Genesis1:1 A kipat cil-in Pasian in vantung le leitung a piangsak hi. 
Genesis1:2 Leitung in limlemel nei loin a awngthawlpi ahi hi. Tuipi tung tengah khua mial bikbek a, tua tui tungah Pasianʼ Kha in na a sem hi." 
Genesis1:3 Pasian in, “Khuavak om hen,” ci hi; tua ciangin khuavak om pah hi." 
Genesis1:4 Pasian in tua khuavak hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi. Pasian in khuamial panin khuavak khen khia hi." 
Genesis1:5 Pasian in khuavak pen “Sun” ci a, khuamial pen “Zan” ci hi. Nitak hong bei-in, zingsang hong tunga, ni khat ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:6 Pasian in, “Tuiteʼ laizang ah van kuumpi om henla, tua van kuumpi in tui le tui kikhensak hen,” ci hi." 
Genesis1:7 Pasian in van kuumpi bawl a, van kuumpi tunga om tuite le van kuumpi nuai-a om tuite a khen hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:8 Pasian in van kuumpi pen “Vantung” ci hi. Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tunga, ni nih ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:9 Pasian in, “Vantungte nuai-a om tuite mun khat ah kikhawm henla, lei keu kidawk hen,” ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:10 Pasian in lei keu pen “Leitung” ci a, a kikaikhawm tuite pen “Tuipi” ci hi. Pasian in tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi." 
Genesis1:11 Pasian in, “Leitung in kung tuamtuamte piangsak henla, tang a nei kungnote, a gah sungah tang a om singgah kungte, amauʼ nam ciatin leitungah piangsak hen,” ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:12 Leitung in kung tuamtuamte piang khiasak a, kungnote in amauʼ nam ciatin tang piangsakin, singkung in a sungah tang a om gahte piangsakin, amauʼ nam ciatciatin piangsak hi. Pasian in tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi." 
Genesis1:13 Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tunga, ni thum ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:14 Pasian in, “Sun le zan a khen dingin vantungah khuavakte om hen; tuate pen pawi hun le khuahun, ni le kumte khen nading hi henla," 
Genesis1:15 leitung khua a vaksak dingin vantungah khuavak hi uh hen,” ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:16 Pasian in khuavak lian nih bawl a, khuavak lian zaw pen sun a uk ding, khuavak neu zaw pen zan a uk dingin bawl a, amah in aksite zong a bawl hi." 
Genesis1:17 Leitungah khua a vaksak ding, sun le zan a uk ding, khuamial panin khuavak a khen khia dingin Pasian in vantungah tuate a koih hi. Pasian in tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi." 
Genesis1:18  
Genesis1:19 Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tunga, ni li ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:20 Pasian in, “Tuite in a nungta ganhing honpite piangsak henla, vantung kantanin leitungah vasate leeng tahen,” ci hi." 
Genesis1:21 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in tuipi ganhing golpite le amau nam ciatin tuipi sungah tampi a pha, nuntakna a nei a gamtang thei ganhing namkim le kha a nei vasa khempeuh amau nam ciatin a piangsak hi. Pasian in tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi." 
Genesis1:22 Pasian in amaute thupha pia a, “Ci pha-in tampi pha-in, tuipi sung dim unla, leitungah vasate tampi pha un,” ci hi." 
Genesis1:23 Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tunga, a ni nga ni ahi hi." 
Genesis1:24 Pasian in, “Nuntakna a nei ganhingte amau nam ciatin leitung in piangsak hen: Innsa, gamsa le a bokvak ganhingte amau nam ciatin piang tahen,” a ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:25 Innsa, gamsa le a bokvak ganhing khempeuh amau nam ciatin Pasian in a piangsak hi. Pasian in tua pen hoih hi, ci-in a mu hi." 
Genesis1:26 Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Eima lim, eimah hong sunin mihing bawl ni. Tuipi ngasate tung, huihlak vasate tung, ganhingte tung le leitung a, a bok vakte tungah ukna neisak ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis1:27 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in ama lim bangin mihing piangsakin, Pasianʼ lim bangin amah a piangsak hi. Amah in numei le pasal a piangsak hi." 
Genesis1:28 Pasian in amaute thupha pia a, Pasian in amaute tungah, “Ci pha-in tampi pha unla, leitung dimin zo un. Tuipi ngasate tung, leitungah a gamtang, a nungtate tungah ukna nei ta un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis1:29 Pasian in, “En un, leitung maitang khempeuh ah a om, tang a piangsak kungno khempeuh le a gah sungah tang a om singkung khempeuh note tungah kong pia khinta hi. Tuate an-in na nei ding uh hi." 
Genesis1:30 Leitung ganhing khempeuhte tung, huihlak vasate tung, leitungah a bok vakte tung, nuntakna hu a neite tungah an dingin kung hing khempeuh kong pia khinta hi,” a ci hi. Tua mah bangin a piang pah hi." 
Genesis1:31 Pasian in a bawl sa khempeuh en a, hoih sa mahmah hi. Nitak hong bei-in zingsang hong tunga, a ni guk ni ahi hi." 
Genesis2:1 Tua ahih ciangin vantung, leitung le a sunga omte kiman khin hi." 
Genesis2:2 Ni sagih ma-in Pasian in a nasepte zo khinta a, ama hih sa nasep khempeuh panin ni sagih ni-in a tawlnga hi." 
Genesis2:3 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in ni sagih ni thupha pia-in siangthosak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh piansak nasepna ama nasep khempeuh panin tua ni-in Pasian a tawlnga hi. 
Genesis2:4 Hihte pen, a kipiansak lai-a vantung le leitung tangthu ahi hi. Topa Pasian in leitung le vantungte a bawl hi." 
Genesis2:5 Topa Pasian in leitungah guah zusak nai lo a, leitang a kho ding mi om lo ahih manin gam sung kungnote lei sungah om nai lo a, lo sung ankungte po khia lo hi." 
Genesis2:6 Tua ciangin leitung panin meii lum kaai to-in, lei maitang khempeuh a buah hunin" 
Genesis2:7 Topa Pasian in leilak pan a leivui tawh mihing bawl a, a nak sungah nuntakna hu sang suk hi. Tua mi pen leitung nuntakna a nei mihing hong suak pah hi." 
Genesis2:8 Topa Pasian in nisuahna lam, Eden ah huan khat bawl hi. Tua lai munah ama bawl sa mipa koih hi." 
Genesis2:9 A deihhuai, nek dinga a hoih singkung nam khempeuh, huan laizang ah nuntakna singkung le a pha le a sia theihna singkung, lei sung panin Topa Pasian in posak hi." 
Genesis2:10 Huan sung a kawtsak dingin Eden nawkin gun khat hong luang a, tua mun panin gun hong kikhenin li hong pha hi." 
Genesis2:11 A masa pen gun a min Pishon hi a, kham a omna, Havilah gambup kimkot ah a luang pen ahi hi." 
Genesis2:12 Tua gam a khamte hoih hi. Tua munah bedolak singnai le onik suang om hi. 
Genesis2:13 A nihna gun min Gihon hi a, Kush gam kimkot ah a luang pen ahi hi." 
Genesis2:14 Assiria gam nisuahna lamah a luang a thumna gun min Hiddekel ahi hi. A lina gun pen Eufratis gun ahi hi. 
Genesis2:15 Topa Pasian in mipa la-in, Eden huan kho-in a kem dingin a koih hi." 
Genesis2:16 Topa Pasian in mipa thu pia a, “Na ututin huan sung singkung gah khempeuh na ne thei ding hi." 
Genesis2:17 Ahih hangin a pha le a sia theihna singkung gah pen na ne kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua na nek ni-in na si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis2:18 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Mipa amah guak a om ding hoih lo hi. Ama ading a kituak a huh ding ka bawlsak ding hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis2:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in gam sung ganhing khempeuh le huihlak vasa khempeuh lei tawh bawl a, mipa in tuate bang a ci hiam ci-in a theih nadingin mipa kiangah tuate a paipih hi. Nuntakna a nei khempeuhte pen mipaʼ cih bangbang a min hi pahpah hi." 
Genesis2:20 Mipa in ganhing nam khempeuh, huihlak vasa khempeuh le gam sung ganhing khempeuh min a vawh hi. Ahih hangin mipa aʼ dinga a kilawm, amah a huh ding khat zong om lo hi." 
Genesis2:21 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in mipa ihmut suak sak mahmah a, ama ihmut kalin a nakguhte khat la-in tua mun pen satak tawh a dimsak hi." 
Genesis2:22 Topa Pasian in mipaʼ tung panin a lakkhiat nakguh pen numei khatin bawl a, mipa kiangah tua nu a paipih hi." 
Genesis2:23 Tua ciangin mipa in, “Tu petpetin hih pen keima guhte le keima sate ahi hi. Amah pen mipa sung panin a kila khia ahih manin ‘Numei’ kici ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis2:24 Tua thu hangin pasal in a nu le a pa nusia-in a zi tawh kigawm a, amau tegel pum khat a bang uh hi." 
Genesis2:25 Mipa le a zi a guaktangin om uh a, maizum lo uh hi." 
Genesis3:1 Tu-in gulpi pen, Topa Pasianʼ bawl sa gamlak ganhing dangte sangin ngiansiam zaw hi. Amah in numei kiangah, “Pasian in, ‘Huan sung singgah khat peuhpeuh ne lo ding,’ hong ci ahi hiam?” ci hi." 
Genesis3:2 Numei in gulpi kiangah, “Huan sung singgahte ka ne thei ding uh hi." 
Genesis3:3 Ahih hangin Pasian in, ‘Huan laizang a om singgah na ne kei ding uh hi, zong na lawng kei ding uh hi. Tua bang hih le-uhcin na si ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:4 Ahih hangin gulpi in numei kiangah, “Na si kei ding uh hi." 
Genesis3:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua singgah na nek ciangun na mitte uh hong vak dinga, a pha le a sia thei-in, Pasian tawh na kibat ding lamtak uh Pasian in thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:6 Tua ahih ciangin singkung a hoihna, mi a pilsak dingin tua a gah a deihhuaina a muh ciangin, a singgah loin a ne hi. Amah in singgah kim khat a pasal pia a, a pasal in zong a ne hi." 
Genesis3:7 A nek khit phetun amau tegel in khua phawk uh a, a guaktangin a om lam uh kithei uh hi. Amaute in theitehte khui tuahin puan silh dingin a bawl uh hi." 
Genesis3:8 A nitak ciangin huan sungah Topa Pasian a hong paina ging amaute in za uh a, Topa Pasianʼ muh loh dingin mipa le a zi, huan sung singte lakah a bu uh hi." 
Genesis3:9 Ahih hangin Topa Pasian in mipa samin ama kiangah, “Koi lai ah om na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:10 Amah in, “Nangma ginna huan sungah ka za a, ka lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka guaktangin om ka hih manin ka bucip hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:11 Amah in, “Na guaktang a na omna kua in hong gen ahi hiam? Na nek loh dinga kong thupiak singgah ne kha na hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Genesis3:12 Mipa in, “Kei tawh a om dinga nong piak numei in singgah hong pia a, keʼn ka ne hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:13 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in numei kiangah, “Bangci a hici gamtat na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in, “Gulpi in kei hong khem a, ka ne hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:14 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in gulpi kiangah, “Nang, hih bangin gamta khin na hih manin, ganhing khempeuhte le gamlak ganhing khempeuhte sangin samsiatna na ngah zaw hi. Na gilpi-in lam na pai dinga, na nuntak sung tawntungin leivui na ne ding hi." 
Genesis3:15 Nang le numei kikal na suanlekhakte le ama suanlekhakte kikalah kilangneihna ka omsak ding hi. Amah in na lutang hong sunim dinga, nang in ama khetul na sunim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:16 Tua ciangin numei kiangah, “Naupaiina ah na gimna nakpi takin ka khangsak dinga, na a sa pipi-in nau na nei ding hi. Ahi zongin na pasal mah na deih dinga, amah in nang tungah hong uk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:17 Tua ciangin mipa kiangah, “Nang in na ziʼ thu mangin, ‘Nang in na ne kei ding hi,’ ci-in nang kong thupiak singgah ne na hih ciangin, nangma hangin leitang in samsiatna ngah hi. Na nuntak tawntung gimpi-in na semin na annek ding na zong ding hi." 
Genesis3:18 Ling le kiakte, nang adingin hong po khiasak dinga, nang in gamlak kungte na ne ding hi." 
Genesis3:19 Lei ah na ciahkik matengin khua-ul kai-in na na sep ciang bekin an na ne ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lei sung panin nang hong kipiangsak a, nang, leivui na hih manin, leivui mah na suakkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis3:20 Mipa in a ziʼ min pen Eve, ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen mihing khempeuhʼ nu ahi hi." 
Genesis3:21 Topa Pasian in mipa le a zi adingin savun puan bawl a, amaute silhsak hi." 
Genesis3:22 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, mipa pen eite khat tawh kibang a, a pha le a sia thei hi. Amah in nuntakna singgah ne-in a hin tawntung khak loh nadingin i vaihawm ding hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis3:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in, amah a kipiansakna leitang a kho dingin Eden Huan panin mipa a sawl khia hi." 
Genesis3:24 Amah in mipa hawl khia hi. Kherub-te le mun khempeuh a nga thei meikuang namsau pen nuntakna singkung lampi a cing dingin Eden Huan nisuahna lamah a koih hi. 
Genesis4:1 Tu-in mipa in ama zi Eve luppih a, amah gai-in Kain nei a, “ Topaʼ huhna tawh mi khat ka ngah khin hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis4:2 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Abel nei leuleu hi. Tu-in Abel, tuu kem pa hi a, Kain, lokho pa ahi hi." 
Genesis4:3 Tua hun sungin Kain in lei pan a piang gah piakna Topaʼ tungah paipih a," 
Genesis4:4 Abel in a tuu hon tacilte le a sa limcite paipih hi. Topa in Abel le ama piakna thusim a," 
Genesis4:5 ahih hangin Kain le ama piakna thusim lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kain heh mahmah a, a mai sia hi." 
Genesis4:6 Topa in Kain tungah, “Bang hangin nang heh a, bang hangin na mai sia ahi hiam?" 
Genesis4:7 Limtakin hih lecin, nang hong kisang lo ding ahi hiam? Limtakin na hih kei leh nang hong hih nuamin mawhna in hong buk a, nang hong uk nuam hi. Ahih hangin nang in tua mawhna na zawh ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis4:8 Kain in a sanggampa Abel kiangah, “Gamlak ah vak ni,” ci hi. Amaute gamlak ah a om ciangin Kain in a sanggampa Abel a that hi." 
Genesis4:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Kain tungah, “Na sanggampa Abel koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka thei kei hi. Kei, ka sanggam a kem pa ka hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Genesis4:10 Topa in, “Bang hangin hici gamtat na hi hiam? Na sanggampaʼ sisan, leilak panin kei tungah hong kiko hi." 
Genesis4:11 Na sanggampaʼ sisan a hup dingin a kam a ka leitang tungah tu-in nang hong kisamsiat hi. 
Genesis4:12 Lo na khawh ciangin nang adingin an hong piangsak nawn lo ding hi. Nang pen a galtai, leitung a a vakvai na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis4:13 Kain in Topaʼ tungah, “Keimah gim hong kipiakna, ka thuak zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Genesis4:14 En in, tu ni-in nangmah in leitung panin kei nong hawl khia a, nang kiang panin kei nong not khia hi. Kei pen a galtai, leitungah a vakvai ka hi dinga, kei hong mu peuhmah in hong that ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis4:15 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Tua bang hi lo ding hi. Khatpeuh in Kain a thah leh tua pa tungah a zah sagihin kithuk ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah a tuak peuh in a thah khak loh nadingin Topa in Kainʼ tungah ciaptehna khat a koih hi." 
Genesis4:16 Tua ciangin Topaʼ omna panin Kain pai khia-in Eden nisuahna lam Nod gam sungah a teeng hi. 
Genesis4:17 Kain in a zi luppih a, amah gai-in Enok a nei hi. Kain in khuapi khat sat a, tua khuapi min dingin ama tapaʼ min tamin Enok a phuak hi." 
Genesis4:18 Enok sung panin Irad suak a, Irad pen Mehujaelʼ pa ahi hi. Mehujael pen Methushaelʼ pa hi a, Methushael pen Lamekʼ pa ahi hi." 
Genesis4:19 Lamek in zi nih nei hi. A khatʼ min Adah hi a, a dang khatʼ min Zillah ahi hi." 
Genesis4:20 Adah in tapa Jabal nei hi. Amah pen puanbukte sungah teengin ganhing a neiteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi. 
Genesis4:21 A sanggampaʼ min Jubal hi a, laiza lasakna le tamngai tumteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi." 
Genesis4:22 Zillah in Tubalkain nei a, sumngo le sik nazat khempeuh a bawlteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi. Tubalkainʼ sanggamnu pen Naamah ahi hi." 
Genesis4:23 Lamek in a zite kiangah, “Adah le Zillah aw, ka aw ngai un. Lamekʼ zite aw, ka thugen ngai un. Kei hong liamsak manin mi khat, kei hong sat manin khanglai mi khat ka that khin hi." 
Genesis4:24 Kain a kithah manin a zah sagihin kithukkik ahihleh, Lamek a kithah manin a zah sawm sagih le sagihin kithukkik taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis4:25 Adam in a zi luppih leuleu hi. Amah in tapa khat nei a, a min Seth ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kain in Abel that ahih manin Abelʼ tangin Pasian in kei adingin naupang khat hong sehsak hi,” amah in ci hi." 
Genesis4:26 Seth in zong tapa khat nei a, ama min Enosh ci hi. Tua hun a kipanin mite in Topa bia-in a min lawh ding kipan ta uh hi." 
Genesis5:1 Hih pen Adamʼ suanlekhakteʼ laibu ahi hi. Pasian in mi a piansakin, amah in Pasian tawh a kisunin a bawl hi." 
Genesis5:2 Amah in numei le pasal a piangsak hi. Amaute a kipiansakin amah in amaute, “Mi,” ci a, amaute thupha a pia hi." 
Genesis5:3 Adam kum za le kum sawm thum a phak khit ciangin, amah a sun tapa khat nei a, Seth ci-in a min a phuak hi." 
Genesis5:4 Seth a suah khit ciangin Adam kum za giat sung nungta lai hi. Amah in tanu le tapa dang zong a nei hi. 
Genesis5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Adamʼ nuntak hun sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm thum hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:6 Seth kum za le kum nga a phak ciangin Enosh kici tapa khat a nei hi. 
Genesis5:7 Enosh a suah khit ciangin Seth kum za giat le kum sawm thum nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:8 Tua ahih ciangin Sethʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm le kum nih hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:9 Enosh kum sawm kua a phak ciangin, amah in Kenan kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis5:10 Kenan a suah khit ciangin Enosh kum za giat le kum sawm le kum nga nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:11 Tua ahih ciangin Enoshʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum nga hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:12 Kenan kum sawm sagih a phak ciangin, Mahalalel kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis5:13 Mahalalelʼ suah khit ciangin Kenan kum za giat le kum sawm li nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Kenanʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:15 Mahalalel kum sawm guk le nga a phak ciangin Jared kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis5:16 Jaredʼ suah khit ciangin Mahalalel kum za giat le kum sawm thum nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mahalalelʼ khan sungteng pen kum za giat le kum sawm kua le kum nga hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:18 Jared kum za le kum sawm guk le kum nih a phak ciangin Enok kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis5:19 Enokʼ suah khit ciangin Jared kum za giat nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:20 Tua ahih ciangin Jaredʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm guk le kum nih hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:21 Enok kum sawm guk le nga a phak ciangin, Methuselah kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis5:22 Methuselahʼ suah khit ciangin kum za thum sung Enok le Pasian kikhawl a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:23 Tua ahih ciangin Enokʼ khan sungteng pen kum za thum le kum sawm guk le kum nga ahi hi. 
Genesis5:24 Enok pen Pasian tawh kikhawl hi. Enok kimu nawn lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in amah la hi. 
Genesis5:25 Methuselah kum za le kum sawm giat le kum sagih a phak ciangin Lamek kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis5:26 Lamekʼ suah khit ciangin Methuselah kum za sagih le kum sawm giat le kum nih nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:27 Tua ahih ciangin Methuselahʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm guk le kum kua hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:28 Lamek kum za le kum sawm giat le kum nih a phak ciangin tapa khat nei a," 
Genesis5:29 ama min Noah phuakin, “ Topa in a samsiat sa leitang panin hih pa in i nasepna le i gimnate ah eite hong khah khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis5:30 Noahʼ suah khit ciangin Lamek kum za nga le kum sawm kua le kum nga nungta a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis5:31 Tua ahih ciangin Lamekʼ khan sungteng pen kum za sagih le kum sawm sagih le kum sagih hi a, tua ciangin amah si hi." 
Genesis5:32 Noah kum za nga a phak khit ciangin Shem, Ham le Jafeth, tapa thum a nei hi." 
Genesis6:1 Leitungah mite tam dingin hong kipanin, amauʼ sung panin tanute hong suah ciangin," 
Genesis6:2 van a om mite in leitung miteʼ tanute hoih sa uh ahih manin a deih bangun amaute zi-in a la uh hi. 
Genesis6:3 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mihingte sungah ka Kha om paisuak nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte a mawh hi khinta a, kum za le kum sawm nih sung kisik nading hun kipia lai bek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis6:4 Van a om mite in leitung mihing tanute luppihin, amaute in ta a neih hun laitak hitaleh tua khit hitaleh, amauʼ suanlekhak Nefilim a kici mite leitungah om hi. Hih mite pen tang lai-a mi thahat, mi minthangte ahi uh hi." 
Genesis6:5 Leitungah mihing a gitlohna a liatna le mihing lungsim ngaihsutna peuhmah a sia ahih ngitngetna thu Topa in mu hi. 
Genesis6:6 Leitungah mihing a bawl pen Topa khial kisa a, tua thu in ama lungsim dahsak hi." 
Genesis6:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in, “Ka piansak sa mihing, ganhing, a bokvak ganhingte le huihlak vasate, leitung panin ka phiat khia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute ka bawl ka khial hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis6:8 Ahih hangin Noah in Topaʼ maipha mu hi. 
Genesis6:9 Noahʼ tangthu hih bang ahi hi. Noah a thuman mi khat hi a, ama khang ah paubaang lo hi. Noah pen Pasian tawh kikhawl hi." 
Genesis6:10 Noah in tapa thum, Shem, Ham le Jafeth a nei hi." 
Genesis6:11 Tu-in Pasianʼ muhna ah leitung sia a, leitungah ngongtatna kidim hi." 
Genesis6:12 Pasian in leitung en a, a kisiat gawp mu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah mi khempeuh a sia-in a gamta lo kuamah om lo hi." 
Genesis6:13 Pasian in Noahʼ kiangah, “Mi khempeuh beisak ding ka khensat zo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ hangin leitungah ngongtatna kidim hi. En in, leitung tawh amaute ka susia khawm ding hi." 
Genesis6:14 Nang adingin noah-taaksing tawh teembaw khat bawl in. Teembaw sungah a deite bawl inla, a sung le a pua kultal tui tawh zut in." 
Genesis6:15 Na bawl nading dan hih bang ahi hi: Teembaw a sauna pi za li le sawm nga, a zaina pi sawm sagih le nga, a sanna pi sawm li le nga hi ding hi." 
Genesis6:16 Teembaw adingin kongkhak khat bawl inla, tua tung pi khat le alang ciangah zawh bawl in. A pangah teembaw kongkhak bulh in. A dawl nuainung, a dawl nihna le a dawl thumnate bawl in." 
Genesis6:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh, en in, leitungah a om nuntak husanna a nei khempeuh a susia dingin leitungah tuiciin ka tungsak ding hi. Leitung a a om khempeuh si ding hi." 
Genesis6:18 Ahih hangin nang tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi. Teembaw sungah nang na hong pai ding hi. Nang, na tapate, na zi le na tapateʼ zite tawh na pai khawm ding uh hi." 
Genesis6:19 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh nang tawh a nungta dingin nam khat ah nih ciat teembaw sungah na paipih ding hi. Tuate pen a nu le a pa hi ding hi. 
Genesis6:20 Vasate amauʼ nam ciatin, ganhingte amauʼ nam ciatin, leilak ah a bokvak ganhingte peuhmah amauʼ nam ciatin, a suakta dingin nam khat ah nih ciat nang kiangah hong pai ding uh hi." 
Genesis6:21 Nek theih an nam khempeuh zong la inla, khol in. Tuate pen nang le amaute adingin an ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis6:22 Noah zong tua bangmahin gamta a, Pasianʼ thupiak khempeuh a hih hi." 
Genesis7:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Noah kiangah, “Nang le na innkuan pih mi khempeuh teembaw sungah pai un. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih khang mite sung panin nang bek a thuman na hihna ka hong thei hi." 
Genesis7:2 Ganhing siangtho nupa kop sagih, ganhing a siang lo nupa kop khat," 
Genesis7:3 huihlak vasate zong nupa kop sagih, leitungah amauʼ nam a manthan loh nadingin la in." 
Genesis7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh tuzawh ni sagih sungin sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi. Ka bawl sa nuntakna a nei peuhmah leitung panin ka phiat khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis7:5 Noah in zong Topaʼ thupiak khempeuh a hih hi. 
Genesis7:6 Leitungah tuiciin a tun lai-in Noah kum za guk pha hi. 
Genesis7:7 Tuiciin a pelh dingin Noah, a tapate, a zi le a tapateʼ zite teembaw sungah pai uh hi." 
Genesis7:8 Ganhing siangthote, a siang lo ganhingte, vasate, leitung a a bokvak peuhmah," 
Genesis7:9 a nupa kopin Pasian in Noah a thupiak sa bangin teembaw sungah Noah tawh pai uh hi. 
Genesis7:10 A ni sagih ni-in leitungah tuiciin tung hi. 
Genesis7:11 Noahʼ nuntak kum za guk kum, a kha nihna, tua kha ni sawm le sagih ni-in van a om a thuk mahmah tuikhukte puakkhamin, vantung tawlette kihong hi." 
Genesis7:12 Sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung leitungah guah zu hi. 
Genesis7:13 Tua ni teekteekin Noah le a tapate Shem, Ham, Jafeth le Noahʼ zi le a tapateʼ zi thumte, amau tawh teembaw sungah a tum uh hi." 
Genesis7:14 Amaute le gamsa peuhmah amauʼ nam ciat, innsa khempeuh amauʼ nam ciat, leitungah a bokvak peuhmah amauʼ nam ciat le vasa peuhmah amauʼ nam ciat, vasa namkim amauʼ nam ciatin a tum uh hi." 
Genesis7:15 Nuntak husanna a nei khempeuh a nupa kop ciatin Noah tawh teembaw sungah a pai uh hi. 
Genesis7:16 Pasian in Noah tungah a thupiakna bangin nuntakna a nei khempeuh teembaw sungah a lut khit ciangin Topa in Noah kong a khaknelh hi. 
Genesis7:17 Leitungah tuiciin ni sawm li sung om den hi. Tui tam semsem a, teembaw laam to-in, leitungʼ tungah khangin sang to lai hi." 
Genesis7:18 Tui khang to-in leitungah tam mahmah hi. Tui tungah teembaw laam hi. 
Genesis7:19 Leitungah tui khangkhang ahih manin mual sangte khempeuh tuumcip hi. 
Genesis7:20 Mual liante tungah tui om to lai a, tuate tungah pi sawm nih le nih thuk-in tuumcip hi." 
Genesis7:21 Leitungah a nungta khempeuh, vasate, innsate, gamsate, a honhonin leitungah a hon om ganhing khempeuh le mi khempeuh a si uh hi." 
Genesis7:22 Leitungah a om, nuntakna hu a nei peuhmah a si uh hi." 
Genesis7:23 Mihing, ganhing, a bok vakte le huihlak vasate, leitung a om nuntakna a nei peuhmah amah in phiat khia hi. Leitung panin amaute kiphiat khia hi. Noah le amah tawh teembaw sunga a om teng bek a suakta uh hi." 
Genesis7:24 Ni za le ni sawm nga sung leitungah tui om hi. 
Genesis8:1 Ahih hangin Pasian in Noah le amah tawh teembaw sungah a om gamsate le innsate a phawk hi. Pasian in leitungah huih nungsak a, tui a kiam hi." 
Genesis8:2 Tui thukte le vantung tawlette kikhak a, vantung pan a guahte kikhawlsak hi." 
Genesis8:3 Leitung panin tuite kiamkiam hi. Ni za le ni sawm nga a phak ciangin tuite kiam khinta hi. 
Genesis8:4 Kha sagihna, tua kha ni sawm le sagih ni-in Ararat mual tungah teembaw kinga hi." 
Genesis8:5 A kha sawmna ciang dong tuite kiamkiam lai hi. Kha sawmna, tua kha ni khat ni-in mual dawnte kidawk hi." 
Genesis8:6 Ni sawm li a cin ni ciangin Noah in ama bawl sa teembaw tawlet hong a," 
Genesis8:7 va-ak khat khah hi. Leitung panin tuite a keu mateng leeng kawikawi hi. 
Genesis8:8 Tua ciangin, leitungah tuite a kiam khin nai hiam cih a theih nadingin amah in vakhu khat khah hi." 
Genesis8:9 Ahih hangin, leitung khempeuh ah tuite om lai-in, a khawl nading mu lo ahih manin teembaw ah hong ciahkik hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut zanin a vakhu man a, teembaw sungah paipih hi." 
Genesis8:10 Amah in ni sagih sung ngakin, teembaw panin a vakhu khah leuleu hi." 
Genesis8:11 Nitak ciangin ama kiangah a vakhu hong ciahkik a, oliv teh a tukkhiat thak khat a muk ah petin hong tunpih hi. Tua ahih ciangin leitung panin tuite kiam khinta hi, ci-in Noah in a thei hi." 
Genesis8:12 Tua ciangin ni sagih sung ngak leuleu-in a vakhu khah hi. Tua vakhu pen ama kiangah hong ciahkik nawn lo hi. 
Genesis8:13 Noah a khan kum za guk le a kum khatna, a kha masa, tua kha ni masa ni-in leitung panin tuite keu hi. Noah in teembaw khuhna la khia a, khuadak hi. Lei maitang na keu ta hi." 
Genesis8:14 A kha nihna, tua kha ni sawm nih le sagih ni-in leitung keu hi." 
Genesis8:15 Tua ciangin Pasian in Noah kiangah," 
Genesis8:16 “Nang le na zi, na tapate le na tapateʼ zite, teembaw sung panin paikhia un." 
Genesis8:17 Nang tawh a om khawm nuntakna a nei khempeuh - vasate, ganhingte le leitung a a bokvak peuhmah - leitungah tampi suakin, pungin leitungah a tam theih nadingin paikhiatpih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis8:18 Tua ahih ciangin Noah paikhia a, a tapate le ama zi le a tapateʼ zite mah tawh paikhia khawm hi." 
Genesis8:19 Ganhing khempeuh, a bokvak khempeuh, vasa khempeuh, leitung a a gamtang khempeuh a inn kuankuanin teembaw panin a paikhia uh hi." 
Genesis8:20 Tua ciangin Noah in Topa ading biakna tau khat lam a, a siangtho ganhing khempeuh le a siangtho vasa khempeuh lak pan khat ciat la-in, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna a pia hi." 
Genesis8:21 Topa in a namtui gimnam a zak ciangin, a lungsim sungah, “Mihingʼ gamtatna hangin leitang ka samsiakik ngei nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingʼ lungsim ngaihsutna pen a tangval lai panin a gilo hi mawk hi. Tu-a ka hih bangin nuntakna a nei khempeuh zong ka susia ngei nawn kei ding hi." 
Genesis8:22 Leitung a om lai tengin, lo pawi hun le anlak hun, a vot le a sa, khuakhal le phalbi, sun le zan bei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:1 Pasian in Noah le a tapate thupha pia a, amaute tungah, “Pung unla, tampi pha-in, leitung dim un." 
Genesis9:2 Note pen leitung ganhing khempeuh, huihlak vasa khempeuh, lei lak ah a bokvak khempeuh le tuipi ngasa khempeuh in hong kihta-in hong zahtak ding uh hi. Noteʼ khut sungah tuate hong kipia hi." 
Genesis9:3 A nungta a gamtang peuhmah, note adingin an hi ding hi. Kung hing khempeuh ka hong piak bangin na khempeuh zong note kong pia hi." 
Genesis9:4 A nuntakna ahi a sisan pen a sa tawh na nekhawm kei bek ding uh hi. 
Genesis9:5 Mi khatpeuh in hong thah leh ama tungah sihna dan ka pia ding hi. A hong that ganhing peuhmah ka that dinga, a mipihte a that mi peuhmah gim ka pia ding hi." 
Genesis9:6 Mi a that peuhmahte pen, midangte in amah that ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama lim bangin mi bawl hi." 
Genesis9:7 “Note, pungin khang unla, leitungah tampi tak piang khia-in, tampi pha-in khang un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:8 Tua ciangin Pasian in Noah le amah tawh a om a tapate kiangah," 
Genesis9:9 “En un, note le noteʼ khit a na suanlekhakte uh le," 
Genesis9:10 note tawh a om nuntakna a nei peuhmah, vasate, innsate, note tawh a om leitung gamsa peuhmah, teembaw sung panin a paikhia zahzah peuhmah tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak hi." 
Genesis9:11 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh, tuiciin tawh susiakik ngei nawn loin, leitung a susia dingin tuiciin ka tunsakkik ngei nawn loh nadingin note tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:12 Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Hih pen, kei le note le note tawh a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh kikalah mailam khang tawntung ah thuciamna lim ahi hi." 
Genesis9:13 Meii sungah ka sakhituihup ka kaisak a, tua pen kei le leitung kikalah thuciamna lim hi ding hi." 
Genesis9:14 Vantungah meii kong kaisak ciangin meii sungah sakhituihup a kimuh leh," 
Genesis9:15 kei le note le nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding hi. Tuite pen, nuntakna a nei khempeuh a susia ding tuiciin suakkik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Genesis9:16 Meii sungah sakhituihup a om ciangin keimah in ka en dinga, kei le leitungah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh tawntung thuciamna ka phawk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:17 Pasian in Noah kiangah, “Hih pen, kei le leitungah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh tawh ka kipsak sa thuciamna lim ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:18 Teembaw sung panin a paikhia Noahʼ tapate, Shem, Ham le Jafeth ahi hi. Ham pen Kanaanʼ pa ahi hi." 
Genesis9:19 Hih Noahʼ tapa thumte panin leitung buppi mi tawh hong kidim hi. 
Genesis9:20 Noah pen lo kho masa pa hi a, amah in leenggui lo khat a bawl hi." 
Genesis9:21 Amah in leenggahzu ne-in kham a, a puanbuk sungah bangmah silh loin a lum hi." 
Genesis9:22 Kanaanʼ pa Ham in a pa guaktangin a omna mu a, a pualam a om a sanggam nihte kiangah a gen hi." 
Genesis9:23 Tua ciangin Shem le Jafeth in puan khat la-in amau tegelʼ liangko tuakah baang uh a, a nung leh lamun pai-in a pa uhʼ guaktang omna a khuh uh hi. Amaute in maingat lo uh ahih manin a pa uh guaktang omna mu lo uh hi." 
Genesis9:24 Noah a zukhamna panin a pilvan ciangin ama tungah a tapa Hamʼ gamtatna thei a," 
Genesis9:25 amah in, “Kanaan in samsiatna ngah ta henla, a sanggamteʼ sila hi tahen." 
Genesis9:26 Topa ka Pasian in Shem thupha pia henla, Kanaan, ama sila hisak hen." 
Genesis9:27 Pasian in Jafeth pungsak henla, Shemʼ puanbukte sungah amah tengsak hen. Kanaan ama sila hisak hen,” a ci hi." 
Genesis9:28 Tuiciin a tun khit ciangin Noah kum za thum le kum sawm nga nungta hi. 
Genesis9:29 Noahʼ khan sungteng pen kum za kua le kum sawm nga hi a, tua ciangin amah a si hi." 
Genesis10:1 Hihte pen Noahʼ tapa Shem, Ham le Jafeth-teʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi. Tuiciin tun khit ciangin amau sung panin tapate hong piang hi." 
Genesis10:2 Jafethʼ tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan le Tiras ahi hi." 
Genesis10:3 Gomerʼ tapate: Ashkenaz, Rifath le Togarmah ahi hi." 
Genesis10:4 Javanʼ tapate: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim le Dodanim ahi hi." 
Genesis10:5 Hihte pen tuipi gei-a teeng miteʼ pulepa ahi uh hi. Amauteʼ leitang ah amauʼ kampau ciat zangin, a beh, a minamin a om uh hi." 
Genesis10:6 Hamʼ tapate: Kush, Egypt, Put le Kanaan ahi hi." 
Genesis10:7 Kushʼ tapate: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah le Sabteka ahi hi. Raamahʼ tapate: Sheba le Dedan ahi hi." 
Genesis10:8 Kush in Nimrod kici tapa khat nei a, amah pen leitungah a vanglian masa mi ahi hi." 
Genesis10:9 Amah pen Topaʼ mai ah a minthang sabeng pa zong ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “ Topa in Nimrod bangin a minthang sabeng pa hong suaksak tahen,” kici hi." 
Genesis10:10 Ama kumpi gam kipatna Babel, Erek le Akkad hi a, tuate khempeuh Shinar gam sungah om hi." 
Genesis10:11 Tua gam panin Assiria gam sungah amah pai-in Nineveh, Rehoboth-Ir, Kalah le" 
Genesis10:12 Nineveh le Kalah kikal a om Resen khuapite a sat hi. Tua Kalah khuapi pen khuapi lian ahi hi. 
Genesis10:13 Egypt pen Lud mite, Anam mite, Lehab mite, Naftuh mite," 
Genesis10:14 Pathru mite, Kasluh mite (Filistia miteʼ pianna) le Kaftor miteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi." 
Genesis10:15 Kanaan pen ama sung pan a suak masa Sidon, Heth," 
Genesis10:16 le Jebus mite, Amor mite, Girgash mite," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv mite, Arki mite, Sin mite," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad mite, Zemari mite le Hamath miteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Kanaan mite kizelthang hi." 
Genesis10:19 Kanaan miteʼ gam pen Sidon panin kipanin Gerar lam manawhin Gaza ciang dong ban a, Sodom lam panin Gomorrah, Admah le Lasha gei-a Zeboiim ciang dong ban hi." 
Genesis10:20 Hihte pen a innkuan, a kampau, a leitang, a minamin Hamʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi." 
Genesis10:21 Eber mi khempeuhʼ pianna pupi, Jafethʼ u, Shemʼ sung panin zong tate hong piang hi." 
Genesis10:22 Shemʼ tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud le Aram ahi hi." 
Genesis10:23 Aramʼ tapate: Uz, Hul, Gether le Mash ahi hi." 
Genesis10:24 Arpakshad in Shelah kici tapa khat nei a, Shelah in Eber kici tapa khat mah nei hi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberʼ sung panin tapa nih suak a, khatʼ min pen Peleg ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama hunin leitung kikhen hi. A sanggampaʼ min pen Joktan ahi hi." 
Genesis10:26 Joktan pen Almodad, Shelef, Hazarmaveth, Jerah," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah," 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofir, Havilah le Jobabʼ pianna pa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh Joktanʼ tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis10:29 Ofir, Havilah le Jobabʼ pianna pa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh Joktanʼ tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis10:30 Amauʼ teenna gam pen Mesha panin kipanin Sefar lamah nisuahna gam mual tung dong ban hi. 
Genesis10:31 Hihte pen a innkuan, a kampau, a leitang, a minamin Shemʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi." 
Genesis10:32 Hihte pen Noahʼ tapate innkuan, a khangsimna tawh kizui-in amauʼ minam ahi hi. Tuiciin tun khit ciangin hihte tung panin leitungah minamte kizelthang hi." 
Genesis11:1 Tua laitakin leitung buppi in kampau khat le kammal tawmno bek nei hi. 
Genesis11:2 Amaute nisuahna lamah lal uh a, Shinar gam sungah zanglei mun khat mu-in tua lai ah a teeng uh hi." 
Genesis11:3 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Hong pai un, leiseek seekin limtakin hal ni,” kici uh hi. Amaute in suang dingin leiseek nei uh a, a buan dingin kultal tui nei uh hi." 
Genesis11:4 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hong pai un, leitung buppi ah eite i kithehthang gawp loh nadingin ei adingin khuapi khat bawlin, a dawn in vantung a ban ding tausang khat lamin, eiteʼ minthan nading khat bawl ni,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis11:5 Tua ciangin mihingteʼ lam sa khuapi le tausangpi a en dingin Topa hong pai suk hi. 
Genesis11:6 Topa in, “En un, amaute minam khat hi uh a, amaute khempeuh in kampau khat nei uh hi. Hih pen amauʼ sep ding a kipatna bek ahi hi. Tu-in sep dinga amauʼ vaihawmte amau adingin hi thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Genesis11:7 Hong pai un, amau thugen khatlekhat a kitheih loh nadingun eite pai sukin amauʼ kampau va kitukalhsak ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis11:8 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua lai panin leitung khempeuh ah amaute thehthang a, a khuapi bawl uh a tawp uh hi." 
Genesis11:9 Tua ahih ciangin a min Babel kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tua munah leitung khempeuhʼ kampau kitukalhsak hi. Tua lai mun panin Topa in leitung khempeuh ah amaute a thehthang hi. 
Genesis11:10 Hihte pen Shemʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi. Shem kum za khat a phak, tuiciin tun khit kum nih ciangin, amah in Arpakshad kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis11:11 Arpakshad a suah khit ciangin Shem kum za khat nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:12 Arpakshad kum sawm thum le kum nga a phak khit ciangin, amah in Shelah kici tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis11:13 Shelah a suah khit ciangin Arpakshad kum za li le kum sawm thum nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:14 Shelah kum sawm thum a phak khit ciangin Eber kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:15 Eberʼ suah khit ciangin Shelah kum za li le kum sawm thum nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:16 Eber kum sawm thum le kum li a phak khit ciangin amah in Peleg kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:17 Peleg a suah khit ciangin Eber kum za li le kum sawm thum nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:18 Peleg kum sawm thum a phak khit ciangin amah in Reu kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:19 Reu a suah khit ciangin Peleg kum za nih le kum kua nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:20 Reu kum sawm thum le nih a phak khit ciangin amah in Serug kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:21 Serug a suah khit ciangin Reu kum za nih le kum sagih nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:22 Serug kum sawm thum a phak khit ciangin amah in Nahor kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:23 Nahor a suah khit ciangin Serug kum za nih nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:24 Nahor kum sawm nih le kua a phak khit ciangin amah in Terah kici tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis11:25 Terah a suah khit ciangin Nahor kum za le kum sawm le kum kua nungta lai a, tanu le tapa dang nei lai hi." 
Genesis11:26 Terah kum sawm sagih a phak khit ciangin amah in Abram, Nahor le Haran a nei hi." 
Genesis11:27 Tu-in Terahʼ suanlekhakte hih bang ahi hi. Terah pen Abram, Nahor le Haranʼ pa hi a, Haran pen Lotʼ pa ahi hi." 
Genesis11:28 Ama pa Terah a sih ma-in ama suahna gam ahi, Khaldea gam Ur khua ah Haran si hi." 
Genesis11:29 Abram le Nahor in zi nei uh hi. Abramʼ zi min Sarai hi a, Nahorʼ zi min Milkah hi a, Milkah pen Iskahʼ pa Haranʼ tanu ahi hi." 
Genesis11:30 Tu-in Sarai ciing a, ta nei lo hi." 
Genesis11:31 Terah in ama tapa Abram le Haranʼ tapa, ama tupa ahi Lot le a tapa Abramʼ zi ahi a monu Sarai samin, Kanaan gam sungah a pai dingin Khaldea gam Ur khua panin amaute a paikhia khawm uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute Haran a tun uh ciangin tua munah a teeng uh hi." 
Genesis11:32 Terahʼ khan sung kum za nih le kum nga hi a, Haran ah Terah a si hi." 
Genesis12:1 Topa in Abram kiangah, “Na gam, na beh le na paʼ inn panin nang kong lah ding gamah pai in." 
Genesis12:2 Minam lian in kong bawl dinga, thupha hong pia-in, na min liansak ding ka hih manin midangteʼ adingin thupha na hi ding hi." 
Genesis12:3 Nang thupha hong piate thupha ka pia dinga, nang hong samsiate ka samsia ding hi. Nangʼ thupha ngah bangin thupha a ngah nadingun leitung midang khempeuh in hong ngen ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis12:4 Tua ciangin Topaʼ gen sa bangin Abram pai a, Lot in zong a zui hi. Haran panin a pai khiatin Abram kum sawm sagih le nga a pha hi." 
Genesis12:5 Abram in ama zi Sarai, a sanggampaʼ tapa Lot, amauʼ kaihkhop sa neihsa khempeuh le Haran a amauʼ neih sila khempeuh samin, Kanaan gamah a pai dingin amaute ding khia uh a, tua gam a tung uh hi." 
Genesis12:6 Abram in tua gam sung nawkin Shekhem mun, Moreh tawsaw phung dong a tung hi. Tua hunin tua lai ah Kanaan mite teeng lai hi." 
Genesis12:7 Tua ciangin Abramʼ tungah Topa kilang a, “Na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitang ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in ama tunga kilang Topa adingin biakna tau khat a bawl hi." 
Genesis12:8 Tua ciangin Bethel panin nisuahna lam mualah amah kinkikin a puanbuk lam a, nitumna lamah Bethel, nisuahna lamah Ai om hi. Tua lai munah zong amah in Topa adingin biakna tau khat bawl a, Topaʼ tungah thu a ngen hi." 
Genesis12:9 Abram in a khualzin zom lai a, Negeb gam lam manawhin a pai lai hi." 
Genesis12:10 Kanaan gam sungah kialpi tung hi. Tua kialpi nasia ahih manin tawl khat sung a om dingin Egypt ah Abram a pai suk hi. 
Genesis12:11 Egypt gam a tum ding ciangin amah in a zi Saraiʼ kiangah, “Nang pen nupi melhoih khat na hihna ka thei hi." 
Genesis12:12 Egypt mite in nang hong muh ciangin amaute in, ‘Hih nu ama zi hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kei hong that ding uh a, ahi zongin amaute in nang hong nungtasak ding uh hi." 
Genesis12:13 Nang pen ka sanggamnu ci lehang, nangma hangin kei adingin thu hong hoih zaw dinga, nangma hangin ka suakta thei kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis12:14 Egypt gam sungah Abram a tun ciangin Egypt mite in tua nupi a mel hoih sa mahmah uh hi. 
Genesis12:15 Faroʼ uliante in amah a muh uh ciangin Faroʼ kiangah amah phat uh hi. Faroʼ inn sungah tua nupi kila hi. 
Genesis12:16 Tua nuʼ hangin amah in Abram limbawl mahmah hi. Amah in tuu, bawngtal, latal, pasal nasem, numei nasem, la nu le kalaoh-te a pia hi." 
Genesis12:17 Ahih hangin Topa in Abramʼ zi Saraiʼ huhau-in Faro le a innkuanpihte gimna lianpi thuaksak hi. 
Genesis12:18 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in Abram samin, “Bang hangin hih bangin kei hong bawl na hi hiam? Amah na zi ahihna bang hangin kei kiangah hong gen lo na hi hiam?" 
Genesis12:19 Ka zi dingin amah ka lak theih nadingin, ‘Amah ka sanggamnu hi,’ bang hangin hong ci na hi hiam? Tu-in hih lai ah na zi om hi. Amah la inla pai un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis12:20 Faro in amah tawh kisai-in a mite tungah thu a pia hi. Amaute in a zi le ama neih khempeuh tawh lampi ah a kha khia uh hi. 
Genesis13:1 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt panin Abram, a zi, ama neih khempeuh le Lot tawh zong Negeb gam lamah a pai to hi." 
Genesis13:2 Abram in ganhing, ngun le kham hau mahmah hi." 
Genesis13:3 Amah Negeb gam pan kipanin Bethel ciang dong, a kipat cil-in a puanbuk omnasa mun Bethel le Ai kikal," 
Genesis13:4 a masa-a biakna tau khat a bawlnasa munah khualzinin a paisuak hi. Tua lai munah Abram in Topaʼ tungah thu a ngen hi. 
Genesis13:5 Abram tawh a pai khawm Lot in zong tuu hon, gan hon le puanbukte nei hi." 
Genesis13:6 Tua ahih manin mun khat ah a teeng khawm dingin leitang in amau tegel vak zo lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gan neihsate tam mahmah ahih manin amau tegel teeng khawm thei lo uh a," 
Genesis13:7 Abramʼ gancingte le Lotʼ gancingte kitawng thei zel hi. Tua hun laitakin Kanaan mite le Perez mite tua gamah teeng lai uh hi. 
Genesis13:8 Tua ciangin Abram in Lotʼ kiangah, “Nang le keiʼ kikal, nangʼ gancingte le keiʼ gancingteʼ kikalah kitotna omsak kei ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite beh khat ihi hi." 
Genesis13:9 Na mai ah gam buppi om hi lo ahi hiam? Keiʼ kiang panin nangmah paikhia tawm in. Nang in veilam na lak leh, kei tak lamah ka pai ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong, nang in taklam na lak leh, kei veilamah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis13:10 Lot zong khuadak a, Jordan gunkuam mun khempeuh in limtakin tui ngahin Topaʼ huan hitaleh, Zoar lam a Egypt gam tawh hitaleh kibang hi, ci-in mu hi. Hih pen Topa in Sodom le Gomorrah a suksiat hun ma ahi hi." 
Genesis13:11 Tua ahih ciangin Lot in ama adingin Jordan gunkuam khempeuh teel a, nisuahna lamah a pai hi. Tua ahih manin amaute kikhen tuak uh hi." 
Genesis13:12 Kuam sunga khuapiteʼ lakah Lot teengin, a puanbukte Sodom ciang dongah khinin a om laitakin Kanaan gam sungah Abram teeng hi." 
Genesis13:13 Tua laitakin Sodom mite migilo hi a, Topaʼ tungah nakpi takin a khialte ahi hi." 
Genesis13:14 Ama kiang panin Lot a paikhiat khit ciangin Topa in Abramʼ kiangah, “Khuadak to inla, nangma omna panin leilu lam, leitaw lam, nisuahna lam le nitumna lam en in." 
Genesis13:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh na muh gam khempeuh nang le na suanlekhakte kong pia paisuak ding hi. 
Genesis13:16 Na suanlekhakte, leitung leivui zahin tampi ka phasak ding hi. Mi khatpeuh in leitung leivui a sim theih leh na suanlekhakte zong kisim thei ding hi." 
Genesis13:17 Ding inla, gamdung gamvai kantanin pai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangʼ tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis13:18 Tua ahih ciangin Abram in a puanbuk khinin, Hebron gam sung, Mamre tawsawte gei ah hong pai-in a teeng hi. Tua lai munah Topa adingin biakna tau khat a bawl hi." 
Genesis14:1 Shinar kumpipa Amrafel, Ellasar kumpipa Ariok, Elam kumpipa Khedorlaomer le Goiim kumpipa Tidal teʼ hun lai-in," 
Genesis14:2 hih kumpite in Sodom kumpipa Bera, Gomorrah kumpipa Birsha, Admah kumpipa Shinab, Zeboiim kumpipa Shemeber le Bela (Zoar) kumpipa, kumpi ngate va sim uh hi." 
Genesis14:3 Hih kumpi ngate in kipawlna bawlin Siddim Kuam (Ci Tuipi) ah a galkapte uh gawm uh hi. 
Genesis14:4 Amaute, kum sawm le kum nih sung Khedorlaomerʼ khutnuai ah om uh a, ahih hangin a kum sawm le kum thumna ciangin amaute in lehdo uh hi." 
Genesis14:5 A kum sawm le kum lina ciangin Khedorlaomer le amah tawh a kipawl kumpite hong pai-in sehnel gamgi Elparan ciang dongah Ashteroth-karnaim gam a Refaim, Ham gam a Zuzim, Shaveh-kiriathaim gam a Emim," 
Genesis14:6 le amauʼ gam Seir Mual tunga Hori mite hong zo uh hi. 
Genesis14:7 Tua ciangin amaute kiheikikin Enmishpat (Kadesh) ah hong pai uh a, Amalek miteʼ gam khempeuh le Hazazon-tamar gam a teeng Amor mite zong zo uh hi." 
Genesis14:8 Tua ciangin Sodom kumpipa, Gomorrah kumpipa, Admah kumpipa, Zeboiim kumpipa le Bela (Zoar) kumpipa kuan khia uh a, amaute kipawlin Siddim Kuam ah" 
Genesis14:9 Ela kumpipa Khedorlaomer, Goiim kumpipa Tidal, Shinar kumpipa Amrafel le Ellasar kumpipa Ariok tawh kido uh a, kumpi li kigawm le kumpi nga kigawm kido uh hi." 
Genesis14:10 Siddim Kuam pen kultal khukte tawh kidim a, Sodom le Gomorrah kumpite a tai uh ciangin pawl khat tua khukte sungah kia uh a, a om lai teng mual tungah tai uh hi." 
Genesis14:11 Tua ahih ciangin galte in Sodom le Gomorrah-teʼ na khempeuh le a an khempeuh uh la-in a ciah uh hi. 
Genesis14:12 Amaute in Sodom a, a teeng Lot (Abramʼ sanggampaʼ tapa) le a na khempeuh zong la-in a paikhia uh hi." 
Genesis14:13 Tua ciangin a suakta mi khat hong pai-in, Hebru mi Abramʼ kiangah hong gen hi. Amah pen Eshkol le Anerʼ sanggampa ahi hi. Amor mi hi a, Mamre tawsawte gei ah teeng hi. Hih mite pen Abramʼ kipawlpihte ahi hi." 
Genesis14:14 Ama behpa salin a kimatna Abram in a zak ciangin, ama inn sunga a suak, a kihilh sa ama mi za thum le sawm le giatte makaihin Dan ciang dong a delhin a pai uh hi." 
Genesis14:15 Amah in zan hunin ama pawlte, amah le a nasemte, amaute a do dingin khenin amaute zo a, Damaskas leilu lam Hobah ciang dong a delh uh hi." 
Genesis14:16 Tua ciangin amah in Lot le ama na khempeuh, numeite le a galmatte tawh a ciah pihkik hi." 
Genesis14:17 Abram in Khedorlaomer kumpipa le a pawlte a zawhna panin a ciahkik ciangin amah a dawn dingin Sodom kumpipa Shaveh Kuam (Kumpipaʼ Kuam) ah na pai hi. 
Genesis14:18 Tua ciangin Jerusalem kumpipa Melkhizedek in an le leenggahzu hong pusuah hi. Amah pen Sangpen Pasianʼ siampi zong ahi hi. 
Genesis14:19 Amah in thupha pia a, “Vantung le leitung a bawl, Sangpen Pasian in Abram thupha pia hen!" 
Genesis14:20 Na galte na khut sungah a hong pia Sangpen Pasian in thupha ngah hen,” a ci hi. Abram in na khempeuh sawm-ah-khat ama tungah a pia hi." 
Genesis14:21 Sodom kumpipa in Abramʼ kiangah, “A mite hong pia inla, ahih hangin a nate nang adingin la in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis14:22 Ahih hangin Abram in Sodom kumpipa kiangah, “Vantung le leitung a bawl Sangpen Topa Pasian tungah ka kiciam khinzo hi." 
Genesis14:23 Nangmah in, ‘Abram ka hausak hi,’ ci kha ding na hih manin mimkhau ahi a, khedap khau ahi a, nangma aʼ ahi na khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin ka la kei ding hi." 
Genesis14:24 Tangvalteʼ nek sate le kei tawh hong kuan miteʼ tanh dingte lobuang bangmah ka la kei ding hi. Aner, Eshkol le Mamre-te amauʼ tanh ding pia in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:1 Hih thute khit ciangin mang sungah Topaʼ thu Abramʼ tungah hong tunga, “Abram aw, lau kei in. Keimah in lauhuaina panin nang ka hong hu dinga, na thaman lian mahmah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:2 Ahih hangin Abram in, “ Topa Pasian aw, bang hong pia ding na hi hiam? Ta nei loin ka om lai hi. Ka inn a luah ding pa pen Damaskas mi Eliezer ahi hi." 
Genesis15:3 Ta nong pia kei a, ka inn sunga a suak sila in keima gamh a luah ding hi ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:4 Tua ciangin ama tungah Topaʼ thu hong tunga, “Hih mipa pen nangma gamhluah pa hi lo ding hi. Nangma tapa mahmah na gamhluah pa hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:5 Amah in a pua lamah paipih a, “Vantung lam enin aksite sim in; na sim thei hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Na suanlekhakte, tua mah bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:6 Amah in Topa um a, tua a upna hangin Pasian in mihoihin a sang hi, ci-in Topa in a ciamteh hi." 
Genesis15:7 Tua ciangin ama kiangah, “Hih leitang na neih nadingin nangma tungah a hong pia dingin Khaldea gam Ur khua panin a hong paikhiatpih pa pen keimah na Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:8 Ahih hangin amah in, “Topa Pasian aw, keimah in tua leitang ka neih nading bangci theih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:9 Amah in, “Kum thum a pha bawngla khat, kum thum a pha keel nu khat, kum thum a pha tuutal khat, vakhu khat le kawl vakhu khanglai khat hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:10 Amah in Pasian kiangah hihte khempeuh paipih a, tuate phel nih ciat suahin, phel khat pen a phel dang khat tungah a koih ciat hi. Ahih hangin vasate phel nih suah lo hi." 
Genesis15:11 Sasial ne vasate tua sate tungah hong tuk suk ciangin Abram in tuate a hawl khia hi. 
Genesis15:12 Ni a tum ciangin Abram a ihmut nak suah mahmah a, khua mial bikbek a, lau mahmah hi." 
Genesis15:13 Tua ciangin Topa in Abram kiangah, “Na suan na khakte amauʼ leitang ahi lo gam dangah salin om ding uh a, tua lai ah amaute kum za li sung nakpi takin gimna thuak ding ahihna thu a kitel theihna thei in." 
Genesis15:14 Ahi zongin na a sepsak uh minamteʼ tungah thukhenna ka tungsak dinga, tua khit ciangin neihsa tampi tawh amaute paikhia ding uh hi." 
Genesis15:15 Nang na hih leh, nuam takin na pu na pate kiang na zuan dinga, khan kicingin hong kivui ding hi." 
Genesis15:16 Khang lina ciangin hih lai munah amaute hong paikik ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Amor miteʼ mawhna kicing nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis15:17 Ni tumin khua a mial khit ciangin, en in, hih sate kikalah mei beel khu le a kuang meivak a pai hi." 
Genesis15:18 Tua ni-in Topa in Abram tawh thuciamna khat bawl a, “Na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitang, Egypt gun panin a lian gunpi ahi Eufratis gun ciang dong," 
Genesis15:19 Ken mite, Kenaz mite, Kadmon mite," 
Genesis15:20 Hit mite, Perez mite, Refaim mite," 
Genesis15:21 Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Girgash mite le Jebus miteʼ leitang kong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:1 Tua hunin Abramʼ zi Sarai in ta nei nai lo hi. Amah in Hagar min nei Egypt mi sila numei khat nei hi. 
Genesis16:2 Sarai in Abramʼ kiangah, “Tu-in en in, Topa in ka ta neih ding hong khaktan hi. Ka sila numeiʼ kiangah lum in. Ama sung panin keimah in ta a nei ding ka hi kha ding hi,” a ci hi. Abram in Saraiʼ thu mang hi." 
Genesis16:3 Tua ahih ciangin, Kanaan leitang ah Abram kum sawm a teen khit ciangin Abramʼ zi Sarai in Egypt mi a sila numei Hagar la-in a pasal Abramʼ tungah zi-in a pia hi." 
Genesis16:4 Amah in Hagar luppih a, Hagar gai hi. Amah a gai lam a kitheih ciangin kiphasakin a tonu simmawh bawl hi." 
Genesis16:5 Tua ciangin Sarai in Abramʼ kiangah, “Keima tungah a man lo a hong kibawlna nangma tungah hong tung tahen! Na kawi dingin ka sila numei kong pia a, amah a gai khitna a kitheih ciangin kei hong simmawh hi. Topa in nang le keiʼ kikalah thu hong khen tahen,” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:6 Ahih hangin Abram in Saraiʼ kiangah, “En in, na sila numei, nangma khut sungah om hi. Na ut bangin ama tungah bawl in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Sarai in amah gawtbawl a, Hagar zong a tai khia hi." 
Genesis16:7 Topaʼ vantungmi in Shur paina lampi a cik ahi, sehnel gam a ciktui gei khat ah amah a mu hi." 
Genesis16:8 Amah in, “Saraiʼ sila numei Hagar aw, koi pan hong pai a, koi ah pai ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka tonu Saraiʼ kiang panin a tai khia ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:9 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Na tonuʼ kiangah ciahkik inla, ama tungah ki-ap in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:10 Topaʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Na suanlekhakte nakpi takin tamsak ding ka hih manin amaute kisim zo lo ding hi,” zong ci lai hi." 
Genesis16:11 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “En in, nau na paii a, tapa khat na nei ding hi. Ama min Ishmael na phuak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nangma thuakna hong mu khin hi." 
Genesis16:12 Amah pen la a zual nai lo bang dinga, amah in mi khempeuh langpangin mi khempeuh in amah langpang ding hi. Ama behte khempeuh a langpangin om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama tungah thu a gen Topa pen, “Nang, a mu thei Pasian khat na hi hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keimah in Pasian mu khin taktakin, amah ka muh khit ciangin hing lai hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis16:14 Tua ahih ciangin tua tuikhuk pen Beer-lahairoi kici a, Kadesh le Bered kikalah om hi." 
Genesis16:15 Hagar in Abram tawh tapa khat nei hi. Abram in Hagarʼ sung panin a suak ama tapaʼ min dingin Ishmael a phuak hi. 
Genesis16:16 Hagar in Abram tawh a neih Ishmael a suah ciangin Abram kum sawm giat le kum guk a pha ta hi. 
Genesis17:1 Abram kum sawm kua le kum kua a phak ciangin ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Kei, Vanglian Pasian ka hi hi. Hoihtakin gamta inla, paubaang kei in." 
Genesis17:2 Nang tawh thuciamna ka bawl dinga, nang tampi tak kong phasak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:3 Tua ciangin Abram kun suk hi. Pasian in ama kiangah," 
Genesis17:4 “En in, nang tungah hih thuciamna kong bawl hi: Nang pen minam honpiteʼ pa na hi ding hi." 
Genesis17:5 Na min Abram hi nawn lo dinga, Abraham hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam honpiteʼ pa-in nang kong bawl khin hi." 
Genesis17:6 Keimah in suanlekhak tampi kong neisak ding hi. Nang sung panin minamte ka piangsak dinga, nang sung panin kumpite hong piang khia ding hi." 
Genesis17:7 “Nang le nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakte tungah Pasian hih nading tawntung thuciam nadingin kei le nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakteʼ tungah amauʼ khang tawntungin ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi. 
Genesis17:8 Nangma tung le nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakte tungah tawl khat na omna Kanaan leitang khempeuh na neih tawntung dingun kong pia dinga, kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:9 Pasian in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Nang le nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakte in zong ka thuciamna na zuih ding uh nong thukim ding uh ahi hi." 
Genesis17:10 Hih pen nang le nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakteʼ zuih ding keima thuciamna ahi hi: Noteʼ lak panin pasal peuhmah a vun ki-at ding hi. 
Genesis17:11 Noteʼ vun dawn ki-at dinga, tua pen kei le noteʼ kikalah thuciamna lim khat hi ding hi." 
Genesis17:12 Noteʼ lak panin ni giat a pha pasal peuhmah a vun ki-at ding hi. Noteʼ khang tawntungin pasal peuhmah, noteʼ inn sunga suak hitaleh, noteʼ ta ahi lo, gamdang mi khatpeuh kiang panin na sum uh tawh na lei uh hitaleh" 
Genesis17:13 na inn sunga suak hitaleh, na sum tawh a kilei pa hitaleh a vun ki-at tuak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tawntung thuciamna ahi keima thuciamna pen nomauʼ satak sungah om ding hi." 
Genesis17:14 A vun dawn a ki-at lo pasal peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawl khia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in keima thuciamna palsat hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:15 Tua ciangin Pasian in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Na zi Sarai ahihleh, ama min Sarai na ci nawn kei dinga, ama min Sarah hi ding hi." 
Genesis17:16 Amah thupha ka pia dinga, amah tawh tapa khat kong pia ding hi. Amah thupha ka pia dinga, amah, minamteʼ nu hi ding hi. Mihingteʼ kumpite ama sung pan hong piang khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:17 Tua ciangin Abraham mai kun sukin nui a, a mahmah tungah, “Kum za a pha pasal khat in ta nei ding ahi hiam? Kum sawm kua a pha Sarah in ta nei ding ahi hiam?” kici hi." 
Genesis17:18 Abraham in Pasianʼ kiangah, “Ishmael hong nungtasak peuh lecin,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:19 Pasian in, “Hi lo hi. Na zi Sarah in nang adingin tapa khat nei dinga, ama min Isaac na phuak ding hi. Ama khit cianga a suanlekhakte adingin tawntung thuciam nadingin ka thuciamna amah tawh ka kipsak ding hi." 
Genesis17:20 Ishmael ading na ngetna ahihleh ka za khin hi. En in, amah thupha pia-in ka pungsak dinga, tampi tak ka phasak ding hi. Amah pen ulian sawm le nihteʼ pa hi dinga, minam lian khatin ka bawl ding hi." 
Genesis17:21 Ahih hangin, kum kik tu hun ciangin Sarahʼ sung panin nang aʼ dinga hong suak ding Isaac tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis17:22 Amah tawh a kiho a man khit ciangin Abrahamʼ kiang panin Pasian pai khiato hi. 
Genesis17:23 Tua ciangin Abraham in a tapa Ishmael le ama sum tawh a lei hitaleh ama inn sunga suak hitaleh a sila, ama inn sunga om miteʼ lak panin pasal khempeuh samin, Pasian in ama tunga a gen sa bangin tua ni mahmah in amauteʼ vun dawn a atsak hi." 
Genesis17:24 Ama vun dawn a ki-atin Abraham kum sawm kua le kum kua pha ta hi. 
Genesis17:25 Ama vun dawn a ki-atin a tapa Ishmael kum sawm le kum thum a pha hi. 
Genesis17:26 Tua ni mahmah in Abraham le a tapa Ishmael a vun uh ki-at hi. 
Genesis17:27 Ama inn sunga pasal khempeuh, inn sunga suak hitaleh gamdang miteʼ tung panin sum tawh a kilei mite hitaleh, amah tawh a vun uh ki-at khawm hi." 
Genesis18:1 Mamre tawsaw gei-a Abraham a omna ah Topa hong kilang hi. Abraham a puanbuk kong gei ah sun nisat laitakin tu-in a om laitakin 
Genesis18:2 a khuadak toh leh, ama mai ah mi thum na ding hi. Amah in amaute a muh ciangin amaute a dawn dingin puanbuk kong panin va tai a, leilak ah kun sukin," 
Genesis18:3 “Ka tote aw, nong hehpihna-un na nasem pa hong kheng kei un." 
Genesis18:4 Na nasem paʼ kiang hong tung khin na hih khit buangun na thahatkik nadingun an tawm khat ka va lak kikal sungin tui tawm khat lasakin na khe uh sil unla, sing nuai ah khawl un; tua khit ciangin paisuak un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “Na cih bangin hong hih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis18:5  
Genesis18:6 Tua ciangin puanbuk sunga Sarah kiangah Abraham pai mengmeng a, “Annel hoihte lawh thum hong bawl mengmeng inla, meek manin mohin hong bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:7 Abraham zong bawng hon lakah tai-in bawng no a dawng a hoih khat la a, manlang takin a na bawl pah dingin a nasem pa tungah a pia hi." 
Genesis18:8 Tua ciangin amah in, bawngnawi-thaukhal, bawngnawi le a min sa bawngsa la-in amauʼ mai ah a lui hi. Amaute in a nek laitakun sing nuai ah amauʼ kiangah amah a ding hi." 
Genesis18:9 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Na zi Sarah koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amah in, “Puanbuk sungah om hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:10 Amaute khat in, “Tu zawh kha kua khit ciangin kong paikik taktak dinga, na zi Sarah in tapa khat nei ding hi,” a ci hi. Sarah in ama nung puanbuk kongah na ngai hi." 
Genesis18:11 Tu-in Abraham le Sarah teek ta uh a, a kum uh ham hi. Sarah a numei ngeina teng tawp ta hi." 
Genesis18:12 Tua ahih ciangin Sarah a mahmah nui-in, “Kei ka teek khit, ka topa zong a teek khitin tua bang hi thei nawn ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:13 Topa in Abrahamʼ tungah, “Bang hangin Sarah nui-in, ‘Tu-in kei teek ka hih ciangin ta nei takpi ding ka hi hiam?’ ci ahi hiam?" 
Genesis18:14 Na khat peuhpeuh Topa adingin haksa lua ahi hiam? A kiseh sa tu zawh kha kua ciangin nang kiangah kong paikik dinga, Sarah in tapa khat nei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:15 Ahih hangin Sarah in nialin, “Ka nui kei hi,” ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah lau hi. Amah in, “Hi lo hi, na nui mah hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:16 Tua ciangin tua mun panin mite paikhia a, amaute in Sodom lam en uh hi. Amauʼ pai nading lampi ah a kha dingin Abraham in amaute va zui hi." 
Genesis18:17 Topa in a lungsimah, “Abraham a lian a thahat minam suakin, leitung minam khempeuh in ama thupha ngah bangin thupha a ngah nadingun hong ngen ding hi, ci-in thei ahih manin, tu-a ka hih ding thu Abrahamʼ tungah im ding ka hi hiam?" 
Genesis18:18  
Genesis18:19 Im kei ning. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Abrahamʼ tunga a ciam sa thu a tunsak theih nadingin ama khit a a tate le a innkuanpihte in thuman le thutangin nasepna tawh Topaʼ thupiakte a zuih theih nadingun a hilh dingin amah ka teel khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:20 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Sodom le Gomorrah a kimawhsakna lianin, amauteʼ khialhna nasia mahmah kici ahih manin," 
Genesis18:21 kei tunga hong kigen bangin amaute gamta takpi uh hiam, ci-in a thei dingin ka pai suk ding hi. Tua bang ahih kei leh zong keʼn ka va thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:22 Tua ahih ciangin tua panin mite kihei-in Sodom lamah pai uh a, ahi zongin Topaʼ mai ah Abraham ding lai hi." 
Genesis18:23 Tua ciangin Abraham in hong naihin, “Thuman mite, migilote tawh susia khawm takpi ding na hi hiam?" 
Genesis18:24 Tua khuapi sungah thuman mi sawm nga bang om leh, tua sunga om thuman mi sawm ngateʼ hangin khah loin tua khua susia teitei ding na hi hiam?" 
Genesis18:25 Thuman mite, migilote tawh a kibat nadingin migilote tawh thuman mite thah khop ding, hi thei ding ahi hiam? Tua pen hi thei lo ding hi. Leitung khempeuh Thukhen pa a manin gamta lo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:26 Topa in, “Sodom khuapi sungah thuman mi sawm nga ka muh leh, amauteʼ hangin tua khua buppi ka khah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:27 Abraham in thu gen leuleu a, “En in, leivui le vut bang ahi lel keimah in Topaʼ tungah thu kong gen ngamna hong maisak in." 
Genesis18:28 Thuman mi sawm nga sung panin nga om kei leh? Tua nga a om loh manin khuapi buppi na susia veve ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Tua sungah sawm li le nga ka muh nakleh ka susia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:29 Ama kiangah thu genkikin, “Tua sungah sawm li bang kimu leh,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Sawm liteʼ hangin ka hih kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:30 Tua ciangin amah in, “Topa heh kei in, thu kong gen lai ding hi. Tua lai ah sawm thum bang kimu leh,” ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Sawm thum ka muh leh ka hih kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:31 Amah in, “En in, Topa tungah thu kong gen ngam lailaina hong maisak in. Tua lai ah sawm nih bang kimu leh,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Sawm nihteʼ hangin ka susia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:32 Tua ciangin amah in, “Topa heh kei in, hih khatvei bek thu hong gensak lai in. Tua lai ah sawm bang kimu leh,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Sawmteʼ hangin ka susia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis18:33 Abrahamʼ tungah a thugen ding a man khit ciangin ama pai nading ah Topa pai a, Abraham zong ama inn ah a ciahkik hi." 
Genesis19:1 vantungmi nihte Sodom ah nitakin hong tunga, Sodom khuakulh kongpi ah Lot na tu hi. Lot in amaute a muh ciangin, amaute a dawn dingin dinga, leilak ah a mai ngatin kun a," 
Genesis19:2 “Ka tote aw, kong thum hi. Na nasem paʼ inn lamah hong kihei-in hong giak unla, na khete uh sil un. Tua ciangin zingsangin tho baihin na pai nading lam uh ah pai pan un,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Hi lo hi; khua lakah ka giak ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis19:3 Ahih hangin amah in amaute nakpi takin kun ahih manin ama lamah kihei uh a, ama inn ah a lut uh hi. Amah in amaute adingin an bawl a, silngo sawh loh anlum emsak a, amaute in a ne uh hi." 
Genesis19:4 Ahih hangin amauteʼ lup ma-in Sodom khua mite, a moi a hamin mi khempeuh in a inn umcih uh hi." 
Genesis19:5 Amaute in Lot sam uh a, “Tu nitak a nang kiangah hong tung mite koi ah om ahi hiam? Amauʼ taw ka luk theih nadingun ko kiangah amaute hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis19:6 Lot, kongkhak pua ah mite kiangah pai-in kong leh khak a," 
Genesis19:7 “Ka sanggamte aw, tua banga na gitloh gamtat loh nading uh kong thum hi." 
Genesis19:8 En un, ta nungak nih ka nei hi. No kiangah amaute hong pai khiatpihsak unla, na ut bangun amaute tungah gamta un. Hih miteʼ tungah bangmah gamta kei bek un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, keima inn sung hong tung khin uh ahih manin ka hut ding kisam hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis19:9 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Tai khia in. Kote kiangah hong peem pak a, tu-in nang thukhen hong kineih ding na hi hiam? Tu-in amaute sangin nang kong siat bawl zaw ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in nakpi takin Lotʼ lam hong neh uh a, kongkhak a phukham zah dongin hong neh uh hi." 
Genesis19:10 Ahih hangin mi nihte in amauʼ khut hong zanin inn sung amauʼ kiangah Lot paipihin kong khak uh hi. 
Genesis19:11 Amaute in inn kongkhak ah a om mi a lian a neute a mit uh tawsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kongkhak a zawtzawt hangun mu zo lo uh hi. 
Genesis19:12 Tua ciangin mi nihte in Lot kiangah, “Hih lai ah tanau dang na nei hiam? Makte, tapate, ahih kei leh khua sunga nangʼ mi peuhpeuh hih mun panin paikhiatpih in." 
Genesis19:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite a kimawhsakna thu Topaʼ tungah tung khin a, a susia dingin Topa in hong sawl khin ahih ciangin hih khua a susia ta ding ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis19:14 Tua ahih ciangin Lot pai khia-in a tanute a teenpih dingte kiangah, “Manlangin hih khua panin paikhia un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih khuapi a susia ding hi ta hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah pen a mak dingte tungah a ciamnui bang lel hi." 
Genesis19:15 Zingsang khuavak ciangin vantung mite in, “Khuapi gimpiakna sungah kaang tum kha ding na hih uh ciangin kinawh inla, hih lai-a om na zi le na tanute la in,” ci-in Lot sawl hamtang uh hi." 
Genesis19:16 Ahih hangin amah lungka-in om lai veve hi. Ahi zongin Topa in ama tungah hehpihna nei ahih manin, mite in amah le a zi le a tanu nihte a khut uh tawh manin, amaute in amah paikhiat pihin khua pua lamah koih uh hi." 
Genesis19:17 Amaute in a paikhiatpih khit uh ciangin, “Na nuntak nadingun tai un. Nunghei kei unla, kuam sungah zong khawl kei un. Note hong kaang tum kha ding ahih manin mual tungah tai to un,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis19:18 Ahi zongin Lot in amaute tungah, “Hi lo hi, ka tote aw;" 
Genesis19:19 en un, noteʼ muhna ah na nasem pa in maipha mu zo a, ka nuntakna nong hutna uh ah migitna lianpi kei tungah nong lak khin uh hi. Ahih hangin mual tung gamla ahih manin ka tun ma-in siatna in kei hong pha-in ka si ding hi." 
Genesis19:20 En un, gal a om khuapi, tai nadingin nai a, khuapi neu khat ahi hi. Tua lai ah hong taisak un - khuapi neu khat hi lo ahi hiam? tua hileh ka suakta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis19:21 Amah in ama kiangah, “En in, na gen sa khuapi ka lumlet loh nading, hih maipha zong nang kong pia hi." 
Genesis19:22 Kinawh inla, tua lai ah tai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai ah nang na tun mateng keʼn bangmah ka hih thei kei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min Zoar kici hi." 
Genesis19:23 Zoar ah Lot a tun ciangin tua lai ah ni suak khinta hi. 
Genesis19:24 Tua ciangin Topa in vantung panin Sodom le Gomorrah khuate tungah kaat le meikuang zusak hi. 
Genesis19:25 Amah in tua khuapite, kuamte khempeuh, khuapite sunga mi teengte khempeuh le leitung a a po khempeuh a susia hi." 
Genesis19:26 Ahih hangin a nung a om Lotʼ zi nunghei a, amah ci khuam a suak hi." 
Genesis19:27 Topaʼ mai-a a dinnasa munah zingsang tungin Abraham va pai hi. 
Genesis19:28 Sodom le Gomorrah le kuamte khempeuh lam nga sukin khuadak a, leitang khu pen, meiphual pi khu bangin a kah to a mu hi." 
Genesis19:29 Pasian in kuam sunga khuapite a suksiat lai-in, amah in Abraham phawk a, amah in Lotʼ teenna khuapite a suksiat ciangin tua bang a suksiatna sung panin Lot sawl khia ahih manin a suakta ahi hi." 
Genesis19:30 Tu-in Zoar panin Lot paikhia to-in a tanu nihte tawh mual tungah a teeng hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zoar ah a teen ding lau hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tanu nihte tawh suanghawm sung khat ah a teeng uh hi. 
Genesis19:31 A u pen in a nau tungah, “I pa lah teek ta a, leitung ngeina bangin eite hong luppih ding pasal khat zong om lo hi." 
Genesis19:32 Hong pai in; i pa leenggahzu khamsak ni; i pa tawh suanlekhak i kizopsak theih nadingin amah tawh lum khawm ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis19:33 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nitakin a pa uh leenggahzu khamsak uh hi. A unu pai-in a pa tawh lum hi. A tanu a lup lam hitaleh a thawh lam hitaleh amah in phawk lo hi. 
Genesis19:34 A zing ciangin a u in a nau tungah, “En in, zan zanin i pa tawh ka lum hi. Tu nitakin zong amah leenggahzu khamsak leuleu ni. Tua ciangin nang pai inla, i pa tawh suanlekhak i kizopsak theih nadingin amah tawh lum khawm in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis19:35 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nitakin zong a pa uh leenggahzu khamsak uh hi. A nau pai-in amah tawh lum hi. A tanu a lup lam hitaleh a thawh lam hitaleh amah in phawk lo hi. 
Genesis19:36 Tua ahih ciangin Lotʼ tanu tegel in a pa uh tawh naupaii uh hi. 
Genesis19:37 A u in tapa khat nei-in a min Moab phuak a, amah pen tu hun a Moab miteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi." 
Genesis19:38 A nau in zong tapa khat nei-in a min Benammi phuak a, amah pen tu donga Ammon miteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi." 
Genesis20:1 Mamre panin Negeb gamah Abraham pai suk a, Kadesh le Shur kikal Gerar ah tawl khat sung a teeng hi." 
Genesis20:2 Abraham in a zi Sarah pen, “Ka sanggamnu hi,” ci hi. Gerar kumpipa Abimelek in mi sawlin Sarah samsak hi." 
Genesis20:3 Ahih hangin zanin mang sungah Abimelek kiangah Pasian pai a, ama kiangah, “En in, na lak sa numeiʼ hangin nang a si ding na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah, mi khatʼ zi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:4 Ahi zongin Abimelek in amah zuan nai lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Topa aw, nang in midik pa that ding na hi hiam?" 
Genesis20:5 A mahmah in kei kiangah, ‘Amah, ka sanggamnu ahi hi,’ hong ci hi lo ahi hiam? A numei mahmah in zong, ‘Amah, ka sanggampa ahi hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin lungsim kisuang het loin a gamta ka hi a, khial ka kisa kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:6 Tua ciangin Pasian in a mang sungin ama kiangah, “Hi hi, lungsim kisuanna om loin hih bangin na gamtatna thu ka thei a, kei tungah na khialh loh nadingin a hong kem pa kei mahmah ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin nang, amah kong lawngsak kei hi." 
Genesis20:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mipaʼ zi piakik in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah, kamsang khat hi a, amah in nang adingin thu hong ngetsak dinga, nang na nungta ding hi. Ahih hangin nang in tua numei na piakkik kei leh nang le na mi khempeuh na sih taktak ding uh thei in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:8 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Abimelek tho baih a, a nasemte samin hih thute khempeuh amaute kiangah a gen hi. Amaute nak lau mahmah uh hi." 
Genesis20:9 Tua ciangin Abimelek in Abraham samin ama kiangah, “Bang hangin ko tungah hong hici gamtat na hi hiam? Kei le ka kumpi gam sungah khialhna lianpi khat nong tut nadingin nangʼ tungah bang khialhna nei ka hi uh hiam? Hih dinga kilawm lo nate keiʼ tungah nong hih hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:10 Tua ciangin Abimelek in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Hih banga na gamtat nadingin bang ngaihsun na hi hiam?” ci lai hi." 
Genesis20:11 Abraham in, “Hih lai munah Pasian zahtakna om het lo hi. Ka ziʼ hangin amaute in kei hong that ding hi, ci-in ngaihsun kha ka hih manin hih bangin a gamta ka hi hi." 
Genesis20:12 Tua tham loin a taktakin amah ka sanggamnu mah ahi hi. Pa kikhat, nu tuam ka hi uh a, amah ka teenpih ahi hi." 
Genesis20:13 Pasian in ka paʼ inn panin hong pai khiatsak ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Hih pen keiʼ tunga nong hih ding na migitna ahi hi: I paina peuhpeuh ah kei pen ka sanggampa hi, hong ci in,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:14 Tua ciangin Abimelek in tuu le bawngtalte, sila numei le sila pasalte la-in Abraham pia a, ama tungah a zi Sarah a piakik hi." 
Genesis20:15 Abimelek in, “En in, na mai ah ka leitang om hi. Nangmah in hoih na sakna munah teeng in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:16 Sarahʼ kiangah, “En in, na sanggampa tungah ngun tang tul khat ka pia khin hi. Nang tawh a om mi khempeuhʼ mai ah nangma dikna a kilatna ahi hi. Mi khempeuhʼ mai ah nang a manin hong kibawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis20:17 Tua ciangin Abraham in Pasianʼ tungah thu ngen a, Pasian in Abimelek a damsak hi. Amaute in ta a neih theih nadingin a zi le a sila numeite zong a damsak hi." 
Genesis20:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Abrahamʼ zi Sarahʼ hangin Abimelekʼ innkuanʼ naubu khempeuh khakcipsak khin hi. 
Genesis21:1 A gen sa bangin Topa in Sarahʼ tungah thupha pia a, a gen sa bangin Sarahʼ tungah Topa in hih hi." 
Genesis21:2 Sarah gai a, ama tunga Pasian in a gen sa hunin a teek zawhin Abraham tawh tapa khat nei hi." 
Genesis21:3 Abraham in Sarah tawh a neih ama tapaʼ min dingin Isaac a phuak hi. 
Genesis21:4 Pasian in ama tunga a thupiak sa bangin amah in ni giat a phak ciangin a tapa Isaac a vun a at hi. 
Genesis21:5 A tapa Isaac a suah ciangin Abraham kum za pha hi. 
Genesis21:6 Sarah in, “Pasian in kei adingin nuamin nuihzak nading hong bawlsak khin hi. A za peuhmah in nuamin hong nuih pih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:7 Amah in, “Sarah in nau nawi pia ding ci-in kua in Abrahamʼ tungah gen ngei ding ahi hiam? Ahi zongin a teek khitin amah tawh tapa khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:8 Naupang khang a, nawi tawh hong kikhen ta hi. Isaac nawi tawh a kikhen ni ciangin Abraham in pawi lianpi khat bawl hi." 
Genesis21:9 Ahih hangin, Abraham tawh a neih Egypt mi Hagarʼ tapa in ama tapa Isaac a ciamnuih bawlna Sarah in a mu hi." 
Genesis21:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Hih sila numei a tapa tawh lawn khia in; bang hang hiam cih leh sila numeiʼ tapa in ka tapa Isaac tawh gamhluah khawm thei lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:11 Ama tapaʼ hangin Abrahamʼ tungah thu nuam het lo hi. 
Genesis21:12 Ahih hangin Pasian in Abrahamʼ tungah, “Tangvalpa le na sila numeiʼ hangin lungkim loin om kei in. Sarah in nangʼ tunga hong gen peuhmah ama hong gen bangin gamta in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaac tawh na suanlekhakteʼ min kilo ding hi." 
Genesis21:13 Sila numeiʼ tapa zong nangma ta mah ahih manin, minam khatin ka bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:14 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Abraham tho baihin, an le tuithawl la-in Hagar pia a, ama liangko tungah naupang tawh suanin a sawl khia hi. Amah paikhia a, Beer-sheba gam sungah a vak kawikawi hi." 
Genesis21:15 Thawl sunga tui a bei ciangin amah in sawlbawk nuai khat ah naupang lawn hi. 
Genesis21:16 Tua ciangin amah pai-in a hoih khop khat a gamla, thal lot khat tan bangah a ta nungngatin a tu suk hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Naupangʼ sih hong musak kei in,” a ci hi. Amah nungngatin a tut laitakin naupang nakpi-in a kap hi." 
Genesis21:17 Pasian in naupangʼ kahna aw a za hi. Pasianʼ vantungmi in vantung panin Hagar sam a, ama kiangah, “Hagar aw, bang in hong lungkhamsak ahi hiam? Lau kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang a omna munah a kahna awging Pasian in za hi." 
Genesis21:18 Dingin naupang la inla, na khut tawh kip takin len in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam lian khatin amah ka bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:19 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama mit haksak a, amah in tuikhuk khat a mu hi. Amah pai-in tui tawh tuithawl dimin naupang a dawnsak hi." 
Genesis21:20 Pasian in tua naupang ompih a, amah khangto hi. Amah gamlak ah teeng a, thal lot siampa khat hong suak hi." 
Genesis21:21 Paran gam sungah amah teeng hi. A nu in Egypt gam panin ama ading zi khat a la hi. 
Genesis21:22 Tua hun laitakin Abimelek le a galkap mangpa Fikol in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Na sepna khempeuh ah Pasian in nang hong ompih hi." 
Genesis21:23 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kei hitaleh ka tate hitaleh ka suanlekhakte hitaleh tungah a man lopi-in hong bawl loin, nang tungah thuman tak tawh kong gamtat bangin keima tung le tawl khat na omna leitang tungah nong gamtat nadingin Pasian tawh kei tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:24 Abraham in, “Ka kiciam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:25 Abimelekʼ nasemte in a suh sa tuikhuk tawh kisai thu Abraham in a lungkim lohna Abimelekʼ kiangah a gen ciangin," 
Genesis21:26 Abimelek in, “Kua in hih hiam ka thei kei hi. Nang nong gen kei a, keimah in tu ni dong ka za nai kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:27 Tua ahih ciangin Abraham in tuu le bawngtalte la-in Abimelek pia a, tua mi nihte in thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi." 
Genesis21:28 Abraham in a tuu hon sung panin tuunu no sagih tuam koih hi. 
Genesis21:29 Abimelek in Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Hih na koihtuam tuunu no sagihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:30 Amah in, “Keimah in hih tuikhuk ka tawhna thu ah nang in keima adingin teci na hih theih nadingin nangmah in ka khut sung panin hih tuunu no sagihte na la ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis21:31 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun Beer-sheba kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau tegel tua munah thu kiciam uh hi. 
Genesis21:32 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Beer-sheba ah thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi. Tua khit ciangin Abimelek le a galkap mangpa Fikol, Filistia miteʼ leitang ah ciahkik uh hi." 
Genesis21:33 Abraham in Beer-sheba ah makeng kung khat suan a, tua lai munah Tawntung Pasian, Topa a bia hi." 
Genesis21:34 Filistia miteʼ leitang ah Abraham, sau veipi sung peemta-in a om hi." 
Genesis22:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Pasian in Abraham ze-et a, ama kiangah, “Abraham,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:2 Amah in, “Na it, na tapa neihsun Isaac, la inla, Moriah gamah pai in. Tua lai mun a nang kiangah kong gen ding mual khat tungah meihal biakpiakna-in amah hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:3 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Abraham tho baih a, a la tutphah vawhin, ama nasem tangval nih le a tapa Isaac a paipih hi. Amah in meihal biakpiak nadingin sing ek a, ama tunga Pasianʼ gen sa munah a pai hi." 
Genesis22:4 A ni thum ni ciangin Abraham khuadak to-in a gamla ah tua mun a mu hi. 
Genesis22:5 Tua ciangin Abraham in a nasemte kiangah, “Hih lai ah la tawh na om un. Kei le tangvalpa hua lamah pai-in Pasian ka va bia ding uh a, note kiangah ka hong paikik ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:6 Abraham in meihal biak nading sing la-in a tapa Isaacʼ tungah suan a, amah in a khut sungah mei le temta a tawi hi. Tua bangin amau tegel pai khawm uh hi." 
Genesis22:7 Isaac in a pa Abrahamʼ kiangah, “Pa aw,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing, ka ta,” a ci hi. Amah in, “En in, mei le sing om hi. Ahih hangin meihal biakpiak nading tuuno koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:8 Abraham in, “Pasian in meihal biakpiak nadingin ama ading tuuno hong pia ding hi, ka ta aw,” a ci hi. Tua bangin amau tegel pai khawm uh hi." 
Genesis22:9 Ama kiangah Pasianʼ gen sa mun a tun uh ciangin, Abraham in tua lai ah biakna tau khat bawlin, a ngeina ding bangin sing koihin, a tapa Isaac henin biakna tau tunga sing tungah a koih hi." 
Genesis22:10 Tua ciangin Abraham in a tapa a that dingin tem la hi. 
Genesis22:11 Ahih hangin Topaʼ vantungmi in vantung panin, “Abraham, Abraham!” ci-in a sam hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:12 Amah in, “Tangvalpa su kei in. Ama tungah bangmah hih kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in Pasian na zahtakna tu-in ka thei a, na tapa khat neihsun keima adingin na humcip lohna ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:13 Tua ciangin Abraham khuadak kawikawi a, khaumang lakah a ki a a awk tuutal khat a nungah na om hi. Abraham pai-in tua tuutal kai a, ama tapaʼ tangin meihal biakna-in a pia hi." 
Genesis22:14 Tua ahih ciangin Abraham in tua mun pen, “ Topa in hong sik hi,” ci-in min phuak a, tu ni dongin Topaʼ mual tungah hong kisik hi, a kici hi." 
Genesis22:15 Topaʼ vantungmi in vantung panin Abraham a nih veina sam a," 
Genesis22:16 “Kei mahmah ka kiciam hi, Topa in ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in hih thu na bawl khin a, na tapa neihsun na humcip kei hi." 
Genesis22:17 Nang thupha kong pia taktak dinga, na suanlekhakte van a aksite le tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tampi ka phasak ding hi. Na suanlekhakte in amauʼ galteʼ khuapite luah ding uh a," 
Genesis22:18 na suanlekhakte thupha ka piak bangin, leitung minam khempeuh in thupha a ngah nadingun hong ngen ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in ka thu na mang hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis22:19 Tua ciangin a nasemteʼ kiangah Abraham ciahkik a, Beer-sheba ah pai khawm uh hi. Abraham Beer-sheba ah a teeng hi." 
Genesis22:20 Hih thuteʼ khit ciangin Abrahamʼ kiangah, “En in, Milkah in zong na sanggampa Nahor tawh tate nei hi:" 
Genesis22:21 Uz a u pen hi. A sanggamte pen Buz, Aramʼ pa Kemuel," 
Genesis22:22 Khesed, Hazo, Pildash, Jidlaf le Bethuel ahi hi,” kici hi." 
Genesis22:23 Bethuel pen Rebekahʼ pa ahi hi. Milkah in Abrahamʼ sanggam Nahor tawh tapa giat nei hi. 
Genesis22:24 Tua tham loin Reumah min nei a zineu in ta Tebah, Gaham, Tahash le Maakah a nei hi." 
Genesis23:1 Sarah kum za le kum sawm nih le kum sagih nungta a," 
Genesis23:2 Kanaan miteʼ gam sung Kiriath-arba (Hebron) ah a si hi. Abraham dahin kap a, a vui nading vaihawm hi."
