Genesis23:3 Abraham in a misi nusia-in Hit mite kiangah va pai a," 
Genesis23:4 “Kei pen note lakah khualmi hi-in peemta ka hi hi. Ka zi ka vui theih nadingin noteʼ lakah vui nading mun leitang hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis23:5 Hit mite in Abraham dawngin," 
Genesis23:6 “Topa aw, koteʼ thu hong ngai in. Nang pen koteʼ lakah a vanglian ulian khat na hi hi. Koteʼ han na deih pen munah na zi vui in. Kote kuamah in nang adingin a han it lo dinga, na zi vui ding hong khaktan lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis23:7 Abraham dingin tua gam mi ahi Hit miteʼ lamah a kun hi. 
Genesis23:8 Amah in amauteʼ kiangah, “Hih gamah ka zi ka vui ding nong deih uh leh, ka thu hong ngai un. Zoharʼ tapa Efron in" 
Genesis23:9 ama neih Makpelah leihawm kei tungah hong piak theih nadingin hong thumsak un. Tua pen ama lo nawl ah om hi. Vui nading munin ka neih nadingin a man ding cing takin piakna tawh noteʼ muhin kei tungah tua leitang amah hong piasak un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis23:10 Tua laitakin Hit miteʼ lakah Efron zong a om ahi hi. Khuapi kulh kongpi ah a hong pai Hit mite khempeuhʼ zakna ah Hit mi Efron in Abraham dawng a," 
Genesis23:11 “Hi lo hi, ka topa aw, hong ngai in. Nangʼ tungah lo kong pia hi. Tua sunga leihawm zong nangʼ tungah kong pia hi. Ka mipihteʼ muhna ah nangʼ tungah kong pia hi. Na misi vui in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis23:12 Tua ciangin tua gam miteʼ mai ah Abraham a kun hi. 
Genesis23:13 Tua gam miteʼ zakna ah amah in Efronʼ kiangah, “Lungsim takpi tawh na cih ahihleh hong ngai in. Lo man ding kong pia ding hi. Tua lai ah ka misi ka vui theih nadingin keiʼ tung panin a man hong sang in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis23:14 Efron in Abraham dawngin," 
Genesis23:15 “Ka topa aw, ka thu hong ngai in. Leitang bek khat in ngun shekel za li man hi. Nang le keiʼ kikalah bang thudang om nawn ahi hiam? Na misi vui in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis23:16 Efronʼ cih bangin Abraham thukim hi. Abraham in Efron adingin, Hit miteʼ zakna ah a min lawh zah, tua hun laitak a sumbukteʼ lakah a kizang a gik zah tawh kizui-in ngun shekel za li a teh khia hi." 
Genesis23:17 Tua ahih ciangin Makpelah a Efronʼ lo, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, a sunga om leihawm le a lo le tua mun khempeuh ah a om lo sunga singte pen" 
Genesis23:18 khuapi kulh kongpi ah a kikhawm mite khempeuhʼ mai, Hit miteʼ omna ah Abrahamʼ neih dingin kipia hi." 
Genesis23:19 Hih bangin a kihih khit ciangin, Kanaan gam sunga om Mamre (Hebron) nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo sunga leihawm sungah Abraham in a zi Sarah a vui hi." 
Genesis23:20 Lo le a sunga om leihawmte si vui nading munin a neih dingin Abrahamʼ tungah Hit mite in a pia uh hi. 
Genesis24:1 Tu-in Abraham teekin a kum tam mahmah ta hi. Topa in na khempeuh ah Abraham thupha pia hi. 
Genesis24:2 Abraham in ama neih khempeuh a uk, a inn sungah a upa pen a nasem pa kiangah, “Ka phei nuai ah na khut hong koih in." 
Genesis24:3 Nangmah in amauʼ lakah ka teenna Kanaan miteʼ tanute lak panin ka tapaʼ zi ding la loin, keima gam le ka behte kiangah va pai-in ka tapa Isaacʼ zi ding na lak nadingin vantung le leitung Pasian ahi Topa tawh nang kong kiciamsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:4  
Genesis24:5 Nasem pa in ama kiangah, “A numei in hih gamah kei hong zui nuam kei kha leh nangma nong pai khiatna gamah na tapa ka paipihkik ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:6 Abraham in ama kiangah, “Tua lai ah ka tapa na paipihkik loh ding thei in." 
Genesis24:7 Ka paʼ inn le ka suahna leitang panin kei hong la-in, kei kiangah thu hong genin kei tungah hong kiciam a, ‘Na suanlekhakteʼ tungah hih leitang ka pia ding hi,’ a hong ci vantung Pasian, Topa in nangma mai ah a vantungmi sawl dinga, tua lai mun panin nangmah in ka tapa ading zi khat na la ding hi." 
Genesis24:8 Ahih hangin a numei in nang hong zuih nop kei leh keima thuciamna panin nang na suakta ding hi. Bangbang hileh tua lai ah ka tapa na paipihkik kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:9 Tua ahih ciangin a nasem pa in a topa Abrahamʼ phei nuai ah a khut koih a, hih thu tawh kisai-in ama tungah a kiciam hi." 
Genesis24:10 Tua ciangin a nasem pa in a topaʼ kalaohte sawm la-in paikhia a, a topaʼ tung panin letsong hoih nono a namkim la hi. Amah dingin Mesopotamia gam Nahorʼ khuapi ah a pai hi." 
Genesis24:11 Numeiteʼ nitak tuitawi hun laitakin khuapi pualam tuikhuk gei ah amah in a kalaohte boksak hi. 
Genesis24:12 Amah in, “Ka topa Abrahamʼ Pasian, Topa aw, tu ni-in ka maa hong vangsak in. Nang tungah thu kong ngen hi, ka topa Abrahamʼ tungah itna kip hong lak in." 
Genesis24:13 En in, tuikhuk gei ah kei ka dinga, khuapi nungakte tuitawi dingin hong pai uh hi." 
Genesis24:14 Keimah in, ‘Tui ka dawn theih nadingin na beel hong nga suk in,’ ka cih ciangin, ‘Dawn in; na kalaohte zong tui ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci nu pen na nasem pa Isaac adingin na seh sa numei hisak in. Nangmah in ka topa tungah itna kip na lahna hih thu tawh ka thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:15 Tua bangin a thunget a khit ma-in, Abrahamʼ sanggampa Nahor in a zi Milkah tawh a neih a tapa Bethuelʼ tanu Rebekah a liangko tungah a tuibeel pua-in hong paikhia hi." 
Genesis24:16 Tua nu pen kuamah tawh a lum khawm nai lo, nungak, a ngaihbaang mahmah khat ahi hi. Amah tuikhuk ah pai sukin a beel dim a, hong pai to hi." 
Genesis24:17 Tua ciangin amah a dawntuah dingin nasem pa tai a, “Dawn ding tui tawm khat na beel sung panin hong pia dih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:18 Amah in, “Dawn in, ka topa,” a ci hi. Tua nu in a khut tungah a beel niam suksakin amah a dawnsak hi." 
Genesis24:19 Amah in tua mipa tui a dawnsak khit ciangin, “Na kalaohte in a kham matengun a dawn ding zong tui kong tawisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:20 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a tuikuang sungah a tui bung suk pak a, tuitawi dingin tuikhuk ah tai-in a kalaohte khempeuh adingin tui a tawi hi." 
Genesis24:21 Topa in ama khualzinna mavangsak ding hiam, vangsak lo ding hiam, cih a theih nadingin mipa in daptakin tua nu na en hi." 
Genesis24:22 Kalaohte in tui a dawn khit ciangin mipa in shekel lang a gik kham nakbah khat le shekel sawm a gik kham tau nih tua nu adingin la-in pia a," 
Genesis24:23 “Kuaʼ tanu na hi hiam, hong gen in. Na paʼ inn ah koteʼ giah nading a awng ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:24 Tua nu in ama kiangah, “Nahor le a zi Milkahʼ tapa Bethuelʼ tanu ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:25 Amah in, “Buhkung le gan-an a kicing ka nei uh a, giah nading mun zong ka nei uh hi,” ci thuah lai hi." 
Genesis24:26 Mipa a lu kunin Topa bia a," 
Genesis24:27 “Ka topaʼ tungah a itna kip le a thumanna a pelh lo, ka topa Abrahamʼ Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Kei ka hih leh, ka topaʼ behteʼ inn zuatna lampi ah Topa in hong paipih hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:28 Tua ciangin nungak nu a inn ah tai-in hih thute khempeuh a innkuanpihte tungah a gen hi. 
Genesis24:29 Rebekah in Laban min nei sanggam pasal khat nei hi. Laban zong tuikhuk a mipa kiangah a tai hi. 
Genesis24:30 Amah in nakbah le a sanggamnuʼ khut tunga taute a muh ciang le, “Mipa in hih bangin kei tungah hong gen,” ci-in a sanggamnu Rebekahʼ gen a zak ciangin, mipa kiangah a pai ahi hi. Tuikhuk a kalaohte kiangah amah na ding hi." 
Genesis24:31 Amah in, “Hong pai in, Topaʼ thupha piak pa aw; bang hangin a pua ah ding na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh inn ah na om nading mun ka bawl khin a, kalaohte ading mun zong om hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:32 Tua ahih ciangin inn sungah mipa hong pai hi. Laban in kalaoh vante suah a, kalaohte adingin buhkung le gan-an pia a, amah le a kikholh pih miteʼ khe sil nadingin tui zong a pia hi." 
Genesis24:33 Tua ciangin nek dingin a mai ah an kilui hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Ka thu ka gen khit matengin an ka ne kei ding hi,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:34 Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Kei pen Abrahamʼ nasem ka hi hi." 
Genesis24:35 Topa in ka topa nakpi takin thupha pia a, amah a lian mahmah suak khin hi. Amah in ama tungah tuu hon, bawng hon, ngun le kham, nasem pasal le nasem numei, kalaoh le late tampi pia hi." 
Genesis24:36 Ka topaʼ zi Sarah in a teek khitin ka topa tawh tapa khat nei hi. Amah in a neihsa khempeuh ama tungah pia hi. 
Genesis24:37 Ka topa in kei hong kiciamsak a, ‘Nangmah in amauʼ gamah ka teenna Kanaan numeite lak panin ka tapaʼ zi ding la kei inla," 
Genesis24:38 ka paʼ innkuan mi le ka behte kiangah pai-in ka tapa ading zi khat na la ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis24:39 Keimah in ka topa kiangah, ‘A numei in kei hong zui nuam kei kha leh,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis24:40 Ahih hangin amah in kei tungah, ‘A thu ka man Topa in nang tawh a vantungmi hong sawlin na maa hong vangsak ding hi. Nang in ka behte le ka paʼ inn panin ka tapa ading zi khat na la ding hi." 
Genesis24:41 Ka behte kiangah na pai ciangin amaute in nang hong piak kei leh ka thuciamna panin nang na suakta ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis24:42 “Tu ni-in tuikhuk ah pai-in, ‘Ka topa Abraham’ Pasian, Topa aw, tu-a ka paina ka maa nong vansak ding leh," 
Genesis24:43 en in, tuikhuk gei ah kei ka ding hi. Tuitawi dinga hong paikhia nungak tungah, “Na beel panin tui dawn ding tawm khat hong pia in,” ka cih ciangin," 
Genesis24:44 “Dawn in, na kalaohte ading zong kong tawisak ding hi,” hong ci nu pen, ka topaʼ tapa adingin Topa in a seh sa numei hisak in, ka ci hi." 
Genesis24:45 “Ka lungsim sungah thu ka nget khit ma-in, a liangko tungah a tuibeel pua-in Rebekah hong paikhia ka mu hi. Amah tuikhuk ah pai sukin tui hong tawi hi. Keimah in ama kiangah, ‘Tui hong dawnsak in,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis24:46 Amah in a liangko panin a beel hong khia suk pahin, ‘Dawn in, na kalaohte zong tui ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin keimah in ka dawn a, amah in kalaohte zong tui a pia hi." 
Genesis24:47 Tua ciangin, ‘Kuaʼ tanu na hi hiam?’ ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in, ‘Nahor le a zi Milkahʼ tapa Bethuelʼ tanu ka hi hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nak tungah nakbah ka batsak a, a khut tungah taute ka butsak hi." 
Genesis24:48 Tua ciangin ka lu kunin Topa ka bia a, a tapa adingin ka topaʼ behpaʼ tanu a la dingin lampi man ah kei a hong paipih, ka topa Abrahamʼ Pasian, Topa ka phat hi." 
Genesis24:49 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka gamtat nading zia ka theih nadingin ka topaʼ tungah hoihtak le thuman takin na gamtat ding uh leh na gamtat loh ding uh hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:50 Tua ciangin Laban le Bethuel in dawng a, “Hih thu pen Topaʼ kiang panin hong pai thu ahi hi. A sia ahi zongin a pha ahi zongin nang tungah kong gen ding uh thu dang om lo hi." 
Genesis24:51 En in, Rebekah na mai ah om hi. Amah la inla pai un. Topaʼ gen sa bangin na topaʼ tapaʼ zi hisak un,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis24:52 Abrahamʼ nasem pa in amauʼ kammalte a zak ciangin Topaʼ mai leilak ah a kun suk hi. 
Genesis24:53 Nasem pa in ngun le kham kizepnate le puante hong suah khia-in Rebekah a pia hi. A sanggampa le a nu zong a manpha kizepnate a pia hi. 
Genesis24:54 Tua ciangin amah le a nungzuite in an ne tui dawnin, tua lai ah tua zan a giak uh hi. Amaute zingsangin a thawh uh ciangin amah in, “Ka topaʼ kiangah hong ciahsakkik un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:55 Ahi zongin a sanggampa le a nu in, “A tawm penin ni sawm bang, ko tawh numei hong omsak lai in; tua khit ciangin amah hong pai thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis24:56 Ahih hangin amah in amaute kiangah, “ Topa in ka maa hong vangsak khin ahih nungsang kei hong zekaisak nawn kei un. Ka topa kiangah ka ciah theih nadingin hong paisak un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis24:57 Amaute in, “A numei samin amah i dong ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis24:58 Amaute in Rebekah samin ama kiangah, “Hih mipa na zui pah ding hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amah in, “Ka zui ding hi,” ci pah hi." 
Genesis24:59 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a sanggamnu uh Rebekah le a cingnu, Abrahamʼ nasem pa le a nungzuite tawh ciah khiasak uh hi." 
Genesis24:60 Amaute in Rebekah thupha pia-in ama kiangah, “Koteʼ sanggamnu aw, a tultul a thenthenteʼ nu hi ta in. Na suanlekhakte in amau a mudahteʼ khuapite luah ta uh hen!” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis24:61 Tua ciangin Rebekah le a numeite dingin, kalaohte tungah tuangin mipa a zui uh hi. Tua bangin nasem pa in Rebekah la-in a pai nading lamah a pai hi." 
Genesis24:62 Tua kikalin, Isaac, Beer-lahairoi panin hong pai-in Negeb gamah na teeng hi." 
Genesis24:63 Isaac, thu a lung ngaingai dingin nitakin gamlak ah a paikhia hi. Amah a khuadak leh kalaohte hong pai a mu hi." 
Genesis24:64 Rebekah in Isaac a muh ciangin, kalaoh tung panin kumin" 
Genesis24:65 nasem pa kiangah, “Hua lai-a mipa, eite hong dawn dingin gamlak a hong pai kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Nasem pa in, “Ka topa hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a kikhuhna puan la-in a kikhuh hi." 
Genesis24:66 Nasem pa in Isaac kiangah a gamtatna sa khempeuh a gen hi. 
Genesis24:67 Tua ciangin Isaac in a puanbuk sungah Rebekah paipih a, amah pen a zi a suak hi. Amah in tua nu a it hi. Tua ahih manin a nuʼ sih khit ciangin Isaac in hehnepna a ngah hi." 
Genesis25:1 Abraham in Keturah min nei zi dang khat la hi. 
Genesis25:2 Amah in tua nu tawh ta Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak le Shuah nei hi." 
Genesis25:3 Jokshan pen Sheba le Dedanʼ pa ahi hi. Dedanʼ tate: Asshurim, Lethusim le Leummim ahi hi." 
Genesis25:4 Midianʼ tate: Efah, Efer, Hanok, Abida le Eldaah ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh, Keturahʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi." 
Genesis25:5 Abraham in a neih khempeuh Isaac a pia hi. 
Genesis25:6 Ahih hangin Abraham in a zi dang tawh a tate tungah zong letsong pia a, ama nuntak lai mahin ama tapa Isaac kiang panin nisuahna lam gamah amaute a sawl khia hi." 
Genesis25:7 Abraham, kum za le kum sawm sagih le kum nga a phak ciangin," 
Genesis25:8 a hu tawpna sang a, a teek, kum tampi a pha, a khanghamin si a, ama mite tawh kivui khawm hi." 
Genesis25:9 Ama tapa Isaac le Ishmael in, Abraham in Hit miteʼ tung panin a lei, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, Hit mi Zoharʼ tapa Efronʼ lo sung, Makpelah leihawm sungah amah a vui uh hi. Tua lai munah a zi Sarah kiangah Abraham kivui hi." 
Genesis25:10  
Genesis25:11 Abrahamʼ sih khit ciangin Pasian in a tapa Isaac thupha pia hi. Isaac, Beer-lahairoi ah a teeng hi." 
Genesis25:12 Hihte pen, Abraham in Sarahʼ sila numei ahi Egypt mi Hagar tawh a neih, Abrahamʼ tapa Ishmaelʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi." 
Genesis25:13 Hihte pen a suahna tawh kizui-in Ishmaelʼ tateʼ min ahi hi: Ishmaelʼ ta upa pen Nebaioth hi a, tua ciangin Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Mishma, Dumah, Massa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Nafish le Kedemah ahi hi." 
Genesis25:16 Hihte pen a khua, a phual, a behin ulian sawm le nihte ahi Ishmaelʼ tate le amauteʼ min ahi hi." 
Genesis25:17 (Ishmael kum za le kum sawm thum le kum sagih a phak ciangin a hu tawpna sang-in si a, a behte tawh kivui khawm hi.)" 
Genesis25:18 Amaute, Egypt nisuahna, Assiria lam Havilah panin Shur dongah teeng uh a, amauʼ sanggamte khempeuh panin amau tuam teen uh hi." 
Genesis25:19 Hihte pen Abrahamʼ tapa Isaacʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi. Abraham pen Isaacʼ pa hi a," 
Genesis25:20 Aram mi Labanʼ sanggamnu, Paddanaram gam a Aram mi Bethuelʼ tanu Rebekah zi-in a lak lai-in Isaac kum sawm li pha hi." 
Genesis25:21 Isaac in Topaʼ tungah a zi adingin thu ngen hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ciing hi. Topa in ama thungetna pia a, a zi Rebekah gai hi." 
Genesis25:22 Ama sungah a naute kilaii gawp hi. Amah in, “Hih bang ahihleh bang hangin nungta se ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa kiangah thukan dingin amah pai hi." 
Genesis25:23 Topa in ama kiangah, “Na gil sungah minam nih om a, nangʼ sung pan a suak mihing nihte kikhen ding hi. Khat pen a khat sangin hat zaw dinga, a u zaw in a nau zawʼ na sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis25:24 Amah a suah hun a tun ciangin, a gil sungah tapeeng om hi." 
Genesis25:25 A masa pen a sanin hong suak a, a pumpi khempeuh mul a nei puan tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min dingin Esau phuak uh hi." 
Genesis25:26 Tua khit ciangin a sanggampa hong suak khia a, ama khut in Esauʼ khetul len hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min dingin Jakob kiphuak hi. Amauʼ suah ciangin Isaac kum sawm guk a pha hi." 
Genesis25:27 Tua naupangte a khan ciangin, Esau pen gam sung mi sabet siam khat hi a, Jakob ahihleh inn ah om hithiatin a cingkam khat ahi hi." 
Genesis25:28 Isaac in Esauʼ sa mat sa nene ahih manin Esau mah it zaw a, ahi zongin Rebekah in Jakob it zaw hi." 
Genesis25:29 Khat vei Jakob in meh huanin a om laitakin gamlak a sa betna panin phukhong vei-in Esau hong ciah hi. 
Genesis25:30 Esau in Jakob kiangah, “Gil kialin phukhong vei ka hih manin tua na meh san tawm khat hong nesak in,” a ci hi. (Tua ahih manin ama min Edom kici hi.)" 
Genesis25:31 Jakob in, “Na innluah za hong pia lecin ka meh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis25:32 Esau in, “A si ding ka hi ta hi; kei adingin innluah za bangin kimang ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis25:33 Jakob in, “Keiʼ tungah hong kiciam masa in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama tungah Esau kiciam a, Jakobʼ tungah a innluah za a zuak hi." 
Genesis25:34 Tua ciangin Jakob in an le bemeh Esau a pia hi. Esau in zong an ne-in tui a dawn khit ciangin a pai nading a zuan hi. Tua ahih manin Esau in a innluah za tua ciang bang bekin a ngaihsun ahi hi. 
Genesis26:1 Abrahamʼ hun lai-a kialpi banah, tu-in tua gam sungah kialpi dang khat tung hi. Filistia miteʼ kumpipa Abimelekʼ omna Gerar ah Isaac pai hi." 
Genesis26:2 Ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Egypt ah pai suk kei inla, kong gen ding leitang ah teeng in." 
Genesis26:3 Hih leitang ah tawl khat om in. Nang tawh kong om khawm dinga, thupha kong pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang le na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitangte kong pia dinga, na pa Abrahamʼ tungah ka thuciam ka tungsak ding hi." 
Genesis26:4 Na suanlekhakte van a aksi bangin tampi ka phasak dinga, na suanlekhakte tungah hih leitang khempeuh ka pia ding hi. Na suanlekhakte thupha ka piak bangin leitung minam khempeuh in thupha a ngah nadingun hong ngen ding uh hi." 
Genesis26:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Abraham in ka thu mangin, ka sawlna, ka thupiakna, ka ngeina kip le ka thu zui hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:6 Tua ahih ciangin Isaac, Gerar ah teeng hi." 
Genesis26:7 Tua mun mite in ama zi tawh kisai thu a dot uh ciangin amah in, “Ka sanggamnu hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Rebekahʼ hangin tua gam mite in hong that kha ding ahih ciangin,” ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin, “Ka zi hi,” a cih ding lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ngaihbaang hi." 
Genesis26:8 Tua lai ah amah sau veipi a om khit ciangin, Filistia miteʼ kumpipa Abimelek a tawlet panin khuadak a, Isaac in a zi Rebekah a noh laitak mu kha hi." 
Genesis26:9 Tua ahih manin Abimelek in Isaac samin, “En in, amah na zi ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in nang in, ‘Amah ka sanggamnu hi,’ ci thei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Isaac in ama kiangah, “‘Ama hangin si kha ding ka hih ciangin,’ ci-in ngaihsun ka hihna hang hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:10 Abimelek in, “Ko tungah bangci-a hih bangin hong gamta na hi hiam? Mite khat peuhpeuh na zi tawh lum khawm pak kha thei dinga, koteʼ tungah mawhna hong tun na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:11 Tua ahih ciangin Abimelek in mi khempeuh thu zasak a, “Hih mipa ahi zongin a zi ahi zongin a su kha peuhmah kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:12 Isaac in tua leitang ah khai tuh a, tua kum mahin a zah za khat la hi. Topa in amah thupha pia a," 
Genesis26:13 a neihsa kibeh laplap ahih manin a hau mahmah khat a suak hi. 
Genesis26:14 Amah in tuu hon le bawng hon le innkuan mi tampi nei a, Filistia mite in amah eng uh hi." 
Genesis26:15 (Ama pa Abrahamʼ hun lai-a a paʼ nasemte in a tawh tuikhuk khempeuh tu-in Filistia mite in hucipin lei vuk uh hi.) 
Genesis26:16 Abimelek in Isaac kiangah, “Koteʼ kiang panin paikhia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote sangin nang na vanglian zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:17 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun panin Isaac paikhia a, Gerar kuam sungah phual satin tua munah a teeng hi." 
Genesis26:18 Isaac in a pa Abrahamʼ hun lai-a a kito sa tuikhukte to phakik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abrahamʼ sih khit ciangin Filistia mite in tuate vukcip uh hi. Amah in a paʼ phuah sa minte mah phuakkik hi. 
Genesis26:19 Ahih hangin Isaacʼ nasemte in tua kuam sung to-in tuikhuk a muh uh ciangin," 
Genesis26:20 Gerarʼ gancingte le Isaacʼ gancingte kitawng uh a, “Tui, ko aʼ hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua tuikhuk Esek ci-in min a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute le amah kitawng uh hi." 
Genesis26:21 Tua ciangin amaute in tuikhuk dang khat to uh a, tua tungtang ah zong amaute kitawng leuleu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua pen Sitnah ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Genesis26:22 Tua mun panin amah kiin-in tuikhuk dang khat to leuleu hi. Tua tungtang ah amaute kitawng nawn lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Rehoboth ci-in min a phuak hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in Topa in eite adingin omna hong bawlsak khin a, eite hih gamah i pung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:23 Tua lai mun panin amah Beer-sheba ah pai to hi. 
Genesis26:24 Tua zan mahin ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Kei pen na pa Abrahamʼ Pasian ka hi hi. Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka nasem pa Abrahamʼ huhau-in nang tawh kong om a, nang le na suanlekhakte thupha hong pia-in kong pungsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:25 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua lai munah biakna tau khat lamin Topa bia a, tua munah puanbuk a lam hi. Tua lai ah Isaacʼ nasemte in tuikhuk khat a to uh hi." 
Genesis26:26 Tua ciangin Gerar panin Abimelek a thulamlak pa Ahuzzath le a galkap mangpa Fikol tawh Isaac kiangah hong pai hi. 
Genesis26:27 Isaac in amauteʼ kiangah, “Note in kei hong mudahin noteʼ kiang panin hong hawl khia na hih uh ciangin bang hangin keiʼ kiangah hong hawh na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis26:28 Amaute in, “Nang tawh Topa a omna teltakin ka mu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin, kote in nang hong su kha loin, nangʼ tungah bangmah hong hih loin, a hoihin gamta-in lungnuam takin kong sawlkhiat mah bangun koteʼ tungah nang in siatna nong bawl loh nadingin nang le koteʼ kikalah kiciamna khat om henla, nang tawh thuciamna khat bawl ni, a ci hi ung. Nang pen tu-in Topaʼ thupha piak na hi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis26:29  
Genesis26:30 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute adingin pawi khat bawl a, amaute in pawi an ne-in a dawn uh hi." 
Genesis26:31 Zingsangin amaute tho baih uh a, khatlekhat kiciamna a bawl uh hi. Isaac in amaute a lampi ding uh ah kha a, ama kiang panin amaute lungnuam takin a paikhia uh hi." 
Genesis26:32 Tua ni mahin Isaacʼ nasemte hong pai-in amauʼ tawh sa tuikhuk thu ama kiangah hong gen uh a, “Tui ka mu zo uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Genesis26:33 Amah in tua pen Shibah ci-in min phuak hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min pen tu ni dongin Beer-sheba kici hi. 
Genesis26:34 Esau kum sawm li a phak ciangin, Hit mi Beeriʼ tanu Judith le Hit mi Elonʼ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi." 
Genesis26:35 A zi tegel in Isaac le Rebekahʼ nuntakna haksasak uh hi. 
Genesis27:1 Isaac teekin a mitte maangin khua a muh theih nawn loh ciangin a ta upa zaw Esau samin ama kiangah, “Ka tapa aw,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:2 Amah in, “En in, kei ka teek hi. Ka sih ding hun ka thei kei hi." 
Genesis27:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, na hiamte ahi na thallawng le na thal la inla, gamlak ah pai-in kei adingin sa va beng in." 
Genesis27:4 Ka sih ma-in nang thupha kong piak theih nadingin keiʼ duh bangin an lim hong bawl inla, ka nek dingin hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:5 Isaac in a tapa Esau a hopih laitakin Rebekah in na ngai sim hi. Sa bengin a ciahpih dingin Esau gamlak ah a kuan ciangin," 
Genesis27:6 Rebekah in a tapa Jakob kiangah, “Na sanggampa Esauʼ tungah na paʼ thugen ka za a," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ka sih ma-in Topaʼ mai ah nang thupha kong piak theih nadingin ka nek dingin na sa mat sa hong paipih inla, kei adingin an lim hong bawl in,’ ci hi." 
Genesis27:8 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka ta aw, kong thupiak bangin gamta in." 
Genesis27:9 Ama duh bangin na pa adingin an lim ka bawl theih nadingin keel hon lakah va pai inla keel no a hoih nih hong paipih in. 
Genesis27:10 Na pa in a sih ma-in nang thupha hong piak theih nadingin a nek dingin na pa kiangah na va paipih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:11 Ahih hangin Jakob in a nu Rebekah kiangah, “En in, ka sanggampa Esau pen mul nei mi hi a, kei pen cineel mi ka hi hi." 
Genesis27:12 Ka pa in kei hong lawng kha leh, amah in ka khemna hong thei dinga, keiʼ tungah thupha hi loin samsiatna hong tung zawsop ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:13 A nu in ama kiangah, “Nangma thuak ding samsiatna kei tungah hong tung tahen, ka ta aw; ka thu hong mang peuh inla, pai-in keelnote keiʼ kiangah hong puak in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in keelnote va la-in a nu kiangah paipih a, a paʼ duh bangin a nu in an lim a bawl hi." 
Genesis27:15 Tua ciangin Rebekah in inn-a a kep, ama ta upa zaw Esauʼ puan hoih pente la-in a ta nau zaw Jakob a silhsak hi." 
Genesis27:16 Amah in keelnoteʼ vun ama khut tung le a neelna mun a ngawng sanah silhsak a," 
Genesis27:17 a bawl sa meh lim le an a tapa Jakob a pia hi. 
Genesis27:18 Tua ahih ciangin a paʼ kiangah amah pai a, “Ka pa aw,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing, ka ta aw; kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:19 Jakob in a pa kiangah, “Na ta upa zaw Esau ka hi hi. Nong gen bangin ka hih khin hi. Kei thupha nong piak theih nadingin tu-in tu to inla, ka sa mat sa ne in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:20 Ahih hangin Isaac in a tapaʼ kiangah, “Ka ta aw, bangci-a hong hici manlan pak na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “ Topa nangma Pasian in kei hong tuahphasak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Isaac in Jakob kiangah," 
Genesis27:21 “Ka ta aw, ka ta Esau taktak na hi hiam, na hi kei hiam kong lawn theih nadingin ka nai ah hong pai in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:22 Tua ciangin a pa Isaacʼ kiangah Jakob pai a, amah lawngin, “A aw, Jakobʼ aw hi, ahih hangin a khutte, Esauʼ khut hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:23 A khutte in a sanggampa Esauʼ khut bangin mul nei ahih manin amah in thei lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in thupha pia dingin kithawi a," 
Genesis27:24 “Ka ta Esau taktak na hi hiam?” ci-in dongkik hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:25 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka tapa nangma sa mat sa ne-in thupha kong piak theih nadingin ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a kiangah paipih a, amah in a ne hi. Amah in leenggahzu paipihin, amah in a dawn hi." 
Genesis27:26 Tua ciangin a pa Isaac in ama kiangah, “Ka kiangah hong pai inla hong nam in, ka ta aw,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:27 Tua ahih ciangin amah a nai ah hong pai-in a pa a nam hi. Amah in a puan gimnamte nam a, amah thupha pia-in, “En in, ka tapaʼ gimnam pen Topa in thupha a piak gamlak gimnam tawh kibang!" 
Genesis27:28 Pasian in na tungah vantung daitui hong pia henla, na lote hoihsak tahen. An le leenggahzu tampi hong pia tahen." 
Genesis27:29 Mite in nangma na hong sem henla, minamte na mai ah hong kun ta uh hen. Na sanggamteʼ tungah topa hi inla, na sanggamteʼ suanlekhakte, na mai ah hong kun uh hen. Nang hong samsia peuhmah in samsiatna ngah henla, thupha hong pia peuhmah in thupha ngah tahen,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:30 Isaac in Jakob thupha a piak a man khit, a pa Isaacʼ omna panin Jakob a paikhiat khit phetin, a sa betna panin a sanggampa Esau hong tung hi." 
Genesis27:31 Amah in zong an lim bawlin a paʼ kiangah hong paipih hi. Amah in a paʼ kiangah, “Thupha nong piak theih nadingin na tapaʼ sa mat sa a ne dingin ka pa hong tho in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:32 A pa Isaac in ama kiangah, “Kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen na tapa, a suak masa Esau ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:33 Tua ciangin Isaac nakpi takin liingin, “Tua ahihleh, nangʼ hong pai ma-in sa mat sa hong paipihin, a vekin ka nek khit, amah thupha ka piak pa kua ahi hiam? Thupha pia khin ka hih manin amah in thupha ngah ding hi” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:34 Esau in a paʼ kammalte a zak ciangin nakpi tak le nasia takin kiko khia-in a paʼ kiangah, “Kei thupha hong pia in, kei zong, aw ka pa!” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:35 Ahih hangin amah in, “Khemna tawh na sanggampa hong pai-in amah in na thupha la khia khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:36 Esau in, “Amah Jakob kici mah hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in kei nih vei hong suan khia khin hi. Amah in ka innluah za hong sut hi. En in, tu-in amah in ka thupha hong sut leuleu hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei adingin thupha siit lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:37 Isaac in Esau dawngin, “En in, amah nangmaʼ topa-in ka bawl khin a, a sanggamte khempeuh ama tungah nasemin ka pia khin a, an le leenggahzu tawh amah ka hingsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka ta aw, nang adingin bang hih thei nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:38 Esau in a paʼ kiangah, “Pa aw, thupha khat beek nei nawn lo na hi hiam? Kei thupha hong pia in, kei zong, ka pa aw,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Esau a kap hi." 
Genesis27:39 Tua ciangin a pa Isaac in, “En in, leitung pan a piang an le leenggahzu na nei kei dinga, na lo adingin vantung daituite na ngah kei ding hi." 
Genesis27:40 Na namsau tawh na nungta dinga, na sanggampaʼ na na sem ding hi. Ahih hangin amah na langpan ciangin ama khutnuai panin na leeng khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:41 A pa in amah thupha pia khin ahih manin tua thupha hangin tu-in Esau in Jakob mudah a, Esau in, “Ka paʼ sihna hangin dah nading hun hong nai ta hi. Tua khit ciangin ka sanggampa Jakob ka that ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
Genesis27:42 Ahih hangin a tapa upa zaw Esauʼ ngimna, Rebekahʼ tungah kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a ta nau zaw Jakob samin ama kiangah, “En in, na sanggampa Esau in nangmah thah ding vaihawmna tawh amah kihehnem hi." 
Genesis27:43 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka ta aw, ka thu hong mang in. Haran a ka sanggampa Labanʼ kiangah va tai inla," 
Genesis27:44 na sanggampaʼ hehna a dam mateng tua lai ama kiangah tawl khat sung va om in. 
Genesis27:45 Na sanggampaʼ sinsona a daih mateng, ama tunga na gamtatna a mangngilh mateng va om in. Tua ciangin mi hong sawlin hih lai munah nang kong lasak ding hi. Bang hangin no tegel tawh ni khat thu-in kei kikhen ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis27:46 Tua ciangin Rebekah in Isaac kiangah, “Esauʼ zi Hit numeiteʼ hangin ka lung gimin ka cimtak hi. Jakob in hih gam numeite khat ahi Hit numeite khat teenpih leh kei adingin bang nuntak tham nawn ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis28:1 Tua ahih ciangin Isaac in Jakob sam a, amah thupha pia-in thuhilh a, “Nang in Kanaan numeite na teenpih kei ding hi." 
Genesis28:2 Kithawi inla, na nuʼ pa Bethuelʼ inn, Paddanaram ah pai in. Tua lai munah na nuʼ sanggampa Labanʼ tanute khat na zi dingin la in." 
Genesis28:3 Nang, mihonpi khat na suah theih nadingin Vanglian Pasian in nang thupha hong pia-in, hong pungsakin, tampi hong phasak hen." 
Genesis28:4 Pasian in Abrahamʼ tunga a piak, tawl khat sung na omna leitang na neih theih nadingin nang le na suanlekhakte tungah amah in Abrahamʼ thupha hong pia tahen!” a ci hi." 
Genesis28:5 Tua bangin Isaac in Jakob sawl khia hi. Jakob le Esauʼ nu Rebekahʼ sanggampa, Aram mi Bethuelʼ tapa Labanʼ omna Paddanaram ah amah a pai hi." 
Genesis28:6 Isaac in Jakob thupha pia-in, zi la dingin Paddanaram ah sawl a, thupha a piak kawmin amah thuhilhin, “Kanaan numeite na teenpih kei ding hi,” a cihna le," 
Genesis28:7 Jakob in a nu le a paʼ thu mangin Paddanaram ah a paina thu tu-in Esau in thei hi. 
Genesis28:8 Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan numeite in a pa lungkimsak lo cih Esau in a theih ciangin," 
Genesis28:9 Ishmaelʼ kiangah Esau pai-in, ama zi neihsa banah, Nebaiothʼ sanggamnu, Abrahamʼ tapa Ishmaelʼ tanu Mahalath zi-in a la hi." 
Genesis28:10 Jakob in Beer-sheba khua nusia-in Haran lamah a pai hi. 
Genesis28:11 Amah mun khat tungin, ni tum khin ahih manin tua lai ah tua zan a giak hi. Tua mun a suangte khat la-in, amah in lukhamin zang a, a ihmu dingin tua munah a lum suk hi." 
Genesis28:12 Amah in mang man a, leitungah kahlei khat kiphutin, a kahlei dawn in van ban hi. Pasianʼ vantung mite tua kahlei tungah kah to-in a kum suk a mu hi." 
Genesis28:13 En in, tua sanah Topa dinga, “Kei pen na pa Abrahamʼ Pasian le Isaacʼ Pasian, Topa ka hi hi. Nang le na suanlekhakteʼ tungah tu-a na lupna leitang kong pia ding hi." 
Genesis28:14 Na suanlekhakte leilak leivui zah pha dinga, nitumna lam le nisuahna lam, leilu lam le leitaw lamah na kizelthang ding uh hi. Nang le na suanlekhakte thupha kong piak bangin leitung minam khempeuh in thupha a ngah nadingun hong ngen ding uh hi." 
Genesis28:15 En in, keimah in nang hong ompihin na paina peuh ah kong kem dinga, hih leitang ah nang kong paipihkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangʼ tunga kong gen sa thute ka hih khit matengin nang kong nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis28:16 Tua ciangin a ihmutna panin Jakob khanglo a, “Hih lai munah Topa om taktak hi; keimah in tua thu ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis28:17 Amah lau a, “Hih mun bangzahin lauhuai ahi hiam! Hih pen Pasianʼ inn lo a dang hi lo a, hih pen vantung lutna kongpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis28:18 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Jakob tho baih a, amah in lukhamin a zat suang la-in khuamin phut a, a tungah sathau a sung hi." 
Genesis28:19 Amah in tua mun Bethel ci hi. Ahih hangin a masa-in tua khua min pen Luz ahi hi. 
Genesis28:20 Tua ciangin Jakob in thuciamna khat bawlin, “Pasian in kei hong ompih a, hih ka paina lampi ah kei hong kep a, nek ding an le silh ding puan hong piak a," 
Genesis28:21 lungnuam takin ka paʼ inn ah ka ciahkik leh, Topa pen keima Pasian hi dinga," 
Genesis28:22 khuamin ka phuh sa hih suang pen Pasianʼ inn hi ding hi. Keima tungah nangmah in nong piak khempeuh sawm-ah-khat nangʼ tungah kong piakik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:1 Tua ciangin Jakob in a khualzinna zom a, nisuahna lam miteʼ gam a tung hi." 
Genesis29:2 A khuadak leh gamlak ah tuikhuk khat a mu hi. Tua gei ah tuu hon thum na lum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua tuikhuk panin tuuhonte tui kipia hi. Tuikhuk gong hukna suang lian hi. 
Genesis29:3 Tua lai munah tuuhonte khempeuh a kikaihkhop khit ciangin, tuucingte in tuikhuk gong panin a suang khuk khia uh a, tuute tui pia-in, tuikhuk gong ama omna ngei ah a suang koihkik uh hi." 
Genesis29:4 Jakob in amaute kiangah, “Sanggamte aw, koi pan a hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Haran pan hi ung,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis29:5 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Nahorʼ tapa Laban na thei uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Thei mah ung,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis29:6 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Amah a cidam hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Dam hi; en in, a tanu Rachel zong a tuu hon tawh hong pai!” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis29:7 Amah in, “En un, ni sang lai a, gan kaihkhop hun nai lo hi. Tuute tui pia unla, pai-in an nesak lai un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:8 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Tuute kikaikhawm a, tuikhuk gong panin a suang a kikhukkhiat mateng tui ka pia thei kei uh hi. A kikhukkhiat khit ciang bekin tuute tui ka pia thei pan uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis29:9 Tua bangin amaute tawh a kiho laitakin, Rachel a paʼ tuute tawh hong tung hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tuate kem hi." 
Genesis29:10 Tu-in Jakob in a nuʼ sanggampa Labanʼ tanu Rachel le a nuʼ sanggampa Labanʼ tuute a muh ciangin pai to-in tuikhuk gong panin a suang khuk khia a, a nuʼ sanggampa Labanʼ tuute tui a pia hi." 
Genesis29:11 Tua ciangin Jakob in Rachel nam a, a gingin kap khia hi." 
Genesis29:12 Jakob in Rachelʼ kiangah amah pen a paʼ behte hi a, Rebekahʼ tapa ahihna zong a kigen hi. Tua ciangin Rachel tai-in a paʼ kiangah a gen hi." 
Genesis29:13 Laban in a sanggamnuʼ tapa Jakobʼ thu a zak ciangin amah a dawn dingin hong tai a, amah kawi-in nam a, a inn ah a ciahpih hi. Jakob in Labanʼ tungah a thute khempeuh gen a," 
Genesis29:14 Laban in ama kiangah, “Nang pen keima si keima sa na hi takpi hi,” a ci hi. Tua hi a, amah tawh kha khat a om khawm hi." 
Genesis29:15 Tua ciangin Laban in Jakobʼ kiangah, “Nang pen keima beh na hih ciangin, a man nei lopi-in keiʼ na hong sem ding na hi hiam? Hong gen in; na thaman ding bang hi ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:16 Tu-in Laban in tanu nih nei hi. A u zawʼ min Leah hi a, a nau zawʼ min Rachel ahi hi." 
Genesis29:17 Leahʼ mit hah nem a, ahih hangin Rachel melhoihin ngaihbaang hi." 
Genesis29:18 Jakob in Rachel ngai hi. Amah in, “Na tanu a nau zaw Rachel thalawh nadingin nangma na kum sagih kong sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:19 Laban in, “Midang tungah amah ka piak ding sangin nangʼ tungah amah kong piak ding hoih zaw hi; kei kiangah om in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:20 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in Rachel a ngah nadingin kum sagih sung na sem a, amah a itna hangin tua hunte ni tawmno khat tawh kibang a sa hi." 
Genesis29:21 Tua ciangin Jakob in Laban kiangah, “Ka hun cing ta ahih ciangin amah tawh ka lup khop theih nadingin ka zi hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:22 Tua ahih ciangin Laban in tua mun a mi khempeuh kaikhawmin pawi khat a bawl hi. 
Genesis29:23 Ahih hangin a nitak ciangin amah in a tanu Leah la-in Jakob kiangah paipih hi. Amah in tua nu luppih hi. 
Genesis29:24 (Laban in ama numei nasem Zilpah a tanu Leah tungah a nasem numei dingin a pia hi.) 
Genesis29:25 A zingsang ciangin, Leah na hi mawk hi. Jakob in Laban kiangah, “Bangci a kei hong hici bawl na hi hiam? Rachel ngah nadingin na na hong sem hi lo ka hi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin kei hong khem na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:26 Laban in, “A uʼ ma-in a nau zaw piak ding koʼ gamah ngeina hi lo hi." 
Genesis29:27 Hih nu adingin nipikal khat sung pawi beisak phot inla, a dang kum sagih ka na nong sepsak thamanin a khat pen zong kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:28 Jakob zong tua bangmahin gamta a, tua nuʼ pawi hunsung beisak phot hi. Tua ciangin Laban in a tanu Rachel zong a zi dingin a pia hi." 
Genesis29:29 (Laban in ama nasem numei Bilhah a tanu Rachelʼ tungah a nasem numei dingin a pia hi.) 
Genesis29:30 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in Rachel zong luppih a, amah in Leah sangin Rachel it zaw hi. Labanʼ na a dang kum sagih sung a sem lai hi." 
Genesis29:31 Topa in Leah a kimuhdahna a theih ciangin, amah in a naubu honsak hi; ahih hangin Rachel ciing hi." 
Genesis29:32 Leah gai-in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Reuben a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topa in ka thuakna hong mu zo hi; tu-in ka pasal in kei hong it taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis29:33 Amah gaikikin tapa khat nei a, amah in, “Keimah hong kimuhdahna thu Topa in za khin ahih manin, amah in hih tapa zong hong pia hi,” ci hi. Amah in a min Simeon a phuak hi." 
Genesis29:34 Amah gai leuleu-in tapa khat nei a, “Amah tawh tapa thum nei ta ka hih manin tu-in ka pasal in kei hong pawl ding hi,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Levi a phuak hi." 
Genesis29:35 Amah gai leuleu-in tapa khat nei a, “Tuhunin Topa ka phat ding hi,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a min Judah a phuak hi. Tua ciangin a ta neih a tawp hi." 
Genesis30:1 Rachel in Jakob tawh ta a neih lohna a kimuh ciangin, amah in a sanggamnu eng hi. Amah in Jakob kiangah, “Ta hong pia in, tua ahih kei leh si ning!” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:2 Rachelʼ tungah Jakob heh mahmah a, amah in, “Nangʼ tungah ta hong pia lo Pasianʼ munah om ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Hih lai ah ka nasem numei Bilhah om hi. Ka phei tungah ka tawi ding ta hong neih nading le ama sung panin suanlekhak ka neih theih nadingin amah tawh lum khawm in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:4 Tua ahih ciangin a nasem numei Bilhah ama tungah zi-in a pia hi. Jakob in tua nu luppih hi. 
Genesis30:5 Bilhah gai-in Jakob tawh tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis30:6 Tua ciangin Rachel in, “Pasian in keiʼ thu a hoihin hong khen zo a, amah in ka aw zong za zo-in tapa khat hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a min Dan a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:7 Rachelʼ nasem numei Bilhah gaikikin Jakob tawh tapa a nihna nei hi. 
Genesis30:8 Tua ciangin Rachel in, “Nakpi takin hanciamna tawh ka sanggamnu ka zo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Naftali a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:9 Leah in ta neih a tawp lam a kimuh ciangin, amah in a nasem numei Zilpah la-in Jakobʼ tungah zi-in a pia hi." 
Genesis30:10 Tua ciangin Leahʼ nasem numei Zilpah in Jakob tawh tapa khat nei hi. 
Genesis30:11 Leah in, “Kaam pha!” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Gad a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:12 Leahʼ nasem numei Zilpah in Jakob tawh tapa a nihna nei hi. 
Genesis30:13 Leah in, “Kei lungdam ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh numei dangte in kei a lungdam hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Asher a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:14 Mangbuh lak hun laitakin gamlak ah Reuben pai-in zawl-ai kungte va mu a, tuate a nu Leahʼ kiangah a ciahpih hi. Tua ciangin Rachel in Leah kiangah, “Na tapaʼ zawl-ai kungte kim khat kei hong hawm in, hong thum ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:15 Ahih hangin Leah in, “Ka pasal nong suh thuneu sa na hi hiam? Ka tapaʼ zawl-ai kungte zong hong sut lai ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Rachel in, “Tua ahihleh na tapaʼ zawl-ai man dingin tu zanin amah, nang tawh hong lum khawm thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:16 Nitakin lo panin Jakob hong ciah ciangin, amah a dawn dingin Leah paikhia a, “Keiʼ kiangah hong lum in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka tapaʼ zawl-ai kungte tawh nang kong cial zo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua zan amah tawh a lum khawm hi." 
Genesis30:17 Pasian in Leahʼ thu ngai a, amah gai-in Jakob tawh tapa a ngana a nei hi." 
Genesis30:18 Leah in, “Ka nasem numei ka pasal tungah pia ka hih manin Pasian in ka tha cial hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Issakhar a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:19 Leah gaikik a, Jakob tawh tapa a gukna a nei hi." 
Genesis30:20 Tua ciangin Leah in, “Pasian in mo ken hoih kei hong guan hi. Tu-in ka pasal in kei hong pahtawi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh tapa guk ka nei khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Zebulun a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:21 Tua khit ciangin amah in tanu khat nei a, a min Dinah a phuak hi." 
Genesis30:22 Tua ciangin Pasian in Rachel phawk a, Pasian in ama thu ngai-in a naubu honsak hi." 
Genesis30:23 Amah gai-in tapa khat nei a, “Pasian in kei hong kikona teng la khia khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:24 Amah in a min Josef phuak a, “ Topa in tapa khat hong pia beh hen!” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:25 Rachel in Josef a neih khit ciangin, Jakob in Labanʼ kiangah, “Keima inn le ka gamah ka ciahkik theih nadingin kei hong sawl in." 
Genesis30:26 Nangʼ tunga kong thalawh sa ka zite le ka tate hong pia inla, hong paisak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma na kong sepsak sa na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:27 Ahih hangin Laban in ama kiangah, “Kei, thu hong gensak dih in. Topa in nangma hangin kei thupha hong piakna ka thei hi." 
Genesis30:28 Na thaman ding hong gen lecin kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:29 Jakob in ama kiangah, “Nangma na kong sepsak khitna le keima kep sungin na ganhingte tampi a phakna nang mahmah in na thei hi." 
Genesis30:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei kong pai ma-in nang in tawm bek na nei a, tu-in tampi takin a khang hi. Ka sepna peuh ah Topa in nang thupha hong pia hi. Ahih hangin tu-in keima innkuan ading cik ciangin keʼn vaihawm ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:31 Amah in, “Nang bang hong pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Jakob in, “Bangmah dang nong pia kei ding hi. Hih bangin nong hih nakleh na tuuhonte vakkikin ka kem ding hi." 
Genesis30:32 Tu ni-in na tuuhonte khempeuh lakah hong paisak inla, tua sung panin tuu a puang le a gial khempeuh le tuuno a vom khempeuh le keel lak panin a gial le a puang khempeuh hong khen khiasak in; tuate keima thaman hi ding hi." 
Genesis30:33 Tua ahih ciangin nangʼ tung pan a ka thaman a en dingin nong pai ciangin ka thumanna na hong nung muh ding hi. Keel lakah a puang lo le a gial lo peuhmah le tuuno lakah a vom lo peuhmah, kei kiangah a kimuh zenzen leh, guk-in kiseh pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:34 Laban in, “Hoih hi! Na cih sa bangin hisak ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis30:35 Ahih hangin Laban in tua ni-in keeltal a dung gial le a bem gialte, keelpi a puang le a gialte, a tungah a kang mun a om khempeuh le tuuno a vom khempeuh la khia-in, ama tapateʼ kep dingin tuate a koih hi." 
Genesis30:36 Jakobʼ kiang panin ni thum paina gamlapi ah tua ganhonte a paipih hi. Jakob in Labanʼ gan hon a om lai teng an a vak hi. 
Genesis30:37 Tua ciangin Jakob in poplar kung, almond kung le hiangpa kungte tung pan ciangkhut ding a thak satin la a, a ciangkhutte a kang mun a om dingin kheh a, a ciangkang kangte kidawksak hi." 
Genesis30:38 Amah in a kheh sa ciangkangte tui luang, tuipiakna tuikuang, tuuhonte tui dawn dingin a hong paina mun, tuuhonteʼ mai ah a koih hi. Amaute tui dawn dingin hong pai uh ciangin a nu le a pa om khawm uh ahih manin," 
Genesis30:39 tuuhonte tua ciangkangteʼ mai ah om khawm uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuuhonte in a dung gial, a puang le a gial ta nei uh hi." 
Genesis30:40 Jakob in tuunote khen khia a, tuuhonteʼ maitang pen a dung gialte le Labanʼ tuu hon sunga a vomte khempeuhʼ lam ngasak hi. Amah in amaʼ tuuhonte a tuamin koih khia-in, Labanʼ tuuhonte tawh koih khawm lo hi." 
Genesis30:41 Tuu hon sung panin a thahat zawte a huk ciangin, amaute tua ciangkangte lakah a gai theih nadingin Jakob in tuuhonteʼ muhna, tui luang sungah a ciangkangte a koih hi." 
Genesis30:42 Ahih hangin tuu hon a gina loteʼ mai ah tua ciangkangte koih lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin a gina lo zawte Laban aʼ hi a, a thahat zawte Jakob-aʼ ahi hi." 
Genesis30:43 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob a hauhna nakpi takin khang a, tuu hon lianpi, nasem numei, nasem pasal, kalaoh le late a nei hi." 
Genesis31:1 Labanʼ tapate in, “Jakob in i pa-aʼ khempeuh la khin a, i paʼ neihsa tung panin amah in hih hauhna ngah hi,” a cihna thu tu-in Jakob in za hi." 
Genesis31:2 Laban in nidang bangin maipha tawh amah a don lohna Jakob in mu hi. 
Genesis31:3 Tua ciangin Topa in Jakobʼ kiangah, “Na pate le na behteʼ gamah ciahkik in, nang kong ompih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:4 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in mi sawlin ama tuu hon a omna gamlak ah Rachel le Leah samsakin 
Genesis31:5 amaute kiangah, “Na pa un nidang bangin maipha tawh kei hong don lohna ka mu hi. Ahih hangin ka paʼ Pasian in kei hong ompih hi." 
Genesis31:6 Ka tha neih khempeuh tawh na paʼ na ka sepna na thei uh hi. 
Genesis31:7 Ahi zongin na pa un kei hong khemin, ka thaman sawm vei khel khin a, ahih hangin kei hong gimsak ding Pasian in phal lo hi." 
Genesis31:8 Amah in, ‘A gialte na thaman hi ding hi,’ ci leh tua ciangin tuu hon khempeuh in a gial ta hong nei hi. Amah in, ‘A dung gialte na thaman hi ding hi,’ ci leh tua ciangin tuu hon khempeuh in a dung gial ta hong nei hi." 
Genesis31:9 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in na paʼ ganhing khempeuh la khia-in tuate keima tungah hong pia zo hi. 
Genesis31:10 “Ganhonte ta nei dingin a kikholh hunin ka khuadak to a, a honteʼ tunga a diang keeltal khempeuh a dung gial, a bem gial, a puangin a omna ka mangin ka mu hi." 
Genesis31:11 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ vantungmi in ka mang sungah, ‘Jakob,’ hong ci a, keʼn, ‘Hiah om ing!’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis31:12 Amah in, ‘Khuadak to inla en in, a honteʼ tunga a diang keelte khempeuh dung gial, bem gialin puang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Laban in nangʼ tunga hong bawlna ka mu khin hi." 
Genesis31:13 Kei pen, nang in khuam khat sathau nuhin keiʼ tungah thuciamna nong bawlna mun Bethel Pasian ka hi hi. Tu-in kithawi inla, hih gam panin pai khia-in, na suahna gamah ciahkik in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:14 Tua ciangin Rachel le Leah in amah dawngin, “I paʼ inn sungah eiʼ tanh ding ahi a, eiʼ luah ding ahi zongin bang om ahi hiam?" 
Genesis31:15 Amah in eite gamdang mi bangin hong ngaihsun hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite hong zuak khin a, eite ading hong kipia sum amah in zang mangkhin hi." 
Genesis31:16 I paʼ tung panin Pasian in a lakkhiat sa neihsa khempeuh eite le i tate aʼ ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, nangʼ tunga Pasianʼ hong cih peuhpeuh hih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis31:17 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob kithawi-in a tapate le a zite kalaohte tungah a tuangsak hi. 
Genesis31:18 Amah in a ganhing khempeuh, a ngah sa a bawng khempeuh, Paddanaram gam sunga a ngah ama neihsa ganhing khempeuh, a pa Isaacʼ omna Kanaan gamah a paipih dingin a hawl khia hi." 
Genesis31:19 Laban a tuumul met dingin a paikhia hi a, Rachel in a paʼ inn sung pasian-te na gu hi." 
Genesis31:20 Jakob in Aram mi Laban khem a, tai ding a sawmna amah in gen lo hi." 
Genesis31:21 Amah a neihsa khempeuh tawh tai-in, Eufratis gun kantan a, Gilead gam mual tung lam a manawh hi." 
Genesis31:22 Jakob tai hi, ci-in a ni thum ni-in Labanʼ tungah a kigen ciangin," 
Genesis31:23 amah in a behte zawnin ni sagih sung amah delh a, Gilead gam mual tungah amah pha dekdek uh hi." 
Genesis31:24 Ahih hangin Aram mi Laban kiangah zanin mang sungah Pasian hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Jakobʼ tungah a pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh kam khat beek na pau loh nadingin kidawm in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:25 Tua ciangin Laban in Jakob pha hi. Tu-in Jakob in mual tung khat ah a puanbuk na lam a, Laban le a behte in Gilead gam mual tungah phual a sat uh hi." 
Genesis31:26 Laban in Jakob kiangah, “Nang in kei hong khemin, galmat bangin ka tanute bang hangin paikhiatpih na hi hiam?" 
Genesis31:27 Bang hangin tai simin kei hong khem a, hong gen lo na hi hiam? Tua ci gamtat kei lecin, lungdamna le lasakna, khuang le laiza tawh kong kha ding hi." 
Genesis31:28 Bang hangin ka tapate le ka tanute mangpha khakna hong namsak lo na hi hiam? Tu-in na hai gamtat khin hi. 
Genesis31:29 Nang kong siatsak ding keima thu ahi hi. Ahih hangin na paʼ Pasian in zan zanin kei kiangah thu hong gen a, ‘Jakob tungah a pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh na gen ding kidawm in,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis31:30 Tu-in nang in na paʼ inn nakpi takin lunggulh na hih manin na paikhia khinta hi. Ahih hangin bang hangin ka pasian-te gu na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Genesis31:31 Jakob in Laban dawngin, “Keiʼ kiang panin na tanute thahat thu-in nong suh khak ding ka launa hang ahi hi." 
Genesis31:32 Na pasian-te na muhna mi peuhpeuh kithat tahen! I behteʼ muhna ah nang aʼ ahi na khat peuhpeuh keiʼ neihsa lakah a om leh kawk khia-in la in,” a ci hi. Rachel in Labanʼ pasian-te a na guk lam Jakob in thei kha lo hi." 
Genesis31:33 Tua ahih ciangin Laban, Jakobʼ puanbuk, Leahʼ puanbuk le nasem numei nihteʼ puanbuk sungah pai a, ahih hangin amah in tuate mu lo hi. Leahʼ puanbuk panin amah pai khia-in Rachelʼ puanbuk sungah a lut hi." 
Genesis31:34 Rachel in inn sung pasian-te na gu a, kalaoh tutphah sungah koihin, tuateʼ tungah na tu hi. Laban in puanbuk sungteng khempeuh zawt a, ahih hangin tuate mu lo hi." 
Genesis31:35 Amah in a pa kiangah, “Nangʼ mai ah hong ding thei lo ka hih manin ka topa heh kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh numei ngeina nin ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in mun dang khempeuh zong a, ahih hangin a inn sung pasian-te mu zo lo hi." 
Genesis31:36 Tua ciangin Jakob a heh suak a, Laban mawhsakin, “Ka mawhna bang ahi hiam? Nasia takin kei nong delh nadingin ka khialhna bang ahi hiam?" 
Genesis31:37 Ka van khempeuh na thawi khit hangin na inn sung nate mu na hi hiam? Ei tegel kikalah amaute in thu a khen theih nadingin keima behte le nangma behteʼ mai ah, na muh a om leh hong koih khia in." 
Genesis31:38 Hih kum sawm nih sung nang kiangah kong om khin hi. Na tuupi le na keelpite tatolh nai lo a, na tuuhonteʼ sung pan tuutal sa ka ne kei hi." 
Genesis31:39 Gamlak ganhingteʼ balzante, nangʼ kiangah kong puak kei hi. Tua banga supnate kei mahmah in ka thuak hi. Sun-a kigu hitaleh zan a kigu hitaleh kei nong lohsak hi." 
Genesis31:40 Kei pen tu-a bang ka hi hi. Sunin a sa in hong kaang a, zanin a vot in hong tawp a, ka ihmu ngei kei hi." 
Genesis31:41 Hih kum sawm nih sung na inn sungah kong om khin hi. Na tanu nihte, kum sawm le kum li sung kong thalawh a, na tuuhonte, kum guk sung kong thalawh a, nangmah in ka thaman sawm vei na kheel hi." 
Genesis31:42 Ka paʼ Pasian, Abrahamʼ Pasian le Isaacʼ Zahtak pa in kei hong ompih lo hileh, tu-in nangmah in khut hawmguakin kei nong sawl khia taktak ding hi. Pasian in ka thuakna le ka nasepna mu a, zan zanin nang hong thuhilh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:43 Tua ciangin Laban in dawngin Jakob kiangah, “Tanute pen keima tanu hi; naupangte zong keima naupang hi; tuuhonte, keima tuu hon hi a, na muh khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. Ahih hangin tu ni-in hih ka tanute hitaleh amauʼ sung pan a piang naupangteʼ tung hitaleh keʼn bang cih thei ding ka hi hiam?" 
Genesis31:44 Tu-in hong pai in, nang le kei in thuciamna khat bawl ni; suangcian khat bawlin nang le keiʼ kikalah teci hisak ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:45 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in suang khat la-in khuamin a phut hi. 
Genesis31:46 Jakob in a behte kiangah, “Suang khawm un,” ci a, amaute in suang la-in suangcian khat a bawl uh hi. Tua suangcian gei ah amaute in an a nekhawm uh hi." 
Genesis31:47 Laban in, Jegar-sahadutha, ci hi. Ahih hangin Jakob in, Galeed, ci hi." 
Genesis31:48 Laban in, “Hih suangcian pen tu ni-in nang le keiʼ kikalah teci ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in, Galeed, ci-in min phuak a," 
Genesis31:49 a khuam pen Mizpah, ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Laban in, “Eite khatlekhat i tuam om ciangin Topa in nang le keiʼ kikalah hong encik tahen." 
Genesis31:50 Ka tanute na bawlsiat a, ka tanuteʼ banah zi na lak beh leh, eite tawh kuamah a om loh hangin nang le keiʼ kikalah Pasian, teci ahihna phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis31:51 Tua ciangin Laban in Jakobʼ kiangah, “Nang le keiʼ kikalah ka phuh sa hih suangcian mu in." 
Genesis31:52 Siatna a bawl dingin keimah in hih suangcian khengin nang kiangah kong pai loh nading, nang zong hih suangcian le khuam khengin kei kiangah nong pai loh nadingin hih suangcian le suangkhuam, teci ahi hi." 
Genesis31:53 Abrahamʼ Pasian le Nahorʼ Pasian, amauʼ pateʼ Pasian in eiteʼ kikalah thu khen tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in ama pa Isaacʼ Zahtak pa tawh a kiciam hi." 
Genesis31:54 Jakob in mual tungah biakpiakna pia-in an ne dingin a behte a sam hi. Amaute in an ne uh a, zan tawntung mual tungah a om uh hi." 
Genesis31:55 Zingsang tungin Laban tho-in, a tute le a tanute namin amaute thupha a piak khit ciangin pai khia-in a inn ah a ciahkik hi." 
Genesis32:1 Jakob zong ama lampi ah paisuak a, Pasianʼ vantung mite in amah na dawn hi." 
Genesis32:2 Jakob in amaute a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte, Pasianʼ galkapte!,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Mahanaim, ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Genesis32:3 Jakob in Edom gam, Seir leitang ah a om a sanggampa Esau kiangah kamtaite ma sawl a," 
Genesis32:4 amaute hilhin, “Note in ka topa Esau kiangah hih bangin na ci ding uh hi: Na nasem pa Jakob in, ‘Laban’ kiangah peemta-in tu ciang dong ka om hi." 
Genesis32:5 Keimah in bawngtal, la, tuu hon, nasem pasal le nasem numeite ka nei hi. Na mai ah maipha ka muh theih nadingin ka topa tungah a gen dingin kong sawl hi, ci hiʼ, ci un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:6 Kamtaite, Jakob kiangah hong ciahkik uh a, “Na sanggampa Esau kiangah ka va pai uh hi. Nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong pai a, amah tawh mihing za li om hi,” ci-in hong gen uh hi." 
Genesis32:7 Tua ciangin Jakob nakpi takin lau-in lungkham hi. Amah in ama kiang a om mite, tuuhonte, bawnghonte le kalaohte pawl nihin khen a," 
Genesis32:8 “Pawl khat ah Esau pai-in a suksiat leh a pawl khat suakta ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Genesis32:9 Jakob in, “Ka pu Abrahamʼ Pasian le ka pa Isaacʼ Pasian, keima kiangah, ‘Na gam le na behte kiangah ciahkik in; nangʼ tungah hoihna kong bawl ding hi,’ hong ci Topa aw," 
Genesis32:10 kei pen na itna kip khempeuh lak pan a neu pen le na nasem pa tunga nong lah sa na thumannate khempeuh tawh ka kilawm kei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka ciangkhut guak tawh hih Jordan ka kantan a, ahi zongin tu-in pawl nih ka cing khinta hi." 
Genesis32:11 Ka sanggampa Esauʼ khut sung pan kei hong khah khia in, kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hong pai-in kote khempeuh, numeite, naupangte tawh hong thah khit khak ding ka lau hi." 
Genesis32:12 Ahih hangin nangmah in, ‘Na tungah hoihna kong bawl dinga, na suanlekhakte tuipi sehnel zahin a honpi a kisim thei loin ka bawl ding hi,’ nong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:13 Tua ahih ciangin amah tua zanin tua lai ah giak a, ama neih sung panin a sanggampa Esau ading letsong" 
Genesis32:14 keelpi za nih le keeltal sawm nih, tuupi za nih le tuutal sawm nih," 
Genesis32:15 kalaoh nawisuuk sawm thum le a note, bawngpi sawm li le bawngtal sawm, lapi sawm nih le latal sawm a la hi." 
Genesis32:16 Amah in hihte a nasemteʼ khut sungah amauʼ hon ciatin pia a, ama nasemte kiangah, “Ka mai ah na paisuak unla, hon khat le hon khat kikal kihalsak un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:17 Amah in a masa pente tungah thu hilh a, “Ka sanggampa Esau in note hong dawnin, ‘Kua-aʼ na hi uh hiam? Koi pan a hong pai na hi uh hiam? Na mai uh a om hihte kua-aʼ ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot ciangin" 
Genesis32:18 note in, ‘Na nasem pa Jakob-aʼ ahi hi. Hihte pen ka topa Esauʼ tungah letsongin hong kipuak ahi hi. Tua tham loin amah ka nung uh ah om hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:19 Amah in tua mah bangin a nihna, a thumna le ganhing honte a zuite khempeuh kiangah, “Amah tawh na kituah uh ciangin Esauʼ kiangah a kibang mahin na gen ding uh hi." 
Genesis32:20 Note in, ‘Tua tham loin na nasem pa Jakob ka nung uh ah om hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka mai ah a pai letsong tawh amah ka lungdamsak zo kha dinga, tua khit ciangin ama maipha ka mu ding hi. Amah in kei hong sang kha ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Genesis32:21 Tua ahih ciangin letsong a piak dingte, ama mai ah paisak a, amah ahihleh tua zanin giahphual ah a giak lai hi." 
Genesis32:22 Tua zan mahin amah tho-in a zi nihte, a nasem numei nihte le a ta sawm le khatte la-in, Jabbok ngahmun a kantan hi." 
Genesis32:23 Amah in amaute la-in lui gal khat ah puak a, tua mah bangin a neih khempeuh zong a galkahsak hi." 
Genesis32:24 Jakob amah guak bek om lai a, zingsang khuavak dong mi khat in amah a laii hi." 
Genesis32:25 Tua mipa in Jakob a zawh lohna a theih ciangin amah in a khelkom sung suksak hi. Tua bangin amah tawh a kilaiina-in Jakobʼ khelguh a kilawi hi. 
Genesis32:26 Tua ciangin amah in, “Khua vak ta ahih ciangin hong khah in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Jakob in, “Kei, thupha nong piak kei leh kong khah kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:27 Amah in, “Na min bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Jakob,” ci hi." 
Genesis32:28 Tua ciangin amah in, “Na min Jakob, kici nawn loin Israel, kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian le mite tawh na kilaii khinzo a, na zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:29 Tua ciangin Jakob in amah dongin, “Na min hong gen in, hong thum ing,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Bang hanga ka min hong dong na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua lai ah amah in Jakob thupha a pia hi." 
Genesis32:30 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in tua mun pen Peniel, ci-in min a phuak hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh maitang kituahin Pasian ka mu khin a, ahi zongin kei hong kihing khawi lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis32:31 A khelpiʼ hangin amah bai kawmin Peniel a kantan laitakin ni hong suak hi. 
Genesis32:32 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin Israel mite in khelkom tunga a om khel thagui ne lo uh hi. Amah in Jakobʼ khelkom, a khel thagui tung a sukna hang ahi hi." 
Genesis33:1 Jakob khuadak a, Esau tawh mihing za li hong pai a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Leah, Rachel le nasem numei nihteʼ lakah a naupangte a khen hi." 
Genesis33:2 Amah in nasem numeite le a tate masa sakin, tua ciangin Leah le a tate, tua ciangin Rachel le Josef a nunung penin a koih hi." 
Genesis33:3 Amah ahihleh amauteʼ mai ah pai-in, a sanggampaʼ kiang nai a tun matengin leilak ah sagih vei a kun hi." 
Genesis33:4 Ahih hangin amah a dawn dingin Esau hong tai-in, amah ngawng kawi a, pomcipin nam a, amaute a kap uh hi." 
Genesis33:5 Esau khuadak to-in nupite le naupangte a muh ciangin amah in, “Nang tawh a om hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jakob in, “Pasian in hehpihna tawh na nasem pa a piak tate ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:6 Tua ciangin nasem numeite in hong naih uh a, amau le a tate hong kun uh hi." 
Genesis33:7 Leah le a tate in zong tua bangmahin hong naihin a kun uh hi. A nunung penin Josef le Rachel in hong naihin a kun uh hi. 
Genesis33:8 Esau in, “Ka kituah pih hih a honte khempeuh bang na cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jakob in dawngin, “Ka topaʼ maipha zon nading,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:9 Ahih hangin Esau in, “A kicing nei ing, sanggam aw; nangʼ neihte nangma adingin kem in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:10 Jakob in, “Hi lo hi, nangʼ tungah hong thum ing. Na muhna ah maipha ngah ka hih leh ka khut sung panin ka letsongte hong sang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih banga maipha tawh kei nong sanna, na maitang ka muh ding pen Pasianʼ maitang muh tawh kibang taktak hi." 
Genesis33:11 Nangʼ kiang a hong kipaipih ka letsong nong san nadingin hong thum ing. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kei hong hehpih mahmah a, a kicing ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin amah in kun teitei ahih manin Esau in zong a sang hi." 
Genesis33:12 Tua ciangin Esau in, “Tu-in pai khawm ni. Na mai ah kei ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:13 Ahih hangin Jakob in ama kiangah, “Naupangte a hat lohna ka topa in na thei hi. Tuuhonte le bawngte, a no ngek neite ka lungphamawh hi. Ni khat sung kinak hawl lua leh ganhonte khempeuh si ding uh hi." 
Genesis33:14 Na nasem paʼ mai ah ka topa na pai inla, Seir ah ka topaʼ kiang kong tun matengin ka mai-a om ganhingteʼ thahatna le naupangteʼ hatna tawh kituakin damdamin kong makaih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:15 Tua ahih ciangin Esau in, “Kei tawh a om mite pawl khat, nangʼ kiangah hong nusia ning,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “A kisapna bang om ahi hiam? Ka topaʼ muhna ah kei maipha hong ngahsak in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis33:16 Tua ahih ciangin Esau in tua ni-in ama lampi zui-in Seir ah a ciahkik hi. 
Genesis33:17 Ahih hangin Jakob, Sukkoth lamah pai a, ama ading inn le a ganhingte ading hampheng a lam hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun a min Sukkoth, kici hi." 
Genesis33:18 Paddanaram panin hong pai lampi, Kanaan gam sunga om Shekhem khuapi ah lungmuang takin Jakob hong tunga, a khuapi kiangah phual a sat hi." 
Genesis33:19 Amah in Shekhemʼ pa Hamorʼ innkuanteʼ tung panin a puanbuk lamna sa leitang dangka za khat tawh a lei hi. 
Genesis33:20 Tua lai ah amah in biakna tau khat bawl a, El-Elohe-Israel, ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Genesis34:1 Ni khat, Jakob le Leahʼ tanu Dinah tua gam numeite kiangah va hawh hi." 
Genesis34:2 Hiv mi Hamorʼ tapa Shekhem, tua gam ulian pa in amah a muh ciangin, amah manin luppih a, amah siasak hi." 
Genesis34:3 Amah in Jakobʼ tanu Dinah hoih sa mahmah ahih manin itin kam khum takin hopih hi. 
Genesis34:4 Tua ahih ciangin Shekhem in a pa Hamorʼ kiangah, “Hih numei ka zi dingin hong laksak in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis34:5 Tu-in Jakob in a tanu Dinah a kisiatsakna za hi. Ahih hangin a tate, a ganhingte tawh gamlak ah om ahih manin amaute hong tun matengin Jakob in bangmah gen loin om hi." 
Genesis34:6 Shekhemʼ pa Hamor, Jakob tawh a kimu dingin ama kiangah va pai hi." 
Genesis34:7 Jakobʼ tapate in tua thu a zak uh ciangin gamlak panin hong ciah uh hi. Amaute lungkim loin heh mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jakobʼ tanu tawh a lup khop manin amah in Israel miteʼ sungah a kilawm lo hai gamtatna hong tun hi. 
Genesis34:8 Ahih hangin Hamor in amaute tawh thu gen a, “Ka tapa Shekhem in na tanu ngai mahmah hi. A teenpih dingin nong piak nadingin kong thum hi." 
Genesis34:9 Kote tawh kiteenna hong bawl un. Na tanute uh koteʼ tungah hong pia unla, no adingin ka tanute uh la un." 
Genesis34:10 Koteʼ lakah nong teeng ding uh hi. No adingin leitang hong kipia ding hi. Ka gam sung uh ah teengin sum bawl unla, neihsa lam un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis34:11 Shekhem in a numeiʼ pa le a numeiʼ sanggamteʼ kiangah, “Noteʼ mai ah maipha hong musak unla, keiʼ tunga nong cih peuhpeuh uh kong pia ding hi." 
Genesis34:12 Kei kiang panin moman le letsong tampi hong ngen un. Keiʼ tunga nong nget zahzah uh kong pia ding hi. Zi dingin a numei hong pia hoh un,” ci thuah lai hi." 
Genesis34:13 Shekhem in a sanggamnu uh Dinah siasak khin ahih manin Jakobʼ tapate in Shekhem le a pa Hamor khemna tawh dawng uh hi. 
Genesis34:14 Amaute in amau kiangah, “Vun ki-at lopaʼ tungah ka sanggamnu uh ka piak ding uh ka ngaihsun thei kei uh hi. Tua bangin pia le ung ko adingin mindaina hi ding hi." 
Genesis34:15 Hih bangin nong gamtat uh leh ka thukim bek ding uh hi: Noteʼ sung panin pasal khempeuh vun ki-at le-uhcin kote mah bang na suak ding uh hi. 
Genesis34:16 Tua ciangin ka tanute uh noteʼ tungah hong pia-in, na tanute uh kote adingin kong la ding uh a, note tawh kote hong teengin mi khat i suak ding hi." 
Genesis34:17 Ahih hangin note in ka thu uh hong ngai loin, vun na ki-at kei uh leh, ka tanu uh ka la ding uh a, kote ka paikhia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis34:18 Amauʼ thugente in Hamor le Hamorʼ tapa Shekhem lungdamsak hi. 
Genesis34:19 Tangvalpa in Jakobʼ tanu deih ahih manin tua banga a gamtat ding zekai lo hi. Amah pen, a kipahtawi a thupi pen khat ahi hi." 
Genesis34:20 Tua ahih ciangin Hamor le a tapa Shekhem, amauʼ khua kulhpi kongpi ah hong pai-in a khuapih mite uh kiangah thu gen a," 
Genesis34:21 “Hih mite, eiteʼ tungah hong nop mahmah uh hi. I gam sungah teengsakin sum bawlsak ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, amau ading a kicing dingin i leitang a zai hi. Amauʼ tanute zi-in teenpih ni. Eiteʼ tanute zong amau pia ni." 
Genesis34:22 Hih thu khat bek tawh eite tawh ten khop ding, mi khat suah ding amau thukim uh hi. Amaute vun a ki-at bangin eiteʼ lakah pasal khempeuh vun ki-at ding ahi hi." 
Genesis34:23 Amauʼ bawngte, amauteʼ neihsate le amauʼ ganhingte khempeuh ei ading hi lo ahi hiam? Amaute tawh eite thukim hoh ni. Tua hileh amaute, eite tawh hong teeng khawm ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis34:24 Khuapi kulh kongpi ah a pai mi khempeuh in Hamor le a tapa Shekhemʼ thu a mang uh hi. Khuapi kulh kongpi ah a hong pai pasal khempeuh a vun ki-at uh hi. 
Genesis34:25 A ni thum ni, amaute meima vei-in a om laitakun Jakobʼ tapa nihte Simeon le Levi, Dinahʼ sanggamte in amauʼ namsau la-in theih kholh lohin khuapi va sim uh a, pasal khempeuh a that uh hi." 
Genesis34:26 Amaute in Hamor le a tapa Shekhem, namsau tawh that uh a, Shekhemʼ inn sung panin Dinah la khia-in a paikhia uh hi." 
Genesis34:27 Jakob tapa dangte in a kithat miteʼ tungtawnin khuapi susia uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggamnu uh kisiasak hi. 
Genesis34:28 Amaute in a tuuhonte le a bawnghonte, a late le khuapi sunga om peuhmah le lo sunga om peuhmah a laksak uh hi." 
Genesis34:29 Amauʼ neihsa khempeuh, a naupangte khempeuh, a zite khempeuh le inn sunga om na khempeuh laksak uh a, amauʼ neihsa a suaksak uh hi." 
Genesis34:30 Tua ciangin Jakob in Simeon le Leviʼ kiangah, “Hih leitang ah a teeng, Kanaan mite le Perez mite tungah kei a muhdahhuai-in nong bawlna uh tawh keiʼ tungah haksatna nong tun uh hi. Keiʼ pawl mite tawm hi. Amaute keiʼ langah hong kikaikhawmin kei hong sim leh, kei le ka innkuanpihte hong susia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis34:31 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Amah in ka sanggamnu uh numei paktat bangin a bawl ding kilawm ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis35:1 Pasian in Jakob kiangah, “Kithawi-in Bethel ah pai to inla, tua lai ah teeng in. Na sanggampa Esauʼ kiang panin na tai hun lai-a nangʼ tungah a hong kilang Pasian adingin biakna tau khat bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis35:2 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in a innkuanpihte le amah tawh a omte khempeuh kiangah, “Note lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koih khia unla, nomau kisiansuahin, na puante uh khek un." 
Genesis35:3 Ka lungkham hunin hong huhin, ka paina khempeuh ah a hong ompih Pasian adingin biakna tau khat ka bawl theih nadingin eite kipanin Bethel ah pai to ni,” a ci hi." 
Genesis35:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jakobʼ tungah amauʼ neih gamdang pasian khempeuh le a bil uh a om bilbahte a pia uh hi. Jakob in Shekhem khua gei-a tawsaw nuai ah tuate a seel hi. 
Genesis35:5 Jakob le a tapate khualzinin a pai laitakun amauʼ kiim a om khuapiteʼ tungah Pasianʼ kiang panin lauhuaina lianpi khat tung ahih manin amaute in Jakob le a tapate delh lo uh hi. 
Genesis35:6 Kanaan gam sunga om Luz (Bethel) ah Jakob le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tung uh a," 
Genesis35:7 tua lai ah amah in biakna tau khat lamin, tua mun Elbethel, ci-in min a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggampa kiang panin a tai lai-in tua munah ama tungah Pasian mahmah kilang hi." 
Genesis35:8 Tua ciangin Rebekah a cingnu Deborah si a, Bethel khang tawsaw nuai ah amah kivui hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun min pen Allon-bakuth, kici hi." 
Genesis35:9 Paddanaram panin amah hong pai ciangin Jakobʼ tungah Pasian kilangkik a, amah thupha a pia hi." 
Genesis35:10 Pasian in ama kiangah, “Na min Jakob ahi hi. Ahi zongin tu-a kipanin nangma min pen Jakob kici nawn lo dinga, Israel, hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Israel, kici hi." 
Genesis35:11 Pasian in ama kiangah, “Kei pen Vanglian Pasian ka hi hi: Pung inla, tampi pha in. Minam khat le minamte hon khat nangʼ sung panin piang dinga, nangʼ sung panin kumpite zong piang ding hi." 
Genesis35:12 Abraham le Isaac tunga ka piak leitang nangma tungah kong pia dinga, nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakteʼ tungah tua leitang ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis35:13 Tua ciangin amah tawh a kihona mun ama kiang panin Pasian pai khiato hi. 
Genesis35:14 Jakob in amah tawh a kihona munah suangkhuam khat phut a, amah in tua tungah leenggahzu tawh biakpiakna a sung khia hi. Tua tungah sathau zong a sung hi." 
Genesis35:15 Tua ahih ciangin Jakob in, Pasian in amah a hopihna mun, a min Bethel, a ci hi." 
Genesis35:16 Tua ciangin Bethel panin amaute ding khia uh a, Efrath panin a gamla sim lai mun a tun laitakun Rachel a nausuah hun tunga, amah nakpi takin a gim hi." 
Genesis35:17 Amah a gim mahmah laitakin naudom nu in ama kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in. Tu-in tapa dang khat na nei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis35:18 Amah a bei laitakin amah in a min dingin Benoni, a ci hi. Ahih hangin a pa in ama min Benjamin, ci-in a phuak hi." 
Genesis35:19 Tua ahih ciangin Rachel si-in, Efrath (Bethlehem) paina lampi ah kivui a," 
Genesis35:20 Jakob in ama han tungah mualsuang khat a phut hi. Tua pen tu ni dongin tua lai mahah a om Rachelʼ han mualsuang khuam ahi hi. 
Genesis35:21 Israel in a khualzin zom lai a, Eder tausang gal khat ah a puanbuk a lam hi." 
Genesis35:22 Tua gamah Israel a ten laitakin Reuben in a paʼ zineu Bilhah luppih hi. Israel in tua thu za-in heh mahmah hi. Tu-in Jakobʼ tapate, sawm le nih ahi hi." 
Genesis35:23 Leahʼ tapate: Reuben (Jakobʼ ta u pen), Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar le Zebulun ahi hi." 
Genesis35:24 Rachelʼ tapate: Josef le Benjamin ahi hi. 
Genesis35:25 Rachelʼ nasem numei Bilhahʼ tapate: Dan le Naftali ahi hi. 
Genesis35:26 Leahʼ nasem numei Zilpahʼ tapate: Gad le Asher ahi hi. Hihte pen Paddanaram gamah ama sunga suak Jakobʼ tapa sawm le nihte ahi hi. 
Genesis35:27 Abraham le Isaac tawl khat a omna Mamre, ahih kei leh Kiriath-arba (Hebron) a, a pa Isaac a omna ah Jakob hong pai hi." 
Genesis35:28 Tu-in Isaacʼ khan sung, kum za le kum sawm giat ahi hi." 
Genesis35:29 Isaac in a nunung pen a hu sang hi. Amah a teek, kum tampi a pha-in si a, ama miteʼ kiangah kigawm hi. Ama tapa Esau le Jakob in amah a vui uh hi." 
Genesis36:1 Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suanlekhakte ahi hi. 
Genesis36:2 Esau in Kanaan numeite zi-in la hi. Hit mi Elonʼ tanu Adah, Hiv mi Zibeonʼ tapa Anahʼ tanu Oholibamah," 
Genesis36:3 le Nebaiothʼ sanggamnu, Ishmaelʼ tanu Basemath ahi hi." 
Genesis36:4 Adah in Esau tawh Elifaz nei a, Basemath in Reuel nei hi." 
Genesis36:5 Oholibamah in Jeush, Jalam le Korah nei hi. Hihte pen Kanaan gam sunga a neih Esauʼ tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis36:6 Tua ciangin Esau in a zite, a tapate, a tanute le ama innkuan sunga mi khempeuh; a bawngte, a ganhingte khempeuh; le Kanaan gam sunga a lam a neihsa khempeuh la-in a sanggampa Jakob kiang panin gamdang khat ah paikhia hi." 
Genesis36:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh ten khop theih dingin amauʼ neihsate tam lua a, a ganhingte uh hangin tawl khat a omna uh leitang in amaute vak zo lo hi." 
Genesis36:8 Tua ahih ciangin Seir mual tung gamah Esau teeng hi. Esauʼ min dang khat pen Edom ahi hi. 
Genesis36:9 Hihte pen Seir mual tung gam a Edom miteʼ pupi Esauʼ suanlekhakte ahi hi. 
Genesis36:10 Esauʼ tapate: Esauʼ zi Adahʼ tapa Elifaz, Esauʼ zi Basemathʼ tapa Reuel ahi hi." 
Genesis36:11 Elifazʼ tapate: Teman, Omar, Zefo, Gatam le Kenaz ahi hi." 
Genesis36:12 (Timna pen Esauʼ tapa Elifazʼ zineu hi a, amah in Elifaz tawh Amalek nei hi.) Hihte pen Esauʼ zi Adahʼ tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis36:13 Reuelʼ tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esauʼ zi Basemathʼ tapate ahi hi." 
Genesis36:14 Esauʼ zi, Zibeonʼ tapa Anahʼ tanu Oholibamah tapate: Jeush, Jalam le Korah ahi hi." 
Genesis36:15 Esauʼ suante hih bang ahi hi. Esauʼ ta masa Elifazʼ tate: Teman, Omar, Zefo, Kenaz," 
Genesis36:16 Korah, Gatam le Amalek ahi hi. Hihte pen Edom gam sungah Elifazʼ suante hi a, Esauʼ zi Adahʼ sunga piangte ahi hi." 
Genesis36:17 Esauʼ tapa Reuelʼ tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah hi a, Edom gam sungah a om Reuelʼ suante ahi hi. Amaute pen Esauʼ zi Basemathʼ sung panin a piangte ahi hi." 
Genesis36:18 Esauʼ zi Oholibamahʼ tapate: Jeush, Jalam le Korah ahi hi. Hihte pen Esauʼ zi, Anahʼ tanu Oholibamahʼ sung panin a piangte ahi hi." 
Genesis36:19 Hihte pen Esau (Edom) suante hi a, amauteʼ sung pan beh lutangte ahi uh hi." 
Genesis36:20 Tua gam a teeng Hori mi Seirʼ tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah," 
Genesis36:21 Dishon, Ezer le Dishan hi a, Edom gam sunga Seirʼ suante ahi Hori miteʼ sung pan beh lutang ahi uh hi." 
Genesis36:22 Lotanʼ tapate: Hori le Heman ahi hi. Lotanʼ sanggamnu Timna ahi hi. 
Genesis36:23 Shobalʼ tapate: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shefo le Onam ahi hi." 
Genesis36:24 Zibeonʼ tapate: Ai ah le Anah ahi hi. Amah pen a pa Zibeonʼ late a cin laitakin gamlak ah a sa ciktui a mu pa Anah ahi hi. 
Genesis36:25 Anahʼ tate: Dishon le Anahʼ tanu Oholibamah ahi hi. 
Genesis36:26 Dishonʼ tapate: Hemdan, Eshban, Ithran le Kheran ahi hi." 
Genesis36:27 Ezerʼ tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan le Akan ahi hi." 
Genesis36:28 Dishanʼ tapate: Uz le Aran ahi hi. 
Genesis36:29 Hori miteʼ beh lutangte: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah," 
Genesis36:30 Dishon, Ezer le Dishan ahi hi. Hihte pen Seir gam sungah amauʼ beh ciatin Hori miteʼ sung pan beh lutang ahi uh hi." 
Genesis36:31 Hihte pen Israel mite tungah kumpi khat beek in a uk ma-in Edom gam sunga kumpite ahi hi. 
Genesis36:32 Beorʼ tapa Bela in Edom gam sung uk a, ama khuapi min Dinhabah ahi hi." 
Genesis36:33 Bela si a, Bozrah khuami Zerahʼ tapa Jobab in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:33 Bela si a, Bozrah khuami Zerahʼ tapa Jobab in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:34 Jobab si a, Teman miteʼ gam mi Husham in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:34 Jobab si a, Teman miteʼ gam mi Husham in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:35 Husham si a, Moab gam sungah Midian mite a zo Bedadʼ tapa Hadad in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Avith ahi hi." 
Genesis36:36 Hadad si a, Masrekah khuami Samlah in ama tangin uk hi." 
Genesis36:37 Samlah si a, Eufratis gun gei-a Rehoboth khuami Shaul in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:38 Shaul si a, Akborʼ tapa Baal-hanan in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Genesis36:39 Akborʼ tapa Baal-hanan si a, Hadar in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Pau ahi hi. Ama ziʼ min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahabʼ tanu Matred, Matred tanu Mehetabel ahi hi." 
Genesis36:40 Amauʼ innkuan le a teenna, amauʼ min tawh kizui-in, Esauʼ suan sung pan minamteʼ min: Timna, Alvah, Jetheth," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon," 
Genesis36:42 Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar," 
Genesis36:43 Magdiel le Iram ahi hi. Hihte in amauʼ neih, amauʼ teenna leitang min dingin amauʼ min mah vawh pah uh a, Esauʼ suan, Edom mi a kicite ahi uh hi." 
Genesis37:1 A pa tawl khat a teenna Kanaan gamah Jakob teeng hi. 
Genesis37:2 Jakob innkuanteʼ tangthu hih bang ahi hi. Josef kum sawm le kum sagih pha ahih manin a sanggamte tawh tuu hon cing hi. A paʼ zite Bilhah le Zilpahʼ tapate tawh tangval ahi uh hi. Josef in a pa uh kiangah amauteʼ siat gamtatnate a gen hi. 
Genesis37:3 Tu-in Israel in a ta dangte khat peuhpeuh sangin Josef it zaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a teek khitin a neih a tapa ahi hi. Amah in ama adingin puan tualpi bansau khat a bawlsak hi. 
Genesis37:4 Ahih hangin a pa un a sanggamte khempeuh sangin amah a itzawkna a sanggamte in a muh uh ciangin, amaute in Josef mudah uh a, nuam takin amah hopih thei lo uh hi." 
Genesis37:5 Tu-in Josef in mang khat man a, amah in a sanggamteʼ lakah a gen ciangin amaute in amah muhdah semsemna-in nei uh hi." 
Genesis37:6 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Keima mat hih mang ngai un:" 
Genesis37:7 Eite in lo lai ah buhlom i hen a, keima buhlom tho-in ding tang hi. Tua kiimah noteʼ buhlom kikhawm a, keima buhlom mai ah kun uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:8 A sanggamte in ama kiangah, “Koteʼ tungah nang in hong uk dinga, koteʼ tungah ukna aana nei ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a mangte le a thugenteʼ hangin amah mudah semsem uh hi." 
Genesis37:9 Tua ciangin amah in mang dang khat man a, tua mang a sanggamte kiangah genin, “Mang dang khat ka man hi. Ni, kha le aksi sawm le khatte keiʼ mai ah hong kun uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:10 Ahih hangin amah in a pa le a sanggamteʼ kiangah a gen ciangin a pa in amah taii-in, “Nangma mat hih mang a bangci mang ahi hiam? Kei le na nu le na sanggamte, nangma mai leilak ah a kun dingin hong pai ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:11 A sanggamte in amah haza uh a, ahih hangin a pa in hih thute a ciamteh hi." 
Genesis37:12 Khat vei a pa uhʼ tuuhonte a cing dingin Shekhem gei ah a sanggamte a pai hi. 
Genesis37:13 Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamte in Shekhem ah tuu hon cing uh hi lo ahi hiam? Hong pai in, amauʼ kiangah hong sawl ning,” a ci hi. Amah in a kiangah, “Hiah om ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Tu-in va pai inla, na sanggamte le tuuhonte a cidam hiam va thei inla, kei kiangah thu hong zasakkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Hebron kuam panin Josef sawl a, Shekhem ah amah va tung hi." 
Genesis37:15 Gamlak ah a vak kawikawina mi khat in mu a, “Bang zongzong na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Genesis37:16 “Ka sanggamte a zong ka hi hi. Amaute in koi lai ah tuu hon cing uh hiam, hong gen in, hong thum ing,” amah in ci hi." 
Genesis37:17 Mipa in, “Amaute paikhia zo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Dothan ah pai ni,’ a cih uh ka za hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggamteʼ nungah Josef pai a, Dothan ah amaute a mu hi." 
Genesis37:18 Amaute in gamlapi ah amah na mu uh a, amauteʼ nai ah amah hong tun ma-in amaute in amah thah ding na vaihawm uh hi." 
Genesis37:19 Amaute khatlekhat in, “Hih lai ah mangman pa hong pai hi." 
Genesis37:20 Tu-in hong pai un. Amah thatin dum sung khat ah lawn ni. Tua ciangin gamsa khat in amah ne tum khin hi, i ci ding hi. A mangte bang a suak hiam i mu ding hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Genesis37:21 Ahih hangin Reuben in tua thu a zak ciangin, “Amah that kei ni,” ci-in, amauʼ khut sung panin amah hon khia hi." 
Genesis37:22 A paʼ kiang a tunpihkik theih nadingin amauʼ khut sung pan a hotkhiat theih nadingin Reuben in amauteʼ kiangah, “Amah that kei un. Hih gamlak dum sungah amah lawn un. Ahih hangin amah bangmah cih kei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:23 Tua ahih ciangin, a sanggamteʼ kiangah Josef hong tun ciangin, ama silh lai a puan tualpi bansau a hawk khiatsak uh hi." 
Genesis37:24 Amaute in Josef la-in dum sung khat ah a lawn uh hi. A dum pen a hawm hi a, a sungah tui om lo hi." 
Genesis37:25 Tua ciangin amaute an ne dingin tu uh hi. A khuadak uh leh Gilead panin Ishmael mite a kalaohte uh tawh singnai, lingsi le myrrh paknamtui pua-in Egypt ah puak suk dingin a pai mu uh hi." 
Genesis37:26 Tua ciangin Judah in a sanggamte kiangah, “I sanggampa thatin amah i thahna im lehang bang meetna om ahi hiam?" 
Genesis37:27 Hong pai un, Ishmael mite kiangah amah zuak ni. Amah bangmah cih kei ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah i sanggampa, eima cilesa ahi hi,” a ci hi. A sanggamte in ama thu mang hi." 
Genesis37:28 Tua ciangin Midian mi sum bawlte in hong nawk hi. Amaute in Josef kai to-in dum sung panin dom khiato uh a, Ishmael mite tungah ngun shekel sawm nihin amah zuak uh a, amaute in Egypt ah Josef a paipih uh hi." 
Genesis37:29 Reuben dumah paikikin dum sungah Josef a om lohna a muh ciangin amah in a puan bal kek a," 
Genesis37:30 a sanggamte kiangah ciahkikin, “Tangvalpa om nawn lo hi. Kei bangci ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:31 Tua ciangin amaute in Josefʼ puan la-in, keel khat go uh a, a sisan sungah a puan diah uh hi."
