Genesis37:32 Amaute in a puan tualpi bansau a pa uh kiangah puak uh a, “Hih puan ka mu uh hi. Na tapaʼ puan hi hiam, hi lo hiam tu-in thei in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis37:33 Amah in Josefʼ puan ahih lam thei a, “Ka tapaʼ puan ahi hi. Gamsa khatpeuh in amah ne tum khinzo hi ding hi. Josef kibalnen gawp ahihna up loh nading om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis37:34 Tua ciangin Jakob in ama puan bal kekin, a kawng ah puanhampi teeng a, a tapaʼ hangin ni tampi sung a kap hi." 
Genesis37:35 A tapate le a tanute khempeuh in amah hehnem uh a, ahih hangin amah hehnep zawhin om lo a, “Hi lo hi. A kap sa-in ka tapa kiang Leinuai ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin ama hangin a pa kap hi." 
Genesis37:36 Tua kikal sungin Midian mite in Egypt gam sunga inncing mang, Faroʼ nuai ah ulian ahi Potifarʼ tungah Josef na zuak uh hi." 
Genesis38:1 Tua hun laitakin Judah a sanggamte kiang panin pai sukin, Adullam mi Hirah min nei mi khat tawh om khawm hi." 
Genesis38:2 Tua lai ah Judah in Kanaan mi Shuaʼ tanu mu hi. Amah in tua nu teen pihin luppih a," 
Genesis38:3 tua nu gai-in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Er a phuak hi." 
Genesis38:4 Tua nu gai leuleu-in tapa khat nei a, tua nu in a min Onan a phuak hi." 
Genesis38:5 Tua nu in tapa khat nei leuleu-in a min Shelah a phuak hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Shelah a neih laitakin Khezib ah amah a om hi. 
Genesis38:6 Judah in a tapa masa Er adingin zi khat la a, tua nuʼ min Tamar ahi hi." 
Genesis38:7 Ahih hangin Judahʼ ta masa Er pen Topaʼ muhna ah hoih lo a, Topa in amah that hi." 
Genesis38:8 Tua ciangin Judah in Onan kiangah, “Na sanggampaʼ zi tawh lum khawm inla, tua nuʼ tungah pasalʼ sanggamteʼ tavuan sem inla, na sanggampa adingin ta nei in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:9 Ahih hangin Onan in tate pen ama aʼ ahih loh ding thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampaʼ zi tawh a lup khop ciangin a sanggampaʼ tungah ta pia kha ding ahih manin a natui leilak ah buasak hi. 
Genesis38:10 Ama gamtatna Topaʼ muhna ah lungkimhuai lo a, Topa in amah zong a that hi." 
Genesis38:11 Tua ciangin Judah in a monu Tamarʼ tungah, “Ka tapa Shelah a gol mateng na paʼ inn ah meigongnu-in va om in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sanggamte mah bangin amah zong si kha ding ci-in lau hi. Tua ahih ciangin Tamar pai-in a paʼ inn ah a om hi." 
Genesis38:12 Tua hun sungin Judahʼ zi, Shuaʼ tanu si hi. Judah a dahna hun a ven ciangin a lawm Hirah tawh Timnah a ama tuumul a mette kiangah pai to hi." 
Genesis38:13 “Na teekpa a tuute mul met dingin Timnah ah pai to hi,” ci-in Tamarʼ kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
Genesis38:14 a meigong numei puan suah khia-in, a kituamna silhin amah kituam a, Timnah paina lampi gei-a Enaim paina munah na tu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Shelah a khang cing khin ahihna amah in thei a, ahi zongin amah tawh kiteengsak nai lo hi." 
Genesis38:15 Judah in tua nu a muh ciangin amah in a mai tuam ahih manin numei paktat dingin ngaihsun hi. 
Genesis38:16 Lampi gei-a tua nuʼ kiangah amah pai a, “Hong pai in, lum khawm ni,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu pen a monu ahih lam thei lo hi. Tua nu in, “I lup khop man dingin kei bang hong pia ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:17 Amah in dawngin, “Keel hon panin keel no khat hong puak ning,” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Nong puak mateng khapna khat nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:18 Amah in, “Bang khapna nang hong pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in dawngin, “Na min gelhna, na khauhual le na khut sunga om na ciangkhut,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua nu tungah tuate pia-in, amah luppih a, tua nu a gai hi." 
Genesis38:19 Tua ciangin amah dingin paikhia a, a kikhuhna puan suah khia-in meigong numei ahihna puan a silh hi." 
Genesis38:20 Numeiʼ khut sung panin a khapna a lakik dingin Judah in Adullam mi a lawmpa a gan no tawh a sawl ciangin, amah in tua nu mu zo lo hi." 
Genesis38:21 Amah in tua lai mun mite dong a, “Lam gei Enaim a om numei paktat nu koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Hih lai ah numei paktat omngei lo hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Genesis38:22 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kiangah amah ciahkikin, “Amah ka mu kei hi. Tua lai a om mite in, ‘Hih lai ah numei paktat omngei lo hi,’ hong ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:23 Judah in dawngin, “Eite hong kinuihsan kha ding ahih ciangin a nate ama adingin kem mai hen. Hih gan no ka puak a, nang in tua nu na muh lohna na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:24 Tua zawh kha thum ciangin Judah tungah, “Na monu Tamar paktatin gamta hi. Tua tham loin paktatna tawh naupaii hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Judah in, “Amah paikhiatpih un; amah kihal tum hen,” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:25 Amah a kipaikhiat pih laitakin amah in a teekpa kiangah kam khak a, “Hih nate a nei pa tawh nau ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Ciamteh in, hong thum ing, min gelhna le khauhual le ciangkhut, hih nate kua-aʼ ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis38:26 Tua ciangin Judah in tua nate thei a, “Ka tapa Shelah tawh gawm lo ka hih ciangin, tua numei, kei sangin thuman zaw hi,” a ci hi. Tua nu tawh amah lum khawmkik nawn lo hi." 
Genesis38:27 Tua nu a suah hun a tun ciangin a naubu sungah nih om hi. 
Genesis38:28 Nausuak dingin a nat ciangin, khat in a khut dawksak hi. Naudom nu in khausan khat la-in a khut tungah khih a, “Hih pen hong pai masa,” ci pah hi." 
Genesis38:29 Ahih hangin a khut a dawh tumkik laitakin, en in, a sanggampa hong suak khia hi. Amah in, “Nang adingin a vang nang mahmah in bawl tawm!” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama min Perez kiphuak hi." 
Genesis38:30 Tua khit ciangin a khut tunga khausan tawh a sanggampa hong suak khia a, ama min Zerah kiphuak hi." 
Genesis39:1 Tu-in Egypt ah Josef kipaipih suk a, tua lai-a a paipih Ishmael mite tung panin Egypt mi, inncing mangpa, Faroʼ nuai-a mangpa Potifar in amah na lei hi." 
Genesis39:2 Topa in Josef ompih a, amah nasep a zo mi khat suak hi. Amah, Egypt mi a topaʼ inn sungah om a," 
Genesis39:3 Topa in amah a ompihna le Topa in ama khut sungah a hih khempeuh a mavansakna a topa in mu hi. 
Genesis39:4 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in ama mai ah maipha ngahin ama na sem a, amah in a inn sung ukpa-in bawlin a neih khempeuh a uk dingin a koih hi." 
Genesis39:5 Amah in a inn sung uk leh a neih khempeuh a ukin a bawl a kipan Topa in Josefʼ hangin Egypt mipaʼ innkuan thupha pia hi. Inn sung hitaleh lo sung hitaleh a neih khempeuh tungah Topaʼ thupha om hi. 
Genesis39:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a neih khempeuh Josefʼ khut sungah ap hi. Josef nei khin ahih manin amau nupa sung thu lobuang thudangte lunghihmawh dingin ngaihsun lo hi. Tu-in Josef ngaihbaangin a mel hoih hi. 
Genesis39:7 Tawl khat khit ciangin a topaʼ zi in Josef zawl mit a, “Kei tawh hong lum khawm in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:8 Ahih hangin amah in nialin a topaʼ zi kiangah, “En in, kei hong nei ahih manin ka topa in inn sungah bangmah lunghihmawhna nei lo a, ama neih khempeuh ka khut sungah hong koih khin hi." 
Genesis39:9 Hih inn sungah kei sangin amah lian zaw lo hi. Nang, ama zi na hih manin, nang lobuang kei kiang panin amah in a kep tuam bangmah om lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in hih gitlohna lianpi bawlin Pasianʼ tungah khial ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:10 Amah in ni khat khit ni khat Josef a zol hangin, amah tawh lup khop ding hitaleh omkhop ding hitaleh amah in tua nuʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Genesis39:11 Ahih hangin ni khat, amah a nasep sem dingin inn sungah pai a, inn sungah inn sung mite khat zong a om loh laitakin," 
Genesis39:12 tua nu in a puan-in amah man a, “Kei tawh hong lum khawm hoh in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in tua nuʼ khut sungah a puan nusia-in tai-in tua inn panin a paikhia hi." 
Genesis39:13 Tua nu in, amah in a khut sungah puan nusia-in inn panin a tai khiatna a muh ciangin," 
Genesis39:14 ama inn sung mite samin amaute kiangah, “En un, amah in eite hong no dingin Hebru mi khat eiteʼ lakah hong paipih hi. Kei tawh a lum khawm dingin amah hong sungtang a, nakpi takin kei ka kiko hi." 
Genesis39:15 Ka aw sangsakin ka kikona a zak ciangin amah in ka kiangah a puan nusia a, tai-in inn panin paikhia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:16 Tua ciangin Josefʼ topa inn ah hong ciah mateng amah in a kiangah a puan koih hi. 
Genesis39:17 Tua nu in ama kiangah tua thu mah gen a, “Kote kiang a nong paipih Hebru mi nasem pa keimah a no dingin hong sungtang hi." 
Genesis39:18 Ahih hangin ka aw sangsakin ka kiko phetin amah in a puan kei kiangah nusia-in inn panin tai khia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis39:19 “Na nasem pa in kei hong bawlna dan hih bang hi,” ci-in a zi in ama kiang a a genna a topa in a zak ciangin heh mahmah hi." 
Genesis39:20 Josefʼ topa in amah manin kumpipaʼ thongkiate a kikhumna thong sungah amah koih a, tua thong sungah amah om hi." 
Genesis39:21 Ahih hangin Topa in Josef ompihin ama tungah itna kip lak a, thong ukpaʼ muhna ah maipha a pia hi." 
Genesis39:22 Thong ukpa in thong sunga thong kia khempeuh Josefʼ et dingin ap a, tua lai-a a kisem khempeuh ama sep sa vive ahi hi." 
Genesis39:23 Topa in amah ompih ahih manin Josefʼ etna nuai a om peuhmah thong ukpa in don nawn lo hi. Ama hih peuhmah Topa in daupaisak hi. 
Genesis40:1 Tua zawh tawl khat khit ciangin, Egypt kumpipaʼ anpia pa le a anhuan pa in Egypt kumpipa ahi amauʼ topa hehsak uh hi." 
Genesis40:2 Anpia pipa le anhuan pipa ahi, ama nuai-a mangte nih tungah Faro heh a," 
Genesis40:3 Josef a kikhumna thong sung, inncing mangpaʼ inn sungah amah in amaute a koih hi." 
Genesis40:4 Inncing mangpa in amaute Josef kemsak a, amah in amauteʼ na sem hi. Kikhumna sungah amaute tawl khat om uh hi." 
Genesis40:5 Zan khat amau tegel in mang man uh hi. Thong sunga a om anpia pa le anhuan pa, amauʼ mang a tuam tuak, a mang khiatna zong a tuam tuak mah ahi hi." 
Genesis40:6 Zingsang ciangin amaute kiangah Josef pai-in amaute a muh ciangin, amaute na lungkham uh hi." 
Genesis40:7 Tua ahih ciangin a topaʼ inn sunga amah tawh a kikhumin a om Faroʼ nuai-a mangte amah in dong a, “Bang hangin tu ni-in mai mial na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:8 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Mang ka man uh a, tuate a khia thei ding om lo hi,” na ci uh hi. Josef in amaute kiangah, “Mang khiat theihnate Pasianʼ hong piak hi lo ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong gen un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:9 Tua ahih ciangin anpia pipa in Josef kiangah a mang gen a, “Ka mangin ka mai ah leenggui khat om a," 
Genesis40:10 tua leenggui tungah hiang thum om hi. A sel phetin pak khia pah a, a bomte leenggah suakin min pah hi." 
Genesis40:11 Ka khut sungah Faroʼ hai ka tawi hi. Keimah in leenggah loin Faroʼ hai sungah ka suk a, Faroʼ khut tungah a hai ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:12 Tua ciangin Josef in ama kiangah, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi. Hiang thumte, ni thum ahi hi." 
Genesis40:13 Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong khah dinga, na za ah nang hong koihkik ding hi. Ama anpia pa na hih lai-a mah bangin ama khut tungah Faroʼ hai na pia ding hi." 
Genesis40:14 Ahih hangin kei hong phawk in. Nang tungah thu hong hoih ciangin kei tungah hehpihna hong bawl in, kong thum hi. Faroʼ tungah keiʼ thu genin, hih inn panin kei hong la khia in." 
Genesis40:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Hebru miteʼ gam panin kei hong kigu khia a, hih lai ah zong amaute in thong mial sungah kei hong koih nadingin bangmah ka gamta kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:16 Anhuan pipa in a khiatna a hoihlam hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, amah in Josef kiangah, “Kei zong mang khat ka man hi: Ka lu tungah moh lawh thum om a," 
Genesis40:17 a lawh tungnung pen sungah an huan sa namkim Faro adingin om hi. Ahih hangin ka lu tunga lawh sung panin vasate in ne uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:18 Josef in dawngin, “A khiatna hih bang ahi hi: Lawh thumte, ni thum ahi hi." 
Genesis40:19 Ni thum sungin Faro in nang hong la khia-in na lu hong tan dinga, sing tung khat ah nang hong khai ding hi. Vasate in na sa ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis40:20 A ni thum ni, Faroʼ suah ni hunin, amah in a nasemte khempeuh adingin pawi khat kham a, anpia pipa le anhuan pipa la khia hi." 
Genesis40:21 Amah in anpia pipa an piak nasep ah koihkik a, amah in Faroʼ khut sungah a hai pia hi." 
Genesis40:22 Ahih hangin Josefʼ khiat mah bangin anhuan pipa a khailum hi. 
Genesis40:23 Ahi zongin anpia pipa in Josef phawk nawn lo a, amah mangngilh ta hi." 
Genesis41:1 Tua zawh kum nih bit khit ciangin Faro in mang man a, amah Nail gun gei ah ding hi." 
Genesis41:2 Nail gun sung panin bawngpi a zol a thau sagih hong paikhia a, amaute in phai lopate ne uh hi." 
Genesis41:3 Amauteʼ khit ciangin Nail gun sung pan mahin a gulhgawng bawngpi dang sagih hong paikhia a, Nail gun gei-a bawngpi dangte kiangah ding uh hi." 
Genesis41:4 Tua ciangin a gulhgawng bawngpi sagihte in a zol a thau bawngpi sagihte ne tum uh hi. Tua ciangin Faro khanglo hi. 
Genesis41:5 Tua ciangin ihmu-in a nih veina mang man hi. A taksa a hoih buhvui sagih kung khat tungah vui hi. 
Genesis41:6 Tuateʼ khit ciangin nisuahna huih in a theemsak a hawm vui sagih hong po khia hi. 
Genesis41:7 A vui hawmte in a taksa a dim vui sagihte valh tum uh hi. Tua ciangin Faro khanglo a, tua pen a mang na hi hi." 
Genesis41:8 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin a lungkham hi. Amah in mi sawlin Egypt mitphial siamte khempeuh le a mipil khempeuh samsak hi. Faro in amauteʼ kiangah a mang gen a, ahih hangin Faroʼ tungah a khiatna a gen thei kuamah om lo hi." 
Genesis41:9 Tua ciangin anpia pipa in Faroʼ kiangah, “Tu ni-in ka khialhnate ka phawkkik hi." 
Genesis41:10 Faro, ama nasemte tungah heh a, kei le anhuan pipa, inncing mangpaʼ inn sungah hong khum lai-in" 
Genesis41:11 amah le keimah in zan khat sungin mang ka man uh a, a mangte in a khiatna tuam ciat nei hi." 
Genesis41:12 Inncing mangpaʼ nasem ahi Hebru mi tangval khat tua lai ah kote tawh om hi. Ama kiangah ka gen uh ciangin, amah in ka mangte uh hong khiatsak a, ka mang uh tawh a kizui tuakin a khiatna hong gen hi." 
Genesis41:13 Amah in kote tungah a khiatna hong gen bangin hong tung hi. Kei pen ka za ah hong kikoihkik a, anhuan pa kikhailum hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:14 Tua ciangin Faro in mi sawlin Josef samsak a, amaute in manlang takin thong mial sung panin amah a paikhiatpih uh hi. Amah in a mul kiatin a puan a khek khit ciangin, Faroʼ mai ah hong pai hi." 
Genesis41:15 Faro in Josef kiangah, “Mang khat ka man a, a khiatna a gen thei kuamah om lo hi. Nang in mang na zak ciangin a khiatna gen thei, ci-in hong kigenna ka za hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:16 Josef in Faro dawngin, “Keiʼ pilna tawh mang a khia thei ka hi kei hi. Pasian in Faroʼ tungah a hoih lamin dawnna hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:17 Tua ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Ka mangin Nail gun gei ah ka ding hi." 
Genesis41:18 A thau a zol bawngpi sagih Nail gun panin hong paikhia a, phai lopate ne uh hi." 
Genesis41:19 Tuateʼ khit ciangin a hehpihhuai a gulhgawng, Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah tua bang ka muh ngei loh bawngpi dang sagih hong pai hi." 
Genesis41:20 A gawng a gulhgawng bawngpite in a masa a thau bawngpi sagihte ne tum uh hi. 
Genesis41:21 Ahih hangin amaute in tuate a nek khit uh ciangin, a nek khit lam uh kuamah in thei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen a tunga mah bangin gulhgawng lai veve uh hi. Tua ciangin ka khanglo hi." 
Genesis41:22 Tua ciangin ka mang mahin kung khat tungah a dim a hoih buhvui sagih a vui khia zong ka mu hi. 
Genesis41:23 Tuateʼ khit ciangin nisuahna huihpi in a keusak a hawm, a theem vui sagih hong po a," 
Genesis41:24 a vui hawmte in a vui hoih sagihte valh tum uh hi. Mitphial siamte kiangah ka gen a, ahih hangin kei kiangah hong gen tel thei khat beek om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:25 Tua ciangin Josef in Faroʼ kiangah, “Faroʼ mang tegel pen khat ahi hi. Pasian in ama bawl ding, Faroʼ tungah hong kilangsak khin hi." 
Genesis41:26 A hoih bawngpi sagihte, kum sagih hi a, a hoih buhvui sagihte zong kum sagih mah ahi hi. A mang khiatna a kibang ahi hi." 
Genesis41:27 Tuateʼ khit ciangin a hong paikhia, a gawng a gulhgawng bawngpi sagihte, kum sagih hi a, nisuahna huihpi in a theemsak buhvui sagihte zong kialpi kum sagih mah ahi hi." 
Genesis41:28 Faroʼ kiang a kong gen bangin Pasian in ama hih ding, Faroʼ tungah hong lak khin ahi hi." 
Genesis41:29 Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah kum sagih sung hauhna hong tung dinga," 
Genesis41:30 ahih hangin tua khit ciangin kialpi kum sagih sung hong tungin, hauhna ngeisa khempeuh Egypt gam sungah kimangngilh ding hi. Kialpi in gam sung ne tum dinga," 
Genesis41:31 nasia mahmah ding ahih manin, tua hong tung ding kialpiʼ huhau-in gam sungah hauhna kithei lo ding hi." 
Genesis41:32 Faroʼ mang nih a phakna pen tua thu Pasianʼ seh sa hi, a cihnopna hi a, Pasian in tomno sungin hong tungsak ding hi." 
Genesis41:33 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Faro in thu ngaihsun siam mipil khat teng khia inla, Egypt gam sung a uk dingin amah koih in." 
Genesis41:34 Faro in gam sungah vaihawm ulian seh inla, a kihauh kum sagih sungin Egypt gam leitang pan a piang sung panin nga ah khat la in." 
Genesis41:35 Hong tung ding kum hoih sunga an khempeuh amaute khawmsak inla, khuapite sungah annek dingin Faroʼ ukna nuai ah antangte kholin, amaute kemsak in." 
Genesis41:36 Kialpi hangin gam sung a siat loh nadingin Egypt gam sungah a hong tung ding kum sagih kialpi dal nadingin a kikoihcing an hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:37 Hih a thugen pen Faro le a nasemte khempeuh in hoih sa uh hi. 
Genesis41:38 Faro in a nasemte kiangah, “Ama sungah Pasian Kha a omna, hih bang midang mu ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:39 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Pasian in hihte khempeuh nang hong lak khin ahih manin, nang bangin thu ngaihsun siam le a pil midang om lo hi." 
Genesis41:40 Nang pen ka inn sungah ulian na hi dinga, nangma thupiak bangin ka mite khempeuh gamta ding uh hi. Kumpi tokhom tawh kisai-in kei pen nang sangin ka lian zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:41 Faro in Josefʼ kiangah, “Egypt gam khempeuh a uk dingin nang kong koih khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:42 Tua ciangin Faro in a min gelhna zungbuh ama khut tung panin suah khia-in Josefʼ khut ah bulh a, puan hoih mahmah tawh amah zemin, a ngawng ah kham khainiang khat oksak hi." 
Genesis41:43 Ama leeng nihna tungah Josef tuangsak a, ama mai ah uliante kiko a, “Khukdin un!” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam khempeuh a ukin amah koih hi." 
Genesis41:44 Tua tham loin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Kei pen Faro ka hi hi. Nangma thukim lohin Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah kuamah in a khut a khe nangawn uh liik lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:45 Faro in Josefʼ min Zafenath-paneah a phuak hi. Amah in On khua siampipa Potiferaʼ tanu Asenath tawh kiteengsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam sungah Josef zin kawikawi hi. 
Genesis41:46 Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ nasemin a tum hunin Josef kum sawm thum pha hi. Faroʼ omna panin Josef paikhia a, Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah zin hi." 
Genesis41:47 A kihauh kum sagih sungin leitang in tampi piangsak a," 
Genesis41:48 Egypt gamah tampi a om laitakin amah in tua kum sagih sunga ante khempeuh khawm a, khuapite sungah an khol hi. A kiim a lote panin khuapi simah amah in an khol hi." 
Genesis41:49 A teh ding a khawl dong zahin Josef in tuipi gei sehnel zahin antang tampi khol hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kiteh khinzo lo hi. 
Genesis41:50 Kialpi kum hong tun ma-in Josef in On khua siampipa Potiferaʼ tanu Asenath tawh tapa nih nei hi. 
Genesis41:51 Josef in a ta masa Manasseh a phuak hi. Amah in, “Pasian in ka haksatna khempeuh le ka paʼ innkuan khempeuh a mangngilhin hong bawl hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:52 A nihna pen amah in Efraim a phuak hi. “Ka thuakna gam sungah kei a pungin hong bawl hi,” ci hi." 
Genesis41:53 Egypt gam sunga a om kum sagih sung hauhna hun bei ta hi. 
Genesis41:54 Josefʼ gen sa bangin kum sagih kialpi hong kipan hi. Gamdang khempeuh ah kialpi tunga, ahih hangin Egypt gam sung tengah an om hi." 
Genesis41:55 Egypt gam khempeuh a kial ciangin, an ngenin mite Faroʼ tungah kiko uh hi. Faro in Egypt mite khempeuh tungah, “Josefʼ kiangah pai un. Noteʼ tunga ama hong cih bangin gamta un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis41:56 Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuh ah kialpi a tunkim ciangin Josef in ankholna innte khempeuh hongin, Egypt mite tungah a zuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gamah kialpi nasia mahmah hi." 
Genesis41:57 Tua tham loin, leitung khempeuh ah kialpi nasia ahih manin, antang lei dingin Josefʼ kiangah leitung mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi." 
Genesis42:1 Egypt ah an a omna thu Jakob in a theih ciangin a tate kiangah, “Bang hangin khatlekhat ki-enen mawk na hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis42:2 Egypt ah an om hi, ci-in ka za hi. Eite si loin i nuntak nadingin pai suk unla, ei ading an va lei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:3 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt ah an lei dingin Josefʼ sanggamte sawm pai suk uh hi. 
Genesis42:4 Ahih hangin Jakob in Josefʼ sanggampa Benjamin, a sanggamte tawh paisak lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tungah siatna tung kha ding, ci-in lau hi." 
Genesis42:5 Kanaan gam sungah kial tung ahih manin a hong pai dangte tawh Israelʼ tapate an lei dingin hong pai khawm uh hi. 
Genesis42:6 Tu-in Josef pen tua gam a ukpa hi a, gam mi khempeuh tungah an a zuak pa amah ahi hi. Josefʼ sanggamte hong pai-in, a maitang uh lei lam ngatin ama mai ah hong kun uh hi." 
Genesis42:7 Josef in a sanggamte a muh ciangin thei a, ahih hangin amah in midang bangin bawlin amaute tungah khauh pau hi. “Koi pan a hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “An lei dingin Kanaan gam panin hong pai hi ung,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:8 Josef in a sanggamte thei a, ahih hangin a sanggamte in amah thei lo uh hi." 
Genesis42:9 Josef in a mangin amaute a mat khitna a phawk hi. Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note, thukan na hi uh a, hih gam thaneemna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:10 Amaute in Josef kiangah, “Hi lo hi, topa aw; an lei dingin na nasemte a hong pai hi ung." 
Genesis42:11 Kote khempeuh mi khatʼ ta ka hi uh hi. Kote, a thutak ka hi uh a, na nasemte thukan hi lo uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:12 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Hi lo hi, hih gam ginat lohna a en dingin hong pai na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:13 Amaute in, “Ko, nangma nasemte, sanggam pasal sawm le nih ka hi uh a, Kanaan gam sungah mi khatʼ ta ka hi uh hi. A moi pen tu laitakin ka pa uh tawh om a, khat pen om nawn lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:14 Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Noteʼ tunga kong gen bangin a man mah ahi hi. Note, thukan na hi uh hi." 
Genesis42:15 Hih thu tawh note hong kithei ding hi: Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin na sanggam moi pen uh hih lai ah hong pai kei leh hih lai mun panin note na paikhia thei nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Genesis42:16 Noteʼ sungah thuman om hiam, ci-in a kimuh nading, na thugente uh a kitel nadingin note thong sungah na om laitakun note khat kisawl unla, na sanggampa uh hong paipihsak un. Tua ahih kei leh Faro a nungta ahih mah bangin note, thukan na hi taktak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:17 Amah in thong sungah ni thum sung amaute a koih hi. 
Genesis42:18 A ni thum ni-in Josef in amaute kiangah, “Keimah in Pasian zahtak ka hih manin hih bangin gamta un. Tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi." 
Genesis42:19 Note, thuman mi na hih uh leh thong sungah na sanggamte uh khat omsak lai unla, a dangte pai-in na innkuan uh a gilkialte adingin an pua unla," 
Genesis42:20 na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua ciangin na kam gente uh kitel dinga, note na si kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute tua bangmahin gamta uh hi." 
Genesis42:21 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “A taktakin i sanggampa tawh kisai-in eite i mawh hi. Amah in eite kiangah hong thum napi-in eite in a thu i ngaih loh ciangin amah a lungkhamna i mu hi. Tua thu hangin hih bang lungkhamna eite tungah hong tung hi,” kici uh hi." 
Genesis42:22 Reuben in amaute dawng a, “Tangvalpa tungah khial kei un, ci-in note tungah hong gen hi lo ka hi hiam? Ahih hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ama sihna thaman eiteʼ tungah hong tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:23 Amauteʼ kikalah kamphen khat om ahih manin Josef in amauʼ paute a tel lam amaute in thei lo uh hi. 
Genesis42:24 Tua ciangin amauteʼ kiang panin Josef kihei-in a kap sim hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiangah hong paikikin amaute hopih hi. Amah in amauʼ kiang panin Simeon la-in amauʼ muhna ah amah a hen hi. 
Genesis42:25 Amauʼ ipte antang tawh dipsakin, a van sung uh ah amauʼ sum ciat koihkikin, lampi a a nek ding uh an a piak nading Josef in thu a pia hi. Tua bangmahin amau adingin kihihsak hi." 
Genesis42:26 Tua ciangin amaute in a late uh antang suanin a paikhia uh hi. 
Genesis42:27 Amaute khat in a giahna panun a la gan-an pia dingin a van a suah leh, a van gongah a sum mu hi." 
Genesis42:28 Amah in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka sum kikoihkik hi. Hih lai ah ka van gongah na om!” a ci hi. Hih thu hangin amaute lungsi uh a, liingin amaute khatlekhat ki-en uh a, “Pasian in eite hih bangin hong bawl a bangci thu ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:29 Kanaan gamah a pa uh Jakob kiang a tun uh ciangin, amauteʼ tunga thupiang khempeuh gen uh a," 
Genesis42:30 “Mipa, tua gam topa koteʼ tungah hong khauh pau-in, tua gam thukanin kote hong ngaihsun hi." 
Genesis42:31 Ahih hangin kote in ama kiangah, ‘Kote thuman mi ka hi uh a, kote thukan ka hi kei uh hi." 
Genesis42:32 Kote pen ka pa uhʼ tapa, sanggam pasal sawm le nih ka hi uh hi. Khat pen om nawn lo a, tu laitakin a moi pen Kanaan gamah ka pa uh tawh om hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Genesis42:33 Tua ciangin tua gam topa in kote kiangah, ‘Note thuman mi na hihna uh hih tawh ka thei ding hi: Na sanggamte uh khat kei kiangah nusia unla, na innkuan gilkialte adingin antang la unla, ciahkik un." 
Genesis42:34 Na sanggam moi pen uh kei kiangah hong paipih un. Tua hileh note thukan hi loin thuman mi na hihna uh ka thei dinga, note kiangah na sanggampa uh hong khahin, hih gam sungah omin na na sem thei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Genesis42:35 Amauʼ vante a suah ciangun, a milip-un a sumte uh a van sung ciat uh ah na om hi. Amaute le a pa un amauteʼ sum kihente a muh uh ciangin, lungkham uh hi." 
Genesis42:36 A pa uh Jakob in amaute kiangah, “Ka tate tawh kei nong kikhensak zo uh hi: Josef om nawn lo, Simeon om nawn lo, tu-in note in Benjamin na la ding uh hi. Hihte khempeuh keiʼ tungah hong tung khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:37 Tua ciangin Reuben in a pa kiangah, “Na kiangah amah kong paipihkik kei leh ka tapa nihte that in. Kei hong ap in, nang kiangah amah kong ciah pihkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis42:38 Ahih hangin amah in, “A sanggampa si a, amah bek om ahih manin ka tapa in note hong zui suk lo ding hi. Noteʼ pai nading na khualzinna uh ah ama tungah siatna tung kha zenzen leh, khangham khit nungin dah lua-in ka si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:1 Tu-in gam sungah kialpi hong nasia semsem hi. 
Genesis43:2 Egypt gam panin a puak uh antang amaute in a gaih khit uh ciangin, a pa un amaute kiangah, “Paikik unla, eite ading an tawm khat va lei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:3 Ahih hangin Judah in ama kiangah, “Mipa in thupi takin kote hong hilh khol a, ‘Na sanggampa uh tawh nong ton kei uh leh ka mai na mu kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis43:4 Ka sanggampa uh hong zuisak lecin kote pai sukin nang ading an ka va lei ding uh hi. 
Genesis43:5 Ahih hangin amah nong zuihsak kei leh kote ka pai suk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mipa in kote kiangah, ‘Na sanggampa uh tawh nong ton kei uh leh ka mai na mu kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:6 Israel in, “Mipa kiangah sanggam dang khat nei ung, ci-in genin bang hangin kei hong hici bawlsiat na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:7 Amaute in dawngin, “Mipa in koteʼ thu le ka sanggamte uh thu limtakin hong dong a, ‘Na pa uh a nungta lai hiam? Sanggam dang na nei uh hiam?’ hong ci hi. Hong dotnate ka dawnna-un ama kiangah a gen ka hi uh hi. ‘Na sanggampa uh hong tonpih suk un,’ amah in hong cih ding lam kote in bangci theih kholh ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:8 Judah in a pa Israel kiangah, “Tangvalpa hong zuisak in; nang le kote le i tate si loin i nuntak theih nadingin kote ka va pai ding uh hi." 
Genesis43:9 Kei pen ama adingin a kikham ka hi dinga, keiʼ khut sung panin amah nong kal ding hi. Keimah in nang kiangah amah hong ciah pihkik loin na mai ah kong koihkik kei leh, tua mawhna kei hong thuaksak tawntung in." 
Genesis43:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh zekai lo hi lehang tu-in nih vei i tungkik khinta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:11 Tua ciangin a pa uh Israel in amaute kiangah, “A tua ci bang ding ahihleh hih bangin gamta un: Gam sunga singgah limci pente pua unla, mipaʼ tungah letsongin lingsi tawm, khuaizu tawm, singnai, myrrh paknamtui, pistakhio gah le almond gahte puak suk un." 
Genesis43:12 Na sum uh a zah nih pua un. Na van gong uh ah a kikoihkik sumte puakik un, a kikhial hi kha ding hi." 
Genesis43:13 Na sanggampa uh zong samin ding unla, mipa kiangah paikik un." 
Genesis43:14 Amah in na sanggampa uh le Benjamin hong ciahsakkik theih nadingin Vanglian Pasian in mipaʼ mai ah note hehpihna hong pia tahen. Ka tate tawh ka kikhen leh a kikhen ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:15 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in letsong la-in, sum a zah nih pua-in, Benjamin zong tonpih uh hi. Amaute dingin Egypt ah pai suk uh a, Josefʼ mai ah a ding uh hi." 
Genesis43:16 Josef in amaute tawh Benjamin a muh ciangin, amah in a inn sung nasem paʼ kiangah, “Mite inn sungah paipih inla, gan khat go-in bawl in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite in sun ciangin kei tawh an ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:17 Josefʼ sawl bangin mipa in sem a, Josefʼ inn ah mite paipih hi." 
Genesis43:18 Josefʼ inn ah kipaipih ahih manin lau uh a, amaute in, “Eite sila-in hong bawlin i late a mat theih nading, eiteʼ tungah thu hong zongin eite hong hih theih nadingin, a masa lai-a i van sunga sum kikoihteʼ hangin eite hong kipaipih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:19 Tua ahih ciangin Josefʼ inn sung nasem paʼ kiangah amaute pai to uh a, inn kongkhak ah amah tawh kiho-in," 
Genesis43:20 “Aw, topa aw, an lei dingin khatvei kong pai uh hi." 
Genesis43:21 Ka giahna mun uh ka tun uh ciangin ka vante uh ka hong uh a, ka sumte uh a cingin ka van sung ciat uh ah na omkik hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote in tua sumte kong puakik uh a," 
Genesis43:22 an lei nadingin sum dang zong kong pua thuah uh hi. Ka van sung uh ah kua in sum koih ahi hiam ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis43:23 Amah in dawng a, “Nuam takin om unla lau kei un. Na Pasian uh, noteʼ paʼ Pasian in note adingin na van sung uh ah sum koih hi ding hi. Keimah in noteʼ sum a cingin ka ngah khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amauteʼ kiangah Simeon paikhiatpih hi." 
Genesis43:24 Mipa in Josefʼ inn ah amaute paipihin, amaute tui pia-in, amaute in a khe uh sil khinin, amah in amauteʼ late gan-an a piak khit ciangin," 
Genesis43:25 amaute in tua lai ah Josef tawh an ne ding uh ci-in za uh ahih manin sunin Josef hong pai ciangin a piak ding uh letsong bawl khol uh hi. 
Genesis43:26 Inn ah Josef hong pai ciangin amauʼ puak letsongte inn sung ama kiangah paipih uh a, ama mai leilak ah kun uh hi." 
Genesis43:27 Amah in amauʼ om zia dong a, “Na gen uh puteek, na pa uh a dam hiam? Amah a nungta lai hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:28 Amaute in, “Nangma nasem ka pa uh dam hi. Amah nungta lai hi,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in a lu uh kun uh a, zahtakna a bawl uh hi." 
Genesis43:29 Amah khuadak to a, a nuʼ tapa Benjamin mu a, “Hih pa, kei kiang a nong gen uh na sanggam moi pen uh ahi hiam? Pasian in nang hong hehpih hen, ka ta!” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:30 Tua ciangin a lungsimah a sanggampa ngai lua ahih manin Josef manlangin paikhia a, a kah nading mun a zong hi. Amah a inn dei sungah pai-in tua lai ah va kap sim hi." 
Genesis43:31 Tua ciangin amah in a mai phiatin hong paikhia hi. Amah ki-ip tawmin, “An hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis43:32 Amaute in Josef amah guakin nesakin, amaute a tuam mahin nesak a, amah tawh a ne Egypt mite in a tuam mahin ne uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite in Hebru mite tawh an nekhawm lo uh hi. Tua banga nekkhawm ding pen Egypt mite adingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Genesis43:33 Ama mai ah amaute a suak masa a suah hun tawh kizui le a moi pen a khangnona tawh kizui-in tu uh hi. Lamdangsakna tawh amaute khatlekhat ki-en uh hi. 
Genesis43:34 Josefʼ sabuai tung panin amauʼ tanh ciat kipia-in, ahih hangin Benjaminʼ tanh pen amaute-aʼ zah nga pha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne tui dawnin amah tawh lungdam uh hi." 
Genesis44:1 Tua ciangin amah in a inn sung nasem pa thu pia a, “Hih miteʼ van sungah amauʼ puak zawh zahzah an guang inla, amauʼ sum ciat a van gong ciat uh ah koih in." 
Genesis44:2 Ka ngun hai pen an lei nadinga a sum tawh a moi penʼ van gongah koihsak in,” a ci hi. Amah in Josefʼ gen bangin a hih hi." 
Genesis44:3 Zingsang khuavak phetin a late uh tawh mite kisawl khia hi. 
Genesis44:4 Amaute a pai khit, ahih hangin khuapi panin a nai lai-in, Josef in ama inn sung nasem pa kiangah, “Kithawi inla, mite va delh in. Amaute na phak ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Bang hangin a hoih pen a sia tawh hong thuk na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin ka topaʼ ngun hai gu na hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis44:5 Ka topa in hih hai sung panin dawnin, hih tawh amah in thu thei hi lo ahi hiam? Hih bangin na gamtat manun na khial uh hi,’ va ci in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:6 Amah in amaute a phak ciangin amaute kiangah hih thute a gen hi. 
Genesis44:7 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin ka topa in thu hih bang hong gen na hi hiam? Na nasemte, tua banga gamta ding hi dek peuhmah lo hi." 
Genesis44:8 En in, ka van gong uh a ka muh uh sumte, Kanaan gam panin nang kiangah kong puakkik uh hi. Tua ahih teh na topaʼ inn panin ngun hitaleh kham hitaleh bangci guk ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
Genesis44:9 Na nasemteʼ sung pan tua hai a kimuhna penpen kithat hen; kote zong ka topaʼ sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:10 Amah in, “Na cih bang uh hi tahen: A kimuhna penpen pa ka sila hi dinga, no a dang teng mawh na baang kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:11 Tua ciangin a milipin a van uh leilak ah nga suk uh a, a milipin a van uh suah hi." 
Genesis44:12 Amah in zong a, a ham pen panin kipanin a moi pen tawh tawp a, Benjaminʼ van sungah a hai kimu hi." 
Genesis44:13 Tua ciangin amaute in a puan uh bal kekin, a late uh a van suan ciatin, khuapi ah hong kilehkik uh hi." 
Genesis44:14 Judah le a sanggamte, Josefʼ inn ah a tun ciangin, amah tua lai mahah na om lai hi. Ama mai leilak ah amaute kun uh hi." 
Genesis44:15 Josef in amaute kiangah, “Noteʼ gamtatna a bangci gamtat ahi hiam? Kei bang ahi mi in thu ka theihna thei lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:16 Judah in, “Ka topa tungah hong bangci gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang thu gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh ko bangci kiphel theih ding ka hi uh hiam? Pasian in na nasemteʼ mawhna mu khia hi. En in, kote le hai a kimuhna pa zong, ka topaʼ sila ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:17 Ahih hangin amah in, “Tua bangin hi dek lo ding hi. Hai a kimuhna mipa bek ka sila hi ding hi. No a dangte ahihleh, na paʼ kiang uh ah nuam takin ciah un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis44:18 Tua ciangin ama kiangah Judah hong pai to-in, “Ka topa aw, hong thum ing. Na nasem pa, nang tungah kam khat thu hong gensak inla, na nasem pa tungah na hehna hong sosak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Faro mahmah tawh a kibang na hi hi." 
Genesis44:19 Ka topa in a nasemte nong dong a, ‘Pa hitaleh sanggam pasal dang hitaleh na nei uh hiam?’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:20 Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Kote in a teek pa khat le a teek zawhin a neih sanggam pasal moi lai khat ka nei uh hi. Ama sanggampa si a, a nuʼ tate sung pan amah bek om lai hi. A pa in amah it mahmah hi,’ kong ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:21 Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Ka mit tawh amah ka muh theih nadingin kei kiangah amah hong tonpih suk un,’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:22 Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Tangvalpa in a pa nusia thei lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa nusia leh a pa si ding hi,’ kong ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:23 Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Note tawh na sanggam uh a moi pen hong pai suk khop kei leh ka mai nong mu nawn kei ding uh hi,’ nong ci hi." 
Genesis44:24 “Tua ahih ciangin na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciahkik uh ciangin ka topaʼ thugente ama kiangah ka gen uh hi. 
Genesis44:25 Ka pa un, ‘Paikikin eite ading an tawm va lei un,’ hong cih ciangin" 
Genesis44:26 kote in, ‘Ka pai suk kei ding uh hi. Ka sanggam moi pen uh ko tawh hong pai khawm leh ka pai suk bek ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sanggam moi pen uh ko tawh hong pai kei leh mipaʼ mai ka mu kei ding uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Genesis44:27 Tua ciangin na nasem ka pa un kote kiangah, ‘Ka zi in kei tawh tapa nih a neih na thei uh hi." 
Genesis44:28 Khat in kei hong nusia khin a, amah kibalzan khin taktak hi, ka ci hi. Tua hun a kipan amah ka mu nawn kei hi." 
Genesis44:29 Hih a khat zong kei kiang panin na lak uh a, ama tungah siatna a tun leh, dahna tawh ka sam kangte Leinuai ah na paipih suk ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis44:30 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciah uh ciangin, tangvalpa kote tawh hong ciah kei leh, ama lungsim khempeuh tangvalpaʼ tungah om ahih manin," 
Genesis44:31 kote tawh tangvalpa a ciah lohna a muh ciangin amah si ding hi. Na nasemte in na nasem ka pa uhʼ sam kangte dahna tawh Leinuai ah ka paipih ding uh hi. 
Genesis44:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem keimah pen tangvalpa adingin ka paʼ tungah a kikham ka hi a, ‘Nang kiangah amah kong ciah pihkik kei leh tua mawhsakna nangma muhna ah ka nuntak tawntungin ka thuak ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Genesis44:33 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi. Ka topaʼ sila dingin tangvalpaʼ tangin na nasem pa hong omsak inla, a sanggamte tawh tangvalpa ciahkiksak in." 
Genesis44:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh tangvalpa kei tawh hong ton kei leh ka pa kiangah bangci ciahkik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ka paʼ tungah a tung ding siatna ka thuak zo kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:1 Tua ciangin ama kiang a dingte khempeuhʼ mai ah Josef ki-ip zo nawn lo a, “Ka kiang panin mi khempeuh paikhia un,” ci-in a kiko hi. Tua ahih manin Josef a sanggamte tungah amah a kipulak ciangin kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Genesis45:2 Amah a gingin kap khia ahih manin Egypt mite in za a, Faroʼ innkuante in zong za uh hi." 
Genesis45:3 Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei, Josef ka hi hi. I pa a nungta lai hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sanggamte maizum uh ahih manin amah dawng thei lo uh hi." 
Genesis45:4 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Ka nai ah hong pai un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi. Amaute a nai ah hong pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei pen Egypt ah nong zuak uh na sanggampa uh Josef ka hi hi." 
Genesis45:5 Hih lai ah kei nong zuak manun tu-in lungkham kei un. Nomau tungah kiheh tawm kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna a hu dingin noteʼ mai ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. 
Genesis45:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah kum nih sung kialpi tung zo hi. Lo khawh loh, an lak loh ding kum nga om lai hi." 
Genesis45:7 Note adingin leitungah a om lai mi a hingsak ding le note adingin a suakta mi tampi a kem dingin noteʼ mai ah Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. 
Genesis45:8 Tua ahih ciangin hih lai ah a hong sawl mi pen note na hi kei uh a, Pasian ahi hi. Amah in Faroʼ khutnuai ah a ulian penin kei hong bawlin, ama inn sung khempeuhʼ topa le Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa-in kei hong bawl khin hi." 
Genesis45:9 “Manlangin i pa kiangah va ciah to unla ama kiangah, ‘Na tapa Josef in hih bangin ci hi: Pasian in Egypt gam khempeuhʼ topa-in kei hong bawl khin hi. Ka kiangah hong pai suk hen, zekai kei hen." 
Genesis45:10 Goshen leitang ah na teeng dinga, nang le na tateʼ tate le na tuuhonte le na bawnghonte le na neih khempeuh tawh, nang pen kei tawh a kinai-in na om ding hi." 
Genesis45:11 Hong tung ding kialpi kum nga om lai ahih manin tua lai ah nang kong vak ding hi. Tua hikeileh nang le na innkuanpihte le na neih khempeuh in zawnna na ngah ding uh hi, ci hi,’ va ci un." 
Genesis45:12 “Noteʼ kiang a thu hong gen pen keima kam ahihna tu-in noteʼ mitin nong mu uh a, ka sanggampa Benjaminʼ mit in zong hong mu hi." 
Genesis45:13 Egypt ah keima liatna khempeuh le noteʼ muh sa khempeuh, i paʼ kiangah na gen ding uh hi. Manlang unla, hih lai ah i pa hong pai sukpih un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:14 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Benjamin ngawng kawi-in a kap hi. Benjamin in zong amah ngawng kawi-in a kap hi. 
Genesis45:15 Tua ciangin a kah kawmin a sanggamte khempeuh ngawng kawi-in a nam hi. Tua khit ciangin a sanggamte in amah hopih uh hi. 
Genesis45:16 “Josefʼ sanggamte hong pai,” cihna thu Faroʼ inn sungah a kizak ciangin, tua thu in Faro le a nasemte lungdamsak mahmah hi." 
Genesis45:17 Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na sanggamte kiangah, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na ganhingte uh van suan unla, Kanaan gamah ciahkik un." 
Genesis45:18 I pa le na innkuanpihte uh va la unla, kei kiangah hong pai un. Egypt gam a hoih pen mun note kong pia dinga, note in gam hoih sunga piangte na ne ding uh hi,’ ci in." 
Genesis45:19 Amaute zong thu pia inla, ‘Hih bangin gamta un: Na tate le na zite uh adingin Egypt panin leeng la unla, i pa hong paipih un." 
Genesis45:20 Egypt gam khempeuh a hoih penna nomau-aʼ ahih ciangin na vante uh ngaihsutin nei kei un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:21 Israelʼ tapate tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. Josef in Faroʼ thupiak mah bangin amaute leeng pia a, lampi a a nek ding uh an zong a pia hi." 
Genesis45:22 Amah in amaute khempeuh tungah puan hoih silh khat ciat a pia hi. Ahih hangin Benjaminʼ tungah ngun shekel za thum le puan hoih silh nga a pia hi. 
Genesis45:23 Amah in a pa kiangah a nuai-ate a khak hi: Egypt na hoihte a pua la sawm; antang, anlum le lampi a a paʼ nek ding an a pua lapi sawm a puak hi." 
Genesis45:24 Tua ciangin amah in a sanggamte sawl khia a, amaute a paikhiat ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Lampi ah kitawng kei un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis45:25 Tua ahih ciangin amaute Egypt panin pai to uh a, a pa uh Jakob kiang Kanaan gamah ciah uh hi." 
Genesis45:26 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Josef nungta lai a, amah pen Egypt gam khempeuh a ukpa na hi hi,” hong ci uh hi. Amah in amauteʼ thugen um lo ahih ciangin a lung si hi." 
Genesis45:27 Ahih hangin amauteʼ tunga Josefʼ gen kammalte ama kiangah a gen ciang le Josef in amah puak nadinga a khak leengte a muh ciangin, a pa uh Jakobʼ lungsim hingkik hi." 
Genesis45:28 Israel in, “Pha zo hi. Ka tapa Josef nungta lai hi. Ka sih ma-in pai-in amah ka mu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:1 Tua ahih ciangin Israel, a neih khempeuh tawh a khualzin kipanin Beer-sheba tunga, a pa Isaacʼ Pasian tungah biakpiakna a bawl hi." 
Genesis46:2 Pasian in Israel tungah zanin thu gen a, “Jakob, Jakob,” ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” ci hi." 
Genesis46:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na paʼ Pasian ahi, Pasian ka hi hi. Egypt ah pai suk ding lau kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam lian khatin tua lai ah nang kong bawl ding hi." 
Genesis46:4 Egypt ah nang tawh kong pai suk dinga, tua ciangin zong keimah in nang kong paipih tokik ding hi. Josefʼ khut sungah na si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:5 Tua ciangin Beer-sheba panin Jakob ding khia hi. Israelʼ tapate in a pa uh Jakob, a tate uh le a zite uh, amah puak nadinga Faro in a khak leeng sungah a pua uh hi." 
Genesis46:6 Amaute in zong Kanaan gam sunga a lam uh a ganhingte uh le a nate uh la-in, Jakob le ama suanlekhakte ahi," 
Genesis46:7 a tapate, ama tapateʼ tapate, a tanute, a tapateʼ tanute tawh Egypt ah a pai uh hi. Amah in a suanlekhakte khempeuh Egypt ah a paipih hi." 
Genesis46:8 Tu-in hihte pen Israelʼ suanlekhak, Egypt ah a pai Jakob le a tateʼ min ahi hi. Jakobʼ ta u pen Reuben" 
Genesis46:9 le Reubenʼ tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron le Karmi ahi hi." 
Genesis46:10 Simeonʼ tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar le Kanaan numeiʼ tapa Shaul ahi hi." 
Genesis46:11 Leviʼ tapate: Gershon, Kohath le Merari ahi hi." 
Genesis46:12 Judahʼ tapate: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez le Zerah ahi hi. (Ahih hangin Er le Onan Kanaan gamah si hi.) Perezʼ tapate: Hezron le Hamul ahi hi." 
Genesis46:13 Issakharʼ tapate: Tola, Puvah, Job le Shimron ahi hi." 
Genesis46:13 Issakharʼ tapate: Tola, Puvah, Job le Shimron ahi hi." 
Genesis46:14 Zebulunʼ tapate: Sered, Elon le Jahleel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:15 (Hihte pen Paddanaram ah Leah tawh a neih Jakobʼ suante hi a, a tanu Dinah tawh zong ahi hi. Numei le pasal a vekpi-in sawm thum le thum ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:16 Gadʼ tapate: Zifion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi le Areli ahi hi." 
Genesis46:17 Asherʼ tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah le a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi. Beriahʼ tapate: Heber le Malkhiel ahi hi." 
Genesis46:18 (Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Leah tungah a piak Zilpahʼ tapate ahi hi. Amah in Jakob tawh hihte nei a, mi sawm le guk ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:19 Jakobʼ zi Rachelʼ tapate: Josef le Benjamin ahi hi. 
Genesis46:20 Josef in Egypt gamah On khua siampipa Potiferaʼ tanu Asenath tawh Manasseh le Efraim nei hi. 
Genesis46:21 Benjaminʼ tapate: Bela, Bekher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim le Ard ahi hi." 
Genesis46:22 (Hihte pen Rachel tawh a neih Jakobʼ suante hi a, a vekpi-in mi sawm le li ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:23 Danʼ tapa Hushim ahi hi. 
Genesis46:24 Naftaliʼ tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer le Shillem ahi hi." 
Genesis46:25 (Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Rachelʼ tungah a piak Bilhah in Jakob tawh a neih tapate hi a, a vekpi-in mi sagih ahi hi.)" 
Genesis46:26 Egypt gamah a pai Jakob-aʼ ahi ama suanlekhak, Jakobʼ tateʼ zite a kisim loin, a vekpi-in mi sawm guk le guk ahi hi." 
Genesis46:27 Josef in Egypt gamah a neih a tapate nih ahi hi. Egypt gamah a pai Jakobʼ innkuan khempeuh sawm sagih ahi hi. 
Genesis46:28 Jakob in ama mai Goshen ah amah lam a lak dingin Josef kiangah Judah ma sawl hi. Amaute Goshen gamah hong pai uh hi. 
Genesis46:29 Tua ciangin Josef in a leengte kithawisakin Goshen ah a pa Israel a dawn dingin a pai to hi. A pa a muh phetin ngawng kawi-in tawl khat sung a kap hi. 
Genesis46:30 Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang mu khinin nang na nuntak lai thei ka hih manin tu-in ka si zongin phamawh nawn lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis46:31 Josef in a sanggamte le a paʼ innkuanpihte kiangah, “Kei pai to-in Faroʼ kiangah ka va gen dinga, ama tungah, ‘Kanaan gam a om ka sanggamte le ka paʼ innkuanpihte kei kiangah hong pai hi." 
Genesis46:32 Amaute pen tuucing ahih manin gankemte ahi uh hi. Amaute in a tuuhonte uh le a bawnghonte uh le a neih khempeuh uh hong paipih uh hi,’ ka va ci ding hi." 
Genesis46:33 Faro in note hong samin note kiangah, ‘Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin," 
Genesis46:34 Goshen leitang ah na ten theih nadingun note in, ‘Kote hitaleh ka pate uh hitaleh ko na nasemte pen ka neu lai uh a kipan tu hun dongin gankemte ka hi uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite adingin tuucing peuhmah a kihhuai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:1 Tua ahih ciangin Josef pai-in Faroʼ kiangah, “Ka pa le ka sanggamte a tuu hon uh le a bawng hon uh le a neih khempeuh uh tawh Kanaan gam panin hong pai uh a, amaute tu-in Goshen gamah om uh hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Genesis47:2 A sanggamteʼ lak panin amah in mi nga la-in Faroʼ kiangah va paipih hi. 
Genesis47:3 Faro in a sanggamte kiangah, “Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in Faroʼ kiangah, “Ka pate uh mah bangin na nasem kote pen gankemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:4 Amaute in Faro kiangah, “Hih gamah tawl khat a om dingin kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan gamah kialpi nasia lua ahih manin tua lai ah na nasemteʼ tuuhonte ading lo nona om nawn lo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi. Goshen gamah na nasemte hong tengsak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:5 Tua ciangin Faro in Josef kiangah, “Na pa le na sanggamte na kiangah hong tung khin hi." 
Genesis47:6 Egypt leitang khempeuh nangma thu ahi hi. Na pa le na sanggamte leihoih penna ah tengsak in. Goshen leitang ah amaute tengsak inla, amauteʼ lakah a hih thei mi na muh leh ka ganhingte a kem dingin koih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:7 Tua ciangin Josef in a pa Jakob tum pihin Faroʼ mai ah koih a, Jakob in Faro thupha a pia hi." 
Genesis47:8 Faro in Jakob kiangah, “Na nuntak kum bangzah pha ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:9 Jakob in Faro kiangah, “Tawl khat sung ka nuntak hun pen kum za le kum sawm thum ahi hi. Ka nuntak hun tom sungah siatna bekbek om a, ka pate tawl khat a om sung uh a nuntak hunte ban nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:10 Jakob in Faro thupha pia-in tua lai panin a paikhia hi. 
Genesis47:11 Tua ciangin Faroʼ thupiak sa bangin Josef in leitang a hoih pen, Rameses leitang, Egypt gam sungah neihsa pia-in a pa le a sanggamte a tengsak hi." 
Genesis47:12 Josef in a pa, a sanggamte le a paʼ innkuante khempeuh a ne ding zah tawh kizui-in an a pia hi." 
Genesis47:13 Tu-in kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuh ah an om nawn lo a, kialpi hangin Egypt mite le Kanaan mite vul gawp uh hi." 
Genesis47:14 Amaute in antang a leina hangin, Egypt gam sung le Kanaan gam sunga sum khempeuh Josef in ngah khin hi. Josef in Faroʼ inn ah tua sumte paipih hi." 
Genesis47:15 Egypt gam sung le Kanaan gam sunga sum a bei khit ciangin Egypt mite khempeuh Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Kote an hong pia in. Bang hangin na muhna ah si ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sum uh bei ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:16 Josef in dawngin, “Na ganhingte uh hong pia un. Na sum uh bei ahihleh na ganhingte uh khekna-in an kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:17 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah a ganhingte uh paipih uh hi. Josef in sakolte, tuuhonte, bawnghonte le late a khekna-in amaute an a pia hi. A ganhingte uh khekna-in Josef in tua kum sung amaute an a pia hi." 
Genesis47:18 Tua kum a bei, a kum kik ciangin amaute Josef kiangah hong pai-in, “Ka sum uh a bei khitna ka topa uh tungah kong im kei ding uh hi. Ganhing honte ka topa aʼ ahi hi. Ka pumpi uh le ka leitang uh cih sim loh ka topaʼ muhna ah bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Genesis47:19 Bang hangin kote si-in ka leitang uh nangma muhna ah maimawk ding ahi hiam? Kote le ka leitang uh an tawh hong lei in. Kote, Faroʼ sila ka hi ding uh a, ka leitang uh zong ama aʼ hi ding hi. Leitang mawk val loin, kote si loin ka hin theih nadingun khaici hong pia in,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:20 Tua ahih ciangin Josef in Egypt gam khempeuh Faro adingin a lei hi. Kialpi nasia lua ahih manin Egypt mi khempeuh in a lote uh a zuak uh hi. Leitang khempeuh Faro-aʼ suak khin hi. 
Genesis47:21 Mihingte ahihleh, Egypt mong khat panin a mong khat dongin amah in sila-in bawl hi." 
Genesis47:22 Siampiteʼ leitang bek amah in lei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Faroʼ tung panin a kiciangtan zah an ngah uh a, amaute tungah Faro in a piak tawh amaute nungta zo uh ahih ciangin amaute in a leitang uh zuak lo uh hi." 
Genesis47:23 Tua ciangin Josef in mite kiangah, “En un, tu ni-in note le na leitang uh Faro adingin kong lei hi. Tu-in hih lai ah no adingin khaici om a, note in leitang tungah na vawh ding uh hi." 
Genesis47:24 Anlak ciangin Faroʼ tungah nga ah khat na pia ding uh a, nga ah li pen lo ah khaici ding, note le na innkuanpihte uh le na tate uhʼ an dingin na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:25 Amaute in, “Nang in ka nuntakna uh nong hon khia khinzo hi. Ka topa uh lungdam hen; kote pen Faroʼ sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis47:26 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in nga ah khat nei ding hi cihna, tu ni donga a om, Egypt leitang tawh kisai-in Josef in ngeina kip khatin a bawl hi. Siampiteʼ leitang bek Faro-aʼ suak lo hi." 
Genesis47:27 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam sung Goshen leitang ah Israel-te teeng uh hi. Tua lai ah amaute in neihsa ngah uh a, pungin tampi tak pha uh hi." 
Genesis47:28 Egypt gamah Jakob kum sawm le kum sagih nungta lai ahih manin ama khan kum za le kum sawm li le kum sagih ahi hi. 
Genesis47:29 Israel a sih ding hun a nai ciangin, amah in a tapa Josef samin ama kiangah, “Tu-in na muhna ah maipha ka ngah leh, ka phei nuai ah na khut hong koih inla, thumantak le citakin kei nong bawl ding thu hong ciam in. Egypt ah kei hong vui kei inla," 
Genesis47:30 ka pate tawh hong sial khawm in. Egypt panin kei hong pua khia inla, amauʼ kivuina munah kei hong vui in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Na gen bangin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis47:31 Amah in, “Keiʼ tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi. Amah zong a paʼ tungah a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Israel lungdamin a lupna lukhung ah a mahmah a kun suk hi." 
Genesis48:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin, “Na pa a ci na hi,” ci-in Josef kiangah kigen ahih ciangin amah in a tapa nihte Manasseh le Efraim a paipih hi." 
Genesis48:2 Jakob kiangah, “Na tapa Josef na kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ciangin Israel in a tha sanin a lupna tungah a tu hi." 
Genesis48:3 Jakob in Josef kiangah, “Kanaan gam Luz ah Vanglian Pasian kei tungah hong kilangin kei thupha hong pia a," 
Genesis48:4 kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang hong pungsakin, mihing hon khatin hong bawlin, nangʼ khit cianga na suanlekhakteʼ tungah a neih tawntung dingun hih leitang ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Genesis48:5 “Tu-in, Egypt ah nang kiangah kong pai ma-in Egypt gam sungah nangʼ sung panin a suak na tapa nihte keima-aʼ ahi hi. Reuben le Simeon-te mah bangin Efraim le Manasseh zong keima aʼ hi ding hi." 
Genesis48:6 Amauteʼ khit cianga nang sung panin a suaktate pen nangma aʼ hi ding hi. Amauʼ gamhluahna ah amauʼ sanggamteʼ min tawh amaute kilo khawm ding hi. 
Genesis48:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Paddan panin ka pai lai-in, Efrath tun ma diak, Kanaan gam lamkal ah ka dah nadingin ka zi Rachel hong si hi. Efrath (Bethlehem) paina lampi ah amah ka vui hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:8 Israel in Josefʼ tapate a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:9 Josef in a paʼ kiangah, “Pasian in hih lai ah kei hong piak ka tapate ahi hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Kong thum hi; amaute thupha ka piak theih nadingin ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:10 Tu-in Israelʼ mitte a khanghamna hangin maang a, amah in khua mu thei lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Josef in ama kiangah amaute paipih hi. Amah in amaute namin a kawi hi." 
Genesis48:11 Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang a hong mukik dingin ka kingaihsun kei hi. Tua hi napi, Pasian in na tate zong kei hong musak hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:12 Tua ciangin Josef in amaute a khuk panin la khia-in a mahmah lei lam nga-in a kun hi. 
Genesis48:13 Josef in amau tegel la-in, Efraimʼ taklam khut, Israelʼ veilam khut ah, Manassehʼ veilam khut, Israelʼ taklam khut ah a paipih hi." 
Genesis48:14 Israel in a taklam khut zanin a nau zaw Efraimʼ lu tungah nga a, Manasseh a ta upa ahih manin, a khut kipaihpehsakin Manassehʼ lu tungah a veilam khut a nga hi." 
Genesis48:15 Amah in Josef thupha pia-in, “Ka pate Abraham le Isaac in a na a sep Pasian, tu ni dongin ka nuntak tawntung ah lam hong pi Pasian," 
Genesis48:16 siatna khempeuh panin kei hong tan khia vantungmi in hih tangvalte thupha pia henla, amaute sungah keima min le ka pa Abraham le Isaacʼ min kizomsak henla, leitungah amaute mihonpi khatin khangsak tahen!” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:17 A pa in a taklam khut Efraimʼ lu tungah a koih Josef in a muh ciangin, tua in amah lungkimsak lo hi. Efraimʼ lu panin Manassehʼ lu tungah koih dingin amah in a paʼ khut a la hi." 
Genesis48:18 Josef in a pa kiangah, “Hi lo hi, pa aw; hih pen a suak masa ahi hi. Na taklam khut ama lu tungah koih in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:19 Ahih hangin a pa in nial a, “Ka thei hi, ka ta aw; ka thei hi. Amah zong mi khat suak dinga, amah zong lian ding hi. Ahi zongin amah sangin a naupa lian zaw dinga, a suanlekhakte, minam lianpi khat suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis48:20 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua ni-in amaute thupha pia a, “Note, Israel sungah thupha na hi ding uh a, ‘Pasian in Efraim le Manasseh bangin note hong bawl hen,’ kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin Jakob in Manassehʼ mai ah Efraim a koih hi." 
Genesis48:21 Tua ciangin Israel in Josef kiangah, “En in, kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in nang hong ompih dinga, na pateʼ leitang ah nang hong paipihkik ding hi." 
Genesis48:22 Tua tham loin, ka namsau le ka thal tawh Amor miteʼ khut tung panin ka lak mual pang khat, na sanggamteʼ tung sangin nangʼ tungah kong pia zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:1 Tua ciangin Jakob in a tapate sam a, “A hong tung ding hunte ah noteʼ tunga hong tung ding thu kong gen theih nadingin note hong kikhawm un." 
Genesis49:2 “Jakobʼ tapate aw, hong kikhawmin za unla, na pa Israelʼ thugen ngai un." 
Genesis49:3 “Reuben, nang pen ka ta upa, ka vangliatna le ka tacil na hi a, a kiphasak pen, a vanglian pen na hi hi." 
Genesis49:4 Tuihual bangin na kip kei dinga, na tung tuang kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka zi na luppih a, ka lupna na mindaisak hi." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeon le Levi, unau hi a, a hiam uh ngongtat nadingin a zang uh hi." 
Genesis49:6 Amauʼ kikhopna ah ka kihel kei dinga, amauʼ pawl tawh ka kizom kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a heh manun mi that uh a, kiphatsakna lungsim tawh amaute in mawlpih dingin bawngtalteʼ zagui a sat tat uh hi." 
Genesis49:7 Amauʼ sinsona lauhuai a, amauʼ hehna kihtakhuai hi. Samsiatna ngah ta uh hen! Jakob suante sungah amaute ka khenthang dinga, Israel sungah amaute ka thehthang ding hi." 
Genesis49:8 “Judah aw, na sanggamte in nang hong phat ding hi. Na galteʼ gawl na meek dinga, na sanggamte na mai ah hong kun ding uh hi." 
Genesis49:9 Judah pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, a sa mat sa a nek khit ciangin a kua ah a ciahkik tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai bangin kizia-in a lum suk hi. Kua in amah phawng ngam ding hiam?" 
Genesis49:10 Judah in kumpi ciangkhut len tawntung dinga, a suan a khakte in zong ukna aana nei tawntung ding hi. Minam dangte in ama tungah siah puak dinga, zahtakna tawh ama mai ah kun ding uh hi." 
Genesis49:11 A sakol no leenggui ah khih a, a la no leenggui limci pen ah khih hi. Amah in a puante leenggahzu sungah sawp a, a puansilhte leenggahtui san sungah a sawp hi." 
Genesis49:12 Leenggahzu a dawndawnna in a mit san gega a, bawngnawi a dawndawnna in a ha pak hi." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebulun, tuipi gei ah teeng ding hi. Amah, teembaw khawlna mun suak dinga, Sidon ciang dongah a gamgi om ding hi." 
Genesis49:14 “Issakhar, a hat la tawh kibang a, van gik nih kikalah a lum hi." 
Genesis49:15 A tawlngakna mun hoih sa a, a leitang noptuak sa hi. Tua ahih ciangin van pua dingin a liangko niamsak a, sila bangin na kisemsak hi." 
Genesis49:16 “Dan in Israel minam dangte mah bangin a mite thu khen ding hi. 
Genesis49:17 Dan pen lampi ah gulpi hi dinga, sul gei ah gul gu nei hi ding hi. Sakolʼ khetul petin a tuang pa a nungkiat hi." 
Genesis49:18 “Nong hotkhiat ding ka ngak hi, Topa." 
Genesis49:19 “Gad pen a buluhte in buluh dinga, ahih hangin amah in amaute sulzuihkik ding hi." 
Genesis49:20 “Asherʼ lo ah an tampi piang dinga, amah in kumpi anlimte bawl ding hi." 
Genesis49:21 “Naftali, a kikhah sakhipi hi a, sakhi no suakkhiasak hi." 
Genesis49:22 “Josef, a gah pha hiang ahi hi. Ciktui gei-a om a gah pha hiang hi a, a hiangte kulh tungah zaam hi." 
Genesis49:23 Thal tawite in nakpi takin amah simin, amah thal tawh kap uh a, nasia takin gimsak uh hi." 
Genesis49:24 Ahih hangin ama thal liing loin om a, a khutte kizaptelsak hi. Jakobʼ Vanglian Paʼ khut (Israel Suangpi, Tuucingpaʼ min)," 
Genesis49:25 nang hong huh ding na paʼ Pasian in tunga om vantung thuphate, nuai-a tui thukna sunga om thuphate, khawilevulh le tuletate, nangma tungah hong pia hi." 
Genesis49:26 Na paʼ thuphate pen tawntung mual lianteʼ thupha, tawntung mual neute sangin vanglian zaw hi. Tua thuphate Josefʼ lu tungah hong tung henla, a sanggamteʼ kiang panin a kituam koihpaʼ tungah hong tung tahen." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamin, a ne bakbak keivom hi a, zingsangin a sa mat sa ne-in, nitakin a ngah sa teng hawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:28 Hihte khempeuh pen Israel minam sawm le nihte ahi hi. Hih thute pen amau tawh a kituak ciatin a pa in amaute thupha pia-in a gente ahi hi. 
Genesis49:29 Tua ciangin Jakob in a tate thuhilhin amaute kiangah, “Kei, ka mipihte kiangah a kigawm ding ka hi ta hi. Kivui nading munin neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efronʼ tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Kanaan gam, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om Makpelah lo-a leihawm, Hit mi Efronʼ lo-a leihawm han sungah ka pate tawh hong vuikhawm un." 
Genesis49:30  
Genesis49:31 Tua lai munah amaute in Abraham le a zi Sarah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah amaute in Isaac le a zi Rebekah vui uh hi. Tua lai munah keimah in Leah ka vui hi. 
Genesis49:32 Lo le tua sunga om leihawm Hit miteʼ tung panin a kilei ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis49:33 Jakob in a tapate thuhilh a man khit ciangin, a lupna tungah laitat a, a nunung pen a hu sang-in ama mipihte kiang a zuan ta hi." 
Genesis50:1 Tua ciangin Josef a paʼ tungah pukin, ama tungah kap a, amah a nam hi." 
Genesis50:2 A pa a muat loh nadingin a bawl dingin Josef in a nasem zatui siamte thu pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin zatui siamte in zatui tawh Israel a bawl uh hi. 
Genesis50:3 Zatui tawh bawlna nasep hun tampi kisam a, ni sawm li sung sep ding kisam hi. Egypt mite ama hangin ni sawm sagih sung a kap uh hi." 
Genesis50:4 Ama hangin kahna hun a bei ciangin Josef in Faroʼ innkuante kiangah, “Tu-in noteʼ mai ah maipha ka ngah leh Faroʼ kiangah thu nong va gensak ding uh kong thum hi." 
Genesis50:5 Ka pa in kei hong kiciamsak a, ‘Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Kanaan leitang ah kei adingin ka khuat sa han sungah kei nong vui ding hi,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kei hong paitosak inla, ka pa hong vuisak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Tua ciangin kei kong ciahkik ding hi, ci hi, va cihsak un,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:6 Faro in dawngin, “Pai to inla, nang hong kiciamsak bangin na pa va vui in,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:7 Tua ahih ciangin a pa a vui dingin Josef pai to hi. Amah tawh Faroʼ nasemte khempeuh, a inn sung upate, Egypt gam upate khempeuh zong," 
Genesis50:8 Josefʼ innkuante khempeuh, a sanggamte, a paʼ innkuante bangmahin pai to uh hi. A tate uh, a tuuhonte uh le a ganhing honte bek uh Goshen gamah kinusia hi." 
Genesis50:9 Tua lai munah amah tawh leengte le sakol tuangte zong pai khawm to uh hi. Tua lai-a paite tam mahmah hi. 
Genesis50:10 Amaute Jordan gun gal khat, Atadʼ buhcilna phual a tun uh ciangin, nakpi takin dahna tawh a thuum uh hi. Amah in a paʼ hangin ni sagih sung dahna hun a bawl hi." 
Genesis50:11 Tua gam a teeng Kanaan mite in, Atadʼ buhcilna ah tua banga kahna a muh ciangin amaute in, “Hih pen Egypt mite adingin a nasia mahmah thuumna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Abel-mizraim, kici hi. Tua mun pen Jordan gun gal khat ahi hi." 
Genesis50:12 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute a thupiak bangin ama tapate in ama adingin bawlsak uh hi. 
Genesis50:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tapate in Kanaan gamah amah pua-in, kivui nading mun a neih dingin Abraham in Hit mi Efronʼ tung panin a lo tawh a leikhop, Mamre nisuahna lamah a om, Makpelah mun lo sunga leihawm sungah a vui uh hi." 
Genesis50:14 Josef in a pa a vui khit ciangin, a sanggamte le a pa a vui dingin amah a zui khempeuhte tawh Egypt ah a ciahkik hi." 
Genesis50:15 Josefʼ sanggamte in a pa uh a sih khit ciangin, “Josef in eite hong mudahin ama tunga siatna i bawl khempeuh hong thukkik kha ding hi,” ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Josef kiangah thu puak uh a, “I pa in a sih ma-in thu hong pia a," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Josef kiangah hih bangin ci un: Na sanggamteʼ thupalsatna le a khialhna na maisak in, kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangʼ tungah amaute in siatna hong bawl uh hi,’ ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangʼ tungah kong thum uh hi. I paʼ Pasianʼ nasemteʼ thupalsatna hong maisak in,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in ama kiangah tua bangin thu a gen ciangun Josef a kap hi." 
Genesis50:18 A sanggamte zong pai-in ama mai ah puk uh a, “En in, kote, nangma nasemte ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Genesis50:19 Ahih hangin Josef in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei un. Kei, Pasianʼ za ah om ka hi hiam?" 
Genesis50:20 Note in ahihleh, keiʼ tungah a sia dingin na ngaihsun uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in tu hun a mah bangin mi tampite a nuntak theihna a pian nadingin a hoih dingin a ngaihsut ahi hi." 
Genesis50:21 Tua ahih ciangin lau kei un. Note le na tate uh adingin an kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in tua bangin kip gen phakikin amaute a hehnem hi." 
Genesis50:22 Tua ahih ciangin Josef, amah le a paʼ innkuante tawh Egypt ah teeng uh a, Josef kum za le kum sawm nungta hi." 
Genesis50:23 Josef in khang thumna ahi Efraimʼ tate mu hi. Manassehʼ tapa Makhirʼ tate zong Josefʼ inn sung mahah suak uh hi. 
Genesis50:24 Josef in a sanggamte kiangah, “Kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in note hong kem dinga, hih leitang panin amah in Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tunga a ciam sa leitang ah note hong paikhiatpih to ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:25 Tua ciangin Josef in Israel tapateʼ kiciamna bawlin, “Pasian in note hong kem dinga, note in hih lai panin ka guhte na pua to ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Genesis50:26 Tua ahih ciangin kum za le kum sawm a phakin Josef a si hi. Amaute in a muat loh nadingin zatui tawh amah bawl uh a, Egypt ah hankuang sung khat ah amah kikoih hi." 
Exodus1:1 Jakob tawh Egypt ah a hong pai, amauʼ innkuan ciat tawh ahi Israelʼ tapateʼ minte:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simeon, Levi le Judah," 
Exodus1:3 Issakhar, Zebulun le Benjamin," 
Exodus1:4 Dan le Naftali, Gad le Asher ahi hi." 
Exodus1:5 Jakobʼ suanlekhakte khempeuh mi sawm sagih hi a, Josef pen Egypt ah na om khinzo hi." 
Exodus1:6 Tua ciangin Josef le a sanggamte le tua khangmi khempeuh si uh hi. 
Exodus1:7 Ahih hangin Israelʼ suanlekhakte pungin nakpi takin khang uh hi. Amaute tampi pha-in nakpi takin khang uh ahih manin Egypt gamah dim uh hi. 
Exodus1:8 Tu-in Josef a thei lo kumpi thak khat Egypt gamah hong khang hi. 
Exodus1:9 Amah in a mipihte kiangah, “En un, Israel mite eite adingin tam lua-in thahat lua uh hi." 
Exodus1:10 Amaute hong tam kha ding uh ahih manin ngaihsut siamna tawh amaute hih ni. Eite tungah gal hong om leh amaute in i galte pawlin eite hong do-in hih gam panin tai khia kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:11 Tua ahih ciangin nasepna tawh amaute a gimsak dingin amaute tungah nasem ukte koih uh hi. Israel mite in Faro adingin vankoihna Pithom le Rameses khuapite lam uh hi. 
Exodus1:12 Ahih hangin amaute a kinenniam ciangin amaute tampi pha zaw-in kizelthang zaw uh hi. Egypt mite in Israel mite kihta uh hi. 
Exodus1:13 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel mite a gim mahmah in na semsak uh a," 
Exodus1:14 buan le leiseek tawh nasepna le lo sungah nasep namkim khempeuh tawh amauʼ nuntakna haksasak uh hi. Israel miteʼ sepna khempeuh ah amaute in a gim mahmah in semsak uh hi. 
Exodus1:15 Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipa in Hebru mi nau a domsakte, khatʼ min Shifrah, a dang khatʼ min Puah a kicite kiangah," 
Exodus1:16 “Hebru numeite nau domin, nausuahna tutphah tungah a tut ciangun, tapa ahihleh a naungek na that ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu ahihleh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:17 Ahih hangin naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh hi. Egypt kumpipa in amaute a thupiak bangin gamta lo uh a, nau pasalte nungtasak uh hi." 
Exodus1:18 Tua ahih ciangin Egypt kumpipa in naudomte samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin gamta a, nau pasalte nungtasak na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus1:19 Naudomte in Faroʼ kiangah, “Hebru numeite le Egypt numeite a kibat lohna hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadim uh a, amauʼ kiangah naudomte a tun ma-in amaute na suak khin pahpah uh hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Exodus1:20 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in naudomte limbawl hi. Mite khangin pawl cing semsem uh hi. 
Exodus1:21 Naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh ahih manin amah in amaute tungah suanlekhak a pia hi. 
Exodus1:22 Tua ciangin Faro in a mipihte khempeuh thu pia a, “Hebru mite sung panin tapa a suak khempeuh Nail gun sungah na khia ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu khempeuh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:1 Tu-in Leviʼ suante khat in Levi numei khat mah zi-in la hi. 
Exodus2:2 Tua numei gai-in tapa khat nei a, nau hoih khat hi, ci-in a muh ciangin, kha thum sung a seel hi." 
Exodus2:3 Amah in naungek a seel zawh nawn loh ciangin ama adingin pumpeeng tawh kibawl lawh khat phansak a, tua lawh pen buan le kultal tui tawh a zut hi. Tua sungah naungek sialin gun gei-a phai kungte lakah a koih hi." 
Exodus2:4 Amah bang a kicih hiam cih a thei dingin a gamla panin mun khat ah a sanggamnu a ding hi. 
Exodus2:5 Tu-in Faroʼ tanu a kisil dingin gun ah hong pai a, a nasem numeite gun gei ah a vak laitakun amah in phai kungte lakah a lawh mu a, tua lawh a la dingin a nasem numei khat a sawl hi." 
Exodus2:6 Amah in a hon ciangin naungek mu hi. Naungek kap ahih manin tua nu in hehpihhuai sa a, “Hih naungek, Hebru miteʼ ta khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:7 Tua ciangin a sanggamnu in Faro tanu kiangah, “Keimah pai-in Hebru numeite lak panin nang adingin naupang hong khoisak dingin naucing khat ka va sapsak ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:8 Faroʼ tanu in ama kiangah, “Va pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin numeino pai-in naupangʼ nu va sam hi." 
Exodus2:9 Faroʼ tanu in ama kiangah, “Hih naupang la inla, kei adingin hong khoisak in; na thaman kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi in naupang la-in a khoi hi." 
Exodus2:10 Naupang khang a, amah in Faro tanuʼ kiangah paipih a, amah pen tua nuʼ tapa a suak hi. Amah in a min Moses a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Tui sung panin amah ka kai khia hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:11 Ni khat, Moses a khan khit ciangin, ama mipihte kiangah pai-in amauʼ gimnate va mu hi. Egypt mi khat in ama mipih Hebru mi khat a sat zong a mu hi." 
Exodus2:12 Amah khuadak kawikawi a, kuamah mu lo ahih manin Egypt mipa thatin sehnel sungah a seel hi." 
Exodus2:13 A zing ciangin amah paikik a, Hebru mi nih na kilaii uh hi. Amah in a gamta khial mipa kiangah, “Bang hangin na lawm sat na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:14 Amah in dawngin, “Kote a hong uk ding le thu a hong khen dingin kua in nang hong koih ahi hiam? Egypt mipa na thah bangin kei zong thah hong sawm na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses lau a, “A thu hong kithei taktak hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
Exodus2:15 Faro in tua thu a zak ciangin Moses thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Faro kiang panin Moses tai-in Midian gam a tung hi. Ni khat amah tuikhuk gei khat ah tu hi. 
Exodus2:16 Tua laitakin Midian siampi Jethro in tanu sagih nei hi. Amaute hong pai-in tui tawi uh a, a pa uhʼ tuuhonte tui pia dingin kuangzawn dim uh hi." 
Exodus2:17 Tuucing dangte hong pai-in amaute hawl khia hi. Ahih hangin Moses ding to-in amaute huh a, a tuuhonte uh tui piaksak hi." 
Exodus2:18 A pa uh kiangah amaute a tun ciangun amah in, “A bangci-a tu ni-a hong hici ciah baih na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:19 Amaute in, “Egypt mi khat in tuucing dangteʼ khut sung panin kote hong hon khia a, ko adingin tui nangawn hong tawisakin tuuhonte tui pia hi,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus2:20 Amah in a tanute kiangah, “Amah koi lai ah om ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua mipa nusia na hi uh hiam? Amah in an hong nek theih nadingin va sam un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:21 Moses zong tua mipa kiangah om ding lungkim a, amah in Moses tungah a tanu Zipporah a pia hi." 
Exodus2:22 Tua nu in tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Gershom a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus2:23 Tua zawh kum tampi khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa si hi. Israel mite a salsuahna sung uh ah amauʼ kikona Pasian kiang tung hi. 
Exodus2:24 Pasian in amauʼ thumna za hi. Pasian in Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tawh a thuciamna a phawk hi." 
Exodus2:25 Pasian in Israel mite mu a, amauteʼ om zia zong a thei hi." 
Exodus3:1 Tu-in Moses in Midian siampi ahi, a sungpa Jethroʼ tuu hon kem hi. Amah in gamlak nisuahna lamah a tuu hon paipih a, Pasianʼ mual ahi Horeb a tung hi." 
Exodus3:2 Topaʼ vantungmi sawlpang kawm, meikuang sung panin ama tungah hong kilang hi. Amah khuadak a, sawlpang a kuang a mu hi. Ahi zongin kaang tum lo hi." 
Exodus3:3 Moses in, “Bang hangin sawlpang kaang tum lo hiam, kei pai-in hih a lamdang ka muh va en dih ning,” ci hi." 
Exodus3:4 Tua thu a thei dingin amah a paina Topa in a muh ciangin, sawlpang kawm panin Pasian in amah sam a, “Moses, Moses!” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” ci hi." 
Exodus3:5 Tua ciangin amah in, “A nai ah hong pai kei in. Na khe panin na khedapte suah khia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma dinna mun, leitang siangtho ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na paʼ Pasian, Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian le Jakobʼ Pasian ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses in Pasian a muh ding lau ahih manin a maitang a hum hi." 
Exodus3:7 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Egypt ah a om ka miteʼ gimna mu khinin, amaute a uk nasem ukteʼ hangin amauʼ kikona ka za khin hi. Amauʼ thuaknate ka thei a," 
Exodus3:8 Egypt miteʼ khut sung panin amaute khah khia-in, tua leitang panin amaute la khia-in a hoih a tanzau leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus miteʼ omna ah amaute a paipih dingin kong pai suk hi." 
Exodus3:9 Tu-in, en in, Israel miteʼ kikona kei kiang hong tung khin a, Egypt mite in amaute a netniamna ka mu khin hi." 
Exodus3:10 Hong pai in, nang in Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te na paikhiatpih theih nadingin Faroʼ kiangah nang kong sawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:11 Ahih hangin Moses in Pasian kiangah, “Faroʼ kiangah pai-in Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin kei, kua ka hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Exodus3:12 Amah in, “Nang tawh kong om taktak ding hi. Hih pen nangma adingin nangmah kong sawlna lim hi ding hi: Nangmah in Egypt panin mihingte na paikhiatpih khit ciangin, nang in hih mual tungah Pasian na bia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:13 Tua ciangin Moses in Pasian kiangah, “Israel mite kiangah kei va pai-in amaute kiangah, ‘Na pate uhʼ Pasian in noteʼ kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ va ci leng, amaute in, ‘Ama min bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dong leh, amauteʼ tungah bangci ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:14 Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in Keimah ka hi hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Israel mite tungah hih thu genin, ‘ Keimah a kici pa in note kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus3:15 Pasian in Moses kiangah, Hih thu Israel mite tungah gen in: ‘ Topa, na pate uhʼ Pasian, Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian le Jakobʼ Pasian in note kiangah kei hong sawl hi,’ ci in. Hih pen keima min hi tawntung ahih manin kei pen khang tawntungin phawk ding ka hi hi." 
Exodus3:16 Pai in, Israel upate kaikhawmin amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa, na pate uh’ Pasian, Abraham, Isaac le Jakobʼ Pasian keima tungah hong kilang khinin, “Note le Egypt gam sungah noteʼ tungah hong kibawlna ka mu khin hi." 
Exodus3:17 Egypt gam panin note hong la khia-in Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus miteʼ leitang, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang ah note kong paipih ding ka kiciam hi,” ci hi, va ci in." 
Exodus3:18 “Amaute in nangma thu hong ngai ding uh hi. Nang le Israel upate, Egypt kumpipa kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘ Topa ahi Hebru miteʼ Pasian, koteʼ kiangah hong kilang zo hi. Tu-in kong thum uh hi, Topa ka Pasian uhʼ tungah biakna ka piak theih nadingun ni thum paina gamlak ah kote hong paisak in,’ va ci un." 
Exodus3:19 Thatang hat thu tawh a kisawl gawp kei buang leh Egypt kumpipa in note hong paisak loh ding zong ka thei hi. 
Exodus3:20 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in ka khut zanin nalamdangte tawh Egypt ka vat gawp ding hi. 
Exodus3:21 “Keimah in Egypt miteʼ muhna ah hih mihingte maipha ka pia ding hi. Note na paikhiat uh ciangin, a hawmguakin na pai kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus3:22 Numei peuhmah in a veengte le ama inn sunga om pak miteʼ kiang panin ngun le kham tawh kibawl kizepnate le puante ngen ding uh a, na tapate uh le na tanute uh tungah tuate na koih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note in Egypt miteʼ na na sut ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:1 Tua ciangin Moses in dawngin, “Ahih hangin amaute in kei hong um loin ka thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Nang tungah Topa hong kilang lo hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:2 Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khut sungah bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ciangkhut,” ci hi." 
Exodus4:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “Lei ah lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in leilak ah lawn a, gulpi khat a suak hi. Tua gulpi kiang panin Moses tai hi." 
Exodus4:4 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Na khut zan inla a mei-in man in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut zanin man a, ama khut sungah ciangkhut a suakkik hi." 
Exodus4:5 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute in a up theih nadingun Topa, amauteʼ Pasian, Abrahamʼ Pasian, Isaacʼ Pasian le Jakobʼ Pasian, nangʼ tungah hong kilang khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:6 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Na khut, na ang sungah koih in,” cikik hi. Amah in a khut a ang sungah koih hi. Amah in a lak khiatkik ciangin, a khut phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi." 
Exodus4:7 Tua ciangin Pasian in, “Na khut na ang sungah koihkik in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut a ang sungah koihkik hi. Amah in a lak khiatkik ciangin ama cilesa dangte mah bangin damkik hi." 
Exodus4:8 Pasian in, “Amaute in nang hong up kei a, lim masa a thudon kei uh leh zong, amaute in lim nunung um kha ding uh hi." 
Exodus4:9 Amaute in hih lim nihte nangawn um loin na thu hong thudon kei leh, nangmah in Nail gun panin tui pawl khat la-in lei keu tungah na sung dinga, Nail gun panin na lak tui pen lei keu tungah sisan suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:10 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “Oh, ka Topa aw, tu masiah hitaleh na nasem pa tungah thu na gen a kipan hitaleh, kei thugen a siam ka hi kei hi. Ka kampau ol-in, ka pau awk hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:11 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Kua in mipaʼ kam bawl ahi hiam? Kua in amah pau thei losak, bilngongsak, musak, mittawsak ahi hiam? Topa ahi keimah hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Exodus4:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in pai in. Keimah in na thugenna ah kong huh dinga, na thugen ding nang kong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:13 Ahih hangin amah in, “Oh, ka Topa aw, hong thum ing; midang khat sawl zaw in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:14 Tua ciangin Moses tungah Topa heh a, amah in, “Levi mi na sanggampa Aaron om hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in hoihtakin thu a gen theihna ka cian theih hi. En in, nangmah a dawn dingin amah hong paikhia a, amah in nang hong muh ciangin a lungsim sungah amah kipak ding hi." 
Exodus4:15 Nangmah in ama kiangah thu na gen dinga, thute amah na theisak ding hi. Keimah in na thugenna uh ah kong huh dinga, na hih ding uh kong hilh ding hi." 
Exodus4:16 Amah in nangʼ tangin mite tungah thu gen ding hi. Amah in nang adingin thu hong gensak dinga, nang in Pasian bangin na gen ding teng amah na sawl ding hi." 
Exodus4:17 Nangmah in limte na bawl nading ahi hih ciangkhut na khut sungah na tawi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:18 Tua ciangin a sungpa Jethroʼ kiangah Moses pai-in ama kiangah, “Hong thum ing; Egypt ah ka sanggamte kiangah kei hong ciahkiksakin amaute a nungta lai uh hiam hong musak in,” a ci hi. Jethro in Moses kiangah, “Cidam takin va ciahkik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:19 Midian gam sungah Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt ah ciahkik in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang a hong that nuam mi khempeuh si khinta uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:20 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a zi le a tapate la a, la khat tungah amaute tuangsakin, Egypt gamah ciahkik hi. Pasian in a tawi dingin a gen ciangkhut, Moses in ama khut sungah a tawi hi." 
Exodus4:21 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt ah na ciahkik ciangin, nangma hih theih dingin vangliatna kong piak sa nalamdangte khempeuh Faroʼ mai ah na hih ding thei in. Ahih hangin keimah in ama lungsim ka khauhsak dinga, amah in mite paisak lo ding hi." 
Exodus4:22 Nangmah in Faroʼ kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel pen ka tapa a suak masa hi a," 
Exodus4:23 nangma kiangah, Amah in kei hong biak theih nadingin ka tapa paisak in, kong ci hi. Amah paisak ding na nial leh, en in, na tapa a suak masa ka that ding hi, ci hi, ci in,’” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:24 Lampi ah a giahna khat ah Topa in Moses dawntuahin thah a sawm hi. 
Exodus4:25 Tua ciangin Zipporah in meisuang khat la-in a tapaʼ vun dawn at khiatsak a, tua tawh Moses lawngin, “Nang pen keiʼ tungah sisan tawh ka pasal na hi taktak hi!” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:26 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses that lo hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, vun atna hangin “Sisan tawh ka pasal na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus4:27 Tua laitakin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Moses a dawn dingin sehnel gamah pai in,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in, Pasianʼ mualah Moses dawnin a nam hi." 
Exodus4:28 Topa in amah a sawlna thute khempeuh le ama sep dinga a sawl limte khempeuh Moses in Aaronʼ tungah a gen hi.
