Exodus4:29 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron pai-in Israel upate khempeuh a kaikhawm uh hi. 
Exodus4:30 Topa in Moses kiang a a gen sa thute khempeuh Aaron in gen a, Moses in miteʼ muhna ah nalamdangte a lak hi." 
Exodus4:31 Mite in um uh hi. Israel mite kiangah Topa hawhin, amauʼ thuaknate amah in a muh khitna thu amaute in a zak uh ciangin, amaute in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Exodus5:1 Tua khit ciangin Faroʼ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in, “Israel Pasian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute in sehnel gamah kei adingin pawi khat a khaam theih nadingun ka mite paisak in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:2 Ahih hangin Faro in, “Ama thu mangin Israel mite ka paisak nadingin Topa na cih uh kua ahi hiam? Topa na cih uh ka thei kei hi. Tua tham loin Israel-te ka paisak kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:3 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hebru-teʼ Pasian ko kiangah hong kilang zo hi. Hong thum ung; amah in natna ahih kei leh namsau tawh kote hong hih kha ding ahih manin, ni thum paina sehnel gamah kote hong paisakin, Topa ka Pasian uhʼ tungah biakna hong piasak in,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:4 Ahih hangin Egypt kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Moses le Aaron aw, bang hangin amauʼ nasepna panin mite pai khiasak ding na hi uh hiam? Na nasepnate uh ah pai un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:5 Tua ciangin Faro in, “En un, tu-in hih mite tam mahmah a, amauʼ nasepnate panin amaute na tawlngasak uh hi,” ci lai hi." 
Exodus5:6 Tua ni mahin Faro in nasem ukte le a nasem mapite thu pia a," 
Exodus5:7 “Tumasiah a bangin, leiseek bawl nadingin mite tungah buhtu na pia nawn kei ding uh hi. Amaute paisak unla, amau mah buhtu khawmsak tawm un." 
Exodus5:8 Ahih hangin tumasiah a a leiseek bawlzah mah uh amaute na bawlsak ding uh hi. Bangbang hitaleh na khiam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadah uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute kiko-in, ‘Kote hong paisakin ka Pasian uh tungah biakna hong piasak unʼ ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:9 Amaute in na semin zuauthute a don loh nadingin mihingte tungah nasep haksa zaw suan un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:10 Tua ahih ciangin nasem ukte le nasem mapite pai khia-in mite tungah, “Faro in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note buhtu kong pia kei ding hi." 
Exodus5:11 Note pai unla, na muhna peuhpeuh uh ah na buhtu ding uh va zong tawm un. Ahih hangin na nasep ngei zah uh them khat zong hong kikhiam lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:12 Tua ahih ciangin a buhtu dingun buhkung a kaikhawm dingin Egypt gam khempeuh ah mite kikhenthang uh hi. 
Exodus5:13 Nasem ukte in kin ngaihsut uh a, “Buhtu hong kipiak hun mah bangin na nisim nasep zah uh zo un,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:14 Israel mi nasem mapi, Faroʼ nasem ukte in amaute a uk dingin a koih sawn mite kisatin, “Bang hangin tu ciang dong, leiseek bawl ding na nasep khempeuh uh hih khin nai lo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in kidong hi." 
Exodus5:15 Tua ciangin Israel mi nasem mapite hong pai-in Faroʼ kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasemte hih bangin hong bawl na hi hiam?" 
Exodus5:16 Na nasemte tungah buhtu hong kipia lo hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ko tungah, ‘Leiseek bawl un!’ hong ci hi. En in, na nasem kote hong kisat hi. Hih thu ah nangma mite khial zaw hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:17 Ahih hangin amah in, “Note na thadah uh hi, note na thadah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in, ‘Hong paisak unla, Topaʼ tungah biakna hong piasak un,’ na ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:18 Tu-in pai unla na sem un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note buhtu hong kipia lo dinga, ahi zongin leiseek a mal ngeina zah mah na pia khia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus5:19 Amaute in, “Bangbang hitaleh nisimin leiseek na seek zah uh khiam lo ding,” a cih ciangin, amaute thu haksapi sungah om ahih lam uh Israel mi nasem mapite in mu uh hi." 
Exodus5:20 Amaute Faro kiang panin a paikhiat ciangun, amaute a na ngak Moses le Aaron tawh kituak uh hi." 
Exodus5:21 Amaute in, “ Topa in note hong enin thu hong khen hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro le a nasemteʼ muhna ah kote a khial nong suaksak uh a, kote hong kithah theih nadingin thu a zong na hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus5:22 Tua ciangin Topaʼ lamah Moses kiheikikin, “ Topa aw, bang hangin nangmah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei hong sawl peuhmah na hi hiam?" 
Exodus5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma min suangin Faroʼ kiangah thugen dingin ka pai khit a kipan, amah in hih mite tungah siatna bawl napi-in nangmah in na mite na hon khia het kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:1 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tu-in Faroʼ tungah ka bawl ding na mu ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ut lo pipi-in amaute sawl khia ding hi. Amah in ut lo pipi-in ama leitang panin amaute hawl khia taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:2 Pasian in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus6:3 Abraham, Isaac le Jakob-teʼ tungah Vanglian Pasian-in ka kilang a, ahih hangin Topa ahi keima min tawh amauteʼ tungah kei ka kitheisak kei hi." 
Exodus6:4 Amaute tawl khat sung a teenna leitang ahi Kanaan gam amauteʼ tungah piak dingin amaute tawh ka thuciamna zong ka kipsak hi. 
Exodus6:5 Tua tham loin Egypt mite in salin a neih Israel miteʼ thumna ka za zo a, ka thuciamna ka phawk zo hi." 
Exodus6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel miteʼ tungah, ‘Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Egypt miteʼ na na sepna uh panin note kong paikhiatpih ding hi. Amauʼ sal hihna panin note kong khah khia dinga, a thahat ka khut zanin thukhenna nasep lian tawh note kong hon khia ding hi." 
Exodus6:7 Keima mi dingin note kong la dinga, kei pen noteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi. Egypt miteʼ sila hihna panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa, Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna note in na thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus6:8 Abraham, Isaac le Jakob-teʼ tunga ka ciam leitang ah note kong paipih ding hi. Tua leitang na neih dingun noteʼ tungah kong pia ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:9 Moses in tua bangmahin Israel mite tungah a gen hi. Ahih hangin amauʼ lungsim kitapna le a salsuahna sung uh ah a gimna uh hangin amaute in Mosesʼ thu ngai lo uh hi. 
Exodus6:10 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus6:11 “Pai-in va tum inla, ama leitang panin Israel mite a pai khiatsak nading Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ kiangah va gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:12 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, Israel mite nangawn in ka thu hong ngai lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in thugen siam lo keima thu, Faro in hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:13 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah thu gen a, Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiatpih dingin note ka hong sawlna thu, Israel mite le Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ tungah va gen un, ci-in a hanthawn hi." 
Exodus6:14 Hihte pen amauʼ beh lutangte ahi hi: Israelʼ ta a suak masa Reubenʼ tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron le Karmi ahi hi. Hihte pen Reuben-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:15 Simeonʼ tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar le Kanaan numeiʼ tapa Shaul ahi hi. Hihte pen Simeon-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:16 Hihte pen amauʼ khang tawh kizui-in Leviʼ tapateʼ min ahi hi: Gershon, Kohath le Merari hi a, Levi kum za le kum sawm thum le kum sagih nungta hi." 
Exodus6:17 Gershonʼ tapate: Amauʼ innkuan tawh kizui-in Libni le Shimei ahi hi. 
Exodus6:18 Kohathʼ tapate: Amram, Izhar, Hebron le Uzziel hi a, Kohath kum za le kum sawm thum le kum thum nungta hi." 
Exodus6:19 Merariʼ tapate: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hihte pen amauʼ khang tawh kizui-in Levi-te beh ahi hi. 
Exodus6:20 Amram in ama paʼ sanggamnu Jokhebed zi-in la a, tua nu in amah tawh Aaron le Moses nei hi. Amram kum za le kum sawm thum le kum sagih nungta hi." 
Exodus6:21 Izharʼ tapate: Korah, Nefeg le Zikri ahi hi." 
Exodus6:22 Uzzielʼ tapate: Mishael, Elzafan le Sithri ahi hi." 
Exodus6:23 Aaron in Amminadabʼ tanu, Nahshonʼ sanggamnu Elisheba zi-in la hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar nei hi." 
Exodus6:24 Korahʼ tapate: Assir, Elkanah le Abiasaf hi a, hihte pen Korah-te beh ahi hi." 
Exodus6:25 Aaronʼ tapa Eleazer in Putielʼ tanute khat zi-in la hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Finehas nei hi. Hihte pen a inn kuankuanin Levi miteʼ beh lutangte ahi hi. 
Exodus6:26 “Egypt gam panin Israel mite a honpi-in paikhiatpih in,” Topa in a cihna mite pen hih Aaron le Moses ahi uh hi." 
Exodus6:27 Egypt gam panin Israel mite paikhiatpih nading thu Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ tunga thu a gente pen hih Moses le Aaron ahi uh hi. 
Exodus6:28 Egypt gamah Moses kiangah Topa in thu a gen ni-in," 
Exodus6:29 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Na tunga kong gen khempeuh Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ tungah gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus6:30 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa kiangah, “En in, kei pen thugen a siam lo mi ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in Faro in ka thu hong ngai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thei in, Faroʼ tungah Pasian bangin nang kong bawl hi. Na sanggampa Aaron pen na kamsang pa hi ding hi." 
Exodus7:2 Nang kong thupiak khempeuh na gen ding hi. Ama leitang panin Israel mite a pai khiatsak nadingin Faroʼ tungah na sanggampa Aaron in gen ding hi. 
Exodus7:3 Ahih hangin keimah in Faroʼ lungsim ka khauhsak dinga, Egypt gamah ka limte le ka nalamdangte tampi ka bawl khit hangin" 
Exodus7:4 Faro in nangʼ thu hong ngai lo ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Egypt tungah gimna ka tungsak dinga, thukhen nasepna lianpite tawh Egypt gam panin Israel mi ahi ka mihonte ka paikhiatpih ding hi." 
Exodus7:5 Keimah in Egypt tungah gimna tungsakin amauteʼ lak panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih ciangin Egypt mite in Topa ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:6 Moses le Aaron zong Topaʼ sawl bangmahin gamta uh a, Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in sem uh hi." 
Exodus7:7 Tu-in amaute in Faroʼ tungah thu a gen laitakun Moses kum sawm giat pha a, Aaron kum sawm giat le kum thum a pha hi." 
Exodus7:8 Topa in Moses le Aaronʼ kiangah," 
Exodus7:9 “Faro in note kiangah, ‘Note a thutak na hihna uh nalamdang khat tawh hong lak un,’ hong cih ciangin nangmah in Aaron kiangah, ‘Gulpi khat a suah theih nadingin na ciangkhut la inla, Faroʼ mai ah khia suk in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:10 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in Topaʼ thupiak bangin gamta uh hi. Aaron in Faro le a ulianteʼ mai ah a ciangkhut lawn suk a, gulpi khat a suak hi." 
Exodus7:11 Tua ciangin Faro in a mipilte le a aisan siamte a sam hi. Egypt mitphial siamte in zong amauʼ siamna tawh tua bang teek mahin a bawl thei uh hi. 
Exodus7:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a milip in a ciangkhut uh khia suk ciat uh a, tuate gulpi vive a suak hi. Ahih hangin Aaronʼ ciangkhut in amauʼ ciangkhutte a valh tum hi." 
Exodus7:13 Topaʼ gen sa bangin Faroʼ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in amauteʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus7:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faroʼ lungsim khauh mahmah a, amah in mite paisak nuam lo hi." 
Exodus7:15 Tua ahih manin zingsangin Nail gun ah a pai ciangin amah tawh a kimu dingin nang zong pai in. Gulpi a suak na ciangkhut pen mah tawi inla, gun gei ah amah ngak in." 
Exodus7:16 Amah tawh na kimuh ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Sehnel gam sungah ama mite in amah a biak theih nadingin a mite na paisak nading a gen dingin Hebru-teʼ Pasian, Topa in nangʼ kiangah kei hong sawl khin hi. Ahi zongin tu ciang dong ama thu na mang kei hi." 
Exodus7:17 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Keima sep ding thute a muh ciangin kei kua ka hi hiam cih hong thei ding hi,” ci hi. En in, hih ka ciangkhut tawh gun tui ka sat dinga, tuite sisan hong suak ding hi." 
Exodus7:18 Ngasate si dinga, gun tui uih gawp ding ahih manin Egypt mite in dawn thei lo ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:19 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Na ciangkhut la inla, sisan a suah theih nadingin Egypt tuite, amauʼ gunte, amauʼ luite, amauʼ bualteʼ tung le amauʼ tuili khempeuhteʼ tungah na khut zan in. Egypt gam sunga sing beel le suang beel khempeuh sung nangawn ah sisan om ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus7:20 Moses le Aaron in Topaʼ thupiak bangin hih uh hi. Faro le ama ulianteʼ muhin amah in ciangkhut vik to-in Nail gun sunga om tui sat a, Nail gun sunga om tui khempeuh sisan a suak hi." 
Exodus7:21 Nail gun sunga ngasate si hi. Nail gun uih a, Egypt mite in Nail gun pan a tui dawn thei lo uh hi. Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah sisan om hi." 
Exodus7:22 Ahih hangin Egypt mitphial siamte in amauʼ siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ lungsim a khauh ngei mahin khauh a, Topaʼ gen sa bangin amah in amauteʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus7:23 Faro kihei-in a inn sungah pai a, amah in a lungsim nangawn ah tua thu ngaihsutin nei nawn lo hi." 
Exodus7:24 Amaute in Nail gun tui dawn thei lo uh ahih manin Egypt mite khempeuh in Nail gun kiim tengah tui dawn ding a to uh hi. 
Exodus7:25 Topa in gun a sat zawh ni sagih pha ta hi. 
Exodus8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faroʼ kiangah pai-in ama tungah, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus8:2 Ahih hangin amaute na paisak kei leh, en in, na gam khempeuh uiphukte tawh ka gimsak ding hi." 
Exodus8:3 Nail gun pen uiphukte tawh kidim dinga, tuate pen na inn sung, na lupna inn dei sung, na lupna tung, na nasemte le na mipihteʼ inn sung, na meikhukte le na annel mekna kuang sung uh ah hong pai ding uh hi." 
Exodus8:4 Uiphukte, nangʼ tung le na nasemte khempeuh tungah hong pai ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:5 Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Gunte, luite le tuilite tungah na ciangkhut zan inla, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte paisak in,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:6 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in Egypt tuite tungah a khut zan a, uiphukte hong pai-in Egypt leitang a tuam hi." 
Exodus8:7 Ahih hangin mitphial siamte in amauʼ siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh a, Egypt leitang tungah uiphukte omsak uh hi." 
Exodus8:8 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron samin, “Kei le ka miteʼ kiang panin uiphukte a lakkhiat nadingin Topaʼ tungah thum in. Topaʼ tungah biakna a pia dingin mite ka paisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:9 Tua ciangin Moses in Faroʼ kiangah, “Nail gun sung cih sim loh, nangma kiang le na innte panin uiphukte a bei nadingin nang le na nasemte le na mite adingin ka thum theih nadingin a hun khat seh in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:10 Amah in, “Zing ciang,” ci hi. Moses in, “ Topa ahi koteʼ Pasian tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi, ci-in na theih nadingin nangma cih bang hi tahen." 
Exodus8:11 Nang le na innte le na nasemte le na miteʼ kiang panin uiphukte paikhia ding uh a, Nail gun sung bekah om lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:12 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ kiang panin Moses le Aaron a paikhia uh hi. Faroʼ tungah a tunsak uiphukte a beisak nadingin Topaʼ tungah Moses in thu a ngen hi. 
Exodus8:13 Topa in Mosesʼ nget bangin hih a, innte le huang sung le lote panin uiphukte a si hi." 
Exodus8:14 Amaute in a lomlomin tuate khawm uh a, gam sungteng uih hi." 
Exodus8:15 Ahih hangin nopna a omkik lam Faro in a muh ciangin, amah in a lungsim khauhsak a, Topaʼ gen sa bangin amauʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus8:16 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Aaronʼ kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah thokang a om nadingin na ciangkhut zanin leivui sat in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:17 Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh hi. Aaron in a ciangkhut tawh leivui sat a, mihing tung le ganhing tungah thokang hong om hi. Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah leivui teng thokang suak hi." 
Exodus8:18 Mitphial siamte in amauʼ siamna tawh thokang piansak ding sin uh a, ahih hangin amaute in hih thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing le ganhing tungah thokangte om hi." 
Exodus8:19 Mitphial siamte in Faroʼ kiangah, “Hih pen Pasianʼ nasepna ahi hi,” ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Faroʼ lungsim khauh a, Topaʼ gen sa bangin amah in amauteʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus8:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baihin gun ah Faro hong pai ding ngakin ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingun ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus8:21 Tua bang hi loin, ka mite na paisak kei leh, en in, nang le na nasemte le na miteʼ tung le na innte sungah tho honpite kong sawl ding hi. Egypt miteʼ innte le tuateʼ dinna leitang zong tho honpite tawh kidim ding hi." 
Exodus8:22 Ahih hangin tua ni ciangin kei pen hih leitang tungah Topa ka hihna na theih nadingin tho honpite a om loh nadingin ka mite a teenna Goshen leitang keimah in ka tuam koih ding hi. 
Exodus8:23 Tua bangin keima mite le nangma mite a kilamdanna khat ka bawl ding hi. Zing ciangin hih lim hong om ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:24 Topa in tua bangmahin hih ahih manin Faroʼ inn sung le ama nasemteʼ inn sungah tho honpi hong pai a, thoteʼ hangin Egypt gam sung khempeuh leitang kisia hi." 
Exodus8:25 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron sam a, “Pai un; hih gam sungah na Pasian tung uh ah biakna pia un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:26 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tua bangin hih ding kituak lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite adingin a deihhuai lo biaknate kote in Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka pia ding uh hi. Egypt mite adingin a deihhuai lo biaknate amauʼ muhna ah pia le ung, amaute in suang tawh kote hong deng ding uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Exodus8:27 Kote, ni thum paina sehnel gamah pai-in ama hong thupiak ding bangin Topa ka Pasian uh tungah biakna ka va pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Faro in, “Sehnel gamah Topa na Pasian uh tungah biakna a pia dingin note kong paisak ding hi. Ahi zongin gamlapi ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Kei adingin zong hong thumsak un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:29 Tua ciangin Moses in, “En in, nang kiang panin kei pai khia-in Faroʼ kiang pan, a nasemteʼ kiang pan le a miteʼ kiang panin tho honpite zing ciangin a paikhiat theih nadingin Topaʼ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Ahi zongin Topaʼ tungah biakna a pia dingin mite paisak lohna tawh Faro hong zuautatkik nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus8:30 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ kiang panin Moses pai khia-in Topaʼ tungah thu a ngen hi. 
Exodus8:31 Topa in Mosesʼ nget bangin pia a, Faroʼ kiang, a nasemteʼ kiang le a miteʼ kiang panin tho honpite la khia a, khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus8:32 Ahi zongin Faro in hih hunin zong a lungsim khauhsak lai a, mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus9:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faroʼ kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa, Hebru-teʼ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus9:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in amaute paisak ding nialin amaute na let lai leh," 
Exodus9:3 lo sunga om ganhing, sakolte, late, kalaohte, bawnghonte le tuuhonte tungah a nasia mahmah gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Exodus9:4 Israel mite aʼ khempeuh khat beek a sih loh nadingin Israel-teʼ ganhingte le Egypt-teʼ ganhingteʼ kikalah Topa in a kilamdanna khat ka bawl ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:5 Topa in a hun khat seh a, “Zing ciangin Topa in hih gam sungah hih na hong sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:6 A zing ciangin Topa in hih na sem hi. Egypt miteʼ ganhing khempeuh si a, ahih hangin Israel miteʼ ganhing khat zong si lo hi." 
Exodus9:7 Faro in a en dingin mi sawl a, Israel-teʼ ganhing khat zong na si lo hi. Ahih hangin Faroʼ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus9:8 Topa in Moses le Aaronʼ kiangah, “Meiphual pi panin khut dimin vut la unla, Faroʼ muhin vantung lamah Moses in lawn hen." 
Exodus9:9 Tua vutte, Egypt gam khempeuh ah leivui neel bangin kithehthang dinga, Egypt gam sung khempeuh ah mihing le ganhing tungah meimatum suakin kilawh gawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in meiphual pi panin vutte la-in Faroʼ mai ah ding uh a, Moses in vantung lamah tuate lawn a, tuate in mihing le ganhing tungah meimatum piangsakin kilawh gawp hi." 
Exodus9:11 Mitphial siamte in meimatum veina hangin Moses dem zo nawn lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mitphial siamte le Egypt mite khempeuh in meimatum vei uh hi. 
Exodus9:12 Ahih hangin Topa in Faroʼ lungsim khauhsak a, Topa in Mosesʼ tunga a gen sa bangin amah in amauteʼ thu ngai lo hi." 
Exodus9:13 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Zingsangin tho baih inla, Faroʼ mai ah dingin ama kiangah, ‘Hebru miteʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingun ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus9:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuh ah kei tawh a kibang khat beek om lo hi, ci-in na theih nadingin hih hunin na inn sung tawng dong le na nasemte le na miteʼ tungah ka gimnate khempeuh kong tungsak ding hi." 
Exodus9:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in keimah in ka khut zanin natna tawh nang le na mite hong vat gawpin, leitung panin note hong kibeisak thei hi." 
Exodus9:16 Ahi zongin leitung khempeuh ah keima min a kipulak theih nadingin note tungah ka vangliatna lah ding deihna-in kong nungtasak lai hi. 
Exodus9:17 Ka mite tungah nang kiliansak lai-in amaute na paisak kei hi. 
Exodus9:18 En in, zing ciang tu bang hunin Egypt gam a kisat a kipanin tu hun dongin tua bang a kimu ngei lo, a tam mahmah gialpi ka kiasak ding hi." 
Exodus9:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mi sawl inla, na ganhingte le gamlak a na neihte khempeuh a muanhuai bukna ah koih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh inn ah a kipaipih lo, gamlak a om mihing le ganhing tungah gialpi kia dinga, amaute si ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:20 Tua ciangin Faroʼ nasemteʼ lak panin Topaʼ thu a zahtak mi in ama silate le a ganhingte inn ah taisak hi. 
Exodus9:21 Ahi zongin Topaʼ thu a don lo mi in ama silate le a ganhingte gamlak ah nusia hi. 
Exodus9:22 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt gam sung khempeuh a mihing le ganhing le gamlak kungte khempeuh tungah gialpi a kiat theih nadingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:23 Tua ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a ciangkhut a zan hi. Topa in van gingsakin gialpi kiasak a, leitungah keek kia suk hi. Topa in Egypt gam sungah gialpi zusak hi." 
Exodus9:24 Egypt gam minam khat a suah khit a kipanin tua bang a omngei lo, a tam mahmah gialpi le gialpi lakah khua phia-in keek ging om tawntung hi." 
Exodus9:25 Gialpi in Egypt gam sunga a om mihing le ganhing, na khempeuh deng gawp hi. Gialpi in gamlak kung khempeuh deng gawp a, gamlak singkung khempeuh deng tan hi." 
Exodus9:26 Israel mite a omna Goshen gam bekah gialpi kia lo hi. 
Exodus9:27 Tua ciangin Faro in mi sawlin Moses le Aaron samsakin amaute kiangah, “Tutungin ka khial hi. Topa man hi. Kei le ka mite ka khial uh hi." 
Exodus9:28 Topaʼ tungah thum un. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih vanging le gialpi kicing zo hi. Note kong paisak dinga, note na khawl nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:29 Moses in ama kiangah, “Khuapi panin ka paikhiat khit phetin Topaʼ lamah ka khut ka zan ding hi. Leitung pen Topa aʼ hi, ci-in na theih nadingin vanging tawpin gialpi om nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus9:30 Ahih hangin nang le na nasemte in ahihleh, Topa Pasian na zahtak nai lohna uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus9:31 (Anthul kungte le mangbuhham kisia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mangbuh hamte a vuih laitak hi a, anthul kungte a pak laitak ahi hi." 
Exodus9:32 Ahih hangin mangbuh le mangbuh mante sia lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate khangham nai lo hi.) 
Exodus9:33 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ kiang pan khuapi pua lamah Moses paikhia a, Topaʼ lamah a khut zanin thu a ngen hi. Van ging le gialpi tawp pah a, leitungah guah bua nawn lo hi." 
Exodus9:34 Ahih hangin guah le gialpi le vanging a khawlna Faro in a muh ciangin amah khial lai a, amah le a nasemte in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh hi." 
Exodus9:35 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Moses tungtawnin a gen sa bangin Faroʼ lungsim khauh lai a, amah in Israel mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses tungah, “Faroʼ kiangah pai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ lakah hih keima limte ka lah theih nading le keimah in Egypt mite ka mawlpihna le amauteʼ lakah bang limte bawl khin cihna thu na tate le na tuteʼ zakna ah na gen theih nading le, Topa ka hihna na theih nadingin ama lungsim le a nasemteʼ lungsim ka khauhsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:2  
Exodus10:3 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ kiangah Moses le Aaron pai-in ama kiangah, “Hebru miteʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Ka mai ah nang na kiniamkhiat nading bang tanvei nial ding na hi hiam? Amaute in keimah hong biak theih nadingin ka mite paisak in." 
Exodus10:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite paisak ding na nial leh, zing ciangin na gam sungah kauphete kong paipih dinga," 
Exodus10:5 kuamah in leitang a muh theih loh nadingin tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam ding uh hi. Gialpi khit cianga nang aʼ dinga a om lai sunte amaute in ne ding uh hi. Tuate in gamlak a a po nangma singkung khempeuh ne ding uh a," 
Exodus10:6 nangma innte le na nasemte khempeuh le Egypt miteʼ inn khempeuh ah dim ding uh hi. Na pu na pate uh leitang tungah a pian uh a kipan tu ni donga tua bang a muh ngei lohte uh hi ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin amah kihei-in Faroʼ kiang panin a paikhia hi." 
Exodus10:7 Faroʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Eite tungah hih mipa bang tanvei thangzak hong hi niloh ding ahi hiam? Amaute in amauʼ Pasian, Topa a biak theih nadingun mite paisak in. Egypt a siatna thei tel nai lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus10:8 Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiangah Moses le Aaron kipaipihkik hi. Faro in amaute kiangah, “Pai un; Topa, na Pasian uh va bia un. Ahi zongin kua teng pai ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:9 Moses in, “Ka khangnote uh le ka khanghamte uh tawh ka pai khawm ding uh hi. Ka tapate uh, ka tanute uh, ka tuuhonte uh le ka bawnghonte uh tawh ka pai ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa adingin pawi khat ka kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:10 Faro in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh na naupangte uh kong paisak taak leh note tawh Topa hong om ta ve! En un, note in ngimna hoih lo na nei uh hi." 
Exodus10:11 Tua bang hi lo ding! Noteʼ lak panin pasalte pai unla, Topa va bia un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen nomauʼ ut ahi hi,” a ci hi. Faroʼ omna panin amaute kihawl khia hi." 
Exodus10:12 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt leitang tungah amaute hong omin, gialpi in a den baang kung khempeuh a ne ding kauphete sapna-in Egypt leitang tungah na khut zan khia in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:13 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Egypt leitang tungah a ciangkhut zan a, Topa in tua sun tawntung le tua zan tawntung leitang tungah nisuahna huih a nungsak hi. Zingsang ciangin nisuahna huih in kauphete hong tun khin hi." 
Exodus10:14 Tua masiah kauphe hon tua banga a tam a omngei lo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngei lo ding, Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ah kauphe hong om a, Egypt gam buppi ah a dim uh hi." 
Exodus10:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate in lei maitang khempeuh tuam uh a, leitang mial hi. Tuate in leitang tunga kung khempeuh le gialpiʼ den baang singkung gah khempeuh ne uh hi. Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ah gamlak singkung hitaleh kungno hitaleh a hing khat beek om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus10:16 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses le Aaron nawh sap a, “ Topa na Pasianʼ tung le nangma tungah ka khial khin hi." 
Exodus10:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka khialhna hong maisak in. Tu-a khatvei bek, kong thum hi; keima tung panin hih sihna a lakkhiat ding Topa na Pasianʼ tungah thum in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:18 Tua ahih ciangin Faro kiang panin amah pai khia-in Topaʼ tungah a thum hi. 
Exodus10:19 Topa in nitumna huihpi hat mahmah khat nungsak a, tua huih in kauphete laam to-in San Tuipi sung a denna hi. Egypt gam sungah kauphe khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Exodus10:20 Ahih hangin Topa in Faroʼ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite in khuamial sung a zawt nading, Egypt leitang tungah khuamial a om theih nadingin vantung lamah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:22 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in vantung lamah a khut zan a, Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ni thum sung khua mial bikbek hi." 
Exodus10:23 Ni thum sung amau khatlekhat kimu thei lo uh a, ama omna panin kuamah paikhia thei lo hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in amauʼ teenna ah khuavak nei uh hi." 
Exodus10:24 Tua ciangin Faro in Moses samin, “Pai un, Topa va bia un; na tate uh zong note tawh hong pai thei ding hi. Na tuuhonte uh le na bawnghonte uh omsak lai un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:25 Ahih hangin Moses in, “ Topa ka Pasian uh tungah ka piak theih nadingun biakpiakna le meihal biakna kote nong neihsak kul hi." 
Exodus10:26 Ka ganhingte uh zong kote tawh a pai kul hi. Gan no khat zong kinusia lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ka Pasian uh ka biak nadingun tuate ka paipih ding uh hi. A mun ka tun matengun bang pen tawh Topa bia ding cih ka thei kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:27 Ahih hangin Topa in Faroʼ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in amaute paisak lo hi." 
Exodus10:28 Tua ciangin Faro in ama kiangah, “Kei kiang panin kihem in. Nang kidawm in. Ka maitang hong mukik nawn kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka maitang nong muh ni-in nang na si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus10:29 Moses in, “Na cih bang hi tahen! Na maitang kong mukik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faro le Egypt tungah gimna khat ka tungsak lai dinga, tua khit ciangin hih lai mun panin amah in note hong paisak ding hi. Amah in note hong paisak ciangin note hong hawl khia mangkhin ding hi." 
Exodus11:2 Pasal peuhmah in a veengte kiang pan, numei peuhmah in zong a veengteʼ kiang mah panin ngun le kham kizepnate a nget theih nadingun miteʼ zakin thu gen in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:3 Topa in Egypt miteʼ muhna ah mite maipha pia hi. Tua tham loin, mipa Moses pen Egypt leitang tung, Faroʼ nasemteʼ muhna le miteʼ muhna ah lian mahmah hi." 
Exodus11:4 Moses in Faroʼ kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Zankim pawlin Egypt miteʼ lakah ka pai ding hi." 
Exodus11:5 Kumpi tokhom tunga tu Faroʼ tacil a kipanin an gawina nung a a om nasem numei tacil dong le ganhing tacil khempeuh, Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh si ding hi." 
Exodus11:6 Cikmahin tua bang a omngei lo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngei lo ding kahna lianpi Egypt leitang tung khempeuh ah om ding hi." 
Exodus11:7 Ahih hangin Egypt mite le Israel mite a kilamdangin Topa in bawl hi, ci-in na theih nadingun Israel mite, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, ui khat nangawn zong tau lo ding hi, ci hi” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:8 Tua ciangin Moses in Faroʼ kiangah, “Na uliante khempeuh keima kiangah hong pai sukin, keima kiangah hong kun ding uh a, ‘Nang le nangmah hong zui khempeuh paikhia un,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin kei ka paikhia ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi. Tua ciangin Faroʼ kiang panin amah a heh mahmah sa-in a paikhia hi." 
Exodus11:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt tungah nalamdang tam ka bawl theih nadingin Faro in na thu hong ngai lo lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus11:10 Moses le Aaron in hih nalamdangte khempeuh Faroʼ mai ah a bawl uh hi. Topa in Faroʼ lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite a leitang panin pai khiasak lo hi." 
Exodus12:1 Egypt gam sungah Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Exodus12:2 “Tu kha pen note adingin kum kipatna hi dinga, note adingin kum khat sungah a kha masa hi ding hi." 
Exodus12:3 Israel mihon khempeuhte tungah gen in. Tu kha ni sawm ni-in innkuan khat adingin tuuno ahih kei leh keel no khat, amauʼ innkuan phazah tawh kituakin amaute in gan no khat ciat kai ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:4 Gan no khat a ne ding innkuan mi a tawm luat leh amauʼ inn zom a veengte tawh a mi tawh kituakin a sa hawm ding uh hi. A mi tamna le a nekzah uh tawh kizui-in gan no man pia ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:5 Na gan no uh a sitbaang lo hi dinga, kum khat a pha a pa hi ding hi. Tua pen tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin, khat peuhpeuh hi thei ding hi." 
Exodus12:6 Tua gannote pen Israel mihonte khempeuh in a gawh ding hun nitak khuamui, tua kha ni sawm le li dong na kem ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:7 Tua ciangin amaute in a si kim khat la-in a nekna uh inn kongkhak khuam nihte le a baang tung zawl nuh ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:8 Amaute in tua zanin a sa hangkeu-in ne ding uh a, silngo sawh loh anlum le a kha meh teh tawh amaute in ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:9 A sate mun khat peuhpeuh a sial ahi a, tui tawh huanin ahi zongin ne loin, a lu le a khete le a sungkuate tawh hangkeu-in, na ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:10 Zingsang dong a khing na omsak kei ding uh a, zingsang cianga a khing om lai peuhmah na hal tum ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:11 Hih bangzia-in na ne ding uh hi: Na kawng uh gakin, na khedap uh na khe uh ah bulhin, na ciangkhut uh na khut uh ah na tawi ding uh a, na nawh nek ding uh hi. Tua pen Topaʼ Paisan Pawi ahi hi." 
Exodus12:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in tua zanin Egypt gam ka nawk dinga, Egypt leitang tungah mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh tacil khempeuh ka vatlum dinga, Egypt pasian-te khempeuh tungah thu ka khen ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Exodus12:13 Noteʼ omna inn tunga sisan pen note adingin lim hi ding hi. Sisan ka muh ciangin note kong paisan dinga, Egypt leitang ka vat gawp ciangin note hong susia ding gimna noteʼ tungah hong tung lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:14 “Hih pen note adingin phawkna ni hi dinga, note in Topaʼ tungah pawi bawlna ni-in na nei ding uh hi. Na khang tawntungun note in biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:15 Topa in, “Note in ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. A ni masa ni-in note in na inn panun silngo na hem khia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatpeuh in a ni masa ni panin a ni sagih ni dong silngo sawh a nek leh, Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:16 A ni masa ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siangtho biak kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni nih sung na bangmah na sem kei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na milipun an huanin na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:17 Note in silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin na mihonte uh ka paikhiatpih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in na khan tawntungun hih ni pen biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:18 Kha masa, tua kha sawm le li nitakin note in silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh a, tua kha ni sawm nih le khat nitak dong na ne ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh ni sagih sung na inn sung uh ah silngo kimu lo ding hi. Mi khatpeuh, peemta hitaleh gam mi hitaleh in silngo sawh a nek leh Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawn lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:20 Silngo a kisawh peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. Na omna khempeuh uh ah silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:21 Tua ciangin Moses in Israel upate khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Nomau adingin na innkuan uh tawh a kituakin tuunote teel unla, Paisan Pawi bawl nading tuuno go un." 
Exodus12:22 Puknah lom khat la unla, kuang sunga om sisan sungah diahin, kuang sunga om sisan tawh baang tung zawl le kongkhak khuam nihte nuh un. Zingsang matengin a inn kongkhak pua ah kuamah paikhia lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite a that dingin Topa in hong nawk ding hi. Baang tung zawl le kongkhak khuam nih tunga sisan a muh ciangin Topa in kongkhak paisan dinga, a susia dingte pen note that dingin na inn sung uh ah tumsak lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:24 Note le na tapate un hih pen biakna ngeina kipin na nei tawntung ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:25 Amah in hong ciam sa bangin Topa in note hong piak ding leitang na tun uh ciangin hih ngeina na zui ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:26 Na tate un note kiangah, ‘Hih banga hihna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin," 
Exodus12:27 note in, ‘ Topaʼ Paisanna hangin biakpiakna ahi hi. Amah in eiteʼ innkuante hong khawi-in Egypt mite a thah lai-in Egypt gam sungah Israel innkuante paisan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Mite in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
Exodus12:28 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses le Aaron a thupiak bangin mite a gamta uh hi. 
Exodus12:29 Ama kumpi tokhom tunga a tu Faroʼ tacil a kipanin thong mial sunga a om a kiman miteʼ tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh, zankim laitakin Topa in vat gawp hi." 
Exodus12:30 Tua zanin Faro le a nasemte khempeuh le Egypt mite khempeuh tho uh a, Egypt gam sungah kahna lianpi a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khat beek a sih lohna inn khat zong om lo hi." 
Exodus12:31 Faro in Moses le Aaron zan sap a, “Ding un; keima miteʼ lak panin note le Israel mite paikhia unla, na gen sa bangun Topa va bia un." 
Exodus12:32 Na gen sa bangun na tuuhonte uh le na bawnghonte uh la unla, pai un. Kei zong thupha hong pia un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:33 Tua gam panin mite manlangin a sawlkhiat nading uh ah Egypt mite nawh tat mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Eite khempeuh i si khin ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus12:34 Tua ahih ciangin mite in silngo sawh nai loh a annel lom uh la-in, annel mekna amauʼ kuangte puan tawh tunin a liangko uh ah pua uh hi." 
Exodus12:35 Moses in amaute tunga a gen bangin Israel mite zong gamta uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Egypt miteʼ tung panin ngun le kham kizepnate le puante ngen uh hi. 
Exodus12:36 Amauʼ ngette a piak nadingun Topa in Egypt miteʼ muhna ah Israel mite maipha a pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Egypt miteʼ na a sut uh hi. 
Exodus12:37 Israel mite numei le naupang kisim loin pasal tul za guk Rameses panin Sukkoth ah khe-in pai uh hi. 
Exodus12:38 Minamdang tampi le tuu hon le bawng hon, ganhing tampi zong amau tawh pai uh hi." 
Exodus12:39 Egypt panin a ken uh annel lom panin amaute in silngo sawh loh moh em uh hi. Tuate silngo a kisawh lohna pen Egypt gam panin amaute kinot khia a, ze-ol tat thei loin amauʼ annek ding zong kiging man lo uh hi." 
Exodus12:40 Israel mite Egypt ah kum za li le kum sawm thum sung om uh hi. 
Exodus12:41 Kum za li le kum sawm thum a cin ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin Topaʼ mihonpite paikhia uh hi. 
Exodus12:42 Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih nadingin hih pen Topaʼ zan vilna ahi hi. Tua mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in zong amauʼ khang tawntungin Topa adingin hih zan mah zan vilna in a nei uh hi. 
Exodus12:43 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah, “Hih Paisan Pawi pen biakna ngeina kip khat hi dinga, gamdang mi kuamah in ne lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:44 Ahih hangin sum tawh a kilei sila peuhmah in a vun na at khit uh ciangin ne thei ding hi. 
Exodus12:45 Peemta hitaleh a kicial nasem hitaleh in ne thei lo ding hi. 
Exodus12:46 Inn sungah kine dinga, inn pua ah a sa na paikhiatpih kei ding uh hi. A guh na kuaitan kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus12:47 Israel mihon khempeuh in hih ding uh hi. 
Exodus12:48 Khualmi khat note kiangah hong peem a, Topa adingin Paisan Pawi a bawl leh, ama mipih pasal khempeuh a vun ki-atsak un. Tua khit ciangin amah a nai ah hong pai-in bawl thei dinga, amah pen gam mi khat tawh kibang ding hi. Ahih hangin vun ki-at lo mi kuamah in ne lo ding hi." 
Exodus12:49 Gam mi le noteʼ lakah hong peem khualmi adingin ngeina khat bek om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus12:50 Tua bangin Israel mite khempeuh gamta uh a, Topa in Moses le Aaron a thupiak bangin amaute in hih uh hi." 
Exodus12:51 Tua ni teekteekin Topa in Israel mite a honpi-un Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih hi. 
Exodus13:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus13:2 “Keima tungah tacil khempeuh hong ap in. Israel miteʼ lakah, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, naubu a hong masa pen peuhpeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:3 Moses in mite tungah, “Salsuahna Egypt gam panin na paikhiat uh hih ni phawk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in vangliatna tawh hih mun panin note hong paikhiatpih hi. Silngo sawh anlum kine lo ding hi." 
Exodus13:4 Abib kha, tu ni-in note a paikhia na hi uh hi." 
Exodus13:5 Amah in note tungah piak dinga na pateʼ tungah a ciam, bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Hiv mite le Jebus miteʼ leitang ah Topa in note hong paipih ciangin hih kha sungin hih bangin na hih ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:6 Note in silngo sawh loh anlum ni sagih sung na ne ding uh a, a ni sagih ni-in Topa pahtawina pawi khat om ding hi." 
Exodus13:7 Silngo sawh loh anlum ni sagih sung kine ding hi. Noteʼ tungah silngo sawh anlum kimu lo dinga, noteʼ huang sung khempeuh ah silngo kimu lo ding hi." 
Exodus13:8 Tua ni-in na tate uh kiangah, ‘Egypt panin ka paikhiat lai-un Topa in ko aʼ dinga hong hihsakna hang hi,’ ci-in na gen ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:9 Na kam un Topaʼ Thukham a gen tawntung theih nadingin hih pen na khut tung uh ah lim, na taltang tung uh ah phawkna khat hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a vangliatna tawh hih mun panin note hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Exodus13:10 Tua ahih ciangin note in a kiseh hunin kum khat pan kum khat, hih biakna ngeina kip na zui ding uh hi." 
Exodus13:11 “Amah in note le na pate uh tungah a ciam bangin, Topa in Kanaan leitang ah note hong paipih hun ciang le note tungah tua gam hong piak ciangin," 
Exodus13:12 note in naubu a hong masa khempeuh Topa adingin na tuam koih ding uh hi. Na ganhing uh a tacil a pa khempeuh zong Topa aʼ hi ding hi. 
Exodus13:13 La a tacil peuhmah tuuno khat tawh na tanh ding uh hi. Na tat kei ding uh leh a ngawng na kuaitan ding uh hi. Noteʼ tapateʼ lak panin tacil peuhmah na tanh ding uh hi. 
Exodus13:14 Hong pai ding hunah na tapa in, ‘Hih pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in nang hong dot ciangin, nangmah in ama kiangah, ‘Salsuahna, Egypt panin Topa in vangliatna tawh kote hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Exodus13:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in kote paisak ding a nial tentan ciangin Egypt gam sunga tacil khempeuh, mihing tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh Topa in that hi. Tua ahih ciangin naubu a hong masa a pa khempeuh Topaʼ tungah biakna-in ka pia uh hi. Ahih hangin ka tapate uh sung pan tacil khempeuh ka tanh uh hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Exodus13:16 Tua pen na khut tunga om ciaptehna lim ahih kei leh na mitteʼ kikal a talsuante bang hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a vangliatna tawh Egypt panin eite hong paikhiatpih hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:17 Faro in mite a paisak ciangin, lampi tom pen hitaseleh, Pasian in Filistia gam tawnin amaute paipih lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in, “Amaute in gal a tuah ciangin mite kisikin Egypt ah ciahkik kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus13:18 Ahih hangin Pasian in San Tuipi lam manawhin sehnel gam lamah mite kot paipih hi. Israel mite gal a do dingin a kithawi sa-in Egypt leitang panin a pai to uh ahi hi. 
Exodus13:19 Moses in Josefʼ guhte paipih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama guhte a puak ding uh Josef in Israel mite thupi takin kiciamna bawlsak khin hi. “Pasian in note hong hotkhiat ciangin note in hih lai panin keima guhte na pua ding uh hi,” na ci khin hi." 
Exodus13:20 Sukkoth panin amaute pai lai uh a, sehnel gam nawl, Etham ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Exodus13:21 Amaute, sun hitaleh zan hitaleh khualzinin a pai theih nadingun sunin amaute lam a lak dingin meii khuam khat tawh, zanin amaute khuavak a pia dingin mei khuam khat tawh, amauteʼ mai ah Topa a pai hi." 
Exodus13:22 Sunin meii khuam le zanin mei khuamte, miteʼ mai ah om tawntung hi." 
Exodus14:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus14:2 “Israel mite kiheikikin Migdol le tuipi kikal, Pihahiroth mai, Baal-zefon nisuahna lamah giahphual a sat ding gen in. Tuipi gei, tua gal khat ah giahphual na sat ding uh hi." 
Exodus14:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in Israel miteʼ thu tawh kisai genin, ‘Sehnel gam sungah amaute tangciak uh hi. Sehnel gam in amaute khuhcip khin hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Exodus14:4 Keimah in Faroʼ lungsim khauhsakin, amah in Israel-te hong delh dinga, Faro le a mihonpite khempeuh ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah ding hi. Kei, Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute zong tua bangmahin gamta uh hi." 
Exodus14:5 Mite tai khinzo hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah a kigen ciangin, Faro le ama nasemteʼ ngaihsutna kikheel a, amaute in, “Eiteʼ na hong sep nading panin Israel mite i pai khiatsak, hih banga i gamtat bang hi mawk ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng kithawisakin ama galkapte la-in," 
Exodus14:7 a kiteng khia leeng za guk le Egypt leeng khempeuh a ukte tawh kuan khawm hi. 
Exodus14:8 Topa in Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ lungsim khauhsak a, Israel mite kithamuanna tawh a paikhiat laitakun a delh hi." 
Exodus14:9 Egypt mite ahi, Faroʼ sakolte, leengte, ama sakol tung tuangte le a galkapte in amaute delh uh a, amaute giahphual satin tuipi gei-a a omna uh, Pihahiroth gei, Baal-zefon nisuahna lam munah a pha uh hi." 
Exodus14:10 Faro hong nai ciangin Israel mite khuadak to uh hi. En in, amauteʼ nungah Egypt mite hong kuan hi. Amaute lau mahmah uh hi. Topaʼ tungah Israel mite kiko uh hi." 
Exodus14:11 Amaute in Moses kiangah, “Egypt ah han a om loh manin sehnel gam sungah a si dingin kote hong paikhiatpih na hi hiam? Egypt panin paikhiat pihna tawh koteʼ tungah bang hong bawl na hi hiam?" 
Exodus14:12 ‘Kote hong hici omsak inla, Egypt miteʼ na hong semsak in,’ ci-in Egypt ah nangʼ tungah hong gen hi lo ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh sehnel gamah sih sangin Egypt miteʼ na sep ding kote adingin hoih zaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:13 Moses in mite tungah, “Lau kei un, kip takin om un. Note-aʼ dingin tu ni-a hong sep ding Topaʼ hotkhiatna mu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-a na muh uh Egypt mite, note in na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus14:14 Topa in note adingin hong dosak dinga, note na hih uh leh na om hithiat ding bek uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:15 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Bang hangin keiʼ tungah hong kiko na hi uh hiam? Israel mite mai nawtin a pai ding uh gen in." 
Exodus14:16 Israel mite in lei keu tungtawnin tuipi a kantan theih nadingin na ciangkhut laam to inla, tuipi tungah na khut zanin tuipi khenkham in." 
Exodus14:17 Amauʼ nungah Egypt mite hong pai-in, keimah in Faro le a mihonpite khempeuh, a leengte le a sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah nadingin keimah in Egypt miteʼ lungsim ka khauhsak ding hi." 
Exodus14:18 Faro le ama leengte le ama sakol tung tuangte ka zawhna hangin minthanna ka ngah khit ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:19 Tua ciangin Israel mihonpiteʼ mai ah a pai Pasianʼ vantungmi kikhiinin amauteʼ nungah a pai hi. Amauteʼ mai panin meii khuam kikhiinin amauteʼ nungah dinga," 
Exodus14:20 Egypt honpite le Israel honpiteʼ kikalah a pai hi. Tua lai ah meii le khuamial om a, zan tawntung khatlekhat kinai kha loin zingsang khua hong vak hi." 
Exodus14:21 Tua ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan hi. Topa in zan tawntung nisuahna huihpi hat tawh tuipi mut gawpin, tuipi pen lei keu-in bawl a, tuite a kikhen hi." 
Exodus14:22 Israel mite, tuipi laizang lei keu tungah pai uh a, amauʼ taklam le veilamah kawm bangin tuite om hi." 
Exodus14:23 Egypt mite ahi, Faroʼ sakol khempeuh, ama leengte le ama sakol tung tuangte in delhin tuipi laizang amauteʼ nungah pai uh hi." 
Exodus14:24 Zingsang ciangin Topa in mei le meii khuam sung panin Egypt mihonpite en sukin, Egypt mihonpite phial gawp a," 
Exodus14:25 amauʼ leengpeite gumsak ahih manin man bekbakin hawl uh hi. Egypt mite in, “Israel miteʼ kiang panin tai ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite hong langpangin Topa in amau adingin hong do hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus14:26 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt miteʼ tung, amauʼ leengte tung le amauʼ sakol tung tuangteʼ tungah tui hong luankik theih nadingin tuipi tungah na khut zan in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus14:27 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, a zingsang khuavak ciangin a luan ngei bangin tuipi hong luangkik hi. Tua tui sung panin Egypt mite taikhiat sawm uh a, ahi zongin Topa in tuipi laizang ah Egypt mite zo gawp hi." 
Exodus14:28 Tui hong paikikin leengte le sakol tung tuangte le tuipi sungah amaute a delh Faroʼ mihonpite khempeuh tuum a, amaute khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Exodus14:29 Ahih hangin tuipi kantanin lei keu tungah Israel mite pai uh a, amauʼ taklam le veilamah kawm bangin tuite a om hi." 
Exodus14:30 Topa in tua bangin Egypt miteʼ khut sung panin tua ni-in Israel-te hon khia a, tuipi gei ah Egypt mi a site, Israel mite in mu uh hi." 
Exodus14:31 Israel mite in Egypt miteʼ tungah Topaʼ bawl nasepna lianpi mu uh a, mite in Topa a zahtak uh hi. Amaute in Topa le ama nasem Moses a um uh hi." 
Exodus15:1 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel mite in Topaʼ tungah hih la sa uh a, “ Topa phatna la ka sa ding hi. Amah in minthangin zo khin a, amah in sakol le a tuang pa tuipi sungah a lawn hi." 
Exodus15:2 Topa, kei a hong hupa hi a, keimah hong hon khia pa ahi hi. Amah, keima Pasian hi a, amah ka phat ding hi. Ka paʼ Pasian hi a, amah ka liansak ding hi." 
Exodus15:3 Topa, galhang pa hi a, Topa, ama min ahi hi." 
Exodus15:4 “Faroʼ leengte le a mihonpite tuipi sungah lawn a, a kiteng khia ama uliante San Tuipi sungah tum hi." 
Exodus15:5 Tui in amaute tuum a, suangtum bangin a thukna sungah amaute kia suk uh hi." 
Exodus15:6 “ Topa aw, na taklam khut, thahatin minthang a, Topa aw, na taklam khut in galte a thehthang hi." 
Exodus15:7 Na vangliatna tawh nangmah in na langte na lawnthal hi. Na hehna na khah khia a, tua in amaute buhkung bangin a kaang tum hi." 
Exodus15:8 Na nak ging tawh tuite kiciang to-in, tuite a lomin ding to a, tuipi sungah tui thukpi a khal hi." 
Exodus15:9 Galte in, ‘Ka delh dinga, ka pha ding hi. A nate uh ka hawm dinga, ka deih zahzahin, tuate ka tang ding hi. Ka namsau ka dok dinga, ka khut in amaute susia ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Exodus15:10 Nang in na huih tawh na mut a, tuipi in amaute tuum hi. A kihtakhuai tui sungah haknaw bangin amaute tum uh hi." 
Exodus15:11 “ Topa aw, pasian-teʼ lakah kua, nang tawh kibang ahi hiam? Kua, nang tawh kibangin, sianthona ah lianin, minthang nasepna ah kihtakhuai-in, nalamdang sem ahi hiam?" 
Exodus15:12 Na taklam khut na zan a, leitung in amaute nawmvalh hi." 
Exodus15:13 Nangmah in na ciam sa zui-in na tatkhiat sa mite na paipih a, na hatna tawh a siangtho na omna ah amaute lam na lak hi." 
Exodus15:14 Midangte in hih thu za khin uh a, amaute liing uh hi. Filistia ah a teeng mite lau-in liingcip uh hi." 
Exodus15:15 Tu-in Edom ukpite lungkia uh a, Moab makaite, liingcip uh hi. Kanaan ah a teeng mi khempeuh a hanna uh bei ta hi." 
Exodus15:16 Launa le kihtakna amauteʼ tungah tunga, a thahat na vangliatna hangin amaute suangtum bangin taang loin om uh hi. Topa aw, nangma mite in a khen mateng, na lei sa mite in a khen mateng amaute khikcip uh hi." 
Exodus15:17 Nang in amaute hong paipihin nangma mual tungah amaute na suan ding hi. Topa aw, na om nading munin na bawl sa munah, Topa aw, na khutte in a phuh sa na biakinn ah na koih ding hi." 
Exodus15:18 Topa in uk tawntung ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus15:19 Faroʼ sakolte ama leengte tawh, a sakol tung tuangte tuipi sungah a pai ciangin, Topa in tuipi tuite amaute tuumsakkik a, ahi zongin Israel mite tuipi laizang lei keu tungah a pai uh hi." 
Exodus15:20 Tua ahih manin Aaronʼ sanggamnu Miriam in a khut ah khuang khat tawi hi. Ama nungah numeite khempeuh laamin khuang tawh a zui uh hi. 
Exodus15:21 Miriam in amaute la sak hi: “ Topa la sak un. Amah in minthangin zo khin a, amah in sakol le a tung tuangte, tuipi sungah a lawn hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus15:22 Tua ciangin Moses in San Tuipi panin Israel mite paipih suak a, Shur sehnel gamah a pai uh hi. Sehnel gamah ni thum sung pai uh a, tui mu lo uh hi." 
Exodus15:23 Marah a tun uh ciangin a tui kha ahih manin Marah tui dawn thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Marah ci-in min kiphuak hi. 
Exodus15:24 Moses tungah mite phun uh a, “Bang dawn ding ihi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Exodus15:25 Topaʼ tungah amah kiko hi. Topa in singkung khat amah lak a, amah in tui sungah tua sing lawn a, tui lim hong suak pah hi. Topa in tua lai munah amaute adingin thukham khat le ngeina kip khat bawl a, tua lai munah amah in amauteʼ tungah laktel a," 
Exodus15:26 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh thu limtakin na ngaih uh a, ama mai ah a man nate hihin, ama thupiakte don a, ama ngeina kipte khempeuh na zuih uh leh, Egypt miteʼ tungah ka tunsak natnate khat beek noteʼ tungah kong tungsak kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa, note hong damsak pa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus15:27 Tua ciangin amaute ciktui sawm le nih le nisuh kung sawm sagih a omna mun Elim tung uh a, tui gei tua munah amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Exodus16:1 Elim panin amaute ding khia uh a, Egypt leitang panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kha nihna ni sawm le nga ni-in Elim le Sinai kikal a om Sin sehnel gamah Israel mihonte khempeuh tung uh hi." 
Exodus16:2 Sehnel gamah Moses le Aaronʼ tungah Israel mihon buppi phun uh a," 
Exodus16:3 amaute tungah, “Kote, sa beel phung ah tu-in ka kham takun an ka nek lai-un Egypt leitang ah Topa in hong that khin hizaw taleh maw! Bang hang hiam cih leh mihon buppi a puksisak dingin note in sehnel gamah nong paikhiatpih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus16:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, note adingin vantung panin an kong zusak ding hi. Keima thu a zuih uh le a zuih loh uh ka theih tel nadingin mite pai khia-in nisimin ni khat khamkhop ding kaikhawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:5 A ni guk ni-in mite in nisimin a khop ngei zah nih uh khawmin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses le Aaron in Israel mite tungah, “Nitak ciangin, Egypt gam panin note hong paikhiatpih pa pen Topa ahihna na thei ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:7 Topaʼ tungah na phunna uh amah in za khin ahih manin zingsang ciangin Topaʼ vangliatna na mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh koteʼ tungah na phun uh, kote a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:8 Moses in, “Ama tungah na phunnate uh Topa in a zakna hangin, Topa in noteʼ tungah nitak annek ding sa, zingsangin na kham tak uh a na nek ding uh an hong piak ciangin - kote pen a bang hi mawk ka hi uh hiam? Noteʼ phunnate pen koteʼ tung hi loin Topaʼ tung ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:9 Moses in Aaronʼ kiangah, “Israel mihon buppi tungah, ‘Amah in noteʼ phunnate za khin ahih manin Topaʼ mai a nai ah hong pai un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:10 Israel mihon buppi tungah Aaron in thu a gen laitakin, amaute in sehnel gam lam en uh a, tua laitakin meii sungah Topaʼ vangliatna hong kilang hi." 
Exodus16:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus16:12 “Israel miteʼ phunnate ka za khin hi. Amaute kiangah, ‘Khuamui ciangin note in sa na ne ding uh a, zingsang ciangin an na kham ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hihna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:13 Nitak ciangin vamimte hong leengin giahphual hong tuam hi. Zingsang ciangin giahphual kiimah daitui kia hi. 
Exodus16:14 Daitui a kap ciangin gamlak lei maitang tungah a pum ciltel, a khal, vukkhal bangin a pak dikdek leitungah om hi." 
Exodus16:15 Israel mite in a muh uh ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “Bang ahi hiam?” kici uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tua pen bang hiam cih thei lo uh hi. Moses in amauteʼ kiangah, “ Topa in nek dinga noteʼ tungah hong piak an ahi hi." 
Exodus16:16 Topaʼ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Note in na milipun na khamzah ding uh khawm un. Na puanbuk sung uh ah mi omzah tawh kituakin mi khat lawhta khat ciat na la ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:17 Tua mah bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Amaute in kaikhawm uh a, pawl khat in tam, pawl khat in tawm, kaikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:18 Ahih hangin amaute in lawhta khat tawh a teh uh ciangin, a tam a kaikhawmte-aʼ dim val lo a, a tawm a kaikhawmte-aʼ dim lah tuan lo hi. A milipin a khamzah ding khawm uh hi." 
Exodus16:19 Moses in amauteʼ kiangah, “Kuamah in zingsang dong koih kei un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:20 Ahih hangin amaute in Mosesʼ thu ngai lo uh hi. Mi pawl khat in zingsang dong koih uh a, than omin ning hi. Amaute tungah Moses heh hi." 
Exodus16:21 Zingsang simin amaute in a khamzah ding ciat uh khawm uh hi. Ahi zongin ni a sat ciangin leilak a omte tui suak hi. 
Exodus16:22 A ni guk ni-in amaute in an a zah nih, lawhta nih ciat, khawm uh hi. Mihon makaite khempeuh hong pai-in Moses kiangah a gen uh ciangin" 
Exodus16:23 amah in amaute kiangah, “ Topaʼ hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Zing ciang pen a thupi a tawlngak ni, Topa adingin sabbath siangtho ni ahi hi. Na em dingte uh emin, na huan dingte uh huan unla, a om lai teng zingsang ciang dong koih un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:24 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Mosesʼ sawl bangin zingsang dong koih uh hi. Ning lo a, than zong tu lo hi." 
Exodus16:25 Moses in, “Tu ni-in ne un; tu ni pen Topa adingin Sabbath ahi hi. Tu ni-in a pua lamah na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus16:26 Note in ni guk sung na khawm ding uh a, ahi zongin sabbath ni ahi a ni sagih ni-in bangmah om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:27 A ni sagih ni-in a kaikhawm dingin mi pawl khat kuan khia uh a, ahi zongin amaute in bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Exodus16:28 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Ka thupiakte le ka thute zuih ding bang tanvei nial ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Exodus16:29 Thei un! Topa in noteʼ tungah sabbath hong pia zo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ni guk ni-in amah in note tungah ni nih khom ding an hong pia hi. Note na milipun nomauʼ omna ciatah om un. A ni sagih ni-in ama omna panin kuamah paikhia kei hen,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:30 Tua ahih ciangin a ni sagih ni-in mite tawlnga uh hi. 
Exodus16:31 Tu-in Israel mite in a min manna ci uh hi. Tua pen nannan tang tawh kibangin a mel kang a, a limna pen khuaizu tawh a kibawl mohpheng tawh kibang hi." 
Exodus16:32 Moses in, “ Topaʼ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Egypt leitang panin note kong paikhiatpih lai-in sehnel gamah note kong vakna an na suanlekhakte un a muh theih nadingun na khang tawntungun lawhta dim khat kem un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus16:33 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Beel khat la inla, tua sungah manna lawhta dim khat koih inla, na khang tawntungun a kikem dingin Topaʼ mai ah koih in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus16:34 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Aaron in kep dingin Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah a koih hi. 
Exodus16:35 Amaute a ten theih nading uh leitang a tun mateng, kum sawm li sung Israel mite in manna ne uh a, Kanaan gamgi a tun matengun manna bek a ne uh ahi hi." 
Exodus16:36 (Lawhta khat pen seu khat seh sawm suah seh khat ahi hi.) 
Exodus17:1 Topaʼ thupiak bangin Israel mihon khempeuh Sin sehnel gam panin giahphual a banbanin sat uh a, Refidim ah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin miteʼ dawn ding tui om lo hi." 
Exodus17:2 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Mosesʼ tungah mawhna zong uh a, “Tui dawn ding hong pia in,” ci uh hi. Moses in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin keiʼ tungah mawhna hong zong na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin Topa ze-et na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:3 Ahi zongin tua munah tui duhin mite dangtak uh a, Mosesʼ tungah mite phunin, “Kote le ka tate uh le ka ganhingte uh dangtakin a si dingin bang hangin Egypt panin hong paipih to na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus17:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ tungah Moses kiko a, “Hih mite bang cih ding ka hi hiam? Suang tawh kei hong deng dingin amaute kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:5 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel upate pawl khat samin miteʼ mai ah pai in. Nail na satna ciangkhut na khutin tawi-in pai in." 
Exodus17:6 En in, Horeb-a suangpi ah nangma mai ah ka ding ding hi. Nang in suangpi na sat dinga, mite in tui a dawn theih nadingin tua suang sung panin tui hong phul khia ding hi,” a ci hi. Israel upateʼ muhna ah tua bangmahin Moses gamta hi." 
Exodus17:7 Israel miteʼ mawh zonna le amaute in Topa ze-etin, “Eiteʼ lakah Topa a om mah ahi hiam?” a cihna hangun, tua mun pen Massah le Meribah, ci-in min kiphuak hi." 
Exodus17:8 Tua ciangin Amalek mite hong pai-in Israel mite tawh Refidim ah kido uh hi. 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua kiangah, “Eite adingin mi teel inla, pai-in Amalek mite tawh kido in. Zing ciangin, Pasian in ka tawi dingin a hong sawl ciangkhut tawi-in mual dawnah ka ding ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:9 Moses in Joshua kiangah, “Eite adingin mi teel inla, pai-in Amalek mite tawh kido in. Zing ciangin, Pasian in ka tawi dingin a hong sawl ciangkhut tawi-in mual dawnah ka ding ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:10 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua gamta a, Amalek mite tawh kido uh hi. Moses, Aaron le Hur-te mual dawnah pai to uh hi." 
Exodus17:10 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua gamta a, Amalek mite tawh kido uh hi. Moses, Aaron le Hur-te mual dawnah pai to uh hi." 
Exodus17:11 Moses in a khut a sansak lai teng Israel mite in zo a, a khut a niamsak ciangin Amalek mite in zo hi." 
Exodus17:12 Ahih hangin Moses a khut kham hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in suangtum khat la-in ama nuai ah koih uh a, tua suang tungah amah tu a, Aaron le Hur in a pang khat tuak panin ama khutte len uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ni tum mateng ama khutte kip hi." 
Exodus17:13 Joshua in Amalek le ama mite namsau tawh vatmai hi. 
Exodus17:13 Joshua in Amalek le ama mite namsau tawh vatmai hi. 
Exodus17:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite ka phiat siangtho nading thu phawk nadingin hih thu laibu sung khat ah gelh inla, Joshua kiangah hih thu genkik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keimah in mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite ka phiat siangtho nading thu phawk nadingin hih thu laibu sung khat ah gelh inla, Joshua kiangah hih thu genkik in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus17:15 Moses in biakna tau khat lamin a min dingin, “ Topa, keima zawhna lim ahi hi,” ci-in phuak a," 
Exodus17:16 “ Topaʼ dial sang tawi un! Topa in a khangkhangin Amalek mite do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:1 Mosesʼ sungpa, Midian siampi Jethro in Moses le ama mi Israel-te adingin Pasianʼ sepna, Topa in Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiat pihna thu khempeuh a za hi." 
Exodus18:2 Tu-in Mosesʼ sungpa Jethro in, Moses a sawl khit a kipanin Mosesʼ zi Zipporah le ama tapa nihte kem a, a khat min Gershom ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Gam dangah peemta ka hi hi,” ci hi.)" 
Exodus18:3  
Exodus18:4 A dang khat min Eliezer ahi hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka paʼ Pasian pen keimah hong huhpa hi a, Faroʼ thah nading panin kei hong hon khia hi,” ci hi.)" 
Exodus18:5 Pasianʼ mual tungah giahphual a satna sehnel gam Moses kiangah Jethro in Mosesʼ tapate le a zi hong puak hi. 
Exodus18:6 Mi khat in Moses kiangah, “En in, na zi le a tapa nihte tawh nang kiangah na sungpa Jethro hong pai hi,” a cih ciangin" 
Exodus18:7 Moses zong a sungpa a dawn dingin paikhia a, zahtakna pia-in amah a nam hi. Amaute khatlekhat om zia kidong tuak uh a, puanbuk sungah a pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:8 Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa kiangah Topa in Israel miteʼ hangin Faroʼ tung le Egypt miteʼ tungah a bawlte khempeuh, lampi ah amauʼ tungah a tung haksatna khempeuh le Topa in amaute a hotkhiatna thu a gen hi." 
Exodus18:9 Egypt miteʼ khut sung panin amah in amaute a khah khiatna, Israel mite tungah Topa in a hoih a bawlte khempeuh hangin Jethro lungdam hi." 
Exodus18:10 Jethro in, “Egypt mite le Faroʼ khut sung panin note hong khah khia Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Exodus18:11 Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a liatzawkna tu-in ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite tungah kiphatsakna tawh Egypt mite a gamtat laitakin amah in Egypt miteʼ khutnuai panin mite khah khia hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:12 Mosesʼ sungpa Jethro in Pasianʼ tungah meihal biakna le biakpiakna a bawl hi. Pasianʼ mai ah Mosesʼ sungpa tawh an a nekhawm dingin Israel upate khempeuh le Aaron hong pai uh hi. 
Exodus18:13 A zing ciangin miteʼ thu a khen dingin Moses tu a, zingsang a kipan nitak dongin Mosesʼ kiimah mite a ding uh hi." 
Exodus18:14 Mite adingin ama hihte khempeuh Mosesʼ sungpa in a muh ciangin amah in, “Mite aʼ dinga nangʼ sep hih pen a bangci ahi hiam? Bang hangin nang bek tu a, zingsang a kipan nitak dongin na kiimah mite khempeuh ding ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:15 Moses in a sungpa kiangah, “Pasianʼ thu a kan dingin keiʼ kiangah mite hong pai uh hi." 
Exodus18:16 Amaute in thu a neih uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai uh a, mi khat le a veengpaʼ kikalah thu ka khen a, Pasianʼ ngeina kipte le ama thukhennate amaute ka theisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:17 Tua ciangin Mosesʼ sungpa Jethro in ama kiangah, “Nangma hih zia hoih lo hi." 
Exodus18:18 Nang le na kiang a om mite in na zawngkhal lawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nasep nang adingin gik lua hi. Nang bek in na sem khinzo kei hi. 
Exodus18:19 Tu-in ka thu hong ngai in; thu kong lak ding hi. Pasian in nang hong ompih tahen. Nang pen Pasianʼ mai ah miteʼ tangin pai-in, amauʼ thute Pasianʼ kiangah na gen ding hi." 
Exodus18:20 Nangmah in ngeina kipte le thukhennate amaute na hilh dinga, amauʼ lam pai nading le amauʼ sep dingte amaute na theisak ding hi." 
Exodus18:21 Tua tham loin, mi khempeuh lak panin Pasian a zahtak mi, a muanhuai mi le sumgolh a mudah mi, misiamte na teel khia ding hi. Tua bang mite pen a tul, a za, a sawm nga, a sawmte tungah a uk dingin na koih ding hi." 
Exodus18:22 Miteʼ thu amaute khensak tawntung in. Amaute in thu liante bek nang kiangah hong puak ding uh a, ahi zongin thu neute amau mah in khen tawm ding uh hi. Tua hileh nang adingin baih zaw dinga, amaute in na van gik hong puak pih ding uh hi." 
Exodus18:23 Hih bangin hih lecin Pasian in thahatna hong pia dinga, nangmah in na sem paisuak zo ding hi. Tua tham loin hih mite khempeuh zong amauʼ omna ah lungnuam takin ciah thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus18:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a sungpaʼ thu ngai-in ama gen khempeuh a hih hi. 
Exodus18:25 Israel mi khempeuh sung panin Moses in mipil misiamte teel a, mite a tul, a za, a sawm nga, a sawmte tungah a ukin miteʼ lutangin amaute a bawl hi." 
Exodus18:26 Amaute in mite tungah a tawntungin thu khen uh hi. Amaute in thu haksate bek Moses tungah puak uh a, ahi zongin thu neute amaute in khen tawm uh hi." 
Exodus18:27 Tua ciangin Moses in a sungpa ciah khiasak a, Jethro zong ama gamah a ciahkik hi." 
Exodus19:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kha thumna a ni masa ni-in amaute Sinai sehnel gam tung uh hi. 
Exodus19:2 Refidim panin amaute ding khia-in Sinai gam a tun uh ciangin, amaute in sehnel gam tua mual mai ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Exodus19:3 Pasian kiangah Moses pai to hi. Topa in mual panin amah sam a, “Jakobʼ suanlekhak Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi:" 
Exodus19:4 Egypt mite tungah ka bawlna le muvanlai in a kha tawh a note a puak bangin note hong pua-in keima kiangah kong paipihna na mu khin uh hi. 
Exodus19:5 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in ka thu mangin ka thuciamna na zuih uh leh mite khempeuh lak panin note pen keima mi na hi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khempeuh keima aʼ hi a," 
Exodus19:6 note pen keima siampi nasep a sem minam le minam siangtho na hi ding uh hi. Israel mite tungah hih thute na gen ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:7 Tua ahih ciangin Moses hong pai-in upate sam a, Topa in amah a thupiak hih thute khempeuh amauteʼ mai ah a sung hi." 
Exodus19:8 Mi khempeuh in, “ Topaʼ gen sa khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” ci-in dawng khawm uh hi. Moses in miteʼ thugente Topaʼ tungah a gen hi." 
Exodus19:9 Topa in Moses tungah, “En in, nang kong hopih ciangin mite in a zak theih nading le nang zong hong up theih nadingun meii sahpi sungah nang kiangah kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses in miteʼ thugente Topaʼ tungah a gen hi." 
Exodus19:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite kiangah pai inla, tu ni le zing ciang sungteng amaute siangthosakin, amauʼ puante amau mah sawpsakin," 
Exodus19:11 a ni thum ni-in a baih sa-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni thum ni-in Sinai Mual tungah mite khempeuhʼ muhna ah Topa hong pai suk ding hi. 
Exodus19:12 Nangmah in mite adingin dalna khat a kimkot ah na koih dinga, ‘Mual tungah pai loin, a gamgi na lawnkhak loh nadingun kidawm un; mual a lawng peuhpeuh kithat ding hi." 
Exodus19:13 Khut peuhmah in tua mi kithat ding pa lawng kha lo dinga, suang tawh kidenglum ahih kei leh kikap lum ding hi. Ganhing hitaleh mihing hitaleh kihing khawi lo ding hi,’ na ci ding hi. Peengkul sau veipi hong kitum ciangin amaute mual tungah hong pai to ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:14 Tua ahih ciangin mual tung panin mite kiangah Moses pai suk a, mite siangthosak hi. Amaute in a puante uh sawp uh hi." 
Exodus19:15 Amah in mite kiangah, “Ni thum ni ciangin a baih sa-in om un; numei tawh lum khawm kei un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:16 A ni thum ni zingsang ciangin van gingin khua phia a, mual tungah meii sahpi kai a, nakpi takin a ging peengkul kitum ahih manin giahphual a om mi khempeuh liing uh hi." 
Exodus19:17 Tua ciangin Moses in giahphual panin Pasian a dawn dingin mite paikhiatpih a, amaute a om nading mual bulah om uh hi." 
Exodus19:18 Meikhu in Sinai Mual tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei sung tua mual tungah Topa a kum suk hi. A khu, meiphual pi khu bangin kah to a, a mual buppi nakpi takin kiliing hi." 
Exodus19:19 Peengkul aw a nak gin semsem laitakin Moses pau a, Pasian in vanging sungah amah dawng hi." 
Exodus19:20 Sinai Mual dawnah Topa hong pai suk hi. Topa in tua mual dawnah Moses sam a, Moses zong pai to hi." 
Exodus19:21 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute in Topa a en dingin hong kantanin amaute tampi tak si kha ding uh ahih manin pai suk inla, mite hilh khol in." 
Exodus19:22 Amauteʼ tungah Topa heh lua kha ding ahih manin, Topaʼ kiangah hong pai siampite zong amau mah kisiangthosak tawm hen,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:23 Moses in Topaʼ tungah, “Sinai Mual dongah mite hong pai thei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang mahmah in kote nong thuhilh a, ‘Mual kimkot ah dalnate bawl inla, siangthosak in,’ nong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:24 Topa in ama kiangah, “Pai suk inla, Aaron hong paipih to in. Ahih hangin amauteʼ tungah amah heh lua kha ding ahih manin Topa kiang dongah a pai dingin siampite le mite paisuaksak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus19:25 Tua ahih ciangin mite kiangah Moses pai sukin amaute kiangah a gen hi. 
Exodus20:1 Pasian in hih thute khempeuh gen a," 
Exodus20:2 “Kei pen salsuahna Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Exodus20:3 “Keimah longal pasian dang na bia kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:4 “A kiseek milim hitaleh, tunga vantung hitaleh, nuai-a lei sung hitaleh, leinuai-a om tui sungah hitaleh a om na khat peuhpeuh a sun khat peuhpeuh note adingin na bawl kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus20:5 Tuateʼ mai ah na kun kei ding uh a, tuate na bia kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah noteʼ Topa Pasian, a aam Pasian ka hi a, kei hong mudahteʼ tungah pateʼ mawhna tateʼ tungah khang thum khang lina dongin thuk-in," 
Exodus20:6 ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite tungah itna kip a lak pa ka hi hi. 
Exodus20:7 “ Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ min a sia lamin na zang kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama min a zang khialte gim pia ding hi. 
Exodus20:8 “Sabbath ni a siangtho a zat ding phawk un. 
Exodus20:9 Ni guk sung nomauʼ na semin na nasep ding khempeuh uh na hih ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:10 Ahi zongin a ni sagih ni pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-in note, na tapate, na tanute, na nasempate, na nasem nute, na ganhing uh ahi a, peemtate in ahi zongin na bangmah na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus20:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh a ni guk sung tengin Topa in vanlelei, tuipi le tuate sunga om khempeuh bawl a, a ni sagih ni tawlnga hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Sabbath ni thupha pia-in siangthosak hi." 
Exodus20:12 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang tungah na khan uh a sau theih nadingin na nu le na pa uh zahtak un. 
Exodus20:13 “Mi na that kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:14 “Nulepa mawhna na bawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:15 “Na na gu kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:16 “Na veengte uh lang khat ah a man loin teci na pang kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:17 “Na veengte uh inn na deihgawh kei ding uh hi. Na veengte uh zi hitaleh, ama nasem pa hitaleh, ama nasem nu hitaleh, ama bawngtal hitaleh, ama la hitaleh, na veengte aʼ ahi na khat peuhpeuh na deihgawh kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus20:18 Tu-in mite khempeuh in van gingte, peengkul aw le mual meikhu thu a theih tel uh ciangin, lau-in a liing uh hi. Amaute a gamla ah ding uh a," 
Exodus20:19 Moses kiangah, “Nangmah in kote kiangah thu hong gen in; kote in ka ngai ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kote si kha ding ka hih uh ciangin ko tungah Pasian hong gensak kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus20:20 Moses in mite kiangah, “Lau kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh note khial kha loin amah na kihtak theih nadingun noteʼ tungah a laktel dingin Pasian hong pai ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus20:21 Pasianʼ omna meii sah nai ah Moses a pai laitakin mite a gamla ah a ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:22 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nangmah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: ‘Vantung panin note kong hopihna note mahmah in na thei khin uh hi." 
Exodus20:23 Note in kei tawh nong biak khop dingun ngun pasian-te le kham pasian-te na bawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus20:24 Note in keima adingin lei tawh biakna tau khat bawl unla, tua tungah na meihal biaknate uh le thunuam a biak na biaknate uh, na tuute uh le na bawngtalte uh pia un. Keima min a kiphawk nading munin ka bawlna peuhmah ah note kiangah keimah hong pai-in note thupha kong pia ding hi." 
Exodus20:25 Note in keima adingin suang tawh biakna tau na bawl uh leh, a kiseek suang tawh na bawl kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nazatte uh tawh na va suk uh leh a ninsak na hi uh hi." 
Exodus20:26 Tua tungah na seelsim uh a kidawk khak loh nadingin ka biakna tau tung kah toh nading kahlei a kulin na sang bawl kei ding uh hi,’ ci in." 
Exodus21:1 “Tu-in hihte pen amauteʼ tungah na piak ding biakna ngeina kipte ahi hi. 
Exodus21:2 Hebru mi sila khat na lei uh ciangin, amah in kum guk sung na hong sepsak dinga, a kum sagihna ciangin bangmah hong pia loin a suakta-in paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:3 Amah guakin hong pai ahihleh amah guak mahin paikhia dinga, zi nei sa-in hong pai ahihleh amah tawh a zi zong paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:4 A topa in amah zi guan a, tua nu in amah tawh tapate ahi a, tanute ahi zongin a neih leh, a zi le a tate pen a topa aʼ hi dinga, amah guakin paikhia ding hi." 
Exodus21:5 Ahih hangin sila in a kitel takin genin, ‘Ka topa, ka zi le ka tate ka it hi; a suakta-in ka paikhia kei ding hi,’ a cih leh," 
Exodus21:6 tua ciangin a topa in thukhente kiangah amah paipih ding hi. Amah in kongkhak ah ahi a, kongkhak khuam ah ahi zongin amah paipih ding hi. A topa in phimpi khat tawh ama bil vuhsak dinga, amah in a nuntak tawntung ama na sepsak ding hi." 
Exodus21:7 “Mi khat in a tanu sila-in a zuak ciangin, tua nu pen sila pasalte bangin paikhia lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:8 A topa in ama zi dingin a seh sa tua numei in amah a lungkimsak kei leh, amah in tua nu a pa kiang mahah zuakkik ding hi. Amah, tua nu tungah citakin gamta lo ahih manin, gamdang mi khat tungah tua nu a zuak theih nading thu nei lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:9 Mi khat in a tapa adingin sila numei a lei leh, amah in tanu bangin tua nu bawl ding hi." 
Exodus21:10 Amah in zi dang khat a lak thuah leh, a zi masaʼ annek, a puansilh, ahih kei leh lup khop nading thuneihna khiam lo ding hi." 
Exodus21:11 Amah in hih thu thumte tua nu adingin a bawl kei leh, sum hong piak kul lo, bangmah a kul loin tua nu paikhia thei ding hi." 
Exodus21:12 “Mi khat satin a sisak mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:13 Ahih hangin amah in a thah sawm hi lo a, a thah khak ahihleh, amah a tai theih nadingin note ading mun khat ka seh ding hi." 
Exodus21:14 Ahih hangin mi khat in midang khat thah ding tumin a thah leh, amah na thah theih nadingun note in ka biakna tau a belhna nangawn panin amah na la teitei ding uh hi." 
Exodus21:15 “Ama pa hitaleh ama nu hitaleh a sat peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:16 “Zuak ding ahi a, sila-in neih ding ahi zongin mi a gu mi peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus21:17 “Ama pa hitaleh ama nu hitaleh a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus21:18 “Mite kitawng a, a khat in a dang khat suangtum khat tawh ahi a, ama khuttum tawh ahi zongin tumin, mipa a sih loh hangin lupna ngakin," 
Exodus21:19 tua ciangin mipa tho zo-in ama ciangkhut tawh a vak khiatkik zawh nakleh, amah a tum pa siang ding hi. Amah in ama hun bei sungteng taang ding bek ama tungah loh dinga, amah damsiangsak ding hi." 
Exodus21:20 “Mi khat in molhtum khat tawh ama sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh satin a phualah a sih pah leh, amah gim kipia ding hi." 
Exodus21:21 Ahih hangin ni khat ahi a, ni nih ahi zongin sila a nuntak leh, amah gim piak ding hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sila pen ama neihsa ahih manin sila a sih ciangin amah a sumh khin ahi hi." 
Exodus21:22 “Mite kitawngin numei naupaii khat liamsak a, tatolhin; ahi zongin siatna in a zuihbeh kei nakleh, tua nuʼ pasal in ama tunga a cih zah tawh kituakin tua numei a liamsak mi kigaam dinga, thukhenteʼ khenna bangin amah liau ding hi." 
Exodus21:23 Siatna khatpeuh in a zuihbeh leh, tua ciangin nuntakna taang ding nuntakna," 
Exodus21:24 mit taang ding mit, ha taang ding ha, khut taang ding khut, khe taang ding khe," 
Exodus21:25 meikaang taang ding meikaang, liamna taang ding liamna, siatna taang ding siatna pia ding hi." 
Exodus21:26 “Mi khat in ama sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a mit satin a suksiat khak leh amah in tua mitʼ hangin sila suaktasakin pai khiasak ding hi. 
Exodus21:27 Amah in a sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a ha a tupkhiat leh, amah in tua haʼ hangin sila suaktasakin pai khiasak ding hi." 
Exodus21:28 “Bawngtal khat in pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh a ki tawh a pik lup ciangin, a bawngtal kidenglum dinga, a sa kine lo ding hi. Ahih hangin bawngtal nei pa siang ding hi." 
Exodus21:29 Ahih hangin a hun bei sa ah bawngtal in mi si thei a, a nei pa kihilh napi-in a khumcip kei a, tua bawngtal in pasal ahi a, numei ahi zongin a thah leh, bawngtal kidenglum dinga, a nei pa zong kithat ding hi." 
Exodus21:30 Ama tung pan tatkhiatna sum a kinget leh, ama nuntakna tatkhiat nadingin ama tungah a kingen zahzah amah in pia ding hi." 
Exodus21:31 Tua bawngtal in miʼ tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin a ki tawh a pik leh hih ngeina tawh kizui-in kigamta ding hi." 
Exodus21:32 Bawngtal in sila ahi pasal hitaleh numei hitaleh khat peuhpeuh a ki tawh a pik leh, a nei pa in amauʼ topaʼ tungah ngun shekel sawm thum pia dinga, bawngtal kidenglum ding hi." 
Exodus21:33 “Mi khat in dum hon sa-in a nusia ahi a, mi khat in dum a tawh ciangin siin loin om ahi zongin, bawngtal hitaleh la hitaleh dum sungah a kiat leh," 
Exodus21:34 dum nei pa in loh ding hi. Amah in a nei pa tungah sum pia dinga, ganhing luang pen ama aʼ hi pah ding hi." 
Exodus21:35 “Mi khatʼ bawngtal in a dang khatʼ bawngtal liamsakin a sih leh, amaute in a hing pen zuak ding uh a, tua man hawm ding uh hi. A ganhing si pen zong amaute in hawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus21:36 Tua bang hi lo a, bawngtal in mi si ngei hi, ci-in kithei napi a nei pa in a khumcip kei leh, amah in bawngtal tang ding bawngtal pia dinga, a si ganhing pen amah in tang ding hi." 
Exodus22:1 “Mi khat in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin gu a, a that a, a zuak zongin, amah in bawngtal khat tang dingin bawngtal nga, tuu khat tang dingin tuu li pia ding hi. Amah in ditkikna bawl ding hi. Amah in bangmah a neih kei leh, ama guktaakna hangin amah kizuak ding hi. A kigu ganhing, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi zongin a hingin ama khut sungah a kimuh leh, amah in a zah nih pia ding hi. “Guta khat in inn vut let a, kisatin amah a sih leh, tua sihna hangin mawhna om lo ding hi. Ahih hangin nisuah khit ahihleh tua sihna hangin mawhna om ding hi." 
Exodus22:2  
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Mi khat in lo khat ah ahi a, leenggui lo ah ahi zongin gan tasak a, a ganhing khahin midang khatʼ lo ah a tat leh, amah in ama lo le ama leenggah lo panin a piangte tawh loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:6 “Mei kuangin gam kaang a, a kikhol an ahi a, a ding lai an ahi a, lo ahi zongin a kat leh, mei a kaangsak pa in a cing takin loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:7 “Mi khat in a veengte kiangah sum ahi a, van ahi zongin kep ding ap a, tua mipaʼ inn panin a kiguk leh, a gu pa a kimuh leh amah in a zah nih pia ding hi." 
Exodus22:8 A gu pa a kimuh kei leh a veengpaʼ vante amah in gu hiam, gu lo hiam cih a kitel nadingin thukhente kiangah inn nei pa in kiciamna bawl ding hi." 
Exodus22:9 “Thuneihna khat peuhpeuh, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi a, tuu ahi a, puansilh ahi zongin, a mang na khat peuhpeuh, mi khat in, ‘Hih pen kei aʼ hi,’ a cihna thu ah, alang nihteʼ thu pen thukhenteʼ mai ah tung ding hi. Thukhente in a mawhsak mipa in a veengpa tungah a zah nih pia ding hi." 
Exodus22:10 “Mi khat in ama veengte tungah la ahi a, bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi zongin, ganhing khat peuhpeuh kep dingin a piak a, kuama muh lohin tua ganhing a si a, a liam a, a kihawl khia ahi zongin ahihleh," 
Exodus22:11 amah in a veengpaʼ neihsa a gu kha hiam cih a kitheih nadingin amau tegelʼ kikalah Topa tawh kiciamna om ding hi. A nei pa in tua kiciamna sang dinga, amah in loh lo ding hi." 
Exodus22:12 Ahih hangin ama tung panin a kigu ahihleh, a nei pa tungah amah in loh ding hi."
