Exodus22:13 Gamsa in a balzan ahihleh, lahtel nadingin tua ganhing paipihsak in. A kibalzan ganhing amah in loh lo ding hi." 
Exodus22:14 “Mi khat in a veengteʼ gan khat peuhpeuh kawm a, a nei pa om loin a liam a, a si zongin, amah in a kicingin loh ding hi." 
Exodus22:15 A nei pa tawh a om khawm ahihleh amah in loh lo ding hi. A kikawm ahihleh a kikawm bangin pai ding hi. 
Exodus22:16 “Mi khat in a kidong nai lo nungak khat zolin amah tawh a lup khop leh, amah in tua nuʼ man ding moman letsong pia dinga, ama zi suak ding hi." 
Exodus22:17 A numeiʼ pa in ama tungah tua nu a piak nop kei leh zong, tua mipa in nungak moman letsong zah numeiʼ paʼ tungah sum pia veve ding hi." 
Exodus22:18 “Numei ai san nu na hingkhawi kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus22:19 “Ganhing tawh a mawh peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus22:20 “ Topa bek sim loh pasian dang khat peuhpeuh tungah biakna a pia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. 
Exodus22:21 “Khualmi khatpeuh na bawlsia kei ding uh a, na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt leitang ah khual mite na hi ngei uh hi." 
Exodus22:22 Meigong numei ahi a, tagah ahi zongin na gimsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:23 Note in amaute na gimsak uh a, amaute keima tungah hong kiko leh, keimah in amauʼ kikona ka za taktak ding hi." 
Exodus22:24 Ka hehna so-in namsau tawh note kong that dinga, na zite uh meigong suakin, na tate uh tagah suak ding hi." 
Exodus22:25 “Note tawh a om, a zawng keima mite khat peuhpeuh tungah sum leitawi na piak uh leh, ama tungah sum leitawi a pia pa bangin na om kei ding uh a, ama tung panin a meet na dok kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:26 Khapna ahi na veengpaʼ puan silh lai na lak ngei khak leh ni tum ma-in ama tungah na piakik ding hi. 
Exodus22:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama silh ding tua bek hi a, tua pen ama pumpi adingin a puan neihsun ahi hi. Amah bang dang tawh lum ding ahi hiam? Amah kei tungah hong kiko leh keʼn ka za ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in hehpihna ka nei hi." 
Exodus22:28 “Thukhente na simmawh kei ding uh a, na mite uh a ukpa zong na samsia kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:29 “Na anlakna pan uh le sathau le leenggah na suknate uh panin a leet khiate piakkhiat ding na zekai kei ding uh hi. “Na tapa cilte uh keima tungah nong pia ding uh hi. 
Exodus22:30 Na bawngtalte uh le na tuute uh panin zong tua bangmahin nong pia ding uh hi. Ni sagih sung a pi tawh om dinga, a ni giat ni-in kei tungah nong pia ding uh hi." 
Exodus22:31 “Note pen keiʼ tungah hong ki-ap mite na hi ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin gamlak ah gamsate in a balzan sa peuhmah note in na ne kei ding uh a, tua bang sate uite na lot ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:1 “Thuman lo na gen khia kei ding uh hi. Elna tawh teci pang dingin migilo pa tawh na kipawl kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:2 Siatna a bawl dingin mihon na zui kei ding uh hi. Thutang a hei khia dingin mihonpi nung zui-in thu neihna ah teci na pang kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:3 Ama thu neihna ah mizawng pa na langneih kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:4 Na langneih miteʼ bawngtal ahi a, a la ahi zongin a gammang na tuah uh leh ama kiangah na hawlkik ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:5 Nangmah a hong mudah paʼ la a van tawh a puk na muh leh a la tawh amah na nusia kei dinga, tua la phot toh ding na huh ding hi." 
Exodus23:6 Ama thu neihna ah mizawng pa a thutang kimlai na lelsak kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:7 A man lopi a mi mawhsak ding panin kikem unla, a dikpa le thuman pa that kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gilo mi ka khah kei ding hi." 
Exodus23:8 Sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumgolh in ulianteʼ mittawsak a, thuman miteʼ thu heikhiatsak hi." 
Exodus23:9 Khualmi na nengniam kei ding uh hi. Khualmiʼ lungsim na thei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi. 
Exodus23:10 Note in na leitang uh ah kum guk sung khai tuhin a piangte na kaikhawm ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:11 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ciangin, nomauʼ mi a zawngte in a nek theih nadingin leitang tawlngasakin, lokhulin na omsak ding uh a, gamlak ganhingte in mizawngteʼ nek loh teng ne thei ding uh hi. Na leenggui lote uh le na oliv lote uh zong tua bangmahin na hih ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:12 Ni guk sung na nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na bawngtal le na la in tawlngakna a neih theih nading le, na nasem numeiʼ tapa le khual mite in tha thak a ngah theih nadingin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:13 Noteʼ tunga kong gente khempeuh thudon un; pasian dangteʼ min genin nei kei unla, na kam sung panun zong tua bangte kizasak kei un." 
Exodus23:14 Kum khatin thum vei, keima adingin pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:15 Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Keimah in note kong thupiak bangin Abib kha sung a kiseh sa hun ciangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi. Khut hawmguak tawh keima mai ah kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi. 
Exodus23:16 Note in lo-a na tuh uh, na nasepna uh a gah masa, anlak pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Note in lo panin na nasepna uh a gah na kaihkhop uh kum bei ciangin an kaihkhopna pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:17 Topa Pasian ’ mai ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thum vei kilaak ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:18 Note in silngo sawh anlum tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, a ganhing thau zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:19 Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uh inn ah na paipih ding uh hi. Note in a piʼ nawizu tawh keel no na huan kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus23:20 En un, keimah in ka bawl sa mun ah note hong paipih ding le lamkal ah note hong cing dingin noteʼ mai ah vantungmi khat ka sawl hi." 
Exodus23:21 Amah thudonin ama aw ngai unla, amah lehdo kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in noteʼ thupalsatna hong maisak lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima min tawh nasem ahi hi." 
Exodus23:22 Ahih hangin note in ama aw limtakin ngai-in keima gen bangin na gamtat uh leh na galte uhʼ tungah gal ka hi dinga, na langte uhʼ tungah lang ka hi ding hi." 
Exodus23:23 Noteʼ mai ah ka vantungmi pai-in Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite kiangah note hong paipihin, keimah in amaute ka phiatkhiat ciangin," 
Exodus23:24 amauʼ pasian-teʼ mai ah note kun loin, tuate bia loin, amauʼ gamtat bangin na gamta kei ding uh a, note in amaute lawnthal mang kiuhkeuhin amauʼ milim suang khuampite na satnen gawp ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:25 Note in Topa na Pasian uh nong bia ding uh a, keimah in na an uh le na tui uh thupha ka pia ding hi. Keimah in noteʼ lak panin cinatna ka la khia ding hi." 
Exodus23:26 Noteʼ leitang ah kuamah nausia om lo dinga, a ciing zong om lo ding hi. Note kong teeksihsak ding hi." 
Exodus23:27 Keimah hong kikihtakna noteʼ mai ah paisakin noteʼ phutkhak ding mi khempeuh ka kitok gawpsak dinga, na galte khempeuh uh lehhei-in noteʼ kiang panin ka taisak ding hi." 
Exodus23:28 Noteʼ mai panin Hiv mite, Kanaan mite le Hit mite a hawl khia dingin noteʼ mai ah tunpi ka sawl khia ding hi." 
Exodus23:29 Leitung gamkhing suakin gamlak ganhingte noteʼ lang khat ah tampi pha kha ding ahih manin noteʼ mai panin kum khat sungin amaute ka hawl khia kei ding hi. 
Exodus23:30 Note khangin tampi pha-in leitang na luah matengun noteʼ mai panin tawmtawmin amaute ka hawl khia ding hi. 
Exodus23:31 Keimah in San Tuipi panin Filistia miteʼ tuipi ciang le sehnel gam panin Eufratis gun ciang dongah na gamgite uh ka phut ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua gam a teeng mite noteʼ khut sungah kong pia dinga, note in na mai uh panin amaute na hawl khia ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:32 Amaute ahi a, amauʼ pasian-te tawh ahi zongin thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus23:33 Amaute in keiʼ tungah note hong khialsak kha ding ahih ciangin noteʼ leitang tungah amaute teeng lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in amauʼ pasian-te na biak uh leh noteʼ tungah thangzak khat hong hi taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nang le Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel upate sung pan sawm sagih tawh keima kiangah hong pai to unla, a gamla panin kunin hong bia un." 
Exodus24:2 Topaʼ nai ah Moses bek hong pai ding hi. A dangte a nai ah hong pai lo dinga, mihonte in mual ciang dong hong neh lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:3 Moses hong pai-in Topaʼ thugente khempeuh le biakna ngeinate khempeuh mite kiangah a gen hi. Mi khempeuh in aw kikhatin dawng uh a, “ Topaʼ gen sa thute khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus24:4 Moses in Topaʼ thugente khempeuh a gelh hi. Zingsangin amah tho baih a, mual bulah biakna tau khat lamin, Israel minam sawm le nihte tawh kituakin khuam sawm le nih a phut hi." 
Exodus24:5 Amah in Israel mi tangvalte sawlin, tuate in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna bawngtalte Topaʼ tungah pia uh hi." 
Exodus24:6 Moses in a sisan kim khat la-in, kuangte sungah koih a, sisan kim khat biakna tau tungah a theh hi." 
Exodus24:7 Tua ciangin amah in thuciamna laibu la-in, miteʼ zakin tua laibu a sim hi. Amaute in, “ Topaʼ gen sa khempeuh kote in ka hih ding uh a, kote ka thumang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus24:8 Tua ciangin Moses in sisan la-in miteʼ tungah theh a, “Hih thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topa in note tawh a bawl sa thuciamna sisan en un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:9 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron, Nadab, Abihu le Israel upate sung pan sawm sagih pai to uh a," 
Exodus24:10 amaute in Israel Pasian mu uh hi. Ama khe nuai ah a sianthona van mel tawh a kibang, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl suangphahpek bang pian om hi." 
Exodus24:11 Amah in Israel mi makaite gimna ngahsak lo hi. Amaute in Pasian mu uh a, tua ciangin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi." 
Exodus24:12 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keima kiang mual tungah hong pai to inla, tua lai ah ngak in. Amaute a kihilh nadingin keima gelh sa, thukham le thupiakna tawh, suangpek nang tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama nasem pa Joshua tawh Moses kithawi uh a, Pasianʼ mual tungah pai to uh hi." 
Exodus24:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama nasem pa Joshua tawh Moses kithawi uh a, Pasianʼ mual tungah pai to uh hi." 
Exodus24:14 Amah in upate kiangah, “Noteʼ kiangah kong paikik matengun hih lai ah kote hong ngak un. En un, note tawh Aaron le Hur om hi. Thu nei peuhpeuh amauteʼ kiangah paisak un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus24:15 Tua ciangin mual tungah Moses pai to a, meii in mual a tuam hi." 
Exodus24:16 Topaʼ minthanna vang pen Sinai Mual tungah kinga a, meii in ni guk sung tua mual a tuam hi. A ni sagih ni-in amah in meii lak panin Moses a sam hi." 
Exodus24:17 Tu-in Topaʼ vangliatna vang pen Israel miteʼ muhna ah mualvum dawn a kaang tum meikuang tawh kibang hi. 
Exodus24:18 Meii sungah Moses tum a, mual tungah pai to hi. Moses sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung mual tungah a om hi." 
Exodus25:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus25:2 “Amaute in kei adingin biakna hong paipih nadingin Israel miteʼ kiangah gen in. A pia nuam mi peuhmah tung panin kei adingin biakna na sang ding hi. 
Exodus25:3 Amauteʼ tung panin na san ding biakna hih bang ahi hi: Kham, ngun, sumngo," 
Exodus25:4 a dum, a dupsan, a ausan puante le a kopin a kikhuk khau tawh a kigan puan hoih, keel mul," 
Exodus25:5 a kisansak tuutal vunte, keel vunte, singkha sing," 
Exodus25:6 meivakte ading sathau, nilh sathau ding le paknamtui dingin a namtui nate," 
Exodus25:7 siampi puan le awmdal a bulh dingin onik suangte ahi hi. 
Exodus25:8 Amauteʼ lakah kei ka om theih nadingin kei adingin biakbuk khat amaute bawlsak in. 
Exodus25:9 Biakbuk le a nazatteʼ lim ding tawh kisai-in nangʼ tungah kong lahte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus25:10 “Amaute in singkha sing tawh singkuang khat bawl ding uh hi. A dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:11 Nangmah in kham citak tawh tua singkuang na zut dinga, a sung le a pua na zut ding hi. A tung kimkot ah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:12 Nangmah in tua singkuang adingin kham kual li sungin a singkuang khe li tungah tuate na bulh dinga, a pang khat ah kual nih, a pang lang khat ah a kual nih mah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus25:13 Nangmah in singkha singzawl na sui dinga, tuate kham tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus25:14 Singkuang puak nadingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte na khum ding hi. 
Exodus25:15 Singkuangʼ kualte sungah a zawlte omsuak dinga, tuate kila khia lo ding hi." 
Exodus25:16 Nangʼ tunga kong piak ding thuciamna nangmah in singkuang sungah na koih ding hi. 
Exodus25:17 “Tua ciangin kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat na bawl dinga, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:18 Nangmah in kham tawh kherub nih na bawl dinga, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a kiseek tua kherub-te na omsak ding hi." 
Exodus25:19 Mong khat ah kherub khat, a mong lang khat ah kherub khat mah bawl in. Hehpihna tokhom tawh a kizomin a mong tuakah kherub na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:20 Kherub-te in a khate uh a tungah zal ding uh a, amauʼ khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsunin amaute khatlekhat kimaingat ding uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-teʼ mai nga ding uh hi." 
Exodus25:21 Singkuang tungah hehpihna tokhom na koih dinga, singkuang sungah nang kong piak ding thuciamna na koih ding hi." 
Exodus25:22 Hehpihna tokhom tung, thuciamna singkuang tunga om kherub nihte kikal panin nang kong hopih dinga, Israel mite adingin nangʼ tungah kong piak ding thute khempeuh nangʼ tungah kong gen ding hi." 
Exodus25:23 “Nangmah in singkha sing tawh sabuai khat na bawl dinga, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat le alang, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:24 Kham citak tawh na zut dinga, a kimkot ah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:25 Nangmah in khut peek cia a zai zawl peek khat a kimkot ah na bawl dinga, tua zawl peek kimkot ah a geihual na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:26 Nangmah in tua sabuai adingin kham kual li na bawl dinga, tuate pen a kiu li, a khe lite ah na gak ding hi." 
Exodus25:27 Sabuai puak nading zawlte a len dingin a zawl peek gei ah a kualte om ding hi. 
Exodus25:28 Nangmah in singkha sing zawlte bawlin kham tawh na zut dinga, hihte tawh sabuai kipua ding hi." 
Exodus25:29 Paknamtui adingin a kuangdaite le a pakante, tui phih nadingin a thawl gongbakte le a kuang-ukte na bawl ding hi. Kham citak tawh tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus25:30 Keima mai sabuai tungah Ompihna Anlum na koih tawntung ding hi. 
Exodus25:31 “Kham citak tawh meivak khuam khat na bawl ding hi. Meivak khuam bul le a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl ding hi. A haite, a nunte le a paakte, tua tawh sakhat hi khawm ding uh hi." 
Exodus25:32 A pang panin hiang guk meeng khia dinga, a pang khat ah meivak khuam hiang thum meeng khia-in, a pang lang khat ah meivak khuam hiang thum mah meeng khia ding hi." 
Exodus25:33 Hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum le a dang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin hiang gukte meivak khuam panin meeng khia ding hi." 
Exodus25:34 A meivak khuam tung mahmah ah a nunte le a paakte tawh a om, almond bangin a kibawl hai li omin," 
Exodus25:35 meivak khuam panin hiang guk a kopteʼ bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om ding hi. 
Exodus25:36 Amauʼ nunte le a hiangte, sakhat hi dinga, a vekpi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat hi ding hi." 
Exodus25:37 Nangmah in ama adingin meivak sagihte na bawl dinga, ama omna mai teng khua a vaksak dingin meivakte kikoih ding hi." 
Exodus25:38 A taitehte le a kuangte kham citak hi ding hi. 
Exodus25:39 Kham citak tawi sawm nih le tawi khat val a gik tawh hih nazatte khempeuh kibawl ding hi. 
Exodus25:40 Mual tungah nangʼ tunga hong kilak hih nate pen amauʼ lim ding bangin na bawl ding thei in. 
Exodus26:1 “Tua tham loin a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan dalna puan sawm le a dum, a dupsan le a ausan khau a kigan puan tawh biakbuk na bawl ding hi. Hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:2 Dalna puan a dung pi sawm li le pi nih hi dinga, dalna puan a vai pi guk hi ding hi. Dalna puan khempeuh kikim ciat ding hi." 
Exodus26:3 Dalna puan ngate khatlekhat kikhuituah ding hi. 
Exodus26:4 A kikhuituah a masa dalna puan a nawlnung penʼ nawl dungsuk ah khau dum tawh a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. Tua bangmahin a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan a nawlnung penʼ nawl dung suk mahah a bilvangte na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:5 Dalna puan khat tungah bilvang sawm nga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna dalna puan nawl ah bilvang sawm nga mah na bawl dinga, a bilvangte khatlekhat kitang ding uh hi." 
Exodus26:6 Biakbuk pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in kham kilhna sawm nga bawlin, tua kilhnate tawh dalna puan khatlekhat na kimatsak ding hi." 
Exodus26:7 “Biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keel mul tawh puante zong na bawl dinga, puan sawm le khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:8 Tua puan a dung pi sawm li le nga, a vai pi guk ciat hi dinga, puan sawm le khatte kikim ding hi." 
Exodus26:9 Tua puan ngate amau le amau khui tuahin, puan gukte zong amau le amau mah na khuituah dinga, a gukna puan pen puanbuk mai ah na khep ding hi." 
Exodus26:10 A kikhuituah puan khat nawl ah a bilvang sawm nga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna puan nawlnung pen nawl ah a bilvang sawm nga mah na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:11 Tua pen bup khat a suah theih nadingin nangmah in sumngo kilhna sawm nga bawlin, a bilvangteʼ sungah tua kilhnate guangin, puanbuk na kimatsak ding hi." 
Exodus26:12 Puanbuk puan a val khia, puan alang a val pen, biakbuk nungah kai suk ding hi." 
Exodus26:13 Puanbuk puan a dunglam, pang khat ah pi khat le alang, a pang lang khat ah pi khat le alang a val pen biakbuk a khuh dingin hih lam pang le hua lam pangte ah kai suk ding hi." 
Exodus26:14 “A kisansak tuutal vunte le keel vunte tawh puanbuk khuhna khat na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:15 “Biakbuk adingin a po to ding khuampeekte singkha sing na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:16 A khuampeek khat a tun pi sawm le nga hi dinga, a vai pi nih le letmat thum vive hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:17 A bulh nadingin a khuampeek khat ah a zang nih ciat om ding hi. Biakbuk khuampeek khempeuh tua bangin na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:18 Biakbuk khuampeekte na bawl ding hi: Leitaw lam pang adingin khuampeek sawm nih hi ding hi. 
Exodus26:19 A khuampeek sawm nihteʼ bulah bullen sawm li ngun tawh na bawl dinga, a zang nihte adingin khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, a khuampeek dang khat bulah a dang nihte adingin bullen nih mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:20 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam, leilu lam panga a khuampeek sawm nihte le" 
Exodus26:21 ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawm lite adingin, khuampeek khat ah bullen nih, a dang khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:22 Nitumna lam, biakbuk nung lam adingin khuampeek guk na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:23 Biakbuk nung lam kiute adingin khuampeek nih na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus26:24 Tuate a bul lamah kikak dinga, ahih hangin a kual masa ah a dawn kimat ding hi. A nihin tua bang hi dinga, tuate in a kiu nihte piangsak ding uh hi." 
Exodus26:25 Ngun tawh kibawl amauʼ bullen sawm le gukte ading a khuampeek giat pha dinga, khuampeek khat ah bullen nih ciat om ding hi." 
Exodus26:26 “Singkha sing, zawlin na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:27 Biakbuk pang khat a khuampeek ading zawl nga, biakbuk a pang lang khat a khuampeek adingin zawl nga, nitumna lam biakbuk nung lam panga a khuampeekte adingin zawl nga hi ding hi." 
Exodus26:28 A zawl laita, a khuampeek kimciang a ban to pen mong khat pan mong khat paisuak ding hi." 
Exodus26:29 A khuampeekte kham tawh zutin, a zawlte a len dingin amauʼ kualte kham tawh na bawl dinga, a zawlte kham tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus26:30 A lim ding geelna, mual tungah nang tungah hong kilak mah tawh kizui-in biakbuk na lam ding hi." 
Exodus26:31 “A dum, a dupsan, a ausan, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih kigan tawh dalna puan khat na bawl dinga, hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh kizem ding hi." 
Exodus26:32 Ngun tawh kibawl bullen lite tungah a om, kham kibawl vankhaina nei-in, kham tawh a kizut singkha khuampi lite tungah na khai ding hi." 
Exodus26:33 A kilhnate ah dalna puan khai sukin, dalna puan sung tua lai munah thuciamna singkuang na koih dinga, dalna puan in siangtho pen mun panin siangtho mun khen ding hi." 
Exodus26:34 Siangtho pen mun sunga om thuciamna singkuang tungah hehpihna tokhom na koih ding hi. 
Exodus26:35 Dalna puan pua lamah sabuai koihin, sabuai tawh a kisan biakbuk leitaw lam pangah meivak khuam na koih dinga, leilu lam pangah sabuai na koih ding hi." 
Exodus26:36 “Puanbuk kongkhak dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem kong puankhai khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus26:37 Kong puankhai adingin singkha khuampi nga bawlin kham tawh na zut ding hi. A vankhainate kham hi dinga, tuate adingin sumngo bullen nga na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:1 “Biakna tau ding singkha sing tawh bawl in. Pi sagih le alang sau-in pi sagih le alang mah na zaisak ding hi. Biakna tau a ning kikim dinga, a tun pi li le alang hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:2 A kiu lite ah ki na bawl ding hi. A kite pen a biakna tau tawh sakhat hi dinga, sumngo tawh na zut ding hi." 
Exodus27:3 Ama adingin vut koih nading beelte le kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate le vutluahna peekte na bawl dinga, a nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:4 Ama adingin siklen, a vang simsiam zong sumngo tawh na bawl ding hi. Siklen tung, a kiu lite ah sumngo kual li na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:5 Siklen in biakna tau kimciang a bat suk theih nadingin biakna tau zawl nuai panin na bulh ding hi. 
Exodus27:6 Biakna tau adingin singkha sing zawlte bawlin sumngo tawh tuate na zut ding hi. 
Exodus27:7 A kipuak ciangin biakna tau pang nihte ah a zawlte a om theih nadingin a kualteʼ vang sungah a zawlte kikhum ding hi. 
Exodus27:8 Singpekte tawh kuak nei-in biakna tau na bawl dinga, mual tungah nang tunga hong kilak sa bangin kibawl ding hi." 
Exodus27:9 “Biakbuk tual na bawl ding hi. A tual in leitaw lam pangah pang khat adingin pi za le sawm nga a sau, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhai suk dalna puan nei ding hi." 
Exodus27:10 A khuam sawm nih le a bullen sawm nih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi dinga, ahih hangin khuampi tunga vankhainate le a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:11 Leilu lam pang ading zong a sauna tua bangmah hi-in, a kikhai suk dalna puan pi za le sawm nga sau dinga, a khuam sawm nih le a bullen sawm nih pen sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi. Ahi zongin khuampi tunga vankhainate le a gaknate pen ngun tawh a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:12 Nitumna lam pangah buktual a vailam adingin khuampi sawm le bullen sawmte tawh pi sawm sagih le nga a sau a kikhai suk dalna puan om ding hi. 
Exodus27:13 A mailam, nisuahna lam buktual a vailam pi sawm sagih le nga hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:14 Kongpi pang khat ading a kikhai suk dalna puan pi sawm nih le nih le alang hi dinga, khuampi thum le bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:15 A pang lang khat ah a kikhai suk dalna puan pen pi sawm nih le nih le alang hi dinga, khuampi thum le bullen thumte tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:16 Buktual a kongpi dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khau a kopin a kikhuk khau hoihte tawh a kigan, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, pi sawm thum a sau kong puankhai khat om dinga, tua in khuampi li le bullen li nei ding hi." 
Exodus27:17 Buktual kiim a khuampi khempeuh ngun tawh kibawl gakna tawh kigak dinga, a vankhainate ngun hi-in a bullente sumngo hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:18 Buktual a dung pi za le sawm nga, a vai pi sawm sagih le nga, a sanna pi sagih le alang hi-in, a kopin a kikhuk khau hoih tawh a kigan a kikhai suk dalna puan le sumngo bullente tawh hi ding hi." 
Exodus27:19 Biakbuk nazat ding peuhmahte le a khetphimte khempeuh le buktual a khetphimte khempeuh sumngo tawh a kibawl hi ding hi. 
Exodus27:20 “Meivak a kuangin a om tawntung theih nadingin mei a vak ding oliv gah a kisuzan, sathau siangtho, Israel mite in nang kiangah hong paipih nadingun thu na pia ding hi." 
Exodus27:21 Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang mai-a dalna puan pua lamah, Aaron le ama tapate in nitak a kipan zingsang dong Topaʼ mai ah vil ding uh hi. Tua pen Israel mite in amauʼ khang tawntungin a zuih ding uh ngeina kip khat hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:1 “Tua ciangin keima tungah siampi na a sem dingin Israel mite lak panin na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate Nadab le Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar, nangma kiangah la in." 
Exodus28:2 Minthanna le hoihna tawh a kidim nadingin na sanggampa Aaron ading biakna puan siangtho na bawl ding hi. 
Exodus28:3 Keima siampi nasepna ah amah a ap theih nadingun amaute in Aaronʼ puante a bawl nading, hih theihna lungsim ka guat sa, siamna a nei mite khempeuh tungah gen in." 
Exodus28:4 Amauteʼ bawl ding puante: Awmdal khat, siampi puan khat, puan tualpi khat, sik li nei-a a gial puan tungsilh khat, dialpi khat le kawnggak khat ahi hi. Keima tungah siampi na a sem ding na sanggampa Aaron le ama tapate adingin amaute in biakna puan siangthote bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus28:5 Amaute in kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk tawh a kigan puan hoihte sang ding uh hi." 
Exodus28:6 “Amaute in siampi puan pen, kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh bawl ding uh a, hoihtakin a kibawl hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:7 A kizop khawm theih nadingin a mong nihte ah a kimat liangkaihna puan nih nei ding hi. 
Exodus28:8 Amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen, kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoihte tawh kibawlin, a sepna zia le a nate a kibang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:9 Nangmah in onik suang nih la-in tuateʼ tungah Israel tapateʼ min na gelh dinga," 
Exodus28:10 amauʼ suahna tawh kizui-in amauʼ min gukte suang khat tungah gelhin, a om lai gukteʼ min a suang dang khat tungah na gelh ding hi." 
Exodus28:11 Kizepna a bawlpa in min gelhna a bawl bangin Israel tapa sawm le nihteʼ minte suang nihte tungah na gelh ding hi. Tuate pen kham a zepna tawh na um ding hi. 
Exodus28:12 Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampi puanʼ liangkaih puan tungah tua suang nihte na bulh ding hi. Aaron in ama liangko nihte tungah phawkphawk dingin Topaʼ mai ah amauteʼ min pua ding hi. 
Exodus28:13 Kham tawh kibawl a kiphut kizepna le 
Exodus28:14 khau bangin a kihual, kham citak khainiang nih na bawl dinga, a kihual khainiangte pen a kiphutteʼ tungah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:15 “Hoihtakin a kibawl thukhenna awmdal khat na bawl ding hi. Siampi puan a kibawl bangmahin na bawl ding hi. Kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoih tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:16 A ning kikimin thuap nih hi dinga, a dung letmat kua, a vai letmat kua mah hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:17 Tua sungah suang gual li-in na bulh ding hi. Sardis suang, topaz suang le karbankal suang gual khat pen a gual masa hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:18 A gual nihna ah emerald suang, sapfaia suang le diamond suang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:19 A gual thumna ah jakinth suang, agate suang le amethyst suang hi ding hi." 
Exodus28:20 A gual lina ah beryl suang, onik suang le jasper suang hi dinga, kham tawh zepna sungah tuate kibulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:21 Israel tapateʼ min tawh kituakin amauteʼ min a omna suang sawm le nih om ding hi. Tuate pen minam sawm le nihte adingin amauʼ min ciat kigelhin, min gelhna tawh kibang ding hi." 
Exodus28:22 Awmdal adingin khau tawh a kibang, a kihual kham citak khainiang na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:23 Awmdal adingin kham kual nih na bawl dinga, awmdal mongah tua kualte na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:24 Awmdal mong a kual nihte sungah kham khau nihte na khum ding hi. 
Exodus28:25 Khau mong nihte zepna tawh na zom dinga, siampi puanʼ liangkaih puan mai lamah tua bangin na zom ding hi." 
Exodus28:26 Kham kual nih na bawl dinga, awmdal mong nih, siampi puan tawh a kizom a sung lamah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:27 Kham kual nih na bawl dinga, siampi puan liangkaih nihteʼ nuai a mailam, hoihtakin a kigan siampi puan khau a kizopna tung sanah na bulh ding hi." 
Exodus28:28 Hoihtakin a kigan siampi puanʼ khau tungah a om theih nading le siampi puan tung panin awmdal a kol theih loh nadingin amaute in siampi puanʼ kual ah khau dum khatin a kual tawh gak khawm ding uh hi. 
Exodus28:29 “Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ mai ah phawk tawntung nadingin amaute a paipih dingin siangtho munah amah a pai ciangin, Aaron in ama lungtang tunga om thukhenna awmdal sungah Israel tapateʼ min pua ding hi." 
Exodus28:30 Thukhenna awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim na koih dinga, Topaʼ mai ah a pai ciangin Aaronʼ lungtang tungah tuate om ding hi. Tua bangin Aaron in ama lungtang tungah Israel miteʼ thukhenna Topaʼ mai ah pua tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus28:31 “Siampi puan tualpi, puan dum bek tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:32 Puan ngawng bangin a kikeek loh nadingin a ngawng kimkot ah a kigan tawh a kizim, lutang thawl a vang nei ding hi." 
Exodus28:33 A mongah a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh a kizem mang kawlsing gah bawlin, a mong kiimah amauteʼ kikalah kham siklong bawlin," 
Exodus28:34 puan tualpi mong kimkot ah kham long le mang kawlsing gah, kham long le mang kawlsing gah cih bangin na kihelhsak ding hi." 
Exodus28:35 Aaron in biakna na a sep ciangin tua puan silh dinga, amah a sih khak loh nadingin Topaʼ mai a siangtho munah a tum ciang le a pusuah ciangin a gingte kiza ding hi." 
Exodus28:36 “Nangmah in kham citak tawh a peek khat na bawl dinga, min gelhna a kibawlte mah bangin tua tungah, ‘ Topa ading siangtho,’ ci-in na gelh ding hi." 
Exodus28:37 Tua pen, khau dum khat tawh dialpi tungah na gak dinga, dialpi mai lamah om ding hi." 
Exodus28:38 Tua pen Aaronʼ taltang ah om dinga, Israel mite in letsong siangtho a piakna uh ahi, a siangtho biakpiakna ah mawhna a om peuhmah Aaron in ama tungah pua ding hi. Topaʼ mai ah amaute a kisan theih nadingin ama taltang tungah tua a peek om tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus28:39 “A puan tungsilh ding pen khau hoih tawh siik li nei, a gialin na gan ding hi. Khau hoih tawh dialpi khat na bawl dinga, phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem kawnggak khat na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:40 “Aaronʼ tapate adingin puan tungsilhte, kawnggakte le lukhute na bawl dinga, minthanna le hoihna tawh a kidim nadingin tuate na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus28:41 Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun na sanggampa Aaron le a tapate na silhsak dinga, amaute sathau nilhin, nasem dingin kipsakin, na siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus28:42 A ci guakin a omna uh a tuam dingin amau adingin puan hoihte tawh pheituamte na bawlsak dinga, tuate in kawng panin phei ciang ban ding hi." 
Exodus28:43 Kikhopna buk ah amaute a pai ciang uh ahi a, siangtho munah nasem dingin biakna tau nai ah a pai ciang uh ahi zongin, Aaron le ama tapate in tuate a silh ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in amau tung mahah mawhna a kisuan tawm suakin si ding uh hi. Hih pen amah le ama khit ciangin a suanlekhakte adingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi." 
Exodus29:1 “Amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amaute na sianthosak nadingin amauteʼ tungah na hih ding thute: Bawngtalno khat le a sitbaang lo tuutal nih," 
Exodus29:2 le silngo sawh loh anlum, sathau a kihel silngo sawh loh mohte, sathau tawh a kizut silngo sawh loh mohphengte la in. Tuate pen mangbuhnel tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus29:3 Lawh khat sungah tuate koihin tuate a lawhin paipihin, a bawngtal le a tuutal nih zong na paipih ding hi." 
Exodus29:4 “Kikhopna buk kongkhak ah Aaron le a tapate na paipih dinga, tui tawh amaute na sil ding hi." 
Exodus29:5 Nangmah in puante la-in, puan tungsilh le siampi puan tualpi, siampi puan le awmdal, Aaron silhsakin, hoihtakin a kigan siampi puan gakna tawh amah na gak ding hi." 
Exodus29:6 Ama lu tungah dialpi khimsakin, dialpi tungah kumpi lukhu siangtho na khusak ding hi." 
Exodus29:7 Nangmah in nilh sathau la-in, ama lu tungah sungin amah na nilh ding hi." 
Exodus29:8 “Tua ciangin nangmah in ama tapate paipihin, amaute, puan tungsilh na silhsak dinga," 
Exodus29:9 kawnggakte tawh amaute gakin, amauʼ lu tungah a lukhute uh na gak ding hi. Siampi nasepna pen a kip tawntung ngeina ahih manin amau aʼ hi ding hi. Tua bangin Aaron le a tapate na kipsak ding hi." 
Exodus29:10 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk mai ah bawngtal na paipih ding hi. Aaron le a tapate in bawngtal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:11 Topaʼ mai, kikhopna buk kongkhak ah nangmah in a bawngtal na go ding hi." 
Exodus29:12 Bawngtal sisan tawm khat la-in na khutme tawh biakna tau kite na nuh dinga, si a om lai teng biakna tau bulah na sung khia ding hi." 
Exodus29:13 A gilpi tuam a thau khempeuh le a sin tunga a utok le a kal nihte le a kal tuam a thau na la dinga, biakna tau tungah tuate na hal ding hi." 
Exodus29:14 Ahih hangin bawngtal sa le a vun le a ekte, giahphual pua lamah mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:15 “Tua ciangin nangmah in tuutalte khat la-in, Aaron le a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:16 nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si la-in biakna tau kimkot ah na theh ding hi." 
Exodus29:17 Tua ciangin tuutal semnenin, a sungkua le a khete silin, a sa bakte le a lu tawh tuate koihin," 
Exodus29:18 biakna tau tungah tuutal a bupin na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna hi a, a gim namtui, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:19 “Nangmah in tuutal a dang khat na la ding hi. Aaron le a tapate in tua tuutal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga ding uh a," 
Exodus29:20 nangmah in tuutal go-in, a si tawm khat la-in Aaronʼ taklam bil dawn le ama tapateʼ taklam bil dawnte le amauʼ taklam khutpi dawnte le amauʼ taklam khepi dawnte nuhin, si a om lai teng biakna tau kiimah na theh ding hi." 
Exodus29:21 Tua ciangin biakna tau tunga a om si tawm khat le nilh sathau la-in Aaron le ama puante tung le a tapate le a puante tungah na theh ding hi. Tua ciangin amah le a puante le a tapate le a puante a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:22 “Nangmah in tuutal thau, a mei, a gilpi tuam a thau, a sin pan a utok, a kal nihte, a kal tuam a thau le a taklam phei (bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen kipsakna tuutal ahi hi)" 
Exodus29:23 le Topaʼ mai ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin anlum khat, sathau tawh a kibawl anlum bek khat le mohpheng khat na la ding hi." 
Exodus29:24 Hihte khempeuh Aaronʼ khut sung le a tapateʼ khut sungah na koih dinga, Topaʼ mai ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi." 
Exodus29:25 Tua ciangin amauʼ khut sung panin tuate na la dinga, Topaʼ mai ah a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah mei tawh kihal biakna banah na hal ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Exodus29:26 “Nangmah in Aaron a kikipsakna tuutal sa-iik la-in Topaʼ mai ah vei-a piak dingin na vei ding hi. Tua pen nangma tanh hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:27 “Kipsakna sa pen Aaron le ama tapate ading ahih ciangin, kipsakna tuutal panin a kipia, a kivei siampiteʼ tanh a phei le vei-a piak sa-iikte na siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:28 Tua pen Aaron le ama tapate adingin Israel miteʼ tung panin a kaih tawntung ding uh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thunuam a biak amauʼ biakna panin Israel mite in a piak ding siampiteʼ tanh ahi hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah amauʼ piak ahi hi. 
Exodus29:29 “Aaronʼ biakna puan siangthote pen ama sih khit ciangin a tapateʼ tungah kipia dinga, amaute sathau kinilhin a kikipsak nading ahi hi." 
Exodus29:30 Ama za luahin siampi na a sem a tapa in siangtho munah nasem dingin kikhopna buk ah a pai ciangin ni sagih sung tuate silh ding hi. 
Exodus29:31 “Nangmah in kipsakna tuutal la-in a siangtho biakna mun khat ah a sa na huan ding hi. 
Exodus29:32 Aaron le a tapate in kikhopna buk kongkhak ah tuutal sa le lawh sunga om anlum ne ding uh hi. 
Exodus29:33 Amaute in amaute a kikipsak nading le a siangthosak dingin kilemna a kibawlna tua ante ne ding uh a, ahih hangin a pualam mi in tuate ne thei lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a siangtho biakna an ahi hi." 
Exodus29:34 Kipsakna sate khat peuhpeuh ahi a, anlum ahi zongin, zingsang ciang dong a om lai leh nangmah in a omlaite mei tawh na hal ding hi. Tuate pen biakna an siangtho ahih manin kine lo ding hi." 
Exodus29:35 “Tua bangin nang kong thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin Aaron le ama tapateʼ tungah na hih dinga, ni sagih sung tawntung amaute ki-apna na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus29:36 Kilem nadingin mawhna hanga biakna-in nisimin bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. Sianthosak nadingin sathau na nilh ciang le kilemna na bawl ciangin biakna tau adingin khialhna hanga biakna khat zong na pia ding hi. 
Exodus29:37 Biakna tau adingin ni sagih sung kilemna bawlin na siangthosak ding hi. Tua ciangin biakna tau a siangtho pen suak dinga, tua biakna tau a lawng peuhpeuh a siangtho suak ding hi." 
Exodus29:38 “Tu-in biakna tau tungah na piak tawntung dingte hih bang ahi hi: Nisimin a kizomin kum khat a pha tuuno nihta hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:39 Tuuno khat zingsang lamin na pia dinga, a dang tuuno khat nitak lamin na pia ding hi." 
Exodus29:40 Tuuno a masa tawh annel lawh khat le a oliv thau hai khat tawh a kihel leh tuibuah dingin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:41 Tuuno a dang khat nitakin na pia dinga, zingsang amah bangin a gim namtui ding, Topaʼ mai ah mei tawh kihal biakna-in an tawh biakna le tuibuah tawh na pia khawm ding hi." 
Exodus29:42 Nang tunga thu kong gen nading, nang tawh ka kituah nading mun, Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk kongkhak ah na khang tawntungun a kipia tawntung ding meihal biakna hi ding hi." 
Exodus29:43 Tua lai ah Israel mite tawh ka kituah dinga, keima vang in tua mun siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:44 Keimah in kikhopna buk le biakna tau ka siangthosak dinga, keima siampi na a sem dingin Aaron le a tapate zong ka siangthosak ding hi." 
Exodus29:45 Israel mite lakah keimah teengin amauʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi. 
Exodus29:46 Amauteʼ lakah keimah ka teenna hangin Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih Topa amauʼ Pasian ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa amauʼ Pasian ka hi hi. 
Exodus30:1 “Nangmah in paknamtui hal nading biakna tau khat, singkha sing tawh na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus30:2 A dung pi khat le alang, a vai zong pi khat le alang mah hi ding hi. A kikim sik li nei hi dinga, a sanna pi thum hi ding hi. A kite a tak tawh sakhat hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:3 Nangmah in kham citak tawh a tung le a pang kimkot le a kite na zut dinga, a kimkot ah kham tawh a geihual na bawl ding hi." 
Exodus30:4 Tua biakna tau adingin kham kual nih na bawl ding hi. A geihual nuai a kigal sai a pang tuakah tuate na bawl dinga, a puak nading zawlte a khum nading hi ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:5 Nangmah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte na bawl dinga, kham tawh tuate na zut ding hi." 
Exodus30:6 Nangmah tawh ka kituah nading mun, thuciamna tunga a om hehpihna tokhom mai, thuciamna singkuang kiangah a om dalna puan mai ah biakna tau na koih ding hi." 
Exodus30:7 Aaron in tua tungah a namtui paknamtui hal ding hi. Amah in zingsang simin meivakte a puah ciangin hal ding hi. 
Exodus30:8 Aaron in nitakin zong meivakte a koih ciangin tuate hal dinga, na khang tawntungun Topaʼ mai ah a namtui hi tawntung ding hi." 
Exodus30:9 Tua tungah a siangtho lo paknamtui hitaleh, meihal biakna hitaleh, an tawh biakna hitaleh na pia kei ding hi. Tua tungah tuibuah na sung kei ding hi." 
Exodus30:10 Aaron in kilem nadingin khialhna hanga biakna si a kite tungah kum khatin khatvei zut ding hi. Amah in na khang tawntungun kum khatin khatvei kilemna bawl ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah a siangtho pen ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:12 “Israel mite a phazah na sim ciangin amauʼ lakah gimna a tun loh nadingin, a milip in a kitatkhiatna uh Topaʼ tungah pia ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:13 Mi simna ah a kihel mi peuhmah in biakinn shekel tawh kituakin shekel lang (shekel khat ah gerah sawm nih om hi), Topaʼ tungah biakna-in pia ding hi." 
Exodus30:14 Mi simna ah a kihel, kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah peuhmah in Topaʼ tungah biakna pia ding hi." 
Exodus30:15 Note ading kilemna bawl nadingin Topa biakna na piak uh ciangin a haute in shekel lang sangin a tam zaw pia lo dinga, a zawngte in a tawm zaw pia lo ding hi." 
Exodus30:16 Nomau adingin kilemna bawl nading, Topaʼ mai ah Israel mite ka phawkna a hisak dingin Israel mite tung panin kilemna sum na la dinga, kikhopna buk nasep nadingin na zang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:18 “Kisil nadingin sumngo kuang khat le a ngak nading zong sumngo mah tawh bawl in. Nangmah in kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah na koih dinga, tua sungah tui na koih ding hi." 
Exodus30:19 Aaron le a tapate in a khut uh le a khe uh tua tui tawh sil ding uh hi. 
Exodus30:20 Kikhopna buk ah amaute a pai ciang uh ahi a, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna hal dingin biakna tau nai ah a pai ciang uh ahi zongin, amaute a sih loh nadingun amaute tui tawh kisil ding uh hi." 
Exodus30:21 A sih khak loh nadingun a khut uh le a khe uh sil ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun amaute tunga kipanin amauʼ suanlekhakte tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:22 Tua tham loin, Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus30:23 “A hoih pen a namtui nate la in. Myrrh paknamtui shekel za nga le a namtui thaksing tua zah lang, shekel za nih le sawm nga a gik le a khum a namtui paknamtui za nih le sawm nga," 
Exodus30:24 biakinn shekel tawh kituakin thaksing nam khat za nga le oliv thau bung khat," 
Exodus30:25 nangmah in paknamtui bawlteʼ bawl mah bangin a siangtho sathau nilh dingin hihte na gawm dinga, tua pen a siangtho sathau nilh hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:26 Nangmah in tua tawh kikhopna buk le thuciamna singkuang," 
Exodus30:27 sabuai le a nazat khempeuh, meivak khuam le a nazatte le paknamtui biakna tau," 
Exodus30:28 meihal biakna tau a nazat khempeuh tawh, kuang le a ngakna na zut ding hi." 
Exodus30:29 Tuate a siangtho pen ahih theih nadingin na siangthosak dinga, tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi." 
Exodus30:30 Amaute in keima tungah siampi na hong sep theih nadingun Aaron le a tapate nangmah in sathau nilhin amaute na siangthosak ding hi. 
Exodus30:31 Nangmah in Israel mite kiangah, ‘Hih pen na khang tawntungun a siangtho keima sathau nilh hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:32 Mi mawkmawkteʼ pumpi tungah tua sathau kisung lo dinga, tua bangin a kigawm sathau dang na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a siangtho hi a, note adingin a siangtho hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:33 Tua tawh a kibangin a bawl mi peuhmah ahi a, a pualam mi khatpeuh tuate a nilhsak mi peuhmah ahi zongin ama miteʼ kiang panin kikhen khia ding hi, Topa in ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus30:34 Topa in Moses kiangah, “A namtui nate, stakte, onikha le galbanum, paknamtui citak tawh a namtui nate (a tamna a kikim ciatin) la inla," 
Exodus30:35 paknamtui bawlteʼ hih bangin ci sawhin a nin baang lo, biakna paknamtui bawl in." 
Exodus30:36 Nangmah in kim khat a neu mahmah in na satnen dinga, nang tawh ka kituah nading kikhopna buk sunga thuciamna mai ah pawl khat na koih ding hi. Tua pen nangma adingin a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Exodus30:37 A kigawm pih ngei teng tawh na bawl ding paknamtui pen note adingin na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note adingin Topaʼ tungah a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Exodus30:38 Tua tawh a kibangin paknamtui a bawl mi peuhmah ama miteʼ kiang panin kikhen khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus31:2 “Thei in; Judah minam Hurʼ tapa ahi Uriʼ tapa Bezalel a minin ka sam khin hi. 
Exodus31:3 Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuh ah nasep nading; bulh ding suangte seekna le singzep nasep a sem dingin vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna le khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah ka kidimsak hi." 
Exodus31:4  
Exodus31:5  
Exodus31:6 En in, amah tawh, Dan minam, Ahisamakʼ tapa Oholiab ka seh khinzo hi. Amaute in nang kong thupiak khempeuh a bawl theih nadingun a hih thei mi khempeuh tungah siamna ka pia khinzo hi." 
Exodus31:7 Amauʼ sep dingte hih bang ahi hi: Kikhopna buk le thuciamna singkuang le a tunga om hehpihna tokhom le buk sung na khempeuh," 
Exodus31:8 sabuai le a nazatte le a siangtho meivak khuam le a nazatte khempeuh, paknamtui biakna tau," 
Exodus31:9 le meihal biakna tau a nazatte khempeuh tawh, kuang le a ngakna," 
Exodus31:10 le amauʼ siampi nasep nadingin siampi Aaronʼ puan siangthote le ama tapateʼ puante ahi, hoihtakin a kigan puante," 
Exodus31:11 le siangtho mun adingin nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui ahi hi. Ka thupiakte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:12 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus31:13 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Keima Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen Topa ahi keimah in note a hong siangthosak ka hihna na theih nadingun na khang tawntungun keimah le noteʼ kikalah lim khat hi ding hi. 
Exodus31:14 Sabbath ni-in note na tawlnga ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note adingin a siangtho ahi hi. Tua ni-in a tawlnga lo mi peuhmah kithat dinga, tua ni-in na a sem mi peuhmah ama miteʼ kiang panin kikhen khia ding hi." 
Exodus31:15 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi a tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi a, Topaʼ tungah siangtho hi. Sabbath ni-in nasep khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus31:16 Tua ahih ciangin a tawntung thuciamna-in amauʼ khang tawntungin Sabbath tangin, Israel mite in Sabbath kem ding uh hi." 
Exodus31:17 Ni guk sungteng Topa in vanlelei bawlin, a ni sagih ni-in amah tawlnga a, a tha dimsakkik hi. Keimah le Israel miteʼ kikalah hih Sabbath ni pen lim khat hi tawntung ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus31:18 Sinai Mual tungah thugenna a man khit ciangin Pasianʼ khut tawh a kigelh suangpek ahi thuciamna suangpek nihte, amah in Moses a pia hi." 
Exodus32:1 Mual tung panin Moses hong tun suk hakna mite in a theih uh ciangin, Aaron kiangah mite amau mah kikaikhawm tawmin ama kiangah, “Kithawi in; koteʼ mai ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahihleh bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:2 Aaron in amaute kiangah, “Na zite, na tapate le na tanute uh bil tungah a om kham bilbahte sut khia unla, kei kiangah tuate hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:3 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in amauʼ bil a om kham bilbahte sut khia-in Aaronʼ kiangah tuate a paipih uh hi. 
Exodus32:4 Amah in amauteʼ tung panin kham saangin, sumtui sunna sungah sungin, a kisung bawng no khat bawlsak a, tua ciangin mite in, “Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh!” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:5 Aaron in hih thu a muh ciangin, amah in tua mai ah biakna tau khat lam a, “Zing ciang pen Topa ading pawi bawl ni hi ding hi,” ci-in zaksakna a bawl hi." 
Exodus32:6 Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, meihal biakna pia-in thunuam a biakna zong a paipih uh hi. Pawi an ne-in mite tu uh a, zu khamin numei pasal kisawk ngeingai uh hi." 
Exodus32:7 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Pai suk in; bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt leitang panin nangmah in na paikhiatpih toh mite amau kisiasak uh hi." 
Exodus32:8 Ka thupiakna lampi panin amaute kihei khia pak uh hi. Amau adingin amaute in a kisung bawng no khat bawlin, tua bia-in a tungah biakna pia uh a, ‘Israel mite aw, hih pen Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih to na pasian uh ahi hi!’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:9 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite ka mu zo hi. En in, a lungkhauh mite ahi uh hi." 
Exodus32:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amaute tungah ka sin so-in amaute ka beisak theih nadingin kei guak hong omsak in. Ahi zongin nang na hih leh minam lian khatin kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:11 Ahih hangin Moses in Topa ama Pasian tungah thum a, “ Topa aw, na vangliatna le na thahatna tawh Egypt leitang panin na paikhiatpih ahi nangma mite tungah bang hangin sin so ding na hi hiam?" 
Exodus32:12 Bang hangin Egypt mite in, ‘Mual tungah amaute a that ding le leitung panin amaute a beisak dingin siatna ngaihsutna tawh amah in amaute paikhiatpih hi,’ ci ding uh ahi hiam? A kihtakhuai na hehna daisak inla, na lungsim kheelin na mite tungah hih siatna tungsak kei in." 
Exodus32:13 Amauteʼ tungah nang mahmah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh vantung aksi bangin tamsakin, keimah in ka ciam sa hih leitang khempeuh na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia dinga, amaute in luah tawntung ding uh hi,’ na cihna na nasemte Abraham, Isaac le Israel phawk in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:14 Tua ciangin Topa in a lungsim kheel a, ama miteʼ tungah a tunsak ding siatna tungsak nawn lo hi." 
Exodus32:15 Tua ciangin Moses kihei-in, a khut sunga om thuciamna suangpek nih, a pang lang nih tuakah a kigelh suangpeekte tawh mual tung panin a pai suk hi." 
Exodus32:16 A peekte pen Pasianʼ bawl hi a, a kigelh thute pen suangpek tungah Pasianʼ gelh ahi hi." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua in amauteʼ kiko gamlumna a zak ciangin Moses kiangah, “Giahphual ah kido-a gamlumna om hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:17 Joshua in amauteʼ kiko gamlumna a zak ciangin Moses kiangah, “Giahphual ah kido-a gamlumna om hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:18 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Tu-a gamlumna pen zawhna kikona aw ahi a, lelhna kikona aw ahi zongin, tua bang pawl hi lo hi. Ahih hangin tu-a ka zak pen lasakna awging ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:19 Giahphual nai ah amah tungin bawng no le lamna a muh phetin, Moses heh mahmah a, amah in ama khut sung panin suangpeekte lawn a, mual bulah tuate a sukham hi." 
Exodus32:20 Amah in amauteʼ bawl sa bawng no la-in mei tawh hal a, gawivui-in tui tungah theh a, Israel mite a tui dawnsak hi." 
Exodus32:21 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Amauteʼ tungah khialhna lianpi khat na tunpih nadingin hih mite in nangʼ tungah bang hong gen uh ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:22 Aaron in, “Ka topa aw, heh lua kei in. Miteʼ lungsim na theih sa ahih mah bangin amaute in siatna ngaihsun uh hi." 
Exodus32:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima kiangah, ‘Koteʼ mai ah a pai ding pasian hong bawlsak in. Egypt leitang panin eite hong paikhiatpih to Moses ahihleh, bang suak khin cih i thei kei hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Exodus32:24 Keimah in amaute kiangah, ‘Kham a nei peuhpeuh in sut khia un,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in keiʼ tungah hong pia uh a, keimah in mei sungah tuate ka lawn a, hih bawng no hong suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:25 Mite a tatkhialhna Moses in a muh ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Aaron in amauʼ maizum nadingin amauʼ galteʼ lakah amaute takhialsak hi)," 
Exodus32:26 giahphual kongpi sungah Moses dinga, “ Topaʼ lamah kua teng om na hi uh hiam? Keiʼ kiangah hong pai un,” a ci hi. Levi mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Exodus32:27 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel-teʼ Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘A milip in a namsau a pangah tawi-in kongpi khat pan kongpi khat, giahphual khempeuh ah pai kawikawi-in, a milip in a sanggampa, a milip in a kikholh pih pa, a milip in a veengpa that hen,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Exodus32:28 Mosesʼ thugen bangin Levi mite gamta uh a, tua ni-in mihing tul thum bang si hi." 
Exodus32:29 Moses in, “Noteʼ tungah thupha hong tun theih nadingin ama tapa le a sanggamte ciat supna thuakin Topaʼ na sep nading ah tu ni-in note na kikipsak tawm uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:30 A zingsang ciangin Moses in mite kiangah, “Note in khialhna lianpi khat na bawl khin uh hi. Tu-in Topaʼ kiangah kei ka pai dinga, noteʼ khialhna thu ah kilemna ka va bawl thei kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:31 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ kiangah Moses paikikin, “Ala! hih mite in khialhna lianpi khat bawl khin uh a, amaute in amau adingin kham pasian khat bawl khin uh hi." 
Exodus32:32 Ahih hangin nangmah in tu-in amauʼ khialhna maisak in. Na maisak kei ding leh, hong thum ing, nangma gelh sa laibu panin keimah hong phiat mai in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:33 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Keiʼ tungah hong khial peuhmah, ka laibu panin ka phiat ding hi." 
Exodus32:34 Ahih hangin tu-in pai in; nangʼ tunga kong gen sa munah mite paipih in. En in, na mai ah ka vantungmi pai ding hi. Ahi zongin ka thukkik ni ciangin amauʼ khialhna amauʼ tungah ka thuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus32:35 Amaute in Aaronʼ bawl sa bawng no bia uh ahih manin Topa in miteʼ tungah gimna a tungsak hi. 
Exodus33:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mun nusia un; Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding hi,’ ci-a ka ciam leitang ah nangmah le Egypt leitang panin na paikhiatpih toh mite tawh hih lai panin pai to un." 
Exodus33:2 Noteʼ mai ah vantungmi khat ka sawl dinga, Kanaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite ka hawl khia ding hi." 
Exodus33:3 Bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang ah pai to un. Ahi zongin note hong sisak kha ding ka hih ciangin noteʼ lakah kei kong pai to kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note mi lungkhauh na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:4 Mite in hih thusiate a zak uh ciangin amaute thuum uh a, kuamah kizem lo uh hi." 
Exodus33:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel miteʼ tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Note mi lungkhauh na hi uh hi. Noteʼ lakah tomno khat sung hong pai to leng, note kong beisak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin note kong bawl nading ka theih nadingin noteʼ tung panin na kizepnate uh suah khia un,’ ci in,” ci-in gen khinzo hi." 
Exodus33:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in Horeb Mual pan a kipanin amauʼ kizepnate suah khia uh hi. 
Exodus33:7 Israel mite in giahphual a sat simin Moses in puanbuk la-in giahphual panin a gamla pekah lam thei zel hi. Amah in tua pen kikhopna buk, ci hi. Topaʼ tungah thu a dong nuam mi peuhmah giahphual pualam a om kikhopna buk ah paikhia uh hi." 
Exodus33:8 Puanbuk ah Moses a pai peuhpeuh ciangin mi khempeuh ding to-in, a milipin a puanbuk kong ciat uh ah ding uh a, puanbuk sungah a tum khit mateng Mosesʼ nung en uh hi." 
Exodus33:9 Puanbuk ah Moses a tum ciangin meii khuam hong kum sukin puanbuk kongkhak ah dinga, Topa in Moses hopih hi." 
Exodus33:10 Puanbuk kongkhak ah meii khuam a ding a muh uh ciangin a milipin a puanbuk kong ciat uh ah mi khempeuh ding to-in kun uh hi. 
Exodus33:11 Tua bangin, mi khat in a lawmpa a hopih bangin maitang kituahin Topa in Moses hopih zel hi. Giahphual ah Moses a ciahkik ciangin, Nunʼ tapa, ama nasem tangval Joshua, puanbuk ah om lai hi." 
Exodus33:11 Tua bangin, mi khat in a lawmpa a hopih bangin maitang kituahin Topa in Moses hopih zel hi. Giahphual ah Moses a ciahkik ciangin, Nunʼ tapa, ama nasem tangval Joshua, puanbuk ah om lai hi." 
Exodus33:12 Moses in Topaʼ kiangah, “Thei in; nangmah in keima kiangah, ‘Hih mite paipih to in,’ nong ci hi. Ahih hangin kei tawh nong sawl khop ding mi kei nong theisak nai kei hi. Ahi zongin nangmah in, ‘Na minin nang kong thei a, ka mai ah maipha zong na mu khin hi,’ nong ci khin hi." 
Exodus33:13 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong thum hi; na muhna ah maipha ka ngah leh keimah in nang hong thei-in, na muhna ah maipha ka ngah theih nadingin tu-in nangma geelnate kei hong lak in. Hih minam pen nangma mite ahihna zong ngaihsun in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:14 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nang tawh kong pai dinga, lungsim tawlngakna hun nang kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:15 Moses in ama kiangah, “Nang nong paipih kei ding leh, hih lai panin kote hong paikhia tosak kei in." 
Exodus33:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah le nangma mite in nangma muhna ah maipha ka ngahna uh bangci-in kithei ding ahi hiam? Leitung a om mi khempeuh tungah keimah le nangma mite ka tungnunna uh pen kote tawh nang nong paikhopna hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Exodus33:17 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nangma gen sa hih thu mahmah keimah in ka hih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka muhna ah nang in maipha na ngah zo a, na minin nang kong thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:18 Moses in, “Kong thum hi; na vangliatna kei hong lak in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:19 Amah in, “Keima hoihna khempeuh na mai ah ka paisak dinga, na mai ah keima min, ‘ Topa ’ cihna ka pulak ding hi. Ka diknopna mite tungah ka dik dinga, ka hehpih nop mite ka hehpih ding hi." 
Exodus33:20 Ahih hangin nangmah in ka maitang na mu thei kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi in kei hong mu leh tua mi nungta lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus33:21 Tua banah Topa in, “En in; suang tungah na din nading keima kiangah mun khat om hi." 
Exodus33:22 Keima minthanna vang a pai laitakin suanghawm sungah nang kong koih dinga, kei ka paikhiat mateng ka khut tawh nang kong hum ding hi." 
Exodus33:23 Tua ciangin keimah in ka khut ka la khia ding hi. Nangmah in ka nung na mu dinga, ahih hangin ka maitang na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “A masa tawh a kibangin suangpeek nih sui in. Na suk khap a masa suangpeekte sunga om thute tuate tungah ka gelhkik ding hi." 
Exodus34:2 Kithawi-in Sinai Mual tungah zingsangin hong pai to inla, mual dawn tua munah keima kiangah hong kilak in." 
Exodus34:3 Nang tawh kuamah hong pai to khawmsak kei inla, mual tung tengah kuamah omsak kei in. Tua mual mai ah tuu hon ahi a, bawng hon ahi zongin gamtasak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:4 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a masa bangin suangpeek nih a sui hi. Zingsang ciangin amah tho baihin, Topa in amah a thupiak sa bangin Sinai Mual tungah pai to a, a khut sungah suangpeek nih a tawi hi." 
Exodus34:5 Meii sungah Topa kum sukin tua lai ah Moses tawh dinga, Topa in ama min a pulak hi." 
Exodus34:6 Ama mai ah Topa pai-in, “Topa, Topa, hehpihna nei-in a dik Pasian; lungduai-in itna kip le thutakna tawh a dim;" 
Exodus34:7 mi tul tampite adingin itna kip a nei; mawhna, thupalsatna le khialhna maisakin; ahih hangin bangbang hitaleh mawhna a khah khong ngei lo; pateʼ mawhna tateʼ tung le tuteʼ tung, khang thum khang lina dongin a thuk pa,” ci-in a pulak hi." 
Exodus34:8 Moses in leilak lamah a lu kunin a bia hi. 
Exodus34:9 Amah in, “Tu-in na muhna ah maipha ka muh leh, Topa aw, kong thum hi; lungkhauh mite ka hi ta uh zongin koteʼ kiangah Topa hong pai in. Koteʼ mawhna le koteʼ khialhna hong maisak inla, nangma mi dingin kote hong sang in,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, keimah in thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Nangma mi khempeuhʼ muhna ah, leitung khempeuh hitaleh minam khatpeuh sungah hitaleh cikmahin tua bang a kibawl ngei lo nalamdangte ka bawl dinga, noteʼ lakah a om mite khempeuh in Topaʼ nasepna mu ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ tungah kong bawl ding na pen a kihtakhuai thu ahi hi." 
Exodus34:11 “Tu ni-a kong thupiak zui in. En in, na mai ah Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite ka hawl khia ding hi." 
Exodus34:12 Na paina leitang ah a teeng mite tawh thuciamna bawl kha kei inla, tua pen note adingin thangzak a suahkhak loh nadingin nang mahmah kidawm in." 
Exodus34:13 Nangmah in amauʼ biakna taute phelin, amauʼ biakna khuamte kuaitanin, amauʼ Asherah milimte na phukpai ding hi." 
Exodus34:14 “(Pasian dang na bia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, ama min Aam ahi pa pen a aam Pasian ahi hi.)" 
Exodus34:15 Nangmah in tua leitang ah a teeng mite tawh thuciamna bawl kha kei in. Amaute in amauʼ pasian-te tawh paktatna bawlin amauʼ pasian-teʼ tungah biakna pia-in, khatpeuh in note hong sap ciangin, note in ama biakpiakna na ne kha ding uh a," 
Exodus34:16 note in amauʼ tanute na tapate uh adingin la-in, amauʼ pasian-te tawh paktatna a bawl a tanute in amauʼ pasian-te tawh na tapate uh paktatsak kha ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:17 “A kisung pasian-te note adingin bawlin na bia kei ding uh hi. 
Exodus34:18 “Silngo sawh loh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Abib kha, a kiseh sa hun sungteng, nang kong thupiak mah bangin ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abib kha sungin Egypt panin note na paikhia uh hi." 
Exodus34:19 “Mihing le ganhing tacil a pa khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. 
Exodus34:20 La a tacilte tuuno khat tawh na tanh ding uh hi. Na tat kei uh leh a ngawng na kuaitan ding uh hi. Na tapa cilte khempeuh uh na tanh ding uh hi. Keima mai ah a guakin kuamah hong kilak lo ding hi. 
Exodus34:21 “Ni guk sung na na sem ding uh a, ahi zongin a ni sagih ni-in na tawlnga ding uh hi. Lokhawh hun le anlak hun sungin zong na tawlnga ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:22 “Nipikalteʼ pawi, mangbuh a tung masa pawi le kum bei ciangin an kaihkhop pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:23 “Pasal khempeuh Israel Pasian, Topa Pasianʼ mai ah kum khatin thum vei kilak ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ mai ah minam dangte ka hawl khia dinga, na gamgite uh nomau adingin ka keek ding hi. Topa na Pasian uhʼ mai ah kum khatin thum vei a kilak dingin na pai toh sungun na leitang uh mi khat peuhpeuh in a hong deihgawh khak ding lunghihmawhna om lo ding hi." 
Exodus34:25 “Note in silngo tawh keimah biakpiakna si na pia khawm kei ding uh a, Paisan Pawi biakpiakna zong zingsang dong na omsak kei ding uh hi." 
Exodus34:26 “Note in na anpalte uh lakah a tung masa pen Topa na Pasian uhʼ inn ah na paipih ding uh hi. “Note in keel no a piʼ nawizu tawh na huan kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:27 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih thute gelh in. Hih thute tawh kizui-in nang le Israel tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus34:28 Tua lai ah sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung Topa tawh Moses om a, tua hun sungteng anletui a ne kei hi. Amah in suangpek tungah thuciamna kammalte ahi thupiak sawmte a gelh hi." 
Exodus34:29 A khut sungah thuciamna suangpek nih tawh Sinai Mual tung panin Moses hong pai suk ciangin, Pasian tawh amah kiho khin ahih manin a maitang vun a taan lamtak Moses in thei lo hi." 
Exodus34:30 Aaron le Israel mite khempeuh in Moses a muh ciangin, a maitang vun na taang a, ama mai ah a pai ding uh amaute lau uh hi." 
Exodus34:31 Ahih hangin amaute kiangah Moses pai hi. Aaron le mihon makaite khempeuh ama kiangah hong paikik uh a, Moses in amaute hopih hi." 
Exodus34:32 Tua khit ciangin Israel mi khempeuh a nai ah hong pai uh a, Topa in Sinai Mual ah ama tunga a gen khempeuh thupiakna-in amaute tungah a pia hi." 
Exodus34:33 Moses in amaute tawh thugen a man khit ciangin, amah in a maitang ah kiliahna puan khat a koih hi." 
Exodus34:34 Ahih hangin Topa tawh a kiho dingin ama mai ah Moses a tum peuhpeuh ciangin, amah a pusuahkik mateng a kiliahna puan la khia hi. Amah hong pai khia-in ama tungah a kipia thute Israel mite kiangah a gen ciangin," 
Exodus34:35 Israel mite in Mosesʼ maitang vun a taang mu uh hi. Amah tawh a kiho dingin a pai matengin Moses in kiliahna puan tawh a maitang a khuhkik hi. 
Exodus35:1 Moses in Israel mihonpi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Hihte pen noteʼ hih ding Topaʼ hong thupiak ahi hi." 
Exodus35:2 Ni guk sungin nasep kiman dinga, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni-in thupi a tawlngakna Sabbath siangtho Topaʼ tungah na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem peuhmah kithat ding hi." 
Exodus35:3 Sabbath ni-in na teenna khempeuh uh ah mei na cih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus35:4 Moses in Israel mihonpite khempeuh tungah, “ Topaʼ hong thupiak hih bang ahi hi:" 
Exodus35:5 Note in Topaʼ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. A pia nuam peuhmah in Topaʼ tungah biakna paipih un. Tuate in: Kham, ngun le sumngo," 
Exodus35:6 a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan hoihte, keel mul," 
Exodus35:7 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savunte; singkha sing," 
Exodus35:8 meivak ading sathau, nilh sathau le a paknamtui dingin a namtui nate," 
Exodus35:9 siampi puan le awmdal ah bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte ahi hi. 
Exodus35:10 “Noteʼ lak panin siamna a nei mi peuhmah hong paisak unla, Topaʼ thupiak sa khempeuh bawlsak un. Tua a bawl dingte pen biakbuk," 
Exodus35:11 a puanbuk le a khuhna, a vankhainate le a khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, a bullente;" 
Exodus35:12 singkuang a zawlte tawh, hehpihna tokhom le kongkhak dalna puan;" 
Exodus35:13 sabuai a zawlte le a nazatte khempeuh tawh, Ompihna Anlum;" 
Exodus35:14 khuavak dingin meivak khuam zong, a nazatte le a meivakte tawh, meivak dingin sathau;" 
Exodus35:15 paknamtui biakna tau, a zawlte tawh, nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui le biakbuk kongah kongkhak ading puankhai;" 
Exodus35:16 meihal biakna tau, a sumngo siklen, a zawlte, a nazatte khempeuh, kuang le a ngakna tawh;" 
Exodus35:17 buktual a a puankhaite, a khuampite le a bullente tawh, tual kongpi ading puankhai;" 
Exodus35:18 biakbuk khetphimte le huang khetphimte le a khaute; 
Exodus35:19 siangtho munah zat dingin limtakin a kigan puante, amauʼ siampi nasep nadingin siampi Aaron ading puan siangtho le ama tapateʼ puante ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus35:20 Tua ciangin Israel mihonpi khempeuh Mosesʼ omna panin paikhia uh hi. 
Exodus35:21 Piak nopna lungsim a nei mi peuhmah hong pai tawm uh a, kikhopna buk le a nasep nading khempeuh le puan siangthote a zat dingin Topa ading a piakte uh hong puak uh hi." 
Exodus35:22 Tua ahih ciangin numei, pasal hong pai uh hi. Piak nopna lungsim a neite khempeuh in tukkilhte, bilbahte, min gelhna zungbuhte le banbulhte ahi kham tawh a kibawl na namkim hong paipih uh a, a milip in Topaʼ tungah kham tawh piakna ap uh hi." 
Exodus35:23 A dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute, puan hoih, keel mul, a kisansak tuutal vunte, ahih kei leh savun hoihte ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah in tuate hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:24 Ngun ahi a, sumngo ahi zongin a pia thei peuhmah in Topaʼ tungah tua nate paipih uh a, nasep nadinga kimang thei ding singkha sing a nei mi peuhmah in zong hong paipih hi." 
Exodus35:25 A hih thei numei khempeuh in a khut uh tawh khau khuk uh a, amauʼ khuk sa a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk khaute hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:26 Hih theih siamna a nei numei khempeuh in zong keel mul khuk uh hi. 
Exodus35:27 Makaite in siampi puan le awmdal a bulh dingin onik suang le suang dangte," 
Exodus35:28 meivak ding, nilh sathau ding le paknamtui dingin a namtui nate le sathau hong paipih uh hi." 
Exodus35:29 Topa in Moses tunga a thupiak sa nasep nadingin na khat peuhpeuh a pia nuam numei pasal Israel mi khempeuh in utthu-a biakna-in Topaʼ tungah hong paipih uh hi. 
Exodus35:30 Moses in Israel mite kiangah, “Thei un; Topa in a minin Judah minam, Hurʼ tapa Uri, Uriʼ tapa Bezalel sam khin hi." 
Exodus35:31 Lim hoihte a geel ding; kham, ngun, sumngo tawh na a bawl ding; siamna nam khempeuh nasep nading, bulh ding suang seekna le singzep nasep a sem dingin amah in vangliatna, siamna, pilna, theihna le khutsiam nasep khempeuh tawh amah kidimsak hi." 
Exodus35:32  
Exodus35:33  
Exodus35:34 Topa in amah le Dan minam Ahisamakʼ tapa Oholiab tungah midangte hilh siamna pia khin hi. 
Exodus35:35 Amah in khutsiam nasep, geel siam nasep; a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk puan zep siam nasep; siamgat siamna le geel siam nasep ahi zongin nasep namkim a sem dingin amaute tungah siamna a guan hi." 
Exodus36:1 “Bezalel le Oholiab le biakbuk lamna ah nasep khat peuhpeuh sep nading zia a thei dingin Topa in siamna le pilna a guat mi peuhmah in Topaʼ thupiak sa khempeuh tawh kituakin sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus36:2 Moses in Bezalel le Oholiab le Topa in nasep siamna a guat mi, nasem a pai dingin a ut mi peuhmah a sam hi." 
Exodus36:3 Israel mite in biakbuk sep nadingin utthu-a a piak uh nate a paipih khempeuh uh amaute in Mosesʼ tung panin a sang uh hi. Amaute in zingsang simin utthu-a piakna ama tungah paipih uh ahih manin," 
Exodus36:4 biakbuk nasep a namkim a sem mi khempeuh amauʼ nasepna ciat panin hong pai uh a," 
Exodus36:5 Moses kiangah, “ Topa in eiteʼ sep dingin a hong sawl nasep nadingin a kicing ding zahval, mite in tampi hong paipih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Exodus36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in thu pia-in giahphual khempeuh ah thu kizasak a, “Numei hitaleh pasal hitaleh kuamah in biakbuk adingin pia thuah nawn kei un,” kici hi. Tua ahih ciangin a piak ding uh mite kikho hi." 
Exodus36:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ piak sa nate pen nasepna khempeuh hih nadingin kicing a, val zaw lai hi." 
Exodus36:8 Nasem miteʼ lak panin a hih thei mi khempeuh in puan dal sawm tawh biakbuk bawl uh hi. Tuate pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih le a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh kibawlin hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh zem uh hi." 
Exodus36:9 Tua puan a dung pi sawm li le nih, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, a puan khempeuh kikim hi." 
Exodus36:10 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khui tuahin, puan a dang ngate zong khatlekhat mah khuituah uh hi." 
Exodus36:11 Amaute in a kikhuituah masa puan a nawlnung penʼ nawl dungsuk ah khau dum tawh a bilvangte bawl uh a, tua mah bangin a kikhuituah nihna puan a nawlnungʼ pen nawl dungsuk ah zong tuate mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:12 Amaute in puan khat tungah bilvang sawm nga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna puan nawl ah bilvang sawm nga mah bawl uh a, a bilvangte khatlekhat kitang hi." 
Exodus36:13 Amaute in kham kilhna sawm nga bawlin, tua kilhnate tawh a puan khatlekhat kimatsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakbuk puan bup khat a suak hi." 
Exodus36:14 Amaute in biakbuk a tung khuh nadingin keel mul tawh puan dal sawm le khat a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:15 Tua puante a dung pi sawm li le nga, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, tua puan sawm le khatte kikim hi." 
Exodus36:16 Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khui tuahin, a puan dang gukte zong khatlekhat mah a khuituah uh hi." 
Exodus36:17 Amaute in a kikhuituah puan khat a nawlnung pen nawl ah a bilvang sawm nga bawlin, puan dal a zom nawl ah a bilvang sawm nga mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:18 Tuate bup khat a suah theih nading, puanbuk a kimatsak dingin amaute in kilhna sawm nga sumngo tawh a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:19 Amaute in puanbuk adingin a kisansak tuutal vunte le keel vunte tawh khuhna khat a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:20 Tua ciangin amaute in biakbuk adingin singkha sing tawh a po to khawm ding khuampeekte a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:21 A khuampeekte khat a tun pi sawm le pi nga hi a, a vai pi nih le letmat thum ciat ahi hi." 
Exodus36:22 A bulh nadingin khuampeek khat in zang nih ciat nei a, amaute in biakbuk khuam khempeuh adingin a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:23 Amaute in biakbuk adingin khuampeekte hih bangin bawl uh hi: Leitaw lam pang adingin khuam sawm nih; 
Exodus36:24 a khuampeek sawm nihteʼ bulah bullen sawm li ngun tawh, a zang nihte adingin khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih le a khuampeek dang khat bulah a zang nihte adingin bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:25 Biakbuk a pang nihna lam, leilu lam pang adingin amaute in khuampeek sawm nih" 
Exodus36:26 le ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawm li, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, a dang khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:27 Nitumna lam, biakbuk nung lam adingin amaute in khuampeek guk a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:28 Biakbuk nung lam kiute adingin a khuampeek nih zong a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus36:29 Tuate a bul lamah kikak a, ahih hangin a kual masa ah a dawn kimat hi. A kiu nihte adingin tua bangin nih a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:30 Ngun tawh kibawl amauʼ bullente tawh khuampeek giat om hi: Bullen sawm le guk om a, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih ciat a om hi." 
Exodus36:31 Amaute in singkha singzawl, biakbuk pang khat a khuampeekte adingin nga," 
Exodus36:32 biakbuk a pang lang khat a khuampeekte adingin zawl nga, nitumna lam biakbuk nung lam pang a khuampeekte adingin zawl nga mah a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus36:33 A khuampeekteʼ kimciang takah mong khat panin mong khat dongin a zawl laita paisuaksak uh hi. 
Exodus36:34 Amaute in kham tawh khuampeekte zutin, zawlte a len dingin kham tawh a kualte bawl uh a, kham tawh a zawlte a zut uh hi." 
Exodus36:35 Amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh dalna puan a bawl uh hi. Hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh amaute in tua dalna puan a zem uh hi." 
Exodus36:36 Tua puan adingin amaute in singkha khuampi li bawl uh a, kham tawh tua khuampite a zut uh hi. A vankhainate pen kham hi a, tua khuamte adingin ngun bullen li a sung uh hi." 
Exodus36:37 Amaute in puanbuk kongkhak-a dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh kong puankhai khat le," 
Exodus36:38 a khuampi ngate a vankhainate tawh a bawl uh hi. Amaute in tuateʼ luzepnate kham tawh zutin, a gaknate kham hi a, ahih hangin a bullen ngate pen sumngo ahi hi." 
Exodus37:1 Bezalel in singkha sing tawh singkuang bawl a, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum mah ahi hi." 
Exodus37:2 Kham citak tawh a sung le a pua zutin, a kimkot ah kham geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:3 A kiu lite adingin kham kual li, a pang khat ah kual nih, a pang lang khat adingin kual nih mah a sung hi." 
Exodus37:4 Singkha sing zawlte zong bawl a, kham tawh tuate zutin," 
Exodus37:5 singkuang puak nadingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte a khum hi. 
Exodus37:6 Kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat bawl a, a dung pi thum le letmat kua, a vai pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
Exodus37:7 Amah in sek tawh a kiseek kham tawh kherub nih, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:8 Kherub khat mong khat ah, kherub khat a mong lang khat ah om a, a mong nihte ah hehpihna tokhom tawh sakhatin kherub-te a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:9 Kherub-te in a khate uh tua tokhom tungah zalin, amauʼ khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh a, amaute khatlekhat kimaingat uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-teʼ mai a nga hi." 
Exodus37:10 Amah in singkha sing tawh sabuai zong bawl a, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat le alang, a sanna pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
Exodus37:11 Kham citak tawh zut a, a kimkot ah kham tawh a geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:12 Khut peek cia a pha zawl khat a kimkot ah bawl a, a zawl kimkot ah kham geihual khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:13 Tua sabuai adingin kham kual li sungin, a kiu li, a khe lite ah a kualte a gak hi." 
Exodus37:14 Sabuai puak nading zawlte a len dingin a zawl gei ah a kualte om hi. 
Exodus37:15 Sabuai puak nadingin singkha sing zawlte bawl a, kham tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus37:16 Amah in sabuai tunga om ding beellekuangte, paknamtui adingin kuangdaite le pakante, tuibuah nadingin kuang-ukte le thawl gongbakte, kham citak tawh a bawl hi." 
Exodus37:17 Amah in kham citak tawh meivak khuam zong a bawl hi. Meivak khuam a bul le a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl hi. A haite, a nunte le a paakte, meivak khuam tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:18 A pangte panin hiang guk meeng khia a, a pang khat ah meivak khuam hiang thum omin, a pang lang khat ah meivak khuam hiang thum mah a om hi." 
Exodus37:19 Hiang khat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum le a dang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun le a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin meivak khuam panin a hiang gukte a meeng khia ahi hi." 
Exodus37:20 A meivak khuam tung mahmah ah a nun le a pak tawh a om, almond gah bangin a kibawl hai li omin," 
Exodus37:21 meivak khuam panin hiang guk a kopteʼ bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om hi. 
Exodus37:22 Amauʼ nunte le a hiangte pen tua tawh sakhat hi a, a buppi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:23 A meivak sagihte le a taitehte le a kuangte kham citak a bawl ahi hi. 
Exodus37:24 Amah in kham citak tawi sawm nih le tawi khat a gik tawh tua meivak khuam le a nazatte khempeuh a bawl hi. 
Exodus37:25 Amah in singkha sing tawh paknamtui biakna tau bawl a, a dung pi khat le alang, a vai pi khat le alang mah ahi hi. Tua pen a ning kikim a, a sanna pi thum hi a, a kite pen tua biakna tau tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
Exodus37:26 Amah in a tungzang, a kimkot a a pangte le a kite kham citak tawh a zut hi. A kimkot ah kham geihual khat" 
Exodus37:27 le a puak nading zawlte a len dingin a pang tuak a geihual nuai tak ah kham kual nih a bawl hi. 
Exodus37:28 Amah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawlin, kham tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus37:29 Amah in paknamtui bawlteʼ gawm bangin a siangtho nilh sathau le a siangtho a namtui paknamtui zong a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:1 Amah in meihal biakna tau zong singkha sing tawh bawl a, a dung pi sagih le alang, a vai pi sagih le alang mah ahi hi. A ning kikim a, a sanna pi li le alang ahi hi." 
Exodus38:2 Amah in tua tau adingin a kiu lite ah a kite a bawl hi. A kite, a tau tawh sakhat hi a, sumngo tawh a zut hi." 
Exodus38:3 Biakna tau nazat khempeuh, beelte, kawbiate, kuangte, sikkate le vutluahna peekte a bawl hi. A nazat khempeuh sumngo tawh a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:4 Biakna tau adingin a zawl nuai ah, a kimciang a ban suk, a vang simsiam, sumngo siklen khat a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:5 A zawlte a len dingin sumngo siklen kiu liteʼ tung ading a kual li a sung hi. 
Exodus38:6 Singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawl a, sumngo tawh tuate a zut hi." 
Exodus38:7 A puak nadingin biakna tau pangte a om a kualte sungah a zawlte khum a, singpeekte tawh biakna tau a kuakin a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:8 Amah in kikhopna buk kongkhak ah na a sem numeiteʼ limlangte panin sumngo tawh kisilna kuang le a ngakna a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:9 Amah in buktual a bawl hi. Leitaw lam pang buktual a puan kikhaite pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih hi a, pi za le pi sawm nga a sau hi." 
Exodus38:10 A khuampite sawm nih hi a, a bullente zong sawm nih mah ahi hi. Sumngo tawh kibawl a, ahih hangin a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi." 
Exodus38:11 Leilu lam pang ading zong tua bangmah ahi hi. 
Exodus38:12 Nitumna lam pang adingin puan kikhai sukte pi sawm sagih le pi nga hi a, a khuampite sawm hi-in, a bullente sawm mah hi a, a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi." 
Exodus38:13 A mailam, nisuahna lam adingin pi sawm sagih le pi nga mah ahi hi." 
Exodus38:14 Kongpi pang khat ading puan kikhai sukte pen pi sawm nih le nih le alang hi a, khuampi thum le bullen thum tawh ahi hi." 
Exodus38:15 A pang lang khat ading zong tua bangmah ahi hi. Buktual kongpi hih lam le hua lamah khuampi thum le bullen thum tawh a puan khai sukte pi sawm nih le nih le alang ahi hi. 
Exodus38:16 Buktual kimkot a puan kikhai sukte khempeuh pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih ahi hi. 
Exodus38:17 Khuampite ading a bullente pen sumngo hi a, ahih hangin a vankhainate le a gaknate ngun ahi hi. A khuamluzepnate a kizutna zong ngun hi a, buktual a khuamte khempeuh ngun kibawl gakna tawh kigak hi." 
Exodus38:18 Buktual kongpi puankhai pen a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem ahi hi. Buktual a kikhai sukte tawh kizui-in pi sawm thum sau-in, a vailam pi sagih le alang sang hi." 
Exodus38:19 A khuampite li hi a, a bullen lite sumngo hi a, a vankhainate ngun hi a, a khuamluzepnate le a gaknate a kizutna ngun mah ahi hi." 
Exodus38:20 Biakbuk le buktual kimkot ading khetphimte khempeuh sumngo ahi hi. 
Exodus38:21 Hihte pen siampi Aaronʼ tapa Ithamarʼ vaihawmna nuai ah Levi miteʼ sep ding Topaʼ omna ahi biakbuk adingin Mosesʼ thupiakna tawh a kisim van malte ahi hi. 
Exodus38:22 Judah minam Hurʼ tapa ahi Uriʼ tapa Bezalel in Topa in Moses a thupiak khempeuh a bawl hi. 
Exodus38:23 A khut siam, a geel siam, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte a zem, Dan minam, Ahisamakʼ tapa Oholiab in zong amah a huh hi." 
Exodus38:24 Nasep nadinga a kizang kham khempeuh, biakbuk lamna-a a kizang, a kipia khamte, biakinn shekel-in talen sawm nih le kua le shekel za sagih sawm thum ahi hi." 
Exodus38:25 Mi simna sungah a kihel mihonte tung panin a kingah ngunte, biakinn shekel-in talen za khat le shekel tul khat za sagih sawm sagih le nga ahi hi." 
Exodus38:26 Mi khat ciangin beka khat (biakinn shekel-in shekel lang) pai pia a, a pia mi, kum sawm nih a pha panin a tungsiah mi kisimna a a kisim peuhmah tul za guk le tul thum le za nga le sawm nga ahi hi." 
Exodus38:27 Ngun talen za khatte pen biakbuk khuam bullente le dalna puan khuam bullente dingin sunʼ ding ahi hi. Talen za khatte bullen za khat, bullen khat ciangin talen khat ahi hi." 
Exodus38:28 Amah in shekel tul khat za sagih sawm sagih le nga pen khuampi tunga vankhai nadingin bawl a, a khuamluzepnate zutin tuate ading gakna a bawl hi." 
Exodus38:29 A kipia sumngo khempeuh, talen sawm sagih le shekel tul nih le za li ahi hi." 
Exodus38:30 Amah in tua tawh kikhopna buk kongkhakte adingin khuam bullente, sumngo biakna tau le a sumngo siklen le biakna tau nazat khempeuh," 
Exodus38:31 buktual kimkot a khuam bullente, buktual kongpi khuam bullente, biakbuk khetphimte khempeuh le buktual kimkot a khetphim khempeuh a bawl hi."
