Exodus39:1 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, siangtho munah nasep nadingin amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh limtakin a kigan puan a bawl uh hi. Amaute in Aaron adingin biakna puan siangtho a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:2 Amaute in siampi puan pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:3 Hoihtakin a kigeel, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte ah zat dingin kham peek kiseekin khau-in kizen hi." 
Exodus39:4 Amaute in siampi puan adingin liangkaih puan bawl uh a, a mong nih tegel ah zom uh hi." 
Exodus39:5 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amah a gak dingin hoihtakin a kigan tua tunga puan om pen kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh kibawlin, a nate le a sepna zia a kibang ahi hi." 
Exodus39:6 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kizui-in, onik suangte kitat a, kham tawh a kizepna sungah a minte kigelhin, min gelh siamteʼ gelh bangin kibawl hi." 
Exodus39:7 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin Israel tapate phawkna suang dingin siampi puanʼ liangkaih puan tungah a bulh uh hi. 
Exodus39:8 Amaute in kham, a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh, siampi puan a kibawl puan bangin hoihtakin awmdal a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:9 Tua awmdal a ning kikim a, thuap nihin kibawl a, a kikhep ciangin a dung letmat kua, a vai letmat kua mah a pha hi." 
Exodus39:10 Amaute in tua sungah suang gual li bulh uh a, Sardis suang, topaz suang le karbankal suang gual khat pen a gual masa ahi hi." 
Exodus39:11 A gual nihna ah emerald suang, sapfaia suang le diamond suang ahi hi." 
Exodus39:12 A gual thumna ah jakinth suang, agate suang le amethyst suang ahi hi." 
Exodus39:13 A gual lina ah beryl suang, onik suang le jasper suang ahi hi. Kham tawh zepna sungah tua suangte khempeuh kikoih hi." 
Exodus39:14 Israel tapate a phazah tawh kituakin amauteʼ min a kigelhna suang sawm le nih om hi. Tua min gelhnate pen minam sawm le nih a huamin a kigelh ahi hi. 
Exodus39:15 Amaute in awmdal tungah khau tawh a kibang, a kihual kham citak khainiang a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:16 Kham tawh a kibawl zepna nih le kham kual nih bawl uh a, awmdal mong nihte ah kham kual nihte a koih uh hi." 
Exodus39:17 Amaute in awmdal mongte ah a om kual nihte pen kham khau nihte tawh a khih uh hi. 
Exodus39:18 Amaute in zepna nihte tungah khau mong nihte zom uh a, tua bangin amaute in siampi puanʼ liangkaih puan tunga mai lamah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:19 Tua ciangin amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampi puan tawh a kizom a sung lam nawl, awmdal mong nihte ah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:20 Amaute in kham kual nih bawl uh a, siampi puanʼ liangkaih puan nihteʼ nuai a mailam, hoihtakin a kigan siampi puanteʼ puan khau a kizopna tung tak ah a bulh uh hi." 
Exodus39:21 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, hoihtakin a kigan siampi puan khau tungah a om theih nading le siampi puan tung panin awmdal a kol theih loh nadingin amaute in siampi puanʼ kualte ah khau dum khatin a kualte tawh awmdal a gak uh hi." 
Exodus39:22 Amaute in khau dum bek tawh a kigan siampi puan tualpi zong a bawl uh hi. 
Exodus39:23 A kikeek loh nadingin puan tualpi ngawng pen puan ngawng vang bangin a ngawng kimkot ah a zimna om hi. 
Exodus39:24 Puan tualpi mongte ah amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul khaute le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh mang kawlsing gahte a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:25 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amaute in kham citak siklongte zong bawl uh a, puan tualpi mong kimkot tunga mang kawlsing gahteʼ kikalah siklongte a koih uh hi." 
Exodus39:26 Biak nasep nadinga puan tualpi mong kimkot tungah siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, siklong khat, mang kawlsing gah khat, cih bangin kihelh hi." 
Exodus39:27 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amaute in Aaron le a tapate adingin khau hoih tawh a kigan puan tungsilhte" 
Exodus39:28 le khau hoih tawh a kigan dialpi le khau hoih tawh a kigan lukhute, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl pheituam hoihte," 
Exodus39:29 le a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoihte tawh a kibawl puan kawnggak le phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem a dum, a dupsan, a ausan tuumul puante zong a bawl uh hi." 
Exodus39:30 Amaute in kham citak tawh a siangtho kizepna peek khat bawl uh a, min gelhna a kibawl mah bangin tua tungah thu gelhin, “ Topaʼ tungah siangtho,” ci uh hi." 
Exodus39:31 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amaute in a tunga dialpi tungah a gak dingin tua tungah khau dum khat a vawh uh hi." 
Exodus39:32 Tua bangin kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasep khempeuh kiman hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak sa khempeuh bangin Israel mite in sem khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute man khin uh hi. 
Exodus39:33 Amaute in biakbuk, a puanbuk le a nazat khempeuh, a vankhainate, khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite le a bullente;" 
Exodus39:34 a kisansak tuutal vunte le savun dangte tawh a kibawl khuhna le kong puankhai dalna puan; 
Exodus39:35 thuciamna singkuang, a zawlte le hehpihna tokhom tawh;" 
Exodus39:36 sabuai le a nazat khempeuhte le Ompihna Anlum; 
Exodus39:37 kham citak meivak khuam le meivak a kibulh sa tawh a meivakte le a nazatte khempeuh le meivak ading sathau; 
Exodus39:38 kham biakna tau, nilh sathau le a namtui paknamtui le puanbuk kongkhak ading kong puankhai;" 
Exodus39:39 sumngo biakna tau le a sumngo siklen, a zawlte le a nazat khempeuh; kisilna kuang le a ngakna;" 
Exodus39:40 buktual a puan kikhaite, a khuampite, a bullente le buktual kongpi ading kong puankhai, a khaute le a khetphimte; le kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk nasepna ah a nazat khempeuh;" 
Exodus39:41 siampi nasep nadingin siangtho mun a zat ding hoihtakin a kibawl puante, siampi Aaron ading biakna puan siangthote le ama tapateʼ puante, Moses kiangah a paipih uh hi." 
Exodus39:42 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa khempeuh tawh kituakin Israel mite in nasep khempeuh hih uh hi. 
Exodus39:43 Moses in nasep khempeuh vel a, amaute in Topaʼ thupiak sa bangin a bawl khitna a mu hi. Tua ciangin Moses in amaute thupha a pia hi." 
Exodus40:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Exodus40:2 “Kha masa a ni masa ni-in nangmah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk na lam ding hi. 
Exodus40:3 Tua buk sungah thuciamna singkuang na koih dinga, dalna puan tawh singkuang na dal ding hi." 
Exodus40:4 Tua ciangin sabuai tum pihin a om ding bangin na koih ding hi. Meivak khuam zong tum pihin a meivakte na bulh ding hi. 
Exodus40:5 Thuciamna singkuang mai ah paknamtui hal nadingin kham biakna tau na koih dinga, biakbuk kongkhak dingin kong puankhai na khai ding hi." 
Exodus40:6 Kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhak mai ah meihal biakna tau koihin," 
Exodus40:7 kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang na koih dinga, a sungah tui zong na koih ding hi." 
Exodus40:8 A kimkot ah buktual na bawl dinga, buktual kongpi dingin kong puankhai na khai to ding hi." 
Exodus40:9 “Tua ciangin sathau la-in, biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh na nuh dinga, biakbuk le a inn sung van khempeuh na ap ding hi. Tua ciangin a siangtho biakna van a suak ding hi." 
Exodus40:10 Nangmah in meihal biakna tau le a nazat khempeuh zong sathau nuhin biakna tau na ap dinga, tua biakna tau a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Exodus40:11 Kisilna kuang le a ngakna zong sathau nuhin na ap ding hi. 
Exodus40:12 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk kongkhak ah Aaron le ama tapate paipihin, tui tawh amaute na sil dinga," 
Exodus40:13 amah in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingin puan siangthote Aaron silhsakin, amah sathau nilhin na ap ding hi." 
Exodus40:14 Tua ciangin ama tapate zong paipihin puan tungsilhte na silhsak dinga," 
Exodus40:15 amaute in keima tungah siampi na a sep theih nadingun amauteʼ pa sathau na nilh bangin amaute zong sathau na nilh ding hi. Amauʼ sathau kinilhna in amauʼ khang tawntungin siampi hi paisuaksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Exodus40:16 Moses in zong Topa in amah a thupiak sa khempeuh tawh kituakin a hih hi. 
Exodus40:17 A kum nihna a kha masa, a ni masa ni-in biakbuk kilam hi." 
Exodus40:18 Moses in biakbuk lam hi. Amah in a bullente koihin, a khuampeekte phut a, a zawlte khumin, a khuampite a phut hi." 
Exodus40:19 Biakbuk tungah a tungkhuhna zal a, Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin puanbuk a tung a khuh hi." 
Exodus40:20 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin amah in thuciamna suangpek la-in singkuang sungah koih a, singkuang tungah a zawlte koihin, singkuang tung sanah hehpihna tokhom a nga hi." 
Exodus40:21 Biakbuk sungah singkuang paipihin, kong puankhai dalna puan khai a, thuciamna singkuang a dal hi." 
Exodus40:22 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amah in biakbuk leilu lam pang, dalna puan pualam, kikhopna buk sungah sabuai koih a," 
Exodus40:23 Topaʼ mai tua sabuai tungah a om ding bangin anlum a koih hi. 
Exodus40:24 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amah in biakbuk leitaw lam pang, sabuai tawh a kigalsai-in, kikhopna buk sungah meivak khuam koih a," 
Exodus40:25 Topaʼ mai ah meivakte a koih hi. 
Exodus40:26 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, amah in kikhopna buk sung, dalna puan mai ah kham biakna tau koih a," 
Exodus40:27 tua tungah a namtui paknamtui a hal hi. 
Exodus40:28 Amah in biakbuk kongkhak ding kong puankhai a mun dingah a khai hi. 
Exodus40:29 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin amah in kikhopna buk ahi biakbuk kongkhak ah meihal biakna tau koih a, tua tungah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna a pia hi." 
Exodus40:30 Kikhopna buk le biakna tau kikalah kisilna kuang koih a, tua sungah kisil nading tui zong a koih hi." 
Exodus40:31 Moses le Aaron le a tapate in amauʼ khut le a khete uh tua tui tawh a sil uh hi. 
Exodus40:32 Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin, kikhopna buk ah amaute a pai ciang le biakna tau nai ah a pai uh ciangin amaute kisil uh hi." 
Exodus40:33 Amah in biakbuk le biakna tau kiimah a buktual bawl a, buktual kongpi kong puankhai a khai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in a nasep a man ta hi." 
Exodus40:34 Tua ciangin meii in kikhopna buk tuam a, biakbuk sungah Topaʼ minthanna vang a dim hi." 
Exodus40:35 Tua ahih manin kikhopna buk sungah Moses tum thei lo hi. 
Exodus40:36 A khualzin sung tawntung uh biakbuk tung panin meii a kilakkhiat toh peuhpeuh ciangin Israel mite mailam nawtin pai uh a," 
Exodus40:37 ahih hangin meii a kilakkhiat kei leh a kilakkhiat ni mateng amaute paikhia lo uh hi. 
Exodus40:38 Bang hang hiam cih leh a khualzin sung tawntung uh Israel mi khempeuhʼ muhna ah biakbuk tungah sunin Topaʼ meii om a, zanin mei a om hi." 
Leviticus1:1 Topa in Moses sam a, kikhopna buk panin amah hopihin hih bangin ci hi:" 
Leviticus1:2 “Israel mite tungah gen inla, amaute tungah hih bangin ci in: Note khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah biakna na paipih uh ciangin, ganhing tawh na biakna pen bawng hon panin hitaleh tuu hon panin hitaleh na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus1:3 “Ama biakna pen bawng hon panin meihal biakna ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo a pa khat pia dinga, Topaʼ mai ah a kisan theih nadingin kikhopna buk kongah pia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:4 Amah in meihal biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga dinga, ama adingin kilemna bawl nadingin kisang ding hi." 
Leviticus1:5 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ mai ah a bawngtal go ding hi. Aaronʼ suan siampite in a si hong paipihin, kikhopna buk kong a biakna tau kimkot ah a si theh ding hi." 
Leviticus1:6 Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna ganhing a vun hawkin semnen dinga," 
Leviticus1:7 Aaronʼ suan siampite in biakna tau tungah mei koihin, mei tungah a ngeina bangin sing koih ding hi." 
Leviticus1:8 Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite in a sanente, a lutang le a thaute, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin koih dinga," 
Leviticus1:9 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh sil ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tawh kihal biakna, Topa adingin a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah a vekpi-in hal ding hi." 
Leviticus1:10 “Meihal biak nadingin ama letsong pen tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh a hon lak panin ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo a pa khat pia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:11 Amah in Topaʼ mai biakna tau tung leilu lam pangah go dinga, Aaronʼ suan siampite in biakna tau tung kimkot ah a si theh ding hi." 
Leviticus1:12 Tua ciangin amah in semnen dinga, biakna tau tunga om mei tunga sing tungah a ngeina bangin siampipa in a lutang le a thau tawh koih khawm dinga," 
Leviticus1:13 ahih hangin a sungkuate le a khete amah in tui tawh sil ding hi. Siampipa in a vekpi-in pia-in, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa adingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus1:14 “ Topaʼ tungah ama biakna pen vasa tawh meihal biakna ahihleh, amah in vakhu tawh ahi zongin, kawl vakhu no tawh ahi zongin, a biakna hong paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus1:15 Tua ciangin siampipa in biakna tau ah paipihin a lu heek tat dinga, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Biakna tau pangah a si taak khiasak ding hi." 
Leviticus1:16 Amah in a tangkhai le a multe bot khia-in, vut koihna, biakna tau pang nisuahna lamah lawn khia ding hi." 
Leviticus1:17 Amah in a khate-in bal kek dinga, ahih hangin bal tat lo ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in mei tunga om sing tung, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen Topa adingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus2:1 “Mi khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah an tawh biakna hong paipih leh, ama biakpiakna pen annel hi ding hi. Amah in tua annel tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui koihin," 
Leviticus2:2 tua ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in annel khut dim le sathau, a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la dinga, siampipa in hih pen Topa adingin a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus2:3 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron le a tapate ading hi ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:4 “Nangmah in biak nadingin meibung sunga ki-em an tawh biakna na paipih ciangin, silngo sawh loh, sathau tawh a kizut mohpheng hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:5 “Na biakna pen beelpei daii tunga ki-em an tawh biakna ahihleh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:6 Balnenin a tungah sathau na sung ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:7 “Na biakna pen sikbeel daii sunga kihuan an tawh biakna ahihleh, sathau tawh a kibawl annel hi ding hi." 
Leviticus2:8 Nangmah in hih nate tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna, Topaʼ kiangah na paipih dinga, siampipa kiangah a kipaipih ciangin amah in biakna tau ah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus2:9 Siampipa in an tawh biakna panin a phawkna biakna teng la-in, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus2:10 An tawh biakna a val teng pen Aaron le a tapate ading hi ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna sung panin a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus2:11 “ Topaʼ tungah na paipih an tawh biakna pen silngo tawh kibawl lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh silngo hitaleh khuaizu hitaleh khat peuhpeuh Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in na hal kei ding hi. 
Leviticus2:12 Anpal tawh biakna ahihleh Topaʼ kiangah na paipih thei ding hi. Ahih hangin a gim namtui dingin biakna tau tungah kipia lo ding hi. 
Leviticus2:13 An tawh na biaknate khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi. An tawh na biakna ah na Pasian tawh na thuciamna ci sawh loin na om kei dinga, na biakna khempeuh ci na sawh ding hi." 
Leviticus2:14 “Anpal tawh Topaʼ tungah biakna na piak leh, anpal tawh na biak nadingin a vui thak panin kila-in a kigawi vui, mei ah a kihangkeu na pia ding hi." 
Leviticus2:15 Nang in a tungah sathau sungin, paknamtui na buak ding hi. Tua pen an tawh biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus2:16 Siampipa in phawk nadingin a kigawi vui an pawl khat, a sathau le a paknamtui khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus3:1 “Mi khatʼ biakna pen thunuam a biakna ahih a, amah in a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh bawng hon lak panin a piak leh, amah in Topaʼ mai ah a sitbaang lo pia ding hi." 
Leviticus3:2 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk kongah go dinga, tua ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:3 Thunuam a biakna panin Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna-in a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuateʼ tunga a om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau le a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:5 Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in mei tunga om sing tunga meihal biakpiakna tau tung mahah hal ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa adingin a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus3:6 “ Topaʼ tungah thunuam a a piak ding ama biakna pen tuu le keel honte sung panin a nu hitaleh a pa hitaleh ganhing khat ahihleh, amah in a sitbaang lo pia ding hi." 
Leviticus3:7 Amah in biak nadingin tuuno khat a piak leh, Topaʼ mai ah pia dinga," 
Leviticus3:8 a biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:9 Tua ciangin thunuam a biakna panin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in a thau, a nung guh ciangah a ki-attan a mei thau buppi le a gilpi tuam a thaute le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:10 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:11 Tua ciangin siampipa in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. 
Leviticus3:12 “Ama biakna keel ahihleh, amah in Topaʼ mai ah pia dinga," 
Leviticus3:13 a lu tungah a khut nga-in kikhopna buk mai ah go ding hi. Tua ciangin Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau kimkot tungah a si theh ding uh hi. 
Leviticus3:14 Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in piak dingin a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus3:15 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus3:16 Tua ciangin siampipa in a gim namtui dingin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. A thau khempeuh Topa -aʼ ahi hi. 
Leviticus3:17 Tua pen na khang tawntungun na teenna khempeuh uh ah note in a thau le sisan na nek loh nadingun a tawntungin ngeina kip hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus4:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih lo ding ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin khial a, tuate khatpeuh a hih khak leh," 
Leviticus4:3 a khial pa pen sathau a kinilh siampipa ahih a, mite tungah tua bangin mawhna hong tut leh, ama gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin a sitbaang lo bawngtalno khat Topaʼ mai ah khialhna hanga biakna-in amah piasak un." 
Leviticus4:4 Amah in Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk kongah a bawngtal paipihin, bawngtal lu tungah a khut nga dinga, Topaʼ mai ah a bawngtal go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:5 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in a bawngtal si tawm khat la-in, kikhopna buk ah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus4:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in a si sungah a khutme diahin, biakbuk dalna puan mai Topaʼ mai ah a si kim khat sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus4:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in kikhopna buk sung Topaʼ mai-a om paknamtui biakna tau kite a si kim khat nuhin, kikhopna buk kongah a om meihal biakna tau bulah bawngtal si a om lai teng sung khia ding hi." 
Leviticus4:8 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal thau khempeuh a gilpi tuam a thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh tawh," 
Leviticus4:9 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding a sintuamte" 
Leviticus4:10 (thunuam a biakna bawngtal panin hihte a kilak mah bangin) la dinga, siampipa in meihal biakna tau tungah tuate hal ding hi." 
Leviticus4:11 Ahih hangin bawngtal vun le a sa khempeuh, a lutang, a khete, a sungkuate le a ek tawh," 
Leviticus4:12 a bawngtal buppi pua khia-in vut kibuakna, giahphual pualam mun siangtho khat ah sing a kicih mei tungah amah in hal dinga, vut a kibuakna munah kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus4:13 “Israel mihonte khempeuh in theih lohna hangin khialhna khat gamta-in tua pen mihonte in a phawk kei a, hih lo ding, ci-in Topa in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh amaute in hihin a mawh uh leh," 
Leviticus4:14 amauʼ gamtatna sa khialhna a kitheih ciangin, khialhna hanga biak nadingin mihonte in bawngtalno khat pia-in kikhopna buk mai ah paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus4:15 Tua ciangin mihonteʼ upate in Topaʼ mai, bawngtal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga ding uh a, Topaʼ mai ah tua bawngtal kigo ding hi." 
Leviticus4:16 Tua ciangin sathau a kinilh siampipa in kikhopna buk ah bawngtal si kim khat paipih dinga," 
Leviticus4:17 a si sungah a khutme diahin dalna puan mai Topaʼ mai ah sagih vei theh ding hi. 
Leviticus4:18 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk sunga om biakna tau kite tungah a si kim khat zut dinga, kikhopna buk kongah a om biakna tau bulah si a om lai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a thau khempeuh la-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. 
Leviticus4:20 Tua bangin a bawngtal hih ding hi. Amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal a hih sa mah bangin hih zong hih ding hi. Siampipa in amau aʼ dingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amaute kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:21 Amah in giahphual pua ah bawngtal pua khia dinga, a masa bawngtal a hal mah bangin a hal ding hi. Tua pen mihonpi adingin khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:22 “Ukpa khat khialin, hih lo ding, ci-in Topa ama Pasian in a thupiakte khempeuh lakah khat peuhpeuh theih lohna hangin hih kha-in a mawh ciangin," 
Leviticus4:23 ama gamtatna sa khialhna ama tungah a va kihilh leh, amah in biakna-in a sitbaang lo keel pa khat paipih dinga," 
Leviticus4:24 keel lu tungah a khut nga-in, Topaʼ mai, meihal biakna a kigawh nading munah go ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus4:25 Tua ciangin siampipa in a khutme tawh khialhna hanga biakna si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuhin meihal biakna tau bulah a si om lai teng sung ding hi. 
Leviticus4:26 Thunuam a biakna sathaute mah bangin amah in biakna tau tungah a thau khempeuh hal ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in ama khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:27 “Hih lo ding, ci-in Topaʼ thupiakte khat peuhpeuh mi mawkmawk khat in theih lohna hangin hihin a khialh a, a mawh leh," 
Leviticus4:28 ama gamtatna sa a khialhna ama tungah a kihilh ciangin amah in a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin biak nading a sitbaang lo keel a nu khat paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus4:29 Amah in a khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna munah khialhna hanga biakna gan go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:30 Siampipa in a khutme tawh si tawm la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh dinga, biakna tau bulah si a om lai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:31 Thunuam a biakna panin a thaute a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh la khia dinga, Topa ading a gim namtui dingin siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus4:32 “Amah in khialhna hanga biakna-in a piak dingin tuuno khat a paipih leh, a sitbaang lo a nu khat hi dinga," 
Leviticus4:33 khialhna hanga biakna ganhing lu tungah a khut nga-in, meihal biakna a kigawhna munah khialhna hanga biak nadingin go ding hi." 
Leviticus4:34 Tua ciangin siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna si tawm khat a khutme tawh la-in meihal biakna tau kite nuh dinga, biakna tau bulah a si om lai teng sung ding hi." 
Leviticus4:35 Thunuam a biakpiakna panin tuuno thau a kilakkhiat mah bangin amah in a thau khempeuh la khia dinga, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah siampipa in hal ding hi. Siampipa in ama gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:1 “Mi khatpeuh teci pang dingin a kisap ciangin a muh sa a theih sa thute gen loin a ip leh, amah in tua mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus5:2 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in gamlak ganhing nin a si sa hitaleh inn ganhing nin a si sa hitaleh a bokvak a nin ganhing a si sa hitaleh, a muh lohin a nin khat peuhpeuh lawng kha-in amah a nin a suah leh, a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:3 “Tua ahih kei leh amah in mihing nitna hitaleh, mu loin a lawnkhak leh, a theih ciangin a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:4 “Tua ahih kei leh mi khatpeuh in a sia bawl ding hitaleh a pha bawl ding hitaleh mite a kiciam theih ngei kiciamna nam khat peuhpeuh ama kam tawh a theih lohin a kiciam pak khak leh, a theih ciangin hihte khat peuhpeuh ah a mawh hi ding hi." 
Leviticus5:5 “Hihte khat peuhpeuh ah mi khat a mawh ciangin, amah in a gamtatna sa a khialhna pulak dinga," 
Leviticus5:6 mawhna hanga biakna-in tuu hon pan ahi a, keel hon pan ahi zongin a nu khat peuhpeuh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh, a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin Topaʼ tungah biakna paipih dinga, siampipa in a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:7 “Ahih hangin amah in tuuno khat a piak zawh kei leh a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin Topaʼ tungah biakna-in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhu no nih ahi zongin, khat khialhna hanga biakna, a khat meihal biak nadingin paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus5:8 Amah in siampipa tungah tuate paipih dinga, siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nading pen pia masa ding hi. Amah in a ngawng panin a lu heek dinga, ahih hangin heek sat lo ding hi." 
Leviticus5:9 Amah in khialhna hanga biakna si tawm khat biakna tau pangah theh dinga, biakna tau bulah a si om lai teng taaksak ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:10 Tua ciangin amah in ngeina kip om bangin meihal biak nadingin a khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:11 “Ahih hangin amah in vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhu no nih ahi zongin a piak zawh kei leh, amah in a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin a biakna-in annel lawh khat, khialhna hanga biak nadingin paipih ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahih manin amah in tua sungah sathau khah lo dinga, paknamtui zong hel lo ding hi." 
Leviticus5:12 Amah in siampipa kiangah paipih dinga, siampipa in phawkna-in khut dim khat la-in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, biakna tau tungah hal ding hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:13 Tua bangin siampipa in hihte khat peuhpeuh a gamtatna sa a khialhna hangin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi. An tawh biakna-a mah bangin a om lai teng siampipa ading ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus5:14 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus5:15 “Mi khatpeuh in theih lohna hangin thu palsatin Topaʼ na a siangtho khat peuhpeuh ah a khialh leh, a mawhna hanga biakna-in tuu hon sung panin a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel-in nangmah in a man sehin, amah in Topaʼ kiangah paipih ding hi. Tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus5:16 Amah in a siangtho na a hih khialhna ah lohkikna zong bawl dinga, seh nga ah khat gawm behin siampipa tungah pia ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh ama adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:17 “Hih lo ding, ci-in Topaʼ thupiakte khat peuhpeuh, mi khatpeuh in hihin a khialh leh, a theih lohna hang hitaleh zong, amah a mawh hi veve-in, ama mawhna mah pua ding hi." 
Leviticus5:18 Tuu hon lak pan a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, a manzah ding nangmah in seh inla, amah in mawhna hanga biak nadingin siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi. Theih lohna hanga ama gamtatna sa khialhna hangin siampipa in ama ading kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus5:19 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah khial ahih manin mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:2 “Mi khatpeuh khialin, Topaʼ thu palsatin, na kepsakna thu ah ahi zongin, khapna nateʼ thu ah ahi zongin a veengpa khemin, ahih kei leh a na sutin, a veengpa nengniamin," 
Leviticus6:3 tua ahih kei leh a mang na khat mu-in tua thu ah zuau-in a man loin kiciam a, mite a khialh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuh ah" 
Leviticus6:4 khialin a mawh ciangin amah in a suhte hitaleh, a netniamna tawh a ngahte hitaleh, amah a kikemsak na hitaleh, a mang na a muh hitaleh," 
Leviticus6:5 a man loin a kiciamnasa na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh loh ding hi. Amah in a cingin lohin seh nga ah khat piak beh dinga, a mawhna hanga biakna a piak ni-in a nei pa tungah pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:6 Tua ciangin a mawhna hanga a biak nading, tuu hon lak pan a sitbaang lo tuutal khat, Topaʼ tungah a piak ding, a man ding nangma sehzah, amah in siampipa kiangah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus6:7 Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah ama ading kilemna bawlsak dinga, mi khat a mawh theih ngeina khat peuhpeuhte ah amah kimaisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:8 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:9 “Aaron le a tapate thu pia inla, hih bangin ci in: Hih pen meihal biakna ngeina ahi hi. Meihal biakna pen biakna tau tunga meikhuk tungah zingsang mateng zan tawntung om dinga, tua biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak den ding hi." 
Leviticus6:10 Siampipa in a saihadial puan silhin, a saihadial pheituam teengin, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna mei in a kattum vutte la-in biakna tau pangah koih ding hi." 
Leviticus6:11 Tua ciangin amah in a puante suahin puan dang silh dinga, giahphual pualam a siangtho mun khat ah a vutte pua khia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:12 Biakna tau tunga mei kikuangsak den dinga, kimitsak lo ding hi. Siampipa in zingsang simin a tungah sing cihin, meihal biakna a ngeina bangin a tungah koihin, thunuam a biakna thau a tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:13 Biakna tau tungah mei kikuangsak tawntung dinga, kimitsak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus6:14 “Tua ciangin an tawh biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Aaronʼ suante in biakna tau mai, Topaʼ mai ah pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus6:15 Mi khat in, biakna tau tungah a om an tawh biakna annel khut dim khat, a sathau le a paknamtui khempeuh tawh la-in, Topa adingin a gim namtui, phawkna-in biakna tau tungah hal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:16 Aaron le a tapate in a om lai teng ne ding uh hi. A siangtho mun khat ah silngo sawh lohin ne ding uh a, kikhopna buktual sung mun khat hi ding hi." 
Leviticus6:17 Tua pen silngo sawhin a ki-em hi lo ding hi. Meihal biakna hong kipiakna sung panin amauʼ tanh dingin ka piak sa ahi hi. Tua pen khialhna hanga biakna le mawhna hanga biakna bangin a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus6:18 Na khang tawntung uh adingin thu hong kipiak mah bangin, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a kipiakna panin Aaronʼ suante lakah pasal peuhmah in tuate ne thei ding hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:19 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:20 “Aaron le a suante sathau a kinilh ni-in Topaʼ tungah hih bangin biakna kipia ding hi: An tawh biakna ngeina bangin annel lawh khat, alang zingsangin, alang nitakin pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:21 Tua pen beelpei tung khat ah sathau tawh kibawl ding hi. An tawh biakna mah bangin limtakin hel sa le balnen sa-in na paipih dinga, Topa ading a gim namtui dingin na pia ding hi." 
Leviticus6:22 Aaronʼ suante sung panin amah a laih dingin sathau a kinilh siampipa in, thu a kipiak sa mah bangin Topaʼ tungah pia dinga, a vekpi-in kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus6:23 Siampipa in an tawh a biakna peuhmah a vekpi-in kihal dinga, kine lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus6:24 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus6:25 “Aaron le a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Khialhna hanga biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi. Meihal biakna a kigawhna mun Topaʼ mai ah khialhna hanga biakna kigo dinga, tua pen a siangtho pen ahi hi." 
Leviticus6:26 Khialhna hanga biakna a pia siampipa in kikhopna buktual sung a siangtho mun khat ah ne ding hi. 
Leviticus6:27 A sa a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi. Puan tungah a si a kitheh khak ciangin, a siangtho mun khat ah tua si a kitheh kha pen kisawp ding hi." 
Leviticus6:28 Tua ciangin a kihuanna leibeel kisukham ding hi. Ahih hangin taaubeelin a kihuan ahihleh a beel kikiatin tui sungah kisawp siang sitset ding hi. 
Leviticus6:29 Siampiteʼ lak panin pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding uh hi. Tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus6:30 Ahih hangin siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin kikhopna buk sungah a kipaipih si a kilak khiatna, khialhna hanga biakna sa kine lo dinga, mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus7:1 “Mawhna hanga biakna ngeina, a siangtho pen hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:2 Amaute in meihal biakna a gawhna mun uh ah mawhna hanga biakna go ding uh a, biakna tau kimkot ah a si kitheh ding hi." 
Leviticus7:3 Tua ciangin a thau khempeuh, a meithau, a gilpi tuam a thau," 
Leviticus7:4 a kawnga om a kal nihte a thau tawh, a kalte tawh a lakkhiat khop ding ahi a sintuamte kipia ding hi." 
Leviticus7:5 Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in siampipa in biakna tau tungah hal dinga, tua pen mawhna hanga biakna ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:6 Siampite lakah pasal peuhmah in a siangtho mun khat ah ne thei ding uh hi; tua in a siangtho pen ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:7 “Mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna tawh kibang a, tuate ading a ngeina a kibang hi dinga, kilemna a bawlsak siampipa in tua biakna sa ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:8 Mi khatpeuhʼ meihal biakna a piaksak siampipa in ama piaksak tua meihal biakna a vun ngah ding hi. 
Leviticus7:9 Mei bung sunga a ki-em an tawh biakna peuhmah leh sikbeel daii ahi a, beelpei tungah ahi zongin a kibawl khempeuhte, a pia siampipa in ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:10 An tawh biakna khempeuh, sathau a kihel hitaleh a kihel lo hitaleh, Aaronʼ suan khempeuh in a kikimin hawm ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:11 “Mi khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah a piak theih ding, thunuam a biakna ngeina hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:12 Amah in lungdam kohna-in a piak leh, silngo sawh loh sathau tawh a kihel moh, silngo sawh loh mohpheng sathau tawh a kizut, annel moh sathau limtakin a kihelte, lungdam biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus7:13 Amah in lungdam koh nadingin thunuam a ama biakpiakna tawh silngo kisawh anlum mohte ama biakna-in paipih khawm ding hi. 
Leviticus7:14 Amah in Topa biak nadingin tua biakna sung panin moh khat ciat pia ding a, thunuam a biakna si a theh siampipa in tua moh ngah ding hi." 
Leviticus7:15 Lungdam kohna-in thunuam a ama biakpiakna a sa pen a piak ni-in kine dinga, a zingsang dong bangmah kisit lo ding hi." 
Leviticus7:16 “Ahih hangin ama biakpiakna pen thuciamna hanga biakpiakna ahi a, utthu-a biakpiakna ahi zongin ahihleh, amah in a biakpiakna a piak ni-in kine dinga, a om lai teng a zing ciangin kine ding hi." 
Leviticus7:17 Ahih hangin a ni thum ni-in biakpiakna sa a om lai teng mei tawh kihal ding hi. 
Leviticus7:18 A ni thum ni-in thunuam a ama biakpiakna sa khat peuhpeuh a kinek leh, tua biakpiakna a pia pa kisang lo dinga, tua pen ama aʼ in zong kiciamteh lo ding hi. Tua sa a nin hi dinga, a ne pa in ama mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus7:19 “A nin na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kisawh kha sa kine lo dinga, mei tawh kihal ding hi. Ahi zongin a siang mi khempeuh in a sa ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:20 A nin hi napi-in thunuam a Topaʼ tungah biakpiakna sa a ne pa ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi. 
Leviticus7:21 Mi khatpeuh in mihing nin hitaleh ganhing nin hitaleh a kihhuai a nin khat peuhpeuh hitaleh lawng a, tua khit ciangin thunuam a Topaʼ tungah biakpiakna sa a nek leh, ama mipihteʼ lak panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:22 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus7:23 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in bawngtal ahi a, tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin a thau na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:24 A mawk sih ganhing thau leh gamsate in a bal gawp ganhing thaute, na dangin kizang thei dinga, ahih hangin bangbang hileh na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus7:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ganhing thau a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi. 
Leviticus7:26 Tua tham loin note in na teenna uh mun khat peuhpeuh ah vasa sisan hitaleh ganhing sisan hitaleh si peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus7:27 Si khat peuhpeuh a ne mi peuhmah ama mipihteʼ lak panin kihawl khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:28 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus7:29 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topaʼ tungah thunuam a ama biakpiakna a pia pa in Topaʼ kiangah ama biakna paipih ding hi. Thunuam a ama biakpiakna panin 
Leviticus7:30 amah in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a khutin paipih ding hi. Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biak nadingin a iik a kivei theih nadingin amah in a thau a iik tawh paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus7:31 Siampipa in biakna tau tungah a thau hal dinga, ahih hangin a iik pen Aaron le a suante ading hi ding hi." 
Leviticus7:32 Thunuam a na biakpiakna panin biakna-in siampipa tungah a taklam phei na pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus7:33 Aaronʼ suante sung panin thunuam a biakna si le a thau a pia pa in a taklam phei a ngah ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus7:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kivei a iik le a kipia a phei pen keimah in Israel miteʼ tung panin thunuam a amauʼ biakpiakna sung panin la khia-in, Israel miteʼ tung panin a tawntungin a ngah dingun siampi Aaron le a suanteʼ tungah ka pia khinzo hi." 
Leviticus7:35 Hih pen, Topaʼ siampi na a sem dingin amaute a kipiak ni-in, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna sung panin amauʼ tungah a kipia, Aaron leh a suanteʼ tanh ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:36 Israel mite in amaute tungah a piak nadingin amaute sathau a kinilh ni-in Topa in hih thu pia a, tua pen a khang tawntungun amauʼ kaih ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus7:37 Hihte pen amauʼ biaknate Topaʼ tungah a piak nadingun amah in Israel mite Sinai sehnel gamah a thupiak ni-in Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses a thupiak, meihal biakna, an tawh biakna, khialhna hanga biakna, mawhna hanga biakna, ki-apna le thunuam a biakna ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus7:38  
Leviticus8:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus8:2 “Aaron le amah tawh a om a tapate, a puante, a nilh sathau, khialhna hanga biakna a bawngtal, a tuutal nihte le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh la inla," 
Leviticus8:3 kikhopna buk kongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:4 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses in hih a, kikhopna buk kongah mihonte kikhawm hi." 
Leviticus8:5 Moses in mihonte kiangah, “Tu-a ka hih dingte pen Topa in hih dingin a thupiak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi. 
Leviticus8:7 Amah in a puan tungsilh amah silhsak a, a kawnggak tawh gakin, a puan tualpi silhsak a, a siampi puan silhsakin, siampi puanʼ khau, hoihtakin a kigan tawh gak a, tua tawh ama tungah a khih hi." 
Leviticus8:8 Amah in ama tungah a awmdal bulhin, a awmdal sungah Urim le Thummim a koih hi." 
Leviticus8:9 Amah in Aaronʼ lu tungah a dialpi khimsakin, a dialpi tung a mai lamah, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amah in kham peek, a siangtho kumpi lukhu a khusak hi." 
Leviticus8:10 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau la-in, biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh nuhin tuate a ap hi." 
Leviticus8:11 Amah in biakna tau tungah tuate kim khat sagih vei thehin, biakna tau le a nazat khempeuh le kuang le a ngaknate, ap dingin sathau a nuh hi." 
Leviticus8:12 Amah in nilh sathau kim khat Aaronʼ tungah sung a, ap dingin amah a sathau a nilh hi." 
Leviticus8:13 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, Moses in Aaronʼ tapate paipih a, puan tungsilhte silhsakin, kawnggak tawh amaute gak a, amauʼ lu tungah lukhute a khih hi." 
Leviticus8:14 Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal paipih a, Aaron le a tapate in tua bawngtal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:15 Kilemna bawl nadingin Moses in a bawngtal go a, a si la-in a kiim a biakna tau kite a khutme tawh nuhin, biakna tau siangthosak a, biakna tau bulah a site sung khia-in a ap hi." 
Leviticus8:16 A sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte le a kal nihte a thau tawh la-in, biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:17 Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a om lai a vun, a sa le a ek, amah in giahphual pua lamah mei tawh a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:18 Tua ciangin Moses in meihal biakna tuutal pia a, Aaron le a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:19 Moses in tua tuutal go-in, biakna tau tung kimkot ah a si theh hi." 
Leviticus8:20 Tuutal a kisem nen ciangin, Moses in a lu le a ki-atnente le a thau a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:21 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, a sungkuate le a khete tui tawh a kisawp khit ciangin, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in Moses in biakna tau tungah tuutal buppi a hal hi." 
Leviticus8:22 Tua ciangin Moses in a tuutal dang, kipsakna tuutal pia a, Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amauʼ khut nga uh hi." 
Leviticus8:23 Moses in tuutal go a, a si tawm khat la-in Aaronʼ taklam bilteep leh a taklam khutpi le a taklam khepi nuh hi." 
Leviticus8:24 Aaronʼ tapate hong kipaipih a, Moses in amauʼ taklam bilteepte le amauʼ taklam khutpite le amauʼ taklam khepite a si tawm khat nuh a, a si a val laite, biakna tau tung kimkot ah a theh hi." 
Leviticus8:25 Tua ciangin amah in a thau, a mei thau le a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh le a sintuamte, a kal nihte le a thau le a taklam phei a la hi." 
Leviticus8:26 Topaʼ mai ah a om silngo sawh loh anlum lawh sung panin amah in silngo sawh loh moh khat le sathau sawh anlum moh khat le mohpheng khat la-in, a thau tung le a taklam phei tungah tuate a koih hi." 
Leviticus8:27 Amah in hihte khempeuh, Aaron le a tapateʼ khut sungah koih a, amaute in vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah tuate a vei uh hi." 
Leviticus8:28 Tua ciangin Moses in amauteʼ khut sung panin tuate la-in, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakpiakna, a gim namtui, kipsakna biakna-in biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a hal khawm hi." 
Leviticus8:29 Moses in a iik la-in vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah a vei hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin tua pen kipsakna tuutal panin Mosesʼ tanh ahi hi. 
Leviticus8:30 Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau kim khat le biakna tau tunga om a si la-in, Aaron le ama tapate le amauʼ puante tungah a theh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le ama tapate, a puante uh tawh a ap khawm hi." 
Leviticus8:31 Moses in Aaron le a tapate kiangah, “Keimah in thu hong pia-in, ‘Aaron le a tapate in ne ding uh hi,’ ka cih mah bangin, kikhopna buk kongah a sa huan unla, tua lai munah tua sa le kipsakna biakna lawh sungah a om anlum ne unla," 
Leviticus8:32 a sa le anlum na khamvalte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. 
Leviticus8:33 Note hong kikipsak nading hun ni sagih sung hi ding ahih manin, note hong kikipsakna hun a cin mateng, kikhopna buk kong pua ah ni sagih sung na paikhia kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus8:34 Tu ni-a kibawl bangin, note adingin kilemna bawl ding, Topa in thu hong pia khin hi." 
Leviticus8:35 Kikhopna buk kongah ni sagih sung sun le zan na om ding uh a, Topaʼ hong sawlte na hih ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh note na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang dingin keima tungah thu hong kipia hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus8:36 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron le a tapate in zong, Topa in Mosesʼ tungtawnin a thupiakte khempeuh a hih uh hi." 
Leviticus9:1 A ni giat ni-in Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel upate a sam hi. 
Leviticus9:2 Amah in Aaronʼ kiangah, “Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawng pa no khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat, a nih tuakin a sitbaang lo, la inla, Topaʼ mai ah tuate pia in." 
Leviticus9:3 Israel mite kiangah, ‘Khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat le meihal biak nadingin bawng no khat le tuuno khat, a nih tuakin kum khat pha-in a sitbaang lo," 
Leviticus9:4 le thunuam a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah piak dingin bawngtal khat le tuutal khat le sathau tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna la un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-in note tungah Topa hong kilang ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus9:5 Amaute in zong kikhopna buk mai ah Mosesʼ thupiak teng hong paipih uh a, mihonpite khempeuh a nai ah hong pai-in Topaʼ mai ah ding uh hi." 
Leviticus9:6 Moses in, “Note tungah Topaʼ minthanna vang hong kilat theih nadingin Topa in hih bangin thu hong pia hi,” a cih khit ciangin" 
Leviticus9:7 Aaronʼ kiangah, “ Topaʼ thupiak sa bangin biakna tau mai ah pai-in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna pia inla, nangma ading le mite adingin kilemna bawl in. Miteʼ biakna paipih inla, amaute adingin kilemna bawlsak in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus9:8 Tua ahih ciangin Aaron in biakna tau naihin, ama aʼ mahmah ding ahi khialhna hanga biakna bawng no a go hi." 
Leviticus9:9 Aaronʼ tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in a si sungah a khutme diahin biakna tau kite nuh a, biakna tau bulah a si val lai teng a sung khia hi." 
Leviticus9:10 Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin khialhna hanga biakna panin a thau le a kalte le a sintuamte biakna tau tungah a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:11 A sa le a vunte ahihleh giahphual pua lamah mei tawh a hal hi. 
Leviticus9:12 Tua ciangin a meihal biakna a go hi. A tapate in ama tungah a si pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tung kimkot ah a theh hi." 
Leviticus9:13 Amaute in meihal biakna ama tungah a nennenin a lutang tawh pia uh a, amah in biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:14 Tua ciangin amah in a sungkuate le a khete sawp a, biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a hal khawm hi." 
Leviticus9:15 Tua ciangin a masa-a khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin amah in miteʼ biakna pia-in, mite ading ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel la-in go a, khialhna hanga biak nadingin a pia hi." 
Leviticus9:16 Tua ciangin meihal biakna paipihin ngeina kip om sa bangin a pia hi. 
Leviticus9:17 Amah in zingsang a meihal biakna banah an tawh biakna paipihin, tua sung panin mangbuh bui a khut dim la-in, biakna tau tungah a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:18 Mosesʼ thupiak bangin amah in mite adingin thunuam a biakna bawngtal le tuutal zong a go hi. A tapate in ama kiangah a si paipih uh a, amah in biakna tau kimkot ah theh a," 
Leviticus9:19 bawngtal le tuutal thau, a mei thau, a gilpi tuam, a kalte, a sintuamte" 
Leviticus9:20 le a thau, amaute in a iikte tungah koihin, amah in biakna tau tungah a thau a hal hi." 
Leviticus9:21 Ahih hangin Aaron in a iikte le a taklam pheite, Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in a vei hi." 
Leviticus9:22 Tua ciangin Aaron in miteʼ lamah a khutte laam to-in thupha a piak khit ciangin khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a piakna panin hong pai suk hi. 
Leviticus9:23 Kikhopna buk sungah Moses le Aaron hong tum uh a, hong pusuahkhiat ciangun mite thupha pia a, mi khempeuh tungah Topaʼ minthanna vang hong kilang hi." 
Leviticus9:24 Topaʼ mai panin mei hong piang khia-in meihal biakna le biakna tau tunga om sathau a kang hi. Mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin awng uh a, lei maingatin a kun suk uh hi." 
Leviticus10:1 Tu-in Aaronʼ tapate Nadab le Abihu in amauʼ paknamtui beel tuak la-in, a sungah mei koih uh a, a tungah paknamtui koihin, Topa in amauʼ tungah tua banga thu a piak ngei loh a siang lo mei, Topaʼ mai ah a pia uh hi." 
Leviticus10:2 Topaʼ omna mun panin mei hong pai khia-in amaute kaang a, Topaʼ mai ah a si uh hi." 
Leviticus10:3 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaronʼ kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Ka kiang nai-a a omte kiangah keimah a siangtho-in ka kilak dinga, mi khempeuhʼ mai ah keimah hong kiminthangsak ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Aaron pau loin a om hi." 
Leviticus10:4 Moses in Aaronʼ paʼ sanggampa Uzzielʼ tapate Mishael le Elizafan samin amaute kiangah, “Hong pai unla biakbuk panin giahphual pua lamah na sanggamte uh pua khia un,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:5 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hong naihin, Mosesʼ sawl bangin giahphual pua lamah amauʼ puan tungsilh mah uh tawh amaute a pua khia uh hi." 
Leviticus10:6 Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah, “Na lu uh a na sam uh phiahsak kei unla, na puante uh bal kek kei un. Tua bangin na hih uh leh note si-in, mihon khempeuh tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung ding hi. Ahih hangin na mipih uh, Israel mihon buppi pen, Topaʼ mei in a kat lup miteʼ hangin dahin kap thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus10:7 Kikhopna buk kong panin a pua lamah paikhia kei un. Na pai uh leh na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ nilh sathau noteʼ tungah om hi,” a ci hi. Mosesʼ gen bangin amaute a gamta uh hi." 
Leviticus10:8 Topa in Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus10:9 “Nang hitaleh na tapate hitaleh kikhopna buk ah na pai uh ciangin leenggahzu hitaleh khamtheih zu hitaleh ne kei un. Na nek uh leh na si ding uh hi. Tua pen na suan na khakte uh tungah khang tawntungin ngeina kip khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus10:10 Note in a siangtho le a mawkmawk le a nin le a siang na khen ding uh hi. 
Leviticus10:11 Topa in Moses tungtawnin amauteʼ tunga a gen sa thukhamte khempeuh note in Israel mite a hilh ding na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:12 Moses in Aaron le a om lai a tapate Eleazar le Ithamar kiangah, “ Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna sung panin a val lai ahi an tawh biakna la unla, tua pen a siangtho pen ahih manin silngo sawh lohin biakna tau gei ah ne un." 
Leviticus10:13 Tua an pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate lak panin nang le na tapateʼ kaih ding ahih manin a siangtho mun khat ah na ne ding uh hi. Tua bang ding mahin keiʼ tungah thu hong kipia hi. 
Leviticus10:14 Ahih hangin a kivei a iik le a kipia a pheite pen nang le na tapate le na tanute in a siangtho mun khatpeuh ah ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Israel mite in thunuam a a biakpiakna panun nang le na tapateʼ kaih dinga hong kipia ahi hi. 
Leviticus10:15 Topa in a thupiak sa bangin a kipia a phei le a kivei a iikte ahihleh Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in vei dingin amaute in meihal biakna sathau tawh hong paipih ding uh a, tua pen nang le na tapate in a tawntungin na kaih ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:16 Tu-in Moses in khialhna hanga biakna keel tawh kisai thu limtakin kan a, na kihal khin mawk hi. Aaronʼ tapa a om lai Eleazar le Ithamar-teʼ tungah amah heh a," 
Leviticus10:17 “Note in mihonte adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlin, amauʼ mawhna a kilakkhiat theih nadingin noteʼ tungah hong kipia sa a siangtho sa pen khialhna hanga biakna hi napi, bang hangin a siangtho mun khat ah ne lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Leviticus10:18 En un, biakbuk sungah a sisan kipaipih lo hi. Ka thupiak sa bangin note in biakbuk sungah na nek dingun a kilawm ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:19 Tua ciangin Aaron in Moses kiangah, “En in, tu ni-in amaute in Topaʼ mai ah amauʼ khialhna hanga biakna le amauʼ meihal biakna pia khinzo uh hi. Tua bang hi napi hih bang thute keiʼ tungah hong tung veve hi. Khialhna hanga biakna tu ni-in a ne hi leng, Topaʼ muhna ah sanhuai ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Leviticus10:20 Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin a lungkim hi. 
Leviticus11:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron tungah," 
Leviticus11:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen un: Hihte pen leitung a om ganhing khempeuh lak panin na nek theih ding uh a nungta ganhing ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:3 Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:4 Ahi zongin eknel haite lak pan hitaleh khecin-kate lak pan hitaleh, note in na nek theih loh dingte uh: Kalaoh in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:5 Sakikh ganhing in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:6 Bilpi in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:7 Vok pen khecin ka ahih hangin eknel hai lo ahih ciangin note adingin a nin ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:8 Note in tuateʼ sa na ne kei ding uh a, a si sate zong na lawng kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen note adingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:9 “Tui sunga omte sung panin nek theih dingte: Tuipi sung hitaleh gun sung hitaleh tui sungah a om phe le lip a neite peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus11:10 Ahih hangin tuipi sung, gun sunga om phe le lip a nei lo, tui sunga a hon tat ganhingte le tui sunga a nungta ganhingte pen note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:11 Tuate pen note adingin a kihhuai hi ding hi. Note in tuateʼ sa na ne kei ding uh a, a si sate zong na kih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:12 Tui sunga a omte sung panin phe le lip a nei lo peuhmah note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:13 “Vasate lak panin note in na kih ding uh, a kine lo ding, a kihhuaite: Muvanlai, mupi, luimu," 
Leviticus11:14 mumeika, musan nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:15 va-ak nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:16 vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:17 keising, tuimu, gun vakang," 
Leviticus11:18 gam vatawt, tui vatawt, musane," 
Leviticus11:19 gun vapi, gunva-zonei nam khempeuh, huihtun le bak ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:20 “Khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhing khempeuhte, note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:21 Ahi zongin khe li tawh a pai, kha a nei ganhingte khempeuh lak panin leitungah a tuan nadingun a khepek uh tawh kizom ngaltak tawn a neite na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:22 Tuate lak panin na nek theih dingte uh: Kauphe kitom nam khempeuh, kauphe zol nam khempeuh, khuangbai nam khempeuh le kauphe ki sau nam khempeuh ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:23 Ahih hangin khe li nei-in kha a nei ganhing dangte khempeuh note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus11:24 “Hihte tawh note a nin na suak ding uh hi. A si sa a lawng peuhmahte a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga," 
Leviticus11:25 a si sa them khat a pua peuhmah in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:26 A khecin a ka ahih hangin eknel a hai lo ganhing peuhmah note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:27 Khe li tawh a pai ganhingte khempeuh lak panin amauʼ khebom tawh a paite khempeuh note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a si sa a lawng kha peuhmahte a nitak dong a nin hi dinga," 
Leviticus11:28 a si sa a pua pa in a puan sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tuate note adingin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:29 “Leitungah a vak kawikawi, a pai thei ganhingte lak panin note adingin a ninte: Savokphual, zusa, innhik pi nam khempeuh," 
Leviticus11:30 tawlbawk pi, tang, tangteuh le sehnel gam thankik ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:31 A hon tat ganhing khempeuhte lak panin hihte pen note adingin a nin ahi hi. Tuate a si sa a lawng peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:32 Tuate a si sa khat peuhpeuh a tukna nate, sing nazat, puan, savun, ippi le na khat peuhpeuhin a kizang beel khat peuhpeuh hitaleh a nin hi ding hi. Tuate pen tui sungah kidiah dinga, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:33 Tuate khat peuhpeuh leibeel khat peuhpeuh sungah a kiat leh, tua sunga om khempeuh a nin hi dinga, note in tua beel na sukham ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:34 Tua leibeel sungah a om a kine thei ding an tungah tua bang tui a tuk leh a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang beel sunga om dawn theih ding peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:35 Tua bang a si sa them khat a tukna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. Meibung hitaleh beelpei hitaleh kisuzan ding hi. Tuate a nin hi a, note adingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:36 Ahi zongin tuinak le tuibeem ahihleh a siang hi dinga, ahih hangin a si sate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:37 A kivawh ding khaici tungah tua a si sate them khat a tuk leh, tua khaici a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus11:38 Ahih hangin khaici tui kidiah a, tua a si sate them khat tua khaici tungah a tuk leh, note adingin tua khaici a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:39 “Noteʼ nek theih ding ganhing khat peuhpeuh a sih leh a si sa a lawng pa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga," 
Leviticus11:40 a si sa a ne pa in ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. A si sa a pua pa in zong ama puante sawpin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus11:41 “Leitungah a hon tat ganhing peuhmah a kihhuai hi a, tuate kine lo ding hi." 
Leviticus11:42 A awmtal peuhmah le khe li-a a pai peuhmah, ahih kei leh khe tampi a nei, leitungah a pai a hon tat ganhing khempeuh, note in na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:43 A hon tat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nomau mah a kihhuai-in na kibawl tawm kei ding uh a, tuate tawh nomau na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi. Na kinitsak tawm uh leh a nin na suak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:44 Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla, kei siangtho ka hih manin note zong siangtho un. Leitungah a bokvak a hon tat ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh note na kininsak tawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus11:45 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei siangtho ka hih manin note na siangtho ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus11:46 Hih pen a nin le a siang, a nungta ganhing nek theih ding le nek theih loh ding khen nadingin ganhing le vasa, tui sunga a pai a nungta ganhing khempeuh le leitungah a hon tat ganhing khempeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus11:47  
Leviticus12:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus12:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Nupi khat gai-in ta pasal a neih leh ni sagih sung tua nu a nin hi dinga, a nin neih huna mah bangin amah a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus12:3 A ni giat ni-in a naungek vun dawn ki-at ding hi. 
Leviticus12:4 Tua ciangin nupi in ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawm thum le ni thum sung om lai ding hi. Amah in kisiansuahna ni a cin mateng a siangtho na khat peuhpeuh lawng loin, biakbuk sungah zong tum lo ding hi." 
Leviticus12:5 “Ahih hangin amah in ta numei a neih leh, ama nin neih huna mah bangin nipikal nih sung a nin hi ding hi. Ama si luanna hangin a sian nadingin ni sawm guk le ni guk sung om lai ding hi." 
Leviticus12:6 “Amah a kisiansuahna hun a cin ciangin tapa ading hitaleh tanu ading hitaleh, amah in kikhopna buk kong a siampipa kiangah meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha tuuno khat le khialhna hanga biak nadingin kawl vakhu no khat ahi a, vakhu khat ahi zongin pia dinga," 
Leviticus12:7 siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah pia-in, ama ading kilemna bawlsak ding hi. Tua ciangin ama si luanna panin tua nu a siang hi ding hi. Hih pen ta pasal hitaleh ta numei hitaleh a nei nu adingin ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus12:8 “Tua nu in tuuno a piak zawh kei leh vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhu no nih ahi zongin paipih dinga, khat pen meihal biak nading, a dang khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading ahi hi. Siampipa in ama adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, tua nu a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus13:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus13:2 “Mi khat in ama pumpi vun tungah a bawk ahi a, meima ahi a, a mel tuampian ahi zongin a neih a, tua pen ama pumpi vun tungah phak natna a suah leh, tua pa pen siampipa kiang ahi a, ama tapa siampi khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin kipaipih ding hi." 
Leviticus13:3 Siampipa in ama pumpi vun tunga natna mun vel ding hi. A natna munah a om a multe kangin ama vun sangin a natna thuktum zaw-in a kimuh leh, tua pen phak natna hi a, siampipa in a vel khit ciangin amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:4 Ahih hangin ama pumpi vun sungah a natna mun kang napi-in, a vun sangin a thuk lo zaw bangin omin, tua sungah a multe kang loin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cina pa khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:5 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel dinga, a natna noptuamin, a natna in a vun sung lawh lo hi ci-in a muh leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung mah khumcip lai ding hi." 
Leviticus13:6 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah velkik dinga, a natna mun mualin, a vun sung a lawh kei leh, siang hi, ci-in siampipa in gen ding hi. Tua pen meima mawkmawk hi lel a, amah in a puante sawpin a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:7 Ahih hangin amah a sian nadingin siampipa kiangah a kilah khit ciangin a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh siampipa mai ah kilakkik ding hi. 
Leviticus13:8 Siampipa in vel dinga, a meima in a vun sung a lawh leh phak natna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:9 “Mi khat in meima a neih ciangin siampipa kiangah kipaipih ding hi. 
Leviticus13:10 Siampipa in vel dinga, a vun sungah a bawk kang omin, tua in a multe kangsakin a bawk sungah ma thak a om leh," 
Leviticus13:11 tua pen ama pumpi vun sungah a om lui sa phak natna hi a, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin khumcip lo ding hi." 
Leviticus13:12 Siampipaʼ muh theihna ciangah tua natna in a vun phukhamin, tua natna a veipaʼ vun khempeuh a lutang panin a khe dongin a lawh khit leh," 
Leviticus13:13 siampipa in vel dinga, a natna in a pumpi khempeuh a lawh khit leh siampipa in tua natna tawh kisai-in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. A pumpi-in kang khin ahih manin amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:14 Ahih hangin ama tungah ma thak a kilat ciangin amah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus13:15 Siampipa in a ma thak velin, amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ma thak pen phak natna ahih manin a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:16 Ahih hangin a ma thak pen kikheel kikin a kang a suah leh, siampipa kiangah pai dinga," 
Leviticus13:17 siampipa in amah velin a natna pen a kang a suah leh, siampipa in natna a veipa siang hi, ci-in gen dinga, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:18 “Mi khatpeuhʼ pumpi vun sungah a dam sa meimatum khat om a," 
Leviticus13:19 a meimatum munah a bawk kang ahi a, a san kang mun ahi zongin a om leh, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi." 
Leviticus13:20 Siampipa in vel dinga, tua pen a vun sangin thuk zaw-in a multe a kang a suah leh, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen phak natna hi a, meimatum sung tawnin hong phu khia ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:21 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua tunga a multe kang loin a vun sangin a thuk zawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:22 Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phak natna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:23 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a kilawh kei leh meimatum pawn hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:24 “Tua ahih kei leh, pumpi in a vun tungah mei kaangma khat nei-in tua mei kaangma a thak mun pen a san kang ahi a, a kang ahi zongin hong suah leh," 
Leviticus13:25 siampipa in vel ding hi. Tua mun a om a multe kangin a vun sangin a natna a thuk zawk leh, tua pen phak natna ahi hi. Tua pen mei kaangma tawnin hong phu khia hi a, phak natna ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:26 Ahih hangin siampipa in velin, tua mun a multe kang loin a vun sangin a thuk zawk kei a, mualin a om leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung khumcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:27 Siampipa in a ni sagih ni-in amah vel ding hi. Tua in a vun sung a lawh leh phak natna hi a, siampipa in amah nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:28 Ahih hangin a natna mun pen mun khat bekah omin a vun sung lawh loin mualin a om leh, tua pen mei kaangma pan a bawk hi a, mei kaangma pawn ahih manin siampipa in amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:29 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin a lutang tung ahih kei leh a kha ah meima khatpeuh a neih ciangin," 
Leviticus13:30 siampipa in tua natna vel ding hi. Tua natna pen a vun sangin thuk zaw-in a kimuh a, a sunga a multe eng-in a mal a neu leh, siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Tua pen cithak ahi, lu-phak ahih kei leh kha-phak natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:31 Siampipa in cithak natna velin, a vun sangin thuk zaw lo bangin kimu-in tua sungah mul vom a om kei leh, siampipa in ni sagih sung cithak natna tawh tua pa khumcip dinga," 
Leviticus13:32 a ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a natna vel ding hi. A cithak kilawh loin, a sungah mul eng om loin, a cithak pen a vun sangin thuk zaw loin a kimuh leh," 
Leviticus13:33 amah le amah a mul kikiat dinga, ahih hangin a cithak san kiat lo ding hi. Siampipa in a dang ni sagih sung mah cithak natna tawh tua pa khum ding hi." 
Leviticus13:34 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa in a cithak vel dinga, a cithak in a vun sung lawh loin, a vun sangin a thuk lo zaw-in a kimuh leh, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi. Amah in ama puante sawp dinga, a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:35 Ahih hangin amah a kisiansak khit ciangin a cithak in a vun sung a lawh leh," 
Leviticus13:36 siampipa in vel dinga, a cithak in a vun sung a lawh takpi leh, siampipa in mul eng a zon ding kisam lo hi; amah a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:37 Ahih hangin ama mitah, cithak noptuam zo hi, ci-in mu a, a sungah mul vom po-in a cithak a dam leh, amah a siang hi a, siampipa in amah a siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus13:38 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, a pumpi vun tungah a mel tuampian a kang mun a neih leh," 
Leviticus13:39 siampipa in vel dinga, a pumpi vun tunga om a tuampian munte pen a kang milmial ahihleh, tua pen vun a phukham meima hi a, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus13:40 “Mi khat a sam pulh a, a lu a tol hangin amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:41 Mi khat a taltang le a paang panin a sam le a mul a pulh leh, amah a talkolh hi lel a, amah a siang ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:42 Ahih hangin a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh a san kang meima a om leh, tua pen a lutol tung ahih kei leh a talkolh tunga a suak khia phak natna ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:43 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah vel dinga, a bawk natna pen a lutol tung hitaleh a talkolh tung hitaleh a pumpi vun tunga phak om tawh kibangin a san kang ahihleh," 
Leviticus13:44 amah pen miphak hi a, a nin ahih manin siampipa in amah a nin hi, ci-in a gen kul hi; a lutang tungah ama natna a om ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:45 “Tua natna a nei miphak pa in puan kekte silhin a sam phiahsak dinga, amah in a muk humin, ‘Nin, nin!,’ ci-in kiko ding hi." 
Leviticus13:46 Amah in a natna a neih lai teng a nin hi ding hi. Amah a nin ahih manin giahphual pualam mun khat ah amah guak teeng ding hi. 
Leviticus13:47 “Samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh, puan khat peuhpeuh tungah phak natna a om ciang," 
Leviticus13:48 tua saihadial puan, samul puante, a tung le a pheiteʼ tung hitaleh, savun le savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin," 
Leviticus13:49 tua natna pen a hing melin ahi a, a san melin ahi zongin puan tungah a kilat ciang, puan a tung a phei tung hitaleh savun le savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om ciangin, tua pen phak natna hi a, siampipa kiangah kilak ding hi." 
Leviticus13:50 Siampipa in a natna vel dinga, tua natna a banna van pen ni sagih sung koihcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:51 Tua ciangin amah in a ni sagih ni-in a natna velkik ding hi. A natna pen puan tungah kizelin, puan a tung a phei ah hitaleh, savun le savun a kizatna na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh, tua natna pen a lauhuai phak natna hi a, a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus13:52 Amah in a puan hal ding hi. Tua natna pen puan a tung a phei ah hitaleh, samul puan saihadial puan hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om leh hal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen a lauhuai phak natna ahih manin mei sungah kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus13:53 “Siampipa in velin, a natna pen puan tung, a tung a phei ah hitaleh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kizelh kei leh," 
Leviticus13:54 siampipa in tua natna a banna pen amaute in a sawp ding uh thu pia dinga, amah in a dang ni sagih sung mah tua na koihcip ding hi." 
Leviticus13:55 Siampipa in tua natna a banna pen a kisawp khit ciangin vel ding hi. Tua natna a banna mun a mel a kikheel kei leh, a natna a kizelh loh hangin tua pen a nin mah ahi hi. Tua natna pen a sung lamah ahi a, a pua lamah ahi zongin a baan leh mei sungah tua puan na hal ding uh hi." 
Leviticus13:56 Ahih hangin siampipa in vel a, a kisawp khit ciangin a meima a mualh leh, amah in a puan tung pan hitaleh savun tung pan hitaleh a puan a tung a phei tung pan hitaleh natna a banna mun bal khia ding hi." 
Leviticus13:57 Tua ciangin a puan tung hitaleh puan a tung a phei tungah hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a kilatkik leh, tua natna a kizel ahih manin natna a banna pen mei tawh na hal ding uh hi." 
Leviticus13:58 Ahih hangin a puan hitaleh puan a tung a phei hitaleh savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh a kisawp khit ciangin tua natna a pai khiatna na pen, a nih veina kisawp kikin a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus13:59 Hih pen samul puan hitaleh saihadial puan hitaleh puan a tung hitaleh a phei hitaleh, savun tawh a kibawl na khat peuhpeuh tungah a om phak natna tawh kisai-in siang hiam, nin hiam, ci-in khen nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus14:2 “Hih pen amah a kisiansak ni-in miphak paʼ zuih ding ngeina hi ding hi. Siampipa kiangah amah kipaipih dinga," 
Leviticus14:3 giahphual pua lamah siampipa pai khia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phak natna pen a phakpaʼ tung pan a dam leh," 
Leviticus14:4 a kisiangsak ding mipa adingin a hing vasa siang nih le taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi. 
Leviticus14:5 Amaute in leibeel khat sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat a gawh ding uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi. 
Leviticus14:6 Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtak sing le a ausan puan le puknah tawh la khawmin, tuate le a hing lai vasa pen tui luang tunga kithat vasaʼ si sungah diah ding hi." 
Leviticus14:7 Amah in phak natna panin a kisiangsak ding paʼ tungah sagih vei theh dinga, tua ciangin amah siang hi, ci-in gen dinga, a hing vasa pen gamlak ah khah ding hi." 
Leviticus14:8 A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin, a mul khempeuh met khia-in, tui sungah a mahmah kisilin, amah a siang hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah giahphual ah hong ciah dinga, ahih hangin ama puanbuk pua lamah ni sagih sung om ding hi." 
Leviticus14:9 A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam, a khamul le a mitkhu mul le a pum tungah a om a mul khempeuh met khia ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi silin, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus14:10 “A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa nih le a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a nu khat le an tawh biakna ahi sathau tawh annel lawh thum le sathau biingta khat la ding hi. 
Leviticus14:11 Amah a siangsak ding siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa le hih nate, kikhopna buk kong a Topaʼ mai ah paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:12 Siampipa in tuuno a pa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in, vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah tuate vei ding hi." 
Leviticus14:13 Amaute in khialhna hanga biakna le meihal biakna, siangtho mun sunga a gawhna mun uh ah amah in tuuno go ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin siampipa aʼ hi a, tua pen a siangtho pen ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:14 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawm khat la-in, tua si pen a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi le a taklam khepi nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:15 Tua ciangin sathau biingta panin kim khat la-in a mahmahʼ veilam khut sungah sungin," 
Leviticus14:16 a veilam khut sunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin, a khutme tawh a sathau kimkhatte Topaʼ mai ah sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:17 Ama khut sungah a om lai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi le a taklam khepi nuhin, mawhna hanga biakna si tungah koih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:18 Siampipa in a khut sunga sathau om lai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi. 
Leviticus14:19 “A nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa ading kilemna bawl nadingin siampipa in a khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go dinga," 
Leviticus14:20 meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate, biakna tau tungah pia ding hi. Tua bangin siampipa in ama adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus14:21 “Ahih hangin amah zawngin tua zah a piak zawh kei leh, ama ading kilemna bawl nadingin a kivei ding, mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuno a pa khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat le sathau biingta khat pia dinga," 
Leviticus14:22 vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhu no nih ahi zongin, a piak zawh bangbang pia ding hi. Khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading hi a, a khat pen meihal biak nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:23 A ni giat ni-in amah in Topaʼ mai, kikhopna buk kong, siampipa kiangah ama kisianthosak nadingin tuate paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus14:24 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno le a sathau biingta khat la-in, vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah tuate vei ding hi." 
Leviticus14:25 Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawm khat la-in, a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi le a taklam khepi nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:26 Siampipa in a mahmahʼ veilam khut sungah a sathau kim khat sung dinga," 
Leviticus14:27 a veilam khut sunga a om sathau tawm khat a taklam khutme tawh Topaʼ mai ah sagih vei theh ding hi. 
Leviticus14:28 Siampipa in ama khut sunga a om sathau tawm khat a kisiangthosak ding mipaʼ taklam bilteep, taklam khutpi le a taklam khepite, mawhna hanga biakna si a kikoihna munah va nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:29 Siampipa in a khut sunga a om lai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa ading Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawl nadingin a lu nilhsak ding hi. 
Leviticus14:30 Amah in vakhu hitaleh kawl vakhu no hitaleh, a piak zawh bangbang pia-in," 
Leviticus14:31 khat pen khialhna hanga biak nading, a khat pen meihal biak nadingin an-a biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi. Siampipa in a kisiangthosak pa adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus14:32 Hih pen phak natna a vei, a kisianthosak nadingin biakna a pia zo lopa adingin ngeina ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus14:33 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus14:34 “Note adingin kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun noteʼ leitang a inn khat sungah phak natna kong tunsak ciangin," 
Leviticus14:35 inn nei pa pai-in siampipa kiangah, ‘Ka inn sungah natna nam khat a om ding tawh kibang,’ ci ding hi." 
Leviticus14:36 Tua ciangin, inn sunga om na khempeuh a nin hi, a kicih khak loh nadingin a natna a vel dingin siampipa a pai ma-in amaute in tua inn a na hawmsak nading uh thu pia dinga, tua khit ciangin inn vel dingin siampipa pai ding hi." 
Leviticus14:37 Amah in a natna vel ding hi. A natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin, a hing mel ahih kei leh a san mel na pua-in, tua natna kawm maitang sangin a thuk zawk tuak leh," 
Leviticus14:38 inn sung panin inn kongah siampipa paikhia dinga, ni sagih sung inn khakcip ding hi." 
Leviticus14:39 A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong paikikin en ding hi. Tua inn kawm tungah a natna a kizelh leh," 
Leviticus14:40 natna a banna suang la khia-in khuapi pualam a nin mun khat ah a paipih nadingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi. 
Leviticus14:41 Amah in a inn sung kimkot kiatsakin, amaute in a kiatkhiat, a kizutna themte, khuapi pualam a nin mun khat ah bua ding uh hi." 
Leviticus14:42 Tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in, tua suangteʼ omna munah koihin, amah in zutna dang la-in tua inn zut ding hi." 
Leviticus14:43 “Amah in a suangte la khia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah natna hong suahkik leh," 
Leviticus14:44 siampipa pai-in en ding hi. Inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh, tua pen inn sunga om a lauhuai phak natna hi a, tua inn a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus14:45 Amah in tua inn, a sing a suang le inn a kizutnate khempeuh phel dinga, khuapi pualam a nin mun khat ah tuate pua khia ding hi." 
Leviticus14:46 Tua tham loin tua inn a kikhakcip sungteng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus14:47 Tua inn sungah a lum mipa le an a ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi. 
Leviticus14:48 “Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a, a inn a kizut khit ciangin inn sungah natna a kizelh kei leh, tua ciangin a natna dam ahih manin siampipa in tua inn siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi." 
Leviticus14:49 Tua inn siangthosak nadingin amah in vasa neu nih, taamtak sing le a ausan khau le puknah tawh la khawmin," 
Leviticus14:50 beel sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat go dinga," 
Leviticus14:51 taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin, tua pen a kigo vasaʼ si le tui luang sungah diahin, tua inn sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus14:52 Tua bangin amah in vasa si tawh, tui luang tawh, a hing vasa tawh, taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khau tawh a inn siangsak dinga," 
Leviticus14:53 vasa hing pen khuapi pualam gamlak ah khah khia ding hi. Tua bangin amah in tua inn adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, tua inn a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus14:54 Hih pen phak natna khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: Cithak tawh kisai," 
Leviticus14:55 puan tung hitaleh inn sung hitaleh ah a om phak natna tawh kisai," 
Leviticus14:56 a bawk hitaleh meima hitaleh a tuampianʼ khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in," 
Leviticus14:57 bang hunin nin a, bang hunin siang hiam, ci-in lah nading ahi hi. Hih pen phak natna tawh kisai ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus15:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Leviticus15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh, a natui a paikhiat ciangin tua a paikhia a natui pen a nin ahi hi." 
Leviticus15:3 Amah a ninsak a natui paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: A natui a paipai a, a khawl zongin, ama sungah nitna mah hi veve hi." 
Leviticus15:4 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ lupna le a tutna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:5 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:6 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ tutnasa na khat peuhpeuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:7 A natui a paikhia mipaʼ pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:8 A natui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipaʼ tungah cil a siat leh, tua pa in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:9 A natui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphah khat peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:10 Ama nuai ah a om na khat peuhpeuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang na a pua mipa in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:11 A natui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sil lopi-in a lawn mi peuhmah in ama puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:12 A natui a paikhia mipa in a lawn lei tawh kibawl umlebeelte kisukham dinga, sing tawh kibawl kuanglekeute ahihleh tui sungah kisawp ding hi." 
Leviticus15:13 “A natui a paikhia mipa a natui a kan ciangin a kisiansak nadingin amah in ni sagih sung ngak dinga, tua ciangin a puante sawpin, tui luang sungah a pumpi sil dinga, a siang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:14 A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in, Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk kongah pai-in, siampipa tungah tuate pia ding hi." 
Leviticus15:15 Siampipa in tuate, khat khialhna hanga biak nading le a dang khat meihal biak nadingin pia dinga, a natui a paikhia mipa adingin siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus15:16 “Mi khat in a natui a teh leh, amah in a pumpi khempeuh tui sungah sil dinga, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:17 A tungah a natui a tukna puan le savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp dinga, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:18 Pasal le numei a lup khawm khit ciangin, amau tegel tui sungah kisil ding uh a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding uh hi." 
Leviticus15:19 “Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin, ni sagih sung a ninin om dinga, amah a lawng mi peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:20 Amah a nit hun sungin a lupna le a tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:21 Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:22 Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawp dinga, tui sungah a mahmah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:23 Ama tutna ahi lupna hitaleh na khat peuhpeuh hitaleh, mi khat in a lawn ciangin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:24 Pasal khat peuhmah tua nu tawh lumin, tua nuʼ nitna ama tungah a om leh, ni sagih sung tua pa a nin hi dinga, tua paʼ lupna peuhmah zong a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:25 “Numei khat in ama nit hun hi lo napi-in ni tampi sung a si a suak ahi a, ama nit hunsung khengin nin nei-in ahi zongin a om leh, a nin neih sung khempeuh, ama nit hunsung mah bangin a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:26 Ama nin neih hunsung tengin a tutna khempeuh zong a nit sungin ama lupna tawh kibang dinga, amah a nin ahih mah bangin a tutna khempeuh zong a nin hi ding hi."
