Leviticus15:27 Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi dinga, a puante sawpin, a mahmah tui sungah kisil dinga, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Leviticus15:28 Ahih hangin tua nu a nin a bei zawh ni sagih khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi. 
Leviticus15:29 A ni giat ni-in tua nu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih la-in, kikhopna buk kong, siampipa kiangah tuate paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus15:30 Siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in, meihal biak nadingin a dang khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in ama nitna hangin Topaʼ mai ah ama ading kilemna bawlsak ding hi." 
Leviticus15:31 “Amauʼ laizang a om ka biakbuk ninsak kha le-uh amaute in sih lawh ding uh ahih ciangin, tua bangin note in Israel mite amauʼ nitna panin siangsakin na kem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus15:32 Hih pen a natui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a natui tehin, tua tawh mi nin a suak pa adingin ngeina hi a," 
Leviticus15:33 nin a nei nu ading zong ahi hi. Hihte pen pasal a natui a paikhia mi, ninnei numei le, a nin neih sungin numei tawh a lum khawm mipa adingin ngeina ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:1 Aaronʼ tapa nihte in ngeina lopi-in Topaʼ mai ah mei tawh va pai-in a sih lawh khit uh ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah thu a gen hi. 
Leviticus16:2 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thuciamna singkuang tunga om hehpihna tokhom mai, dalna puan sung lam a siangtho munah a hun lopi-in hong pai nawn loh nadingin na sanggampa Aaron kiangah gen in. A hun lopi-in hong pai leh amah si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun pen hehpihna tokhom tunga meii sungah kei ka kilatna mun ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:3 Ahih hangin siangtho munah Aaron hong pai ding zia in: Khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno khat le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat hong paipih ding hi. 
Leviticus16:4 “Amah in a siangtho saihadial puan tungsilh silhin, saihadial pheituam teengin, saihadial kawnggak tawh kigakin, saihadial dialpi khim ding hi. Hihte pen a siangtho puan ahi hi. Amah in tui sungah a pumpi sil dinga, tua ciangin tua puante silh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:5 “Amah in Israel mihonte tung panin khialhna hanga biak nadingin keeltal nih le meihal biak nadingin tuutal khat la ding hi. 
Leviticus16:6 Aaron in a mahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah le a innkuanpihte adingin kilemna bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:7 Tua ciangin amah in keeltal nih la-in, Topaʼ mai kikhopna buk kongah tuate koih ding hi." 
Leviticus16:8 Aaron in tua keel nihte tungah ai saanin, khat pen Topa ading, a dang khat pen Azazel ading ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:9 Aaron in Topa ading ai a pha keel paipihin, khialhna hanga biakna-in pia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:10 Ahih hangin Azazel adingin ai a pha keel pen gamlak ah Azazelʼ kiangah a kipuak theih nadingin kilemna bawl nadingin a hingin Topaʼ mai ah kipaipih ding hi. 
Leviticus16:11 “Aaron in a mahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal pia-in, amah le a innkuanpihte adingin kilemna bawl dinga, a mahmah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in a bawngtal go ding hi." 
Leviticus16:12 Amah in Topaʼ biakna tau panin mei-am a dim paknamtui beel khat le a kisu nen paknamtui khut nih dim la ding hi. Amah in dalna puan sungah paipihin 
Leviticus16:13 thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom pen paknamtui khu in a tuam theih nadingin Topaʼ mai ah a om mei tungah a paknamtui koih ding hi. Tua hikeileh amah si ding hi. 
Leviticus16:14 Amah in bawngtal si tawm khat la-in, a khutme tawh hehpihna tokhom a mailam tungah thehin, hehpihna tokhom mai ah a khutme tawh a si sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:15 “Tua ciangin amah in mite ading ahi khialhna hanga biakna keel go-in, dalna puan sungah a si paipih dinga, bawngtal si a theh mah bangin a si thehin, hehpihna tokhom tung le hehpihna tokhom mai ah theh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:16 Amah in tua bangin Israel miteʼ nitna hang, amauʼ thupalsatna hang le amauʼ khialhna khempeuh hangin siangtho mun adingin kilemna bawl ding hi. Amah in amauʼ nitna sungah amau tawh a om khawm kikhopna buk adingin tua mah bangin a bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:17 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl dingin amah tumin ama ading, a innkuanpihte ading le Israel mihonte khempeuh adingin kilemna a bawl khit hong paikhiat matengin kikhopna buk sungah kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Leviticus16:18 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mai ah a om biakna tau ah amah va pai-in, biakna tau siansuahna bawl dinga, bawngtal si le keel si tawm khat la-in, biakna tau kimkot a a kite nuh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:19 Amah in a khutme tawh a si tawm khat biakna tau tungah sagih vei thehin, siangsakin, Israel miteʼ nitsakna panin biakna tau siangthosak ding hi." 
Leviticus16:20 “Amah in siangtho mun, kikhopna buk le biakna tau siansuahna a bawl khit ciangin, keel hing pen paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus16:21 Aaron in keel hing lu tungah a khut tegel nga-in, Israel miteʼ mawhna, amauʼ thupalsatna le amauʼ khialhnate khempeuh, keel tungah pulak ding hi. Amah in keel lu tungah tuate suanin, a paikhiatpih dingin a kithawi sa mipa tawh sehnel gamah sawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:22 Keel in amauʼ mawhnate khempeuh pua-in gam daihna ah a pai dingin a keel khah ding hi. 
Leviticus16:23 “Tua ciangin kikhopna buk ah Aaron hong pai-in, siangtho munah a tum hunin a silh saihadial puante suahin, tua lai ah a puante nusia ding hi." 
Leviticus16:24 Amah in a siangtho mun khat ah, a pumpi tui sungah silin, a puante silh dinga, hong pai khia-in, ama meihal biakna le miteʼ meihal biakna pia-in, ama ading le mite adingin kilemna bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:25 Amah in biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna sathau hal ding hi. 
Leviticus16:26 Azazelʼ kiangah keel a paisak pa in a puante sawpin, a pumpi tui sungah sil dinga, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong ciah thei ding hi." 
Leviticus16:27 Siangtho munah kilemna bawl nadingin hong kipaipih si a kilakna, khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal le keel pen giahphual pua lamah kipua khia dinga, a vun, a sa le a ekte, mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus16:28 Tuate a hal pa in ama puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi sil dinga, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong ciah thei ding hi." 
Leviticus16:29 “Hih pen, a kha sagihna, a ni sawm ni-in note adingin a tawntungin thukham hi dinga, tualsung mi hitaleh note lakah a hong peem khualmi hitaleh an tangin, na na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus16:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni-in note siansak nadingin note-aʼ ding kilemna kibawl dinga, na khialhna khempeuh panun Topaʼ mai ah na siang ding uh hi." 
Leviticus16:31 Tua pen note adingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath hi a, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua pen a tawntung a thukham ahi hi." 
Leviticus16:32 A paʼ tanga siampi dingin sathau a kinilh a ki-ap siampipa in kilemna bawlin, a siangtho saihadial puante silh ding hi." 
Leviticus16:33 Amah in biakbuk siansuahna bawlin, kikhopna buk le biakna tau siansuah dinga, siampite le mihonte khempeuh adingin kilemna a bawl ding hi." 
Leviticus16:34 Hih pen Israel mite adingin amauʼ khialhnate khempeuh hangin kum khatin khatvei kilemna a kibawlsak theih nadingin note adingin a om tawntung ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses a gamta hi." 
Leviticus17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus17:2 “Aaron, ama tapate le Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in. Hih pen Topaʼ thupiak sa thu ahi hi." 
Leviticus17:3 Israel mi khatpeuh in bawngtal ahi a, tuuno ahi a, keel ahi zongin giahphual sung ahi a, giahphual pua ah ahi zongin go a," 
Leviticus17:4 Topaʼ biakbuk mai, Topaʼ tungah letsongin piak dingin kikhopna buk kongah a gawh kei leh, tua mipa thu palsat hi ding hi. Amah in sisan luangsak ahih manin ama miteʼ lak panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:5 Hih pen, gamlak ah Israel mite in a gawh uh amauʼ biakpiaknate hong paipih theih nading, kikhopna buk kongkhak-a siampipaʼ kiang, Topaʼ tungah amaute in tuate hong paipih theih nading le thunuam a biakpiakna-in Topa tungah sa hong gawh theih nading uh deihna ahi hi." 
Leviticus17:6 Siampipa in kikhopna buk kong a Topaʼ biakna tau tungah a si thehin, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui dingin a thau hal ding hi." 
Leviticus17:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a biak uh keeldawite adingin amauʼ biakpiaknate go nawn lo ding uh hi. Hih pen amauʼ khang tawntungin amauteʼ tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus17:8 “Nangmah in amaute tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: Israel mite sung pan hitaleh, amaute lakah a peem khual mite sung panin hitaleh meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin a pia mipa in" 
Leviticus17:9 Topaʼ tungah piak dingin kikhopna buk kongah a paipih kei leh, ama mipihte kiang panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:10 “Israel mite sung pan hitaleh amauʼ lakah a peem khual mite sung pan hitaleh mi khat in si khat peuhpeuh a nek leh, si a ne mipa ka maisiat dinga, ama mite lak panin amah ka khen khia ding hi." 
Leviticus17:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh pumpi nuntakna pen si sungah om hi. Note ading kilemna bawl nadingin note adingin biakna tau tungah tua si ka pia zo hi. Si pen nuntakna ahih manin kilemna a piangsak na ahi hi. 
Leviticus17:12 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khin hi: Note lakah kuamah in si ne lo dinga, note lakah a hong peem khualmi khatpeuh in zong si ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus17:13 “Israel mite khatpeuh hitaleh, amaute lakah a peem khualmi khatpeuh in zong hitaleh, sabetna ah, a kine thei ding gamsa khatpeuh hitaleh vasa hitaleh a man pa in a si bua khia-in leivui tawh vuk ding hi." 
Leviticus17:14 Ganhing khempeuhʼ nuntakna pen a si ahih manin Israel mite tungah hih bangin ka ci khinzo hi: Ganhing khat peuhpeuh si na ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing khempeuhʼ nuntakna pen a si ahi hi. Si a ne mi peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawl khia ding hi. 
Leviticus17:15 “A mawk sih hitaleh gamsate in a bal gawp hitaleh a ne mi peuhmah, tualsung mi hitaleh peemta hitaleh tua mi in a puante sawp dinga, a mahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga, tua khit ciangin amah siang ding hi." 
Leviticus17:16 Ahih hangin amah in tuate sawp loin ahi zongin, kisil loin ahi zongin a om leh, amah in ama mawhna pua ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus18:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus18:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:3 Note na teenna uh Egypt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a, note kong paipihna Kanaan gamah zong amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Note in amauʼ gamtatnate na zui kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus18:4 Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungta ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:6 “Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus18:7 Na nu mawhpihna tawh na paʼ tungah maizumna na tun kei ding hi. Amah pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi. 
Leviticus18:8 Nangmah in na paʼ zi dangte zong na mawhpih kei ding hi. Tua pen na paʼ mindai nading ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:9 Nangmah in na sanggamnu, na paʼ tanu, ahih kei leh na nuʼ tanu, inn-a suak hitaleh gam a suak hitaleh na mawhpih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:10 Nangmah in na tapaʼ tanu ahih kei leh na tanuʼ tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ mindaina pen nangma mindaina mah ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:11 Na paʼ ziʼ tanu, na paʼ tanu pen na sanggamnu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:12 Na ni na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na paʼ sanggam numei ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:13 Na nuʼ sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:14 Na paʼ sanggampaʼ tungah mindaina na tun kei ding hi; tua pen ama zi na naih kei ding hi, cihnopna ahi hi; tua nu pen nangma innlak nu ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:15 Na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua nu pen na tapaʼ zi ahi hi; amah na mawhpih kei ding hi. 
Leviticus18:16 Na sanggampaʼ zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua pen na sanggampaʼ mindai nading ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:17 Na luppih numei khatʼ tanu na mawhpih kei dinga, tua numeiʼ tapaʼ tanu hitaleh tua numeiʼ tanuʼ tanu hitaleh, luppih dingin na la kei ding hi. Amaute pen nangmah tawh a kinai beh numeite ahi uh hi. Tua bang gamtatna pen a siahuai ahi hi." 
Leviticus18:18 Nangmah in a sanggamnu a hingsuan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei dinga, a sanggamnu a hing laipi-in amah na luppih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:19 “Nangmah in numei khat nin a neih laitak, a nit hun sungin luppih dingin na naih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:20 Na veengpaʼ zi tawh na lum khawm kei dinga, tua nu tawh na kininsak kei ding hi." 
Leviticus18:21 Nangmah in Molek tungah meihal biakna-a piak dingin na tate khat peuhpeuh na pia kei dinga, tua bangin na Pasianʼ min na daisak kei ding hi; keimah pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus18:22 Numei khat tawh lup khop bangin pasal khat tawh na lum khawm kei ding hi; tua pen a kihhuai ahi hi. 
Leviticus18:23 Ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei dinga, numei khatpeuh in zong ganhing khatpeuh tawh a mawh dingin kipia lo ding hi; tua pen ngeina hi lo hi." 
Leviticus18:24 “Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ mai-a ka paihkhiat minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amaute kininsak uh hi. 
Leviticus18:25 Leitung a nin suak ahih manin keimah in a leitang gimna pia-in, leitang in ama tunga a teeng mite a lua khia hi." 
Leviticus18:26 Ahih hangin, tualsung mi hitaleh note lakah hong peem khualmi hitaleh, note in keima thukhamte le keima biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh a, hih a kihhuai nate khat beek na hih kei ding uh hi;" 
Leviticus18:27 (bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ ma-a a om gam mite in hih a kihhuaite khempeuh gamta uh ahih manin leitang a nin a suak hi;) 
Leviticus18:28 tua bang hikeileh leitang in noteʼ ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin amah in note hong lua khia ding hi. 
Leviticus18:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a kihhuaite khatpeuh a hihte peuhmah, amauʼ mite lak panin kihawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus18:30 “Tua ahih ciangin noteʼ ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khat peuhpeuh na gamtat ngei loh nading uh le tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak loh nadingun kong thuhilhte zui un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus19:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus19:2 “Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa noteʼ Pasian keimah ka siangtho hi. 
Leviticus19:3 Note a kuamah peuh in na nu le na pa uh zahtakin, note in ka Sabbath-te na tang ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:4 “Milimte lamah kihei kei unla, note in a kisungtawm pasian-te nomau adingin bawl kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:5 “Note in Topaʼ tungah thunuama biakpiakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan theih nadingin na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:6 Tua pen na piak ni mah uh ahih kei leh a zing ciangin kine dinga, a ni thum ni ciang dongin a omlai peuhmah mei tawh kihal ding hi." 
Leviticus19:7 A ni thum ni-in a kinek peuhmah leh, tua pen a kihhuai hi a, kisang lo ding hi." 
Leviticus19:8 Tua a ne mi peuhmah in ama mawhna pua ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topaʼ na a siangtho ninsak ahih manin ama mite sung panin kihawl khia ding hi. 
Leviticus19:9 “Na leitang tung panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lo uh ah a nawl dongin an na la kei ding uh a, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sang zong na khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:10 Note in na leenggui lo uh hawkmai loin, leenggah a kiate zong na leenggui lo panun na tawm kei ding uh hi. Note in mizawngte le peemtate adingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:11 “Note na guta kei ding uh hi. A man loin na gamta kei ding uh a, khatlekhat tungah zuau na kigen kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:12 Note in a man lopi-in keima min tawh na kiciam kei ding uh a, tua bangin na Pasian uhʼ min na daisak kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:13 “Note in na veengte uh na nengniam kei ding uh a, a na na sut kei ding uh hi. A kicial nasem paʼ thaman pen a zingsang dong zan tawntung na kemcip kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:14 Note in bilngongte phuisam loin, mittawteʼ mai-ah a puk theih nading na na koih kei ding uh a, note in na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:15 “Note in thukhenna-ah thu a tang loin na khen kei ding uh hi. Mizawngte lang gen loin, a lianteʼ thu zui loin, thumanna tawh na veengte uh thu na khen ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:16 Note in na mipihte lak uh ah mi gensia-in vaksuk-vakto loin, na veengpa uh a sih nadingin na langpang kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:17 “Note in na lungsim sung uh ah na sanggampa uh na mudah kei ding uh a, na veengte uh tawh thu na kituah lohna uh kikum khawmin na siangsak ding uh hi; tua hikeileh ama hangin khialhna na pua ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:18 Note in nomauʼ mipihte tungah phu la loin, amau na lungsim neih kei ding uh a, nomau na ki-it uh bangin na veengte uh na it ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:19 “Note in ka thukhamte na zui ding uh hi. Note in na ganhingte uh a namdang tawh ta na neisak kei ding uh hi. Note in na lo uh ah khaici nam nih na pawikhawm kei ding uh a, khau nam nih a kigan puan zong na silh kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:20 “Sila ahi numei, midang khat in zuthawl a piaksa, kitan khia nai loin amah suahtakna a kipia nai lo nu, pasal dang khat in a lupkhoppih leh, thukanna kinei ding hi. Amaute kithat lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu sila hi lai hi." 
Leviticus19:21 Ahih hangin tua pa in a mahmah adingin mawhna hanga biak nadingin tuutal khat, kikhopna bukkong, Topaʼ kiangah hong paipih ding hi." 
Leviticus19:22 Siampipa in, tua pa a gamtatnasa a khialhna hangin mawhna hanga biakna tuutal tawh Topaʼ mai-ah ama adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, a gamtatnasa a khialhna kimaisak ding hi." 
Leviticus19:23 “Note, Kanaan gamah tungin nek dingin kung nam khempeuh na suan uh ciangin, note in amauʼ gahte kum thum sung na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:24 A kum lina ciangin amauʼ gah khempeuh siangtho-in, Topaʼ tungah phatna biakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus19:25 Ahih hangin a kum ngana ciangin tuate pen note adingin hong gah semsem nadingin tuateʼ gah na ne thei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:26 “Note in sa khat peuhpeuh a sunga si tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi. Mailam thugen kholhna, ahih kei leh aisan na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:27 Note in na baa samte uh met loin na khamul mongte uh zong na tan kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus19:28 Note in mi siteʼ hangin dahna limin na ci tung uh liamsak loin noteʼ tungah ciaptehna khat peuhpeuh zong na sun kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:29 “Na tanu uh biakinn sungah paktat dinga piakna tawh siasak kei un. Tua bang hileh pasian dangte biakna sungah na tung ding uh a, gam sung khempeuh, mawhna tawh a kidim suak kha ding hi." 
Leviticus19:30 Note in ka Sabbath ni tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:31 “Vankahte le aisanna lamah kihei kei un. Amaute tawh a kininsak dingin amaute zong kei un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus19:32 “Note, sam kangteʼ mai-ah na kun ding uh a, puteekteʼ maitang zahtakin, na Pasian uh na kihta ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:33 “Na gam sung uh ah note lakah khualmi khat hong peem leh, ama tungah a man loin na gamta kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:34 Note lakah a hong peem khualmite tualsung mi mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a, nomau mah bangin amaute na it ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Egypt gam sungah khualmi na hi ngei uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:35 “Note in thukhenna, a sau tehna, a tam tehnate-ah a man loin na gamta kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus19:36 Note in tawi khaina man, tawisuang man, seu man, bung man, na zang ding uh hi. Kei pen Egypt gam panin a hong pai khiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus19:37 Note in ka thukhamte khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus20:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus20:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite khat peuhpeuh hitaleh Israel sunga a peem khual mite hitaleh, a tate khat peuhpeuh Molek pasian tungah a pia mipa kithat dinga, mihonte in suang tawh deng lum ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:3 Kei mahmah in tua mipa ka maisiat dinga, ama mite lak panin ka hawl khia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a tate Molek tungah pia-in, ka biakbuk ninsakin, ka min siangtho daisak hi." 
Leviticus20:4 Amah in Molek tungah a tate khat a piak ciangin mihonte in tua pa kimuhmawh bawlin amah a thah kei uh leh," 
Leviticus20:5 keimah in tua mipa le ama innkuanpihte maisiatin, amah le Molek biakna ah amah a zuite khempeuh amauʼ mite lak panin ka hawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:6 “Mi khat vankahna le aisan lamah kihei-in tuate thu a dot leh, keimah in tua mipa ka maisiat dinga, ama mite lak panin amah ka hawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:7 Tua ahih ciangin note ki-ap unla siangtho un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus20:8 Ka thukhamte zui unla, tuate sem un; note a hong siangthosak Topa pen keimah ka hi hi." 
Leviticus20:9 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a nu ahih kei leh a pa a samsia mi peuhmah kithat ding hi. Amah in a nu ahih kei leh a pa samsia khin a, ama sihna a mahmah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:10 “Pasal khatpeuh a veengpaʼ zi tawh a mawh leh, tua a khial pa le a khial nu kithat khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus20:11 A paʼ zi tawh a lum khawm mipa in a pa a mindaisak a suak hi. Amau tegel kithat ding hi. Amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus20:12 Pasal khat a monu tawh a lup khop leh, amau tegel kithat ding hi; amaute in sisan kinai lua mi tawh khialhna a bawl uh ahi hi. Amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:13 Pasal khat in numei khat tawh lup khop bangin pasal dang khat tawh a lup khop leh, amau tegel kihhuaina a gamta khin uh ahih manin amaute kithat dinga, amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:14 Pasal khat in zi nei-in, a ziʼ nu tawh zong a lak thuah leh, tua pen a kilawm lo ahi hi. Note lakah tua bang kilawm lohna a om loh nadingin tua pa le a nutate, mei tawh kihal lum ding hi." 
Leviticus20:15 Pasal khatpeuh ganhing khat tawh a mawh leh amah le a ganhing kithat ding hi. 
Leviticus20:16 Numei khat in ganhing khat naihin tua tawh a mawh leh, note in a numei le a ganhing na that ding uh hi; amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:17 “Pasal khat in ama sanggamnu, ahih kei leh a nuʼ tanu teen pihin a lup khawm uh leh, tua pen a zumhuai hi a, amauʼ mipihteʼ omna panin amaute kihawl khia ding hi. Ama sanggamnu tawh mawh ahih manin tua pa in ama mawhna pua ding hi." 
Leviticus20:18 Pasal khat, nin a nei numei khat tawh lum khawmin a mawh uh leh, amau tegel in siantho nading ngeina palsat uh ahih manin amauʼ mipihte lak panin kihawl khia ding hi." 
Leviticus20:19 “Note pen na nuʼ sanggamnu ahih kei leh na paʼ sanggamnu tawh na mawh kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a nai behte tawh mawhna ahih manin amaute in amauʼ mawhna pua ding uh hi. 
Leviticus20:20 Pasal khat, a paʼ sanggampaʼ zi tawh a lup khop leh, amah in a paʼ sanggampa a mindaisak ahi hi. Amaute in amauʼ khialhna thuak ding uh a, ta nei loin si ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:21 Pasal khat in a sanggampaʼ zi a lak leh, tua pen nitna hi a, amah in a sanggampa a mindaisak ahi hi. Amaute in ta nei lo ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:22 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukham khempeuh le ka biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh zui-in, tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua pen note na ten nadingun kong paipih nading leitang in note hong luakkhiat loh nading ahi hi." 
Leviticus20:23 Noteʼ mai ah keimah in ka paihkhiat minamteʼ ngeinate na zui kei ding uh hi. Amaute in hih nate khempeuh hih uh ahih manin amaute ka kih hi. 
Leviticus20:24 Ahih hangin keimah in note kiangah, ‘Note in amauʼ leitang na luah ding uh hi. Bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna leitang, na neih dingun note tungah kong pia ding hi,’ kong ci khinzo hi. Kei pen miteʼ kiang panin note a hong khen khia Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus20:25 Tua ahih ciangin note in ganhing a siang le a nin, vasa a siang le a nin khentelna na bawl ding uh hi. Note in nin hi, ci-in na seh dingun keimah in ka tuam koih sa ganhing hitaleh vasa hitaleh leitung a a pai thei khat peuhpeuh tawh hitaleh, note na kininsak kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus20:26 Note pen keima adingin na siangtho ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah ka siangtho a, note pen keima-aʼ na hih theih nadingun mite kiang panin note kong tuam koih zo hi." 
Leviticus20:27 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin van a kah a, ai a saan leh kithat dinga, suang tawh amaute kidenglum ding hi. Amauʼ sihna amau mah ngawh ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:1 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaronʼ tapa siampite tungah thu gen inla, amaute lak panin kuamah in ama beh nai pen ahi a nu, a pa, a tapa, a tanu, a sanggampa," 
Leviticus21:2  
Leviticus21:3 ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tua nu in pasal nei nai lo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tua nu hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misiteʼ hangin kininsak lo ding hi. 
Leviticus21:4 Amah in pasal nei sa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin, tua bangin kidaisak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:5 “Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin, amauʼ khamul nawlhui zong kiat loin, a ci tung uh liamsak lo ding uh hi." 
Leviticus21:6 Amaute pen amauʼ Pasian adingin siangtho ding uh a, amauʼ Pasianʼ min daisak lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amauʼ Pasianʼ anlum ahi, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute siangtho ding uh hi." 
Leviticus21:7 Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsak sa numei teenpih lo ding uh a, a pasal in a mak sa numei zong teenpih lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa pen ama Pasian adingin siangtho hi." 
Leviticus21:8 Amah in noteʼ Pasianʼ anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh a, amah pen note adingin siangtho ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah, note hong siangthosak pa, ka siangtho hi." 
Leviticus21:9 Siampipa khat peuhpeuhʼ tanu in paktatna tawh amah le amah a kidaisak leh, ama pa a daisak ahi hi. Tua nu mei tawh kihal lum ding hi." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ama sanggamte lakah siampi lianpen, a lu tungah nilh sathau a kisunna pa, a puante silh dingin a ki-ap khin siampipa in a samte phiahsak loin, a puante zong bal kek lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:11 Amah in a nu le a pa nangawn ahi zongin misi khat peuhpeuh kiangah pai loin, a mahmah zong kininsak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:12 Biakbuk panin zong paikhia loin, ama Pasianʼ biakbuk zong daisak lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama Pasian-aʼ ahi ki-apna nilh sathau ama tungah om hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus21:13 Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi. 
Leviticus21:14 Meigong numei, a kima sa numei, a kininsak sa numei, numei paktat, hih bangte pawl teenpih lo dinga, amah in ama mite lak panin nungak khat zi-in la ding hi." 
Leviticus21:15 Tua pen ama mite lakah a tate a daisak loh nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosak pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi, ci in,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:16 Topa in Moses tungah," 
Leviticus21:17 “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi in a khangkhangin ama Pasianʼ anlum pia dingin hong neh thei lo ding hi. 
Leviticus21:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei, mittaw, khelbai, maihem le khutlekhe sau lua," 
Leviticus21:19 khut liam, khe liam," 
Leviticus21:20 elkul le mi cingtaak lo, mit hoih lo le cithak a vei, meima nei le ciltang kitam mi in hong naih lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:21 Siampi Aaronʼ suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa ading meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai ah hong pai lo ding hi. Amah in poina nei ahih manin, ama Pasianʼ anlum pia dingin a nai ah hong pai lo ding hi." 
Leviticus21:22 Amah in ama Pasianʼ anlum, a siangtho pen le a siangtho ante ne thei ding hi." 
Leviticus21:23 Ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin, ka biakbuk a daisak loh nadingin dalna puan gei ahi a, biakna tau nai ah ahi zongin hong pai lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a siangthosak pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen hi. 
Leviticus22:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:2 “Aaron le a tapate in keima min siangtho a daisak loh nadingun amaute in keima tungah a hong ap uh ahi, Israel miteʼ piak a siangthote panin a kikep nadingun gen in; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:3 Amaute kiangah, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh sung panin a khangkhangin khatpeuh in a nit laitakin Israel mite in Topaʼ tungah a ap a siangtho nate a naih leh keima omna panin tua pa kihawl khia ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:4 “‘Aaronʼ gui sung panin meima nei le a natui a paikhia mi peuhmah in amah a siangtho mateng a siangtho an ne thei lo ding hi. Misi lawnna hitaleh a natui a teh pa lawnna hitaleh a nin na khat peuhpeuh a lawng pa," 
Leviticus22:5 amah a nit theih nadingin a bokvak ganhing khat hitaleh nitna a ngah theih nading mi khat hitaleh a lawng pa, ama nitna pen bangbang hitaleh," 
Leviticus22:6 tua bang na a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi dinga, amah in tui sungah a pumpi a sil kei leh a siangtho an ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:7 Ni a tum ciangin amah siang dinga, tua khit ciangin amah in a siangtho an ne thei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangte pen ama nek ding mah ahi hi." 
Leviticus22:8 A mawk sihte hitaleh gamsate in a bal gawpte hitaleh amah in tuate nekna tawh amah kininsak lo ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in." 
Leviticus22:9 “Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ka thuhilhna zui ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh amaute in tua thu a daisak uh ciangin khialhna thuakin sihpih ding uh hi. Amaute a siangthosak pa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus22:10 “A pualam mi in a siangtho an ne lo ding hi. Siampipaʼ inn ah a om peemta ahi a, a kicial nasemte in ahi zongin a siangtho an ne lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:11 Ahih hangin siampipa khat in ama adingin sum tawh sila khat a lei leh, tua a sila in ne thei ding hi. Ama inn sungah a suak mite in ama an ne thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:12 Siampipaʼ tanu khat a pualam mi khat tawh a kiteen leh tua nu in a siangtho biakna an ne thei lo ding hi. 
Leviticus22:13 Ahih hangin siampipaʼ tanu pen meigong ahi a, a kima ahi zongin, ta nei loin a nungak lai mah bangin a paʼ inn ah a ciahkik leh, tua nu in a paʼ an ne thei ding hi. Ahi zongin a pualam mi kuamah in tua an ne thei lo ding hi." 
Leviticus22:14 “Mi khat in theih lohna hangin a siangtho an khat peuhpeuh a nekkhak leh, tua a na manzah seh nga ah seh khat behlapin, siampipa tungah a siangtho an man pia ding hi." 
Leviticus22:15 Amaute in Topaʼ tungah a piak ahi, Israel-teʼ an a siangtho pen siampite in ninsak lo ding uh a," 
Leviticus22:16 tua bangin amauʼ an a siangthote nekna tawh mawhna le khialhna amaute puasak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen amaute a siangthosak Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus22:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:18 “Aaron le a tapate le Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih bangin gen in: Israel mite sung panin ahi zongin Israel mite sungah a peem mite lak pan ahi zongin mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin, thuciamna a tunsakna hitaleh meihal biakna-in Topaʼ tungah a kipia utthu-a biakna hitaleh," 
Leviticus22:19 hong kisan theih nadingin bawngtal hitaleh tuu hitaleh keel hitaleh, a sitbaang lo a pa khat na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:20 Note in a sitbaang khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hong kisang zo lo ding hi. 
Leviticus22:21 Mi khatpeuh in bawng hon panin ahi a, tuu le keel hon panin ahi zongin thuciamna tunsak nading hitaleh utthu-a biakna-in hitaleh Topaʼ tungah thunuam a biakna a piak ciangin, a kisan theih nadingin a ganhing a cidam hi dinga, sitbaanna a om lo hi ding hi." 
Leviticus22:22 Ganhing a mittaw, a gamtang thei lo, a hem, meima nai a nei, cithak ahih kei leh meima a neite pen, note in Topaʼ tungah pia loin, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in biakna tau tungah tuate na zang kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:23 Bawngtal hitaleh tuuno hitaleh a na khat peuhpeuh a sau lua ahih kei leh a tom luate pen note in utthu-a biakna-in na pia thei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin thuciamna tunsakna a piak dingin tua bangte kisang zo lo hi. 
Leviticus22:24 A ciltangte a sanim, a kisuzan, a kitam, ahih kei leh a ki-at khia ganhing khat peuhpeuh, note in Topaʼ tungah pia loin, na gam sung uh ah biakna-in na zang kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:25 “Gamdang mite khat peuhpeuh tung panin a kingah ganhingte zong na Pasian uhʼ an dingin note in na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute sitbaang a, hem ahih manin tuate hong kisang zo lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus22:26 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus22:27 “Bawng ahih kei leh tuu ahih kei leh keel khat a suah ciangin a pi tawh ni sagih sung om khawm ding hi. A ni giat ni a kipanin tua gan no pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna-in kisang thei ding hi. 
Leviticus22:28 A pi pen bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh, note in a pi le a no ni khat sungin na go khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:29 Note in Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh biakna na piak uh ciangin, note hong kisan theih nadingin na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus22:30 A tua ni mahin kine dinga, note in zingsang dong siit na nei kei ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Leviticus22:31 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiaknate zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus22:32 Note in keima min siangtho na daisak kei ding uh a, Israel mite lakah kei hong kisiangthosak ding hi. Kei pen note a hong siangthosak Topa," 
Leviticus22:33 noteʼ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih pa ka hi hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in a siangtho biak kikhopnate hi, ci-in na gen ding uh keimah Topaʼ pawi a kisehte hih bang ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:3 Ni guk sungin nasep kizo dinga, ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath, a siangtho kikhopna ahi hi. Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen noteʼ teenna khempeuh ah Topa adingin Sabbath ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:4 “Hihte pen amaute adingin a kiseh hunin note in na gen ding uh ahi Topaʼ pawi a kisehte, a siangtho biak kikhopnate ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:5 “A kha masa, a ni sawm le li nitak pen Topaʼ Paisan Pawi ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:6 Tua kha mah, a ni sawm le nga ni pen Topaʼ tungah silngo sawh loh anlum pawi ahi hi. Ni sagih sung note in silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:7 A ni masa ni-in note in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:8 Ahih hangin note in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna ni sagih sung na pia ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi dinga, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:9 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak leitang ah note tungin an na lak uh ciangin, note in an na lakna uh ah anpal lom khat, siampipa kiangah na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:11 Note hong kisan theih nadingin amah in Topaʼ mai ah anlom vei dinga, Sabbath ni a zing ciangin siampipa in tua anlom vei ding hi." 
Leviticus23:12 Note in anlom na vei ni-un, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:13 Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding an tawh biakna pen sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi dinga, a gim namtui dingin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in kipia ding hi. Tua tawh a kipia khawm ding leenggahzu tawh biakna pen leenggahzu thawl khat hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:14 Note in na Pasian uh biakna na paipih ma, hih ni matengin anlum hitaleh a ki-em an hitaleh a sial hitaleh na ne kei ding uh hi; tua pen noteʼ khang tawntungin na teenna khempeuh uh ah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus23:15 “Note in Sabbath khit a zing ciang, vei-a biakna anlom na paipih ni uh a kipan nipikal sagih bit dong a ni na sim to ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:16 A Sabbath sagihna khit a zing ciang dong ni sawm nga dong na sim to ding uh a, tua ciangin note in Topaʼ tungah an thak tawh biakna na paipih ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:17 Note in na teenna uh panin vei dingin an lawh nih a kibawl anlum nih nong paipih ding uh hi. Tuate pen annel a kibawl, silngo sawhin a ki-em, Topaʼ tungah anpalin a kipia hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:18 Note in anlum tawh, a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno sagih le bawngtalno khat le tuutal nih na pia ding uh hi. Tuate, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui mei tawh kihal biak nadingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate tawh Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:19 Note in khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat le thunuam a biakpiakna-in kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nih na pia ding uh hi. 
Leviticus23:20 Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in anpal-anlum le tuuno nih tawh tuate vei dinga, tuate pen siampipa adingin Topaʼ mai ah a siangtho hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:21 Note in tua ni mahin thu zaksakna na bawl ding uh a, a siangtho kikhop khat na nei ding uh hi. Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi; tua pen noteʼ teenna khempeuh ah na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus23:22 “Note in na leitang panun an na lak uh ciangin, na lonawl dongun la loin, an na lak khit uh ciangin a sangte zong na khawm kei ding uh a, mizawngte le khualmi adingin tuate na nusia ding uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:24 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A kha sagihna, a ni masa ni-in note in a thupi tawlngakna ni khat, peengkul aw tawh a kitaangko phawksakna, a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:25 Note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh a, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na paipih ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:26 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:27 “Hih a kha sagihna ni sawm ni pen kilemna ni ahi hi. Tua pen note adingin a siangtho kikhop hun hi dinga, note in an tangin, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:28 Note in tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin kilemna bawl ni ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in bang khat peuhpeuh a ne kha mi peuhmah ama mite kiang panin kihawl khia ding hi. 
Leviticus23:30 Tua ni-in na khat peuhpeuh a sem mi peuhmah keimah in ama mite lak panin ka that ding hi. 
Leviticus23:31 Note in na na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun na teenna khempeuh uh ah ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus23:32 Tua pen note adingin a thupi tawlngakna Sabbath ni hi dinga, an na tang ding uh hi. Tua kha ni kua nitak a kipan, a nitak panin a nitakkik dong note in na Sabbath uh na tang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:33 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus23:34 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung pen Topa ading buk pawi ahi hi. 
Leviticus23:35 A ni masa ni pen a siangtho kikhopna ni hi dinga, thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:36 Ni sagih sung note in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh a, a ni giat ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua pen a thupi kikhopna khat hi a, note in thatang nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:37 “Hihte pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate, biakpiakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate, amauʼ ni ciatin piak dingin a siangtho kikhopna hunin na gen ding uh, Topaʼ pawi a kisehte ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:38 Note in Topaʼ tungah na piak uh Topaʼ Sabbath-te, noteʼ letsongte, thuciamna hangin na biaknate khempeuh uh le utthu-a na biaknate khempeuh uh banah piak ding ahi hi." 
Leviticus23:39 “Note in leitang a piangte na kaihkhop khit uh, kha sagihna, a ni sawm le nga ni a kipan ni sagih sung Topaʼ pawi na bawl ding uh hi. A ni masa ni pen a thupi tawlngakna khat hi a, a ni giat ni zong a thupi tawlngakna khat mah hi ding hi." 
Leviticus23:40 Note in a ni masa ni-in singkung hoih gahte, nisuh hiangte, a teh tam singhiangpite le lui a gialhekte la-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawina, ni sagih sung pawi na bawl ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:41 Note in tua pen kum simin ni sagih sung pawi-in na nei ding uh a, noteʼ khang tawntungin ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi. Note in kha sagihna sungah na bawl ding uh hi." 
Leviticus23:42 No Israel mi khempeuh ni sagih sung buk sungah na teeng ding uh hi. 
Leviticus23:43 Tua pen keimah in Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiatpih lai-in Israel mite, buk sungah ka tensakna thu noteʼ suanlekhakte in a theih nading uh ahi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus23:44 Tu-a bangin Moses in Israel mite tungah Topaʼ pawi a kisehte a gen hi. 
Leviticus24:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus24:2 “Meivak khat a tawntungin a kivak suak theih nadingin meivak adingin oliv gah a kisuzante panin sathau siangtho nang kiangah hong paipih nading uh Israel mite thu pia in. 
Leviticus24:3 Kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna singkuang dalna puan pua lamah, Aaron in nitak a kipanin zingsang dongin Topaʼ mai ah a tawntungin tua meivak a ngeina bangin koih dinga, tua pen na khang tawntungun ngeina khat hi tawntung ding hi." 
Leviticus24:4 Amah in kham citak meivak khuam tungah meivakte a ngeina bangin Topaʼ mai ah omsak tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus24:5 “Nangmah in annel la inla, tua panin moh sawm le nih bawlin em in; moh khat ciangin annel lawh nih hi ding hi." 
Leviticus24:6 Nangmah in kham citak sabuai tungah tuate gual nihin na koih dinga, gual khat ah guk om ding hi." 
Leviticus24:7 Phawkna-in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh biakna-in piak dingin anlum tawh a pai khawm theih nadingin nangmah in a gual nihte ah paknamtui siangtho na koih ding hi. 
Leviticus24:8 Sabbath nisimin Aaron in a tawntung thuciamna-in Israel mite tang dingin Topaʼ mai ah a ngeina bangin koih tawntung ding hi. 
Leviticus24:9 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna sung panin amah in a tawntung a a ngah ding, a siangtho pen ama kaih ahih manin, Aaron le a suante-aʼ ding hi a, amaute in a siangtho mun khat ah ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus24:10 Tu-in Israel numei khatʼ tapa, a pa Egypt mi ahi khat, Israel mite lakah a pai hi. Israel numeiʼ tapa le Israel mi khat giahphual ah kitawng uh a," 
Leviticus24:11 Israel numeiʼ tapa in Min Siangtho gensia-in samsia hi. Amaute in Moses kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Ama nuʼ min pen Shelomith hi a, Dan minam, Dibriʼ tanu ahi hi." 
Leviticus24:12 Topaʼ deihna amaute tungah a kigen mateng amaute in tua mipa khumcip uh hi. 
Leviticus24:13 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus24:14 “A samsia mipa pen giahphual pua lamah paipih in. Ama samsiat a za mi khempeuh ama lu tungah amauʼ khut ngasak inla, mihonte khempeuh amah deng lumsak in." 
Leviticus24:15 Tua ciangin Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Ama Pasian a samsia mi peuhmah in ama khialhna thuak ding hi. 
Leviticus24:16 Topaʼ min a gen sia mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in amah deng lum ding uh hi. Peemta hitaleh tualsung mi hitaleh, Min Siangtho a gensiate kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus24:17 “Mi a that pa kithat ding hi. 
Leviticus24:18 Ganhing a that pa in a ganhing mahin loh ding hi. A thu-in ci lehang nuntakna le nuntakna a kithuk ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus24:19 “Mi khat in a veengte khat a poisak leh, ama hih bangin ama tung mahah kithukkik dinga," 
Leviticus24:20 guh kitan tang ding guh kitan, mittang tang ding mittang, ha tang ding ha kihih dinga, amah in mi khat a poisak bangin amah kipoisak ding hi." 
Leviticus24:21 Ganhing a that pa in loh dinga, mi a that pa kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus24:22 Note in peemta le tualsung mi adingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus24:23 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite tungah hih thu a gen hi. Amaute in a samsia mipa giahphual pua lamah paipih uh a, suang tawh a deng lum uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite in a hih uh hi." 
Leviticus25:1 Topa in Sinai Mual tungah Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus25:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitang ah na tun uh ciangin, Topa pahtawina-in leitang tawlngak hun na omsak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:3 Kum guk sung note in na lo uh na pawi ding uh a, kum guk sung na leenggui lo uh hahin a gahte na kaikhawm ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna ah leitang ading a thupi tawlngakna sabbath, Topa pahtawina sabbath om ding hi. Note in na lo uh na pawi kei ding uh a, na leenggui lo uh na hah kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:5 A li pote note in na kaikhawm kei ding uh a, a kipuah lo leenggui gahte na khawm kei ding uh hi. Leitang adingin a thupi tawlngakna hi ding hi." 
Leviticus25:6 Lo na khawh loh uh hangin leitang tawlngak kumin a piang tawmte in note ading, na sila numei le na sila pasalte ading, a kicial nasemte le note tawh a teeng a peem mite ading an hong sik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:7 A piang khempeuhte pen na bawngte uh le na leitang uh ah a om ganhingteʼ an ding ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:8 “Kum nipi sagih hun pen note adingin kum sawm li le kua ahih theih nadingin note in kum nipi sagih, kum sagih mun sagih vei na sim to ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:9 Tua ciangin note in kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in nakpi-in peengkul na tum ding uh a, kilemna ni-in note in na gam sung khempeuh uh ah peengkul aw na ging khiasak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:10 Note in a kum sawm ngana siangthosakin, gam sunga a teeng mi khempeuh tungah suahtakna thu na zasak ding uh hi. Note in nomauʼ neihsa ciat ngahkikin, sila-in a kizuak mite nomauʼ innkuanpihte ciat kiangah na ciahkik uh ciangin note adingin jubilee hi ding hi." 
Leviticus25:11 Tua a kum sawm ngana pen note adingin jubilee hi ding hi. Tua kum sungin note in lo pawi loin, a li pote zong la loin, a kihah lo leengguite panin zong leenggah na khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen jubilee ahi hi. Tua pen note-aʼ dingin siangtho dinga, note in lo panin a piang tawmte na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:13 “Hih jubilee kum sungin note khempeuh in nomauʼ neihsa ciat na ngahkik ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:14 Note in na veengteʼ tungah na zuak uh ahi zongin na veengteʼ kiang panin na lei uh ahi zongin note khatlekhat na kikhem kei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:15 Jubilee khit ciangin a jubilee kik dong a kum phazah tawh kituakin note in na veengte uh kiang panin lei-in, a an piang ding kum zah tawh kituakin amau in note tungah hong zuak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:16 A kum a tam lai leh a man na tamsak ding uh a, a kum a tawm leh a man na tawmsak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh no tungah hong zuak pen a tuk tung ding zah ahi hi." 
Leviticus25:17 Note khatlekhat kikhem loin na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus25:18 “Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte zui-in tuate na sem ding uh hi. Tua hileh note lungmuang takin gam sungah na teeng ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:19 Leitang in an hong piangsak dinga, note in na kham takun ne-in, lungmuang takin na teeng ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:20 “Note in, ‘Lo lah pawi loin, an lah la kei lehang, a kum sagihna ah bang ne ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uh leh" 
Leviticus25:21 keimah in a kum gukna ah note tungah thupha kong pia dinga, kum thum sung khom ding an hong piang ding hi." 
Leviticus25:22 A kum giatna ah lo na pawi ding uh ciangin, note in an lui na ne lai ding uh hi. An thak hong tun a kum kuana mateng note in a lui na ne ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:23 “Leitang pen keima-aʼ ahih manin neih suak dingin leitang kizuak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note pen kei tawh a om khawm khualmi le peemtate na hi uh hi. 
Leviticus25:24 “Note in na neih uh leitang khempeuh na kitanhkiksak thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:25 Na sanggampa zawngin a neihsa leitang khen khat a zuak leh, amah tawh a kinai a behpa hong pai-in a sanggampaʼ zuak sa tanh ding hi." 
Leviticus25:26 Mi khat in tua na a tatsak ding mi a neih kei a, a mahmah hong haukikin a tanh zo dingin a pian leh," 
Leviticus25:27 amah in tua na a zuak zawh a kumte sim dinga, a zuakna mipa tungah a piak lai ding a kisam zah pia dinga, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:28 Ahih hangin amah in ama adingin ngahkik zawh nading lampi a neih kei leh, tua ama zuak leitang pen jubilee kum mateng a leipaʼ khut sungah om ding hi. Jubilee kum ciangin tua leitang kipia khia dinga, amah in a neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:29 “Mi khat in khuapi kulh sungah teenna inn khat a zuak leh, a kizuak khit kum khat bit sungin amah in tanhkik thei dinga, kum khat bit sungin amah in tatkik theih nading thu nei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:30 Tua pen kum khat bit sungin a kitatkik kei leh, khuapi kulh sunga om tua inn pen a leipa in khang tawntungin a neih dingin kibawlsak dinga, jubilee kum ciangin zong kipia khiakik tuan nawn lo ding hi." 
Leviticus25:31 Ahih hangin a kimkot ah kulh a nei lo khua neu-a innte pen gam sung lote tawh a kibangin kingaihsun ding hi. Tuate kitanhkik thei dinga, jubilee kum ciangin tuate kipia khia ding hi." 
Leviticus25:32 Ahi zongin Levi miteʼ khuapite, amauʼ neihsa khuapite-a innte ahihleh, Levi mite in khatvei peuh ciangin tanh thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:33 Levi mi khatpeuh in ama tatkik theih ding hi napi a tatkik zawh kei leh, amauʼ neihsa khuapi sunga tua inn pen jubilee kum ciangin kipiakik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi miteʼ khuapi sunga innte pen Israel miteʼ lakah amauʼ neihsa ahi hi." 
Leviticus25:34 Ahih hangin amauʼ khuapi taang gamte kizuak thei lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amauʼ neih tawntung na ahi hi. 
Leviticus25:35 “Na sanggampa uh zawngin, note bangin amah a kivak zawh kei leh, note in amah na vak ding uh hi. Khualmi le peemta bangin amah pen note tawh hong om ding hi." 
Leviticus25:36 Na sanggampa uh no kiangah hong ten theih nadingin ama tung panin a meet a khang la kei unla, na Pasian uh zahtak un." 
Leviticus25:37 Note in ama tungah a meetin sum leitawi pia loin, ama tungah a meetin na an uh zong na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:38 Kei pen noteʼ Pasian ahi ding le, note tungah Kanaan leitang a hong pia dingin Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus25:39 “Na gei-a om na sanggampa zawngin, nangma tungah a mahmah hong kizuak leh, sila bangin na na semsak kei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:40 Amah pen a kicial nasem le peemta bangin nang kiangah om ding hi. Amah in jubilee kum mateng nangma na hong sem dinga," 
Leviticus25:41 tua ciangin nang kiang panin amah le ama kiangah a om a tate paikhia dinga, ama innkuan zuan kikin, a pateʼ neihsa ngahkik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte hi a, amaute sila-in kizuak lo ding hi." 
Leviticus25:43 Note in hih gawpgawpna tawh amah na uk kei ding uh a, na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:44 Note in na neih theih ding uh sila numei le sila pasalte hih bang ahi hi: Na kimkot uh a om minam dangte lak panin sila numei le sila pasal na lei thei ding uh hi. 
Leviticus25:45 Note in na gam sung uh ah a suak, note lakah a hong peem khual mite le note tawh a om amauʼ innkuante lak panin zong na lei thei ding uh a, amaute pen nomau aʼ hi thei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:46 Note in amaute pen noteʼ khit ciangin na tapate uh tungah amauʼ neih tawntung dingin a luah dingin na pia thei ding uh hi. Note in sila-in amaute na nei thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggam uh Israel mite khatlekhat hih gawpgawpna tawh na ki-uk kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus25:47 “Note lakah a teeng khualmi ahih kei leh peemta khat hong hau a, ama kiang a om na sanggampa uh zawngin, no tawh a om khualmipa tung ahi a, peemta mipa tungah ahi zongin, tua ahih kei leh khualmipaʼ innkuan khat peuhpeuh tungah amah a kizuak leh," 
Leviticus25:48 amah a kizuak khit ciangin amah kitanhkik thei dinga, ama sanggamte khat peuhpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi." 
Leviticus25:49 Ama innlak pa ahih kei leh a innlak sanggampa in tanh thei ding hi. Ama innkuan sunga a kinaipih a beh khatpeuh in amah tanh thei ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh zong amah a hauh leh a mahmah kitanhkik thei ding hi. 
Leviticus25:50 Midang tungah a mahmah a kizuak a kipan jubilee kum dong amah a leipa tawh tuat dinga, ama suahtak nading sum pen a kum phazah tawh kituak hi ding hi. A topa tawh a om khawm hun sungteng pen a kicial nasem khat thaman zahin seh ding hi." 
Leviticus25:51 Kum tampi in a sap lai leh, amah in tuate tawh a kituakin ama thaman ding a kipiakna sung panin ama kitatkhiat nadingin piakik ding hi." 
Leviticus25:52 Ahih hangin jubilee kum ding kum tawm khat bek in a sap leh amah in a topa tawh tuatna khat nei ding hi. Ama sepsak ding kum a om lai tawh kituakin ama kitatkhiat nadingin sum piakik ding hi. 
Leviticus25:53 Amah pen a topa tungah a kumkumin a kicial nasem pa tawh kibang ding hi. A topa in noteʼ muhna ah hih gawpgawpna tawh amah uk lo ding hi. 
Leviticus25:54 Hih bang danin amah a kitatkhiat kei leh, jubilee kum ciangin amah le amah tawh a om a tate kikhah khia ding hi." 
Leviticus25:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite pen kei adingin nasemte ahi uh hi. Amaute pen Egypt gam panin keimah in ka paikhiatpih keima nasemte ahi uh hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Leviticus26:1 “Note in nomau adingin a mai ah na kun dingun milim bawl loin, a kiseek milim hitaleh biakna song hitaleh na dingsak kei ding uh a, na gam sung uh ah suang milim na phut kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:2 Note in ka sabbath-te tangin keimah hong kibiakna mun na zahtak ding uh hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Leviticus26:3 “Note in ka thukham zui-in, ka thupiaknate mangin tuate na sep uh leh," 
Leviticus26:4 keimah in note tungah guahtui a hunin kong pia dinga, leitang in an hong piangsakin, lo-a kungte in amauʼ gah gah ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:5 Na cil uh ante leenggah lawh hun dong kimang dinga, leenggah minte zong lo pawi hun dong kimang ding hi. Note in na kham takun an na ne ding uh a, lungnuam takin na gam sung uh ah na teeng ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:6 “Keimah in gam sungah nopsakna hong pia-in, note lungnuam takin na lum ding uh a, bangmah in note hong lausak lo ding hi. Keimah in gam sung panin ganhing gilote ka hawl khia dinga, gal kidona in na gam uh hong nawk lo ding hi." 
Leviticus26:7 Note in na galte uh na delh ding uh a, noteʼ mai ah namsau in amaute puksak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:8 Note nga in za khat zo-in, note za khat in tul sawm na zo ding uh hi. Noteʼ mai ah namsau in na galte uh puksak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:9 Keimah in note ka hong pi ngaihsut dinga, note hong pungsakin, tampi kong phasak dinga, note tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:10 Note in sau veipi a kikhol anluite ne-in, a thak koih nadingin a lui na hahsiang masa ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:11 Keimah in note lakah omna ka bawl dinga, keimah in note kong kih kei ding hi." 
Leviticus26:12 Keimah, noteʼ lakah omin noteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, note, keima mite na hi ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:13 Note pen amauʼ sila na hih loh nadingun Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Keimah in noteʼ gimna hakkolte kuaitanin note a ding tangin kong paisak hi. 
Leviticus26:14 “Ahih hangin note in ka thu ngai loin, hih thupiaknate khempeuh na hih kei uh a," 
Leviticus26:15 ka thukhamte nialin, ka biakna ngeina kipte kih a, ka thupiaknate khempeuh sem loin, ka thuciamna na palsat uh leh," 
Leviticus26:16 keimah in note tungah hih bangin kong hih ding hi: Noteʼ tungah hong tung dingin keimah in thakhat thu a dipkuatna, zawngkhalna le mite siasakin nuntakna a kiamsak ding cisa natna kong tungsak ding hi. Noteʼ lo pawi zong a mawkna hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na galte un tuate ne ding hi." 
Leviticus26:17 Keimah in note kong maisiat dinga, na galte uh mai ah lelhna na thuak ding uh hi. Note hong mudah mite in note hong uk dinga, kuamah in note hong delh lo napi-in na tai ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:18 “Tua bang hi napi-in note in ka thu nong ngaih kei veve uh leh, keimah in na khialhna hangun a zah sagih vei-in note kong thuhilhkik dinga," 
Leviticus26:19 keimah in na kiphatsakpih uh noteʼ vangliatna susia-in, van panin guah hong zusak loin, na leitang uh sik ka bangsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:20 Na leitang un an piangsak loin, na gam sung uh a kungte in amauʼ gah gah lo ding ahih manin noteʼ thatang a mawkna-in a bei hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:21 “Tua ciangin kei hong demin, keima thu na ngaih kei lai uh leh, keimah in noteʼ khialhna a zah sagih vei-in noteʼ tungah gimna kong tungsak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:22 Keimah in noteʼ lakah gamsate hong khahin, amaute in na tate uh hong neksak ding uh a, na ganhingte uh susia-in, note mi tawmno khat hong suah dinga, noteʼ lampite zong gamkhing hong suak ding hi." 
Leviticus26:23 “Hih banga hihna tawh note hong kihei tuan loin, kei na hong demlai uh leh," 
Leviticus26:24 kei zong note hong gawtin, kei mahmah in na khialhnate uh hangin a zah sagih vei-in kong sat ding hi." 
Leviticus26:25 Keimah in, thuciamna om sa bangin phulakna na a sem ding namsau khat noteʼ tungah kong tungsak ding hi. Na khuapi sung uh ah note na kikaihkhop uh leh zong keimah in noteʼ lakah natna kong tungsak dinga, na galte uh khut sungah note hong kipia ding hi." 
Leviticus26:26 Keimah in noteʼ nuntakna an ka suksiat ciangin, an kicing lo ahih manin nupi sawm in meibung khat sungah na anlum uh em khawm dinga, na anlum uh a tawi tehin hong pia khiakik ding hi. Note in na ne ding uh a, na kham zo kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:27 “Tua bang hi napi-in note in keima thu ngai loin, kei na hong demlai uh leh," 
Leviticus26:28 note ka hong heh ngawh bawl dinga, noteʼ khialhna hangin a zah sagih vei-in kong thuhilh ding hi." 
Leviticus26:29 Note na gil uh kial lua ding ahih manin na tapate uh le na tanute uhʼ sa na ne ding uh hi. 
Leviticus26:30 Keimah in mual dawna na biaknate uh susia-in, na paknamtui biakna taute uh phukin, noteʼ milimʼ siluang hawmte tungah na luanghawmte uh ka pai dinga, keimah in note kong kih ding hi." 
Leviticus26:31 Keimah in na khuapite uh siasakin, na biakna munte uh gamkhing ka suaksak dinga, nomauʼ hong biakna a gim namtuite ka diik kei ding hi." 
Leviticus26:32 Keimah in leitang ka siasak dinga, tua tungah a teeng na galte un lamdang sa ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:33 Keimah in minam dangte lakah note kong thehthang dinga, keimah in namsau a paai panin dokin note kong delh ding hi. Na leitang uh gamkhing suak dinga, na khuapite uh a sia hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:34 Tua ciangin na galte uh leitang ah na om tanvei uh, gamkhingin a om sungteng, leitang in tawlngak hun a ngah hi ding hi. Leitang tawlnga-in, a sabbath-te a tang hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:35 Ama tungah na ten laitakun na ngahsak loh uh tawlngakna ahi a sabbath-te, gamkhingin a om sungteng a tawlnga hi ding hi." 
Leviticus26:36 “Noteʼ sung panin galteʼ leitang ah a om lai mite tungah lungsim gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Nahthel ging in amaute taisak dinga, namsau mai ah mi khat a tai bangin amaute tai ding uh a, kuamah in a delh lohpi-in amaute puk ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:37 Kuamah in delh lo napi-in namsau mai pan a tai khia bangin khatlekhat na kiphupai ding uh a, na galte uh nan zawh nading vangliatna na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:38 Minam dangte lakah note na sia ding uh a, na galte uhʼ leitang in note hong valh tum ding hi." 
Leviticus26:39 Noteʼ sung panin galteʼ leitang ah a omlaite amauʼ mawhna hangin kiam ding uh a, amauʼ pute pate a mawhna uh hangin a kiam bangun amau zong a kiam ding uh hi." 
Leviticus26:40 “Ahih hangin kei tungah khemna tawh hong gamtatna sa uh le kei hong demna uh hangin amaute gawt bawlin, amauʼ galteʼ leitang ah amaute ka paipihna hangin, amauʼ mawhna le a pu a pate uh mawhna pulakin a lungsim uh niamkhiatin, amaute in a mawhna a kipuahphat uh leh," 
Leviticus26:41  
Leviticus26:42 keimah in Jakob tawh ka thuciamna, Isaac tawh ka thuciamna le Abraham tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk dinga, leitang zong ka phawk ding hi." 
Leviticus26:43 Ahih hangin amaute in leitang nusia-in, amaute om loin gamkhingin a om sungteng leitang in a sabbath-te na ngah ding hi. Amaute in ka biakna ngeina kipte nialin, ka thukhamte mudah uh ahih manin, a mawhna uh a kipuahphat ding uh kisam hi." 
Leviticus26:44 Bangbang ahi zongin, a galte uh gam sungah amaute a om sungteng uh keimah in amaute nil khia loin, amaute a susia maimang zah ding le amaute tawh ka thuciamna a pelh zah dingin amaute ka mudah kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa amauʼ Pasian ka hi hi." 
Leviticus26:45 Ahih hangin keimah in amaute ka ngaihsutna-in amauʼ Pasian ka hih theih nadingin, minam dangteʼ muhna ah Egypt gam panin ka paikhiatpih amauʼ pu le pate tawh ka thuciamna ka phawk ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus26:46 Hihte pen Moses tungtawnin Sinai Mual tungah Topa in amah le Israel mite kikalah a bawl thukhamte le biakna ngeina kipte le thute ahi hi. 
Leviticus27:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Leviticus27:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mi khat in a tuam vilvelin kiciamna a bawl ciangin, tua a kiciam mite pen nangmah in Topa -aʼ in na seh dinga, a nuai-a kiseh bangin kitanh-in suaktakik thei ding hi." 
Leviticus27:3 Pasal kum sawm nih panin kum sawm guk a phate a man na sehna pen, biakinn shekel zangin pasal khat ciangin ngun shekel sawm nga hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:4 Numei ahihleh shekel sawm thum hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:5 Kum nga pan kum sawm nih ciang a phate, pasal ahihleh shekel sawm nih hi dinga, numei ahihleh shekel sawm hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:6 Kha khat pan kum nga ciang a phate pen pasal ahihleh ngun shekel nga hi dinga, numei ahihleh ngun shekel thum hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:7 Kum sawm guk pan a tungsiahte pen pasal ahihleh shekel sawm le nga hi dinga, numei ahihleh shekel sawm hi ding hi." 
Leviticus27:8 “Mi khatpeuh zawng lua-in nangma sehzah a piak zawh kei leh, siampipa kiangah a mi hong kipaipih dinga, siampipa in ama man seh ding hi. A kiciam mipa a siamna tawh kizui-in siampipa in ama man seh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:9 “Mite in Topaʼ tungah biakna-in a piakte pen ganhing ahihleh, mi khatpeuh in Topaʼ tungah a piak tua bang ganhingte khempeuh a siangtho ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:10 Amah in na khat peuhpeuh, a hoihte a hoih lo tawh ahi zongin, a hoih lote a hoih tawh ahi zongin, laih lo, khek lo ding hi. Amah in ganhing khat ganhing a dang khat tawh a khek leh, tua ganhing le a khekna ganhing a siangtho hi khawm ding hi." 
Leviticus27:11 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah a kipia thei lo ganhing nin khat ahihleh, mipa in siampipa mai ah a ganhing paipih dinga," 
Leviticus27:12 siampipa in hoih hi, ci-in ahi zongin sia hi, ci-in ahi zongin a man zah seh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:13 Ahih hangin amah in tua ganhing a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga ah khat behlap ding hi." 
Leviticus27:14 “Mi khatpeuh in a siangtho dingin Topaʼ tungah a inn a ap ciangin, siampipa in a hoihna le a hoih lohna tawh kizui-in a man seh dinga, siampipaʼ sehna bangin kip ding hi." 
Leviticus27:15 A ap pa in ama inn a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga ah khat sum tawh behlap dinga, tua inn ama aʼ hikik ding hi." 
Leviticus27:16 “Mi khat in a luah ama leitang phel khat Topaʼ tungah a ap leh, nangma sehna pen khaici vawh zah ding tawh kizui ding hi. Mangbuhham beem khat dim a pawina leitang pen ngun shekel sawm nga-in kiseh ding hi." 
Leviticus27:17 Amah in jubilee kum a kipanin a lo a ap leh, nangma sehna zahzah bit ding hi." 
Leviticus27:18 Ahih hangin jubilee kum khit ciangin amah in a lo a ap leh, siampipa in jubilee kum kik dong a om lai kumte tawh kizui-in a manzah sum seh dinga, nangma sehna zah panin kikhiam ding hi." 
Leviticus27:19 Lo a ap pa in a tatkik nop leh, a kisehna banah nga ah khat sum tawh behlap dinga, tua lo ama aʼ hi suak ding hi." 
Leviticus27:20 Ahih hangin amah in a lo a tanh nuam lo ahi a, amah in midang khat tungah a zuak ahi zongin ahihleh, tua pen amah in tanhkik thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Leviticus27:21 A lo pen, jubilee huna piakkhiat ciangin, a ki-ap sa lo mah bangin Topaʼ tungah a siangtho hi dinga, siampipa in tua lo tang ding hi." 
Leviticus27:22 “Amah in luahna tawh a neih ahi lo, a lei sa lo pen Topaʼ tungah a ap leh," 
Leviticus27:23 siampipa in jubilee kum ciang dong ding tua man seh dinga, tua ni-in a mipa in a kiseh zah, Topaʼ tungah a siangtho-in pia ding hi." 
Leviticus27:24 Jubilee kum ciangin a lo pen a kileina pa, gamhluahna tawh tua leitang a nei mipa tungah tungkik ding hi." 
Leviticus27:25 “A kisehna peuhmah biakinn shekel kizang ding hi; gerah sawm nih ciangin shekel khat hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:26 “Ahih hangin tacil pen Topa aʼ hi khinzo ahih mah bangin, kuamah in ganhing tacilte ap thei lo ding hi; bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh Topa -aʼ ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:27 Ganhing nin ahihleh, nangma sehna bangin amah in leikikin, tua banah seh nga ah khat behlap ding hi. Tua hi lo a, a kitat kei leh, a kisehna bangin kizuak ding hi." 
Leviticus27:28 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a neih, Topaʼ tungah a ap, a ki-ap sa nate, mi hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, a luah ama lo hitaleh, kizuak lo ding, kitanh lo ding hi. A ki-ap na peuhmah Topaʼ tungah a siangtho pen ahi hi." 
Leviticus27:29 Mite lak nangawn panin a kisusia mang dingin a ki-ap sa mi peuhmah, kitanh lo dinga, kithat ding hi." 
Leviticus27:30 “Leitang panin a piang khempeuh khaici hitaleh singgah hitaleh sawm-ah-khat Topa aʼ hi a, Topa adingin siangtho hi." 
Leviticus27:31 Mi khatpeuh in sawm-ah-khat a piak na khat peuhpeuh a tat nop leh, amah in tua banah nga ah khat behlap ding hi." 
Leviticus27:32 Bawng hon leh tuu le keel hon sawm-ah-khat khempeuh le a cing paʼ ciangkhut nuai-a a pai ganhing khempeuh sawm-ah-khat peuhmah Topa adingin a siangtho hi ding hi. 
Leviticus27:33 Mi khat in pha hiam sia hiam ci-in kantel lo dinga, khek lo ding hi. A khek leh, tua leh a khekna pen a siangtho hi khawm ding hi. Tua pen kitanh lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Leviticus27:34 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Israel mite adingin Moses tungah a piak thute ahi hi. 
Numbers1:1 Amaute, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in, Sinai sehnel gam kikhopna puanbuk sungah Topa in Moses hopihin hih bangin ci hi:" 
Numbers1:2 “Nang le Aaron in Israel mihonte khempeuh a innkuankuan, a behbehin, pasal peuhmah a milipin a phazah sim un." 
Numbers1:3 Israel sungah kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah a pha, galdo dingin a kuan thei ding mi khempeuh a honhonin na sim ding uh hi." 
Numbers1:4 A minam simin a beh sungah a lutang ahi mi khat ciat in hong huh ding uh hi. 
Numbers1:5 No hong huh dingteʼ min: Reuben sung panin Shedeurʼ tapa Elizur; 
Numbers1:6 Simeon sung panin Zurishaddaiʼ tapa Shelumiel; 
Numbers1:7 Judah sung panin Amminadabʼ tapa Nahshon; 
Numbers1:8 Issakhar sung panin Zuarʼ tapa Nethanel; 
Numbers1:9 Zebulun sung panin Helonʼ tapa Eliab; 
Numbers1:10 Josef tapate, Efraim sung panin Ammihudʼ tapa Elishama le Manasseh sung panin Pedahzurʼ tapa Gamaliel;" 
Numbers1:11 Benjamin sung panin Gideoniʼ tapa Abidan; 
Numbers1:12 Dan sung panin Ammishaddaiʼ tapa Ahiezer; 
Numbers1:13 Asher sung panin Okranʼ tapa Pagiel; 
Numbers1:14 Gad sung panin Deuelʼ tapa Eliasaf; 
Numbers1:15 Naftali sung panin Enanʼ tapa Ahira ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers1:16 Hihte pen mihon sung panin a kiteel, amauʼ phung sung panin a makaite, Israel behteʼ lutangte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers1:17 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses le Aaron in a min kilo sa hih mite khawmin, a kha nihna a ni masa ni-in amaute in kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah a pha peuhmah a milipin a innkuankuan, a behbehin amau le amau a kiciamteh mihon buppite khawm uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sinai sehnel gamah amaute a phazah a sim hi." 
Numbers1:18  
Numbers1:19  
Numbers2:1 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen hi: 
Numbers2:2 Israel mite in amauʼ dialkhai gei ciatah a beh dialkhaite tawh phual sat ding uh a, amaute in a pang simah kikhopna buk mai ngatin phual sat ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:3 Nisuahna lam pangah phual a sat dingte pen Judahʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite hi dinga, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Judah mite a makai pa pen Amminadabʼ tapa Nahshon hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm sagih le tul li le za guk a pha hi. Issakhar mite a makai pa pen Zuarʼ tapa Nethanel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm nga le tul li le za li a pha hi. Zebulun mite a makai pa pen Helonʼ tapa Eliab hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm nga le tul sagih le za li a pha hi. Judahʼ phualah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawm giat le tul guk le za li a pha hi. A kipaikhiat ciangin amau masa ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5  
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7  
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9  
Numbers2:10 A leitaw lam pangah a pawlpawlin Reubenʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite hi dinga, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Reuben mite a makai pa pen Shedeurʼ tapa Elizur hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm li le tul guk le za nga a pha hi. Simeon mite a makai pa pen Zurishaddaiʼ tapa Shelumiel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm nga le tul kua le za thum a pha hi. Gad mite a makai pa pen Reuelʼ tapa Eliasaf hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm li le tul nga le za guk le sawm nga a pha hi. Reubenʼ giahphual ah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawm nga le tul khat le za li le sawm nga a pha hi. Amaute a nihna ah paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12  
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16  
Numbers2:17 Tua ciangin kikhopna buk pen, giahphualteʼ laizang ah a om Levi miteʼ phual tawh kikhiin khawm dinga, a phual sat hun mah bangun amauʼ san ciatah a dialkhai uh tawh paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:18 A nitumna lam pangah a pawlpawlin Efraim giahphual dialkhai a neite hi dinga, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Efraim mite a makai pa pen Ammihudʼ tapa Elishama hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm li le za nga a pha hi. Manasseh mite a makai pa pen Pedahzurʼ tapa Gamaliel hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm thum le tul nih le za nih a pha hi. Benjamin mite a makai pa pen Gideoniʼ tapa Abidan hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm thum le tul nga le za li a pha hi. Efraim giahphual ah a pawlpawlin a omte a vekpi-in tul za le tul giat le za khat a pha hi. Amaute a thumna ah paikhia ding uh hi." 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20  
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24  
Numbers2:25 A leilu lam pangah a pawlpawlin Dan giahphual dialkhai a neite hi dinga, a makaite le a mi phazah a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Dan mite a makai pa pen Ammishaddaiʼ tapa Ahiezer hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm guk le tul nih le za sagih a pha hi. Asher mite a makai pa pen Okranʼ tapa Pagiel hi a, ama pawl tul sawm li le tul khat le za nga a pha hi. Naftali mite a makai pa pen Enanʼ tapa Ahira hi a, ama pawl mi tul sawm nga le tul thum le za li a pha hi. Danʼ giahphual a om mi a vekpi-in tul za le tul sawm nga le tul sagih le za guk a pha hi. Amaute a dialkhai tawh kizui-in a pai nunung ding uh ahi hi." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27  
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31  
Numbers2:32 Hihte pen Israel mite a beh zui-a kisim hi a, a pawlpawlin giahphual ah a om mi a vekpi-in tul za guk le tul thum le za nga le sawm nga a pha hi." 
Numbers2:33 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah Levi mite kisim khawm lo hi. 
Numbers2:34 Tua bangin Israel mite gamta uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a beh tawh kizui-in a inn kuankuanin amauʼ dialkhaiteʼ gei ah giahphual sat uh a, tua bangmahin paikhia uh hi." 
Numbers3:1 Hihte pen Sinai Mual tungah Topa in Moses tawh a thugen hun lai-a Aaron le Mosesʼ huna mite ahi hi. 
Numbers3:2 Aaronʼ tapateʼ minte in: A ta upa Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar hi a," 
Numbers3:3 sathau a kinilh siampi, siampi za ah na a sem dingin a kikipsak, Aaronʼ tapateʼ minte ahi hi." 
Numbers3:4 Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gam Topaʼ mai ah mei siangtho lo a zat uh ciangin Topaʼ mai ah Nadab le Abihu si hi. Amaute in ta nei lo uh ahih ciangin Eleazar le Ithamar in a pa uh Aaronʼ nuntak sungteng bek siampi na a sem uh ahi hi. 
Numbers3:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:6 “Levi minamte va paipih inla, amaute in siampi Aaronʼ na a sep theih nadingun a mai ah va koih in." 
Numbers3:7 Amaute in biakbuk ah a sep uh ciangin amah le mihonpi adingin kikhopna buk mai ah na sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers3:8 Amaute in kikhopna buk sung nazat khempeuh vaan ding uh a, biakbuk ah a sep uh ciangin Israel mite adingin na sem ding uh hi." 
Numbers3:9 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapateʼ tungah Levi mite na pia dinga, amaute pen Israel mite lak panin keima tungah a kipiate hi ding uh hi." 
Numbers3:10 Nangmah in Aaron le a tapate na seh dinga, amaute in a siampi nasep uh don ding uh hi. Ahih hangin midang khatpeuh in siampi nasep a sep leh, tua mi kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:12 “En in, Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi. Levi mite pen keima aʼ hi ding hi." 
Numbers3:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh tacil khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in, Israel sungah tacil khempeuh, mihing tacil le ganhing tacil khempeuh, keima adingin ka ap a, amaute pen keima aʼ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:14 Topa in Sinai sehnel gam Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:15 “Levi mite, a behbeh, a inn kuankuanin, pasal kha khat a pha panin a tungsiah peuhmah na sim ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:16 Tua ahih ciangin Moses thu a kipiak bangin amah in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh kizui-in amaute a sim hi. 
Numbers3:17 Leviʼ tapateʼ min in: Gershon, Kohath le Merari ahi hi." 
Numbers3:18 Gershonʼ tapateʼ min in: Libni le Shimei ahi hi. 
Numbers3:19 Kohathʼ tapateʼ min in: Amram, Izhar, Hebron le Uzziel ahi hi." 
Numbers3:20 Merariʼ tapateʼ min in: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Hih mite pen Levi mite beh lutangte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers3:21 Gershon-te beh pen Libni mite le Shimei mite hi a, hihte pen Gershon-te beh ahi uh hi." 
Numbers3:22 Amaute, kha khat pan a tungsiah a pha pasal peuhmah tul sagih le za nga ahi hi." 
Numbers3:23 Gershon-te beh in nitumna lam biakbuk nungah giahphual sat ding uh a," 
Numbers3:24 tua Gershon mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Laelʼ tapa Eliasaf hi ding hi. 
Numbers3:25 Gershon-te beh in kikhopna buk sungah a et dingte pen a biakbuk, puanbuk a tuamna tawh, kikhopna buk kongkhak puankhai," 
Numbers3:26 buktual a puan kikhaite, biakbuk kiim a om buktual a kongkhak puankhai le biakna tau le a khaute le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:27 Kohath-te beh pen Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite le Uzziel mite hi a, hihte pen Kohath-te beh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:28 Pasal khempeuh kha khat pan a tungsiah, biakbuk nasep a sem peuhmah tul giat le za guk ahi hi." 
Numbers3:29 Kohath-te beh in biakbuk leitaw lam pangah giahphual sat ding uh a," 
Numbers3:30 Kohath mite sung pan a beh ukpi pen Uzzielʼ tapa Elizafan hi ding hi. 
Numbers3:31 Amauʼ et dingte pen thuciamna singkuang, a sabuai, a meivak khuam, a biakna taute, siampite in nasepna-in a zat uh biakbuk nazatteʼ kidalna puan le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:32 Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar pen Levi mi makaite tungah a ukpi hi dinga, biakbuk a en miteʼ nasepna vil ding hi." 
Numbers3:33 Merari-te beh pen Mahli mite le Mushi mite hi a, hihte pen Merari-te beh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:34 Amaute kha khat panin a tungsiah pasal peuhmah tul guk le za nih ahi hi. 
Numbers3:35 Merari-te beh sung pan a beh ukpi pen Abihailʼ tapa Zuriel hi dinga, amaute pen biakbuk leilu lam pangah giahphual a sat dingte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers3:36 Merari-te behʼ et dinga a kisehte pen biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, khuam bullente, a nengneng teng le hihte tawh a kizom nasep khempeuh ahi hi." 
Numbers3:37 Buktual kimkot a khuampite le a bullente tawh, khetphimte le a khaute zong ahi hi." 
Numbers3:38 Nisuahna lam pang biakbuk mai, kikhopna buk mai ah giahphual a sat ding mite pen Israel mite adingin bang khat peuhpeuh sep nadingin biakbuk sungah thu a nei Moses le Aaron le a tapate hi a, midang khatpeuh in biakbuk sungah na a sep leh kithat ding hi." 
Numbers3:39 Moses le Aaron in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh a inn kuankuanun a sim Levi mi pasal kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah tul sawm nih le tul nih a pha hi. 
Numbers3:40 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel mite sung pan pasal tacil khempeuh sim inla, kha khat panin a tungsiah peuhmah a min la in." 
Numbers3:41 Israel mite lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite nong laksak dinga, Israel miteʼ ganhing tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi miteʼ ganhing nong laksak ding hi - kei pen Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:42 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topaʼ thupiak bangin Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh a sim hi. 
Numbers3:43 Kha khat panin a tungsiah tacil pasal a kisim peuhmah tul sawm nih le tul nih le za nih le sawm sagih le thum ahi hi. 
Numbers3:44 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers3:45 “Israel mite lakah tacil khempeuh le a ganhingte uh tang dingin Levi mite le a ganhingte uh la in. Levi mite keima aʼ hi ding hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi. 
Numbers3:46 Levi mi pasal khempeuh sangin Israel mi tacil khempeuh za nih le sawm sagih le thumin tam zaw ahih manin," 
Numbers3:47 tuate tat nadingin shekel khat ah gerah sawm nih a pha, biakinn shekel zangin mi khat ciangin shekel nga pai la inla," 
Numbers3:48 tua a tam zaw teng a kitatna uh sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers3:49 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Levi mite banah a val lai mite tung panin kitatkhiatna sum la a," 
Numbers3:50 biakinn shekel zangin Israel mi tacilte tung panin sum shekel tul khat le za thum le sawm guk le nga a la hi. 
Numbers3:51 Tua ciangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak mah bangin Topaʼ thu tawh kizui-in kitatkhiatna sumte Aaron le a tapate tungah Moses in a pia hi." 
Numbers4:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers4:2 “Levi mite lak panin Kohath mite amauʼ innkuankuan le a behbehin," 
Numbers4:3 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha mi khempeuh sim in. 
Numbers4:4 Kikhopna buk sungah Kohath mite in a siangtho pen nate tawh kisai nasepte sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:5 “Giahphual a kisuan ding ciangin Aaron le a tapate tumin kidalna puan la khia ding uh a, tua puan tawh thuciamna singkuang tun ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:6 Tua ciangin amaute in savun tawh tuam ding uh a, tua tungah puan a dum tawh khuhin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:7 “Ompihna Anlum sabuai tungah amaute in puan a dum phah ding uh a, tua tungah a kuangdaite, paknamtui pakante, kuang-ukte le tuibuahna thawl gongbakte koih ding uh a, a kikoih tawntung anlum zong a tungah om ding hi." 
Numbers4:8 Tua ciangin amaute in a ausan puan tawh tuate khuh ding uh a, savun tawh khuh thuahin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:9 “Mei vakna mei khuam pen, a meivakte, a taitehte, a kuangte le sathau piakna nazatte khempeuh tawh puan a dum khatin tun ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:10 Amaute in a nazat khempeuh savun-in tunin a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:11 “Puan a dum khat tawh kham biakna tau khuh ding uh a, savun tawh tua mah tuam thuahin, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:12 Amaute in biakbuk sungah a kizang nazat khempeuh la-in puan dum khat tawh tunin, savun tawh tuate tun thuah ding uh a, a puak nading tal tungah koih ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:13 Amaute in a biakna tau panin a vutte luak khia ding uh a, a tungah puan a dupsan khat phah ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:14 Tua lai ah nasep nadinga a kizang, biakna tau nazat khempeuh, a vutluahna peek, a tu-ka, a kawbia le a kuang, biakna tau nazat khempeuh, a tungah koihin, tua tungah savun tawh tuam ding uh a, a zawlte bulh ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:15 Aaron le a tapate in biakbuk le biakbuk nazat khempeuh a tun khit uh giahphual a kisuan ciangin, tuate a pua dingin Kohath mite hong pai ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute in a siangtho nate lawng kha lo ding uh hi; lawng le-uh si ding uh hi. Hihte pen Kohath miteʼ puak ding kikhopna buk nate ahi hi."
