Numbers4:16 “Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar in meivak tui, a namtui paknamtui, a kikoih tawntung an tawh biakna, nilh sathau le biakbuk le a sunga om khempeuh le a nazat khempeuh uk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:17 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers4:18 “Levi mite lakah Kohath minamte a sih loh nadingin hih un. 
Numbers4:19 A siangtho pen nate nai ah amaute a pai ciangun si loin a hin nadingun hih un. Aaron le a tapate pai-in a nasep ding uh le a van puak ding ciat uh ah amaute seh ding uh hi. 
Numbers4:20 Ahih hangin a siangtho nate tom kha no sung bek nangawn a en dingin amaute tum lo ding uh hi; tum le-uh si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:21 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers4:22 “Gershon mite zong, amauʼ innkuankuan le a behbehin sim in." 
Numbers4:23 Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi. 
Numbers4:24 Nasep le van puak ciangin Gershon-te behʼ nasep dingte: 
Numbers4:25 Biakbuk dalna puante, kikhopna buk a tuamna tawh, a tungzang a om a khuhna tuu vun, kikhopna buk kongkhak-a puankhai," 
Numbers4:26 buktual a puan kikhaite, biakbuk le biakna tau kimkot ah a om buktual kongpi puankhaite, a khaute le amauʼ nasep nadinga nazat khempeuh pua ding uh a, amaute in tuate tawh a kizom nasep kisam khempeuh sem ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:27 Gershon beh pasalteʼ nasep ding, a puak ding le a hih dingte khempeuh uh Aaron le a tapateʼ thupiakna bang hi dinga, a puak ding khempeuh uh amaute na ap ding uh hi." 
Numbers4:28 Hih pen kikhopna buk sungah Gershon beh pasalteʼ nasep hi a, amauʼ nasepna pen siampi Aaronʼ tapa Ithamarʼ ukna nuai hi ding hi." 
Numbers4:29 “Merari mite zong amauʼ innkuankuan le a behbehin," 
Numbers4:30 kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha mi khempeuh na sim ding hi. 
Numbers4:31 Kikhopna buk sungah amauʼ sep dingte in: Biakbuk khuampeekte, a zawlte, a khuampite, khuam bullente tawh," 
Numbers4:32 a kimkot a om buktual a khuampite a bullente tawh, khetphimte, a khaute, a nazatte khempeuh le a nengnengte hi a, amauteʼ puak dingin a kiseh nate a minin na lo ding hi." 
Numbers4:33 Hih pen siampi Aaronʼ tapa Ithamarʼ khutnuai ah Merari mite in kikhopna buk sungah a sep ding teng uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers4:34 Topaʼ thupiakna bangin Moses le Aaron le mihonteʼ makaite in Levi mite sung panin beh thumte - Kohath-te beh, Gershon-te beh le Merari-te beh sunga om pasal mi phazah sim uh hi. Kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha a behbehin a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Kohath mi pasal a beh tangun tul nih le za sagih le sawm nga a pha hi. Gershon mi pasal a beh tangun tul nih le za guk le sawm thum a pha hi. Merari mi pasal a beh tangun tul thum le za nih ahi hi. Moses le Aaron le Israel makaite in a sim, Levi mi a kisim peuhmah, van puak nasep le kikhopna buk sungah na a sem thei ding kum sawm thum pan kum sawm nga a pha, a vekpi-in tul giat le za nga le sawm giat a pha hi." 
Numbers4:35 Mosesʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thupiakna bangin a sep ding a puak ding ciat uh kiseh a, Topaʼ thupiak bangin Moses in amaute a sim hi." 
Numbers5:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:2 “Amaute in miphakte, ninneite le misi tawh kisukha-in a ninte khempeuh giahphual pua ah a omsak nadingun Israel mite thu pia in." 
Numbers5:3 A laizang ah keima omna ahi amauʼ giahphual a nitsak loh nadingun hih bangin a nin numei le pasal pai khiasakin, giahphual pua ah na omsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers5:4 Tua mah bangin Israel mite in hih uh a, giahphual pua ah amaute hawl khia uh hi. Topa in Moses tungah a gen bangin Israel mite in hih uh hi." 
Numbers5:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:6 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Topaʼ tungah mite a khialh theihna ahi khialhna khat peuhpeuh, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin gamta-in a mawh leh," 
Numbers5:7 a gamtatna sa a khialhna pulak ding hi. Amah in a tatkhialhna ah a kicingin dinkik dinga, tua tungah nga ah khat behlapin, a khialhna mi tungah pia ding hi." 
Numbers5:8 Ahih hangin a khialhna mi in tua khialhna hanga ditkikna a sang ding tanau a neih kei leh, a khial mi adingin kilemna a bawlsakna ahi kilemna tuutal banah, khialhna hanga tua ditkikna pen siampipa adingin Topaʼ tungah tung ding hi." 
Numbers5:9 Amaute in siampipa tungah a paipih uh biakna peuhmah, Israel miteʼ na a siangthote khempeuh, ama aʼ hi ding hi." 
Numbers5:10 Mi khempeuhʼ na a siangthote zong ama aʼ hi dinga, mi khatpeuh in siampipa tungah a piak peuhmah ama aʼ hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers5:11 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers5:12 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Mi khatpeuhʼ zi vakvai-in a pasal a palhngulh a," 
Numbers5:13 pasal khat in tua nu luppihin, a pasal in tua thu a theih kei a, tua nu kininsak napi-in kuamah in phawk loin, a khialh laitakin tua nu kiman lo ahih manin a langah a pang ding teci a om loh hangin," 
Numbers5:14 a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a kininsak tawm a zi a upmawh leh; tua ahih kei leh zong, a numei kininsak lo napi-in, a pasal in upmawhna lungsim nei-in, a zi a upmawh leh;" 
Numbers5:15 tua pa in siampipa kiangah a zi paipihin, tua nu adingin a kisam biakna, mangbuhham lawh khat paipih ding hi. A tungah sathau sung loin, paknamtui zong koih lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna, mawhna phawkkik nadinga an tawh biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers5:16 “Siampipa in tua nu va paipihin, Topaʼ mai ah koih ding hi." 
Numbers5:17 Siampipa in leibeel khatin tui siangtho la dinga, biakbuk sual tunga om leivui tawm khat la-in tua tui sungah khah ding hi." 
Numbers5:18 Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah tua numei koih dinga, numeiʼ sam phelin, upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna ahi phawkkikna an tawh biakna tua numei tawisak ding hi. Siampipa in ama khut sungah tuisia tawi ding hi." 
Numbers5:19 Tua ciangin siampipa in amah kiciamsakin, ‘Na pasalʼ ukna nuai ah na om sungin, kuamah in nang hong luppih loin, nitna lamah a kihel lo na hih leh, hih tuisia panin suakta in." 
Numbers5:20 Ahih hangin na pasalʼ ukna nuai ah om napi-in nangmah vakvai a, nang le nang kininsakin, na pasal ahi lo midang khat in nang hong luppih leh," 
Numbers5:21 (siampipa in tua numei kiciamsak dinga, tua nu kiangah) Topa in na pheipi teemsakin na pumpi a pawmsak ciangin, na mite lakah hamsia le kiciamna a zat dingin Topa in nang hong bawlin," 
Numbers5:22 hih tuisia in na gil sung zui henla, na pumpi pawmsakin na pheipi teemsak hen,’ ci ding hi. Tua ciangin numei in, ‘Amen, Amen,’ ci ding hi." 
Numbers5:23 “Tua ciangin siampipa in laibu khat sungah hih hamsiate gelhin tuisia sungah sil khia ding hi. 
Numbers5:24 Tua numei a nasak velval thei ding tuisia a dawnsak 
Numbers5:25 siampipa in numeiʼ khut sung panin upmawhna hanga an tawh biakna la khia dinga, Topaʼ mai ah tua an vei-in biakna tau ah paipih ding hi." 
Numbers5:26 Siampipa in phawk nadingin an tawh biakna khut dim khat la-in biakna tau tungah hal dinga, tua khit ciangin a tui pen a numei dawnsak ding hi." 
Numbers5:27 Amah in a tui a dawnsak khit ciangin, tua nu a mahmah kininsakin a pasal tungah thuman loin gamta ahihleh, tua tuisia pen ama sungah tumin nasak velval dinga, a pumpi pawmin a pheipi teem dinga, tua numei pen mite lakah hamsiatna-in kizang ding hi." 
Numbers5:28 Ahih hangin a mahmah a kininsak hi loin a siang ahihleh, tua nu suakta-in ta nei thei ding hi." 
Numbers5:29 “Zi khat, a pasalʼ ukna nuai ah om napi-in vakvai-in a mahmah a kinitsak ciang," 
Numbers5:30 ahih kei leh pasal khat in upmawhna lungsim nei-in a zi a upmawh ciangin, upmawhna thute ah zat ding ngeina tu-a bang ahi hi. Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah numei koih dinga, hih ngeina khempeuh numeiʼ tungah zang ding hi." 
Numbers5:31 Hih thu ah pasal in mawhsakna thuak lo dinga, ahih hangin numei a mawh leh ama mawhna thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers6:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers6:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, Topa adingin a mahmah a kituam koih nadingin Nazir kiciamna ahi, a tuam mahmah kiciamna a bawl ciangin," 
Numbers6:3 leenggahzu le khamtheih zu ne lo ding hi. Leenggahzu le khamtheih zu pan a kibawl tui thuk dawn lo dinga, leenggahtui khat peuhpeuh dawn loin, leenggah a hing hitaleh a keu hitaleh ne lo ding hi." 
Numbers6:4 Amah a kituam koih hun sungteng leenggui panin a piang bangmah ne lo dinga, a tang ahi a, a hawng nangawn ahi zongin ne lo ding hi." 
Numbers6:5 “Tuam om dingin a kiciam hun sungteng ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Topa adingin a tuam om hun a cin mateng amah a siangtho hi dinga, a sam a sau-in hawi ding hi." 
Numbers6:6 Topa adingin a tuam om hun sungteng misi luang kiangah pai lo ding hi. 
Numbers6:7 A nu, a pa, a sanggamnu, a sanggampa ahi zongin a sih leh tuate khat peuhpeuh hangin amah kininsak lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian adingin a tuam omna ama lu tungah om hi." 
Numbers6:8 A tuam om hun sungteng Topa adingin a siangtho ahi hi. 
Numbers6:9 “Mi khatpeuh ama gei ah thakhatin si-in, amah in a ki-ap ama sam a nitsak leh, ni sagih sung ngakin tua ciangin kisiansuahin a sam met ding hi." 
Numbers6:10 A ni giat ni-in amah in siampipa kiang kikhopna buk kongah vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhu no nih paipih dinga," 
Numbers6:11 siampipa in khialhna hanga biak nadingin khat pia-in, meihal biak nadingin a khat pia dinga, ama adingin kilemna bawlsak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh misi luang hangin amah khial hi. Amah in tua ni mahin a lutang ap phakik dinga," 
Numbers6:12 a tuam om ding hun sungteng Topa adingin amah tuam omin, mawhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat paipih ding hi. Ahih hangin ama tuam omna kininsak khin ahih manin a masa hun pen a mawkna hi ding hi." 
Numbers6:13 “A tuam om hun a cin ciangin zuih ding Nazir ngeinate: Kikhopna buk kongah amah kipaipih dinga," 
Numbers6:14 amah in Topaʼ tungah letsong ahi meihal biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a pa khat, khialhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha a sitbaang lo tuuno a nu khat le thunuam a biak nadingin a sitbaang lo tuutal khat," 
Numbers6:15 le silngo sawh loh anlum lawh khat, sathau tawh a kibawl annel mohte le silngo sawh loh, sathau tawh a kizut mohphengte le an tawh biaknate le leenggahzu tawh biaknate paipih ding hi." 
Numbers6:16 “Siampipa in Topaʼ mai ah tuate paipihin a khialhna hanga biakna le a meihal biakna pia dinga," 
Numbers6:17 a tuutal pen Topaʼ tungah thunuam a biakna-in silngo sawh loh anlum lawh tawh pia khawm dinga, an tawh a biakna le leenggahzu tawh biakna zong siampipa in pia ding hi." 
Numbers6:18 Tua Nazir mipa in a ki-ap a sam, kikhopna buk kongah met dinga, a ki-ap ama lutang panin a samte la-in thunuam a biakpiakna nuai ah a om mei sungah hal ding hi." 
Numbers6:19 “Siampipa in a kihuan sa tuutal liang le lawh sung panin silngo sawh loh moh khat le silngo sawh loh mohpheng khat la-in, a ki-ap hun sunga a sam a met khit ciangin tua Nazir mipaʼ khut ah tuate koih dinga," 
Numbers6:20 Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biak nadingin siampipa in tuate vei ding hi. Tuate pen a kivei a sa-iik le a kipia a phei tawh siampipa adingin a siangtho ama tanh ahi hi. Tua khit ciangin Nazir mipa in leenggahzu ne thei ding hi. 
Numbers6:21 “Hih pen kiciamna a la Nazir mipa adingin ngeina ahi hi. Ama piak zawh zahzah a piak banah, Topaʼ tungah ama piakna pen Nazir hihna tawh a kiciamna bang hi dinga, ama kiciamna mah bangin amah in Nazir hihna tawh tuam om nading ngeina zui-in a gamta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers6:22 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers6:23 “Aaron le a tapate tungah hih bangin gen in: Note in hih bangin Israel mite thupha na pia ding uh hi. Amaute tungah hih bangin na ci ding uh hi: 
Numbers6:24 Topa in note thupha hong pia-in hong kem tahen. 
Numbers6:25 Topa in note tungah a maitang hong taangsakin note hong ompih tahen. 
Numbers6:26 Topa in note tungah a maipha hong pia henla, note tungah nopsakna hong pia tahen,’ ci-in thupha pia uh hen." 
Numbers6:27 “Amaute in tua bangin Israel mite tungah keima min lo ding uh a, keimah in amaute thupha ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:1 Moses in biakbuk dingsakin, tua biakbuk le a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin ap a, biakna tau le a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin a ap a man ni-in," 
Numbers7:2 Israel makaite, a beh ukpite, minam makaite ahi a kisim mite a ukte in," 
Numbers7:3 buk a nei leeng guk le bawngtal sawm le nih Topaʼ mai ah paipih uh a, leeng khat ah makai nih, mi khat ah bawngtal khat ciatin sehin a biakna uh pia uh hi. Amaute in biakbuk mai ah tuate pia uh hi." 
Numbers7:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers7:5 “Kikhopna buk nasepna ah zat dingin amauʼ tung panin tuate sang inla, a nasep ciat uh tawh kizui-in Levi mite pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:6 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in leengte le bawngtalte saangin Levi mite a pia hi. 
Numbers7:7 Amauʼ nasep tawh kizui-in Gershon mite tungah leeng nih le bawngtal li pia hi. 
Numbers7:8 Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Ithamarʼ ukna nuai ah na a sem Merari mite tungah amauʼ nasep tawh kizui-in leeng li le bawngtal giat pia hi. 
Numbers7:9 Ahih hangin Kohath mite tungah bangmah pia lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh liangko ah a puak ding uh a siangtho nate kep ding amaute tavuan kipia hi. 
Numbers7:10 Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a ap nadingin makaite in a biakna uh biakna tau mai ah pia uh hi. 
Numbers7:11 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Biakna tau ap nadingin makai khat in ni khat ciat a biakna uh pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers7:12 A ni masa ni-a biakna a pia pa pen Judah minam, Amminadabʼ tapa Nahshon ahi hi." 
Numbers7:13 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:14 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:15 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:16 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat," 
Numbers7:17 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Amminadabʼ tapa Nahshonʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:18 A ni nih ni-in Issakhar mite a makai, Zuarʼ tapa Nethanel in biakna pia hi." 
Numbers7:19 A biak nadingin amah in biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:20 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:21 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:22 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:23 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Zuarʼ tapa Nethanelʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:24 A ni thum ni-in Zebulun mite a makai, Helonʼ tapa Eliab ahi hi." 
Numbers7:25 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:26 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:27 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:28 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:29 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Helonʼ tapa Eliabʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:30 A ni li ni-in Reuben mite a makai, Shedeurʼ tapa Elizur ahi hi." 
Numbers7:31 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:32 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:33 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:34 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:35 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Shedeurʼ tapa Elizurʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:36 A ni nga ni-in Simeon mite a makai, Zurishaddaiʼ tapa Shelumiel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:37 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:38 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:39 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:40 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:41 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Zurishaddaiʼ tapa Shelumielʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:42 A ni guk ni-in Gad mite a makai, Deuelʼ tapa Eliasaf ahi hi." 
Numbers7:43 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:44 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:45 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:46 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:47 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Deuelʼ tapa Eliasafʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:48 A ni sagih ni-in Efraim mite a makai, Ammihudʼ tapa Elishama ahi hi." 
Numbers7:49 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:50 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:51 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:52 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:53 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Ammihudʼ tapa Elishamaʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:54 A ni giat ni-in Manasseh mite a makai, Pedahzurʼ tapa Gamaliel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:55 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:56 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:57 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:58 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:59 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Pedahzurʼ tapa Gamalielʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:60 A ni kua ni-in Benjamin mite a makai, Gideoniʼ tapa Abidan ahi hi." 
Numbers7:61 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:62 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:63 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:64 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:65 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Gideoniʼ tapa Abidanʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:66 A ni sawm ni-in Dan mite a makai, Ammishaddaiʼ tapa Ahiezer ahi hi." 
Numbers7:67 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:68 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:69 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:70 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:71 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Ammishaddaiʼ tapa Ahiezerʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:72 A ni sawm le khat ni-in Asher mite a makai, Okranʼ tapa Pagiel ahi hi." 
Numbers7:73 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:74 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:75 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat;" 
Numbers7:76 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:77 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Okranʼ tapa Pagielʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:78 A ni sawm le nih ni-in Naftali mite a makai, Enanʼ tapa Ahira ahi hi." 
Numbers7:79 Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za le sawm thum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawm sagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biak nadingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh;" 
Numbers7:80 shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh;" 
Numbers7:81 meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat," 
Numbers7:82 khialhna hanga biak nadingin keel a pa khat; 
Numbers7:83 le thunuam a biakpiak nadingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Enanʼ tapa Ahiraʼ piak ahi hi." 
Numbers7:84 Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a piakte: Ngun kuangdai sawm le nih, ngun kuang sawm le nih," 
Numbers7:85 ngun kuangdai khat ciangin shekel za le sawm thum gikin ngun kuang khat ciangin shekel sawm sagih gik a, ngun kuangte khempeuh pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel tul nih le za li gik hi." 
Numbers7:86 Paknamtui tawh a kidim kham pakan sawm le nihte, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in khat ciangin shekel sawm gik a, kham pakan khempeuh pen shekel za le sawm nih gik hi." 
Numbers7:87 Meihal biak nadingin ganhing khempeuh pen bawngtal sawm le nih, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le nih, an-a biaknate tawh; le khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa sawm le nih," 
Numbers7:88 le thunuam a biakpiakna-in ganhing khempeuh bawngtal sawm nih le li, tuutal sawm guk, keel a pa sawm guk, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm guk ahi hi. Hihte pen biakna tau sathau a kinuh khit ciangin apna biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers7:89 Topa tawh a kiho dingin kikhopna buk sungah Moses a pai ciangin, kherub nihteʼ kikal, thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom tung san teng panin amah a hopih awging khat om a, tua awging in Moses a hopih hi." 
Numbers8:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:2 “Aaron tungah hih bangin gen in. Meivakte na koih ciangin, meivak sagihte in meivak khuam mai teng a taan dingin koih in, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers8:3 Aaron in tua bangmahin hih a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, meivak khuam mai teng a taan dingin meivakte a koih hi." 
Numbers8:4 Meivak khuam a kibawlna zia in: Kham a kiseek hi a, a bul pan a kipan a paakte dongin a kiseek ahi hi. Topa in Moses tungah a lah sa lim tawh kizui-in amah in meivak khuam a bawl hi." 
Numbers8:5 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:6 “Israel mite lak panin Levi mi teng la khia inla, amaute siangsak in." 
Numbers8:7 Amaute siansak nadingin hih bangin na hih ding hi: Siansuahna tui amaute tungah theh inla, a pumpi khempeuh uh mulkiatna tawh amau kiatsak inla, a puante uh sawpin amau mah na kisiang tawmsak ding hi." 
Numbers8:8 Tua ciangin bawngtalno khat le sathau le annel a kibawl an tawh biakna amaute na lasak dinga, nangmah in khialhna hanga biak nadingin bawngtalno a dang khat na la ding hi." 
Numbers8:9 Kikhopna buk mai ah Levi mite paipihin, Israel mihon buppi na khawm ding hi." 
Numbers8:10 Topaʼ mai ah Levi mite na paipih ciangin, Israel mite in Levi mite tungah a khut uh nga ding uh a," 
Numbers8:11 amaute in Topaʼ na a sep theih nadingun Aaron in Israel mite sung panin Levi mite Topaʼ mai ah vei-a biakna-in a pia ding hi. 
Numbers8:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite in bawngtalteʼ lu tungah a khut uh nga ding uh hi. Levi mite ading kilemna bawlsak nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in khat, meihal biakna-in a khat, Topaʼ tungah na pia ding hi." 
Numbers8:13 “Aaron le a tapateʼ mai ah Levi mite na koih dinga, Topaʼ tungah amaute vei-a biakna-in na pia ding hi." 
Numbers8:14 Tua bangin Israel mite lak panin Levi mite na khen khia dinga, Levi mite keima aʼ hi ding uh hi." 
Numbers8:15 Amaute siangthosakin vei-a biakna-in na piak khit ciangin kikhopna buk ah na a sem dingin Levi mite pai ding uh hi. 
Numbers8:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ lak panin keiʼ tungah amaute hong kipia khin hi. Israel miteʼ tacil khempeuh tang dingin keima adingin amaute ka la khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ lakah tacil khempeuh mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh keima-aʼ ahi hi. 
Numbers8:17 Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh ka thah ni-in keima adingin amaute ka tuam koih a," 
Numbers8:18 Israel miteʼ lak panin tacil khempeuh tang dingin Levi mite ka la khin hi. 
Numbers8:19 Kikhopna buk ah Israel mite adingin na a sem ding le, biakbuk mai ah Israel mite a pai khak ciangin Israel miteʼ lakah gimna a tun loh nadingin Israel mite adingin kilemna a bawl dingin Israel miteʼ lak panin Aaron le a tapateʼ tungah letsongin Levi mite ka pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers8:20 Tua bangin Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonpite khempeuh in Levi miteʼ tungah a hih uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Mosesʼ tungah a thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in Israel mite in amaute tungah a hih uh hi. 
Numbers8:21 Israel mite, khialhna panin amaute kisiangthosak tawm uh a, a puante uh sawp uh hi. Aaron in vei-a biakna-in Topaʼ mai ah amaute pia a, amaute siansak nadingin Aaron in amau ading kilemna a bawlsak hi." 
Numbers8:22 Tua khit ciangin Aaron le a tapateʼ omna kikhopna buk sungah na a sem dingin Levi mite a pai uh hi. Topa in Levi mite tawh kisai-in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Levi miteʼ tungah a hih uh hi. 
Numbers8:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers8:24 “Hih pen Levi mite tawh a kisai thu ahi hi. Kum sawm nih le kum nga pan a tungsiah a phate, kikhopna buk nasepna sungah na a sem dingin hong pai ding uh hi." 
Numbers8:25 Kum sawm nga a phak uh a kipan nasepna panin amau kihem khia-in na sem nawn lo ding uh hi. 
Numbers8:26 Ahih hangin kikhopna buk sungah a sanggamte uh huh dinga, amaute in a na taktak sem lo ding uh hi. Tua bangin Levi miteʼ nasep ding na seh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:1 Amaute Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum nihna a kha masa sungin Sinai sehnel gamah Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers9:2 “A kiseh hunin Paisan Pawi, Israel mite khamsak in." 
Numbers9:3 A kiseh hun, tu kha ni sawm le li ni nitakin a thukhamte le a ngeina kip omte bangin na kham ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Paisan Pawi a kham nadingun Moses in Israel mite tungah a gen hi. 
Numbers9:5 Amaute in a kha masa, a ni sawm le li ni nitakin Sinai sehnel gamah Paisan Pawi kham uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite a gamta uh hi." 
Numbers9:6 Misi luang a lawnna uh hangin a nin mi pawl khat om uh a, tua ni-in amaute in Paisan Pawi kham thei lo uh ahih manin Moses le Aaronʼ mai ah pai uh hi." 
Numbers9:7 Tua mite in, “Misi luang lawnna hangin ka nin uh hi. Ahi ta zongin bang hangin a kiseh hunin Israel midangte tawh Topa biakna hong kipiasak khawm lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers9:8 Moses in amaute kiangah, “Noteʼ thu tawh kisai, Topaʼ thupiak ka zak dong na ngak dih un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:9 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers9:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Noteʼ lakah mi khatpeuh ahi a, na suanlekhakte uh khatpeuh in ahi zongin misi luang lawnna hangin a nin ahi a, khualzinin gamlapi ah a om ahi zongin, Topa adingin Paisan Pawi kham veve ding hi." 
Numbers9:11 A kha nihna a ni sawm le li ni nitakin amaute in kham ding uh a, amaute in silngo sawh loh anlum le a kha meh tawh ne ding uh hi." 
Numbers9:12 Amaute in a zingsang dong bangmah siit lo ding uh a, a guh khat zong sutan lo ding uh hi. Paisan Pawi ngeinate tawh kizui-in amaute in a kham ding uh hi." 
Numbers9:13 Ahih hangin a siang mi khat khualzin lo napi-in Paisan Pawi a kham kei leh, amah in a kiseh hunin Topa biakna pia lo ahih manin a mite lak panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi. Tua mi in ama khialhna mah thuak ding hi." 
Numbers9:14 “Noteʼ lakah khualmi khat hong peemin, Topa adingin Paisan Pawi a kham le Paisan Pawi thukhamte le a ngeina kipte bangin hih ding hi. Peemta le tualsung mite adingin ngeina a kibang na neikhawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers9:15 Biakbuk a kidinsak ni-in meii in thuciamna biakbuk tuam a, nitak a kipan a zingsang dong meikuang tawh kibangin biakbuk tung sanah a om hi." 
Numbers9:16 Tua bangin om den hi. Sunin meii in tuam a, zanin mei tawh a kibang khat in tuam hi." 
Numbers9:17 Puanbuk tung san panin meii a kilaktoh khit ciangin Israel mite ding khia uh a, meii a kiphuhna munah Israel mite in giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Numbers9:18 Topa in thu a piak ciangin Israel mite ding khia uh a, Topa in thu a piak ciangin amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi. Biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl lai teng, amaute zong giahphual ah om uh hi." 
Numbers9:19 Biakbuk tungah ni tampi sung meii a om khinta zongin Israel mite in Topaʼ thupiakna zui-in ding khia tuan lo uh hi. 
Numbers9:20 Biakbuk tungah ni tawmno sung bek meii om thei zel hi. Tua bang ciangin zong Topaʼ thupiak bangin giahphual ah amaute tawmno sung mah omin, Topaʼ thupiakna bangin amaute a ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:21 Khat veivei nitak a kipan zingsang dong tua meii om hi. Zingsangin meii a kilaktoh ciangin amaute ding khia uh a, tua ahih kei leh, sun khat le zan khat a om lai le zong, meii a kilaktoh hunhunin amaute ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:22 Ni nih ahi a, kha khat ahi a, a hun sau zaw ahi zongin biakbuk tung sanah meii a khawl lai teng giahphual ah Israel mite omin ding khia lo uh a, ahih hangin a kilaktoh peuh ciangin amaute ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers9:23 Topaʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in giahphual sat uh a, Topaʼ thupiakna mah tawh amaute ding khia uh hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amaute in Topaʼ thu a mang uh hi." 
Numbers10:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers10:2 “Ngun peengkul nih bawl in. Tuate na bawl ciangin na seek dinga, mihonte khop nading le giahphual nusiat nadingin na zang ding hi." 
Numbers10:3 A nihin a kitum ciangin kikhopna buk kong nangma kiangah mihon khempeuh hong kikhawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:4 Ahih hangin khat bek a kitum leh Israel minamteʼ lutang ahi makaite nangma kiangah hong kikhawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:5 Dinkhiat nading zaksakna na tum ciangin nisuahna lam pang a giahphual-ate ding khia masa ding uh hi. 
Numbers10:6 A nih veina na tum ciangin leitaw lam pang a giahphual-ate ding khia ding hi. Amaute a dinkhiat ding peuhmah ciangun zaksakna kitum ding hi. 
Numbers10:7 Mihonte a kikaihkhop ding ciangin na tum dinga, ahih hangin a gindan na kibangsak kei ding hi." 
Numbers10:8 Aaronʼ tapa siampite in peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Peengkul zatna pen na khang tawntungun note adingin a kip den ngeina khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers10:9 Na gam sung uh ah, no hong nengniam na galte uh tawh na kido ding uh ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh mai ah note hong kiphawk nadingin peengkulte tawh pataukohna aw na gingsak ding uh a, na langte panun note hong kihon ding hi." 
Numbers10:10 Na lungdam hun uh, a kiseh na pawi hunte uh le kha kipat hunte-in, note in na meihal biaknate uh le thunuam a na biakpiaknate uh ah zong peengkulte na tum ding uh hi. Tuate pen na Pasian uh mai ah phawkna-in kimang ding hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:11 A kum nihna, a kha nihna, a ni sawm nih ni-in thuciamna biakbuk tung san panin meii kila khiato a," 
Numbers10:12 Sinai sehnel gam panin Israel mite phual khat pan phual khat ah ding khia uh a, Paran gamlak ah meii a khawl hi." 
Numbers10:13 Mosesʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh khualzin cilna kipan uh hi. 
Numbers10:14 Judah miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia masa uh hi. Tua mihonte, Amminadabʼ tapa Nahshon in uk hi." 
Numbers10:15 Issakhar minam honte, Zuarʼ tapa Nethanel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:16 Zebulun minam honte, Helonʼ tapa Eliab in uk hi." 
Numbers10:17 Biakbuk a kiphel khit ciangin, biakbuk a pua Gershon mite le Merari mite ding khia uh hi." 
Numbers10:18 A zomah Reubenʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Shedeurʼ tapa Elizur in uk hi." 
Numbers10:19 Simeon minam honpite, Zurishaddaiʼ tapa Shelumiel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:20 Gad minam honpite, Deuelʼ tapa Eliasaf in uk hi." 
Numbers10:21 Tua ciangin a siangtho nate pua-in Kohath mite ding khia uh a, amaute a tun ma-in biakbuk na kidingsak khin hi." 
Numbers10:22 A zomah Efraim miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammihudʼ tapa Elishama in uk hi." 
Numbers10:23 Manasseh minam honte, Pedahzurʼ tapa Gamaliel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:24 Benjamin minam honte, Gideoni tapa Abidan in uk hi." 
Numbers10:25 Tua ciangin a dang khempeuhʼ nungdalin Dan miteʼ giahphual dialkhai a neite a pawlpawlin ding khia uh hi. Tua mihonte, Ammishaddaiʼ tapa Ahiezer in uk hi." 
Numbers10:26 Asher minam honte, Okranʼ tapa Pagiel in uk hi." 
Numbers10:27 Naftali minam honte, Enanʼ tapa Ahira in uk hi." 
Numbers10:28 Hih pen Israel mite a dinkhiat uh ciangin amauʼ mihonte tawh kizui-in a paina zia uh ahi hi. 
Numbers10:29 Moses in ama ziʼ sanggampa ahi, Midian mi Reuelʼ tapa Hobab kiangah, “ Topa in, ‘Noteʼ tungah kong pia ding hi,’ a cihna mun zuanin a ding khia ding ka hi uh hi. Ko hong zui in; nang kong limbawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-te hong limbawl ding hong ciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:30 Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong zui kei ding hi. Ka leitang le ka behte kiangah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:31 Moses in, “Kote hong nusia kei in, kong thum hi; nangmah in gamlak ah giahphual sat nading zia thei na hih manin, kote adingin lamhilh nong hi ding hi." 
Numbers10:32 Kote hong zui lecin, Topa in kote hong limbawl ding bangbangin nang zong kong limbawl ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:33 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mual panin amaute ding khia-in ni thum lam a pai uh hi. A tawlngak nading mun uh a zonsak dingin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang, amauʼ mai ni thum lam na pai khol hi." 
Numbers10:34 Giahphual panin a dinkhiat peuhmah uh ciangin sunin amauteʼ tungah Topaʼ meii a om hi. 
Numbers10:35 Singkuang a dinkhiat peuhmah ciangin Moses in, “ Topa aw, dingin na galte kithehthangsak inla, nang hong mudahte na mai ah taisak in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers10:36 A khawl ciangin, “ Topa aw, Israel tul sawm tampiteʼ kiangah hong ciahkik in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:1 Mihonte in amauʼ tuahsiatna hangin Topaʼ zakin a phun uh hi. Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin heh mahmah a, amauteʼ lakah Topaʼ mei kuangin, giahphual nawl kim khat kaang tum hi." 
Numbers11:2 Tua ciangin Mosesʼ zak dingin mite kiko uh hi. Moses in Topaʼ tungah thu ngen a, mei a mit hi." 
Numbers11:3 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Taberah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ lakah Topaʼ mei a kuang hi. 
Numbers11:4 Tu-in amauteʼ lakah a om gamdang mite in an lim a lunggulh mahmah uh hi. Israel mite zong kapkik uh a, “Sa nek ding nei hi leeng maw!" 
Numbers11:5 Egypt ah man pia loin i nek ngasate, tangmaite, dawnpawlte, lo-uih neute, lo-uih sante le lo-uih kangte i phawkphawk hi." 
Numbers11:6 Ahih hangin tu-in i tha bei ta a, hih manna sim loh bangmah dang om peuhmah lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers11:7 Manna pen nannan tang tawh kibang a, a mel pen bedolak singnai tawh kibang hi." 
Numbers11:8 Mite pai kawikawi-in khawm uh a, an gawina tawh gawi-in, tua ahih kei leh sum sungah su-in, beelin huan uh a, mohin a bawl uh hi. A limna pen sathau tawh a kibawl moh ki-em tawh kibang hi." 
Numbers11:9 Zanin giahphual tungah daitui a kiat ciangin manna tawh kia khawm hi. 
Numbers11:10 Mite a inn kuankuanun a milipin a puanbuk kongah a kahna uh Moses in a za hi. Topa nak heh lua mahmah ahih manin Moses lungkim lo hi. 
Numbers11:11 Moses in Topaʼ kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasem pa hong hici bawlsiat na hi hiam? Bang hangin na maipha hong musak loin, hih mi khempeuhteʼ tavuan keiʼ tungah hong suan na hi hiam?" 
Numbers11:12 Keimah in hih mite khempeuh paii ka hi hiam? Nangmah in keiʼ kiangah, ‘Nau cingnu in nawine naungek a puak bangin, nangmah in amauʼ pate piak dingin ka ciam leitang ah amaute ang puakin paipih in,’ nong cih theih nadingin keiʼ sunga piang ahi uh hiam?" 
Numbers11:13 Hih mite khempeuh piak ding koi ah sa ngah ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mai ah amaute kapin, ‘Ka nek ding uh sa hong pia in,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Numbers11:14 Kei guak in hih mite khempeuh ka si zo kei a, kei adingin tavuan lian lua hi." 
Numbers11:15 Hih bangin kei hong bawl ding na hih leh, ka gentheihna ka kimuh loh nadingin nong hehpih zawh leh, thakhatin hong that zaw in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:16 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Miteʼ upa le ulian hi ci-in na theih, Israel upateʼ sung panin mi sawm sagih hong khopsakin, kikhopna buk ah amaute paipih inla, tua lai ah nang tawh ding khawmsak in." 
Numbers11:17 Keimah hong pai sukin tua munah nang tawh i kiho dinga, keimah in nangʼ sunga om kha pawl khat la-in amauteʼ sungah ka guang ding hi. Nang guak in na puak loh nadingin amaute in miteʼ tavuan hong puak pih ding uh hi." 
Numbers11:18 Mite tungah, ‘Zing cianga dingin note ki-ap pha un, sa na ne ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ zakin na kap uh a, “Sa nek ding kua in hong pia ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gamah nuam i sa hi,” na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin noteʼ tungah Topa in sa hong pia dinga, note in sa na ne ding uh hi." 
Numbers11:19 Note in ni khat sung, ahih kei leh ni nih sung, ahih kei leh ni nga sung, ahih kei leh ni sawm sung, ahih kei leh ni sawm nih sung bek ne loin," 
Numbers11:20 na ikkhiat dong uh le na kih dongun kha khat sung tawntung sa na ne ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ lakah a om Topa nialin a mai ah na kap uh a, “Bang hangin Egypt panin paikhia ihi hiam?” na ci uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:21 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Kei tawh a kisim khawm mi tul za guk tak om hi. Nangmah in, ‘Kha khat sung tawntung a nek dingun amaute sa pia ning!’ na ci hi." 
Numbers11:22 Amauteʼ khamzah dingin tuuhonte le bawnghonte amau adingin kigo zo ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh tuipi ngasate khempeuh amauʼ khamzah ding kiman zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Numbers11:23 Topa in Moses kiangah, “ Topaʼ hih theih ding zah kiciangtan sa na hi hiam? Ka thugen a manin hong tun leh hong tun loh tu-in na mu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:24 Tua ahih ciangin Moses pai khia-in miteʼ tungah Topaʼ thugente a gen sawn hi. Amah in mite a makai mi sawm sagih kaikhawmin, Puanbuk kimkot ah amaute omsak hi." 
Numbers11:25 Tua ciangin meii sungah Topa hong pai sukin amah hopih a, ama sunga om kha pawl khat la-in upa sawm sagihteʼ sungah a guang hi. Amauteʼ sungah tua kha a om ciangin, amaute in kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in tua khit zawh hih nawn lo uh hi." 
Numbers11:26 Giahphual ah mi nih om uh a, khat Eldad kici-in, a khat Medad kici a, amauteʼ sungah tua kha a lut hi. Amaute pen a kiciamtehte lakah a kihelte hi uh a, ahih hangin Puanbuk ah pai loin, giahphual ah kamsangte bangin thu genin a kiko uh hi." 
Numbers11:27 Tangval khat va tai-in Moses kiangah, “Eldad le Medad-te in giahphual ah thu a gen uh hi,” va ci hi." 
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi, Mosesʼ nasem, Nunʼ tapa Joshua in, “Ka topa Moses aw, amaute kham in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:28 Ama teel mite lakah khat ahi, Mosesʼ nasem, Nunʼ tapa Joshua in, “Ka topa Moses aw, amaute kham in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:29 Ahih hangin Moses in ama kiangah, “Keima tangin hong hazatsak na hi hiam? Topaʼ mi khempeuh kamsang hi henla, Topa in amauʼ sungah ama Kha guan leh ka cih laitak hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers11:30 Tua ciangin Moses le Israel upate giahphual ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
Numbers11:31 Topaʼ kiang panin huih nungin, tuipi panin vamimte hong puak a, giahphual kiang hih lam pang ni khat paina ciang, hua lam pang ni khat paina ciang mah giahphual kimkot ah kiasak a, lei maitang tungah pi thum bang a sah hi." 
Numbers11:32 Tua sun tawntung le a zan tawntung le a zing ciang tawntung mite dingin vamimte a khawm uh hi. Tawm a khawm pen mipa in beem sawm dim khawm a, amaute in amau adingin giahphual kimkot ah tuate a pho uh hi." 
Numbers11:33 Sa a kigaih ma, amauʼ ha kawmah sa a baang laipi mahin, miteʼ tungah Topa hong heh mahmah a, Topa in gimna lianpi khat tawh mite a vat gawp hi." 
Numbers11:34 Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kibroth-hattaavah kici hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sa a lunggulh mite tua lai munah a vui uh hi. 
Numbers11:35 Kibroth-hattaavah panin Hazeroth munah mite pai uh a, Hazeroth ah amaute a taam uh hi." 
Numbers12:1 Moses in Kush numei khat teenpih ahih manin, ama teenpih Kush numeiʼ hangin Miriam le Aaron in amah gensia-in," 
Numbers12:2 “ Topa in Mosesʼ tung bek tawnin thu gen ahi hiam? Eiteʼ tung zong tawnin hong gen hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in tua thu a za hi. 
Numbers12:3 Moses a lungnem mahmah hi a, leitung a om mi khempeuh sangin a lungnem zaw ahi hi." 
Numbers12:4 Topa in thakhat thu-in Moses le Aaron le Miriam kiangah, “Kikhopna buk ah no mihing thumte hong pai un,” a ci hi. Amau thumte a pai uh hi." 
Numbers12:5 Meii khuam sungah Topa hong kum sukin, kikhopna buk kongah dinga, Aaron le Miriam a sam hi. Amau tegel mailam nehin hong pai uh hi." 
Numbers12:6 Topa in, “Ka thu za un: Noteʼ lakah kamsang a om leh Topa keimah in ama tungah maangmuhna tawh ka kilak a, amah tawh mang sungah ka kiho hi." 
Numbers12:7 Ka nasem pa Moses tawh tua bang hi lo hi; ka inn sung thu khempeuh amah ki-ap hi. 
Numbers12:8 Amah tawh kam le kam kiho-in, a kitel lo kampaute tawh hi loin, a kitel takin thu ka gen uh a, amah in Topaʼ mel a mu hi. Tua bang ahih ciangin bang hangin ka nasem Moses gensiat ding lau lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:9 Amaute tungah Topa heh mahmah a, a heh sapi-in a paikhia hi." 
Numbers12:10 Puanbuk tung san panin meiipi a kilakkhiat ciangin Miriam phak a, vuk bangin a pak hi. Miriamʼ lamah Aaron kihei a, tua numei a na phak hi." 
Numbers12:11 Aaron in Moses kiangah, “Ka topa aw, kote hai gamtatin ka khialhna hangun gim hong pia kei in." 
Numbers12:12 A nuʼ sung panin a suahkhiat ciangin a pum phel lang khat a bei misi bangin Miriam hisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:13 Tua ciangin Moses in Topaʼ tungah, “Amah damsak in, Pasian aw, kong thum hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Numbers12:14 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua numeiʼ maitang, a pa in cilphih leh tua numei ni sagih sung maizum ding hi lo ahi hiam? Giahphual pua lamah ni sagih sung kikhumcipsak in; tua khit ciangin amah hong kipaipihkik thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers12:15 Tua ahih ciangin giahphual pua lamah ni sagih sung Miriam kikhumcip hi. Miriam a kipaipihkik mateng khualzin a zom dingin mite ding khia lo uh hi. 
Numbers12:16 Tua khit ciangin Hazeroth panin mite ding khia uh a, Paran gamlak ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Numbers13:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers13:2 “Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan leitang a vaan dingin mi sawl inla, amaute lakah makai ahi, nam khat sung panin mi khat ciat sawl in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers13:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh Paran gamlak panin Israel miteʼ lutang ahi mi khempeuh a sawl hi. 
Numbers13:4 A sawl miteʼ min hih bang ahi hi: Reuben minam panin Zakkurʼ tapa Shammua; Simeon minam panin Horiʼ tapa Shafat; Judah minam panin Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb; Issakhar minam panin Josefʼ tapa Igal; Efraim minam panin Nunʼ tapa Hoshea; Benjamin minam panin Rafuʼ tapa Palti; Zebulun minam panin Sodiʼ tapa Gaddiel; Josef minam (Manasseh minam) panin Susiʼ tapa Gaddi; Dan minam panin Gemalliʼ tapa Ammiel; Asher minam panin Mikhaelʼ tapa Shethur; Naftali minam panin Vofsiʼ tapa Nahbi; Gad minam panin Makhiʼ tapa Geuel ahi hi. 
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl miteʼ min ahi hi. Moses in Nunʼ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi. 
Numbers13:5 Hihte pen gam vaan dingin Moses in a sawl miteʼ min ahi hi. Moses in Nunʼ tapa Hoshea pen Joshua ci-in a min kheelsak hi. 
Numbers13:6 Moses in Kanaan gam a vaan dingin amaute sawlin amaute kiangah, “Negeb gam gal khat ah pai to-in, mual tung gamah pai to unla," 
Numbers13:7 leitang bangci hiam, tua leitang ah a teeng mite thahat hiam, amaute tawm hiam, tam hiam," 
Numbers13:8 amauʼ teenna gam pen nuntak olna gam hiam, haksatna gam hiam, amauʼ teenna khuapite pen giahphual hiam, mun muanhuai hiam," 
Numbers13:9 a leitang a leihoih hiam, lei sia hiam, sing om hiam, om lo hiam, va thei un. Na siam tawpun va hih unla, tua leitang a gah pawl khat hong ciahpih un,” a ci hi. Tua hun pen leenggah a palte a min hun ahi hi." 
Numbers13:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute pai to-in Zin gamlak panin Hamath khua lutna gei, Rehob mun dong gam a vaan uh hi." 
Numbers13:11 Amaute Negeb lamah pai to uh a, Hebron tung uh hi. Anakʼ suanlekhakte ahi Ahiman mite, Sheshai mite le Talmai mite, tua lai ah na om uh hi. (Hebron pen Egypt gam a Zoan a kisat ma kum sagih lai-in kisat hi.)" 
Numbers13:12 Amaute Eshkol kuam tung uh a, tua lai panin leenggah bawk khat bek a hiang tawh loin, mi nih in zawl khatin a zawng uh hi. Amaute in mang kawlsing le thei zong tawm khat a pua uh hi." 
Numbers13:13 Tua lai panin Israel mite in leenggah bawk a lawhna hangin tua mun pen Eshkol Kuam kici hi. 
Numbers13:14 Ni sawm li a cin ciangin gam vaanna panin amaute hong ciahkik uh hi. 
Numbers13:15 Paran gamlak Kadesh mun a Moses le Aaron le Israel mihonte khempeuh kiangah amaute hong tung uh hi. Amaute le mihon khempeuh tungah thu puakkik uh a, tua leitang a gahte amaute a lak uh hi." 
Numbers13:16 Amaute in Moses kiangah, “Kote nong sawlna leitang ah ka va tung uh hi. Tua lai ah bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin luang a, hih pen tua gam a gah ahi hi." 
Numbers13:17 Ahi zongin tua gam a teeng mite thahat uh a, a khuapite uh kulh tawh ki-umin lian mahmah hi. Tua banah Anakʼ suanlekhakte tua lai ah ka mu uh hi." 
Numbers13:18 Amalek mite Negeb gamah teeng uh hi. Hit mite, Jebus mite le Amor mite, mual tung gamah teeng uh hi. Kanaan mite tuipi gei le Jordan dungah teeng uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Numbers13:19 Ahih hangin Kaleb in Mosesʼ mai ah mite gamdaisakin, “Thakhatin pai to-in va luah ni; bang hang hiam cih leh eite pen a zo thei mahmah ding ihi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers13:20 Tua ciangin amah tawh a pai to mite in, “Tua mite a sim dingin i pai ngam kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh eite sangin amaute hat zaw uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers13:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a tam zaw in amauʼ vaan sa gam thu Israel mite tungah a sia lamin hong puak uh a, “Kote, a vaan dingin ka va paina uh gam pen a tunga teeng mite a puksisak thei ding gam hoih lo ahi hi." 
Numbers13:22 Tua lai ah Nefilim mite (Nefilim pan a hong piang Anak mite) ka mu uh hi. Kote pen kauphe bang lelin ka kingaihsun uh a, amauʼ muhna ah zong tua bangmah ka hi takpi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:1 Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh nakpi takin kiko uh a, tua zan sung kap uh hi." 
Numbers14:2 Israel mite khempeuh in Moses le Aaron phunsan uh a, mihon buppi in amaute tungah, “Egypt gamah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung! Tua ahih kei leh zong hih gamlak ah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung!" 
Numbers14:3 Namsau tawh a si dingin bang hangin Topa in hih gamah kote hong paipih ahi hiam? Ka zite uh le ka tate uh galteʼ mat suak ding uh hi. Egypt ah ciahkik ding ko adingin hoih zaw ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. 
Numbers14:4 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Makai khat teelin Egypt ah ciahkik ni,” kici uh hi." 
Numbers14:5 Tua ciangin Israel mihon kikhawmte khempeuhʼ mai ah Moses le Aaron bok suk uh hi. 
Numbers14:6 Gam vaanteʼ lakah a kihel Nunʼ tapa Joshua le Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb-te in a puan uh bal kekin," 
Numbers14:6 Gam vaanteʼ lakah a kihel Nunʼ tapa Joshua le Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb-te in a puan uh bal kekin," 
Numbers14:7 Israel mihonte khempeuh tungah, “A vaan dingin kote ka va paina sa uh leitang a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
Numbers14:8 Eiteʼ tungah Topa a lungkim leh, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna hih leitang ah eite hong paipihin eite tungah tua leitang hong pia ding hi." 
Numbers14:9 Topa phunsan kei hamtang un. Amaute pen zial mang pak ding ihih manin tua gam mite kihta kei un. Amauʼ kiang panin amauʼ kidalna kila khia khin a, eite tawh Topa hong om hi; amaute kihta kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:10 Ahih hangin mihonte khempeuh in, amaute suang tawh deng un, a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuhʼ muhin kikhopna buk tungah Topaʼ minthanna vang hong kilang hi." 
Numbers14:11 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite in bang tanvei kei hong simmawh ding ahi uh hiam? Amauteʼ lakah ka hih sa limte om napi-in, amaute in bang tanvei hong um lo lailai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Numbers14:12 Pulnatna tawh amaute vat gawpin ka lawn khiakik dinga, amaute sangin a lian zaw a thahat zaw minamin nang kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:13 Ahih hangin Moses in Topaʼ kiangah, “Tua bang hileh Egypt mite in hih thu za ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ lak panin na thahatna tawh hih mite na paikhiatpih hi." 
Numbers14:14 Amaute in hih gam a teeng mite tungah gen ding uh hi. Topa aw, hih miteʼ lakah nang na omna thu hih mite in za khinzo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, maitang kituahin nang hong kimu a, amauteʼ tungah nangma meii a ding hi. Amauteʼ mai ah sunin meii khuam sungah, zanin mei khuam sungah nang na pai hi." 
Numbers14:15 Tu-in hih mite mihing khat thah bangin that lecin, nangma minthang vangliatna a za sa minamte in," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Amauteʼ tungah piak dinga a kiciam leitang ah Topa in hih mite paipih zo lo ahih manin, amah in gamlak ah amaute that hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:17 Tu-in, nang tungah hong thum ing. Nangmah in thu ciamin, ‘ Topa heh hak a, a itna kip lianin, mawhna le thupalsatna maisak a, ahih hangin a mawhte siangsak ngei loin, pateʼ mawhna tate tungah, khang thum khang lina dongin thuk hi,’ na cih mah bangin Topaʼ vangliatna liansak in." 
Numbers14:18  
Numbers14:19 A lian nangma itna kip tawh a kizui le Egypt panin tu hun dong hih mite na maisak sa tawh kizui-in hih miteʼ mawhna maisak in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:20 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nangma gen bangin ka maisak hi." 
Numbers14:21 Ahih hangin a taktakin, ka nuntak lai teng, Topaʼ minthanna tawh leitung kidim ding ahih mah bangin," 
Numbers14:22 Egypt le gamlak ah ka hih sa ka vangliatna le ka limte mu khin napi-in sawm vei kei hong ze-etin keima aw a ngai lo mite," 
Numbers14:23 amauʼ pate tungah piak dinga ka kiciam leitang a mu kuamah om lo ding uh hi. Kei hong simmawh mi kuamah in tua leitang mu lo ding hi. 
Numbers14:24 Ahih hangin ka nasem Kaleb ahihleh, amah in lungsim tuam nei-in limtakin kei hong zui ahih manin, amah in a zuat leitang ah ka tunpih dinga, ama suanlekhakte in tua leitang luah ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:25 Tu-in tua kuam sungah Amalek mite le Kanaan mite teng uh ahih manin, San Tuipi paina lampi tawnin zing ciangin gamlak ah pai un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:26 Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers14:27 “Hih a gilo mihonte in bang tanvei kei hong phunsan ding uh ahi hiam? Israel mite in kei hong phunsanna ka za khin hi. 
Numbers14:28 Amaute tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa in, ‘Kei a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka zakna ah na gente uh no tungah ka hong hih ding hi." 
Numbers14:29 Na luanghawmte uh hih gamlak ah lum ding hi. Note khempeuh, kum sawm nih pan a tungsiah, kei hong phunsante," 
Numbers14:30 Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua sim loh, note tengsak dingin ka kiciamna leitang ah khat beek na tung kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:30 Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua sim loh, note tengsak dingin ka kiciamna leitang ah khat beek na tung kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:31 Ahih hangin galte in man ding na cih uh na tate uh, keimah in ka tumpih dinga, note in na thusim loh uh leitang amaute in mu ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:32 Ahih hangin note na hih uh leh, na luanghawmte uh hih gamlak ah lum ding hi." 
Numbers14:33 Na luanghawmte uh a nunung pen gamlak ah a kisial mateng, gamlak ah kum sawm li sung na tate uh tuucing hi ding uh a, noteʼ ginat lohna thuak ding uh hi." 
Numbers14:34 Na gam vaan sung uh ni phazah tawh kizui-in, ni sawm li, ni khat ciangin kum khat, note in na mawhna uh kum sawm li sung na thuak ding uh a, keima lungkim lohna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Numbers14:35 Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen hi. Keimah langpangin a kikaikhawm hih a gilo mihonte khempeuh tungah hih thu ka hih taktak ding hi. Hih gamlak ah amaute bei mang ding uh a, amaute si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:36 Moses in gam vaan dingin a sawl mite hong ciahkikin a gam thu a sia lamin gen uh ahih manin mihonte Topa a phunsansak," 
Numbers14:37 a gam thu a sia lamin a gen tua mite, Topaʼ mai ah gimna in sisak hi." 
Numbers14:38 Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nunʼ tapa Joshua le Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi. 
Numbers14:38 Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nunʼ tapa Joshua le Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi. 
Numbers14:39 Moses in Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen a, nakpi takin mite thum uh hi." 
Numbers14:40 Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, gamlak mual dawnah pai to-in, “Thei un, hih lai ah i om hi. Topaʼ ciamna sa munah i pai to ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i khial khin hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers14:41 Ahih hangin Moses in, “Bang hangin tu-in Topaʼ thupiakna palsat na hi uh hiam, tangtung lo ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Numbers14:42 Na galte uh mai ah note hong kisat puk kha ding ahih manin kuan to kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ lakah Topa om lo hi. 
Numbers14:43 Amalek mite le Kanaan mite na mai uh ah om ahih ciangin namsau tawh note na puk ding uh hi. Topa zuihna panin nungkik na hih uh ciangin note tawh Topa hong om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers14:44 Ahih hangin Topaʼ thuciamna singkuang hitaleh Moses hitaleh giahphual panin ding khia lo napi-in gamlak mual dawnah kuan toh ding amaute in ngaihsun veve uh hi. 
Numbers14:45 Tua ciangin mual tung gamah a teeng Amalek mite le Kanaan mite hong pai suk uh a, amaute zo-in Hormah ciang dong nangawn ah amaute a delh uh hi." 
Numbers15:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitang ah a teeng dingin na tun uh ciangin 
Numbers15:3 bawng hon pan hitaleh tuu hon pan hitaleh thuciamna tunsak nadingin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin na piak ciang uh hitaleh, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui bawl nadingin utthu-a biakna hitaleh, a kiseh pawi hunte ah biakpiakna hitaleh na piak uh ciangin," 
Numbers15:4 biakna a paipih mipa in annel lawh khat sathau biing khat tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna Topaʼ tungah pia ding hi. 
Numbers15:5 Tuuno khat tawh piak khawm dingin meihal biakna ahih kei leh biakpiakna tawh, tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na bawl ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:6 Tua ahih kei leh tuutal khat tawh piak khawm dingin annel lawh nih sathau biing nih tawh a kibawl an tawh biak nading na bawl ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:7 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:8 Meihal biak nading ahi a, thuciamna tunsakna in biakpiak nading ahi a, Topaʼ tungah thunuam a biak nading ahi zongin bawngtal na bawl uh ciangin," 
Numbers15:9 mi khat in a bawngtal tawh annel lawh thum sathau biing thum tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna pia dinga," 
Numbers15:10 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl nih na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:11 “Bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin, tuuno a pa ahi a, keel no a pa tawh ahi zongin piak khawm dingin tua bangin kihih ding hi." 
Numbers15:12 Na piak uh ganhing khempeuh a malzah tawh kizui-in tua bangin na bawlkim ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:13 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piakna uh ah tualsung mi khempeuh in hih nate tu-a bangin hih ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:14 Note kiangah khualmi khat hong peem ahi a, na khang tawntungun note lakah mi khatpeuh hong om ahi zongin, amah in Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piak nop leh, noteʼ hih mah bangin hih ding hi." 
Numbers15:15 Mihonpi adingin ngeina khat om dinga, note le noteʼ lakah hong peem mi adingin tawntung ngeina khat na khang tawntungun om ding hi. Topaʼ mai ah note le peemta mite na kibang ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:16 Note le noteʼ lakah hong peem mi adingin a kibang thu khat, ngeina kip khat om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:17 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:18 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong paipihna gamah tungin 
Numbers15:19 tua gam a piang ante na nek uh ciangin Topaʼ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:20 Na an lak uh a masa pen sung panin biakna-in moh khat na pia ding uh a, ancilna pan a biakna-in na piak bangun na bawl ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:21 Na khang tawntungun na an lak uh a masa pen Topaʼ tungah biakna-in na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers15:22 “Ahih hangin note khialin, Topa in Moses tungah a gen sa hih thupiaknate khempeuh," 
Numbers15:23 Topa in a thupiak a kipanin na khang tawntungun, Moses tungtawnin Topa in note hong thupiakte khempeuh na zuih kei uh leh," 
Numbers15:24 theih lohna hangin mihonteʼ phawk lohin a kikhial ahihleh, mihonte khempeuh in Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, meihal biak nadingin bawngtalno khat, ngeina kip om bangin an tawh biakna le a tuibuah tawh le khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat pia ding hi." 
Numbers15:25 Siampipa in Israel mihonte khempeuh adingin kilemna bawlsak dinga, amaute kimaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen tatkhialhna hi a, amaute in tua amauʼ tatkhialhna hangin Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal amauʼ biakna le khialhna hanga amauʼ biakna uh Topaʼ mai ah paipih khin uh hi." 
Numbers15:26 Tua tatkhialhna in amaute khempeuh huam kha ahih manin Israel mihonte khempeuh le amauʼ lakah a peem khualmi zong kimaisak ding hi. 
Numbers15:27 “Theih lohna hangin mi khat a khialh leh, khialhna hanga biak nadingin kum khat a pha keel nu khat pia ding hi." 
Numbers15:28 Mi khat, theih lohna hangin a khialh ciangin, amah a siankik theih nadingin siampipa in tua a khial mipa adingin Topaʼ mai ah kilemna bawlsak dinga, amah kimaisak ding hi." 
Numbers15:29 Theih lohna hangin na khat peuhpeuh a hih kha, Israel miteʼ lakah a om tualsung mipa le amauteʼ lakah a peem khualmipa adingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:30 “Ahih hangin tualsung mi hitaleh peemta hitaleh, na khat peuhpeuh a hih teitei mipa in Topa a simmawh hi a, tua mipa kithat ding hi." 
Numbers15:31 Amah in Topaʼ thu simmawhin, a thupiakna siasak ahih manin, tua mipa kithat dinga, ama mawhna amah in thuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:32 Israel mite gamlak ah a om sungun, Sabbath ni-in sing a tom mi khat mu uh hi." 
Numbers15:33 Sing a tom laitak a mu mite in Aaron, Moses le mihonte khempeuh kiangah amah paipih uh hi." 
Numbers15:34 Amah bang kicih ding ci-in teltakin kigen lo ahih manin amaute in khumcip uh hi. 
Numbers15:35 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua ah suang tawh amah deng ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers15:36 Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua ah amah paipih uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin suang tawh amah a deng lum uh hi." 
Numbers15:37 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers15:38 “Israel mite tungah gen inla, a khang tawntungun a puan mongte uh ah a teep bawlin, a puan mongteep tungah khau dum khat a khih dingun sawl in." 
Numbers15:39 Tua pen, note in ut luatna tawh na zuih theih zel uh ahi nomauʼ lungsim le nomauʼ mittangʼ deihna zui kha loin, note in na et ding uh puan mongteep le Topaʼ thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sep nading uh ahi hi." 
Numbers15:40 Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sem ding uh a, na Pasian uh tungah na siangtho ding uh hi." 
Numbers15:41 Kei pen, noteʼ Pasian ahi dingin Egypt panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:1 Tu-in Levi mite sung pan Leviʼ tapa Kohath, Kohathʼ tapa Izhar, Izharʼ tapa Korah; le Reuben mite sung pan Reubenʼ tapa Eliab, Eliabʼ tapa Dathan; le Abiram; le Pelethʼ tapa On;" 
Numbers16:2 hih mite in pawl kai uh hi. Israel mite sung panin miʼ theihkim, mihon sung panin a kiteel, mihonte a makai mi za nih le sawm nga tawh Mosesʼ mai ah ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:3 Moses le Aaron langpangin amaute kikaikhawmin amaute kiangah, “Khengval lua uh teh! Mihon khempeuhte a milipin siangtho uh a, amauteʼ lakah Topa om hi. Bang hangin Topaʼ mihonpite tungah nomau kiliansak tawm na hi uh hiam” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:4 Moses in tua thu a zak ciangin bok sukin 
Numbers16:5 Korah le a pawlte khempeuh kiangah, “Zing ciangin Topa in a siangtho ahi mi, ama aʼ ahi mi hong lakin, ama kiangah paisak dinga, amah in a teel ding mipa ama kiangah paisak ding hi." 
Numbers16:6 Hih bangin gamta un: Korah le a pawlte khempeuh in paknamtui beel la un. 
Numbers16:7 Zing ciangin Topaʼ mai ah tua beelte sungah mei koihin, mei tungah paknamtui koih unla, tua ciangin Topaʼ teel mi pen a siangtho hong hi ding hi. Leviʼ tapate aw, khengval lua uh teh!” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:8 Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “No Levi mite aw, tu-in za un." 
Numbers16:9 Israel miteʼ Pasian in ama kiangah hong paipih ding, Topaʼ biakbuk sungah nasep sem ding, mihonteʼ na a sem dingin amauʼ mai ah a ding dingin Israel mihonteʼ kiang panin hong khen khiatna," 
Numbers16:10 le nang le na sanggamte ahi Leviʼ mite, ama kiangah hong paipihna hawmthawh lai na hi hiam? Siampi nasepna zong deih lai na hi hiam?" 
Numbers16:11 Tua ahih ciangin nang le na pawlte khempeuh hih lai ah na kikaihkhopna uh pen Topa langpanna ahi hi. Note in na phunsan uh Aaron pen bang mi hi mawk ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Numbers16:12 Tua ciangin Moses in mi sawlin Eliabʼ tapa Dathan le Abiram samsak hi. Amaute in, “Kong pai kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:13 Koteʼ tungah nangmah ulianin kibawl tawmin, gamlak ah kote hong that dingin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam panin nong paikhiat pihna thu hawmthawh lai na hi hiam?" 
Numbers16:14 Tua tham loin nangmah in bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gamah kote hong paipih loin, lote le leenggui lote zong nong luahsak kei hi. Hih miteʼ mit khel khia ding na hi hiam? Kong pai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:15 Moses heh mahmah ahih manin Topaʼ kiangah, “Amauʼ biakna thupi ngaihsut kei in. Amaute tungah bangmah ka gamta khial kei a, a la uh khat beek nangawn ka laksak kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:16 Tua ciangin Moses in Korah kiangah, “Nang le na pawlte, nang le amaute, Aaron tawh zing ciangin Topaʼ mai ah hong om un." 
Numbers16:17 Note in na milipun na paknamtui beel ciat uh la-in, a sungah paknamtui koih unla, Topaʼ mai ah na paknamtui beel ciat uh, paknamtui beel za nih le sawm nga paipih un. Aaron le nangmah in zong na paknamtui beel tuak uh paipih un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:18 Tua ahih ciangin a milipun a paknamtui beel ciat uh la uh a, tuate sungah mei koihin a tungah paknamtui koih uh a, kikhopna buk kongah Moses le Aaron tawh ding khawm uh hi." 
Numbers16:19 Tua ciangin Korah in amauteʼ lang khat, kikhopna buk kongah mihonte khempeuh khawm hi. Topaʼ minthanna mihon khempeuhte tungah hong kilang hi." 
Numbers16:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah," 
Numbers16:21 “Amaute tomno sungin ka beisak theih nadingin hih mihonte lak panin kihem un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:22 Amaute bok suk uh a, “Pasian, mi khempeuhteʼ tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian aw, mi khatʼ khialhna hangin mihon khempeuhteʼ tungah nang heh ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:23 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:24 “Mihonte tungah hih bangin gen in: Korah, Dathan le Abiram-teʼ omna kiim panin paikhia un, ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:25 Tua ciangin Moses dingin Dathan le Abiram kiangah pai a, Israel upate in zong amah a zui uh hi." 
Numbers16:26 Amah in mihonte kiangah, “Amauteʼ khialhna khempeuh tawh note hong kiphiat khia kha ding ahih manin, hih migiloteʼ puanbuk panin paikhia unla, amauʼ na khat beek lawng kha kei un, hong thum ing,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:27 Tua ahih ciangin Korah, Dathan le Abiram-teʼ omna kiim panin amaute a paikhia uh hi. Dathan le Abiram, a zite uh le a tapate uh le a taneute uh tawh hong pusuakin a puanbuk kong uh ah ding khawm uh hi." 
Numbers16:28 Tua ciangin Moses in, “Hih na khempeuh a sem dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi. Hih nasep pen keima utthu ahih lohna, hih thu tawh na thei ding uh hi." 
Numbers16:29 Mi khempeuh a sih ngei bang danin hih mite si a, tua ahih kei leh mi khempeuh in a tuah ngeite a tuah leh, Topa in kei hong sawl loh ahi hi." 
Numbers16:30 Ahih hangin Topa in a thak khat hong piangsakin, leitang in a kam ka-in amauteʼ neih khempeuh tawh hih mite valh tumin, a hingtangin Leinuai ah a tum suk uh leh, hih mite in Topa a simmawh ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:31 Hih thute a gen khit phetin amauʼ nuai ah lei kiphelkham hi. 
Numbers16:32 Leitang a kam ka-in, Korah tawh a kipawl mi khempeuh le a innkuanpihte uh le a neihsa khempeuh uh valh tum hi." 
Numbers16:33 Tua ahih ciangin amaute le a neihsa khempeuh uh a hingtangun Leinuai ah tum suk uh hi. Leitang in amaute khup nelhin mihonpiteʼ lak panin amaute bei uh hi. 
Numbers16:34 Amauteʼ kikona hangin a kiim uh a om Israel mite khempeuh tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Leitang in hong valh tum kha in teh!” ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:35 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kiang panin mei hong paikhia a, paknamtui a pia mi za nih le sawm ngate kaang tum hi." 
Numbers16:36 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:37 “Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar in meikuang sung panin paknamtui beelte a lakkhiat ding gen inla, tua ciangin a gamlapi ah mei thehthang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nate," 
Numbers16:38 amauʼ nuntakna a beina dongin a khial hih miteʼ paknamtui beelte a siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakna tau sitna kuangdai dingin seek un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topaʼ mai ah tuate pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nate siangtho hi. Israel mite tungah tua bangin hih nate pen lim khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:39 Tua ahih ciangin siampi Eleazar in mei tawh a kaang tum miteʼ piak paknamtui sumngo beelte la-in biakna tau sitna-in a seek hi. 
Numbers16:40 Topa in Moses tungtawnin Eleazar tungah a gen bangin Korah le a pawlte tawh a kibang kha lo dingin, siampi ahi lo, Aaronʼ suanlekhakte ahi lo mi peuhmah, Topaʼ mai ah paknamtui hal dingin a pai loh nading, Israel mite tungah phawksakna khat ahi hi." 
Numbers16:41 Ahih hangin a zing ciangin Israel mihon khempeuh in Moses le Aaron phunsan uh a, “ Topaʼ mite na that uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers16:42 Moses le Aaron langpangin mihonte a kikhop uh ciangin, kikhopna buk lamah amaute a khuadak uh ciangin, meii in na tuam a, Topaʼ minthanna vang kilang hi." 
Numbers16:43 Kikhopna buk mai lamah Moses le Aaron pai a," 
Numbers16:44 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers16:45 “Tomno sungin amaute ka siatsak theih nadingin hih mihonteʼ lak panin paikhia un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amau tegel zong bok suk uh hi." 
Numbers16:46 Moses in Aaron kiangah, “Na paknamtui beel la-in, biakna tau pan a mei a sungah koih inla, a tungah paknamtui koihin, mihonteʼ lakah paipih mengmeng inla, amaute adingin kilemna bawlsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ kiang panin hehna hong paikhia khin a, gimna kipan khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers16:47 Tua ahih ciangin Mosesʼ gen bangin Aaron in paknamtui beel la-in mihonte lakah a tai hi. Mite lakah gimna kipan khin takpi a, amah in paknamtui koihin mite adingin kilemna a bawlsak hi." 
Numbers16:48 A si le a hingteʼ kikalah amah dinga, gimna a veng hi." 
Numbers16:49 Tu-in Korahʼ tungtang ah a site sim loh, hih gimna tawh a si mi tul sawm le tul li le za sagih ahi hi." 
Numbers16:50 Gimna a ven ciangin kikhopna buk kong Moses kiangah Aaron a ciahkik hi. 
Numbers17:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers17:2 “Israel mite tungah thu gen inla, amaute tung panin, beh khat ciangin ciangkhut khat, a beh tawh kizui-in a makaite khempeuh tung panin ciangkhut sawm le nih la in. A ciangkhut tungah amauʼ min ciat gelh inla," 
Numbers17:3 Levi ciangkhut tungah Aaronʼ min gelh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh beh lutang khat ah ciangkhut khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers17:4 Tua ciangin kikhopna buk sung, thuciamna mai, nang tawh i kituahna munah tuate na koih ding hi." 
Numbers17:5 Keimah in ka teel mipaʼ ciangkhut hong sel ding hi. Amaute in nang hong phunsanna, Israel miteʼ phunna tua bangin keiʼ kiang panin ka beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers17:6 Moses in zong Israel mite tungah tua thu a gen hi. A makaite khempeuh in a beh tawh kizui-in makai khat ciangin khat pai, ciangkhut sawm le nih ama tungah pia uh a, Aaronʼ ciangkhut zong amauʼ ciangkhut lakah a om hi." 
Numbers17:7 Moses in thuciamna puanbuk sung Topaʼ mai ah tua ciangkhutte a koih hi. 
Numbers17:8 A zing ciangin thuciamna puanbuk sungah Moses a pai leh, Levi-te beh ading Aaronʼ ciangkhut selin nguum khia a, paakin, almond min gah a gah hi." 
Numbers17:9 Tua ciangin Moses in Topaʼ mai panin Israel mite khempeuh kiangah ciangkhut khempeuh paikhiatpih hi. Amaute in en uh a, a ciangkhut ciat uh a la uh hi." 
Numbers17:10 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amaute si kha ding ahih manin, amaute in kei hong phunsanna beisak theih nadingin a lehdo mite adingin lim ahi dingin thuciamna mai ah Aaronʼ ciangkhut koihkik in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers17:11 Tua ahih manin Topaʼ sawl bangin Moses in zong a hih hi. 
Numbers17:12 Israel mite in Moses kiangah, “En in, kote a si ka hi ta uh a, kote khempeuh a mawkna ka hi ta uh hi." 
Numbers17:13 A nai ah a pai, Topaʼ biakbuk nai ah a pai peuhmah si ding hi. Kote khempeuh ka bei nading uh hi ta hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers18:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Nang le na tapate le na behte in biakbuk sung nasepnate tawh kisai-in khialhna a om leh mawhna na pua khawm ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang le na tapate in na siampi nasepna uh tawh kisai-in khialhna a om leh no teng bek in mawhna na pua ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:2 Amaute in nang hong pawlin, thuciamna puanbuk mai ah nang le na tapate na om laitakun noteʼ na hong sepsak theih nadingin na pate nam ahi Levi minam na sanggamte zong paipih in." 
Numbers18:3 Amaute in note hong huhin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh a, ahih hangin note le amaute si kha ding na hih ciangun biakbuk nazatte le biakna tau ah na hong seppih lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:4 Amaute in note hong pawlin, kikhopna buk vaanin puanbuk nasep khempeuh sem ding uh a, noteʼ nasepte midang kuamah in hong seppih thei lo ding hi." 
Numbers18:5 Israel mite tungah hehna a om nawn loh nadingin biakbuk nasep le biakna tau nasep note in na sem ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:6 En un, Israel mite kiang panin na sanggam uh Levi mite ka la khin a, amaute pen kikhopna buk nasep a sem dingin Topaʼ tungah a kipia, noteʼ tungah letsong ahi hi." 
Numbers18:7 Nang le na tapate in biakna tau tawh kisai nate le dalna puan sunga om nate khempeuh ah na siampi nasep uh na sem ding uh hi. Na siampi nasep uh letsongin kong piak hi a, midangte in hong sep leh kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Aaron kiangah, “En in, kei tungah hong kipia biakna a kikoih khempeuh, Israel mite in a ap nate khempeuh nang kong pia hi. Nangma tanh ding le na suanlekhakteʼ kaih ahi tawntung dingin note tungah kong pia hi." 
Numbers18:9 Mei tawh hal dingte lak panin a kisit, a siangtho pen nangma ngah dingte in: Amaute in keiʼ tungah hong piak amauʼ biaknate khempeuh, an tawh amauʼ biaknate khempeuh, khialhna hanga amauʼ biaknate khempeuh le mawhna hanga amauʼ biaknate khempeuh pen nang le na suanlekhakte adingin a siangtho pen hi ding hi." 
Numbers18:10 A siangtho pen mun khat ah na ne ding uh hi. Pasal peuhmah in ne thei ding hi; note adingin a siangtho ahi hi. 
Numbers18:11 “Amauʼ letsong biakna, Israel mite in vei-a biaknate khempeuh uh zong nomau-aʼ ahi hi. Nang le na tapate le na tanuteʼ kaih tawntung dingin tuate kong pia hi. Na inn sunga om a siangtho mi peuhpeuh in ne thei ding hi." 
Numbers18:12 “Sathau limci pen khempeuh le leenggahzu le an a limci pen khempeuh, Topaʼ tungah amauʼ piak anpalte, noteʼ tungah kong pia hi." 
Numbers18:13 Amaute in Topaʼ tungah a piak uh, amauʼ leitang ah a min masa gah khempeuh nomau aʼ hi ding hi. Na inn sunga om a siangtho mi peuhpeuh in ne thei ding hi." 
Numbers18:14 “Israel-teʼ sungah a ki-ap na peuhmah nomau aʼ hi ding hi. 
Numbers18:15 “Mihing le ganhing khempeuh sung panin Topaʼ tungah mite in a piak tacil khempeuh, mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh, nomau aʼ hi ding hi. Ahi zongin mihing tacil na tan khia ding uh a, ganhing nin tacil zong na tan khia ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:16 Tuate a kitatna man (kha khat a phak ciangin tuate na tan khia ding uh hi) gerah sawm nih a pha biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in ngun shekel nga-in na seh ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:17 Ahih hangin bawng tacil, ahih kei leh tuu tacil, ahih kei leh keel tacilte na tan kei ding uh hi; tuate a siangtho ahi hi. Biakna tau tungah tuateʼ si na theh ding uh a, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna-in tuateʼ thau na hal ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:18 Ahih hangin a kivei sa-iik le a taklam phei nomau-aʼ ahih mah bangin, tuateʼ sate nomau aʼ hi ding hi." 
Numbers18:19 “Israel mite in Topaʼ tungah a piak a siangtho biaknate khempeuh, nang le na tapate le na tanute tungah kaih tawntung dingin kong pia hi. Tua pen nang le na suanlekhakte adingin Topaʼ mai ah a tawntungin a kiphel thei lo, ci tawh thuciamna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:20 Topa in Aaron kiangah, “Nang in amauʼ gam sungah gamhluah na nei kei dinga, amauteʼ lakah tanh zong na nei kei ding hi. Kei pen Israel miteʼ lakah nangma tanh le nangma luah ka hi hi." 
Numbers18:21 “Kikhopna buk sungah amauteʼ nasepna thaman dingin Israel sunga sawm-ah-khat khempeuh, Levi miteʼ tungah gamh-in ka pia hi." 
Numbers18:22 Amaute in khialhna thuakin si kha ding uh ahih manin, tu a kipanin kikhopna buk sungah Israel midangte pai-in tua sawm-ah-khat nek pih lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:23 Ahih hangin Levi mite in kikhopna buk nasep sem ding uh a, amaute in a tavuan uh pua ding uh hi. Tua pen amauʼ khang tawntungin ngeina kip hi dinga, amaute in Israel miteʼ lakah luah nei lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakna-in Topaʼ tungah a piak uh Israel miteʼ sawm-ah-khat pen Levi mite tungah luah dingin ka pia khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lakah amaute in luah a neih loh ding uh ka gen sa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers18:25 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers18:26 “Levi mite kiangah hih bangin na gen lai ding hi: ‘Noteʼ luah dingin amauteʼ tung panin kong piak sawm-ah-khat, Israel miteʼ tung panin na lak uh ciangin, tua sung panin Topaʼ tungah biakna, sawm-ah-khat sung pan sawm-ah-khat na pia sawn ding uh hi." 
Numbers18:27 Tua na biaknate uh, ancilna pan a an le leenggah sukna pan a kipia mah bangin note-aʼ in kiciamteh ding hi." 
Numbers18:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel miteʼ tung panin na ngah uh sawm-ah-khat khempeuh tung panin Topaʼ tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tua bangin siampi Aaronʼ tungah Topa a kibiakna na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers18:29 Note tungah hong kipia letsong lakah a limci pen, a siangtho pen paipihin Topa ading biakna khempeuh na pia ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Numbers18:30 Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Tuate sung panin a limci pen teng na piak khit uh ciangin, a om lai teng Levi mite adingin ancilna panin a piangte le leenggah sukna panin a piangte a kipia mah bangin kiciamteh ding hi." 
Numbers18:31 Nang le na innkuanpihte in mun khat peuhpeuh ah na ne thei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen kikhopna buk sungah noteʼ nasepna thaman ahi hi. 
Numbers18:32 Tua sung panin a limci pen na piak nak uh leh tua thu hangin mawhsakna na thuak kei ding uh hi. Israel miteʼ na a siangthote na ninsak kei ding uh hi. Na nitsak uh leh na si ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers19:1 Tu-in Topa in Moses le Aaronʼ kiangah," 
Numbers19:2 “ Topaʼ thupiak thukham le ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Poina a nei lo, sitbaanna a om lo, a tungah nasepna kol a kivawh ngei nai lo, bawngla a san khat nomau kiangah hong paipih nadingun Israel mite kiangah gen un." 
Numbers19:3 Siampi Eleazar kiangah na pia ding uh a, giahphual pua lamah kipaipihin ama mai ah kigo ding hi." 
Numbers19:4 Siampi Eleazar in a khutme tawh a si tawm khat la-in, kikhopna buk mai lamah a si sagih vei theh ding hi." 
Numbers19:5 Ama muhna ah a bawngla kihal dinga, a vun, a sa le a si, a ek tawh kihal ding hi." 
Numbers19:6 Siampipa in taamtak sing le puknah le a ausan khaute la-in bawngla a kihalna sungah tuate khul ding hi. 
Numbers19:7 Tua ciangin siampipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil dinga, tua khit ciangin giahphual ah hong pai ding hi. A nitak mateng siampipa a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:8 Bawngla a hal mipa in ama puante sawpin tui sungah kipumsil dinga, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:9 Mi a siang khat in bawngla vu khawmin, giahphual pualam a siang mun khat ah tuate koih dinga, khialhna maisak nading, nitna siansak nading tui ah zat dingin Israel mihonpite adingin tuate kikem ding hi." 
Numbers19:10 Bawngla vute a khawm mipa in ama puante sawpin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Hih pen Israel mite le amaute lakah a peem khualmi tungah tawntung ngeina hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:11 “Misi luang khatpeuh a lawng pa ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi. 
Numbers19:12 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a mahmah tui tawh kisiangsakin, tua khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a mahmah a kisiansak kei leh, amah a siang suak thei lo ding hi." 
Numbers19:13 Misi khatpeuh a lawng mi in a mahmah a kisiansak tawm kei leh a mahmah in Topaʼ biakbuk a ninsak hi a, Israel sung panin tua mi kihawl khia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuak lo ahih manin ama tungah nitna baang lai ahih ciangin a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:14 “Mi khat puanbuk sungah a sih ciangin puanbuk sungah a pai mi peuhmah le puanbuk sungah a om mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi. 
Numbers19:15 A kisiincip lo a kihong beel peuhmah a nin ahi hi. 
Numbers19:16 Namsau tawh gamlak ah a kithat mi ahi a, misi pumpi ahi a, mi guh ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mi peuhmah ni sagih sung a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:17 “Amaute in a nin mipa adingin a kihal khialhna hanga biakna vute la-in beel sung khat ah tui luang lai tawh hel ding uh hi. 
Numbers19:18 Tua ciangin a siang mi khat in puknah la-in a sungah diah dinga, puanbuk tung le a nazat khempeuh tung le tua lai ah a om mi khempeuh tung le guh ahi a, a kithat mi ahi a, misi ahi a, han ahi zongin a lawng mipa tungah theh ding hi." 
Numbers19:19 A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in a siang mipa in a nin mipa tungah theh dinga, tua bangin a ni sagih ni-in amah in mi nin pa siangsakin, amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah kipumsil dinga, a nitak ciangin amah a siang hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:20 “Ahih hangin a nin hi napi-in a kisiangsak lo mipa in Topaʼ biakbuk ninsak ahih manin mihonpi panin tua mipa kihawl khia ding hi. Nitna hangin ama tungah tui kibuak lo ahih manin amah a nin ahi hi. 
Numbers19:21 Tua pen amaute adingin tawntung ngeina khat hi ding hi. Nitna hangin tui a theh mipa in ama puante sawp dinga, nitna hangin a kizang tui a lawng mipa a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi." 
Numbers19:22 A nin mipa in a lawn na khat peuhpeuh a nin hi dinga, tua na a lawng peuhpeuh zong a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:1 Israel mite, a mihon buppi, a kha masa sungin Zin gamlak tung uh a, Kadesh munah phual sat uh hi. Tua lai ah Miriam si a, tua lai mahah kivui hi." 
Numbers20:2 Tu-in mihonte ading tui om lo ahih manin Moses le Aaronʼ langah amaute kikhawmin kituah uh hi. 
Numbers20:3 Mite, Moses tawh kiseelin, “ Topaʼ mai ah ka sanggamte uh a sih lai-in a si hizaw hoh ta le ung!" 
Numbers20:4 Bang hangin hih lai ah kote le ka ganhingte uh a si dingin Topaʼ mihonte hih gamlak ah hong paipih na hi hiam?
