Numbers20:5 Bang hangin hih mun sia ah hong paipih dingin Egypt panin kote hong paitosak na hi hiam? An ahi a, thei ahi a, leenggui ahi a, mang kawlsing ahi zongin a omna mun ahih loh banah tui dawn ding nangawn zong om lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers20:6 Tua ciangin mihonte omna panin kikhopna buk kongah Moses le Aaron pai-in bok suk uh hi. Topaʼ minthanna vang amauteʼ tungah hong kilangin 
Numbers20:7 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers20:8 “Ciangkhut la-in, nang le na sanggampa Aaron in mihonte khawm unla, suangpi in amauʼ muhin tui a piak ding sawl un. Tua bangin mihonte le amauʼ ganhingte tui na ngahsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:9 Moses in zong Topaʼ thupiak bangin ciangkhut a la hi. 
Numbers20:10 Moses le Aaron in suangpi mai ah mihonte kaikhawmin amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu-in za un, a lehdo mite aw; hih suangpi panin note ading tui hong phul khiasak ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:11 Moses in a khut laam to-in a ciangkhut tawh tua suangpi nih vei sat a, tui tampi phul khia-in mihonte le amauʼ ganhingte in a dawn uh hi." 
Numbers20:12 Ahi zongin Topa in Moses le Aaron kiangah, “Israel miteʼ mai ah kei hong um lo, hong siangthosak lo na hih uh ciangin amaute ka piak sa leitang ah hih mihonte na tunpih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:13 Hihte pen, Israel mite in Topa a phunsanna, amaute lakah a mahmah a siangtho a a kilahna mun, Meribah tui phual a thupiang ahi hi." 
Numbers20:14 Moses in Kadesh panin Edom kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawl a, “Na sanggam Israel-te in hih bangin ci hi: Koteʼ tuah khak kamsiatna khempeuh na thei hi." 
Numbers20:15 Ka pu ka pate uh Egypt ah na pai sukin Egypt ah sau veipi ka teeng uh a, Egypt mite in kote le ka pu ka pate uh hong gim bawl hi." 
Numbers20:16 Topaʼ tungah ka kiko uh ciangin amah in ka aw uh hong za a, vantungmi khat hong sawlin, Egypt panin hong paikhiatpih a, tu-in nangma gam nawl Kadesh khuapi ah ka om uh hi." 
Numbers20:17 Tu-in kote na gam hong kantansak in. Lo ahi a, leenggui lo ahi zongin nawk kha loin, tuikhuk panin zong tui ka dawn kei ding uh hi. Kumpipaʼ Lamlian dungah ka pai ding uh a, na gam sung ka khen matengun lam ka pial kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:18 Ahih hangin Edom mite in ama kiangah, “Nong nawk kei ding uh hi; nong nawk uh leh note langpangin namsau tawh kong kuan ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Numbers20:19 Israel mite in, “Lamlian tawnin ka pai to ding uh hi. Kote le ka ganhingte un na tui uh ka dawn uh leh, a man kong pia ding uh hi. Khe tawh pai-in hong nawksak un; a dang kong ngen kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers20:20 Ahih hangin Edom mite in, “Nong nawk kei ding uh hi,” na ci uh hi. Amauteʼ lang khat ah galkap tampi tawh Edom mite kuan hi." 
Numbers20:21 Israel mite, amauʼ gam a nawksak ding tua bangin Edom mite in nial uh ahih ciangin amauʼ kiang panin Israel mite paikhia uh hi." 
Numbers20:22 Kadesh panin Israel-te pai uh a, a hon buppi-in Hor Mual tung uh hi." 
Numbers20:23 Edom gamgi Hor Mual ah Topa in Moses le Aaronʼ tungah," 
Numbers20:24 “Aaron in ama mite kiang zuan ta ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Meribah tui ah no tegel in ka thupiak hong nial na hih manun, Israel mite tungah ka piak leitang ah amah tum lo ding hi." 
Numbers20:25 Aaron le ama tapa Eleazar sam inla, Hor Mual ah amaute paipih in." 
Numbers20:26 Aaronʼ tung panin a puante suah khia inla, a tapa Eleazar silhsak in. Aaron in ama mite kiang zuan ta dinga, tua lai ah si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers20:27 Topaʼ thupiak bangin Moses zong gamta hi. Mihonte khempeuhʼ muhin Hor Mual tungah amaute pai to uh hi. 
Numbers20:28 Moses in Aaronʼ puante suah khiatsakin a tapa Eleazar silhsak a, tua mual dawnah Aaron a si hi. Tua ciangin mual tung panin Moses le Eleazar pai suk uh hi." 
Numbers20:29 Aaron si hi, ci-in mihonte khempeuh in a theih uh ciangin, Aaronʼ hangin Israel mi khempeuh ni sawm thum sung a kap uh hi." 
Numbers21:1 Kanaan mi, Negeb gam a teeng Arad gam kumpipa in Atharim lam tawnin Israel mite hong paina thu a zak ciangin amah in Israel-te do-in, amaute kim khat salin a man hi." 
Numbers21:2 Tua ciangin Israel-te in Topaʼ tungah kiciamna khat bawl uh a, “Ka khut sung uh ah hih mite nong piak nakleh kote in amauʼ khuapite ka susia mang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers21:3 Topa in zong Israel-teʼ cihna mangin Kanaan mite a pia hi. Israel-te in amau le a khuapite uh susia mang ahih ciangin tua mun pen Hormah kici hi. 
Numbers21:4 Hor Mual panin amaute ding khia-in Edom gam kiimah a pai dingin San Tuipi lamah pai uh a, lamkal ah mite lungkia uh hi." 
Numbers21:5 Mite in Pasian le Moses gensia uh a, “Bang hangin sehnel gamah a si dingin Egypt panin kote hong paikhiatpih to na hi hiam? Anletui om lo a, bangmah a man lo hih an ka kih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers21:6 Tua ciangin Topa in miteʼ lakah gul guphate khah a, tuate in mite tu-in Israel mi tampi a si hi." 
Numbers21:7 Moses kiangah mite hong pai-in, “ Topa le nang hong gensia-in kampau kha ka hih manun ka khial uh hi. Koteʼ kiang panin gulte a lakkhiat nadingin Topaʼ tungah thum in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite adingin Moses in thumsak hi." 
Numbers21:8 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Gul gupha tawh a kibang sumngo gul khat bawl inla, khuam khat tungah khai in. Gul in a tuk mi peuhmah in tua gul a et ciangin hing ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers21:9 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in sumngo gul khat bawl a, khuam khat tungah a khai hi. Gul in mi khatpeuh a tuk leh amah in tua sumngo gul enin hing pah hi." 
Numbers21:10 Israel mite ding khia uh a, Oboth munah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers21:11 Oboth panin ding khia uh a, nisuahna lam, Iyeabarim munah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers21:12 Tua lai panin ding khia uh a, Zered Kuam ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers21:13 Tua lai panin ding khia uh a, Amor miteʼ gamgi panin a hong kikhung suk gamlak a om Arnon gun gal khat ah giahphual sat uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Arnon gun pen Moab le Amor miteʼ kikalah Moab-teʼ gamgi ahi hi." 
Numbers21:14 Tua ahih manin Topaʼ Gal Laibu sungah, “Sufa gam a Vuahep khua, le Arnon gun kuamte," 
Numbers21:15 le Ar khua ciang ban sukin, Moab gamgi lamah a pai suk kuam” kici hi." 
Numbers21:16 Tua lai panin Beer munah pai uh hi. Tua mun pen Topa in Moses kiangah, “Mite kaikhawm in; amaute tui ka pia ding hi,” a cihna tuikhuk ahi hi." 
Numbers21:17 Tua ciangin Israel mite in hih la sa uh hi: “Tuikhuk aw, phul in! La kong sak ding uh hi." 
Numbers21:18 Kumpi ciangkhut le amauʼ ciangkhutte tawh miteʼ uliante in a tawh, kumpi tate in a tawh tuikhuk aw,” a ci uh hi. Gamlak panin amaute Mattanah munah pai uh a," 
Numbers21:19 Mattanah panin Nahaliel, Nahaliel panin Bamoth," 
Numbers21:20 Bamoth panin sehnel gam a kimuh suk theihna Pisgah mual kiang nai, Moab gam sunga kuam khat ah tung uh hi." 
Numbers21:21 Tua ciangin Israel-te in Amor kumpipa Sihon kiangah kamtaite sawl uh a," 
Numbers21:22 “Na gam hong kantansak in. Lo ahi a, leenggui lo ah ahi zongin ka pial kei ding uh hi. Tuikhuk tuite kong neksak kei ding uh a, na gam ka khen khit mateng uh Kumpipaʼ Lamlian tawnin ka pai ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers21:23 Ahih hangin Sihon in Israel mite ama gam kantansak lo hi. Amah in a mite khempeuh kaikhawmin, Israel-te a do dingin gamlak ah pai-in Jahaz mun tunga, Israel-te a do hi." 
Numbers21:24 Israel-te in namsau tawh amah le a mite tampi thatin, Arnon gun panin Jabbok lui, Ammon mite kiang dong bek a gam laksak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon miteʼ gamgi nawk suak zo lo uh hi." 
Numbers21:25 Israel-te in a khuapite khempeuh la-in, Heshbon gam sunga Amor miteʼ khuapi khempeuh le khua neu khempeuh ah a teeng uh hi." 
Numbers21:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Heshbon pen, nidangin Moab kumpipa simin a khut sung panin Arnon gun ciang dong a gam khempeuh a laksak, Amor miteʼ kumpipa Sihonʼ khuapi ahi hi." 
Numbers21:27 Tua ahih ciangin la a sa pawlte in, “Heshbon ah hong pai un. Lamkik unla, Sihonʼ khuapi kipsak un." 
Numbers21:28 Heshbon panin mei piang khia a, Sihonʼ khuapi panin meikuang piang khia hi. Moab miteʼ khuapi Ar, Arnon mual sang a ukte kaang tum hi." 
Numbers21:29 Moab! Gimna na ngah hi. Khemosh mite! Na mangthang uh hi. Amah in a tapate galtai-in, a tanute galmatin, Amor kumpipa Sihon adingin hong bawl hi." 
Numbers21:30 Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ suanlekhakte Heshbon pan Dibon ciang dong si uh a, mei in Medeba ciang dong a bat mateng ka siasak uh hi,” ci-in sa uh hi." 
Numbers21:31 Tua bangin Amor miteʼ gam sungah Israel-te teeng uh hi. 
Numbers21:32 Moses in Jazer khua thu a kansim dingin mi a sawl hi. Amaute in a khuaneute la-in tua lai-a om Amor mite suan khia uh hi. 
Numbers21:33 Tua ciangin amaute kihei-in Bashan lamah pai to uh hi. Bashan kumpipa Og le a mite khempeuh Edrei ah amaute a do dingin hong kuan uh hi. 
Numbers21:34 Ahih hangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Amah kihta kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah le a mite khempeuh le a leitang, nomau khut sungah kong pia khin hi. Heshbon ah a teeng Amor kumpipa Sihon na bawl bangun amah na bawl ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers21:35 Tua ahih ciangin khat beek a nungta a om nawn lo dingin amaute in amah le a tapate le a mite khempeuh that uh a, amaute in ama gam a luah uh hi." 
Numbers22:1 Tua ciangin Israel mite ding khia uh a, Jerikho gei Jordan gal khat Moab gam zanglei ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Numbers22:2 Israel-te in Amor mite tungah a bawlna khempeuh Zipporʼ tapa Balak in mu hi. 
Numbers22:3 Amaute tam mahmah uh ahih manin Moab mite in tua mite kihta uh a, Israel mite kihtakna hangin Moab mite liing gawp uh hi." 
Numbers22:4 Moab mite in Midian upate kiangah, “Bawngtal in gamlak lopate a liah bangin hih mite in i kiim a om mi khempeuh liaktum mang ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Zipporʼ tapa Balak, tua hun laitak a Moab kumpipa in" 
Numbers22:5 Amaw miteʼ gam Gun gei Pethor ah a om Beorʼ tapa Balaam kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “En in, Egypt panin mihon khat hong paikhia hi. Amaute, lei maitang teng dim khin uh a, keima gal khat ah amaute om uh hi." 
Numbers22:6 Tu-in hong pai inla, amaute hat lua uh ahih manin hih mite hong samsiatsak in. Tua hileh amaute zo-in hih gam panin ka hawl khia zo kha ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thupha na piak mi in thupha ngahin, na samsiat mi in siatna a ngahna ka thei hi,” cisak hi." 
Numbers22:7 Tua ahih ciangin Moab upate le Midian upate aisanna man ding tawh kuan khia-in Balaam kiangah pai uh a, Balakʼ thu ama kiangah sung uh hi." 
Numbers22:8 Balaam in amaute kiangah, “Tu zan hih lai ah giak phot un. Topa in kei tungah hong gen bangin note tungah kong genkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moab uliante Balaam tawh a om uh hi." 
Numbers22:9 Balaam kiangah Pasian hong pai-in, “Nang tawh a om hih mite kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:10 Balaam in Pasian kiangah, “Zipporʼ tapa Balak, Moab kumpipa in kei kiangah mi hong sawlin," 
Numbers22:11 ‘En in, Egypt panin mihon khat hong paikhia a, lei maitang teng dim uh hi. Tu-in hong pai inla, amaute hong samsiatsak in. Tua hileh amaute do-in ka hawl khia zo kha ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Numbers22:12 Pasian in Balaam kiangah, “Amaute na zui kei ding hi. Tua mite thupha a kipia ahih manin na samsia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:13 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Balaam tho-in Balakʼ uliante kiangah, “Na gam uh ah ciah un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note kong zuih ding hong phal lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:14 Tua ahih ciangin Moab uliante dingin Balak kiangah ciah uh a, “Balaam in kote hong zui nuam lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers22:15 Tua ciangin Balak in amaute sangin a tam zaw le a zahtakhuai zaw uliante khatvei sawlkik hi. 
Numbers22:16 Amaute zong Balaam kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, “Zipporʼ tapa Balak in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah nong pai nading bangmah kikol-awksak kei in;" 
Numbers22:17 bang hang hiam cih leh minphatna lianpi nang kong pia dinga, keiʼ tunga nong gen peuhpeuh ka hih ding hi. Hong pai inla, hih mite hong samsiatsak in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Numbers22:18 Ahih hangin Balaam in Balakʼ nasemte kiangah, “Balak in kham le ngun tawh a kidim ama inn hong pia ding hitaleh zong, Topa ka Pasianʼ thupiakna banah a tam zaw hitaleh a tawm zaw hitaleh bangmah ka hih thei kei hi." 
Numbers22:19 Tu-in kong thum hi; Topa in kei tungah bang hong ci lai ding hiam cih ka theih nadingin tu zan zong hih lai ah giak phot un,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Numbers22:20 Tua zanin Balaam kiangah Pasian hong pai-in, “Nangmah a sam dingin mite hong pai ahihleh, tho inla amaute zui in. Ahih hangin nang kong sawl teng bek na hih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:21 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Balaam tho-in a la tutphah vawhin Moab uliante a zui hi. 
Numbers22:22 Ahih hangin amah pai ahih manin Pasian heh a, amah a khaktan dingin Topaʼ vantungmi in lampi ah na pang hi. Tu-in a la tungah amah tuang a, a nasemte nih in zong a zui uh hi." 
Numbers22:23 Topaʼ vantungmi in a khut sungah namsau dawh sa tawi-in lampi ah a ding, a la in mu ahih manin lampi panin pialin gamlak ah a pai hi. Balaam in lampi ah a paikik nadingin a la a sat hi." 
Numbers22:24 Tua ciangin leenggui lo kikal, a pang tuakah phung a omna lam kawcik ah vantungmi na ding leuleu hi." 
Numbers22:25 La in Topaʼ vantungmi a muh ciangin phung phu a, phung ah Balaamʼ khe nengcip ahih ciangin amah in a la satkik hi." 
Numbers22:26 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi na ma pai-in, tak lamah ahi a, veilamah ahi zongin kihei theih nading a om lohna mun kawcik khat ah na ding leuleu hi." 
Numbers22:27 La in Topaʼ vantungmi a muh ciangin Balaamʼ nuai ah lum suk hi. Balaam heh mahmah a, a ciangkhut tawh a la a sat hi." 
Numbers22:28 Tua ciangin Topa in la pau theisak a, la in Balaam kiangah, “Thum vei dong nong sat nadingin nang bang hong cih ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:29 Balaam in a la kiangah, “Nang in kei nong mawlpihna hang ahi hi. Ka khut ah namsau a tawi hi leng ka ut hi. Tua hileh nang kong that khin ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:30 La in Balaamʼ kiangah, “Na khantawnin tu ni ciang dong na tuanna na la hi lo ka hi hiam? Hih bangin nang hong hih ngei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nong hih ngei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:31 Tua ciangin Topa in Balaamʼ mitte honsak a, a khut sungah namsau dawh sa tawh Topaʼ vantungmi lampi ah a ding mu ahih manin a lu kunin a bok suk hi." 
Numbers22:32 Topaʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na la thum vei dong sat na hi hiam? En in, hih na khualzinna ah lungkim lo ka hih manin nang hong pang dingin kong kuan khia hi." 
Numbers22:33 La in kei hong mu-in thum vei dong hong peel hi. Hong peel kei leh, tu mahmah in nang hong that khinin na la ka hingsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:34 Tua ciangin Balaam in Topaʼ vantungmi kiangah, “Kei hong pangin lampi ah na din lam thei lo ka hih manin ka khial hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka khualzinna hoih sa lo na hih leh ka ciahkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:35 Topaʼ vantungmi in Balaam kiangah, “Mite zui in; ahih hangin nang kong sawl teng bek na gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Balaam in Balakʼ uliante a zuisuak hi." 
Numbers22:36 Balaamʼ hong paina thu Balak in a zak ciangin, Arnon gun gamgi-in a kizatna dunga om, Moab gamgi gei-a om Ar khuapi ciangah amah a dawn dingin a paikhia hi." 
Numbers22:37 Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Nang hong sam ding mi hong sawl hi lo ka hi hiam? Bang hangin hong pai lo na hi hiam? Nang hong liansak lah ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:38 Balaam in Balak kiangah, “En in, na kiang hong tung ing! Thu khatpeuh ka gen theih nading vangliatna nei ka hi hiam? Pasian in hong sawl thu bek ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers22:39 Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak zui a, Kiriath-huzoth khua ah a tung uh hi." 
Numbers22:40 Balak in bawngtalte le tuute tawh biakna pia-in Balaam le amah tawh a om uliante kiangah a puak hi. 
Numbers22:41 A zing ciangin Balak in Balaam samin Bamoth-baal munah paipih to hi. Tua lai panin amah in Israel mi a madawk pente gal muh thei hi. 
Numbers23:1 Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hih lai ah kei adingin biakna tau sagih hong bawlsak inla, kei adingin bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:2 Balaamʼ gen bangin Balak gamta a, Balak le Balaam in biakna tau simah bawngtal khat le tuutal khat ciat a pia uh hi." 
Numbers23:3 Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Na meihal biakna kiangah na ding in; kei ka va pai ding hi. Kei hong dawn dingin Topa hong pai kha ding hi. Amah in kei hong lah khempeuh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a sang mual dawn pawn khat ah amah a pai to hi." 
Numbers23:4 Pasian in Balaam na dawn hi. Balaam in ama kiangah, “Biakna tau sagih ka bawl khin a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat le tuutal khat ciat ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:5 Topa in Balaam kiangah thu gen a, “Balak kiangah ciahkikin hih bangin na gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:6 Balak kiangah a ciahkik ciangin amah le Moab uliante khempeuh ama meihal biakna gei ah na ding uh hi. 
Numbers23:7 Balaam in a thugen ding teng genin: “Aram panin Balak in kei hong paipih a, nisuahna mualte panin Moab kumpipa in kei hong paipih hi: ‘Hong pai in, Israel mite mawhsak in!’ hong ci hi." 
Numbers23:8 Pasianʼ samsiat loh mite bangci samsiat ding ka hi hiam? Topaʼ mawhsak loh mite bangci mawhsak ding ka hi hiam? 
Numbers23:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mual dawn panin amaute ka mu a, mual neute panin amaute ka en hi. En in, a tangten mite, minamte lakah a kihel lote!" 
Numbers23:10 Leivui zahin a tam Jakob mite, kua in a mal sim zo dinga, Israel mi phazah a mal sim zo ding ahi hiam? Mi thuman paʼ sihna bangin hong sisak inla, ka mailam thu ama aʼ bang hisak in!” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:11 Tua ciangin Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Kei bang hong cih na hi hiam? Ka galte a samsia dingin nang kong sam a, ahi zongin amaute bangmah cih loin, amaute thupha na pia zawsop hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:12 Amah in, “ Topa in ka gen dingin hong sawl thu, don lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Numbers23:13 Tua ciangin Balak in ama kiangah, “Amaute na muh theih nading mun dangah kei hong zui in. Amaute a madawk teng bek na mu dinga, a vekpi-in na mu kei ding hi. Tua ciangin tua lai panin amaute nong samsiatsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:14 Tua ciangin amah in Zofim gamlak, Pisgah mual dawnah amah paipihin, biakna tau sagih bawl a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat le tuutal khat ciat a pia hi." 
Numbers23:15 Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hua lamah Topa tawh ka va kituah kalun na meihal biakna gei hih lai ah na ding in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:16 Topa in Balaam na dawnin ama kiangah, “Balak kiangah ciahkikin hih bangin thu na gen ding hi” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:17 Balak kiangah a paikik ciangin a meihal biakna gei ah amah na dinga, Moab uliante tawh na om uh hi. Balak in ama kiangah, “ Topa in bang hong gen ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:18 Tua ciangin Balaam in a thugen ding teng genin: “Balak aw, ka thugen ding za in. Zipporʼ tapa aw, ka thu ngai in:" 
Numbers23:19 A zuau dingin Pasian pen mihing hi lo a, a kisik dingin mihingʼ tapa hi lo hi. Amah in gen khin hi; a gen bangin hih lo ding ahi hiam? Amah in ci khin hi; a cih bangin tungsak lo ding ahi hiam?" 
Numbers23:20 En in, thupha piak ding thu ka ngah hi. Amah in thupha pia khin a, keʼn ka kheelkik thei kei hi." 
Numbers23:21 Amah in Jakob mite tungah mawhna mu lo a, Israel mite tungah gamtat siatna mu lo hi. Topa amauʼ Pasian, amaute tawh om a, kumpipa phatna awging amauteʼ lakah om hi." 
Numbers23:22 Pasian in Egypt panin amaute paikhiatpih a, amaute in gamsial tha bang hatna nei uh hi." 
Numbers23:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jakob mite a kibum nading om lo a, Israel miteʼ lang khat ah ai san ding om lo hi. Tu-in Israel-te tawh kisai-in, ‘Pasianʼ sepna en un,’ kici ding hi." 
Numbers23:24 En un, hua mite! Humpinelkai bangin tho to a, humpinelkai bangin kaang to hi. A an a nek mateng, amauteʼ si a dawn mateng, lum suk lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:25 Tua ciangin Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Amaute samsia peuhmah kei inla, thupha zong pia peuhmah kei in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:26 Ahih hangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “ Topaʼ cih khempeuh keimah in ka hih ding hi,’ hong ci hi lo ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Numbers23:27 Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Tu-in hong pai in; mun dangah kong paipih ding hi. Tua lai panin amaute nong samsiatsak nading Pasian in hong lungkim pih kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:28 Tua ahih ciangin Balak in sehnel gam a kimuh sukna Peor mual dawnah Balaam paipih hi. 
Numbers23:29 Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Hih lai ah kei adingin biakna tau sagih hong bawlsak inla, bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih hih lai ah hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers23:30 Balaamʼ cih bangin Balak in hih a, biakna tau simah bawngtal khat le tuutal khat ciat a pia hi." 
Numbers24:1 Israel-te thupha piak ding in Topa lungkimsak ahihna Balaam in a muh ciangin, a hun dang a bangin kihilna lim a mu dingin pai lo a, a maitang gamlak lam ngat hi." 
Numbers24:2 Balaam khuadak a, a namnamin Israel-te in giahphual a sat a mu hi. Pasianʼ Kha ama tungah hong tunga," 
Numbers24:3 amah in a thugen ding teng genin: “Beorʼ tapa Balaamʼ thugen, a mit in khua a mu thei mipaʼ thugen," 
Numbers24:4 Pasianʼ thute a za, Vanglian paʼ maangmuhna a mu, maang mu napi-in a mit in khua a mu thei mipaʼ thugen:" 
Numbers24:5 Jakob mite aw, na puanbukte uh bangzahin hoih ahi hiam? Israel mite aw, na giahphual uh bangzahin hoih ahi hiam?" 
Numbers24:6 Saupi a kiphah kuamte tawh kibang a, gun gei-a om huante tawh kibang hi. Topa in a suan aloes paknamtui kungte tawh kibang a, tuipi gei-a om taamtak kungte tawh kibang hi." 
Numbers24:7 A phelkhaite panin tui luang dinga, a khaici in tui tampi ngahin, a kumpipa uh, Agag sangin lian zaw dinga, ama kumpi gam kiliansak ding hi." 
Numbers24:8 Pasian in Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiatpih a, gamsial bangin amaute thahat uh hi. Amaute in a gal uh ahi minam dangte su gawp ding uh a, amauʼ guhte suzan gawp ding uh a, a thaltang uh tawh amaute kap let ding uh hi." 
Numbers24:9 Amaute bok a, humpinelkai pa bangin lum suk uh hi. Humpi-nelkaipi bangin lum suk uh hi. Kua in amaute phong ngam ding ahi hiam? Note thupha hong piate in thupha ngah henla, note hong samsiate in samsiatna ngah tahen,” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:10 Balaamʼ tungah Balak heh mahmah a, amah in a khut le a khut a tuum hi. Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Ka galte a samsia dingin nang kong sam hi. En in, nang in amaute thum vei tak thupha na pia khinzo hi." 
Numbers24:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na omna munah tai in. ‘Nang kong min liansak ding hi,’ ka hong ci hi. Ahih hangin na min liat nading panin Topa in nang hong khaktan hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:12 Balaam in Balak kiangah, “Kei kiangah nong sawl na kamtaite kiangah," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Balak in kham le ngun tawh a kidim ama inn hong pia ding hitaleh zong, Topaʼ thu banah keima thu-in a pha bawl ding ahi a, a sia bawl ding ahi zongin bangmah ka hih thei kei hi. Topaʼ gente bek keimah in ka gen ding hi,’ ci-in gen khin hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Numbers24:14 “Tu-in en in, ka mipihte kiangah ka pai ding hi. Hong pai in; nidang ciangin hih mite in na miteʼ tungah a bawl dingte kong theisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:15 Amah in a thugen ding teng genin, “Beorʼ tapa Balaamʼ thugen, a mit in khua a mu thei mipaʼ thugen," 
Numbers24:16 Pasianʼ thute a za, Sangpen paʼ thugen a thei, Vanglian paʼ maangmuhna a mu, maang mu napi-in a mit in khua a mu thei mipaʼ thugen in:" 
Numbers24:17 Amah ka mu hi; ahih hangin tu nai hun hi lo hi: Jakob sung pan aksi khat hong suak khia dinga, Israel sung pan kumpi ciangkhut hong piang ding hi. Tua in Moab thaltang satkham dinga, Shethʼ suante khempeuh su gawp ding hi." 
Numbers24:18 Israel gualzo dinga, Edom mite kisuan khia dinga, a galte ahi Seir zong, kisuan khia ding hi." 
Numbers24:19 Jakob tawh ukna na kisem dinga, khuapi sunga a suaktate kisusia ding!” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:20 Tua ciangin amah in Amalek mite enin, ama thugen ding teng genin, “Amalek, minamte lakah a masa pen hi a, ahih hangin a tawpna ah siatna a tuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:21 Tua ciangin amah in Ken mite enin, ama thugen ding teng genin, “Na omna mun kho a, suangpi sungah na bu kibawl hi." 
Numbers24:22 Ahih hangin Kain bei ding hi. Asher in galmatin nang bang tanvei hong nei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Numbers24:23 Amah in a thugen ding a om lai teng genin, “Ala! Pasian in hihte a hih ciangin kua nungta zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Numbers24:24 Ahih hangin Kittim panin teembawte hong pai-in Asshur le Eber gimsak dinga, amah in zong siatna tuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers24:25 Tua ciangin Balaam dingin ama gamah ciahkik a, Balak zong a ciah hi." 
Numbers25:1 Shittim ah Israel mite a om laitakin Moab gam numeite tawh paktat ding kipan uh hi. 
Numbers25:2 Hih numeite in amauʼ pasian biakpiakna pawi ah Israel mite sam uh a, amaute in a pawi an nek pihin, amauʼ pasian-teʼ mai ah kun uh hi." 
Numbers25:3 Tua ahih ciangin Peor-a Baal tawh Israel mite va kizomtawm hi. Israel mite tungah Topa heh mahmah a," 
Numbers25:4 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Israel miteʼ tung panin Topaʼ hehna a kihtakhuai a bei theih nadingin miteʼ ukpite khempeuh man inla, Topaʼ mai ah sun tangin amaute khai in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers25:5 Moses in Israel thukhente kiangah, “Note khempeuh in Peor-a Baal tawh a va kizomtawm na mite khempeuh uh na that ciat ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers25:6 Kikhopna buk kongah amaute kapin a om laitak, Mosesʼ muhna le Israel mihon buppiʼ muhna ah Israel mite khat hong pai-in, Midian numei khat ama innkuanpihte kiangah hong ciahpih hi." 
Numbers25:7 Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar, Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas in a muh ciangin dingin mihonteʼ lak panin paikhia a, a khut ah teipi khat tawi-in" 
Numbers25:8 Israel mipa inn dei sungah zui a, Israel mipa le a numei, a numeiʼ pumpi pailetin a nihin sun khawm hi. Tua bangin Israel miteʼ sung panin gimna dai hi." 
Numbers25:9 Ahi zongin gimna tawh a si mite tul sawm nih le tul li ahi hi. 
Numbers25:10 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers25:11 “Siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar, Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas in Israel mite tungah ka hehna damsakkik hi. Keimah in pammaih ka sak bangin amah in pammaih sa ahih ciangin pammaih ka sakna tawh Israel mite ka beisak kei hi." 
Numbers25:12 Tua ahih ciangin, ‘En in, ka thuciam ahi nopsakna, amah ka pia hi." 
Numbers25:13 Ama tung le ama khit ah a suanlekhakte tungah tawntung siampi hihna thuciamna hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama Pasian ading amah in pammaih saksak a, Israel mite ading kilemna bawlsak hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers25:14 Midian numei tawh a kithat khawm, Israel mi a kithat paʼ min pen Simeon mite sung panin a beh lutang Saluʼ tapa Zimri ahi hi." 
Numbers25:15 Midian numei a kithat nuʼ min pen Midian innkuan sungah a beh lutang ahi Zurʼ tanu Kozbi ahi hi. 
Numbers25:16 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers25:17 “Midian mite gimsak gawp inla, amaute vat gawp in;" 
Numbers25:18 bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a khelpilna uh tawh note hong gimsak gawp uh a, Peor tawh kisai thu le Peorʼ hangin gimna ni-in a kithat, amauʼ sanggamnu, Midian ulianteʼ tanu Kozbi thu ah note hong khem uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers26:1 Tua gimna khit ciangin Topa in Moses tung le siampi Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar tungah," 
Numbers26:2 “Israel mihonte khempeuh kum sawm nih pan a tungsiah, a behbehin, Israel sung panin galdo dingin a kuan khia thei ding khempeuh sim in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers26:3 Moses le siampi Eleazar in Jerikho nai, Jordan kiang, Moab zanglei ah amauteʼ tungah thu gen a," 
Numbers26:4 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, “Kum sawm nih pan a tungsiah peuhmah mi sim un,” a ci hi. Egypt gam panin a paikhia Israel mite:" 
Numbers26:5 Israelʼ tacil Reuben hi a, Reubenʼ tapate: Hanok pan Hanok behte ahi uh hi; Pallu pan Pallu behte ahi uh hi;" 
Numbers26:6 Hezron pan Hezron behte ahi uh hi; Karmi pan Karmi behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:7 Hihte khempeuh pen Reuben minam ahi uh hi; amau mi tul sawm li le tul thum le za sagih le sawm thum pha hi. 
Numbers26:8 Palluʼ tapa Eliab ahi hi. 
Numbers26:9 Eliabʼ tapate pen Nemuel, Dathan le Abiram ahi uh hi. Hih Dathan le Abiram pen, mihonte lak panin pawl a kai, amaute in Topaʼ thu a seel lai-in Korah tawh kipawlin Moses le Aaronʼ thu a seelte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:10 Mei in mihing za nih le sawm nga a kattum lai-in lei in a kam ka-in Korah tawh amaute valh tumin amau pawl teng si uh a, amaute pen hilhkholhna a suak uh hi." 
Numbers26:11 Ahi zongin Korahʼ tapate si lo uh hi. 
Numbers26:12 Amauʼ behbehin Simeon minamte: Nemuel pan Nemuel behte ahi uh hi; Jamin pan Jamin behte ahi uh hi; Jakhin pan Jakhin behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:13 Zerah pan Zerah behte ahi uh hi; Shaul pan Shaul behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:14 Hihte pen Simeon minam hi uh a, mi tul sawm nih le tul nih le za nih ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:15 Amauʼ behbehin Gad minamte: Zefon pan Zefon behte ahi uh hi; Haggi pan Haggi behte ahi uh hi; Shuni pan Shuni behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:16 Ozni pan Ozni behte ahi uh hi; Eri pan Eri behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:17 Arod pan Arod behte ahi uh hi; Areli pan Areli behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:18 Hihte pen Gad minamte hi a, mi tul sawm li le za nga ahi hi." 
Numbers26:19 Judahʼ tapate pen Er le Onan hi a, Kanaan gamah Er le Onan si uh hi." 
Numbers26:20 Amauʼ behbehin Judah minamte in: Shelah pan Shelah behte ahi uh hi; Perez pan Perez behte ahi uh hi; Zerah pan Zerah behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:21 Perez mite: Hezron pan Hezron behte ahi uh hi; Hamul pan Hamul behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:22 Hihte pen Judah minamte hi a, mi tul sawm sagih le tul guk le za nga ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:23 Amauʼ behbehin Issakhar minamte: Tola pan Tola behte ahi uh hi; Puvah pan Puvah behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:24 Jashub pan Jashub behte ahi uh hi; Shimron pan Shimron behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:25 Hihte pen Issakhar minamte hi a, mi tul sawm guk le tul li le za thum ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:26 Amauʼ behbehin Zebulun minamte: Sered pan Sered behte ahi uh hi; Elon pan Elon behte ahi uh hi; Jahleel pan Jahleel behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:27 Hihte pen Zebulun minamte hi a, mi tul sawm guk le za nga ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:28 Amauʼ behbehin Josef minamte: Manasseh le Efraim ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:29 Manasseh minamte: Makhir pan Makhir behte ahi uh hi; Makhir pen Gileadʼ pa ahi hi; Gilead pan Gilead behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:30 Gileadʼ suante: Iezer pan Iezer behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:31 Asriel pan Asriel behte ahi uh hi; Shekhem pan Shekhem behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:32 Shemida pan Shemida behte ahi uh hi; Hefer pan Hefer behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:33 Tu-in Heferʼ tapa Zelofehad in tapa nei lo a, ahih hangin tanu nei hi: Zelofehadʼ tanuteʼ minte in Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah le Tirzah ahi hi." 
Numbers26:34 Hihte pen Manasseh minamte hi a, mi tul sawm nga le tul nih le za sagih ahi hi." 
Numbers26:35 Amauʼ behbehin Efraim minamte: Suthelah pan Suthelah behte ahi uh hi; Bekher pan Bekher behte ahi uh hi; Tahan pan Tahan behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:36 Suthelah minamte: Eran pan Eran behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:37 Hihte pen Efraim minamte hi a, mi tul sawm thum le tul nih le za nga ahi hi. Hihte pen amauʼ behbehin Josef minamte ahi hi." 
Numbers26:38 Amauʼ behbehin Benjamin minamte: Bela pan Bela behte ahi uh hi; Ashbel pan Ashbel behte ahi uh hi; Ahiram pan Ahiram behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:39 Shefufam pan Shefufam behte ahi uh hi; Hufam pan Hufam behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:40 Belaʼ tapate pen Ard le Naaman ahi uh hi: Ard pan Ard behte ahi uh hi; Naaman pan Naaman behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:41 Hihte pen amauʼ behbehin Benjamin minamte hi a, mi tul sawm li le tul nga le za guk ahi hi." 
Numbers26:42 Amauʼ behbehin Dan minamte: Shuham pan Shuham behte hi a, hihte pen Dan minamte ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:43 Dan minam sung pan Shuham behte mi tul sawm guk le tul li le za li ahi hi. 
Numbers26:44 Amauʼ behbehin Asher minamte: Imnah pan Imnah behte ahi uh hi; Ishvi pan Ishvi behte ahi uh hi; Beriah pan Beriah behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:45 Beriah minamte: Heber pan Heber behte ahi uh hi; Malkhiel pan Malkhiel behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:46 Asherʼ tanuʼ min Serah ahi hi. 
Numbers26:47 Hihte pen Asher minamte hi a, tul sawm nga le tul thum le za li ahi hi." 
Numbers26:48 Amauʼ behbehin Naftali minamte: Jahzeel pan Jahzeel behte ahi uh hi; Guni pan Guni behte ahi uh hi; 
Numbers26:49 Jezer pan Jezer behte ahi uh hi; Shillem pan Shillem behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:50 Hihte pen Naftali minamte hi a, mi tul sawm li le tul nga le za li ahi hi." 
Numbers26:51 Hihte pen Israel mi vekpi a phazah hi a, mi tul za guk le tul khat le za sagih le sawm thum ahi uh hi." 
Numbers26:52 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers26:53 “Mi a phazah tawh kizui-in hih mite tungah luah dingin leitang kihawm ding hi. 
Numbers26:54 Minam a tamte tungah gamh a tam na pia dinga, minam a tawmte tungah gamh a tawm na pia ding hi. Minam khempeuh a mi phazah tawh kizui-in gamh kipia ding hi." 
Numbers26:55 Ahih hangin leitang pen aisanna tawh kihawm dinga, amauʼ beh min tawh kizui-in amaute in luah ding uh hi." 
Numbers26:56 Aisanna tawh kizui-in a tamte tungah a tam, a tawmte tungah a tawm, a gamh uh kihawmsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers26:57 Amauʼ behbehin a kisim Levi minamte: Gershon pan Gershon behte ahi uh hi; Kohath pan Kohath behte ahi uh hi; Merari pan Merari behte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:58 Amauʼ suante: Libni behte, Hebron behte, Mahli behte, Mushi behte le Korah behte ahi uh hi. Kohath pen Aramʼ pa ahi hi." 
Numbers26:59 Amramʼ zi pen Levi sung pan Egypt gamah a suak ahi Leviʼ tanu Jokhebed ahi hi. Tua nu in Amram tawh Aaron, Moses le a sanggamnu uh Miriam nei hi." 
Numbers26:60 Aaron in ta Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar nei hi." 
Numbers26:61 Ahih hangin Nadab le Abihu pen amaute in Topaʼ mai ah mei siangtho lo a piak lai-un si uh hi. 
Numbers26:62 Pasal peuhmah kha khat pan a tungsiah, amauʼ sung pan a kisimte, tul sawm nih le tul thum ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite lakah amaute gamh kipia lo ahih manin Israel mite lakah amaute kisim khawm lo hi." 
Numbers26:63 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah Israel mite a sim Moses le siampi Eleazar mah in a sim mite pen hihte ahi uh hi. 
Numbers26:64 Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gamah Israel mite a sim Moses le Aaron in a simte lakah tu-in khat zong kihel nawn lo hi. 
Numbers26:65 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amauteʼ thu a genna ah, “Amaute gamlak ah si ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua lobuang amaute khat beek om nawn lo hi." 
Numbers26:65 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amauteʼ thu a genna ah, “Amaute gamlak ah si ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua lobuang amaute khat beek om nawn lo hi." 
Numbers27:1 Tua ciangin Josefʼ tapate sung panin Manassehʼ tapa Makhir, Makhirʼ tapa Gilead, Gileadʼ tapa Hefer, Heferʼ tapa Zelofehadʼ tanute a nai ah hong pai uh hi. Ama tanuteʼ minte in: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah le Tirzah ahi hi." 
Numbers27:2 Amaute, Mosesʼ mai le siampi Eleazarʼ mai le makaiteʼ mai le mihonte khempeuhʼ mai, kikhopna buk kongah ding uh a," 
Numbers27:3 “Ka pa uh gamlak ah a si hi. Korah tawh kipawlin Topa langpangin a kikaikhawm mihonte lakah amah kihel lo hi. Ahih hangin ama khialhna hangin si a, amah in tapa nei lo hi." 
Numbers27:4 Amah in tapa a neih loh man bekin bang hangin a beh sung panin ka pa uhʼ min mangthang ding ahi hiam? Ka pa uh sanggamteʼ lakah kote zong neihsa hong pia un,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers27:5 Moses in Topaʼ mai ah amauʼ thu a gen hi. 
Numbers27:6 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers27:7 “Zelofehadʼ tanuteʼ thugen man hi. Amauʼ paʼ sanggamte lakah neihsa gamh amaute tungah na pia dinga, amauʼ paʼ gamh amauteʼ tungah na tungsak ding hi." 
Numbers27:8 Israel mite tungah hih bangin na gen ding hi: ‘Pasal khat si-in, tapa a neih kei leh, ama gamh a tanu na luahsak ding uh hi." 
Numbers27:9 Amah in tanu a neih kei leh, ama gamh a sanggam pasalte tungah na tungsak ding uh hi." 
Numbers27:10 Amah in sanggam pasal a neih kei leh, ama gamh ama paʼ sanggam pasalte tungah na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers27:11 Ama pa in sanggam pasal a neih kei leh, ama gamh ama innkuan tawh a kinai ama behpaʼ tungah na pia ding uh a, amah in tang ding hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin hih pen Israel mite tungah thukham le ngeina kip hi ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers27:12 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih Abarim mual tungah pai to inla, Israel miteʼ tungah ka piak leitang en in." 
Numbers27:13 Na muh khit ciangin na sanggampa Aaron mah bangin nang zong na mite kiang na zuan ta ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh," 
Numbers27:14 mihonpite a kitot lai-un tui phualah keimah sianthosak ding hunin Zin gamlak ah keima thu nong lehpan hi,” a ci hi. (Hihte pen Zin gamlak, Kadesh gam Meribah tui a thupiangte a cihna ahi hi.)" 
Numbers27:15 Moses in Topa kiangah," 
Numbers27:16 “Topaʼ mihonte, a cing nei lo tuute a bat loh nadingin amauteʼ mai ah pai khia-in amauteʼ mai ah a tum ding, amaute paikhiat pihin amaute a ciahpih ding, mihonte a uk dingin, Topa, mi khempeuh tungah nuntakna a pia Pasian ahi nangmah in mi khat seh in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nunʼ tapa Joshua, siamna a nei mipa la inla, ama tungah na khut nga in." 
Numbers27:18 Topa in Moses kiangah, “Nunʼ tapa Joshua, siamna a nei mipa la inla, ama tungah na khut nga in." 
Numbers27:19 Siampi Eleazar le mihon khempeuh mai ah amah na dingsak dinga, amauteʼ muhna ah amah za na pia ding hi." 
Numbers27:20 Israel mihon khempeuh in ama thu a man theih nadingin thuneihna pawl khat amah na guan ding hi. 
Numbers27:21 Siampi Eleazarʼ mai ah amah ding dinga, amah in Topaʼ mai ah Urim thukhenna tawh thu dotsak ding hi. Amah le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh, mihon buppi, ama thu tawh pusuak ding uh a, ama thu mah tawh sung tum ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers27:22 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses gamta a, amah in Joshua la-in siampi Eleazar le mihon buppi mai ah dingsak a," 
Numbers27:22 Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses gamta a, amah in Joshua la-in siampi Eleazar le mihon buppi mai ah dingsak a," 
Numbers27:23 amah in ama tungah a khutte nga-in, Topa in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua tungah za a pia hi." 
Numbers27:23 amah in ama tungah a khutte nga-in, Topa in ama tungah a gen bangin Joshua tungah za a pia hi." 
Numbers28:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers28:2 “Israel mite thu pia-in amaute tungah, ‘Keimah hong kibiakna mei tawh a kihal an, a gim namtui keima-aʼ pen a hunin kei tungah nong piak ding uh phawk un,’ ci-in gen in." 
Numbers28:3 “ Topaʼ tungah na piak ding uh mei tawh kihal biakna in: A sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno nih, tatsat loin biakpiakna-in nisimin na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers28:4 Tuuno khat zingsangin na pia ding uh a, a tuuno khat pen nitakin na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers28:5 An tawh biakna-in oliv thau hai khat tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:6 Tua pen Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna, a gim namtui dingin Sinai Mual ah a kikipsak, a kitatsat lo meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers28:7 Leenggahzu tawh biakna pen tuuno khat ciangin hai khat hi ding hi. Topaʼ tungah leenggah-zucil tawh biakna pen siangtho munah na sung ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:8 A tuuno khat nitakin na pia ding uh hi. Zingsang a an tawh biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biakna mah bangin, mei tawh kihal biakna, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui-in na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers28:9 “Sabbath ni-in a sitbaang lo, kum khat a pha tuuno nih le an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih le a leenggahzu tawh biakna hi ding hi." 
Numbers28:10 Hih pen tatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah Sabbath simin meihal biakna ahi hi. 
Numbers28:11 “Kha simin a ni masa ni-in Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtal nih, tuutal khat, a sitbaang lo kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih hi ding hi." 
Numbers28:12 Bawngtal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh thum zong hi ding hi. A tuutal khat ciangin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh nih hi ding hi. 
Numbers28:13 Tuuno khat adingin an tawh biakna-in sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat ciat hi dinga, a gim namtui meihal biak nading ahi hi." 
Numbers28:14 Leenggahzu tawh biaknate pen, bawngtal khat ciangin leenggahzu thawl lang, tuutal khat ciangin leenggahzu hai nih, tuuno khat ciangin leenggahzu hai khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen kum khat sunga om kha simin meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Numbers28:15 Khialhna hanga biakna-in Topaʼ tungah keel a pa khat zong kipia ding hi. Tua pen a kitatsat loin meihal biakna le a leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah a kipia ding ahi hi. 
Numbers28:16 “Kha masa a ni sawm le ni li ni pen Topaʼ Paisan Pawi ni ahi hi. 
Numbers28:17 Tua kha a ni sawm le ni nga ni pen biakna pawi ni hi a, ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum kine ding hi." 
Numbers28:18 A ni masa ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat om ding hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a," 
Numbers28:19 Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate pen bawngtalno nih, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih hi ding hi. Tuate a sitbaang lo ahih ding thei un." 
Numbers28:20 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi. Bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum le tuutal khat ciangin annel lawh nih tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:21 Tuuno sagihte khat ciangin annel lawh khat mah tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:22 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers28:23 Meihal biak nading ahi zingsang a meihal biakna banah tatsat lo-a biakna-in hihte na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:24 Tua bangmahin mei tawh kihal an tawh biakna ahi, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, ni sagih sung nisimin na pia ding uh hi. Tua pen a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah kipia ding hi." 
Numbers28:25 A ni sagih ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers28:26 “Na nipikal pawi hunun Topaʼ tungah an thak tawh biakna na piak hun uh anpal piak ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a," 
Numbers28:27 meihal biakna, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui na pia ding uh hi. Bawngtalno nih, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo hi ding hi." 
Numbers28:28 Sathau tawh a kibawl ahi an tawh a biak nadingin zong, bawngtal khat ciangin annel lawh thum, tuutal khat ciangin lawh nih," 
Numbers28:29 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat tawh na pia khawm ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:30 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin keel a pa khat zong na pia ding uh hi. 
Numbers28:31 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate banah tuate le leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia ding uh hi. Tuate a sitbaang lo ahih ding thei ta un. 
Numbers29:1 “A kha sagihna a ni masa ni-in kikhopna siangtho khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi. Tua ni pen note in peengkul na tum ni ding uh hi a," 
Numbers29:2 meihal biakna, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui na piak dingte un: Bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:3 Bawngtal tawh piak dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate lawh thum, tuutal tawh lawh nih," 
Numbers29:4 le tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:5 Note adingin kilemna bawl nadingin khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:6 A khasim meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le tuate ading ngeina a om bangin a gim namtui, Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biakna ahi leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:7 “Hih kha sagihna a ni sawm ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, an tangin tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers29:8 Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui meihal biakna na piak dingte un: Bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih hi dinga, tuate pen noteʼ muhna ah a sitbaang lo hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:9 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel tawh biaknate pen, bawngtal tawh piak khawm dingin lawh thum, a tuutal tawh lawh nih," 
Numbers29:10 tuuno sagihte khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:11 Kilem nadingin khialhna hanga biakna le a kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:12 “A kha sagihna ni sawm le ni nga ni-in a siangtho kikhopna khat nei-in tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh a, Topa adingin ni sagih sung pawi na kham ding uh hi." 
Numbers29:13 A ni masa ni-in meihal biakna, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biak nadingin bawngtalno sawm le thum, tuutal nih, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li na pia ding uh a, tuate a sitbaang lo hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:14 Sathau tawh a kibawl annel ahi an tawh biaknate pen, bawngtal sawm le thumte khat ciangin lawh thum, tuutal nihte khat ciangin lawh nih," 
Numbers29:15 le tuuno sawm le lite khat ciangin lawh khat hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:16 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna, an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:17 “A ni nih ni-in bawngtalno sawm le nih, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:18 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:19 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:20 “A ni thum ni-in bawngtal sawm le khat, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:21 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak bangin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:22 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:23 “A ni li ni-in bawngtal sawm, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:24 ngeina om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:25 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna, an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:26 “A ni nga ni-in bawngtal kua, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:27 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:28 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:29 “A ni guk ni-in bawngtal giat, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:30 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:31 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna, an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:32 “A ni sagih ni-in bawngtal sagih, tuutal nih le kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawm le li, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:33 ngeina kip om bangin a phazah tawh kizui-in bawngtalte, tuutalte le tuunote tawh piak dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:34 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna, an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:35 “A ni giat ni-in a thupi kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni-in leitung nasep na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Numbers29:36 Meihal biakna, mei tawh kihal biakna, Topaʼ tungah a gim namtui na piak dingte un: Bawngtal khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sagih, a vekpi-in a sitbaang lo," 
Numbers29:37 ngeina kip om bangin bawngtal, tuutal le tuunote a phazah tawh kizui-in piak khawm dingin an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate zong hi ding hi." 
Numbers29:38 A kitatsat lo-a meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le leenggahzu tawh biaknate banah khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat zong hi ding hi. 
Numbers29:39 “Na thuciam biakpiakna uh le utthu-a na biakpiaknate uh banah na meihal biaknate le an tawh na biaknate le leenggahzu tawh na biaknate le thunuam a na biak nadingun a kiseh na pawi hunte uh ah hihte, Topaʼ tungah na pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers29:40 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amah in Israel mite tungah a thu a kimin a gen sawn hi. 
Numbers30:1 Moses in Israel minam lutangte tungah, “ Topaʼ thupiak hih bang ahi hi:" 
Numbers30:2 Mi khat in Topaʼ tungah thuciamna a ciam ciang ahi a, amah in a zuih dingin kiciamna a bawl ciang ahi zongin, amah ciampel lo dinga, ama kam sung panin a ging khiate khempeuh tawh kizui-in gamta ding hi." 
Numbers30:3 “Tua ahih kei leh, numei khat in Topaʼ tungah thuciamna bawlin, a paʼ inn sungah nungakin a om sungin kamciamna tawh amah kikhih tawm a," 
Numbers30:4 amah in a zuih dingin thuciamna le kamciamnate a bawlna a pa in za napi-in ama tungah bangmah a cih kei leh, ama thuciamna khempeuh kip dinga, amah a kikhih tawmna kamciamna khempeuh kip ding hi." 
Numbers30:5 Ahih hangin a pa in a zak ni-in a lungkim lohna a tanuʼ tungah a gen leh, tua nuʼ thuciamna, amah a kikhih tawmna kamciamnate khat zong kip lo ding hi. A pa in nial ahih manin Topa in tua nu maisak ding hi." 
Numbers30:6 “Tua numei, pasal khat tawh kiteeng a, amah a kikhih tawmna thuciamna ahi a, ngaihsun lopi-in a kampaunate ahi zongin" 
Numbers30:7 a pasal in za a, a zak ni-in a ziʼ tungah bangmah a cih kei leh tua numeiʼ thuciamna kip dinga, amah a kikhih tawmna a kamciam kip ding hi." 
Numbers30:8 Ahih hangin, a pasal in tua thu a zak ni-in a lungkim lohna a gen leh, amah a kikhih tawmna ahi numeiʼ tunga om kamciamna le ngaihsun lopi-in a kampaunate amah in phiatsak dinga, Topa in tua nu maisak ding hi." 
Numbers30:9 “Ahih hangin meigong numeiʼ thuciamna ahi a, a kima numeiʼ thuciamna ahi zongin, amah a kikhih tawmna peuhmah ama tungah kip ding hi." 
Numbers30:10 “Numei khat in a pasalʼ inn sungah thu a ciam ahi a, kiciamna khat tawh kamciamin amah a kikhih tawmna ahi zongin," 
Numbers30:11 a pasal in za a, a ziʼ tungah bangmah ci loin, a nial kei leh, ama thuciamna khempeuh kip dinga, amah a kikhih tawmna thuciamna khempeuh zong kip ding hi." 
Numbers30:12 Ahih hangin a pasal in tua thute a zak ni-in a phiatsak leh, ama thuciamna tawh kisai-in a kam panin a ging khia peuhmah ahi a, a mahmah a kamciamna tawh kisaite ahi zongin kip lo ding hi. A pasal in tuate phiatsak ahih manin Topa in tua nu maisak ding hi." 
Numbers30:13 Thuciamna khatpeuh ahi a, an tang dingin a kikhihna kamciam khatpeuh ahi zongin, a pasal in kipsak thei, a pasal in phiatsak thei hi." 
Numbers30:14 Ahih hangin a pasal in tua a kiciam ni a kipanin a ziʼ tungah bangmah a cih kei leh, amah in a ziʼ tunga om thuciamna khempeuh hitaleh a kamciam khempeuh hitaleh a kipsak ahi hi. Amah in tuate a zak ni-in ama tungah bangmah ci lo ahih manin tuate a kipsak ahi hi." 
Numbers30:15 Ahih hangin amah in tuate a zak khit ciangin a nung phiat leh, amah in a ziʼ mawhna pua ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers30:16 Hihte pen, pasal le a zi le a paʼ inn sungah nungakin a om laitakin a pa le a tanuʼ kikalah a om, Topa in Moses a piak ngeinate ahi hi." 
Numbers31:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers31:2 “Israel miteʼ phu Midian-te tungah la in. Tua khit ciangin na mipihte kiang na zuan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers31:3 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in mite kiangah, “Midian-teʼ tungah Topaʼ phulakna a sem ding, Midian-te a do dingin noteʼ lak panin mi pawl khat galhiam guan un." 
Numbers31:4 Israel minamte nam khat panin mi tul khat ciat gal sungah na kuansak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers31:5 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi tul tampi sung panin minam khat ah tul khat, tul sawm le tul nih galdo dingin galhiam kiguan hi." 
Numbers31:6 Moses in amaute, minam khat panin tul khat ciat, biakinn nate le patau koh nadingin peengkulte siampi Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas kengsakin ama makaihna tawh gal sungah a kuansak hi." 
Numbers31:7 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Midian-te do uh a, pasal khempeuh that uh hi." 
Numbers31:8 Amaute in midangte le Midian kumpi ngate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur le Reba a thahna uh ah, Beorʼ tapa Balaam zong namsau tawh that khawm uh hi." 
Numbers31:9 Israel-te in Midian nupite le a tate uh manin, a bawngte, a tuuhonte khempeuh le a na khempeuh uh laksak uh hi." 
Numbers31:10 Amauʼ teenna a khuapi khempeuh uh le a giahphual khempeuh uh mei tawh halsak uh a," 
Numbers31:11 a mat sa khempeuh uh, mihing ganhing ciahpih khin uh hi." 
Numbers31:12 Tua ciangin amaute in Jerikho nai, Jordan kiang, Moab zanglei-a a giahphual uh a Moses le siampi Eleazar le Israel mihonte kiangah a galmatte uh le a na lakte uh tunpih uh hi." 
Numbers31:13 Moses, siampi Eleazar le mihon makaite khempeuh zong giahphual pua ah vai dawn dingin pai uh hi." 
Numbers31:14 Galdona panin a hong ciah mi tul tampi a ukte le mi za tampi a uk galkap ulianteʼ tungah Moses heh hi. 
Numbers31:15 Moses in amaute tungah, “Numei khempeuh hingkhawi na hi uh hiam?" 
Numbers31:16 En un, hih mite in Balaamʼ lamlahna tawh Peor ah Topaʼ tungah Israel mite zuautatsak hi. Tua ahih manin Topaʼ mihonte lakah gimna hong tung hi." 
Numbers31:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, a khangnote lakah pasal peuhmah that unla, pasal tawh a lum khawm sa numei peuhmah zong that un." 
Numbers31:18 Ahih hangin pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo nungaknote khempeuh note adingin kem un. 
Numbers31:19 Tu-in note lakah mi khat peuhpeuh a thatte le a kithat sa a lawng mi peuhmahte, giahphual pua ah ni sagih sung om un. A ni thum ni le a ni sagih ni-in note le na galmatte uh na kisiansuah ding uh hi." 
Numbers31:20 Puan khempeuh, savun tawh a kibawl na khempeuh, keel mul tawh a kibawl na khempeuh le sing tawh a kibawl na khempeuh na siansuah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers31:21 Siampi Eleazar in galdona ah a va kuan galkapte tungah, “ Topa in Moses a thupiak thukham ngeina hih bang ahi hi:" 
Numbers31:22 Kham, ngun, sumngo, sik, dal le haknaw," 
Numbers31:23 mei a do zo peuhmahte bek mei ah na hal ding uh a, a siang hi ding hi. Ahi zongin mei a do zo lo peuhmahte, nitna siansuahna tui tawh kisiansuah dinga, tui ah na sawp ding uh hi." 
Numbers31:24 A ni sagih ni-in na puante uh na sawp ding uh a, note a siangtho na hi ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin giahphual ah nong ciahkik thei pan ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers31:25 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers31:26 “Nang le siampi Eleazar le mihon beh lutangte in gal sunga a kiman mihing le ganhingte sim un. 
Numbers31:27 Gal sunga a kingahte khen nih suah inla, galdo dingin a kuan galhangte le inn-a om mihonte tungah a kikimin hawmsak in." 
Numbers31:28 Galdo dingin a kuan khia galkapteʼ tung panin mite, bawngtalte, late le tuuhonte za nga ciangin Topaʼ siah dingin khat ciat la in." 
Numbers31:29 Alang a ngah uh sung panin la inla, Topaʼ tungah biakna-in siampi Eleazar tungah pia in." 
Numbers31:30 Israel mihonte in alang a ngah uh sung panin mite, bawngtalte, late, tuuhonte, ganhing khempeuh, sawm nga ciangin khat ciat la inla, Topaʼ biakbuk a kem Levi mite tungah pia in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers31:31 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses le siampi Eleazar in a sem uh hi. 
Numbers31:32 Tu-in galkapte in a lak gal sunga a mat uh a om lai a kihawm dingte: Tuu tul za guk le tul sawm sagih le tul nga," 
Numbers31:33 bawng tul sawm sagih le tul nih," 
Numbers31:34 la tul sawm guk le tul khat," 
Numbers31:35 le pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo nungak a vekpi-in tul sawm thum le tul nih ahi hi. 
Numbers31:36 Alang ahi, gal sungah a kuan khia miteʼ ngah pen tuu tul za thum le tul sawm thum le tul sagih le za nga hi a," 
Numbers31:37 Topaʼ tuu-siah pen tuu za guk le sawm sagih le nga ahi hi. 
Numbers31:38 Bawngte tul sawm thum le tul guk hi a, Topaʼ siah sawm sagih le nih ahi hi." 
Numbers31:39 Late tul sawm thum le za nga hi a, tua sung panin Topaʼ siah sawm guk le khat ahi hi." 
Numbers31:40 Nungak tul sawm le tul guk hi a, tua sung panin Topaʼ siah nungak sawm thum le nih ahi hi." 
Numbers31:41 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in siampi Eleazarʼ tungah Topa biak nading siah a pia hi. 
Numbers31:42 Galdo dingin a kuan khia mite adingin Moses in a khenkhiat zah mah Israel mihonte in ngah uh a," 
Numbers31:43 mihonte in a ngah alang teng pen tuu tul za thum le tul sawm thum le tul sagih le za nga," 
Numbers31:44 bawng tul sawm thum le tul guk," 
Numbers31:45 la tul sawm thum le za nga," 
Numbers31:46 nungak tul sawm le tul guk ahi hi. 
Numbers31:47 Israel-te in a ngah alang sung panin Moses in mihing le ganhing sawm nga ciangin khat ciat la-in, Topa in ama tungah a thupiak bangin Topaʼ biakbuk a kem Levi mite tungah a pia hi." 
Numbers31:48 Tua ciangin galkap tul tampite tunga uliante ahi, tul tampi a ukte le za tampi a ukte, Moses kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Numbers31:49 “Koteʼ ukna nuai-a a om galkapte, na nasem kote in ka sim khin uh a, koteʼ kiang panin mi khat zong a pelhem om lo hi." 
Numbers31:50 Kote in Topaʼ mai ah ko adingin kilemna bawl nading, Topa biak nadingin kham tawh a kibawl nate, banbuhte le taaute, min gelhna zungbuhte, bilbahte le khite ka muh ciat uh kong puak uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Numbers31:51 Moses le siampi Eleazar in amauteʼ tung panin na-a a kibawl khamte a sang uh hi. 
Numbers31:52 Tul tampi a ukte le za tampi a ukteʼ tung panin a kingah, Topaʼ tungah biakna-in a piak uh khamte khempeuh shekel tul sawm le tul guk le za sagih le sawm nga a gik hi." 
Numbers31:53 (Gal sunga a kuan mite in amau ading ciat a la uh hi.) 
Numbers31:54 Moses le siampi Eleazar in tul tampi le za tampi a uk miteʼ tung panin khamte sang uh a, Israel mite adingin Topaʼ mai ah phawk tawntungna-in kikhopna buk sungah a koih uh hi." 
Numbers32:1 Reuben minamte le Gad minamte in ganhing hon tampi nei uh hi. Amaute in Jazer gam le Gilead gam a muh uh ciangin gan khawi nading munin hoih sa mahmah uh hi. 
Numbers32:2 Tua ahih ciangin Gad minamte le Reuben minamte pai-in Moses le siampi Eleazar le mihon makaite kiangah," 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Sebam, Nebo le Beon" 
Numbers32:4 Topa in Israel mihonte a hong luahsak gamte pen a gan gam hi a, na nasem kote in gan ka nei uh hi." 
Numbers32:5 Nong hehpihna-un hih gam hong pia unla, Jordan kantanin kote hong paipih kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:6 Ahih hangin Moses in Gad minamte le Reuben minamte tungah, “Note hih laitak ah om hithiatin na sanggamte uh gal sungah kuan ding ahi hiam?" 
Numbers32:7 Topa in amaute a piakna gamah a pai nading uh ah Israel mite bang hangin lungkiasak ding na hi uh hiam? 
Numbers32:8 Na pu na pate uh Kadesh-barnea panin gam vel dingin ka sawl lai-in zong tu-a mah a bang uh hi. 
Numbers32:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute Eshkol Kuam ah pai to-in tua gam a muh uh ciangin, Topa in amaute a piakna gamah a pai nading uh ah Israel mite lungkiasak uh hi." 
Numbers32:10 Tua hunin Topa heh mahmah ahih manin amah kiciamin," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Amaute in kei hong zui taktak lo uh ahih manin Egypt gam pan a paikhia mite kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah peuhmah khat beek in, Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah piak dingin ka ciam sa gam mu lo ding uh hi." 
Numbers32:12 Ahi zongin Kenaz mi Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua in Topa zui taktak uh ahih manin a mu ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Numbers32:12 Ahi zongin Kenaz mi Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb le Nunʼ tapa Joshua in Topa zui taktak uh ahih manin a mu ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Numbers32:13 Israel mite tungah Topa heh a, ama muhna ah siatna a gamta tua khangmi khempeuh a bei mateng kum sawm li sung gamlak ah amaute vak kawikawisak hi." 
Numbers32:14 En un, Israel mite tungah Topaʼ hehluatna a khangsak to lai dingin, na pu na pate uhʼ tangin hong khang na hi uh hiam!" 
Numbers32:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah zuihna panin note na pial uh leh amah in gamlak ah amaute nusiakik dinga, note pen hih mi khempeuh a susia na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers32:16 Tua ciangin ama kiang nai ah amaute hong pai-in, “Hih lai ah ka tuute uh adingin tuukhawkte bawlin, ka zi ka tate uh adingin khua ka sat ding uh a," 
Numbers32:17 ahih hangin kote in hiam tawi-in amauʼ munah Israel mite ka tunpih mateng uh amauʼ mai ah a pai dingin ka kiging ding uh hi. Tua kikal sungin hih gam sungah a teeng miteʼ kiang pan kihut nadingin khuapi muanhuai sungah ka zi ka tate uh a na om ding uh kisam hi. 
Numbers32:18 Israel mite in amauʼ luah ding ciat a luah khit matengun ka inn uh ah ka ciah kei ding uh hi. 
Numbers32:19 Jordan gal khat le tua bansiah ah amaute tawh ka luah khawm kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jordan hih lam gal nisuahna lam koteʼ luah hong suak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:20 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amaute kiangah, “Note, tu-a bangin gamta-in, galdo dingin Topaʼ mai ah a pai dingin hiam la-in," 
Numbers32:21 Topa in a mai panin a galte a hawlkhiat matengin hiam a tawi note khempeuh in ama mai ah Jordan kantanin," 
Numbers32:22 Topaʼ mai ah leitang a kilak matengin na om uh leh, Topa le Israel mite ading na sep ding teng uh a zo khin na hih manun note na ciahkik ding uh a, hih leitang pen Topaʼ mai ah noteʼ neihsa hi ding hi." 
Numbers32:23 Ahih hangin note tua bangin na gamtat kei uh leh, en un, Topaʼ tungah a khial khin na hi uh hi. Na khialhna un note hong sulzuih ding thei tel un." 
Numbers32:24 Na zi na tate uh adingin khuapite satin, na tuute uh adingin tuukhawkte bawl unla, na ciam sa bangun gamta un,” a ci hi." 
Numbers32:25 Tua ciangin Gad minamte le Reuben minamte in Moses kiangah, “Ka topaʼ thupiak bangin na nasemte ka gamta ding uh hi." 
Numbers32:26 Ka tate uh, ka zite uh, ka tuuhonte uh le ka ganhing khempeuhte uh Gilead gam khuapite ah na om ding uh hi." 
Numbers32:27 Koteʼ topa in nong thupiak bangin na nasemte, galdo dingin hiam a tawi thei khempeuh, galdo dingin Topaʼ mai ah ka gal kah ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:28 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amauteʼ thu tawh kisai-in siampi Eleazarʼ tung le Israel minam beh lutang khempeuh tungah thu a pia hi. 
Numbers32:29 Moses in amaute tungah, “Gad minamte le Reuben minamte, Topaʼ mai ah galdo dingin hiam a tawi thei khempeuh in note tawh Jordan kantanin tua gam hong zawh pih leh, Gilead gam a neih dingun amaute tungah na pia ding uh hi." 
Numbers32:30 Ahih hangin hiam tawi-in note tawh hong gal kah kei uh leh zong amaute in Kanaan gam sungah note mah bangin ngah nei veve ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers32:31 Tua ciangin Gad minamte le Reuben minamte in dawng uh a, “Topa aw, Topaʼ thupiak bangin kote ka gamta ding uh hi." 
Numbers32:32 Hiam tawi-in Topaʼ mai ah Kanaan gam sungah ka pai ding uh a, koteʼ luah ahi ka neihsa uh Jordan gal khat ah kote aʼ mahin na kip ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers32:33 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Gad minamte, Reuben minamte le Josefʼ tapa Manasseh minam a langte tungah, Amor kumpi Sihonʼ gam le Bashan kumpi Ogʼ gam, a leitang le a khuapite a gam sung tawh, a gam sunga leitang tunga om khuapi khempeuh a pia hi." 
Numbers32:34 Gad minamte in khuapi muanhuai Dibon, Ataroth, Aroer," 
Numbers32:35 Atroth-shofan, Jazer, Jogbehah," 
Numbers32:36 Beth-nimrah le Beth-haran-te satin, tuute adingin tuukhawkte a bawl uh hi." 
Numbers32:37 Reuben minamte in Heshbon, Elealeh, Kiriathaim," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baal-meon (a minte kheel ding) le Sibmah khuapite sat uh a, amauʼ sat sa khuapiteʼ min a thak a phuak uh hi." 
Numbers32:39 Manassehʼ tapa Makhir-te beh, Gilead ah pai-in va la uh a, tua sunga om Amor mite suan khia uh hi." 
Numbers32:40 Moses in Manassehʼ tapa Makhir-te beh tungah Gilead pia a, tua lai ah amaute a teeng uh hi." 
Numbers32:41 Manasseh minam sung panin Jair pai-in amauʼ khuaneute va la a, tuate Havvoth jair, ci-in min a phuak hi." 
Numbers32:42 Nobah pai-in Kenath le a khuaneute va la a, ama min tamin Nobah a phuak hi." 
Numbers33:1 Hihte pen Moses le Aaronʼ makaihna tawh Egypt gam panin a honin a paikhiat lai-un Israel miteʼ giahphualte ahi hi. 
Numbers33:2 Moses in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh phual khat khit phual khat amauʼ kipatna munte a gelh hi. Hihte pen amauʼ kipatna mun tawh kizui-in a giahphualte ahi hi. 
Numbers33:3 A kha masa, tua kha ni sawm le ni nga ni-in Rameses panin amaute ding khia uh hi. Paisan Pawi masa ni khit a zing ciangin Egypt mite khempeuhʼ muhna ah gualzawhna tawh Israel mite paikhia uh a," 
Numbers33:4 Topa in amauteʼ lakah a thah lup tacil khempeuh Egypt mite in a vui laitak uh ahi hi. Topa in amau pasian-te zo gawp hi. 
Numbers33:5 Tua ahih ciangin Rameses panin Israel mite ding khia uh a, Sukkoth ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:6 Sukkoth panin ding khia uh a, a gam mong a om Etham ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:7 Etham panin ding khia uh a, Baal-zefon nisuahna lam a om Pihahiroth lamah kiheikik uh a, Migdol mai ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:8 Pihahiroth mai panin ding khia uh a, tuipi laizang kantanin sehnel gamah pai-in Etham gam sungah ni thum lam pai uh a, Marah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:9 Marah panin ding khia uh a, Elim tung uh hi. Elim ah ciktui khuk sawm le nih le nisuh kung sawm sagih om a, amaute in tua lai ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:10 Elim panin ding khia uh a, San Tuipi gei ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:11 San Tuipi panin ding khia uh a, Sin sehnel gamah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:12 Sin gam panin ding khia uh a, Dofkah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:13 Dofkah panin ding khia uh a, Alush ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:14 Alush panin ding khia uh a, miteʼ dawn ding tui a om lohna Refidim ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:15 Refidim panin ding khia uh a, Sinai sehnel gamah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:16 Sinai gam panin ding khia uh a, Kibroth-hattaavah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:17 Kibroth-hattaavah panin ding khia uh a, Hazeroth ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:18 Hazeroth panin ding khia uh a, Rithmah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:19 Rithmah panin ding khia uh a, Rimmon-perez ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:20 Rimmon-perez panin ding khia uh a, Libnah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:21 Ribnah panin ding khia uh a, Rissah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:22 Rissah panin ding khia uh a, Kehelathah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:23 Kehelathah panin ding khia uh a, Shefer Mual ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:24 Shefer Mual panin ding khia uh a, Haradah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:25 Haradah panin ding khia uh a, Makheloth ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:26 Makheloth panin ding khia uh a, Tahath ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:27 Tahath panin ding khia uh a, Terah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:28 Terah panin ding khia uh a, Mithkah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:29 Mithkah panin ding khia uh a, Hashmonah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:30 Hashmonah panin ding khia uh a, Moseroth ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:31 Moseroth panin ding khia uh a, Bene-jaakan ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:32 Bene-jaakan panin ding khia uh a, Hor-haggidgad ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:33 Hor-haggidgad panin ding khia uh a, Jotbathah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:34 Jotbathah panin ding khia uh a, Ebronah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:35 Ebronah panin ding khia uh a, Ezion-geber ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:36 Ezion-geber panin ding khia uh a, (Kadesh ahi) Zin gamah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:37 Kadesh panin ding khia uh a, Edom gam mong Hor Mual ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:38 Israel mite Egypt gam panin a paikhiat zawh uh a kum sawm lina, a kha ngana, a ni masa ni-in Topaʼ thupiakna tawh Hor Mual tungah siampi Aaron pai to-in tua lai ah a si hi." 
Numbers33:39 Hor Mual ah Aaron a sihin kum za le kum sawm nih le kum thum a pha hi. 
Numbers33:40 Kanaan gam sung Negeb gamah a teeng Kanaan mi Arad kumpipa in Israel mite hong paina thu a za hi. 
Numbers33:41 Hor Mual panin amaute ding khia uh a, Zalmonah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:42 Zalmonah panin ding khia uh a, Punon ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:43 Punon panin ding khia uh a, Oboth ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:44 Oboth panin ding khia uh a, Moab gam sung Iyeabarim ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:45 Iyim panin ding khia uh a, Dibongad ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:46 Dibon-gad panin ding khia uh a, Almon-diblathaim ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:47 Almon-diblathaim panin ding khia uh a, Nebo tun ma Abarim mualte ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Numbers33:48 Abarim mualte panin ding khia uh a, Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah giahphual sat uh a," 
Numbers33:49 Jordan kiang Beth-jeshimoth panin Moab zanglei sunga om Abel-shittim dongah amaute in giahphual a sat uh hi. 
Numbers33:50 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers33:51 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jerikho kantanin Kanaan gam na tun uh ciangin 
Numbers33:52 noteʼ mai panin tua gam a mi khempeuh na hawl khia ding uh a, amauʼ suang milimte khempeuh susia-in, a kisung amauʼ milimte khempeuh na susia ding uh a, mual tunga a biaknate khempeuh uh na su mang ding uh hi." 
Numbers33:53 Na neih dingun noteʼ tungah leitang hong pia khin ka hih manin note in leitang luahin tua tungah na teeng ding uh hi. 
Numbers33:54 Note in na minam uh tawh kizui-in aisanna tawh leitang na luah ding uh hi. Minam tamte tungah a tam na pia ding uh a, minam tawmte tungah a tawm na pia ding uh hi. Mi khatpeuh ading ai a phatna peuhpeuh ama aʼ hi dinga, na pate uh nam tawh kizui-in na luah ding uh hi." 
Numbers33:55 Ahih hangin noteʼ mai panin tua gam a teeng mite na hawlkhiat kei uh leh, na omsak lai uh mite pen na mittang uh a hong do, na pang uh a hong sun lingte tawh hong kibang ding uh a, na teenna gam uh ah note hong gimsak ding uh hi." 
Numbers33:56 Amaute tunga hih dinga ka ngaihsut bangin noteʼ tungah kong hih ding hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers34:1 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers34:2 “Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Note tungah ka hong piak Kanaan gamah na lut uh ciangin 
Numbers34:3 na leitaw lam pang uh pen Zin gam panin Edom pang teng hi dinga, leitaw lam na gamgi uh nisuahna lamah Ci Tuipi mong pan kipan ding hi." 
Numbers34:4 Na gamgi uh Akrabbim mual leitaw lamah kawi-in Zin dong banin, Kadesh-barnea leitaw lamah pai ding hi. Tua ciangin Hazaraddar lamah pai suakin Azmon dongah pai dinga," 
Numbers34:5 Azmon panin Egypt Lui lamah kawi-in Tuipi ah tawp ding hi. 
Numbers34:6 “Nitumna gamgi dingin Tuipi Lian le a gei dung teng na nei ding uh hi; hih pen nitumna lam na gamgi uh hi ding hi. 
Numbers34:7 “Leilu lam na gamgi ding uh pen Tuipi Lian panin Hor Mual dong na ciamteh ding uh hi. 
Numbers34:8 Hor Mual panin Hamath tumna ciang dong na ciamteh ding uh a, gamgi in Zedad dong ban ding hi." 
Numbers34:9 Tua ciangin Zifron dongah gamgi kikhung dinga, a mong pen Hazarenan ah tawp ding hi; hih pen leilu lam na gamgi uh hi ding hi." 
Numbers34:10 “Nisuahna lam na gamgi uh Hazarenan panin Shefam dong na ciamteh ding uh hi. 
Numbers34:11 Gamgi pen Shefam panin Ain nisuahna lam Riblah dongah pai suk ding hi. Gamgi pai suk lai-in nisuahna lamah Khinnereth tuipi liangko dong ban ding hi. 
Numbers34:12 Jordan dongah gamgi pai suk dinga, a mong pen Ci Tuipi ah tawp ding hi. Hih pen a kimkot a gamgi a nei na leitang uh hi ding hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers34:13 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Israel mite thu pia-in, “Hih pen minam kua le minam langte tungah piak dingin Topa in a thupiak, aisanna tawh na luah ding uh leitang ahi hi." 
Numbers34:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Reuben minamte a behbeh le Gad minamte in a behbehin amauʼ luah ding ngah khinzo uh a, Manasseh minam a langte in zong ngah khinzo uh hi." 
Numbers34:15 Minam nih le minam langte in nisuahna lam, Jerikho nai Jordan gal khat ah amauʼ luah ding ngah khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers34:16 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers34:17 “Luah dingin noteʼ tungah gam a hawm ding mite pen siampi Eleazar le Nunʼ tapa Joshua ahi uh hi. 
Numbers34:17 “Luah dingin noteʼ tungah gam a hawm ding mite pen siampi Eleazar le Nunʼ tapa Joshua ahi uh hi. 
Numbers34:18 Luah dingin gam a hawm dingin minam simah makai khat na la ding hi. 
Numbers34:19 Tua na lak ding mite: Judah minam sung panin Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb ahi hi. Simeon minam panin Ammihudʼ tapa Shemuel ahi hi. Benjamin minam panin Khislonʼ tapa Elidad ahi hi. Dan minam panin makai khat, Jogliʼ tapa Bukki ahi hi. Josefʼ tapateʼ sung pan: Manasseh minam ah makai khat, Efodʼ tapa Hanniel ahi hi. Efraim minam ah makai khat, Shiftanʼ tapa Kemuel ahi hi. Zebulun minam sung pan makai khat, Parnakʼ tapa Elizafan ahi hi. Issakhar minam sung pan makai khat, Azzanʼ tapa Paltiel ahi hi. Asher minam sung pan makai khat, Shelomiʼ tapa Ahihud ahi hi. Naftali minam sung pan makai khat, Ammihudʼ tapa Pedahel ahi hi."

Numbers34:28  
Numbers34:29 “Hihte pen Kanaan gamah Israel mite adingin gamh a hawm dingin Topa in a thupiak mite ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers35:1 Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers35:2 “Amaute in amauʼ neih a luah uh sung panin ten nadingin Levi mite tungah khuapite a piak dingun Israel mite thu pia in. Khuapi kiim a lo nona gamte Levi mite tungah na pia ding hi. 
Numbers35:3 Khuapite pen amauʼ teenna hi dinga, a lo nona gamte pen amauʼ bawngte le a inn ganhingte le a ganhing khempeuh uh ading ahi hi." 
Numbers35:4 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi lo nona gamte pen khuapi kulh panin a kimkot pi tul le za nga ciang ban ding hi. 
Numbers35:5 Khuapi laizang panin na teh dinga, nisuahna lam pang pi tul thum, leitaw lam pang pi tul thum, nitumna lam pang pi tul thum, leilu lam pang pi tul thum hi dinga, a laizang ah khuapi om ding hi. Hih pen amauʼ khuapi lo nona taanggam dingin a neih ding uh ahi hi." 
Numbers35:6 Levi mite tungah na piak uh khuapite pen bukna khuapi gukte hi dinga, mi thatte tua lai ah na taisak ding uh a, tuateʼ banah khuapi sawm li le nih na pia thuah ding uh hi." 
Numbers35:7 Levi mite tungah na piak ding uh khuapi vekpi sawm li le giat hi-in, a lo nona gamte tawh hi ding hi." 
Numbers35:8 Israel miteʼ neihsa sung panin na piak ding khuapite pen minam tamte tung panin tam la-in, minam tawmte tung panin tawm na la ding hi. Amauʼ luah gamh tawh a kizui-in Levi mite tungah a khuapite uh a piak ciat ding uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Numbers35:9 Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Numbers35:10 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Jordan kantanin Kanaan gamah na tun uh ciangin," 
Numbers35:11 sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that kha mi thatte a va tai theih nading, note adingin bukna khuapi dingin khuapite na teel ding uh hi." 
Numbers35:12 Thu kikhen dingin mihonpi mai ah a din ma-in mi thatte a sih loh nadingin tua khuapite pen phula paʼ kiang panin note adingin bukna hi ding hi. 
Numbers35:13 Na piak uh tua khuapite, noteʼ bukna khuapi gukte hi ding hi." 
Numbers35:14 Bukna khuapi dingin Jordan gal khat ah khuapi thum, Kanaan gamah khuapi thum na teel ding uh hi." 
Numbers35:15 Sawm lopi-in mi khatpeuh a that khate a tai theih nadingin hih khuapi gukte pen Israel mite, khual mite le noteʼ lakah a peemte adingin bukna hi ding hi." 
Numbers35:16 “Ahih hangin mi khat in na-a kizang sik khat tawh midang khat satin a sih leh, amah mi that hi a, tua mi that pa kithat ding hi." 
Numbers35:17 Amah in mi a sih theih nading mah ahi a khut sunga om suang khat tawh a suk a, a sih leh, amah mi that hi a, tua mi that pa kithat ding hi." 
Numbers35:18 Tua ahih kei leh, amah in mi a sih theih nading ahi a khut sunga om sing a kibawl hiam khat tawh amah a sat a, a sih leh, mi that hi a, tua mi that pa kithat ding hi." 
Numbers35:19 A kinaipih pen khat in a phu la-in mi that pa that dinga, amah a tuahna peuh ah that ding hi." 
Numbers35:20 “Amah in muhdahna tawh sunin, ahih kei leh bukin a khawh a a sih leh," 
Numbers35:21 tua ahih kei leh galbawlna tawh a khutin tumin a sih leh, tua a tum pa kithat ding hi. Amah mi that hi a, a phula pa in a tuah ciangin tua mipa that ding hi." 
Numbers35:22 “Ahih hangin galbawl lopi-in thakhatin amah sunin, ahih kei leh buk lopi-in na khatpeuh tawh amah khawhin," 
Numbers35:23 ahih kei leh, amah pen ama gal hi lo, ama siat nading a zong hi lo napi-in, mi a sih theih nading suang khat zangin a muh lohpi-in amah in deng kha-in a sih leh," 
Numbers35:24 tua mi that pa le a phula paʼ kikalah hih ngeina kipte tawh kizui-in mihonpi in khen ding hi. 
Numbers35:25 A phula paʼ khut sung panin mihonpi in mi that pa hon khia-in, mihonpi in amah a va taina, bukna khuapi ah amah puakkik dinga, sathau siangtho a kinilh siampi lianpen pa a sih matengin tua khua ah a teeng ding hi." 
Numbers35:26 Ahih hangin hun khat peuhpeuh ah amah a taina bukna khuapi gamgi khengin a pai a," 
Numbers35:27 a phula pa in ama bukna khuapi daihual pua lamah amah mu-in, a phula pa in mi that pa a thah leh, tua a that pa mawh lo ding hi." 
Numbers35:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh siampi lianpen pa a sih matengin tua mipa a bukna khuapi sungah a om ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin siampi lianpen pa a sih khit ciangin mi that pa a neihsa leitang ah ciahkik thei ding hi. 
Numbers35:29 “Hihte pen na teenna khempeuh uh ah na khang tawntungun thukham le ngeina hi ding hi. 
Numbers35:30 Khatpeuh in mi khat a thah leh, teciteʼ genna siksanin mi that pa kithat ding hi. Ahih hangin teci khat bekʼ teci panna siksanin kuamah kithat lo ding hi." 
Numbers35:31 Tua tham loin, sihna thuak dingin a kilawm mipa tat nading sum na sang kei ding uh hi; amah kithat ding hi." 
Numbers35:32 Siampi lianpen pa a sih ma-in bukna khuapi ah a tai sa mipa a gamah a ciahkik theih nadingin ama nuntakna tat nading sum na sang kei ding uh hi. 
Numbers35:33 Na teenna uh leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna in leitang ninsak a, a that mipa a kithah kei buang leh, tua mi kithahna leitang siansak nading thudang om thei lo hi." 
Numbers35:34 A laizang ah keimah ka teenna leitang na ninsak kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah, Israel miteʼ laizang ah ka teeng hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Numbers36:1 Josefʼ tapate beh Manasseh, Manassehʼ tapa Makhir, Makhirʼ tapa Gilead, Gileadʼ tapa beh lutangte in hong naihin Moses le Israel mite beh lutang ahi makaiteʼ mai ah thu gen uh a," 
Numbers36:2 “Israel mite tungah aisanna tawh gamhluah dingin leitang piak ding Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi. Ka sanggampa uh Zelofehadʼ gamhluahte a tanute tungah piak dingin Topa in ka topa tungah thu hong pia hi. 
Numbers36:3 Ahih hangin Israel sungah minam dangteʼ tapate khat peuhpeuh tawh amaute kiteeng leh ka pate uhʼ gamhluah panin amau aʼ teng kilakhia-in a manawh minamte tungah tua gamh kipia beh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin koʼ ngah sa gamh a kikhen khia ding ahi hi. 
Numbers36:4 Israel miteʼ Jubilee hong tun ciangin amau aʼ te pen a manawh minamteʼ tungah kipia beh ding hi. Ka pa uh namteʼ gamhluah panin amau aʼ kikhen khia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Numbers36:5 Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Topaʼ genna tawh kizui-in Israel mite thu pia a, “Zelofehad minamteʼ genna man hi." 
Numbers36:6 Zelofehadʼ tanute tawh kisai-in Topaʼ thupiak hih bang ahi hi: ‘Amaute in hoih a sak pente uh tawh kiteeng uh hen. Ahih hangin amauʼ behte bek teenpih thei ding uh hi. 
Numbers36:7 Israel miteʼ gamhte minam khat pan namdang khat ah paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mi khempeuh a minam gamhluah ciat uh tawh kip ding uh hi. 
Numbers36:8 Israel mi khempeuh in a pate uhʼ gamh a luah theih nadingun, Israel miteʼ sung panin minam khat peuhpeuh ah gamh a nei tanu khempeuh pen a pateʼ nam sung khat peuhpeuhʼ zi hi ding hi." 
Numbers36:9 Tua ahih ciangin minam khat pan a dang ah gamh paikhia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ sung panin minam khempeuh amauʼ gamh ciat tawh kip ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Numbers36:10 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Zelofehadʼ tanute gamta uh hi. 
Numbers36:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Zelofehadʼ tanu Mahlah, Tirzah, Hoglah, Milkah le Noah-te, a pate uhʼ sanggamteʼ tapate tawh kiteeng uh hi." 
Numbers36:12 Josefʼ ta Manassehʼ tapateʼ innkuan sungah amaute in pasal nei uh a, a pate nam innkuan sungah amauʼ gamhluahte a kip hi."
