Numbers36:13 Hihte pen Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei ah Israel mite tungah Moses tungtawnin Topa in a piak thupiaknate le ngeina kipte ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Hihte pen Jordan gal khat gamlak, Suf gal khat Arabah gam sung, Paran le Tofel, Laban, Hazeroth le Dizahab kikalah Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah a gen thute ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Tua mun pen Horeb panin Seir Mual tawnin Kadesh-barnea lamah ni sawm le ni khat paina ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Heshbon gamah a teeng Amor kumpipa Sihon le Ashtaroth le Edrei gamah a teeng Bashan kumpipa a zawh khit ciangin, a kum sawm lina, kha sawm le kha khatna, a ni masa ni-in, amauteʼ tungah thupiakna-in Topa in ama tungah a piak bangbangin Moses in Israel mite tungah a gen hi." 
Deuteronomy1:4  
Deuteronomy1:5 Moab gam Jordan gal khat ah Moses in hih thu gen tel a," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Horeb gam sungah Topa i Pasian in eiteʼ kiangah, ‘Hih mualah sauvei na om khinzo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Kithawi-in na khualzin uh kipankik unla, Amor miteʼ mual tung gam le Arabah kiim, mual tung gam, lei niamna gam, Negeb gam khempeuh le Kanaan miteʼ gam tuipi gei le Lebanon, gun golpi ahi Eufratis gun dongin pai un." 
Deuteronomy1:8 En un, noteʼ mai ah leitang ka koih zo hi. Pai unla, Topa in na pate uh Abraham, Isaac, Jakob le amauʼ nung a a suanlekhakte uh tungah piak dingin a ciam leitang luah un,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Tua hun laitakin note kiangah, ‘Kei guak bek in note kong en zo kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Topa na Pasian un note tampi hong phasak zo hi. En un, note tuhunin vantung aksite zahin tampi na pha uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Topa, na pate uh Pasian in tu-a zah tulin note hong bawl henla, note tungah hong ciam sa bangin thupha hong pia tahen!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kei guak in noteʼ thu kineihnate siansak nading tavuan lianpi bangci puak zawh ding ka hi hiam? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Na minam uh tawh a kizui-in a pil, thu thei, thuphawk sa mite teel unla, noteʼ lutangin amaute ka koih ding hi,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Note in, ‘Nangma hong gen thu pen kote adingin hoih hi,’ ci-in nong dawng uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Tua ahih ciangin na minam lutang uh ahi, a pil thu phawk sa mite ka la a, noteʼ tungah lutangin a tul uk, a za uk, a sawm nga uk, a sawm ukte le uliante na minam khempeuh sung uh ah ka koih hi." 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Tua hun laitakin na thukhente uh ka thuhilh a, ‘Na sanggamte uh thu neihte za unla, mi khat le a sanggampa ahi a, amah tawh a om khualmipa tawh ahi zongin thu a mantakin khen un." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Thukhenna ah angvan tuam na nei kei ding uh hi. A neu le a liante a kibangin a thu na ngai ding uh a, maitang zahtak tuam na nei kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukhenna pen Pasian-aʼ ahi hi. Note adingin a haksa lua thute kei kiangah nong paipih ding uh a, keimah in tua thu ka za ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Amauteʼ hih ding na khempeuh tua hunin amaute kiangah thu ka pia hi. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Tua ciangin Horeb gam panin i ding khia a, Topa i Pasian in hong thupiak bangin Amor mite mual tung gam zuatna lamkal ah noteʼ muh sa a lian a lauhuai sehnel gam i nawk khit ciangin Kadesh-barnea i tung hi." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Tua ciangin noteʼ kiangah, ‘ Topa i Pasian in eite hong piak Amor miteʼ mual tung gam na tung khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:21 En un, Topa na Pasian un noteʼ mai ah leitang koih zo hi. Topa, na pate uh Pasian in note tungah hong gen sa bangin pai to-in luah un. Lau kei unla, lungkia kei un,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Tua ciangin na vekpi-un ka kiangah nong pai uh a, ‘Eite adingin gam va enin, i pai toh nading lampi le i zuat ding khuapite hong genkik thei ding eiteʼ mai ah mi sawl ni,’ nong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Tua thu hoih tuak ka sa a, minam khat ah khat, note mi sawm le nih kong la hi." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Amaute kithawi-in mual tung gamah pai to uh a, Eshkol kuamah pai-in va en uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Amaute in tua gam singgah pawl khat a khutun hong tawi-in i kiangah hong tunpih suk uh a, amaute in eite kiangah thu hong zasakkikin, ‘ Topa i Pasian in eite hong piak gam pen leitang hoih ahi hi,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ahi zongin note pai to nuam loin, Topa na Pasian un hong thupiak na nial uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Na puanbukte uh sungah na phun uh a, ‘ Topa in eite hong mudah ahih manin eite a hong susia ding Amor miteʼ khut sungah hong pia dingin Egypt gam panin eite hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Koi lai ah pai to ding ihi hiam? I sanggamte in i lungsim hong siasak khin uh a, “A mite ei sangin lian zaw-in sang zaw uh hi. A khuapite lianin van banin ki-um hi. Tua tham loin Anak mite tua munah ka mu uh hi,” hong ci uh hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Tua ciangin note kiangah, ‘Lau kei unla, amaute kihta kei un." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Egypt gam sungah noteʼ mit muh ah a hih bangin, mi khat in a tapa a puak bangin hih mun na tun matengun lam tawntung ah Topa na Pasian un note hong puak na muh sa uh sehnel gam amah bangin, noteʼ mai ah a pai Topa na Pasian un note adingin hong dosak ding hi,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:31  
Deuteronomy1:32 Ahi zongin hih bang thu om hi napi-in, na puanbuk lamna mun ding uh hong lak ding le na pai nading lampi uh hong lak dingin zanin mei, sunin meii tawh noteʼ mai lampi ah a pai Topa na Pasian uh note in na um kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:33  
Deuteronomy1:34 “ Topa in noteʼ thu hong za a, a heh suakin kiciam a," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Hih a gilo khang mite khat beek in, na pate uh tungah piak dinga ka ciam gam hoih na mu kei ding uh a, Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb bek in tua gam mu ding hi. Amah in a lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa zui ahih manin amah le a tate tungah ama tot sa leitang ka pia ding hi!’ a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:36  
Deuteronomy1:37 Noteʼ hangin kei tungah zong Topa heh a, ‘Nang zong tua gamah na pai kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Nunʼ tapa Joshua, nangma mai ah a ding pa lut ding hi. Amah hanthawn in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Israel mite tua gam luahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Nunʼ tapa Joshua, nangma mai ah a ding pa lut ding hi. Amah hanthawn in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Israel mite tua gam luahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Tua tham loin galteʼ mat suak ding hi, na cih uh na taneute uh le, tu hun laitakin a sia le a pha a khen thei nai lo na tate uh, tua gamah pai dinga, amaute tungah tua gam pia-in, amaute in tua gam luah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ahih hangin note na hih uh leh, kihei unla, San Tuipi lam manawhin sehnel gamah pai un,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Tua ciangin note in kei nong dawng uh a, ‘ Topaʼ tungah ka khial khin uh hi. Topa i Pasian in hong thupiak bang teekteekin pai to-in i do ding hi,’ nong ci uh hi. Na milipun na galhiam uh tawh na kithawi uh a, mual tung gamah pai toh ding na baih ngaihsut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amaute kiangah gen in: Note lakah kei om lo ka hih manin kuan to kei unla, do kei un. Tua bangin kuan to le-uhcin na galte uh na lel ding uh hi, ci in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong gen a, note in na ngai nuam kei uh hi. Topaʼ thupiakna na nial uh a, mual tung gamah na kuan to hamtang uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tua ciangin tua mual tung gamah a teeng Amor mite hong kuanin, Seir gam Hormah ciang dongah khuai bangin hong delhin hong zo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Note hong ciahkikin Topaʼ mai ah na kap uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa in na aw uh hong ngai loin, a bil zong hong ngat lo hi." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Tua ahih ciangin tua thu hangin ni tampi sung Kadesh munah na om uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah hong gen bangin eite kihei-in San Tuipi lam manawhin sehnel gamah i pai a, ni tampi sung Seir Mual tung gamah i pai kawikawi hi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 “Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Hih mual kiimah sauvei khop na pai khinta uh hi; leilu lamah kihei un. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Miteʼ tungah hih bangin thu pia in: Seir gamah a teeng Esauʼ suanlekhak, na behte uh gam sung a nawk ding na hi uh hi. Amaute in note hong kihta ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note kidawm un." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Amaute tawh kiseel kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ leitang them khat zong no kong pia peuhmah kei ding hi. Esauʼ neih dingin ama tungah Seir Mual pia khin ka hih manin khe a ta khop zah zong no kong pia kei ding hi. 
Deuteronomy2:6 Na nek ding uh an amauteʼ tung panin sum tawh na lei ding uh a, na dawn ding uh amauʼ tui zong sum mah tawh na lei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:7 “‘Bang hang hiam cih leh na sepna khempeuh uh ah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia hi. Hih a zai sehnel gam na paina uh amah in hong thei hi. Hih kum sawm li sung Topa na Pasian uh no tawh hong om hi. Bangmah na kisam kei uh hi, ci-in gen in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Tua ahih ciangin Seir gamah a teeng Esauʼ suan i behte le Elath le Ezion-geber khua pan hong kipan Arabah lampi panin i paikhia suak hi. “Tua ciangin eite kihei-in Moab gam lamah i pai hi. 
Deuteronomy2:9 Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amauʼ leitang na neih dingun noteʼ tungah hong pia lo ding ka hih manin Moab mite gimsak kei unla, amaute tawh galin kido kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh a neih dingun Lotʼ suanlekhakte tungah Ar khua ka pia zo hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Anak mite zahin a tun a sang, a lian, a tam Emim mite tua lai ah teeng ngei hi." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Anak mite mah bangin amaute zong Refaim mite kici a, ahih hangin Moab mite in Emim ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Hor mite zong Seir ah nidangin teeng ngei a, ahih hangin Topa in amauteʼ tungah a piak amauʼ leitang tungah Israel mite in a hih mah bangin, Esauʼ suanlekhakte in amaute suan khia-in susia uh a, amauʼ munah teeng uh hi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Tu-in ding unla Zered lui kantan un,’ hong cih bangin Zered lui i kantan hi." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Amaute tungah Topa a kiciam mah bangin galsim mi ahi tua khang mite khempeuh gam sungah a sih khit dong ahi, Kadesh-barnea i nusiat a kipan Zered lui i kantan dong kikal kum sawm thum le kum giat ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Amaute a bei khit mateng gamlak ah amaute a susia dingin Topa langpang takpi hi. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Tua ahih ciangin mihingte lak panin galsim mite bei-in a sih khit ciangin 
Deuteronomy2:17 Topa in kei kiangah," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Tu ni-in Ar khua santak ah Moab gamgi a kantan ding na hi uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ammon miteʼ leitang na neih dingun khat zong hong pia lo ding ka hih manin, Ammon miteʼ gamgi na nai uh ciangin amaute gimsak kei unla, amaute tawh kido kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh a neih dingun Lotʼ suanlekhakte tungah ka pia khin hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Tua pen Refaim gamgi ci-in zong kithei ngei hi. Refaim mite tua lai ah teeng ngei a, ahih hangin Ammon mite in amaute pen, Anak mite bangin lianin a tun a sang ahi Zamzummim mite ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa in amauteʼ mai ah tua mite susia hi. Amaute in tua mite suan khia uh a, amauʼ munah teeng uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:21  
Deuteronomy2:22 Amah in Seir ah a teeng Esauʼ suanlekhakte adingin amauteʼ mai ah Hor mite a suksiat mah bangin amaute in tua mite susia-in tu ni dongin amauʼ munah teeng uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:23 Gaza ciang dong khuaneute ah a teeng Avvim mite ahihleh Kaftor pan a hong pai Kaftor mite in susia-in amauʼ munah teeng uh hi.) 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Moab gam sung i khen ciangin Topa in, ‘Ding un, na khualzin uh kipan unla, Arnon kuam kantan un. En un, Heshbon kumpipa, Amor mi Sihon le ama leitang noteʼ khut sungah kong pia zo hi. Amah suankhiat ding kipan unla, gal sungah amah tawh kido un." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Nomauʼ thu za-in noteʼ hangin liingin a gim ding ahi, mun khempeuh ah a om miteʼ tungah note hong kikihtakna le noteʼ hanga launa ka tunsak ding tu ni-in ka kipan ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Tua ahih ciangin Kedemoth sehnel gam panin Heshbon kumpipa Sihonʼ kiangah kilem nading thu genin kamtai ka sawl a," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Na gam sung hong nawksak in. Lampi bekah ka pai ding uh a, taklam ahi a, veilamah ahi zongin ka pial kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ka nek ding uh an sum tawh lei dingin nong zuak dinga, ka dawn ding uh tui sum tawh lei dingin nong pia ding hi. Khe tawh hong nawksak bek in." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Jordan kantanin Topa ka Pasian un kote hong piak leitang ah ka tun matengun Seir-a a teeng Esauʼ suante le Ar-a a teeng Moab mite in kei hong paisak mah bangun hong paisak in,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Ahih hangin Heshbon kumpipa Sihon in eite hong paisak lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tu hun a mah bangin na khut sung uh ah amah hong piak theih nadingin Topa na Pasian un a lungsim khauhsakin, amah paupeengsak hi." 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘En in, Sihon le a leitang nang tungah piak kong kipan khinzo hi. Ama leitang na luah theih nadingin suankhiat kipan in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Tua ciangin Sihon le a mite khempeuh eite a do dingin Jahaz ah hong pai uh hi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Topa i Pasian in amah hong pia a, amah le a tapate le a mi khempeuh i zo hi." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tua hunin a khuapi khempeuh i la a, a khuapi khempeuh, papi, nupi le naupangte i susia maimang a, bangmah i siit kei hi." 
Deuteronomy2:35 I lak sa a khuapi sunga van kinusiate tawh a ganhingte uh eima adingin i la bek hi. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Arnon kuam mong a a om Aroer le tua kuam sunga om khuapi Gilead ciang dongah eite adingin khuapi kulh a sang lua khat beek om lo a, Topa i Pasian in a vekpi-in eiteʼ khut sungah hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Ammon miteʼ leitang ahi Jabbok gun pang khempeuh le mual tung gam khuapite le Topa eiteʼ Pasian in hong khamna munte bek i va neh kei hi. 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Tua ciangin eite kihei-in Bashan lamah i pai to a, Bashan kumpipa Og le ama mite khempeuh Edrei ah eite a do dingin hong kuan khia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ahih hangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amah kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah le a mite khempeuh le a leitang nangma khut sungah kong pia khinzo hi. Heshbon ah a teeng Amor kumpipa Sihon na bawl bangin ama tungah na bawl ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian in eiteʼ khut sungah Bashan kumpipa Og le a mite khempeuh zong hong pia a, ama adingin mi khat beek a suakta nawn lo dingin i vatmai hi." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Tua hunin a khuapite khempeuh uh i la a, amauʼ kiang pan i lak loh khuapi khat zong om lo hi. Tua banga i lakte pen Bashan gam a Og kumpi gam sung, Argob gambup, khuapi sawm gukte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Kulhpi a ki-um lo khua neu tampite sim loh, hih khuapite khempeuh kulh sangpi, kongpi le sikzawlte tawh a muanhuai takin a kibawl ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Heshbon kumpipa Sihon i bawl bangin amaute i susia mang a, a khuapi khempeuh, papi, nupi le naupangte i susia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ahih hangin a ganhing khempeuh le khuapi sunga van kinusiate i la hi. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Tua ahih ciangin tua hun laitakin, Jordan gal khat a om Amor kumpi nihteʼ khut sung pan, Arnon kuam panin Hermon Mual dong" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Sidon mite in Hermon pen Sirion ci a, Amor mite in Senir ci uh hi)," 
Deuteronomy3:10 mualzang khuapite khempeuh le Gilead gam khempeuh le Bashan gam khempeuh, Salekah le Edrei dong, Bashan-a om Og kumpi gam khuapite i la hi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Bashan kumpipa Og bek Refaim gam sungah a om lai ahi hi. Ama lupna a han pen suang han hi a, Ammon miteʼ khuapi Rabbah ah tua han om lai hi lo ahi hiam? Tua han a sauna pi sawm le li dektak hi a, a zaina pi guk ahi hi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Tua hunin hih leitang i luah ciangin, Reuben mite le Gad mite tungah Arnon kuam mong a a om Aroer pan le Gilead mual tung gam kim khat a khuapite tawh ka pia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Gilead gam a om lai teng le Argob gam khempeuh ahi, Og kumpi gam, Bashan gam khempeuh, Manasseh minam kimkhatte tungah ka pia hi. (Bashan gam buppi pen Refaim leitang kici hi." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasseh mi Jair in Bashan kici Argob gam khempeuh, Geshur mite le Maakath miteʼ gamgi dong la a, tua sunga khua neu minte ama min tamsakin tu ni donga a kip Havvoth jair a phuak hi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Makhir tungah Gilead ka pia a," 
Deuteronomy3:16 Reuben mite le Gad mite tungah Gilead panin Arnon kuam dong, gamgi dingin a kuam laita, Ammon miteʼ gamgi ahi Jabbok gun dong tawh ka pia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Arabah gam zong, a gamgi dingin Jordan tawh, Khinnereth pan nisuahna lam a om Pisgah mual pang nuai-a Ci Tuipi ahi Arabah tuipi ciang dong amaute ka pia hi." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Tua hunin note thu kong pia a, ‘ Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun hih leitang hong pia zo hi. Na galhang mite khempeuh uh galhiam tawh kithawi-in Israel mi na sanggamte uh mai ah va kuan ding hi." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ahih hangin na zite, na taneute le na ganhingte uh (ganhing tampi na neih uh ka thei hi) note kong piak sa khuapite ah om ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy3:20 Topa in note hong piak bangin na sanggamte uh tungah lungsim tawlngakna pia-in, Topa na Pasian un Jordan gal khat ah amaute a piak leitang amaute in zong a luah matengun na huh ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note kong piak sa ahi na neihsa ciat uh ah note khempeuh na ciah ding uh hi,’ kong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Tua hun laitakin Joshua thu ka pia a, ‘ Topa na Pasian in hih kumpi nihteʼ tungah a bawlte khempeuh na mit in mu khin a, na nawk lai ding kumpi gam khempeuh tungah zong Topa in tua mah bangin hih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Tua hun laitakin Joshua thu ka pia a, ‘ Topa na Pasian in hih kumpi nihteʼ tungah a bawlte khempeuh na mit in mu khin a, na nawk lai ding kumpi gam khempeuh tungah zong Topa in tua mah bangin hih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Amaute na kihta kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang aʼ dinga hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian ahi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Tua hunin keimah in Topaʼ tungah ka thum a," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Topa Pasian aw, na liatna le na thahatnate na nasem paʼ tungah lah ding a hong kipan pan bek na hi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh vantung hitaleh leitungah hitaleh nangma hih bangin tua bang nasep leh a vanglian gamtatna a hih thei bang pasian om ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Kei hong paisak inla, Jordan gal khat a om gam hoih, tua mual tung gam hoih le Lebanon hong musak in, ci-in kong thum hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Ahih hangin noteʼ hangin keiʼ tungah Topa heh a, ka thunget hong pia lo hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Pha zo hi; hih thu kei kiangah hong gen nawn kei in." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisgah mual dawnah pai to inla, nitumna lam, leilu lam, leitaw lam le nisuahna lamah khuadak to inla, na mit tawh gal et in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in hih Jordan na kantan kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ahih hangin Joshua thu pia inla, hanthawnin tha khauhsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih miteʼ mai ah amah pai dinga, nangmah in na muh ding leitang amaute luahsak ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ahih hangin Joshua thu pia inla, hanthawnin tha khauhsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih miteʼ mai ah amah pai dinga, nangmah in na muh ding leitang amaute luahsak ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Tua ahih ciangin Beth-peor gal a kuam sungah i taam lai hi. 
Deuteronomy4:1 “Tu-in Israel-te aw, note nungta-in, Topa, na pate uh Pasian in note hong piak leitang ah va pai-in na luah theih nadingun note kong hilh thukhamte le ngeina kipte don unla zui un." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Topa na Pasian un hong piak ahi keima hong thugente na zuih theih nadingun no kong thupiakte behlap loin, zong na khiam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Na mit un Baalpeor ah Topaʼ hihna mu khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na Pasian un noteʼ lak panin Peor-a Baal a zui mi khempeuh susia a," 
Deuteronomy4:4 ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh a len kipte khempeuh tu ni-in na hing lai uh hi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “En un, note in a luah dingin na lutna uh gam sungah na zuih dingun Topa ka Pasian in kei hong thupiak bangin thukhamte le ngeina kipte kong hilh khinzo hi." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Tuate zui unla, sem un; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thukhamte khempeuh a zak uh ciangin, ‘Hih minam liante pen a pil thu thei taktak hi,’ a ci ding uh miteʼ muhna ah hih thu pen nomauʼ pilna le nomauʼ theihna hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in Topa i sap hun simin eiteʼ kiangah i Pasian hong nai zahin tua bang pasian a nei minam lian koi ah om ahi hiam? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Tu ni-in note kong hilh thute bangin thukham le ngeina kip a man a nei minam lian koi ah om ahi hiam? 
Deuteronomy4:9 “Na mit un a muh sa nate na nuntak sungun mangngilh kha-in, na lungsim panun paikhia kha ding ahih manin limtakin ngaihsunin hoihtakin kikem un. Horeb-a Topa na Pasian uh mai ah na din ni-un Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Leitungah a nuntak lai teng uh amaute in kei hong kihtak nading le amaute in a tate uh a hilh sawn theih nadingun keimah in amaute tungah ka thute ka zaksak theih nadingin ka kiangah mite hong khawm in,’ hong cihna thu, na tate uh le na tate uh tateʼ tungah kitheisak un." 
Deuteronomy4:10  
Deuteronomy4:11 “Mei in mual kaang in van laizang dong ban to-in, khuamial le meii le khuazing in a tuamcip laitakin note a nai ah hong pai-in mual bulah na ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Tua ciangin mei sung panin Topa in noteʼ kiangah thu hong gen hi. Note in awging na za uh a, ahih hangin bangmah mu loin, awging bek a om hi." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Thupiak Sawmte ahi noteʼ hih dinga hong thupiak ama thuciamna noteʼ tungah hong gen a, amah in suangpek nih tungah tuate a gelh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Note in na luah ding uh gam sungah na zuih theih nadingun, thukhamte le ngeina kipte note kong hilh nading tua hun laitakin Topa in kei thu hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Tua ahih ciangin note hoihtakin kidawm un. Horeb ah mei sung panin Topa in noteʼ tungah thu hong gen ni-in bangmah mu lo na hih manun," 
Deuteronomy4:16 note adingin lim khat peuhpeuh, pasal tawh a kibang hitaleh numei tawh a kibang hitaleh," 
Deuteronomy4:17 leitung a om ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hitaleh, huihlak a leeng kha a nei vasa khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hitaleh," 
Deuteronomy4:18 leitungah a bokvak khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hitaleh, leinuai ah a om tui sunga ngasa khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang hitaleh, a kiseek milim bawlna tawh a sia-in na gamtat khak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Note in na mit uh tawh vantung lam en to-in, ni le kha le aksite, vantung na khempeuh na muh uh ciangin, mun khempeuh a miteʼ tungah Topa na Pasian un a piak nateʼ lamah kihei-in tuate bia-in a na na sep khak loh nading uh kidawm un." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ahih hangin Topa in tu ni-a bangin sik meikhuk tawh a kibang Egypt panin ama neih mi dingin note hong la-in hong paikhiatpih khin hi. 
Deuteronomy4:21 Tua tham loin noteʼ hangin keiʼ tungah Topa heh a, keimah in Jordan kantan loin Topa na Pasian un noteʼ gamh dingin hong piak leitang hoih ah ka lut loh nadingin a kiciam hi." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Hih gamah kei ka si dinga, Jordan khengin ka pai thei kei ding hi. Ahih hangin note in kantanin tua gam hoih na luah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Topa na Pasian un note tawh hong bawl thuciamna mangngilhin, Topa na Pasian un noteʼ hih dinga hong kham lim khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang a kiseek milim na bawl khak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh hong kaang tum thei mei tawh kibang a, a haza Pasian ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Note in tuleta nei-in gam sungah mi khangham na suah uh ciangin, na khat peuhpeuh tawh a kibang limin a kiseek milim bawlna le Topa na Pasian uhʼ muhna ah a sia bawlna tawh amah a heh nadingin na siat gamtat uh leh," 
Deuteronomy4:26 Jordan gal khat luah dingin na paina leitang uh ah na siat maimang baih nadingun noteʼ lang khat ah teci pang dingin tu ni-in vanlelei ka sam hi. Tua leitang tungah note sauvei na hing kei ding uh a, na sia maimang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Topa in mite lakah note hong thehthang dinga, Topa in note hong hawlna minamte lakah mi tawmcik bek na om lai ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Note in tua lai munah miteʼ khut in a bawl, khua mu thei lo, khua za thei lo, a ne thei lo, a nam thei lo sing le suang pasian-teʼ na na sem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ahih hangin tua lai panin Topa na Pasian uh na zong ding uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na zon uh leh amah na mu ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Note in gimna thuakin, mailam hunah hih nate khempeuh noteʼ tungah hong tun ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh lamah kihei-in ama thu na mang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh hehpihna a nei Pasian ahi hi. Amah in note hong tamasak loin, hong nusia lo dinga, na pate uh tawh a thuciamna mangngilh lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Pasian in leitungah mi a piansak ni a kipan, noteʼ pian ma-a hun beisa thu tu-in kan unla, van mong khat pan mong khat kikal thu zong kan un. Hih bang na lian piang ngei-in, a kiza ngei peuhmah hiam?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Note in Pasianʼ aw za khin napi-in na hin lai uh bangin meikuang sung panin pasian dang khat peuhpeuhʼ pauna aw mi khat peuhpeuh in za ngei ahi hiam? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Tua ahih kei leh, Topa na Pasian un Egypt gam sungah note adingin na muhna uh ah a bawlte khempeuh tawh a kibangin, ze-etna, lim, nalamdang, gal, a vanglian le a thahatna le a lauhuai mahmah tawh pasian dang khat peuhpeuh in ama mite adingin minamdang khat sung pan minam khat a va lak ding hanciam ngam ngei ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Topa Pasian hi, ci-in na theih nadingun noteʼ tungah hih thu hong kilak hi a, amah sim loh kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Amah in note hong khal theih nadingin vantung panin ama aw note hong zasak hi. A mei lianpi leitungah note hong musak a, mei sung panin ama aw na za uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Amah in na pate uh itin, amauʼ suanlekhakte hong teel a, a mahmah in ama vanglian tawh Egypt panin note hong paikhiatpih a," 
Deuteronomy4:38 note sangin a tam zaw le a vanglian zawteʼ gamah hong paipihin, noteʼ luah dingin amauʼ leitang hong piak nadingin noteʼ mai ah amaute hong hawl khiatsak ahih manin tu ni-in hih bangin na om thei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Tua ahih ciangin tunga om vantung hitaleh nuai-a om leitung hitaleh Topa pen Pasian ahihna thu tu ni-in thei unla, na lungsim uh ah ciamteh un; kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Tua ahih ciangin note le noteʼ khit a na tate uh tungah thu hong nuamin, Topa na Pasian un a tawntung a hong piak gam sungah na khan uh na sausak theih nadingun tu ni-a no kiangah kong gen ahi ama thukhamte le a thupiakte na zui ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Tua ciangin, a beisa hunah amah tawh kilangneihna a om lo, tum lopi-in a veengpa a that, mi that khapa va tai-in, hih khuapite khat peuhpeuh ah taina tawh a suahtak theih nadingin Moses in nisuahna lam Jordan gal khat ah khuapi thum a tuam koih hi." 
Deuteronomy4:42  
Deuteronomy4:43 Reuben mite adingin mualzang sehnel gam Beza khua, Gad mite adingin Gilead gam sung Ramoth khua le Manasseh mite adingin Bashan gam sung Golan khua ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Moses in Israel mite tungah thu pia hi. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Hihte pen, Egypt gam panin a pai khiat-un Moses le Israel mite in a zawh Heshbon ah a teeng Amor miteʼ kumpipa Sihonʼ gam sung, Jordan gal, Beth-peor tawh a kigal sai kuam sungah, Egypt panin Israel mite a paikhiat lai-in Moses in amaute tungah a gen thute ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 Amaute in, Arnon kuam mong a a om Aroer panin Sirion Mual (Hermon a cihna) dong, Jordan nisuahna lam a om Arabah gam khempeuh, Pisgah mual pang nuai Arabah tuipi dong tawh, kumpi Sihonʼ leitang le Bashan kumpi Ogʼ leitang, Jordan gal khat nisuahna lamah a teeng Amor kumpi nihteʼ leitang a luah uh hi." 
Deuteronomy4:48  
Deuteronomy4:49  
Deuteronomy5:1 Moses in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Israel-te aw, tu ni-a noteʼ zakin kong gen thukhamte le ngeina kipte ngai unla, note in thei-in limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsun ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Topa i Pasian in eite tawh Horeb ah thuciamna khat bawl hi. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Topa in i pute i pate bek tawh hih thuciamna a bawl hi loin, tu ni-a a hing lai eite khempeuh tawh zong a bawl ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Noteʼ tungah Topaʼ thu a gen dingin Topa le noteʼ kikalah ka din laitakin, mei sung panin tua mualah Topa in kimaituahin note hong hopih a, mei hangin note lau na hih manun mual tungah na pai to kei uh hi. Amah in:" 
Deuteronomy5:5  
Deuteronomy5:6 “‘Kei pen salsuahna Egypt leitang panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. 
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Keimah longal pasian dang na nei kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “‘A kiseek milim hitaleh, tunga vantung hitaleh, nuai-a leitung hitaleh, leinuai-a om tui sung hitaleh a om na khat peuhpeuh a sun khat peuhpeuh note adingin na bawl kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Amauteʼ mai ah kun loin, amauʼ na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa noteʼ Pasian, a aam Pasian ka hi a, kei hong mudahteʼ tungah a pateʼ mawhna a tateʼ tungah khang thum khang lina dongin thuk-in," 
Deuteronomy5:10 ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampiteʼ tungah itna kip a lak pa ka hi hi. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “ Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ min a sia lamin na zang kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama min a sia lamin a zang mi a mawh lo hi, ci lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “‘ Topa noteʼ Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na sianthosak nadingun Sabbath ni tang un. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ni guk sung na semin na nasep ding khempeuh uh na hih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:14 Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-in note bangin na nasem numei le na nasem pasalte uh a tawlngak theih nadingin note, na tapate, na tanute, na nasem nute, na nasempate, na bawngtal, na la, na ganhing khat peuhpeuh uh le na huang sung uh a om zinte in na khat peuhpeuh sem lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Egypt ah nasem na hihna uh le tua lai panin Topa na Pasian un a vangliatna khut le a thahatna tawh hong paikhiat pihna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Sabbath ni na tan ding uh Topa noteʼ Pasian in thu hong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy5:16 “‘ Topa noteʼ Pasian in hong piak leitang tungah na khan uh sau-in na nopsak theih nadingun Topa noteʼ Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na nu na pa uh zahtak un. 
Deuteronomy5:17 “‘Mi na that kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “‘Nulepa mawhna zong na bawl kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “‘Na na gu kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “‘Na veengte uh lang khat ah zong a man loin teci na pang kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “‘Na veengte uh zi zong na deihgawh kei ding uh hi. Na veengteʼ inn, a lo, a nasem pa, a nasem nu, a bawngtal, a la, ahih kei leh na veengteʼ na khat peuhpeuh na deihgawh kei ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Deuteronomy5:22 “ Topa in mei, meii le a mial mahmah sung panin awging lianpi tawh mual tunga no a kikhawm khempeuh tungah hih thute hong gen a, amah in bangmah dang gen thuah lo hi. Amah in suangpek nih tungah tuate gelhin, tua suangpeekte kei tungah hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Mei in mual a kat laitakin khuamial sung panin awging na zak uh ciangin minam lutang khempeuh le upate kei kiangah hong pai uh hi. 
Deuteronomy5:24 Note in, ‘En in, Topa i Pasian in a minthanna le a liatna eiteʼ tungah hong lak khin a, mei sung panin ama awging i za khin hi. Pasian in mi hopih napi, mi a hing lai veve-in tu ni-in i mu hi." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin tu-in eite si ding ihi hiam? Hih mei lianpi in eite hong kaang tum ding hi. Topa i Pasianʼ awging za lai lehang eite i si ding hi. 
Deuteronomy5:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh a si thei mihing khempeuh sung panin eiteʼ zak bangin mei sung panin a nungta Pasian a pau khiatna awging za-in a nungta lai kua om ahi hiam? 
Deuteronomy5:27 A nai ah va pai inla, Topa i Pasian in a gen ding khempeuh va za in. Topa i Pasian in nang tungah hong gen teng koʼ tungah nang hong gen sawn in. Kote in hong mangin ka sem ding uh hi,’ nong ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Kei kiangah nong gen uh ciangin Topa in na thu uh a za hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih mite in nang kiangah hong gen uh thu ka za khin a, a gen khempeuh uh a manin gen uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Amaute le a suan a khakte uh a nopsak tawntung theih nadingun keimah zahtak ding le ka thupiak khempeuh zuih ding hih bang ngaihsutna nei tawntung le-uh ka deih ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy5:30 Pai inla amaute kiangah, “Na puanbuk uh ah ciah un,” ci in." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ahih hangin nang, kei kiang hih lai ah ding in. Amauteʼ neih dingin ka piak leitang ah amaute in a zuih theih nadingun amaute na hilh ding thupiakna le thukhamte le ngeina kipte khempeuh nang tungah kong gen ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian un note hong thupiak bangin na gamtat ding uh na kingaihsun ding uh a, ama thu panin taklam hitaleh veilam hitaleh ah na pial kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Note nungta-in, nuamsa-in na luah ding uh leitang ah sawtpi na nuntak nadingun Topa na Pasian un note hong thupiakna lampi khempeuh na tawn ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Tu-in, luah dinga na paina gam uh ah na zuih dingun, note le na tapate uh le na suanlekhakte un Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ thukhamte le a thupiakte na zuihna uh tawh amah na zahtak theih nadingun, Topa na Pasian un na nuntak tawntung uh na zuih dingun kei a hong hilh sawnsak thute pen hih thupiakna, thukhamte le ngeina kipte ahi hi. Hihte pen na khan uh a sau theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy6:2  
Deuteronomy6:3 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te aw, note nuamsa-in, Topa, na pate uh Pasian in note tungah hong ciam sa bangin bawngnawi le khuaizu a luanna gamah tampi pha-in na khan theih nadingun hih thute za unla, na zuih ding uh ngaihsun un." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Israel-te aw, za un: Topa i Pasian, Topa khat bek ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Topa noteʼ Pasian, na lungsim khempeuh uh, na nuntakna khempeuh uh le na thahatna khempeuh uh tawh na it ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Tu ni-a no kong piak hih thute na lungsim uh ah om ding hi. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Na tate uh tungah limtakin na hilh ding uh a, na inn sung uh ah na tut uh ciang, lampi ah na pai uh ciang, na lup ciang uh le na thawh ciangun tua thute na gengen ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Na khut tung uh ah lim dingin tuate na hen ding uh a, na mitte uh kikalah tuate pen talsuante bang hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Na inn kongkhak khuam tung uh le na kongpi uh tungah tuate na gelh ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “ Topa na Pasian un note piak dingin na pate uh Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah a ciam, noteʼ phuh loh a lian a hoih khuapite," 
Deuteronomy6:11 noteʼ khol loh na hoih khempeuh tawh a kidim innte, noteʼ bawl loh tuibeem, noteʼ suan loh leengguite le oliv kungte a omna leitang ah hong paipihin, note in ne-in na kham uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy6:12 salsuahna Egypt leitang panin hong paikhiatpih Topa na mangngilh khak loh nading uh kidawm un. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak ding uh hi. Ama na bek na sem ding uh a, ama min tawh na kiciam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Noteʼ kiim a om miteʼ pasian-te ahi pasian dangteʼ nung na zui kei ding uh hi; 
Deuteronomy6:15 bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ lakah a om Topa na Pasian uh a aam Pasian ahi hi. Tua bang hikeileh noteʼ tungah Topa na Pasian uh hong hehin, lei maitang panin note hong susia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Massah munah amah na ze-et uh bangin Topa na Pasian uh na ze-et nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Amah in note hong thupiak sa ahi Topa na Pasian un hong thupiakte khempeuh na zui ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy6:18 Topaʼ hong ciam sa bangin noteʼ mai panin na langte khempeuh uh nawh khiatna tawh na pu na pate uh tungah piak dingin Topa in a ciam sa leitang hoih note in na luah theih nading uh le note na nopsak theih nadingun Topaʼ muhna ah a man le a hoih nate na sem ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy6:19  
Deuteronomy6:20 “Hong tung ding hunah na tapate un, ‘ Topa i Pasian in note hong piak hih thute, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh ciangin" 
Deuteronomy6:21 na tapate uh kiangah, ‘Eite pen Egypt gam sungah Faroʼ silate ihi a, Topa in Egypt panin a vangliatna tawh hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Topa in eiteʼ muhna ah a lian a nasia lim le nalamdangte Egypt mite le Faro le a uliante khempeuh tungah lak hi. 
Deuteronomy6:23 Amah in i pu i pate tungah piak dinga a ciam leitang ah hong paipihin, eite hong piak theih nadingin tua lai panin eite hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Tu hun a bangin i nuntak theih nadingin amah in eiteʼ hoih tawntung ding a deihna-in, Topa i Pasian zahtakin hih thukhamte khempeuh i zuih ding Topa in thu hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Amah in eite hong thupiak bangin Topa i Pasianʼ mai ah hih thupiakte khempeuh limtakin zui lehang eite adingin thumanna hi ding hi,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:1 “ Topa na Pasian un luah dinga na tumna uh leitang ah hong paipihin, noteʼ mai ah Hit mite, Girgash mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite, note sangin lian zaw-in a thahat zaw minam sagihte noteʼ mai panin siang khiasakin," 
Deuteronomy7:2 Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia-in, note in amaute na zawh uh ciangin, note in amaute na susia mang ding uh hi. Amaute tawh thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh a, amaute tungah hehpihna na lak kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Amaute tawh kiteeng loin, na tanute uh amauʼ tapate pia loin, a tanute uh na tapate uh adingin na la kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh pasian dangteʼ na a sem dingin Topa zuihna panin na tapate uh amaute in hei khia ding uh hi. Tua ciangin no tungah Topa hong hehin note hong susia pak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy7:5 Amaute tungah hih bangin note na gamta ding uh hi: A biakna taute uh phelsakin, a biakna songte uh deng zanin, amauʼ Asherah milimte phuksakin, a kiseek a milimte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:6 “Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah a siangtho mi na hi uh hi. Leitung a om mite khempeuh sung panin ama mi ahi dingin Topa na Pasian un note hong teel zo hi. 
Deuteronomy7:7 “ Topa in note hong itin hong teelna pen midangte sangin na tamzawkna hang uh hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh lakah a tawm pen na hi uh hi. 
Deuteronomy7:8 Topa in salsuahna Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ khut sung panin note hong hon khia-in a vangliatna tawh hong paikhiat pihna pen Topa in note hong itin, na pate uh tunga a kiciam thuciam a zuihna hang ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh amah bek ahi Pasian hi a, amah itin a thupiakna a zuite tungah khang tul khat dongin thuciamna le itna kip lenin a thuman Pasian," 
Deuteronomy7:10 amah a mudah mite, suksiatna tawh a thuk pah pa ahihna thei un. Amah a mudah mi tungah zekai loin a maitang mahah thuk ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-a no kong piak thute khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh ngaihsun un. 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Note in hih ngeina kipte za-in, kemin tuate na zuihna hangun, Topa na Pasian un na pu na pate uh tungah a ciam thuciamna le itna kip note tungah hong tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Amah in note hong itin, tampi hong phasak ding hi. Amah in note tungah piak dingin na pu na pate uh tungah a ciam gam sungah noteʼ suanlekhakte le na gam sung panun a piangte, na an uh le na leenggahzu uh le na sathau uh le na ganhingte uh pungsakin, na tuulekeel no honte uh zong thupha pia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Midangte khempeuh sangin note thupha hong kilim piak zaw ding hi. Noteʼ lak hitaleh na ganhingte uh lak hitaleh ah a nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a ciing om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Topa in noteʼ tung panin natna khempeuh la khia ding hi. Note in na theih sa uh ahi Egypt gam a natna siate noteʼ tungah khat zong hong tung lo dinga, ahih hangin no hong mudahte khempeuh tungah tuate tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Topa na Pasian un note tungah hong piak mi khempeuh na beisak ding uh a, amaute na khasiat kei ding uh hi. Note adingin thangzak hi ding ahih manin amauʼ pasian-te zong na bia kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Na lungsim uh ah, ‘Hih minamte ei sangin tam zaw hi. Amaute bangci suankhiat zawh ding ihi hiam?’ na cih khak uh leh," 
Deuteronomy7:18 amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un Faro le Egypt mite khempeuh tungah a hih," 
Deuteronomy7:19 na mitte un a muh sa a lian ze-etnate, limte, nalamdangte, a vangliatna le Topa na Pasian un hong paikhiat pihna a thahatna na phawk ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un na kihtak uh mi khempeuh tungah tua bangin hih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Tua tham loin, a om lai mite le no kiang panin a bu mite a siat khit dong matengin Topa na Pasian un amauteʼ lakah tunpi khah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Note in amaute na kihta kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a lian a kihtakhuai ahi Pasian, Topa na Pasian uh note tawh a om hi." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ mai ah hih minamte tawmtawmin siang khiasak ding hi. Note adingin gamsate hong tam khan lua kha ding ahih manin thakhat thu-in amaute na beisak kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un note tungah amaute hong pia dinga, amaute a bei matengin kibuaisak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Amah in noteʼ khut sungah amauteʼ kumpite hong pia dinga, note in mun khempeuh panin amauteʼ min na maimangsak ding uh hi. Amaute na susia mangkhin ding uh a, noteʼ lang khat ah mi khat beek hong pang zo lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy7:25 A kiseek amauʼ pasian milimte mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. Tua nate ah na awk khak loh nadingun amauteʼ tunga a om kham le ngun deihgawh loin, note adingin na la kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Noteʼ inn sungah a kihhuai nate na tumpih kei ding uh a, tua nate tawh kibangin samsiat a thuak mi na kisuaksak kei ding uh hi. Note in tua nate mudah mahmah in na kih ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua nate a kisamsia na ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Note nungta-in tampi na phak theih nading uh le na pu na pate uh tungah piak dinga Topa a kiciam sa leitang ah va pai-in na neih theih nadingun tu ni-a note kiangah kong gen thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy8:2 A thupiakte na zui uh hiam, na zui kei uh hiam cih a theih nadingin note hong niamkhiatin, na lungsim uh ah bang om hiam cih a theih nadingin Topa na Pasian un sehnel gamah hih kum sawm li sung note hong paipihna lampi khempeuh na ciamteh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Mite, an bek tawh nungta loin Topaʼ kam sung panin a pusuak thu khempeuh tawh nungta hi, ci-in note hong theihsak nadingin, amah in note hong niamkhiatin hong gilkialsak a, note hitaleh na pu na pate uh hitaleh a theih ngei loh manna tawh hong vak hi." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hih kum sawm li sung noteʼ tunga om na puan uh sia loin, na khe uh zong bawk lo hi." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Tua ahih manin mi khat in a tapa a khal bangin Topa na Pasian un note hong khalna thu na lungsim uh ah thei un. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tua ahih ciangin ama lampi zuihna le amah zahtakna tawh Topa note Pasianʼ thupiakte na zui ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy8:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa noteʼ Pasian in, mual le guam ah a luang tuite a omna, ciktui le tuikhuk a omna leitang," 
Deuteronomy8:8 mangbuh le mangbuhham, leenggui le theikung le mang kawlsing a omna leitang, oliv kungte le khuaizu a omna leitang," 
Deuteronomy8:9 bangmah kisam loin, cil bawl loin an na nek nading uh leitang, a suangte sik ahihna leitang, mualte sung panin sumsan na tawh theihna uh leitang ahi gam hoih ah note hong paipih hi." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Note in ne-in na gil uh vah dinga, note tungah gam hoih hong piakna hangin Topa na Pasian uh na phat ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Tu ni-a no tungah kong gen ahi ama thupiaknate le a ngeina kipte le a thukhamte zuih lohna tawh Topa na Pasian uh mangngilh kha ding na hih manun kidawm un. 
Deuteronomy8:12 Tua hikeileh, an ne-in na kham uh ciang, inn hoihte lamin tuate sungah na ten uh ciang," 
Deuteronomy8:13 na bawnghonte uh le na tuuhonte uh tampi a phak ciang le na khamte uh le na ngunte uh tampi pha-in, na neih khempeuh uh tampi a phak ciangin" 
Deuteronomy8:14 na lungsim uh lianin, salsuahna Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih," 
Deuteronomy8:15 a lian a lauhuai sehnel gamah gul gu nei le momai lak le tui om lohna lei keu ah a hong paipih pa, meisuang tawh a kibang suangpi panin tui a hong pia pa," 
Deuteronomy8:16 a tawpna ah a hoihin na gamtat theih nading uh a deihna-in note hong niamkhiatin a hong ze-et theih nadingin na pu na pate un a theih loh manna tawh sehnel gamah a hong vak Topa na Pasian uh na mangngilh kha ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy8:17 Na lungsim uh ah, ‘Ka vangliatna uh le ka thahatna un hih hauhna hong ngahsak hi,’ ci kha ding na hih manun kingaihsun un." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tu ni-a mah bangin na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciamna a kipsak theih nadingin, na hauh nadingun vangliatna a hong pia pa amah ahih manin Topa na Pasian uh na phawk ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Topa na Pasian uh mangngilhin pasian dangteʼ nung zui-in tuateʼ na semin na biak uh leh, na sia taktak ding uh hi, ci-in tu ni-in limtakin kong hilh khol hi." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ aw ngai lo ahih manun, Topa in noteʼ mai ah a siatsak minamte bangin note na sia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Israel-te aw, za un; note sangin tam zaw-in a thahat zaw minamte, lianin van banin kulhpi a kiciang to khuapite, na theih sa uh mi ahi a pum lian a tun sang Anak mite, ‘Anak mite, kua in do zo ding ahi hiam?’ a kicih na zak ngei mite uh a suan khia dingin Jordan a kantan ta ding na hi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:2  
Deuteronomy9:3 Tua ahih ciangin, a kaang tum thei mei bangin noteʼ mai ah a pai pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahihna thu tu ni-in thei un. Amah in noteʼ mai ah amaute susia-in, amaute zo gawp ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in note tungah hong ciam sa bangin amaute hawl khia-in manlangin nasiasak mang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “ Topa na Pasian un note mai panin amaute a nawhkhiat khit ciangin, na lungsim uh ah, ‘Hih leitang a luah dingin Topa in hong paipihna pen komauʼ thumanna hang ahi hi,’ ci kha kei un. Topa in na mai uh ah amaute a hawl khiatna pen hih minamteʼ gitlohna hang hizaw hi." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Na thumanna hang uh ahi a, na lungsim manna hang uh tawh ahi zongin amauʼ leitang a luah ding na hi kei uh hi. Topa na Pasian un na mai panun amaute a hawl khiatna pen hih minamteʼ gitlohna hang le Topa in na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah a thuciamna kammal a kipsak theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:6 “Tua ahih ciangin noteʼ thumanna hangin Topa na Pasian un na tan dingun hih leitang hoih note tungah hong pia ahih lohna thei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen lungsim khauh mi na hi uh hi. 
Deuteronomy9:7 “ Topa na Pasian uh sehnel gamah phinin na hehsakna uh phawk unla, mangngilh kei un. Egypt gam panin na paikhiat ni uh a kipan hih lai na tun dongun Topa langpanin na lehdo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb mual nangawn ah a heh nadingin Topa na phin uh a, noteʼ tungah Topa heh a, amah in note hong susia dektak hi." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Topa in note tawh a bawl thuciamna suangpeekte a sang dingin mual tungah ka pai toh lai-in, mual tungah sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung ka om a, an ne lo, tui dawn loin ka om hi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Pasianʼ khut tawh a kigelh suangpek nihte kei tungah Topa in hong pia hi. Kikhop ni-in mei sung panin note tungah Topa in hong gen sa kammal khempeuh tua suangpeekte tungah om hi. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Sun sawm li le zan sawm li a cin ni-in kiciamna suangpek nihte Topa in kei hong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Kithawi inla, hih lai panin pai suk mengmeng in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin na paikhiatpih mite a sia-in gamta khin uh hi. Amaute ka thupiakna panin kihei khia pak uh a, amaute adingin a kisung milim khat bawl khin uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Tua tham loin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih mite ka mu khin a, a lungsim khauh mite ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Amaute susia-in mun khempeuh panin amauteʼ min ka phiat theih nadingin kei guak hong omsak in. Amaute sangin a vanglian zaw, a tam zaw minamin nang kong bawl ding hi,’ hong ci lai hi." 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Tua ahih ciangin kihei-in mual tung panin kong pai suk a, mei in mual kaangin na kuang hi. Kiciamna suangpek nihte ka khut nihte sungah om hi." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh, Topa na Pasian tung uh ah na khial khin takpi uh a, a kisung bawng no milim amaute adingin na bawl uh hi. Topa in note hong thupiakna panin na kihei khia pak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Tua ahih ciangin suangpek nihte la-in ka khut nihteʼ sung panin lawnin noteʼ muhna ah ka sukham hi. 
Deuteronomy9:18 Tua ciangin a masa-a bangin sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung Topaʼ mai ah kunin ka om a, ama heh nadingin phinin, Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamtatna tawh noteʼ khialhnate khempeuh hangin an ne lo, tui dawn loin ka om hi." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ tungah Topaʼ hehna le a lungkim het lohna, note susia dingin a kithawina hangin ka lau hi. Ahih hangin tua hunin zong Topa in keiʼ thu hong ngai hi." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Aaronʼ tungah Topa heh mahmah a, amah susia dingin kithawi a, tua hun mahin Aaron ading zong thu ka ngen hi." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Tua ciangin noteʼ khialhna, na bawl sa uh bawng no, mei tawh halin sukhamin, leivui bangin a neel dongin ka gawizan hi. Tua ciangin mual tung panin a hong luang suk lui sungah a vuite ka lawn hi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Taberah, Massah le Kibroth-hattaavah munte ah zong Topa phinin na hehsak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Topa in Kadesh-barnea panin note hong sawlin, ‘Pai to unla note kong piak leitang luah un,’ hong cih lai-in Topa na Pasian uh hong thupiakna nialin, amah um loin, ama aw na ngai kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Note kong theih ni a kipan Topa na nial uh hi. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa in note ka susia ding ci ahih manin hih sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung Topaʼ mai ah kunin ka om hi. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Topaʼ tungah thu ka ngen a, ‘Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in na liatna tawh na hotkhiat sa, na vangliatna tawh Egypt panin na paikhiatpih na mite le na luahte susia kei in." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Na nasem Abraham, Isaac le Jakob phawk inla, hih mihingteʼ lungsim khauhna hitaleh a gitlohna uh hitaleh a khialhna uh hitaleh thusim kei in." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Tua bang hikeileh kote nong paikhiat pihna gam mite in, “ Topa in amaute tungah a ciam sa leitang ah amaute paipih zo loin, amah in amaute mudah ahih manin, sehnel gamah amaute a that dingin paikhiatpih hi,” ci kha ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen na vangliatna le na thahatna tawh na paikhiatpih na mihingte le na luahte ahi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Tua hun laitakin Topa in kei kiangah, ‘A masa-a bangin suangpek nih seekin, mual tung ka kiangah hong pai inla, sing singkuang khat bawl in." 
Deuteronomy10:2 A masa-a suangpek na suk khapteʼ tunga thute tua suangpeekte tungah ka gelh dinga, singkuang sungah tuate na koih ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Tua ahih ciangin singkha sing tawh singkuang khat bawlin, a masa-a bangin suangpek nih ka seek a, ka khut sungah a peek nihte tawi-in mual tungah ka pai to hi." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Kikhop ni-in mei sung panin mual tungah Topa in note tungah hong gen sa thupiak sawmte, a masa-a a kigelh bangin tua suangpeekte tungah amah in gelh a, tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah tua suangpeekte hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Tua ciangin kihei-in mual tung panin ka pai suk a, ka bawl sa singkuang sungah tua suangpeekte ka koih hi. Topa in kei hong thupiak bangin suangpeekte tua sungah a om hi." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Beeroth Bene-jaakan panin Moserah ah Israel mite zin uh hi. Tua lai ah Aaron si a, tua lai munah kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Eleazar in siampi na sem hi." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Tua lai panin Gudgodah ah pai uh a, Gudgodah panin lui tuite a omna gam Jotbathah ah pai uh hi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Tua hun laitakin Topa in, tu ni dongin ama na a sem ding le ama min tawh thupha a pia dingin Topaʼ mai ah dingin, Topaʼ thuciamna singkuang a pua dingin Levi minamte a tuam koih hi." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Tua ahih ciangin a sanggamte uh bangin Levi mite in tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin nei lo uh a, Topa na Pasian un amau kiangah a gen bangin Topa pen amauʼ luah ahi hi.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “A masa-a bangin sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung mual tungah ka om a, Topa in tua hunin zong ka thu hong ngai a, Topa in note hong susia nawn lo hi." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amaute tungah piak dingin a pu a pate uh tungah ka kiciam leitang ah pai-in a luah theih nadingun ding inla, na khualzin uh zomin mite mai ah pai in,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Israel-te aw, tu-in, Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding, ama lampite tot ding, amah it ding, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ na sep ding," 
Deuteronomy10:13 le nomauʼ hoih nadingin tu ni-a kong gen thupiaknate le Topaʼ thukhamte zuih ding cih sim loh, Topa na Pasian un noteʼ tung panin bang dang hong kal ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 En un, vantung le vantung a sang pente le leitung le a sunga om khempeuh pen Topa noteʼ Pasian-aʼ ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Tua hi napi-in Topa in na pu na pate uh a itna lian mahmah ahih manin tu ni-a mah bangin midangte khempeuh sangin amauʼ suanlekhakte hong teel zaw hi. 
Deuteronomy10:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thu mang unla, lungkhauh nawn kei un." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh a lian, a vanglian, a kihtakhuai Pasian, angvan nei loin, sumgolh a la lo, pasian-teʼ Pasian, topateʼ Topa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Amah in pa nei lote le meigong numeite adingin thutang semin, peemtate itin an le puan a pia hi." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Tua ahih ciangin peemtate it un; bang hang hiam cih leh note zong Egypt gamah peemta na hi uh hi. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Topa noteʼ Pasian na zahtak ding uh a, ama na semin, amah beelin, ama min tawh na kiciam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Amah pen nomauʼ phat ding ahi hi. Na mitte un a muh sa hih a lian a kihtakhuai nate note adingin hong bawlsak pa pen na Pasian uh ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy10:22 Na pu na pate uh mihing sawm sagih bek Egypt ah pai suk uh a, ahi zongin tu-in Topa na Pasian un vantung aksi zahin note hong tamsak hi." 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh itin ama hong thuhilhna, a thukhamte, a ngeina kipte, a thupiakte na zui tawntung ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Tu ni-in ngaihsun un (a thei nai lo, a mu nai lo na tate uh tungah a gen hi lo ka hih ciangin), Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ hong thuhilhna, ama liatna, a vangliatna le a thahatna," 
Deuteronomy11:3 Egypt kumpipa Faro le a leitang tung khempeuh ah a hih Egypt gam sunga ama limte le a sepnate; 
Deuteronomy11:4 Egypt galkapte, a sakolte le a leengte tungah a hihte; note hong delh laitakin San Tuipi tawh amaute tuumsakin, tu ni dongin Topa in amaute a suksiatna;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 hih mun na tun matengun sehnel gamah amah in note tungah hong hihte; 
Deuteronomy11:6 Reubenʼ tapa Eliab, a tapa Dathan le Abiram tungah a hihte; leitang a kam ka-in Israel khempeuh lakah a innkuanpihte, a puanbukte le amau a zuite khempeuh tawh amaute a nawmvalhna ngaihsun un." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ hih sa a nasepna a liante khempeuh na mitte un mu khin hi. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Tua ahih ciangin note thahatin, na luah ding uh leitang ah va pai-in na luah theih nading uh le, Topa in na pu na pate uh le a suanlekhakte uh tungah piak dingin a kiciam, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gamah sauvei na nuntak theih nadingun tu ni-a kong gen thupiakna khempeuh na zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:9  
Deuteronomy11:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh luah dinga na lut nading uh leitang pen noteʼ hong pai khiatna, anteh cinna huan banga khaici vawhin tui na buah nadingun nakpi takin na semin tui na lakna uh Egypt leitang tawh kibang lo hi." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Note va pai-in na luah ding uh leitang pen, vantung panin guahtui a ngah mual le guam a omna leitang," 
Deuteronomy11:12 Topa na Pasian un a kep leitang hi a, kum kipat a kipan kum bei dongin Topa noteʼ Pasian in tua leitang en tawntung hi." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “ Topa na Pasian uh itin, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh ama na na sep nadingun tu ni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate na zuih uh leh," 
Deuteronomy11:14 na an uh le na leenggahzu uh le na sathau uh na kaihkhop theih nadingun amah in guah masa le guah nunung, a hunin na leitang uh adingin hong zusak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Amah in na ganhingte uh adingin na gam sung uh ah lopa hong posak dinga, note in zong an ne-in na gil uh vah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Midangteʼ hong khemna hangin note kihei-in pasian dangteʼ na semin tuate na biakkhak loh nadingun kingaihsun un. 
Deuteronomy11:17 Tua hikeileh no tungah Topa hong hehin guah zu lo dinga, leitang in bangmah piangsak loin, Topa in no hong piak leitang hoih ah manlangin na siat pak theih nadingun amah in vantungte khakcip kha ding hi." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Tua ahih ciangin hih ka thugente na lungsim uh ah ciamtehin na ngaihsun ding uh hi. Na khut tung uh ah lim dingin na khih ding uh a, tuate pen na mitte uh kikalah talsuan hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Na tate uh tungah na hilh ding uh a, na inn sung uh ah na lut laitak, lampi ah na pai laitak, na lup ciang uh leh na thawh ciangun tuate genin na nei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Vantungte, leitungʼ tungah a om lai teng, amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciam gam sungah note le na tate uh khan a sau theih nadingin na inn kongkhak khuam uh le na kongpite uh tungah tuate na gelh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:21  
Deuteronomy11:22 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama lampi khempeuh zui-in, amah beelin, nomau zuih dingin kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh zuih ding na kingaihsut uh leh," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Topa in na mai uh ah a om hih minamte khempeuh hawl khia dinga, note sangin lian zaw-in a thahat zaw minamte na suan khia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Na khe un a sikna mun khempeuh nomau aʼ hi ding hi. Na gamgi uh sehnel gam panin Lebanon ciang dong le Eufratis gun panin nitumna tuipi dong hi ding hi. 
Deuteronomy11:25 Na lang uh ah kuamah pang zo lo ding hi. No tungah hong ciam bangin Topa na Pasian un na tot ding uh gam khempeuh tungah note hong kizahtakna le note hong kikihtakna tungsak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy11:26 “En un, tu ni-in na mai uh ah thupha khat le hamsiat khat ka koih hi." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Tu ni-a kong gen, Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate na zuih uh leh thupha hi a," 
Deuteronomy11:28 Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate mang loin, na theih nai loh uh pasian dangteʼ nungzui dingin tu ni-a no kong thupiakna panin na kiheikhiat uh leh hamsiat ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Luah dingin na lutna uh leitang ah Topa na Pasian un hong paipih ciangin Gerizim Mual tungah thupha taangko-in, Ebal Mual tungah hamsia na taangko ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Tua mualte, Jordan gal, lampi panin nitumna lam, Moreh tawsaw gei-a Gilgal gal khat, Arabah ah a teeng Kanaan miteʼ gam sungah om hi.)" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang a luah dingin Jordan kantanin a pai ding na hi uh hi. Tua leitang luahin a sungah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy11:32 tu ni-a note kong piak thukhamte le ngeina kipte khempeuh na zuih ding uh limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Hihte pen, leitungah na nuntak lai teng uh Topa, na pu na pate uh Pasian in na neih dingun no hong piak sa gam sungah limtakin na zuih ding uh thukhamte le ngeina kipte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Na suankhiat ding uh minamte in a biakna mun mual sangte tung le mual neute tung le singniim nuai, mun khempeuh na susia taktak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Amauteʼ biakna taute phel khia-in, a biakna songte deng zanin, amauteʼ Asherah milimte mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. A kiseek amauʼ pasian-teʼ limte na phukpai ding uh a, tua mun panin amauʼ min na maimangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh tungah tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Topa na Pasian un na minam khempeuh uh sung panin ama min koih nadingin teelin, ama om nadinga a bawlna mun na zong ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Tua lai ah na pai ding uh a, na meihal biaknate uh le na biakpiaknate uh, note in na piak uh sawm-ah-khat le na piak thuahte uh, thuciamna biakpiakna, utthu-a na piakna, na bawng hon tacilte uh le na tuu hon tacilte uh tua lai ah na paipih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Topa na Pasian uh mai tua lai munah na ne ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piakna hangin na hihna khempeuh uh ah note le na innkuanpihte na lungdam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Tua hun ciangin mi khempeuh in ama hoihsak bangin a gamtat ngei ciat bangin na gamta nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un note hong piak tawlngakna le luahna ah na tung nai kei uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ahih hangin Jordan gal khat ah pai-in, Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak leitang ah teengin, nuam takin na nuntak theih nadingun na kiim uh a na langte khempeuh uh kiang panin tawlngakna hong piak ciangin," 
Deuteronomy12:11 Topa na Pasian un ama min om nading munin a teelna munah note kong sawl khempeuh na paipih ding uh hi. Na meihal biaknate uh le na biakpiaknate uh, note in na piak uh sawm-ah-khat le na piak thuahte uh le Topaʼ tungah na ciam uh na thuciam piaknate uh na paipih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Topa na Pasian uh mai ah note le na tapate uh le na tanute uh, na nasem numeite uh le na nasem pasalte uh le noteʼ neih bangin tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin a nei lo na khua sung uh a om Levi mite tawh lungdam khawm un." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Na tuahna mun peuh uh ah na meihal biaknate uh na piak loh nadingun kingaihsun un. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Na minamte uh sung panin Topa in a teelna mun khat ah na meihal biaknate uh pia-in, note kong thupiakte khempeuh tua lai munah na hih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Ahi zongin, Topa na Pasian un note tungah hong piak thupha tawh kizui-in na khuapite uh khat peuhpeuh sungah sa na deih zahzah uh go-in na ne thei ding uh hi. Sanang le sakhitalte a kinek mah bangin mi a nin le a siang kideidan loin na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:16 A si na ne kei bek ding uh hi; tui bangin leitungah a si na bua ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Na an uh sawm-ah-khat ahi a, na leenggahzu uh ahi a, na sathau uh ahi zongin, na bawng hon uh le na tuuhonte uh sung pan tacilte ahi zongin, na kiciamna uh ahi na thuciam uh biakpiakna khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, utthu-a na piakte uh ahi zongin, nomauʼ piak thuahte ahi zongin na khuapite uh sungah na ne thei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah note le na tapate le na tanute, na nasem numeite le na nasem pasalte le na khuapite uh sunga om Levi mite in Topa na Pasian uh mai ah na ne ding uh hi. Na hihna khempeuh uh ah Topa na Pasian uh mai ah na lungdam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Na gam sung uh ah na ten lai teng uh Levi mite na mangngilh loh nadingun kingaihsun un. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “No tungah hong ciam sa bangin Topa na Pasian un na gamgi uh hong sotsak ciangin, sa na duh manun, ‘Sa ka ne ding uh hi,’ na cih uh leh, na duh zahzah uh sa na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Topa na Pasian un ama min koih nadingin a teelna mun pen note kiang panin a gamla lua ahihleh, note kong thupiak sa bangin Topa in no hong piak sa na bawng hon uh pan ahi a, na tuu hon uh pan ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh na go thei ding uh a, na duh zahzah uh na khua sung uh ah na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sanang ahi a, sakhi tal ahi zongin a kinek mah bangin na ne thei ding uh a, mi a nin le a siang kideidan loin a kibangin na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:23 A si na nek loh ding uh thei tel un. Bang hang hiam cih leh si pen nuntakna hi a, nuntakna pen sa tawh na nekhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Si na ne kei ding uh a, tui bangin leitungah na bua khia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Topaʼ muhna ah a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note le noteʼ khit cianga na tate uh a nopsak theih nadingin si na ne kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Ahih hangin na bat uh a siangtho nate le na thuciamna uh na piaknate uh note in la-in Topa in a teelna munah na paipih ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy12:27 Topa na Pasian uh biakna tau tungah na meihal biakna uh, a sa le a si na pia ding uh hi. Na biakpiakna uh site Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ biakna tau tungah kibua khia dinga, ahih hangin a sa na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Topa na Pasian uh muhna ah a hoih le a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note le noteʼ khit cianga na tate uh a nopsak theih nadingin note kong thupiak khempeuh na kin ding uh limtakin ngaihsun un. 
Deuteronomy12:29 “ Topa na Pasian un na mai panun na suankhiat ding uh minamte beimangsakin, amaute suan khia-in amauʼ leitang ah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy12:30 na mai uh ah amaute a kisuksiat khit ciangin amaute zui-in na awk khak loh nading uh le, ‘Kei zong amauʼ hih bangin ka hih theih nadingin hih minamte in a pasian-te uh bangci biak ahi uh hiam?’ ci-in a pasian-te uh thu na kan loh nadingun kingaihsun un." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Topa na Pasian uh tungah tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a muhdah a kihhuai nam khempeuh amaute in a pasian-te uh adingin hih uh hi. A pasian-te uh adingin a tapate uh le a tanute nangawn uh mei sungah a hal uh hi. 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Note kong thupiak khempeuh na hih ding uh na lim ngaihsut ding uh hi. Na behlap kei ding uh a, zong na khiam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Note lakah kamsang khat ahi a, mangman khat ahi zongin hong khangin, lim ahi a, nalamdang ahi zongin hong lak a," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ama hong gen lim ahi a, nalamdang ahi zongin hong tungin, na theih ngei loh uh, ‘A dang pasian-teʼ nung zui-in amaute va bia ni,’ hong cih leh," 
Deuteronomy13:3 tua kamsang paʼ thu ahi a, mangman paʼ thu ahi zongin na ngai kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa noteʼ Pasian na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na it uh hiam cih a kitheih nadingin Topa na Pasian un no hong ze-etna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Topa na Pasian uh nung zui-in, amah na zahtak ding uh a, a thupiaknate zui-in a thu na ngai ding uh a, amah bia-in amah na beel ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Ahih hangin tua kamsang pa ahi a, mangman pa ahi zongin kithat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un na pai nadingun a hong thupiak na nusiat theih nading uh le Egypt leitang panin hong paikhiat pihin salsuahna panin hong hon khia Topa na Pasian uh langpangin na lehdo nading uh thu hong hilh ahi hi. Tua bangin noteʼ lak panin siatna na siang khiasak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Na sanggampa ahi a, na tanu ahih kei leh na tapa in ahi a, na ang sunga om na zi ahi a, nangmah banga na ngaihsut na lawm it in ahi zongin nang hong zol simin, leimong khat pan mong khat dong kikalah, nang kiang pan a nai ahi a, a gamla ahi zongin, nang hitaleh na pu na pate hitaleh in a theih ngei loh, na kiim a om miteʼ pasian-te, ‘Va pai-in pasian dangte va bia ni,’ hong cih leh" 
Deuteronomy13:7  
Deuteronomy13:8 ama cih mang loin, a thu ngai loin, amah hehpih loin, amah khah khong loin, amah na im kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Nangmah in amah na that ding hi. Amah a that dingin nangmah a masa pen na hi dinga, tua khit ciangin midangte khempeuh in hong zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Salsuahna ahi Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh kiang panin note hong paikhiatpih ding ngaihsun ahih manin suang tawh amah na deng lum ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in za-in lau ding uh a, hih banga gitlohna note lakah bawlkik ngei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “ Topa na Pasian un ten nadinga hong piak na khuapite uh khat peuhpeuh sungah," 
Deuteronomy13:13 mi ginalo pawl khat note lakah hong pai-in, ‘Pai-in pasian dangte va bia ni,’ ci-in na theih ngei lohte uh lamah khuapi sunga teeng mite a paikhiat pihna na zak uh leh," 
Deuteronomy13:14 note in a thu na kan ding uh a, zongin limtakin na dong ding uh hi. Note lakah tua banga a kihhuai-in gamtatna thu a om mah ahih takpi leh," 
Deuteronomy13:15 tua khua sunga mite namsau tawh na that ding uh a, khua sunga om mi khempeuh le a ganhingte, namsau tawh na susia mang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Note in van kinusiate khempeuh khua laizang mun awngah khawmin, Topa na Pasian uh tungah khuapi le van kinusia khempeuh meihal biakna bupin mei tawh na hal ding uh hi. Tua khuapi pen nin kikholna hi tawntung dinga, kilamkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Tu ni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate khempeuh zui-in Topa na Pasian uh mai ah a manin gamtatna tawh Topa na Pasian uhʼ aw na ngaih uh leh, na pu na pate uh tungah a ciam sa bangin, a kihtakhuai ama hehna panin Topa kihei-in note tungah migitna hong lakin, note tungah hehpihna hong nei-in, note tampi tak hong phaksak theih nadingin a ki-ap sa na khat beek zong note adingin na kem kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy13:18  
Deuteronomy14:1 “Note pen Topa na Pasian uh mite na hi uh hi. Misite hangin note ki-at keh loin, na sam uh zong na mettol kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a siangtho mite na hi uh a, leitung a om mite khempeuh sung panin ama neih dingin Topa in note hong teel ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “A kihhuai na khat peuhpeuh na ne kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Na nek theih ding uh ganhingte: Bawng, tuu, keel," 
Deuteronomy14:5 sakhi tal, sanang, sim sakhi, sathak, saza, zo sakhi le gamtuu ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ganhingte lak panin a khecin a ka, eknel a hai ganhing peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ahi zongin eknel a hai a, a khecin a ka ahi zongin na nek theih loh dingte uh: Kalaoh, bilpi le sakikhte in eknel a hai hangin a khecin ka lo ahih manin note adingin a nin ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Vok pen a khecin a kat hangin eknel hai lo ahih manin note-aʼ dingin a nin ahi hi. Tuateʼ sa ne loin, a si sate zong na lawng kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Tui sunga om khempeuh lak panin phe le lip a nei peuhmah na ne thei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Phe le lip a nei lo peuhmah na ne kei ding uh a, tuate pen no-aʼ dingin a nin ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Vasa a siang khempeuh na ne thei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ahih hangin na nek loh dingte uh: Muvanlai, musane, luimu," 
Deuteronomy14:13 mupi, mumeika, amau nam ciat;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 va-ak nam khempeuh; 
Deuteronomy14:15 vasa-kalaoh, pengpelep, vatawt, musi nam khempeuh;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 keising le simbu, gam vatawt" 
Deuteronomy14:17 le tui vatawt, samuat ne musane le tuimu," 
Deuteronomy14:18 gun vapi, gunva-zonei nam khempeuh; huihtun le bak ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Kha a nei insek ganhing khempeuh no adingin a nin ahi hi; tuate kine lo ding hi. 
Deuteronomy14:20 A leng thei insek ganhing a siangte khempeuh na ne thei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Ama thu-a a si tawm ganhing peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. A nek dingun na khua sung uh a om khual mite tungah na pia thei ding uh a, tua ahih kei leh zong gamdang mite tungah na zuak thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen Topa na Pasian uh tungah a siangtho mi na hi uh hi. “Keel no a piʼ nawizu tawh na huan kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “A kumkumin na lo uh ah a piang, na khaici panun a piang khempeuh sawm-ah-khat na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak tawntung nading uh na theih nadingun, ama min a ten nadingin a teelna mun Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah na an uh, na leenggahzu uh, na sathau uh sawm-ah-khat le na bawng hon uh le na tuu hon tacilte uh na ne ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Topa na Pasian un a min koih nadingin a teelna mun pen, Topa na Pasian un no thupha hong piak ciangin note kiang panin gamla lua a, no adingin lam a sau luat manin sawm-ah-khat na paipih zawh kei uh leh," 
Deuteronomy14:25 tuate sum na suah ding uh a, a sumte tunin, Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na pai ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy14:26 na deih peuhpeuh uh bawng ahi a, tuu ahi a, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin, na duh peuhpeuh uh leina-in a sum na zang ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh mai tua lai munah na ne ding uh a, note le na innkuanpihte uh na lungdam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Note bangin amaute in tanh le luah nei lo ahih manin na khua sung uh a om Levi mite na mangngilh kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Kum thum simin tua kum a noteʼ an piang sawm-ah-khat khempeuh hong paikhiat pihin na khua sung uh ah na khol ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy14:29 Topa na Pasian un na sepnate khempeuh uh ah thupha hong piak theih nadingin, note tawh kibangin amaute in tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin nei lo uh ahih manin noteʼ khua sunga om Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote le meigong numeite hong pai-in tua ante ne-in a gilvah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kum sagih a cin simin leiba maisakna na nei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Maisak nading zia in: Leitawi a pia mi khempeuh in a veengte tungah leitawi a a piak sate maisak ding hi. Topaʼ maisakna thu kigen khin ahih manin a veengpa, a sanggampaʼ tung pan kuamah in leiba siik nawn lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Gamdang miteʼ tung pan na siik thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggamte uh tung panin no-aʼ hong bat peuhmah na maisak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Ahih hangin tu ni-a kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh zui-in Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ aw na ngaih nak uh leh noteʼ lakah a zawng om lo ding hi (bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun gamhluahin hong piak leitang tungah Topa in note thupha hong pia ding hi). 
Deuteronomy15:5  
Deuteronomy15:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un hong ciam sa bangin note thupha hong pia dinga, minam tampi tungah leitawi na pia ding uh a, ahih hangin note in lei na tawi kei ding uh hi. Minam tampite na uk ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute in note hong uk lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak gam sunga na khuate uh khat peuhpeuh sungah na sanggam khat uh note lakah a zawng a om leh na lungsim uh khauhsak loin, na sanggam zawng pa uh huh loin na om kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Ama tungah na cingh gamtat ding uh a, bangbang hitaleh ama kisap zah na leitawi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Na lungsim uh ah ngaihsutna hoih lo omin, ‘Kum sagihna, maisakna kum hong nai hi,’ ci-in na sanggampa galmi et-in amah bangmah na piak loh uh ciangin na lang khat ah Topaʼ tungah amah kiko-in, no tungah khialhna a suahkhak ding kingaihsun un." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Citna tawh amah na pia ding uh a, amah na piak uh ciangin lungsim neihna na nei kei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un na sepna na hihna khempeuh uh ah hih thu hangin note thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitang tungah mizawng bei ngei lo ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Gam sungah a om na sanggampa, na a kisam mite le mizawngte tungah na cingh mahmah ding uh hi,’ ci-in thu kong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Na sanggampa, Hebru pasal khat ahi a, Hebru numei khat ahi zongin nang tungah hong kizuak leh, amah in nangma na kum guk sung hong sem dinga, a kum sagihna ciangin nang kiang panin a suakta-in na pai khiasak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Na kiang panin a suakta-in na pai khiatsak ciangin khuthawm guakin na paisak kei ding hi. 
Deuteronomy15:14 Na tuu hon lak, na ancilna le na leenggah sukna panin citna tawh tampi na pia dinga, Topa na Pasian in nang thupha hong piak zahin amah na pia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Egypt gamah sila na hihna uh le Topa na Pasian un note hong suahtaksakna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih thu tu ni-in kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Ahih hangin amah in note nuam hong sa-in, nang le na innkuanpihte hong it ahih manin ‘Nang kiang panin ka paikhia kei ding hi,’ hong cih leh," 
Deuteronomy15:17 phimpi khat la-in, kongkhak dapphahin a bil na vut dinga, na sila hi tawntung ding hi. Na sila numei zong tua bangmahin na hih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Na kiang panin a suakta-in amah na paisak ciangin haksa sa kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh a kicial nasem thaman lang tawh amah in nangma na kum guk sung hong sem khinzo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian un na hihna khempeuh uh ah thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Na bawng hon uh le na tuu hon uh panin tacil a pa khempeuh Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah na ap ding uh hi. Na bawng hon tacilte uh tawh na na sem kei ding uh a, na tuu hon tacilte uh zong a mul na met kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Topa in a teelna munah a kumkumin Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah na innkuanpihte uh tawh na ne ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ahih hangin poina khatpeuh, a khebai a mittaw, ahih kei leh poina lian khat peuhpeuh a neih leh, Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah biakna-in na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Na khua sung uh ah na ne ding uh hi. Sanang ahi a, sakhi ahi zongin a kinek bangin mi nin le mi siangte in a kibangin ne thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy15:23 A si na ne kei bek ding uh a, tui bangin leilak ah a si na bua khia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Abib kha tang unla, Topa na Pasian uh adingin Paisan Pawi bawl un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Abib kha sungin Topa na Pasian un Egypt gam panin zanin note hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Tuu hon pan ahi a, bawng hon pan ahi zongin Topa in ama min om nadingin a teelna munah Paisan Pawi biakpiakna Topa na Pasian uh tungah na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Silngo sawh anlum tawh na ne kei ding uh a, ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum, gimna anlum tawh na ne ding uh hi. Egypt gam panin nawhsa-in na tai khia uh hi. Egypt gam panin na taikhiat uh hun na nuntak sung tawntung uh na phawk theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Na gam sung khempeuh uh ah ni sagih sung note lakah silngo kimu lo ding hi. A ni masa nitakin biakpiakna ah na piak uh sa khat peuhpeuh zong a zingsang dong zan tawntung na omsak kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak khua khempeuh ah Paisan Pawi biakpiakna na pia thei kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:6 Topa na Pasian un ama min om nadingin a teelna mun bekah ni a tum khit nitak, Egypt panin na paikhiat uh hunin Paisan Pawi biakpiakna na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah huanin na ne ding uh a, zingsang ciangin na puanbukte uh ah na ciah thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Ni guk sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh a, a ni sagih ni-in Topa na Pasian uh adingin a thupi kikhopna khat na nei ding uh hi. Tua ni-in na na sem kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “An na lak masak ni uh a kipanin nipikal sagih na sim to ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Tua ciangin Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piakna tawh kizui-in na piak ding uh ahi noteʼ khut sung panin utthu-a piakna tawh Topa na Pasian uh tungah nipikal pawi na bawl ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Topa na Pasian uh mai, ama min om nadingin Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah, note a kipan na tanute le na tapate, na nasem numeite le na nasem pasalte, na khua sunga om Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote le note lakah a om meigong numeite tawh na lungdam khawm ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Egypt ah sila na hihna uh na phawk ding uh a, hih thukhamte zuih ding limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Na ancilna uh le na leenggah sukna panun an na kaihkhop uh ciangin ni sagih sung buk pawi na bawl ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Tua pawi sungah nang a kipan na tanute le na tapate, na nasem numeite le na nasem pasalte, Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote le na khua sunga om meigong numeite tawh na lungdam khawm ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Topa in a teelna munah ni sagih sung Topa na Pasian uh tungah pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note na lungdam khawm theih nadingun na khawh sa uh le na khut uh tawh na sepna khempeuh uh ah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Amah in a teelna mun, Topa na Pasian uh mai ah pasal khempeuh kum khatin thum vei, silngo sawh loh anlum pawi, nipikal pawi le buk pawi ah kilaak ding uh hi. Amaute khut hawmguakin Topaʼ mai ah kilak lo ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong piaknasa tawh kizui-in mi khempeuh in ama hih theih bang ciatin pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:17  
Deuteronomy16:18 “Na minam uh tawh kizui-in Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna khuate ah thukhente le uliante na koih ding uh a, amaute in a manin mite tungah thu khen ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Thutang na hei khia kei ding uh a, angvan tuam na nei kei ding uh hi. Sumgolh in mipilteʼ mit tawsakin thumanteʼ thu hei khia ahih manin sumgolh na la kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Note nungta-in Topa na Pasian un hong piak leitang na luah theih nadingun a thuman bekbekin na gamta ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Note in na bawl sa uh ahi, Topa na Pasian uh biakna tau kiangah Asherah milim dingin khuam khat peuhpeuh na phut kei ding uh hi."
