Deuteronomy16:22 Topa na Pasian un a muhdah biakna songpi na phut kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Bawng ahi a, tuu ahi zongin, poina a nei, kisapna khat peuhpeuh a om peuhmah Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah biakpiakna-in na pia kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topa noteʼ Pasian adingin a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “ Topa noteʼ Pasian in note hong piak khua khat peuhpeuh sungah numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin, ama thuciamna palsatin, Topa na Pasian uh muhna ah a sia-in a gamtatna kimu-in," 
Deuteronomy17:3 pasian dangteʼ na semin tuate bia ahi zongin, keimah in ka kham ahi ni ahi a, kha ahi a, vantung na khat peuhpeuhteʼ na semin bia ahi zongin," 
Deuteronomy17:4 no kiangah hong kigenin tua thu na zak uh leh, note in limtakin na kantel ding uh a, Israel-te sungah tua bang a kihhuai na a kigamtatna thu a om mah ahih takpi leh," 
Deuteronomy17:5 numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin tua banga a sia-in a gamta mi pen na khua pua uh ah na paipih ding uh a, tua numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin suang tawh na deng lum ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Teci nih ahih kei leh thum bang genna tawh a si ding pa kithat dinga, teci khat bek thugenna tawh mi kithat lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:7 A that dingin tecite masa dinga, tua khit ciangin midang khempeuh in hih ding uh hi. Tua bangin noteʼ sung panin hoih lohna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Mi khatlekhat kithah khakna, khatlekhat thu kituhna, mi khatlekhat kisatna, note adingin a haksa lua thu khat peuhpeuh noteʼ khua sungah khen ding hong om leh, note kithawi-in Topa na Pasian un a teelna mun," 
Deuteronomy17:9 Levi siampite le tua huna thukhente kiangah pai-in thu na dong ding uh a, amaute in note kiangah thukhen nading hong gen ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a teelna mun panin noteʼ tungah hong gen bangun na hih ding uh hi. Amaute in note tungah hong lah bangin limtakin na hih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy17:11 amaute in note tungah hong piak thuhilhna le note tungah hong gen uh thukhensatna tawh kizui-in na hih ding uh hi. Amaute in note tungah hong gen bang teekteekin na hih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah nasem dingin a ding siampipaʼ thu ahi a, thukhen paʼ thu ahi zongin man lohna tawh a khengval a a gamta mi peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Tua bangin Israel-teʼ sung panin hoih lohna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in za-in, kihta-in, a khengvalin gamta ngam nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang ah tungin, note in tua leitang nei-in a tungah na ten uh ciangin, ‘Eiteʼ kimkot a om minamte khempeuh mah bangin eiteʼ tungah kumpi khat i koih ding hi,’ na ci nuam kha ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Topa noteʼ Pasian in a teel mipa noteʼ tungah kumpi-in na koih thei takpi ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na mipihte bek uh lak panin kumpi-in mi khat na koih ding uh a, na sanggam uh ahi lo gamdang mi khat noʼ tungah na koih thei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Amah in ama aituam dingin sakol tampi nei lo ding hi. Topa in no kiangah, ‘Hih lampi tawnin na kilehkik ngei kei ding uh hi,’ hong ci ahih manin, amah in sakolte a lei dingin Egypt gamah mite paisak lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 A lungsim hei khia kha ding ahih manin zi la thuah lo dinga, ama adingin ngun le kham zong nakpi takin behlap lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ama kumpi tokhom tungah a tut ciangin Levi siampiteʼ kep hih thukhamte ama adingin laibu khat sungah gelh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy17:19 Hih thukham sunga thute le hih ngeinate kemin zuihna tawh Topa a Pasian zahtak ding a theih nading, a mipihte tungah ama lungsim a kiliatsak loh nading, thupiaknate them khat zong a pelh loh nading le Israel-te sung ahi ama kumpi gam sungah amah le a tate saupi a om theih nadingin amah in a nuntak sung tawntung tua sunga thute sim ding hi." 
Deuteronomy17:20  
Deuteronomy18:1 “Siampi ahi Levi minam khempeuh in Israel-te bangin tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin nei lo ding uh a, amaute in Topaʼ tungah mei tawh kihal biaknate le a kaih ngeite uh ne ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Amaute in a sanggamte uh lakah gamhluah nei lo ding uh a, amah in amaute tungah a ciam mah bangin Topa pen amauteʼ luah ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Bawng hitaleh tuu hitaleh biakna-in a pia miteʼ tung panin siampiteʼ kaih dingte: Amaute in siampiteʼ tungah a liang le a paang nihte le a gilpi pia ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:4 Na anpal, na leenggahzu, na sathau le na met masak uh na tuumul uh na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi minamte Topaʼ na a sem tawntung dingin na minam khempeuh uh sung panin Topa na Pasian un a teel ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Levi mi khat, Israel-te sung na khuapi uh khat peuhpeuh ahi ama teenna panin ama ut hun peuh ciangin Topaʼ teelna munah hong pai thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mai ah nasem dingin a om a lawm Levi midangte khempeuh mah bangin Topa a Pasianʼ min tawh na sem thei ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Amah in a gamhluah a zuakna pan a sum ngahte banah nek ding a kikimin amaute tawh tanh ngahkhawm ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:9 “ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang ah na tun uh ciangin, tua minamteʼ gamtatna a kihhuaite zuih ding na kisin kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Note lakah a tanu ahi a, a tapa ahi zongin biakna-in a zang, ai a saan, khong a khai, mailam thu a gen, ai a tawi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 bum a zang, van a kah, sikhate tawh a kiho, sikha thu a dong kuamah na om kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh hihte a hih mi peuhmah Topa adingin a kihhuai ahi hi. Hih bang a kihhuai gamtatnate hangin noteʼ mai panin Topa na Pasian un amaute hawl khia hi. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Note pen Topa na Pasian uh mai ah paubaang loin na om ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in na suankhiat ding uh hih minamte in khongkhaite le aisante thu ngai uh hi. Ahih hangin note na hih uh leh tua bangin na gamtat ding uh Topa na Pasian un hong phal lo hi. 
Deuteronomy18:15 “ Topa na Pasian un note lak ahi na sanggamte uh lak panin note adingin kei tawh a kibang kamsang khat hong khangsak ding hi. Note in ama thu na ngai ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Note in, ‘Si kha ding ka hih manun Topa koteʼ Pasianʼ aw hong zasakkik kei in. Hih a lian mei zong hong musak nawn kei in,’ ci-in na kikhop ni-un Horeb ah Topa na Pasian uh tung pan na deih bang uh hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amauteʼ hong ngetna thuman taktak hi." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Amau sanggamte lak panin nang tawh a kibang kamsang khat amaute adingin ka khangsak ding hi. Ama gen dingte ka hilh dinga, amah ka thupiak khempeuh amaute tungah a gen ding hi." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Amah in keima min tawh a gen ka thute a don lo mi peuhmahte kei mahmah in ka thuk ding hi. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ahih hangin keimah in thugen dingin thu pia lo napi-in keima min tawh thu a gen ngam kamsang pa hitaleh pasian dangteʼ min tawh thu a gen pa hitaleh, tua bang mite si ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Na lungsim sung uh ah, ‘ Topaʼ gen ahi lo thu bangci theih ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uh leh," 
Deuteronomy18:22 kamsang khat in Topaʼ min tawh thu genin, tua thu pen hong tung lo ahi a, a man lo ahi zongin hong hih leh, tua thu pen Topaʼ gen loh thu ahi hi. Kamsang pa in ama utthu a gen hi a, amah na kihtak ding uh kul lo hi." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “ Topa na Pasian un amauteʼ leitang note hong piak minamte beisakin, note in amaute suan khia-in, amauteʼ khuapite le innte ah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy19:2 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ neih dingin hong piak gam sungah note adingin khuapi thum na tuam koih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Mi a that kha peuhpeuh a tai theih nadingin Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun a hong piak leitang seh thumin khenin seh khat sungah khuapi khat ciat koihin a lampite na puah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:4 Mi khat sing a phuk dingin a veengpa tawh gamlak ah pai-in, sing a phuk dingin a khut tawh a hei vaanin, a heitang a ga panin kikhongin a veengpa kha-in a sih bang danin, mi khat in sawm lohpi, a beisa hunah amah tawh kigalneihna om lopi-in a veengpa a sihsak khak leh, hih khuapite khat peuhpeuh ah amah tai-in a nuntakna hu thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:5  
Deuteronomy19:6 Tua bang hikeileh, amah in a beisa hunah a veengpa tawh kigalneihna nei lo ahih manin sih nading thu om lo napi-in, a hehna tawh phula nuam pa in mi that khapa delhin lampi a gamlatna hangin amah pha-in a si dingin liamsak kha ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Tua ahih ciangin, khuapi thum tuam koih un, ci-in note thu a hong pia ka hi hi." 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama lampi zuih tawntungna tawh tu ni-a kong gen hih thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uh a, amah in na pu na pate uh tungah a kiciam mah bangin Topa na Pasian un na gamgite uh hong keeksakin, na pu na pate uh piak dingin a ciam leitang note tungah hong piak leh, hih khuapi thum banah khuapi thum mah na behlap ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:9  
Deuteronomy19:10 Tua hikeileh Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak leitang tungah mawhbaang lo mi kithat kha dinga, tua mi thahna hanga mawhna noteʼ tungah hong tu ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a veengpa mudahin, amah pangsim a, amah satin liamsakin a sihsak a, tua mipa hih khuapi khat peuhpeuh ah a tai leh," 
Deuteronomy19:12 ama khua upate in amah hong puakin hong paipih ding uh a, a sih theih nadingin phula pa tungah ap ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Note na nopsak theih nadingun amah hehpih loin, Israel-te sung panin mi that pa na beisak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “ Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun hong piak leitang tungah noteʼ kep ding na gamhluahna sung uh ah khanglui mite in a phuh sa na veengteʼ gisuang na khiin kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Mi khat in a hih khak mawhna lian ahi a, khialhna khat peuhpeuh a gamtatna ah ahi zongin tua mipaʼ langah teci khat guak kicing lo dinga, teci nih ahih kei leh teci thum bang thugenna tawh mawhsakna kikipsak bek ding hi." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Elna lungsim a nei teci khat in mi khat gamta khial hi, ci-in a mawhsak leh," 
Deuteronomy19:17 thuneite a lang nih tuakin, tua hun laitak a siampite le thukhenteʼ mai, Topaʼ mai ah pai ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Thukhente in limtakin kan ding uh a, teci pa pen zuau teci hi-in, a man lopi-in a sanggampa a mawhsak ahihleh," 
Deuteronomy19:19 a sanggampa tungah amah in hih dinga a sawm bang teekin ama tungah na hih ding uh hi. Tua bangin note sung panin gitlohna na siangsak ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Tua hileh a om lai mite in za-in lau dinga, note lakah tua bang gitlohna bawlkik ngei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi. Nuntakna tang ding nuntakna, mit tang ding mit, ha tang ding ha, khut tang ding khut, khe tang ding khe na hisak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Na langte uh a do dingin pai-in a sakolte, a leengte le a galkapte uh nomau-aʼ sangin a tam zaw-in na muh uh hangin amaute na kihta tuan kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh note tawh hong om hi." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Gal nai na tun uh ciangin siampipa a mai ah hong pai-in mite kiangah thu genin 
Deuteronomy20:3 amaute kiangah, ‘Israel-te aw, za un. Tu ni-in na langte uh a do dingin na nai uh hi. Na lungsim uh lausak kei un. Lau kei un, liing kei un, amaute kihta kei un." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah gualzawhna a hong pia ding, na langte uh hong dosak dingin note tawh hong kuan khawm pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Tua ciangin uliante in mite kiangah thu genin, ‘Inn thak lam khinin a ap nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in a inn ap kha ding ahih manin a inn ah ciahkik hen." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Leenggui lo kho khinin a gah a ne nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in a gah ne kha ding ahih manin a inn ah ciahkik hen. 
Deuteronomy20:7 A zi dingin lawm dong khinin a la nai lo kua om na hi uh hiam? Gal sungah amah si-in midang khat in tua numei la kha ding ahih manin a inn ah ciahkik hen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Uliante in mite kiangah thu gen thuah lai-in, ‘A lau, a lungsim meidawi kua om na hi uh hiam? A lawmte meidawi lawh kha ding ahih manin a inn ah ciahkik hen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Uliante in mite kiangah thugen a man khit uh ciangin mite a makai ding kiseh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “A do dingin khuapi khatpeuh na nai uh ciangin kilem nading thu gen masa un. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Note hong dawnna pen kilem nading lam hi-in note kongpi hong hon leh, tua sunga om mi khempeuh in note adingin aana tawh na semin, na na uh hong sepsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ahih hangin note tawh kilemna hong bawl loin note hong do leh, note in tua khua na umcih ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy20:13 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ khut sungah hong piak ciangin pasal khempeuh namsau tawh na that ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Ahih hangin numeite le naupangte, ganhingte, khua sunga na dang khempeuh, a kinusiate khempeuh note adingin na la ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un note hong piak ahi na langte uh vante na tang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Hih nai-a om minamteʼ khuapi ahi lo, note kiang panin a gamla khuapi khempeuh tungah tu-a bangin na hih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Ahih hangin, amauʼ pasian-te a biakna uh ah a hih uh a kihhuai gamtatnate khempeuh note hong hilh theih loh nading le tua bangin Topa na Pasian uh tungah na khialh theih loh nadingun, Topa na Pasian un luah dingin noteʼ tungah hong piak hih miteʼ khuapi sungah mi khempeuh na hingkhawi kei ding uh a, Topa na Pasian un hong thupiak sa bangin Hit mite le Amor mite, Kanaan mite le Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite, a vekpi-in amaute na susia mang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy20:17  
Deuteronomy20:18  
Deuteronomy20:19 “Khuapi khat na lak theih nadingun do-in sau veipi na umcih uh hangin hei zatna tawh a singgah kungte na susia kei ding uh hi. A gahte na ne thei ding uh a, ahih hangin a kungte na phuk kei ding uh hi. Gamlak a om singkungte, noteʼ suk gawp dingin na gal uh hi zenzen ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Nek dinga kizang lo singkung hi, ci-in na theih teng bek uh note hong do khuapi a tuk mateng umcihna-in na zat dingun na phuk thei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:1 “ Topa na Pasian un noteʼ neih dingin a hong piak leitang ah mi khat kithatin gamlak ah lum a, a that a kitheih kei leh," 
Deuteronomy21:2 na upate uh le na thukhente uh hong pai khia-in, a kithat mipaʼ omna kiim a khuapite a gamlatna teh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Tua ciangin a kithat mipaʼ omna tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate in a kisin nai lo, kol a kai nai lo bawngla khat la ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Tua khuapi upate in a kikho nai lo, khaici a kivawh nai lo, tui luang a omna kuam khat ah a bawngla paipih suk ding uh a, tua kuam sungah a bawngla ngawng at tan ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Topa na Pasian un Levi mi siampite ama na a sem ding le Topaʼ min tawh thupha a pia dingin teel khia ahih manin amaute hong pai ding uh a, kithuneihna le kitotna peuhmah amauʼ thu tawh kivengsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:6 A kithat mipa tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate khempeuh in kuam sunga a ngawng a kitan bawngla tungah a khut uh sil ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy21:7 amaute in teci pangin, ‘Kote in hih mipa ka that kei uh a, a kithah lam zong ka thei kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Topa aw, na hotkhiat sa Israel miteʼ mawhna hong maisak inla, mawhna nei lo mipa a kithahna hanga mawhna na Israel mihingte hong thuaksak kei in. Mi thahna hanga mawhna pan hong maisak in,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Topaʼ muhna ah a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note lak panin mawhna nei lo mi thahna hanga mawhna tua bangin na siangsak ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Na galte uh a do dingin kuan khia-in, Topa na Pasian un noteʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia a, amaute salin na mat ciangun," 
Deuteronomy21:11 salte lakah numei a melhoih khat mu-in, tua nu deihin na zi dingin na lak nop leh," 
Deuteronomy21:12 na inn ah tua numei na ciahpih dinga, amah in a lu metin a cinte tan ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Amah in sal hihna puan suah khia-in, na inn ah om dinga, a nu le a paʼ hangin kha khat bit sung kap ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah na luppih thei pan dinga, nang pen ama pasal hi-in, amah pen na zi hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Tua ciangin, amah na deih nawn kei leh, ama utna peuh ah na paisak ding hi. Ahih hangin amah daisak khin na hih manin sumin amah zuak loin, sila bangin na bawl kei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Mi khat in zi nih nei a, khat itin a khat mudah a, a it le a muhdah a zi tegel in ta nei tuakin, tapa a neih cil pen a muhdah nu tawh a neih ahihleh," 
Deuteronomy21:16 a tapate tungah gamhluah dingin ama neihsa a hawm ciangin, a muhdah nuʼ tapa cil sangin deihzawkna hangin a it nuʼ tapa pen a ta cil-in bawl thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ama neihsa khempeuh tanh nih piakna tawh a muhdah nuʼ tapa a tacil mahin sang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pa pen ama sung panin a piang masa pen ahih manin tacil hihna za pen ama aʼ ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Mi khat in a lungkhauh, a langpang thei, a nuʼ thu ahi a, a paʼ thu ahi zongin a mang lo, a tai hangun amauʼ thu a ngai lo tapa khat a neih leh," 
Deuteronomy21:19 a nu le a pa in tua mipa manin ama khuapi upate kiang, a teenna mun kongpi ah paipihin," 
Deuteronomy21:20 amaute in a khuapi upate kiangah, ‘Hih ka tapa uh lungkhauhin hong langpang thei a, amah in ka thu uh hong mang lo a, anhai, zuhai bek ahi hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Tua ciangin khuapi pasal khempeuh in suang tawh amah deng lum ding uh hi. Tua bangin noteʼ sung panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi. Tua hileh Israel-te khempeuh in za-in lau ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Mi khat in sihna thuak theih nading mawhna bawlin amah kithat a, sing tungah na khai uh leh," 
Deuteronomy21:23 zan tawntung sing tungah ama luang na omsak kei ding uh a, a ni mahin na phum ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuam tungah a kikhai si luanghawm pen Pasian in muhthadah sa hi. Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak na leitang uh na ninsak kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Na mipihteʼ bawngtal ahi a, a tuu ahi zongin a gammang na muh uh leh huh loin na om kei ding uh hi. A nei pa kiangah na ciah pihkik ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Amah na veeng nai uh hi lo a, a nei na theih kei uh leh, na inn uh ah a gan ciah pihin a nei pa in hong zon mateng na kem ding uh a, hong zon ciangin na piakik ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Tua bangin a la, a puan, a mang sa na muh, na mipihteʼ na a mang khat peuhpeuh na hih ding uh a, huh loin na om kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Na mipihteʼ la ahi a, a bawngtal ahi zongin lam gei ah a kia na muh uh leh, tuate huh loin na om kei ding uh a, tuate phottoh sakkikna tawh na huh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Numei in pasal puan khat peuhpeuh silh lo dinga, pasal in zong numei puan silh lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin a gamta peuhmah Topa na Pasian uh tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Vasa bu khat, sing tung ahi a, leilak ah ahi zongin, a no ahi a, a tui ahi zongin omin, a pi in a no a ompih ahi a, a op ahi zongin na muh khak zenzen uh leh, a pi pen a no tawh na la khawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:7 A pi na khah ding uh a, a no na la thei ding uh hi. Hih bang gamtatna pen na nopsak nading uh, sauveipi na nuntak theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Na inn tung panun mi khat kia-in mi sihna hanga mawhna na inn sung uh ah na tunsak khak loh nadingun inn thak na lam uh ciangin na inn khumzang uh ah tangban na khung ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Na leenggui lo uh ah khaici nam nih na vawh kei ding uh hi. Vawh le-uh cin na vawh uh an le na leenggui lo uh ah a piang khempeuh a nin suak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Bawngtal khat le la khat tawh lo na kho khawm kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Samul le khau a kigan khawm puan na silh kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Na puanza uh kiu lite tungah puan mongteep na bawl ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Mi khat in zi la-in, amah a luppih khit ciangin amah mudahin," 
Deuteronomy22:14 a zumhuai gamtatna tawh tua nu mawhsakin, ‘Keimah in hih numei ka la a, amah tawh ka lupkhop ciangin ama sungah nungakna lim ka mu kei hi,’ cihna tawh tua nu tungah minsia a tut leh," 
Deuteronomy22:15 tua numeiʼ nu le a pa in a tanu uhʼ nungakna lim a kilatna puan la khia-in upate kiang kongpi ah paipih ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Numeiʼ pa in upate kiangah, ‘Hih mipa tungah a zi dingin ka tanu ka pia a, amah in deih nawn lo a," 
Deuteronomy22:17 “Na tanuʼ sungah nungakna lim ka mu kei hi,” cihna tawh a zumhuai-in amah mawhsak hi. Ahi zongin hihte pen ka tanuʼ nungakna a kilatna limte ahi hi,’ ci-in a puan lak ding hi. Amaute in khua upate mai ah a puan phah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Tua ciangin tua khua upate in tua mipa la-in sat ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Amaute in ngun shekel za khat liausak ding uh a, a numeiʼ paʼ tungah tuate pia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Israel nungak tungah minsia tun hi. Tua ciangin a numei pen ama zi mah hi dinga, a nuntak laiteng tua nu ma thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Ahih hangin a mawhsakna thumanin, numei sungah nungakna lim a kimuh kei takpi leh," 
Deuteronomy22:21 amaute in a paʼ inn kongah a numei paipih ding uh a, ama khuapi pasalte in suang tawh amah deng lum ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a paʼ inn sungah paktat gamtatna tawh Israel sungah haina tun hi. Tua bangin noteʼ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Mi khat, midang khatʼ zi tawh a lum khawm a kimuh leh, numei tawh a lum pa le a numei, a nih tuakun kithat ding hi. Tua bangin Israel sung panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “A kidong sa nungak khat om a, mi khat in khuapi sungah tua nu tuakin amah tawh a lupkhop leh," 
Deuteronomy22:24 tua khuapi kongpi ah amau tegel na paipih ding uh a, a numei khuapi sungah a om hinapi-in miʼ huhna ngen dingin a kiko lohna hang le, tua pasal in a veengpaʼ zi a vasuksakna hangin, suang tawh a nihun na deng lum ding uh hi. Tua bangin noteʼ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Ahih hangin mi khat in a kidong sa nungak khat gamlak ah tuakin, mipa in tua nu buanin a luppih leh, tua numei tawh a lum mipa bek kithat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:26 A numeiʼ tungah bangmah na hih kei ding uh hi. Numeiʼ tungah sih nading mawhna om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen mi khat in a veengpa do-in a thah tawh kibang hi. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Hih mipa in gamlak ah numei hih ahih manin, a kidong sa numei in huhna ngen dingin a kiko hangin amah a hon ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Mi khat in a kidong nai lo nungak khat tuakin, tua numei buanin luppih a, amau tegel a kimuh leh," 
Deuteronomy22:29 numei tawh a lum pa in nungakʼ pa tungah ngun shekel sawmnga pia dinga, tua numei ama zi hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a numei va su khin hi. A nuntak laiteng tua numei ma thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Mi khat in a paʼ zi dangte teenpih lo dinga, a pa-aʼ ahi numei tawh mawh lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “A ciltang a kitam ahih kei leh, a pasal na a cing lo mipa Topa ading kikhopna sungah lut lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Zawlta peuhmah, Topa ading kikhopna sungah lut lo ding hi. A suan a khak khang sawmna dong nangawnin Topa ading kikhopna sungah tua bang mi kuamah lut thei lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Ammon mite ahi a, Moab mite ahi zongin Topa ading kikhopna sungah lut thei lo ding uh hi. A khang sawmna dong nangawnun Topa ading kikhopna sungah lut thei ngei peuhmah lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi ah anletui tawh amaute in note hong dawn lo uh a, note hong samsia dingin Mesopotamia gam Pethor khua panin Beorʼ tapa Balaam cial uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ahih hangin Topa na Pasian un Balaamʼ thu ngai lo hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong it ahih manin, Topa na Pasian un samsiatna pen note adingin thupha-in hong heisak zaw hi." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Amauteʼ nopsak nading ahi a, a daupai nading uh ahi zongin na khantawnun na hanciam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Edom mite khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na sanggam uh ahi hi. Egypt mi khatpeuh na mudah kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gamah peemta na hi ngei uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Amauteʼ sung pan a piang a khang thumna mite a kipan Topa ading kikhopna sungah lut thei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Na galte uh a do dingin kuanin giahphual ah na om uh ciangin, siatna nam khempeuh panin nomau na kikem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Note lakah, zan sungin ama tungah thupiang hangin a siang lo mi a om leh giahphual pua lamah amah paikhia dinga, giahphual sungah hong pai lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Ahih hangin nitak ciangin a mahmah tui sungah kisil dinga, ni a tum ciangin giahphual sungah hong pai thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Giahphual pua ah awnghawh nading mun khat na nei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Na galhiamte uh banah tulzum khat na nei ding uh a, awng na hawh khit uh ciangin tua tawh lei to-in, na ek uh na vuk ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh note hong hon ding le noteʼ mai-a na galte uh a hong pia dingin Topa na Pasian uh na giahphual laizang uh ah hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a kilawm lo nate a muh loh nading le note kiang panin amah a paikhiat loh nadingin na giahphual uh siangtho ding hi. 
Deuteronomy23:15 “A topaʼ kiang panin no kiangah a hong tai sila, a topa kiang mahah na apkik kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Na khuapite uh lak panin ama teelna mun, ama lungkim penna, note lakah note tawh amah hong teeng dinga, amah na nengniam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Israel ta numeite biakinn sunga a paktat pawlin om lo ding uh a, Israel tapate zong a paktat pawlin om lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:18 A paktat nu a kiguaihna sum ahi a, a paktat pa a kiguaihna sum ahi zongin thuciamna khat peuhpeuh piakna-in Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ inn sungah na paipih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih tegel pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Na sanggampa tungah sumgum hitaleh, an khing hitaleh, a meet ngaihsutna-in na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Gamdang mi tungah a meetin leitawi na pia thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na sanggampa tungah a meetin leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Hihte pen a luah dingin na tumna uh gam sungah Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uh ah thupha hong piak theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “ Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah thuciamna na bawl ciangun na ciamna uh tungsak loin na om mawk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un hong kal teekteek dinga, note tungah khialhna hong hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ahih hangin thuciamna bawl ding pan na kikep uh leh noteʼ sungah khialhna om lo ding hi. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Na kam uh tawh na ciam sa uh thu pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah nomau utthu-a na ciam uh ahih manin na kam uh panin a ging khia peuhmah na tunsak ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Na veengpaʼ leenggui lo ah na pai uh ciangin na ut zahzah uh na kham dong uh leenggah na ne thei ding uh a, ahih hangin na van sung uh ah na guang kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Na veengpaʼ ankungte lakah na pai uh ciangin na khut uh tawh a vuite na zut thei ding uh a, ahih hangin phiaukawi tawh na veengpaʼ ankungte na at kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Mi khat in zi la-in a teenpih ciangin, tua nu tungah kilawm lohna a om manin numei in a pasalʼ mitah maipha mu lo a, amah in makna lai gelhin ama tungah pia-in ama inn panin sawl khia a, a pasalʼ inn panin amah kihem khia-in," 
Deuteronomy24:2 amah pai-in midang khatʼ zi va suak a," 
Deuteronomy24:3 a pasal nunung in amah deih lo leuleu a, makna lai gelhin a numeiʼ khut sungah koih a, a inn panin tua nu sawl khia-in, tua ahih kei leh zi dinga a la a pasal nunung a sih leh," 
Deuteronomy24:4 tua numei a hawl khia a pasal masa in, tua nu a kinitsak khit ciangin a zi dingin lakik thei nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen Topaʼ mai ah kihhuaina hi a, Topa noteʼ Pasian un luah dingin hong piak leitang tungah mawhna na tunpih kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Mi khat in zi a neih tungin galkapte tawh kuan khia lo dinga, nasep khat peuhpeuh zong kisawl lo ding hi. A lak sa a zi tawh a lungdam khawm dingin inn ah kum khat sung mang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Kuamah in an gawina ahi a, an gawina suangpek a tungnung ahi zongin khapna-in la lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khapna-in nuntakna a la suak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Mi khat in Israel mi a sanggamte khat gu-in, amah in sila bangin a bawl ahi a, a zuak ahi zongin a kimuh leh, tua guta pa kithat ding hi. Tua bangin noteʼ lak panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Phak natna hong tun ciangin Levi siampite in hong gen bangin na gamtat ding uh ngaihsun un. Amaute ka thupiakna bangin na gamtat nadingun na kingaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Egypt panin na paikhiat lai-un lampi ah Topa na Pasian un Miriamʼ tungah ahihna phawk un. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Na veengte uh tungah na khat peuhpeuh leitawi na piak uh ciangin ama hong khapna a la dingin a inn ah pai kei un. 
Deuteronomy24:11 A pua lamah na ding ding uh a, leitawi na piakna mipa in nang kiangah a na khap hong paipih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Amah mizawng ahihleh ama hong khap puan na zantaamsak kei ding uh a," 
Deuteronomy24:13 ni a tum ciangin, a puanza silhin nang thupha hong piak theih nadingin tua hong na khap ama kiangah na piakik ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah note adingin thumanna hi ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “A zawng a cimawh a kicial nasem pa, na sanggamte khat ahi a, na gam sung na khuapite sunga om peemta khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, na nengniam kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:15 A sep ni-in ama thaman, ni tum ma-in na pia ding uh hi (bang hang hiam cih leh amah zawng a, tua bek a lungsimah om hi). Tua hikeileh Topaʼ tungah amah in hong khia dinga, note na mawh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Tateʼ tangin pate kithat lo dinga, pateʼ tangin zong tate kithat lo ding hi. Mi khempeuh ama khialhna hang bekin kithat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Peemtaʼ thu ahi a, pa nei lo miʼ thu ahi zongin tuate ading thutang na heisak kei ding uh a, meigong numeiʼ puan zong khapna-in na laksak kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Egypt ah sila na hihna uh le Topa noteʼ Pasian in tua lai panin hong hotkhiatna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih banga na gamtat nading uh thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Na lo ah an la-in lo lai ah anlom na mangngilh uh ciangin a tawm dingin na paikik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo le meigong numeite ading ahi hi. Hih pen Topa noteʼ Pasian in na khut uh tawh na sepna khempeuh uh ah note thupha hong piak theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Na oliv kungte uh na sat uh ciangin a hiangte na sat kikkik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo le meigong numeite ading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Na leenggui lo panun leenggah na kaihkhop uh ciangin a sang na nung khopkik kei ding uh hi. Tuate pen peemta, pa nei lo le meigong numeite ading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Egypt gamah sila na hihna uh na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih bangin na gamtat nadingun thu kong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Mite kikalah thu kineihna om a, thukhen zumah amaute pai-in, thukhente in amauʼ thu khensakin, a dikpa khahin a mawh pa lelsak a," 
Deuteronomy25:2 a mawh pa satna thuak dinga kilawm ahihleh, thukhen pa in amah lum suksakin a khialhna zahin ama muhin satsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Sat sawm li kipia thei dinga, ahih hangin tua val hi lo ding hi. Tua hikeileh, hih sangin a tamvei zaw mi khat in sat lai leh noteʼ muhna ah na sanggampa uh a kineubawl suak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Bawng in an a cil laitakin a muk na tuam kei ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Sanggam pasalte teng khawmin, tuate khat si-in tapa a neih kei le, a sipaʼ zi pen innkuan pualam khualmi tawh kiteeng lo ding hi. A pasalʼ sanggampa in luppihin a zi dingin amah la dinga, ama tungah pasalʼ sanggampaʼ nasep sem ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ama min Israel tungah a maiman loh nadingin tua nu in a neih masak a tapa pen a si sa a pasalʼ ta-in kiseh ding hi. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Mipa in a sanggampaʼ zi a lak nop kei leh, upate kiang kongpi ah a sanggampaʼ zi pai dinga, ‘Ka pasalʼ sanggampa in a sanggampaʼ min Israel sungah a zop ding ut lo a, pasalʼ sanggampaʼ nasep kei tungah hong sem nuam lo hi,’ ci ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Tua ciangin mipaʼ khuapi upate in amah samin thu genpih ding uh hi. Amah in, ‘Tua nu ka la nuam kei hi,’ a cih teitei leh," 
Deuteronomy25:9 upateʼ omin a sanggampaʼ zi ama kiangah pai to-in a khe panin a khedap kaih khiatsakin a maitang cilphih ding hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, ‘A sanggampaʼ innkuan a zom to lo mipa hih bangin kibawl tahen,’ ci khia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Israel mite lakah ama innkuan pen, ‘A khedap a kikaih khiatsak mipaʼ innkuan,’ kici ding hi." 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Mi khatlekhat a kilaii ciangin, a sat paʼ kiang panin a pasal a hon khia dingin a khat paʼ zi hong pai a, a khutin a sel simte a matsak leh," 
Deuteronomy25:12 tua nuʼ khut na sat tansak ding uh a, amah na hehpih kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Na ip sung uh ah tawisuang nam nih, a lian le a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Na inn sung uh ah tehna nam nih, a lian le a neu, na neikhawm kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Tawisuang a cing a man na nei ding uh a, tehna a cing a man na nei ding uh hi. Topa noteʼ Pasian in hong piak leitang ah na khan uh a sau theih nading ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangin gamta-in, a thuman lote khempeuh, Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah a kihhuai ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Egypt panin nong paikhiat lai-un lampi ah Amalek mite in note hong bawlna," 
Deuteronomy25:18 note gimin lungkhamin na om laitakun lampi ah a hong simna le noteʼ nungah a nunung khempeuh hong thahna uh phawk un; amaute in Pasian kihta lo uh hi. 
Deuteronomy25:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa noteʼ Pasian in noteʼ neih dingin gamh-in hong piak leitang tungah, Topa na Pasian un na kiim uh a na galte khempeuh panun tawlngakna hong piak ciangin, mun khempeuh panin Amalek mite a kiphawkna na phiatkhiat ding uh na mangngilh kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “ Topa na Pasian un luah dingin a hong piak leitang ah va pai-in, tua leitang luahin a tungah na ten uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy26:2 Topa na Pasian un a hong piak leitang pan a piang gah khempeuh panin a gah masa pawl khat la-in lawh khat sungah na koih ding uh a, ama min na omsak nadingun Topa na Pasian un a teelna munah na pai ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Tua hun laitakin na a sem siampipa kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in kote piak dingin ka pu ka pate uh tungah a ciam leitang ah ka tun khitna uh tu ni-in Topa na Pasian kiangah kong ko uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Tua ciangin siampipa in noteʼ khut panin a lawh hong saang dinga, Topa noteʼ Pasian biakna tau mai ah koih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy26:5 “ Topa noteʼ Pasian mai ah note in, ‘A vak kawikawi koteʼ pupi pen Aram mi hi a, amah Egypt ah pai sukin tua munah a peem lai-in mi tawmno ahi hi. Tua lai ah amah a lian, a thahat, tampi a pha minam khat a suak hi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Egypt-te in kote hong ngong bawlin hong gimsak a, kote sal bangin hong bawl uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Tua ciangin ka pu ka pate uh Pasian ahi Topa Pasianʼ tungah ka kiko uh a, Topa in koteʼ aw hong za-in, ka gimnate uh, ka sepnate uh le hong netniamnate uh a mu hi." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Topa in a vangliatna le a thahatna, launa lianpi, lim le nalamdangte tawh Egypt panin kote hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Amah in hih mun hong tunpihin, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam hih leitang ko tungah hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Tua ahih ciangin en in, Topa, nangmah in kote nong piak sa leitang panin a gah a min masa kong paipih uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah na koih suk ding uh a, Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah na bia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Topa noteʼ Pasian in note le na innkuanpihte uh tungah hong piak na a hoih khempeuhte hangin note le Levi mite le note lakah a om peemtate na lungdam khawm ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Sawm-ah-khat piak kum ahi, a kum thumna kumin, amaute in na khuapite uh sungah an ne-in, gilvahin a om theih nadingun Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote le meigong numeite tungah na piak uh, na khawh sa uh sawm-ah-khat na piak khit uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy26:13 Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah, ‘Ka inn sung panin a siangtho ding teng ka tuam koih khin hi. Tua tham loin kei nong sawlna bangin na thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in Levi mite, peemtate, pa nei lote le meigong numeite tungah ka pia khin hi. Hih tungtang ah na thupiakna khat zong ka khial kei a, ka mangngilh zong om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Dahin ka kah sungin zong sawm-ah-khat ka ne kei a, ka nit sungin zong ka khen khia kei a, misite tungah zong ka pia kei hi. Topa ka Pasianʼ thu ka mang a, kei nong thupiakna khempeuh bangin ka hih khin hi." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Vantung, nangma omna a siangtho panin hong en suk inla, koteʼ pu le pate tungah bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam na ciam mah bangin, nangma mi Israel-te le na hong piak sa leitang thupha hong pia in,’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Tu ni-in Topa na Pasian un hih thukhamte le ngeina kipte na zuih ding uh note tungah thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh na hih ding uh limtakin na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy26:17 Tu ni-in, Topa pen noteʼ Pasian ahihna le note in ama lampite tawnin, ama thukhamte le ama thupiaknate le ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thu na man ding uh na gen khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Tu ni-in Topa in note pen amah in note tungah hong ciam sa bangin ama neih ding mi na hihna uh le note in ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zuih nading uh," 
Deuteronomy26:19 ama bawl sa minam dangte khempeuh sangin phatna le minthanna le pahtawina a lian zaw a ngahin hong koih nading le ama gen sa mah bangin Topa noteʼ Pasian adingin a siangtho mi na hih nading uh hong gen khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Tu-in Moses le Israel upate in mite thu pia-in, “Tu ni-a kong gen uh thupiakna khempeuh na zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitang ah pai dingin Jordan na kantan ni-un suangtumpite na phut ding uh a, buan tawh na zut ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa in note tungah hong ciam mah bangin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna leitang, Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna gamah a lut dingin na gal kah uh ciangin tua suangte tungah hih thute na gelh ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Jordan na gal kah khit uh ciangin Ebal Mual tungah tu ni-a kong thupiakna uh tawh kizui-in hih suangte na phut ding uh a, buan tawh tua suangte na zut ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Tua lai ah Topa na Pasian uh adingin suang kibawl biakna tau khat na bawl ding uh a, tuate tungah sik tawh a kibawl nazatte na liik kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Topa na Pasian uh adingin a kiseek lo suangtumte tawh biakna tau na bawl ding uh a, tua biakna tau tungah Topa na Pasian uh adingin meihal biaknate na pia ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Tua ciangin thunuam a biakna te na pia ding uh a, tua lai munah ne-in, Topa na Pasian uh mai ah na lungdam ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Hih thute khempeuh tua suangte tungah a kitel takin na gelh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Tua ciangin Moses le Levi siampite in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “Israel-te aw, gamdai unla ngai un: Tu ni-in Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ mi na suak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Tua ahih ciangin Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ thu mangin, tu ni-a kong gen uh ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte na zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Moses in tua ni mahin mite thuhilhin," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Jordan na gal kah khit uh ciangin mite thupha a pia dingin Gerizim Mual tungah a ding ding minamte: Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, Josef le Benjamin ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Ebal Mual tungah hamsia a pia dingin a ding ding minamte: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan le Naftali ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Levi mite in awging lianpi tawh Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih bangin ci ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy27:15 “‘ Topa adingin a kihhuai ahi, khutsiam paʼ khut tawh a kibawl, a kiseek ahi a, a kisung ahi zongin milim bawlin, mun simtham ah a koih mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in dawngin, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:16 “‘A nu ahi a, a pa ahi zongin a zahtak lo mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:17 “‘A veengpaʼ gisuang a bot khia mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:18 “‘Mittaw pa lam a lakkhial mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:19 “‘Peemta, pa nei lo le meigong numeite ading thutang a heikhiatsak mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:20 “‘Amah in a paʼ tungah maizumna tun ahih manin, a paʼ zi dang tawh a lum khawm mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:21 “‘Ganhing khat peuhpeuh tawh nulepa mawhna a bawl mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:22 “‘A nuʼ tanu, a paʼ tanu, ahih kei leh a sanggamnu tawh a lum khawm mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:23 “‘A sungnu tawh a lum khawm mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:24 “‘A veengpa a that sim mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:25 “‘Mawhna nei lopa thah nadingin sumgolh a la mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy27:26 “‘Hih thute zuihna tawh hih thu a kipsak lo mipa in gimna ngah tahen,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, ‘Amen,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mangin, tu ni-a kong gen ama thupiakna khempeuh limtakin na zuih uh leh Topa na Pasian un leitung minam dangte khempeuh sangin a lian zaw-in note hong bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Topa na Pasian uh thu na man uh leh hih thuphate khempeuh note tungah hong tung ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Khuapi sungah thupha ngah mi na hi ding uh a, lote ah zong thupha ngah mi mah na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Noteʼ sung pan a piangte le na leitang uh pan a piangte le na ganhing uh pan a piang, na bawngte uh pungin na tuuhonte uh tungah thupha om ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Na seengte uh le na annel mekna kuangte uh ah thupha om ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Na sepna khempeuh uh ah thupha na ngah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “ Topa in, noteʼ langah hong pang na galte uh na mai uh ah lelhna thuaksak ding hi. Amaute lampi khat tawnin hong kuan ding uh a, noteʼ mai panin lam sagih tawnin taikeek ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “ Topa in noteʼ ansal tung le na hihna khempeuh uh ah thupha hong puak ding hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piakna leitang ah amah in note tungah thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Note in Topa na Pasian uh hong thupiaknate zui-in ama lampi na tot uh leh amah in note tungah hong ciam sa bangin ama adingin a siangtho mi dingin Topa in note hong kipsak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:10 Topa in note hong sapna thu midang khempeuh in thei ding uh a, amaute in note hong kihta ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Note piak dingin na pu na pate uh tungah Topa in a ciam sa gam sungah noteʼ sung pan a piangte, na gan khawi pan uh a piangte le na leitang pan uh a piangte ah Topa in note nakpi takin hong hausak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Noteʼ leitang ah ama hunin guah a zusak ding le na sepna khempeuh uh thupha a pia dingin Topa in a na hoih kholna vantung note hong hon ding hi. Note in minam tampite tungah leitawi na pia ding uh a, ahih hangin note in leitawi na la kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Note in tu ni-a kong thugente limtakin zuihna tawh Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate mangin, tu ni-a no kong thupiakna kammalte panin, pasian dangteʼ na semin a bia dingin na pial kei nak uh leh, Topa in a makai-in note hong bawl dinga, miʼ nung zui-in hong bawl lo ding hi. Tung lam bekah na kah ding uh a, na nuai kiat ngei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:14  
Deuteronomy28:15 “Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uh thu mang loin, tu ni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte khempeuh limtakin na zuih kei uh leh, hih samsiatna khempeuh note tungah hong tung dinga, note hong ban ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Khuapi sungah hong kisamsia dinga, lo ah zong hong kisamsia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Na lawhte uh le na annel mekna kuangte un zong samsiatna ngah ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Noteʼ sung pan a piangte le na leitang uh pan a piangte, na bawngte uh le na tuu hon note uh in zong samsiatna ngah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Na sep na bawlna khempeuh uh ah hamsia na ngah ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Note in Topa na nusiat uh a, na gamtat siat uh leh, note sia-in na sih mang khit matengun Topa in note tungah samsiatna, buaina, cihmawhnate hong tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:21 A luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong beisak matengin note lakah pulnatna a tun nadingin Topa in bawl ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Topa in pulnatna le cisa natna, meima nasia le a sa mahmah keutumna, huihpiʼ mut gawpna le a nom tawh note hong vat gawp dinga, note na sih matengun tuate na thuak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Na lu tung uh a om vantungte pen sumngo bangin sanin guah zu lo dinga, na nuai uh a om leitung pen sik bangin sak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Topa in na gam sung uh a guahte taang dingin leivui le sehnel hong zusak dinga, note na sih matengun vantung panin note tungah tuate hong kia suk ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “ Topa in na galte uh mai ah note hong guallelsak ding hi. Amaute a do dingin lam khat ah na kuan khawm ding uh a, amauʼ mai ah lam sagihin na taikeek ding uh hi. Leitung kumpi gamte khempeuhʼ muhna ah note a cikzethuai na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Noteʼ luanghawmte pen huihlak a leeng vasate khempeuh le leitung a ganhingte khempeuhʼ an hi dinga, tuate a beng khia ding mihing om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Topa in note na damkik theih loh nading uh Egypt meimatumte le meima daite, meima lipneite le cithak tawh note hong vat gawp ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Topa in haina, mittawtna le lungsim buaina tawh note hong vat gawp ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Mittawte in khuamial lakah khua a zawt bangin sunin khua na zawt ding uh a, na hihnate uh ah na maavang kei ding uh hi. Note hong kinengniamin na tate uh hong kisut niloh dinga, note hong huh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Zi dingin lawm khat na dong ding uh a, midang khat in na luppih ding hi. Inn na lam ding uh a, tua sungah na teeng kei ding uh hi. Leenggui lo na zuan ding uh a, a gah na ne kha kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Na muh tangpi-un na bawngtal uh kigo dinga, a sa na ne kha kei ding uh hi. Noteʼ mai panin na la uh hong kingawh laksak dinga, note kiangah hong kipiakik nawn lo ding hi. Na tuute uh na galte uh tungah kipia dinga, note hong huh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Na tapate uh le na tanute uh midang tungah kipia dinga, amaute ngai-in sun nilohin na mit un enin na mit uh gim ding hi. Tuate pen nomauʼ tha tawh na dalzawh ding uh hi lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Na theih nai loh uh minam khat in na leitang panun a piangte le na na sep sa khempeuh uh ne tum dinga, note hong kinengniamin hong kisu gawp tawntung lel ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Tua ahih ciangin na mit un a muh ding nate in note hong hehsak mahmah ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Topa in note na kidamsakkik theih loh ding uh a nasia mahmah meimatumte tawh na khukte uh le na khete uh meimasak gawpin, na khenuai panun na luzang dong uh ah na thuak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Note le na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh minam khat kiangah Topa in note le note tungah na koih uh na kumpipa uh hong tunpih dinga, tua lai ah sing le suang tawh a kibawl pasian dangteʼ na na sem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Topa in note hong paikhiat pihna mite lakah a cikzethuai, paunak le gentehna na suak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Khaici tampi lo ah na tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin tawmno bek na khawm ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kauphe in ne mang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Note in leenggah lo zuanin na puah ding uh a, ahih hangin leenggahzu dawn loin, leenggah zong na ne kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh lung in tuate ne ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Na gam sung khempeuh uh ah oliv kung na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin a thau tawh note na kizut kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na oliv gahte uh pulh ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Tanute le tapate na nei ding uh a, ahih hangin amaute pen nomau aʼ hi lo ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute galmat suak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Na singte khempeuh uh le, na leitang panun a piang khempeuh kauphete in tang ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Note lakah a om peemtate lian semsem ding uh a, note na neu semsem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Amaute in noteʼ tungah leitawi hong pia ding uh a, note in amaute tungah leitawi na pia kei ding uh hi. Amaute a makai hi-in, note a nungzui na hi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Amah in note hong piak thupiaknate le thukhamte zui loin, Topa na Pasian uh thu mang lo na hih manun, note na sih matengun hih samsiatnate khempeuh noteʼ tungah hong tungin, note hong delhin hong pha ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Note le na suanlekhakte uh tungah a tawntungin tuate pen lim le nalamdang hi ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Hih a tampi nate khempeuh om napi-in note in lungdamna le lungsim kipahna tawh Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ na sem lo na hih manun," 
Deuteronomy28:48 Topa in noteʼ langah a hong sawl ding na galte uhʼ na, gilkialna le dangtakna, pum guakin omna le na khempeuh kitangsapna tawh, na sem ding uh hi. Na galte un note hong suksiat matengin noteʼ ngawng ah sik hakkol hong thuah ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Topa in a gamlapi leimong panin muvanlai leeng bangin a manlang, amauʼ pau na theih loh uh minam, thukhualna a nei lo minam, khangham mite a zahtak lo, khangno mite tungah maipha zong a lak tuan lo minam khat, noteʼ lang khat ah hong paipih dinga," 
Deuteronomy28:50  
Deuteronomy28:51 note na sih matengun amaute in na gan hon note uh le na leitang panun a piang gahte hong neksak ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong beisak matengun note adingin an, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathau, na ganhingte uh ahih kei leh na tuu hon note uh zong hong nusiat lo ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Na gam sung uh a a om na muan uh, a sang a muanhuai na kulhpite uh a cip khit dong matengin noteʼ khuapite khempeuh sungah amaute in note hong umcih ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian un note hong piak sa na gam sung khempeuh uh ah a om na khuapite khempeuh sung uh ah note hong umcih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Na galte un hong umcihna le hong lungkhamsak nading ahi na lungkham hunsung uh ah Topa na Pasian un note a hong piak sa, na sung panun a piang na tanute uh le na tapate uhʼ sate na ne ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Note lakah a ngeksuak, a cithei pen mipa in a sanggampa, a it a zi le amah tawh a om a tate a nunung penʼ tungah an pia nuam lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Na khuapite khempeuh sung uh ah hong umcihna le na galte un note hong lungkhamsak nading hun sungah bangmah kinei nawn lo ding ahih manin ama nek a tateʼ sate kuamah in midang hawm nuam lo ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Note lakah a om a ngeksuak, a cithei pen numei, amah ngekin a ci neel lua ahih manin a khenuai tawh lei sik ding a ngaihsun ngei vet lo nu in a it a pasal, a tanute le a tapate adingin ama sung panin a piang a tate le ama sung panin a paikhia a nau-nungzuite phal lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hong umcihna le na galte un na khuapite uh ah note hong lungkhamsak nading lungkhamna sungah bangmah neih lohna hangin amah in tuate nesim ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Hih a minthang, a zahtakhuai min, Topa na Pasian uh na kihtak theih nadingun hih laibu sunga kigelh hih thute limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsut kei uh leh," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Topa in note le na suan na khakte uh tungah nasia-in sauvei a om gimna, gimna a tuan diak le a nasia, nat saute hong tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Amah in noteʼ kihtak Egypt natnate noteʼ tungah hong tungsakkik dinga, noteʼ tungah tuate kilawi lo ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Note na siat matengun hih thukham laibu sungah a kiciamteh lo natna le gimna khempeuh zong Topa in no tungah hong tungsak ding hi. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Note, vantung aksite zahin a tam na hihna sung uh ah tawmno bek na pha ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh thu na mang kei uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Topa in note tungah a hong bawlna le note tampi hong phaksakna ah nuam a sak mah bangin, note tungah siatna tunsakna le note suksiatna ah zong Topa in nuamsa dinga, a luah dingin na lutna uh leitang panin note hong kila khia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “ Topa in leimong khat panin mong khat, mi khempeuhte lakah note hong thehthang ding hi. Tua lai ah note le na pu na pate un a theih nai loh sing le suang tawh a kibawl pasian dangteʼ na na sem ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Hih minamte lakah oltak a nuntakna na mu kei ding uh a, kiptakin na om nading uh gam na nei kei ding uh hi. Topa in tua lai ah lungsim linna, mit gimna le nuntak tha beina hong pia dinga," 
Deuteronomy28:66 na nuntakna uh lunghimawhin na om tawntung ding uh hi. Sun le zanin na lau ngitnget ding uh a, nuntak lungmuanna na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Na lungsim un a kihtak launa le na mit un a muh ding nateʼ hangin, zingsangin, ‘Nitak hileh!’ na ci ding uh a, nitakin, ‘Zingsang hileh!’ na ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Note na zinkik ngei nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in kong ciam khualzinna, Egypt gamah teembaw tawh Topa in note hong paipihkik ding hi. Tua lai ah sila numei le sila pasal dingin na galte uh tungah na kizuak ding uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in note hong lei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Hihte pen, Horeb ah amaute tawh thuciamna a bawl sa banah, Israel mite tawh Moab gamah thuciamna a bawl dingin Topa in Moses a sawl, a thuciamna kammalte ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Moses in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Egypt gam sung noteʼ mit muh ah, Topa in Faroʼ tung le ama nasemte khempeuh le ama gam khempeuh ah a bawlna," 
Deuteronomy29:3 noteʼ mit in a muh sa ze-etna lianpite, limte, tua nalamdang liante khempeuh na thei khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Ahih hangin tu ni dongin Topa in noteʼ tungah a thu na tel nading uh lungsim hitaleh, na muh nading uh mit hitaleh, na zak nading uh bil hitaleh hong pia nai lo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kum sawm li sung sehnel gamah note hong makaih khin hi. Noteʼ tung panin na puante uh sia nai lo a, na khe panun zong na khedapte uh sia nai lo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Topa pen na Pasian uh ahihna na theih nadingun nek ding anlum le dawn ding leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin na ne nai kei uh a, ahi zongin na kisapna teng uh hong pia hi." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Hih mun na tun uh ciangin Heshbon kumpipa Sihon le Bashan kumpipa Og, eite a do dingin hong kuan khia uh a, ahih hangin amaute i zo hi." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Amauteʼ leitang i la a, Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte tungah luah dingin i pia hi." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Tua ahih ciangin na hihna khempeuh uh ah na daupai theih nadingun hih thuciamna kammalte khempeuh limtakin na zuih ding uh na ngaihsun ding uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “ Topa na Pasian un tu ni-in note tawh a bawl, Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna sungah na lut theih nadingun, tu ni-in amah in ama mi dingin note hong kipsak theih nading le noteʼ tungah hong ciamna le na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah a kiciamna bangin, amah, noteʼ Pasian ahih theih nadingin, na minam lutangte uh, na upate uh, na uliante uh, Israel mi pasal khempeuh, na taneute uh, na zite uh, na giahphual uh ah a om peemtate, na sing uh hong tomsakin na tui uh a hong tawisakte a kipan note khempeuh, tu ni-in Topa na Pasian uh mai ah na ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:11  
Deuteronomy29:12  
Deuteronomy29:13  
Deuteronomy29:14 Hih kiciamna note bek tawh a bawl hi lo a," 
Deuteronomy29:15 tu ni-in eite tawh Topa i Pasianʼ mai ah a ding mite tawh a bawl mah bangin tu ni-in eite tawh a om nai lo i suan i khakte tawh zong a bawl ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Egypt gamah i teenna le note in na nawk uh minamte lakah i paina na thei uh hi. 
Deuteronomy29:17 A muhdahhuai amauʼ na, sing le suang a kibawl, ngun le kham a kibawl, amauteʼ lakah a om a milimte uh na mu khin uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Note lakah numei ahi a, pasal ahi a, innkuan ahi a, minam khat ahi zongin, tua minamteʼ pasian a bia dingin Topa i Pasian kiang panin tu ni-in a lungsim a hei khia a om khak ding kidawm un. Tua hikeileh note lakah gu a nei gah kha a gah singkung hong bang dinga, hih kiciamna kammalte za napi-in a lungsim ah amah thupha kipia tawmin, ‘Ka lungsim khauhna tawh ka gamta zongin ka suakta veve ding hi,’ a ci hong om kha ding hi. Hih in mihoih le misia, a kibangin phiat khiatna hong suaksak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy29:19  
Deuteronomy29:20 Topa in amah maisak lo dinga, Topaʼ hehna le hazatna meikhu bangin tua mipaʼ lang khat ah khu zaw-in, hih laibu sunga kigelh samsiatnate ama tungah tu dinga, Topa in a mun khempeuh panin ama min phiat ding hi." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Topa in hih thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thuciam samsiatnate khempeuh tawh kizui-in gimna a thuak dingin Israel minamte khempeuh lak panin amah teng khia ding hi. 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Hong khanglai ding, noteʼ nungah hong piang na tate uh le a gamla gam panin a hong pai gamdang mite in, tua gamʼ gim ngahna le Topa in a natsak cinatnate a muh uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy29:23 ‘A gambup pen kaat le ci le nin a kaang tum, khai kituh lo, bangmah po lo, lopa zong a po zawh lohna mun Sodom le Gomorrah, Admah le Zeboiim bangin a kilawn thal gawp, a hehna le a sinsona tawh Topaʼ lot gawpte tawh kibang hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Minam khempeuhte in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih bangin hih gam bawl ahi hiam? Hih hehna lian, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci takpi ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Amah in Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih lai-in amaute tawh a bawl, a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topaʼ thuciamna amaute in nusia-in," 
Deuteronomy29:26 a theih nai loh uh pasian-te le amah in amaute tungah a piak loh pasian dangteʼ na va semin a biakna hang uh ahi hi. 
Deuteronomy29:27 Tua ahih ciangin a mite tungah Topa heh mahmah a, hih laibu sunga om samsiatnate khempeuh hih leitungah tungsak hi." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Topa in hehna, sinsona, lungham mahmahna tawh a leitang panun amaute zunglot a, tu ni-a i muh bangin amaute gam dangah hawl khia hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 “ Topa i Pasian in hong lahkhiat loh thusim om a, ahih hangin hih thukham sunga om thute khempeuh i zuih theih nadingin hong lak khia a, eite le i suan i khakteʼ zuih tawntung ding ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Noteʼ mai ah ka koih, na teel ding thu thupha le samsiatna, hih nate khempeuh note tungah hong tungin, Topa in note hong hawl khiatna minamte lakah hih thute phawkkikin," 
Deuteronomy30:2 Topa noteʼ Pasianʼ kiangah note le na suan na khakte uh paikikin, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh tu ni-a kong gen ama thute na man uh ciangin," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Topa na Pasian un note na ngei uh hong bangsakkikin, note tungah hehpihna hong nei dinga, Topa na Pasian un note hong thehthangna mi khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawmkik ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:4 A kihawl khia na mite uh van mong pekah a om leh zong, Topa na Pasian un tua lai panin note hong khawmin, tua lai panin amah in hong paipih ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Note in na neih theih nadingun, na pu na pate uh neih leitang ah, Topa na Pasian un hong paipih dinga, na pu na pate uh sangin a cithei zaw a tam zaw-in note hong bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Note in na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh itin na hin theih nadingun, Topa na Pasian un note le na suanlekhakte uh tungah thu man nopna lungsim hong guan ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Topa na Pasian un hih samsiatnate khempeuh, no hong bawlsia na galte uh le na langte uh tungah tungsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Note in Topaʼ thu mangkikin, tu ni-a kong gen ama thupiaknate khempeuh na zui ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Note in hih thukham laibu sunga kigelh ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte zui-in, Topa na Pasian uh thu na man uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh Topa na Pasian uh lamah na kihei uh leh, Topa na Pasian un na sepna khempeuh uh, noteʼ suanlekhakte, na ganhingte uh panin a piangte le na leitang panun a piang khempeuh ah nakpi takin hong daupaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na pu na pate uh tungah amah a lungkim mah bangin note tungah Topa hong lungkimkik dinga, note hong daupaisak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:10  
Deuteronomy30:11 “Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-a kong gen hih thupiakna pen note adingin a haksa lua hi lo a, na zuih lah ding uh zong hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theih nadingin kua in vantungah eite adingin hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theih nadingun vantung a om hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:13 Note in, ‘Eite in a thu za-in i sep theih nadingin kua in tuipi gal khat ah hong paisakin hong laksak ding ahi hiam?’ na cih theih nadingun tuipi gal a om zong hi lo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:14 A thu, hong nai mahmah hi. Note in na hih theih nadingun na kam sung uh le na lungsim sung uh ah om hi." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Tu ni-in na teel dingun noteʼ mai ah nuntakna le a hoih na, sihna le siatna ka koih khinzo hi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Topa na Pasian uh itna, ama lampite totna, ama thupiaknate le ama thukhamte le ama ngeina kipte zuihna tawh, tu ni-a no tungah kong gen ahi Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate na man uh leh, note nungta-in tampi na pha ding uh a, a luah dingin note na lutna uh leitang tungah Topa na Pasian un note thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ahih hangin na lungsim uh kihei-in, note in amah zui loin, pasian dangte a bia ding le a na a sem dingin note na kiheikhiat uh leh," 
Deuteronomy30:18 tu ni-in note tungah hih thu kong gen khol hi: Note na si ding uh a, Jordan kantanin note a lut ding le a nei dingin na paina uh leitang tungah sauvei na nungta kei ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Tu ni-in noteʼ lang khat ah teci a pang dingin vantung le leitung ka sam a, noteʼ mai ah na teel dingun nuntakna le sihna, thupha le samsiatna ka koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note le na suanlekhakte uh na hin theih nadingun nuntakna teel unla," 
Deuteronomy30:20 Topa na Pasian uh itin, ama thu mangin, amah beel un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na pu na pate uh Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah piak dingin a kiciam sa leitang ah note na ten theih nadingun tua pen note-aʼ dingin nuntakna le khansauna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Tua ciangin Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah a thugen zom lai hi. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu ni-in kei kum za le kum sawm nih ka pha ta a, keima ut bangin ka gamtang zo nawn kei hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih Jordan gal khat ah na pai kei ding hi,’ hong ci zo hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Topa na Pasian mahmah uh noteʼ mai ah hong gal kah ding hi. Noteʼ mai ah hih minamte amah in susia dinga, note in amaute na suan khia ding uh hi. Topaʼ gen sa bangin noteʼ mai ah Joshua hong gal kah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Topa na Pasian mahmah uh noteʼ mai ah hong gal kah ding hi. Noteʼ mai ah hih minamte amah in susia dinga, note in amaute na suan khia ding uh hi. Topaʼ gen sa bangin noteʼ mai ah Joshua hong gal kah ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Topa in amaute a suksiat lai-in, Amor kumpi Sihon le Og tung le amauʼ leitang tungah a bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Topa in note tungah amaute hong pia dinga, note kong piak thupiaknate khempeuh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah na bawl ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Thahat unla, hang un. Lau kei unla, amaute kihta kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note tawh hong pai pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi. Note hong cimawhsak lo dinga, hong nusia lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tua ciangin Moses in Joshua samin, Israel-te khempeuh muhin ama kiangah, “Thahat inla hang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in amauʼ pute pate tungah a ciam sa leitang ah hih mite tawh na pai dinga, nangmah in tua leitang amaute na ngahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Tua ciangin Moses in Joshua samin, Israel-te khempeuh muhin ama kiangah, “Thahat inla hang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah piak dingin Topa in amauʼ pute pate tungah a ciam sa leitang ah hih mite tawh na pai dinga, nangmah in tua leitang amaute na ngahsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Na mai ah a pai pa pen Topa ahi hi. Amah in nang hong ompih dinga, nang hong cimawhsak loin, zong hong nusia lo ding hi. Lau kei inla, lungkia kei in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Moses in hih Thukham gelhin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mi siampite le upate khempeuh tungah a pia hi. 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moses in amaute thu pia-in, “Kum sagih a cin sim, a kiseh sa suahtaksakna hun, buk pawi hunin," 
Deuteronomy31:11 amah in a teelna mun Topa na Pasian uh mai ah a kilak dingin Israel-te khempeuh a pai uh ciangin, amauʼ zakin Israel-te khempeuh mai ah hih thukham na sim ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Jordan gal khat ah a luah dingin na paina uh gamah na nuntak lai tengun amaute in a thu za-in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theih nading le hih thukham thute khempeuh limtakin a sep theih nading le hih thu a thei nai lo amauʼ tate in Topa na Pasian uh zahtak ding a theih nadingun, numei, pasal le naupangte le na khuapite uh sunga om peemtate, mi khempeuh khawm un,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:13  
Deuteronomy31:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na sih ding hun hong nai ta hi. Joshua sam inla, amah ka sawl theih nadingin kikhopna buk sungah hong om un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses le Joshua pai-in kikhopna buk sungah va om uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na sih ding hun hong nai ta hi. Joshua sam inla, amah ka sawl theih nadingin kikhopna buk sungah hong om un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Moses le Joshua pai-in kikhopna buk sungah va om uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Tua ciangin meii khuam omna puanbuk sungah Topa kilang hi. Meii khuam, puanbuk kong gei ah a ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “En in, na pu na pate kiang a zuan ding na hi ta hi. Nang na om nawn loh ciangin hih mite pen na paina uh mite lakah a gam sung pasian-te uh tawh paktat ding uh a, amaute in kei hong nusia-in amaute tawh ka bawl ka thuciamna uh siasak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Tua hun ciangin amaute tungah ka sin so-in, amaute nusia-in ka mai ka seel dinga, amaute bei mang ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin amaute in, ‘Eiteʼ lakah i Pasian a om loh manin hih siatnate i tungah hong tung hi lo ahi hiam?’ a cih theih nadingun amaute tungah siatna le gimna tampi tung ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Amaute, pasian dangte lamah kihei uh ahih manin amauʼ gamtatna sa siatnate khempeuh hangin tua hun ciangin ka mai ka seel taktak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Tua ahih ciangin hih lai gelh inla, Israel mite hilh in. Hih la, kei adingin Israel miteʼ lang khat ah teci a suah theih nadingin amaute tungah hilh in." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh tungah piak dinga ka kiciamna, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gamah amaute tunpih khinin, amaute in ne-in khamin a thau khit uh ciangin, pasian dangte a bia dingin kihei-in kei hong simmawhin ka thuciamna siasak ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Siatna le haksatnate amaute tungah a tun ciangin hih la, teci-in amauteʼ lang khat ah pang ding hi (bang hang hiam cih leh a suanlekhakte un mangngilh lo ding uh hi); bang hang hiam cih lehpiak dingin ka kiciam leitang ah amaute ka paipih ma-in, amauʼ vaihawm kholh a ngimnate uh ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni mahin Moses in hih la gelh a, Israel mite a hilh hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua ciangin Topa in Nunʼ tapa Joshua sawlin, “Thahat inla hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin ka kiciam leitang tungah Israel mite na paipih dinga, nang tawh kong om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Tua ciangin Topa in Nunʼ tapa Joshua sawlin, “Thahat inla hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin ka kiciam leitang tungah Israel mite na paipih dinga, nang tawh kong om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Moses in a bei dongin hih Thukham kammalte laibu sungah a gelh a man ciangin," 
Deuteronomy31:25 Moses in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite thu pia a," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Hih Thukham laibu la unla, noteʼ lang khat ah teci dingin a om theih nadingin Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang gei ah koih un." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh a lehdo mite le a lungkhauh thei mite na hihna uh ka thei hi. En un, note tawh kei a nungta khawm laipi mahin, tu ni-in Topa na lehdo khin uh hi. Ka sih khit ciangin bangzah takin lehdo zaw lai ding na hi uh hiam!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hih thute amauteʼ bilah genin, amauʼ lang khat ah teci a pang dingin vantung le leitung ka sap theih nadingin na minam upate uh le na uliante khempeuh uh kei kiangah hong khawm un." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sih khit ciangin note siat gamtatin, note kong sawlna lampi panin na pial taktak ding lam uh ka thei hi. Noteʼ sepna tawh amah hehsakin, Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta ding na hih manun, hong pai ding hunte ah, noteʼ tungah gimna hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Tua ciangin hih la malte a bei dongin Israel a kikhawm khempeuhteʼ zakin Moses in gen a," 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Vantungte aw, ngai un, thu kong gen ding hi. Ka thugente leitung in za hen." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ka thuhilhte guah mal bangin zu-in, ka thugente daitui bangin kia henla, lo ngeek tunga guah phin leh ankung tunga guahzu bang tahen." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ min ka phat ding hi. Eiteʼ Pasian a liatna gen un! 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Eiteʼ belh Topa, a nasepna kicing a, ama sepna khempeuh thumanna ahi hi. Thumanna nei-in, mawhna a nei lo Pasian hi a, amah thutangin thuman hi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Ama tungah amaute gamtat sia uh a, amauteʼ sitbaanna hangin ama tate hi nawn lo uh hi. Amaute pen a lampial, a lungsim kawi khang mite ahi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:6 A hai, ngaihsutna nei lo mite aw, tua bangin Topa thuk ding na hi uh hiam? Amah pen, note a hong piangsak, note hong bawlin a hong kipsak, na pa uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 “A beisa hunte phawk unla, khang tampi hunte ngaihsun un. Na pate uh dong le-uhcin, hong hilh ding uh a, na upate uh dong le-uhcin hong gen ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Sangpen pa in minam dangte tungah amauʼ gamh pia a, mihingte a ten nading mun a seh ciangin vantungmi a phazah tawh a kizui-in miteʼ gamgi a phut hi." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ahi zongin Topaʼ tanh pen ama mite hi a, Jakobʼ suante pen a kipia ama luah ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Amah in sehnel gam, huihpi nunna gam sungah amaute mu hi. Amah in amaute kawi-in kem a, ama mitnauta bangin amaute kem hi." 
Deuteronomy32:11 A bu a vil, a note tungah a kha a zap, a khate zakin a note a man, a kha tawh a note a pua muvanlai bangin" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Topa bek mah in amaute makaih a, amaute kiangah gamdang pasian om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Amah in leitung a sangna ah amaute tuangsak a, amaute in gamlak pan a piangte a ne uh hi. Suangpi panin amaute khuaizu hupsakin, meisuang tawh a kibang suang panin sathau a nesak hi." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Bawng hon panin bawngnawi-thaukhal, tuu hon panin tuunawi, tuunote le tuutalteʼ thau tawh, Bashan bawnghonte le keelte, mangbuh hoih pente tawh leenggahtui san na dawn uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Israel mite thau mahmah uh a, a lehdo thei mi suak uh hi. Note thau-in lianpi pha-in, na zol uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a bawl Pasian amaute in nusia-in, amau a Hon khia pa thusim lo uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Amaute pen pasian dangte tawh ama hazat theih nadingin gamta uh a, a kihhuai gamtatnate tawh amaute in amah hehsak uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Amaute in pasian ahi lo dawite, amauʼ theih ngei loh pasian-te, hong suak nunung pasian thakte, na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh pasian-teʼ tungah biakna a pia uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Note a hong Hon khia pa na phawk kei uh a, note a hong suaksak Pasian na mangngilh uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “ Topa in tua thu thei a, a tapate le a tanute in amah hehsak uh ahih manin tua ama tate a nolh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Amah in, ‘Amauteʼ kiang panin ka mai ka seel dinga, amauteʼ thumong bang hong hi hiam, ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a lampial khang mite hi a, cihtakna a nei lo tate ahi uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Amaute in pasian ahi lote tawh ka hazat nading hong bawl uh a, a milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi-a a gen taak lo mite tawh amauteʼ hazat theih nading ka bawl dinga, a hai mahmah minam khat tawh amaute ka hehsak ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna in mei tawhkuang a, Leinuaiteʼ gam dong a kuang hi. Leitung le a tunga piangte kaang tum a, mualteʼ bulpite kuangsak hi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “‘Amauteʼ tungah siatna ka khol dinga, amauteʼ tungah ka thaltangte ka zang ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Gil kialin amaute si ding uh a, a sa mahmah meikuang le gunei natna in amaute ne tum ding hi. Keimah in amaute a pet dingin ha hiam a nei gamsate amaute a tu dingin gu a nei gulte ka sawl ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Namsau in gamlak ah amaute susia-in, inn sungah launa lianpi om dinga, tangval le nungak, naungek nawi nete, sam kangte tawh susia khawm ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Keimah in, “Amaute gamlapi ah ka thehthang dinga, mite lakah amaute a kiphawkna ka beisak ding hi,” ka ci thei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Amauʼ langte in ngaihsun khialin, amaute in, “Eite i gualzo hi. Topa in hihte khempeuh bawl lo hi,” hong ci kha ding uh ahih manin galteʼ hong phin ding ka lau hi,’ a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, ngaihsutna a nei lo minam hi a, amauteʼ sungah thu theihtelna om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Amaute a pil hileh, hih thu thei tel ding uh a, amauʼ thu tawpna mu ding uh!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Amau a Hon khia pa in amaute zuakin, Topa in amaute pia khia kei leh bangci-in mi khat in mi tul khat delh mangin, mi nih in mi tul sawm taisak zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh i galteʼ pasian eiteʼ Pasian bang hi lo a, i galteʼ thungetna a mawkna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Amaute, Sodom le Gomorrah bangin siahuai uh a, gu nei-in a kha leenggah a gah leenggui tawh kibang uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Amauʼ leenggahzu pen gulpi gu le a gupha gul gunei gu tawh kibang hi. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Hihte kei kiangah kikholin, ka vankoihna sungah kisiincip hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Phulakna le thukkikna kei aʼ hi a, a hun ciangin amaute puk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gim ngah hun ding hong nai ta a, amauʼ siat nading hong tung pah hi." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ vang a beina le sila le sila ahi lote a beina a muh ciangin Topa in a miteʼ dikna kilangsak dinga, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna nei ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Amauʼ pasian-te, a bukna uh suangpi," 
Deuteronomy32:38 amauteʼ biakpiakna thau ne-in, leenggahzu tawh a biakna uh a dawnte koi ah om ahi hiam? Amaute thosakin note kihuhsak unla, amaute, na kidalna uh hisak un!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 ‘Tu-in thei un, keimah a kici pa pen kei ka hi a, kei sim loh pasian dang kuamah om lo hi. Ka that a, ka nungtasak hi. Ka liamsak a, ka damsak hi. Ka khut sung pan a hon khia zo kuamah om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung lamah ka khut laam to-in ka kiciam a, a nungta tawntung ka hih mah bangin," 
Deuteronomy32:41 a tee ka namsau taatin, thu ka khen ciangin, ka galte tungah phu ka la dinga, kei hong mudahte ka thukkik ding hi." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thaltangte si ka tawksak dinga, ka namsau in mi that ding hi. a kithatte le a kimante, kei hong langpangte, su gawp ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Topaʼ mite phat un, no minam dangte aw; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a nasemteʼ phu la a, a langte thuk-in, ama miteʼ gam adingin kilemna a bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tua ciangin Moses hong pai-in, miteʼ zakin amah le Nunʼ tapa Joshua in hih la malte khempeuh a sut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tua ciangin Moses hong pai-in, miteʼ zakin amah le Nunʼ tapa Joshua in hih la malte khempeuh a sut uh hi." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moses in Israel-te khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen a man ciangin 
Deuteronomy32:46 amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khempeuh limtakin zui unla, na tate un a zuih dingin na hilh theih nadingun tu ni-a note tungah kong gen thu khempeuh na lungsim uh ah koih un." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen note adingin a thuneu hi loin noteʼ nuntakna hi a, a luah dingin Jordan gal khat na paina uh gam sungah hih thu tawh sau veipi na hing ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Tua ni mahmah in Topa in Moses kiangah," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Jerikho gal lam, Moab gam sungah a om Nebo Mual, hih Abarim mual tungah kah to in. A neih dingun Israel mite tungah ka piak Kanaan gam gal et in." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Hor Mual tungah na sanggampa Aaron si-in a mite kiangah a kigawm bangin, na kah tohna mual tungah si inla, na mite kiangah pai-in kigawm in." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Bang hang hiam cih leh Zin gam, Kadesh khua gei-a Meribah tui phual, Israel mite lakah keimah nong upna nasiasak a, Israel mite lakah a siangtho-in kei nong zahtak kei hi." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Tua ahih manin na mai ah a om gam na gal muh tei dinga, ahih hangin Israel mite ka piak gam sungah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Hih pen, Pasianʼ mi Moses in ama sih ma-in Israel mite thupha a piakna ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Amah in, “Sinai panin Topa hong pai a, Sinai panin eite ading hong suak khia hi. Paran Mual panin hong taang khia a, a taklam khut ah meikuang tawi-in, mi siangtho tul sawmte kiang panin a hong pai hi." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Hi taktak hi; amah in a mite it a, ama tungah a ki-ap mi khempeuh a khut sungah om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in na kalsuanna hong zui uh a, nang tung panin lamlahna ngah uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Jakob mihonteʼ neih dingin Moses in kote tungah ngeina khat hong pia hi. 
Deuteronomy33:5 Miteʼ makaite kikhawmin, Israel minamte khempeuh a kikaihkhop ciangin, ama mi Israel-te lakah Topa, kumpi a suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Reuben minamteʼ thu gen a, “Reuben nungta-in si kei henla, ama mite zong mi tawm hi kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Tua ciangin Judah minamteʼ thu genin, “ Topa aw, Judahʼ aw ngai inla, a mite kiangah amah paipih in. Na khutte tawh ama ading do inla, a galteʼ dona ah a huhpa hi in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Tua ciangin Levi minamteʼ thu genin, “Levi tungah na Thummim pia inla, na midik pa tungah na Urim pia in. Massah ah na ze-et mipa, Meribah tuite ah na kitot pih pa ahi hi." 
Deuteronomy33:9 A nu le a pa sangin nangmah hong thupi ngaihsut zaw uh a, ‘Amaute ka thupi sim kei hi,’ a ci pa ahi hi. Amah in a sanggamte paai khia-in, a tate don lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi minamte in na thu hong mangin, na thuciamna zui uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Amaute in na ngeina kipte Jakob suante hilhin, na thukhamte Israel-te hilh ding uh hi. Amaute in na mai ah paknamtui hong koihin, na biakna tau tungah meihal biakna bup hong koih ding uh hi." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Topa aw, ama nate tungah thupha pia inla, a khut tawh a sepnate saang in. A galteʼ kawng sutan inla, a dingkik zo nawn lo dingin amah a mudahte su gawp in,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Benjamin minamteʼ thu genin, “ Topa in a it mipa ama kiangah nuam takin om hi. Amah in sun tawntung kemin, amaute lakah om hi,” a ci hi."
