Deuteronomy33:13 Josef minamteʼ thu genin, “ Topa in ama leitang, tung lamah a om vantung letsong hoih pente, le nuai-a om a thuknate tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:14 ni hanga gah a hoih pente, le kha hanga piang a hoih pente tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:15 tanglai mualte tunga piang a hoih a limci pente le tawntung mualteʼ hauhna tawh," 
Deuteronomy33:16 leitung le a tunga om letsong hoih pente le sawlbawk lakah a teeng paʼ maipha tawh thupha pia tahen. Hihte khempeuh, Josef tungah tung henla, a sanggamte lakah ulian ahi mipaʼ lu tungah tung tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:17 A tacil, bawngtal bangin thahat a, a kite, gamsial kite tawh kibang hi. Amah in tuate tawh mite nawt dinga, leimong dongah amaute khempeuh phul ding hi. Efraim mi tul sawmte tua bang hi a, Manasseh minam tul tampite zong tua bangmah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Zebulun minamteʼ thu genin, “Zebulun aw, na pai khiatna ah lungdam in. Issakhar aw, na puanbukte sungah lungdam in." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Amaute in a mual uh ah mite sam ding uh a, amaute in tua lai ah biakpiakna mante pia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tuipi tung le sehnel sungah na manpha kiseelte ngah uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad minamteʼ thu genin, “Gad a lianin a bawlpa in thupha ngah tahen! Gad in humpinelkai bangin buk khikhe a, amah in a baan le a luzang, a bal kham hi." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Amah in leihoih penna mun ama adingin teel hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ukpaʼ tanh kikoihcingsak hi. Mi makaiteʼ ngahte mah amah zong kingahsak a, amah in Israel-te tawh Topaʼ thupiakna le thuman khennate a sem hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan minamteʼ thu genin, “Dan pen Bashan panin a diang khia humpinelkai no ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Naftali minamte thu genin, “O Naftali, maipha tawh nuam a sa, Topaʼ thupha tawh a kidim, bualtuite le leitaw lam a nei pa,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Asher minamte thu genin, “Asher in tapa dangte sangin thupha ngah zaw tahen. A sanggamteʼ pahtak hi henla, a gam sungah oliv thau kidim tahen." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Na khuapite, sik le sumngo tawh kidal dinga, na nuntak lai teng na thahatna tua bang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Israel aw, nangmah huh dingin vantungah a tuang a liatna tawh vanpi ah a om, Pasian tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Tawntung Pasian pen nangma omna hi a, nangmah huh dingin tawntung khutte a om hi. Amah in na mai ah galte nawt khia-in, ‘Susia un,’ ci hi." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite lungmuangin om ding uh hi. Jakob suante bek an le leenggahzu gamah om hi. Hi taktak hi, a vantungte in daitui hong khiat suk hi. Israel aw, mi nuamsa na hi hi. Nang hong kihuhna lum le na gualzawhna lum le na gualzawhna namsau ahi Topa in nang banga a hotkhiat mi kua om ahi hiam?" 
Deuteronomy33:29 Na galte in hong mai-etin, na kiangah hong pai ding uh a, amaute na tuancil ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Tua ciangin Moab zanglei panin Jerikho gal Nebo Mual, Pisgah dawnah Moses pai to hi. Tua ciangin Topa in gam khempeuh, Gilead gam pan Dan ciang dong," 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naftali gam khempeuh, Efraim le Manasseh gam, Judah gam khempeuh Nitumna Tuipi dong," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Negeb gam le nisuh kung khuapi kuam a kici Jerikho panin Zoar ciang dong a kikhung zanglei a lak hi. 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Hih gam, Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tungah kiciamin, ‘Na suanlekhakte uh tungah ka pia ding hi,’ ka cih leitang ahi hi. Na mit tawh nang kong musak khin a, ahih hangin tua lai ah nang na pai kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thugenna bangin Topaʼ nasem Moses pen Moab gamah si a," 
Deuteronomy34:6 Beth-peor gal khat, Moab gam kuamah amah kiphum hi. Ahih hangin tu hun dongin a kiphumna mun kuamah in thei lo hi." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moses a sihin kum za le kum sawm nih pha hi. A mit maang lo a, a tha ngeina zong kiam lo hi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Moab zanglei ah Israel mite ni sawm thum sung Moses hangin a kah khit uh ciangin Moses hangin kahna le thumna a veng ta hi. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tua ciangin Moses in, ama tungah a khut nga khin ahih manin Nun tapa Joshua lungsim pilna tawh a kidim hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in ama thu mangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin a gamta uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tua ciangin Moses in, ama tungah a khut nga khin ahih manin Nun tapa Joshua lungsim pilna tawh a kidim hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in ama thu mangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak sa bangin a gamta uh hi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Israel mite sungah Moses bangin Topa in maitang kimu-in a theih kamsang dang kuamah om lo hi. 
Deuteronomy34:11 Egypt gam sungah Faro le a nasemte le a gam khempeuh ah a hih dingin Topa in ama tungah a piak limte le nalamdangte khempeuh a nei kuamah dang om lo hi. 
Deuteronomy34:12 Israel-te khempeuh muhna ah Moses in a hih a lian vangliatna le a lauhuaite khempeuh a hih thei, amah tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Joshua1:1 Topaʼ nasem Moses a sih khit ciangin Topa in Mosesʼ nasem, Nun tapa Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua1:2 “Ka nasem pa Moses si ta ahih ciangin tu-in ding inla, nang le hih mite khempeuh, hih Jordan kantanin Israel mite tungah ka piak gam sungah pai un." 
Joshua1:3 Moses tungah ka ciam sa bangin na khe in a sikna mun khempeuh nang tungah kong pia hi. 
Joshua1:4 Sehnel gam le hih Lebanon panin gun lianpi Eufratis gun dong, ni a tumna lam a Tuipi Lian lam, Hit miteʼ leitang khempeuh nangma gam hi ding hi." 
Joshua1:5 Na nuntak sung tawntung kuamah in na mai hong khak zo lo ding hi. Moses tawh ka om mah bangin nang tawh zong kong om ding hi. Nang kong tamasak kei dinga, kong nusia kei ding hi." 
Joshua1:6 Thahat inla, hang in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute piak dingin a pu a pate uh tungah ka ciam leitang hih mite na luahsak ding hi." 
Joshua1:7 Thahat-in hang inla, ka nasem Moses in nang hong piak thukhamte khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat ding limtakin ngaihsun in. Na paina peuh ah hoihtakin na lamzan theih nadingin tuate khat zong pelh kei in." 
Joshua1:8 Hih thukham laibu na mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. A sunga kigelh thute khempeuh tawh kizui-in na gamtat theih nadingin sun le zanin na lung ngaingai ding hi. Tua hileh na maa vang dinga, na nasep tangtung ding hi." 
Joshua1:9 Thu hong pia khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Thahat inla hang in. Lau kei inla lungkia kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina peuhpeuh ah Topa na Pasian nang tawh hong om hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:10 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi makaite thu pia-in," 
Joshua1:11 “Giahphual ah pai unla, mite thu pia-in, ‘Na lam-an ding uh kiging khol un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un na neih dingun note hong piak leitang ah pai-in a luah dingin ni thum sungin hih Jordan a gal kah ding na hi uh hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:12 Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte tungah," 
Joshua1:13 “‘ Topa na Pasian un note tawlngakna mun hong pia-in, hih leitang note hong pia ding hi,’ a cihna Topaʼ nasem Moses in note tungah hong gen kammal phawk un." 
Joshua1:14 Moses in Jordan gal khat a note hong piak leitang ah na zite uh, na taneute uh le na ganhingte uh a na om ding uh hi. Ahih hangin note lakah galhang mi khempeuh in hiam tawi-in Jordan kantanin na sanggamte uh mai ah pai-in," 
Joshua1:15 note hong piak bangin Topa in na sanggamte uh tungah tawlngakna pia-in, Topa na Pasian un amaute a piak leitang amaute in zong a luah mateng uh na huh ding uh hi. Tua ciangin noteʼ neih leitang ah ciahkikin, Topaʼ nasem Moses in Jordan gal ni a suahna lamah note hong piak leitang na luah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua1:16 Amaute in Joshua dawngin, “Kote nong thupiak khempeuh ka hih ding uh a, nong sawlna peuhpeuh ah ka pai ding uh hi." 
Joshua1:17 Na khempeuh ah Mosesʼ thu ka man uh mah bangin nangma thu zong kong mang ding uh hi. Moses a ompih mah bangin Topa na Pasian in nang hong ompih tahen! 
Joshua1:18 Na thupiakna le na thute, na thupiak peuhpeuh hong langpangin a mang lo mipa kithat ding hi. Thahat inla hang in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:1 Tua ciangin Nunʼ tapa Joshua in Shittim panin thukanin mi nih sawlsim a, “Pai-in gam va en unla, a diakdiakin Jerikho khua hong en un,” a ci hi. Amaute pai uh a, Rahab min nei numei paktat nuʼ inn ah tungin giak uh hi." 
Joshua2:2 Jerikho kumpipa tungah, “Gam sung a en dingin Israel mi pawl khat tu nitakin hih lai ah hong tung zo hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
Joshua2:3 Tua ciangin Jerikho kumpipa in Rahab kiangah mi sawlin, “Na inn sunga hong tum, na kiang a hong tung mite hong paikhiatpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh gam khempeuh a en dingin amaute hong pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:4 Ahih hangin Rahab in tua mi nihte la-in na seel khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Hi mah hi, ka kiangah mi hong pai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute koi pan hong pai uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi." 
Joshua2:5 Kulh kongpi a kikhak ding khuamial ciangin tua mite paikhia uh a, koi ah pai uh hiam, cih ka thei kei hi. Manlangin amaute delh le-uhcin na pha kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:6 Ahih hangin amah in innkhum zang ah tua mite paipih to-in innkhum zang ah a koih ngei bangin a koih sa anthul kungte lakah amaute seel khin hi. 
Joshua2:7 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Jordan lamah ngahmun dong delh uh a, a delhte a paikhiat phetin kulh kongpi kikhak hi." 
Joshua2:8 Amaute a lup ma-in innkhum zanga amaute kiangah Rahab pai to-in 
Joshua2:9 tua mite kiangah, “ Topa in noteʼ tungah hih leitang hong piak khitna ka thei a, note ka hong kihta mahmah uh hi. Hih gam sunga a teeng mi khempeuh noteʼ hangin lunggim uh hi." 
Joshua2:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin nong paikhiat lai-un Topa in noteʼ mai ah San Tuipi a kansakna le Jordan gal khat a om na suksiat mang uh Amor miteʼ kumpi nihte ahi Sihon le Og tungah na bawlna uh ka za khin uh hi. 
Joshua2:11 Tua thu ka zak phetun ka lungsim uh bei a, noteʼ hangin miteʼ lungsimah hanna bei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh, tunga om vantung le nuai-a om leitungah Pasian ahi hi." 
Joshua2:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note tungah kong dik gamtat bangin note zong ko innkuan ah nong dik gamtat nading uh Topaʼ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam unla, a man taktak lim khat kei hong pia un." 
Joshua2:13 Ka nu, ka pa, ka sanggam nute, ka sanggampate le amaute tawh a kizomte khempeuh hong hon unla, sihna panin kote hong suaktasak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:14 Mite in ama tungah, “Nangʼ tangin kote ka si ngam uh hi. Hih koʼ thu na genkhiat kei nakleh, Topa in kote tungah hih leitang hong piak ciangin nang tungah dikna le thumanna tawh kong gamta ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:15 Tua ciangin amah in tawlet panin khau khat tawh amaute khai suk hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuapi kulh sung lam pangah ama inn kilam a, khuapi kulh sungah amah teeng hi." 
Joshua2:16 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Mual tungah pai un. Hong delhte tawh na kituak kha ding uh hi. Hong delhte hong ciahkik mateng ni thum sung tua lai ah bu un. Tua khit ciangin na pai nading uh ah na pai thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua2:17 Mite in ama kiangah, “Kote nong kiciamsak thuciamna thu tawh kisai-in ka paubaang kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua2:18 En in, hih leitang ah kong pai uh ciangin kote nong khai sukna hih tawlet ah hih khauhual san na khih ding hi. Na inn sungah na nu le na pa, na sanggamte le na paʼ innkuanpihte khempeuh na khawm ding hi." 
Joshua2:19 Mi khatpeuh na inn sung panin kongzing lampi ah a paikhiat le ama sihna pen ama khialhna hang hi dinga, kote ka siang ding uh hi. Ahih hangin inn sungah nang tawh a om mi khatpeuh a kisukkhak leh, ama sihna pen koteʼ khialhna hi ding hi." 
Joshua2:20 Ahih hangin hih ko thute na genkhiat leh, kote nong kiciamsak thuciamna tawh kisai-in kote ka siang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua2:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Na thugen bangun hi tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute sawl khia a, amaute paikhia uh hi. Amah in a khauhual san a tawlet ah a khih hi." 
Joshua2:22 Amaute pai khia-in mual tungah pai uh a, a delhte a ciahkik mateng ni thum sung om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a delhte in lamdung khempeuh zongin bangmah mu lo uh hi." 
Joshua2:23 Tua ciangin mual tung panin mi nihte pai sukkik uh a, gal kahin Nunʼ tapa Joshua kiangah tungin amauʼ tunga thupiang khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Joshua2:24 Amaute in Joshua kiangah, “ Topa in leitang khempeuh eiteʼ khut sungah hong pia taktak hi. Tua tham loin tua gam a teeng mi khempeuh eiteʼ hangin lungmang uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua3:1 A zing ciangin Joshua tho baihin Israel mi khempeuh tawh Shittim pan ding khia-in Jordan gun tung uh a, a gal kah ma-un tua munah a giak uh hi." 
Joshua3:2 Ni thum a cin ciangin giahphual ah uliante pai-in 
Joshua3:3 mite thu pia uh a, “ Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang Levi siampite in a puak na muh uh ciangin na omna panun ding khia-in na zui ding uh hi." 
Joshua3:4 Hih lamah pai ngei lo na hih manun na pai nading uh lampi tu-a bangin na thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin note le tua Thuciamna Singkuang kikalah mun awng, pi tul thum bang om ding hi. A gei ah pai kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua3:5 Tua ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Nomau mah kisiangsak tawm un; bang hang hiam cih leh zing ciangin noteʼ lakah Topa in nalamdangte hong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:6 Tua ciangin Joshua in siampite kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang la unla, miteʼ mai ah paisuak un,” a ci hi. Amaute in Thuciamna Singkuang la-in miteʼ mai ah a pai uh hi." 
Joshua3:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Moses tawh ka omkhop bangin nang tawh kong omkhop nading thu amaute in a theih nadingun Israel mite khempeuh muhna ah tu ni-in nang liatsak ding ka kipan ding hi." 
Joshua3:8 Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite thu na pia dinga, ‘Jordan tuiteʼ gei na tun uh ciangin Jordan tui sungah tang loin na ding ding uh hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:9 Tua ciangin Joshua in Israel mite kiangah, “Hih lai ah hong pai unla, Topa na Pasian uh thute za un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:10 Joshua in, “A nungta Pasian note lakah a omna hih thu tawh na thei ding uh hi. Amah in pel loin noteʼ mai panin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Hiv mite, Perez mite, Girgash mite, Amor mite le Jebus mite hawl khia ding hi." 
Joshua3:11 En un, leitung buppiʼ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang noteʼ mai Jordan lamah pai ding hi." 
Joshua3:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel minamte sung panin nam khat pan mi khat, mi sawm le nih teel un." 
Joshua3:13 Leitung buppiʼ Topa ahi Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampiteʼ khete in Jordan tui a sik ciangin Jordan tuite luang nawn lo dinga, a tung lam panin hong luang suk tuite lom khatin khawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua3:14 Tua ahih ciangin miteʼ mai ah Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite tawh Jordan gal kah dingin a puanbuk uh panin mite ding khia-in," 
Joshua3:15 Thuciamna Singkuang a puate Jordan tunga, Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampiteʼ khe tui ah a kidiah ciangin (anlak hunsung khempeuh Jordan a piau khempeuh ah let hi)," 
Joshua3:16 a saklam panin hong luang suk tuite khawlin khangto a, a gamlapi, Zarethan gei-a khuapi Adamah ah a lomin kikhol a, Ci Tuipi a kici Arabah tuipi ah a luang sukte kikhensat siang hi. Tua ciangin Jerikho gei ah mite gal kah uh hi." 
Joshua3:17 Israel-te khempeuh lei keu tungah a gal kah sung, minam bup in Jordan a khen khit mateng, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan gun laizang lei keu tungah ding uh hi." 
Joshua4:1 A minam bupin Jordan a gal kah khit uh ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua4:2 “Nam khat pan mi khat, mite lak panin mi sawm le nih teel inla," 
Joshua4:3 amaute thu pia-in, ‘Siampiteʼ khe a dinna mun mahmah, Jordan gun laizang panin suangtum sawm le nih la unla, a galah pua-in tu nitakin na giahna uh munah koih un,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:4 Tua ciangin Joshua in nam khat panin mi khat, ama seh sa mi sawm le nihte Israel mite lak panin a sam hi." 
Joshua4:5 Joshua in amaute kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian uh Thuciamna Singkuang mai Jordan laizang ah pai unla, note in Israel minam phazah tawh kizui-in suangtum khat ciat la-in na liangko tung uh ah pua un." 
Joshua4:6 Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangtumte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot ciangin noteʼ lakah lim khat hi ding hi." 
Joshua4:7 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah Jordan tuite kikhentan a, Jordan a gal kah laitakun Jordan tuite kikhentan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih suangtumte pen Israel mite tungah a tawntungin phawkna hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:8 Joshuaʼ thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, Topa in Joshua a thupiak bangin Israel minam a phazah tawh kizui-in Jordan laizang panin suangtum sawm le nih a la uh hi. Amaute in a giahna uh munah tuate pua-in a koih uh hi." 
Joshua4:9 Tua ciangin Joshua in Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampiteʼ khe a dinnasa mun, Jordan laizang ah zong suang sawm le nih mah a phut hi. Tu ni dongin tua suangte tua mun mahah om lai hi." 
Joshua4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Joshua a thupiak bangin mite tungah a gen dingin Topa in Joshua a thupiak khempeuh a vekpi-in a kiman khit matengin Jordan laizang ah Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite a ding uh hi. Mite nawhsa-in gal kah uh hi. 
Joshua4:11 Mite khempeuh a gal kah khit uh ciangin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le siampite, miteʼ mai ah na ma pai uh hi." 
Joshua4:12 Moses in amaute a sawl sa bangin Israel mite mai ah hiam tawi-in Reuben minamte, Gad minamte le Manasseh minam a langte na ma pai uh a," 
Joshua4:13 mi tul sawm li bang galdo dingin hiam tawi-in a baih sa-in Jerikho zanglei lam Topaʼ mai ah a pai uh hi. 
Joshua4:14 Tua ni-in Israel-te khempeuhʼ muhna ah Topa in Joshua liansak hi. Amaute in Moses lamdang sa-in a om uh mah bangin Joshua a nuntak sung tawntung lamdang sa-in a om uh hi. 
Joshua4:15 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua4:16 “Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan panin hong paikhiat nading thu pia in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in siampite thu pia a, “Jordan panin hong paikhia un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua4:18 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua siampite Jordan laizang panin hong pai khia-in, siampiteʼ khe lei keu tungah hong om toh ciangin, a ngeina bangin amauʼ munah Jordan tuite hong luangkikin a piau khempeuh a tuum hi." 
Joshua4:19 Kha masa a ni sawm ni-in Jordan panin mite paikhia uh a, Jerikho nisuahna lam gamgi Gilgal ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Joshua4:20 Jordan panin a lakkhiat uh tua suangtum sawm le nihte Joshua in Gilgal ah a phut hi. 
Joshua4:21 Tua ciangin amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Hong tung ding hunah na tate un, ‘Hih suangte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh ciangin," 
Joshua4:22 ‘Israel-te in lei keu tungtawnin hih Jordan kantan hi,’ ci-in na tate uh na theisak ding uh hi." 
Joshua4:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite in i kantan khit matengin Topa na Pasian un a kansak San Tuipi tungah a bawl bangin, note in na kantan khit matengun Topa na Pasian un Jordan tuite note adingin kangsak hi." 
Joshua4:24 Topa vanglian mahmah hi, ci-in leitung mi khempeuh in a theih nading le Topa na Pasian uh na zahtak tawntung theih nading uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:1 Nitumna lam Jordan gal khat a om Amor miteʼ kumpite khempeuh le tuipi gei-a om Kanaan miteʼ kumpi khempeuh in, Israel mite in a kantan khit mateng amaute adingin Jordan tuite Topa in a kansakna thu a zak uh ciangin lungmang uh a, Israel miteʼ hangin a lungsim uh a bei hi." 
Joshua5:2 Tua hun laitakin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Meisuang tem bawl inla, Israel mite a nih veina vun atkik in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in meisuang tem bawl a, Gibeath-haaraloth munah Israel mite a vun a at hi." 
Joshua5:4 Joshua in amaute vun a atna a thu in: Egypt gam panin hong paikhia pasal galhang mite khempeuh, Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh ciangin lamkal sehnel gamah si khin uh hi." 
Joshua5:5 Hong paikhia mite khempeuh vun a ki-at khit hangin Egypt panin hong paikhiat khit uh sehnel gam lamkal a suak mite khempeuh a vun uh ki-at nai lo hi. 
Joshua5:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topaʼ thu a ngaih lohna hangun Egypt panin a hong paikhia minam bup, galhang mite a sih khit dong kum sawm li sung sehnel gamah Israel mite lam pai uh hi. Topa in amauʼ tungah a piak dingin a pu a pate tungah a ciam sa bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna leitang a muhsak loh nading thu amaute tungah Topa kiciam hi." 
Joshua5:7 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in vun a at mite pen, amauteʼ tangin amah in a piansak amauʼ tate ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lampi ah amaute a vun ki-at nai lo ahih manin vun at nai loh ahi uh hi." 
Joshua5:8 Minam bup vun ki-atna a man khit ciangin giahphual amauʼ mun ciatah a dam mateng a om uh hi. 
Joshua5:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Tu ni-in noteʼ tung panin Egypt gamah sal suakin na min siatna uh ka zial khia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen tu ni dongin Gilgal kici hi." 
Joshua5:10 Israel mite Gilgal-a giahphual ah a om sungun tua kha a ni sawm le li ni nitakin Jerikho zanglei ah Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi. 
Joshua5:11 Paisan Pawi khit a zing ciang ni teekteekin amaute in tua gam a piang silngo sawh loh moh le ankan a ne uh hi. 
Joshua5:12 Tua gam a piang a nek ni uh a zing ciangin manna a bei ta hi. Israel mite in manna nei nawn lo uh a, ahih hangin tua kumin Kanaan leitang a piangte a ne uh hi." 
Joshua5:13 Jerikho khua kiangah Joshua a tun ciangin a khuadak toh leh, a khut sungah namsau dawh sa tawh mi khat a mai ah na ding hi. Ama kiangah Joshua pai-in, “Koʼ pawl na hi hiam, ahih kei leh ka langteʼ pawl na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:14 Amah in, “Hi lo hi; Topaʼ galkapte a ukpa-in tu-in kong pai hi,” a ci hi. Joshua zong bok sukin bia-in ama kiangah, “Ka topa in a nasem pa bang hong sawl nuam ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua5:15 Tua ciangin Topaʼ galkapte a ukpa in Joshua kiangah, “Na khe panin na khedapte suah in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dinna mun a siangtho leitang ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangmahin Joshua a gamta hi." 
Joshua6:1 Tu-in Israel miteʼ hangin Jerikho kulh kongpi kikhakcip a, kuamah pusuak thei lo, sung tum thei lo hi." 
Joshua6:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Thei in, na khut sungah a kumpipa le a mi thahatte tawh Jerikho khua kong pia khin hi." 
Joshua6:3 Khuapi kimkot ah galkap mi khempeuh khatvei na pai ding uh hi. Tua bangin ni guk sung na pai ding uh hi. 
Joshua6:4 Siampi sagih in Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawi ding uh hi. A ni sagih ni-in khuapi kimkot ah sagih vei na pai ding uh a, siampite in peengkul tum ding uh hi." 
Joshua6:5 Amaute in tuutal ki sau veipi a ginsak khit uh ciangin, peengkul aw na zak phetun nakpi takin mi khempeuh awng ding uh hi. Khuapi kulh cimmai dinga, mi khempeuh amau mai ciatah tangtakin khuapi sungah paisuak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Nun tapa Joshua in siampite samin amaute kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang la unla, tua Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah siampi sagihte tuutal ki peengkul sagih tawisak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:7 Tua ciangin amah in mite kiangah, “Mai nawtin pai un. Khuapi kimkot ah pai unla, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah hiam tawi mite paisak un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:8 Joshua in mite a thupiak bangin Topaʼ mai ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul a tawi siampi sagihte mai nawtin pai-in peengkul tum uh a, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang in amaute zui hi." 
Joshua6:9 Tua ciangin peengkul a tum siampiteʼ mai ah hiam tawi mite pai uh a, peengkulte a kitum suak hun laitakin Thuciamna Singkuang nungah a nungdalte a pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:10 Ahih hangin Joshua in mite thu pia-in, “Awng un, ci-a kong sawl hun matengin note awng loin, na aw uh zong na kizasak kei ding uh a, na kam panun aw khat beek ging khia lo ding hi. Awng un, kong cih ciangin na awng bek ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:11 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang khuapi kimkot ah khatvei paisak a, amaute hong ciahkikin giahphual ah a zan giak uh hi." 
Joshua6:12 Tua ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baih a, siampite in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a la uh hi." 
Joshua6:13 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah a pai tuutal ki peengkul sagih a tawi siampi sagihte pai suakin peengkulte tum suak uh hi. Amauteʼ mai ah hiam tawite pai-in, peengkulte a kitum suak hun laitakin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang nungah a nungdalte a pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:14 A ni nih ni-in khuapi kimkot ah khatvei pai uh a, giahphual ah ciahkik uh hi. Tua bangin ni guk sung a hih uh hi." 
Joshua6:15 A ni sagih ni-in khuavak tungin tho baih uh a, tua bangmahin khuapi kimkot ah sagih vei a pai uh hi. Tua ni bekin khuapi kimkot ah amaute sagih vei pai uh hi." 
Joshua6:16 A sagih veina ah, siampite in peengkul a tum ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Awng un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in khuapi note hong pia zo hi." 
Joshua6:17 Khuapi le a sunga omte khempeuh pen Topaʼ tungah biakna-in kisusia ding hi. Amah in i sawl kamtaite na seel ahih manin numei paktat Rahab le ama inn sungah amah tawh a om khawmte khempeuh bek hing ding hi. 
Joshua6:18 Ahih hangin suksiat dingin a kiseh nate panin nomau mah na kikem ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh tuate na suksiat ding uh ciangin a kisusia ding nate khat peuhpeuh iplahin la kha-in Israel-teʼ giahphual sungah siat nading na khat suaksakin haksatna na tun kha ding uh hi. 
Joshua6:19 Ahih hangin ngun le kham, sumngo le sik tawh kibawl nazatte Topa adingin a siangtho ahi hi. Topaʼ sumkoihna ah tuate tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:20 Tua ahih ciangin mite awng a, peengkulte kitum hi. Mite in peengkul aw a zak phetun nakpi takin awng uh a, kulhpi cimmai-in, mi khempeuh amau mai ciatah tangtakin khuapi sungah pai uh a, khuapi a la uh hi." 
Joshua6:21 Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi sunga om khempeuh numei le pasal, a moi a ham, bawngtalte, tuute le late khempeuh namsau tawh that mangkhin uh hi." 
Joshua6:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in tua gam thu a va kansim mi nihte kiangah, “Numei paktat nuʼ inn ah va pai unla, tua lai panin a numei le amah tawh a kizom khempeuh, ama tungah na ciam sa bangun hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:23 Tua ahih ciangin thu kansim tangvalte va tum uh a, Rahab, a nu, a pa, a sanggamte le amah tawh a kizom khempeuh a paikhiatpih uh hi. Amaute in tua nuʼ tanau teng khempeuh paipih uh a, Israel-teʼ giahphual pua lamah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua6:24 Amaute in khuapi le a sunga om khempeuh mei tawh hal uh a, ngun le kham, sumngo le sik tawh a kibawl nazatte bek Topaʼ inn-a sumkoihna ah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua6:25 Ahih hangin numei paktat Rahab le tua nu tawh a kizomte khempeuh Joshua in a hingkhawi hi. Jerikho khua thu a kansim dingin Joshua in a sawl kamtaite tua nu in na seel ahih manin tu ni dongin Israel mite lakah a suanlekhakte a teeng uh hi. 
Joshua6:26 Tua hun laitakin Joshua in amaute tungah thuciamna khat koih a, “Mi khat kipanin hih Jerikho khuapi a lamkik pa in Topaʼ mai ah samsiatna thuak tahen. A tacil luang khaamin tua khuapi bulpi phut dinga, a tapa neu pen luang khaamin a kulh kongpite phut ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua6:27 Tua bangin Topa in Joshua ompih a, gam khempeuh ah ama min a thang hi." 
Joshua7:1 Ahih hangin a ki-ap nate tawh kisai-in Israel mite zuau tat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minam Zerah tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan in a ki-ap nate pawl khat la ahih manin Israel mite tungah Topa heh mahmah hi." 
Joshua7:2 Joshua in Jerikho panin Bethel nisuahna lam Bethaven gei-a om Ai khua ah mi sawlin amaute kiangah, “Pai to unla a gam va en un,” a ci hi. Tua mite pai to-in Ai khua va ensim uh hi." 
Joshua7:3 Amaute Joshua kiangah hong ciahkikin ama kiangah, “Mi khempeuh kuan tosak kei inla, mi tul nih ahi a, tul thum ahi zongin kuan tosakin Ai khua simsak in. Amaute mi tawmno khat ahih manin tua lai ah mi khempeuh gim tosak kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua7:4 Tua ahih ciangin mite lak panin tul thum bang tua lai ah a kuan to uh hi. Ai miteʼ mai ah amaute tai uh a," 
Joshua7:5 Ai mite in amauʼ kulh kongpi mai panin Shebarim ciang dong delh uh a, tuah sukna munah amaute sawm thum le guk khawng a that uh hi. Hih thu hangin Israel miteʼ hanna bei-in, lau mahmah uh hi." 
Joshua7:6 Tua ciangin Joshua in dahna limin ama puante bal kekin nitak mateng Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah, amah le Israel upate bok suk uh a, amaute in a lu tung uh ah leivui a koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:7 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Ala! Topa Pasian, kote a hong susia ding Amor miteʼ khut sungah a hong pia dingin bang hangin hih mite Jordan gal khat ah hong paipih peuhmah na hi hiam? Jordan gal khat ah ten ding a lungkim hi hoh ta le-ung!" 
Joshua7:8 Topa aw, Israel-te a galte uh mai ah a nungkik uh ciangin bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam!" 
Joshua7:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan mite le hih gam a teeng mi khempeuh in hih thu za ding uh a, kote hong umcihin leitung panin kote hong phiat khia mang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin a lian mahmah nangma min bang cih ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:10 Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Tho in, bang hangin tua bangin lei ah bok na hi hiam?" 
Joshua7:11 Israel mite khial a, amaute in ka thupiak thuciamna palsat khin uh hi. Amaute in a ki-ap nate pawl khat la uh a, amaute in gu-in zuau thu gen uh a, amauʼ van lakah tua nate koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:12 Tua thu hangin Israel mite in a galte uh nang zo lo uh hi. Amaute pen suksiat ding mi na suak khin uh ahih manin a galte uh mai ah nungkik uh hi. Noteʼ lak panin a ki-ap nate na suksiat kei uh leh note tawh kong om khawm nawn kei ding hi. 
Joshua7:13 Tho in, mite siansuah inla, ‘Zing cianga dingin note kisiansuah tawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian Topa in, “Israel mite aw, noteʼ lakah a ki-ap nate om hi. Noteʼ lak panin a ki-ap nate na lakkhiat matengun na galte uh na nang zo kei ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Joshua7:14 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin na mi namnamun note hong kipaipih ding hi. Topa in a lak minam sung panin a behbehin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a beh sung panin a inn kuankuanin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a innkuan sung panin a mimi-in hong pai ding hi. 
Joshua7:15 Tua ciangin a ki-ap nate tawh a kilakhawm mipa le a neih khempeuh, mei-in kihal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topaʼ thuciamna palsat hi. Israel sungah a zumhuai-in a gamta ahi hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:16 Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baihin, a namnamin Israel-te hong paipih a, Judah minam kila hi." 
Joshua7:17 Tua ciangin amah in Judah behte hong paipih a, Zerah-te beh kila hi. Amah in Zerah-te beh a mimi-in hong paipih a, Zabdi kila hi." 
Joshua7:18 Tua ciangin amah in ama innkuanpihte a mimi-in hong paipih a, Judah minam Zerahʼ tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan kila hi." 
Joshua7:19 Tua ciangin Joshua in Akhan kiangah, “Ka tapa aw, Israel Topa Pasian min thangsak inla, amah phat in. Tu-in na gamtatna sate kei tungah hong gen inla, bangmah hong im kei in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:20 Tua ciangin Akhan in Joshua dawngin, “A taktakin, Israel Topa Pasian tungah ka khial khin a, hih bangin ka gamta kha hi." 
Joshua7:21 Shinar panin van kia lakah puan hoih khat le ngun shekel za nih a gik le shekel sawm nga a gik kham tawn khat ka muh ciangin, tuate iplahin ka la kha hi. Tu-in tuate ka puanbuk sung leilak ah a ngunte a nuai ah omin kiseel hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua7:22 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in sawltakte sawl a, amaute a puanbuk ah va tai uh a, a puanbuk sungah a ngun nuainungin na kiseel takpi hi." 
Joshua7:23 Amaute in puanbuk panin tuate la khia-in Joshua le Israel mite khempeuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ mai ah a koih uh hi." 
Joshua7:24 Tua ciangin Joshua le amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh in Zerahʼ tapa Akhan le a ngun, a puan, a kham tawn, a tanute, a tapate, a bawngtalte, a late, a tuute, a puanbuk le a neih khempeuh la uh a, amaute in Akhor Kuam ciangah tuate a paipih uh hi." 
Joshua7:25 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Bang hangin kote tungah gimna hong tun na hi hiam? Tu ni-in Topa in nang tungah gimna hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in suang tawh Akhan a deng lum uh hi. Amaute in a innkuan pih dangte le a neihsate uh zong suang tawh deng lumin a hal uh hi." 
Joshua7:26 Tua ciangin amaute in tu ni donga a om suang honpi ama tungah a ciang uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ hehluatna a dai hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu dongin tua mun pen Akhor Kuam, kici hi." 
Joshua8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Lau kei inla lungkia kei in. Galkap khempeuh nang kiangah la inla, kithawi-in Ai ah pai to in. Nangma khut sungah Ai kumpipa le a mite, a khuapi le a leitang kong piak khitna thei in." 
Joshua8:2 Jerikho le a kumpipa tungah na bawl bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah na bawl dinga, a van kinusiate le a ganhingte bek note adingin na la ding uh hi. A khuapi nungah a khuapi a sim dingin na buk sim ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua8:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua le galkap khempeuh Ai ah a pai to dingin kipan uh hi. Joshua in a tha kicing mi thahat tul sawm thum teel a, zanin tua mite a sawl khia hi." 
Joshua8:4 Amah in amaute thu pia a, “En un, tua khuapi a sim dingin a nungah na buk sim ding uh a, khuapi panin gamlapi ah na pai kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a kiging sa-in na om ding uh a," 
Joshua8:5 tua ciangin keimah le kei tawh a om mite khempeuh in khuapi kong naih ding uh hi. A masa bangin kote a do dingin hong kuan khiat uh ciangin amauteʼ mai ah kote ka na tai khem ding uh hi. 
Joshua8:6 Khuapi panin amaute hong paikhiat khit uh matengin kote hong delh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ‘A masa-a bangin eiteʼ mai ah amaute tai uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kiang panin ko ka tai ding uh hi." 
Joshua8:7 Tua ciangin na buk simna panun note na kipan ding uh a, khuapi na la ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un noteʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi." 
Joshua8:8 Khuapi na lak khit uh ciangin Topaʼ hong sawlna bangin hihin, mei tawh khuapi na hal ding uh hi. Note thu kong piak khitna thei un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua8:9 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute a sawl khia hi. A buk sim nading uh munah amaute pai-in, Ai nitumna lam, Bethel le Ai kikalah pang uh a, ahih hangin tua zanin giahphual a mite lakah Joshua om lai hi." 
Joshua8:10 Zingsangin Joshua tho baihin mite sam a, miteʼ mai ah Israel upate tawh Ai ah a pai to uh hi." 
Joshua8:11 Amah tawh a om galkap khempeuh pai to uh a, khuapi mai naihin Ai leilu lam pangah phual sat uh a, Ai le amauteʼ kikalah luihawm khat om hi." 
Joshua8:12 Tua ciangin amah in mi tul nga bang paipihin, khuapi nitumna lam Bethel le Ai kikalah a buk sim dingin a koih hi." 
Joshua8:13 Tua ahih ciangin galkapte, khuapi leilu lamah a phualpi le khuapi nitumna lamah a nungdalte a koih uh hi. Ahih hangin tua zanin Joshua kuam sungah a om hi." 
Joshua8:14 Ai kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin amah le tua khuapi mi khempeuh, Israel-te a do dingin manlangin kithawi-in Arabah lam pai sukna ah zing tungin a kuan khia uh hi. Ahih hangin khuapi nungah amah a buk sim a om lam thei lo hi." 
Joshua8:15 Tua ciangin amauʼ mai ah Joshua le Israel-te khempeuh kilelsak khem uh a, gamlak lamah a tai uh hi." 
Joshua8:16 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi sunga om mi khempeuhte amau a delh dingin kikaikhawm uh a, Joshua a delh uh ciangin amaute khuapi panin a kihem khia ahi hi." 
Joshua8:17 Ai khua sung pan Israel-te a delh lo pasal khat beek om lo uh a, khuapi kong hon sa-in nusia-in Israel-te a delh uh hi." 
Joshua8:18 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Na khut sunga om teipi Ai lamah zan in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah tua khua kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in a khut sunga om teipi khuapi lamah a zan hi." 
Joshua8:19 Tua ciangin a buk simte diang khia pah uh a, amah in a khut a zan khit phetin amaute tai-in khuapi sungah lut uh a, a khuapi la-in manlangin a hal uh hi." 
Joshua8:20 Ai mite in a nung etkik uh ciangin, khuapi meikhu vanah a kah to a mu uh hi. A nung a mai koi mahah tai thei lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak lamah tai-in a kilelsak khemte in amau a delhteʼ lamah hong kihei-in leh delhkik uh hi." 
Joshua8:21 A buk simte in khuapi a lak khitna le khuapi meikhu a kah tohna Joshua le Israel khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin amaute kiheikikin Ai mite vat gawp uh hi. 
Joshua8:22 Tua ciangin Ai khua mite a do dingin khuapi panin Israel dangte hong kuan khia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ kikalah amaute om uh a, pawl khat hih lamah pawl khat hua lamah om uh ahih manin a suakta khat zong a om lo dongin Israel-te in amaute a vatmai uh hi." 
Joshua8:23 Ahih hangin amaute in Ai kumpipa hingmatin Joshua kiangah a paipih uh hi. 
Joshua8:24 Amaute in a delhna gamlak ah Ai khuami khempeuh thatin, amaute khempeuh a bei dongin namsau tawh a thah uh a man khit uh ciangin, Israel-te khempeuh Ai ah paikikin Ai khuami a omlaite namsau tawh a vat gawp uh hi." 
Joshua8:25 Tua ni-in a si, Ai mi khempeuh numei le pasal a vekpi-in tul sawm le tul nih ahi hi." 
Joshua8:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ai khuami khempeuh a suksiat mang khit matengin amah in a teipi a zanna a khut dokkik lo hi. 
Joshua8:27 Amah in Joshua a thupiak, Topaʼ thugenna bangin Israel-te in ganhing le khuapi sunga van kinusiate bek a la uh hi." 
Joshua8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Ai hal a, tu ni donga a om mah bangin nin khol napi khatin piangsak den hi." 
Joshua8:29 Tua ciangin amah in nitak mateng sing khat tungah Ai kumpipa a khai hi. Ni a tum ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin a luang la sukin, khuapi kulh kongpi lutna ah paai uh a, a tungah suangtum lompi ciang uh a, tu ni dongin tua suangcian om lai hi." 
Joshua8:30 Tua ciangin Joshua in, Moses Thukham Laibu sungah, “A kiseek lo suangte tawh a kibawl biakna tau, kuamah in a tungah sik nazat a lik loh,” ci-in a kigelh mah bangin, Topaʼ nasem Moses in Israel mite a thupiakna bangin, Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian adingin Ebal Mual tungah biakna tau khat a bawl hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua tungah Topa adingin meihal biaknate pia-in, thunuam a biakna te a go uh hi." 
Joshua8:31  
Joshua8:32 Tua lai mun, Israel miteʼ omna ah, Moses in a gelh sa a thukhamte tua suangte tungah a gelh hi." 
Joshua8:33 Tua ciangin Israel mite in thupha a ngah theih nadingun Topaʼ nasem Moses in a thupiak sa bangin Israel mite khempeuh peemta hitaleh tualsuak hitaleh, a upate le a uliante le a thukhente uh tawh, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi siampiteʼ mai, Thuciamna Singkuang lang khat, Gerizim Mual mai lamah mi alang, Ebal Mual mai lamah mi alang a ding uh hi." 
Joshua8:34 Tua khit ciangin amah in thukham laibu sunga a kigelh bangbangin thukham kammal khempeuh, thupha le samsiatnate a sim hi." 
Joshua8:35 Moses in a thupiak kammalte khempeuh Israel mihonpite, numeite le amaute lakah a teeng peemtate mai ah Joshua in a sim loh khat zong om lo hi." 
Joshua9:1 Jordan gal khat a om mual tung gam le lei niamna gam Lebanon lam Tuipi Lian dung khempeuh ah a om kumpite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin" 
Joshua9:2 Joshua le Israel mite a do dingin lungsim kikhatin kikhawm uh hi. 
Joshua9:3 Ahih hangin Gibeon khua-a teeng mite in Jerikho le Ai tungah Joshuaʼ hihnasa thu a zak uh ciangin 
Joshua9:4 amaute in khembawl ding vaihawm uh a, lam-an bawlin, a late uh tungah a paat sa ip le a paat sa leenggahzu um, a kikeek leh a kiphopte suanin," 
Joshua9:5 a khe uh ah a paat sa, a kiphop khedapte bulhin, a paat sa puante tawh a pai uh hi. A ante khempeuh uh zong keu-in ap hi." 
Joshua9:6 Amaute Gilgal-a giahphual a Joshua kiangah hong pai-in amah le Israel mite tungah, “A gamlapi panin kong pai uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna khat hong bawl un,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:7 Ahih hangin Israel mite in tua Hiv mite kiangah, “Koteʼ mai ah a teeng mite na hi kha thei ding uh hi. Tua hileh note tawh thuciamna hong bangci bawl theih ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:8 Amaute in Joshua kiangah, “Kote, nangma nasem ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Kuate na hi uh hiam? Koi lai panin hong pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua9:9 Amaute in, “ Topa na Pasian uh min hangin a gamla mahmah gam panin na nasemte kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu le Egypt gam sungah a hihte khempeuh," 
Joshua9:10 le Jordan gal khat ah a om Amor kumpi nihte ahi, Ashtaroth ah a teeng Heshbon kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og tungah a hihte khempeuh a kigenna ka za khin uh hi." 
Joshua9:11 Ka upate uh le ka gam sung uh a a teeng mite khempeuh in kote kiangah, ‘Na khualzin nading uh lam-an bawl unla, amaute a dawntuah dingin pai-in amaute kiangah, “Kote, na nasem ka hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kote tawh thuciamna hong bawl un,” va ci un,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:12 Hih lai ah ka anlum uh om hi. No kiangah a hong pai dingin kong dinkhiat ni uh, khualzin lam-an dingin ka inn panun ka guan laitakun lum lai hi. Ahih hangin tu-in en un, keu-in ap hi." 
Joshua9:13 Hih leenggahzu umte ka thun laitakun a thak ahi hi. Tu-in en un, puak gawp ta hi. Hih ka puante uh le ka khedapte uh khual gamlapi zinna-in paat gawp ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:14 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in amauʼ an puakte sang kha uh a, Topaʼ tung panin lamlahna dong lo uh hi." 
Joshua9:15 Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute tawh kilemna bawlin, amaute a hinsak nading thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin mihonteʼ makaite amauʼ tungah a kiciam uh hi." 
Joshua9:16 Amaute tawh thuciamna a bawl khit uh ni thum a cin ciangin, amaute pen a veengte ahihna le amauteʼ nai ah a teengte ahihna thu a za uh hi." 
Joshua9:17 Israel mite ding khia uh a, a ni thum ni-in amauteʼ khuapite a ban uh hi. Amauʼ khuapite pen Gibeon, Khefirah, Beeroth le Kiriath-jearim na hi hi." 
Joshua9:18 Ahih hangin, Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh mihonteʼ makaite kiciam zo uh ahih manin Israel mite in amaute that lo uh hi. Tua ciangin makaite tungah mihon khempeuh phun uh hi." 
Joshua9:19 Ahih hangin makaite khempeuh in mihon khempeuh tungah, “ Topa, Israel Pasian min tawh amaute tungah i kiciam zo a, tu-in amaute i su thei kei ding hi." 
Joshua9:20 Amaute tungah i kiciam thuciamna hangin eite tungah hehna hong tung kha ding ahih manin hih bangin gamta-in amaute i hingsak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:21 Tua ciangin makaite in mihonte kiangah, “Amaute hingsak un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin makaiteʼ gen mah bangin mihon khempeuh adingin amaute pen sing suite le tui tawite a suak uh hi." 
Joshua9:22 Joshua in amaute samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin koteʼ nai hih lai ah a teeng hi napi-in, ‘Noteʼ kiang panin gamla mahmah ung,’ cihna tawh kote hong khem na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua9:23 Tu-in note hong kisamsia a, note pawl khat a tawntungin sila, ka Pasian uh inn-a dingin sing suite le tui tawite na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua9:24 Amaute in Joshua dawngin, “Gam khempeuh nang tungah a hong piak nading Topa na Pasian in a nasem pa Moses a thupiakna le na mai panin gam sunga a teeng mi khempeuh suksiat taktak nading thu na nasemte kiangah hong kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin noteʼ hangin nakpi takin ka lunghimawh uh a, hih bangin ka gamta kha uh hi." 
Joshua9:25 Tu-in, en in, nangma khut sungah kote ka om uh hi. Hoih na sak bang leh kote tungah bawl dingin nangma muhna ah man na sak bangin hong bawl in,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua9:26 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute tungah tua bangin bawl a, Israel miteʼ khut sung panin amaute hon khia a, amaute thatsak lo hi." 
Joshua9:27 Ahih hangin Joshua in mihonte le Topaʼ biakna tau-a dingin singtomte le tui tawite a suaksak hi. Topa in amah biak nadingin a teelna munah tu ni dongin tua nasepte mah amaute in sem uh hi. 
Joshua10:1 Joshua in Ai a lakna zia le Jerikho le a kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Ai le a kumpipa tungah a bawlna le Gibeon khua sunga teeng mite in Israel-te tawh kilemna a bawlna le amaute lakah a omna thu Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in a zak ciangin 
Joshua10:2 nakpi takin a lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeon pen kumpi khuate khat mah bangin khua lian khat hi a, Ai khua sangin zong lian zaw-in a mite khempeuh zong mi thahat ahi hi." 
Joshua10:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem kumpipa Adonizedek in Hebron kumpipa Hoham kiang, Jarmuth kumpipa Piram kiang, Lakhish kumpipa Jafia kiang le Eglon kumpipa Debir kiangah kamtai sawlin," 
Joshua10:4 “Kei kiangah hong pai un. Hong huh unla, Gibeon vat gawp ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Joshua le Israel mite tawh kilemna na bawl khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:5 Tua ciangin Amor kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi le Eglon kumpi, a galkapte khempeuh uh tawh pai to-in Gibeon lang khat ah phual satin a do uh hi." 
Joshua10:6 Tua ciangin Gibeon mite in Gilgal-a giahphual a Joshua kiangah kamtai sawlin, “Na nasemte hong nusia kei in. Manlang takin ko kiangah hong pai to-in, kote hong hon inla, hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mual tung gam a teeng Amor kumpite khempeuh kote langpangin kikhawm uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua10:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin amah le galhang mite khempeuh le a thahat mi khempeuh tawh Joshua a kuan to hi. 
Joshua10:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Amaute na khut sungah hong pia khin ka hih manin amaute kihta kei in. Amaute khat beek in nang hong nang zo lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Gilgal panin zan tawntung pai to-in Joshua in thakhat thu-in amaute sim gawp hi. 
Joshua10:10 Topa in Israel-teʼ mai ah amaute amkhamsakin, amaute in Gibeon ah amaute tampi tak that uh a, Beth-horon pai tohna lampi ah amaute delhin, Azekah le Makkedah ciang dong amaute a vat gawp uh hi." 
Joshua10:11 Israel-teʼ mai ah amaute a tai laitak, Beth-horon pai tohna ah amaute a pai suk laitakun, Topa in vantung panin gialpi lianpite Azekah khua ciang dong, amauteʼ tungah lawn suk a, amaute a si uh hi. Israel mite in namsau tawh a thah sangin tua gialpi hangin a si mi tam zaw hi." 
Joshua10:12 Tua ciangin, Topa in Israel mite tungah Amor mite a piak ni-in Joshua in Topa tungah thu gen a, amah in Israel miteʼ muhna ah, “Ni aw, Gibeon ah, Kha aw, Aijalon Kuam ah khawlcip in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:13 Tua ciangin hih minamte in a galte uh a zawh khit mateng ni ding cipin kha a khawl hi. Hih thute, Jasharʼ Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Vankim lai ah ni khawlin ni khat bup bang tum suk lo hi." 
Joshua10:14 Tua hun ma hitaleh tua hun khit hitaleh Topa in mi khat thu a ngaih tua ni bang nidang om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel mite adingin a dosak hi. 
Joshua10:15 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a giahphual ah a ciahkik hi." 
Joshua10:16 Hih kumpi ngate tai-in Makkedah leihawm sungah bu uh hi. 
Joshua10:17 Tua ciangin Joshua kiangah, “Kumpi ngate Makkedah leihawm sungah a bu kimu khin hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
Joshua10:18 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Suangtum lianpite a leihawm gong lik nelh unla, a cing dingin a gei ah mi koih un." 
Joshua10:19 Ahih hangin note tua lai ah om kei un. Na galte uh delhin a nungdalte bawh unla, a khuapi sung uh ah amaute lutsak kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian un noteʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:20 Joshua le Israel mite in amaute a beisiang dongin tampi tak a thah khit uh ciang le a suakta lai mite amauʼ khuapi muanhuai sungah a tum khit uh ciangin," 
Joshua10:21 Makkedah giahphual Joshua kiangah mi khempeuh cidamin a ciahkik uh hi. Israel mite khatpeuh a paupih ngam kuamah om lo hi. 
Joshua10:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Leihawm gong hong unla, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate kei kiangah hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:23 Amaute in tua bangmahin hih uh a, leihawm panin tua kumpi ngate, Jerusalem kumpi, Hebron kumpi, Jarmuth kumpi, Lakhish kumpi le Eglon kumpite, ama kiangah a paipih uh hi." 
Joshua10:24 Amaute in Joshua kiangah tua kumpi ngate a paikhiatpih uh ciangin, Joshua in Israel mi khempeuh samin, amah tawh a kuan khawm galkap maangte kiangah, “A nai ah hong pai unla, hih kumpiteʼ ngawng ah na khe uh nga un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute a nai ah hong pai-in, a khe uh amauteʼ ngawng tungah a nga uh hi." 
Joshua10:25 Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Lau kei unla, lungkia kei un. Thakhauh unla, hang un. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ do na gal khempeuhte uh tungah Topa in hih bangin bawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua10:26 Tua khit ciangin Joshua in amaute satin sisak a, singkung nga tungah amaute a khai hi. Amaute in nitak dong sing tungah a khai uh hi." 
Joshua10:27 Ahih hangin ni a tum hun ciangin Joshua in thu pia a, amaute in sing tung panin la khia sukin, amaute a bukna sa leihawm sungah lawn suk uh a, suangtum lianpite leihawm gongah a koih uh hi. Tu dongin tua suangtumte om lai hi." 
Joshua10:28 Tua ni-in Joshua in Makkedah khua la a, namsau tawh tua khua le a kumpipa vat gawp hi. A sunga om mi khempeuh susia mangin, bangmah siit lo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin Makkedah kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:29 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Makkedah panin Libnah ah paisuak uh a, Libnah khua a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:30 Topa in tua khua le a kumpipa zong Israel miteʼ khut sungah a pia hi. Amah in namsau tawh tua khua le a sunga om mi khempeuh a vat gawp hi. Tua khua sungah bangmah siit lo a, Jerikho kumpipa tungah a bawl bangin a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:31 Tua ciangin Joshua, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Libnah panin Lakhish ah paisuak uh a, tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:32 Topa in Israel miteʼ khut sungah Lakhish pia a, amah in a ni nih ni-in la-in, Libnah a bawl bangin tua khua le a sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh a vat gawp hi." 
Joshua10:33 Tua ciangin Lakhish a huh dingin Gezer kumpipa Horam hong kuan to hi. Ahi zongin khat zong a om nawn lo dongin Joshua in amah le a mite a vat gawp hi. 
Joshua10:34 Tua ciangin Lakhish panin Eglon ah, amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh tawh Joshua pai suakin tua khua umcihin a sim uh hi." 
Joshua10:35 Tua ni mahin tua khua la uh a, namsau tawh a vat gawp uh hi. Lakhish a hih mah bangin tua khua sunga om mi khempeuh tua ni-in amah in a susia mang hi." 
Joshua10:36 Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Eglon panin Hebron ah a pai to hi. Amaute in tua khua simin," 
Joshua10:37 la-in, namsau tawh tua khua le a kumpi le a kiim a om khempeuh a vat gawp hi. Eglon tungah a bawl bangin amah in kuamah siit lo a, tua khua le a sunga om khempeuh a susia mang hi." 
Joshua10:38 Tua ciangin Joshua, Israel-te khempeuh tawh Debir lamah kiheikikin tua khua a sim hi." 
Joshua10:39 Amah in a kumpipa le a kiimnai-a khuapite khempeuh tawh tua Debir khua a la hi. Amaute in namsau tawh vat gawp uh a, a sunga om mi khempeuh a susia mang uh hi. Amah in kuamah siit lo a, Hebron le Libnah le a kumpipa tungah a bawl sa bangin Debir le a kumpipa tungah a bawl hi." 
Joshua10:40 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mual tung gam le Negeb gam le lei niamna mun le mual pang suk le a khuapite khempeuh a zo hi. Amah in kuamah siit lo a, Israel-teʼ Topa Pasianʼ thupiak sa bangin mi khempeuh a susia mang hi." 
Joshua10:41 Joshua in amaute Kadesh-barnea panin Gaza ciang dong le Goshen gam khempeuh Gibeon ciang dong a zo gawp hi. 
Joshua10:42 Israel-teʼ Topa Pasian in Israel-te adingin dosak ahih manin Joshua in hih kumpite khempeuh le amauʼ leitang hun khat sungin a la khin hi. 
Joshua10:43 Tua ciangin amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh tawh Gilgal-a a giahphual ah Joshua a ciahkik hi. 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-teʼ gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab le Shimron kumpipa, Akshaf kumpipa," 
Joshua11:1 Hazor kumpipa Jabin in Israel-teʼ gualzawhna thu a zak ciangin amah in Madon kumpipa Jobab le Shimron kumpipa, Akshaf kumpipa," 
Joshua11:2 saklam mual tung le Khinneroth leitaw lam a om Arabah gam sung le Jordan gunkuam le nitumna lamah Nafathdor gam sunga om kumpite," 
Joshua11:3 nisuahna le nitumna lam a om Kanaan mite, Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite le mual tung gam a om Jebus mite le Mizpah gam Hermon nuai-a Hiv mite tungah thu a puak hi." 
Joshua11:4 Tua ciangin amaute tampi a pha a galkap honpite tawh, a tam mahmah sakolte le leengte tawh, tuipi gei-a om sehnel bangin tampi tak hong kuan khia uh hi." 
Joshua11:5 Hih kumpite khempeuh in amauʼ galkapte gawmin Israel mite tawh a kido dingin hong pai-in Merom lui ah giahphual a sat khawm uh hi. 
Joshua11:6 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Zing ciang tu bang hunin amaute khempeuh a kithat sa-in Israel mite tungah pia ding ka hih manin amaute kihta kei un. A sakolte uh a zagui na sat tat ding uh a, a leengte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua11:7 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua zong a galkapte khempeuh tawh thakhat thu-in Merom lui gei amaute kiangah pai-in va sim uh hi. 
Joshua11:8 Topa in Israel-teʼ khut sungah amaute pia a, amaute in vat gawpin a Lian Sidon le Misrefoth-maim ciang dong le nisuahna lamah Mizpeh kuam ciang dong delh uh a, amaute kuamah a om nawn lo dongin a vat gawp uh hi." 
Joshua11:9 Topaʼ sawl bangin Joshua in amaute hih a, amauʼ sakolte uh a zagui sat tat sakin mei tawh a leengte uh a halsak hi." 
Joshua11:10 Tua hun laitakin Joshua kiheikikin Hazor la a, namsau tawh a kumpipa a that hi. (Tua hun laitakin Hazor khua pen tua kumpipa gam khempeuh sungah a thahat pen ahi hi.)" 
Joshua11:11 Amaute in tua sunga om mi khempeuh namsau tawh that khin mang uh hi. Khat zong hingkhawi lo uh a, a khuapi uh zong a hal tum uh hi." 
Joshua11:12 Topaʼ nasem Moses in a thupiak sa bangin Joshua in tua kumpiteʼ khuapite le a kumpi khempeuh la-in namsau tawh amaute vatin that mangkhin hi. 
Joshua11:13 Ahih hangin Hazor khua longal mual tunga om khuapite khat zong Israel mite in hal lo uh a, Joshua in tua khua bek a hal hi." 
Joshua11:14 Israel mite in tua khuapite sunga van kinusiate le ganhingte amauʼ gal zawh van dingin a la uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute a thah khit matengun namsau tawh vat gawp uh a, khat beek hingkhawi lo uh hi." 
Joshua11:15 Topa in ama nasem Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in zong Joshua thu pia a, Joshua zong tua bangmahin gamta a, Topa in Moses a thupiaknate khempeuh a hih loh om lo hi." 
Joshua11:16 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in gam khempeuh, mual tung gam le Negeb gam le Goshen gam khempeuh le lei niamna gam le Arabah le Israel-teʼ mual tung gam le a lei niamna gamte," 
Joshua11:17 Seir lamah a kikhung to Halak Mual panin Hermon Mual nuai Lebanon kuama om Baalgad ciang dong a la hi. Amah in amauʼ kumpite khempeuh la-in amaute vat gawpin a that hi. 
Joshua11:18 Hih kumpite khempeuh le Joshua sau veipi sung a kido hi. 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khua-a teeng Hiv mite longal, Israel mite tawh kilemna a bawl khuapi khat zong om lo hi. Amaute in tua khua dangte khempeuh simin a lak uh ahi hi." 
Joshua11:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Moses a thupiakna bangin amaute a kisuksiat mang nading le hehpihna ngah loin a kibeisak theih nadingin Israel-te a do nadingin a lungsim uh a khauhsak pa pen Topa ahi hi. 
Joshua11:21 Tua hun laitakin Joshua hong pai-in mual tung gam, Hebron, Debir, Anab le Judah mual tung gam khempeuh le Israel mual tung gam khempeuh panin Anak mite not khia siang a, Joshua in a khuapite uh tawh amaute susia mang khawm hi." 
Joshua11:22 Israel miteʼ leitang ah Anak mite khat zong om nawn lo a, Gaza, Gath le Ashdod sung bekah pawl khat om lai hi." 
Joshua11:23 Topa in Moses tungah a gen sa bangin Joshua in leitang khempeuh a la hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amau minam tawh kizui-in a ngah ding bangin Israel mite tungah gamh-in a pia hi. Tua hun a kipan galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi. 
Joshua12:1 Tu-in nisuahna lam Jordan gal khat, Arnon kuam panin Arabah khempeuh, Hermon Mual ciang dong Israel mite in a leitang uh laksakin a zawh kumpi nihte:" 
Joshua12:2 Heshbon ah a teeng Amor kumpi, Arnon kuam gei-a om Aroer pan le Gilead kuam laizang panin phel lang ahi Ammon miteʼ gamgi Jabbok gun ciang dong le Arabah panin nisuahna lamah Khinneroth Tuipi le Beth-jeshimoth lamah Pisgah mual pang bul leitaw lam a om Ci Tuipi ahi Arabah tuipi ciang dong a uk Sihon;" 
Joshua12:3  
Joshua12:4 le Bashan kumpi, Refaim panin a suaktate lakah khat, Ashtaroth le Edrei ah teengin, Hermon Mual le Salekah le Bashan gam khempeuh, Geshur mite le Maakath mite gamgi ciang le Gilead lang khat panin Heshbon kumpipa Sihonʼ gamgi ciang dong a uk Og ahi hi." 
Joshua12:5  
Joshua12:6 Topaʼ nasem Moses le Israel mite in amau tegel a zo uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ nasem Moses in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte tungah a neih dingun amauʼ leitang a pia hi." 
Joshua12:7 Hihte pen, Joshua le Israel mite in a zawh Jordan nitumna lam pang, Lebanon kuam sung Baalgad panin Seir lamah a kikhung to Halak Mual kikal a om kumpite ahi hi. (Joshua in mual tung gam, lei niamna gam, Arabah gam, mual pang suk, sehnel gam le Negeb gam sunga om Hit mite, Amor mite, Kanaan mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus miteʼ leitangte Israel minamteʼ tungah amauʼ ngah ding tawh kizui-in a neih dingun a pia hi.)" 
Joshua12:8  
Joshua12:9 A zawh uh kumpite: Jerikho kumpi, khat; Bethel gei-a om Ai kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem kumpi, khat; Hebron kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth kumpi, khat; Lakhish kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:12 Eglon kumpi, khat; Gezer kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:13 Debir kumpi, khat; Geder kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:14 Hormah kumpi, khat; Arad kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:15 Libnah kumpi, khat; Adullam kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:16 Makkedah kumpi, khat; Bethel kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:17 Tappuah kumpi, khat; Hefer kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:18 Afek kumpi, khat; Lasharon kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:19 Madon kumpi, khat; Hazor kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:20 Shimron-meron kumpi, khat; Akshaf kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:21 Taanak kumpi, khat; Megiddo kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:22 Kadesh kumpi, khat; Karmel gam sunga Jokneam kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:23 Nafathdor sunga Dor kumpi, khat; Galilee sunga Goiim kumpi, khat;" 
Joshua12:24 Tirzah kumpi, khat; a vekpi-in kumpi sawm thum le khat ahi hi." 
Joshua13:1 Tu-in Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha hi. Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang teekin na kum tampi pha a, ahi zongin leitang lak ding tampi tak om lai hi." 
Joshua13:2 A om lai leitang: Filistia gam sung khempeuh le Geshur gam khempeuh 
Joshua13:3 (Kanaan miteʼ gam ci-a a kiciamteh, leilu lam Ekron gamgi lam, Egypt nisuahna lam a om Shihor pan Filistia gam Gaza, Ashdod, Ashkelon, Gath le Ekron gamte a uk mi nga om hi) le Avvim gam," 
Joshua13:4 leitaw lamah, Kanaan mite leitang khempeuh le Sidon mite gam ahi Mearah gam Amor mite gamgi ahi Afek ciang," 
Joshua13:5 le Gebal miteʼ leitang le Lebanon gam khempeuh, nisuahna lamah, Hermon Mual nuai-a Baalgad panin Hamath tumna ciang," 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon le Misrefoth-maim kikalah a teeng Sidon mite khempeuh ahi hi. Kei mahmah in Israel miteʼ mai panin amaute ka hawl khia dinga, nang kong thupiak sa bangin Israel mite tungah a luah dingun leitang hawm in." 
Joshua13:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in minam kua le Manasseh minam a langte tungah luah dingin hih leitang hawm in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua13:8 Reuben mite le Gad mite in Manasseh minam alang dang khatte tawh Topaʼ nasem Moses in amaute a piak sa ahih manin nisuahna lam Jordan gal khat ah gamh ngah khin uh hi. 
Joshua13:9 Arnon kuam mong a om Aroer pan le kuam laizang a om khuapi le Dibon ciang dong Medeba mualzang khempeuh; 
Joshua13:10 le Ammon miteʼ gamgi ciang dong Heshbon ah a uk Amor kumpi Sihonʼ khuapi khempeuh; 
Joshua13:11 Gilead le Geshur mite le Maakath miteʼ gam le Hermon Mual khempeuh le Salekah dong Bashan gam khempeuh; 
Joshua13:12 Ashtaroth le Edrei ah a uk Bashan gam sunga Og kumpi gam khempeuh (Refaim a a suaktate lakah amah bek om hi); Moses in hihte zo-in a hawl khia hi. 
Joshua13:13 Ahi zongin Israel mite in Geshur mite ahi a, Maakath mite ahi zongin hawl khia lo uh a, tu ni dongin Geshur mite le Maakath mite Israel-te lakah a teeng uh hi." 
Joshua13:14 Levi minamte tung bekah Moses in gamh pia lo hi. Topa in Moses kiangah a gen sa mah bangin Israel-teʼ Topa Pasianʼ tungah a kipia mei tawh kihal biaknate pen amauʼ gamh ahi hi. 
Joshua13:15 Tua ciangin Moses in Reuben minamte tungah amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in gamh pia hi. 
Joshua13:16 Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ gamh pen Arnon kuam gei-a a om Aroer pan le kuam laizang a om khuapi le Medeba kiang a mualzang khempeuh," 
Joshua13:17 Heshbon tawh le mualzang tunga om a khuapite khempeuh; Dibon, Bamoth-baal, Beth-baal-meon," 
Joshua13:18 Jahaz, Kedemoth, Mefaath," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim, Sibmah le tua kuam mual tunga om Zereth-shahar," 
Joshua13:20 Beth-peor, Pisgah pang suk le Beth-jeshimoth hi a," 
Joshua13:21 mualzang khuapite khempeuh le Heshbon ah a uk, Moses in Midian makaite Evi, Reke, Zur, Hur le Reba, tua gam a teeng Sihonʼ uliante tawh a zawh khop ahi Amor kumpi gam khempeuh a huam ahi hi." 
Joshua13:22 Beorʼ tapa, aisan pa Balaam zong, Israel mite in a dang a thahte lakah namsau tawh that khawm uh hi." 
Joshua13:23 Reuben miteʼ gampi pen Jordan ahi hi. Hihte pen amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh Reuben miteʼ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua13:24 Tua ciangin Moses in Gad minamte tungah zong amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in gamh pia hi. 
Joshua13:25 Amauʼ gam pen Jazer le Gilead khuapite khempeuh le Rabbah nisuahna lamah a om Aroer ciang dong Ammon miteʼ leitang kim khat," 
Joshua13:26 le Heshbon panin Ramath-mizpeh le Betonim ciang le Mahanaim panin Debir gam ciang dong," 
Joshua13:27 le Beth-haram kuam sungah Beth-nimrah, Sukkoth le Zafon, Jordan gal khat nisuahna lam, Khinnereth Tuipi a niamna lam mong ciang, Jordan gamgi-in a nei, Heshbon kumpipa Sihonʼ kumpi gam a om lai teng ahi hi." 
Joshua13:28 Hihte pen amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh Gad miteʼ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua13:29 Tua ciangin Moses in Manasseh minam a langte tungah amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in gamh a pia hi. 
Joshua13:30 Amauʼ gam pen Mahanaim pan kipanin Bashan gam sung khempeuh, Bashan kumpipa Ogʼ kumpi gam sung khempeuh le Bashan gam sunga om Jair khuapi sawm gukte," 
Joshua13:31 le Gilead alang, Ashtaroth le Edrei, Bashan gam a Ogʼ kumpi gam khempeuh ahi hi. Hihte amauʼ innkuan tawh kizui-in Makhir mi a langte adingin Manassehʼ tapa Makhir mite tungah kipia hi." 
Joshua13:32 Hihte pen Jerikho nisuahna lam Jordan gal khat, Moab zanglei ah Moses in a hawm gamhte ahi hi." 
Joshua13:33 Ahih hangin Levi minamte tungah Moses in gamh pia lo hi. Israel-teʼ Topa Pasian in amaute kiangah a gen sa mah bangin amah pen amauʼ gamh ahi hi. 
Joshua14:1 Hihte pen, siampi Eleazar, Nun tapa Joshua le Israel minam sung pan beh lutangte in amaute tungah a piak, Kanaan gam sungah Israel miteʼ ngah gamhte ahi hi." 
Joshua14:2 Minam kua le a langte adingin Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amauʼ gamhte aisanna tawh kipia hi. 
Joshua14:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in Jordan gal khat ah minam nih le a langte tungah gamh pia khinzo hi. Ahih hangin amaute lakah Levi mite tungah bangmah pia lo hi. 
Joshua14:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Josef mite minam nihin kikhen a, Manasseh le Efraim minamte ahi uh hi. Tua gam sungah Levi-te tungah tanh kipia lo a, ahih hangin amauʼ ten nading khuapite le a ganhingte uh adingin lo nona gamte kipia bek hi." 
Joshua14:5 Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Israel mite gamta uh a, amaute in leitang a hawm uh hi." 
Joshua14:6 Tua ciangin Judah minamte Gilgal-a Joshua kiangah pai uh a, amaute sung panin Kenaz mi Jefunneh tapa Kaleb in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Kadesh-barnea ah Pasian mi Moses tungah nang le keiʼ thu tawh kisai a gente na thei hi." 
Joshua14:7 A gam sung thu kansim dingin Topaʼ nasem Moses in Kadesh-barnea panin kei hong sawl lai-in kum sawm li ka pha a, ka lungsim a om bangin ama kiangah thu ka tunkik hi." 
Joshua14:8 Ahih hangin kei tawh hong pai to khawm ka sanggamte in mite lungkiasak uh a, ahi zongin keimah in lungsim tak tawh Topa ka Pasian ka zui hi." 
Joshua14:9 Tua ni-in Moses kiciamin, ‘Nangmah in Topa ka Pasian, lungsim tak tawh zui na hih manin na khe in a tot sa leitang pen nang le na tate adingin gamh hi tawntung ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Joshua14:10 Tu-in, a cih sa bangin Topa in, Israel mite sehnel gamah a pai sung, Topa in hih thu Moses tungah a gen a kipan hih kum sawm li le nga sung kei hong nungtasak a, tu-in kei kum sawm giat le kum nga ka pha hi." 
Joshua14:11 Moses in hong sawl hun lai mah bangin tu ni-in kei ka tha hat lai a, galdo nading le kuan khiatna le ciahkik nadingin ka thatang pen tua hun lai-a ka thatang mah bang lai hi." 
Joshua14:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in tua ni-a Topaʼ gen hih mual tung gam kei hong pia in. Anak mite a muanhuai mahmah khuapi sungah a omna thu tua hun lai-in kong gen uh hi. Topa in kei hong ompih dinga, Topaʼ cih mah bangin amaute ka hawl khia zo kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua14:13 Tua ciangin Joshua in amah thupha pia a, Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb tungah gamh-in Hebron a pia hi." 
Joshua14:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian, lungsim tak tawh zui ahih manin tu ni dongin Hebron pen Kenaz mi Jefunnehʼ tapa Kalebʼ gamh a suak hi." 
Joshua14:15 Hih Hebron min a nidangin Kiriath-arba kici hi; Arba pen Anak mite lakah mi lianpen khat ahi hi. Tua ciangin galdona panin tua gam a tawlnga hi. 
Joshua15:1 Amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in Judah miteʼ ngah pen leitaw lamah Edom gamgi ciang hi a, leitaw lam a gamla penna munah Zin gam ciang ban hi." 
Joshua15:2 Leitaw lam a gamgi pen Ci Tuipi mong, leitaw lam a sun tuidawk pan kipan hi." 
Joshua15:3 Leitaw lam Akrabbim kah tohna ah pai khia-in, Zin dong ban a, Kadesh-barnea leitaw lamah Hezron dung tawnin Addar ciang dong pai to-in Karka lamah kihei a," 
Joshua15:4 Azmon ciang dong pai-in Egypt lui ah suak khia a, tuipi ah a mong bei hi. Hih pen amauʼ leitaw lam gamgi hi ding hi." 
Joshua15:5 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam gamgi pen Jordan tunna ciang dong Ci Tuipi ahi hi. Leilu lam pang gamgi pen Jordan tunna tuipi dawk panin kipan hi. 
Joshua15:6 Beth-hoglah lamah a gamgi pai to a, Betharabah leilu lam pangah paisuak hi. Tua ciangin Reuben tapa Bohanʼ Suangpi dongah a gamgi pai to-in," 
Joshua15:7 Akhor Kuam panin Debir ah pai to a, leilu lam manawhin, tua kuam leitaw lam pangah a om, Adummim kah tohna gal khat ah a om Gilgal lamah kihei hi. Tua ciangin En-shemesh lui dung ah gamgi pai-in Enrogel ah tawp hi." 
Joshua15:8 Tua ciangin Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) liangko leitaw lam Hinnomʼ tapaʼ kuamah gamgi pai to-in, Refaim kuam leilu lam mong, nitumna lam Hinnom Kuam gal khat ah a kikhung mual dawnah gamgi pai to hi." 
Joshua15:9 Tua ciangin mual dawn panin Neftoah lui ah gamgi kikhung a, tua panin Efron Mual khuapite ah pai a, tua ciangin Baalah (Kiriath-jearim a cihna) lamah gamgi kawi kual hi." 
Joshua15:10 Tua ciangin Baalah nitumna lam Seir Mual ah gamgi kual a, tua panin pai suakin Jearim Mual (Khesalon a cihna) liangko leilu lamah pai-in, Beth-shemesh ah pai suk a, Timnah kiangah paisuak hi." 
Joshua15:11 Ekron leilu lam mual liangko ah a gamgi paikhia a, tua ciangin Shikkeron ah gamgi kawi kualin, Baalah Mual ah paisuak a, Jabneel ah leng khia-in tuipi ah a gamgi tawp hi." 
Joshua15:12 Tua ciangin nitumna gamgi pen Tuipi Lian dung teng ahi hi. Hih pen amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in Judah miteʼ kiimah a gamgi ahi hi. 
Joshua15:13 Topa in Joshua tungah a thupiak bangin Jefunneh tapa Kaleb tungah amah in Judah mite lakah tanh khat Kiriath-arba, Hebron a cihna, (Arba pen Anakʼ pa hi) pia hi." 
Joshua15:14 Tua lai panin Kaleb in Anakʼ tapa thumte Sheshai, Ahiman le Talmai, Anakʼ suanlekhakte a hawl khia hi." 
Joshua15:15 Tua lai panin Debir sunga a teeng mite a sim dingin amah kuan to hi. Debir pen a nidangin Kiriath-sefer kici hi. 
Joshua15:16 Kaleb in, “Kiriath-sefer vat gawpin a la zo mi tungah ka tanu Aksah a zi dingin ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua15:17 Tua ciangin Kalebʼ sanggampa Kenazʼ tapa Othniel in la a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia hi." 
Joshua15:18 Tua nu ama kiangah a pai ding ciangin ama paʼ tung panin lo khat a nget ding hah gen hi. A la tung panin tua nu a kum ciangin Kaleb in tua nu kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Joshua15:19 Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb gamah kei hong koih na hih buangin ciktui khukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in tua nu tungah ciktui tungnungte le ciktui nuainungte a pia hi." 
Joshua15:20 Hihte pen amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in Judah minamteʼ gamhluah ahi hi. 
Joshua15:21 Leitaw lam mongciik, Edom gamgi lamah Judah minamteʼ neih khuapite: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah," 
Joshua15:23 Kadesh, Hazor, Ithnan," 
Joshua15:24 Zif, Telem, Bealoth," 
Joshua15:25 Hazor-hadattah, Kerioth-hezron (Hazor a cihna)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Shema, Moladah," 
Joshua15:27 Hazar-gaddah, Heshmon, Beth-pelet," 
Joshua15:28 Hazarshual, Beer-sheba, Biziothiah," 
Joshua15:29 Baalah, Iim, Ezem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Khesil, Hormah," 
Joshua15:31 Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain le Rimmon: a vekpi-in khuapi sawm nih le kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:33 Tua ciangin lei niamna lamah Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoah, Engannim, Tappuah, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth, Adullam, Sokoh, Azekah," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah le Gederothaim: khuapi sawm le li, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:37 Tua banah Zenan, Hadashah, Migdalgad," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean, Mizpeh, Joktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Lakhish, Bozkath, Eglon," 
Joshua15:40 Kabbon, Lahmam, Khitlish," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah le Makkedah: khuapi sawm le guk, a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi." 
Joshua15:42 Tua ciangin Libnah, Ether, Ashan," 
Joshua15:43 Iftah, Ashnah, Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 Keilah, Akzib le Mareshah: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. 
Joshua15:46 Ekron panin tuipi dong, Ashdod lam pang a omte khempeuh a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:47 Ashdod, a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Gaza, a khuapite le a khuaneute tawh ahi hi. Egypt lui le tuipi lian a gei ciang dong tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:48 Tua ciangin mual tung gamah Shamir, Jattir, Sokoh," 
Joshua15:49 Dannah, Kiriath-sannah (Debir a cihna)," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Goshen, Holon le Giloh: khuapi sawm le khat, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Dumah, Eshan," 
Joshua15:53 Janim, Beth-tappuah, Afekah," 
Joshua15:54 Humtah, Kiriath-arba (Hebron a cihna) le Zior: khuapi kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Zif, Juttah," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah," 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibeah le Timnah: khuapi sawm, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:58 Halhul, Bethzur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarath, Beth-anoth le Eltekon: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath-baal (Kiriath-jearim a cihna) le Rabbah: khuapi nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:61 Sehnel gamah Betharabah, Middin, Sekakah," 
Joshua15:62 Nibshan, Ci Khuapi le Engedi: khuapi guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua15:63 Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jerusalem-a a teeng Jebus mite hawl khia zo lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin Jebus mite pen Judah mite tawh Jerusalem ah a teeng khawm uh hi. 
Joshua16:1 Josefʼ suanlekhakteʼ tanh gamgi pen Jerikho luiteʼ nisuahna lam, Jerikho kiang Jordan panin sehnel gamah pai a, Jerikho panin mual tung gamte tawnin Bethel ah pai to hi." 
Joshua16:2 Tua ciangin Bethel panin Luz ah pai-in, Arkhi mite gam Ataroth nawk hi." 
Joshua16:3 Tua ciangin nitumna lam Jaflet miteʼ gam lam Beth-horon a niam lam gam ciang dongah pai suk hi. Tua ciangin Gezer ah pai-in tuipi ah tawp hi. 
Joshua16:4 Josefʼ suan Manasseh le Efraim mite in amauʼ gamhluah dingin hih gamte ngah uh hi. 
Joshua16:5 Amauʼ behbehin Efraim miteʼ gam pen a nuai-a bang ahi hi: Nisuahna lamah amauʼ gamgi pen Ataroth-addar pan Beth-horon tungnung ciang ahi hi. 
Joshua16:6 Tua panin tuipi ciangah a gamgi pai a, leilu lamah Mikmethath ahi hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam a gamgi Taanathshiloh lamah kual pai-in, nisuahna lam galah pai-in Janoah a tung hi." 
Joshua16:7 Janoah panin Ataroth le Naarah ah pai suk a, Jerikho banin Jordan ah tawp hi." 
Joshua16:8 Tappuah panin nitumna lam Kanah lui ah gamgi pai-in tuipi ah tawp hi. Hih pen amauʼ behbehin Efraim minamteʼ gamhluah hi a," 
Joshua16:9 Manasseh miteʼ gamhluah sung panin Efraim mite adingin a kikhen khia khuapite, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua16:10 Ahi zongin amaute in Gezer sunga teeng Kanaan mite hawl khia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin Kanaan mite pen Efraim mite lakah teeng a, ahih hangin aana nasep a sem dingin sal a suak uh hi." 
Joshua17:1 Tua ciangin Josefʼ tacil ahih manin Manasseh minam tungah tanh kipia hi. Manasseh minam sung panin tacil, Gileadʼ pa Makhir tungah Gilead gam le Bashan gam kipia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah galhang mi ahi hi." 
Joshua17:2 Tua ciangin Manasseh minam a omlaite Abiezer, Halek, Asriel, Shekhem, Hefer le Shemida-te tungah a behbehin piakna kinei hi. Hihte pen Josefʼ tapa Manassehʼ ta pasal suanlekhakte a behbeh ahi hi." 
Joshua17:3 Ahih hangin Manassehʼ tapa Makhir, a tapa Hefer, a tapa Zelofehad in tapa nei loin tanu bek nei a, a tanuteʼ min in: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah le Tirzah ahi hi." 
Joshua17:4 Amaute, siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le makaite mai ah pai uh a, “Ka sanggamte uh tawh gamh hong piak nadingin Topa in Moses thu pia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thupiakna bangin amau pateʼ sanggamte tawh amah in gamh a pia khawm hi." 
Joshua17:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan gal khat ah Gilead le Bashan-te sim loh Manasseh tungah tanh sawm kia hi. 
Joshua17:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Manassehʼ tanute in a tapate tawh gamh ngahkhawm uh hi. A om lai Manasseh mite tungah Gilead leitang kipia hi. 
Joshua17:7 Manasseh-teʼ gam in Asher panin Shekhem nisuahna lamah a om Mikmethath dong ban a, tua ciangin En-tappuah miteʼ leitaw lamah a gamgi pai hi." 
Joshua17:8 Tappuah leitang pen Manasseh aʼ ahi hi. Ahih hangin Manasseh gamgi a om Tappuah khuapi pen Efraim tapate aʼ ahi hi. 
Joshua17:9 Tua ciangin Kanah lui ah a gamgi pai suk hi. Manasseh khuapite lak panin lui leitaw lam a om hih lai-a khuapite pen Efraim aʼ ahi hi. Tua ciangin lui leilu lam pangah Manasseh gamgi pai suakin tuipi ah tawp hi. 
Joshua17:10 Tua gam leitaw lam teng Efraim aʼ hi-in, a leilu lam teng Manasseh aʼ hi a, tuipi pen a gamgi hi a, leilu lamah Asher banin nisuahna lamah Issakhar a ban hi." 
Joshua17:11 Issakhar le Asher gam sungah zong Manasseh in gam ngah a, tuate pen Beth-shean le a khuaneute, Ibleam le a khuaneute, Dor-a teengte le a khuaneute, Endor a teengte le a khuaneute, Taanak a teengte le a khuaneute le Megiddo a teengte le a khuaneute hi a, a thumna pen Nafath ahi hi." 
Joshua17:12 Ahi zongin Manassehʼ tapate in hih khuapite luah zo lo uh ahih manin tua gamah Kanaan mite teng teitei uh hi. 
Joshua17:13 Ahih hangin Israel mite tampi pha-in a hat uh ciangin amaute in Kanaan mite nasemin koih uh a, hawl khia mangkhin lo uh hi." 
Joshua17:14 Tua ciangin Josef minam in Joshua kiangah thu genin, “ Topa in kote thu hong pia khin a, kote mi tampi hi napi-in bang hangin ngah khat le tanh khat bek gamh-in hong pia na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua17:15 Tua ciangin Joshua in amaute kiangah, “Note mi tampi pha a, Efraim mual tung gam pen note adingin neu lua ahih ciangin Perez le Refaim gam tulak ah pai unla, nomau adingin gam sat tawm un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua17:16 Josef minam in, “Kote adingin mual tung gam kicing zo lo hi. Ahi zongin zang gam a teeng Kanaan mite khempeuh, Beth-shean le a khuaneute, Jezreel Kuam sunga om mite pen sikleeng neite hi zel uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua17:17 Tua ciangin Joshua in Josefʼ suan Efraim le Manasseh mite tungah, “Note mi tampi pha-in vanglian na hih manun tanh khat kia na nei kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua17:18 Mual tung gam pen note aʼ hi dinga, tulak ahih hangin note in hah siangin a gamgi mong dong na luah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sikleeng nei-in, amaute a thahat hangin Kanaan mite na hawl khia zo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:1 Tua ciangin Israel mihon buppi Shiloh ah kikhawmin tua lai ah kikhopna buk lam uh a, amauteʼ mai ah gam zawh sa-in om hi." 
Joshua18:2 Israel mite lakah gamh a kipia nai lo minam sagih om lai hi. 
Joshua18:3 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Israel mite kiangah, “ Topa, na pu na pate uh Pasian in note hong piak sa leitang ah pai-in na luah ding uh bang tanvei zekai lai ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua18:4 Minam khat panin mi thum ciat hong pia unla, amaute va kuan khia-in vaksuk vakto-in, amauteʼ luah dinga ngaihsutna tawh a leitang om ziate hong gelhin, tua ciangin kei kiangah hong ciah dingun amaute ka sawl ding hi." 
Joshua18:5 Amaute in seh sagihin khenin, leitaw lam ama gam mahah Judah omsuakin, Josefʼ innkuante leilu lam amauʼ gamah om ding hi." 
Joshua18:6 Note in leitang khen sagihin hong ciamteh unla, na ciaptehna uh hih mun kei kiangah nong paipih ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Topa i Pasianʼ mai ah note ading ai ka san ding hi." 
Joshua18:7 Levi mite in note lakah tanh nei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ siampi nasepna pen amauʼ luah ahi hi. Gad, Reuben le Manasseh minam a langte in Topaʼ nasem Moses in amaute tungah a piak ahi Jordan Nisuahna lam gal khat ah amauʼ gamh ngah khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:8 Tua ahih ciangin mite a kuan uh hi. Leitang a ciaptehna a gelh nadingun Joshua in a pai mite thu pia a, “Vaksuk vakto-in leitang ciaptehna hong gelh unla, kei kiangah hong paikik un. Tua ciangin Shiloh mun Topaʼ mai ah note adingin ai ka san ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua18:9 Tua ciangin mite kuanin gam sungah pai suk pai to-in khen sagih suahin tua gam a khuakhua-in a ciaptehna uh laibu khat sungah khum uh a, Shiloh giahphual a Joshua kiangah amaute hong pai uh hi." 
Joshua18:10 Joshua in amaute adingin Topaʼ mai Shiloh ah ai sansak hi. Tua ciangin Joshua in amauʼ tanh ding ciat Israel-te tungah leitang a pia hi. 
Joshua18:11 A behbeh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamte ading aisan hun hong tunga, amauʼ tungah a kipia gam pen Judah minam le Josef minamte kikalah hong kia hi." 
Joshua18:12 Leilu lamah amauʼ gamgi pen Jordan panin kipan a, Jerikho leilu lam liangko ah pai to-in, tua panin mual tung gam nawkin nitumna lamah pai a, Bethaven sehnel gamah a tawp hi." 
Joshua18:13 Tua lai panin gamgi in Luz lam manawhin leitaw lam nawtin Luz (Bethel a kici) liangko ah pai a, Beth-horon Nuainung leitaw lam a om mual tunga Ataroth-addar khua ah pai suk hi." 
Joshua18:14 Tua ciangin mun dang manawhin gamgi pai a, Beth-horon gal khat, leitaw lam a om mual panin nitumna lam pang leitaw lamah kihei a, Judah minamte aʼ ahi Kiriath-baal (Kiriath-jearim a cihna) ah a tawp hi. Hih in a nitumna lam pang piangsak hi." 
Joshua18:15 Tua ciangin Kiriath-jearim mong panin leitaw lam pang kipan a, Efron lam, Neftoah Luite ah gamgi pai hi." 
Joshua18:16 Tua ciangin Refaim kuam leilu lam mong a om, Hinnomʼ tapaʼ kuam a kimuhna mual a gamgi ah pai hi. Tua ciangin Jebus miteʼ gam liangko leitaw lam, Hinnom Kuam ah pai sukin, Enrogel ah pai suk suak hi." 
Joshua18:17 Tua ciangin leilu lam manawhin kawi-in, En-shemesh ah paisuak a, tua lai panin Adummim kah tohna gal khat, Geliloth ah pai a, Reubenʼ tapa Bohanʼ Suangpi ah pai suk hi." 
Joshua18:18 Tua ciangin Beth-arabah gam liangko leilu lamah pai suakin Arabah ah pai suk hi. 
Joshua18:19 Tua ciangin Beth-hoglah gam liangko leilu lamah gamgi paisuak a, Jordan mong leitaw lam, Ci Tuipi dawk leilu lamah a tawp hi. Hih pen leitaw lam gamgi hi a," 
Joshua18:20 Jordan in nisuahna lam pang a gamgi piangsak hi. Hih pen a beh zui-in a kimkot ah a gamgi a gamgi-in Benjamin minamʼ luah ahi hi. 
Joshua18:21 Tu-in amauʼ beh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamteʼ khuapite in Jerikho, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz," 
Joshua18:22 Beth-arabah, Zemaraim, Bethel," 
Joshua18:23 Avvim, Parah, Ofrah," 
Joshua18:24 Khefar-ammoni, Ofni, Geba - khuapi sawm le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua18:25 Tua ciangin Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpeh, Khefirah, Mozah," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Haelef, Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna), Gibeah le Kiriath-jearim - khuapi sawm le li, a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Benjamin minamteʼ luah ahi hi." 
Joshua19:1 A beh zui-in Simeon minam ading aisan nihna hong tung hi. Amauʼ gamh in Judah minamteʼ gamh ngah sa pawl khat huam hi. 
Joshua19:2 Amauʼ ngah ding gamhte pen Beer-sheba, Sheba, Moladah," 
Joshua19:3 Hazarshual, Bala, Ezem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah," 
Joshua19:5 Ziklag, Beth Markaboth, Hazarsusah," 
Joshua19:6 Beth-lebaoth le Sharuhen - khuapi sawm le thum, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:7 Tua ciangin Ain, Rimmon, Ether le Ashan - khuapi li a khuaneute tawh zong ahi hi." 
Joshua19:8 Negeb gam Ramah a om Baal-athbeer ciang dong hih khuapiteʼ kiim a om khuaneute khempeuh zong a huam ahi hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Simeon minamteʼ luah ahi hi.
