Joshua19:9 Simeon minamteʼ luah in Judah minamteʼ gam sung khen khat hong huam hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minamteʼ ngah pen amau adingin lian lua a, amauʼ luah sung panin Simeon minam in gamh ngah sawn uh hi." 
Joshua19:10 A beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minam adingin aisan thumna hong tung hi. Amauʼ luah gam in Sarid ciang dong ban hi. 
Joshua19:11 Tua ciangin nitumna lamah a gamgi pai to-in Mareal ah paisuak a, Dabbesheth va su a, tua ciangin Jokneam nisuahna lam a om lui a ban hi." 
Joshua19:12 Sarid panin nisuahna lam manawhin pai-in Khisloth-tabor gamgi ah tung hi. 
Joshua19:13 Tua panin Daberath ah pai-in Jafia ciang ban a, tua lai panin nisuahna lam Gath-hefer, Eth-kazin lamah paisuak a, tua ciangin Rimmon ah pai lai-in Neah lamah a kawi hi." 
Joshua19:14 Tua ciangin leilu lam pan, Hannathon lamah gamgi kihei a, Iftahel kuamah a tawp hi." 
Joshua19:15 Tua ciangin Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah le Bethlehem khuate zong huam a, khuapi sawm le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:16 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Zebulun minamteʼ luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:17 A beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamte adingin aisan lina hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:18 A gam in Jezreel, Khesulloth, Shunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraim, Shion, Anaharath," 
Joshua19:20 Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez," 
Joshua19:21 Remeth, Engannim, Enhaddah le Bethpazzez a huam hi." 
Joshua19:22 A gamgi in Tabor, Shahazumah le Beth-shemesh zong ban a, Jordan ah a tawp hi. Khuapi sawm le guk, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:23 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Issakhar minamteʼ luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:24 A beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamte adingin aisan ngana hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:25 A gam in Helkath, Hali, Beten, Akshaf," 
Joshua19:26 Allammelek, Amad le Mishal huam hi. Nitumna lamah Karmel le Shihor-libnath ban a," 
Joshua19:27 tua ciangin nisuahna lamah kihei-in Beth-dagon ah pai a, leilu lam Bethemek le Neiel lamah Zebulun le Iftahel kuam ban hi. Tua ciangin leilu lam Kabul," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, Kanah le a Lian Sidon ciang dong pai to lai hi." 
Joshua19:29 Tua ciangin Ramah ah a gamgi kihei a, kulh a nei Taia khuapi a tung hi. Tua ciangin Hosah ah gamgi kihei a, tuipi ah a tawp hi. Mahalab, Akzib," 
Joshua19:30 Ummah, Afek le Rehob khuapite huam a - khuapi sawm nih le nih, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:31 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Asher minamteʼ luah hi a, hih khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:32 A beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamte adingin aisan gukna hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:33 A gamgi pen Helef, Zaanannim-a om tawsaw le Adaminekeb le Jabneel panin Lakkum ciang dong pai-in Jordan ah a tawp hi." 
Joshua19:34 Tua ciangin nitumna lam Aznothtabor ah a gamgi kihei a, tua lai panin Hukkok ah pai-in, leitaw lamah Zebulun ban a, nitumna lamah Asher banin, nisuahna lam panin Jordan ah Judah a ban hi." 
Joshua19:35 Kulh a nei khuapite pen Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Khinnereth," 
Joshua19:36 Adamah, Ramah, Hazor," 
Joshua19:37 Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor," 
Joshua19:38 Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath le Beth-shemesh - khuapi sawm le kua, a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:39 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Naftali minamteʼ luah hi a, a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:40 A beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamte adingin aisan sagihna hong tung hi. 
Joshua19:41 A luah gamte in Zorah, Eshtaol, Irshemesh," 
Joshua19:42 Shaalbim, Aijalon, Ithlah," 
Joshua19:43 Elon, Timnah, Ekron," 
Joshua19:44 Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath," 
Joshua19:45 Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon," 
Joshua19:46 le Joppa gal khat a om Mejarkon le Rakkon a gamte tawh a huam hi. 
Joshua19:47 Dan mite in amauʼ gam a taan ciangun Dan mite kuan to-in Leshem sim uh a, amaute in a mite manin namsau tawh a thah khit uh ciangin tua gam luahin a sungah teeng uh a, amauʼ pupiʼ min tamin Leshem pen Dan ci-in min a phuak uh hi." 
Joshua19:48 Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Dan minamteʼ luah hi a, hih a khuapite a khuaneute tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua19:49 Israel mite in gamh-in tua leitangte a hawm khit uh ciangin amaute lakah Nun tapa Joshua tungah gamh a pia uh hi. 
Joshua19:50 Topaʼ thupiakna tawh ama nget khuapi, Efraim mual tung gam a om Timnath-serah a pia uh hi. Amah in tua khuapi lamkikin a sungah a teeng hi." 
Joshua19:51 Hihte pen siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le Israel minam beh lutangte in kikhopna buk kong, Topaʼ mai Shiloh ah aisanna tawh a hawmkhiat uh gamh ahi hi. Tua bangin amaute in leitang hawmna a zo uh hi." 
Joshua20:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Joshua kiangah," 
Joshua20:2 “Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: ‘Sawm lohpi-in ahi a, theih lohna hangin ahi zongin mi khat a that khapa a tai theih nadingin Moses tungtawnin nang tungah kong gen bukna khuapite teel in. Phula pa kiang panin note adingin tua khuate pen bukna hi ding hi." 
Joshua20:3  
Joshua20:4 Hih khuapite khat peuhpeuh ah amah tai-in khuapi kongpi tumna ah ding dinga, tua khuapi upate kiangah a thu gen tel ding hi. Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi sungah amah paipihin amah mun khat pia dinga, amaute tawh amah om khawm ding hi." 
Joshua20:5 Tua ciangin phula pa in amah a delh leh, tua pa tungah mi that pa pia lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in theih lohna hangin a veengpa thatin, a beisa hun sungah ama tungah galneihna bangmah nei lo hi." 
Joshua20:6 Thukhenna thuak dingin mihonte mai ah a din mateng le tua hun laitak a siampi lianpen pa a sih hun mateng, tua khuapi sungah amah om ding hi. Tua khit ciangin mi that khapa ama khua ama inn, a hong tai khiatna khua ah paikik thei ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Joshua20:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Naftali mual tung gam sunga om Galilee gam sung panin Kedesh khua, Efraim mual tung gam sungah Shekhem khua le Judah mual tung gam sungah Kiriath-arba (Hebron a cihna) khuate a tuam koih uh hi." 
Joshua20:8 Jerikho nisuahna Jordan gal khat ah Reuben minam sung panin mualzang sehnel gam a om Bezer khua, Gad minam sung panin Gilead gam sunga om Ramoth khua le Manasseh minam sung panin Bashan gam sunga om Golan khuate a seh uh hi." 
Joshua20:9 Hihte pen Israel mi khempeuh le amaute lakah a peem khualmi adingin sawm lopi-in mi khat a that khapa pen mihonte mai ah a din ma-in phula pa khut ah a sih loh nadingin a tai theih nadinga a kiseh khuapite ahi hi. 
Joshua21:1 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar le Nun tapa Joshua le Israel minam beh lutangte kiangah Levi beh lutangte hong pai uh hi. 
Joshua21:2 Amaute in Kanaan gam sung Shiloh munah, “Ten nadingin khuapi le ka ganhingte uh adingin a lo nonate tawh kote hong kipiak ding Moses tungtawnin Topa in thu pia zo hi,” ci-in amaute kiangah a gen uh hi." 
Joshua21:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh Israel mite in amauʼ luah sung panin Levi mite tungah a nuai-a khuapite le lo nona gamte a pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:4 Kohath behte adingin aisan hong tung hi. Tua ahih ciangin siampi Aaronʼ suanlekhak ahi Levi mite in Judah, Simeon le Benjamin minamte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm le thum ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:5 Tua ciangin a om lai Kohath mite in Efraim minam, Dan minam le Manasseh minam a langte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:6 Gershon mite in Issakhar minam, Asher minam, Naftali minam le Bashan gam sunga om Manasseh minam a langte tung panin aisanna tawh khuapi sawm le thum ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:7 Merari mite in a beh uh tawh kizui-in Reuben minam, Gad minam le Zebulun minamte tung panin khuapi sawm le nih ngah uh hi." 
Joshua21:8 Topa in Moses tungtawnin a thupiak bangin hih khuapite le a lo nona gamte Israel mite in aisanna tawh Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi. 
Joshua21:9 Judah minam le Simeon minam sung panin amaute in a nuai-a min kigen khuapite pia uh a," 
Joshua21:10 Levi mite ahi Kohath beh sung panin Aaronʼ suanlekhakte tungah tung hi; amaute tungah a ai kia masa ahih man hi. 
Joshua21:11 Amaute in Judah mual tung gam Kiriath-arba, Arba pen Anakʼ pa (Hebron a cihna), a kiim a lo nona gam tawh amau tungah pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:12 Ahih hangin tua khuapiʼ lote le a khuaneute pen Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb tungah a neih dingin kipia khin hi. 
Joshua21:13 Amaute in siampi Aaronʼ suanlekhakte tungah mi thatteʼ bukna khuapi Hebron a lo nona gamte tawh, Libnah a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:14 Jattir a lo nona gamte tawh, Eshtemoa a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:15 Holon a lo nona gamte tawh, Debir a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:16 Ain a lo nona gamte tawh, Juttah a lo nona gamte tawh le Beth-shemesh a lo nona gamte tawh, hih minam nihte sung panin khuapi kua a pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:17 Tua ciangin Benjamin minam panin Gibeon a lo nona gamte tawh, Geba a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth a lo nona gamte tawh le Almon a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li a pia uh hi." 
Joshua21:19 Siampi Aaronʼ suanlekhakteʼ khuapite a vekpi-in khuapi sawm thum le thum, a lo nona gamte tawh ahi hi." 
Joshua21:20 Levi mite sung panin Kohath beh ahi a om lai Kohath mite tungah a kipia khuapite pen Efraim minamte aʼ sung pan ahi hi. 
Joshua21:21 Efraim mual tung gam a om khuapite sung panin mi thatte ading Shekhem a lo nona gamte tawh, Gezer a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim a lo nona gamte tawh le Beth-horon a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li amaute tungah kipia hi." 
Joshua21:23 Tua ciangin Dan minam sung panin Eltekeh a lo nona gamte tawh, Gibbethon a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon a lo nona gamte tawh le Gath-rimmon a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:25 Tua ciangin Manasseh minam a langte sung panin Taanak a lo nona gamte tawh le Gath-rimmon a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi." 
Joshua21:26 Kohath mi a om lai behteʼ khuapite a vekpi-in a lo nona gamte tawh khuapi sawm ahi hi. 
Joshua21:27 Tua ciangin Levi beh sunga om Gershon mite tungah Manasseh minam a langte aʼ sung panin Bashan gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte adingin bukna khuapi Golan a lo nona gamte tawh le Beeshterah a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi nih kipia hi." 
Joshua21:28 Tua ciangin Issakhar minam sung panin Kishion a lo nona gamte tawh, Daberath a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth a lo nona gamte tawh le Engannim a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:30 Tua ciangin Asher minam sung panin Mishal a lo nona gamte tawh, Abdon a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:31 Helkath a lo nona gamte tawh le Rehob a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:32 Tua ciangin Naftali minam sung panin Galilee gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte adingin bukna khuapi Kedesh a lo nona gamte tawh, Hammoth-dor a lo nona gamte tawh le Kartan a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi thum kipia hi." 
Joshua21:33 Gershon mite beh tuamtuamteʼ khuapite a vekpi-in a lo nona gamte tawh khuapi sawm le thum ahi hi. 
Joshua21:34 Tua ciangin Levi mi a om lai Merari behte tungah, Zebulun minam sung panin Jokneam a lo nona gamte tawh, Kartan a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:35 Dimnah a lo nona gamte tawh le Nahalal a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:36 Tua ciangin Reuben minam sung panin Bezer a lo nona gamte tawh, Jahaz a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoth a lo nona gamte tawh le Mefaath a lo nona gamte tawh, khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:38 Tua ciangin Gad minam sung panin Gilead gam sunga om khuapite sung panin mi thatte ading bukna khuapi Ramoth a lo nona gamte tawh, Mahanaim a lo nona gamte tawh," 
Joshua21:39 Heshbon a lo nona gamte tawh le Jazer a lo nona gamte tawh, a vekpi-in khuapi li kipia hi." 
Joshua21:40 Levi beh a om lai ahi Merari beh tuamtuamte ading khuapi a kipia a vekpi-in sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Joshua21:41 Israel miteʼ neihsa lakah Levi miteʼ khuapi a vekpi-in a lo nona gamte tawh khuapi sawm le giat ahi hi. 
Joshua21:42 Hih khuapite in a kiim ciatah lo nona gam nei ciat a, hih khuapi khempeuh tua bang ahi hi." 
Joshua21:43 Tua bangin Topa in amauʼ pu le pate tungah piak dingin a kiciam leitang khempeuh Israel tungah pia a, amaute in a ngah khit uh ciangin tua lai ah a teeng uh hi." 
Joshua21:44 Tua ciangin a pu a pate uh tungah a ciam sa bangin Topa in amaute tungah na khempeuh ah tawlngakna a pia hi. Topa in a galte khempeuh uh amau khut sungah pia ahih manin a galte uh khat beek in zong amaute nang zo lo hi. 
Joshua21:45 Topa in Israel mite tungah a ciam sa thuhoih khempeuh khat zong a mawkna om lo a, a vekpi-in tangtung kim hi." 
Joshua22:1 Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte samin" 
Joshua22:2 amaute kiangah, “ Topaʼ nasem Moses in note hong thupiak khempeuh zui-in, keimah in note kong thupiakna khempeuh ah ka thu na hong mang khin uh hi." 
Joshua22:3 Tu ni dong hih hun saupi sung na sanggamte uh na nusia kei uh a, Topa na Pasian uh hong sawlna limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsun uh hi." 
Joshua22:4 Tu-in Topa na Pasian un amaute tungah a ciam sa bangin na sanggamte uh tawlngakna pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ nasem Moses in note hong piak Jordan gal khat, noteʼ neihsa a omna leitang na inn uh ah note ciah un." 
Joshua22:5 Topaʼ nasem Moses in note hong piak thupiakna le thukham ahi, Topa na Pasian uh it ding, ama lampi khempeuh zuih ding, ama thupiakte zuih ding, amah belh ding le na lungsim khempeuh uh le na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh ama na na sep ding uh limtakin ngaihsun un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:6 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute thupha pia-in ciahsak a, amaute zong a inn ciat uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
Joshua22:7 Tu-in Manasseh minam a langte tungah Moses in Jordan nisuahna lam Bashan gam sungah neihsa pia khin hi. Ahi zongin Joshua in a langte tungah Jordan nitumna lam a sanggamte kiang uh ah neihsa a pia hi. Joshua in amaute a inn uh ah sawlin thupha a piak ciangin 
Joshua22:8 amaute tungah, “Na inn uh ah hauhna lianpi, ganhing tampi tak, ngun, kham, sumngo, sik le puan tampi tawh ciahkik un. Na galte uh van na suhte uh na sanggamte uh tawh hawm un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:9 Tua ahih ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte, Moses tungtawnin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh a neih uh amauʼ leitang ahi Gilead gamah a pai dingin Kanaan gam sunga om Shiloh munah Israel mite tawh kikhenin a inn uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
Joshua22:10 Kanaan gam sunga om Jordan gam kiim teng a tun uh ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte in tua lai Jordan gun kiangah a lian mahmah biakna tau khat a lam uh hi." 
Joshua22:11 Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “En un, Israel miteʼ lam pang, Jordan kiim gam, Kanaan gam nawl ah Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte in biakna tau khat lam uh hi,” a kicihna za uh hi." 
Joshua22:12 Israel mite in tua thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a do dingin Israel mihon buppi khempeuh Shiloh ah kikhawm uh hi. 
Joshua22:13 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gilead gam a om Reuben mite, Gad mite, le Manasseh minam a langte kiangah siampi Eleazar tapa Finehas," 
Joshua22:14 le amah tawh ukpi sawm, Israel minam innkuan panin khat ciat, Israel behte lakah innkuan lutang ahite a sawl uh hi." 
Joshua22:15 Tua ciangin Gilead gam sunga om Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah," 
Joshua22:16 “ Topaʼ mihon buppi in, ‘ Topa leh dona ah tu ni-in note adingin biakna tau khat lamna tawh Topa zuihna panin tu ni-in kihei-in Israel Pasianʼ tungah na gamtatna sa uh ahi hih khemna pen bang ahi hiam?" 
Joshua22:17 Topaʼ mihonte tungah gimna khat a hong tungsak ahi, eite i kisiansuah nai beek lohna ahi, Peor-a i khialhna hawmthawhin, tu ni-in Topa zuihna panin kihei khia ding na hi uh hiam? Note in tu ni-in Topa lehdo le-uhcin zing ciangin Israel mihon buppi tungah amah heh ding hi." 
Joshua22:18  
Joshua22:19 Ahih hangin tu-in noteʼ lak na leitang uh nin ahihleh Topaʼ biakbuk a dinna mun Topaʼ leitang ah hong pai unla, koteʼ lakah luah hong nei un. Topa lehdo kei unla, Topa i Pasianʼ biakna tau sim loh note ading biakna tau na lamna uh tawh kote a lehdo hong suaksak kei un." 
Joshua22:20 Zerahʼ tapa Akhan, a ki-ap nate ah a khialh manin Israel mihon khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Ama mawhna hangin amah bek si lo hi,’ ci uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Joshua22:21 Tua ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte in Israel beh lutangte dawngin," 
Joshua22:22 “A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! Amah in thei hi. Israel mahmah in zong thei tahen! Lehdona ahi a, Topaʼ tungah thuman lohna ahi zongin ahih a, Topa zuihna panin a pial dingin biakna tau lam ka hih uh leh, tu ni-in kote hong zah kei hen. Tua ahih kei leh zong, tua tungah meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, thunuam a biakna ahi zongin piak nadingin a lam ka hih uh leh Topa mahmah in hong thuk tahen." 
Joshua22:23  
Joshua22:24 Tua bang hi het lo hi. Hong tung ding hunte ah na tate un koʼ tate tungah, ‘Israel Pasian, Topa tawh no bang kisai na hi uh hiam?" 
Joshua22:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh no Reuben mite le Gad mite le koʼ kikalah Topa in gamgi-in Jordan bawl khinzo hi. Topaʼ sungah no tanh bangmah om lo hi,’ a cih khak ding uh launa tawh ka bawl uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tate un Topa a biak ding uh na tate un khaktan kha ding uh hi." 
Joshua22:26 Tua ahih ciangin kote in, ‘Meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiak nading ahi zongin hi loin, ama omna ah ka meihal biaknate uh le ka biakpiaknate uh le thunuam a ka piaknate uh tawh Topaʼ na ka sepna uh kote le noteʼ kikal le koʼ khit ciangin i suanlekhakte kikalah teci dingin bawl ni. Tua bang hikeileh hong tung ding hunte ah na tate un koʼ tate tungah, “ Topaʼ sungah noʼ tanh bangmah om lo hi,” ci kha ding uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:27  
Joshua22:28 Tua ahih ciangin hong tung ding hunte ah kote tung ahi a, koteʼ suanlekhakteʼ tungah ahi zongin hih bangin hong kicih leh, ‘Meihal biak nading ahi a, biakpiak nading ahi zongin hi loin note le kote kikalah teci dingin ka pu ka pate un a bawl Topaʼ biakna tau lim en un,’ i ci ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh hi." 
Joshua22:29 Ama biakbuk mai-a om Topa ka Pasian uh biakna tau longal, meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, biakpiak nading lamna tawh ahi zongin kote in Topa lehdo-in Topa zuihna panin a pial ka hi het kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua22:30 Siampi Finehas le amah tawh a om mihon ukpi, Israel beh lutangte in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh miteʼ thugenna a zak uh ciangin tua thugennate in amaute lungkimsak mahmah hi." 
Joshua22:31 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh mite tungah, “ Topa tungah note zuau tat nai lo na hih manun eiteʼ lakah Topa om hi, ci-in tu ni-in i thei hi. Tu-in note in Topaʼ gimpiak nading panin Israel mite na hon khia uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua22:32 Tua ciangin siampi Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas le ukpite, Gilead gam a om Reuben mite le Gad mite kiang panin Israel miteʼ omna Kanaan gamah ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah thu puakkik uh hi." 
Joshua22:33 Tua thu in Israel mite lungkimsak hi. Israel mite in Pasian phat uh a, Reuben mite le Gad mite a teenna leitang susia-in amaute galin do ding gen nawn lo uh hi." 
Joshua22:34 Reuben mite le Gad mite in a biakna tau uh min dingin “Teci” a phuak uh hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen Pasian ahihna thu eiteʼ kikalah teci ahi hi,” amaute in ci uh hi." 
Joshua23:1 Topa in amauʼ kiim a om gal khempeuh panin Israel mite tungah lungmuanna a piak khit a sawtpi ciangin Joshua teekin a kum tampi pha ta hi. 
Joshua23:2 Joshua in Israel khempeuh, a upate le a lutangte, a thukhente le a uliante uh samin amaute kiangah, “Tu-in kei teekin ka kum tampi pha ta hi." 
Joshua23:3 Noteʼ hangin Topa na Pasian un hih minam dangte khempeuh tungah a bawlnate na mu khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note adingin hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahi hi. 
Joshua23:4 En un, Jordan panin nitumna lam a Tuipi Lian dong, a om lai minamte pen ka zawh sa minamte tawh na minamte uh gamh dingin note tungah kong pia khin hi." 
Joshua23:5 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ mai ah amaute leh nawt dinga, noteʼ muhna panin hawl khia ding hi. Topa na Pasian un noteʼ tungah hong ciam bangin amauʼ gam na luah ding uh hi." 
Joshua23:6 Tua ahih ciangin note lakah a om lai hih minamte tawh kihel loin, amauʼ pasian-teʼ thu zong gen loin, tuate tawh zong kiciam loin, amauʼ na sem loin, amauteʼ mai ah zong note kun loin, ahih hangin tu ni-a na gamtat bangun Topa na Pasian uh na belh theih nadingun Mosesʼ thukham laibu sunga kigelhte khempeuh zui-in semin, them khat zong pial loin na om nadingun khauh takin om un." 
Joshua23:7  
Joshua23:8  
Joshua23:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in noteʼ mai ah a lian a thahat minamte hawl khia a, note na hih uh leh tu ni dongin mi khat beek in hong nang zo nai lo hi." 
Joshua23:10 Note tungah hong ciam sa bangin note adingin hong dosak pa pen Topa na Pasian uh ahih manin note khat in mi tul khat na tai keeksak zo uh hi. 
Joshua23:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian uh na it ding uh hoihtakin ngaihsun un. 
Joshua23:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh note nungkikin note lakah a om lai minamte tawh kipawlin amaute tawh kiteengin, note in amauʼ numeite teen pihin amaute in noteʼ numeite a teenpih leh," 
Joshua23:13 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ mai ah hih minamte hawl khia nawn lo ding hi, ci-in teltakin thei un. Topa na Pasian un note hong piak hih leitang hoih panin na sih khit matengun amaute pen note adingin thangzak le tehlop, na nung uh a hong sat ciangduai, ahih kei leh na mit sung uh a hong sun ling tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Joshua23:14 “Tu-in leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin kei a pai ding ka hi ta a, note khempeuh in na lungsim uh le na nuntakna uh ah, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai na hoih hong ciam khempeuh khat zong maimawk lo ahihna na thei uh hi. A vekpi-in note adingin hong tangtung a, khat zong maimawk lo hi." 
Joshua23:15 Ahih hangin, amah in note hong thupiak ahi Topa na Pasian uh thuciamna palsatin, note in pasian dangteʼ na semin tuate na biak uh leh, Topa na Pasian un note tawh kisai-in a ciam na hoih khempeuh a tun mah bangin Topa na Pasian un note hong piak sa hih leitang hoih panin amah in note hong suksiat khit matengin note tungah siatna khempeuh hong tungsak ding hi. Note tungah Topa hong sin so dinga, note tungah a hong piak leitang hoih panin note manlang takin na bei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua23:16  
Joshua24:1 Tua ciangin Joshua in Israel minam khempeuh Shekhem ah kaikhawmin a upate, a makaite, a thukhente le Israel uliante a sam hi. Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mai ah amau ciat kipia uh hi." 
Joshua24:2 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh tungah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, ‘Tanglai-in Eufratis gun gal khat ah na pu na pate uh teng ngei a, tuate lakah Abraham le Nahorʼ pa Terah pen khat bek ahi hi. Na pu na pate un pasian dangte bia uh hi." 
Joshua24:3 Tua ciangin Gun gal panin na pu uh Abraham la-in Kanaan gam khempeuh ah ka paipih a, a suanlekhakte tampi ka phasak hi. Ama tungah Isaac ka pia a," 
Joshua24:4 Isaac tungah Jakob le Esau ka pia hi. A neih dingin Seir mual tung gam Esau ka pia a, ahih hangin Jakob le a tate Egypt ah a pai suk uh hi." 
Joshua24:5 Tua ciangin Moses le Aaron ka sawl a, a gam sunga ka sepnate tawh Egypt ka gimsak khit ciangin note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Joshua24:6 Egypt panin na pu na pate uh ka paikhiatpih a, tuipi a tung uh hi. Egypt mite in leeng le sakol tung tuangte tawh na pu na pate uh San Tuipi ah delh uh hi." 
Joshua24:7 Kei tungah amaute hong kiko uh ciangin amaute le Egypt mite kikalah khuamial ka koih a, Egypt mite tungah tuipi luangsakin amaute ka tuumsak hi. Egypt tungah ka bawlna na thei uh a, sehnel gam sungah sau veipi na om uh hi." 
Joshua24:8 Tua ciangin Jordan gal khat ah a teeng Amor miteʼ leitang ah note kong paipih hi. Amaute in note hong do-in, noteʼ khut sungah amaute kong pia a, note in amauʼ leitang na luah uh a, noteʼ mai ah amaute ka susia hi." 
Joshua24:9 Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa, Zipporʼ tapa Balak hong khangin Israel mite hong do hi. Amah in mi sawlin note hong samsia dingin Beorʼ tapa Balaam a samsak hi." 
Joshua24:10 Ahih hangin Balaamʼ thu ka ngai kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in note thupha hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin Balakʼ khut sung panin note kong hon khia hi. 
Joshua24:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan gal khat ah pai-in Jerikho na tung uh a, Jerikho mite in note hong do uh hi. Amor mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Girgash mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite in zong note hong do uh a, ahi zongin noteʼ khut sungah amaute kong pia hi." 
Joshua24:12 Amor kumpi nihte note mai ah a hawl khia tunpite keimah in note mai ah ka sawl hi. Tua pen noteʼ namsau ahi a, noteʼ thal tawh ahi zongin na dona hang uh hi lo hi." 
Joshua24:13 Note in na sep loh uh leitang, na sat loh uh khuapite, note tungah kong pia a, tuate sungah na teeng uh hi. Na suan loh uh leenggui lo pan a gah leh oliv huan pan a gah na ne uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Joshua24:14 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa zahtak unla, lungsim tak le thumanna tawh ama na sem un. Na pu na pate un Gun gal le Egypt gam sungah a biak uh pasian-te koih khia unla, Topaʼ na sem un." 
Joshua24:15 Topaʼ na na sepnop kei uh leh, Gun gal khat a, a na na sepsak uh na pu na pate uh pasian ahi a, noteʼ teenna gam Amor miteʼ pasian ahi zongin, a na na sepsak ding peuhpeuh uh tu ni-in teel un. Ahih hangin kei le ka innkuanpihte in ka hih uh leh Topaʼ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:16 Tua ciangin mite in dawngin, “A dang pasian-teʼ na a sem dingin Topa nusiat ding ka ngaihsun ngei kei ding uh hi." 
Joshua24:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh salsuahna Egypt gam panin eite le i pu i pate a hong paikhiatpih, eiteʼ muhna ah tua lim liante a bawl, i paina lampi khempeuh le i nawk mite khempeuh lakah hong kem pa pen Topa i Pasian ahi hi." 
Joshua24:18 Topa in eiteʼ mai ah tua gam a teeng Amor mite khempeuh hawl khia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen eiteʼ Pasian ahih manin kote in zong Topaʼ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:19 Ahih hangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “ Topaʼ na na sem zo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen a siangtho Pasian hi a, a aam Pasian zong ahi hi. Noteʼ thupalsatna ahi a, na khialhna uh ahi zongin hong maisak lo ding hi." 
Joshua24:20 Topa nusia-in gamdang pasian-teʼ na na sep uh leh, note tungah a hoih hong bawl khit ciangin amah hong kihei-in noteʼ tungah siatna hong bawlin note hong beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:21 Tua ciangin mite in Joshua kiangah, “Hi lo hi; Topaʼ na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:22 Tua ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Ama na a sem dingin Topa na teel khitna uh ah note adingin note mah teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:23 Amah in, “Tua ahihleh noteʼ lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koih khia unla, Israel Pasian, Topaʼ lamah na lungsim uh nga un,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:24 Mite in Joshua kiangah, “ Topa i Pasianʼ na ka sem ding uh a, ama thu ka mang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Joshua24:25 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Shekhem ah tua ni-in mite tawh thuciamna bawl a, amaute adingin thukham le biakna ngeina kipte a bawl hi." 
Joshua24:26 Tua ciangin Joshua in Pasianʼ thukham laibu sungah hih kammalte a gelh hi. Amah in suangtum lianpi khat la-in Topa biakna mun tawsaw nuai ah a phut hi. 
Joshua24:27 Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh kiangah, “En un, hih suangtum pen eiteʼ lang khat ah teci hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in eite tungah hong thugen khempeuh hih suangtum in za khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin note, na Pasian uh tungah a man loin na gamtat loh nadingun hih suangtum pen noteʼ lang khat ah teci hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joshua24:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in a milipin amauʼ gamh ciatah, mite a ciahsak hi." 
Joshua24:29 Hih thute khit ciangin Topaʼ nasem, Nunʼ tapa Joshua si a, a khan kum za le kum sawm khat a pha hi." 
Joshua24:30 Tua ciangin amaute in Gaash mual leilu lam, Efraim mual tung gam a om Timnath-serah mun a ama gamhluah leitang ah a vui uh hi." 
Joshua24:31 Joshuaʼ khang sung le Joshua sangin sau a nungta zaw upate khempeuh khang sungin Israel mite in Topaʼ na sem a, Israel mite adingin Topa in a sep na khempeuh a thei uh hi." 
Joshua24:32 Israel mite in Egypt panin a puak uh Josefʼ guhte pen Shekhemʼ pa Hamorʼ tapate tung panin Jakob in dangka za khat tawh a lei Shekhem leitang ah kivui a, tua leitang pen Josefʼ suanlekhakteʼ luah a suak hi." 
Joshua24:33 Tua ciangin Aaronʼ tapa Eleazar a si hi. Amaute in Efraim mual tung gam sunga a om, ama tapa Finehas tungah a kipia Gibeah khua ah a vui uh hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan mite a sim dingin kua kuan to masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:1 Joshua a sih khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa tungah thu dong uh a, “Kanaan mite a sim dingin kua kuan to masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:2 Topa in, “Judah minamte kuan to masa ding uh hi. En un, amauʼ khut sungah tua leitang ka pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges1:3 Tua ciangin Judah minamte in a sanggam uh Simeon minamte kiangah, “Kanaan mite i zawh theih nadingin ko tungah hong kipia gamah kote hong zui un. Tua mah bangin no hong kipia gamah kote in zong kong zui ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Simeon minamte in a zui uh hi." 
Judges1:4 Tua ciangin Judah minamte kuan to uh a, Topa in amauteʼ khut sungah Kanaan mite le Perez mite a pia hi. Amaute in Bezek ah tua mite tul sawm bang a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:5 Amaute in Bezek ah Adonibezek tuakin amah tawh kido uh a, Kanaan mite le Perez mite a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:6 Adonibezek tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in delhin man uh a, a khutpite le a khepite at tan uh hi." 
Judges1:7 Tua ciangin Adonibezek in, “A khutpi le a khepi a ki-attan kumpi sawm sagihte in ka sabuai nuai ah an nengkia tawm ngei uh hi. Ka gamtatna sa bangin Pasian in kei hong thuk hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Jerusalem ah amah paipih uh a, tua munah amah a si hi." 
Judges1:8 Tua ciangin Judah mite in Jerusalem simin la uh a, a mite thatin a khuapi hal uh hi." 
Judges1:9 Tua khit ciangin Judah mite, mual tung gam, Negeb gam le lei niamna a teng Kanaan mite a sim dingin pai suk uh hi." 
Judges1:10 Tua ciangin Hebron (Hebron pen a nidangin Kiriath-arba) ah a teeng Kanaan mite a sim dingin Judah mite kuan suk uh a, amaute in Sheshai le Ahiman le Talmai a zo uh hi." 
Judges1:11 Tua lai panin Debir mite a sim dingin amaute a pai uh hi. Debir min pen nidangin Kiriath-sefer ahi hi. 
Judges1:12 Tua ciangin Kaleb in, “Kiriath-sefer simin a la zo pa tungah a zi dingin ka tanu Aksah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges1:13 Tua ciangin Kalebʼ naupa Kenazʼ tapa Othniel in la a, amah in a zi dingin a tanu Aksah a pia pah hi." 
Judges1:14 Tua nu tawh a kiteen ciangin a pa kiang panin lo khat a nget nading a zi hahsawl hi. A zi zong a la tung panin kum a, Kaleb in ama kiangah, “Bang ut na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges1:15 Amah in, “Letsong khat hong pia in. Negeb lei keu gamah hong koih na hih ciangin tuikhukte zong hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Kaleb in ama tungah tuikhuk tungnungte le tuikhuk nuainungte a pia hi." 
Judges1:16 Tua ciangin Mosesʼ sungpate nam ahi Kenʼ suanlekhakte, Judah mite tawh nisuh khuapi panin Negeb gam Arad gei-a om Judah gamah pai to uh a, tua lai munah tungin tua mite tawh a teeng khawm uh hi." 
Judges1:17 Judah mite zong Simeon mite tawh pai khawmin Zefathah a teeng Kanaan mite va zo-in susia mang uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min Hormah kici hi. 
Judges1:18 Judah mite in zong Gaza le a gam, Ashkelon le a gam le Ekron le a gamte a la uh hi." 
Judges1:19 Topa in Judah mite huh ahih manin amaute in mual tung gam teng luah uh a, ahih hangin zang gam a teeng mite hawl khia zo lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sikleeng nei uh hi." 
Judges1:20 Tua ciangin Moses in a gen sa bangin Kaleb tungah Hebron kipia a, tua sung panin amah in Anakʼ tapa thumte a hawl khia hi." 
Judges1:21 Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in Jerusalem ah a teeng Jebus mite hawl khia lo uh ahih manin tu ni dongin Jebus mite pen Jerusalem ah Benjamin mite tawh a teeng khawm uh hi. 
Judges1:22 Josef minamte zong Bethel a sim dingin kuan to uh a, Topa in amaute a huh hi." 
Judges1:23 Amaute in thu kansim dingin Bethel ah mi sawl uh hi. (Tua khuapi min pen a nidangin Luz ahi hi.) 
Judges1:24 Thu kan simte in khuapi panin hong paikhia mi khat mu-in ama kiangah, “Khuapi sung lutna lampi hong hilh in, kong thum uh hi, nang tungah kong dik tat ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges1:25 Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sung lutna lampi amaute a lak hi. Amaute in namsau tawh tua khuapi mite vat uh a, ahih hangin tua mipa le a innkuante suaktasak uh hi." 
Judges1:26 A nung ciangin Hit mite gamah tua mipa pai-in khuapi khat sat a, a min pen Luz ci-in a phuak hi. Tu dongin tua khua min pen Luz mah ahi hi." 
Judges1:27 Manasseh mite in Beth-shean le a khuaneute-a teeng mite, Taanak le a khuaneute-a teeng mite, Dor le a khuaneute-a teeng mite, Ibleam le a khuaneute-a teeng mite ahi a, Megiddo le a khuaneute-a teeng mite ahi zongin hawl khia lo uh ahih manin Kanaan gam mite tua leitang ah teeng lai uh hi." 
Judges1:28 Ahi zongin Israel-te a thahat uh ciangin amaute in aana tawh na a sem dingin Kanaan mite koih uh a, hawl khia siang lo uh hi." 
Judges1:29 Efraim mite in zong Gezer ah a teeng Kanaan mite hawl khia lo uh ahih manin Gezer ah amauteʼ lakah Kanaan mite a teeng uh hi. 
Judges1:30 Zebulun minamte in Kitron-a teeng mite ahi a, Nahalol a teeng mite ahi zongin hawl khia lo a, Kanaan mite amaute lakah teengin aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:31 Asher minamte in Akko a teeng mite, Sidon a teeng mite, Ahlab a teengte, Akzib a teengte, Helbah a teengte le Afik a teengte ahi a, Rehob a teengte ahi zongin hawl khia lo uh hi." 
Judges1:32 Tua gam a teeng Kanaan mite lakah Asher mite teeng uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in hawl khia lo uh hi. 
Judges1:33 Naftali minamte in Beth-shemesh a teengte ahi a, Beth-anath a teengte ahi zongin hawl khia loin, tua gam a teeng Kanaan mite lakah a teeng uh hi. Ahi zongin Beth-shemesh le Beth anath a teeng mite pen amaute adingin aana tawh na a sem mite a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:34 Amor mite in mual tung gamah Dan mite notkik uh a, zang gamah paisuksak lo uh hi." 
Judges1:35 Amor mite pen Harheres, Aijalon le Shaalbim ah teeng uh a, ahih hangin Josef minamte in amaute gawt semsem a, amaute pen aana tawh nasemte a suak uh hi." 
Judges1:36 Amor miteʼ gamgi pen Akrabbim kah tohna, Sela leilu lam pan kipan hi." 
Judges2:1 Tu-in Gilgal panin Bokhim ah Topaʼ vantungmi pai to hi. Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Egypt panin note kong paipih to a, na pu na pate uh tungah piak dinga ka ciam leitang ah note kong paipih hi. Keimah in, ‘Note tawh ka thuciam ka siasak ngei kei dinga," 
Judges2:2 hih gam a teeng mite tawh thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi. Amauʼ biakna taute na susia ding uh hi,’ ka hong ci hi. Ahih hangin note in ka thupiakna na mang kei uh hi. Bang hangin leh gamtat na hi uh hiam?" 
Judges2:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keimah in noteʼ mai ah amaute ka hawl khia kei ding hi. Amaute pen noteʼ lang suak ding uh a, a pasian-te uh note adingin thang antah hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges2:4 Topaʼ vantungmi in Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen ciangin mite a kap uh hi. 
Judges2:5 Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Bokhim, ci-in min phuak uh a, tua lai munah Topaʼ tungah biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges2:6 Joshua in mite ciahsak a, Israel mite zong leitang luah dingin amauʼ gamh ciatah pai uh hi." 
Judges2:6 Joshua in mite ciahsak a, Israel mite zong leitang luah dingin amauʼ gamh ciatah pai uh hi." 
Judges2:7 Mite in Joshuaʼ nuntak sung le, Israel-te adingin Topaʼ sep sa na lian khempeuh a mu, Joshua sanga sau a nungta zawte khempeuh nuntak sungin Topaʼ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:7 Mite in Joshuaʼ nuntak sung le, Israel-te adingin Topaʼ sep sa na lian khempeuh a mu, Joshua sanga sau a nungta zawte khempeuh nuntak sungin Topaʼ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:8 Tua ciangin Topaʼ nasem ahi, Nunʼ tapa Joshua, a khan kum za le kum sawm khat a phak laitakin a si hi." 
Judges2:8 Tua ciangin Topaʼ nasem ahi, Nunʼ tapa Joshua, a khan kum za le kum sawm khat a phak laitakin a si hi." 
Judges2:9 Amaute in Gaash Mual leilu lam, Efraim mual tung gam sung, Timnath-heres a ama luahna huam sungah a vui uh hi." 
Judges2:10 Tua ciangin tua khang mite khempeuh zong si khin uh a, amauteʼ khit ciangin Topa hitaleh, Israel-te adingin a septe hitaleh a thei lo khangthak hong piang uh hi." 
Judges2:11 Tua ciangin Israel mite, Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta-in Baal-teʼ na sem uh hi." 
Judges2:12 Egypt panin amaute a paikhiatpih a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa amaute in nusia uh hi. Amauʼ kiim a om miteʼ pasian dangteʼ nung zui-in, tuateʼ mai ah kun uh a, amaute in Topa hehsak uh hi." 
Judges2:13 Amaute in Topa nusia uh a, Baal-te le Ashtaroth pasian-te bia uh hi." 
Judges2:14 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sin so a, amauteʼ na a sut, miʼ na a sut thei miteʼ tungah amaute a pia hi. A kiim a om a galte uh tungah amaute pia a, amaute in a galte uh nang zo nawn lo uh hi." 
Judges2:15 Galsim dingin amaute a kuan khiat sialun, Topa in a hilhkholh sa le Topa in amaute tungah a kiciam sa bangin amauteʼ lang khat ah a sia lamin Topa pang hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungkhamna tuak uh hi." 
Judges2:16 Tua ciangin, amauteʼ na a sut gawp miteʼ vangliatna panin amaute a hon khia thukhente Topa in khangsak hi." 
Judges2:17 Ahi zongin amaute in a thukhente uh thu ngai lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in pasian dangte bia-in tuateʼ mai ah kun uh hi. Topaʼ thupiakna a mang amauʼ pute pateʼ tot lampi panin amaute pial pah uh a, amaute in Topaʼ thu mang lo uh hi." 
Judges2:18 Topa in amaute adingin thukhente a khansak sialin Topa in thukhente huh a, thukhenteʼ nuntak sung tawntung a galte uh khut sung panin amaute hon hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a gimsak a nengniamteʼ hangin amauʼ tauna in Topaʼ hehpih nading piangsak hi." 
Judges2:19 Ahih hangin thukhente a sih peuhpeuh ciangin amaute kiheikikin a pu a pate uh sangin a sia zaw-in gamta zel uh hi. A dang pasian-teʼ nung zui uh a, amauteʼ na semin a mai uh ah kun uh hi. Amauteʼ gamtatnate uh ahi a, a lungkhauhnate uh ahi zongin khia lo uh hi." 
Judges2:20 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa heh mahmah a, amah in, “Hih mite in amauʼ pu le pateʼ tungah ka thupiak ka thuciamna khialin keima thu ngai lo uh ahih manin," 
Judges2:21 Joshua a sih lai-in a nusiat minamte khat zong tu a kipanin amauteʼ mai ah ka hawl khia kei ding hi. 
Judges2:21 Joshua a sih lai-in a nusiat minamte khat zong tu a kipanin amauteʼ mai ah ka hawl khia kei ding hi. 
Judges2:22 Amauʼ pute pate in Topaʼ lampi a zuih bangin zuih ding a don uh hiam, a don kei uh hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin hih mite tawh Israel mite ka ze-et ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua minamte thakhatin hawl khia loin koihcing a, Joshuaʼ khut sungah amaute pia lo hi." 
Judges2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua minamte thakhatin hawl khia loin koihcing a, Joshuaʼ khut sungah amaute pia lo hi." 
Judges3:1 Tu-in Israel-te sung panin Kanaan gam sungah galdona a thei kha nai lo Israel-te ze-et nadingin Topa in minam pawl khat a siit hi. 
Judges3:2 Tua khang Israel mite in galdona a theih nading, nidangin galdona a thei ngei lo tua bang mite a hilh theih nading bek ahi hi." 
Judges3:3 Tua a siit minamte: Filistia ulian ngate, Kanaan mi khempeuh, Sidon mite le Baal-hermon Mual panin Hamath lutna ciang dong Lebanon Mual tungah a teeng Hiv mite ahi hi." 
Judges3:4 Moses tungtawnin a pu a pate uh a thupiak, Topaʼ thupiaknate Israel-te in a mang uh hiam, cih a kitheih nadingin amaute pen Israel-te a kize-etna ahi hi." 
Judges3:5 Tua ahih ciangin Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus miteʼ lakah Israel mite teeng uh hi." 
Judges3:6 Amaute in a zi dingun a tanute uh la uh a, amauʼ tanute a tapate uh tungah a pia uh hi. Amaute in a pasian-te uh a bia uh hi." 
Judges3:7 Topaʼ muhna ah Israel-te a sia gamta-in, Topa amauʼ Pasian mangngilh uh a, Baal-te le Asherah milimte a bia uh hi." 
Judges3:8 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sin so a, amah in Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushan-rishathaim tungah amaute a pia hi. Israel mite in Kushan-rishathaimʼ na kum giat sung a sem uh hi." 
Judges3:9 Ahih hangin Topaʼ tungah Israel mite kiko uh a, Topa in Kalebʼ naupa Kenazʼ tapa Othniel, amaute a hon khia dingin a khangsak hi." 
Judges3:10 Topaʼ Kha ama tungah tunga, amah, Israel miteʼ thukhen a suak hi. Galsim dingin kuan khia a, Topa in ama khut sungah Mesopotamia kumpipa Kushan-rishathaim a pia hi." 
Judges3:11 Tua ahih ciangin a gam in kum sawm li sung tawlngakna hun nei hi. Tua ciangin Kenazʼ tapa Othniel a si hi. 
Judges3:12 Tua ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah Israel-te a sia gamtakik uh ahih ciangin Topa in Israel-teʼ lang khat ah Moab kumpipa Eglon thahatsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ muhna ah amaute a sia gamta uh hi. 
Judges3:13 Eglon in Ammon mite le Amalek mite ama kiangah khawm a, va kuanin Israel-te va zo hi. Amaute in nisuh khuapi a luah uh hi." 
Judges3:14 Israel mite in Moab kumpi Eglonʼ na kum sawm le kum giat sung a sem uh hi. 
Judges3:15 Ahih hangin Topaʼ tungah Israel mite a kiko uh ciangin, Topa in Benjamin mi, Geraʼ tapa a veikhoi Ehud, amauteʼ honpa dingin a khangsak hi. Israel mite in ama tungtawnin Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah siah a puak uh hi." 
Judges3:16 Ehud in ama adingin lang nih a hiam, pi khat le alang a sau namsau khat bawl a, a puannuai a taklam phei tungah tua namsau a khih hi." 
Judges3:17 Tua ciangin amah in Moab kumpipa Eglon tungah a siah sung hi. Eglon pen a thau mahmah mi khat ahi hi. 
Judges3:18 Ehud in a siahsunʼ a man khit ciangin siah a puak mite ciahsak hi. 
Judges3:19 Ahih hangin Gilgal kiang suang milimte omna panin amah kilehkikin, “Kumpipa aw, nang tungah gen ding thusim khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Gam dai un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amah a cing mi khempeuh ama omna panin paikhia uh hi." 
Judges3:20 Inn khum zang inn dei a votna sungah amah guak tu-in a om laitakin ama kiangah Ehud hong pai hi. Ehud in, “Pasianʼ kiang panin nang tungah gen ding thu khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tutna panin amah ding to hi." 
Judges3:21 Tua ciangin Ehud in a veilam khut tawh a taklam phei panin a namsau la-in, tua paʼ gil sungah a siat suk hi." 
Judges3:22 A namsau banah a bul zong tum a, a thau in a namsau tuamcip hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gil panin amah in a namsau dok lo a, a ek lawt khia hi." 
Judges3:23 Tua ciangin inn dei pua ah Ehud pai khia-in, inn khumzang inn dei kongkhakte amah khaknelhin tuate a kalh hi." 
Judges3:24 Amah a paikhiat khit ciangin nasemte hong pai hi. Innkhum zang inn dei kongkhakte a kikalh a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Inn vot sunga inn dei ah awnghawh hi in teh,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi." 
Judges3:25 A cih nading uh a theih loh zah dong uh ngak uh hi. Ahih hangin inn khumzang inn dei kongkhak amah in a hon loh veve ciangin, amaute in a tawhtang la-in hong uh a, sual tungah a topa uh na si hi." 
Judges3:26 Amauʼ zia kikalin Ehud tai-in suang milimte kheng a, Seirah ah a tai hi." 
Judges3:27 Amah a tun ciangin Efraim mual tung gamah peengkul a gingsak hi. Mual tung gam panin Israel mite amah tawh pai suk uh a, amauʼ lutangin Ehud a nei uh hi." 
Judges3:28 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ka nung hong zui un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na gal uh Moab mite na khut sung uh ah hong pia zo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama nungah amaute pai suk uh a, Moab mite kiang panin Jordan ngahmunte la-in, mi khat zong galkahsak lo uh hi." 
Judges3:29 Tua hunin amaute in a thahat a siam Moab mite khempeuh, mi tul sawm bang that uh a, mi khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Judges3:30 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Moab gam pen Israel-teʼ khutnuai a suak hi. Tua gam in kum sawm giat sung tawlngakna a nei hi. 
Judges3:31 Ama khit ciangin Anathʼ tapa Shamgar hi a, ciangkhut zum tawh Filistia mite za guk a that pa ahi hi. Amah in zong Israel-te hon khia hi." 
Judges4:1 Ehud a sih khit ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah Israel mite a sia gamtakik uh hi. 
Judges4:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Hazor ah a uk, Kanaan kumpipa Jabinʼ khut sungah amaute a pia hi. Ama galkapte a ukpa pen, Harosheth-ha-goiim ah a teeng Sisera ahi hi." 
Judges4:3 Tua ciangin Israel mite huhna a ngen dingin Topaʼ tungah a kiko uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sikleeng za kua nei a, Israel mite kum sawm nih sung nakpi takin gim a pia hi." 
Judges4:4 Tua hun lai-in Lappidothʼ zi kamsang numei Deborah in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges4:5 Tua nu, Efraim mual tung gam sung Ramah le Bethel kikal nisuh kung nuai ah tu zel a, thu a khensak dingin ama kiangah Israel mite hong pai uh hi." 
Judges4:6 Amah in mi sawlin Naftali gam Kedesh panin Abinoamʼ tapa Barak samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian in nang thu hong pia-in, ‘Pai in, Tabor Mual ah na mite khawm inla, Naftali minam le Zebulun minam panin mi tul sawm bang la in hong ci hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Judges4:7 Keimah in Jabinʼ galkap maang Sisera, Kishon gun ah nang hong dawntuah dingin a leengte le a galkapte tawh ka kai khia dinga, na khut sungah amah kong pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:8 Barak in ama kiangah, “Kei na hong zuih ding le, ka kuan ding hi. Ahih hangin kei tawh nong kuan kei ding le, ka kuan kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “Nang tawh kong kuan taktak ding hi. Ahi zongin gualzawhna pen nangma minthan nading hi lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in numei khatʼ khut sungah Sisera pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Deborah dingin Barak tawh Kedesh ah pai hi." 
Judges4:10 Barak in Kedesh ah Zebulun minam le Naftali minamte a sam hi. Ama kiangah mihing tul sawm bang kuan to uh a, amah tawh Deborah kuan to khawm hi." 
Judges4:11 Tu-in Mosesʼ ziʼ sanggampa Hobabʼ suanlekhak Ken mite sung panin Ken mi Heber paikhia a, Kedesh kiang a Zaanannim-a tawsaw ciang pekah a puanbuk a lam hi." 
Judges4:12 Abinoamʼ tapa Barak, Tabor Mual ah pai to khin, ci-in Sisera kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
Judges4:13 Sisera in a leeng khempeuh, sikleeng za kua le ama kiang a om mi khempeuh, Harosheth-ha-goiim panin Kishon gun ah a sam khia hi." 
Judges4:14 Tua ciangin Deborah in Barak kiangah, “Pai in! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khut sungah Sisera hong piak ni ahi hi. Na mai ah Topa pai hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing tul sawm bang in zui-in Tabor Mual panin Barak a pai suk hi." 
Judges4:15 Topa in Barakʼ mai ah Sisera le a leengte khempeuh a taisak hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a leeng tung pan tuakin a khe-in a tai hi. 
Judges4:16 Barak in Harosheth-ha-goiim ciang dong a leengte le a galkapte delh a, Siseraʼ galkapte khempeuh namsau tawh kithatin bei mang uh a, mi khat zong suakta lo hi." 
Judges4:17 Ahih hangin Sisera, Ken mi Heberʼ zi Jaelʼ puanbuk ah a khe-in a tai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hazor kumpipa Jabin le Ken mi Heberʼ innkuante kilem uh hi." 
Judges4:18 Sisera a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong kihei in, ka topa aw, kei lamah hong kihei in; lau kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama puanbuk ah Sisera hong pai a, tua nu in sualphah puan khat tawh amah na khuh hi." 
Judges4:19 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Hong thum ing, dawn ding tui hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka dangtak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in bawngnawi koihna savun thawl hongin dawnsakin amah a khuhkik hi." 
Judges4:20 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Puanbuk kongah ding inla, mi khatpeuh hong pai-in na kiangah, ‘Hih lai ah mi khatpeuh a om hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Om kei,’ na ci in,” a ci hi." 
Judges4:21 Ahih hangin Heberʼ zi Jael in puanbuk khetphim khat la a, a khut ah sek khat tawi-in ama kiangah dam takin pai a, a gim luatna hangin ihmucipin a om laitakin a khetphim in lei a bat dongin a paang ah a khen suk hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a si hi." 
Judges4:22 En in, Barak in Sisera hong delh ciangin amah a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong pai in, na mi zon kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua nuʼ puanbuk sungah amah hong pai hi. Tua lai ah Sisera a paang ah puanbuk khetphim tawh a si-in na om hi." 
Judges4:23 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Israel miteʼ mai ah Pasian in Kanaan kumpi Jabin nuaisiah hi. 
Judges4:24 Israel mite in Kanaan kumpipa Jabin a suksiat matengin Kanaan kumpipa Jabin tungah thuak hak semsem uh hi. 
Judges5:1 Tua ciangin Deborah le Abinoamʼ tapa Barak in tua ni-in la sa uh a," 
Judges5:2 “Makaite in Israel-te makai uh a, mite amau mahmah utna tawh kipia uh hi. Topa phat un." 
Judges5:3 Ngai un, kumpite aw, na bil uh ngat un, uliante aw. Topa tungah la ka sa dinga, Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topaʼ tungah la ngaih ka sa ding hi." 
Judges5:4 Topa aw, Seir panin na paikhiat ciang, Edom gam panin na paikhiat ciang, leitung liing a, vantung panin guah zu hi. Hi hi, meiite in tui hong khia a," 
Judges5:5 Topaʼ mai ah mualte kiliing hi, Israel Pasian, Topaʼ mai Sinai gal khat ah." 
Judges5:6 “Anathʼ tapa Shamgarʼ hun lai, Jaelʼ hun lai-in, a hon hona khualzinte om nawn lo a, khualzinte lam gei ah pial uh hi." 
Judges5:7 Israel sunga lokhote khawlcip uh a, bangmah sem thei lo uh hi. Nang, Deborah, nong khan mateng, Israel sungah nu banga nong khan mateng." 
Judges5:8 A thak pasian-te a kiteel ciangin, kulh kongpi sungah gal om pah hi. Lum ahi a, tei ahi zongin, Israel tul sawm lite lakah kimu ahi hiam?" 
Judges5:9 Mite lak panin utna tawh amau a kipiatawm Israel a ukteʼ lamah ka lungsim pai hi. Topa phat un. 
Judges5:10 “A thu gen un, no la puang tungah a tuangte, sualphah puan hoih tungah a tute le lampi ah a paite aw." 
Judges5:11 Tui phual a lasakna a tumteʼ ginna in Topaʼ gualzawhna gen a, Israel sunga lokhote in zong a gualzawhna mah genkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ mite kulh kongpite ah pai suk uh hi." 
Judges5:12 “Khanglo in, khanglo in, Deborah! Khanglo in, khanglo in, la khat sa in! Tho in, Barak, na galmatte paikhiatpih in, Abinoamʼ tapa aw." 
Judges5:13 Tua ciangin ulian paʼ mi a omlaite pai suk uh a, ama ading a dosak dingin Topaʼ mite pai suk uh hi." 
Judges5:14 Efraim panin amaute ding khia-in tua kuamah pai uh a, nang, Benjamin, na behte tawh hong zui uh hi. Makhir panin a ukte hong pai sukin, Zebulun panin ulian paʼ ciangkhut a tawite hong pai suk uh hi." 
Judges5:15 Issakhar uliante Deborah tawh hong pai a, Barak tungah Issakhar thuman hi. Kuam sung ama khe phung ah amaute kituah uh hi. Reuben behte lakah nakpi tak a lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi." 
Judges5:16 Bang hangin tuukhawkte lakah tuuhonte adingin tamngai kitum a ngai dingin zekai na hi hiam? Reuben behte lakah nakpi tak a lungsim ngaihsutna a om hi. 
Judges5:17 Jordan gal khat ah Gilead om hi. Dan minamte bang hangin teembaw tawh om ahi hiam? Asher minamte, tuipi gei ah tu lai a, leilak a tunna gei ah a teeng uh hi." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun mite a sih dongun gal sungah a kipia ngam mi hi a, Naftali minamte zong, gamlak a sangna munah tua bangmah ahi hi." 
Judges5:19 “Kumpite hong pai-in do uh hi. Tua ciangin Kanaan kumpite in Megiddo tuiteʼ gei, Taanak ah do uh a, amaute in a kinusia ngunte ngah lo uh hi." 
Judges5:20 Vantung panin aksite in do uh a, amau paina ciat panin Sisera do uh hi." 
Judges5:21 Kishon gun tuikhang in amaute tai a, a leeng vanvan tuikhang, Kishon tuikhang in tai hi. Thakhauh takin mai nawtsuak ding!" 
Judges5:22 Tua ciangin sakol khe, a koptaina, a sakol hangteʼ koptaina a ging hi." 
Judges5:23 “ Topaʼ vantungmi in, ‘Meroz khua samsia in, a sunga teeng mite nasia takin samsia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a huh dingin a thahatpa dona ah Topa a huh dingin hong kuan lo uh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:24 “Numeite lakah thupha ngah pha pen Jael, Ken mi Heberʼ zi, puanbuk ah a teeng numei lak pan thupha ngah pha pen ahi hi." 
Judges5:25 Sisera in tui ngen a, Jael in bawngnawi pia hi. Ulian hai sungah tua nu in bawngnawi-thaukhal paipih hi." 
Judges5:26 Amah in puanbuk khetphim a khutin zam a, a taklam khutin nasemteʼ khetbuk a zam hi. Sisera khatvei sat a, a lutang sat khamin, amah in phel khamin a paang a sun hi." 
Judges5:27 Amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. Tua nuʼ khe kiangah amah taang loin om hi. Ama khe phung ah amah tuk hi, amah puk hi. A tukna munah, amah a si-in puk hi." 
Judges5:28 “Tawlet panin Siseraʼ nu khuadak a, a kikalh simsiam kawm panin Siseraʼ nu khuadak hi: ‘Bang hangin a leeng hong ciah ding hih tanvei sawt ahi hiam? A leeng khegingte bang hangin hici zekai ahi hiam?’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:29 A numeite a pil pen nu in amah a dawng hiam, dawng lo hi. Amah le amah kidawng a," 
Judges5:30 ‘Amaute in van kinusiate mu-in hawm hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khat ciangin nungak khat ahih kei leh nih pai; a kinusia puan kinimte Sisera ading, a kinusia puan kinim a kizemte, a kinim a kizem puan nihte ka ngawng ading maw?’ a ci hi." 
Judges5:31 “Tua ahih ciangin na gal khempeuh si khin uh hi, Topa! Ahih hangin na lawmte pen a vangliatna tawh a suak ni bang tahen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam in kum sawm li sung tawlngakna hun a nei hi." 
Judges6:1 Topaʼ muhna ah Israel-te a sia gamta uh a, Topa in Midian-teʼ khut sungah amaute kum sagih sung a pia hi." 
Judges6:2 Israel-te tungah Midian-te gualzo uh hi. Midian-teʼ kiang panin a buk nadingun leihawmte le mun muanhuaite a bawl uh hi. 
Judges6:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te in khai a tuh peuhmah uh ciangin Midian-te le Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite hong pai-in amaute sim uh hi. 
Judges6:4 Amaute a sim nadingun giahphual satin Gaza kiim ciangciang dong lei pan a piangte susia uh a, Israel mite a nuntak nading bangmah nusia loin, tuu ahi a, bawngtal ahi a, la ahi zongin siit nei lo uh hi." 
Judges6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a ganhingte le a puanbukte uh tawh kauphe honpi bangin tamin hong pai uh a, amaute le a kalaohte uh kisim zo lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute hong tun ciangin gam teng beisak uh hi." 
Judges6:6 Midian-teʼ hangin Israel-te kiniamkoih mahmah a, Israel mite in Topaʼ tungah huhna ngenin kiko uh hi." 
Judges6:7 Midian-teʼ hangin Israel mite Topaʼ tungah a kiko uh ciangin," 
Judges6:8 Topa in Israel mite kiangah kamsang khat a sawl hi. Amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Salsuahna Egypt panin note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Judges6:9 Egypt mite le note hong nengniam mi khempeuh khut sung panin note kong hon khia a, noteʼ mai ah amaute hawl khia-in, amauʼ leitang note kong pia hi." 
Judges6:10 Tua ciangin note kiangah, ‘Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Na teenna uh Amor miteʼ pasian-te zahtakna na pia kei ding uh hi,’ kong ci hi. Ahih hangin note in ka thu na ngai kei uh hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:11 Tua ciangin Ofrah khua ah Topaʼ vantungmi hong pai a, Abiezer mi Joash neihsa tawsaw nuai ah hong tu hi. Tua laitakin Joashʼ tapa Gideon in Midian miteʼ muh loh dingin leenggah sukna ah mangbuh cil simin na om hi." 
Judges6:12 Topaʼ vantungmi ama tungah kilangin ama kiangah, “ Topa in nang hong ompih hi, a thahat a vanglian mipa aw,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:13 Gideon in ama kiangah, “Kong thum hi, sia aw, Topa in kote hong ompih ahihleh, bang hangin hih thu khempeuh ko tungah hong tung ahi hiam? Ka pate un kote tungah hong genin, ‘ Topa in Egypt panin eite hong paipih hi lo ahi hiam?’ a cih uh a lamdang ama sepnate khempeuh koi ah om ta ahi hiam? Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in kote hong paai khia-in Midian-teʼ khut sungah hong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:14 Tua ciangin ama lamah Topa kihei-in, “Hih nangma thahatna tawh pai inla, Midian-teʼ khut sung panin Israel-te hon khia in. Nangmah hong sawl khin hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges6:15 Tua ciangin Gideon in ama kiangah, “Kong thum hi, Topa aw, Israel-te bangci hotkhiat zawh ding ka hi hiam? En in, Manasseh minam sungah keima behte a hat lo pen hi a, ka innkuan sung panin kei a neu pen ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:16 Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang kong ompih dinga, nangmah in mihing khat bang lelin Midian-te na vat gawp ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in nong hehpih zawh leh, kei tawh a kiho mi pa pen nang na hihna lim khat hong lak in." 
Judges6:18 Kong thum hi, letsong puakin nang kiangah hong pai-in nangma mai ah kong koih mateng hih lai panin na paikhia kei in,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nong tunkik mateng ka na om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:19 Tua ahih ciangin Gideon a inn ah pai-in keel no khat le annel seu khat silngo sawh loh moh a bawl hi. A sa ciang sung khat ah koihin a satui beel sung khat ah koih a, tawsaw nuai ama kiangah tuate hong paipihin a pia hi." 
Judges6:20 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Sa le silngo sawh loh moh la-in, hih suang tungah koih inla, a tungah satui sung in,” a ci hi. Tua bangmahin amah in a hih hi." 
Judges6:21 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in a khut sung a om ciangkhut dawn dawksakin, sa le silngo sawh loh mohte a su hi. A suang panin mei piang khia-in, sa le silngo sawh loh moh a kaang tum hi. Tua ciangin ama muhna panin Topaʼ vantungmi a mang hi." 
Judges6:22 Tua ciangin Gideon in amah pen Topaʼ vantungmi ahih lam a thei hi. Gideon in, “Ala! Topa Pasian! Topaʼ vantungmi mai kituahin ka mu kha khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:23 Ahih hangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Nopna na tungah hong om tahen; lau kei in, na si kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in Topa adingin biakna tau khat tua lai ah lamin tua pen, “ Topa in nopna ahi hi”, ci-in min a phuak hi. Tua pen, Abiezer miteʼ neihsa Ofrah khua ah tu ni dongin a ding lai hi." 
Judges6:25 Tua zanin Topa in ama kiangah, “Na paʼ bawng sung pan kum sagih a pha a bawngtal nih la inla, na paʼ neih Baal biakna tau phelin, a gei-a om Asherah milim phuk in." 
Judges6:26 Tua ciangin hih lai mun muanhuai dawnah Topa na Pasian adingin biakna tau khat lamin, a suangte a ngeina ding bangin koih in. Tua ciangin a bawngtal nih la-in, na phuk Asherah milim sing tawh meihal biakna-in pia in,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:27 Tua ahih ciangin Gideon in a nasemte mi sawm paipihin, Topa in ama tungah a gen bangin a hih hi. Ahih hangin sunin a hih ding a innkuanpihte le a khua mite kihta lua ahih manin zanin a hih hi." 
Judges6:28 Tua khua mite zingsang tungin a thawh uh ciangin, Baal biakna tau kiphel khia-in a gei-a om Asherah milim kiphuk a, a kilam thak biakna tau tungah bawngtal a nihna a kipia a mu uh hi." 
Judges6:29 Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Hih na kua in hih ahi hiam?” kici uh hi. Amaute in a thu kanin a dot uh ciangin, “Joashʼ tapa Gideon in hih hi,” kici uh hi." 
Judges6:30 Tua ciangin tua khua mite in Joash kiangah, “Na tapa in Baal biakna tau phel khia-in a gei-a om Asherah milim phuk ahih manin ka thah theih nadingun amah hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges6:31 Ahih hangin Joash in ama lang khat ah a pang mite khempeuh tungah, “Baal panpih dinga, ama tupna hut pih ding na hi uh hiam? Amah a panpih peuhmah zingsang ciangin kithat ding hi. Amah pasian ahihleh a mahmah kihu tawm tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama biakna tau a kiphelsak ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:32 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Gideon, “Keima lang khat ah Baal pangsak un,” a cihnopna ahi Jerubbaal min kiphuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Gideon in a biakna tau a phel hi." 
Judges6:33 Tua ciangin Midian mite, Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite khempeuh hong pai khawm uh a, amaute in Jordan kantanin Jezreel Kuam ah giahphual a sat uh hi." 
Judges6:34 Ahih hangin Gideonʼ tungah Topaʼ kha hong tung hi. Amah in peengkul gingsak a, amah a zui dingin Abiezer mite kisam khia hi." 
Judges6:35 Amah in Manasseh gam khempeuh ah kamtaite sawl a, amaute zong amah a zui dingin kisam hi. Amah in Asher, Zebulun le Naftali minamte kiangah kamtaite sawl a, amah a pawm dingin amaute zong pai to uh hi." 
Judges6:36 Tua ciangin Gideon in Pasian kiangah, “Na gen sa bangin keima tha tawh Israel-te na hotkhiat ding leh," 
Judges6:37 en in, ancilna sual tungah tuumul lom khat ka koih hi. Tuumul tung bekah daitui omin leilak dang khempeuh a keu leh, na gen sa bangin keima tha tawh Israel-te na hon khia ding hi, cih ka thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:38 Tua bangmahin a piang hi. A zing ciangin tho baihin a tuumulte a tui suk a, tuumul panin tui hai khat dim a suk khia hi." 
Judges6:39 Tua ciangin Gideon in Pasian kiangah, “Kei tungah hong heh kei in, tu-a khatvei bek hong pausak lai in, kong thum hi; tuumul tawh hih khatvei bek hong sinsak lai in, kong thum hi. Tuumul tung bek keusak inla, mun dang leitung khempeuh ah daitui omsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges6:40 Tua bangmahin Pasian in tua zanin a hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuumul tung bek keu a, mun dang leitung khempeuh ah daitui a om hi." 
Judges7:1 Tua ciangin Jerubbaal (Gideon a cihna) le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zingsangin tho baihin Harod tuikhuk gei ah giahphual a sat uh hi. Midian-teʼ giahphual pen amauʼ kiang pan leilu lam, Moreh mual kiang, kuam sungah om hi." 
Judges7:2 Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Amauʼ khut sungah Midian mite piak nadingin nang tawh a om khawm mite kei adingin tam lua hi. Tua bangin tam lua leh kei tungah Israel-te kisialin, ‘Komauʼ hatna hangin ka gualzo uh hi,’ ci kha ding uh hi." 
Judges7:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in miteʼ zakin taangko inla, ‘Lau-in a liing mi peuhmah a inn ah ciah un,’ ci in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute ze-et hi; tul sawm nih le tul nih ciahkikin, tul sawm bang bek om lai hi." 
Judges7:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Mite tam lua lai ahih manin tui gei ah amaute paipih in. Nang adingin tua munah amaute kong sinsak ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi,’ ka cih pa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuan lo ding hi,’ ka cih peuhpeuh pa kuan lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tui phualah mite paipih suk hi. Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Ui in a liah bangin a lei tawh tui a liak mi peuhmah na tuam koih ding hi. Tua mah bangin tui dawn dingin a khukdin suk peuhmah zong na tuam koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:6 Tui a liak, a khut uh a kam ah a tuah mi za thum ahi hi. Ahih hangin a dangte khempeuh tui dawn dingin khukdin suk uh hi." 
Judges7:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Tui a liak mi za thumte tawh nangmah hong hon khia-in, na khut sungah Midian mite kong pia ding hi. A dangte khempeuh amauʼ inn ciatah ciahsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:8 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Israel midang khempeuh ciahsak a, a beelte le a peengkulte khempeuh uh a kem mihing za thumte a khawlsak hi. Midian-teʼ giahphual pen amauʼ khanglam kuam sungah om hi." 
Judges7:9 Tua zan mahin Topa in ama kiangah, “Tho in, giahphual simin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah kong pia zo hi." 
Judges7:10 Ahih hangin na sim suk ngam kei leh, na nasem pa Purah tawh a giahphual nai uh ah pai suk in." 
Judges7:11 Tua ciangin amauteʼ thugen na za dinga, giahphual simin a kuan suk dingin na tha hong khauh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nasem pa Purah tawh giahphual a om galkapte in a pua lamah a galpanna munah a pai suk uh hi." 
Judges7:12 Midian mite, Amalek mite le Nisuahna lam mite khempeuh kauphe bangin tamin kuam dungah om uh hi. A kalaohte uh sim zawh hi lo a, a tamna pen tuipi gei-a sehnel omzah bang ahi hi." 
Judges7:13 Gideon a tun ciangin, mi khat in a lawmpa kiangah mang khat na gen hi. Amah in, “Ngai in, mang khat ka man hi. Midian-te giahphual sungah mangbuhham tawh a kibawl moh khat hong tuk sukin puanbuk hong ban a, puanbuk deng kha-in puanbuk puk a, puanbuk kilumletin leilak ah kiphah hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:14 Tua ciangin a lawmpa in dawngin, “Hih pen, Israel mi Joashʼ tapa Gideonʼ namsau lo a dang hi lo hi. Pasian in ama khut sungah Midian le mihon khempeuh pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:15 Gideon in a mang le a khiatna a kigenna a zak ciangin Pasian bia-in a khukdin hi. Israel-teʼ giahphual ah ciahkikin, “Tho un, bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khut sung uh ah Midian honte hong pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:16 Amah in mihing za thumte pawl thumin khenin, amaute khempeuh tungah peengkul le beel sungah meilah a om beel hawmte a pia hi." 
Judges7:17 Amaute kiangah, “Keimah hong en unla, a giahphual nawl ka tun ciangin keiʼ hih bangin hih un." 
Judges7:18 Kei le ka ompih khempeuh in peengkul ka tum uh ciangin, giahphual pang khempeuh ah zong peengkulte tum unla, ‘ Topa -aʼ ding le Gideon ading,’ ci-in awng un,” a ci hi." 
Judges7:19 Tua ahih ciangin, amaute in galvil a laih khit phet, zankim laitakin, Gideon le amah tawh a om mi za khatte giahphual nawl ah hong pai uh a, amaute in peengkul tumin a khut sung uh a om beelte a sukham uh hi." 
Judges7:20 A pawl thumun peengkul tumin beelte sukham uh a, a veilam khutun meilah tawi-in, a taklam khutun a tum ding uh peengkul tawi uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiko-in, “ Topa ading le Gideon ading namsau khat!” a ci uh hi." 
Judges7:21 Amaute a vekpi-in giahphual kiimah ding uh a, a galte khempeuh uh kiko-in tai khia uh hi." 
Judges7:22 Amaute in peengkul za thumte a tum uh ciangin, Topa in a galte khempeuh a namsau uh tawh amau le amau kisat gawpsak hi. Tua ciangin a galte uh Zererah gei Beth-shittah ciang le Tabbath kiang Abel-meholah gamgi dong tai uh hi." 
Judges7:23 Tua ciangin Naftali, Asher le Manasseh minamte khempeuh sung panin mite kisam khia a, amaute in Midian-te a delh uh hi." 
Judges7:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in Efraim mual tung gam khempeuh ah kamtaite sawl a, “Midian miteʼ lang khat ah hong kuan sukin Beth-barah ciang dong luite hong la unla, Jordan zong hong la un,” cisak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Efraim mite khempeuh kisam khia a, amaute in Beth-barah ciang dong luite la-in, Jordan zong a la uh hi." 
Judges7:25 Amaute in Midian ulian nihte Oreb le Zeeb a man uh hi. Amaute in Midian-te a delh kawmun Oreb Suangpi ah Oreb that uh a, Zeeb Leenggah sukna ah Zeeb that uh hi. Amaute in Jordan gal khat Gideon kiangah Oreb le Zeeb lutangte hong paipih uh hi." 
Judges8:1 Tua ciangin Efraim mite in Gideon kiangah, “Midian-te a do dingin na kuan cil lai-in kote nong sap loh, kote hong bangci ngaihsut na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in nakpi takin amah mawhsak uh hi." 
Judges8:2 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note tawh teh dingin kote bang hi lel ka hi uh hiam? No Efraim minamteʼ sep a themno khat pen ko minam bup khempeuhteʼ sep sangin thupi zaw hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Judges8:3 Pasian in noteʼ khut sungah Midian uliante Oreb le Zeeb hong pia zo hi. Note tawh teh dingin kote in bang hih zo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah hih bangin kam a pau ciangin ama tunga amauʼ hehna a bei hi. 
Judges8:4 Tua ciangin Gideon le amah tawh a om mi za thumte, Jordan tungin gal kah uh a, a gimpi mahin amaute delh lai uh hi." 
Judges8:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Sukkoth mite kiangah, “Kong thum hi, kei hong zuite tungah anlum pawl khat pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute gim uh a, Midian kumpi Zebah le Zalmunna a delh ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:6 Tua ciangin Sukkoth uliante in, “Na galkapte tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah le Zalmunna na khut sungah om khin ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:7 Tua ciangin Gideon in, “Tua ahihleh pha hi. Topa in Zebah le Zalmunna ka khut sungah hong piak khit ciangin gamlak lingte le lingkungte tawh na sa uh ka kuikek ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:8 Tua lai panin Penuel ah pai to a, amaute tungah zong tua mah bangin a gen hi. Penuel mite in Sukkoth miteʼ dawn mah bangin amah na dawng uh hi." 
Judges8:9 Tua ciangin amah in Penuel mite kiangah, “Lungnuamin kong paikik ciangin hih tausang ka supai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:10 Tu-in Zebah le Zalmunna te, Nisuahna lam mi galkap khempeuh sung pan a om lai teng, mihing tul sawm le tul nga bang bek a pha lai a galkapte uh tawh Karkor ah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau a tawi mi tul za le tul sawm nih si khin hi." 
Judges8:11 Tua ciangin Nobah le Jogbehah nisuahna lam mihonteʼ tot lampi zui-in Gideon pai to-in a galte va bingphawnʼ hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a galte uh galvil om lo hi. 
Judges8:12 Tua ciangin Zebah le Zalmunna tai uh hi. Amah in amaute delhin Midian kumpi nihte Zebah le Zalmunna manin amauʼ galkap khempeuh kithehthangsak hi. 
Judges8:13 Tua ciangin Joashʼ tapa Gideon a galsimna panin Heres kah tohna lam tawnin ciahkik hi. 
Judges8:14 Amah in Sukkoth mi tangval khat manin thu dong hi. Tua pa in ama adingin uliante le upate mihing sawm sagih le sagih a min gelhsak hi. 
Judges8:15 Tua ciangin Sukkoth mite kiangah amah tungin, “Kei tungah hong kisialin, ‘A gim na mite tungah anlum ka piak dingun Zebah le Zalmunna na khut sungah om khin ahi hiam?’ na cih uh Zebah le Zalmunna en un,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:16 Tua ciangin amah in a khuapi upate sam a, gamlak lingte le lingkungte zong la-in, tuate tawh Sukkoth mite a thuhilh hi." 
Judges8:17 Tua ciangin amah in Penuel tausang supai-in tua khua mite a that hi. 
Judges8:18 Tua ciangin amah in Zebah le Zalmunna kiangah, “Tabor ah na thah uh mite koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amaute, nangmah bang uh hi; amaute in kumpipaʼ tapate suun uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:19 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amaute, ka sanggam ka laigui zop pihte ahi uh hi. Topa a nuntak mah bangin, amaute suaktasak hi le-uhcin note kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:20 Tua ciangin amah in a ta upa pen Jether kiangah, “Ding in, amaute that in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tangvalpa in a namsau dok ngam lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah tangval lai ahih manin a lungsim hang nai lo hi." 
Judges8:21 Tua ciangin Zebah le Zalmunna in, “Nang mahmah ding inla, kote hong hih in; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nasep a sem dingin pasal mah kisam hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Gideon dingin Zebah le Zalmunna that a, amauʼ kalaohteʼ ngawng a a om khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate a la hi." 
Judges8:22 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gideon kiangah, “Nang le na tapa le na tupa dongin zong kote hong uk un; bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-teʼ khut sung panin kote nong hon khia hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges8:23 Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note kong uk kei dinga, ka tapa in zong note hong uk lo ding hi. Topa in note hong uk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges8:24 Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute kiangah, “Note tung panin kong nget nop khat om hi. Note in van kinusia na top uh lak panin bilbahte hong pia un,” a ci hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Ishmael mite ahih manin kham bilbah nei uh hi.)" 
Judges8:25 Amaute in dawngin, “Lungkim takin kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in puan phah uh a, mi khempeuh in van kinusia a top uh lak panin bilbahte tua puan tungah a lawn uh hi." 
Judges8:26 Ama nget kham bilbahte a gihna pen kham shekel tul khat le za sagih ahi hi. Midian kumpite in a zat khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate, khainiangte, puan dupsante le a kalaohte uh ngawng kimkot ah a om ngawng-awhte a kisim lo ahi hi." 
Judges8:27 Tua ciangin Gideon in tuate milimin bawlin ama khuapi Ofrah khua ah a koih hi. Israel-te khempeuh in tua lai munah tua milim bia uh a, Gideon le a innkuanpihte adingin thangzak khat a suak hi." 
Judges8:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel miteʼ mai ah Midian-te guallel uh a, amaute kihisak zo nawn lo uh hi. Gideonʼ hun sungin tua gam in kum sawm li sung lungnopna a nei hi." 
Judges8:29 Joashʼ tapa Gideon pai-in ama aituam inn ah a teeng hi. 
Judges8:30 Tu-in Gideon in tapa sawm sagih, ama aʼ mahmah nei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zi tampi nei hi." 
Judges8:31 Shekhem ah a om a zineu in zong tapa khat nei a, amah in a min Abimelek a phuak hi." 
Judges8:32 Tua ciangin Joashʼ tapa Gideon teeksih a, Abiezer miteʼ neihsa Ofrah khua-a om a pa Joashʼ hanah kivui hi." 
Judges8:33 Gideon a sih khit phetin Israel mite kiheikikin Baal-te bia uh a, a pasian dingun Baal-berith a bawl uh hi." 
Judges8:34 Israel mite in, mun khempeuh panin amauʼ galteʼ khut sung pan a hon khia Topa a Pasian uh phawk lo uh hi." 
Judges8:35 Jerubbaal in Israel-te tungah a bawl thuhoihte khempeuh hangin amaute in Jerubbaal innkuante tungah lungdamna bangmah lak lo uh hi. 
Judges9:1 Tu-in Jerubbaalʼ tapa Abimelek, Shekhem a a nuʼ tanaute kiangah pai-in amaute khempeuh kiangah," 
Judges9:2 “Shekhem khuami khempeuh huau-in gen un, ‘Jerubbaalʼ tapa sawm sagihte a vekpi in note hong uk ding le khat in note hong uk ding, note adingin koi hoih zaw ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. Kei pen noteʼ guh noteʼ sa ka hihna zong phawk un,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:3 Tua ciangin a nuʼ tanaute in ama tangin Shekhem mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen uh hi. Tua ciangin amauteʼ lungsim Abimelek zuih ding lamah hoi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah i naihuai ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges9:4 Tua ciangin amaute in Baal-berith inn panin ngun pek sawm sagih Abimelek pia uh a, amah in ama nung a zui, bangmah-a a kimang lo le thu ngaihsun thei lo mite cialna hi." 
Judges9:5 Tua ciangin Ofrah a a paʼ inn ah amah pai-in, Jerubbaalʼ tapa a sanggam mi sawm sagihte suang khat tungah a that hi. Ahih hangin amah bu ahih manin Jerubbaalʼ tapa neu pen Jotham a suakta hi." 
Judges9:6 Tua ciangin Shekhem khua mite khempeuh le Beth-millo khua mite khempeuh hong pai khawm uh a, amaute in Shekhem khua-a tawsaw songpi kiangah Abimelek kumpi a suaksak uh hi." 
Judges9:7 Jotham kiangah tua thu a kigen ciangin amah pai-in Gerizim Mual dawnah dinga, nakpi-in kiko-in amaute kiangah, “No Shekhem mite aw, Pasian in noteʼ thu hong ngaih theih nadingin ka thu hong ngai un." 
Judges9:8 Khat vei, singkungte amauʼ tungah kumpi-in sathau a nilh dingin kuan khia uh a, amaute in oliv kung kiangah, ‘Kote hong uk in,’ a ci uh hi." 
Judges9:9 Ahih hangin oliv kung in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in pasian-te le mite a kipahtawina ahi ka thaunate nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:10 Tua ciangin singkungte in theikung kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:11 Ahih hangin theikung in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in ka khumna le ka gah hoihte nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:12 Tua ciangin singkungte in leenggui kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:13 Ahih hangin leenggui in amaute kiangah, ‘Keimah in pasian-te le mite a lungnuamsak ka leenggahzu nusia-in singkungte a uk dingin hong pai ding ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
Judges9:14 Tua ciangin singkung khempeuh in thangling kung kiangah, ‘Hong pai inla, kote hong uk in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges9:15 Thangling kung in singkungte kiangah, ‘Note tungah kumpi-in lungsim tak tawh sathau hong nilh na hih uh leh, hong pai unla, ka liim ah hong bu un. Ahi zongin ka liim nuai ah nong buk kei uh leh, thangling kung lak panin meikuang hong paikhia henla, Lebanon taamtak kungte kaang tum hen,’ ci hi." 
Judges9:16 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Abimelek kumpi-in na bawl uh ciangin lungsim tak le thumantak mah tawh a gamta na hi uh hiam? Jerubbaal le a innkuan tungah thuman takin gamta-in ama sepna tawh a kituakin amah a bawl mah na hi uh hiam? 
Judges9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa in note ading hong dosakin a lauhuaina sungah a nuntakna pia a, Midian-teʼ khut sung panin note hong hon khia hi." 
Judges9:18 Ahi zongin tu ni-in ka paʼ innkuan lang khat ah note pangin a tapate mi sawm sagih suang khat tungah na that uh a, ka pa in a nasem numei tawh a neih a tapa Abimelek pen noteʼ naihuai ahihna hangin Shekhem khua mite tungah kumpi-in na bawl uh hi." 
Judges9:19 Note in tu ni-in Jerubbaal le a innkuanpihte tungah lungsim tak le thumantak tawh a gamta takpi mah na hih uh leh, Abimelek tungah note lungdam unla, note tungah zong amah lungdam tahen." 
Judges9:20 Ahih hangin tua bang ahih takpi kei leh, Abimelek sung panin meikuang hong paikhia henla, Shekhem le Beth-millo khua mite kaang tum hen. Shekhem khua mite sung pan le Beth-millo khua mite sung panin meikuang hong pai henla, Abimelek kaang tum hen,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:21 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Abimelek a kihtakna hangin Jotham tai khia-in Beer ah pai-in tua lai ah a teeng hi. 
Judges9:22 Abimelek in Israel-te tungah kum thum sung uk hi. 
Judges9:23 Pasian in Abimelek le Shekhem mite kikalah kigalneihna omsak a, Shekhem mite in Abimelek lehdo uh hi." 
Judges9:24 Tua pen, Jerubbaal tapa sawm sagihte a kithahna thu tawh kisai-in, amaute a that a sanggampa uh Abimelek le a sanggamte thah nadingin a hanthawn Shekhem mite tungah thukkikna hong tun theih nadingin a kibawl mahmah ahi hi." 
Judges9:25 Tua hi a, Shekhem mite in Abimelek a pangsim dingin mual dawnah mi koih uh a, amaute in tua lam a tawn mi khempeuhteʼ na na sut uh hi; hih thu Abimelek kiangah kigen hi." 
Judges9:26 Tua ciangin Ebedʼ tapa Gaal a tanaute tawh Shekhem ah hong kikhiin uh hi. Shekhem mite in amah muang uh hi. 
Judges9:27 Amaute lo ah kuanin a leenggui uh panin leenggah khawmin cil uh a, pawi khamin amauteʼ pasianʼ inn ah pai uh a, an ne tui dawnin omin Abimelek zahko uh hi." 
Judges9:28 Tua ciangin Ebedʼ tapa Gaal in, “Abimelek, kua hi a, ama na i sepsak dingin ei Shekhem mite kua ihi hiam? Jerubbaalʼ tapa le ama ulian Zebul in Shekhem miteʼ pulepa Hamorʼ na sem uh hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ama na sem ding ihi hiam?" 
Judges9:29 Hih mite keima khutnuai hileh! Abimelek kakhiin khia ding hi. Abimelek kiangah, ‘Na galkap behlap inla hong kuan khia in,’ ka ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:30 Tua khuapi a uk Zebul in Ebed tapa Gaalʼ kammalte a zak ciangin heh mahmah hi. 
Judges9:31 Amah in Arumah khua-a om Abimelek kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “En in, Ebed tapa Gaal le a tanaute Shekhem ah hong pai-in nang langpangin tua khuapi sosuah hi." 
Judges9:32 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na ompih mite tawh zanin pai unla, gamlak ah pangsim un." 
Judges9:33 Tua ciangin zingsang ni a suah phetin tho baih unla, khuapi sim gawp un. A ompih mite tawh nang a do dingin hong kuan khiat ciangun ahi thei bangin amaute tungah na bawl ding uh hi,” cisak hi." 
Judges9:34 Tua ciangin Abimelek le amah tawh a om mite khempeuh zanin tho-in pawl li kisuahin Shekhem a sim dingin pangsim uh hi. 
Judges9:35 Tua ciangin Ebed tapa Gaal pai khia-in khuapi kulh kongpi lutna ah dinga, Abimelek le amah tawh a om mite zong a pansimna panun ding to uh hi." 
Judges9:36 Gaal in tua mite a muh ciangin amah in Zebul kiangah, “En in, mual dawn panin mite hong pai suk!” a ci hi. Zebul in ama kiangah, “Mual liimte mi bangin a mu na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:37 Gaal pau kikin, “En in, a gam laizang panin mite hong pai suk a, Aisanteʼ Tawsaw lam panin pawl khat hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:38 Tua ciangin Zebul in ama kiangah, “Tu-in na kam hanna koi ah om ahi hiam? ‘Ama na i sep dingin Abimelek kua ahi hiam?’ a ci pa hi lo na hi hiam? Hih mite, na simmawhte hi lo ahi hiam? Tu-in paikhia inla amaute tawh kido in,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:39 Tua ciangin Shekhem miteʼ mai ah Gaal kuan khia-in Abimelek tawh kido hi. 
Judges9:40 Abimelek in Gaal delh a, ama mai ah Gaal a tai hi. Kulh kongpi lutna ciang dong nangawn ah mi tampi liamin tuk hi." 
Judges9:41 Tua ciangin Arumah ah Abimelek a teeng hi. Zebul in Gaal le a tanaute hawl khia a, amaute Shekhem ah teeng thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Judges9:42 A zing ciangin gamlak ah Shekhem mite paikhia uh hi. Hih thu Abimelek kiangah kigen hi. 
Judges9:43 Amah in a mite la-in pawl thum suahin gamlak ah pangsim uh hi. Tua ciangin amah khuadakin khuapi panin mite a kuan khia mu a, amaute do-in kipan a, amaute that hi." 
Judges9:44 Abimelek le amah tawh a om a pawlte in thakhatin mainawt uh a, ama pawldang nihte in gamlak a om mite delhin a thah sungin khuapi kulh lutna ah amaute na ding uh hi." 
Judges9:45 Abimelek in sun tawntung tua khuapi sim a, tua khuapi la-in a sunga om mite that a, tua khuapi phiatin ci a vawh hi." 
Judges9:46 Shekhem Tausang mite khempeuh in tua thu a zak uh ciangin Elberithʼ inn munmuanhuai ah lut uh hi. 
Judges9:47 Shekhem Tausang mite khempeuh kikaikhawm uh hi, ci-in Abimelek kiangah kigen hi." 
Judges9:48 Tua ciangin amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tawh Zalmon Mual ah Abimelek kuan to hi. Abimelek in a khutin hei khat la-in selkeu lom khat sat a, tuate la to-in a liangko tungah koih hi. Tua ciangin amah tawh a om mite kiangah, “Keiʼ hih nong muh sa bangun keiʼ hih bangbangin manlangin hih un,” a ci hi." 
Judges9:49 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in amau ading ciat selkeu tomin Abimelek zui-in mun muanhuai sim nadingin koih uh a, amaute in mei tawh mun muanhuai halin Shekhem Tausang mite, numei le pasal mi tul khat bang a si hi." 
Judges9:50 Tua ciangin Thebez ah Abimelek pai a, Thebez langpangin giahphual sat a, tua khua a la hi." 
Judges9:51 Ahih hangin tua khuapi sungah tausang muanhuai om a, tua khua numei le pasal, tua khuami khempeuh tua tausang ah tai-in kikhaknelh uh a, tausang khum ah amaute om uh hi." 
Judges9:52 Tua ciangin Abimelek zong tausang ah pai-in sim a, mei tawh a hal dingin tausang kongkhak a naih hi." 
Judges9:53 Numei khat in an gawina suangpek tungnung, Abimelekʼ lu tungah lawnin a luguh deng kham hi."
