Judges9:54 Tua ciangin amah in ama hiam a tawisak tangvalpa nawh sapin ama kiangah, “Na namsau dok inla kei hong that in. Tua hikeileh mite in, ‘Numei khat in amah that hi,’ hong ci kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi. A tangvalpa in amah sun letin amah a si ta hi." 
Judges9:55 Israel mite in Abimelek a sihna a muh uh ciangin amauʼ inn ciatah a ciah uh hi. 
Judges9:56 Ama sanggam sawm sagihte thatin a pa tungah a khialhna hangin tua bangin Pasian in Abimelekʼ khialhna a thuk ahi hi. 
Judges9:57 Pasian in Shekhem mite khempeuhʼ gitlohna hangin Jerubbaalʼ tapa Jothamʼ samsiatna bangin amauʼ tungah gimna a tungsak hi. 
Judges10:1 Abimelek khit ciangin Israel-te a hon khia dingin Issakhar minam Dodoʼ tapa Puah, Puahʼ tapa Tola hong khang a, Efraim mual tung gam Shamir ah a teeng hi." 
Judges10:2 Amah in Israel-te kum sawm nih le kum thum sung thu khen hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, Shamir ah kivui hi." 
Judges10:3 Ama khit ciangin Israel-te kum sawm nih le kum nih sung thu a khen Gilead mi Jair hong khang hi. 
Judges10:4 Amah in la sawm thum tungah a tuang tapa sawm thum a nei hi. Amaute in Gilead gam sunga om tu dongin Havvoth jair a kici khuapi sawm thum nei uh hi. 
Judges10:5 Tua ciangin Jair si-in Kamon ah kivui hi. 
Judges10:6 Tua ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah Israel mite a sia gamtakik uh a, Syria miteʼ pasian-te, Sidon miteʼ pasian-te, Moab miteʼ pasian-te, Ammon miteʼ pasian-te, Filistia miteʼ pasian-te le Baal-te le Ashtaroth bia uh a, amaute in Topa nusia-in ama na sem lo uh hi." 
Judges10:7 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sin so a, amah in Filistia mite tung le Ammon mite tungah amaute pia a," 
Judges10:8 amaute in Israel mite tua kum su gawpin nengniam uh hi. Amaute in Jordan gal khat Gilead gam sunga om Amor miteʼ leitang ah a om Israel mite khempeuh kum sawm le kum giat sung nengniam uh hi. 
Judges10:9 Judah, Benjamin le Efraim minamte a sim dingin Ammon mite Jordan hong gal kah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te nakpi takin lungkham uh hi." 
Judges10:10 Tua ciangin Topa tungah Israel-te kiko uh a, “Nang tungah kong khial khin uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kote in ka Pasian uh nusia-in Baal-te ka bia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges10:11 Topa in Israel mite kiangah, “Egypt-te le Amor mite, Ammon mite le Filistia mite kiang panin hong hon khia hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Judges10:12 Sidon mite, Amalek mite le Maon mite in note hong nengniam uh hi. Kei tungah note nong kiko uh a, keimah in amauteʼ khut sung panin note kong hon khia hi." 
Judges10:13 Tua hi napi-in note in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte na bia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin note kong hon khia nawn kei ding hi. 
Judges10:14 Pai unla noteʼ teel pasian-te tungah kiko un. Na lungkham hunun amaute kihonkhiasak un,” a ci hi." 
Judges10:15 Ahi zongin Israel mite in Topa tungah, “Ka khial khin uh hi. Hoih na sak bangin ko tungah hong hih in. Tu ni-in hong hon khia in, kong thum uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges10:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in amauʼ lak panin gamdang pasian-te koih khia-in Topa a bia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ gentheihna ah amah a dah hi. 
Judges10:17 Tua ciangin Ammon mite galhiam tawi dingin kisam uh a, Gilead ah giahphual sat uh hi. Israel mite zong kikaikhawmin Gilead gam sung Mizpah ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
Judges10:18 Tua ciangin Israel mihonte le makaite khatlekhat in, “Ammon mite do dinga a kipan ngam kua om ihi hiam? A kipan ngam mipa, Gilead gam a teeng mite khempeuh tungah lutang hi ding hi,” a kici uh hi." 
Judges11:1 Tu-in Gilead khuami Jefthah, a thahat galhang khat hi a, ahih hangin amah pen numeipaktat khat i tapa ahi hi. Jefthahʼ pa Gilead hi a," 
Judges11:2 Gileadʼ zi in zong amah tawh tapa dang nei hi. A tapate a khan ciangun amaute in Jefthah not khia-in ama kiangah, “Ka pa uh inn sungah gamh na luah kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen numei dang tawh zawlta na hi lel hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:3 Tua ciangin a sanggamte kiang panin Jefthah tai-in Tob gam sungah teeng a, bangmah a man lo mite in Jefthah pawmin amah tawh mite su gawpin pai kawikawi uh hi." 
Judges11:4 Tawl khat khit ciangin Ammon mite in Israel-te sim uh hi. 
Judges11:5 Ammon mite in Israel-te a sim ciangin Tob gam panin Jefthah a la dingin Gilead upate va pai uh hi. 
Judges11:6 Amaute in Jefthah kiangah, “Ammon mite i do theih nadingin hong pai inla koteʼ makai hong hi in,” va ci uh hi." 
Judges11:7 Ahih hangin Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in kei hong mudahin ka paʼ inn pan hong hawl khia hi lo na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin thuhaksa na tuah uh ciangin kei kiangah hong pai na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi." 
Judges11:8 Tua ciangin Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “Kote tawh nang hong pai-in Ammon mite do-in Gilead gam sunga teeng mi khempeuh tungah lutang nong hih theih nadingin nangʼ lamah hong kihei ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:9 Jefthah in Gilead upate kiangah, “Note in Ammon mite a do dingin inn ah kei nong ciahpih uh a, kei tungah Topa in amaute hong piak leh kei pen noteʼ lutang ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:10 Gilead upate in Jefthah kiangah, “ Topa pen eiteʼ kikalah teci hi ding hi. Na cih bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Gilead upate tawh Jefthah pai a, mite in amauʼ tungah lutang le makai-in amah koih uh hi. Jefthah in hih thute khempeuh Mizpah khua sung Topaʼ mai ah a gen ahi hi." 
Judges11:12 Tua ciangin Jefthah in Ammon miteʼ kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Ka gam a sim dingin kei kiangah nong pai nadingin keiʼ tungah bang thu om ahi hiam?” cisak hi." 
Judges11:13 Ammon miteʼ kumpipa in Jefthahʼ kamtaite dawng a, “Egypt panin Israel-te hong pai lai-in Arnon panin Jabbok le Jordan ciang ka gam hong laksak hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in thu damin hong piakik in,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:14 Jefthah in Ammon miteʼ kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawlkikin 
Judges11:15 ama kiangah, “Jefthah in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-te in Moab leitang hitaleh Ammon miteʼ leitang hitaleh la lo hi." 
Judges11:16 Egypt panin Israel-te hong pai toh lai-in gamlak tawnin San Tuipi ah hong pai-in Kadesh hong tung uh hi. 
Judges11:17 Israel-te in Edom kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawl a, ‘Kong thum uh hi; na gam sung hong nawksak in,’ cisak uh hi. Ahih hangin Edom kumpipa in a thu ngai lo hi. Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa kiangah zong sawl uh a, ahih hangin amah thukim lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kadesh ah Israel-te om phot uh hi." 
Judges11:18 Tua ciangin sehnel gam tawnin amaute khualzin uh a, Edom gam le Moab gam kimkotin pai-in Moab gam nisuahna lam pangah tung uh a, Arnon gun gal khat ah phual sat uh hi. Ahih hangin Moab gam sungah amaute lut lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Arnon gun pen Moab gamgi ahi hi." 
Judges11:19 Tua ciangin Israel-te in Heshbon khua ah a om Amor miteʼ kumpi Sihon kiangah kamtaite sawl uh hi. Israel-te in ama kiangah, ‘Kong thum uh hi; ka gam uh a zuan dingin na gam hong nawksak in,’ ci uh hi." 
Judges11:20 Ahih hangin Sihon in ama gam a nawk dingin Israel-te muang lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Sihon in a mite khempeuh kaikhawmin Jahaz ah giahphual sat a, Israel-te na sim hi." 
Judges11:21 Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian in Sihon le a mite khempeuh Israel-teʼ khut sungah pia a, amaute in zo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gam sunga teeng Amor miteʼ leitang khempeuh Israel-te in luah uh hi." 
Judges11:22 Amaute in Arnon gun panin Jabbok lui ciang le sehnel gam panin Jordan gun ciang, Amor miteʼ gam khempeuh a luah uh hi." 
Judges11:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian in ama mi Israel-teʼ mai panin Amor mite paai khia hi. Tu-in nangmah in luahkik ding sawm na hi hiam?" 
Judges11:24 Na pasian Khemosh in na neih dinga hong piakte kem peuh in. Kote ahihleh Topa ka Pasian un koteʼ mai ah a suan khiatte ka tang ding uh hi. 
Judges11:25 Tu-in nang pen Moab kumpipa, Zipporʼ tapa Balak sangin gina zaw na hi hiam? Amah in Israel-te to ngei a, amaute do ngei ahi hiam?" 
Judges11:26 Heshbon le a khuaneute, Aroer le a khuaneute le Arnon gun panga om khuapite khempeuh sungah Israel-te a ten kum za thum hunsung tengin bang hangin lakik lo na hi hiam?" 
Judges11:27 Tua ahih ciangin nang tungah ka khial kei a, kei nong simna ah kei tungah nang nong khial hi. Topa, Thukhen pa in Israel mite le Ammon mite kikalah tu ni-in thu khen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:28 Ahih hangin Ammon kumpipa in ama kiangah thu a puak Jefthahʼ thu a don kei hi. 
Judges11:29 Tua ciangin Jefthahʼ tungah Topaʼ kha hong tunga, amah in Gilead le Manasseh nawkin Gilead gam Mizpah ah paisuak a, Gilead gam Mizpah panin Ammon mite kiangah paisuak lai hi." 
Judges11:30 Jefthah in Topa tungah thuciamna bawlin, “Ka khut sungah Ammon mite nong piak leh" 
Judges11:31 Ammon mite kiang panin gualzo-in ka ciah ciangin keimah a dawn dingin ka inn sung pan a hong pai peuhpeuh Topa aʼ hi dinga, meihal biak nadingin kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:32 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a sim dingin Ammon mite kiangah Jefthah gal kah a, Topa in ama khut sungah amaute a pia hi." 
Judges11:33 Amah in Aroer panin Minnith kiimnai ciang dong khuapi sawm nih le Abel-keramim ciang dong mi tampi tak thatin a vat gawp hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite mai ah Ammon mite guallel uh hi. 
Judges11:34 Tua ciangin Mizpah a ama inn ah Jefthah hong ciah hi. Amah a dawn dingin a tanu khuangneute tawh a laam sa-in hong paikhia hi. Tua nu pen ama ta khat neihsun hi a, amah sim loh tapa ahi a, tanu ahi zongin a dang nei lo hi." 
Judges11:35 Amah in a tanu a muh ciangin a puan bal kekin, “Ala, ka tanu! Kei nong niamkoih mahmah hi. Kei adingin lungkhamna lianpi nong suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa tungah thu ka ciam khin a, ka thuciamna ka dokkik thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:36 Tua ciangin a tanu in ama kiangah, “Ka pa aw, Topa tungah thu ciam khin na hih leh, na thuciamna tawh kizui-in keiʼ tungah hong bawl in. Tu-in Topa in na gal Ammon mite tungah nang ading hong thuksak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:37 Tua ciangin amah in a pa kiangah, “Kong nget nop thu khat om hi. Kei pai-in mual tungah vak kawikawi-in kei le ka lawmte in nungak-in ka sih nading hangin ka thum theih nadingun kha nih sung kei guak hong omsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges11:38 Amah in, “Pai ta in,” a ci hi. Amah in kha nih sung a tanu pai khiasak hi. Tua ciangin amah le a lawmte pai khia-in nungakin a sih nading hangin mualte tungah kapin a thum uh hi." 
Judges11:39 Kha nih a cin ciangin a pa kiangah amah ciahkik a, amah in ama bawl sa a thuciamna bangin a tanu tungah hih hi. Tua nu pen pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo, nungakin khansih hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te sungah ngeina khat suak a," 
Judges11:40 Israel numeite kum khatin ni li sung kum simin Gilead mi Jefthahʼ tanu hangin a thum dingin paikhia uh hi. 
Judges12:1 Efraim mite galhiam tawi dingin kisam uh a, amaute Zafon gun kantanin gal kah uh a, Jefthah kiangah, “Bang hangin Ammon mite a sim dingin gal kahin, nang tawh a kuan khawm dingin kote hong zawn lo na hi hiam? Na inn tawh nang kong halnelh ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges12:2 Tua ciangin Jefthah in amaute kiangah, “Kei le ka mite in Ammon mite tawh buaina lianpi khat ka nei ngei uh hi. Note kong sap hangin amauʼ khut sung panin kei nong hon khia kei uh hi." 
Judges12:3 Note in kei nong hotkhiat loh ding uh ka theih ciangin kei mahmah hanciam tawmin Ammon mite a sim dingin ka gal kah a, Topa in keiʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin tu ni-in kei a hong sim dingin hong kuan na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges12:4 Tua ciangin Jefthah in Gilead mite khempeuh khawmin Efraim mite tawh kido uh hi. Gilead mite in Efraim mite vat gawp uh hi. (Efraim mite in, “No Gilead mite pen Efraim-te le Manasseh-te sung panin Efraim mite a taisante na hi uh hi,” ci ngei uh hi.)" 
Judges12:5 Gilead mite in Efraim mite tung panin Jordan ngahmunte la uh hi. Efraim galtaite khat peuhpeuh in, “Hong galkahsak in,” a cih ciangin Gilead mite in ama kiangah, “Efraim mi na hi hiam?” ci uh hi. Amah in, “Hi kei ing,” a cih ciangin" 
Judges12:6 amaute in ama kiangah, “Tua ahihleh Shibboleth ci in,” ci uh a, tua ciangin amah in, “Sibboleth,” ci hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a manin ci thei lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah manin Jordan ngahmunte ah that uh hi. Tua tungin Efraim mi tul sawm li le tul nih tuk hi." 
Judges12:7 Jefthah in Israel mite kum guk sung thu khen hi. Tua ciangin Gilead mi Jefthah si a, Gilead gam ama khuapi sungah kivui hi." 
Judges12:8 Ama nungah Bethlehem khuami Ibzan in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges12:9 Amah in tapa sawm thum nei hi. Ama beh pualam mite tungah tanu sawm thum mo kha a, a pualam panin a tapate adingin tanu sawm thum la hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sagih sung thu khen hi." 
Judges12:10 Tua ciangin Ibzan si a, Bethlehem ah kivui hi." 
Judges12:11 Ama nungah Zebulun mi Elon in Israel-te kum sawm sung thu khen hi. 
Judges12:12 Tua ciangin Zebulun mi Elon si a, Zebulun gam Aijalon ah kivui hi." 
Judges12:13 Ama nungah Pirathon mi Hillelʼ tapa Abdon in Israel-te thu khen hi. 
Judges12:14 Amah in la sawm sagihte tungah a tuang tapa sawm li le tupa sawm thum nei hi. Amah in Israel-te kum giat sung thu khen hi. 
Judges12:15 Tua ciangin Pirathon mi Hillelʼ tapa Abdon si a, Amalek miteʼ mual tung gam Efraim leitang tung, Pirathon ah kivui hi." 
Judges13:1 Topaʼ muhna ah Israel mite a sia gamtakik uh a, Topa in Filistia miteʼ khut sungah kum sawm li sung amaute a pia hi." 
Judges13:2 Dan minam sung panin Zorah khuami Manoah min nei mi khat om hi. Ama zi tasel ahih manin ta nei lo hi. 
Judges13:3 Topaʼ vantungmi tua numei kiangah kilangin ama kiangah, “En in, na tasel a, ta na nei kei hi. Ahi zongin tu-in gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi." 
Judges13:4 Tua ahih ciangin kidawm inla, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin ne loin, a nin bangmah ne kei in." 
Judges13:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi. Ama lu tungah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang pen a suah a kipanin Pasianʼ tungah Nazir mi hi dinga, amah in Filistia miteʼ khut sung panin Israel-te hotkhiat ding kipan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:6 Tua ciangin tua nu pai-in a pasalʼ kiangah gen a, “Pasianʼ mi khat ka kiangah hong pai a, ama mel pen Pasianʼ vantungmi mel tawh kibangin dipkuathuai mahmah hi. Koi panin hong pai cih amah ka dong kei a, amah in ama min hong gen lo hi." 
Judges13:7 Ahih hangin amah in kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang gai-in tapa khat na nei ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin ne kei inla, a nin bangmah ne kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang pen a suah a kipan a sih dong Pasianʼ tungah Nazir mi hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:8 Tua ciangin Manoah in Topa kunh a, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; na hong sawl Pasianʼ mipa koʼ kiangah hong paisakkik inla, a hong suak ding naupang ka bawl nading uh hong hilhsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:9 Pasian in Manoahʼ aw ngai-in lo lai ah tua nu a tut laitakin Pasianʼ vantungmi ama kiangah hong pai hi. Ahih hangin a pasal Manoah amah tawh om lo hi. 
Judges13:10 Tua ciangin tua nu nawhsa-in tai-in a pasal kiangah, “En in, zan hal a kei kiangah hong pai mipa ka kiangah hong kilangkik hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:11 Tua ciangin Manoah dingin a zi zui a, mipa kiangah pai-in, “Hih nu kiangah thugen pa nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:12 Tua ciangin Manoah in, “Na thugente a manin hong tun ciangin naupangʼ nuntak zia ding bang hi a, amah in bang hih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:13 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in Manoahʼ kiangah, “Numeiʼ kiangah ka gente khempeuh na kidawm hen." 
Judges13:14 Amah in leenggui pan a piang peuhmah ne thei lo dinga, leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin ne thei loin, a nin na khat peuhpeuh ne thei lo ding hi; amah ka thupiak khempeuh tang hen,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:15 Manoah in Topaʼ vantungmi kiangah, “Kong thum hi; tawl khat khawl inla, nang adingin keel no khat hong bawlsak nung,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:16 Topaʼ vantungmi in Manoah kiangah, “Nong khawlsak zongin na an ka ne kei ding hi. Ahih hangin meihal biak nading a baih sa-in na bawl leh Topa tungah pia in,” a ci hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh Manoah in amah Topaʼ vantungmi ahih lam thei lo hi.)" 
Judges13:17 Manoah in Topaʼ vantungmi kiangah, “Na thugente a manin hong tun ciangin nang kong pahtawi theih nadingun, na min bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:18 Topaʼ vantungmi in ama kiangah, “Hih thu a lamdang hi, ci-in thei napi-in bang hangin ka min hong dong na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges13:19 Tua ahih ciangin Manoah in an-a biakna tawh a keel no la-in nalamdang a bawl Topa adingin suang tungah a pia hi. 
Judges13:20 Biakna tau panin vantung lamah meikuang a pai toh ciangin, Manoah le a zi in a et laitakun biakna tau meikuang sungah Topaʼ vantungmi kah to hi. Tua ciangin amaute leilak ah a bok uh hi." 
Judges13:21 Manoah le a ziʼ tungah Topaʼ vantungmi kilang nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin Manoah in amah Topaʼ vantungmi ahih lam thei hi. 
Judges13:22 Manoah in a zi kiangah, “Pasian mu khin ihih manin i si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:23 Ahih hangin a zi in ama kiangah, “ Topa in eite thah hong sawm hileh, i meihal biakna le an tawh i biakna hong sang lo dinga, hih nate khempeuh hong lak loin, hih bang nate zong eiteʼ tungah hong pulak lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges13:24 Tua numei in tapa khat nei-in a min Samson a phuak hi. Naupang khangto a, Topa in thupha a pia hi." 
Judges13:25 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kha in Zorah le Eshtaol kikal Mahanehdan ah Samson hanthot ding a kipan hi. 
Judges14:1 Khat vei Timnah ah Samson va pai suk a, Timnah ah Filistia nungak khat mu hi." 
Judges14:2 Tua ciangin amah ciah to-in a nu le a pa kiangah, “Filistia nungak khat Timnah ah ka mu hi. Ka zi dingin va la un,” a ci hi." 
Judges14:3 Ahih hangin a nu le a pa in ama kiangah, “Nang pai-in dawibia Filistia mite kiang panin zi na lak nadingin na tanauteʼ lak ahi a, i mipih khempeuh lakah ahi zongin numei khat beek om lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:4 A nu le a pa in hih thu pen Topaʼ kiang pan ahih lam thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Filistia mite tungah paulap ding a zong ahi hi. Tua hun laitakin Filistia mite in Israel-te uk uh hi. 
Judges14:5 Tua ciangin a nu le a pa tawh Timnah ah Samson pai suk a, Timnah leenggui lote ah amah tung hi. Tua lai ah humpinelkai khanglai khat in amah hawk san hi." 
Judges14:6 Tua ciangin ama tungah Topaʼ kha khauh takin hong tunga, mi khat in keel no khat a bal gawp bangin amah in a khut guak tawh humpinelkai a balzan hi. Ahih hangin tua bangin ahihna thu a nu tung ahi a, a pa tungah ahi zongin gen lo hi." 
Judges14:7 Tua ciangin amah pai sukin a numei tawh kiho hi. Tua nu in Samson lungkimsak mahmah hi. 
Judges14:8 Tawl khat khit ciangin tua nu a la dingin paikik hi. Humpinelkai luanghawm a en dingin amah lam pialin a va et leh humpinelkai luanghawm sungah khuai hon khat le khuaizu na om hi. 
Judges14:9 Amah in a khut tawh tuate sawkin paisuak a, a pai kawmin a ne hi. Amah a nu le a pa kiangah tungin tuate pawl khat pia a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Ahih hangin humpinelkai luanghawm sung panin tua khuaizu a lakna thu gen lo hi." 
Judges14:10 Tua ciangin numei kiangah a pa pai suk a, Samson in zong tua lai ah pawi khat a kham hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tangvalteʼ hih ngei ahi hi." 
Judges14:11 Mite in amah a muh uh ciangin amah a uap dingin tangval sawm thum hong paipih uh hi. 
Judges14:12 Tua ciangin Samson in amaute kiangah, “Noteʼ mai ah thuhaksa khat hong gen ning. Hih pawi ni sagih sungin a thu mu khia-in bang hiam cih nong gen theih uh leh saihadial puan silh sawm thum le pawipuan silh sawm thum note kong pia ding hi." 
Judges14:13 Ahih hangin bang hiam cih nong gen theih kei uh leh saihadial puan silh sawm thum le pawipuan silh sawm thum kei nong pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Na thuhaksa hong gen in, za dih ni,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:14 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “A ne pa sung panin nek ding pawl khat hong piang a, a thahatpa sung panin a khum pawl khat hong piang hi,” a ci hi. Ni thum sungin tua thuhaksa bang hiam cih gen thei lo uh hi." 
Judges14:15 A ni li ni-in amaute in Samsonʼ zi kiangah, “A thuhaksa bang hiam cih hong gen nadingin na pasal zol in. Tua hikeileh nang le na pa, na inn uh tawh kong hal ding uh hi. Kote a hong zawngsak dingin hih lai ah hong sam na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges14:16 Tua ciangin Samsonʼ zi ama mai ah kapin, “Kei nong mudah hi, kei nong it kei hi. Ka gam mite tungah thuhaksa na gen a, bang hiam cih keiʼ tungah nong gen kei hi,” a ci hi. Amah in numei kiangah, “En in, ka nu kiang hitaleh ka pa kiang hitaleh ah ka gen kei hi. Nang kiangah hong gen tuan ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges14:17 A pawi ni sagih hun sungteng ama mai ah tua nu kap niloh hi. A ni sagih ni-in Samson in a lawmnu kiangah gen ta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nakpi takin kunh niloh hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in a gam mite kiangah tua thuhaksa gen hi. 
Judges14:18 Tua khuapi mite in a ni sagih ni, ni a tum ma-in ama kiangah gen uh a, “Khuaizu sangin bang khum zaw a, humpinelkai sangin bang hat zaw ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Ka bawngla tawh lo kho khawm lo hi le-uhcin, ka thuhaksa na thei kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges14:19 Tua ciangin Samsonʼ tungah Topaʼ kha khauh takin hong tunga, Ashkelon ah amah pai sukin tua khua mite sawm thum that a, amauteʼ nate la-in a thuhaksa a genthei mite tungah a pawi puante a pia hi. A hehsa-in a paʼ inn ah amaute ciah san hi." 
Judges14:20 Tua ahih manin Samsonʼ zi pen a mo liah paʼ zi dingin na kipia hi. 
Judges15:1 Tawl khat khit, mangbuh lak hunin a zi kiangah a hawh dingin keel no khat tawh Samson a pai hi. Amah in, “Inndei sung ka zi kiangah ka lum ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in amah lutsak lo hi." 
Judges15:2 A sungpa in, “Amah mudah taktak hi ni teh, ci-in ngaihsun ka hih manin na lawmpaʼ zi dingin ka pia hi. A naunu amah sangin hoih zaw hi lo ahi hiam? A u tangin amah na teenpih nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:3 Samson in, “Tutungin amau tungah siatna ka bawlna ah Filistia mite tawh kisai-in ka mawh kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:4 Tua ciangin Samson pai-in ngia za thum manin meilah zong a la hi. Amah in a ngia meite khatlekhat kimatsakin a meite kikalah meilah khat ciat hencip hi. 
Judges15:5 A mei lahte a kuansak khit ciangin Filistia miteʼ ankung ding laite lakah ngiate paisak a, anphualte le ankung ding laite le oliv lote kaang tum hi." 
Judges15:6 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in, “Kua in hih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Timnah miteʼ makpa Samson in hih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a sungpa in a zi laksakin a lawmpa tungah piaksak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong pai to-in tua nu le a pa mei tawh a hallum uh hi." 
Judges15:7 Samson in amaute kiangah, “Hih pen, noteʼ hih ahihleh, ka kiciam hi. Note kong thuk dinga, tua khit ciangin ka khawl ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:8 Amah in amaute dawm loin tampi that a, tua ciangin pai sukin Etam suanghawm sungah a om hi." 
Judges15:9 Tua ciangin Filistia mite pai to-in Judah gamah giahphual sat uh a, Lehi sim uh hi." 
Judges15:10 Judah mite in, “Bang hangin kote simin hong pai to na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Samson a hen ding le ko tungah amah in hong hih bangin ama tungah a hih dingin kong pai to uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges15:11 Tua ciangin Judah mite mihing tul thum Etam suanghawm ah pai sukin Samson kiangah, “Filistia mite, eite a hong ukte ahih lam thei lo na hi hiam? Koteʼ tungah nangʼ hong bawl bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Amaute in kei tungah hong bawl bangin amaute tungah ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:12 Tua ciangin amaute in Samson kiangah, “Filistia miteʼ khut sungah nang kong piak theih nadingun nangmah a hen dingin kong pai suk uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Samson in amaute kiangah, “Note mahmah in nong thah loh nading uh kei tungah hong kiciam un,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:13 Amaute in Samson kiangah, “Kong that kei ding uh hi. Nang hong henin amauteʼ khut sungah kong pia bek ding uh a, nang kong that het kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khauhual thak nih tawh amah hen uh a, tua suanghawm sung panin amah paikhiatpih to uh hi." 
Judges15:14 Lehi ah Samson a tun ciangin amah a dawn dingin Filistia mite hong pai-in awng uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tungah Topaʼ kha khauh takin hong tunga, a khut tunga om khauhualte pen mei in a kat anthul khau tawh kibang a, amah a kikhihnate a khut panin tolh khia hi." 
Judges15:15 Tua ciangin amah in la khaguh thak khat mu a, a khut zanin tua khaguh la-in tua tawh mihing tul khat a that hi." 
Judges15:16 Tua ciangin Samson in, “La khaguh khat tawh a lomlomin, la khaguh khat tawh mihing tul khat ka that hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges15:17 Tua a thugen a man khit ciangin a la khaguh paai khia hi; tua mun pen Ramathlehi kici hi. 
Judges15:18 Tua ciangin amah dangtak mahmah ahih manin Topa samin, “Na nasem paʼ tha tawh hih bang suahtakna lian nong pia zo hi. Tu-in dangtakin kei si-in dawibia miteʼ khut sungah puk ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges15:19 Tua ciangin Pasian in Lehi a om komdep khat hong a, tua sung panin tui hong phul hi. Amah in tua tui a dawn ciangin a tha hong dimkikin thakhauhkik hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun min En-hakkore kici a, tu hun dongin Lehi ah tua tuikhuk om lai hi." 
Judges15:20 Amah in Filistia miteʼ uk hunsung Israel-te kum sawm nih sung thu a khen hi. 
Judges16:1 Ni khat, Gaza khua ah Samson pai a, tua lai ah numei paktat khat mu-in tua nu kiangah a giak dingin a pai hi." 
Judges16:2 Gaza mite kiangah, “Samson hong pai,” ci-in kigen a, amaute in tua khua umcihin khuapi kulh kongpi ah zan tawntung amah pangsim uh hi. Amaute zan tawntung daitakin om uh a, “Zingsang khuavak mateng ngak ni; tua ciangin amah that ni,” ci uh hi." 
Judges16:3 Ahih hangin zankim ciang dong Samson lum a, zankim ciangin tho-in khuapi kulh kongpi kongkhakte le a khuam nihte lenin a zawlte le a na khempeuh bot to a, a liangko tungah tuate pua-in Hebron mai ah a om mual dawnah tuate a tunpih hi." 
Judges16:4 Tua khit ciangin Samson in Sorek kuamah Delilah a kici numei khat ngai hi. 
Judges16:5 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante tua nu kiangah hong pai-in, “Amah hong zol inla, ama hatna koi ah om hiam cihna le amah i nuaisiah zawh nadingin amah i hen theih nading, amah i zawh theih nading zia hong thei in. Na theih zawh leh ngun pek tul le za khat ciat nang kong pia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:6 Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Na hatna lian koi ah om a, mi khatpeuh in nang hong zawh theih nadingin hong bangci kihen ding cihna thu, nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:7 Samson in tua nu kiangah, “Amaute in a keu nai lo thalkhau thak sagih tawh hong hen leh ka tha nem dinga, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:8 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante in tua nu kiangah a keu nai lo thalkhau sagih hong paipih uh a, tua nu in tua khaute tawh amah a hen hi." 
Judges16:9 Tua laitakin tua nu in inn dei sungah mi busak hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in ama kiangah, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin, patkhaute in mei a sukkhak ciangin a kitah bangin amah in thalkhaute bot sat ziau hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama thahatna thusim kithei zo lo hi." 
Judges16:10 Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “En in, kei nong simmawh a, zuau thu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih nong hehpihna-in hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:11 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Amaute in a kizang nai lo khauhual thakte tawh kei hong hen leh ka tha nem dinga, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:12 Tua ahih ciangin Delilah in khauhual thakte la-in tuate tawh amah hen a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A busim mite inn dei sung nungah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Samson in mimkhau bangin khauhualte bot sat ziau hi." 
Judges16:13 Tua ciangin Delilah in Samson kiangah, “Tu dong kei nong simmawh a, zuau thu nong gen hi. Nang hong bangci kihen theih ding cih hong gen in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Ka lu tunga ka sam lom sagihte mimkhau tawh gan khawmin ciampek tawh khen bikbek lecin ka tha nem dinga, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah a ihmut laitakin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte la-in siamin a gan hi. Amah in ciampek tawh khen bikbek a, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a ihmutna pan amah khanglo-in a ciampek, a siambu le a siam a kai khia hi." 
Judges16:15 Tua ciangin numei in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na lungsim kei tawh a om lopi, ‘Nang kong it hi,’ ci thei na hi hiam? Hih thum vei dong kei nong simmawh a, na thahatna a omna mun nong gen kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:16 Nisimin nakpi takin a kutkut ciangin, sihna dong dingin Samson lunggim hi." 
Judges16:17 Amah in tua nu kiangah a lungsim khempeuh gen a, “Ka lu tungah mulkiatna kitah ngei lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka suah tunga kipan Pasianʼ tungah a kipia Nazir mi ka hi hi. Ka sam kimet leh ka hatna in kei hong nusia dinga, ka tha nem dinga, midang mah ka bang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:18 Ama tungah a lungsim khempeuh gen khin hi, ci-in Delilah in a theih ciangin amah in mi sawlin Filistia mi uliante sam a, “Tu-a khatvei hong pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a lungsim khempeuh kei kiangah hong gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Filistia uliante tua nu kiangah hong pai-in sum zong hong pua uh hi." 
Judges16:19 Tua nu in a phei tungah Samson ihmusak hi. Amah in mi khat samin a lu tunga a sam lom sagihte metsak hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in amah gimsak ding kipan a, ama thahatna in amah nusia ta hi." 
Judges16:20 Tua nu in, “Filistia mite in nang hong hih, Samson!” a ci hi. A ihmutna panin amah khanglo-in, “Nidang a mah bangin pai khia-in keimah kisingin suakta ning,” a ci hi. Topa in amah a nusiat khit lam amah in thei lo hi." 
Judges16:21 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in amah manin a mitte khel khia uh a, Gaza ah paipihin amah sumngo kol a bulh uh hi. Amah in thong sung an gawina ah an a gawi hi." 
Judges16:22 Ahih hangin a kimet khit ciangin a lu tunga a samte khangkik dingin hong kipan hi. 
Judges16:23 Tu-in Filistia uliante a pasian uh Dagon tungah biakna lianpi khat a pia ding le a gualnuam dingin kikhawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in i khut sungah i galpa Samson hong pia zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:24 Mite in amah a muh ciangun a pasian uh phat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I pasian in eiteʼ khut sungah i gam a susia pa, eite tampi hong that pa hong pia zo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges16:25 A lungsim uh a nop ciangin amaute in, “Eite adingin a kimawl theih nadingin Samson sam un,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in thong panin Samson sam khia-in amauʼ mai ah mawlpih uh hi. Khuampite kikalah amah kidingsak hi." 
Judges16:26 Samson in ama khut a len tangvalpa kiangah, “Ka kingak theih nadingin innpite a do khuampite hong lawngsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:27 Tua laitakin a innpi pen numei le pasal tawh kidim hi. Samson a kimawlsak laitakin a en Filistia ulian khempeuh le innkhum zang ah numei le pasal mi tul thum bang om uh hi. 
Judges16:28 Tua ciangin Samson in Topa samin, “ Topa Pasian aw, kei hong phawk in, kong thum hi. Tu-a ka mittang nihteʼ tang dingin Filistia mite ka thuhkik theih nadingin hong thahatsak in, tu-a bek kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges16:29 Samson in innpi a do khuampi nihte manin, a khut tak lamin khat, a khut vei lamin khat lenin ama gihna tawh a khuamte a luai hi." 
Judges16:30 Samson in, “Filistia mite tawh hong sisak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a thaneih khempeuh tawh a awng hi. Tua ciangin uliante le inn sunga om mi khempeuh tungah a innpi kicim suk hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nuntak lai-a a thah sangin a sihna-a a thah a si mi tam zaw hi." 
Judges16:31 Tua ciangin a sanggam pasalte le a innkuanpihte khempeuh hong pai sukin a luanghawm la uh a, ciahpih to-in Zorah le Eshtaol kikal a om a pa Manoahʼ hanah a vui uh hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sawm nih sung thu a khen hi." 
Judges17:1 Efraim mual tung gam mi Mikah a kici min nei mi khat om hi. 
Judges17:2 Amah in a nu kiangah, “Ngun pek tul le za khat hong kiguksak lai-in a gu pa na samsiatna thu ka za hi. A ngunte pen keima guk hi a, tu-in hih lai ah tuate om hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nu in, “Ka tapa aw, Topa in thupha hong pia tahen,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:3 Amah in ngun pek tul le za khatte a nu kiangah piakik hi. A nu in, “A kiseek milim khat le a kisung milim khat bawl nadingin ka tapa adingin Topaʼ tungah a ngunte ka ap sa ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong piakik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:4 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a nu kiangah a sum a piakkik ciangin a nu in zong ngun pek za nih la-in, a kiseek milim khat le a kisung milim khat a a bawlsak ngunseek pa kiangah pia a, tuate pen Mikahʼ inn sungah om hi." 
Judges17:5 Tua mipa Mikah in biakna phual khat nei a, amah in siampi puan khat le inn sung pasian-te bawlin siampi a suak dingin a tapate khat a koih hi." 
Judges17:6 Tua hun lai-in Israel sungah kumpi om lo a, mi khempeuh amauʼ hoihsak bang ciatin gamta uh hi." 
Judges17:7 Tua hun laitakin Judah gam Bethlehem khua sungah Levi mi tangval khat om hi. 
Judges17:8 Tua mipa a muhna mun peuhpeuh ah a teeng dingin Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin paikhia hi. Tua bangin khualzinin a pai laitakin Efraim mual tung gam sunga Mikahʼ inn ah va tung hi. 
Judges17:9 Mikah in ama kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Judah gam sung Bethlehem khua-a om Levi mi ka hi a, mun ka muhna peuh ah a peem ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:10 Mikah in ama kiangah, “Kei tawh hong omin kei adingin pa le siampi hong hi in; kum khatin ngun pek sawm, puan silh khat le annek kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges17:11 Levi mipa zong Mikah tawh a teeng khawm dingin lungkim hi. Tangvalpa pen ama tungah a tapate khat tawh kibang hi. 
Judges17:12 Mikah in Levi mipa koihin, tangvalpa ama siampi suakin Mikahʼ inn ah a om hi." 
Judges17:13 Tua ciangin Mikah in, “ Topa in kei hong daupaisak ding hi, ci-in tu-in ka thei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampi-in Levi mite khat ka nei ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:1 Tua hun lai-in Israel-te sungah kumpi om lo hi. Tua hun lai-in Dan minamte in a ten nading uh leitang zong uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun dong mateng Israel minamte sung panin amau ading gamhluah bangmah kia lo hi. 
Judges18:2 Tua ahih ciangin Dan mite in gam ensimin a va zong dingin amauʼ minam bup khempeuh lak panin misiam nga Zorah le Eshtaol panin a sawl uh hi. Amaute in tua mite kiangah, “Pai unla gam va zong un,” a ci uh hi. Amaute Efraim mual tung gam, Mikahʼ inn ah hong tung uh a, tua lai ah a taam uh hi." 
Judges18:3 Amaute Mikahʼ inn ah a om uh ciangin Levi mi tangvalʼ aw khat khen thei uh hi. Amaute kihei-in ama kiangah, “Kua in hih lai ah nang hong paipih ahi hiam? Hih lai munah bang hih na hi hiam? Hih lai ah na nasep bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:4 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Mikah in kei hong bawl hi. Amah in kei hong cialin kei pen ama siampi ka suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:5 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Koteʼ kuan khiat khualzinna a tangtung ding hiam cih ka theih nadingun Pasian hong dotsak in, kong thum uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:6 Tua ciangin siampipa in amaute kiangah, “Lung nuamin pai un. Noteʼ khualzinna thu ah Topa in hong panpih hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges18:7 Tua ciangin mi ngate pai khia-in Laish tung uh a, tua lai-a om mite, Sidon miteʼ om bang danin daitakin omin bangmah a upmawh lohna, leitungah bangmah kisam loin a hauhna le amaute Sidon-teʼ kiang panin gamla omin kuamah tawh kizopna a neih lohna, lungmuang takin a teenna uh a mu uh hi." 
Judges18:8 Amaute Zorah le Eshtaol-a a sanggamte uh kiangah hong tunkik uh ciangin, a sanggamte un amaute kiangah, “Bang thu gen ding nong nei uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:9 Amaute in, “Ding un, amaute a sim dingin pai to ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh a leitang ka mu khin uh a, a leihoih mahmah hi. Bangmah hih loin om mawk ding na hi uh hiam? Pai ding zekai kei un; lutin leitang va luah ni." 
Judges18:10 Na pai uh ciangin bangmah a ummawh lo mite kiang na tung ding uh hi. Leitang zai mahmah hi. Pasian in na khut sung uh ah leitungah bangmah a kisap lohna mun hong pia khinzo takpi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:11 Tua ciangin Dan minamte galhiam a tawi mihing za guk Zorah le Eshtaol panin kuan khia uh a," 
Judges18:12 amaute pai to-in Judah gam sung Kiriath-jearim ah giahphual sat uh hi. Hih thu hangin tu hun dongin tua mun pen Mahanehdan kici hi. Tua pen Kiriath-jearim nitumna lamah om hi. 
Judges18:13 Amaute tua lai mun panin Efraim mual tung gamah pai suakin Mikahʼ inn ah a tung uh hi. 
Judges18:14 Tua ciangin Laish gam a ensim dingin a pai mi ngate in a sanggamte uh kiangah, “Hih innte khat sungah siampi puan khat, inn sung pasian-te, a kiseek milim khat le a kisung milim khat a om lam thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na hih ding uh ngaihsun un,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:15 Tua ciangin amaute kihei-in Mikahʼ inn-a Levi tangvalpaʼ omna ah tung uh a, ama om zia dong uh hi." 
Judges18:16 Tua hunsung tengin galhiam a tawi Dan mi za gukte kulh kongpi lutna ah ding uh hi. 
Judges18:17 Tua ciangin, galhiam a tawi mi za gukte tawh kulh kongpi lutna ah siampipa a din khop laitakin gam ensim dingin a kuan khia mi ngate tumin a kiseek milim, a siampi puan, a inn sung pasian-te le a kisung milim la uh hi." 
Judges18:18 Hih mite Mikahʼ inn sungah tumin a kiseek milim, a siampi puan, a inn sung pasian-te le a kisung milim a lak uh ciangin siampipa in amaute kiangah, “Bang hih na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges18:19 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Pau kei in; na khutin na kam hum inla, kote tawh hong pai-in kote adingin pa le siampi hong hi in. Nang adingin mi khatʼ inn sungah siampi hih ding hoih zaw ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh Israel-teʼ sungah minam le beh siampi hih ding hoih zaw ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:20 Tua ciangin siampipa a lungkim hi. Amah in a siampi puan, a inn sung pasian-te le a kiseek milim la-in miteʼ lakah a pai hi." 
Judges18:21 Tua ahih ciangin amauteʼ mai ah a taneute le a ganhingte le a vante uh omsakin, amaute paikhia uh hi." 
Judges18:22 Amaute Mikahʼ inn panin a gamla khop khat a tun uh ciangin Mikahʼ inn veeng a om mite kikaikhawm uh a, Dan mite delhin a pha uh hi." 
Judges18:23 Amaute in Dan mite a ot san uh ciangin Dan mite hong kihei-in Mikah kiangah, “Hih bang mihon tawh nong delh nading bang thu om ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:24 Amah in, “Note in keima bawl sa ka pasian-te le ka siampipa la-in na paikhia uh hi. Keimah in bang nei nawn ka hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin, ‘Bang thu ahi hiam?’ bang hangin hong ci thei na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges18:25 Dan mite in ama kiangah, “Koteʼ lakah na aw hong kizasak kei in; tua hikeileh ka lawmte uh hehin nang hong hih ding uh a, na innkuanpihte tawh na si kha ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges18:26 Tua ciangin Dan mite pai uh hi. Mikah in ama adingin amaute thahat lua hi, ci-in a muh ciangin amah kihei-in a inn ah a ciahkik hi." 
Judges18:27 Dan mite in Mikahʼ bawl sate le a siampipa paipihin, gamdai-in a om, bangmah a ummawh lo miteʼ omna Laish tung uh a, namsau tawh amaute vatin mei tawh a khuapi a hal uh hi." 
Judges18:28 Amaute pen Sidon panin gamla uh ahih manin a hon khia ding om lo a, amaute in kuamah tawh kizopna nei lo uh hi. Tua mun pen Beth-rehob miteʼ neihsa kuam sungah om hi. Amaute in khuapi lamkikin a sungah teeng uh hi." 
Judges18:29 Amaute in tua khuapi min pen Israelʼ suan amauʼ pianna Dan tamin Dan a phuak uh hi. Ahih hangin a masa-in tua khuapi min pen Laish ahi hi. 
Judges18:30 Tua ciangin Dan mite in a kiseek milim amau adingin phut uh a, Mosesʼ tupa, Gershomʼ tapa Jonathan le ama tapate pen tua gam a kilak hun dong Dan minamte adingin siampi ahi uh hi." 
Judges18:31 Tua ahih ciangin Shiloh ah Pasianʼ biakbuk a om sungteng Mikahʼ bawl sa a kiseek milim tua lai ah a om hi. 
Judges19:1 Israel-te sungah kumpi a om loh hun laitakin, Levi mite khat Efraim mual tung gam mongah peemin, Judah gam Bethlehem panin zineu khat a la hi." 
Judges19:2 A zineu ama tungah heh a, ama kiang panin pai khia-in Judah gam Bethlehem khua-a a paʼ inn ah ciah a, tua lai ah kha li sung khawng a om hi." 
Judges19:3 Tua ciangin a pasal ding khia-in kam nem tawh a hopih ding le a ciah pihkik dingin tua nuʼ nungah a pai hi. Amah in a nasem pa le a la nih tonpih hi. A sungpaʼ inn ah tunga, a sungpa in amah a muh ciangin lungdamna tawh a dawn dingin hong pai hi." 
Judges19:4 Tua ciangin a sungpa in amah taamsak a, amah tawh ni thum sung a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne, tui dawnin giak khawm uh hi." 
Judges19:5 Tua ciangin a ni li ni zingsangin amaute tho baih uh a, pai dingin kithawi uh hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “An tawm khat ne-in na tha khauhsak in. Tua khit ciangin na pai thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:6 Tua ahih ciangin tua mi nihte tukhawmin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. A sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “Tu zan taam ding lungkim hoh inla, na lung nuamsak in,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:7 A pai dingin mipa a din ciangin a sungpa in a taamkik dong mateng kho hi. 
Judges19:8 Tua ciangin a ni nga ni-in a ding dingin zingsangin amah tho baih hi. A sungpa in, “An ne phot inla, ni a dialh mateng khawl lai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne uh hi." 
Judges19:9 Mipa le a zineu le a nasem pa a paikhia dingin a din uh ciangin a sungpa in, “En in, tu-in nitak nai-in ni niam ta hi; tu zan taam un. En in, ni tum dektak hi. Hih lai ah giak inla, na lung nuamsak in. Zing ciang zingsangin tho baihin inn ah na ciah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:10 Ahih hangin mipa tua zan taam nawn lo hi. Amah dingin paikhia a, Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) gal khat tung hi. Amah pen tuanna a kivawh la nih le a zineu tawh ahi hi." 
Judges19:11 Amaute Jebus kiang nai a tun uh ciangin ni niam khin a, a nasem pa in a topa kiangah, “Hih Jebus miteʼ khuapi ah zantaam ni,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:12 A topa in, “Israel mite ahi lo, gamdang miteʼ khuapi sungah i taam kei ding hi. Gibeah ah i paisuak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:13 Tua ciangin amah in a nasem pa kiangah, “Hong pai in, hih munte khat peuhpeuh va naihin, Gibeah ahih kei leh Ramah ah zantaam ni,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:14 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khengin paisuak uh a, Benjamin-teʼ gam ahi Gibeah khua gei ah ni tum a," 
Judges19:15 Gibeah ah pai-in a giak dingin tua khua a zuan uh hi. Amah pai-in khuapi sung kongzing laizang ah tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a zantaam dingin kuamah in a inn ah amaute sang lo hi. 
Judges19:16 Tua laitakin puteek khat lo-a a nasepna panin nitak ciangin hong ciah hi. Tua pa pen Efraim mual tung gam pan hi a, amah Gibeah khua ah a peem hi a, tua khua mite pen Benjamin mite ahi hi." 
Judges19:17 Amah khuadak a, khualzin pa, khuapi kongzing ah a mu hi. Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Koi ah pai ding na hi hiam? Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Judges19:18 Amah in, “Keima hong pai khiatna Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin Efraim mual tung gam mongah a pai dingin hong nawk ka hi uh hi. Judah gam Bethlehem ah ka pai hi. Tu-in ka inn-a a ciah ka hi hi. Kuamah in a inn ah hong tungsak nuam lo hi." 
Judges19:19 Ka late uh adingin buhtu le gan-an, kei le na nasem nu le na nasemte tawh a om tangvalpa adingin anlum le leenggahzu ka nei uh a, a kisam bangmah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:20 Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Lunghimawh kei in. Na kisapna khempeuh ka en ding hi. Kongzing ah giak kei hamtang in,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:21 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn ah ciah pihin late gan-an a pia hi. Amaute in a khe uh silin an a ne uh hi. 
Judges19:22 Amaute in a lung uh nuamsakin a om laitakun, tua khuapi mi, migina lote in tua inn kimkot ah pangin a kongkhak tum gawp uh hi. Amaute in inn nei puteekpa kiangah, “Ama taw ka luk theih nadingun na inn ah a hong tung mipa hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges19:23 Inn nei pa, amaute kiangah pusuakin amaute tungah, “Hi lo hi, ka sanggamte aw; tua bangin gitloh gamtat kei un." 
Judges19:24 En un, hih lai ah ka ta nungak le ka zin paʼ zineu om hi. Amaute hong paikhiatpih ning. Amaute buanin hoih na sak bangun amaute tungah hih un. Ahih hangin hih mipa tungah tua bang a sia gamta kei un,” a ci hi." 
Judges19:25 Ahih hangin mite in ama thu ngai lo uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mipa in a zineu manin amaute kiangah koih khia hi. Amaute in tua nu buan uh a, zingsang mateng zan tawntung tua nu hih uh hi. Zingsang khuavak dingin a kipat ciangin amaute in tua nu ciahsak uh hi." 
Judges19:26 Zingsang khua hong vak ciangin a numei hong ciahin, ama topa a omna mipaʼ kongkhak ah pukin khuavak dong om hi." 
Judges19:27 Zingsang ciangin a topa tho a, a khualzin zom dingin inn kongkhak hongin a paikhiat ciangin, inn kongkhak ah a zineu lumin sangkil tungah a khutte a kinga a mu hi." 
Judges19:28 Amah in a zineu kiangah, “Tho in, pai ta ni,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in dawng nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin amah in dom to-in a la tungah tua nu koih a, a inn ah a ciahpih hi." 
Judges19:29 A inn ah a tun ciangin amah in tem khat la a, a zineu lenin a phei a liangin seh sawm le nih suahin sem a, Israel-teʼ gam sung khempeuh ah a hawm hi." 
Judges19:30 A mu mite khempeuh in, “Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat a kipan tu ni dongin hih bang thu piang ngei lo a, zong kimu ngei lo hi. Hih thu ngaihsun un; kikum unla, gen un,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:1 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, Gilead gam zong a kihel, Dan panin Beer-sheba dong hong kuan khia uh a, Topaʼ kiang Mizpah ah mihing khat bangin mihon hong kikhawm lian uh hi." 
Judges20:2 Israel minam khempeuh sung pan makai khempeuh, namsau tawi khe galkap mihing tul za li, Pasianʼ miteʼ kikhopna ah amau mahmah kipia uh hi." 
Judges20:3 (Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah ah a paina thu Benjamin mite in za uh hi.) Israel mite in, “Hih bang tatsiatna hong pianna thu hong gen in,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:4 Tua ciangin a kithat numeiʼ pasal, Levi mipa in dawngin, “Benjamin-teʼ gam Gibeah ah kei le ka zineu a taam dingin ka tung uh hi." 
Judges20:5 Tua ciangin Gibeah mite keiʼ langah hong pang uh a, zanin koteʼ omna inn hong umcih uh hi. Amaute in kei hong that nuam uh a, ka zineu buan gawpin tu-in amah si hi." 
Judges20:6 Tua ciangin ka zineu la-in ka semnen a, Israel-teʼ luah gam sung khempeuh ah ka hong hawm hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Israel-teʼ lakah kihhuaina le lan luat khialhna gamta uh hi." 
Judges20:7 En un, no Israel mihingte khempeuh aw, na ngaihsutna uh gen unla, hih lai ah kikum un,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:8 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh mihing khat bangin ding lianin, “Eite khempeuh khat zong i puanbuk ah pai loin, eite khat zong i inn ah i ciah kei ding hi." 
Judges20:9 Tu-in Gibeah tungah eiteʼ hih ding thu in: Tua khua a sim dingin aisanna tawh i pai dinga," 
Judges20:10 amaute in Israel-te sungah lanluatna tawh a khialhna uh hangin Benjamin-teʼ gam Gibeah a thuk theih nadingun mite ading an nek tui dawn a pua dingin Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin mi za khat sung pan mihing sawm, tul khat sung pan za khat, tul sawm sung pan tul khat i la ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:11 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi a sim dingin Israel mite khempeuh kikhawm uh a, kipawlin mi khat a bang uh hi." 
Judges20:12 Tua ciangin Israel minamte in Benjamin minam khempeuh kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Noteʼ lakah a piang thu pen bangzah tatsiatna ahi hiam?" 
Judges20:13 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kote in amaute thatin Israel-teʼ sung panin siatna ka phiatkhiat theih nadingun Gibeah khua sunga om a migina lote hong pia khia un,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin-te in a sanggam uh Israel miteʼ thu ngai lo uh hi." 
Judges20:14 Tua ciangin Israel mite do-in a kuan khia dingin Benjamin gam sung khuapite panin Gibeah khuapi ah hong kituah uh hi. 
Judges20:15 Benjamin mite in tua ni-in amauʼ khuapite panin, Gibeah ah a teeng a kiteng khia mihing za sagih banah, namsau a tawi mihing tul sawm nih le tul guk a khawm uh hi." 
Judges20:16 Hihte khempeuh lakah mi a kiteng khia a veikhoi za sagih om a, amaute khempeuh pen suang tawh samzang kapin a khial lote ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:17 Israel mite in Benjamin-te sim loh, namsau a tawi mihing tul za li khawm uh a, hih mite khempeuh galsiam mi ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:18 Israel mite dingin Bethel ah pai to uh a, “Benjamin mite a sim dingin kua pai masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in Pasian a dong uh hi. Topa in, “Judah minamte pai to masa ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:19 Tua ciangin Israel mite zingsangin tho-in Gibeah khua a sim dingin giahphual a sat uh hi. 
Judges20:20 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kuan khia uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite a sim dingin Gibeah ah a gualin va naih uh hi. 
Judges20:21 Benjamin mite Gibeah pan hong kuan khia-in tua ni-in Israel mite tul sawm nih le tul nih lei ah a tuksak uh hi. 
Judges20:22 Ahih hangin Israel mite kihanthawnin a ni masa ni-a a panna mun mah uh ah gal pangkik uh hi. 
Judges20:23 Tua ciangin Israel mite pai to-in nitak dong Topaʼ mai ah a kap uh hi. Amaute in Topaʼ kiangah thu dongin, “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin gal phualah ka naihkik ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Amaute a sim dingin kuan to un,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:24 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a ni nih ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin hong nai uh hi. 
Judges20:25 Amaute a sim dingin a ni nih ni-in Gibeah panin Benjamin-te hong kuan khia uh a, Israel mite tul sawm le tul giat lei ah tuksak uh hi. Hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi hi." 
Judges20:26 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, galkap vekpi pai to-in Bethel ah tungin a kap uh hi. Tua lai mun Topaʼ mai ah amaute tu-in nitak dong tua ni an tang uh a, Topaʼ mai ah meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges20:27 Israel mite in Topa thu dong uh a (bang hang hiam cih leh tua hunin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai ah om a," 
Judges20:28 Aaronʼ tapa Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas in tua lai ah tua hunin na sem hi), “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuankik lai ding ka hi uh hiam, tua ahih kei leh khawl ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Pai to un; bang hang hiam cih leh zing ciangin amaute na khut sung uh ah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Judges20:29 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te in Gibeah kiimah a pangsim dingin mi koih uh hi. 
Judges20:30 Israel mite a ni thum ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuan to uh a, a hun dangte-a mah bangin Gibeah lang khat ah pang uh hi." 
Judges20:31 Tua ciangin amaute a do dingin Benjamin mite hong kuan khia uh a, khuapi panin amaute kipaikhiasak hi. A hun dangte-a mah bangin amaute in Bethel lamah a pai to pen le Gibeah lamah a pai lam lianpi le gamlak ah Israel mite sawm thum bang that uh hi." 
Judges20:32 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite in, “A masa-a mah bangin i mai ah amaute tai uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in, “Eite tai-in, khuapi panin lam lianpi ah amaute pai khiasak ni,” a kici uh ahi hi." 
Judges20:33 Israel mite khempeuh amauʼ omna mun panin dingin Baal-tamar ah a gualin pang uh hi. A pangsim Israel mite Gibeah nitumna lam amau omna panin hong ding khia uh hi. 
Judges20:34 Gibeah khua a sim dingin Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kiteng khia mi tul sawm hong kuan uh a, a galdo uh haksa mahmah hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in amau adingin siatna a naina thu thei lo uh hi." 
Judges20:35 Tua ciangin Israel-te mai ah Topa in Benjamin-te a zo hi. Israel mite in tua ni-in Benjamin mite tul sawm nih le tul nga le za khat that uh a, hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi uh hi." 
Judges20:36 Tua ahih ciangin Benjamin mite in a guallelhna uh kimu uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite awn uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeah khua a sim dingin a koih uh a pangsimte muang uh hi. 
Judges20:37 Tua ciangin a pangsim mite manlangin hong pai-in Gibeah khua sungah lut uh a, a pangsim mite in namsau tawh khuapi mi khempeuh vat gawp uh hi." 
Judges20:38 Israel mite le a pangsim mite a kiciamna lim in, amaute in khuapi sung panin meikhu lianpi a suahsak toh uh ciangin" 
Judges20:39 Israel mite galsim dingin hong tum ding uh hi. Tu-in Benjamin mite in Israel mite sawm thum bang vat gawpin thah ding kipan uh hi. Amaute in, “A masa-a mah bangin eiteʼ mai ah amaute kivat tuk gawp taktak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges20:40 Ahih hangin amauʼ kiciamna lim meikhu khuapi sung panin suak to dingin a kipat ciangin Benjamin mite nunghei uh a, a khuapi bup a khu-in vantungah a kah to a mu uh hi." 
Judges20:41 Tua ciangin Israel mite hong kilehhei uh a, Benjamin mite lungkia uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ siat nading a naina thei uh hi." 
Judges20:42 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ mai panin amaute kilehkikin gamlak lam manawh uh hi. Ahih hangin gal in amaute pha a, khuapi sung panin hong paikhia mite in amaute le a pawlte uh kikal sung tengah amaute sumai uh hi." 
Judges20:43 Amaute in Nohah panin nisuahna lamah Gibeah gal ciang dong Benjamin mite delhin tuancilin vat gawp uh hi. 
Judges20:44 Benjamin mite sung pan galhang mihing tul sawm le tul giat tuk uh hi. 
Judges20:45 Tua ciangin a dangte kihei-in sehnel gam lam Rimmon Suangpi ah tai uh hi. Amaute mihing tul nga lam lianpi dungah si uh a, Gidom ciang dong nakpi takin amaute kidelhin tul nih kithat hi." 
Judges20:46 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Benjamin-te a si khempeuh, namsau a tawi galhang mihing tul sawm nih le tul nga ahi hi." 
Judges20:47 Ahih hangin mihing za guk kihei-in gamlak lam Rimmon Suangpi ah tai uh a, Rimmon Suangpi ah kha li sung om uh hi." 
Judges20:48 Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kithawikik uh a, namsau tawh a mi a sa-in a muh khempeuh uh vat gawp uh hi. A muh uh khuate khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
Judges21:1 Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah ah kiciam uh a, “Benjamin mite tungah kuamah in i tanu mo-in i kha kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:2 Tua ciangin Bethel ah Israel mite hong pai-in Pasianʼ mai ah nitak dong tu uh a, amaute nakpi takin a kap uh hi." 
Judges21:3 Amaute in, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa aw, tu ni-in Israel-te sungah minam khat a pelhem nading, hih thu bang hangin Israel-te tungah hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:4 A zing ciangin mite tho baihin tua lai ah biakna tau khat lam uh a, meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a pia uh hi." 
Judges21:5 Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “ Topa ading kikhopna ah Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin kua teng hong pai lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa kiangah a pai lo mite tawh kisai-in Mizpah ah kiciamna lianpi khat bawl uh a, “Kithat ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:6 Israel mite in a sanggam uh Benjamin mite khasiat uh a, “Tu ni-in Israel-teʼ sung panin minam khat bei hi." 
Judges21:7 Eite in i tanute amaute tungah zi dingin pia lo ding hi hang, ci-in Topa tawh kiciam khin ihih ciangin a nungta lai amauteʼ zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:8 Tua ciangin amaute in, “ Topa kiang Mizpah ah Israel minamte hong pai lo a om hiam?” a ci uh hi. En in, Jabesh-gilead panin tua giahphual kikhopna ah kuamah pai lo hi." 
Judges21:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh mite a kikhop ciangin, tua lai ah Jabesh-gilead a teengte khat zong om lo hi." 
Judges21:10 Tua ahih ciangin mihonte in a galhangte uh mihing tul sawm le tul nih tua lai ah sawl uh a, “Pai unla Jabesh-gilead a teengte namsau tawh va vat gawp unla, nupite le naupang neute zong hih un." 
Judges21:11 Hih bangin na hih ding uh hi: Pasal khempeuh le pasal tawh a lum khawm sa numei khempeuh na sumai ding uh hi,” ci-in thu pia uh hi." 
Judges21:12 Amaute in Jabesh-gilead a teeng mite lakah pasal tawh a lum khawm nai lo nungak no za li mu uh a, Kanaan gam a om Shiloh giahphual ah tuate hong paipih uh hi." 
Judges21:13 Tua ciangin mihon buppite in Rimmon Suangpi a om Benjamin mite kiangah thu puak a, amaute kiangah kilemna thu gen uh hi." 
Judges21:14 Tua hun ciangin Benjamin-te hong ciah uh a, amaute in Jabesh-gilead numei a hing a a koihte uh pia uh a, ahi zongin amau adingin kicing zo lo hi." 
Judges21:15 Israel minamte sungah Topa in kitapkhapna omsak ahih manin mite in Benjamin-te khasiat uh hi. 
Judges21:16 Tua ciangin mihonteʼ upate in, “Benjamin-teʼ sung panin numeite kithat khin ahih manin a om lai miteʼ zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:17 Amaute in, “Israel-te sung panin minam khat a bei loh nadingin Benjamin a suakta laite adingin gamhluah a om ding kisam hi." 
Judges21:18 Ahi zongin amauʼ zi dingin i tanute i pia thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite kiciam khinin, “Benjamin-te tungah zi a pia mipa in samsiatna ngah tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:19 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “En un, Bethel leilu lam, Bethel panin Shekhem lamah a pai to lam lianpi nisuahna lam, Lebonah leitaw lamah a om Shiloh ah Topa ading kumsim pawi khamna om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:20 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Benjamin mite thu pia-in, “Pai-in leenggui lote ah bukin" 
Judges21:21 vil un. Laamna ah Shiloh nungakte a laam dingin hong pai uh leh, leenggui lote panin note in delhin mi khempeuh in na zi ding ciat uh Shiloh nungakte man unla, Benjamin gamah ciahpih un." 
Judges21:22 Amauʼ pate ahi a, a sanggampate uh ahi zongin a lungkim lohna uh koteʼ kiangah a gen dingin hong pai uh ciangin kote in amaute kiangah, ‘Kote tungah hehpihna tawh amaute hong pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh zi ding galsimna sungah ka ngahsak zo kei uh a, note zong a mawh na suah loh nadingun note in amaute tungah utna tawh na piak tawm uh ahi kei hi,’ ka ci ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Judges21:23 Benjamin mite zong tua bangmahin gamta uh a, amau mi a phazah tawh kituakin a laamte lak panin a zi dingun a la uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute pai-in a gamhluahna uh ah ciahkik uh a, khuapite lamkikin a sungah a teeng uh hi." 
Judges21:24 Tua hun ciangin Israel midangte tua lai panin paikhia uh a, mi khempeuh amauʼ minam le a innkuan pih ciat, amauʼ gamhluahna ciatah a ciah uh hi." 
Judges21:25 Tua hun lai-in Israel-te sungah kumpi om lo a, amauʼ hoihsak bang ciatin mi khempeuh a gamta uh hi." 
Ruth1:1 Thukhente in a uk hun lai-in tua gam sungah kialpi tunga, Judah gam sunga Bethlehem khuami khat, a zi le a tapa nihte tawh Moab gamah a peem dingin a pai uh hi." 
Ruth1:2 Tua mipaʼ min Elimelek hi a, a ziʼ min Naomi hi-in, a tapa nihte min Mahlon le Khilion ahi hi. Amaute pen Judah gam Bethlehem a Efrathah mite ahi uh hi. Amaute Moab gamah pai-in tua lai ah om uh hi." 
Ruth1:3 Ahih hangin Naomiʼ pasal Elimelek si a, a tapa nihte bek tawh tua nu a om hi." 
Ruth1:4 Hih a tapa nihte in Moab mite zi-in la uh hi. A khat min Orpah hi a, a dang khat min Ruth ahi hi. Tua lai ah amaute kum sawm bang teeng uh hi." 
Ruth1:5 Tua ciangin Mahlon le Khilion si a, tua nupi a tapa nihte le a pasal in sihsan hi." 
Ruth1:6 Tua ciangin tua nu a mo tegel tawh Moab gam panin a ciahkik dingin kithawi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a mite kemin an a piakna thu Moab gam sung panin amah in za hi. 
Ruth1:7 Tua ahih ciangin ama omna mun panin a mo tegel tawh tua nu ding khia a, Judah gamah a ciahkik dingin pai uh hi." 
Ruth1:8 Ahih hangin Naomi in a mo nihte kiangah, “Pai un, na inn tuak uh ah ciahkik unla, na nute uh tawh om un. A si sate hitaleh kei hitaleh nong limbawl uh mah bangin Topa in note hong limbawl tahen." 
Ruth1:9 Topa in na pasalkik uh inn tuakah hong nuamsasak tahen!” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute namin, amaute a kap uh hi." 
Ruth1:10 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Hi lo hi, na mipihte kiangah nang tawh kong ciah khawm ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth1:11 Ahih hangin Naomi in, “Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, bang hangin hong zui ding na hi uh hiam? Noteʼ pasal hong hi thei dingin tapa nei nawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Ruth1:12 Kilehkik un, ka tanute aw, na pai nading uh ah pai un; bang hang hiam cih leh pasal nei dingin ka teek lua ta hi. Pasal nei dingin kilamen ing ci mah leng zong, tu nitak mahmah in pasal nei-in tapate nei phial ta mah leng zong," 
Ruth1:13 amaute a khan khit dong ngak zo ding na hi uh hiam? Hi lo hi, ka tanute aw, Topa in kei hong bawlsia ahih manin note sangin nakpi takin kei ka lunggim zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:14 Tua ciangin amaute a kapkik uh hi. Orpah in a teeknu namin ciah a, ahih hangin Ruth in a teeknu beel hi." 
Ruth1:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “En in, na sanggamnu a mipihte le a pasian-te kiangah ciahkik khin hi. Na sanggamnuʼ nungah nang zong ciah in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:16 Ahih hangin Ruth in, “Nang kong nusiat nading ahi a, nang zuihna panin ka ciahkik nading ahi zongin hong cici nawn kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na paina ah ka pai dinga, na giahna ah ka giak ding hi. Na mite keima mite hi dinga, na Pasian keima Pasian hi ding hi." 
Ruth1:17 Na sihna ah si-in ka kivui ding hi. Sihna cih loh buang thudang hangin kong nusiat taak leh Topa in kei hong dawm kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:18 Tua ciangin Naomi in amah a zuih ding a lungsim a khensatna a muh ciangin bangmah ci nawn lo hi. 
Ruth1:19 Tua ahih ciangin Bethlehem a tun mateng uh a nihun paisuak uh hi. Bethlehem a tun uh ciangin amauteʼ hangin a khuazang un luum lialua-in nupite in, “Hih nu Naomi mah ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth1:20 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Naomi hong ci nawn kei un; Mara hong ci un; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian pa in nakpi takin kei hong gimsak hi." 
Ruth1:21 A dimin ka paikhia a, Topa in a hawmin hong ciah pihkik hi. Topa in kei hong gimsakin, Vanglian pa in kei tungah gimna hong tungsak ahih ciangin bang hangin Naomi hong ci lai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth1:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu-a bangin Moab gam panin Naomi, Moab mi a monu Ruth tawh hong ciahkik hi. Mangbuhham lak kipat laitakin Bethlehem khua hong tung uh hi." 
Ruth2:1 Tu-in Naomi in a pasalʼ tanaute, Elimelek innkuan sung mi, Boaz min nei a hau migina khat nei hi." 
Ruth2:2 Tua ciangin Moab mi Ruth in Naomi kiangah, “Lo ah hong kuansak inla, maipha ka muhna peuhpeuh paʼ nungah anvuite lakah a sang hong tawmsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai in, ka tanu aw,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:3 Tua ahih ciangin amah kuan khia-in pai a, anlateʼ nung lo sungah ansangte a tawm hi. Elimelek-te innkuan Boazʼ lo ah va kuan kha hi." 
Ruth2:4 Boaz zong Bethlehem panin hong kuanin amah in anlate kiangah, “ Topa in note hong ompih tahen!” a ci hi. Amaute in dawngin, “ Topa in nang thupha hong pia tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth2:5 Tua ciangin Boaz in anlate a uk a nasem pa kiangah, “Hih ka muh ngei loh numei kuaʼ ta ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:6 Tua ciangin anlate a uk nasem pa in dawngin, “Moab gam panin Naomi tawh a hong ciahkik Moab numei ahi hi." 
Ruth2:7 Tua numei in, ‘Kong thum hi; ansang hong tawmsakin anlateʼ nungah anlomte lakah a kiate hong khawmsak in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah hong pai-in tawl khat zong khawl loin zingsang tung a kipan tu dong sem suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:8 Tua ciangin Boaz in Ruth kiangah, “Tu-in ngai in ka ta aw; midangteʼ lo ah ansang tawm dingin pai kei inla, hih lo zong nusia kei in. Hih lai ah kuamah in bangmah hong cih lo ding ahih manin ka nasem numeiteʼ nai ah om cinten in." 
Ruth2:9 Amauteʼ anlakna lo mitsuan inla, amauteʼ nungah zui in. Nang hong bawlsiat loh nading uh tangvalte thu ka pia khin hi. Na dang a tak ciangin pai inla tangvalteʼ tui tawi sa dawn in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:10 Tua ciangin amah a mai-in lei ah puk a, leilak ah kunin ama kiangah, “Kei gamdang mi khat hi napi, hih banga kei nong phawk nadingin bang hangin na mai ah maipha ngah thei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:11 Ahih hangin Boaz in tua nu dawngin, “Na pasal a sih khit a kipan na teeknu adingin na sepnate khempeuh le na nu le na pa le na pianna gam nusia-in cikmahin na theih ngei loh mite kiangah na paina thu a kicing takin kei kiangah hong kigen zo hi." 
Ruth2:12 Topa in na gamtatna sate a pha tawh hong thuk a, a liim nuai beel dinga na paina Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in thaman a cingin hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:13 Tua ciangin Ruth in, “Ka topa aw, kei tungah nong dik mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen na nasem numeite hi lo napi-in na nasem nuʼ tungah migitna kam nong pau hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:14 Annek hun ciangin Boaz in tua nu kiangah, “Hih lai ah hong pai in; anlum ne inla, leenggahzu sungah na an diah in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin anlate gei ah amah tu a, tua pa in ankante tua nu a pia hi. Amah in a kham mateng ne a, a khamval zong pawl khat om lai hi." 
Ruth2:15 Tua nu ansang tawm dingin a din ciangin Boaz in a tangvalte hilh a, “Anlomte lak nangawn ah tawmsak unla, amah ko sia kei un." 
Ruth2:16 Anlom hente lak panin zong ama adingin pawl khat dok khia-in ama top dingin nusia unla, amah tai kei un,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:17 Tua ahih ciangin amah in nitak dong lo sungah ansang tawm hi. A top sa teng sat khia a, mangbuhham seu khat bang pha hi." 
Ruth2:18 Tua ciangin amah in tuate pua-in khuapi sungah a ciah hi. A an top teng a teeknu lakin, a an khamvalte zong la-in a pia hi." 
Ruth2:19 Tua ciangin a teeknu in ama kiangah, “Tu ni-in koi ah tawm na hi hiam? Koi ah sem na hi hiam? Nang hong phawk mipa in thupha ngah tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a teeknu kiangah a naseppihte gen a, “Tu ni-a ka sepna mipa pen Boaz ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:20 Tua ciangin Naomi in a monu kiangah, “A dikna in a site hitaleh a hingte hitaleh a mangngilh lo Topa in amah thupha pia tahen,” a ci hi. Naomi in ama kiangah, “Tua mipa pen i behte, i tanau nai pen khat ahi hi,” zong ci lai hi." 
Ruth2:21 Tua ciangin Moab numei Ruth in, “Tu-a banah amah in kei kiangah, ‘Ka an khempeuh a lak khit matengun ka nasemteʼ kiang nai ah om in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:22 Naomi in a monu Ruth kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, ama numeite tawh na kuan khop theih hoih mahmah hi; tua hikeileh lo dangah nang hong kibawlsia kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth2:23 Tua ahih ciangin Boazʼ numeiteʼ nai ah amah omin mangbuhham lak khit dong ansang tawm a, a teeknu tawh a om khawm hi." 
Ruth3:1 Tua ciangin a teeknu Naomi in ama kiangah, “Ka tanu aw, inn khat na suan theih nadingin na pasal ding kong vaihawmsak ding kilawm hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Ruth3:2 A numeite tawh na nasepna Boaz pen i tanau hi lo ahi hiam? Thei in, amah in tu nitakin ancilna ah mangbuhham haih hi." 
Ruth3:3 Tua ahih ciangin kisilin sathau kinuh inla, na puan hoih pente silhin ancilna ah pai suk in. Ahih hangin a nek a dawn a man mateng ama kiangah na pai lam kitheisak kei in." 
Ruth3:4 Ahih hangin amah a lup ciangin a lupna mun encik in; tua ciangin pai inla a khe lam puan leemin lum in; tua ciangin na gamtat nading amah in hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:5 Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Na gen khempeuh ka hih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:6 Tua ahih ciangin ancilna ah amah pai sukin a teeknu in ama kiangah a gen sa bang teekteekin a gamta hi. 
Ruth3:7 Boaz in a nek a dawn khit ciangin a lung nuam a, anphual nawl ah lum dingin a pai hi. Tua ciangin dam takin numei hong pai-in a khe lam puan leem sakin a lum suk hi." 
Ruth3:8 Zankim ciangin mipa a kihei ciangin a khe ah numei khat na lum hi. 
Ruth3:9 Amah in, “Kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in dawngin, “Keimah na nasem nu Ruth ka hi hi; tanaute na hih ciangin na nasem nu na puan hong zawn in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:10 Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in thupha hong pia tahen, ka tanu aw; a hau hitaleh a zawng hitaleh tangvalteʼ nung na zuih lohna ah a masa sangin a lian zaw a tawp khak hih ngeina man na gamta hi." 
Ruth3:11 Tu-in ka tanu aw, lau kei in; na nget khempeuh nang adingin kong hihsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khuapih mite khempeuh in numei gina na hih lam hong thei uh hi." 
Ruth3:12 Kei pen tanau nai ka hi mah hi; ahih hangin kei sangin a nai zaw tanau khat om lai hi. 
Ruth3:13 Tu zan om in; zingsang ciangin amah in nang tungah tanauteʼ hih ding hong hih leh pha hi; amah hihsak in. Ahih hangin nang tungah tanauteʼ sep ding a sepnop kei leh, tua ciangin, Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin nang tungah tanau nasep kong sem ding hi. Zingsang dong lum in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:14 Tua ahih ciangin zingsang dong a khe kiangah lum a, ahih hangin mi mel khatlekhat a kitheih ma-in amah a tho hi. Tua ciangin mipa in, “Ancilna ah numei a paina kitheisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:15 Mipa in, “Na puanza hong paipih inla hong dawh in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a numei in dawh a, amah in mangbuhham lawh guk teh khia-in tua nu guan a, tua ciangin khuapi sungah tua nu a ciah hi." 
Ruth3:16 A teeknu kiangah a tun ciangin amah in, “Ka tanu aw, bang na ci hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a thu khempeuh genin," 
Ruth3:17 “Hih mangbuhham lawh guk hong guan hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Na teeknu kiangah khut hawmguakin na ciah kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth3:18 Amah in dawngin, “Ka tanu aw, a thu hong bangci suahkhiat cih na theih mateng ngak in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mawk om lo dinga, tu ni-in a thu siangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:1 Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna kulh kongpi ah Boaz pai to-in tua munah tu suk hi. Tua laitakin a tanaute, Boazʼ gen pa hong pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in, “Hong pai dih in, lawm aw; hih lai ah tu dih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah hong kihei-in tu suk hi." 
Ruth4:2 Tua ciangin amah in khua upate mihing sawm samin, “Hih lai ah tu dih un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tu suk uh hi." 
Ruth4:3 Tua ciangin amah in a tanau pa kiangah, “Moab gam panin a hong ciahkik Naomi in i tanaute Elimelekʼ leitang zuak hi." 
Ruth4:4 Tua ahih ciangin hih thu nang kiangah kong gen ding ngaihsunin, ‘Hih lai ah a tu miteʼ muhna le keima mi upateʼ muhna ah lei in,’ kong ci hi. Na tat ding leh tanh in; ahih hangin na tat kei ding leh, a thu ka theih nadingin kei kiangah hong gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang sim loh a tanh ding kuamah om lo ahih manin nang kiangah kong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:5 Tua ciangin Boaz in, “Naomiʼ tung panin a lo na lei ni a kipanin, a siteʼ gamh a siteʼ beh sungah a kip theih nadingin a sipaʼ zi Moab numei Ruth zong a lei na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:6 Tua ciangin a tanau pa in, “Keima gamhluah siasak kha ding ka hih manin keima adingin ka tanh thei kei ding hi. Keimah in tanh thei lo ka hih ciangin keima tat theihna thu nangmah in tang in,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:7 Nidang lai-in Israel-te sungah tatna le kikhekna thu ah ngeina hih bang ahi hi: Thu vaihawm khat peuhpeuh a kipsak nadingin mipa khat in a khedap suah khia-in a lawmpa pia hi; hih banga hihna pen Israel-teʼ sungah kipsakna ahi hi. 
Ruth4:8 Tua ahih ciangin a tanau pa in Boaz kiangah, “Nang adingin lei in,” a cih ciangin amah in a khedap suah khia hi." 
Ruth4:9 Tua ciangin Boaz in upate le mi khempeuh kiangah, “Tu ni-in note pen Naomiʼ tung panin Elimelek le Khilion le Mahlonʼ neihsa khempeuh ka lei khitna thu teci na hi uh hi." 
Ruth4:10 A siteʼ min ama sanggamte le a pianna a khua sung panin a maiman loh nadingin ama gamhluahna ah a siteʼ min a kizop theih nadingin a si khin Mahlonʼ zi, Moab numei Ruth zong ka zi dingin ka lei khin hi; note pen tu ni-in teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Ruth4:11 Tua ciangin kulh kongpi a om mite khempeuh le upate in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi. Topa in Israel-teʼ pianna Rachel le Leah bangin na innkuan sunga hong pai numei bawl tahen. Efrathah ah na daupai henla, Bethlehem ah na min thang tahen." 
Ruth4:12 Topa in hih a khangno lai numei tawh nang hong piak na tateʼ hangin Judah in Tamar tawh a neih a tapa Perez innkuan tawh kibangin na innkuan piang tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth4:13 Tua ahih ciangin Boaz in Ruth la-in ama zi a suak hi. Amah in a zi luppih a, Topa in tua nu gaisakin amah in tapa khat nei hi." 
Ruth4:14 Tua ciangin nupite in Naomi kiangah, “Tanau nei loin tu ni-in nang a hong omsak lo Topa in thupha ngah henla, Israel-teʼ sungah ama min thang tahen!" 
Ruth4:15 Amah pen nang adingin na nuntakna a hong piakik le na khanghamna ah hong vak pa hi ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, tapa sagih sangin a thupi zaw, nangmah hong it na monuʼ neih tapa ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ruth4:16 Tua ciangin Naomi in naungek la-in a ang ah tawi a, amah a cingnu a suak hi." 
Ruth4:17 A veeng nupite in a min phuak uh a, “Naomiʼ sung pan tapa khat suak,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in a min Obed phuak uh hi. Amah pen Jessiʼ pa hi a, Jessi pen Davidʼ pa ahi hi." 
Ruth4:18 Tu-in Perezʼ suanlekhakte hih bang ahi hi: Perez pen Hezronʼ pa," 
Ruth4:19 Hezron pen Ramʼ pa, Ram pen Amminadabʼ pa," 
Ruth4:20 Amminadab pen Nahshonʼ pa, Nahshon pen Salmonʼ pa," 
Ruth4:21 Salmon pen Boazʼ pa, Boaz pen Obedʼ pa," 
Ruth4:22 Obed pen Jessiʼ pa, Jessi pen Davidʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Samuel1:1 Efraim mi Zufʼ tapa Tohu, a tapa Elihu, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Elkanah a kici min nei mi khat Efraim mual tung gam Ramathaimzofim ah om hi." 
1Samuel1:2 Amah in zi nih nei hi. Khatʼ min Hannah hi a, a khatʼ min Peninnah ahi hi. Peninnah in ta nei a, ahih hangin Hannah in nei lo hi." 
1Samuel1:3 Elkanah a kumkumin a khuapi panin, Eliʼ tapa nihte Hofni le Finehas in Topaʼ siampi a sepna mun Shiloh ah Vanglian Topa a bia ding le ama tungah biakna a pia dingin a pai zel hi." 
1Samuel1:4 Elkanah in biakna a piak ciangin a zi Peninnah le a tanu le a tapate khempeuh tungah tanh pia hi. 
1Samuel1:5 Amah in Hannah a it hangin Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin Hannah tungah tanh khat bek a pia hi. 
1Samuel1:6 Topa in amah ta neisak lo ahih manin amah a el a zi-pih in amah nakpi takin phin zel, hehsak zel hi." 
1Samuel1:7 Tua ahih ciangin a kumkumin tua bangin hi den uh hi. Topaʼ inn ah a pai toh simin Peninnah in Hannah phin zel hi. Tua ahih ciangin Hannah kapin an ne lo hi. 
1Samuel1:8 Tua ciangin ama pasal Elkanah in, “Hannah aw, bang hangin kap na hi hiam? Bang hangin an ne lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin na lungsim dah ahi hiam? Kei pen tapa sawm sangin nang adingin hoih zaw hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:9 Amaute in Shiloh ah an a nek khit uh ciangin khatvei Hannah ding khia-in biakinn ah thungen dingin a pai hi. Tua hun laitakin Topaʼ biakinn kongkhak khuam pangah siampi Eli na tu hi. 
1Samuel1:10 Tua nu nakpi takin lungkhamin Topaʼ tungah thu ngenin nakpi takin a kap hi. 
1Samuel1:11 Amah in thuciamna khat bawlin, “Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah in na nasem nuʼ gimna nong et takpi a, keimah hong phawkin na nasem nu hong mangngilh loin na nasem nu tungah tapa khat nong piak leh, Topaʼ tungah a khan tawntungin amah kong pia dinga, ama lu ah mulkiatna kitah lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:12 Topaʼ mai ah thungenin a om laitakin Eli in tua nuʼ kam na en hi. 
1Samuel1:13 Hannah a lungsimah pau hi. A mukte bek liingin a awging kiza lo ahih ciangin Eli in tua numei zukhamin ngaihsun hi. 
1Samuel1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in ama kiangah, “Bang tanvei zu kham ding na hi hiam? Na leenggahzu nek khawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:15 Ahih hangin Hannah in dawngin, “Hi lo hi, ka topa aw; kei pen nakpi takin a lungkham numei ka hi hi. Leenggahzu ahi a, khamtheih zu ahi zongin ka ne kei a, Topaʼ mai ah ka lungsim a sung khia ka hi hi." 
1Samuel1:16 Lungkhamna le gimna tawh a pau ka hih manin numei gina lo bangin na nasem nu hong ngaihsun kei in, a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:17 Tua ciangin Eli in dawngin, “Nuam takin pai in. Israel-teʼ Pasian in ama tungah na nget sa thu hong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:18 Tua ciangin numei in, “Nangma mitah na nasem nu maipha hong musak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei pai-in an ne a, dahmai pua nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel1:19 Amaute zingsangin tho baihin biakinn ah Topa a biak khit uh ciangin amauteʼ khua Ramah a a inn uh ah a ciahkik uh hi. Tua ciangin Elkanah in a zi Hannah luppih a, Topa in tua nuʼ thungetna a pia hi." 
1Samuel1:20 A hun ciangin Hannah gai-in tapa khat nei a, a min Samuel a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topaʼ tung panin amah ka nget ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:21 Tua ciangin Elkanah le a innkuante khempeuh Topaʼ tungah kumsim biakna le a thuciamna a pia dingin pai tokik uh hi. 
1Samuel1:22 Ahih hangin Hannah pai to lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pasal kiangah, “Naungek nawi tawh a kikhen phetin Topaʼ omna mai ah kilakin tua lai ah a om tawntung dingin ka paipih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel1:23 A pasal Elkanah in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in hoih na sak pen bangin gamta inla, amah nawi tawh a kikhen dong ngak in. Topa in a kammal hong kipsak tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin nupi omin nawi tawh a kikhen mateng a ta a khoi hi." 
1Samuel1:24 Numei in amah nawi tawh a kikhensak khit ciangin kum thum a pha bawngtal khat, annel seu khat le leenggahzu savun thawl khat tawh amah la-in, Shiloh a Topaʼ inn ah amah a paipih hi." 
1Samuel1:25 Tua ciangin amaute in a bawngtal go-in Eli kiangah a naupang a paipih uh hi. 
1Samuel1:26 Tua nu in, “Aw ka topa! Nangmah, a nungta na hih mah bangin ka topa aw, keimah in Topaʼ tungah thu ngenin nangma omna hih lai munah a ding nu ka hi hi." 
1Samuel1:27 Hih naupang ka ngen hi. Topa in ama tungah keima ngetna hong pia hi. 
1Samuel1:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ tungah amah ka kawm hi. A nuntak lai teng Topaʼ tungah amah a kikawm ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua lai ah Topa a bia uh hi." 
1Samuel2:1 Hannah in zong thu ngenin, “ Topaʼ tungah ka lungdam a, Topaʼ hangin ka kipak hi. Nong huhna hangin ka galte ka nuihsan hi." 
1Samuel2:2 “ Topa bangin a siangtho kuamah dang om lo a, amah sim loh kuamah dang om lo a, i Pasian tawh a kibang hong hu dang om lo hi." 
1Samuel2:3 Tua bangin kiphatsakna tawh pau nawn kei inla, na kam sung pan kihihsakna ging khiasak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thei Pasian hi a, amah in gamtatnate a tawi khai hi." 
1Samuel2:4 A thahatteʼ thalte kitan a, ahih hangin a thaneemte in thahatna ngah uh hi." 
1Samuel2:5 A gilvahte in an thalawh uh a, ahih hangin a gilkialte kial nawn lo uh hi. Tasel mi in ta sagih nei a, ahih hangin ta tampi a nei nu a lungzuang hi." 
1Samuel2:6 Topa in thatin hingsakkik a, amah in Leinuai ah paipih sukin tho tosak hi." 
1Samuel2:7 Topa in zawngsakin hausak a, amah in niamkhiat sukin, zong sangtosak hi." 
1Samuel2:8 Amah in leivui panin mizawngte phong to a, amah in a cimawhte a lungkhamna panun a phong to hi. Uliante tawh tu khawmsak a, minphatna ngahsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung khuampite Topa aʼ hi a, tuate tungah amah in leitung pumpi a koih hi." 
1Samuel2:9 “Amah in a thuman miteʼ kalsuanna limtakin cing a, ahih hangin migilote khua mialna sungah kikhia suk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thatang hatna tawh mi gualzo lo ding hi." 
1Samuel2:10 Topaʼ langte tamkham dinga, amah in amaute do-in vantungah van gingsak ding hi. Topa in leimong dongah thu khen ding hi. Amah in ama kumpipa tungah thahatna pia dinga, a sathau nilh paʼ vangliatna sangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:11 Tua ciangin Ramah a a inn ah Elkanah a ciah hi. Ahi zongin naupang in siampi Eliʼ omna ah Topaʼ na a sem hi. 
1Samuel2:12 Eliʼ tapate pen bangmah a man lo mite ahi uh hi. Amaute in Topa zahtakna nei lo uh hi. 
1Samuel2:13 Miteʼ tungah siampiteʼ gamtatzia ding ngeinate don lo uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in biakna a piak ciangin a sa a huan laitakin siampipaʼ nasem pa sikkeuka-thum nei khat a khut ah tawi-in hong pai a," 
1Samuel2:14 amah in a sikkeu tawh sikbeel daii ahi a, beel-uk ahi a, beel pi ahi a, beel sungah ahi zongin sun suk hi. Sikkeuka in a kaihkhiat toh khempeuh siampipa in tang ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin Shiloh ah a pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah amaute in tua bangin hih uh hi." 
1Samuel2:15 Tua tham loin a thau a kihal ma-in siampipaʼ nasem pa hong pai-in biakna a pia mipa kiangah, “Siampipa ading han ding sa hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nang tung panin sa min sa hong sang loin a sial bek hong sang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:16 Tua ciangin mipa in ama kiangah, “A thau hong hal masasak inla, tua khit ciangin na deih zahzah la in,” a cih leh, amah in, “Hi lo hi; tu mahmah in nong pia ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh thatang hat thu-in kong laksak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel2:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah tangvalteʼ khialhna lian mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topaʼ tungah biakpiaknate thupi seh lo uh hi. 
1Samuel2:18 Samuel pen saihadial siampi puan silhin Topaʼ mai ah na a sem naupang khat ahi hi. 
1Samuel2:19 Samuelʼ nu a pasal tawh kumsim biakna pia dingin a pai toh ciangin ama adingin puan tual neu khat bawlin kum simin ama kiangah a puak hi. 
1Samuel2:20 Tua ciangin Eli in Elkanah le a zi thupha pia-in, “Amah in Topaʼ tungah a apkik a taʼ tang dingin Topa in hih numei tawh nang ta dang hong neisak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a inn uh ah amaute a ciah uh hi." 
1Samuel2:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Hannah thupha pia a, tua nu gai-in tanu nih le tapa thum a nei hi. Naupang Samuel ahihleh Topaʼ omna ah a khang hi."
