1Samuel2:22 Tu-in Eli teek mahmah a, Israel-te khempeuh tungah a tapateʼ gamtatnate le kikhopna buk lutna ah na a sem numeite tawh a lup khopna thute khempeuh zong a za hi." 
1Samuel2:23 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin gamta na hi uh hiam? Mi khempeuh tung panin na gamtat siatnate uh ka za hi." 
1Samuel2:24 Hi lo hi, ka tapate aw; Topaʼ mite in a genthangna thu ka zakte hoih lo hi." 
1Samuel2:25 Mi khat midang khat tungah a khialh le ama adingin thukhente in palai sem ding hi. Ahih hangin mi khat Topaʼ tungah khial leh ama adingin kua in va thumsak ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in a paʼ thu ngai lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen amaute a thah nadingin Topaʼ deihna ahi hi. 
1Samuel2:26 Tu-in naupang Samuel a pumpi khangin Topa le miteʼ maipha a ngah toto hi. 
1Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mi khat Eliʼ kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt gam sung Faroʼ khutnuai ah na pupi Aaron le a innkuante a om laitakin Aaronʼ tungah keimah ka kilang hi." 
1Samuel2:28 Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin amah ka siampi ahi ding, ka biakna tau ah a pai ding, paknamtui a hal ding, keima mai ah siampi puan a silh dingin ka teel hi. Israel miteʼ tung panin mei tawh kihal keimah hong kibiaknate khempeuh na pupi innkuan tungah ka pia hi." 
1Samuel2:29 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keimah hong kibiaknate le ka thupiak ahi keimah hong kipiakte thusim loin, keima mi Israel-teʼ piak a limci pen teng tawh note kithausakin, kei sangin na tapate pahtawi zaw na hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
1Samuel2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in thu hong genin: ‘Nangma innkuan le na behte keima mai ah sung tumin pusuak tawntung ding hi, ci-in thu ka ciam sa hi,’ ci hi. Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in thu genin: ‘Tua bang hi nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong pahtawite ka pahtawi dinga, kei hong simmawhte ka simmawh ding hi." 
1Samuel2:31 En in, nangma innkuan sung le na beh sunga tangval hat khempeuh ka suksiat hun hong tung dinga, na innkuan sungah puteekte a om nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
1Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah ka piak daupainate khempeuh na lungkham hunin enna mit tawh na en dinga, na innkuan sungah puteek omngei nawn lo ding hi." 
1Samuel2:33 Ka biakna tau panin ka suksiat loh na suante khat pen mit lawt dongin a kap ding le a lunggim dingin kikoih ding hi. Tua ciangin na inn sung panin a khang khempeuh, miteʼ namsau tawh si ding uh hi." 
1Samuel2:34 Na tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas tungah hong tung ding hih thu pen nang adingin lim hi ding hi. Amau tegel a ni kikhatin si ding uh hi." 
1Samuel2:35 Tua ciangin ka lungsim sung le ka ngaihsutna bangin a sem ding a citak siampi khat keima adingin ka khangsak ding hi. Amah, suanlekhak nei-in ka bawl dinga, ka sathau nilh paʼ mai ah amah sung tumin pusuak tawntung ding hi." 
1Samuel2:36 Na suanlekhak a suakta mite khempeuh ngun peek khat ahi a, anlum lum khat ngen ding ahi zongin ama kiangah pai-in, “An tawm ka neih theih nadingin siampipaʼ omna mun khat peuhpeuh ah kei hong koih in, ci-in kong thum hi,” ci ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
1Samuel3:1 Tu-in Eliʼ khutnuai ah naupang Samuel in Topaʼ na sem hi. Tua hun lai-in Topa in thu gen mun lo a, maang mu om mun lo hi." 
1Samuel3:2 Tua hunin a mit a maang dingin a kipan khin Eli in khua mu thei lo a, ama omna tuam ah lum hi." 
1Samuel3:3 Pasianʼ meivak mit nai lo a, Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a omna mun Topaʼ mun siangtho sungah Samuel lum hi." 
1Samuel3:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Samuel! Samuel!” ci-in sam ahih manin amah in, “Hih lai ah om ing!” ci-in" 
1Samuel3:5 Eli kiangah tai a, “Hih lai ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong sam kei hi; lumkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in a lum hi." 
1Samuel3:6 Tua ciangin Topa in samkikin, “Samuel!” a ci hi. Samuel tho-in Eli kiangah pai-in, “Hih lai ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Kong sam kei hi, ka tapa aw; lumkik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:7 Tua laitakin Samuel in Topa thei nai lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah hopih ngei nai lo hi. 
1Samuel3:8 Topa in Samuel a thum veina samkik hi. Amah tho-in Eli kiangah pai-in, “Hih lai ah om ing, nong sam hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in naupang a sapna thu Eli in a thei hi." 
1Samuel3:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eli in Samuel kiangah, “Pai-in lum in; amah in nang hong sap leh nangmah in, ‘Hong gen in, Topa aw, na nasem pa in za hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Samuel pai-in ama omna ah lum suk hi." 
1Samuel3:10 Topa hong pai-in hong dinga, a hun dangte-a mah bangin, “Samuel! Samuel!” ci-in a sam hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Hong gen in, na nasem pa in za hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “En in, a za mite khempeuhʼ bil nihte a vut ding na khat Israel-teʼ sungah a sem ding ka hi hi." 
1Samuel3:12 Tua ni ciangin ama innkuan tawh kisai ka gen sa khempeuh a patna pan a tawpna dong Eli tungah ka tungsak ding hi. 
1Samuel3:13 A tapate in Pasian mindaisak a, amah in a tate kham lo ahih manin, ama theih a mawhna hangin ama innkuan gimna a pia tawntung ding ka hihna ama kiangah ka gen hi." 
1Samuel3:14 Tua ahih ciangin Eli innkuanteʼ mawhna pen biakna ahi a, piakna in ahi zongin a maisak zawh ngei loh nading thu Eliʼ innkuante tungah ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuel zong zingsang dong lum hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ inn kongkhakte hong hi. A maangmuhna Eliʼ kiangah a gen ding Samuel lau hi. 
1Samuel3:16 Ahih hangin Eli in Samuel samin, “Ka tapa Samuel aw,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hih lai ah om ing,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:17 Eli in, “Amah in nang kiangah hong gen bang ahi hiam? Kei kiangah hong im kei in. Amah in nang tungah hong gente khempeuh kei kiangah ip nong neih leh, Pasian in nang hong dawm kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:18 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in ama kiangah a vekpi-in genin bangmah im lo hi. Tua ciangin Eli in, “Amah pen Topa ahi hi. Amah in hoih a sak bangin hih tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel3:19 Samuel khang a, Topa in amah ompihin, Samuelʼ thugente khat zong lei ah kiasak lo hi." 
1Samuel3:20 Tua ciangin Dan le Beer-sheba kikal a om Israel-te khempeuh in Topaʼ kamsangin Samuel a kikipsakna thei uh hi. 
1Samuel3:21 Tua ciangin Shiloh ah Topa kilangkik zelzel hi. Shiloh ah Topa mahmah Samuel tungah kilangin thu gen a, Samuel in mite tungah gen sawn hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in Samuelʼ thu a zui uh hi." 
1Samuel4:1 Tu-in Filistia mite a sim dingin Israel-te kuan khia uh hi. Amaute in Ebenezer ah phual sat uh a, Filistia mite in Afek ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel4:2 Israel-te a do dingin Filistia mite kipan uh a, gal a kido uh ciangin Filistia mite in Israel-te zo-in galphual sungah mi tul li bang that uh hi." 
1Samuel4:3 Mihonte giahphual ah hong ciah ciangin Israel upate in, “Bang hangin Topa in tu ni-in Filistia miteʼ mai ah eite hong taisak ahi hiam? Eiteʼ lakah amah hong pai-in a thahat i galteʼ khut sung panin amah in eite hong hotkhiat theih nadingin Shiloh panin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih ni,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel4:4 Tua ahih ciangin mite in Shiloh ah mi paisak uh a, kherub-te tungah a tu Vanglian Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai panin hong pua uh hi. Eliʼ tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas, Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang tawh tua lai ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel4:5 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang giahphual sung hong tun ciangin Israel-te khempeuh nakpi takin awng uh a, lei a thawn hi." 
1Samuel4:6 Filistia mite in otna gamlumna a zak uh ciangin amaute in, “Hebru miteʼ giahphual ah nakpi a hih bang otna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang giahphual a tun khitna a theih uh ciangin" 
1Samuel4:7 Filistia mite lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Giahphual ah a pasian-te uh tung zo hi,” a ci uh hi. Amaute in, “Gimna ngah hi ta hang! Bang hang hiam cih leh nidangin hih bang piang ngei lo hi." 
1Samuel4:8 Gimna ngah hi ta hang! Kua in hih a thahat pasian-teʼ khut sung panin eite hong hon khia zo ding ahi hiam? Hihte pen gimna a tuamtuamte tawh gamlak ah Egypt-te a vat gawp pasian-te ahi hi. 
1Samuel4:9 Filistia mite aw, hang unla, pasal bangin gamta un. Tua hikeileh amaute, noteʼ sila hong hih mah bangin Hebru miteʼ sila na suak ding uh hi. Pasal lungsim nei-in do un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel4:10 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite in do uh a, Israel-te kizo-in mi khempeuh a inn ciatah tai uh a, mi tampi tak kithat hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te khe galkap mi tul sawm thum puk hi." 
1Samuel4:11 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang zong kiman a, Eliʼ tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas zong kithat hi." 
1Samuel4:12 Giahphual panin Benjamin mi khat hong tai-in a puan kikeek sa le a lu tungah leivui khu-in Shiloh hong tung hi. 
1Samuel4:13 Amah a tun ciangin, lampi gei ah a vilin ama tutna ah Eli na tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hangin a lungsim liing hi. Mipa khuapi sung hong tungin a thu teng a gen ciangin khuapi mi khempeuh lau-in kiko uh hi." 
1Samuel4:14 Eli in kikona awging a zak ciangin amah in, “Hih gamlumna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mipa manlangin hong pai-in Eli kiangah a gen hi." 
1Samuel4:15 Tu-in Eli kum sawm kua le kum giat pha a, a mitte maangin khua mu thei lo hi." 
1Samuel4:16 Mipa in Eli kiangah, “Keimah, galphual panin hong ciah ka hi a, tu ni-in giahphual panin kong tai hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka tapa aw, bangci ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel4:17 A thu hong puak pa in dawngin, “Filistia miteʼ mai ah Israel-te tai uh a, mi tampi tak zong kithat hi; na tapa nihte, Hofni le Finehas zong si uh a, Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang kiman khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel4:18 Amah in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a gen ciangin kulh kongpi gei-a a tutna mun panin Eli thal pukin a ngawng kitanin a si hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah puteek hi-in gik hi. Amah in Israel-te kum sawm li sung thu khen hi. 
1Samuel4:19 Tu-in a monu, Finehasʼ zi, naupaii-in a suak dektak ahi hi. Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a kimatna le a pasal a sihna thu a zak ciangin amah kunin nausuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a nat hun tung ta hi." 
1Samuel4:20 Amah si dektak a, ahi zongin amah a don numeite in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in, tapa khat na nei hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in dawng lo a, zong don lo hi." 
1Samuel4:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Israel-teʼ sung panin minthanna paikhia khinta!” ci-in a naungek min Ikhabod a phuak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a kimatna hang le a teekpa le a pasalʼ hang ahi hi." 
1Samuel4:22 Amah in, “Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang kiman khin ahih manin Israel-teʼ sung panin minthanna paikhia khinta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel5:1 Filistia mite in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a mat uh ciangin Ebenezer panin Ashdod ah pua uh hi. 
1Samuel5:2 Tua ciangin Filistia-te in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Dagon inn sungah paipihin Dagon kiangah koih uh hi. 
1Samuel5:3 Ashdod mite a zing ciang zingsang tungin a thawh uh ciangin, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai leilak ah Dagon na maipuk hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Dagon phong to-in ama omna munah koihkik uh hi." 
1Samuel5:4 Ahih hangin a zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute a thawh uh ciangin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai leilak ah Dagon na maipuk leuleu a, Dagon lutang le a khut tegel kitan khia-in sangkil gei ah om a, Dagon a pumpi bek om lai hi." 
1Samuel5:5 Tu ni dongin Dagon siampite le Dagon inn ah a tumte khempeuh in hih thu hangin Ashdod a Dagon sangkil tung sik lo uh hi. 
1Samuel5:6 Topa in Ashdod khua mite nakpi takin gawt a, amah in uilut tawh Ashdod khua le a gam sung lausakin gimsak hi." 
1Samuel5:7 Ashdod mite in hih bang thute a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang eite kiang panin a paikhiat loh phamawh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eite le i pasian Dagon hong gawt hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:8 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in mi sawlin Filistia uliante khempeuh khawm uh a, “Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in dawngin, “Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Gath ah koihsak ni,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai ah paipih uh hi." 
1Samuel5:9 Ahih hangin amaute in tua Gath khua ah a tunpih khit uh ciangin Topa in tua khuapi langpanin apkhapna lianpi piangsak a, amah in khuapi mite a moi a hamin gimsakin amaute in uilut vei uh hi." 
1Samuel5:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Ekron ah puak uh hi. Ahih hangin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Ekron a tun ciangin Ekron mite kiko uh a, “Kote le ka mite uh a that dingin amaute in Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang ko kiangah hong paipih uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel5:11 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in mi sawlin Filistia uliante khempeuh khawmin, “Kote le ka mite uh hong thah loh nadingin Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang pua khia unla, ama omna munah ciahkiksak un,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a khuapi sung khempeuh ah si dektak a apkhapna om hi. Pasian in tua lai ah amaute nak gawt mahmah hi." 
1Samuel5:12 A si lo sunte in uilut vei uh a, khuapi sunga kahna awging vantung dongah kiza to hi." 
1Samuel6:1 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Filistia gam sungah kha sagih sung om hi. 
1Samuel6:2 Tua ciangin Filistia-te in siampite le aisante sam uh a, “ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang bang cih ding ihi hiam? Ama omna munah bang tawh kha ding ihi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:3 Amaute in, “Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang na puakkhiat uh leh, a hawmguakin puak kei un. Bangbang hitaleh mawhna hanga biakna pia un. Tua ciangin note na dam ding uh a, note hong gawtna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:4 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah i piak ding mawhna hanga biakna bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in dawngin, “Filistia uliante a phazah tawh kizui-in kham uilut nga le kham simbeng nga hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh le na uliante uh tungah a kibang gimna hong tung hi." 
1Samuel6:5 Tua ahih ciangin note in na gam sung uh hong su gawp na uilut uh limte le na simbeng limte uh bawlin, Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ tungah zahtakna na lak ding uh hi. Note le na pasian-te uh le na gam uh hong gawtna amah in hong zangsak kha ding hi." 
1Samuel6:6 Egypt-te le Faro in a lungsim uh a khauhsak bangin bang hangin na lungsim uh khauhsak ding na hi uh hiam? Amah in amaute a mawlpih khit ciangin amaute in Israel mite paisakin, tua ciangin Israel mite kihem khia uh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel6:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in leeng thak khat bawlin a tungah kol a kibaang ngei nai lo bawngpi a no nawi a pia lai nih la unla, a bawngpite leeng ah vawh un; ahih hangin amaute kiang panin a note la-in inn ah ciahpih un." 
1Samuel6:8 Tua ciangin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in leeng tungah koih unla, mawhna hanga biakna-in na piak uh kham milimte a singkuang khat sungah guangin a gei ah koih un. Tua ciangin sawl khia unla, a lampi ah paisak un." 
1Samuel6:9 A bawngte in Beth-shemesh khua zuanin a pai toh leh siatna lianpi hong bawl pa pen amah hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a pai toh kei leh eite hong susia pa amah hi lo a, eite tungah a piang mawkmawk hi, ci-in i thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:10 Mite in tua bangmahin hih uh a, a no nawi a pia lai bawngpi nih la-in leeng ah bulh uh hi." 
1Samuel6:11 Amaute in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le kham simbeng le amauʼ uilut limte a omna singkuang leeng tungah a koih uh hi. 
1Samuel6:12 Tua ciangin bawngpite lamlian dung zui-in Beth-shemesh lamah tang takin pai uh a, a paikawmun ham uh hi; taklam ah hitaleh veilamah hitaleh kihei lo uh a, Filistia uliante in Beth-shemesh gamgi ciang dong a nung a zui uh hi." 
1Samuel6:13 Tu-in Beth-shemesh uliante in kuam sungah a mangbuh uh a lak laitak ahi hi. Amaute khuadakin Thuciamna Singkuang a muh uh ciangin, a muhna uh hangin amaute lungdam uh hi." 
1Samuel6:14 Beth-shemesh khuami Joshuaʼ lo ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ek khamin a bawngpite Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:14 Beth-shemesh khuami Joshuaʼ lo ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ek khamin a bawngpite Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:15 Levi mite in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le a gei-a om kham milim a omna singkuang la-in suangtumpi tungah a koih uh hi. Beth-shemesh mite in tua ni-in Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate a pia uh hi. 
1Samuel6:16 Filistia ulian ngate in tua bang teng a muh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin Ekron ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
1Samuel6:17 Filistia-te in mawhna hanga biakna-in Topaʼ tungah a piak uh kham uilutte in: Ashdod ading khat, Gaza ading khat, Ashkelon ading khat, Gad ading khat le Ekron ading khat ahi hi." 
1Samuel6:18 Ulian ngateʼ uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite le a ki-um lo khuaneute adingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uh a suangtumpi pen Beth-shemesh khuami Joshuaʼ lo ah tu ni dongin teci ahi hi. 
1Samuel6:18 Ulian ngateʼ uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite le a ki-um lo khuaneute adingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uh a suangtumpi pen Beth-shemesh khuami Joshuaʼ lo ah tu ni dongin teci ahi hi. 
1Samuel6:19 Amaute in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang en uh ahih manin amah in Beth-shemesh mite pawl khat that hi. Amah in amaute sawm sagih that a, mite lakah Topa in mi tampi that ahih manin mite thuum uh hi." 
1Samuel6:20 Tua ciangin Beth-shemesh mite in, “Hih a siangtho Pasian, Topaʼ mai ah kua om zo ding ahi hiam? Eiteʼ kiang panin kua kiangah amah paisak ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel6:21 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Kiriath-jearim ah a teeng mite kiangah kamtaite sawl uh a, “Filistia-te in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hong puakkik khin uh hi. Hong pai suk unla, no kiangah pua to un,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:1 Tua ciangin Kiriath-jearim mite hong pai-in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang pua to uh a, mual tungah a om Abinadabʼ inn ah paipih uh hi. Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a en dingin amaute in ama tapa Eleazar a ap uh hi." 
1Samuel7:2 Kiriath-jearim ah Thuciamna Singkuang a om a kipan, hun saupi, kum sawm nih bang pha a, Israel mite khempeuh in Topa ngai-in thuum uh hi." 
1Samuel7:3 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel mite khempeuh kiangah, “Na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topaʼ lamah a kiheikik na hih uh leh noteʼ lak panin gamdang pasian-te le Ashtaroth nusian milim koih khia-in Topaʼ lamah na lungsim uh ngat unla, amah bek bia un. Tua hileh amah in Filistia-teʼ khut sung panin note hong hon khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:4 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te in Baal-te le Ashtaroth koih khia-in Topa bek a bia uh hi. 
1Samuel7:5 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Israel-te khempeuh Mizpah ah khawm un. Note adingin Topaʼ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:6 Tua ahih ciangin amaute Mizpah ah kikhawm uh a, tui tawi-in Topaʼ mai ah sung khia uh a, tua ni-in an tangin tua lai munah, “ Topaʼ tungah i khial khinzo hi,” a ci uh hi. Samuel in Israel mite Mizpah ah thu khen hi." 
1Samuel7:7 Israel mite Mizpah ah a kikhopna thu Filistia-te in a zak uh ciangin Israel-te a sim dingin Filistia uliante kuan to uh hi. Israel mite in tua thu a zak uh ciangin amaute in Filistia-te kihta uh hi. 
1Samuel7:8 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Samuel kiangah, “Filistia-teʼ khut sung panin amah in eite hong hotkhiat theih nadingin Topa i Pasianʼ tungah eite adingin thunget na khawl kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel7:9 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in nawi a ne lai tuuno khat la-in Topaʼ tungah a bupin meihal biakna-in a pia hi. Israel-te adingin Topaʼ tungah Samuel kiko a, Topa in amah na dawng hi." 
1Samuel7:10 Samuel in meihal biakna a piak laitakin Filistia-te in Israel-te a sim dingin hong nai uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa in aw lianpi tawh tua ni-in Filistia-te thawn gawpin amaute buaisak gawp a, Israel-teʼ mai ah amaute kinot khia hi." 
1Samuel7:11 Tua ciangin Mizpah panin Israel-te pai khia-in Filistia-te delh uh a, Bethkar nuai ciang dong amaute a vat gawp uh hi." 
1Samuel7:12 Tua ciangin Samuel in suangtum khat la-in Mizpah le Jeshanah kikalah phut a, a min Ebenezer a phuak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Hih pen Topa in eite hong huhna teci ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel7:13 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia-te kizo a, Israel-teʼ gam sungah tumkik nawn lo uh hi. Samuelʼ hunsung khempeuh Topa in Filistia-te langpang hi." 
1Samuel7:14 Israel-teʼ tung panin Filistia-te in a lak sa khuapite, Ekron panin Gath ciang kikal sungteng, Israel-te tungah kipiakik a, Israel-te in Filistia-teʼ khut sung panin a gam uh lakik uh hi. Israel-te le Amor mite kikalah zong kilemna om hi." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuel in a nuntak sung tawntung Israel-te thu khen hi. 
1Samuel7:16 A kumkumin Bethel, Gilgal le Mizpah ah kot pai a, amah in hih munte khempeuh ah Israel-te thu khen hi." 
1Samuel7:17 Tua ciangin Ramah ah amah ciahkik zel hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai ah ama inn om a, tua lai ah zong Israel-te tungah thukhen na mah a sem hi. Amah in tua lai ah Topa ading biakna tau khat a lam hi." 
1Samuel8:1 Samuel a teek ciangin amah in Israel-teʼ tungah thukhenin a tapate a koih hi. 
1Samuel8:2 A ta upaʼ min Joel hi a, a nihnaʼ min Abijah ahi hi. Amaute pen Beer-sheba ah thukhente ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:2 A ta upaʼ min Joel hi a, a nihnaʼ min Abijah ahi hi. Amaute pen Beer-sheba ah thukhente ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:3 Ahih hangin a tapate amah bangin gamta lo uh a, sum ngah ding lam bek kin uh ahih manin sumgolh la-in thuman hei khia uh hi." 
1Samuel8:4 Tua ciangin Israel upate kikhawmin Ramah a Samuel kiangah pai-in 
1Samuel8:5 ama kiangah, “En in, nang na teek ta a, na tapate in nangma khekhap hong zui lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin kote hong uk dingin kote adingin kumpi khat seh in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel8:6 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote hong uk dingin kumpi khat hong pia in,” a cih uh ciangin hih thu in Samuel lungkim losak hi. Samuel in Topaʼ kiangah thu ngen hi." 
1Samuel8:7 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amaute in nang kiangah hong gen thu khempeuh ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong nial hi lo a, amaute tungah kumpi hihna panin kei hong nial ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:8 Egypt panin amaute ka paikhiatpih a kipan tu ni dongin amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangteʼ na semin, keiʼ tungah hong bawlnate khempeuh mah bangin amaute in nang tungah zong hong bawl ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amauteʼ thu ngai in. Amaute limtakin hilh kholin, amauteʼ tungah a uk ding kumpipaʼ hih zia ding lak bek in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel8:10 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in ama tung panin kumpi khat a ngen mite kiangah Topaʼ thugen khempeuh a gen hi. 
1Samuel8:11 Amah in, “Note hong uk ding kumpipaʼ hih zia dingte in: Amah in na tapate uh la-in a leengte ah na semin a sakol nasem ding le a leengte mai ah a tai dingin seh ding hi." 
1Samuel8:12 Tua ciangin amah in ama adingin a tul-a uk le a sawm nga a ukte le pawl khatte a lo kho-in a an a la ding le a gal sung nazatte le a leeng nate a bawl dingin seh ding hi. 
1Samuel8:13 Amah in na tanute uh paknamtui bawl ding, anhuan ding le an em dingin la ding hi." 
1Samuel8:14 Amah in na lote uh, na leenggui lote uh le na oliv lote uh sung panin a limci pen teng la-in ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi." 
1Samuel8:15 Amah in na an le na leenggahte uh sawm-ah-khat la-in ama uliante le ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi. 
1Samuel8:16 Amah in na nasem numeite uh, na nasem pasalte uh, na bawngte, uh le na late uh a gina pen teng la-in ama na a sem dingin koih ding hi." 
1Samuel8:17 Amah in na tuuhonte uh sawm-ah-khat la dinga, note pen ama sila na hi ding uh hi." 
1Samuel8:18 Tua ni ciangin note adingin na teel sa uh na kumpipa uh hangin note na kiko ding uh a, ahih hangin tua ni ciangin Topa in note hong dawng lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel8:19 Ahih hangin mite in Samuelʼ thu ngai nuam lo uh hi. Amaute in, “Hi lo! Koteʼ tungah kumpi khat ka nei ding uh hi." 
1Samuel8:20 Kote zong minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin, ka kumpipa uhʼn kote hong ukin koteʼ mai ah pai-in ka galte uh hong dosak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuel in miteʼ thugen khempeuh a zak khit ciangin Topaʼ kiangah tua thute a genkik hi. 
1Samuel8:22 Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amauteʼ thu ngai inla, amaute-aʼ dingin kumpi khat koih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh na khuapi ciat uh ah ciah un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin-te sung panin Afiahʼ tapa Bekorath, a tapa Zeror, a tapa Abiel, a tapa Kish min nei, Benjamin-te mihau khat a om hi." 
1Samuel9:2 Amah in tangval a melhoih, a min Saul ahi tapa khat nei hi. Israel mite lakah amah sangin a melhoih zaw, a thacing zaw khat zong om lo a, midang khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi." 
1Samuel9:3 Tua laitakin Saulʼ pa Kishʼ late a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kish in a tapa Saul kiangah, “Nasemte khat sam inla, late va zong in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Efraim mual tung gam teng le Shalisha gam teng nawkin zong uh a, ahih hangin mu lo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Shaalim gam teng zong uh a, ahih hangin tua gamah na om tuan lo hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Benjamin gam teng zong uh a, ahih hangin mu sam lo uh hi." 
1Samuel9:5 Zuf gam a tun uh ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om a nasem pa kiangah, “Hong pai in, ciahkik ni. Tua hikeileh ka pa in late ngaihsun nawn loin eite hong lunghimawh zaw kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:6 Ahih hangin a nasem pa in, “En in, hih khuapi sungah Pasianʼ mi khat om a, a kizahtak mi khat ahi hi. Ama gen khempeuh a manin tung hi. Tua lai ah pai ni. Eiteʼ khualzin khiatna thu amah in hong gen thei kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasem pa kiangah, “Ahih hangin pai lehang, tua mipa bang puak ding ihi hiam? I van sunga i anlum bei ta a, Pasianʼ mipa kiangah i puak ding letsong om lo hi. Bang nei nawn ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:8 Tua ciangin a nasem pa in Saul dawngkikin, “Hih lai ah ngun sumnen tang khat ka nei hi. I vai hong gen nadingin Pasianʼ mipa kiangah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:9 (Tua ma lai-in Israel-te sungah mi khat in Pasian kiangah thu dong dingin a pai ciangin amah in, “Hong pai in, thumu pa kiangah va pai ni,” ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu hun a kamsang i cihte tua ma-in thumu pa kici hi.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasem pa kiangah, “Tua ahihleh hoih hi, va pai ni,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasianʼ mipa a omna khuapi ah amaute a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel9:11 Amaute khuapi omna mual tungah a pai toh laitakun khuapi panin tui tawi dingin hong paikhia nungaknote tawh kituak uh ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Thumu pa hih lai ah a om hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel9:12 Amaute in, “Amah om hi; noteʼ mai diak ah pai hi. Kinawh un; khuapi sungah tu mahmah in hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in tu ni-in mual tunga biakna ah biakna pia uh hi." 
1Samuel9:13 Khuapi sung na lut phetun mual tunga biakna ah an ne dingin a pai ma-in amah na mu ding uh hi. Amah in biakpiakna thupha pia ding ahih manin ama pai mateng mite in an ne lo ding uh hi. Thupha a piak khit ciangin a kisam mite in ne thei pan uh hi. Tu-in pai to un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah na tuak pah ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel9:14 Tua ahih ciangin khuapi ah amaute pai to uh hi. Khuapi sungah amaute a lut laitakun mual tunga biakna lamah Samuel a pai dingin amauʼ lamah hong paikhia a mu uh hi. 
1Samuel9:15 Tu-in Saul hong pai ni a zan ni-in Samuel tungah Topa in thu na gen khin hi: 
1Samuel9:16 “Zing ciang tu bang hunin Benjamin gam sung panin nang kiangah mi khat kong sawl dinga, nangmah in ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin amah sathau na nilh ding hi. Amah in Filistia miteʼ khut sung panin ka mite hon khia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ kikona kei kiang hong tung khin ahih manin ka miteʼ gimna ka mu khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:17 Samuel in Saul a muh ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong gen mipa hih lai ah hong pai ta hi. Amah pen ka miteʼ tungah a uk ding pa ahi hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
1Samuel9:18 Tua ciangin Saul in kulh kongpi ah Samuel va naihin, “Hong gen in; thumu paʼ inn koi lai ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuel in Saul dawngin, “Keimah, thumu pa ka hi hi; mual tunga biakna ah keima mai ah na pai to in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in tu ni-in kei tawh an na ne dinga, zingsang ciangin nang hong ciahsakin na lungsim a om khempeuh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi." 
1Samuel9:20 Tu ma ni thum lai-in a mang na late ahihleh, kimu khinta ahih manin tuate na lungsimah ngaihsun nawn kei in. Israel-teʼ deihdeihte kuaʼ tungah om ahi hiam? Nang le na paʼ innkuante khempeuh tungah a om hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:21 Saul in dawngin, “Kei pen Israel minamte sung panin a tawm pen Benjamin-te hi lo ka hi hiam? Keima innkuan, Benjamin minam innkuan khempeuh sung panin a niam pen hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih bangin kei tungah hong pau na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:22 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul le a nasem pa samin inn dei sungah paipih a, mihing sawm thum bang a pha a kisam mite lak tutna bul lamah a tusak hi." 
1Samuel9:23 Tua ciangin Samuel in anhuan pa kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong piak, ‘Na tuam koih in,’ kong cih pawl hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel9:24 Tua ahih ciangin anhuan pa in a khe le a kawngsa la-in Saulʼ mai ah a lui hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Thei in, a kisit pen nangʼ mai ah hong kilui hi. Ne in; bang hang hiam cih leh leenglate tawh na nek theih nadingin a kiseh hun a cin mateng nang adingin hong kisitsak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Saul in Samuel tawh an nekhawm hi." 
1Samuel9:25 Amaute mual tunga biakna panin khuapi sungah a pai suk uh ciangin innkhum zang ah Saul adingin lupna khat na kiphah a, a ihmu dingin amah lum suk hi." 
1Samuel9:26 Khua a vak ciangin Samuel in innkhum zanga Saul samin, “Na pai nading ah kong sawl theih nadingin tho in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul tho-in, amah le Samuel, khuapi kongzing ah a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel9:27 Amaute khuapi nawl ah a paikawmun Samuel in Saul kiangah, “I mai ah na nasem pa a paisuak nading gen inla, amah a paisuak khit ciangin nangʼ tungah Pasianʼ thute kong theihsak theih nadingin tawl khat hih lai ah khawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:1 Tua ciangin Samuel in sathau thawl khat la a, ama lu tungah buakin amah nam a, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khin hi lo ahi hiam? Nangmah in Topaʼ mite ukin a kiim a om amauʼ galteʼ khut sung panin amaute na hon khia ding hi. Topa in ama luahte tungah ulian dingin nang sathau hong nilh khitna lim hih bang hi ding hi:" 
1Samuel10:2 Tu ni-in kei kiang panin na paikhiat ciangin Benjamin-teʼ gam Rachelʼ han kiang Zelzah ah mihing nih na tuak dinga, amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Pai a na zon late kimu khin a, tu-in na pa in late ngaihsun nawn loin nangmah hong lunghimawh a, “Ka tapa bang cih ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
1Samuel10:3 Tua ciangin tua lai panin pai lai-in Tabor tawsaw lak na tung ding hi. Tua lai panin Bethel a Pasian kiangah a pai to, keel no thum a pua mi khat, anlum thum a pua a dang khat le leenggahzu savun thawl khat a pua mi khat, mi thum in nang hong dawn ding uh hi." 
1Samuel10:4 Amaute in nang hong hopihin nangmah in amauʼ tung panin na san ding anlum nih nang tungah hong pia ding uh hi. 
1Samuel10:5 Tua khit ciangin Filistia khuacingte a omna Gibeath-elohim na tung ding hi. Tua khuapi sung na tun ciangin amaute mai ah, harp lasakna, khuangneu, tamngai le laiza lasakna tawh laamin awng kawmin mual tunga biakna panin hong pai suk kamsang hon khat na tuak ding hi." 
1Samuel10:6 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kha in khauh takin nang hong uk dinga, amaute tawh laamin awng khawmin mi tuamdang khatin na kikheel ding hi." 
1Samuel10:7 Hih limte nang tungah hong tun ciangin na tuah peuhpeuh na hih ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh Pasian hong om hi. 
1Samuel10:8 Tua ciangin keima mai Gilgal ah na pai suk ding hi. Meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te a pia dingin nang kiangah kei zong kong pai ding hi. Nang kiangah kei hong pai-in na hih ding teng kong lah mateng, ni sagih sung na ngak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:9 Samuel nusia dingin a nunghei ciangin Pasian in ama tungah pianzia thak khat a pia hi. Tua ni-in Samuelʼ gen limte khempeuh a piang hi. 
1Samuel10:10 Gibeah ah amaute a tun uh ciangin, kamsang hon khat in amah na dawn hi. Pasianʼ kha in khauh takin amah hong man takpi a, amah zong amauteʼ lakah laamin a awng hi." 
1Samuel10:11 Tua ciangin kamsangte tawh a gamtat khawmna, amah a thei sa mi khempeuhte in a muh uh ciangin khatlekhat in, “Kishʼ tapaʼ tungah bang tung ahi hiam? Saul zong kamsang suak ahi hiam?” kici uh hi." 
1Samuel10:12 Tua ciangin tua lai-a mite khat in dongin, “Hih kamsang dangte kuaʼ tate ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Saul nangawn kamsang suak hi,” cihna paunak a kipatna hong suak hi." 
1Samuel10:13 Tua bangin laamin a otna a man ciangin mual tunga biakna tau omna ah a pai hi. 
1Samuel10:14 Saulʼ pano in amah le a nasem pa a muh ciangin, “Koi ah pai na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Late a zong dingin ka pai uh hi. Late kimu zo lo ding ci-in ka theih uh ciangin Samuel kiangah ka pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:15 Tua ciangin Saulʼ pano in, “Kong thum hi; Samuel in nang kiangah hong gen teng kei tungah hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:16 Tua ciangin Saul in a pano kiangah, “Late a kimuh khitna ko kiangah teltakin hong kigen hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Samuel in a gen kumpi suah nading thu tawh kisai ama tungah bangmah gen lo hi." 
1Samuel10:17 Tu-in Samuel in Mizpah a Topaʼ kiangah mite khawm hi. 
1Samuel10:18 Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Egypt panin Israel-te ka paikhiatpih a, Egypt-teʼ khut sung le note hong nengniam kumpi gamte khempeuhʼ khut sung panin note kong hon khia hi,’ ci hi." 
1Samuel10:19 Ahih hangin note in na tuahsiatnate uh le na lungkhamnate uh panin note a hong hon khia na Pasian uh tu ni-in na nial uh a, note in, ‘Koteʼ tungah kumpi khat koih in,’ na ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na minam nam uh le a tultulin Topaʼ mai ah kilak un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:20 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel minamte khempeuh a nai ah hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Benjamin minam kila hi." 
1Samuel10:21 Amah in Benjamin minamte a behbehin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Matri innkuan kila hi. A tawpna ah amah in Matri innkuan a mi malin hong paipih a, aisanna tawh Kishʼ tapa Saul kila hi. Ahih hangin amaute in amah a zon uh ciangin amah kimu zo lo hi." 
1Samuel10:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa kiangah dongkik uh a, “Tua mipa hih lai ah hong pai hiam?” ci uh a, Topa in, “En un, a mahmah van kawm lakah bu hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel10:23 Tua ciangin amaute tai-in tua lai mun panin amah hong paipih uh hi. Miteʼ lakah amah a din ciangin mi khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi. 
1Samuel10:24 Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh tungah, “ Topa in a teel sa mipa na mu uh hiam? Mi khempeuh lakah amah tawh a kibang khat zong om lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh awngin, “Kumpipa khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel10:25 Tua ciangin Samuel in kumpipaʼ thuneihna le a nasepte mite kiangah gen a, amah in tuate laibu khat sungah gelhin Topaʼ mai ah a koih hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in mi khempeuh amauʼ inn ciatah a ciahsak hi." 
1Samuel10:26 Saul zong Gibeah-a ama inn ah ciah a, Pasian in amauʼ lungsim a lawnsak mi thahatte zong amah tawh a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel10:27 Ahih hangin bangmah a man lo mi pawl khat in, “Hih mipa in eite hong bangci hotkhiat zawh ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in amah simmawhin ama kiangah letsong puak lo uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in tua mite bangmah cih lo hi." 
1Samuel11:1 Tua ciangin Ammon mi Nahash a galkapte tawh pai to-in Jabesh-gilead umcih hi. Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Kote tawh kilemna hong bawl in; nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:2 Ahih hangin Ammon mi Nahash in amaute kiangah, “Hih thu khat tawh note tawh kilemna ka bawl ding hi. Keimah in noteʼ taklam mittang khempeuh khel khia-in Israel-te khempeuh tungah mindaina kong omsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:3 Jabesh upate in ama kiangah, “Israel-teʼ gam sung khempeuh ah kamtaite ka sawl theih nadingun ni sagih sung a hun hong sot in. Tua ciangin kote hong hon khia ding kuamah a om kei le nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:4 Saulʼ khua Gibeah ah kamtaite a tun uh ciangin amaute in mite kiangah a thu gen uh a, tua ciangin mi khempeuh a gingin kap khia uh hi." 
1Samuel11:5 Tu-in Saul a bawngtalteʼ nung zui-in lo panin hong ciah hi. Saul in, “Amaute a kah nadingin bang in mite nasak ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jabesh miteʼ thute ama kiangah a gen uh hi." 
1Samuel11:6 Saul in hih thute a zak ciangin Pasianʼ kha in khauh takin amah hanthawn a, nakpi takin a sin hong so hi." 
1Samuel11:7 Amah in bawng leengkai kap khat la a, tuate go-in semnen a, kamtaite sawlin Israel gam khempeuh ah khak a, “Saul le Samuel nung zui-in a kuan khia lo peuhmah a bawngtalteʼ tungah hih bangin kihih ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin mite tungah Topa kihtakna hong tunga, mihing khat bangin amaute hong kuan khia uh hi." 
1Samuel11:8 Amah in Bezek ah amaute a kaihkhop ciangin Israel mite tul za thum pha a, Judah mite tul sawm thum pha hi." 
1Samuel11:9 Amaute in a hong pai kamtaite kiangah, “Jabesh-gilead mite tungah hih bangin gen un: ‘Zing ciang, sun hun ma-in note hong kihon khia ding hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Kamtaite hong tungin Jabesh mite kiangah a gen uh ciangin amaute lungdam uh hi." 
1Samuel11:10 Tua ahih ciangin Jabesh mite in Nahash kiangah, “Zing ciangin nang tungah kote kong kipia ding uh a, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin koteʼ tungah nong hih ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:11 A zing ciangin Saul in mite pawl thumin a khen hi. Tua ciangin amauteʼ giahphual laizang ah zingsang tungin hong pai uh a, sun nisat dong Ammon-te a sat lum uh hi. A suakta mite kithehthang uh a, amaute mi nih nangawn a om khopna om nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel11:12 Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “‘Saul in eite hong uk ding hiam?’ a cite kua ahi hiam? Amaute i thah theih nadingin a mite hong paipih in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel11:13 Ahih hangin Saul in, “Tu ni-in mi khat zong kithat lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni pen Topa in Israel-te hong hotkhiat ni ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:14 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Hong pai un; Gilgal ah pai-in kumpi dingin Saul kipsak phakik ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh Gilgal ah pai uh a, tua lai mun Topaʼ mai Gilgal ah Saul kumpi-in a koih uh hi. Amaute in tua lai Topaʼ mai ah thunuam a biakna pia uh a, Saul le Israel mite khempeuh tua lai ah nakpi takin lungdam khawm uh hi." 
1Samuel12:1 Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “En un, note in keima kiangah nong gen uh thu khempeuh ka hong mang a, note tungah kumpi khat ka koih khin hi." 
1Samuel12:2 Tu-in noteʼ makai pa pen kumpipa ahi hi. Keimah teekin ka sam kang ta a, ahi zongin note tawh ka tapate om hi. Ka neu lai a kipan tu ni dong noteʼ makai ka hi hi." 
1Samuel12:3 Hih lai ah ka om hi; ka mawhna a om leh Topaʼ mai le a sathau nilh paʼ mai ah ka mawhna hong pulak un. Kuaʼ bawngtal ka laksak hiam? Ahih kei leh kuaʼ la ka laksak hiam? Ahih kei leh kua khem ka hi hiam? Kua nengniam ka hi hiam? Ahih kei leh keima mit a tawsak dingin kuaʼ tung panin sumgolh la ngei ka hi hiam? Ka mawhna nong lah theih uh leh kong dinkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel12:4 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Nangmah in kote nong khem kei a, zong nong nengniam kei a, mi khat peuhpeuh tung panin zong bangmah na la kei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:5 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Note in kei tungah bangmah na muh lohna thu uh Topa pen noteʼ lang khat ah teci hi a, ama sathau nilh pa zong tu ni-in teci ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hi mah hi; Topa, i teci ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:6 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Moses le Aaron teelin Egypt gam panin na pu na pate uh a paikhiatpih Topa, teci ahi hi." 
1Samuel12:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-in note le na pu na pate uh adingin Topa in hotkhiatna a sepna thu khempeuh Topaʼ mai noteʼ tungah hong genin kong mawhsak theih nadingin ding lai dih un. 
1Samuel12:8 Egypt ah Jakob pai-in Egypt-te in amaute a netniam uh ciangin Topaʼ tungah na pu na pate uh kiko uh a, Egypt panin na pu na pate uh paikhiat pihin hih lai munah amaute a tengsak ahi Moses le Aaron, Topa in a puak hi." 
1Samuel12:9 Ahih hangin amaute in Topa a Pasian uh mangngilh uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in Hazor kumpipa Jabinʼ galkap mangpa Siseraʼ tung le Filistia-te tung le Moab kumpipa tungah amaute zuak a, hih mite in amaute sim uh hi." 
1Samuel12:10 Tua ciangin Topa tungah amaute kiko uh a, ‘Kote ka khial khin uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa nusia-in Baal-te le Ashtaroth na ka sem uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in ka galte uh khut sung panin kote hong hon khia in; nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:11 Tua ciangin Topa in Jerubbaal, Barak, Jefthah le Samuel hong sawl a, na kiim khempeuh uh a na galte uh khut sung panin note hong hon khia a, note lungmuang takin na om uh hi." 
1Samuel12:12 Tua ciangin note a sim dingin Ammon kumpipa Nahash hong kuanna na muh uh ciangin, Topa na Pasian uh na kumpi uh hi napi-in note in kei kiangah, ‘Kumpi khat in kote hong uk ding hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:13 “Tu-in noteʼ teel sa, noteʼ nget kumpipa en un; Topa in noteʼ tungah kumpi khat koih khinta hi." 
1Samuel12:14 Note in Topa zahtakin ama na sem a, ama aw ngai-in Topaʼ thupiakna na langpan kei uh a, note a hong uk kumpipa le na Pasian uh na zuih uh leh thu hong nuam ding hi." 
1Samuel12:15 Ahih hangin note in Topaʼ aw ngai loin Topaʼ thupiakna na langpan uh leh Topa in note le na kumpipa uh hong langpan ding hi. 
1Samuel12:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in taang loin ding unla, noteʼ muhna ah Topa in a hih ding hih na lian en un." 
1Samuel12:17 Tu hun pen mangbuh lak laitak hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in vanging le guah hong puak theih nadingin Topaʼ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Note adingin kumpi khat na ngetna uh hangin Topaʼ muhna ah na gamtatna sa na gitlohna uh a liatna thu thei-in na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel12:18 Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in Topaʼ tungah thu ngen a, Topa in tua ni-in van gingsakin guah zusak hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in Topa le Samuel nakpi takin a zahtak uh hi." 
1Samuel12:19 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in Samuel kiangah, “Kote ka sih loh nadingun na nasemte adingin Topaʼ tungah thu ngen in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka khialhna sate uh banah kote adingin kumpi khat ngenin ka khialhnate uh banah hih siatna ka behlap lailai uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel12:20 Tua ciangin Samuel in mite kiangah, “Lau kei un; hih siatnate khempeuh na gamta khin uh hi. Ahi zongin Topa zuihna panin pial kei unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topaʼ na sem un." 
1Samuel12:21 Meetna hong pia thei lo, hong hon thei lo, a mawkna milimte biakna lamah pial kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a mawkna ahi hi." 
1Samuel12:22 Topa in ama min a khualna-in ama mite paai khia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama mi-in note hong bawl nadingin Topa lungkim khin hi. 
1Samuel12:23 Tua tham loin kei zong, note adingin Topaʼ tungah thunget lohna tawh ka na khial het kei dinga, keimah in a hoih a man lampite note kong hilh ding hi." 
1Samuel12:24 Topa zahtak unla, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh citakin ama na sem un; bang hang hiam cih leh note adingin amah in na lian hong bawlsak sate ngaihsun un." 
1Samuel12:25 Ahih hangin note na gamtat siat lai uh leh, note le na kumpipa uh, na nihun hong kiphiat khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:1 Saul in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm thum pha a, kum sawm li le kum nih sung Israel-te a uk hi." 
1Samuel13:2 Saul in Israel-te mihing tul thum teel hi. Tul nihte Mikmash le Bethel mual tung gamah Saul tawh om a, tul khatte Benjamin gam sung Gibeah ah a tapa Jonathan tawh om uh a, midang a omlaite amauʼ inn a puanbuk ciat uh ah amah in ciahsak hi." 
1Samuel13:3 Jonathan in Geba ah a om Filistia-teʼ khuacingte zo a, Filistia-te in tua thu za uh hi. Tua ciangin Saul in gam khempeuh ah peengkul tum a, “Hebru mi khempeuh zasak un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:4 Tua ciangin Saul in Filistia khuacingte a zawhna le Filistia-te adingin Israel-te a huathuai ahihna zong Israel-te khempeuh in za uh hi. Gilgal ah Saul a pawm dingin mite kisam khia hi. 
1Samuel13:5 Tua ciangin Israel-te tawh a kido dingin Filistia-te kikhawmin, leeng tul sawm thum, sakol galkap tul guk le a galkapte tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin tampi pha uh hi. Amaute hong pai to-in Bethaven nisuahna lam Mikmash ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel13:6 A galte in Israel mite neh mahmah ahih manin amaute haksatna sungah a om lam uh a kitheih uh ciangin suanghawm sung, leihawm sung, suang kawmlak, han lak le tuikhukte sungah bu uh a," 
1Samuel13:7 a dangte in Jordan ngahmun kantanin Gad le Gilead gamah gal kah uh hi. Saul ahihleh Gilgal ah om lai a, amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lau-in liing uh hi." 
1Samuel13:8 Amah in Samuelʼ seh hun, ni sagih sung a ngak hi. Ahih hangin Gilgal ah Samuel hong pai lo a, ama kiang panin mite kithehthang hi." 
1Samuel13:9 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in, “Meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna hih lai kei kiangah hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in meihal biakna a pia hi." 
1Samuel13:10 Meihal biakna a piak a man khit phetin Samuel hong tunga, amah a dawn ding le a hopih dingin Saul paikhia hi." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuel in, “Bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in, “Kei kiang panin mite kithehthangin, a ni kiseh sungin nang lah hong tung lo a, Mikmash ah Filistia-te a kikhopna ka muh ciangin" 
1Samuel13:12 keimah in, ‘Tu-in Filistia-te keimah hong hih dingin Gilgal ah hong pai suk ding uh a, keimah in Topaʼ maipha ka ngen nai kei hi,’ ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei mahmah kisawl tawmin meihal biakna ka pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:13 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Na hai gamtat hi; Topa na Pasianʼ hong thupiakna na zui kei hi; bang hang hiam cih le Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang le na suanlekhakte a kipsak suak ding ahi hi." 
1Samuel13:14 Ahih hangin tu-in na ukna kizom suak lo dinga, Topa in ama lungsim bangin mi khat zong khin hi. Topa in nang hong thupiak zui lo na hih manin ama mite tungah ulian dingin Topa in amah seh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel13:15 Tua ciangin Samuel dingin Gilgal panin Benjamin-teʼ gam sung Gibeah ah pai to hi. Tua ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om mite mihing za guk bang kaikhawm hi. 
1Samuel13:16 Saul, a tapa Jonathan le amau tawh a om mite Benjamin-teʼ gam sung Gibeah ah om uh hi. Ahih hangin Filistia-te in Mikmash ah phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel13:17 Tua ciangin Filistia-teʼ giahphual panin galsimte pawl thumin hong kuan khia uh hi. Pawl khatte Shual gam Ofrah lamah kihei-in," 
1Samuel13:18 pawl khatte Beth-horon lamah kihei a, pawl khatte gamlak lam Zeboiim kuam a kimuh sukna gamgi lamah kihei uh hi." 
1Samuel13:19 Tua laitakin Israel gam sung khempeuh ah sikseek khat zong om lo hi. Tua ahih manin Filistia-te in, “Hebru mite in amau adingin namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin hong seeksak kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel13:20 Israel-te pen a lokhawhna tu, a hei, ahih kei leh a phiaukawi a seek hiam dingin Filistia-te kiangah pai suk zel uh hi." 
1Samuel13:21 Lokhawhna tu le tuzum seek hiam thaman hamu bang hi a, hei seek hiam thaman le ciangkhut ah sik phuh thaman mat khat bang ahi hi." 
1Samuel13:22 Tua ahih ciangin gal do-in Saul le Jonathan tawh a om mite khat peuhpeuh khut sungah namsau ahi a, teipi ahi zongin om lo a, ahi zongin Saul le a tapa Jonathan in nei uh hi." 
1Samuel13:23 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in Mikmash paina ciangka a cing dingin mi sawl uh hi. 
1Samuel14:1 Ni khat ni-in Saulʼ tapa Jonathan in ama galhiam a pua tangvalpa kiangah, “Hong pai in; gal khat a Filistia khuacingte kiangah pai ni,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in a pa kiangah a pai ding thu gen lo hi." 
1Samuel14:2 Saul pen Migron-a om mang kawlsing nuai-a Gibeah nawl ah om hi. Amah tawh a om mite za guk bang pha a," 
1Samuel14:3 Shiloh ah Topaʼ siampi Eliʼ tapa Finehas, a tapa Ikhabod, a sanggampa Ahitubʼ tapa Ahijah in siampi puan silh hi. Mite in Jonathan a paikhiat khit lam thei lo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:4 Filistia khuacingteʼ omna ah pai ding Jonathan in a ngimna ciangka a pang khat ah suangdawk khat omin, a pang lang khat ah zong suangdawk khat mah om hi. A khat min Bozez hi a, a lang khat min Seneh ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:5 Suangdawk khat pen Mikmash mai leilu lamah dawkin a khat pen Geba mai leitaw lamah dawk hi. 
1Samuel14:6 Tua ciangin Jonathan in ama galhiam a pua tangvalpa kiangah, “Hong pai in; dawibia mi hih khuacingte kiangah va pai ni. Topa in eite adingin hong hihsak kha ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hotkhiat nadingin a tam a tawm in Topa nawngkaisak lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:7 Tua ciangin a galhiam pua pa in ama kiangah, “Na lungsim in a sawm khempeuh hih in. Nang tawh ka om a, nang lungsim mah bangin keiʼ lungsim zong ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:8 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “En in, hua mite kiangah gal kahin amaute kiangah i va kilak ding hi." 
1Samuel14:9 Amaute in, ‘Note kiangah kong pai mateng uh hong ngak un,’ hong cih leh i omna munah taang loin i om dinga, amaute kiangah i pai to kei ding hi." 
1Samuel14:10 Ahih hangin amaute in, ‘Koʼ kiangah hong pai to un,’ hong cih leh eite i pai to ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in eiteʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia khin hi. Hih pen eite adingin lim hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:11 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia khuacingte kiangah amau tegel va kilak uh hi. Filistia-te in, “En un, a bukna uh leivang panin Hebru mite hong pusuak khia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel14:12 Khuacing mite in Jonathan le a galhiam pua pa na hopih uh a, “Ko kiangah hong pai to un; na khat kong lak ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan in a galhiam pua pa kiangah, “Ka nung hong zui to in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Israel-teʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:13 Tua ciangin Jonathan a khut le a khe tawh kah to-in a galhiam pua pa a nungah pai hi. Jonathan in amaute vattuk a, a galhiam pua pa in ama nungah amaute that hi." 
1Samuel14:14 Jonathan le a galhiam pua pa in a mi thah masak tungin lo ekah khat dung zui-in lo kaihna kuak dung tawn lang tan sungah mihing sawm nih bang si hi. 
1Samuel14:15 Tua ciangin giahphual sung, gam sung le mite lakah apkhapna om hi. Khuacingte le galsimte nangawn liing uh hi. Zin liing a, buaina lianpi mahmah khat hong suak hi." 
1Samuel14:16 Benjamin-teʼ gam sunga Gibeah-a Saulʼ galvilte in a et uh ciangin hih lam hua lamah mihonte a kikhiin muaimuai a mu uh hi. 
1Samuel14:17 Tua ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om khawm mite kiangah, “Mi sim unla, eite kiang panin kua paikhia hiam thei un,” a ci hi. Amaute in mi a sim khit uh ciangin, Jonathan le a galhiam pua pa na om lo hi." 
1Samuel14:18 Tua ciangin Saul in Ahijah kiangah, “Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hih lai ah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua hun laitakin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Israel mite tawh pai hi." 
1Samuel14:19 Saul in siampipa a hopih laitakin Filistia-teʼ giahphual a buaina hong lian semsem hi. Tua ciangin Saul in siampipa kiangah, “Tua Thuciamna Singkuang lenin Topa thu dot ding hun om nawn lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:20 Tua ciangin Saul le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh kikhawmin gal phualah pai uh hi. A galte khempeuhʼ namsau in amauʼ lawmte mah hih ciat a, kitawhnawina lianpi khat na om hi." 
1Samuel14:21 Tu-in tua hun ma-in Filistia-te tawh om khawm khinin giahphual ah amaute tawh a pai khin sa Hebru mite nangawn Saul le Jonathan tawh a om khawm Israel-te tawh a kipawl dingin kihei uh hi. 
1Samuel14:22 Tua mah bangin, Filistia-te a taina thu Efraim mual tung gamah a bu Israel mite khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin amaute in zong gal phualah nakpi takin a nung delh uh hi." 
1Samuel14:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel-te tua ni-in hon khia a, gal kidona in Bethaven a kheng hi." 
1Samuel14:24 Israel mite tua ni-in lungkham uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Saul in mite tungah kiciamna khat koih a, “Tu nitak mateng le ka galte ka thuk zawh matengin an a ne pa in samsiatna ngah tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite khat beek in an ciam lo uh hi." 
1Samuel14:25 Mi khempeuh tulak a tun uh ciangin mun citeng ah khuaizu na om hi. 
1Samuel14:26 Mite tulak a lut uh ciangin, a khuaizu taak a, ahih hangin kuamah in ciam ngam vet lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in tua kiciamna kihta uh hi." 
1Samuel14:27 Ahih hangin a pa in kiciamna tawh mite a thuhilhna Jonathan in za lo ahih ciangin amah in a khut sunga om a ciangkhut dawn dawksakin khuaizu sungah diahin a ne hi. Tua ciangin a tha hatkik hi. 
1Samuel14:28 Tua ciangin mite khat in, “Na pa in kiciamna khat tawh nakpi takin mite thuhilh a, ‘Tu ni-in an a ne mipa in samsiatna ngah tahen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Mite gim mahmah uh hi." 
1Samuel14:29 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “Ka pa in gam sung nawngkaisak hi; hih khuaizu tawmno khat ka ciapna hangin ka tha a hatkikna mu un." 
1Samuel14:30 Mite in tu ni-in a ututun amauʼ muh sa galteʼ an kinusiate ne leh bangzah takin hoih zaw ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh tu-in Filistia-te i thah tam zo nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:31 Amaute in tua ni-in Mikmash panin Aijalon ciang dong Filistia-te sat tuk uh hi. Tua ciangin mite gim mahmah uh hi. 
1Samuel14:32 Van kinusiate tungah mite va leengin, tuu le bawngtal le bawngnote a tuahtuahna munah go uh a, mite in tuate a si tawh a ne uh hi." 
1Samuel14:33 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah thu kiko a, “A si tawh sa nekna hangin Topaʼ tungah mite khial uh hi,” kici hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Na zuau gamtat khin uh hi; suangtum lian khat hih lai kei kiangah hong khuk dih un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:34 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Mite lakah note pai-in amaute kiangah, ‘Mi khempeuh in a bawngtal ahi a, a tuu ahi zongin hih lai ah hong paipihin go unla, a sa ne un; a si tawh nekna hangin Topaʼ tungah khial kei un,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh in tua zanin a bawngtalte uh hong paipihin tua munah go uh hi." 
1Samuel14:35 Tua ciangin Saul in Topa ading biakna tau khat lam hi. Tua pen Topa adingin a lam masak biakna tau ahi hi. 
1Samuel14:36 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Filistia-te kiangah zanin pai sukin zingsang khuavak dong amaute va su gawp ni; amaute mi khat zong siit kei ni,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hoih na sak peuhpeuh hih in,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin siampipa in, “Hih lai ah Pasian kiang nai ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:37 Tua ciangin Saul in Pasian kiangah thu dong a, “Filistia-te kiangah ka pai suk ding hiam? Israel-teʼ khut sungah amaute nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tua ni-in amah in dawng lo hi." 
1Samuel14:38 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Mi a makaite khempeuh aw, hih lai ah hong pai un; hih mawhna tu ni-in hong pianna thei unla mu un." 
1Samuel14:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te a hon khia Topa a nuntak mah bangin, ka tapa Jonathanʼ tungah tua mawhna a om leh zong, amah a si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin mite lak panin amah a dawng ngam mi khat zong om lo hi." 
1Samuel14:40 Tua ciangin amah in Israel-te khempeuh tungah, “Note lang khat ah na om ding uh a, kei le ka tapa Jonathan a lang khat ah ka om ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “Hoih na sak bangin hih in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel14:41 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in, “Israel-teʼ Pasian Topa aw, bang hangin tu ni-in na nasem pa hong dawng lo na hi hiam? Hih mawhna kei tung ahi a, ka tapa Jonathanʼ tungah ahi zongin a om leh, Israel-teʼ Pasian Topa aw, Urim hong pia in; ahih hangin hih mawhna na mi Israel-te tungah om ahihleh Thummim hong pia in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan le Saul kila a, a midangte suakta hi." 
1Samuel14:42 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Kei le ka tapa Jonathan kikalah ai san un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jonathan kila hi." 
1Samuel14:43 Tua ciangin Saul in Jonathan kiangah, “Na gamtatna sa hong gen in,” a ci hi. Jonathan in ama kiangah gen a, “Ka khut sunga om ciangkhut dawn tawh khuaizu tawm khat ka ciam hi. Hih lai ah ka om hi; kei a si dingin ka kiging hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel14:44 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Nang na sih taktak kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen, Jonathan aw,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
1Samuel14:45 Tua ciangin mite in Saul kiangah, “Israel-te sungah hih gualzawhna lian a piangsak Jonathan si ding ahi hiam? Hi dek peuhmah lo ding! Topa a nuntak mah bangin, a lu tunga samzang khat zong leilak ah kia lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Pasian tawh tu ni-in tua thu piangsak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in Jonathan hon khia uh a, amah si lo hi." 
1Samuel14:46 Tua ciangin Filistia-te a delhna panin Saul khawl a, Filistia-te zong amauʼ munah a ciah uh hi." 
1Samuel14:47 Saul, Israel-te tungah kumpi a suah khit ciangin mun khempeuh a ama galte khempeuh, Moab-te, Ammon-te, Edom-te, Zobah kumpite le Filistia-te a do hi. A galsimna peuhpeuh ah amah gualzo tawntung hi." 
1Samuel14:48 Amah in hang takin hihin Amalek-te vat gawp a, amaute a su gawp miteʼ khut sung panin Israel-te a hon khia hi." 
1Samuel14:49 Tu-in Saulʼ tapate pen Jonathan, Ishvi le Malkhishua hi a, a tanu nihte: a u zaw min Merab hi a, a nau zawʼ min Mikhal hi a," 
1Samuel14:50 Saulʼ zi min Ahinoam hi a, Ahimaazʼ tanu ahi hi. A galkap mangpaʼ min Abner hi a, Saulʼ pano Nerʼ tapa ahi hi." 
1Samuel14:51 Saulʼ pa Kish le Abnerʼ pa Ner pen Abielʼ tapate ahi uh hi. 
1Samuel14:52 Saulʼ nuntak sung khempeuh Filistia-te tawh nakpi tak a kidona om hi. Saul in, mi thahat khat peuhpeuh ahi a, mi hang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a muh ciangin, tua mipa ama galkap dingin pawlbawl pahpah hi." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuel in Saul kiangah, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang sathau a nilh dingin kei hong sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topaʼ thugen ngai in." 
1Samuel15:2 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute Egypt panin hong paikhiat lai-in amaute in lampi ah Israel-te a nialna uh hangin Amalek mite gim ka pia ding hi. 
1Samuel15:3 Tu-in pai-in Amalek mite vat gawp unla, amauteʼ neih khempeuh susia mangkhin un. Amaute siit loin, numei le pasal, naupang le nawine laite, bawngtal le tuu, kalaoh le la, that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:4 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in Israel mite sam a, Telaim ah khe galkap mi tul za nih le Judah mi tul sawm kaikhawm hi." 
1Samuel15:5 Tua ciangin Amalek khuapi ah Saul hong pai-in kuam sungah pangsim hi. 
1Samuel15:6 Tua ciangin Saul in Ken mite kiangah, “Pai un; kihem khia un. Amalek mite lak panin paikhia suk un. Tua hikeileh amaute tawh note kong susia khawm kha ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin Israel-te hong paikhiat lai-in amaute khempeuh tungah migitna na lak uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Amalek mite lak panin Ken mite kihem khia uh hi." 
1Samuel15:7 Tua ciangin Saul in Havilah panin Egypt nisuahna lam a om Shur ciang dong Amalek-te zo hi. 
1Samuel15:8 Amah in Amalek-teʼ kumpipa Agag a hingin man a, mi khempeuh namsau tawh that mang hi." 
1Samuel15:9 Ahih hangin Saul le mite in Agag le a hoih pen tuute, bawngtalte, gannote, tuunote le a hoih khempeuh khawi uh a, tuate that mangkhin lo uh hi. A kisimmawh bangmah a man lo khempeuh amaute in that mang uh hi." 
1Samuel15:10 Topaʼ thu Samuel tungah hong tung hi: 
1Samuel15:11 “Kumpi-in Saul ka koih ka kisik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen keimah zuihna panin kiheikik a, ka thupiaknate sem lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel heh hi; zan tawntung Topaʼ tungah kiko hi." 
1Samuel15:12 Tua ciangin Saul a dawn dingin zingsangin Samuel tho baih hi. Samuel kiangah, “Karmel ah Saul hong pai hi. Amah in ama adingin phawkna mual khat phutin, kihei-in paisuak a, Gilgal ah pai suk hi,” kici hi." 
1Samuel15:13 Tua ciangin Samuel hong pai a, Saul in ama kiangah, “ Topaʼ thupha na tungah hong tung hen. Topaʼ thupiakna ka sem khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:14 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Tua ahihleh ka bil a tuu hamna le ka zak bawngtalteʼ hamna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:15 Saul in, “Amaute in Amalek-te kiang panin tuate hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian tungah biakna piak nadingin a limci pen tuute le bawngtalte mite in siit uh a, a dangte ka that mangkhin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:16 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Khawl in! Topa in tu zanin kei kiangah hong gen thu nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in Samuel kiangah, “Hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:17 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Nang na kineu ngaihsut hun a om hangin, tu-in nang pen Israel minamteʼ lutang hi lo na hi hiam? Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilh hi." 
1Samuel15:18 Topa in nasem dingin nang hong sawl a, ‘Pai in; mawhnei Amalek mite va susia mang inla, amaute a bei mateng va sim gawp in,’ hong ci hi." 
1Samuel15:19 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topaʼ thu mang lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin van kinusiate bawhin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel15:20 Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Keimah in Topaʼ thu ka mang a, Topa in hong sawl nasepna ah pai khinin, Amalek kumpipa Agag kong ciahpih khin a, Amalek mite ka susia mangkhin hi." 
1Samuel15:21 Ahih hangin mite in a kinusiate, tuute le bawngtalte, suksiat dinga a ki-ap na hoih pente Gilgal ah Topa na Pasian piak dingin la uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:22 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa in meihal biaknate le biakpiaknate Topaʼ thu man ding zahin deih ahi hiam? En in, biakpiakna sangin thu man ding hoih zaw a, tuutal thaute sangin thu ngaih ding hoih zaw hi." 
1Samuel15:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh lehdona pen ai san mawhna bangmah hi a, lungkhauhna pen mawhna le milim biakna mah a bang ahi hi. Nangmah in Topaʼ thu nial khin na hih manin, amah in zong kumpi hihna pan nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:24 Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Ka khial khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in mite kihta-in amauʼ thu mang kha ka hih manin Topaʼ thupiakna le nangma thute ka palsat khin hi." 
1Samuel15:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi; ka khialhna hong maisak inla, Topa ka biak theih nadingin kei hong leh zuihkik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:26 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Nang tawh kong kilehkik kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topaʼ thu na nial khin a, Israel-teʼ tungah kumpi hihna panin Topa in nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:27 A paikhia dingin Samuel a kihei laitakin Saul in a puan tualpi mongin len a, a puan kikeek hi." 
1Samuel15:28 Tua ciangin Samuel in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Israel-teʼ kumpi gam nangʼ tung panin tu ni-in bal khia-in nang sangin a hoih zaw na veengpa tungah pia khin hi." 
1Samuel15:29 Israel-teʼ minthang Pasian in zong zuaugen lo dinga, zong kisik lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a kisik dingin amah mi hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:30 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka khial khin hi; ahi zongin tu-in keima mi upate mai le Israel-teʼ mai ah kei hong pahtawi inla, Topa na Pasian ka biak theih nadingin kei hong zuikik in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:31 Tua ahih ciangin Saulʼ nung zui-in Samuel kilehkik a, Saul in Topa a bia hi." 
1Samuel15:32 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Amalek-teʼ kumpi Agag hih lai ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Agag launa linna tawh ama kiangah hong pai hi. Agag in, “Sih ding lungkhamna hong tung taktak ta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel15:33 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Na namsau in nute ta bei-in a bawl mah bangin na nu zong ta bei hi ta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Topaʼ mai Gilgal ah Agag a semnen hi." 
1Samuel15:34 Tua ciangin Ramah ah Samuel pai a, Gibeah-a a inn ah Saul zong a ciah to hi." 
1Samuel15:35 Samuel in ama sih ni dong Saul mukik lo a, ahih hangin Saulʼ hangin Samuel a dah hi. Israel-te tungah kumpi-in Saul a koih manin Topa kisik hi." 
1Samuel16:1 Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Israel-te tungah kumpi hihna panin amah ka nolh khitna mu napi-in Saulʼ hangin bang tanvei dah ding na hi hiam? Na sathau biing ah sathau thun inla, pai in; Bethlehem mi Jessi kiangah kong sawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama tapate lak panin keima-aʼ ding kumpi khat ka la khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuel in, “Bangci pai theih ding ka hi hiam? Saul in za le amah in kei hong that ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Bawngla khat paipih inla, ‘ Topaʼ tungah biakna pia dingin kong pai hi,’ ci in." 
1Samuel16:3 Biakpiakna ah Jessi sam in. Na hih ding teng na tungah kong lak dinga, nang tungah a min kong gen pa sathau nong nilhsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:4 Topaʼ thupiak bangin Samuel gamta-in Bethlehem ah a pai hi. Tua khuapi upate a liing sa-in amah a dawn dingin hong pai uh a, “Thuhoih a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:5 Amah in, “Thuhoih hi; Topaʼ tungah biakna a pia dingin kong pai hi. Note ki-ap unla, biakpiakna ah kei tawh hong pai un,” a ci hi. Amah in Jessi le a tapate apin, biakpiakna ah amaute a sam hi." 
1Samuel16:6 Amaute hong tun ciangin amah in Jessiʼ tapa Eliab enin, “ Topaʼ sathau nilh pa ama mai ah om taktak hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel16:7 Ahih hangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “A tungtham hitaleh a tun sanna hitaleh en kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ka nolh hi. Topa in mihingteʼ muh bangin mu lo hi. Mihingte in a pualam a kilangte en a, ahih hangin Topa in a lungsim en hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:8 Tua ciangin Jessi in a tapa Abinadab samin Samuel mai ah a paisak hi. Amah in, “ Topa in hih pa zong teel lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:9 Tua ciangin Jessi in Shammah paisak hi. Amah in, “ Topa in hih pa zong teel lo hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
1Samuel16:10 Jessi in a tapate a sagihna dongin Samuel mai ah paisak hi. Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “ Topa in hih mite teel lo hi,” a ci leuleu hi." 
1Samuel16:11 Tua ciangin Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “Na tapate khempeuh hih lai ah a omkim mah ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Jessi in, “A nautum pen om lai a, ahih hangin amah tuu cingin om hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Jessi kiangah, “Hih lai ah amah hong tun mateng eite in bangmah dang i hih thei kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:12 Amah in David samsakin amah hong tumpih hi. Amah in cidam mel pua-in, a mitte hoih a, a mel hoih hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ding in; amah sathau nilh in; hih pa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:13 Tua ciangin Samuel in a sathau biing sunga sathau la-in a sanggamte laizang ah amah sathau a nilh hi. Tua ni a kipanin Topaʼ kha in khauh takin David hong uk hi. Tua ciangin Samuel dingin Ramah ah a ciah hi. 
1Samuel16:14 Tu-in Saulʼ tung panin Topaʼ kha paikhia a, Topa in kha gilo sawlin tua kha gilo in amah gimsak hi." 
1Samuel16:15 Saulʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Tu-in en in, Pasianʼ hong sawl kha gilo in nang hong gimsak hi." 
1Samuel16:16 Tu-in na mai-a om nasemte in laiza lasakna a tumsiam mi khat a zon nadingin ka topa un na nasemte thu pia in. Pasianʼ hong sawl kha gilo na tungah hong tun ciangin amah in tua hong tum dinga, tua ciangin na ci hong dam ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel16:17 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a nasemte kiangah, “Limtakin a tum thei khat kei adingin hong zong unla, ka kiangah amah hong paipih un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:18 Tangvalte khat in dawngin, “En un, Bethlehem mi Jessiʼ tapa, a tumsiam, a thahat, a galhang mi, thugen a siam, a om nuam mi khat ka mu a, Topa in amah a ompih mi khat ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:19 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in Jessi kiangah kamtaite sawl a, “Na tapa David, tuute tawh a om pa, keiʼ kiangah hong sawl in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel16:20 Tua ciangin Jessi in anlum, leenggahzu savun thawl khat le keel no khat a pua ding la khat la-in, Saul kiangah tuate a tapa David puaksak hi." 
1Samuel16:21 Saul kiangah David hong tunga, ama nasepna ah a lut hi. Saul in amah nakpi takin it a, amah pen a galhiam pua pa a suak hi." 
1Samuel16:22 Saul in Jessi kiangah mi sawlin, “Keima nasepna ah David hong omsak in. Amah ka pahtak mahmah mi khat ahi hi,” cisak hi." 
1Samuel16:23 Pasianʼ sawl kha gilo Saulʼ tungah a om peuhmah ciangin David in a laiza la-in a khut tawh tum ahih ciangin Saul thaksuakin a ci dam a, ama kiang panin kha gilo kihem khia hi." 
1Samuel17:1 Tu-in Filistia-te in galsim dingin a galkapte uh khawmin Judah gam Sokoh ah amaute kituah uh a, Sokoh le Azekah kikal Efesdammim ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel17:2 Tua ciangin Saul le Israel mite kikhawmin Elah kuamah giahphual sat uh a, Filistia-te a do dingin kithawi uh hi." 
1Samuel17:3 Filistia-te a gal mual tungah ding uh a, Israel-te a gal khat mual tungah dingin, amauteʼ kikalah kuam khat om hi." 
1Samuel17:4 Filistia-teʼ giahphual panin Gath khuami Goliath a kici a makai, a tun pi kua val a sang mi khat hong paikhia hi." 
1Samuel17:5 Amah in a lu tungah sumngo sik lukhu khu-in, sik puan tawh amah kithawi a, a puan gihna sumngo shekel tul nga ahi hi." 
1Samuel17:6 Amah in a khete tungah sumngo ngaltuam bulh a, a liangko ah sumngo teipi khawh kikhai hi." 
1Samuel17:7 A teibul siamlawngpi cia bang pha a, a teipak sik shekel za guk gik a, ama mai ah a lum pua pa a pai hi." 
1Samuel17:8 Amah dingin Israel uliante ot sanin, “Galdo dingin bang hangin hong kuan khia ngam na hi uh hiam? Kei, Filistia mi hi-in, note, Saulʼ nasemte hi lo na hi uh hiam? Note adingin mi khat teel unla, tua mipa kei kiangah hong paisuksak un." 
1Samuel17:9 Amah in kei hong do-in hong thah zawh leh kote na nasemte ka hi ding uh a, ahih hangin keimah in amah zo-in ka thah leh note, komauʼ nasem na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:10 Tua ciangin tua Filistia mipa in, “Tu ni-in Israel uliante kong to hi. I kido theih nadingin mi khat hong pia un,” ci thuah lai hi." 
1Samuel17:11 Saul le Israel-te khempeuh in Filistia mipaʼ kammalte a zak uh ciangin amaute lungkia-in nakpi takin a lau uh hi. 
1Samuel17:12 David pen Judah gam Bethlehem khua-a om Efrathah mi, tapa giat a nei Jessi min a nei paʼ tapa ahi hi. Saulʼ hun lai-in tua mipa teek zo-in kum tampi pha ta hi." 
1Samuel17:13 Jessiʼ tapa a u pen thumte in galdona ah Saul zui khin uh hi. Gal sungah a pai a tapa thumteʼ min pen, a ta upa Eliab, ama zomah Abinadab le a thumna Shammah ahi hi." 
1Samuel17:14 David, a nautum pen hi a, a upa pen thumte in Saul zui a," 
1Samuel17:15 ahih hangin Bethlehem a om a paʼ tuute a vak dingin Saulʼ kiang panin David ciah zelzel hi. 
1Samuel17:16 Ni sawm li sung zing le nitakin Filistia-pa hong pai-in hong ding zelzel hi. 
1Samuel17:17 Tua ciangin Jessi in a tapa kiangah, “Hih ankan seu khat le hih anlum sawm na ute puak dingin guang inla, na ute kiang giahphual ah manlangin va puak inla," 
1Samuel17:18 a tul a ukpa kiangah zong hih sathaukhal sawmte puak in. Na uteʼ om dan va mu inla, amauʼ om zia a kitheihna lim pawl khat hong ciahpih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:19 Tua laitakin Filistia-te tawh kido-in Saul le amaute le Israel mite khempeuh, Elah kuamah om uh hi." 
1Samuel17:20 Tua ciangin Jessi in a thupiak bangin zingsangin David tho baihin, a kem ding midang khat tawh a tuute nusia a, a ante pua-in a pai hi. Mihonte giahphual ah pai-in galdo kikona a ot laitakun amah giahphual va tung hi." 
1Samuel17:21 Israel-te le Filistia-te, galkap le galkap a kido dingin kinaih uh hi." 
1Samuel17:22 David in van cing paʼ khut sungah a nate nusia-in galkapte kiangah va tai a, pai-in a ute va hopih hi." 
1Samuel17:23 Amaute tawh a kiho laitakin, Gath khuami Filistia-te a makaipi Goliath min nei pa, Filistia uliante lak panin hong pai khia-in a masa-a mah bangin kam hong pau hi. David in ama kampau a za hi." 
1Samuel17:24 Israel mite khempeuh in tua mipa a muh uh ciangin ama kiang panin tai khia uh a, lau mahmah uh hi." 
1Samuel17:25 Israel mite khatlekhat kiho-in, “Hih hong paikhia mipa na mu ngei uh hiam? Israel-te a to dingin hong pai to takpi hi. Amah a that mipa tungah kumpipa in sum tampi pia-in, ama tanu zong pia dinga, a paʼ innkuante, Israel sungah aana nasep le siah khempeuh kipengsak ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel17:26 David in ama kiang a ding mite kiangah, “Hih Filistia-pa thatin Israel-teʼ tung panin hih mindaina a beisak pa adingin bang kihih ding ahi hiam? A nungta Pasianʼ galkapte a to dingin hih dawibia Filistia-pa kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:27 Mite in a kibang mahin dawng uh a, “Amah a that mipa tungah tua bang tua bangin kihih ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel17:28 David in mite kiangah thu a gen laitakin ama u a u pen Eliab in a za hi. David tungah Eliab heh mahmah ahih manin, “Bang hangin hong pai suk na hi hiam? Tua tuu tawmkhatte gamlak ah kua tawh nusia na hi hiam? Na kihaimuanna le na lungsim gitlohna ka thei hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gal kidona a en dingin nong pai suk hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:29 David in, “Bang hih ka hi hiam? Kam bek hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:30 Tua ciangin ama kiang panin midang khat kiangah kihei-in a kibang mahin thu dong a, mite in a masa-a mah bangin amah dawngkik uh hi." 
1Samuel17:31 Davidʼ kampaute a kizak ciangin amaute in Saul kiangah gen uh a, Saul in amah samsak hi." 
1Samuel17:32 Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Ama hangin kuamah lungkiasak kei in. Na nasem pa pai-in hih Filistia-pa tawh ka va kido ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:33 Saul in David kiangah, “Hih Filistia-pa tawh a kido dingin ama lang khat ah na kuan zo kei ding hi. Nang pen tangval na hi pan a, amah pen a tangval a kipan galkap mi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:34 Ahih hangin David in Saul kiangah, “Na nasem pa in a paʼ tuute a kem zel hi. Humpinelkai ahi a, vom ahi zongin hong pai-in tuute lak panin tuuno a mat ciangin," 
1Samuel17:35 a nungah delhin vat gawpin a kam sung panin tuuno ka hon khia hi. Kei hong hih dingin amah hong ding leh keimah in a ngawngin manin vat gawpin ka that hi. 
1Samuel17:36 Na nasem pa in humpinelkai le vomte that khin ngei hi. Amah in a nungta Pasianʼ galkapte ninsak ahih manin dawibia hih Filistia-pa pen tuate khat tawh kibang lel ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:37 Tua ciangin David in, “Humpinelkai khecin le vom khecin panin kei a hong hon khia Topa in hih Filistia-paʼ khut sung panin zong kei hong hon khia ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi. Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Pai in; Topa in nang hong ompih tahen!” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:38 Tua ciangin Saul in a galvante David pia a, amah in a lu tungah sumngo lukhu khusakin, sik puan silhsak hi." 
1Samuel17:39 Tua ciangin David in a galdalnate tungah a namsau khih a, amah kingeina seh lo ahih manin lam pai dingin a kithawi leh pai thei lo hi. Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Hihte tawh lam ka pai thei kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka kingeina seh kei hi,” a ci hi. David in tuate suah khia hi." 
1Samuel17:40 Tua ciangin amah in a khut ah a ciangkhut tawi-in, lui panin suangmai tang nga tengin a tuucin thungip sungah tuate koih hi. A khut sungah a suanglotna tawi a, Filistia-paʼ nai ah a pai hi." 
1Samuel17:41 Tua ciangin a mai ah a lum pua pa tawh Filistia-pa hong pai-in David hong naih hi. 
1Samuel17:42 Filistia-pa khuadakin David a muh ciangin amah in simmawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a tangval pan, a cidam tuak, a melhoih khat hi lel hi." 
1Samuel17:43 Tua ciangin Filistia-pa in David kiangah, “Ui hong sa a, ciangkang tawh sat hong sawm na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Filistia-pa in a pasian-teʼ min tawh David samsia hi." 
1Samuel17:44 Filistia-pa in David kiangah, “Ka kiangah hong pai in. Huih lak vasate le gamlak gamsate tungah na sa ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:45 Tua ciangin David in Filistia-pa kiangah, “Namsau, teipi le teikhawh tawh kei kiangah nang nong kuan hi. Ahih hangin kei pen Israel galkapteʼ Pasian, a Vanglian Topa, nangmah in na to mipaʼ min tawh nang kiangah kong kuan hi." 
1Samuel17:46 Tu ni-in Topa in ka khut sungah nang hong pia dinga, keimah in nang hong sattukin na lu ka tan khia ding hi. Tua ciangin tu ni-in huihlak vasate le leitung ganhingte tungah Filistia mi a siteʼ luanghawmte ka pia ding hi. Israel sungah Pasian khat a om lam leitung mi khempeuh in a theih nading," 
1Samuel17:47 le Topa in namsau le teipi tawh a hotkhiat lohna thu hih lai-a a om khempeuh in a theih nading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh galdona pen Topa aʼ hi a, amah in koteʼ khut sungah note hong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:48 David tawh a kituah dingin Filistia-pa dingin hong pai a, hong nai ciangin David zong Filistia-pa tawh a kituah dingin gal mai ah a delh hi." 
1Samuel17:49 Tua ciangin David in a khutin a thungip sawkin suangtang khat la a, a kap leh Filistia-paʼ taltang a kha hi. A taltang ah a suangtang tum a, leilak ah amah maipuk hi." 
1Samuel17:50 Tua ahih ciangin David in suanglotna khat le suangtang khat tawh Filistia-pa zo-in a that hi. Davidʼ khut sungah namsau om lo hi. 
1Samuel17:51 Tua ciangin David tai-in ama tungah dinga, Filistia-paʼ namsau mah a paai panin dok a, amah thatin tua tawh a lu a tan khia hi. Filistia-te in a makai pa uh a sihna a theih uh ciangin a taikeek uh hi." 
1Samuel17:52 Tua ciangin Israel-te le Judah-te awngin ding uh a, Gath le Ekron kulh kongpi ciang dong Filistia-te delh uh ahih manin Shaarim panin Gath le Ekron ciang dong Filistia mi a liamte puk uh hi." 
1Samuel17:53 Tua ciangin Filistia-te a delhna panun Israel-te hong ciahkik uh a, amaute in a giahphual uh luhsak uh hi." 
1Samuel17:54 David in Filistia-paʼ lutang la-in Jerusalem ah paipih a, ahih hangin a galvan teng ama puanbuk ah a koih hi." 
1Samuel17:55 Filistia-pa do-in David a kuan khiatna Saul in a muh ciangin galkap mangpa Abner kiangah, “Abner aw, hih tangvalpa kuaʼ tapa ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Abner in, “Kumpipa aw, ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:56 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tangvalpa kuaʼ tapa ahi hiam, kan in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel17:57 Filistia-pa a thahna panin David hong ciah ciangin Abner in amah samin a khut sunga Filistia-paʼ lutang tawh Saulʼ mai ah a paipih hi. 
1Samuel17:58 Saul in ama kiangah, “Tangvalpa aw, kuaʼ tapa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. David in dawngin, “Bethlehem khuami na nasem pa Jessiʼ tapa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:1 David le Saul a kiho khit a kipanin Saulʼ tapa Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David a it hi. 
1Samuel18:2 Saul in tua ni a kipanin ama kiangah David omsak a, a paʼ inn ah ciahsak lo hi." 
1Samuel18:3 Jonathan in ama pumpi zahin David it ahih manin amah tawh thuciamna khat a bawl hi. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonathan in ama silh lai a puan tualpi suahin David pia a, a gal kidalna le a namsau nangawn le a thal le a kawnggak zong a pia hi." 
1Samuel18:5 Saul in a sawlna mun khempeuh ah David in a maa tun hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in galkapte a uk dingin amah a koih hi. Mi khempeuh le Saulʼ nasemte in zong hih thu hoih a sa uh hi. 
1Samuel18:6 Filistia-pa a thahna panin David ciahin, amaute in inn lam a zuat uh ciangin Israel khuapi khempeuh sung panin kumpi Saul a dawn dingin khuangtung le lasaknate tawi-in numeite a laam kawmin hong kuan khia uh hi." 
1Samuel18:7 Amaute gualnuamin numeite khatlekhat in, “Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,” kici uh hi." 
1Samuel18:8 Saul heh mahmah a, hih thugenna in amah lungkim losak hi. Amah in, “Amaute in David tungah a tul sawmin pia-in, kei tungah a tulin hong pia bek uh hi. Kumpi min puak cih sim loh bang dang nei nawn ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:9 Tua ni a kipan Saul in David encik hi. 
1Samuel18:10 A zing ciangin Pasianʼ sawl kha gilo in Saul hong bawh a, nisimin David in a hih ngei bangin laiza lasakna a tum laitakin ama inn sung tengah Saul hang gawp hi. Saul in a khut sungah a teipi tawi hi." 
1Samuel18:11 Saul in a teipi-in David nih vei a khawh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kawm tawh David ka khawhcip ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin David in a nih vei mahin na pelh thei hi." 
1Samuel18:12 Saul in David kihta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih a, ahih hangin Saul kiang panin amah kihem khia khinta hi." 
1Samuel18:13 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a omna panin David la khia-in mihing tul khat a ukin koih a, mite a makai-in amah kuan khia-in hong ciah hi." 
1Samuel18:14 David in a sepna khempeuh ah a maa tun hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah ompih hi. 
1Samuel18:15 Amah in matut zawhna lianpi a neih lam Saul in a muh ciangin amah lamdang sa-in om hi. 
1Samuel18:16 Ahih hangin Israel-te khempeuh le Judah-te khempeuh in David it uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute makaihin amah kuan khia-in hong ciah hi. 
1Samuel18:17 Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Hih lai ah ka tanu u zaw Merab om hi. Nang tungah zi dingin kong pia ding hi. Kei adingin hang peuh inla, Topaʼ gal do in,” a ci hi.
