Bang hang hiam cih leh Saul in, “Keima khut sungah amah si loin Filistia-teʼ khut sungah si hen,” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel18:18 David in Saul kiangah, “Kei pen kumpipaʼ makpa ka hih nadingin kei, bang hi a, Israel-te tungah ka tanaute, ka paʼ innkuante bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:19 Ahih hangin Davidʼ tungah Saulʼ tanu Merab a kipiak ding laitakin Meholah mi Adriel tungah a zi dingin kipia hi. 
1Samuel18:20 Tu-in Saulʼ tanu Mikhal in David ngai hi. Saul kiangah hih thu a kigen ciangin Saul a lungdam hi. 
1Samuel18:21 Saul in, “Ama adingin ka tanu pen thangzak ahih theih nading le Filistia-teʼ khut sungah a sih theih nadingin ama tungah ka tanu pia ning,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in David kiangah a nih veina genin, “Nang pen tu-in ka makpa na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:22 Saul in a nasemte thu pia a, “David kiangah thu tuam genpih unla, ‘En in, nang tungah kumpipa lungkim a, ama nasemte khempeuh in nang hong it hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kumpipaʼ makpa suak in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:23 Saulʼ nasemte in David kiangah hih thute gen uh hi. David in, “Kei pen mizawng hi-in a zahtakhuai lo ka hihna mu napi-in kumpipaʼ makpa suah ding a thuneu sa na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel18:24 Tua ciangin Saulʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin David in gen hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel18:25 Tua ciangin Saul in, “David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding uh hi: ‘Kumpipa in a galte a thukkik theih nadingin Filistia-teʼ zangvun teep za khat cih sim loh kumpipa in moman deih lo hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tu-in Saul in Filistia-teʼ khut tawh David sihsak ding ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel18:26 Saulʼ nasemte in David kiangah hih thute a gen uh ciangin kumpipaʼ makpa ahih ding David a lungkim hi. A hun a bei ma-in," 
1Samuel18:27 David dingin ama mite tawh pai a, Filistia mi za nih that hi. Tua ciangin amah kumpipaʼ makpa a suah theih nadingin kumpipa tungah a cingin a kipia amauteʼ zangvun teepte David in hong paipih hi. Saul in a tanu Mikhal ama zi dingin a pia hi." 
1Samuel18:28 Ahih hangin Topa in David a ompihna le Israel-te khempeuh in amah a itna thu Saul in a muh ciangin 
1Samuel18:29 David a kihta semsem hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul pen Davidʼ gal hi tawntung hi. 
1Samuel18:30 Tua ciangin Filistia mi uliante galsim dingin hong kuan khia uh a, amaute hong kuan khiat simin Saulʼ nasem dangte khempeuh sangin David in a maa tun zaw hi. Tua ahih manin mite in David thupi muh semsem hi." 
1Samuel19:1 Tua ciangin Saul in David thah ding a ngaihsutna thu a tapa Jonathan le a nuai-a ulian khempeuh kiangah a gen hi. Ahih hangin Saulʼ tapa Jonathan in David diksa mahmah hi. 
1Samuel19:2 Jonathan in David kiangah, “Ka pa Saul in nang thah hong sawm hi. Tua ahih ciangin zingsang ciangin kidawm inla, mun simtham khat ah omin bu in." 
1Samuel19:3 Kei pai khia-in nangma bukna phual nai ah ka pa kiangah ka ding dinga, nangma thu ka pa kiangah ka gen ding hi. Ama tung panin phawk ka neih leh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:4 Jonathan in a pa Saul kiangah Davidʼ thu a hoihin genin ama kiangah, “Kumpipa, a nasem pa David tungah khial kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah amah hong khial lo a, ama nasepnate nang adingin nasep hoih ahi hi." 
1Samuel19:5 Amah in a nuntakna pia ngamin Filistia-pa that a, Topa in Israel-te khempeuh adingin gualzawhna lianpi piangsak hi. Nangmah in hih thu na mu a, na lung a dam hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin thu om lopi-in David thahna tawh a mawhbaang lo mipa tungah khial ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:6 Saul in Jonathanʼ thu mang hi. Saul kiciam a, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin amah kithat lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:7 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David samin, Jonathan in hih thute khempeuh ama tungah lak hi. Jonathan in Saul kiangah David paipih a, a nidang a mah bangin ama sepna ngei ah a sem hi." 
1Samuel19:8 Tua ciangin gal hong omkik hi. David kuan khia-in Filistia-te tawh kido a, amaute tampi tak that a, ama mai ah amaute a tai uh hi." 
1Samuel19:9 Tua ciangin a khut sungah a teipi tawi-in a inn sungah a tut laitakin Topaʼ sawl kha gilo Saulʼ tungah hong tung hi. David in a laiza lasakna tum hi. 
1Samuel19:10 Saul in a teipi-in kawm tawh David khawhcip dingin khawh a, ahih hangin amah in na pelh a, kawm tungah a teipi kiphut hi. Tua ciangin David tai-in a suakta hi." 
1Samuel19:11 A zingsang ciangin amah a thah theih nadingin tua zanin Saul in amah a vil dingin Davidʼ inn ah mi sawl hi. Ahih hangin Davidʼ zi Mikhal in ama kiangah, “Tu zanin na nuntakna na suahtak kei leh, zing ciangin nang hong kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:12 Tua ahih ciangin Mikhal in tawlet ah David khia suk hi. Amah tai khia-in suakta hi. 
1Samuel19:13 Mikhal in milim khat la-in lupna tungah koih a, keel mul lukham khat a lu ah koihin puan silhsak hi." 
1Samuel19:14 Saul in David a man dingin mi a paisak ciangin amah in, “Amah a ci na hi,” na ci hi." 
1Samuel19:15 Tua ciangin Saul in David a en dingin mi sawl a, “Amah ka thah theih nadingin a lupna tawh kei kiangah amah hong pua to un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:16 A mi sawlte hong tun ciangin, keel mul lukham a lu sanah omin lupna tungah a milim na om hi." 
1Samuel19:17 Saul in Mikhal kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin kei hong khem a, amah a suahtak nadingin ka galpa khah na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Mikhal in Saul dawngin, “Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Hong paisak in; bang hangin nang hong that ding ka hi hiam?’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:18 Tu-in David tai-in suakta a, Ramah ah Samuel kiangah pai-in, ama tungah Saulʼ hihna teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin amah le Samuel pai-in Naioth ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel19:19 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah, “En in, Ramah khua sung Naioth veeng ah David om hi,” kici hi." 
1Samuel19:20 Tua ciangin David a man dingin Saul in mi sawl hi. Amaute in kamsang honte laamin awngin omin, amaute a makai-in Samuel a ding a muh uh ciangin, Saulʼ sawltakte tungah Pasianʼ kha hong tunga, amaute zong laamin a awng uh hi." 
1Samuel19:21 Hih thu Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin, amah in midang sawl leuleu a, amaute zong laamin awng leuleu uh hi. Tua ciangin Saul in mi a thum veina sawl a, amaute zong tua bangmah hi veve uh hi." 
1Samuel19:22 Tua ciangin a mahmah Ramah ah pai a, Seku-a om tuikhuk lianpi tung hi. Amah in, “Samuel le David koi ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Mi khat in, “En in, Ramah khua sung Naioth veeng ah om uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel19:23 Tua lai panin Ramah khua sung Naioth veeng ah amah pai hi. Ama tungah zong Pasianʼ kha hong tunga, Ramah khua sung Naioth veeng a tun mateng a pai kawmin laamin awng hi." 
1Samuel19:24 Amah in zong a puante suah khia-in Samuelʼ mai ah laamin awng a, tua sun tawntung le tua zan tawntung a guaktangin a om hi. Tua hun a kipanin, “Saul zong kamsang suak khin ahi hiam?” kici hi." 
1Samuel20:1 Tua ciangin Ramah khua sung Naioth veeng panin David tai-in, Jonathan kiangah hong tungin ama mai ah, “Bang hih ka hi hiam? Ka mawhna bang ahi hiam? Amah in kei thah dingin hong zon nadingin na paʼ mai ah ka khialhna bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:2 Tua ciangin amah in David kiangah, “Tua bang hi het lo ding! Na si kei ding hi. En in, ka pa in kei kiangah gen loin a lian hitaleh a neu hitaleh bangmah hih lo hi; bang hangin ka pa in kei tungah hih thu hong im ding ahi hiam? Tua bang hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:3 Ahih hangin David in dawngin, “Kei nong pahtak lam na pa in teltakin thei hi. Tua ahih manin amah in, ‘Amah dah kha ding ahih manin hih thu Jonathan theisak kei ning,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a taktakin, Topa nungta-in nang na nuntak mah bangin kei ka sih nading them khat bek in sam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:4 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Na gen peuhpeuh nang adingin kong hihsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:5 David in Jonathan kiangah, “En in, zing ciang pen Khadet ni hi a, kumpipa tawh sabuai ah pel loin ka tut ding ahi hi. Ahih hangin a ni thum ni nitak dongin lo sungah ka buk theih nadingin kei hong paisak in." 
1Samuel20:6 Na pa in kei hong kan leh, ‘David in ama khuapi Bethlehem ah a va tai pak dingin kei kiangah limtakin hong kingen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau innkuan khempeuh adingin kumsim biakpiakna tua lai ah om hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
1Samuel20:7 Amah in, ‘Pha hi!’ a cih leh na nasem pa adingin a hoih hi ding hi; ahih hangin amah a heh leh amah in siatna a ngaihsutna thei in." 
1Samuel20:8 Tua ahih ciangin thuman itna tawh na nasem pa hong bawl in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a siangtho thuciamna ah na nasem pa na tunpih hi. Ahih hangin kei sungah mawhna a om leh, nang mahmah in kei hong that in; bang hangin na pa kiangah kei hong paipih ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:9 Tua ciangin Jonathan in, “Nang tungah tua bang hi het kei hen! Ka pa in nang tungah siatna tung ding a ngaihsutna thei leng nang kiangah hong gen lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:10 Tua ciangin David in Jonathan kiangah, “Na pa in nang hong ngawh dawn leh kua in kei kiangah hong gen ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:11 Jonathan in David kiangah, “Hong pai in, lo sungah pai ni,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau tegel lo sungah a pai uh hi." 
1Samuel20:12 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa, teci hi tahen! Zing ciang tu bang hun ahi a, a ni thum ni-in ahi zongin, ka paʼ ngaihsutna tawng ka kankhiat khit ciangin, nangma tungah a lungsim a hoih leh, nang kiangah mi hong sawlin hong pulak lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
1Samuel20:13 Ahih hangin nang tungah siatna bawl nadingin ka pa a lungkimsak leh, a muanhuaina ah nang na pai theih nadingin nang kiangah a thu kong pulak kei a, nang kong sawlkhiat kei taak leh Topa in keimah Jonathan hong dawm kei tahen. Topa in ka pa a ompih mah bangin nang zong hong ompih tahen." 
1Samuel20:14 Kei ka nuntak lai leh ka sih loh nadingin Topaʼ thuman itna kei tungah hong lak in. 
1Samuel20:15 Keima innkuan panin na thumanna dokkik ngei kei in. Leitung maitang panin Davidʼ galte khempeuh Topa in a phiatkhiat ciangin," 
1Samuel20:16 Davidʼ innkuan panin Jonathanʼ min phiat khia kei in. Topa in Davidʼ galte tungah phu la tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:17 Tua ciangin Jonathan in amah a itna David tungah kiciam phakik hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama pumpi a it zahin amah in David a it hi. 
1Samuel20:18 Tua ciangin Jonathan in ama kiangah, “Zing ciang pen Khadet ni ahi hi. Na tutna awng ding ahih manin nang hong kiphawk ding hi." 
1Samuel20:19 A ni thum ni-in nakpi takin nang hong kiphawk kan zaw lai ding hi. A thu a kikup ciangin na bukna ah pai inla, suangcian hua lam pangah om in." 
1Samuel20:20 Tua ciangin muitum bangin tua lam pangah thaltang thum ka lawn ding hi. 
1Samuel20:21 Naupang khat sawlin ama kiangah, ‘Pai in; thaltangte va zong in,’ ka ci ding hi. Naupangʼ kiangah, ‘En in, nangma kiang hih lamah thaltangte om hi, tawm in,’ ka cih leh nang a hong pai ding na hi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin nang adingin lungmuanhuai-in launa om lo hi." 
1Samuel20:22 Ahih hangin tangvalpa kiangah, ‘En in, thaltangte nangma khen ah om hi,’ ka cih leh, nang paikhia in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nang hong sawl khia hi." 
1Samuel20:23 Nang le kei in i gen thu tawh kisai-in ahihleh, nang le kei kikalah Topa om tawntung hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:24 Tua ahih ciangin lo sungah David bu hi. Khadet ni hong tun ciangin an ne dingin kumpipa tu hi. 
1Samuel20:25 A nidang a bangin kawm gei-a a tutna tung, ama tutna ah kumpipa tu hi. A kigalsai-in Jonathan tu-in, Saulʼ pangah Abner tu a, ahih hangin Davidʼ mun a awng hi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ahi zongin Saul in tua ni-in bangmah gen lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ama tungah thu khatpeuh piang hi ding hi; amah siang lo hi; siang lo taktak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:27 Ahih hangin a ni nih ni, Khadet ni khit a zing ciangin Davidʼ mun awng lai hi. Tua ciangin Saul in a tapa Jonathan kiangah, “Bang hangin Jessiʼ tapa zanni hitaleh tu ni hitaleh annekna ah hong pai lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:28 Jonathan in Saul dawngin, “Bethlehem ah a pai dingin limtakin kei tungah David hong kingen hi." 
1Samuel20:29 Amah in, ‘Kei hong ciahsak in; ka innkuante un khua sungah biakpiakna bawl uh a, ka sanggampa in tua lai ah ka om ding thu hong pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nong hehpihna-in hong paisakin ka sanggamte hong musak in,’ hong ci hi. Hih thu hangin kumpipaʼ sabuai ah amah hong pai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:30 Tua ciangin Jonathan tungah Saul heh mahmah in ama kiangah, “A kihei khial, a lehdo numeiʼ tapa aw, nangma maizum nading le na nuʼ mindai nadingin Jessiʼ tapa na pawlpihna thu a thei lo hong sa na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel20:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitungah Jessiʼ tapa a nuntak lai teng nang na hi a, na kumpi za ahi zongin kip lo ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin mi sawl inla, kei kiangah amah hong paipih in. Amah a si taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:32 Tua ciangin Jonathan in a pa Saul dawngin, “Bang hangin amah kithat ding ahi hiam? Amah in bang hih ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:33 Ahih hangin Saul in amah a khawh kha dingin ama lamah a teipi lawn hi. Tua ahih ciangin a pa in David thah ding a ngaihsutna Jonathan in thei tel hi. 
1Samuel20:34 Tua ciangin heh mahmahna tawh sabuai panin Jonathan ding khia a, tua pawi a ni nih ni-in an ne lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa in David minsiasak ahih manin ama hangin a dah hi." 
1Samuel20:35 A zing ciangin David tawh a kiciamna lo ah Jonathan pai-in, amah tawh naupang no khat pai hi." 
1Samuel20:36 Amah in a naupang kiangah, “Tai inla ka thaltang lotte va tawm in,” a ci hi. Naupang a tai laitakin ama khen ah a thaltang khat lawn hi." 
1Samuel20:37 Jonathanʼ thaltang lot a tukna munah naupang a tun ciangin Jonathan in a naupang samin, “Nangʼ khen hua lamah thaltang om hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:38 Tua ciangin Jonathan in naupang samin, “Manlang in; hong kinawh in; tua lai ah om kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jonathanʼ naupang pa in a thaltangte khawmin a topa kiangah a paipih hi." 
1Samuel20:39 Ahih hangin naupang in bangmah thei lo a, Jonathan le David bek in a thu thei uh hi." 
1Samuel20:40 Tua ciangin Jonathan in a hiamte a naupang pa kiangah pia-in ama kiangah, “Pai inla, khuapi sungah ciahpih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel20:41 Naupang a paikhiat khit phetin suangcian pang panin David dingin lei ah maipuk a, thum vei kun hi. Jonathan sangin David nakpi takin dah zaw a, amau khatlekhat kinamin, khitui luangin khatlekhat kikah uh hi." 
1Samuel20:42 Tua ciangin Jonathan in David kiangah, “Ei tegel Topaʼ min tawh kiciamin, ‘Kei le nang kikal le keima suanlekhakte le nangma suanlekhakte kikalah a tawntungin Topa om ding hi,’ i cih mah bangin nuam takin pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah dingin paikhia a, Jonathan zong khuapi sungah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel21:1 Tua ciangin Nob khua-a siampipa Ahimelek kiangah David pai hi. Ahimelek a liing sa-in David a dawn dingin hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nang guak hong hi a, kuamah hong tonpih lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:2 David in siampi Ahimelek kiangah, “Kumpipa in na khat hong sawlin kei kiangah, ‘Nang kong sawlna le nang kong hilh thute khat zong kuamah theisak kei in,’ hong ci hi. Tua mun tua munah tangvalte tawh kiciamna khat ka bawl zo hi." 
1Samuel21:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang bang nei na hi hiam? Anlum lum nga ahih kei leh hih lai-a a om peuhpeuh hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:4 Siampipa in David dawngin, “Tu takin anlum mawkmawk ka nei kei hi; ahih hangin anlum siangtho om hi; tangvalte numei panin a kikep nak uh leh la in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:5 Tua ciangin David in siampipa dawngin, “A taktakin ci lehang, hih bangin ka paikhiat uh ciangin numeite kiang panin kote ka kikem tawntung uh hi. Khualzin mawkmawk ciang nangawnin zong tangvalte siangtho hi. Tu ni-in amaute bangzahin siangtho zaw kan ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:6 Tua ahih ciangin siampipa in anlum siangtho amah pia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh anlum dang om lo a, a kilakkhiat ni-in anlum a lum lai tawh a kilaih pah ding, Topaʼ mai panin a kila khia Ompihna Anlum bek om hi." 
1Samuel21:7 Tua laitakin Topaʼ mai ah biakna vai-in a om, Saulʼ nasemte mi khat tua lai ah na om kha hi. Ama min Doeg hi a, Saulʼ gancing makai pa hi a, Edom mi ahi hi." 
1Samuel21:8 Tua ciangin David in Ahimelek kiangah, “Teipi ahi a, namsau ahi zongin hih lai ah nei lo na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipaʼ nasep pen nawh tat ding kul ahih manin ka namsau ahi a, ka hiamte ahi zongin ka la man kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:9 Siampipa in, “Elah kuamah na thah Filistia mi Goliathʼ namsau, puan tawh kitunin hih lai ah siampi puan nungah om hi. Tua na deih leh la in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a dang om lo a, tua bek hih lai ah om hi,” a ci hi. David in, “Tua sanga hoih zaw a dang om lo hi; kei hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel21:10 David dingin tua ni-in Saul kiang panin tai a, Gath kumpipa Akhish kiangah pai hi." 
1Samuel21:11 Akhishʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih David, a gam kumpipa hi lo ahi hiam? Amaute khatlekhat in ama thu la-in sa-in laam uh a, ‘Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,’ ci hi lo ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel21:12 David in hih thute a lungsimah ciamteh a, Gath kumpipa Akhish kihta mahmah hi." 
1Samuel21:13 Tua ahih ciangin amauteʼ mai ah a gamtat kheelin, amauteʼ muhna ah a hai-in kibawl a, kulh kongkhakte tung kui gawpin, a khamul tungah a cilphuan kai suksak hi." 
1Samuel21:14 Tua ciangin Akhish in a nasemte kiangah, “En un, hih mipa a hai ahih lam na mu uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin kei kiangah amah hong paipih na hi uh hiam?" 
1Samuel21:15 Ka omna ah mi hai bangin a gamta dingin hih mipa nong paipih nadingun mihai kisam thuah lai ka hi hiam? Hih mipa ka inn sungah hong pai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel22:1 David tua lai panin kihem khia-in Adullam leihawm ah tai hi. A sanggamte le a paʼ innkuante khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin ama kiang tua lai munah pai suk uh hi. 
1Samuel22:2 Tua ciangin a lungkham mi khempeuh, leiba a nei mi khempeuh le a lungkim lo mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. Amah pen amaute tungah a ukpa a suak hi. Tua lai ah amah tawh mihing za li bang a om hi." 
1Samuel22:3 Tua lai mun panin Moab gam Mizpah ah David a pai hi. Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah, “Pasian in kei adingin hong sepsak ding ka theih matengin ka nu le ka pa na kiangah hong omsak in, ci-in kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:4 Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah amaute nusia a, mun muanhuaina sungah David a om sungteng amah tawh om khawm uh hi." 
1Samuel22:5 Tua ciangin kamsang pa Gad in David kiangah, “Mun muanhuai sungah om nawn kei in; kihem inla, Judah gamah pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David kihem khia-in Hereth tulak ah a pai hi." 
1Samuel22:6 Tu-in David le amah tawh a om mite a kimuhna thu Saul in za hi. A khut sungah a teipi tawi-in, a nasemte khempeuh a kimkot ah dingin Gibeah khua a sangna mun makeng kung nuai ah Saul a tu hi." 
1Samuel22:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a kimkot ah a ding a nasemte kiangah, “Tu-in za un, no Benjamin-te aw; Jessiʼ tapa in note khempeuhʼ lote le leenggui lote hong pia-in, note khempeuh a tul a uk, a za a ukin hong koih dingin um a," 
1Samuel22:8 note khempeuh in kei hong sawm sim na hi uh hiam? Tu ni-a bangin hong pangsim dingin ka tapa in Jessiʼ tapa tawh thukimna a bawl ciangin kuamah in kei kiangah hong pulak loin, ka tapa in keimah a do dingin ka nasem pa a hanthotna ah note kuamah dah loin, kei kiangah zong nong pulak kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:9 Tua ciangin Saulʼ nasemteʼ kiangah a ding, Edom mi Doeg in dawngin, “Ahitubʼ tapa Ahimelekʼ kiang, Nob khua ah Jessiʼ tapa a pai ka mu a," 
1Samuel22:10 amah in ama adingin Topaʼ tungah thu dotsakin, anletui pia a, Filistia mi Goliathʼ namsau ama tungah pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ahitubʼ tapa siampi Ahimelek le a paʼ innkuante ahi Nob a om siampi khempeuh a sam dingin mi sawl a, kumpipa kiangah amaute khempeuh hong pai uh hi." 
1Samuel22:12 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ahitubʼ tapa aw, tu-in za in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hih lai ah om ing, topa aw,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:13 Tua ciangin Saul in ama kiangah, “Tu ni-a bangin hong pangsimin kei a do dingin hong kipat theih nadingin bang hangin nang le Jessiʼ tapa in kei hong sawm sim a, ama tungah an le namsau pia-in, ama adingin Pasian kiangah thu dotsak na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:14 Tua ciangin Ahimelek in kumpipa dawngin, “Na nasemte khempeuh lak panin kumpipaʼ makpa ahi nangmah hong cingte a ukpa David bangin kua thumanin, na inn sungah kua kipahtawi ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ama adingin Pasianʼ kiangah thu ka dotsak a masa pen tu ni ahi hiam? Hi lo hi. Kumpipa in a nasem pa ahi a, ka paʼ innkuante khempeuh ahi zongin ngawh kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem pa in a tam hitaleh a tawm hitaleh hih thu khempeuh bangmah thei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Ahimelek aw, nang le na paʼ innkuante na si taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel22:17 Kumpipa in ama kiimah a ding a cingte kiangah, “Kihei unla Topaʼ siampite that un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute zong David tawh pangkhawm uh a, amaute in ama tai lam thei napi-in kei kiangah hong pulak lo uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin kumpipaʼ nasemte in Topaʼ siampite tunga tu dingin a khut uh taang khiasak lo uh hi." 
1Samuel22:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Doeg kiangah, “Kihei inla, siampite hih in,” a ci hi. Edom mi Doeg kihei-in siampite hih a, tua ni-in saihadial siampi puan a silh mihing sawm giat le nga a that hi." 
1Samuel22:19 Amah in siampiteʼ khuapi Nob khua sunga om nuntakna a nei khempeuh numei le pasal, naupang le nawine, bawngtalte, late le tuute, namsau tawh a that khin hi." 
1Samuel22:20 Ahih hangin Ahitubʼ tapa Ahimelekʼ tapate lakah Abiathar a kici khat suakta-in David kiangah a tai hi. 
1Samuel22:21 Saul in Topaʼ siampite a thah khitna thu Abiathar in David kiangah a gen hi. 
1Samuel22:22 David in Abiathar kiangah, “Tua ni-in Doeg tua lai ah om ahih ciangin Saulʼ kiangah gen taktak ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Na paʼ innkuan pih mite khempeuhʼ sihna ka piangsak kha hi." 
1Samuel22:23 Kei tawh hong om in; lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a that dingin a hong zongte in nang zong thah dingin a hong zong ahi hi; kei kiangah om lecin lungmuanna sunga om na hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:1 Tu-in amaute in David kiangah, “En in, Filistia-te in Keilah khua sim uh a, a ancilnate uh luh uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
1Samuel23:2 Tua ahih ciangin David in Topa thu dongin, “Pai-in Filistia-te ka sim ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in David kiangah, “Pai-in Filistia-te sim inla, Keilah khua mite hon khia in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:3 Ahih hangin Davidʼ mite in ama kiangah, “En in, Judah gam hih munah eite i lau hi. Filistia galkapte simin Keilah ah pai lehang bangzahin lau zaw ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:4 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dongkik hi. Topa in amah dawngin, “Ding in; Keilah ah pai suk in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah Filistia-te kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:5 Tua ciangin David le a mite Keilah ah pai suk uh a, Filistia-te tawh kido-in amauʼ ganhingte ciah pihin amaute tampi tak a that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in Keilah a teeng mite a hon khia hi." 
1Samuel23:6 David kiang Keilah ah Ahimelekʼ tapa Abiathar a tai lai-in amah in siampi puan khat kengin pai suk hi. 
1Samuel23:7 Keilah ah David a tun khitna thu tu-in Saul kiangah kigen hi. Saul in, “Pasian in ka khut sungah amah hong pia khin hi; bang hang hiam cih le kulh kongpi le a kalhna zawl a nei khua sungah lutna tawh a mahmah kikhaknelh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:8 Tua ciangin Saul in galsim ding, Keilah khua ah a pai suk ding, David le a mite a umcih dingin mi khempeuh a sam hi." 
1Samuel23:9 Saul in ama tungah a sia a sawmna David in thei hi. Amah in a siampi Abiathar kiangah, “Hih lai ah siampi puan hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:10 Tua ciangin David in, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa aw, keima hangin khuapi susia dingin Saul in Keilah ah pai hong sawmna thu na nasem pa in za khin taktak hi." 
1Samuel23:11 Keilah mite in ama tungah kei hong ap ding hiam? Na nasem paʼ zak bangin Saul hong pai suk ding hiam? Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa aw, kong thum hi, na nasem pa tungah hong gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amah hong pai suk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:12 Tua ciangin David in, “Keilah mite in kei le ka mite Saulʼ tungah hong ap ding uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amaute in note hong ap ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:13 Tua ciangin mi za guk bang a pha, David le a mite dingin Keilah panin kihem khia uh a, amaute a pai theihna peuhpeuh uh ah pai uh hi. Keilah panin David a suahtakna thu Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in a vai a khawl phot hi." 
1Samuel23:14 Zif gamlak mual tung gam sung, gamlak mun muanhuaina ah David om hi. Saul in nisimin amah zong a, ahih hangin Pasian in ama tungah David pia lo hi." 
1Samuel23:15 Amah a that dingin Saul kuan khia khin ahih manin David a lau hi. Zif gamlak Horesh munah David om hi. 
1Samuel23:16 Tua ciangin Saulʼ tapa Jonathan dingin David kiang Horesh ah pai a, Pasian in hong huh ding hi, ci-in amah a hanthawn hi." 
1Samuel23:17 Amah in David kiangah, “Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Saul in nang hong su kha lo ding hi. Nang pen Israel-te tungah kumpi na hi dinga, kei pen nangma zom ka hi ding hi; ka pa Saul in zong hih thu thei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:18 Tua ciangin amau tegel in Topaʼ mai ah thuciamna bawl uh hi. Horesh ah David om lai-in, Jonathan a inn ah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel23:19 Tua ciangin Saulʼ kiang Gibeah ah Zif mite pai to uh a, “Jeshimon leitaw lam, Hakhilah mual tung, Horesh a mun muanhuai sung koteʼ lakah David om hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel23:20 Tu-in hong pai suk in, kumpipa aw; amah na mat nopna thu thei ka hih manun hong pai suk in. Koteʼ hih ding ahihleh kumpipa tungah amah kong ap ding uh ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel23:21 Tua ciangin Saul in, “ Topa in note thupha hong pia tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in kei tungah hehpihna nong nei uh hi." 
1Samuel23:22 Pai-in va kiciansak lai un. Ama bukna mun thei-in va mu unla, tua lai ah kua in mu hiam, hong thei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah ngiansiam mahmah hi, ci-in kei tungah hong kigen hi." 
1Samuel23:23 Tua ahih ciangin amah a bukna, a kiselsimna mun khempeuh hong ciamteh unla, thu a kitel tak tawh kei kiangah hong paikik un. Tua ciangin note tawh kei kong kuan ding hi. Gam sungah amah a om lai nakleh Judah gam sung khempeuh zon ding ahi zongin a tul lak panin amah ka zong khia teitei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:24 Amaute ding uh a, Zif ah a pai dingin Saulʼ mai ah a na ma pai uh hi. Tu-in David le a mite Jeshimon leitaw lam Arabah gam sung Maon gamlak ah om uh hi." 
1Samuel23:25 Saul le a mite amah a zong dingin kuan uh hi. Hih thu David kiangah kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin Maon gamlak a om suangpi ah amah pai suk hi. Saul in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in Maon gamlak ah David delh hi. 
1Samuel23:26 A mual pang khat ah Saul pai a, David le a mite a mual pang lang khat ah pai uh hi. Saul le a mite in David le a mite a man dingin hong um uh ahih manin Saul a pelh dingin David a nawh tai laitakin," 
1Samuel23:27 Saul kiangah kamtai khat hong tunga, “Hong kinawh inla hong ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia-te in gam sung hong sim hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel23:28 Tua ahih ciangin David a delhna panin Saul kilehkik a, Filistia-te a do-in a pai hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun pen Kikhenna Mual kici hi." 
1Samuel23:29 Tua lai panin David pai to-in Engedi munmuanhuai ah a om hi. 
1Samuel24:1 Filistia-te a delhna panin Saul a ciah ciangin ama kiangah, “En in, Engedi gamlak ah David om hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
1Samuel24:2 Tua ciangin Saul in Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kiteel mihing tul thum la-in Sathak Suangpi mai ah David le a mite a zong dingin a pai hi. 
1Samuel24:3 Lam gei-a tuukhawk omna ah a pai hi. Tua gei ah leihawm khat om a, awnghawh dingin tua sungah Saul a pai hi. Tu-in David le a mite tua leihawm tawngnung sungah na tu uh hi." 
1Samuel24:4 Tua ciangin Davidʼ mite in ama kiangah, “ Topa in nang kiangah, ‘En in, na khut sungah na galpa kong pia dinga, hoih na sak bangin ama tungah na hih ding hi,’ hong cih pen tu ni hi ta hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin David dingin Saulʼ puan tualpi mong at khiatsak sim hi." 
1Samuel24:5 Tua khit ciangin amah in Saulʼ puan mong a atkhiat manin David a lungsim nuam thei nawn lo hi. 
1Samuel24:6 Amah in a mite kiangah, “Amah pen Topaʼ sathau nilh pa hi, ci-in a thei gegu pi-in ama tungah ka khut ka ngak ding, Topaʼ sathau nilh pa ahi ka topa tungah hih bang ka hih ding Topa in hong kham hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:7 Tua ahih ciangin David in hih thute tawh a mite zol a, amaute Saul hihsak lo hi. Tua ciangin Saul ding khia-in leihawm nusia a, a pai nading lampi ah a paisuak hi." 
1Samuel24:8 Tua khit ciangin David zong leihawm sung panin pai khia-in Saul nung sap a, “Ka to kumpipa!” a ci hi. Saul in a nung a et ciangin David in lei ah a mai kunin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
1Samuel24:9 Tua ciangin David in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin, ‘En in, David in na siat nading zong hi,’ a ci miteʼ thu um na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel24:10 En in, Topa in tu ni-in leihawm sung, ka khut sungah nang hong piakna nang mahmah in tu ni-in na thei khin hi. Mi pawl khat in nang a that dingin kei hong sawl a, ahih hangin nang kong hih kei hi. Keimah in, ‘Ka topa tungah ka khut ka nga kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen Topaʼ sathau nilh pa ahi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
1Samuel24:11 En in, ka pa aw, ka khut sunga na puan tualpi mong en in. Kei tungah khialhna ahi a, kumpi dona ahi zongin a om lohna, na puan tualpi mong at khia napi-in nang kong thah lohna thu tawh thei-in na mu ding hi. Kei thah dingin nong zon hangin nang tungah ka khial kei hi." 
1Samuel24:12 Topa in kei le nang kikalah thu hong khen tahen. Topa in kei tangin nang tungah hong thuk tahen. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi. 
1Samuel24:13 Tang-ateʼ paunak in, ‘A giloteʼ sung panin gitlohna hong piang,’ a cih mah bang ahi hi. Ahih hangin keima khut tawh nang kong hih kei ding hi." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel kumpipa kua do-a hong kuan khia ahi hiam? Kua delh na hi hiam? Uisi maw! Uili maw! 
1Samuel24:15 Tua ahih ciangin Topa thukhen hong hi-in, kei le nang kikalah thukhenna hong pia henla, hih thu thei-in ka thu ah hong pang henla, na khut sung panin kei hong hon khia tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:16 David in hih thute Saul kiangah a gen a man khit ciangin Saul in, “Ka tapa David, tu-a ka zak nangʼ aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul a kap hi." 
1Samuel24:17 Amah in David kiangah, “Nang pen kei sangin na thuman zaw hi. Keimah in nang tungah a sia kong bawl laitakin nang in kei tungah a pha nong bawl hi." 
1Samuel24:18 Topa in na khut sungah kei hong koih laitakin nang in kei nong thah lohna ah kei nong limbawlna tu-in na hong laktel hi. 
1Samuel24:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh in a galpa mu leh amah in a suakta-in a galpa pai khiasak ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu ni-in kei tungah nong bawlna hangin Topa in a hoih tawh nang thaman hong pia tahen. 
1Samuel24:20 Tu-in en in, kumpi na hih taktak ding ka thei hi. Israel kumpi gam nangma khut sungah a kip ding hi." 
1Samuel24:21 Tua ahih ciangin keima nung a ka suanlekhakte beisak loin, ka paʼ innkuan panin ka min na phiat loh nadingin Topaʼ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel24:22 Tua ciangin Saulʼ deih bangin David a kiciam hi. Tua ciangin Saul a inn ah a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David le a mite munmuanhuai ah pai to uh hi. 
1Samuel25:1 Tu-in Samuel si a, Israel-te khempeuh kikhawmin ama hangin kap uh a, amaute in Ramah a a inn ah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Paran gamlak ah David pai suk hi." 
1Samuel25:2 Karmel mualah nasep a nei mi khat Maon khua ah a om hi. Tua pa hau mahmah a, amah in tuu tul thum le keel tul khat nei hi. Amah in Karmel ah a tuumul a met hi." 
1Samuel25:3 Tua mipaʼ min Nabal hi a, a ziʼ min Abigail ahi hi. Tua numei, tei le melhoih a thuah khat hi a, ahih hangin a pasal pen a ki-uk zo lo mi le a gamtat sia khat hi a, amah Kaleb mi ahi hi." 
1Samuel25:4 Nabal in a tuumul a metna thu David in gamlak ah a za hi. 
1Samuel25:5 Tua ahih ciangin David in a tangvalte sawm sawl hi. David in a tangvalte kiangah, “Karmel ah pai to-in Nabal kiangah pai unla, keima min tawh amah va hopih un." 
1Samuel25:6 Hih bangin amah na hopih ding uh hi: ‘Nang tungah nopna om tahen, na innkuan tungah nopna om tahen, na neih khempeuh tungah zong nopna om tahen." 
1Samuel25:7 Gan mul mette na neihna ka za hi. Na tuucingte kote tawh omin amaute tungah siatna ka bawl kei uh a, Karmel ah a om sungteng uh amaute in bangmah mansuah lo uh hi." 
1Samuel25:8 Na tangvalte uh dong lecin amaute in nang kiangah hong gen thei ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tangvalte maipha na musak in; bang hang hiam cih leh pawi ni-in kong pai uh hi. Na neih sung pan nong piak theih peuhpeuh na nasemte le na tapa David tungah pia in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:9 Tangvalte hong tun ciangin amaute in hih thu khempeuh Davidʼ minin Nabal kiangah gen uh a, tua ciangin amaute in ngak uh hi." 
1Samuel25:10 Tua ciangin Nabal in Davidʼ nasemte dawngin, “David kua ahi hiam? Jessiʼ tapa kua ahi hiam? Tu lai-in a tote kiang panin a tai khia nasem tampi om hi." 
1Samuel25:11 Ka anlum le ka tui le ka gan mul meette adingin ka gawh ka sate la-in koi lai panin hong pai cih ka theih loh mite tungah pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Samuel25:12 Tua ahih ciangin Davidʼ tangvalte ciahkikin hih thu khempeuh ama kiangah a gen uh hi. 
1Samuel25:13 David in a mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh in na namsau uh kuah ciat un!” a ci hi. Amaute khempeuh in a namsau uh kuah uh a, David in zong a namsau a kuah hi. Mihing za li bang Davidʼ nungah pai to uh a, mihing za nihte van ngakin om uh hi." 
1Samuel25:14 Ahih hangin Nabalʼ nasem tangvalte khat in Nabalʼ zi Abigail kiangah thu genin, “En in, ka topa uh a hopih dingin gamlak panin David in kamtaite hong paisak a, amah in amaute na tai hi." 
1Samuel25:15 Ahi zongin kote tungah tua mite hoih mahmah in kote in siatna ka thuak kei uh a, amaute tawh ka pai lai teng uh gamlak ah ka om sungun bangmah ka mansuah kei uh hi." 
1Samuel25:16 Tuute kemin amaute tawh ka om sung khempeuh uh sun le zanin amaute in kote hong hu uh hi. 
1Samuel25:17 Tua ahih ciangin hih thu thei inla, na hih ding ngaihsun in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka topa le a innkuan khempeuh tungah siatna tunsak ding kingaihsun a, amah a khansia ahih manin kuamah in hopih thei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:18 Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin, anlum lum za nih, leenggahzu savun thawl nih, a han min sa tuu nga, ankan lawh nga, leenggahkeu bawk za khat le theimoh za nih la-in late tungah tuate a guang hi." 
1Samuel25:19 Tua nu in a tangvalte kiangah, “Keima mai ah na paisuak un; noteʼ nungah kei kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in a pasal Nabal hilh lo hi." 
1Samuel25:20 Amah la tungah tuangin mual liahah a pai suk laitakin, en in, David le a mite ama lamah hong pai suk uh hi; amah in amaute na dawn hi." 
1Samuel25:21 Tu-in David in, “Ama neihsa khempeuh khat zong a mangthang lo dingin hih mipaʼ neih khempeuh gamlak ah a mawkna-in ka cing a, amah in hih thuhoihte a sia tawh kei tungah hong thuk hi." 
1Samuel25:22 Zing ciangin ama neihsa khempeuh lakah pasal khat zong ka siit taak leh Pasian in keimah David hong dawm kei tahen,” na ci khin hi." 
1Samuel25:23 Abigail in David a muh ciangin kinawh a, a la tung panin tuakin Davidʼ mai ah puk a, leilak ah a kun hi." 
1Samuel25:24 Ama khe phung ah pukin, “Kei tung bekah, ka topa aw, mawhna om tahen. Na kiangah na nasem nu thu hong gensak inla, na nasem nuʼ thugente hong ngai in, ci-in kong thum hi." 
1Samuel25:25 Ka topa in hih a khansia mipa Nabal ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama min mah bangin amah zong a tua ci mah ahi hi. Nabal ama min hi a, haina in amah vukcip hi. Ahih hangin na nasem nu keimah in nangma hong sawl na tangvalte ka mu kha kei hi." 
1Samuel25:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa aw, Topa nungta-in, nang zong na nuntak mah bangin, mi na thah loh nading le nangma khut tawh thukkikna na hih loh nadingin Topa in nang hong kho ahih manin, tu-in na galte le nangma tungah siat nading a zongte khempeuh Nabal bang tahen." 
1Samuel25:27 Tu-in na nasem nu keimah in nangmah ka hong puak hih letsong nangma nung hong zui tangvalte hong piasak in. 
1Samuel25:28 Na nasem nuʼ khialhna hong maisak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topaʼ galte do na hih manin Topa in na suanlekhakte kipsak paisuak dinga, na nuntak lai teng nang sungah siatna kimu lo ding hi." 
1Samuel25:29 Nangmah delhin hong that dingin mite hong kipat leh, nang pen Topa na Pasianʼ kepna sung a hing mite lakah na om dinga, amah in suanglotna tawh lotkhiat bangin na galte lawn khia ding hi." 
1Samuel25:30 Topa in nangmah tawh kisai thu a hoih a gente khempeuh tawh kizui-in hong hihin, Israel-te tungah ulianin nang hong koih khit ciangin," 
1Samuel25:31 thu om lopi-in mi thahna ahi a, nang mahmah in phulakna hangin ahi zongin, dah nading thu ahi a, lungsim nat nading thu ahi zongin na nei kei ding hi. Topa in limtakin nang hong bawl ciangin na nasem nu hong phawk in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:32 Tua ciangin David in Abigail kiangah, “Tu ni-in keimah a dawn dingin nang a hong sawl Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen!" 
1Samuel25:33 Tu ni-in mi thahna le keima khut tawh phulak nading panin keimah hong kem nangma ngaihsutna in thupha ngah tahen! 
1Samuel25:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong gimsak nading panin hong kho Israel Pasian, Topa a nungta taktak ahih mah bangin, nang hong kinawhin keimah a dawn dingin hong pai lo hi lecin, zing ciangin Nabal sung pan pasal khat zong hing nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:35 Tua ciangin David in ama tung panin amah a puakte a sang hi. Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Lung nuamin na inn ah ciah to ta in. Na thu ka ngai a, nong thumna kong pia khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:36 Tua ciangin Nabal kiangah Abigail hong tungkik hi. Kumpipaʼ pawi tawh kibangin amah in a inn sungah pawi na kham hi. Nabal lungnuam mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zu kham mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin zingsang khuavak mateng ama kiangah bangmah gen peuhmah lo hi. 
1Samuel25:37 Zingsang ciang, Nabalʼ zukhamna a ven ciangin a zi in ama kiangah hih thute gen a, thakhatin a lungtang si-in amah suangtum bang hi." 
1Samuel25:38 Tua khit ni sawm bang ciangin Topa in Nabal vat a, amah a si ta hi." 
1Samuel25:39 Nabal a sihna thu David in a zak ciangin amah in, “Nabal khut tung panin ka ngah zahkona hong thuksakin, siatna panin a nasem pa a lenkik Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Topa in Nabalʼ gamtat siatna ama lu tung mahah tungkiksak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin David in mi sawlin ama zi dingin Abigail helsak hi." 
1Samuel25:40 Davidʼ nasemte Karmel a Abigailʼ kiang a tun ciangin amaute in tua nu kiangah, “David in ama zi dingin a la dingin kote nang kiangah hong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel25:41 Tua ciangin amah dingin lei ah mai kun a, “En un, na nasem nu uh ka topaʼ nasemteʼ khe a silsak ding nasem ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel25:42 Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin dingin la tungah tuang a, ama nasem numei nga in amah a kem hi. Davidʼ kamtaiteʼ nung zui-in pai a, tua ciangin ama zi a suak hi." 
1Samuel25:43 David in Jezreel khuami Ahinoam zong la a, amau tegel ama zi a suak uh hi." 
1Samuel25:44 Saul in ama tanu Mikhal, Davidʼ zi pen, Gallim khuami Laishʼ tapa Palti tungah na pia khin hi." 
1Samuel26:1 Tua ciangin Saul kiang Gibeah ah Zif mite hong pai uh a, “Jeshimon nisuahna lam Hakhilah mual tungah David bu hi lo ahi hiam?” va ci uh hi." 
1Samuel26:2 Tua ahih ciangin Saul kithawi-in David a zong dingin Israel mi a kiteel mihing tul thum tawh Zif gamlak ah a pai suk hi. 
1Samuel26:3 Tua ciangin Saul in Jeshimon nisuahna lam lampi gei ah a om Hakhilah mual tungah giahphual sat hi. Ahih hangin gamlak ah David om lai hi. Amah a delhin gamlak ah Saul a hong paina thu a theih ciangin 
1Samuel26:4 David in thukan simte sawl a, Saul hong pai taktak ahihna thu a thei hi." 
1Samuel26:5 Tua ciangin David dingin Saul in giahphual a satna munah a pai hi. David in Saulʼ galkap mangpa, Nerʼ tapa Abner tawh a lupna mun mu hi. Giahphual laizang ah Saul lum a, ama kimkot ah a galkapte in phual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel26:6 Tua ciangin David in Hit mi Ahimelek le a nu uh Zeruiah ahi Joabʼ sanggampa Abishai kiangah, “Saulʼ giahphual ah kei tawh kua hong pai suk ding na hi uh hiam” a ci hi. Abishai in, “Kei nang tawh kong pai suk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:7 Tua ahih ciangin David le Abishai zanin galkapte kiangah pai uh hi. Giahphual sungah Saul na ihmu a, a lukhung leilak ah a teipi na kiphut a, Abner le galkapte ama kimkot ah na lum uh hi." 
1Samuel26:8 Tua ciangin Abishai in David kiangah, “Pasian in na galpa tu ni-in na khut sungah hong pia ahih ciangin tu-in teipi-in lei tawh khatvei bek hong khawhcipsak in, nih vei khawh ding kisam lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:9 Ahih hangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Ama tungah siatna bawl kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ sathau nilh pa a su peuhpeuh mawhna pan peng ding sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:10 David in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin Topa in amah vat taktak ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong a sih hun hong tung ding hi; tua ahih kei leh gal kikapna sungah amah pai sukin si ding hi." 
1Samuel26:11 Topaʼ sathau nilh pa tungah ka khut ka ngak ding Topa in kei hong kham hi; ahih hangin tu-in a lukhung ah a om a teipi le a tuithawl la-in paikhia ni,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:12 Tua ahih ciangin David in Saulʼ lukhung a a om a teipi le a tuithawl a la hi. Tua ciangin amaute paikhia uh hi. Kuamah in mu lo hi; zong thei lo hi; kuamah khanglo lo hi. Amaute khempeuh ihmu uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute ihmut suak mahmah sak hi. 
1Samuel26:13 Tua ciangin David a pang khat ah pai-in, amaute kikal saupi a kihalin mual dawn a gamla ah a ding hi." 
1Samuel26:14 David in galkapte le Nerʼ tapa Abner samin, “Abner aw, hong dawng lo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Abner in dawngin, “Kumpipa a sam kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:15 David in Abner kiangah, “Pasal hi lo na hi hiam? Israel-te sungah nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin na to kumpipa vil lo na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na to kumpipa a that dingin mi khat hong pai hi." 
1Samuel26:16 Hih banga na gamtatna hoih lo hi. Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin a si dingin na kilawm hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ sathau nilh pa, na topa na vil kei hi. Tu-in a lukhung a om kumpipaʼ teipi le a tuithawl koi ah om ahi hiam, thei in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:17 Saul in Davidʼ aw khen thei a, “Ka tapa David, tu-a a ging nangmaʼ aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. David in, “Ka topa, kumpipa aw, keimaʼ aw ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Bang hangin ka topa in a nasem pa delh ahi hiam? Bang gamta khial ka hi hiam? Ka tungah bang mawhna om ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel26:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka to kumpipa in a nasem paʼ thu za in. Keimah a do dingin nang hong tok suah pa pen Topa ahihleh amah in biakna hong sang tahen; ahih hangin mihing ahihleh amaute in Topaʼ mai ah samsiatna ngah tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Pai in; pasian dangteʼ na sem in,’ ci-in Topaʼ gamh ka ngah loh nadingin tu ni-in kei hong hawl khia uh hi." 
1Samuel26:20 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topaʼ omna panin gamdang leitang ah kei hong sisak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh mual tungah vak a a beng pa bangin uili bang lel keimah a that dingin Israel kumpipa nong kuan khia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:21 Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ka gamta khial hi; hong ciahkik in, ka tapa David aw; bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-in kei hong suaktasak na hih manin na tungah siatna kong bawl nawn kei ding hi. Ka hai gamtat kha a, nakpi takin ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:22 Tua ciangin David in dawngin, “Hih lai ah na teipi om hi, kumpipa! Tangvalte khat hong paisak inla hong lasak in." 
1Samuel26:23 Topa in mi khempeuh a thumanna le a thutakna hangin thaman pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tu ni-in ka khut sungah nang hong pia a, keimah in Topaʼ sathau nilh pa a hih dingin ka khutte ka taang khiasak kei hi." 
1Samuel26:24 En in, tu ni-in nangmah kong suahtaksak mah bangin Topa in zong kei hong suaktasak henla, haksatna khempeuh panin kei hong hon khia tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel26:25 Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Thupha ngah ta in, ka tapa David! Nangmah in na tampi na sem dinga, tuate na zo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David ama lampi ah pai-in, Saul zong ama omna munah a ciah hi." 
1Samuel27:1 David in a lungsim sungah, “Saulʼ khut tawh ni khat ni ciangin ka si thei kha ding hi. Kei adingin Filistia-teʼ gamah tai ding sangin a hoih zaw dang om lo hi. Tua hileh Saul in Israel gamgi huam sungah kei hong zon niloh lungkia ta dinga, ama khut sung panin ka suakta ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:2 Tua ahih ciangin David kithawi a, amah tawh a om mihing za gukte tawh Gath kumpipa, Maokʼ tapa Akhish kiangah a pai hi." 
1Samuel27:3 Tua ciangin David, a innkuanpihte le a mite a innkuan pih ciat tawh, David zong a zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam le Nabalʼ zi meigongnu, Karmel khuami Abigail tawh, Gath a Akhish kiangah va teeng hi." 
1Samuel27:4 Gath ah David tai hi, ci-in Saul kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in David zong nawn lo hi." 
1Samuel27:5 Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, ka ten theih nadingin gam sung khuate khat ah kei ading mun hong pia in; bang hangin na nasem pa nang tawh kumpi khua sungah teeng khawm ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:6 Tua ahih ciangin Akhish in tua ni-in ama tungah Ziklag khua a pia hi. Tua ahih manin tu ni dongin tua khua pen Judah kumpite aʼ ahi hi. 
1Samuel27:7 Filistia gam sungah David a ten hunsung pen kum khat le kha li sung ahi hi. 
1Samuel27:8 Tu-in David le a mite pai to-in Geshur mite, Girzi mite le Amalek mite va sim hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite pen Egypt lam Shur ciang dongah tanglai a kipanin a teeng mite ahi uh hi." 
1Samuel27:9 Tua ciangin David in tua gam vat gawp a, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawi loin, ahih hangin tuute, bawngtalte, late, kalaohte le puante la-in Akhish kiangah hong ciahkik hi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akhish in, “Tu ni-in kua va sim na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin David in, “Judah miteʼ Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Jerahmeel miteʼ Negeb gam,” ahih kei leh, “Ken miteʼ Negeb gam,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel27:11 David in, “Amaute in koteʼ thu genin, ‘David in tua bangin hih hi,’ ci ding uh ahih ciangin,” ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin Gath ah thu a puak thei ding numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin hingkhawi lo hi. Filistia-teʼ gam sungah a ten sungteng tua bang gamtatna pen ama ngeina ahi hi." 
1Samuel27:12 Akhish in David muangin, “Ama mipih Israel-te in a muhdah theih nadingin a mahmah kibawl khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah ka nasem hi tawntung ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
1Samuel28:1 Tua hunin Filistia-te in Israel-te a sim dingin a galkapte khawm uh hi. Akhish in David kiangah, “Nang le na mite, kei tawh galkapte lakah a kuan khawm ding na hih lam thei in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:2 David in Akhish kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; na nasem pa in bang hih thei hiam, cih na thei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Akhish in David kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; khan tawntungin keimah a hong cing dingin nang kong koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:3 Tu-in Samuel si khin a, Israel-te khempeuh ama hangin kapin, ama khuapi Ramah ah vui uh hi. Saul in vankahte le aisante a gam sung panin beisak hi." 
1Samuel28:4 Filistia-te kikhawm uh a, hong pai-in Shunem ah giahphual sat uh hi. Saul in Israel-te khempeuh khawm a, amaute in Gilboa ah giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel28:5 Saul in Filistia galkapte a muh ciangin lau a, a lungsim nakpi takin liing hi." 
1Samuel28:6 Saul in Topa tungah thu a dot ciangin, Topa in mang tawh hitaleh, Urim tawh hitaleh, kamsangte tawh hitaleh dawng lo hi." 
1Samuel28:7 Tua ciangin Saul in a nasemte kiangah, “Ama kiangah pai-in ama tung pan thu ka dot theih nadingin vankah thei numei khat kei adingin hong zonsak un,” a ci hi. A nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, Endor ah vankah thei khat om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel28:8 Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a mel seelin puan dang silh a, amah le mi nih pai hi. Amaute zanin tua numei kiangah va pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei adingin a si sateʼ kha kiang pan thu hong dotsak inla, nang kiang a a min kong gen peuhpeuh kei adingin hong sap tohsak in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:9 Numei in ama kiangah, “Saulʼ hih sa thu, gam sung panin vankahte le aisante a suksiatna na thei taktak hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keima sih nading a piangsak dingin kei adingin thangzak hong koih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:10 Ahih hangin ama tungah Topaʼ min tawh Saul kiciam a, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih thu hangin nang tungah gimna hong tung het lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:11 Tua ciangin numei in, “Kua hong sapsak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Samuel hong sapsak in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:12 Numei in Samuel a muh ciangin a gingin kiko khia hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong khem na hi hiam? Nang, Saul na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:13 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; kua mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Lei sung panin pasian khat hong pai khiato ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:14 Amah in tua nu kiangah, “Ama mel bangci ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua nu in, “Puteek khat hong pai to a, amah in puan tualpi silh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul in tua pen Samuel hi, ci-in thei a, lei ah a mai kunin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
1Samuel28:15 Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin keimah sap tohna tawh hong nawngkaisak na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in dawngin, “Nakpi takin ka lungkham hi; Filistia-te in kei hong sim a, kei kiang panin Pasian kihei khia-in kamsangte tawh ahi a, mang tawh ahi zongin hong dawng nawn lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka gamtat nading zia a hong gen dingin nang kong sam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:16 Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa, nang kiang panin kihei khia-in na gal suak khin ahih ciangin bang hangin kei thu hong dong lai na hi hiam?" 
1Samuel28:17 Topa in keiʼ tungtawnin hong gen sa bangin nang tungah hong hih hi. Topa in na khut sung panin kumpi gam bal khia-in na veengpa Davidʼ tungah pia khin hi. 
1Samuel28:18 Nangmah in Topaʼ thu ngai loin, Amalek tungah ama heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in hih lo na hih manin Topa in nang tungah tu ni-in hihte hong tungsak hi." 
1Samuel28:19 Tua tham loin Topa in Israel mite zong nang tawh Filistia-teʼ khut sungah hong pia khawm ding hi. Zing ciangin nang le na tapate in zong kei kiang nong zuan ding uh hi. Topa in Israel galkapte zong Filistia-teʼ khut sungah pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:20 Tua ciangin Samuelʼ thugente hangin lau lua-in leilak ah Saul tawnpuk pah hi. Amah in sun tawntung le zan tawntung bangmah ne lo ahih manin a tha nem mahmah hi. 
1Samuel28:21 Tua ciangin Saul kiangah a numei hong pai-in amah a lau mahmahna a muh ciangin tua nu in Saul kiangah, “En in, na nasem nu in na thu hong ngai zo hi. Ka luang khamin, kei tungah nong gen bangin ka gamta zo hi." 
1Samuel28:22 Tua ahih ciangin nang zong na nasem nuʼ thu hong ngai in; na mai ah anlum tawm khat hong luisak in; na pai nading ah na pai ciangin na thahat nadingin ne in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel28:23 Amah in nial a, “Ka ne kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tua numei tawh kopin a nasemte in ci teitei uh ahih manin amauʼ cih bangin a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin leilak panin amah tho-in lupna tungah a tu hi." 
1Samuel28:24 Tu-in tua numei in a inn ah bawng no thau khat nei a, amah in manlang takin go-in, tua ciangin annel la a, a annel meekin silngo sawh loh anlum em a," 
1Samuel28:25 Saul le a nasemteʼ mai ah lui a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute dingin tua zanin a paikhia uh hi." 
1Samuel29:1 Tu-in Filistia-te in a galkap khempeuh uh Afek ah khawm uh a, Jezreel gam sunga om tuikhuk gei ah Israel-te in giahphual sat uh hi." 
1Samuel29:2 Filistia uliante a zaza, a tultulin a pai laitakin David le a mite zong Akhish tawh a nungah pai uh hi." 
1Samuel29:3 Filistia galkap a ukte in, “Hih Hebru mite in hih lai ah bang hong hih uh ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Akhish in Filistia galkap a ukte kiangah, “Ni tampi, kum tampi kei tawh a om khin, Israel kumpi Saulʼ nasem pa David hi a, kei kiangah hong tai a kipanin tu ni dongin ama tungah mawhna ka mu kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:4 Ahih hangin Filistia galkap a ukte ama tungah heh uh hi. Filistia galkap a ukte in ama kiangah, “Amah na koihna munah a ciahkik theih nadingin hih mipa sawlkik in. Gal kidona sungah eiteʼ lang hong suak kha ding ahih manin galdona sungah eite tawh amah hong kuan suk lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mipa in a topa tawh kilemna bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Hih lai-a om miteʼ lutang tawh bawl ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
1Samuel29:5 Amaute khatlekhat in la-in sa-in laam uh a, ‘Saul in a tulin that, David in a tul sawmin that,’ a cih pa uh hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel29:6 Tua ciangin Akhish in David samin ama kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, nang na thuman a, hih vai ah kei tawh hong kuan khia-in na ciah ding man ka sa hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei kiangah nong pai a kipan tu ni dong nang tungah khialhna bangmah ka mu kei hi. Ahih hangin uliante in nang hong thukim lo uh hi." 
1Samuel29:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ciahkik in. Filistia uliante na lungkim lohsak khak loh nadingin lungkim takin ciah in,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:8 Tua ciangin David in Akhish kiangah, “Ahih hangin, keimah in bang hih ka hi hiam? Ka to kumpipaʼ galte do-in ka pai theih loh nadingin nangma nasepna ah kong tum ni a kipan tu hun dong na nasem paʼ tungah bang mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:9 Tua ciangin Akhish in David dawngin, “Nang pen keima muhna ah Pasianʼ vantungmi khat mah bangin paubaang lo na hihna ka thei hi; ahi zongin Filistia galkap a ukte in, ‘Amah pen eite tawh gal phualah hong kuan to lo ding hi,’ ci uh hi." 
1Samuel29:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tawh a hong pai na topaʼ nasemte tawh zingsangin tho baih un. Zingsangin kipan baih unla, khua a vak phetin kihem khia un,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel29:11 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia gamah a ciahkik dingin David a mite tawh zingsang tungin ding khia uh a, Filistia-te ahihleh Jezreel khua ah pai to uh hi." 
1Samuel30:1 David le a mite a ni thum ni-in Ziklag hong tun uh ciangin, Amalek-te in Negeb le Ziklag na sim khin uh hi. Amaute in Ziklag zo-in mei tawh na hal uh a," 
1Samuel30:2 numei khempeuh le tua khua sunga om teng a neu a lianin man uh hi. Amaute in khat zong that lo uh a, ahih hangin amaute khempeuh paikhiatpih uh hi." 
1Samuel30:3 David le a mite khuapi a tun uh ciangin a khuapi uh mei tawh na kihalin, a zite uh, a tanute uh le a tapate uh salin a kimat khitna thei uh hi." 
1Samuel30:4 Tua ciangin David le amah tawh a om mite in a aw uh gingsakin a tha bei dongun kap uh hi. 
1Samuel30:5 Davidʼ zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam le Karmel khuami Nabalʼ zi meigongnu Abigail zong salin kiman hi." 
1Samuel30:6 David nakpi takin lungkham hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a tanu a tapate uh hangin lungsim sia uh ahih manin amaute in suang tawh amah den ding gen uh hi. Ahih hangin Topa a Pasian in David tha khauhsak hi. 
1Samuel30:7 Tua ciangin David in Ahimelek tapa Abiathar kiangah, “Siampi puan hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abiathar in David kiangah siampi puan a paipih hi." 
1Samuel30:8 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dong a, “Hih mihonte ka delh ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Delh in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pha taktak dinga, na mite na hon khia zo taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:9 Tua ahih ciangin David le amah tawh a om mihing za gukte kuan khia uh a, Besor lui ah tungin, tua lai ah mi pawl khat kinusia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:10 Ahih hangin David le mi za lite a delhin paisuak uh a, Besor lui a gal kah dingin a gim lua mi za nih kinusia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:11 Amaute in Egypt mi khat gamlak ah mu uh a, David kiangah amah paipih uh hi. Amaute in an pia uh a, amah in ne hi. Amaute in tui dawn ding zong a pia uh hi." 
1Samuel30:12 Theimoh khat le leenggahkeu bawk nih zong a pia uh hi. Amah in tuate a nek khit ciangin a tha hong dimkik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh an ahi a, tui ahi zongin sun thum le zan thum ne lo dawn loin om hi." 
1Samuel30:13 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Nang kuate na hi hiam? Koi pan na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Kei pen Amalek-te khatʼ nasem, Egypt mi tangval khat ka hi hi. Tu ma ni thum lai-in ka ci na ahih manin ka topa in hong nusia hi." 
1Samuel30:14 Kote in Khereth miteʼ Negeb gam le Judah-teʼ gam sung le Kaleb miteʼ Negeb gam ka sim uh a, mei tawh Ziklag ka hal uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:15 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Hih mite kiangah nong paipih suk nuam ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nangmah in kei nong thah loh nading ahi a, ka topaʼ khut sungah nong apkik loh nading ahi zongin Pasianʼ min tawh kei tungah hong kiciam peuh lecin hih mihonte kiangah nang kong paipih suk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:16 Tua ciangin amah in David paipih suk hi. Filistia-teʼ gam le Judah gam panin a lak uh na tampite hangin amaute gam sung khempeuh ah kithehthangin an ne, tui dawn, laamin na om uh hi." 
1Samuel30:17 Tua ciangin David in a zing ciang phalvak a kipan nitak dong amaute vat gawp a, kalaoh tung tuangin a tai tangval za lite sim loh amaute khat zong suakta lo uh hi." 
1Samuel30:18 David in Amalek-teʼ lak sa khempeuh ngahkik a, a zi nihte hon khia hi." 
1Samuel30:19 A neu a lian, tanute tapate nate ahi a, a kila khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a kisam khat zong om lo a, David in a vekpi-in ciah pihkik hi." 
1Samuel30:20 David in tuuhonte le bawnghonte khempeuh zong man hi. Mite in tua ganhingte ama mai ah hawl uh a, “Davidʼ na lakte ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:21 Tua ciangin, David a zui dingin a gim lua, Besor lui ah a kinusia mihing za nihte kiangah David tung hi. David le amah tawh a om mite a dawn dingin amaute hong kuan khia uh a, a nai a tun ciangin David in amaute hopih hi." 
1Samuel30:22 Tua ciangin David tawh a pai mite lak panin a gilo le migina lote khempeuh in, “Amaute pen eite tawh hong paisuak lo uh ahih manin, amaute in a zite le a tate uh la-in a paikhiatpih uh cih sim loh, eiteʼ ngahkik nate khat zong amaute i pia kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Samuel30:23 Ahih hangin David in, “Ka sanggamte aw, Topa in eite hong piak sa nate tua bangin na hih kei ding uh hi. Amah in eite hong kemin eite a do dinga hong pai mihonte i khut sungah hong pia khin hi." 
1Samuel30:24 Hih thu ah kua in noʼ thu hong ngai ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh gal sungah a kuan mipaʼ tanh zah mah, van a ngak mipa in tang dinga, amaute in a kibangin ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:25 Tua ni a kipanin tu ni dongin amah in Israel-te adingin thukham le biakna ngeina kipin a bawl hi. 
1Samuel30:26 Ziklag a tun ciangin David in Judah upa a lawmte kiangah a na lakte pawl khat khakin, “ Topaʼ galteʼ na a kilate sung panin hih lai ah note ading letsong a om hi,” a ci hi." 
1Samuel30:27 Tua nate pen Bethel, Negeb gam sunga om Ramoth le Jattir," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer, Sifmoth, Eshtemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 Karmel, Jerahmeel khuapite, Ken khuapite," 
1Samuel30:30 Hormah, Borashan, Athak," 
1Samuel30:31 Hebron sunga omte, David le a mite a pai ngeina mun khempeuhte ading ahi hi." 
1Samuel31:1 Filistia-te in Israel-te sim uh hi. Filistia-teʼ mai ah Israel-te tai uh a, Gilboa Mual tungah thahin tuk uh hi." 
1Samuel31:2 Filistia-te in Saul le a tapate pha uh hi. Filistia-te in Saulʼ tapate Jonathan, Abinadab le Malkhishua a that uh hi." 
1Samuel31:3 Gal in nakpi takin Saul neh a, gal thaltawite in nakpi takin amah liamsak hi." 
1Samuel31:4 Tua ciangin Saul in a galhiam pua pa kiangah, “Hih dawibia mite hong pai-in kei hong dawt letin hong mawlpih kha ding uh ahih manin na namsau dok inla, tua tawh hong dawt let in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a galhiam pua pa in hih ngam lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah lau mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in ama namsau la-in tua tungah puk hi." 
1Samuel31:5 A galhiam pua pa in Saul a sihna a muh ciangin amah zong a namsau tungah kipuk suksakin amah tawh a si khawm hi. 
1Samuel31:6 Tua bangin Saul, a tapa thumte, a galhiam pua pa le a mi khempeuh, a ni kikhatin a si khawm uh hi." 
1Samuel31:7 Tua ciangin Jezreel kuam gal khat le Jordan gal khat a om Israel mite in Israel mite tai-in Saul le a tapate a sih khitna thu a zak uh ciangin amaute in a khuapite uh nusia-in tai uh ahih ciangin Filistia-te hong pai-in tuate sungah a teeng uh hi. 
1Samuel31:8 A zing ciangin a kithat miteʼ na a la dingin Filistia-te hong pai ciangin Saul le a tapa thumte Gilboa Mual tungah a si mu uh hi. 
1Samuel31:9 Amaute in Saulʼ lu tan khia-in a galhiam hawk khia uh a, a milimte uh le mite kiangah hih thuhoih a puak dingin Filistia gam sung khempeuh ah kamtaite a sawl uh hi." 
1Samuel31:10 Amaute in Ashtaroth biakinn sungah ama galhiam koih uh a, Bethshan khuakulh ah ama luang a suang uh hi." 
1Samuel31:11 Ahih hangin Jabesh-gilead ah a teeng mite in Saulʼ tungah Filistia-teʼ hihna a zak uh ciangin," 
1Samuel31:12 a hang mi khempeuh dingin zan tawntung pai uh a, Bethshan kulh tung panin Saulʼ luang le a tapateʼ luangte va la uh hi. Amaute in Jabesh ah tunpihin tua lai ah a hal uh hi." 
1Samuel31:13 Amaute in a guhte la-in Jabesh khua sung makeng kung nuai ah vui uh a, ni sagih sung an a tang uh hi." 
2Samuel1:1 Saul a sih khit, Amalek-te a thahna panin David a ciahkik ciangin Ziklag ah David ni nih om hi." 
2Samuel1:2 A ni thum ni-in, a puan kikekin a lu tungah lei omin Saulʼ giahphual panin mi khat hong pai hi. David kiangah amah hong tun ciangin leilak ah pukin zahtakna a bawl hi." 
2Samuel1:3 David in ama kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in David kiangah, “Israel giahphual panin kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:4 David in ama kiangah, “Bangci bang ahi hiam? Hong gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Giahphual panin mite tai a, mi tampi zong pukin si uh hi. Saul le a tapa Jonathan zong a si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:5 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah a gen tangvalpa kiangah, “Saul le a tapa Jonathan a sihna bangci theih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:6 Tua ciangin tangvalpa in, “Gilboa Mual ah ka om kha a, tua lai munah Saul a teipi tungah kingam hi." 
2Samuel1:7 Saul in a nung lam hong et ciangin kei hong mu-in hong sam hi. Keimah in ka dawng a, ‘Hih lai ah om ing,’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel1:8 Saul in kei kiangah, ‘Kua na hi hiam?’ hong ci hi. Keimah in Saul ka dawng a, ‘Kei, Amalek mi ka hi hi,’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel1:9 Saul in kei kiangah, ‘Ka pangah ding inla kei hong that in; bang hang hiam cih leh gimna ka thuak a, ahi zongin ka naang lai hi,’ hong ci hi." 
2Samuel1:10 Tua ahih ciangin ama pangah dingin amah ka that hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a tuk khit ciangin nungta zo lo taktak ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Tua ciangin a lu tungah a om kumpi lukhu le a ban tungah a om a banbulh kong la a, tuate hih lai ka topa kiangah kong paipih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:11 Tua ciangin David in ama puante lenin bal kek a, amah tawh a om mite khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin a hih uh hi." 
2Samuel1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Saul, a tapa Jonathan le Topaʼ mi Israel-te hangin amaute thumin kap uh a, nitak dong an a tang uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal sungah amaute si uh hi." 
2Samuel1:13 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah thu a puak tangvalpa kiangah, “Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen Amalek mi peemta khatʼ tapa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:14 David in ama kiangah, “ Topaʼ sathau nilh pa a that dingin na khut na liikkhiat ding na lau loh a bangci thu ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:15 Tua ciangin David in tangvalte khat samin, “Pai in; amah that lum in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua thupuak pa sat a, amah a si hi." 
2Samuel1:16 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Nangma mawhna nangma lu tungah tung tahen; bang hang hiam cih leh nangma kampau in nangʼ lang khat ah teci pangin, ‘ Topaʼ sathau nilh pa ka that khin hi,’ na ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel1:17 Tua ciangin Saul le a tapa Jonathanʼ hangin kah la phuakin David kap a," 
2Samuel1:18 amah in Judah mite tungah hih kah la a kihilh nading thu a pia hi. Tua la pen Jashar Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Amah in: 
2Samuel1:19 “Israel aw, na minthanna, na mual sangte tungah kithat! A vanglian pa bangci-in tuk!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gath khua sungah gen kei in. Ashkelon kongzing ah genthang kei in. Filistia numeite lungdam kha ding, dawibia numeite nuamin diang kha ding." 
2Samuel1:21 “No Gilboa mualte aw, daitui ahi a, guahtui ahi zongin, na tung uh ah omsak kei un. Tui thukpi kilok zong omsak kei un! Bang hang hiam cih leh a vanglian paʼ lum nin a, Saulʼ lum, sathau kinuh lo hi." 
2Samuel1:22 “Jonathanʼ thaltang gupha a, Saulʼ namsau zong kihtakhuai hi. Jonathanʼ thaltang guakkik lo a, Saulʼ namsau zong hong guakkik lo hi." 
2Samuel1:23 “Saul le Jonathan, ki-it uh a, it-huai uh! A sih a hinin amaute kikhen lo a, muvanlai sangin zaptel zaw uh a, humpinelkai sangin thahat zaw uh hi." 
2Samuel1:24 “No Israel numeite aw, Saulʼ hangin kap un. Puansan neel a silh, na puan tung uh ah kizepna kham a suangte aw, ama hangin kap un." 
2Samuel1:25 “A vanglian pa bangci-in tuk galphual sungah! Jonathan aw, na mual sangte tungah nang hong kithat hi." 
2Samuel1:26 Nangma hangin ka lungkham hi, ka sanggam Jonathan; kei nong itna lamdang a, numeiʼ itna sangin lian zaw hi." 
2Samuel1:27 “A vanglian pa bangci-in tuk, galhiamte bangci-in sia!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:1 Hih hun khit ciangin David in Topa thu dong a, “Judah khuapi khat peuhpeuh ah ka pai to ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in ama kiangah, “Pai to in,” a ci hi. David in, “Koi pen ah pai to ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hebron ah,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin tua lai ah David pai to a, ama zi nihte, Jezreel khuami Ahinoam le Karmel khuami Nabalʼ zi meigongnu Abigail zong a pai uh hi." 
2Samuel2:3 David in amah tawh a om a mite, mi khempeuh a innkuan pih ciat tawh paipih to a, Hebron khua ah amaute a teeng uh hi." 
2Samuel2:4 Tua ciangin Judah mite hong pai-in amaute in tua lai munah Judah kumpi dingin David sathau a nilh uh hi. Amaute in David kiangah, “Saul a vuite pen Jabesh-gilead mite hi,” ci-in a gen uh ciangin" 
2Samuel2:5 Jabesh-gilead mite kiangah David in kamtaite sawlin amaute kiangah, “Note in na topa uh Saul tungah thumanna lakin amah vui na hih manun Topa in note thupha hong pia tahen!" 
2Samuel2:6 Tu-in Topa in itna kip le thumanna note tungah hong lak tahen! Note hih bangin gamta na hih manun note tungah thuhoih kong bawl ding hi. 
2Samuel2:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note kithakhauhsakin hang un; bang hang hiam cih leh na topa uh Saul si a, Judah mite in amauʼ tungah kumpi-in kei sathau hong nilh khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:8 Tu-in Nerʼ tapa Abner, Saulʼ galkap mangpa in Saulʼ tapa Ishbosheth la-in Mahanaim ah paipih hi." 
2Samuel2:9 Amah in Gilead, Ashur, Jezreel, Efraim, Benjamin le Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah bawl hi." 
2Samuel2:10 Israel-te tungah uk dingin a kipatin Saulʼ tapa Ishbosheth kum sawm li pha a, amah in kum nih sung uk hi. Ahih hangin Judah minamte in Davidʼ nung zui uh hi." 
2Samuel2:11 Judah minamte tungah kumpi-in Hebron ah David kum sagih le kha guk sung a om hi. 
2Samuel2:12 Nerʼ tapa Abner le Saulʼ tapa Ishboshethʼ nasemte Mahanaim panin Gibeon ah paikhia uh hi. 
2Samuel2:13 Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab le Davidʼ nasemte pai khia-in Gibeon bual ah amaute dawntuah uh hi. Amaute bual lang khat ah, a dang khatte a bual lang khat ah tu uh hi." 
2Samuel2:14 Tua ciangin Abner in Joab kiangah, “Tangvalte dingsakin eiteʼ mai ah kimawlsak ni,” a ci hi. Joab in, “Amaute dingsak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:15 Tua ciangin amaute dingin gal kah uh a, Benjamin le Saulʼ tapa Ishbosheth adingin sawm le nih le Davidʼ nasemte zong sawm le nih mah ahi hi." 
2Samuel2:16 Tua ciangin alang ciat uh lutang lenin, a namsau tawh a lang pa dawt ciat uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tukkhawm uh hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeon ah a om tua mun pen Helkath-hazzurim kici hi." 
2Samuel2:17 Tua ni-in gal kidona nasia mahmah a, Abner le Israel mite Davidʼ nasemte in zo uh hi." 
2Samuel2:18 Zeruiahʼ tapa thumte, Joab, Abishai le Asahel, tua lai ah om uh hi. Asahel pen Syria sakhi lee bangin a khe manlang hi." 
2Samuel2:19 Asahel in Abner delh a, amah a delh laitakin Abner a zuihna ah pial het loin delh paisuak hi." 
2Samuel2:20 Tua ciangin Abner in a nung enin, “Asahel aw, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Keimah ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:21 Abner in ama kiangah, “Na tak lamah ahi a, na veilamah ahi zongin kihei inla, tangvalte khatpeuh manin a na sut in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah a zuihna panin Asahel pial lo hi." 
2Samuel2:22 Tua ciangin Abner in Asahel kiangah, “Keimah zuihna panin pial in; bang hangin nang lei ah hong vat gawp ding ka hi hiam? Nang hong vat gawp leng na sanggampa Joabʼ mai ah ka maitang bangci lak ding ka hi hiam?” a cikik hi." 
2Samuel2:23 Ahih hangin amah lampial nuam lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abner in a teipi tong lamin a gil khawh a, a nungah a teipi leng suak hi. Tua ciangin amah tukin tua phualah a si hi. Asahel tukin a sihna munah a pai mi khempeuh tang loin a ding uh hi." 
2Samuel2:24 Ahih hangin Joab le Abishai in Abner delh ding kipan uh hi. Ni a tum laitakin Gibeon gamlak paina lampi a om Giah mai ah a kikhung Ammah mual a tung uh hi. 
2Samuel2:25 Tua ciangin Abner a pawlpih Benjamin-te kikaikhawm uh a, amaute pawl khat suakin mual dawn khat ah a pang uh hi." 
2Samuel2:26 Tua ciangin Abner in Joab samin, “Mi hih bangin kithat lai ding ahi hiam? A tawpna ah a haksat zawk nading thei lo na hi hiam? A sanggamte uh a delhna panin na mite a kihei nadingin na thupiak ding bang tan sawt lai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:27 Tua ciangin Joab in, “Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin, hong pau lo hi lecin, a sanggamte uh a delhna panin zingsang mateng mite khawl lo taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel2:28 Tua ahih ciangin Joab in peengkul tum hi. Mi khempeuh khawl a, Israel-te delh nawn loin amaute in do nawn lo uh hi." 
2Samuel2:29 Tua ciangin Abner le a mite Arabah kantanin tua zan tawntung pai uh hi. Amaute in Jordan kantan uh a, sun ma sungteng pai-in Mahanaim tung uh hi." 
2Samuel2:30 Abner a delhna panin Joab ciahkik hi. Amah in mi khempeuh a kaihkhop khit ciangin Asahel sim lohin Davidʼ nasemte mi sawm kua le kua kisam hi. 
2Samuel2:31 Ahih hangin Davidʼ nasemte in Abner aʼ ahi Benjamin-te mihing za thum le sawm guk that uh hi. 
2Samuel2:32 Tua ciangin amaute in Asahel la-in Bethlehem ah a om ama paʼ hanah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Joab le a mite zan tawntung pai uh a, Hebron ah khua a vak hi." 
2Samuel3:1 Saulʼ innkuan le Davidʼ innkuanteʼ kikalah sau veipi gal kidona om hi. David thahat semsem a, Saul thaneem semsem hi." 
2Samuel3:2 Hebron ah Davidʼ tapate suak hi: A tacil pen Jezreel khuami Ahinoam tawh a neih Amnon ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:3 A ta nihna pen Karmel khuami Nabalʼ zi meigongnu Abigail tawh a neih Khileab ahi hi. A thumna pen Geshur kumpipa Talmaiʼ tanu Maakahʼ tapa Absalom ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:4 A lina pen Haggithʼ tapa Adonijah ahi hi. A ngana pen Abitalʼ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:5 A gukna pen Davidʼ zi Eglah ta Ithream ahi hi. Hihte pen Hebron khua ah Davidʼ sung pan a suak ahi hi. 
2Samuel3:6 Saul innkuan le David innkuante a kisim sungin Saulʼ innkuan sungah Abner hong thahat semsem hi. 
2Samuel3:7 Tu-in Saul in Aiahʼ tanu Rizpah min nei zineu khat nei hi. Ishbosheth in Abnerʼ kiangah, “Bang hangin ka paʼ zineu luppih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:8 Tua ciangin Ishboshethʼ thugennate hangin Abner heh mahmah a, “Kei pen Judah mite adingin ui bang lel ka hi hiam? Keimah in na pa Saulʼ innkuante, a sanggam pasalte le a lawmte tungah tu ni dongin thumanna ka lak lai a, Davidʼ khut sungah note kong pia nai kei hi. Ahi zongin tu ni-in nang in numei khat lel tawh kisai-in kei nong mawhsak hi." 
2Samuel3:9 Saulʼ innkuan panin kumpi gam khinin, Dan panin Beer-sheba dong Israel le Judah-te tungah Davidʼ kumpi tokhom phuh ding Topa in ama tungah a ciam sa thu David adingin ka tunsak kei taak leh Pasian in keimah Abner hong dawm kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Ishbosheth in kam khatin zong Abner dawng ngam lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Abner kihta hi. 
2Samuel3:12 Tua ciangin Abner in Hebron-a David kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Hih gam kua in uk ding ahi hiam? Kei tawh thuciamna hong bawl in. Israel-te khempeuh nang kiangah a paipih dingin keimah kong pang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:13 Amah in, “Pha hi; nang tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Ahih hangin nangʼ tung panin na khat ka kisam hi. Tua pen, kei tawh a kimu dingin nong pai ciangin Saulʼ tanu Mikhal nong paipih masak kei leh ka mai na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:14 Tua ciangin David in Saulʼ tapa Ishbosheth kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Filistia-teʼ vun dawn za khatin ka lei sa ka zi Mikhal hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:15 Tua ciangin Ishbosheth in mi sawlin ama pasal, Laish tapa Paltiel kiang panin amah a la hi." 
2Samuel3:16 Ahih hangin a pasal in amah zui-in, Bahurim paina lam tawntung ama nungah a kap hi. Tua ciangin Abner in ama kiangah, “Pai in; ciahkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah ciahkik hi." 
2Samuel3:17 Tua ciangin Abner in Israel upate tawh thu kikumin, “A beisa tawl khat sungteng note tungah kumpi dingin David na zong uh hi." 
2Samuel3:18 Tu-in taksuaksak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in David tungah kam ciamin, ‘Ka nasem pa Davidʼ khut tawh Filistia-teʼ khut sung pan le amauʼ galte khempeuhʼ khut sung panin ka mi Israel-te ka hon khia ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:19 Abner in Benjamin-te tungah zong thu gen hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te le Benjamin-te khempeuh in tua bangin hih ding hoih hi, ci-in a ngaihsutna uh Hebron-a Davidʼ kiangah a gen dingin Abner a pai hi." 
2Samuel3:20 Hebron-a David kiangah mihing sawm nih tawh Abner a pai ciangin, Abner le amah tawh a om mite adingin David in pawi khat a kham hi." 
2Samuel3:21 Tua ciangin Abner in David kiangah, “Amaute in nang tawh thuciamna a bawl theih nading le na deih bangin amaute khempeuh tungah na uk theih nadingin keimah dingin ka to kumpipa kiangah Israel-te khempeuh ka kaikhawm ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in Abner sawl khia a, amah zong lung nuamin a pai hi." 
2Samuel3:22 Tua khit phetin a galsimna panun Davidʼ nasemte Joab tawh hong tung uh a, amaute in na tampi hong ciahpih uh hi. Ahih hangin Hebron khua sung David kiangah Abner na om nawn lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh David in amah sawl khia khin a, amah lungnuamin ciah khinzo hi." 
2Samuel3:23 Joab le amah tawh a om galkap khempeuh hong tun ciangin Joab kiangah, “Kumpipaʼ kiangah Nerʼ tapa Abner hong pai a, lungnuam takin amah ciah khiasak khin hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Samuel3:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Joab pai-in, “Bang hih na hi hiam? Na kiangah Abner hong pai hi. Nang in amah sawl khia-in amah a ciahkhiat khitna bang thu ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel3:25 Nang hong khem ding, na pusuahna le na sung tumna a thei ding le na hihna khempeuh a thei dingin Nerʼ tapa Abnerʼ hong paina na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:26 Davidʼ omna panin Joab a paikhiat ciangin, amah in Abnerʼ nungah kamtaite sawl a, amaute in Sirah Tuibeem panin amah hong paipihkik uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua thu thei lo hi." 
2Samuel3:27 Hebron ah Abner hong paikik ciangin, Joab in amah tawh a kituam ho dingin kulh kongpi pam ah paikhiatpih a, a sanggampa Asahelʼ phulakna-in amah in a gil sun a, tua ciangin a si hi." 
2Samuel3:28 Tua khit, David in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in, “Nerʼ tapa Abner a kithahna hangin Topaʼ mai ah keimah le ka kumpi gam, a tawntungin mawhbaang lo hi." 
2Samuel3:29 Joab lu tung le ama innkuante khempeuh tungah tu tahen! Joabʼ innkuante nin paikhia a nei mi ahi a, a phak mi ahi a, ciangkhut khun mi ahi a, namsau tawh a kithat mi ahi a, annek ding a nei lo mi tawh ahi zongin kilawi ngei kei tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:30 Tua bangin Joab le a sanggampa Abishai in Abner that uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Gibeon-a gal kidona ah a sanggampa uh Asahel thahsak hi. 
2Samuel3:31 Tua ciangin David in Joab le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh kiangah, “Na puan uh bal kekin puanhampi silh unla, Abnerʼ mai ah kap un,” a ci hi. Kumpipa David in hankuang a zui hi." 
2Samuel3:32 Amaute in Hebron ah Abner vui uh a, Abnerʼ hanah kumpipa a kap hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh zong a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel3:33 Tua ciangin Abnerʼ hangin kumpipa in kah la-in, “Mihai pa a sih bangin Abner si ding ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel3:34 Na khutte kihen lo a, na khete kol kibulh lo hi. Migiloteʼ thah bangin nang na si hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama hangin kapkik uh hi." 
2Samuel3:35 Tua ciangin ni a om lai-in an ne dingin David a zol dingin mi khempeuh hong pai uh a, ahih hangin David kiciamin, “Ni a tum matengin an ahi a, na khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin ka ciap taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel3:36 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in tua thu thei uh a, tua in amaute lungdamsak hi. Kumpipaʼ sep khempeuh in mi khempeuh lungdamsak hi." 
2Samuel3:37 Tua ahih ciangin Nerʼ tapa Abner thah ding kumpipaʼ deihna ahih loh lam tua ni-in mi khempeuh le Israel-te khempeuh in thei uh hi. 
2Samuel3:38 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Tu ni-in Israel-te sungah ulian ahi mi lian khat a tukna thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel3:39 Sathau kinilh kumpipa hi napi-in tu ni-in ka tha a nem hi. Zeruiahʼ ta hih mite kei adingin haksa lua hi. Gamtat sia pa a gitlohna bangin Topa in thuk tahen!” a ci hi. 
2Samuel4:1 Saulʼ tapa Ishbosheth in Hebron ah Abner a sihna thu a zak ciangin a tha kiam a, Israel-te khempeuh lungkia hi." 
2Samuel4:2 Saulʼ tapa in galsim pawlte a makai mi nih nei hi. Khat paʼ min Baanah hi-in, a dang khat paʼ min Rekhab hi a, Beeroth khua pan Benjamin mi Rimmonʼ tapate ahi uh hi. (Bang hang hiam cih leh Beeroth zong Benjamin aʼ in kisim hi." 
2Samuel4:3 Beeroth mite Gittaim ah tai uh a, tu ni dongin tua lai ah peemta-in om uh hi.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Saulʼ tapa Jonathan in a khe zaw tapa khat nei hi. Jezreel panin Saul le Jonathanʼ thu hong tunin amah kum nga pha hi. Amah a cingnu in amah la-in taipih a, tua nu a nawh taina lamin naupang kia-in a khe zaw hi. Ama min Mefibosheth ahi hi." 
2Samuel4:5 Tu-in Beeroth mi Rimmonʼ tapate Rekhab le Baanah ding khia uh a, sun nisat hun pawlin Ishboshethʼ inn ah a sun tawlngak laitakin hong tung uh hi." 
2Samuel4:6 Inn kongcing nu mangbuh a su khin hi a, a lusuk suakin ihmu hi. Tua ahih ciangin Rekhab le a sanggampa Baanah simlut uh hi." 
2Samuel4:7 Amaute inn sungah a tun uh ciangin a lupna dei sunga lupna tungah Ishbosheth lumin a om laitakin amaute in amah satin that uh a, a lu tan uh hi. Amaute in ama lu la-in Arabah lam tawnin zan tawntung pai uh a," 
2Samuel4:8 Ishboshethʼ lutang Hebron-a Davidʼ kiang tunpih uh hi. Amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai ah, thah dingin nang a hong zong, na gal Saulʼ tapa Ishboshethʼ lutang om hi. Topa in tu ni-in Saul le a suanlekhakte tungah koteʼ to kumpipa adingin hong thuksak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel4:9 Ahih hangin David in Beeroth mi Rimmonʼ tapate Rekhab le a sanggampa Baanah dawngin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin ka nuntakna hong hon khia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
2Samuel4:10 mi khat in kei kiangah, ‘En in, Saul si hi,’ ci-in hong gen ciangin, amah thuhoih puakin kingaihsun a, ama thu puak thaman ka piakna-in amah manin Ziklag ah ka that hi." 
2Samuel4:11 Migilote in a thuman mi khat ama inn sung a lupna tungah a thah ciangin noteʼ tungah ama phu hong la-in, leitung panin note hong susia zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel4:12 Tua ciangin David in a tangvalte thu pia a, tangvalte in amaute thatin a khut le a khete sattan uh a, Hebron-a bual gei ah amaute khai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Ishboshethʼ lutang la-in Hebron-a Abnerʼ hanah a vui uh hi." 
2Samuel5:1 Tua ciangin Israel minamte khempeuh Hebron-a David kiangah hong pai-in, “En in, kote pen nangma guh le nangma sa ka hi uh hi." 
2Samuel5:2 A beisa hunte ah, kote tungah Saul kumpi ahih laitakin Israel-te kuan khiat pihin a ciahpih pa pen nangmah na hi hi. Topa in nangma kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima mi Israel-te a cing pa hi-in, Israel-te tungah ulian na hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi."
