2Samuel5:3 Tua ahih ciangin Israel upate khempeuh Hebron-a kumpipa kiangah hong pai uh hi. Kumpipa David in amaute tawh Topaʼ mai Hebron ah thuciamna khat bawl a, amaute in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in David sathau a nilh uh hi." 
2Samuel5:4 Gam uk dingin a kipatin David kum sawm thum pha a, amah in kum sawm li sung uk hi." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron panin kum sagih le kha guk sung Judah gam sung uk a, Jerusalem panin kum sawm thum le thum sung Israel-te khempeuh le Judah gam a uk hi." 
2Samuel5:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa le a mite tua gam a teeng Jebus mite a sim dingin Jerusalem ah pai uh a, amaute in David kiangah, “Kote nong zo vet kei ding hi; mittaw le khebaite nangawn in nang hong not khia zo ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. “Hih lai ah David hong pai zo peuhmah lo ding hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi." 
2Samuel5:7 Ahi zongin David in kumpipaʼ khua ahi Zion mun muanhuai la hi. 
2Samuel5:8 Tua ciangin David in tua ni-in, “Jebus mite a vat gawp nuam peuhmah, keimah David in ka muhdah zahin a mudah mi peuhmah, tua khebaite le mittawte a sim dingin tuizawl dungah pai tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Mittawte le khebaite Topaʼ inn sungah lut lo ding hi,” kici hi." 
2Samuel5:9 Tua ciangin mun muanhuai sungah David teengin David khuapi ci-in min a phuak hi. Tua ciangin David in Millo panin biakinn lamah khuapi lam hi. 
2Samuel5:10 David lian semsem hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Pasian, Topa in amah ompih hi." 
2Samuel5:11 Tua ciangin Taia kumpipa Hiram in kamtaite le taamtak singte le David adingin inn khat a lamsak khutsiamte le leilesuang inn lam a siamte zong a puak hi. 
2Samuel5:12 Tua ciangin David in Israel-teʼ tungah kumpi-in Topa in amah a kipsak khitna le Israel miteʼ hangin ama kumpi gam a liatsakna a phawktel hi. 
2Samuel5:13 Hebron panin hong tun khit ciangin David in Jerusalem panin zineute le zite la thuah lai a, Davidʼ tanute le tapate piang thuah lai hi." 
2Samuel5:14 Jerusalem ah a neih a tateʼ min: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhar, Elishua, Nefeg, Jafia," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada le Elifelet ahi hi." 
2Samuel5:17 Israel-te tungah kumpi-in David sathau a kinilh khitna thu Filistia-te in a zak uh ciangin David a man dingin Filistia-te khempeuh kuan to uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua thu za-in munmuanhuai ah pai suk hi. 
2Samuel5:18 Tu-in Filistia-te hong pai-in Refaim kuam sung dim uh hi. 
2Samuel5:19 Tua ciangin David in Topa thu dongin, “Filistia-te do-in ka kuan to ding hiam? Keima khut sungah amaute na hong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in David kiangah, “Kuan to in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khut sungah Filistia-te kong pia taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel5:20 Tua ciangin Baal-perazim ah David hong pai-in David in tua lai ah amaute a zo hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tuikhang in a phulkhap bangin Topa in ka mai ah ka galte phukham hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun Baal-perazim ci-in min kiphuak hi." 
2Samuel5:21 Filistia-te in tua lai ah a milimte uh nusia uh a, David le a mite in tuate a pua khia uh hi." 
2Samuel5:22 Tua ciangin Filistia-te hong kuan tokik lai-in Refaim kuam sung dim khin uh hi. 
2Samuel5:23 David in Topa thu a dot ciangin amah in, “Na kuan to kei ding hi; amauteʼ nung lamah kual pai inla, lungli kungte gal panin amaute hih in." 
2Samuel5:24 Lungli kungteʼ dawnah lam paina kheging na zak ciangin na tha saan in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia galkapte a vat gawp dingin na mai ah Topa pai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel5:25 Tua ciangin Topa in amah a thupiak bangin David in hih a, Geba panin Gezer ciang dong Filistia-te a vat gawp hi." 
2Samuel6:1 David in Israel-te a kiteel khia mi tul sawm thum khawmkik hi. 
2Samuel6:2 Tua ciangin David in kherub-te tungah a tu, Vanglian Topaʼ min tawh a kisam Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang tua mun panin a paipih to dingin amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tawh Baalejudah ah a pai hi." 
2Samuel6:3 Amaute in leeng thak khat tungah Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang pua uh a, mual tunga om Abinadabʼ inn panin paikhiatpih uh hi. Abinadabʼ tapate Uzzah le Ahio in leeng thak tungah Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang koihin hawl uh a, Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah Ahio a pai hi." 
2Samuel6:4  
2Samuel6:5 Tua ciangin David le Israel mite khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah a tha neih zahun la sa-in, laiza khausai lasaknate, harp khausai lasaknate, khuangneute, kuangtuahte le daltuahte tumin lungdamin a lam uh hi." 
2Samuel6:6 Nakonʼ ancilna mun a tun uh ciangin bawngtalte muktu ahih manin Uzzah in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zanin len kha hi. 
2Samuel6:7 Tua ciangin Uzzah tungah Topa hong sin so hi. Amah in Thuciamna Singkuang lamah a khut zan ahih manin Pasian in tua lai ah amah vatlum a, Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang gei ah amah si hi." 
2Samuel6:8 Topa in Uzzah gim pia ahih manin David heh hi. Tu ni dongin tua mun pen Perezuzzah kici hi. 
2Samuel6:9 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in David in Topa kihta hi. Amah in, “ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang bangci-in ka kiangah hong tung thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:10 Tua ahih ciangin David khuapi sungah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih ding David ut lo a, Gath khuami Obededomʼ inn ah paipih hi." 
2Samuel6:11 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Gath khuami Obededomʼ inn sungah kha thum sung om a, Topa in Obededom le a innkuan khempeuh thupha a pia hi." 
2Samuel6:12 Tua ciangin Kumpi David kiangah, “Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hangin Topa in Obededom innkuan le ama neih khempeuh thupha pia hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David pai-in Obededomʼ inn panin David khuapi ah lungdamna tawh Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih to hi." 
2Samuel6:13 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a puate kal guk a suan khit ciangin amah in a puate tawl khat khawlsakin bawngtal khat le bawng no thau khat biakna-in a pia hi. 
2Samuel6:14 Tua ciangin a tha neih khempeuh tawh Topaʼ mai ah David lam hi. David in saihadial siampi puan khat silh hi. 
2Samuel6:15 Tua ahih ciangin David le Israel mi khempeuh in otna le saki tumna awging tawh Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih to uh hi. 
2Samuel6:16 Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang David khuapi sung hong tun laitakin tawlet panin Saul tanu a zi Mikhal hong khuadak a, Topaʼ mai ah Kumpi David diangin a lam mu hi. Tua nu in a lungsim sungah amah simmawh hi." 
2Samuel6:17 Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hong tumpih uh a, David in ama adingin a lamsak puanbuk sung ama mun dingah a koih hi. Tua ciangin David in Topaʼ mai ah meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te a pia hi." 
2Samuel6:18 David in meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te a piak khit ciangin amah in Vanglian Topaʼ min tawh mite thupha pia a," 
2Samuel6:19 Israel mihon buppi, mi khempeuh, numei le pasalte tungah anlum pheng khat, sa baak khat le leenggahkeu pheng khat ciat a pia hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
2Samuel6:20 Tua ciangin a innkuante thupha a pia dingin David a ciah hi. Ahih hangin David a dawn dingin Saulʼ tanu Mikhal hong paikhia a, “Tu ni-in Israel kumpipa, mi mawkmawkte khat maizum loin a guak om bangin, a nasemteʼ numeiteʼ muhna ah tu ni-in a tangguakin omin, a mahmah bangci kipahtawi ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:21 Tua ciangin David in Mikhal kiangah, “ Topaʼ mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin a hong koih dingin na pa le a innkuan khempeuhte sangin kei a hong teel zaw Topaʼ mai ahi hi. Keimah in Topaʼ mai ah lungdamna ka bawl ding hi." 
2Samuel6:22 Hih sangin a simmawhhuai zaw-in ka kibawl lai dinga, nangma mit bekah a gina lo ka hi ding hi. Ahih hangin nangma gen numeite in keimah hong pahtawi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel6:23 Tua ahih ciangin Saulʼ tanu Mikhal in a sih ni dongin ta nei thei nawn lo hi. 
2Samuel7:1 Tu-in kumpipa ama inn sungah teengin Topa in ama kiim a a galte khempeuh panin tawlngakna a piak khit ciangin," 
2Samuel7:2 kumpipa in kamsang Nathan kiangah, “Tu-in thei in; keimah taamtak inn hoih sungah ka om a, ahih hangin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang puanbuk sungah om lai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:3 Tua ciangin Nathan in kumpipa kiangah, “Pai in; na lungsim a om khempeuh hih in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong ompih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:4 Ahih hangin tua zan mahin Nathan kiangah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
2Samuel7:5 “Pai inla ka nasem pa David kiangah gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ten nading biakinn khat hong lamsak ding na hi hiam? 
2Samuel7:6 Israel mite Egypt panin ka paikhiatpih toh ni a kipan tu ni dongin biakinn sungah ka om nai kei a, puanbuk sungah omin ka pai kawikawi hi." 
2Samuel7:7 Israel mite khempeuh tawh ka paina sa mun khempeuh ah, ka mi Israel-te a cing dingin ka piak thukhente khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Bang hangin taamtak biakinn hoih hong lamsak lo na hi hiam?” ci-in kam khat beek gen ngei ka hi hiam?’ ci hi." 
2Samuel7:8 “Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasem pa David kiangah hih bangin na gen ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin lo nona mun, tuute na zuihna panin nang kong la hi." 
2Samuel7:9 Na paina peuhpeuh ah nang tawh kong om a, na galte khempeuh ka hong zosak hi. Leitung mi lianteʼ min khat mah bangin nang adingin min lian khat kong bawlsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:10 Keimah in ka mi Israel-te adingin mun khat ka seh dinga, amauʼ munah amaute teengin a kinawngkaisak nawn loh nadingin amaute ka phut ding hi. Nidang a bangin mi ngongtatte in," 
2Samuel7:11 ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka koih khit zawh, amaute gimsak nawn lo ding hi. Na galte khempeuh panin nang tungah tawlngakna kong pia ding hi. Tua tham loin Topa in nang adingin suanlekhak hong bawlsak ding nang tungah Topa in gen hi." 
2Samuel7:12 Na pu na pateʼ kiang na zuat ni ciangin, nangma sung panin hong suak khia ding na tapa nangma nungah ka khangsak dinga, keimah in ama kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:13 Amah in keima min dingin biakinn khat lam dinga, keimah in ama kumpi gam tokhom a tawntungin ka kipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:14 Kei pen ama pa ka hi dinga, amah pen keima tapa hi ding hi. Amah in mawhna a bawl ciangin, keimah in miteʼ ciangduai tawh amah ka thuhilh ding hi." 
2Samuel7:15 Ahih hangin nangma ma-a ka hepkhiat Saulʼ tung panin ka lakkhiat bangin ama tung panin ka itna kip ka la khia kei ding hi. 
2Samuel7:16 Na suanlekhakte le na kumpi gam keima mai ah a kip tawntungin kibawl dinga, na kumpi tokhom kip tawntung ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel7:17 Hih thute khempeuh tawh a kizui le hih maangmuhna khempeuh tawh a kizui-in Nathan in David kiangah a gen hi. 
2Samuel7:18 Tua ciangin kumpi David sung tumin Topaʼ mai ah tu a, “Topa Pasian aw, tu ciang dong hih bangin kei nong kep nadingin kei kua hi a, ka innkuan bang ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel7:19 Hih pen nangma mitah thu neuno khat hi lai hi, Topa Pasian aw. A hong tung ding sau veipi sung na nasem paʼ suanlekhakteʼ thu ding na gen khin a, mailam khangte zong kei nong lak khin hi, O Topa Pasian!" 
2Samuel7:20 David in nang tungah bang gen thuah nawn ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na nasem pa na thei hi, O Topa Pasian!" 
2Samuel7:21 Nangma thuciamna bang le na lungsim tawh kizui-in na nasem pa na theihsak nadingin hih thu lian khempeuh na piangsak hi. 
2Samuel7:22 Tua ahih ciangin nang na lian takpi hi, Topa Pasian aw. Ka bilun ka zakna uh tawh kizui-in nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo a, nang sim loh Pasian dang om lo hi." 
2Samuel7:23 “Ama miteʼ mai ah minam khat le a pasian-te hawl khiatna tawh ama adingin min bawlin, amaute adingin a lian a lauhuai nate hihsakin, ama mi dingin a hon khia dingin Pasian a paina na mi Israel-te, leitung minam dang kua tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel7:24 Nangmah in nangma mi ahi tawntung dingin na mi Israel-te nangma adingin na kipsak hi. Topa aw, nangmah, amauteʼ Pasian na suak hi." 
2Samuel7:25 Topa Pasian aw, tu-in na nasem pa le ama suanlekhakte tawh kizomin na gen sa thu a tawntung dingin kipsak inla, nangma gen sa bangin hih in." 
2Samuel7:26 Tua hileh, ‘Vanglian Topa pen Israel-te tungah Pasian hi,’ ci-in nangma min kiliansak tawntung dinga, nangma mai ah na nasem pa Davidʼ suanlekhakte kumpi-in kikipsak ding hi." 
2Samuel7:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-teʼ Pasian, Vanglian Topa nangmah in, ‘Nangma suanlekhakte kumpi-in kong bawlsak ding hi,’ ci-in na nasem pa tungah pulakna na bawl khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nasem pa in nang tungah hih thungetna hong ngen ngam hi." 
2Samuel7:28 Tu-in Topa Pasian aw, nang, Pasian na hi a, na thute manin, na nasem pa tungah hih na hoih na ciam khin hi." 
2Samuel7:29 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangma mai ah a om tawntung theih nadingin na nasem paʼ suanlekhakte thupha piak ding hong lungkim in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in na gen khin a, nangma thupha tawh na nasem paʼ suanlekhakte thupha kipia tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel8:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin David in Filistia-te zo-in amaute nuaisiah a, David in Filistia-teʼ khut sung panin Methegammah khua a la hi." 
2Samuel8:2 Tua ciangin amah in Moab mite zo a, amaute khauzang khat tawh tehin, leilak ah amaute lumsak hi. Amah in thah dingin gual nih le khah dingin gual khat dim a teh hi. Tua ciangin Moab mite Davidʼ khutnuai mite suakin siah a puak uh hi." 
2Samuel8:3 Zobah kumpipa Rehobʼ tapa Hadadezer in Eufratis gun kiim gamte ngahkik nuamin hong kuan ahih manin David in amah do-in a zo hi. 
2Samuel8:4 David in ama tung panin sakol galkap tul khat le za sagih le khe galkap tul sawm nih la hi. David in leengkai sakol khempeuh a zagui at sat a, ahih hangin leeng za khat adingin a kicing a siit hi." 
2Samuel8:5 Damaskas gam a Syria mite, Zobah kumpipa Hadadezer a huh dingin hong kuan ciangin David in Syria mite tul sawm nih le tul nih a that hi." 
2Samuel8:6 Tua ciangin David in Damaskas gam Aram ah khuacingte a koih hi. Syria mite Davidʼ nasem suak uh a, siah a puak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuh ah gualzawhna a pia hi." 
2Samuel8:7 Tua ciangin David in Hadadezerʼ nasemte in a puak kham kibawl lumte la-in Jerusalem ah a paipih hi. 
2Samuel8:8 Hadadezerʼ khuapite Betah le Berothai panin Kumpi David in sumngo tampi tak a la hi. 
2Samuel8:9 Hamath kumpipa Toi in David in Hadadezerʼ galkap buppi a zawhna thu a zak ciangin," 
2Samuel8:10 amah in Hadadezer do-in a zawhna hangin amah va hopihin a lungdam pih dingin Toi in Kumpi David kiangah a tapa Joram a sawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hadadezer pen Toi tawh galin kido ngei zel hi. Joram in ngun, kham le sumngo tawh a kibawl nate puak hi." 
2Samuel8:11 Kumpi David in hihte zong, a nuaisiah minamte khempeuh Edom, Moab, Ammon mite, Filistia-te, Amalek le Zobah kumpipa Rehobʼ tapa Hadadezerʼ van nusiatte sung panin a ap ngun le kham tawh Topaʼ tungah a ap khawm hi." 
2Samuel8:12  
2Samuel8:13 David minthang semsem hi. A ciah ciangin amah in Ci Kuam ah Edom mite tul sawm le tul giat a that hi. 
2Samuel8:14 Tua ciangin amah in Edom ah khuacingte a koih hi. Edom gam sung khempeuh ah amah in khuacingte koih a, Edom mi khempeuh Davidʼ nasemte a suak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuh ah gualzosak hi." 
2Samuel8:15 Tua ahih ciangin David in Israel-te khempeuh uk a, a mite khempeuh tungah thutang le thuman a zang hi." 
2Samuel8:16 Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in galkapte uk hi. Ahiludʼ tapa Jehoshafat thuciamteh pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel8:17 Ahitubʼ tapa Zadok le Abiatharʼ tapa Ahimelek siampi ahi uh hi. Seraiah lai-at pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah in Khereth mite le Peleth mite uk uh hi. Davidʼ tapate pen siampite ahi uh hi. 
2Samuel9:1 Tua ciangin David in, “Jonathanʼ hangin ama tungah migitna ka lah theih nadingin Saulʼ innkuan sungah mi khatpeuh a om lai hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:2 Saulʼ innkuan sungah Ziba min nei nasem pa khat om a, amaute in David kiangah amah sam uh hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Ziba na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasem pa kei pen Ziba ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Pasianʼ tungah ka ciam sa bangin migitna ka lah theih nading Saulʼ innkuan ah mi khat beek om lai lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Jonathanʼ tapa khat om lai hi; amah a khe zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:4 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Amah koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Lodebar-a Ammielʼ tapa Makhirʼ inn ah amah om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:5 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in mi sawlin Lodebar-a Ammielʼ tapa Makhirʼ inn panin amah a lasak hi. 
2Samuel9:6 Tua ciangin Saulʼ tapa Jonathan, a ta Mefibosheth David kiangah hong pai a, maipukin zahtakna a bawl hi. Tua ciangin David in, “Mefibosheth!” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “En in, na nasem pa,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:7 Tua ciangin David in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih le na pa Jonathanʼ hangin nangma tungah migitna kong lak dinga, na pu Saulʼ leitang khempeuh nangma tungah kong piakik ding hi. Tua ciangin nangmah in ka sabuai ah an na ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:8 Tua ciangin amah in zahtakna bawlin, “A si sa ui tawh a kibang kei bang lel, nong hici bawl nadingin na nasem pa bang ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel9:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Saulʼ nasem pa Ziba samin ama kiangah, “Saul le a innkuan tawh a kizom khempeuh na topaʼ tupaʼ tungah ka pia khin hi." 
2Samuel9:10 Nang le na tapate le na nasemte in ama adingin lo na kho ding uh a, na topaʼ tupa in annek ding a neih theih nadingin a piangte na tunpih ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na topaʼ tupa Mefibosheth in keima sabuai ah an ne tawntung ding hi,” a ci hi. Ziba in tapa sawm le nga le nasem sawm nih nei hi." 
2Samuel9:11 Tua ciangin Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in nong thupiak khempeuh tawh kizui-in na nasem pa in hih ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ tapate khat bangin Mefibosheth in Davidʼ sabuai ah an a ne hi." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheth in Mika min nei tapa tangval khat nei hi. Zibaʼ inn ah a teeng khempeuh Mefiboshethʼ nasemte a suak hi. 
2Samuel9:13 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem ah Mefibosheth teeng a, amah in kumpipaʼ sabuai ah an ne tawntung hi. Mifibosheth a khe a langnihin a zaw hi." 
2Samuel10:1 Hih hun khit ciangin Ammon miteʼ kumpipa si a, a tapa Hanun in ama tangin uk hi." 
2Samuel10:2 Tua ciangin David in, “Keima tungah a pa thuman takin hong gamtat bangin Nahashʼ tapa Hanunʼ tungah thuman takin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in a paʼ hangin amah a hehnem dingin a nasemte a sawl hi. Davidʼ nasemte Ammon miteʼ gamah va tung uh hi." 
2Samuel10:3 Ahih hangin Ammon miteʼ uliante in a topa uh Hanun kiangah, “David in nangma kiangah hehnemte hong sawl manin na pa a pahtawi hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi hiam? David in a nasemte khuapi sung a en ding le a lawnthal dingin hong sawl hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel10:4 Tua ciangin Hanun in Davidʼ nasemte manin a khamul uh alang ciat kiat khiatsak a, a puan uh a laizang, a kawng ciangah at khiatsakin amaute a sawl khia hi." 
2Samuel10:5 David kiangah tua thu a kigen ciangin amaute a dawn dingin amah in mi sawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mite nakpi takin maizum uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Na khamul uh a saukik mateng Jerikho ah om unla, tua ciangin hong ciah un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel10:6 Ammon mite in amaute Davidʼ huat mi a suah khitna uh a muh uh ciangin, Ammon mite in mi sawlin Beth-rehob a Syria mite, Zobah a Syria mite, khe galkap tul sawm nih le Maakah kumpipaʼ mi tul khat tawh le Tob mite tul sawm le tul nih a cial uh hi." 
2Samuel10:7 David in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in Joab le a thahat mihon khempeuh a sawl hi. 
2Samuel10:8 Tua ciangin Ammon mite hong kuan khia-in kulh kongpi lutna ah galsim dingin panmun hong la uh hi. Zobah le Rehob a Syria mite, Tob mite le Maakah-te, gamlak ah amau pawl ciatin om uh hi." 
2Samuel10:9 Joab in a nung le a mai ah amah a sim dingin gal in a panna a muh ciangin, amah in Israel-teʼ sung pan mi pawl khat teel khia a, Syria mite a do dingin a pangsak hi." 
2Samuel10:10 Ama mi a om lai teng a sanggampa Abishaiʼ ukna sungah koih a, Ammon miteʼ lang khat ah amaute a pangsak hi." 
2Samuel10:11 Tua ciangin amah in, “Syria mite kei adingin a hat luat leh kei nong huh ding hi. Ahih hangin Ammon mite nang adingin a hat luat le kei hong pai-in nang kong huh ding hi." 
2Samuel10:12 Kihangsak in; i mite ading le i Pasianʼ khuapite adingin kipasalsak ni; Topa in hoih a sak bangin hong hih tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel10:13 Tua ahih ciangin Joab le amah tawh a om mite in Syria mite a do dingin naih uh a, ama mai ah amaute tai uh hi." 
2Samuel10:14 Ammon mite in Syria mite a tai a muh uh ciangin amaute zong Abishaiʼ mai ah tai-in khuapi sungah lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Ammon mite a dona panin Joab ciahin Jerusalem ah a tung hi. 
2Samuel10:15 Israel-te in amaute a zawhna thu Syria mite in a muh uh ciangin amau mahmah kikaikhawm uh hi. 
2Samuel10:16 Tua ciangin Hadadezer in mi sawlin Eufratis gal khat a Syria mite samsak hi. Hadadezerʼ galkap mangpa Shobak makai-in Helam ah amaute tung uh hi. 
2Samuel10:17 Hih thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin amah in Israel-te khempeuh kaikhawm a, Jordan kantanin Helam tung uh hi. David a do dingin Syria mite in na pang uh a, amah tawh kido uh hi." 
2Samuel10:18 Israel-teʼ mai ah Syria mite tai uh hi. David in leeng za sagih a hawl Syria mite le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm li thatin, amauʼ galkap mangpa Shobak liamsak a, tua lai ah amah a si hi." 
2Samuel10:19 Hadadezerʼ nasem ahi kumpite khempeuh in Israel-te in amaute a zawhna thu a muh uh ciangin, amaute in Israel-te tawh kilemna bawl uh a, amauteʼ khutnuai mi a suak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Ammon mite a huh lai ding uh Syria mite lau ta uh hi." 
2Samuel11:1 Galdo dingin kumpite a kuan khiat hun tua kum khuakhal sungin David in Joab le amah tawh a om a nasemte le Israel-te khempeuh sawl a, amaute in Ammon mite su gawpin Rabbah khua umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin David Jerusalem ah om hi." 
2Samuel11:2 Khat vei nitak lamin a lupna panin David tho-in kumpi innkhum zang ah a pai leh inn khumzang panin amah in numei khat a kisil gal muh kha hi. A numei mel hoih mahmah hi. 
2Samuel11:3 David in mi sawlin tua numeiʼ thu kansak hi. Mi khat in, “Hih nu pen Hit mi Uriahʼ zi, Eliamʼ tanu Bathsheba hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:4 Tua ahih ciangin David in kamtaite sawlin tua nu samsak hi. Tua nu ama kiangah hong pai a, amah in tua nu luppih hi. (Tua nu a khasim nitna panin a kisiansuah tung ahi hi.) Tua ciangin ama inn ah a ciah hi." 
2Samuel11:5 Tua ciangin tua numei gai hi. Amah in mi sawlin David kiangah, “Nau ka paii hi,” ci-in gensak hi." 
2Samuel11:6 Tua ciangin David in Joab kiangah thu puak a, “Hit mi Uriah ka kiangah hong sawl in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joab in David kiangah Uriah sawl hi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ama kiangah Uriah a tun ciangin David in Joab bangci om a, mite bangci uh a, galdona bangci mavan hiam cih dong hi." 
2Samuel11:8 Tua ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Na inn ah ciah suk inla tawlnga in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ inn panin Uriah paikhia a, kumpipa kiang panin letsong khat in amah zui hi." 
2Samuel11:9 Ahih hangin Uriah a topaʼ nasemte khempeuh tawh kumpipaʼ kongpi gei ah lum a, ama inn ah ciah suk lo hi." 
2Samuel11:10 “Uriah a inn ah ciah suk lo hi,” ci-in amaute in David kiangah a gen uh ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Khualzin a hong tung hi lo na hi hiam? Bang hangin na inn ah ciah suk lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:11 Uriah in David kiangah, “Thuciamna Singkuang, Israel-te le Judah mite gal sungah om uh a, ka topa Joab le ka topaʼ nasemte gamlak ah giak uh hi. Tua ahih manin an ne tui dawn ding le ka zi tawh a lum dingin ka inn ah ciah suk ding ka hi hiam? Nangmah na hin mah bangin hih bang ka gamta het kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:12 Tua ciangin David in Uriah kiangah, “Hih lai ah tu ni zong om inla, zing ciangin nang kong pai khiasak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Uriah zong tua zan le a zing ciang Jerusalem ah om hi." 
2Samuel11:13 David in amah samin ama omna ah zu le an nesak a, amah zu khamsak hi. A nitak ciangin amah a lum dingin a topaʼ nasemte tawh paikhia a, ahih hangin ama inn ah ciah suk tuan lo hi." 
2Samuel11:14 Zingsang ciangin David in Joab kiangah lai khat gelh a, Uriah khut tungah a lai khak hi." 
2Samuel11:15 A lai sungah, “Galsim a haksatna pen ah a madawkin Uriah koih inla, amah kivat tukin a sih theih nadingin ama kiang panin nungkik un,” ci-in a gelh hi." 
2Samuel11:16 Joab in khuapi a umcih ciangin mi a hangte om hi, ci-in a theihna munah Uriah a seh hi." 
2Samuel11:17 Khuapi mite hong kuan khia-in Joab tawh kido uh hi. Miteʼ lakah Davidʼ nasemte pawl khat si hi. Hit mi Uriah zong kithat hi. 
2Samuel11:18 Tua ciangin Joab in mi sawlin gal kidona thu khempeuh David kiangah a gen hi. 
2Samuel11:19 Amah in kamtai pa thu hilhin, “Gal kidona thu khempeuh kumpipa kiangah na gen khit ciangin," 
2Samuel11:20 kumpipa a heh suakin amah in nangma kiangah, ‘A sim dingin khuapi ah tua zahin a nai-in pai na hi uh hiam? Kulh tung panin hong kap ding uh thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubbeshethʼ tapa Ahimelek kua in that hiam? Numei khat in an gawina suangpek tungnung kulh tung pan ama tungah khiat sukin Thebez ah amah si hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hangin tua zahin kulh nai ah pai na hi uh hiam?’ hong cih leh nangmah in, ‘Hit mi na nasem pa Uriah zong si hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:22 Tua ahih ciangin kamtai pa pai a, hong tungin a gen dingin Joab in a sawl thu khempeuh David kiangah a gen hi." 
2Samuel11:23 Kamtai pa in David kiangah, “Mite in kote hong zo thawhin gamlak ah kote a do dingin hong kuan khia uh hi. Ahih hangin kote in kulh kongpi lutna dongah amaute ka notkik uh hi." 
2Samuel11:24 Tua ciangin thaltawite in kulh tung panin na nasemte hong kap uh a, kumpipaʼ nasem pawl khat si hi. Hit mi na nasem pa Uriah zong si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:25 David in kamtai pa kiangah, “Joab kiangah hih bangin na gen in: ‘Hih thu hangin nangmah kilungkhamsak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau in koi lai panin hong vat ding cih a kima-theih lo mah ahi hi. Khuapi na simna hanciamin lumlet in,’ ci-in Joab hanthawn in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel11:26 Uriahʼ zi in a pasal a sihna thu a zak ciangin a pasalʼ hangin kap hi. 
2Samuel11:27 A kahna a ven ciangin David in mi sawlin ama inn ah tua nu lasak a, tua nu ama zi suakin, amah tawh tapa khat a nei hi. Ahih hangin Davidʼ gamtatna thu in Topa lungkim losak hi." 
2Samuel12:1 Tua ciangin Topa in David kiangah kamsang Nathan sawl hi. Amah hong pai-in David kiangah, “Khuapi khat sungah mi nih om a, khat hau-in a khat zawng hi." 
2Samuel12:2 A hau pa in tuu hon le bawng hon tampi nei hi. 
2Samuel12:3 Ahih hangin a zawng pa in bangmah nei lo a, a lei sa tuuno a nu khat bek nei hi. Amah in tua tuuno khoi a, amah le a tate tawh khangkhawm hi. Ama an ne-in a hai panin dawn a, ama ang sungah lum a, ama adingin tanu tawh kibang hi." 
2Samuel12:4 Tu-in mihau paʼ inn ah zin khat hong tunga, amah in a tuu hon ahi a, a bawng hon pan ahi zongin ama kiangah a tung khualzin pa adingin a gawh ding la nuam loin mizawng paʼ tuuno laksak a, ama kiang a a tung mipa adingin a gawhsak hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:5 Tua ciangin tua mipaʼ tungah David sin so mahmah hi. Amah in Nathan kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih banga a gamta mipa a sih ding kilawm hi." 
2Samuel12:6 Amah hih bangin gamta a, amah in hehpihna nei lo ahih manin a tuuno a zah li-in loh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:7 Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “Nang pen tua mipa na hi hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilhin Saulʼ khut sung panin nang kong hon khia hi." 
2Samuel12:8 Keimah in na topaʼ inn le na topaʼ zite na khut sungah kong pia a, Israel-te le Judah mite nang kong pia hi. Hihte a tawm lua hileh tua zah nih a hong pia khin ding ka hi hi." 
2Samuel12:9 Ama muhna ah a sia a gamta dingin bang hangin Topaʼ thu simmawh na hi hiam? Nangmah in Hit mi Uriah namsau tawh vatin, ama zi nangma zi dingin na la a, Ammon miteʼ namsau tawh amah na that khin hi." 
2Samuel12:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangmah in kei hong simmawhin Hit mi Uriahʼ zi nangma zi dingin la khin na hih manin na inn sungah namsau tawh kidona veng ngei lo ding hi,’ ci hi." 
2Samuel12:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En in, keimah in nangma innkuan sung panin nangma langah siatna a piangsak ding khat ka khangsak ding hi. Na zite na muhin la-in na veengpaʼ tungah ka pia dinga, amah in sun nitaang sungah na zite luppih ding hi." 
2Samuel12:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in a simthamin na hih hi; ahih hangin keimah in Israel-te khempeuhʼ muh dingin suntangpi-in ka hih ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:13 David in hih thu a zak ciangin Nathan kiangah, “ Topaʼ tungah ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “ Topa in zong na khialhna hong maisak khinzo hi; nang na si kei ding hi." 
2Samuel12:14 Ahi zongin, hih bangin gamtatna tawh Topa thusim peuhmah lo na hih manin nangʼ sung panin a hong piang naungek si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:15 Tua ciangin Nathan a inn ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin Uriahʼ zi in David tawh a neih naungek Topa in vat a, a ci hong na hi." 
2Samuel12:16 Tua ahih ciangin David in naungek adingin Pasianʼ tungah thum hi. David in an tangin zan tawntung leilak ah a lum hi. 
2Samuel12:17 Tua ciangin leilak panin a phong dingin a inn sung upate ama kiangah ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amah tho lo a, amaute tawh an zong ne nuam lo hi." 
2Samuel12:18 A ni sagih ni-in naungek si hi. Ama kiangah, naungek si hi, ci-in a gen ding uh Davidʼ nasemte lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Naungek a hin lai nangawnin amah i hopih hangin i thu hong ngai lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in ama kiangah, naungek si, ci ngam ding ihi hiam? A mahmah kisusia kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:19 Ahih hangin ama nasemte a kihuauna uh David in a muh ciangin naungek si hi, ci-in a thei hi. Tua ciangin David in a nasemte kiangah, “Naungek si ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amah si ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:20 Tua ciangin David leilak panin tho-in kisil a, sathau nilhin a puante khek a, Topaʼ inn ah pai-in Pasian a bia hi. Tua ciangin ama inn ah ciah hi. An a nget ciangin amaute in a mai ah lui uh a, amah in a ne hi." 
2Samuel12:21 Tua ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih banga na gamtatna a bangci hiam? Naungek a hin lai-in an tangin na kap hi; ahih hangin naungek a sih ciangin tho-in an na ne zawsop hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel12:22 Amah in, “Naungek a hin lai-in an tangin ka kap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Naungek a hin nadingin Topa in kei hong hehpih ding hiam, hong hehpih lo ding hiam, cih kua in thei khol ahi hiam?’ ka ci hi." 
2Samuel12:23 Ahih hangin tu-in amah si ta hi; bang hangin an tang nawn ding ka hi hiam? Amah lakik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ama kiangah kei ka pai dinga, ahih hangin kei kiangah amah hong kilehkik lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:24 Tua ciangin David in a zi Bathsheba hehnem a, ama kiangah pai-in amah tawh a lum khawm hi. Tua nu in tapa khat nei a, a min Solomon a phuak hi. Topa in tua naupang it ahih manin," 
2Samuel12:25 kamsang Nathanʼ tungah thu puak hi. Topaʼ itna hangin ama min Jedidiah a phuah ding a gen hi. 
2Samuel12:26 Tu-in Joab in Ammon khuapi Rabbah simin a khuapi tuikhuk la hi. 
2Samuel12:27 Joab in David kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Rabbah khuapi ka sim a, a khuapi tuikhuk ka la khin hi." 
2Samuel12:28 Tua ahih ciangin mi a om lai teng kaikhawm inla, khuapi langah phual satin khuapi la in; tua hikeileh keimah in khuapi la-in keima min pua kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel12:29 Tua ahih ciangin David in mi khempeuh kaikhawmin Rabbah ah pai a, tua khuapi simin a la hi." 
2Samuel12:30 Tua ciangin amah in amauʼ pasian Molek lu tungah a om lukhu a laksak hi. Tua lukhu kham talen khat gik a, a sungah suangmanpha khat om hi. Davidʼ kumpi lukhu tungah tua suangmanpha kikoih hi. Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sunga van kinusiate tampi tak paikhiatpih hi." 
2Samuel12:31 Amah in a sunga om mite paikhiat pihin singatnate, tuzumte le heite tawh na a sem dingin koih a, leiseek seekna ah amaute na semsak hi. Tua bangin Ammon miteʼ khuapi khempeuh a hih hi. Tua ciangin David le mi khempeuh Jerusalem ah a ciah uh hi." 
2Samuel13:1 Tu-in Davidʼ tapa Absalom in Tamar min nei sanggam numei a melhoih mahmah khat nei hi. Tawl khat khit ciangin Davidʼ tapa Amnon in tua nu ngai hi. 
2Samuel13:2 Amnon in ngai lua mahmah ahih manin a sanggamnu Tamar hangin cinat lawh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nungak le tangval kituam omsak ahih manin Amnon in tua nu a muh theih nading om theih tuak lo hi. 
2Samuel13:3 Ahih hangin Amnon in Davidʼ sanggampa Shimeahʼ tapa Jonadab min nei lawmpa khat nei a, Jonadab pen mi tei mahmah khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel13:4 Amah in Amnon kiangah, “Kumpipaʼ tapa aw, bang hangin zingsang khat khit zingsang khat thakiam semsem na hi hiam? Kei kiangah a hang hong gen lo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amnon in ama kiangah, “Ka sanggampa Absalomʼ sanggamnu Tamar ka ngai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadab in ama kiangah, “Na lupna tungah lum inla, a cina kineih in. Nangmah a veh dingin na pa hong pai ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Keimah in mu-in ama khut panin an ka nek theih nadingin ka sanggamnu Tamar hong paisakin annek ding hong piasak inla, ka muhna ah an hong bawlsak in,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:6 Tua ahih ciangin Amnon lumin a cina kineih hi. Amah a en dingin kumpipa a pai ciangin Amnon in kumpipa kiangah, “Ama khut panin ka nek theih nadingin ka sanggamnu Tamar hong paisakin mohpheng nih khawng na bawlsak nading kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:7 Tua ciangin David in inn-a Tamar kiangah mi sawlin, “Na sanggampa Amnonʼ inn ah pai-in ama ading an bawlsak in,” cisak hi." 
2Samuel13:8 Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampa Amnon lumin a omna mun a inn ah Tamar pai hi. Amah in annel lom la-in meek a, ama muhna ah mohphengte bawlin a em hi." 
2Samuel13:9 Tua ciangin amah in sikbeel dai la-in ama mai ah sung khia a, ahih hangin amah in ne nuam lo hi. Tua ciangin Amnon in, “Kei kiang panin mi khempeuh sawl khia masa in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama kiang panin mi khempeuh paikhia hi." 
2Samuel13:10 Tua ciangin Amnon in Tamar kiangah, “Na khut tung panin ka nek theih nadingin inn dei sungah an hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tamar in a bawl sa mohphengte la-in inn dei sung a sanggampa Amnon kiangah paipih hi." 
2Samuel13:11 Ahih hangin amah in a nek dingin ama kiang nai ah a paipih ciangin, amah in tua numei lenin ama kiangah, “Hong pai in; kei tawh hong lum in ka sanggamnu aw,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:12 Amah in dawngin, “Hi lo hi, ka sanggampa aw, kei hong thatang hih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel sungah tua bangin kigamta lo hi. Hih bangin hai gamtat lua kei in." 
2Samuel13:13 Keimah in ka maizumna koi ah seelcip zo ding ka hi hiam? Nang zong, Israel-te sungah mihai luate khat bang na hi ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi, kumpipa kiangah gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nang adingin kei hong khaktan lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:14 Ahih hangin amah in a thugen ngai lo hi. Amah sangin hat zaw ahih manin thatang hat thu tawh hihin amah luppih hi. 
2Samuel13:15 Tua ciangin Amnon in nakpi takin Tamar mudah hi. Amah in a cil a a itna zah sangin a muhdahna lian zaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin Amnon in ama kiangah, “Ding in, paikhia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:16 Ahih hangin a numei in ama kiangah, “Hi lo hi, ka sanggampa aw; bang hang hiam cih leh kei nong sawl khiatna pen kei tungah nong hih sa thu sangin lian zaw hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a thu ngai lo hi." 
2Samuel13:17 Amah in a nasem tangvalpa samin, “Ka omna panin hih numei koih khia inla, ama nungah kongkhak kalh in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:18 Tua nu in puan tualpi ban nei khat silh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipaʼ tanute in tua bangin puan silh hi. Tua ahih ciangin a nasem pa in tua nu koih khia-in ama nungah kongkhak kalh hi. 
2Samuel13:19 Tua ciangin Tamar in a lu tungah vut koihin ama silh puan tualpi bansau bal kek hi. Tua ciangin a lu tungah a khut koihin paikhia a, a pai kawmin a gingin a kap hi." 
2Samuel13:20 Tua ciangin a sanggampa Absalom in ama kiangah, “Na sanggampa Amnon in nang hong bawlsia ahi hiam? Bangbang hitaleh kilungnuamsak in, ka sanggamnu aw; amah pen na sanggampa ahi hi; hih thu na lungsimah koih kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a sanggampa Absalomʼ inn ah Tamar lungzuang khawngai-in a om hi." 
2Samuel13:21 Kumpi David in hih thute khempeuh a zak ciangin heh mahmah hi. 
2Samuel13:22 Absalom in Amnon kiangah a pha ahi a, a sia ahi zongin bangmah gen vet lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a sanggamnu Tamar thatang hat thu tawh hih ahih manin Absalom in Amnon mudah lua mahmah hi." 
2Samuel13:23 Tua zawh kum nih bit khit ciangin Absalom in Efraim nai-a om Baal-hazor ah tuumul mette khawm a, Absalom in kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh sam hi." 
2Samuel13:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Absalom hong pai-in, “En in, na nasem pa in tuumul mette khawm hi; kumpipa le a nasemte na nasem pa tawh nong pai ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in Absalom kiangah, “Hi lo hi, ka tapa aw; i vekpi-in pai kei ni; pai lehang kote pen nang adingin van gik ka hi kha ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Amah in ci teitei a, ahih hangin amah pai nuam loin ama thupha a tungah a pia hi." 
2Samuel13:26 Tua ciangin Absalom in, “Tua bang hi lo ding ahihleh ka sanggampa Amnon kote tawh nong paisak ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nang tawh amah hong pai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:27 Ahih hangin Absalom in Amnon le kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh amah tawh a paisak mateng ci teitei hi. 
2Samuel13:28 Tua ciangin Absalom in a nasemte thu pia a, “Amnon in zu a kham hun phawk unla, note kiangah, ‘Amnon sat un,’ kong cih ciangin amah that un. Lau kei un; note thu hong pia khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Hang unla, thahat un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:29 Tua ahih ciangin Absalomʼ nasemte in ama thupiak sa bangin Amnon hih uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh dingin a la tung ciat uh ah tuangin a tai uh hi. 
2Samuel13:30 Amaute lamkal ah a om laitakin David kiangah thu tunga, “Absalom in kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh that a, khat beek siit lo hi,” kici hi." 
2Samuel13:31 Tua ciangin kumpipa dinga, a puante bal kekin leilak ah a lum hi. A kiang a om a nasemte khempeuh in zong a puan uh bal kek uh hi." 
2Samuel13:32 Ahih hangin Davidʼ sanggampa Shimeahʼ tapa Jonadab in, “Amaute in kumpipaʼ tapa tangvalte khempeuh that hi, ci-in ka topa in ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Amnon bek si hi. Amah in a sanggamnu Tamar thatang hat thu tawh a hih ni a kipanin Absalomʼ thupiakna tawh hih thu a kiseh khol ahi hi." 
2Samuel13:33 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh si hi, ci-in ka topa in ngaihsunin na lungsimah koih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Amnon bek si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:34 Tua kikal sungin Absalom tai hi. Tua ciangin galvil tangvalpa a khuadak leh, mual pang nai Horonaim lampi panin mihon hong pai a mu hi." 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadab in kumpipa kiangah, “En in, kumpipaʼ tapate hong tung zo hi. Na nasem paʼ gen bangin hong piang takpi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel13:36 Amah in a thugen a man khit phetin, kumpipaʼ tapate hong tungin hong kap uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa zong a nasemte khempeuh tawh nakpi takin a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel13:37 Ahih hangin Absalom tai-in Geshur kumpipa Ammihudʼ tapa Talmai kiangah tung hi. Ni tampi sung David a tapaʼ hangin a thum hi. 
2Samuel13:38 Absalom ahihleh Geshur ah pai a, tua lai ah kum thum sung a om hi." 
2Samuel13:39 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom ngai-in hong mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah si hi, ci-in thei khin ahih manin Amnonʼ thu ah kihehnem khin hi." 
2Samuel14:1 Tu-in kumpipa in Absalom a ngaihna thu Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in a phawk hi. 
2Samuel14:2 Tua ahih ciangin Joab in Tekoa ah mi sawlin tua panin numei pil khat la-in ama kiangah, “Dahin a kap kineih inla, dahna lim puante silh in. Sathau nilh kei inla, misi hangin ni tampi a thum khin numei bangin gamta in." 
2Samuel14:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah pai inla, hih bangin ama kiangah thu gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in ama gen ding thute a hilh hi." 
2Samuel14:4 Kumpipa kiangah Tekoa numei a pai ciangin lei ah maipukin zahtakna bawl a, “Hong huh in! Aw kumpipa,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Na lungkhamna bang om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kalai, ka pasal si ta a, meigong numei khat ka hi hi." 
2Samuel14:6 Na nasem nu in tapa nih nei a, lo sungah amau tegel kitawng uh hi. Amau tegel a khen ding kuamah om lo a, khat in a khat pa satin that hi." 
2Samuel14:7 Tu-in ka beh buppi na nasem nuʼ langah hong pangin amaute in, ‘Ama thah a sanggampaʼ nuntakna tangin amah ka thah theih nadingun a sanggampa a sat mipa hong pia in,’ hong ci uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in innluah pa zong susia ding uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in a om lai ka lametna pa beisakin leitungah ka pasalʼ suanlekhak a suakta omsak lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:8 Tua ciangin kumpipa in tua numei kiangah, “Na inn ah ciah in; nang tawh kisai-in thu ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:9 Tua ciangin Tekoa numei in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa aw, keima tung le ka innkuan tungah mawhna om tahen; kumpipa le a tokhom mawh peng tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:10 Kumpipa in, “Nangʼ tungah mi khatpeuh in thu khatpeuh hong gen leh kei kiangah amah hong paipih in; amah in nang hong sukik ngei nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:11 Tua ciangin amah in, “Phula pa in that nawn loin, ka tapa a kisuksiat loh nadingin kumpipa in Topa na Pasianʼ tungah na kiciam ding kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin na tapaʼ samzang khat zong lei ah kia lo ding hi,” ci-in a kiciam hi." 
2Samuel14:12 Tua ciangin a numei in, “Ka to kumpipa tungah na nasem nu kam khat hong gensak in, ci-in kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:13 Tua ciangin a numei in, “Tua ahihleh bang hangin Pasianʼ miteʼ langah tua bang na hih sawm na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bang lungsim khensatna na piakna ah kumpipa in a hawl khiatna a inn ah a paipihkik mateng kumpipa a mahmah mawh a kipia ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:14 Eite khempeuh i si dinga, a kikhawmkik thei lo leilak ah a bua tui tawh i kibang hi. Ahih hangin a hawlkhiat pa a kipuasehin a kikoih loh nadingin lampi a zong mipaʼ nuntakna Pasian in la khia lo ding hi." 
2Samuel14:15 Mite in kei hong lausak ahih manin tu-in ka to kumpipa kiangah hih thu a gen dingin kong pai hi. Na nasem nu in, ‘Kumpipa kiangah thu ka gen dinga, kumpipa in a nasem nuʼ ngetna sem kha ding hi." 
2Samuel14:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in za-in, Pasianʼ gamh panin kei le ka tapa hong susia khawm ding mipaʼ khut panin a nasem nu hon khia ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
2Samuel14:17 Na nasem nu in, ‘Ka to kumpipaʼ kammal in nopsakna hong pia ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipa pen a pha le a sia a khen thei dingin Pasianʼ vantungmi tawh kibang hi. Topa na Pasian in nang hong ompih tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a numei dawngin, “Nang kong dot peuhpeuh hong im kei in,” a ci hi. A numei in, “Ka to kumpipa in gen hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:19 Kumpipa in, “Hih thu khempeuh Joabʼ vaihawmna tawh hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. A numei in dawngin, “Nang a nungta taktak na hih mah bangin ka to kumpipa aw, ka to kumpipaʼ gen bang teekteek mah ahi hi. Kei hong sawl pa pen na nasem pa Joab hi a, na nasem nuʼ gen dingin hih thute a hong sawl pa amah ahi hi." 
2Samuel14:20 Na thu paizia khek nadingin na nasem pa Joab in hih thu hih hi. Ahih hangin ka topa in leitung a om na khempeuh theih nadingin Pasianʼ vantungmi pilna tawh a kibang pilna na nei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:21 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Joab kiangah, “Tu-in en in, hih thu kong pia hi; pai in, tangvalpa Absalom hong ciah pihkik in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:22 Tua ciangin Joab lei ah maipuk suk a, zahtakna bawlin kumpipa thupha a pia hi. Tua ciangin Joab in, “Kumpipa in a nasem paʼ ngetna a piakna ah, tu ni-in ka to kumpipa nangma muhna ah maipha ka muhna na nasem pa in ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:23 Tua ahih ciangin Joab dingin Geshur ah pai a, Jerusalem ah Absalom a ciahpih hi." 
2Samuel14:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Ama inn ah amah tuam tensak in; keima omna ah amah hong pai lo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom ama inn ah tuam tenin kumpipa omna ah pai lo hi." 
2Samuel14:25 Tu-in Israel-te khempeuh sungah a melhoihna hangin Absalom zahin tua bangin phat ding kuamah om lo hi. A khenuai a kipan a luzang dongin ama tungah paubaanna om lo hi. 
2Samuel14:26 Amah in a sam a met ciangin (kum bei simin amah in met zel hi; a sam a gih ciangin amah in met hi), amah in a sam tawi khai a, kumpipaʼ gik tehna-in shekel za nih a gik hi." 
2Samuel14:27 Absalomʼ sung pan tapa thum le a min Tamar ahi ta numei khat a suak hi; tua nu pen a melhoih mahmah khat ahi hi. 
2Samuel14:28 Tua hi a, kumpipaʼ omna ah pai loin Absalom kum nih bit Jerusalem ah teeng hi." 
2Samuel14:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah a sawl dingin Absalom in Joab samsak hi. Ahih hangin ama kiangah Joab hong pai lo hi. Amah in a nih veina sawl a, ahih hangin Joab hong pai lo veve hi." 
2Samuel14:30 Tua ciangin amah in a nasemte kiangah, “En un, Joabʼ lo pen keima-aʼ zom hi a, tua lai ah amah in mangbuhham nei hi; pai unla mei tawh va hal un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalomʼ nasemte in a lo mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
2Samuel14:31 Tua ciangin Joab dingin Absalomʼ kiang ama inn ah pai-in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na nasemte in mei tawh ka lo hong halsak ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:32 Absalom in Joab dawngin, “En in, nang kiangah thu kong puak a, ‘Kumpipa kiangah nang hong sawlin, “Bang hangin Geshur panin hong pai ka hi hiam? Tua lai ah om lai leng kei adingin hoih zaw ding hi,” ci-in a va dong dingin hih lai ah nong pai nading kong gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kumpipa omna ah kei hong paisak in; kei tungah mawhna a om leh amah hong thatsak in,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel14:33 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Joab pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom sam hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kumpipa kiangah hong pai a, a mai lei ngatin kumpipaʼ mai ah a kun hi; tua ciangin kumpipa in Absalom a nam hi." 
2Samuel15:1 Hih hun khit ciangin Absalom in leeng khat le sakolte le ama mai ah a tai ding mi sawm nga la hi. 
2Samuel15:2 Absalom tho baihin kulh kongpi lam gei ah tu zel hi. Mi khatpeuh in thu khensak dingin kumpipaʼ mai ah pai nading thu a neih ciangin Absalom in amah samin, “Koi khua pan na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasem pa, Israel-te sungah tua minam tua khua ka hi hi,” a cih ciangin" 
2Samuel15:3 Absalom in ama kiangah, “Thei in, na thugente hoihin man hi; ahih hangin na thu a khen dingin kumpipa in a koih mi om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:4 Tua tham loin Absalom in, “Gam sungah kei thukhen hi leng! Thu ahi a, a hang khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a nei mi peuhmah kei kiangah hong pai dinga, keimah in ama tungah thu a tangin ka khen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:5 Ama tungah zahtakna a bawl dingin mi khatpeuh a nai ah hong pai ciangin amah in a khut zan a, amah lenin a nam hi." 
2Samuel15:6 Tua bangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah thu a khensak dingin a hong pai Israel-te khempeuh tungah a hih hi. Tua ahih ciangin Absalom in Israel miteʼ lungsim na zo hi. 
2Samuel15:7 Kum li a cin ciangin Absalom in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei hong paisak inla, Topaʼ tungah ka ciam sa ka thuciam, Hebron ah hong piasak in, ci-in kong thum hi." 
2Samuel15:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Aram gam Geshur ah ka om laitakin na nasem pa in thu khat ciam a, ‘ Topa in Jerusalem ah kei hong paipihkik taktak leh Topaʼ tungah biakna ka pia ding hi,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:9 Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Nuam takin pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin Hebron ah a pai hi." 
2Samuel15:10 Ahih hangin Absalom in Israel minam khempeuh kiangah a simthamin kamtaite sawl a, “Peengkul aw na zak phetun, ‘Absalom, Hebron ah kumpi hi!’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:11 A kisam mi za nihte Jerusalem panin Absalom tawh a pai uh hi. Amaute lungsim hoih tawh a pai hi a, bangmah thei lo uh hi." 
2Samuel15:12 Absalom in biakna a piak laitakin Davidʼ thulamlak pa, Giloh mi Ahithofel, ama khuapi Gilo panin samsak hi. Tua ciangin sawm simna hong hat semsem a, Absalom tawh a om mite kibeh laplap hi." 
2Samuel15:13 Tua ciangin kamtai khat David kiangah hong pai-in, “Israel miteʼ lungsim Absalomʼ lamah pai khin hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
2Samuel15:14 Tua ciangin David in Jerusalem ah amah tawh a om a nasemte khempeuh kiangah, “Ding un, tai ni; tua hikeileh Absalomʼ kiang panin eiteʼ suahtak nading om lo ding hi. Manlangin pai ni; tua hikeileh amah in eite hong pha pak dinga, eiteʼ tungah siatna hong tungsakin namsau tawh khuapi hong vat ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:15 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, ka to kumpipa in na khensat peuhpeuh a sem dingin na nasemte kiging hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel15:16 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, ama innkuan le a ulian khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Kumpipa in inn kem dingin a zineu sawm nusia hi." 
2Samuel15:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa paikhia a, mi khempeuh in ama nung a zui uh hi. Tua ciangin khua nawl inn tawpna ah amaute khawl uh hi." 
2Samuel15:18 Tua ciangin a nasemte khempeuh in amah nawkin pai uh hi. Khereth mi khempeuh, Peleth mi khempeuh le Gath panin amah a zui mi za gukte khempeuh, kumpipaʼ mai nawkin paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel15:19 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Gath mi Ittai kiangah, “Bang hangin nang zong kote hong zui na hi hiam? Ciahkik inla, kumpipa tawh om in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen gamdang mi na hi a, na inn panin gam dangah a om zong na hi hi." 
2Samuel15:20 Nang pen zan mah bek a hong pai na hi hi. Koi lai munah kei pai ding cih thei lopi-in kote tawh a kawi vak dingin nang hong bawl ding ka hi hiam? Ciahkik in, na sanggamte ciahpih in. Topa in itna kip le thumanna nangʼ tungah hong lak tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:21 Ahih hangin Ittai in kumpipa dawngin, “ Topa nungta-in, ka to kumpipa zong nungta ahih mah bangin, sih nading ahi a, hin nading ahi zongin ka to kumpipa a omna peuhpeuh ah na nasem pa om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:22 Tua ciangin David in Ittai kiangah, “Tua ahihleh pai in, paisuak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Gath mi Ittai, a mi khempeuh le amah tawh a om a naupang khempeuh tawh a paisuak hi." 
2Samuel15:23 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh a pai laitakin gam sung mi khempeuh a gingin kap khia uh a, kumpipa in Kidron lui kantanin, mi khempeuh zong gamlak lamah a paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel15:24 Tua ciangin Abiathar hong pai to a, Zadok zong Levi mi khempeuh tawh hong pai-in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hong pua uh hi. Mi khempeuh in khuapi a khen khit mateng amaute in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang nga phot uh hi." 
2Samuel15:25 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Zadok kiangah, “Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang khuapi sungah puakik in. Topaʼ maipha ka muh nakleh, amah in kei hong paipihkikin Thuciamna Singkuang le a omna mun hong musakkik ding hi." 
2Samuel15:26 Ahih hangin amah in, ‘Na tungah lungkimna ka nei kei hi,’ hong cih leh, en in, hih lai ah kei ka om hi; amah in hoih a sak bangin kei tungah hong bawl hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:27 Kumpipa in siampi Zadok kiangah, “En in, nuam takin nang le Abiathar, na tapa nihte Ahimaaz le Abiatharʼ tapa Jonathan tawh khuapi sungah ciahkik un." 
2Samuel15:28 Thei in, kei kiangah thu a hong zasak dingin nangʼ kiang panin thu ko mi hong tun mateng gamlak tui ngahmunte ah ka na ngak ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi." 
2Samuel15:29 Tua ahih ciangin Zadok le Abiathar in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Jerusalem ah puakik uh a, amaute tua lai ah om uh hi." 
2Samuel15:30 Ahih hangin Oliv Mual tung kah tohna ah David pai to a, khe guak le lu tuam sa-in a pai kawmin kap hi. Amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zong lu khuh sa-in a pai toh kawmun a kap uh hi." 
2Samuel15:31 Tua laitakin David kiangah, “Ahithofel zong mi sawmsimte lakah Absalom tawh om hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; Ahithofelʼ thugente haina-in na heisak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:32 Pasian a kibiakna mun mual dawnah David a tun ciangin, Arkhi mi Hushai amah a dawn dingin a puan tungsilh bal kek sa le a lu tungah lei baang tawh hong pai hi." 
2Samuel15:33 David in ama kiangah, “Nang hong zuisuak lecin kei adingin van gik na hi ding hi." 
2Samuel15:34 Ahih hangin khuapi sungah nang ciahkikin Absalom kiangah, ‘Aw kumpipa, kei, nangma nasem ka hi ding hi. Hun beisa sungah na paʼ nasem ka hih mah bangin tu-in nangma nasem ka hi ding hi,’ ci lecin, Ahithofelʼ thugente kei adingin na zo ding hi." 
2Samuel15:35 Siampi Zadok le Abiathar tua lai ah nang tawh om hi lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ inn pan na zak peuhpeuh siampi Zadok le Abiatharʼ kiangah gen in. 
2Samuel15:36 En in, amauʼ tapa tegel, Zadokʼ tapa Ahimaaz le Abiatharʼ tapa Jonathan, amaute tawh om khawm hi. Na zak peuhpeuh amauteʼ tungtawnin kei tungah nong puak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel15:37 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem ah Absalom a lut laitakin Davidʼ lawmpa Hushai zong khuapi sungah a pai hi. 
2Samuel16:1 David in mual dawn a khen khit tawmvei ciangin Mefibosheth nasem pa Ziba in anlum za nih, leenggah phehkeu bawk za khat, khuakhal singgah za khat le leenggahzu savun um khat a pua van a kivawh la nih tawh amah na dawn hi." 
2Samuel16:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ziba kiangah, “Bang hangin hihte hong paipih na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in dawngin, “Late pen kumpipaʼ innkuante a tuan nading, anlum le khuakhal singgahte pen tangvalteʼ nek ding le leenggahzu pen gamlak ah a gimteʼ dawn ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Na topa Saulʼ tupa koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ziba in kumpipa kiangah, “Amah Jerusalem ah om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Tu ni-in Israel mite in ka pu Saulʼ kumpi gam kei hong piakik ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ziba kiangah, “En in, Mefiboshethʼ neihsa khempeuh tu-in nangma aʼ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ziba in, “Kei, nangma nasem pa ka hi hi; ka to kumpipaʼ muhna ah maipha hong musak tawntung in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:5 Bahurim ah Kumpi David a tun ciangin Saulʼ inn sung innkuan mi, Geraʼ tapa Shimei min nei mi khat hong paikhia a, a pai kawmin David samsia tawntung hi." 
2Samuel16:6 Amah in Kumpi David le a nasemte khempeuh suang tawh deng hi. Mi khempeuh le mi thahatte khempeuh Davidʼ taklam le veilamah om uh hi. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei in a samsiat kawmin, “Pai mang, pai mang, nang mi that pa, bangmah man lo mipa!" 
2Samuel16:8 Ama tangin na uk Saulʼ innkuante na thahna hangin Topa in nangma tungah hong thuk hi. Topa in na tapa Absalomʼ tungah kumpi gam pia khinta hi. Thei in, na siatna nangma lu tungah hong tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen mi that pa na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:9 Tua ciangin a nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai in kumpipa kiangah, “Bang hangin hih uisi a bang lel mi khat in ka to kumpipa samsia ding ahi hiam? Hong kuansak inla a lu hong tan khiasak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:10 Ahih hangin kumpipa in, “No Zeruiah tapate aw, note tawh bang kisai ahi hiam? Topa in ama kiangah, ‘David samsia in,’ a cihna hangin hong samsia ahihleh, ‘Bang hangin tua ci hih na hi hiam?’ kua in ci ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:11 Tua ciangin David in Abishai le a nasemte khempeuh kiangah, “En un, keima tapa mahmah in kei thah dingin hong zong hi; hih Benjamin mi in bangzahin tu-in hong zong zaw kan ding ahi hiam! Ama thu-in omsak un, amah hong samsiasak un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amah a sawl hi kha ding hi." 
2Samuel16:12 Topa in ka thuakna hong enin, tu ni-a kei hong samsiatna hangin Topa in a hoih tawh kei hong thuk kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:13 Tua ahih ciangin ama gal khat mualpang ah Shimei pai a, a pai kawmin samsia-in suang tawh amah dengin leivui a theh laitakin David le a mite lampi ah pai uh hi." 
2Samuel16:14 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om mi khempeuhte gim mahmah in Jordan tung uh a, tua lai ah amah kitawldamsak hi." 
2Samuel16:15 Tu-in Absalom le Israel mite khempeuh Jerusalem hong tung uh a, Ahithofel amah tawh om hi." 
2Samuel16:16 Tua ciangin David lam a lak pa, Arkhi mi Hushai, Absalom kiangah hong tun ciangin Hushai in Absalomʼ kiangah, “Kumpipa khan sawt tahen! Kumpipa khan sawt tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:17 Absalom in Hushai kiangah, “Hih bang pen na lawmpa tungah thumanna ahi hiam? Bang hangin na lawmpa tawh pai lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai in Absalom kiangah, “Hi lo hi; Topa le hih mite le Israel mite khempeuh adingin a kiteel mipa aʼ ka hi dinga, amah tawh ka om ding hi." 
2Samuel16:19 Tua banah, kuaʼ na sem ding ka hi hiam? Amaʼ tapa hi lo ding ahi hiam? Na paʼ na ka sep bangin nangma na ka sem ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:20 Tua ciangin Absalom in Ahithofel kiangah, “Na ngaihsutna hong gen in; bang hih ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:21 Ahithofel in Absalomʼ kiangah, “Inn kem dingin a nusiat na paʼ zineute luppih in; tua ciangin nangmah in na pa na muhdah bawlna thu Israel-te khempeuh in za-in nangmah tawh a om mite khempeuhʼ tha khauhsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel16:22 Tua ciangin amaute in innkhum zang ah Absalom adingin puanbuk khat lam uh a, Israel-te khempeuhʼ muhna ah Absalom in a paʼ zineute luppih hi." 
2Samuel16:23 Tua hun lai-in Ahithofelʼ thugente pen Pasianʼ kammal mahmah bangin kingaihsun hi. Tua bangin David le Absalom in Ahithofelʼ thugente a thupi ngaihsut uh ahi hi. 
2Samuel17:1 Tua zawh a sawt loin Ahithofel in Absalom kiangah, “Mi tul sawm le tul nih hong teelsak in; keimah kuan khia-in tu zanin David ka delh ding hi." 
2Samuel17:2 Amah gimin lungkia-in a om laitakin amah ka hih dinga, amah ka amkhamsak ding hi. Tua hileh amah tawh a om mi khempeuh tai ding uh hi. Keimah in kumpipa bek ka sat puk dinga," 
2Samuel17:3 mothak in a pasal kiang a zuatkik mah bangin mi khempeuh nang kiangah kong ciah pihkik ding hi. Nangmah in mi khat bekʼ nuntakna na zong hi; midang khempeuh nuam takin om ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:4 Tua thugenna in Absalom le Israel upate khempeuh lungkimsak hi. 
2Samuel17:5 Tua ciangin Absalom in, “Arkhi mi Hushai zong sam un; ama thugen ngai phot ni,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:6 Absalom kiangah Hushai hong pai ciangin Absalom in ama kiangah, “Tua bangin Ahithofel in thu gen hi; ama genna bangin i hih ding hiam? Tua ahih kei leh nang gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:7 Tua ciangin Hushai in Absalom kiangah, “Tutungin Ahithofelʼ thugen hoih lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:8 Tua banah Hushai in, “Na pa le a mite mi thahat hi a, gamlak ah a note a kilaksak vompi bangin amaute a hehna na thei hi. Tua banah na pa galdona lamsang a siam hi a, mite tawh zanin amah om khawm lo ding hi." 
2Samuel17:9 Tu nangawnin amah dum khat sungah ahi a, mun dang khat ah ahi zongin bu khin ding hi. Kisim cilna ah mi pawl khat si leh tua thu a za mi peuhpeuh in, ‘Absalom a zui mite lakah a si om khin hi,’ ci ding hi." 
2Samuel17:10 Tua ciangin a lungtang humpinelkai lungtang a bang galhang mipa nangawn launa tawh lungkia gawp ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te khempeuh in na pa mi thahat ahihna le amah tawh a om mite mi hang ahihna thei uh hi. 
2Samuel17:11 Ahih hangin keima ngaihsutna hih bang ahi hi: Dan panin Beer-sheba ciang dong, tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin a tam Israel mi khempeuh nang kiangah khawmin galsim dingin nang mahmah na kuan ding hi." 
2Samuel17:12 Tua ciangin amah i muhna mun khat peuhpeuh ah theih kholh lohin i hih gawp ding hi. Amah le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh khat zong kisiit lo ding hi. 
2Samuel17:13 Amah khuapi khat sungah a nungkik le, Israel-te khempeuh in tua khuapi sungah khauhual paipihin tua lai munah suangtang khat nangawn a kimu nawn lo dingin kuam sungah tua khua i kai khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:14 Tua ciangin Absalom le Israel mite khempeuh in, “Arkhi mi Hushaiʼ thugen pen Ahithofelʼ thugen sangin hoih zaw hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Absalomʼ tungah siatna a tunsak theih nadingin Ahithofelʼ thugen hoih in a lelh ding Topa in a seh sa ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:15 Tua ciangin Hushai in siampi Zadok le Abiathar kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Ahithofel in Absalom le Israel upate kiangah gen a, tua bang tua bangin keimah in thu ka gen hi." 
2Samuel17:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in manlang takin mi sawl inla, David kiangah, ‘Tu zan gamlak tui ngahmunte ah giak kei inla, bangbang hitaleh gal kah in; tua hikeileh kumpipa le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh hong kivalh tum kha ding hi,’ ci-in gensak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel17:17 Tu-in Jonathan le Ahimaaz in Enrogel ah ngak uh hi. Nasem numei khat pai-in amaute kiangah gen a, amaute pai-in Kumpi David kiangah gen zel uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute khuapi sungah a lut lam uh a kimu lo ding ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:18 Ahih hangin tangval khat in amaute mu-in Absalom kiangah gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau tegel manlang takin paikhia uh a, a huang sungah tuikhuk a nei Bahurim a mi khatʼ inn ah tung uh a, tuikhuk sungah amaute tuak suk uh hi." 
2Samuel17:19 Tua ciangin a numei in khuhna khat la-in tuikhuk gong tungah phah a, tua tungah an zalh a, bangmah kithei lo hi." 
2Samuel17:20 Absalomʼ nasemte tua nuʼ inn ah hong tun ciangin amaute in, “Ahimaaz le Jonathan koi lai ah om ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. A numei in amaute kiangah, “Amaute lui gal khat ah pai khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong a muh zawh loh uh ciangin Jerusalem ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
2Samuel17:21 Amaute a paikhiat khit ciangin tuikhuk panin mite hong paikhia uh a, pai-in Kumpi David kiangah a thu gen uh hi. Amaute in David kiangah, “Ding in; tui gal khat ah manlang takin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang tua bangin nangma lang khat ah Ahithofel in thu gen hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel17:22 Tua ciangin David le amah tawh a om mi khempeuh ding uh hi. Amaute in Jordan kantan uh a, khuavak ciangin Jordan a kantan nai lo khat beek om nawn lo uh hi." 
2Samuel17:23 Ahithofel in ama thugen a kizuih loh a muh ciangin a la tutphah vawhin ama khuapi a inn ah nuak ciah hi. Tua ciangin amah in a innkuan vai hawmsak a, a man ciangin a mahmah gui-awk hi. Amah si a, a paʼ hanah kivui hi." 
2Samuel17:24 Tua ciangin Mahanaim ah David tung hi. Absalom in Israel mite khempeuh tawh Jordan kantan hi. 
2Samuel17:25 Tu-in Absalom in Joab tangin galkapte a uk dingin Amasa koih khin hi. Amasa pen Nahashʼ tanu Abigail a teenpih, Ishmael mi ahi Ithra min nei mi khatʼ tapa hi a, ama nu Abigail le Joabʼ nu Zeruiah a unau ahi hi." 
2Samuel17:26 Israel-te le Absalom in Gilead gamah giahphual sat uh hi. 
2Samuel17:27 Mahanaim ah David a tun ciangin Ammon miteʼ gam Rabbah khua panin Nahashʼ tapa Shobi le Lodebar panin Ammielʼ tapa Makhir le Rogelim panin Gilead mi Barzillai in 
2Samuel17:28 lupnate, kuangte le leibeelte, mangbuh, mangbuhham, an, ankan, bepi le besan," 
2Samuel17:29 khuaizu le bawngnawi-thaukhal le tuu le sathau khalte, David le amah tawh a om miteʼ nek dingin hong puak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Mite gamlak ah gil kialin, gimin dangtak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel18:1 Tua ciangin David in amah tawh a om mite khawmin a tultul a ukte le a zaza a ukte in koih hi. 
2Samuel18:2 David in galkapte khen thum suah a, khen khat Joabʼ ukna nuai ah, khen khat Joabʼ sanggampa Zeruiahʼ tapa Abishaiʼ ukna nuai ah, khen khat Gath mi Ittaiʼ nuai ah koihin galdo dingin a kuansak hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in mite kiangah, “Note tawh kei zong kong kuan khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:3 Ahih hangin mite in, “Nang nong kuan khia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote tai le-ung amaute in kote phamawh hong sa lo ding hi. Kote kim khat si le ung amaute in kote phamawh hong sa lo ding hi. Ahih hangin nang pen kote tul sawm zahin na manpha hi. Tua ahih ciangin khuapi panin kote kiangah huhna hong puak lecin hoih zaw hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel18:4 Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Note in hoih na sak pen bangun ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin galkap khempeuh a zaza le a tultulin a paikhiat laitakun kulh kongpi pangah kumpipa ding hi." 
2Samuel18:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Joab le Abishai le Ittai thu pia-in, “Keimah nong khualna-un tangvalpa Absalom hong dawm mahmah un,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in Absalomʼ thu galkap maangte tungah a vaikhakna mi khempeuh in za uh hi." 
2Samuel18:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te a do dingin gamlak ah galkapte kuan khia uh a, Efraim tulak ah kido uh hi." 
2Samuel18:7 Davidʼ nasemte in tua lai ah Israel mite zo uh a, tua ni-a mi kithat tam a, mi tul sawm nih ahi hi." 
2Samuel18:8 Tua gam maitang tung khempeuh ah gal kikapna omkim hi. Tua ni-in namsauʼ thah sangin thudang hangin tulak ah a si mi tam zaw hi. 
2Samuel18:9 Davidʼ nasemte in Absalom tuak kha uh hi. Absalom a la tungah tuang a, tawsaw lianpi hiang pha nuai khat ah a la tai-in, a lutang tawsaw hiang lakah awk a, ama nuai panin a la taisuakin, vanlelei kikalah amah a kikhai-in kinusia hi." 
2Samuel18:10 Tua ciangin mi khat in mu-in Joab kiangah gen a, “En in, tawsaw hiang kawm lakah Absalom a kikhai ka mu hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:11 Joab in ama kiangah a gen mipa kiangah, “Bang! Nang amah mu maw! Bang hangin leilak ah amah sat khia suk lo na hi hiam? Nang tungah ngun peek sawm le kawnggak khat hong pia ngel ding hi ve ing,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:12 Ahih hangin a mipa in Joab kiangah, “Ngun peek tul khat ka khut sungah hong koih talecin zong kumpipaʼ tapa a hih dingin ka khut meno khat zong ka zan khia kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh koteʼ zakin kumpipa in nang le Abishai le Ittai thu hong pia-in, ‘Keimah nong khualna-un tangvalpa Absalom hong dawm un,’ hong ci hi." 
2Samuel18:13 Thudang khat ah, amah langpangin zuau tat leng (Kumpipa tungah a ki-im bangmah om lo hi), nang mahmah kikang koihin nong hu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:14 Joab in, “Hih bangin nang tawh hun ka beisak kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in thaltang thum la-in tawsaw hiang kawmah Absalom a hing lai-in a lungtang sungah tuate a siat hi." 
2Samuel18:15 Tua ciangin Joabʼ galhiam tawite tangval sawm in Absalom umcih a, amah satin that uh hi." 
2Samuel18:16 Tua ciangin Joab in peengkul tum a, Israel-te a delhna panun galkapte hong ciahkik uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Joab in amaute kho hi." 
2Samuel18:17 Tua ciangin amaute in Absalom la-in tulak a dum lianpi khat sungah amah paai uh a, ama tungah suangcian a lian mahmah khat ciang uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh amauʼ inn ciatah tai uh hi." 
2Samuel18:18 Absalom in ama nuntak lai-in khuampi khat la-in ama adingin phutin Kumpipaʼ Kuamah om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keima min hong zom ding tapa ka nei kei hi,” a ci hi. Tua khuampi ama min tamin phuak a, tu ni dongin Absalomʼ Mual, kici hi." 
2Samuel18:19 Tua ciangin Zadokʼ tapa Ahimaaz in, “Kei hong taisak inla, Topa in ama galteʼ vangliatna panin amah a hotkhiat lungdamna thu kumpipa kiangah hong puaksak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:20 Joab in ama kiangah, “Nang in tu ni-in lungdamna thu na puak kei ding hi. A nidang ciangin lungdamna thu na puak thei dinga, ahih hangin tu ni-in lungdamna thu na puak kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipaʼ tapa si hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:21 Tua ciangin Joab in Kush mipa kiangah, “Pai inla na muh sa teng kumpipa kiangah va gen in,” a ci hi. Kush mipa zong Joabʼ mai ah kunin, tua ciangin a tai hi." 
2Samuel18:22 Tua ciangin Zadokʼ tapa Ahimaaz in Joab kiangah, “Bangbang piang taleh kei zong Kush mipaʼ nungah hong taisak in,” a cikik hi. Joab in, “Lungdamna thu puakna hangin thaman ngah lo ding cih thei napi-in, ka tapa aw, bang hangin tai ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:23 Amah in, “Bangbang piang taleh ka tai ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in ama kiangah, “Tai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ahimaaz zanglei lam tawnin tai a, Kush mipa makhelh hi." 
2Samuel18:24 Tua laitakin kulh kongpi pua nung le a sung nung kikalah David na tu hi. Galvil pa kulh kongpi khumzang ah pai to a, a khuadak ciangin amah guakin a hong tai mi khat a mu hi." 
2Samuel18:25 Galvil pa in kumpipa kiangah a gen hi. Kumpipa in, “Amah guak ahihleh thuhoih ahi hi,” a ci hi. Amah hong nawh tai-in hong nai hi." 
2Samuel18:26 Tua ciangin galvil pa in midang khat a hong tai mu leuleu hi. Galvil pa in kulh kongpi ah ko a, “En un, midang khat zong hong tai leuleu!” a ci hi. Kumpipa in, “Amah in zong lungdamna thu hong paipih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:27 Tua ciangin galvil pa in, “A masa paʼ tai zia pen Zadokʼ tapa Ahimaazʼ tai tawh kibang hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amah mihoih hi a, lungdamna thuhoih tawh hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:28 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Ahimaaz hong kiko-in, “Na khempeuh hoih hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa mai ah lei maingatin amah kun a, “Ka to kumpipaʼ lang khat ah a khut a liik mite nangma khut sungah a hong pia Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tangvalpa Absalom a hoihhoih hiam?” a ci hi. Ahimaaz in dawngin, “Joab in na nasem pa hong sawl laitakin buaina lianpi khat ka mu a, ahih hangin bang hiam cih ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:30 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Kihei khia inla, hih lai ah ding in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei khia-in taang loin a ding hi." 
2Samuel18:31 Tua ciangin Kush mipa hong tung hi. Kush mipa in, “Ka to kumpipa adingin lungdam nading thu om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma langah a ding mi khempeuhʼ vangliatna panin tu ni-in Topa in nang hong hon khia hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:32 Kumpipa in Kush mipa kiangah, “Tangvalpa Absalom a hoihhoih hiam?” a ci hi. Kush mipa in dawngin, “Ka to kumpipaʼ galte le siat nadingin nangma lang khat ah a ding khempeuh, tua tangvalpa bang tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel18:33 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ lungsim nakpi takin su kha a, kulh kongpi tunga inn dei sungah pai to-in a kap hi. A pai kawmin amah in, “Aw ka tapa Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa Absalom! Nangma tangin kei si zaw taleng. Aw Absalom, ka tapa, ka tapa!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:1 Joab kiangah, “En in, Absalomʼ hangin kumpipa kapin thum hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Samuel19:2 Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-a gualzawhna mi khempeuh adingin thumna hong suak mawk hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni-in mite in, “Kumpipa a tapaʼ hangin dah hi,” ci-in za uh hi." 
2Samuel19:3 Tua ciangin gal sung pan a tai uh ciangin a maizum mite a geel bangin tua ni-in khuapi sungah mite simlut uh hi. 
2Samuel19:4 Kumpipa in a mai khuh a, nakpi takin kap khia-in, “Aw ka tapa Absalom! Aw Absalom! Ka tapa, ka tapa!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:5 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ inn sungah Joab hong pai-in, “Tu ni-in nangma nuntakna, na tanute le na tapateʼ nuntakna, na zite le na zineuteʼ nuntakna a hong hon khia na nasemte khempeuh na maizumsak hi." 
2Samuel19:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nang hong mudahte itin, nang hong itte na mudah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ukte le nasemte nang adingin bangmah ahih lohna tu ni-in na kitelsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Absalom hingin, kote khempeuh tu ni-in si le ung na nuam ding ka thei hi." 
2Samuel19:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ding in, paikhia inla na nasemte tungah kam neem pau in; bang hang hiam cih leh na pai kei leh tu zan ciangin mi khat zong nang kiangah hong om nawn lo ding hi, ci-in Topaʼ min tawh ka kiciam ngam hi. Hih thu pen na tangval a kipan tu ciang dong na tungah hong tung sa siatna khempeuh sangin nang adingin sia zaw ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:8 Tua ciangin kumpipa dingin kulh kongpi gei ah a tu hi. Tua ciangin mite kiangah, “En un, kulh kongpi ah kumpipa tu hi,” ci-in kigen a, tua ciangin kumpipa mai ah mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi. Tu-in Israel mite amauʼ inn ciatah na tai khin uh hi." 
2Samuel19:9 Israel minam khempeuh sungah mi khempeuh thu kiseel uh a, “Kumpipa in i galteʼ khut sung panin hong khah khia-in Filistia-teʼ khut sung panin hong hon khia hi. Tu-in Absalomʼ hangin i gam sung panin amah tai khia hi." 
2Samuel19:10 Ahih hangin eiteʼ tungah sathau i nilh Absalom, gal sungah si khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in bang hangin kumpipa lakkik ding bangmah gen lo na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:11 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in hih thu, siampi Zadok le Abiathar kiangah puakin, “Judah upate kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Israel-te khempeuhʼ thu kumpipa kiangah tung khin hi. Bang hangin note in kumpipa a inn ah a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam?" 
2Samuel19:12 Note pen ka beh nai na hi uh a, note pen keima si keima sa na hi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin kumpipa a ciahpih nunung pen hi ding na hi uh hiam?’ ci un." 
2Samuel19:13 Tua ciangin Amasa kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima si keima sa hi lo na hi hiam? Tua kipan Joabʼ munah nang pen ka galkapte a ukpa na hih kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen, ci hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:14 Davidʼ thugen in Judah mite khempeuhʼ lungsim thakhatin zo pah hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Nang le na nasemte khempeuh hong ciahkik un,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:15 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan ah kumpipa hong paikik hi. Kumpipa a dawn ding le Jordan galah kumpipa a paipih dingin Gilgal ah Judah mite hong pai uh hi. 
2Samuel19:16 Tua ciangin Bahurim panin Benjamin mi Geraʼ tapa Shimei, Kumpi David a dawn dingin Judah mite tawh manlangin pai suk hi." 
2Samuel19:17 Benjamin sung panin mi tul khat amah tawh om hi. Tua ciangin Saulʼ inn sung nasem Ziba, a tapa sawm le nga le a nasem sawm nihte tawh kumpipaʼ mai Jordan ah tai suk a," 
2Samuel19:18 kumpipaʼ innkuante a gal kah pih ding le ama deih bangin na a sem dingin amaute in ngahmun ngap uh hi. Jordan a gal kah ding ciangin Geraʼ tapa Shimei kumpipaʼ mai ah bok sukin 
2Samuel19:19 kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in Jerusalem na nusiat ni-in na nasem paʼ gamtat khialhna ka topa in hong mawhsak kei inla, hong ciamteh kei in; kumpipa in ngaihsutin nei kei in." 
2Samuel19:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka khialh khitna na nasem pa in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin, en in, ka to kumpipa a dawn dingin a hong pai suk dingin Josef minam khempeuh sung panin a masa penin tu ni-in kong tung hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:21 Tua ciangin a nu Zeruiah ahi Abishai hong pau khia a, “Amah in Topaʼ sathau nilh pa samsia ahih manin hih thu hangin Shimei thah ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:22 Ahih hangin David in, “Note pen tu ni-in keiʼ lang bangin na om nadingun no Zeruiahʼ tapate tawh kei bang kisai ihi hiam? Tu ni-in Israel sungah mi khatpeuh kithat ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-in Israel-teʼ tungah kumpi ka hihna thei hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:23 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Nang na si kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah kiciamna a bawl hi." 
2Samuel19:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa a dawn dingin Saulʼ tupa Mefibosheth hong pai suk hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ni a kipan lungnuamin hong tunkik ni dong, amah in a khete zem lo, a khamul puah lo, a puante zong sawp lo hi." 
2Samuel19:25 Jerusalem panin kumpipa a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mefibosheth aw, bang hangin kei hong zui lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:26 Amah in dawngin, “Ka topa! Aw Kumpipa, ka nasem pa in kei hong khem hi; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem pa in ama kiangah, ‘Kei a tungah tuangin kumpipa ka zuih theih nadingin kei adingin la khat tutphah vawh in,’ ka ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem pa a khe bai hi." 
2Samuel19:27 Amah in ka to kumpipa kiangah na nasem pa hong gensia hi. Ahih hangin ka to kumpipa pen Pasianʼ vantungmi tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak bangin hong hih in. 
2Samuel19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka to kumpipaʼ mai ah ka paʼ innkuante khempeuh a si zah dong dingin a sia ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in na sabuai ah a ne mite lakah na nasem pa na hong koih hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa tungah ka koh ding thudang bang nei thuah nawn ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
2Samuel19:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangma thu gen lailai na hi hiam? Ka lungsim ka khensat zo hi; nang le Ziba in leitang na hawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:30 Tua ciangin Mefibosheth in kumpipa kiangah, “Aw, ka to kumpipa lungnuamin inn hong tung khin na hih nungsang, a vekin amah lasak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:31 Rogelim panin Gilead mi Barzillai zong hong pai suk hi. Jordan gal khat ah amah a kha dingin kumpipa tawh Jordan ciang dong amah paisuak hi. 
2Samuel19:32 Barzillai pen kum sawm giat a pha, a khangham mahmah mi khat ahi hi. Mahanaim ah kumpipa a om laitakin amah in an pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah mihau mahmah khat ahi hi." 
2Samuel19:33 Kumpipa in Barzillai kiangah, “Kei hong zui inla, Jerusalem ah kei tawh hong om in, nang kong vak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:34 Ahih hangin Barzillai in kumpipa kiangah, “Kei, kumpipa tawh Jerusalem ah a pai to dingin ka nuntak ding kum bangzah hun nei nawn ka hi hiam?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tu ni-in kei kum sawm giat ka pha ta a, a nuam le a nuam lo khentel thei nawn ka hi hiam? Na nasem pa in a nek ahi a, a dawn ahi zongin a limna phawk thei nawn ka hi hiam? Lasa numeite le lasa pasalteʼ aw za thei nawn ka hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa tungah na nasem pa van gik kibehlap hong hi ding ka hi hiam?" 
2Samuel19:36 Na nasem pa in Jordan gal khat ah tom kha sung kumpipa hong zui ding hi. Kei pen tua bang hamphatna lianpi a ngah dingin zong ka kilawm kei hi. 
2Samuel19:37 Keima khuapi sung mah, ka nu le ka paʼ han nai ah ka sih theih nadingin na nasem pa hong ciahsakkik in, ci-in kong thum hi. Ahih hangin hih lai ah ka tapa na nasem pa Khimham om hi; ka to kumpipa tawh amah galkahsak in; hoih na sak bangbangin ama ading hihsak in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:38 Tua ciangin kumpipa in dawngin, “Khimham in kei hong zui dinga, nangmah in hoih na sak bangbangin ama ading ka hihsak ding hi; kei tung panin na deih khempeuh nangma adingin kong hihsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel19:39 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Jordan galah pai uh a, kumpipa zong a pai hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Barzillai namin thupha pia a, ama inn ah amah a ciah hi." 
2Samuel19:40 Gilgal ah kumpipa paisuak a, amah tawh Khimham paisuak hi. Judah mi khempeuh le Israel mi a kimkhatte in zong ama pai nading ah kumpipa a kha uh hi." 
2Samuel19:41 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh hong pai-in kumpipa kiangah, “Bang hangin ka sanggam uh Judah mite in nang hong gu khia-in, kumpipa le a innkuante le Davidʼ mite amah tawh, Jordan galah paipih ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:42 Judah mite khempeuh in Israel mite dawngin, “Kumpipa pen kote tawh beh kinai ahihna hang ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih thu ah heh na hi uh hiam? Kumpipaʼ sum bei-in an ne peuhmah ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amah in letsong khat peuhpeuh kote hong pia ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel19:43 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Judah mite dawngin, “Kumpipa sungah tanh sawm ka nei uh a, Davidʼ sungah note khempeuh sangin tam ka nei zaw uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin note in kote hong simmawh na hi uh hiam? Kote pen i kumpipa ciah pihkik ding a gen masate hi lo ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel miteʼ kammal sangin Judah miteʼ kammal kihtakhuai zaw hi." 
2Samuel20:1 Tu-in tua lai ah Benjamin mi, Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba min nei, mi ginalo khat hong om kha hi. Amah in peengkul tumin, “Davidʼ sungah tanh i nei kei a, Jessiʼ tapaʼ sungah gamh i nei kei hi; na inn ciat uh ah ciah un, Israel-te aw,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:2 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh Davidʼ kiang pan nungkik uh a, Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba zui uh hi. Ahih hangin Judah mite in Jordan panin Jerusalem ciang dong a kumpipa uh kip takin zui uh hi." 
2Samuel20:3 Tua ciangin Jerusalem-a a inn ah David tung hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in inn kem dingin a nusiat a zineu sawmte la-in a kivil inn khat sungah amaute koihin amaute a vak hi. Ahih hangin amaute luppih lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a khang laipi-in meigong numei suak uh a, a sih dong uh amaute kikhumcip hi." 
2Samuel20:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Amasa kiangah, “Ni thum sungin Judah mite kei kiangah khawm inla, nang mahmah zong hih lai ah hong om in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah-te a sam dingin Amasa pai a, ahi zongin ama tungah a kiciam a kiseh sa khengin amah zekai hi." 
2Samuel20:6 Tua ciangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Tu-in Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba in Absalom sangin eite tungah siatna tam zaw hong bawl ding hi. Na topaʼ nasemte la inla, amah delh in. Tua hikeileh amah in ama adingin khuapi muanhuaite ngahin eite tungah buaina hong piangsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:7 Tua ciangin Abishaiʼ nungah Joab le Khereth mite le Peleth mite le mi thahat khempeuh pai uh hi. Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba a delh dingin Jerusalem panin amaute kuan khia uh hi.
