2Samuel20:8 Gibeon gam sunga suangtumpi ah amaute a tun uh ciangin amaute a dawn dingin Amasa hong pai hi. Tu-in Joab in galkap puan silhin, tua tungah, a kawng tungah a kigak a paai sunga namsau tawh a kithuah kawnggak khat om a, a mailam manawhin a pai laitakin a namsau seel hi." 
2Samuel20:9 Tua ciangin Joab in Amasa kiangah, “Ka sanggampa aw, bang cici na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Joab in amah a hopih kawmin a taklam khut tawh a khamul-in Amasa man hi." 
2Samuel20:10 Ahih hangin Amasa in Joabʼ khut sunga om namsau mu lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Joab in a namsau tawh a pumpi sat a, nih vei sat kul loin a gilpi leilak ah bua khia hi; tua ciangin Amasa a si hi. Tua ciangin Joab le a sanggampa Abishai in Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba delh uh hi." 
2Samuel20:11 Tua ciangin Joabʼ mite khat Amasaʼ kiangah dingin, “Joab a gum peuhmah le David-aʼ ahi mi peuhmah in Joab zui un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:12 Lam lianpi a ama sisan sungah Amasa kidiahin a om hi. Tua lai ah a pai mi peuhmah in amah a muh ciangin a khawl uh hi. Mi khempeuh a khawlna tua mipa in a muh ciangin amah in lam lianpi panin gamlak ah Amasa pua khia-in ama tungah puan khat a khuh hi. 
2Samuel20:13 Lam lianpi panin amah a kilakkhiat khit ciangin Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba a delh dingin Joab nungah mi khempeuh paisuak hi. 
2Samuel20:14 Tua ciangin Israel minamte khempeuh nawkin Abelbeth-maakah khua ah Sheba pai hi. Bikhri mi khempeuh kikhawm uh a, amah zui-in khuapi sungah tum uh hi." 
2Samuel20:15 Tua ciangin Joab tawh a om mi khempeuh hong pai-in Abelbeth-maakah khua ah amah umcih uh hi. Amaute in khuapi simna-in suang cianpi khat bawl uh a, kulhpi lang khat ah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kulhpi a puk theih nadingin amaute in kulhpi nuai to uh hi." 
2Samuel20:16 Tua ciangin numei pil khat in khuapi panin samin, “Za un! Joab kiangah gen un: ‘Nang tungah thu kong gen theih nadingin hih lai ah hong pai in,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:17 Tua ciangin tua nuʼ mai ah Joab hong pai hi. Tua numei in, “Nang, Joab na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in ama kiangah, “Na nasem nuʼ thugente ngai in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Ka ngai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tanglai-in amaute in, ‘Abel ah thu dongsak un,’ ci thei uh a, tua bangin amaute in thu siangsak uh hi." 
2Samuel20:19 Kei pen Israel sungah tua bangin kilemna a deih a thuman mi khat ka hi hi. Nang in Israel sungah nu tawh a kibang khuapi khat suksiat ding na hanciam hi. Bang hangin Topaʼ gamhluah valh tum ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
2Samuel20:20 Joab in dawngin, “Keimah in ka valh tum ding ahi a, ka suksiat ding ahi zongin keima ngaihsut hi dek lo hi." 
2Samuel20:21 Tua thu man lo hi. Ahih hangin Efraim mual tung gam mi Bikhriʼ tapa Sheba a kici mipa in Kumpi David lehdo hi; amah bek hong pia in. Tua hileh khuapi panin ka nungkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua numei in Joab kiangah, “En in, kulh sung panin nang kiangah ama lutang hong kilawnsuk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel20:22 Tua ciangin ama pilna zangin mi khempeuh kiangah tua numei a pai hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Bikhriʼ tapa Shebaʼ lu tan khia-in Joab kiangah lawn khia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in peengkul tum a, khuapi panin amaute kikhenin a milipin a inn ciat uh ah a ciah uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa kiang Jerusalem ah Joab a ciah hi." 
2Samuel20:23 Tua laitakin Joab pen Israel galkap khempeuh a uk ahi hi. Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah pen Khereth mite le Peleth mite a uk ahi hi. 
2Samuel20:24 Adoram pen aana tawh na a kisemsakte a uk ahi hi. Ahiludʼ tapa Jehoshafat pen thuciamteh pa ahi hi. 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva pen lai-at pa ahi hi. Zadok le Abiathar siampite ahi uh hi. 
2Samuel20:26 Jair mi Ira zong Davidʼ siampi ahi hi. 
2Samuel21:1 Tu-in kum khat khit kum khat, Davidʼ hun sungin kum thum sung kialpi tung hi. Tua ciangin David in Topaʼ kiangah thu dong hi. Topa in, “Amah in Gibeon mite that ahih manin Saul le a innkuan tungah mi thahna hanga mawhna om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Gibeon mite sam hi. Tu-in Gibeon mite pen Israel-teʼ sung hi loin Amor mi a omlaite ahi uh hi. Amaute a hingkhawi ding Israel mite kiciam khin napi-in, Israel le Judah mite ading a deih luatna-in Saul in amaute thah dingin hanciam hi." 
2Samuel21:3 Tua ciangin David in Gibeon mite kiangah, “Note adingin bang hong hihsak ding ka hi hiam? Note in Topaʼ mite thupha na piak theih nadingun bangci bangin kilemna hong bawl ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:4 Gibeon mite in ama kiangah, “Kote le Saul ahi a, a innkuan tawh kikalah ahi zongin kitotna a om pen ngun le kham in maisak zo lo ding hi. Israel-te sungah mi khatpeuh ka thah hangun zong lungkim zawh nading om lo hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Note ading kong hihsak ding bang hi, ci na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:5 Amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Israel gam sungah kote in mun ka neih loh nadingun kote hong netumin suksiat ding Saul in vaihawm hi." 
2Samuel21:6 Topaʼ mual tung, Topaʼ mai Gibeon ah amaute ka khai theih nadingun ama tapa sagihte hong pia in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amaute kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel21:7 Ahih hangin kumpipa in amah le Saulʼ tapa Jonathanʼ kikalah a om, Topa tawh kiciamna hangin Jonathanʼ tapa, Saulʼ tupa Mefibosheth a siit hi." 
2Samuel21:8 Ahi zongin Aiahʼ tanu Rizpahʼ tapa nih, Saul tawh a neih Armoni le Mefibosheth; le Saulʼ tanu Merab in Meholah mi Barzillaiʼ tapa Adriel tawh a neih a tapa ngate a la hi." 
2Samuel21:9 Amah in Gibeon mite tungah amaute pia a, amaute in Topaʼ mai mual tungah amaute khai uh a, amau sagihte si khawm uh hi. Mangbuhham lak kipat hun, an lak kipat cil lamin amaute kithat hi." 
2Samuel21:10 Tua ciangin Aiahʼ tanu Rizpah in a puanhampi la-in, an lak a kipan van panin amauʼ luanghawmte tungah guah a zuk dongin ama lup nadingin suangpi tungah a phah hi. Sunin huihlak vasate in ahi a, zanin gamsate in ahi zongin amauʼ luanghawmte a sukkhak loh nadingun a cing hi." 
2Samuel21:11 Saulʼ zineu, Aiahʼ tanu Rizpahʼ gamtatna thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin," 
2Samuel21:12 David pai-in Gilboa mual tungah Filistia-te in Saul a thah lai hunin Filistia-te in amaute a khaina mun Bethshan khua sung kongzing lampi laizang panin a luanghawm a guksak Jabesh-gilead miteʼ tung panin Saulʼ guhte le a tapa Jonathanʼ guhte a lakik hi. 
2Samuel21:13 Amah in tua lai panin Saulʼ guhte le a tapa Jonathanʼ guhte paipih to hi. Amaute in a kikhai mi sagihteʼ guh zong kaikhawm uh hi. 
2Samuel21:14 Tua ciangin amaute in Zela khua sung Benjaminʼ leitang, a pa Kishʼ han sungah Saul le a tapa Jonathanʼ guhte phum uh a, amaute in kumpipaʼ thupiak khempeuh hih uh hi. Tua khit ciangin tua gam ading thumnate Pasian in a ngai hi." 
2Samuel21:15 Filistia-te, Israel-te tawh kidokik uh a, David a nasemte tawh pai suk khawmin Filistia-te a sim uh hi. Tua gal kidona ah David gim mahmah hi." 
2Samuel21:16 Mi thagolteʼ suante khat, a teipi sumngo shekel za thum a gik, namsau thak khat a kuah Ishbibenob in David thah ding ngaihsun hi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ahih hangin amah a huh dingin Zeruiahʼ tapa Abishai hong pai a, Filistia-pa simin amah a that hi. Tua ciangin Davidʼ mite in amah kunh-in, “Galsim dingin ko tawh nong kuan khia nawn kei ding hi. Hong kuan lecin Israel miteʼ muan le suanpa kong taan kha ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Samuel21:18 Hih hun khit ciangin Filistia-te tawh Gob ah gal kidona omkik a, Hushah mi Sibbekai in mi thagolteʼ suante khat ahi Saf a that hi." 
2Samuel21:19 Tua ciangin Filistia-te tawh gal kidona om leuleu a, Bethlehem mi Jaare-oregimʼ tapa Elhanan in a teipi siamganteʼ siamlawngpi cia a pha, Gath mi Goliath a that hi." 
2Samuel21:20 Tua ciangin, a khut lang tuakah khutme guk le a khe lang tuakah kheme guk, a vekpi-in sawm nih le li a nei, mi thalian khat a omna Gath ah gal om leuleu hi. Amah zong mi thagolteʼ sung panin a piang ahi hi." 
2Samuel21:21 Amah in Israel-te a phin ciangin, Davidʼ sanggampa Shimeiʼ tapa Jonathan in amah that hi." 
2Samuel21:22 Hih mi lite pen Gath a mi thagolteʼ sung pan a piang ahi uh hi. David le a nasemte in amaute a that uh hi. 
2Samuel22:1 Tua ciangin Topa in ama galte khempeuhʼ khut sung le Saulʼ khut sung panin amah a hotkhiat hunin David in hih la kammalte Topaʼ tungah a gen hi. 
2Samuel22:2 Amah in, “ Topa, kei hong hupa, ka kulhpi, kei hong hon khia pa," 
2Samuel22:3 ka Pasian, ka kihutna, ka bukna pa, lum bangin kei a hong dal, ka mun muanhuai le ka belh, keimah hong hon khia pa hi a, ngong hihna panin hong hon hi." 
2Samuel22:4 A phat taak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong kihon hi." 
2Samuel22:5 “Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna tuihualte in kei hong tum a, siatna tuikhangte in kei hong nawk hi." 
2Samuel22:6 Leinuai khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi." 
2Samuel22:7 Ka lungkhamna ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasian ka sam hi. A biakinn panin amah in ka aw hong za a, ka kikona awging ama bil a tung hi." 
2Samuel22:8 “Tua ciangin ama hehna hangin leitung kisingin, nakpi takin kilok gawp a, vantung bulpite kiliing gawp hi." 
2Samuel22:9 A nakvang sung panin meikhu pusuak a, a kam sung panin a kaang tum mei pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuang khia hi." 
2Samuel22:10 Amah in vantungte niamsakin hong pai suk a, ama khe nuai ah khuamial sahpi om hi." 
2Samuel22:11 Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leng a, huih khate tungah amah kimu hi." 
2Samuel22:12 Amah in ama kimkot ah khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuh nadingin meii sahpi a zang hi." 
2Samuel22:13 Ama mai-a a taang sung panin mei-amte kuang khia hi. 
2Samuel22:14 “Vantung panin Topa hong awng suk a, Sangpen pa in a aw hong gingsak hi." 
2Samuel22:15 Amah in thaltangte lawnin thehthang gawp a, khuaphialep phiasakin amaute a taisak hi." 
2Samuel22:16 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mawhsakna awging lianpi hangin tuipi tawte kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi." 
2Samuel22:17 “Amah in a sangna mun panin hong banin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin kei hong kai khia hi." 
2Samuel22:18 A hat ka galte panin kei hong hon khia a, kei hong mudahte panin hong suaktasak hi. Keima adingin ka galte hat lua uh hi." 
2Samuel22:19 Ka kamsiat ni-in kei hong sim gawp uh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi." 
2Samuel22:20 Amah in mun tanzau khat ah kei hong paikhiatpih a, kei tungah lungkim ahih manin kei hong hon khia hi." 
2Samuel22:21 “Ka thumanna tawh kizui-in Topa in thaman hong pia a, ka sianthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi." 
2Samuel22:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ thu ka zui a, ka Pasian ka langpang kei hi." 
2Samuel22:23 Ama biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
2Samuel22:24 Ama mai ah kawk ka baang kei a, kisuanna dangte panin hoihtakin ka kikem hi." 
2Samuel22:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka thumanna, ama muhna ah ka sianthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi." 
2Samuel22:26 “Thuman mi tungah nangmah na thuman a, a kawkbaang lo mi tungah a kawkbaang loin na gamta hi." 
2Samuel22:27 A siangtho mi tungah a siangtho-in na gamta a, a thukawi mi tungah thupeelin na gamta hi." 
2Samuel22:28 Nangmah in miniamte na hon khia a, ahih hangin a kiphasakte na niamkhiat hi." 
2Samuel22:29 Topa aw, nang pen keima meivak na hi hi. Ka Pasian in ka khuamial vaksak hi." 
2Samuel22:30 Nangma hangin galkap hon khat ka su gawp zo a, ka Pasianʼ hangin khuakulh khat ka kan zo hi." 
2Samuel22:31 “Hih Pasian a thu kicing a, Topaʼ kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a beelte khempeuh adingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
2Samuel22:32 Topa longal Pasian kua hiam? I Pasian sim loh, hong hu kua hiam?" 
2Samuel22:33 Hih Pasian, a muanhuai keima belh hi a, ka lampi khempeuh lungmuanhuaisak hi." 
2Samuel22:34 Amah in sakhipiteʼ khe bangin ka khe kipsak a, mun sangna ah keimah hong koih hi." 
2Samuel22:35 Amah in galsim zia kei hong hilh a, sumngo thal khauh pente ka keek zo hi." 
2Samuel22:36 “Nangmah in kei hong dalin na hong hon khia a, nangma hong huhna in kei hong liansak hi." 
2Samuel22:37 Ka kalsuan nading mun tanzau keima nuai ah nong pia a, ka khe taal lo hi." 
2Samuel22:38 Ka galte delhin ka susia a, amaute a beitum mateng kei ka kileh kei hi." 
2Samuel22:39 Amaute ka beisak a, amaute ka sun let hi; amaute thokik nawn lo uh a, ka khe nuai ah amaute puk uh hi." 
2Samuel22:40 “Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in galdo nadingin tha nong guan a, keimah hong dote ka nuai ah na nengniam hi." 
2Samuel22:41 Nangmah in ka galte, kei hong mudahte, na nungkiksak a, keimah in amaute ka susia gawp hi." 
2Samuel22:42 Amaute khuadak uh a, ahih hangin a hon khia ding kuamah om lo hi. Topaʼ tungah hong ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in amaute dawng lo hi." 
2Samuel22:43 “Leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute tuan khamin ka sikcip suk hi." 
2Samuel22:44 Mite tawh kidona panin nangmah in nong hon khia a, minamteʼ lutangin kei nong bawl a, ka theih ngei loh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi." 
2Samuel22:45 Keimah mai-etin gamdang mite ka kiangah hong pai uh hi. Amaute in ka thu a zak phetun, ka thu hong mang uh hi." 
2Samuel22:46 Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun liingin hong paikhia uh hi." 
2Samuel22:47 “ Topa hing hi; kei hong hupa in thupha ngah henla, ka Pasian, kei hong hon khia pa," 
2Samuel22:48 hong thuksakin, keima nuai ah mite a koih suk Pasian," 
2Samuel22:49 ka galte kiang panin kei hong paikhiatpih pa vanglian tahen. Nangmah in ka langte tungah kei nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei nong hon khia hi." 
2Samuel22:50 “ Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam khempeuh lakah nang kong phat dinga, na minphatna la ka sa ding hi." 
2Samuel22:51 Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilh pa David le a suanlekhakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:1 Jessiʼ tapa David, milianpi a suak mipa, Jakobʼ Pasianʼ sathau nilh pa, Israel laphuak siampa Davidʼ kam nunungte hih bang ahi hi:" 
2Samuel23:2 “ Topaʼ kha in kei tungtawnin thu hong gen a, ka kam sungah ama thugente om hi." 
2Samuel23:3 Israel Pasian kampau khin a, Israel a hupa in kei kiangah hong ci khin hi: Mi khat in mite tungah thutang takin ukin Pasian zahtakna tawh limtakin a uk ciangin" 
2Samuel23:4 amah pen amaute tungah zingsang khuavak bangin taang ziazua a, meii kaai loh ni zingsang a nitaang khia, leilak panin lopate a selsak guahtui tawh kibang hi." 
2Samuel23:5 Hi hi, ka innkuan zong Pasian tawh tua bangmah hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tawntung thuciamna kei tawh hong bawl a, na khempeuh a hoih a kipin hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong huhin, ka deihna khempeuh tangtungsak ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Samuel23:6 Ahih hangin migilote ahihleh a kilawn khia lingkungte tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khut guak tawh amaute kilawng ngam lo a," 
2Samuel23:7 amaute a lawng ding mipa pen sik le teipi bul tawh kithawi a, amaute mei tawh kihal tum siang hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:8 Davidʼ neih mi thahatteʼ minte: Tahkhemon mi Josheb-basshebeth hi a, amah pen mi thumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za giat do-in hun khat sungin that mangkhin hi." 
2Samuel23:9 Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte lakah amah a zom pa pen Ahoah mi Dodoʼ tapa Eleazar ahi hi. Galsim dingin a kikaikhawm Filistia-te to a, Israel mite a nungkik hunin David tawh amah om hi." 
2Samuel23:10 Amah dingin a khut a hikcip mateng Filistia-te sat tuk a, a namsau a khut sungah omcip hi. Topa in tua ni-in gualzawhna lianpi piangsak a, a kithat miteʼ na a tawm ding bekin ama nungah mite hong paikik uh hi." 
2Samuel23:11 Ama zomah Harar mi Ageeʼ tapa Shammah ahi hi. Besan a dimna mun Lehi ah Filistia-te kikaikhawm uh a, Filistia-teʼ kiang panin mite tai uh hi." 
2Samuel23:12 Ahih hangin amah in tua munah panmun la-in hu a, Filistia-te that a, Topa in gualzawhna lianpi a piangsak hi." 
2Samuel23:13 Ukpa sawm thumte lak panin mi thumte pai sukin, Refaim kuamah Filistia mihonte in giahphual satin a om laitakin, Adullam leihawm a David kiangah anlak hun pawlin tung uh hi." 
2Samuel23:14 Tua hunin mun muanhuai sungah David om a, Filistia khuacingte Bethlehem ah om uh hi." 
2Samuel23:15 David in lunggulhna tawh, “Kulh kongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin mi khat in tui dawn ding kei hong pia leh!” a ci hi." 
2Samuel23:16 Tua ciangin mi thahat thumte in Filistia-teʼ giahphual phulin kulh kongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin tui tawi khia uh a, a tui la-in David kiangah paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin David in a tui dawn lo hi. Amah in Topa adingin a tui sung a," 
2Samuel23:17 “ Topa aw, hih tui ka dawn het kei ding hi. Amauʼ nuntakna khamin a pai miteʼ sisan a dawn tawh ka kibang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in dawn lo hi. Mi thahat thumteʼ han zia tu-a bang ahi hi." 
2Samuel23:18 Tu-in Zeruiahʼ tapa, Joabʼ sanggampa Abishai, mihing sawm thumte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thumte do-in amaute that a, mihing sawm thumteʼ banah minphatna ngah beh hi." 
2Samuel23:19 Mihing sawm thumte sung pan amah a minthang pen hi a, amaute a ukpa a suak hi. Ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nai lo hi." 
2Samuel23:20 Jehoiadaʼ tapa, Kabzeel khuami Benaiah pen gal a hang, na lianpite a sem pa hi a, amah in Moab galhang mi nih a vat hi. Amah zong pai sukin vuk a kiat ni khatin leihawm sunga om humpinelkai khat a that hi." 
2Samuel23:21 Amah in a melhoih Egypt mi khat a that hi. Egypt mipa in a khut sungah teipi tawi hi. Ahih hangin Benaiah ciangkhut khat tawh ama kiangah pai suk a, Egypt-paʼ khut sung panin a teipi sut khia-in ama teipi mah tawh amah a that hi." 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah in hihte hihin, a thahat mi thumteʼ minphatna zah phial a ngah hi." 
2Samuel23:23 Mihing sawm thumteʼ lakah amah minthang a, ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nai lo hi. David in amah a cingte a ukin a koih hi." 
2Samuel23:24 Joabʼ sanggampa Asahel zong sawm thumteʼ lakah khat ahi hi. Bethlehem mi Dodoʼ tapa Elhanan," 
2Samuel23:25 Harod khuami Shammah, Harod khuami Elika," 
2Samuel23:26 Palti mi Helez, Tekoa khuami Ikkeshʼ tapa Ira," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathoth khuami Abiezer, Hushah mi Mebunnai," 
2Samuel23:28 Ahoah mi Zalmon, Netofah khuami Maharai," 
2Samuel23:29 Netofah khuami Baanahʼ tapa Heleb, Benjamin miteʼ gam sunga om Gibeah khuami Ribaiʼ tapa Ittai," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathon khuami Benaiah, Gaash gei-a kuam pan Hiddai," 
2Samuel23:31 Betharabah khuami Abialbon, Bahurim khuami Azmaveth," 
2Samuel23:32 Shaalbon khuami Eliahba, Jashenʼ tapate, Jonathan," 
2Samuel23:33 Harar mi Shammah, Harar mi Shararʼ tapa Ahiam," 
2Samuel23:34 Maakah khuami Ahasbaiʼ tapa Elifelet, Gilo khuami Ahithofelʼ tapa Eliam," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmel khuami Hezro, Arbi mi Paarai," 
2Samuel23:36 Zobah khuami Nathanʼ tapa Igal, Gad mi Bani," 
2Samuel23:37 Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiahʼ tapa galhiam a tawi Beeroth khuami Naharai," 
2Samuel23:38 Ithri mi Ira, Ithri mi Gareb," 
2Samuel23:39 Hit mi Uriah, a vekpi-in sawm thum le sagih ahi uh hi." 
2Samuel24:1 Khat vei, Israel-te tungah Topa hong hehkik a, amah in miteʼ gim nadingin David hanthawnin, “Pai in; Israel le Judah mi a phazah sim in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Joab le amah tawh a om galkap ukte kiangah, “Mite a phazah ka theih nadingin Dan panin Beer-sheba ciang dong Israel minamte khempeuh lakah pai unla mi phazah va sim un,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:3 Ahih hangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka to kumpipaʼ muhin Topa na Pasian in mite tu-a a omzah za khatin a tamna behlap tahen. Ahih hangin bang hangin ka to kumpipa in hih thu deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:4 Ahih hangin kumpipaʼ kam gente in Joab le galkap ukte zo zaw hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a phazah a sim dingin kumpipaʼ omna panin Joab le galkap ukte a paikhia uh hi. 
2Samuel24:5 Amaute in Jordan kantanin kuam laizang a om khuapi Aroer panin kipanin Gad lam manawh uh a, Jazer ah paisuak uh hi." 
2Samuel24:6 Tua ciangin amaute Gilead tung uh a, tua panin Hit miteʼ gam Kadesh tung uh hi. Tua lai panin Dan tungin, Dan panin kual pai-in Sidon tung uh hi." 
2Samuel24:7 Tua ciangin Taia mun muanhuai le Hiv mite le Kanaan miteʼ khuapite khempeuh tung uh hi. Tua panin Judah-teʼ Negeb lam Beer-sheba ah pai uh hi. 
2Samuel24:8 Tua ahih ciangin gam khempeuh ah amaute a pai khit uh, kha kua le ni sawm nih a cin khit ciangin Jerusalem ah hong tungkik uh hi." 
2Samuel24:9 Tua ciangin Joab in kumpipa kiangah mite a phazah a gawm a pia hi: Israel sungah namsau a tawi galhang mi tul za giat om a, Judah mi tul za nga om hi." 
2Samuel24:10 Ahih hangin mi a sim khit ciangin Davidʼ lungsim in a mahmah gimsak hi. Tua ciangin David in Topaʼ tungah, “Ka gamtatna sa sungah nakpi takin ka khial hi. Ahih hangin, tu-in, Topa aw, nang tungah kong thum hi; na nasem paʼ mawhna hong maisak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka hai gamtat kha khin hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:11 Zingsangin David a thawh ciangin Davidʼ thumu pa ahi kamsang Gad tungah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
2Samuel24:12 “Pai inla, David kiangah hih bangin gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah thu thum kong pia hi; nang tungah kong hih theih nadingin tuate khat teel in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:13 Tua ahih ciangin David kiangah Gad hong pai-in ama tungah gen a, “Na gam sungah kum thum sung kialpi hong tung ding hiam? Ahih kei leh na galte in nang hong delh laitakin amauteʼ mai ah kha thum sung tai ding na hi hiam? Ahih kei leh na gam sungah ni thum sung pulnatna hong tung ding ahi hiam? Tu-in ngaihsun in; kei hong sawl paʼ kiangah bang dawnna puakkik ding ka hi hiam khensat in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:14 Tua ciangin David in Gad kiangah, “Nakpi takin ka lung a kham hi. Ama hehpihna lian ahih manin Topaʼ khut sungah tung ni; bangbang ahi zongin mihing khut sungah hong tungsak kei hen,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:15 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in zingsang a kipan a kiseh hun dongin Israel-te tungah natna tungsak hi. Dan panin Beer-sheba dongin mihing tul sawm sagih a si hi. 
2Samuel24:16 Vantungmi in Jerusalem khua a susia dingin kithawi-in a khut a zan ciangin tua tatsiatna panin Topa kisik a, mite lakah suksiatna na a sem vantungmi kiangah, “Pha zo hi; tu-in khawl ta in,” a ci hi. Topaʼ vantungmi pen Jebus mi Araunahʼ ancilna gei ah a om hi." 
2Samuel24:17 Tua ciangin mite a vat vantungmi a muh ciangin David in Topaʼ tungah thu gen a, “En in, ka mawh hi; a khial pa pen kei ka hi hi. Hih mite in bang khialhna nei ahi uh hiam? Kong thum hi; kei le ka innkuante bek gim hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:18 Tua ciangin tua ni-in David kiangah Gad pai-in ama kiangah, “Pai to in; Jebus mi Araunahʼ ancilna ah Topa ading biakna tau khat phut in,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thupiak bangin Gadʼ cihna zui-in David pai to hi. 
2Samuel24:20 Araunah a khuadak suk ciangin kumpipa le a nasemte ama lamah a hong pai to a mu hi. Araunah pai khia-in a mai lei ngatin kumpipa zahtakna a bawl hi. 
2Samuel24:21 Tua ciangin Araunah in, “Bang hangin ka to kumpipa a nasem pa kiangah hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. “Miteʼ tung panin gimna a ven theih nadingin Topa ading biakna tau lam nading na ancilna mun a lei ding,” a ci hi." 
2Samuel24:22 Tua ciangin Araunah in David kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa in hoih na sak bangin la inla biakna pia in; meihal biak nadingin bawngtalte le a sing dingin ancilna peekte le bawngtal kolte hih lai ah om hi." 
2Samuel24:23 Kumpipa aw, keimah Araunah in hihte khempeuh kumpipa tungah kong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua banah Araunah in kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa, na Pasian in nang hong sang tahen,” ci thuah lai hi." 
2Samuel24:24 Ahih hangin kumpipa in Araunah kiangah, “Hi lo hi; nangma tung panin hihte a man tawh kituakin kong lei ding hi. Topa ka Pasianʼ tungah keiʼ sum bei loin meihal biaknate ka pia kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in ngun shekel sawm nga tawh ancilna mun le bawngtalte a lei hi." 
2Samuel24:25 Tua ciangin David in Topa ading biakna tau khat tua lai ah lam a, meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua gam adingin thumna Topa in ngai a, Israel-teʼ tung panin gimna a veng hi." 
1Kings1:1 Tu-in Kumpi David teekin kum tam ta hi. Amaute in amah puan a silhsak uh hangin a khua lum thei lo hi. 
1Kings1:2 Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa adingin nungak no khat kizong henla, amah in kumpipa enin amah a kem nu hi tahen. Ka to kumpipa a khua a lum theih nadingin na ang sungah tua nu lum hen,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:3 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel gam sung khempeuh ah nungak melhoih khat zong uh a, Shunem mi Abishag mu-in, kumpipa kiangah amah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings1:4 Tua nungak melhoih mahmah a, kumpipa a kem nu suakin ama na a sem hi. A lup khawm uh hangin kumpipa in amah hih zo lo hi." 
1Kings1:5 Tu-in David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah a mahmah kiliansak tawmin, “Keimah, kumpi ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in ama adingin leengte le sakol tung tuangte le ama mai ah a tai ding mihing sawm nga vaihawm hi." 
1Kings1:6 A pa David in, “Bang hangin tua bang tua bangin gamta na hi hiam?” ci-a dotna tawh khatvei beek amah tai ngei lo hi. Amah pen a melhoih mahmah mi khat zong ahi hi. Amah pen Absalom zom a suak ahi hi." 
1Kings1:7 Amah in Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab le siampi Abiathar tawh vaihawm hi. Amaute in Adonijah zui-in amah panpih uh hi. 
1Kings1:8 Ahih hangin siampi Zadok le Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah le Davidʼ mi a thahatte in Adonijah panpih lo uh hi. 
1Kings1:9 Adonijah in Enrogel gei-a om Gulpiʼ Suangpi kiangah tuute, bawngtalte le gan no thaute biakna-in pia-in, amah in kumpipaʼ tapate ahi a sanggamte khempeuh le Judah gam kumpi uliante khempeuh sam a," 
1Kings1:10 ahih hangin kamsang pa Nathan ahi a, Benaiah ahi a, mi thahatte ahi a, a sanggampa Solomon ahi zongin sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:11 Tua ciangin Nathan in Solomonʼ nu Bathsheba kiangah, “Haggithʼ tapa Adonijah kumpi suak khinin, David in tua thu a theih lohna thu za nai lo na hi hiam?" 
1Kings1:12 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in hong pai in. Nangma nuntakna le na tapa Solomonʼ nuntakna na suahtaksak theih nadingin nang tungah ngaihsutna kong pia ding hi. 
1Kings1:13 Thakhatin Kumpi David kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘Ka to kumpipa in na nasem nuʼ tungah hong kiciamin, “Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah mangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” ci hi lo na hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Adonijah kumpi suak ahi hiam?’ ci in." 
1Kings1:14 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah thu na gen laitakin kei zong nangma nungah hong pai-in nangma thugen teng kong panpih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:15 Tua ahih ciangin Bathsheba a inn dei sung kumpipa kiangah va pai hi (tu-in kumpipa teek mahmah a, Shunem mi Abishag in kumpipaʼ na sem hi.)" 
1Kings1:16 Bathsheba kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:17 Tua nu in ama kiangah, “Ka topa aw, na nasem nu tungah Topa na Pasianʼ min tawh kiciamin, ‘Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah mangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
1Kings1:18 Tu-in en in, ka to kumpipa in na theih loh hangin, Adonijah kumpi ahi hi." 
1Kings1:19 Amah in biakna-in bawngtalte, gan no thaute le tuute, tampi tak pia khin a, kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh, siampi Abiathar le galkapte a ukpa Joab sam a, ahih hangin amah in na nasem pa Solomon sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:20 Ka to kumpipa aw, tu-in nangma nungah ka to kumpipaʼ tokhom tungah kua tu ding, ci-a amaute kiangah na gen ding ngakin Israel-te khempeuh in nang hong en uh hi." 
1Kings1:21 Tua bang hikeileh ka to kumpipa na bei ciangin kei le ka tapa Solomon a khialin a hong kiseh hun hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:22 Kumpipa tawh tua nu kiho-in a om laitakin kamsang pa Nathan hong tum hi. 
1Kings1:23 Kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai ah kamsang pa Nathan om hi,” ci-in a kigen hi. Kumpipa mai ah amah hong pai ciangin a mai lei lam ngatin kumpipaʼ mai ah a kun hi." 
1Kings1:24 Tua ciangin Nathan in, “Ka to kumpipa aw, ‘Keima nungah Adonijah mangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ci na hi hiam?" 
1Kings1:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni-in amah pai suk khinin, bawngtalte, gan no thaute le tuute, tampi tak biakna-in pia a, kumpipaʼ tapate khempeuh, galkapte a ukpa Joab le siampi Abiathar sam hi. Amaute in ama ading pawi bawl uh a, ‘Kumpi Adonijah a khansau hen!’ ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:26 Ahih hangin na nasem pa keimah le siampi Zadok le Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah le na nasem pa Solomon, amah in hong sam lo hi." 
1Kings1:27 Ka to kumpipa in hih thu thukimpihin, nangma khit ciangin ka to kumpipaʼ tokhom tungah kua tu ding cih thu na nasem koteʼ kiangah hong im na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:28 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in dawngin, “Bathsheba ka kiangah hong samkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa omna ah tua nu hong pai-in, kumpipaʼ mai ah a ding hi." 
1Kings1:29 Kumpipa kiciamin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin kei a hong hon khia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
1Kings1:30 nangma tungah Topa, Israel Pasianʼ min tawh hong kiciamin, ‘Keima nungah ka tapa Solomon mang dinga, keima tangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ka cih sa mah bangin, tu ni-in zong ka cikik hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:31 Tua ciangin Bathsheba in lei lam maingatin kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, “Ka to kumpi David nungta tawntung tahen!” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:32 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan le Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah samsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ mai ah amaute hong pai uh hi." 
1Kings1:33 Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Na topaʼ nasemte paipih unla, ka tapa Solomon keima la-sakol tungah tuangsakin Gihon ah paipih suk un." 
1Kings1:34 Israel-teʼ tungah kumpi-in tua lai munah siampi Zadok le kamsang Nathan sathau nilhsak un. Tua ciangin peengkul tum unla, ‘Kumpi Solomon khansau hen!’ ci un." 
1Kings1:35 Tua ciangin ama nungah note nong pai ding uh a, amah hong pai-in ka kumpi tokhom tungah hong tu ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keima tangin amah kumpi hi ding hi. Israel le Judah a ukpa dingin amah ka seh khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:36 Tua ciangin Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah in dawngin, “Hi tahen! Topa, ka to kumpipaʼ Pasian in tua bangin kipsak tahen." 
1Kings1:37 Topa in ka to kumpipa a ompih mah bangin Solomon zong ompih henla, ka to Kumpi Davidʼ tokhom sangin ama tokhom liansak zaw hen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:38 Tua ahih ciangin Zadok, kamsang Nathan, Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah le Khereth mite le Peleth mite pai sukin Kumpi Davidʼ la-sakol tungah Solomon tuangsak uh a, Gihon ah amah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings1:39 Tua lai ah siampi Zadok in puanbuk panin sathau biing la-in Solomon a nilh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in peengkul tum uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Kumpi Solomon khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings1:40 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama nungah pai-in tamngaikop tum uh a, nakpi takin lungdam uh a, amauʼ gamlumna in lei a thawn kham hi." 
1Kings1:41 Adonijah le amah tawh a om leenglate khempeuh in a pawi bawl a man khit uh ciangin hih thu za uh hi. Joab in peengkul aw a zak ciangin amah in, “Khuapi sungah hih gamlumna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:42 Amah a kampau laitakin, siampi Abiatharʼ tapa Jonathan hong pai hi. Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Hong tum in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang migina na hi a, thuhoih nong puak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:43 Jonathan in Adonijah dawngin, “Hi lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i to kumpi David in kumpi-in Solomon bawl khin hi." 
1Kings1:44 Kumpipa in amah tawh siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan le Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah le Khereth mite le Peleth mite sawl khin hi. Amaute in kumpipaʼ la-sakol tungah amah tuangsak khin uh hi." 
1Kings1:45 Siampi Zadok le kamsang Nathan in Gihon ah kumpi-in amah sathau nilh khin uh hi. Tua lai panin amaute lungdamin ciah khin uh ahih manin khuapi sung gamlum hi. Nangma zak pen hih gamlumna ahi hi. 
1Kings1:46 Tu-in Solomon in kumpi tokhom luah khinta hi. 
1Kings1:47 Tua tham loin kumpipaʼ nasemte i to Kumpi David tungah lungdamna a ko dingin pai uh a, ‘Na Pasian in nangma min sangin Solomonʼ min a thang zaw-in bawl henla, nangma tokhom sangin ama tokhom a lian zaw-in bawl tahen,’ ci uh hi. A lupna tung panin kumpipa mahmah zong kun hi." 
1Kings1:48 Kumpipa in zong, ‘Keima mit-a ka muhin keima suanlekhakte khat ka kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin tu ni-in a pia Topa, Israel Pasian in thupha ngah tahen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:49 Tua ciangin Adonijahʼ leenglate khempeuh liing uh a, dingin amauʼ mun ciatah a ciah uh hi." 
1Kings1:50 Tua ciangin Adonijah in Solomon kihta hi. Amah pai-in biakna tau kite pom hi. 
1Kings1:51 Tua ciangin Solomon kiangah, “Adonijah in Kumpi Solomon hong kihta hi. Amah in biakna tau kite lenin, ‘Amah in a nasem pa namsau tawh a thah loh nading kei tungah Kumpi Solomon hong kiciam masa hen,’ ci hi,” kici hi." 
1Kings1:52 Tua ciangin Solomon in, “Amah in a kilawm mi ahihna a lahtel theih leh ama samzang khat zong leilak ah kia lo dinga, ahi zongin ama sungah gitlohna a kimuh leh amah si ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings1:53 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawl a, amaute in zong biakna tau panin amah paikhiatpih uh hi. Amah hong pai-in Kumpi Solomonʼ tungah zahtakna bawl hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in ama kiangah, “Na inn ah ciah in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:1 Davidʼ sih ding hun a nai ciangin amah in a tapa Solomon thuhilhin," 
1Kings2:2 “Leitung mi khempeuh ngeina bangin a pai ding ka hi ta hi. Thakhauhin pasal na hihna kilangsak in. 
1Kings2:3 Amah in kei tungah a hong gen, ‘Na tapate in a lungsim khempeuh uh le a nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh keima mai ah thuman takin gamtat ding limtakin a ngaihsut nak uh leh Israel kumpi tokhom tungah khat beek in nang hong tamasak lo ding hi,’ ci-a a thugenna Topa in a kipsak theih nadingin, Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin Topa na Pasianʼ thuhilhna zui-in, ama lampite hoihtakin tawn inla, ama thukhamte, a thupiakte, a biakna ngeina kipte hoihtakin zui in. Tua hileh na hek suk na hek tohna khempeuh ah na dau hong pai ding hi." 
1Kings2:4  
1Kings2:5 “Tham loin, Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in kei hong bawlna, gal sunga a si miteʼ phu a lakna-in gal kilem hun sungin a thah, Israel galkap ukte ahi mi nih, Nerʼ tapa Abner le Jetherʼ tapa masa tungah a bawlna le, amah in mawhna nei lo mite thatin, tua ama gamtatna hangin ka thuaknate zong na thei hi." 
1Kings2:6 Tua ahih ciangin nangma pilna bangin gamta inla, lungnuam takin sih ngeina tawh amah na sihsak loh ding thei in." 
1Kings2:7 Ahih hangin Gilead mi Barzillaiʼ tapate tungah thuman takin gamta inla, na sabuai a an nete bangin amaute omsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Absalomʼ kiang panin ka tai lai-in amaute in tua bang thumanna tawh kei hong bawl uh hi." 
1Kings2:8 Mahanaim ah ka pai lai-in a nasia samsiatna tawh kei a hong samsia, Bahurim panin a hong pai Benjamin mi Geraʼ tapa Shimei zong nang tawh om hi. Ahih hangin Jordan ah keimah a dawn dingin hong pai ciangin ama tungah Topa tawh kiciamin, ‘Namsau tawh nang kong that kei ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
1Kings2:9 Ahi ta zongin tu-in amah a mawhbaang loin ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang mipil na hi hi. Ama tungah na bawl dinga a kilawm na thei ngawn ding hi. Amah thatin a lutang hanah na paipih suk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:10 Tua ciangin David si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi." 
1Kings2:11 Israel-te tungah David in kum sawm li sung uk hi. Amah in Hebron ah kum sagih sung ukin, Jerusalem ah kum sawm thum le kum thum sung uk hi." 
1Kings2:12 Tua ahih ciangin a pa Davidʼ tokhom tungah Solomon tu a, ama kumpi gam kip takin kiphut hi." 
1Kings2:13 Tua ciangin Solomonʼ nu Bathsheba kiangah David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah hong pai hi. Tua nu in, “Thunuam a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Thunuam hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:14 Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Nang tungah gen ding khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:15 Adonijah in, “Kumpi gam pen keima-aʼ hi-in, Israel-te khempeuh in keima uk ding a lamet mahmahna uh na thei hi. Ahi zongin kumpi gam kihei-in ka sanggam pa-aʼ suak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen Topaʼ kiang pan ahi hi." 
1Kings2:16 Tu-in nangma tung panin kong nget ding khat om hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Tua nu in ama kiangah, “Gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:17 Amah in, “Kumpi Solomon kiangah nong ngetsak ding kong thum hi. Amah in nangʼ thu hong nial lo ding hi. Shunem mi Abishag ka zi dingin kei tungah hong piak ding ka ut hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:18 Bathsheba in, “Hoih mahmah hi; kumpipa kiangah kong gensak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:19 Tua ahih ciangin Adonijah tangin ama tungah thu a gen dingin Kumpi Solomon kiangah Bathsheba va pai hi. Tua ciangin tua nu a dawn dingin kumpipa dingin tua nu mai ah a kun hi. Tua ciangin ama tokhom tungah tu-in kumpipaʼ nu adingin tutna khat lasak hi. Tua nu ama tak lamah a tu hi. 
1Kings2:20 Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma tungah na neuno khat nget ding ka nei hi; kei hong nial kei in,” a ci hi. Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Hong ngen in, nu aw; kong nial kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:21 Amah in, “Shunem mi Abishag ama zi dingin na sanggampa Adonijah tungah kipia hen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:22 Kumpi Solomon in a nu dawngin, “Bang hangin Adonijah adingin Shunem mi Abishag hong ngen na hi hiam? Kumpi gam zong ama adingin ngetsak lai vet in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah ka u hi a, ama lamah siampi Abiathar le Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab pang hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:23 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon zong Topa tawh kiciamin, “Hih thu in Adonijahʼ nuntakna a lei kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen!" 
1Kings2:24 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, kei hong kipsakin ka pa Davidʼ tokhom tungah hong koih a, ama ciam sa bangin kei tung le ka suanlekhakte tungah kumpi gam hong pia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, tu ni-in Adonijah kithat ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:25 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah sawl hi. Amah in tua pa sat puk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi." 
1Kings2:26 Tua ciangin siampi Abiatharʼ kiangah kumpipa in, “Nangma mun le nangma gam a omna Anathoth ah ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh na sih ding a kilawm ahi hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in ka pa Davidʼ mai ah Topa Pasian ’ Thuciamna Singkuang na puakna le ka paʼ gimna ah na gim khopna hangin tutungin nang kong that kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Topaʼ siampi hihna panin Abiathar hawl khia-in, Eli innkuan tawh kisai thu Topa in Shiloh ah a genna thu tua bangin a tungsak hi." 
1Kings2:28 Hih thu Joab kiang a tun ciangin Topaʼ puanbuk ah Joab tai-in biakna tau kite a len hi. (Joab in Absalom pawlpih loin Adonijah a na pawlpihna hang ahi hi.) 
1Kings2:29 Kumpi Solomon kiangah, “ Topaʼ puanbuk ah Joab tai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin Solomon in Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah sawlin, “Pai in; amah sat puk in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:30 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ puanbuk ah Benaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa in thu hong pia a, ‘Hong paikhia in,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Hi lo hi, hih lai ah kei ka si zaw ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Benaiah in kumpipa kiangah thu puakin, “Tua bangin Joab in thu gen a, tua bangin amah in kei hong dawng hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:31 Kumpipa in amah dawngkikin, “Ama cih sa bangin hih in; amah sat lum inla phum in. Joab in thu om lopi-in mi a thahna hangin mawhna pen keima tung le ka suanlekhakteʼ tung panin tua bangin na siangsak ding hi." 
1Kings2:32 Topa in ama mawhna ama lu tung mahah tungsakkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Davidʼ theih loh kalin amah in Israel galkapte a uk Nerʼ tapa Abner le Judah galkapte a uk Jetherʼ tapa Amasa, amah sangin thuman zaw-in a hoih zaw ahi mihing nih do-in namsau tawh a that hi." 
1Kings2:33 Tua ahih ciangin mi thahna hangin gimna pen Joabʼ lu tung le ama suanlekhakteʼ lu tungah a tawntungin hong tungkik ding hi. Ahih hangin Davidʼ tung, ama suanlekhakteʼ tung, ama innkuan tung le ama kumpi tokhom tungah Topaʼ kiang panin a tawntung nopna om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:34 Tua ciangin Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah pai to-in amah sat puk sukin that a, gamlak ama inn sungah amah kiphum hi." 
1Kings2:35 Kumpipa in Joab tangin galkapteʼ tungah Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah koih a, kumpipa in Abiatharʼ tangin siampi Zadok a koih hi." 
1Kings2:36 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “Jerusalem ah inn khat lamin tua lai ah teeng inla, tua lai mun panin mun khat peuhpeuh ah paikhia kei in." 
1Kings2:37 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pai khia-in Kidron lui na kantan ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in; na sih leh nangma khialhna hang hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings2:38 Tua ciangin Shimei in kumpipa kiangah, “Na thugen hoih hi; ka to kumpipaʼ gen bangin na nasem pa gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem ah sau veipi sung Shimei om hi." 
1Kings2:39 Ahih hangin kum thum a cin ciangin Gath kumpipa Maakahʼ tapa Akhish kiangah Shimeiʼ silate nih va tai uh hi. Shimeiʼ kiangah, “En in, na silate Gath ah om hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei dingin la khat a van vawhin a silate a zong dingin Gath a Akhish kiangah pai a, Gath panin a silate a ciahpih hi." 
1Kings2:41 Jerusalem panin Gath ah Shimei pai-in a ciahkikna thu Solomon kiangah a kigen ciangin 
1Kings2:42 kumpipa in mi sawlin Shimei samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa tawh hong kiciam sakin, thupi takin nang hong thuhilhin, ‘Nang, mun khat peuhpeuh ah na paikhiat ni-in na sih ding teltakin thei in,’ hong ci hi lo ka hi hiam? Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Na thugen hoih hi; ka mang hi,’ na ci hi." 
1Kings2:43 Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topaʼ tungah na kiciamna le nang hong thuhilhin kong thupiakna zui lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Kings2:44 Tua banah kumpipa in Shimei kiangah, “Ka pa David tungah siatna na bawlte khempeuh na lungsimah na thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in nangma siatna nangma lutung mahah hong tunkik ding hi." 
1Kings2:45 Ahih hangin Kumpi Solomon thupha kipia-in, a tawntungin Topaʼ mai ah a tokhom kikipsak ding hi,” zong a ci lai hi." 
1Kings2:46 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah thu pia hi. Amah pai khia-in Shimei sat puk sukin, tua ciangin amah a si hi. Tua ahih ciangin Solomonʼ khut sungah kumpi gam kikipsak hi." 
1Kings3:1 Solomon in Egypt kumpipa Faro tawh numei-a kizopna bawl hi. Amah in Faroʼ tanu la a, ama inn le Topaʼ biakinn le Jerusalem kimkot a kulhpi a lam a zawh mateng David khuapi sungah tua nu paipihin omsak hi." 
1Kings3:2 Ahi zongin Topa adingin biakinn kilam nai lo ahih manin mite in mual tunga biaknate ah biakna pia uh hi. 
1Kings3:3 Solomon in Topa itin, a pa Davidʼ thukhamte zui hi. Ahi zongin amah in mual tunga biaknate ah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal hi." 
1Kings3:4 Tua ciangin biakna a pia dingin Gibeon ah kumpipa pai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mual tunga biakna mun a lian pen ahi hi. Solomon in tua biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tam veipi tak a piaknasa mun ahi hi. 
1Kings3:5 Gibeon ah zanin mang sungah Solomonʼ tungah Topa kilang hi. Pasian in, “Nang kong piak ding hong ngen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:6 Solomon in, “Na nasem ka pa Davidʼ tungah a lian itna kip na lak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh cihtakna, thumanna tawh nangma mai ah gamta-in, nangma tungah lungsim thutang hi. Nangmah in ama adingin hih a lian itna kip koihsakin, tu ni-in ama tokhom tungah a tu ding tapa khat na pia hi." 
1Kings3:7 Tu-in, Topa ka Pasian aw, kei pen naupang no khat hi napi-in ka pa Davidʼ munah kumpi-in na nasem pa nong koih hi. Bangci gamtatin bangci nasep ding cih ka theih khat zong om lo hi." 
1Kings3:8 A lian, a phazah a kisim zo lo, a tamna a kiseh thei lo, nangmah in na teel sa na mite lakah na nasem pa om hi." 
1Kings3:9 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in a sia le a pha ka theihtheih nadingin na mite uk nading thu theihtelna lungsim na nasem pa hong pia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a lian a tam na mite kua in uk zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Kings3:10 Solomonʼ thungetna in Topa lungkimsak hi. 
1Kings3:11 Pasian in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in hih thu hong ngenin, nangma adingin khansauna ahi a, hauhna ahi a, na galte thah zawh nading ahi zongin hong ngen loin, a man thu na theih nadingin nang adingin thu theihtelna hong ngen na hih manin," 
1Kings3:12 en in, nangma hong ngetna bangin kong pia ding hi. En in, nangma hun ma-in nang tawh a kibang a om loh nading le nangma khit ah zong nang tawh a kibang hong khan loh nadingin pilna le theihna lungsim kong pia ding hi." 
1Kings3:13 Nangma hunsung tawntung kumpi dang nang tawh a kiteh theih loh nadingin nangma hong nget loh hauhna le pahtawina zong nang kong pia ding hi. 
1Kings3:14 Na pa David in a tot bangin nangmah in ka lampite tawnin, ka thukhamte le ka thupiaknate na zuih nakleh na khan ka sausak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:15 Tua ciangin Solomon khanglo a, hih pen a mang na hi hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah amah pai a, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah amah dingin meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te pia-in, a nasemte khempeuh adingin pawi khat a kham hi." 
1Kings3:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah numei paktat nih hong pai-in a mai ah ding uh hi. 
1Kings3:17 A numei khat in, “Aw, ka topa aw, hih numei le kei, inn khat sungah ka om khawm uh hi; amah zong inn ah a om sungin keimah in ta khat ka nei hi." 
1Kings3:18 Ka ta neih khit ni thum ni ciangin hih numei in zong ta hong nei hi. Ko gel bek a om ka hi uh a, kote tawh inn sungah kuamah dang om lo hi." 
1Kings3:19 Amah in delhphah kha ahih manin zanin hih numeiʼ tapa a si hi. 
1Kings3:20 Tua ciangin zankim laitakin amah tho-in, na nasem nu ka ihmut laitakin ka kiang panin ka tapa la-in ama ang ah koih a, ama tapa si keiʼ ang ah hong koih hi." 
1Kings3:21 Zingsangin ka ta nawi a pia dingin ka thawh ciangin, a si sa na hi hi. Ahih hangin limtakin ka et ciangin, amah pen keima sung pan a suakta na hi lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:22 Ahih hangin a numei dang khat in, “Hi lo hi; a hing naupang keima aʼ hi a, a si naupang nangma aʼ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a masa nu in, “Hi lo hi; a si naupang nangma aʼ hi a, a hing naupang keima-aʼ ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin kumpipaʼ mai ah amau tegel in thu gen tuak uh hi." 
1Kings3:23 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Khat in, ‘A nungta pen keima tapa hi a, nangma tapa si hi,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin a dang khat in, ‘Hi lo hi; nangma tapa si a, keima tapa a hing pen ahi hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Namsau khat hong la un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ mai ah namsau khat hong kipaipih hi." 
1Kings3:25 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “A nungta naupang khen nih suah unla, khat tungah alang pia-in, a dang khat tungah alang pia un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:26 Tua ciangin a tapa a nungta numei in a lungsimah a tapa khasiat ahih manin kumpipa kiangah, “Aw ka topa aw, a nungta naupang amah pia zaw in; bangbang hitaleh amah that kei in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a khat in, “Hih pen kei ka hi a, amah in ahi zongin tang thei lo ding hi; hong hawmsak un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:27 Tua ciangin kumpipa in dawngin, “A masa numei tungah naupang hing pia un; bangbang hitaleh that kei un; amah pen a nu ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings3:28 Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh in kumpipaʼ piak thukhenna za uh hi. Thutang a sem dingin ama tungah Pasian in pilna pia hi, ci-in phawk uh ahih manin amaute in kumpipa lamdang sa-in a om uh hi." 
1Kings4:1 Kumpi Solomon pen Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a," 
1Kings4:2 ama nuai ah panmunte le a semte hih bang ahi hi: Siampi nasep: Zadokʼ tapa Azariah ahi hi. 
1Kings4:3 Lai-at nasep: Shishaʼ tapa Elihoref le Ahijah ahi uh hi. Thu ciamteh nasep: Ahiludʼ tapa Jehoshafat ahi hi. 
1Kings4:4 Galkapte a uk nasep: Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah ahi hi. Siampite nasep: Zadok le Abiathar ahi uh hi. 
1Kings4:5 Uliante tungah a uk nasep: Nathanʼ tapa Azariah ahi hi. Kumpi thulamlak nasep: Nathanʼ tapa Zabud ahi hi. 
1Kings4:6 Kumpi inn uk nasep: Ahishar ahi hi. Aana tawh nasemte a uk nasep: Abdaʼ tapa Adoniram ahi hi. 
1Kings4:7 Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawm le nih nei-in tuate in kumpipa le a innkuan adingin an nek tui dawn vaihawmsak uh hi. Mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung an nek tui dawn vaihawmsak ciat uh hi. 
1Kings4:8 Tua a vaihawm uliante: Benhur: Efraim mual tung gam sungah; 
1Kings4:9 Bendeker: Makaz khua, Shaalbim, Beth-shemesh khua le Elon-beth-hanan khua sungah;" 
1Kings4:10 Benhesed: Arubboth khua sungah (Soko le Hefer gam khempeuh ama aʼ hi); 
1Kings4:11 Benabinadab: Nafathdor gam sung khempeuh ah (amah in Solomonʼ tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi); 
1Kings4:12 Ahiludʼ tapa Baana: Taanak khua, Megiddo khua le Jezreel khua nuai Zarethan khua panga om Beth-shean gam khempeuh le Beth-shean khua panin Jokmeam khua le Abelmeholah dongah;" 
1Kings4:13 Bengeber: Ramoth-gilead gam sungah (amah in Gilead sunga om Manassehʼ tapa Jairʼ khuaneute le Bashan sungah a om Argob gam sung, kulhpite le sumngo zawlte a nei khuapi lian sawm guk nei hi);" 
1Kings4:14 Iddoʼ tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim khua sungah; 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaaz: Naftali gam sungah (amah in Solomonʼ tanu Basemath zi-in la hi); 
1Kings4:16 Hushaiʼ tapa Baana: Asher gam le Bealoth khua sungah; 
1Kings4:17 Paruahʼ tapa Jehoshafat: Issakhar gam sungah; 
1Kings4:18 Elaʼ tapa Shimei: Benjamin gam sungah; 
1Kings4:19 Uriʼ tapa Gebal: Amor miteʼ kumpi Sihon le Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gam sungah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawm le nihte banah Judah gam sung khempeuh a uk ulian khat om lai hi. 
1Kings4:20 Judah mi le Israel mi tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tam uh a, amaute in an ne tui dawnin lungdam uh hi." 
1Kings4:21 Solomon in Eufratis panin Filistia gam le Egypt gamgi ciang dong kumpi gam khempeuh uk hi. Amaute in siah hong puak uh a, a nuntak sung tawntung uh Solomonʼ na sem uh hi." 
1Kings4:22 Solomon ading ni khatin an nek tui dawn, annel lawh sawm thum le an lawh sawm guk," 
1Kings4:23 bawngtal a thau sawm le lo nona a kivak bawng sawm nih; tuu za khat; sakhitalte le Syria sakhite, sanangte le a thau vasate a kisim lo hi lai hi." 
1Kings4:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Eufratis nitumna lam gam sung khempeuh Tifsah panin Gaza ciang dong, Eufratis nitumna lam pang kumpi khempeuh uk a, ama kiim mun khempeuh ah galdaihna om hi." 
1Kings4:25 Solomonʼ hunsung khempeuh Judah le Israel lungmuang takin omin, Dan panin Beer-sheba ciang dong nangawn mi khempeuh a leenggui le a theikung nuai uh ah lungnuamin om uh hi." 
1Kings4:26 Solomon in a leengte adingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawm li le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tul nih zong nei hi. 
1Kings4:27 Tua uliante in Kumpi Solomon le Kumpi Solomonʼ sabuai ah a hong pai mite khempeuh adingin amau ciat sik kha sunga dingin an nek tui dawn vaihawm uh a, amaute in bangmah kisamsak lo uh hi." 
1Kings4:28 Amauʼ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a kisapna munah sakolte le sakol zaptelte adingin mangbuhham le buhtu zong paipih uh hi. 
1Kings4:29 Pasian in Solomonʼ tungah teh zawh lohin a thuk mahmah pilna le theihna le gen zawh loh lungsim zaina pia a," 
1Kings4:30 Solomonʼ pilna in nisuahna lam mi khempeuh le Egypt pilna khempeuh khum let hi. 
1Kings4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pil zaw a, Ezrah mi Ethan le Maholʼ tapa Heman, Kalkol le Darda sangin pil zaw lai a, a kiim a minam khempeuh lakah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
1Kings4:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pil zaw a, Ezrah mi Ethan le Maholʼ tapa Heman, Kalkol le Darda sangin pil zaw lai a, a kiim a minam khempeuh lakah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
1Kings4:32 Amah in paunak tul thum zong gen khia a, ama laphuah dawng tul le dawng nga ahi hi." 
1Kings4:33 Amah in Lebanon-a om taamtak a kipan phungmai a po puknahte dongin singkung thu a gen hi. Amah in khe li nei ganhingte, vasate, a bokvak ganhingte le ngasateʼ thu a gen hi." 
1Kings4:34 Mi khempeuh le leitung kumpi khempeuh sung panin Solomonʼ pilna thu a ngai dingin ama pilna thu a za ngeisate hong pai uh hi. 
1Kings5:1 Amaute in ama paʼ munah kumpi-in amah sathau a nilhna thu a zak ciangin Taia kumpi Hiram in a nasemte Solomon kiangah sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hiram in David it tawntung hi. 
1Kings5:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in Hiram kiangah kam khak a," 
1Kings5:3 “ Topa in ama khe nuai ah amaute a koihsak matengin amah a umcih a galte tawh kidona hangin ka pa David in Topa ama Pasianʼ min dingin biakinn a lam theih lohna thu na thei hi. 
1Kings5:4 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa ka Pasian in na khempeuh ah tawlngakna kei tungah hong pia hi. Hong langpang ahi a, thusia ahi zongin om lo hi." 
1Kings5:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah, ‘Nangma tangin na kumpi tokhom tungah ka koih ding na tapa in ka min dingin biakinn lam ding hi,’ a cih mah bangin Topa ka Pasianʼ min dingin biakinn khat lam ka sawm hi." 
1Kings5:6 Tua ahih ciangin Lebanon taamtak singte kei adingin a kiphuk nading thu pia in; ka nasemte in nangma nasemte seppih ding uh a, nangma seh bangin na nasemteʼ thaman ding nang tungah kong pia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon mite bangin sing suih a siam kote lakah khat zong a om lohna na thei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings5:7 Hiram in Solomonʼ kam a zak ciangin nakpi takin lungdam a, “Hih a lian a tam mite a uk dingin Davidʼ tungah a pil tapa a pia Topa in tu ni-in thupha ngah tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings5:8 Tua ciangin Hiram in Solomon kiangah mi sawlin, “Kei kiangah nong thu-khak ka za hi. Taamtak sing le taaksan sing tawh kisai na deih khempeuh a hih dingin ka kiging hi." 
1Kings5:9 Ka nasemte in Lebanon panin tuipi ah tuate hong puak suk ding uh hi. Nangma cihna munah a pai dingin tuipi a tawn dingin keimah in tuate phongin ka bawl dinga, tua lai munah keimah in a singte phelsakin nangmah in na ngah ding hi. Nangmah in ka mite ading an piakna tawh ka deihnate nong kicingsak ding hi,” cisak hi." 
1Kings5:10 Tua ahih ciangin Hiram in ama deih taamtak le taaksan singte Solomon pia a," 
1Kings5:11 Solomon in Hiram tungah a miteʼ an dingin mangbuh beem tul sawm nih le oliv thau bungpi tul sawm nih dim a pia hi. Solomon in Hiramʼ tungah a kumkumin hihte a pia hi. 
1Kings5:12 Ama tungah a ciam bangin Topa in Solomon tungah pilna pia hi. Solomon le Hiram kilem uh a, amau tegel in thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi." 
1Kings5:13 Kumpi Solomon in Israel sung panin aana tawh na a sem mite la hi. A lak mite mihing tul sawm thum pha hi. 
1Kings5:14 Amah in Lebanon ah tua mite kha khatin tul sawm a kikhelin puak hi. Amaute Lebanon ah kha khat omin inn ah kha nih om ding uh hi. Adoniram in hih a kila mite uk hi. 
1Kings5:15 Solomon in van pua mi tul sawm sagih le mual tung gamah suangseek mi tul sawm giat zong nei a," 
1Kings5:16 na a sem mite a uk, Solomonʼ nuai ah ulian tul thum le za thum, nasep ukte a kihel lo ahi hi." 
1Kings5:17 Suangseek sa tawh biakinn bulpi a phuh theih nadingin kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in a lian, a manpha suangtumte to khia uh hi." 
1Kings5:18 Tua ahih ciangin biakinn lam nadingin Solomonʼ mi innlamte le Hiramʼ mi innlamte le Gebal mite in sing phuk le sing le suang nasep a sem uh hi. 
1Kings6:1 Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiat zawh kum za li le kum sawm giatna, Israel-te tungah Solomonʼ uk a kum lina, a kha nihna ahi Ziv kha-in amah in Topaʼ biakinn lam ding kipan hi." 
1Kings6:2 Kumpi Solomon in Topa adingin a lam biakinn, a sung pi sawm kua sau-in, pi sawm thum zai a, pi sawm le nga sang hi." 
1Kings6:3 Biakinn mai ah a innliim pen biakinn zaina zahin pi sawm thum sau a, inn mai lamah pi sawm le nga sang hi." 
1Kings6:4 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn adingin a pualam a kihui tawlette a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:5 Amah in biakinn pang tuak le a nung lam biakinn kawm kimkotin a kawm tungah zong inn lam a, a kimkot a pangah inn dei bawl hi." 
1Kings6:6 A dawl nuainung pen pi sagih le alang zai-in, a laita pi kua zai a, a thumna pi sawm le alang zai hi. Kawm sungah innkam a lut loh nadingin amah in inn pualam pang kimkot a dingin a nanna singbekte a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:7 Biakinn a kilam ciangin a kitawhna mun panin a kibawl sa suangte tawh kilam hi. Tua ahih manin a kilam laitakin hei ahi a, sek ahi a, sik nazat khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a gingte biakinn huang sungah kiza lo hi." 
1Kings6:8 A dawl nuainung lut nading pen biakinn leitaw lam pangah om hi. A dawl laita ah kahlei zui-in kipai-in a dawl laita panin a thumna ah kipai hi. 
1Kings6:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in biakinn lamin a zo hi. Amah in innkamte khungin taamtak peekte tawh inndap a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:10 Amah in a inn buppi tungah a lambehte zomin, dawl khat ciangin pi sagih le alang sang ciat a, taamtak singte-in a biakinn tawh kizom hi." 
1Kings6:11 Tu-in Topaʼ thu Solomonʼ tungah hong tunga," 
1Kings6:12 “Nangmah in na lam hih biakinn tawh kisai-in, ka thukhamte zui-in ka ngeina kipte mang a, ka thupiaknate khempeuh kemin tuate na zuih leh, na pa David tungah ka gen thu nangʼ tungah kong kipsak ding hi." 
1Kings6:13 Tua ciangin na lam biakinn sung Israel mite lakah ka teeng dinga, keima mi Israel-te ka nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in biakinn lamin a zo hi. 
1Kings6:15 Amah in taamtak peekte tawh biakinn sung kawm dap hi. Sual panin inndap innsunte dongin amah in sing tawh a sung lam tuam hi. Tua ciangin amah in taaksan peekte tawh a sual tuam hi. 
1Kings6:16 Amah in sual panin innsun dong inn nung lam pi sawm thum taamtak peekte tawh lam a, amah in siangtho pen mun, biakinn sung nung dingin a inn sungah a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:17 Biakinn sung nung mai-a inn sung, pi sawm guk sau hi." 
1Kings6:18 Inn sunga om taamtak singte tungah umgah le pakpalh lim kigelh hi. A vekpi-in taamtak a kidap hi a, suang kimu lo hi." 
1Kings6:19 Amah in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang koih nadingin a sung tawng pen ah biakinn sung nung a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:20 Biakinn sung nung, pi sawm thum sau-in, pi sawm thum mah zai a, pi sawm thum mah sang a, amah in kham citak tawh a zut hi. Amah in taamtak sing biakna tau khat zong a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:21 Tua ciangin Solomon in kham citak tawh inn sung zut a, biakinn sung nung mai kantanin kham khainiang khung a, kham tawh a zut hi." 
1Kings6:22 Amah in a inn buppi a zawh dongin kham tawh a zut hi. Biakinn sung nung a biakna tau buppi zong amah in kham tawh a zut hi. 
1Kings6:23 Amah in biakinn sung nungah oliv sing tawh kherub nih bawl a, pi sawm le nga tuak a sang hi." 
1Kings6:24 Kherub kha lang khat, pi sagih le alang sau-in, kherub kha lang dang khat, pi sagih le alang mah sau a, a kha lang khat mong panin a mong lang khat dong pi sawm le nga ahi hi." 
1Kings6:25 Kherub a dang khat zong pi sawm le nga mah sau a, Kherub tegel a sauna le a pian lim kibang hi." 
1Kings6:26 Kherub khat a sauna pi sawm le nga hi a, a kherub dang khat zong tua zah mah ahi hi." 
1Kings6:27 Amah in biakinn sung tawngnung pen ah kherub-te a koih hi. Kherub-teʼ khate kizal a, khatʼ kha in kawm banin, a dang kherubʼ kha in a kawm lang khat ban hi. Amauʼ kha lang khat tegel inn laizang ah kituah hi." 
1Kings6:28 Amah in kham tawh tua kherub-te a zut hi. 
1Kings6:29 Amah in a sung nung le a pua nung inn deite, a kimkotin inn kawm khempeuh tungah kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte a bawl hi." 
1Kings6:30 A sung nung le a pua nung inn dei sung innsualte amah in kham tawh a zut hi. 
1Kings6:31 Biakinn sung nung lut nadingin amah in oliv sing kongkhak peekte a bawl hi; a baang tung zawl le kongkhak khuamte in kiu nga piangsak hi. 
1Kings6:32 Amah in kherub-te, nisuh kungte le pakpalh lim kibawlte tawh oliv sing kongkhak peek nihte a tuam hi; amah in tuate kham tawh zut a, kherub-te le nisuh kungte tungah kham a theh hi." 
1Kings6:33 Tua bangmahin amah in kiu li nei-in biakinn sung lutna oliv sing kongkhak khuamte," 
1Kings6:34 le taaksan sing kongkhak peek nihte a bawl hi. Kongkhak a peek nihte kikhepin, a dang kongkhak a peek nihte zong kikhep hi." 
1Kings6:35 Tuate tungah amah in kherub-te le nisuh kungte le pakpalhte bawl a, tua a bawlte tungah a tukimin kham tawh a zut hi." 
1Kings6:36 Amah in a kiseek suang gual thum le taamtak sing gual khat tawh a tual sung nung a bawl hi. 
1Kings6:37 A kum lina, Ziv kha-in Topaʼ biakinn a bulpi kipan hi." 
1Kings6:38 A kum sawm le kum khatna, a kha giatna ahi Bul kha-in a na khempeuh le a kigen khempeuh bangin a kizo hi. Amah in tua a lamna-in kum sagih sung hun a bei hi." 
1Kings7:1 Solomon in ama inn ding zong kum sawm le kum thum sung lamin a inn buppi a zo hi. 
1Kings7:2 Amah in Lebanon Tulak Inn a kici khat a lam hi. A sauna pi za le sawm nga hi a, a zaina pi sawm sagih le nga hi-in, a sanna pi sawm li le nga hi a, taamtak khuampi gual thum tungah taamtak innkam kikhungin tua tungah a kilam ahi hi." 
1Kings7:3 Gual khat ah sawm le nga a om khuampi sawm li le nga tunga kilam inn dei tung san teng taamtak sing tawh kituam hi. 
1Kings7:4 A pang kawm tegel tungah tawlet gual thum tuak om a, a tawlet gual thumte khatlekhat kitang hi." 
1Kings7:5 A kongkhakte le a tawlet khempeuhte a pang kikim kiu li nei vive hi a, a gual thumin tawlet khatlekhat kitang dimdiam hi." 
1Kings7:6 Tua ciangin amah in Khuampi Innpi a kici khat lam hi. A sauna pi sawm sagih le nga hi a, a zaina pi sawm li le nga ahi hi. A mai lamah khuampite a nei innliim om a, tua khuampite tungah a tungkhuhna khat om hi." 
1Kings7:7 Tua ciangin amah in a thukhen nading mun Thukhenna Innpi ahi Kumpi Tokhom Innpi a kici khat lam a, a sual panin a innsun ciang dong taamtak sing kizang hi." 
1Kings7:8 Kumpi Tokhom Innpi nung lamah ama ten nading inn zong tua mah bangin a kilam ahi hi. Solomon in zi a a lak Faroʼ tanu adingin hih innpi tawh a kibang inn dang khat zong a lam hi. 
1Kings7:9 Hihte khempeuh, a bulpi nangawn a kipan a khum dong le Topaʼ biakinn tual a kipan tual lianpi dongin, limtakin tehin, a kitan, a nung le a mai suangatna tawh a ki-at a manpha suangte tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Kings7:10 A bulpi pen a manpha suang, suang lian, pawl khat pi sawm le nih, pawl khat pi sawm le nga a pha suangte ahi hi." 
1Kings7:11 Tuateʼ tung a te pen limtakin tehin a kitan a manpha suang le taamtak sing ahi hi. 
1Kings7:12 Tual lianpi in a kimkot ah a kiseek suang gual thum simin taamtak sing gual khat nei hi. Tua mah bangin Topaʼ biakinn tual sung nung le innliim in zong a nei hi. 
1Kings7:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawlin Taia khua-a om Huram samsak hi. 
1Kings7:14 Amah pen Naftali minam meigongnuʼ tapa hi a, ama pa pen Taia khuami sumngo seek na a sem pa ahi hi. Amah in sumngo tawh na khat peuhpeuh hih nadingin pilna, theihna, siamna a nei ahi hi. Kumpi Solomon kiangah amah hong pai-in ama na khempeuh a sem hi." 
1Kings7:15 Amah in sumngo khuampi nih sung hi. Khuampi khat a sauna pi sawm nih le sagih hi a, a khuam pum kimkot pi sawm le giat pha hi. A sung hawm a, a sahna zung li ahi hi. A khuam nihna zong tua mah tawh kibang hi." 
1Kings7:16 Khuampite tungah a bulh dingin amah in a kisung sumngo khuam luzepna nih zong a bawl hi. Khuam luzepna khat a sauna pi sagih le alang hi a, a dang khat khuam luzepna a sauna tua zah mah ahi hi." 
1Kings7:17 Tua ciangin amah in khuampite lu dawna khuam luzepna adingin khainiang a kihuiheek tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam nih a bawl hi. Ngen khat pen khuam luzepna khat ading hi a, a ngen dang khat pen khuam luzepna a dang khat ading ahi hi." 
1Kings7:18 Tua mah bangin amah in mang kawlsing gahte a bawl hi. Khuampi lu dawna om khuam luzepna tuam nadingin ngen tawh kibangin a bawl tung kimkot ah gual nih bawl a, a khuam luzepna dang khat zong tua mah bangin a bawl hi." 
1Kings7:19 Tua ciangin inn lim a om khuampi dawnah a om khuamluzepnate pi guk pha a, tuate tungah unok pak a kibawlte om hi." 
1Kings7:20 A khuamluzepnate pen a khuampi nihte tung le ngen tawh kibanga kibawl gei-a a om a bem a dawk tungah om hi. A kimkot ah gual nihin mang kawlsing gah za nih om a, a khuam luzepna dang khat ah zong tua bangmah ahi hi." 
1Kings7:21 Amah in biakinn inn liimah khuampite a phut hi. Leitaw lamah a khuam khat phutin a min Jakhin phuak a, leilu lamah a khuam dang khat phutin a min Boaz a phuak hi." 
1Kings7:22 A khuampite dawnah unok pak a kibawl om hi. Tua bangin khuampite a bawl a man khin hi. 
1Kings7:23 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi a bawl hi. Tua tuikuang a bem hi a, a gei khat pan a gei khat pi sawm le nga pha-in, pi sagih le alang thuk a, a kimkot pi sawm li le nga a pha hi." 
1Kings7:24 A geivial nuai pi sawm li le nga sung, tuikuangpi kimkotin um gahte kibawl hi. Tua um gahte gual nihin om a, a tuikuangpi a kisunin kisung khawm pah hi." 
1Kings7:25 Bawngtal sawm le nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a, thum leilu lam nga a, thum nitumna lam nga-in, thum leitaw lam nga a, thum nisuahna lam a nga hi. Tuate tungah a tuikuangpi kikoih a, a nung lam uh a sung lamah om hi." 
1Kings7:26 A tuikuang sahna khut peek mai cia ahi hi. A geivial pen unok pak tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl hi. Tua sungah tui tambong tul li bang ta thei hi. 
1Kings7:27 Amah in sumngo kibawl tuikuang a kingakna sawm zong a bawl hi. Tua a bawlte pi guk sau, pi guk zai, pi li le alang sang hi." 
1Kings7:28 Tua a kingaknate hih bangin kibawl hi: Tuate in a khawkte nei-in, tua a khawkte a kungah kibulh a," 
1Kings7:29 tua ciangin a kungah a kibulh a khawkte tungah humpi-nelkaite, bawngtalte le kherub-te om hi. Tua kungte tung, humpi-nelkaite le bawngtalteʼ tung le nuai ah a sawi-in a kikalh limliam om hi." 
1Kings7:30 Tua tham loin tua ngaknate in sumngo tawh a kibawl leengpeite le leengpei zawlte nei ciat a, a kiu lite ah tuikuangpi nannate om hi. Tua nannate a kisung hi a, a pang ciatah pakkual om hi." 
1Kings7:31 A gong pen a kingakna pan pi khat le alang sang to hi. A gong pen kingakna a kibawl bangin bem a, pi nih le letmat thum thuk hi. A gongah lim kigelhte om hi. A khawkte in sik li nei a, bem lo hi." 
1Kings7:32 A leengpei lite pen a khawkteʼ nuai ah om hi. Leengpei zawlte a kingakna tawh sakhat mah hi a, leengpei a sanna pi nih le letmat thum ahi hi." 
1Kings7:33 A peite pen sakol leengpei bangin kibawl hi; a pei zawl, a pei kual, a pei kalhna le a kalhna bulte khempeuh a kisung ahi hi." 
1Kings7:34 A kingaknateʼ kiu ciatah a nanna li om ciat a, tua a nannate a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi." 
1Kings7:35 Tua ciangin a ngakna dawnah letmat kua a sang vial bem khat om hi. A ngakna dawnah a kipsaknate le a khawkte pen a ngakna tawh sakhat ahi hi. 
1Kings7:36 Tua ciangin a kipsaknate le a khawkte tungah a mun awng zah ciat tawh kizui-in amah in kherub-te, humpi-nelkaite le nisuh kungte gelhin a kimkot ah pakkual a bawl hi." 
1Kings7:37 Tu-a bangin amah in a kingakna sawm bawl hi. A vekpi-in a kibangin kisungin, a liatna le a pian lim a kibang ahi hi." 
1Kings7:38 Tua ciangin amah in sumngo tuikuang sawm bawl hi. Tuikuang khat ah tui tambong sawm giat bang ta-in, tuikuang vangsung pi guk ciat pha a, a kingakna sawmte adingin tuikuang khat ciat om hi." 
1Kings7:39 Tua ciangin amah in tua a kingaknate, biakinn leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi. Tua ciangin biakinn khang nisuahna lam kiu ah tuikuangpi a koih hi." 
1Kings7:40 Huram in beelte, kawbiate le kuangte zong a bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin Huram in Kumpi Solomon adingin Topaʼ biakinn a ding nasep khempeuh a zo hi." 
1Kings7:41 Khuampi nihte, khuampite dawnah a om khuam luzepna kuak nihte le khuampite dawnah a om khuam luzepna kuak nihte tuam nading ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl nihte;" 
1Kings7:42 khuampite tungah a om khuam luzepna nihte a tuam dingin ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl khat adingin mang kawlsing gah gual nih ahi, ngen tawh a kibanga kibawl nih adingin mang kawlsing gah za lite;" 
1Kings7:43 a kingakna sawmte le a kingaknate tungah a om tuikuang sawmte; 
1Kings7:44 tuikuangpi khat le tuikuangpi nuai ah a om bawngtal sawm le nihte ahi hi. 
1Kings7:45 Tu-in beelte, kawbiate le kuangte, Huram in Kumpi Solomon adingin a bawl, Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om nazatte khempeuh a tee sumngo tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan zanglei, Sukkoth le Zarethan kikal beel lei ah kumpipa in tua nate sungsak hi." 
1Kings7:47 Tam lua ahih manin Solomon in hih nate khempeuh tawi teh zo lo hi; sumngo gik zah kithei lo hi. 
1Kings7:48 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sunga om nazat khempeuh Solomon in bawl hi. Kham biakna tau, Ompihna Anlum adingin kham sabuai," 
1Kings7:49 biakinn sung nung mai, leitaw lam pangah nga omin, leilu lam pangah nga a om kham citak meivak khuamte; kham tawh a kibawl paakte, meivakte le taitehte;" 
1Kings7:50 paknamtui adingin haite, taitehte, kuangte, pakante le kham citak vutluahna; le siangtho pen mun biakinn sung tawngnung kongkhakte le biakinn sung kongkhakte adingin kham bilte ahi hi." 
1Kings7:51 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn a hih nasep khempeuh kizo hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in a pa Davidʼ ap sa nate, ngun, kham le nazatte paipihin Topaʼ biakinn sung vankoihna ah tuate a koih hi." 
1Kings8:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Zion a kici David khuapi panin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn sungah a paipih dingin Jerusalem khua sung ama kiangah Israel upate le minam lutang, Israel beh makaite a khawm hi." 
1Kings8:2 Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh a kha sagihna Ethanim kha sunga pawi hunin Kumpi Solomon kiangah kikhawm uh hi. 
1Kings8:3 Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a, siampite in Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn ah paipih uh hi." 
1Kings8:4 Tua ciangin amaute in kikhopna buk le puanbuk sunga om a siangtho nazatte khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Siampite le Levi mite in tuate paipih to uh hi. 
1Kings8:5 Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah a kikhawm Kumpi Solomon le Israel mihonte khempeuh in biakna-in tuu le bawngtalte tampi tak pia uh ahih manin tuate a phazah kisim zo lo hi. 
1Kings8:6 Tua ciangin siampite in a kherub-teʼ kha nuai, siangtho pen mun sung, biakinn sung nung lam a ama munah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih uh hi." 
1Kings8:7 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang omna mun tungah a kha uh zak ahih manin Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah kherub-te in khuhna piangsak uh hi. 
1Kings8:8 A zawlte sau mahmah ahih manin biakinn sung nung mai siangtho mun panin a zawl mongte kimu a, ahih hangin a pualam panin kimu thei lo hi. Tu ni dongin tua santak ah tuate om hi." 
1Kings8:9 Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat lai-un Topa in Israel mite tawh thuciamna a bawlna Horeb ah Moses in suangpek nih a koih sim loh bangmah dang om lo hi." 
1Kings8:10 Siangtho mun panin siampite a paikhiat ciangin meii in Topaʼ biakinn tuam a," 
1Kings8:11 meii hangin siampite nasem dingin om thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ minthanna vang in Topaʼ biakinn a tuam hi. 
1Kings8:12 Tua ciangin Solomon in, “ Topa in vantungah ni koih khin a, ahih hangin khuamial sahpi sungah amah a ten ding gen khin hi." 
1Kings8:13 Keimah in nangma adingin a kipahtawi mun khat, na ten tawntung nading biakinn khat ka lam khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:14 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte a din laitakin kumpipa in en kawikawi-in Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha a pia hi. 
1Kings8:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “‘Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te ka paikhiatpih a kipanin keima min a om theih nadingin biakinn khat lam nading Israel minam khempeuh sungah khuapi khat zong ka teel kei hi. Ahih hangin ka mi Israel-te tungah a uk dingin David ka teel hi,’ ci-in ka pa David tungah a kam tawh a ciam sa a tungsak Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
1Kings8:16  
1Kings8:17 Israel Pasian, Topaʼ min dingin biakinn khat lam ding ka pa Davidʼ lungsim sungah omngei hi." 
1Kings8:18 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah, ‘Keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding na lungsim sungah a omna thu a hoih mahmah ahi hi." 
1Kings8:19 Ahi zongin nangmah in a biakinn na lam kei dinga, nangma sung pan hong suak ding na tapa in ka min dingin biakinn a lam ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
1Kings8:20 Tu-in ama bawl sa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa Davidʼ munah keimah khangin, Topaʼ ciam sa bangin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah ka tu a, Israel Pasian, Topaʼ min dingin a biakinn ka lam khin hi." 
1Kings8:21 Amah in Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topaʼ thuciamna a omna Thuciamna Singkuang adingin tua lai ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:22 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh a omna Topaʼ mai ah Solomon dinga, vantung lamah a khutte zak hi." 
1Kings8:23 Amah in, “Israel Pasian, Topa aw, tunga om vantung ahi a, nuai-a om leitungah ahi zongin, nangma mai ah a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh a gamta na nasemte tungah thuciamna lenin itna kip a lak, nang tawh a kibang pasian om lo hi." 
1Kings8:24 Na nasem ka pa David tungah na gen sa thu na kipsak hi. Nangmah in na kam tawh na gen a, tu ni-in na tungsak hi." 
1Kings8:25 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian, Topa aw, ama tungah, ‘Keima mai ah nang na gamtat mah bangin na tapate in keima mai ah gamtat ding a kidop nak uh leh, Israel kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin keima mai ah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in na nasem ka pa David tungah na ciam sa thu lenkip in." 
1Kings8:26 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian aw, na nasem ka pa David tungah na gen sa thu kipsak in." 
1Kings8:27 “Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teeng taktak ding ahi hiam? Vantung le vantung a sang pen in nang hong huam zo lo hi. Tua ahih manin keima lam sa hih biakinn in bangzahin nang hong huam zo lo zaw kan ding ahi hiam? 
1Kings8:28 Ahi zongin na nasem paʼ thungetna le a hong thumna hong don inla, Topa ka Pasian aw, tu ni-in nangma mai ah na nasem pa in a hong ngetna, a kikona le a thungetna hong ngai in." 
1Kings8:29 ‘Tua lai ah ka min om ding hi,’ na cihna mun hih biakinn lamah sun le zanin na mit hak inla, na nasem pa in hih mun lamah a thungetna hong za in." 
1Kings8:30 Amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na mi Israel-teʼ hong thumna zong ngai in. Na teenna mun vantung panin hong za inla, ka mawhna uh hong maisak in." 
1Kings8:31 “Mi khat a veengpa tungah khialin, amah a kiciamsak a, amah hong pai-in hih biakinn sung nangma biakna tau mai ah a kiciam leh," 
1Kings8:32 nangmah in vantung panin za-in gamta inla, na nasemte thu khen inla, a mawh pa thuaksakin ama lu tung mahah ama gamtatna tungsak inla, a dikpa a dikna langsakin ama dikna tawh kizui-in thaman pia in." 
1Kings8:33 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin galte mai ah na mi Israel-te a guallelh ciangin, amaute nang lamah hong kiheikikin nangma min hong phawk a, hih biakinn sungah thu ngenin nang tungah hong thum uh leh," 
1Kings8:34 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel-teʼ khialhna maisak inla, a pu a pate uh tungah na piak leitang ah amaute paipihkik in." 
1Kings8:35 “Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh ciangin, amaute in hih mun lamah thu ngenin na min hong phawk a, amaute na gimsak ciangin amauʼ khialhna panin a kihei uh leh," 
1Kings8:36 vantung panin za-in na mi Israel, na nasemteʼ khialhna maisak inla, amauteʼ zuih ding lampi hoih hilh inla, na mite tungah gamh-in na piak sa leitang tungah guah zusak in." 
1Kings8:37 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin, pulnatna ahi a, ankung natna ahi a, ankung zawngkhalna ahi a, kauphe ahi a, lung ahi zongin a om a, amauʼ khuapi khat peuhpeuh a galte un umcihin, bangbang gimna, bangbang natna hitaleh," 
1Kings8:38 mi khatpeuh ahi a, na mi Israel-te khempeuh in ahi zongin amauʼ lungsim natna thei-in hih biakinn lamah a khutte hong zanin bangbang thungetna hitaleh bangbang thumna hitaleh hong bawl uh leh," 
1Kings8:39 na teenna vantung panin za-in maisak in. Tua ciangin amauʼ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang, nang bek in mihing khempeuh lungsim na thei hi)." 
1Kings8:40 Tua hileh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hunsung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi. 
1Kings8:41 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel ahi lo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi panin hong pai-in 
1Kings8:42 (bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthanna le nangma mite adingin na sepsak na lianteʼ thu za ding uh hi), hih biakinn lamah thu hong nget ciangin," 
1Kings8:43 na teenna vantung panin za inla, tua gamdang mipa in nang tungah hong ngetna khempeuh tawh kizui-in hih in. Nangma mi Israel-te mah bangin leitung mi khempeuh in na min thei-in nang hong zahtak nading le hih ka lam sa biakinn pen nangma min tawh a kilo ahihna a theih nading uh ahi hi." 
1Kings8:44 “A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuan khia-in, bangbang lamah amaute sawl hi talecin, nangmah in na teel sa khuapi lam, Topaʼ tung le nangma min dingin ka lam sa biakinn lamah thu hong nget uh ciangin," 
1Kings8:45 amauʼ hong thungetna le hong thumna vantung panin za-in amauʼ vai huh in. 
1Kings8:46 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin - bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khial lo kuamah om lo hi - amaute tungah nang heh a, galte tungah amaute pia-in, amaute kimanin a galteʼ gam a gamla ahi a, a nai ah ahi zongin kipua khia a," 
1Kings8:47 ahi zongin amaute a kipuak khiatna leitang ah amaute in a lungsim uh ah thu ngaihsunin kisikkik a, ‘Kote khialin lam pialin ka gitloh tat uh hi,’ ci-in amaute a manteʼ leitang panin nang tungah hong thum uh a," 
1Kings8:48 amaute manin a pua khia a galte uh leitang ah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh le a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisikkikin, nangmah in na teel sa khuapi, amauʼ pute pateʼ tungah na piak sa amauʼ leitang le nangma min dingin ka lam biakinn lam nga-in nangma tungah thu hong nget uh leh" 
1Kings8:49 vantung na teenna mun panin amauʼ hong thungetna le hong thumna za-in, amauʼ vai huh in." 
1Kings8:50 Nang tungah hong khial na mite le nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amauʼ thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin, a galte un amaute tungah hehpihna a neih theih nadingun amaute manin a pua khia miteʼ muhna ah amaute hehpih in." 
1Kings8:51 (Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt panin na paikhiatpih, sik meiphual sung panin na paikhiatpih nangma mi le nangma luah ahi uh hi.)" 
1Kings8:52 Na nasem paʼ hong thumna le na mi Israel-teʼ hong thumna ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung inla, nang hong sap peuhmah uh ciangin amaute na bil na ngat in." 
1Kings8:53 Egypt panin ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasem pa Moses tungtawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na teng khia hi, Topa Pasian aw,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:54 Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna le thumnate khempeuh Topaʼ tungah a bawl khit ciangin, vantung lamah a khutte a zan sa-in a khukdinna mun Topaʼ biakna tau mai panin amah ding to hi." 
1Kings8:55 Tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in," 
1Kings8:56 “Ama hong ciam sa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israel-te tungah tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah tahen! A nasem pa Moses tungtawnin a gen sa ama thuciam hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawk lo hi. 
1Kings8:57 I pu i pate a ompih mah bangin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih henla, eite hong nusia kei henla, hong taisan kei hen." 
1Kings8:58 Amah in i pu i pate a thupiak sa ahi ama lampi khempeuh a zui ding le ama thupiaknate, a thukhamte le a ngeina kipte a zui dingin ama lamah i lungsim hong awnsak hen." 
1Kings8:59 Topaʼ mai ah ka thumna kammalte sun le zanin Topa i Pasian in hong za henla, nisimin a kisam bangin a nasem paʼ vai le ama mi Israel-teʼ vai hong huh tahen." 
1Kings8:60 Tua hileh mi khempeuh in Topa pen Pasian hi, ci-in thei ding uh a, kuamah dang a om lohna phawk ding uh hi." 
1Kings8:61 Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasianʼ tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman unla, tu ni-a bangin ama thukhamte zui-in a thupiaknate mang un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings8:62 Tua ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah biakna a pia uh hi. 
1Kings8:63 Solomon in thunuam a biakna-in Topaʼ tungah bawngtal tul sawm nih le tul nih le tuu tul za khat le tul sawm nih a pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le Israel mi khempeuh in Topaʼ biakinn a ap uh hi. 
1Kings8:64 Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuam a biakna a thaute a ta zo dingin Topaʼ mai-a sumngo biakna tau neu lua ahih manin tua lai ah meihal biakna le an tawh biakna le thunuam a biakna thaute a pia hi. 
1Kings8:65 Tua hi a, tua hun lai-in Solomon le amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa i Pasianʼ mai ah ni sagih sung, Hamath khua lutna panin Egypt lui dong kikhopna lianpi khat bawlin pawi khat kham uh hi." 
1Kings8:66 A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi. Amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a, Topa in a nasem pa David le ama mi Israel-te tungah hoihna a lahnate khempeuh hangin lungdamna le lungsim kipahna tawh a inn ciat uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
1Kings9:1 Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn le a lam nop khempeuh a lam a man khit ciangin," 
1Kings9:2 Gibeon-a ama tungah a kilah sa bangin Solomon tungah Topa a nih veina kilang hi.
