1Kings9:3 Topa in ama kiangah, “Keima mai ah na hih sa na thungetna le na thumnate ka za khin hi. Na lam sa hih biakinn ka ap khin hi. A tawntungin tua biakinn sungah kei hong kibia dinga, a tawntungin tua biakinn ka hu ding hi." 
1Kings9:4 Nang na hih leh, na pa David a gamtat bangin lungsim thupina le thumanna tawh ka mai ah gamta-in, nang kong thupiak khempeuh bangin sem a, ka thukhamte le ka ngeina kipte na zuih leh," 
1Kings9:5 na pa David tungah, ‘Israel kumpi tokhom tungah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in ka ciam sa bangin Israel-te tungah na kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi." 
1Kings9:6 Ahih hangin nang na hi a, na tate ahi zongin, keimah zuihna panin pialin, note mai ah ka koih ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte na zuih kei uh a, pasian dangteʼ na a sem ding le a bia dingin na pai uh leh," 
1Kings9:7 amaute ka piak sa leitang panin Israel mite ka la khia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka ap sa biakinn pen ka muhna panin ka lawn khia dinga, Israel-te pen mi khempeuh lakah paunak le thu gentehna suak ding hi." 
1Kings9:8 Tua ciangin hih biakinn pen ninbu lomtang suak dinga, a nawk kha mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in, eh! ci ding uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih leitang le hih biakinn hih bangin hih ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi." 
1Kings9:9 Tua ciangin amaute in, ‘Egypt panin a pu a pate uh a paikhiatpih Topa a Pasian uh amaute in nusia-in pasian dangte len uh a, tuate bia-in a na a sepna hang uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih siatna khempeuh amaute tungah tungsak hi,’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings9:10 Solomon in inn nihte, Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn a lam kum sawm nih a beina," 
1Kings9:11 Taia kumpi Hiram in Solomonʼ deih zahzah taamtak sing le taaksan sing le kham a piak khit ciangin, Kumpi Solomon in Galilee gam sunga om khuapi sawm nih, Hiram tungah a pia hi." 
1Kings9:12 Ahih hangin Solomon in amah a piak sa khuapite a en dingin Taia panin Hiram hong pai ciangin, tua khuapite tawh amah lungkim zo lo hi." 
1Kings9:13 Tua ahih ciangin amah in, “Ka sanggam aw, kei nong piak hih khuapite a bangci khuapi ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin tuate Kabul gam kici hi." 
1Kings9:14 Hiram in kumpipa kiangah a piak kham talen za khat le talen sawm nih a pha hi. 
1Kings9:15 Topaʼ biakinn, ama inn, Jerusalem kulh le Hazor, Megiddo le Gezer khuate a lam dingin Kumpi Solomon in aana tawh na a semte a la hi." 
1Kings9:16 (Egypt kumpi Faro pai to a, Gezer la-in mei tawh hal a, a khuapi sunga teeng Kanaan mite thatin Solomonʼ zi, a tanuʼ tungah mo kenin a khuapi a piak ahi hi." 
1Kings9:17 Tua ahih manin Solomon in Gezer khua lamkik hi). Tua banah Beth-horon nuainung 
1Kings9:18 le Baalath le Judah gam sung gamlak ah Tamar," 
1Kings9:19 le Solomon in a neih vankoihna khuapi khempeuh le a leengte-aʼ ding khuapite le a sakol tung tuangte ading khuapite le Jerusalem sung, Lebanon sung le ama ukna gam sung khempeuh ah zong Solomon in a lam nop khempeuh a lamkik hi." 
1Kings9:20 Israel mi ahi lo Amor mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite sung panin a om lai mi khempeuh," 
1Kings9:21 Israel mite in a suksiat khit siang zawh loh, tua gamah amauʼ nung a a om lai a suanlekhakte uh, Solomon in aana tawh na a sem salin bawl ahih ciangin tu ni dongin tua bangmahin amaute om uh hi." 
1Kings9:22 Ahih hangin Solomon in Israel mite salin bawl lo hi. Amaute pen galkapte, ama nuai ah a uliante, a galkap maangte, a leeng ukte le a sakol tung tuangte ahi uh hi." 
1Kings9:23 Solomonʼ inn lam nasep a uk ulianpite mi za nga le sawm nga ahi hi. 
1Kings9:24 Faro tanu adingin Solomon in a lamsak ama inn ah a om dingin David khuapi panin amah a paikhiat khit ciangin Solomon in Millo a lam hi. 
1Kings9:25 Solomon in Topa adingin a lam biakna tau tungah meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna kum khatin thum vei pia-in Topaʼ mai ah paknamtui a hal hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a biakinn a zo hi. 
1Kings9:26 Kumpi Solomon in Edom gam sung San Tuipi gei dunga om Eloth nai-a Ezion-geber ah teembaw hon khat a bawl hi. 
1Kings9:27 Tua ciangin Hiram in tua teembaw honte tawh tuipi tung nasep a thei tuipi mi a nasemte, Solomonʼ nasemte tawh sawl khia hi." 
1Kings9:28 Tua ciangin amaute Ofir ah pai-in tua lai panin kham talen za li le sawm nih hong pua uh a, amaute in Kumpi Solomon kiangah tuate tunpih uh hi." 
1Kings10:1 Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Topaʼ min tawh kisai-in Solomonʼ minthanna a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh amah a ze-et dingin hong pai hi. 
1Kings10:2 Amah nungzui honpi, a namtui nate a pua kalaohte, kham tampi le suangmanpha tampi tawh Jerusalem ah hong pai a, Solomonʼ kiangah a tun ciangin amah in a lungsim a om khempeuh Solomon tungah a gen hi." 
1Kings10:3 Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi. Kumpipa in ama tungah a gen tel theih loh, haksa lua a sak bangmah om lo hi." 
1Kings10:4 Sheba kumpinu in Solomonʼ pilna, ama lam sa a inn," 
1Kings10:5 a sabuai ah a an, a ulianteʼ om zia le a nasemteʼ etna, a puante uh, a an piate le Topaʼ biakinn ah a piak meihal biaknate khempeuh a muh khit ciangin lamdang a sa mahmah hi." 
1Kings10:6 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka gam sung panin nangma thu le na pilna ka zak a kigen thute man mahmah hi." 
1Kings10:7 Kei hong pai-in keima mit in a muh mateng a kigente ka um kei hi. Ahi zongin alang zong kei tungah hong kigen lo na hi a, na pilna le na daupaina in ka zak thute vuknelh hi." 
1Kings10:8 Na zite a hampha mahmah hi a, na mai ah ding tawntungin na pilna a za hih na nasemte zong hampha mahmah uh hi." 
1Kings10:9 Nang tungah lungdamin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah nang a hong koih Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah tahen! Topa in Israel it tawntung ahih manin nangmah in thutang le thuman na sepkhiat theih nadingin amah in kumpi-in nang hong bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings10:10 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za le sawm nih le a namtui nate tampi tak le suang manphate a pia hi. Sheba kumpinu in Kumpi Solomon tungah a piak hih banga a tam a namtui nate hong pai ngei nawn lo hi. 
1Kings10:11 Tua tham loin Ofir panin kham hong pua Hiramʼ teembaw honte in Ofir panin cingsing le suangmanpha tampi tak hong pua uh hi. 
1Kings10:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in cingsingte Topaʼ biakinn le kumpipaʼ innkhuamte, lasate adingin laiza lasakna le harp lasakna-in bawl hi. Tu ni dongin tua bang cingsing hoihte hong tungkik ngei lo, kimu ngei nawn lo hi." 
1Kings10:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in citna tawh ama tungah a piak banah ama deih a nget khempeuh zong Sheba kumpinu tungah a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah le a nasemte a gam uh ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
1Kings10:14 Tu-in sum bawlte le sumbukte, Arabia kumpi khempeuh le gam sung a ukte tung panin a ngahte banah kum khatin Solomon tungah a tung kham a gihna pen talen za guk le sawm guk le guk ahi hi." 
1Kings10:15  
1Kings10:16 Kumpi Solomon in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum lianpi za nih bawl a, lum khat ah kham shekel za guk bei hi." 
1Kings10:17 Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham tawh kibawl lum za thum bawl a, lum khat ciangin kham mina thum bei hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Lebanon Tulak Inn a kici sungah tuate koih hi." 
1Kings10:18 Kumpipa in saiha kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a, kham hoih pente tawh tua tokhom zut hi." 
1Kings10:19 Kumpi tokhom in kahlei cial guk nei-in, kumpi tokhom nungah bawng no lutang khat om a, a tutna pang tuakah ban ngakna omin ban ngaknate pangah humpinelkai nih dinga," 
1Kings10:20 kahlei cial gukteʼ mong ciatah khat ciat a om humpinelkai sawm le nih ding hi. Kumpi gam sung khat peuhpeuh ah tua tawh a kibang kibawl ngei lo hi. 
1Kings10:21 Kumpi Solomonʼ tuidawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a, Lebanon Tulak Inn sunga om haite khempeuh kham citak hi a, khat zong ngun hi lo hi. Solomonʼ hun lai-in ngun bangmahin kingaihsun lo hi." 
1Kings10:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Hiramʼ teembaw honte tawh Tarshish teembaw hon khat tuipi ah a pai nei hi. Tarshish teembaw honte kum thumin khatvei hong pai-in kham, ngun, saiha, zawngmaw le utongte hong puak zel hi." 
1Kings10:23 Tua bangin Kumpi Solomon in hauhna le pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi. 
1Kings10:24 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sunga a koih ama pilna a ngai dingin leitung mi buppi in Solomonʼ omna zong uh hi. 
1Kings10:25 Amaute khempeuh in letsong, ngun le kham tawh kibawl nate, puante, myrrh paknamtui, a namtui nate, sakolte le la-sakolte, a kumkumin tampi tak hong puak uh hi." 
1Kings10:26 Tua ciangin Solomon in leengte le sakol tung tuangte khawm hi. Amah in leeng tul le za li le tuanna sakol tul sawm le tul nih nei a, amah in tuate, leeng khuapite le Jerusalem ah zat tawm dingin a koih hi." 
1Kings10:27 Kumpipa in Jerusalem ah suang bangin ngun olsak a, amah in Shefelah theithek sing bangin taamtak sing tamsak hi." 
1Kings10:28 Solomonʼ sakol lakte Egypt le Kue pan hi a, kumpipaʼ sum bawlte in Kue ah a man pia-in tuate ngah uh hi." 
1Kings10:29 Egypt panin leeng khat ciangin ngun shekel za guk, sakol khat ciangin za le sawm nga-in kingah hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ sum bawlte in Hit kumpite le Syria kumpite khempeuh tungah zuak khia uh hi." 
1Kings11:1 Tu-in Kumpi Solomon in gamdang numei tampi ngai hi. Faroʼ tanu le Moab mi, Ammon mi, Edom mi, Sidon mi le Hit numeite," 
1Kings11:2 Topa in Israel mite tungah, “Amaute tawh na kiteeng kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amauʼ pasianʼ lamah na lungsim uh hong hei khia taktak ding uh hi,” a cih minamteʼ lak pan lawm ngai a, Solomon in hih mite ngai-in pom hi." 
1Kings11:3 Amah in kumpiteʼ tanu vive zi za sagih le zineu za thum nei hi. A zite in ama lungsim hei khia uh hi. 
1Kings11:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon a teek ciangin a zite in pasian dangteʼ lamah ama lungsim hei khia uh a, ama pa Davidʼ lungsim bangin ama lungsim Topaʼ tungah thuman bup taktak zo lo hi." 
1Kings11:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon miteʼ nusian Ashtoreth le Ammon mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Milkom, Solomon in bia hi." 
1Kings11:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ muhna ah Solomon a sia gamta a, a pa David bangin Topa zui bup lo hi." 
1Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem nisuahna lam mual tungah Moab mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Khemosh le Ammon mite aʼ ahi a kihhuai Molek adingin mual tunga biakna khat a lam hi. 
1Kings11:8 Tua mah bangin amah in paknamtui halin a pasian-te uh tungah biakna a pia a gamdang zite khempeuh adingin hihsak hi. 
1Kings11:9 Ama tungah nih vei kilak khinin, amah in pasian dangteʼ nung a zuih loh nading ama tungah thu a pia khin Topa, Israel Pasian panin a lungsim kihei khia ahih manin Solomon tungah Topa heh hi. Ahih hangin amah in Topaʼ thupiak sa zui tuan lo hi." 
1Kings11:10  
1Kings11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Solomon kiangah, “Hih pen nangma ngaihsutna hi-in, nang kong piak sa ka thuciamna le ka thukhamte zui lo na hih ciangin, keimah in nangma tung panin na kumpi gam bal kekin na nasem pa tungah ka pia taktak ding hi." 
1Kings11:12 Ahi zongin na pa Davidʼ hangin nangma hun sungin ka hih kei dinga, na tapaʼ khut sung panin ka bal khia ding hi." 
1Kings11:13 Ahi zongin kumpi gam khempeuh ka bal khia kei ding hi. Ka nasem pa David hang le ka teel sa Jerusalem hangin na tapaʼ tungah minam khat ka pia lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings11:14 Tua ciangin Topa in Solomon a langpang ding Edom mi Hadad khangsak hi. Amah pen Edom kumpi innkuan sung mi khat ahi hi. 
1Kings11:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom ah David a om lai, a site a vui dingin galkap a ukpa Joab a pai toh lai-in Edom sunga pasal khempeuh amah in that hi." 
1Kings11:16 (Bang hang hiam cih leh Joab in Edom sunga pasal khempeuh a suksiat khit matengin amah le Israel-te khempeuh tua lai ah kha guk sung om uh hi). 
1Kings11:17 Ahih hangin Hadad naupang no ahih lai-in, a paʼ nasem Edom mite pawl khat tawh Egypt ah a tai hi." 
1Kings11:18 Amaute Midian panin ding khia-in Paran tung uh a, Paran panin mi zawnin tonpih a, ama tungah inn khat pia-in, annek ding pia-in, leitang a pia Egypt kumpipa Faro kiang Egypt gam tung uh hi." 
1Kings11:19 Hadad in Faroʼ mai ah maipha lianpi mu a, amah in ama zi Tahpenesʼ sanggamnu tawh kiteengsak hi." 
1Kings11:20 Tua ciangin Tahpenes sanggamnu in amah tawh tapa Genubath nei a, Tahpenes in Faroʼ inn ah a naupang khoi hi. Faroʼ inn sungah Faroʼ tapate tawh Genubath om hi." 
1Kings11:21 Ahih hangin Hadad in David le galkap a ukpa Joab a sihna thu Egypt panin a zak ciangin Faroʼ kiangah, “Keima gamah ka ciah theih nadingin hong pai khiasak in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings11:22 Ahih hangin Faro in ama kiangah, “Nangma gamah ciah ding na hanciam nadingin kei tawh na omna ah bang kitangsapna nei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amah in Faroʼ kiangah, “Hong paisak hoh in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings11:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama topa ahi Zobah kumpi Hadadezer kiang panin a tai Eliada tapa Rezon zong Solomon a langpang dingin a khangsak hi. 
1Kings11:24 Amah in ama kiimah mi khawmin miteʼ na a sut pawl a makai a suak hi. Amaute Damaskas ah pai-in tua lai munah teeng uh a, Damaskas ah amah kumpi-in bawl uh hi." 
1Kings11:25 Hadad mah bangin Solomonʼ hunsung khempeuh Israel-te a langpangin amah omin siatna a bawl hi. Amah in Israel mite mudah a, Syria gamah a uk hi." 
1Kings11:26 Solomonʼ nasem, Zeredah khua sunga om Efraim mi, Nebatʼ tapa, a nuʼ min Zeruah hi-in meigong ahi, Jeroboam in zong kumpipa lehdo hi." 
1Kings11:27 Amah in kumpipa a lehdona thu hih bang ahi hi: Solomon in Millo lamin a pa Davidʼ khuapi a vangte a hu hi. 
1Kings11:28 Jeroboam pen nasep siam mahmah khat hi a, Solomon in hih a khangno mipa a kizen mi hi, ci-in a theih ciangin Josef minam aana tawh na a semte tungah a ukin a bawl hi." 
1Kings11:29 Tua hun sungin Jerusalem panin Jeroboam a paikhiat ciangin Shiloh khuami kamsang Ahijah in lampi ah amah na dawn hi. Ahijah in puan thak khat na silh tawm a, amau nih tegel bek gamlak ah om uh hi." 
1Kings11:30 Tua ciangin Ahijah in ama tungah a silh a puan thak lenin seh sawm le nih suahin a bal kek hi. 
1Kings11:31 Tua ciangin amah in Jeroboam kiangah, “Nang adingin bek sawm la in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ‘En in, Solomonʼ khut panin kumpi gam a bal khia ding ka hi a, nangma tungah minam sawm kong pia ding hi." 
1Kings11:32 (Ahih hangin ka nasem David le Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teel sa khuapi Jerusalem hangin amah in minam khat nei ding hi). 
1Kings11:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong nusia a, Sidon miteʼ nusian Ashtoreth, Moab pasian Khemosh le Ammon miteʼ pasian Milkom bia-in, a pa David bangin keima muhna ah a manin gamta loin, ka thukhamte le ka ngeina kipte zui loin ka thu hong nial hi." 
1Kings11:34 Ahi zongin ama khut sung panin kumpi gambup ka la khia kei ding hi. Ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte a zui, ka teel ka nasem Davidʼ hangin a nuntak sung tawntung ukpa-in amah ka bawl ding hi." 
1Kings11:35 Ahih hangin ama tapaʼ khut sung panin kumpi gam la-in nangma tungah minam sawm kong pia ding hi. 
1Kings11:36 Ahi zongin ka min koih nadingin ka teel sa khuapi Jerusalem ah ka nasem pa David in keima mai ah suanlekhak a neih tawntung theih nadingin a tapa tungah minam khat ka pia ding hi. 
1Kings11:37 Tua ciangin keimah in nang hong la-in na deih khempeuh tungah na uk dinga, nang pen Israel tungah kumpi na hi ding hi." 
1Kings11:38 Ka nasem pa David bangin ka thukhamte zuihna tawh nang kong thupiak khempeuh ngai-in, ka thu hong zui-in, ka muhna ah a manin na gamtat leh nang tawh hong om khawmin, David adingin ka hih bangin nangma tungah Israel mite kong pia dinga, na suanlekhakte in zong uk paisuak ding hi." 
1Kings11:39 Hih thu hangin Davidʼ suanlekhakte ka gimsak dinga, ahih hangin a tawntung ding hi lo hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings11:40 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Jeroboam thah dingin zong hi. Ahih hangin Jeroboam dingin Egypt kumpipa Shishak kiangah tai a, Solomonʼ sih mateng Egypt ah a om hi." 
1Kings11:41 Tu-in Solomonʼ sep a omlaite le a hih khempeuh le a pilna, Solomonʼ Nasepna Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings11:42 Jerusalem panin Israel-te khempeuh tungah Solomon in a uk hun kum sawm li sung ahi hi. 
1Kings11:43 Tua ciangin Solomon si a, a pa David khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Rehoboam in uk hi." 
1Kings12:1 Shekhem ah Rehoboam pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kumpi a suaksak Israel mi khempeuh Shekhem ah hong pai uh hi. 
1Kings12:2 Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zak ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi Solomon kiang panin a taina Egypt ah amah om lai hi), Egypt panin hong ciahkik hi." 
1Kings12:3 Tua ciangin amaute in mi sawlin amah sam uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam le a kikhawm khempeuhte hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah," 
1Kings12:4 “Na pa in kote hong gimbawlin van gikpi hong suan hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na paʼ nasep haksate le kote tungah a gik lua thuhaksate zangsak in. Tua hileh kote in nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings12:5 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ni thum sung va kihem unla, tua ciangin kei kiangah hong paikik un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite paikhia uh hi." 
1Kings12:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in a pa Solomon a nuntak lai-in ama mai ah a ding ngei khangham mite thu dongin, “Hih mite ka dawn nading ngaihsutna hong bangci piak ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings12:7 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in tu ni-in hih miteʼ deihna bang zui inla, amaute na dawn ciangin kam hoih pau lecin, amaute pen a tawntungin nangma nasemte hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings12:8 Ahih hangin khanghamte in ama tungah ngaihsutna a piakte nusia-in, amah tawh a khangkhawm ama mai ah a ding khangnote thu dong hi." 
1Kings12:9 Amah in amaute kiangah, “‘Na pa in kote tungah hong suat van gik zangsak in,’ kei tungah hong ci hih mite i dawn nading ngaihsutna hong bangci piak ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings12:10 Tua ciangin amah tawh a khangkhawm khangnote in ama kiangah, “Nang kiangah, ‘Na pa in van gikpi hong puasak ahih manin kote adingin hong zangsak in,’ hong ci hih mite kiangah hih bangin na gen ding hi. Amaute kiangah, ‘Ka khut meno pen ka paʼ kawng sangin gol zaw hi." 
1Kings12:11 Tu-in ka pa in note tungah van gik hong suat banah kong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings12:12 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Ni thum ni-in ka kiangah hong paikik un,” a cih mah bangin Jeroboam le mi khempeuh a ni thum ni-in Rehoboam kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
1Kings12:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mite ngawh dawn a, khangham mite in ama tungah ngaihsutna a piakte nusia-in," 
1Kings12:14 khangnoteʼ ngaihsut piakna tawh kizui-in amaute kiangah thu gen a, “Ka pa in noteʼ tungah van gik hong suat banah keimah in kong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang bek tawh note hong thuhilh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings12:15 Tua bangin kumpipa in miteʼ deihna zui lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Shiloh khuami Ahijahʼ tungtawnin Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ tungah a gen sa thu a tunsak nadingin Topa in a piansak thu kiheina ahi hi. 
1Kings12:16 Kumpipa in amauʼ thu a ngaih lohna Israel-te khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin mite in kumpipa dawng uh a, “David sungah kote in bang ngah nei ka hi uh hiam? Jessi tapa sungah gamhluah ka nei kei uh hi. Israel-te aw, na inn ciat uh ah ciah un. Rehoboam in ama ading vaihawm tawm tahen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te a inn ciat uh ah kihem uh hi." 
1Kings12:17 Ahih hangin Rehoboam in Judah khuapite sungah a teeng Israel mite a uk hi. 
1Kings12:18 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in aana tawh nasemte a uk Adoram, Israel-te tawh a kimu dingin sawl a, ahi zongin amaute in amah suang tawh na deng lum uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a tai dingin Kumpi Rehoboam a sakol leeng ah a tuang dingin nawh tai hi." 
1Kings12:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin leilu lam Israel-te in Davidʼ suanteʼ ukna lehdo uh hi. 
1Kings12:20 Jeroboam hong ciahkik khitna thu Israel-te khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin amaute in mi sawlin kikhopna ah amah samsak uh a, Israel-te khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah a bawl uh hi. Davidʼ suante a zui kuamah dang om lo a, Judah minam bek in a zui uh hi." 
1Kings12:21 Jerusalem ah Rehoboam a tun ciangin, a kumpi gam a ngahkik nadingin Israel mite a sim dingin Judah minam khempeuh le Benjamin minam, a kiteel galhang mi tul za khat le tul sawm giat a khawm hi." 
1Kings12:22 Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mi Shemaiahʼ tungah Pasianʼ thu hong tung hi: 
1Kings12:23 “Judah kumpipa, Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboam tung le Judah le Benjamin minam khempeuh tung le a om lai midang khempeuh tungah gen in." 
1Kings12:24 ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Note na kuan to kei ding uh a, na beh uh ahi Israel-te na do kei ding uh hi. Mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah ciah hen. Hih thu pen keima vaihawm ahi hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topaʼ thu ngai uh a, Topaʼ thugen bangin inn ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
1Kings12:25 Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Efraim mual tung gam sungah Shekhem khua phutin tua lai ah tawl khat sung a teeng hi. Tua ciangin amah pai khia-in Penuel a puah hi. 
1Kings12:26 Tua ciangin Jeroboam in a lungsim sungah, “Tu-in kumpi gam pen Davidʼ suanteʼ tungah kiheikik kha thei ding hi." 
1Kings12:27 Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakinn ah biakna pia dingin hih mite pai to leh, hih miteʼ lungsim Judah kumpi Rehoboam, a topa uh lamah kiheikik kha dinga, amaute in kei hong thatin Judah kumpi Rehoboam kiangah ciahkik ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Kings12:28 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in thu kikupna khat bawl a, tua ciangin kham bawng no nih bawl hi. Tua ciangin amah in mite kiangah, “Jerusalem ah sauvei khop na pai khinta uh hi. Israel mite aw, Egypt leitang panin note hong paikhiatpih na pasian-te uh en un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings12:29 Amah in Bethel ah khat koihin, Dan ah a dang khat a koih hi." 
1Kings12:30 Hih na pen khialhna khat a suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite Bethel a bia ding le Dan a bia dingin a gamla pekah va pai uh hi. 
1Kings12:31 Amah in mual dawnte ah zong biak nading inn lamin mite khempeuh lak panin Levi mi ahi lo mite siampi-in a seh hi. 
1Kings12:32 Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Judah a om pawi tawh a kibangin a kha giatna a ni sawm le nga ni-in pawi khat bawl a, biakna tau tungah biaknate a pia hi. Tua mah bangin amah in Bethel ah bawlin ama bawl sa bawng no milimte tungah biakna a pia hi. Tua ciangin amah in ama bawl sa mual tunga biakna siampite Bethel ah a koih hi." 
1Kings12:33 A kha giatna a ni sawm le nga ni, ama deih kha sungin Bethel a ama bawl sa biakna tau ah amah pai to hi. Amah in Israel mite adingin pawi khat kipsak a, paknamtui hal dingin biakna tau ah a pai to hi." 
1Kings13:1 Tua laitakin Topaʼ sawlna tawh Judah panin Pasianʼ mi khat Bethel ah hong pai hi. Paknamtui hal dingin biakna tau gei ah Jeroboam na ding hi. 
1Kings13:2 Tua ciangin Topaʼ sawlna bangin biakna tau langpangin mipa kiko a, “Biakna tau, biakna tau aw, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En in, Josiah min nei tapa khat Davidʼ suan sung pan hong piang ding hi. Amah in nangma tungah paknamtui a hal mual tunga biakna a pia siampite nangma tungah biakna-in pia dinga, nangma tungah mihingteʼ guhte kihal ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:3 Tua ciangin tua ni mahin amah in lim khat pia a, “Hih pen Topa in thu a gen khitna lim ahi hi: ‘En in, biakna tau kitam khamin a tunga om vutte kithehthang ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:4 Bethel a biakna tau langpangin Pasianʼ mipaʼ thugenna kumpipa in a zak ciangin biakna tau panin Jeroboam in a khut zan a, “Amah lencip un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah langpangin a zankhiat a khut keucip ahih manin a khut tonsakkik thei nawn lo hi." 
1Kings13:5 Topaʼ sawlna bangin Pasianʼ mipa in lim khat a piakna tawh kizui-in biakna tau zong kiphelkhamin biakna tau panin a vutte kithehthang hi. 
1Kings13:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah, “Tu-in Topa na Pasianʼ maipha kunh inla, ka khut a ngei a bat nadingin thu hong ngetsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa in Topaʼ tungah kunh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ khut a ngei bangkik a, a nidang a mah hong bang hi." 
1Kings13:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah, “Inn ah hong zui inla, tawlnga in. Keimah in nangma tungah thaman kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:8 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa in kumpipa kiangah, “Na inn phel lang khat hong pia ding na hi zongin kong zui kei ding hi. Keimah in hih lai munah an ahi a, tui ahi zongin ka ne ka dawn kei ding hi." 
1Kings13:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah thu hong pia khinzo a, ‘An ahi a, tui ahi zongin ne lo dawn loin, na paina lampi tawnin na ciahkik kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah lampi dangah pai a, Bethel ah hong paina lampi tawnin ciahkik lo hi." 
1Kings13:11 Tua hun laitakin kamsang khangham khat Bethel ah a teeng hi. Ama tapate hong pai-in tua ni-in Pasianʼ mipa in Bethel ah a hih thu teng ama kiangah a gen uh hi. Kumpipa kiangah a gen thute zong, amaute in a pa uh kiangah a gen uh hi." 
1Kings13:12 Tua ciangin a pa un amaute kiangah, “Koi lamah amah pai ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tapate in Judah panin hong pai Pasianʼ mipa a paina lam a hilh uh hi." 
1Kings13:13 Amah in a tapate kiangah, “Kei adingin la van hong vawhsak un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ama adingin la van vawhsakin a tungah amah a tuang hi." 
1Kings13:14 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa nungah amah pai a, tawsaw khat nuai ah tu-in amah mu hi. Tua ciangin amah in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah, “Nang pen Judah panin a hong pai Pasianʼ mipa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei tawh inn ah hong ciahin an ne in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:16 Amah in, “Nang tawh kong ciahkik kei dinga, nang kong zui thei kei ding hi. Hih munah nang tawh an ahi a, tui ahi zongin ka ne ka dawn kei ding hi." 
1Kings13:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah, ‘An ahi a, tui ahi zongin tua lai ah ne lo dawn loin, na paina lampi tawnin na ciahkik kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei zong nangmah bangin kamsang khat ka hi a, Topaʼ sawlna bangin vantungmi khat in kei tungah thu hong gen a, ‘Amah in anletui ne-in a dawn theih nadingin na inn ah amah paipihkik in,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in Pasianʼ mipa tungah zuau genin a phuahtawm ahi hi." 
1Kings13:19 Tua ahih ciangin amah zui-in hong ciahkik a, ama inn ah an ne-in tui a dawn hi." 
1Kings13:20 Amaute sabuai ah a tut laitakun amah a ciah pihkik kamsang teekpa tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi. 
1Kings13:21 Judah panin hong pai Pasianʼ mipa tungah amah kiko a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Nangmah in ama thu mang loin, Topa na Pasian in hong thupiak sa thupiakna zui loin," 
1Kings13:22 nang hong paikikin, amah in, “An ne kei inla, tui dawn kei in,” hong cihna munah an ne-in tui na dawn hi. Tua ahih manin na pateʼ hanah na luanghawm kivui lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:23 Tua ciangin amah in an ne-in tui a dawn khit ciangin, amah in a ciah pihkik kamsang pa adingin la van vawhsak hi." 
1Kings13:24 Amah a paikhiat ciangin humpinelkai khat in lampi ah na dawntuahin amah that hi. Ama luanghawm lampi ah kipaai a, a gei ah a la dinga, a humpinelkai zong a luanghawm gei ah a ding hi." 
1Kings13:25 Tua laitakin mite in va nawk kha uh a, lampi ah a luanghawm kipaai-in a luanghawm gei ah humpinelkai a ding mu uh hi. Amaute hong pai-in kamsang khangham pa a teenna khuapi sungah a gen uh hi." 
1Kings13:26 Lampi panin amah a ciah pihkik kamsang pa in tua thu a zak ciangin amah in, “ Topaʼ thu a mang lo Pasianʼ mipa ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ama tungah a gen sa thu tawh kizui-in amah balnenin a that humpinelkai tungah Topa in amah pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:27 Tua ciangin amah in a tapate kiangah, “Kei adingin la van hong vawhsak un,” a ci hi. Amaute in vawhsak uh hi." 
1Kings13:28 Tua ciangin amah pai a, lampi ah a luanghawm kipaai-in la leh humpinelkai a luanghawm gei ah a ding a mu hi. Humpinelkai in a luanghawm ne lo a, a la zong balnen lo hi." 
1Kings13:29 Tua ciangin kamsang pa in Pasianʼ mipaʼ luanghawm la-in la tungah koih a, kah ding le vui dingin khuapi sungah a ciahpih hi." 
1Kings13:30 Tua ciangin amah in ama hanah a luanghawm a vui hi. Tua ciangin ama hangin amaute kap uh a, “Ala, ka sanggampa!” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings13:31 Amah a vui khit ciangin a tapate kiangah, “Kei ka sih ciangin Pasianʼ mipa a kivuina hanah kei hong vui un. Ama guh gei ah keiʼ guhte koih un." 
1Kings13:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Bethel a biakna tau le Samaria khuapite sunga om mual tunga biaknate khempeuh langpangin Topaʼ sawlna bangin a thugenna hong tung taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings13:33 Hih thu khit ciangin zong ama gamtat sia panin Jeroboam kihei tuan lo a, mite khempeuh sung panin mual tunga biaknate-a sem ding siampite bawlkik hi. Amah in a sem nuam peuhpeuh mual tunga biakna siampi dingin a ap hi." 
1Kings13:34 Hih pen lei maitang panin khen khia-in a susia zah dongin Jeroboamʼ innkuan tungah khialhna lianpi a suak hi. 
1Kings14:1 Tua hun laitakin Jeroboamʼ tapa Abijah a ci na hi. 
1Kings14:2 Jeroboam in a zi kiangah, “Ding inla, na mel kiseelin Jeroboamʼ zi na hih lam kitheisak kei inla, Shiloh ah va pai in. Hih mite tungah kumpi ka hih nading thu a gen kamsang pa Ahijah tua lai ah om hi." 
1Kings14:3 Anlum sawm, moh pawl khat, khuaizu thawl khat keng inla ama kiangah va pai in. Naupang tungah a piang ding thu amah in nang kiangah hong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings14:4 Jeroboamʼ zi tua bangmahin gamta hi. Amah kithawi-in Shiloh ah pai a, Ahijahʼ inn va tung hi. A khanghamna hangin a mitte maang ahih manin Ahijah in khua mu thei lo hi." 
1Kings14:5 Tua ciangin Topa in Ahijah kiangah, “En in, a tapa tawh kisai nangma kiangah thu a dong dingin Jeroboamʼ zi hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a tapa a ci na hi. Tua bang tua bangin tua nu tungah na gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah hong pai ciangin numei dang khatin kineih hi." 
1Kings14:6 Ahih hangin Ahijah in amah kongkhak hong tun a kheging a zak ciangin, “Hong tum in Jeroboamʼ zi aw, bang hangin midang khat kineih na hi hiam? Nang adingin thugik khat kei tungah hong kipia hi." 
1Kings14:7 Pai inla Jeroboam kiangah hih bangin gen in, ‘Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Mite lak panin nang hong liansakin ka mi Israel-te tungah makai-in kong bawl a," 
1Kings14:8 Davidʼ suanteʼ tung panin kumpi gam bal khia-in nangma tungah kong pia hi. Ahi zongin nang pen ka thupiaknate zui-in, a lungsim khempeuh tawh kei hong zui-in ka muhna ah a man nate bek a sem ka nasem pa David na bang kei a," 
1Kings14:9 nangmah in na mai-a om mite khempeuh sangin siatna bawl zaw-in, pai-in pasian dangte le a kisung milimte nang adingin bawlin ka heh nadingin nong phin a, na nung lamah kei nong paai hi." 
1Kings14:10 Tua ahih ciangin en in, mi khat in a bei matengin ek a hal tum mah bangin Jeroboam innkuan tungah siatna tungsakin, sal le sal ahi lo mi a kibangin pasal khempeuh Jeroboam innkuan panin ka susia dinga, Israel sungah Jeroboam innkuan ka beisiangsak ding hi." 
1Kings14:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jeroboamʼ mi, khuapi sunga a si mi peuhpeuh uite in ne dinga, gamlak ah a si mi peuhpeuh huihlak vasate in ne ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in gen khin hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in a gen hi." 
1Kings14:12 “Tua ahih ciangin ding inla na inn ah ciah in. Na khua na tun ciangin na tapa si ding hi. 
1Kings14:13 Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh ama hangin kapin vui ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian, Topaʼ tungah a lungkimhuai na khat Jeroboamʼ innkuan sung panin ama tungah kimu ahih manin Jeroboam sung panin amah bek mah hanah kivui ding hi." 
1Kings14:14 Tua tham loin tu ni-in Jeroboam innkuan a beisak ding, Israel-teʼ tungah kumpi khat Topa in ama adingin khangsak ding hi. Tua hun a kipan" 
1Kings14:15 tui sunga pumpeeng a kilin mah bangin Topa in Israel mite vatin amau pute pate tungah a piak hih gam hoih panin Israel zunglot dinga, Eufratis gun gal khat ah amaute thehthang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Asherah milimte bawlin Topa a heh nadingin phin uh hi." 
1Kings14:16 Tua ciangin ama khialhna le Israel-te a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboamʼ khialhna hangin amah in Israel nusia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings14:17 Tua ciangin Jeroboamʼ zi dingin kihem khia a, Tirzah ah a ciah hi. Amah inn tungin sangkil a kan laitakin naupang a si hi." 
1Kings14:18 Tua ciangin a nasem kamsang Ahijah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugenna tawh kizui-in Israel mi khempeuh in amah vui-in ama hangin a kap uh hi. 
1Kings14:19 Tu-in Jeroboamʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a galsimna le a gam uknate, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings14:20 Jeroboamʼ uk hunsung kum sawm nih le nih ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, ama tangin a tapa Nadab in a uk hi." 
1Kings14:21 Tu-in Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboam in Judah ah uk hi. Gam uk dingin a kipatin Rehoboam kum sawm li le khat pha a, a min koih nadingin Topa in Israel minam khempeuh sung panin a teelkhiat khuapi Jerusalem ah amah in kum sawm le kum sagih sung uk hi. Ama nu a min Naamah hi a, Ammon mi ahi hi." 
1Kings14:22 Tua ciangin Judah mite, Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta uh a, a pu a pate khempeuh uh hih sangin a tam zaw-in amauʼ khialhnate uh tawh ama hazat nading piangsak uh hi." 
1Kings14:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau adingin mual tunga biaknate, biakna songte le mual sang tung khempeuh le singniim nuai khempeuh ah Asherah milimte bawl uh a," 
1Kings14:24 biakna phualte ah numei pasal paktat pawlte zong om uh hi. Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minam dangteʼ gamtatna a kihhuai khempeuh bangin amaute gamta uh hi. 
1Kings14:25 Kumpi Rehoboamʼ kum ngana kumin Jerusalem a sim dingin Egypt kumpi Shishak hong kuan to hi. 
1Kings14:26 Amah in Topaʼ biakinn-a van manphate le kumpipaʼ inn-a van manphate la khia hi. Amah in na khempeuh la khia hi. Amah in Solomonʼ bawl sa kham lumte khempeuh zong la hi. 
1Kings14:27 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in tuateʼ tangin sumngo lumte bawl a, kumpipaʼ inn kongkhak a cing inncing ulianteʼ khut sungah tuate a ap hi." 
1Kings14:28 Topaʼ biakinn ah kumpipa a pai simin inn cingte in tuate pua-in, tua ciangin inn cinna inn dei sungah tuate koihkik zel uh hi." 
1Kings14:29 Tu-in Rehoboamʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings14:30 Tua ciangin Rehoboam le Jeroboamʼ kikalah gal kidona om tawntung hi. 
1Kings14:31 Tua ciangin Rehoboam si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Ama nu a min Naamah hi a, Ammon mi ahi hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Abijam in a uk hi." 
1Kings15:1 Tu-in Nebatʼ tapa Kumpi Jeroboamʼ kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Abijam in Judah tungah uk ding kipan hi. 
1Kings15:2 Amah in Jerusalem ah kum thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Maakah hi a, Absalomʼ tanu ahi hi." 
1Kings15:3 Ama mai-a a paʼ khialhna khempeuh amah in zui hi. A pusawn David a thuman bangin Topa a Pasianʼ tungah a lungsim thuman bup lo hi. 
1Kings15:4 Ahi zongin Davidʼ hangin Topa a Pasian in Jerusalem ah amah tapa khat pia a, ama khit ah a tapa koihin Jerusalem kipsak hi." 
1Kings15:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Hit mi Uriah thu ah cih sim loh ama nuntak sung tawntung Topaʼ mitah David a manin gamta-in a thupiakte khat peuhpeuh panin amah pial lo hi. 
1Kings15:6 Tu-in Abijamʼ nuntak sung tawntung amah le Jeroboamʼ kikalah kidona om hi. 
1Kings15:7 Abijamʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Tua ciangin Abijam le Jeroboam kikalah gal kidona om hi." 
1Kings15:8 Tua ciangin Abijam si a, amaute in David khuapi sungah amah vui uh hi. Ama tangin a tapa Asa in uk hi." 
1Kings15:9 Israel kumpi Jeroboamʼ kum sawm nihna kumin Asa in Judah tungah uk ding kipan a," 
1Kings15:10 amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm li le khat sung uk hi. Ama piʼ min Maakah hi a, Absalomʼ tanu ahi hi." 
1Kings15:11 Ama pupi David a gamtat bangin Topaʼ muhna ah Asa a manin gamta hi. 
1Kings15:12 Amah in gam sung panin pasal paktat pawlte koih khia-in a pateʼ bawl sa milim khempeuh khiin khia hi. 
1Kings15:13 Amah in Asherah milim dingin a kibawl a kihhuai milim khat nei ahih manin kumpinuʼ nu hihna panin a pi Maakah zong khiin khia hi. Tua hi a, Asa in tua nuʼ milim phukin Kidron lui ah a hal hi." 
1Kings15:14 Ahih hangin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hunsung khempeuh Asaʼ lungsim Topaʼ tungah thuman bup hi. 
1Kings15:15 Tua ciangin amah in a paʼ ap sa letsongte le ama ap sa letsongte, ngun, kham le nazatte Topaʼ biakinn sungah a paipih hi." 
1Kings15:16 Amauʼ hunsung tawntung Asa le Israel kumpi Baasha kikalah gal kidona om hi. 
1Kings15:17 Judah a sim dingin Israel kumpi Baasha kuan to a, Judah kumpi Asa kiang pan kuamah paikhia thei lo, kuamah a tum theih loh nadingin Ramah khua a lam hi." 
1Kings15:18 Tua ciangin Asa in Topaʼ biakinn sung vankoihna le kumpipa inn vankoihna sungah a om lai ngun le kham khempeuh la-in ama nasemteʼ khut sungah tuate a pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpi Asa in Damaskas ah a teeng, Syria kumpi, Hezionʼ tapa Tabrimmon, a tapa Benhadad kiangah tuate puak a," 
1Kings15:19 “Ka pa le na pa mah bangin kei le nang kikalah kipawlna khat omsak ni. Ngun le kham letsong nangma tungah kong puak hi. Keima kiang panin amah a nungkik theih nadingin Israel kumpi Baasha tawh na kipawlna va su tat in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings15:20 Tua ciangin Benhadad in Kumpi Asaʼ thu mang a, Israel khuapite a sim dingin a galkap a ukte sawlin, Ijon, Dan, Abelbeth-maakah le Khinneroth khempeuh, Naftali gam khempeuh tawh a zo hi." 
1Kings15:21 Baasha in tua thu a zak ciangin Ramah a lam khawlin Tirzah ah om hi. 
1Kings15:22 Tua ciangin kumpi Asa in Judah gam khempeuh ah thu genzakna khat bawl a, kuamah peng loin a milipin Baasha in khua lamna-a a zat Ramah suangte le a singte a pua khia dingin a sawl hi. Tua ciangin kumpi Asa in tuate tawh Benjamin miteʼ khua Geba le Mizpah khua a lam hi." 
1Kings15:23 Tu-in Asaʼ gamtatna a omlaite khempeuh, ama thahatna khempeuh, ama sep khempeuh le ama lam khuapite, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Ahih hangin a teek ciangin a khete ah natna khat a nei hi." 
1Kings15:24 Tua ciangin Asa si a, a pupi David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jehoshafat in a uk hi." 
1Kings15:25 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum nihna kumin Jeroboamʼ tapa Nadab in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Israel tungah kum nih sung uk hi." 
1Kings15:26 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a, a paʼ khekhap mah tawnin, Israel a khialhsakna ama khialhna mah a zui hi." 
1Kings15:27 Issakhar minam Ahijahʼ tapa Baasha in Nadab sawm sim hi. Baasha in Filistia-teʼ khua Gibbethon ah amah sat tuk hi. Nadab le Israel khempeuh in Gibbethon umcihin a om laitakun a thah ahi hi. 
1Kings15:28 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum thumna kumin Baasha in Nadab that a, Nadab tangin amah in a uk hi." 
1Kings15:29 Amah kumpi ahih phetin Jeroboamʼ innkuan khempeuh that hi. Topa in Shiloh khuami a nasem pa Ahijah tungtawnin a gen sa bangin a vekpi-in a suksiat khit dongin mi khat zong Jeroboamʼ innkuan ah nusia lo hi. 
1Kings15:30 Tua pen ama khialhna le Israel a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboamʼ khialhnate hang le Israel Pasian, Topa a hehsakna hang ahi hi." 
1Kings15:31 Tu-in Nadabʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings15:32 Amauʼ hunsung khempeuh Asa le Israel kumpi Baasha kikalah gal kidona a om hi. 
1Kings15:33 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum thumna kumin Ahijahʼ tapa Baasha in Israel khempeuh tungah Tirzah panin uk ding kipan a, kum sawm nih le li sung a uk hi." 
1Kings15:34 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a, Jeroboamʼ khekhap mah tawnin, Israel a khialhsakna ama khialhna mah a zui hi." 
1Kings16:1 Tua ciangin Baasha langpangin Hanani tapa Jehu tungtawnin Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
1Kings16:2 “Keimah in leivui lak panin nang hong sang to sakin ka mi Israel-te tungah makai-in nang hong bawl napi-in, nangmah in Jeroboamʼ khekhap mah tawnin ka mi Israel-te na khialsak a, amauteʼ khialhna tawh kei hong hehsak na hih manin" 
1Kings16:3 en in, keimah in Baasha le a innkuan ka phiatsiang dinga, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ innkuan bangin na innkuan ka bawl ding hi." 
1Kings16:4 Baashaʼ mi, khuapi sunga a si peuhpeuh uite in ne dinga, ama mi gamlak ah a si peuhpeuh huihlak vasate in ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings16:5 Tu-in Baashaʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a septe le a thahatna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings16:6 Tua ciangin Baasha si a, Tirzah ah kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Elah in uk hi." 
1Kings16:7 Tua tham loin Jeroboam innkuan bangin ama nasepna tawh hehsakin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia a gamtatna khempeuh hang le amah in Jeroboam le a innkuan a suksiatna hangin Hananiʼ tapa kamsang Jehuʼ tungtawnin Baasha le a innkuan langpangin Topaʼ thu hong tung hi. 
1Kings16:8 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum sawm nih le gukna kumin Baashaʼ tapa Elah in Tirzah panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, kum nih sung uk hi." 
1Kings16:9 Ahih hangin ama leengte alang a ukpa ama nasem Zimri in amah sawm sim hi. Tirzah a kumpi inn sung a ukpa Arzaʼ inn ah zukhamin Tirzah ah a om laitak," 
1Kings16:10 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum sawm nih le sagihna kumin Zimri hong pai-in Elah sattukin that a, ama tangin a uk hi." 
1Kings16:11 Amah in uk dinga a kipat, kumpi tokhom tungah a tut khit phetin amah in Baashaʼ innkuan khempeuh that hi. Ama behte pasal khat beek ahi a, a lawmte ahi zongin khat zong siit lo hi." 
1Kings16:12 Baashaʼ khialhnate le a khialh sa uh ahi a tapa Elahʼ khialhnate le amaute in Israel khialsakin, a milimte uh tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a hehsakna uh hangin, Baasha langpangin kamsang Jehu tungtawnin Topaʼ thugenna bangin Baashaʼ innkuan khempeuh tua bangin Zimri in susia hi." 
1Kings16:13  
1Kings16:14 Tu-in Elahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a sep khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings16:15 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum sawm nih le sagihna kumin Zimri in Tirzah ah ni sagih sung uk hi. Tua laitakin Filistia-teʼ khua Gibbethon simin Israel galkapte in giahphual sat uh a," 
1Kings16:16 giahphual sat a om galkapte in, “Zimri in sawm simin kumpipa that khin hi,” a kicihna a za uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in tua ni-in giahphual ah galkap a ukpa Omri kumpi-in a bawl uh hi." 
1Kings16:17 Tua ahih ciangin Omri le amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh Gibbethon panin pai to-in amaute in Tirzah umcih uh hi. 
1Kings16:18 Ama hih sa a khialhna, Topaʼ muhna ah a siat gamtatna, Jeroboamʼ khekhap a totna le a hih sa a khialhna, Israel a khialhsakna hangin, a khuapi kila khinta hi, ci-in Zimri in a muh ciangin kumpipaʼ inn muanhuai sungah amah pai a, kumpipaʼ inn tawh amah mei-in kihalnelhin a si hi." 
1Kings16:19  
1Kings16:20 Tu-in Zimriʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama hih sa a sawm simna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings16:21 Tua ciangin Israel mite pawl nihin kikhen uh hi. Mi pawl khat in kumpi-in a bawl dingin Ginathʼ tapa Tibni zui uh a, a pawl khat in Omri zui uh hi." 
1Kings16:22 Ahih hangin Omri a zui mite in Ginathʼ tapa Tibni a zuite zo uh ahih ciangin Tibni si a, Omri kumpi a suak hi." 
1Kings16:23 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum sawm thum le khatna kumin Omri in Israel-te tungah uk ding kipan a, kum sawm le kum nih sung a uk hi. Amah in kum guk sung Tirzah ah uk hi." 
1Kings16:24 Amah in Shemerʼ tung panin ngun talen nihin Samaria mual lei hi. Amah in kulh tawh a mual um a, tua mual a nei pa Shemerʼ min tamin a lam sa khuapi min Samaria a phuak hi." 
1Kings16:25 Topaʼ muhna ah Omri a sia gamta a, ama mai-a om mi khempeuh sangin a sia tam zaw gamta hi." 
1Kings16:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ gamtat khempeuh le Israel a khialhsakna khialhnate, a milimte uh tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a hehsakna uh a zui hi." 
1Kings16:27 Tu-in Omriʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a thahatna a lahna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings16:28 Tua ciangin Omri si a, Samaria ah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Ahab in a uk hi." 
1Kings16:29 Judah kumpi Asaʼ kum sawm thum le giatna kumin Omriʼ tapa Ahab in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria panin Israel-te tungah kum sawm nih le nih sung a uk hi." 
1Kings16:30 Omriʼ tapa Ahab, ama mai-a mite khempeuh sangin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia tam zaw gamta hi." 
1Kings16:31 Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate zuih ding ama adingin a thuzang tawh a kibat mah bangin, amah in Sidon miteʼ kumpi Ethbaalʼ tanu Jezebel zi-in la a, pai-in Baal na semin a bia hi." 
1Kings16:32 Amah in Samaria-a a lam Baal inn sungah Baal adingin biakna tau khat dingsak hi. 
1Kings16:33 Tua ciangin Ahab in Asherah milim khat bawl hi. Ahab in ama mai-a om Israel kumpite khempeuh sangin Israel Pasian, Topa hehsak nading tam hih zaw hi." 
1Kings16:34 Ama hun sungin Bethel mi Hiel in Jerikho a puah hi. Topa in Nun tapa Joshuaʼ tungtawnin a gen bangin amah in a tacil Abiramʼ luang khamin a bulpi phut a, a tapa neu pen Segubʼ luang khamin a kongpite a phut hi." 
1Kings16:34 Ama hun sungin Bethel mi Hiel in Jerikho a puah hi. Topa in Nun tapa Joshuaʼ tungtawnin a gen bangin amah in a tacil Abiramʼ luang khamin a bulpi phut a, a tapa neu pen Segubʼ luang khamin a kongpite a phut hi." 
1Kings17:1 Tu-in Gilead gam sung Tishbe khua panin Tishbe mi Elijah in Ahab kiangah, “A mai ah ka dinna Israel Pasian, Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin keima thu tawh loin daitui ahi a, guah ahi zongin hong tung ding kumte sungah om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:2 Tua ciangin ama kiangah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
1Kings17:3 “Hih lai panin kihemin nisuahna lamah kihei inla, Jordan nisuahna lam Kherith lui ah bu in." 
1Kings17:4 Nangmah in lui panin tui na dawn ding hi. Tua lai ah nangmah a hong vak dingin va-akte thu ka pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:5 Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in Topaʼ thugen bangin gamta a, Jordan nisuahna lam Kherith lui gei ah a om hi." 
1Kings17:6 Tua ciangin va-akte in ama kiangah zing le nitakin anlum le sa puak a, amah in lui panin tui a dawn hi." 
1Kings17:7 Tua gam sungah guah zu lo ahih manin tawl khat khit ciangin a lui a kang hi. 
1Kings17:8 Tua ciangin Elijah kiangah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
1Kings17:9 “Ding inla, Sidon miteʼ khua Zarefath ah pai-in tua lai ah om in. Tua lai ah nangmah a hong vak dingin meigongnu khat thu ka pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin Zarefath ah a pai hi. Khuapi kulh kongpi a tun ciangin, meigongnu khat in sing na tom hi. Amah in tua nu samin, “Ka dawn theih nadingin beel khat sungah tui tawm hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:11 Tua nu in paipih dingin a kisak laitakin, amah in tua nu samin, “Anlum neu khat hong tawi kawm in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa na Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin em sa bangmah ka nei kei a, beel sungah annel khut dim khat le um sungah sathau tawmno khat bek om hi. Tu-in keimah le ka tapa adingin tuate bawlin kote in ka nek theih nadingun singkang nih khawng a tom ka hi a, tua ciangin a si ta ding ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:13 Tua ciangin Elijah in ama kiangah, “Lunghimawh kei in; pai inla na gen sa bangin an hong bawl in. Kei adingin moh neu khat hong bawlsak masa-in kei kiangah hong paipih inla, tua khit ciangin nang le na tapa ading bawl in." 
1Kings17:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘ Topa in leitungah guah a zuksak ni matengin beel sunga annel bei lo dinga, um sunga sathau zong kiam ngei lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:15 Tua ciangin amah pai-in Elijahʼ gen sa bangin hih hi. Tua nu le amah le tua nuʼ innkuan in ni tampi sung ne uh hi. 
1Kings17:16 Elijahʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen bangin beel sunga annel bei lo a, um sunga sathau zong kiam ngei lo hi." 
1Kings17:17 Hih thu khit ciangin inn sung nupi ahi numeiʼ tapa a ci na hi. A natna nasia mahmah ahih manin gim semsemin a si hi. 
1Kings17:18 Tua ciangin amah in Elijah kiangah, “Pasianʼ mipa aw, keiʼ lang khat ah bang thu nei na hi hiam? Ka khialhna a pholak ding ka tapaʼ sihna a piangsak dingin kei kiangah nong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:19 Tua ciangin amah in tua nu kiangah, “Na tapa hong pia in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua nuʼ ang panin amah la-in ama giahna innkhum zang ah pua to-in ama lupna tungah a sial hi." 
1Kings17:20 Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah kiko-in, “ Topa ka Pasian aw, ama tapa thahna tawh ka peemna meigongnuʼ tung nangawn ah gimna hong tungsak na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:21 Tua ciangin naupang tungah amah thum vei kikhuangin Topaʼ tungah kiko a, “ Topa ka Pasian aw, hih naupang hingkiksak in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:22 Tua ciangin Topa in Elijahʼ aw ngai hi; naupang hong nakkikin a hingkik hi. 
1Kings17:23 Tua ciangin Elijah in naupang la-in inn khumzang panin inn sungah paipih suk a, a nu kiangah a pia hi. Tua ciangin Elijah in, “En in, na tapa nungta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings17:24 Numei in Elijah kiangah, “Nang, Pasianʼ mi na hihna le Topa in nang tungtawnin thu a gen takpi ahihna tu-in ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:1 Ni tampi khit a kum thumna kumin Elijahʼ tungah Topaʼ thu hong tunga, “Pai in, Ahab kiangah nangmah kilak in. Tua ciangin keimah in leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:2 Tua ahih ciangin Ahab kiangah amah a kilaktawm dingin Elijah a pai hi. Tu-in Samaria ah kialpi nasia hi. 
1Kings18:3 Tua ciangin Ahab in kumpi inn sung a ukpa Obadiah sam hi. (Obadiah in nakpi takin Topa zahtak hi; 
1Kings18:3 Tua ciangin Ahab in kumpi inn sung a ukpa Obadiah sam hi. (Obadiah in nakpi takin Topa zahtak hi; 
1Kings18:4 Jezebel in Topaʼ kamsangte a hon thah lai-in Obadiah in kamsang za khat la-in sawm nga sawm nga-in leihawm sungah seel a, amaute anletui tawh a vak hi.)" 
1Kings18:4 Jezebel in Topaʼ kamsangte a hon thah lai-in Obadiah in kamsang za khat la-in sawm nga sawm nga-in leihawm sungah seel a, amaute anletui tawh a vak hi.)" 
1Kings18:5 Tua ciangin Ahab in Obadiah kiangah, “Gam sung ciktui omna khempeuh le kuam omna khempeuh ah va pai in. Lopa mu-in sakolte le la-sakolte i hin suah zo kha dinga, ganhingte pawl khat i sum kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:5 Tua ciangin Ahab in Obadiah kiangah, “Gam sung ciktui omna khempeuh le kuam omna khempeuh ah va pai in. Lopa mu-in sakolte le la-sakolte i hin suah zo kha dinga, ganhingte pawl khat i sum kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:6 Tua ciangin amaute in a et dingun leitang hawm uh hi. Ahab mahmah mun khat lamah pai-in Obadiah mahmah a mun dang khat lamah a pai hi. 
1Kings18:6 Tua ciangin amaute in a et dingun leitang hawm uh hi. Ahab mahmah mun khat lamah pai-in Obadiah mahmah a mun dang khat lamah a pai hi. 
1Kings18:7 Obadiah lamkal ah a om laitakin, Elijah in amah na dawntuah hi. Obadiah in amah thei-in a mai lei ngatin puk a, “Ka to Elijah, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:7 Obadiah lamkal ah a om laitakin, Elijah in amah na dawntuah hi. Obadiah in amah thei-in a mai lei ngatin puk a, “Ka to Elijah, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:8 Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Keimah ka hi hi. Pai-in na topa kiangah, ‘Elijah hih lai ah om hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:9 Amah in, “Hong thah dingin Ahabʼ khut sungah na nasem pa nong piak nadingin bang thu ah khial ka hi hiam?" 
1Kings18:10 Topa na Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin nangmah a zong dingin ka topa in a sawl lohna minam ahi a, kumpi gam ahi zongin om lo hi. Amaute in, ‘Hih lai ah amah om lo hi,’ a cih uh ciangin, amaute in nang hong muh lohna thu amah in kumpi gam ahi a, minam ahi zongin kiciamsak hi." 
1Kings18:11 Tu-in nangmah in, ‘Pai-in na topa kiangah, “Hih lai ah Elijah om hi,” ci in,’ nong ci hi." 
1Kings18:12 Nang kiang panin kei ka paikhiat phetin ka theih lohna munah Topaʼ kha in nang hong pua ding hi. Kei va pai-in Ahab kiangah genin amah in nang hong muh loh ciangin, ka khangno lai a kipanin keimah na nasem pa in Topa a zahtak hi napi-in, amah in kei hong that ding hi." 
1Kings18:13 Jezebel in Topaʼ kamsangte a thah lai-in Topaʼ kamsangte mi za khat, sawm nga sawm nga-in leihawm sungah seelin, amaute anletui tawh ka vakna thu ka topa tungah hong kigen nai lo ahi hiam?" 
1Kings18:14 Tu-in nangmah in, ‘Pai-in na topa kiangah, “Hih lai ah Elijah om hi,” ci in,’ nong ci hi. Tua hileh amah in kei hong that ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:15 Tua ciangin Elijah in, “A mai ah ka dinna Vanglian Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, tu ni-in ama kiangah kei mahmah ka kilak taktak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:16 Tua ahih ciangin Ahab tawh a kimu dingin Obadiah pai-in ama kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Elijah tawh a kimu dingin Ahab hong pai hi. 
1Kings18:16 Tua ahih ciangin Ahab tawh a kimu dingin Obadiah pai-in ama kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin Elijah tawh a kimu dingin Ahab hong pai hi. 
1Kings18:17 Ahab in Elijah a muh ciangin, “Israel mite a lungkhamsak pa, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:18 Amah in dawngin, “Keimah in Israel mite ka lungkhamsak kei hi. Nang in Topaʼ thupiaknate nusia-in Baal-te zui na hih manin nang le na paʼ innkuan in na lungkhamsak uh hi." 
1Kings18:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mi sawl inla, Karmel Mual kei kiangah Israel-te khempeuh le Jezebelʼ sabuai ah an a ne Baal kamsang za li le sawm nga le Asherah kamsang za lite hong khawm in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:20 Tua ahih ciangin Ahab in Israel mite khempeuh kiangah mi sawlin, Karmel Mual ah Israel mite le kamsangte khawmsak hi." 
1Kings18:21 Tua ciangin mi khempeuhʼ nai ah Elijah hong pai-in, “Ngaihsutna kibang lo thu nih kikalah bang tanvei khensat loin om niloh ding na hi uh hiam? Topa pen Pasian ahihleh amah zui un; tua hi loin Baal pen Pasian ahihleh amah zui un,” a ci hi. Ahi zongin mite in kam khat beek dawng lo uh hi." 
1Kings18:22 Tua ciangin Elijah in mite kiangah, “Kei, kei bekbek, Topaʼ kamsang sung panin ka om lai a, ahih hangin Baal kamsangte mihing za li le sawm nga om hi." 
1Kings18:23 Kote tungah bawngtal nih hong pia un. Amau adingin bawngtal khat amaute teelsak unla, semnen sakin sing tungah koihsak unla, ahih hangin a tungah mei koihsak kei un. Tua ciangin keimah in a bawngtal khat bawlin sing tungah koihin, a tungah mei ka koih kei ding hi." 
1Kings18:24 Tua ciangin note in na pasian tung uh ah thu ngen unla, keimah in zong Topaʼ tungah thu ka ngen ding hi. Tua ciangin thungetna mei tawh hong pia pasian pen Pasian taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in dawngin, “Hih na thugen hoih hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings18:25 Tua ciangin Elijah in Baal kamsangte kiangah, “Note tam na hih manun note adingin bawngtal khat teel unla bawl masa un. Tua ciangin na pasian uh tungah thu ngen unla, ahih hangin a tungah mei koih kei un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:26 Tua ciangin amaute in amaute tungah a kipia bawngtal la-in bawl uh a, zingsang a kipan sun dong Baal tungah thu ngenin, “Baal aw, kote hong dawng in,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin awging om lo a, kuamah in dawng lo hi. Tua ciangin amauʼ bawl sa biakna tau ah amaute diang uh hi." 
1Kings18:27 Sun ciangin Elijah in amaute zahpihin, “Amah pen pasian ahih ciangin a gingin kiko un. Amah in thu a lungngaih laitak, ahih kei leh mun dangah paikhia, ahih kei leh khualzin, ahih kei leh amah ihmu-in phot ding kisam hi kha thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:28 Tua ciangin amaute a gingin kiko-in, amauʼ ngeina bangin namsaute le sikzumte tawh, amaute tungah si a luan dongin ki-atin kisun uh hi." 
1Kings18:29 Sunkim khit ciangin biakpiak hun dong mateng amaute awng suak uh a, ahih hangin awging om lo hi. Kuamah in dawng lo a, kuamah in don lo hi." 
1Kings18:30 Tua ciangin Elijah in mi khempeuh kiangah, “Ka kiang nai ah hong pai un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama kiang nai ah hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakna tau a kisupai sa khat puahkik hi." 
1Kings18:31 “Israel, nangma min hi ding hi,” ci-in Topaʼ thu a tunna Jakobʼ tapa minam sawm le nihte tawh kizui-in Elijah in suangtum sawm le nih la hi." 
1Kings18:32 Tua ciangin tua suangte tawh Topaʼ minin biakna tau khat lam hi. Amah in khaici lawh nih a ta zo dingin a lian hawklam khat biakna tau kimkot ah bawl hi. 
1Kings18:33 Tua ciangin amah in a ngeina bangin a sing koih a, a bawngtal semnenin a sing tungah koih hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Beel li sungah tui dim unla, meihal biakna tau tung le a sing tungah sung un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:34 Tua ciangin amah in, “A nih veina hih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a nih veina hih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A thum veina hih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a thum veina hih leuleu uh hi." 
1Kings18:35 Tua ciangin biakna tau kimkot ah tui luang a, a hawklam zong tui tawh kidim hi." 
1Kings18:36 Biakpiak hun ciangin kamsang Elijah a nai ah hong pai-in, “Abraham, Isaac le Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang pen Israel sungah Pasian na hihna le kei pen nangma nasem ka hihna le hih nate khempeuh nangma thu tawh ka hihna thu tu ni-in kitheisak in." 
1Kings18:37 Topa aw, nangmah Pasian na hihna le amauteʼ lungsim na heikikna thu hih mite in a theih nadingin hong dawng in, Topa aw, hong dawng in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:38 Tua ciangin Topaʼ meikuang hong kia a, a meihal biakna, a sing, a suangte le a leivui kangtumin, hawklam sunga om tui nangawn kangcip hi." 
1Kings18:39 Mi khempeuh in tua thu a muh uh ciangin a mai uh lei lam ngatin puk uh hi. Amaute in, “ Topa pen Pasian ahi hi; Topa pen Pasian ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings18:40 Tua ciangin Elijah in amaute kiangah, “Baal kamsangte man un; amaute khat zong suaktasak kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in man uh hi. Elijah in Kishon lui ah amaute paipih sukin tua lai ah amaute a that hi." 
1Kings18:41 Tua ciangin Elijah in Ahab kiangah, “Pai to inla, an ne-in tui dawn in; bang hang hiam cih leh guahpi huging om hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:42 Tua ahih ciangin an ne tui dawn dingin Ahab pai to hi. Karmel Mual dawnah Elijah pai to a, a mahmah leilak ah kun sukin a khukte kikalah a maitang a phum hi." 
1Kings18:43 Tua ciangin a nasem pa kiangah, “Tu-in pai to in; tuipi lam va en in,” a ci hi. Amah pai to-in khuadak a, “Bangmah om lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Sagih vei paikik in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:44 A sagih veina ciangin amah in, “Khuttum cia bang meii tawmno khat tuipi panin hong kai to hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai to-in Ahab kiangah, ‘Guah in hong khak kha ding ahih manin na leeng kithawi inla pai suk in,’ va ci in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings18:45 Tomno sungin meiite le huih tawh van hong vom a, guah tampi a zu hi. Ahab a leeng tungah tuangin Jezreel ah a pai hi." 
1Kings18:46 Tua ciangin Elijah tungah Topaʼ vangliatna hong tung hi. Amah in a kawng gakin Jezreel khua lutna dongah Ahabʼ mai ah na tai hi. 
1Kings19:1 Ahab in Jezebel kiangah Elijahʼ hih khempeuh le namsau tawh kamsangte khempeuh a thah khitna thu a gen hi. 
1Kings19:2 Tua ciangin Jezebel in Elijah kiangah kamtai khat sawlin, “Zing ciang tu bang hunin amaute na thah bangin nangmah kong thah kei taak le pasian-te in kei hong dawm kei tahen,” cisak hi." 
1Kings19:3 Tua ciangin amah lau a, kithawi-in a suahtak nadingin paikhia a, Judah-teʼ khua Beer-sheba tungin tua lai ah a nasem pa nusia hi." 
1Kings19:4 Ahih hangin a mahmah gamlak ah ni khat lam pai lai-in poding kung nuai khat ah a tu hi. Tua ciangin amah in a sih nading thu ngenin, “Pha zo hi; tu-in Topa aw, ka nuntakna hong la ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka pate sangin kei ka hoih zaw kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:5 Tua ciangin poding kung khat nuai ah amah lum sukin a ihmu hi. Tua laitakin vantungmi khat in amah lawngin ama kiangah, “Tho inla an ne in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:6 Amah khuadak a, ama lutang gei suang sa tungah a ki-em moh khat le tui hai khat na om hi. Amah in tuate ne-in dawnin lumkik hi." 
1Kings19:7 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi a nih veina hong paikikin amah lawng a, “Tho inla an ne in; tua hikeileh nang adingin khualzinna haksa lua ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:8 Tua ciangin amah tho a, an ne-in tui dawn a, tua an thahatna tawh Pasianʼ mual Horeb ciang dong sun sawm li le zan sawm li sung a pai hi." 
1Kings19:9 Tua ciangin leihawm khat ah amah tungin tua lai ah giak hi. Topa in Elijah hopih a, “Elijah, hih lai ah bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:10 Amah in, “Vanglian Pasian, Topa adingin ka huaiham mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in na thuciamna nusia-in, na biakna taute lawn khia uh a, namsau tawh na kamsangte that hi; kei, kei bekbek ka om lai hi. Amaute in kei nangawn thah dingin hong zong lai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:11 Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai khia inla, mual tung, Topaʼ mai ah ding in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in hong nawk a, a lian a khauh huihpi in mualte sem khamin Topaʼ mai ah suangtumte sukham a, ahih hangin huihpi sungah Topa om lo hi. Huihpi nun a daih khit ciangin zin liing a, ahih hangin zin liing sungah Topa om lo hi." 
1Kings19:12 Zin liing khit ciangin meikuang om a, ahih hangin meikuang sungah zong Topa om lo hi. Meikuang khit ciangin aw nem neu khat a ging hi." 
1Kings19:13 Elijah in a zak ciangin a puan tawh a mai tuamin paikhia a, leihawm lutna ah ding hi. Ama kiangah aw khat hong ging a, “Elijah, hih lai ah bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:14 Amah in, “Vanglian Pasian, Topa adingin ka huaiham mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in na thuciamna nusia-in, na biakna taute lawn khia uh a, namsau tawh na kamsangte that uh hi; kei, kei bekbek ka om lai hi. Amaute in kei nangawn thah dingin hong zong lai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:15 Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Pai in, Damaskas gamlak na lampi ah ciahkik in. Na tun ciangin Syria gam kumpi dingin Hazael sathau na nilh ding hi." 
1Kings19:16 Tua ciangin Israel kumpi dingin Nimshiʼ tapa Jehu sathau na nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin nangma munah kamsang dingin Abelmeholah khuami Shafatʼ tapa Elisha sathau na nilh ding hi. 
1Kings19:17 Jehu in Hazaelʼ namsau panin a suakta peuhpeuh that ding hi. Elisha in Jehuʼ namsau panin a suakta peuhpeuh that ding hi. 
1Kings19:18 Ahi zongin Baal mai ah a kun nai lo, amah a nam nai lo mihing tul sagih Israel sungah ka siit ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:19 Tua ahih ciangin tua lai panin amah paikhia a, ama neihsa a bawngtal kap sawm le nih tawh lo a kho Shafatʼ tapa Elisha mu a, amah a sawm le nihna tawh a kho ahi hi. Elijah in ama gei nawkin ama tungah a puan lawn hi." 
1Kings19:20 Tua ciangin amah in a bawngtalte nusia-in Elijahʼ nungah tai a, “Ka nu le ka pa kam vaikhakin hong namsak phot in; tua ciangin nang kong zui ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in Elisha kiangah, “Paikik in; nang hong khaktan ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings19:21 Tua ciangin amah a zuihna panin ciahkik a, a bawngtal kolte la-in a bawngtalte go a, a sate bawngtal kolte tawh huanin mite tungah pia a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Tua ciangin amah kithawi-in Elijahʼ nung zui a, ama na a sem hi." 
1Kings20:1 Syria kumpipa Benhadad in ama galkap khempeuh khawm hi. Amah a huh ding kumpi sawm thum le nih le sakolte le leengte om hi. Amah pai to-in Samaria umcihin sim gawp hi. 
1Kings20:2 Amah in Israel kumpi Ahab khuapi sungah kamtaite sawlin ama kiangah, “Benhadad in hih bangin ci hi:" 
1Kings20:3 ‘Na ngun le na kham keima aʼ hi a, na zi hoih pente le na tate zong keima-aʼ mah ahi hi,’ ci hi,” cisak hi." 
1Kings20:4 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in dawngin, “Na gen mah bangin, ka topa, kumpipa aw, kei le ka neih khempeuh nangma aʼ ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:5 Kamtaite hong paikikin, “Benhadad in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Nang kiangah mi hong sawlin, “Kei tungah na ngun le na kham, na zite le na tate hong pia in,” kong cisak hi." 
1Kings20:6 Ahi zongin zing ciang tu bang hunin nangma kiangah ka nasemte kong sawl dinga, amaute in nangma inn le na nasemteʼ inn sung thawi-in, amauʼ deih peuhpeuh hong la ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” cisak hi." 
1Kings20:7 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in gam sung upa khempeuh samin, “Tu-in ciamteh un, hih mipa in buaina a zonna thei un; bang hang hiam cih leh ka zite le ka ngun le ka kham a la dingin mi hong sawl a, ama thu ka nial kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:8 Tua ciangin upa khempeuh le mi khempeuh in ama kiangah, “Don kei inla, zong thukim kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings20:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Benhadadʼ kamtaite kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Na nasem paʼ tung panin nong kalh masak kong pia ding hi; ahih hangin a nihna kong pia zo kei hi, ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin kamtaite kihem khia-in ama tungah thu tunkik uh hi." 
1Kings20:10 Benhadad in ama kiangah mi sawlin, “Samaria leitang pen kei hong zui khempeuhʼ khut kuak a dim zawh taak leh, pasian-te in kei hong dawm kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:11 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in dawngin, “Ama kiangah gen un: ‘Gal a zawh khit ciangin galhiam a suah khia pa bangin galsim dingin galhiam a kuah lai pa kiphasak kei hen,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:12 Bukte sungah kumpite tawh zu ne-in Benhadad a om laitakin hih thu a zak ciangin amah in a mite kiangah, “Panmun la un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in khuapi a sim gawp dingin panmun a la uh hi." 
1Kings20:13 Tua ciangin Israel kumpi Ahab kiang nai ah kamsang khat hong pai-in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih mihon tampi khempeuh na mu hiam? En in, tu ni-in nangma khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah, Topa ka hihna na thei ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:14 Tua ciangin Ahab in, “Kua tawh hi ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gamte a ukteʼ nasemte tawh, ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Kua in galsim pan ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Nangmah in na pan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:15 Tua ciangin amah in gamte a ukteʼ nasemte khawm a, amaute za nih le sawm thum le nih ahi hi. Amauteʼ khit ciangin amah in Israel mi khempeuh, tul sagih a khawm hi." 
1Kings20:16 Tua ciangin Benhadad, bukte sungah amah a huh kumpi sawm thum le nihte tawh zukhamin a om laitak sun hunin amaute kuan khia uh hi." 
1Kings20:17 Gam a ukteʼ nasemte kuan khia masa uh hi. Tua ciangin Benhadad in thukante sawl khia a, amaute in ama kiangah, “Samaria panin mi hong kuan khia uh hi,” ci-in zasak uh hi." 
1Kings20:18 Amah in, “Kilemna a bawl dingin hong pai ahihleh a hingin amaute man un. Tua ahih kei a, a hong sim dingin amaute a hong pai ahihleh zong amaute a hing mahin man un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:19 Tua ahih ciangin gamte a ukteʼ nasemte le amaute a zui galkapte, khuapi panin kuan khia uh hi." 
1Kings20:20 Mi khempeuh in amauʼ kisikpih ciat that uh hi. Syria-te tai-in Israel mite in amaute delh uh a, ahih hangin Syria kumpipa Benhadad sakol tung tuangte tawh sakol khatin tai hi." 
1Kings20:21 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa pai khia-in sakolte le leengte man a, Syria-te tampi tak a that hi." 
1Kings20:22 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa kiang nai ah kamsang pa hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Hong pai in, nangmah kithakhauhsak inla, na hih ding thu limtakin ngaihsun in; bang hang hiam cih leh khuakhal ciangin Syria kumpipa nangmah simin hong kuan tokik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:23 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipaʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Amauteʼ pasian-te pen mual tung pasian-te hi a, tua ahih ciangin eite sangin amaute hat zaw uh hi. Ahih hangin zanglei ah amaute do lehang amaute sangin eite i hat zaw taktak ding hi." 
1Kings20:24 Hih bangin hih in: Kumpite ama panmun ciat panin khiin khia inla, amauteʼ munah galkap maangte koih in." 
1Kings20:25 Tua ciangin na taan sa galkap tawh a kibang galkap, sakol tangin sakol, leeng tangin leeng khawm in. Tua ciangin zanglei ah amaute i do dinga, amaute sangin eite i hat zaw taktak ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amauʼ thu ngai-in a hih hi." 
1Kings20:26 Khuakhal ciangin Benhadad in Syria-te khawmin Israel mite a sim dingin Afek ah a kuan to hi. 
1Kings20:27 Tua ciangin Israel mite kikhawmin, lam-an kiguan a, amaute a do dingin a kuan uh hi. Israel mite in amauteʼ mai ah keel hon neu nih bangin giahphual sat uh a, Syria-te ahihleh gam sung khempeuh dim uh hi." 
1Kings20:28 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mi khat a nai ah hong pai-in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Syria-te in, “ Topa pen mual tung pasian hi a, amah pen kuam sung pasian hi lo hi,” ci uh ahih manin hih a lian mihonpi khempeuh nangma khut sungah kong pia dinga, keimah, Topa ka hihna na thei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:29 Amaute a kimaituahin ni sagih sung giahphual satin om uh hi. A ni sagih ni-in gal kido uh hi. Israel mite in Syria-te ni khat sungin khe galkap tul za khat vatlum uh hi. 
1Kings20:30 Tua ciangin a omlaite Afek khuapi ah tai uh a, ahi zongin tuate mi tul sawm nih le tul sagih pen khuapi kulh in cipnelh hi. Benhadad zong tai a, khuapi sunga inn dei sung nung khat ah a lut hi." 
1Kings20:31 Tua ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Israel kumpite pen hehpihna a nei kumpite hi, ci-in i za hi. Puanhampi i kawng ah teengin i lu tungah khauhual vialin Israel kumpipa kiangah pai ni; amah in na nuntakna hong suaktasak kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings20:32 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a kawng uh ah puanhampi teengin a lu uh ah khauhual vialin Israel kumpipa kiangah pai uh a, “Na nasem pa Benhadad in, ‘Kong thum hi, kei hong nungtasak in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi. Amah in, “Amah nungta lai ahi hiam? Amah ka sanggam bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:33 Tu-in mite in a lim en cikin ama tung panin a theih uh ciangin, “Hi hi, amah nungta lai hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai unla amah hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin ama kiangah Benhadad hong paikhia hi. Ahab in leeng tung ama kiangah Benhadad kah tosak hi." 
1Kings20:34 Tua ciangin Benhadad in ama kiangah, “Ka pa in na paʼ tung panin a lak khuapite kong piakik ding hi. Ka pa in Samaria ah a bawl mah bangin Damaskas ah nang adingin sumbuk na bawl thei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Ahab in, “Hih na thugenteʼ hangin nang kong suaktasak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in thuciamna khat amah tawh bawlin a ciahsak hi." 
1Kings20:35 Tua ciangin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh kamsangteʼ tapate khat in a lawmte khat kiangah, “Hong sat in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a mipa in amah sat nuam lo hi." 
1Kings20:36 Tua ciangin amah in a lawmpa kiangah, “Nangmah in Topaʼ thu mang lo na hih manin, kei kiang panin na paikhiat khit phetin humpinelkai khat in nang hong that ding hi,” a ci hi. Ama kiang panin amah a kihepkhiat khit phetin humpinelkai khat in amah dawntuahin pet lum pah hi." 
1Kings20:37 Tua ciangin amah in midang khat mu a, “Hong sat in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin mipa in amah nakpi takin satin amah liamsak hi." 
1Kings20:38 Tua ciangin kamsang pa kihem khia-in lam gei ah kumpipa ngak a, a mit tung puan tawh tuamin a mel a seel hi." 
1Kings20:39 Kumpipa in a nawk laitakin kumpipa tungah amah kiko-in, “Na nasem pa gal sungah kuan hi. Galkap khat in kei kiangah gal mat sa mi khat hong paipih a, ‘Hih mipa kem in; amah na tai suah leh ama nuntakna tangin nangma nuntakna hi dinga, ahih kei leh ngun talen khat na liau ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Kings20:40 Na nasem pa hih lai hua lai ah manlahin ka om kalin amah na mang hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Nangma thukhenna bang hi tahen; nang mahmah in na khen tawm hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:41 Tua ciangin amah in a mit panin a tuamna thakhatin phel vat hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in amah pen kamsangte khat ahih lam thei hi. 
1Kings20:42 Tua ciangin amah in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Thah dinga ka seh mipa khah na hih ciangin ama nuntakna tangin nangma nuntakna, ama miteʼ tangin nangma mite pai ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings20:43 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa a inn ah a lungkim lo, mai khingin pai a, Samaria a tung hi." 
1Kings21:1 Tua laitakin Jezreel khuami Naboth in Samaria kumpi Ahabʼ kumpi inn gei ah leenggui lo khat nei hi. 
1Kings21:2 Hih thu teng khit ciangin Ahab in Naboth kiangah, “Ka inn tawh kinai ahih manin anteh huan dingin ka neih theih nadingin na leenggui lo hong pia in; keimah in tua tang dingin leenggui lo hoih zaw khat kong pia ding hi; ahih kei leh zong nang adingin a hoih zawk ding leh a man ding sum kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:3 Ahih hangin Naboth in Ahab kiangah, “Ka pu ka pateʼ gamh nang tungah kong piak ding Topa in hong kham hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:4 Tua ciangin Jezreel khuami Naboth in ama tungah a thugenna hangin hehna le maikhinna tawh Ahab a inn ah ciah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka pu ka pateʼ gamh nang tungah kong pia kei ding hi,” ci hi. Amah a lupna tungah lumin a mai hei a, an ne lo hi." 
1Kings21:5 Ahih hangin a zi Jezebel ama kiangah hong pai-in, “An a ne lo zah dingin bang hangin na lungsim tua zahin heh ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:6 Amah in, “Keimah in Jezreel khuami Naboth kiangah thu genin, ‘Sum tawh lei dingin na leenggui lo hong pia in; ahih kei leh zong, na lungkim leh tua tang dingin leenggui lo dang khat kong pia ding hi,’ ka ci hi. Amah in hong dawngin, ‘Nang tungah ka leenggui lo kong pia kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:7 Tua ciangin a zi Jezebel in, “Tu laitakin Israel mite a ukpa hi lo na hi hiam? Tho-in an ne inla, na lungsim nuamsak in. Keimah in Jezreel khuami Nabothʼ leenggui lo nangma tungah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:8 Tua ahih ciangin amah in Ahabʼ minin laikhakte gelhin ama min gelhna tawh tua laite tungah gelh a, ama khuapi sungah Naboth tawh a teeng upate le uliante tungah tua laite a khak hi." 
1Kings21:9 Amah in a laite sungah, “An tan ding thu zasak unla, miteʼ lak a sangna munah Naboth koih un." 
1Kings21:10 Ama mai ah mi ginalo nih koihin ama lang khat ah mawhna zongsakin, ‘Nang in Pasian le kumpipa na samsia hi,’ cisak un. Tua ciangin amah la khia unla deng lum un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:11 Tua ciangin ama khuapi mi, ama khuapi sungah a teeng upate le uliante in amaute tungah Jezebelʼ thupuak bangin hih uh hi. Amaute tungah a khak laite sungah a kigelh mah bangin," 
1Kings21:12 amaute in an tan ding thu zasak uh a, miteʼ lak a sangna munah Naboth koih uh hi." 
1Kings21:13 Tua ciangin mi ginalo nihte hong pai-in ama mai ah tu uh hi. Tua ciangin mi ginalo nihte in miteʼ omin Nabothʼ mawhna zong uh a, “Naboth in Pasian le kumpipa samsia hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khuapi pua lamah amah paipih uh a, suang tawh amah deng lum uh hi." 
1Kings21:14 Tua ciangin amaute in Jezebel kiangah thu puakin, “Suang tawh Naboth kideng khinzo a, amah si ta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings21:15 Jezebel in Naboth suang tawh kidengin a sihna thu a zak phetin Ahab kiangah, “Tho in; sum tawh lei dingin nangma tungah hong piak nop loh, Jezreel khuami Nabothʼ leenggui lo tang in; bang hang hiam cih le Naboth nungta nawn lo hi; si ta hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:16 Naboth a sihna thu Ahab in a zak phetin, a luah dingin Jezreel khuami Nabothʼ leenggui lo ah a pai suk dingin a tho hi." 
1Kings21:17 Tua ciangin Tishbe khuami Elijah tungah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
1Kings21:18 “Tho inla, Samaria ah a om Israel kumpi Ahab a dawntuah dingin pai suk in. Nabothʼ leenggui lo a la dingin tua lai ah amah om hi." 
1Kings21:19 Nangmah in ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “That khinin zong luah khin na hi hiam?” ci hi,’ na ci ding hi. Tua ciangin ama kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Uite in Nabothʼ sisan a liahna munah uite in nangma sisan liak ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:20 Ahab in Elijah a muh ciangin, “Ka galpa aw, kei hong mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “ Topaʼ muhna ah a sia a gamta dingin nangmah kipiatawm na hih manin nang kong mu hi." 
1Kings21:21 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah siatna kong tungsak ding hi. Nang kong phiat khia siang dinga, Israel sungah nangma mi sal le sal ahi lo mi pasal khempeuh ka beisak ding hi." 
1Kings21:22 Kei nong hehsakna hang le Israel na khialhsakna hangin Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ innkuan le Ahijahʼ tapa Baashaʼ innkuan bangin nangma innkuan ka bawl ding hi. 
1Kings21:23 Jezebelʼ thu zong Topa in genin, ‘Uite in Jezreel khua sungah Jezebel ne ding uh hi,’ ci hi." 
1Kings21:24 Khuapi sungah Ahabʼ innkuan a si peuhpeuh uite in ne ding uh hi; gamlak ah a si nangma innkuan peuhpeuh huihlak vasate in ne ding uh hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings21:25 Ama zi Jezebel in a hanthot Ahab bangin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia a gamta dingin a mahmah a kipiatawm mi kuamah dang om lo hi. 
1Kings21:26 Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat Amor mite mah bangin milimte zui-in a kihhuai mahmah in a gamta hi. 
1Kings21:27 Ahab in hih thute a zak ciangin a puante bal kek a, a pum tungah puanhampi silhin, an tangin puanhampi tungah lum a, mai khingin a vak kawikawi hi." 
1Kings21:28 Tu-in Tishbe khuami Elijah tungah Topaʼ thu hong tunga," 
1Kings21:29 “Keima mai ah bangzahin Ahab a kiniamkhiatna na mu hiam? Keima mai ah amah kiniamkhiat ahih manin ama hun sungin siatna ka tungsak kei ding hi. Ahih hangin a tapaʼ hun sungin ama innkuan tungah siatna ka tungsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:1 Kum thum sung Syria le Israel gal kido loin om uh hi. 
1Kings22:2 Ahih hangin a kum thumna kumin Israel kumpi Ahab kiangah Judah kumpi Jehoshafat va pai suk hi. 
1Kings22:3 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Ramoth-gilead eima aʼ hi a, eite pau loin omin Syria kumpipaʼ khut sung panin i lakkhiat lohna thu na thei uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:4 Tua ciangin amah in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Ramoth-gilead ah galsim dingin kei nong zui ding hiam?” a ci hi. Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Kei a kipan ka mite le ka sakolte nangma aʼ ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:5 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa thu dong masa in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:6 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in kamsangte mihing za li bang khawmin amaute tungah, “Ramoth-gilead a sim dingin ka kuan ding hiam, ahih kei le ka thuak ding hiam,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Kuan to in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kumpipaʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings22:7 Ahih hangin Jehoshafat in, “Thu i dot theih ding Topaʼ kamsang a dang khat beek om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:8 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “ Topa thu i dot theih nading, Imlahʼ tapa Mikaiah a kici mi khat om lai hi. Ahih hangin amah in keiʼ thu a hoih gen ngei loin a sia gen den ahih manin amah ka mudah hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Kumpipa in tua bangin ci kei in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:9 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in ulian khat samin, “Manlangin Imlahʼ tapa Mikaiah hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:10 Samaria kulhpi lutna ancilna ah Israel kumpipa le Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat a kumpi tokhom tung uh ah tu-in kumpi puan tawh kizemin om uh a, kamsang khempeuh in amauʼ mai ah thu gen uh hi." 
1Kings22:11 Tua ciangin Khenaanahʼ tapa Zedekiah in ama adingin sik kite bawl a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute na zawh matengin hihte tawh Syria mite na nawt ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:12 Kamsang khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin genin, “Ramoth-gilead ah kuan to inla gualzo in; Topa in kumpipaʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Kings22:13 Tua ciangin Mikaiah a sam dingin a pai kamtai pa in ama kiangah, “Thu kikhatin kamsangteʼ thugen pen kumpipa adingin a hoihlam ahi hi. Amaute bangin nang zong gen inla, a hoih lamin gen in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:14 Ahih hangin Mikaiah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, Topa in kei tungah hong gen thu ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:15 Kumpipa kiangah amah a tun ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mikaiah aw, Ramoth-gilead ah galsim dingin i kuan ding hiam, ahih kei le i thuak ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Kuan to inla va gualzo ve. Topa in kumpipaʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi ven,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:16 Ahih hangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “ Topaʼ min tawh thudang gen loin thuman bek kei tungah nong gen nading bangzah vei hong thuhilh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tuucing a nei lo tuute bangin mualte tungah Israel mi khempeuh a kithehthang ka mu hi. Topa in, ‘Hihte in makai nei lo hi; amaute lungnuam takin a inn ciat uh ah ciah hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:18 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Amah in keiʼ thu a hoih gen loin a sia gen ding hi, nang kiangah hong ci khin hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:19 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ thu ngai in: Topa a kumpi tokhom tungah tu-in, ama taklam le a veilamah vantung mihonpi a ding ka mu hi." 
1Kings22:20 Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Amah kuan to-in Ramoth-gilead ah a va sih nadingin kua in Ahab va zol ding hiam?’ ci hi. Khat in thu khat genin a dang khat in thudang khat gen hi." 
1Kings22:21 Tua ciangin kha khat hong madawkin Topaʼ mai ah dinga, ‘Keimah in amah ka va zol ding hi,’ ci hi." 
1Kings22:22 Topa in ama kiangah, ‘Bang lam tawh zol ding na hi hiam?’ a ci hi. Amah in, ‘Keimah pai khia-in, ama kamsangte khempeuh sungah a zuau kha ka va hi ding hi,’ ci hi.
