Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Nangmah in amah a va zol ding na hi a, nangmah in na zo ding hi; paikhia inla tua bangin va hih in,’ ci hi." 
1Kings22:23 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in en in, Topa in hih na kamsangte khempeuhʼ sungah zuaugen kha khat koih khin hi. Topa in nang tawh kisai-in a sia gen khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:24 Tua ciangin Khenaanahʼ tapa Zedekiah a nai ah hong pai-in Mikaiah a paang bengin, “Nangʼ tungah thu a gen dingin Topaʼ kha in cikin kei hong nusia-in nang kiang hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:25 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “En in, nangmah a bu dingin inn dei nungah na pai ni ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:26 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Mikaiah man unla, khuapi sung a ukpa Amon le kumpipaʼ tapa Joash kiangah paipihkik un." 
1Kings22:27 Tua ciangin, ‘Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih mipa thong sungah koih unla, lungnuamin kei kong ciahkik matengin anletui tawmno cik bek tawh vak un,” ci hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:28 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Lungnuam takin nong ciahkik leh Topa in keiʼ tungtawnin thu hong gen lo ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A kuamah peuh in hih ka thugen za un,” ci thuah lai hi." 
1Kings22:29 Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa le Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat, Ramoth-gilead ah kuan to uh hi." 
1Kings22:30 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Kei ka mel seelin gal sungah kong kuan dinga, ahih hangin nangmah in na kumpi puante nong silh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa in a mel seelin gal sungah kuan hi." 
1Kings22:31 Tu-in Syria kumpipa in ama leeng a uk mi sawm thum le nihte thu pia-in, “A neu ahi a, a lian tawh ahi zongin kido loin, Israel kumpipa bek tawh na kido ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:32 Leeng a ukte in Jehoshafat a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Israel kumpipa hi taktak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah a do dingin amaute kihei uh hi; tua ciangin Jehoshafat awng khia hi." 
1Kings22:33 Israel kumpipa ahih lohna leeng a ukte in a theih uh ciangin amah a delhna panun amaute nungkik uh hi. 
1Kings22:34 Ahih hangin mi khat in a thal mawk lot a, a galhiam awmdal thep kikalah lutin Israel kumpipa kha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng hawl pa kiangah, “Kei liam ka hih manin hong kihei inla, gal sung panin hong pua khia in,” a ci hi." 
1Kings22:35 Tua ni-in gal kidona lian a, nitak a a sih dong Syria-teʼ lam maingatin a leeng sungah Israel kumpipa kingamin a om hi. A liamma panin a si luangte leeng taw lamah luang khia hi." 
1Kings22:36 Ni tum pawlin galkapte lakah kikona khat hong om a, “Mi khempeuh ama khuapi ah, mi khempeuh ama gamah!” kici hi." 
1Kings22:37 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa si a, Samaria ah kipaipih a, amaute in Samaria ah kumpipa vui uh hi." 
1Kings22:38 Tua ciangin amaute in Samaria bual gei ah a leeng sil uh a, Topa in a gen sa thu tawh kizui-in uite in a sisan liak tumin numei paktatte tua sungah kisil uh hi." 
1Kings22:39 Tu-in Ahabʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a hih khempeuh, ama lam sa saiha inn le ama lam khuapi khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings22:40 Tua bangin Ahab si a, ama tangin a tapa Ahaziah in uk hi." 
1Kings22:41 Israel kumpi Ahabʼ kum lina kumin Asaʼ tapa Jehoshafat in Judah gamah uk ding kipan hi. 
1Kings22:42 Gam uk dingin a kipatin Jehoshafat kum sawm thum le nga pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm nih le nga sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Azubah hi a, Shilhiʼ tanu ahi hi." 
1Kings22:43 Amah in a pa Asaʼ khekhap tawn a, tua lampi panin pial loin, Topaʼ muhna ah a manin gamta hi. Ahi zongin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo a, mite in tuate tungah biakna pia lai-in paknamtui hal uh hi." 
1Kings22:44 Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa tawh zong kilemna a bawl hi. 
1Kings22:45 Tu-in Jehoshafatʼ gamtatna a omlaite, amah in a lah a thahatna le amah in a galdona, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
1Kings22:46 A pa Asaʼ hun lai-in a om lai pasal paktat pawlte amah in gam sung panin beisak hi. 
1Kings22:47 Edom ah kumpi om lo a, Judah kumpipaʼ khutnuai-a a huhpa khat in uk hi." 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafat in kham zongin Ofir ah a pai dingin Tarshish teembawte bawl hi. Ahih hangin Ezion-geber ah teembawte sia ahih manin amaute pai lo uh hi. 
1Kings22:49 Tua ciangin Ahabʼ tapa Ahaziah in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Teembawte sungah nangma nasemte tawh keima nasemte paikhawmsak in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Jehoshafat ut lo hi." 
1Kings22:50 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat si a, David khuapi Jerusalem ah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jehoram in a uk hi." 
1Kings22:51 Judah kumpipa Jehoshafatʼ kum sawm le kum sagihna kumin Ahabʼ tapa Ahaziah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Israel tungah kum nih sung uk hi." 
1Kings22:52 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a, ama nu le ama pa le Israel a khialsak Jeroboamʼ khekhap mah tawn hi." 
1Kings22:53 Amah in Baal na semin bia a, a pa mah bangin ahihna khempeuh ah Israel Pasian, Topa hehsak hi." 
2Kings1:1 Ahab a sih khit ciangin Moab gam in Israel lehdo hi. 
2Kings1:2 Samaria-a a inn dei tungnung innliim panin Ahaziah kia-in a liam hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in kamtaite sawlin amaute kiangah, “Pai un, hih natna panin ka damkik zo ding hiam cih thu Ekron pasian, Baal-zebub kiangah va dong un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:3 Ahih hangin Topaʼ vantungmi in Tishbe mi Elijah kiangah, “Ding in, Samaria kumpipaʼ kamtaite a dawn dingin pai to-in amaute kiangah, ‘Ekron pasian, Baal-zebub kiangah thu a dong dingin na pai nadingun Israel sungah Pasian om nawn lo ahi hiam?’ ci in." 
2Kings1:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Nang pen tu-a na liamna panin na damkik zo nawn kei dinga, na si taktak ding hi, ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Elijah zong pai-in a gen hi." 
2Kings1:5 Kamtaite zong kumpipa kiangah hong ciahkik uh a, amah in amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hong ciahkik na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi." 
2Kings1:6 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Kote a dawn dingin mi khat hong pai-in kote kiangah, ‘Note hong sawl kumpipa kiangah paikik unla, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ekron pasian, Baal-zebub kiangah thu a dong dingin mi na sawl nadingin Israel sungah Pasian om nawn lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-a na liamna panin na damkik zo nawn kei dinga, na si taktak ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings1:7 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Note a dawn dingin hong pai-in hih thute a gen pa a bangci mi ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:8 Amaute in amah dawngin, “Amah in samul puan khat silh a, a kawng ah savun kawnggak gak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Amah pen Tishbe mi Elijah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah mihing sawm nga a ukpa a mihing sawm nga tawh a sawl hi. Mual dawn khat ah a tu Elijah kiangah amah pai to-in ama kiangah, “Pasianʼ mipa aw, kumpipa in, ‘Hong pai suk hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:10 Ahih hangin Elijah in mihing sawm nga a ukpa dawngin, “Kei pen Pasianʼ mi khat ka hih leh, vantung panin meikuang hong pai suk henla, nang le na mihing sawm ngate hong kaang tum hen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung panin meikuang hong pai sukin amah le a mihing sawm ngate a kaang tum hi." 
2Kings1:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah mihing sawm nga a uk a dang khat a mihing sawm nga mah tawh sawlkik hi. Tua ciangin amah pai to-in ama kiangah, “Pasianʼ mipa aw, kumpipaʼ thupiakna hih bang ahi hi: ‘Manlang takin hong pai suk in,’ cihna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:12 Ahih hangin Elijah in amaute dawngin, “Kei pen Pasianʼ mi khat ka hih leh, vantung panin meikuang hong pai suk henla, nang le na mihing sawm ngate hong kaang tum hen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin vantung panin Pasianʼ meikuang hong pai sukin amah le a mihing sawm ngate a kaang tum leuleu hi." 
2Kings1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mihing sawm nga a uk a thumna pa a mihing sawm nga mah tawh sawl leuleu hi. Tua ciangin mihing sawm nga a uk a thumna pa pai to a, Elijahʼ mai ah hong pai-in khukdinin hong puk a, amah kunh-in, “Pasianʼ mipa aw, nangma tungah kong thum hi, keima nuntakna le nangma nasem hih mihing sawm ngateʼ nuntakna pammaih sa-in hong hehpih in." 
2Kings1:14 En in, vantung panin meikuang hong pai suk a, mihing sawm nga a uk a masa nihte a mi sawm nga tuak uh tawh kaang tum hi. Ahih hangin ka nuntakna pammaih sa-in hong hehpih in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:15 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in Elijah kiangah, “Amah tawh pai suk in; amah kihta kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin kumpipa kiangah amah tawh pai suk a," 
2Kings1:16 tua ciangin ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Nangmah in Ekron pasian, Baal-zebub kiangah thu a dong dingin kamtaite na sawl khin hi. Thudot nading Israel sungah Pasian om nawn lo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-a na liamna panin nang na damkik zo nawn kei dinga, na si taktak ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings1:17 Tua ahih ciangin Elijahʼ gen sa Topaʼ kammal tawh kizui-in amah si hi. Ahaziah in tapa nei lo ahih manin Judah kumpipa Jehoshafatʼ tapa Jehoramʼ kum nihna kumin, a sanggampa Joram ama tangin kumpi a suak hi." 
2Kings1:18 Ahaziahʼ gamtatna a sep sa a omlaite, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings2:1 Topa in pingpei-in vantungah Elijah a lak ding lai-in Elijah le Elisha-te Gilgal panin inn zuanin lamkal a om ahi uh hi. 
2Kings2:2 Elijah in Elisha kiangah, “Hih lai ah khawl in, kong thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Bethel ciang dong kei hong sawl hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Elisha in, “ Topa nungta a, nang mahmah na nuntak mah bangin, nang kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute Bethel dongah paisuak uh hi." 
2Kings2:3 Tua ciangin Bethel ah a om kamsang hon khat Elisha kiangah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in tu ni-in nangma kiang panin na topa a lakkhiat ding na thei hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Hi hi, ka thei hi; bangmah gen nawn kei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:4 Tua ciangin Elijah in Elisha kiangah, “Elisha aw, hih lai ah khawl in, kong thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jerikho ah kei hong sawl hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “ Topa nungta a, nang mahmah na nuntak mah bangin, nang kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerikho ah amaute tung uh hi." 
2Kings2:5 Jerikho ah a om kamsang hon khat in Elisha hong naihin ama kiangah, “ Topa in tu ni-in nangma kiang panin na topa a lakkhiat ding na thei hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Hi hi, ka thei hi; bangmah gen nawn kei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:6 Tua ciangin Elijah in ama kiangah, “Hih lai ah khawl in, kong thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jordan ah kei hong sawl hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “ Topa nungta a, nang mahmah na nuntak mah bangin, nang kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a nihun pai lai uh hi." 
2Kings2:7 Kamsang mihing sawm nga in zong zui uh a, amau tegel Jordan gei ah a din laitakun a kiang panun a gamla simah kamsangte a ding uh hi." 
2Kings2:8 Tua ciangin Elijah in a puan tualpi suahin zial a, tua tawh a tui sat hi. Lei keu tungah amau tegel a pai theih matengun a pang khat le a pang lang khat ah a tui kikhen hi." 
2Kings2:9 Amaute a gal kah khit uh ciangin Elijah in Elisha kiangah, “Nang kiang panin kei hong kilakkhiat ma-in nang adingin kong hihsak ding na deih hong gen in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in, “Kong thum hi, kha thu ah na vangliatna a zah nih hong luahsak in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:10 Tua ciangin amah in, “A haksa na khat nong ngen hi. Ahi zongin nangma kiang panin kei hong kilak laitakin kei nong muh leh nang adingin tua thu hong piang ding hi. Ahih hangin kei nong muh kei leh tua bangin hong piang lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:11 Tua ciangin amaute a pai kawmkawm a kiho laitakun, mei leeng khat le mei sakolte in amaute nih a khen hi. Tua ciangin vantungah Elijah pingpei-in pai to hi." 
2Kings2:12 Tua ciangin Elisha in tua mu-in amah kiko a, “Ka pa, ka pa! Israel mite a hupipa! Nang pai ta maw!” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in Elijah mu nawn lo hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in a dah manin a puan bal kekin phel nih a suak hi." 
2Kings2:13 Tua ciangin amah in Elijah tung panin a kia khia puan tawm a, kileh in Jordan gun pangah a ding hi." 
2Kings2:14 Tua ciangin amah in ama tung panin a kia khia Elijahʼ puan la-in tui sat a, “Elijahʼ Pasian, Topa koi ah om na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in tui a sat khit ciangin a pang khat le a pang lang khat ah a tui kikhen hi. Tua ciangin Elisha pai-in a gal kah hi." 
2Kings2:15 Tu-in Jerikho ah a om kamsangte in amah a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Elijahʼ vangliatna Elishaʼ tungah om hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah a dawn dingin amaute hong pai uh a, ama mai leilak ah amaute a kun uh hi." 
2Kings2:16 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Tu-in en in, a thahat na nasem mihing sawm nga ka om uh hi; kong thum uh hi, kote hong paisak inla na topa hong zongsak in. Topaʼ kha in amah manin mual tung ahih kei leh guam sungah amah khia hi kha ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Na zong kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:17 Ahih hangin amaute in amah a maizum dongin a cih teitei uh ciangin amah in, “Pai un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute mihing sawm nga a pai uh hi. Amaute in ni thum sung amah zong uh a, ahih hangin amah mu zo lo uh hi." 
2Kings2:18 Tua ciangin amah Jerikho ah a khawl sungin ama kiangah amaute hong paikik uh a, amah in amaute kiangah, “Note kiangah, ‘Pai kei un,’ hong ci hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:19 Tu-in khuapi mite in Elisha kiangah, “En in, topa in na muh bangin, hih khuapi om zia nuam hi. Ahih hangin a tui sia a, hih gamah kipung thei lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings2:20 Amah in, “Hai thak khat hong paipih unla, a sungah ci koih un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in ama kiangah paipih uh hi." 
2Kings2:21 Tua ciangin tuinak ah amah pai-in a sungah ci lawnin, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih tui a hoihin ka bawl khin hi. Tu-a kipanin sihna ahi a, tatolhna ahi zongin piangsak nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings2:22 Tua ahih ciangin Elishaʼ kampauna tawh kizui-in tu ni dongin a tui hoih hi. 
2Kings2:23 Amah tua lai panin Bethel ah pai to hi. Lampi ah a pai toh laitakin khuapi panin naupang neu pawl khat hong pai khia-in amah zahko uh a, “Pai to in, nang lukolh pa” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings2:24 Tua ciangin amah a kiimah khuadak a, amah in amaute a muh ciangin Topaʼ min tawh amaute a samsia hi. Tua ciangin gamlak panin vompi nih hong pai-in naupang sawm li le nih balnen hi." 
2Kings2:25 Tua lai panin amah Karmel Mual ah paisuak a, tua ciangin Samaria ah a ciahkik hi." 
2Kings3:1 Judah kumpi Jehoshafatʼ kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Samaria sung Israel tungah Ahabʼ tapa Joram kumpi suak a, amah in kum sawm le kum nih sung uk hi." 
2Kings3:2 Ama nu le ama pa zahin a siat loh hangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amah in a paʼ bawl sa Baal biakna song koih khia tei a," 
2Kings3:3 ahi zongin amah in Israel a khialsak Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhna mah pom lai hi; tua panin amah kihem khia lo hi. 
2Kings3:4 Moab kumpipa Mesha pen tuu khawi pa ahi hi. Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah kum simin tuuno tul za khat le tuutal tul za khatʼ mul a piak ding ahi hi. 
2Kings3:5 Ahih hangin Ahab a sih khit ciangin Moab kumpipa in Israel kumpipa lehdo hi. 
2Kings3:6 Tua ahih ciangin tua laitakin Samaria panin kumpi Joram kuan khia-in Israel mi khempeuh khawm hi. 
2Kings3:7 Tua ciangin amah pai-in Judah kumpi Jehoshafat kiangah thu zasak a, “Moab kumpipa in kei hong lehdo hi; Moab gam a sim dingin kei tawh nong kuan ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Kong kuan ding hi; keimah a kipan ka mite le ka sakolte nangma aʼ ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:8 Tua ciangin amah in, “Koi lam tawnin kuan ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Joram in dawngin, “Edom gam lam tawnin i kuan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa le Edom kumpipa tawh Israel kumpipa a kuan hi. Amaute ni sagih sung a kual pai khit uh ciangin galkapte hitaleh amaute a zui ganhingte ading hitaleh tui om lo hi. 
2Kings3:10 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Ala! Moab kumpipaʼ khut sungah a hong piak dingin Topa in ei kumpi thumte hong sam hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:11 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Ama tungtawnin Topaʼ tungah thu i dot theih nadingin hih lai ah Topaʼ kamsang om lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipaʼ nasemte khat in dawngin, “Elijah a huhpa om a, Shafatʼ tapa Elisha ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:12 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Amah pen Topaʼ kamsang man taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa le Jehoshafat le Edom kumpipa ama kiangah pai suk uh hi." 
2Kings3:13 Tua ciangin Elisha in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Nang tawh bang kisai ka hi hiam? Na nuʼ kamsangte le na paʼ kamsangteʼ kiangah pai in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Israel kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Hi lo hi; Moabʼ khut sungah hong piak dingin ko kumpi thumte a hong sam pa pen Topa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:14 Tua ciangin Elisha in, “Ama na ka sep Vanglian Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat thupi ngaihsutna nei lo hi leng nang hong en loin, zong kong mu kei ding hi." 
2Kings3:15 Ahi zongin tu-in lasakna a tumsiam khat hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Lasakna a tumsiam pa in a tum ciangin Topaʼ vangliatna ama tungah hong tung hi." 
2Kings3:16 Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Hih a keu lui taw pen tuilite tawh a kidimin ka bawl ding hi,’ ci hi." 
2Kings3:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Huih ahi a, guah ahi zongin na mu kei dinga, ahih hangin nangmah in na dawn ding, na gan hon le na ganpite in a dawn dingin lui taw pen tui tawh kidim ding hi,’ ci hi." 
2Kings3:18 Hih pen Topaʼ muhna ah a thuneu khat ahi hi. Amah in Moab mite zong nangma khut sungah hong pia dinga," 
2Kings3:19 nangmah in kulhpi a nei khuapi khempeuh le khuapi deihhuai khempeuh zo-in, singkung hoih khempeuh phukin, tuinak khempeuh na khakcip dinga, leitang hoih khempeuh suangtum tawh na kidimsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings3:20 A zingsang ciangin biakpiak hunin, gam sungteng tui tawh a kidim matengin Edom panin tui hong luang hi." 
2Kings3:21 Amaute a sim dingin kumpite a kuan tohna thu Moab mite khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin, a moi pen panin a ham pen dongin galhiam a tawi thei khempeuh kisam khia uh a, gamgi ah kikhawm uh hi." 
2Kings3:22 A zing ciang zingsang tungin amaute tho-in, tui tungah ni a taan ciangin, Moab mite in amauʼ gal khat ah a om tuite pen sisan bangin a sanin mu uh hi." 
2Kings3:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “Hua pen sisan ahi hi; kumpite khatlekhat kido-in, khatlekhat kithat hi taktak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, Moab-te aw, van kinusiate va la ni!” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings3:24 Ahih hangin Israel-teʼ giahphual ah amaute a tun uh ciangin, amauteʼ mai ah a taikhiat matengin Israel mite hong kipanin Moab mite a do uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute mainawtin pai-in a paikawmun Moab mite that uh hi." 
2Kings3:25 Tua ciangin amaute in khuapite lawnthal uh a, a suang in a khuhcip dongin leitang tung khempeuh ah mi khempeuh in suang lawn uh hi. Amaute in tuinak khempeuh khakcip uh a, singkung hoih khempeuh phuk uh hi. Kir-hareseth ah a suangtumte bek a om dongin suanglotna a tawite in umcihin vat gawp uh hi." 
2Kings3:26 Moab kumpipa in a lelhlam a kitheih ciangin, Edom kumpipaʼ san tak a phu khia dingin namsau tawi mihing za sagih a la hi. Ahih hangin amaute in phu khia zo lo uh hi." 
2Kings3:27 Tua ciangin amah in ama tangin a uk ding a ta upa pen la-in kulh tungah meihal biakna-in a pia hi. Israel mite in tua bangin a gamtatna a muh uh ciangin a lungsim uh su kha mahmah a, amauʼ kiang panin nungkikin a gamah a ciahkik uh hi." 
2Kings4:1 Tu-in kamsang honte sung pan mi khatʼ zi Elishaʼ tungah kiko-in, “Na nasem ka pasal si hi. Na nasem pa in Topa a zahtakna na thei hi. Ahih hangin ka tapate nih sila dingin a la dingin a leibatna pa hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:2 Tua ciangin Elisha in tua numei kiangah, “Nang adingin bang hong hihsak thei ding ka hi hiam? Inn sungah bang nei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Na nasem nu in sathau biing khat cih sim loh inn sungah bangmah dang nei lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:3 Tua ciangin amah in, “A pua ah paikhia inla, beel hawm a tawm lua lo, na veengte khempeuhʼ beel va kawm in." 
2Kings4:4 Tua ciangin sung tumin, nang le na tapate kong kikhaknelh unla, hih beelte khempeuh sungah sung in. Beel khat a dim simin tuam koih pahpah in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:5 Tua ahih ciangin ama kiang panin tua numei pai khia-in amah le a tapate kong kikhaknelh uh hi. Amah in a sunʼ laitakin a tapate in ama kiangah a beelte paipih uh hi. 
2Kings4:6 Beelte a dim ciangin amah in a tapa khat kiangah, “Beel dang khat hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a tapa in, “Beel a dang om nawn lo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin sathau a luan a khawl hi." 
2Kings4:7 Tua nu hong pai-in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah a thu teng gen a, tua ciangin amah in, “Pai in; a sathau zuakin na leibate loh in. Nang le na tapate, a omlaite tawh na nungta ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:8 Ni khat Shunem ah Elisha paisuak a, tua lai ah a hau numei khat teengin tua nu in an ne dingin amah a sam hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua lam a nawk peuhpeuh ciangin an ne dingin tua lai ah baang zel hi." 
2Kings4:9 Tua ciangin tua numei in a pasal kiangah, “Tu-in en in, hih lai mun hong nawk tawntung pa pen Pasianʼ mi siangtho hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
2Kings4:10 Eite kiangah amah hong pai peuhpeuh ciangin a tun theih nadingin innkhum zang ah kawm a nei inn dei neu khat bawlin tua sungah ama adingin lupna khat, sabuai khat, tutphah khat le meivak khat koihsak ni,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:11 Ni khat amah tua lai ah hong pai-in inn dei sungah lutin 
2Kings4:12 tua lai ah tawlnga hi. Tua ciangin amah in a nasem pa Gehazi kiangah, “Hih Shunem mi sam in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua numei a sap ciangin ama mai ah tua nu hong ding hi." 
2Kings4:13 Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Tu-in tua nu kiangah hih bangin gen in: Thei in, kote adingin hih haksatna khempeuh na thuak hi. Nang adingin bang hong kihihsak ding deih na hi hiam? Kumpipa kiang ahih kei leh galkap a ukpa kiangah nang tangin thu khat peuhpeuh hong kigensak ding na deih a om hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen ka mipihte lakah teeng ka hih manin bangmah ka kisam kei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:14 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua bang ahihleh tua nu adingin bang kihihsak thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Gehazi in dawngin, “Thu khat bek om hi. Tua nu in tapa nei lo a, a pasal teek ta hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:15 Amah in, “Tua nu sam in,” a ci hi. Amah in tua nu a sap ciangin kong kalai ah a hong ding hi." 
2Kings4:16 Tua ciangin amah in, “A hun hong tun ciangin tapa khat na tawi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, “Hi lo hi, ka topa, Pasianʼ mipa aw; na nasem nu tungah zuau kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:17 Ahih hangin tua nu in naupaii a, Elisha in ama tungah a gen sa bangin a hun a tunkik ciangin amah in tapa khat a nei hi." 
2Kings4:18 Naupang a gol ciangin ni khat a pa kiang anlate lakah a pai hi. 
2Kings4:19 Tua ciangin amah in a pa kiangah, “Aw, ka lutang, ka lutang!” a ci hi. A pa in a nasem pa kiangah, “A nu kiangah va pua in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:20 Amah in domin a nu kiangah a paipih ciangin a ang sungah sun dong naupang tawi a, tua ciangin a si hi." 
2Kings4:21 Tua ciangin tua nu pai to-in Pasianʼ mipa lupna tungah amah koih a, amah kong khaknelhin a paikhia hi." 
2Kings4:22 Tua ciangin amah in a pasal samin, “Manlang takin Pasianʼ mipa kiangah pai-in kong ciahkik theih nadingin nasemte khat le late khat hong puak in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:23 Tua ciangin amah in, “Bang hangin tu ni-in ama kiangah pai ding na hi hiam? Khadet ni ahi a, Sabbath ni ahi zongin hi lo hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hong hoih na ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:24 Tua ciangin amah inla van vawhin a nasem pa kiangah, “Gan nawh in; kong gen kei nakleh kei adingin a pai khiamsak kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:25 Tua ahih ciangin amah ding khia a, Karmel Mual a, Pasianʼ mipa kiangah a pai hi. Pasianʼ mipa in amah hong pai a muh ciangin a nasem pa Gehazi kiangah, “En in, galah Shunem nu hong pai hi." 
2Kings4:26 Amah a dawn dingin thakhatin va tai inla ama kiangah, ‘Na dam hiam? Na pasal a dam hiam? Naupang a dam hiam?’ va ci in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin tua nu in, “Hoih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:27 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa kiang mual tungah tua nu a tun ciangin tua nu in ama khe len hi. Tua ciangin amah a sawn khia dingin Gehazi hong pai hi. Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mipa in, “Amah tua ci omsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh amah nakpi takin lungkham hi. Topa in kei tungah a thu hong im a, kei kiangah hong gen lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:28 Tua ciangin tua nu in, “Ka topaʼ tung pan tapa hong ngen ka hi hiam? Kei hong khem kei in, hong ci hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:29 Amah in Gehazi kiangah, “Na kawng gak inla na khut ah ka ciangkhut tawi-in pai in. Mi khatpeuh in nang hong hopih leh zong dawng kei in. Tua ciangin naupangʼ mai tungah ka ciangkhut va nga in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:30 Tua ciangin naupangʼ nu in, “ Topa nungta a, nang mahmah na nuntak mah bangin, nang kong nusia kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin tua nu a zui hi." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi na mapai suakin naupangʼ maitang tungah a ciangkhut nga a, ahih hangin awging ahi a, nuntakna lim ahi zongin om lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah a dawn dingin hong kilehkikin ama kiangah, “Naupang khanglo nai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:32 Inn sungah Elisha hong tun ciangin amah in a lupna tungah a si-in a lum naupang a mu hi. 
2Kings4:33 Tua ahih ciangin amah bek lutin kong a kikhaknelh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah thu ngen hi. 
2Kings4:34 Tua ciangin amah pai to-in naupangʼ tungah bok a, ama kam le naupangʼ kam tuahin, a naupangʼ mit tungah ama mitte omsak a, a naupangʼ khutte tungah ama khutte omsak hi. Tua ciangin ama tungah kikhuang a, naupang a ci hong lum hi." 
2Kings4:35 Tua ciangin amah ding tokikin inn sungah khatvei vak kawikawi a, tua ciangin pai to-in ama tungah kikhuang leuleu hi. Naupang sagih vei hong hetchiai-in a mit a hak hi." 
2Kings4:36 Tua ciangin amah in Gehazi samin, “Shunem numei sam in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua nu a sam hi. Tua nu ama kiangah hong pai ciangin amah in, “Na tapa la in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:37 Tua nu hong pai-in ama khe ah pukin leilak ah a kun hi. Tua ciangin a tapa la-in a paikhia hi. 
2Kings4:38 Tua gam sungah kialpi a tun laitakin Gilgal ah Elisha hong paikik hi. Kamsangte ama mai ah tu-in thu a ngaih laitakin amah in a nasemte kiangah, “Beel pi suang unla kamsangte ading meh huan un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:39 Amaute khat meh zong dingin gamlak ah pai a, vatak-um gui khat mu-in tua tung panin a ang dimin umgah lo a, tuate bang hiam cih thei lopi-in hong pai-in meh beel sungah at nen hi." 
2Kings4:40 Tua ciangin amaute in miteʼ nek dingin hong thuk khia uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in meh a nek laitakun amaute kiko-in, “Pasianʼ mipa aw, an sungah gu om!” a ci uh hi. Amaute in ne thei lo uh hi." 
2Kings4:41 Amah in, “Tua ahihleh a an tawm hong la un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in beel sungah tua an lawn a, “Amaute in a nek theih nadingin mite adingin thuk khia un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin bangmah ci nawn lo hi." 
2Kings4:42 Mi khat Baal-shalishah panin hong pai-in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah anpal-anlum, mangbuhham lum sawm nih le anvui a thak a van sungah hong pua hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in a nasem pa kiangah, “Amaute in a nek theih nadingun kamsangte tungah pia in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings4:43 Ahih hangin a nasem pa in, “Mihing za khatteʼ mai ah keimah in hih bangci lui theih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahi zongin amah in, “Amaute in a nek theih nadingun mite tungah tuate pia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, ‘Amaute in ne-in khamval ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” a cikik hi." 
2Kings4:44 Tua ciangin amah in amaute mai ah tua an a lui hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ne uh a, Topaʼ gen sa bangin pawl khat a val lai hi." 
2Kings5:1 Syria kumpipaʼ galkap a uk Naaman pen kumpipaʼ maipha a ngah ulianpi khat ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama hangin Syria mite gualzawhna pia hi. Amah a thahat a vanglian khat hi a, ahih hangin amah a phak ahi hi." 
2Kings5:2 Syria mite in a galsimna khat uh ah Israel gam panin numeino khat ciahpih uh a, tua nu in Naamanʼ zi naʼ a sem hi." 
2Kings5:3 Amah in a tonu kiangah, “Samaria ah a om kamsang pa tawh ka topa kimu thei leh! Amah in a phakna damsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:4 Naaman in hih thu a zak ciangin sung tumin a topa kiangah, “Tua bang tua bangin Israel gam numeino in thu gen hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
2Kings5:5 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa in, “Tu-in pai in. Israel kumpipa kiangah lai khat ka khak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pai-in ngun talen sawm, kham shekel tul guk le pawipuan sawm a keng hi." 
2Kings5:6 Amah in Israel kumpipa tungah laikhak keng a, tua sungah, “Hih laikhak na ngah ciangin, ama phakna na damsak theih nadingin ka nasem pa Naaman nangma kiangah kong sawlna thu thei in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:7 Israel kumpipa in a laikhak a sim ciangin amah in a puante bal kekin, “Mi khat a phak natna damsak dingin hih mipa in kei tungah hih thu hong puak nadingin a that ding le a nungtasak dingin kei, Pasian ka hi hiam? Ngaihsun dih un. Kei tawh kitot nading a zonna thei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:8 Ahih hangin Israel kumpipa in a puante a bal kekna thu Pasianʼ mipa Elisha in a zak ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah mi sawlin, “Bang hangin na puante bal kek na hi hiam? Israel sungah kamsang khat a omna thu amah in a theih nadingin tu-in kei kiangah amah hong paisak in,” cisak hi." 
2Kings5:9 Tua ahih ciangin a sakolte le a leengte tawh Naaman hong pai-in Elishaʼ kongah a khawl hi. 
2Kings5:10 Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah kamtai khat sawlin, “Pai inla, Jordan gun sungah sagih vei va kisil in. Tua ciangin nangma cilesa a ngei hong bangkikin, nang na siang ding hi,” cisak hi." 
2Kings5:11 Ahih hangin Naaman hehin paikhia a, “En un, amah kei kiangah hong pai khia-in, ka gei ah hong dingin, a Pasian a Topaʼ min loin, a natna mun tungah a khut vanin, kei miphak pa hong damsak taktak ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
2Kings5:12 Israel tuite khempeuh sangin Damaskas gam a om Abana le Farpar gun tuite hoih zaw hi lo ahi hiam? Tuateʼ sungah kisilin siang thei lo ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in paikhia hi. 
2Kings5:13 Ahih hangin a nasemte a nai ah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Ka topa aw, kamsang pa in na lian khat a sem dingin hong sawl hileh sem ding hi lo na hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin amah in nang kiangah, ‘Kisil inla siang in,’ hong cih ciangin na hih ding bangzah ta-in kilawm zaw hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian mipaʼ gen bangin amah pai sukin Jordan gun sungah sagih vei kidiah hi. Tua ciangin a cilesa naupang no cilesa bangin a ngei bangkikin amah a siang hi. 
2Kings5:15 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa kiangah amah le a pawlte khempeuh kilehkikin ama mai ah ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “En in, leitung mun dang khempeuh ah Pasian om loin, Israel sung bekah om hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na nasem pa tung panin letsong khat hong sang in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:16 Ahih hangin amah in, “A na ka sep Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, bangmah kong sang kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a lak nading kunh teitei a, ahih hangin amah in nial veve hi." 
2Kings5:17 Tua ciangin Naaman in, “Tua ahihleh kong thum hi, na nasem pa tungah la-sakol nih puak khop leitang hong pia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tu a kipanin na nasem pa in meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin pasian dangte khat peuhpeuh tungah pia loin Topaʼ tung bekah pia ding hi." 
2Kings5:18 Ahi zongin hih thu ah Topa in na nasem pa a mawhna hong maisak hen: Rimmon biakinn sungah a bia dingin ka topa a pai ciangin zui ding ka hih manin Rimmon biakinn sungah kei ka kunna thu ah Topa in a nasem pa hong maisak hen,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:19 Amah in ama kiangah, “Nuam takin pai in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin ama kiang panin Naaman tawm khat a pai khit ciangin," 
2Kings5:20 Pasianʼ mipa Elishaʼ nasem Gehazi in, “Ama hong puak nate sang loin ka topa in Syria mi hih Naaman ciahsak mawk hi. Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, amah nungdelhin ama tung panin na khat peuhpeuh ka ngah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:21 Tua ahih ciangin Gehazi in Naaman nung delh hi. Tua ciangin ama nungah mi khat hong taina Naaman in a muh ciangin amah a dawn dingin a leeng panin kum a, “Thu a hoih kim hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:22 Tua ciangin amah in, “A vekpi-in hoih hi. Ka topa in, ‘Kamsangte nih Efraim mual tung gam panin kei kiangah tu mahmah in hong tung hi. Kong thum hi, amaute tungah ngun talen khat le pawipuan nih pia in,’ a ci dingin hong sawl hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:23 Tua ciangin Naaman in, “Talen nih hong sang nuam hoh in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a san ding kunh a, ngun talen nih ip nihin henin pawipuan nih tawh, a nasem nihte tungah a guan hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Gehaziʼ mai ah tuate pua uh hi." 
2Kings5:24 Tua ciangin mual tungah amah a tun ciangin amah in amaute tung panin tuate la-in inn sungah koih hi. Tua ciangin a mite sawl khia a, amaute kihem uh hi." 
2Kings5:25 Amah sung tumin a topaʼ mai ah dinga, tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Gehazi aw, koi ah pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Na nasem pa koimah pai lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings5:26 Ahih hangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Nangmah a dawn dingin a leeng tung panin mipa a kihei laitakin nang tawh ka kha om khawm hi lo ahi hiam? Sum le puante, oliv huante le leenggui lote, tuute le bawngtalte, nasem numeite le nasem pasalte san ding hun ahi hiam?" 
2Kings5:27 Tua ahih ciangin nangma tung le na suanlekhakte tungah Naamanʼ phakna hong belh tawntung tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama omna panin vuk bangin kangin a phakin a paikhia hi." 
2Kings6:1 Ni khat, kamsangte khat in Elisha kiangah, “Thei in, nangma khutnuai-a om koteʼ teenna mun kote adingin neu lua hi." 
2Kings6:2 Kote Jordan ah hong paisakin kote in singluang khat ciat la-in ka ten nading uh mun khat ko hong bawlsak in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Pai un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:3 Tua ciangin amaute khat in, “Na nasemte tawh kuan kawm ding hong ut in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kong kuan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tawh amah a kuan hi. Jordan a tun uh ciangin amaute in sing phuk uh hi. 
2Kings6:5 Ahih hangin khat in singluang a tan laitakin a heitang leengin tui sungah kia hi. Amah kiko-in, “Ala! ka topa! A kikawm hi veʼn,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:6 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa in, “Koi lai ah kia ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in a kiatna mun ama kiangah a lah ciangin amah in ciangkang khat khiakin tua munah lawn a, a heitang laam tosak hi." 
2Kings6:7 Tua ciangin amah in, “La to in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut zanin a heitang a la hi." 
2Kings6:8 Khat vei Syria kumpipa le Israel mite kido a, Syria kumpipa le a nasemte thu kikumin, “Tua mun tua munte i panmun ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:9 Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mipa in Israel kumpipa tungah thu puak a, “Syria-te in hong buk sim uh ahih manin hih mun na nawk loh nadingin kingaihsun in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:10 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Pasianʼ mipa genna mun kiimah a om mite kiangah mi sawlin hilh kholsak hi. Tua ahih manin tua bangin amaute suakta zelzel uh hi. 
2Kings6:11 Tua ciangin hih thu hangin Syria kumpipa nakpi takin patau hi. Amah in a nasemte samin amaute kiangah, “Eite sung panin Israel kumpipa lamah a pangsim mipa hong gen lo ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:12 Tua ciangin a nasemte khat in, “Kuamah om lo hi, ka topa, kumpipa aw; ahih hangin Israel sungah kamsang Elisha in na lupna inn dei sunga na thugente Israel kumpipa tungah gen hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:13 Tua ciangin amah in, “Keimah in mi sawlin amah ka mat theih nadingin pai inla, amah a omna mun va thei in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin ama kiangah, “En in, amah Dothan ah om hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Kings6:14 Tua ahih ciangin amah in sakolte le leengte le galkap hon lianpi khat tua lai ah a sawl hi. Amaute zanin hong pai-in a khuapi umcih uh hi. 
2Kings6:15 Pasianʼ mipaʼ nasem pa zingsangin tho baihin a paikhiat ciangin, en in, khuapi kimkot ah sakolte le leengte tawh galkap honpi na om hi. Tua ciangin nasem pa in, “Ala! ka topa! Bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:16 Amah in, “Kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tawh a omte sangin eite tawh a omte tam zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:17 Tua ciangin Elisha in thu ngenin, “ Topa aw, kong thum hi; amah in a muh theih nadingin ama mitte honsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tangvalpaʼ mitte honsak a, tua ciangin amah in mu hi. En in, Elishaʼ kimkot mual tung khempeuh sakolte le meileengte tawh kidim hi." 
2Kings6:18 Amah a sim dingin Syria-te hong pai suk ciangin Elisha in Topa kiangah thu ngenin, “Hih mite mittawtna tawh vat gawp in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Elishaʼ thungetna bangin amah in mittawtna tawh amaute vat gawp hi." 
2Kings6:19 Tua ciangin Elisha in amaute kiangah, “Hih pen a lampi hi lo a, hih zong a khuapi hi lo hi; hong zui un; na zon uh mipa kiangah note kong paipih ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in Samaria ah amaute a paipih hi." 
2Kings6:20 Amaute Samaria ah a lut phetin Elisha in, “ Topa aw, amaute in a muh theih nadingun hih miteʼ mitte honsak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amauʼ mitte honsak a, tua ciangin amaute in khua mu uh hi. Samaria khua sungah a om ahihna uh thei uh hi." 
2Kings6:21 Israel kumpipa in amaute a muh ciangin amah in Elisha kiangah, “Ka pa aw, amaute ka that ding hiam? Amaute ka that ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:22 Amah in dawngin, “Amaute na that kei ding hi. Na namsau le na thal tawh loin galmatin na lak sate that ding na hi hiam? Amaute in an ne-in tui a dawn khit ciangin a topa uh kiangah a ciahkik theih nadingun amauteʼ mai ah anletui lui in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:23 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute adingin pawi lianpi khat bawl hi. Amaute in an ne-in tui a dawn khit uh ciangin amaute sawl khia a, tua ciangin a topa uh kiangah amaute a ciah uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel gam a sim dingin Syria-te hong pai nawn lo uh hi." 
2Kings6:24 Tua khit ciangin Syria kumpipa Benhadad in a galkap buppi khawmin pai to a, Samaria a umcih hi." 
2Kings6:25 Amaute in a umcih hun sungteng, la lutang khat ngun shekel sawm giat, gam lo-uih bul hai khat ngun shekel nga-in a kizuak dongin Samaria ah kialpi lianpi a tung hi." 
2Kings6:26 Israel kumpipa kulhzang ah a pai laitakin numei khat ama tungah kiko-in, “Hong huh in, ka topa, Aw Kumpipa!” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:27 Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topa in nang hong huh ding ahih kei leh koi lai panin nang hong huh ding ka hi hiam? An ahi a, leenggahzu ahi zongin nei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:28 Tua ciangin kumpipa in tua nu dongin, “Na lungkhamna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hih numei in kei kiangah, ‘Tu ni-in amah i nek theih nadingin na tapa hong pia in; zing ciangin keima tapa i ne ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
2Kings6:29 Tua ahih ciangin kote in ka tapaʼ sa huanin ka ne uh hi. A zing ciangin keimah in ama kiangah, ‘Amah i nek theih nadingin na tapa hong pia in,’ ka ci hi. Ahih hangin tua nu in a tapa na seel hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:30 Kumpipa in tua numeiʼ thugente a zak ciangin ama puante bal kek hi. Kulhzang ah kumpipa pai kawikawi a, mite khuadakin amah a et uh ciangin amah in a sung lamah puanhampi a silh mu uh hi." 
2Kings6:31 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu ni-in Shafatʼ tapa Elishaʼ lutang a kitankhiat kei taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei tahen,” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:32 Elisha a inn sungah tu a, upate amah tawh tukhawm uh hi. Tu-in kumpipa in ama omna panin mi khat sawl khia hi. Ahih hangin kamtai pa a tun ma-in Elisha in upate kiangah, “Hih mi that pa in ka lutang a tan khia dingin hong sawlna na mu uh hiam? En un, kamtai pa hong tun ciangin kong khak unla, ama lang khat ah khauh takin kongkhak lencip un. Ama nungah a topaʼ kheging hong kiza hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings6:33 Amaute tawh amah a kiho laitakin ama kiangah kumpipa hong pai sukin, “Hih lungkhamna Topaʼ piansak hi lo ahi hiam! Bang hangin Topa in bang khat peuhpeuh a sep ding ngak lai ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:1 Ahih hangin Elisha in, “ Topaʼ thu za in. Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Zing ciang tu bang hunin Samaria kulh kongpi ah annel lawh khat shekel khatin kizuak dinga, mangbuhham lawh nih shekel khatin kizuak ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:2 Tua ciangin a ban tungah kumpipa a kingapna galkap ukpa in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah, “ Topa mahmah in vantung tawlette hong hong taleh zong, hih bang thu hi thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in, “Nangma mit mahmah tawh hih thu na mu dinga, ahih hangin nang in na ne kha kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:3 Tua laitakin kulh kongpi lutna ah a phak mi li om hi. Amaute khatlekhat in, “I sih dongin bang hangin hih lai ah tu ding ihi hiam?" 
2Kings7:4 Eite, ‘Khuapi sungah lut ni,’ ci lehang, khuapi sungah kialpi om a, tua lai ah i si ding hi. Hih lai ah tu lehang lah eite i si veve ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in hong pai un. Syria-teʼ giahphual ah va pai ni. Amaute in eite hong hingkhawi leh eite i nungta dinga, ahih hangin amaute in eite hong that leh zong a si veve ding mah ihi lel hi,” kici uh hi." 
2Kings7:5 Tua ahih ciangin nitak khuamial tungin amaute kithawi-in, Syria-teʼ phualah a pai uh hi. Ahih hangin Syria-teʼ phual a nawl a tun uh ciangin tua lai ah kuamah na om nawn lo hi." 
2Kings7:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leengte le galkap hon lianpiteʼ huging Syria galkapte zasak ahih ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “En un, Israel kumpipa in eite a hong hih dingin Hit kumpite le Egypt kumpite cial hi,” kici uh hi." 
2Kings7:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute nitak khuamial tungin tai-in a puanbukte, a sakolte le a late uh nusia uh a, a phual uh a tua ci bangmahin nusia-in a suahtak nadingun tai uh hi." 
2Kings7:8 Giahphual nawl ah hih miphakte hong tun uh ciangin puanbuk khat sungah amaute lutin an ne-in tui dawn uh a, amaute in ngun le kham le puante pua khia-in tuate a seel uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute hong paikikin puanbuk dang khat ah lut uh a, tua panin vante pua khia-in seel leuleu uh hi." 
2Kings7:9 Tua ciangin amaute khatlekhat in, “A manin i gamta kei hi. Tu ni pen thu thak a hoih i theih ni ahi hi. Eite pau loin zingsang khuavak dong ngak lehang gimna i thuak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in hong pai un. Eite pai-in kumpipa innkuante kiangah va gen ni,” kici uh hi." 
2Kings7:10 Tua ahih ciangin amaute hong pai-in kulh kongpi cingte samin amaute kiangah, “Syria-teʼ phualah ka va tung uh a, tua lai ah kuamah kimu lo, bangmah kiza lo, bangmah om lo; ahih hangin sakolte kikhihin, late kikhihin, puanbukte a om bangbangin om hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
2Kings7:11 Tua ciangin kulh kongpi cingte in thu zasak uh a, kumpipa innkuante kiangah hih thute kigen hi." 
2Kings7:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa zanin tho-in a nasemte kiangah, “Syria-te in eiteʼ lang khat ah a vaihawmna kong gen ding hi. Eite i kialna amaute in hong thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute gamlak ah a bu dingin a phual panin paikhia uh a, ‘Khuapi sung panin amaute a paikhiat uh ciangin amaute a hingin manin khuapi sungah i lut ding hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:13 Tua ciangin a nasemte khat in, “Mi pawl khat sakol a omlaite sung panin nga paipihsak ni. Hih lai ah a om eite pen a si sa Israel mihon buppi tawh a kibang lel ihihna i thei hi. Amaute sawlin en dih ni,” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:14 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in sakol tung tuang mi nih sam a, kumpipa in Syria galkapteʼ nungah amaute sawl a, “Pai-in va thei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings7:15 Tua ahih ciangin amaute Jordan ciang dong va pai uh hi. Syria-te in nawhsa-in a paihkhiat uh puante le nate tawh lamdung khempeuh pak zeizai hi. Tua ciangin kamtaite hong kikin kumpipa kiangah a gen uh hi. 
2Kings7:16 Tua ciangin mite paikhia uh a, Syria-teʼ phual luh uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ gen sa bangin annel lawh khat shekel khatin kizuakin, mangbuhham lawh nih shekel khatin kizuak hi." 
2Kings7:17 A khut tungah a kingapna pa, a ukpa pen kulh kongpi a ukin kumpipa in seh hi. Mite in kulh kongpi ah amah nawk pai-in a tung sikin pai uh a, ama kiangah kumpipa a pai suk laitakin Pasianʼ mipa gen sa bangin amah na si hi." 
2Kings7:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ mipa in kumpipa kiangah, “Zing ciang tu bang hunin Samaria kulh kongpi ah mangbuhham lawh nih ciangin shekel khatin kizuak dinga, annel lawh khat ciangin shekel khatin kizuak ding hi,” a cih ciangin" 
2Kings7:19 galkap ukpa in Pasianʼ mipa dawngin, “ Topa mahmah in vantung tawlette hong hong hitaleh zong, hih bang thu hi thei ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma mit mahmah tawh hih thu na mu dinga, ahih hangin nang in na ne kha kei ding hi,” ci hi." 
2Kings7:20 Mite in kulh kongpi ah ama tung sikin pai uh hi. Amah si ahih manin ama tungtawnin tua bangin a kipai ahi hi. 
2Kings8:1 Tu-in Elisha in a tapa a hinkiksak numei kiangah, “Ding in; na innkuan tawh kihem khia inla, na hih theihna peuhpeuh ah peem in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kialpi khat tungsak dinga, gam sungah tua kialpi kum sagih sung hong tung ding hi,” ci khinzo hi." 
2Kings8:2 Tua ahih ciangin tua numei dingin Pasianʼ mipa thugen bangin gamta hi. Tua nu a innkuan tawh pai-in Filistia-te gamah kum sagih sung a peem hi. 
2Kings8:3 Kum sagih a cin khit, Filistia-te gam panin tua numei hong ciahkik ciangin, kumpipa kiangah a inn le a leitang a ngen dingin a pai hi." 
2Kings8:4 Tua laitakin Pasianʼ mipaʼ nasem Gehazi tawh kumpipa kiho a, “Elishaʼ sep sa na lian khempeuh hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:5 Elisha in a si sa mi a hinsakna thu kumpipa kiangah a gen laitakin, a tapa a hinkiksak numei in kumpipa kiangah a inn le a leitang hong ngen hi. Tua ciangin Gehazi in, “Ka topa, Kumpipa aw, hih lai ah a numei om a, Elisha in a hinkiksak a tapa zong hih lai ah om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:6 Kumpipa in numei kiangah a dot ciangin tua nu in ama kiangah a gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in a uliante khat sawlin, “Leitang a nusiat ni a kipan tu hun dong lo panin a piang khempeuh tawh ama aʼ ahi khempeuh piakik in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:7 Syria kumpipa Benhadad cina-in a om laitakin Damaskas ah Elisha hong pai hi. Ama kiangah, “Hih lai ah Pasianʼ mipa hong pai hi,” ci-in a kigen ciangin" 
2Kings8:8 kumpipa in ama nuai-a ulian Hazael kiangah, “Letsong khat kengin Pasianʼ mipa a dawn dingin va pai in. Ama tungtawnin Topa thu va dong inla, ‘Hih natna panin ka damkik zo ding hiam, ci hi,’ va ci in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:9 Tua ahih ciangin amah a dawn dingin Hazael pai a, Damaskas a na hoih namkim kalaoh puak sawm li, letsong a keng hi. Amah hong tungin ama mai ah a din ciangin amah in, “Syria kumpipa na tapa Benhadad in nang kiangah kei hong sawlin, ‘Hih natna panin ka damkik zo ding hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:10 Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Pai in; ama kiangah gen in, ‘Na damkik taktak ding hi,’ va ci in. Ahi zongin amah a sih taktak nading thu Topa in kei kiangah hong lak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:11 Tua ciangin amah a maizum dongin a etna mun mah en denin Hazael sal gega hi. Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa a kap hi. 
2Kings8:12 Tua ciangin Hazael in, “Bang hangin ka topa kap na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite tungah nangmah in na bawl ding siatna ka thei hi. Nangmah in amauʼ mun muanhuaite mei tawh na hal dinga, namsau tawh amauʼ tangvalte thatin, amauʼ naupang neute lei na den khap nadinga, naupaii amauʼ numeite na phel kham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:13 Tua ciangin Hazael in, “Ui bang ahi lel na nasem pa in hih na lian a hih dingin bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Elisha in dawngin, “Syria tungah nang kumpi na hih ding thu Topa in kei tungah hong lak khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:14 Tua ciangin Elisha kiang panin amah kihem khia a, ama kiangah, “Elisha in nang kiangah bang hong ci ahi hiam?” a na ci Benhadad kiangah va tung hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Amah in kei kiangah nang na damkik taktak nading thu hong gen hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings8:15 Ahih hangin amah in a zing ciangin delhphah puan khat la-in tui sungah tua puan diah a, tua puan kawt tawh kumpipaʼ maitang tuamcipin a sisak hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin Hazael kumpi a suak hi." 
2Kings8:16 Israel kumpi, Ahabʼ tapa Joramʼ kum ngana kumin, Judah kumpi, Jehoshafatʼ tapa Jehoram in uk ding kipan hi." 
2Kings8:17 Amah kumpi a suah hunin ama pian kum sawm thum le nih pha a, Jerusalem ah kum giat sung a uk hi." 
2Kings8:18 Ahabʼ tanu ama zi ahih manin Ahabʼ innkuanteʼ gamtatna sa, Israel kumpiteʼ lampi mah amah in tawn hi. Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi." 
2Kings8:19 Ahi zongin amah in ama tung le a suante tungah ukna a piak ding thu ciam khin ahih manin a nasem Davidʼ hangin Topa in Judah gam susia nuam lo hi. 
2Kings8:20 Ama hun sungin Judah gam ukna panin Edom mite leng khia-in amau ading kumpi khat koih uh hi. 
2Kings8:21 Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoram zong a leengte khempeuh tawh Zair ah a kuan hi. Tua lai ah Edom mite in amaute na umcih uh a, ahi zongin zanin amaute kipanin amah le a leeng ukte in Edom mite vat gawpin inn ah a tai uh hi." 
2Kings8:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin Judah gam ukna panin Edom mite leeng khia hi. Tua ciangin tua hun mahin Libnah leeng khia leuleu hi. 
2Kings8:23 Jehoramʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama sep khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings8:24 Tua ciangin Jehoram si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Ahaziah in uk hi." 
2Kings8:25 Israel kumpi, Ahabʼ tapa Joramʼ kum sawm le kum nihna kumin, Judah kumpi, Jehoramʼ tapa Ahaziah in uk ding kipan hi." 
2Kings8:26 Amah in uk ding a kipatin Ahaziah kum sawm nih le nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum khat sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Athaliah hi a, Israel kumpi Omriʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings8:27 Amah zong Ahabʼ innkuanteʼ makpa ahih manin Ahabʼ innkuanteʼ gamtat sa bangin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta a, Ahabʼ innkuanteʼ lampi mah a tawn hi." 
2Kings8:28 Syria kumpipa Hazael tawh gal kido dingin Ahabʼ tapa Joram tawh kipawlin Ahaziah a kuan hi. Syria mite in a gal kidona mun Ramoth-gilead ah Israel kumpi Joram liamsak uh hi. 
2Kings8:29 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa Hazael a sim laitakin Syria mite in amah a liamsakna mate Jezreel khua ah a kidamsak dingin kumpi Joram ciahkik hi. Jezreel ah Ahabʼ tapa Joram a cina-in om ahih manin a veh dingin Judah kumpi Jehoramʼ tapa Ahaziah va pai suk hi. 
2Kings9:1 Tua ciangin kamsang Elisha in kamsangteʼ sung pan khat samin ama kiangah, “Kithawi inla, hih sathau biing tawi-in Ramoth-gilead ah va pai in." 
2Kings9:2 Na tun ciangin Nimshiʼ tapa Jehoshafat, a tapa Jehu tua lai ah va zong in. Tua ciangin pai-in a lawmte lak panin a paikhiat ding sawl inla, inn dei sung nung khat sungah amah paipih in." 
2Kings9:3 Tua ciangin sathau biing la-in ama lu tungah sung inla, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel tungah kumpi-in sathau kong nilh hi, ci hi,’ va ci in. Tua ciangin kongkhak hong inla tai in; zekai kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:4 Tua ahih ciangin kamsang tangvalpa Ramoth-gilead ah pai hi. 
2Kings9:5 Amah a tun ciangin, galkap a ukte in thu kikupna na nei uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A ukpa aw, nang tungah thugen ding khat ka nei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in, “Kote lakah kuaʼ tungah nei na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Nangma tung hi, a ukpa aw,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah dingin inn khat sungah a pai khawm uh hi. Tua ciangin tangvalpa in ama lu tungah a sathau sungin ama kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel mite tung, Topaʼ mite tungah kumpi-in nang sathau kong nilh hi." 
2Kings9:7 Kamsang ka nasemte a thahna le Topaʼ nasemte khempeuh a thahna hangin Jezebelʼ tungah phu ka lak theih nadingin na topa Ahabʼ innkuan na sat puk ding hi. 
2Kings9:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ahab innkuan sia ding hi. Israel sungah keimah in Ahab innkuan panin sal hitaleh sal ahi lo hitaleh pasal khempeuh ka beisak ding hi. 
2Kings9:9 Tua ciangin keimah in Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam innkuan le Ahijahʼ tapa Baashaʼ innkuan bangin Ahabʼ innkuan ka bawl ding hi. 
2Kings9:10 Tua ciangin uite in Jezreel khua sungah Jezebel ne-in, kuamah in amah vui lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in kongkhak hongin a tai khia hi." 
2Kings9:11 A topaʼ nasemte kiangah Jehu hong pusuah ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Thu khempeuh a hoih hiam? Bang hangin hih mihai pa nang kiangah hong pai ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “A mipa le a thugen na thei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tua thu ka thei kei uh hi. Tu-in ko kiangah hong gen in,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua bang tua bangin amah in kei kiangah thu hong genin, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Israel tungah kumpi-in nang sathau kong nilh hi,” ci hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:13 Tua ciangin nawhsa-in mi khempeuh in a puan uh la-in ama din nadingin kahlei tungah phah uh a, tua ciangin amaute in peengkul tumin, “Jehu, kumpi hi,” ci-in a taangko uh hi." 
2Kings9:14 Tua ciangin Nimshiʼ tapa Jehoshafat, a tapa Jehu in Joram sawm sim hi. (Tu-in Syria kumpi Hazael langpangin Ramoth-gilead ah Israel khempeuh tawh khua cingin Joram om hi." 
2Kings9:15 Ahih hangin Syria kumpi Hazael tawh a kido lai-in Syria-te in amah a liamsakna mate Jezreel khua ah a kidamsak dingin Kumpi Joram ciahkik khinta hi.) Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in a ulianpihte kiangah, “Kei hong pawlpih nuam peuhmah in, mi khatpeuh Jezreel ah pai-in thu a va ko dingin hih khuapi panin kuamah a paikhiat khak loh nading thei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:16 Tua ciangin Jehu a leeng tungah kahin Jezreel ah pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai ah Joram lum hi. A tun ciangin Joramʼ kiangah a hawh dingin Judah kumpipa Ahaziah na tung khin hi. 
2Kings9:17 Tua laitakin Jezreel tausang tungah galvil pa dinga, amah hong pai laitakin Jehuʼ pawlte amah in mu khia a, “Mi hon khat ka mu hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Joram in, “Sakol tung tuang mi khat la-in amaute a dawn dingin sawl inla, ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ cisak in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:18 Tua ahih ciangin sakol tung tuangin amah a dawn dingin mi khat pai a, “Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in, “Thuhoih tawh bang hih ding na hi hiam? Kihem inla ka nungah hong pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin galvil pa in thu zasakin, “Kamtai pa in amaute kiang ban a, ahih hangin amah hong kilehkik lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:19 Tua ciangin amah in sakol tung tuang a nihna sawlin amaute kiangah tua pa paisak a, “Kumpipa in hih bangin hong ci khin hi: ‘Thuhoih ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in dawngin, “Thuhoih tawh bang hih ding na hi hiam? Kihem inla ka nungah hong pai in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:20 Galvil pa in thu zasakkikin, “Amah in amaute va ban a, ahih hangin amah zong hong kilehkik lo hi. A leeng hawl zia pen Nimshiʼ tapa Jehuʼ hawl tawh kibang hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in nakpi takin nawh hawl hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:21 Tua ciangin Joram in, “Kithawi un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a leeng kithawisak uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Joram le Judah kumpipa Ahaziah, a sakol leeng tuak uh ah tuangin ding khia uh a, Jehu a dawntuah dingin pai uh a, Jezreel mi Nabothʼ lo ah amah tawh kituak uh hi." 
2Kings9:22 Joram in Jehu a muh ciangin, “Jehu aw, thuhoih ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Na nu Jezebelʼ paktatnate le aisannate tua zahin a tam lai teng bang thuhoih om thei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:23 Tua ciangin Joram in a sakol kamkaih lehhei-in tai a, Ahaziah kiangah, “Ahaziah aw, gal om!” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:24 Tua ciangin Jehu in a tha neih khempeuh tawh a thal keekin Joramʼ liangko kikal kap a, a thaltang in a lungtang pailetin a leeng sungah amah a puk suk hi." 
2Kings9:25 Jehu in amah a huhpa Bidkar kiangah, “Amah tawm to inla, Jezreel mi Nabothʼ neihsa lo lai ah amah paai in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang le kei, a pa Ahabʼ nungah mai kimin i tuan laitakin amah langpangin Topa in hih thu a genna phawk in:" 
2Kings9:26 ‘Za ni-in Naboth le a tapate a kithahna ka muh taktak mah bangin leitang tung hih munah nang kong thuk ding hi,’ Topa in ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topaʼ thugen bangin amah tawmin tua mun leitang tungah amah paai in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:27 Judah kumpipa Ahaziah in hih thu a muh ciangin Beth-haggan lamah a tai hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in amah delhin, “Amah zong kap un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Ibleam gei, Gur kah tohna san a leeng sungah amah kap uh hi. Ahih hangin amah Megiddo khuapi ciang dong tai zo lai a, tua khua ah a si hi." 
2Kings9:28 A nasemte in leeng khat tawh Jerusalem ah amah pua uh a, David khuapi sung ama hanah a vui uh hi." 
2Kings9:29 Ahabʼ tapa Joramʼ kum sawm le kum khatna kumin Ahaziah in Judah tungah uk ding a kipan ahi hi. 
2Kings9:30 Jezreel khua ah Jehu hong tun ciangin Jezebel in a thu na za hi. Amah in a mitte zutin a lutang zem a, tawlet ah khuadak hi." 
2Kings9:31 Kulh kongpi ah Jehu hong lut laitakin Jezebel in, “Nang Zimri! A topa a that pa aw, bang hih a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:32 Tua ciangin tawlet lamah Jehu khuadak to-in, “Keiʼ lamah kua om na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Inn sung mangte nih khawng thum khawng in amah hong en suk hi." 
2Kings9:33 Jehu in, “Amah hong lawn suk un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jezebel lawn suk uh hi. A sisan pawl khat kulh tung le sakolte tungah kitheh a, tua ciangin amaute in amah tuancil uh hi." 
2Kings9:34 Tua ciangin amaute sung tumin an ne-in tui a dawn uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-in a kisamsia hih numei tawm unla, phum un. Bangbang ahi ta zongin amah kumpipaʼ tanu hibuang hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings9:35 Ahih hangin amah a phum dingin amaute a pai uh ciangin a luguh le a khete le a khut peek sim loh bangmah dang mu nawn lo uh hi. 
2Kings9:36 Amaute hong paikikin Jehu kiangah a gen uh ciangin amah in, “Hih pen a nasem pa, Tishbe mi Elijah tungtawnin Topaʼ gen sa ahi hi: ‘Jezreel khua sungah uite in Jezebelʼ sa ne ding uh hi." 
2Kings9:37 Tua ciangin Jezebelʼ luanghawm pen Jezreel khua sung lei maitang tungah eklei tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih manin kuamah in, “Hih pen Jezebel hi,” cih thei lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:1 Tu-in Ahabʼ suanlekhak mihing sawm sagih Samaria ah teeng uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in laikhakte gelh a, khuapi ukte, upate le Ahabʼ suanlekhak a kemte tung Samaria ah tua laite khakin," 
2Kings10:2 “Tu-in hih lai na ngah phetun, na topa uh suante note tawh omin, leengte le sakolte, kulh a nei khuapite zong le hiamte na neihna uh thei un." 
2Kings10:3 Na topa uh suante sung pan a hoih pen le a kilawm pen teelin a paʼ kumpi tokhom tungah tusak unla, na topa uh innkuan adingin do un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:4 Ahih hangin amaute nakpi takin lau uh a, “En un, kumpi nihte in amah nang zo lo uh ahih ciangin eite in bangci nan zawh ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings10:5 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn a ukte le khuapi a ukte in upate le a kemte tawh kigawmin Jehu kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Kote nangma nasemte ka hi uh a, nong sawl khempeuh ka hih ding uh hi. Khat zong kumpi-in ka bawl kei ding uh hi; hoih na sak bangbangin hong hih in,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings10:6 Tua ciangin Jehu in amaute kiangah laikhak nihna gelhin, “Note kei lamah omin, keima thu a mang dingin a kiging na hih uh leh, na topa uh Ahabʼ suanlekhakteʼ lutangte hong la unla, zing ciang tu bang hunin kei kiang Jezreel ah hong puak un,” a ci hi. Tu-in kumpipaʼ suanlekhak mihing sawm sagihte pen amaute a khoi khuapi makaite tawh om khawm uh hi." 
2Kings10:7 Amaute kiangah a laikhak a tun ciangin amaute in kumpipaʼ suanlekhak tua mihing sawm sagihte that uh a, a lutangte seeng sungah guangin Jehu kiang Jezreel ah a puak uh hi." 
2Kings10:8 Kamtai pa hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Amaute in kumpipaʼ suanlekhakteʼ lutangte hong paipih uh hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin amah in, “Zingsang mateng kulh kongpi lutna ah khawl nihin koih un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:9 Zingsangin amah a paikhiat ciangin tua mite khempeuh kiangah, “Note na paubaang kei uh hi. Kumpi Joram sawm simin a that pa keimah ka hi hi. Ahih hangin hihte khempeuh a sat tuk kua ahi hiam?" 
2Kings10:10 Ahabʼ innkuan tawh kizomin Topa in a gen thu, Topaʼ kammal khat zong lei ah kia lo ding hi, ci-in thei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a nasem pa Elijah kiangah a gen sa thu Topa in sem khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:11 Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in kuamah a siit nawn loh dongin Jezreel khua sungah Ahabʼ innkuan a omlaite, a behte le a lawm mel theihte le a siampite khempeuh a that hi." 
2Kings10:12 Tua ciangin amah ding khia-in Samaria ah a pai hi. Lamkal, Tuucingteʼ Buk a tun laitakin," 
2Kings10:13 Jehu in Judah kumpi Ahaziahʼ behte tuak a, amah in, “Kuate na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in dawngin, “Ahaziahʼ behte ka hi uh a, Jezreel khua-a om kumpinuʼ tapate le kumpi ta dangte kiangah a hawh dingin hong pai suk ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings10:14 Amah in a mite kiangah, “Hingmat un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tua mite hing mat uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute thatin tua lai-a om dum sungah amaute mi sawm li le nih a sisa-in lawn suk uh a, amah in amaute khat zong hingkhawi lo hi." 
2Kings10:15 Tua lai panin amah a kihepkhiat ciangin amah a dawn dingin a hong pai Rekhabʼ tapa Jehonadab tawh kituak hi. Jehu in tua pa hopihin ama kiangah, “Keima lungsim nang tungah a thuman bangin nangʼ lungsim keiʼ tungah a thuman hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehonadab in dawngin, “Man hi,” a ci hi. Jehu in, “A man leh na khut hong khak in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut a khak hi. Tua ciangin Jehu in leeng sungah amah kai to hi." 
2Kings10:16 Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei hong zui inla, Topa ading ka deih luatna hong thei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jehu in a leeng sungah amah tuangsak hi." 
2Kings10:17 Samaria ah a tun ciangin Topa in Elijahʼ tungah a gen bangin Jehu in amaute a siakkhiat dongin Samaria sunga Ahab mi a omlaite khempeuh a that khin hi. 
2Kings10:18 Tua ciangin Jehu in mi khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Ahab in Baal na tawm khat sem a, ahi zongin Jehu in tampi sem zaw ding hi." 
2Kings10:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Baal kamsangte khempeuh le a siampite khempeuh kei kiangah hong sam un. Baal tungah biakpiakna lianpi nei ding ka hih manin kuamah pelhemsak kei un. A pelhem peuhmah nungta lo ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Baal a biate a suksiat theih nadingin Jehu in ngian tawh a hih ahi hi." 
2Kings10:20 Tua ciangin Jehu in thu pia-in, “Baal adingin a thupi kikhopna khat bawl un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua thu zasak uh hi." 
2Kings10:21 Tua ciangin Jehu in Israel sung khempeuh ah thu zasak hi. Baal a bia khempeuh hong pai uh a, hong pai lo mi khat zong om lo hi. Tua ciangin Baal biakinn sungah amaute lut uh a, Baal biakinn mong khat pan mong khat dong a dim uh hi." 
2Kings10:22 Amah in puan koihna a ukpa kiangah, “Baal a biate khempeuh adingin puante hong la in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute-aʼ dingin a puante hong paikhiatpih hi." 
2Kings10:23 Tua ciangin Rekhabʼ tapa Jehonadab tawh Baal biakinn sungah Jehu a tum hi. Tua ciangin amah in Baal a biate kiangah, “Hih lai ah Baal a biate bek omin noteʼ lakah Topaʼ nasemte a om loh nading thei unla, zong un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:24 Tua ciangin biakpiaknate le meihal biaknate a pia dingin amah a tum hi. Tu-in Jehu in a pua lamah mi sawm giat koih a, “Na khut sung uh ah kong piakte khat peuhpeuh a khahsuah pa in ama nuntakna tawh loh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:25 Tua ahih ciangin meihal biakna a bawl a man khit phetin Jehu in a cingte le uliante kiangah, “Sung tum unla, amaute that un; mi khat zong suaktasak kei un,” a ci hi. Amaute in namsau tawh a thah khit uh ciangin a cingte le uliante in amaute lawn khia uh a, tua ciangin Baal biakinn sung nung dei ah tumin," 
2Kings10:26 Baal biakinn sunga om biakna song paikhiat pihin a hal uh hi. 
2Kings10:27 Tua ciangin amaute in Baal biakna song susia-in, Baal biakinn susia uh a, tu ni dongin ekbuk a suaksak uh hi." 
2Kings10:28 Tua bangin Jehu in Israel sung panin Baal siak khia hi. 
2Kings10:29 Ahih hangin Bethel le Dan ah a om kham bawngnote ahi, Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin Jehu kihei khia lo hi." 
2Kings10:30 Tua ciangin Topa in Jehu kiangah, “Nangmah in keima muhna ah a man thu limtakin na sepna hang le ka lungsimah a om bangin Ahabʼ innkuan tungah na bawlna hangin, na suante khang lina dongin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings10:31 Ahih hangin Jehu in a lungsim khempeuh tawh Israel Pasian, Topaʼ thukham limtakin zuih ding ngaihsun lo hi. Israel-te a khialhsakna ahi Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin amah kihei lo hi." 
2Kings10:32 Tua hun lai-in Topa in Israel gam pawl khat khenkhiat ding kipan hi. Hazael in Israel gam sung khempeuh ah amaute zo hi. 
2Kings10:33 Jordan panin nisuahna lam, Gilead gam khempeuh, Gad mite, Reuben mite le Manasseh mite, Arnon kuam gei-a om Aroer panin Gilead le Bashan gam khempeuh a zo gawp hi." 
2Kings10:34 Tu-in Jehuʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a sep khempeuh le ama thahatnate khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings10:35 Tua ciangin Jehu si a, amaute in Samaria ah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tapa Jehoahaz in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Kings10:36 Jehu in Samaria panin Israel tungah kum sawm nih le giat sung a uk hi. 
2Kings11:1 Ahaziahʼ nu Athaliah in a tapa a sihna a theih ciangin amah kipanin kumpi innkuan khempeuh thatsak hi. 
2Kings11:2 Ahih hangin Ahaziahʼ sanggamnu, Kumpi Joramʼ tanu Jehosheba in Ahaziahʼ tapa Joash la-in, thah dingin a kikoih kumpipaʼ tapate lak panin amah gu khia a, biakinn sung lupna inn dei sungah amah le a cingnu a koih hi. Tua bangin tua nu in Athaliah kiang panin amah seel a, tua ahih manin amah kithat kha lo hi." 
2Kings11:3 Athaliah in Israel gam sungah a uk sungteng a cingnu tawh amah kum guk sung omin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a bu hi. 
2Kings11:4 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna kumin siampi Jehoiada in mi sawlin Kar mite le kumpi inncing a ukte kiangah paisak a, Topaʼ biakinn sung ama kiangah samsak hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute tungah a ngaihsutna genin Topaʼ biakinn sungah kiciamna khat bawl uh a, amah in amaute kiangah kumpipaʼ tapa a lak hi." 
2Kings11:5 Tua ciangin amah in amaute thu pia a, “Note hih bangin na gamta ding uh hi: Sabbath ni-in nasep pengin kumpipa inn a cing no seh thum ah seh khatte in" 
2Kings11:6 (a dang seh thum ah seh khatte Sur kulh kongpi ah omin a dang seh thum ah seh khatte a cingteʼ nung kulh kongpi ah om hi) kumpi inn na cing ding uh hi. 
2Kings11:7 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni-in na semin Topaʼ biakinn a cing no a khen nihte in 
2Kings11:8 na khut sung uh ah na hiam ciat uh tawh kumpi Joash na cing ding uh hi. Note kiang nai ah a hong pai peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ciang le a sung tum ciangin amah na cing ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings11:9 A ukte in siampi Jehoiadaʼ thupiak khempeuh bangin hih uh a, Sabbath ni-in nasep a sem dingte tawh Sabbath ni-in ama mi nasep a peng dingte hong paipih ciat uh a, siampi Jehoiada kiangah hong tung uh hi." 
2Kings11:10 Tua ciangin siampipa in a ukte tungah Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om David-aʼ ahi teipite le lumte a pia hi. 
2Kings11:11 Tua ciangin biakinn leitaw lam pang, biakna tau le biakinn kimkot ah mi khempeuh a khut uh ah a hiam ciat uh tawh a cingin a ding uh hi." 
2Kings11:12 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipaʼ tapa paikhiat pihin, ama lu tungah kumpi lukhu khusak a, kumpi hihna teci panna lai amah a pia hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah kumpi hi, ci-in taangko-in amah sathau a nilh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a khut uh bengin, “Kumpipa khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings11:13 Athaliah in a cingte le miteʼ gamlumna a zak ciangin miteʼ kiang Topaʼ biakinn sungah a pai hi. 
2Kings11:14 Amah a khuadak ciangin a ngeina ding bangin biakna song gei ah kumpi thak pa dingin, kumpipa gei ah a ukte le peengkul tumte om a, tua gam mi khempeuh in lungdamin peengkul na tum uh hi. Tua ciangin Athaliah in a puante bal kekin kiko a, “Sawm simna! Sawm simna!” a ci hi." 
2Kings11:15 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in galkap a ukte thu pia-in, “A pua ah tua nu paikhiatpih un. Amah a panpih peuhmah namsau tawh that un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa in, “ Topaʼ biakinn sungah amah that kei un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings11:16 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nu man uh a, Kumpipaʼ inn lutna Sakol Kongpi a tun ciangin tua lai ah amah kithat hi." 
2Kings11:17 Tua ciangin Jehoiada in amaute Topaʼ mi ahih nading uh Topa le kumpipa le mite kikalah thuciamna khat bawl a, kumpipa le mite kikalah zong a bawl hi." 
2Kings11:18 Tua ciangin tua gam mi khempeuh Baal biakinn ah pai-in a biakinn a phelkek uh hi. A biakna taute le a milimte amaute in sukham uh a, amaute in biakna taute mai ah Baal siampi Mattan a that uh hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in Topaʼ biakinn ah galvilte a koih hi." 
2Kings11:19 Tua ciangin amah in a ukte, a cingte le tua gam mi khempeuh kaikhawm hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn panin kumpipa paipih suk uh a, a Cingteʼ Kongpi tawnin kumpipaʼ inn ah a pai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpiteʼ kumpi tokhom tungah amah hong tu hi." 
2Kings11:20 Tua ahih ciangin tua gam mi khempeuh a lungdam uh hi. Kumpipaʼ inn ah namsau tawh Athaliah a kithah khit ciangin khuapi sung a gamdai hi. 
2Kings11:21 Joash in uk ding a kipat ciangin ama khan kum sagih pha pan hi. 
2Kings12:1 Jehuʼ kum sagihna kumin Joash in uk ding kipan a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm li sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Zibiah hi a, Beer-sheba khuami ahi hi." 
2Kings12:2 Siampi Jehoiada in amah thuhilh ahih manin Joash in ama uk hunsung tawntung Topaʼ muhna ah a man gamta hi. 
2Kings12:3 Ahi zongin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi. 
2Kings12:4 Joash in siampite kiangah, “Pasianʼ biakinn sungah a kipaipih a siangtho nateʼ man sum khempeuh, a milipin piak dingin a kiseh sum le amauʼ utthu tawh Pasianʼ biakinn ah a kipaipih sumte," 
2Kings12:5 nomauʼ nasepna mite ciat panin no siampite in khawm un. Tua ciangin biakinn puahphat nading a kisapna a kimuhna khempeuh puahsak un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings12:6 Ahih hangin Kumpi Joashʼ uk kum sawm nih le thumna kum dongin siampite in biakinn puah kipan nai lo uh hi. 
2Kings12:7 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Joash in siampi Jehoiada le siampi dangte samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin biakinn puah lo na hi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na nasepna uh mite kiang panin na sum lakte uh kem nawn kei unla, a sumte biakinn puah nadingin ap un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings12:8 Tua ahih ciangin mite tung pan sum kaihkhop tavuan la nawn loin, biakinn puah ding zong tavuan a lak nawn loh nading uh siampite a thukim uh hi." 
2Kings12:9 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in singkuang khat la-in a siin vut vang a, Topaʼ biakinn sung tum ciangin taklam pang khuam gei ah a koih hi. Tua ciangin kongkhak a cing siampite in Topaʼ biakinn sungah a kipaipih sum khempeuh tua sungah a koih uh hi." 
2Kings12:10 Singkuang sungah sum tam om hi, ci-in a theih peuhpeuh uh ciangin kumpipaʼ lai-at pa le siampi lianpen pa hong pai to-in Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om sumte amaute in simin ip-in tun uh hi." 
2Kings12:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a en nasemteʼ khut sungah a tawi tehkhiat uh sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a sem khutsiamte le innlamte tung," 
2Kings12:12 le leilesuang inn lam siamte le suangseekte tungah Topaʼ biakinn puah nadingin sing lei nading le suang tawh nading le biakinn puahna khat peuhpeuh a zat dingin pia khia uh hi. 
2Kings12:13 Ahih hangin Topaʼ biakinn adingin ngun kuangte, taitehte, haite, peengkulte, ahih kei leh kham ahi a, ngun nazat khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, Topaʼ biakinn ah a kipaipih sumte panin kibawl lo hi." 
2Kings12:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ biakinn a puah nasemte tungah tua sumte kipia hi. 
2Kings12:15 Amaute in thuman takin na sem uh ahih manin nasemte tungah piak dingin a khut sung uh ah sum a apnate uh tung panin amaute in sazian ngen lo uh hi. 
2Kings12:16 Mawhna hanga piak sum le khialhna hanga piak sumte Topaʼ biakinn sungah kipaipih lo hi; tuate pen siampite-aʼ ahi hi. 
2Kings12:17 Tua hun laitakin Syria kumpipa Hazael kuan to-in Gath simin a la hi. Ahih hangin Hazael in Jerusalem simin a pai to dingin a mai a ngat ciangin," 
2Kings12:18 Judah kumpi Joash in Judah kumpite ahi ama hun ma-a sem Jehoshafat, Jehoram le Ahaziah-teʼ ap sa thuciam piakna letsongte khempeuh le ama thuciam piakna letsongte le Topaʼ biakinn le kumpipaʼ sum koihnate ah a om kham khempeuh la-in Syria kumpipa Hazael kiangah a puak hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem panin Hazael a paikhia hi." 
2Kings12:19 Tu-in Joashʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings12:20 Ama nasemte kipanin sawm simna khat vaihawm uh a, Silla pai sukna lampi, Millo inn sungah Joash a that uh hi." 
2Kings12:21 Amah a sat pukte pen ama nasemte, Shimeathʼ tapa Jozakar le Shomerʼ tapa Jehozabad ahi hi; tua hi a, amah si ta hi. Tua ciangin amaute in David khuapi sungah a pate tawh amah vui uh a, ama tangin a tapa Amaziah in a uk hi." 
2Kings13:1 Judah kumpi, Ahaziahʼ tapa Joashʼ kum sawm nih le thumna kumin, Jehuʼ tapa Jehoahaz in Samaria panin Israel uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawm le kum sagih sung uk hi." 
2Kings13:2 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a, Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate zui hi. Tuate panin amah kihem khia lo hi." 
2Kings13:3 Tua ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa heh a, amah in Syria kumpipa Hazaelʼ khut sung le Hazaelʼ tapa Benhadadʼ khut sungah amaute pia tawntung hi." 
2Kings13:4 Tua ciangin Jehoahaz in Topaʼ tungah thum a, Topa in a thu ngai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpipa in amaute a nenniamna mu hi." 
2Kings13:5 (Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel tungah honpa khat pia hi. Tua ahih manin Syria-teʼ khut sung panin amaute suakta uh hi. Tua ciangin a nidang a bangin Israel-te a inn uh ah teeng uh hi. 
2Kings13:6 Ahi zongin Israel a khialhsakna, Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin amaute kihem khia lo uh a, amaute in tuate zui uh hi. Asherah milim zong Samaria mahah om lai hi.)" 
2Kings13:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jehoahaz adingin galkap sakol tung tuang sawm nga le leeng sawm le khe galkap tul sawm bang bek om lai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpipa in amaute susia-in leivui bangin amaute a bawl hi. 
2Kings13:8 Tu-in Jehoahazʼ gamtatna a omlaite, ama hih khempeuh le ama vangliatna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings13:9 Tua ciangin Jehoahaz si a, amaute in Samaria ah amah vui uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jehoash in a uk hi." 
2Kings13:10 Judah kumpipa Joashʼ kum sawm thum le sagihna kumin Jehoahazʼ tapa Jehoash in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawm le kum guk sung a uk hi." 
2Kings13:11 Amah zong Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta hi. Israel-te a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate khempeuh panin amah kihem khia lo a, tua bangmahin amah gamta hi." 
2Kings13:12 Tu-in Jehoashʼ gamtatna a omlaite, ama hih khempeuh le Judah kumpipa Amaziah a dona a thahatnate, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings13:13 Tua ciangin Jehoash si a, ama kumpi tokhom tungah Jeroboam Nihna pa a tu hi. Tua ciangin Israel kumpi dangte tawh Samaria ah Jehoash kivui khawm hi." 
2Kings13:14 Tu-in a sih nading natna tawh Elisha a nat ciangin, Israel kumpipa Jehoash ama kiangah pai sukin ama mai ah kap a, “Ka pa, ka pa! Israel mite a hupipa!” ci-in a kiko hi." 
2Kings13:15 Tua ciangin Elisha in ama kiangah, “Thal khat le thaltangte hong la in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in thal khat le thaltangte a la hi." 
2Kings13:16 Tua ciangin amah in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Na thal keek in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a keek hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in kumpipa khut tungah ama khutte nga hi." 
2Kings13:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Nisuahna lam tawlet hong in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in hong hi. Tua ciangin Elisha in, “Na thal lawn in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in lawn hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “ Topaʼ gualzawhna thaltang, Syria tungah gualzawhna thaltang! Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na beisak dongin Afek ah Syria-te na do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings13:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Thaltangte la in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in a la hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Tuate tawh leilak sat in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in thum vei satin a khawl hi." 
2Kings13:19 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mipa ama tungah hehin, “Nga vei ahi a, guk vei ahi zongin na sat ding kilawm hi. Tua hileh na beisak dongin Syria na sat puk ding hi. Ahih hangin tu-in thum vei bek Syria na sat puk ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings13:20 Tua ciangin Elisha si a, amaute in amah a vui uh hi. Tu-in Moab mihonte in sik-hiau sungin tua gam sim zel uh hi." 
2Kings13:21 Tua ciangin amaute in misi khat a vui laitakun, amaute a sim dingin a hong pai mihon khat mu uh a, amau zong a misi uh Elishaʼ han sungah lawn uh hi. A misi in Elishaʼ guhte a sukkhak phetin hingkik a, tua ciangin ama khe-in a ding hi." 
2Kings13:22 Tu-in Syria kumpipa Hazael in Jehoahazʼ hunsung khempeuh Israel mite nengniam hi. 
2Kings13:23 Ahih hangin Topa in amaute hehpihin amaute khasiat a, Abraham, Isaac le Jakob tawh a thuciamna hangin amaute lamah amah kihei a, amaute nusia lo hi. Tu dongin zong ama mite mangngilh lo hi." 
2Kings13:24 Syria kumpipa Hazael a sih ciangin ama tangin a tapa Benhadad kumpi a suak hi. 
2Kings13:25 Tua ciangin a pa Jehoahazʼ tung panin gal sungah Hazael in a lak sa khuapite Hazaelʼ tapa Benhadad tung panin Jehoahazʼ tapa Jehoash in lakik hi. Jehoash in amah thum vei zo-in Israel khuapite a ngahkik hi. 
2Kings14:1 Israel kumpi, Jehoahazʼ tapa Jehoashʼ kum nihna kumin, Judah kumpi, Joashʼ tapa Amaziah in uk ding kipan hi." 
2Kings14:2 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, Jerusalem ah amah in kum sawm nih le kua sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jehoaddin hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi." 
2Kings14:3 Topaʼ mitah amah a manin gamta a, ahi zongin a pu David bang zo lo hi. A pa Joashʼ hih sa na khempeuh hih hi." 
2Kings14:4 Mual tunga biaknate koih khia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi. 
2Kings14:5 Kumpi aana kip takin ama khut sungah a om phetin ama pa ahi kumpipa a that a nasemte amah in that hi. 
2Kings14:6 Ahih hangin Topa in a thupiak sa, Moses thukham laibu sungah, “Tateʼ hangin pate kithat lo dinga, pateʼ hangin tate zong kithat lo ding hi; ahih hangin mi khempeuh amauʼ khialhna hangin si ding hi,” ci-in a kigelh bangin amah in mi thatteʼ tate that lo hi." 
2Kings14:7 Amah in Edom mite tul sawm Ci Kuam ah thatin Sela khua simin la a, a min dingin Joktheel phuak a, tu ni dongin tua min kipsuak hi." 
2Kings14:8 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Israel kumpi, Jehuʼ tapa Jehoahaz, a tapa Jehoash kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Hong pai in, khatlekhat mai kituahin kisu ni,” ci-in a to hi." 
2Kings14:9 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Judah kumpi Amaziah kiangah thu puak a, “Lebanon-a om thangling kung khat in Lebanon-a om taamtak khat kiangah mi sawlin, ‘Ka tapaʼ zi dingin na tanu hong pia in,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin Lebanon gamsa khat in hong nawkin tua thangling tuancil hi." 
2Kings14:10 Nangmah in Edom na vat gawp khin a, na lungsim in nang hong liansak hi. Na minthanna tawh lungkim inla, inn ah om in; bang hangin nang tukin, Judah tawh nang na tuk nadingin buaina piangsak se ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings14:11 Ahih hangin Amaziah in a thu ngai lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash pai to a, Judah-teʼ gam Beth-shemesh ah amah le Judah kumpipa Amaziah khatlekhat kimaituahin gal kido uh hi." 
2Kings14:12 Tua ciangin Israel in Judah zo a, mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah tai uh hi." 
2Kings14:13 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Jehoash in Beth-shemesh ah Ahaziahʼ tapa Joash, a tapa Amaziah ahi Judah kumpipa man hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah amah hong pai a, Efraim Kongpi panin Kiu Kongpi dong Jerusalem kulhpi za guk sung susia hi." 
2Kings14:14 Tua ciangin amah in kham le ngun khempeuh le Topaʼ biakinn sung le kumpi inn vankoihna sungah a om umlebeel khempeuh la-in, mite zong man a, tua ciangin Samaria ah a ciahkik hi." 
2Kings14:15 Tu-in Jehoash in a hih a gamtatna a omlaite, a vangliatna le Judah Kumpipa Amaziah tawh a kidona, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings14:16 Tua ciangin Jehoash si a, Israel kumpite tawh Samaria ah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jeroboam Nihna in a uk hi." 
2Kings14:17 Israel kumpipa, Jehoahazʼ tapa Jehoash a sih khit ciangin Judah kumpipa, Joashʼ tapa Amaziah kum sawm le kum nga sung nungta lai hi." 
2Kings14:18 Tu-in Amaziahʼ nasepna a omlaite, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi."
