2Kings14:19 Tua ciangin amaute in Jerusalem ah amah sawm sim uh a, amah zong Lakhish ah tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in ama nung zui-in Lakhish ah mi sawl uh a, tua lai ah amah that uh hi." 
2Kings14:20 Tua ciangin amaute in sakolte tungah amah hong pua uh hi. David khuapi sung Jerusalem ah a pate tawh amah kivui hi. 
2Kings14:21 Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in kum sawm le kum guk a pha Uzziah la-in a pa Amaziahʼ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi. 
2Kings14:22 A pa a sih khit ciangin amah in Elath khua zo kikin lam pha a, Judah mite adingin ngahkik hi." 
2Kings14:23 Judah kumpipa, Joashʼ tapa Amaziahʼ kum sawm le kum ngana kumin, Israel kumpipa, Jehoashʼ tapa Jeroboam in Samaria ah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum sawm li le khat sung uk hi." 
2Kings14:24 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate khempeuh panin amah kihem khia lo hi." 
2Kings14:25 Amah in Gath-hefer pan a kamsang pa, Amittaiʼ tapa, a nasem Jonahʼ tungtawnin Israel Pasian, Topaʼ thugen bangin, Hamath lutna panin Arabah Tuipi dong Israel gam a ngahkik hi." 
2Kings14:25 Amah in Gath-hefer pan a kamsang pa, Amittaiʼ tapa, a nasem Jonahʼ tungtawnin Israel Pasian, Topaʼ thugen bangin, Hamath lutna panin Arabah Tuipi dong Israel gam a ngahkik hi." 
2Kings14:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-teʼ thuakna nasia mahmah hi, ci-in Topa in mu hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sal ahi a, sal ahi lo ahi zongin a peng kuamah om lo a, Israel a huh ding kuamah om lo hi." 
2Kings14:27 Ahih hangin Israel min a phiatkhiat ding Topa in gen nai lo ahih manin Jehoashʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khut tawh amah in amaute hon khia hi. 
2Kings14:28 Tu-in Jeroboamʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a hihte khempeuh, a vangliatna, a galsimna le Judah in a na neih ngei Damaskas le Hamath khuapite Israel adingin a ngahkikna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings14:29 Tua ciangin Jeroboam si-in a pate tawh kivui a, ama tangin a tapa Zekhariah in a uk hi." 
2Kings15:1 Israel kumpi Jeroboam Nihnaʼ kum sawm nih le sagihna kumin Judah kumpipa, Amaziahʼ tapa Uzziah in uk ding kipan hi." 
2Kings15:2 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum guk pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm nga le nih sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jekoliah hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi." 
2Kings15:3 A pa Amaziahʼ sepna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topaʼ mitah a man gamta hi. 
2Kings15:4 Ahi zongin mual tunga biaknate kila khia lo hi. Mite in tuate tungah biakna pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi. 
2Kings15:5 Tua ciangin Topa in phak natna tawh kumpipa vat ahih manin a sih ni dongin amah a phak hi a, inn tuam sungah amah teeng hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ tapa Jotham pen a innkuan tungah a uk hi a, tua gam mite a uk hi." 
2Kings15:6 Tu-in Uzziahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:7 Tua ciangin Uzziah si a, amaute in David khuapi sungah a pate tawh amah vui uh a, tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jotham in a uk hi." 
2Kings15:8 Judah kumpi Uzziahʼ kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Jeroboam Nihnaʼ tapa Zekhariah in Samaria panin Israel tungah kha guk sung uk hi. 
2Kings15:9 A pateʼ hih sa bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin amah kihem khia lo hi." 
2Kings15:10 Jabeshʼ tapa Shallum in amah sawm sim a, Ibleam ah amah sat pukin that a, tua ciangin ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Kings15:11 Tu-in Zekhariahʼ sepna a omlaite, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:12 (Hih pen Topaʼ thuciamna, Jehu tungah a piak, “Na suante khang lina dongin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” a cih ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua bangin a piang ahi hi.)" 
2Kings15:13 Judah kumpi Uzziahʼ kum sawm le kum kuana kumin Jabeshʼ tapa Shallum in uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria ah kha khat sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:14 Tua ciangin Tirzah panin Gadiʼ tapa Menahem hong pai to-in Samaria hong tunga, tua ciangin amah in Samaria ah Jabeshʼ tapa Shallum sat pukin that a, ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Kings15:15 Tu-in Shallumʼ sepna a omlaite le amah in a hih sa a sawm simna, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:16 Tua hun laitakin Menahem in Tappuah le a sunga teeng khempeuh le Tirzah pan a kipan a gam sungteng a luh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ama adingin a kongpite uh hong lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in luhin, a sunga om numei naupaii khempeuh a phel kham hi." 
2Kings15:17 Judah kumpi Uzziahʼ kum sawm thum le kuana kumin Gadiʼ tapa Menahem in Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Samaria panin kum sawm sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:18 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel khempeuh a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate khempeuh panin a nuntak sung tawntung amah kihem khia lo hi." 
2Kings15:19 Assiria kumpi Tiglath-pileser tua gam a sim dingin kuan to hi. Tua ciangin ama kumpi aana a kip nading a huh ding a deihna-in Menahem in Tiglath-pileser tungah ngun talen tul khat a pia hi. 
2Kings15:20 Menahem in Assiria kumpipa tungah a piak dingin mihau khempeuh, a mi kim khut tung panin ngun shekel sawm nga, Israel-te tung panin sum a dok hi. Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiheikik a, tua gam sungah om lo hi." 
2Kings15:21 Tu-in Menahemʼ sepna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:22 Tua ciangin Menahem si a, ama tangin a tapa Pekahiah in a uk hi." 
2Kings15:23 Judah kumpi Azariahʼ kum sawm ngana kumin Menahemʼ tapa Pekahiah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum nih sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:24 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin amah kihei khia lo hi." 
2Kings15:25 Tua ciangin ama nuai ah a ukpa, Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah in Gilead mi sawm nga tawh amah sawm sim a, kumpipaʼ inn sung tawng, Samaria ah amah that hi. Amah a thah khit ciangin ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Kings15:26 Tu-in Pekahiahʼ nasepna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:27 Judah kumpi Uzziahʼ kum sawm nga le nihna kumin Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, kum sawm nih sung uk hi." 
2Kings15:28 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Israel a khialhsakna, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ khialhnate panin amah kihem khia lo hi." 
2Kings15:29 Israel kumpi Pekahʼ hun laitakin Assiria kumpi Tiglath-pileser hong pai-in Ijon, Abelbeth-maakah, Janoah, Kedesh, Hazor, Gilead le Galilee le Naftali gam khempeuh la a, amah in galmatin mite Assiria ah a ciahpih hi." 
2Kings15:30 Tua ciangin Uzziahʼ tapa Jothamʼ kum sawm nihna kumin Elahʼ tapa Hoshea in Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah sawm simin amah sat pukin that a, tua ciangin ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Kings15:31 Tu-in Pekahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:32 Israel kumpi Remaliahʼ tapa Pekahʼ kum nihna kumin Judah kumpi Uzziahʼ tapa Jotham in uk ding kipan hi. 
2Kings15:33 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum guk sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jerushah hi a, Zadokʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings15:34 A pa Uzziahʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ mitah amah a manin gamta hi. 
2Kings15:35 Ahi zongin mual tunga biaknate kikoih khia lo hi. Mite in tuateʼ tungah biaknate pia-in paknamtui hal lai uh hi. Amah in Topaʼ biakinn kulh kongpi tungnung bawl hi. 
2Kings15:36 Tu-in Jothamʼ nasepna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings15:37 Tua hunin Topa in Judah a sim dingin Syria kumpipa Rezin le Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah sawl ding kipan hi. 
2Kings15:38 Jotham si a, a pu David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Ama tangin a tapa Ahaz in uk hi." 
2Kings16:1 Remaliahʼ tapa Pekahʼ kum sawm le kum sagihna kumin Judah kumpi Jothamʼ tapa Ahaz in uk ding kipan hi. 
2Kings16:2 Ahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum guk sung uk hi. A pu Davidʼ gamtatna sa bangin a Pasian, Topaʼ mitah amah a manin gamta lo a," 
2Kings16:3 Israel kumpi dangteʼ khekhap mah zui hi. Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minamteʼ zat a kihhuai a gamtatte mah uh bangin biakna-in ama tapa nangawn a hal hi. 
2Kings16:4 Amah in mual tunga biaknate tung le mual dawnte tung le singniim nuai khempeuh ah biakna pia-in paknamtui a hal hi. 
2Kings16:5 Tua ciangin Syria kumpi Rezin le Israel kumpi, Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah, Jerusalem a sim dingin hong kuan to uh a, amaute in Ahaz umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin amah zo zo lo uh hi." 
2Kings16:6 Tua hun laitakin Edom kumpipa in Edom gam dingin Elath lakikin Elath panin Judah gam mite hawl khia hi. Tua ciangin tu ni dongin amaute a teenna ahi Elath ah Edom mite hong pai uh hi. 
2Kings16:7 Tua ciangin Ahaz in Assiria kumpi Tiglath-pileser kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Kei pen na nasem pa le na tapa ka hi hi. Hong kuan to inla, keimah a hong sim Syria kumpipa le Israel kumpipa kiang panin kei hong hon khia in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings16:8 Ahaz in zong Topaʼ biakinn sung le kumpipaʼ vankoihna a ngun le khamte la a, Assiria kumpipa tungah letsongin a puak hi." 
2Kings16:9 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in ama thu ngai hi. Assiria kumpipa zong Damaskas a sim dingin hong kuan to-in tua khua la a, a mite galmatin Kir ah pua a, amah in Rezin a that hi." 
2Kings16:10 Assiria kumpi Tiglath-pileser tawh a kimu dingin Kumpi Ahaz zong Damaskas ah a pai ciangin, amah in Damaskas ah a om biakna tau mu hi. Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in biakna tau a om dan, a neng a tawngin a lah kimna lim khat siampi Urijah kiangah puak hi." 
2Kings16:11 Tua ciangin siampi Urijah in biakna tau bawl hi. Damaskas panin Kumpi Ahaz hong tun ma-in Kumpi Ahaz in Damaskas panin a khakna tawh kizui-in siampi Urijah in na bawl hi. 
2Kings16:12 Damaskas panin kumpipa hong tun ciangin kumpipa in tua biakna tau a en hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in biakna tau hong naihin pai to a," 
2Kings16:13 a meihal biakna le an tawh a biakna halin, leenggahzu tawh a biakna sung a, thunuam a a biakna sisan biakna tau tungah a theh hi." 
2Kings16:14 Tua ciangin amah in ama biakna tau thak le Topaʼ biakinn kikalah a om sumngo biakna tau la khia-in ama biakna tau leilu lam pangah a koih hi. 
2Kings16:15 Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in siampi Urijah thu pia-in, “Gam sung mi khempeuhʼ meihal biakna, an tawh a biakna le leenggahzu tawh a biakna uh tawh biakna tau lian tungah zingsang meihal biakna, nitakin an tawh biakna, kumpipaʼ meihal biakna le an tawh a biaknate hal khawm in. Tua tungah meihal biakna sisan khempeuh le biakpiakna sisan khempeuh theh in. Ahih hangin sumngo biakna tau pen kei adingin thudot nading hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings16:16 Kumpi Ahazʼ thupiak bangin siampi Urijah in hih thu khempeuh a hih hi. 
2Kings16:17 Tua ciangin Kumpi Ahaz in a kingakna kungte tan khia-in tuate panin a kuang la khia a, a nuai-a om sumngo bawngtalte tung panin tuikuangpi la khia sukin suang vial tungah a nga hi." 
2Kings16:18 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa a mai-et nadingin amah in Sabbath ni-in zat dingin a sungah a kikoih tutna khuhna le kumpipaʼ lutna a pua nung, Topaʼ biakinn panin a la khia hi." 
2Kings16:19 Ahaz in a hih a gamtatna a omlaite, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings16:20 Tua ciangin Ahaz si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Hezekiah in a uk hi." 
2Kings17:1 Judah kumpi Ahazʼ kum sawm le kum nihna kumin Elahʼ tapa Hoshea in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in kum kua sung uk hi." 
2Kings17:2 Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta a, ahi zongin ama ma-a Israel kumpi dangte bang hi lo hi." 
2Kings17:3 Assiria kumpi Shalmaneser amah a simin kuan to hi. Tua ciangin Hoshea ama khutnuai mi suak a, ama tungah siah a puak hi." 
2Kings17:4 Ahih hangin Assiria kumpipa in Hoshea a zuautatna mu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Egypt kumpipa So kiangah kamtaite sawlsim a, a kumkumin ahih ngeisa bangin Assiria kumpipa tungah siah pia nawn lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa in amah man a, thong sungah koihin a hencip hi." 
2Kings17:5 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in gam sung khempeuh simin Samaria ciang dong tunga, amah in kum thum sung umcih hi." 
2Kings17:6 Hosheaʼ kum kuana kumin Assiria kumpipa in Samaria la a, amah in Assiria ah Israel mite ciah pihin Halah gam sung, Gozan gam a om Habor gun gei le Media khuapite sungah amaute a koih hi." 
2Kings17:7 Hih thu a pianna pen Egypt kumpi Faroʼ khutnuai Egypt gam panin amaute a paikhiatpih a Pasian uh Topaʼ tungah Israel mite khial a, pasian dangte kihta-in" 
2Kings17:8 Israel miteʼ mai ah Topa in a hawlkhiat minamteʼ ngeina le Israel kumpite in a piansak tawm ngeinate a zuihna hang uh ahi hi. 
2Kings17:9 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Topa a Pasian uh langpangin a man lo na vaihawm uh hi. Amaute in amau adingin galvilna bukno a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin khuapi khempeuh ah mual tunga biakna bawl uh hi. 
2Kings17:10 Amaute in amau adingin mual sang tung khempeuh le singniim nuai khempeuh ah biakna songte le Asherah milimte a phut uh hi. 
2Kings17:11 Tua ciangin amauteʼ mai ah Topa in a puakkhiat minamteʼ hih bangin amaute in mual tunga biakna mun khempeuh tungah paknamtui a hal uh hi. Amaute in a hoih lo nate hihin Topa hehsak uh a," 
2Kings17:12 Topa in amaute tungah, “Note in na hih kei ding uh hi,” a cih milimteʼ na sem uh hi." 
2Kings17:13 Ahi zongin Topa in kamsangte khempeuh le thumute khempeuh tungtawnin Israel le Judah mite hilh khol a, “Na pu na pate uh ka thupiak thukhamte khempeuh le kamsangte ahi ka nasemteʼ tungtawnin note kiangah thu kong puak bangin na gamtat siate panun kihei-in ka thupiaknate le ka thukhamte zui un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings17:14 Ahih hangin amaute in a thu ngai lo uh a, Topa a Pasian uh a um lo a pu a pate uh mah bangin lungsim khauh uh hi." 
2Kings17:15 Amaute in ama thukhamte le a pu a pate uh tawh a bawl a thuciamna le amaute tungah a piak hilh kholhnate simmawh uh hi. Amaute in a mawkna milimte zui-in a mawkna suak uh a, amaute tawh kibangin gamta kei un ci-in Topa in a thupiak tawh kisai-in, amaute in amauʼ kiim a om minamte zui uh hi." 
2Kings17:16 Amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thupiakte khempeuh nusia-in amau adingin a kisung bawng no lim nih bawl uh hi. Amaute in Asherah milim khat bawl uh a, vantung a om nate khempeuh bia-in Baal milim na sem uh hi." 
2Kings17:17 Amaute in biakna-in a tanute uh le a tapate uh halin vankahna le aisanna zang uh a, Topaʼ muhna ah a sia a gamta dingin kipia tawmin amah hehsak uh hi." 
2Kings17:18 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa heh a, ama muhna panin amaute hem khia hi. Kuamah dang om nawn loin Judah gam mi bek om lai hi." 
2Kings17:19 Judah mite in zong Topa a Pasian uh thupiaknate zui loin Israel mite in a phuahtawm ngeinate zuih pih uh hi. 
2Kings17:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Israel suanlekhakte khempeuh nialin amaute gimsak a, ama muhna panin amaute a paihkhiat dongin amaute a siasak migiloteʼ khut sungah amaute a pia hi." 
2Kings17:21 Amah in David suante tung panin Israel gam a balkhiat khit ciangin Israel mite in Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam kumpi-in koih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Topa zuihna panin Israel hawl khia-in khialhna lianpi amaute bawlsak hi. 
2Kings17:22 Israel mite in Jeroboamʼ khialhna khempeuh hih uh hi. Kamsangte ahi a nasemte khempeuh tungtawnin a gen sa bangin Topa in ama muhna panin Israel a hepkhiat zah dongin tuate panin amaute kihem khia lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ gam panin Assiria ah tu ni dongin Israel-te salin a om uh hi. 
2Kings17:23  
2Kings17:24 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Babylon, Kuthah, Avva, Hamath le Sefarvaim panin mite paipih a, Israel miteʼ tangin Samaria khuapite ah amaute a koih hi. Amaute in Samaria gam luahin a khuapite ah teeng uh hi." 
2Kings17:25 Tua lai ah a ten cilun amaute in Topa kihta lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amaute kim khat a that humpi-nelkaite amaute lakah a khah hi. 
2Kings17:26 Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiangah, “Nangmah in pua khia-in Samaria khuapite sungah na koih minamte in tua gamteʼ pasianʼ thukham thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in amaute lakah humpinelkai khah hi. Amaute in tua gam pasianʼ thukham thei lo uh ahih manin tua humpi-nelkaite in amaute that uh hi,” ci-in kigen hi." 
2Kings17:27 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in thu pia a, “Na puak khiatna uh mun siampite khat tua lai ah puak un. Amah pai-in tua lai ah teengin a gam sung pasianʼ thukhamte amaute hilhsak un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings17:28 Tua ahih ciangin Samaria panin a puakkhiat uh siampite khat hong pai-in Bethel ah teeng a, amaute in Topa bangci kihtak ding cih thu amaute kiangah a hilh hi." 
2Kings17:29 Ahih hangin minam khempeuh in amauʼ pasian ciat bawl uh a, minam khempeuh in amauʼ teenna khuapi sung, Samariateʼ bawl sa mual tunga biakna munte ah tuate koih uh hi." 
2Kings17:30 Babylon mite in Sukkoth-benoth pasian lim, Kuth mite in Nergal pasian lim, Hamath mite in Ashima milim," 
2Kings17:31 le Avva mite in Nibhaz le Tartak milimte bawl uh hi. Sefarvaim mite in Sefarvaim pasian-te ahi Adrammelek le Anammelek biakna-in a tate uh mei tawh a hal uh hi. 
2Kings17:32 Amaute in Topa zong kihta uh a, mual tunga biakna siampi dingin amau sung panin mi namkim seh uh a, tuate in mual tunga biaknate tungah amau adingin piaksak uh hi." 
2Kings17:33 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topa bia uh a, ahih hangin amaute a kipuak khiatna minamteʼ ngeina bangin amauʼ pasian-teʼ na zong sem khawm uh hi." 
2Kings17:34 Tu ni dongin amaute in a nidang a ngeina bangin gamta uh hi. Amaute in Topa bia lo uh hi. Israel min a phuah Jakobʼ suanteʼ Topa in a thupiak thukhamte ahi a, ngeina kipte ahi a, zuih ding ngeinate ahi a, a thupiakna ahi zongin amaute in zui lo uh hi." 
2Kings17:35 Topa in Israel-te tawh thuciamna khat bawlin amaute thu pia a, “Note in pasian dangte kihta loin, amaute mai ah note kun loin, amauʼ na zong sem loin, amaute tungah biakna zong na pia kei ding uh hi." 
2Kings17:36 Egypt gam panin vangliatna le thahatna tawh a hong paikhiatpih Topa na kihta ding uh hi. Ama mai ah note na kun ding uh a, ama tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi." 
2Kings17:37 Note adingin a gelh thukhamte, ngeina kipte, zuih ding ngeinate le thupiaknate zuih ding na kingaihsun tawntung ding uh hi. Note in pasian dangte na kihta kei ding uh a," 
2Kings17:38 note tawh ka bawl sa thuciamna na mangngilh kei ding uh hi. Note in pasian dangte na kihta kei ding uh a," 
2Kings17:39 ahih hangin Topa na Pasian uh na kihta ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in na galte khempeuh uh khut sung panin note hong hon khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings17:40 Ahi zongin mite in tua thu ngai lo uh a, a nidang ngeina bangun gamta veve uh hi." 
2Kings17:41 Tua ahih ciangin hih minamte in Topa bia uh a, a kiseek amauʼ milimteʼ na zong sem kawm uh hi. A tate uh le a tate uhʼ tate zong tua bangmahin gamta uh hi. A pu a pate uh gamtat bangin a suan a khakte uh tu ni dongin gamta uh hi." 
2Kings18:1 Israel kumpi, Elahʼ tapa Hosheaʼ kum thumna kumin Judah kumpi, Ahazʼ tapa Hezekiah in uk ding kipan hi." 
2Kings18:2 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nih le kua sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Abi hi a, Zekhariahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings18:3 A pu Davidʼ hihna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topaʼ mitah a man gamta hi. 
2Kings18:4 Amah in mual tunga biaknate hem khia-in biakna songte sutan a, Asherah milim phukpai hi. Tua ciangin amah in Mosesʼ bawl sa sumngo gulpi satnen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua tungah paknamtui hal uh hi; tua pen Nehushtan kici hi." 
2Kings18:5 Amah in Israel Pasian, Topa muang hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama nung a Judah kumpite khempeuh lak hitaleh ama mai-ate lak hitaleh ah amah tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi." 
2Kings18:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa kip takin len hi. Amah zuihna panin kihem khia lo a, Topa in Moses tungah a gen thupiaknate a zui hi." 
2Kings18:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amah ompih a, a sepna khempeuh ah maavang hi. Amah in Assiria kumpipa lehdo-in ama na sem lo hi." 
2Kings18:8 Amah in galvilna bukno a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin, Gaza le a gam sung ciang dong Filistia-te a vat gawp hi." 
2Kings18:9 Israel kumpi, Elahʼ tapa Hosheaʼ kum sagihna kum ahi, Kumpi Hezekiahʼ kum lina kumin Assiria kumpi Shalmaneser, Samaria a simin hong kuan to-in umcih a," 
2Kings18:10 kum thum a beina ah tua khua la zo hi. Israel kumpi Hosheaʼ kum kuana kum ahi, Hezekiahʼ kum gukna kumin Samaria kila hi." 
2Kings18:11 Assiria kumpipa in Israel mite Assiria ah la a, Halah gam sung, Gozan gam a om Habor gun gei le Media khuapite sungah a koih hi." 
2Kings18:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thu mang lo uh a, ama thuciamna, Topaʼ nasem Mosesʼ thupiak khempeuh nangawn palsat uh hi. Amaute in thu ngai loin, thu zong mang lo uh hi." 
2Kings18:13 Kumpi Hezekiahʼ kum sawm le kum lina kumin Assiria kumpi Sennakherib, Judah khuapi kulh a neite khempeuh a sim dingin hong kuan to-in tuate a la hi." 
2Kings18:14 Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Hezekiah in Assiria kumpipa kiang Lakhish ah mi sawlin, “Ka gamta khial hi; kei kiang panin nungkik in; kei tungah nong nget peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Judah kumpi Hezekiah tung panin ngun talen za thum le kham talen sawm thum a kal hi." 
2Kings18:15 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topaʼ biakinn sung le kumpipaʼ inn van koihnate ah a om ngun khempeuh ama tungah a pia hi. 
2Kings18:16 Tua hunin Hezekiah in Topaʼ biakinn kongkhakte tung pan le a mahmah in kongkhak mungte a zutna khamte hawk khia-in Assiria kumpipa tungah a pia hi. 
2Kings18:17 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Lakhish panin Kumpi Hezekiah kiang Jerusalem ah galkap hon lianpi khat tawh a galkap maang lianpen pa, a inn sung mang lianpen pa le a ulian khat a sawl hi. Amaute pai to-in Jerusalem tung uh hi. Amaute a tun uh ciangin amaute hong pai-in Puansawp paʼ nasepna phual zuatna lampi a om bual tungnung tuilakna gei ah hong ding uh hi." 
2Kings18:18 Amaute in kumpipa a sap uh ciangin, amaute kiangah inn sung ukpa ahi, Hilkiahʼ tapa Eliakim, lai-at Shebnah le thuciamteh pa ahi, Asafʼ tapa Joah hong pai uh hi." 
2Kings18:19 Tua ciangin a ulian pa in amaute kiangah, “Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un. ‘Assiria kumpipa, kumpi lianpa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih banga na kimuanna uh bang suang na hi uh hiam?" 
2Kings18:20 Note in kampau lel pen galsim nadingin thu lamlahna le thahatna-in na ngaihsun uh hi. Note in kei nong lehdo nadingun bang suang na hi uh hiam? 
2Kings18:21 En un, a tungah a kingam mipaʼ khut a sun ding pumpeeng kung kitam a bang lel Egypt tu-in na suang uh hi. Amah a suangte khempeuh tungah Egypt kumpipa Faro pen tua bang lel ahi hi." 
2Kings18:22 “‘Ahih hangin note in kei kiangah, “Kote in Topa ka Pasian uh ka suang uh hi,” na cih uh leh, Hezekiah in mual tunga biaknate le biakna taute hep khiatsakin Jerusalem tungah, “Jerusalem khua sung hih biakna tau mai ah na bia ding uh hi,” a cih pa hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Kings18:23 Tu-in hong pai un; Assiria kumpi ka topa tawh kikhapna khat bawl un; no lam panin a tunga tuang ding na ngah nak uh leh note tungah sakol tul nih kong pia ding hi. 
2Kings18:24 Tua ahih ciangin note in leengte le sakol tung tuangte tawh kisai-in Egypt a suang kimlai in bangci-in ka topaʼ nasemte lakah a neu pen galkap ukpa khat leh nawh zo ding na hi uh hiam? 
2Kings18:25 Tua tham loin, Topa tawh a kikop lopi-in hih mun simin a susia dingin a hong pai to ka hi hiam? Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih gam a sim dingin pai to inla susia in,” hong ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings18:26 Tua ciangin Hilkiahʼ tapa Eliakim, Shebnah le Joah in a ulian pa kiangah, “Kong thum uh hi; kote in Aram pau thei ka hih manun na nasemte tungah Aram pau-in thu hong gen in; kulh tunga om miteʼ zakin Jew pau-in koteʼ tungah hong gen kei in,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings18:27 Ahih hangin a ulian pa in amaute kiangah, “Ka topa in hih thute na topa uh le note tung bekah a gen dingin hong sawlin, amauʼ ek mah ne-in, amauʼ zun mah dawnin note tawh a siakhawm ding kulh tunga tu mite kiangah a gen lo dingin hong sawl ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings18:28 Tua ciangin a ulian pa dingin Jew pau-in a gingin kiko a, “Assiria kumpi, kumpi lianpaʼ thu za un!" 
2Kings18:29 Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Hezekiahʼ khem sa-in om kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in keima khut sung panin note hong hon khia zo lo ding hi. 
2Kings18:30 Topa in eite hong hon khia taktak dinga, Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sungah hih khuapi kipia lo ding hi, ci-a Hezekiahʼ hong genna tawh Topa suang kei un,’ ci hi." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekiahʼ thu ngai kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei tawh kilemna hong bawl unla, kei kiangah hong pai un. Tua hileh kei hong pai-in nomauʼ leitang tawh a kibatna mun, an le leenggahzu a omna, oliv kungte le khuaizu a omna gamah, note si loin na nuntak nadingun kong koih dong matengin note khempeuh in nomauʼ leenggah ciat ne-in, mi khempeuh in a theigah ciat uh ne ding uh a, note khempeuh in na tuinak ciat uh panin tui na tawi ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in note kiangah, “ Topa in eite hong hon khia ding hi,” ci-in note hong lamlah khialhna ah Hezekiahʼ thu ngai kei un." 
2Kings18:32  
2Kings18:33 Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sung panin minam dangteʼ pasian khatpeuh in a gam hon khia zo ngei ahi hiam? 
2Kings18:34 Hamath le Arpadʼ pasian-te koi ah om ahi uh hiam? Sefarvaim, Hena le Ivvah pasian-te koi ah om ahi uh hiam? Keima khut sung panin amaute in Samaria a hon khia zo uh hiam?" 
2Kings18:35 Topa in ka khut sung panin Jerusalem a hotkhiat nadingin, gam sungah pasian-te khempeuh lakah kua in keima khut sung panin a gam uh hon khia zo ngei ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings18:36 Ahih hangin mite dai-in kam khat beek dawngkik lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipaʼ thupiakna pen, “Amah dawng kei un,” cihna ahi hi." 
2Kings18:37 Tua ciangin inn sung a uk, Hilkiahʼ tapa Eliakim, lai-at pa Shebnah le thuciamteh pa, Asafʼ tapa Joah-te a puan uh bal kek sa-in Hezekiah kiangah hong pai uh a, a ulian paʼ kammalte ama kiangah a gen uh hi." 
2Kings19:1 Kumpi Hezekiah in hih thu a zak ciangin a dahna hangin a puante bal kekin puanhampi silh a, Topaʼ biakinn sungah a pai hi." 
2Kings19:2 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn sung a ukpa Eliakim, lai-at pa Shebnah le siampi khangham zaw deuhte puanhampi silhsakin Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi." 
2Kings19:2 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn sung a ukpa Eliakim, lai-at pa Shebnah le siampi khangham zaw deuhte puanhampi silhsakin Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi." 
2Kings19:3 Amaute in ama kiangah, “Hezekiah in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Tu ni pen lungkham ni, hong kitai ni, mindai ni ahi hi. Naungekte a suah hun tunga, amaute hinkhiat nading thatang om lo hi." 
2Kings19:4 Ama topa ahi Assiria kumpipa in a nungta Pasian a zahko dingin a sawl a ulian paʼ kammalte khempeuh Topa na Pasian in za-in, Topa na Pasian in a zak sa thute nial khin kha ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin a om lai mite adingin thu ngen in,’ ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Kings19:5 Kumpi Hezekiahʼ nasemte Isaiah kiang hong tun uh ciangin 
2Kings19:5 Kumpi Hezekiahʼ nasemte Isaiah kiang hong tun uh ciangin 
2Kings19:6 “Isaiah in amaute kiangah, “Na topa uh kiangah hih bangin gen un. Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Assiria kumpipaʼ nasemte in kei hong simmawhna, na zak sa uh thute hangin lau kei un." 
2Kings19:6 “Isaiah in amaute kiangah, “Na topa uh kiangah hih bangin gen un. Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Assiria kumpipaʼ nasemte in kei hong simmawhna, na zak sa uh thute hangin lau kei un." 
2Kings19:7 En un, keimah in ama tungah thu khat ka piangsak dinga, amah in kamdawn khat za-in a gamah ciahkik ding hi. Ama gam mahah namsau tawh amah a tuk nading ka piangsak ding hi,” ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings19:8 Assiria kumpipa in Lakhish nusia khinin Libnah khua tawh a kidona thu, a ulian pa in za ahih manin, kumpipa kiangah thu a dong dingin a pai hi." 
2Kings19:9 Ethiopia kumpi Tirhakah amah a sim dingin a hong kuan khiat khitna thu kumpipa in a zak ciangin, amah in Hezekiah kiangah kamtaite sawlkikin," 
2Kings19:10 “Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sungah Jerusalem kipia lo ding hi, ci-a a hong ciamna tawh na suan na Pasianʼ khem sa-in om kei in." 
2Kings19:11 En in, Assiria kumpite in gam khempeuh a hihnasa, a suksiat mangna thu na za khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin nang hong hon khia zo ding ahi hiam?" 
2Kings19:12 Ka pu ka pate in a suksiat minam Gozan, Haran, Rezef le Telassar gam sunga Eden mite, tua minamteʼ pasian-te in amaute hon khia zo ahi hiam?" 
2Kings19:13 Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sefarvaim khuapi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa, ahih kei leh Ivvah kumpipa koi ah om ahi uh hiam, ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings19:14 Hezekiah in kamtaite tung panin a lai sangin a sim hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah Hezekiah pai to a, Topaʼ mai ah a lai a zal hi." 
2Kings19:15 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topaʼ mai ah thu ngenin, “ Topa, Israel Pasian, kherub tungah a tupa aw, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh lakah nangmah, nangmah bek Pasian na hi a, nangmah in vantung le leitung na bawl hi." 
2Kings19:16 Topa aw, na bil hong ngat inla hong za in. Topa aw, na mitte hak inla hong mu in. Tua ciangin a nungta Pasian a zahko nadingin a hong khak Sennakheribʼ thute za in." 
2Kings19:17 A taktakin, Topa aw, Assiria kumpite in minam dangte le a gam uh siasak uh a," 
2Kings19:18 a pasian-te uh meikhuk sungah lotsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pasian hi loin, mihingteʼ khut tawh a kibawl sing le suang ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tuate kisusia hi." 
2Kings19:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, Topa koteʼ Pasian aw, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh in nang, nang bek Pasian na hihna a theih nadingun ama khut sung panin kote hong hon khia in, kong thum hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi." 
2Kings19:20 Tua ciangin Amozʼ tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah thu puak a, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai kei tungah nong thungetna ka za zo hi,’ ci hi." 
2Kings19:20 Tua ciangin Amozʼ tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah thu puak a, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai kei tungah nong thungetna ka za zo hi,’ ci hi." 
2Kings19:21 Amah tawh kisai-in Topaʼ gen sa thu hih bang ahi hi: Zion khuapi in nang hong simmawh a, nang hong nuihsan hi. Jerusalem khuapi in na nungah a lu hong pei san hi." 
2Kings19:22 Kua zahko-in, a simmawh na hi hiam? Kua langpangin na aw sangsakin kihihsakna tawh gamta na hi hiam? Israel-teʼ a Siangtho pa, a simmawh na hi hi." 
2Kings19:23 Na kamtaite tawh Topa na zahko a, nangmah in, ‘Ka leeng tampite tawh mual sang pen munah ka pai khin a, Lebanon gam tawng pek dong ka tung khin hi. A taamtak sang pente ka phuk mangkhin a, a taaksan hoih pente zong ka phuk mangkhin hi. A gam tawngnung pen dongah keimah ka lut a, a tulak thuk pen dongah zong ka lut khin hi." 
2Kings19:24 Tuikhukte ka to a, gamdang tuite ka dawn hi. Ka khenuai tawh Egypt lui khempeuh ka keusak hi,’ na ci hi." 
2Kings19:25 Sawt pek lai-in ka ngaihsut sa ahih lam za nai lo na hi hiam? Tanglai pek panin ka geel kholh sa hi a, tu-a ka tunsak ding thute kulh a nei khuapite nin bulomtangin na heina ding," 
2Kings19:26 a sunga teengte a hatna teng kilakhia-in, lungkia-in cih nading thei loin, gamlak singnote le lo ngeekte bangin, innkhum zanga lopate bangin a om laitak, a khan khit ma-in a sih ding ka geel sa ahi hi." 
2Kings19:27 Ahih hangin keimah in na tut sukna le na pusuahna le na sung tumna, kei tungah na hehna ka thei khin hi." 
2Kings19:28 Kei tungah na hehna hang le na kiphatsakna ka bilah hong tun khitna hangin na nak ah nakpheh hong bulhin, na kam ah kamkaih kong bulh dinga, nong kuan khiatna lam mahah kong leh heikik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings19:29 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Nang adingin lim hih bang hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin ama thu-in a pote na ne dinga, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a sel khiate na ne ding hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin atin, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding hi." 
2Kings19:29 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Nang adingin lim hih bang hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin ama thu-in a pote na ne dinga, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a sel khiate na ne ding hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin atin, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding hi." 
2Kings19:30 Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah a suakta a omlaite in singkung bangin a thuk lamah zungkha kikin a tung lamah gah hong gah to ding hi; 
2Kings19:31 bang hang hiam cih leh a omlaite Jerusalem panin hong paikhia dinga, a suakta khat Zion Mual panin hong paikhia ding hi. Topaʼ deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi." 
2Kings19:32 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa tawh kisai-in hih bangin gen hi: ‘Hih khuapi sungah amah hong pai lo dinga, thaltang khat zong lawn lo ding hi. Khuapi mai ah lum tawh zong hong pai loin, khuapi simna-in phung zong ciang lo ding hi." 
2Kings19:33 Amah hong paina lampi mah tawnin amah kilehkik dinga, hih khuapi sungah amah hong pai lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
2Kings19:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima min ka khualna le ka nasem pa David tungah ka ciam sa thu hangin hih khuapi ka hu ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings19:35 Tua zanin Topaʼ vantungmi paikhia a, Assiria-te giahphual ah galkap tul za khat le tul sawm giat le tul nga a that hi. Zingsang tungin mite a thawh ciangin, hihte khempeuh si luanghawm na hi hi." 
2Kings19:36 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib kihem khia a, inn ah ciahin Nineveh ah a teeng hi." 
2Kings19:37 Tua ciangin amah in ama pasian Nisrokʼ biakinn sungah bia-in a om laitakin, ama tapate Adrammelek le Sharezer in namsau tawh amah thatin Ararat gamah a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Esar-haddon in a uk hi." 
2Kings20:1 Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah cina-in si dektak hi. Tua ciangin Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Na innkuan vai ding hawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na si ding hi; na damkik zo kei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:1 Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah cina-in si dektak hi. Tua ciangin Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Na innkuan vai ding hawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na si ding hi; na damkik zo kei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:2 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in a mai kawm lam ngatin Topa tungah thu ngen a," 
2Kings20:3 “Nangma mai ah thuman tak le ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ka gamtatna le nangma muhna ah a hoih ka sepna thu tu-in hong phawk in, kong thum hi, Topa aw,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah nakpi takin a kap hi." 
2Kings20:4 Tua ciangin inntual laita panin Isaiah a paikhiat ma-in ama tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi. 
2Kings20:4 Tua ciangin inntual laita panin Isaiah a paikhiat ma-in ama tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi. 
2Kings20:5 “Kilehkik inla keima miteʼ makai Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na thungetna ka za khin a, na khituite ka mu khin hi. En in, nang kong damsak dinga, ni thum ni-in Topaʼ biakinn ah na pai to ding hi." 
2Kings20:6 Na nuntakna kum sawm le kum nga sung kong behlap ding hi. Assiria kumpipa khut sung panin nangmah le hih khuapi ka hon khia dinga, keima hang le ka nasem pa David hangin hih khuapi ka hu ding hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:7 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Theimoh khat hong la un. Amah a damkik theih nadingin tuate la unla, a uilut nuh un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:7 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Theimoh khat hong la un. Amah a damkik theih nadingin tuate la unla, a uilut nuh un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:8 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “ Topa in kei hong damsak nading le a ni thum ni-in Topaʼ biakinn ah ka pai toh nading a lim bang hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:8 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “ Topa in kei hong damsak nading le a ni thum ni-in Topaʼ biakinn ah ka pai toh nading a lim bang hi ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:9 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “ Topa in a ciam sa thu hong hih nadingin Topaʼ tung panin nangma tungah a lim hih bang hi ding hi: A liim kal sawm mai pai ding hiam, ahih kei leh kal sawm nung kik ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:9 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “ Topa in a ciam sa thu hong hih nadingin Topaʼ tung panin nangma tungah a lim hih bang hi ding hi: A liim kal sawm mai pai ding hiam, ahih kei leh kal sawm nung kik ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:10 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in dawngin, “Liim kal sawm a mai nawt ding a baih khat ahi hi; liim kal sawm nung kiksak zaw in,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:11 Tua ciangin Topa tungah kamsang pa Isaiah kiko hi. Tua ciangin amah in Ahazʼ ni-nai tungah a ni tum sa a liim kal sawm lehkaihkik hi. 
2Kings20:11 Tua ciangin Topa tungah kamsang pa Isaiah kiko hi. Tua ciangin amah in Ahazʼ ni-nai tungah a ni tum sa a liim kal sawm lehkaihkik hi. 
2Kings20:12 Tua hun laitakin Babylon kumpipa, Baladanʼ tapa Merodak-baladan in Hezekiah kiangah laikhakte le letsong khat tawh kamtaite a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hezekiah a ci na hi, ci-in amah in za hi." 
2Kings20:13 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in amaute na zin do a, amah in amaute kiangah a vankoihna inn khempeuh, ngun, kham, a namtui nate, sathau manpha, a galvan le a vankoihna innte ah a om khempeuh a lak hi. Ama inn sung hitaleh ama gam sung khempeuh pan hitaleh Hezekiah in amaute a lah loh om lo hi." 
2Kings20:14 Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiangah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Hih mite in bang gen ahi hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah in, “Amaute, Babylon gam, a gamlapi panin hong pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:14 Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiangah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Hih mite in bang gen ahi hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah in, “Amaute, Babylon gam, a gamlapi panin hong pai uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:15 Amah in, “Amaute in na inn sungah bang mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hezekiah in dawngin, “Amaute in ka inn sunga om khempeuh mu uh hi; ka vankoihna inn sungte panin amaute ka lah loh bangmah om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:16 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “ Topaʼ thu za in:" 
2Kings20:16 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “ Topaʼ thu za in:" 
2Kings20:17 En in, na inn sunga om khempeuh le na pu na pate in tu ni donga a kholte Babylon ah a kipuak ni ding hong tung ding hi; bangmah kisiit lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
2Kings20:18 Nangma sung pan a suak na tapate pawl khat kila khia dinga, amaute pen Babylon kumpipa inn sungah inn sung mangte hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings20:19 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Na gen sa ahi Topaʼ thugen a hoih hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keima hun sungin kilemna le lungmuanna a om nakleh bang phamawh ding ahi hiam?” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
2Kings20:19 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Na gen sa ahi Topaʼ thugen a hoih hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keima hun sungin kilemna le lungmuanna a om nakleh bang phamawh ding ahi hiam?” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
2Kings20:20 Hezekiahʼ sepna a omlaite, a vangliatna le tuili le tuilakna bawlin khuapi sungah tui a tutna, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings20:21 Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a, ama tangin a tapa Manasseh in a uk hi." 
2Kings21:1 Manasseh in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nga le nga sung a uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Hefzibah ahi hi." 
2Kings21:2 Topa in Israel miteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minamteʼ gamtatna a kihhuaite mah bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings21:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pa Hezekiahʼ suksiat sa mual tunga biaknate lamkik hi. Tua ciangin amah in Baal adingin biakna taute phut a, Israel kumpi Ahabʼ bawl bangin Asherah milim khat bawl a, vantung a om nate khempeuh bia-in tuateʼ na a sem hi." 
2Kings21:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Jerusalem ah ka min ka koih ding hi,” a cihna Topaʼ biakinn sungah amah in biakna taute lam hi." 
2Kings21:5 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn tual nihte tungah vantung a om nate khempeuh adingin biakna taute a lam hi. 
2Kings21:6 Tua ciangin amah in biakna-in a tapa hal a, aisanna le mailam thugen kholhnate semin, vankah theite le aisante tawh nasem khawm hi. Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia tampi gamta a, amah hehsak hi." 
2Kings21:7 Tua ciangin Topa in David le a tapa Solomon tungah, “Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teelkhiat hih biakinn sung le Jerusalem ah ka min ka koih tawntung ding hi. Amaute ka thupiak sa khempeuh tawh kizui le ka nasem pa Moses in amaute a piak thukham khempeuh tawh kizui-in gamtat ding a kingaihsut nak uh leh, a pu a pate uh tungah ka piak gam sungah Israel mite mi vakvai ka hisak nawn kei ding hi,” a cihna biakinn sungah amah in ama bawl sa a kiseek Asherah milim a koih hi." 
2Kings21:8  
2Kings21:9 Ahih hangin amaute in thu ngai lo uh a, Topa in Israel-teʼ mai ah a suksiat minamteʼ gamtatna sangin a siahuai zaw a gamtat nadingun Manasseh in amaute a zol hi." 
2Kings21:10 Tua ciangin Topa in kamsangte ahi a nasemteʼ tungtawnin gen a," 
2Kings21:11 “Judah kumpipa Manasseh in hih a kihhuai nate sem a, ama ma-a Amor miteʼ gamtatna sangin a sia zaw-in na semin a milimte tawh Judah mite zong khialsak khin hi." 
2Kings21:12 Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, a za mite khempeuhʼ bilte a vut ding siatna Jerusalem le Judah tungah ka tungsak ding hi." 
2Kings21:13 Keimah in Samaria le Ahab le ama suante gim ka piak bangin Jerusalem tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Tua ciangin mi khat in pakan a nul bangin keimah in Jerusalem nulin ka lumlet ding hi. 
2Kings21:14 Tua ciangin keimah in ka mi a omlaite paai khia-in amauʼ galte tungah ka pia dinga, amaute pen a galteʼ mat ding mi le van kiate suak ding uh hi;" 
2Kings21:15 bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh Egypt panin hong paikhiat a kipan tu ni dongin keima muhna ah a sia gamta-in kei hong hehsak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings21:16 Tua tham loin Topaʼ muhna ah amaute a sia a gamtat nadingun amah in Judah mite a khialhsak banah, Jerusalem mong khat pan mong khat sisan tawh a kidimsak dongin Manasseh in mawhna baang lo mi tampi a that hi." 
2Kings21:17 Manassehʼ sepna a omlaite, a hih khempeuh le ama hih sa a khialhna, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings21:18 Tua ciangin Manasseh si a, Uzzaʼ huan sung, ama inn huan sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Amon in a uk hi." 
2Kings21:19 Amon in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum nih sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Meshullemeth hi a, Jotbah khuami Haruzʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings21:20 A pa Manassehʼ gamtat bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings21:21 Amah in a paʼ khekhap khempeuh tawn a, a pa in a na a sepsak milimteʼ na mah semin tuate a bia hi." 
2Kings21:22 Amah in a pu a pateʼ Pasian, Topa nusia a, Topaʼ lampi tawn lo hi." 
2Kings21:23 Tua ciangin Amonʼ nasemte in amah sawm sim uh a, ama inn sungah kumpipa a that uh hi." 
2Kings21:24 Ahih hangin tua gam mite in Kumpi Amon a sawmsimte khempeuh that leuleu uh a, tua ciangin tua gam mite in ama tangin a tapa Josiah kumpi-in a koih uh hi." 
2Kings21:25 Tu-in Amonʼ hih sa a gamtatna a omlaite pen Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. 
2Kings21:26 Tua ciangin Uzzaʼ huan sung ama hanah amah kivui a, ama tangin a tapa Josiah in a uk hi." 
2Kings22:1 Josiah in uk ding a kipatin kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm thum le khat sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jedidah hi a, Bozkath khuami Adaiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings22:2 Topaʼ mitah amah a manin gamta-in, a pu Davidʼ khekhap khempeuh zui cinten a, them khat zong pial lo hi." 
2Kings22:3 Kumpi Josiahʼ kum sawm le kum giatna kumin, kumpipa in a lai-at pa Meshullamʼ tapa Azaliah, a tapa Shafan, Topaʼ biakinn ah sawl a," 
2Kings22:4 “Kongcingte in mite tung panin a kaihkhop uh ahi Topaʼ biakinn sungah hong kipaipih sum phazah a theih nadingin siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah kiangah pai to in. 
2Kings22:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn nasemte tungah a sum piasak in. Topaʼ biakinn ah a om inn a puah nasemte tungah amaute tua sum piasak in. 
2Kings22:6 Tua sumte pen khutsiamte, innlamte le leilesuang inn lam siamte tungah piak ding le biakinn puah nadingin sing lei nading le suang tawh nading zong ahi hi." 
2Kings22:7 Ahih hangin thuman takin amaute gamta uh ahih manin amauteʼ khut sungah a kipia sumte hangin amaute tung panin sazian kingen lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings22:8 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah in lai-at pa Shafan kiangah, “ Topaʼ biakinn sungah thukham laibu ka mu hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hilkiah in Shafan kiangah a laibu pia a, amah in a sim hi." 
2Kings22:9 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah lai-at pa Shafan hong pai-in thu zasak a, “Nasemte in biakinn sungah a om sumte la khia-in Topaʼ biakinn nasemte tungah pia khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings22:10 Tua ciangin lai-at pa Shafan in kumpipa kiangah, “Siampi Hilkiah in laibu khat kei hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Shafan in kumpipa mai ah tua laibu a sim hi." 
2Kings22:11 Kumpipa in thukham laibu sunga thute a zak ciangin a dahna hangin a puante a bal kek hi. 
2Kings22:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in siampi Hilkiah, Shafanʼ tapa Ahikam, Mikaiahʼ tapa Akbor, lai-at pa Shafan le kumpipaʼ nasem Asaiah thu pia a," 
2Kings22:13 “Pai unla, a kimu hih laibu sunga thute tawh kisai-in keima ading, mite ading le Judah mi khempeuh adingin Topaʼ tungah thu va dong un; bang hang hiam cih leh hih laibu sunga thu, eite tawh kisai-in a kigelh khempeuh bangin gamtat ding i pu i pate in na mang lo uh ahih manin eite tungah Topaʼ hehna lian hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings22:14 Tua ahih ciangin siampi Hilkiah, Ahikam, Akbor, Shafan le Asaiah te zong Harhas tapa Tikvah, a tapa Shallum, biakinn puan a kem paʼ zi kamsangnu Huldah kiangah a pai uh hi (tua laitakin Jerusalem khua sung a Veeng Nihna ah tua nu teeng hi); tua ciangin tua nu tawh amaute kiho uh hi." 
2Kings22:15 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah note hong sawl mipa kiangah gen un." 
2Kings22:16 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, hih lai mun le a tungah a teengte tungah Judah kumpipa in laibu sunga a sim siatna thute khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi." 
2Kings22:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui hal uh a, amau khut tawh a bawl milimte tawh kei hong hehsak uh ahih manin hih mun tungah ka hehna so dinga, ka hehna dai lo ding hi." 
2Kings22:18 Ahih hangin Topaʼ tungah thu a dong dingin note a hong sawl Judah kumpipa tungah ahihleh note in hih bangin na gen ding uh hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangmah in na zak sa thute tawh kisai-in," 
2Kings22:19 amaute gamkhing le samsiat a ngahte a suah nadingin hih mun le a tungah a teeng mite tungah ka kampauna na zak ciangin na lungsim kisikin Topaʼ mai ah nang mahmah kiniamkhiatin, na puante bal kekin ka mai ah na kahna thu, keimah in zong ka za hi, Topa in ci hi." 
2Kings22:20 Tua ahih ciangin, nangmah in nuam takin na han na zuan dinga, hih mun tungah ka tunsak ding siatna khempeuh na mit in mu lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah tua thu a puakkik uh hi." 
2Kings23:1 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Judah le Jerusalem upate khempeuh samsak a, ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi." 
2Kings23:2 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah kumpipa pai to a, amah tawh Judah mi khempeuh, Jerusalem-a teengte khempeuh, siampite, kamsangte le mi khempeuh a neu a lian tawh pai uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in amauteʼ zakin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a kimu thuciamna laibu sunga thute khempeuh a sim hi." 
2Kings23:3 Tua ciangin khuampi gei ah kumpipa dingin hih laibu sunga a kigelh thuciamna kammalte khempeuh a sep nading, Topaʼ thu mangin a thupiaknate le a thukhamte, a lungsim le a ngaihsutna khempeuh tawh a zuih nading, Topaʼ mai ah thuciamna khat a bawl hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh zong tua thuciamna ah a kihel uh hi." 
2Kings23:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah le a nihna siampi le kongcingte in Topaʼ biakinn sung panin Baal le Asherah nusian milim adingin a kibawl nazatte khempeuh le vantung a om nate khempeuh biak nadingin a kibawlte hong paikhiatpih nading uh thu a pia hi. Amah in Jerusalem pualam Kidron leikang halna munah tuate halin a vute Bethel khua ah a pua hi. 
2Kings23:5 Tua ciangin amah in Judah khuapite le Jerusalem kiim a om mual tunga biaknate tungah paknamtui hal dingin Judah kumpite in a kipsak sa milim biateʼ siampite a hawl khia hi. Baal tung, ni tung, kha tung, aksi honpite tung le vantung a om nate khempeuh tungah paknamtui a halte zong a hawl khia hi." 
2Kings23:6 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn panin Jerusalem pualam, Kidron lui ah Asherah nusian milim paikhiat pihin hal a, tua ciangin amah in sat vui-in mi nautangteʼ han tungah a vuite lawn hi." 
2Kings23:7 Tua ciangin amah in numeite in Asherah milim adingin a kizang puante a gatna mun Topaʼ biakinn sunga om a paktat pawlteʼ innte a phel khia hi. 
2Kings23:8 Tua ciangin amah in Judah khuapite panin siampite khempeuh paikhiatpih a, Geba panin Beer-sheba ciang dong, siampite in paknamtui a halna mual tunga biaknate a susia hi. Tua ciangin amah in khuapi kulh kongpi veilam, khuapi ukpa Joshuaʼ kongpi lutna ah a om dawibiakna munte a phel khia hi." 
2Kings23:8 Tua ciangin amah in Judah khuapite panin siampite khempeuh paikhiatpih a, Geba panin Beer-sheba ciang dong, siampite in paknamtui a halna mual tunga biaknate a susia hi. Tua ciangin amah in khuapi kulh kongpi veilam, khuapi ukpa Joshuaʼ kongpi lutna ah a om dawibiakna munte a phel khia hi." 
2Kings23:9 Tua lai-a sem siampite ahihleh Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakna tau ah hong pai to thei lo uh a, ahi zongin amauʼ sanggamteʼ lakah silngo sawh loh anlum ne thei uh hi." 
2Kings23:10 Tua ciangin kuamah in Molek pasian tungah a tanu ahi a, a tapa ahi zongin biakna-in a hal theih nawn loh nadingin Hinnom Kuam sunga om Tofeth kici milim biakna mun a susia hi." 
2Kings23:11 Tua ciangin amah in a kiimnai-a om, inn sung ulian Nathanmelekʼ inn gei, Topaʼ biakinn sung lutna munah, Judah kumpite in ni tungah a ap uh a sakolte hem khia hi. Tua ciangin amah in niʼ sakol leengte mei tawh a hal hi." 
2Kings23:12 Tua ciangin Judah kumpite in a bawl sa, Ahazʼ inn dei tungnung khum zanga a om biakna taute le Topaʼ biakinn tual nihte sungah Manasseh in a bawl sa biakna taute, amah in phelin satnen a, tua a vuite Kidron lui ah a paai hi." 
2Kings23:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon in Sidon miteʼ kihhuaina Ashtoreth pasian ading le Moab-teʼ kihhuaina Khemosh pasian ading le Ammon miteʼ kihhuaina Milkom pasian adingin a lam, Jerusalem nisuahna lam, Oliv Mual leitaw lam a om mual tunga biaknate kumpipa in a susia hi." 
2Kings23:14 Tua ciangin amah in a biakna songte sat khamin, Asherah milimte phuk a, mihing guh tawh a dim tua munte a vuk hi." 
2Kings23:15 Tua tham loin Israel-te a khialsak Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam in Bethel ah a phuh sa mual tunga biakna, tua biakna mun a biakna tau tawh, amah in phelin a suangte sukham a, tuate a satvui hi. Amah in Asherah milim zong a hal hi." 
2Kings23:16 Tua ciangin Josiah kihei-in khuadak a, mual tunga om hante a mu hi. Amah in mi sawlin hante sung panin a guhte lasak a, hih thute a gen khol Pasianʼ mipa in a gen Topaʼ thugen tawh kizui-in biakna tau tungah tuate halin a susia hi." 
2Kings23:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Hua gal khat a ka muh phawkna mual bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin khuapi sung mite in ama kiangah, “Judah panin hong pai-in Bethel a biakna tau tungah na bawl hih thute a gen khol Pasianʼ mipaʼ han ahi hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
2Kings23:18 Tua ciangin amah in, “Amah tua ci omsak un; kuamah in ama guhte khiin kei un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Samaria panin hong paikhia kamsangteʼ guhte le ama guhte tua ci omsak uh hi." 
2Kings23:19 Tua ciangin Israel kumpite in a bawl sa, Topa a hehsakna uh, Samaria khuapite sunga om mual tunga biakna munte khempeuh zong Josiah in a la khia hi. Bethel a a hih sa khempeuh mah bangin tuate tungah a hih hi." 
2Kings23:20 Tua ciangin amah in tua lai-a a om, mual tunga biakna siampite khempeuh, biakna taute tungah that a, tuate tungah mihing guh a hal hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah amah a ciahkik hi." 
2Kings23:21 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi khempeuh thu pia a, “Hih thuciamna laibu sungah a kigelh mah bangin Topa na Pasian uh pahtawina-in Paisan Pawi bawl un,” a ci hi." 
2Kings23:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te thu a khen thukhenteʼ hun a kipan hitaleh, Israel kumpite ahih kei leh Judah kumpiteʼ hunsung khempeuh tua bang Paisan Pawi kibawl ngei lo hi." 
2Kings23:23 Ahih hangin Kumpi Josiahʼ uk kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Jerusalem ah Topa adingin Paisan Pawi kibawl hi. 
2Kings23:24 Tua tham loin Topaʼ biakinn sungah siampi Hilkiah in a muh laibu sungah a kigelh thukham kammalte amah in a kipsak theih nadingin Judah gam sung le Jerusalem-a om vankahte, aisante, inn sung pasian-te, milimte le a kihhuai nate khempeuh Josiah in a hem khia hi." 
2Kings23:25 Ama hun ma-in, amah tawh a kibang, Moses thukham tawh kizui-in a lungsim khempeuh, a nuntakna khempeuh le a thahatna khempeuh tawh Topaʼ lamah a kihei kumpi om lo a, ama nungah zong amah tawh a kibang khat zong hong khang nawn lo hi." 
2Kings23:26 Manasseh in amah a phinnate khempeuh hangin Judah tungah ama hehna, a lauhuai hih hehna lian panin Topa kihei nai lo hi." 
2Kings23:27 Topa in, “Israel ka khiinkhiat bangin ka muhna panin Judah zong ka khiin khia dinga, keimah in ka teel sa khuapi Jerusalem le ka min om ding hi, ka cihna biakinn ka paai khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings23:28 Tu-in Josiahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings23:29 Ama hun sungin Assiria kumpipa a huh dingin Eufratis gun ah Egypt kumpipa Faro Neko kuan to hi. Amah a khaktan dingin Kumpi Josiah zong a kuan hi. Faro Neko in Josiah a muh ciangin Megiddo ah a that hi. 
2Kings23:30 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in Megiddo panin a sisa-in leeng khat sungah amah pua-in Jerusalem ah ciahpih uh a, a hanah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam mite in Josiahʼ tapa Jehoahaz la-in sathau nilh uh a, a paʼ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le thum pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kha thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuami Jeremiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le thum pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kha thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuami Jeremiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings23:32 A pu a pateʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings23:33 Tua ciangin amah in Jerusalem a uk theih loh nadingin Faro Neko in Hamath gam sung Riblah khua ah amah kol bulh a, Judah mite tung panin ngun talen za khat le kham talen khat siah a kai hi." 
2Kings23:34 Tua ciangin Faro Neko in a pa Josiahʼ tangin Josiahʼ tapa Eliakim kumpi-in koih a, ama min Jehoiakim ci-in a kheelsak hi. Ahih hangin amah in Jehoahaz paikhiatpih hi; amah Egypt tung a, tua lai ah a si hi." 
2Kings23:35 Tua ciangin Jehoiakim in a ngun le a kham Faroʼ tungah pia a, ahih hangin Faroʼ thupiakna bangin tua sum a piak dingin a gam sung mite tung pan amah in siah a dong hi. Faro Neko tungah a piak dingin, amah in mi khempeuh tung panin a neihsa uh tawh kizui-in a gam sung miteʼ ngun le kham a dok hi." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakim in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Zebidah hi a, Rumah khuami Pedaiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings23:37 A pu a pateʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings24:1 Ama hun sungin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar hong kuan to a, Jehoiakim kum thum sung ama nasem a suak hi. Tua ciangin Jehoiakim in amah lehdo hi." 
2Kings24:2 Tua ciangin ama nasem kamsangte tungtawnin a gen Topaʼ thugenna bangin Judah a susia dingin ama lang khat ah Topa in Khaldea mihonte, Syria mihonte, Moab mihonte le Ammon mihonte a sawl hi." 
2Kings24:3 Ama gamtatna sate khempeuh tawh kizui-in Manassehʼ khialhna hangin ama muhna panin amaute a khiinkhiat nading le a diakdiakin, amah in khialhna nei lo mite a thahna hangin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh Judah tungah hih thu a hong tung taktak ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a mawh lo miteʼ sisan tawh Jerusalem kidimsak a, Topa in ama mawhna maisak lo hi." 
2Kings24:4  
2Kings24:5 Tu-in Jehoiakimʼ sepna a omlaite le a hih khempeuh, Judah Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Kings24:6 Tua ciangin Jehoiakim si a, ama tangin a tapa Jehoiakhin in a uk hi." 
2Kings24:7 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in Egypt lui panin Eufratis gun dong Egypt kumpipaʼ neih khempeuh laksak khin ahih manin Egypt kumpipa a gam panin hong kuan khiakik zo nawn lo hi. 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakhin kumpi a suahin kum sawm le kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kha thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Nehushta hi a, Jerusalem khuami Elnathanʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings24:9 A paʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings24:10 Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar hong kuan to a, tua khuapi a umcih hi." 
2Kings24:11 Ama nasemte in a umcih laitakin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar tua khuapi ah hong tung hi. 
2Kings24:12 Tua ciangin Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin in Babylon kumpipa tungah amah a kipan, ama nu, a nasemte, a uliante le a kumpi inn-a zaneite a kipia hi. Topa in a gen kholh sa bangin Babylon kumpipa in ama uk a kum giatna kumin thongkia-in amah la a, Topaʼ biakinn-a van manpha khempeuh pua khia-in, Kumpi Solomon in a bawl sa, Topaʼ biakinn sunga kham nazat khempeuh a satnen hi." 
2Kings24:13  
2Kings24:14 Amah in Jerusalem mi khempeuh, a ulian khempeuh le a thahat a vanglian khempeuh, galmatin tul sawm le khutsiamte le sikseekte khempeuh a ciahpih hi. Tua gam a a zawng pente sim loh kuamah dang om nawn lo hi." 
2Kings24:15 Amah in Babylon ah Jehoiakhin a ciahpih hi. Kumpipaʼ nu, kumpipaʼ zite, ama nuai ah a zaneite le tua gam sung ukpite, Jerusalem panin Babylon ah galmatin a la hi." 
2Kings24:16 Babylon kumpipa in a thahat, galdo dingin a hoih mi thahat khempeuh a vekpi-in tul sagih le khutsiamte le sikseekte tul khat, galmatin Babylon ah a paipih hi." 
2Kings24:17 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in Jehoiakhinʼ tangin ama paʼ sanggampa Mattaniah kumpi-in koih a, ama min Zedekiah ci-in a kheelsak hi." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawm nih le khat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat sung a uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuami Jeremiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawm nih le khat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat sung a uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khuami Jeremiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Kings24:19 Jehoiakimʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Kings24:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ hehna hangin ama kiang panin amaute a paih khiatna zah dong dingin Jerusalem le Judah tungah thu hong om hi. 
2Kings25:1 Tua ciangin Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa lehdo hi. Tua ahih manin ama uk a kum kuana, tua kum a kha sawmna, tua kha a ni sawm ni-in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar a galkap khempeuh tawh Jerusalem a sim dingin hong kuanin tua khua a umcih uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a kimkot ah umcih nading panmun a bawl uh hi." 
2Kings25:2 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Zedekiahʼ kum sawm le kum khatna kum dong tua khuapi ki-umcih hi. 
2Kings25:3 A kha lina a ni kua ni-in tua khuapi sungah kialpi nasia mahmah ahih manin tua gam mite ading an om lo hi. 
2Kings25:4 Tua ciangin khuapi kulh su let uh hi. Khaldea mite khuapi kiimah a om pi mahin, kumpipaʼ huan kiang lam kulhpi nih kikal kulh kongpi lampi zui-in kumpipa le a galhang mi khempeuh zanin a tai uh hi. Arabah lam manawhin amaute pai uh hi." 
2Kings25:5 Ahih hangin Khaldea miteʼ galkapte in kumpipa delh uh a, Jerikho zanglei ah amah pha uh hi; tua ciangin a galkap khempeuh ama kiang panin kithehthang hi." 
2Kings25:6 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa man uh a, ama tungah thukhenna a pia, Riblah a Babylon kumpipa kiangah amah paipih uh hi." 
2Kings25:7 Amaute in Zedekiahʼ muhna ah a tapate thatin, Zedekiahʼ mitte khel khia uh a, amah kol bulhin Babylon ah a paipih uh hi." 
2Kings25:8 A kha ngana, tua kha a ni sagih ni-in, Babylon Kumpi Nebukhadnezzarʼ kum sawm le kum kuana kumin, Babylon kumpipaʼ nasem, amah a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan Jerusalem ah hong pai hi." 
2Kings25:9 Amah in Topaʼ biakinn a kipan kumpipaʼ inn le Jerusalem khua sunga om inn khempeuh hal a, inn lian khempeuh amah in hal tum hi." 
2Kings25:10 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa tawh a om Khaldea mi galkapte khempeuh in Jerusalem kimkot a kulhpi susia uh hi. 
2Kings25:11 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia a om lai mite le Babylon kumpipa a taisan mite, mihonpi a om lai teng khempeuh salin paipih khawm hi." 
2Kings25:12 Ahih hangin a cingte a ukpa in leenggui lote a en ding le lokho dingin tua gam mi a zawng pente pawl khat nusia lai hi. 
2Kings25:13 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om sumngo khuampite, Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om tuikuang kingaknate le sumngo tuikuangpi, Khaldea mite in satnen uh a, Babylon ah a sumngo pua uh hi." 
2Kings25:14 Tua ciangin amaute in beelte, kawbiate, taitehte, paknamtui adingin pakante le biakinn sung nasepna a kizang sumngo nazatte khempeuh," 
2Kings25:15 vutluahna le haite la khia uh hi. A cingte a ukpa in kham ahite kham mahin la-in, ngun ahite a ngun mahin a la hi." 
2Kings25:16 Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn ading a, a bawl khuampi nihte, tuikuangpi khat le a kingaknate, sumngo tawh kibawl hih nazatte khempeuh ahihleh tawi teh zawh ding hi lo hi." 
2Kings25:17 Khuampi khat a sanna pi sawm nih le sagih hi a, tua tungah sumngo khuam luzepna khat om hi; khuam luzepna a sanna pi li le alang ahi hi. Sumngo tawh a kibawl ngen banga kikalh simsiam le mang kawlsingte khuam luzepna kimkot ah om hi. A khuampi nihna zong tua mah bangin, ngen banga kikalh simsiam tawh ahi hi." 
2Kings25:18 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa in siampi lianpa Seraiah, siampi nihna Zefaniah le kong a cing mi thumte a la hi." 
2Kings25:19 Tua ciangin khuapi panin galkapte a uk ngei ulian khat le khuapi sungah a om kumpipaʼ thukuppihte mi nga a la hi. Tua ciangin gam sung mite a khawm galkapte a ukpaʼ lai-at pa a la hi. Tua ciangin khuapi sungah a om tua gam sung mi sawm guk a la hi. 
2Kings25:20 Tua ciangin a cingte a ukpa Nebuzaradan in amaute la-in Riblah a Babylon kumpipa kiangah amaute a paipih hi. 
2Kings25:21 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipa in amaute vat a, Hamath gam sung Riblah ah amaute a that hi. Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ gam panin salin Judah mite kila khia hi." 
2Kings25:22 Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah a om lai, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a nusiatte tungah a uk dingin Shafanʼ tapa Ahikam, a tapa Gedaliah amah in a seh hi." 
2Kings25:23 Tu-in gam sunga om galkap a ukte le a mite in Babylon kumpipa in a uk dingin Gedaliah a sehna thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a mite uh tawh Mizpah a Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh hi. Tuate pen Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael, Kareahʼ tapa Johanan, Netofah mi Tanhumethʼ tapa Seraiah le Maakath mi Jaazaniah ahi uh hi." 
2Kings25:24 Tua ciangin amaute le a mite uh tungah Gedaliah kiciamin, “Khaldea mi ulianteʼ hangin lau kei un; gam sungah teengin, Babylon kumpipaʼ na sem un. Tua hileh note adingin thu hong nuam ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Kings25:25 Ahih hangin a kha sagihna sungin kumpi innkuan sung panin Elishamaʼ tapa Nethaniah, a tapa Ishmael mihing sawm tawh hong kuanin Gedaliah le Mizpah ah amah tawh a om Judah mi le Khaldea mite simin a that hi." 
2Kings25:26 Tua ciangin a lian a neu-in mi khempeuh le galkap a ukte kithawi-in Egypt ah pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Khaldea mite kihta uh hi. 
2Kings25:27 Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin thong sungah a om zawh kum sawm thum le kum sagihna kum, kha sawm le nihna, tua kha ni sawm nih le sagih ni, Babylon kumpipa Evil-merodak in uk ding a kipat kumin, hehpihna tawh thong panin Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin a khah hi." 
2Kings25:28 Amah in migitna kam tawh amah hopih a, Babylon sunga amah tawh a om kumpi a mat dangte khempeuh sangin a sang zaw-in amah a pahtawi hi." 
2Kings25:29 Tua ahih ciangin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante suah khia hi. Tua ciangin a nuntak sung nisimin kumpipaʼ sabuai ah a manmanin an a ne hi. 
2Kings25:30 Tua ciangin ama ngah thuap dingin, amah a nuntak sung tawntung nisimin tanh khat, a manmanin ngahthuapna ama tungah kumpipa in a pia hi." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamʼ ta Seth, Sethʼ ta Enosh," 
1Chronicles1:2 Enoshʼ ta Kenan, Kenanʼ ta Mahalalel, Mahalalelʼ ta Jared," 
1Chronicles1:3 Jaredʼ ta Enok, Enokʼ ta Methuselah, Methuselahʼ ta Lamek," 
1Chronicles1:4 Lamekʼ ta Noah ahi hi. Noah in tapa thum nei a, tuate pen Shem, Ham le Jafeth ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:5 Jafethʼ tapate: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshek le Tiras hi a, amauʼ min ciat pua-in minam tuamtuam a piang hi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomerʼ suante: Ashkenaz mite, Rifath mite le Togarmah mite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:7 Javanʼ suante: Elishah mite, Tarshish mite, Kittim mite le Rodanim mite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hamʼ tapate: Kush, Egypt, Put le Kanaan hi a, amauʼ min ciat pua-in minam a piang hi." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kushʼ suante: Seba mite, Havilah mite, Sabta mite, Raamah mite le Sabteka mite ahi uh hi. Raamahʼ suante: Sheba mite le Dedan mite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kush in Nimrod kici tapa khat nei a, leitungah amah a vanglian masa pen ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:11 Egypt pen Lud mite, Anam mite, Lehab mite, Naftuh mite," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathrus mite, Kasluh mite (Filistia miteʼ hong pianna) le Kaftor miteʼ pianna pupi ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaan pen a tacil Sidon le Heth," 
1Chronicles1:14 le Jebus mite, Amor mite, Girgash mite," 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv mite, Arka mite, Sin mite," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad mite, Zemari mite le Hamath miteʼ pianna pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:17 Shemʼ tapate: Elam, Asshur, Arpakshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether le Meshek hi a, amauʼ min ciat pua-in minam a piang hi." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakshad pen Shelahʼ pa hi a, Shelah pen Eberʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberʼ sung pan a piang tapa nihte: A khat paʼ min Peleg ahi hi (bang hang hiam cih leh ama hunin gam kikhen hi). A sanggampaʼ min Joktan ahi hi. 
1Chronicles1:20 Joktan pen Almodad mite, Shelef mite, Hazarmaveth mite, Jerah mite," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram mite, Uzal mite, Diklah mite," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal mite, Abimael mite, Sheba mite," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir mite, Havilah mite le Jobab miteʼ pianna pa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh, Joktanʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir mite, Havilah mite le Jobab miteʼ pianna pa ahi hi. Hihte khempeuh, Joktanʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shem, Arpakshad, Shelah," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nahor le Terah hi a," 
1Chronicles1:27 tua ciangin Abraham a kici Abram ahi suk uh hi. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahamʼ tapate: Isaac le Ishmael ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles1:29 Amauʼ khangsimna hih bang ahi hi: Ishmaelʼ tacil Nebaioth ahi hi. Tua ciangin Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishma, Dumah, Massa, Hadad, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Nafish le Kedemah ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Ishmaelʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahamʼ zineu Keturahʼ tapate: Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak le Shuah ahi uh hi. Jokshanʼ tapate: Sheba le Dedan ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midianʼ tapate: Efah, Efer, Hanok, Abida le Eldaah ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Keturahʼ suanlekhakte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abraham pen Isaacʼ pa ahi hi. Isaacʼ tapate Esau le Israel ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esauʼ tapate: Elifaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam le Korah ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifazʼ tapate: Teman, Omar, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna le Amalek ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuelʼ tapate: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah le Mizzah ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:38 Seirʼ tapate: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer le Dishan ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:39 Lotanʼ tapate Hori le Homam hi uh a, Lotanʼ sanggamnu pen Timna ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobalʼ tapate: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shefi le Onam ahi uh hi. Zibeonʼ tapate: Aiah le Anah ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:41 Anahʼ tapa Dishon ahi hi. Dishonʼ tapate: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran le Kheran ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezerʼ tapate: Bilhan, Zaavan le Jaakan ahi uh hi. Dishanʼ tapate: Uz le Aran ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israel-te tungah kumpi khat peuhpeuh in a uk ma-in Edom gam sungah a uk kumpite: Beorʼ tapa Bela hi a, ama khuapi min Dinhabah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a sih ciangin ama tangin Bozrah khuami Zerahʼ tapa Jobab in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela a sih ciangin ama tangin Bozrah khuami Zerahʼ tapa Jobab in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobab a sih ciangin ama tangin Teman miteʼ gam mi Husham in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:45 Jobab a sih ciangin ama tangin Teman miteʼ gam mi Husham in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:46 Husham a sih ciangin Moab gam sungah Midian mite a zopa, Bedadʼ tapa Hadad in ama tangin uk a, ama khuapi min Avith ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadad a sih ciangin ama tangin Masrekah khuami Samlah in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:48 Samlah a sih ciangin ama tangin Eufratis gun gei-a om Rehoboth khuami Shaul in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaul a sih ciangin ama tangin Akborʼ tapa Baal-hanan in uk hi. 
1Chronicles1:50 Baal-hanan a sih ciangin ama tangin Hadad in uk hi. Ama khuapi min Pai hi a, ama ziʼ min Mehetabel hi a, Mezahabʼ tunu hi a, Matredʼ tanu ahi hi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Tua ciangin Hadad si hi. Edom ukpite: Ukpi Timna, Aliah, Jetheth," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholibamah, Elah, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenaz, Teman, Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiel le Iram hi uh a, hihte pen Edom ukpite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:1 Israelʼ tapate: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, Zebulun," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Josef, Benjamin, Naftali, Gad le Asher ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:3 Judahʼ tapate: Er, Onan le Shelah ahi uh hi. Hih thumte pen Kanaan mi Bathshua tawh a neih ahi hi. Judahʼ tacil Er pen Topaʼ muhna ah gamtat hoih lo ahih manin Topa in amah that hi." 
1Chronicles2:4 A tapaʼ zi Tamar in zong amah tawh Perez le Zerah nei hi. Judah in a vekpi-in tapa nga nei hi. 
1Chronicles2:5 Perezʼ tapate: Hezron le Hamul ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zerahʼ tapate: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Kalkol le Dara, a vekpi-in nga pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karmiʼ tapa: A ki-ap nate ah a khial, Israel mite a nawngkaisak Akhan ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:8 Tua ciangin Ethanʼ tapa Azariah ahi hi. 
1Chronicles2:9 Ama sung panin a suak Hezronʼ tapate: Jerahmeel, Ram le Khelubai ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram pen Amminadabʼ pa hi a, Amminadab pen Judahʼ tapateʼ sung pan ulian Nahshonʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahshon pen Salmaʼ pa, Salma pen Boazʼ pa," 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaz pen Obedʼ pa, Obed pen Jessiʼ pa ahi hi."

1Chronicles2:14 a lina Nethanel, a ngana Raddai," 
1Chronicles2:15 a gukna Ozem, a sagihna David a nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:16 Amauʼ sanggam numeite Zeruiah le Abigail ahi uh hi. Zeruiahʼ tapate: Abishai, Joab le Asahel, thum pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail in Amasa nei a, Amasaʼ pa pen Ishmael mi Jether ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:18 Hezronʼ tapa Kaleb in a zi Azubah le Jerioth tawh ta nei hi. Ama tate: Jesher, Shobab le Ardon ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azubah a sih ciangin Kaleb in Efrath teen pihin, tua nu in amah tawh Hur nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hur pen Uriʼ pa hi a, Uri pen Bezalelʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ama khan kum sawm guk a phak ciangin Hezron in a teenpih, Gileadʼ pa Makhirʼ tanu luppih hi. Tua nu in amah tawh Segub nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segub pen Jairʼ pa hi a, Gilead gam sungah khuapi sawm nih le thum nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ahih hangin Geshur le Aram in amaute tung panin Havvoth jair khua le Kenath le a khuaneute, khua sawm guk la hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Gileadʼ pa Makhirʼ suanlekhakte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Hezron a sih khit ciangin Kaleb in a pa Hezronʼ zi Efrath luppih a, tua nu in amah tawh Tekoa khuapi a sat Ashhur a nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hezronʼ tacil Jerahmeelʼ tapate: A tacil Ram, Bunah, Oren le Ahijah ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahmeel in zi dang khat zong nei a, a min Atarah ahi hi. Amah pen Onamʼ nu ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerahmeelʼ tacil Ramʼ tapate: Maaz, Jamin le Eker ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles2:28 Onamʼ tapate: Shammai le Jada ahi uh hi. Shammaiʼ tapate: Nadab le Abishur ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishurʼ ziʼ min Abihail hi a, tua nu in amah tawh Ahban le Molid nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadabʼ tapate: Seled le Appaim ahi uh hi. Seled in ta nei loin si hi. 
1Chronicles2:31 Appaimʼ tapa Ishi ahi hi. Ishiʼ tapa Sheshan ahi hi. Sheshanʼ tapa Ahlai ahi hi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Tua ciangin Shammaiʼ sanggampa Jadaʼ tapate: Jether le Jonathan ahi uh hi. Jether in ta nei loin si hi. 
1Chronicles2:33 Jonathanʼ tapate: Peleth le Zaza ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Jerahmeelʼ suanlekhakte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan in tapa nei loin tanu bek nei hi. Ahih hangin Sheshan in Jarha min nei Egypt sila khat nei hi. 
1Chronicles2:35 Tua ahih ciangin Sheshan in a sila Jarha tungah a zi dingin a tanu pia a, tua nu in Attai nei hi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Attai pen Nathanʼ pa hi a, Nathan pen Zabadʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad pen Eflalʼ pa hi a, Eflal pen Obedʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obed pen Jehuʼ pa hi a, Jehu pen Azariahʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariah pen Helezʼ pa hi a, Helez pen Eleasahʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasah pen Sismaiʼ pa hi a, Sismai pen Shallumʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shallum pen Jekamiahʼ pa hi a, Jekamiah pen Elishamaʼ pa ahi hi."

1Chronicles2:50 Hih a nuai-ate zong Kalebʼ suanlekhakte ahi uh hi. Kalebʼ zi Efrathʼ tacil Hurʼ tapate: Kiriath-jearim khuapi a sat Shobal,"

1Chronicles2:54 Bethlehem khuapi a sat Salmaʼ suante: Netofah mite, Atroth-beth-joab mite le Zorah mi ahi Manahath minam nih sung pan alang ahi hi." 
1Chronicles2:55 Jabez ah a teeng lai thei minamte: Tirath mite, Shimeath mite le Sukath mite ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Rekhab minamte tawh a kiteeng Ken mite ahi uh hi."

1Chronicles4:2 Shobalʼ tapa Reaiah pen Jahathʼ pa hi a, Jahath pen Ahumai le Lahadʼ pa ahi hi. Hihte pen Zorah khua ah a teeng minamteʼ pu le pate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles4:3 Hur pen a pa Kalebʼ zi Efrathʼ ta upa pen hi a, ama suanlekhakte in Bethlehem khuapi sat uh hi. Hurʼ tapa thumte: Etam, Penuel le Ezer ahi uh hi. Etam in tapa thum nei a, tuate pen Jezreel, Ishma le Idbash ahi uh hi. Tanu khat zong nei a, a min Hazzeleponi ahi hi. Penuel pen Gedor khuapi a sat pa hi a, Ezer pen Hushah khuapi a sat pa ahi hi."

1Chronicles4:7 Helah tawh a tapate: Zereth, Izhar le Ethnan ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles4:8 Koz pen Anub le Zobebahʼ pa hi a, Harumʼ tapa Aharhelʼ suanteʼ pupi ahi hi."

1Chronicles4:10 Jabez in Israel Pasian tungah thu ngen a, “Kei thupha hong pia-in ka gamgi hong keeksak in. Kei hong ompih inla, siatna khatpeuh in kei hong gimsak loh nadingin hong kem in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasian in ama ngetna pia hi." 
1Chronicles4:11 Shuhahʼ sanggampa Khelub pen Mehirʼ pa hi a, Mehir pen Eshtonʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton in Bethrafa, Paseah le Tehinnah, tapa thum nei a, Tehinnah pen Irnahash khuapi a sat pa ahi hi. Hih miteʼ suanlekhakte, Rekah munah teeng uh hi."

Ishbah pen Eshtemoa khuapi a sat pa ahi hi. Mered in Judah minam numei khat zong teenpih a, tua tawh tapa thum nei hi. Tuate in: Gedor khuapi a sat pa Jered, Soko khuapi a sat pa Heber le Zanoah khuapi a sat pa Jekuthiel ahi hi."

1Chronicles4:38 a minin a kilo hih mite pen amauʼ beh ciatah ulian hi uh a, amauʼ beh ciat nakpi takin a khang hi."

1Chronicles4:43 Amaute in Amalek mi a suakta a omlaite susia uh a, tu ni dongin tua munah amaute teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:1 Israelʼ tate sung panin Reuben a tacil ahi hi. (Amah in a paʼ zineute khat luppih ahih manin tacil hi napi-in ama innluah za pen Josefʼ tungah kipia hi. Tua ahih ciangin innluah za tawh kizui-in khangsimna ah amah kiciamteh lo hi. 
1Chronicles5:2 A sanggamte lakah Judah a thahat suakin ama sung panin ulian khat a om hangin innluah za pen Josef aʼ ahi hi.) 
1Chronicles5:3 Israelʼ tacil Reubenʼ tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron le Karmi ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Joelʼ suante: A tapa Shemaiah, a tapa Gog, a tapa Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:4 Joelʼ suante: A tapa Shemaiah, a tapa Gog, a tapa Shimei," 
1Chronicles5:5 a tapa Mikah, a tapa Reaiah, a tapa Baal," 
1Chronicles5:6 le a tapa Beerah hi a, Assiria kumpipa Tiglath-pileser in amauʼ minam makai Beerah manin salin a puakkhiat pa ahi hi. Amah pen Reuben mite a ukpipa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles5:7 Tua ciangin amauʼ khangsimna a kiciamteh ciangin a inn kuankuanin ama behte: Ukpi Jeiel, Zekhariah," 
1Chronicles5:8 le Joel mite beh sung panin Shemaʼ tapa Azaz, a tapa Bela ahi hi. Aroer le tua panin Nebo le Baal-meon ciang dongah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:8 le Joel mite beh sung panin Shemaʼ tapa Azaz, a tapa Bela ahi hi. Aroer le tua panin Nebo le Baal-meon ciang dongah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:9 Gilead gam sungah amauʼ bawngte khangin tampi pha ahih manin Eufratis gun hih lam pang sehnel gam lutna ciang dong nisuahna lamah zong a teeng uh hi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Tua ciangin Saulʼ hun lai-in amaute in Hagri mite simin zo uh a, Gilead nisuahna lam gam khempeuh a amauʼ puanbukte luahin tuate sungah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Bashan gam Salekah dongah Reuben-teʼ gal khat ah a teeng Gad minamte: 
1Chronicles5:12 Ukpi Joel hi-in, a zom Shafam hi a, Janai le Shafat, Bashan ah beh makai ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:12 Ukpi Joel hi-in, a zom Shafam hi a, Janai le Shafat, Bashan ah beh makai ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:13 Tua ciangin amauʼ beh makai dangte: Mikhael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jakan, Zia le Eber, sagih pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hihte pen Buzʼ tapa Jahdo, a tapa Jeshishai, a tapa Mikhael, a tapa Gilead, a tapa Jaroah, a tapa Huriʼ tapa Abihailʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Guniʼ tapa Abdielʼ tapa Ahi pen amauʼ behte sungah ukpi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles5:16 Amaute Gilead gam sung, Bashan gam le a khuapite sung le Sharon gam sung lo nona a kiteen theihna ciang dongah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:17 Hihte khempeuh Judah kumpi Jothamʼ hunsung le Israel kumpi Jeroboamʼ hun sungin khangsimna ah kiciamteh hi. 
1Chronicles5:18 Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte in mi thahat, lum le namsau kuah in thal a tawi, gal a siam, nasem dingin a baih sa-in a om mi tul sawm li le tul li le za sagih le sawm guk nei hi." 
1Chronicles5:19 Amaute in Hagri mite, Jetur mite, Nafish mite le Nodab mite zo uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Amaute a sim nadingin huhna a ngah uh ciangin Hagri mite le amau tawh a kipawl khempeuhte amauteʼ khut sungah kipia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal kidona sungah amaute in Pasianʼ tungah ko uh a, amaute in Pasian muang uh ahih manin amah in amauteʼ thumna a pia hi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Amaute in amauʼ ganhingte matsak uh hi. A kalaoh uh tul sawm nga, tuu tul za nih le tul sawm nga, la tul nih le mi tul za khat hing mat uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:22 Tua gal pen Pasianʼ gal ahih manin mi tampi tak kithatin puk hi. Tua ciangin amaute sal a suah hun dong uh tua munah teeng uh hi. 
1Chronicles5:23 Manasseh minam a langte pen Bashan panin Baal-hermon, Senir le Hermon Mual tungah teengin tam pha mahmah uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:24 Amauʼ beh lutangte: Efer, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah le Jahdiel hi a, a thahat galhangte, mi minthangte, a beh lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:24 Amauʼ beh lutangte: Efer, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremiah, Hodaviah le Jahdiel hi a, a thahat galhangte, mi minthangte, a beh lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ahih hangin amaute in a pate uh Pasianʼ thu palsat uh a, Pasian in amauteʼ mai ah a suksiat tua gam miteʼ pasian-te bia uh hi." 
1Chronicles5:26 Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian in Assiria kumpipa Pul (Tiglath-pileser zong a kici) Assiria kumpipa hansuah a, amah in Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte pua khia-in, Halah, Habor, Hara khuate le Gozan gun dungah paipihin tu ni dongin tua gamte ah om uh hi."

1Chronicles6:33 Hih nasep a semteʼ khangsimna a nuai-a bang ahi hi. Kohath mite beh sung panin: Heman la makai pa hi a, Joelʼ tapa ahi hi. Hemanʼ khangsimna pen a pupi Israel lam manawhin kileh sim to hi. Heman a pa Joel, a pa Samuel,"

1Chronicles6:55 Judah gam sungah Hebron le a kiim lo nonate amaute tungah pia uh a," 
1Chronicles6:56 ahih hangin a lote le a khuaneute Jefunnehʼ tapa Kaleb tungah a pia uh hi.
