1Chronicles6:60 Tua ciangin Benjamin minamteʼ gam sung panin Geba a lo nona gamte tawh, Alemeth a lo nona gamte tawh le Anathoth a lo nona gamte tawh ahi hi. Amauʼ beh khempeuhʼ khuapite sawm le thum ahi hi." 
1Chronicles6:61 Kohath mi a omlaite tungah aisanna tawh Manasseh minam a langteʼ gam sung panin khuapi sawm kipia hi. 
1Chronicles6:62 Gershom-te beh tungah a innkuan a kizui-in Issakhar-teʼ gam, Asher-teʼ gam, Naftali-teʼ gam le Bashan-a om Manasseh-teʼ gam sung panin khuapi sawm le thum kipia hi." 
1Chronicles6:63 Merari-te beh tungah a innkuan a kizui-in Reuben-teʼ gam, Gad-teʼ gam le Zebulun-teʼ gam sung panin khuapi sawm le nih kipia hi." 
1Chronicles6:64 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite in hih bangin Levi mite tungah khuapite a lo nonate tawh a pia uh hi. 
1Chronicles6:65 Amaute in Judah-teʼ gam, Simeon-teʼ gam le Benjamin-teʼ gam sung panin zong a minin a kilo hih khuapite amaute tungah a pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles6:66 Tua ciangin Kohath-te beh pawl khat in Efraim minamteʼ gam sung panin amauʼ gam khuapite mah ngah uh hi.

1Chronicles6:69 Aijalon a lo nona gamte tawh, Gath-rimmon a lo nona gamte tawh,"

1Chronicles6:71 Manasseh minam a langteʼ gam sung panin Gershom-te beh tungah a kipiate: Bashan gam sunga Golan a lo nona gamte tawh le Ashtaroth a lo nona gamte tawh ahi hi.

1Chronicles7:1 Issakharʼ tapate: Tola, Puah, Jashub le Shimron, li pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tolaʼ tapate: Uzzi, Refaiah, Jeriel, Jahmai, Ibsam le Shemuel-te hi a, amauʼ beh sung panin innkuan lutangte hi a, Tola-te beh pen amauʼ khangin a galhangte ahi uh hi. Davidʼ hun laitakin mihing tul sawm nih le tul nih le za guk pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa Izrahiah nei hi. Izrahiah le a tapate Mikhael, Obadiah, Joel le Isshiah, mi nga hi a, a vekpi-in ukpite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa Izrahiah nei hi. Izrahiah le a tapate Mikhael, Obadiah, Joel le Isshiah, mi nga hi a, a vekpi-in ukpite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzzi in tapa Izrahiah nei hi. Izrahiah le a tapate Mikhael, Obadiah, Joel le Isshiah, mi nga hi a, a vekpi-in ukpite ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:4 Amauteʼ banah a pate uh a inn kuankuanin khangsimna ah a kiciaptehna tawh kizui-in galsim dingin galkap honte mi tul sawm thum le tul guk om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in zi tampi nei-in ta tampi nei uh hi. 
1Chronicles7:5 Issakhar minam sungah a om, khangsimna ah a kiciamteh, a galhang a thahat amau beh mi a vekpi-in tul sawm giat le tul sagih ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjaminʼ tapate: Bela, Bekher le Jediael, thum pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:7 Belaʼ tapate: Ezbon, Uzzi, Uzziel, Jerimoth le Iri, nga pha uh a, amauʼ beh sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat galhangte ahi uh hi. Amauʼ khangsimna a kiciaptehna ah tul sawm nih le tul nih le sawm thum le li pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekherʼ tapate: Zemirah, Joash, Eliezer, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremoth, Abijah, Anathoth le Alemeth ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:9 Hihte khempeuh Bekherʼ tapate ahi uh hi. Amauʼ khang tawh kizui-in a khangsimna a kiciaptehna ah, amauʼ beh sungah innkuan lutang, a thahat a galhang mihing tul sawm nih le za nih ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediaelʼ tapa pen Bilhan ahi hi. Bilhanʼ tapate: Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Khenaanah, Zethan, Tarshish le Ahishar ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:11 Hihte khempeuh amauʼ beh sungah innkuan lutang hi uh a, a thahat, a galhang, Jediaelʼ suante galsimna ah nasem dingin a baih sa-in a om mihing tul sawm le tul sagih le za nih pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:12 Tua ciangin Shuppim le Huppim zong hih minamte sung mah hi a, Dan in Hushim kici tapa khat a nei hi." 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftaliʼ tapate: Jahziel, Guni, Jezer le Shallum hi a, Bilhah sung pan a piangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manassehʼ tapate: A zineu Aram numei tawh a neih Asriel le Makhir ahi hi. Makhir pen Gileadʼ pa ahi hi. 
1Chronicles7:15 Tua ciangin Makhir in Huppim le Shuppim ading zi a la hi. Ama sanggamnuʼ min Maakah ahi hi. Makhirʼ tapa a nihnaʼ min Zelofehad hi a, Zelofehad in tanu bek a nei hi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Tua ciangin Makhirʼ zi Maakah in tapa nih nei a, a min Peresh le Sheresh ahi hi. Pereshʼ tapate Ulam le Rakem ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulamʼ tapa Bedan ahi hi. Hihte pen Manassehʼ tapa Makhirʼ tapa Gileadʼ suante ahi hi. 
1Chronicles7:18 Tua ciangin Gileadʼ sanggamnu Hammolekheth in Ishhod, Abiezer le Mahlah nei hi." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemidaʼ tapate Ahian, Shekhem, Likhi le Aniam ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efraimʼ suante: A tapa Shuthelah, a tapa Bered, a tapa Tahath, a tapa Eleadah, a tapa Tahath," 
1Chronicles7:21 a tapa Zabad, a tapa Shuthelah ahi hi. Efraim in tapa dang nih nei a, tuate Ezer le Elead ahi uh hi. Gath khua miteʼ bawng a sut dingin a kuan lai-in Gath mite in amau tegel na that uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:22 Tua ciangin a pa uh Efraim ni tampi sung kap a, amah a hehnem dingin a sanggamte hong pai uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:23 Tua ciangin Efraim in a zi luppih a, amah gai-in tapa khat nei hi. Ama inn sungah siatna tung ahih manin amah in a min Beriah a phuak hi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ama tanu Sheerah hi a, Beth-horon nuainung le a tungnung le Uzzen-sheerah khua a lam nu ahi hi."

1Chronicles7:27 a tapa Nun, a tapa Joshua ahi hi."

1Chronicles7:29 Manassehʼ suante in Beth-shean le a khuapite, Taanak le a khuapite, Megiddo le a khuapite, Dor le a khuapite a uk uh hi. Hihte sungah Israelʼ tapa Josefʼ suante a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:30 Asherʼ tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah le a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriahʼ tapate: Heber le Malkhiel hi a, Malkhiel pen Birzaith khuapi a sat pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heber pen Jaflet, Shomer, Hotham le a sanggamnu uh Shua-teʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles7:33 Jafletʼ tapate: Pasak, Bimhal le Ashvath ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Jafletʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:34 A sanggampa Shomerʼ tapate: Rohgah, Jehubbah le Aram ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:35 A sanggampa Hothamʼ tapate: Zofah, Imna, Shelesh le Amal ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zofahʼ suante: Suah, Harnefer, Shual, Beri, Imrah," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bezer, Hod, Shamma, Shilshah, Ithran le Beera ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:38 Jetherʼ suante: Jefunneh, Pispa le Ara ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ullaʼ suante: Arah, Hanniel le Rizia ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles7:40 Hihte khempeuh Asherʼ beh lutangte, a kipakta, a thahat galhangte, ulian a ukte ahi uh hi. Gal sungah nasem dingin khangsimna ah a kiciamteh amaute a phazah mihing tul sawm nih le tul guk ahi hi."

1Chronicles8:12 Elpaalʼ tapate: Eber, Misham le Ono le Lod a khuapite tawh a sat Shemed,"

1Chronicles8:19 Jakim, Zikri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Zillethai, Eliel,"

1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zikri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananiah, Elam, Anthothijah," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdeiah le Penuel-te pen Shashakʼ suante ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamsherai, Shehariah, Athaliah," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaareshiah, Elijah le Zikri te pen Jehoramʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles8:28 Hihte pen amau khang tawh kizui-in beh lutangte, a ukpite ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh Jerusalem ah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles8:29 Gibeon khuapi a sat pa Jeiel pen Gibeon ah teeng a, ama ziʼ min Maakah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:30 Ama tapa upa pen Abdon, tua ciangin Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahio, Zekher," 
1Chronicles8:32 le Mikloth (amah pen Shimeahʼ pa) ahi hi. Tu-in amauʼ suanlekhakte zong Jerusalem-a amauʼ behteʼ gal khat ah amauʼ behte mah tawh teeng uh hi. 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner pen Kishʼ pa, Kish pen Saulʼ pa ahi hi. Saul pen Jonathan, Malkhishua, Abinadab le Eshbaalʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:34 Tua ciangin Jonathanʼ tapa pen Meribbaal hi a, Meribbaal pen Mikahʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikahʼ tapate: Pithon, Melek, Tarea le Ahaz ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahaz pen Jehoaddahʼ pa ahi hi. Jehoaddah pen Alemeth, Azmaveth, le Zimriʼ pa hi a, Zimri pen Mozaʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza pen Bineaʼ pa ahi hi. Bineaʼ tapa Rafah, a tapa Eleasah, a tapa Azel ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel in tapa guk nei a, tuateʼ minte: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah le Hanan ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh Azelʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel in tapa guk nei a, tuateʼ minte: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah le Hanan ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh Azelʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles8:39 Azelʼ sanggampa Eshekʼ tapate: A tacil Ulam, a nihna Jeush le a thumna Elifelet ahi hi." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulamʼ tapate a thahat galhangte, thal tawite, tapa tampi le tupa tampi a neite hi a, mi za le sawm nga pha uh hi. Hihte khempeuh Benjamin minamte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:1 Israel mi khempeuh khangsimna ah kiciamteh a, Israel Kumpiteʼ Laibu sungah tuate kigelh hi. Amau thuman lohna hangin gimpiakna-in Babylon ah salin Judah mite kipaipih hi." 
1Chronicles9:2 Tu-in amauʼ neihsa amauʼ khuapite sungah a tengkik masate pen Israel nautangte, siampite, Levi mite le biakinn nasemte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:3 Tua ciangin Judah, Benjamin, Efraim le Manasseh mi pawl khat Jerusalem ah teeng uh a, tua a teengte:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Judah tapa Perezʼ tapate sung panin Baniʼ tapa Imri, a tapa Omri, a tapa Ammihud, a tapa Uthai a makai ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:5 Tua ciangin Judah tapa Shelah mite sung panin: Innkuan lutang Asaiah a makai ahi hi. 
1Chronicles9:6 Judah tapa Zerah mite sung panin: Jeuel a makai ahi hi. Judah minam sung panin innkuan za guk le sawm kua ahi hi. 
1Chronicles9:7 Benjamin mite sung panin: Hassenuahʼ tapa Hodaviah, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Sallu ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:8 Tua ciangin Jehoramʼ tapa Ibneiah, Makriʼ ta Uri, a tapa Elah le Ibnijahʼ ta Reuel, a tapa Shefatiah, a tapa Meshullam ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:9 Benjamin minamte sung panin innkuan za kua le sawm nga le guk ahi hi. Hih min kilote khempeuh pen amauʼ beh ciatah beh lutangte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles9:10 Siampiteʼ sung panin: Jedaiah, Jehoiarib, Jakhin," 
1Chronicles9:11 le Ahitubʼ tapa Meraioth, a tapa Zadok, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Hilkiahʼ tapa Azariah, (Pasianʼ biakinn sung a ukpipa)" 
1Chronicles9:12 le Malkhijahʼ tapa Pashhur, a tapa Jehoramʼ tapa Adaiah le Immerʼ tapa Meshilemith, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Jahzerah, a tapa Adielʼ tapa Maasai ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:13 Hihte banah amauʼ behte, a beh lutangte, Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasep nadingin a siam mahmah mihing tul khat le za sagih le sawm guk ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:14 Levi mite sung panin: Merariʼ tapate sung pan Hashabiah, a tapa Azrikam, a tapa Hasshubʼ tapa Shemaiah," 
1Chronicles9:15 le Bakbakkar, Heresh, Galal le Asafʼ tapa Zikri, a tapa Mikaʼ tapa Mattaniah," 
1Chronicles9:16 le Jeduthunʼ tapa Galal, a tapa Shemaiahʼ tapa Obadiah le Netofah khuaneute sungah a teeng, Elkanahʼ tapa Asaʼ tapa Berekhiah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:16 le Jeduthunʼ tapa Galal, a tapa Shemaiahʼ tapa Obadiah le Netofah khuaneute sungah a teeng, Elkanahʼ tapa Asaʼ tapa Berekhiah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:17 Kulh kongpi cingte: Shallum, Akkub, Talmon le Ahiman hi a, Shallum pen amauʼ makai pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:18 Tu dongin Kumpipaʼ Kulh kongpi nisuahna lam pangah a omte ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Levi miteʼ omna kongcingte ahi ngei uh hi. 
1Chronicles9:19 A pu a pate uh, biakbuk lutna mun a cing, Topaʼ phual a ukte ahih uh mah bangin Korahʼ tapa Ebiasaf, a tapa Koreʼ tapa Shallum le a behte ahi Korah mite pen nasepna a uk, puanbuk kong a cingte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:20 Eleazarʼ tapa Finehas pen a beisa hun sungah amaute a ukpa hi a, Topa in amah ompih hi." 
1Chronicles9:21 Meshelemiahʼ tapa Zekhariah pen kikhopna puanbuk lutna ah kongcing pa ahi hi. 
1Chronicles9:22 Kongcingin a kiteel hih mite khempeuh za nih le sawm le nih ahi hi. Amaute pen a khuaneute uh a khangsimna ah kiciamteh uh hi. David le thumu pa Samuel in amauʼ panmun ah amaute phut hi. 
1Chronicles9:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute le a suan a khakte uh Topaʼ biakinn kulh kongpite a uk, a cingte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:24 Kongpi cingte pen a pang li, nisuahna, nitumna, leilu le leitaw lamah om uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:25 Tua ciangin amauʼ khuaneute sungah a om a behte uh hih mite tawh a om dingin a hunhunin ni sagih simin a hong pai ding uh a kisam ahi hi. 
1Chronicles9:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi mi kongpi a cing ukpi lite pen biakinn sungte le Pasianʼ biakinn van manpha koihnate a uk ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles9:27 Pasianʼ biakinn kiimah amaute giak uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah vilna nasep le zingsang simin kong a hon ding uh nasep kiguan hi. 
1Chronicles9:28 Amaute pawl khat in biakinn sunga kizang umlebeelte uk uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nazatte hong kitumpih ciang hitaleh a kilakkhiat ciang hitaleh a malzah a sim ding uh kisam hi. 
1Chronicles9:29 Amau sung pan a dang pawl khatte pen tutphah sabuaite le a kituam koih umlebeel, annelte, leenggahzute, sathaute, paknamtuite le a namtui nate zong a en dingin kiseh hi." 
1Chronicles9:30 Siampiteʼ ta a dangte in a namtui nate hel dingin bawl uh a," 
1Chronicles9:31 tua ciangin Levi mite lak pan Korah mi Shallumʼ tacil Mattithiah in biak nading moh pheengte bawl ding uk hi. 
1Chronicles9:32 Kohath mi amauʼ behte pawl khat in zong Sabbath simin koih ding Ompihna Anlum uk uh hi. 
1Chronicles9:33 Tu-in hihte pen lasate, Levi mi beh lutangte, nasep dangte panin pengin biakinn deite sungah a teengte ahi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in sun le zanin na sem uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:34 Hihte pen Jerusalem ah a teeng amauʼ khang tawh kizui-in makaite, Levi mi beh lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:35 Gibeon ah tua khuapi a sat pa Jeiel teeng a, ama ziʼ min Maakah hi-in," 
1Chronicles9:36 a tapa upa pen Abdon, tua ciangin Zur, Kish, Baal, Ner, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahio, Zekhariah le Mikloth ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikloth pen Shimeahʼ pa ahi hi. Amauʼ suanlekhakte zong Jerusalem-a a behte uh gal khat ah a behte uh tawh teeng uh hi. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner pen Kishʼ pa, Kish pen Saulʼ pa ahi hi. Saul pen Jonathan, Makhishua, Abinadab le Eshbaalʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonathanʼ tapa Meribbaal hi a, Meribbaal pen Mikahʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mikahʼ tapate: Pithon, Melek, Tahrea le Ahaz ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahaz pen Jarahʼ pa hi a, Jarah pen Alemeth, Azmaveth le Zimriʼ pa ahi hi. Zimri pen Mozaʼ pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza pen Bineaʼ pa ahi hi. A tapa Refaiah, a tapa Eleasah, a tapa Azel ahi hi." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel in tapa guk nei a, tuateʼ min: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah le Hanan ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Azelʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel in tapa guk nei a, tuateʼ min: Azrikam, Bokheru, Ishmael, Sheariah, Obadiah le Hanan ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Azelʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:1 Filistia mite in Israel mite sim uh hi. Filistia mite mai ah Israel mite tai uh a, Gilboa Mual tungah tuk zeizai uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:2 Filistia mite in Saul le a tapate pha uh hi. Filistia mite in Saulʼ tapate Jonathan le Abinadab le Malkhishua that uh hi. 
1Chronicles10:3 Gal kidona in Saul neh mahmah a, thal tawite in amah pha-in liamsak uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:4 Tua ciangin Saul in a galvan pua pa kiangah, “Na namsau dok inla tua tawh kei hong sun let in. Tua hikeileh hih dawibia mite hong pai-in kei hong khelbawl kha ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin a galvan pua pa in hih ngam lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah lau mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul in ama namsau la-in tua tungah puk hi." 
1Chronicles10:5 A galvan pua pa in Saul a sihna a muh ciangin amah zong a namsau tungah kipuk suksakin a si hi. 
1Chronicles10:6 Tua bangin Saul a si hi. Amah le a tapa thumte le a innkuan khempeuh a si khawm uh hi. 
1Chronicles10:7 Kuam sungah a om Israel mite khempeuh in galkapte tai khinin, Saul le a tapate a sihna a theih uh ciangin amaute in a khuapite uh nusia-in a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong pai-in tua khuate sungah a teeng uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:8 A zing ciang, a kithatteʼ nate a hawk khia dingin Filistia mite hong pai uh ciangin Saul le a tapate Gilboa Mual tungah a sihna mu uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:9 Tua ciangin amaute in ama nate hawk khia-in a lutang le a galhiam la uh a, a milimte uh le mite kiangah hih thu thak a ko dingin Filistia gam sung khempeuh ah kamtaite a sawl uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:10 Amaute in amauʼ pasianʼ biakinn sungah ama galhiam koihin Dagon biakinn sungah ama lutang a suang uh hi. 
1Chronicles10:11 Ahih hangin Jabesh-gilead mi khempeuh in Saulʼ tungah Filistia miteʼ hih sa thu khempeuh a zak uh ciangin 
1Chronicles10:12 a thahat mi khempeuh kithawi-in Saul le a tapateʼ luanghawmte la khia-in Jabesh ah a paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Jabesh a tawsaw nuai ah amauteʼ guhte vui uh a, ni sagih sung an a tang uh hi." 
1Chronicles10:13 Tua ahih ciangin Saul a thuman lohna hangin a si hi. Amah in Topaʼ thupiakna a zuih lohna le vankah khat thu dongin a lamlah ding a zonna," 
1Chronicles10:14 le Topaʼ tung panin lamlahna a zon lohna ah Topaʼ tungah a thuman lo ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amah that a, Jessiʼ tapa David tungah kumpi gam a hei hi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh David kiang Hebron ah hong kikhawm uh a, “En in, kote nangma guh le nangma sa ka hi uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:2 A hun beisa, Saul kumpi ahih sung nangawnin Israel a kuan khiat pih le a ciahpih pa nangmah na hi hi. Topa na Pasian in nangma kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka mi Israel-te a cing pa na hi dinga, ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian na hi ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:3 Tua ahih ciangin Israel upate khempeuh kumpipa kiang Hebron ah hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin David in Topaʼ mai Hebron ah amaute tawh thuciamna khat bawl a, Samuelʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen bangin amaute in Israel kumpi-in David sathau a nilh uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:4 Tua ciangin Jebus mite a teenna, Jebus a kici Jerusalem ah David le Israel mi khempeuh hong pai uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:5 Jebus ah a teeng mite in David kiangah, “Hih lai ah nang nong pai kei ding hi,” na ci uh hi. Ahi zongin David in David khuapi a kici Zion mun muanhuai a la hi." 
1Chronicles11:6 David in, “Jebus mite a va sim masa peuhpeuh pen ukpi le ukpa hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab kuan to masa ahih ciangin amah, ukpi a suak hi." 
1Chronicles11:7 Tua ciangin mun muanhuaina sungah David teeng hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khua pen David khuapi kici hi. 
1Chronicles11:8 Tua ciangin amah in Millo panin a kualin khuapi lam hi. Joab in khuapi sung a om lai mun teng puahkik hi. 
1Chronicles11:9 Vanglian Topa in amah ompih ahih manin David a lian semsem hi. 
1Chronicles11:10 Tu-in hihte pen Israel tawh kisai-in Topaʼ thugen bangin amah kumpi-in a bawl dingin Israel khempeuh tawh ama kumpi gam sungah amah nakpi takin a huh Davidʼ mi a thahat a ukpite ahi hi. 
1Chronicles11:11 Davidʼ mi a thahatte a kiciaptehna: Hakmoni mi Jashobeam pen mi thumte a ukpi ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thum do a, hun khat sungin that khin hi." 
1Chronicles11:12 Tua ciangin a thahat mihing thumte lak panin amah a zom pa pen Ahoh-te beh Dodoʼ tapa Eleazar ahi hi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Filistia mite galsim dingin a kikaihkhop laitakun Pasdammim ah David tawh a om hi. Tua lai ah mangbuhham a dimna leitang khat om a, Filistia miteʼ kiang panin mite tai hi." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ahih hangin amah in tua leitang laizang ah panmun la-in hu a, Filistia mite that hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa in gualzawhna lianpi a pia hi." 
1Chronicles11:15 Refaim kuamah Filistia miteʼ galkapte in giahphual a sat laitakun Adullam leihawm David kiang suangpi ah ukpi sawm thumte sung panin mihing thum pai suk uh hi. 
1Chronicles11:16 Tua hunin mun muanhuai sungah David om a, Filistia khuacingte Bethlehem ah om uh hi." 
1Chronicles11:17 Tua ciangin David in, “Kulh kongpi gei-a Bethlehem tuikhuk panin mi khat in tui dawn ding kei hong pia leh!” ci-in lunggulhna tawh a pau hi." 
1Chronicles11:18 Tua ciangin a thahat mihing thumte in Filistia miteʼ giahphual phulin kongpi gei-a om Bethlehem tuikhuk panin tui tawi uh a, a tui la-in David kiangah paipih uh hi. Ahih hangin David in tua tui dawn lo hi. Amah in Topa adingin sung a," 
1Chronicles11:19 “Ka Pasianʼ mai ah hih bangin ka gamta het kei ding hi. Hih mihingteʼ nuntakna sisan tui dawn ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a nuntakna uh khamin kei kiangah hong paipih uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a tui dawn lo hi. A thahat mi thumte in hih bangin na a sem uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles11:20 Tu-in Joabʼ sanggampa Abishai pen sawm thumte lakah a ukpi ahi hi. Amah in a teipi tawh mihing za thum do-in amaute that a, mihing sawm thumteʼ banah min khat ngah thuah hi." 
1Chronicles11:21 Amah pen mihing sawm thumte sung panin a minthang pen hi a, amaute a ukpa a suak hi; ahih hangin amah in mihing thumte ban nai lo hi." 
1Chronicles11:22 Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah pen Kabzeel khuami gal a hang, na lianpite a sem pa ahi hi. Amah in Moab galhang mi nih vatlum hi. Amah zong pai sukin vuk a kiat ni khatin leihawm sunga om humpinelkai khat that hi." 
1Chronicles11:23 Amah in Egypt mi khat, a thagol, pi sagih le alang a sang mi khat a that hi. Egypt-pa in a khut sungah siamganteʼ siamlawngpi cia a pha teipi khat nei hi. Ahih hangin ciangkhut khat tawh ama kiangah Benaiah pai suk a, Egypt-paʼ khut sung panin a teipi sut khia-in ama teipi mah tawh amah a that hi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah in hih nate sem a, a thahat mi sawm thumteʼ banah min khat ngah thuah hi." 
1Chronicles11:25 Mihing sawm thumte lakah amah minthang a, ahih hangin amah in mi thumte ban nai lo hi. Tua ciangin David in amah a cingte a ukin a koih hi."

1Chronicles11:27 Harod khuami Shammoth, Pelon khuami Helez,"

1Chronicles11:32 Gaash mualkuam mi Hurai, Betharabah khuami Abiel," 
1Chronicles11:33 Bahurim khuami Azmaveth, Shaalbon khuami Eliahba,"

1Chronicles11:35 Harar khuami Sakharʼ tapa Ahiam, Urʼ tapa Elifal," 
1Chronicles11:36 Mekherath khuami Hefer, Pelon khuami Ahijah," 
1Chronicles11:37 Karmel khuami Hezro, Ezbaiʼ tapa Naarai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathanʼ sanggampa Joel, Hagriʼ tapa Mibhar," 
1Chronicles11:38 Nathanʼ sanggampa Joel, Hagriʼ tapa Mibhar," 
1Chronicles11:39 Ammon mi Zelek, Zeruiahʼ tapa Joabʼ galhiam pua pa Beeroth khuami Naharai," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ithri mi Ira le Gareb," 
1Chronicles11:41 Hit mi Uriah, Ahlaiʼ tapa Zabad," 
1Chronicles11:42 Reuben miteʼ makai khat ahi, Reuben mi Shizaʼ tapa Adina le amah tawh mihing sawm thum," 
1Chronicles11:43 Maakahʼ tapa Hanan, Mithni mi Joshafat," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ashterath khuami Uzzia, Aroer khuami Hothamʼ tapate Shama le Jeiel,"

1Chronicles12:1 Tu-in Kishʼ tapa Saulʼ hangin a ututin David a tat theih loh laitakin Ziklag a ama kiangah mite hong pai-in amah pawlpih uh hi. Gal sungah amah a huh a thahatte lakah amaute a kihelte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:2 Amaute pen thal tawite hi uh a, taklam khut tawh ahi a, veilam khut tawh ahi zongin thaltang le suangte lawn thei uh hi. Amaute pen Saulʼ behte Benjamin mi ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ahiezer a ukpi hi a, tua ciangin Joash ahi hi. Amau tegel pen Gibeah khuami Shemaahʼ tapate ahi uh hi. Amau gel nuai ah galkapte: Azmavethʼ tapate Jeziel le Pelet; Anathoth khuami Berakah le Jehu;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Gibeon khuami Ishmaiah, mihing sawm thumte lakah a thahatpa le sawm thumte a makai pa; Gederah khuami Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan le Jozabad;" 
1Chronicles12:4 Gibeon khuami Ishmaiah, mihing sawm thumte lakah a thahatpa le sawm thumte a makai pa; Gederah khuami Jeremiah, Jahaziel, Johanan le Jozabad;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Harif mi Eluzai, Jerimoth, Bealiah, Shemariah le Shefatiah;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Korah mi Elkanah, Isshiah, Azarel, Joezer le Jashobeam;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Gedor khuami Jerohamʼ tapate Joelah le Zebadiah ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:7 Gedor khuami Jerohamʼ tapate Joelah le Zebadiah ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:8 Gad minam sung panin gamlak a mun muanhuai a David kiangah a thahat a siam galhangte, lum le tei zat a siam, a maitang uh humpinelkai maitang bangin, mual tunga om sakhi bangin a manlang mi hong paite:" 
1Chronicles12:9 A ukpi Ezer, a nihna Obadiah, a thumna Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:9 A ukpi Ezer, a nihna Obadiah, a thumna Eliab," 
1Chronicles12:10 a lina Mishmannah, a ngana Jeremiah," 
1Chronicles12:10 a lina Mishmannah, a ngana Jeremiah," 
1Chronicles12:11 a gukna Attai, a sagihna Eliel," 
1Chronicles12:12 a giatna Johanan, a kuana Elzabad," 
1Chronicles12:13 a sawmna Jeremiah, a sawm le khatna Makbannai ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:13 a sawmna Jeremiah, a sawm le khatna Makbannai ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:14 Hih Gad mite pen galkap uliante hi a, a neu zawte in za khat val, a gol zawte in tul khat val uk uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Hihte pen Jordan a piau khempeuh a dim let laitak kha masa sungin Jordan kantanin kuam sunga om mite nisuahna lam le nitumna lamah a taisak mite ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:16 Tua ciangin Benjamin mi le Judah mi pawl khat David kiang munmuanhuai ah hong pai uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:17 Amaute a dawntuah dingin David pai khia-in amaute kiangah, “Kei kiangah kilawmtatna tawh keimah a huh dingin hong pai na hih uh leh note tawh ka lungsim kihual khawm ding hi. Ahih hangin keimah in bangmah khialhna nei lo napi-in ka langte tungah kei a hong lehhek dingin a hong pai na hih uh leh, i pu i pateʼ Pasian in thei henla, note hong tai tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles12:18 Tua ciangin mihing sawm thum a ukpipa Amasaiʼ tungah Pasianʼ kha hong tungin amah in, “David aw, kote, nangma aʼ hi ung! Jessiʼ tapa aw, nangma pawl hi ung! Nangma tungah nopna hong om henla, nang hong huhte tungah zong nopna hong om tahen! Bang hang hiam cih leh na Pasian in nang hong huh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin David in amaute sang a, ama galkap uliante in a bawl hi." 
1Chronicles12:19 Saul a do dingin Filistia mite tawh David a kuan laitakin Manasseh mi pawl khat tai-in David a beel hi. (Ahi zongin David in Filistia mite huh thei lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia mi a ukte in thu kikupna khat nei uh a, “Eiteʼ makaiteʼ siat nadingin a topa Saul kiangah David tai ding hi,” ci-in amah sawl khia uh hi.)" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ziklag ah amah a pai laitakin Manasseh sung panin tai-in amah a beelte: Adnah, Jozabad, Jediael, Mikhael, Jozabad, Elihu le Zillethai hi a, Manasseh sungah mi a tulin a ukte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:21 Amaute in miʼ na a sut thei mite panin David huh uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a thahat a vanglian mi hi a, galkap sungah a ukte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:22 Pasianʼ galkap hon bangin galkap hon tampi a phak dongin a nini-in David a huh dingin mi hong paipai hi. 
1Chronicles12:23 Hihte pen Topaʼ thugen bangin Saul kumpipaʼ gam David tungah a hei dingin Hebron-a ama kiangah a pai galkap a khen phazah ahi uh hi: 
1Chronicles12:24 Judah mi: Lum le tei a pua galkap tul guk le za giat ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:25 Simeon mi: Galdo dingin a thahat a vanglian mihing tul sagih le za khat ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:26 Levi mi: Tul li le za guk ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:27 Aaronʼ suante sung pan ulian Jehoiada le amah tawh mi tul thum le za sagih ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:28 A thahat a vanglian a khangno Zadok le ama beh sung panin galkap a ukte mi sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:29 Benjamin mi: Tua hun ciang dong mi a tam zaw Saul tawh a kipawl, Saulʼ behte ahi Benjamin mite sung panin mihing tul thum ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:30 Efraim mi: Amaute sung panin a thahat, a vanglian, amauʼ beh sungah a minthang mi tul sawm nih le za giat ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Manasseh minam a langte: Amau sung panin hong pai-in David kumpi-in a bawl dingin a min a kilo mihing tul sawm le tul giat ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:32 Issakhar mi: Amaute sung panin Israel in bang a sep dingin kilawm cih a thei, hun paizia a thei ukpi za nih le amauʼ ukna nuai ah a om amauʼ behte khempeuh ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles12:33 Zebulun mite: Amaute sung panin David a huh dingin lungsim a kikhat, hun khempeuh ah gal a kap thei, galdo nadingin galhiam khempeuh a nei mihing tul sawm nga ahi hi." 
1Chronicles12:34 Naftali mi: Amaute sung panin galkap a ukte tul khat le amau tawh a om lum le tei a tawi mihing tul sawm thum le tul sagih ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:35 Dan mi: Amaute sung panin galdo dingin a kithawi mihing tul sawm nih le tul giat le za guk ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:36 Asher mi: Amaute sung panin galdo dingin a baih sa-in a om hun khempeuh ah gal a kap thei mihing tul sawm li ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:37 Jordan gal khat a om Reuben mite le Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte sung panin galhiam nam khempeuh tawh a kithawi mihing tul za khat le tul sawm nih ahi hi. 
1Chronicles12:38 Galkap mi ahi, galsim dingin a kithawi hih mite khempeuh, Israel tungah David kumpi-in koih ding ngaihsutna takpi tawh Hebron ah hong pai uh hi. Tua mah bangin Israel a omlaite khempeuh zong David kumpi-in a bawl ding uh a ngaihsutna uh kikhat hi." 
1Chronicles12:39 A sanggamte un amaute adingin na vaihawm khol uh ahih manin amaute tua lai ah David tawh ni thum sung an ne tui dawnin om khawm uh hi. 
1Chronicles12:40 Israel gam sungah lungdamna om ahih manin a veengte uh Issakhar le Zebulun le Naftali ciang dong panin zong hong pai-in late le kalaohte le la-sakolte le bawngtalte tawh an hong pua-in, an tampi tak, theimohte, leenggahkeu bawkte le leenggahzu le sathau, bawngtalte le tuute, lungdam lahna-in hong puak uh hi." 
1Chronicles13:1 David in a tul-a ukte le a za-a ukte le a makai khempeuh tawh thu kikupna khat nei hi. 
1Chronicles13:2 Tua ciangin David in Israel a kikhawm khempeuhte kiangah, “Note in kilawm na sak uh a, Topa i Pasianʼ deihna ahihleh, eiteʼ kiangah hong pai theih nadingun Israel gam sungah a om lai i sanggamte le lo nona gam a nei khuapi sunga om siampite le Levi mite a sam dingin mi sawl ni." 
1Chronicles13:3 Tua ciangin Thuciamna Singkuang eite kiangah lakik ni; bang hang hiam cih leh Saulʼ hun lai-in i don kei hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles13:4 Mi khempeuh in tua thu hoih sa uh ahih manin tua bangin hih ding a kikhawm mi khempeuh a thukim uh hi. 
1Chronicles13:5 Tua ahih ciangin Kiriath-jearim panin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a ciahpih dingin David in Egypt gam Shihor lui panin Hamath lutna ciang dong Israel mi khempeuh a khawm hi. 
1Chronicles13:6 Tua ciangin David le Israel mi khempeuh, kherub-teʼ tungah a tu Topaʼ min tawh a kilo Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih to dingin Kiriath-jearim a kici Baalah ah a pai to uh hi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Amaute in Abinadabʼ inn panin leeng thak khat tungah Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang pua uh a, Uzza le Ahio in a leeng a hawl uh hi." 
1Chronicles13:8 Tua ciangin David le Israel mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ mai ah la le laiza lasakna, harp lasakna, khuangneute, daltuahte le peengkulte tawh a tha neih zahun gualnopna a bawl uh hi." 
1Chronicles13:9 Amaute Khidonʼ ancilna phual a tun uh ciangin bawngtalte muktu ahih manin Uzza in Thuciamna Singkuang a len dingin a khut va zan kha hi. 
1Chronicles13:10 Tua ciangin Uzza tungah Topa heh hi. Amah in a khut tawh Thuciamna Singkuang su kha ahih manin Topa in amah vat hi. Tua ciangin Pasianʼ mai tua lai ah amah si hi. 
1Chronicles13:11 Uzza tungah Topa hehin gim pia ahih manin David zong a heh suak hi. Tua mun pen tu ni dongin Perezuzzah kici hi. 
1Chronicles13:12 Tua ni-in David in Pasian kihta hi. Amah in, “Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang kei kiang inn ah bangci ciahpih theih ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles13:13 Tua ahih ciangin David in Thuciamna Singkuang David khuapi a inn ah ciahpih lo-a, Gath mi Obededomʼ inn ah va koih hi." 
1Chronicles13:14 Tua ahih ciangin Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang Obededomʼ innkuan tawh kha thum sung om hi. Topa in Obededomʼ innkuan le a neih khempeuh thupha a pia hi. 
1Chronicles14:1 Tua ciangin Taia kumpipa Hiram in David kiangah kamtaite, taamtak singte, ama adingin inn khat a lamsak dingin leilesuang inn lam a siamte le khutsiamte zong a puak hi." 
1Chronicles14:2 Tua ciangin David in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in Topa in amah a kipsak khitna le ama mi Israel-teʼ hangin ama kumpi gam nakpi takin a lianin a kibawlna a phawktel hi. 
1Chronicles14:3 David in Jerusalem ah zi nei thuahin tapate le tanute a nei hi. 
1Chronicles14:4 Jerusalem ah a neih a tateʼ min: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibhar, Elishua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogah, Nefeg, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliada le Elifelet ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles14:8 Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi-in David sathau a kinilhna thu Filistia mite in a zak uh ciangin David a zong dingin Filistia mi khempeuh kuan to uh hi. David in zong tua thu za ahih manin amaute a do dingin a kuan khia hi. 
1Chronicles14:9 Tu-in Filistia mite hong pai-in Refaim kuam sung a luh uh hi. 
1Chronicles14:10 Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah thu dong a, “Filistia mite a do dingin ka kuan to ding hiam? Keima khut sungah amaute nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Kuan to in; nangma khut sungah amaute kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles14:11 Tua ciangin Baal-perazim ah David pai to a, amah in tua lai ah amaute a zo hi. Tua ciangin David in, “Tuikhang in a phulkhap bangin Pasian in keima khut tawh ka galte phukham hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun a min Baal-perazim kici hi." 
1Chronicles14:12 Filistia mite in tua lai ah a pasian-te uh nusia uh a, Davidʼ thupiakna tawh tuate kihal hi." 
1Chronicles14:13 Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong kuanin kuam sung hong luhkik lai uh hi. 
1Chronicles14:14 David in Pasian kiangah thu a dotkik ciangin Pasian in ama kiangah, “Amauteʼ nungah na kuan to kei ding hi. Kual pai inla lungli kungteʼ gal khat lam panin amaute hih in." 
1Chronicles14:15 Lungli kungte dawnah kalsuan huging na zak ciangin galsim dingin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia galkapte a vat dingin nangma mai ah Pasian kuan khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles14:16 Pasian in amah a thupiak bangin David gamta a, amaute in Gibeon panin Gezer ciang dong Filistia galkapte vat gawp uh hi." 
1Chronicles14:17 Tua ciangin Davidʼ minthanna in gam khempeuh zel a, Topa in minam dang khempeuh tungah amah kihtakna a tungsak hi." 
1Chronicles15:1 David in ama adingin David khuapi sungah innte a lam hi. Amah in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang adingin mun khat bawlin puanbuk khat lamsak hi. 
1Chronicles15:2 Tua ciangin David in, “ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua ding le ama na a sem tawntung dingin Topa in amaute teel ahih manin Levi mite sim loh kuamah in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang pua thei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles15:3 Tua ciangin amah in a bawl sa, ama om nading munah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih to dingin David in Jerusalem ah Israel mi khempeuh a khawm hi." 
1Chronicles15:4 David in Aaronʼ suante le Levi mi a khopte: 
1Chronicles15:5 Kohath-te beh sung panin a ukpi Uriel, a behte za le sawm nih tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:6 Merari-te beh sung panin a ukpi Asaiah, a behte za nih le sawm nih tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershom-te beh sung panin a ukpi Joel, a behte za le sawm thum tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershom-te beh sung panin a ukpi Joel, a behte za le sawm thum tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:8 Elizafan-te beh sung panin a ukpi Shemaiah, a behte za nih tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:9 Hebron-te beh sung panin a ukpi Eliel, a behte sawm giat tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:10 Uzziel-te beh sung panin a ukpi Amminadab, a behte za le sawm le nih tawh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:11 Tua ciangin David in siampite Zadok le Abiathar le Levi mite Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel le Amminadab samin" 
1Chronicles15:11 Tua ciangin David in siampite Zadok le Abiathar le Levi mite Uriel, Asaiah, Joel, Shemaiah, Eliel le Amminadab samin" 
1Chronicles15:12 amaute kiangah, “Note pen Levi mite beh lutangte na hi uh hi. Ama adingin ka bawlsakna munah Israel Pasian, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang na paipih toh theih nadingun note le na Levi mipihte uh nomau mah kisiansuah tawm un." 
1Chronicles15:13 A masa lai-in note na om kei uh a, a kiseh sa bang danin kem lo ihih manin eite tungah Topa i Pasian hong hehin gim hong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles15:14 Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian, Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih to dingin siampite le Levi mite amau mah kisiansuah tawm uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:15 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kamgenna tawh kizui-in Mosesʼ thupiak bangin Levi mite in a liangko uh ah a zawlte tawh Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:16 Lungdamna aw ginsak nadingin lasakna nate, harp lasakna le laiza lasaknate le a daltuahte nakpi takin tumin la a sa dingin Levi ukpite in a mipihte uh a seh nading David in thu a pia hi." 
1Chronicles15:17 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in Joelʼ tapa Heman seh uh hi. Tua ciangin a beh sung panin Berekhiahʼ tapa Asaf, Merari minam sung panin a behte uh Kushaiahʼ tapa Ethan;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in Joelʼ tapa Heman seh uh hi. Tua ciangin a beh sung panin Berekhiahʼ tapa Asaf, Merari minam sung panin a behte uh Kushaiahʼ tapa Ethan;" 
1Chronicles15:18 tua ciangin amaute tawh a pawl nihna-in a behte uh Zekhariah, Jaaziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattithiah, Elifelehu le Mikneiah le kongcingte Obededom le Jeiel seh uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:19 Lasate Heman, Asaf le Ethan-te in sumngo daltuahte a tum ding uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekhariah, Aziel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseiah le Benaiah-te in a paisuak aw-in harp lasaknate a tum ding uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:21 Mattithiah, Elifelehu, Mikneiah, Obededom, Jeiel le Azaziah-te in laiza lasaknate a un aw-in a makai ding uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles15:22 Levi mite sungah la makai Khenaniah inla uk ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thei hi. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekhiah le Elkanah-te pen Thuciamna Singkuang adingin kongcingte hi ding uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:24 Siampite Shebaniah, Joshafat, Nethanel, Amasai, Zekhariah, Benaiah le Eliezer-te in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah peengkulte tum ding uh hi. Obededom le Jehiah-te zong Thuciamna Singkuang adingin kongcingte hi ding uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:25 Tua ahih ciangin David le Israel upate le a tul-a a ukte, Obededomʼ inn panin lungdamna tawh Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih to dingin a pai uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:26 Pasian in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite huh ahih manin amaute in bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih biakna-in a pia uh hi. 
1Chronicles15:27 David in saihadial puan tualpi silh a, tua mah bangin Thuciamna Singkuang a pua Levi mite khempeuh le lasate le lasate a uk Khenaniah-te in zong a silh uh hi. Tua ciangin David in siampi puan khat silh hi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh in sakite le peengkulte le daltuahteʼ awging tawh kizui-in awng kawmin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih to uh a, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawh nakpi takin la a sa uh hi." 
1Chronicles15:29 David khuapi ah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hong tun laitakin Saulʼ tanu a zi Mikhal in tawlet panin na en a, Kumpi David lamin a gualnuam a a om a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a lungsim sungah David a neu-et hi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Tua ciangin amaute in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang hong tumpih uh a, David in ama adingin a lamsak puanbuk sungah koih uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te Pasianʼ mai ah pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:2 David in meihal biaknate le thunuam a a biaknate a piak a man khit ciangin amah in Topaʼ min tawh mite thupha pia a," 
1Chronicles16:3 Israel mi numei le pasal khempeuhte tungah anlum khat, sa bak khat le leenggahkeu bek khat ciat a hawm hi." 
1Chronicles16:4 Tua tham loin amah in Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah na semin thu a ngen ding, lungdamna a ko ding le Israel Pasian, Topa a phat dingin Levi mite pawl khat a seh hi." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaf a ukpi hi a, ama zomah Zekhariah ahi hi. Jeiel, Shemiramoth, Jehiel, Mattithiah, Eliab, Benaiah, Obededom le Jeiel, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate a tum dingte ahi uh hi. Asaf in daltuahte a tum ding hi a," 
1Chronicles16:6 siampite Benaiah le Jahaziel-te in Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah peengkulte a tum paisuak ding uh ahi hi. 
1Chronicles16:7 Tua ciangin tua ni-in David in Asaf le a Levi mipihte in Topa tungah hih bangin lungdamkohna la a sa dingin a seh masa hi: 
1Chronicles16:8 Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko-in, ama min lo unla, ama septe khempeuh miteʼ lakah kitheisak un!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Amah la sak un. Phatna la amah sak unla, a lamdang a septe khempeuh mite tungah gen un!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Ama min siangtho hangin nuamin diang unla, Topa a zong mite khempeuh lungdam ta uh hen!" 
1Chronicles16:11 Topa le ama hatna zong unla, ama ompihna zong den un!" 
1Chronicles16:12 A lamdang a nasepte phawk unla, a lamdang ama genkhiat a thukhennate phawk un," 
1Chronicles16:13 no ama nasem Abrahamʼ suante, Jakobʼ suante, ama teeltuamte aw!" 
1Chronicles16:14 Amah, eiteʼ Topa Pasian hi a, ama thupiaknate leitung khempeuh ading ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:15 Amah in a thuciamna phawk tawntung hi. Khang tul khat adingin a thupiakna kammal," 
1Chronicles16:16 Abraham tawh a thuciamna, Isaac tungah a khapna," 
1Chronicles16:17 Jakob tungah thu ciamin, amah in a kipsak, Israel tungah tawntung thuciamna-in a kipsak," 
1Chronicles16:18 “Nangma tungah Kanaan gam hong pia-in, gamhluahin na tanh dingin kong pia ding hi,” a cihte phawk tawntung hi." 
1Chronicles16:19 Amaute a mi-in tawmin, gen taak loin peemta hi uh a," 
1Chronicles16:20 minam khat pan nam khat ah vak kawikawi-in, kumpi gam khat pan gamdang khat ah a pai lai-un," 
1Chronicles16:21 amaute kuamah nengniamsak lo hi. Amauteʼ hangin amah in kumpite tai gawp a," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Ka sathau nilhte lawng kei unla, ka kamsangte tungah siatna hih kei un!” ci hi." 
1Chronicles16:23 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa la sak un! A nini-in ama hotkhiatna thu gengen un." 
1Chronicles16:24 Minam dangte lakah ama minthanna gen khia unla, a lamdang ama septe mi khempeuh lakah gen un!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian mahmah a, nakpi takin phat ding ahi hi; pasian khempeuh sangin lamdang sak zawk ding ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam dangteʼ pasian-te milim hi lel a, ahih hangin Topa ahihleh vantungte a bawlpa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles16:27 Pahtawina le minliatna in amah umcih a, thahatna le lungdamna in amah kimkot hi." 
1Chronicles16:28 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa thei tel unla, Topaʼ minthanna le a thahatna thei tel un!" 
1Chronicles16:29 Amah in a ngah ding a kilawm minthanna Topaʼ tungah pia un. Biakna puak unla, ama mai ah pai un! Biakna puan silhin Topa bia un." 
1Chronicles16:30 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, ama mai ah liing un; hi hi, leitung kip mahmah a, kilok ngei lo ding hi." 
1Chronicles16:31 Vantung kipak henla, leitung lungdam tahen; minam khempeuhte lakah, “ Topa mang hi!” amaute in ci ta uh hen." 
1Chronicles16:32 Tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh awng uh henla, gamlak le a sunga om khempeuh lungdamin diang ta uh hen!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Tua ciangin gamlak singte in lungdamna tawh Topaʼ mai ah la sa ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung thu khen dingin amah hong pai hi. 
1Chronicles16:34 Amah hoih ahih manin Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip a tawntungin a kho hi! 
1Chronicles16:35 “Kote hong khah khia in, kote hong hon khia Pasian aw, minam dangte lak panin kote hong kaikhawm in. Na min siangtho tungah lungdam kong koh theih nading uh le, nangmah phatna ah ka minthan nadingun kote hong hon in." 
1Chronicles16:36 Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen, a tawntung pan a tawntung dongin!” zong ci lai un, a ci hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Amen!” ci-in Topa a phat uh hi." 
1Chronicles16:37 Tua ahih ciangin David in nisim a a kisam bangin Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah na a sem tawntung dingin Asaf le a Levi mipihte Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah nusia a," 
1Chronicles16:38 Obededom le a behte sawm guk le giatte zong a nusia hi. Jeduthunʼ tapa Obededom le Hosah-te pen kongpi cing dingte ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles16:39 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ thukham sungah a kigelh ama thupiak khempeuh bangin, zingsang le nitakin meihal biakna tau tungah Topa adingin meihal biaknate a pia tawntung dingin, Gibeon-a om mual dawna Topaʼ biakbuk mai ah siampi Zadok le a sanggam siampite a nusia hi." 
1Chronicles16:40  
1Chronicles16:41 Tuateʼ banah amaute tawh Heman le Jeduthun zong om a, ama itna kip kho tawntung ahih manin Topaʼ tungah lungdamna a ko dingin a kiteel, a minin a kilo khia midang om lai hi." 
1Chronicles16:42 Heman le Jeduthun in la aw dingin peengkulte le daltuahte nei uh a, biakna la sak nadingin lasakna nate nei uh hi. Jeduthunʼ tapate kulh kongpi cing dingin kiseh hi." 
1Chronicles16:43 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah ciah uh a, David zong a innkuante thupha a pia dingin a inn ah a ciah hi." 
1Chronicles17:1 Tu-in David a inn ah a ten ciangin amah in kamsang Nathan kiangah, “En in, taamtak inn hoih sungah kei ka teeng a, ahih hangin puanbuk nuai ah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang om lai hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:2 Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “Pasian in nang hong ompih ahih manin na lungsimah a om khempeuh hih in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ahih hangin tua zan mahin Nathan kiangah Topaʼ thu hong tung a," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Pai inla ka nasem pa David kiangah hih bangin gen in. ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangmah in keima ten nadingin biakinn na lam kei ding hi. 
1Chronicles17:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te ka paipih toh a kipan tu ni dongin biakinn sungah ka teeng kei a, puanbuk khat pan puanbuk khat, omna khat pan omna khat ah ka pai kawikawi hi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Israel mi khempeuh tawh ka paina sa mun khempeuh ah, keima mite tuu bangin a cing dingin ka sawl thukhente khat peuhpeuh tungah, “Bang hangin biakinn khat kei adingin hong lamsak lo na hi hiam?” ci-in kam khat beek ka gen hiam?’ ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:7 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka nasem pa David kiangah hih bangin na ci ding hi. ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian ahi dingin lo nona, tuu na zuihna panin nang kong la hi." 
1Chronicles17:8 Na paina peuhpeuh ah nang tawh kong om khin a, na mai panin na galte khempeuh ka susia hi. Leitung mi liante khat min bangin nang adingin min khat kong bawlsak ding hi." 
1Chronicles17:9 Amauʼ inn ciatah a ten theih nading le a kinawngkaisak nawn loh nadingin ka mi Israel-te adingin mun khat sehin amaute ka phut ding hi. Ka mi Israel-te tungah thukhente ka seh a kipanin a nidang a bangin mi ngongtatte in amaute beisak nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in na galte khempeuh ka nuaisiah ding hi. Tua tham loin Topa keimah in nang a lianin hong bawlin, suanlekhak na neih nading thu nang tungah kong gen hi." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Na nuntakna bei-in na pate kiang na zuat ciangin nangma nungah na tapate khat ka khangsak dinga, ama kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Amah in kei adingin biakinn khat hong lamsak dinga, keimah in ama kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Kei pen ama pa ka hi dinga, amah pen keima tapa hi ding hi. Nangma hun ma-a sem Saulʼ tung panin ka lakkhiat bangin nangma tung panin ka itna kip ka la khia kei dinga," 
1Chronicles17:14 ka mite le ka kumpi gam a kem dingin amah ka koih dinga, ama kumpi tokhom kip paisuak ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles17:15 Hih kammalte khempeuh tawh kizui le hih maangmuhna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Nathan in David kiangah a gen hi. 
1Chronicles17:16 Tua ciangin Kumpi David tumin Topaʼ mai ah tu a, “ Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in hih ciang dong nong tunpih nadingin kei in kua hi a, ka innkuanpihte bang ahi hiam?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Hih a beisa thu pen nangma mitah na neu khat ahi hi, Pasian aw. Nangmah in a hong tung ding hunpi khat sung taang ding na nasem paʼ suanlekhak tawh kisai thu zong na gen khin a, mailam a khang dingte thu kei nong lak khin hi, Topa Pasian!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Na nasem pa nong pahtawina ah David in nang tungah bang gen ding nei nawn ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na nasem pa na thei hi. 
1Chronicles17:19 Topa aw, na nasem paʼ hang le nangma lungsim bangin hih na liante khempeuh na kitheihsakna ah hih liatna khempeuh na hih hi." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ka bilun ka zakna uh tawh kizui-in Topa aw, nangmah tawh a kibang kuamah om lo a, nang sim loh Pasian dang om lo hi." 
1Chronicles17:21 Egypt panin na hotkhiat na miteʼ mai ah minam dangte hawl khiatna tawh nang adingin a lian a lauhuai min khat na bawlna, Pasian pai-in ama mi dingin a hotkhiat Israel-te tawh a kibang mi leitungah minam dang kua om ahi hiam?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Na mi Israel-te a tawntungin nangma mi ahi dingin na bawl hi. Tua ciangin Topa aw, nang pen amauteʼ Pasian na suak hi." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Tu-in Topa aw, na nasem pa le a suan a khakte tawh kisai-in na gen sa thu a tawntungin kip henla, na gen sa bangin hong hih in." 
1Chronicles17:24 Tua ciangin, ‘Israel Pasian, Vanglian Topa pen Israel-teʼ Pasian hi,’ ci-in nangma min a tawntungin kipin kiliansak dinga, na nasem pa Davidʼ ukna nangma mai ah kip tawntung ding hi." 
1Chronicles17:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang ka Pasian in keima suante kumpi-in nong bawlsak nading na nasem pa tungah nong lak khinzo hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nasem pa in na mai ah thu nget ding hanna lungsim hong nei hi. 
1Chronicles17:26 Tu-in Topa aw, nang, Pasian na hi a, na nasem pa tungah hih na hoih na ciam khin hi." 
1Chronicles17:27 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangma mai ah a kizop tawntung theih nadingin na nasem paʼ suanlekhakte thupha na piak ding nang hong lungkim ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah in thupha na piak sate a tawntungin thupha ngah ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles18:1 Hih thute khit ciangin David in Filistia mite zo-in nuaisiah a, Filistia miteʼ khut sung panin Gath le a khuaneute a la hi." 
1Chronicles18:2 Tua ciangin amah in Moab mite zo a, Moab mite Davidʼ nasem suakin siah hong puak uh hi." 
1Chronicles18:3 Zobah le Hamath gam kumpipa Hadadezer in Eufratis gunkuam gamte ngahkik nuamin hong kuan ahih manin David in amah do-in a zo hi. 
1Chronicles18:4 Tua ciangin David in ama tung panin leeng galkap tul khat, sakol tung tuang galkap tul sagih le khe galkap tul sawm nih la hi. Tua ciangin David in leengkai sakol galkap khempeuh a zagui at tatsak a, ahih hangin leeng za khat adingin a kicing a siit hi." 
1Chronicles18:5 Zobah kumpi Hadadezer a huh dingin Damaskas a Syria mite hong pai ciangin David in Syria mite tul sawm nih le tul nih that hi. 
1Chronicles18:6 Tua ciangin David in Syria gam Damaskas ah khuacingte koih hi. Tua ciangin Syria mite Davidʼ nasem suak uh a, siah a puak uh hi. David a paina peuhpeuh ah Topa in gualzosak hi." 
1Chronicles18:7 Tua ciangin David in Hadadezerʼ nasemte in a puak kham kibawl lumte la-in Jerusalem ah a ciahpih hi. 
1Chronicles18:8 Tua ciangin Hadadezerʼ khuapite Tibhath le Kun panin David in sumngo tampi tak la hi. Solomon in tuate tawh sumngo tuikuangpi le khuampite le sumngo umlebeelte a bawl hi. 
1Chronicles18:9 David in Zobah kumpi Hadadezerʼ galkap buppi a zawhna thu Hamath kumpi Toi in a zak ciangin," 
1Chronicles18:10 Hadadezer simin a zawhna hangin a hopih ding le a lungdam pih dingin Kumpi David kiangah a tapa Joram a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hadadezer le Toi kido zel ngei hi. Amah in kham, ngun le sumngo tawh kibawl na namkim khempeuh puak hi." 
1Chronicles18:11 Kumpi David in hihte zong, Edom, Moab, Ammon mite, Filistia mite le Amalek, minam khempeuh kiang panin a puakkhiat ngun le kham tawh Topaʼ tungah a ap khawm hi." 
1Chronicles18:12 Tua ciangin Zeruiahʼ tapa Abishai in Ci Kuam ah Edom mite tul sawm le tul giat that hi. 
1Chronicles18:13 Tua ciangin amah in Edom ah khuacingte koih a, Edom mite khempeuh Davidʼ nasem a suak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuh ah gualzosak hi." 
1Chronicles18:14 Tua ahih ciangin David in Israel mi khempeuh uk a, amah in a mite khempeuh tungah thuman le thutang a zang hi." 
1Chronicles18:15 Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab pen galkapte a uk hi a, Ahiludʼ tapa Jehoshafat pen thuciamteh pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles18:16 Ahitubʼ tapa Zadok le Abiatharʼ tapa Ahimelek siampite hi a, Shavsha lai-at pa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles18:17 Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah pen Khereth mite le Peleth mite tungah a uk hi a, Davidʼ tapate pen kumpipaʼ nasepna ah uliante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:1 Hih thu khit tawl khat ciangin Ammon miteʼ kumpipa Nahash si a, a tapa in ama tangin uk hi." 
1Chronicles19:2 Tua ciangin David in, “Ama pa kei tungah thuman takin hong gamta ahih manin Nahashʼ tapa Hanunʼ tungah thuman takin ka gamta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in a paʼ huhau-in amah a hehnem dingin kamtaite a sawl hi. Tua ciangin Davidʼ nasemte amah a hehnem dingin Ammon miteʼ gam Hanunʼ kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ahih hangin Ammon miteʼ uliante in Hanunʼ kiangah, “David in nang kiangah hehnemte hong sawlna hangin na pa a pahtawi hi, ci-in ngaihsun na hi hiam? Gam sung a pheklek ding le a lumlet ding le gam sung a ensim dingin ama nasemte na kiangah hong pai hi lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:4 Tua ahih ciangin Hanun in Davidʼ nasemte manin a khamul uh metsak a, a kawng ciang uh ah a puante uh at khiatsakna tawh amaute daisakin a sawl khia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kihem uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:5 Hih mite tawh kisai thu David kiangah a kigen ciangin amaute a dawntuah dingin mi a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite nakpi takin maizum uh a, ciah ngam lo uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Na khamul uh a khankik mateng Jerikho ah om unla, tua ciangin hong ciah un,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ammon mite in Davidʼ muhdahin amau mah a kibawl tawmna uh a muh uh ciangin Hanun le Ammon mite in Mesopotamia, Aram-maakah le Zobah panin leeng galkapte le sakol galkapte cial nadingin ngun talen tul khat a puak uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:7 Amaute in leeng galkap tul sawm thum le tul nih le Maakah gam kumpipa a galkap tawh cial uh a, amaute hong pai-in Medeba khua kiangah phual a sat uh hi. Tua ciangin a khuapite uh panin Ammon mite kikhawmin galsim dingin hong kuan uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:8 David in tua thu a zak ciangin Joab le mi thahat galkap khempeuh a sawl hi. 
1Chronicles19:9 Tua ciangin Ammon mite hong kuan khia-in khuapi lutna ah galdo dingin hong pang uh a, a hong kuan kumpite in gamlak ah panmun a la uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:10 Gal in a nung le a mai panin a panna Joab in a theih ciangin Israel mi a kiteng khia mi pawl khat teel a, Syria mite a do dingin pangsak hi." 
1Chronicles19:11 A om lai a mite amah in a sanggampa Abishaiʼ ukin koih a, Ammon mite a do dingin amaute kipangsak hi." 
1Chronicles19:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “Syria mite ka lelhtuak leh nangmah in kei nong huh dinga, ahih hangin Ammon mite nang na lelhtuak leh keimah in nang kong huh ding hi." 
1Chronicles19:13 Hang in; i mite ading le i Pasianʼ khuapite adingin pasal tat ni; Topa in ama hoihsak bangin hong hih tahen,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles19:14 Tua ahih ciangin Joab le amah tawh a om mite in a do dingin Syria mite kiang hong naih uh hi. Tua ciangin ama mai ah Syria mite tai uh hi. 
1Chronicles19:15 Syria mite a taina Ammon mite in a muh uh ciangin tua bangmahin amaute zong Joabʼ sanggampa Abishaiʼ mai ah tai uh a, khuapi sungah lut uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah Joab hong ciahkik hi." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ahih hangin Syria mite in Israel-te a lelhlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin, amaute in kamtaite sawlin Eufratis gal khat a om Syria galkapte sam uh a, Hadadezerʼ galkapte a ukpa Shofak a makai-in koih uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:17 David kiangah hih thu a kigen ciangin, amah in Israel khempeuh khawmin Jordan gal kah a, amaute kiangah pai-in amaute a do dingin galkapte khawm hi. David in Syria mite a do dingin gal pangsak a, Syria mite tawh kido uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:18 Tua ciangin Israel-teʼ mai ah Syria mite tai uh hi. Tua ciangin David in Syria miteʼ leeng hawl galkap mihing tul sagih le khe galkap tul sawm li that a, amauʼ galkap a ukpa Shofak zong a that hi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Tua khit ciangin Hadadezerʼ nasemte in Israel-te a lelhlam uh a kitheih uh ciangin amaute in David tawh kilemna bawl uh a, ama khutnuai mi a suak uh hi." 
1Chronicles19:20 Tua ahih ciangin Syria mite in Ammon mite huh nuam nawn lo uh hi. 
1Chronicles20:1 Khuakhal sungin galsimin kumpite kuan khia zel uh hi. Tua bang hunhoih khuakhal hong tun ciangin Joab in galkapte kuan khiat pihin Ammon miteʼ gam su gawp a, hong pai-in Rabbah khua umcih hi. Ahih hangin Jerusalem ah David om hi. Tua ciangin Joab in Rabbah khua vatin lumlet hi." 
1Chronicles20:2 Tua ciangin David in amauʼ kumpipaʼ kumpi lukhu ama tung panin lakkhiatsak hi. Tua lukhu kham talen khat gikin a sungah suangmanpha khat a omna amah in thei hi. Tua hi a, David in tua lukhu ama lu tungah khu hi. Tua ciangin amah in tua khuapi van kinusiate tampi tak khat paikhiatpih hi." 
1Chronicles20:3 Tua ciangin amah in tua sunga om mite paikhiat pihin singatnate le tuzumte le heite tawh na a sem dingin a koih hi. Tua bangin Ammon miteʼ khuapite khempeuh ah David in hih hi. Tua ciangin David le mi khempeuh Jerusalem ah a ciah uh hi. 
1Chronicles20:4 Hih thute khit ciangin Gezer ah Filistia mite tawh kidona hong om a, Hushah khuami Sibbekai in mi thagolteʼ suanlekhakte khat ahi Sippai a that hi. Tua bangin Filistia mite kinuaisiah hi." 
1Chronicles20:5 Tua ciangin Filistia mite tawh kidona omkik leuleu hi. Tua hi a, Jairʼ tapa Elhanan in a teipi kung siamlawngpi cia a pha, Gath khuami Goliathʼ sanggampa Lahmi a that hi." 
1Chronicles20:6 Tua ciangin a khut lang tuakah khutme guk a nei, a khe lang tuakah zong kheme guk mah a nei, a vekpi-in sawm nih le li a nei, mi thalian khat a omna Gath ah gal omkik hi. Tua mipa zong mi thagolteʼ sung pan a hong piang ahi hi." 
1Chronicles20:7 Amah in Israel a to ciangin Davidʼ sanggampa Shimeaʼ tapa Jonathan in amah that hi. 
1Chronicles20:8 Hih mi thumte pen Gath a mi thagolte sung pan a hong piang ahi uh hi. David le a nasemteʼ khutin amaute puk uh hi. 
1Chronicles21:1 Satan in Israel mite gimsak nuam ahih manin Israel mi phazah a sim dingin David hanthawn hi. 
1Chronicles21:2 Tua ahih ciangin David in Joab le galkap a ukte kiangah, “Pai un; Beer-sheba panin Dan ciang dong Israel mi phazah va sim unla, amaute a phazah ka theih nadingin kei kiangah thu hong zasak un,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:3 Ahih hangin Joab in, “ Topa in a mite a zah za khatin behlap tahen! Ka to kumpipa aw, amaute khempeuh ka topaʼ nasemte hi lo ahi uh hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin ka topa in hih kisam sa na hi hiam? Bang hangin Israel tungah mawhna tun ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:4 Ahih hangin kumpipa in Joab thu zawh hi. Tua ciangin Joab kihem khia-in Israel sung khempeuh ah pai a, tua ciangin Jerusalem ah hong ciahkik hi." 
1Chronicles21:5 Tua ciangin Joab in David kiangah mite a kigawm khit ciangin a phazah a pia hi. Israel khempeuh sungah galkap thei ding mihing awn khat le sang khat om a, Judah sungah galkap thei ding mi tul za le tul sawm sagih om hi." 
1Chronicles21:6 Ahih hangin Joab in kumpipaʼ thupiakna hoih sa het lo ahih manin a mi simna ah Levi minam le Benjamin minamte hel lo hi. 
1Chronicles21:7 Ahih hangin hih thu ah Pasian lungkim lo a, amah in Israel-te vat gawp hi." 
1Chronicles21:8 Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah, “Hih ka nasepna ah nakpi takin ka khial hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nang tungah kong thum hi; na nasem paʼ mawhna hong maisak in; bang hang hiam cih leh a haihuai mahmah in ka gamta kha khin hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:9 Tua ciangin Topa in Davidʼ thumu pa Gad tungah thu gen a," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Pai inla David kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangma tungah thu thum kong pia hi. Nang tungah kong hih theih nadingin tuate khat teel in, ci hi,’ ci-in gen in” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:11 Tua ahih ciangin David kiangah Gad hong pai-in ama tungah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ‘Na lak ding khat teel in:" 
1Chronicles21:12 Kialpi kum thum sung, ahih kei leh na galte in nang hong sim gawp laitakin na galte mai ah kha thum sung galtaina, ahih kei leh gam sungah pulnatna le Topaʼ vantungmi in Israel sung khempeuh ah suksiatna ni thum sung a piangsak Topaʼ namsau,’ ci hi. Tu-in kei hong sawl pa kiangah ka ciahpih ding dawn nading khentel in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:13 Tua ciangin David in Gad kiangah, “Keimah in lungkhamna lianpi khat ka tuak hi. Ama hehpihna lian mahmah ahih manin Topaʼ khut sungah hong puksak inla, mihingʼ khut sungah hong puksak kei in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel tungah pulnatna khat tungsak a, Israel mi tul sawm sagih puk hi." 
1Chronicles21:15 Tua ciangin Pasian in a susia dingin Jerusalem ah vantungmi sawl hi. Ahih hangin amah in a suksiat ding laitakin Topa in mu a, tua thusia ah amah kisik hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a susia vantungmi kiangah, “Pha zo hi; tu-in khawl ta in,” a ci hi. Jebus mi Ornanʼ ancilna gei ah Topaʼ vantungmi a din laitak ahi hi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Tua ciangin David khuadak to a, leitung le vantung kikalah Topaʼ vantungmi dingin, a khut sungah a kidok sa namsau khat omin Jerusalem tungah a zan mu hi. Tua ciangin David le a upate puanhampi silhin maipuk uh hi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah, “Mi phazah a sim dingin thu a pia pa keimah hi lo ka hi hiam? Khialin a gitloh gamtat mahmah pa keimah ka hi hi. Ahih hangin hih mite in bang gamtat khialhna nei ahi uh hiam? Topa ka Pasian aw, kong thum hi, keimah le ka innkuan gim hong pia in. Ahih hangin na mite tungah gimna tungsak kei in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:18 Tua ciangin David pai to-in Jebus mi Ornanʼ ancilna phualah Topa ading biakna tau khat a lam nading a gen dingin Topaʼ vantungmi in Gad sawl hi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ min tawh a gen Gadʼ kammal bangin David pai to hi. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ornan le a tapa lite in mangbuh a cilcil laitakin a khuadak uh leh Topaʼ vantungmi mu uh a, a tapa lite lau-in a bu uh hi." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ornan kiangah David hong tun ciangin, Ornan khuadak a, David mu-in ancilna panin hong paikhia a, a mai lei lam ngatin David tungah zahtakna a bawl hi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Tua ciangin David in Ornan kiangah, “Mite kiang panin gimna a ven theih nadingin Topa ading biakna tau khat ka lam theih nadingin na ancilna mun hong pia in. A man a cingin piak dingin hong pia in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:23 Tua ciangin Ornan in David kiangah, “La in; ka to kumpipa in hoih na sak bangin hih in. Meihal biaknate-a zat dingin bawngtalte, a sing dingin ancilna singte le an tawh biak nadingin a mangbuhte kong pia hi. A vekpi-in kong pia hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:24 Ahih hangin Kumpi David in Ornan kiangah, “Hi lo hi, a man a cing tawh kong lei ding hi. Topa adingin nangma aʼ ka la kei dinga, keima sum bei loin meihal biaknate zong ka pia kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles21:25 Tua ahih ciangin David in Ornanʼ tungah a mun lei nadingin kham shekel za guk a gik a pia hi. 
1Chronicles21:26 Tua ciangin David in tua lai ah Topa adingin biakna tau khat lamin meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te bawlin Topaʼ tungah thu ngen a, tua ciangin amah in a thungetna a piakna-in a meihal biakna a hal dingin vantung panin meikuang a pia suk hi." 
1Chronicles21:27 Tua ciangin Topaʼ thupiakna tawh vantungmi in a namsau a pai sungah a siatkik hi. 
1Chronicles21:28 Tua hunin, Jebus mi Ornanʼ ancilna phualah ama nget thu Topa in a piakna David in a muh ciangin amah in tua lai ah a biakpiaknate a bawl hi." 
1Chronicles21:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moses in gamlak ah a bawl Topaʼ biakbuk le meihal biakna tau pen tua hunin Gibeon mual dawnah om lai hi. 
1Chronicles21:30 Ahih hangin amah in Topaʼ vantungmiʼ namsau kihta ahih manin Pasian tungah thu a dong dingin tua lai ah David pai ngam lo hi. 
1Chronicles22:1 Tua ciangin David in, “Hih lai ah Topa Pasianʼ inn om dinga, hih lai ah Israel miteʼ meihal biakna tau om ding hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:2 Israel gam sunga om gamdang mite a kikaihkhop nadingun David in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin amah in Pasianʼ biakinn lam nadingin suangseek sate a bawl dingin suangseekte a koih hi. 
1Chronicles22:3 David in kongpi kongkhak-a zat dingin siktukkilh le gak nadingin sik tampi koihin, teh zawh lohin sumngo tampi tak zong koih a," 
1Chronicles22:4 taamtak singte sim zawh hi lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Sidon khua mite le Taia khua mite in David kiangah taamtak tampi tak puak uh hi. 
1Chronicles22:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh David in, “Ka tapa Solomon khangno-in pumpi tawh sinna om nai lo a, Topa ading a kilam biakinn pen gam khempeuh ah minthanna le pahtawina ah a lian mahmah ding ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua biakinn dingin keimah ka kiging khol ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David in a sih ma-in na tampi tak koih khol hi." 
1Chronicles22:6 Tua ciangin amah in a tapa Solomon sam a, Israel Pasian, Topa adingin biakinn khat a lam ding a gen hi." 
1Chronicles22:7 David in Solomon kiangah, “Ka ta aw, Topa ka Pasianʼ min dingin biakinn khat lam ding ka lungsimah om hi." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ahih hangin keiʼ tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung a, ‘Nangmah in gal lian pipi tampi simin mi tampi na that hi. Nangmah in keima mai leitungah sisan tua zahta luangsak na hih manin ka min dingin biakinn na lam kei ding hi." 
1Chronicles22:9 En in, nangma sung panin tapa khat hong piang dinga, amah pen lungnopna a nei mi hi ding hi. Keimah in a kimkot a, a galte khempeuh panin ama tungah lungnopna ka pia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama min Solomon hi dinga, ama hun sungin Israel tungah lungnopna le daihna ka pia ding hi." 
1Chronicles22:10 Amah in keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding hi. Amah ka tapa hi-in, kei, ama pa ka hi dinga, Israel sungah ama kumpi tokhom ka kipsak paisuak ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:11 Tu-in ka ta aw, amah in nangma thu a gen sa bangin Topa na Pasianʼ biakinn na lamna ah na tangtun theih nadingin Topa in nang hong ompih tahen." 
1Chronicles22:12 Amah in Israel tungah nang hong uksak ciangin Topa na Pasianʼ thukham na zuih theih nadingin Topa in ngaihsut pilna le thutelna nang tungah hong pia tahen. 
1Chronicles22:13 Tua ciangin Israel-te adingin Topa in Moses a piak thukhamte le biakna ngeina kipte zuih ding na kidop nakleh na maavang ding hi. Thakhauh inla hang in. Lau kei inla lungkia kei in. 
1Chronicles22:14 Nakpi tak a hanciamna le gimna lianpi tawh Topaʼ biakinn dingin kham talen tul za khat, ngun talen awn khat le teh zawh lohin sumngo le sik ka koih khinzo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tam mahmah hi; sing le suang zong ka koih zo hi. Nangmah in hihte na behlap ding hi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Nangmah in na a sem ding mi tampi na nei hi; suangseekte, leilesuang inn lam siamte, khutsiamte le sim zawh lohin siamna nam khempeuh a nei," 
1Chronicles22:16 kham, ngun, sumngo le sik sep a siamte na nei ding hi. Kithawi inla sem in! Topa in nang hong ompih tahen!” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles22:17 Israel makaite khempeuh in zong a tapa Solomon a huh nading David in thu pia a," 
1Chronicles22:18 “ Topa na Pasian uh note tawh hong om hi lo ahi hiam? Amah in na kiim khempeuh uh ah lungnopna hong pia hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in gam sunga teeng mite keima khut sungah hong pia khin a, Topa le ama miteʼ mai ah gam sung khempeuh kinuaisiah hi." 
1Chronicles22:19 Tu-in Topa na Pasian uh a zong dingin na ngaihsutna uh le na lungsim uh kipsak un. Topaʼ min dingin a kilam biakinn sungah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang le Pasianʼ umlebeel siangthote a kipaipih theih nadingin kithawi unla Topa Pasianʼ biakinn lam un,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles23:1 Tu-in David teekin kum tampi pha a, amah in Israel tungah kumpi-in a tapa Solomon a koih hi." 
1Chronicles23:2 David in Israel makai khempeuh le siampite le Levi mite a khawm hi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Levi mite kum sawm thum panin a tungsiah teeng kisim a, a vekpi-in pasal tul sawm thum le tul giat pha hi." 
1Chronicles23:4 David in, “Hihte sung panin tul sawm nih le tul li in Topaʼ biakinn sungah nasep uk dinga, tul guk pen mangte le thukhente hi dinga," 
1Chronicles23:5 tul li kongcingte le tul li in phat nadinga ka bawl sa lasaknate tawh Topa tungah phatna pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles23:6 Tua ciangin David in Levi mite a behbehin pawl thum suah a, tuate pen: Gershom pawl, Kohath pawl le Merari pawl ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gershomʼ tapate: Ladan le Shimei ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladanʼ tapate: A ukpi Jehiel le Zetham le Joel, thum pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladanʼ tapate: A ukpi Jehiel le Zetham le Joel, thum pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shimeiʼ tapate: Shelomoth, Haziel le Haran, thum pha uh hi. Hihte pen Ladanʼ beh lutangte ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:10 Tua ciangin Shimeiʼ tapate: Jahath, Zina, Jeush le Beriah ahi uh hi. Hih lite pen Shimeiʼ tapate ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:11 Jahath a ukpi hi-in, Zina a nihna ahi hi. Ahih hangin Jeush le Beriah-te in tapa tampi nei lo uh ahih manin innkuan khat kisuak sakin sim khatin kisim khawm uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kohathʼ tapate: Amram, Izhar, Hebron le Uzziel, li pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:13 Amramʼ tapate: Aaron le Moses ahi uh hi. Amah le a tapate in Topaʼ mai ah paknamtui a hal tawntung ding le ama na semin ama min tawh thupha a piak tawntung theih nadingin a siangtho pen nate a ap dingin Aaron kituam koih hi. 
1Chronicles23:14 Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mipa Mosesʼ tapate ahihleh Levi minamte lakah kisim hi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Mosesʼ tapate: Gershom le Eliezer ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles23:16 Gershomʼ tapate lakah Shebuel a ukpi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliezerʼ tapa Rehabiah zong a ukpi ahi hi. Eliezer in tapa dang nei lo a, ahih hangin Rehabiahʼ tapate tam mahmah hi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Kohathʼ tapa nihna Izharʼ tapate lakah Shelomoth a ukpi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles23:19 Kohathʼ tapa thumna Hebronʼ tapate lakah: Jeriah a ukpi, Amariah a nihna, Jahaziel a thumna le Jekameam a lina ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:20 Kohathʼ tapa lina Uzzielʼ tapate lakah: Mikah a ukpi le Isshiah a nihna ahi hi. 
1Chronicles23:21 Merariʼ tapate: Mahli le Mushi ahi hi. Mahliʼ tapate: Eleazar le Kish ahi hi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazar in tapa nei loin si a, tanu bek nei hi. Amauʼ tanau, Kish tapate in amaute teenpih uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushiʼ tapate: Mahli, Eder le Jeremoth, thum pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:24 Hihte pen Topaʼ biakinn nasepna ah na a sem ding, kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah, a milipin a minin a mi phazah zui-in a kiciaptehna bangin beh lutangte, a behbehin Levi suante ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh David in, “Israel Pasian, Topa in a mite tungah lungnopna pia zo a, Jerusalem ah amah om tawntung ta hi." 
1Chronicles23:26 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in puanbuk hitaleh tua tawh kisai nasep nading nate khat peuhpeuh hitaleh a puak ding uh kisam nawn lo hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles23:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Davidʼ thupiakna a nunung pen tawh a kisim hihte pen kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah Levi mi a phazah ahi hi. 
1Chronicles23:28 “Ahih hangin amauteʼ nasep ding pen Topaʼ biakinn nasepna ah Aaronʼ suante huhin, biakinn tualte le biakinn deite kemin, biakna na khempeuh a siangthosak ding le Pasianʼ biakinn nasepna ah hih ding khat peuhpeuh a sem ding uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:29 Ompihna Anlum, an tawh biak nadingin annel, silngo sawh loh anlum moh, a ki-em piakna, sathau tawh a kihel piakna le a tam tehna ahih kei leh a lian tehna nasep khempeuh zong a huh ding uh ahi hi." 
1Chronicles23:30 Tua ciangin amaute zingsang simin ding ding uh a, lungdamna ko-in Topa phatin, nitakin zong tua bangmahin hih ding uh a," 
1Chronicles23:31 a mal zah a kisam bangin Sabbath nite, Khadet nite le pawi nite-in Topa tungah meihal biakna a kipiak peuhpeuh ciangin a tawntungin Topaʼ mai ah om ding uh hi." 
1Chronicles23:32 Tua bangin amaute in kikhopna puanbuk le biakinn kemin, Topaʼ biakinn nasepna ah amauʼ behte ahi Aaronʼ suante huh ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles24:1 Aaronʼ suante a kisehkhennate hih bang ahi hi. Aaronʼ tapate: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar le Ithamar ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ahih hangin a pa uh a sih ma-in Nadab le Abihu si-in ta nei lo uh ahih manin Eleazar le Ithamar-te siampi suak uh hi. 
1Chronicles24:3 Eleazarʼ suan Zadok le Ithamarʼ suan Ahimelekʼ huhna tawh David in amauʼ nasepna ah a kiseh bangin Aaronʼ suante a koih hi. 
1Chronicles24:4 Ithamarʼ suante lak sangin Eleazarʼ suante lakah ukpi tam om zaw ahih manin, amaute in Eleazarʼ suante pawl sawm le guk suahin, Ithamarʼ suante pawl giat suah uh hi." 
1Chronicles24:5 Eleazarʼ suante le Ithamarʼ suante lakah biakinn uliante le Pasianʼ uliante om tuak uh ahih manin amaute in a kibangin aisanna tawh amaute koih uh hi. 
1Chronicles24:6 Tua ciangin Levi mi Nethanelʼ tapa ahi lai-at pa Shemaiah in kumpipa, uliante, siampi Zadok, Abiatharʼ tapa Ahimelek, siampite le Levi mi beh lutangteʼ omna ah amaute ciamteh hi. Eleazarʼ suante-aʼ dingin khat kiteelin, tua ciangin Ithamarʼ suante adingin khat kiteel a, kilaihsak niloh uh hi." 
1Chronicles24:7 Aisanna a masa pen Jehoiarib tung, a nihna Jedaiah tung," 
1Chronicles24:8 a thumna Harim tung, a lina Seorim tung," 
1Chronicles24:9 a ngana Malkhijah tung, a gukna Mijamin tung," 
1Chronicles24:10 a sagihna Hakkoz tung, a giatna Abijah tung," 
1Chronicles24:11 a kuana Jeshua tung, a sawmna Shekaniah tung," 
1Chronicles24:12 a sawm le khatna Eliashib tung, a sawm le nihna Jakim tung," 
1Chronicles24:13 a sawm le thumna Huppah tung, a sawm le lina Jeshebeab tung," 
1Chronicles24:14 a sawm le ngana Bilgah tung, a sawm le gukna Immer tung," 
1Chronicles24:15 a sawm le sagihna Hezir tung, a sawm le giatna Happizzez tung," 
1Chronicles24:16 a sawm le kuana Pethahiah tung, a sawm nihna Jehezkel tung," 
1Chronicles24:17 a sawm nih le khatna Jakhin tung, a sawm nih le nihna Gamul tung," 
1Chronicles24:18 a sawm nih le thumna Delaiah tung, a sawm nih le lina Maaziah tungah a tu hi." 
1Chronicles24:19 Hihte in Israel Topa Pasian in amah a thupiak bangin a pupi uh Aaron in amaute-aʼ dingin a kipsak sa ngeina bangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a pai dingin amauʼ nasep uh ahi a kiseh nasep nei uh hi. 
1Chronicles24:20 Tua ciangin Levi suante a omlaite lakah: Aramʼ suante sung panin Shubaelʼ suante Jehdeiah ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:21 Rehabiahʼ suante sung panin Isshiah a ukpi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:22 Izharʼ suante sung panin Shelomothʼ suante Jahath ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:23 Hebronʼ suante lakah: Jeriah a ukpi, Amariah a nihna, Jahaziel a thumna, Jekameam a lina ahi hi." 
1Chronicles24:24 Uzzielʼ suante sung panin Mikahʼ suante Shamir ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:25 Isshiahʼ suante sung panin Zekhariah ahi hi. Mikahʼ sanggampa pen Isshiah ahi hi. 
1Chronicles24:26 Merariʼ suante: Mahli, Mushi le Jaaziah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles24:27 Merariʼ suante Jaaziah sung panin Beno, Shoham, Zakkur le Ibri ahi hi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Mahli in tapa nih, Eleazar le Kish nei hi. Eleazar in tapa nei lo a, Kish in Jerahmeel a kici tapa khat nei hi." 
1Chronicles24:29  
1Chronicles24:30 Mushiʼ tapate: Mahli, Eder le Jerimoth ahi uh hi. Hihte pen a beh tawh kizui-in Leviʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
1Chronicles24:31 Hihte in zong a behte uh ahi Aaronʼ suante mah bangin Kumpi David, Zadok, Ahimelek, siampite le Levi mi beh lutangteʼ muhna ah beh lutangte le a nau pasalte khat ciat in a kibangin aisanna tawh nasep tavuan a la uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:1 David le nasepna ah a ukpite in zong laiza lasaknate, harp lasaknate le daltuahte tawh Pasian thu a gen dingin Asaf, Heman le Jeduthun-teʼ tapate pawl khat nasepna a dingin koihtuam uh hi. Na a semte le amauʼ nasepte:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Asafʼ tapate sung panin: Kumpipaʼ makaihna nuai ah Pasianʼ thu a gen Asafʼ makaihna nuai ah Asafʼ tapate Zakkur, Josef, Nethaniah le Asharelah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles25:3 Jeduthunʼ sung panin Jeduthunʼ tapate: Lungdamkohna le Topa phatna-in laiza lasakna tawh thu a gen, a pa uh Jeduthunʼ makaihna nuai ah Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah le Mattithiah, guk pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:4 Heman sung panin Hemanʼ tapate: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, Romamti-ezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir le Mahazioth ahi hi." 
1Chronicles25:5 Hihte khempeuh pen Pasian thuciamna bangin amah a pahtawi dingin kumpipaʼ thumu pa Hemanʼ tapate ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Heman tungah tapa sawm le li le tanu thum pia hi. 
1Chronicles25:6 Amaute khempeuh Pasianʼ biakinn nasep nadingin Topaʼ biakinn sungah daltuahte, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawh la lamsang ah a pa uh ukna nuai ah om uh hi. Asaf, Jeduthun le Heman-te pen kumpipaʼ thupiakna nuai ah om uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:7 A Levi mipihte uh tawh Topa ading lasakna lamah sinna a nei a siam mi a vekpi-in za nih le sawm giat le giat ahi hi. 
1Chronicles25:8 Tua ciangin a neu a lian, sia le a sinte a kibangin, amaute in amauʼ nasep ding uh ai a san uh hi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Asafʼ behte adingin ai masa Josef tungah tu hi. A nihna Gedaliah, a sanggamte le a tapate, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:10 A thumna Zakkur, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:11 A lina Izri, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:12 A ngana Nethaniah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:13 A gukna Bukkiah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:14 A sagihna Jesharelah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:15 A giatna Jeshaiah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:16 A kuana Mattaniah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:17 A sawmna Shimei, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:18 A sawm le khatna Azarel, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:19 A sawm le nihna Hashabiah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:20 A sawm le thumna Shubael, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:21 A sawm le lina Mattithiah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:22 A sawm le ngana Jeremoth, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:23 A sawm le gukna Hananiah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:24 A sawm le sagihna Joshbekashah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:25 A sawm le giatna Hanani, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:26 A sawm le kuana Mallothi, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:27 A sawm nihna Eliathah, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:28 A sawm nih le khatna Hothir, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:29 A sawm nih le nihna Giddalti, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:30 A sawm nih le thumna Mahazioth, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung tu hi." 
1Chronicles25:31 A sawm nih le lina Romamti-ezer, a tapate le a sanggamte, sawm le nih tung a tu hi." 
1Chronicles26:1 Kongcingte a kisehkhenna hih bang ahi hi: Korah behte, Asafʼ innkuan sung panin Koreʼ tapa Meshelemiah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:2 Meshelemiahʼ tapate: Zekhariah a tacil, Jediael a nihna, Zebadiah a thumna, Jathniel a lina," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam a ngana, Jehohanan a gukna, Eliehoenai a sagihna ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obededomʼ tapate: Shemaiah a tacil, Jehozabad a nihna, Joah a thumna, Sakar a lina, Nethanel a ngana," 
1Chronicles26:5 Ammiel a gukna, Issakhar a sagihna, Peullethai a giatna ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:6 Ama tapa upa pen Shemaiah sung panin zong a beh sungah ukte ahi tapate a suak hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen siamna lian a nei mite ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:7 Shemaiahʼ tapate: Othni, Refael, Obed le a sanggamte siamna a nei ahi Elzabad, Elihu le Shemakhiah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:8 Hihte khempeuh pen Obededomʼ tapate le amauʼ tapate le a sanggamte uh tawh, nasep nadingin siamna a nei mi kician ahi uh hi. Obededom sung panin sawm guk le nih pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemiah in siamna a nei tapate le sanggamte, sawm le giat nei hi." 
1Chronicles26:10 Merari innkuan sung panin Hosahʼ tapate: Shimri a ukpi (amah tacil ahih loh hangin a pa in a ukpi-in amah bawl hi)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkiah a nihna, Tebaliah a thumna, Zekhariah a lina ahi hi. Hosahʼ tapate le a sanggamte khempeuh sawm le thum a pha uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:12 Innkuan pasal lutangte pen kongcingte ahi uh hi. Amaute in a sanggamte uh tawh Topaʼ biakinn sungah nasep nei uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:13 Amaute in a neu a lian a kibangin a pate uh inn kuankuanin amauʼ kongpi cin ding ai san uh hi.
