1Chronicles26:14 Nisuahna lam adingin ai, Shelemiah tungah tu hi. A tapa, a pil thulamlak pa Zekhariah adingin zong ai san uh a, leilu lam adingin ai pha hi." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obededom adingin leitaw lamah hong suak a, a tapa tungah vankoihna inn dei kipia hi." 
1Chronicles26:16 Shuppim le Hosah adingin lampi a pai tohna, Shallekheth kongpi san, nitumna lamah kia hi. Galvil le galvil kimai tuah uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Vankoihna inn dei kongah nih nihin a om mah bangin nisimin nisuahna lamah guk omin, nisim mahin leitaw lamah li om hi." 
1Chronicles26:18 Tua ciangin nitumna lam a om lampi inn-a dingin a lampi ah li omin a inn ah nih om hi. 
1Chronicles26:19 Hihte pen Korah mite le Merariʼ tapate lakah kongcingte a kisehkhenna ahi hi. 
1Chronicles26:20 Tua ciangin Levi mite sung panin Ahijah in Pasianʼ biakinn van manpha koihnate le a ki-ap letsong koihnate uk hi. 
1Chronicles26:21 Gershon-te beh sung panin Ladan pen innkuan tampi a pian khiatna mi khat hi a, Jehiel innkuante zong ama sung panin a piang ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehielʼ tapa Zetham le a sanggampa Joel in Topaʼ biakinn van manpha koihnate uk uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:22 Jehielʼ tapa Zetham le a sanggampa Joel in Topaʼ biakinn van manpha koihnate uk uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:23 Amram mite, Izhar mite, Hebron mite le Uzziel mite sung panin:" 
1Chronicles26:24 Mosesʼ tapa Gershom-te beh sung panin Shebuel pen van manpha koihna a ukte lakah a ukpi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles26:25 Gershomʼ sanggam Eliezerʼ suan Shelomith tawh zong beh kinai ahi hi. Eliezerʼ sung panin a tapa Rehabiah, a tapa Jeshaiah, a tapa Joram, a tapa Zikri, a tapa Shelomith ahi hi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Hih Shelomith le a sanggamte in, Kumpi David, beh lutangte le a tultul le a zaza-a uk uliante le galkap a ukte in a ap uh ahi, a ki-ap letsongte a kikoihna khempeuh uk uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:27 Gal sungah a ngah uh van kinusiate sung panin Topaʼ biakinn puah nadingin amaute in letsongte ap uh hi. 
1Chronicles26:28 Thumu pa Samuel, Kishʼ tapa Saul, Nerʼ tapa Abner le Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in a ap sate khempeuh zong, a ki-ap letsong khempeuh Shelomith le a sanggamteʼ kepna sungah om hi." 
1Chronicles26:29 Izhar mite sung panin Khenaniah le a tapate pen Israel adingin uliante le thukhente-in a pualam nasepna ah kiseh hi. 
1Chronicles26:30 Hebron mite sung panin Hashabiah le a sanggamte, siamna a nei mihing tul khat le za sagih in Jordan nitumna lam Israel tungah Topaʼ nasepna khempeuh le kumpipaʼ nasepna ah uk uh hi." 
1Chronicles26:31 Hebron mite sung panin Jerijah a ukpi ahi hi. (Davidʼ uk a kum sawm lina kumin kikantelna bawl uh a, Gilead gam sung Jazer ah amaute sung panin siamna lian a nei mihing kimu hi.)" 
1Chronicles26:32 Kumpi David in Jerijah le a sanggamte, siamna a nei mihing tul nih le za sagih, a beh sungah lutang ahite pen Pasian tawh a kisai na khempeuh le kumpipaʼ vaite ah, Reuben mite, Gad mite le Manasseh minam a langte tungah a uk dingin a seh hi." 
1Chronicles27:1 Tu-in Israel mite, beh lutangte, a tul le a za-a a ukte le khen khat ah mi tul sawm nih le tul li a om, kum tawntung kha khat khit kha khat hong tungin a kuan khia a khente tawh kisai-in na khempeuh ah kumpipaʼ na a sem a uliante:" 
1Chronicles27:2 A kha masa sungin Zabdielʼ tapa Jashobeam a khen masa a uk hi a, ama khen sungah mi tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:3 Amah pen Perezʼ suanlekhak hi a, a kha masa sungin galkap a ukte khempeuh a ukpi ahi hi." 
1Chronicles27:4 A kha nihna sungin Ahoh-te beh Dodai a khen a ukpi hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:5 A kha thumna sungin siampi Jehoiadaʼ tapa Benaiah a ukpi hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:6 Hih pa pen mihing sawm thumte sungah a thahat, mihing sawm thumte a uk Benaiah hi a, ama tapa Ammizabad pen ama khen a ukpa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles27:7 A kha lina sungin Joab sanggampa Asahel hi a, ama nungah amah a laih dingin a tapa Zebadiah om hi. Ama khen sungah mi tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:8 A kha ngana sungin Izrah-te beh Shamhuth hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:9 A kha gukna sungin Tekoa khuami Ikkeshʼ tapa Ira hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:10 A kha sagihna sungin Efraim suante sung panin Pelon khuami Helez hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:11 A kha giatna sungin Jerah mi sung panin Hushah khuami Sibbekai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:12 A kha kuana sungin Benjamin mi sung panin Anathoth khuami Abiezer hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:13 A kha sawmna sungin Zerah mi sung panin Netofah khuami Maharai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:14 A kha sawm le khatna sungin Efraim suante sung panin Pirathon khuami Benaiah hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:15 A kha sawm le nihna sungin Othnielʼ suante sung panin Netofah khuami Heldai hi a, ama khen sungah tul sawm nih le tul li om hi." 
1Chronicles27:16 Israel minamte tungah a ukpite: Reuben mite adingin Zikriʼ tapa Eliezer ahi hi. Simeon mite adingin Maakahʼ tapa Shefatiah ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:17 Levi mite adingin Kemuelʼ tapa Hashabiah ahi hi. Aaron mite adingin Zadok ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:18 Judah mite adingin Davidʼ sanggamteʼ sung panin Elihu ahi hi. Issakhar mite adingin Mikhaelʼ tapa Omri ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite adingin Obadiahʼ tapa Ishmaiah ahi hi. Naftali mite adingin Azrielʼ tapa Jeremoth ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:19 Zebulun mite adingin Obadiahʼ tapa Ishmaiah ahi hi. Naftali mite adingin Azrielʼ tapa Jeremoth ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim mite adingin Azariahʼ tapa Hoshea ahi hi. Manasseh minam a langte adingin Pedaiahʼ tapa Joel ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:20 Efraim mite adingin Azariahʼ tapa Hoshea ahi hi. Manasseh minam a langte adingin Pedaiahʼ tapa Joel ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:21 Gilead gam sunga Manasseh minam a langte adingin Zekhariahʼ tapa Iddo ahi hi. Benjamin mite adingin Abnerʼ tapa Jaasiel ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:22 Dan mite adingin Jehoramʼ tapa Azarel ahi hi. Hihte pen Israel minamteʼ makaite ahi uh hi. 
1Chronicles27:23 Israel mite vantung aksi zahin a tamin a bawl nading Topa in thu ciam khin ahih manin David in kum sawm nih le a nuaisiah mite sim lo hi. 
1Chronicles27:24 Zeruiahʼ tapa Joab in sim ding kipan a, ahih hangin zo man lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu hangin Israel tungah Pasianʼ hehna hong tung a, Kumpi Davidʼ khang tangthu sungah tua a kisimte kikhum lo hi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Kumpipaʼ van manpha a ukte: Kumpipaʼ van manpha koihnate ah Adielʼ tapa Azmaveth ahi hi. Gam sunga van manpha koihnate, khuapi sungate, khuaneute le tausangte sunga omte tungah Uzziahʼ tapa Jonathan ahi hi." 
1Chronicles27:26 Lo khawh nasep a sem mite tungah Khelubʼ tapa Ezri ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:27 Leenggui lote tungah Ramah khuami Shimei ahi hi. Leenggui lo panin a piang leenggahzu koihnate tungah Shifmoth khuami Zabdi ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:28 Shefelah gam sunga om oliv le theithek kungte tungah Gederah khuami Baal-hanan ahi hi. Sathau koihnate tungah Joash ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Sharon gam sungah a gamta ganhonte tungah Sharon khuami Shitrai ahi hi. Kuam sunga om ganhonte tungah Adlaiʼ tapa Shafat ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:30 Kalaohte tungah Ishmael mi Obil ahi hi. La a nute tungah Meronoth khuami Jehdeiah ahi hi. Tuuhonte tungah Hagri mi Jaziz ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:31 Hihte khempeuh pen Kumpi Davidʼ neihsa a kemte ahi hi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Davidʼ pano Jonathan pen thu thei mi le lai thei mi ahih manin thulamlak pa ahi hi. Amah le Hakmoniʼ tapa Jehiel in kumpipaʼ tapate cing uh hi. 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahithofel pen kumpipaʼ thulamlak pa hi a, Arkhi mi Hushai pen kumpipaʼ lawmpa ahi hi." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahithofel a sih ciangin Benaiahʼ tapa Jehoiada le Abiathar in laih uh hi. Joab pen kumpipaʼ galkapte a ukpa ahi hi. 
1Chronicles28:1 David in Jerusalem-a Israel-te lakah zaneite, minamte sungah zaneite, kumpipaʼ na a sem a khente sungah uliante, a tultul a a ukte, a zaza-a a ukte, neihsa khempeuh le kumpipaʼ ganhingte le a tapate a kemte pen, kumpi inn-a zaneite, a thahat mite le gal a hang tawntungte khempeuh tawh a khawm hi." 
1Chronicles28:2 Tua ciangin Kumpi David a khe-in ding to-in, “Ka sanggamte le ka mite aw, ka thugen hong za un. Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang ading le i Pasianʼ khengak nadingin tawlngakna biakinn khat lam ding ka lungsim sungah om a, a lam nading ka kiging hi." 
1Chronicles28:3 Ahih hangin Pasian in kei kiangah, ‘Nang pen galhang khat hi-in sisan tampi luangsak na hih manin keima min dingin biakinn na lam thei kei ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:4 Ahi zongin Israel Topa Pasian in Israel tungah kumpi ahi tawntung dingin ka paʼ innkuan khempeuh panin kei hong teel hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in makai-in Judah teel a, tua ciangin Judah innkuan panin ka paʼ innkuan teel a, tua ciangin ka paʼ tate lak panin Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in kei hong bawl ding kei tungah amah lungkim hi." 
1Chronicles28:5 Tua ciangin ka tapate khempeuh lak panin (bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah tapa tampi hong pia hi) Israel-te a ukin Topaʼ kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin amah in ka tapa Solomon teel khin hi. 
1Chronicles28:6 Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Ka biakinn le a inntualte a bawl ding pa pen na tapa Solomon ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka tapa dingin amah ka teel khin a, kei pen ama pa ka hi ding hi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Amah in ka thupiaknate le ka biakna ngeina kipte tu ni-a mah bangin zuih ding a ngaihsut paisuak nakleh ama kumpi gam ka kipsak tawntung ding hi,’ hong ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:8 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note in hih leitang hoih nei-in noteʼ khit na tate uh tungah gamh-in na nusiat tawntung theih nadingun Topaʼ mai ah kikhopna ahi Israel khempeuhʼ muhna le i Pasianʼ zakna ah Topa na Pasian uh thupiaknate khempeuh zui-in zong un. 
1Chronicles28:9 “Tu-in nang, ka tapa Solomon aw, na paʼ Pasian thei inla, na lungsim khempeuh le utna lungsim tawh ama na sem in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in lungsim sung zong a, ngimna le ngaihsutna khempeuh thei hi. Nangmah in amah na zon le nangmah in amah na mu ding hi. Ahih hangin amah na nusiat leh amah in nang hong paai khia paisuak ding hi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Biakinn dingin inn khat a lam dingin Topa in nang hong teel khin ahih manin tu-in kingaihsun in; thahat inla sem in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles28:11 Tua ciangin David in a tapa Solomon tungah biakinn innliim, a innte, a van manpha koihnate, a dawl tungnungte, a dei sung nungte le hehpihna tokhom adingin inn dei a geelna;" 
1Chronicles28:12 le Topaʼ inn a tualte adingin a lungsim ah a ngaihsut khempeuh, a kimkot a inn deite khempeuh, Pasianʼ biakinn sung van manpha koihnate le a ki-ap letsongte ading van manpha koihnate;" 
1Chronicles28:13 siampite le Levi mi a khente le Topaʼ biakinn sungah nasepna khempeuh ading; Topaʼ biakinn sungah nasep nading umlebeel khempeuh ading," 
1Chronicles28:14 nasepna ah zat ding kham tawh kibawl umlebeel khempeuh a gihna, nasepna ah zat dingin ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte a gihna," 
1Chronicles28:15 nasepna ah meivak khuam a kizat ciatna bangin kham meivak khuamte le a meivakte a gihna, a meivak khuam le meivakte a gihna zah ciat, meivak khuam khat le a meivakte ngun a gihna," 
1Chronicles28:16 Ompihna Anlum adingin sabuai kham a gihna ciat, ngun sabuaite adingin ngun a gihna," 
1Chronicles28:17 le sikkeute, kuangte le haite adingin kham citak a gihna; kham haipite le a gihna ciat, ngun haipite le a gihna ciat;" 
1Chronicles28:18 a kisiangsak sa kham tawh kibawl paknamtui biakna tau ding le a gihna zah ding a geelna; a khate uh zakin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a khuh kherub-teʼ kham leeng ding a geelna zong a pia hi. 
1Chronicles28:19 Nasep ding khempeuh geel sa bangin sep dingin hih thu tawh kizui-in Topaʼ genna bangin lai-in gelhna tawh amah in hihte khempeuh a siangin a hih hi. 
1Chronicles28:20 Tua ciangin David in a tapa Solomon kiangah, “Thakhauhin hang inla sem in. Lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian, keima Pasian nangawn nang tawh hong om hi. Topaʼ biakinn sung nasepna khempeuh a kizawh matengin amah in nang hong tamasak lo dinga, hong nusia lo ding hi." 
1Chronicles28:21 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasep khempeuh a sem dingin siampite le Levi mi a khente om hi. Nasepna khat peuhpeuh ah siamna a nei mite in nasepna khempeuh ah nang hong huh ding hi. Uliante le mi khempeuh zong nangma thupiakna bangbangin gamta ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles29:1 Tua ciangin Kumpi David in a kikhawm khempeuhte kiangah, “Pasian in amah bek a teel sa ka tapa Solomon pen khangno-in pumpi tawh sinna om nai lo a, nasep ding pen lian mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih biakinn lianpi pen mihing ading hi lo a, Topa Pasian ading ahi hi." 
1Chronicles29:2 Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasianʼ biakinn dingin ka hih theih zah ciang, phuh dingin onik suang, suangpak, mel tuamtuam a nei suang, suangkang le suangmanpha nam khempeuh tampi takte banah kham zat nading nate ah kham, ngun zat nading nate ah ngun, sumngo zat nading nate ah sumngo, sik zat nading nate ah sik le sing zat nading nate ah sing ka koih khinzo hi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Tua tham loin, a siangtho biakinn adingin ka koihte khempeuh banah, ngun le kham keima-aʼ mahmah zong om a, ka Pasianʼ biakinn ka ngaihsutna hangin ka Pasianʼ inn ah ka piakte:" 
1Chronicles29:4 Kawm zut nadingin Ofir gam kham ahi kham talen tul thum le a kisiangsak sa ngun talen tul sagih," 
1Chronicles29:5 le siamneelte in a hih ding nasepna khempeuh adingin kham zat nading nate ah kham le ngun zat nading nate ah ngun ahi hi. Kua teng utna lungsim tawh Topaʼ tungah tu ni-in a mahmah kipia-in ki-ap ding na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. 
1Chronicles29:6 Tua ciangin beh lutangte in utthu-a piakna bawl uh a, minam makaite, a tultul a a ukte le a zaza-a a ukte le kumpipaʼ nasepna ah a uk uliante in zong hih uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:7 Amaute in Pasianʼ biakinn nasep nadingin kham talen tul nga le kham darik tul sawm, ngun talen tul sawm, sumngo talen tul sawm le tul giat le sik talen tul za khat a pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:8 Suang manpha a nei peuhmah in Gershon mi Jehielʼ kepna sung, Topaʼ biakinn sung van manpha koihna ah a pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:9 Tua ciangin hih mite in utna lungsim tawh pia uh ahih manin mite lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topaʼ tungah pia ziahziah uh a, kumpi David zong nakpi takin a lungdam hi." 
1Chronicles29:10 Tua ahih ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuhʼ omna ah David in Topa phat hi. David in, “Nang, Topa, ka pu uh Israel Pasian aw, a tawntungin thupha ngah ta in." 
1Chronicles29:11 Topa aw, liatna, vangliatna, minthanna, gualzawhna le min liatnate nangma aʼ ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh vantung le leitungah a om khempeuh zong nangma aʼ ahi hi. Topa aw, kumpi gam nangma aʼ hi a, tuate khempeuh tungah nang a lutangin hong kisangsak hi." 
1Chronicles29:12 Hauhna le minphatna nangma kiang pan hong pai a, nangmah in na khempeuh tungah na uk hi. Na khut sungah vangliatna le minthanna om a, liatsak nading le thakhauhsak nading na khut sungah om hi." 
1Chronicles29:13 Tu-in nangma tungah ka nuam uh hi, koteʼ Pasian aw, a minthang na min ka phat uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Ahih hangin kote in hih bangin utna tawh kong piak nadingun kei kua hi a, ka mite bang ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh nang kiang pan hong pai hi a, nangma aʼ mah nang tungah a hong pia ka hi uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pu ka pate khempeuh uh mah bangin kote pen nangma mai ah khual mite le peemtate ka hi uh hi. Ka hunte uh leitungah niliim bang hi a, sih ding ka pelh thei kei uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Topa koteʼ Pasian aw, na min siangtho pahtawi nadingin nang ading biakinn lam nadingin ka piak sa uh hih a tampite zong nangma khut sung panin hong pai hi a, a vekpi-in nangma aʼ mah ahi hi." 
1Chronicles29:17 Nangmah in lungsim en telin thumanna ah na lungkimna ka thei hi, ka Pasian aw. Lungsim thumanna le citna tawh hih nate khempeuh kong pia khin a, tu-in nang tungah citna le lungdamna tawh a hong pia, hih lai ah a om na mite ka mu zo hi." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ka pute uh Abraham, Isaac le Israel Pasian, Topa aw, na miteʼ lungsim sungah tua bang ngimnate le ngaihsutnate omsak tawntung inla, amauteʼ lungsim nangma lamah kai in." 
1Chronicles29:19 Amah in a lungsim khempeuh tawh na thupiaknate, na teci pannate le na thukhamte kemin a vekpi-in sem a, keimah in ka vaihawm sa biakinn lianpi amah in a lam theih nadingin ka tapa Solomon tungah utna lungsim guan in,” a ci hi." 
1Chronicles29:20 Tua ciangin David in a kikhawmte khempeuh tungah, “ Topa na Pasian uh phat un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in a pute a pate uh Pasian Topa phatin a lu uh kun uh a, Topa bia-in kumpipa tungah zahtakna a bawl uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:21 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa tungah biakpiakna bawl uh a, a zing ciangin Topa tungah meihal biakna bawngtal tul khat, tuutal tul khat le tuuno tul khat, a leenggahzu tawh a biakna teng tawh le Israel khempeuh adingin biakpiakna tampi a pia uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:22 Tua ciangin amaute in tua ni-in lungdamna lianpi tawh Topaʼ mai ah pawi khamin a om uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Davidʼ tapa Solomon kumpi-in a nih veina bawl uh a, amaute in Topa adingin amah kumpi-in sathau nilhin, siampi dingin Zadok sathau a nilh uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Tua ciangin a pa David tangin Topaʼ phuh sa kumpi tokhom tungah kumpi-in Solomon a tu hi. Amah a daupai a, Israel mi khempeuh in ama thu a mang uh hi." 
1Chronicles29:24 Makaite khempeuh le a thahat mite le Kumpi Davidʼ tapate khempeuh in zong Kumpi Solomon tungah a thuman ding uh thu ciam uh hi. 
1Chronicles29:25 Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mi khempeuh muhna ah Solomon tungah minthanna lianpi pia a, Israel sungah ama ma-in kumpi khat peuhpeuh tungah a kipia ngei nai lo kumpi minliatna a guan hi." 
1Chronicles29:26 Tua hi a, Jessiʼ tapa David in Israel khempeuh tungah a uk hi." 
1Chronicles29:27 Israel tungah ama uk hun kum sawm li sung hi a, amah in Hebron ah kum sagih sung, Jerusalem ah kum sawm thum le thum sung a uk hi." 
1Chronicles29:28 Tua ciangin a khangham, a ni cing, hauhna le minthanna tawh a si hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Solomon in ama tangin uk hi." 
1Chronicles29:29 Tu-in Kumpi Davidʼ gamtatna a patna pan a tawpna dongin thumu pa Samuelʼ Khang Tangthu sung, kamsang Nathanʼ Khang Tangthu sung le thumu pa Gadʼ Khang Tangthu sungah" 
1Chronicles29:30 ama ukna le ama vangliatnate khempeuh le ama tung le Israel tung, gam sung kumpi gamte khempeuh tungah a tung thute a kiciaptehna tawh kigelh khawm hi." 
2Chronicles1:1 Davidʼ tapa Solomon in ama kumpi gam kho takin lenkip hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ama Pasian in ompih a, a lian mahmah in amah a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles1:2 Solomon in Israel mi khempeuh tung, a tultul le a zaza-a a ukte tung, thukhente tung, Israel sunga makai khempeuh tung le beh lutangte tungah thu a gen hi." 
2Chronicles1:3 Tua ciangin Solomon le amah tawh a om khempeuh, Gibeon-a a om mual dawna biakpiakna munah pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ nasem Moses in gamlak ah a bawl sa Pasianʼ kikhopna buk tua lai ah om hi." 
2Chronicles1:4 (Ahih hangin David in Kiriath-jearim panin ama adingin a bawlsak na sa munah Pasianʼ Thuciamna Singkuang paipih to khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Jerusalem ah ama adingin puanbuk khat lamsak khin hi.) 
2Chronicles1:5 Tua tham loin Hurʼ tapa Uri, a tapa Bezalel in a bawl sumngo biakna tau pen Topaʼ biakbuk mai tua lai ah om hi. Tua ciangin Solomon le a kikhawm mite in Topa thu dong uh hi." 
2Chronicles1:6 Tua ciangin kikhopna buk ah a om Topaʼ mai-a sumngo biakna tau ah Solomon pai to-in tua tungah meihal biakna ganhing tul khat a pia hi. 
2Chronicles1:7 Tua zanin Solomon tungah Pasian kilangin ama kiangah, “Nang kong piak ding hong gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles1:8 Tua ciangin Solomon in Pasian kiangah, “Nangmah in ka pa David tungah a lian le a kip itna na lak khin a, ama tangin kumpi-in keimah nong koih khin hi." 
2Chronicles1:9 Topa Pasian aw, leitung leivui zahin a tam mite tungah kumpi-in kei hong koih khin na hih manin ka pa David tungah na thuciamna tu-in hong tungsak in." 
2Chronicles1:10 Hih mite ka uk theih nadingin tu-in pilna le theihna hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih zahin a tam hih na mite kua in uk zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
2Chronicles1:11 Pasian in Solomon dawngin, “Hih thu na lungsim sungah om a, nangmah in neihsate, hauhna, pahtawina, ahih kei leh nang hong mudahteʼ nuntakna hong ngen loin, a tungah kumpi-in nang kong koihna ka mite na uk theih nadingin nang ading pilna le theihna hong ngen na hih manin," 
2Chronicles1:12 pilna le theihna nangma tungah hong kipia hi. Nangʼ ma-a kumpite kuamah in a neih ngei loh, nangʼ khit-ate kuamah in zong tua bang a neih loh ding hauhnate, neihnate le pahtawina zong, nangma tungah kong pia thuah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles1:13 Tua ahih ciangin Gibeon-a om mual dawna biakpiakna mun, kikhopna buk mai panin Jerusalem ah Solomon hong pai hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel tungah a uk hi." 
2Chronicles1:14 Solomon in leengte le sakol tung tuangte kaikhawm hi. Amah in leeng tul khat le za li le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tul nih nei a, leeng khuapite sung le Jerusalem ah tuate a koih hi." 
2Chronicles1:15 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jerusalem ah suang bangin ngun le kham olsak a, taamtak singte pen Shefelah theithek sing bangin tamsak hi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Solomon in gamdang panin sakol a lakna munte pen Egypt le Kue pan hi a, kumpipaʼ sum bawlte in a man ding pia-in Kue panin tuate ngah uh hi." 
2Chronicles1:17 Amaute in Egypt panin leeng khat ciangin ngun shekel za guk-in la uh a, sakol khat ciangin za le sawm nga-in la uh hi. Tua bangmahin amaute in zuak khiatkik dingin Hit kumpite le Syria kumpite khempeuh tung panin zong sakol le leeng a la uh hi." 
2Chronicles2:1 Tu-in Solomon in Topaʼ min dingin biakinn khat le ama adingin kumpi inn khat lam ding sawm hi. 
2Chronicles2:2 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in van a pua ding mi tul sawm sagih le mual tung gamah suang a to ding mi tul sawm giat le tuate a van dingin mi tul thum le za guk a seh hi. 
2Chronicles2:3 Tua ciangin Solomon in Taia kumpi Hiram kiangah thu puak a, “Ten nading inn khat a lam nadingin ka pa David tungah taamtak sing na puak mah bangin kei tungah zong hong puak in." 
2Chronicles2:4 En in, Israel-te adingin a tawntung ading a kikipsak sa bangin, ama mai ah a namtui nate ahi paknamtui hal nading le Ompihna Anlum piak tawntung nading le Sabbath nite, Khadet nite le Topa koteʼ Pasian adingin a kiseh sa pawi nite-in zing le nitakin meihal biaknate piak nadingin Topa ka Pasianʼ minin biakinn khat lamin ama tungah a ap ding ka hi hi." 
2Chronicles2:5 Koteʼ Pasian pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin lian zaw ahih manin ka lam ding biakinn zong lian ding hi. 
2Chronicles2:6 Ahih hangin vantung, a sang pen vantung nangawn in amah huam zo lo ahih manin ama adingin kua in biakinn lam zo ding ahi hiam? Ama mai ah paknamtui hal nading cih sim loh ama adingin biakinn a lamsak dingin kei kua ka hi hiam?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Tua hi a, tu-in ka pa David in a seh sa, Judah le Jerusalem ah kei tawh a om nasep siamte tawh a sem khawm dingin kham, ngun, sumngo le sik le a ausan, a dupsan, puan dumte le nasepna ah zong siamna a nei mi khat hong puak in." 
2Chronicles2:8 Taamtak, taaksan le cingsing zong, Lebanon panin hong puak in; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasemte in Lebanon sing phuk ding zia a theihna ka thei hi. Tua ahih ciangin kei adingin sing tampi a sem dingin nangma nasemte pen keima nasemte tawh om ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka lam ding biakinn pen lianin lamdang ding hi." 
2Chronicles2:9  
2Chronicles2:10 Sing nasem sing a phukte adingin a kisuvui mangbuh beem tul sawm nih, mangbuhham beem tul sawm nih, leenggahzu tambong tul sawm li le sathau tambong tul sawm li kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles2:11 Tua ciangin Taia kumpipa Hiram in lai-in thuk-in Solomon kiangah khak a, “ Topa in a mite it ahih manin amaute tungah kumpi-in nang hong koih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles2:12 Tua ciangin a lai sungah gen thuah lai a, “ Topa adingin biakinn khat le ama adingin kumpi inn khat a lam ding, thutheihna le thutelna tawh a kidim mipil, David tungah a pia, vanlelei a bawl Israel Topa Pasian in thupha ngah tahen." 
2Chronicles2:13 Tu-in Dan minam numei khatʼ tapa, thutelna tawh a kidim, siamna a nei, siapa Huram kong puak hi. Ama pa pen Taia khuami ahi hi. Amah in kham, ngun, sumngo, sik le sing le a ausan, a dum le a dupsan puante le saihadial puan le zepna nam khempeuh a sem ding le ka topa ahi na pa Davidʼ mi khutsiamte tawh a sem khawm dingin ama tungah a kipia nasep khat peuhpeuh a sem dingin siamna a nei sa ahi hi." 
2Chronicles2:14  
2Chronicles2:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka topa in a gen sa mangbuh le mangbuhham, sathau le leenggahzute, na nasemte tungah hong puak in." 
2Chronicles2:16 Tua ciangin na kisap sing peuhmah Lebanon panin kong phuk ding uh a, nangmah in Jerusalem ah na puak toh theih nadingin phongin tuipi tungah Joppa dong nang kiangah kong paipih ding uh hi,” zong ci lai hi." 
2Chronicles2:17 Tua ciangin a pa David in mi phazah a sim mah bangin, Solomon in Israel gam sunga om gamdang mi phazah simna bawl a, mi tul za khat le tul sawm nga le tul thum le za guk pha hi." 
2Chronicles2:18 Amah in van a pua dingin amaute tul sawm sagih, mual tung gamah suang a to dingin tul sawm giat le miteʼ nasep a van dingin tul thum le za guk a seh hi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem sung Moriah Mual tung, a pa Davidʼ tungah Topa a kilahna mun, David in a sehna sa mun ahi, Jebus mi Ornanʼ ancilna phualah Topaʼ biakinn lam ding kipan hi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Amah in ama uk a kum lina a kha nihna sungin lam ding kipan hi. 
2Chronicles3:3 Pasianʼ biakinn lam nading Solomonʼ geelna hih bang ahi hi: A dung pi sawm kua hi a, a vai pi sawm thum ahi hi." 
2Chronicles3:4 Inn mai-a innliim pen inn vai tawh kikimin pi sawm thum sau a, a sanna zong pi sawm thum mah ahi hi." 
2Chronicles3:5 Amah in taaksan tawh innpi kawm dapin kham hoih tawh zut a, tua tungah nisuh le khainiang a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles3:6 Amah in suangmanpha phutin a inn zem hi. A kham zatte Parvaim kham ahi hi. 
2Chronicles3:7 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn, a innsunte, a sangkilte, a kawmte le a kongkhakte kham tawh zut a, tua ciangin a kawmte tungah kherub-te a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles3:8 Tua ciangin amah in siangtho pen mun bawl hi. A dung pen a vai tawh kizui-in pi sawm thum hi a, a vai zong pi sawm thum mah ahi hi. Amah in kham hoih talen za guk tawh a zut hi." 
2Chronicles3:9 A kilhnate a gihna kham shekel sawm nga ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah in a inn dawl tungnungte kham tawh a zut hi. 
2Chronicles3:10 Amah in siangtho pen mun sungah sing kherub nih bawlin kham tawh tuate zut hi. 
2Chronicles3:11 Tua kherub tegelʼ kha a kizalin pi sawm thum ahi hi. A khatʼ kha pen pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm ban a, tua ciangin a lang khat pi sagih le alang in a kherub dang khatʼ kha ban hi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Tua mah bangin a kherub dang khatʼ kha lang khat zong pi sagih le alang hi-in inn kawm lang khat ban a, pi sagih le alang mah a sau a kha lang khat pen a kherub masaʼ kha tawh kizom hi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Hih kherub-teʼ khate in pi sawm thum huam hi. Kherub-te amauʼ khe-in dingin innpi sung lam nga uh hi. 
2Chronicles3:14 Tua ciangin amah in a dum, a ausan le a dupsan puante le saihadial puan tawh a dalna puan bawl a, tua tungah kherub-te a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Amah in inn mai sanah pi sawm nga le pi nih le alang a sang, a dawn tuakah pi sagih le alang a pha khuam luzepna a nei khuampi nih bawl hi." 
2Chronicles3:16 Amah in ngawng a awhte bangin khainiangte bawlin khuampite dawnah khai hi. Tua ciangin amah in mang kawlsing za khat bawlin khainiangte tungah koih hi. 
2Chronicles3:17 Amah in tua khuamte, khat leitaw lam, a khat leilu lam, biakinn mai ah phut hi. Amah in leitaw lam a om pen Jakhin phuakin, leilu lam a om pen Boaz a phuak hi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Amah in sumngo biakna tau, a dung pi sawm thum, a vai pi sawm thum, a sang pi sawm le nga a pha khat bawl hi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi khat zong bawl hi. Tua pen a bem hi a, a gei khat pan a gei khat dong pi sawm le nga pha-in, pi sagih le alang sang a, a kimkot pi sawm li le nga a pha hi." 
2Chronicles4:3 Tuikuangpi pualam kimkot pi sawm li le pi nga sungah umgah limte om hi. Tua um gahte gual nihin om a, tuikuangpi a kisunin kisung khawm pah hi." 
2Chronicles4:4 Bawngtal sawm le nihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a, thum leilu lam nga a, thum nitumna lam nga-in, thum leitaw lam nga a, thum nisuahna lam nga hi. Tuate tungah a tuikuangpi kinga a, a nung lam uh a sung lamah om hi." 
2Chronicles4:5 A sahna pen khut peek mai cia ahi hi; a geivial pen unok tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl a, tua sungah tui tambong tul guk val ta hi." 
2Chronicles4:6 Amah in kisil nading tuikuang dang sawm zong bawl a, leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi. Amaute in meihal biakna-a a zatte uh hihte sungah silsiang ding uh a, tuikuangpi pen siampiteʼ kisil nading ahi hi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Tua ciangin amah in a kigelh sa bangin kham meivak khuam sawm bawl a, biakinn sung leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi." 
2Chronicles4:8 Amah in sabuai sawm zong bawl a, biakinn sung leitaw lam pangah nga, leilu lam pangah nga koih hi. Tua ciangin amah in kham kuang za khat bawl hi." 
2Chronicles4:9 Amah in siampiteʼ inntual le inntual lian le inntual kongkhakte bawl a, a kongkhakte sumngo tawh a zut hi." 
2Chronicles4:10 Tua ciangin amah in inn khang nisuahna lam kiu ah tuikuangpi koih hi. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huram in beelte, kawbiate le kuangte zong bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin Huram in Kumpi Solomon adingin Pasianʼ biakinn a bawl nasep a zawhte:" 
2Chronicles4:12 Khuampi nihte, kuang-ukte le a khuampite lu dawnah a om khuam luzepna nihte, khuampite lu dawnah a om khuam luzepna, kuang-uk nihte a tuam dingin ngen bangin a kibawl nihte," 
2Chronicles4:13 khuampite tungah a om khuam luzepna kuang-uk nihte a tuam dingin ngen banga kibawl khat adingin mang kawlsing gual nih ahi ngen banga kibawl nihte adingin mang kawlsing za lite," 
2Chronicles4:14 tuikuang a kingaknate le tuate tungah a kikoih tuikuangte," 
2Chronicles4:15 tuikuangpi khat le tua nuai-a a om bawngtal sawm le nihte," 
2Chronicles4:16 Topaʼ biakinn dingin Kumpi Solomon adingin siapa Huram in a kihal sumngo tawh a bawl beelte, kawbiate, sikkeukate le hihte adingin nazat khempeuh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles4:17 Jordan zanglei sung Sukkoth le Zeredah kikal beel lei ah kumpipa in hihte sungsak hi. 
2Chronicles4:18 Solomon in hih nate tampi tak bawlsak a, sumngo a gik zah kithei zo lo hi." 
2Chronicles4:19 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Pasianʼ biakinn sunga na khempeuh a bawl sakte: Kham biakna tau, Ompihna Anlum adingin sabuaite," 
2Chronicles4:20 a kigelh sa bangin biakinn sung nung mai ah vak dingin kham citak meivak khuamte le a meivakte; 
2Chronicles4:21 kham hoih pen tawh a kibawl a paakte, a meivakte le a tehte;" 
2Chronicles4:22 kham citak tawh a kibawl a taitehte, kuangte, paknamtui adingin pakante le vutluahna ahi hi. Siangtho pen mun pai nading kongkhak sung nungte ading le biakinnpi sung kongkhakte adingin biakinn kongkhak bilte zong kham tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Tua bangin Topaʼ biakinn ding a hih nasep khempeuh kizo hi. Tua ciangin a pa David in a ap sa nate Solomon in paipihin, Pasianʼ biakinn sung van manpha koihnate sungah a ngunte, a khamte le umlebeel khempeuh a seng hi." 
2Chronicles5:2 Tua ciangin Zion a kici David khuapi sung panin Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih to dingin Kumpi Solomon in Israel upate, minam lutang khempeuh le Israel beh makaite, Jerusalem ah kaikhawm hi." 
2Chronicles5:3 Tua ciangin a kha sagihna-a pawi hun sungin kumpipaʼ mai ah Israel mi khempeuh kikhawm uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:4 Tua ciangin Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a, Levi mite in Thuciamna Singkuang la uh hi." 
2Chronicles5:5 Tua ciangin amaute in Thuciamna Singkuang le kikhopna buk le puanbuk sunga om a siangtho umlebeel khempeuh pua to uh a, siampite le Levi mite in tuate pua to uh hi." 
2Chronicles5:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Solomon le ama mai ah a kikhawm Israel-te khempeuh Thuciamna Singkuang mai ah om uh a, biakna-in tuu le bawngtal tampi tak pia uh ahih manin a phazah kisim zo lo hi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Tua ahih ciangin siampite in kherub-teʼ kha nuai, siangtho pen mun sung, biakinn sung nung sung ama munah Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a paipih uh hi." 
2Chronicles5:8 Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang tungah a khate uh zak uh ahih manin kherub-te pen Thuciamna Singkuang le a zawlte tungah khuhna khat a suak uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:9 A zawlte sau ahih manin siangtho mun panin biakinn sung nung mai ah a mongte kidawk a, ahih hangin a pualam panin kimu thei lo hi; tu ni dongin tua lai ah tuate om hi." 
2Chronicles5:10 Egypt panin amaute hong paikhiat lai-in Topa in Israel mite tawh thuciamna a bawlna mun Horeb ah Moses in suangpek nihte a koih sim loh Thuciamna Singkuang sungah bangmah dang om lo hi. 
2Chronicles5:11 Siangtho mun panin siampite hong pusuakin (bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ pawlte cih tuam om loin tua lai-a om siampite khempeuh amau mahmah kisiansuah uh hi. 
2Chronicles5:12 Tua ciangin Levi mi lasate Asaf, Heman le Jeduthun, amauʼ tapate le a behte, saihadial puan tawh kizemin, daltuahte, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawi-in peengkul tum siampite za le sawm nih tawh biakna tau nisuahna lamah ding khawm uh hi." 
2Chronicles5:13 Aw kikhatin phatin Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh ding pen peengkul tumte le lasateʼ nasep ahi hi) peengkulte le daltuahte le a dang lasaknate tawh, “ Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh ding hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi,” ci-in Topa phatna-in la a kisak ciangin, Topaʼ biakinn sung meii tawh kidim a," 
2Chronicles5:14 meii hangin siampite in na sem zo lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ minthanna vang taang Pasianʼ biakinn sung a dim hi. 
2Chronicles6:1 Tua ciangin Solomon in, “Khuamial sahpi sungah ten ding a teel Topa aw," 
2Chronicles6:2 a tawntungin na ten nading a lian biakinn khat hih lai ah kong lamsak khin hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles6:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in en kawikawi a, Israel mi a kikhawmte khempeuh a din laitakin amaute khempeuh thupha a pia hi." 
2Chronicles6:4 Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Egypt gam panin ka mite ka paikhiatpih ni a kipanin keima min a om nadingin Israel minam khempeuh sungah biakinn khat lam nading khuapi khat zong ka teel kei a, keima mi Israel tungah kumpi dingin mi khat zong ka teel kei hi. Ahih hangin tu-in ka min a om theih nadingin Jerusalem teelin ka mi Israel-te tungah a uk dingin David ka teel khinta hi,’ ci-in genin, ka pa David tungah a kam tawh a thuciamna a khut tawh a tungsak Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
2Chronicles6:5  
2Chronicles6:6  
2Chronicles6:7 “Tu-in Israel Pasian, Topaʼ min dingin biakinn khat lam ding ka pa Davidʼ lungsim sungah om hi." 
2Chronicles6:8 Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David tungah, ‘Na lungsimah keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding na ngaihsun a, tua na ngaihsutna hoih mahmah hi." 
2Chronicles6:9 Ahi zongin keima min dingin tua biakinn a lam ding pa nangmah hi loin, nangma sung pan hong piang ding na tapa hizaw ding hi,’ ci hi." 
2Chronicles6:10 “Tu-in Topa in a bawl sa thuciamna tungsak khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ thuciam bangin ka pa David munah hong khangin Israel kumpi tokhom ah kong tu a, Israel Pasian, Topaʼ min dingin biakinn ka lam khin hi." 
2Chronicles6:11 Amah in Israel mite tawh a bawl Topaʼ thuciamna a kikoihna Thuciamna Singkuang tu-in tua lai ah ka koih khin hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles6:12 Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuhʼ omna Topaʼ biakna tau mai ah Solomon dingin a khut zan hi. 
2Chronicles6:13 Solomon in a dung pi sagih le alang, a vai pi sagih le alang, a sang pi li le alang a pha sumngo tau khat bawlin inntual ah a koih khin hi. Tua ciangin tua tungah amah ding hi. Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuhʼ muhin amah khukdinin van lamah a khut zan hi." 
2Chronicles6:14 Tua ciangin Solomon in thu ngen a, “Israel Pasian, Topa aw, vantungah ahi a, leitungah ahi zongin thuciamna lenin a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh nangma thu hong mang na nasemte tungah itna kip a lak, nang tawh a kibang Pasian dang om lo hi." 
2Chronicles6:15 Ama tungah na gen sa bangin na nasem ka pa David tungah a tungsak pa na hi hi. Na kam tawh thu na gen a, na khut tawh tu ni-in na tungsak takpi hi." 
2Chronicles6:16 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian, Topa aw, ama tungah thu ciamin, ‘Keima thu na hong man bangin na suan na khakte in ka thukham zui-in a gamtatna uh ah a kidop nak uh leh Israel kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin keima mai ah mi khat beek na kitasam kei ding hi,’ na cih sa bangin na nasem ka pa David tawh na thuciam sa kipsak in." 
2Chronicles6:17 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian, Topa aw, na nasem pa David tungah na gen sa na kammal kipsak in." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Ahih hangin Pasian pen mite tawh leitungah hong teeng takpi ding ahi hiam? En in, vantung le a sang pen vantung in nang hong huam zo lo hi; hih keima lam sa biakinn in hong huam zo lo zaw kan ding!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Ahi zongin na nasem paʼ thungetna le hong thumna don in, Topa ka Pasian aw, na nasem pa na mai ah hong kikona le a hong nget thungetna hong ngai in." 
2Chronicles6:20 Na nasem pa in hih mun lamah hong thungetna na zak theih nadingin nangmah in na min koih nadingin na ciam sa mun hih biakinn lam sun le zanin hong en in. 
2Chronicles6:21 Amaute in hih mun lam nga-in thu hong nget uh ciangin na nasem pa le na mi Israel-teʼ hong thumnate nangmah in ngai in. Na teenna mun vantung panin hong za takpi inla, na zak ciangin hong maisak in." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Mi khat a veengte tungah khialin kiciamna kiciamsak a, hong pai-in hih biakinn sung na biakna tau mai ah a kiciamna hong kiciam leh," 
2Chronicles6:23 vantung panin za-in gamta inla, na nasemte thu khenin, a mawh mi a gamtatna ama lu tung mahah tusakin thuk inla, a thuman mi a thumanna tawh kizui-in thaman piakna tawh langsak in." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Na mi Israel-te nang tungah hong khialhna hangin a galte uh mai ah guallelin, amaute hong kiheikikin na min hong phawkin hih biakinn sung nangma kiangah thu ngenin thumna hong bawl uh ciangin," 
2Chronicles6:25 vantung panin nangmah in za inla, na mi Israel-teʼ khialhna maisakin amaute le a pu a pate uh tungah na piak leitang ah amaute paipihkik in." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Amaute nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zuk loh hun, amaute na gimsak hun ciangin, amaute in hih mun lam nga-in thu ngen a, na min hong phawkin amauʼ khialhna panin a kihei uh leh," 
2Chronicles6:27 amaute a pai nading lampi hoih hilh inla, vantung panin za-in na nasem, na mi Israel-teʼ khialhna maisak in. Tua ciangin na mite tungah gamh-in na piak leitang tungah guah zusak in." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Gam sungah kialpi tungin, pulnatna ahi a, ankung natna ahi a, ankung zawngkhalna ahi a, kauphe ahi a, lung ahi zongin a om a, amauʼ khuapi khat peuhpeuh ah a galte un umcihin, bangbang gimna, bangbang natna hitaleh," 
2Chronicles6:29 mi khatpeuh ahi a, na mi Israel-te khempeuh in ahi zongin amauʼ natna le a dahna ciat uh thei-in hih biakinn lamah a khut uh hong zanin bangbang thungetna hitaleh bangbang thumna hitaleh hong bawl uh leh," 
2Chronicles6:30 na teenna mun vantung panin za inla, maisakin, amauʼ gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang, nang bek in mihingʼ lungsim na thei hi)." 
2Chronicles6:31 Tua hileh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hunsung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtakin nangma thu hong zui ding uh hi. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Tua mah bangin na mi Israel ahi lo gamdang mi khat a lian nangma min hang le nangma thahatna hangin a gamlapi gam panin hong pai-in, hih biakinn lam nga-in thu hong nget leh" 
2Chronicles6:33 na teenna mun vantung panin za inla, gamdang mipa in na tungah hong ngetna khempeuh tawh kizui-in hih in. Tua hileh nangma mi Israel-te mah bangin leitung mi khempeuh in na min thei-in nang hong zahtak ding uh a, keima lam sa hih biakinn pen nangma min tawh a kilo ahihna thei ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles6:34 “A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuan khia-in, bangbang lamah amaute sawl hi talecin, nangmah in na teel sa hih khuapi, nangma tung le nangma min dingin ka lam sa hih biakinn lam nga-in amaute in thu hong nget uh leh," 
2Chronicles6:35 amauʼ hong thungetna le hong thumnate vantung panin za-in amauʼ vai huh in. 
2Chronicles6:36 “Amaute nang tungah hong khialin (a khial lo kua om ahi hiam?) amaute tungah nang heh a, galte tungah amaute pia-in, amaute a gamla gam ahi a, a nai ah ahi zongin galmatin kipua khia a," 
2Chronicles6:37 ahi zongin galmatin a kipuakna gamah amaute in a lungsim sung uh ah tua thu ngaihsunin kisikkik a, ‘Kote khialin lam pialin ka gitloh tat uh hi,’ ci-in amaute galmatin a omna uh gam panin nang tungah hong thum a," 
2Chronicles6:38 amaute galmatin a kitutna, galmatin a omna uh leitang ah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh le a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisikkikin, na teel sa khuapi le nangma min dingin ka lam sa biakinn, nangmah in amauʼ pute pate tungah na piak amauʼ leitang lam nga-in thu hong nget uh leh," 
2Chronicles6:39 na teenna vantung panin amauʼ thungetna le hong thumnate za inla, amauʼ vai huhin nang tungah hong khial na mite maisak in." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Ka Pasian aw, tu-in na mit hak inla, hih lai mun a thungetna na bil hong ngat in." 
2Chronicles6:41 Tu-in ding in, Topa Pasian aw, na tawlngak nading munah na vangliatna lim Thuciamna Singkuang tawh pai in. Topa Pasian aw, na siampite, thupha pia inla, na hoihna ah na mi siangthote lungdam tahen." 
2Chronicles6:42 Topa Pasian aw, na sathau nilh pa nial kei in. Na nasem pa David na itnasa hong phawk in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles7:1 Solomon a thunget a tawp ciangin, vantung panin meikuang hong pai sukin meihal biakna le biakpiaknate kaang tum a, tua ciangin Topaʼ minthanna vang biakinn sung hong dim hi." 
2Chronicles7:2 Topaʼ minthanna vang biakinn dim ahih manin Topaʼ biakinn sungah siampite lut thei lo uh hi. 
2Chronicles7:3 Israel mite khempeuh in meikuang hong pai sukin Topaʼ minthanna vang biakinn tungah a om a muh uh ciangin suangphah tungah lei lam maingatin kun uh a, Pasian bia-in Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko-in, “ Topaʼ tungah lungdam koh ding hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa le mi khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah biakna pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kumpi Solomon in biakna-in bawngtal tul sawm nih le tul nih le tuu tul za khat le tul sawm nih pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa le mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ biakinn a ap uh hi. 
2Chronicles7:6 Siampite amau panmun uh ah ding uh hi. Levi mite zong, Kumpi David in Topa tungah lungdam koh nadingin a bawl Topaʼ tungah lasak nading lasaknate tawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. David in amauʼ nasepna tawh phatnate a bawl ciangin tua bangin hih uh hi. Amaute tawh a kigalsai ah siampite in peengkulte tum uh a, Israel mi khempeuh zong a ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:7 Tua ciangin Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn mai ah a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Solomon in a bawl sumngo biakna tau ah meihal biakna le a thaute ta zo lo ahih manin tua lai munah amah in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna thaute a pia hi. 
2Chronicles7:8 Tua hun laitakin Solomon le amah tawh a om Israel khempeuh mihon tampi in Hamath lutna panin Egypt lui ciang dongah ni sagih sung pawi a kham uh hi. 
2Chronicles7:9 Tua ciangin a ni giat ni-in amaute in a thukhupna khat nei uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in biakinn apna ni sagih sung pawi kham uh a, tua pawi ni sagih sung kibawl hi." 
2Chronicles7:10 A kha sagihna a ni thum ni-in, Topa in David le Solomon le ama mi Israel tungah a hoih a bawlna hangin amah in lungdamna le kipakna tawh a inn uh ah mite a ciahsak hi." 
2Chronicles7:11 Tua bangin Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn zo hi. Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le ama inn sungah hih dinga a geel khempeuh nuam takin zo hi. 
2Chronicles7:12 Tua ciangin zanin Solomon tungah Topa kilangin ama kiangah, “Na thungetna ka za khin a, keima-aʼ dingin biakpiakna inn dingin hih mun ka teel khin hi." 
2Chronicles7:13 Keimah in vantungte khakcipin guah a zuk loh ciang ahi a, gam sung a ne tum dingin kauphe thu ka piak ciang ahi a, ka mite lakah natna ka tunsak ciang ahi zongin," 
2Chronicles7:14 keima minin a kisam ka mite amau mahmah kiniamkhiatin, thu ngenin ka mai hong zong a, amauʼ gitlohnate panin a kihei uh leh, keimah in vantung panin ka za dinga, amauteʼ khialhna maisakin a leitang uh ka hoihsakkik ding hi." 
2Chronicles7:15 Tu-in ka mitte hakin hih lai munah a kingen thungetna ka bilte in ngai ding hi. 
2Chronicles7:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh a tawntungin ka min a om theih nadingin keimah in hih biakinn teelin ka ap khin a, ka mit tawh enin ka lungsim a tawntungin tua lai ah om ding hi." 
2Chronicles7:17 Nang adingin ahihleh, na pa David a gamtat bangin keima mai ah na gamtat a, nang kong sawl khempeuh bangin semin, ka thukhamte le ka biakna ngeina kipte na zuih leh," 
2Chronicles7:18 na pa David tawh kiciamin, ‘Israel a uk dingin mi khat zong na kitasam kei ding hi,’ ka cih bangin na kumpi tokhom ka kipsak ding hi." 
2Chronicles7:19 Ahih hangin note kihei-in, na mai uh ah ka koih sa ka thukhamte le ka thupiaknate nusia a, pai-in pasian dangteʼ na semin tuate na biak uh leh," 
2Chronicles7:20 noteʼ tungah kong piak sa leitang panin note kong bot khia ding hi. Tua ciangin ka min dingin ka ap sa hih biakinn ka muhna panin ka lawn khia dinga, mi khempeuh lakah paunak le gentehna ka suaksak ding hi." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Tua ciangin a minthang sa hih biakinn a nawk kha khempeuh in lamdang sa-in, ‘Bang hangin hih bangin Topa in hih gam le hih biakinn bawl ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles7:22 Tua ciangin amaute in, ‘Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin amaute a paikhiatpih a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa amaute in nusia uh a, pasian dangte pom uh a, tuate bia-in a na sem uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in hih bang siatna khempeuh amaute tungah tungsak hi,’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles8:1 Solomon in Topaʼ biakinn le ama inn a lam khit kum sawm nih a cin ciangin," 
2Chronicles8:2 Kumpi Hiram in ama tungah a piak sa khuapite Solomon in lampha-in tuate sungah Israel mite tengsak hi. 
2Chronicles8:3 Tua ciangin Hamath-zobah ah Solomon pai-in tua gam a la hi. 
2Chronicles8:4 Amah in sehnel gam sungah Tadmor khua satin Hamath gam sungah vankoihna khuapite khempeuh a lam hi. 
2Chronicles8:5 Amah in khuapi kulh, kongpite le zawlte a nei Beth-horon Tungnung le Beth-horon Nuainung," 
2Chronicles8:6 le Baalath le Solomonʼ neih vankoihna khuapite khempeuh, a leengte ading khuapite khempeuh, a sakol tuangte ading khuapite le Solomon in Jerusalem, Lebanon sung le ama ukna gam sung khempeuh ah a lam nop khempeuh zong a lam hi." 
2Chronicles8:7 Israel ahi lo Hit mite, Amor mite, Perez mite, Hiv mite le Jebus mite sung panin a om lai," 
2Chronicles8:8 Israel mite in a suksiat nai loh amau nungah a suanlekhakte uh tua gam sungah a omlaite, Solomon in aana tawh siah a pia dingin bawl a, tua bangin tu ni dongin amaute om uh hi." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ahih hangin Israel mite ahihleh Solomon in ama na a sem dingin salin bawl lo hi. Amaute pen galkapte, ama nuai ah uliante, a leengte a ukte le a sakol tung tuangte ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles8:10 Kumpi Solomonʼ ulian, miteʼ tungah aana a zang mihing za nih le sawm nga a om uh hi." 
2Chronicles8:11 Solomon in David khuapi panin Faroʼ tanu ama zi paipihin ama aʼ dingin a lamsak inn ah tunpih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang a tunna sa munte a siangtho ahih manin Israel kumpi Davidʼ inn sungah ka zi teeng lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles8:12 Tua ciangin Sabbath nite, Khadet nite le kum simin a kinei pawi thum - silngo sawh loh anlum pawi, nipikal pawi le biakbuk pawite adingin Mosesʼ thupiakna tawh kizui-in nisimin piakna nasep ding a kisam ahih mah bangin innliim mai-a a lam Topaʼ biakna tau tungah Solomon in meihal biakna Topa tungah a pia hi." 
2Chronicles8:13  
2Chronicles8:14 A pa Davidʼ biakna ngeina kip tawh kizui-in, nasep nadingin siampite a pawlpawlin a kikhennate le nisim nasepna ah a kisam bangin siampiteʼ mai ah Levi mite phatna la sak panmunte le kongpi tampite-aʼ dingin kongcingte amauʼ pawl kikhenna ciatah amah in seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua bangin Pasianʼ mipa David in thupia hi." 
2Chronicles8:15 Thu khat peuhpeuh le van manpha koihnate tawh kisai-in kumpipa in siampite le Levi mite a thupiakna bang teekteekin amaute in a sem uh hi. 
2Chronicles8:16 Tua bangin Topaʼ biakinnpi a kiphuh ni a kipan a kizawh dongin Solomonʼ nasep khempeuh kimansiang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ biakinn kizo hi. 
2Chronicles8:17 Tua ahih ciangin Edom gam sung tuipi gei-a om Ezion-geber le Eloth khuate ah Solomon pai hi. 
2Chronicles8:18 Tua ciangin Kumpi Hiram in teembawte le tuipi a thei a nasemte tawh ama nasemte sawl a, Solomonʼ nasemte tawh Ofir ah pai khawmin tua lai panin kham talen za li le sawm nga pua-in Kumpi Solomon kiang a tunpih uh hi." 
2Chronicles9:1 Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Solomonʼ minthanna a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh a ze-et dingin Jerusalem ah hong pai a, nungzui honpi le a namtui nate le kham tampi le suang manphate a pua kalaohte hong keng hi. Solomon kiangah amah hong tun ciangin a lungsim a om khempeuh ama tungah gen hi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi. Solomon in ama tungah a gen tel theih loh haksa lua a sak bangmah om lo hi. 
2Chronicles9:3 Sheba kumpinu in Solomonʼ pilna, a lam sa inn," 
2Chronicles9:4 a sabuai ah a an, a ulianteʼ om zia le a nasemteʼ etna zia le a puansilhte, a an piate le a puansilhte le Topaʼ biakinn ah a piak a meihal biaknate a muh khit ciangin a lungsim a bei hi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka gam sung panin nangma thute le na pilna ka zak a kigen thute a man hi." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ahih hangin kei hong pai-in ka mit in a muh matengin a kigen thute ka um kei hi. A taktakin, na pilna alang zong kei kiangah hong kigen lo ahi hi. Ka zak sa thute sangin na thupi zaw hi." 
2Chronicles9:7 Na zite hampha mahmah hi. Na mai ah ding tawntungin na pilna a za hih na nasemte hampha mahmah hi. 
2Chronicles9:8 Na tungah lungkimin Topa na Pasian adingin kumpi-in a kumpi tokhom tungah nang hong tusak Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah tahen! Na Pasian in Israel mite itin a tawntungin amaute kipsak ding ahih manin, nangmah in thutang le thuman na sepkhiat theih nadingin amaute tungah kumpi-in nang hong koih hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles9:9 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za khat le sawm nih le a namtui nate tampi tak le suang manphate a pia hi. Sheba kumpinu in Kumpi Solomon tungah a piak tua banga a namtui nate zahin a hoih omngei lo hi. 
2Chronicles9:10 Tua tham loin Ofir panin kham hong pua Kumpi Hiramʼ nasemte le Solomonʼ nasemte in cingsing le suang manphate hong pua uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpi inn-a cingsing kahlei ding le lasate-aʼ dingin laiza lasaknate le harp lasaknate-in zong a bawl hi. Tua hun ma-in Judah gam sungah tua bang kimu ngei lo hi. 
2Chronicles9:12 Tua ciangin kumpinu in amah a puakte a thuhna-in letsong a piakte banah, a deih khempeuh, a nget khempeuh, Sheba kumpinu tungah Solomon in a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in a nasemte tawh ama gamah a ciahkik hi." 
2Chronicles9:13 Tu-in kum khat sungin Solomon tungah a tung kham a gihna talen za guk le sawm guk le guk hi a," 
2Chronicles9:14 sum bawlte le sumbukteʼ tutte a kisim lo ahi hi. Arabia kumpite khempeuh le gam sung a ukte in Solomon kiangah kham le ngun puak uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:15 Kumpi Solomon in kham a kiseek lumpi za nih bawl hi; lum khat ciangin a kiseek kham shekel za guk bei hi. 
2Chronicles9:16 Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham lum za thum bawl hi; lum khat ciangin kham shekel za thum bei hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Lebanon Tulak Inn sungah tuate koih hi. 
2Chronicles9:17 Kumpipa in saiha kibawl kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a, kham citak tawh zut hi." 
2Chronicles9:18 Kumpi tokhom in cial guk le kham a kibawl khengakna khat nei-in, tuate kumpi tokhom tawh kimat a, a tutna pang tuakah ban ngaknate le a ban ngaknate pangah humpinelkai nih dinga," 
2Chronicles9:19 kahlei cial guk mong ciatah khat ciat, humpinelkai sawm le nih ding hi. Kumpi gam khat peuhpeuh ah tua tawh a kibang kibawl ngei lo hi." 
2Chronicles9:20 Kumpi Solomonʼ dawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a, Lebanon Tulak Inn sunga umlebeelte khempeuh zong kham citak ahi hi. Solomonʼ hun lai-in ngun bangmahin kingaihsun lo hi." 
2Chronicles9:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Hiramʼ nasemte tawh kumpipaʼ teembawte, Tarshish ah pai hi. Tarshish teembawte kum thum simin khatvei hong tungin kham, ngun, saiha, zawngmaw le utong hong puak zel hi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Tua bangin kumpi Solomon in hauhna le pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi. 
2Chronicles9:23 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sungah a koihsak pilna a za dingin leitung kumpi khempeuh in Solomonʼ omna hong zong uh hi. 
2Chronicles9:24 Amaute khempeuh in a letsong ciat uh, ngun le kham tawh a kibawl nate, puante, myrrh paknamtuite, a namtui nate, sakolte le la-sakolte, a kumkumin tampi tak hong puak uh hi." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomon in sakolte le leengte adingin buk tul li le sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm le tul nih nei a, leeng khuapite sungah pawl khat koih a, Jerusalem khua ama kiangah pawl khat koih hi." 
2Chronicles9:26 Amah in Eufratis panin Filistia gam ciang le Egypt gamgi ciang dong kumpi khempeuh a uk hi. 
2Chronicles9:27 Kumpipa in Jerusalem ah suang bangin ngun olsak a, Shefelah theithek sing bangin taamtak sing tamsak hi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Solomon adingin Egypt le gam khempeuh panin sakolte kila hi. 
2Chronicles9:29 Tu-in Solomonʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a kipatna pan a tawp dong, Kamsang Nathanʼ Tangthu sung le Shiloh khuami Ahijahʼ Thugen Kholhna sung le Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam thu tawh kisai-in Thumu pa Iddoʼ Maangmuhna sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomon in Jerusalem panin Israel khempeuh tungah kum sawm li sung uk hi. 
2Chronicles9:31 Tua ciangin Solomon si a, a pa David khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Rehoboam in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles10:1 Amah kumpi a suaksak dingin Israel khempeuh Shekhem ah pai ahih manin Shekhem ah Rehoboam pai hi. 
2Chronicles10:2 Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zak ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Solomon kiang panin a taina Egypt ah amah om lai hi), Egypt panin Jeroboam hong ciahkik hi." 
2Chronicles10:3 Amaute in mi sawlin amah samkik uh a, tua ciangin Jeroboam le Israel khempeuh hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Na pa in hong gimbawlin van gik hong suan hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na paʼ nasep haksa le koteʼ van gik hong zangsak inla, kote in nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:5 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ni thum sung a hun hong pia unla, tua ciangin hong paikik un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles10:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in a pa Solomon a nuntak lai-a a mai ah a ding khangham mite thu kup pih a, “Hih mite ka dawn nading ngaihsutna hong bangci piak na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles10:7 Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Hih mite tungah nang dik inla, amaute lungkimsakin amaute tungah kam hoih pau lecin, amaute nangma nasem hi tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:8 Ahih hangin khanghamte in a piak ngaihsutna nusia-in, amah tawh a khangkhawm, ama mai ah a ding khangnote thu a kup pih hi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Amah in amaute kiangah, “Kei kiangah, ‘Na pa in kote tungah hong suat van gik zangsak in,’ a hong ci hih mite i dawn nading bang ngaihsutna hong pia na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles10:10 Tua ciangin amah tawh a khangkhawm khangnote in ama kiangah, “Nangma kiangah, ‘Na pa in van gik hong suan hi; ahih hangin kote adingin hong zangsak in,’ hong ci hih mite kiangah hih bangin gen in, ‘Ka khut meno pen ka paʼ kawng sangin lian zaw hi." 
2Chronicles10:11 Tu-in ka pa in note tungah van gik hong suatna ah keimah in na van gik uh ka behlap ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi; ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:12 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Kei kiangah ni thum ni-in hong paikik un,” a cih mah bangin Jeroboam le mi khempeuh a ni thum ni-in Rehoboam kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in amaute ngawh dawnin, khangham miteʼ ngaihsutna nusia a," 
2Chronicles10:14 “Ka pa in note van gik hong suan hi; ahih hangin keimah in kong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi; ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,” ci-in khangnoteʼ ngaihsut piakna bangin Kumpi Rehoboam in amaute kiangah a gen hi." 
2Chronicles10:15 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in hih miteʼ thu ngai lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Shiloh mi Ahijahʼ tungtawnin Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam tungah a thugente Topa in a tunsak theih nadingin Pasian in a piansak thu kiheina ahi hi. 
2Chronicles10:16 Kumpipa in amauteʼ thu a ngaih lohna Israel mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin mite in kumpipa dawngin, “Davidʼ sungah kote in bang ngah nei ka hi uh hiam? Jessiʼ tapaʼ sungah gamhluah ka nei kei uh hi. Israel-te aw, na inn ciat uh ah ciah un. Rehoboam in ama ading vaihawm tawm tahen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh a inn ciat uh ah kihem uh hi." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ahih hangin Judah khuapite ah a teeng Israel mite tungah Rehoboam in a uk hi. 
2Chronicles10:18 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in aana tawh na a kisemsakte a uk nasep ukpa Hadoram Israel-te kiangah sawl a, Israel mite in suang tawh amah na deng lum uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a tai dingin Kumpi Rehoboam a leeng tungah a tuang dingin nawh tat hi." 
2Chronicles10:19 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin leilu lam a om Israel-te in David innkuan lehdo uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Jerusalem ah Rehoboam hong tun ciangin a kumpi gam a ngahkik nadingin Israel-te a sim dingin amah in Judah minam le Benjamin minam a kiteng khia galhang mihing tul za khat le tul sawm giat kaikhawm hi. 
2Chronicles11:2 Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mi Shemaiahʼ tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi: 
2Chronicles11:3 “Judah kumpi Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboam le Judah le Benjamin sunga om Israel mi khempeuh tungah gen in," 
2Chronicles11:4 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note na kuan to kei ding uh a, na mipihte uh na sim kei ding uh hi. Mi khempeuh na inn uh ah ciahkik un; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu pen keima kiang pan hong pai ahi hi,” ci-in gen in,’” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Topaʼ thu ngai-in ciahkik uh a, Jeroboam a sim dingin kuan lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:5 Jerusalem ah Rehoboam teeng a, kihut nadingin Judah gam sungah khuapite a lam hi." 
2Chronicles11:6 Amah in Bethlehem, Etam, Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bethzur, Soko, Adullam," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gath, Mareshah, Zif," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adoram, Lakhish, Azekah," 
2Chronicles11:10 Zorah, Aijalon le Hebron, Judah le Benjamin gam sunga om kulh a nei khuapite a lam hi." 
2Chronicles11:11 Amah in mun muanhuaite a muanhuai-in bawl pha-in tuate sungah a ukte le an, sathau le leenggahzu a koih hi." 
2Chronicles11:12 Tua ciangin amah in khuapi khempeuh ah lum le tei koih a, a muanhuai mahmah in a bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam le Benjamin gam ama aʼ a suak hi." 
2Chronicles11:13 Tua ciangin Israel sungah a om siampite le Levi mite khempeuh in amauʼ teenna mun khempeuh panin amah hong beel uh hi. 
2Chronicles11:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jeroboam le a tapate in Topaʼ siampi a sepna panun amaute hawl khia-in, mual dawna biakpiakna munte, dawi gilote le ama bawl sa bawng no milimte adingin ama siampi tuam teel ahih manin Levi mite in amauʼ taanggam le amauʼ neihsate nusia-in Judah le Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:15  
2Chronicles11:16 Tua ciangin Israel Topa Pasian zon ding a lungsim uh ah a khensat khin mite in amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian, Topa tungah biakna a pia dingin Israel minam khempeuh sung panin amauʼ nung zui-in Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:17 Amaute in Judah kumpi gam tha khauhsak uh a, amaute in Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboam lungmuangin kum thum sung koih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh David le Solomonʼ thu a zuih bangun kum thum sung ama thu a mang uh hi." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehoboam in Mahalath teenpih hi. Mahalathʼ pa pen Davidʼ tapa Jerimoth hi a, a nu pen Jessiʼ tapa Eliabʼ tanu Abihail ahi hi." 
2Chronicles11:19 Tua nu in amah tawh tapate Jeush, Shemariah le Zaham nei hi." 
2Chronicles11:20 Tua nuʼ khit ciangin amah in Absalomʼ tanu Maakah la a, amah tawh Abijah, Attai, Ziza le Shelomith nei hi." 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehoboam in a zi dangte le a zineute khempeuh sangin Absalomʼ tanu Maakah it zaw hi (amah in zi sawm le giat le zineu sawm guk la a, tapa sawm nih le giat le tanu sawm guk nei hi)." 
2Chronicles11:22 Tua ciangin Rehoboam in Maakahʼ tapa Abijah, a sanggamte lakah a ulian penin a seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi-in amah koih sawm hi." 
2Chronicles11:23 Amah pil gamtat a, Judah le Benjamin gam sung, kulh nei khuapite khempeuh ah a tapa pawl khat a khen hi. Amah in amaute tungah na tampi pia a, amaute adingin zi zong a zonsak hi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Rehoboamʼ ukna kipin a thahat ciangin, amah a kipan amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topaʼ thukham nusia uh hi." 
2Chronicles12:2 Topa tungah amaute citak lo uh ahih manin Rehoboamʼ kum ngana kumin Jerusalem a sim dingin Egypt kumpipa Shishak, leeng galkap tul le za nih le sakol tung tuang galkap tul sawm guk tawh hong kuan to hi. Egypt panin amah tawh a hong kuan mite pen Libya mi, Sukkiim mi le Ethiopia mite hi a, a tamna sim zawh hi lo hi." 
2Chronicles12:3  
2Chronicles12:4 Amah in kulh nei khuapite la-in Jerusalem ciang dong hong tung hi. 
2Chronicles12:5 Tua ciangin Shishakʼ huhau-in Jerusalem ah a kikhawm Rehoboam le Judah uliante kiangah kamsang Shemaiah hong pai-in amaute kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note in kei nong nusia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Shishakʼ khut sungah note kong pia khin hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles12:6 Tua ciangin Judah uliante le kumpipa kiniamkhiatin, “ Topa thuman hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles12:7 Amaute a kiniamkhiatna thu Topa in a muh ciangin Shemaiahʼ tungah Topaʼ thu hong tung hi: “Amaute kiniamkhiat ahih manin ka susia kei ding hi. Amaute ka suaktasak liailiai tei dinga, Shishakʼ khut tawh Jerusalem tungah ka hehna a cingin ka tungsak kei ding hi." 
2Chronicles12:8 Ahi zongin amaute in keima nasepna le leitung kumpiteʼ nasepna a kilamdanna a theih nadingun amaute pen Shishakʼ nasemte suak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles12:9 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem a simin Egypt kumpipa Shishak hong kuan to hi. Amah in Topaʼ biakinn-a van manphate le kumpipaʼ inn-a van manphate a kipan na khempeuh a la khia hi. Amah in Solomonʼ bawl sa kham lumte zong la khia hi. 
2Chronicles12:10 Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in tuateʼ tangin sumngo lum bawl a, kumpipaʼ kongcing ahi inncing a ukteʼ khut sungah tuate a ap hi." 
2Chronicles12:11 Topaʼ biakinn ah kumpipa a pai simin a cingte hong pai-in tuate keng uh a, tua ciangin cinna inn dei sungah tuate koihkik uh hi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Amah a kiniamkhiat ciangin siat cimitna a pian loh nadingin ama tung pan Topaʼ hehna kihei khia hi. Tua tham loin Judah gam sungah thu paizia zong hong hoihsak hi. 
2Chronicles12:13 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam a mahmah Jerusalem ah kikipsakin a uk hi. Rehoboam in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le khat pha a, Israel minam khempeuh sung panin a min koih nadingin Topa in a teelkhiat khuapi Jerusalem ah amah in kum sawm le kum sagih sung a uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Naamah hi a, Ammon mi ahi hi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Amah in Topa zon ding a lungsimah koih lo ahih manin a sia a gamta hi. 
2Chronicles12:15 Tu-in Rehoboamʼ gamtatnate, a kipatna pan a tawpna dong, Kamsang Shemaiah le Thumu pa Iddoʼ Khang Tangthu sungah kigelh hi. Rehoboam le Jeroboam kikalah gal kidona om tawntung hi." 
2Chronicles12:16 Tua ciangin Rehoboam si a, Davidʼ khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Abijah in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles13:1 Israel Kumpi Jeroboamʼ uk kum sawm le kum giatna kumin Abijah in Judah tungah uk ding kipan hi. 
2Chronicles13:2 Amah in Jerusalem ah kum thum sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Mikaiah hi a, Gibeah khuami Urielʼ tanu ahi hi. Tu-in Abijah le Jeroboam kikalah gal kidona om hi." 
2Chronicles13:3 Galsim dingin Abijah kuan khia a, a kiteng khia mi tul za li a pha, a thahat galhang galkap hon a nei hi. Tua ciangin Jeroboam in Abijah a do dingin a kiteng khia galhang tul za giat tawh a pang hi." 
2Chronicles13:4 Tua ciangin Efraim mual tung gamah a om Zemaraim Mual tungah Abijah ding to-in, “Jeroboam le Israel mi khempeuh aw, ka thu ngai un!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Israel Topa Pasian in David le a suante tungah Israel kumpi hih ding thuciamna kip tawh a piakna na theih ding uh kilawm hi lo ahi hiam? 
2Chronicles13:6 Ahi zongin Davidʼ tapa Solomonʼ nasem pa, Nebatʼ tapa Jeroboam kipanin a topa lehdo hi." 
2Chronicles13:7 Rehoboam khangno lai a, thu khensat thei nai loin, amaute a nial zawh nai loh hun laitakin mi ginalo hon khat Solomonʼ tapa Rehoboamʼ kiimah kikhawmin amah dem uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:8 Note mi tampi na hihna uh le noteʼ pasian dingin Jeroboam in hong bawlsak kham bawngnote note tawh a om manin, Davidʼ suanteʼ khut sungah a om Topaʼ kumpi gam do ding tu-in na ngaihsun uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:9 Note in Aaronʼ suan, Topaʼ siampite le Levi mite hawl khia-in, gamdang mite bangin note adingin siampite bawl khin hi lo na hi uh hiam? Bawngtalno khat tawh ahi a, tuutal sagih tawh ahi zongin a ki-ap dingin a hong pai peuhpeuh, pasian ahi loteʼ siampi suak pahpah hi." 
2Chronicles13:10 “Ahih hangin kote ahihleh, Topa pen ka Pasian uh hi a, amah ka nusia kei uh hi. Topaʼ na a sem, Aaronʼ suan ahi siampite le amauʼ nasepna ah a huh dingin Levi mite ka nei uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:11 Amaute in Topa tungah zing le nitak simin meihal biaknate le a namtui nate ahi paknamtuite pia uh a, kham citak sabuai tungah Ompihna Anlum koihin, a meivakte a kuan nadingin nitak simin kham meivak khuamte a don uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kote in Topa Pasianʼ hong sawlnate ka zui uh a, ahih hangin note in amah na nusia uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:12 En un, koteʼ lutangin kote tawh Pasian hong om khawm a, note a do ding sapna peengkul a tum dingin a siampite a galkap peengkulte uh tawh hong om uh hi. Israel mite aw, na pu na pate uh Pasian, Topa do kei un; bang hang hiam na cih uh leh na tangtung kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles13:13 A nung lam panin amaute a hih dingin a pangsim ding pawl khat Jeroboam in kual paisak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Judah miteʼ mai ah ama galkapte om a, a pangsimte amauʼ nungah om hi." 
2Chronicles13:14 Judah mite a khuadak uh ciangin, amauʼ mai le a nung uh ah gal a om lam mu uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah amaute kiko uh a, siampite in a peengkulte uh a tum uh hi." 
2Chronicles13:15 Tua ciangin Judah mite in galdona aw kiko uh hi. Judah mite a kiko uh ciangin Abijah le Judah miteʼ mai ah Pasian in Jeroboam le Israel khempeuh zo hi. 
2Chronicles13:16 Judah miteʼ mai ah Israel-te tai uh a, Pasian in amauʼ khut sungah Israel-te a pia hi." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abijah le a mite in Israel-te tampi tak that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi a kiteng khia mihing tul za nga a kithatin tuk hi. 
2Chronicles13:18 Judah mite in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa suang uh ahih manin gualzo uh a, tua hunin Israel mite kizo hi." 
2Chronicles13:19 Tua ciangin Abijah in Jeroboam delh a, ama tung panin khuapite, Bethel a khuaneute tawh, Jeshanah a khuaneute tawh le Efron a khuaneute tawh a la hi." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jeroboam in Abijahʼ hun sungin ama vangliatna ngahkik lo hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Jeroboam vat a, amah a si hi." 
2Chronicles13:21 Ahih hangin Abijah a thahatna a khang hi. Amah in zi sawm le li la a, tapa sawm nih le nih le tanu sawm le guk a nei hi." 
2Chronicles13:22 Abijahʼ gamtatna a omlaite, ama ziate le a thugente, Kamsang Iddoʼ Tangthu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles14:1 Tua ciangin Abijah si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Asa in uk hi. Asa hun sungin tua gamah kum sawm sung gal dai hi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Tua ciangin Asa in ama Pasian, Topaʼ mitah a hoih le a man na sem hi." 
2Chronicles14:3 Amah in gamdang biakna taute le mual dawna biakpiakna munte la khia-in, biakna songte supai-in Asherah milimte phuk a," 
2Chronicles14:4 amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian, Topa zongin thukham le thupiaknate a zuih nadingun Judah mite thu a pia hi." 
2Chronicles14:5 Amah in Judah khuapi khempeuh panin mual dawna biakpiakna munte le paknamtui biakna taute zong la khia hi. Tua ciangin ama khutnuai ah kumpi gam sung gal dai hi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Tua gamah gal dai ahih manin Judah gam sungah kulh a nei khuapite a lam hi. Topa in ama tungah galdaihna hun pia ahih manin tua hun sungin amah in galdona nei lo hi. 
2Chronicles14:7 Tua ciangin amah in Judah mite kiangah, “Hih khuapite lamin kulhpite le tausangte, kulh kongpite le zawlte tawh um ni. Eite in Topa i Pasian zong ihih manin leitang pen eima aʼ hi lai hi. Eite in amah i zong a, amah in i kiim khempeuh panin galdaihna hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khuapite lamin kulh tawh um uh a, maavang uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa in Judah mite sung panin lumneu le teipi a tawi galkap tul za thum le Benjamin mite lum pua-in thal a keek tul za nih le tul sawm giat nei hi. Hih mite khempeuh pen a thahat a galhang mite vive ahi uh hi. 
2Chronicles14:9 Amaute a sim dingin Ethiopia mi Zerah, galkap awn khat le leeng galkap za thum tawh hong kuan khia a, Mareshah ciang dong hong tung hi." 
2Chronicles14:10 Tua ciangin amah a dawntuah dingin Asa kuan khia a, Zefathah le Mareshah kuamah galdo nading panna a bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:11 Tua ciangin Topa Pasianʼ tungah Asa kiko a, “ Topa aw, a thahat le a zawngkhal a kidona ah a huh dingin nang tawh a kibang kuamah dang om lo hi. Kote hong huh in, Topa koteʼ Pasian aw; bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong suang uh a, nangma minin hih mihonpi a do dingin kong pai uh hi. Topa aw, nang, koteʼ Pasian na hi hi; mite kizosak kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles14:12 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Asa le Judah miteʼ mai ah Ethiopia mite zo a, Ethiopia mite tai uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa le amah tawh a om mite in Gerar ciang dong amaute delh uh a, a hing kuamah a om nawn loh dongin Ethiopia mite puk uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa le ama galkapteʼ mai ah amaute kisusia hi. Judah mite in van kinusia tampi tak pua uh hi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Topa a kikihtakna amaute tungah om ahih manin amaute in Gerar kiim a khuapi khempeuh vat uh hi. Amaute in khuapite luh uh a, tuate sungah van kinusiate tam mahmah hi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Tua ciangin amaute in gan omna puanbukte vat uh a, tuu tampi le kalaohte paikhiatpih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:1 Odedʼ tapa Azariahʼ tungah Pasianʼ kha hong tung hi. 
2Chronicles15:2 Tua ciangin Asa a dawntuah dingin amah pai-in ama kiangah, “Asa, le Judah mite le Benjamin mite aw, ka thu ngai un. Note amah tawh na om lai teng uh note tawh Topa hong om hi. Amah na zon uh leh amah na mu ding uh a, ahih hangin amah na nusiat uh leh amah in note hong nusia ding hi." 
2Chronicles15:3 Hun saupi sung Israel mite, Pasian man tawh om lo, thu a hilh siampi tawh om lo, thukham tawh om lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:4 Ahih hangin a lungkham uh ciangin Israel Pasian, Topaʼ lamah kihei uh a, amah zongin amaute in amah a mu uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:5 Tua hun lai-in nasemin mite a zin suk a zin tohna uh ah lungmuanna om lo a, gam khempeuh ah buaina om hi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Pasian in lungkhamna nam khempeuh tawh buaisak ahih manin minam khat le minam khat, khuapi khat le khuapi khat kido-in amaute kitam kham uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ahih hangin nang, hang in! Na nasepna thaman hong kipia ding ahih manin na khut zawsak kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa in Odedʼ tapa Azariahʼ thugen kholh, hih thute a zak ciangin amah a lungsim hong hangin, Judah gam khempeuh le Benjamin le Efraim mual tung gam panin a lak sa khuapite panin a kihhuai milimte la khia a, Topaʼ biakinn mai-a om Topaʼ biakna tau a puah hi." 
2Chronicles15:9 Tua ciangin amah in Judah le Benjamin mi khempeuh le Efraim, Manasseh le Simeon sung panin amaute kiangah a peemte zong a khawm hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a Pasian in amah a ompihna thu amaute in a muh uh ciangin Israel-te kiang panin mi tampi tak ama kiangah tai uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:10 Asaʼ uk kum sawm le kum ngana a kha thumna sungin Jerusalem ah amaute kikhawm uh hi. 
2Chronicles15:11 Tua ni-in amaute in gal sung panin a ciahpih uh nate sung panin bawngtal za sagih le tuu tul sagih tawh Topaʼ tungah biakna a pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles15:12 Tua ciangin a lungsim khempeuh uh le a nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh a pu a pate uhʼ Pasian, Topa a zon ding uh," 
2Chronicles15:13 le Israel Pasian, Topa a zong lo peuhmah, a moi ahi a, a ham ahi a, numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin a kithah nading uh thuciamna khat a bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Amaute in awging pha, otna, peengkulte le sakite tawh Topaʼ tungah kiciamna a bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles15:15 Tua ciangin Judah mi khempeuh tua kiciamna ah lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh kiciamin deihna taktak tawh amah zong uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah mu uh a, Topa in a kiim uh ah amaute galdaihna a pia hi." 
2Chronicles15:16 Ama nu Maakah in Asherah milim dingin a kihhuai milim khat a bawlna hangin kumpipaʼ nu hihna za panin kumpi Asa in a nu a la khia hi. Asa in a nuʼ milim phuksakin satnen a, Kidron lui ah a hal hi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Ahih hangin Israel gam sung panin mual dawna biakpiaknate kila khia lo hi. Ahi zongin ama hunsung tawntung Asaʼ lungsim paubaang lo hi. 
2Chronicles15:18 Tua ciangin amah in a paʼ ap sa letsongte le ama ap sa letsongte, ngun le kham le nazatte, Topaʼ biakinn ah paipih hi." 
2Chronicles15:19 Asaʼ uk kum sawm thum le nga ciang dong gal kidona om nawn lo hi. 
2Chronicles16:1 Asaʼ uk a kum sawm thum le gukna kumin Judah a simin Israel kumpipa Baasha pai to a, Judah kumpipa Asa kiang panin kuamah a paikhiat theih loh nading le ama kiangah kuamah a pai theih loh nadingin Ramah khua a phut hi." 
2Chronicles16:2 Tua ahih ciangin Asa in Topaʼ biakinn le kumpipaʼ inn-a van manpha koihnate panin ngun le kham la-in, Damaskas ah a teeng Syria kumpipa Benhadad kiangah tuate puakin," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Ka pa le na pa a kipawl mah bangin kei le nang i kipawl hi. Tu-in ngun le kham kong puak hi. Kei kiang panin amah a nungkik theih nadingin pai inla Israel kumpipa Baasha tawh na kipawlna va su tat in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles16:4 Tua ciangin Benhadad in Kumpi Asaʼ thu ngai-in Israel khuapite a sim dingin a galkap ukte sawl a, amaute in Ijon, Dan, Abelmaim le Naftali vankoihna khuapite a zo uh hi." 
2Chronicles16:5 Baasha in tua thu a zak ciangin Ramah khua a lam khawl a, a nasep a tawpsak hi." 
2Chronicles16:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Asa in Judah mi khempeuh khawmin thu pia a, Baasha in lamna-a a zat Ramah suang le a singte amaute in pua khia uh a, tuate tawh Geba le Mizpah a lam uh hi." 
2Chronicles16:7 Tua hun laitakin Judah kumpi Asa kiangah thumu pa Hanani hong pai-in ama kiangah, “Nangmah in Syria kumpipa suangin, Topa na Pasian suang lo na hih manin, Syria kumpipaʼ galkapte in nang hong suaktasak hi." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ethiopia mite le Libya mite pen leeng tampi tak le sakol tung tuang tampi tak tawh a om galkap tampi hi lo ahi hiam? Ahi zongin Topa suang na hih manin amah in na khut sungah amaute hong pia hi. 
2Chronicles16:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama lamah a lungsim a paubaang lo miteʼ tangin ama vangliatna a lak dingin Topaʼ mit in leitung khempeuh en kawikawi hi. Hih thu ah na hai gamtat khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tu a kipan gal na do ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles16:10 Tua ciangin thumu pa tungah Asa heh a, amah kol bulhin thong sungah a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thu hangin ama tungah nakpi takin heh hi. Tua hun mahin Asa in mi pawl khat zong gitlohna tawh a gimsak hi." 
2Chronicles16:11 Asaʼ gamtatnate, a patna pan a tawpna dong, Judah le Israel Kumpiteʼ Tangthu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles16:12 Ama uk a kum sawm thum le kuana kumin Asa in a khe ah natna nei a, a natna nasia mahmah hi. Ahi zongin ama nat hun nangawn ah amah in Topa zong lo a, zato siamteʼ huhna a zong hi." 
2Chronicles16:13 Tua ahih ciangin Asa si a, ama uk a kum sawm li le khatna kumin a bei ahi hi." 
2Chronicles16:14 David khuapi sungah a mahmah in a khuat han sungah amaute in a vui uh hi. Paknamtui bawl siamte in a bawl a namtui a nam tuamtuamte tawh a kidim hankuang sungah amah a sial uh hi. Tua ciangin amah zahtakna-in amaute in meiphual lian mahmah khat a cih uh hi. 
2Chronicles17:1 Tua ciangin a tapa Jehoshafat in ama tangin uk a, Israel langpangin a mahmah kithakhauhsak hi." 
2Chronicles17:2 Amah in Judah khuapi kulhneite khempeuh ah galkapte koih a, Judah gam sung le a pa Asa in a lak sa Efraim khuapite sungah khuacingte a koih hi." 
2Chronicles17:3 Amah in a paʼ gamtat masate zui ahih manin Jehoshafat tawh Topa om hi. Amah in Baal-te bia lo hi. 
2Chronicles17:4 Israel-teʼ gamtat bang hi loin ama paʼ Pasian zongin ama thupiakna a zui hi. 
2Chronicles17:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in ama khut sungah kumpi gam kipsak a, Judah mi khempeuh in Jehoshafat tungah siah puak uh hi. Amah hau mahmah a, minthang mahmah hi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Topaʼ na a sepna ah hang mahmah a, Judah gam sung panin mual dawna biakpiaknate le Asherah milimte a la khia hi." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama uliante Benhail, Obadiah, Zekhariah, Nethanel le Mikaiah, Judah khuapite ah thuhilh dingin a sawl hi." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama uliante Benhail, Obadiah, Zekhariah, Nethanel le Mikaiah, Judah khuapite ah thuhilh dingin a sawl hi." 
2Chronicles17:8 Amaute tawh Levi mi Shemaiah, Nethaniah, Zebadiah, Asahel, Shemiramoth, Jehonathan, Adonijah, Tobijah le Tob-adonijah a paikhawmsak hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite tawh siampi Elishama le Jehoram zong a paisak hi." 
2Chronicles17:9 Amaute in Topaʼ thukham laibu kengin Judah gam sungah hilh uh hi. Judah khuapi khempeuh ah amaute pai kawikawi-in mite lakah a hilh uh hi. 
2Chronicles17:10 Tua ciangin Judah gam kimkot ah a om kumpi gam khempeuh tungah Topa kihtakna om a, amaute in Jehoshafat do ngam nawn lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles17:11 Filistia mite pawl khat in Jehoshafat tungah letsongte le siah dingin ngun a puak uh hi. Tua ciangin Arab-te in zong ama tungah tuutal tul sagih le za sagih le keeltal tul sagih le za sagih mah a puak uh hi. 
2Chronicles17:12 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat hong lian zaw semsem hi. Amah in Judah gam sungah mun muanhuaite le vankoihna khuapite lam a," 
2Chronicles17:13 amah in Judah khuapite sungah van tampi a nei hi. Amah in a thahat a hang galkapte Jerusalem ah a nei hi. 
2Chronicles17:14 A beh ciat uh tawh kizui-in amaute a phazah hih bang ahi hi. Judah sung pan a tulin a ukte: Adnah a ukpa hi a, a thahat a galhang mi tul za thum tawh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:15 Ama zomah a ukpa Jehohanan hi a, mi tul za nih le tul sawm giat tawh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:16 Ama zomah Topaʼ nasep nadingin a kipia Zikriʼ tapa Amasiah hi a, a thahat a galhang mi tul za nih tawh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:17 Benjamin sung panin: A thahat a galhang Eliada hi a, thal le lum a tawi mi tul za nih tawh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:18 Tua ciangin ama zomah Jehozabad hi a, galdo dingin hiam a tawi mi tul za khat le tul sawm giat tawh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles17:19 Hihte pen kumpipa in Judah gam sung khempeuh ah kulh a nei khuapite ah a koihte banah kumpipaʼ na a semte ahi hi. 
2Chronicles18:1 Jehoshafat hau-in hong minthan ciangin Ahab tawh numei-a kizopna a bawl hi. 
2Chronicles18:2 Kum tawm khat khit ciangin Samaria-a Ahab kiangah amah pai suk hi. Tua ciangin Ahab in amah le amah tawh a hong pai mite adingin tuu tampi le bawngtal tampi go a, Ramoth-gilead a sim dingin amah a zol hi."
