2Chronicles18:3 Israel kumpipa Ahab in Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat kiangah, “Ramoth-gilead ah kei tawh nong kuan ding hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Kei pen nangmah bang ka hi a, ka mite zong nangma mite mah bang ahi hi. Kote pen galsimna ah nang tawh kong kuan ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:4 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa thu dong masa ni,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:5 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in kamsangte mihing za li khawmin amaute kiangah, “Ramoth-gilead a sim dingin kuan to ding ka hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh thuak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kuan to in; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kumpipaʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:6 Ahih hangin Jehoshafat in, “Eite in i dot theih ding Topaʼ kamsang a dang hih lai ah om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:7 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Eite in Topa thu i dot theih nading Imlahʼ tapa Mikaiah a kici mi khat om lai hi. Ahih hangin amah in kei tawh kisai a hoih thu gen ngei loin a sia bekbek gen tawntung ahih manin amah ka mudah hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Tua bangin kumpipa in ci kei in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:8 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in ulian khat samin, “Imlahʼ tapa Mikaiah manlang takin hong paipih in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:9 Tu-in Israel kumpipa le Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat a kumpi tokhom tung uh ah tu-in a puan tualpi uh tawh kizem uh hi. Samaria kulh kongpi lutna munah amaute tu uh a, amauteʼ mai ah kamsangte khempeuh in thu a gen uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:10 Tua ciangin Khenaanahʼ tapa Zedekiah in sik kite bawl tawmin, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute a siat matengin hihte tawh Syria mite na nawt ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:11 Tua ciangin kamsang khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin gen uh a, “Ramoth-gilead ah kuan to inla, gualzo in. Topa in kumpipaʼ khut sungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:12 Tua ciangin Mikaiah a sam dingin a pai kamtai pa in ama kiangah, “En in, thu kikhatin kamsangteʼ thugen pen kumpipa adingin a hoihlam ahi hi. Nang zong amauteʼ gen bangin gen inla, a hoih lamin gen in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:13 Ahih hangin Mikaiah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, ka Pasianʼ gen thu bek ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:14 Kumpipa kiangah amah hong tun ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mikaiah aw, Ramoth-gilead ah galsim dingin kuan ding ka hi hiam, tua ahih kei leh thuak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Kuan to inla va gualzo ve! Na khut sungah amaute hong kipia ding hi veʼn,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:15 Ahih hangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “ Topaʼ min tawh thudang gen loin thuman bek kei tungah nong gen nading bangzah vei hong thuhilh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:16 Tua ciangin amah in, “A cing nei lo tuute bangin mualte tungah Israel mi khempeuh a kithehthang ka mu hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Hihte in to nei lo hi; nuam takin a inn ciat uh ah ciahsak un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:17 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Amah in kei tawh kisai a hoih gen loin a sia bek gen ding hi, ci-in nang kiangah hong gen hi lo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:18 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “ Topaʼ thugen za in: Topa a kumpi tokhom tungah tu a, a taklam le a veilamah vantung mihon khempeuh a ding ka mu hi." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tua laitakin Topa in, ‘Israel kumpipa Ahab kuan to-in Ramoth-gilead ah a puk nadingin kua in amah zol ding ahi hiam?’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin khat in thu khat gen a, a dang khat in thudang khat a gen hi." 
2Chronicles18:20 Tua ciangin kha khat hong madawkin Topaʼ mai ah dinga, ‘Keimah in amah ka va zol ding hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, ‘Bang lam tawh zol ding na hi hiam?’ a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:21 Amah in, ‘Keimah pai khia-in ama kamsangte khempeuhʼ kam sungah zuau thu gen kha khat ka va hi ding hi,’ a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Nangmah in amah na va zol ding hi. Pai inla tua bangin va hih in,’ a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih na kamsangteʼ kam sungah zuau thu a gen kha khat koih khin ahihna thei in. Topa in nang na siat nading gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:23 Tua ciangin Khenaanahʼ tapa Zedekiah a nai ah hong pai-in Mikaiah a paang bengin, “Cik hun a kipan Topaʼ kha in kei hong nusia-in, hih bang na gen nadingin nang tungah hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:24 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Nangmah a bu dingin inn dei sung nungah na pai ni ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:25 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Mikaiah man unla, khuapi ukpa Amon le kumpipaʼ tapa Joash kiangah paipihkik un." 
2Chronicles18:26 Tua ciangin, ‘Hih bangin kumpipa in ci hi: Hih mipa thong sungah koih unla, lungnuam takin kong ciahkik mateng anletui tawmno bek tawh vak un, ci hi,’ ci un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:27 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Lungnuam takin nong ciahkik leh kei tungtawnin Topa in thu a gen lo ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Mi khempeuh aw, tu-a ka thugen za un!” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:28 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa le Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat, Ramoth-gilead ah a kuan to uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Kei pen mel kiseelin gal sungah kong kuan dinga, ahih hangin nangmah in na puan tualpite nong silh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa a mel kiseel a, amaute gal sungah a kuan uh hi." 
2Chronicles18:30 Tu-in Syria kumpipa in a leeng a ukte thu pia khin a, “A neu tawh ahi a, a lian tawh ahi zongin kido loin, Israel kumpipa bek tawh na kido ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:31 Leeng galkap a ukte in Jehoshafat a muh uh ciangin, “Israel kumpipa hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah a hih dingin amaute in naih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat kiko khia a, Topa in amah huh hi. Pasian in ama kiang panin amaute kai khia hi;" 
2Chronicles18:32 bang hang hiam cih leh Israel kumpipa ahih lohna leeng galkap a ukte in a theih uh ciangin amah a delhna panin kilehheikik uh hi. 
2Chronicles18:33 Ahih hangin mi khat in a thal mawk lot a, Israel kumpipa a galdal thep le a awmdal kikal a kha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng hawl pa kiangah, “Kei liam ka hih manin kileh inla, galphual panin hong pua khia in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles18:34 Tua ni-in gal kidona nasia mahmah a, nitak dong Syria mite maingatin a leeng sungah Israel kumpipa kingam hi. Tua hi a, ni tum laitakin amah a si ta hi." 
2Chronicles19:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat lungmuang takin Jerusalem-a ama inn ah ciahkik hi. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ahih hangin amah a dawn dingin Hananiʼ tapa, thumu pa Jehu hong paikhia a, Kumpi Jehoshafat kiangah, “Migilote huhin Topa a mudahte it ding na hi hiam? Hih thu hangin Topaʼ hehna nang tungah hong tung zo hi." 
2Chronicles19:3 Ahi zongin nang na hoihna pawl khat om hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in gam sung panin Asherah milimte nusia-in Pasian zon ding na lungsimah na ngaihsun hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles19:4 Jerusalem ah Jehoshafat teeng hi. Tua ciangin Beer-sheba panin Efraim mual tung gam ciang dong mite lakah zin kawikawi a, amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian, Topa kiangah amaute tunpihkik hi." 
2Chronicles19:5 Amah in gam sunga Judah khuapi kulh nei khempeuh a khuapi a khuapi ah thukhen dingte seh a," 
2Chronicles19:6 thukhente tungah, “Note in mi ading hi loin Topa adingin a khen na hih manun na hih dingte uh limtakin ngaihsun un; thukhenna na piak laitakun note kiangah amah hong om hi." 
2Chronicles19:7 Tu-in note in Topa zahtak unla, na hihnate uh ah kingaihsun un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa i Pasian in thuman hei khiatna, mi deidanna le sumgolh laknate deih lo hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles19:8 Tua tham loin, Topa adingin thukhenna a pia ding le thuneite a khensak dingin Levi mite le siampite le Israel mi beh lutangte pawl khat, Jehoshafat in Jerusalem ah a seh hi. Amaute in Jerusalem ah a phual ding uh nei uh hi." 
2Chronicles19:9 Tua ciangin amah in amaute thuhilh a, “ Topa zahtakna, cihtakna le na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh hih bangin na hih ding uh hi:" 
2Chronicles19:10 A khuapi uh ah a teeng na sanggamte uh tung panin mi kithahna thu, thukham ahih kei leh thupiakna, upadi ahih kei leh biakna ngeina kipte tawh kisai-in thu khat peuhpeuh note tungah hong tun ciangin, amaute in Topaʼ mai ah mawhna a piansak loh nading le note le na sanggamte uh tungah hehna hong tun loh nadingin amaute na hilh ding uh hi. Tua bangin na gamta ding uh a, mawhna na piangsak kei ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles19:11 En un, Topaʼ thu tawh kisai thute khempeuh ah siampi lian Amariah note tungah om hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa tawh kisai khempeuh ah Judah mite a ukpa Ishmaelʼ tapa Zebadiah om hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in note tungah ulian na hong sem ding uh hi. Hang takin gamta un; thuman mite tawh Topa hong om tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:1 Hih thu khit ciangin Moab mite le Ammon mite le Meunim mite pawl khat, Jehoshafat a sim dingin hong kuan uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:2 Mi pawl khat hong pai-in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Tuipi gal khat, Edom gam panin mihon tampi khat nangmah a sim dingin hong kuan uh hi. Amaute Hazazon-tamar (Engedi a kici) ah om uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat lau a, a mahmah in Topaʼ lamlah nading zong a, Judah gam khempeuh ah an tan ding thu a zasak hi." 
2Chronicles20:4 Tua ciangin Topaʼ tung pan huhna a ngen dingin Judah mite hong kikhawm uh hi. Judah khuapi khempeuh panin Topa thu a dong dingin amaute hong pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn huang sung, inntual thak mai, Judah le Jerusalem teʼ kikhopna sungah Jehoshafat dinga," 
2Chronicles20:6 “ Topa, ka pu ka pate uh Pasian aw, nang, vantungah Pasian hi lo na hi hiam? Minamteʼ kumpi gam khempeuh tungah nang a uk hi lo na hi hiam? Na khut sungah vangliatna le thahatna om a, kuamah in nang hong nang zo lo hi." 
2Chronicles20:7 Koteʼ Pasian aw, hih gamah a teeng mite na mi Israel-teʼ mai ah hawl khia-in, na lawmpa Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte tungah a tawntung dingin pia hi lo na hi hiam?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Hih gamah amaute teengin, nangma min dingin hih lai ah biakinn khat lam uh a," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Eite tungah siatna, namsau, thukhenna, ahih kei leh natna, ahih kei leh kialpi hong tun leh, hih biakinn sungah ama min om ahih manin hih biakinn mai ah dingin i gimna hunah ama tungah i kiko dinga, amah in hong za-in hong hon ding hi,’ ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Tu-in en in, Egypt gam panin Israel-te hong paikhiat lai-in na simsak loh, amaute in a suksiat loh uh Ammon mite le Moab mite le Seir Mual gam mite," 
2Chronicles20:11 ka luah dingun kote tungah nong piak sa nangma neihsa panin kote a hong hawl khia dingin hong paina tawh amaute in kote hong leh thuk zawsop uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:12 Koteʼ Pasian aw, amaute tungah thu khen lo ding na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh kote a sim dingin a hong pai hih mihon tampite a do dingin thahatna ka nei kei uh hi. Ka cih nading uh ka thei kei uh a, nangmah bek kong mitsuan uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:13 Tua laitakin Topaʼ mai ah Judah mi khempeuh a taneute, a zite le a naupangte uh tawh a ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:14 Tua ciangin a kikhawmteʼ lak, Levi mi Asafʼ suante sung pan Mattaniah, a tapa Jeiel, a tapa Benaiah, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Jahaziel tungah Topaʼ kha hong tung hi." 
2Chronicles20:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Judah gam khempeuh le Jerusalem-a teng khempeuh le Kumpi Jehoshafat aw, ngai un. Topa in hih bangin noteʼ tungah hong gen hi: ‘Kihta kei unla, hih a tam mihonpi hangin lungkia kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh galdona pen note aʼ hi loin Pasian-aʼ ahi hi." 
2Chronicles20:16 Zing ciangin amaute a do-in pai suk un. Ziz kah tohna lampi tawnin amaute hong kuan to ding uh a, Jeruel gamlak nisuahna lam kuam mongah amaute na mu ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:17 Note in hih kidona ah na do ding uh kisam lo hi. Judah gam mite le Jerusalem khua mite aw, na panmun uh la-in taang loin ding unla, noteʼ tangin Topaʼ gualzawhna mu un,’ ci hi. Kihta kei unla, lungkia kei un. Zing ciangin amaute a do-in pai un. Topa in note hong ompih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:18 Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in a maitang lei lam ngatin kun a, Judah gam le Jerusalem-a a teeng mite khempeuh zong Topaʼ mai ah pukin Topa a bia uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:19 Tua ciangin Levi mite sung pan Kohath mite le Korah mite, awging pha mahmah tawh Israel Pasian, Topa a phat dingin a ding to uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:20 Tua ciangin zingsangin amaute tho baihin Tekoa gamlak ah a paikhia uh hi. Amaute a paikhiat laitakin Jehoshafat dingin, “Judah gam le Jerusalem-a a teengte aw, ka thugen za un! Topa na Pasian uh um un; tua hileh note na kip ding uh hi. Ama kamsangte um un; tua hileh na maavang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles20:21 Amah in mite tawh thu kikupna a neih khit ciangin, galkapte mai ah amaute a pai kawmin, “ Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi,” ci-in biakna puan silhin Topa tungah la sa-in amah a phat dingte a seh hi." 
2Chronicles20:22 Amaute in la sa-in phat ding a kipat uh ciangin, Judah mite a sim dingin a hong pai Ammon mite, Moab mite le Seir Mual gam mite a pangsim ding Topa in koih a, amaute kizo hi." 
2Chronicles20:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ammon mite le Moab mite in Seir Mual a, a teengte a do dingin kipanin amaute susia mang uh a, Seir-a a teengte a beisak khit uh ciangin amaute khatlekhat kisusia uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:24 Gamlak a galvilna tausang ah Judah-te hong tun ciangin mihonpiteʼ omna lam en uh hi. Amaute pen leilak ah a puk misi luanghawm vive na hi a, a suakta kuamah om lo hi." 
2Chronicles20:25 Van kinusiate a tawm dingin Jehoshafat le a mite hong pai ciangin bawngte, vante, puante le na manphate tampi tak mu uh a, a puak zawh nawn loh ciang dong uh amau adingin a la uh hi. Van kinusiate tam mahmah ahih manin ni thum sung tawm uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:26 A ni li ni-in Berakah Kuam ah amaute kikhawm uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in tua lai ah Topa phat uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin tua lai mun pen Berakah Kuam kici hi. 
2Chronicles20:27 Tua ciangin Judah mi le Jerusalem mi khempeuh ciah uh a, Jehoshafat makai-in lungdamna tawh Jerusalem ah a pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a galte uh hangin Topa in amaute lungdamsak hi." 
2Chronicles20:28 Amaute, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawh Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakinn ah tung uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:29 Topa in Israel-teʼ galte a dosakna thu a zak uh ciangin kumpi gamte khempeuh in Topa a kihta uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:30 Tua ahih ciangin Jehoshafatʼ ukna gam sung gamdai hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a Pasian in ama kiimah galdaihna a pia hi. 
2Chronicles20:31 Tua bangin Jehoshafat in Judah tungah uk hi. Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm thum le nga pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm nih le nga sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Azubah hi a, Shilhiʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Amah in a pa Asaʼ gamtat bang mahin Topaʼ muhna ah a man na sem hi. 
2Chronicles20:33 Ahi zongin mual dawna biakpiaknate kila khia lo hi. Mite in a lungsim uh ah a pu a pate uhʼ Pasian ngaihsun nai lo uh hi. 
2Chronicles20:34 Tu-in Jehoshafatʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a patna pan a tawp dongin, Israel Kumpiteʼ Tangthu sunga a kiciamteh, Hananiʼ Tapa Jehuʼ Khang Tangthu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles20:35 Hih thu khit ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoshafat in a gilo a a gamta Israel kumpipa Ahaziah tawh kipawlna a bawl hi. 
2Chronicles20:36 Tarshish a pai ding teembawte bawlna ah amah pawl a, amaute in Ezion-geber ah teembawte a bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles20:37 Tua ciangin Mareshah khuami Dodavahuʼ tapa Eliezer in Jehoshafat langpangin thu gen a, “Nangmah in Ahaziah tawh kipawlna bawl na hih manin Topa in na bawl sa uh nate susia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin teembawte kisia a Tarshish ah pai thei lo hi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshafat si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jehoram in ama tangin uk hi." 
2Chronicles21:2 Jehoshafatʼ tapa Jehoramʼ sanggam pasalte: Azariah, Jehiel, Zekhariah, Azariah, Mikhael le Shefatiah ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh, Judah kumpi Jehoshafatʼ tapate ahi hi." 
2Chronicles21:3 A pa un amaute tungah letsong lianpite, ngun, kham le a manpha neihsate, Judah gam sunga kulh nei khuapite tawh a pia hi. Ahih hangin amah ta upa ahih manin Jehoram tungah kumpi gam a pia hi." 
2Chronicles21:4 A paʼ kumpi tokhom tungah Jehoram kahin a kip ciangin namsau tawh a sanggam pasal khempeuh that a, Judah ulian pawl khat zong a that hi." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoram kumpi a suahin a kum sawm thum le nih pha a, Jerusalem ah kum giat sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles21:6 Amah in Ahab innkuan mah bangin Israel kumpi dangteʼ gamtat a zui hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Ahabʼ tanu ama zi ahi hi. Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. 
2Chronicles21:7 Ahi zongin, David tawh a bawl sa a thuciamna, ama tung le a suante tungah ukna za a piak suak nading a ciam khitna hangin Topa in Davidʼ suante susia lo hi." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ama hun sungin Judah ukna panin Edom leng khia-in amauʼ kumpi tuam a koih uh hi. 
2Chronicles21:9 Tua ciangin ama nuai-a a ukte le a leengte khempeuh tawh Jehoram gal kah a, zanin amah kipanin amah le a leeng ukte a umcih Edom mite a vat gawp hi." 
2Chronicles21:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu ni dongin Judah ukna panin Edom mite leeng khia hi. Amah in a pu a pateʼ Pasian, Topa nusia ahih manin tua hun laitakin Libnah zong ama ukna panin a leng khia hi." 
2Chronicles21:11 Tua tham loin amah in Judah mual tung gamah mual dawna biakpiaknate bawl a, Jerusalem-a teeng mite citak loin omsak a, Judah mite lam pialsak hi." 
2Chronicles21:12 Tua ciangin kamsang Elijah tung panin ama kiangah laikhak khat hong tung a, “Na pu Davidʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Na pa Jehoshafatʼ gamtat bang le Judah kumpi Asaʼ gamtat bangin gamta loin," 
2Chronicles21:13 Israel kumpi dangteʼ gamtat bangin gamta-in Ahab innkuan in cihtak lohna ah Israel a paipih bangin Judah le Jerusalem-a teeng mite cihtak lohna ah na paipih a, na paʼ innkuan sung panin nang sangin a hoih zaw na sanggam pasalte zong na that hi." 
2Chronicles21:14 Tua ahih manin na mite, na tate, na zite le na neih khempeuh tungah Topa in gimna lianpi khat hong tungsak dinga," 
2Chronicles21:15 na natna hangin a nini-in na gil a tolhkhiat dongin, nang mahmah in gilnatna lianpi khat na nei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles21:16 Tua ciangin Topa in Ethiopia mite kiangah a om Filistia mite le Arab mite, Jehoram tungah a heh nadingun tok lo hi." 
2Chronicles21:17 Tua ahih ciangin Judah a simin amaute hong kuan to-in luh uh a, kumpipaʼ inn ah a om a muh uh na khempeuh le a tapate le a zite zong pua khia uh a, a tapa neu pen Jehoahaz sim loh a tapate a kinusia om lo hi." 
2Chronicles21:18 Hih thute khempeuh khit ciangin Topa in a dam thei lo natna tawh a gil nasak hi. 
2Chronicles21:19 A hun a cin, kum nih beina ciangin a natna hangin a gil tolh khia a, nakpi takin na sa-in a si hi. A pate adingin mei a cih uh bangin a mite in amah zahtakna-in mei cih lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles21:20 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm thum le nih a pha hi. Jerusalem ah kum giat sung uk a, kuama dahpih lohin amah kihem khia hi. Amaute in David khuapi sungah amah vui uh a, ahih hangin kumpiteʼ han sungah kivui lo hi." 
2Chronicles22:1 Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a teengte in ama tangin a tapa neu pen Ahaziah kumpi-in koih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Arab mite tawh giahphual ah hong pai mite in a tapa gol zawte khempeuh that khin uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpi Jehoramʼ tapa Ahaziah in uk hi. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm li le nih pha a, Jerusalem ah kum khat sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Athaliah hi a, Omriʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Chronicles22:3 Ama nu in a sia-a a gamtat nading lamlak ahih manin amah zong Ahab innkuan dangteʼ gamtat bangin a gamta hi. 
2Chronicles22:4 Ahab innkuan dangte mah bangin Topaʼ muhna ah a sia gamta hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a paʼ sih khit ciangin ama siat nading ah thulamlakte pen Ahabʼ innkuante ahi uh hi. 
2Chronicles22:5 Amah in amauteʼ thugen nangawn zui a, Ramoth-gilead ah Syria kumpi Hazael tawh a kido dingin Israel kumpi Ahabʼ tapa Joram tawh a kuan hi. Tua ciangin Syria mite in Joram liamsak uh a," 
2Chronicles22:6 Syria kumpi Hazael a do laitakin gal sungah a ngah a liamnate Jezreel ah a kidamsak dingin a kilehkik hi. Tua ciangin Jezreel ah Ahabʼ tapa Joram a ci na ahih manin amah a en dingin Judah kumpi Jehoramʼ tapa Ahaziah a hawh suk hi. 
2Chronicles22:7 Ahih hangin Joramʼ kiangah a hawhna tawh Ahaziahʼ pukna a tun nading Pasianʼ seh sa ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai ah amah a hawh sungin Ahab innkuan a susia dingin Topa in sathau a nilh sa, Nimshiʼ tapa Jehu tawh a kimu dingin Joram tawh paikhia hi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Jehu in Ahab innkuan tungah Pasianʼ thukhenna a sepkhiat laitakin Judah uliante le Ahaziahʼ na a sem, Ahaziahʼ sanggam pasalteʼ tapate tuak a, amah in amaute a that hi." 
2Chronicles22:9 Amah in Ahaziah zong a, Samaria ah a buk laitakin amah kiman a, tua ciangin Jehu kiangah amah kipaipihin kithat hi. Amaute in amah vui uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah pen a lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa a zong Jehoshafatʼ tupa ahi hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Ahaziah innkuante in kumpi gam a uk zo ding mi khat zong nei nawn lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles22:10 Tu-in Ahaziahʼ nu Athaliah in a tapa a sihna a theih ciangin amah kipanin Judah sung pan kumpi innkuan khempeuh thatsak hi. 
2Chronicles22:11 Ahih hangin kumpipaʼ tanu Jehosheba in Ahaziahʼ tapa Joash la a, a kithat ding kumpipaʼ tapate lak panin amah gu khia-in lupna senna inn dei sungah amah le a cingnu a koih hi. Amah pen Ahaziahʼ sanggamnu ahih manin Kumpi Jehoramʼ tanu ahi, siampi Jehoiadaʼ zi Jehosheba in tua bangin Athaliahʼ kiang panin amah seel a, tua nu in amah that kha lo hi." 
2Chronicles22:12 Tua bangin Athaliah in gam sung a uk laitakin Pasianʼ biakinn sungah bu-in kum guk sung amaute tawh amah a om hi. 
2Chronicles23:1 Ahih hangin a kum sagihna kumin Jehoiada amah kihanthawnin a za-a a ukte, Jehoramʼ tapa Azariah le Jehohananʼ tapa Ishmael le Obedʼ tapa Azariah le Adaiahʼ tapa Maaseiah le Zikriʼ tapa Elishafat te tawh thukimna khat a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles23:2 Tua ciangin Judah gam sungah amaute pai kawikawi-in Judah khuapite khempeuh panin Levi mite le Israel mi beh lutangte khawmin Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles23:3 Tua ciangin a kikhawm khempeuh in Pasianʼ biakinn sungah kumpipa tapa Joash tawh thuciamna khat bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin Jehoiada in amaute kiangah, “En un, kumpipaʼ tapa! Topa in David suante tawh kisai-in a gen bangin amah uksak un." 
2Chronicles23:4 Note in hih bangin na hih ding uh hi: Sabbath ni-in nasep a peng no siampite le Levi mite sung panin seh thum ah seh khat kulh kongpi cingte na hi ding uh a," 
2Chronicles23:5 seh thum ah seh khat kumpipaʼ inn ah omin seh thum ah seh khat Khuabul Kulh kongpi ah na om ding uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Topaʼ biakinn tual sungah na om ding uh hi. 
2Chronicles23:6 Siampite le na a sem Levi mite sim loh, Topaʼ biakinn sungah kuamah lutsak kei un. Amaute a siangtho ahih manin amaute lut thei ding uh a, ahih hangin mi khempeuh in Topaʼ sawlna na mang ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:7 Levi mite in a khut sung uh ah a galhiam ciat uh tawh kumpipa cing ding uh a, biakinn sungah a lut peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Hong tum ciang hitaleh a pusuah ciang hitaleh ah kumpipa tawh om un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles23:8 Siampi Jehoiadaʼ thupiak khempeuh bangin Levi mite le Judah mi khempeuh gamta uh hi. Amaute in amauʼ mi ciat Sabbath ni-in na a sem ding mite tawh Sabbath ni-in nasep a peng ding mite hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Jehoiada in nasep a peng ding siampite ciahsak lo hi. 
2Chronicles23:9 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om, Kumpi David-aʼ ahi ngei teipite le lum lian le lum neute, a ukte tungah a pia hi." 
2Chronicles23:10 Tua ciangin amah in mi khempeuh a galhiam ciat uh tawh kumpipa a cingin, biakinn leitaw lam pang pan leilu lam pang, biakna tau le inn kiimah a koih hi." 
2Chronicles23:11 Tua ciangin amah in kumpipaʼ tapa paikhiat pihin ama lu tungah kumpi lukhu khusak a, kumpi za ngahna lai zong a pia hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi-in amah taangko uh a, Jehoiada le a tapate in amah sathau nilhin, “Kumpipa khansau hen!” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:12 Mite tai-in kumpipa a phatna uh gamlumna Athaliah in a zak ciangin miteʼ omna Topaʼ biakinn ah a pai hi. 
2Chronicles23:13 Amah a khuadak ciangin, biakinn lutna-a om a khuampi gei ah kumpipa ading le a ukte le peengkul tumte kumpipa gei ah a om le gam sung mi khempeuh lungdamin peengkulte a tum le lasate a lasakna nate uh tawh tua pawi makai-in a na om uh a mu hi. Tua ciangin Athaliah in a puante bal kekin kiko a, “Sawm simna! Sawm simna!” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles23:14 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in galkapte tungah a kikoih a ukte paikhiat pihin amaute tungah, “A gualin a cingte lak panin a pua ah amah paikhiatpih un. Amah a panpih mi khat peuhpeuh namsau tawh kithat ding hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa in, “ Topaʼ biakinn sungah tua nu that kei un,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles23:15 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nu man uh a, kumpipa omna inn Sakol Kongpi vangah paikhiat pihin tua lai ah amah a that uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:16 Tua ciangin Topaʼ mi ahih nading uh Jehoiada in amah le mi khempeuh le kumpipa kikalah thuciamna khat a bawl hi. 
2Chronicles23:17 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh Baal inn ah pai-in a inn a lai khia uh hi. Amaute in a biakna taute le a milimte sukham uh a, biakna taute mai ah Baal siampi Mattan a that uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:18 Tua ciangin Jehoiada in Davidʼ hih ngei bangin, Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin lungdamna le lasakna tawh, Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a pia ding, Topaʼ biakinn a en dingin David in a vaihawm sa Levi siampite le Levi miteʼ ukna nuai ah Topaʼ biakinn a vil galvilte a koih hi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Lam khat peuhpeuh ah a nin mi khat peuhpeuh hong lut loh nadingin Topaʼ biakinn kulh kongpite ah amah in kulh kongpi cingte a koih hi. 
2Chronicles23:20 Tua ciangin amah in galkap ukte, mi liante, mi a ukte le gam sung mi khempeuh a paipih hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn panin kumpipaʼ inn kulh kongpi tungnung tawnin kumpipa paipih suk uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tusak uh hi." 
2Chronicles23:21 Tua ahih ciangin gam sung mi khempeuh lungdam uh hi. Namsau tawh Athaliah a kithah khit ciangin khuapi sung a nuam pah hi. 
2Chronicles24:1 Joash in uk ding a kipatin kum sagih pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm li sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Zibiah hi a, Beer-sheba khuami ahi hi." 
2Chronicles24:2 Siampi Jehoiadaʼ hunsung khempeuh Topaʼ mitah Joash a manin gamta hi. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoiada in ama adingin zi nih laksak a, amah in tapate le tanute a nei hi." 
2Chronicles24:4 Hih hun khit ciangin Joash in Topaʼ biakinn a ngei batsakkik ding ngaihsun hi. 
2Chronicles24:5 Amah in siampite le Levi mite khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Judah khuapite ah pai unla, Pasianʼ biakinn a kumkumin puah nadingin Israel khempeuh tung panin sum khawm un; hih thu na nawh hih ding uh thei un,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Levi mite kinawh lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:6 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in amauʼ ukpi Jehoiada samin ama kiangah, “ Topaʼ nasem Moses in Topaʼ ompihna puanbuk a dingin Israel mihonte tung panin a khon mangmu bang hangin Judah le Jerusalem panin Levi mite khawmsak lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles24:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua a gilo numei Athaliah le a pawlte in Pasianʼ biakinn luh uh a, Topaʼ biakinn sunga om a ki-ap nate khempeuh zong Baal-te adingin zang uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:8 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in thu pia a, amaute in singkuang khat bawlin Topaʼ biakinn kulh kongpi pua lamah a koih uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:9 Gamlak ah a om lai-un Pasianʼ nasem Moses in Israel mite a piaksak mangmu Topa adingin hong puak nadingun Judah le Jerusalem sung khempeuh ah thu zaksakna kibawl hi. 
2Chronicles24:10 Tua ciangin ulian khempeuh le mi khempeuh lungdamin a mangmu uh hong sung uh a, a man khit mateng uh singkuang sungah khia uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:11 Levi mite in kumpipaʼ uliante kiangah a singkuang paipih uh a, a sungah sum tampi a om lam a muh peuhpeuh uh ciangin, kumpipaʼ lai-at pa le siampi lianpen paʼ sawltak pa hong pai-in singkuang sunga sum teng bung khia-in la uh a, tua ciangin a omna ngei ah a singkuang koihkik uh hi. Tua bangin a nini-in amaute in hih uh a, sum tampi a khawm uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa le Jehoiada in Topaʼ biakinn nasep a ukte tungah tua sumte pia uh a, amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a ngei a bangsakkik dingin leilesuang nasep a siamte le khutsiamte le Topaʼ biakinn a puahkik dingin sik le sumngo nasep a siamte zong a cial uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:13 Tua ahih ciangin tua nasepna ah a kisehte in na semin amauʼ khut sungah puahkikna nasep in mai nawt a, amaute in a ngei bangin Topaʼ biakinn bawlkikin kipsak uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:14 Amaute in a zawh khit uh ciangin, kumpipa le Jehoiada kiangah sum a omlaite hong paipih uh a, amaute in tuate tawh Topaʼ biakinn ah nasep nading le meihal biak nadingin nazatte le paknamtui adingin pakante le kham le ngun beelte a bawl uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jehoiadaʼ nuntak sung khempeuh a tawntungin Topaʼ biakinn sungah meihal biaknate a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ahih hangin Jehoiada teekin a hun kicing ta a, tua ciangin a si hi. A sihin kum za le kum sawm thum pha hi." 
2Chronicles24:16 Amah in Israel sung le Pasianʼ na le Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasep hoih sem ahih manin amaute in David khuapi sung kumpiteʼ lakah amah a vui uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:17 Jehoiada a sih khit ciangin Judah uliante hong pai-in amauʼ thu a zuih nadingin kumpipa tungah thu va gen uh a, kumpipa in zong amauteʼ thu a ngai hi." 
2Chronicles24:18 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topaʼ biakinn nusia uh a, Asherah milimte le milim dangteʼ na sem uh hi. Hih amauʼ mawhna hangin Judah le Jerusalem tungah hehna hong tung hi." 
2Chronicles24:19 Ahi zongin Topaʼ lamah amaute a paipihkik dingin amah in amaute lakah kamsangte a puak hi. Hihte in amauʼ lang khat ah teci pang a, ahih hangin amaute in don lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:20 Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiadaʼ tapa Zekhariahʼ sungah Pasianʼ kha hong lut hi. Tua ciangin amah dingin mite en sukin mite kiangah, “Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Bang hangin na mavan theih loh nadingun Topaʼ thupiaknate palsat na hi uh hiam? Note in Topa nusia na hih manun amah in note hong nusia hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles24:21 Ahih hangin amaute in amah sawm sim uh a, kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in Topaʼ biakinn tual ah suang tawh amah deng lum uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:22 Tua bangin kumpipa Joash in Zekhariahʼ pa Jehoiada in ama tungah a lah dikna phawk nawn loin ama tapa thahsak mawk hi. Amah in a sih ding ciangin, “ Topa in mu henla thuk tahen!” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles24:23 Kum bei ciangin Joash a simin Syria galkapte hong kuan to hi. Judah le Jerusalem ah amaute hong pai-in mite lak panin ulian khempeuh that uh a, a van ngahte khempeuh uh Damaskas kumpipa kiangah puak uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:24 Syria galkapte mi tawmno hong pai hi napi-in, amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa nusia uh ahih manin Topa in amauteʼ khut sungah galkap tampi ahi mite a pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Joashʼ tungah thukhenna a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:25 Amah nakpi tak a liam sa-in nusia-in, ama kiang panin Syria mite a kihepkhiat khit uh ciangin, siampi Jehoiadaʼ tapa a thahna hangin a nasemte in amah sawm sim uh a, a lupna tungah amah that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah si hi. David khuapi sungah amah vui uh a, ahih hangin amaute in kumpiteʼ hanah amah vui lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles24:26 Amah a sawm sim mite pen Ammon numei Shimeathʼ tapa Zabad le Moab numei Shimrithʼ tapa Jehozabad ahi uh hi. 
2Chronicles24:27 Ama tapateʼ thute le amah a kigensiatna thute le Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkikna thute, Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Amaziah in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nih le kua sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jehoaddin hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi." 
2Chronicles25:2 Topaʼ mitah a manin amah gamta a, ahi zongin a lungsim a paubaang lo hi zo nai sam lo hi." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ama khut sungah kumpi vangliatna kip takin a om khit phetin a pa ahi kumpipa a that a nasemte a that hi. 
2Chronicles25:4 Ahih hangin Moses laibu sungah, “Tateʼ hangin pate kithat lo dinga, pateʼ hangin tate kithat lo ding hi,” ci-in Topa in a thupiakna thukham sungah a kigelh mah bangin amah in amauʼ tate that lo hi." 
2Chronicles25:5 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Judah mite khawm a, a tul-a ukte le a za-a ukteʼ khutnuai ah Judah mite le Benjamin mite a behbeh, a pawlpawlin a koih hi. Amah in kum sawm nih le a tungsiah a pha mite khawm a, galsim dingin a hoih, teipi le lum a zang thei, a kiteng khia mihing tul za thum a pha hi." 
2Chronicles25:6 Amah in Israel sung panin ngun talen za khat tawh a thahat galhang mi tul za khat zong a cial hi. 
2Chronicles25:7 Ahih hangin Pasianʼ mi khat ama kiangah hong pai-in, “Kumpipa aw, Israel mi ahi hih Efraim mite khempeuh, Topa in ompih lo ahih manin hih Israel galkapte nang tawh kuan khawmsak kei in." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ahih hangin hih bang lam a hihna tawh galdona ah thahat dingin kingaihsun kha na hih leh, Pasian in galteʼ mai ah nang hong paai ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in huh nading ahi a, paih nading ahi zongin vangliatna nei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:9 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Pasianʼ mipa kiangah, “Ahi ta zongin Israel galkapte tungah ka piak sa talen za khat thu bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Pasianʼ mipa in dawngin, “ Topa in hih sangin nakpi takin a tam zaw hong pia thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:10 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Efraim panin hong pai galkapte, inn ah a ciahkik dingin a pai khiasak hi. Tua ciangin Judah mite tungah amaute heh mahmah uh a, heh mahmahna tawh inn ah a ciahkik uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:11 Ahih hangin Amaziah kihanthawnin a mite paikhiatpih a, Ci Kuam ah pai-in Seir gam mite mihing tul sawm a that hi." 
2Chronicles25:12 A dang tul sawm hing mat uh a, keen sang dawn khat ah amaute paipihin tua keen dawn panin amaute lawn suk uh a, amaute khempeuh them len hi." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ahih hangin Amaziah in gal sungah amah tawh kuansak loin, inn ah a sawlkik galkapte in Samaria panin Beth-horon dong Judah khuapite na sim uh a, tuate sungah mi tul thum thatin van tampi a la uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Seir gamah Edom mite a thahna panin Amaziah hong ciah ciangin amah in Seir gam miteʼ pasian-te hong ciahpih a, ama pasian dingin tuate koih a, tuate bia-in tuateʼ tungah biakna a pia hi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Tua ciangin Amaziah tungah Topa hehin ama kiangah kamsang khat sawl a, tua pa in, “Bang hangin nangma khut panin ama mite a hon khia lo, mi pawl khatteʼ pasian-te beel na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:16 Ahih hangin amah in thu a gen laitakin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa tungah ngaihsutna a pia dingin nang hong koih ka hi uh hiam? Khawl in! Bang hangin nang hong kithat ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kamsang pa khawl a, ahih hangin ama kiangah, “Hih bang gamta-in ka thugenna ngai lo na hih manin Pasian in nang hong suksiat ding a lungsim a khensatna ka thei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:17 Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Amaziah in ngaihsutna a lak khit ciangin Israel kumpi, Jehuʼ tapa Jehoahaz, a tapa Joash kiangah mi sawlin, “Hong pai in; khatlekhat kisi ni,” cisak hi." 
2Chronicles25:18 Tua ciangin Israel kumpi Joash in Judah kumpi Amaziah kiangah thu puak a, “Lebanon-a thangling kung in Lebanon-a taamtak tungah thu puak a, ‘A zi dingin ka tapaʼ tungah na tanu pia in,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin Lebanon gamsa khat hong pai-in thangling kung tuancil hi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Nangmah in, ‘Edom mite ka vat khin hi,’ na ci a, na lungsim in nang hong kisatheisak hi. Tu-a na minthanna zah tawh inn ah om in; bang hangin nangmah le Judah mite na pukkhawm nadingun buaina piangsak ding na hi hiam” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles25:20 Ahih hangin Amaziah in mang lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Edom pasian-te bia uh ahih manin, Pasian in amauʼ galteʼ khut sungah amaute a piak theih nadingin tua pen Pasianʼ vaihawmna ahi hi." 
2Chronicles25:21 Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa Joash kuan to a, Judah-teʼ gam Beth-shemesh ah amah le Judah kumpipa Amaziah khatlekhat gal sungah kisi uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:22 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Judah mite zo a, mi khempeuh a inn uh ah a tai uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:23 Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa Joash in Beth-shemesh ah Ahaziahʼ tapa Joash, a tapa Amaziah ahi Judah kumpipa manin Jerusalem ah paipih a, Efraim Kongpi panin a Kiu Kulhpi ciang dong pi za guk sung Jerusalem kulh a phel khia hi." 
2Chronicles25:24 Tua ciangin amah in kham le ngun khempeuh le Pasianʼ biakinn sungah a kimu umlebeel khempeuhte tawh Obededom man khawm hi. Amah in kumpipaʼ inn-a van manphate la-in luang khap nading mite zong man a, tua ciangin Samaria ah a ciahkik hi." 
2Chronicles25:25 Israel kumpi, Jehoahazʼ tapa Joash a sih zawh Judah kumpi Joashʼ tapa Amaziah kum sawm le kum nga sung hing lai hi." 
2Chronicles25:26 Tu-in Amaziahʼ nasep a omlaite, a patna panin a tawpna dong, Judah le Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles25:27 Topa kiang panin amah a kiheikhiat a kipanin amaute in amah sawm simna khat Jerusalem ah nei uh ahih ciangin Lakhish ah amah tai hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Lakhish ah amah nungdelhsak uh a, tua lai ah amah that uh hi." 
2Chronicles25:28 Tua ciangin sakolte tungah amah pua-in kiciah pih a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi." 
2Chronicles26:1 Tua ciangin Judah mi khempeuh in kum sawm le kum guk a pha Uzziah la-in a pa Amaziahʼ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi. 
2Chronicles26:2 Kumpi ahi ama pa a sih khit ciangin amah in Eloth khua lakikin Judah gam dingin a ngahkik hi. 
2Chronicles26:3 Uzziah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum guk pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nga le nih sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jekoliah hi a, Jerusalem khuami ahi hi." 
2Chronicles26:4 A pa Amaziahʼ hih sa khempeuh bangin amah in Topaʼ mitah a man sem hi. 
2Chronicles26:5 Pasian zahtak ding ama tungah a hilh Zekhariahʼ hun sungteng amah in Pasian zong hi. Amah in Topa a zon lai teng, Pasian in amah daupaisak hi." 
2Chronicles26:6 Amah kuan khia-in Filistia mite va sim a, Gath khuapi kulh, Jabneh khuapi kulh le Ashdod khuapi kulh sucim hi. Tua ciangin amah in Ashdod gam sung le Filistia-teʼ gam sung mun dangte ah khuapite a lam hi." 
2Chronicles26:7 Filistia mite, Gurbaal ah a teeng Arab mite le Meunim mite a dona ah Pasian in amah huh hi." 
2Chronicles26:8 Ammon mite in Uzziah tungah siah puak uh a, amah a thahat mahmah suak ahih manin a minthanna in Egypt gam ciang dong nangawn zel hi." 
2Chronicles26:9 Tua tham loin Uzziah in Jerusalem a Kiu Kongpi le a Kuam Kongpi le Kulh Keen sanah tausangte lam a, tuate kulh tawh a um hi." 
2Chronicles26:10 Tua ciangin amah in gamlak ah tausangte lam a, Shefelah le zanglei ah gan hon tampi nei ahih manin tuikhuk tampi to a, lei nasep uuk ahih manin mual tung le lei hoihna gamte ah lokhote le leenggui puahte a nei hi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Tua tham loin Uzziah in kumpipaʼ khutnuai ah galkap ukte khat ahi Hananiahʼ ukna nuai ah, lai-at Jeiel le ulian Maaseiah in mi a khop lai-in a khenkhenin a koih a mi phazah mah bangin, galsim dingin a hoih galkap tampi a nei hi." 
2Chronicles26:12 A thahat galkap maang a vekpi-in tul nih le za guk ahi hi. 
2Chronicles26:13 Amauteʼ ukna nuai ah galdona ah kumpipa a huh dingin thahatna tawh gal a do thei ding galkap tul za nga om hi. 
2Chronicles26:14 Uzziah in galkap khempeuh adingin lumte, teipite, sik lukhute, thalte, lot ding suangtangte a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles26:15 Amah in thaltangte le suang liante lot nadingin tausang omna munte le a kiute ah koih ding, mi a siamte in a bawl tawm sette, Jerusalem ah a bawl hi. Amah a thahat dong a lamdangpi khatin kihuh ahih manin ama minthanna in gamlapi a zel hi." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ahih hangin amah a thahat ciangin a siat nadingin a kiphatsakna hong khang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa a Pasian tungah amah khial a, paknamtui biakna tau tungah paknamtui hal dingin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a lut hi." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ahih hangin Topaʼ siampi Azariah, a thahat mihing sawm giat tawh ama nungah pai hi." 
2Chronicles26:18 Tua ciangin amaute in Kumpi Uzziah nialin ama kiangah, “Uzziah aw, Topaʼ tungah paknamtui hal ding nangma hih ding hi lo hi. Paknamtui hal dingin a ki-ap, Aaronʼ suan siampiteʼ hih ding ahi hi. Biakinn sung panin paikhia in; bang hang hiam cih leh na gamta khial a, hih bang hihna in Topa Pasian tung panin nangʼ tungah pahtawina hong tun lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles26:19 Tua ciangin Uzziah a heh suak hi. Tu-in amah in paknamtui a hal dingin a khut sungah paknamtui beel tawi a, siampite tungah a hehna hangin paknamtui biakna tau gei Topaʼ biakinn sung siampiteʼ muhin ama taltang ah phak natna hong suak khia hi." 
2Chronicles26:20 Tua ciangin siampi lian Azariah le siampi khempeuh in amah a et uh ciangin a taltang ah phak natna na nei hi. Tua ciangin amaute in manlang takin amah sawn khia uh a, Topa in amah vat khin ahih manin a mahmah zong a paikhia dingin nawh tat hi." 
2Chronicles26:21 Tua ahih ciangin a sih ni dong Kumpi Uzziah a phak hi a, amah miphak ahih manin inn tuam khat ah a teeng hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ biakinn panin amah kipuaseh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jotham in tua gam mite a uk hi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Tu-in Uzziahʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a patna panin a tawp dong, Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah in gelh hi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Tu-in Uzziahʼ gamtatna a omlaite, a patna panin a tawp dong, Amozʼ tapa kamsang Isaiah in gelh hi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uzziah si a, amaute in kumpiteʼ neihsa hanah vui loin a huang sungah a vui uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Amah a phak ahi hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jotham in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotham in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum guk sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Jerushah hi a, Zadokʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Chronicles27:2 A pa Uzziah hih sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ mitah a man gamta hi. Ahih hangin a pa bangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah amah va mawk lut lo hi. Ahih hangin mite in a sia gamtatnate zui lai uh hi. 
2Chronicles27:3 Jotham in Topaʼ biakinn kulh kongpi tungnung lam a, Ofel kulh tungah zong inn tampi a lam hi." 
2Chronicles27:4 Tua tham loin amah in Judah mual tung gamah khuapite le sing tamna mualte tungah mun muanhuaite le tausangte a lam hi. 
2Chronicles27:5 Amah in Ammon kumpipa sim a, amaute a zo hi. Tua ciangin Ammon mite in tua kumin ama tungah ngun talen za khat, mangbuh lawh tul sawm, le mangbuhham lawh tul sawm mah a puak uh hi. Ammon mite in ama tungah a kum nihna le a kum thumna kumin tua zah mah a puak uh hi." 
2Chronicles27:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa a Pasianʼ mai ah Jotham a hoih tatna tawh kizui-in a vang zong a lian hi. 
2Chronicles27:7 Tu-in Jothamʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a galsimnate le a om ziate, Israel le Judah Kumpiteʼ Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles27:8 Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum guk sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles27:9 Tua ciangin Jotham si a, David khuapi sungah amaute in amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Ahaz in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum guk sung uk hi. A pu David gamtat hoih bangin Topaʼ mitah a man gamta lo a," 
2Chronicles28:2 Israel kumpiteʼ khekhap zui zaw hi. Amah in a kisung milimte nangawn Baal-te adingin a bawl hi. 
2Chronicles28:3 Tua ciangin Hinnomʼ tapaʼ kuamah paknamtui hal a, Topa in Israel-teʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minamte in a zat uh a kihhuai gamtatnate mah bangin biakna-in a tapate a hal hi." 
2Chronicles28:4 Tua ciangin amah in mual dawna biakpiaknate le mual neute le singniim nuai khempeuh ah biakna pia-in paknamtui a hal hi. 
2Chronicles28:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Syria kumpipa khut sungah amah pia a, amah in zo-in mi tampi salin Damaskas ah a ciahpih hi. Israel kumpipaʼ khut sungah zong amah kipia a, amah zo-in a mite tampi tak a that hi." 
2Chronicles28:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa nusia uh ahih manin Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah in ni khat thu-in amaute galhang mihing tul za khat le tul sawm nih, Judah gam sungah a that hi." 
2Chronicles28:7 Tua ciangin Efraim mi a thahat Zikri in Kumpi Ahazʼ tapa Maaseiah le kumpi inn a uk Azrikam le kumpipa zomah aana a nei Elkanah a that hi. 
2Chronicles28:8 Israel mite in amauʼ beh Judah mite lak panin numeite, tapate le tanute, mihing tul za nih salin a man uh hi. Amaute in amauʼ kiang panin van tampi zong la-in tua vante Samaria ah a ciahpih uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ahih hangin Oded min nei Topaʼ kamsang khat tua lai ah om hi. Samaria ah hong tung galkapte a dawn dingin amah pai khia-in amaute kiangah, “En un, Judah tungah na pu na pate uh Pasian Topa heh ahih manin noteʼ khut sungah amaute hong pia a, ahih hangin note in heh mahmahna tawh amaute na that uh a, tua in vantung dong ban hi." 
2Chronicles28:10 Tu-in note in Judah mi le Jerusalem mi, numei le pasalte, na sal dingun nuaisiah na sawm uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh tungah nomau mahmah in khialhna nei hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Tu-in ka thugen hong za unla, na behte uh kiang panin na lak uh na galmatte uh puakkik un; bang hang hiam cih leh note tungah Topaʼ hehna a lauhuai om hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles28:12 Efraim mi ukpite pawl khat, Johananʼ tapa Azariah, Meshillemothʼ tapa Berekhiah, Shallumʼ tapa Jehizkiah le Hadlaiʼ tapa Amasa, gal sung panin hong tungteʼ lang khat ah pangin" 
2Chronicles28:13 amaute kiangah, “Tu hun a i khialhnate le i mawhna behlapin Topaʼ tungah mawhna eite tungah behlap hong sawm na hih manun hih lai ah galmatte nong tunpih kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh i mawhna lian khinzo a, Israel tungah a lauhuai hehna om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:14 Tua ahih ciangin galhiam tawi mite in uliante le a kikhawm khempeuhʼ mai ah galmatte le a lak uh nate nusia uh hi. 
2Chronicles28:15 Tua ciangin tua na a sem dingin mite dingin galmatte la uh a, amaute lakah guaktangin a omte, a van lakte uh sung pan puante silhsak uh hi. Amaute puan silhsak uh a, khedap kaihte pia-in anletui vak uh a, sathau nilh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute lakah a tha gina lote la tungah pua uh a, nisuh khuapi ahi Jerikho khua amauʼ behte kiangah paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin Samaria ah amaute ciahkik uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:16 Tua hun laitakin Kumpi Ahaz in Assiria kumpipa kiangah huhna a ngen dingin mi a sawl hi. 
2Chronicles28:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Edom mite in Judah simkikin zo uh a, galmatin a mite pua khia uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:18 Tua ciangin Filistia mite in Shefelah le Judah-teʼ Negeb gam sung khuapite luh uh a, Beth-shemesh, Aijalon, Gederoth, Soko a khuaneute tawh, Timnah a khuaneute tawh le Gimzo a khuaneute tawh la uh a, amaute tua munah teeng uh hi." 
2Chronicles28:19 Judah Kumpi Ahaz pen Judah mite tungah kihihsakna tawh gamta-in Topaʼ tungah citak lo ahih manin ama hangin Topa in Judah mite niamkoih hi. 
2Chronicles28:20 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Ahazʼ ngetna zui-in Assiria kumpipa Tiglath-pileser hong kuan hi. Ahi zongin amah tha khauhsak zaw loin gimsak zaw hi. 
2Chronicles28:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ahaz in Topaʼ biakinn, kumpipaʼ inn le ulianteʼ inn panin van manphate la-in Assiria kumpipa tungah siah pia a, ahih hangin hihte khempeuh a kimanna om lo hi." 
2Chronicles28:22 Hih Kumpi Ahaz mah pen, a lungkham hunin Topaʼ tungah citak lo zaw lai hi." 
2Chronicles28:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a zo Damaskas-teʼ pasian-te tungah biakna pia-in, “Syria kumpiteʼ pasian-te in amaute huh ahih manin amaute in kei hong huh theih nadingun amauʼ tungah biakna ka pia ding hi,” ci hi. Ahih hangin tua pasian-te pen amah le a mipihte khempeuhʼ siatna ahi hi." 
2Chronicles28:24 Tua ciangin Ahaz in Pasianʼ biakinn-a umlebeelte khawmin satnen a, tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn kongkhakte a kalhcip hi. Tua ciangin ama adingin Jerusalem kiu khempeuh ah biakna tau a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles28:25 Amah in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui hal nadingin Judah khuapi khempeuh ah mual dawna biakpiaknate bawl a, a pu a pateʼ Pasian, Topa a heh nadingin a phin hi." 
2Chronicles28:26 Tu-in ama gamtatna a omlaite le a om zia khempeuh, a patna panin a tawpna dong, Judah le Israel Kumpiteʼ Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles28:27 Tua ciangin Ahaz si a, amaute in Jerusalem khuapi sungah vui uh a, ahi zongin Judah kumpite tawh vuikhawm lo uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Hezekiah in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nih le kua sung uk hi. Ama nuʼ min Abijah hi a, Zekhariahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
2Chronicles29:2 A pu Davidʼ hihnasa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ mitah a man gamta hi. 
2Chronicles29:3 Ama uk a kum khatna, a kha masa sungin amah in Topaʼ biakinn kongkhakte hongin tuate a puah hi." 
2Chronicles29:4 Amah in siampite le Levi mite paipihin nisuahna lam mun awngah amaute khawmin 
2Chronicles29:5 amaute kiangah, “Levi mite aw, ka thugen hong za un! Tu ni-in nomau kisiansuah unla, na pu na pate uh Pasian, Topaʼ biakinn siangthosakin a ninsak thei na khempeuh siangtho mun panin nawn khia un." 
2Chronicles29:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh i pute i pate citak lo a, Topa i Pasianʼ muhna ah a sia gamta uh hi. Amaute in amah nusia-in, Topa i Pasianʼ muhna ah a sia gamta uh hi. Amaute in amah nusia-in, Topaʼ teenna panin a mai uh hei khia uh a, a nung uh ngat uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:7 Amaute in innliim kongkhakte zong khakin meivakte sumit uh a, siangtho munah paknamtui halna le meihal biaknate Israel Pasian tungah bawl lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:8 Tua ahih ciangin Judah le Jerusalem tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung a, noteʼ mit mahmah tawh na muh uh mah bangin amah in amaute a cikzethuai, lamdangsakna le a dipkuathuai-in a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles29:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, hih thu hangin namsau-in i pu i pate puk uh a, i tapate, i tanute le i zite galmatin om uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:10 Tu-in a lauhuai a hehna eite tung pan a kiheikhiat theih nadingin Israel Pasian, Topa tawh thuciamna khat bawl ding ka lungsimah om hi." 
2Chronicles29:11 Ka tate aw, Topa in ama omna ah a ding ding, ama na a sem ding le ama nasemte hi-in ama tungah paknamtui a hal dingin note hong teel khin ahih manin tu-in mawk om kei un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles29:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite, Kohathʼ beh sung panin Amasaiʼ tapa Mahath le Azariahʼ tapa Joel; Merariʼ beh sung panin Abdiʼ tapa Kish le Jehallelelʼ tapa Azariah; Gershon beh sung panin Zimmahʼ tapa Joah le Joahʼ tapa Eden;" 
2Chronicles29:12 Tua ciangin Levi mite, Kohathʼ beh sung panin Amasaiʼ tapa Mahath le Azariahʼ tapa Joel; Merariʼ beh sung panin Abdiʼ tapa Kish le Jehallelelʼ tapa Azariah; Gershon beh sung panin Zimmahʼ tapa Joah le Joahʼ tapa Eden;" 
2Chronicles29:13 Elizafanʼ beh sung panin Shimri le Jeuel; Asafʼ beh sung panin Zekhariah le Mattaniah; 
2Chronicles29:14 Hemanʼ beh sung panin Jehiel le Shimei; Jeduthunʼ beh sung panin Shemaiah le Uzziel kipan uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:15 Amaute in a sanggamte uh khawmin amau kisiansuah uh a, Topaʼ genna tawh kumpipaʼ thupiak bangin Topaʼ biakinn a puahsiang dingin a tum uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:16 A puahsiang dingin Topaʼ biakinn sung tawng nung ah a siampite lut uh a, Topaʼ biakinn sunga a muh uh a nin khempeuh Topaʼ biakinn tual ah hong paikhiatpih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in la-in Kidron lui ah pua khia uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Kha masa a ni masa ni-in amaute in siansuah ding kipan uh a, tua kha a ni giat ni-in Topaʼ inn liimah amaute hong pai uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in ni giat sung Topaʼ biakinn siansuah uh a, a kha masa a ni sawm le guk ni-in zo uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah kiangah amaute tumin, “ Topaʼ biakinn khempeuh, meihal biakna tau le a nazatte khempeuh le Ompihna Anlum sabuai le a nazatte khempeuh ka puahsiang khin uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kumpi Ahaz a cihtak loh laitakin ama uk sungin a paihkhiat nazat khempeuh a baih sa-in bawlin ka siansuah uh hi. Topaʼ biakna tau mai ah tu-in tuate om hi,” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah tho baihin khuapi sung zaneite khawmin Topaʼ biakinn ah a pai to uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:21 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpi gam le biakinn le Judah adingin khialhna hanga biakna-in bawngtal sagih, tuutal sagih, tuuno sagih le keel sagih hong paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakna tau tungah tuate a pia dingin Aaronʼ suan siampite a sawl hi." 
2Chronicles29:22 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a bawngtalte go uh a, siampite in a sisan la-in biakna tau tungah theh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tuutalte go-in a sisan tawh biakna tau theh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in tuunote go-in a sisan tawh biakna tau theh uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:23 Tua ciangin khialhna hanga biak nading keeltal sagihte kumpipa le a kikhawmte kiangah hong kipaipih a, amaute in tuate tungah a khut uh nga hi;" 
2Chronicles29:24 tua ciangin Israel khempeuh adingin pum khat suahna bawl nadingin siampite in go-in tuateʼ sisan tawh biakna tau tungah khialhna hanga biakna a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel khempeuh adingin meihal biakna le khialhna hanga biakna a bawl ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. 
2Chronicles29:25 Tua ciangin amah in David le kumpipaʼ thumu pa Gad le kamsang Nathanʼ thupiakna bangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah daltuahte, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawh Levi mite a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua thupiakna pen kamsangteʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ kiang pan a hong pai ahi hi." 
2Chronicles29:26 Davidʼ lasaknate tawh Levi mite ding uh a, peengkulte tawh siampite ding uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:27 Tua ciangin biakna tau tungah meihal biakna a kipiak nading Hezekiah in thu a pia hi. Meihal biakna a kipat ciangin Topaʼ tungah lasakna zong kipan a, Israel kumpi Davidʼ lasaknate in peengkulte pawm hi." 
2Chronicles29:28 A kikhawm khempeuh in Pasian bia-in, lasate in la sa uh a, peengkul tumte in peengkul tum uh hi. Meihal biakna a kiman mateng hihte khempeuh hih paisuak uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:29 Biakpiakna a kiman ciangin kumpipa le amah tawh a om khempeuhte kunin Pasian a bia uh hi. 
2Chronicles29:30 Tua ciangin Davidʼ kammalte le thumu pa Asafʼ kammalte zangin Topaʼ tungah phatna la a sak nadingun kumpipa Hezekiah le uliante in Levi mite thu a pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh phatna late sa uh a, tua ciangin amaute kunin Pasian a bia uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:31 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in, “Tu-in Topaʼ tungah nomau mah na ki-ap khin uh hi. A nai ah hong pai unla Topaʼ biakinn ah biakpiaknate le lungdam piaknate hong paipih un,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte in biakpiaknate le lungdam piaknate hong paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin piak nopna lungsim a nei khempeuh in meihal biaknate hong paipih uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:32 A kikhawmte in a hong paipih meihal biakna a phazah bawngtal sawm sagih, tuutal za khat le tuuno za nih hi a, hihte khempeuh pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna khat ahi hi." 
2Chronicles29:33 A ki-ap biaknate bawngtal za guk le tuu tul thum ahi hi. 
2Chronicles29:34 Ahih hangin siampite a mi tawm lua uh ahih manin meihal biaknate khempeuh a vun hawk khinzo lo uh a, siampi dangte a kisiansuah ma sungteng, a sanggam uh Levi mite in nasep a kizawh mateng amaute huh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kisiansuahna thu ah siampite sangin Levi mite ngentel zaw uh hi." 
2Chronicles29:35 Meihal biakna a tampite banah thunuam a biakna thaute le meihal biakna adingin leenggahzu tawh biaknate om hi. Tua bangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah nasepna ki-omsakkik hi. 
2Chronicles29:36 Pasian in mite adingin a bawlsak thute hangin Hezekiah le mi khempeuh lungdam uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu thakhatin hong piang vat hi. 
2Chronicles30:1 Israel Pasian, Topaʼ Paisan Pawi a bawl dingin Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakinn ah hong pai nadingun Hezekiah in Israel mi khempeuh le Judah mite kiangah mi sawl a, Efraim mite le Manasseh mite tungah zong laikhakte a gelh hi." 
2Chronicles30:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa le a uliante le Jerusalem-a a kikhawm khempeuh in Paisan Pawi a kha nihna sungin bawl ding kikum khin uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:3 Siampite mi a kicing zah ding amau kisiansuah nai lo uh a, mite zong Jerusalem ah kikhawm nai lo uh ahih manin a hunin bawl thei lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:4 Hih geelna pen kumpipa le a kikhawm khempeuh adingin hoih leh kilawm hi. 
2Chronicles30:5 Tua ahih ciangin mite hong pai-in Israel Pasian, Topa adingin Jerusalem ah Paisan Pawi a bawl nadingun Beer-sheba panin Dan ciang dong Israel sung khempeuh ah taangkona khat a bawl nading uh thukhensatna khat bawl uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh bawl dinga a kigen bangin amaute in a lianpi-in bawl ngei lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:6 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa le a uliante kiang pan a laikhakte tawh Israel khempeuh le Judah sungah laikhakte tawh pai uh a, kumpipaʼ thupiakna: “Israel mite aw, Assiria kumpiteʼ khut sung panin a suakta, a om lai noteʼ lamah amah hong kiheikik theih nadingin Abraham, Isaac le Israel Pasian, Topaʼ lamah kiheikik un." 
2Chronicles30:7 Note in na theih uh bangin, amauʼ pute pateʼ Topa Pasianʼ tungah a cihtak lohna uh hangin nakpi takin gim a piak na pute na pate uh le na sanggamte uh bang kei un." 
2Chronicles30:8 Tu-in na pute na pate uh bangin lungkhauh kei unla, note kiang panin a lauhuai ama hehna a kiheikhiat theih nadingin Topaʼ lamah kipia unla, amah in a tawntung dingin a sianthosak sa a biakinn ah Topa na Pasian uh bia un." 
2Chronicles30:9 Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh Topaʼ lamah note na kilehkik uh leh, na sanggamte uh le na tate un amau a manteʼ tung panin hehpihna ngahin hih gamah hong ciahkik ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh dikna le hehpihna a nei hi a, ama lamah na kiheikik nak uh leh note kiang panin a maitang hei khia lo ding hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:10 Tua ahih ciangin Efraim le Manasseh gam sung khuapi khat pan khuapi khat le Zebulun ciang dongah laitaite a pai uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in na nuihsanin zahpih uh a, na simmawh bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:11 Asher mi, Manasseh le Zebulun mi tawm khat bek kiniamkhiatin Jerusalem ah hong pai uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:12 Topaʼ thupiakna tawh kumpipa le ulianteʼ sawlna a sem dingin Judah mite tungah Pasian in lungsim kikhatna a guan hi. 
2Chronicles30:13 Tua ciangin a kha nihna sungin silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl dingin Jerusalem ah mihon tampi tak hong pai uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:14 Amaute nasem dingin kipanin Jerusalem-a biakna taute hem khia uh a, paknamtui hal nading biakna taute khempeuh amaute in la khia-in Kidron kuamah paai uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Tua ciangin amaute in a kha nihna a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi. Tua ciangin biakna vai-in a siangtho nai lo siampite le Levi mite nakpi takin maizum uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amau mah kisiansuahin Topaʼ biakinn sungah meihal biaknate hong paipih uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:16 Pasianʼ mipa Mosesʼ thukham bangin amaute in amauʼ panmun ngei hong la uh a, siampite in Levi miteʼ khut tung panin a ngah uh sisan theh uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kikhawm lakah amau mah a kisiansuah nai lo tampi om uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ tungah a siangtho-in a kibawl nadingun a nin khempeuh adingin Levi mite in Paisan Pawi tuuno a gawh ding uh kisam hi. 
2Chronicles30:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi tampi tak, Efraim, Manasseh, Issakhar le Zebulun sung pan, amau mah kisiansuah nai lo uh a, ahi zongin ngeina lopi-in amaute in Paisan Pawi ne uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hezekiah in amaute adingin thu ngenin, “Ka pute ka pate uhʼ Pasian a dik Topa aw," 
2Chronicles30:19 biakinn sianthona ngeina om bangin lungsim tak tawh nang hong biate khempeuhʼ mawhna maisak in,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles30:20 Tua ciangin Topa in Hezekiahʼ thungetna pia-in miteʼ mawhna maisak a, gimna ngahsak lo hi." 
2Chronicles30:21 Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a om Israel mite in lungdamna lianpi tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite le siampite in a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Topa la sak uh a, a nini-in Topa phat uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:22 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topaʼ nasepna ah a siamna hoih uh a lak Levi mite khempeuh tungah hanthotna thu a gen hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in pawi an ni sagih sung ne uh a, thunuam a biakna pia-in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa tungah lungdamna a ko uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:23 Tua ciangin a dang ni sagih sung mah tua pawi a bawl thuah lai ding uh a kikhawm khempeuh thukim uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungdamna tawh a dang ni sagih sung mah bawl thuah uh hi. 
2Chronicles30:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in biakpiak nadingin a kikhawmte tungah bawngtal tul khat le tuu tul sagih pia a, uliante in a kikhawmte tungah bawngtal tul khat le tuu tul sawm pia uh hi. Siampite tampi tak amau mah kisiansuah uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:25 Judah mi a kikhawm khempeuh le siampite le Levi mite le Israel panin a hong paikhia a kikhawm khempeuh le Israel gam panin a hong paikhia peemtate le Judah gam sungah a teeng peemtate, lungdam uh hi." 
2Chronicles30:26 Israel kumpi Davidʼ tapa Solomon hun a kipanin Jerusalem ah hih bang omngei lo ahih manin Jerusalem ah lungdamna lianpi a om hi. 
2Chronicles30:27 Tua ahih ciangin siampite le Levi mite dingin mite thupha pia uh a, amauʼ awging kiza-in, amauʼ thungetna in vantung a a siangtho ama teenna a ban to hi." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tu-in hihte khempeuh a man ciangin, tua lai-a a om Israel khempeuh Judah khuapite ah pai-in biakna songte sat khamin Asherah milimte phukin, Judah le Benjamin sung le Efraim le Manasseh sunga mual dawna biakpiaknate le biakna taute a suksiat khit mateng uh phelkek uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh, a mikimin amauʼ inn omna a khuapi ciat uh ah a ciah uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:2 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in siampite le Levi mite amauʼ nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a khen a khenin seh a, siampite le Levi mite in meihal biaknate le thunuam a biakna te pia-in, Topaʼ biakinn sung phual tuamtuamte ah na semin lungdamkohna le phatna a bawl ding uh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:3 Kumpipa in ama neihsa sung panin a piakte pen meihal biak nading ahi hi. Topaʼ thukham sungah a kigelh mah bangin zing le nitak a meihal biaknate, Sabbath nite, Khadet nite le a kiseh pawite adingin meihal biaknate ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:4 Tua ciangin Topaʼ thukham om bangin nasepna ah siampite le Levi mite a kibup piak theih nadingun amauʼ ngah ding a kilawm nate, Jerusalem-a a teeng mite in amaute tungah a piak nadingun amah in a sawl hi." 
2Chronicles31:5 Tua thupiakna a kitheihthang phetin Israel mite in anpalte, leenggahzu le lo-a piang khempeuh tampi tak hong pia uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in na khempeuh sung pan sawm-ah-khat ahi tampi tak hong paipih uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Tua ciangin Judah khuapite sungah a teeng Israel mite le Judah mite in zong bawng le tuu sawm-ah-khat le Topa a Pasian uh tungah a kipia sa a ki-ap nate hong paipih uh a, a lom a lomin a koih uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:7 A kha thumna sungin amaute in tua a lomte cian ding kipan uh a, a kha sagihna sungin a man siang uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiah le uliante hong pai-in a lomte a muh uh ciangin amaute in Topa le ama mi Israel-te thupha a pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles31:9 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in a lomteʼ thu, siampite le Levi mite a dong hi." 
2Chronicles31:10 Zadokʼ suan ahi siampi lianpen pa Azariah in amah dawngin, “Amaute in amauʼ piakte uh Topaʼ biakinn sungah paipih ding hong kipat uh a kipan kote in an ka ne uh a, a kicing nei-in tampi val lai hi. Topa in ama mite thupha pia ahih manin hih na tampi a om lai i nei hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles31:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topaʼ biakinn sungah inn deite a bawl nading uh Hezekiah in thu pia a, amaute in zong a deite a bawl uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:12 Tua ciangin amaute in a piaknate, sawm-ah-khat le a ki-ap nate cihtakna tawh hong paipih uh hi. Tuate a en ulian pen pa Levi mi Konaniah hi a, a sanggampa Shimei pen amah a huhpa ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:13 Kumpipa Hezekiah le Pasianʼ biakinn ukpa Azariahʼ sehna tawh Jehiel, Azaziah, Nahath, Asahel, Jerimoth, Jozabad, Eliel, Ismakhiah, Mahath le Benaiah-te in Konaniah le a sanggampa Shimei huhin a ukte ahi uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:14 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kulh kongpi cing pa, Levi mi Imnah tapa Kore pen Topa ading le siangtho pen biak nadingin koihcing dingin a kipiate a seh khen dingin, Topaʼ tungah utthu-a piaknate a ukpa ahi hi." 
2Chronicles31:15 Eden, Miniamin, Jeshua, Shemaiah, Amariah le Shekaniah-te in siampiteʼ khuapi sungah a moi a ham a kibangin a khenkhenin, a ngah ding ciat a sanggamte uh tungah a hawm dingin cihtakna tawh amah huh uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:16 Khangsimna a amauʼ kiciaptehna tawh kisai-in a kipia hi tuan loin, a khenkhenin amauʼ panmun tawh kizui-in nisimin nasepna ah a kisam bangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a lut, kum thum le a tungsiah a pha pasal khempeuh tungah tanh kipia kim hi." 
2Chronicles31:17 Siampite a beh zui-in nasep kipia hi. Levi mi kum sawm nih le a tungsiahte a khenkhenin amauʼ panmun tawh kizui-in nasep kipia hi. 
2Chronicles31:18 Siampite a naupangte khempeuh, a zite, a tapate le a tanute uh tawh a mihon bupin kiciamteh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho-in a kikepna uh ah amaute citak uh hi." 
2Chronicles31:19 Amauʼ khuapite-aʼ ahi taanggam lote ah a om Aaronʼ suan siampite ading ahihleh, a kiciamteh siampiteʼ lak le Levi mite lakah pasal khempeuh tungah amauʼ ngah ding ciat a hawm khia dingin a minin a kiseh mi, khuapi tampite sungah a om hi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Tua bangin Hezekiah in Judah gam sung khempeuh ah hih hi. Amah in Topa a Pasianʼ mai ah a hoih le a manin gamta-in cihtakna tawh a sem hi. 
2Chronicles31:21 Amah in Pasianʼ biakinn sung nasepna le thukham le thupiaknate tawh kizui-in a hihna ah ama Pasian zongin, a lungsim khempeuh tawh sem a, a maa a vang hi." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hih thute khempeuh le citak a hih banga na a kisep khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib hong pai-in Judah simin kulh nei khuapiteʼ lang khat ah phual sat a, ama adingin lak a sawm hi." 
2Chronicles32:2 Sennakherib hong pai-in Jerusalem sim ding a sawmna thu Hezekiah in a theih ciangin," 
2Chronicles32:3 amah in a uliante le a mi thahatte tawh khuapi pua lamah a luang khia tuinakte khakcip ding vaihawm a, amaute in amah a huh uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:4 Mi tampi tak kikhawm uh a, gam sungah a luang tuinak le lui khempeuh khakcipin, “Bang hangin Assiria kumpite hong pai-in tui tampi mu ding ahi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:5 Amah in lungsim kho takin sep ding kipan a, a cim sa kulh khempeuh ciang pha-in tua tungah tausangte koih to a, tua pua lamah kulh dang khat a ciang hi. Amah in David khuapi sungah Millo a muanhuai-in a bawl pha hi. Amah in galhiamte le lumte zong tampi bawl hi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Amah in mite a uk dingin galdona ah a ukte koih a, khuapi kulh kongpi mun awnna ama kiangah amaute khawmin amaute tungah hanthotna tawh thu genin," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Thakhauh unla hang un. Assiria kumpipa le amah tawh a om mihon khempeuh mai ah lau kei unla, zong lungkia kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a omte sangin eite tawh a om pa lian zaw hi." 
2Chronicles32:8 Amah in mihing thahatna nei a, ahih hangin eite hong huhin i gal hong dosak dingin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in Judah kumpipa Hezekiahʼ kammalte a muang uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:9 Hih thute khit ciangin a galkap khempeuh tawh Lakhish a umcih, Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in Judah kumpipa Hezekiah le Jerusalem ah a om Judah mi khempeuh kiang Jerusalem ah a nasemte sawlin," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Note in Jerusalem umcihna na nan nading uh bang suang na hi uh hiam? 
2Chronicles32:11 Hezekiah in note kiangah, “Assiria kumpipaʼ khut panin Topa i Pasian in eite hong hon khia ding hi,” hong cih ciangin, note gilkial dangtakin a hong sisak dingin amah in note hong makai khial hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Hih Hezekiah mah in mual dawna a biakpiaknate le ama biakna taute la khia-in Judah le Jerusalem thu pia a, “Biakna tau khat mai ah note in bia-in tua tungah na biakpiaknate uh na hal ding uh hi,” ci hi lo ahi hiam?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Keimah le ka pu ka pate in gamdang mi khempeuh tungah ka hihna sate uh thei lo na hi uh hiam? Tua gam minamteʼ pasian in keima khut sung panin a gam uh hon khia zo ahi uh hiam? 
2Chronicles32:14 Na Pasian un keima khut sung panin note hong hotkhiat theih nadingin ka pu ka pate in a suksiat mang tua minamteʼ pasian khempeuh lakah kua in a mite hon khia zo ngei ahi hiam? 
2Chronicles32:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note, Hezekiahʼ khem sa-in ta kei unla, hih bangin kimakai khialsak kei un. Amah um kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh minam khatpeuh, kumpi gam khatpeuhʼ pasian in keima khut pan ahi a, ka pu ka pateʼ khut sung pan ahi zongin a mite hon khia zo ngei nai lo hi. Keima khut sung pan na Pasian un note hong hon khia zo lo zaw kan ding hi,’ ci un,” a cisak hi." 
2Chronicles32:16 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in Topa Pasian le a nasem pa Hezekiah langpangin thu tam zaw gen lai uh hi. 
2Chronicles32:17 Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian, Topaʼ heh nading le amah a langpanna-in laikhakte gelh a, “Ka khut sung panin a mite a hon khia zo lo gam sung minam dangteʼ pasian-te mah bangin ka khut sung panin Hezekiahʼ Pasian in a mite hon khia zo lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
2Chronicles32:18 Amaute in khuapi a lak theih nadingin khuapi mite lau-in a liinglawnsak nadingun kulh tungah a om Jerusalem mite tungah Judah pau tawh nakpi takin kiko uh hi. 
2Chronicles32:19 Amaute in, miteʼ khut tawh a kibawl leitung miteʼ pasian-te a gen bang lelun Jerusalem Pasian a gen uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah le Amozʼ tapa, kamsang Isaiah in hih thu hangin thu ngenin vantung lamah kiko uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa Hezekiah le Amozʼ tapa, kamsang Isaiah in hih thu hangin thu ngenin vantung lamah kiko uh hi." 
2Chronicles32:21 Tua ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipaʼ giahphual ah a thahat galhang khempeuh le galkap a ukte le uliante a susia vantungmi khat a sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama gamah maizumna tawh a ciahkik hi. Ama pasianʼ inn sungah amah a tun ciangin ama tapate pawl khat in namsau tawh amah sat lum uh hi. 
2Chronicles32:22 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa Sennakheribʼ khut le ama galte khempeuh panin Hezekiah le Jerusalem-a a teengte hon khia a, amah in mun khempeuh panin galdaihna amaute tungah a pia hi." 
2Chronicles32:23 Tua ciangin mi tampi in Jerusalem khua Topa kiangah letsongte hong puakin, Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah na manphate hong puak uh a, tua hun a kipanin minam khempeuhʼ muhna ah amah kisangtawi hi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Tua hun lai-in Hezekiah cina-in si dektak a, amah in Topaʼ tungah thu ngen hi. Topa in a ngetna pia-in ama tungah lim khat a pia hi." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ahih hangin a lungsim kiphasak ahih manin ama tungah phattuamna a kibawl zahin Topaʼ tungah Hezekiah in lungdam ko nuam lo hi. Tua ahih manin amah le Judah le Jerusalem tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung hi. 
2Chronicles32:26 Ahi zongin a nung ciangin Hezekiah a lungsim kiphatsakna thu ah amah le Jerusalem-a teeng mite tawh kiniamkhiat uh ahih manin amauteʼ tungah Topaʼ hehna hong tung lo hi. 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiah hau mahmah in a min thang mahmah hi. Amah in ngun, kham, suang manphate, a namtui nate, lumte, a manpha umlebeel khempeuh adingin van manpha koihnate a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles32:28 An, leenggahzu le sathau koih nading van koihnate zong a bawl hi. Ganhing nam khempeuh adingin ganbukte le tuubukte a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles32:29 Amah in tua bangmahin a mahmah adingin khuapite le tuuhonte le ganhonte tampi a koih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in ama tungah neihsa tampi tak pia hi. 
2Chronicles32:30 Hih Hezekiah mah in Gihon tui tungnungte khaktanin David khuapi nitumna lam pangah luangsak hi. Hezekiah a nasepna khempeuh ah a maa vang hi. 
2Chronicles32:31 Tua ahih ciangin gam sung om zia lim a kan dingin ama kiangah a kisawl Babylon ulianteʼ kamtaite tawh kisai-in, amah a ze-et nading le ama lungsim sungah bang om hiam cih a vekpi-in a theih nadingin Pasian in ama thu-in amah a omsak hi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Tu-in Hezekiahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama nasep hoihte, Judah le Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sung le Amozʼ Tapa, Kamsang Isaiahʼ Maangmuhna sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Tu-in Hezekiahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama nasep hoihte, Judah le Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sung le Amozʼ Tapa, Kamsang Isaiahʼ Maangmuhna sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles32:33 Tua ciangin Hezekiah si a, amaute in Davidʼ suanteʼ han paina mualpang ah amah vui uh hi. Judah mi khempeuh le Jerusalem-a teengte in a sih lai-in amah zahtakna bawl uh hi. Tua ciangin ama tapa Manasseh in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasseh in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm nga le nga sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:2 Topa in Israel minamteʼ mai ah a hawlkhiat minamteʼ zat a kihhuai gamtatnate mah bangin, Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi." 
2Chronicles33:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa Hezekiah in a suksiat sa mual dawna biakpiaknate amah in lamkikin, Baal-te adingin biakna taute phut a, Asherah milimte bawlin vantung nate khempeuh bia a, tuateʼ na sem hi." 
2Chronicles33:4 Topa in, “Jerusalem ah ka min om tawntung ding hi,” a cihna Topaʼ biakinn sungah amah in biakna taute a lam hi." 
2Chronicles33:5 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn tual nihte sungah vantung nate khempeuh adingin biakna taute lam hi. 
2Chronicles33:6 Tua ciangin amah in Hinnomʼ tapaʼ kuamah biakna-in a tapate hal a, aisanna le mailam thugen kholhna le khongkhaina zang a, vankah theite le aisante tawh nasem khawm hi. Amah in Topaʼ muhna ah siatna tampi bawl a, amah hehsak hi." 
2Chronicles33:7 Tua ciangin Pasian in David le a tapa Solomon tungah, “Amaute ka thupiak khempeuh, thukham khempeuh, ngeinate le Moses tungtawnin a kipia biakna ngeina kipte zuih ding a kidop nak uh leh, Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teelkhiat hih biakinn sung le Jerusalem sungah ka min ka koih tawntung ding hi. Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh adingin ka seh sa gam panin Israel-te ka khiin khia nawn kei ding hi,” a cih Pasianʼ biakinn sungah amah in ama bawl sa milim koih hi." 
2Chronicles33:8  
2Chronicles33:9 Manasseh in Judah le Jerusalem-a teengte zol ahih manin, Israel miteʼ mai ah Topa in a suksiat minamte sangin amaute a sia tam zaw gamta uh hi." 
2Chronicles33:10 Topa in Manasseh tung le ama mite tungah thu gen a, ahih hangin amaute in don lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles33:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipaʼ galkap ukte amauʼ kiangah paipih a, amaute in sikkawite tawh Manasseh manin sumngo khau tawh khihin Babylon ah a paipih uh hi." 
2Chronicles33:12 Amah a lungkham ciangin Topa a Pasian kunh-in a pu a pateʼ Pasianʼ mai ah nakpi takin a mahmah kiniamkhiat hi. 
2Chronicles33:13 Amah in ama kiangah thu ngen a, tua ciangin Pasian in ama kutna saangin, a thumna a ngai hi. Amah in Jerusalem ah amah paipihkikin a kumpi gam a piakik hi. Tua ciangin Topa pen Pasian ahihna Manasseh in a thei hi." 
2Chronicles33:14 Tua khit ciangin amah in kuam sung, Gihon nitumna lam, David khuapi ah, Ngasa Kongpi lutna lamah kulh pua nung khat ciang a, Ofel kiimah ciang suakin a sang mahmah in ciang to hi. Amah in Judah gam sunga kulh nei khuapi khempeuh ah zong galkap a ukte koih hi." 
2Chronicles33:15 Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn panin gamdang pasian-te le a milim la khia a, Topaʼ biakinn mual tung le Jerusalem-a ama lam sa biakna tau khempeuh la khia-in, khuapi pua lamah tuate paai hi." 
2Chronicles33:16 Amah in Topaʼ biakna tau zong koihkikin tua tungah thunuam a biakna le lungdamkohna a pia hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel Pasian, Topaʼ na a sep nadingun Judah-te thu a pia hi." 
2Chronicles33:17 Ahi zongin mite in mual dawna biakpiaknate ah biakna pia lai uh a, ahih hangin Topa amauteʼ Pasianʼ tung bek mahah a piak uh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles33:18 Tu-in Manassehʼ gamtatna a omlaite le a Pasianʼ tungah a thungetna le Israel Pasian, Topaʼ min tawh ama tungah thu a gen thumuteʼ thugente, Israel Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu sungah om hi." 
2Chronicles33:19 Tua ciangin ama thungetna le ama kutna Pasian in a sanna le ama khialhna le a cihtak lohna khempeuh le amah a kiniamkhiat ma-in mual dawna biakpiaknate bawlin Asherah-te le milim dangte a koihna munte thu, Thumuteʼ Khang Tangthu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Tua ciangin Manasseh si a, amaute in a inn sungah vui uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Amon in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amon in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nih pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum nih sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manassehʼ gamtatna sa khempeuh bangin Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Amon in a pa Manassehʼ bawl sa milim khempeuh tungah biakna pia a, tuateʼ na sem hi." 
2Chronicles33:23 A pa Manasseh a kiniamkhiat bangin Topaʼ mai ah amah kiniamkhiat lo a, hih Amon in mawhna tam piangsak semsem hi." 
2Chronicles33:24 Tua ciangin ama nasemte in amah sawm simin ama inn sungah amah that uh hi. 
2Chronicles33:25 Ahih hangin tua gam mite in Kumpi Amon a sawm sim khempeuh that leuleu uh hi. Tua ciangin tua gam mite in ama tangin a tapa Josiah kumpi-in a koih uh hi. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiah in uk ding a kipatin kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm thum le khat sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles34:2 Topaʼ mitah a man gamta a, a pu Davidʼ khekhap zui-in them khat zong lampial lo hi." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ama uk a kum giatna sung, naupang ahi laipi mahin, amah in a pu Davidʼ Pasian zon ding kipan hi. A kum sawm le kum nihna ciangin amah in Judah le Jerusalem panin mual dawna biaknate, Asherah milimte le a kiseek le a kisung milimte beisiangsak ding kipan hi." 
2Chronicles34:4 Tua ciangin amah in Baal-teʼ biakna taute ama muhna ah su paisak hi. Tua ciangin amah in tuate tungah a om paknamtui biakna taute phuk a, Asherah milimte le a kiseek le a kisung milimte sukhamin gawivui a, tuateʼ tungah biakna a pia miteʼ han tungah tua a vuite a theh hi." 
2Chronicles34:5 Amah in amauʼ biakna taute tungah a siampiteʼ guhte zong hal a, Judah le Jerusalem a siangsak hi." 
2Chronicles34:6 Tua ciangin Manasseh, Efraim le Simeon le Naftali khuapi ciang dong, mun awngte le a kiim a pam ah," 
2Chronicles34:7 amah in biakna taute sukhamin Asherah milimte le milim dangte satvui a, Israel gam sung khempeuh ah paknamtui biakna taute a satvui hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah a ciahkik hi." 
2Chronicles34:8 Tu-in ama uk a kum sawm le kum giatna, gam sung le biakinn a siansak khit ciangin, Topa a Pasianʼ biakinn a puah dingin amah in Azariahʼ tapa Shafan le khuapi sung ukpa Maaseiah le thuciamteh pa ahi, Joahazʼ tapa Joah a sawl hi." 
2Chronicles34:9 Siampi lianpen pa Hilkiah kiangah amaute hong pai uh a, kongcingte ahi Levi mite in Manasseh le Efraim le Israel a omlaite khempeuh le Judah le Benjamin khempeuh le Jerusalem-a a teeng mite tung panin a khop uh ahi, Pasianʼ biakinn ah a hong kipaipih sumte a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:10 Amaute in Topaʼ biakinn a vaan nasemte tungah tua sumte pia uh hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah a sem nasemte in biakinn puah nading le a ngei batsakkik nadingin pia uh hi. 
2Chronicles34:11 Amaute in a kito suangte lei nading le Judah kumpite in a siatsak, tep nadingin singte le biakinn lam nadingin innkamte lei nadingin khutsiamte le innlamte tungah a sumte a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:12 Tua ciangin mite in cihtakna tawh na sem uh hi. Amaute tungah a en dingin Levi mi Merari-te beh sung pan Jahath le Obadiah le Kohath-te beh sung pan Zekhariah le Meshullam kikoih hi. Levi mi, lasakna nazatte ah siamna a nei khempeuh," 
2Chronicles34:12 Tua ciangin mite in cihtakna tawh na sem uh hi. Amaute tungah a en dingin Levi mi Merari-te beh sung pan Jahath le Obadiah le Kohath-te beh sung pan Zekhariah le Meshullam kikoih hi. Levi mi, lasakna nazatte ah siamna a nei khempeuh," 
2Chronicles34:13 van gik puate a uk le nasep namkim a sem khempeuh a makaih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mi pawl khatte pen laigelhte le zaneite le kulh kongpi cingte ahi hi. 
2Chronicles34:14 Amaute in Topaʼ biakinn ah a kipaipih sumte a lakkhiat laitakun siampi Hilkiah in Moses tungtawnin a kipia thukham laibu a mu hi.
