2Chronicles34:15 Tua ciangin Hilkiah in lai-at pa Shafan kiangah, “ Topaʼ biakinn sungah thukham laibu ka mu hi,” ci hi. Tua ciangin Hilkiah in Shafan tungah a laibu pia hi." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafan in kumpipa kiangah a laibu paipihin ama kiangah, “Na nasemte tungah a kipia khempeuh amaute in a sep san laitak uh ahi hi." 
2Chronicles34:17 Topaʼ biakinn sungah a kikoih sumte amaute in la khia-in nasep vaante le nasemte tungah pia uh hi,” ci-in gen thuah lai hi." 
2Chronicles34:18 Tua ciangin lai-at pa Shafan in kumpipa kiangah, “Siampi Hilkiah in kei tungah laibu khat hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Shafan in kumpipa mai ah tua laibu a sim hi." 
2Chronicles34:19 Kumpipa in thukham kammalte a zak ciangin a puante bal kek hi. 
2Chronicles34:20 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Hilkiah, Shafanʼ tapa Ahikam, Mikahʼ tapa Abdon, lai-at pa Shafan le kumpipaʼ nasem pa Asaiah thu pia-in," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Pai unla, a kimu laibu sunga kammalte tawh kisai-in keima ading le Israel le Judah ah a om lai mite adingin Topa thu va dong un; bang hang hiam cih leh i pu i pate in hih laibu sungah a kigelh khempeuh bangin sep ding Topaʼ kammal na zui lo uh ahih manin eite tungah Topaʼ hehna lian hi,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles34:22 Tua ahih ciangin Hilkiah le kumpipa in a sawl mite, Hasrah, a tapa Tokhath, a tapa Shallum, biakinn puante a kem paʼ zi ahi kamsangnu Huldah kiangah pai-in (tu-in tua nu Jerusalem sung a Veeng Nihna ah teeng hi) tua thu tawh kisai ama kiangah va gen uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:23 Tua ciangin tua nu in amaute kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah note a hong sawl pa kiangah gen un." 
2Chronicles34:24 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, Judah kumpipa mai ah a kisim laibu sunga kigelh samsiatnate khempeuh ahi siatna, hih mun le a tungah a teeng mi khempeuh tungah ka tungsak ding hi." 
2Chronicles34:25 Amaute in amauʼ gamtatna tawh kei hong hehsak theih nadingun amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui hal uh ahih manin hih mun tungah ka hehna kisungin dai lo ding hi. 
2Chronicles34:26 Ahih hangin Topa thu a dong dingin note a hong sawl Judah kumpipa tungah hih bangin na gen ding uh hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na zak sa thute tawh kisai-in," 
2Chronicles34:27 hih mun le a tunga teengte langpanna ama kammal na zak ciangin na lungsim kisikin Pasianʼ mai ah na kiniamkhiat a, keima mai ah nang kiniamkhiatin na puante bal kekin ka mai ah kap na hih manin, kei zong nang kong za hi, Topa in ci hi." 
2Chronicles34:28 Na pate kiang kong zuansak dinga, hih mun le a tunga teengte tungah ka tunsak ding siatna khempeuh na mit in mu lo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah a thu puakkik uh hi." 
2Chronicles34:29 Tua ciangin kumpipa in mi sawlin Judah le Jerusalem upa khempeuh kaikhawm hi. 
2Chronicles34:30 Tua ciangin kumpipa, Judah mite le Jerusalem-a a teeng mite, siampite le Levi mite le mi khempeuh a lian a neu tawh, Topaʼ biakinn ah pai to uh hi. Tua ciangin amah in Topaʼ biakinn sungah a kimu thuciamna laibu sunga thute khempeuh amauʼ zakin a sim hi." 
2Chronicles34:31 Tua ciangin kumpipa ama munah dingin, hih laibu sungah a kigelh thuciamna kammalte a sem dingin a lungsim khempeuh le a nuntakna khempeuh tawh Topaʼ nung a zuih nading le ama thupiaknate, ama teci pannate le a thukhamte a zuih nading, Topaʼ mai ah thuciamna khat a bawl hi." 
2Chronicles34:32 Tua ciangin amah in Jerusalem le Benjamin sunga a om mi khempeuh hih thu a zuisak hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-a teeng mite zong amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian ahi Pasianʼ thuciamna bangin a gamta uh hi. 
2Chronicles34:33 Tua ciangin Josiah in Israel miteʼ neihsa gam sung khempeuh panin a kihhuaite khempeuh la khia a, Israel sunga om mi khempeuh Topa amauteʼ Pasianʼ na a semsak hi. Ama nuntak sung khempeuh amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian ahi Topa zuihna panin amaute kihei khia lo uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:1 Josiah in Topa adingin Jerusalem ah Paisan Pawi bawl hi. Amaute in a kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi tuuno go uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:2 Amah in siampite amauʼ panmunte ah seh a, Topaʼ biakinn sunga nasepna ah amaute hanthawn hi." 
2Chronicles35:3 Tua ciangin amah in Israel khempeuh hilhin Topaʼ tungah a siangtho Levi mite tungah, “Israel kumpipa, Davidʼ tapa Solomon in a lam biakinn sungah Thuciamna Singkuang siangtho koih un. Na liangko tung uh ah na puak ding uh kisam nawn lo hi. Tu-in Topa na Pasian uh le ama mi Israel-teʼ na sem un." 
2Chronicles35:4 Note a khenkhenin na beh uh tawh kizui-in kithawi unla, Israel kumpipa Davidʼ lamlahna le a tapa Solomonʼ lamlahna zui un." 
2Chronicles35:5 Tua ciangin mi nautang na sanggamte uh beh kikhenna tawh kizui-in siangtho munah ding uh henla, Levi minam beh tuamtuamte sung pan kihelkim un." 
2Chronicles35:6 Tua ciangin Paisan Pawi bawlna ganhing go-in nomau mah kisiansuah unla, Mosesʼ tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen bangin na sanggamte uh adingin kithawi un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles35:7 Tua ciangin Josiah in tua lai-a a om mi khempeuhte adingin Paisan Pawi piakna-in a gan hon panin mi nautangte tungah tuunote le keelnote tul sawm thum ciang dong le bawngtal tul thum a pia hi. Hihte pen kumpipaʼ neihsa sung pan a kipia ahi hi. 
2Chronicles35:8 Tua ciangin ama uliante in zong utna lungsim tawh mite tung, siampite tung le Levi mite tungah a pia uh hi. Pasianʼ biakinn ah ulianpite ahi Hilkiah, Zekhariah le Jehiel-te in siampite tungah Paisan Pawi bawl nadingin tuuno le keel no tul nih le za guk le bawngtal za thum a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:9 Levi mi ukpite Konaniah, Shemaiah le a sanggam Nethanel, Hashabiah, Jeiel le Jozabad-te in Paisan Pawi piak nadingin Levi mite tungah tuuno le keel no tul nga le bawngtal za nga a pia uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:10 Nasep nading a kithawi khit uh ciangin, siampite amauʼ munah ding uh a, kumpipaʼ thupiakna bangin Levi mite amauʼ khen sungah om uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Paisan tuuno go uh a, Levi mite in a vun a hawk laitakun siampite in amauʼ tung panin a ngah uh sisan a theh uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Topaʼ tungah piak dingin mi nautang sungah a innkuan a pawlpawl tawh kizui-in a hawm theih nadingun meihal biaknate a tuam koih uh hi. Tua bangin amaute in bawngtalte zong a hih uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:13 Tua ciangin amaute in biakna ngeina kip tawh kizui-in Paisan tuuno sa mei ah a hang uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in beel sung, beel pi sung le sikbeel daite sungah a siangtho piaknate huan uh a, mi nautang khempeuh kiangah tuate manlang takin a puak uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:14 Tua khit ciangin amau ading le siampite adingin amau mah in a sa bawl uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Aaronʼ suan siampite zankim ciang dong meihal biakna pia-in manlah uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in amau ading le Aaronʼ suan siampite adingin a sa bawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:15 Davidʼ thupiak bangin Asafʼ behte ahi lasate le Asaf le Heman le kumpipaʼ thumu pa Jeduthun-te amauʼ munah om uh hi. Kulh kongpi cingte a kulh kongpi ciatah om uh a, amauʼ sanggam Levi mite in amau adingin sa bawlsak uh ahih manin amauʼ nasepna pan amaute a paikhiat ding uh kisam lo hi." 
2Chronicles35:16 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Josiahʼ thupiakna bangin Paisan Pawi bawl nading le Topaʼ biakna tau tungah meihal biaknate piak nadingin tua ni-in Topaʼ nasep nading khempeuh a kithawi uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:17 Tua lai ah a om Israel mite in tua hunin Paisan Pawi le Silngo Sawh loh Anlum Pawi ni sagih sung a bawl uh hi. 
2Chronicles35:18 Kamsang Samuel huna kipan Israel sungah tua bang Paisan Pawi kibawl ngei lo hi. Josiah le siampite le Levi mite le tua lai ah a om Judah le Israel mi khempeuh le Jerusalem-a a teeng mite in a bawl Paisan Pawi tawh a kibang, Israel kumpite kuamah in bawl ngei lo hi." 
2Chronicles35:19 Josiahʼ uk a kum sawm le kum giatna kumin hih Paisan Pawi kibawl hi. 
2Chronicles35:20 Hih thute khempeuh khit, Josiah in biakinn a bawl khit ciangin, Eufratis gun gei Karkhemish ah galsim dingin Egypt kumpipa Neko hong kuan to a, amah a do dingin Josiah a kuan khia hi." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ahih hangin Neko in ama kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Judah kumpipa aw, ei tegel khatlekhat i kihihna ding bang om ahi hiam? Tu-in nang a sim dingin hong kuan ka hi kei a, ka galte a sim dingin a hong kuan ka hi hi. Ka kinawhna ding Pasian in kei tungah thu hong pia khin hi. Kei tawh a om khawm Pasian na nialna khawl in. Tua hikeileh nang hong susia ding hi,” cisak hi." 
2Chronicles35:22 Ahi zongin ama kiang panin Josiah kihei khia nuam lo a, amah tawh a kido theih nadingin a mel kiseel hi. Amah in Nekoʼ kam pan a Pasianʼ thugente ngai lo a, Megiddo zanglei a gal kidona ah va pawm hi." 
2Chronicles35:23 Tua ciangin thaltawite in Kumpi Josiah kap hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Nakpi takin liam ka hih manin kei hong paikhiatpih un,” a ci hi." 
2Chronicles35:24 Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in leeng sung panin amah la khia-in ama leeng nihna sungah amah pua-in Jerusalem ah a paipih uh hi. Tua ciangin amah si a, a pateʼ han sungah kivui hi. Judah gam le Jerusalem khuami khempeuh Josiahʼ hangin kap uh hi." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiah in zong Josiahʼ hangin kah la a phuak hi. Numei lasate le pasal lasate khempeuh in tu ni dongin amauʼ kahna ah Josiah tamlawh uh hi. Amaute in Israel sungah hih thu biakna ngeina kipin a bawl uh hi. Kah la sungah tuate kikhum hi. 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiah in zong Josiahʼ hangin kah la a phuak hi. Numei lasate le pasal lasate khempeuh in tu ni dongin amauʼ kahna ah Josiah tamlawh uh hi. Amaute in Israel sungah hih thu biakna ngeina kipin a bawl uh hi. Kah la sungah tuate kikhum hi. 
2Chronicles35:26 Tu-in Josiahʼ gamtatna a omlaite le Topaʼ thukham sungah a kigelh bangin a nasep hoihte," 
2Chronicles35:27 le ama gamtatna, a masa le a nunungte, Israel le Judah Kumpiteʼ Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
2Chronicles36:1 Tua gam mite in Josiahʼ tapa Jehoahaz la-in Jerusalem ah a paʼ tangin kumpi-in a koih uh hi. 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahaz in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le thum pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kha thum sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles36:3 Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipa in Jerusalem ah amah zakiasak a, siah ngun talen za khat le kham talen khat, tua gam kipiasak hi." 
2Chronicles36:4 Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipa in Judah le Jerusalem tungah a ukin Jehoahazʼ sanggampa Eliakim koih a, ama min Jehoiakim-in kheelsak hi. Ahih hangin Neko in a sanggampa Jehoahaz la-in Egypt ah a paipih hi." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakim in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le nga pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi. Topa a Pasian mai ah amah a sia gamta hi." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar amah a simin hong kuan to a, Babylon ah a paipih dingin amah kol bulh hi." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukhadnezzar in Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel pawl khatte zong Babylon ah pua-in Babylon-a a kumpi inn ah tuate a koih hi. 
2Chronicles36:8 Tu-in Jehoiakimʼ gamtatna a omlaite le ama hih a kihhuaite le amah a hoih lohna a kimute, Israel le Judah Kumpiteʼ Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jehoiakhin in ama tangin a uk hi." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakhin in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm le kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kha thum le ni sawm sung uk hi. Topaʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi." 
2Chronicles36:10 Tua kum khuakhal sungin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in mi sawlin Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel manphate tawh amah Babylon ah lasak a, Judah le Jerusalem tungah Jehoiakhinʼ sanggampa Zedekiah kumpi-in a koih hi." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawm nih le khat pha a, amah in Jerusalem ah kum sawm le kum khat sung uk hi." 
2Chronicles36:12 Topa a Pasianʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Topaʼ kammal a gen sawn kamsang Jeremiah mai ah amah kiniamkhiat lo hi. 
2Chronicles36:12 Topa a Pasianʼ muhna ah amah a sia gamta hi. Topaʼ kammal a gen sawn kamsang Jeremiah mai ah amah kiniamkhiat lo hi. 
2Chronicles36:13 Pasian tawh amah a kiciamsak kumpi Nebukhadnezzar zong amah in lehdo hi. Israel Pasian, Topaʼ kiang zuankik nuam lo a, zong kisik nuam loin a lung khauhsak hi." 
2Chronicles36:14 A makai siampite le mi khempeuh zong tua bangmahin citak lo mahmah uh a, minam dangteʼ kihhuainate zui uh hi. Amah in Jerusalem ah a siangtho-in a koih Topaʼ biakinn amaute in ninsak uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:15 A mite le ama teenna mun khasiat ahih manin amauʼ pute pateʼ Pasian, Topa in a kamtaite amaute kiangah sawl teitei hi." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ahih hangin a mite tungah Topa a heh ciang dong, a hehna a kidamsak zawh nawn loh ciang dongin amaute in Pasianʼ kamtaite zahpihin, a thute simmawhin, a kamsangte thusim lo niloh uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:17 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Khaldea miteʼ kumpipa amauteʼ lang khat ah paipih a, tua kumpipa in amauʼ Pasianʼ biakinn sung nangawn ah namsau tawh a tangvalte uh that a, numei pasal, a moi a ham, a dam a na, kuamah khasiat lo hi. Pasian in a vekpi-in ama khut sungah a pia hi." 
2Chronicles36:18 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn-a umlebeel khempeuh a lian a neu le Topaʼ biakinn-a van manphate le kumpipa le a ulianteʼ van manphate khempeuh amah in Babylon ah paipih hi. 
2Chronicles36:19 Tua ciangin amaute in Pasianʼ biakinn halin Jerusalem khua susia uh a, a kumpi inn khempeuh mei tawh halin umlebeel a manpha khempeuh a susia uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:20 Amah in namsau panin a suakta mite Babylon ah salin la a, Persia kumpi in a uk hun mateng amah le a suanlekhakteʼ nasem a suak uh hi." 
2Chronicles36:21 Tua sungin Israel leitang in a sabbath-te a kicingin na tang hi. Kamsang Jeremiah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen a tun nadingin kum sawm sagih a cin nadingin leitang a kinusiat sung khempeuh leitang in sabbath tawlngakna a nei ahi hi. 
2Chronicles36:21 Tua sungin Israel leitang in a sabbath-te a kicingin na tang hi. Kamsang Jeremiah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen a tun nadingin kum sawm sagih a cin nadingin leitang a kinusiat sung khempeuh leitang in sabbath tawlngakna a nei ahi hi. 
2Chronicles36:22 Tu-in Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ kum khatna kumin, Jeremiahʼ kam pan a Topaʼ thugen a tun theih nadingin, Topa in Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ lungsim hanthawn a, amah in a kumpi gam sung khempeuh ah taangkona khat bawl a, lai-in zong a gelh hi. A lai gelhna ah," 
2Chronicles36:22 Tu-in Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ kum khatna kumin, Jeremiahʼ kam pan a Topaʼ thugen a tun theih nadingin, Topa in Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ lungsim hanthawn a, amah in a kumpi gam sung khempeuh ah taangkona khat bawl a, lai-in zong a gelh hi. A lai gelhna ah," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Persia kumpipa Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Vantung Pasian, Topa in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh kei hong pia khin a, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua ah ama adingin biakinn khat ka lamsak ding hong sawl hi. Note lakah ama mi ahi khempeuh, Topa a Pasian uh in ompih tahen. Biakinn lam dingin Jerusalem ah amaute paitosak un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra1:1 Persia kumpi Sairasʼ uk kum khatna kumin, Jeremiah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen a tun theih nadingin, ama gam sung khempeuh ah taangkona khat bawlin lai-in zong a gelh nadingin Persia kumpi Sairasʼ lungsimah Topa in a suaksak hi. Amah in hih bangin a hih hi:" 
Ezra1:1 Persia kumpi Sairasʼ uk kum khatna kumin, Jeremiah tungtawnin Topaʼ thugen a tun theih nadingin, ama gam sung khempeuh ah taangkona khat bawlin lai-in zong a gelh nadingin Persia kumpi Sairasʼ lungsimah Topa in a suaksak hi. Amah in hih bangin a hih hi:" 
Ezra1:2 “Persia kumpi Sairas in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung Pasian, Topa in leitung kumpi gam khempeuh keima tungah hong pia khin a, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua ah ama adingin biakinn khat ka lamsak ding hong sawl hi." 
Ezra1:3 Note lakah ama mi peuhmah a Pasian in ompih henla, Judah gam sung Jerusalem khua ah pai to henla, Israel Pasian, Topaʼ biakinn lamkik hen. Amah pen Jerusalem ah a om Pasian ahi hi." 
Ezra1:4 Tua ciangin koi lai mun koi lai gam a om hitaleh Judah mi a om lai khempeuh, ama omna mun mite in Jerusalem-a om Pasianʼ biakinn adingin utthu-a a piakte uh banah, ngun le kham, nate le ganhingte tawh zong huh ciat uh hen,” a ci hi." 
Ezra1:5 Tua ciangin Judah le Benjamin sunga innkuan lutangte le siampite le Levi mite, Jerusalem khua-a om Topaʼ biakinn a lamkik dingin a lungsim sung uh ah Pasian in a suahsak mite khempeuh kithawi uh hi." 
Ezra1:6 Tua ciangin a veeng a pamte in thatang tawh a huh uh banah ngun tawh kibawl umlebeel, kham, van tuamtuamte, ganhingte le letsong manphate tawh huh thuah lai uh hi." 
Ezra1:7 Tua tham loin, Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin pua khia-in ama pasian-teʼ biakinn sungah a koih sa ahi Topaʼ biakinn-a omngei umlebeelte zong kumpipa Sairas in pusuah hi." 
Ezra1:8 Persia kumpi Sairas in hihte pusuah in sumkem pa Mithredathʼ khut sungah ap hi. Tua pa in Judah ukpa Sheshbazzar adingin a malzah simin sazian bawlsak hi. 
Ezra1:9 Tua nate a phazah: Kham kuang tul khat, ngun kuang tul khat, umlebeel a nam tuamtuam sawm nih le kua," 
Ezra1:10 kham kuang-uk sawm thum, ngun kuang-uk a nam tuamtuam za li sawm khat, le umlebeel a dang tul khat ahi hi." 
Ezra1:11 Kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte khempeuh a vekpi-in tul nga za li sawm guk kua pha hi. Tua hi a, Babylon panin salte a kiciahpihkik ciangin Sheshbazzar in tua nate khempeuh Jerusalem ah a ciahpih hi." 
Ezra2:1 Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin Babylon ah salin a lakte sung panin hih mite Jerusalem le Judah ah a ciahkikte hi a, amauʼ khua ciatah a ciah uh ahi hi." 
Ezra2:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum le Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel mi phazahte:" 
Ezra2:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum le Baanah-te makai-in tua mite a ciahpih uh hi. Israel mi phazahte:" 
Ezra2:3 Parosh suante - tul nih za khat sawm sagih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:4 Shefatiah suante - za thum sawm sagih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:5 Arah suante - za sagih sawm sagih le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:6 Pahathmoab beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - tul nih za giat sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:7 Elam suante - tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:8 Zattu suante - za kua sawm li le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:9 Zakkai suante - za sagih sawm guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:10 Bani suante - za guk sawm li le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:11 Bebai suante - za guk sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:12 Azgad suante - tul khat za nih sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:13 Adonikam suante - za guk sawm guk le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:14 Bigvai suante - tul nih sawm nga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:15 Adin suante - za li sawm nga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:16 Ater a kici Hezekiah suante - sawm kua le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:17 Bezai suante - za thum sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:18 Jorah suante - za khat sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:19 Hashum suante - za nih sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:20 Gibbar suante - sawm kua le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:21 Bethlehem khuami - za khat sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:22 Netofah khuami - sawm nga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:23 Anathoth khuami - za khat sawm nih le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:24 Beth-azmaveth khuami - sawm li le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:25 Kiriath-jearim khua, Khefirah khua le Beeroth khuami - za sagih sawm li le thum ahi hi." 
Ezra2:26 Ramah khua le Geba khuami - za guk sawm nih le khat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:27 Mikmash khuami - za khat sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:28 Bethel khua le Ai khuami - za nih sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:29 Nebo khuami - sawm nga le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:30 Magbish khuami - za khat sawm nga le guk ahi hi. 
Ezra2:31 Elam a dang khat suante - tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:32 Harim suante - za thum sawm nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:33 Lod khua, Hadid khua le Ono khuami - za sagih sawm nih le nga ahi hi." 
Ezra2:34 Jerikho khuami - za thum sawm li le nga ahi hi. 
Ezra2:35 Senaah gam mi - tul thum za guk sawm thum ahi uh hi. 
Ezra2:36 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - za kua sawm sagih le thum ahi hi. 
Ezra2:37 Immer suante - tul khat sawm nga le nih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:38 Pashhur suante - tul khat za nih sawm li le sagih ahi hi. 
Ezra2:39 Harim suante - tul khat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi. 
Ezra2:40 Levi mite sung panin: Hodaviah-te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawm sagih le li ahi hi. 
Ezra2:41 Lasate sung panin Asafʼ suante - za khat sawm nih le giat ahi hi. 
Ezra2:42 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante, Akkub suante, Hatita suante le Shobai suante, a vekpi-in - za khat sawm thum le kua ahi hi." 
Ezra2:43 Biakinn nasemte sung panin Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante," 
Ezra2:44 Keros suante, Siaha suante, Padon suante," 
Ezra2:45 Lebanah suante, Hagabah suante, Akkub suante," 
Ezra2:46 Hagab suante, Shamlai suante, Hanan suante," 
Ezra2:47 Giddel suante, Gahar suante, Reaiah suante," 
Ezra2:48 Rezin suante, Nekoda suante, Gazzam suante," 
Ezra2:49 Uzza suante, Paseah suante, Besai suante," 
Ezra2:50 Asnah suante, Meunim suante, Nefisim suante," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante," 
Ezra2:52 Bazluth suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante," 
Ezra2:53 Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante," 
Ezra2:54 Neziah suante le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi. 
Ezra2:55 Solomonʼ nasemte nam sung panin: Sotai suante, Hassofereth suante, Peruda suante," 
Ezra2:56 Jaalah suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante," 
Ezra2:57 Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokhereth-hazzebaim suante le Ami suante ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:58 Biakinn nasemte khempeuh le Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhak khempeuh a vekpi-in za thum sawm kua le nih a pha uh hi. 
Ezra2:59 Temelah, Teharsha, Kherub, Addan le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik, Israel mi hi napi-in amauʼ behlephung a kan thei lo mite:" 
Ezra2:60 Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante le Nekoda suante, mi za guk sawm nga le nih ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:61 Siampite sung panin zong: Habaiah suante, Hakkoz suante le Barzillai suante (amah in Gilead mi Barzillai tanute khat teen pihin tua min tawh a kilo pah) ahi uh hi." 
Ezra2:62 Hih mite in khang kiciaptehna ah amauʼ min a zon uh hangin amauʼ min na om lo ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a, siampi nasep semsak thei lo uh hi." 
Ezra2:63 Urim le Thummim aisanna tawh ai a san ding siampi khat a om mateng amaute in biakna an siang pente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpa in a gen hi. 
Ezra2:64 Mi a vekpi - tul sawm li le tul nih le za thum sawm guk pha uh a," 
Ezra2:65 amauteʼ nasem numei le pasal mihing - tul sagih le za thum sawm thum le sagihte kisim lo hi. Amaute in lasa numei le pasal mihing za nih nei uh hi. 
Ezra2:66 Amauʼ sakolte - za sagih sawm thum le guk, amauʼ la-sakol - za nih sawm li le nga," 
Ezra2:67 amauʼ kalaoh - za li sawm thum le nga, le a la uh - tul guk za sagih le sawm nih pha hi." 
Ezra2:68 Amaute Jerusalem-a Topaʼ biakinn a tun uh ciangin Pasianʼ biakinn ama mun ngei ah lamkik nadingin innkuan lutangte pawl khat in Pasianʼ biakinn adingin piakna bawl uh hi. 
Ezra2:69 Amaute in a hih zawhna zah uh tawh kizui-in tua nasep nadingin van manpha koihna ah kham darik tul sawm guk le tul khat, ngun mina tul nga le siampi puan za khat a pia uh hi." 
Ezra2:70 Siampite, Levi mite le mi pawl khatte Jerusalem le a kiim nai ah teeng uh hi. Lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte le Israel mi khempeuh amauʼ khuapi ciatah a teeng uh hi." 
Ezra3:1 A kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh ahih manin, khekhat khai bangin Jerusalem ah hong kituah diam uh hi." 
Ezra3:2 Tua ciangin Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua le a siampipihte le Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel le a behte hong kipan uh a, Pasianʼ mi Moses thukham sungah a kigelh bangin meihal biaknate piak nadingin Israel Pasian biakna tau a bawl uh hi." 
Ezra3:3 Amaute in tua gam a midang a teengte kihta uh ahih manin a mun lui mahah biakna tau phut pahin zing le nitak simin Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna a pia uh hi. 
Ezra3:4 Tua ciangin amaute in a kikipsak sa bangin buk pawi bawl uh a, nisimin zat dingin a kiseh sa zah bangin meihal biakna nisimin a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:5 Tua ciangin hihte banah a tawntung a meihal biakna, Khadet sim a biakna le Topaʼ pawi a kiseh sa hun khempeuh le Topaʼ tungah amauʼ utthu tawh a pia mite khempeuhʼ biaknate zong a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:6 Topaʼ biakinnpi a bul a kiphuh nai loh hangin a kha sagihna a ni masa ni a kipanin amaute in Topaʼ tungah meihal biaknate piak ding kipan uh hi. 
Ezra3:7 Tua hi a, amaute in suangseekte le khutsiamte tungah sum pia uh a, Persia kumpi Sairasʼ tung panin a thu ngahna bangun Lebanon mual tung gam panin tuipi gei Joppa khua ah taamtak singte a hong puak suk ding Sidon khua mite le Taia khua mite tungah zong an nek tui dawn le sathau a pia uh hi." 
Ezra3:8 Amaute, Jerusalem khua-a Pasianʼ biakinn ah a hong ciahkik uh a kum nihna, tua kum a kha nihna sungin Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua, nasep kipan uh a, a Israel mipihte, siampite, Levi mite le salsuahna panin Jerusalem ah a hong ciahkik mite khempeuh in zong a huh uh hi. Amaute in Levi mite kum sawm nih panin a tungsiah peuhmah Topaʼ biakinn sungah biakna nasepte a vaan dingin a seh uh hi." 
Ezra3:9 Jeshua a tapate le a behte tawh le Hodaviah-te beh Kadmiel le a tate in Henadadʼ tapate le Levi mi a tapate uh le a behte uh tawh Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasemte tungah ukna tavuan a la khawm uh hi. 
Ezra3:10 Innlamte in Topaʼ biakinn a bul a phuh uh ciangin, Israel kumpipa David in a geel kholh sa bangin Topa a phat dingin siampite in a puan uh silhin peengkul tawh, Asafʼ tapa Levi mite daltuah tawh a panmun ding uh ah hong pang uh hi." 
Ezra3:11 Tua ciangin amaute in Topa phatna le lungdamkohna a kidawngin sa uh a, “ Topa hoih hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te hong itna kip tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi. Topaʼ biakinn bulpi kiphut khin ahih manin mi khempeuh in nakpi takin Topa phat uh hi." 
Ezra3:12 Midang tampi lungdamin a aw neih zahun a kiko uh hangin a biakinn masa a mu ngeisa siampite, Levi mite le innkuan lutang, midang tampite in hih biakinn bulpi a kiphuh a muh uh ciangin kapin a thum uh hi." 
Ezra3:13 Mite nakpi takin kiko ahih manin lungdamna awging le kahna le thumna awgingte mite in khen thei lo uh hi. Gamlapi pek panin tua awgingte a kiza hi. 
Ezra4:1 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mite in Israel Pasian Topa adingin biakinn khat a lamna thu Judah le Benjamin miteʼ galte in a zak uh ciangin 
Ezra4:2 Zerubbabel, Jeshua le innkuan lutangte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah, “Biakinn lamna ah ko zong hong kihelsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh note mah bangin ko zong na Pasian uh ka bia uh a, hih lai ah kote hong koih Assiria kumpipa Esar-haddonʼ hun lai a kipanin noteʼ Pasianʼ tungah biakna ka pia uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:3 Ahih hangin Zerubbabel le Israel sunga innkuan lutang a omlaite in amaute kiangah, “Koteʼ Pasian adingin ka lam uh biakinn pen noteʼ hong lunghihmawh pih ding hi lo hi. Persia kumpipa Sairas in kote hong thupiak sa bangin Israel Pasian, Topa adingin ko teng guak mah in ka lam ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:4 Tua ciangin tua gam a teeng midangte in Judah mite lungkiasakin biakinn a lam zom lai ding uh a lausak uh hi. 
Ezra4:5 Amauʼ ngimna a tangtun theih loh nadingin amaute in a langpang dingin zum nasemte golhguk pia uh hi. Persia kumpipa Sairasʼ hun a kipan kumpi Darias hun dong hih bangin hih ngitnget uh hi. 
Ezra4:6 Ahasueras in uk ding hong kipat ciangin Judah gam le Jerusalem-a a teengte a khiatna thu tua gamah a na teeng sate in lai-in a gelh uh hi. 
Ezra4:7 Tua ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis hun ciangin Mithredath, Tabeel le a lawmte uh thukimna tawh kumpipa tungah lai gelh uh a, a lai pen Aram lai-in kigelh a, Aram pau mahin kisim khia hi." 
Ezra4:8 Menzipipa Rehum le lai-at pa Shimshai in Kumpi Artakzaksis tungah Jerusalem tawh kisai thu a nuai-a bangin gelh uh hi. 
Ezra4:9 Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai le a lawmte khempeuh, thukhente, mangpite, thuvaante, uliante, Erek khuami le Babylon khuami, Susa khua-a om Elam mite," 
Ezra4:10 le a lian a minthang Ashurbanipal in hong pua khia-in Samaria khuapi ah a hong tensak mite le Eufratis Gun lang khat a kizawhna gam sunga a om mite tung panin lai puak, a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:11 A lai sung thu hih a nuai-a bang ahi hi: “Artakzaksis Kumpipa tungah, Eufratis Gun gal gam a om na nasemte in hopihna kam kong puak uh hi." 
Ezra4:12 “Nangma kiang panin ko kiangah a hong pai Judah mite, tu-in Jerusalem ah tung khin uh a, a gilo, mi lehdo thei ahi khuapi pen amaute in lamkikin, amaute in a khua bulpi vel khinin, kulhpi cian a kipat khitna thu thei in." 
Ezra4:13 Amauʼ khuapi kilam kikin kulhte kizo leh amaute in siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin hong pia nawn lo ding uh a, a tawpna ah kumpi hong sukkhak ding thu thei in." 
Ezra4:14 Kote in kumpipa tawh thuciamna kip nei khin ka hih manun kumpipaʼ min siatna ka muh ding uh kilawm lo hi. Tua ahih manin nangma mai-a a semteʼ thuciaptehna laibute a ki-etkik theih nadingin kumpipa tungah thu kong zasak uh hi. Thuciaptehna laibu sung en lecin hih khuapi pen a lehdo thei khuapi, kumpipa tung le a ukna gamte tungah siatna a piangsak, kumpi dona a khua sungah a om tawntungna thu na mu khia ding hi. Hih khuapi a kisukcipna zong hih thu hang mah ahi hi." 
Ezra4:15  
Ezra4:16 Hih khuapi kilam kikin a kulhte kizo khin leh Eufratis Gun gal gam na uk nawn loh nading thu, nangma tungah kong thei kholsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra4:17 Tua ciangin kumpipa in a lai uh hih bangin thuk hi: “Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at pa Shimshai le Samaria le Eufratis Gun gal gam sunga om na lawmte khempeuh uh tungah hopihna lai kong khak hi." 
Ezra4:18 “Keima tungah nong khak uh lai pen a kitel takin keima zakna ah hong kisim khin hi. 
Ezra4:19 Keimah in hih thu a kikanna ding thu ka pia a, tu-in kikantel khinta hi. Tanglai a kipanin hih khuapi pen kumpi langah pangin, hih khua sungah lehdona le kumpi dona a om ngitngetna thu kimu khia hi." 
Ezra4:20 A vanglian kumpite in Jerusalem ah uk ngei-in, Eufratis Gun gal gambup tungah aana zang uh a, siah, mangmu le losapte tua kumpite tungah kipia hi." 
Ezra4:21 Tua ahih ciangin hih mite a nasep uh a khawl nading thu pia in. Keimah in thu kong piakkik mateng hih khuapi kilamkik lo ding hi. 
Ezra4:22 Hih thu tawh kisai-in na sep ding don loin om mawk kei in. Tua hikeileh kumpi tungah siatna le gimna hong khang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra4:23 Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai le amauʼ lawmteʼ zakna ah Kumpi Artakzaksis tung panin a kingah lai a kisim ciangin, Jerusalem ah amaute pai pahin Judah mite a nasep uh aana tawh a khawlsak uh hi." 
Ezra4:24 Tua hun a kipanin Jerusalem-a om Pasianʼ biakinn a kisepna a khawl hi. Persia kumpi Dariasʼ uk a kum nihna dong tua bangin a khawlcip phot hi. 
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddoʼ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin, Israel Pasianʼ min tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Ezra5:1 Tu-in kamsangte Haggai le Iddoʼ suan Zekhariah in Judah gam le Jerusalem ah a om Judah mite hanthawnin, Israel Pasianʼ min tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Ezra5:2 Tua ciangin Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel le Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua, Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ biakinn lamkik ding kipan pah uh a, Pasianʼ kamsangte in amaute ompihin huh uh hi." 
Ezra5:3 Tua laitakin Eufratis Gun gal gam sungteng a uk sawn Tattenai, Shethar-bozenai le amauʼ lawmte hong pai pahin amaute kiangah, “Note in hih biakinn lamkikin a nate na bawlna ding uh kua in thu hong pia ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra5:4 Hih biakinn lam nasepna ah a sem miteʼ min zong amaute in dong uh hi. 
Ezra5:5 Ahi zongin Pasian in Judah upate huh ahih manin Darias kiangah a thu va tungin ama tung pan thu a kingahkik hun dong a nasep zop suakna uh kikhak tan lo hi. 
Ezra5:6 Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk sawn Tattenai, Shethar-bozenai le Eufratis Gun gal gam sung thu a vaan ama lawmte in Kumpi Darias tungah lai khak uh hi." 
Ezra5:7 Amaute in thu zaksakna lai hih bangin a gelh uh hi: “Kumpi Darias tungah thupha namcin hong tung tahen. 
Ezra5:8 “Judah gam, a lian Pasianʼ biakinn ah ka va paina uh kong theisak uh hi. Tua biakinn pen suang lianpipite tawh kilamin a kawmte sing tawh kibawl hi. Hih biakinn limtakin kisemin amauʼ makaihna tawh a nasep uh telh mahmah hi." 
Ezra5:9 “Hih biakinn a kilamkikna ding le a nate a zawh nadingin kua in thu pia hiam, cih thu hih upate tungah ka dong uh hi." 
Ezra5:10 Nangmah in a makai teng na theih nadingin amauteʼ min zong ka dong uh hi. 
Ezra5:11 “Amaute in hih bangin hong dawng uh hi: ‘Kote pen vantung le leitung Pasianʼ nasemte ka hi uh a, kum tampi lai-in a kilam sa biakinn a lamkik ka hi uh a, a lian Israel kumpi khat in lamin a zawh sa ahi hi." 
Ezra5:12 Ahi zongin ka pu ka pate un vantung Pasian hehsak kha uh ahih manin Babylon kumpipa, Khaldea mi Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah amaute pia hi. Tua kumpipa in hih biakinn susia a, a mite Babylon ah ciahpih hi." 
Ezra5:13 Ahi zongin Babylon kumpipa Sairasʼ uk a kum khatna kumin hih Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkikna ding amah in thu pia hi. 
Ezra5:14 Tua tham loin Jerusalem-a biakinn sung panin Nebukhadnezzar in la-in Babylon biakinn sunga a koih ahi Pasianʼ biakinn sunga om ngeisa kham le ngun kibawl umlebeelte zong kumpi Sairas in Babylon biakinn panin la khia-in gam ukin a hong koih Sheshbazzar min nei pa tungah ap hi. 
Ezra5:15 Kumpipa in ama tungah, “Hih umlebeelte paipih inla, Jerusalem-a biakinn ah va koihkik in. Tua lai-a Pasianʼ biakinn pen a mun ngei mahah lamkiksak in,” ci hi." 
Ezra5:16 Tua ciangin Sheshbazzar hong pai-in Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ biakinn a bulpi hong phut hi. Tua hun a kipanin tu dong lamkik kisem suak a, ahi zongin kizo nai lo hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezra5:17 “Tua ahih ciangin hoih na sak leh, Jerusalem-a hih Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkikna ding thu kumpipa Sairas in thu pia takpi hiam, pia taktak lo hiam cih a kitheih nadingin Babylon khua sunga om laibu koihna innte sung zongsak in. Tua khit ciangin kumpipa in na deihna hong zasakkik in,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra6:1 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in thu pia a, Babylon khua sunga lai manphate a kisenna innte sung kizong hi." 
Ezra6:2 Ahi zongin Babylon khua sungah na om lo a, Media gam sung kumpi khuapi Ekbatana ah laizial khat kimu a, tua sungah hih a nuai-a bangin a kiciamteh kimu hi:" 
Ezra6:3 “Kumpi Sairasʼ kum khatna kumin Jerusalem khua-a Pasianʼ biakinn tawh kisai-in kumpipa in thu pia hi: Biakna kipia-in meihal biakna a kipaipihna munah biakinn lamsakkik un. A sanna pi sawm kua, a vai pi sawm kua mah hi dinga," 
Ezra6:4 a kawm pen suang thuap thum le sing thuap khat tawh a kibawl, thuap li hi ding hi. Hih sum beinate ahihleh kumpi sum panin kipia ding hi." 
Ezra6:5 Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinn panin la khia-in Babylon ah a hong tunpih Pasianʼ biakinn sunga om kham le ngun tawh kibawl umlebeelte zong kipiakik ding hi. Tuate khempeuh Jerusalem biakinn ah kipuakik dinga, Pasianʼ biakinn sunga a omna munmun ciatah kikoihkik ding hi,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Ezra6:6 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in hih bangin thu a pia hi: “Tu-in Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk Tattenai, Shethar-bozenai le Eufratis Gun gal gam sung a vaan na lawmte, tua mun panin na kihem khia ding uh hi." 
Ezra6:7 Judah mi a ukpa le a upate in hih Pasianʼ biakinn a lamkik theih nadingun na tua ci omsak ding uh hi. Ama mun ngei mahah a biakinn lamsakkik un. 
Ezra6:8 Hih a kigen Pasianʼ biakinn a kilamkik theih nadingin hih Judah upate adingin na hih dingte uh zong thu kong pia hi. Hih nasepna a mawk khawl loh nadingin, Eufratis Gun gal gam sung panin a kingah siahte ahi kumpi sum sung panin beina khempeuh a cingin kipia ding hi." 
Ezra6:9 Vantung Pasianʼ tungah meihal biakna-in piak dingin a kisam khempeuh - bawngtal note, tuutalte, ahih kei leh tuunote na pia ding uh a, Jerusalem-a siampiteʼ hong ngetna bangin mangbuh, ci, leenggahzu, ahih kei leh sathaute, kitasam loin nisimin amaute tungah piasak un." 
Ezra6:10 Tua hileh amaute in vantung Pasianʼ tungah a namtui biaknate pia-in kumpipa le a tapateʼ nuntak nading thu hong ngetsak thei ding uh hi. 
Ezra6:11 Tua tham loin, mi khatpeuh in hih thupiakna a siatsak leh ama inn panin a innkam khat kidawh khiatsakin tua tungah amah kihen cipin kisat gawp dinga, tua banah a inn zong a kisuksiatna ding thu kong pia thuah lai hi." 
Ezra6:12 Hih ka thupiakna a siasak nuam, Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ biakinn a susia nuam kumpi khatpeuh ahi a, mi khatpeuh ahi zongin a om leh, ama min omna dinga tua mun a bawl Pasian in tua mipa lawnthal tahen. Keimah Darias in thu kong pia hi. Ka thupiak bang teekteekin sep ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra6:13 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in amaute tungah a thupiak bang teekteekin Eufratis Gun gal gam sung a uk sawn Tattenai, Shethar-bozenai le a lawmte in sem uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a, kamsang Haggai le Iddoʼ suan Zekhariahʼ thugenna hangin Judah upate in a biakinn lam uh zom suakin maavang uh hi. Israel Pasianʼ sawlna le Persia kumpi Sairas le Darias le Artakzaksis-teʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in a biakinn lam uh a zo uh hi." 
Ezra6:14 Tua hi a, kamsang Haggai le Iddoʼ suan Zekhariahʼ thugenna hangin Judah upate in a biakinn lam uh zom suakin maavang uh hi. Israel Pasianʼ sawlna le Persia kumpi Sairas le Darias le Artakzaksis-teʼ thupiakna tawh amaute in a biakinn lam uh a zo uh hi." 
Ezra6:15 Tua hi a, Kumpi Dariasʼ kum gukna, Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in a biakinn kizo hi." 
Ezra6:16 Tua ciangin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite le sal a suak sa a hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in lungdamna lianpi tawh Pasianʼ biakinn apna a bawl uh hi." 
Ezra6:17 Amaute in Pasianʼ biakinn apna-in bawngtal za khat, tuutal za nih le tuuno za li go uh a, mawhna hanga biak nadingin Israel-te khempeuh adingin a minam phazah tawh kizui-in keeltal sawm le nih a pia uh hi." 
Ezra6:18 Tua ciangin Moses laibu sungah a kigelh bangin Jerusalem-a Pasianʼ nasep nadingin siampite amauʼ panmun ngei ah pangsak uh a, Levi mite amauʼ nasepna ngei ah a semsakkik uh hi." 
Ezra6:19 A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in sal a suak sa a hong ciahkik mite in Paisan Pawi a bawl uh hi. 
Ezra6:20 Siampite le Levi mite a vekpi-un kisiansuah khin uh a, a vekpi-un zeh siang khin uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in sal suak sa a hong ciahkik khempeuh ading, a siampipihte uh le amau mahmah adingin Paisan tuuno a go uh hi." 
Ezra6:21 Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik Israel-te le Israel Pasian, Topa a bia dingin tua gam a midang a teengte le a nitna uh pan amau le amau a kihem khia tawm mite khempeuh in tua Paisan Pawi an a ne uh hi." 
Ezra6:22 Tua hi a, amaute in lungdamna tawh ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum pawi a bawl uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ lungdam nading a om theih nadingin Topa in Assiria kumpipaʼ lungsim amauʼ tungah a nuam dingin a bawlsak hi. Tua ahih manin Israel Pasian ahi Pasianʼ biakinn a sepna uh ah kumpipa in amaute a huh hi." 
Ezra7:1 Hih thu teng khit ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis uk hun sungin Ezra, a pa Seraiah, a pa Azariah, a pa Hikiah," 
Ezra7:2 a pa Shalum, a pa Zadok, a pa Ahitub," 
Ezra7:3 a pa Amariah, a pa Azariah, a pa Meraioth," 
Ezra7:4 a pa Zerahiah, a pa Uzzi, a pa Bukki," 
Ezra7:5 a pa Abishua, a pa Finehas, a pa Eleazar, a pa siampi lianpen pa Aaron:" 
Ezra7:6 hih Ezra pen Babylon panin hong tung to hi. Amah pen Israel Pasian, Topa in a piak Moses thukham a siam lai thei mi khat ahi hi. Topa ahi ama Pasian in ompih ahih manin ama nget khempeuh kumpipa in a pia hi." 
Ezra7:7 Kumpi Artakzaksis in a uk a kum sagihna kumin Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte le biakinn nasem pawl khat zong, Jerusalem ah Ezra tawh tung to uh hi." 
Ezra7:8 Kumpipaʼ uk kum sagih a cin kum, a kha ngana sungin Jerusalem tung uh hi." 
Ezra7:9 A kha masa a ni khat ni-in Babylon pan a ding khia dingin Ezra in a ni sehkhol a, a kha ngana a ni khat ni-in Jerusalem a tung uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in amah ompih hi." 
Ezra7:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Ezra in Topaʼ thukham sinin zuih ding le Israel mite a hilh dingin amah kipia hi. 
Ezra7:11 Kumpi Artakzaksis in siampi ahi, lai thei pa lah ahi, Israel-te adingin Topaʼ thupiaknate le thukhamte a siam Ezra tungah a piak lai pen hih bang ahi hi:" 
Ezra7:12 “Kumpiteʼ kumpi ahi Artakzaksis kiang panin vantung Pasianʼ thukham a siam, siampi hi-in lai thei pa lah ahi Ezra tungah:" 
Ezra7:13 “Ka lungsim khensatna hih bang ahi hi: Ka gam sunga om Israel mi khatpeuh ahi a, a siampite uh ahi a, Levi mite ahi zongin, Jerusalem ah a ciahkik nuam khempeuh in nang hong zuih theih nadingun thu ka pia hi." 
Ezra7:14 Nang tungah hong kipia ahi na Pasianʼ thukham tawh kisai-in Judah le Jerusalem ah thu bangci om hiam cih a va thei dingin kumpipa keimah le thu hong lamlak mihing sagihte in kong sawl uh hi. 
Ezra7:15 Kumpipa le a thulamlakte in Jerusalem ah a teeng Israel Pasian tungah lungkim takin a piak ngun le khamte zong," 
Ezra7:16 Babylon gamah na muh uh ngun le khamte le Jerusalem-a noteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn dingin mite le siampite in lungkim takin a piakkhiat zuazuate uh tawh a va puakkhawm ding na hi uh hi. 
Ezra7:17 “Hih ka thupiakna tawh kizui-in hih sumte pen Jerusalem-a noteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn-a biakna tau tungah piak dingin bawngtalte, tuutalte, tuunote le a an tawh biaknate le a leenggahzu tawh biakna dingte lei nading bekin na zang ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:18 Tua banah ngun le kham a val a om lai leh, noteʼ Pasianʼ deihna tawh kituakin hoih na sak bangun na lawmte tawh na zang thei ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:19 Na Pasianʼ biakinn ah zat dingin hong kipia umlebeelte pen Jerusalem Pasian tungah na va pia ding hi. 
Ezra7:20 Na Pasianʼ biakinn adingin a kisam, na piak ding a phamawh a om khak zenzen leh kumpipa sum sung panin na zang thei ding hi." 
Ezra7:21 “Tua hi a, kumpipa keimah Artakzaksis in Eufratis Gun gal gam sunga om kumpi vankemte khempeuh tungah hih bangin thu ka pia hi: Vantung Pasianʼ thukham a siam lai a thei, siampi Ezra in note tung panin a kisapna hong nget ciangin," 
Ezra7:22 ngun talen za khat, mangbuh seu za khat, leenggahzu tambong za nih, sathau tambong za nih ciang le ci a deih zahzah na pia ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:23 Vantung Pasian in a deih peuhpeuh, vantung Pasian biakinn adingin limtakin hih un. Tua hikeileh kumpipa tapate le kumpi gam tungah amah hong heh kha ding hi." 
Ezra7:24 Siampite, Levi mite, lasate, kongcingte, biakinn nasemte, ahih kei leh hih Pasianʼ biakinn-a nasemte khat peuhpeuh tung panin siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin lak nading thu na neih lohna uh zong kong zasak uh hi, ka ci hi." 
Ezra7:25 “Tua hi a, nang Ezra in nang tungah hong kipia na Pasianʼ pilna tawh kizui-in Eufratis Gun gal gam sunga mite thu a khen dingin na Pasianʼ thukham a thei mite seh in. Nang le amaute in na Pasianʼ thukham a thei lote na hilh ding uh hi." 
Ezra7:26 Na Pasianʼ thukham le kumpipaʼ thukham a mang lo peuhmah, sihna ahi a, hawl khiatna ahi a, neihsa matna ahi a, thongkiatna ahi zongin, a ngah ding a kilawm thukhenna tawh khauh takin gim kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Ezra7:27 Tua ciangin Ezra in, “Jerusalem-a om Topaʼ biakinn tua bangin a min thangsak thuah dingin kumpipa lungsimah suak a, kumpipa le a thulamlakte le a uliante kei tungah a thunuam dingin a bawl i pu i pateʼ Pasian ahi Topa in thupha ngah tahen!” a ci hi. Tua hi a, Topa ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna thei ka hih manin ka lungsim hong hang a, kei hong zui dingin Israel makaite ka khawm hi." 
Ezra7:28  
Ezra8:1 Kumpi Artakzaksisʼ uk hun sungin Babylon panin kei tawh hong ciah to khawm a behbehin a kiciamteh beh lutangte hih bang ahi hi: 
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniahʼ tapa ahi hi. 
Ezra8:2 Gershom: Finehas-te beh pan ahi hi. Daniel: Ithamar-te beh pan ahi hi. Hattush: David-te beh panin Shekaniahʼ tapa ahi hi. 
Ezra8:3 Zekhariah: Parosh-te beh sung pan hi a, amah tawh pasal za khat le sawm nga kiciamteh hi." 
Ezra8:4 Eliehoenai: Pahath-moab-te beh panin Zerahiahʼ tapa hi a, pasal za nih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:5 Shekaniah: Zattu-te beh panin Jahazielʼ tapa hi a, pasal za thum tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:6 Ebed: Adin-te beh panin Jonathanʼ tapa hi a, pasal sawm nga tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:7 Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliahʼ tapa hi a, pasal sawm sagih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:7 Isaiah: Elam-te beh panin Athaliahʼ tapa hi a, pasal sawm sagih tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:8 Zebadiah: Shefatiah-te beh panin Mikhaelʼ tapa hi a, pasal sawm giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:9 Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehielʼ tapa hi a, pasal za nih le sawm le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:9 Obadiah: Joab-te beh panin Jehielʼ tapa hi a, pasal za nih le sawm le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:10 Shelomith: Bani-te beh panin Josifiahʼ tapa hi a, pasal za le sawm guk tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:11 Zekhariah: Bebai-te beh panin Bebaiʼ tapa hi a, pasal sawm nih le giat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:12 Johanan: Azgad-te beh panin Hakkatanʼ tapa hi a, pasal za le sawm khat tawh ahi hi." 
Ezra8:13 Elifelet, Jeiel le Shemaiah: A hong nung pai Adonikam-te beh zong hi uh a, pasal sawm guk tawh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra8:14 Uthai le Zabbud: Bigvai-te beh pan hi uh a, pasal sawm sagih tawh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra8:15 Ahava gam lamah a luang lui gei khat ah amaute ka khawm a, tua lai ah ni thum sung ka tam uh hi. Mite le siampite ka et phat ciangin Levi mite khat zong na om lo hi." 
Ezra8:16 Tua ahih ciangin a lawmte lakah a makai, Eliezer, Ariel, Shemaiah, Elnathan, Jarib, Elnathan, Nathan, Zekhariah, Meshullam le thu ngaihsut siam Joiarib le Elnathan te ka sam a," 
Ezra8:17 Kasifia mun a a makai pa Iddo kiangah va pai-in, tua lai-a biakinn nasem amah le a behte in, eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn-a na a sem ding mihing hong puak ding uh a ngen dingin ka sawl hi." 
Ezra8:18 Tua hi a, hehpihna a nei eiteʼ Pasian in hong ompih ahih manin Levi mi Mahli-te beh sung panin thu ngaihsut siam mi ahi Sherebiah, a tapate le a behte tawh pasal sawm le giat," 
Ezra8:19 le Merari-te beh panin Isaiah, a behte le amauʼ tapate mi sawm le nih le Hashabiah tawh," 
Ezra8:19 le Merari-te beh panin Isaiah, a behte le amauʼ tapate mi sawm le nih le Hashabiah tawh," 
Ezra8:20 Levi miteʼ na a sem dingin David le a uliante in a tuam koih ahi biakinn nasem za nih le sawm nih hong pia hi. Hih mite khempeuh amauʼ min ciat tawh a kisam ahi hi. 
Ezra8:21 Tua ciangin eiteʼ Pasianʼ mai ah kote kiniamkhiat thei-in, kote le ka naupangte uh le ka neihsa khempeuh uh nuam takin ka khualzinna uh ah ka pai theih nading uh Pasianʼ tung pan ka nget theih nadingun Ahava lui ah antanna ding thu ka taangko hi." 
Ezra8:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa kiangah, “Ka Pasian un amah a zong mite khempeuh ompihin amau adingin a hoih na sem a, amah a nusiate khempeuh tungah amah heh hi,” ci-in gen khin ka hih manun lampi ah kote hong kha dingin galkapte le sakol tung tuangte kumpipa kiangah ka nget ding ka mai a zum hi." 
Ezra8:23 Tua hi a, kote in an ka tang uh hi. Nuam takin khual ka zin theih nading uh i Pasianʼ tungah ka ngen uh a, amah in ka thungetna uh hong pia hi." 
Ezra8:24 Tua ciangin siampi liante sung panin mi sawm le nih - Sherebiah, Hashabiah le amauʼ behte mi sawm ka tuam koih hi." 
Ezra8:25 Tua ciangin i Pasianʼ biakinn nasep nadingin kumpipa le a thulamlakte le a uliante le tua lai-a a om Israel mi khempeuh in a tuam khen ciat uh ngun le kham le umlebeelte, amaute tungah ka ap hi." 
Ezra8:26 Amaute tungah ka apte: Ngun talen za guk sawm nga, talen nih a gik ngun tawh a kibawl umlebeel za khat, kham talen za khat," 
Ezra8:27 kham darik tul khat man tawh a kibawl kuang-uk sawm nih, le kham zahin a manpha sumsan hoih tawh a kibawl beel nih ahi hi." 
Ezra8:28 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “ Topa tungah note hong ki-ap hi. Umlebeelte zong biakna vante ahi hi. Ngun le khamte ahihleh na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topa tungah citna tawh a kipia na ahi hi." 
Ezra8:29 Siampi liante, Levi mite le Israel mi beh lutangteʼ muhin Jerusalem khua ah Topaʼ biakinn dei sungah na puak dong mateng uh vilin kem un,” ka ci hi." 
Ezra8:30 Tua ahih manin siampite le Levi mite in Jerusalem-a i Pasianʼ biakinn ah puak dingin ngun, kham le umlebeelte a hong sang uh hi." 
Ezra8:31 Tua ciangin Jerusalem a zuan dingin kha masa a ni sawm le nih ni-in Ahava lui panin ka ding khia uh hi. I Pasian in kote hong ompih ahih manin lamkal ah galte le pansimna a tuamtuamte tawh hong kipelhsak hi. 
Ezra8:32 Jerusalem khua ka tun uh ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga uh hi. 
Ezra8:33 A ni li ni-in Uriahʼ tapa siampi Meremothʼ tavuan lakna tawh i Pasianʼ biakinn sungah ngun, kham le umlebeelte kiseng hi. Finehasʼ tapa Eleazar in amah huh a, Levi mi Jeshuaʼ tapa Jozabad le Binnuiʼ tapa Noadiah in amau tegel huh uh hi." 
Ezra8:34 Vante a ki-ap ciangin limtakin kivel a, a ki-ap na khempeuh ciaptehna lai khat kibawl hi." 
Ezra8:35 Tua ciangin salsuahna panin inn hong zuankik mite in Israel-te khempeuh adingin Israel Pasian tungah meihal biakna-in bawngtal sawm le nih, tuutal sawm kua le guk, tuuno sawm sagih le nih le mawhna hanga biakna-in keeltal sawm le nih a pia uh hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Topaʼ tungah meihal biakna ahi hi." 
Ezra8:36 Amaute in Eufratis Gun gal gam sungteng a kumpipaʼ nuai ah a uk sawn a lian pente le uliante tungah kumpipaʼ thupiaknate zong a va gen uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute in mite le Pasianʼ biakinn lam nasep a huh uh hi." 
Ezra9:1 Hih thute khempeuh a kisep khit ciangin keima kiangah makaite pawl khat hong pai-in, “Hih gam a teeng gamdang miteʼ nitna le Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Perez mite, Jebus mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite, Egypt mite le Amorʼ miteʼ gamtat a kihhuaite panin Israel mi, siampite le Levi mite nangawn zong, a siangtho-in tuam om lo uh hi." 
Ezra9:2 Amaute le a tapate un hih gam a teeng minam dangteʼ numeite teenpih uh a, tua thu hangin a siangtho minam pen tu-in gamdang mite tawh a kihel suakta hi. Tua hi a, hih thu ah makaite le thukhen uliante pen a khial masa ahi uh hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Ezra9:3 Hih thu ka zak ciangin dah mahmah in ka puante bal kekin, ka sam le ka khamul botin, cih nading thei loin ka om hi." 
Ezra9:4 Tua ciangin sal a suak hih miteʼ cihtak lohna hangin Israel Pasianʼ gim piak ding lau-in a liing mite khempeuh kei kiangah hong kikhawm uh a, nitak biakpiak hun dong cih nading thei loin ka om hi." 
Ezra9:5 Tua hi a, nitak biakpiak hun ciangin khua phawkkikin ka puan kekpi mah silh kawmin khukdinin Topa Pasianʼ lamah ka khut zakin," 
Ezra9:6 “Ka biak Pasian aw, ka mawhnate un ka lu dawn dong uh hong vuknelhin vantung dong ban to ahih manin nangma lam kong et ding maizumin ka mai a san hi, ka Pasian aw." 
Ezra9:7 Ka pu ka pate uh hun a kipanin tu hun dong mawhna lianpi ka nei uh hi. Tua thu hangin ka kumpite uh le ka siampite un gamdang kumpiteʼ khut sungah sihna, salsuahna, neihsa kisuhna le maizumna thuak uh a, tuhunin zong tua bangmah ka thuak uh hi." 
Ezra9:8 Ahi zongin tu-in Topa ka Pasian un tom kha sung kote hong hehpih a, a suakta pawl khat hong omsakin nangma mun siangtho ah siksan ding mun nong pia hi. Nangmah in ka mit uh hong vaksakkikin ka salsuahna uh ah ka nuntakna uh ka thak pat theih nading uh kalsuan cilna nong pia hi." 
Ezra9:9 Kote pen sal ka hi takpi uh hi; ahi zongin ka salsuahna uh ah ka Pasian un nong nusia kei a, koteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn puahkikin ka dinsakkik theih nading uh le Judah le Jerusalem ah kidalna kulh ka neih theih nadingun kipat thakna na hong piak theih nadingin Persia kumpite ko tungah a thunuam dingin nong bawlsak hi." 
Ezra9:10 “Koteʼ Pasian aw, hih bang hi khin ahih ciangin kote in bang gen thei nawn ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem kamsangte tungtawnin kote thu hong pia-in, ‘Note va lutin na luah ding uh gam pen, tua gam a, a na teeng gamdang mite in ninsakin a kihhuai a gamtatnate uh tawh mong khat pan mong khat dongin a nin sa gam nin ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin na tanute uh amauʼ tapate tawh kiteengsak kei unla, na tapate uh zi dingin amauʼ tanute zong la kei un. Amauteʼ phattuam nading le a maavanna ding uh hanciam kei un. Tua bang hileh note thahatin tua gam a piangte nuam takin na ne ding uh a, na tate un a luah tawntung dingun tua gam na pia sawn thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in nong thupiaknate ka zui kei uh hi." 
Ezra9:11  
Ezra9:12  
Ezra9:13 Tu-in koteʼ gamtat siate le a lian ka mawhnate uh hangin hih bang gimna lian ka thuak uh hi; ahi zongin nangmah in koteʼ tuah dinga kilawm zah gimna hong tuaksak loin, tu-a banga a nungta lai-in nong omsak zaw hi." 
Ezra9:14 Hih banga ka thuak khit uh ciangin kote in na thupiaknate mang lo kikin, a kihhuai-in a gamta mite tawh kiteengin kizomkik ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua bang hikik le-ung, a suakta, a nungta ka om nawn loh dongun koteʼ tungah na hehna hong tungsak ding hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Ezra9:15 Israel Pasian, Topa aw, nang na thutang a, ahi zongin tu ni-a a om lai ko teng nong suaktasak veve hi. Na muhna ah kote a mawhpi mah hi ta le-ung hong hehpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna tawh nangma mai ah kuamah om thei lo hi,” ci-in thu ka ngen hi." 
Ezra10:1 Ezra in tu-a bangin thu ngenin mawhna pulakin khitui naptui tawh Pasianʼ biakinn mai ah kunin a om laitakin Israel mi numei, pasal, naupang, mi tampi tak ama kiimah hong kikhawmin amaute khempeuh zong nakpi takin a kap uh hi." 
Ezra10:2 Tua ciangin Elam-te beh sung panin Jehielʼ tapa Shekaniah hong pau-in Ezra kiangah, “Hih gam a teeng gamdang numeite tenpihna tawh i Pasian tungah i khial hi. Ahi ta zongin Israel mite adingin lametna om lai hi." 
Ezra10:3 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa uh nangma ngaihsutna le i Pasianʼ thupiakna a kihta miteʼ ngaihsutna bangin hih i zite le a tate uh i makna ding thu i Pasianʼ tungah kiciam ni. Tua ciangin thukham sunga om bangin gamta ni." 
Ezra10:4 Kipan in; nangma nasep ding ahi hi; kote in kong huh ding uh hi. Hang inla sem in,” a ci hi." 
Ezra10:5 Tua ciangin Ezra dingin, a kigen sa bangin amaute a gamtat nadingun a kiciam dingin siampi makaite, Levi mite le Israel mi khempeuh sawl a, amaute zong a kiciam pah uh hi." 
Ezra10:6 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ biakinn panin Ezra pai khia-in Eliashibʼ tapa Jehohananʼ omna inn dei ah pai-in tua lai ah a giak hi. Salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik miteʼ khialhna hangin dah ahih manin amah in anletui ne zo lo hi. 
Ezra10:7 Tua ciangin Judah le Jerusalem sunga a om a hong ciahkik salte khempeuh Jerusalem ah a hong kikhop nading uh," 
Ezra10:8 le ni thum sungin a hong tung lo a om leh uliante le upateʼ hoihsakna bangin a neihsa khempeuh uh kimanin, sal suak sa mihonte panin a kihawlkhiat theih nading thu taangkona khat kibawl hi." 
Ezra10:9 Tua ahih ciangin Judah le Benjamin mi khempeuh ni thum sungin Jerusalem ah hong kikhawm uh a, tua pen a kha kuana a ni sawm nih ni ahi hi. Tua hi a, Pasianʼ biakinn mai inntual ah hih thu hangin mi khempeuh patau-in guah lakah liingin a tu uh hi." 
Ezra10:10 Tua ciangin siampi Ezra ding to-in amaute kiangah, “Note in gamdang numeite zi-in la-in Israel miteʼ mawhna na behlap uh hi." 
Ezra10:11 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pu na pate uh Pasian ahi Topaʼ tungah na mawhna uh pulak unla, ama deihna bangin gamta-in hih gam a teeng gamdang mite le gamdang mi ahi na zite uh tawh kikhenin tuam om un,” a ci hi." 
Ezra10:12 Tua ciangin a kikhawm mi khempeuh in dawngin kiko uh a, “Hi tahen, na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi." 
Ezra10:13 Ahi zongin mi tampi hi hang a, guahzuk laitak zong ahi hi. Hih guah lakah ka omsuak zo kei ding uh hi. Tua tham loin hih thu ah eite in mawhna lianpi hih kha ihih manin ni khat ni nih sungin hih nasep a kizo thei ding hi lo hi." 
Ezra10:14 A kikhawm mihonpiteʼ tangin i makaite semsak inla, hih thu hangin eiteʼ tungah Pasianʼ hehna a dam matengin, i khuapite sung khempeuh ah gamdang numei a teenpih mi khempeuh amau khua sung upate le thukhente ciat tawh a kiseh hunin i makaite kiangah va kilak uh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Ezra10:15 Asahelʼ tapa Jonathan le Tikvahʼ tapa Jahzeiah tegel bek in hih thu nial uh a, Meshullam le Levi mi Shabbethai bek in tua a nialte panpih uh hi." 
Ezra10:16 Tua hi a, thukham om sa bangin, a hong ciahkik salsuakte a gamta uh hi. Siampi Ezra in amauʼ beh ciat tangin beh lutang pawl khat teng khia a, tuate khempeuh a minin a kilo khia ahi hi. A kha sawmna a ni khat ni-in hih mite a thukan ding uh kipan uh a," 
Ezra10:17 a kha masa a ni khat ni-in gamdang numei a teenpih miteʼ thu a kan uh a zo uh hi. 
Ezra10:18 Siampite beh lak panin Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua le a sanggamte beh sung panin Maaseiah, Eliezer, Jarib le Gedaliah-te in gamdang numei a tenpihna kimu hi." 
Ezra10:19 Amaute in a zite a mak ding uh kiciam uh a, amauʼ mawhna hangin biakna-in tuu hon panin tuutal khat hong paipih uh hi." 
Ezra10:20 Immer-te beh sung panin Hanani le Zebadiah ahi uh hi. 
Ezra10:21 Harim-te beh sung panin Maaseiah, Elijah, Shemaiah, Jehiel le Uzziah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:22 Pashhur-te beh sung panin Elioenai, Maaseiah, Ishmael, Nethanel, Jozabad le Elasah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:23 Levi mite sung panin Jozabad, Shimei, Kelaiah (Kelita a kici), Pethahiah, Judah le Eliezer ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:24 Lasate sung panin Eliashib ahi hi. Kongcingte sung panin Shallum, Telem le Uri ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:25 Israel mi a dangte sung pan: Parosh-te beh panin Ramiah, Izziah, Malkhijah, Mijamin, Eleazar, Makhijah le Beinaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:26 Elam-te beh panin Mattaniah, Zekhariah, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremoth le Elijah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:27 Zattu-te beh panin Elioenai, Eliashib, Mattaniah, Jeremoth, Zabad le Aziza ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:28 Bebai-te beh panin Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai le Athlai ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:29 Bani-te beh panin Meshullam, Maluk, Adaiah, Jashub, Sheal le Jeremoth ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:30 Pahath-moab-te beh panin Adna, Khelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezalel, Binnui le Manasseh ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:31 Harim-te beh sung panin Eliezer, Isshijah, Malkhijah, Shemaiah, Shimeon," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk le Shemariah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:33 Hashum-te beh sung panin Mattenai, Mattattah, Zabad, Elifelet, Jeremai, Manasseh le Shimei ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:34 Bani-te beh panin Maadai, Amram, Uel," 
Ezra10:35 Benaiah, Bedeiah, Kheluhi," 
Ezra10:36 Vaniah, Meremoth, Eliashib," 
Ezra10:37 Mattaniah, Mattenai le Jaasu ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:38 Binnui-te beh panin Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemiah, Nathan, Adaiah," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Azarel, Shelemiah, Shemariah," 
Ezra10:42 Shalum, Amariah le Josef ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel le Benaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:43 Nebo-te beh panin Jeiel, Mattithiah, Zabad, Zebina, Jaddai, Joel le Benaiah ahi uh hi." 
Ezra10:44 Hih mite khempeuh in gamdang numei teenpih uh a, amaute in a zite uh a tate uh tawh a ma khawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliahʼ tapa Nehemiahʼ thugen hih bang ahi hi. A kum sawm nihna Khislev kha sungin kumpi khuapi Susa ah ka om laitakin," 
Nehemiah1:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le midang pawl khat Judah gam panin hong tung uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Jerusalem khua thu le sal a matna panin a suakta ahi a omsuak Judah miteʼ thu tawh kisai amaute kiangah ka dong hi. 
Nehemiah1:3 Salsuahna panin a suakta, tua gam a om suakte in haksatna lianpi le maizumna a ngahna uh le Jerusalem kulh kicimin kulh kongpite mei in a kat tumna thu a hong gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:4 Hih thu ka zak ciangin tu sukin ka kap niloh a, ni tampi sung an tangin, vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen hi." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ka thungetna ah, “Aw vantung Pasian, Topa, nang hong itin na thupiakna a zuite tungah thuciamna limtakin a zui, a lian a kihtakhuai Pasian aw," 
Nehemiah1:6 Israel mi ahi na nasemteʼ tangin sun le zanin kong thunget nilohna a ngai dingin na bil hong ngat inla, na mit hong hak in. Nangma tungah ko Israel mite ka khialhna uh, keimah le ka pu ka pate zong ka khialhna uh ahi ka mawhnate uh kong pulak uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:7 Nangma tungah kong khial khin uh a, na nasem pa Moses tungah na piak ahi thupiaknate, thukhamte le ngeina kipte ka zui kei uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:8 Na nasem Moses tungah, ‘Na cihtak kei uh leh minam dangte lakah kong thehthang ding hi." 
Nehemiah1:9 Ahi zongin kei kiangah hong ciahkikin ka thupiaknate zui-in na sep uh leh leimong dongah a kithehthang sa na mite uh kaikhawmin keima min om nadingin ka teelna sa munah amaute ka ciahpih ding hi,’ ci-a na thugen hong phawkkik in." 
Nehemiah1:10 Topa aw, amaute pen na vangliatna le a thahat na khut tawh na hotkhiat sa na nasemte le nangma mite ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah1:11 Keima hong thungetna le nangma min a zahtak nuam na nasemteʼ thungetna na bil hong ngat in. Tu-in kei tungah maavanna hong pia inla, kei tungah hih kumpipa hong migitna ding lungsim hong guan in,” ka ci hi. Tua hun laitakin kei pen kumpipaʼ an a pia pa ka hi hi." 
Nehemiah2:1 Kumpi Artakzaksisʼ kum sawm nihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei, a leenggahzu a baih sa-in a om khit ciangin la-in kumpipa ka pia a, ama mai ah ka om laitakin ka mai a khing hi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Amah in, “Cina lopi-in bang hangin na mai khing ahi hiam? Na dahna khat om hi ding hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin lau mahmahna tawh" 
Nehemiah2:3 kumpipa ka dawng a, “Kumpipa nungta tawntung in. Ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi sia gawp a, a kongpite kaang tum ahih ciangin mai khing loin bangci om theih ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Kei tungah bang hong ngen nuam na hi hiam?” hong ci hi. Kei zong ka lungsim tawng ah vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen a," 
Nehemiah2:5 tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin, “Kumpipa na lung a kim a, dik na sak leh, ka puahphatkik theih nadingin Judah gam sung ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi ah nong paisak nading kong thum hi, topa,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu a gei ah tu kawmin), “Bang tanvei sawt dinga, cik ciangin hong ciahkik thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ka ngetna hong thukimpih a, kei zong ka ciahkik ding hun ka gen hi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah, “Kumpipa na thukim leh, Judah gam ka tun dong amaute in hong paisuaksak theih nadingun Eufratis Gun gal gam sung a uk sawn mite ka piak ding laikhakte," 
Nehemiah2:8 le biakinn hutna ding mun muanhuai kongpi ding, khuapi kulh ding le ka om nading inn lam nadingin sing hong piak theih nadingin kumpipaʼ tulak a kem Asafʼ tungah piak ding laikhak zong, kei tungah hong pia in,” ka ci hi. A dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompih ahih manin kumpipa in ka ngette hong pia hi." 
Nehemiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk sawn mite kiang ka tung a, kumpipaʼ laikhakte amaute tungah ka pia hi. Kumpipa in galkap maangte le sakol galkapte kei hong khasak hi." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ahi zongin Israel miteʼ phattuam nading a sem dingin mi khat a paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat le Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin lungkim lo uh hi. 
Nehemiah2:11 Jerusalem khua ka tun ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi. 
Nehemiah2:12 Tua ciangin zanin vak khia-in mi tawm khat ka tonpih hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem adingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsimah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuanna sim loh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi. 
Nehemiah2:13 Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk le Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a, a kicim sa Jerusalem kulhpi le mei in a kat tum sa a kongpite ka en hi." 
Nehemiah2:14 Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi le Kumpipaʼ Bual ah ka paisuak hi. Ahi zongin ka tuanna ganhing a paisuak theih nading mun om lo hi. 
Nehemiah2:15 Tua hi a, a zanpi mahin kuam lampi ah pai-in khuapi kulh ka vel hi. Tua ciangin Kuam Kongpi mah tawnin khuapi sungah ka lutkik hi." 
Nehemiah2:16 Tua hi a, khua sung upate in ka paina mun ahi a, ka sep ahi zongin thei lo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih nasep tavuan a la ding Judah mite, siampite, uliante, khua sung upate le a dangte tungah ka gen nai kei hi." 
Nehemiah2:17 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “I lungkhamna thu na thei uh hi. Jerusalem a siasa-in omin, a kongpite mei in kaang tum hi. Hong pai un, zahkona i ngah nawn loh nadingin Jerusalem kulh ciang pha ni,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah2:18 Tua ciangin a dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna le kumpipa in kei tungah hong gen thute zong amaute tungah ka gen hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tu-in nasep kipan pah ni,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin lawp mahmahna le ngimna hoih tawh nasep a kipan uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat, Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah le Arab gam mi ahi Geshem in tua thu a zak uh ciangin, kote zahpihna le simmawhna tawh, “Hih na sep uh bang ahi hiam? Kumpipa lehpan na hi uh hiam?” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah2:20 Tua ciangin amaute dawngin, “Vantung Pasian in ka maa uh hong telhsak dinga, ko ama nasemte in nasep a kipan ta ka hi uh hi; note in ahihleh Jerusalem tawh kisai-in thu na neih theih nadingun bangmah kimematna na nei kei uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah3:1 Tua ciangin siampi lianpen pa Eliashib le a siampipihte in nasep kipanin Tuu Kongpi a bawl uh hi. Amaute in a khuamte le a zawlte bawlin a kongkhakte bulh uh hi. Amaute in Za Khat Tausang ciang banah Hananel Tausang dong sem uh a, tua ciangin Pasianʼ tungah ap uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:2 A zomah Jerikho khua mite in sem uh hi. Amauteʼ zomah Imriʼ tapa Zakkur in sem hi. 
Nehemiah3:3 Tua ciangin Hassenaahʼ tapate in Ngasa Kongpi bawl uh hi. Amaute in a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:4 Amauteʼ zomah Hakkozʼ tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in ama khawk sung puah hi. Tua zomah Meshezabelʼ tapa Berekhiah, a tapa Meshullam hi a, tua zomah Baanaʼ tapa Zadok in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:5 A zom kik ah Tekoa khua mite in puah uh a, ahi zongin amauʼ uliante in a tote uh sawl bangin sem nuam lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:6 Tua ciangin Paseahʼ tapa Joiada le Besodeiahʼ tapa Meshullam in Jeshanah Kongpi puah uh a, a zawlte khungin a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Amauteʼ zomah Gibeon le Mizpah khuami ahi, Gibeon mi Melatiah le Meronoth khuami Jadon in Eufratis Gun gal gam a uk sawn paʼ zum dong puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Tua zomah kham seek pa Harhaiahʼ tapa Uzziel in puah a, a zomah paknamtui bawlpa Hananiah in puah hi. Amaute in Kulh Zai ciang dong a ngeina bangin Jerusalem bawlkik uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Amauteʼ zomah Jerusalem gam phel khat a uk, Hurʼ tapa Refaiah in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:10 A zomah Harumafʼ tapa Jedaiah in ama inn mai san teng puah hi. Tua ciangin a zomah Hashabneiahʼ tapa Hattush in puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:11 Harimʼ tapa Malkhijah le Pahathmoabʼ tapa Hasshub in Meikhuk Tausang a huam khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:12 Amauteʼ zomah Jerusalem gam a phel khat a uk, Halloheshʼ tapa Shallum in a tanute tawh a puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanun le Zanoah khua-a teeng mite in Kuam Kongpi puah uh hi. Amaute in tua kongpi bawl pha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh uh a, Nin Kongpi ciang dong pi tul le pi za nga sung kulh a puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:14 Beth-hakkherem gam a uk, Rekhabʼ tapa Malkhijah in Nin Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawl pha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna a bulh hi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Mizpah gam a uk, Kolhozehʼ tapa Shallum in Tuinak Kongpi puah a, tua kongpi bawl pha-in a kongkhakte a kalhna bulh hi. Tua ciangin amah in kumpipaʼ huan gei-a kulh ciang a, David khuapi pan a hong pai suk kahlei ciang dong a sem hi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ama zomah Bethzur gam phel khat a uk, Azbukʼ tapa Nehemiah in Davidʼ han san ciang, a kibawl tawm bual le Galkap Inn ciang dong puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Ama zomah a puah Levi mite: Baniʼ tapa Rehum hi a, ama zomah Keilah gam phel khat a uk Hashabiah in ama gam tangin puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ama zomah a puah a behte: Keilah gam phel khat a uk, Henadadʼ tapa Bavvai in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:19 A zomah Mizpah gam a uk, Jeshuaʼ tapa Ezer in a Kiu-a galvan koihna kah tohna san khawk khat puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:20 Ama zomah Zabbaiʼ tapa Baruk in a Kiu panin siampi lianpen pa Eliashibʼ inn kongkhak ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:21 Ama zomah Hakkozʼ tapa Uriah, a tapa Meremoth in Eliashibʼ inn kongkhak panin Eliashibʼ inn mong ciang dong khawk khat sung puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ama zomah Jerusalem kiimnai-a om siampite in puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:23 A zomah Benjamin le Hasshub in amauʼ inn mai san puah uh hi. A zomah Ananiahʼ tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Azariah in ama inn gei san teng puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:24 Ama zomah Henadadʼ tapa Binnui in Azariahʼ inn panin a Kiu," 
Nehemiah3:25 le kulh kiu ciang khawk khat sung puah hi. Uzaiʼ tapa Palal in a Kiu gal san teng le kumpipaʼ inn panin hong dawk khia, zum cingteʼ omna ahi tausang tungnung teng puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:26 Ama zomah Paroshʼ tapa Pedaiah in nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi gal san ciang le tausang dawk puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:27 Ama zomah Tekoa khua mite in a lian tausang dawk panin Ofel mualbo kulh ciang, khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi." 
Nehemiah3:28 Sakol Kongpi tung san teng ahihleh siampite in amauʼ inn mai san ciat puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah3:29 Amauteʼ zomah Immerʼ tapa Zadok in ama inn mai san puah hi. Ama zomah Nisuahna Kongpi a cing, Shekaniahʼ tapa Shemaiah in puah hi." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ama zomah Shemaiahʼ tapa Hananiah le Zalafʼ tapa gukna Hanun in khawk dang khat sung puah uh hi. Amau zomah Berekhiahʼ tapa Meshullam in ama inn dei mai san teng puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:31 Ama zomah kham seek pa Malkhijah in Kikaihkhopna Kongpi mai san a om biakinn nasemteʼ inn le sumbukteʼ inn ciang le a kiu-a inn dei tungnung ciang dong puah hi. 
Nehemiah3:32 Tua ciangin kham seekte le sumbukte in a kiu-a inn dei tungnung le Tuu Kongpi kikal a puah uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:1 Sanballat in koteʼ kulh cianna thu a zak ciangin lungkim loin heh mahmah a, ko Jew mite hong zahko hi." 
Nehemiah4:2 Amah in a kikholhpihte le Samaria galkapteʼ kiangah, “Hih Jew mi niangnuangte in bang hih ding a kipan ahi uh hiam? Hih mun a bawl pha dinga kingaihsun ahi uh hiam? Biakpiakna hangin a nasep uh ni khat sungin zo dingin kilamen ahi uh hiam? Amaute in a kaang tum sa ninbu lomtang panin suangtum bawlkik thei ding ahi uh hiam?” ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:3 Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in, “Amaute in bangbang ciang taleh amauʼ kulh cian tungah ngia khat kah leh kicim lel ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:4 Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiah in thu ka ngen a, “Hong za in, koteʼ Pasian aw; kote hong kisimmawh hi. Kote hong zahkona amauʼ lu tungah leh tuksak inla, gamdang khat ah sal suakin miʼ bawlsiatin amaute omsak in." 
Nehemiah4:5 Amaute in a langtangin kulh ciangteʼ mai ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih manin amauʼ mawhna maisak kei inla, na ciaptehna panin zong a mawhna uh sumit kei in,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a, nasep a kimciang bang kizo hi. Mite in utna lungsim tawh sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:7 Ahi zongin Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite le Ashdod mite in Jerusalem kulh cian nasep kizom suakin, kulh vang teng huk ding a kipat khitna thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:8 Tua hi a, Jerusalem hong simin buaina a piangsak dingin amaute kipawlin vaihawmna khat nei uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:9 Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a, amaute a en dingin sun le zanin galvil ka koih uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in, “Nasemte a tha uh zaw ta a, ahi zong nin tampi om lai hi. Eima tha tawh kulh cian i zo ngei kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:11 Tua ciangin ka galte un, “Amauʼ phawk loh kalun amaute lakah pai-in i that dinga, a nasep uh i beisak ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:12 Amaute lakah a teeng Jew mite khuapi sungah hong pai ciangin, ka galte uh a omna khempeuh ciat panun hong pai-in kote hong simna ding thu, sawm vei tak hong hilh khol uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Tua ahih ciangin kulh nung lam mun niam penna mun awng tengah a namsau uh, a teipi uh le a thal uh tawh, a inn kuankuanun ka mite ka pangsak hi." 
Nehemiah4:14 Miteʼ launa ka muh ciangin, uliante, mi ukte le mi khempeuh tungah, “Amaute kihta kei un. Na sanggamte, na tapate, na tanute, na zite uh le na inn na lote uh adingin hong dosak, a lian a kihtakhuai Topa phawk un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:15 Amauʼ hong sawmna thu kote in ka phawkna uh le Pasian in amauʼ geelna a suksiatna thu ka galte un thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka nasepna ciat uh kulh tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:16 Tua hun a kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kim khat in na sem a, a kim khat in a teipite, a lumte le a thalte uh tawi-in sik puan silhin ding uh a, uliante in kulh a ciang Judah mi khempeuh uk uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh-a cian ding na a nawn mite in a khut lang khat uh tawh a van puak uh lenin a khut lang khat uh ah galhiam tawi uh hi. 
Nehemiah4:18 Kulh ciangte in na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uh ah a namsau uh kuah uh hi. Peengkul tum pa ahihleh keima kiangah om hi. 
Nehemiah4:19 Tua ciangin mi liante, mi ukte le mi khempeuh tungah, “I nasepna lian a, zaipi tak huam hi; eite kulh tungah kikhenin khatlekhat i kigamla hi." 
Nehemiah4:20 Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I Pasian in eite adingin hong dosak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:21 Tua hi a, nisimin khuavak a kipan nitak aksi suah dong, mi kim khat in teipi tawi-in, mi kim khat in na ka sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah4:22 Tua hun mahin mite kiangah, “Zanin galvil, sunin nasemin hong om theih nadingun mi khempeuh na nasemte ciat uh tawh Jerusalem khua sungah hong giak un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah4:23 Tua ahih ciangin keimah a kipan ka behte, ka nasemte le kei hong cingte, a kuamah peuh puan suah man om loin, mi khempeuh in ka khut uh ah galhiam ka tawi den uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Tu-in mi nautang numei le pasalte in a Jew mipihte uh tungah lungkim lohna kam hong gingsak uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:2 Mi pawl khatte in an lei nadingin a tanute uh le a tapate uh a piakna thu hong gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:3 Pawl khatte in kial tun huhau-in an lei nadingin a lote, a leenggah lote le a innte uh a piakna hong gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:4 Pawl khatte in kumpipa tungah siah piak dingin a lote uh le a leenggui lote uh khamin a piakna uh hong gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah5:5 Amaute in, “Kote pen ka behte uh mah bangin cilesa kibang hi-in, ka naupangte uh zong amauʼ naupangte mah bangin a hoih hi napi-in, ka tanute uh le ka tapate uh sal suak dingin ka phum uh hi. Ka tanute uh pawl khat zong sal suak khin a, ka lote uh le ka leenggui lote uh midangte aʼ suak khin ahih manin amaute tat nadingin ka hih zawh uh bangmah om lo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Amauteʼ kikona le hih thute ka zak ciangin ka heh mahmah hi. 
Nehemiah5:7 Kei zong hih thu limtakin ka ngaihsun a, tua ciangin uliante le thukhente taii-in amaute kiangah, “No le no leiba manin salin na kila uh hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute nakpi takin taii-in," 
Nehemiah5:8 “Minam dangte tungah sal a kizuak sa i Jew mipihte ahi zo zahzahin i tanhkik hi. Tua hi napi-in note in na mipihte uh na zuak uh a, tu-in amaute i tatkik ding hi zel hi,” ka ci hi. Amaute pau loin om uh a, a gen ding mel uh thei lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:9 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Noteʼ gamtatna hoih lo hi. I gal ahi minam dangteʼ zahkona i ngah loh nadingin i Pasian zahtakna tawh na gamtat ding uh kilawm hi." 
Nehemiah5:10 Kei le ka behte le ka nasemte in zong an le sum leitawi-in ka pia khia uh hi. Leiba manin mi kilakna phiat ni. 
Nehemiah5:11 Tu ni mahmah in a lote, a oliv lote, a innte uh le a meetin na lak uh sum, an, leenggahzu le sathaute, amaute tungah piakik un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah5:12 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hihte khempeuh ka piakik ding uh a, amaute tung panin bangmah ka kal nawn kei ding uh hi. Na gen bangin ka gamta ding uh hi,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ciangin siampite ka sam a, a ciam sa bangun a gamtat nadingun siampiteʼ mai ah kiciamna ka bawlsak hi." 
Nehemiah5:13 Tua ciangin kei zong ka puan singin, “Hih thuciamna a tungsak lo peuhmah a inn le a neihsa panin Pasian in sing khia tahen. Hih bangin kising khia henla, hawmsuak hen!” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin a kikhawmte khempeuh in, “Hi tahen,” ci uh a, Topa a phat uh hi. Tua hi a, a ciam sa bangun mite a gamta uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:14 Tua tham loin, Judah gam a uk dingin hong kiseh hun a kipan, Kumpi Artakzaksisʼ kum sawm nihna pan a kum sawm thum le nihna dong, kum sawm le kum nih sung, kei le ka behte in gam ukteʼ ngah ngei ante ka ne kei uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Keima hun ma-in a ukte in mite tungah van gikpi suan uh a, amauteʼ tung panin nisimin an le leenggahzu ngun shekel sawm li man a la uh hi. Amauʼ nasemte nangawn mite tungah kiliansak lai uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian ka zahtakna hangin tua bangin kei ka gamta kei hi." 
Nehemiah5:16 Hih kulh cianna ah kei mahmah in zong ka sem a, kei adingin leitang bangmah ka la kei hi. Keima mite khempeuh nasem ding bekin tua lai ah kisutuah uh hi." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kiim le pam a minam dangteʼ kiang pan hong paite banah, nisimin ka sabuai ah an a ne, thukhente le Jew mi a kihelin leengla za le sawm nga bang ka nei den hi." 
Nehemiah5:18 Nisimin inn sung annek tawm dinga kibawl bawngtal khat le tuu limci guk ahi hi. Tua mah bangin ak zong kibawl a, ni sawm simin leenggahzu a um tam pipi-in kihih hi. Tua zahin bei taseleh gam ukteʼ ngah theih ahi anletui ka kal kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mite genthei lua hi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Pasian aw, hih mite adingin ka bawlna khempeuh kei adingin a hoih lamin hong phawk in." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kongpite ah kongkhak ka bulh nai loh uh hangin, kulh ka cian khitna uh le a vang khat zong a om nawn lohna thu, Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mi Geshem le ka gal dangte khempeuh un a zak uh ciangin," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanballat le Geshem zong Ono zanglei sunga om Hakkofirim khua ah pai-in amaute tawh thu a kikum dingin hong sam uh hi. Hih pen kei hong suksiat nopna uh ahi hi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Tua ahih ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah kamtaite ka sawl a, “Tu laitakin nasep thupi ka nei hi; kong pai thei kei ding hi. Kei hong pai leng, kong pai sung ka om loh kal teng nasep kitawlnga ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:4 Amaute in tu-a bangmahin li vei tak hong sam uh a, kei zong a li vei mahin tu-a bangin ka dawngkik hi." 
Nehemiah6:5 Tua bangmahin Sanballat in a nga veina hong sam a, tua tungtangin a kamtai pa in laikhak khat hong pia hi." 
Nehemiah6:6 A laikhak sungah, “Minam dangte lakah a kigen, Geshem in zong tu-a a kigen thu man hi, ci-a a gen thu in: Nang le Jew mite in kumpi lehdo ding na sawm uh a, tua thu hangin kulh na ciang uh hi. Tua banah nang mahmah zong kumpi na utna kigen lai hi." 
Nehemiah6:7 Judah gam in kumpi khat nei ta hi, ci-in, nang kumpi na hihna thu Jerusalem ah a taangko dingin kamsangte pawl khat a koihin zong hong kigen hi. Kumpipa in hih thu za pelmawh ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin thakhatin hong pai inla, hih thu kikum ni,” ci-in kigelh hi." 
Nehemiah6:8 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Tu-a na gen bangin bangmah om lo hi. Tua bang thu pen nangma phuahtawm ahi hi,” ci-in ka thuk hi." 
Nehemiah6:9 Kote in ka hanciamna uh khiamin nasep a kizawh loh nading deihna tawh amaute in kote hong lausak theih nading uh a hanciam uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka hahkat semsem zaw uh hi. 
Nehemiah6:10 Mehetabelʼ tapa Delaiah, a tapa Shemaiah a inn ah omcip ahih manin ni khat ama kiangah ka pai leh amah in, “Pasianʼ inn sung, siangtho munah kituahin biakinn kong kikhaknelh ni; bang hang hiam cih leh nang hong that dingin amaute hong pai uh a, zanin amaute in nang hong that ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:11 Ahih hangin keimah in, “Kei bang mite tai ding ahi hiam? Kei bang mite a suahtak nadingin biakinn sungah bu ding ahi hiam? Ka pai peuhmah kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah6:12 Tua ciangin a thusim ka phawk khia hi. Pasian in tua bang thu a gen dingin amah a sawl hi lo a, Tobiah le Sanballat in tua bangin thugen dingin golhguk a na pia na hi a, ama thugenna pen keimah suksiat nopna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ama thugen bangin gamta-in mawhna ka bawl theih nadingin keimah hong lausak nadingin a kicial ahi hi. Tua bangin zui kha leng kei hong minsiasakin hong simmawh ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah6:14 Ka Pasian aw, amauʼ sepnateʼ hangin Tobiah le Sanballat thei inla, keimah lausak dingin a hanciam kamsangnu Noadiah le kamsang dang khempeuh zong thei in." 
Nehemiah6:15 Elul kha ni sawm nih le nga ni-in kulh kizo a, ni sawm nga le nih sung hun bei hi." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ka galte un hih thu za-in, ka kiim uh a om minam dangte in a theih uh ciangin lamdang sa a, koteʼ Pasianʼ huhna tawh hih nasep kizo ahihna a phawk uh hi." 
Nehemiah6:17 Hih hun sungteng khempeuh Jew uliante in Tobiah kiangah lai tampi khak uh a, Tobiahʼ laikhakte zong amauteʼ kiangah tung hi." 
Nehemiah6:18 Tobiah pen Arahʼ tapa Shekaniahʼ makpa hi a, ama tapa Jehohanan in Berekhiahʼ tapa Meshullamʼ tanute khat teenpih ahih manin Judah gam sunga mi tampi amah tawh kipawl hi." 
Nehemiah6:19 Amaute in ama hoihnate zong keima zak ah hong gen uh a, keima sepna teng zong ama kiangah na puak uh hi. Tua hi a, Tobiah in zong ka lau theih nadingin kei tungah lai tampi hong khak hi." 
Nehemiah7:1 Kulh kiciang khinin, kongkhakte ka bulh khin uh a, kongcingte, lasate le Levi mite a kiseh khit ciangin,"
