Nehemiah7:2 ka sanggampa Hanani le biakinn a uk Hananiah in a et dingin Jerusalem ka pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hananiah pen midang tampi sangin a citak zaw, Pasian a zahtak zaw khat ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Tua hi a, amaute tungah, “Sun mateng Jerusalem kongpite hongsak kei un. Tua ciangin ni om lai mahin kongte khaksakin kalhsak un. Jerusalem khua sunga teengte lak panin khuacing dingte seh unla, pawl khatte galvilna munah, pawl khatte amauʼ omna inn mai ciatah omsak un,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah7:4 Khuapi lianin zai a, ahi zongin a sungah mi tawm bek om a, innte a kilam om nai lo hi." 
Nehemiah7:5 Tua ciangin uliante, thukhente le mite a inn kuankuanun ciapteh nading ka lungsim sungah Pasian in hong suaksak hi. Tua hi a, hong ciahkik masateʼ khang ciaptehna laibu ka mu hi. Tua sungah a kigelh ka muhte:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawhna gam panin salin a lak mite sung panin hih mite pen Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Mordekai, Bilshan, Mispereth, Bigvai, Nehum le Baanah-teʼ makaihna tawh Jerusalem le Judah gam sung amau khua ciatah a hong ciahkik ahi uh hi. Israel sung panin mi a phazah:" 
Nehemiah7:7  
Nehemiah7:8 Parosh suante - mi tul nih za khat sawm sagih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:9 Shefatiah suante - mi za thum sawm sagih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:10 Arah suante - mi za guk sawm nga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:11 Pahath-moab-te beh sung panin Jeshua le Joab suante - mi tul nih za giat le sawm le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:12 Elam suante - mi tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:13 Zattu suante - mi za giat sawm li le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:14 Zakkai suante - mi za sagih sawm guk ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:15 Binnui suante - mi za guk sawm li le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai suante - mi za guk sawm nih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad suante - mi tul nih za thum sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam suante - mi za guk sawm guk le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvai suante - mi tul nih sawm guk le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:20 Adin suante - mi za guk sawm nga le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:21 Ater a kici Hezekiahʼ suante - mi sawm kua le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:22 Hashum suante - mi za thum sawm nih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai suante - mi za thum sawm nih le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:24 Harif suante - mi za khat sawm le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon suante - mi sawm kua le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem le Netofah khuami - za khat sawm giat le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth khuami - za khat sawm nih le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-azmaveth khuami - sawm li le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriath-jearim, Khefirah le Beeroth khuami - za sagih sawm li le thum ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:30 Ramah le Geba khuami - za guk sawm nih le khat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikmash khuami - za khat sawm nih le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel le Ai khuami - za khat sawm nih le thum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo a dang khat khuami - sawm nga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam a dang khat suante - tul khat za nih sawm nga le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khuami - za thum sawm nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:36 Jerikho khuami - za thum sawm li le nga ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod, Hadid le Ono khuami - za sagih sawm nih le khat ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:38 Senaah khuami - tul thum za kua sawm thum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:39 Siampite sung panin: Jeshua-te beh panin Jedaiah suante - za kua sawm sagih le thum ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:40 Immer suante - mi tul khat sawm nga le nih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:41 Pashhur suante - mi tul khat za nih sawm li le sagih ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:42 Harim suante - mi tul khat sawm le sagih ahi uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:43 Levi mite sung panin: Hodevah te beh panin Jeshua suante le Kadmiel suante - sawm sagih le li ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:44 Lasate sung panin Asaf suante - mi za khat sawm li le giat ahi hi. 
Nehemiah7:45 Kongcingte nam sung panin Shallum suante, Ater suante, Talmon suante, Akkub suante, Hatita suante le Shobai suante - mi za khat sawm thum le giat ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:46 Biakinn nasemte sung panin a hong ciahkikte: Ziha suante, Hasufa suante, Tabbaoth suante," 
Nehemiah7:47 Keros suante, Sia suante, Padon suante," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana suante, Hagaba suante, Shamai suante," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanan suante, Giddel suante, Gahar suante," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaiah suante, Rezin suante, Nekoda suante," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazzam suante, Uzza suante, Paseah suante," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besai suante, Meunim suante, Nefushesim suante," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk suante, Hakufa suante, Harhur suante," 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlith suante, Mehida suante, Harsha suante," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos suante, Sisera suante, Temah suante," 
Nehemiah7:56 Neziah suante le Hatifa suante ahi uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhakte sung panin: Sotai suante, Sofereth suante, Perida suante," 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala suante, Darkon suante, Giddel suante," 
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatiah suante, Hattil suante, Pokhereth-hazzebaim suante le Amon suante ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:60 Biakinn nasemte le Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhakte mi a vekpi-in za thum sawm kua le nih a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:61 Temelah, Telharsha, Kherub, Addan le Immer khuate panin a hong ciahkik, Israel mi hi napi-in amauʼ behlephung a kan thei lo mite:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Delaiah suante, Tobiah suante le Nekoda suante, mi za guk sawm li le nih ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:63 Siampiteʼ sung panin zong: Hobaiah suante, Hakkoz suante, Barzillai suante (amah in Gilead mi Barzillaiʼ tanute khat teen pihin tua min tawh a kilo pah) ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:64 Hih mite in khang ciaptehna sungah a kiciamteh mite lakah amauʼ min a zon uh hangin mu lo uh ahih manin amaute a siang loin seh uh a, siampi nasep semsak thei lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Tua hi a, Urim le Thummim aisanna tawh ai san ding siampi khat a om matengin amaute in biakna an siangtho pente a nek loh nading uh gam ukpa in a gen hi." 
Nehemiah7:66 Mi a vekpi-in tul sawm li tul nih za thum sawm guk pha a," 
Nehemiah7:67 amauteʼ nasem numei le pasal tul sagih za thum sawm thum le sagihte kisim lo lai hi. Tua banah amaute in lasa numei le pasal za nih sawm li nga nei uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:68 Amauʼ sakol za sagih sawm thum guk, a la-sakol uh za nih sawm li nga," 
Nehemiah7:69 a kalaoh uh za li sawm thum nga le a late uh tul guk za sagih sawm nih a pha hi. 
Nehemiah7:70 Beh lutang mi pawl khat in nasep nadingin nate pia uh hi. Gam ukpa in van manpha koihna ah kham darik tul khat, kuang-uk sawm nga le siampi puan za nga sawm thum a pia hi." 
Nehemiah7:71 Tua ciangin beh lutang pawl khatte in van manpha koihna ah kham darik tul sawm nih le ngun mina tul nih za nih a pia uh hi. 
Nehemiah7:72 Tua ciangin midangteʼ piakte pen kham darik tul sawm nih, ngun mina tul nih le siampi puan sawm guk le sagih ahi hi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Tua ciangin siampite, Levi mite le mi pawl khatte Jerusalem khua le a kiimah teeng uh hi; kongcingte, lasate, biakinn nasemte le Israel midangte amauʼ khuapi ciatah a teeng uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawm tuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen lai thei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:1 Kha sagihna hong cin ciangin Israel mite amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng khin uh hi. Tua ciangin Tui Kongpi mai tualpi ah mi khempeuh khekhat khai bangin hong kikhawm tuah diam hi. Tua ciangin Topa in Israel mite tungah a piak ahi Moses thukham laibu pen lai thei pa Ezra in hong paipih nadingin a gen uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a, a kha sagihna a ni khat ni-in numei pasal le thu thei tel thei ding a kikhawm khempeuh mai ah siampi Ezra in thukham laibu hong paipih hi." 
Nehemiah8:2 Tua hi a, a kha sagihna a ni khat ni-in numei pasal le thu thei tel thei ding a kikhawm khempeuh mai ah siampi Ezra in thukham laibu hong paipih hi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Tua ciangin amah in Tui Kongpi mai-a om tualpi lam mai ngatin zingsang tung a kipan sun ciang dong, numei pasal le thu a tel thei ding miteʼ zakin tua laibu sunga thute sim a, mi khempeuh in tua thukham laibu sunga thu kisimte limtakin a ngai uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah lai thei pa Ezra ding to a, ama taklam pangah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah ding uh a, a veilam pangah Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkhijah, Hashum, Hash-baddanah, Zekhariah le Meshullam a ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tua ciangin thugenna dinga sing tawh kibawl tau tungah lai thei pa Ezra ding to a, ama taklam pangah Mattithiah, Shema, Anaiah, Uriah, Hilkiah le Maaseiah ding uh a, a veilam pangah Pedaiah, Mishael, Malkhijah, Hashum, Hash-baddanah, Zekhariah le Meshullam a ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sang zaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuhʼ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:5 Mi khempeuh sangin a sang zaw munah amah om ahih manin mi khempeuhʼ muh theih dingin Ezra in a laibu a hong hi. A laibu a hon ciangin mi khempeuh a ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian, Topa thupha pia a, mi khempeuh in a khut uh laam to-in, “Hi tahen. Hi tahen,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin a lu uh kunin lei lam maingatin Topa a bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Tua ciangin Ezra in a lian Pasian, Topa thupha pia a, mi khempeuh in a khut uh laam to-in, “Hi tahen. Hi tahen,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Tua ciangin a lu uh kunin lei lam maingatin Topa a bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Mite amauʼ omna san ciatah a om sungun mite in thukham a tel theih nadingun Levi mi Jeshua, Bani, Sherebiah, Jamin, Akkub, Shabbethai, Hodiah, Maaseiah, Kelita, Azariah, Jozabad, Hanan le Pelaiah-te in a khiatna a gen uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:8 Amaute in Pasianʼ thukham laibu sung panin a kitel takin sim uh a, a cihnopna a kitelin gen uh a, tua a kisim thute a tel nadingun a hilh uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah, lai thei pa lah hi-in siampi lah ahi Ezra le mite a hilh Levi mite in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Tu ni pen Topa noteʼ Pasian adingin biakna ni siangtho ahi hi; a kap a mau om kei un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham kammalte a zak uh ciangin mi khempeuh kap uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tua ciangin a gam ukpa Nehemiah, lai thei pa lah hi-in siampi lah ahi Ezra le mite a hilh Levi mite in amaute khempeuh kiangah, “Tu ni pen Topa noteʼ Pasian adingin biakna ni siangtho ahi hi; a kap a mau om kei un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham kammalte a zak uh ciangin mi khempeuh kap uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:10 Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu-in ciah un. Anlim tuilim ne-in thadim unla, a nei zo lote zong va kholh un; bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa adingin tu ni pen biakna ni siangtho ni ahi hi; dah kei un, bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ hong piak lungdamna in note hong thahatsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Nehemiah8:11 Tua ahih ciangin Levi mite in mite gamdaisak a, “Daitakin om un; bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni pen biakna ni siangtho ni ahi hi; dah kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:12 Tua ahih ciangin mi khempeuh an ne tui dawnin midangte a kholh ding le lungdam a om dingin a ciah uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen thute amaute in a thei tel uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh lai thei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:13 A ni nih ni-in thukham sin dingin siampite le Levi mite tawh beh lutang khempeuh lai thei pa Ezra kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. 
Nehemiah8:14 Tua ciangin, a kha sagihna pawi hun sungin sawlbuk sungah Israel mite a om nading thu le amaute in a khuapi khempeuh uh le Jerusalem ah taangko-in, “A kigen sa bangin sawlbuk lam nadingin gamlak ah pai unla oliv hiangte, gamlak oliv hiangte, mui sing hiangte le a teh tam singhiang dangte va sat un,” ci-in a gen ding uh, Moses tungtawnin Topa in a thupiakna pen thukham sungah a kigelh lam a mu uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:15  
Nehemiah8:16 Tua ahih ciangin mite kuan khia-in tua sing hiangte hong pua-in amauʼ inn khumzang ciat le a inntual uh le Pasianʼ biakinn tual, Tui Kongpi tual le Efraim Kongpi tual ah sawlbuk a lam uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a, salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik a kikhawm mite khempeuh in sawlbuk lamin tuate sungah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Nunʼ tapa Joshuaʼ hun a kipanin tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua bangin hih ngei lo uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tua hi a, salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik a kikhawm mite khempeuh in sawlbuk lamin tuate sungah om uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Nunʼ tapa Joshuaʼ hun a kipanin tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua bangin hih ngei lo uh hi. Tua hi a, amaute lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Tua hi a, a kipat ni a kipan a bei ni dong Ezra in nisimin Pasianʼ thukham laibu a sim khia hi. Amaute in ni sagih sung tua pawi kham uh a, a ngeina om bangin a ni giat ni-in pawi khupna thupi kikhopna khat a om hi." 
Nehemiah8:18 Tua hi a, a kipat ni a kipan a bei ni dong Ezra in nisimin Pasianʼ thukham laibu a sim khia hi. Amaute in ni sagih sung tua pawi kham uh a, a ngeina om bangin a ni giat ni-in pawi khupna thupi kikhopna khat a om hi." 
Nehemiah9:1 Tua kha mah a ni sawm nih le li ni-in an tang dingin Israel mite kikhawm uh a, puanhampi silhin a lu tung uh ah lei kibuak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:2 Tua hi a, gamdang mi khempeuh panin Israel mite tuam om uh a, amaute in din sa-in amauʼ khialhnate le a pu a pate uh mawhnate a pulak uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:3 Tua ciangin amauʼ omna mun ciat uh ah dingin Topa amauʼ Pasianʼ thukham laibu nai thum sung sim uh a, a dang nai thum sung amaute in mawhna pulakin Topa a Pasian uh zahtakna a bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:4 Levi miteʼ kahlei tungah Jeshua, Bani, Kadmiel, Shebaniah, Bunni, Sherebiah, Bani le Khenani ding uh a, Topa amauteʼ Pasianʼ tungah nakpi takin kiko uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:5 Tua ciangin Levi mi Jeshua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabneiah, Sherebiah, Hodiah, Shebaniah le Pethahiah-te in, “Ding un, Topa na Pasian uh phat unla, ‘A tawntung pan a tawntung dongin a minthang na min in thupha ngah a, thupha khempeuh le phatna dang khempeuh sangin a sang zaw hi." 
Nehemiah9:6 Nang bek Topa na hi hi. Nangmah in a sang pen vantung le van a om khempeuh, leitung le a tunga om khempeuh le tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh na bawl hi. Nangmah in tuate khempeuh na omsak a, vantung mihonpi in nang hong bia uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:7 Nang pen Abram teelin Khaldea gam Ur khuapi panin paikhiat pihin Abraham min a phuak Pasian, Topa na hi hi." 
Nehemiah9:8 Nangma tungah amah a cihtakna na mu a, Kanaan mite gam, Hit mite gam, Amor mite gam, Perez mite gam le Girgash mite gam, amah le a suanlekhakte tungah piak dingin ama tungah thuciamna khat na bawl hi. Nang thuman na hih manin na thuciamna na tungsak hi." 
Nehemiah9:9 “‘Nangmah in Egypt gam sunga ka pute ka pate uhʼ gimna mu-in San Tuipi ah hong kikona uh na za a," 
Nehemiah9:10 amaute in ka pu ka pate uh kihihsakna tawh a hih gawpna thei na hih manin Faro le a nasemte le a gam mi khempeuh langpangin lim le nalamdang na bawl hi. Tua hi a, tu ni dongin a kip minphatna khat nangma aʼ dingin na ngah hi." 
Nehemiah9:11 Amauteʼ mai ah tuipi phel kham na hih manin tuipi laizang lei keu tungah amaute paisuak uh a, ahi zongin tuihual sunga suanglot bangin tui thukna sungah amau a delhte na lawn hi." 
Nehemiah9:12 Sunin meii khuam khat tawh amaute lam na lak a, amauʼ lam paina khua a vaksak dingin zanin mei khuam khat tawh lam na lak hi." 
Nehemiah9:13 Sinai Mual tungah kum sukin, vantung panin amaute hopihin, amaute tungah a man thukhenna, thukham taktak, a hoih ngeinate le thupiaknate na pia a," 
Nehemiah9:14 na nasem pa Moses tungtawnin amaute tungah na Sabbath siangtho na theisak a, thupiaknate, ngeinate le thukhamte na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:15 A gilkialna uh a vahsak dingin vantung panin an na pia a, a dangtakna uh a phasak dingin suangpi panin tui na phulsak a, amaute tungah piak dingin na kiciam sa gamah lutin a luah nadingun amaute na sawl hi." 
Nehemiah9:16 “‘Ahi zongin koteʼ pute pate kihisakin lungkhauh uh a, na thupiaknate mang lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:17 Amaute in thu mang nuam lo uh a, amaute lakah na bawl nalamdangte ngaihsun kha lo uh hi. Amaute lungkhauh niloh uh a, a salsuahna uh Egypt ah a paipihkik dingin makai khat seh uh hi. Ahi zongin nang pen mawhna a maisak nuam, dikin hehpihna a nei, lungduai-in itna kip a nei Pasian na hi a, amaute na nusia tuan kei hi." 
Nehemiah9:18 Amaute in a kisung bawng no khat amau mah adingin bawlin, “Hih pen Egypt panin note a hong paikhiatpih na pasian uh ahi hi,” ci-in gendai mawhna lianpi a bawl uh ciangin zong," 
Nehemiah9:19 nang in na hehpih mahmah manin amaute gamlak ah na nusia kei hi. Sunin lam a lak meii khuam in amaute nusia lo a, zanin a pai nading uh lampi a vaksak dingin mei khuam in zong amaute nusia lo hi." 
Nehemiah9:20 Amaute hoihtakin thu na hilh a, na manna an zong amaute kiang panin na lakik kei a, a dangtakna uh a phasak dingin tui na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:21 Kum sawm li tawntung gamlak ah amaute na vak a, amaute in bangmah tangsapna nei lo uh hi. A puante uh zong sia lo a, a khe uh zong bawk beek lo hi." 
Nehemiah9:22 Nangmah in amaute tungah kumpi gamte le mite na pia a, tuate pen gal sung van ngah dingin na piak ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Heshbon kumpipa Sihonʼ gam le Bashan kumpipa Ogʼ gam luah uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:23 Nangmah in amauʼ suanlekhakte van a aksi zahin sim zawh lohin na tamsak a, a pu a pate un a luah dingin na piak dingin na ciam sa gamah amaute na paipih hi." 
Nehemiah9:24 A suan a khakte uh tua gamah lutin a lak uh ciangin, amauʼ mai ah tua gam a teeng Kanaan mite na nuaisiah a, a ut bangbangun a bawl dingun a kumpite le a mite amauʼ khut sungah na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:25 Tua hi a, amaute in kulh nei khuapite le gam hoihte la uh a, na hoih tampi tawh a kidim innte, suang kikhuak tuibeemte, leenggui lote, oliv lote le nek theih singgah kung tampi a luah uh hi. Amaute in tuate ne-in gilvahin thau uh a, nangma hoihna hangin nuamsa mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:26 “‘Ahi zongin amaute in demnopna lungsim nei-in nang hong lehdo uh hi. Amaute in na thukham nungngat uh a, nangma lamah hong ciahkik nadingun amaute a hilh na kamsangte that uh a, amaute in gendai mawhna lianpi bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:27 Hih thu hangin a galte uh khut sungah amaute na ap a, a galte un amaute hih gawpgawp uh hi. Ahi zongin amau a kihih gawpgawp hun ciangin nang tungah hong ko uh a, nangmah in vantung panin na za a, na hehpihna lianpi tawh amauʼ galteʼ kiang panin amaute a hon khia ding hon khiate na puak hi." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ahi zongin a tawldam khit uh ciangin nangma muhna ah a sia gamta zel uh a, nangmah in amauʼ galteʼ khut sungah amaute na nusia a, a galte un amaute a uk gawp uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in nang tungah huhna hong nget uh ciangin vantung panin amauʼ ngetna za-in na hehpihna tawh amaute tam veipi na hon khia hi." 
Nehemiah9:29 Tua hi a, na thukham lamah amaute hong kiheikikna ding limtakin na hilh a, ahi zongin amaute kihisakin na thupiaknate don lo uh hi. A zuite tungah nuntakna a pia thei ahi na ngeina kip tungah amaute khial uh hi. Lungkhauhin phengphi-in amaute kihei khia uh a, thu mang nuam lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kum tampi sung lungduaina tawh amaute na thuak a, na kamsangte tungtawnin amaute na hilh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ngai nuam lo uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin gamdang miteʼ khut sungah amaute na pia hi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ahi ta zongin na hehpihna lian hangin amaute beisak loin, zong na nusia kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh dikna le hehpihna a nei na hi hi." 
Nehemiah9:32 “‘Tua ahih ciangin tu-in a lian, a vanglian, a kihtakhuai, thuciamna kip takin a len koteʼ Pasian aw, Assiria kumpiteʼ hun a kipan tu ni dongin ka kumpite uh, ka uliante uh, ka siampite uh, ka sanggamte uh, ka pu ka pate uh le ko mi khempeuh tungah hong tung gimnate hong neu ngaihsutsak kei in." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kote tungah hong tung sa thu khempeuh ah nang a thutang na hi a, nang citakin a om na hi a, kote a khial gamtat kha ka hi uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Ka kumpite uh, ka uliante uh, ka siampite uh le ka pu ka pate un nangma thukham zui lo uh a, amaute tungah na piak ahi na thupiaknate le na hilh kholhnate zong don lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:35 Amaute tungah na piak gamzai leihoih ah omin, amaute tungah na piak hauhna lianpi tawh nuamsa-in amauʼ kumpiteʼ khutnuai ah a om laitak nangawnun amaute in nangma na hong sem lo uh a, a gamtat hoih lote uh nusia lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Tu-in kote sal ka hi uh hi. Ka pu ka pate un a leitang pan a piangte ne-in a na hoih khempeuhte nuam takin a ngah nadingun na piak gam hih lai munah kote sal ka hi ta uh hi. 
Nehemiah9:37 Tu-in leitang tunga piang khempeuh pen koteʼ mawhna hangin koteʼ tungah nong koih kumpite tungah tung ta hi. Tua kumpite in kote tungah thu hong nei-in, ka ganhingte uh a ututun hong hihsak uh a, kote lungkham mahmah in ka om uh hi,’ ci un,” a ci uh hi." 
Nehemiah9:38 Hih thute khempeuh hangin a kip thuciamna khat bawlin lai-in ka gelh uh a, ka uliante uh, ka Levi mite uh le ka siampite un zong tua lai tungah a min uh a gelh uh hi."

Nehemiah10:28 A om lai Israel mite, siampite, Levi mite, kongcingte, lasate, biakinn nasemte, a zite a tapate le a tanute, thu tel theihna a nei, Pasianʼ thukham hangin gamdang mite panin a tuam om mi khempeuh in" 
Nehemiah10:29 a sanggam uh ahi amauʼ makaite pawmin, Pasianʼ nasem Moses in a piak Pasianʼ thukham zui-in, eiteʼ Topa ahi Topaʼ thupiakna khempeuh, ama ngeinate le ama thukhamte a zuih nading uh kiciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:30 Gamdang mite tungah i tanute i kha kei dinga, i tapateʼ zi dingin zong i la kei ding hi." 
Nehemiah10:31 Hih mite in Sabbath ni-in van ahi a, an ahi zongin hong zuak leh Sabbath ni le ni siangtho khat peuhpeuh ni-in i lei kei ding hi. Kum sagihna-a an piangte nusia-in tua kumin leiba khempeuh i maisak ding hi." 
Nehemiah10:32 Eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn ah nasep nading ahi Ompihna Anlum, a manmanin an tawh biakna, a manmanin meihal biakna, Sabbath ni, Khadet ni, a kiseh pawite, biakna letsongte le Israel miteʼ tangin a kibawlsak ahi kilemna bawl nadingin mawhna hanga biaknate le i Pasianʼ biakinn ah sep ding a kisam dangte khempeuh ah zat dingin kum simin shekel khat seh thum ah khat piak ding ka kiciam uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:33  
Nehemiah10:34 Tua ciangin thukham sunga a kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin a kumkumin Topa eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakna tau tungah cih dingin beh a banbanin i Pasianʼ biakinn sungah sing a kitut nadingin siampite, Levi mite le ko mi vekpite in sing pua ding sehna ai ka san uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:35 I leitang panin a piang anpalte le singgah kungte panin a gah masa khempeuh a kumkumin Topaʼ biakinn ah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:36 Thukham sunga kigelh mah bangin i Pasianʼ biakinn ah a om, i Pasianʼ biakinn sungah na a sem siampite kiangah zong tapa upa pente le bawngteʼ tacilte le ganhonteʼ tacilte le tuuhonteʼ tacilte paipih ding," 
Nehemiah10:37 le annel lom meek masak pen siampite tungah puak ding le gah nei sing khempeuh panin a gah masa, sathau le leenggahzu thakte khempeuh i Pasianʼ biakinn sung vankoihna ah puak ding le lokhawhna khuaneute khempeuh ah sawm-ah-khat a kaikhawmte pen Levi mite ahih manin leitang panin sawm-ah-khat khempeuh Levi mite kiangah puak ding ka kiciam uh hi." 
Nehemiah10:38 Levi mite in sawm-ah-khat a khop uh ciangin Aaronʼ suan siampite tawh hih khawm ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in i Pasianʼ biakinn sunga vankoihna a kilawm mun inn deite ah sawm-ah-khat a ngah uh sung pan sawm-ah-khat puak sawn ding uh hi. 
Nehemiah10:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh biakinn umlebeelte a kikoihna inn deite le na a sem siampite, kongcingte le lasate a giahna inn deite ah Israel mite le Levi mite in a kipia ante, leenggahzu le sathaute a paipih ding uh ahi hi. Eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn kin loin i om kei ding hi." 
Nehemiah11:1 Tua ciangin Jerusalem ah mi makaite teeng uh hi. Tua lo midang teng, amauʼ lak pan mi sawm-ah-khat, khuapi siangtho Jerusalem ah a teeng ding aisanna tawh kiteel uh a, a om lai mi sawm ah kuate ahihleh khuapi dangte ah om uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:2 Tua hi a, sawl lohin, Jerusalem ah amauʼ thu-in a teeng tawm nuam khempeuhte mipi in pakta uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:3 Hih a nuai-ate pen Jerusalem-a a teeng a uk sawn ukpite ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin Judah khuapi dangte ah Israel midangte, siampite, Levi mite, biakinn nasemte le Solomonʼ nasemteʼ suanlekhakte teeng uh a, amauʼ neihsa, amauʼ khuapi ciatah teeng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:4 Judah minam le Benjamin minam sung panin mi pawl khat zong Jerusalem ah teeng uh hi. Perezʼ suan Mahalalel, a tapa Shefatiah, a tapa Amariah, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Uzziah, a tapa Athaiahʼ suante," 
Nehemiah11:5 le Shelahʼ suan Zekhariah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Adaiah, a tapa Hazaiah, a tapa Kolhozeh, a tapa Baruk, a tapa Maaseiahʼ suante ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:6 Jerusalem ah a teeng Perezʼ suante khempeuh galhang mi za li sawm guk le giat a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:7 Jeshaiahʼ tapa Ithiel, a tapa Maaseiah, a tapa Kolaiah, a tapa Pedaiah, a tapa Joed, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Salluʼ suante," 
Nehemiah11:8 le a beh Gabbai le Sallai hi uh a, mi za kua sawm nih giat pha uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikriʼ tapa Joel pen amauʼ mapi hi a, Hassenuahʼ tapa Judah pen khuapi uk a nihna pa ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikriʼ tapa Joel pen amauʼ mapi hi a, Hassenuahʼ tapa Judah pen khuapi uk a nihna pa ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:10 Pasianʼ biakinn a uk Ahitubʼ tapa Meraioth, a tapa Zadok, a tapa Meshullam, a tapa Hilkiah, a tapa Seraiah, a tapa Joiarib, a tapa Jedaiah le Jakhin," 
Nehemiah11:11  
Nehemiah11:12 le inn nasep a sem a behte hi uh a, mi za giat sawm nih le nih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Malkhijahʼ tapa Pashhur, a tapa Zekhariah, a tapa Amzi, a tapa Pelaliah, a tapa Jehoram, a tapa Adaiah," 
Nehemiah11:13 le beh lutang ahi a beh dangte hi a, mi za nih sawm linih pha uh hi. Tua ciangin Immerʼ tapa Meshillemoth, a tapa Ahzai, a tapa Azarel, a tapa Amashsai," 
Nehemiah11:14 le a thahat a vanglian a behte hi a, mi za khat sawm nih le giat pha uh a, Haggedolimʼ tapa Zabdiel pen amauʼ mapi ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:15 Bunniʼ tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Azrikam, a tapa Hasshub, a tapa Shemaiah," 
Nehemiah11:16 le Pasianʼ biakinn pualam nasep a uk, Levi miteʼ ukpite ahi Shabbethai, Zozabad," 
Nehemiah11:17 le lungdam koh thungetna patkhiat ding a makai Asaf, a tapa Zabdi, a tapa Mika, a tapa Mattaniah le a sanggamte lakah a nihna ahi Bakbukiah le Jeduthunʼ tapa Galal, a tapa Shammua, a tapa Abdaʼ suante beh ahi uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:18 Khuapi siangtho sungah Levi mi a om khempeuh mi za nih sawm giat le li a pha uh hi. 
Nehemiah11:19 Akkub, Talmon le a behte hi uh a, mi za khat sawm sagih nih pha uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:20 A om lai Israel-te, siampite le Levi mite ahihleh Judah khuapi dangte ah amauʼ luah leitang ciatah teeng uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ahi zongin biakinn nasemte ahihleh Ofel mualbo ah teeng uh a, Ziha le Gishpa in amaute a uk uh hi." 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem-a Levi mite ukin Pasianʼ biakinn nasepna a vaan pa pen Mikaʼ tapa Mattaniah, a tapa Hashabiah, a tapa Bani, a tapa Uzzi hi a, amah pen lasa Asaf suante sung pan ahi hi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Tuate beh in kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh na sem uh a, tua lasate in nisimin na a sep ding uh kisam hi." 
Nehemiah11:24 Tua ciangin Judahʼ tapa Zerah, a tapa Meshezabel, a tapa Pethahiah pen mite tawh kisai zum thu khempeuh ah kumpipaʼ zat pen ahi hi."

Nehemiah12:24 Tua ciangin Levi mi ukpite: Hashabiah, Sherebiah, Jeshua, Binnui le Kadmiel hi uh a, Pasianʼ mi Davidʼ thupiakna bangin a banbanin phatna la a sa ding le lungdamna a ko dingin a sanggamte uh tawh na a sem ding uh ahi hi."

Nehemiah12:26 Hih pen Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua, a tapa Joiakimʼ hun le gam ukpa Nehemiah le siampi hi-in lai thei pa zong ahi Ezra-teʼ hun lai-a vaihawmna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hih pen Jozadakʼ tapa Jeshua, a tapa Joiakimʼ hun le gam ukpa Nehemiah le siampi hi-in lai thei pa zong ahi Ezra-teʼ hun lai-a vaihawmna ahi hi." 
Nehemiah12:27 Tua ciangin amaute in daltuahte, harp lasaknate le laiza lasaknate tawh lungdam ko-in la sa-in lungdamna tawh kulhpi apna a bawl dingin Jerusalem ah hong pai theih nadingun Levi mite a omna khempeuh uh ah a zong uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Tua hi a, Jerusalem kiim le Netofah miteʼ khuaneute panin Levi mi lasate hong kikaikhawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:29 Beth-gilgal khua le Geba kiimnai le Beth-azmaveth khua panin zong hong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lasate pawl in Jerusalem kiimah amau adingin khuaneute sat uh hi. 
Nehemiah12:30 Tua ciangin siampite le Levi mite amau mah kisiansuah tawm uh a, tua khit ciangin mite le kongpite le kulhpi a siansuah uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:31 Tua ciangin khuapi kulhzang ah Judah mi uliante ka paipih a, lampai kawmin lungdamna a ko dingin pawl lian nih ka seh hi. Kulhzang panin pawl khatte taklam manawhin Nin Kongpi lamah a pai uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:32 Tuateʼ nungah Hoshaiah le Judah uliante kim khat," 
Nehemiah12:33 le Azariah, Ezra, Meshullam,"

Nehemiah12:34 Judah, Benjamin, Shemaiah le Jeremiah,"

Nehemiah12:35 le siampi pawl khat: Asaf, a tapa Zakkur, a tapa Mikaiah, a tapa Mattaniah, a tapa Shemaiah, a tapa Jonathan, a tapa Zekhariah," 
Nehemiah12:36 le ama behte Shemaiah, Azarel, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah le Hanani-te, Pasianʼ mi Davidʼ lasakna nate tawh pai uh a, tuate lakah lai thei pa Ezra masa hi." 
Nehemiah12:36 le ama behte Shemaiah, Azarel, Gilalai, Maai, Nethanel, Judah le Hanani-te, Pasianʼ mi Davidʼ lasakna nate tawh pai uh a, tuate lakah lai thei pa Ezra masa hi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Tuinak Kongpi panin kulh kah tohna David khuapi kahlei ah pai to-in, Davidʼ inn khengin nisuahna lam manawhin Tui Kongpi dongah pai uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:38 Lungdamna a ko a pawldang khat pen veilam manawhin pai uh a, mi a kim khat tawh amaute ka zui hi. Kulh tungah pai-in Meikhuk Tausang pan Kulh Zai ah" 
Nehemiah12:39 tua panin Efraim Kongpi, tua ciangin Jeshanah Kongpi, tua ciangin Ngasa Kongpi, tua ciangin Hananel Tausang, tua ciangin Za Khat Tausang, tua ciangin Tuu Kongpi ah pai uh a, tua ciangin Thong Kongpi ah khawl uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Tua hi a, lungdamna a ko hih pawl nihte, Pasianʼ biakinn hong tung uh a, uliante pawl khat le kei ka om khawm uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:41 Tua ciangin siampi Eliakim, Maaseiah, Miniamin, Mikaiah, Elioenai, Zekhariah le Hananiah-te a peengkulte uh tawh om uh a," 
Nehemiah12:42 Maaseiah, Shemaiah, Eleazar, Uzzi, Jehohanan, Malkhijah, Elam le Ezer zong a om uh hi. Tua hi a, Jezrahiah makai-in lasate in la sa uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:43 Pasian in nakpi takin amaute lungdamsak ahih manin amaute in tua ni-in biakpiakna lian tampi pia-in lungdam uh a, numei naupangte zong lungdam uh hi. Tua hi a, Jerusalem khua sunga lungdamna awging gamlapi pek pan nangawnin kiza hi." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tua ciangin khuapiteʼ kiimah lo omte panin a golna le a neuna tawh kizui-in siampite le Levi mite adingin thukham sunga om bangin a kaihkhop ding uh a kipia nate, anpalte le sawm-ah-khatte a koih nading uh vankoihna innte a uk dingin mi kiseh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh siampite le Levi miteʼ nasepna hangin Judah mi khempeuh lungdam mahmah uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:45 Tua hi a, David le a tapa Solomonʼ thupiakna tawh kizui-in lasate le kongcingte mah bangin amaute in amauʼ Pasianʼ nasepte le siansuah nasep a sem uh hi." 
Nehemiah12:46 Bang hang hiam cih leh Davidʼ hun lai-in lasate a ukpi le phatna le lungdamkohna a makai-in Asaf om hi. 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubbabel le Nehemiahʼ hun lai-in Israel mite khempeuh in lasate le kongcingte adingin a nisim tanh uh pia uh a, amaute in Levi mite ading tuam koih uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mite in Aaron suante adingin tuam koih sawn leuleu uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:1 Tua ciangin amaute in mipiʼ zakin Mosesʼ laibute sim uh a, Pasianʼ miteʼ kikhopna ah Ammon mi le Moab mite a kihel ngei loh nading thu kiphawk khia hi;" 
Nehemiah13:2 bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in anletui tawh Israel mite na dawn lo uh a, amaute a samsia dingin Balaam cial zawsop uh hi. Ahi zongin i Pasian in tua samsiatna thupha-in hong heisak hi." 
Nehemiah13:3 Mite in hih thukham a zak uh ciangin Israel mite lak panin gamdang suan peuhmah khen khia uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:4 Ahi zongin tua hun ma-in, i Pasianʼ biakinn sunga vankoihna inn deite a uk dingin a kiseh, Tobiah tawh a kimeltheih siampi Eliashib in," 
Nehemiah13:5 Levi mite, lasate le kongcingte tungah piak dingin a kisawl an tawh biakna, paknamtui, umlebeelte, sawm-ah-khat a kipia an, leenggahzu le sathau le siampite adingin a kipia nate a koihna ngei uh inn dei lianpi khat, Tobiah adingin bawlsak hi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Babylon kumpipa Artakzaksis in a uk kum sawm thum le nihna kumin ama kiangah pai ka hih manin hih thu a pian laitakin Jerusalem ah ka om kei hi. Tawl khat khit ciangin kumpipa kiangah a khuan ka ngen a," 
Nehemiah13:7 Jerusalem ah ka ciahkik hi. Tua ciangin Tobiah adingin Pasianʼ biakinn huang sungah inn dei khat a vaihawmsakna thu, Eliashibʼ gamtat hoih lohna ka phawk khia hi." 
Nehemiah13:8 Hih thu ah lungkim het lo ka hih manin inn dei sung panin Tobiahʼ van teng ka lawn khia hi. 
Nehemiah13:9 Tua ciangin tua inn dei a siansak nading uh le Pasianʼ biakinn-a umlebeelte, an tawh biakna le paknamtui a koihkik nadingun thu ka pia hi." 
Nehemiah13:10 Levi miteʼ ngah dingte amauʼ tungah kipia lo ahih manin Levi mite le lasate in a nasep ngeite uh nusia-in a lote uh ah na a sepna uh zong ka phawk khia hi. 
Nehemiah13:11 Tua ahih ciangin uliante tungah ka lungkim kei a, “Bang hangin Pasianʼ biakinn kinusiacip ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. Tua hi a, amaute kaikhawmkikin amauʼ sepna ngei mun ciatah ka pangsakkik hi." 
Nehemiah13:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite khempeuh in an, leenggahzu le sathau sung pan sawm-ah-khat hong paipihin vankoihna innte ah hong tun uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tua ciangin tua vankoihna innte a kem dingin siampi Shelemiah, lai thei Zadok le Levi mi Pedaiah le amaute a huh dingin Mattaniahʼ tapa Zakkur, a tapa Hanan ka seh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute mi muanhuai ahi uh hi. Amauʼ nasep pen a sanggamte uh tungah amauʼ tanh ciat uh a hawm khia ding uh ahi hi." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ka Pasian aw, hih thu tawh kisai-in kei hong phawk inla, ka Pasianʼ biakinn le a nasep nadingin ka sep sa gamtat hoihte maimangsak kei in." 
Nehemiah13:15 Tua hun lai-in Judah gam sungah mite in Sabbath ni-in leenggah sukin, a khawh sate uh khawmin late tungah suanin, leenggah, thei le van namkim, Sabbath ni-in Jerusalem ah hong puakna ka mu hi. Tua ni-in na a zuakna uh hangin ka lungkim lohna amaute tungah ka gen hi." 
Nehemiah13:16 Jerusalem khua sunga teeng Taia khua mite in zong ngasa le van namkim hong paipihin Judah mite tung le Jerusalem khua sungah Sabbath ni-in zuak uh hi. 
Nehemiah13:17 Tua ciangin Judah uliante tungah lungkim loin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin hoih lohna gamta-in Sabbath ni ninsak ngam na hi uh hiam?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Na pu na pate uh tu-a bang teekin a gamtat manin eite tung le hih khuapi tungah hih bang siatna khempeuh hong tung hi lo ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in note in Sabbath ni nitsakna tawh Israel tungah hehna tam zaw na tungsak uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Nehemiah13:19 Tua hi a, Sabbath ni ding khuamial ciangin kongpite a kikhak nading ka sawl a, Sabbath bei khit mateng a kihon loh nadingin thu ka pia hi. Tua ciangin, Sabbath ni-in khua sungah van hong kilut pih loh nadingin kongpite a cing dingin ka nasemte pawl khat ka koih hi." 
Nehemiah13:20 Tua ahih manin sumbukte le na nam tuamtuam a zuakte, khatvei nih vei khawng Jerusalem khua pua lamah giak uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:21 Ahi zongin amaute hilh kholin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin kulh gei ah giak na hi uh hiam? Nong giahkik uh leh note tungah thu kong bawl ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua hun a kipanin Sabbath ni-in amaute hong pai nawn lo uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:22 Tua ciangin Sabbath ni a siangtho-in a omsak theih nadingun amaute kisiansuah tawmin kongpite hong cin nadingun Levi mite ka sawl hi. Ka Pasian aw, hih thu ah zong hong phawk inla, na itna tawh kizui-in siatna panin kei hong pengsak in." 
Nehemiah13:23 Tua hun lai mahin zong Judah mite in Ashdod numei, Ammon numei le Moab numeite a tenpihna," 
Nehemiah13:24 le a tate uh kim khat in Ashdod kampau a zatna le Judah kampau zang thei loin, amau pau ciat bek a zat theihna thu ka mu khia hi." 
Nehemiah13:25 Amaute tai gawpin ka samsia a, pawl khat satin a sam uh ka bawhsak gawp hi. Tua ciangin Pasianʼ min tawh amaute ka kiciamsak a, “Note in amauʼ tapateʼ zi dingin na tanute uh na pia kei ding uh a, na tapate uh zi ding ahi a, nomauʼ zi dingin ahi zongin amauteʼ tanu na la kei ding uh hi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Israel kumpipa Solomon zong tua bang numeiteʼ hangin khial hi lo ahi hiam? Minam tampite lakah amah tawh a kibang kumpi khat zong om lo a, ama Pasian in amah itin, Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah koih hi; ahi ta zongin gamdang numeite in amah nangawn khialsak zo hi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tua ahih ciangin Solomon aw, nangma gamtatnate hong zui-in, gamdang numeite tenpihna tawh hih siatna lian khempeuh gamta-in i Pasian tungah hong zuau tat ding ka hi uh hiam?” ka cisak hi." 
Nehemiah13:28 Siampi lianpen pa Eliashibʼ tapa Jehoiadaʼ tapate khat pen Horonaim khuami Sanballatʼ makpa na hi hi. Tua ahih manin keima kiang panin amah ka hawl khia hi. 
Nehemiah13:29 Ka Pasian aw, amaute in siampi nasepna le siampite le Levi miteʼ thuciamna siasak uh ahih manin amaute thei ta in." 
Nehemiah13:30 Tua bangin gamdang tawh a kizom nate khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak a, siampite le Levi mite a nasep ngei mah uh ah ka semsakkik hi." 
Nehemiah13:31 Tua ciangin a kiseh hunin zat dingin cih ding sing tawh biakna le anpal tawh biakna ding ka vaihawmsak hi. Ka Pasian aw, a hoih lamin kei hong phawk in." 
Esther1:1 Hih lai-a kigelh thupiangte pen India gam panin Ethiopia gam dong, gamneu za khat sawm nih le sagih a uk Ahasuerasʼ hun lai-a piang thu ahi hi." 
Esther1:2 Hih hun laitakin kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi sunga kumpi tokhom tungah amah tu hi. 
Esther1:3 Ama uk a kum thumna kumin ama nuai-a a uliante khempeuh le a nasemte adingin pawi khat bawlsak hi. Ama khutnuai-a om Persia le Media galkap maangte le ama nuai-a uliante le ama nuai ah gam a uksawnte a om laitakin," 
Esther1:4 a kumpi gam hauhna le ama thupi ziazuana ni tampi sung, ni za le ni sawm giat sung tak a lak hi." 
Esther1:5 Hih pawi hun a bei khit ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga om mi lian mi neu mi khempeuh adingin kumpipa in pawi khat a bawl hi. Tua pawi pen kumpi inn huang sungah kibawl a, ni sagih sung kibawl hi." 
Esther1:6 Tua huang sungah suangkang khuamte kiphut a, khau malneu le khau dupsan tawh ngun kualte ah kikhihin a kikhai dalna puan pakte kikhungin, suangmanpha a san, a dum, a kang le a vom, a nam tuamtuamte kizangin a kizem suangphah kiphah tungah kham le ngun kibawl lupnate kikoih hi." 
Esther1:7 Kham hai nam tuamtuamte tawh zu kihawm a, kumpipaʼ hauhna tawh kituakin deihdeihin zu kizang hi." 
Esther1:8 Tua lai ah zunekna zia pen kihah piak cih om lo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh in amauʼ duh zahzah bek a neksakna ding uh kumpipa in a nuai-a a uliante thu pia hi. 
Esther1:9 Tua banah Kumpinu Vashti in zong numeite adingin Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ inn sung mahah pawi khat a bawl hi. 
Esther1:10 A ni sagih ni, zunekna hangin a lung a nop ciangin kumpipa in ama na a sem innsung maang sagihte Mehuman, Biztha, Harbona, Bigtha, Abagtha, Zethar le Karkas-te sam a, mite le uliante mai ah Kumpinu Vashti a melhoihna a lah theih nadingin a kumpi lukhu khusa-in ama kiangah a paipih nadingun a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua nu a mel a hoih takpi mah ahi hi." 
Esther1:11  
Esther1:12 Ahih hangin Kumpinu Vashti in innsung maangteʼ thupuak kumpipaʼ sapna a nial hi. Hih a nialna thu ah kumpipa heh mahmah a, a hehna hangin a sin so hi." 
Esther1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipa in upadi siam a mipilte thu dong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh upadi le biakna lam thu theite khempeuh thu dot pen kumpipaʼ zat ngei khat ahi hi. 
Esther1:14 Ama gei nai pen ah a tu mite pen Persia le Media gam ulian sagihte ahi Karshena, Shethar, Admatha, Tarshish, Meres, Marsena le Memukan-te hi uh a, kumpipa kiangah a hawh thei, kumpi gam sungah ulian pente ahi uh hi." 
Esther1:15 “Inn sung mangteʼ tungtawnin keimah kumpi Ahasuerasʼ thupiakna bangin Kumpinu Vashti gamta lo ahih manin Kumpinu Vashti tungah upadi tawh kizui-in bangci kihih ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Esther1:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa le ulianteʼ zakin Memukan in dawng a, “Kumpinu Vashti khial hi; kumpipa tung bek hi loin Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam sung khempeuh a om uliante le mi khempeuh tungah zong a khial ahi hi." 
Esther1:17 Kumpinuʼ gamtatna thu numei dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh a, hih thu hangin numeite in a pasalte uh simmawh ding uh a, amaute in, ‘Kumpipa Ahasueras in ama kiangah a pai dingin Kumpinu Vashti thu pia napi-in pai lo hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Esther1:18 Hih banga kumpinuʼ gamtatna thu a za Persia le Media gam numei liante in kumpipa nuai-a uliante tungah tu ni mahmah in hih thu gen ding uh a, kisimmawhna le kizahtak lohna tampi piangsak ding hi." 
Esther1:19 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, kumpi thupiakna khat paisak inla, Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ mai ah Vashti a kilakkik nawn loh nadingin a kikhelkik ngei nawn lo ding Persia mite le Media miteʼ upadi sungah gelhsak in. Tua ciangin amah sangin a kilawm zaw numei khat ama za luahsak in." 
Esther1:20 Tua banga kumpipaʼ thupiakna thu kumpi gam sung khempeuh ah a kizak ciangin numei khempeuh in a neu a lian amauʼ pasal ciat zahtak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther1:21 Kumpipa le uliante in hih ngaihsutna hoih sa uh a, Memukanʼ gen bangin kumpipa a gamta hi." 
Esther1:22 Pasal khempeuh pen ama inn sung ukpa ahih nading le ama kampau a kizuih kim nadingin kumpipaʼ ukna gam khempeuh ah amauʼ lai ciat le mi khempeuh tungah amauʼ pau ciatin laikhakte kigelh hi. 
Esther2:1 Hih thu teng a pian khit, Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ hehna a dam ciangin, amah in Vashti phawkin, Vashtiʼ gamtatna le amah tawh kisai-in a thupiakna zong thei hi." 
Esther2:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa adingin a melhoih nungak khangnote zongsak in." 
Esther2:3 Kumpi khua ahi Susa khuapi a numeiteʼ omna ah a melhoih nungak khangno khempeuh hong paipih nadingun na ukna gam tuamtuam khempeuh ah uliante sawl in. Tua numeite pen numeite a uk, kumpipaʼ innsung maang Hegaiʼ kep dingin ki-ap hen. Tua ciangin tua numeite tungah paknamtui tuamtuam kiguan hen." 
Esther2:4 Tua sung panin kumpipaʼ deih bel nungak pen Vashtiʼ tangin kumpinu suak hen,” a ci uh hi. Kumpipa in hih ngaihsutna hoih sa a, tua bangin a gamta hi." 
Esther2:5 Tu-in kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Benjamin minam Kish, a tapa Shimei, a tapa Jair, a tapa Mordekai a kici Jew mi khat om hi." 
Esther2:6 Amah pen, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem panin Judah kumpipa Jekoniah tawh a lak galmatte lak a kihel khat ahi hi." 
Esther2:7 Amah in a innlak pate khatʼ tanu, a min masa Hadassah, a nung ciangin Esther a kici, a khoi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a nu le a pa om nawn lo hi. Tua numei melhoihin a ngaihbaang mahmah khat hi a, a nu le a pa a sih ciangin Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak ahi hi." 
Esther2:8 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna kithei kimin, Hegaiʼ kep dingin ap dingin kumpi khua Susa khuapi ah numei tampi hong kipaipih ciangin, numeite a uk Hegaiʼ tungah ap dingin kumpipaʼ inn ah Esther zong kipaipih hi." 
Esther2:9 Amah in tua nungak hoih sa-in pakta mahmah ahih manin paknamtuite le a annek ding pia pah a, kumpipaʼ inn sung panin a kiteel nasem numei sagih zong guan a, amah le a nasem numeiteʼ tungah numeiteʼ omna a hoih pen mun a pia pah hi." 
Esther2:10 Mordekai in kham ahih manin Esther in ama namlephung gen khia lo hi. 
Esther2:11 Esther bangci om a, ama tungah bang piang hiam cih a theih nadingin numeiteʼ omna inntual mai ah nisimin Mordekai va pai zel hi." 
Esther2:12 Numeite a kigin hun a vekpi-in kha sawm le nih sung hi a, sathau le myrrh paknamtui tawh kha guk sung kipuahin, paknamtui tuamtuamte le kipuahna dangte tawh kha guk sung mah kipuah uh hi." 
Esther2:13 Kigin kholhna hun cing a, Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ kiangah numeite a pai ciangin numeiteʼ omna panin kumpipaʼ inn ah a deih peuhpeuh uh kikengsak hi." 
Esther2:14 Nitakin kumpipa kiangah va pai a, a zingsang ciangin numeiteʼ omna a mun dang khat ah kiciahsak a, kumpipaʼ zineute a uk, kumpipaʼ innsung maang Shaashgaz in kem hi. Kumpipa in a deihkik kei leh kumpipa kiangah paikik nawn lo a, kumpipa in a deih leh a minin kisamkik hi." 
Esther2:15 Mordekai in ama tanu dingin a lak a innlak pa Abihailʼ tanu Esther pen kumpipa kiangah a pai ding hun a tun ciangin, numeite a uk kumpipaʼ inn sung mangpa Hegaiʼ gen teng lobuang kizepna ding puan dang bangmah ngen thuah lo hi. Tu-in Esther a mu mi peuhmah in hoih sa kim uh hi." 
Esther2:16 Ama uk a kum sagihna, kha sawmna ahi Tebeth kha sungin kumpi inn sung Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ kiangah Esther a kipaipih ciangin," 
Esther2:17 kumpipa in ama numei dangte khempeuh sangin it zaw a, a nungak dangte khempeuh sangin limbawl zaw hi. Tua hi a, kumpi lukhu amah khusakin Vashtiʼ tangin kumpinu a suaksak hi." 
Esther2:18 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Esther pahtawina-in ama uliante le a nasem khempeuh adingin pawi lianpi khat a bawl hi. Amah in ama ukna gam khempeuh ah tua ni nasep khawlin zum a khak nading uh zong thu zasak kim a, kumpipa min tawh a kilawm a kituak letsongte zong a hawm khia hi." 
Esther2:19 Tua hun sungin Mordekai in kumpi nasep a ngah hi. 
Esther2:20 Ama hilhna tawh kizui-in Esther in ama minam ahi a, a innkuan ahi zongin pulak lo hi. Mordekaiʼ kep sungin ama thu a man mah bangin tu-in zong Mordekaiʼ gen bangin gamta hi." 
Esther2:21 Ni khat, kumpi nasemin Mordekai a om hun sungin kongcing ahi kumpipaʼ innsung maangte Bigthana le Teresh heh uh a, Kumpipa Ahasueras thah ding a sawm uh hi." 
Esther2:22 Hih thu Mordekai in phawkin Kumpinu Esther kiangah ko a, Esther in Mordekaiʼ hong thupuak, ci-in kumpipa kiangah a gen sawn hi." 
Esther2:23 A thu kikanin a manna a kitheih ciangin khuampite tungah tua mi nih tegel kikhailum hi. Hih thupiangte khempeuh kumpipaʼ theihin Kumpi Gam Tangthu Laibu sungah kiciamteh hi. 
Esther3:1 Hih thute khit ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Agag-te beh Hammedathaʼ tapa Haman a za khangsak a, amah tawh a sem khawm ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lian zaw-in a bawl hi." 
Esther3:2 Tua ahih ciangin kumpi huang sunga om kumpipaʼ nasem khempeuh in Haman zahtak bawlin ama mai ah kun uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua banga a hih ding uh kumpipa in thu pia hi. Ahih hangin Mordekai pen amah zahtakna limin a mai ah kun lo hi. 
Esther3:3 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ huang sunga om kumpipaʼ nasemte in Mordekai kiangah, “Bang hangin kumpipaʼ thupiak mang lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Esther3:4 Nisimin amaute in Mordekai kiangah gengen uh a, ahih hangin amah in mang nuam lo hi. Jew mi ahihna thu amaute kiangah gen khin ahih manin tua banga ama nialna a kimang ding mah ahi hiam cih a theih nadingun Haman kiangah a thu ko uh hi." 
Esther3:5 Ama mai ah Mordekai a kun lohna, amah a zahtak bawl lohna a theih ciangin Haman nak heh mahmah hi." 
Esther3:6 Amah in Mordekaiʼ mipihte a theih ciangin amah bek suk taak sa lo a, Ahasuerasʼ kumpi gam sung khempeuh ah a om Jew mi khempeuh, Mordekai le a minam buppi-in a suksiat theih nading lampi a zong hi." 
Esther3:7 Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ uk a kum sawm le kum nihna, a kha masa pen ahi Nisan kha a kipanin a ni ni, a kha kha-in Pur a kici aisanna tawh Hamanʼ muhin ai kisan a, a kha sawm le nihna Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in ai a pha hi." 
Esther3:8 Tua ciangin Haman in Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ kiangah, “Na ukna gam tuamtuam sunga om mite lakah a om kawikawi, amau a tuam om mi pawl khat om hi. Amauʼ ngeinate pen midangte aʼ tawh kibang lo a, amaute in nangma thukhamte zui lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin hih mite na hici khah khong ding kilawm lo hi." 
Esther3:9 Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh amaute a kisuksiatna ding thu pia-in lai-in gelh in. Tua hileh nangma sumkholna sungah koih dingin na khutnuai-a na uliante tungah ngun talen tul sawm ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther3:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ama khut sung panin a minthuhna zungbuh suahin Jew miteʼ gal, Agag-te beh Hammedathaʼ tapa Hamanʼ tungah a pia hi." 
Esther3:11 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah, “Na sum cihte nangmah kong piakik hi; na mi cihte zong nangma khut sungah kong pia hi; na ut bangbangin bawl in,” a ci hi." 
Esther3:12 A kha masa a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ lai-atte khempeuh kisam a, Hamanʼ genna tawh kizui-in kumpipaʼ nuai ah gam tampi a uksawnte le gam khat a uksawnte le gam uksawnteʼ khutnuai ah a mi tuamtuamte lakah uliante tungah lai kipaisak hi. Gam khempeuh ah amauʼ lai ciat, mi khempeuh tungah amau pau ciatin kigelh hi. Hih lai pen kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ min tawh kigelhin kumpipaʼ minthuhna zungbuh tawh min kithuh hi." 
Esther3:13 Tua bangin kumpipaʼ ukna gam khempeuh ah laitaite kipiasak a, Adar kha ahi a kha sawm le nihna a ni sawm le thum ni, ni khat sungin Jew mi a moi a ham, numei naupang, a vekpi-in susia-in, thatin, a beisak mang nading uh le a neihsate uh a laksak nadingun thu kipia hi." 
Esther3:14 Tua a ni seh ni-in amaute a baih sa-in a om theih nadingun hih thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuh ah dal khat ciat kipuakin tua thu pen a gam sung mi khempeuh tungah a kizasak kim ding ahi hi. 
Esther3:15 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna tawh laitaite kinawh sawl a, hih thupiakna pen kumpi khua Susa khuapi panin a kihawm khia ahi hi. Kumpipa le Haman zu ne-in om hithiat uh a, ahi zongin Susa khuapi sung buai mahmah hi." 
Esther4:1 Mordekai in hih thupiang teng a theih ciangin a puan bal kekin puanhampi silhin vut kibuak a, nakpi takin a kap kawmin khua sungah vak kawikawi hi." 
Esther4:2 Puanhampi silh kawmpi-in kongpi ah kuamah kilutsak lo ahih manin kumpi inn kongpi panin a kimuhna mun ciangah pai hi. 
Esther4:3 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna a tunna gam Jew miteʼ omna khempeuh ah nakpi tak a thumna le tauna, antanna, kahna le dip-humna om hi. Mi a tam zaw in puanhampi silhin vut lakah lum uh hi." 
Esther4:4 Estherʼ nasem numeite le a innsung maangte hong pai-in ama kiangah tua thu a gen ciangun kumpinu in lamdang sa mahmah hi. A puanhampi a laih nadingin amah in Mordekai ading puante khak a, ahih hangin Mordekai in tuate na sang lo hi." 
Esther4:5 Tua ciangin Esther in ama na a sem dingin a kiseh, kumpipa innsung maangte lak panin Hathak a kici mipa samin hih thu pen bang hi a, bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in Mordekai tung panin thu a va kan dingin a sawl hi." 
Esther4:6 Kumpi inn kongpi mai-a om khuapi kongzing tualpi a om Mordekai kiangah Hathak va pai a," 
Esther4:7 Mordekai in ama tunga thupiangte khempeuh le Jew mite suk mang nadingin kumpipaʼ sumkholna ah Haman in piak dinga a sum ciamzah thute khempeuh ama kiangah na gen hi. 
Esther4:8 Amaute a kisuk mang nadingin Susa khua panin a kihawm khia laidal khat zong Mordekai in ama tungah pia a, amah in Esther tungah tua lai na pia-in a thu a na gentelna ding le, kumpipa kiangah Esther na pai-in ama mipihte adingin a na thumsak ding zong a sawl hi." 
Esther4:9 Hathak zong ciahin Mordekaiʼ thugen teng Esther kiangah va gen hi. 
Esther4:10 Tua ciangin Esther in Hathak mah sawlkikin Mordekaiʼ tungah thu zasak a," 
Esther4:11 “Numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin sap lohpi-in mi khat peuhpeuh kumpipaʼ omna inn sungah a va lut leh upadi khat bek om a, tua pen, thah ding ahi hi; kumpipa in ama lamah a kham kumpi ciangkhut a na zan leh tua mipa suakta bek ding ahihna thu kumpipaʼ nasemte le ama ukna gam mi khempeuh in a theih ciat uh ahi hi. Tu-in kumpipa kiangah a pai dingin hong kisap loh zawh ni sawm thum bang pha ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther4:12 Tua hi a, Estherʼ thugen teng Mordekai tungah kigen hi." 
Esther4:13 Tua ciangin Mordekai in Esther a dawnkikna thu a mahmah puasakkik a, “Kumpi inn sungah na omna hangin Jew mi khempeuh lak panin nang a suakta tuan dingin kingaihsun kei in." 
Esther4:14 Hih bang hunin bangmah hih loin na omcip leh, Jew miteʼ suahtak nading le noptuamna ding thu mun dang khat pan hong piang veve dinga, nangmah le na innkuanpihte na si mang ding uh hi. Hih kumpi inn na tunna pen hih bang huna mah dinga a tung na hih mel zong kua in thei ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Esther4:15 Tua ciangin Esther in Mordekai a dawnna lai amah puasak leuleu a," 
Esther4:16 “Pai-in Susa khua sunga om Jew mi khempeuh khawm inla, keimah ngaihsutna-in an na tang un. A sun a zan ci loin ni thum sung an ne lo, tui dawn loin na om un. Na tan uh mah bangin kei le ka nasem numeite in zong ka na tang ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin ngeina ahih loh hangin kumpipa kiangah ka va pai dinga, ka sih leh zong a si ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther4:17 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai pai-in Estherʼ sawl bang teekteekin a gamta hi. 
Esther5:1 A ni thum ni-in Esther in a kumpi puan silhin kumpipaʼ inntual sung nungah dingin kumpi inn lam a nga hi. Kumpi inn sung a kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tu-in kongpi lam na nga hi. 
Esther5:2 Inntual ah Kumpinu Esther dinga a om kumpipa in a muh ciangin Esther in kumpipaʼ maipha ngah a, kumpipa in a khut a a tawi kumpi ciangkhut pen Estherʼ lamah a zan hi. Tua ciangin Esther in hong naihin tua ciangkhut dawn va lawng hi." 
Esther5:3 Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, bang thu ahi hiam? Kei tungah nong nget peuhpeuh, ka kumpi gam phel khat ciang dong, nang tungah hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:4 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, kumpipa aʼ dinga kong bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin tu ni-in Haman tawh hong pai un,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:5 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Estherʼ deih bangin i gamtat theih nadingin manlangin Haman va sam un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin Estherʼ bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin kumpipa le Haman hong pai uh hi." 
Esther5:6 Amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Estherʼ kiangah, “Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia ding hi. Nong nget peuhpeuh ka kumpi gam phel khat ciang dong nangawn hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:7 Esther in dawngin, “Nang tung panin kong nget nop kong thumnop thu in:" 
Esther5:8 Topa aw, nong hehpih zawh a, na lung a kim a, kong nget thu nong piak zawh ding leh, no tegel adingin ka na bawl an a ne dingin zing ciangin kumpipa le Haman hong pai un. Zing ciangin nong cih bangin ka deihna kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther5:9 Tua ahih ciangin lungdam kipakin tua ni-in Haman a ciah hi. Ahih hangin kongpi a om Mordekai in amah zahtakna limin a mai ah ding lo, kun lo-a om a muh ciangin Mordekai tungah nakpi takin a heh hi." 
Esther5:10 Ahi zongin Haman ki-ip tentanin inn ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin a lawmte le a zi Zeresh sam a," 
Esther5:11 ama hauhna teng, a tapa neih teng, kumpipa in amah a pahtak manin a za a khansakna teng le kumpipaʼ nasemte le ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lian zaw-in amah a koihna thute khempeuh amaute tungah genin a lak hi." 
Esther5:12 Tua ciangin Haman in, “Tua teng bek hi nai lo lai hi. Kumpinu Esther nangawn in ama bawl sa an kumpipa tawh a nekhawm dingin kei sim loh midang kuamah paisak lo hi. Zing ciangin zong kumpipa tawh kei hong sam khawm hi." 
Esther5:13 Ahi zongin kumpipaʼ kongpi a a tu Jew mi Mordekai ka muh lai teng hih thute khempeuh a mawkna suak zel hi,” ci lai hi." 
Esther5:14 Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh le a lawmte khempeuh in ama kiangah, “Pi sawm sagih le nga a sang khuam phutsak inla, tua tungah Mordekai a kikhailup nadingin zing ciangin kumpipa kiangah gen in. Tua ciangin nitak an ne dingin lungnuam takin kumpipa tawh pai in,” a ci uh hi. Haman in hih ngaihsutna hoih sa a, a khuam a phutsak hi." 
Esther6:1 Tua zanin kumpipa ihmu thei lo a, nisim thupiang ciaptehna Khang Tangthu Laibu lasak a, ama zakin tua laibu kisim hi." 
Esther6:2 Tua banga a kisim ciangin, kongcingte sung panin innsung maang Bigthana le Teresh in Kumpipa Ahasueras thah a sawmna thu pen Mordekai in a genna thu a kiciaptehna sim kha uh hi." 
Esther6:3 Tua thu a zak ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih thu hangin Mordekaiʼ tungah pahtawina ahi a, minliatna ahi zongin bang kipia ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua lai-a a om kumpipaʼ nasemte in Mordekaiʼ tungah bangmah a kipiak lohna thu a gen uh hi." 
Esther6:4 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih kiim nai ah kua om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua laitakin Mordekai thah nadingin a phuh sa khuam tungah Mordekai khai lupna ding thu kumpipa kiangah a ngen dingin kumpi huang sungah Haman hong tum hi." 
Esther6:5 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih lai ah Haman om hi; inntual ah ding hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Amah hong tumsak un,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:6 Tua ahih ciangin Haman hong tum a, kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah bang kihih leh hoih na sa hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Haman in a lungsim sungah ngaihsun a, “Kumpipa in kei sangin a pahtawi nop zawk ding kua om zenzen ahi hiam?” ci-in ngaihsun hi." 
Esther6:7 Tua ahih manin Haman in kumpipa kiangah, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa adingin" 
Esther6:8 kumpipa mahmah in a silh kumpi puante le kumpipa a tuanna sakol a lukhu tawh la sak in. 
Esther6:9 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ ulian pen khat tungah tua kumpi puante le sakol apsak in. Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa pen amah zemsak inla, tua ciangin khua sung kongzing lampi ah sakol tungah a tuang sa-in na ulian pen pa kaisak inla, ama mai ah kikosakin, ‘Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah hih bangin kibawl ding hi,’ cisak in,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Haman kiangah, “Na cih sa bangin manlangin kumpi puante le sakol la pah inla, kongpi a om Jew mi Mordekai tungah hih thute khempeuh hih in. Na gen sa khat beek siit kei in,” a ci hi." 
Esther6:11 Tua ahih ciangin Haman in kumpi puante le sakol la-in Mordekai zem a, khuapi sung kongzing lampi ah amah tuangsakin, “Kumpipa in a pahtawi nop mipa tungah hih bangin kibawl ding hi,” ci-in a taangko hi." 
Esther6:12 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ kongpi ah Mordekai ciahkik hi. Haman ahihleh kilukhuh sa-in a thum kawmin a inn ah ciah pah vingveng hi. 
Esther6:13 Tua ciangin Haman in a zi Zeresh le a lawmte khempeuh tungah ama tunga thupiang teng a gen hi. Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh le a lawmte in ama kiangah, “Tu-a na lelhtak Mordekai pen Jew mi ahi hi; amah na zo kei dinga, amah in nang hong zo zaw ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Esther6:14 Tua bangin Haman tawh amaute a kiho laitakin kumpipaʼ innsung maangte hong pai a, Estherʼ bawl sa nitak an a ne dingin amah a paikhiatpih pah uh hi." 
Esther7:1 Tua ahih ciangin Kumpinu Esther tawh an a ne dingin kumpipa le Haman va pai uh hi. 
Esther7:2 A ni nih ni, amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Esther kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, nong nget nop bang ahi hiam? Nong nget khempeuh ka kumpi gam phel khat dongin hong kipia ding hi,” cikik leuleu hi." 
Esther7:3 Tua ciangin Kumpinu Esther in dawngin, “Kumpipa in nong hehpih zawh a, kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, kong nget kong thumnop thu pen keimah le ka mipihte sihna tawh nong kipelhsakna ding ahi hi." 
Esther7:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei le ka mite suksiat ding, thah ding, beisak mang dingin hong kizuak hi. Kote, numei pasal a kibangin sal dingin hong kizuak hileh bangmah ka pau kei ding hi; tua bang lel tawh kumpipa nawngkaisak taak lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther7:5 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Hih banga gamtat ding a ngaihsun kua hi a, koi ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Esther7:6 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Hong langpang ka gal pa! Hih migilo Haman!” a ci hi. Tua laitakin kumpipa le kumpinuʼ mai ah cih nading thei loin Haman a om hi." 
Esther7:7 Tua ciangin kumpipa a hehsa-in annekna pan ding khia-in kumpi huan sungah a pai hi. Ahi zongin Haman ahihleh tua lai mahah omin Kumpinu Esther in a nuntakna a suahtaksakna ding a thum hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in amah thah dingin a ngaihsutna a lungsim a thei hi. 
Esther7:8 Kumpi huan panin a annekna mun uh ah kumpipa hong paikik ciangin Estherʼ tutna lamah Haman na awn phei-in a om mu a, kumpipa in, “Ka inn sung ka muhna nangawn ah hih mipa in kumpinu hih ding ahi hiam?” ci hi. Kumpipa in tua thu a cih phetin amaute in Hamanʼ mai puan a khuh uh hi." 
Esther7:9 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ na a sem innsung maangte lakah Harbona in, “Nidangin kumpipaʼ na hoihtakin a sem ngei Mordekai thah nadingin Haman mahmah in a phuhsak, pi sawm sagih le nga a sang khuam pen Hamanʼ inn ah tumahin om hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther7:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Tua tungah amah khailum un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Mordekai khai lup nadingin a phuh khuam tungah Haman a khailum uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ hehna a dam hi." 
Esther8:1 Tua ni mahin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Jew miteʼ gal ahi Hamanʼ neihsa khempeuh Kumpinu Esther tungah pia hi. Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ omna ah Mordekai hong tung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah tawh a kinaina zia, kumpipa kiangah Esther in gen hi." 
Esther8:2 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Hamanʼ tung panin a lakkik sa minthuhna zungbuh pen suah khia-in Mordekai a pia hi. Tua hi a, Hamanʼ neihsa khempeuh a uk dingin Esther in Mordekai a koih hi." 
Esther8:3 Kumpipaʼ mai ah Esther khatvei va paikikin khitui naptui tawh a khe mai ah va puk a, Agag mi Hamanʼ vaihawm siatna lianpi le Jew mite a sawmna thu a kipelhkik theih nadingin va thum hi." 
Esther8:4 Kumpipa in Estherʼ lamah a kham ciangkhut na zan a," 
Esther8:5 tua ciangin Esther tho to-in kumpipa mai ah dingin, “Kei nong hehpih zawh a, hih ka ngaihsutna man na sak a, hoih na sak le, na ukna gam sung khempeuh ah a om Jew mite thah nading a sawmna-in Agag-te beh Hammedathaʼ tapa Haman in a laigelhte dawhkik nadingin lai khat gelhsak in." 
Esther8:6 Ka mipihte tungah hih siatna lianpi a tung ka muh ding bangci thuak zawh ding ka hi hiam? Ahih kei le ka innkuan pih tungah a tung hih siatna ka muh ding bangci thuak zawh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. 
Esther8:7 Tua ciangin Kumpipa Ahasueras in Kumpinu Esther le Jew mi Mordekai tungah, “Haman in Jew mite thah hong sawm ahih manin sing tungah amah kikhailum khin a, Hamanʼ neihsa khempeuh Estherʼ tungah kong pia khin hi." 
Esther8:8 Kumpipaʼ min tawh kigelhin, kumpipaʼ minthuhna tawh a kithuh khin sa lai pen kidokkik thei nawn lo ahih manin, tu-in Jew mite tawh kisai-in hoih dinga na up bangin kumpipaʼ min tawh gelh inla, tua khit ciangin kumpipaʼ minthuhna zungbuh tawh thuh in,” a ci hi." 
Esther8:9 Tua ahih ciangin a kha thumna ahi Sivan kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ lai-atte kisam a, Mordekaiʼ gen bang teekteekin Jew mite tung le India panin Ethiopia dong gam za khat le sawm nih le sagih a uk ahi gam tampi a ukte, gam khat a ukte le tua gam sunga uliante tungah lai kihawmkik a, amauʼ lai ciat le amauʼ pau ciatin kigelh a, Jew mite ading zong amauʼ lai le amauʼ pau mahin kigelh hi." 
Esther8:10 Tua lai pen Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ minin kigelhin kumpipaʼ minthuhna zungbuh mah tawh kithuh a, kumpi sakol buk ah a kikhawi kumpipaʼ sakolte tungah laitaite kituangsakin lai kihawmsak hi." 
Esther8:11 Kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thumna ni khat sungin Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam sung khempeuh ah Jew mite in amau a sim ding mi ahih kei leh a gamteʼ hih nading panin khua khempeuh ah amau na kipawlin na kihu-in, tua banga amaute a hih dingte pen a numei a naupangin susia-in, thatin a beisak nading uh le a neihsate uh a laksak theih nadingun hih banga lai piakna tawh kumpipa in Jew mite tungah hih theih nading thu a pia hi." 
Esther8:12  
Esther8:13 Tua thupiakna lai pen gam khempeuh ah kihawmin mi khempeuh kitheisakin, amauʼ galte a thukkikna ding ahi tua ni tawh kisai-in Jew mite a kigin kholh ding uh ahi hi." 
Esther8:14 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipaʼ sakolte tungah laitaite tuangin kumpipaʼ thu-kin sawl mah bangin nawh tai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah zong tua thupiakna lai a kihawm hi. 
Esther8:15 Tua ciangin kumpi puan a san le a kang silhin, kham tawh kibawl kumpi lukhu lianpi khu-in, saihadial puan neel le puan san silh sa-in kumpipaʼ omna panin Mordekai paikhia hi. Tua ciangin Susa khuapi sung mi khempeuh lungdamin awng uh hi." 
Esther8:16 Tua hi a, Jew mite in suahtakna, lungdamna le pahtawina ngah uh hi." 
Esther8:17 Kumpipaʼ thupiakna a tunna gam le khua khempeuh ah Jew mite adingin lungdamna le kipahna, pawi bawlna le nasep khawlin zum khakna a om hi. Tua hi a, midangte in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin tua gam a om mi tampi tak in Jew mi ka hi uh hi, a ci uh hi." 
Esther9:1 A kha sawm le nihna ahi Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni-in kumpipaʼ thupiakna bangin sep khiatna ding hun hong tung hi. Jew miteʼ galte in gualzo dinga a ki-up ni teek pen amau a mudah miteʼ tungah Jew mite a gualzawh ni ding hong hizaw hi. 
Esther9:2 Tua ni-in amauteʼ siat nading a geelte a su gawp dingin Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam khempeuh a amauʼ khuapite sungah Jew mite kikhawm uh hi. Mi khempeuh in Jew mite kihta uh ahih manin kuamah in Jew mite nang ngam lo uh hi. 
Esther9:3 Mordekai kihta uh ahih manin gam tampi a ukte le gam khat a ukte le gam sunga ulian tuamtuamte le kumpi ulian khempeuh in Jew mite panpih uh hi. 
Esther9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpi inn sungah Mordekai ulianpi khat suak a, a vangliatna a khan semsem mah bangin gam khempeuh ah ama minthanna kizel hi." 
Esther9:5 Tua ahih ciangin Jew mite in namsau tawh a galte uh tampi tak that lum uh a, amau a mudahte a ututun hih gawp uh hi." 
Esther9:6 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sung mahmah ah Jew mite in mi za nga thatin susia uh hi. 
Esther9:7 Tua hi a, amaute in Jew miteʼ gal ahi Hammedathaʼ tapa Hamanʼ tapa sawmte Parshandatha, Dalfon, Aspatha, Poratha, Adalia, Aridatha, Parmashta, Arisai, Aridai le Vaizatha te zong a that uh hi. Ahi zongin amauʼ neihsate suksak lo uh hi." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sunga a kithat zah tua ni mahmah in kumpipa kiangah kizasak hi. 
Esther9:12 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Kumpinu Esther kiangah, “Kumpi khua Susa khuapi sungah Jew mite in mi za nga that uh a, Hamanʼ tapa sawmte zong that uh hi. Ka ukna gamdangte sungah zong bangzah that ding kithei lo hi. Tu-in bang deih lai na hi hiam? Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia lai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Esther9:13 Tua ciangin Esther in, “Kumpipa in hoih na sak leh, tu ni-a mah bangin zing ciangin zong Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite tungah hih theihna thu pia inla, Hamanʼ tapa sawmteʼ luanghawmte khuam tungah khaisak in,” a ci hi." 
Esther9:14 Tua ahih manin tua banga a hih nadingin kumpipa in a sawl hi. Susa khuapi sungah hih thu suakkhiasak a, khuam tungah Hamanʼ tapa sawmte kikhai hi." 
Esther9:15 Susa khuapi sunga om Jew mite Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni-in kikhawmkikin Susa khua sungah mi za thum that uh hi. Ahi zongin amauʼ neihsate suksak lo uh hi. 
Esther9:16 Tua mah bangin kumpipaʼ ukna gam tuamtuam a om Jew mite zong amauʼ kihut nadingin kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in zong amau a mudah mihing tul sawm sagih le tul nga thatin a galte uh tungah phu la uh hi. Ahih hangin a neihsate uh suksak lo uh hi. 
Esther9:17 Hih banga a hih pen Adar kha a ni sawm le thum ni hi a, a ni sawm le li ni-in tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi." 
Esther9:18 Ahih hangin Susa khua sunga om Jew mite ahihleh a ni sawm le thum le sawm le li ni-in kikaikhawm uh a, a ni sawm le nga ni tawlnga uh a, pawi bawlin lungdamin om uh hi." 
Esther9:19 Hih thu hangin gam sung khuaneute-a teng Jew mite in Adar kha a ni sawm le li ni pawi bawlna le lungdam ni dingin tawlngak ni-in nei uh a, an lim nono kikholhna ni-in a zang uh hi." 
Esther9:20 Tua ciangin Mordekai in hih thupiangte khempeuh lai-in ciamteh a, a nai a gamla a om Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam sung khempeuh a om Jew mite tungah lai paisak hi." 
Esther9:21 A kumkumin Adar kha ni sawm le li ni le sawm le nga ni a tan nadingun thu a pia hi. 
Esther9:22 Tua nite pen Jew mite a galte uh tung panin a suahtak ni, dahna le thumnate lungdamna le lungnopna a suah kha ahi hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in pawi bawl ni le lungdam ni-in nei-in, an lim nono khatlekhat kikholh ni le mizawngte tungah letsong piak ni-in a zat dingun thu a pia hi." 
Esther9:23 Tua ahih ciangin Mordekaiʼ laigelhna tawh kizui-in Jew mite in a pat sa uh hih banga a hihnate uh a zom uh hi. 
Esther9:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh Jew mi khempeuhʼ gal ahi, Hammedathaʼ tapa, Agag-te beh Haman in Jew mite su gawpin a suksiat nadingin Pur kici ai sanin Jew mite suksiat ding sawm hi." 
Esther9:25 Ahih hangin kumpipa in hih thu a theih ciangin, Jew mite suk nadingin Haman in a geel sa thu hoih lo pen Hamanʼ lu tung mah a leh tuk nading le amah le a tapate khuam tungah a kikhai nading lai-in gelhin thu a pia hi." 
Esther9:26 Tua ahih ciangin Pur min tamin hih hun sungteng Purim ci-in min a phuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin hih lai sunga a kigelh thute khempeuh le hih thute amauʼ mit tawh mu-in a pumpi uh tawh a tuahna uh hangin," 
Esther9:27 Jew mite amau mahmah le a suan a khakte uh le amau a pawlpih khempeuh in lai sunga kigelh bangin a kiseh hunin kum simin hih ni nihte a pel loin a tan ding uh kipsak uh a," 
Esther9:28 a khangkhangin innkuan sim, gam sim, khuapi simah hih nite phawkin a kitanna ding le Jew mite lakah hih Purim nite a kitan ngitnget nading ahi a, a suanlekhakte un zong hih thu a mangngilh het loh nading uh ahi zongin kho takin a len uh hi." 
Esther9:29 Tua ciangin Abihailʼ tanu Kumpinu Esther in Purim thu tawh kisai hih laikhak nihna a kipsak nadingin Jew mi Mordekai tungah aana a kicingin a piakna lai-in a gelh hi. 
Esther9:30 Kumpi Ahasuerasʼ ukna gam za le sawm nih le sagih sungah a om Jew mite khempeuh tungah kilemna le nopna a om nading deihsakna laite kikhak a," 
Esther9:31 Jew mi Mordekai in a gelh sa bangin a kiseh sa tawh kizui-in hih Purim nite a tan nadingun thu kipia hi. Tua mah bangin amaute le a suanlekhakte uh adingin antanna ding le thumna bawlna ding ngeinate a gelh uh hi. 
Esther9:32 Kumpinu Estherʼ thupiakna in hih Purim bawlna ding ngeinate kipsak a, lai thupite sungah hih thu kiciamteh hi." 
Esther10:1 Kumpipa Ahasueras in a ukna gam leitung le tuikulh tunga teengte tung panin siah kai hi. 
Esther10:2 Ama vangliatna le a sepnate khempeuh le Mordekai tungah a piak minphatnate, Media le Persia Kumpiteʼ Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi." 
Esther10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpipa Ahasuerasʼ zomah Mordekai a lian pen ahi hi. Mordekai in ama miteʼ phattuam nading le a suanlekhakte uh a khantoh nading hanciam ahih manin Jew mite lakah mi lian khat hi a, a gam mihonpite in a it kim uh hi." 
Job1:1 Uz gamah Job kici min nei mi khat a om hi. Tua mipa a paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian a zahtak mi khat hi a, amah in gamtat hoih lo peuhmah peel hi." 
Job1:2 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum nei hi. 
Job1:3 Amah in tuu tul sagih, kalaoh tul thum, bawngtal kap za nga, lapi za nga le nasem tampi tak a nei hi. Tua ahih manin nisuahna gam sungah Job a hau pen khat ahi hi." 
Job1:4 Ama tapate in inn khat panin inn khat ah a banbanin pawi bawlin pai kawikawi uh a, tua pawi a siim dingin a sanggam numei thumte uh zong a sam kawikawi uh hi." 
Job1:5 Tua banga a pawi bawl uh gual khat a kikhit ciangin Job in a tapate samin amaute siansuah a, zingsangin tho baihin a ta phazah tawh kizui-in meihal biakna a pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Job in, “Ka tate khialin, a lungsim sung uh ah Pasian samsia kha thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Tu-a bangin Job in hih tawntung hi." 
Job1:6 Ni khat ni-in Topaʼ omna ah vantung mite hong pai uh a, tuate lakah Satan zong hong kihel hi." 
Job1:7 Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi pan a hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin ka hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:8 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawk kha hiam? A paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoih lo a peel amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah na mu kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:9 Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Job in Pasian hong mawk zahtak ahi hiam?" 
Job1:10 Amah le a innkuan le a neihsate khempeuh na hutna-in a kimkot ah daai khan hi lo na hi hiam? Ama hihna khempeuh ah thupha na pia a, gen zawh lohin ama neihsa pung hi." 
Job1:11 Ahi zongin na khut zanin ama neihsa khempeuh suksak lecin na maitang mahmah ah nang hong samsia pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, ama neihsa khempeuh na khut sungah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah taktak ahihleh na su kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ omna panin Satan a paikhia hi." 
Job1:13 Ni khat, a tapate le a tanute in a u pen uh inn ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi." 
Job1:14 Kamtai khat Job kiangah hong tungin, “Bawngtalte in lo kho-in, tuate gei ah late gamta uh hi." 
Job1:15 Tua laitakin Seba mite hong pai-in ganhingte hong sut a, namsau tawh gancingte that khin uh hi. Hih thu a hong zasak thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:16 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tungin, “Vantung panin keek hong kia a, tuute le tuucingte kha-in kaang tum uh hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:17 Tua pa in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu-in, “Khaldea mite hon thum in kalaohte hong sut a, namsau tawh kalaoh tung tuangte khempeuh that hi. Hih thu nang kiangah a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:18 Amah in a thugen a khit ma-in kamtai dang khat hong tung leuleu a, “Na tapate le na tanute a u pen uh inn ah an ne zu ne-in om uh hi." 
Job1:19 Tua laitakin sehnel gam panin huihpi pingpei hong nungin a inn mut pai-in na tate deng lum hi. Nang kiangah hih thu a hong ko thei dingin kei bek kong suakta hi,” a ci hi." 
Job1:20 Hih thu a zak ciangin Job dah lua-in a puan bal kek a, a sam met khia-in leilak ah bok sukin Pasian a bia hi." 
Job1:21 Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nu sung panin guaktangin ka suak a, guaktang mahin ka ciahkik ding hi. Topa in hong pia a, Topa mah in hong lakik hi. Topaʼ min kiphat tahen,” a ci hi." 
Job1:22 Hih thu khempeuh ah Job khial lo a, Pasian zong mawhsak lo hi." 
Job2:1 Ni khat ni-in Topaʼ omna ah vantung mite hong paikik uh a, Satan zong amaute lakah hong kihelin Topaʼ omna mahah hong pai hi." 
Job2:2 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Koi lai panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Satan in Topa dawngin, “Leitung khempeuh a lu pan a taw dong vak kawikawi-in ka va phehlehna mun panin kong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:3 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “Ka nasem Job na phawk hiam? A paubaang lo, a thutang, Pasian zahtakin gamtat hoih lo a peel, amah tawh a kibang midang leitungah om lo hi. Thu om lopi-in amah susia dingin kei nong kam pausak a, ahi zongin ama hoihna bangmah hem tuan lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:4 Tua ciangin Satan in Topa dawngin, “Vun bek in vun mah lei zo bek, ci-in paunak a om mah bangin mi khat in ama nuntakna a hutna-in a neih khempeuh pia ngam ding hi." 
Job2:5 Tu-in na khut zan inla, ama sa le a guh suksak lecin nangma maitang mahah pel loin nang hong samsia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job2:6 Tua ciangin Topa in Satan kiangah, “En in, na khut sungah amah kong ap hi; ahi zongin amah sisak kei in,” a ci hi." 
Job2:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ omna panin Satan paikhia a, Job a khetul pan a luzang dongin a kihhuai meima a veisak hi." 
Job2:8 Tua ciangin Job in beel kitam them khat la-in tua tawh kikhuatin vut lakah a tu hi. 
Job2:9 Tua ciangin a zi in, “Na upna khiam tuan lo ding na hi hiam? Pasian samsia inla si suk mai in,” a ci hi." 
Job2:10 Ahih hangin amah in a zi kiangah, “Numei haiteʼ kampau bangin na pau hi. Pasianʼ tung panin a hoih sang ihih ciangin siatna zongsang lo ding ihi hiam?” a ci hi. Hih thu khempeuh ah a kampau nangawnin Job khial lo hi." 
Job2:11 Jobʼ lawmte thum, Teman khuami Elifaz, Shuah gam mi Bildad le Naamah gam mi Zofar te in Job in a thuak gimna thu teng a zak uh ciangin a inn ciat panun amah a hehnem ding le a hanthawn dingin kituahin hong pai khawm uh hi." 
Job2:12 Amaute in a gamla sim mun panin Job a muh tung un amah thei pah lo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute a gingin kap khia uh a, a puan uh bal kekin a lu tung uh a tukik dingin leivui lawn to uh hi." 
Job2:13 Tua ciangin leilak ah sun sagih le zan sagih sung amah tawh tukhawm uh a, ama thuakna a nasiat mahmah lamtak mu uh ahih manin kuamah in kam khat beek a paupih ngam kei uh hi." 
Job3:1 Hih bang teng khit ciangin Job in thugen hong kipan a, mihingin a pian ni a samsia hi." 
Job3:2 Tua ciangin Job in," 
Job3:3 “Ka suah ni le ‘Pasal naungek khat kipaii hi,’ a kicih zan bei mang hen!" 
Job3:4 Tua ni khimzin ni suak hen! Van a Pasian in phawkin nei kei henla, tua ni-in khua vak taang kei hen." 
Job3:5 Khua niim, khua mial in khuhcip hen. Tua ni-in meiipi zing henla, tua ni awkin valh tum hen." 
Job3:6 “Tua zan, khuamial sahpi in mancip hen! Kum khat sunga nidangte tawh kisim khawm kei henla, kha khat sunga nidangte lakah kiseh khawm kei hen." 
Job3:7 Tua zanin ta piang kei henla, lungdam otna awging tua zanin ging nawn kei hen." 
Job3:8 Phuisamna tawh Awle a khiim thei, a mitphial tawh tuipi ganhing a hencip thei mite in tua zan samsia tahen." 
Job3:9 Tua ni zingsang aksite mial hen. A vak ngei lo ding khuavak ngak niloh henla, zingsang phalvak mu ngei kei hen;" 
Job3:10 bang hang hiam cih leh kei hong kipaiina naugil na khakcip lo a, keiʼ muhna panin lungkhamna hong hepkhiatsak lo hi." 
Job3:11 “Bang hangin a sisa-in suak hoh lo a, bang hangin ka suah phetin si pah hoh lo ka hi hiam?" 
Job3:12 Bang hangin ka nuʼ khuk tungah hong kitawi se a, ka nuʼ nawi hong kiteepsak se ahi hiam?" 
Job3:13 Tua hi zenzen kei leh hanah nuam takin ka lum hithiat khin ding hi. Sihna sungah ihmu-in ka tawlnga khin dinga," 
Job3:14 inn hoih nono a lam kumpite le uliante," 
Job3:15 ngun le kham tawh a kidim a hau a liante tawh nuam takin hanah ka tawlnga khinta ding hi. 
Job3:16 Bang hangin a hun cing lo-a suakte bang, khuavak a mu man loin a si naungekte bangin hong kiseelcip hoh lo ahi hiam?" 
Job3:17 Tua lai ah migilote in hong su kha nawn lo dinga, a gim mite tawlnga hithiat ding hi." 
Job3:18 Tua lai ah galmat salte in nopna ngah dinga, nasem ukpaʼ awging za nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Job3:19 Tua lai munah mi lian mi neu om khawm a, silate nangawn a topaʼ kiang pan suakta hi." 
Job3:20 “Bang hangin lungkhamna a thuak mipa, a nuntakna haksa a sa mahmah mipa," 
Job3:21 sih ding lunggulh ngeungau napi, a si thei lo, sum phum zon sangin sih ding a lim zon zaw," 
Job3:22 han sung a tun ciangin a nuam mahmah, hankhuk a tun ciangin nuam lua-in a diang gawp mite, khuavak a mu dingin mi-in piang laizang ahi hiam?" 
Job3:23 Bang hangin mailam thu ding a thei lopi-in a mot om ding, a kimkot ah Pasian in daai a khaknelh mipa, mi-in piang zenzen ahi hiam?" 
Job3:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh khuisatna, ka annek suak a, ka tauna, luipi ging bang hi." 
Job3:25 Ka kihtaktak thu ka tungah hong tung ta a, ka laulau thu, ka tuak ta hi." 
Job3:26 Lungnopna, daitakin omna, ka nei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong nawk niloh a, tawldam hun ka nei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Job4:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in thu hong gen a," 
Job4:2 “Mi khatpeuh in thu hong genpih leh na heh ding hiam? Kua in a kam ip zo nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Job4:3 Lunghiang mite na hanthotna, khut kha ban kha mite na thakhauhsakna," 
Job4:4 a puk mite na thugenna tawh na kipsakna, khuk zaw mite na hatsak ngeite ngaihsun in." 
Job4:5 Ahi zongin nang tungah tuate hong tung a, na thuak zo kei hi. Tuate in nang hong su a, na lungniam hi." 
Job4:6 Na biakna in hong hehnem zo lo ahi hiam? A paubaang lo, na nuntakna in lametna hong pia zo lo ahi hiam?" 
Job4:7 Tu-in ngaihsun in: Midik kimlai kua sia ngei ahi hiam? A thutang mi a kisuksiatna koi ah mu ngei na hi hiam? 
Job4:8 Mawhna bawlin buaina a piangsak mi in a gamtatna bangin a gah a atna ka thei hi. 
Job4:9 Pasianʼ husanna tawh tua bang mite sia a, ama hehna in tua bang mite kaang tum hi." 
Job4:10 Humpinelkai hawk bangin migiloteʼ hawkna dai ta a, Pasian in amauteʼ ha suktansak khin ahih manin gamdai ta uh hi." 
Job4:11 Annek ding a mu lo a thahat humpinelkai bangin amaute si mangkhin uh a, a tate uh kithehthang hi." 
Job4:12 “Tu-in kei kiangah thu khat hong tung khian a, ka bil in tua thu ginghiau a za hi." 
Job4:13 Mi a ihsip hun zankim laitak, zan mangmat hun laitakin" 
Job4:14 launa le linna kei tungah hong tung a, ka pumpi linna in kei hong lausak hi." 
Job4:15 Huih in ka mai hong mut a, ka khuasikmul hong suaksak hi." 
Job4:16 A mel ka khen theih loh lim khat hong dinga, keima mai ah mihing lim khat hong om a, tua ciangin aw un duadua khat ka za a," 
Job4:17 ‘Pasianʼ mai ah mi khatpeuh paubaang loin om zo ngei ding ahi hiam? Amah a Bawlpaʼ mai ah sitbaang loin om zo ngei ding ahi hiam? 
Job4:18 Pasian in ama nasemte mahmah muang zo loin, ama sawltakteʼ mawhna mu ahihleh,"
