Job4:19 inn umna kawmin buan a kizatna inn sunga a teeng mite, a inn bulpi leivui ahi," 
Job4:20 zing kal nitak kalin, a kisusia thei sungah a omte, bangzah ta-in kuama don lohin si pakin," 
Job4:21 amauʼ liatna in taisan pak dinga, pilna ngah ngei loin si pak zaw ding hi lo ahi hiam?’ hong ci hi." 
Job5:1 “Tu-in na thu ko in: Nang hong huh ding om ahi hiam? A siangthote kua penʼ lam zuan ding na hi hiam? 
Job5:2 Mihai pa in a hehna sih lawh a, muhdahna in sihna piangsak hi." 
Job5:3 Mihai pa in limtakin zungkha ngei napi, ama inn thakhatin a kizunglot ka mu ngei hi." 
Job5:4 A tapate suahtaksak zawh ding hi nawn lo hi. Kulh kongpi gei ah amaute kisu gawp a, amaute a hon khia ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job5:5 Midangte in a neihsate liah tumsak uh a, amah sangin a hat zaw pa in a um a beel sunga a omte nangawn laksak a, a neih a lam duhgawhin a deihgawh hi." 
Job5:6 Leilak panin gimna hong piangtawm lo a, lei sung panin lungkhamna hong po khia tawm lo hi." 
Job5:7 Mei-ek a to leen mah bangin mihingte in amauʼ lungkhamna ding mah a piangsak uh hi. 
Job5:8 “Nang hi leng, ka Pasianʼ tungah ka thum dinga, ama tungah ka thu ka ap ding hi." 
Job5:9 Amah in na liante le kuama phawk zawh loh thute sem a, gen zawh lohin a lamdang na tampi a bawl hi." 
Job5:10 Amah in guah zusak a, lo khempeuh tui a buak hi." 
Job5:11 Amah in miniamte sang koih a, a dahte lungnuamsak hi." 
Job5:12 Amah in migiloteʼ geelna suksiatsak ahih manin amaute in a ngimna uh tangtun thei lo uh hi. 
Job5:13 Amah in migilote amauʼ gitlohna mahah awksak a, ngian a zangteʼ geelna zong a lumletsak hi." 
Job5:14 Sun thapai-in khuamial sung kidenna a, sun tangpi mahin zan bangin mial a zawt uh hi." 
Job5:15 Ahi zongin amah in amauʼ kiang panin pa nei lote hon khia a, mi thahatte kiang panin mi cimawhte a hon khia hi." 
Job5:16 Tua ahih manin mizawngte in lametna neikik uh a, thuman lo mite ahihleh kihencip hi." 
Job5:17 “Pasian in a taii mite mi nuamsa hizaw ahih manin, Vanglian paʼ taiina thupi san in." 
Job5:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a liamsak hangin a liamna tunsak dinga, ama satna liamma damsak ding hi." 
Job5:19 Lungkhamna guk vei dong na tuahna ah amah in nang hong hon dinga, a sagih veina dingah siatna in nang hong su nawn lo ding hi." 
Job5:20 Kialpi sungin sih nading pan nang hong hon khia dinga, gal sungah namsau panin nang hong suaktasak ding hi." 
Job5:21 Gensiatna panin nang hong kihu dinga, siatna hong tun ciangin na lau kei ding hi." 
Job5:22 Suksiat ding le puksih dingte na nuihsan lel dinga, leitung gamsate na kihta kei ding hi." 
Job5:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh na lo sungah suang om lo dinga, gamlak gamsate in hong su lo ding hi." 
Job5:24 Na inn sungah lunghihmawhna ding om lo hi, ci-in na thei dinga, na inn kiim na et ciangin a kitasam bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Job5:25 Na suan na khakte tampi tak pha ding hi, ci-in na thei dinga, na sunga piangte leitung lopa zah pha ding hi, ci-in na thei ding hi." 
Job5:26 A hun ciangin ancilna phualah buhlom a tun mah bangin teek sihin han na zuan ding hi. 
Job5:27 Hih thute khempeuh ka kantel uh a, a thuman a na hi hi. Hih thute ka zak sa uh hi a, a manna na thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job6:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job6:2 “Ka lunggimna kitawikhai henla, ka haksatna khempeuh kitawiteh leh!" 
Job6:3 Tuipi sehnel khempeuh sangin gik zaw ding ahih manin ka kampaute guhin a kha hi. 
Job6:4 Vanglian paʼ thaltangte in kei hong kha a, ka sungah a thal gu kidiah hi. Pasian in a kihtakhuai-in kei hong su hi." 
Job6:5 Gam late in lopa a nek laitakin ham a, bawngtal in an a nek laitakin ham ahi hiam?" 
Job6:6 An lim lote, ci sawh loin kine thei a, aktui da kang in limna nei ahi hiam?" 
Job6:7 Ka kam in tuate ciam nuam lo a, tuate khempeuh a luak suahhuai an tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Job6:8 “Ka ngetna ngah thei hi leng a, Pasian in ka deihna hong pia ding hileh" 
Job6:9 Pasian in kei hong sucip henla, a khut zanin kei hong that vet leh!" 
Job6:10 Tua hileh keima kihehnepna hi dinga, hih zahta ka thuakna ah nuamin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Siangtho Paʼ thu ka nial khat zong om lo hi." 
Job6:11 Ka thuak lai nadingin bang hatna nei nawn a, lungduai a ka om nadingin lamet ding bang om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job6:12 Ka thahatna suang bang hi a, ka pumpi in sumngo tha paii ahi hiam?" 
Job6:13 Kei le keiʼ sung panin huhna bangci ngah tawm theih ding ka hi hiam? Kei hong kihuhna ding ka nget nading kuamah om lo hi. 
Job6:14 “Pasian ka nusia a, ka nusia kei zongin, hih bang lungkham hunin lawm citak ka kisam hi." 
Job6:15 No ka lawmte pen, lui tuikhang bang, a mangthang pak tui let bang," 
Job6:16 nin a khalhnelh vuk le tuikhal bangin na zuau tat uh hi. 
Job6:17 Khua a lum ciangin tuate tui mangthang a, ni a sat ciangin a kaang hi." 
Job6:18 Tua tui a zong dingin khualzin mite pai kawikawi a, gam sung tengah kawi pai-in a mangthang uh hi." 
Job6:19 Tema khuami khualzinte in zong tua tui zong uh a, Sheba mite in zong tua tui muanin a nei uh hi." 
Job6:20 Ahi zongin tua a lametna uh ah cimawh uh hi. Tua tui zuan uh a, a om loh ciangin cih nading thei loin kam ka lel uh hi." 
Job6:21 Tu-in zong kei adingin note tua bang lel na hi uh hi. Ka gimna teng nong mu uh a, na lau uh hi." 
Job6:22 No kiangah, ‘Na khat peuhpeuh hong pia un, ka suahtak nadingin sum tawh hong huh un," 
Job6:23 ka galteʼ kiang panin hong hon khia un, kei a hong nengniamteʼ khut sung panin hong tan khia un,’ hong ci ngei zenzen ka hi hiam?" 
Job6:24 “Hong hilh thei le-uhcin, pau loin ka om pah ding hi. Ka khialhna hong theitelsak dih un." 
Job6:25 Lungsim takpi tawh thugennate heh loin kisang thei a, ahi zongin no hong taiina in bang phatuamsak ahi hiam?" 
Job6:26 Kamging mawkmawk lelte heh taak sa a, huihʼ let mang cihmawh kamte thupi ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?" 
Job6:27 Mi cimawh khat suksiat gawp sawm a, na lawm khat uh hih gawp sawm na hi uh hiam?" 
Job6:28 Tu-in kong thum hi; kihei unla kei hong en un. Na maitang uh ah zuau a gen dingin kilawm ka hi hiam? 
Job6:29 Ngaihsun pha un, a kilawm lopi-in kei hong hih kei un. Ngaihsun pha un, ka hoihna teng a hong kize-et hi lel hi." 
Job6:30 Ahi zongin zuaugen mahin nong ngaihsun lai veve uh a, a sia le a pha a khen thei loin nong seh lai veve uh hi." 
Job7:1 “Leitungah mihing in nasep haksa nei a, ama hun pen nasem pa-aʼ bang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job7:2 Sila nasemte in niliim lunggulhin nasem pa in a thaman a ngak tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job7:3 A mawkna-in kha tampi sung ka om a, zan thapai-in lungkhamna bek keima tanh ahi hi." 
Job7:4 Nitak ka lup ciangin, ‘Cik ciangin khua hong vakin zing ka tho tam,’ ka ci hi. Ahi zongin zan sau a, zingsang khuavak mateng ka kigawigawi hi." 
Job7:5 Ka pumpi tung khempeuh ah than bekbek kidim a, ka vun tung khempeuh meima in tuamcip hi." 
Job7:6 Ka hunte siamganteʼ siam ciangtang sangin manlang zaw a, lametna om loin a mong tung pak hi." 
Job7:7 “Pasian aw, ka nuntakna husan bang bek ahihna hong phawk in. Ka mit in hun nuam mukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job7:8 Kei hong mu ngei pa in kei hong mukik nawn lo dinga, na hong et laitak mahin ka mangthang ding hi." 
Job7:9 Meiilum kaite bei-in a manthan bangin Leinuai a pai suk pa mangthang ding hi. 
Job7:10 Ama inn ah hong ciahkik nawn lo dinga, ama omna ngei mun in amah thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job7:11 Tua ahih manin pau loin ka om kei ding hi. Ka lungkham manin kam ka pau dinga, ka gim luat manin ka phun ding hi." 
Job7:12 “Kei a hong cing ding na koih nadingin kei, tuipi ganhing hong sa na hi hiam?" 
Job7:13 Lum leng nuam dinga, ihmu leng phatuam ding hi, ci leng lah," 
Job7:14 a lauhuai mang nong mansak a, a lauhuai maangmuhna tawh nong lausak hi." 
Job7:15 Tua ahih manin gui-awk ding ka ut zaw a, hih bang ka thuak sangin ka si nuam zaw hi." 
Job7:16 Ka lungkham a, ka nungta nuam nawn kei hi. Ka nuntakna pen husan bang hi lel ahih manin hong hici omsak hoh in." 
Job7:17 “Nang in hih zahin na thupi ngaihsut dingin na lungsimah na ngaihsut dingin 
Job7:18 zingsang simin gim a pia dingin ama kiangah pai-in amah na ze-et themthum nadingin mihing bang hi lel ahi hiam? 
Job7:19 Tom kha sung beek hong pelh lo dinga, ka hu beek hong sangsak man lo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job7:20 Mihingte a encik pa aw, a khial ka hih leh zong nangma tungah bang gamta khial ka hi hiam? Bang hangin kei hong ngim a, bang hangin nangma muitum suak zenzen ka hi hiam?" 
Job7:21 Bang hangin ka khialhna hong maisak lo a, ka mawhna hong maisak lo na hi hiam? Tu-in han sungah ka lum dinga, nong zonzon hangin ka na om nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job8:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gam mi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job8:2 “Tua bang thu bang tanvei gengen dinga, bang tanvei paupau ding na hi hiam?" 
Job8:3 Pasian in thutang a zang lo sa na hi hiam? Vanglian pa in thuman a zang lo sa na hi hiam? 
Job8:4 Na tate ama tungah khial a, amauʼ mawhnate amaute a tuaksak ahi hi." 
Job8:5 A hun lai-in Pasian zong inla, Vanglian paʼ hehpih nading thuum lecin," 
Job8:6 nang dikin thutang kisa mahmah na hih leh pel loin amah in nang hong en dinga, na thumanna tawh kizui-in thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Job8:7 Tua hileh, na zawn mahmah khit hangin a tawpna ah na haukik ding hi." 
Job8:8 “Khangluiteʼ thu kantel inla, pute pateʼ tuah sa thute ngaihsun pha in." 
Job8:9 Eite pen zan mah mi ihi a, bangmah i thei kei hi. Leitung a i nuntakna pen niliim bang lel ahi hi." 
Job8:10 Amaute in nang hong hilhin, a thu hong genin, amauʼ phawk sa thute hong gen ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job8:11 “Ciknawng om lohna ah laiphai kung po thei ahi hiam? Tui om lohna ah pumpeeng pung thei ahi hiam? 
Job8:12 Ahi zongin tuate a pak kimlai a phuk hun nai lopi-in kungno dang khempeuh sangin keu masa zaw hi. 
Job8:13 Pasian a mangngilhte tua bangmah ahi hi. Pasian a don lo miteʼ lametna a bei ta ahi hi. 
Job8:14 Ama kimuanna maimom khau bang hi lel a, ama ki-upna maimom bu bang hi lel hi." 
Job8:15 A inn tungah kingam a, a inn hoi hi. A inn lencip a, ahi zongin kip zo lo hi." 
Job8:16 “Amah pen nitaang sungah hoihtakin a khang kungno, a huan sungah a dawn hilhhelh kungno ahi hi." 
Job8:17 Ahi zongin suangtum lakah a zung a kivial gawp, suang tawphah a phu kha zung a suak hi." 
Job8:18 Tua ciangin mi khatpeuh in a phung pan zungbawh a, ‘Cikmahin nang hong thei ngei peuhmah kei ing,’ ci-in a lawn khia hi." 
Job8:19 Hih bang danin ama nuntakna bei a, lei sung panin kung dangte hong po khia hi." 
Job8:20 “Thei tel in; Pasian in cikmah hunin mawhbaang lo mite nil khia lo dinga, gamtat sia mite huh ngei lo ding hi." 
Job8:21 Na muk ah lungdam nuihna hong omsak dinga, na kam sungah lungdam a kikona hong omsak ding hi." 
Job8:22 Nang hong mudahte in maizumna ngah ding uh a, migiloteʼ puanbuk maimang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job9:1 Tua ciangin Job in Pasian dawng a," 
Job9:2 “Kuamah in Pasian a zawhzawh lohna a teltakin ka thei ta hi. 
Job9:3 Mi khatpeuh Pasian tawh thu a kinial ding hileh tul khat sungah khatvei nangawn dawng thei lo ding hi. 
Job9:4 Amah pil mahmah a, vanglian mahmah hi. Kua in khauh takin nial a, nial paisuak zo ahi hiam?" 
Job9:5 Pasian in mualte liingsak a, tawlngasak lo hi. Ama hehna tawh mualte a lumlet hi." 
Job9:6 Amah in leitung lok gawp a, a khuampite kiliing hi." 
Job9:7 Amah in ni a suak lo dingin thu pia a, aksite sincip hi." 
Job9:8 Amah bek in vanpi zal a, tuipi tuihualte tuancil hi." 
Job9:9 Amah pen van a a om Khawlei-uikai, Zawlzawng, Seguk le Khanglam aksite a bawlpa ahi hi." 
Job9:10 Amah in kuama theih zawh loh na lian tampi bawl a, kuama sim zawh loh nalamdang tampi sem hi." 
Job9:11 “Ka kiangah amah hong pai a, keʼn amah ka mu thei kei hi. Amah gam tangtang napi-in, amah ka theithei kei hi." 
Job9:12 Amah in la khia nuam leh a khaktan zo ding kua om ahi hiam? Bang hih na hi hiam, kuaʼn ci thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:13 Pasian in ama hehna dokkik het lo mah ding hi. Rahabʼ pawlte nangawn a khe nuai ah kun uh hi. 
Job9:14 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in bangci dawn theih dinga, amah ka nial nading kammal bangci muh ding ka hi hiam?" 
Job9:15 Kei ka dik hangin amah ka dawng thei kei hi. Kei hong mawhsak pa tungah hong hehpih ding ka nget kul hi. 
Job9:16 Thukhen zumah amah samin hong pai hi ta mah leh zong ka thumna hong ngai dingin ka um tuan kei hi. 
Job9:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu themno khat hangin nakpi takin kei hong hih a, thu om lopi-in gimna tampi hong thuaksak hi." 
Job9:18 Ka hu nangawn hong sangsak man lo a, lungkhamna tawh kei hong kidimsak hi." 
Job9:19 Thatang hat thu ding hileh, amah hat mahmah a, thutang kituh hi leng, kua in thukhen zumah amah sam zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:20 Kei ka dik hangin keima kam mah siksanin kei hong man dinga, mawhbaang lo ka hih hangin keima kampau hong leh heisak ding hi." 
Job9:21 Paubaanna ka neih loh hangin kei a thupi-in ka kingaihsun tuan het kei a, ka nuntakna ka kih hi." 
Job9:22 Thu khat bek om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a paubaang lote le a gilote susia khawm hi, ka ci hi." 
Job9:23 Lauhuai lianpi hong tung pakin sihna a om ciangin mawhbaang loteʼ thumna a nuihsan lel hi. 
Job9:24 Migiloteʼ khut sungah leitung kipia a, amah in thukhen mangteʼ mit a tuncipsak hi - amah hikeileh kua hi ding ahi hiam?" 
Job9:25 “Laitaite sangin ka hun nawh tai zaw a, beipak ahih manin nopna ngah kha lo hi." 
Job9:26 Pumpeeng gunkuang bangin ka hun nawhpai a, muvanlai sa bawh bangin a nawh len hi." 
Job9:27 Ka dahnate kimangngilh bawlin kimaitaisak ding ci taleng zong," 
Job9:28 a dikin nong seh loh ding lamtak thei khin ka hih manin ka thuak ding thute hangin kei ka lau mahmah hi. 
Job9:29 Kei a mawhin hong kiseh veve ding ahihleh bang hangin a mawkna-in na sem ding ka hi hiam? 
Job9:30 Satpiang tawh kei kisilin, vuttui tawh ka khut sawp taleng," 
Job9:31 buannawng sungah kei nong hencip veve dinga, ka puan ninte in a kihhuai hong suaksak ding hi." 
Job9:32 Amah ka dawn theih nadingin amah, kei bangin mi hi lo a, thukhen zumah thu kineih pih theih hi lo hi." 
Job9:33 Ko tegel kikalah thu hong khen ding khat om thei henla, ko tegel tungah aana hong zang ding khat om thei hileh," 
Job9:34 kei hong kisatna ciang hong paih khiatsak dinga, kei tungah lauhuaina lianpite hong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Job9:35 Bangbang ahi zongin amah kihta het loin ka pau ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keiʼ om zia ding bangin kei ka om loh lamtak teltakin ka kithei hi. 
Job10:1 “Ka nuntakna ka cimtak mahmah ta hi. Ka dahna thu ka ututin ka gen dinga, ka lungkham manin ka paupau ding hi." 
Job10:2 Pasian kiangah hih bangin ka ci ding hi: Kei hong mawhsak kei in. Kei nong langpanna thu hong gen in. 
Job10:3 Na khut tawh na sep sate simmawh bawlin, migiloteʼ vai panpihin, hih bangin nong netniamna ah bang phattuamna ngah na hi hiam?" 
Job10:4 Mihing bang lelin gamta na hi hiam? 
Job10:5 Na nuntak hun tan koteʼ nuntak tan bang lelin ngaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job10:6 Bang hangin ka mawhna hong sulzuihin, ka khialhna khempeuh hong kantel na hi hiam?" 
Job10:7 Ka mawh lohna na thei a, nang kiang panin kei hong hon ding a om lohna na theih sa mah ahi hi." 
Job10:8 “Nangma khut tawh kei hong lomin na hong piangsak a, tu-in nangma khut mah in kei hong leh suksiat hi." 
Job10:9 Leivui pan a kei nong bawlna hong phawkkik in. Leivui mahin hong deng vuikik takpi ding na hi hiam? 
Job10:10 Kei ka pian nadingin ka paʼ tungah tha na guan a, ka nuʼ sungah kei nong khangsak hi." 
Job10:11 Guh le thaguite tawh ka pumpi ding nong bawl a, sazang le vun tawh tua guhte nong tuamsak hi." 
Job10:12 Kei, nuntakna hong pia-in, nong it tawntung a, nangma hong kepna hangin kei ka nungta hi." 
Job10:13 Ahi zongin a beisa hunsung khempeuh ah kei ading thusim khat na neihna tu-in ka thei ta hi. 
Job10:14 Ka khialh khaknate hong ensim niloh na hih manin ka mawhnate hong maisak nuam lo na hi hi. 
Job10:15 Ka khialh phetin gim nong pia pah a, ka gamtat hoih ciangin zong nong pakta tuan kei hi. Mindaina le maizumna tawh kei ka kidim hi." 
Job10:16 Mavanna khatpeuh neisun leng zong, humpinelkai bangin ka siat nading na zong a, keiʼ gim theih nadingin nalamdang tuamtuam nangawn na bawl liang hi." 
Job10:17 Kei a hong langpang dingin teci na nei tawntung a, keima tungah na hehna hong khang semsem a, kei nong sukna ding thu thak na mu tawntung hi." 
Job10:18 “Pasian aw, bang hangin ka nuʼ sung panin kei hong piangsak peuhmah na hi hiam? Kuama hong muh ma-in a si hizaw hoh leng!" 
Job10:19 Ka nuʼ sung pan hankhuk zuat pah ding pen mihing a pian loh zah mahin a hoih ahi hi. 
Job10:20 Keima nuntakna bei dektak ta hi lo ahi hiam? Hong hici omsak hoh in! Ka hun neih lai sunteng nuam takin hong zangsak in. 
Job10:21 Kei a pai baih ta ding ka hi a, a hong ciahkik ngei ding ka hi kei hi - khuamial, lungzinna gam," 
Job10:22 khuavak nangawn khuamial ahihna gam, khuamial gam, lungzinna gam, lungkhamna gam, a zuan ta ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job11:1 Tua ciangin Naamah gam mi Zofar in dawng a," 
Job11:2 “Kampau hih zahta hong kidawng lo ding sa a, kam tam pauna hangin thumanin hong kiseh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job11:3 Job aw, na thugente hong dawng thei lo dingin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam? Na simmawh kampaute hong kidawng mawh dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job11:4 Nangma thugente a man na sa kha a, Pasianʼ muhna ah a siangtho dingin na kingaihsun kha hi." 
Job11:5 Pasian in na thugente hong dawngkik leh ut mahmah ing! 
Job11:6 Pilna nam tampi a omna thu, mihingʼ theih zawh loh thuthuk, a omna thu hong gen ding hi. Na mawhna zahin Pasian in gim hong piak lohna thei in." 
Job11:7 “Pasianʼ thuthuk thei khinzo ding na hi hiam? Vanglian paʼ hih theihna thei khinzo ding na hi hiam? 
Job11:8 Vantung sangin Pasian sang zaw a, ahi zongin tua vantung nangawn na ban zo kei hi. Pasian in leinuai thu thei a, ahi zongin nangmah in tua thu na thei kei hi." 
Job11:9 Pasianʼ liatna pen leitung sangin gol zaw a, tuipi sangin zai zaw hi." 
Job11:10 Pasian in nang hong manin thu hong sit leh amah a khaktan ding kua om ahi hiam? 
Job11:11 Pasian in mihoih lote thei takpi hi. Mawhna a muh ciangin thudon lo ding ahi hiam? 
Job11:12 Gamlak a om late mihing suak ngei dinga, mihaite pil ngei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job11:13 “Job aw, na lungsim a hoihin bawl inla, Pasianʼ lamah kihei in." 
Job11:14 Khialhna na bawl khak leh paai khia inla, na inn sungah gitlohna omsak kei in." 
Job11:15 Tua hileh kisuanna om loin na khuadak ngam dinga, na lung nuamin launa na nei kei ding hi." 
Job11:16 Na lungkhamnate veng dinga, tuikhang pak bangin na phawk nawn kei ding hi." 
Job11:17 Tua ciangin na nuntakna, sun sangin taang zaw dinga, nuntak lungzin pen hun, sun sangin taang zaw ding hi." 
Job11:18 Lungnuam tak le lametna nei-in na om dinga, Pasian in nang hong hu-in, tawldamna hong pia ding hi." 
Job11:19 Kuamah kihtak nei loin nuam takin na om dinga, mi tampi in nangma maipha hong zong ding uh hi." 
Job11:20 Ahih hangin migilote ahihleh cimawhin khuadak ding uh a, suahtak nading lampi mu lo ding uh hi. Amauʼ ngah ding ahihleh sihna bek ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job12:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job12:2 “Note pen theihna kicing na kisa mah uh a, pilna a nei na kisa mah uh hi." 
Job12:3 Ahi zongin note zah mahin kei zong thu ka thei a, midangte sangin na theih zawk uh bang om tuan ahi hiam?" 
Job12:4 Ka lawmte nangawn in tu-in kei hong nuihsan uh a, kei dikin paubaang lo napi hong nuihsan uh hi. Ahi zongin Pasian in ka thungetna a hong piak hun om hi." 
Job12:5 Note in lungkhamna bangmah na nei kei uh a, kei na hong ciamnuih bawl gawpgawp uh hi. A puk dektak mipa na sat gawp uh hi." 
Job12:6 Guta mite nuam takin om hithiat uh a, Pasian a simmawhte nuam takin nungta uh hi." 
Job12:7 “Ahi zongin gamsate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Vasate va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi." 
Job12:8 Leitung ganhingte va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi. Tui sung ngasate zong va dong un, hong hilh ding uh hi." 
Job12:9 Pasianʼ khut in amaute a bawlna thu a vekpi-un thei kim uh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job12:10 A piansak sateʼ nuntakna Pasian mah in a uk ahi hi. Mihing khempeuhteʼ nuntakna ama khut sungah om hi. 
Job12:11 Leii in an a ciap mah bangin, bil in ngai thei hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job12:12 “Khanghamte in pilna nei a, nuntak saute in thu thei tel uh hi." 
Job12:13 Pasian in pilna le vang nei a, amah thukipin thu a thei tel hi." 
Job12:14 Pasian in phelkek leh kuamah in lamkik zo lo a, Pasian in thong ah mi koih leh kuamah in suaktasak zo lo hi." 
Job12:15 Pasian in guah khaktan leh leitung keugaw a, tui a khah ciangin tui hong khang hi." 
Job12:16 “Pasian thahatin gualzo tawntung a, mi khemte le khemna a thuakte Pasianʼ ukna nuai ah a om uh ahi hi." 
Job12:17 Amah in mipilteʼ pilna susia-in, makaite pen mihai bangin gamtasak hi." 
Job12:18 Amah in kumpite zakiasak a, thong ah a khia hi." 
Job12:19 Siampite mihai suaksak a, mi vangliante lawnthal hi." 
Job12:20 Amah in miʼ muante a pau thei loin bawl a, khanghamteʼ pilna a paih khiatsak hi." 
Job12:21 Amah in mi vangliante mindaisak a, mi thupiteʼ kihihsakna a beisak hi." 
Job12:22 Amah in khuamial sung panin thuthukte kal khia a, a kithei zo lo thute kitelsak hi." 
Job12:23 Amah in minamte thahatsakin liansak a, ahi zongin amah in tuate zo gawpin susia hi." 
Job12:24 Amah in minam makaite a pilna uh paih khiatsak a, lampi om lohna gamlak ah vakvaisak hi." 
Job12:25 Khuamial lakah amaute in mialzawt uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoihoi uh hi." 
Job13:1 “Na gen uh thu khempeuh ka muh sa vive hi a, ka bil-in ka zakzak sa, ka theihtheih sa thu ahi hi." 
Job13:2 Noteʼ theih khempeuh, kei zong ka thei hi. Note khempeuh sangin ka neu zaw tuan het kei hi." 
Job13:3 Ahi zongin note tawh kam a kinial hi loin, Pasian tawh a kinial ka hi hi. Pasian tawh hih ka thu ka kinial nuam hi." 
Job13:4 Note in na haina uh zuau thu tawh na melh uh a, kuamah a damsak zo lo zato siam a kinei mite tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Job13:5 Pau het loin om hi le-uhcin, mipil mah hong kisa zaw ding hi." 
Job13:6 “Tu-in ka thugen hong ngai unla, ka gen laitakin limtak ngai un." 
Job13:7 Pasianʼ min dingin thuman lo genin, ama adingin zuau thu gensak ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Job13:8 Pasian angvan dinga, ama ading gensak ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Job13:9 Pasian in limtakin note hong en tel leh noteʼ sungah hoihna mu ding ahi hiam? Mihingte na khem bangun Pasian a khem thei dingin kingaihsun na hi uh hiam? 
Job13:10 A simthamin angvanna na zat uh leh amah in note hong taii taktak ding hi. 
Job13:11 Ama vangliatna in note hong lausak dinga, note tungah amah kihtakna hong tung ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Job13:12 Na thugente uh vut khu bang hi lel a, na siksante uh leivui bang hi lel hi." 
Job13:13 Pau kei unla, kei, thu hong gensak dih un; a piang peuhpeuh a piang hi mai hen." 
Job13:14 “Ka nuntakna pia ngamin, ka nuntakna ka ap ngam hi." 
Job13:15 Pasian in kei hong that mah taleh zong, phamawh ka sa kei hi. Ahi zongin ama mai ah ka thu ka gen veve ding hi." 
Job13:16 Pasianʼ mai ah migilote pai ngam lo uh ahih manin, ka hanna pen ka gualzawhna hi ding hi." 
Job13:17 Ka thugente limtak ngai unla, ka lah telnate na za un." 
Job13:18 Ka thu a gen dingin a baih sa-in ka om a, thu ka zawh ding lamtak teltakin ka thei hi." 
Job13:19 “Pasian aw, keimah hong mawhsak ding na hi hiam? Nong mawhsak leh pau het loin a si dingin ka kiging hi." 
Job13:20 Thu nih kong ngen hi, ka hong nget hong pia in. Tua ciangin nang tungah bangmah kong im kei ding hi." 
Job13:21 Kei tungah gim hong pia nawn kei inla, hih bang launa hong thuaksak nawn kei in." 
Job13:22 Pasian aw, hong hopih masa in, kong dawng ding hi. Kei, thu hong gensak inla, nangmah in hong dawng in." 
Job13:23 Ka mawhna ka khialhna bangzah pha ahi hiam? Ka mawh ka khialhna teng hong theisak in. 
Job13:24 “Bang hangin kei hong peel a, gal bangin hong ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job13:25 Bang hangin keimah lausak ding hanciam na hi hiam? Kei, singteh bang lel hi lo ka hi hiam? Anvai them khat galin do ding na hi hiam?" 
Job13:26 “Nangmah in kei tungah thusiapi nong zong a, ka neu lai huna ka gamtatna nangawn tawh nong mawhsak hi." 
Job13:27 Nangmah in ka khe sikkol nong bulh a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh le ka khekhap nangawn na en tel hi." 
Job13:28 Tua huhau-in singmuat bangin ka puk a, nget in a nek puan bangin ka zan gawp hi." 
Job14:1 “Mihingte a nuntak hun tom mahmah a, lungkhamna tawh kidim hi." 
Job14:2 Amaute paak bangin khangin keu pak uh a, niliim bangin pai hanhanin, mangthang uh hi." 
Job14:3 Pasian aw, tua bang lel mi kei hong en a, thukhenna a thuak dingin na mai ah hong sam na hi hiam?" 
Job14:4 Mihing banga a ninte sung panin a siang hong piang lo ding hi. 
Job14:5 A nuntak tan ding kiseh khol a, a nuntak kha phazah ding kiciangtan khin hi. Nangmah in na ciangtan khin a, kikheel thei nawn lo hi." 
Job14:6 Amah en loin tua ci omsak mai inla, a nuntak haksapi mah zomzomsak hoh in." 
Job14:7 “A kiphuk khin sa singkung nangawn in lametna nei buang a, a bul sel kikin nungtakik thei hi." 
Job14:8 Lei sungah a zungte teek a, a bulsum a si zongin," 
Job14:9 guahtui ngahin, singkungno-in hong selkik hi." 
Job14:10 Ahi zongin mi si a, amah maimang pah hi. Amah a beina tung ta a, koi ah om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job14:11 “Gun tuite le tuipi tuite a kan hun om thei ding hi. 
Job14:12 Ahi zongin vanpi a om lai teng, misite thokik ngei lo dinga, a ihmutna panun khanglo ngei lo, gamtang ngei lo ding uh hi." 
Job14:13 “Hih gimna tawh ka kipelh theih nadingin nong phawk loh nading mun misiteʼ gam sungah kei hong busak in. Mi a si khin sate hingkik thei lo ahih manin a hingin hong omsak peuh lecin tua lai ah ka ut hi. Na hehna a dam ciangin hong phawkkik peuh lecin tua lai ah ka ngak nuam hi. 
Job14:14  
Job14:15 Tua khit ciangin kei na hong sam dinga, keʼn kong dawng ding hi. Nangma bawl sa ahi keimah na hong lunggulh ding hi." 
Job14:16 Tua hun ciangin ka kalsuanna khempeuh nong en dinga, ahi zongin ka khialhnate nong sulzuih nawn kei ding hi." 
Job14:17 Ka khialhnate hong maisakin, nong paih khiatsak dinga, ka mawhna khempeuh nong phiatkhiatsak ding hi. Tu-a bangin a piang thei hileh ka ut mahmah hi." 
Job14:18 “Ahi zongin a taktakin, mualte a puk ding hun suangkeente nangawn a cip ding hun hong tung ding hi." 
Job14:19 Tui in suangte nawt khia-in, guahtui in lei a nawtkhiat bangin nangmah in mihingteʼ lametna na beisak hi." 
Job14:20 Nangmah in mi khat zo gawpin na hawl khia a, na sa mahmah ahih manin a si dingin a ha a li hi." 
Job14:21 Amah a pahtawi dingin a tapate hong pai taleh zong amah gim lua ahih manin bangmah phawk zo nawn lo a, a tapate mindai taleh zong bangmah phawk zo nawn lo hi." 
Job14:22 A pumpi sunga a natnate le a lungsim gimnate bek a phawk zo lai hi,” a ci hi." 
Job15:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in Job dawng a," 
Job15:2 “Job aw, mawk paupau kei in! Nangʼ pau bangin mipilte pau ngei lo a," 
Job15:3 bangmah-a kimang lo kampaute pau lo a, phattuamna om lo dingpi-in thu seel lo uh hi." 
Job15:4 Ahi zongin nangmah in Pasian zahtakna na beisak a, ama mai ah thugenna ding na khaktan hi." 
Job15:5 Tu-in na mawhna thu na kam pan hong ging khia a, ngian zangin na kampau tawh na mawhna na seel hi." 
Job15:6 Na mawhna thu keiʼ hong gen kisam lo a, na pauna khempeuh in na mawhna hong langsak ta hi." 
Job15:7 “Mihing a a piang lakah a masa pen kisa na hi hiam? Pasian in mualte a bawl lai-in a piang khin kisa na hi hiam? 
Job15:8 Pasianʼ vaihawmnate a za simin kingaihsun na hiam? Nang bek in pilna khempeuh a nei-in kingaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job15:9 Koʼ theih loh thu bang thei tuan na hi hiam? Koʼ muh loh thu bang mu tuan na hi hiam? 
Job15:10 Na paʼ pian ma a a piang puteek sam kangteʼ tung panin kote in ka pilnate uh a ngah ka hi uh hi. 
Job15:11 “Pasian in nang hong hehnem hi; bang hangin nialnial na hi hiam? Kam khum kam nem tawh Pasianʼ tangin nang tungah thu kong gen uh hi. 
Job15:12 Ahih hangin na lung khauhin kote nong heh et hi. 
Job15:13 Pasianʼ tungah a heh na hi a, amah a simmawh na hi hi." 
Job15:14 “Mihing a a piang peuhmah paubaang het loin siangtho taktak zo ding ahi hiam? Pasianʼ tungah a thuman zo kua om ding ahi hiam? 
Job15:15 Pasian in a siangtho vantung mite nangawn muang lo ahihleh, ei mawhnei mite bang hangin hong muang mah ding ahi hiam?" 
Job15:16 Mihing in tui i dawn bangin siatna i dawndawn a, mihing pen siahuai-in bangmah i man kei hi." 
Job15:17 “Job aw, ka thutheihte na ngai in." 
Job15:18 Amaute tung bekah gam kipia ahih manin, amaute a pialkhiat pih ding gamdang mi tawh a kihel lo, a pu a pate un bangmah im loin thu a hilh suksuk uh mipilteʼ thugente kong gen ding hi. Tua a gen uh thute in:" 
Job15:19  
Job15:20 “Mi a nengniam migilo pa in a khan tawntungin lungkhamna thuak ding hi. 
Job15:21 Launa ding awging a bilah za ngitnget dinga, lungmuangin a om laitakin gutate in buluh ding hi." 
Job15:22 Lungzinna pan suahtak nading lametna om lo a, amah a that dingin mun khat ah namsau in ngak khinkhian a," 
Job15:23 amah a ne dingin musanete in a ngak uh hi. A mailam thu lungzinhuai ahihna thei hi. 
Job15:24 A thahat kumpi khat bangin lungkhamna le lungzinna in amah a hih gawp dingin a ngak khikhe hi. 
Job15:25 “Pasian langpangin a khuttum a lah san, Vanglian pa a dem mipa in hih bang thute a thuak hi." 
Job15:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in khauh takin Pasian langpangin, a lum sahpi tawh a lehdo hi." 
Job15:27 “A thatang muanhuai-in a pumpi a liat hangin 
Job15:28 ama teenna khuapi sia-in, ama inn kinusia dinga, a sawt loin ninbu lomtang suak ding hi." 
Job15:29 Amah sauvei hau lo dinga, a neihsate kip lo ding hi. Ama liim nangawn maimang dinga," 
Job15:30 khuamial panin suakta lo ding hi. Amah pen a hiangte mei in a kat tumsak, a paakte huih in a let khiatsak, singkung tawh kibang ding hi." 
Job15:31 Amah in gitlohna suanin nei ahih manin, gitlohna bek mah ngahkik ding hi." 
Job15:32 A hun a tun ma-in amah bei dinga, singhiang bangin keu-in hingkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Job15:33 A min ma-in a gahte a pulh leenggui bang dinga, a paakte a pulh mangkhin oliv kung bang ding hi." 
Job15:34 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian a ngaihsun lote mi cimang suak a, sumgolh tawh a kilam innte mei in kaang tum hi." 
Job15:35 Mihingte in siat nading bek ngaihsunin sem uh a, mi khem ding bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job16:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job16:2 “Tua bang thute ka zaza khin a, noʼ hehnepna pen gimna ding bek ahi hi." 
Job16:3 Khawl hun nei loin gengen lai ding na hi uh hiam? Na gen ding uh omom lai ahi hiam? 
Job16:4 Note le keimah a kikhek thei hi lehang, noteʼ gen khempeuh kei zong ka gen thei ding hi. Note ka lu hong peisanin thu tampi tak mah kong gen thei ding hi." 
Job16:5 Ahi zongin keimah in note hong tua cih loin, thuhoih mahmah tawh note hong hehnemin, note hehnepna ding thu ka gen ding hi." 
Job16:6 Thu gengen taleng ka natna nuamtuam lo a, pau kei taleng zong, phatuam tuan lo hi." 
Job16:7 Pasian aw, kei nong paatsak ngingei a, ka innkuan khempeuh na sisak mangkhin hi." 
Job16:8 Kei na hong mancip a, keima gal na suak hi. Ka vun guak le ka guh guak bekin ka om a, keima mawhna a kilatna-in mite in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Job16:9 “Pasian in a hehna tawh hong balnen ngingei a, a ha hong gawi sanin hong heh et hi." 
Job16:10 Mite in kei hong zahko uh a, ka paang a beeng dingin hong kikhawm tuah uh hi." 
Job16:11 Pasian in migiloteʼ khut sungah kei hong pia hi. 
Job16:12 Kei nuam takin a om kimlai, Pasian in ka gawlin hong manin, hong bal gawpin hong su gawp hi. Pasian in a muitum dingin kei hong suang a," 
Job16:13 ka kimkot panin a thaltangte tawh hong kap hi. Tua thaltangte in kei hong kha-in hong liamsak a, tua bang nangawn ah kei hong hehpih lo hi." 
Job16:14 Amah in hong hehpih het loin kei hong liamsak thuahthuah a, galkap a heh pa bangin kei hong hih gawp hi." 
Job16:15 “Kei thumin puanhampi ka silh a, guallelin leivui lakah ka om hi." 
Job16:16 Ka kahkahna-in ka mai khempeuh san gawp a, ka mitkhute bawk gawpin khua ka mu thei kei hi." 
Job16:17 Ahi zongin ngongtatna them khat zong ka zang kei a, Pasian tungah ka thungetna pen lungsim takpi tawh ahi hi." 
Job16:18 “Leitung aw, a man loin kei hong kibawlna seelcip kei in! Thuman deihin ka kikona ka awging daicipsak kei in." 
Job16:19 Kei adingin a ding ding, a hong panpih ding mi khat vantungah om hi." 
Job16:20 Pasian in ka khitui luanna hong mu-in ka thungetna hong za leh ka ut hi. 
Job16:21 Mi khat in a lawmpa ading a thumsak mah bangin mi khatpeuh in Pasianʼ kiangah kei adingin hong thuumsak leh ka ut hi. 
Job16:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun nai mahmah ta a, ka leh zuih nawn loh ding lampi zui-in a pai ka hi ta hi." 
Job17:1 “Ka bei ding hun nai kuan ta a, hu ka sang zo nawn kei hi. Kei adingin hankhuk cih loh bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Job17:2 Ka heina khempeuh ah mite in hong zahko uh a, amauʼ hong phinna in hong lungzingsak hi." 
Job17:3 Pasian aw, kei hong hu in. Ka thugente hong panpih ding kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Job17:4 Nangmah in amaute thuman a mu lo dingin bawl na hih manin amaute a gualzo-in na bawl kei ding hi. 
Job17:5 Paunak ah, sum ngah nop manin mi khat in a lawmte a heek leh, ama tate in tua gitlohna thaman thuak hi, kici hi." 
Job17:6 Tu-in amaute in kei tungah hih paunak hong bulh uh a, mite in hih thu za-in kei hong cilphih uh hi." 
Job17:7 Ka dahna hangin ka mit mial a, ka khut ka khete ciangkang bang ta hi." 
Job17:8 Mihoihin a kineite in lamdang hong sa uh a, migiloin kei hong seh uh hi." 
Job17:9 Miteʼ zahtak a a kinei mite in amauʼ ngaihsutna uh man mahmah sa semsem uh hi. 
Job17:10 Ahi zongin amaute khempeuh hong pai-in ka mai ah hong ding le-uh amauteʼ lakah mipil khat zong ka mu kei ding hi. 
Job17:11 “Ka hun bei ta hi. Ka geelna teng maimang a, ka lametna teng bei ta hi." 
Job17:12 Ka lawmte in, khuamial kimlai, sun khuavak, ci uh hi. Khuavak hong nai ta hi, ci-in gen uh a, ahi zongin khuamial sung mahah kei ka om lai veve hi." 
Job17:13 Keiʼ lamet ding misiteʼ gam bek om lai a, tua khuamial sungah lumin ka ihmu ding hi." 
Job17:14 Han khuk sung pen ka pa hi, ka ci dinga, kei hong ne thante pen ka nu le ka sanggam numeite, ka ci ding hi." 
Job17:15 Keiʼ lamet ding tua lai ah bang om ahi hiam? Tua lai ah ka lamet ding bang nong muhsak uh hiam? 
Job17:16 Misiteʼ gam Leinuai ah ka pai ciangin nopsakna in kei hong zui lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job18:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gam mi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job18:2 “Job aw, khawl hun nei thei lo ding na hi hiam? Hong khawl phot lecin, thu kong gen thei ding uh hi." 
Job18:3 Bang hangin bawng bang lelin kote hong ngaihsun a, mi haipi-in kote hong seh na hi hiam?" 
Job18:4 Na hehna tawh nangmah a kigimsak bek na hi hi. Nangma hangin leitung kinusia dinga, mualte a kin khia dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam?" 
Job18:5 “Migilo paʼ meivak kisumit dinga, cikmah hunin kuangkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Job18:6 Ama buk sungah a meivak mit dinga, ama inn sungah khua a mial ding hi." 
Job18:7 A khe kip ngei a, ahi zongin tu-in a khe bai ta hi. Amah in a ngaihsut khialhna a puk lawh hi." 
Job18:8 Thangsiahna ngen sungah amah bungbu tuk a, gum sungah amah kia hi." 
Job18:9 Thang ah a khetulin awk a, thangkhau in amah gakcip hi." 
Job18:10 Amah siahna-in leilak ah khauzak kitung a, a pai nading lampi ah thang kisiah hi." 
Job18:11 Lauhuaina in amah pang a, a kalsuanna khempeuh a sulzuih hi." 
Job18:12 A hauh ngei hangin tu-in gilkial ta a, siatna in a su dingin amah ngak gige hi." 
Job18:13 A kihtakhuai natna in a pum khempeuh tuam a, a khut le a khete muatsak mang khinta hi." 
Job18:14 Lungmuang takin a omna a inn panin amah kikai khia a, Sihna Kumpipa kiangah amah kitun pih hi." 
Job18:15 Ahih hangin zatui tawh ama inn a kisiansuah khit ciangin tua inn ah a ut peuhpeuh teng thei pah ding hi. 
Job18:16 Lei sunga ama zungte keu-in, a tunga a hiangte a si ta hi." 
Job18:17 Inn le gamah ama minthanna bei ta a, kuamah in amah phawk kha nawn lo hi." 
Job18:18 A nungtateʼ gam panin amah kihawl khia dinga, khuavakna mun panin khuamialna ah kihawl khia ding hi." 
Job18:19 Amah in suanlekhak nei lo a, ama teennasa munah ama gui a zom ding om lo hi." 
Job18:20 Nisuahna pan nitumna dong ama thuakna a za peuhmah kigaihin a liing uh hi. 
Job18:21 Migilote, Pasian a ngaihsun lote a thutawpna uh tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job19:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job19:2 “Bang tanvei thu genin hong gimsak ding na hi hiam? 
Job19:3 Kei nong simmawh niloh a, tua banga na gamtatna ah maizumna mel na nei thei kei hi." 
Job19:4 A khial takpi hi taleng zong nangʼ lainatna ding bang om ahi hiam? 
Job19:5 Keimah sangin a hoih zaw-in nang na kingaihsun a, ka thuak gimnate pen keima mawhna hangin na ngaihsun hi." 
Job19:6 Hih thu hong piangsak pa Pasian ahih lam mu thei lo na hi hiam? Kei hong mat nadingin amah in thang hong siah hi. 
Job19:7 Keimah hong ngongbawlna ka nialnial hangin kuamah in hong don kei hi. Thuman ka deih hangin hong kipia kei hi. 
Job19:8 Pasian in ka lampi khaktan a, ka paisuak zo kei hi. Amah in ka pai nading lampi khua mialcipsak hi." 
Job19:9 Amah in ka hauhna khempeuh hong lakkhiatsak a, ka min hoih kimlai hong siasak hi." 
Job19:10 Amah in ka pumpi khempeuh hong sat gawp hi. Ka nopsakna teng hong zunglot sakin, vul gawpin a si dingin kei a hong nusia hi." 
Job19:11 Keima tungah Pasianʼ hehna hong so gawp a, ama gal lian penin kei a hong ngaihsun hi." 
Job19:12 Amah in keimah a sim dingin a galkapte hong sawl a, a galkapte in dum to-in ka buk hong umcih uh hi." 
Job19:13 “Pasian in ka sanggamte hong taisansak a, kei hong thei sate kiangah khualmi ka suak hi." 
Job19:14 Ka behte le ka lawmte bei mang khinta uh hi. 
Job19:15 Ka inn ah a hong tung ngei keima zinte in hong mangngilh ta a, ka na a sem numeite in khualmi bangin hong bawl uh a, amauteʼ mai ah midangpi khat ka suak hi." 
Job19:16 Ka nasemte khatpeuh ka sap ciangin hong dawng nuam lo uh a, hong huh nading uh ka thum ciang nangawnin hong thudon lo uh hi." 
Job19:17 Ka zi nangawn in ka gimnam thuak zo lo a, ka sanggamte mahmah in zong hong naih nuam lo uh hi." 
Job19:18 Naupang melmawl nangawn in kei hong simmawh uh a, kei hong muh uh ciangin hong nuihsan uh hi." 
Job19:19 Ka lawm it pente nangawn in kei hong muhdah et uh a, ka it pente nangawn in kei hong langbawl uh hi." 
Job19:20 Ka guh tungah ka vun kol dihdiahin om a, a nungta liailiai bekin kei a om ka hi hi." 
Job19:21 Hong hehpih un! Hong hehpih un! Keima lawmte hi lo na hi uh hiam? Pasian in kei hong sat pai ta hi. 
Job19:22 Pasianʼ hong bawlsiat bangin bang hangin no zong kei hong bawlsia ding na hi uh hiam? Nong gimsakna uh kicing ta hoh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Job19:23 “Ka thugente khempeuh mi khatpeuh in ciamteh henla, laibu khat sungah a khum hileh ut mahmah ing!" 
Job19:24 Tua ahih kei leh zong, ka thugente khempeuh sikkhu khat tawh suang tungah kikhen henla, a mang ngei nawn lo dingin a kigelh hileh ut ing!" 
Job19:25 “Ahi zongin a tawpna ah kei hong panpih ding a nungta tawntung khat vantungah a omna thu ka thei hi. 
Job19:26 Natna in ka vun a nektum khit hangin, hih ka pumpi mahmah tawh Pasian ka mu ding hi." 
Job19:27 Keima mit teekteek tawh amah ka mu dinga, amah in kei hong khualmi et lo ding hi. “Ka lungsim hanna a bei hi." 
Job19:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Amah bangci gimsak thei ding ihi hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Kei nong suktheih nadingun paulap khatpeuh na zong uh hi." 
Job19:29 Ahi zongin tu-in namsau kihta un. Tua namsau in a mawhte tungah Pasianʼ hehna hong sem ding hi. Tua ciangin thukhen ding khat a om lam na thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job20:1 Tua ciangin Naamah gam mi Zofar in dawng a," 
Job20:2 “Job aw, ka heh nong suaksak a, ka ki-ip zo nawn kei hi." 
Job20:3 Na thugente khempeuh kei nong simmawhna kampau vive hi a, ahi zongin kong dawnna ding ka thei hi." 
Job20:4 Tanglai pek a kipan, leitung mi a om cil a kipanin," 
Job20:5 migiloteʼ nopsak hun a tom mahmahna thu, Pasian a don loteʼ lungdam hun a tom mahmahna thu thei lo na hi hiam?" 
Job20:6 Migilo pa lian mahmah in vantung a ban to zongin, lian mahmah in a lutang in meii lak a ban to zongin," 
Job20:7 leivui them bangin maimang veve lel ding hi. Amah a thei ngei mite in, ‘Amah koi ah om ta ahi hiam?’ ci-in lamdang sa ding uh hi." 
Job20:8 Amah pen zan a mangmat bang, mumaang bangin maimang dinga, cikmah hunin kimukik ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Job20:9 Ama teenna ngei mun panin amah maimang dinga," 
Job20:10 mizawngteʼ na a suhsakte, a tate in lohsak ding uh hi." 
Job20:11 A pumpi moi suahin a thatang a hat mahmah hangin a sawt loin leivui a suak pak ding ahi hi. 
Job20:12 “Ama kam sungah gitlohna lim sa mahmah in, namtui mahmah sa-in, a leii tawh lop melmel a," 
Job20:13 amah in muammuam nuamin sia khia nuam lo a, lim sa mahmah in a dangtawng denna-in a neih hangin," 
Job20:14 a gil sung a tun ciangin a kha mahmah an suakin, gu a kha mahmahte zahin kha deidai hi." 
Job20:15 Migilo pa in a guk sa nate lua khiakik a, a gil sung nangawn panin Pasian in a lak khiatsak hi." 
Job20:16 Migilo paʼ nekte pen gu tawh kibang a, gul guneiteʼ tuk bangin amah a sisak hi." 
Job20:17 Amah in bawngnawi le khuaizu gun tui bangin a luang mu kha lo ding hi. 
Job20:18 Amah in a nasep thamante nusia dinga, a hauhna khempeuh zang kha man lo ding hi." 
Job20:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in mizawngte bawlsia-in don lo a, midangteʼ inn lam sate sutin a tang hi." 
Job20:20 “A huaihamna bei ngei lo a, a duh khempeuh siit nei lo hi." 
Job20:21 Amah in a nek ciangin a khamval cih omngei lo a, tu-in a hauhna khempeuh a bei mang khinta ahi hi." 
Job20:22 A cihtheih pen hun laitakin lungkhamna lian pen a tuak hi. 
Job20:23 Amah in a duhduh ne mai hen! Pasian in hehna tawh amah gim pia ngawn ding hi. 
Job20:24 Amah in namsau pelhin a taina ah sumngo thal in kap tuk ding hi. 
Job20:25 Thaltang khat in ama pumpi paih let a, a te-dildel thaltang muk ah si taak keuhkeuh a, ama tungah a kihtakhuai hong tung hi." 
Job20:26 A khol sa khempeuh kisusia a, mihingʼ tawh loh meikuang in amah le a innkuan khempeuh a kaang tum hi." 
Job20:27 Vantungte in hih mipaʼ mawhna pholak uh a, leitung in ama langah teci a pang hi." 
Job20:28 Pasianʼ hehna hangin ama hauhna khempeuh a kisusia mang ding ahi hi. 
Job20:29 “Migiloteʼ ngah dingin Pasian in a piak gimna migiloteʼ ngah pen tu-a bang ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job21:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job21:2 “Ka thugente limtakin hong ngai unla, ka thu nong ngaihna uh nong hehnepna uh hisak ni." 
Job21:3 Thu ka gen theih nading hun hong pia unla, ka gen khit ciangin na ut uh leh hong zahpih un." 
Job21:4 “Keiʼ kitot pih pen mihing hi lo hi. Bang hangin lung tom lo ding ka hi hiam? 
Job21:5 Kei hong en dih un. Lamdangsak taak hi lo ka hi hiam? 
Job21:6 Keima tunga thupiang ka ngaihsut ciangin lamdang sa mahmah in lau-in ka liing hi. 
Job21:7 “Bang hangin Pasian in migilote khantosak a, hausakin liansak ahi hiam?" 
Job21:8 A tate uh nuam takin a khantohna, a u a nau, a suan a khakte uh a punna a mu ding dongin a nungta uh hi." 
Job21:9 Pasian in amauteʼ inn sungah lungkhamna tungsak lo a, amaute in lauhuaina thuak kha ngei lo uh hi." 
Job21:10 A bawngte uh pung a, tatolh cih omngei lo hi." 
Job21:11 Tuuno bangin a naupangte uh tai khia-in kimawl uh a," 
Job21:12 tamngai le harp lasakna aw tawh a kituakin a lam uh hi. 
Job21:13 Amaute a nuntak sungin cithei mahmah uh a, gentheihna tuak se loin nuam takin a si hiat uh hi." 
Job21:14 “Migilote in Pasian nawlkhiin uh a, Pasian in amauʼ nuntak ding a deihsakte thei nuam lo uh hi." 
Job21:15 Pasianʼ na sep ding kisam sa se lo uh a, Pasian kiang a thunget phattuamna om kei, ci uh hi." 
Job21:16 Amauʼ thahatna hang bek tawh a gina kisa uh a, amauʼ ngaihsutna le keiʼ ngaihsutna kigamla hi." 
Job21:17 “Migilo paʼ meivak kisukmitsak ngei ahi hiam? Amaute khat beek in lungkhamna tuak ngei ahi uh hiam? Pasian in hehna tawh migilote gim pia ngei ahi hiam? 
Job21:18 Huih in a letkhiat buhkungte, le huihpi in a mutkhiat buhsi bangin amaute bawl ngei ahi hiam?" 
Job21:19 “Pasian in a paʼ khialhna hangin a ta gim pia hi, na ci uh hi. Tua bang hi lo! Pasian in a mawhte teek mah gim pia henla, amauʼ mawhna hangin gim pia ahihna theisak hen." 
Job21:20 Mawhneite amauʼ mawhna hangin gimna thuaksak henla, Vanglian paʼ hehna theisak tahen." 
Job21:21 Mi khat a nuntakna a bei khit ciangin, a naupangteʼ nopsakna phawk thei nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job21:22 Mi khat in Pasianʼ tungah thu hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Vanglian pa tungah thu khen thei ding ahi hiam? 
Job21:23 “Mi pawl khatte a cithei mahmah in si a, lungmuang tak le lungnuam takin om uh a," 
Job21:24 an nek tui dawn a kicingin a nei uh hi. 
Job21:25 Mi pawl khatte ahihleh nopsak cih thei kha ngei loin lunggimin a si uh hi. 
Job21:26 Ahi zongin a kibangin a vekpi-in si-in kivui a, than in amaute tuamcip hi." 
Job21:27 “Na lungsim sung uh ah na ngaihsutna uh, kei nong siatsak nopnate uh ka tel mahmah hi." 
Job21:28 Siatna a gamta, mi lian paʼ inn, koi ah om ta ahi hiam, na ci uh hi." 
Job21:29 “Khual zinzin mite tawh kiho ngei lo na hi uh hiam? Amauteʼ thugente, thei lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Job21:30 Pasian hehin, mite gim a piak ciangin migilote peng tawntung zawsop hi." 
Job21:31 Migilo pa a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding, migilo pa mawhsakin a langpang ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job21:32 Migilo pa a kivui ciangin a hankhuk kicing a," 
Job21:33 mi tul tampi in amah kha-in hoihtakin lei tawh kivuk hi. 
Job21:34 “Tu-in note in a mawknapi tawh hehnep nong sawm uh hi. Na gen uh thu khempeuh zuau thu vive hi lel hi,” a ci hi." 
Job22:1 Tua ciangin Teman khuami Elifaz in dawng a," 
Job22:2 “Mipil pente i cih nangawn, ama ading cih loh buang, Pasian adingin a kimanna om lo hi." 
Job22:3 Na gamtat hoihna in Pasianʼ phattuam nading bangmah piangsak lo a, na hoihna in Pasian hoihsak tuan lo hi." 
Job22:4 Nangmah in Pasian na zahtakna hangin amah in nang hong taii-in hong ze-et hi lo hi. 
Job22:5 Na mawhna a tamna hang, na gitlohna a liatna hang hizaw hi." 
Job22:6 Na sanggampaʼ leiba tangin a silh ding sitsak loin a puan teng na laksak hi. 
Job22:7 A dangtakte tui na pia nuam kei a, a gilkialte an na pia nuam kei hi." 
Job22:8 Na vangliatna le na za liatna zangin, gam khempeuh na la khin hi." 
Job22:9 Meigongte a huh nuam lo ciang bek hi loin, mi tagahte bawlsia-in a neihsa uh na sut hi." 
Job22:10 Tua ahih manin na kimkot ah thang hong kisiah a, thakhat thu-in launa in nang hong buaisak hi." 
Job22:11 Khuavak kimlai khuamial hong suak vatin khua na mu thei kei a, tuikhang in nang hong tuumcip hi." 
Job22:12 “Van a sang pen dawnah Pasian a om hi a, a sang mahmah a om aksite hong suk et lai hi." 
Job22:13 Ahi zongin nangmah in, ‘Pasian in bang thei ding ahi hiam? Meii in Pasian tuamcip hi. Eiteʼ thu bangci-in khen thei ding ahi hiam?’ na ci hi." 
Job22:14 Van khumzang ah Pasian a pai kawmin meii pailetin Pasian in hong mu suk thei lo ding hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Job22:15 “Migiloteʼ gamtat ngeite mah gamtat ding ngaihsun na hi hiam? 
Job22:16 Amauʼ hun tung lopi-in tuikhang in amaute taai hi. 
Job22:17 Hih mite pen Pasian a nial, Pasian in bangmah a cih thei lo dingin a ki-um mite ahi uh hi." 
Job22:18 Tua hitaseleh amaute a daupaisak Pasian hi a, migiloteʼ ngaihsutna pen keima ngaihsutna tawh kigamla mahmah hi." 
Job22:19 Migilote tungah gim kipia a muh uh ciangin mihoihte nuam a, paubaanna a nei lo mite in a nuihsan uh hi." 
Job22:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh migiloteʼ neih khempeuh kisuksiatsak gawp a, a om lai sunte nangawn mei in a kaang tum hi." 
Job22:21 “Job aw, tu-in Pasian tawh kilem inla, amah galbawl nawn kei in. Tua hileh amah in nang thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Job22:22 Ama hong hilhnate zui inla, ama thute ciamteh in." 
Job22:23 Lungsim tak tawh Vanglian pa lamah kihei inla, na inn sung pan gamtat sia beisak inla," 
Job22:24 na kham neihte leivui bang lelin ngaihsunin, na Ofir khamte suang bang lelin ngaihsunin," 
Job22:25 Vanglian Pasian pen na kham le na ngun hisak lecin," 
Job22:26 Pasian muanin na nei tawntung dinga, na lungdamna bulpi amah ahih lam na thei ding hi." 
Job22:27 Thu na nget ciangin na ngetna hong pia dinga, nangma thuciamnate na tungsak ding hi." 
Job22:28 Na hih khempeuh na tangtun dinga, na maa hong vang ding hi." 
Job22:29 Pasian in mi kiphasakte niamkhiat a, miniamte a hon hi." 
Job22:30 Nang a mawhbaang lo, a gamtat man na hih nakleh nang hong hon ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job23:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job23:2 “Tu laitakin Pasianʼ tungah a phun lo, a heh loin ka om thei kei a, thum loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Job23:3 Amah ka zon dan ding thei-in, ama kiang ka tun nading zia a thei hi leng," 
Job23:4 a mai ah ka thu ka gen dinga, kei ka dikna thu a kicingin ka gen ding hi." 
Job23:5 Ama hong gen ding thute le kei a hong dawnna ding thute ka thei nuam hi. 
Job23:6 Pasian in a thaneih khempeuh tawh keima lang khat ah hong pang ding ahi hiam? Hong langpan lo dinga, ka thugen hong ngai ding hi." 
Job23:7 Kei a thuman ka hi a, Pasian kiangah ka gen ding hi. Kuama phel zawh nawn loh dingin keiʼ dikna a gen khia ding hi." 
Job23:8 “Ahi zongin Nisuahna lam ka zong a, Pasian ka mu kei hi. Nitumna lam ka zong a, amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Job23:9 Leilu lam ka zon hangin amah ka mu thei kei a, Leitaw lam ka zon hangin zong amah ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Job23:10 Ahi zongin Pasian in ka kalsuanna khempeuh thei a, kei hong ze-et leh ka sianthona a mu ding hi." 
Job23:11 Ama hong lamlahna citakin ka zui cinten a, lam ka pial ngei kei hi." 
Job23:12 Pasianʼ thupiakna bangin ka gamta ngitnget a, keima utna zui loin ama deihna ka zui hi." 
Job23:13 “Amah kikheel ngei lo a, kuamah in amah nial zo lo hi. Ama hih nopte kuamah in khaktan zo lo hi." 
Job23:14 Tua ahih manin kei adingin a geel sate tungsak ding hi. Amah in hih bangin geelna tampi tak a nei ahi hi. 
Job23:15 Tua hi a, ama omna ah kei ka lau mahmah a, ka ngaihsut khak ciangin amah ka kihta hi." 
Job23:16 Vanglian Pasian in ka lungsim hanna hong mangsak hi. 
Job23:17 Khuamial in ka mit a mialsak hangin keima kihtak pen khuamial hi lo a, Pasian ahi hi." 
Job24:1 “Pasian in bang hangin a thukhen ni ding seh lo a, ama nasemte thutang ahihna a lah ni ding seh lo ahi hiam?" 
Job24:2 “Mihingte in leitang zaipi a ngah theih nadingun gisuangte khiin sim uh a, tuute gu-in amauʼ tuuhonte tawh khawi khawm uh hi." 
Job24:3 Mi tagahteʼ la neihsunte guksak uh a, meigong numei in a leiba a loh khit dong a bawngtal a matsak uh hi." 
Job24:4 Mizawngteʼ ngah theih dingte khaktan uh a, mizawngte not khia ahih manun amaute lau-in a bucip uh hi." 
Job24:5 “Tua ahih manin gamlak a om la bangin gam keu sungah a an ding uh zong tawm uh a, a tate uh an ding koi mahah mu zo lo uh hi." 
Job24:6 Midangteʼ lo sungah anlak na sem uh a, migiloteʼ leenggui lo ah leenggah loin a om uh hi." 
Job24:7 Zanin puan silh loin lum uh a, khua dampi lakah silh ding nei loin om uh hi." 
Job24:8 Mual tung gam panin a hong zu guahtui in amaute kawtciimsak a, suangpi pang peuh beelin a toncip uh hi." 
Job24:9 “Migilote in pa nei nawn lo naupangte sila-in nei uh a, mizawngteʼ tate leiba tangin a la uh hi." 
Job24:10 Tua mizawngte in puan silh loin na sem uh a, gilkial pi mahin anlak na a sem uh hi." 
Job24:11 A thau ngah nadingin oliv gahte gawi-in leenggahzu ngah nadingin leenggahte cil napi-in, gilkial dangtakin ki-omsak hi." 
Job24:12 Khuapi sungah a liam le a si kuanteʼ kikona kiza napi-in Pasian in amauʼ thungetnate don lo hi. 
Job24:13 “Sun khuavak a nial, tua khuavak thuzia a thei lo, khuavak lampi a pelh mi pawl khat om hi." 
Job24:14 A zawng a cimawhte a that lum dingin khuavak ma-in mi that pa kuan khia a, zan khuamial hun sungin miteʼ na a guksak hi." 
Job24:15 Numei tunga a mawh mipa in khuamial ding ngakin om a, miteʼ theih loh dingin ama mel a seel hi." 
Job24:16 Gutate in sun sungin a ciapteh sa teng zanin a inn luh uh a, sun sung bu-in khuavak a peel uh hi." 
Job24:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh zan khuamial pen amaute khempeuh adingin zing khuavak bang hi a, zan khuamial lauhuai sung nuam a sa uh hi." 
Job24:18 “Tua bang migilo peuhpeuh tuikhang in taai a, ama neih leitangte Pasian in samsia a, tua leenggui lote ah nasemin kikuan nawn lo hi." 
Job24:19 Nisat hun le khuakhal hunin vukkhalte a manthan bangin mihingteʼ gam sung panin mawhnei mi a mangthang hi. 
Job24:20 Amah kiphawk kha nawn lo a, ama nu nangawn in zong a mangngilh ta hi. Thante in amah ne tum a, amah maimang ta hi." 
Job24:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite, numei taciingteʼ neihsa tawh a kivak uh hi a, meigongteʼ phattuam nading bangmah bawl lo uh hi." 
Job24:22 Pasian in a thahatna tawh mi vangliante susia a, amah a gamtat ciangin migilo pa a si pah hi." 
Job24:23 Pasian in a lungnuamin amah nungtasak a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah encik tawntung hi." 
Job24:24 Migilo pa tom kha sung a liat hangin kiak bangin vulkik pah a, a kisat tan ankung bangin a keu pah hi." 
Job24:25 Hih thu kua in nial zo ding na hi uh hiam? Ka thugennate man lo hi, ci-in kei langah hong pangin ka thugente hong sel zo ding kua om na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job25:1 Tua ciangin Shuah gam mi Bildad in dawng a," 
Job25:2 “Pasian vanglian a, mi khempeuh in a zahtak ding ahi hi. Ama vantung kumpi gam, nuam takin a omsak zo hi." 
Job25:3 Ama na a sem vantung mite bangzah pha cih kua in sim zo ding ahi hiam? Pasianʼ khuavak in a bat lohna koi lai mun om ahi hiam? 
Job25:4 Pasianʼ muhna ah kua dik zo dinga, siangtho zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Job25:5 Ama mitah khapi nangawn taang sa zo lo lai a, aksite nangawn siang sa zo lo lai hi." 
Job25:6 Tua ahihleh, lungno, ganhing no ahi lel mihing pen bangci ding ahi hiam? Mihing in Pasianʼ muhna ah bang man lel ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job26:1 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job26:2 “A hehpihhuai kei nong huhna, a tha zawngkhal kei nong hotna, hih bang ahi hiam?" 
Job26:3 Kei bang mihai tungah thu manpha nong gen a, pilna thu tampi nong pulak hi." 
Job26:4 Tua bang thu a gen dingin kua in hong sawl a, kuaʼ lungsim hong pulak khia na hi hiam?" 
Job26:5 “Misiteʼ gam kiliing a, a sunga a teeng mite launa tawh a liing hi." 
Job26:6 Pasianʼ muhna ah misiteʼ gam kilang sinsen a, a muh theih loh nadingin a liah bangmah om lo hi." 
Job26:7 Pasian in mun awng tungah vanpi hong zal khia a, bangmah in a len lopi-in leitung a khai lingleng hi." 
Job26:8 Amah in meii lom lakah tuite khol a, tua a gik mahmah tui meii a pua zosak hi." 
Job26:9 Amah in kha a liah ding bawl a, meii tawh kha a khuh hi." 
Job26:10 Amah in muh tawpna ah git dinden a, khuavak le khuamial a khen hi." 
Job26:11 Amah in vanpi a pua khuampite a taii ciangin tua khuampite lau-in a liing uh hi. 
Job26:12 Ama thahatna tawh tuipi zo a, ama siamna tawh tui ganhing golpi Rahab that lum hi." 
Job26:13 A hu a san ciangin vantung teng siang pah a, ama khut in a tai khia gulpi that lum hi." 
Job26:14 Hihte pen ama vangliatna them khat bek hi pan a, i zak thute pen a hemlam bek hi pan hi. Pasian a liatna taktak kuaʼn thei zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job27:1 Tua ciangin Job in thu genkik a," 
Job27:2 “Keima dikna a hong seelcipsak Pasian, ka lungsim a hong gimsak Vanglian Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin," 
Job27:3 ka sungah nuntakna a om lai teng, Pasianʼ hu, ka nak ah ka diik lai teng," 
Job27:4 ka muk tawh thusia peuhmah ka gen het kei dinga, ka kam tawh zuau thu peuhmah ka gen het kei ding hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
Job27:5 Note a thuman hi, kong ci ngei kei dinga, ka nuntak lai teng, kei a thuman hiʼng, ka cihna thu ka khia ngei kei ding hi." 
Job27:6 Kei thuman ka kisakna ka khia ngei kei ding hi. Ka lungsimah kisuanna om loin siang mahmah hi. 
Job27:7 “Kei a hong langpan, kei a hong dote in migilo le thuman lote bangin gimna thuak ta uh hen." 
Job27:8 Pasian in amauteʼ nuntakna a laksak hun ciangin, migilote adingin lametna om nawn ahi hiam?" 
Job27:9 Lungkhamna a thuak uh ciangin Pasian in amauʼ kikona awging ngai ding ahi hiam? 
Job27:10 Pasianʼ piak ding lungdamna a deih ding uh kilawm ahih manin, ama tungah thu a nget tawntung ding uh a kilawm ahi hi." 
Job27:11 “Pasianʼ vangliatna bangzahin lian mahmah cih hong gensak unla, Vanglian Pasianʼ geel sa teng hong lak telsak dih un." 
Job27:12 Ahi zongin tuate khempeuh na theih khit sa uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin mawk pau na hi uh hiam? 
Job27:13 “Vanglian Pasian in migilote, mi ngongtatte, gim a piak zia hih bang ahi hi." 
Job27:14 Tapa tampi a neih hangun, a vekpi-in gal sungah si mangkhin ding uh hi. A tate uh a tawntungin gilkial niloh ding uh hi." 
Job27:15 A nungta lai sunte zong pulnatna tawh si ding uh a, meigong numeite in misite kah zo nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Job27:16 Migilote in kuama sim zawh loh ngun tampi tak nei ding uh a, gen zawh lohin nikten puansilh ciang venvan ding uh hi." 
Job27:17 Ahi zongin mihoih pawl khat in tua puante silhin, thuman mi pawl khat in tua ngunte tang lel ding uh hi." 
Job27:18 Migiloteʼ lam innte kho lo a, maimom bu, ahih kei leh lo honna buk tawh kibang lel hi." 
Job27:19 Amaute a hau sa-in lum uh a, ahih hangin a khanlawh uh ciangin a hauhna teng uh na maimang ta hi." 
Job27:20 Lauhuaina in tuikhang pak bangin nawk gawp dinga, zan ciangin huihpi in amaute mut khia mang ding hi." 
Job27:21 Nisuahna huihpi in amaute leen khia-in a inn panun gamlapi ah leen khia ding hi. 
Job27:22 Amaute a suahtak theih nading a hanciam tantan kimlai mah, hehpih ngaihsut het loin leen khia mang ding hi." 
Job27:23 Amaute a tai laitakun huih in nawk gawpin, a susia gawp dingin mut khia gawp ding hi." 
Job28:1 “Ngun a kitawh khiatna a khuk om a, kham a kisiansakna a mun mah om hi." 
Job28:2 Mihingte in lei sung panin sik to khia a, suang sung panin sumsan a huantui uh hi." 
Job28:3 Mihingte in khuamial thuk pen sung zongin, lei sung a thukpi dong hahkatin zong uh a, khuamial thuk tawng sung pan suang a to khia uh hi." 
Job28:4 Mihingteʼ teenna panin a gamlapi mun, kuamah a pai ngei lohna sungah lei sung sumte a to khia uh hi. Tua lai munah amau guak in na semsem uh a, lei thuk sungah khauhual tawh kivei suk kivei to uh hi." 
Job28:5 I annek dingte leitungah hong po khia a, ahi zongin leinuai thuk sung mei bangin a sa mahmah hi." 
Job28:6 Lei sunga om suangte sungah sapfaia suangmanpha om a, a leivuite sungah kham a om hi." 
Job28:7 Simbung in zong tua lampi thei ngei lo a, luimu zong tua lai ah va leng ngei lo hi." 
Job28:8 Humpinelkai ahi a, ganhing dangte ahi zongin cikmah hunin tua lai ah va pai ngei lo uh hi." 
Job28:9 “Mihingte in suang a sak pente to uh a, mualteʼ bul lei sung panin a to khia uh hi." 
Job28:10 Suangte a tawhvang uh ciangin suang manphate a mu uh hi. 
Job28:11 Amaute in tuinak kipatna dong lei sung to uh a, a kiphum cip nate hong suah khia uh hi." 
Job28:12 Ahi zongin koi lai ah pilna kimu ding ahi hiam? Koi lai ah thutheihna nak om ahi hiam? 
Job28:13 “Mihingte in a kimuh nading a lampi thei lo uh a, mihingteʼ gam sungah zong a lampi om lo hi." 
Job28:14 A thuk mahmah tuipi liante in, ‘Koʼ sungah om lo hi,’ ci uh a, tuipite in, ‘Ko kiangah om lo hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Job28:15 Pilna pen kham tawh a kilei zo hi lo a, a man ding zah zong ngun tawh seh theih hi lo hi." 
Job28:16 Ofir kham tawh pilna a kilei zo hi lo a, suangmanpha pen tawh zong a kilei zo hi tuan lo hi." 
Job28:17 Pilna a manphatna kham le limlang tawh tehtheih hi lo a, kham hoih pen a kibawl nate tawh zong lei zawh hi lo hi." 
Job28:18 Pilna a manphatna suangkhi le limlang tawh genteh theih hi lo a, pilna them khat bek nangawn kep sangin manpha zaw lai hi." 
Job28:19 Ethiopia gamah a piang topaz suang manphate tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a, kham citak hoih pen tawh zong kiteh thei tuan lo hi." 
Job28:20 “Tua ahihleh koi lai panin pilna hong piang ahi hiam? Thutheihna koi lai ah om ahi hiam? 
Job28:21 Nuntakna a nei sung pan a mu thei kuamah om lo a, a leeng thei vasate nangawn in mu thei lo uh hi." 
Job28:22 Sihna le siatna nangawn in a thu hem zak bek ung, ci lai uh hi." 
Job28:23 “Pasian bek in pilna lampi thei a, amah bek in a omna mun a thei hi." 
Job28:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in leimong dong mu a, vantung nuai ah a om na khempeuh a mu thei hi." 
Job28:25 Pasian in huih a gik ding zah bawlin, tuipi a liat nading zah a seh laitak," 
Job28:26 guahzukna ding mun thu pia-in, khuaphialep in a zuih ding lampi bawlin a vaihawm laitak nangawnin," 
Job28:27 amah in pilna mu-in a manphate en tel a, amah in hoih sa ahih manin a kipsak hi." 
Job28:28 “Tua ciangin amah in mihingte tungah thu genin, ‘Topa zahtakna, pilna hi a, siatna pelhna pen thutheihna hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Job29:1 Tua ciangin Job in a thu genkik a," 
Job29:2 “Ka nuntakna nidang a bang hikik henla, Pasian in kei hong et hun lai bang hong hikik leh ka ut hi." 
Job29:3 Tua hun lai-in Pasian in kei hong ompih tawntung a, khuamial sungah ka pai laitakin khuavak hong pia hi." 
Job29:4 Tua hun pen ka cihtheih hun laitak hi a, Pasian in ka innkuan a hong hut laitak hun ahi hi." 
Job29:5 Tua hun lai-in Vanglian Pasian in kei hong ompih a, ka kimkot ah ka tate a om uh hi." 
Job29:6 Ka bawngte le ka keelte in nawi deih zahzah hong pia uh a, suang tam penna nangawn ah ka oliv kungte hoih mahmah hi." 
Job29:7 Khua sung upate a kikhop uh ciangin a kikhawm dingin kei ka pai ciangin 
Job29:8 kei hong muh phetun khangnote in tutna hong awn uh a, kei hong zahtakna limun papite na ding uh hi." 
Job29:9 Khua sung uliante a kiho na khawl pah uh a, a khut uh tawh a kam uh na hum uh hi." 
Job29:10 Mi a thupi pente nangawn na gamdai pah uh a, kuamah pau loin na om uh hi." 
Job29:11 “Ka thugen a za mi peuhmah in a hoih lamin na za uh a, a hong mu mi peuhmah in dik hong sa uh hi." 
Job29:12 Mizawng ka theih peuhmah ka huh tawntung a, cih nading thei lo tagahte zong ka huh hi." 
Job29:13 A lungkham a cimawhte in kei hong phat uh a, meigong numeite a lungnuamin ka omsak hi." 
Job29:14 Thuman, puan bangin ka silh a, thuman in kei hong tuam hi. Thutang, puan pi-in ka silh a, thutang in kei hong tuam hi." 
Job29:15 Mittaw mite adingin mittang ka hi a, khebai mite adingin khe ka hi hi." 
Job29:16 Mizawngte adingin a pa uh ka hi a, lungkhamna a thuak, ka theih loh mite nangawn ka panpih tawntung hi." 
Job29:17 Migiloteʼ gitlohna khempeuh ka susia gawp mang a, amauʼ suk gawp mi khempeuh ka hon khia hi." 
Job29:18 “Ka nuntak kum sehnel zahin a tam dingin ka ngaihsun a, lungnuam takin inn ah a si dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Job29:19 A zung in tui a ngah tawntung singkung tawh ka kibang a, daitui in a hiangte a nomsak singkung tawh ka kibang hi." 
Job29:20 Mi khempeuh in kei hong phat tawntung uh a, ka tha a hat tawntung hi." 
Job29:21 Mite in ka thugen ngai-in hong ngak dimdem uh a, kuamah pau het loin limtakin hong ngai uh hi." 
Job29:22 Thu ka gen khit ciangin a gen thuah ding uh bangmah thei nawn lo uh a, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang pah uh hi." 
Job29:23 Lokhote in khuapi guah deih mahmah in a ngak bangin, ka thugente khempeuh hoihtakin na sang uh hi." 
Job29:24 Itna tawh ka nuihsat ciangin amaute lungnuam mahmah uh a, ka mai a tai ciangin a maigumna uh a bei hi." 
Job29:25 Amaute ukin a vai ding uh ka hawmsak a, kumpipa in a galkapte a makaih bangin ka makai a, a lungkham uh ciangin amaute ka hehnem hi." 
Job30:1 “Ahi zongin tu-in, a pate uh kimanna a nei lo ka uite tawh tuu cing dingin a kuan dingin zong ka deih loh, kei sanga a khangno zawte in hong ciamnuih bawl ta uh hi." 
Job30:2 Amauʼ hatna khempeuh tu-in bei khinta ahih manin, amauʼ hatna kei adingin a kimanna om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:3 Amaute zawng mahmah in gilkial uh ahih manin gamlak singzung keu peuh teep lel ding uh hi. 
Job30:4 Amaute in singkungnote botin ne uh a, limna alna a nei lo poding zung nangawn a ne uh hi." 
Job30:5 Gutate otkhai-in a kidelhkhiat bangin mite lak panin amaute kihawl khia hi. 
Job30:6 Amaute pen hawkguam sung, leihawm sung, luihawm le keenhawm sungah a ten uh a kul ahi hi." 
Job30:7 Ganhing bangin gamlak ah amaute ham uh a, sawlkawm nuai ah kilomin a om khawm uh hi." 
Job30:8 Bangmahin a kimang lo hih bang misia honte, mite omna gam sung panin a kihawl khia hi." 
Job30:9 Tu-in amaute in kei hong simmawh bawlin hong nuihsan uh a, amauteʼ ciamnuihna bek ka suak khinta hi." 
Job30:10 Amaute in kei hong kih uh a, kei tawh tehna-in amaute hoih lua kisa uh a, amaute in ka maitang nangawn cil hong phih vial uh hi." 
Job30:11 Pasian in hong zawngkhalsak, hong cimawhsak ahih manin amaute in a ututun kei hong bawlsia uh hi." 
Job30:12 Amaute in hong sim gawpin, kei hong tai khiasak uh a, ka sih theih nadingin ka mai ah na pang uh hi." 
Job30:13 Ka suahtak theih nading lampi na khaktan uh a, kei suksiat ding hanciam uh a, amaute a kho ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Job30:14 Kei ka bukna leihawm ah amaute hong tuak suk uh a, kei hong sucip suk uh hi." 
Job30:15 Launa tawh ka kidim a, ka cihtheihna khempeuh meii bangin a theng ta hi." 
Job30:16 “Tu-in a si ding ka hi ta a, ka gimna panin noptuam ngah nading bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:17 Zan thapai-in ka guh sung, ka tang sung khempeuh na a, a hong pet tawntung natna dai ngei peuhmah lo hi." 
Job30:18 Pasian in ka puan ngawng pan kei hong manin ka puan tawh hong heekcip hi. 
Job30:19 Buannawng ciim sungah kei hong lawn khia a, ninbulom bang lel ka hi ta hi." 
Job30:20 “Pasian aw, nang kong sam a, na hong dawng ngei kei hi. Nang tungah thu kong ngen a, nong don het kei hi." 
Job30:21 Kei tungah nong gilo mahmah a, nong hih theih zahin kei na hong bawlsia hi." 
Job30:22 Huih lakah na hong lawn a, huih na hong leensak a, huihpi in hong lawn suk hong lawn to hi." 
Job30:23 Mi khempeuh adingin seh kholhin a kikoih sa sihna ah a hong paipih na hihna ka thei hi. 
Job30:24 Na hehpih ding a hong thum ding cih loh buang, bangmah dang a hih thei nawn lo misia pa, bang hangin su gawp na hi hiam?" 
Job30:25 A lungkham mite tawh kei kap khawmin, a cimawh mite dahpih hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Job30:26 Lungdamna le khuavakna ka lamet laitakin, lungkhamna le khua mialna hong tung zawsop hi." 
Job30:27 Lunggimna le natna in kei hong su gawp a, gimna ka thuak ding cih loh bangmah dang om nawn lo hi." 
Job30:28 Lungkham sinkhamin ka om a, mihon lakah dingin huhna ka ngen hi." 
Job30:29 Kei pen gamkhing sunga a om ngia le vasa-kalaohte tawh kipawlin a kikhawl ka hi ta hi. 
Job30:30 Ka vun vomin dulh khia a, ka pumtangin ka ci sa gawp hi." 
Job30:31 Nidangin lungdamna la a kisa ka zakna munah tu-in thumna le kahna aw bek ka za ta hi. 
Job31:1 “Lunggulhna tawh nungak khatpeuh ka et ngei loh nading, kiciamna ka bawl khin hi." 
Job31:2 Vanglian Pasian in eite bang hong cih a, mihingteʼ gamtatna bangci thuhkik ahi hiam?" 
Job31:3 A man loin a gamtate tungah siatna le gimna a tungsak hi. 
Job31:4 Pasian in ka gamtatna khempeuh thei a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh a hong mu hi." 
Job31:5 “Ka gitloh gamtat ngei lohna, kuamah ka khem ngei het lohna, ka gamtat hoihna thute ah ka kiciam ngam hi." 
Job31:6 Pasian in tawikhaina man ah hong tawikhai hen; ka paubaan het lohna hong mu ding hi. 
Job31:7 Lampi man panin ka pial a, siatna lam ka zuih a, ka khut tungah mawhna a baan taak leh" 
Job31:8 ka khawh sa ante midangteʼ nek suak henla, ka an neih khempeuh maimang tahen." 
Job31:9 “Ka veengteʼ zi zawlmitin, a kong gei ah ngakin ka buk taak leh" 
Job31:10 ka it ka zi in midangteʼ an suksak henla, midangteʼ ang ah lum tahen." 
Job31:11 (Tua bang mawhna pen a siahuai hi a, sihna a thuak ding ahi hi." 
Job31:12 Ka neih khempeuh a kaang tum thei mei husia tawh a kibang ahi hi.) 
Job31:13 “Ka nasemte khat peuhpeuh kei tungah hong phun ciangin, ama thu ngai-in limtakin ka bawl hi." 
Job31:14 Tua ci kei leng, Pasianʼ mai mu ngam ding ka hi hiam? Keima thu a khen dingin Pasian hong pai ciangin bang gen mawk ding ka hi hiam?" 
Job31:15 Kei a hong piangsak Pasian mah in keima nasemte zong a piangsak ahi hi. 
Job31:16 “Mizawngte ka huh ding ka mangngilh ngei kei a, meigong numeite ka guaksuaksak ngei kei hi." 
Job31:17 Keimah in an ne napi-in, tagahte a gil kialin ka koihkhong ngei kei hi." 
Job31:18 Ka khang tawntungin tua bangte ka en tawntung hi. 
Job31:19 “Mi a cimawh, puan silh ding a lei zo lo, a zawng lua ka muh ciangin," 
Job31:20 ka tuu hon panin ka ngah tuumul puan kibawl ka pia hi. Amah in zong a lungsim neih khempeuh tawh kei a hong phat hi. 
Job31:21 “Zum thukhenna ah zo na ning cih ngaihsutna tawh tagah khatpeuh ka khem taak leh," 
Job31:22 ka khutte buisum henla, ka liang bul panin kilong khia tahen." 
Job31:23 Pasianʼ gimpiak ding kihta ka hih manin, tua bang peuhmah ka gamta ngei kei ding hi." 
Job31:24 “Leitung hauhna muan le suanin ka nei ngei kei a," 
Job31:25 ka hauhna zong ka kisaktheih pih ngei kei hi. 
Job31:26 A taang mahmah ni ahi a, a hoih mahmah kha ahi zongin, cikmahin ka bia ngei kei hi." 
Job31:27 Tuate pahtawina le zahtakna limin ka khut lapna tawh cikmah hunin ka khial ngei het kei hi. 
Job31:28 Tua bang mawhna in sihna a thuak ding hi a, tua bang mawhna pen Vanglian Pasian nialna ahi hi." 
Job31:29 “Ka galteʼn gim a thuak teh ka kipak ngei kei a, haksatna a tuah uh teh ka lungdam ngei kei hi." 
Job31:30 A sih ding uh deihna tawh ka samsia ngei kei hi. 
Job31:31 Zin le leengte limtakin ka do tawntungna thu ka na a hong sepsak mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi. 
Job31:32 Khualzin mi khempeuh ka inn ah ka tungsak tawntung a, kongzing lakah amaute ka lumsak ngei kei hi." 
Job31:33 Midangte in a mawhnate uh pulak loin imcip uh a, ahih hangin keima mawhna cikmahin ka im ngei kei hi." 
Job31:34 Midangteʼ hong kampau ding kihtakin ka nei ngei kei hi. Amauʼ hong simmawh ding ka kihtakna hangin pau loin ka omngei kei a, ka bucip ngei kei hi." 
Job31:35 “Ka thugente kuamah in na ngai lo ding ahi hiam? Ka gen thu khempeuh man hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi. Vanglian Pasian in kei hong dawng tahen. “Ka langte in kei hong mawhsakna thute ka tawi theih dingin lai sungah a kigelh hileh" 
Job31:36 tua mawhsaknate kisialhna tawh ka ngawng ah ka ok dinga, mi khempeuh in a muh dingin ka sangsak ding hi." 
Job31:37 Ka gamtatna khempeuh Pasian kiangah ka gen dinga, ama muhna ah lungdamin kihihsakna tawh ka om ding hi." 
Job31:38 “Ka khawh leitang ka guk ahih a, a nei taktak paʼ tung pan ka suh ahih a," 
Job31:39 tua leitang a piang ante ka nek a, tua lo a khote a puksi-in ka omsak taak leh," 
Job31:40 tua lo sungah mangbuh le mangbuhham tangin kiak le ling po tahen,” a ci hi. Jobʼ thugente bei ta hi." 
Job32:1 Job a mahmah dik kisa tawntung ahih manin hih mihing thumte in Jobʼ thugente dawn ding ngaihsun nawn lo uh hi. 
Job32:2 Ahi zongin a thu a za, Ram minam, Buz-te beh, Barakhelʼ tapa Elihu a heh hong suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job amah kidiksakin Pasian mawhsak zawsop hi." 
Job32:3 Jobʼ lawm thumte tungah zong a heh suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Job a dawnna ding uh thei lo uh ahih manin Pasian a khial tawh hong kibang hi. 
Job32:4 Elihu ahihleh amaute lak panin a khangno pen ahih manin a dangte a pau kim khit mateng bangmah pau loin a om hi. 
Job32:5 Ahi zongin hih mihing thumte in Job a dawn theih loh a muh ciangin a hehna thuak zo nawn lo hi. 
Job32:6 Tua ahih ciangin Buz-te beh Barakhelʼ tapa Elihu in thu gen ding hong kipan a, “Kei a khangno lai hi-in, note a khangham na hih manun, ka ngaihsutna note lakah kong gen ngam kei hi." 
Job32:7 No a khangham zawte in thu a gen ding kilawm hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Job32:8 Ahi zongin mihingte tungah a hong tung pilna pen Vanglian Pasianʼ kha in a hong piak ahi hi. 
Job32:9 Khanghamna in mi pilsak lo a, thuman zong theisak tuan lo hi." 
Job32:10 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keima thugen dingte nong ngaih ding uh ka deih hi. Keima ngaihsutna hong gensak dih un. 
Job32:11 “Thu na gengen laitakun lungduai takin kong ngaingai a, na thugen dingte uh na zonzon laitakun ka hong ngak hithiat hi." 
Job32:12 Limtakin kong ngai a, na cihmawhna uh ka thei hi. Jobʼ thugente a man lohna na gen tel thei kei uh hi." 
Job32:13 Bang hangin pilna a nei-in kigen thei ding na hi uh hiam? Note in lel na hih manun Pasian in Job dawng ding hi. 
Job32:14 Job in note tungah thu tampi hong gen a, kei tungah hong gen lo hi. Ahi zongin noteʼ dawn bangin ka dawng ngei kei ding hi." 
Job32:15 “Job aw, hih mite in nang hong lel uh a, nang hong dawnna ding bangmah thei lo uh hi." 
Job32:16 Amaute pau loin a om ciangun kei zong pau loin ngak lailai ding ka hi hiam? Amaute in a gen ding uh thei nawn loin om mawk uh hi. 
Job32:17 Tu petpetin kei zong nang kong dawng dinga, keima ngaihsutnate ka hong pulak ding hi." 
Job32:18 Thu a gen dingin kha in kei hong sawl a, tu taktak ciangin ka kam ka ki-ip zo nawn het kei hi." 
Job32:19 Thugen theih nading hun a nei lo hi leng, leenggahzu thak a kithun leenggahzu um bangin ka puak kham ding hi." 
Job32:20 Ka thuak zo nawn kei a, ka gen khia ta ding hi." 
Job32:21 Hih ka thugenna ah kuamah ka pawlpih kei dinga, kuamah phattuam ka nei kei ding hi." 
Job32:22 Kuamah ka mawk phat thei kei hi. Tua ci mawk phat leng Pasian in kei hong su mang pak ding hi. 
Job33:1 “Job aw, tu-in ka thugen khempeuh limtakin hong ngai in." 
Job33:2 Ka lungsim sunga om thute a hong gen ding ka hi hi. 
Job33:3 Ka gen khempeuh lungsim takpi tawh ka gen hi a, a man thu a gen ka hi hi." 
Job33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasianʼ kha in kei hong sawl a, Vanglian pa in kei tungah nuntakna hu hong pia hi." 
Job33:5 “Na hong dawn theih leh limtakin hong dawng in. Na hong seelna ding limtakin kiging in. 
Job33:6 Job aw, nang le kei, Pasianʼ hong muhna ah a kibang ihi a, i nih tuakin leivui pan a piang ihi hi." 
Job33:7 Tua ahih manin kei nong kihtak nading bangmah thu om lo a, nang ka hong zawhthawh bawl gawp nading zong bangmah thu om tuan lo hi." 
Job33:8 “Keima zakin thu na gen khin a, na thugente ka za khin hi." 
Job33:9 Nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei a, ka gamta khial kei hi. Ka paubaang kei a, mawhna ka su kha kei hi." 
Job33:10 Pasian in kei hong sukna ding thu zongzong a, gal bangin kei hong bawl hi." 
Job33:11 Amah in ka khe kol bulh a, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong encik hi,’ na cihna ka za hi." 
Job33:12 “Ahih hangin, Job aw, nangmah na khial zaw hi. Pasian pen mihing sangin lian zaw hi." 
Job33:13 Pasian in mihingteʼ phunna thudon ngei lo hi, ci-in thugenna tawh bang hangin Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam?" 
Job33:14 Pasian in a lam tuamtuamin thu hong gengen napi-in, ama thugente khempeuh kuamah in thudon lo hi." 
Job33:15 Zanin mite a ihmut ciangin, mang le maangmuhna sungah Pasian in thu a gen hi." 
Job33:16 Pasian in thu hong gen a, ama hilhkholhna hangin mite lau mahmah uh hi." 
Job33:17 Mite in khialhna a bawl nawn lohna ding, mi kiphasakte a suahkhak loh nading, Pasian in a deihna hangin mite kiangah thu a gen hi." 
Job33:18 Pasian in mihingte siatna thuaksak lo a, sih nading panin amaute a hon khia hi." 
Job33:19 Pasian in cinatsakna tawh mihingte thuhilh a, a pumpi khempeuh natna tawh a kidimsak hi." 
Job33:20 Cina pa in an ne zo lo a, an lim pen nangawn a kih tha a suak hi." 
Job33:21 A ci a sa khempeuh kiam a, a guh guak bekin a om hi." 
Job33:22 A bei nading a nai hi ta a, misi gam a zuan ding hi ta hi." 
Job33:23 “Mihingteʼ tavuan a phawksak, Pasianʼ vantungmi tul tampite lak panin vantungmi khat amah a huh dingin hong paikhia ding hi." 
Job33:24 Vantungmi in amah a hehpihna hangin, ‘Amah suaktasak in. Misite gamah paisak kei in. Amah tatkhiat nading hih lai ah om hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Job33:25 Tua ciangin ama pumpi khangno suakkikin, a thahat pen hun laitak a bangkik ding hi." 
Job33:26 Tua ciangin Pasian in ama thungetna pia dinga, amah in lungdamna tawh Pasian bia dinga, Pasian in ama adingin thu a hoih lamin a heisakkik ding hi." 
Job33:27 Tua ciangin amah in mihonpiteʼ zakna ah, ‘Kei ka khial khin hi. A manin ka gamta kei a, ahi zongin Pasian in kei hong suaktasak hi." 
Job33:28 Misiteʼ gam sung ka tun nading panin amah in kei hong kem a, tu-in kei ka nungta lai hi,’ a ci ding hi." 
Job33:29 Pasian in hih thute khempeuh mihingte tungah hong hihkik zelzel a," 
Job33:30 sih nading panin hon khiakik zelin nuntak nuam a piakik hi. 
Job33:31 “Job aw, ka thugente limtakin hong ngai in. Gamdai-in om inla, kei thu hong gensak in." 
Job33:32 Ahi zongin gen nop mahmah na neih leh hong gen in; bang hang hiam cih leh midik na hih ding ka hong deihsak hi. 
Job33:33 Ahi zongin gen nop velvel na neih khol kei leh keima thugen hong ngai in. Mipil na hih theih nading thu kong hilh ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job34:1 Tua ciangin Elihu in," 
Job34:2 “No a pilin a kinei mite aw, ka thugente ciamteh un. Thu thei a a kinei mite aw, ka thugente ngai un." 
Job34:3 An na ciap uh ciangin a lim a lim lo na thei uh hi. Thu kigen na zak uh ciangin pil kampau le hai kampau na khen thei uh hi. 
Job34:4 Thuman bang hiam cih teng khia ni. Thuhoih bang hiam cih mu khia ni. 
Job34:5 Job in, ‘Kei ka dik hi. Pasian in kei a thumanin hong seh nuam lo hi." 
Job34:6 Kei a thuman hi napi zuau thu genin hong seh hi. Kei a khial hi lo napi gim thuakin ka cimawh hi,’ a ci hi." 
Job34:7 “Hih Job tawh a kibang mi na mu ngei uh hiam? Amah in Pasian zahtakna lim bangmah nei het lo hi. 
Job34:8 Amah in migilote tawh kikholh nuamsa mahmah a, mawhnei mite tawh a vak kawikawi hi." 
Job34:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘Pasianʼ deihna i zuih hangin phattuamna bangmah om lo hi,’ ci hi." 
Job34:10 “Ahi zongin thu ngaihsun thei a kinei note khempeuh in ka thugenna hong ngai un. Pasian a giloin gamta ngei dinga, Vanglian pa in a man loin sem ngei ding ahi hiam?" 
Job34:11 Pasian in a gamtatna tawh kizui-in mite tungah thaman pia a, a thuak dingun a kilawm bangin gim a pia hi." 
Job34:12 A taktakin ci lehang, Pasian a man loin gamta ngei lo a, thutang kimlai a khialin heisak lo hi." 
Job34:13 Pasian in ama vangliatna mi khatpeuh tung panin a ngah ahi hiam? Leitung khempeuh a uk dingin mi khatpeuh in amah a koih ahi hiam? 
Job34:14 Pasian in ama ngaihsutna kheel henla, nuntakna hu a dokkik hileh" 
Job34:15 nuntakna a nei khempeuh si pah ding uh a, mihing khempeuh leivui suakkik ding uh hi." 
Job34:16 “Job aw, mi pil a kinei na hih leh ka thugente hong ngai in." 
Job34:17 Vanglian pa in thutang a deih lo dingin ngaihsun na hi hiam? Nang in a thuman Pasian mawhsak na hi hiam? 
Job34:18 Kumpite le uliante bangmahin kimang loin a gitloh uh ciangin, amaute a mawhsak ngam pa Pasian bek ahi hi." 
Job34:19 Pasian pen mi khempeuh a hong piangsak pa hi a, amah in uliante panpih tuan nei lo a, mizawngte sangin mihaute thupi ngaihsut zaw tuan lo hi." 
Job34:20 Mihingte ahihleh zan khat thu-in sipak thei hi. Pasian in mite sat pukin sisak thei a, nakpi takin hih kul loin mi thahat pente zong a that thei hi." 
Job34:21 Pasian in mihingteʼ gamtatna khempeuh hong encik a, i kalsuanna themno dongin hong mu khin hi." 
Job34:22 Gamtat sia mite a buk theih nadingun a seelcip zo ding, khuamial khuazing koi mahah om lo hi." 
Job34:23 Pasianʼ mai ah mihingte in thukhenna a thuak ni ding, a kiseh hun om tuam lo hi." 
Job34:24 Amah in a thu kan kul loin mi vangliante su gawp a, amauteʼ tang dingin midangte a koih hi." 
Job34:25 Amah in amauteʼ gamtatnate a vekpi-in thei ahih manin zan khat thu-in amaute lumletin a susia gawp hi. 
Job34:26 Pasian in mi khempeuhʼ muhin mawhneite gim a pia hi. 
Job34:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ama thu mang nawn lo uh a, a thupiakte khempeuh don nawn lo uh hi." 
Job34:28 Amaute in mizawngte kapsak gawp uh a, mizawngteʼ huh ngetna awging Pasian in a za hi." 
Job34:29 “Pasian in bangmah hih het kei taleh zong, kuamah in Pasian mawhsak thei lo ding hi. Amah in hong maingat het kei taleh zong, kuamah in bangmah cih thei tuan lo ding hi." 
Job34:30 Migilote hong uksak taleh zong, tua panin suahtak nading kuamah in vaihawm zo lo ding hi." 
Job34:31 “Job aw, Pasianʼ tungah na khialhnate pulakin na khialh nawn loh nading thu ciam nai lo na hi hiam?" 
Job34:32 Pasian in na khialhnate a hong lah nading ngenin, na gamtat siat nawn loh nading ut nai na hi hiam?" 
Job34:33 Pasian nial na hih manin amah in nangma utna a bang hangin hong hihsak ding ahi hiam? Hih thu pen keiʼ ngaihsut ding hi loin, nangma khensat ding ahi hi. Tu-in nangma ngaihsutna a kician takin hong gen in." 
Job34:34 “Thu a ngaihsun theite in hih thu man hi, hong cih pih ding uh a, ka thugenna a za mipil peuhmahte in," 
Job34:35 ‘Thu a thei lopi-in Job in thu gen a, a thugen peuhmah a khiatna nei om lo hi." 
Job34:36 Jobʼ thugente khempeuh ngaihsun le-uhcin, migilo bangin a kampauna na thei ding uh hi." 
Job34:37 Amah a khialhna khawl nuam het lo a, eite khempeuhʼ mai ah Pasian simmawhin zahpih bawl gawp hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job35:1 Tua ciangin Elihu mah in," 
Job35:2 “Job aw, Pasianʼ muhna ah ka paubaang kei hi, na cih ding kilawm lo hi." 
Job35:3 Pasian kiangah, ka khialh hangin bang phamawh sa na hi hiam? Khialhna ka gamtat loh manin bangmah phattuamna ka ngah kei hi, na cih ding kilawm lo hi." 
Job35:4 Nang le na lawmte tungah thu kong gen ding hi. 
Job35:5 “Vantung en to dih un. Meiite bangzah takin sang om to ahi hiam?
