Job35:6 Mawhna na gamtat manin, Pasian bangmah su kha lo hi. Tampi tak khial talecin zong amah su kha tuan ahi hiam?" 
Job35:7 Na thumanna hangin Pasian in phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? Pasian in nang kiang panin bangmah deih lo hi. 
Job35:8 Na khialhna hangin na mipihte bek in thuak a, na gamtat hoihna hangin na mipihte bek in phattuamna ngah hi." 
Job35:9 “Mite in gim a thuak ciangin tau uh a, amaute a hon khia dingin midang khatpeuh a sam uh hi." 
Job35:10 Lungzin hun laitakin thahatna a pia, amaute a Piangsak Pasianʼ lam nga lo uh hi." 
Job35:11 Eite mi pilin a hong bawl, ganhingte le vasate sangin a pil zaw-in a hong bawl Pasianʼ lam nga lo uh hi." 
Job35:12 Amaute migilo mi kihisakte ahih manun, huh ding a nget hangun Pasian in pia lo hi." 
Job35:13 Ngetnget, gengen, a phattuamna bangmah om lo hi. Vanglian Pasian in na mu lo, na ngai lo hi." 
Job35:14 “Job aw, nangmah in, ‘Pasian ka mu thei kei a, ahi zongin ka thu ama khut sungah om a, lungduai takin ka ngak niloh hi,’ na ci hi." 
Job35:15 Pasian in kuamah gim pia lo a, khialhna zong thupi ngaihsut lo hi, ci-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Job35:16 Tua banga kam na paupau a mawknapi hi a, na gen mel zong a thei het lo na hihna thu a hong kilangsak na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job36:1 Elihu in a thugen zom lai a," 
Job36:2 “Lungduai takin tawm khat hong ngai lai in. Pasianʼ tangin ka gen ding thu pawl khat om lai hi. 
Job36:3 Kei a hong Piangsak Pasian thuman hi, ci-in kong lah nadingin thu tampi tak kaikhawmin kong gen ding hi." 
Job36:4 Ka thugente khempeuh a khial om het lo a, na mai ah thugen pa pen mipil khat ahi hi." 
Job36:5 “Pasian a thahat mahmah hi napi-in, kuamah simmawh lo hi. Amah in a theih loh bangmah om lo hi." 
Job36:6 Amah in mimawhte daupaisak lo a, a zawng gimna a thuakte tungah a manin a gamta hi." 
Job36:7 Amah in thuman mite hu a, kumpi ukna za zong pia a, pahtawina lianpi a ngahsak tawntung hi." 
Job36:8 Ahi zongin mite sikkol kibulh a, a gamtatna sate hangin gimna a thuak uh leh," 
Job36:9 Pasian in amauʼ mawhna le a kiphatsaknate uh a lak khia ahi hi. 
Job36:10 A gamtat siatna panun a khawl nadingun amauʼ bil sungah thu a gengen hi. 
Job36:11 Amaute in Pasianʼ thu mangin ama na sem le-uh amaute nuamsa-in a khan uh a sau hi. 
Job36:12 Ahi zongin ama thu mang kei le-uh, namsau tawh si ding uh a, misiteʼ gam zuan ding uh hi." 
Job36:13 “Migilote a hehin ni tum uh a, gimna a thuak ciang nangawnun ama huh ding ngen lo uh hi." 
Job36:14 Amaute khansih uh a, a zumhuaipi-in a bei uh hi." 
Job36:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in gimna tawh mite thuhilh a, khua a phawk theih nadingun gimna a zang ahi hi." 
Job36:16 Pasian in lungkhamna panin nang hong paikhiat pihin, lungnuam takin nang hong omsak a, na sabuai tungah an lim nono kilui venvan hi." 
Job36:17 Ahi zongin tu-in na ngah dinga kilawm gimna a thuak ta na hi hi. 
Job36:18 Sumgolhʼ khem sa-in gamta kei inla, leitung nateʼ bawlin lam kipialsak kei in." 
Job36:19 Huh ding na nget hangin a phattuamna om nawn lo a, na hauhna na liatna in hong huh thei nawn lo hi." 
Job36:20 Mihingte a bei mang hun ding, zan khuamial hong tun hun ding lunggulh kei in." 
Job36:21 Siatna lamah na kihei khak lohna ding limtakin kidawm in. Na siat khak loh nadingin gimna hong kithuaksak ahi hi. 
Job36:22 “Pasian a vangliat mahmahna limtakin phawktel in. Pasian pen sia khempeuh lakah sia lian pen ahi hi. 
Job36:23 Pasianʼ gamtatzia ding kuamah in sawl thei lo a, Pasian gamtat sia hi, ci-in kuamah in zong mawhsak zo lo hi." 
Job36:24 Pasian a nasepna hangin mi khempeuh in a phat tawntung mah bangin nang zong amah phat zaw in. 
Job36:25 Mi khempeuh in Pasianʼ sep sate mu uh a, thei kim zo lo uh ahih manin lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Job36:26 Pasian a liatna a kicingin i thei zo kei a, ama kum phazah zong i sim zo kei hi." 
Job36:27 “Amah in tuipi panin tuite la to a, tua a lak tuite guahtui-in a bawl hi." 
Job36:28 Amah in meii sung panin guah piangsak a, mihing khempeuh adingin guah a zusak hi." 
Job36:29 Meiite a pai henhanna hitaleh, vanah van a ginna hitaleh kuamah in thei zo lo hi." 
Job36:30 Amah in vantungah khua phiasak a, ahi zongin tuipi thuk sung a mialsak hi." 
Job36:31 Amah in tu-a bangin mihingte hong vak a, annek ding tampi tak a hong pia ahi hi." 
Job36:32 Amah in keek thu pia a, a kap nop penpen a kha dingin a sawl hi." 
Job36:33 Amah a heh ciangin huihpi sam a, vanging pen ama hong pai nading a kitheihna ahi hi." 
Job37:1 “Hih huihpi in ka dip hong kuasak a, ka dip van a khai hong bangsak hi." 
Job37:2 Ama kam panin a hong ging khia hih vanging Pasianʼ pauna awging, limtakin ngai in." 
Job37:3 Amah in vanah khua phiasak a, leimong khat pan mong khat dong a taan hi." 
Job37:4 Tua ciangin a vanglian vanging, ama awging hong kiza a, tua hun sungteng mahin khua a phiaphia hi." 
Job37:5 Pasianʼ sawlna tawh nalamdang pipi piang a, eiteʼ theih zawh loh thute a hong piang hi." 
Job37:6 Amah in leitungah vuk a kia dingin sawl a, guah tampi tak a zusak hi." 
Job37:7 Amah in mihingte a nasep uh khawlsak a, amah a gamtang ahihna a kilangsak hi." 
Job37:8 Gamsate in a lupna ngei delh uh a, a kua sungah bucip uh hi." 
Job37:9 Leitaw lam panin guahpi hong zu a, leilu lam panin huihpi hong nung hi." 
Job37:10 Pasianʼ husanna in tuite khalsak a, tui lianpite khalin sik bangin a sak hi." 
Job37:11 Amah in meiipi nomsak a, meiipi in khua a phiasak hi." 
Job37:12 Pasianʼ deihna zui-in a kikhiin kawikawi hi. Leitung mun khempeuh ah pai-in, Pasianʼ sawl teng a sem uh hi." 
Job37:13 Pasian in mihingte gim a piak nading ahi a, pahtakna a lah nading ahi zongin, leitungah tu-a bangin a piangsak hi." 
Job37:14 “Job aw, tawl khat khawlin ngai inla, Pasianʼ bawl sa nalamdangte ngaihsun dih in." 
Job37:15 Pasian in thu pia a, meii lak panin khua a phiatsak theihna na thei hiam?" 
Job37:16 Bangmah in a len lopi-in vantungah meii a omsak theihna, a lamdang hih ama siamna na thei hiam?" 
Job37:17 Leitaw lam huihpi nasia takin a nun laitakin na puan sungah khua-ul kai-in na om hi. 
Job37:18 Limlang bangin a sak mahmah van peekpi ama hih bangin zal zo na hi hiam? 
Job37:19 Pasian kiangah ka gen ding uh hong hilh in. A hawmpi-in ka om uh a, ka gen ding uh om lo hi." 
Job37:20 Pasian tawh kiho theih nading ka ngen kei ding hi. Kei hong suksiat nadingin kei kipia ding ka hi hiam? 
Job37:21 “Tawl khat sung khuavak kimu vet lo a, guah le meii in a liah hi. Tua ciangin huih hong nungin tuate khempeuh a mut siang hi." 
Job37:22 Kham mel khuavak leilu lam pan hong taang a, Pasianʼ minthanna pen zahtakna tawh kidimsak hi." 
Job37:23 Pasian vanglian mahmah a, eiteʼ theih zawh hi lo hi. Amah thuman mahmah a, thutang takin na a sem hi." 
Job37:24 Tua ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah a zahtakna, mipil a kisate amah in a don lohna, lamdangsak ding hi lo hi.” a ci hi." 
Job38:1 Tua ciangin huihpi lak panin Topa in Job tungah thu hong gen a," 
Job38:2 “Keiʼ pilna a nial dingin nang kua na hi hiam? Thu na theih loh lam a kilangsak na hi bek hi. 
Job38:3 Kipasalsakin ding to inla, kong thudot dingte hong dawng in." 
Job38:4 Leitung ka bawl laitakin nang om na hi hiam? Thei kisa na hih leh tua thu hong gen in. 
Job38:5 Bang cia-in golsak ding cih kua in seh ahi hiam? Kua in a golna ding zah khau khai ahi hiam? Hihte khempeuh thei kisa na hi hiam? 
Job38:6 Leitung a pua khuampite bang tungah kiphut ahi hiam? Kua in leitung a bulpi phut ahi hiam? 
Job38:7 Tua ni-in zingsang aksite in la sa khawm uh a, Pasianʼ tapate lungdamin a kiko uh hi." 
Job38:8 “Lei sung panin tuipi hong suahkhiat laitakin, tua tuipi a khaktan ding kongpi kua in na khak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:9 Meii tawh tuipi a tuamcip pa, khuamial tawh a vialcip pa keimah ka hi hi." 
Job38:10 Tuipi gamgi ding ciamteh sakin, ama huang sung ding bekah ka omsak hi." 
Job38:11 Tuipi kiangah, ‘Hih ciang bek na pai dinga, hih banah na kin nawn kei ding hi. Na tuihualte hih ciang bek pai ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Job38:12 Job aw, nangmah in, ‘Tu ni-in khua vak in,’ ci-in na nuntak sung tawntung thu pia ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:13 Zing khuavak in leitung a mongin manin, a kawm a bu migilote a sinkhiat ding, thu pia thei ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:14 Khuavak in mualleguamte kilangkhiasak a, puan a tonin a kikoih tawh a kibatna a kilangsak hi." 
Job38:15 Migilote adingin sun khuavak taang lua a, siatna a gamtat nading uh a khamcip hi." 
Job38:16 “Tuipi sung tawng tuinak ah pai ngei na hi hiam? Tuipi nuai lei tam tungah lam pai ngei na hi hiam? 
Job38:17 Misiteʼ gam khuamial kongkhakpi, mi khatpeuh in nang hong lak ngei ahi hiam?" 
Job38:18 Leitung bangcia lian ding cih na thei hiam? Hih thute thei na hih leh hong dawng in. 
Job38:19 “Leitung khuavak hong kipat khiatna mun ahi a, leitung khuamial hong kipatna mun ahi zongin, thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:20 Nangmah in amauʼ omna mun ciang dong va thei a, tua ciang dongah va khakik ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:21 Na nuntakna sawt ta a, leitung a pianin nang suak khin na hih teh tua thute khempeuh thei mah ni teh!" 
Job38:22 “Vuk a kikoihna munah nang va lut ngei a, gial a kikhopna mun va mu ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:23 Tuate, lungkham hun ading, gal om hun cianga dingin ka koihcing ahi hi." 
Job38:24 Leitung nitaang a hong suah khiatna mun ahi a, nisuahna huihpi hong kipatna mun ahi zongin, va tung ngei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:25 “Kua in guahzukna ding tui lampi bawlsak a, keekʼ lampi ding sialsak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:26 Mihing om lohna mun leilak ah, kua in guah zusak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:27 Lopate a po theih nadingin lei keu-in a sak bekbakte kua in tui buak ahi hiam? 
Job38:28 Guah in pa nei ahi hiam? Daitui in pa nei ahi hiam? 
Job38:29 Kuaʼ sung panin tuikhal hong piang khia a, kuaʼ sung panin van a vukte hong suak ahi hiam?" 
Job38:30 Tua tuite suang bangin sak a, tuipi tui teng khalcip hi." 
Job38:31 “Van a om Seguk henkop thei a, Zawlzawng a kikhihna phel thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:32 Ama hunhunin aksite lam lak thei a, Khawlei-uikai a pai nading lampi lak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:33 Van a om nateʼ zuih ding ngeina bawlsak thei a, lei-a om nateʼ zuih ding ngeina bawl thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:34 “Van a om meiite in guah hong zuksak nading nangmah in sawl na hi hiam? 
Job38:35 ‘Khua phia in,’ ci-in thu pia lecin, ‘Nong sawl bangin phia ning,’ hong ci ding ahi hiam?" 
Job38:36 Nail gun a khan ding a thei gunvapite kua in hilh a, guahzuk ding a thei akluite, kua in hilh ahi hiam?" 
Job38:37 Leivuite khalcipin, leitang a sak ciangin, meiite thu pia-in van a tuibeemte a hong dingin kua in pilna nei ahi hiam?" 
Job38:38  
Job38:39 “Humpinelkai le a note leihawm sungah bu-in, a kua sung uh ah lumin ngakin a om laitakun, a an ding uh zonsak thei a, a noteʼ gilkialna vahsak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job38:40  
Job38:41 Va-akte a gil kialin leng kawikawi-in, a note in an duhin kei tungah hong nget ciangun, tua va-akte an a pia pa kua ahi hiam?" 
Job39:1 “Sathakte a suah hun ding thei ngei na hi hiam? Sakhite a suah laitakin nau va dom ngei na hi hiam? 
Job39:2 Tuate a ni ciamtehin, a suah hun ding uh thei na hi hiam?" 
Job39:3 A no suak dingin lei ah a bawh suk hun laitak thei na hi hiam? 
Job39:4 A note gamlak ah khangin, a nute kiang pan pai khia-in ciahkik nawn lo uh hi." 
Job39:5 “Kua in gam-late tungah suahtakna pia ahi hiam? Kua in khahin a ututin vaksak ahi hiam? 
Job39:6 Amauʼ om nadingin gamlak ka pia a, bangmah a po zawh lohna zanglei ah ka tengsak hi." 
Job39:7 Gamlumna mun khuapite tawh a kigamla ah om uh a, kuamah in zualsak zo lo a, na semsak zo lo uh hi." 
Job39:8 Mualte tungah an zongin vak kawikawi uh a, nek theih ding singkung lopa a hing peuhpeuh zuan kawikawi uh hi." 
Job39:9 “Gam bawngtal in nangma na hong sem ding ahi hiam? Na ganbuk ah gam bawngtal hong giak nuam ding ahi hiam? 
Job39:10 Nangmah in khauhual tawh khih zo dinga, na lo ah na lokhawhna leeng kaisak zo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job39:11 Nasem dingin a hat mahmah hangin, nangma na hong sepsak dingin lamen ngam na hi hiam?" 
Job39:12 Lo a na an piangte hong kaihkhop sakin, na ancilna ah an hong khawm dingin um na hi hiam?" 
Job39:13 “Vasa-kalaohte in a kha uh bangzah takin nawh zap thei ahi hiam! Ahi zongin gun vapi bangin vasa-kalaoh leng thei lo hi. 
Job39:14 Vasa-kalaoh in leilak ah a tui nusia a, a tuite a luumsak dingin leilak a ap hi." 
Job39:15 Mi khatpeuh in a khe tawh a tuite a sikkhap khak ding, gamsa khatpeuh in a sikkhap khak ding, phawk khol lo hi." 
Job39:16 A tuite ama aʼ bangin ngaihsun khol lo a, ka gimnate a mawkna suak kha ding hi, ci-in lunghimawh lo hi." 
Job39:17 Amah a hai-in a bawlpa ama tungah pilna a guan lopa keimah ka hi hi. 
Job39:18 Ahi zongin a tai ciangin sakol sangin hat zaw hi. 
Job39:19 “Job aw, sakolte a hatsak pa nang na hi hiam? Sakol zaang mul a posak pa nang na hi hiam?" 
Job39:20 Sakolte kauphe bangin diangsak thei-in, miteʼ kihtak dingin phitsak thei na hi hiam?" 
Job39:21 Amaute in lawpna tawh a khe-un lei khuat uh a, a thaneih khempeuh uh tawh gal sungah a diang uh hi." 
Job39:22 Amaute in launa mel bangmah thei lo uh a, namsau kihta-in nungkik cih zong om lo hi." 
Job39:23 Amauteʼ tungah a tuang miteʼ galhiam, lum le teite a tee zalzal hi." 
Job39:24 Lawp mahmahna tawh sakolte in mainawt uh a, peengkul a kitum ciangin omkhong thei lo uh hi." 
Job39:25 Peengkul a kitum ciangin ham hathat uh a, gal mai a tun ma-un gal gimnam za uh a, galkap maangteʼ thupiakna awging a za uh hi." 
Job39:26 “Simbung in a kha zalin leitaw lamah a leentheih nading nangma kiang panin hong sin ahi hiam? 
Job39:27 Muvanlai in sang leenin mual tungah bu a tomna ding nangʼ thupiakna hong ngak ahi hiam? 
Job39:28 Suangpi dawnah bu bawl a, suangheeng kawmte phualpi-in nei hi." 
Job39:29 Tua lai mun panin khuadak kawikawi a, manin a nek ding an a gal et hi." 
Job39:30 Gan sihna kimkot ah musanete kikhawm uh a, a note in sasi a dawn uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job40:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Job kiangah," 
Job40:2 “Job aw, nangmah in Vanglian Pasian nong dem hi. Tu-in khawl ding na hiam, ahih kei leh keima thugen nong dawng ding hiam?” a ci hi." 
Job40:3 Tua ciangin Job in dawng a," 
Job40:4 “ Topa aw, ka hai pau kha hi. Hong bangci dawn theih ding ka hi hiam? Tu a kipanin ka pau nawn kei ding hi." 
Job40:5 Ka gen dinga kilawm zahval gen kha ka hih manin, tu a kipanin ka pau nawn het kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Job40:6 Tua ciangin huihpi sung panin Topa in Job tungah thu genkik a," 
Job40:7 “Kipasalsakin ding to inla, ka thudotnate hong dawng in." 
Job40:8 Kei a thutang loin hong seh a, nang thutang kisa-in kei hong mawhsak na hi hiam?" 
Job40:9 Kei zahin nang hat na hi hiam? Keiʼ awging zahin nang aʼ ging zo ding ahi hiam? 
Job40:10 Na ngap nakleh na minthan nading le na kihihsak theih nadingin tu-in hong kipan inla, minthanna le minliatna ngah ta in." 
Job40:11 A kiphasak mite en inla, na hehna tawh amaute niamkhiat gawp in." 
Job40:12 Mi kiphasakte en inla, amaute niamkhiat gawp in. Migilote khempeuh a omna mun munah tuancil in." 
Job40:13 Amaute khempeuh lei sungah phumcip inla, misiteʼ gam sungah amaute khihcip in." 
Job40:14 Tua bangin na hih zawh nakleh nang a hong phat masa pen pa, nang a gualzo pa na hihna thu a hong phawk masa pen pa ka hi ding hi." 
Job40:15 “Tui-sakol ganhing golpi ngaihsun dih in. Amah le nang a piangsak pa keimah ka hi hi. Amah in bawngtal bangin lopa bek mah ne a," 
Job40:16 ahi zongin ama pum sungah bangzah hatna om a, bangzah ta-in a sazang khauh ahi hiam?" 
Job40:17 Ama mei, taamtak sing bangin khauhin tal po veva a, a khe-a a sazangte hat pha mahmah hi." 
Job40:18 Ama guhte sumngo bangin khauh a, ama khete sikzawl bangin a khauh hi." 
Job40:19 “Ganhing khempeuh lak pan a lamdang pen hi a, amah a Piangsak pa bek mah in amah a zo zo ahi hi." 
Job40:20 Gamsate omna mual tung panin ama an ding lopa kipuak hi. 
Job40:21 Amah lingkung nuai ah lum a, nawng sunga pumpeeng lakah a bu hi." 
Job40:22 Lingkungte le lui gei-a gialhek kungte in ama ading niliim piangsak hi. 
Job40:23 Amah in gun tuikhangte kihta het lo a, tuikhang in ama maitang a nawk gawp hangin nuam takin om thei veve hi." 
Job40:24 Kua in ama mit tawsakin man zo ding ahi hiam? Kua in a nakpheh ah khau vawh zo ding ahi hiam? 
Job41:1 “Ngasa siahna sikkawi tawh Awle man zo dinga, khauhual khat tawh a leii hen zo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:2 A nakpheh ah khau vawh zo dinga, a khaguh ah sikkawi bulh zo ding na hiam?" 
Job41:3 Amah in na khah nading hong thum dinga, na hehpih nading hong ngen ding ahi hiam?" 
Job41:4 Na sila ahi tawntung dingin nangma tungah thu hong ciam ding ahi hiam? 
Job41:5 Na nasem numeite na mawlpih bangin mawlpih zo dinga, vasa khawi bangin bawl zo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:6 Ngasa bengte in lei dingin hong deek dinga, sa zuakte in zuak dingin a sa sem ding ahi hiam?" 
Job41:7 Ngasa khawhna teipi tawh a vun khawh let zo dinga, teipi lingnei tawh a lutang khawh let zo ding na hi hiam?" 
Job41:8 Khat vei su kha khin lecin na hihkik nawn kei dinga, tua na sukkhakna thu na mangngilh nawn kei ding hi." 
Job41:9 “Awle a mu mi peuhmah lau-in lei ah a puk uh hi. 
Job41:10 Awle a heh ciangin kihtakhuai mahmah a, ama omna mai ah kuamah om ngam lo hi." 
Job41:11 Leitung a om mihingte lakah Awle a suk manin a sih lawh lo kua om ahi hiam? 
Job41:12 “Awle khete, a guh a taang, a thahatna ziate gen loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Job41:13 Kua in ama puan tungnung hawk khiatsak zo a, a sik puanpi sun let zo ahi hiam?" 
Job41:14 A kihtakhuai a hate a kam sungah om ahih manin, kua in ama kam phensak ngam ahi hiam?" 
Job41:15 A nung zang suk ah a lipte lum bangin kithuap suk cinten a, suang bangin sakin kimatcip bikbek ciat hi." 
Job41:16 Tua lipte khatlekhat kithuapcip bikbek ahih manin, khatlekhat kikalah huih nangawn thawl zo lo hi." 
Job41:17 Tuate kinak mat lua ahih manin, bangmah in phel khia zo lo hi." 
Job41:18 Amah a hetchiai ciangin mei-ek bangin taang zaizai a, a mittangte nisuak bangin a taang hi." 
Job41:19 A kam panin mei kuang khia a, mei-ek leeng khia zaizai hi." 
Job41:20 A nak panin meikhu suak a, selkeu khu tawh kibang hi." 
Job41:21 Ama husanna in mei tawhkuang a, ama kam panin meikuang a suak khia hi." 
Job41:22 A ngawng zong thakhauh mahmah ahih manin, a gim thei het lo thatang a nei ahi hi." 
Job41:23 A vun tung khempeuh a nipna mun mahmah om lo a, sik peek bangin a sak kim hi." 
Job41:24 A lungsim in suangtum bangin kihtak khat zong nei lo a, an gawina suang bangin sakin do lah nei lo hi." 
Job41:25 Amah hong kithawi ciangin mi thahat pente nangawn lau a, kihta mahmah uh ahih manin cih nading thei loin a om uh hi." 
Job41:26 Namsau tawh a kisut hangin bun zo vet lo a, teipi le thaltangte in zong bun zo tuan het lo hi." 
Job41:27 Ama adingin sikte, buhkung bangin nip a, sumngote nangawn sing muat sa bang lel hi." 
Job41:28 Amah khua a phawksak zo ding, thaltang om lo a, suang tawh a kiden ciangin anvai them tu bang lel hi." 
Job41:29 Ama adingin molhtum pen buhkung bang hi lel a, teipi tawh a kikhawh ciangin a nuihsan lel hi." 
Job41:30 A khecinte, beelpei kitamte tawh kibang a, lam a pai ciangin leilak kuikek gawp hi." 
Job41:31 Amah in tuipi tokin beel sunga tui so bangsak zo a, sathau sa sunga tui tu bangin tuipi phuansak zaizai zo hi." 
Job41:32 A paina sa khempeuh ah tuihual om dandan a, tuipi phuansak pheuphau hi." 
Job41:33 Amah tehpih theih ding leitungah bangmah om lo a, bangmah kihtak a nei het lo ganhing ahi hi." 
Job41:34 Amah in a kihtakhuai ganhing a kihisak pente nangawn nuai-et lai a, amah pen gamsa khempeuhʼ kumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:1 Tua ciangin Job in Topa dawng a," 
Job42:2 “ Topa aw, vangliatna khempeuh na neihna, na hih nop khempeuh na hih theihna thu ka thei hi." 
Job42:3 Kei bangmah a thei lo kimlai, ‘Bang hangin ka pilna hong dem ngam na hi hiam?’ na hong ci hi. Keimah in ka tel zawh loh thute, kei adingin a lamdang lua thu a gengen ka hi hi." 
Job42:4 Thu na gen laitakin ka na ngaihna ding, na thugente kong dawn ding, na hong gen hi." 
Job42:5 Nidangin miʼ gen sawn bekin nang ka hong thei a, tu-in keima mit mahmah tawh nang ka hong mu ta hi." 
Job42:6 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka pauna sate khempeuh hangin ka maizum mahmah a, tu-in vutlevai khu-in nakpi takin ka kisik hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:7 Topa in hih thute khempeuh Job tungah a gen khit ciangin, Teman khuami Elifaz kiangah, “Ka nasem pa Job bangin, keima thu na gen ding uh a kilawm bangin gen lo na hih manun, nang le na lawm tegel tungah ka heh hi." 
Job42:8 Tu-in bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Job kiangah paipih unla, note adingin biakpiakna-in nei un. Job in note adingin thu hong ngetsak dinga, keimah in ama thungetna ka pia ding hi. Noteʼ haina zahin kong minsiasak kei ding hi. Note in Jobʼ gen bangin keima thu a manin na gen kei uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Job42:9 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ sawl bangin Elifaz, Bildad le Zofar gamta uh a, Topa in Jobʼ thungetna a pia hi." 
Job42:10 Job in a lawm thumte ading thu a ngetsak khit ciangin, Topa in Job cithei sakkik a, nidang a a neih ngei zah nihin neihsa lamsa a guan hi." 
Job42:11 Tua ciangin Jobʼ sanggam pasalte, a sanggam numeite le a lawm ngeite a inn ah hong hawh uh a, a inn ah pawi bawlin lungdamin a om khawm uh hi. Topa in ama tungah a tunsak gimnate hangin a khasiatpihnate uh genin a hanthawn uh hi. Amaute in sum le kham zungbuh khat ciat tawh va pha uh hi." 
Job42:12 Tua tham loin Topa in Jobʼ nuntakna a masa lam sangin a nunung lamah thupha lim piak zaw hi. Job in tuu tul sawm le tul li, kalaoh tul guk, bawngtal kap tul khat le la a pi tul khat a nei hi." 
Job42:13 Amah in tapa sagih le tanu thum neikik a," 
Job42:14 a tanu upa pen Jemimah phuak a, a nihna Keziah phuak a, a tum pen Keren-happuk a phuak hi." 
Job42:15 Jobʼ tanute zahin a melhoih leitungah numei dang khat zong om lo a, a pa un a sanggam pasalte uh tawh a kibangin gamh a luah khawmsak hi." 
Job42:16 Hih hun khit ciangin Job kum za le kum sawm li sung nungta lai a, a tute ciang bek hi loin a tu sawnsawn ciang dong zong a mu hi." 
Job42:17 Tua khit ciangin a khan khinin a teeksih ta hi. 
Psalms1:1 Mi nuamsa i cihte pen migiloteʼ thu a zui lo mi, mimawhteʼ gamtat bangin a gamta lo mi, mi a thusim lote tawh a kipawl lo mi ahi hi." 
Psalms1:2 Ama nopsakna pen Topa thu sung bek mah hi a, sun le zanin ama thu a ngaih sunsun mi ahi hi." 
Psalms1:3 Amah pen luitui luang gei-a a kisuan, ama gah hunin gah a, a teh a vul ngei lo, singkung tawh kibang hi. Ama hihna khempeuh ah a maa pai mahmah hi." 
Psalms1:4 Migilote ahihleh tua bang hi lo uh a, huih in a letkhiat anvai tawh kibang lel uh hi." 
Psalms1:5 Tua ahih ciangin migilote in thukhenna thuak zo lo ding uh a, mimawhte pen midikteʼ pawl sungah kihel thei lo ding uh hi;" 
Psalms1:6 bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in midikte lamlakin hu tawntung a, migilote ahihleh sia maimang ding uh hi." 
Psalms2:1 Bang thu hangin minam dangte siat nading ah kithukhat sim uh a, mite in a mawkna dingpi-in sawm sim uh ahi hiam?" 
Psalms2:2 Leitung kumpite le gam ukte in Topa le ama sathau nilh pa langpangin vaihawm uh a," 
Psalms2:3 “Amauʼ hong henna khaute su tat khia-in, amauʼ khaute ei kiang panin paai khia ni,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms2:4 Vantung a a tupa in amaute na nuihsan a, tua Topa in amaute a zahko hi." 
Psalms2:5 Tua ciangin hehna tawh amau kiangah thu gen dinga, heh luat mahmahna tawh amaute liing lawngsakin," 
Psalms2:6 “Ka mual siangtho Zion tungah ka kumpi ka tusak khin hi,” ci hi." 
Psalms2:7 Topaʼ thukhenna tu-in kong gen ding hi: Amah in keima tungah, “Nang pen ka tapa na hi a, tu ni-in na Pa ka suak hi." 
Psalms2:8 Keima tungah hong ngen in; nangma luah dingin minamte ka bawl dinga, leimong dongin na neihsa ka hisak ding hi." 
Psalms2:9 Sik tawn khat tawh amaute na satkham dinga, beelseek pa in beel a den khap bangin leilak ah amaute na deng zan ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Psalms2:10 Tua ahih ciangin kumpite aw, tu-in pil ta un; leitung gam a ukte aw, tu-in thu phawk ta un." 
Psalms2:11 Launa tawh Topaʼ na sem unla, linna tawh a khe nam un; tua hikeileh amah sin so-in lamkal ah na sia mang ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah heh pakpak hi. Amah a beel khempeuh mi nuamsate ahi hi." 
Psalms2:12  
Psalms3:1 Topa aw, ka galte tam mahmah a, mi tampi tak in kei hong langpan nainai uh hi." 
Psalms3:2 Pasian in amah huh lo ding, mi tampi in hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms3:3 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen ka kidalna lum, ka minthanna le ka lu hong phong pa na hi hi." 
Psalms3:4 Nakpi takin Topa ka gal sap a, amah in a mual siangtho panin kei a hong dawng hi." 
Psalms3:5 Lumin ka ihmu a, Topa in hong kem ahih manin ka thokik hi." 
Psalms3:6 Keimah a hong galbawl keimah a hong umcih mi tul sawm tampite ka kihta kei hi. 
Psalms3:7 Tho in, Topa! Kei hong hon in, ka Pasian! Bang hang hiam cih leh ka galte khempeuhʼ paang nangmah in na beeng gawp a, migiloteʼ ha na sutan hi." 
Psalms3:8 Gualzawhna pen Topa nangma hang ahi hi. Na mite tungah na thupha hong tung tahen! 
Psalms4:1 A thuman ka Pasian aw, ka hong sap ciangin hong dawng in. Gimna ka thuak ciangin nopsakna nong pia hi. Kei hong hehpih inla, ka thungetna hong za in." 
Psalms4:2 Mite aw, ka minphatna in bang tanvei daina thuak ding ahi hiam? Bang tanvei thumawkna deihin zuau thu zong ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms4:3 Ahih hangin Topa in ama adingin miphate a tuam koih lam thei ta un. Keʼn ka sap ciangin Topa in hong za hi. 
Psalms4:4 Lau-in liing unla, mawhna peel un. Na lupna tung uh ah lungngai phapha unla, om khikhe un." 
Psalms4:5 A man biakpiaknate lui unla, Topa muang un." 
Psalms4:6 Mi tampi in, “Thupha tampi hong pia in. Ko tungah na maitang vang hong taangsak in, Topa!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms4:7 Amaute, an le leengtui a hauh cianga a nuam uh sangin nuamna lian zaw ka lung sungah nong guan hi." 
Psalms4:8 Nuam takin lumin ka ihmu ta ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah bek in lungmuanna munah na hong omsak hi." 
Psalms5:1 Topa aw, kong paunate hong ngai inla, ka hong thumnate hong thudon in." 
Psalms5:2 Ka kumpi le ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah hong thum ka hih manin ka kikona aw hong ngai in." 
Psalms5:3 Topa aw, zingsang simin ka aw nong za a, zingsang simin nangma adingin biakna bawlin kong ngak hi." 
Psalms5:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna lamsang a deih Pasian na hi kei a, siatna pen tawl khat zong nang tawh a om khawm thei ahi kei hi." 
Psalms5:5 A kisathei mite nangma mit tawh kituak lo a, siatna a bawlte khempeuh nangmah in na mudah hi." 
Psalms5:6 Zuau thu a gen mite nangmah in na susia hi. Topa in mi thahnopna lungsim le mi khemnopna lungsim a neite a mudah hi. 
Psalms5:7 Kei ka hih leh a kicing na itna kip suangin na inn sungah ka tum dinga, nangmah zahtakna tawh kunin a siangtho na biakinn lam nga-in kong bia ding hi." 
Psalms5:8 Topa aw, gal tampi nei ka hih manin na thumanna tawh kei hong makaih inla, keima mai ah na lampi taangsak in." 
Psalms5:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amau sungah thuman om lo hi. Amau lungsimah siatna bek ngaihsun uh a, amau gawlgui pen a kihong sa hankhuk tawh kibang hi. A kam uh tawh mawk phat uh hi." 
Psalms5:10 Pasian aw, a mawhna uh amau mah thuaksak inla, amau thu mah tawh amaute puksak in. Amaute in nangmah hong lehdo uh ahih manin amau mawhna tampite hangin amaute paai khia in." 
Psalms5:11 Ahih hangin nang hong belte khempeuh lungdamsak inla, nuamna la sasak tawntung in. Nangma min a deihte nangma hangin gualzo-in a lungdam theih nadingun amaute na hu hi." 
Psalms5:12 Topa aw, thuman mi thupha na pia a, lum tawh dal bangin deihsakna tawh na dal hi." 
Psalms6:1 Topa aw, na heh laitak hong taii kei inla, lung so sa-in hong thuhilh kei in." 
Psalms6:2 Topa aw, thaneem ka hih manin kei tungah dikna hong zang in. Topa aw, ka guh ka taang na mahmah ahih manin hong damsak in." 
Psalms6:3 Ka hingim mahmah hi. Topa aw, bang tanvei nang hong zekai lai ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms6:4 Topa aw, hong kihei inla, kei hong hon in. Itna kip a nei pa na hih manin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms6:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh misite omna gam sungah nangmah phawk theih nading bangmah om lo ahih manin, Leinuai panin kua in nang hong phat thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms6:6 Ka tautauna-in ka gim hi. Zan sialin ka khitui in ka lupna tum a, ka kahkahna-in ka lupna kawt dikdek hi." 
Psalms6:7 Dahna hangin ka mit mial a, ka galteʼ hong bawlna hangin ka mit zung zaw semsem hi." 
Psalms6:8 Siatna a bawlte khempeuh aw, ka kiang panin kihem khia un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka kahna aw a za hi." 
Psalms6:9 Topa in keima thumna hong za khinzo a, Topa in ka thungetna hong sang ta hi." 
Psalms6:10 Ka galte khempeuh zahhuai mahmah in genthei ding uh hi. Amaute nungkikin maizumna thuak pah ding uh hi. 
Psalms7:1 Topa ka Pasian aw, nangmah kong bel hi. Kei hong delhteʼ kiang panin hong dal inla hong hon in." 
Psalms7:2 Kei hong hon kei lecin a hong hon ding dang kuamah om lo ahih manin amaute in humpinelkai bangin hong kai khia-in hong bal gawp ding uh hi. 
Psalms7:3 Topa ka Pasian aw, ka gamtat a siat a, ka khut a khialh leh," 
Psalms7:4 bangmah thu om lopi-in ka lawmte khemin, ka galte ka huh taak leh," 
Psalms7:5 galte in kei hong delhin hong pha uh henla, leilak ah kei hong tuancilsak inla, leilak ah kei hong sial pai ta uh hen." 
Psalms7:6 Tho in, Topa, a hehsa-in thasaan inla, ka galteʼ hehna panin kei hong dal in. Khanglo in, ka Pasian aw, thukhen nading hun khat na seh khinzo hi." 
Psalms7:7 Nangma omna kiimah mite kikhawmsak inla, amauteʼ omna tung a sangna munah tu in." 
Psalms7:8 Topa in mite thu a khen hi. Topa aw, ka thumanna le keima sunga om ka dikna tawh kizui-in thu hong khen in." 
Psalms7:9 Lungsim le ngaihsutna a en a thuman Pasian aw, migiloteʼ siatna beisak inla, mi thumante kipsak in." 
Psalms7:10 Pasian, kei hong hupa hi a, lungsim man mite a hon hi." 
Psalms7:11 Pasian, thu a tangin a khen pa hi a, migilote tungah a heh den pa ahi hi." 
Psalms7:12 Mite a kibawl phatkik kei leh, Pasian in a thalkhau hek zo a, a namsau taat ding hi." 
Psalms7:13 Amah in mei thaltang bawl a, sih theihna ama galhiamte a baih sa-in a koih zo hi." 
Psalms7:14 Migilo in thusia paii a, suak nuamin na a, zuau thu a hing khia hi." 
Psalms7:15 Amah in gum to a, ama tawh sa gum sung mahah amah a kia hi." 
Psalms7:16 Ama lunggulh hoih lo pen ama lu tungah tukik a, ama gamtat sia pen ama luzang mahah tukik hi." 
Psalms7:17 Keʼn ahihleh, ama dikna om bangin Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ka lak dinga, a Sangpen Topaʼ minphatna la ka sak ding hi." 
Psalms8:1 Topa koteʼ Topa aw, leitung khempeuh ah na min lian mahmah hi. Nangmah a hong kiphatna awgingte in vantung ban a," 
Psalms8:2 naungekte le naupangteʼ kam tawh nangmah phatna la kisa hi. Gal na neih manin galte le langpangte na daihsakna dingin panmun kip na bawl khin hi. 
Psalms8:3 Na nasepna, na bawl sa, kha le aksite, le na vantungte ka et ciangin," 
Psalms8:4 na ngaihsut tham dingin mihing bang hi lel a, na phawk tham dingin mihingʼ ta bang hi lel ahi hiam?" 
Psalms8:5 Ahi zongin, vantungmi sangin a neu zaw deuh bekin na bawl a, minthanna le pahtawina nangmah in na guan hi." 
Psalms8:6 Na khut tawh na bawl sate khempeuh tungah ukna thu ama tungah na pia a, na khempeuh na uksak hi." 
Psalms8:7 Tuu le bawng khempeuh, gamsa khempeuh zong," 
Psalms8:8 huihlak a leng vasate, tui sunga om ngasate, tui, lampi a a tawn khempeuhte, na khempeuh ama khe nuai ah na koih hi." 
Psalms8:9 Topa, koteʼ Topa aw, leitung khempeuh ah na min lian mahmah hi." 
Psalms9:1 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa tungah lungdamna kong ko dinga, na bawl a lamdangte khempeuh ka gen ding hi." 
Psalms9:2 Nangma hangin nuamin ka diang dinga, na minphatna ka sa ding hi, Sangpen pa aw." 
Psalms9:3 Ka galte a nungkik ciangin, nangma mai ah amaute pukin kisia uh hi." 
Psalms9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima thutanna na hong kipsak a, tokhom tungah tu-in thu a manin na khen hi." 
Psalms9:5 Minamte na taii a, migilote na susia hi. A maimang dingin amauʼ min na phiat hi." 
Psalms9:6 Siat denna sungah galte bei mang hi. A khuate uh na zunglot a, amaute kiphawk kha nawn lo hi." 
Psalms9:7 Topa ahihleh kumpi za ah tu ngitnget a, thukhen nadingin a tokhom a bawl hi." 
Psalms9:8 Leitung miteʼ thu a mantakin khen a, a kilawm bangin miteʼ thu a khen hi." 
Psalms9:9 Topa pen, netniamna a thuakte adingin munkip hi a, haksat hun ciangin mun muanhuai ahi hi." 
Psalms9:10 Topa aw, nang a hong zongte nusia lo na hih manin, na min a theite in nang hong muang uh hi." 
Psalms9:11 Zion ah a om Topa phatna la sa un! Ama nasepnate miteʼ lakah gen un! 
Psalms9:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi thahna a hua pa in amaute phawk a, a thuak miteʼ awging amah in mangngilh lo hi." 
Psalms9:13 Ka tungah hong dik in, Topa! Sihna pan hong hon khia pa aw, kei hong mudahteʼ hangin keima gim thuaknate hong en inla," 
Psalms9:14 nangmah a hong kiphatnate phawk kikkik inla, na hong hotkhiatna hangin Jerusalem khua sungah ka nuamna ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms9:15 Amauʼ bawl sa gum sung mahah minamte kia suk uh a, a ngenthang siahna uh ah amauʼ khe mah a awk hi." 
Psalms9:16 Topa in thu hong khenin migilote amauʼ nasepna mahah awksakna tawh amah hong kilang hi. 
Psalms9:17 Pasian a mangngilh minam khempeuh sung panin migilote, Leinuai ah pai ding uh hi." 
Psalms9:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte kimangngilh den lo dinga, mizawngteʼ lametna bei paisuak lo ding hi." 
Psalms9:19 Tho in, Topa! Mi kizosak keʼn; na mai ah minamte sam inla, amauteʼ tungah thu khen in!" 
Psalms9:20 Amaute lausak in, Topa! Mi ahih lelna uh minamte theisak in!" 
Psalms10:1 Topa aw, bang hangin gamla din na hi hiam? Haksat hunin bang hangin nang bucip khong na hi hiam?" 
Psalms10:2 Migilote in kiphatsakna tawh mizawngte uuk delh uh hi. Amau ngaihsut vaihawmna mahah amaute awksak in. 
Psalms10:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilo in a lungsim deihna kisaktheih pih a, ngahna dingah a huaiham pa in Topa phuisamin a taisan hi." 
Psalms10:4 Migilo in kiphatsakna lungsim nei a, Topa zong lo hi. Ama ngaihsutna khempeuh ah, “Pasian om kei,” a ci hi." 
Psalms10:5 Ahihna khempeuh ah a maa pai ngitnget hi. Na thukhennate khempeuh ama muhna in a bat zawh lohin sang mahmah a, a galte khempeuh ahihleh amah in nehpik san lel hi." 
Psalms10:6 A lungsim sungah, “Kiliing ngei kei ning; khang tawntungin kamsiatna tuak kei ning,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Psalms10:7 Ama kampaute pen hamsia, khemna le netniamna tawh kidim a, siatna le man lohna bekbek thugenin a nei tawntung hi." 
Psalms10:8 Khuaneute sungah mi a buksimin tu a, munbu kawmah mawhnei lote a that hi. Ama mit in mi tuahsiate ensim a," 
Psalms10:9 humpinelkai in a kuahawm sung pan a buk bangin amah in buksimin, mizawngte a man dingin buk a, a ngenthang sungah mizawngte kai-in a man hi." 
Psalms10:10 A thatang hat thu tawh mi tuahsia mi sucipin a puk suksak hi. 
Psalms10:11 Ama lungsim sungah, “Hih thute pen Pasian in mangngilh hi; a mai seel hi, en lo ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Psalms10:12 Tho in, Topa! Pasian aw, na tha hong san inla, a thuakte mangngilh kei in." 
Psalms10:13 Bang hangin migilo in Pasian simmawh a, a lungsim sungah, “Hong thei kei naʼn teh,” ci ahi hiam?" 
Psalms10:14 Nangmah in na mu hi. Na huh theih nadingin haksatna le gimna a thuakte na ciamteh hi. A tuahsia mi in nangma tungah ama pumpi hong ap a, pa nei lote a huhpa na hi hi." 
Psalms10:15 Giloin siatna a bawlteʼ khut kuaitan gawp inla, siatna a bawl zo nawn lo dingin gim pia in." 
Psalms10:16 Topa, a tawntungin kumpi hi a, ama leitang panin minam dangte bei mang ding hi." 
Psalms10:17 Topa aw, lungnemteʼ deihna na ngai ding hi. A lungsim uh na hatsak dinga, na bil na ngat ding hi." 
Psalms10:18 Pa nei lote le netniamna a thuakte tungah nang na thutang a, leitung mite in launa tuak kha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms11:1 Keʼn Topa ka bel hi. Bang hangin ka tungah, “Vasa leeng bangin mual tungah tai in;" 
Psalms11:2 bang hang hiam cih leh, en in, migilote in khuamial sung panin lungsim thutangte a kap dingin a thalkhau uh ah thaltang bulhin a thal uh a keek uh hi." 
Psalms11:3 Bulpite kisusia khin leh midikte in bang cih thei nawn ding hiam?” nong ci thei diam? 
Psalms11:4 Topa a biakinn siangtho sungah om a, Topaʼ tokhom vantungah om hi. Amah in mihingte hong en a, mihingteʼ gamtatna khempeuh a thei tel hi." 
Psalms11:5 Topa in midikte le migilote en tel a, a ngongtat nuam mite a lungsim in mudah hi." 
Psalms11:6 Amah in migilote tungah mei-am le kaat zusak dinga, amauʼ ngah ding gimna huih sa mahmah hi ding hi." 
Psalms11:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa dik mahmah a, dik gamtatna a deih hi. Thutang mi in ama mai a mu ding hi." 
Psalms12:1 Topa aw, hong huh in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lak panin mi thumante maimang ta a, mipha khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Psalms12:2 Mi kim in a veengte kiangah zuau thu gen ciat a, phat khemna kam zol le lungsim nam nih tawh thu a gen uh hi." 
Psalms12:3 “I Leii tawh gualzo ding, i mukte eima neihsa; i to kua hiam?” a ci vial, kiphatsakna a piangsak leii, phat khemna muk khempeuh, Topa in at khia tahen." 
Psalms12:4  
Psalms12:5 Topa in, “Mizawngte a neihsa kihawk khia a, mi cimawhte thumin tau uh ahih ciangin tu-in dingin, amauʼ lunggulh, lungmuanna munah amaute ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms12:6 Topaʼ thuciamnate, a siangtho thuciamna hi a, meikhuk sungah sagih vei a kisiangsak ngun tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms12:7 Topa aw, kote hong dal inla, tu khang mite kiang panin kote hong kem in." 
Psalms12:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingte lakah siatna kipahtawi a, mun khempeuh ah migilote kidimin vak kawikawi uh hi." 
Psalms13:1 Topa aw, bang tanvei hi lai ding ahi hiam? Kei hong mangngilh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Bang tanvei kei kiang pan na maitang seel ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms13:2 Bang tanvei gimna thuakin, sun thapai-in ka lungsim dah ding ahi hiam? Bang tanvei kei tungah ka galte gualzo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms13:3 Topa ka Pasian aw, ngaihsun inla hong dawng in. Ihmu lum kha ding ka hih manin ka mitte hong vaksak in." 
Psalms13:4 Ka galte in, “Ama tungah gualzo khin ung,” ci kha ding hi. Kei ka liin manin ka galte nuam kha ding hi." 
Psalms13:5 Ahih hangin na itna kip ka muang a, nong hotkhiatna hangin ka lungdam ding hi." 
Psalms13:6 Nong hehpihna kicing ahih manin, Topa, la kong sak ding hi." 
Psalms14:1 Mihaite in a lungsim sung uh ah, “Pasian om lo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Amaute sia uh a, kihhuai gamtat uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms14:2 A pil gamtat, Pasian a zong a om uh hiam, cih a theih nadingin Topa in vantung panin mihingte hong en suk hi." 
Psalms14:3 Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un puk khin uh hi. A kibangin sia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat zong om lo hi." 
Psalms14:4 Topaʼ tungah thu a ngen lo, annek bangin ka mite a ne tum, siatna a bawlte in thutheihna nei lo ahi hiam?" 
Psalms14:5 Launa lianpi sungah amaute om ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in midikte ompih hi. 
Psalms14:6 Mizawngteʼ geelna susia nuam uh a, ahih hangin Topa pen mizawngteʼ belh ahi hi." 
Psalms14:7 Israel-te ading hotkhiatna Zion panin hong tun nading thu ka ngenngen hi. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi." 
Psalms15:1 Topa aw, na biakinn sungah kua om ding ahi hiam? Na mual siangtho tungah kua teeng ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms15:2 Paubaang loin gamta-in, a manin na sem a, lungsim tak a gen mi," 
Psalms15:3 mi gensia loin, a lawmte tungah siatna bawl lo a, a veengte a mawhsak lo mi," 
Psalms15:4 migilote thusim lo a, ahi zongin Topa a zahtakte a pahtawi mi, ama nat nading nangawn ah a ciampel lo mi," 
Psalms15:5 ama sum a meetin a kha lo, thutang mite a langpan lo, golhguk a la lo mite teeng ding uh hi. Hih bangin a gamtate pen liing ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms16:1 Pasian aw, nang hong bel ka hih manin keimah hong kem in." 
Psalms16:2 Topa tungah, “Nang, ka Topa na hi hi; nang tawh loin hoihna ka nei kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms16:3 Leitungah a om mi siangthote ahihleh, amaute nampi hi a, amaute sungah ka lungkimna teng om hi." 
Psalms16:4 Pasian dang a teelte in amauʼ dahna khangsak hi. Amauʼ si theh biaknate keʼn bawl pih loin, amauʼ pasian-te ka biakpih kei ding hi." 
Psalms16:5 Topa pen keima luah dinga ka teel sa, keima muanpi na hi a, keima ngah ding khempeuh na khut sungah om hi." 
Psalms16:6 Kei-aʼ pen mun nuam mahmah sung hong tu ahih manin gamhluah hoih nei ka hi hi. 
Psalms16:7 Ngaihsutna a hong lak Topa ka phat a, zanin zong ka lungsimah hong suak hi." 
Psalms16:8 Topa ka maingat tawntung a, ka tak lamah amah om ahih manin ka kiliing kei ding hi." 
Psalms16:9 Tua ahih ciangin lungdamin ka kipak a, lungmuangin ka om hi." 
Psalms16:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Leinuai nong zuansak kei a, na mihoih pa Leihawmpi na musak kei hi." 
Psalms16:11 Nangmah in nuntakna lampi keimah nong lak hi. Nangma omna munah lungdamna lianpi om a, nangma tak lamah nop tawntungnate a om hi." 
Psalms17:1 Topa aw, thuman ka hong ngetna hong za inla, ka otna hong ngai in! Lungsim takpi tawh ka hong thungetna hong ngai in!" 
Psalms17:2 Thuman mu na hih manin ka dikna hong kilangsak in. 
Psalms17:3 Keima lungsim hong sin inla, zan hun sungin ka kiangah hong hawh inla, keimah hong ze-et lecin, ka sungah gitlohna na mu kei ding hi. Ka kampau-in zong bangmah ka khial kei hi." 
Psalms17:4 Gamtatna thu ah ci leng, nangma thupiaknate ka zui a, mi ngongtatteʼ gamtat ziate ka pelh hi." 
Psalms17:5 Nangma lampi zui-in ka pai a, na lam ka pial ngei kei hi." 
Psalms17:6 Pasian aw, hong dawng ding na hih manin nang kong sam hi. Na bil hong ngat inla, ka thu hong za in." 
Psalms17:7 Amauʼ galteʼ kiang panin nang hong belte a honpa aw, na itna kip lamdang takin hong lak in." 
Psalms17:8 Kei a hong su gawp migilo, kei a hong umcih a kihtakhuai mahmah ka galte kiang panin mitnauta bangin hong kem inla, na kha liim ah hong seel in." 
Psalms17:9  
Psalms17:10 Amaute in hehpihna lungsim bangmah nei lo uh a, a kam uh tawh amaute kiphatsak pau uh hi." 
Psalms17:11 Amaute in kei hong sulzuih uh a, tu-in kei hong umcihin, keimah leilak den nadingin a hong en uh hi." 
Psalms17:12 Amaute pen a balnen nuam humpinelkai tawh kibang uh a, humpinelkai khanglai sabuk tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms17:13 Topa aw, tho in! Amaute mai phut inla, thal paih in! Topa aw, a deih khempeuh uh hih leitungah a nei migilote kiang panin na khut le na namsau tawh kei hong hon khia in. Amau adingin na koihcing gimnate thuaksak inla, a tate un zong a cingvalin thuak uh henla, a naungekte uh ading nangawn nusiat lai ta uh hen." 
Psalms17:14  
Psalms17:15 Kei ka hih leh, thumanna tawh na maitang ka en dinga, ka khanlawh ciangin nangma mel muhna tawh ka lungkim ding hi." 
Psalms18:1 Ka thahatna ahi Topa aw, nangmah ka hong it hi." 
Psalms18:2 Topa pen keima suangpi, ka munkip muanhuai, kei a hong hon khia pa, ka Pasian, ka suangpi, ka belh pa, ka lum, ka kihotkhiatna ki, ka munkip ahi hi." 
Psalms18:3 A phat taak Topa ka sam a, ka galte kiang panin kei hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms18:4 Sihna khaute in hong gakcip a, sihna tuihualte in kei hong nawk hi." 
Psalms18:5 Leinuai sihna khaute in kei hong kancip a, sihna thangte in kei hong dawntuah hi." 
Psalms18:6 Ka gimna ah Topa ka sam a, ka Pasianʼ tungah huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Amah in a biakinnpi panin ka aw hong za a, amah ka kohna aw in ama bilte va ban to hi." 
Psalms18:7 Ama hehna hangin leitung kipumpei-in kivei a, mual bulpite zong kisingin liing damdam hi." 
Psalms18:8 Ama nakvangte panin meikhu pusuak hi. Ama kam panin mei husia pusuak a, ama tung panin mei-am san kuang khia hi." 
Psalms18:9 Amah in vanpi niamsakin hong kum suk a, ama khe nuai ah meii vom sahpi a om hi." 
Psalms18:10 Kherub khat tungah amah tuangin hong leeng a, huih khate tungah manlang takin hong leeng hi." 
Psalms18:11 A kimkot ah a ki-um nadingin khuamial bawl a, a tung kikhuh nadingin meii sahpi le tui tawh a zingsak hi." 
Psalms18:12 Ama mai-a khuaphia sung panin gialpi le mei-amte in ama meii sahpite a phu let hi. 
Psalms18:13 Topa zong vantungah awng a, Sangpen pa in gialpi le mei-am ahi ama aw hong gingsak hi." 
Psalms18:14 Amah in a thaltangte lawn a, a galte kithehthangsak hi. Khuaphialep phiasak a, a galte a susia hi." 
Psalms18:15 Topa aw, nangma mawhsakna na awging hangin tuipi taw kidawk a, lei bulpite a guakin om hi." 
Psalms18:16 Amah in a sangna panin a khut tawh zamin kei hong la a, tui thukpi panin keimah hong kai khia hi." 
Psalms18:17 Ka galhat pa kiang pan le hong mudahte kiang panin kei hong hon khia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kei adingin amaute hat lua uh hi. 
Psalms18:18 Amaute in ka kamsiat hunin kei hong nehthawh uh hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi. 
Psalms18:19 Amah in mun tanzau khat ah kei hong paikhiatpih a, ka tungah lungkim ahih manin a hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms18:20 Topa in ka thumanna tawh kizui-in noptuamna hong pia a, ka sianthona tawh kizui-in hong dinkik hi." 
Psalms18:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ lampite ka tawn khin a, ka Pasianʼ kiang panin gitlohna tawh ka paikhia kei hi." 
Psalms18:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama biakna ngeina thukip omte khempeuh limtakin ka zui a, ama thukhamte ka paai khia kei hi." 
Psalms18:23 Ama mai ah kawkbaang het loin ka om a, kisuanna dingte panin kei ka kikem hi." 
Psalms18:24 Tua ahih manin Topa in ka thumanna le ama muhna ah ka sianthona tawh kizui-in kei hong dinkik khin hi. 
Psalms18:25 Thuman mi tungah nang na thuman a, kawkbaang lo mi tungah nang na dik tat hi." 
Psalms18:26 A siangtho mi tungah na siangtho gamtat a, thukawi mite na galbawl hi." 
Psalms18:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh miniamte na hon khia a, ahih hangin mi kiphasakte na niamsak hi." 
Psalms18:28 Nangmah in keima mei nong vaksak a, Topa ka Pasian in ka khuamial na vaksak hi." 
Psalms18:29 Nangma hangin galkap hon khat ka su gawp zo a, ka Pasian hangin khuakulh khat ka kan zo hi." 
Psalms18:30 Hih Pasian - a thu kicing a, Topaʼ kamciamna a manna kilang hi. Amah a belte khempeuh adingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
Psalms18:31 Topa longal, Pasian kua hiam? Pasian longal, suangpi kua hiam?" 
Psalms18:32 Keima tungah thahatna a hong guan Pasian, ka lampi lungmuan nadingin a bawl pa ahi hi." 
Psalms18:33 Amah in sangaipi khe bangin keima khe hong bawlsak a, mual sang dawnah ka khe hong kipsak hi." 
Psalms18:34 Galsim siam nadingin ka khutte hong hilh a, keima khut in sumngo thal nangawn a keek zo hi." 
Psalms18:35 Na hotkhiatna lum kei hong pia khinin, na taklam khut in kei hong phong a, nangma hong huhna in keimah hong liansak hi." 
Psalms18:36 Ka kalsuan nading mun tanzau nong pia a, ka khe taal lo hi." 
Psalms18:37 Ka galte delhin ka pha a, a vekpi-un a kisiat khit matengun ka ciahkik kei hi." 
Psalms18:38 Amaute khempeuh a thawhkik zawh loh nadingun ka sun let gawp a, ka khe nuai ah a puk uh hi." 
Psalms18:39 Bang hang hiam cih leh galdo nadingin keimah tha nong guan a, keimah a hong dote ka nuai ah na nengniam hi." 
Psalms18:40 Ka galte na nungkiksak a, kei hong mudahte ka susia hi." 
Psalms18:41 Huh nading ngenin amaute kikoko uh a, ahih hangin a hon ding kuamah om lo hi. Amaute in Topaʼ tungah ko uh a, ahih hangin amah in dawng lo hi." 
Psalms18:42 Huihpi mai ah leivui bangin amaute ka satvui a, kongzing buante bangin amaute ka lawn khia hi." 
Psalms18:43 A lehdo mite kiang panin nangmah in kei na hong hon khia a, minamteʼ lutangin kei na hong bawl a, ka theih ngei loh mite in keima na hong sem uh hi." 
Psalms18:44 Ka thu a zak phetun amaute in hong mang pah uh a, gamdang mite in kei hong mai-et uh hi." 
Psalms18:45 Gamdang mite lungkia uh a, a phualkip panun a liing sa-in hong paikhia uh hi." 
Psalms18:46 Topa hing hi. Keima suangpi in thupha ngah henla, ka kihotkhiatna Pasian," 
Psalms18:47 hong thuhkiksakin keima nuai ah mite a hong zawhsak Pasian," 
Psalms18:48 ka galte kiang panin keimah a hong hon khia pa minthangin vanglian tahen. Ka langte tungah keimah nong liansak a, mi ngongtatte kiang panin na hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms18:49 Topa aw, hih thu hangin minam dangte lakah nang kong phat dinga, nangma minphatna la ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms18:50 Zawhna lianpi ama kumpipa tungah pia a, a sathau nilh pa David le a suan a khakte tungah a tawntungin itna kip a lak hi." 
Psalms19:1 Vantung in Pasianʼ minthanna gen a, vanpi in ama nasepna taangko hi." 
Psalms19:2 Nisimin thu gengen a, zan simin theihtelna pulaklak hi." 
Psalms19:3 Pauna le kammal om lo a, amauʼ aw kiza lo hi." 
Psalms19:4 Ahih hangin a aw uh leitung khempeuh ah kizel a, a kammal uh leimong dongah a tung hi. Amauʼ sungah ni ading omna khat bawl khin a," 
Psalms19:5 a inn sung pan a hong pusuak zipi tangval tawh ahi zongin, lungtaii takin tai ding a kipan mi thahat khat tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi." 
Psalms19:6 Ama suahna van mong pan hi a, mong khat dongin pai a, ama satna panin a kiliah thei bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms19:7 Topaʼ thu kicing a, nuntakna a thaksuaksak hi. Topaʼ teci panna hi takpi a, mipil lote pilsak hi." 
Psalms19:8 Topaʼ thuhilhte man a, lungsim nuamsak hi. Topaʼ thupiakna siang a, mitte vaksak hi." 
Psalms19:9 Topa a kizahtakna siang a, kip tawntung hi. Topaʼ ngeina kipte thuman a, a vekin kituakin man kim hi." 
Psalms19:10 Kham sangin ahi zongin kham hoih pen sang ahi zongin tuate deihhuai zaw a, khuaizu le khuailuzu taakte sangin zong khum zaw lai hi." 
Psalms19:11 Tua tham loin tuateʼ hangin a nasem pa in thuphawkna ngah a, tuate zuihna ah noptuamna lian a om hi." 
Psalms19:12 Ahih hangin kua in ama khialhnate mu khia thei tawm ahi hiam? Theih loh manin khialhna panin kei hong siangsak hi. 
Psalms19:13 Mawh kaltangnate panin zong na nasem pa hong kem inla, tuate keima tungah hong uksak kei in! Tua ciangin kei ka kawkbaang kei dinga, mawhna liante panin ka siang ding hi." 
Psalms19:14 Topa, ka belh suangpi le keimah hong tan khia pa aw, ka kammal le ka lungsim ngaihsutnate nangma muhna ah a sanhuai suaksak ta in!" 
Psalms20:1 Gimna na thuak ciangin Topa in nang hong en henla, Jakobʼ Pasian in nangmah hong dal tahen!" 
Psalms20:2 Siangtho mun panin huhna nang hong puak henla, Zion panin nang hong panpih tahen!" 
Psalms20:3 Na biakpiaknate khempeuh amah in hong phawk henla, na meihal biakpiakna hong sang tahen!" 
Psalms20:4 Na lungsimʼ deihna amah in hong pia henla, na geelna khempeuh hong tangtungsak tahen!" 
Psalms20:5 Na gualzawhna ah eite lungdamin awngin, i Pasianʼ min tawh i lante khai ni!" 
Psalms20:6 Topa in a sathau nilh pa a huh ding tu-in ka thei ta a, ama vantung siangtho panin amah dawng dinga, a vangliatna tawh amah gualzosak ding hi." 
Psalms20:7 Mi pawl khat in leengte kisaktheih pih a, mi pawl khat in sakolte kisaktheih pih hi. Ahih hangin eite in Topa i Pasianʼ min bek i kisaktheih pih hi." 
Psalms20:8 Amaute kinawmsawmin puk gawp ding uh a, ahih hangin eite tho-in i ding tang ding hi." 
Psalms20:9 Topa aw, kumpipa tungah gualzawhna pia inla, kong sap ciangun hong dawng in." 
Psalms21:1 Topa aw, na hatna hangin kumpipa lungdam a, na huhna hangin amah nak nuam mahmah hi." 
Psalms21:2 Ama lungsim deihna teng nangmah in na pia khin a, ama hong ngette na khaktan kei hi." 
Psalms21:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh thupha hoihte tawh amah na dawntuah a, ama lu tungah kham siang lukhu na khusak hi." 
Psalms21:4 Nangma tung panin amah in nuntakna hong ngen a, ama tungah nuntak sau na pia hi." 
Psalms21:5 Nangma huhna hangin ama minthanna lian a, hoihna le minliatna ama tungah na pia hi." 
Psalms21:6 Nangmah in a tawntungin thupha ngah pen dingin amah na bawl a, nangma ompihna hangin lungdamna tawh amah na kipaaksak hi." 
Psalms21:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Topa muang a, Sangpen paʼ itna kip hangin amah a kiliing kei ding hi." 
Psalms21:8 Na khut in na galte khempeuh su gawp dinga, na khut taklam in nang hong mudahte su gawp ding hi." 
Psalms21:9 Na kilat ciangin meiphual kuang bangin amaute na hih ding hi. Topa in hehna tawh amaute nawmvalh dinga, meikuang in amaute kaang tum ding hi." 
Psalms21:10 Leitung panin a suan a khakte, miʼ tateʼ lak panin amauʼ tate na susia ding hi." 
Psalms21:11 Nangma langah siat nading vaihawmin, gitlohna a bawl uh hangin tangtung lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms21:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute na taisak dinga, na thal tawh a maitang uh na ngim ding hi." 
Psalms21:13 Topa aw, na hatna hangin nang hong kipahtawi tahen! Nangma vangliatna la sa-in kong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:1 Ka Pasian, ka Pasian aw, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam? Nong huh nading ka hong thumna panin bang hangin gamla om na hi hiam?" 
Psalms22:2 Ka Pasian aw, sunin kong kiko a, ahi zongin nong dawng kei hi. Zanin zong ka kiko a, ahi zongin lungsim nopna ka mu thei tuan kei hi." 
Psalms22:3 Ahih hangin nang na siangtho a, Israel-teʼ pahtawi-in na tu hi." 
Psalms22:4 Ka pate un nangmah hong muang uh hi. Amaute in hong muang uh a, nangmah in amaute na hon khia hi." 
Psalms22:5 Nangma tungah amaute in hong ko uh a, amaute kihon hi. Nangmah hong muang uh a, guaksuak lo uh hi." 
Psalms22:6 Ahih hangin kei pen lungno khat bang lel ka hi a, mi ka bang kei hi. Miteʼ ko gawpgawp, miteʼ simmawh ka hi hi." 
Psalms22:7 Hong mu mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko-in, hong mukpik san uh a, a lu uh hong pei san hi." 
Psalms22:8 “ Topaʼ tungah amah in ama thu ap hi. Amah kihonkhiasak un; amah deih ahih manin hon khia tahen!” hong cih san uh hi. 
Psalms22:9 Ahih hangin nang pen gil sung panin kei a hong suaksak pa na hi a, ka nuʼ ang sungah a muanhuai-in keimah na hong kem hi." 
Psalms22:10 Ka suah tung a kipan nangma tungah kong tung a, ka nu in hong paii lai a kipan keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms22:11 Haksatna nai ahih manin kei tawh kigamla om kei in; kei a hong huh ding kuamah dang om lo hi. 
Psalms22:12 Bawngtal tampi tak in kei hong umcih uh a, Bashan gam bawngtal hatte in kei hong umcih uh hi." 
Psalms22:13 Humpinelkai hawk, a sa bawh nuam bangin amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh hi." 
Psalms22:14 Tui buakkhiat bangin kei hong kibua khia a, ka guh ka taang khempeuh kilawi mangkhin hi. Ka lungtang khuainun bang a, ka awm sungah tui suak hi." 
Psalms22:15 Ka thahatna, leibeel phel bangin keu a, ka leii zong toncip ta hi. Nangmah in leivui sungah kei na hong koih hi." 
Psalms22:16 Ka kiimah uite om a, siatna bawl mi hon khat in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ka khut ka khete hong sun let zo uh hi." 
Psalms22:17 Ka guh khempeuh kimu thei hi. Amaute in hong sal gega uh hi. 
Psalms22:18 Amaute in ka puante hawm uh a, ka puan a hawm nadingun lai ai a san uh hi." 
Psalms22:19 Ahih hangin Topa aw, gamla om kei in. Keimah a hong huhpa aw, a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms22:20 Namsau panin keimah hong hon inla, uiteʼ kiang panin ka nuntakna hong hon in." 
Psalms22:21 Humpinelkai kam panin keimah hong hon inla, gamsialteʼ ki panin a cimawh keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms22:22 Ka u ka naute tungah nangma min ka gen dinga, mihon kikhopna laizang ah nangmah kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms22:23 Topa a zahtak mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Jakobʼ suan mi khempeuh aw, amah min thangsak un. Israel mi khempeuh aw, amah lamdang sa un." 
Psalms22:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a thuak miʼ gimna simmawh bawl lo a, zong kihbawl lo hi. Ama kiang pan a mai seel lo a, ama tungah a koh ciangin, amah in a za hi." 
Psalms22:25 Mihonpite lakah nang kong phat nading na piangsak a, nang a hong zahtakteʼ mai ah ka thuciamna kong pia ding hi." 
Psalms22:26 Gimna a thuakte in kham takin ne ding uh a, amah a zongte in Topa phat ding uh hi. A lungsim uh nuam tawntung tahen!" 
Psalms22:27 Leitung mi khempeuh in phawkin Topaʼ lamah kihei ding uh a, minam khempeuh in ama mai ah bia ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh ukna pen Topa aʼ hi a, minamte tungah amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms22:29 Hi hi, a kiphasak mi khempeuh ama mai ah kun suk ding uh a, a si thei mihing khempeuh ama mai ah kun ding uh hi." 
Psalms22:30 A hong khangkik mite in ama na sem ding uh hi. Mite in a hong piang lai ding mite tungah Topaʼ thu gen ding uh a," 
Psalms22:31 a suak nai lo mite tungah ama sep sa, hotkhiatna thu gen ding uh hi." 
Psalms23:1 Topa pen tuucin bangin hong cing hi a, kisapna teng kicing ta hi." 
Psalms23:2 Lo nona ah hong lumsak a, tuidam kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Psalms23:3 Thahatna thak kei hong guan hi. A hong ciam sa mah bangin ah lampi man ah kei hong kha hi. 
Psalms23:4 Topa aw, kei hong ompih na hih manin khuamial thukpi ka nawk hangin ka lau kei hi. Na molhtum le na ciangkhut in kei hong hu hi." 
Psalms23:5 Keima galteʼ muhna munah an nong lui hi. Thupi takin nong pahtawi a, keima hai zong dim let ta hi." 
Psalms23:6 Na hoihna le nong itna in ka khantawnin a hong zuih ding tel takin ah ka thei ta a, a tawntungin na inn sungah ka om ding hi." 
Psalms24:1 Leitung le a tunga omte, leitung le a tunga teengte Topa -aʼ ahi hi." 
Psalms24:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in tuipite sungah a bul phut a, tui tungah a kipsak hi." 
Psalms24:3 Topaʼ mual tungah kuate kah to ding ahi hiam? Ama mun siangtho ah kuate ding ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms24:4 Gamtat siangtho le lungsim siangtho a nei, a man lo thu ah a nuntakna pia loin, khemna tawh a kiciam lo mite ahi hi." 
Psalms24:5 Tua bang mite in Topaʼ tung panin thupha ngah ding uh a, amaute a hon khia Pasianʼ kiang panin diksakna ngah ding uh hi." 
Psalms24:6 Tua bang mite pen, amah a zong, Jakobʼ Pasianʼ mai a zong minam ahi hi." 
Psalms24:7 Minthang Kumpipa hong tum theih nadingin, kulh kongpite lian hon unla, tanglai kongkhakte gol hon un." 
Psalms24:8 Minthang Kumpipa kua ahi hiam? Hatin a vanglian Topa, galhat Topa ahi hi." 
Psalms24:9 Minthang Kumpipa hong tum theih nadingin, kulh kongpite lian hon unla, tanglai kongkhakte gol hon un." 
Psalms24:10 Hih a minthang Kumpipa kua ahi hiam? Vanglian Topa, minthang Kumpipa ahi hi." 
Psalms25:1 Topa aw, nangma tungah thu kong ngen hi." 
Psalms25:2 Ka Pasian aw, nangmah kong muang hi. Hong zahhuaisak kei in. Keima tungah ka galte gualzo-in lungdamsak kei in." 
Psalms25:3 Nangmah a hong ngakte kuamah zahhuaisak kei in. Thu khual loin a zuautheite zahhuaisak in. 
Psalms25:4 Topa aw, na zia na tong a thei-in hong bawl inla, na lampite hong hilh in." 
Psalms25:5 Na thuman sungah kei hong paipih inla, lam hong hilh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong hon Pasian na hi a, nang kong muang tawntung hi." 
Psalms25:6 Topa aw, tanglai pek a kipan a om sa ahih manin, na hehpihna le na itna kip hong phawkkik in." 
Psalms25:7 Topa aw, ka khangno lai-a ka mawhna le ka khialhnate ciamteh kei inla, na hoihna na ngaihsutna le na itna kip tawh kizui-in kei hong phawk in!" 
Psalms25:8 Topa hoihin thutang hi. Tua ahih manin mimawhte lam a hilh hi. 
Psalms25:9 Amah in lungsim kiniamkhiatte a man ah paipihin a zia a tong a hilh hi. 
Psalms25:10 Ama thuciamna le a thupiak a zuite adingin Topaʼ lampi pen itna kip le cihtakna ahi hi. 
Psalms25:11 Topa aw, ka mawhna lian ahih manin, nangma min phat nadingin keima mawhna hong maisak in." 
Psalms25:12 Topa a zahtak mi kua ahi hiam? Ama lampi zuih ding Pasianʼ hilhna a ngah mi ahi hi. 
Psalms25:13 Amah nuamsa tawntung dinga, a tate in leitang nei ding uh hi." 
Psalms25:14 Topa tawh kilawmtatna pen amah a zahtakte ading hi a, a thuciamna amau tungah kitheithangsak hi." 
Psalms25:15 Topaʼ lam ka en tawntung hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ngenthang panin ka khete hong sut khia ding hi. 
Psalms25:16 Kei lamah nang hong kihei-in, kei hong hehpih in; bang hang hiam cih leh kei guak bek hi-in gimna ka thuak hi." 
Psalms25:17 Ka lungsim natnate khempeuh hong damsak inla, ka gimnate khempeuh panin hong paikhiatpih in." 
Psalms25:18 Ka gimna le ka thuaknate hong ngaihsun inla, ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak in." 
Psalms25:19 Ka galte bangzah takin a tamna le kei hong muhdah luatnate hong ngaihsun in. 
Psalms25:20 Kei hong cing inla, hong hon khia in. Nangmah hong bel ka hih manin kei hong maizumsak kei in." 
Psalms25:21 Nang hong muang ka hih manin, kicinna le thutanna in kei hong kem tahen." 
Psalms25:22 Pasian aw, amauʼ haksatna khempeuh panin na mi Israel-te hon khia ta in." 
Psalms26:1 Topa aw, a hoihin gamta-in Topa hong muang ka hih manin, ka thutanna hong lak in." 
Psalms26:2 Topa aw, hong ze-et inla hong sin in. Ka lungsim le ka ngaihsutna hong en tel in." 
Psalms26:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in lam hong lak a, nangma tungah citakin ka gamta hi." 
Psalms26:4 Mikhialte tawh tukhawm loin, thusim neite tawh ka kipawl kei hi." 
Psalms26:5 Siatna a bawl mite ka mudah a, migilote tawh ka tukhawm kei hi." 
Psalms26:6 Topa aw, mawh baan lohna ka lahna-in ka khutte ka sil a, biakna pia-in na biakna tau kiim ah ka pai hi." 
Psalms26:7 Lungdamkohna la a gingin sa-in, nangma nasep a lamdangte ka gen kawm hi." 
Psalms26:8 Topa aw, nangma inn-a ten ding le na minthang a omna munah om ding ka ut hi." 
Psalms26:9 Mimawhte, mi that nuamte, siatna a bawl mite, le golhguk a la nuamte tawh kei hong susia khawm kei in." 
Psalms26:10  
Psalms26:11 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh, ka hoih gamtat hi. Hong hehpih inla, kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms26:12 Leizang munah ka ding hi. Mihon tampi lakah Topa ka phat ding hi. 
Psalms27:1 Topa, ka khuavak le hong honpa ahi hi. Kua kihta ding ka hi hiam? Topa, kei adingin mun muanhuai ahi hi. Bang lau pih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms27:2 Hong langpangte le ka galte ahi, siatna bawlte in hong do a, kei nektum hong sawm ciangun, amaute kisukha-in puk ding uh hi." 
Psalms27:3 Mi hon khat in keimah hong langpangin phual a sat uh hangin, ka lungsim lau lo ding hi. Keimah hong langpangin gal hong kuan hangin tua nangawn ah ka lungmuang ding hi." 
Psalms27:4 Topaʼ tung panin na khat ka ngen khin a, tua ngenin ka zon ding pen: Topaʼ inn sungah ka khan tawntungin om ding, Topaʼ hoihna et ding le ama biakinn sungah thu dot dingte ahi hi." 
Psalms27:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh haksat hun ciangin amah in a buk sungah kei hong seel ding hi. A puanbuk khuhna nuai ah kei hong seel dinga, a sangna suang tungah kei hong koih ding hi." 
Psalms27:6 Tu-in ka kimkot ah a om ka galte tungah ka gualzo ding hi. Lungdamin kikona tawh ama buk sungah biakna ka pia dinga, la ka sa ding hi. Topa tungah la ngaih ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms27:7 Topa aw, ka otna aw hong za inla, kei hong hehpihin hong dawng in!" 
Psalms27:8 “Ka mai hong zong in,” na hong ci khinzo hi. Keimah in nangma tungah, “ Topa aw, nangma mai kong zong hi,” ka hong ci hi." 
Psalms27:9 Kei kiang panin na maitang seel kei in. Hehpihna tawh na nasem pa hong hawl khia kei in; kei hong nei pa na hi hi. Hong paai khia kei inla, hong nusia kei in, kei hong hon khia Pasian aw." 
Psalms27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nu le ka pa in hong nusiat hangin Topa in kei hong kem ding hi. 
Psalms27:11 Topa aw, na lampi hong hilh inla, ka galteʼ hangin lam phei ah kei hong kha in." 
Psalms27:12 Ka langteʼ deihna bangin kei hong nusia kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh teci man lote ka langah pang khin a, amaute in zuau genin kei hong tawng niloh uh hi." 
Psalms27:13 A hingteʼ gam sungah Topaʼ hoihna a mu dingin kei ka ki-um hi. 
Psalms27:14 Topa muang in. Thakhauh inla, na lungsim hangsakin, Topa muang in." 
Psalms28:1 Topa aw, awngin nang kong sam hi. Ka belh suangpi aw, keima thu ah hong bilngong kei in. Tua bangin kei tungah hong dai dide lecin, Leihawm sunga a pai sukte tawh a kibang ka suak ding hi." 
Psalms28:2 Siangtho pen mun lamah ka khutte hong laam to a, nangma kiangah huhna kong nget mah bangin kong thumna aw hong za in." 
Psalms28:3 Amauʼ lungsim sungah siatna a om hi napi a veengte tawh kilemna thu a gen khem, siatna bawlte, migilote tawh kei hong la khia khawm kei in." 
Psalms28:4 Amauʼ sepna le a gamtat siatnate uh bangin amaute thukkik in. Amauʼ sepna tawh a kizui-in amaute tungah thuk inla, amauʼ ngah ding a kilawm thaman pia in." 
Psalms28:5 Amaute in Topaʼ nasepnate thupi ngaihsut lo ahih manun, amah in amaute susia-in a donkik nawn kei ding hi." 
Psalms28:6 Ka thumna aw hong za ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms28:7 Topa, ka hatna le ka lum hi a, amah ka muang hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong kihuh a, lungdamin ka diang a, ka lasakna tawh ama tungah lungdamna ka ko hi." 
Psalms28:8 Topa, ama miteʼ hatna hi a, amah pen a sathau nilh paʼ bukna le a hon khia pa ahi hi." 
Psalms28:9 Na mite hon inla, na luahte thupha pia in. Amau a cing pa hi inla, a tawntungin amaute huh in." 
Psalms29:1 Topa -aʼ ci un, van mite aw; minthanna le hatna Topa -aʼ ci un." 
Psalms29:2 Ama minthanna Topaʼ tungah pia unla, a siangtho kizepna tawh Topa bia un." 
Psalms29:3 Topaʼ awging tuipite tungah kiza hi. A minthang Pasianʼ aw ging damdam a, tui tampite tungah Topaʼ aw kiza hi." 
Psalms29:4 Topaʼ awging vanglian a, Topaʼ awging, liatna tawh kidim hi." 
Psalms29:5 Topaʼ awging in taamtak singte kitansak a, Topaʼ awging in Lebanon mual taamtak singte a kuaitan hi." 
Psalms29:6 Lebanon mual le Sirion mualte bawng no le gamsial no bangin amah in a diangsak hi. 
Psalms29:7 Topaʼ awging in meikuang taang khiasak hi. 
Psalms29:8 Topaʼ awging in gamlak lok a, Topa in Kadesh gamlak lok hi." 
Psalms29:9 Topaʼ awging in singkungte heek gawp a, gammang tulak hawk khia-in a kolhsak hi. Ama biakinn sungah a vekpi-un awngin, “Pasianʼ min thang tahen,” a ci uh hi." 
Psalms29:10 Topa in tui thukpite uk a, a tawntung kumpi hihna tawh Topa a tu hi." 
Psalms29:11 Topa in ama mite tungah thahatna pia tahen. Topa in ama mite tungah nopsakna thupha pia tahen. 
Psalms30:1 Topa aw, nangmah hong phatin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei nong laam to khin a, ka tungah ka galte na lungdamsak kei hi." 
Psalms30:2 Topa ka Pasian aw, huhna a hong ngenin nang tungah kong awng a, kei na hong damsak khin hi." 
Psalms30:3 Topa aw, Leinuai panin kei nong paikhiatpih to khin a, Leihawm sungah a pai khin sate lak panin kei nong nungta kiksak hi." 
Psalms30:4 Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa tungah phatna la sa-in ama tungah lungdamna ko un." 
Psalms30:5 Ama hehna tomno sung bek hi a, ama hong deihsakna pen khang tawntung ading ahi hi. Zan hun sungteng kahna om kha mah dinga, ahih hangin zing khuavak tawh nuamna hong tung hi." 
Psalms30:6 Keimah in ahihleh, ka daupai laitakin, “Ka kiliing ngei kei ding hi,” ka ci kha hi." 
Psalms30:7 Topa aw, nong deihsakna tawh mual kip bangin kei nong phut khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in na maitang na seel a, kei ka khasia hi." 
Psalms30:8 Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko a, Topa tungah kong thum hi:" 
Psalms30:9 “Leihawm sungah pai sukin ka sihna ah bang meetna om ahi hiam? Leivui in nang hong phat ding ahi hiam? Na thumanna gen ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms30:10 Topa aw, hong za inla, kei hong hehpih in. Topa aw, keimah huhpa hong hi in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms30:11 Topa ka Pasian aw, nangma tungah lungdamna ka hong koh tawntung theih nading, ka lungsim in nang hong phat theih nading, a dai om mawk loh nadingin ka thumna le ka taunate lamna tawh nong heisak a, dahna lim ahi ka puanhampi hong suah khiatsakin nuamna na hong guan hi." 
Psalms30:12  
Psalms31:1 Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Hong maizumsak ngei kei inla, na thumanna tawh kei hong hon khia in!" 
Psalms31:2 Na bil hong ngat inla, hong hon pak in! Ka belh ding suangpi hong hi inla, kei hong dal ding munkip muanhuai hong hi in!" 
Psalms31:3 Nang pen ka suangpi le ka munkip muanhuai na hi hi. Nangma min ngaihsutna tawh kei hong kha-in lam hong lak inla," 
Psalms31:4 keima belh pa na hih manin hong kisiahna ngenthang panin kei hong la khia in. 
Psalms31:5 Nangma khut sungah keimah kong ki-ap hi. Topa, a thuman Pasian aw, keimah na hong hon ding hi." 
Psalms31:6 Mawkna milim a thupi ngaihsutte na mudah hi; ahih hangin keimah in Topa kong muang hi. 
Psalms31:7 Na itna kip hangin lungdamin ka kipak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thuakna mu khinin, ka kamsiatna ah na hong don khin hi." 
Psalms31:8 Galteʼ khut sungah kei na hong pia kei a, mun tanzau ah ka khe na dingsak hi." 
Psalms31:9 Topa aw, genthei ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Dahna hangin ka mit thuk a, ka lungsim le ka pumpi zong gim mahmah ta hi." 
Psalms31:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna dahna vive hi a, ka hunte khuisatna vive ahi hi. Ka gentheihna hangin ka tha kiam gawp ta a, ka guhte zong ngaam ta hi." 
Psalms31:11 Ka veengte khempeuhʼ nuihsat ka suak a, ka veengte tungah a cikzethuai ka hi a, ka meltheih khempeuhteʼ gimneih mi ka suak hi. Kong lak ah hong mute in kei hong peelin hong taisan uh hi." 
Psalms31:12 Misi bangin kei hong kiphawk nawn lo a, beel kitam khat tawh ka kibang lel ta hi." 
Psalms31:13 Ka galteʼ kihuauna ka za a, ka kiim ka pam ah launa om hi. Kei hong langpangin amaute in vaihawm khawm a, thah dingin kei hong sawm uh hi." 
Psalms31:14 Ahih hangin nang kong muang hi, Topa aw. Keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms31:15 Keima nuntakna nangma khut sungah om hi. Keima galte le kei a hong bawlsiateʼ khut sung panin kei hong hon khia in! 
Psalms31:16 Na nasem pa tungah na mai hong taangsak inla, na itna kip tawh kei hong hon in!" 
Psalms31:17 Topa aw, nangma tung panin huhna hong ngen ka hih manin kei hong maizumsak kei in. Migilote maizumsak inla, amaute a pau ding thei loin Leinuai ah paisak in." 
Psalms31:18 Thumanteʼ langah pang a, kihihsak pau-in, kiphatsakna le simmawhna tawh pau-in zuau thu a gen mite a pau thei loin omsak in." 
Psalms31:19 Nang hong zahtakte adingin na koih sa na hoihte, nang hong belte adingin miteʼ muhna ah na bawl, nangma hoihna kicing a, mi khempeuh in thei uh hi." 
Psalms31:20 Miteʼ sawm simna panin na omna huam sungah amaute na seel a, kitotna mun panin na buk sungah a muanhuai-in amaute na kem hi." 
Psalms31:21 Gal in khuapi a umcih bangin kei hong ki-umcih hun lai-in a itna kip a lamdangin kei tungah hong lak ahih manin Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms31:22 Lauthawngna tawh, “Nangma muhna panin a gamlapi ah kei hong not khia hi,” ka ci khin hi. Ahih hangin nang tungah huhna ka hong nget ciangin keima hong thumnate nangmah in na hong za hi." 
Psalms31:23 Ama mi siangtho khempeuh aw, Topa phat un! Pasian in thuman mite kem a, ahih hangin a kiphatsak gamtatte nakpi takin a thuk hi." 
Psalms31:24 Topa a ngak mi khempeuh aw, na tha uh khauhsak unla, na lungsim uh hangsak ta un!" 
Psalms32:1 Ama khialhna kimaisak a, ama mawhna a kiselcipsak mi, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms32:2 Topa in mawhna a khuksak loh mi, a lungsim sungah khemna a om lo mi, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms32:3 Ka mawhna ka pulak loh ciangin, sunthapai ka tautauna hangin ka pumpi a thaneem hi." 
Psalms32:4 Sun le zan tawntung gim nong piakna ka thuak a, khuakhal nisaʼ kat bangin ka thahatna a keucip hi." 
Psalms32:5 Keima khialhnate nangma tungah kong pulak a, ka mawhna ka im kei hi. “Ka khialhnate khempeuh Topaʼ tungah ka pulak ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka mawhna nin nong maisak hi." 
Psalms32:6 Tua ahih ciangin nang hong kimuh theih lai-in mihoih khempeuh, nang tungah thu kingensak in. Tua hileh tuikhang in amaute ban lo ding hi." 
Psalms32:7 Nang pen kei adingin ka bukna mun na hi a, haksatna pan kei hong kemin hotkhiatna kicing nong pia hi." 
Psalms32:8 Na pai nading lampi lakin kong hilh dinga, ka mit tawh hong enin thu kong hilh ding hi." 
Psalms32:9 A kamkaih tawh uk lohin a phamawh, thutheihna a nei lo, sakol le la bang kei in." 
Psalms32:10 Migilote in gimna tampi thuak uh a, Topa a muangte ahihleh itna kip in a hu hi." 
Psalms32:11 Thumante aw, Topa tungah lungdamin kipak un. Lungsim man mi khempeuh aw, lungdamin awng un!" 
Psalms33:1 No thuman mite aw, Topa tungah lungdam un! Pahtawina pen thutangte tawh kilawm kituak hi." 
Psalms33:2 Laiza khausai lasakna tawh Topa phat unla, harp zang sawm khausai lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms33:3 Ama tungah la thak sa unla, a gingpha mahmah in hoihtakin khausai tum un." 
Psalms33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa thutang a, ama hihna khempeuh thuman tawh a sem hi." 
Psalms33:5 Amah in thuman le thutang deih a, leitungah Topaʼ itna kip a kidim hi." 
Psalms33:6 Topaʼ kampauna tawh vantung piang a, a kam pan a husanna tawh vantung nate a piang hi." 
Psalms33:7 Amah in tuipi tuite thawl khat sunga thun bangin mun khat ah gawm a, tui thukpite tuibeem ah a koih hi." 
Psalms33:8 Leitung khempeuh in Topa zahtak uh henla, leitung a teengte khempeuh, amah lamdangsakna tawh ding ta uh hen!" 
Psalms33:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pau a, leitung hong piang hi; amah in thu pia a, na khempeuh hong om hi." 
Psalms33:10 Topa in minamteʼ thungaihsutna a mawkna suahin, miteʼ geelna a khaktan hi." 
Psalms33:11 Topaʼ thungaihsutna kip ngitnget a, ama lungsim ngaihsutna khang tawntungin a kip hi." 
Psalms33:12 Topa, Pasian-a a nei minam, ama luah dingin teelna a ngah minamte thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms33:13 Topa in vantung panin hong en suk a, mihing khempeuh a mu hi." 
Psalms33:14 A tutna mun panin amah hong dak khia-in, leitung mite a en hi." 
Psalms33:15 Amauʼ lungsim a bawlpa in amauteʼ gamtatnate en gige hi. 
Psalms33:16 Kumpi khat a galkap tampite in suaktasak zo lo a, galkap hang pa ama hatna tawh kihon khia zo lo hi." 
Psalms33:17 Sakol galkapte pen gualzawh nadingin a mawkna lametna hi a, amauʼ hatna tawh hon zo lo hi." 
Psalms33:18 Amah a zahtakte, a itna kip lametna a neite, sihna panin hon khia-in, kialpi hun sungin amaute a hin kep theih nadingin Topa in amaute en tawntung hi." 
Psalms33:19  
Psalms33:20 Topa i ngak hi; amah pen eite hong huhpa le i lum ahi hi. 
Psalms33:21 Ama min siangtho eite in muang ihih manin ama sungah i lungdam hi. 
Psalms33:22 Topa aw, nang kong lamet uh mah bangin koteʼ tungah na itna kip hong omsak in." 
Psalms34:1 Topa ka phat tawntung dinga, amah phatna ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms34:2 Topa ka phat ding hi. Gimna thuakte zasak unla, lungdam uh hen." 
Psalms34:3 Kei tawh Topa nak phat un, ama min pahtawi khawm ni!" 
Psalms34:4 Keimah in Topa ka zong a, amah in kei hong dawngin, ka launa khempeuh panin kei hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms34:5 Amah en unla, maitai un; tua hileh na mai uh zum ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms34:6 Hih mi hehpihhuai pa kiko-in, Topa in amah za a, ama haksatna khempeuh panin amah a hon khia hi." 
Psalms34:7 Amah a zahtakteʼ kiimah Topaʼ vantungmi in giahphual sat a, amaute a hon khia hi." 
Psalms34:8 Topa tawh kikhawl phot unla, ama hoihna thei un! Amah a beel mite mi lungdam ahi uh hi." 
Psalms34:9 Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa zahtak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a zahtak mite in kitangsapna nei lo hi." 
Psalms34:10 Humpinelkai khanglaite in kisapna le gilkialna thuak a, ahih hangin Topa a zongte in na hoih a kisap uh om lo hi." 
Psalms34:11 Tate aw, hong pai unla hong ngai un; Topa zahtakna thu kong hilh ding hi." 
Psalms34:12 Nopna a neih theih nadingin nuntakna le khansau a deih kua ahi hiam? 
Psalms34:13 Siat nading panin na leii kem inla, zuaugenna panin na muk kem in." 
Psalms34:14 Siatna panin kihem khia inla, a hoih bawl in. Kilem nading hanciam inla, na phak mateng delh in." 
Psalms34:15 Topaʼ mit in thuman miteʼ lam en a, amauʼ kikona lamah a bil a ngat hi." 
Psalms34:16 Siatna a bawl mite hih leitung panin a kiphawkna a kisuk tat nadingin Topa in amaute a langpang hi. 
Psalms34:17 Huhna a ngen dingin thumante a kiko ciangin Topa in za a, a haksatna khempeuh panun amaute a hon khia hi." 
Psalms34:18 Lungsim kitamzante kiangah Topa hong om a, lungsim zan gawpte a hon hi." 
Psalms34:19 Thuman miʼ thuakna a tam mahmah hangin tuate khempeuh panin Topa in amah a hon hi. 
Psalms34:20 Amah in thuman mipa kem a, a guh khat zong kitan lo hi." 
Psalms34:21 Siatna in migilote that dinga, thuman a mudah mite gim kipia ding hi." 
Psalms34:22 Topa in ama nasemte hon khia a, amah a beel mi khat beek gim kipia lo ding hi." 
Psalms35:1 Topa aw, kei hong langpangte langpang inla, kei hong dote do in." 
Psalms35:2 Lum lian le lum neu la inla, keimah hong huh in!" 
Psalms35:3 Teipi le teitangzang dok inla, kei hong delhteʼ lam ngat in! Keima tungah, “Nang a hong honpa ka hi,” hong ci in." 
Psalms35:4 Kei hong sawmte maizumin mindaisak ta in! Keima siat nading a bawlte nungkiksakin sisak in! 
Psalms35:5 Topaʼ vantungmiʼ hawlna tawh huih letkhiat ansite tawh amaute kibangsak in. 
Psalms35:6 Topaʼ vantungmiʼ delhna ah a taina lampi uh mialin nalsak in. 
Psalms35:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thu om lopi-in a ngenthang uh tawh kei hong siah uh a, thu om lopi-in gum to-in kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms35:8 A phawk loh kalun amauteʼ tungah siatna tungsak in! Amauʼ ngenthang mahah amaute mah awksak inla, a kisia mangkhin dingin amaute puksak in." 
Psalms35:9 Tua ciangin Topa tungah ka lungdam mahmah dinga, ama hotkhiatna ah nuamin ka diang ding hi." 
Psalms35:10 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh, “ Topa aw, ama adingin a hat luate kiang panin a thahat lo mi a hon khia, a bawlsiateʼ kiang panin mizawngte a hon khia, nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam?” ka ci ding hi." 
Psalms35:11 Mi a el tecite hong kipan uh a, ka theih loh thute kei hong dong uh hi." 
Psalms35:12 Amaute in ka hoihnate siatna tawh hong thuk uh a, ka khuangai mahmah hi." 
Psalms35:13 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh, amaute a cinat uh ciangin, puanhampi silhin an tangin kei ka kigimtawmsak hi." 
Psalms35:14 Ka lawm, ka sanggampa hangin a dah bangin ka dah hi. A nuʼ hanga a kap mi bangin kapin ka vak kawikawi a, kunin ka kidikdik hi." 
Psalms35:15 Ahih hangin kei ka tukna ah amaute nuamin kikhawm uh a, kei simmawh dingin kikaikhawm uh hi. Ka theih ngei het loh khebaite nangawn in tawlnga het loin kei hong gensia niloh uh hi." 
Psalms35:16 Zahtakna mel nei het loin kei hong zahko niloh uh a, a ha uh hong gawi san uh hi." 
Psalms35:17 Topa aw, bang tanvei hong en khong ding na hi hiam? Amauʼ hong suk gawpna panin keimah hong hon khia inla, humpi-nelkaite kiang panin kei hong hon in." 
Psalms35:18 Tua ciangin mihon kikhopna lian sungah nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko dinga, mihonpite lak panin nang kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms35:19 A man lopi a ka gal ahite kei tungah lungdamsak kei inla, thu om lopi a kei hong mudahte, mitheek kipiasak kei in." 
Psalms35:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kilemna thu gen lo uh a, daitakin a om mite langpangin, khemna thu ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms35:21 Amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh a, amaute in, “Ha, Ha! Mu khin hang ei!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms35:22 Topa aw, na mu khin hi; dai om mawk keʼn! Topa aw, kei kiang panin gamla om keʼn!" 
Psalms35:23 Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, ka thu hong thei inla, kei adingin nangmah hong kisosuah tawm in!" 
Psalms35:24 Ka Topa, ka Pasian aw, na thumanna tawh a kituakin keima thutanna hong langsak inla, keima gimna ah amaute lungdamsak keʼn!" 
Psalms35:25 Amau le amau tungah, “Ha, i tuptup tung ei!” kicisak kei in. “Amah nawmvalh tum khin hang,” amaute cisak kei in." 
Psalms35:26 Keiʼ kamsiatna ah a lungdamte maizumsak inla, zahhuai gawpsak in! Kei tungah a hong kiliansakte maizumna le mindaina thuaksak in!" 
Psalms35:27 Kei thutang ka hihna lahkhiat ding a deihte lungdamin awngin, kipaaksak inla, “A nasem paʼ hoihna ah a lungkim Topa lian hi,” cicisak in." 
Psalms35:28 Tua ciangin na thumanna le nangmah phatna sun thapai-in ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms36:1 Mawhna in migilo paʼ lungsim tawng ah thu gen a, amah in Pasian zahtakna nei het lo hi." 
Psalms36:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mawhna kidawk khia lo a, muhdahna thuak lo ahih manin amah kimawk phat tawm hi." 
Psalms36:3 Ama kammalte pen siatna le khemna vive hi a, pil gamtatna le hoih gamtatna bei khinta hi." 
Psalms36:4 A lupna tungah lumin siat gamtat ding a ngaihsun hi. Hoih lohna lamah amah kibulh tawm a, amah in siatna nolh lo hi." 
Psalms36:5 Topa aw, na itna kip in vantung ban a, na cihtakna in vanpi dong ban to hi." 
Psalms36:6 Na thumanna pen Pasianʼ mualte tawh kibang a, na thukhennate pen tuipi thuk tawh kibang hi. Mihing le ganhing na hon hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms36:7 Pasian aw, na itna kip manpha mahmah hi. Mihing tate na kha liim ah bu uh hi." 
Psalms36:8 Na inn sunga na tampite tawh amaute nuamsa uh a, na hoihna gun panin amaute na dawnsak hi." 
Psalms36:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna tuinak nangmah tawh om a, na khuavak sungah kote in khuavak ka mu uh hi." 
Psalms36:10 Nang hong theite tungah na itna kip hong zom inla, lungsim thutangte tungah na hotkhiatna hong zom in!" 
Psalms36:11 A kihisak mite kei hong su khasak kei inla, migilote, hong hawl khiasak kei in." 
Psalms36:12 Hua lai ah siatna bawlte a cimawhin kun uh a, amaute kisuncip sukin, tho zo nawn lo uh hi." 
Psalms37:1 Migiloteʼ hangin kilungsosak kei inla, a man loin a gamta mite en dingin ngaihsun kei in." 
Psalms37:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh lopa bangin amaute vul pak ding uh a, lokung hingte bangin keutum ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:3 Topa muang inla, gamtat hoih in. Gam nuamah teeng inla, thumanin om in." 
Psalms37:4 Topa sungah lungkim in; amah in na deihna hong pia ding hi. 
Psalms37:5 Topa tungah na vai teng ap in. Amah muang in; amah in hong sem ding hi. 
Psalms37:6 Amah in nangma dikna khuavak bangin, nangma thumanna nitaang bangin hong langsak ding hi."
