Psalms37:7 Topaʼ mai ah khawl dide inla, lungduai takin ngak in. Ahihna a daupai pa tung le siatna a bawlpa tungah kilung so tawmsak keʼn!" 
Psalms37:8 Hehna panin kikham inla, sinsona nusia in. Nangmah kilung so tawmsak keʼn; tua in siatna bekah a hong paipih hi." 
Psalms37:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kipuaseh dinga, ahih hangin Topa a ngakte in leitung luah ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:10 Ahih hangin tawl khat sungin migilo pa om nawn lo dinga, ama omna mun na lim zon mahmah hangin tua lai ah amah na om lo ding hi." 
Psalms37:11 Ahih hangin lungnemte in leitung luahin, gen zawh lohin amaute nuamsa ding uh hi." 
Psalms37:12 Migilo in thuman pa sawm a, a ha a gawi san hi." 
Psalms37:13 Ahih hangin Topa in migilo paʼ hun a tung ta ahih lam mu ahih manin amah a nuihsan lel hi. 
Psalms37:14 Mizawngte le mi cimawhte a su niam ding, a thutangte a that dingin migilote in namsau dokin, a thal uh a keek hi." 
Psalms37:15 A namsau uh amauʼ lungtang mahah tumin, a thalte uh kitan ding hi." 
Psalms37:16 Migiloteʼ hauhna sangin thuman mite in tawmno khat bek a neihna hoih zaw lai hi. 
Psalms37:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh migiloteʼ thahatna kipaih khiatsak dinga, ahih hangin Topa in mihoihte a huh hi." 
Psalms37:18 Topa in a paubaang lote kem a, amauʼ gamh kip den ding hi." 
Psalms37:19 Siatna hun ciangin amaute kimaizumsak lo a, kial hun ciangin tampi nei uh hi." 
Psalms37:20 Ahih hangin migilote kisia hi. Topaʼ galte pen lono etlawm tawh kibang a, amaute mangthang pak uh hi. Meikhu bangin mangthang uh hi." 
Psalms37:21 Migilo in leitawi la a, lohkik zo nawn lo hi. Thuman mi ahihleh cingh-in mi a pia hi." 
Psalms37:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ thupha piakte in leitung luah ding uh a, ahih hangin a samsiatte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:23 Topa in mi a lam pai nading lak a, ama lungkim bangin a gamta pa amah in a kipsak hi." 
Psalms37:24 Amah a puk hangin lutuk lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama khut len hi. 
Psalms37:25 Thuman mi a kinusiacip, a suanlekhakte ngen tawmin a kivak, ka neu lai a kipanin tu-a ka teek hun ciang dong ka mu ngei nai kei hi." 
Psalms37:26 Amah in mi citpiak ngitngetin, mi tungah leitawi pia khia a, a suanlekhakte zong thupha ngah mi a suak hi." 
Psalms37:27 Siatna panin kikem inla, gamtat hoih in; tua hileh na khantawnin, na kip paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms37:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thutang deih a, ama mi siangthote nusia lo ding hi. Thuman mite kikemcing den dinga, ahi zongin migiloʼ suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:29 Thuman mi in leitung luah dinga, tua leitang tungah teeng paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms37:30 Thuman miʼ kam in pilna gen a, a leii in thutang gen hi." 
Psalms37:31 A lungsim sungah ama Pasianʼ thukham om a, a gamtatna khempeuh ah lampial het lo hi." 
Psalms37:32 Migilo in thuman mi encik a, thah dingin a zong hi." 
Psalms37:33 Topa in migilo paʼ khut sungah amah nusia lo dinga, thusit dingin a kipaipih ciangin mawhna thuaksak lo ding hi." 
Psalms37:34 Topa ngak inla, ama lampi zui in. Leitang a luah dingin nang hong liansak dinga, migiloteʼ siatna nangmah in na en ding hi." 
Psalms37:35 Lebanon taamtak sing bangin a sang pha mahmah migilo kiphasak khat keimah in ka mu hi. 
Psalms37:36 Ama kiangah ka paikik a, amah na om nawn lo hi. Amah ka zonzon hangin kimu zo nawn lo hi." 
Psalms37:37 Paubaang lo mi ciamteh inla, thutang mi en in; bang hang hiam cih leh gal a phuang lo mi adingin nopna a om hi." 
Psalms37:38 Ahih hangin thupalsatte kisusia mangkhin dinga, migiloteʼ suanlekhakte kipuaseh ding hi." 
Psalms37:39 Topa in thuman mite hon khia a, amah pen haksat hun ciangin amauteʼ bukna ahi hi." 
Psalms37:40 Amaute in Topa beel ahih manin amah in amaute huhin hon khia a, migiloteʼ kiang panin amaute honin suaktasak hi." 
Psalms38:1 Topa aw, a hehsa-in kei hong taii kei inla, lung so sa in kei hong thuhilh kei in." 
Psalms38:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thaltangte ka sungah hong tum khin a, ka tungah na khuttum hong tu khinta hi." 
Psalms38:3 Nangma hehna hangin kei ka ci na a, ka mawhna hangin ka pumtangin ka na hi." 
Psalms38:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mawhnate in ka lu dong hong tuum zo a, keima puak dingin a gik lua van gik tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms38:5 Ka haina hangin ka liamnate naai-in uih a," 
Psalms38:6 keimah hong kikunsak a, hong kibokcipsak hi. Sun thapai-in kapin ka vak kawikawi hi." 
Psalms38:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka ci sa mahmah a, nakpi takin ka ci na hi." 
Psalms38:8 Kei hong kinengcip gawpin ka thahatna bei mangkhin a, ka lungsim gimna hangin thumin ka tautau hi." 
Psalms38:9 Topa aw, ka deihna khempeuh na thei a, ka khuisatnate na za hi." 
Psalms38:10 Ka lungtang kisat a, ka tha in lel hi. Ka mit in zong khua mu thei nawn lo hi." 
Psalms38:11 Ka gim thuakna ah ka lawmte le ka kithuahpihte kidang koih uh a, keima behte nangawn kei kiang pan gamla om uh hi." 
Psalms38:12 Kei a hong that nuamte in a thang uh zak a, keiʼ nat nading a zongte in siat nading thu bek gen uh a, sun thapai-in khemna bekbek ngaihsutin nei uh hi." 
Psalms38:13 Ahih hangin kei pen bilngong ka bang a, khua ka za kei hi. A kam a ka thei lo, a pau thei lo mi ka bang hi." 
Psalms38:14 Bil khua za lo, tawnna kam a za thei lo mi khat tawh kei ka kibang takpi hi." 
Psalms38:15 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah kong muang hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, a hong dawng ding pa nangmah na hi hi." 
Psalms38:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Ka khe a taal ciangin kei tunga hong kihisakte, keima gim thuakna ah lungdamsak kei in,” cih bek kong thum hi." 
Psalms38:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh puk dingin ka kithawi a, ka gimna kam tuan lo hi." 
Psalms38:18 Ka thuman lohna ka pulak a, ka mawhna hangin ka dah hi." 
Psalms38:19 A thuman lopi-in ka gal ahite thahat a, kei a hong mudah khialte tam mahmah uh hi." 
Psalms38:20 A hoih gamta ka hih manin ka hoihna pen siatna tawh a hong thukte ka langpangte ahi hi. 
Psalms38:21 Topa aw, kei hong nusia kei in. Ka Pasian aw, ka kiang pan gamla om keʼn!" 
Psalms38:22 Topa, kei hong honpa aw, keimah a hong huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms39:1 “Ka leii tawh ka khialh loh nadingin ka gamtatna ka kikem dinga, ka omna ah migilote a om lai teng ka kam ka kham ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms39:2 Pau loin ka dai om a, ka dai omna a mawkna suak a, ka thuakna khang semsem hi." 
Psalms39:3 Ka sungah ka lung so a, ka lungngaih ciangin ka lung so semsem hi. Tua ciangin ka pau khia a," 
Psalms39:4 “ Topa aw, ka mong le ka hun a kiseh zah hong theisak inla, ka nuntakna a beipak hun ding hong theisak in!” ka ci hi." 
Psalms39:5 Ka nuntakna hun khutme tan bang bekin na bawl a, ka nuntakna hun nangma muhna ah bangmah gentham lo hi. Mihing khempeuh, husan bang bek hi takpi hi." 
Psalms39:6 Niliim bangin mihing pai kawikawi takpi hi. A mawkna-in amau lungkham takpi uh a, kuaʼ ngah ding cih thei lopi-in mite in na a khol uh hi." 
Psalms39:7 Tu-in Topa aw, keʼn, bang ngak lai ding ka hi hiam? Keima lametna nangma sung bekah om hi." 
Psalms39:8 Ka thupalsatna khempeuh panin kei hong hon khia inla, miteʼ nuihsatin kei hong bawl kei in." 
Psalms39:9 Hih bangin a hong bawl nangmah na hih manin pau loin ka om a, ka kam ka ka kei hi." 
Psalms39:10 Nong vuakna ma ka tung panin la khia in. Na hong vuakna hangin ka tha bei ta hi. 
Psalms39:11 Mi khat a mawhna hangin tai-in na sat ciangin, nget in a nektum bangin ama na manpha na beisak hi. Mihing khempeuh husan khat bang bek hi takpi hi." 
Psalms39:12 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong ngai inla, ka kikona hong za in. Ka khitui luanna hong thudon in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pu ka pate khempeuh bangin kei zong na zin, na peemta ka hi hi." 
Psalms39:13 Ka manthan hun matengin ka lungnop theih nadingin kei hong en in! 
Psalms40:1 Topa lamenin ka ngak ngiungeu a, amah kei lam hong nga-in ka kikona aw hong za hi." 
Psalms40:2 Dahna dum sung, buannawng panin kei hong kai khia-in suangpi tungah ka khete nga a, ka khesikna mun a muanhuaisak hi." 
Psalms40:3 Eima Pasian phatna la thak keimah hong hilh hi. Mi tampite in hih thu mu-in amah zahtak ding uh a, amaute khempeuh in Topa muang ding uh hi." 
Psalms40:4 Topa a muang a, mi kiphasakte lamah a kihei lo, pasian man lote lamah a pial khia lo mi thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms40:5 Topa ka Pasian aw, na sep a lamdangte le ko adingin na ngaihsutnate tampi tak na phasak a, kuamah dang tawh tehtheih na hi kei hi. Tuate pulakin gen ding hi leng, gen khit zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms40:6 Gan gawh biakna le khawh sa tawh biakna na deih kei a, khua ka zak theih nading bil na hong guan hi. Meihal biakna le mawhmaina ding biakna zong na kulsak kei hi." 
Psalms40:7 Tua ciangin keimah in, “En in, laibu sungah keima thu a kigelh khin sa bangin ka hong pai hi." 
Psalms40:8 Nangma deih bang hihna ah nuam ka sa hi, ka Pasian aw. Nangma thukham ka lung sungah om hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms40:9 Hotkhiatna hangin lungdam thu mihonpi lakah ka gen ding hi. Topa aw, lungdam thugen ka khawl ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms40:10 Nangma hotkhiatna thu ka im kei a, na thumanna le na hotkhiatna ka gen khin hi. Na itna kip le na thumanna mihonpi tungah ka im kei hi." 
Psalms40:11 Topa aw, na hehpihna kei kiang panin humcip kei inla, na itna kip le na thumanna kei a hong kem tawntung ding hisak ta in." 
Psalms40:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh a malin sim zawh loh ding siatna tampite in kei hong umcih a, khua a hong musak thei lo zah dong dingin ka mawhna thaman ka thuak khinta hi. Amaute ka sam mal sangin tam zaw uh a, ka lung in a lel ta hi." 
Psalms40:13 Topa aw, keimah hong hon khia nuam in. Topa aw, hong huh meng in." 
Psalms40:14 Kei a hong that nuamte zahhuaisak inla, maisiasak in. Keima siat nading a deihte nungkiksak inla minsiasak in." 
Psalms40:15 Keima tungah, “Ha ha!” hong ci vialte zahhuaina tawh maikhingsak in." 
Psalms40:16 Ahih hangin nang a hong zongte khempeuh nangma hangin nuamin kipak henla, na hotkhiat ding a deihte in, “ Topa lian hi!” ci ngitnget ta uh hen." 
Psalms40:17 Kei ka hih leh zawngin ka cimawh a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong mangngilh lo hi. Nang pen kei hong huhpa le hong hon khia pa na hi hi. Zekai kei in, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms41:1 Mi genthei a khualte thupha ngah ahi hi. Topa in haksatna hunah amaute hon khia ding hi. 
Psalms41:2 Topa in amaute hu-in hingsak dinga, leitungah amaute thupha ngah mi kici ding hi. Amauʼ galteʼ khut sungah amaute pia lo ding hi." 
Psalms41:3 A ci uh a nat ciangin Topa in amaute kem dinga, a cinatna khempeuh uh damsakkik ding hi." 
Psalms41:4 Keʼn ahihleh, “ Topa aw, kei hong hehpih inla, kei hong damsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah kong khial zo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms41:5 Ka galte in elna tawh keima thu gen uh a, “Cik ciangin amah a si tam, cik ciangin a min a mang tam,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms41:6 Keimah a en dingin mi hong pai ciangin, kam mawkna a pau uh hi. A lungsim uh ah siatna kaikhawm uh a, a paikhiat uh ciangin a genthang uh hi." 
Psalms41:7 Kei hong mudah khempeuh in keima thu kihuauhuau uh a, kei adingin a sia thei pen ding a geelgeel uh hi." 
Psalms41:8 Amaute in, “Amah nak gim mahmah hi. A lupna panin thokik zo nawn lo ding hi,” ci uh hi." 
Psalms41:9 Ka muan, ka lawm it pa, keima an a ne pa nangawn in a khetul tawh kei hong peek vial hi." 
Psalms41:10 Ahih hangin, Topa aw, amaute na thuhkik theih nadingin kei hong hehpih inla, hong damsak in." 
Psalms41:11 Ka galte in keimah hong zo lo dinga, keima tungah nong lungkimna ka thei ding hi." 
Psalms41:12 Keima hoihna hangin na hong huh dinga, nangma omna ah nong omsak tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms41:13 Israel Pasian, Topa in khang tawntungin thupha ngah tahen. Amen, Amen!" 
Psalms42:1 Sakhi in tui luang sialsial a lunggulh bangin nang ka hong lunggulh hi, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms42:2 A nungta Pasian kong deih hi. Cik ciangin kei hong pai-in Pasianʼ maitang hong mu thei ding ka hi hiam? 
Psalms42:3 Mite in keima tungah, “Na Pasian koi ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, sun le zanin ka khitui an-in ka ne hi." 
Psalms42:4 Ka lungsim sung ka suah khia a, pawi bawl mihon khat kipakin otna le nuamna la tawh Pasianʼ inn ah ka makaihna, mihonpi tawh ka paina ka phawkkik hi." 
Psalms42:5 Bang hangin kha kunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasianʼ sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms42:6 Ka lungsim tamkham ahih manin Jordan le Hermon gam, Mizar mual tung panin nang ka hong phawk hi." 
Psalms42:7 Nangma tuizeu gingte khatlekhat kidawng uh a, dahna tuihualte in kei a hong tuum hi." 
Psalms42:8 Topa in sun tawntungin a itna kip hong lak a, zan hun ciangin nuntakna a hong pia Pasianʼ tungah thungetna la ka sa hi." 
Psalms42:9 “Bang hangin kei hong mangngilh na hi hiam? Galte in hong sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam?” ci-in ka Pasian, kei a hong huhpaʼ tungah ka gen hi." 
Psalms42:10 Ka langte in kei tungah, “Na Pasian koi ah om ahi hiam?” hong cihcih sungteng, ka sungah meima nai tawm bangin hong tum ngangngang hi." 
Psalms42:11 Bang hangin kha kunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasianʼ sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms43:1 Pasian aw, ka dikna hong langsak inla, migilote tawh ka thu ah kei hong panpih in. Mi khemte le thutang lote kiang panin kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms43:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hong belh Pasian na hi hi. Bang hangin kei hong nil khia na hi hiam? Galteʼ sukcip manin bang hangin kapin kidikdik ka hi hiam? 
Psalms43:3 Na khuavak le na thuman hong sawl khia inla, na mual siangtho, na omna ah kei hong paipihsakin, hong khasak in." 
Psalms43:4 Tua ciangin na biakna tau ah ahi a, ka lung a hong damsak Pasian kiangah ahi zongin ka pai dinga, laiza khausai lasakna tawh nang kong phat ding hi, aw Pasian, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms43:5 Bang hangin kha kunkun a, lunghimawh niloh ka hi hiam? Pasian sungah lametna nei ning; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huh ka Pasian ka phatkik ngawn ding hi." 
Psalms44:1 Pasian aw, ka pu ka pate uh a khan lai-a na hihna sate, amaute in kote tungah hong gen uh a, kote in ka bil uh tawh ka za khin uh hi." 
Psalms44:2 Nangmah in minam dangte na hawl khia mang a, ahih hangin amauʼ munah ka pu ka pate uh na tengsak hi. Midangte na su gawp a, ahih hangin amaute na suaktasak hi." 
Psalms44:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in namsau tawh leitang ngah lo uh a, amauʼ khut in amauteʼ tungah gualzawhna pia lo hi. Na khut taklam le na baan, na hehpihna maipha hizaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah nang na lungkim hi." 
Psalms44:4 Nang pen Jakob adingin gualzawhna a sehkhol, keima Kumpipa le keima Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms44:5 Nangma huhna tawh ka galte uh ka sawn pai uh a, ko a hong do mite na min suangin ka tuancil uh hi." 
Psalms44:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thalpi suanin ka nei kei a, ka namsau in zong kei hong hon zo lo hi." 
Psalms44:7 Ahih hangin nangmah in ka galteʼ kiang panun kote na hong hon a, ko a hong mudahte na zahhuai gawpsak khin hi." 
Psalms44:8 Pasianʼ hangin kote ka angtang ngitnget uh a, nangma tungah ka lungdam tawntung ding uh hi." 
Psalms44:9 Ahih hangin nangmah in kote hong nusia-in, nong minsiasak khin a, ka galkap hon uh tawh na hong kuan khawm kei hi." 
Psalms44:10 Galte kiang panin kote nong nungkiksak a, ka galte un ka neihsa teng uh buluah khin uh hi." 
Psalms44:11 Tuu gawh ding bangin kote na hong bawl a, minam dangte lakah nong thehthang khin hi." 
Psalms44:12 Na mite a man tawmno khatin na hong zuak a, a man ding na sang nget kei hi." 
Psalms44:13 Ka veengte uhʼ zahko, ka kiim uh a omteʼ nuihsat leh thusim lohin kote na hong bawl khin hi." 
Psalms44:14 Minam dangte lakah a sia lam a gentehna, mite lakah ciamnuih a neihin kote na hong bawl khin hi." 
Psalms44:15 Keimah a hong ko mi le keimah a hong minsiasak miteʼ kampauna ahi a, galte le langte in hong bawlna hang ahi zongin, sun thapai-in ka zahhuai den a, maizumna tawh ka kidim hi." 
Psalms44:16  
Psalms44:17 Na thuciamna ah khial lo napi, nang hong mangngilh lo napi, hih thute khempeuh ko tungah hong tung khin hi." 
Psalms44:18 Ngiateʼ omna ah kote hong balnen gawpin, khuamial pi sungah nong paihdak ding zahin, ka lungsim uh kihei nai lo a, ka kalsuan uh lampial nai lo hi." 
Psalms44:19  
Psalms44:20 Ka Pasian uh mangngilh khinin pasian dang tungah ka khutte uh a khak khin hi le ung," 
Psalms44:21 Pasian in hih thu mu khia lo ding ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in lungsim thusim a thei hi. 
Psalms44:22 Nangma hangin sun thapai-in kote hong kithat a, gan goteʼ tuu gawh ding bangin kote hong kikoih hi." 
Psalms44:23 Topa aw, bang hangin ihmu na hi hiam? Nangmah hong tho tawm in!" 
Psalms44:24 Bang hangin na maitang seel na hi hiam? Bang hangin ka thuakna uh le hong kisukcipnate mangngilh na hi hiam? 
Psalms44:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh leilak ah ka puk uh a, leivui lakah guallelin ka lum uh hi." 
Psalms44:26 Tho to in, kote a hong huh dingin hong pai in! Na itna kip hangin kote hong hon khia in!" 
Psalms45:1 Thubul hoih khat tawh ka lungsim hong dimletin, kumpipa la ka phuah a, ka leii pen lai thei paʼ laikung tawh hong kibang hi." 
Psalms45:2 Mihingte lakah nangmah na hoih pen a, thugen na siam a, na kam khum zungzung hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang thupha hong pia tawntung hi." 
Psalms45:3 Vanglian kumpipa aw, na minthanna le na liatna tawh na namsau kuah in." 
Psalms45:4 Thumanna a om nading le thuman a hu dingin na minliatna tawh gualzo-in hong pusuak inla, dipkuathuai hihnate na taklam khut nangmah kihilhsak in." 
Psalms45:5 Kumpipaʼ galteʼ lungtang ah na thaltang hiamte lut a, mite na nuai ah puk uh hi." 
Psalms45:6 Na kumpi tokhom siangtho kip tawntung hi. Na kumpi ciangkhut thumanna ciangkhut hi a," 
Psalms45:7 thuman deihin gitlohna na mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian ahi, nangma Pasian in na khangualte tungah a kikhai to-in lungdamna sathau nang hong nilh zo a," 
Psalms45:8 na puan tualpite myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, le thalsing namtuite a nam hi. Saiha tawh kibawl innpite panin khausai lasaknate in nang hong lungdamsak a," 
Psalms45:9 kumpiteʼ tanute, numei uliante lakah om a, na tak lamah Ofir gam khamte tawh kizemin kumpinu a ding hi." 
Psalms45:10 Tanu aw, ngai dih in; ngaihsun inla, na bil hong ngat in. Na mite le na behte mangngilh in." 
Psalms45:11 Na melhoihna hangin kumpipa in hong deih ding hi. Na topa ahih ciangin ama mai ah kun in. 
Psalms45:12 Mihau pen ahi Taia mite in na manpha namkim letsong tawh nang hong maivil ding uh hi. 
Psalms45:13 Kumpi tanu a inn dei sungah kham puan tualpi tawh kizem a, mel tuamtuam a nei puan tualpite silh a, mihon kigual deudaute lakah a kithuah pih nungakte le amah a khate tawh kumpipa kiangah kipaipih hi." 
Psalms45:14  
Psalms45:15 Kumpipaʼ inn ah a tun ciangun lungdamna le nuamna tawh amaute kitumpih hi. 
Psalms45:16 Na pateʼ tang ding na tapate hong hi dinga, nangmah in leitung khempeuh ah amaute, ulian na suaksak ding hi." 
Psalms45:17 Keimah in khang tawntungin na min ka kiphawksak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in nang hong phat den ding uh hi. 
Psalms46:1 Pasian, i belh leh i thahatna hi a, haksat hunin a hong huh pahpah pa ahi hi." 
Psalms46:2 Tua ahih ciangin, leitung kikhiinin, mualte tuipi sung a kidenna zongin, a tuite ging zuazua-in phuan zuazua a, hih ginna hangin mual liante a liing zongin, i lau kei ding hi." 
Psalms46:3  
Psalms46:4 Sangpen paʼ teenna khua siangtho, Pasianʼ khuapi, a lungdamsak gun khat a om hi." 
Psalms46:5 Ama laizang ah Pasian om a, amah a kiliing kei ding hi. Pasian in phalvak tungin amah huh ding hi." 
Psalms46:6 Minamte lungkham uh a, kumpi gamte kiliing hi. Ama aw ging khiasak a, leitung kicim gawp hi." 
Psalms46:7 Vanglian Topa eite tawh hong om khawm a, Jakob Pasian eima belh ahi hi." 
Psalms46:8 Hong pai unla, Topaʼ sepna hong mu un. Leitung khempeuh gam khing a suahsak khitna hong en un." 
Psalms46:9 Amah in leimong dongah gal beisak hi. Amah in thalpi kuaitanin teipi susia a, leengte mei tawh a hal tum hi." 
Psalms46:10 “Om hithiat unla, Pasian ka hihna thei un. Minamte lakah keimah hong kisangsak a, leitung khempeuh ah ka min hong kithangsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms46:11 Vanglian Topa, eite tawh hong om khawm a, Jakobʼ Pasian, eima belh ahi hi." 
Psalms47:1 Mi khempeuh aw, na khut uh beeng un! Lungdamna la nakpi-in sa-in Pasian phat un." 
Psalms47:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a Sangpen pa, dipkuathuai a, leitung khempeuh a uk kumpi lian khat ahi hi." 
Psalms47:3 Mi khempeuh eima nuai ah, minamte i khe nuai ah amah in hong zawhsak hi." 
Psalms47:4 Ama it Israel-teʼ angtan pih eima luah ding leitang amah in hong teelsak hi. 
Psalms47:5 Awging tawh Pasian pai to a, peengkul aw tawh Topa pai to hi." 
Psalms47:6 Pasian tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un! I Kumpipa tungah phatna la sa un, phatna la sa un!" 
Psalms47:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian pen leitung khempeuhteʼ kumpi ahi hi. La sakna tawh amah phat un! 
Psalms47:8 Pasian in minamte uk a, a tokhom siangtho tungah Pasian tu hi." 
Psalms47:9 Uliante le Abrahamʼ Pasianʼ mite kipawl khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung miteʼ lumte khempeuh Pasian-aʼ suak khinta a, amah a sangpi-in kithangsak hi." 
Psalms48:1 Topa lian a, i Pasianʼ khuapi sungah nakpi takin phat ding ahi hi." 
Psalms48:2 Kumpi lianpaʼ khuapi, leilu lam a a om ama mual siangtho hoihin a sang mahmah Zion mual pen leitung khempeuhʼ lungdamna ahi hi." 
Psalms48:3 A muanhuai tua mualah amah a hu taktak pa ahihna Pasian in a lak khin hi. 
Psalms48:4 Ahi zongin, kumpite kikaikhawmin, a sim dingin hong kuan khawm uh hi." 
Psalms48:5 Amaute in Zion a muh phetun lamdang sa mahmah uh a, dipkua vatin tai uh hi." 
Psalms48:6 Numei nausuak na a sa bangin amaute liing gawp uh hi. 
Psalms48:7 Nisuahna huihpi tawh Tarshish kici teembaw liante nang na susia hi. 
Psalms48:8 Ka zak sa bangun Vanglian Topaʼ khuapi, i Pasianʼ khuapi, Pasian in a phuhkip ngitngetna ka mu khin uh hi." 
Psalms48:9 Pasian aw, na biakinn sungah nangma itna kip ka ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms48:10 Pasian aw, na min in leimong dong a zelh bangin, nangmah hong kiphatna in zong a zel hi. Na taklam khut gualzawhna tawh a kidim hi." 
Psalms48:11 Zion Mual lungdamsak in. Na thukhenna hangin Judah mite lungdamsak in. 
Psalms48:12 Hih pen eima Pasian hi a, a tawntungin eima Pasian hi, ci-in khangkikte tungah na gen theih nadingun Zion kiimvelin pai-in, a tausang phazah sim unla, a kulh phungmai a hoih mahmahte ngaihsunin, a phualpi muanhuaite va nawk kim un. Amah pen a tawntungin lam hong lak ding pa ahi hi." 
Psalms48:13  
Psalms48:14  
Psalms49:1 Hih thu za un, mi khempeuh aw! Ngai un, leitung a a teeng khempeuh," 
Psalms49:2 mi lian mi neu, mihau mizawngte aw!" 
Psalms49:3 Ka kam in pilna thu gen dinga, ka lungsim ngaihsutna kitel siang ding hi." 
Psalms49:4 Paunak thu theih hak khat ka ngaihsun dinga, laiza lasakna tawh a khiatna ka gen tel ding hi." 
Psalms49:5 Haksat hun, hong bawlsiateʼ gitlohna in hong nencip ciangin bang hangin lau ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms49:6 Mite in a hauhna uh muangin, tampi a neihna uh a kisaktheih pih hangun," 
Psalms49:7 amah le amah a kitan khia tawm zo taktak, a nuntakna man ding Pasianʼ tungah a pia zo mi kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms49:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a nuntakna tat nading a man tam mahmah a, Leihawmpi mu ngei lo zah ding a hing tawntung dingin kitan khia zo ngei lo hi." 
Psalms49:9  
Psalms49:10 Amah in a pilte nangawn a si mu dinga, a haite le a tei lote a kibangin sia-in, amauʼ neihsa khempeuh midangteʼ tungah nusiat uh hi." 
Psalms49:11 Amaute in leitangte amauʼ min a puaksak uh hangin hankhuk pen khang tawntung amauʼ omna hi ngitnget ding hi. 
Psalms49:12 Ama hauhna ah mi kipsuak thei lo a, a si thei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Psalms49:13 Hih pen a kihai muanteʼ ngah hi a, amauʼ ngah sa tawh a lungkimteʼ thumong ahi hi." 
Psalms49:14 Tua bangin amaute Leinuai-a dingin kiseh hi. Sihna pen amau a cing pa hi ding hi. Han khuk sungah amaute tuak suk suak ding uh a, a mel uh sia dinga, Leinuai, amauʼ inn hi ding hi." 
Psalms49:15 Ahih hangin Pasian in Leinuaiʼ vangliatna panin kei hong hon khia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei hong sang ding hi. 
Psalms49:16 Mi khatpeuh a hauh ciang ahi a, a innkuan minthanna a khan ciang ahi zongin lau-in lunghihmawh dingin ngaihsun tuan kei in." 
Psalms49:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sih ciangin bangmah keng lo dinga, a minthanna in amah zui suk lo ding hi." 
Psalms49:18 A hin lai-in amah a lungdamin kingaihsunin, mi khat in ama ading na a lim sep ciangin phatna a ngah hangin," 
Psalms49:19 khuavak a mu nawn lo dingin a si khin sa a pu a pate kiang mahah amah pai veve ding hi. 
Psalms49:20 Ama hauhna in mi hing paisuaksak thei lo a, a si thei ganhingte tawh a kibang lel ahi hi." 
Psalms50:1 Vanglian, Topa Pasian hong pau khia a, nisuahna le nitumna kikal leitung mi khempeuh a khawm hi." 
Psalms50:2 Hoih kicinna Zion panin Pasian hong taang khia hi. 
Psalms50:3 Eiteʼ Pasian hong pai a, amah dai om mawk lo hi. Ama mai ah mei husia om a, a kimkot ah huihpi om hi." 
Psalms50:4 A mite tungah thu a khen theih nadingin tung lam vantung le leitung a sam hi. 
Psalms50:5 “Biakpiakna tawh, kei tungah thuciamna a bawlte, ka mi citakte ka kiangah hong khawm un,” a ci hi." 
Psalms50:6 Vantung in ama thumanna gen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian mahmah thukhen pa ahi hi. 
Psalms50:7 “Ka mite aw, ngai un; thu kong gen ding hi. Israel-te aw, noteʼ lang khat ah teci ka pang ding hi. Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, nomauʼ Pasian ka hi hi." 
Psalms50:8 Na biakpiakna uh ah note kong mawhsak kei hi. Na meihal biaknate uh ka mai ah om ngitnget hi. 
Psalms50:9 Ahi zongin na inn pan uh a bawngtal hitaleh na ganbuk pan uh a keeltal hitaleh ka hong sang kei ding hi. 
Psalms50:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak ganhingte khempeuh, mual tul tampite tunga a om ganhingte keima-aʼ ahi hi." 
Psalms50:11 Huih lak vasate khempeuh keimah in ka thei a, gamlak a gamta khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi." 
Psalms50:12 “Ka gil kial taleh zong note kiang panin an kong ngen kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung le a sunga om khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. 
Psalms50:13 Bawngtalteʼ sa ne dinga, keelteʼ sisan dawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms50:14 Lungdam biakpiakna Pasian tungah pia unla, Sangpen pa tungah na thuciamnate uh bawl un." 
Psalms50:15 Haksat hun ciangin keima tungah hong ko un. Note kong hon khia dinga, note in keima min nong thangsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms50:16 Ahih hangin migilote tungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Ka thukhamte lawhna ding ka thuciamna na muk uh tawh gen nading thu nei na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms50:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh hilh ding na ut kei uh a, ka thute na nung lam uh ah na paai uh hi." 
Psalms50:18 Guta khat mu le-uhcin ama lawm na hi pah uh a, a paktat mite tawh na kikhawl uh hi." 
Psalms50:19 “Na kam uh, siatna na uksak uh a, na leii un khemna a khangsak hi." 
Psalms50:20 Na sanggamte uh langpangin thu na gen uh a, amauteʼ mawhna na zong uh hi." 
Psalms50:21 Hihte khempeuh na gamta khin uh a, bangmah ka pau kei hi. Kei pen no tawh a kibangin nong ngaihsun kha uh hi. Ahih hangin tu-in note ka hong taii a, na mawhna uh na mai uh ah ka koih hi." 
Psalms50:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Pasian a mangngilh mite aw, hih thuciamteh un. Tua hikeileh note kong bal gawp ding hi. Note hong hon khia ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms50:23 Biakpiak nadingin lungdam piakna hong paipih mi in kei a hong pahtawi ahi hi. Ka thu a mang mite khempeuh ka hon khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms51:1 Pasian aw, nangma itna kip om bangin kei hong hehpih inla, na hehpihna lian om bangin ka thu palsatnate hong phiatkhiatsak in." 
Psalms51:2 Ka khialhna panin hong silsiang kiuhkeuh inla, ka mawhna panin kei hong siangsak in." 
Psalms51:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thupalsatnate ka thei a, ka mawhnate khempeuh ka phawk ngitnget hi." 
Psalms51:4 Nangma tungah khialin, nangma muhna ah a sia ka gamta khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na thugenna ah nang na thutang a, thu na hong khenna ah pauna ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms51:5 A khial sa mahin kei ka suak a, ka nu in a gil sungah hong paii tung a kipan a mawh sa ka hi hi." 
Psalms51:6 Nang in nuntakna sungah thumanna na deih hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka lungsim tawng ah ciimna hong hilh in. 
Psalms51:7 Puknah tawh hong nul in; kei ka siang ding hi. Hong sil in; vuk sangin ka ngo zaw ding hi. 
Psalms51:8 Lungdamna le kipahna kei tungah hong pia inla, na hong suk gawp mipa hong lungdamsak in." 
Psalms51:9 Ka mawhna khempeuh na mai panin seel inla, ka khialhna khempeuh hong phiatkhiatsak in." 
Psalms51:10 Pasian aw, keima sungah lungsim siangtho hong piangsak inla, a thak a man ngaihsutna ka sungah hong guan in." 
Psalms51:11 Nangma omna panin kei hong paai khia kei inla, keima kiang panin na kha siangtho la khia kei in." 
Psalms51:12 Nong hotkhiatna hangin hong lungdamsakkik inla, utna lungsim tawh keimah hong huh ta in." 
Psalms51:13 Tua ciangin thupalsatte na zia na tong ka hilh dinga, nangma lamah mimawhte hong kiheikik ding uh hi." 
Psalms51:14 Kei a hong hon Pasian aw, sih nading panin kei hong hon khia in. Nong hotkhiatna thu lungdam takin ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms51:15 Topa aw, ka pau theih nadingin kei hong huh in; nangmah kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms51:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh ganhing tawh biakna na deih kei hi. Meihal biakna hong pia hi taleng zong, na lungdam kei ding hi." 
Psalms51:17 Pasianʼ san theih biakna pen lungsim kitamzan ahi hi. Pasian aw, a kitamzan, a kisik lungsim na simmawh kei ding hi." 
Psalms51:18 Na lungkimna pha tawh Zion tungah a pha bawl inla, Jerusalem kulhpite ciangkik ta in." 
Psalms51:19 Tua ciangin biakpiakna man, meihal biakna le meihal biakpiakna bupah na lungkim dinga, na biakna tau tungah bawngtalte hong kipia ding hi." 
Psalms52:1 Mi thahatpa aw, bang hangin miphate suksiatna ah kisial na hi hiam? Sun thapai-in, suksiatna na ngaih sunsun hi." 
Psalms52:2 Zuau nasem pa aw, na leii a hiam pha mahmah mulkiatna tem tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms52:3 Hoihna sangin siatna na deih zaw a, thuman genna sangin zuauna na deih zaw hi." 
Psalms52:4 Mi a khem thei pa aw, a siasak thei kammal khempeuh deih belin na nei hi." 
Psalms52:5 Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang hong susia paisuak ding hi. Amah in nang hong bawhin na buk sung panin hong kai khia dinga, a hingteʼ leitang panin hong zunglot ding hi." 
Psalms52:6 Thuman mite in nang hong mu-in, lau mahmah ding uh a, nang hong nuihsanin," 
Psalms52:7 “Pasian a beel lo, ama hauhnate a muang, ama hauhna a beel pa en un,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms52:8 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh Pasianʼ inn sunga a om oliv kung a hing tawh ka kibang hi. Pasianʼ itna kip ka muang ngitnget hi. 
Psalms52:9 Hih bangin keimah hong bawl khin na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam ngitnget ding hi. Thuhoih ahih manin miphate omna ah nangma min ka taangko ding hi. 
Psalms53:1 Mihai in a lungsim sungah, “Pasian om lo hi,” ci-in ngaihsun hi. Amaute sia uh hi. A kihhuai-in gamta uh a, a hoihin a gamta kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms53:2 A pil, Pasian a zong mi a om uh hiam, cih a theih nadingin Pasian in vantung panin mihingte hong en suk hi." 
Psalms53:3 Amaute khempeuh a vekpi-un puk khin uh hi. A kibangin kisia kim uh a, a hoihin a gamta khat beek om lo hi." 
Psalms53:4 Pasian tungah thu a ngen lo, annek bangin ka mite a ne tum, siatna a bawlte in thu theihtelna nei lo ahi hiam?" 
Psalms53:5 Cikmahin tua bang launa a omngei lo, launa lianpi sungah amaute om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in migiloteʼ guhte thehthang ding hi. Pasian in amaute nial ahih manin, amaute maizumin kikoih ding hi." 
Psalms53:6 Zion panin Israel-te ading hotkhiatna hong tun nading thu ka ngenngen hi. Pasian in ama mite tungah nopsakna a piakkik ciangin, ama mi Israel-te kipak mahmah ding uh hi." 
Psalms54:1 Pasian aw, na thahatna tawh kei hong hon khia inla, na vangliatna tawh ka dikna hong kilangsak in." 
Psalms54:2 Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka kampaute hong ngai in." 
Psalms54:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi kiphasakte in kei hong langpang uh a, mi helhhawtte in thah dingin hong zong uh hi. Amaute in Pasian thudon lo uh hi." 
Psalms54:4 Pasian, kei hong huhpa hi a, Topa, kei hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms54:5 Amah in ka galte siatna tawh thuk ding hi. Na thumanna tawh kizui-in amaute sumai in. 
Psalms54:6 Utna lungsim tawh biakpiakna kong pia dinga, nang hoih na hih manin, nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms54:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh haksatna khempeuh panin kei nong hon khia khin a, ka galte a guallelhna keimah in ka mu khinta hi." 
Psalms55:1 Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong ngai inla, ka hong thumna panin nangmah bu kei in." 
Psalms55:2 Keima lam hong nga inla, ka hong ngetna hong pia in. Ka lungsim gimna in kei hong zo gawp ta hi." 
Psalms55:3 Migiloteʼ suk cipna, galteʼ huging in kei hong gimsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in keima tungah haksatna hong tun uh a, hehna tawh keimah hong galbawl ding amaute in nuamsa uh hi." 
Psalms55:4 Ka sungah ka lungsim na mahmah a, sih ding launate kei tungah hong tung zo hi." 
Psalms55:5 Launa le linna ka tungah hong tung a, launa in hong vukcip hi." 
Psalms55:6 Hih bangin ka ci hi: “Vakhu bangin kha nei hi leng! Ka leeng khia dinga, nuam takin ka om hithiat ding hi." 
Psalms55:7 Gamla pekah ka vakthap dinga, gam sungah ka giak ding hi." 
Psalms55:8 Gensiatna huihpi le huih husiate panin bukna ka zong pak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms55:9 Topa aw, amauʼ geelnate suksiatsakin a pau uh kilamdangsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khua sungah ngongtatna le kam kiseelna ka mu hi." 
Psalms55:10 Amaute sun le zanin kulhpi tungah kot paipai uh a, khua sungah siatna le ngongtatnate om a, mite lakah lungkhamna om hi." 
Psalms55:11 Sum zuak sumleina mun panin kisukcipna le kikhemnate veng lo hi. 
Psalms55:12 Kei hong phin galte hi lo hi. Hileh ka thuak zo ding hi. Kiphatsakna tawh kei hong bawlte, langpang mi hi lo hi. Hileh ama kiang panin ka bu thei ding hi." 
Psalms55:13 Ahih hangin ka kikim pih, ka kikholh pih, ka lawm theih mahmah, nangmah na hi hi." 
Psalms55:14 Kam khum tawh i kihoho ngei a, Pasianʼ inn sungah i kikhawl khawm ngei hi." 
Psalms55:15 Amauʼ tungah sihna tungsak in. Leinuai ah a hingtangin amaute pai suksak inla, amaute launa lianpi tawh a han uh ah paisak in." 
Psalms55:16 Ahih hangin keimah in Pasianʼ tungah ka ko a, Topa in kei hong hon ding hi." 
Psalms55:17 Nitak, zingsang le sunin ka gimna leh ka thumnate ama tungah ka gen a, amah in keima thumna aw, hong za ding hi." 
Psalms55:18 Amah in ka galsimna sungah kei hong kem dinga, a muanhuai munah kei hong koih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah a hong do dingin mi tampi tak kigual deudau uh hi." 
Psalms55:19 Tanglai pek panin kumpi-in a kikoih Pasian in za-in amaute niamkhiat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukham zui lo uh a, Pasian zahtak lo uh hi." 
Psalms55:20 Ka kikholh pih ngei mi in a lawmte langpangin su gawp a, a thuciamna palsat hi." 
Psalms55:21 Ama kampau, thawhbat sangin nel zaw a, ahi zongin a lung sungah muhdahna om hi. A kammalte sathau sangin nip zaw a, ahi zongin tuate pen namsau hiam mahmah tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms55:22 Topa tungah na van gik nga in, amah in hong huh ding hi. Amah in mi thumante kiliingsak ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms55:23 Ahih hangin Pasian aw, dum thuk penna munah amaute na lawn suk dinga, mi thatte le mi khemte pen amau nuntak ding zah lang hing lo ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keimah in nang kong muang ding hi." 
Psalms56:1 Pasian aw, mite in kei hong tuancil ahih manin kei hong hehpih in. Sun thapai-in galte in kei hong sucip hi." 
Psalms56:2 Sun thapai-in ka galte in kei hong tuancil uh a, kiphatsakna tawh mi tampi in kei hong do hi." 
Psalms56:3 Kei ka lau ciangin nangmah kong muang hi. 
Psalms56:4 A thu ka phat Pasianʼ sungah, lunghihmawhna khat zong nei het loin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing ahi lelte in kei, bang hong cih zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms56:5 Amaute in ka vai siatsak ding sun thapai-in hanciam uh a, amauʼ ngaihsutnate khempeuh keima siat nading ahi hi." 
Psalms56:6 Amaute kikaikhawmin keimah hong buk uh a, ka gamtatna khempeuh hong encik uh hi. Amaute in keimah thah ding a hanciam uh bangin," 
Psalms56:7 amauʼ khialhna hangin amaute thuk in. Pasian aw, hehna tawh tua mite lawn khia suk in." 
Psalms56:8 Ka sin linnate khempeuh nangmah in na ciamteh khin hi. Ka khituite khempeuh na thawl sungah thun in. Tuate na laibu sungah kiciamteh hi lo ahi hiam? 
Psalms56:9 Tua ciangin, keimah in kong koh ni peuh ciangin ka galte nungkik ding hi. Pasian pen keima-aʼ ahihna ka thei hi." 
Psalms56:10 A thu ka phat Pasianʼ sungah, a thu ka phat Topaʼ sungah," 
Psalms56:11 lunghihmawhna khat zong nei het loin Pasian ka muang hi. Mihing lellelte in kei, bang hong cih zo ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms56:12 Pasian aw, nang tungah ka kiciamna ka zuih kul hi. Nangma tungah lungdamna kong thuk hi." 
Psalms56:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh sihna panin nong hon khia khin hi. Pasianʼ mai, nuntakna khuavak sungah ka pai theih nadingin ka khe a taalna ding panin na hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms57:1 Kei hong hehpih in Pasian aw, nang hong bel ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in. Siatna huihpi a ven mateng na kha liim ah kong bu ding hi." 
Psalms57:2 A Sangpen Pasianʼ tungah, keima deihna a hong tungsak Pasianʼ tungah ka ko hi." 
Psalms57:3 Amah in vantung panin keimah hong dawngin hong hon khia dinga, amah in kei hong tuancilte maizumin a koih ding hi. Pasian in ama itna kip le a thumanna hong lak ding hi." 
Psalms57:4 Huaihamna tawh mihing a ne tum, humpinelkai tawh a kibang miteʼ lakah ka om hithiat hi. Amauʼ hate, namsau hiam tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms57:5 Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuh ah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms57:6 Amaute in keima khe, thang hong siah uh a, lungkhamin hong koih uh hi. Ka pai nading munah gum khat to uh a, ahih hangin tua gum sungah amaute mah kia uh hi." 
Psalms57:7 Ka lungmuang hi, Pasian aw, ka lungmuang hi. La ka sa dinga, nakpi takin ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms57:8 Ka tho ding hi. Harp lasakna le laiza lasakna aw, tho ta un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning." 
Psalms57:9 Topa aw, mite lakah lungdam kong ko dinga, minamte lakah nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms57:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipi ban to hi." 
Psalms57:11 Pasian aw, vantungah na liatna kilangsak in. Leitung khempeuh ah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms58:1 No gam ukte aw, a manin thu na khen uh hiam? Note in mi khempeuhʼ thu a tangin na khen uh hiam?" 
Psalms58:2 Hi peuhmah lo hi; na lungsim uh ah a man lo na ngaihsun uh a, gam sungah ngongtatna na gamta uh hi." 
Psalms58:3 Migilote a khantawnun khial uh hi. A suah tung mahun lam khial pah uh a, zuau thu gen uh hi." 
Psalms58:4 Amaute in gulpiʼ gu bang gu nei uh a, a khiimteʼ aw ahi a, a zol siamteʼ aw ahi zongin bangmah a za het lo, gul bilngong tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms58:5  
Psalms58:6 Pasian aw, amauʼ kam sunga a om a hate uh sutan inla, humpinelkai khanglai hatu-te bot khia in, Topa aw." 
Psalms58:7 Tui luang khiate bangin amaute mangthangsak inla, lopa bangin amaute kituancil gawpin keu tumsak in." 
Psalms58:8 Amaute a naai a bei toktol, a hun cing loin a suak, ni a mu ngei lote bangsak in." 
Psalms58:9 Na beelte in lingkung kuang sa a sak ma-in, a hing a keu-in amah in phiat khia mang hen." 
Psalms58:10 Heh thukna a muh ciangin thuman mipa lungdam dinga, migiloteʼ sisan sungah amah in a khete sil ding hi." 
Psalms58:11 Mite in, “Thuman mi ading noptuamna om taktak a, leitung thu a khen Pasian khat om taktak hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms59:1 Ka Pasian aw, ka galteʼ kiang panin keimah hong hon khia in. Kei a hong langpangte panin kei hong dal in." 
Psalms59:2 Siatna a bawlteʼ kiang panin hong suaktasak inla, mi that nuamteʼ kiang panin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms59:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong pangsim uh a, a kihtakhuai mite keimah hong langpangin kikaikhawm uh hi. Topa aw, keima thupalsatna hang hi lo," 
Psalms59:4 keiʼ khialhna hang hi lopi-in, amaute va kithawi uh hi. Nangmah in hong phawk in. Keimah a hong huh dingin hong pai inla, kei hong en in." 
Psalms59:5 Nang, Vanglian Topa Pasian, Israelʼ Pasian na hi hi. Minam khempeuh gim a pia dingin tho inla, khemna tawh siat gamtat ding a sawmte kuamah siit kei in." 
Psalms59:6 Nitak simin amaute hong paikik zelzelin ui bangin ku uh a, khua sung tengah vak khuankhuan uh hi." 
Psalms59:7 Amaute a kam uh tawh nak pipi-in hawk uh a, a muk uh tawh zuau thu gengen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kuaʼn hong za ding hiam?” ci-in amaute in ngaihsun uh hi." 
Psalms59:8 Topa aw, ahih hangin nang in amaute na nuihsan lel a, minam khempeuh na zahpih hi." 
Psalms59:9 Ka thahatna aw, nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka Pasian aw, ka munkip muanhuai na hi hi." 
Psalms59:10 Ka Pasian in ama itna kip tawh keimah hong dawn dinga, ka Pasian in gualzawhna tawh ka galte hong ensak ding hi." 
Psalms59:11 Amaute that kei in; that lecin ka mite in mangngilh ding hi. Na vangliatna tawh amaute kilok gawpsak inla, amaute niamkhiat in, Topa, kote hong hupa aw." 
Psalms59:12 Amauʼ kam a a mawhna a muk uh tawh a pauna hangin, amauʼ kiphatsakna ah amau mah awksak in. Amaute in hamsiatna zangin zuau thu a genna hangun," 
Psalms59:13 hehna tawh amaute beisak in. Amaute khempeuh a beisiang dongin sumai in. Tua hileh Pasian in Israel-te tungah leimong dongin a uk khitna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. 
Psalms59:14 Nitak simin amaute hong paikik zelzelin ui bangin ku uh a, khua sung tengah vak khuankhuan uh hi." 
Psalms59:15 An zong dingin vak kawikawi uh a, a kham uh ngah kei leh humham uh hi." 
Psalms59:16 Ahih hangin keimah in na vangliatna la ka sa dinga, zingsangin na itna kip phatna la nakpi takin ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang, ka munkip muanhuai na hi a, ka gentheih hunin keima belh na hi hi." 
Psalms59:17 Ka thahatna aw, nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, nang pen ka munkip muanhuai, keima tungah itna kip a hong lak Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms60:1 Pasian aw, kote na hong nil khia khin a, ka panmunte uh na sukham mangkhin hi. Kote tungah nangmah na heh khin hi. Kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik ta in." 
Psalms60:2 Nangmah in lei na liingsak khin a, lei na khangkhamsak khin hi. Kip lo ahih ciangin a kitam mate matkik in." 
Psalms60:3 Nangmah in na mite a haksa na thuaksak khin hi. Ka dawn dingun ko a hong hoisak leenggahzu na hong pia khin hi. 
Psalms60:4 Thalte panin kihemin a kikaihkhop nadingun nang hong zahtakte adingin dial khat na koih khin hi. 
Psalms60:5 Nangma it mite a suahtak theih nadingin na khut taklam tawh gualzawhna pia inla, koteʼ ngetna hong pia in." 
Psalms60:6 A biakinn sungah Pasian in thu gen a, “Gualzo a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khen khia-in Sukkoth gam kuam ka seh khia ding hi." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead gam keima aʼ hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-aʼ mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka sik lukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi." 
Psalms60:8 Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, ka neihsa hi cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn a, Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms60:9 Kua in khuapi muanhuai ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam? 
Psalms60:10 Pasian aw, nangmah in kote a hong don nawn lo khinta hi lo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komauʼ galkapte tawh na hong kuan khia kei hi." 
Psalms60:11 Ka galdona uh ah huhna hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh mihingʼ huhna a mawkna hi. 
Psalms60:12 Pasian tawh khauh takin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak ding pa ahi hi. 
Psalms61:1 Pasian aw, ka kikona aw hong za inla, ka thungetna hong ngai in." 
Psalms61:2 Ka lungsim a neu ciangin, leimong panin nang kong sam hi. Keimah sangin a sang zaw suangpi tungah hong paipih in." 
Psalms61:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang, keima bukna na hi a, galteʼ langah tausang muanhuai na hi hi." 
Psalms61:4 Na buk sungah hong omsak tawntung inla, nangma khateʼ hutna sungah lungmuangin hong omsak in." 
Psalms61:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, ka thuciamnate khempeuh nangmah in na za khin a, nangmah a hong zahtak miteʼ ngah dingte keimah nong pia khinta hi." 
Psalms61:6 Kumpipa khantosak inla, khang tawntungin nungtasak in." 
Psalms61:7 Pasianʼ mai ah amah om ngitnget henla, ama itna kip le a thumanna in amah kem tahen." 
Psalms61:8 Tua ciangin nisimin ka thuciamnate bangin gamta-in, na minphatna ka sasa ding hi." 
Psalms62:1 Dai dide-in Pasian bek ka ngak a, ama hong hotkhiat ding muangin ka om hi." 
Psalms62:2 Kei hong huhpa le hong honpa amah bek hi a, ka guallel ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms62:3 Note khempeuh in kawm a hoi tawh a kibang, gawl bangin a kiliing mi khat a susia dingin bang tanvei hih huan nilohin, susia ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms62:4 Amah a za liatna panin suk niam ding bekbek amaute in a sawm uh hi. Amaute in thuman lo ah nuamsa mahmah uh hi. Amaute in a kampi uh tawh phat khem uh a, ahih hangin a sung tawng uh ah samsiat uh hi." 
Psalms62:5 Amah bek ka muan ahih manin, daitakin Pasian bek ka ngak hi." 
Psalms62:6 Kei hong hupa le hong honpa amah bek mah hi a, ka guallel ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms62:7 Keima suahtakna le ka minphatna Pasianʼ hang ahi hi. A muanhuai ka belh pa, ka bukna Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms62:8 Mite aw, amah muang tawntung unla, na lungkhamna teng uh ama tungah gen un. Pasian, eiteʼ bukna ahi hi." 
Psalms62:9 Mihingte ahihleh husan bang bek hi a, a lian a neu kibang lel hi. Tawi a kikhai ciangin amaute in leek lo uh a, amaute a kigawmin husan sangin zang zaw hi." 
Psalms62:10 Zawhthawh thu tawh ngahna muanin nei kei inla, suh gawpnate lametin nei kei in. Na hauhna a khan leh, tuate muanin nei kei in." 
Psalms62:11 Vangliatna pen keima aʼ hi, ci-in Pasian in a genna ka zak ngeingei sa ahi hi." 
Psalms62:12 Topa aw, itna kip nangma aʼ ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a sepna bang ciatin mite na thuk hi." 
Psalms63:1 Pasian aw, keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong zong a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang kong deih hi. Tui om lohna gam keu bangin ka pumpi bup in nang hong deih hi." 
Psalms63:2 Tua ahih manin biakinn sungah nang mahmah le na vangliatna na minthannate kei hong musak in. 
Psalms63:3 Nuntakna sangin nangma itna kip hoih zaw ahih manin nangmah kong phat ding hi. 
Psalms63:4 Tua ahih ciangin ka nuntak lai teng nang kong phat dinga, ka khutte hong laam to-in thu kong ngen ding hi." 
Psalms63:5 Ka lupna tungah nangmah hong ngaihsunsunin, zan thapai-in kong lungngaihngaih ciangin guhngek le sathau ne bangin ka lung tai mahmah a, lungdam mahmahna tawh nangmah phatna la ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms63:6  
Psalms63:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei a hong huhpa na hi a, nangma hutna sungah lungdamin la ka sa hi." 
Psalms63:8 Nangmah kong bel a, nangma taklam khut in keimah a hong len hi." 
Psalms63:9 Ahi zongin thah dingin kei a hong zongte, lei thukpi sungah pai suk ding uh hi." 
Psalms63:10 Gal sungah amaute si ding uh a, ngiateʼ an suak ding uh hi." 
Psalms63:11 Ahi zongin Pasianʼ hangin kumpipa lungdam dinga, Pasian tawh thuciamna a nei khempeuhte zong minthang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh zuau thu a gen kam khempeuh kihubing ding hi." 
Psalms64:1 Pasian aw, ka thumna aw hong za inla, gallauna panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms64:2 Migiloteʼ sawm simna, thusia bawlteʼ vaihawmna," 
Psalms64:3 namsau taat bangin a leii uh a taatte, thaltang bangin thu hoih lo a ngimte," 
Psalms64:4 a buk simna panun mawhbaang lo mi a kapte, lau het loin thakhatin amah a kapteʼ kiang panin kei hong liah in." 
Psalms64:5 Amaute in thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh uh hi. Amaute in thangsiah sim ding gen uh a, “Eite kua in hong mu ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms64:6 Eiteʼ mawhna kua in phawk zo ding ahi hiam? Siam mahmahna tawh i sawm simna i vaihawm hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingteʼ sung thu le a lungsim ngaihsutna uh thuk mahmah hi." 
Psalms64:7 Ahih hangin Pasian in a thaltang tawh amaute kap gawp dinga, amaute khempeuh thakhatin liam ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:8 Amauʼ kampaunate hangin amaute siatna thuaksak dinga, amaute a mu khempeuh in a lu uh pei san ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:9 Tua ciangin mi khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in Pasianʼ hih sa thute gengen ding uh a, ama hih sa nate khempeuh ngaih sunsun ding uh hi." 
Psalms64:10 Topaʼ nasepna hangin midikte lungdam ding uh a, amah a beel ding uh hi. Lungsim thutangte khempeuh in amah a phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:1 Pasian aw, Zion ah nangmah phat dingin kilawm a, nangma tunga thuciam sate hong kitungsak ding hi." 
Psalms65:2 Thungetna a za pa na hi a, mawhna hangin nangma kiangah mi khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:3 Ka mawhnate un kote hong zawh ciangin, nangmah in tuate na hong maisak hi." 
Psalms65:4 Nangma inn ah a om dingin na teel na lakte mi nuamsa ahi hi. Nangma biakinn siangtho, na inn sunga hoihna tawh kote ka lungkim ding uh hi." 
Psalms65:5 Tuipi gamla pente le leimong khempeuhteʼ lamet, kote a hong hon khia Pasian," 
Psalms65:6 a thahatna tawh mualte a bawl, vangliatna tawh a kidim," 
Psalms65:7 tuipi gingte, tuihualte, mi gamlumte a daisak pa aw," 
Psalms65:8 leimong pek a omte in na hihna limte a kihtak nadingun a kihtakhuai gamtatna zangin, nong hotkhiatna tawh koteʼ ngetna nong pia hi. Nisuahna le nitumna kikalah a om mi khempeuhte lungdamna tawh a awng dingin na bawl hi." 
Psalms65:9 Nangmah in leitung enin, guah na hong zusak a, leitung a hoihna nakpi takin na behlap hi. Pasianʼ gunpi tui tawh kidim a, leitungah an na piangsak hi. Tua bangin nangmah in na khempeuh na bawl khol hi." 
Psalms65:10 Tu-ma-kuakte khempeuh tui tampi tak na buak a, leivumte zalhmai-in, guahtui tawh na nipsak a, a po kungte thupha na pia hi." 
Psalms65:11 Nangma hauhna tawh kum na phasak a, na leeng paina khempeuh ah sathau a taak hi." 
Psalms65:12 Ganhing tatna, a noptuak mahmah munte ah ganhing honte omin, mualte khempeuh zong lungdamna tawh kidim a," 
Psalms65:13 gamlak lo nona munte tuu hon tawh kizemin, kuampite an tawh kidim a, amaute lungdamin awngin la a sa khawm uh hi." 
Psalms66:1 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna aw ging phasak un." 
Psalms66:2 Ama minthanna sa unla, ama tungah minthanna pia un." 
Psalms66:3 Pasianʼ tungah thu gen unla, “Nangma bawlnate bangzah ta-in dipkuathuai! Na vang lian mahmah ahih manin na mai ah na galte in nang hong mai-et uh hi." 
Psalms66:4 Leitung mi khempeuh in nangmah hong bia uh hi. Amaute in nangmah phatna la hong sak uh a, nangma minphatna la hong sak uh hi,” ci-in gen un." 
Psalms66:5 Hong pai unla, Pasianʼ sep sate mu un. Miteʼ lak a a bawlnate ah amah dipkuathuai hi." 
Psalms66:6 Amah in tuipi tui pen lei keu suaksak a, i pu i pate in a khe uh tawh tua tuipi na kantan uh hi. Tua bangin ama nasepna hangin eite i lungdam hi." 
Psalms66:7 Ama thahatna tawh a uk ngitnget pa, ama mit tawh minamte a encik ngitnget pa, mi lehdote in langpan kei uh hen." 
Psalms66:8 Mite aw, a hingte lak a a hong kem pa, i khe a hong taalsak lopa, eiteʼ Pasian phat un. Amah phatna aw kizasak tawntung un." 
Psalms66:9  
Psalms66:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian aw, kote na hong sin khin a, mei tawh ngun a kisin bangin kote na hong sin khin hi." 
Psalms66:11 Nangmah in ngen sungah kote na hong tungsak a, ka nungzang uh ah van gikpi na hong suan hi." 
Psalms66:12 Ka galte uh nong tuancilsak a, tui le mei lauhuainate ka thuak uh hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in a tanzau munah kote nong paipih hi." 
Psalms66:13 Meihal biaknate tawh nangma inn sungah kei ka hong pai ding hi. Ka lungkham laitakin ka muk pan a a ging khia, ka kam a ka thuciamte nangma tungah kong pia ding hi." 
Psalms66:14  
Psalms66:15 Ganhing thaute tawh meihal biaknate, tuutal a biakna khute tawh biakna kong pia dinga, bawngtalte le keelte tawh nangmah biakpiakna ka bawl ding hi." 
Psalms66:16 Pasian a zahtakte khempeuh aw, hong pai unla, hong za un. Kei-aʼ dinga ama bawl sate kong gen ding hi." 
Psalms66:17 Ama tungah huhna ngenin nakpi takin ka kiko a, lasakna tawh amah ka phat hi." 
Psalms66:18 Ka lung sungah mawhna kem leng, Topa in keima thu hong ngai lo ding hi." 
Psalms66:19 Ahih hangin Pasian in, keima thu hong ngai khin taktak a, keima thungetna aw, hong don khinzo hi." 
Psalms66:20 Amah in keima thungetna hong nolh loin, keima kiang panin a itna kip la khia lo ahih manin Pasian in thupha ngah tahen!" 
Psalms67:1 Pasian in eite hong hehpihin thupha hong pia henla, eite khempeuh tungah a mai hong taangsak tahen." 
Psalms67:2 Leitungah nangma deihna, minam khempeuhte lakah na vanglian hotkhiatna kithei tahen." 
Psalms67:3 Pasian aw, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong phat henla, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong pahtawi tahen." 
Psalms67:4 Miteʼ thu a manin khenin, leitung minamte khempeuh lamlakin makai na hih manin, minamte nuamin lungdamna la hong sak ta uh hen." 
Psalms67:5 Pasian aw, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong phat henla, mi khempeuh in nangmah hong pahtawi tahen." 
Psalms67:6 Leitang in ama hauhna gah khia khinta a, Pasian, eima Pasian in eite thupha hong pia khin hi." 
Psalms67:7 Pasian in eite thupha hong pia khin hi. Leimong dong mi khempeuhte in amah zahtak uh hen. 
Psalms68:1 Pasian hong kipan henla, ama galte kithehthangsak hen. Amah a mudahte ama mai ah tai uh hen." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu leeng khia bangin amaute a hawl khia ding hi. Mei mai ah khuainun a tui bangin Pasianʼ mai ah migilote sia mang ding hi. 
Psalms68:3 Ahih hangin midikte lungdam ding hi. Pasianʼ mai ah nuamin diang ding uh a, amaute lungdam mahmah in awng-awng ding uh hi." 
Psalms68:4 Pasianʼ tungah la sa unla, ama minphatna la sa un. Meiite tungah a tuang pa la sak un. Ama min pen Topa ahi hi; ama mai ah lungdamin diang un!" 
Psalms68:5 Pa nei loteʼ pa le meigong numeite a hupa pen, a siangtho mahmah ama omna ah a om Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms68:6 Pasian in a cimawhte a ten nading inn le lo guan a, thong kia mite nopsakna munah a tunpih hi. Ahih hangin mi lehdote ahihleh keugaw gamah teeng uh hi." 
Psalms68:7 Pasian aw, nangma mite mai ah na kuan khiat ciang, gamlak nawkin na pai ciangin," 
Psalms68:8 nangmah Pasian na om manin lei kiliing gawpin vantungte in guah a zusak hi. Pasian ahi, Israel Pasianʼ omna ah Sinai mual nangawn a kiliing gawp hi." 
Psalms68:9 Pasian aw, na luah mite vul gawp uh ahih manin guah tampi zusakin na nosuaksakkik hi." 
Psalms68:10 Nangma mihonte in tua sungah omna ding mu uh hi. Pasian aw, nangma hoihna tawh a cimawh miteʼ kisapna a kicingin na guan hi." 
Psalms68:11 Topa in thu pia hi: Hih thu a pua mihonte tam mahmah uh a," 
Psalms68:12 “Kumpipaʼ galkapte tai uh!” ci uh hi. Inn-a om nupite in galteʼ van a kisutte hawm uh a, tua vante pen" 
Psalms68:13 ngun tawh a kizut vakhu limte hi a, a khate kham tawh kizut hi. Bang hangin note pawl khat, tuukhawk sungah mawk om na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms68:14 Vanglian pa in tua gam panin kumpite a nawh keek ciangin Zalmon mual tungah vuk a kia tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms68:15 Aw mual lianpi, Bashan mual, aw mual dawnzum tampi a nei Bashan mual!" 
Psalms68:16 Dawnzum tampi a nei mual aw, Pasian in ama om nadingin a deih mual Pasianʼ om tawntung nading mun bang hangin simmawh et na hi hiam?" 
Psalms68:17 Leeng muanhuai tul sawm nih, vantungmi a tultul tawh, Sinai mual pan siangtho munah Topa hong pai hi." 
Psalms68:18 Topa nangmah Pasian tua munah na om theih nadingin a sangna ah kah to-in salte na paipih a, mihonte le mi lehdoteʼ tung nangawn panin piakkhong nate na ngah hi." 
Psalms68:19 Nisimin eite adingin a hong thuaksak Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Pasian pen eite hong hon khia pa ahi hi. 
Psalms68:20 Eiteʼ Pasian pen hong hon khia Pasian hi a, sihna pan a hong suaktasak Topa Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms68:21 Ahih hangin Pasian in mawhna a gamta a galteʼ lutang khempeuh sukham ding hi. 
Psalms68:22 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note in sisan sungah na khe uh silin, na uite un galteʼ sisan a liak theih nadingin Bashan mual panin galte la khiakikin, tuipi thuk sung panin ka kai khiakik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms68:23  
Psalms68:24 Pasian aw, ka Kumpipa, keima Pasian, a zahtakhuai takin biakinn sungah na paina kimu hi." 
Psalms68:25 A masa-in lasate, a nunungin tamngai tumte, a laizang ah nungak khuangtumte in:" 
Psalms68:26 “Israelʼ suanlekhakte aw, mipi kikhopna sungah Topa Pasian phat un!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms68:27 Amauteʼ lakah a mi tawm pen Benjamin-te a mapi-in om a, amauʼ zomah Judah kumpite le a mite, Naftali kumpite le a mite ahi uh hi." 
Psalms68:28 Pasian aw, na vangliatna kilangsak in. Kote adingin a hong bawlsak Pasian aw, na thahatna hong lak in." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalem-a na biakinn hangin kumpite in nang tungah letsong hong puak uh hi. 
Psalms68:30 Pumpeeng lak a teeng Egypt mite - tua ganhingte, bawngtal hon, bawngnote tai gawp in. Siah a lunggulhte tuancil inla, gal a uuk mite thehthang gawp in." 
Psalms68:31 Egypt gam panin sumngo la khiasak inla, Pasianʼ tungah thungetna-in Ethiopia gam a khut zansak mengmeng in." 
Psalms68:32 Leitung kumpi gamte aw, Pasianʼ tungah la sa un. Vantung, tanglai vantung a a tuang Topa phatna la sa un. Ngai un, ama aw, a vanglian mahmah ama aw hong ging khiasak hi." 
Psalms68:33  
Psalms68:34 Israel-teʼ tungah a lian, Pasianʼ hatna pahtawi un; ama vangliatna vantungah om hi." 
Psalms68:35 Israel-teʼ Pasian, ama biakinn sungah zahtakhuai mahmah a, ama mite tungah vangliatna le hatna a pia hi. Pasian in thupha ngah tahen!" 
Psalms69:1 Pasian aw, hong hon in! Bang hang hiam cih leh tuikhang in ka ngawng ciang hong tuum ta hi." 
Psalms69:2 Khe tawh din kipna ding mun a om lohna buannawng thuk sungah ka tum suk a, tui thuk sung tung khinta-in ka tungah tuikhang a luang hi." 
Psalms69:3 Ka kikokona-in ka gim a, ka dang keu ta hi. Ka Pasian ka ngakngakna-in ka mitte maang ta hi." 
Psalms69:4 Thu om lopi-in kei a hong mudah mi, ka lu tunga samzangte sangin tam zaw uh hi. Kei a hong susia ding, zuau thu tawh a hong dote hat mahmah uh hi. Keiʼ guk lohpi keʼn loh ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms69:5 Pasian aw, ka pil lohna na thei a, ka tatkhialhnate nangma kiang pan kiliah lo hi." 
Psalms69:6 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, nangmah a hong muangte keima hangin zahhuaisak kei in. Israel Pasian aw, nang a hong zongte keima hangin mindaisak kei in." 
Psalms69:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma hangin kona ka thuak a, maizumna in kei hong pumtuam khinta hi." 
Psalms69:8 Ka sanggamte lakah midangpi ka suak a, khualmi ka bang hi." 
Psalms69:9 Nangma inn ka deih luatna mei bangin ka sungah sa a, nangmah hong koteʼ konate keima tung hong tu hi." 
Psalms69:10 An ngolhna tawh ka lungsim ka kiniamkhiat a, tua pen keimah hong kikona leh suak zawsop hi." 
Psalms69:11 Ka puan dingin puanhampi bawl taleng zong amaute adingin gentehna ka suak veve hi. 
Psalms69:12 Kongzing lakah miteʼ gengen ka hi a, zukhamte in keima thu la-in hong sa uh hi." 
Psalms69:13 Topa aw, keʼn ahihleh nang tungah thu kong ngen hi. A kicing na itna kip tawh a hunhoih ciangin hong dawng in, ka Pasian aw." 
Psalms69:14 Buannawng thuk sungah tum sukna ding panin nangma thuman huhna tawh kei hong hon inla, tui thukte le ka galteʼ kiang panin kei hong suaktasak in." 
Psalms69:15 Keima tungah tuikhang lauhuai hong luangsak kei inla, khuamial thukpi hong nawmvalhsak kei in. Gum in a kuavang keima tungah hong khak nelhsak kei in." 
Psalms69:16 Topa aw, na itna kip hoih ahih manin kei hong dawng inla, na hehpihna lian a om tawh kizui-in keiʼ lam hong nga in." 
Psalms69:17 Na nasem pa kiang pan na maitang seel kei inla, kei cimawh ka hih ciangin hong dawng meng in." 
Psalms69:18 Kei kiangah hong nai inla, kei hong hon in. Ka galteʼ khut sung pan kei hong khah in!" 
Psalms69:19 Keimah hong kisimmawhna, ka maizumna le ka mindaina nang na thei a, ka galte khempeuh zong nang na thei hi." 
Psalms69:20 Simmawhna in ka lungsim hong zo a, kei ka cimawh ta hi. Kei a hong hehpih ding mi ka zonzon hangin kuamah om lo a, hong huh ding ka zon hangin kuamah ka mu kei hi." 
Psalms69:21 Amaute in an dingin gu hong pia uh a, ka dangtakna ah dawn dingin tui thuk hong pia uh hi." 
Psalms69:22 Amauʼ mai-a kilui ante thangzak suaksak inla, amauʼ biakna pawi ante tehlop suaksak in." 
Psalms69:23 Khua a muh theih loh nadingun amauʼ mit mialsak inla, a kawngte uh zawcipsak in." 
Psalms69:24 Amaute tungah nangma thangpaihna sung suk inla, na sinsona amaute bansak in." 
Psalms69:25 Amauteʼ phualpi a kilawi mun suak henla, amauʼ buk ah mi khat zong tengsak kei in." 
Psalms69:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in na sat gawp mi amaute in bawlsia uh a, nangmah in na liamsak sa mi amaute in gimsak sawnsawn uh hi." 
Psalms69:27 Amauʼ gim thuakna banah thuaksak thuahthuah lai inla, nangma tung panin suahtakna ngah kei ta uh hen." 
Psalms69:28 A nungtateʼ laibu sung panin amaute kiphiatsak inla, miphate lakah a min uh kikhumsak kei in." 
Psalms69:29 Ahih hangin keimah in gimna thuakin na ka sa hi. Pasian aw, kei hong kai to-in hong hon khia ta in." 
Psalms69:30 Lasakna tawh Pasianʼ min ka phat dinga, lungdamna tawh amah ka pahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms69:31 Hih banga hihna in bawngtal tawh biakna ahi a, bawngtalno tawh biakna sangin zong Topa lungdamsak zaw ding hi." 
Psalms69:32 Netniamna a thuakte in hih thu mu-in lungdam uh hen. Pasian a zong note aw, na lungsim uh nosuaksakkik un." 
Psalms69:33 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a cimawhteʼ aw za a, henna sungah a om a mite simmawh lo hi." 
Psalms69:34 Vantung le leitung, tuipi le a sungah a om khempeuhte in amah phat ta uh hen." 
Psalms69:35 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Zion honin Judah khuapite lamkik dinga, a nasemte tua lai ah teengin tang pah ding uh hi." 
Psalms69:36 Ama nasemteʼ tate in tua leitang luah ding uh a, amah a itte tua sungah teeng ding uh hi." 
Psalms70:1 Pasian aw, keimah hong hon khia nuam in. Topa aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms70:2 Kei, thah hong sawmte maizumin kibuai gawpsak in. Keima siat nading a deihte nungkiksak inla, mindaisak in." 
Psalms70:3 “Ha, ha!” a cite a maizumna uh tawh maikhingsak in." 
Psalms70:4 Nang hong zongte khempeuh lungdam mahmah in na min hangin kipak tahen. Na hotkhiat ding a utte in, “Pasian lian hi,” cici tahen." 
Psalms70:5 Ahih hangin kei zawngin ka cimawh hi. Pasian aw, hong manlang in. Nang pen keimah huhpa le hong hon khia pa na hi hi. Topa aw, hong zekai kei in." 
Psalms71:1 Topa aw, nang kong bel hi. Kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms71:2 Na thumanna tawh kei hong huh inla, hong hon khia in. Keima lamah na bil hong ngat inla, hong hon in." 
Psalms71:3 Hong hon dingin ka belh suangpi, ka kulh muanhuai, hong hi ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah hong honpa le ka belh pa na hi hi." 
Psalms71:4 Ka Pasian aw, migiloteʼ khut sung pan le thuman lo mite le migiloteʼ matna panin keimah hong hon in." 
Psalms71:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian aw, ka neu lai a kipanin ka hong lamet, ka hong muan na hi hi, Topa aw." 
Psalms71:6 Ka suah tung a kipanin nangmah kong bel a, ka nuʼ gil sung panin hong la khia pa na hi hi. Nangmah kong phat ngitnget hi." 
Psalms71:7 Mi tampite adingin a siahil bang ka hih hangin nang pen a muanhuai, keima belh na hi hi." 
Psalms71:8 Sun thapai-in nangmah kong phat a, na minthanna ka gen tawntung hi." 
Psalms71:9 Ka teek hun ciangin kei hong lawn khia kei inla, ka tha a kiat ciangin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms71:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka galte kihoho-in, keimah hong thahnopna thu kikumkum uh hi." 
Psalms71:11 “Pasian in amah nusia zo a, amah a hon ding kuamah om lo ahih manin, amah delhin man ni,” kici uh hi." 
Psalms71:12 Pasian aw, kei kiang panin gamla om kei in. Ka Pasian aw, keimah a huh dingin hong manlang in." 
Psalms71:13 Kei hong mawhsakte zahhuai-in bei mang uh henla, keima siat nading a zongte simmawhna le min siatna in tuamcip tahen." 
Psalms71:14 Ahih hangin keʼn, nang kong lamen dinga, nangmah kong phat semsem lai ding hi." 
Psalms71:15 Thuman tawh na hotkhiatna na nasepnate sim zawh lohin tam ahih manin sun thapai-in ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms71:16 Topa Pasian aw, na nasep liante ka phat dinga, na thumanna bek genin ka nei ding hi." 
Psalms71:17 Pasian aw, ka khangno lai a kipanin nong thuhilh a, a lamdang na nasepnate ka gengen lai hi." 
Psalms71:18 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian aw, hong piang lai ding mite khempeuh tungah nangma hatna thu ka gen khit matengin, teekin ka sam a kang zongin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms71:19 Pasian aw, na vangliatna le na thumanna in van sangpite ban to hi. Pasian aw, na lian pipi na sem khinzo hi. Nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam?" 
Psalms71:20 Gimna lian pipi a hong tuaksak nangmah in kei nong hingkiksak dinga, lei thukpi sung panin nong la khiato ding hi." 
Psalms71:21 Nangmah in ka min hoihna nong khangsak dinga, nong hehnemkik ding hi." 
Psalms71:22 Ka Pasian aw, na thumannate hangin kei zong harp lasakna tawh nangmah kong phat ding hi. Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa aw, laiza lasakna tawh nangmah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms71:23 Nangmah phatna ka sak ciangin nuamin ka awng dinga, na hong hotkhiatna hangin ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nuamin ka awng ding hi." 
Psalms71:24 Keima siat nading a zongte kizahhuaisak khin a, minsia khinzo ahih manun thuman tawh na hong huhna sun thapai-in ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms72:1 Pasian aw, nangma thutang, kumpipa hilh inla, nangma thuman, kumpi tapa hilh in." 
Psalms72:2 Amah in thumanna tawh na mite tungah thu khen henla, na mizawngte tungah thu a tangin khen tahen." 
Psalms72:3 Mual liante le mual neute in thumanna tawh na mite adingin nopna tampi piangsak tahen. 
Psalms72:4 Amah in mizawngte ading thu a manin khen henla, mi cimawhte tungah suahtakna pia-in, midang a nengniamte sucip gawp tahen." 
Psalms72:5 Ni le kha a om lai teng, khang tawntungin amah hing tahen." 
Psalms72:6 Amah pen pawn lak lopa tungah a kia guah, lei a kawtsak guahzu tawh kibang tahen." 
Psalms72:7 Ama hun sungin thuman pung henla, khapi a bei mateng nopna om tahen." 
Psalms72:8 Ama ukna, tuipi khat pan tuipi khat, Gunpi panin leimong dongin om tawntung tahen." 
Psalms72:9 Ama galte khempeuh ama mai ah kun uh henla, amah a langpangte leilak kidenna uh hen." 
Psalms72:10 Tarshish kumpite le tuikulh neu-a kumpite in ama tungah siah pia uh henla, Sheba le Seba kumpite in letsong puak ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:11 Kumpi khempeuh ama mai ah bok uh henla, minam khempeuh in ama na sem ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte in a koh ciangin amah in hon khia a, mizawng, a huh ding a om lote amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms72:13 A thakiam, a cimawh mite amah in hehpih a, mi cimawhteʼ nuntakna amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms72:14 Amah in amaute pammaih sa ahih manin netniamna le ngong hihna panin amaute a hon khia hi. 
Psalms72:15 Amah a khansau henla, Sheba gam a khamte ama tungah kipia tahen. Ama adingin thu kingetsak tawntung henla, sun thapai-in ama adingin thupha kingetsak tahen." 
Psalms72:16 Gam sung khempeuh ah an tampi tak piang henla, mual liante dawnah dim mema-in Lebanon gam hoih sung bang ta henla, gamlak a lopate bangin khuapite sunga om mite pung ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:17 Ama min kip tawntung henla, a minthanna kip paisuak hen. Ama hangin mite in thupha ngah henla, minam khempeuh in amah pen thupha ngah pa, ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms72:18 Na lamdangte a bawl amah bek ahi Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Psalms72:19 A minthang ama min in thupha ngah tawntung henla, ama minthanna tawh leitung khempeuh kidim tahen. Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Jessiʼ tapa Davidʼ thungetnate a bei ta ahi hi. 
Psalms73:1 Israel mite bangin a lungsim a siangtho a thutang mite tungah Pasian hoih takpi hi. 
Psalms73:2 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh ka khe kisui puk dektak a, ka khe taal dektak hi." 
Psalms73:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh migiloteʼ daupaina ka muh ciangin mi kihisakte ka eng hi. 
Psalms73:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nat velvalna bangmah thuak lo uh a, a pumpi uh cidamin zol hilhial hi." 
Psalms73:5 Amaute in midangte bangin haksatna thuak lo uh a, amaute in midangte bangin gimna ngah lo uh hi." 
Psalms73:6 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khainiang bangin kiphatsakna ok uh a, puan bangin ngongtatna silh uh hi." 
Psalms73:7 A lungsim panun gitlohna pusuaksak uh a, a ngaihsutna uh gitlohna tawh a dim let hi." 
Psalms73:8 Amaute in mi thusim loin el pau uh a, kiliatsakna tawh a sucip dingin mi a tawng uh hi." 
Psalms73:9 Amauteʼ gensiatna in vantung dong ban to a, kiliatsakna tawh leitungah thu gen kawikawi uh hi." 
Psalms73:10 Tua ahih ciangin mite in amaute phat uh a, amauʼ mawhna zong lo uh hi." 
Psalms73:11 Amaute in, “Pasian in bangci theih ding ahi hiam? Sangpen pa in phawk ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Psalms73:12 Amaute migilo ahi uh hi. A tawntungin nuam takin om hithiat uh a, amaute a hauhna uh khang semsem zaw lai hi." 
Psalms73:13 Ka lungsim siangsak a, mawhna ka bawl loh hangin a phattuamna om tuan lo hi." 
Psalms73:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh sun thapai-in gimna ka thuak a, zingsang simin hong kithuhilh hi." 
Psalms73:15 Tu-a bangin thu a gen hi leng, nangma mite tungah a thutak lo ka suak ding hi." 
Psalms73:16 Ahih hangin hih thu a bangci hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin kei adingin a lunggimhuai mahmah nasep khat hong suak a," 
Psalms73:17 Pasianʼ biakinn sungah ka pai ciangin a thutawpna dongte ka tel hi. 
Psalms73:18 Nangmah in amaute mun nalna ah na koih takpi dinga, a sia dingin amaute na tuksak ding hi." 
Psalms73:19 Tomno sungin amaute kisusia-in, lau mahmahna in amaute nil khia mang ding hi." 
Psalms73:20 Amaute pen zan a mangmat tawh kibang lel a, na khanlawh ciangin amaute a bangci pian hiam, ci-in na phawk nawn kei hi." 
Psalms73:21 Ka lung khamin ka lungsim hong nat ciangin," 
Psalms73:22 keimah hai-in bangmah ka thei kei a, nangma mai ah ganhing tawh ka kibang hi." 
Psalms73:23 Ahih hangin nangmah tawh ka om khawm ngitnget a, ka khut tak lamin kei na hong len hi." 
Psalms73:24 Thulahna tawh keimah nong makaih a, a nung ciangin minthanna munah na hong tunpih ding hi." 
Psalms73:25 Nang sim loh vantungah kua nei ka hi hiam? Nang sim loh ka deih ding leitungah kuamah om lo hi. 
Psalms73:26 Ka lungsim le ka pumpi zawngkhal kha dinga, ahih hangin Pasian pen ka lungsim hatna le keima aʼ hi tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms73:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tawh a kigamlate kisia ding uh a, nangma tungah a hong khialte na beisak ding hi." 
Psalms73:28 Ahih hangin kei adingin Pasianʼ kiangah om ding a hoih ahi hi. Na sepnate khempeuh ka gen theih nadingin Topa Pasian kong bel hi. 
Psalms74:1 Pasian aw, bang hangin kote hong paai khia paisuak na hi hiam? Bang hangin na gam sunga om nangma tuute tungah heh na hi hiam?" 
Psalms74:2 Tanglai-in na ngah sa na mihonte, nangma luah minam dingin na tatkhiat sate phawk in! Na teennasa Zion Mual hong phawk in." 
Psalms74:3 A sia den sa munah hong pai in. Na biakinn sunga om khempeuh galte in susia khinta hi. 
Psalms74:4 Nangma galte mun siangtho laizang ah awng uh a, amauʼ dialte gualzawhna lim dingin a khai uh hi." 
Psalms74:5 Amaute pen tulak sing phatna ah pai-in heipi tawh sing a phuk bang uh hi. 
Psalms74:6 Tua ciangin biakinn na a kizemte khempeuh sek-hei le sekpi tawh a satkham uh hi. 
Psalms74:7 Amaute in mei tawh na biakinn hal uh a, nangmah hong kibiakna mun a susia uh hi." 
Psalms74:8 Amaute in, “A vekpi-in zo mang khin ni,” kici uh a, gam sungteng a om Pasian biakna inn khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi." 
Psalms74:9 Kote in ka mailam thu ding uh ka thei kei uh hi. Kamsang khat zong om nawn lo a, bang tanvei hi ding, ci-in a thei kuamah ka om kei uh hi." 
Psalms74:10 Pasian aw, ka galte in bang tanvei hong thusim loin om ding ahi hiam? Langpangte in nangma min hong simmawh den ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms74:11 Bang hangin na khut dokkik a, na khut taklam na ang ah koihcip na hi hiam?" 
Psalms74:12 Ahi zongin Pasian pen tanglai pek a kipanin kumpi hi tawntung a, hih leitungah a hong hon khia zelzel ngei ka Kumpi ahi hi." 
Psalms74:13 Na vangliatna tawh tuipi na khenkham a, tuite tunga gulpiteʼ lutangte na sukham hi." 
Psalms74:14 Nangmah in Awleʼ lutangte na sukham a, amah pen, gamlak ganhingteʼ nek dingin na pia hi." 
Psalms74:15 Ciktuite le luite na phulsak a, gun tui luangte na kangsak hi." 
Psalms74:16 Sun pen nangma aʼ hi a, zan zong nangma aʼ mah ahi hi. Nangmah in ni le kha na bawl hi." 
Psalms74:17 Leitung gamgi khempeuhte le phalbi hun le khuakhal hunte na bawl khin hi. 
Psalms74:18 Topa aw, galte in nang hong thusim lohna le, dawibia mite in nangma min a hong simmawhna hong phawk ta in." 
Psalms74:19 A cimawh mite a gal gilote uh khut sungah nusia kei inla, bawlsiatna a thuak mite mangngilh kei in." 
Psalms74:20 Nangma thuciamna hong pi ngaihsut in; bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mun mialna khempeuh mi ngongtatte tawh kidim hi. 
Psalms74:21 A kisikcip mite zahhuaisak kei inla, mizawng le mi cimawhte nangma min kiphatsak in." 
Psalms74:22 Pasian aw, tho inla, nangma thu ah hong pang in. Dawibia mite in sun tawntungin nang a hong thusim lohna hong phawk ta in!" 
Psalms74:23 Nangma galteʼ kikona aw, nang a hong langpangte a gamlum semsemna mangngilh kei ta in." 
Psalms75:1 Pasian aw, nangma tungah ka lungdam mahmah uh a, nangma tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi. Nangma liatna thu ka gen uh a, a lamdang na bawlnate ka sut kikkik uh hi." 
Psalms75:2 A hun ka seh sa ni ciangin thu a manin ka khen ding hi. 
Psalms75:3 Leitung le a tunga teengte khempeuh a kilin ciangin a khuampite a kipsak pa keimah ka hi hi. 
Psalms75:4 A kiphasakte tungah, “Kiphasak kei un,” a gilote tungah, “Kihisak kei un." 
Psalms75:5 Kihisak kei unla, kiphatsakna tawh kampau kei un,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms75:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh vangliatna pen nisuahna lam ahi a, nitumna lam ahi a, gamlak pan ahi zongin a hong pai hi lo hi." 
Psalms75:7 Mihing khat a sangsak, mihing khat a niamsak thukhen pa pen Pasian ahi hi." 
Psalms75:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ khut sungah leenggahzu a phuan, a kihelkim ngingei hai khat om a, amah in tua sung panin hong bung khia dinga, leitung migilo khempeuh in a tawdat dong takin a liaktum ding uh hi." 
Psalms75:9 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh ka lungdam ngitnget dinga, Jakob Pasianʼ tungah phatna late ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms75:10 Migiloteʼ vangliatna khempeuh amah in susia dinga, ahih hangin thuman miteʼ vangliatna khang semsem ding hi." 
Psalms76:1 Judah gam sungah Pasian kithei a, Israel gam sungah ama min lian hi." 
Psalms76:2 Zion khua sungah ama teenna mun kibawl hi. 
Psalms76:3 Amah in tua lai ah thaltangte, lum, namsau le galhiamte a kuaitan hi." 
Psalms76:4 A om ngitnget mual liante sangin na min thang zaw a, na lian zaw hi." 
Psalms76:5 A thahatteʼ neihsa nate kisut khia a, amaute ihmucip suak uh hi." 
Psalms76:6 Jakobʼ Pasian aw, nangma thuhilhna hangin sakol le a tung tuang pa khawlcip uh hi." 
Psalms76:7 Ahih hangin nang na kihtakhuai mahmah hi. Na heh khit phot ciangin nangma mai ah kua ding ngam nawn ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms76:8 Vantung panin thukhenna na gen khia hi. Gimna a thuak leitung mi khempeuh a hon dingin thukhen dingin Pasian a kipat ciangin leitung lau mahmah in tang het loin a om khikhe hi. 
Psalms76:9  
Psalms76:10 Mihingteʼ hehna in nang hong kiphatna ding piangsak dinga, na hehna panin a suakta mite in nangmah pahtawina pawi a bawl ding uh hi." 
Psalms76:11 Topa na Pasianʼ tungah na thuciamnate uh pia unla, tuate khempeuh zui un. Leitung kumpite sangin a kihtakhuai zaw, ulianteʼ lungsim a niamkhiat, zahtak ding ahi paʼ tungah, ama kiimah a om mi khempeuhte in letsong puak ta uh hen!" 
Psalms76:12  
Psalms77:1 Pasianʼ tungah a gingin ka kiko khia a, a hong zak theih nadingin a gingin ka kiko hi." 
Psalms77:2 Ka lungkham hunin keimah in Topa ka zong hi. Zanin thu ngenin gim het loin ka khut ka zan a, ahi zongin hehnepna ka ngah kei hi." 
Psalms77:3 Keimah in Pasian ka ngaihsun a, ka tautau hi. Lung ka geelgeel a, ka gim mahmah hi." 
Psalms77:4 A ihmu lo dingin kei na hong bawl a, lungkham lua-in ka pau thei kei hi." 
Psalms77:5 Hun luite ka ngaihsun a, sawt pek lai-a kumte ka phawk hi." 
Psalms77:6 Zan thapai-in ka lungsimah ka kihoho a, lung geelgeelin thu ka kan ciangin:" 
Psalms77:7 “Topa in hong nial paisuakin, kei tungah maipha hong piakik lo ding hiam?" 
Psalms77:8 Ama itna kip bei paisuakin, ama thuciamte maimang suak ding hiam?" 
Psalms77:9 Pasian in hehpihna a neih ding mangngilh khinta ahi hiam? Ama hehna in hehpihnate vukcip khin ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. 
Psalms77:10 Tua bang ahihleh, “Sangpen paʼ hat nawn lohna pen ka khakham veina ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms77:11 Topaʼ sepnate ka lungsimah ka phawk dinga, hun lui lai-a nangma nalamdangte ka ciamteh ding hi." 
Psalms77:12 Nangma nasepna khempeuh ka lung ngaingai dinga, nangma sep na liante ka ngaih sunsun ding hi." 
Psalms77:13 Pasian aw, nangma lampi siangtho hi. Eima Pasian tawh kibangin bang pasian lian ahi hiam?" 
Psalms77:14 Nang pen nalamdangte a bawl, minam dangteʼ lakah na vangliatna alang khiasak khin Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms77:15 Nangmah in na vangliatna tawh Jakob le Josefʼ suante, na mite na hon khia hi." 
Psalms77:16 Tui in nang hong muh ciangin Pasian aw, tuite in nang hong muh ciangin a lau uh hi. Tui thukpi zong a liing hi." 
Psalms77:17 Meiipite in tui sung khia-in, vante ging damdam a, nangma thaltangte mun citeng ah a leeng uh hi." 
Psalms77:18 Na vanging lianpi pingpei sungah omin, khuaphialepte in leitung taan a, leitang liing gawpin a kising damdam hi." 
Psalms77:19 Nangma lam lianpi tuipi tung hi a, nangma lam neute zong luilianteʼ tung mah ahi hi. Ahi zongin na khekhapte kimu lo hi." 
Psalms77:20 Nangmah in Moses le Aaronʼ khut tawh nangma mite tuu hon bangin na makaih hi. 
Psalms78:1 Ka mite aw, keima hilhna ngai unla, ka kam tawh ka thugente na bil uh hong ngat un." 
Psalms78:2 Note tungah thu gentehna zangin ka kam ka-in thu kong gen ding hi. I pu i pate in hong gen sa, eite in i zak sa le i theih sa, tanglai-a thuthukte ka hong gen khia ding hi." 
Psalms78:3  
Psalms78:4 Hih thute, i tate tungah eite in im loin, a hong piang lai ding khang thakte tungah, Topaʼ minthang nasepna, ama vangliatna, ama sep sa nalamdangte i gen ding hi." 
Psalms78:5 Amaute pen Pasian tungah a lungsim thuman lo, lungsim kip a nei lo khangmi, lungsim khauhin a lehdo khangmi, amauʼ pu le pate tawh kibang loin, amaute in Pasian sungah amauʼ lametna koihin, Pasianʼ nasepnate mangngilh loin, ama thupiakte zui-in, a suak nai lo naupangte, a hong piangkik khang thakte in a thu thei-in, amaute ding khia-in amauʼ tuletate tungah a thu a gen theih nadingin, amah in, i pate in a tate a hilh sawn dinga a sawl ahi, Israel sungah thukham khat koihin, Jakob sungah teci panna khat a koih hi." 
Psalms78:6  
Psalms78:7  
Psalms78:8  
Psalms78:9 Thal a tawi Efraim mite, gal kido ni-in nungkik uh hi." 
Psalms78:10 Amaute in Pasianʼ thuciamna zui lo uh a, ama thukham bangin gamta nuam lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:11 Ama bawl sa le amaute tungah nalamdang a lah sate amaute in mangngilh uh hi. 
Psalms78:12 Egypt gam sung Zoan munah, a pu a pate uhʼ muhna ah amah in nalamdang a bawl hi." 
Psalms78:13 Amah in tuipi kikhensakin amaute kantansak a, tuite a lompi-in a omsak hi." 
Psalms78:14 Sun hunin amah in amaute meiipi khat tawh kha a, zan tawntung, meikuang taang khat tawh amaute a kha hi." 
Psalms78:15 Amah in gam sungah suangpite kitamsak a, tui thukpi sung panin a piang khia bangin amauteʼ tungah tui dawn ding tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms78:16 Amah in suangpi sung panin luitui luang khiasak a, gun tui luang bangin tuite a luangsak hi." 
Psalms78:17 Ahi zongin ama tungah amaute khial lailai uh a, Sehnel gam sungah Sangpen pa a lehpan uh hi." 
Psalms78:18 Amaute in amauʼ duh mahmah an a kalhna uh tawh amaute in a lungsim sung uh ah Pasian a ze-et uh hi. 
Psalms78:19 Amaute in Pasian gensia uh a, “Pasian in gamlak ah an pia thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms78:20 Amah in suangpi sat a, tui leng khia-in tuite dim let takpi ahi hiam? Amah in ama mite, an ahi a, sameh ahi zongin a pia thei takpi ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi." 
Psalms78:21 Topa in tua thu a zak ciangin hehna tawh kidimin, meikuang tawh Jakob su gawp a, Israel tungah a heh semsem hi." 
Psalms78:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasian um lo uh a, a hon khia zo dingin muang lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:23 Ahi zongin amah in, tunga om vantungte thu pia-in, vantung kongte hong a," 
Psalms78:24 nek dingin amau tungah manna an zusakin, amaute tungah vantung an a pia hi." 
Psalms78:25 Mihingte in vantung miteʼ an ne uh a, amah in amaute tungah an tampi a puak hi." 
Psalms78:26 Amah in vantungah nisuahna huih nungsakin, ama vangliatna tawh leitaw lam huih paikhiatpih a," 
Psalms78:27 amah in amaute tungah leivui zah-a tam sa zusak a, tuipi sehnel zah-a tam vasate a khiat suk hi." 
Psalms78:28 Amauʼ giahphual laizang, amauʼ omna kiim khempeuh ah tuate a kiasak hi."
