Psalms78:29 Amauʼ duh pen pia ahih manin, amaute in ne-in gilvah uh hi." 
Psalms78:30 Ahih hangin amaute in a duh pen uh a kham ma, amauʼ kam sungah an a om laipi mahin," 
Psalms78:31 amauteʼ tungah Pasianʼ hehna tungkikin amah in amaute lakah a hat pen teng thatin, Israel-teʼ muan le suan teng a vatlum hi." 
Psalms78:32 Hih nalamdangte khempeuh a om khin hi napi-in amaute khial lai veve uh a, ama nalamdangteʼ hangin amaute in um tuan lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:33 Tua ahih ciangin amah in amauʼ hunte husan khat bangin maimangsak a, amauʼ nuntakna, launa lianpi tawh a beisak hi." 
Psalms78:34 Amaute pawl khat a thah khit ciangin a om lai mite in amah zong pan uh hi. Amaute kisikin, lungsim taktak tawh Pasian a zong uh hi." 
Psalms78:35 Amaute in Pasian pen, amaute a hon khia, Sangpen Pasian, amaute a hupa ahihna a phawk uh hi." 
Psalms78:36 Ahih hangin amaute in a kampi bek uh tawh amah phat khem uh a, a leii uh tawh ama tungah zuaugen uh hi." 
Psalms78:37 Amauteʼ lungsim ama lamah kip lo uh a, ama thuciamna ah amaute thuman lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:38 Ahi zongin amah in hehpihna lungsim nei ahih manin amauʼ khialhnate maisakin, amaute susia lo hi. Amah in a hehna ip zelzel a, a hehna khempeuh phong khia lo hi." 
Psalms78:39 Amah in, amaute pen mihing hi lel a, a hong paikik nawn lo huihnung bang ahihna uh a phawk hi." 
Psalms78:40 Amaute in gamlak ah amah lehdo zelzel uh a, sehnel gam sungah amah dahsak uh hi." 
Psalms78:41 Amaute in amah ze-et kikkik uh a, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pasian a phin uh hi." 
Psalms78:42 Galteʼ kiang panin amah in amaute a hotkhiat ni hitaleh, Egypt gamah ama limte a bawl hun lai hitaleh, Zoan gamah a bawl a nalamdangte hitaleh, ama vangliatna hitaleh, amaute in ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:43  
Psalms78:44 Amaute in a lui tuite uh a dawn theih loh nadingin amauʼ gun tuite amah in sisan a suaksak hi. 
Psalms78:45 Amaute a pet thei cippi honte, amauteʼ lote a susia uiphukte amauʼ lakah a sawl hi." 
Psalms78:46 Amauʼ lo ante tangngol pia a, amauʼ sepna gahte kauphe a pia hi." 
Psalms78:47 A leengguite uh gial tawh deng gawp a, a theithekte uh vukkhal tawh susia hi." 
Psalms78:48 A ganhingte uh gial tawh deng lum a, a gan khawite uh keek tawh a deng lum hi." 
Psalms78:49 Amauteʼ tungah a lauhuai ama sinsona, hehna, thangpaihna, gimna, le a susia thei van mi hon khat a khah hi." 
Psalms78:50 Amah in a sinsona ip loin, kuamah hinkhawi lo a, pulnatna tawh amaute a sisak hi." 
Psalms78:51 Hamʼ suanteʼ inn sungah a ta upa pen teng, Egypt gam sung tacil khempeuh amah in a vatmai hi." 
Psalms78:52 Tua ciangin amah in tua bangin ama mite gamlak ah paikhiat pihin, ganhing honpi bangin amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms78:53 Amah in a muanhuaina munah amaute paipih ahih manin amaute lau lo uh hi. Ahih hangin tuipi in amauʼ galte tuumcip hi. 
Psalms78:54 A khut taklam tawh ama ngah sa mual ahi, a gam siangtho ah amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms78:55 Amauʼ mai panin midangte hawl khia-in, amauteʼ luah ding neihsa hawmsak a, Israel minamte amauʼ buk sungah a tengsak hi." 
Psalms78:56 Ahi zongin amaute in Sangpen Pasian ze-etin lehdo uh a, ama thupiakna zui loin," 
Psalms78:57 a pu a pate uh mah bangin kihei khia-in a zuau gamtat uh hi. Thal gina lo bangin amaute a kihuiheek uh hi. 
Psalms78:58 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a mun sangte uh tawh amah a sin so nadingin phinphin uh a, amauʼ milim bawlte tawh ama hazat nading a piangsak uh hi." 
Psalms78:59 Pasian in a zak ciangin heh pha mahmah a, amah in Israel-te a nial siangtho hi." 
Psalms78:60 Mihingteʼ lakah ama omna puanbuk ahi, Shiloh khua-a ama omna biakinn nusia a," 
Psalms78:61 ama vangliatna, galteʼ tungah ap a, ama minthanna, galteʼ khut ah a pia hi." 
Psalms78:62 Amah in ama mite namsau tawh sisak a, ama luahte tungah a hehna a nga hi." 
Psalms78:63 Mei in a tangvalte kaang lum a, a nungakteʼ pasal ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Psalms78:64 Amauʼ siampite, namsau in puksak a, amauʼ zite in a pasalte kah zo lo uh hi." 
Psalms78:65 Tua ciangin Topa pen zukhamin a awng mi thahatpa, a ihmu tho bangin a khanglo hi." 
Psalms78:66 Amah in a langpangte zo a, a maizum tawntung dingin amaute a koih hi." 
Psalms78:67 Amah in Josefʼ suante nial a, Efraim minamte teel lo hi." 
Psalms78:68 Ahih hangin ama it Zion Mual, Judah minam a teel hi." 
Psalms78:69 A kip den dingin a phuh sa leitang bang leh, a vantung inn bangin ama biakinn a lam hi." 
Psalms78:70 Amah in ama mi Jakob, ama luah Israel a cing dingin, no a nei tuupite a cinna, tuubukte panin la-in, ama nasem David a teel hi." 
Psalms78:71  
Psalms78:72 Amah in lungsim thutang tawh amaute hoihtakin cingin, a siam mahmah a khut tawh amaute lam a lak hi." 
Psalms79:1 Pasian aw, na luah gam sungah dawi biate hong pai uh hi. Amaute in na biakinn siangtho ninsak gawp uh a, Jerusalem khuapi siasak gawp khin uh hi." 
Psalms79:2 Amaute in, na nasemteʼ luanghawmte huihlak vasate pia uh a, na mi siangthoteʼ sate leilak ganhingte a pia uh hi." 
Psalms79:3 Amaute in Jerusalem kimkot ah tui buakkhiat bangin amauteʼ sisan bua khia uh a, amaute a vui ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms79:4 Kote pen ka veengte uhʼ zahko, ka kiim uh a omte in a hong ko a hong nuihsat ka suak khinta uh hi." 
Psalms79:5 Topa aw, bang tanvei hi ding ahi hiam? Heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Nangma hazat hehna meikuang bangin kuang paisuak ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms79:6 Nangmah a hong thei lo minamte tung le, nangma tungah thu a hong ngen lo kumpi gamte tungah heh gawp in." 
Psalms79:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka mite uh that mang khin uh a, ka gam sung khempeuh uh susia gawp khin uh hi." 
Psalms79:8 Ka pu ka pate uh mawhna hangin ko a suanlekhakte hong lang ngaihsut kei inla, hong kiniamkoih ahih manin kote a huh dingin na hehpihna hong paisak mengmeng in." 
Psalms79:9 Kote a hong hon khia Pasian aw, nangma min a than nadingin kote hong huhin, nangma min hangin kote hong khah khia-in, ka mawhnate uh hong maisak ta in." 
Psalms79:10 “Amauteʼ Pasian koi ah om ahi hiam?” minam dangte in a cih ding kilawm ding ahi hiam? Na nasemteʼ sisan luang khia a phulakna pen, minam dangteʼ lak, komauʼ muhna ah kitheisak in." 
Psalms79:11 Thongkiateʼ tauna ngai inla, thah dingin a kisehte na vangliatna tawh kizui-in suaktasak in." 
Psalms79:12 Amaute in nang hong zahkona mah tawh ka veengte uhʼ ang sungah a zah sagihin thuk in, Topa!" 
Psalms79:13 Tua ciangin nangma mi, nangma gam sung tuu kote in nangma tungah lungdamna kong lak ngitnget ding uh a, a khangkhangin nangmah phatnate ka gengen ding uh hi." 
Psalms80:1 Tuu hon bangin Josef a paipih, Israel Tuucingpa aw, ngai in! Kherub tungah a tupa aw," 
Psalms80:2 Efraim, Benjamin le Manassehʼ mai ah taang khia in! Na tha saan inla, kote a hon khia dingin hong pai ta in." 
Psalms80:3 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms80:4 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na miteʼ thungetna ah bang tanvei sin so niloh ding na hi hiam?" 
Psalms80:5 Nangmah in a an dingun amaute tungah khitui na pia a, amauteʼ dawn dingin khitui tampi na pia hi." 
Psalms80:6 Nangmah in, ka veengte uhʼ thusim lohin kote na hong bawl a, ka galte un hong thusim loin hong nuihsan uh hi." 
Psalms80:7 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms80:8 Nangmah in Egypt panin leenggui khat na la a, minam dangte hawl khia-in, tua leenggui na suan hi." 
Psalms80:9 Nangmah in tua leenggui adingin leitang na hahsiang a, amah in zung thuk kha-in gam sung a dim hi." 
Psalms80:10 Ama liim in mual liante hoihtakin liimsun a, a hiang in taamtak sing liante hoihtakin khuh a," 
Psalms80:11 tuipi lamah a hiangte zamin, a dawnngekte in Gunpi lam a zuan hi." 
Psalms80:12 Tua ahih ciangin, lampi ah a pai mi khempeuh in a gah a lawh theih nadingin, bang hangin nangmah in a daigawl suvang na hi hiam?" 
Psalms80:13 Gamlak a om ngal in susia gawp a, zang sung sa khempeuh in kivakna-in nei uh hi." 
Psalms80:14 Hong kiheikik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Vantung panin hong en sukin hong mu in. Na khut taklam in a suan sa, hih leenggui hong don in." 
Psalms80:15  
Psalms80:16 Amaute in mei tawh halin sattan gawp uh hi. Amaute heh et inla, susia gawp in." 
Psalms80:17 Ahih hangin nangma adingin na hatsak miʼ tapa, na taklam a om mipa tungah na thahatna guan in." 
Psalms80:18 Tua ciangin nang kiang panin ka kiheikik nawn kei ding uh hi. Kote hong nungtasak in, nang kong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms80:19 Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Topa Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theih nadingin na maitang hong taangsak in." 
Psalms81:1 Eiteʼ thahatna Pasianʼ tungah nakpi takin la sa unla, Jakob Pasianʼ tungah lungdamin awng un." 
Psalms81:2 La khat phuangin, khuang no tumin, a ngaih laiza khausai lasakna le harp khausai lasakna limtakin tum un." 
Psalms81:3 Khadet, khalik, i pawi ni-in peengkul tum un." 
Psalms81:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh, tua bang hih ding pen Israel-te adingin thukham hi a, Jakob Pasianʼ biakna ngeina a kip khat ahi hi." 
Psalms81:5 Egypt gamah a pai lai-un Israel miteʼ tungah thupiakna-in amah in a neih ahi hi. Ka theih ngei loh kampau khat hih bangin ka za hi: 
Psalms81:6 “Na liangko uh a om na vangikte uh ka hong lakkhiatsak a, na khut uh a vangikte ka hong khiasak hi." 
Psalms81:7 Na cihmawh uh ciangin kei na hong sam uh a, keimah in note ka hong hon khia hi. A kilang lo vanging sung panin note kong dawng a, Meribah tui phualte ah note ka hong ze-et hi." 
Psalms81:8 Ka mite aw, note kong thuhilh laitakin limtakin hong ngai un. Israel-te aw, keima thu a hong ngai hi hoh le-uhcin!" 
Psalms81:9 Noteʼ lakah pasian dang om lo dinga, pasian dang khatʼ mai ah na kun kei ding uh hi." 
Psalms81:10 Egypt gam panin note a hong la khia, Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi. Na kam uh a golin ka un, keimah in kong dimsak ding hi." 
Psalms81:11 “Ahih hangin ka mite in keima thu hong ngai lo uh a, Israel-te in keima thu themkha zong zui lo uh hi." 
Psalms81:12 Tua ahih ciangin a ut bangun a gamta dingin amauʼ lungsim khauhna bangin ka gamtasak hi. 
Psalms81:13 Ka mite in ka thu hong ngai-in, keima deih bangin Israel a gamta hileh!" 
Psalms81:14 Amauʼ galte khempeuh ka zawhsak pak dinga, amauʼ galte langpangin ka khut ka liik ding hi." 
Psalms81:15 Kei a hong mudahte ka mai ah hong kun ding uh a, amauteʼ gim thuakna kip paisuak ding hi." 
Psalms81:16 Mangbuh hoih pen tawh note ka hong vak dinga, suangpi pan a khuaizu tawh note kong gilvahsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms82:1 Thu vaihawm kikhopna sungah Pasian in ama panmun hong len a, amah in pasian-teʼ lakah thu a khen hi." 
Psalms82:2 “Note in bang tanvei a man loin thu khenin, migilote tungah angvanna zang ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms82:3 A gina lo mite le pa a nei lo mite tungah thuman unla, a thuakte le a cimawhteʼ thu a manin khen un." 
Psalms82:4 A gina lo mite le a cimawh mite hon unla, migiloteʼ khut sung panin amaute hon khia un,” a ci hi." 
Psalms82:5 Amaute in thutheihna ahi a, thutelna ahi zongin bangmah nei lo uh a, khuamial sungah gamta uh ahih manin leitung bulpite khempeuh a kiliing gawp hi." 
Psalms82:6 Keʼn kong cih in ah, “Note khempeuh, Sangpen paʼ tate, pasian-te na hi uh hi." 
Psalms82:7 Ahi zongin mite bangin si-in, kumpi khat peuhpeuh bangin na kia ding uh hi,” kong ci hi." 
Psalms82:8 Pasian aw, tho in; leitung mite thu khen in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam khempeuh nangma aʼ ahi hi." 
Psalms83:1 Pasian aw, dai dide-in om kei in. Lungnuamin, tang loin om mawk kei in, Pasian aw." 
Psalms83:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte in gamlumna piangsak uh a, nang hong mudahte kiphasak mahmah uh hi." 
Psalms83:3 Amaute in khem siamna tawh na mite thangsiah uh a, amaute in na it mite langpangin thu kikum uh hi." 
Psalms83:4 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, minam khat hihna panin amaute beisak ni. Israel min peuhmah kiphawksak nawn kei ni!” ci uh hi." 
Psalms83:5 Amaute in siat nading geelin kithukhat uh a, nangmah hong langpangin thuciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms83:6 Edom mite le Ishmael mite, Moab le Hagri mite," 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, Ammon le Amalek mite, Filistia le Taia khua mite tawh thuciam a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms83:8 Assiria mite in zong amaute pawlpih uh a, amaute pen Lotʼ suanlekhakte adingin pawl muanhuaite ahi uh hi." 
Psalms83:9 Endor munah a kizo gawp, leilak ah a luang uh a muat gawp, Midian miteʼ tungah na bawl bang leh, Kishon gun-a Sisera le Jabin-teʼ tungah na bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl in." 
Psalms83:10  
Psalms83:11 “Pasianʼ gam hoihte eima tan dingin la ni,” a ci Oreb le Zeeb te bangin amauʼ mi liante bawl inla, Zeba le Zalmunna te bangin amau a ukte khempeuh bawl in." 
Psalms83:12  
Psalms83:13 Ka Pasian aw, amaute pen pingpei sunga ninnen, huih mai-a ansi leeng bangsak ta in." 
Psalms83:14 Mei in gamlak a hal tum bang, mual liante a kuansak bangin" 
Psalms83:15 na khuapi huihpi tawh amaute delh inla, na huihpi tawh amaute lausak gawp in." 
Psalms83:16 Topa aw, amaute in na min hong zon theih nadingin amaute khempeuh maizumna tawh kidimsak in." 
Psalms83:17 Amaute maizumin lungkia densak inla, a mindai-in siasak in." 
Psalms83:18 Topa a kici min nei nangmah bek leitung khempeuh ah a Sangpen pa na hihna amaute theisak in. 
Psalms84:1 Vanglian Topa aw, nangma teenna mun bangzah takin etlawm ahi hiam?" 
Psalms84:2 Keʼn ka lunggulh mahmah hi. Topaʼ huang sung ka lunggulh mahmah a, ka lungsim le ka pumpi a nungta Pasianʼ tungah lungdam mahmah in la a sa hi." 
Psalms84:3 Vanglian Topa, ka kumpi le ka Pasian aw, na biakna tau ah, kawlgit nangawn in a inn ding mu a, phialphiah in a om nading, a note a koih nading bu a mu hi." 
Psalms84:4 Nangma inn sungah teengin, nangmah phatna a sa ngitnget mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi." 
Psalms84:5 Nangma tung panin thahatna ngahin Zion zuatna lampi a tawn nuam mite thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi. 
Psalms84:6 Amaute in Kuam keu mun kantanin a pai laitakun tua kuam pen ciktui tampi tawh kidim a, guahzu masate in zong tua mun pen bualtuite tawh a kidimsak hi." 
Psalms84:7 Amaute a paikawmun a tha uh hat semsem a, pasian-teʼ Pasian Zion ah mu ding uh hi." 
Psalms84:8 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka thungetna hong ngai in, Jakob Pasian!" 
Psalms84:9 Pasian aw, kote a hong hu ding pa hong etsak inla, na sathau nilh pa hong kem in." 
Psalms84:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mun dangah ni tul khat om sangin nangma huang sungah ni khat om hoih zaw hi. Gitlohna inn sungah ka ten sangin ka Pasianʼ inn kongcing pa ka hi nuam zaw hi. 
Psalms84:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian pen eite a hong hupa a minthang i kumpi hi a, maipha le pahtawina a hong pia pa ahi hi. Thumanin a gamta mite tungah Topa in na hoih bangmah siit lo hi." 
Psalms84:12 Vanglian Topa aw, nangmah a hong muang mite, thupha ngah mi ahi uh hi." 
Psalms85:1 Topa aw, nangma leitang na hehpih a, Jakobʼ nopsaknate a ngeina na bangsakkik hi." 
Psalms85:2 Na miteʼ mawhna na maisak a, amauʼ khialhna khempeuh na maisak hi." 
Psalms85:3 Na hehna khempeuh na damsak a, na sinsona na daisak hi." 
Psalms85:4 Kote hong hon khia Pasian aw, kote ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik inla, kote tunga na lungkim lohna hong beisak ta in." 
Psalms85:5 Koteʼ tungah heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? Khang tawntungin heh paisuak ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms85:6 Kote in nangmah kong phat theih nadingun ko na mite hong nungtasakkik lo ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms85:7 Topa aw, kote tungah na itna kip hong lak inla, hong huhin hong hon in." 
Psalms85:8 Topa Pasianʼ thugen ding hong zasak dih un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama lamah lungsim takpi tawh a kihei ama mi siangtho, ama miteʼ tungah kilemna thu a gen ding hi." 
Psalms85:9 I gam sungah minthanna a om theih nadingin amah a zahtakte adingin ama hong hotkhiatna hong om takpi hi. 
Psalms85:10 Itna kip le thutak kigawm dinga, thuman le kilemna kihual ding uh hi." 
Psalms85:11 Leilak panin thutak hong po khia dinga, vantung panin thuman in hong en suk ding hi." 
Psalms85:12 Topa in a hoih nate eite tungah hong pia dinga, i leitang in hauhna piangsak ding hi." 
Psalms85:13 Topaʼ mai ah thuman na ma pai dinga, ama lampi a bawl khol ding hi." 
Psalms86:1 Topa aw, kei hehpihhuai-in cimawh ka hih manin na bil hong ngat inla, hong dawng in." 
Psalms86:2 Mihoih ka hih manin kei hong kem in. Nangmah a hong muang na nasem pa hong hon in. 
Psalms86:3 Nang pen ka Pasian na hi hi. Topa aw, sun tawntung hong kiko ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in." 
Psalms86:4 Topa aw, nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin na nasem pa hong kipaaksak in." 
Psalms86:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah hoihin mawhna na maisak a, hong ngente khempeuh tungah itna kip tampi na nei hi." 
Psalms86:6 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, nang tungah thumin kong kikona hong ngai in." 
Psalms86:7 Kei hong dawng na hih manin ka haksat hun ciangin nangma tungah kong ngen hi. 
Psalms86:8 Topa aw, pasian-te lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo a, nangma sep bang, kuamah in sem thei lo hi." 
Psalms86:9 Topa aw, na bawl sa minam khempeuh hong pai-in na mai ah hong kun ding uh a, nangma min hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms86:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah lianin nalamdangte na bawl a, nang bek Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms86:11 Topa aw, nang tungah hong thumanin nangma lampi ka zuih theih nadingin kei hong hilh inla, nangma min a zahtakte tawh keima lungsim pum khat hong bangsak in." 
Psalms86:12 Topa ka Pasian aw, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na tungah ka lungdam a, nangma min ka thangsak ngitnget ding hi." 
Psalms86:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah na hong itna kip lian mahmah a, Leinuai thuk sung panin kei nong hon khia khin hi." 
Psalms86:14 Pasian aw, mi kihisakte, kei langpangin hong kipan hi. Thu-helhawt mi pawl khat in kei, thah hong sawm uh a, amaute in nang hong thudon lo uh hi." 
Psalms86:15 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a hehpih thei, a dik Pasian na hi a, heh hak mahmah in, itna kip le thumanna tawh a kidim na hi hi." 
Psalms86:16 Kei lamah hong kihei inla, kei hong hehpih in. Na nasem pa thahatsak inla, na nasem numeiʼ tapa hong hon in." 
Psalms86:17 Topa nangmah in kei hong huhin, nong thahatsakna hangin, kei hong mudahte in mu-in a zahhuai nadingun keima tungah na maipha hong lak in." 
Psalms87:1 Mual Siangtho tungah ama phuh sa khuapi om hi. 
Psalms87:2 Topa in Israel gam mun dang khempeuhte sangin Zion kulh kongpi it zaw hi. 
Psalms87:3 Pasianʼ khuapi aw, na minthanna teng hong kigengen hi." 
Psalms87:4 Kei hong theite lakah Egypt le Babylon ka hel hi. Filistia, Taia le Ethiopia te zong kihel a, “Hihte pen hua lai mah panin a piang ahi hi,” kici ding hi." 
Psalms87:5 Zion tawh kisai-in ahihleh, “Minam khempeuh ama sung pan a suak ahi hi,” kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Sangpen pa mahmah in amah kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms87:6 Topa in, “Hihte pen hua lai-a suak,” ci-in minam khempeuh ciamtehin a gelh ding hi." 
Psalms87:7 Tua sunga teeng mite in, “Koteʼ lungdamna khempeuh nangma sungah om hi,” ci ciat ding uh hi." 
Psalms88:1 Topa, ka Pasian aw, sunin huhna kong ngen a, zan hun sungin nangma mai ah kong kiko hi." 
Psalms88:2 Ka thungetna hong za inla, nong huh ding ka hong ngetna hong ngai in." 
Psalms88:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh lungkhamna tampi thuakin, ka si dektak hi." 
Psalms88:4 Kei pen a sidek mi tawh ka kibang ta a, ka thahatna khempeuh bei mang khinta hi." 
Psalms88:5 Misite lakah a kinusia, a kithat lum, han sunga lum, na huh zawh ahi nawn lo, na phawk nawn lohte ka bang ta hi." 
Psalms88:6 Kei pen, mialin a thukna mun, Leihawm thuk sungah nong koih khinta hi." 
Psalms88:7 Nangma hehna keima tungah gik mahmah a, na tuihualte khempeuh tawh kei na hong vukcip hi." 
Psalms88:8 Ka kikholh pih mite in kei a hong pelh dingin na hong bawl a, amaute tungah a cikzethuai khatin kei na hong bawl hi. Ka suahtak theih loh nadingin kei hong kikhumcip a," 
Psalms88:9 ka gim thuakna hangin ka mit a mial ta hi. Topa aw, nisimin nangma tungah kong ngen a, thu ngenin ka khutte nangma lamah kong zan hi." 
Psalms88:10 A si sate adingin nalamdang a bawl na hi hiam? Nangmah a phat dingin mi a si khin sate hong tho ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms88:11 Han sungah na itna kip kigen dinga, siatna munah nangma thumannate kigen ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms88:12 Khua mialna sungah na nalamdangte kithei a, mangngilhna gam sungah na hotkhiat huhna kithei ahi hiam?" 
Psalms88:13 Ahih hangin Topa aw, na tungah huhna kong ngen a, zingsang simin na mai ah thu kong ngen hi." 
Psalms88:14 Topa aw, bang hangin kei hong paai khia na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei kiang panin na maitang seel na hi hiam?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka neu tung a kipan gim thuakin ka si dektak hi. Nong gimpiakte ka thuak a, ka cih nading mel ka thei nawn kei hi." 
Psalms88:16 Nangma hehna in keimah hong nawk gawp khin a, a lauhuai mahmah nangma hong suk gawpna in kei hong susia ta hi." 
Psalms88:17 Amaute in tuikhang bangin sun tawntungin kei hong umcih uh a, kei hong tuamcip uh hi." 
Psalms88:18 Kei hong itte le ka lawmte keimah nong pelhsak khin a, khuamial bekbek, keima kikholh pih ahi hi." 
Psalms89:1 Topa aw, na itna kip la-in ka sa tawntung dinga, nangma thutakna ka gen tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma itna kip tawntung a, na thutakna zong vantung bangin kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms89:3 Nangmah in, “Ka teelpa tawh thuciamna ka bawl zo a, ka nasem David tungah thu ka ciam zo hi:" 
Psalms89:4 ‘Na suan na khakte kumpi-in ka kipsak dinga, na kumpi gam khang tawntungin ka kipsak ding hi,’” na ci khin hi." 
Psalms89:5 Topa aw, na nasepna a lamdangte, vantungte phatsak inla, mi siangthoteʼ kikhopna sungah na thumanna phatsak in." 
Psalms89:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen vantung a kua tawh kiteh thei ding ahi hiam? Mi siangthoteʼ kikhopna sungah a kizahtak Pasian, a kiim a omte khempeuh tungah lianin a zahtakhuai Topa pen van miteʼ lakah kua pen tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:7  
Psalms89:8 Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na khempeuh ah na thutak a, nangmah bangin a vanglian kua om ahi hiam, Topa aw." 
Psalms89:9 Nang in tuipi khang na uk a, a tuihualte a san ciangin na daisak hi." 
Psalms89:10 Nangmah in a kithat lum sa luanghawm khat bangin ganhing golpi Rahab na su gawp a, na thahatna tawh na galte na zo gawp hi." 
Psalms89:11 Vantungte nangma aʼ hi a, leitung zong nangma aʼ mah ahi hi. Leitung le a sunga om khempeuh nangma phuh sa ahi hi." 
Psalms89:12 Saklam le khanglamte nangma bawl sa hi a, Tabor mual le Hermon mual in lungdamna tawh na min hong phat uh hi." 
Psalms89:13 Nangma vang lian mahmah a, na thahatna kigen thei lo hi." 
Psalms89:14 Thuman le thutang tawh na ukna za na phut a, itna kip le thuman tawh na khempeuh na sem hi." 
Psalms89:15 Topa aw, lungdamin lasakna tawh nang hong bia a, na migitna khuavak sungah nuam takin a nungta, nangma hangin sun thapai-in lungdam a, nangma hoihna hong phat mite mi nuamsa ahi uh hi." 
Psalms89:16  
Psalms89:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in nakpi takin kote na hong gualzosak a, kote hong angvanin na hong gualzosak hi." 
Psalms89:18 Kote a hong hu Topa hi a, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pasian nangmah in ka kumpipa uh nong pia hi." 
Psalms89:19 Hun lui lai-in na thuman mipa tungah mang sungah thu na gen a, “A vanglian khat pa tungah lukhu ka koih khinzo a, mite lak panin a kiteng khia mi khat ka liansak zo hi." 
Psalms89:20 Ka nasem pa David ka mu zo hi. Ka thahatna ama tungah a om ngitnget theih nading, ka vangliatna in zong, amah a tha khauhsak theih nadingin ka sathau siangtho amah ka nilh khin hi." 
Psalms89:21  
Psalms89:22 Galte in amah khem zo ngei lo dinga, migilote in zong amah zo ngei lo ding uh hi." 
Psalms89:23 Ama mai ah a galte ka su gawp dinga, amah a mudahte ka sat puk ding hi." 
Psalms89:24 Amah it tawntungin ama tungah ka thutak dinga, amah a gualzo-in ka bawl tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:25 Mediterranean Tuipi a kipan Eufratis Gunpi dong amah ka uksak ding hi. 
Psalms89:26 Amah in kei kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima Pa le ka Pasian na hi a, kei a hong hon khia pa le a hong hupa na hi hi,’ hong ci ding hi." 
Psalms89:27 Keimah in amah ta upa penin ka bawl dinga, leitung kumpite lakah a lian penin ka bawl ding hi." 
Psalms89:28 Amah ka itna ka kipsak tawntung dinga, ama tungah ka thuciamna ka kipsak tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms89:29 Ama suanlekhakte kumpi ka hisak ngitnget dinga, a ukna za, vantung bangin ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms89:30 “Ama tate in ka thukhamte nusia-in, ka biakna ngeina kip om bangin a gamtat kei uh a, amaute in ka ngeina siasakin ka thupiak a zuih kei uh leh, amauteʼ thupalsatna hangin ciang tawh gim ka pia dinga, amauʼ mawhnate hangin satna tawh gim ka pia ding hi." 
Psalms89:31  
Psalms89:32  
Psalms89:33 Ahih hangin amah ka itna ka khiam kei dinga, ka thuciamna ka kipelhsak kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:34 Ka thuciamna siasak loin, ka kam pan a paikhia thute ka kheel kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:35 “A tawntung a kimang dingin ka sianthona tawh khatvei ka kiciam khin a, Davidʼ tungah ka zuau kei ding hi." 
Psalms89:36 Ama suanlekhakte kizom paisuak dinga, van a ni a taan lai teng a kumpi gam ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms89:37 Khapi bangin tua pen kipsuak dinga, vantung a om lai teng kip ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms89:38 Ahih hangin tu-in amah nialin na lawn khia a, na sathau nilh paʼ tungah na heh mahmah hi." 
Psalms89:39 Na nasem pa tawh na thuciamna na pelh khin a, ama kumpi lukhu leivui lakah na paihsak hi." 
Psalms89:40 Ama kulhte khempeuh na sukham khin a, ama galpanmun kipte a sia na suah khin hi." 
Psalms89:41 A pai khempeuh in ama nate sut gawp uh a, amah pen a veengteʼ nuihsat a suak hi." 
Psalms89:42 Ama galte na gualzosak a, ama galte na lungdamsak khin hi." 
Psalms89:43 Ama galhiamte a mawkna na suaksak a, gal kidona ah amah na guallelsak hi." 
Psalms89:44 Nangmah in ama khut panin a kumpi ciangkhut na la khia a, a kumpi tokhom leilak na denna hi." 
Psalms89:45 Nangmah in a teek hun nai lopi-in amah na teeksak a, maizumna tawh na kidimsak hi." 
Psalms89:46 Topa aw, nang bang tanvei bucip den ding na hi hiam? Na hehna bang tanvei meikuang bangin kuangkuang ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:47 Topa aw, nuntak hun a tom mahmah lam hong phawk in. Mihingte a mawk nadingin bawl na hi hiam?" 
Psalms89:48 A si thei lo kua om ahi hiam? Sihna hankhuk panin kua suakta zo ahi hiam? 
Psalms89:49 Topa aw, na thumanna tawh David tunga na thuciamna, hun lui lai-a na itna kip koi ah om ta ahi hiam?" 
Psalms89:50 Topa aw, na nasem pa bangzah takin hong kithusim lohna, galte in phinna-in a hong neihna, Topa aw, amaute in na sathau nilh pa a paina khempeuh ah a hong nuihsatna uh hong phawk ta in." 
Psalms89:51  
Psalms89:52 Topa in thupha ngah tawntung tahen. Amen! Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Topa aw, khang tawntungin koteʼ omna mun na hi hi." 
Psalms90:2 Mual liante a kipiansak ma, leitang le leitung na bawl ma pek, a tawntung a kipan a tawntung dongin Pasian na hi hi." 
Psalms90:3 Mi, leivui na suaksakkik a, “Mihingte aw, ciahkik un,” na ci hi." 
Psalms90:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma muhna ah kum tul khat a bei ciangin zanni ahi a, zan ihmut laitakin khanlawh khat sung tawh ahi zongin a kibang bek hi." 
Psalms90:5 Nangmah in mite na phiat khia hi. Amaute pen a ihmu tawh kibang uh a, zingsangin a nokik lopa tawh kibang uh hi." 
Psalms90:6 Zingsangin palhin thaksuakkik a, nitak ciangin vulin a keu uh hi." 
Psalms90:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma sinsona in kote hong susia a, na hehluatna in kote hong lausak gawp hi." 
Psalms90:8 Nangmah in ka mawhnate uh na mai ah na koih a, ka khialh simnate uh na maitang ah na koih hi." 
Psalms90:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun khempeuh uh na hehna-in bei a, ka nuntak hun uh husan khat bangin a bei hi." 
Psalms90:10 Koteʼ nuntak sung kum sawm sagih bang hi a, cidam le-ung kum sawm giat bang hi thei hi. Ahih hangin tua hunsung nangawn gimna le haksatna hi a, tua hunte bei pakin kote ka maimang uh hi." 
Psalms90:11 Nang hong kizahtak nadingin na sinsonaʼ vangliatna kua in thei a, na hehnaʼ husiatna kua in thei ahi hiam?" 
Psalms90:12 Tua ahih ciangin pilna lungsim ka ngah theih nadingun ka nuntak hun uh a tomlam ka theih nadingun hong hilh in. 
Psalms90:13 Topa aw, hong kiheikik in. Bang tan sauvei ding hiam? Na nasemte hong hehpih in." 
Psalms90:14 Ka nuntak tawntung uh lungdamin ka kipak theih nadingun zingsangin na itna kip tawh kote hong lungkimsak in. 
Psalms90:15 Kote nong gimsak ni zah, siatna ka thuak uh kum phazah mah, kote hong kipaaksak in." 
Psalms90:16 Na nasemte tungah na nasepna, a tate uh tungah na minthanna, na vang hong kilangsak in." 
Psalms90:17 Koteʼ Topa Pasian aw, kote tungah na thupha hong tungsak inla, koteʼ nasepna khempeuh hong tangtungsak in." 
Psalms91:1 Sangpen paʼ liahna sung, Vanglian paʼ liim sungah a om mi khempeuh in" 
Psalms91:2 Topaʼ tungah, “Ka bukna le ka munkip muanhuai, ka muan ka Pasian na hi hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Psalms91:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thangsiah paʼ thangzak le a lauhuai pulnatna panin nang hong hon khia ding hi. 
Psalms91:4 Amah in a khate tawh nang hong tuam dinga, ama khateʼ nuai ah bukna ding na mu ding hi. Ama thumanna in nang hong dalin hong hu ding hi." 
Psalms91:5 Nangmah in zan a lauhuaina, sun-a thaltang leengte, khuamial lakah a vak khiankhian pulnatna, sun nitaang a suksiatnate na kihta kei ding hi." 
Psalms91:6  
Psalms91:7 Na kiangah mi tul khat, na kimkot ah mi tul sawm, hong tukin a sih hangin bangmah na ci kei ding hi." 
Psalms91:8 Na mit tawh na en bek dinga, migilote a kithukkikna na mu ding hi." 
Psalms91:9 Nangmah in Topa pen na buk nadingin bawlin, Sangpen pa, nang a hong hu dingin bawl khin na hih manin" 
Psalms91:10 nangma tungah siatna hong tung lo dinga, na inn sungah gimna hong tung lo ding hi." 
Psalms91:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong cing dingin amah in ama vantungmi nang hong kemsak ding hi. 
Psalms91:12 Na khete le suang a kitah khak loh nadingin amaute in a khut uh tawh nang hong dom ding uh hi. 
Psalms91:13 Nangmah in humpinelkai le gul gunei tung na tawn dinga, na khe nuai ah humpinelkai khanglai le gulpi na tuancil ding hi." 
Psalms91:14 Itna tawh hong bel ahih manin amah ka hon khia dinga, ka min hong thei ahih manin mun sangna ah amah ka koih ding hi." 
Psalms91:15 Amah in hong sap ciangin amah ka dawng ding hi. Haksatna sungah amah ka ompih dinga, amah hon khia-in ka pahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms91:16 Nuntak sau tawh amah ka lungkimsak dinga, amah ka hon khia ding hi." 
Psalms92:1 Sangpen pa aw, Topa tungah lungdamna lah ding, nangma minphatna la sak dingin kilawm a, zang sawm khausai lasakna le harp lasakna, laiza lasaknate tumin, zingsangin nangma itna kip, zanin na thumanna genkhiat dingin a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms92:2  
Psalms92:3  
Psalms92:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangma sepna tawh kei nong lungdamsak a, nangma sepnate hangin lungdamin la ka sa hi." 
Psalms92:5 Topa aw, na nasepnate lian mahmah a, na ngaihsutnate thuk mahmah hi." 
Psalms92:6 Migilote, lopa bangin sel khia-in, siatna bawl khempeuh a punʼ mahmah hangun, a tawntungin siatna a thuak ding uh ahi hi. Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a sangna ah a om den na hihna thu, lungsimmawl mi in theithei lo a, lungsim tei lo mi in tel thei lo hi." 
Psalms92:7  
Psalms92:8  
Psalms92:9 Topa aw, na galte si ta ding! Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte bei mang dinga, siatna a bawl khempeuhte kithehthang ding uh hi." 
Psalms92:10 Ahih hangin nangmah in zangsial bangin kei na hong hatsak a, kei thupha hong pia-in nong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms92:11 Ka galteʼ pukna ka mit in mu khinta a, keimah a hong do a giloteʼ siatna ka bil in za khinta hi." 
Psalms92:12 Nisuh kung bangin thuman mi palh a, Lebanon mual tunga om taamtak kung bangin a khang hi." 
Psalms92:13 Topaʼ inn sungah amaute kisuan a, i Pasianʼ huang sungah amaute palh uh hi." 
Psalms92:14 Topa thutang hi, ci-in a lah nadingun amaute teek napi-in gah lailai uh a, amaute tui kiuhkeuhin hing sitset uh hi. Amah pen kei hong hupa hi a, ama sungah thuman lohna om lo hi." 
Psalms92:15  
Psalms93:1 Topa in uk a, vangliatna kumpi puan kisilhsak hi. Topa, kumpi puan kisilhsak a, thahatna tawh amah kidim hi. Leitung kikipsak a, kiliing ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms93:2 Tanglai pek panin na tokhom a kip sa hi a, nang pen a tawntung a om na hi hi." 
Psalms93:3 Topa aw, gunte hong khangin, a aw uh hong sangsak a, nakpi takin hong ging hi." 
Psalms93:4 A sangna munah a om Topa vanglian hi. Tui tampi gingte sangin vanglian zaw a, tuipi hualte sangin vanglian zaw hi." 
Psalms93:5 Na thupiaknate kip mahmah hi. Topa aw, sianthona pen a tawntungin na inn tawh a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms94:1 A thukkik Pasian, a thukkik Pasian, Topa aw, na hehna hong lak khia in." 
Psalms94:2 Tho in, leitung thukhen pa aw, a kiphasak mite tungah amauʼ ngah ding a kilawm gimna pia ta in." 
Psalms94:3 Topa aw, migilote bang tanvei lungdam ding uh a, migilote bang tanvei lungnuamin omom lai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:4 Gamtat siate bang tanvei kihisak lai ding uh a, a siat gamtatna uh bang tanvei kisialh pih lai ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:5 Topa aw, amaute in nangma mite su gawp uh a, nangma luahte gimsak uh hi." 
Psalms94:6 Amaute in meigong numeite le khual mite that lumin pa nei lote suam lum uh hi. 
Psalms94:7 Amaute in, “ Topa in mu lo hi; Jakob Pasian in thei lo hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms94:8 Thei tel un, mi lungsimmawl pente aw! Lung pil lote aw, cik ciangin pil ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Psalms94:9 I bil a bawlpa in khua za lo ding ahi hiam? I mit a piangsak pa in khua mu lo ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms94:10 Minamte a thuhilhpa in mi thuhilh lo ding ahi hiam? Mihingte tungah theihtheihna a hilh Topa in mihingteʼ ngaihsutna thei a, amaute pen husan bang bek ahihna teltakin a thei hi." 
Psalms94:11  
Psalms94:12 Topa aw, migilote adingin gum khat a kitawh hun mateng, haksat hun sungteng a tawlngak theih nadingin na thukham na hilh mi, na thuhilh mi, mi nuamsa ahi hi." 
Psalms94:13  
Psalms94:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite nusia lo dinga, ama luahte paidak lo ding hi." 
Psalms94:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh thutang pen thuman mite tungah hong tungkik dinga, lungsim thutang khempeuh in amah zui ding uh hi." 
Psalms94:16 Kei adingin migilote a do dingin kua kipan ahi hiam? Kei adingin siatna a bawlteʼ lang khat ah kua ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms94:17 Topa in kei hong huh lo hileh, gam khing sungah ka tung khinta ding hi." 
Psalms94:18 Topa aw, “Ka khe taal,” ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin na itna kip in kei hong kai to hi." 
Psalms94:19 Ka lungsim ngaihsutna a tam mahmah ciangin kei na hong hehnem a, na hong lungdamsak hi." 
Psalms94:20 Sih nading ngeina a bawl, a gilo gam ukte, nang tawh kipawl ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms94:21 Amaute in thuman mihoihte thah sawm uh a, a mawhbaang lo mite sihna thuaksak uh hi." 
Psalms94:22 Ahih hangin Topa pen keima munkip, keima Pasian, ka belh suangpi a suak khinta hi." 
Psalms94:23 Amah in amauʼ mawhnate amauʼ tung mahah tungsakkikin, a gitlohna hangun amaute a maimangsak ding hi. Topa, i Pasian in amaute maimangsak ding hi." 
Psalms95:1 Hong pai un, Topa phat ni. Eite a hong hu, a hong hon khia pa tungah lungdamna la sa ni." 
Psalms95:2 Ama omna ah lungdamna ko-in pai ni. Phatna late, ama tungah lungdam takin sa ni." 
Psalms95:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a lian Pasian hi a, pasian khempeuh tungah Kumpi lianpa ahi hi." 
Psalms95:4 Amah in leitung khempeuh uk a, guam thuk pen panin mual sang pen dawn dongin amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms95:5 Ama bawl sa tuipite uk a, ama bawl sa leitung zong amah in a uk hi." 
Psalms95:6 Hong pai un, amah bia-in kun ni. Eite hong Bawl Topaʼ mai ah khukdin ni." 
Psalms95:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen eiteʼ Pasian hi a, eite pen ama hong kep mite le ama khut sunga om a tuute ihi hi. Tu ni-in hih bangin ama hong thugen za un:" 
Psalms95:8 Amaute in ka nasepna mu khin uh hi napi, Meribah le Massah munah na pate un kei hong ze-etin, gamtatna tawh ka lah ding hong kalh hun lai uh bangin, note in na lungsim uh khauhsak kei un." 
Psalms95:9  
Psalms95:10 Kum sawm li sung tua minam ka kih a, “Amaute pen a lungsim uh ah a khial mi hi a, amaute in ka thupiakte mang lo uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms95:11 Tua ahih ciangin keima nopsakna munah amaute a lut lo dingin sin so kawmin ka kiciam hi. 
Psalms96:1 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topa tungah la thak khat sa un. Topa tungah la sa un." 
Psalms96:2 Topa tungah la sa unla, ama min phat un. Ni khat khit ni khat ama hong hotkhiatna thu gen tawntung un." 
Psalms96:3 Ama minthanna minamte lakah gen unla, ama nalamdang septe mi khempeuh lakah pulak un." 
Psalms96:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian a, nakpi takin phat ding ahi hi; pasian dangte khempeuh sangin amah zahtak zawk ding ahi hi." 
Psalms96:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam dangteʼ pasian khempeuh milim hi lel a, ahih hangin Topa ahihleh vantungte a bawlpa ahi hi." 
Psalms96:6 Pahtawina le liatnate ama mai ah om a, hatna le hoihnate ama omna mun siangtho ah om hi." 
Psalms96:7 Minamkimte aw, Topa in minthanna le hatna nei hi, ci-in mang un. Topa in nei hi, ci-in mang un." 
Psalms96:8 Ama min in a ngah dingin a kilawm minthanna Topaʼ tungah pia unla, biakpiakna hong kengin ama huang sungah hong pai un." 
Psalms96:9 Puan siangtho silhin Topa bia un. Leitung mi khempeuh aw, ama mai ah liing un." 
Psalms96:10 Minam khempeuh lakah thu gen kawikawi unla, “ Topa in uk hi. Leitung kikipsak a, kiliing ngei lo ding hi. Amah in mihingteʼ thu a manin khen ding hi,” ci un." 
Psalms96:11 Vantung mite kipak henla, leitung mite lungdam hen. Tuipi le a sunga om khempeuh awng ta uh hen." 
Psalms96:12 Lo le a sunga om khempeuh nuamin diang uh hen. Gamlak a sing om khempeuh in Topaʼ mai ah lungdamin la sa hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hong pai ta hi. Leitung miteʼ thu a khen dingin hong pai ta hi. Amah in thumanna tawh leitung ukin miteʼ thu ahi bangin khen ding hi. 
Psalms96:13  
Psalms97:1 Topa in uk hi. Leitung lungdam henla, tuikulh neu tampite zong lungdam ta uh hen." 
Psalms97:2 Meiipite le khuamial sahpite ama kiimah om a, thumanna le thutannate ama tokhom bulpi ahi hi." 
Psalms97:3 Ama mai ah mei pai a, ama kiim a om a galte a kaang tum hi." 
Psalms97:4 Ama khuaphialepte in leitung taangsak a, leitung in mu-in a liing hi." 
Psalms97:5 Topaʼ mai, leitung mi khempeuhʼ Topaʼ mai ah mual liante khuainun bangin a tui suak uh hi." 
Psalms97:6 Vantungte in ama thumanna gen khia uh a, mi khempeuh in ama minthanna mu uh hi." 
Psalms97:7 Bangmah a man lo milimte a kisaktheih pih, milim a bia mi khempeuhte maizumin kikoih a, ama mai ah pasian khempeuh kun uh hi." 
Psalms97:8 Pasian aw, Zion in za-in nuam a, na thukhennate hangin Judah khuapite lungdam uh hi." 
Psalms97:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, leitung khempeuh a ukpa na hi a, pasian dang khempeuh sangin nakpi takin na lian zaw hi." 
Psalms97:10 Topa in gitlohna a mudahte it a, amah in a mi siangthoteʼ nuntakna siat nading pan a kem hi. Amah in migiloteʼ khut sung panin amaute a hon khia hi." 
Psalms97:11 Thuman miteʼ tungah khuavak hong taang a, lungsim thutang mite tungah lungdamna hong tung hi." 
Psalms97:12 Thuman mite aw, Topaʼ nasepnate hangin lungdam unla, ama min siangtho phat un." 
Psalms98:1 Amah in nalamdangte bawl ahih manin Topaʼ tungah la thak sa un. Ama khut taklam le ama khut siangthote in amah gualzosak hi. 
Psalms98:2 Topa in ama gualzawhna kitheisak khinzo a, amah in minamteʼ muhna ah ama thumanna langsak khin hi." 
Psalms98:3 Amah thutakin, it tawntungna nei ahih manin Israel-te tungah a thuciamna a tungsak hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in eiteʼ Pasianʼ gualzawhna mu khinta uh hi." 
Psalms98:4 Leitung mi khempeuh aw, Topaʼ tungah lungdamin la sa-in lungdamin awng khia unla, phatna la sa un." 
Psalms98:5 Laiza lasakna tawh Topaʼ tungah phatna late sa unla, laiza lasakna le la ngaih tawh phat un." 
Psalms98:6 Peengkulte le saki aw tawh Topa, Kumpipaʼ mai ah lungdamna gingsak un." 
Psalms98:7 Tuipi le a sunga omte khempeuh aw, awng unla, leitung le a tunga teng khempeuhte aw, la sa un." 
Psalms98:8 Gunte aw, na khut uh beeng un. Mualte aw, Topaʼ mai ah lungdamin la sa un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung a uk dingin amah hong pai ta a, thumanna tawh leitung miteʼ thu ahi ding bangin hong khen ding hi." 
Psalms98:9  
Psalms99:1 Topa in uk hi. Mihonte liing hen. Kherub-te tungah amah tu hi. Leitung liing tahen. 
Psalms99:2 Zion khuapi ah Topa lian a, amah in leitung mi khempeuh uk hi." 
Psalms99:3 A lian a kihtakhuai ama min mi khempeuh in phat ta uh hen. Amah siangtho hi. 
Psalms99:4 Thutang a deih, Vanglian Kumpipa aw, nangmah in thuman na phut khin a, Israel-te sungah thutang le thuman na sem khia hi." 
Psalms99:5 I Topa Pasian phat unla, ama khengakna munah bia un. Amah siangtho hi." 
Psalms99:6 Moses le Aaron ama siampi hi uh a, amah a biate lakah Samuel zong a kihel hi. Topaʼ tungah amaute kiko uh a, amah in amaute a dawng hi." 
Psalms99:7 Amah in meii khuampi sung pan amaute tungah thu gen a, ama teci pannate le amah in amaute tungah a thukham piakte amaute in a zui uh hi." 
Psalms99:8 Koteʼ Topa Pasian aw, nang in amaute na dawng hi. Amauʼ mawhna hangin gim na piak tei hangin amauʼ mawhnate a maisak nuam Pasian na hihna amauteʼ tungah na kilangsak hi." 
Psalms99:9 I Topa Pasian phat unla, ama mual siangtho ah bia un; bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Pasian a siangtho hi." 
Psalms100:1 Gam khempeuh aw, Topaʼ tungah lungdamna aw gingsak un." 
Psalms100:2 Lungdamna tawh Topaʼ na sem un. Ama omna ah la sa kawmin hong pai un. 
Psalms100:3 Topa, Pasian ahihna thei un. Eite hong bawlpa amah hi a, eite ama aʼ ihi hi. Eite ama mi ihi a, ama gankhahna sunga om a tuute ihi hi." 
Psalms100:4 Lungdamkohna tawh ama kongpi ah lut unla, amah phatna tawh ama huang sungah tum un. Ama tungah lungdam ko unla, ama min phat un." 
Psalms100:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih hi. Ama itna kipin kho tawntung a, ama thumanna a khangkhangin kip hi." 
Psalms101:1 Keima la pen thumanna le thutanna la ahi hi. Nang ka hong sak ding hi; Topa aw, kong sak ding hi." 
Psalms101:2 Paubaanna a om lo thu bek ka kin ding hi. Cik ciangin kei kiangah hong pai ding na hi hiam? Lungsim hoihna tawh ka inn sungah ka gamta ding hi. 
Psalms101:3 A sia na peuhmah ka deih kei ding hi. Lam khial miteʼ nasepna ka mudah a, tuate tawh ka kisu kha kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:4 Lungsim kawina ka deih het kei a, siatna, ngaihsutin zong ka nei kha kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:5 A veengte a gen sia sim mite ka susia dinga, kiphatsakna, kihihsakna lungsim a nei mi ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Psalms101:6 Leitungah a thuman mite kei tawh a om theih nadingin maipha ka pia dinga, paubaanna om loin a gamta mi in keima na hong sem ding hi." 
Psalms101:7 Khemna a zang mi peuhmah keima inn ah teeng lo dinga, zuau thu a gen mi peuhmah keima omna ah om thei nawn lo ding hi." 
Psalms101:8 Zingsang simin leitung a migilote khempeuh ka susia dinga, Topaʼ khuapi panin siatna bawlte khempeuh ka khen khia ding hi." 
Psalms102:1 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, ka thumna hong ngai in." 
Psalms102:2 Ka cihmawh hunin kei kiang panin bu kei in. Keima lam hong nga inla, kong sap ciangin hong dawng pah in." 
Psalms102:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntakna, meikhu bangin bei mang a, ka pumpi meikuang bangin a sa hi." 
Psalms102:4 Lungkham luatna hangin lopa bangin ka keutum a, an nangawn ka ne zo kei hi." 
Psalms102:5 A gingin ka tautauna hangin ka guh guakin ka om hi. 
Psalms102:6 Gamlak a om musane le mun kolhna ah a om simbu tawh ka kibang hi. 
Psalms102:7 Ihmu thei loin ka om a, innkhum dawna vasa khat guak a om tawh ka kibang hi." 
Psalms102:8 Sun nilohin ka galte in kei hong zahko uh a, kei hong simmawhte in samsiatna-in ka min a zang uh hi." 
Psalms102:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh vut bek ka annek hi ta a, na thangpaihna le na hehna hangin ka tuidawnte khitui tawh kihel hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in kei hong dom to napi-in lei nong denna hi." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Keima nuntakna pen nitak lam a a om niliim tawh kibang lel a, lopa bangin ka vul gawp hi." 
Psalms102:12 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na kip ngitnget a, khang tawntungin nang hong kiphawkna kip hi." 
Psalms102:13 Nangmah tho-in Zion khua na hehpih ding hi. Amah na angvan hun ding hi ta a, a kiciangtan sa hun hong tung khin hi." 
Psalms102:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasemte in tua khua suangtumte it uh a, a leivuite nangawn pammaih sa uh hi." 
Psalms102:15 Minamte in Topa hong zahtakin, leitung kumpi khempeuh in na minthanna hong zahtak ding uh hi." 
Psalms102:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion khua lam dinga, ama minthanna hong kilang ding hi." 
Psalms102:17 Amah in mi cimawhteʼ thungetna kinin, amauʼ thumna simmawh lo ding hi." 
Psalms102:18 A suak nai lo mite in Topa a phat theih nadingin a hong tung lai ding khang mite adingin hih thu kiciamteh hen: 
Psalms102:19 Mihingte, kumpi gamte, Topa a bia dingin a kikaihkhop uh ciangin, mite in Zion khua sungah Topaʼ min, Jerusalem khua sungah amah phatna a pulak theih nadingun, thongkiateʼ taunate a za ding le a si dingin a kisehte a khah khia dingin a sangna ama siangtho mun panin amah in hong en sukin, vantung panin Topa in leitung hong en hi." 
Psalms102:20  
Psalms102:21  
Psalms102:22  
Psalms102:23 Amah in kei a khangtung kimlai ka thahatna hong suk tat sakin, ka hunte hong khiapsak hi." 
Psalms102:24 Keimah in, “Khang tawntungin a kip ka Pasian aw, hong khansihsak kei in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms102:25 Tanglai hunin nangmah in leitung bulpi na koih a, vantungte zong nangma khut tawh na bawl sa ahi hi." 
Psalms102:26 Amaute sia ding uh a, ahih hangin nang na kip ding hi. Puan bangin amaute paat khia ding uh hi. Nangmah in amaute puan bangin na khek a, amaute a maimang uh hi." 
Psalms102:27 Ahi zongin nang na kibang ngitnget a, na nuntak hun in mong nei lo hi." 
Psalms102:28 Na nasemteʼ tate lungmuangin om ding uh a, amauʼ suanlekhakte na mai ah kip ding uh hi." 
Psalms103:1 Topa ka phat dinga, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ama min siangtho ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms103:2 Topa ka phat dinga, ama migitna ka mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Psalms103:3 Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh hong maisak a, ka natna khempeuh hong damsak hi." 
Psalms103:4 Han khuk tung ding kimlai hong suaktasak a, itna le hehpihna tampi hong pia hi." 
Psalms103:5 Muvanlai bangin ka tha a hat theih nadingin thupha namkim hong pia hi. 
Psalms103:6 Topa in a kinengniamte adingin thuman thutangin thu a khen hi. 
Psalms103:7 Amah in ama geelna Moses tungah gen a, ama nasepnate Israel mite a musak hi." 
Psalms103:8 Topa dikin hehpihna tawh kidim a, heh hakin, a lian mahmah itna kip tawh a kidim hi." 
Psalms103:9 Amah in a tawntungin hong taii ngitnget lo dinga, amah heh paisuak lo ding hi." 
Psalms103:10 Amah in eiteʼ khialhna tawh a kituakin eite tungah hong bawl lo a, eiteʼ mawhna tawh a kituakin hong thukkik lo hi." 
Psalms103:11 Vantung pen leitung panin a san mah bangin amah a zahtakteʼ tungah ama itna kip lianin sang mahmah hi. 
Psalms103:12 Nisuahna pen nitumna panin a gamlat mah bangin i mawhna hangin gimnate eiteʼ kiang panin gamlapi ah a nil khia hi. 
Psalms103:13 Pa in tate a hehpih bangin Topa in amah a zahtakte hong hehpih hi. 
Psalms103:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in eiteʼ pianna hong thei a, eite pen leivui ihihna a phawk hi." 
Psalms103:15 Eite ihih leh i nuntakna pen lopa tawh kibang a, lo lai ah a po paakte bangin a palh hi." 
Psalms103:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh huih in amah semin bei mang a, tua mun in amah thei nawn lo hi." 
Psalms103:17 Ahih hangin Topaʼ itna kip pen amah a zahtak mite tungah a tawntung pan a tawntung dongin kip ngitnget a, ama thumanna pen ama thuciamna zui-in a thupiak bangin sep ding a phawk mite tungah a khangkhangin a kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms103:18  
Psalms103:19 Topa in vantungah ama tokhom phut khin a, amah in mun khempeuh a uk hi." 
Psalms103:20 Ama thugen a ngai, ama thu bangin a sem no a thahat, no ama vantung mite aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms103:21 Ama deih bangin a gamta ama nasem, ama mihon khempeuhte aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms103:22 Ama ukna sunga a om ama bawl sate aw, Topa phat un. Keʼn, Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms104:1 Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, nang na lian mahmah hi. Minthanna le liatna nang na silh hi." 
Psalms104:2 Puanza tawh tuam bangin khuavak tawh na kituam a, vantungte pen puanbuk bangin na zal hi." 
Psalms104:3 Van a om tui tungah na inn na lam a, na leeng dingin meiipite na bawl a, huih khate tungah nang na tuang hi." 
Psalms104:4 Na kamtai dingin huihte na bawl a, mei le meikuangte na nasemte na hisak hi." 
Psalms104:5 Leitung a liing ngei lo dingin ama bulpi tungah na phut hi. 
Psalms104:6 Nangmah in puan tawh tuam bangin leitung pen tui thukpi tawh na tuam a, tuate in mualte tuumcip hi." 
Psalms104:7 Na thuhilhna hangin tua tuite tai khia uh a, na thupiakna awging a zak uh ciangin kikhawh khia uh hi." 
Psalms104:8 Mual tung le guam sungah tua tuite luang uh a, amau adingin na seh sa munah a tung uh hi." 
Psalms104:9 Tua tuite in leitung a tuamkik loh nadingin amauteʼ kantan loh ding gamgi khat na phut hi. 
Psalms104:10 Kuamte sung panin ciktui na phul khiasak a, mualte kikalah a luang uh hi." 
Psalms104:11 Gamlak ganhingteʼ dawn ding tui na pia a, gamlak sakolte in a dangtakna uh tua tui ah a phasak uh hi." 
Psalms104:12 Tua tui kiangah huihlak vasate om uh a, sing hiangte lakah amaute ham zaizai uh hi." 
Psalms104:13 A sangna mun na omna panin mite tungah guah na zusak a, nangma thupha tawh leitung a kidim hi." 
Psalms104:14 Nangmah in ganhingte adingin lopa, mihing in leilak panin an a ngah theih nadingin a khawh ding ankungte," 
Psalms104:15 mihing lungsim a nuamsak ding leenggahzu, mihing maitang a zolsak ding sathau, mihing lungsim a hatsak ding an na piangsak hi." 
Psalms104:16 Topa in a suan, Lebanon mual a om taamtak singte, tua ama singkungte in guahtui tampi a ngah hi." 
Psalms104:17 Tua singte tungah vasate in bu bawl uh a, taksing kungte lakah gunvapite in bu a tom uh hi." 
Psalms104:18 Mual sangte pen sathakte ading hi a, suangtumte pen sakhiteʼ belh ding ahi hi." 
Psalms104:19 Hun ciamteh nadingin khapi na bawl a, ni in zong a tum ding hun a thei hi." 
Psalms104:20 Nangmah in khuamial na bawl a, gamlak ganhing khempeuh a vak khiat hun pen zan hunsung ahi hi." 
Psalms104:21 Humpinelkai khanglaite in amauʼ nek ding sa a ngah nadingun nakpi takin hawk uh a, amauʼ an ding Pasianʼ tung pan a ngah uh hi." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a suah ciangin amaute kihem khia uh a, a kua sung uh ah a lum hithiat uh hi." 
Psalms104:23 Mite pen nasem dingin kuan khia uh a, nitak mateng na sem uh hi." 
Psalms104:24 Topa aw, na sep sa nate tam mahmah hi. Nangmah in ciimna tawh tuate khempeuh na bawl a, na piansak ganhingte tawh leitung a kidim hi." 
Psalms104:25 Hua lai ah, ganhing a lian a neu, sim zawh lohin a tam, a vak muamua-na, lianin a zai mahmah tuipi om hi." 
Psalms104:26 Hua tuipi tungah teembawte le gualnop nadingin na bawl Awle a pai hi. 
Psalms104:27 A hun ciangin an na piak ding ngakin hihte khempeuh in nangmah hong en uh hi. 
Psalms104:28 Na piak ciangin amaute in ne uh a, an na pia a, amaute lungkim uh hi." 
Psalms104:29 Na maitang na seel ciangin amaute khasia uh hi. Amauʼ husanna na lakkhiat ciangin amaute si-in amauʼ pianna leivui ah a ciahkik uh hi. 
Psalms104:30 Na hu na sankhiat ciangin amaute a kipiangsak hi a, nangmah in leitung na bawl thak hi." 
Psalms104:31 Leitung a et ciangin tua leitung kiliingin, mualte a lawn ciangin tua mualte meikhu a suak, ama nasepna ah Topa lungdam henla, Topaʼ minthanna kip tawntung tahen." 
Psalms104:32  
Psalms104:33 Ka nuntak lai teng Topa tungah la ka sa dinga, ka hin lai teng ka Pasian phatna la ka sasa ding hi." 
Psalms104:34 Topa in hong lungdamsak ahih manin ka lasaknate in zong amah lungdamsak tahen. 
Psalms104:35 Leitung panin mawhnei mite bei mang henla, migilote om nawn kei hen. Keʼn, Topa ka phat ding hi. Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms105:1 Topa tungah lungdamna ko-in, ama min phat unla, ama sepnate khempeuh mite lakah kitheisak un." 
Psalms105:2 Ama tungah la sa un. Ama tungah phatna la sa unla, a lamdang a septe khempeuh gen ciat ta un." 
Psalms105:3 Ama min siangtho hangin lungdam unla, Topa a zong mite lungdam tahen." 
Psalms105:4 Topa le ama huh ding zon belin nei unla, a tawntungin ama maipha zong niloh un." 
Psalms105:5 No ama nasem, Abrahamʼ suanlekhak, Jakobʼ tate, ama teel mite aw, ama sep sa a lamdang nate, ama nalamdang lahte, a genkhiat a thukhennate phawk ciat ta un!" 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Amah pen Topa, eiteʼ Pasian hi a, ama thupiaknate leitung khempeuh in a zuih ding ahi hi." 
Psalms105:8 “Na luah dingin Kanaan gam kong pia ding hi,” ci-in Abraham tawh thuciam a bawl sa, Isaac tungah a thuciam sa, Jakob tungah thupiakna a kipsak, Israel tungah tawntung thuciamna, ama thupiak sa kammal, ama thuciamna pen khang tul khat dongin amah in phawk ngitnget hi." 
Psalms105:9  
Psalms105:10  
Psalms105:11  
Psalms105:12 Amaute tawm mahmah in, bangmah gentham lo uh a, khualmi hi-in," 
Psalms105:13 minam khat panin minam dang khat ah, gam khat pan gam khat ah a vak kawikawi laitakun," 
Psalms105:14 amah in amaute kuamah nengniamsak lo hi. Amauteʼ hangin amah in kumpite thuhilhin," 
Psalms105:15 “Ka sathau nilhte su kha kei un; ka kamsangte tungah siatna bawl kei un,” ci hi." 
Psalms105:16 Amah in leitungah kialpi tungsakin, nek theih an khempeuh a siatsak ciangin," 
Psalms105:17 amah in, Josef a kici, sila-a a kizuak mi khat, amauteʼ mai ah a sawl hi." 
Psalms105:18 Ama khete pen kolte in nasak a, ama ngawng pen sikkol sungah kikoih hi." 
Psalms105:19 Ama thugente a tun matengin Topa in amah ze-et hi. 
Psalms105:20 Amah a khah khia dingin kumpipa in mi paisak a, mihingte a ukpa in amah a khah khia hi." 
Psalms105:21 Josef in kumpipaʼ uliante ama ut bangin lamlakin, a upate pen pilna hilhsak a, ama inn sung topa ama neihsa khempeuh a ukpa-in a koih hi." 
Psalms105:22  
Psalms105:23 Tua ciangin Egypt gamah Israel va pai a, Hamʼ gam sungah peemta-in Jakob va om hi." 
Psalms105:24 Topa in ama mite pungsak mahmah a, a galte sangin amaute hatsak zaw hi." 
Psalms105:25 Ama mite mudahin, ama nasemte siamna tawh a khem dingin amauteʼ lungsim amah in kiheisak hi." 
Psalms105:26 Amah in, ama nasem Moses le ama teel sa Aaron a sawl hi." 
Psalms105:27 Amaute in ama limte amauteʼ lakah nalamdangte Hamʼ gam sungah a bawl uh hi. 
Psalms105:28 Amah in khuamial sawl a, leitung khim a zingsak hi. Ahih hangin Egypt mite in ama thu a langpang uh hi." 
Psalms105:29 Amah in amauʼ tuite sisan suaksak a, a ngasate uh a sisak hi." 
Psalms105:30 Amauʼ leitang tung le a kumpipaʼ inn sung nangawn uiphukte tawh a kidim hi. 
Psalms105:31 Amah kampau a, tho honpi le thokangte gam sung dimin hong om hi." 
Psalms105:32 Amah in a guah dingun gialpi, amauʼ gam sung khempeuh a taangsak khuaphialep, amaute a pia hi." 
Psalms105:33 Amah in amauʼ leengguite le a theikungte uh vat tansak a, amauʼ gam sung sing khempeuh a kuaihtansak hi." 
Psalms105:34 Amah kampau a, kauphete le tangngolte, sim zawh lohin hong pai uh a," 
Psalms105:35 gam sunga kung khempeuh, amauʼ leitang panin a gah khempeuh a nektumsak mang hi." 
Psalms105:36 Amauʼ sung pan a piang masa Egypt tacil khempeuh a sat lum hi. 
Psalms105:37 Tua ciangin amah in ngun le kham tawh Israel-te paikhiatpih a, amaute a vekpi-in cidamin thahat kim uh hi." 
Psalms105:38 Amaute a paikhiat ciangun Egypt mite lungdam mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kihta uh hi. 
Psalms105:39 Amaute a liah dingin amah in meiipi kaisak a, zanin khua muh nadingin mei a omsak hi." 
Psalms105:40 Amaute in ngen a, vantung panin anlum tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms105:41 Amah in suangpi hong a, tui a phul khia hi. Gun tui bangin sehnel gamah tui a luang hi." 
Psalms105:42 Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama thuciamna le ama nasem Abraham a phawk hi. 
Psalms105:43 Tua ahih ciangin ama mite lungdamna tawh, ama teel mite lasakna tawh a paikhiatpih hi." 
Psalms105:44 Amaute in ama ngeina kipte zui-in, ama thukhamte a neih theih nadingun, amah in amaute tungah minam dangteʼ leitang pia a, midangteʼ nasepna gahte zong amaute a ngahsak hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms105:45  
Psalms106:1 Topa phat un. Topaʼ tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms106:2 Topaʼ nasepna lianpite kua in gen khia thei dinga, kua in a kicingin amah phat thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms106:3 Thutang a zui, a tawntungin thumanin a gamta mite, mi nuamsa ahi hi." 
Psalms106:4 Topa aw, nangma teel miteʼ daupaina ka muh theih nading, nangma minamteʼ kipakna sungah ka lungkim theih nading, nangma luahte tawh ka minthan khawm theih nadingin na mite tungah maipha na lah ciangin kei hong phawk inla, amaute na hotkhiat ciangin kei zong hong huh in." 
Psalms106:5  
Psalms106:6 Ka pu ka pate uh a kipan kote ka khial khin uh hi. Mawhna ka bawl khin uh a, ka gilo gamtat khin uh hi." 
Psalms106:7 Ka pu ka pate un Egypt gamah a om lai-un nangma nasepna a lamdangte ngaihsun lo uh hi. Na itna kip a tampite phawk lo uh a, San Tuipi ah Sangpen pa hong lehdo uh hi." 
Psalms106:8 Ahi zongin amah in a lian mahmah a vangliatna a kitheihsak nadingin ama min a ngaihsutna-in amaute a hon khia hi. 
Psalms106:9 Amah in San Tuipi thuhilh a, tua tuipi a kang hi. Amah in gamlak kantan bangin tui thuk kantanin amaute a paipih hi." 
Psalms106:10 Tua ahih ciangin amah in galteʼ khut sung panin amaute hon khia a, langpangteʼ vangliatna panin amaute a khah khia hi." 
Psalms106:11 Tui in amauʼ langte tuum mang khin a, amaute a suakta khat zong om lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:12 Tua ciangin amaute in ama thu um uh a, amah phatna la a sa uh hi." 
Psalms106:13 Ahih hangin amaute in ama nasepte mangngilh pah uh a, ama thugen ding ngak loin a gamta pah uh hi." 
Psalms106:14 Ahih hangin amaute in gamlak ah duh luat mahmahna nei uh a, sehnel gam sungah Pasian a ze-et uh hi." 
Psalms106:15 Amah in amauteʼ nget pen pia a, ahih hangin amaute lakah natsia a tungsak hi." 
Psalms106:16 Gamlak ah Moses le Topaʼ mi siangtho Aaron a hazat uh ciangin," 
Psalms106:17 lei kihongin Dathan valh tum a, Abiramʼ pawlte a vukcip hi." 
Psalms106:18 Amauteʼ sungah mei hong piang khia a, meikuang in migilote a kaang tum hi." 
Psalms106:19 Amaute in Horeb gam sungah bawng no khat bawl uh a, a kisung tua milim a bia uh hi." 
Psalms106:20 Amaute in Pasianʼ minthanna pen lopa a ne bawngtal lim tawh a khek uh hi. 
Psalms106:21 Amaute in Egypt gam sungah na lianpite a bawl, Hamʼ gam sungah nalamdangte le San Tuipi ah a kihtakhuai nate a bawl, amauʼ Honpa, Pasian mangngilh uh hi." 
Psalms106:22  
Psalms106:23 Tua ahih ciangin amaute a suksiatna ding a hehna panin a hei khia dingin Pasianʼ mai ah ama teelpa Moses ding hikeileh amaute ka susia ding hi, amah in ci hi." 
Psalms106:24 Amaute in gam nuam simmawh uh a, ama thuciamna um lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:25 Amaute a puanbuk sung uh ah phun niloh uh a, Topaʼ thu ngai lo uh hi." 
Psalms106:26 Tua ahih ciangin amah in a khut laam to-in gam sungah amaute puksak a, leitung gam khempeuh minamteʼ lakah amauʼ suanlekhakte a thehthang ding a kiciam hi." 
Psalms106:27  
Psalms106:28 Tua ciangin amaute in Peor-a Baal pasian bel uh a, nuntakna a nei lote tungah biakna-in a kipia sate a ne uh hi." 
Psalms106:29 Amauʼ gamtatna tawh Topaʼ heh nading piangsak uh a, amauteʼ lakah pulnatna hong tung hi." 
Psalms106:30 Tua ciangin Finehas dingin hong palai a, pulnatna a hong dai hi." 
Psalms106:31 Tua thu pen a khang a khangin ama thumanna-in kiciamteh tawntung hi. 
Psalms106:32 Amaute in Meribah tui phualah amah sin so sakin, amah a langpang uh hi. Thakhatin kamguh a pau kha Moses in amauteʼ huhau-in siatna a ngahlawh hi." 
Psalms106:33  
Psalms106:34 Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in tua mite that lo uh hi. 
Psalms106:35 Minam dangte tawh kihelin amauʼ gamtat bangbang a gamta dingin a kisin uh hi. 
Psalms106:36 Amau adingin thangzak ahi amauʼ milimte a biakpih uh hi. 
Psalms106:37 Amaute in a tapate uh le a tanute uh dawi biakna-in a nei uh hi. 
Psalms106:38 Amaute in Kanaan gam milimte a biakna-un mawhna nei lo a tanute uh le a tapate uh that uh a, hih mi thahna hangin gam sung a nin a suak hi." 
Psalms106:39 Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ sepna tawh amaute a nin suak uh a, amauʼ gamtatnate tawh palhngulhna a bawl uh hi." 
Psalms106:40 Tua ciangin ama mite tungah Topaʼ hehna hong kitawhkuang a, amah in ama luah minamte a kih hi." 
Psalms106:41 Amau a mudah minamte in amaute a uk theih nadingin tua minamteʼ khut sungah amaute a pia hi. 
Psalms106:42 A galte un amaute nengniam uh a, amauʼ khutnuai ah amaute a koih uh hi." 
Psalms106:43 Amah in amaute tam veipi hon khia hi. Ahih hangin amaute in lehdona lungsim vom uh a, amauʼ mawhna hangin amaute a kiniamkoih hi." 
Psalms106:44 Tua bang ahi ta zongin amauteʼ kikona a zak ciangin amauteʼ cihmawhna a don hi. 
Psalms106:45 Amaute ading a ngaihsutna-in ama thuciamna phawk a, ama itna kip tawh kizui-in a kolsak hi." 
Psalms106:46 Amaute a man mi khempeuhte in a khasiat pih zah dong dingin amah in amauʼ tungah a piangsak hi. 
Psalms106:47 Topa, koteʼ Pasian aw, kote hong hon inla, nangma min siangtho kong phat theih nading uh le nangma tungah lungdamna kong koh theih nadingun minam dangteʼ lak panin kote hong kaikhawmkik in." 
Psalms106:48 Topa, Israel Pasian in a tawntung a kipan a tawntung dongin thupha ngah tahen. Mi khempeuh in, “Amen,” ci ta uh hen. Topa phat un." 
Psalms107:1 “ Topa tungah lungdam ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung!”" 
Psalms107:2 Tu-a teng mah, nisuahna le nitumna, leilu lam le leitaw lam, leitung pan a ama kaihkhop, galteʼ khut sung panin a hong hotkhiat mite in ci kikkik ta uh hen." 
Psalms107:3  
Psalms107:4 Pawl khatte gamlak ah gammang uh a, a ten nading uh khuapi tunna lampi mu zo lo uh hi." 
Psalms107:5 Gilkial dangtakin amaute sibup uh hi. 
Psalms107:6 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uh ah Topa ko uh a, amauʼ cihmawhna panin amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms107:7 Amauʼ ten nading khuapi a tun matengun amah in lampi man ah amaute a paipih hi. 
Psalms107:8 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang ama sepnate hangin amaute in Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a gilkial a dangtakte phasak a, bangmah a nei lote tungah na hoih tampi a pia hi." 
Psalms107:10 Pawl khatte, khuamial sung, a zing sungah tu uh a, sikkol kibulhin gimna thuakin thong kia uh hi." 
Psalms107:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Pasianʼ thu sel uh a, Sangpen paʼ thugente a nial uh hi." 
Psalms107:12 Nasep haksa tawh amauteʼ lungsim niamsak hi. Amaute puk uh a, a huh ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms107:13 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uh ah Topa ko uh a, amauʼ cihmawhna panin amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms107:14 Amah in khuamial sung le a zing sung panin amaute la khia a, amau a kihennate a bot sat hi." 
Psalms107:15 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sumngo kongkhakte sukhamin sikzawlte tum nih a suah hi. 
Psalms107:17 Pawl khatte amauʼ khialhna hangin a ci uh na a, a mawhna hangun gimna a thuak uh hi." 
Psalms107:18 Amaute in an peuhmah kih uh a, sihna kongpi tawh amaute kinai ta uh hi." 
Psalms107:19 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uh ah Topa ko uh a, amauʼ cihmawhna panin amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms107:20 Amah in thu vaikhakin amaute damsak a, siat nading panin amaute a hon khia hi." 
Psalms107:21 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a nasepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:22 Lungdam koh piaknate pia-in ama nasepnate lungdam la tawh amaute gensak un. 
Psalms107:23 Pawl khatte, teembaw tawh tuipi ah pai uh a, tui liante tungah sum bawl na a sem uh hi." 
Psalms107:24 Amaute in tui thuk tungah Topaʼ gamtatna a lamdang a septe a mu uh hi. 
Psalms107:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, tuipi hualte a piangsak huihpi a nungsak hi." 
Psalms107:26 Amaute, vanah kilawn to-in, a thukna ah kia suk uh hi. A lauhuai siatna sungah amauʼ lungsim hanna a bei hi." 
Psalms107:27 Amaute zukham bangin hoi suk hoi to uh a, a cih nading mel uh thei nawn lo uh hi." 
Psalms107:28 Tua ciangin amaute in a lungkhamna uh ah Topa ko uh a, amauʼ cihmawhna panin amah in a hon khia hi." 
Psalms107:29 Amah in huihpi daisak a, tuipi hualte a bei hi." 
Psalms107:30 Tua ciangin, tua tuihualte a khawl manin amaute a lungdam uh hi. Amah in amauteʼ utna khua ah a paipih hi." 
Psalms107:31 Ama itna kip le mihing tate tungah a lamdang a sepnate hangin amaute in Topa tungah lungdamna ko ta uh hen. 
Psalms107:32 Amaute in mihon kikhopna sungah amah pahtawi-in, upateʼ kikhopna sungah amah phat ta uh hen." 
Psalms107:33 Amah in, a tunga a teeng mihingteʼ gitlohna hangin gunte sehnel gam suaksakin ciktuite lei keu suaksak a, an tampi a pianna leitang pen ci-lei a suaksak hi." 
Psalms107:34  
Psalms107:35 Amah in sehnel gam pen bualtuite suaksak a, leitang keu pen ciktui a suaksak hi." 
Psalms107:36 Amah in tua munah gilkialte tengsak a, a ten nading uh khuapi amaute in a sat uh hi." 
Psalms107:37 Amaute in lo ah an tuhin leenggui suan uh a, a gah tampi tak a ngah uh hi." 
Psalms107:38 Ama thupha piakna hangin ante nakpi takin pung a, amauʼ bawngte zong kiamsak lo hi." 
Psalms107:39 Amaute pen nenniamna, haksatna le dahna tawh khiam suk gawpin a kiniamkoih suk ciangin" 
Psalms107:40 amah in, amau a bawlsiate tungah simmawhna buak sukin lampi om lohna gam sungah amaute a vakvaisak hi." 
Psalms107:41 Ahih hangin amah in amauʼ thuakna sung panin a cimawhte laam to a, tuu honpite bangin amauʼ innkuante a pungsak hi." 
Psalms107:42 Lungsim thutangte in hih thu mu-in kipak uh a, a gilote in ahihleh amauʼ kam a cih ciat uh hi." 
Psalms107:43 A pil peuhmah in hih thute don henla, Topaʼ itna kip lung ngaingai tahen." 
Psalms108:1 Pasian aw, ka lungsim a kiging sa-in om hi. Ka sa ding hi; nangmah phatna late ka sa ding hi. Kei ka khanglo ding hi." 
Psalms108:2 Harp lasakna le laiza lasakna aw, khanglo un. Zingsang khuavak hong phong ning." 
Psalms108:3 Topa aw, mite lakah nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko dinga, minam dangte lakah nangma tungah phatna ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms108:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh na itna kip in vantung ban a, na thumanna in meiipite ban to hi." 
Psalms108:5 Pasian aw, vantungteʼ tungah sang to lai in. Leitung khempeuh ah na minthanna omsak in." 
Psalms108:6 Nangma it mite, na hatna tawh hon inla, kong ngetna bangun hong pia in." 
Psalms108:7 Ama biakinn sungah Pasian in thu ciam khin a, “Gualzo a lungdamna tawh Shekhem gam khen khia-in, Sukkoth gam kuam ka seh khia ding hi." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead gam keima aʼ hi a, Manasseh gam zong keima-aʼ mah ahi hi. Efraim gam ka sik lukhu hi a, Judah gam ka ciangkhut ahi hi." 
Psalms108:9 Moab gam ka kisilna kuang hi a, keima neihsa hi, cih lahna limin Edom gam tungah ka khedap ka lawn hi. Filistia gam tungah gualzawhna tawh ka awng hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms108:10 Kua in khuapi muanhuai ah kei hong paipih ding hiam? Kua in Edom gamah kei hong paipih ding hiam? 
Psalms108:11 Pasian aw, nangmah in kote hong don lo khinta hi lo na hi hiam? Pasian aw, komau galkapte tawh na kuan khia kei hi." 
Psalms108:12 Ka galdona uh ah kote hong huh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihingʼ huhna a mawkna hi. 
Psalms108:13 Pasian tawh khauh takin i hih ding hi. Amah pen i galte hong sikcipsak ding pa ahi hi. 
Psalms109:1 Keima hong phat Pasian aw, dai dide-in om mawk kei in." 
Psalms109:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote le zuau thu gente keima langah hong pang uh a, keimah hong gensia-in, zuau thu bekbek genin nei uh hi." 
Psalms109:3 Amaute in muhdah kamte pau-in kei hong gensia uh a, thu om lopi-in kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Psalms109:4 Amaute ka itna, amaute adingin thu ka ngetsakna nangawn amaute in hong thukna-in kei hong mawhsak uh hi." 
Psalms109:5 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in hoihna adingin siatna itna adingin muhdahna tawh kei hong thuk uh hi. 
Psalms109:6 Ka gal paʼ langah migilo khat pangsak inla, thusitna a thuak dingin mawhna a zong mi khat paipihsak in." 
Psalms109:7 Amah thu a kisit ciangin thu lelin pusuaksak inla, ama hong thumnate zong mawhna suaksak in." 
Psalms109:8 Amah khantom henla, midang khat in ama nasep za ngah tahen." 
Psalms109:9 Ama tate pa nei lo hi ta henla, a zi zong meigong numei hi tahen." 
Psalms109:10 Ama tate vak kawikawi-in khut dawhin ngen henla, a kisia sa a teenna mun panun kihawl khia ta uh hen." 
Psalms109:11 Ama leibatna pa in a neih khempeuh man henla, khual mite in a om lai sunsunte sut tahen." 
Psalms109:12 Ama tungah kuamah migi kei henla, pa nei lo ama tate kuamah in hehpih kei tahen." 
Psalms109:13 Ama suanlekhakte bei henla, khang khat sungin a vangliatna maimang tahen." 
Psalms109:14 Topaʼ mai ah a pu a pateʼ mawhna kiciamteh henla, a nuʼ mawhna kimaisak kei tahen." 
Psalms109:15 Topaʼ mai ah tua mawhnate omsak inla, leitung panin amah a kiphawkna bei tahen." 
Psalms109:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh migitna lah ding ngaihsun lo a, a zawng a cimawhte le lungsim kitamzan mite a sih dongun a bawlsia hi." 
Psalms109:17 Amah in mi samsiat nuam a sa hi. Ama tungah samsiatnate tungsak in. Amah in thupha pia nuam lo hi. Kuamah in amah thupha pia kei tahen. 
Psalms109:18 Amah pen puansilh bangin samsiatna kingeina seh hi. Tua a samsiatnate ama pumpi sungah tui bangin a guhte sungah sathau bangin lutin kizel tahen. 
Psalms109:19 Tua samsiatnate pen ama kituamna puan tawh kibang henla, nisimin amah a kigakna a kawnggak tawh kibang tahen." 
Psalms109:20 Hih bang teng pen keimah hong mawhsakteʼ tung, kei hong gensiateʼ tungah Topaʼ kiang pan a thaman hi tahen." 
Psalms109:21 Ahih hangin Topa ka Pasian aw, na min na ngaihsutna tawh keima tangin hong pang inla, na itna kip hoih ahih manin kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms109:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei genthei-in ka cimawh a, ka lungsim tawng dongin na hong nasak hi." 
Psalms109:23 Nitak a niliim bangin kei ka bei a, kauphe bangin kei hong kising khia hi." 
Psalms109:24 An ngolhna hangin ka khukte zaw a, ka pumpi si le sa zong kiam gawp khinta hi." 
Psalms109:25 Amauteʼ nuihsatin kei ka om a, amaute in kei hong muh ciangun lusu ngeungeu uh hi." 
Psalms109:26 Topa ka Pasian aw, kei hong huh in. Nangma itna kip tawh kituakin kei hong hon in." 
Psalms109:27 Topa aw, hih pen nangma bawl, nangma khut in a sep ahihna amaute theisak in." 
Psalms109:28 Amaute in kei hong samsiat hangin nangmah in kei thupha nong pia ding hi. Ka langte zahhuaisak inla, na nasem pa keimah hong kipsak ta in." 
Psalms109:29 Kei hong mawhsakte in mindaina silh uh henla, puanza silh bangin amauʼ maizumna tawh kituamcip ta uh hen." 
Psalms109:30 Topa tungah ka lungdamna a ging pha-in ka ko dinga, mihonte lakah amah ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms109:31 Bang hang hiam cih leh sih nading gimna a pia paʼ khut sung pan a hon khia dingin mi cimawh paʼ tak lamah amah hong ding hi. 
Psalms110:1 Topa in ka to kumpipa tungah, “Na galte nangma khengakna-in ka bawl matengin ka tak lamah tu in,” a ci hi." 
Psalms110:2 Topa in Zion panin na kumpi ciangkhut hong puak hi. Na galteʼ tungah uk in. 
Psalms110:3 Nangma mihonte mual siangtho tungah na makaih ciangin, utna lungsim tawh na mite hong kipia ding uh hi. Daitui bangin zingsangin na khangnona nangma tungah hong tung ding hi." 
Psalms110:4 Topa in thu ciam zo a, ama ngaihsutna kheel lo ding hi. “Melkhizedek bangin a tawntungin siampi na hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Psalms110:5 Nangma tak lamah Topa hong om a, ama heh ni-in kumpite a zo gawp ding hi." 
Psalms110:6 Kumpipa in minamte lakah thu khen dinga, tua munte si luanghawm tawh a dimsak ding hi. Amah in a zai mahmah leitungah ukpite a susia ding hi." 
Psalms110:7 Amah in lampi gei-a om luitui dawn dinga, amah a tha hatin a gualzo pa hi ding hi." 
Psalms111:1 Topa phat un. Lungsim thutangte a omna, mihon kikhopna sungah ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ka ko ding hi." 
Psalms111:2 Topaʼ nasepna lian a, hoih a sa mi khempeuh in tuate kankan uh hi." 
Psalms111:3 Ama nasepnate, pahtawina le minliatna tawh kidim a, ama thumanna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms111:4 Amah in phawk tawntung dingin a lamdang nasepnate hong bawl a, Topa dikin hehpihna nei hi." 
Psalms111:5 Amah in amah a zahtakte an pia a, a thuciamna a phawk tawntung hi." 
Psalms111:6 Amah in ama mite tungah minamteʼ gamh a piakna tawh ama vangliatna hong lak khin hi. 
Psalms111:7 Ama nasepnate khempeuh ah amah thumanin citak a, a thupiaknate muantaak mahmah hi." 
Psalms111:8 A tawntungin tuate kip ngitnget a, thuman le thutang tawh zuih ding ahi hi." 
Psalms111:9 Amah in ama mite hon khia a, a tawntung a kimang dingin thupiakna a bawl khin hi. Ama min siangtho-in vanglian mahmah hi." 
Psalms111:10 Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna ahi hi. Ama thupiak a zuite khempeuh tungah thukhen siamna a pia hi. Amah phat tawntung ding ahi hi. 
Psalms112:1 Topa phat un. Topa zahtakin a thupiaknate nuam a sa mahmah mi, thupha ngah mi ahi hi." 
Psalms112:2 Ama suanlekhakte leitungah vanglian dinga, a lungsim thutang miteʼ suanlekhakte thupha kipia ding hi." 
Psalms112:3 Hauhna le nopsaknate a innkuan sungah dim dinga, ama thumanna kip tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms112:4 Lungsim thutangte adingin khuamial sung panin khuavak hong taang khia hi. Topa dik a, hehpihna nei-in, amah thuman hi." 
Psalms112:5 Cingh gamtatin mite tungah leitawi pia a, thutangin a gamta mite tungah thu a hoih hi." 
Psalms112:6 Amah kiliing lo taktak dinga, kiphawk tawntung ding hi." 
Psalms112:7 Amah in thusia zak ding lau lo hi. Topa muang a, ama lungsim a kip hi." 
Psalms112:8 Amah lau loin, lunghimawh loin om hithiat a, amah a langpangte a guallelh ding a thei tel hi." 
Psalms112:9 Amah in hawm khia zuahzuah a, mizawngte tungah a pia khia hi. Ama migitna kip tawntung a, amah vanglianin kipahtawi ding hi." 
Psalms112:10 Migilo in hih thu mu-in a heh suak mahmah a, a ha gawigawi-in a tui mang hi. Migiloteʼ lametna a mawkna a suakta hi." 
Psalms113:1 Topa phat un. Topaʼ nasemte aw, phat un. Topaʼ min phat un." 
Psalms113:2 Topaʼ min in tu a kipanin thupha ngah tawntung tahen. 
Psalms113:3 Nisuahna pan nitumna dongin Topaʼ min phat ding ahi hi. 
Psalms113:4 Topa in minam khempeuh tungah uk a, ama minthanna vantung sangin sang zaw hi." 
Psalms113:5 A sangna munah a tu, vantung le leitung a hong en suk Topa, eiteʼ Pasian pen kua tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms113:6  
Psalms113:7 Amah in leivui panin mizawngte laam to-in, ninphual panin mi cimawhte le a lungkhamte dom to a," 
Psalms113:8 uliante tawh kikhawl sakin ama miteʼ ulianin a bawl hi. 
Psalms113:9 Amah in tasel numei tungah ta guan a, ta a nei nu a lungdamin a bawl hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms114:1 Israel-te, Egypt gam panin pusuakin, Jakob innkuanpihte pau dang a zang mite kiang pan a paikhiat uh ciangin" 
Psalms114:2 Judah-te, Topaʼ mi siangtho suak a, Israel-te, ama uk mi a suak hi." 
Psalms114:3 Tuipi in amaute mu-in tai khia a, Jordan gun a nungkik hi." 
Psalms114:4 Mual liante tuutal bangin diang uh a, mual neute tuuno bangin a diang uh hi." 
Psalms114:5 Tuipi aw, na taikhiat nading, Jordan gun aw, na nungkik nading," 
Psalms114:6 mual liante aw, tuu bangin mual neute aw, tuuno bangin na dianna ding uh bang in hong nasak ahi hiam?" 
Psalms114:7 Leitung aw, suangpi, bualtui suaksak a, meisuang, ciktui a suaksak, Jakobʼ Pasianʼ omna, Topaʼ omna ah liing in." 
Psalms114:8  
Psalms115:1 Kote tungah hi loin, Topa aw, kote tungah hi loin, na itna kip le na thumanna hangin nangma tungah minthanna om tahen." 
Psalms115:2 Bang hangin minam dangte in, “Amauteʼ Pasian koi ah om ahi hiam?” ci laizang ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms115:3 Vantungah eiteʼ Pasian om a, ama ut peuhpeuh a hih hi." 
Psalms115:4 Amauʼ milimte pen ngun le kham hi lel a, mihingteʼ khut tawh a kibawl ahi hi." 
Psalms115:5 Amaute in kam nei napi-in pau thei lo uh a, mit nei napi-in khua mu thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:6 Amaute in bil nei napi-in khua za lo uh a, nak nei napi-in a nam thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:7 Amaute in khut nei napi-in lawng thei lo uh a, khe nei napi-in pai thei lo uh hi. Amaute in aw gingsak thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:8 Tuate a bawlte le tuate a muangte khempeuh pen tuate mah tawh kibang uh hi. 
Psalms115:9 Israel-te aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:10 Aaron innkuante aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:11 Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa muang un. Amah pen note hong huhpa le hong hupa ahi hi." 
Psalms115:12 Topa in eite hong phawk a, thupha hong pia ding hi. Amah in Israel mite, thupha hong pia dinga, amah in Aaron innkuante thupha hong pia ding hi." 
Psalms115:13 Amah in Topa a zahtakte a lian a neu-in thupha hong pia ding hi. 
Psalms115:14 Topa in note le na tate uh hong pungsak tahen. 
Psalms115:15 Vanlelei a bawl Topa in note thupha hong pia tahen. 
Psalms115:16 Vantung pen Topa aʼ hi a, ahih hangin leitung pen mihingte tungah hong pia khin hi." 
Psalms115:17 Misite ahi a, gamdaihna sungah a pai peuhpeuhte in ahi zongin Topa phat lo uh hi." 
Psalms115:18 Ahih hangin eite in tu a kipanin a tawntungin Topa i phat ngitnget ding hi. Topa phat un. 
Psalms116:1 Topa ka it hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ka aw hong za-in ka thumnate hong ngai hi. 
Psalms116:2 Amah ka sap sialin ka sapna aw hong ngai hi. 
Psalms116:3 Sihna khau in kei hong gakcip hi. Leinuai sihna in kei hong mancip a, natna le lungkhamna ka thuak hi." 
Psalms116:4 Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah thu ngenin, “ Topa aw, nang tungah kong thum hi; kei hong hon in,” ka ci hi." 
Psalms116:5 Topa dikin thuman a, i Pasian in hehpihna nei hi." 
Psalms116:6 Topa in thu thei lo mi hong kem a, kei hong kiniamkoih ciangin amah in hong huh hi." 
Psalms116:7 Lungmuang takin ka om ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keima tungah Topa hong thunuam hi. 
Psalms116:8 Topa in sihna panin kei hong hon khia hi. Ka khituite hong kangsak a, kei hong guallelsak lo hi." 
Psalms116:9 Tua ahih ciangin mihingteʼ omna leitung, Topaʼ mai ah nungta-in ka vak kawikawi hi." 
Psalms116:10 “Nakpi takin gimna ka thuak hi,” ka cih hun ciang nangawnin ka upna mah ka len cinten hi." 
Psalms116:11 Lunghihmawhna tawh, “Mi khempeuh zuaugen vive hi,” ka cih hun nangawnin ka um lailai hi." 
Psalms116:12 Kei tunga ama thupha tampite Topaʼ tungah bangci thuk ding ka hi hiam? 
Psalms116:13 Topa in kei hong hotkhiat ka lungdamna hangin, ama kiangah tui phih biakna ka paipih ding hi." 
Psalms116:14 Topaʼ tungah ka thuciamnasa pen ama mite khempeuh a kikhopna munah ka pia ding hi. 
Psalms116:15 Ama mi siangthote a sih ciangin Topa in na sa mahmah hi. 
Psalms116:16 Topa aw, kei pen nangma nasem ka hi hi. Nangma nasem ka hi a, na nasem nuʼ ta ka hi hi. Keimah hong kikhihnate nong sutkhiatsak zo hi." 
Psalms116:17 Lungdam koh biakpiakna nang tungah kong pia dinga, Topaʼ tungah thu kong ngen ding hi." 
Psalms116:18 Jerusalem khuapi aw, ama mi khempeuh a omna sung, Topaʼ inn huang sung, nangma laizang ah, Topaʼ tungah ka thuciamnasa ka pia ding hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms116:19  
Psalms117:1 Minam khempeuhte aw, Topa phat un. Minam khempeuhte aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms117:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a hong itna lian mahmah a, Topaʼ thutakna a tawntungin kip ngitnget hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms118:1 Topa tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms118:2 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Israel-te in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:3 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” Aaron innkuante in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:4 “Ama itna kip tawntung hi,” amah a zahtakte in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms118:5 Ka cihmawhna ah Topa ka sam a, Topa in hong dawngin mun tanzau ah hong koih hi." 
Psalms118:6 Topa in kei hong ompih hi. Bangmah ka kihta kei ding hi. Mihingte in kei, bang hong cih zo ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Psalms118:7 Kei hong huh dingin kei lamah Topa om hi. Kei hong mudahte pen gualzawhna tawh ka en ding hi. 
Psalms118:8 Mi i muan sangin Topa belh ding hoih zaw hi. 
Psalms118:9 Uliante i muan sangin Topa belh ding hoih zaw hi. 
Psalms118:10 Minam khempeuh in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topaʼ vang tawh amaute ka su gawp hi. 
Psalms118:11 Amaute in ka kimkot ah kei hong umcih uh hi. Ahih hangin Topaʼ vang tawh amaute ka su gawp hi. 
Psalms118:12 Amaute in khuaipi bangin kei hong umcih uh a, ahi zongin selkeu kuang bangin amaute daikik pak uh hi. Topaʼ vang tawh amaute ka su gawp hi." 
Psalms118:13 Kei ka puk nadingin nakpi takin hong kisawn a, ahih hangin Topa in kei hong huh hi." 
Psalms118:14 Topa in a vanglian, a thahatin kei hong bawl a, amah pen kei a hong honpa ahi hi." 
Psalms118:15 Ngai un! Thuman miteʼ puanbuk sungah gualzawh lungdamna la kisa a, “ Topaʼ taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi."
