Psalms118:16 Topaʼ taklam khut kipahtawi a, Topaʼ taklam khut in a lian nate hih khin hi,” kici hi." 
Psalms118:17 Kei ka si kei dinga, ka nungta ding hi. Topaʼ sepnate ka gengen ding hi." 
Psalms118:18 Topa in nasia takin kei hong thuhilh a, ahih hangin kei hong sisak lo hi." 
Psalms118:19 Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko-in ka lut theih nadingin biakinn kongpite kei hong hon in. 
Psalms118:20 Hih pen Topaʼ kongpi ahi hi. Thuman mi bek hih kongpi ah lut ding hi. 
Psalms118:21 Nangmah in kei hong dawngin, hong hon khia na hih manin nangma tungah ka lungdam hi." 
Psalms118:22 Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. 
Psalms118:23 Hih pen Topaʼ nasepna hi a, eiteʼ mitah lamdang hi." 
Psalms118:24 Hih ni pen Topaʼ hong piak ni hi a, eite lungdamin i kipak ding hi." 
Psalms118:25 Topa aw, kote hong hon in; hong thum ung. Topa aw, kong thum uh hi; kote hong daupaisak in." 
Psalms118:26 Topaʼ min tawh hong pai pa in thupha ngah tahen. Topaʼ inn panin nang kong phat uh hi. 
Psalms118:27 Topa pen Pasian ahi hi. Amah in eite tungah nopsakna hong pia zo hi. Na khut uh ah singhiang tawi-in, biakna tau kimkotin pai un." 
Psalms118:28 Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi. Nang pen keima Pasian na hi a, nangmah kong phat ding hi." 
Psalms118:29 Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:1 Amauʼ gamtatna ah paubaan om loin Topaʼ ngeina sungah a gamtate thupha ngah ahi hi. 
Psalms119:2 Ama thuhilhnate zui-in, a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amah zongin, khialhna zong bawl loin, ama lampi a zuite, thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Psalms119:3  
Psalms119:4 Nangma thuhilhte limtakin zuih dingin thu nong pia hi. 
Psalms119:5 Nangma ngeina kipte zuihna ah ka gamtatna kip tahen. 
Psalms119:6 Na thupiakte khempeuh mitsuanin nei ka hih manin, kei ka maizum kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:7 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte ka sin khit ciangin lungsim thutang tawh nangmah kong phat ding hi. 
Psalms119:8 Nangma ngeina kipte ka zui ding hi; kei hong nusia suak kei in. 
Psalms119:9 Tangval khat in ama gamtatna a siangtho mahmah dingin bangci kep ding ahi hiam? Nangma thu zuihna tawh ama gamtatna siangthosak thei ding hi. 
Psalms119:10 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang ka hong zong hi. Na thupiaknate panin kei hong pialsak kei in. 
Psalms119:11 Nangma tungah kong khialh loh nadingin ka lungsim sungah nangma thu ka khol hi. 
Psalms119:12 Topa aw, thupha ngah ta in; na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:13 Nangma hong piak nangmah biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh ka gengen ding hi. 
Psalms119:14 Hauhnate khempeuh sangin nangma thuhilhnate nuam ka sa zaw hi. 
Psalms119:15 Nangma thuhilhnate lungngaingai-in, nangma lampite ka mitsuan ding hi." 
Psalms119:16 Nangma ngeina kipte ah nuam ka sa dinga, nangma thu ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:17 Nungta-in nangma thu ka zuih theih nadingin na nasem pa tungah hong cingh in. 
Psalms119:18 Nangma thukham sung panin a lamdang nate ka muh theih nadingin keima mitte hong honsak in. 
Psalms119:19 Kei pen hih leitungah peemta ka hi hi; keiʼ kiang panin na thuphate seel kei in. 
Psalms119:20 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte a tawntungin ka lunggulh venvan hi. 
Psalms119:21 Nangmah in na thupiaknate panin a pial khia, a kisamsiat, a kiphasakte na thuhilh hi." 
Psalms119:22 Na thuhilhnate zui ka hih manin amauʼ hong nuihsatna le hong simmawhnate panin kei hong suaktasak in. 
Psalms119:23 Uliante in kei hong langpangin thu a vaihawm uh hangin na nasem pa in na ngeina kipte ngaih sunsun ding hi. 
Psalms119:24 Na thuhilhnate ka deih hi. Tuate pen keimah thu hong lakte ahi hi. 
Psalms119:25 Guallelin leivui lakah ka lum hi. Na thu om sa bangin kei hong hingsak in. 
Psalms119:26 Ka gamtatnate kong gen ciangin nangmah in kei nong dawng hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in. 
Psalms119:27 Nangma ngeina kipte kei hong theitelsak in. Nangma nasep lamdangte ka ngaih sunsun ding hi. 
Psalms119:28 Dahna in kei hong vukcip hi. Nangma thu om sa bangin kei hong tha khauhsak in. 
Psalms119:29 A man lo lampite ka zuih khak loh nadingin kei hong kem in. Hong hehpih inla, na ngeinate hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:30 Thuman lampi ka teel khin a, na biakna ngeina kipte ka deih hi." 
Psalms119:31 Topa aw, na thuhilhnate ka pom hi. Kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms119:32 Keima theihna nong zaisak ciangin nangma thupiaknate lawpna tawh ka zui ding hi. 
Psalms119:33 Topa aw, na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in. A mong dongin ka zui ding hi." 
Psalms119:34 Nangma thute kemin ka lungsim khempeuh tawh ka zuih theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong pia in. 
Psalms119:35 Nangma thupiakna lampi ah kei hong paipih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua ah nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:36 Nangma thuhilhnateʼ lamah ka lungsim awnsak inla, ngah nading bekah awnsak kei in." 
Psalms119:37 Bangmahin a kimang lo nate, kei hong kinsak kei inla, nangma thu om sa bangin hong nungtasak in." 
Psalms119:38 Na thu hong mangte tungah na thuciamnate, na nasem pa tungah hong kipsak in." 
Psalms119:39 Ka kihtak hong kikonate keiʼ kiang pan hei khia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah biakna ngeina kipte hoih mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:40 En in, na thuhilhnate ka lunggulh hi. Na thumanna tawh kei hong hingsak in." 
Psalms119:41 Topa aw, na ciamna bangin na itna kip, na hotkhiatna kei tungah hong tungsak in." 
Psalms119:42 Tua hileh na thu ka muanna hangin kei hong zahkote ka dawnna ding hong om ding hi. 
Psalms119:43 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte lamenin om ka hih manin a man thu hong gen theisak tawntung in. 
Psalms119:44 Nangma thu tatsat loin ka zui ngitnget ding hi. 
Psalms119:45 Nangma thuhilhnate zuih ding hanciam ka hih manin nuam takin ka nungta ding hi. 
Psalms119:46 Kumpiteʼ mai ah nangma thute ka gen dinga, maizumna ka thuak kei ding hi." 
Psalms119:47 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka deih nangma thupiakna zuih ding nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:48 Keima deih ahi na thupiakte ka zahtak a, na ngeina kipte ka lung ngaingai ding hi." 
Psalms119:49 Keimah nong lametsakna ahi na nasem paʼ tungah na thuciamna hong phawk in. 
Psalms119:50 Hih pen ka thuakna ah keima kihehnepna hi a, na thuciamna in kei tungah nuntakna hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:51 Mi kiphasakte in kei hong zahko gawp uh a, ahih hangin nangma thupiakna panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
Psalms119:52 Topa aw, hun lui lai-a nangmah biakna ngeina kipte ka ngaihsut ciangin ka lung hong nuam hi." 
Psalms119:53 Nangma thu a nusia migiloteʼ hangin ka heh a suak hi. 
Psalms119:54 Hih leitung ka omna peuh ah nangma ngeina kipte la phuah in ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:55 Topa aw, zanin na min ka phawk a, nangma thu ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:56 Nangma thuhilhte zui ka hih manin keima tungah hih thupha hong tung hi. 
Psalms119:57 Topa pen keima tanh ahi hi. Na thute zuih ding ka kiciam hi. 
Psalms119:58 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na maipha kong ngen hi. Na thuciamna om sa bangin kei hong hehpih in. 
Psalms119:59 Ka gamtatnate ka ngaihsun a, na ngeinate zuih ding ka kiciam hi." 
Psalms119:60 Kei kinawhin, na thupiakte zuih ding ka zekai kei hi." 
Psalms119:61 Migiloteʼ khau in kei hong vialh hangin nangma thu ka mangngilh tuan kei hi. 
Psalms119:62 A thuman na ngeina kipte hangin nangmah a phat dingin zankim laitakin ka tho hi. 
Psalms119:63 Kei pen, na thuhilhte a zui, nangmah a hong zahtakte tawh a kikhawl pa ka hi hi." 
Psalms119:64 Topa aw, leitung pen nangma itna kip tawh kidim hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:65 Topa aw, na thuciamna bangin na nasem pa na limbawl hi." 
Psalms119:66 Na thupiakte um ka hih manin thu khentel theihna le theih siamna hong hilh in. 
Psalms119:67 Gim nong piak ma-in lam ka pial thei zel a, ahih hangin tu-in na thu ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:68 Nangmah na hoih a, a hoih nate na sem hi. Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:69 Mi kiphasakte in keiʼ thu, zuau vive gengen uh a, ahih hangin keimah in ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na thuhilhte ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:70 Amauteʼ lungsim in thu theithei loin khikcip a, ahih hangin keimah in nangma thu sung nuam ka sa hi." 
Psalms119:71 Nangma ngeina kipte ka sin theih nadingin gimna ka thuak pen kei adingin hoih mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:72 Nangma kam sung pan a thu pen kham le ngun tul tampite sangin kei adingin hoih zaw hi. 
Psalms119:73 Nangmah in kei hong piangsakin na hong bawl hi. Na thupiaknate ka sin theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong pia in. 
Psalms119:74 Nangma thuciamna muang ka hih manin nang hong zahtakte in kei hong mu-in lungdam ding uh hi. 
Psalms119:75 Topa aw, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte man hi, ci-in ka thei a, na thumanna hangin kei gim na hong pia hi." 
Psalms119:76 Na nasem pa tungah na thuciamna bangin keimah hong hehnem dingin na itna kip a baih sa-in hong omsak in. 
Psalms119:77 Ka nuntak theih nadingin kei hong hehpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thu nuam ka sa hi. 
Psalms119:78 Mi kiphasakte zahhuaisak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in khemna tawh kei hong lumlet uh hi. Keʼn ahihleh na thuhilhte ka lung ngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms119:79 Na teci pannate a theih nadingun nang hong zahtakte keiʼ lamah hong kiheisak in. 
Psalms119:80 Guallelh maizumna ka thuak loh nadingin nangma ngeina kipte a kicing takin a zui zo mi hong hisak ta in. 
Psalms119:81 Na hong hotkhiat ding ka ngakngakna-in ka tha bei ta a, nangma thu muangin ka lamen hi." 
Psalms119:82 Na thuciamnate ka etetna-in ka mitte tha zaw ta hi. “Cik ciangin hong hehnem ding na hiam?” kong ci hi. 
Psalms119:83 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen meikhu lak a a kikoih dak savun um tawh ka kibang a, ahi zongin nangma ngeina kipte ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:84 Na nasem pa in bang tanvei ngak lai ding ka hi hiam? Kei hong bawlsiate cik ciangin thu khen ding na hi hiam? 
Psalms119:85 Nangma thu a zui lo, mi kiphasakte in keimah hong siahna-in gum a to uh hi." 
Psalms119:86 Nangma thupiakte khempeuh man taktak hi. Amaute in thuman lopi-in kei hong bawlsia uh hi. Kei hong huh in. 
Psalms119:87 Amaute in kei hong that zo dektak uh hi. Ahih hangin na thuhilhnate ka mangngilh tuan kei hi. 
Psalms119:88 Na kam pan a na teci pannate ka zuih theih nadingin na itna kip tawh kei hong hingsak in. 
Psalms119:89 Topa aw, vantungah nangma thu kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:90 Nangma thumanna khang tawntungin kip hi. Nangmah in leitung na kipsak a, om tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:91 Nangma sehna tawh tu dongin amaute kip uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khempeuh nangma nasem ahi hi. 
Psalms119:92 Nangma thu, nuam a sa lo hi leng, ka gim thuakna ah ka kisia khinzo ta ding hi." 
Psalms119:93 Nangma thuhilhte ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate tawh nong nungtasak hi. 
Psalms119:94 Kei pen nangma aʼ ka hi hi. Kei hong hon in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thuhilhte zuih ding ka hanciam hi. 
Psalms119:95 Migilote in keimah a hong that dingin hong buk uh hi. Ahih hangin na teci pannate keʼn ka lung ngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms119:96 A kicing a a kingaihsun nate khempeuh in mong a neihna ka mu khin a, ahih hangin na thupiakna in mong nei loin zai mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:97 Na thu deih mahmah ing. Sun tawntungin ka lungngaihngaih ahi hi. 
Psalms119:98 Na thupiakna in ka langte khempeuh sangin a pil zaw-in hong bawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen kei tawh om khawm den hi. 
Psalms119:99 Ka siate khempeuh sangin thu ka tel zaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na teci pannate ka ngaih sunsun hi. 
Psalms119:100 Khanghamte sangin thu ka tel zaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na thuhilhnate ka zui hi. 
Psalms119:101 Na thu ka zuih theih nadingin gamtat sia khempeuh ka pelh hi. 
Psalms119:102 Nangmah in hong hilh khin na hih manin na biakna ngeina kipte panin kei ka pial kei hi. 
Psalms119:103 Nangma thute khum mahmah a, khuaizu sangin khum zaw hi." 
Psalms119:104 Na thuhilhnate hangin thu theihtelna ka ngah hi. Tua ahih ciangin a man lo lampi khempeuh ka mudah hi. 
Psalms119:105 Nangma thu pen lam hong lak ding meivak hi a, ka paina lampi ah khuavak ahi hi." 
Psalms119:106 A thuman ahi nangmah biakna ngeina kipte a zui dingin ka kiciam khin a, ka kipsak khin hi." 
Psalms119:107 Nakpi takin gimna ka thuak hi. Topa aw, nong ciam sa bangin kei hong nungtasak in." 
Psalms119:108 Topa aw, phatin kong biaknate hong sang inla, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:109 Nisimin ka nuntakna a lauhuai sungah om ngitnget a, ahih hangin nangma thu ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:110 Migilote in kei thang hong siah uh a, ahih hangin na thuhilhnate panin kei ka pial kei hi." 
Psalms119:111 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte tawntung keima luah ahi hi. Tuate pen keima lungdamna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:112 Nangma ngeina kipte ka sih mateng a zui tawntung dingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi. 
Psalms119:113 Nangma tungah a thuman lote ka mudah a, ahih hangin keimah in nangma thu ka deih hi." 
Psalms119:114 Nang pen keima bukna mun le kei hong hupa na hi hi. Na thuciamna ka muang hi. 
Psalms119:115 No, siatna a bawlte aw, Pasianʼ thupiakte ka zuih theih nadingin kei kiang panin paikhia un." 
Psalms119:116 Kei ka nuntak theih nadingin na thuciamna tawh kizui-in kei hong huh inla, ka lametna ah kei hong zahhuaisak kei in." 
Psalms119:117 Ka suahtak theih nading le na ngeina kipte sungah nuamsa-in ka om ngitnget theih nadingin kei hong huh in. 
Psalms119:118 Nangma ngeina kipte panin a pial khiate khempeuh na nil khia hi. Amauʼ khem siamna a mawkna ahi hi. 
Psalms119:119 Leitung a migilote khempeuh sik-ek bangin na ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin na teci pannate ka deih hi. 
Psalms119:120 Nang kong zahtakna hangin ka khuasikmul suak a, na thukhennate ka zahtak hi." 
Psalms119:121 Thutang thumanin ka gamta hi. Hong nengniamteʼ khut sungah kei hong nusia kei in. 
Psalms119:122 Na nasem pa adingin nangmah hong kikham inla, mi kiphasakte hong nengniamsak kei in." 
Psalms119:123 Nangma hotkhiatna le a man na thuciamna hong tun ding ka etna-in ka mitte a gim ta hi. 
Psalms119:124 Na itna kip tawh kituakin na nasem pa tungah hong bawl inla, na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:125 Kei pen na nasem pa ka hi hi. Na thuhilhnate ka theih nadingin thu theihtelna hong guan in. 
Psalms119:126 Topa aw, nangma thu kipalsat khin ahih ciangin thu na khen ding hun hi ta hi." 
Psalms119:127 Tua ahih ciangin khamte, le kham hoih pente sangin nangma thupiakna ka deih zaw hi." 
Psalms119:128 Tua ahih ciangin na thuhilhnate khempeuh tawh a kituakin kei ka gamta a, a man lo lampi khempeuh ka mudah hi." 
Psalms119:129 Na thuhilhnate lamdang pha mahmah a, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh tuate ka zui hi." 
Psalms119:130 Na thute gentelna in khua vaksak a, thu thei lote tungah thu theihtelna a guan hi." 
Psalms119:131 Na thupiakte ka lunggulhna-in ka kam ka-in ka leii ka kha hi. 
Psalms119:132 Nangmah hong itte tungah na hih ngei bangin kei lamah hong kihei-in kei hong hehpih in. 
Psalms119:133 Na hong ciam sa bangin ka puk nading panin hong kem inla, keima tungah siatna gualzosak kei in." 
Psalms119:134 Nangma thuhilhte ka zuih theih nadingin hong nengniamteʼ kiang pan kei hong hon khia in. 
Psalms119:135 Na nasem pa tungah na mai hong taangsak inla, na ngeina kipte hong hilh in." 
Psalms119:136 Mite in nangma thu zui lo uh ahih manin ka khitui hawk luanin a luang hi. 
Psalms119:137 Topa aw, nang na thuman a, na thukhennate zong thuman mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:138 Nangma koih sa ngeina kipte thumanin thutak hi. 
Psalms119:139 Ka galte in nangma thu kin het lo uh ahih manin keima hehna mei bangin a kuang hi. 
Psalms119:140 Na thuciamnate kician mahmah a, na nasem pa in tuate deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:141 Kei ka neu a, hong kisimmawh hi. Ahih hangin na thuhilhnate ka mangngilh tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:142 Nangma thumanna kip tawntung a, na thukham zong man tawntung hi." 
Psalms119:143 Dahna le lungkhamna ka tungah hong tung a, ahih hangin na thupiaknate nuam ka sakna ahi hi." 
Psalms119:144 Na teci pannate a tawntungin thuman hi. Thu theihtelna hong guan in; tua hileh ka nungta ding hi. 
Psalms119:145 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nang tungah kong kiko hi. Hong dawng in, Topa! Na ngeina kipte ka zui ding hi." 
Psalms119:146 Nang tungah kong kiko hi. Na thuhilhnate ka zuih theih nadingin kei hong hon in. 
Psalms119:147 Khuavak ma-in tho-in huhna ngenin kong kiko a, nangma thuciamna hong tun ding lamenin ka om niloh hi." 
Psalms119:148 Nangma thuciamna a lung ngaingai dingin zan khuavakin ka zan hak hi. 
Psalms119:149 Topa aw, na itna kip tawh a kizui-in ka aw hong za inla, nangma thutang tawh kizui-in ka nuntakna hong kem in." 
Psalms119:150 Gitloh ngimna tawh kei hong bawlsia mite in kei hong neh ta uh a, amaute in nangma thu ngaihsutin nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms119:151 Ahih hangin Topa aw, kei kiangah nang nong nai a, na thupiaknate khempeuh ahi taktak vive ahi hi." 
Psalms119:152 Tuate a tawntungin a kip dingin na bawl ahihna thu, nangma thuhilhnate panin sawtpi-in ka thei hi." 
Psalms119:153 Ka thuakna hong en inla, kei hong hon khia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thu ka mangngilh kei hi." 
Psalms119:154 Ka thu ah hong pang inla, kei hong suaktasak in. Na ciam sa bangin kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms119:155 Migilote, kihon khia lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in na thukhamte zui lo uh hi." 
Psalms119:156 Topa aw, na hehpihna lian hi. Na biakna ngeina kip tawh a kituakin kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms119:157 Kei hong bawlsiate, ka langte tam mahmah a, ahih hangin nangma thu panin kei ka pial tuan kei hi." 
Psalms119:158 Thuman lo mite ka muh ciangin ka kih mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nangma thupiakte zui lo uh hi. 
Psalms119:159 Nangma thuhilhnate bangzah takin ka deihna hong ngaihsun in. Topa aw, na itna kip tawh a kizui-in kei hong hon in." 
Psalms119:160 Na thubulpi thumanna hi a, a man mahmah, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh a tawntungin kip paisuak hi." 
Psalms119:161 Uliante in thu om lopi-in kei hong bawlsia uh a, ahih hangin na thute lamdang sa mahmah in ka thupi ngaihsut hi." 
Psalms119:162 Van kinusia tampi tak a ngah pa bangin na thuciamna ah ka lung a dam mahmah hi. 
Psalms119:163 Zuaunate zadahin ka kih a, ahih hangin nangma thu ka deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:164 Nangmah biakna ngeina kipte hangin nisimin sagih vei nang kong phat hi. 
Psalms119:165 Nangma thu a deihte in lungnopna lianpi ngah uh a, amaute a tuksak zo ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Psalms119:166 Topa aw, nong hotkhiat ding ka ngak a, na thupiakte ka sem hi." 
Psalms119:167 Na thuhilhnate ka zui a, tuate ka nak deih mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:168 Na thuhilhnate le na ngeina kip omte khempeuh hoihtakin ka zui a, ka gamtatna khempeuh nangmah in na hong mu hi." 
Psalms119:169 Topa aw, kong kikona aw, na kiang hong tung henla, nangma thu om sa tawh kizui-in thu theihtelna kei hong guan in." 
Psalms119:170 Keima thumna in na kiang hong ban henla, nangma thu om sa tawh kizui-in kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms119:171 Na ngeina kipte kei hong hilh na hih manin kong phat tawntung ding hi. 
Psalms119:172 Na thupiak khempeuh man mahmah ahih manin nangma thu phatna la ka sa ding hi. 
Psalms119:173 Nangma thuhilhte hong zui ka hih manin keimah hong huh dingin a kiging sa-in om tawntung in. 
Psalms119:174 Topa aw, nong hotkhiat ding ka lamen a, nangma khut sungah nuam ka sa mahmah hi." 
Psalms119:175 Nang kong phat theih nadingin kei hong nungtasak inla, nangmah biakna ngeina kipte kei hong huhsak in." 
Psalms119:176 A gammang tuu bangin lam ka pial khin hi. Tua ahih manin na nasem pa hong zong in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thupiaknate ka pelh kei hi. 
Psalms120:1 Ka cihmawh ciangin Topaʼ tungah ka kiko a, amah in hong dawng hi." 
Psalms120:2 Topa aw, mizuaute le mi khemteʼ kiang panin kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms120:3 Mi khem theite aw, noteʼ tungah bang hong kipia dinga, noteʼ tungah bang hong kihih ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms120:4 Galhang paʼ thal hiamte le sesing hol-am hi ding hi. 
Psalms120:5 Note lakah ka om khak pen Meshek gam sungah ten khak sangin haksa zaw a, Kedar mite lakah ten khak sangin siahuai zaw hi." 
Psalms120:6 Gal kilemna a deih lo mite lakah sauvei ka teng lua kha hi. 
Psalms120:7 Kei pen gal kilemna a ngaihsun mi ka hi hi. Ahih hangin kilem nading thu ka gen ciangin amaute in gal kido ding utna tengin nei uh hi. 
Psalms121:1 Keimah in mual tung lam ka en to hi. Keimah huhna koi lai pan hong pai ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms121:2 Vanlelei a bawl Topaʼ kiang panin keimah huhna hong pai hi. 
Psalms121:3 Amah in ka khe taalsak lo dinga, kei hong kem pa lusu lo ding hi." 
Psalms121:4 En un, Israel a kem pa lusu lo a, zong ihmu lo hi." 
Psalms121:5 Topa in nang hong cing dinga, nangmah a hong hu dingin na kiangah hong om hi." 
Psalms121:6 Sunin ni in nang hong gimsak lo dinga, zanin kha in zong nang hong su kha lo ding hi." 
Psalms121:7 Topa in siatna khempeuh panin nang hong hu dinga, amah in a muanhuai-in nang hong kem ding hi." 
Psalms121:8 Topa in tua kipan a tawntungin na vak suk na vak tohna ah nang hong kem ding hi. 
Psalms122:1 Amaute in kei tungah, “ Topaʼ inn ah pai ni,” hong cih uh ciangin kei ka kipak hi." 
Psalms122:2 Jerusalem aw, na kulh kongpi sungah kote hong tungin ka ding khinta uh hi." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem khuapi pen Israel-te tungah thu a kipiak sa bangin Topaʼ tungah lungdamna a ko dingin Topaʼ minamte, Israel minamte, a hong pai tohna, khuapi lian tawh a kibangin a kibawl, kip takin a kilam bikbek khuapi ahi hi." 
Psalms122:4  
Psalms122:5 Davidʼ innkuanteʼ kumpi tokhom, thukhen nading kumpi tokhomte, tua lai ah kikoih hi." 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem khuapi, a nopsak nading thu ngen unla, “Nang hong itte a daupai tahen." 
Psalms122:7 Na khua sungah lungnopna om henla, na galvilna tausangteʼ huam sungah lungmuanna om tahen,” ci-in ngen un." 
Psalms122:8 Sanggamte le kikholhpihte ka khualna-in, “Jerusalem in nopna om tahen,” ka ci ding hi." 
Psalms122:9 Topa eiteʼ Pasianʼ inn ka khualna-in nangma hoih nading thu ka ngen ding hi. 
Psalms123:1 Vantungah a om pa aw, nangmah kong en to hi." 
Psalms123:2 Nasem pasalte in a topa uh muang a, nasem numeite in a tonu uh a muan mah bangin ko tungah hehpihna nong neih matengin Topa koteʼ Pasian kong mitsuan uh hi." 
Psalms123:3 Kote hong hehpih in. Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote in ka thuak zawh loh uh simmawhna ka thuak uh hi." 
Psalms123:4 A ututin a gamta mite in kote a hong zahkona, a kiphasak mite in hong simmawh bawlna hangin ka gim thuakna uh sauvei lua khinta hi." 
Psalms124:1 Israel mite aw, Topa in hong panpih lo hileh i tuah ding thu thei un." 
Psalms124:2 Eite langpangin mite hong kipat ciangin eiteʼ lamah Topa hong pang lo hileh," 
Psalms124:3 eiteʼ tungah a hehna uh a kisosuah ciangin amaute in eite a hingin hong nawmvalh khin ding uh hi. 
Psalms124:4 Tuikhang in eite hong tai-in, tuihual in hong tum khin dinga," 
Psalms124:5 tuipi husiate in hong tuum mang khin ding hi. 
Psalms124:6 Amauteʼ suksiat dingin eite a hong pia khia lo Topa in thupha ngah tahen. 
Psalms124:7 Thangsiahteʼ thangzak panin vasa a suahtak bangin eite i suakta hi. Thangkhau kibot tat a, eite i suakta khinta hi." 
Psalms124:8 Vanlelei a bawl Topaʼ tung panin eite huhna hong pai hi. 
Psalms125:1 Topa a muang mite pen liing het loin a om tawntung Zion Mual tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms125:2 Jerusalem kimkot ah mualte a om mah bangin ama miteʼ kimkot ah tu-a kipan a tawntungin Topa om ding hi. 
Psalms125:3 Thuman mite a khialh khak loh nadingun amau a kipia leitang tungah migilote in amaute uk paisuak lo ding hi. 
Psalms125:4 Topa aw, a hoih mite tung le na thupiakna a zui mite tungah hehpihna hong nei in." 
Psalms125:5 Ahih hangin amauʼ gitlohna a zuite pen siatna a bawlte gim na piak ciangin amaute tawh pia khawm in. Israel tungah nopna om tahen! 
Psalms126:1 Topa in Zion ah eite hong ciah pihkik ciangin i mang tawh kibang liang hi. 
Psalms126:2 Lungdamin i nui a, lungdam lua-in la i sa hi. Tua ciangin minam dangte kiho-in, “ Topa in amau adingin na lianpite bawl khinta hi,” kici uh hi." 
Psalms126:3 Topa in eite adingin na lianpite bawl khinta a, eite i kipak hi." 
Psalms126:4 Topa aw, lei keuna munah guah in tui a puak bangin koteʼ nopsaknate a ngei hong bangsakkik ta in." 
Psalms126:5 Khitui tawh khai a tuhte lungdamin kikona tawh an la sak ta in. 
Psalms126:6 Kap kawmin kuan khia-in a tuh ding khaici a pua mi lungdamin kikona tawh buhlomte pua-in hong ciah ding hi. 
Psalms127:1 Topa in inn lam pih kei leh innlamteʼ sepna a mawkna ahi hi. Topa in khuapi hut pih kei leh khuapi cingteʼ cinna a mawkna ahi hi. 
Psalms127:2 Zingsangin tho baihin, gimpi a nangma sep sa an na nek hakna zong a mawkna mah ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ama itte tungah a ihmut sung nangawnun a pia hi." 
Psalms127:3 En un, tate pen Topaʼ tung pan a letsong hi a, tapate pen ama hong piak thupha ahi hi." 
Psalms127:4 Mi khat in a khangno lai-in a neih tate pen galhang paʼ khut sunga a om a thaltangte tawh kibang hi. 
Psalms127:5 A thallawng dimin tua bang thaltang a nei pa mi lungdam ahi hi. Amah guallel ngei lo dinga, zahhuai ngei lo ding hi." 
Psalms128:1 Topa zahtakin ama thu a zui mi khempeuh thupha ngah mi ahi hi. 
Psalms128:2 Na khut tawh na sep thaman na ne dinga, na lungdamin na maavang ding hi." 
Psalms128:3 Nangma inn sungah na zi, a gah pha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang dinga, na sabuai kiimah a tu na tate, oliv no dawng hilhhelh tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Psalms128:4 En un, Topa a zahtak mi tua bangin thupha kipia ding hi." 
Psalms128:5 Topa in Zion panin nang thupha hong pia henla, na nuntak sung tawntung Jerusalemʼ nopsakna mu ta in." 
Psalms128:6 Na tute a mu dingin hong siam tahen. Israel tungah nopna om tahen! 
Psalms129:1 “Ka neu lai a kipanin nakpi takin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh hi,” Israel in tu-in ci tahen." 
Psalms129:2 “Ka neu lai a kipanin nakpi takin amaute in kei hong gimsak uh a, ahih hangin amaute in kei hong zo nai lo uh hi." 
Psalms129:3 Lokhote in lei a kuih bangin ka nungzang hong kuikek uh a, tu-ma-kuakte tawh kibangsak uh hi." 
Psalms129:4 Topa thuman a, amah in migiloteʼ henna khaute su tat khinta hi,” amaute in ci ta uh hen." 
Psalms129:5 Zion a mudahte khempeuh maizumin kinungkiksak tahen. 
Psalms129:6 Amaute pen a khan khit ma-a a vul, innkhum zanga lopa, an at pa in a khut sungah a kaihkhop loh, buhlom hen pa in a ang ah a pom loh, amau a mu khate in, “ Topaʼ thupha na tungah om tahen. Topaʼ min tawh thupha kong pia uh hi,” a cih loh mite tawh kibangsak in." 
Psalms129:7  
Psalms129:8  
Psalms130:1 Topa aw, ka lungkham mahmahna panin nang tungah kong kiko hi." 
Psalms130:2 Topa aw, ka aw hong za in. Ka thumna awgingte hong ngai in." 
Psalms130:3 Topa aw, nangmah in mawhneite ciamteh lecin, Topa aw, kua in thuak zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Psalms130:4 Ahih hangin nangmah hong kizahtak theih nadingin nangmah in mawhna na maisak hi. 
Psalms130:5 Topaʼ hong huh ding lawpna tawh ka ngak a, ama thugen ka muang hi." 
Psalms130:6 Galvilte in zingsang hun ding a ngaklah sangin galvilte in phalvak hun ding a ngaklah sangin, Topa ka ngaklah zaw hi." 
Psalms130:7 Israel aw, Topa muang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ itna kip tawntungin, hong hon khia nuam tawntung hi." 
Psalms130:8 Mawhna a om khempeuh panin amah in Israel-te a hon khia ding hi. 
Psalms131:1 Topa aw, ka lungsim kiliansak nawn lo a, kei ka kihisak nawn kei hi. Kei adingin a lian lua le a lamdang luate ngaihsutin ka nei kei hi." 
Psalms131:2 A nuʼ nawi tawh a kikhen ta naupang bangin daitakin ka om dide zo ta hi. A dai hithiat-a om naupang tawh ka kibang ta hi. 
Psalms131:3 Israel aw, tu a kipanin a tawntungin Topa muang in." 
Psalms132:1 Topa aw, David na ngaihsutna-in a gim thuaknate khempeuh le amah in, “Jakobʼ Vanglian paʼ ten nading, Topa ading mun ka muh matengin ka inn sungah ka lum kei dinga, ka lupna ka zuan kei ding hi. Ka ihmu kei dinga, ka mitkhute ka kikhupsak kei ding hi,” ci-in Jakobʼ Vanglian paʼ tungah hong thuciamna le Topaʼ tungah hong kiciamnate phawk in." 
Psalms132:2  
Psalms132:3  
Psalms132:4  
Psalms132:5  
Psalms132:6 Jaar gam sungah Thuciamna Singkuang ka mu uh hi, cihna thu thak Bethlehem ah kiza hi." 
Psalms132:7 “Ama omna munah va pai ni; ama khengakna ah va bia ni,” ka ci uh hi." 
Psalms132:8 Topa aw, tho inla na vangliatna lim Thuciamna Singkuang tawh na omna munah pai in." 
Psalms132:9 Na mite na hotkhiatna thu, na siampite in taangko henla, na mi siangthote lungdamin awng ta uh hen." 
Psalms132:10 Na nasem pa David tungah thu na ciam zo hi; na sathau nilh pa nial kei in. 
Psalms132:11 Topa in a pelh loh ding kiciamna taktak khat David tungah kiciam a, “Nangʼ sung pan a na tate khat na kumpi tokhom tungah ka koih ding hi." 
Psalms132:12 Na tate in, amauʼ tungah ka hilh ding ka thuciamna le ka teci pannate a zuih nak uh leh, amauʼ tate zong na kumpi tokhom tungah tu paisuak ding uh hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms132:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion teel khinzo a, amah in tua mun pen ama ten nadingin a deih hi." 
Psalms132:14 “Hih mun pen ka om tawntung nading ahi hi; hih mun deih ka hih manin hih lai ah ka teeng ding hi. 
Psalms132:15 Ama beemlepang thupha tampi ka pia dinga, a mizawngte an ka vak kham ding hi." 
Psalms132:16 Ka hotkhiatna thu, a siampite ka taangkosak dinga, a mi siangthote lungdamin la sa-in awng ding uh hi." 
Psalms132:17 Keimah in tua lai ah Davidʼ suanlekhakte kumpi lianin ka koih dinga, ka sathau nilh paʼ ukna ka kipsak ding hi." 
Psalms132:18 Ama galte maizumna tawh ka dimsak dinga, ahih hangin ama kumpi gam khangin zai semsem ding hi,” na ci hi." 
Psalms133:1 En un, sanggamte pum khat suakin a tut khawm uh ciangin bangzahin hoihin nuam ahi hiam?" 
Psalms133:2 Tua pen a puan ngawng tungah Aaronʼ khamul kai suk zui-in a lu tung panin a taak suk, sathau manpha tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms133:3 Tua pen Zion mualte tungah a kia, Hermon mual pan a hong piang daitui tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in nuntak tawntungna thupha tua munah a pia hi." 
Psalms134:1 Zan khuavakin Topaʼ inn sungah a ding, Topaʼ nasemte khempeuh aw, hong pai-in Topa phat un." 
Psalms134:2 Siangtho mun lamah na khutte uh laam to-in Topa phat un. 
Psalms134:3 Vanlelei a bawl Topa in Zion panin note tungah thupha hong pia tahen. 
Psalms135:1 Topa phat un. I Pasianʼ inn huang sung, Topaʼ inn sunga a ding, Topaʼ nasemte aw, Topa phat un; ama min phat un." 
Psalms135:2  
Psalms135:3 Topa phat un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih hi. Ama minphatna la sak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah phatnophuai hi. 
Psalms135:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama adingin Jakob teel a, ama neihsa dingin Israel teel khinta hi." 
Psalms135:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian hi, ci-in ka thei a, eiteʼ Topa pen pasian dang khempeuh sangin a lian zaw hi." 
Psalms135:6 Vantung le leitung, tuipi le a thukna sung khempeuh ah Topa in ama ut peuhpeuh a bawl hi." 
Psalms135:7 Amah in leimong panin meiipi kaisakin, guahzuk nadingin khuaphialepte bawl a, a huihkua panin huih a pusuaksak hi." 
Psalms135:8 Amah in Egypt gam sungah mihing ganhing tacil khempeuh a vatmai hi. 
Psalms135:9 Egypt aw, nangma sungah lim le nalamdangte, Faro le a nasem khempeuhte gimpiakna-in a lak hi." 
Psalms135:10 Minam tampite vat mai-in kumpi vangliante that a," 
Psalms135:11 Amor kumpipa Sihon, Bashan kumpipa Og le Kanaan kumpite a that hi." 
Psalms135:12 Amauʼ leitang khempeuh, ama mi Israel-teʼ luah dingin a pia khia hi." 
Psalms135:13 Topa aw, nangma min kip tawntung hi. Topa aw, na minthanna khang tawntungin a kip hi." 
Psalms135:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama miteʼ thu khenin, ama nasemte tungah hehpihna a nei ding hi." 
Psalms135:15 Minam dangteʼ pasian-te pen mihingteʼ khut tawh a kibawl, ngun le kham ahi hi." 
Psalms135:16 Amaute in kam nei napi, pau thei lo uh hi. Amaute in mit nei napi, khua mu thei lo uh hi." 
Psalms135:17 Amaute in bil nei napi, khua za thei lo uh hi. Amauteʼ kam sungah nak suk nak toh theihna nei lo uh hi." 
Psalms135:18 Milim a bawl mite pen milim mah bangsak in. Milim a muang khempeuhte zong tua milimte mah bangsak in. 
Psalms135:19 Israel mite aw, Topa phat un. Aaronʼ innkuante aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms135:20 Levi mite aw, Topa phat un. Topa a zahtakte aw, Topa phat un." 
Psalms135:21 Jerusalem inn-a a nei, Zion-a om Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Topa phat un." 
Psalms136:1 Amah hoih ahih manin Topa tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:2 Lungdamna pen pasian-teʼ Pasianʼ tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:3 Lungdamna pen topateʼ Topaʼ tungah ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms136:4 Nalamdang lian a bawl amah bek Pasian ahi paʼ tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:5 Theihna tawh vantungte a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:6 Tuite tungah leitung a zal pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:7 Khuavak lianpite a bawlpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:8 Sun pen ni a uksak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:9 Zan pen kha le aksite a uksak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:10 Egypt gam tacil khempeuh a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:11 Amauʼ gam sung pan Israel-te a paikhiatpih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:12 A baan zanin a khut thahat tawh a paikhiatpih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:13 San Tuipi a phel kham pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:14 Israel-te tui laizang a kantan sakpa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:15 Ahih hangin Faro le a mihonte San Tuipi sungah a thal paih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:16 Sehnel gam nawkin ama mite a paipih pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:17 Kumpi liante a vatmaipa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:18 Kumpi minthangte a that pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:19 Amor miteʼ kumpipa Sihonʼ hang le, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi;" 
Psalms136:20 Bashan kumpipa Ogʼ hangin, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:21 Amauteʼ leitang pen gamhluah dingin a pia khia pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:22 Ama nasem Israel tungah gamh a a pia pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:23 Mi niam ihih laitakin a hong phawk pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:24 I galteʼ kiang pan eite hong hon khia pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:25 Nuntakna a nei khempeuh an a vak pa tungah, bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi." 
Psalms136:26 Vantung Pasianʼ tungah lungdamna ko un; bang hang hiam cih leh ama itna kip tawntung hi. 
Psalms137:1 Zion khuapi i ngaihsut khak ciangin Babylon luite gei ah eite tu sukin i kapkap hi. 
Psalms137:2 Tua lai-a gialhek kungte tungah i laiza lasaknate i khai hi; 
Psalms137:3 bang hang hiam cih leh ei hong man mite in la i sak ding hong deih a, ei hong bawlsiate in i gualnop ding hong deihin, “Zion late khat hong sak un,” hong ci uh hi." 
Psalms137:4 Topaʼ la, gam dangah bangci sak theih ding ihi hiam?" 
Psalms137:5 Jerusalem khuapi aw, nang kong mangngilh taak leh ka taklam khut buisum tahen!" 
Psalms137:6 Nang kong phawk kei a, keiʼ lungdamna a lian pen sangin Jerusalem a sang zaw-in kong koih kei taak leh ka dang tawng ah ka leii toncip tahen!" 
Psalms137:7 Topa aw, Jerusalem a siat hun lai-in Edom mite in, “Sumai un, sumai un! A bulpi dongin sumai un!” a cih vialna uh phawk in." 
Psalms137:8 Mi susia Babylon aw, koteʼ tungah nong bawl bangin nang tungah hong thuk pa in lungdamna ngah tahen!" 
Psalms137:9 Na taneute hong laksakin suangtumpi denna-in a hong neihsak pa in lungdamna ngah tahen! 
Psalms138:1 Topa aw, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh nangma tungah lungdamna kong ko a, pasian-teʼ mai ah nangmah phatna ka sa hi." 
Psalms138:2 Na biakinn siangtho lamah kei ka kun a, na itna kip le na thumanna hangin na min kong phat hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dang khempeuh sangin na min le na thu a liatzawkna na lak hi." 
Psalms138:3 Nang kong sap ciangin kei nong dawng a, na thahatna tawh kei nong tha khauhsak hi." 
Psalms138:4 Topa aw, leitung khempeuh in na thuciamnate za khin uh ahih manin nang hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms138:5 Topaʼ minthanna lian mahmah ahih manin amaute in Topaʼ nasepna ziate la-in sa ding uh hi. 
Psalms138:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa lian mahmah napi-in amah in a neute don a, a kiphasakte ahihleh amah in gamlapi panin mu thei veve hi." 
Psalms138:7 Haksatna tuamtuamte ka thuak ciangin kei nong kem hi. A heh ka galte, keiʼ tangin nong dosak a, na thahatna tawh kei na hong hon khia hi." 
Psalms138:8 Topa in kei adingin a ngaihsutte hong tungsak ding hi. Topa aw, na itna kip tawntung hi. Na sep sa na maban hong tun ta in." 
Psalms139:1 Topa aw, nangmah in kei na hong en tel a, nong thei khin hi." 
Psalms139:2 Nangmah in ka hek sukna, ka hek tohnate na thei hi. Nangmah in ka ngaihsutnate gamlapi pek panin na thei hi." 
Psalms139:3 Nangmah in ka sep laitak ahi a, ka khawl laitak ahi zongin na hong mu a, ka gamtatna khempeuh a vekpi-in na thei hi." 
Psalms139:4 Topa aw, kam khat bek nangawn ka paukhiat ma-in, nangmah in ka gen ding teng a vekpi-in na thei khin hi." 
Psalms139:5 Nangmah in ka nung le ka mai ah nong dal a, na thahatna tawh kei na hong hu hi." 
Psalms139:6 Tua bangin kei nong theihna pen kei adingin lamdang lua mahmah a, thuthuk lua ahih manin keiʼ theih tel zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms139:7 Nangmah a pelh dingin koi ah pai dinga, nangma omna panin koi lai ah tai khia ding ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms139:8 Vantungah kah to leng tua lai ah nang na om dinga, Leinuai misiteʼ gamah lupna bawl taleng zong tua lai ah zong nang na om veve ding hi." 
Psalms139:9 Leimong pekah leengin, tuipi mong pekah om taleng zong," 
Psalms139:10 tua lai nangawn ah nangma khut in kei hong paipihin, na khut taklam in kei hong len ding hi." 
Psalms139:11 “Khuamial in kei hong tuamcip henla, ka kiim a khuavak omte zan khuamial suak hen,” ci taleng zong," 
Psalms139:12 tua nangawn ah, nangma adingin khuamial pen mial lo a, zan khuamial pen sun nitaang tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang adingin khuamial pen khuavak mah bang lel hi." 
Psalms139:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pumpi na khempeuh na hong piangsak a, ka nuʼ gil sungah keimah nong khuituah hi." 
Psalms139:14 Kihtak dingin a kilawm na hih manin nang kong phat hi. Na nasepnate lamdang mahmah! Nangmah in kei nong lim theih mahmah hi. 
Psalms139:15 A thukna sung mun simtham ah kei hong kikhui tuahin hong kibawl laitakin, ka guh ka taang, na mai ah kiliah lo hi." 
Psalms139:16 A kipiangsak nai lo keima pumpi nate na mit in a mu hi. Ka pumpi nate khat beek a om ma, ka ni zah ding a kiciangtan laitakin, tuate khempeuh na laibu sungah kigelh khin hi." 
Psalms139:17 Pasian aw, na ngaihsutnate kei adingin manpha mahmah a, tuate khempeuh a vekpi-in zai mahmah hi." 
Psalms139:18 Tuate a mal sim leng sehnel sangin tam zaw hi. Ka khanlawh ciangin nang tawh ka om khawm lai hi. 
Psalms139:19 Pasian aw, migilote that inla, kei kiang panin mi that theite pai khiasak in." 
Psalms139:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong dem uh a, ngimna hoih lo tawh nang hong pang uh hi." 
Psalms139:21 Topa aw, nang hong mudah mite keʼn mudah hi lo ka hi hiam? Nangʼ langah hong pangte keʼn kih hi lo ka hi hiam?" 
Psalms139:22 Amaute ka mudah mahmah a, amaute ka galin ka seh hi." 
Psalms139:23 Pasian aw, kei hong en tel inla, ka lungsim hong thei in. Kei hong sit inla, ka ngaihsutnate hong thei in." 
Psalms139:24 Kei sungah siat theihna a om kha hiam hong en inla, tawntung lampi ah kei hong kha in." 
Psalms140:1 Topa aw, migilote kiang panin kei hong hon khia inla, mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms140:2 Amaute in a lung sung uh ah thusia geelgeel uh a, gal phuang ngitnget uh hi." 
Psalms140:3 A leii uh gulpi leii bang a, a thugente uh gulgu bang hi." 
Psalms140:4 Topa aw, migiloteʼ khut sung panin kei hong cing inla, kei, suk paih ding a hong sawm mi ngongtatte kiang panin kei hong kem in." 
Psalms140:5 Mi kiphasakte in keimah hong siahna-in tehlop tung sim uh a, amaute in ngenthang zakin lam gei ah thangzak tawh kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms140:6 Topaʼ tungah hih bangin ka ci hi: Nang pen keima Pasian na hi hi; ka thumna awte hong ngai in, Topa!" 
Psalms140:7 Topa, keima Topa, a thahat hong hon khia pa aw, gal kidona sungah keimah nong hu hi." 
Psalms140:8 Topa aw, migilo paʼ deihnate tangtungsak kei inla, ama thusia sawmna a maban sotsak kei in!" 
Psalms140:9 Kei hong umcih mite gualzosak kei inla, kei hong sawmnate uh amauʼ lu tung mah tusak in!" 
Psalms140:10 Amaute tungah mei-am kuang zusak in. A thokik zo nawn lo dingin dum sungah amaute kiasak in! 
Psalms140:11 Mi gensia pa leitungah mavangsak kei inla, mi ngongtat pa pen thusia in sulzuih tahen!" 
Psalms140:12 Topa in gimna a thuak miteʼ thu a panpihna, mi cimawhte adingin thu a manin a khenna ka thei hi." 
Psalms140:13 Thuman mite in nangma min hong phat pelmawh ding uh a, lungsim thutangte pen nangma omna ah teeng ding uh hi." 
Psalms141:1 Topa aw, nang kong sam hi; hong kinawh in. Nang kong sap ciangin ka aw hong ngai in." 
Psalms141:2 Ka thungetna pen na mai ah paknamtui bangsak inla, ka khutte ka lap tohna pen nitak biakpiakna bangsak in." 
Psalms141:3 Topa aw, keima kam a cing ding khat koih inla, ka mukteʼ kongkhak a vil ding khat koih in." 
Psalms141:4 Mawh bawlnopna lungsim hong neisak kei inla, a gilo mite tawh hong kikhawlsak kei in. Amauʼ anlimte hong duhgawhsak kei ta in." 
Psalms141:5 Mipha pa kei hong vuasak inla, ahih hangin migilote ka lu sathau nilhsak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gitloh gamtatnate nakpi takin langpangin thu ka ngenngen hi." 
Psalms141:6 Amaute, thu kisitin mawhsakna a thuak uh ciangin, Topaʼ thute man hi, ci-in a thei ding uh hi." 
Psalms141:7 Mi khat in suangpi khat sukhamin leitungah a thehthang gawp bangin Leinuaiʼ kongvang ah amauʼ guhte kithehthang hi. 
Psalms141:8 Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, nang kong muang tawntung a, nangmah kong bel hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong nusia kei in." 
Psalms141:9 Amaute in kei hong siahna uh tehlop le siatna bawlteʼ thangzak panin kei hong kem in. 
Psalms141:10 Kei ka suahtak khit ciangin amauʼ ngenthang sung mahah migilote awksak in. 
Psalms142:1 Topaʼ hong huh ding ngenin ka kiko a, Topaʼ tungah ka thum hi." 
Psalms142:2 Ama mai ah ka lungkim lohna ka sung a, ama mai ah ka haksatna teng ka gen hi." 
Psalms142:3 Ka cih nading ka theih nawn loh ciangin, amah in ka mailam ding hong theihsak hi. Ka paina lampi ah ka galte in tehlop khat tawh kei hong siah uh hi." 
Psalms142:4 Ka kiim ka pam khuadakin ka en kawikawi a, ahih hangin kei hong huh ding kuamah om lo hi. Ka belh ding kuamah om lo a, kuamah in kei hong don lo hi." 
Psalms142:5 Topa aw, nang tungah kong kiko hi. Nang pen keima belh na hi a, a hingteʼ leitang ah keima tanh na hi hi, ka hong ci hi." 
Psalms142:6 Ka kikona hong ngai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nakpi takin kei hong kiniamkoih suk hi. Kei hong bawlsiateʼ kiang pan hong hon khia in. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei adingin amaute hat lua uh hi. 
Psalms142:7 Thong sung panin kei hong la khia in. Tua ciangin nangma mite tawh kong phatkhawm ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh itna lianpi tawh kei tungah nong gamta hi. 
Psalms143:1 Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za inla, kong thumnate hong ngai in. Na thumanna le na thutakna tawh kizui-in kei hong dawng in." 
Psalms143:2 Na nasem pa, thu hong sit kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma mai ah mihing a dik zo kuamah om lo hi." 
Psalms143:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh gal in kei hong bawlsia-in hong zo gawp hi. Sau veipi lai-a a site bangin a mial sungah hong tusak hi. 
Psalms143:4 Tua ahih ciangin cih nading ka thei nawn kei a, ka lungtang ah si teng nawn lo hi." 
Psalms143:5 Hun luite ka phawk a, na sep sa khempeuh ka ngaih sunsun hi. Na khut in a sep sa nate ka lung ngaingai hi." 
Psalms143:6 Thu ngenin nang lamah ka khutte ka hong zan a, lei keu in tui a duh bangin nang ka hong duh hi." 
Psalms143:7 Topa aw, kei hong dawng mengmeng in. Kei ka cimawh ta hi. Leihawm sung misite kiangah a pai sukte tawh ka kibat loh nadingin kei kiang panin na maitang seel kei in." 
Psalms143:8 Nang hong muang ka hih manin zingsang simin na itna kip kei hong phawksak in. Nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin ka pai nading lampi hong hilh ta in. 
Psalms143:9 Topa aw, ka langteʼ kiang panin kei hong hon khia in. Nangmah a beel dingin ka hong tai hi." 
Psalms143:10 Keima Pasian na hih manin nangma deih bangin a gamta dingin kei hong hilh in. Kei hong hehpih inla, lam phei ah hong kha in." 
Psalms143:11 Topa aw, nangma min na ngaihsutna-in keima nuntakna hong kem in. Nangma thumanna tawh kituakin haksatna panin hong paikhiatpih in." 
Psalms143:12 Kei pen nangma nasem ka hih manin na itna kip tawh kituakin ka galte khen khia inla, ka langte khempeuh susia in." 
Psalms144:1 Ka khutte galdo nading ka khutmete galkap nadingin a hilh, keimah a hong hu, Topa in thupha ngah tahen." 
Psalms144:2 Amah pen ka suangpi le ka munkip muanhuai, ka kulhpi le hong hon khia pa, ka lum le ka belh pa, ka nuai ah mite a zopa ahi hi." 
Psalms144:3 Topa aw, nangmah in na hong phawk tham dingin mi pen bang hi a, nangmah in na hong ngaihsut tham dingin mihingʼ tapa bang ahi hiam?" 
Psalms144:4 Mi pen husan khat tawh kibang a, ama hunte pen a tai dandan niliim tawh kibang hi." 
Psalms144:5 Topa aw, na vanpite niamsak inla, hong pai suk in. Mualte lawng inla, meikhu suaksak in." 
Psalms144:6 Khuaphialep phiasak inla, amaute kithehthangsak in. Na thaltangte lawn inla, amaute susia in." 
Psalms144:7 A sangna mun panin na khut hong zan inla, tui lian lauhuaite le gamdang miteʼ vangliatna panin hong hon khia in." 
Psalms144:8 A kam uh tawh zuau thu a gente le limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuau thu mah a gen lai veveteʼ kiang pan kei hong phel inla, hong hon khia ta in." 
Psalms144:9 Pasian aw, la thak khat kong sak dinga, harp zang sawm khausai lasakna nang kong tum ding hi." 
Psalms144:10 Kumpite tungah gualzawhna a pia pa, na nasem David a hon khia pa na hi hi." 
Psalms144:11 A gilo galte kiang panin kei hong hon inla, a kam uh tawh zuau thu a gen limtakin kiciamna a bawl khit ciang nangawnin zuau a gen lai veve gamdang miteʼ khut sung pan kei hong hon khia in." 
Psalms144:12 Ka tapate uh a tangval lai-in khang cingin a khauh mahmah singkungte bang ta henla, ka tanute uh a nungak lai-in kumpi inn lamna dinga a kisui innkiu khuampite bang tahen." 
Psalms144:13 Ka saalte uh a dimin an nam khempeuh om ta henla, ka tuute uh a tultul a thenthen-in gamlak ah suak tahen." 
Psalms144:14 Ka kongzingte uh ah cimawhin kikona om kei tahen. 
Psalms144:15 Tua bang thupha a ngah mi mi lungdam ahi hi. Topa pen amauʼ Pasian ahi mite pen mi lungdam ahi hi. 
Psalms145:1 Ka Pasian le ka Kumpipa aw, nangmah hong pahtawi-in a tawntungin nangma min kong phatphat ding hi." 
Psalms145:2 Nisimin hong pahtawi-in a tawntungin nangma min kong phatphat ding hi. 
Psalms145:3 Topa lian hi; nakpi takin phat ding hi a, ama liatna ngaihsut zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms145:4 A khang a khangin nangma nasepnate kiphatphat dinga, a vanglian na bawlnate kigengen ding hi." 
Psalms145:5 Na liatna le na minthanna a lamdang nangma sepnate ka lung ngaingai ding hi. 
Psalms145:6 A vanglian nangma bawlnate mite in taangko ding uh a, nangma vangliatna mah kei zong ka pulak ding hi." 
Psalms145:7 Amaute in nangma liatna, na minthanna gen khia-in nangma thumanna nakpi takin sa ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:8 Topa dikin hehpihna nei a, heh hak mahmah in itna kip lianpi a nei hi." 
Psalms145:9 Topa pen mi khempeuh tungah hoih a, a bawl sa khempeuh tungah hehpihna a nei hi." 
Psalms145:10 Topa aw, nangma bawl sa khempeuh in nangma tungah lungdamna hong ko ding uh a, na mi siangtho khempeuh in nang hong phat ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:11 Amaute in na kumpi gam a minthanna thu gengenin na vangliatna thu sutsut ding uh a," 
Psalms145:12 a vanglian nangma sepnate le na kumpi gam a hoihna, a minthannate mi khempeuh tungah kitheisak ding uh hi." 
Psalms145:13 Nangma kumpi gam pen a kip tawntung kumpi gam hi a, nangma ukna khang tawntungin a kip hi. A thuciamna khempeuh ah Topa thutak mahmah a, a gamtatna khempeuh ah zong hehpihna a nei ahi hi." 
Psalms145:14 Topa in a puk mite khempeuh huh a, niamsakna a thuakte khempeuh a sangtosak hi." 
Psalms145:15 Nuntak husanna a nei khempeuhteʼ mit in nang hong en uh a, a hun a tun ciangin amaute an na vak hi." 
Psalms145:16 Nangmah in na khut na hong a, nuntak husanna a nei khempeuhteʼ deihna a kicingin na pia hi." 
Psalms145:17 Topa pen a sepna khempeuh ah thutang a, a gamtatna khempeuh ah hehpihna a nei hi." 
Psalms145:18 Amah a sam mi khempeuh kiangah Topa nai om a, lungsim takpi tawh a sam mi khempeuh kiangah amah nai om hi." 
Psalms145:19 Amah a zahtakteʼ deihna a kicingin tungsak a, amauteʼ kikona zong za-in amaute a hon khia hi." 
Psalms145:20 Topa in amah a itte khempeuh kem a, ahih hangin migilo khempeuh amah in susia ding hi." 
Psalms145:21 Topa ka phat tawntung ding hi. Mi khempeuh in a tawntungin ama min siangtho phat ta uh hen. 
Psalms146:1 Topa phat un. Keʼn, Topa ka phat ding hi." 
Psalms146:2 Ka hin lai teng Topa ka phat dinga, ka nuntak lai teng ka Pasianʼ tungah phatnate ka sa ding hi." 
Psalms146:3 Huhna a hong pia thei lo uliante ahi a, mi mawkmawkte ahi zongin muang kei un." 
Psalms146:4 A husanna a bei ciangin lei ah ciahkik uh a, tua ni mahmah in a ngaihsutnate uh bei ta hi." 
Psalms146:5 Jakobʼ Pasian pen amah huhpa hi-in, ama Topa Pasian a muang mipa mi lungdam ahi hi." 
Psalms146:6 Amah in vanlelei, tuipi le tuate sungah a om khempeuh bawl a, a tawntungin thuman hi." 
Psalms146:7 A kinengniam mite adingin thumanna sem khia a, gilkialte an a vak hi. Topa in thongkiate a khah khia hi." 
Psalms146:8 Topa in mittawte khua a musak hi. Topa in niamsakna a thuak mite sangtosak a, Topa in thuman mite a it hi." 
Psalms146:9 Topa in peemtate kem a, meigong numeite le pa nei lote a huh hi. Ahih hangin amah in migiloteʼ vaihawmna a suksiatsak hi." 
Psalms146:10 Zion aw, nangma Pasian Topa in khang tawntungin uk ding hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms147:1 Topa phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh eiteʼ Pasianʼ tungah phatnate i sak ding hoih hi. Phatna sak ding nuam a, zong a kilawm ahi hi." 
Psalms147:2 Topa in Jerusalem khuapi lam a, amah in a kinil khia Israel-te a kaikhawm hi." 
Psalms147:3 Amah in lungsim kitamte damsak a, amauʼ meimate a tuamsak hi." 
Psalms147:4 Amah in aksite a phazah ding seh a, tua aksite amau min ciatin a sam hi." 
Psalms147:5 Eiteʼ Topa lian a, ama vang lian mahmah hi. Amah in thu a theihtelna pen ngaihsut zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Psalms147:6 Topa in a kisikcip mite laam to-in, migilote leilak a denna hi." 
Psalms147:7 Topa tungah lungdamkohna la sa unla, laiza lasakna tawh eiteʼ Pasianʼ tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms147:8 Amah in vanpite meiipi tawh tuamin, leitung adingin gun bawl a, mualte tungah lopa a posak hi." 
Psalms147:9 Amah in ganhingte le a ham va-aknote an a vak hi. 
Psalms147:10 Ama lungkimna le amah in nuam a saknate pen sakol thahatna le galhangteʼ hang hi lo hi. 
Psalms147:11 Amah a zahtak mite le ama itna kip a muangte tungah Topa a lungkim hi. 
Psalms147:12 Jerusalem khuapi aw, Topa phat in. Zion aw, nangma Pasian phat in." 
Psalms147:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in na kulh kongpi zawlte tosak a, nangma mite thupha hong piaksak hi." 
Psalms147:14 Amah in na gam sungah kilemna bawl a, mangbuh hoih pente tawh nang hong gilvahsak hi." 
Psalms147:15 Amah in thu hong pia a, ama thu manlangin leitung hong tung suk hi." 
Psalms147:16 Amah in tuumul bangin vukkhal hong pia a, vut bangin vukpak hong thehthang hi." 
Psalms147:17 Amah in suangtum bangin tui khalte hong lawn khia hi. Tua a votna kua in thuak zo ding ahi hiam? 
Psalms147:18 Amah in thu pia-in tuate tui suak hi. Amah in a huih nungsak a, tuite a luang hi." 
Psalms147:19 Amah in Jakob tungah ama thu gen a, Israel tungah ama ngeina kipte le ama biakna ngeina kipte a gen hi." 
Psalms147:20 Amah in tua bangin minam dang khat peuhpeuh tungah bawl ngei lo hi. Amaute in amah biakna ngeina kipte thei lo uh hi. Topa phat un. 
Psalms148:1 Topa phat un. Vantung panin Topa phat unla, a sangna panin amah phat un." 
Psalms148:2 Ama vantungmi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Ama mihonte khempeuh aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:3 Ni le kha aw, amah phat un. A taang aksi khempeuh aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:4 Van sang pen te le vantung a om tuite aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:5 Topaʼ min amaute phatsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in thu pia a, amaute a piang hi." 
Psalms148:6 Amaute a tawntung a om dingin amah in kipsak a, a palsat loh ding uh thupiakna amah in a bawl hi." 
Psalms148:7 Leitung panin Topa phat un, no gulpi liante le tuipi thuk khempeuh," 
Psalms148:8 mei le gial, tuikhal le vuk, ama thupiakna a mang huihpi!" 
Psalms148:9 Amah phat un, no mual liante le mual neute khempeuh, gah a nei singkungte le taamtak singkung khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:10 Gamsate le innsate khempeuh, a bokvak ganhingte le a leeng vasate khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:11 No leitung kumpite le mihing khempeuh, leitung uliante le thukhente khempeuh!" 
Psalms148:12 Nungakte le tangvalte, teeksiate le naupangte aw, amah phat un." 
Psalms148:13 Topaʼ min phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah bek a min lian hi a, ama minthanna pen leitung le vantung sangin sang zaw lai hi." 
Psalms148:14 Amah in ama mite thahatsak a, ama mi siangthote khempeuh, ama mai ah a om Israel-te khempeuh in amah phat uh hi. Topa phat un." 
Psalms149:1 Topa phat un. Topaʼ tungah la thak sa un. A thuman miteʼ kikhopna sungah amah phatna sa un. 
Psalms149:2 Amah a Bawlpa tungah Israel lungdam henla, amauʼ Kumpipaʼ tungah Zion mite kipak tahen." 
Psalms149:3 Lamna tawh amah phat unla, khuang le laiza lasakna tawh ama tungah la ngaih sa un." 
Psalms149:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh ama mite tungah Topa lungdam a, miniamte gualzo sakin a pahtawi hi." 
Psalms149:5 A gualzawhna uh ah thuman mite lungdamin diang uh henla, ama mai ah khukdinin nuamna la sa uh hen." 
Psalms149:6 Minam dangte tungah phu la-in gim a pia ding, a kumpite uh sikkhau tawh henin a mi liante uh sikkol a bulh ding, a kigelh sa thukhenna bangin amaute tungah a sem khia dingin lang nih a hiam namsau a tawi kawmun Pasian phatin awng ta uh hen. Hih pen Pasianʼ miteʼ gualzawhna ahi hi. Topa phat un."

Psalms149:9  
Psalms150:1 Topa phat un. Ama biakinn sungah Pasian phat unla, ama vangliatna mun vantungah amah phat un." 
Psalms150:2 A vanglian ama sepnate hangin amah phat unla, a liat mahmahna tawh kituakin amah phat un." 
Psalms150:3 Peengkul aw tawh amah phat unla, githa lasakna le harp lasakna tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:4 Khuang le lamna tawh amah phat unla, khausai lasaknate le tamngai tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:5 Daltuahte tawh amah phat unla, nakpi takin a ging daltuahte tawh amah phat un." 
Psalms150:6 Husang thei khempeuh in Topa phat un. Topa phat un. 
Proverbs1:1 Davidʼ tapa, Israel kumpi Solomonʼ paunakte:" 
Proverbs1:2 Mite in pilna le thuhoihte a phawk theih nading, khiatna thuk a nei kammalte a theihtheih nading." 
Proverbs1:3 A hoihin a pil gamtat theih nading, thuman, thutang, a kilawmin a gamtat theih nading." 
Proverbs1:4 Thu thei nai lote in a theih nading, khangnote in pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna a ngah nading." 
Proverbs1:5 Mi ciim sate ciimsak semsemin, mi pil sate pilsak semsemin," 
Proverbs1:6 paunakte le thugentehnate hoihtakin thei-in, mipilteʼ kampau le a thugente uh a theih nading ahi hi." 
Proverbs1:7 Topa zahtakna in pilna kipatna hi a, mihaite in pilna le thuhilhna don lo uh hi." 
Proverbs1:8 Ka ta aw, na paʼ hong thuhilhna hoihtakin zui inla, na nuʼ hong thugente ngai in." 
Proverbs1:9 Tua thuhilhnate in na gamtat hong hoihsak dinga, kizepna lukhu le kizepna khi bangin hong etlawmsak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka ta aw, mihoih lote in nang hong zol ciangin, amauʼ zolna zui kei in." 
Proverbs1:11 Amaute in, “Hong pai in, mi khatpeuh va that ni! Mi ommuang khat va muan suam ni!" 
Proverbs1:12 I muh tungin a cidam, a hing kimlai hi napi, i suk khit ciangin a si sa hi ding!" 
Proverbs1:13 Na a manpha a namkimin i sut dinga, tua bang nate i inn dimin i nei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:14 Kote tawh hong kipawl lecin, i ngah khempeuh i hawm ding hi,” hong cih uh hangin ut kei in." 
Proverbs1:15 Ka ta aw, tua bang mite tawh kikhawl kei inla, amaute kiang panin kihem khia in." 
Proverbs1:16 Amaute a sia-in gamta nuam vanvan uh a, mi thah ding lamsang haksa sa het lo uh hi." 
Proverbs1:17 I mat nop vasateʼ muhtangpi-in, i siahna ngenthang zaak leeng a mawkna ahi hi." 
Proverbs1:18 Ahi zongin mite in amauʼ awk nading mah thangsiah uh a, kuamah dang awk loin, amau mah hai awk uh hi." 
Proverbs1:19 Zawhthawh thu tawh miʼ na a sutte in sih lawh tawntung zaw a, hih bangin a gamtate in tua bangmah tuak ngitnget hi." 
Proverbs1:20 Ngai in! Kongzing lampi le van kizuakna phualpi ah pilna hong kiko hi. 
Proverbs1:21 Khuapi kulh kongpi tual le mi a kikhopna mun khempeuh ah nakpi takin hong awng khia a," 
Proverbs1:22 “Mihaite aw, bang tanvei hai omom nuam na hi uh hiam? Bang tanvei pilna thudon loin om ding na hi uh hiam? Pilna ngaihsutin nei ngei lo ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Proverbs1:23 Kong thuhilhna hong ngai un; ka ngaihsutna kong gen dinga, ka theihna kong zasak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:24 Keimah in note hong samsam napi-in nong ngai nuam kei uh a, ka khut hong vanvan napi-in kuamah in nong thudon kei uh hi." 
Proverbs1:25 Ka thugente khempeuh hong thudon loin, kong tainate khempeuh hong mang nuam lo na hih manun," 
Proverbs1:26 lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong nuihsan lel dinga, launa na tuah uh ciangin kong thusim kei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:27 Lungkhamna in huihpiʼ nawk bangin note hong nawk gawpin, pingpeiʼ pei bangin note hong pei gawpin, lungkhamna le sinkhamna na tuah uh ciangin kong don kei ding hi." 
Proverbs1:28 Tua bang hun ciangin kei nong sam ding uh a, ahi zongin kong dawng kei ding hi. Limtakin kei nong zong ding uh a, ahi zongin koi mahah nong mu kei ding uh hi." 
Proverbs1:29 Note in pilna na deih kei uh a, Topa na zahtak nuam kei uh hi." 
Proverbs1:30 Ka thugente na deih kei uh a, kong thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih manun," 
Proverbs1:31 na gamtatna bangun na thuak ding uh a, nomauʼ gamtatna mah in note hong gimsak ding hi." 
Proverbs1:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu thei lote in pilna a don loh manun sih lawh uh a, mihaite in lunghihmawhna a neih loh manun siatlawh uh hi." 
Proverbs1:33 Ahi zongin ka thugenna a ngaite in lungnopna ngah ding uh a, launa nei loin nuam takin om hithiat ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs2:1 Ka ta aw, kong hilhte thei inla, kong gente mangngilh kei in." 
Proverbs2:2 Pilna thute limtakin ngai inla, na theih tel zawh nadingin hanciam in." 
Proverbs2:3 Thu theih nading hanciam takpi inla, thu muh nading hahkat takpi in." 
Proverbs2:4 Ngun, ahih kei leh a kiseel sum manpha zon bangin, hahkatin pilna zong in." 
Proverbs2:5 Tua hileh, Topa zahtakna thu na thei dinga, Pasian na thei tel ding hi." 
Proverbs2:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh pilna a pia pa pen Topa hi a, amah pen pilna le siamna a hilh pa ahi hi." 
Proverbs2:7 Pasian in thuman mite pilna guan a, midikte a hu hi." 
Proverbs2:8 Amah in thutang mite cing a, amah a itte a kem hi." 
Proverbs2:9 Tua hileh thuman le thutang a hoih le a kilawm na thei ding hi. 
Proverbs2:10 Tua ciangin mipil na suak dinga, na pilna hangin nuam na sa ding hi." 
Proverbs2:11 Na thungaihsut theihna le na thutelna in nangmah hong hu-in," 
Proverbs2:12 a sia-in na gamtat khak ding hong kem dinga, kampauna tawh buaina a piangsak thei mi," 
Proverbs2:13 nuntakna manin a nungta lo, mawhna khuamial sungah a gamta," 
Proverbs2:14 a sia-in gamtat ding nuam a sa, a sia-a gamtatna ah a lungkim mahmah," 
Proverbs2:15 mi lungsim kawi, muan theih loh ding mite panin nang hong kem ding hi." 
Proverbs2:16 A pasal tungah citak loin a pasal a nusia, Pasianʼ mai ah a kiciamna a mangngilh, kam khum mahmah tawh nangmah zol ding a hanciam, numei paktatte panin hong cing ding hi." 
Proverbs2:17  
Proverbs2:18 Tua nuʼ inn ah pai lecin sihna lampi a zui na hi a, misite gam a zuan na hi hi." 
Proverbs2:19 Tua bang numei tawh mawhna a bawl mite in nuntak nuam neikik ngei lo uh hi. 
Proverbs2:20 Tua ahih manin mihoihteʼ gamtat bangin na gamta dinga, thuman miteʼ gamtatna na zui ding hi." 
Proverbs2:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi thuman, miginate, hih i leitungah teengin om ding uh a," 
Proverbs2:22 ahi zongin Pasian in leitung panin migilote lawn khia-in, singkung zungbawh bangin mawhneite bot khia ding hi." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka ta aw, kong thuhilhte mangngilh kei inla, kong thugente phawk tawntung in." 
Proverbs3:2 Kong thuhilhte in na khan hong sausak dinga, hong daupaisak ding hi." 
Proverbs3:3 Thumanna le cihtakna khahsuah ngei kei inla, na ngawng ah tuate okin, na lungtang tungah gelh in." 
Proverbs3:4 Tua hileh, Pasianʼ mai le miteʼ mai ah maipha ngahin na maa vang ding hi." 
Proverbs3:5 Na lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa muang inla, nangʼ theihna suang kei in." 
Proverbs3:6 Na hihna khempeuh ah amah phawk in. Tua hileh lampi man amah in hong lak ding hi. 
Proverbs3:7 Nangmah a pilin kingaihsun tawm kei inla, Topa zahtakin a sia peel in." 
Proverbs3:8 Tua hileh nang adingin damna zatui tawh kibang dinga, na meimate hong damsakin na natnate hong daisak ding hi." 
Proverbs3:9 Na neihsa le na anpalte tawh Topa zahtak in. 
Proverbs3:10 Tua hileh na ansalte an tawh kidim dinga, beel dimletin leenggahzu na nei ding hi." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka ta aw, Topaʼ thuhilhna limtakin ngai-in, hong tainate thudon in." 
Proverbs3:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh pa in a pahtak a tapa a thuhilh bangin Topa in a it mite a thuhilh hi. 
Proverbs3:13 Pilna nei-in thu a thei mipa, a lungdam mi ahi hi." 
Proverbs3:14 Pilna nei leeng ngun sangin hoih zaw a, kham sangin zong manpha zaw hi." 
Proverbs3:15 A manpha pen suangmanpha nangawn sangin pilna manpha zaw lai a, mihingteʼ deih theih na lakah tehpih theih ding om lo hi." 
Proverbs3:16 Pilna in khan hong sausak a, hauhna le pahtawina zong hong pia thuah lai hi." 
Proverbs3:17 Pilna in nuntakna hong nuamsak a, lungmuang takin hong omsak den hi." 
Proverbs3:18 Pilna a nei mite a lungdam mi hi a, pilna a nei mite nuntakna singkung tawh kibang uh hi." 
Proverbs3:19 Topa in pilna tawh leitung bawl a, a theihtelna tawh vantung a bawl hi." 
Proverbs3:20 Ama pilna in gun tuite luangsak a, meiite in leitungah guah zusak hi." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka ta aw, pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna len tawntung inla, cikmah ciangin khahsuah ngei kei in." 
Proverbs3:22 Tuate pen nang adingin nuntakna hi dinga, na hoih nadingin kizepna hi ding hi." 
Proverbs3:23 Tua hileh lungmuang takin na nungta dinga, puk nading thu bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:24 Launa om loin nuam takin na lum dinga, zan tawntung lungmuang takin na ihmu thei ding hi." 
Proverbs3:25 Migilote tungah huihpi bangin siatna a tun ciangin, nang na lunghihmawhna ding bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a muanhuai-in nang hong kem dinga, siatna hong tuaksak lo ding hi." 
Proverbs3:27 Na hih zawh ding ahih nakleh midangteʼ kitangsapna huh tawntung in. 
Proverbs3:28 Na vaihawmsak theih pah ding thute ahih nakleh, zing ciangin hong paikik in, ci-in a hun sot to kei in." 
Proverbs3:29 Nangmah hong muangin nangma nai ah a hong teeng na veengpa, gim a ngah nading bangmah vaihawm kei in." 
Proverbs3:30 Nangma tungah siatna bangmah a hong bawl lo, mi khatpeuh tawh thu om lopi-in kimawk tot kei in." 
Proverbs3:31 A ngongtat thei mite eng kha kei inla, amauʼ gamtat bangin gamta kha kei in." 
Proverbs3:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sia-in a gamtate mudah a, thuman mite bek a pawlpih dingin a la hi." 
Proverbs3:33 Topa in migiloteʼ inn sung samsia a, thuman miteʼ inn sung thupha a pia hi." 
Proverbs3:34 Amah in mi kihisakte bangmahin sim lo a, a kiniamkhiatte tungah maipha a pia hi." 
Proverbs3:35 Mipilte in minphatna le pahtawina ngah ding uh a, mihaite in maizumna le mindaina ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs4:1 Tate aw, na pa uhʼ hong hilhnate ngai unla, thu na tel theih nadingun limtakin ngaihsun un." 
Proverbs4:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh kong hilh thute thuhoih ahi hi. Kong hilhte khempeuh limtakin ciamteh un. 
Proverbs4:3 Kei zong tapa khat neihsun ka hi a, naupang no khat ka hih lai-in" 
Proverbs4:4 ka pa in thu hong hilh a, “Ka thugente ciamteh inla, mangngilh kei in. Kong gen bangin gamta in; tua hileh na nungta ding hi." 
Proverbs4:5 Pilna le thu ngaihsut theihna na neih nading hahkat in. Kong gen thute mangngilh kei inla, hoihtakin ngaihsun in." 
Proverbs4:6 Pilna nusia kei in; tua hileh siatna panin nang hong hu ding hi. Pilna deih in; tua hileh lungmuang takin na om nadingin hong kem ding hi. 
Proverbs4:7 Pilna na ngah nading a thupi masa pen hi a, na neih khempeuh na beilawh zongin na zon ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs4:8 Pilna deih in; mi lianin hong bawl ding hi. Limtakin pom in; pahtawina hong ngahsak ding hi. 
Proverbs4:9 Pilna in pahtawina le minthanna nangma tungah hong tungsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Proverbs4:10 Ka ta aw, ka thugente limtakin zui in. Tua hileh na khansau ding hi." 
Proverbs4:11 Na pil nading lampi kong hilh zo a, na gamtatzia ding kong gen zo hi." 
Proverbs4:12 Hoihtakin gamta lecin nang hong nawngkaisak zo ding bangmah om lo dinga, na tai hangin zong na puk kha kei ding hi." 
Proverbs4:13 Hong kihilhnate lencip inla, khahsuah kei in. Na nuntak nading ahih manin limtakin zui in." 
Proverbs4:14 Migilote tawh kikhawl kei inla, amauʼ gamtatnate zui kei in." 
Proverbs4:15 Amauʼ gamtat bangin gamta peuhmah keʼn! Gitlohna peel in! Paisan inla, na maban sem in." 
Proverbs4:16 Migilote in a sia khatpeuh a sep mateng uh lum thei lo uh a, mi khatpeuh a suk zawh mateng uh ihmu thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs4:17 Gitloh gamtatna, annek bangin nuamsa uh a, ngongtatna, tui dawn bangin a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Proverbs4:18 Ahi zongin thuman miteʼ zuih lampi ahihleh sun dong a taang pha semsem zingsang khuavak tung tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs4:19 Migiloteʼ lampi ahihleh zan khuamial bangin mial a, amaute a tuksak, a suih khakte nangawn mu thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka ta aw, ka thugente don inla, ka kammalte ngai in." 
Proverbs4:21 Na kiang panin pai khiasak kei inla, na lungsimah ciamteh in." 
Proverbs4:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua thu a zuite in nuntakna le cidamna-in a nei uh hi. 
Proverbs4:23 Na lungsim ngaihsutnate nuntakna nak hi a, na neihsa a manpha pen bangin na kep ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs4:24 A man lo thu gen ngei kei inla, zuau thu le a kiza khial thei ding kammalte zang het kei in." 
Proverbs4:25 Kisuanna nei het loin om liuliau inla, maizumin kuncip kei in." 
Proverbs4:26 Na khatpeuh na sepna thu thei tel in. Tua hileh na nasep peuhpeuh maavang ding hi. 
Proverbs4:27 Siatna peelin a manin gamta inla, thuman lampi panin themcik zong pial kha kei in." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka ta aw, ka pilna le ka thumuhnate, limtakin ngai-in hong za in." 
Proverbs5:2 Tua hileh a kilawmin na gamtatzia ding na thei dinga, na kampaunate in na pil lamtak hong kilangsak ding hi." 
Proverbs5:3 Numei paktatteʼ kampau khuaizu bangin khum mahmah in a thugente uh a neel dakdak hangin," 
Proverbs5:4 a tawpna ah lungkhamna le natna sim loh nangma tungah bangmah dang hong guan lo hi. 
Proverbs5:5 Amah in sihna gamah nang hong paipih dinga, ama tot lampi pen sihna mun tunna lampi ahi hi." 
Proverbs5:6 Nuntakna lampi ah amah om lo a, nang na phawk loh hangin amah lam pialin a vakvai ahi hi." 
Proverbs5:7 Tate aw, tu-in ka thugente limtakin hong ngai unla, ka thugente mangngilh kei un." 
Proverbs5:8 Tua bang numei tawh kineh kha kei unla, a inn gei nangawn ah pai kha kei un." 
Proverbs5:9 Tua bang na hih kei uh leh na min hoihna teng uh midang tungah tung dinga, hehpihna a nei lo miteʼ khutlum tawh na khansih ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:10 Khual mite in na neihsa teng uh la dinga, na sep sa khempeuh uh midangte in ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:11 Na sih kuan uh ciangin thumin na tau ding uh a, gawngin na guh guak bekun na om ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:12 Tua ciangin, “Bang hangin thu thei hoh lo a, hong kihilhna mang hoh lo ka hi hiam?" 
Proverbs5:13 Kei hong hilh siateʼ thu ka mang nuam kei a, amauʼ hong hilhnate ka don kei kha hi." 
Proverbs5:14 Tua ahih manin tu-in ka cimawh vat a, miʼ mai ah ka min a sia hi,” na ci ciat ding uh hi." 
Proverbs5:15 Na ziʼ tungah citak inla, amah bek itin nei in." 
Proverbs5:16 Pasal dang tawh va vak zau in kongzing lakah va mawh kha ding hi. 
Proverbs5:17 Na zi pen nangma ading bek hi a, midangte tawh na neihkhawm ding hi lo hi." 
Proverbs5:18 Tua ahih ciangin na zi tawh lungkim inla, na teenpih numei tawh lungdam in." 
Proverbs5:19 A it-huai a ngaihbaangin ngaihsun tawntung inla, ama ngaihbaanna tawh lungdamin, ama hong itna tawh lungkim in." 
Proverbs5:20 Ka ta aw, bang hangin numei dang lunggulh dinga, numei dangteʼ ngaihbaanna iplah ding na hi hiam?" 
Proverbs5:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in na gamtatna khempeuh hong mu a, na paina khempeuh ah nang hong en kawikawi hi." 
Proverbs5:22 Migilo paʼ mawhna thangzak bang hi a, ama mawhna thang sung mahah amah a awk hi." 
Proverbs5:23 Ama pumpi ki-uk zo lo ahih manin amah in sih lawh a, ama hai luatna in hankhuk sung a tun hi." 
Proverbs6:1 Ka ta aw, na lawmte khatpeuh in sum leitawi a lak ciangin a loh zawh kei leh ama tangin a lohsak dingin kam na ciam kha hiam?" 
Proverbs6:2 Na kampauna hangin nang hong kimanin, na thuciamna hangin na awk kha hiam?" 
Proverbs6:3 Ka ta aw, tua bang na hih khak leh, tua mipaʼ khut sungah a om na hi hi. Na suahtak theih nadingin manlangin a kiangah pai inla, hong khah nadingin ama kiangah thum in." 
Proverbs6:4 Ih mumu kei inla, om mawkmawk kei in." 
Proverbs6:5 Sabeng paʼ kiang panin a suahtak nadingin sakhi a tai bangin, thang ah a awk vasa a kitom bangin na suahtak nadingin hanciam in." 
Proverbs6:6 Thadahpa aw, miksite kiangah pai inla, amauʼ nuntak zia va en in." 
Proverbs6:7 Amaute in a uk ding le a makai ding kuamah nei lo napi-in," 
Proverbs6:8 khuakhal sungin a nek ding uh, tuk hun sungin kaikhawm khol uh hi." 
Proverbs6:9 Thadahpa aw, bang tanvei lumlum dinga, cik ciangin tho khia ding na hi hiam?" 
Proverbs6:10 Tawm khat sung mengme lai ning, na cih kikalin" 
Proverbs6:11 zawnna le cihmawhna in migilo gutate bangin nang hong su gawp pak ding hi. 
Proverbs6:12 Miginalo pa, a gilopa, thuzuau genin vak kawikawi a," 
Proverbs6:13 nang hong khemnop manin a mitheek hong pia-in, a khe tawh hong su-in a khut tawh hong khoih hi." 
Proverbs6:14 A lungsimah thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh a, a omna peuh ah buaina a piangsak hi." 
Proverbs6:15 Tua ahih manin theih kholh lohin ama tungah lungkhamna tung dinga, bawlkik zawh nawn loh dongin siatna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs6:16 Topa in a muhdah, a khah khong ngei loh ding, thu guk, tua zah bek hi lo, thu sagih tak om a, tuate pen" 
Proverbs6:17 kihihsakna, zuau thu genna, mawhnei lo mi thahna," 
Proverbs6:18 thusia bawl ding ngaihsutna, gamtat siat ding a manlangte," 
Proverbs6:19 zuau thu gen teci man lote, le kitotna a piangsakte ahi hi." 
Proverbs6:20 Ka ta aw, na paʼ hong gen bangin gamta inla, na nuʼ hong thuhilhnate mangngilh kei in." 
Proverbs6:21 Amauʼ hong thugente phawk tawntung inla, na lungsimah ciamteh niloh in." 
Proverbs6:22 Tua thute in na paina peuh ah lam hong lak dinga, zanin na ihmut kalin nang hong cing dinga, sunin na hah sungin na gamtat nading hong hilh ding hi." 
Proverbs6:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham le a hilhnate pen a taang mahmah khuavak bang hi a, khalna le hilhnate pen nuntak nading lampi hi a," 
Proverbs6:24 miʼ zi tawh na mawh loh nadingin nang hong kemin, kam khum zangin a hong zol numei gina lote kiang panin nang hong hu ding hi." 
Proverbs6:25 Amauʼ melhoihna iplah kha kei inla, amauʼ hong zawlmitna khenglah kha kei in." 
Proverbs6:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh anlum khat tawh numei paktat khat kingah zo a, ahi zongin numei tawh mawhna in nuntakna bup siasak hi." 
Proverbs6:27 Na ang sungah meikuang pom lecin na puan kaang loin om ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs6:28 Mei-am tungtawnin pai lecin na khe kaang loin om ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs6:29 Tua mah bangin miʼ zi tawh a mawhte in gimna thuak ding uh a, tua bang a gamta peuhmah in gimna thuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs6:30 A gilkial a cimawh mi khat in na a guk ciangin, midangte in mawhsak lua lo napi," 
Proverbs6:31 amah kiman leh a zah sagihin kilohsak a, a neih khempeuh a piak kul hi." 
Proverbs6:32 Ahi zongin numei tawh a mawhte pen thu ngaihsun thei lo mi hi a, amau le amau a kisusia tawm ahi uh hi." 
Proverbs6:33 Mawhna a bawl mi in sat gawpna thuak dinga, a min sia-in mindai paisuak ding hi." 
Proverbs6:34 A numeiʼ pasal a heh zawk theih nading thudang om nawn lo a, a heh thukna ah khawl hun cih nei thei lo hi." 
Proverbs6:35 Amah in sumlepai sang nuam vet lo a, letsong tampi piakna in a hehna damsak zo lo hi." 
Proverbs7:1 Ka ta aw, ka thugente ciamteh inla, kong sawl thute khempeuh mangngilh ngei kei in." 
Proverbs7:2 Kong gen bangin gamta lecin na nungta ding hi. Kong thuhilhte, na mitnauta bangin hoihtakin kem in." 
Proverbs7:3 Kong hilhnate kem tawntung inla, na lungtang tungah gelh in." 
Proverbs7:4 Pilna na sanggamnu dingin nei inla, thumuhna na lawm it pen dingin nei in." 
Proverbs7:5 Tua hileh midangteʼ zi tungah na khialh khak loh nading, kam khum tawh a hong zol numei gina lote tawh na khialh khak loh nadingin hong hu ding hi." 
Proverbs7:6 Khat vei, ka omna inn ah, ka tawlet panin ka khuadak a," 
Proverbs7:7 bangmah a phawk nai lo tangval hon khat lakah, tangval thu thei lo khat, ka lim muh kha hi." 
Proverbs7:8 Lam dungah amah a vak laitakin, tua bang numei paktat a omna inn gei khat ah va pai kha a," 
Proverbs7:9 tua hun pen nitak ni tum khit zawh, khuamui hun laitak ahi hi." 
Proverbs7:10 Tua numei in numei paktatteʼ puansilh ngeite a silh kawmin ngimna khat tawh tua tangval na dawntuah hi. 
Proverbs7:11 Tua numei pen maizumna mel thei loin a hang mahmah hi a, lamdung tengah vak tawntung hi." 
Proverbs7:12 Mihon omna van zuakna phual, lamdung citeng, kong kiu khatpeuh ah mi ngakin om niloh hi." 
Proverbs7:13 Tua numei in tangvalpa thakhatin kawi-in tawp a, na maitai bawl mahmah in ama kiangah," 
Proverbs7:14 “Tu ni-in biakpiakna ka bawl a, nek ding sa tampi ka nei hi." 
Proverbs7:15 Ka nek pih dingin nang ka hong zong a, tu-in kong mu petmah hi." 
Proverbs7:16 Ka lupna tungah a nop mahmah dingin, Egypt gam puan hoih pente ka phah zo hi." 
Proverbs7:17 Myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, le sinnamon paknamtui tawh, ka lupna tung a namtui dingin ka bawl khinta hi." 
Proverbs7:18 Hong pai in; zan thapai-in ki-itna bawlin, ang kikawmin lungnuam ni." 
Proverbs7:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pasal khual gamlapi ah zin a, tu laitakin inn ah om lo hi." 
Proverbs7:20 Amah in sum tampi keng a, nipikal nih bang mateng hong tung lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs7:21 Tua ahih manin kam khum kam neel tawh amah zol a, tangvalpa in tua zolna a mang kha hi." 
Proverbs7:22 Tua ahih manin a kigo ding bawngtal in a sih nading mun a zuat bangin, sakhi in a awk nading thang zuanin a dian laklak bangin," 
Proverbs7:23 thaltang in ama lungtang a khak nading munah amah va pai hi. Vasa in a sih nading thang antah a bawh bangin va bawh a, a lauhuai sung a tun lamtak thei lo hi." 
Proverbs7:24 Ka tate aw, keiʼ lam hong nga unla, ka thugente hong ngai un." 
Proverbs7:25 Tua bang numeiteʼ zolna mang kei unla, tua bangte tawh khial kha kei un." 
Proverbs7:26 Tua bang numei in mi tampi tak siasakin, sim zawh loh ding mi tampiʼ sihna a piangsak hi." 
Proverbs7:27 Tua bang numei zuihna pen sihna gam zuatna hi a, sih baih nading lampi zuatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:1 Ngai un! Pilna in hong sam a, thungaihsut theihna hong kiko hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs8:2 Lamdung mual tung tengah, lamka citeng mun khempeuh ah dinga," 
Proverbs8:3 khuapi lutna lampi gei ah, mi omna kongpi tual ah hong kiko a," 
Proverbs8:4 “Mi khempeuh tungah ka hong thum a, leitung a om mi khempeuh kong sam hi." 
Proverbs8:5 Ngaihsut kicing nai lote aw, na lungsim uh khanghamsak un. Mihaite aw, thu ngaihsun un." 
Proverbs8:6 Ngai un, thu manpha kong gen ding hi; ka gen khempeuh thuman vive ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:7 Ka thugente a man bekbek hi a, zuau thu ka deih kei hi." 
Proverbs8:8 Ka gen khempeuh ahi vive hi a, zuau thu, thukawi om het lo hi." 
Proverbs8:9 Thungaihsun theite adingin tel nop mahmah a, thu mu theite adingin siang mahmah hi." 
Proverbs8:10 Ngun sangin kong thuhilhnate deih zaw unla, kham hoih pen sangin thutheihna deih zaw un." 
Proverbs8:11 “Suang manpha sangin pilna ahi keimah ka hoih zaw a, kei tawh na hong tehpih theih ding uh a manpha dang om lo hi." 
Proverbs8:12 Pilna ahi keimah in thuthuk muh theihna ka nei a, thu a telin theihna le a kilawm ngaihsut theihna ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:13 Topa zahtakna pen thusia muhdahna hi a, kiphatsakna le kihihsakna, gamtat sia le thuzuau ka mudah hi." 
Proverbs8:14 Thu geelin ka sem khia a, thu theihtelna nei-in, kei ka thahat hi." 
Proverbs8:15 Kumpite in a gam mite a uk nading, mi ukte in ngeina man a zat theih nadingin keimah in ka huh hi." 
Proverbs8:16 Leitung a om mi ukte khempeuh in keima huhna bek tawh uk zo uh a, mi lian mi thupite in keima huhna bek tawh vaihawm zo uh hi." 
Proverbs8:17 Kei hong itte ka it a, kei hong zong peuhmahte in hong mu uh hi." 
Proverbs8:18 Piakkhiat theih ding hauhna le minphatna, daupaina le ma tutsak zawhna a kicingin ka nei hi." 
Proverbs8:19 Keima kiang panin na ngahte uh ngun hoih pen sangin hoih zaw a, kham hoih pen sangin zong hoih zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs8:20 Thuman lampi ka zui a, thutang lampi ka tawn hi." 
Proverbs8:21 Kei hong itte ka hausak a, a inn dimin neihlelam ka pia hi." 
Proverbs8:22 “ Topa in kei hong piangsak masa pen a, tangtawng a ama sep lak pan a masa pen ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:23 Tangtawng pek lai-in kei hong bawl a, leitung a om ma-in hong bawl masak pen ka hi hi." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuipite a om ma-in kei ka suak khin a, keiʼ suah hunin lui tuite om nai lo hi." 
Proverbs8:25 Mual liante a kibawl ma-in kei ka suak khin a, mual neute a kibawl ma pekin kei ka om khinta hi." 
Proverbs8:26 Leitung khempeuh a bawl ma, lei them khat bek nangawn a bawl ma pekin kei ka om khinta hi." 
Proverbs8:27 Amah in vantung bawlin tuipi kimkot ah vanpi mong ding a bawl laitak," 
Proverbs8:28 amah in vantungah meiite kipsakin tuipi tuinakte a bawl laitak," 
Proverbs8:29 tuipi tuite in ama cihna ban a khengin a luan loh nading thu a piak laitak ka om a, leitung bulpi a phuh laitak kei ka om hi." 
Proverbs8:30 Na geel siampa bangin amah tawh kikhawlin keimah pen nisimin ama lungdamna ka hi a, ama kiang a om nuamsa-in," 
Proverbs8:31 leitungah ka lungdam a, mihingte lakah nuam ka sa hi." 
Proverbs8:32 “Tate aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai unla, kong gente zui le-uhcin lungdamna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs8:33 Hong kihilhnate zui-in pilna ngah unla, thudon loin om mawk kei un." 
Proverbs8:34 Ka thugenna a ngai, nisimin ka kong gei ah omin, ka inn ah a ngak mipa in lungdamna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs8:35 Kei hong mu mi in nuntakna a mu hi a, Topaʼ mai ah maipha ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs8:36 Ahi zongin kei hong mu lo mi, a mahmah a kisusia hi a, kei hong mudah peuhmah, a si nuam ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Proverbs9:1 Pilna in a inn lam a, a innkhuampi sagih a phut hi." 
Proverbs9:2 Amah in pawi bawl dingin sa go-in leenggahzu khaih a, annek nading sabuai a bawl hi." 
Proverbs9:3 Khua sung mun sang khempeuh panin mi a sam dingin a nasem numeite sawl a," 
Proverbs9:4 “Thu thei lote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samsak a, mihaite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:5 “Hong pai unla, ka an huan sa ne-in, ka bawl sa leenggahzu hong dawn un." 
Proverbs9:6 Thu thei lote taisanin khansau unla, pilna lampi zui un,” cisak hi." 
Proverbs9:7 Mihaite thuhilh lecin hong maizumsak dinga, migilote thuhilh lecin hong su gawp ding hi." 
Proverbs9:8 Mihaite thuhilh kei in; hong mudah ding uh hi. Mipilte thuhilh in; hong it ding uh hi. 
Proverbs9:9 Mipilte thuhilh lecin pil semsemna-in nei dinga, thuman mite thuhilh lecin a thutheihna uh khang semsem ding hi."
