Proverbs9:10 Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna hi a, Siangtho Pa theihna pen thumuhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs9:11 Pilna in na khang hong khan dinga, na nuntakna hong sausak ding hi." 
Proverbs9:12 Pil lecin nangma phattuam nading hi a, pilna don kei lecin nangma supna ding ahi hi." 
Proverbs9:13 Haina pen a kam tam, zumna mel a thei lo numei tawh kibang a," 
Proverbs9:14 ama kong gei ah ahi a, a sang pen munah ahi zongin amah tu a," 
Proverbs9:15 ama kiang a nawk kha, amauʼ nasep bek a phawk kimlai mite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:16 “Thu thei lote aw, hong pai un,” ci-in samin, mihaite kiangah," 
Proverbs9:17 “Tui dawn sim, khum diak a, an nek sim, lim diak hi,” ci hi." 
Proverbs9:18 Tua lai ah a paite a sihna thu tua lai ah a lut sate sihna gam thuk sungah a om khitna thu, a khem zawh mite in phawk kha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs10:1 Hihte pen Solomonʼ paunakte ahi hi: Ta pil in a pa lungdamsak a, ta hai in a nu dahsak hi." 
Proverbs10:2 Thuman loin ngahna ah phattuamna om lo a, thumanna in sih nading pan hong hon hi." 
Proverbs10:3 Topa in mihoihte a gil kialin koih lo a, migilote a duh uh nesak lo hi." 
Proverbs10:4 Thadahna in zawnna hi a, tha nuamna in hauhna hi." 
Proverbs10:5 A hunin an a lapa mipil hi a, an lak hunin a ihmu pa in maizumna a ngah hi." 
Proverbs10:6 Mihoihte in thupha ngah a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen hi." 
Proverbs10:7 Mihoihte kiphawkphawk a, migilote kimangngilh pah hi." 
Proverbs10:8 Mipilte in thuhilhna mang a, a hai paute in lungkhamna tuak hi." 
Proverbs10:9 Thuman mite lungnuamin om hithiat a, thuman lote kiman hi." 
Proverbs10:10 Khialhna kimuhmawh bawlna in buaina piangsak a, hang takin hilh ngamna in nopna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs10:11 Mihoihteʼ kampaute pen nuntakna tuinak bang a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen uh hi." 
Proverbs10:12 Muhdahna in kitotna piangsak a, itna in mawhna khempeuh maisak hi." 
Proverbs10:13 Thungaihsun theiteʼ kam sungah pilna om a, mihaiteʼ nungzang ah ciangduai kinga hi." 
Proverbs10:14 Mipilte in a pilna uh behlapin, mihaite a pau ciangin thusia tawh kizom pahpah hi." 
Proverbs10:15 Hauhna in mihaute hu a, zawnna in mizawngte siasak hi." 
Proverbs10:16 Mihoihteʼ thaman nuntakna hi a, migiloteʼ thaman siatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:17 Kihilhna manna nuntak lampi zuihna hi a, hilhna man nop lohna lampi lauhuai zuihna ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:18 Mi a mudahte bek in zuau thu gen a, mi a gensiate mihai ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:19 Kam tam paute tampi khial a, pau ip theite mipil hi." 
Proverbs10:20 Mihoihteʼ thugente ngun tang bang a, migiloteʼ ngaihsutnate in bangmah man lo hi." 
Proverbs10:21 Mihoihteʼ thugente in mi tampi nuamtuamsak a, mihaite in a hai sihpih uh hi." 
Proverbs10:22 Topaʼ thupha in mite hausak a, dahna le gimna tawh pia khawm lo hi." 
Proverbs10:23 Mihaite in gamtat siat ding nuamsa uh a, thungaihsun theite in pil gamtatna nuamsa uh hi." 
Proverbs10:24 Migilote tungah a kihtaktak uh tung a, mihoihte in a deihdeih uh ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs10:25 Huihpi a nun ciangin migilote leen mang a, thuman mite lungmuangin om tawntung uh hi." 
Proverbs10:26 Leenggahtui thuk in ha kimsak a, meikhu in mit a siipsak bangin, mi thadah in a cial pa a nasak hi." 
Proverbs10:27 Topa zahtakna in khan sausak a, migilote khansih hi." 
Proverbs10:28 Mihoihteʼ lametna lungdamna hi a, migiloteʼ lametna a hawmpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs10:29 Topa in midikte hu a, migilote a susia hi." 
Proverbs10:30 Midikte lungmuang takin om tawntung ding uh a, migilote in omna ding mun ngah zo lo ding uh hi." 
Proverbs10:31 Midikte in pilna thu gen uh a, thu hoih lo a genteʼ leii ki-attan ding hi." 
Proverbs10:32 Midikte in a gen ding uh thuhoih thei a, migilote in thusia bekbek gengen uh hi." 
Proverbs11:1 Tawikhaina man lo a zangte Topa in mudah a, tawikhaina man a zangte tungah Topa lungkim hi." 
Proverbs11:2 Mi kiphasakte in min siatna ngah pak ding ahih manin a hoihbekin om ding hoih zaw tham hi. 
Proverbs11:3 Midikte thumanin gamta uh a, migilote amauʼ hoih lohna in susia hi." 
Proverbs11:4 Hauhna in sih nading panin hong hu thei lo a, thumanna in na sih ding hong hu thei hi." 
Proverbs11:5 Thumanna in midikteʼ nuntakna a nuam zaw-in piangsak a, migilote in amauʼ gitlohna mah puk lawh uh hi." 
Proverbs11:6 Thumanna in midikte hon khia a, thuman lo mite in amauʼ huaihamna mah awk pih uh hi." 
Proverbs11:7 Migilote a sih ciangin a lametna teng uh tawh bei khawm a, hauhna suanna a mawkna a suak hi." 
Proverbs11:8 Lungkhamna a tuah loh nadingun midikte kihu a, migilote tungah lungkhamna tung zaw hi." 
Proverbs11:9 Pasian a ngaihsun lo miteʼ thugenna hangin mite in siatna thuak a, midikteʼ pilna hangin mite in hotkhiatna ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs11:10 Midikte a tuahphat ciangin khua sungah lungdamna om a, migilote a sih ciangin zong khua sungah lungdamin kikona a om hi." 
Proverbs11:11 Thuman miteʼ omna hangin khuapi a lian suak a, migiloteʼ kampauna hangin khuapi a sia suak hi." 
Proverbs11:12 Simmawhna tawh midang hopihna pen haina hi a, mipilte pau loin om dide hi." 
Proverbs11:13 Mi a gen siasiate tungah thusim kigen ngam lo a, a muanhuai miteʼ tung bekah thusim kigen ngam hi." 
Proverbs11:14 Thulamlak ding a nei lo mihingte kipuk uh a, thulamlak tampi neihna pen lungmuanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs11:15 Midang khatʼ leiba lohsak ding na kiciam leh na kisik ding hi. Tua bang thu ah kihel kei lecin nang adingin hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs11:16 A dik numei kizahtak a, a dik lo numei mindai hi. A thadah mi in sum nei ngei lo a, a hahkat mi in sum hau hi." 
Proverbs11:17 Migi lecin nang adingin a hoih a bawl na hi a, gilo lecin nang mahmah a kigimsak na hi bek hi." 
Proverbs11:18 Migilote in a man nei taktak bangmah ngah lo a, thumanin a gamtate in peel loin thaman hoih a ngah hi." 
Proverbs11:19 Thumanin gamtat ding a hanciamte nungta dinga, a sia-in a gamta teiteite si ding uh hi." 
Proverbs11:20 Topa in lungsim gilote mudah a, a manin a gamtate tungah a lungkim hi." 
Proverbs11:21 Migilote in gim a thuak hamtang nading, midikte gimna tawh a kipelhna ding teltakin thei in." 
Proverbs11:22 Thu a ngaihsun thei lo numei melhoih pen vokpi muk a om kham nakbah tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs11:23 Mihoihteʼ deihna thuhoih tawh kizom tawntung a, migiloteʼ deihna a tun ciangin mi khempeuh a heh hi." 
Proverbs11:24 Mi pawl khat in sum zang ziahziah napi-in hau semsem uh a, mi pawl khat cil mahmah napi, zawng semsem hi." 
Proverbs11:25 A cingh mite hau semsem dinga, midang a huhte in huhna mah ngahkik ding hi." 
Proverbs11:26 An man khan ding ngakna-in a zuak nuam lote kisamsia a, lei nop hunin a zuak pahte kiphat hi." 
Proverbs11:27 Thuhoih a hanciamte in pahtakna ngah a, siatna a hanciamte in siatna mah ngah hi." 
Proverbs11:28 Tuk lai-a singteh tam bangin midikteʼ hauhna khang dinga, phalbi lai-a singteh pulh bangin hauhna a suangte kiam ding uh hi." 
Proverbs11:29 A innkuan sung a uk khial mite hawmsuak dinga, a haite pen mipilteʼ sila suak tawntung ding hi." 
Proverbs11:30 Midikte a khansau a, migilote khansih hi." 
Proverbs11:31 Mihoihte hih leitungah thaman kipia ahihleh migilo le mawhneite gimna kipia zaw kan ding hi. 
Proverbs12:1 Pilna a deihte, kithuhilh ding ut uh a, kitai ding ut lohna pen haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs12:2 Mihoihte in Topaʼ maipha ngah a, siatna a gamtate amah in a mawhsak hi." 
Proverbs12:3 Gitlohna in lungmuanna piangsak lo a, thuman mite lungmuang takin om uh hi." 
Proverbs12:4 Zi hoih pen a pasalʼ minthanna le lungdamna hi a, a pasal a maizumsak zi pen a pasal adingin a dam thei lo guhnatna tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs12:5 Thuman mite in a kilawm a kituakin hong bawl a, migilote bek in hong khem nuam hi." 
Proverbs12:6 Migiloteʼ thugente mi thahnopna bekbek hi a, midikteʼ thugente in lauhuaina sunga om mite a hon khia hi." 
Proverbs12:7 Migilote in sihna tuakin cimang a, thuman mite nungta-in khang kizom hi." 
Proverbs12:8 Mipilte kiphatin kipahtawi a, mihaite kineu-et hi." 
Proverbs12:9 Nektawm ding nei lopi-in mi lian bangin omna sangin nuntak nading na semin mi mawkmawk hihna hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs12:10 Midikte in a gannote hoihtakin don a, migilote in a gannote bawlsia hi." 
Proverbs12:11 Nakpi takin lokhote in an hau a, man nei lopi-in hun beisakna in haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs12:12 Migiloteʼ belh mun muanhuai pen lei khal bangin kitamzan a, mihoihteʼ zung kip tawntung hi." 
Proverbs12:13 Migilote in a zuaugenna uh awk pih a, thuman mite buaina tawh kipelh hi." 
Proverbs12:14 Mite in kam hoih pauna hangin thaman ngah uh a, a sepna bangun zong thaman ngah uh hi." 
Proverbs12:15 Mihaite pen amau mah thuman kisa tawntung a, mipilte in miʼ thugenna ngai nuam uh hi." 
Proverbs12:16 Mihaite in a hehna uh langsak pah uh a, mipilte in a hehna uh ip zo hi." 
Proverbs12:17 Thuman mite in thu taktak mah gen uh a, zuau tecite in khemna thu bek gen uh hi." 
Proverbs12:18 Ngaihsun lo-a kampauna in tem hiam bangin mi liamsak thei a, mipilteʼ kampauna in tua bang liamna damsak thei hi." 
Proverbs12:19 Thuman genna kip tawntung a, thuzuau genna tomno sung bek kimang hi." 
Proverbs12:20 Thusia ngaihsunte lungkham uh a, thuhoih vaihawmte lungdam uh hi." 
Proverbs12:21 Thuman mite tungah thusia tung lo a, migilote lungkhamna tawh kidim hi." 
Proverbs12:22 Topa in zuaugen mite mudah a, mi citakte tungah a lungdam hi." 
Proverbs12:23 Mipilte in a theihna uh im khinkhian a, mihaite in a haina uh pho laklak hi." 
Proverbs12:24 Mi thanuamte vanglian a, mi thadahte sila suak hi." 
Proverbs12:25 Lunghihmawhna in lungkhamna piangsak a, kampau hoih in mi lungdamsak hi." 
Proverbs12:26 Midikte in a gamtatna uh tel et a, migilote a gamtatna un lam pialsak hi." 
Proverbs12:27 Thadahte a tup tung ngei lo a, a thanuamte in a deih ngah hi." 
Proverbs12:28 Mi thumanteʼ gamtatna in nuntakna piangsak a, mihaiteʼ gamtatna in sihna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs13:1 Ta pil in a paʼ hilhna mang a, a kihisak mi in a khial min pua nuam lo hi." 
Proverbs13:2 Mihoihte in a kam siamna bangun thaman sang a, mizuaute pen siat tat ding bek ut uh hi." 
Proverbs13:3 Pau a ki-ip zo mi in a nuntakna a hu hi a, a mawk paupau mi pen amah a kisiasak tawm ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:4 Thadah mi in a deih ngah zo lo a, nasep hahkat mi in a deih khempeuh ngah zo hi." 
Proverbs13:5 Thuman mi in zuau thu deih lo a, a gilo mi in gensiatna le mindai nading bek a pau hi." 
Proverbs13:6 Thumanna in midikte hu a, gitlohna pen mawhneiteʼ pukna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:7 Mi pawl khatte, zawng napi-in kihausak uh a, mi pawl khatte, hau napi-in kizawngsak uh hi." 
Proverbs13:8 Mihau paʼ sum hauhna in a nuntakna tan khia zo a, mizawng pa in a kitatna ding bangmah nei lo hi." 
Proverbs13:9 Thuman mite khuavak bangin taang lela a, migilote meivak bangin mit pak hi." 
Proverbs13:10 Hilh ding ut lo, kihihsakna in kitotna bek piangsak thei a, hong kithuhilh ding utna pen a hoih zaw ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:11 Ol takin hauh pakna oltak mahin kiamkik pah a, haksapi-in hauh tohna khangto semsem hi." 
Proverbs13:12 Lamet tun lohna in lungsim cinasak a, deihna tangtunna pen lungdamna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:13 Thu kihilh ding ut lohna pen siat ding utna hi a, thukihilhna zuihna pen lungnopna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:14 Mipilteʼ thuhilhna pen nuntakna tuinak bang hi a, sihna thang tawh kipelhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs13:15 Thungaihsut theihna pen maipha ngahna hi a, zuautatna in lungkhamna bek piangsak hi." 
Proverbs13:16 Thungaihsun theite pilna tawh gamta a, mihaite in a haina taangko hi." 
Proverbs13:17 Kamtai gina lo in mi lungkhamsak a, a citak thupuak pa in mi lungdamsakkik hi." 
Proverbs13:18 Thukihilhna a zui lo mi in zawnna le mindaina ngah a, thukihilhna a zui mi in minphatna le pahtawina a ngah hi." 
Proverbs13:19 Deihna ngahna in lungsim nuamsak a, siat gamtatna panin mihaite pial khia nuam lo hi." 
Proverbs13:20 Mipil tawh kikhawl lecin na pil dinga, mihai tawh kikhawl lecin gimna na thuak ding hi." 
Proverbs13:21 Tuahsiatna in mawhneite sulzuih kawikawi a, midikte tuahpha kawikawi hi." 
Proverbs13:22 Midikte in a tu a tateʼ luah ding gamh nei uh a, mawhneiteʼ neihsate ahihleh midikte ading hi lel hi." 
Proverbs13:23 Lo thak panin mizawngteʼ khamkhop ding an piang kha dinga, ahi zongin thuman lohna hangin tua nangawn maimang thei ding hi." 
Proverbs13:24 A ta a tai nuam lote a ta mudah hi a, a ta a itte in limtakin thuhilhin a tai hi." 
Proverbs13:25 Thuman mi in a kham ding nei-in gilvah a, a gilo mi in nektawm ding nei loin a gil a kial hi." 
Proverbs14:1 Numei pilte in inn sung nuntakna khangsak a, numei haite in inn sung susia hi." 
Proverbs14:2 Thumanin a gamta mite in Topa zahtak uh a, a sia-in a gamta mite in Topa simmawh uh hi." 
Proverbs14:3 Mihaite a pau ciangin siatna thuak lawh uh a, mipilteʼ pauna in siat nading pan pengsak hi." 
Proverbs14:4 Bawngtal om kei leh lo panin an tawm bek kila a, bawngtal tha tawh an a kihau ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:5 A citak teci in thuman bekbek gen tawntung a, a gina lo teci in zuau bekbek gen tawntung hi." 
Proverbs14:6 Mi a simmawh theite in pilna a zon uh hangin ngah zo lo uh a, thungaihsun theite in olno takin ngah thei uh hi." 
Proverbs14:7 Mihaite tawh kikhawl kei in; amauʼ kiang pan pilna na ngah kei ding hi. 
Proverbs14:8 Thungaihsun theite a pilna in lampi man musak a, mihaite a haina in lam khialsak hi." 
Proverbs14:9 Mihaite in a khialh hangun phamawh sa lo uh a, mipilte a khialh ciangun mawhmaisak ding deih uh hi." 
Proverbs14:10 Lungdamna le lungkhamna eimah bek in i theih hi a, midang kuamah in hong phawkpih kha lo hi." 
Proverbs14:11 Migiloteʼ inn kisusia dinga, thuman miteʼ inn kipin gina semsem ding hi." 
Proverbs14:12 Mihingte in thuman lampi hi, ci-in a ngaihsutte pen sihna lampi hi kha thei hi." 
Proverbs14:13 Nuihna pen cihmawh seelna zong hi thei a, kigualnop sakna a ven ciangin dahna hong kilangkik hi." 
Proverbs14:14 Misia in siatna thaman ngah a, mipha in phatna thaman ngah hi." 
Proverbs14:15 Mihaite in a thu zak peuh um pahpah a, mipilte in a gamtat nading ngaihsun cian hi." 
Proverbs14:16 Mipilte kidawmin siatna panin kihem a, mihaite in thu ngaihsun masa loin gamta pahpah hi." 
Proverbs14:17 A lung tom mite hai gamtat a, mipilte lungduai hi." 
Proverbs14:18 Mihaite in haina bek mah ngah a, mipilte in pilna mah ngah thuah hi." 
Proverbs14:19 Migilote in mihoihte mai-et uh a, maipha a piak ding uh a thum uh hi." 
Proverbs14:20 Kuamah in mizawngte ngai lo a, mihaute in lawm tampi nei hi." 
Proverbs14:21 Mizawngte a simmawhte a khial hi a, mizawngte tungah a cinghte a lungdam hi." 
Proverbs14:22 Na a hoih a semte mite in muangin zahtak a, a sia gamtatna pen khialhna lianpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:23 Gimpi a nasepna pen hauhna hi a, kam bek pau-in tut mawkna pen zawnna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:24 Pilna pen mipilteʼ minthanna lukhu hi a, haina pen mihaiteʼ kizepna bulpi ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:25 Thutak a gen teci in nuntakna hu zo a, zuau thu a gen teci in mi lehhek hi." 
Proverbs14:26 Topa a zahtak mi in lungmuanna nei a, a tateʼ belh theih ding mi kician ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:27 Topa zahtakna pen nuntakna tuinak tawh kibang a, sihna thang tawh hong kipelhsak hi." 
Proverbs14:28 Mi tampi a uk kumpipa minthang a, a uk ding mi om kei leh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:29 A lungduaite mipil hi a, lungtomna pen haina kilatna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:30 Lungnopna in pumpi cidamsak a, hazatna pen guh a muatsak natna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:31 Mizawngte bawlsiatna pen a piangsak Pasian simmawhna hi a, mizawngte tungah citna pen Pasian zahtakna ahi hi." 
Proverbs14:32 Migilo pa ama tatsiatna in puksak a, mihoih pa ama hoih tatna in hu hi." 
Proverbs14:33 Thungaihsun theiteʼ sungah pilna teeng a, mihaite in pilna thei kha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs14:34 Thumanna in minam min thangsak a, mawhna in minam mindaisak hi." 
Proverbs14:35 A hoihin a gamta a mite tungah kumpipa lungdam a, a gina-in a gamta lote gim a pia hi." 
Proverbs15:1 Kam nemin dawnna in hehna damsak a, kam khauh in hehna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs15:2 Mipilte in pilna thu gen a, mihaite in haina thu gen hi." 
Proverbs15:3 Topaʼ mit in mun khempeuh mu a, misia, mipha, hong encik kim hi." 
Proverbs15:4 Kam khum in nuntakna piangsak a, kam sia in lung gimsak hi." 
Proverbs15:5 A paʼ hilhna a ngai nuam lote mihai hi a, hilhna a mang nuamte mipil ahi hi." 
Proverbs15:6 Thuman miteʼ neihsa kip a, migiloteʼ hauhna in lungkham a guan hi." 
Proverbs15:7 Mipilteʼ kampauna in pilna khangsak a, mihaiteʼ lungsimah thuman lohna bek om hi." 
Proverbs15:8 Topa in migiloteʼ biakpiakna kihhuai sa a, thuman miteʼ thungetna ah lungdam hi." 
Proverbs15:9 Topa in migiloteʼ gamtatna kihhuai sa a, thuman a deih mite a it hi." 
Proverbs15:10 A gamta khial mite nakpi takin kithuhilh a, thukihilhna a mang nuam lote in sihna thuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs15:11 Sihna gam sungah a omte nangawn Pasian in mu ahihleh, mihingteʼ ngaihsutna tel muh zaw kan ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs15:12 A kihisak mite in kithuhilhna ngai nuam lo uh a, mipilte kiangah thu dong ngei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs15:13 Lungdamna in maitaisak a, lungkhamna in maigumsak hi." 
Proverbs15:14 Thungaihsun theite in pilna zong uh a, mihaite ahihleh a theih lohna uh tawh lungkim uh hi." 
Proverbs15:15 Mizawngte lungkham tawntung uh a, a lungdam mite in nuntak nuamsa mahmah uh hi." 
Proverbs15:16 Hau napi-in lungkham sangin zawng napi-in Topa zahtakna hoih zaw tham hi. 
Proverbs15:17 Kitawngtawng kawmin sameh lim pen nekna sangin ki-it diamdiamin anteh meh nek hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs15:18 Lungtomna in kitotna piangsak a, lungduaina in kilemna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs15:19 Mi thadahte in mun khempeuh ah haksatna tuak a, mi thumante in haksatna tuak kha lo hi." 
Proverbs15:20 Ta pilte in a pa lungdamsak a, ta haite bek in a nu simmawh hi." 
Proverbs15:21 Mihaite in a hai mah uh lungdam pih a, mipilte ahihleh a manin gamta uh hi." 
Proverbs15:22 Lim ngaihsut loin sepna tawh bangmah piang zo lo a, limtakin geelna tawh maa kitun zo bek hi." 
Proverbs15:23 A hun mahin dawn pah theihna lungkimhuai a, a kilawm kammal tawh dawn pah theihna hoih zaw kan hi." 
Proverbs15:24 Mipilte in nuntakna lampi zui to uh a, sihna lampi zui suk lo uh hi." 
Proverbs15:25 Topa in mi kiphasakteʼ inn phel khiatsak a, meigongteʼ neihsa hut pih hi." 
Proverbs15:26 Topa in migiloteʼ ngaihsutna kihhuai sa a, midikteʼ kampaunate hoih a sa hi." 
Proverbs15:27 A man loin sum ngahna in inn sung lungkhamsak a, sumgolh a deih lote a nuntak sauvei nuam hi." 
Proverbs15:28 Mihoihte in a kampau ding ngaihsun phot a, migiloteʼ pau pakna pen thusia tawh kizom hi." 
Proverbs15:29 Topa in midikteʼ thungetna ngai a, migiloteʼ thungetna thudon lo hi." 
Proverbs15:30 Maitaina in lung nuamsak a, thuhoih zakna in lungdamsak hi." 
Proverbs15:31 Kithuhilhna zuih theihna pen mipilteʼ lakah kihel theihna ahi hi. 
Proverbs15:32 Kihilh ding a ut lote a mahmah a kisusia hi a, kithuhilh ding a utte pil semsem ding hi." 
Proverbs15:33 Topa zahtakna pen pilna mah hi pah a, kiniamkhiatna in pahtawina hong ngahsak hi." 
Proverbs16:1 Mite in bangbang a geel zongin Topaʼ deihna bang bekin a piang ding hizaw hi. 
Proverbs16:2 Mihingte pen a gamtatna uh ah man kisa a, ahi zongin Topa in a khenna khat na om hi." 
Proverbs16:3 Na geelnate khempeuh Topa ap in; tua hileh na geelna bangin tangtung ding hi. 
Proverbs16:4 Topa in na khempeuh ngimna nei-in bawl a, migilote nangawn siatna a thuak dingin a bawl ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:5 Topa in a kihisak mite mudah a, amaute in gimna thuak hamtang uh hi." 
Proverbs16:6 Thumanna le cihtakna mawhmai ngahna hi a, Topa zahtakna siatna tawh kipelhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:7 Topaʼ deih bangin gamtatna pen galte nangawn lawm a kaih zawhna ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:8 Thuman loin hauhna sangin thumanin tawmno neihna a hoih zaw ahi hi. 
Proverbs16:9 Mihing in thu geel a, ahi zongin Topaʼ deihna bangin kisem khia hi." 
Proverbs16:10 Kumpipa in thuman genin thu a khen ciangin khial ngei lo hi. 
Proverbs16:11 A man tawikhaina le tawi tehnate Topa aʼ hi a, a tawisuang khempeuh ama bawl sa ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:12 Thumanin gamtatna bek in kumpi kipsak ahih manin a sia-a gamtat ding kumpite ut lo uh hi. 
Proverbs16:13 Kumpite in thuman genna deih uh a, thuman a gen mite it uh hi." 
Proverbs16:14 Kumpipa heh leh mi khatpeuh in sih lawh thei a, mipil khat in kumpipa lungdamsak thei hi." 
Proverbs16:15 Kumpipa maitai leh nuntakna hi a, ama pahtakna pen tuk hunin guah a zusak meiipi tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs16:16 Kham sangin pilna hoih zaw a, ngun sangin thutheihna deihhuai zaw hi." 
Proverbs16:17 Mihoihte in siatna tawh a kipelh ding lampi tawn uh a, a lampi tot ding limtakin a ngaihsun mi in a nuntakna a hu ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:18 Kisaktheihna in siatna hong tuaksak a, kiphatsakna in pukna hong piangsak hi." 
Proverbs16:19 Mi kihisak tawh kipawlin vankisutte ngahna sangin mizawngte tawh kikhawlin mi neu a om hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs16:20 Thuhilhna a mang mite a maa vang dinga, Topa a muang mite a lung dam ding hi." 
Proverbs16:21 Lungsim pilte thumuhna tawh kampau uh a, amauʼ kam khumna zaknophuai kisa semsem hi." 
Proverbs16:22 Pilna pen mipilte adingin hinna tuinak bang hi a, mihaite ahihleh amauʼ haina mah in gimna thuaksak hi." 
Proverbs16:23 Mipilte in thu ngaihsun kawmin kampau uh a, amauʼ pauna zaknophuai semsem hi." 
Proverbs16:24 Kam khum pen khuaizu bang hi a, i kam ah khum a, i pumpi adingin zong hoih mahmah hi." 
Proverbs16:25 Hoih hi, ci-in i ngaihsut thu khat pen sih theih nading thu na hi zawsop thei hi." 
Proverbs16:26 An duhna in mi na semsak a, gilkialna in nak sepsak semsem zaw hi." 
Proverbs16:27 Migilote in siat nading bek zongzong uh a, a kampaunate uh na a kaang tum thei meikuang tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs16:28 Mihoih lote in kitotna piangsak a, mi gensiate in lawmta ki-it kimlai kimudahsak hi." 
Proverbs16:29 A ngongtat mite in a lawmte zol a, lungkhamna sung tunpih hi." 
Proverbs16:30 A mit hong sitsante thusia a ngaihsun hi a, a neh hong piksante thusia geel ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:31 A teekteʼ sam kang minthanna lukhu hi a, thumanin nuntakna tawh a ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs16:32 Thahatna sangin lungduaina hoih zaw a, khuapi khat uk zawhna sangin eimah ki-uk zawhna hoih zaw hi." 
Proverbs16:33 Mite in bangbangin ai a san zongin, a piang ding thu pen Topaʼ deihna bang bek hizaw hi." 
Proverbs17:1 Kitawng kawmkawmin pawipi sungah annekna sangin lungnuam takin mohkeu them khat nekna hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs17:2 A pil silapa in a topaʼ ta hai tungah aana nei-in a topaʼ gamh pawl khat a luah hi. 
Proverbs17:3 Kham le ngunte mei sungah kize-et a, mihingteʼ lungsim Topa in ze-et hi." 
Proverbs17:4 Migilote in gitlohna thu bek mah ngaihin nei uh a, zuautheite in zuau thu mah ngaihin nei hi." 
Proverbs17:5 A zawngte a simmawh pa in amah a Piangsak pa a simmawh hi a, midangteʼ tuahsiatna ah a lungdam mipa in gim thuak hamtang ding hi." 
Proverbs17:6 Tute pen puteekte adingin minthanna lukhu hi a, tate pen pateʼ minthanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:7 Mi liante in zuau thu gen ngei lo a, mihaite in na-a kimang kam pau ngei lo hi." 
Proverbs17:8 Sumgolh a zangte in ai bangin ngaihsun uh a, a deih khempeuh uh a ngahsak dingin ngaihsun uh hi." 
Proverbs17:9 Miʼ khialhna a maisakte midangte in itin lawm hau uh a, miʼ khialhna ciaptehna pen lawm taanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:10 Mihai khat zavei a kisatna sangin mipil khat khatvei tai-na in bun zaw hi. 
Proverbs17:11 Thusia bekbek a deih tawntung migilote kiangah, a gilo kamtai pa bangin sihna tung ding hi." 
Proverbs17:12 Mihaite a hai gamtatna uh i tuah khak sangin a no a kilaksak vompi hang khat tuak lehang hoih zaw lai hi. 
Proverbs17:13 Thuhoih kimlai thusia tawh a thukteʼ inn sungah cikmahin thusia veng cih omngei lo hi. 
Proverbs17:14 Kitot i kipat ciangin tui lipi cinna phung kehsak khak tawh kibang hi. Tua ahih manin a nasiat ma-in kitot khawl pak in. 
Proverbs17:15 Migilote khah khongna, thuman mite mawhsakna, a nih tuakin Topa in deih lo hi." 
Proverbs17:16 Mihai pa in thu ngaihsun thei lo ahih manin pilna zon nading sum tampi a zat hangin a phattuamna om lo hi. 
Proverbs17:17 Lawm citak in a tawntungin hong it a, i sanggamte pen i lungkhamna a hong thuakpih dingin a piang ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:18 Thu a ngaihsun thei lo mihaite bek midangʼ leiba lohsak dingin kipia ngam hi. 
Proverbs17:19 Khialh ding a utte lungkham ding a ut hi a, kihisak-a kam paupaute buaina ding a zongzong ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:20 Lungsim hoih lote in lungdam mu lo uh a, mi a khem theite in lungkhamna tuak uh hi." 
Proverbs17:21 Tapa hai pen a paʼ lungkhamna hi a, ta hai a nei pa a lung dam lo hi." 
Proverbs17:22 Maitaina in cidamsak a, maigum tawntungna in guhtui teep kang hi." 
Proverbs17:23 A gina lo thukhente in sumgolh sang sim uh a, a thukhenna uh ah thuman om nawn lo hi." 
Proverbs17:24 Mipilte in a hoih penin gamtat nading thei uh a, mihaite in a cih nading thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs17:25 Ta hai in a pa dahsak a, a nu lungkhamsak hi." 
Proverbs17:26 A thuman mi gimpiak ding hoih lo a, mihoihte satna pen thukhialhna ahi hi." 
Proverbs17:27 Thu a thei taktakte in gengen khol lo a, a paupau khol lote thumu taktak hizaw hi." 
Proverbs17:28 Mihaite pau loin om leh a pil mahin kingaihsun hi. Thungaihsun thei na hihna a kilat nadingin pau loin om khinkhian in. 
Proverbs18:1 Midangte tawh a kipawl thei pha lote amah bek thupi a kisate hi a, midangteʼ cih khempeuh man a sak khat beek om lo hi." 
Proverbs18:2 Mihaite in thu a tel theih zawh nading uh kin lo uh a, pil si, a kicih theih nading deihna bek tawh thu gen uh hi." 
Proverbs18:3 Mawhna bawl leeng maizumna tawh kizom pah a, min siatna ngah leeng mindaina tawh kizom pah hi." 
Proverbs18:4 Mihingteʼ kampau pen pilna kipatna suak thei a, tuipi bangin thuk-in luitui bangin a siang hi." 
Proverbs18:5 Mimawhte angvanin diksak a, midikte mawhsak ding thuman lo hi." 
Proverbs18:6 Mihaite in kitot nading a pat uh ciangin hong sat un, ci-in a ngenngen ahi hi." 
Proverbs18:7 Mihaite a pau ciangin amauʼ siat nading mah a pau hi a, amauʼ kampau mah awk pih uh hi." 
Proverbs18:8 Gensiatna pen an lim mahmah tawh kibang a, thakhatin i sungah kihup suk hi." 
Proverbs18:9 Na a susia mite a hoih loh zah mahin a thadahte zong mihoih lo ahi hi. 
Proverbs18:10 Topaʼ min pen tausang muanhuai tawh kibang a, thuman mite in belin lungmuangin om thei uh hi." 
Proverbs18:11 Khuapi kiim a kulhpi in amah a hut bangin a hauhna in amah a hu dingin mihau pa in ngaihsun kha hi. 
Proverbs18:12 A kiniamkhiatte in zahtakna ngah uh a, a kihisakte pen siat ding a manawh hi ta hi." 
Proverbs18:13 A thu za khin nai lopi-in dawnkikna pen haina le maizumna ahi hi. 
Proverbs18:14 Mihingteʼ lungsim in cinatna thuak zosak a, mihing lungsim kisia leh cih nading om nawn lo hi." 
Proverbs18:15 Thungaihsun theite in a pilna uh behlap a, pilna a ngah nadingun mipilte in a bil uh tawh limtakin ngai uh hi." 
Proverbs18:16 Letsong in a pia pa adingin lampi honsak a, mi liante tawh kimusak thei hi." 
Proverbs18:17 Thukhenna zumah a lang pa in a thuk mateng a gen masa pa a thuman tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs18:18 Thugen a siam tuak mi nih zum sungah a kiseel ciangin kiciamna bek in thu khen zo hi. 
Proverbs18:19 Sanggamte na huhna in khuapi muanhuai bangin hong hu a, sanggam tawh kitotna in kidon lohna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs18:20 Mi khat in a kampauna hangin gilvahna ngah dinga, a thugenna hangin nuntakna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs18:21 Kampauna in sihna ahi a, hinna ahi zongin piangsak thei a, i kampauna bangin a piangte san loh phamawh hi." 
Proverbs18:22 Zi a mu zote na hoih a mu hi a, Topaʼ maipha a ngah ahi hi." 
Proverbs18:23 Mizawngte a pau ciangin thumna kam zang a, mihaute in a dawn ciangin kihihsakna kam zang hi." 
Proverbs18:24 Lawm pawl khatte sauvei kimang lo a, lawm pawl khatte sanggam sangin kip zaw hi." 
Proverbs19:1 Zuau genin mihai hihna sangin citakin zawn khiukheuna hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs19:2 Thu thei lopi-in lawp luatna hoih lo a, mawk nawh tatna in lungkhamna piangsak thei hi." 
Proverbs19:3 Mi pawl khat in amauʼ hai tatna hangin gimna a ngah hi napi-in Topa ngawhin mawk heh uh hi. 
Proverbs19:4 Mihaute in lawm mu thuahthuah a, mizawngte in a neihsun teng nangawn khah suahsuah uh hi." 
Proverbs19:5 Thuman gen lo teci in gim tuak pelmawh dinga, zuaugen mi suakta lo ding hi." 
Proverbs19:6 A cingh mihau paʼ maipha ngah ding ki-ut ciat a, na a piak mi khempeuh ama lawm ahi hi." 
Proverbs19:7 Mi khempeuh in a sanggam zawng pa uh mudah ciat ahih manin a lawmte in a tai satna a thu lamdang hi lo hi. 
Proverbs19:8 Pilna a zong pa in ama phattuam nading a zong hi a, thu a thei mipaʼ sepna maavang ding hi." 
Proverbs19:9 Thuman lo teci in gim tuak pelmawh dinga, zuaugen mi in sihna thuak ding hi." 
Proverbs19:10 Mihaite a nop lua-in a nuntak ding kilawm lo a, silate in mi liante a uk ding kilawm lo zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs19:11 Pilna in mi lungduaisak a, miʼ hong hehsaknate kiphawkmawh bawlna in minthanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs19:12 Kumpipaʼ hehna humpinelkai hawk bangin lauhuai a, ama pahtakna lopa tunga daitui taak bangin deihhuai hi." 
Proverbs19:13 Tapa hai pen a paʼ lungkhamna hi a, zi phunphun pen a theu thei lo guahciin tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs19:14 Inn le neihsate pen pateʼ tung panin a kiluah hi a, zi pil ahihleh Topa bek in hong pia thei hi." 
Proverbs19:15 A thadahte lumlum a, a mawk omte a gil kial hi." 
Proverbs19:16 Thukham a zuite a khansau dinga, thukham a zui lote si ding hi." 
Proverbs19:17 Mizawngte tungah a piate in Topaʼ tungah a pia hi a, Topa in a cingin amaute tungah lohkik ding hi." 
Proverbs19:18 Thu hong man theih lai-in na ta thuhilh in; na hilh kei leh a siat nading a deih na hi hi. 
Proverbs19:19 Migilo pa ama thuak ding gimna mah thuaksak zaw in. Hon khia lecin na hotkhiatkik zelzel kul ding hi. 
Proverbs19:20 Thu kigente ngai-in hong kihilhte mang lecin mai lamah na pil ding hi. 
Proverbs19:21 Mihingʼ ngaihsutna ah thu tampi om a, ahi zongin Topaʼ deihna tawh a kituakte bek kimang ding hi." 
Proverbs19:22 Duhhopna pen mindaina hi a, zuaugen pa hihna sangin mizawng hihna hoih zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs19:23 Topa a zahtakte a khansau a, lungkim takin nuamsa-in om uh a, siatna bangmah tuak kha lo uh hi." 
Proverbs19:24 A thadah mi in a khut tawh ankuang sawk sukin a kam sungah a tut tohkik ding nangawn ut lo liang hi. 
Proverbs19:25 Thu thei lote in satna bek tawh pilna ngah zo a, thungaihsun theite in taina lel tawh pilna ngah zo uh hi." 
Proverbs19:26 A pa nawt gawpin a nu a not khia tapa pen zumna le mindaina a piangsak tapa ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:27 Thuhilhna a mang nuam lo tapa pen pilna a thei kha lo ding tapa ahi hi. 
Proverbs19:28 Mi a susia nuam teci in thuman gen nuam lo a, migilote in gitloh tatna nuamsa uh hi." 
Proverbs19:29 Mi a thusim lote in ciangduai thuak uh a, mihaite in satna thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs20:1 Leenggahzu in mi kam tamsakin khamtheih zu in mi kitawngsak a, zukhamna pen haina ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:2 Kumpipaʼ hehna pen a lauhuai mahmah humpinelkai hawk bang hi a, kumpipa a hehsak khate in sih lawh uh hi." 
Proverbs20:3 Kitot khak ding pelhna in pahtak ngahna hi a, mihaite bek kitot ding ut uh hi." 
Proverbs20:4 Lo khawh hunin a kho nuam lo thadahpa in tuk anlak hun ciangin bangmah nei lo ding hi. 
Proverbs20:5 Mihingteʼ ngaihsutna pen a thuk sunga om tui tawh kibang a, thuthuk mu theite bek in suah khia thei hi." 
Proverbs20:6 Mi khempeuh pen mi citakin kigen kim uh hi; ahi zongin a citak takpi ding mi kimu zo ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs20:7 Mi khat thumanin a hoihin a nuntak leh ama suanlekhakte mi hampha ahi uh hi. 
Proverbs20:8 Thukhenna tokhom tungah thu khenin a tu kumpipa in a mitin a etna tawh a hoih lote khen khia thei hi. 
Proverbs20:9 “Ka lungsim siangtho hi; mawhna ka nei het kei hi,” a ci thei ding mi kua om ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs20:10 Tawisuang nam nih le piciang nam nih zangin mi khemna pen Topa in a deih lohna kibang hi. 
Proverbs20:11 Naupangte nangawn mi citak mihoih ahihna a gamtatna panun kimu khia thei hi. 
Proverbs20:12 Topa in khua muh nading mit, khua zak nading bil hong guan hi." 
Proverbs20:13 Lumlum lecin na zawng dinga, semsem lecin na hau ding hi." 
Proverbs20:14 Van leipa in van zuak pa kiangah, “Kiman kei, kiman kei,” cici khem a, a paikhiat khit ciangin sumdek siam mahmah ing, ci-in mi kiangah kisial hi." 
Proverbs20:15 Pilna tawh kam na pau theih leh kham le suangmanpha sangin a manpha zaw a nei na hi hi. 
Proverbs20:16 Mi khat in gamdang mi khatʼ leiba a lohsak dingin kam a hai ciam leh a ciam bangin a neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi. 
Proverbs20:17 A man loin a kingah an pen lim zungzung a, ahi zongin a nung ciangin suangtang hai khak tawh a kibang ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:18 Hoihtakin geelna tawh nasepna tangtung hi. Geelna kician om lopi-in galsim dingin kipan kei in. 
Proverbs20:19 Mi a gen sia kawikawite in thu im thei lo hi. Tua banga mihai paute tawh kikhawl kei in. 
Proverbs20:20 Na nu le na pa na samsiat leh khuamial sunga om meivak kisumit na bang ding hi. 
Proverbs20:21 A baih lamin hauh pakna pen a tawpna ah phattuamna om lo hi. 
Proverbs20:22 Miteʼ hong bawlsiatna thuk ding ngaihsun kei inla, Topaʼ hong huh ding ngak zaw in." 
Proverbs20:23 Tawisuang nam nih a zangte Topa in mudah a, amah in tawikhaina man lote hoih sa lo hi." 
Proverbs20:24 Topa in miteʼ gamtatna zia ding uk hi. Koici gamtat ding cih mihing in bangci theih ding ahi hiam? 
Proverbs20:25 Pasianʼ tungah piak ding na ciam ma-in hoihtakin ngaihsun masa in. Tua hikeileh na kinung sik kha ding hi. 
Proverbs20:26 A pil kumpipa in migilote teng khia a, khasiat loin gim pia gawp hi." 
Proverbs20:27 Topa in mihing lungsim meivak bangin zang a, i sung tawng dongin hong mu tel hi." 
Proverbs20:28 Kumpipa in thuman, thutang, citakin a uk lai teng a kumpi za ah kip bek hi." 
Proverbs20:29 Khangnoteʼ thahatna pen amauʼ minthanna hi a, khanghamteʼ sam kanna pen amauʼ thupina lim ahi hi." 
Proverbs20:30 Nakpi takin satna in misia kimlai a pha hong suah a, nakpi takin vuakna in i sung tawng hoih lohna teng a siangsak hi." 
Proverbs21:1 Topaʼ khut sungah kumpipa om a, lo sunga tui lak bangin a deihna peuh ah hei kawikawi thei hi." 
Proverbs21:2 Na gamtatna khempeuh nangmah in man na sak hangin Topa in na lungsim tawng a et telna phawk in. 
Proverbs21:3 Topa in biakpiakna sangin thuman thutang deih zaw hi. 
Proverbs21:4 Kihisakin gamtatna le kiphatsakna lungsimte pen mawhna hi a, migilo hihna lim ahi hi." 
Proverbs21:5 Limtakin ngaihsunin geelgeelna pen hauhna lampi hi a, nawhsa-in lopthop hihna pen zawnna lampi ahi hi." 
Proverbs21:6 Zuaugenna tawh hauhnate bei mang pak a, sihna khuk sung hong tunpih hi." 
Proverbs21:7 Migilote a manin gamta nuam lo uh ahih manin amauʼ gamtat siatna mah a awk pih uh hi. 
Proverbs21:8 Mimawhte thukawi-in gamta uh a, midikte a manin gamta uh hi." 
Proverbs21:9 Phun bek a thei zi tawh inn sungah ten khop sangin inn khumzang kiu khat ah tangten hoih zaw tham hi. 
Proverbs21:10 Migilote in thusia bekbek deih uh a, a lawmte nangawn zah tuan lo uh hi." 
Proverbs21:11 Mi kiphasakte gim a kipiak ciangin mi mawkmawkte in pil lawh uh a, mipilte a kihilh ciangin thu theihna-in nei uh hi." 
Proverbs21:12 Pasian in migilo paʼ inn sungah a kisem khempeuh mu tel a, migilote lawnthalin a siasak hi." 
Proverbs21:13 Mizawngteʼ huh ngetna a pia nuam lote pen amau zong cimawhin huhna a nget uh ciangin kipia lo ding hi. 
Proverbs21:14 A simthamin letsong piakna in hehna damsak a, puannuai tawi in sinsona daisak hi." 
Proverbs21:15 Thutangin na a kisep ciangin midik khempeuh lungdam a, ahi zongin migilote lungkham hi." 
Proverbs21:16 A kilawm gamtatna pan a pial khia mite misi honte lakah a tung hi. 
Proverbs21:17 A nop tat nuamte zawng uh a, zu ne-in sathau namtui a nilhte hau lo uh hi." 
Proverbs21:18 Midikteʼ thuak dingin a bawlsak uh gimnate pen migilote mah in leh thuak zawsop uh hi. 
Proverbs21:19 A phun hat zi gilo tawh ten khop sangin gam simtham ah khat guak tangten hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs21:20 Mipil paʼ inn sungah neihlelam a dimin om a, ahi zongin mihai pa in a ngah zahzah zang khia pah hi." 
Proverbs21:21 Thuman thutakin gamta tawntung lecin na khan sau-in pahtawina na ngah ding hi. 
Proverbs21:22 Mipil khat in mi thahatte in a hut khuapi la zo a, amauʼ muanmuan kulhpi nangawn susia zo hi." 
Proverbs21:23 Kampau a ki-ip zote lungkhamna tawh kipelh hi. 
Proverbs21:24 Mi kihisak i cihte pen kiliansakin a kiphasak mite ahi hi. 
Proverbs21:25 Mi thadahpa in na sem nuam lo ahih manin a mahmah a kithattawm ahi hi. 
Proverbs21:26 Mihoih lote in lungkim hun nei loin deih thuah tawntung uh a, mihoihte cingh-in pia khia tawntung uh hi." 
Proverbs21:27 Topa in migiloteʼ biakpiaknate deih lo a, ngimna hoih lo tawh a piakte uh deih lo zaw kan lai hi." 
Proverbs21:28 A man lo tecite mangthang ding uh a, thuman teciteʼ kam kizaza ding hi." 
Proverbs21:29 Migilote pen muan theih dingin khauh pau uh a, midikte ahihleh lungmuang takin kampau hiathiat uh hi." 
Proverbs21:30 Mihingteʼ pilna, a thutheihna le a thugente khempeuh, Topaʼ deihna tawh a kituah kei leh a kimanna om lo hi." 
Proverbs21:31 Galdo nadingin sakolte a baih sa-in kikoih a, ahi zongin gal zawhna pen Topaʼ hang hizaw hi." 
Proverbs22:1 Hauhna sangin min hoihna deihhuai zaw a, kham le ngun sangin miʼ hong thusimna deihhuai zaw hi." 
Proverbs22:2 A hau a zawng a kilamdanna om lo a, a nih tuakun Topaʼ bawl sa ahi uh hi." 
Proverbs22:3 Mipilte in a lauhuai thu mu thei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs22:4 Kiniamkhiat-a Topa zahtakna thaman in hauhna, minthanna, le khansauna ahi hi." 
Proverbs22:5 Migiloteʼ lampi ah thang kisiahin so kidawh a, mipilte in tua lampi pelh uh hi." 
Proverbs22:6 Naupang khat a neu lai-in lampi man tawnsak lecin a teek dongin lampial nawn lo ding hi. 
Proverbs22:7 Mihaute in mizawngte uk a, leitawi a late pen a piateʼ sila a suak hi." 
Proverbs22:8 Thuman lo khaici a vawhte in lungkhamna tuak uh a, amauʼ hehna ciangduai amauʼ tung mah tukik ding hi." 
Proverbs22:9 A cingh mi in mizawngte an pia a, amah in thupha ngahkik hi." 
Proverbs22:10 Mi kiphasakte hawl khia lecin kitotna le kisimmawhna bei pah ding hi. 
Proverbs22:11 Kam siamna in kumpipaʼ lawm hong suaksak a, ahi zongin Topa in lungsim takpi a deih hi." 
Proverbs22:12 Topa in thuman mite kem a, ahi zongin thuzuau gente a lawnthal hi." 
Proverbs22:13 Mi thadahte a inn ah lumlum a, “Pua pial lehang humpiʼn hong hih khaʼn teh,” ci uh hi." 
Proverbs22:14 Numei tungah mawhna pen thangzak bang hi a, tua thang ah a awkte tungah Topa a heh hi." 
Proverbs22:15 Naupangte a hai gamtat a ngeina hi a, deih takin pangbetna in mihoih suaksak thei hi." 
Proverbs22:16 Hauh nop manin mihaute letsong pia leeng kizawn lawh a, hauh nop manin mizawngteʼ neihsa laksak lehang zong kihauh lawh tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs22:17 Na bil uh hong ngatin mipilteʼ thugen ngai unla, kong hilh pilna thute na lungsim uh ah lutsak un." 
Proverbs22:18 Na lungsim uh ah ciingin zang thei le-uhcin, na lung uh dam tawntung ding hi." 
Proverbs22:19 Tua hileh Topa muanin na nei ding uh a, tu ni-in noteʼ phattuam nading kam a pau ka suak ding hi." 
Proverbs22:20 Thuhilhna le pilna thu nam sawm thum hih lai ah note adingin ka gelh a," 
Proverbs22:21 thuman a kan dingin note hong sawlteʼ tungah thuman bang hiam cih na genkik theih nadingun thuman na theih nading uh ka deihna ahi hi. 
Proverbs22:22 Bangmah hong cih zo lo ding cihna hangin nuamtak sa-in mizawngteʼ neihsa mawk suh kei unla, zumah khia-in mawk bawlsiat kei un." 
Proverbs22:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute panpih dinga, amau a bawlsiate tungah phu a laksak ding hi." 
Proverbs22:24 A heh baih mite tawh kipawl kei unla, a lung tom mite tawh kikhawl kei un." 
Proverbs22:25 Amauʼ hoih lohnate na zuih khak loh nadingun na kidop kei uh leh note in zong na awk lawh kha ding uh hi. 
Proverbs22:26 Midangteʼ leiba lohsak dingin kamciamin leiba tavuan la kha kei un. 
Proverbs22:27 A leiba lohsak zo kei le-uhcin na lupna nangawn uh hong kidawh khiatsak ding hi. 
Proverbs22:28 Na pu na pateʼ phuh sa gisuang cikmah hunin khiin kei un. 
Proverbs22:29 A nasepna ah a siam mahmah mi na thei kha uh hiam? Amah in mi mawkmawkteʼ na sem lo dinga, kumpiteʼ na sem ding hi." 
Proverbs23:1 Mi liante tawh an nekhawm dingin na tut uh ciangin na tut pih pa limtakin en un. 
Proverbs23:2 An a ngaklah thei mi na hih khak uh leh zong limtakin kidawm un. 
Proverbs23:3 Hong thangsiahna hi kha thei ding ahih manin tua anlimte lunggulh pah lua kei un. 
Proverbs23:4 Hauh nop man bekin sumʼ sila suak kei unla, a man loin gamta kha kei un." 
Proverbs23:5 Na ngah sa uh sumte mitphiat kalin bei mang thei a, muvanlai bangin thakhatin leeng mang thei hi." 
Proverbs23:6 A cil tentan miteʼ an neksak kei unla, a anlimte uh duhgawh kha kei un." 
Proverbs23:7 “Nene un,” hong cih hangin a cih takpi hi lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na dangtawng a hong sun samzang nekkhak tawh kibang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:8 Na nek sa teng uh na lua khiakik ding uh a, na kamsiam ngah teeng uh maimang ta ding hi." 
Proverbs23:9 Mihaite pil hopih kei un; amaute in a manphatna phawk thei lo uh hi. 
Proverbs23:10 Tanglai gisuang khiin kei unla, tagahteʼ leitang va keek kei un." 
Proverbs23:11 Amaute a pawlpih pa pen Topa hi a, noteʼ lang khat ah amaute panpih ding hi." 
Proverbs23:12 Hong kihilhnate zui unla, pilna thu hong kigente ngai un." 
Proverbs23:13 Naupangte sat ding lunghiang kei un; satna hangin si lo ding hi. 
Proverbs23:14 Ciangduai tawh sat le-uhcin nuntak lawh zaw ding uh hi. 
Proverbs23:15 Ka ta aw, mipil suak lecin ka lungdam mahmah ding hi." 
Proverbs23:16 Thuman na gen ciangin ka nuam mahmah ding hi. 
Proverbs23:17 Mawhnei mite eng kha kei inla, Topa zahtakna zom paisuak in." 
Proverbs23:18 Tua bang hi lecin lametna om a, cithei-in na khansau ding hi." 
Proverbs23:19 Ka ta aw, ka thu ngai inla, mipil suak in; lampi man zuih ding ngaihsutpi-in nei in." 
Proverbs23:20 Zu nenete tawh kikhawl kei inla, a uisante tawh kithuah kha kei in." 
Proverbs23:21 Zu nenete le a uisante zawng ding uh a, a ne bek a nitumte in puan sia bek silh zo ding hi." 
Proverbs23:22 Nangma pianna na paʼ thu ngai inla, na nu a teek ciangin simmawh bawl kei in." 
Proverbs23:23 Thuman, pilna, siamna, thungaihsut theihna lei in; zuak khiat dingin tuate pammaih lua hi." 
Proverbs23:24 Ta hoih a nei pa a lung dam dinga, ta pil a nei pa a taʼ tungah lungkim ding hi." 
Proverbs23:25 Na nu le na pa a kipak nadingin gamta inla, na pianna nu lungdamsak in." 
Proverbs23:26 Ka ta aw, ka thugente ciamteh inla, keima gamtat bangin nang zong gamta in." 
Proverbs23:27 Numei paktatte pen kiat theih nading gum tawh kibang a, numei gina lote pen tangciak theihna hawkguam tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs23:28 Gutate bangin nang hong buk sim a, mi tampi tak siasak uh hi." 
Proverbs23:29 Kuate in gal nei a, kuate in dahna thuak hiam? Thu om lopi-in kuate liam a, thu om lopi-in kuate a mit san gega hiam?" 
Proverbs23:30 Zu ne-a a tut khote zu a nenete ahi hi. 
Proverbs23:31 Hai sungah a phuan seuhseuh gawl sungah a tum suk hithit thei leenggahzu san et-in nei kei in. 
Proverbs23:32 A tawpna ah gulpi bangin nang hong tu dinga, gul gu nei in a tuk na bang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:33 Na mitah na lam dangdang hong suak dinga, hoihtakin na pau thei nawn kei ding hi." 
Proverbs23:34 Tuipi tungah a lum tawh na kibang dinga, a suk awn a to awn teembaw dawna tuang tawh na kibang ding hi." 
Proverbs23:35 “Hong vuak hangun ka liam kei a, hong sat hangun ka phawk kei hi. Ka pilvang ciangin zu ka nekik ding hi,” na ci ding hi." 
Proverbs24:1 Migilote eng kei inla, amaute tawh kikhawl kei in." 
Proverbs24:2 Amaute in tatsiat ding bek ngaihsun uh a, thusia bekbek genin nei uh hi." 
Proverbs24:3 Pilna tawh inn kilam a, ngaihsut siamna tawh inn kip hi." 
Proverbs24:4 Thungaihsut theihna inn sungah a hoih a manpha nate a dimtakin om hi. 
Proverbs24:5 Thahatna sangin pilna hoih zaw a, thakhauhna sangin thutheihna hoih zaw hi." 
Proverbs24:6 Geel siamna tawh galte kizo a, ngaihsut siamna tawh gualzawhna kingah hi." 
Proverbs24:7 Pil kampauna pen mihaiteʼ theih zawh dingin thuk lua mahmah a, mihaite in mihon lakah thu gen ngam lo uh hi." 
Proverbs24:8 Thusia lamsang a deih mite thusia bawl mi kici hi. 
Proverbs24:9 Mihaiteʼ vaihawmna in khialhna bek piangsak lel a, mi a simmawh theite midangte in mudah uh hi." 
Proverbs24:10 Haksatna na tuah ciangin na lung a kiat leh a gina lo mi na hi hi. 
Proverbs24:11 Thah dinga a kikai khia mipa hon khia inla, sih nading mun a zuan mipa lehkaihkik in." 
Proverbs24:12 Keʼn thei kha kei ing, na cih nop hangin lungsim a thei Pasian in thei tel veve hi; nang hong encik Pasian in hong tel theihna phawk in. Mi khempeuh a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding hi." 
Proverbs24:13 Ka ta aw, khuaizu khum ahih manin ne in. I kam ah khuailuzu khum mahmah hi." 
Proverbs24:14 Pilna pen i nuntakna ah khuaizu tawh kibang a, pilna nei lecin mai lamah lametna om a, na khan hong sausak ding hi." 
Proverbs24:15 Migiloteʼ gamtat bangin thuman miteʼ omna su gawp kei inla, amauʼ teenna inn luh gawp kei in." 
Proverbs24:16 Mihoihte sagih vei dong a puk hangin tho kikkik thei a, migilote ahihleh tuahsiatna thuakin kithallot hi." 
Proverbs24:17 Na galte in gimna a ngah ciangin lungdam kei inla, a puk ciangin kipak kei in." 
Proverbs24:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong thei-in nang tungah lungkim lo dinga, na galte tungah heh nawn loin gim pia lo kha ding hi." 
Proverbs24:19 Migiloteʼ hangin lung nuammawh kei inla, amaute eng kei in." 
Proverbs24:20 Amaute in mai lamah lamet ding bangmah nei lo a, amauteʼ meivak kisukmitsak ding hi." 
Proverbs24:21 Ka ta aw, Topa le kumpipa zahtak khawm inla, amau a langpangte tawh kipawl kha kei in." 
Proverbs24:22 Tua bang mite thakhat thu-in kisu gawp thei ding hi. Pasian le kumpipaʼ piansak theih ding gimna kuamah in gen khol thei lo hi. 
Proverbs24:23 Mipil dangte in zong hih bangin thu gen uh hi: Mi lang muhin thukhenna hoih lo hi. 
Proverbs24:24 Mimawh kimlai a diksak thukhen pa leitung a mi khempeuh in mudahin phuisam ding hi. 
Proverbs24:25 A mawh mi gim a pia thukhen pa ahihleh thupha kipia-in daupai ding hi. 
Proverbs24:26 A mantakin dawnkikna pen lawm taktak hihna lim ahi hi. 
Proverbs24:27 Na nuntak nading zong masa inla, na annek ding a kicin ciang bekin na inn ding lamin zi le ta nei pan in." 
Proverbs24:28 Thu kician om lopi-in na veengpaʼ lang khat ah teci pang kei inla, amauʼ siat nadingin zuau thu gen kei in." 
Proverbs24:29 Kei tungah hong bawl bangin kei zong ka bawl dinga, ama hong hihna bangin ka thuk ding hi, ci kha kei in." 
Proverbs24:30 Mi thadahpaʼ lo gei ah ka va pai a, mihai paʼ leenggui lo ka va nawk kha hi." 
Proverbs24:31 Limtakin ka et ciangin a lo ciing bupah kiak dim a, a leitang khempeuh lopa in khuhcip a, a umna a phungcian suangte kicim khin hi." 
Proverbs24:32 Tua bang ka muh ciangin thu ka lung ngaingai a, thu manpha khat ka mu khia hi." 
Proverbs24:33 Tawmvei ihmutna, tawmvei lusukna, tawmvei sung na sep lohna, khut zepin om mawkna hangin" 
Proverbs24:34 i tungah zawnna hong tung a, cihmawhna in hong khuhcip hi." 
Proverbs25:1 Judah kumpi Hezekiahʼ lai-atte in a teikhiat uh Solomonʼ paunak dangte: 
Proverbs25:2 Pasian in thu a ip manin a min thang a, kumpite in thu a genkhiat manin minthang uh hi." 
Proverbs25:3 Vantung sang lua-in lei sung a thuk luat mah bangin kumpipaʼ ngaihsutna thuk lua-in kithei zo lo hi. 
Proverbs25:4 Ngun a ek teng paikhia lehang sikseek pa in na hoihpi piangsak thei hi. 
Proverbs25:5 Kumpipa kiang pan migilote nil khia lehang thumanin ama ukna kip thei bek hi. 
Proverbs25:6 Kumpipa mai ah na om ciangin mi lian kineih kei inla, mi lianteʼ tut nading munah tu kha kei in." 
Proverbs25:7 Uliante a awn dingin hua lai ah va tu suk in, hong kicih sangin hih lai ah hong tu to in, hong kicih ding hoih zaw hi." 
Proverbs25:8 Thu khatpeuh na theih ciangin thukhen zum tun pah kei in. Na veengpa in nangʼ khialhna hong lak telkik leh nang bang lawh nawn ding na hi hiam? 
Proverbs25:9 Na thu neih pih na veengpa bek mah tawh thu kiseel inla, mi khatʼ thusim midangʼ tungah genthang kei in." 
Proverbs25:10 Tua hikeileh amah hehin nang hong maizumsak dinga, na min siatna bei ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Proverbs25:11 A kilawm hunin kammal khat pau khiatna pen ngun pek tunga kham pek khat a kisuang tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs25:12 Hilhna a sang thei mipa adingin a pil thuhilhpa pen kizepna kham bilbah tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs25:13 Amah a sawlte tungah a citak kamtai pa pen an lak huna tuivot tawh kibang a, a toteʼ lungsim thaksuaksak hi." 
Proverbs25:14 Bangmah a piak lohpi a kisialh pih pa pen guah a zusak tuan lo meiipi le huihpi nung tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs25:15 Lungduai a zolzolna tawh gam ukte kizo thei a, kam nemin pauna tawh aana neite kizo thei hi." 
Proverbs25:16 Khuaizu na nek ciangin a hoih khop bek zah ne in. Tua hikeileh kham lua-in na lua ding hi. 
Proverbs25:17 Na veengteʼ inn ah hawh mun lua kei in. Hong cimtakin hong mudah kha ding hi. 
Proverbs25:18 A lawmteʼ lang khat ah teci man lo a pang mi pen molhtum, namsau, ahih kei leh thal hiam tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:19 Haksat hunin a zuau tat mi muanin neih khakna pen hana, ahih kei leh khebai tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:20 A dah a lungkham mipa kiangah lasakna pen khua dam laitakin puan suahkhiat tawh kibang a, meima ci-al nuh tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:21 Na galte a gil a kial leh an pia inla, a dang a taak leh tui pia in." 
Proverbs25:22 Tua hileh amauʼ maizum nadingin a bawl na hi a, Topa in nang tungah thaman hong pia ding hi." 
Proverbs25:23 Leilu lam huih in guah a zuksak bangin gensiatna in hehna piangsak hi. 
Proverbs25:24 Phun bek a thei zi tawh inn sungah ten khop sangin inn khumzang kiu khat ah tangten hoih zaw tham hi. 
Proverbs25:25 A dangtak mipa in tuivot lim a sak bangin gamlapi-a om lawmteʼ kiang panin thu zak nuam kisa hi. 
Proverbs25:26 Mihoih khat in mihoih loteʼ gamtatna a zuih khak ciangin hawktui nin, ahih kei leh tui uih tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs25:27 Khuaizu a tam lua nek ding a hoih loh bangin phat ding deih luatna a hoih lo ahi hi. 
Proverbs25:28 Ama lungsim a ki-uk zo lo mipa pen dalna kulhpi a nei lo khuapi tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:1 Tuk laitak a vuk kia le an lak huna guahzu bangin mihaite adingin pahtawina a kilawmna om lo hi. 
Proverbs26:2 Thu om lopi a hong kisamsiatna pen bangmah a hong cih thei lo, khawlna mun mel a nei lo, a leeng suk a leeng to phialphiah tawh kibang lel hi." 
Proverbs26:3 Sakolte sat ding kisam a, late kamkaih kisam a, mihaite zong sat ding a kisam ahi hi." 
Proverbs26:4 Mihaiteʼ thudotna dawngdawng lecin nang zong amau mah bangin a hai na hi hi. 
Proverbs26:5 Mihaite a pilin a kingaihsut khak loh nadingin amauʼ haina tawh kizui-in dawng zaw in. 
Proverbs26:6 Mihai khat kamtai-in a zang pa pen ama khe mah a sattan tawm, siatna a zong pa ahi hi." 
Proverbs26:7 Khebai paʼ khe a kimanna om loin a kikhai mawk bangin mihaite adingin paunak in bangmah man nei lo hi. 
Proverbs26:8 Saili kuang ah sailungtang khihcip lehang phattuamna a om loh bangin mihaite pahtawina zong a mawkna ahi hi. 
Proverbs26:9 Mihaite in paunak thuhilhnate a paukhiat ciangin zukham pa in a khut a ling om a khei dingin a kipan tawh kibang lel hi. 
Proverbs26:10 Mihai a tuah khak peuh tha cial a a nei pa pen a tuah khak peuh a ban kap thal tawipa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:11 Ui in a luak a zuatkik bangin mihaite zong a hai tat ngei bangin takik zel hi. 
Proverbs26:12 A pil lo kimlai a pil a kisa pa sangin mihaite adingin lametna om zaw lai hi. 
Proverbs26:13 Thadahpa in, “Lampi ah humpinelkai om! Kongzing ah humpinelkai om!” ci-in lumlum hi." 
Proverbs26:14 Kongkhak pen kawmhek tungah a kiheihei lel bangin mi thadahpa a lupna tungah kiheihei hi. 
Proverbs26:15 Thadahpa in a khutin ankuang sawk suk a, a kam ah a bak tohkik ding nangawn gim zungzung kisa hi." 
Proverbs26:16 A kilawmin thu a dawng thei mihing sagih sangin mi thadahpa a ngaihsutna ah pil kisa zaw hi. 
Proverbs26:17 Eite tawh a kisai lo kitotna sunga kiphumna pen ui ommuang khat a bil-in i kaihsak tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:18 A veengte a khem khit ciangin ka ciamnuihna hi, a ci pa pen" 
Proverbs26:19 sih theihna gu a baang thaltang tawh a kap pa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:20 Sing om kei leh mei mit a, gensiatna om kei leh kitotna bei hi." 
Proverbs26:21 Meihol in mei-am ding piangsak a, sing in mei kuangsak a, migilo in kitotna piangsak hi." 
Proverbs26:22 Gensiatna pen a lim mahmah an tawh a kibang hi a, mihingteʼ sung tawng pekah tum suk pahpah hi." 
Proverbs26:23 Tungtham bek a kam khum pauna pen cimbeng kizut leibeel tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs26:24 A sim tat mi in a kampi bek tawh thuhoih gen a, a lungsimah zuau thu bek om hi." 
Proverbs26:25 A lungsimah a deihhuai lo thu sagih tak om ahih manin kam khum takin a pau manin um kha kei in. 
Proverbs26:26 Ama hoih lohna a ip nop hangin mi khempeuh in ama gitlohna thei veve hi. 
Proverbs26:27 Mi siahna-in gum a tote amauʼ gum tawhna sung mahah leh kiat zawsop uh a, mi a deng kha dingin suang a khukte amauʼ suang khuk mah in amau mah lehden kha zaw hi." 
Proverbs26:28 Zuaugenna in midik kimlai a mawh bangsak a, tungtham bek a thugenna in siatna bek piangsak hi." 
Proverbs27:1 Zing ciang hun ading kima-sialh kei in. Tu hun le tua hun kikalah a piang ding thu bangmah na thei kei hi. 
Proverbs27:2 Midangte in hong phat loh buang nangmah kiphattawm kei in. Khual mite in hong phat loh buang nangma kamin kiphattawm kei in. 
Proverbs27:3 Suangtum le sehnel gik mahmah a, ahi zongin mihaiteʼ piansak lungkhamna gik zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs27:4 Hehna le sinsona siahuai a, ahi zongin hazatna siahuai zaw lai hi." 
Proverbs27:5 Itna i seel bawl sangin a langtangin taina hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs27:6 I lawmte in hong liamsak hangin i hoih nading a hong deihsakna hizaw hi. I galte in hong ngawng kawina pen hong leh bawlna ahi hi. 
Proverbs27:7 A gilvah mipa in khuaizu nangawn duh nawn lo a, a gilkial mipa in a kha an nangawn lim sa hi." 
Proverbs27:8 Inn panin gamlapi ah a zin khia mipa a bu panin a leeng khia vasa tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs27:9 Sathau namtui le paknamtui in lung nuamsak a, lawmteʼ limbawlna in tha hatsak hi." 
Proverbs27:10 Na lawmte daang koih kei inla, na paʼ lawmte dong nangawn lawm bawl in. Na lungkham ciangin na sanggampa va ko kei in. A gamla ah a om i sanggampa sangin a nai ah a om i veengpa kimang zaw hi." 
Proverbs27:11 Ka ta aw, pil in; tua hileh ka lungdam dinga, kei hong mawhsak nuamte in bangmah hong cih thei lo ding hi." 
Proverbs27:12 Mipilte in a lauhuai thu mu thei-in pelh uh a, mi mawkmawkte in phusuakin thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs27:13 Mi khat in gamdang mi khatʼ leiba a lohsak dingin kam a ciam leh a ciam bangin ama neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi. 
Proverbs27:14 Mi khat in a kituak lopi-in midang khat limbawl lualiang leh amah in a sia lamin na ngaihsun zaw hi. 
Proverbs27:15 Phun bekbek a thei zi pen theu hun mel a nei lo guahciin tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs27:16 Tua bang numeite kikho thei lo a, a kikham thei lo huihnung le i khutin sathau i tawi nop tawh kibang hi." 
Proverbs27:17 Sik in sik mah hiamsak thei a, mi in midang pilsak thei hi." 
Proverbs27:18 Theikung a cing pa in a theigah ne a, a tapa a kem pa in pahtakna ngah hi." 
Proverbs27:19 Tui sung en leeng eima maitang i muh bangin i lungsim en leeng eima pianzia kilang hi. 
Proverbs27:20 Mihingteʼ lungsim pen misiteʼ gam tawh kibang a, tam lua cih hun nei thei lo hi." 
Proverbs27:21 Ngun le khamte meikhuk ah kize-et a, mihing ahihleh phatna tawh kize-et hi." 
Proverbs27:22 Mihai khat a sih dek dongin na satsat hangin a hai ngei mahin hai veve lai ding hi. 
Proverbs27:23 Na tuuhonte hoihtakin thei inla, na bawnghonte hoihtakin kem in." 
Proverbs27:24 Bang hang hiam cih leh neihsa kip tawntung lo a, hauhna pen a khangkhangin kizom suak lo hi." 
Proverbs27:25 Lopate ki-at mangkhin a, ahi zongin a no hong selkik hi. Mual tungah a po lopa hing khempeuh ki-atin inn ah kipua a," 
Proverbs27:26 tuute in na puan ding hong guan a, na keeltal mante lo ciing khat man tawh kikim hi." 
Proverbs27:27 Na keelnawite ahihleh na innkuan annek ding, le na nasem numeiteʼ nuntak nadingin kicing ding hi." 
Proverbs28:1 Kuama delh lohpi-in migilote tai mang a, mi thumante ahihleh humpinelkai bangin a hang uh hi." 
Proverbs28:2 Gam sung mite a hoih loh ciangin a banbanin gam uk kumpi tampi nei uh a, ahi zongin mipil thungaihsun theite in gam sung thahatsakin kipsak uh hi." 
Proverbs28:3 Mizawngte a bawlsia aana a nei mipa pen lo-a ante a susia gawp guahzu tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs28:4 Thukham a zui lo mite in migilote pakta uh a, thukham a zui mite ahihleh migilote tawh kilem lo uh hi." 
Proverbs28:5 Mi siahuaite in thutang cih mel thei lo uh a, Topa a biate in ahihleh a kicingin a thei uh hi." 
Proverbs28:6 Hau napi-in lungsim kawi mi hihna sangin zawng napi-in paubaan neih lohna hoih zaw hi. 
Proverbs28:7 Thuhilhna a mang mite ta pil hi a, lawm gilo tawh a kikhawl mi in a pa mindaisak hi." 
Proverbs28:8 A meet a pung lakna tawh a hau mipa pen mizawngte a hehpih mipa adingin sum a zonsak hi lel hi. 
Proverbs28:9 Mi khat in thukham a zuih nop kei leh ama thungetna nangawn Pasian in zakthadah huai sa hi. 
Proverbs28:10 A dik tat mi khat siatsak ding a hanciam pa pen ama tawh sa gum sung mahah kia ding hi. A dik mipa in gamh hoih luah dinga, migilo pa in bangmah luah lo ding hi." 
Proverbs28:11 Mihau pa pen amah pil kisa a, ahi zongin a zawng mipil pa in a hau paʼ haina phawk khia veve hi." 
Proverbs28:12 Mihoihte in vangliatna a ngah ciangin mi khempeuh lungdam uh a, migilote a liat ciangin a dangte in gimna thuak uh hi." 
Proverbs28:13 A khialhna a im mite a daupai lo dinga, a mawhna pulakin a kikheel mite in hehpihna ngah ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:14 Topa a zahtak tawntungte pen mi nuamsa hi a, a lungkhauh mite in lungkhamna tuak ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:15 Mizawngte a uk migilo pa pen humpinelkai gilkial le vompi halungvei tawh kibang hi. 
Proverbs28:16 Ngaihsut siamna a nei lo gam ukpa a gilo kumpi hi dinga, thuman tawh ngah ding bek a deih mipa in sau veipi uk ding hi." 
Proverbs28:17 Mi thatin a khial pa in ama hankhuk ding a to ahi hi. Ama hankhuk tawh kho kei in. 
Proverbs28:18 Thumanin a gamta mite lungmuangin om ding uh a, a zuau tat mite ahihleh puk ding uh hi." 
Proverbs28:19 Nakpi takin lo a kho pa hau mahmah a, bangmahin a kimang tum lo na a sem pa zawng mahmah hi." 
Proverbs28:20 A citak mipa in thupha tampi ngah dinga, a hau baih nuam mipa in gim tuak pelmawh ding hi." 
Proverbs28:21 Mi langbawlna hoih lo a, ahi zongin letsong neucik khat hangin thukhente gamta khial thei zel hi." 
Proverbs28:22 A huaiham mi in a hauh nadingin huai mengmeng a, a tawpna ah a zawn ding lamtak phawk kha lo hi." 
Proverbs28:23 Mi khat tai-in thuhilh lecin tungtham a phatna sangin a tawpna ah lungdam zaw ding hi. 
Proverbs28:24 A nu a paʼ neihsa laksakin, “Khialhna hi kei,” a ci pa pen guta mah hi veve hi." 
Proverbs28:25 A huaiham mi in kitotna piangsak a, Topa a muang mite mihau hi ding hi." 
Proverbs28:26 Ei le ei kimuanna haina hi a, mipilteʼ hilhna zuihna pen lungmuanna ahi hi." 
Proverbs28:27 Mizawng a huhte cimawh ngei lo dinga, huhna a pia nuam lote in samsiatna ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs28:28 Migilote a liat ciangin midangte bucip uh a, amaute a za kiat ciangin midikte in ukkik ding hi." 
Proverbs29:1 Kihilh napi-in a mang nuam lote bawl phat zawh nawn loh dongin kisia ding uh hi. 
Proverbs29:2 Midikte in gam a uk ciangin gam mite lungdam uh a, migilote in a uk ciangin a gam mite thum uh hi." 
Proverbs29:3 Pilna a deih mi in a pa lungdamsak a, numei paktat tawh a kikhawl mi in a neihsa teng lawn mang hi." 
Proverbs29:4 Thumanin a gamta kumpi in a gam kipsak a, sum bek a ngaihsun kumpi in a gam siasak hi." 
Proverbs29:5 A man lopi-in mi khat mawk phatna pen a awk nadingin thangsiahna ahi hi. 
Proverbs29:6 Migilote amau mawhna sungah awkcip a, midikte ahihleh suakta-in lungdam uh hi." 
Proverbs29:7 Midikte in mi cimawhte ading thu khual uh a, migilote in tua bang thukhualna thei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs29:8 Thu a khual lote in khua sungah buaina lianpi piangsak a, mipilte in tua buaina daisak thei hi." 
Proverbs29:9 Mipil khat in mihai khat tawh zumah thu nei leh mipil pa tungah hehin zahko a, phattuamna piang tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs29:10 Mi a that nuamte in a thuman mi mudah a, midikte in a thuman mi hu uh hi." 
Proverbs29:11 Mihai pa a hehna bangin kam pau-in gamta gawp a, mipil pa ahihleh ki-ipin a hehna damsak hi." 
Proverbs29:12 Kumpipa in zuau thu saangin na sem leh a nuai-a ulian khempeuh zong zuau genin ni tum ding uh hi. 
Proverbs29:13 Mizawng pa le mi bawlsia pa a kibatna uh khat om hi. Topa in a nih tuakun mittang guan hi. 
Proverbs29:14 Kumpipa in mizawngteʼ thu a manin khensak leh a ukna kip tawntung ding hi. 
Proverbs29:15 Ciangduai le tai-na in pilna guan a, a kikhah khong ta in a nu maizumsak hi." 
Proverbs29:16 Migilote ulian suak leh siatna khang semsem a, ahi zongin midikte in amauʼ mit mahmah tawh a gilo ulianteʼ zakiatna mu ding uh hi." 
Proverbs29:17 Na ta thuhilhin tai lecin ama hangin na kipak dinga, na lung hong kimsak ding hi." 
Proverbs29:18 Pasianʼ lamlahna a kizuih lohna gamah gam sung mite pheng tat gawp uh hi. Pasianʼ thukham a zui mite ahihleh a lungdam uh hi. 
Proverbs29:19 Kam a hilh lel tawh silate pil zo lo a, a theih hangun hong mang tuan lo hi." 
Proverbs29:20 Thu ngaihsun loin a pheng paupau mipa sangin mihai pa adingin lametna om zaw lai hi. 
Proverbs29:21 Sila khat a neu tung a kipan limtakin na khoi hangin a tawpna ah nang hong hehsak veve ding hi. 
Proverbs29:22 A heh pahpahte in kitotna piangsak a, a heh baihte khial thei tawntung hi." 
Proverbs29:23 A kiphasakte in niamkhiatna thuak dinga, a kiniamkhiatte in pahtawina ngah ding hi." 
Proverbs29:24 Guktaakna sungah a kipawl mipa ama adingin thusia zong pa ahi hi. A guktaakna pulak leh amah gim kipia dinga, gen khia kei leh lah Pasian in samsia veve ding hi." 
Proverbs29:25 Midangte kihtakna in hong lunghimawhsak a, Topa muanna in hong lungmuangsak hi." 
Proverbs29:26 Mi khempeuh in gam ukteʼ maipha ngah ding hanciam ciat uh a, ahi zongin Topaʼ kiang pan bekin thutang kingah hi." 
Proverbs29:27 Midikte in migilote mudah uh a, migilote in midikte mudah uh hi." 
Proverbs30:1 Jakehʼ tapa Agurʼ thugente: Amah in, “Pasian aw, ka lunggim a, ka cih nading ka thei kei hi." 
Proverbs30:2 Ka hai lua a, mihing ka sun kei hi. Mihing bangin ngaihsut siamna ka nei kei hi." 
Proverbs30:3 Pilna thu ka thei kei a, Pasianʼ thu ka theih om lo hi." 
Proverbs30:4 Vantungah kua kah to a, leitungah kua hong kum sukkik ahi hiam? Kua in a khut sungah huihte lomcip a, puan tawh tuite tuncip ahi hiam? Kua in leitung bulpite phut kip ahi hiam? Tua bang mi na theih ngei leh a tapaʼ min bang ahi hiam?" 
Proverbs30:5 “Pasian in a thugen khempeuh a manna laktel a, amah a belte adingin kidalna lum ahi hi." 
Proverbs30:6 Ama gen lohpi behlapsak kei in; na tua cih leh amah in nang hong tai-in zuau thu gen na hihna hong kilang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Proverbs30:7 Pasian aw, thu nih kong ngen hi. Ka sih ma-in tuate hong pia in." 
Proverbs30:8 Zuauna le khemna ka zat loh nadingin hong huh inla, a hau lua lo, a zawng lua loin hong bawl inla, ka khamkhop zah lian bek an hong pia in." 
Proverbs30:9 Hau lua leng nang hong nialin, “ Topa i cih kua ahi hiam?” kong ci kha dinga, zawng lua leuleu leng miʼ na guksakin ka Pasianʼ min kong daisak khazel ding hi." 
Proverbs30:10 Sila khat a topa kiangah gensia kei in; amah in nang hong gensia-in gimna na thuak kha ding hi. 
Proverbs30:11 A pate samsia-in a min a daisak, a nute a phat lo mi pawl khat om hi." 
Proverbs30:12 Amaute a nin mahmah hi napi-in amauʼ muhna ah siang a kisa mahmah mi pawl khat om hi. 
Proverbs30:13 Mihoih pha mahmah in a kingaihsun, a kiliansak mahmah mi pawl khat om hi." 
Proverbs30:14 A ha uh namsau tawh a kibang gam sung mizawngte a ne tum, mi cimawhte a liaktum mi pawl khat om hi." 
Proverbs30:15 Vot in tanu nih nei a, khat in, “Hong pia in,” ci a, a khat in zong, “Hong pia in,” mah ci veve hi. “Pha zo ta,” a ci ngei lo nam thum om a, eh! li hizaw:" 
Proverbs30:16 Han khuk, taciing numei, tui a deih tawntung lei keu, le a kisumit zo lo meikuang." 
Proverbs30:17 A pa a simmawh mipa, a nuʼ thu a mang nuam lo mipa, va-ak in a mittang khelkhiat sakin musanete in a sa ne ding uh hi." 
Proverbs30:18 Ka theih zawh het loh a lamdang mahmah thu thum om a, eh! li hizaw:" 
Proverbs30:19 Vanah musane a leen theihna zia, suangpi tungah gul a pai theihna zia, tuipi tungah teembaw a pai theihna zia, le nungak tangval a kingaihna zia." 
Proverbs30:20 A citak lo zi hih bangin gamta hi: Midang tawh khialin tua ciangin kisilsiang a, “Khialhna bangmah gamta kei ing,” ci khem hi." 
Proverbs30:21 Leitung mi khempeuh in a thuak zawh loh thu thum, eh! thu li om a," 
Proverbs30:22 sila khat kumpi a suah ciang, mihai khat in a duh bangbang a nek zawh ciang," 
Proverbs30:23 a muhthadah huai numei khat in pasal a neih ciang, nasem numeino in a tonuʼ za a suan ciang." 
Proverbs30:24 A neu mahmah ganhing nam li leitungah om a, ahi zongin a pil penpente ahi hi." 
Proverbs30:25 Miksite: A hat het lo ganhing hi napi-in khuakhal sungin a nek ding uh khol zo uh hi. 
Proverbs30:26 Ngalvangte: A thahat lo ganhing hi napi-in suang lakah a kua ding bawl uh hi. 
Proverbs30:27 Kauphete: Kumpi nei lo napi-in a kituak diamdiamin hon tat thei uh hi. 
Proverbs30:28 Innhikte: Khut sunga tawi zawh ganhing hi lel napi-in kumpi inn sungah teeng zo uh hi. 
Proverbs30:29 A gamtatna i et ciangin a thupi suak mahmah thum, eh! li om hi." 
Proverbs30:30 Humpinelkai: Ganhing lak pan a hat pen kuamah a kihta lo. 
Proverbs30:31 Aklui: A kihisak pai kuankuan. Keeltal: A kihisak pai gangan. Kumpipa: A miteʼ mai ah a pai lanlan. 
Proverbs30:32 Kiphasakin na hai pau ngei a, thusia bawl ding na ngaihsut ngei khak leh limtakin thu ngaihsun pha in." 
Proverbs30:33 Bawngnawi toktok lehang thawhbat hong suak a, mi khatʼ nak tupsak lehang si hong luang a, mi phin lehang kitotna hong piang hi." 
Proverbs31:1 Kumpipa Lemuel, a nu in a thuhilhna:" 
Proverbs31:2 Kong it mahmah ka ta aw, thu ngenngenin kong neih ka tapa na hi hi. Nangma tungah bang teng hong gen ding ka hi hiam?" 
Proverbs31:3 Na thatang teng numei tungah beisak kei inla, na sum khempeuh numei tungah zang kei in. Numei in kumpipa siasak thei hi." 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuel aw, ka thugen hong ngai in. Kumpite in zu nek huai lo a, mi ukte in khamtheih zu a duh ding hi lo hi." 
Proverbs31:5 Zu ne le-uh, thukham mangngilh uh a, thukham hei-in mizawngte gim pia kha thei uh hi." 
Proverbs31:6 A si dekdekte, khamtheih zu pia inla, a lungkham mahmahte, leenggahzu pia in." 
Proverbs31:7 Amaute nesak lecin a zawnna uh mangngilhin, a lungkhamna uh phawk nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Proverbs31:8 Thu a gen thei lo mite adingin thu gensak inla, a huh ding a om lo mite panpih in." 
Proverbs31:9 Amau ading thu genin thu a tangin khen inla, a zawng a cimawh mite amau adingin a kilawm hamphatna ngahsak in." 
Proverbs31:10 Zi hoih pen suangmanpha sangin manpha zaw pek a, ahi zongin zi hoih ngah ding haksa mahmah hi." 
Proverbs31:11 A pasal in muang mahmah a, a inn sung uh ah annek kitasam ngei lo uh hi." 
Proverbs31:12 Amah in a khan tawntungin a pasal tungah thupha bawl a, a pasal tungah thusia tun ngei lo hi." 
Proverbs31:13 Amah in samul le khau zongin thanuam takin na sem hi. 
Proverbs31:14 Amah in sumbukteʼ van pua teembaw bangin gamlapi panin an hong ciahpih hi. 
Proverbs31:15 Phalvak tungin zingtho a, annek ding teng limtakin bawlin a nasem numeiteʼ sep ding teng a vaihawmsak hi." 
Proverbs31:16 Amah in leitang hoih penpen zong a, a thalawh sa sum tawh a leenggui lo ding a lei hi." 
Proverbs31:17 A nik singtenin a puan ban zial a, tha lawp takin na a sem hi." 
Proverbs31:18 Amah in a nasepte a manphatna thei a, zankim zankhang dongin nakpi takin na a sem hi." 
Proverbs31:19 Amah in khau kheekin a puan ding gan tawm hi. 
Proverbs31:20 A zawng mite tungah amah cingh mahmah a, a cimawh mite tungah huhna a pia hi." 
Proverbs31:21 A innkuan buppi puan lum guan zo ahih manin phalbi tun ding lunghimawh lo hi. 
Proverbs31:22 Amah in a puan ding khui tawm a, saihadial puan san vive a silh zo hi." 
Proverbs31:23 Thukhen upate lakah a pasal a tut ciangin miteʼ lakah a kithei kim mi khat ahi hi. 
Proverbs31:24 Amah in puan khui-in kawnggakte zong bawl a, sumbukte tungah tuate a zuak hi." 
Proverbs31:25 Amah a tha hatin zong kizahtak a, mailam hun ading a lung patau lo hi." 
Proverbs31:26 Amah in a pilna tawh thu gen a, kam khum takin pau hiathiat hi." 
Proverbs31:27 Amah in a innkuan sung kisapna teng sem a, a tawntungin manlah den hi." 
Proverbs31:28 A tate in amah it mahmah uh a, a pasal in zong pakta mahmah a," 
Proverbs31:29 “Zi hoih tampi a om tei hangin nang kan a hoih kuamah om kei,” ci-in a phat hi." 
Proverbs31:30 Ngaihbaanna pen zuaupi hi thei a, melhoihna zong maimang thei hi. Ahi zongin Topa a zahtak numei a phat taak ahi hi." 
Proverbs31:31 A sepna khempeuh hangin amah phat un. Mi khempeuh in a zahtak dingin a kilawm ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem khua sungah kumpi a sem, Davidʼ tapa, Thugen Siampaʼ thugente:" 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Thugen Siampa in hih bangin ci hi: A mawknapi, a mawknapi, na khempeuh a mawknapi." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Gimpi a nisa thuakin nasepna ah mihing in bang noptuam ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Khang khat bei-in khang khat hong tung a, ahi zongin leitung kibangbang niloh hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ni hong suakin ni tum a, a suakkik dingin tum zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Leitaw lamah huih nungin leilu lamah nung leuleu a, a zuih ngeina teng mah zui-in nungnung niloh hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Lui khempeuh tuipi ah luang suk a, ahi zongin tuipi dim nai lo hi. Tuipi tuite a khu-in leengin tuinak ah guahin zu a, a nak panin hong luang sukkik zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Na khempeuh lunggimhuai a, kuama gen zawh ding hi lo hi. Mit in a muh cim thei lo a, bil in a zak cim thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 A om sa mah bangin hong piangkik dinga, a kisem sa bangin hong kisemkik ding hi. Leitungah a thak na khat beek om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Hih pen a thak ahi hi, a kici thei ding khat beek om lo hi. Eiteʼ khan ma-in a om sa vive ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 A beisa nate kiphawk kha nawn lo a, hong tung lai ding thute zong a khangkikte in phawk nawn lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Thugen Siampa kei pen Jerusalem khua ah Israel kumpipa ka hi ngei hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Hih leitungah a kisem na khempeuh en telin a thu kan ding ka ngaihsun hi. Pasian in tua bang nasep ei tungah hong guat pen a nuam het lo nasep khat ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Leitungah a kisem khempeuh ka mu khin a, tuate khempeuh a mawknapi na hi a, huihpi nung tawh kibang lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 A kawi sate kimamsak thei lo a, a om lopi a omin kiseh thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 “Pilna sangpi ka nei a, keima mai ah Jerusalem a uk dangte khempeuh sangin ka pil zaw hi. Pilna le theihna a kici khempeuh ka theih loh om lo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Pilna le haina, theihna le mawlna, a kilamdanna ka zong hi. Ahi zongin tua bang ka hahkatna zong a mawknapi ahih lam ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pil semsem lehang kilunghimawh semsem a, tam thei semsem lehang hong gimsak semsem zawsop hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Lungdamna zongin nuam ka sak bangbangin om ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun leuleu hi. Tua zong a mawknapi ahihna ka phawk zel hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nuihna pen haina ahihna, nopna pen bangmahin a kiman lohna ka mu khia hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Mihingte in leitungah tomno a nuntak sungin bangci om leh hoih ding ahi hiam, cih ka muh theih nadingin pilna ka deihna mah tawh, zunekna tawh ka lung nuamsakin, ka utut sep ding ka hanciam hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Na lian tampi tak mah ka sem zo hi. Keima adingin inn tampi tak ka lam a, leenggui lo tampi tak mah ka nei hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Huan bawlin singno cinna lo zong ka nei a, ka huan sungah nek theih namkim kidim hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Tua singnote tui piak nadingin tuikhuk pi zong ka bawl hi. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ka inn ah a suak silate banah, sila a nu a pa-in tampi tak ka nei thuah hi. Tuuhonte le bawnghonte zong tampi tak ka nei a, Jerusalem-a omngei dangte khempeuh sangin ka hau zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ka zawh sa kumpiteʼ sumkholna panin keima adingin ngun le kham zong ka la hi. Ka lungnop nadingin la a sa ding lasiam numei le pasal tampi ka nei a, ka deih zahzah zong ka nei zo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Tua ahih ciangin keima hun ma-in Jerusalem ah a omngei mite khempeuh sangin ka lian zaw a, ka pilna zong bei tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ka deih khempeuh ka nei a, ka ut bangbangin omin ka gamta hi. Ka sepna khempeuh ah nuam ka sa hi; tua nopsakna pen ka nasepna hangin ka phattuamna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tua ciangin ka sep sa na khempeuh, tua bangin haksapi a ka sepnate ka ngaihsutkik ciangin, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahihna le leitungah bangmah phattuamna a om lohna ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 A hi-in ci lehang, kumpi khat in ama ma-a kumpipaʼ hih sa teng mah a hih thei bek ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin pilna, haina, mawkna i cih bang ahi hiam, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Tua banga ka ngaihsut ciangin, khuavak in khuamial a zawh bangin, pilna pen haina zawhna ahih lam ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mipilte in a pai nading mun mu thei a, mihaite in a pai nading mun mu thei lo hi. Ahi zongin a pil le a hai in a kibang khat a tuah tuak ding ka thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tua ciangin, “Mihaite tungah a piang ding thute keiʼ tungah zong hong piang ding ahih manin, ka pil mahmah manin bang phattuamna ngah ka hi hiam?” ka ci a, “Bangmah ngah kei ing, them khat zong ngah kei ing,” ci-in ka kidawng hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mihaite a kiphawkphawk loh mah bangin, mipilte zong kiphawkphawk tuan lo a, mailam hunah i vekpi-in hong kimangngilh lel ding ahi hi. A pil a hai-in, i vekpi-in i si ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Tua ahih ciangin hih leitung a sepna khempeuh in lungkhamna cih loh hong piak theih dang bangmah om lo ahih manin, hih leitung a hinna pen kei adingin a kimanna bangmah om lo hi. A mawknapi, huih hawmguak bang bek hi lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Keimah a hong laih ding pa tungah ka neih ka lam khempeuh ka nusiat ding thei ka hih manin, nakpi takin sem a ka gimpih nate pen kei adingin a phattuamna om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kei hong laih pa pil taleh hai taleh, ka pilna ka siamna khempeuh zanga ka sep sa nate luahin a ukpa hi ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Tua ahih ciangin hih leitungah nakpi takin na ka sepna ka kisik hi. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Pilna, siamna, theihna siit loin na kisem a, them khat zong a gimpih het lo mi khat adingin nusiat ding hi zenzen hi. Hih thu a man het lo, a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mi khat in hih leitungah lunghimawhin thatang sanin na a sepna ah bang phattuamna ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Sepna bawlna khempeuh ah lungkhamna le sinkhamna bekbek hi a, zan nangawnin a ihmut mawhpih hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mihing khat in a nasepna thamanin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om sangin a hoih zaw bangmah dang om lo hi. Ahi zongin tua nangawn zong, Pasianʼ hang ahihna ka phawk hi." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Pasian kihel loin kua in an ne-in nuamsa thei ding ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Pasian in amah a lungdamsakte tungah pilna, theihna le lungdamna pia a, ahi zongin a hehpihhuai mimawhte ahihleh a sep bek sisakin, amauʼ thalawh sa khempeuh amah a lungdamsakte tungah a piaksak hi. Hih pen a mawknapi taktak, huihpi nung delh bang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Hih leitungah a piang thu khempeuh, Pasian in ama pian hun dinga a seh sa hunin a piansak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Suah hun om a, sih hun om hi. Suan hun om a, bawhkhiat hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Gawh hun om a, khoi hun om hi. Phel hun om a, lam hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Kah hun om a, nuih hun om hi. Dah hun om a, laam hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Lup khawm hun om a, tuam lup hun om hi. Kikawi hun om a, kikhah hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Zonʼ hun om a, mansuah hun om hi. Kep hun om a, paihkhiat hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Bal kek hun om a, phop hun om hi. Daih hun om a, pau hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 It hun om a, muhdah hun om hi. Kido hun om a, kilem hun om hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Na a sem mipa in a sep sa khempeuh thamanin bang ngah ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Pasian in eiteʼ manlah pih dingin hong piak nasep ka thei hi. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Amah in na khempeuh amauʼ hun ciat tawh a kituak dingin a bawl hi. Amah in mailam thu theihnopna lungsim eite tungah hong guan a, ahi zongin ama sepnate a cing a theih zawh nading hong guan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Tua ahih ciangin mihingte in a nuntak lai teng a siam tawpun gamta-in lungdamin a om ding a thupi pen ahihna ka phawk hi. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Eite khempeuh in an ne tui dawnin i sepna thaman tawh lungdamin i om ding kilawm a, tua pen Pasianʼ hong piak letsong ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pasianʼ sep khempeuh a kip tawntung ding ahihna ka thei hi. I behlap theih ding om lo a, i paihkhiat ding zong om lo hi. Amah i zahtak theih nadingin Pasian in tua bang ding mahin a bawl ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 A piang khat peuhpeuh pen a piang ngeisa mah na hi a, a piang lai ding khat peuhpeuh zong a piang ngeisa mah na hi lel hi. Pasian in ama hunhunin a piang ngeisa mah piangsakkik zelzel hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Tua tham loin, hih leitungah gitlohna in thuman thutang a suan khiatna zong ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Pasian in sepna bawlna le na khempeuh ama hun ding sehkhol khin ahih manin, midikte le migilote thu khen ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Mihingte pen ganhing bang lel ahihna uh a lahtel nadingin Pasian in mihingte ze-et hi, ci-in ka lungsimah ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 A tawpna ah ci lehang, mihingte le ganhingte in a tuah ding uh kibang a, ganhing mah bangin mihing zong a si ahi hi. Mihing le ganhing in a kibangin nuntakna hu nei a, mihing le ganhing nuntakna a kimanna bangmah om lo ahih manin, mihing pen ganhing sangin a hoihzawkna bangmah om tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 A nih tuakun mun khat ah tung khawm ding uh a, leivui panin a piang uh ahih mah bangin leivui mah suakkik ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mihingteʼ kha vanah kah to-in ganhingteʼ kha lei ah lut suk hi, cih a thei zong kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Tua ahih ciangin mihingte in a sep thaman uh ne-in nuamsa-in a om ding uh a hoih pen ahihna ka phawk hi. Tua lo a hih theih ding uh bangmah dang om lo hi. I sih khit ciangin bang piang ding cih theihtheihna bangmah om lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tua ciangin leitungah thuman loin a kigamtatnate khempeuh ka ngaihsunkik leuleu hi. Nenniamna a thuak mite kap uh a, ahi zongin kuamah in amaute hehnem lo uh hi. A nengniam mite thahat lua uh ahih manin kuamah in thuk ngam lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 A hing lai mite sangin a si khin sa mite hampha zaw ka sa hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Mihing a hong piang nai lo, hih leitung gitlohna teng a mu nai lote hampha zaw lai sawnsawn uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Mi khatlekhat, hauh nop man a kidemna hangin nakpi tak a na kisem ahihna ka mu hi. Hih zong a mawknapi hi a, huihpi nung delh mah tawh kibang bek hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Mihaite in na sem loin a khut zepin om uh a, a tawpna ah gil kialin sih lawh uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Nakpi takin na sem a, a mawknapi ahi ding, khut nih dim sangin lungsim nuamin khut khat dim neihna hoih zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Nuntakna sungah a mawknapi ahi thudang khat ka mu leuleu hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi khat in tapa ahi a, sanggam ahi zongin nei lo napi-in, a tawntungin na semin a neihsa tawh lungkim hun nei thei lo hi. Kua adingin gimpi-in na sem a, a ututin ta hoh lo ahi hiam? Hih zong a mawknapi mah, a dahhuai nuntakna khat ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Mi khat sangin mi nih hoih zaw hi; amauʼ sepna thaman a tam zaw ngah uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh khat cimawh leh a khat in huh a, mi khat guak pen cimawh zenzen leh a huh ding om lo ahih manin a dahhuai pha mahmah ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Khua a dam ciangin mi nih lum khawm leh khua lum hi; khat guak bangci khualum theih ding ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mi khat bek hileh zawh nop kisa a, nih pha leh kizo zo lo hi. Zang thum a kiheek khauhual bawh sat hak hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Miʼ thugen a sang thei nawn lo, teek leh hai a thuah kumpipa sangin zawng napi-in a pil tangval khat hoih zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Mi khat pen thong panin suakta-in kumpi suak thei a, zawng napi-in ama gam sungah kumpi suak thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Hih leitungah mi khempeuhʼ thu ka ngaihsun a, tua mite lak panin kumpipaʼ za a luah ding khangno mi khat a om lam ka phawk hi."
