Ecclesiastes4:16 Kumpipaʼ uk ding mite sim zawh lohin tam a, ahi zongin amah a sih ciangin ama nasepna hangin a lungdam khat beek om lo hi. Hih pen a mawkna taktak, huihpi nung delh bang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Biakinn ah na pai ciangin limtakin kingaihsun in. A man le a man lo a khen thei lo mihaiteʼ biakpiaknate tawh a kibang piakna sangin thu ngai dingin biakinn-a paina hoih zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Thu ngaihsun masa-in pau inla, Pasianʼ tungah thu mawk ciam pak kei in. Vantungah Pasian om a, leitungah nang om na hih manin na pau ding a kilawm zahval pau kei in." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Lunghimawh semsem lecin na mang sia semsem dinga, tam pau semsem lecin na haina kilang semsem ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pasianʼ tungah thu na ciam ciangin manlangin tungsak pah in. Amah in mihaite diksa lo hi. Na thuciamna bangin tungsak in. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Na thuciamna bangin na tunsak kei ding le thu ciam vet kei zaw in. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Khial kha ing, ci-in Pasianʼ siampipaʼ mai ah na gen ding kisam kha ding ahih manin na kampauna hangin khial kha kei in. Tua bangin gamta khial lecin nangma tungah Pasian heh dinga, na sep sa khempeuh hong suksiatsak ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mang tam man leeng a mawkna mah tam a, kam tam pau leeng zong a kituak mahin a mawkna thu mah kibehlap hi; bangbang ahi zongin Pasian zahtak lai veve in." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kumpite in mizawngte gim ngahsakin, thuman thutangin na a kisep kei leh lamdang sa kei in. Uliante pen amauʼ tunga uliante in en uh a, tuateʼ tungah a en sawn a lian zaw khat om lai hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Gam khat peuhpeuh in lokhawhna lamsang a lunghimawh kumpi khat kisam hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Sum deihna lungsim na neih leh lungkim hun cih na nei ngei kei ding hi. Na hauh nop hangin na deih khempeuh na ngah ngei kei ding hi. Hih pen a mawknapi ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Hau semsem lecin na vak ding mi tam semsem a, a hau zaw hiʼng, ci-a na theih bek cih sim loh bangmah phattuamna na ngah kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Na a sem mipa pen a nek ding nei taleh nei ta kei leh lungnuam takin ihmu thei a, a haute ahihleh lungnuam takin ihmu thei lo uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 A hoih het lo na khat hih leitungah ka mu hi: Mite amauʼ lunggim nadingin hau uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Na a sep khialh manun a neihsa teng uh suplawh uh a, a tu a tateʼ luah ding bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 I nuteʼ sung panin bangmah nei loin guaktangin i suah mah bangin guaktang mahin i ciahkik hi. I sep sate i ciah pihkik theih bangmah om lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes5:16 A dahhuai mahmah thu in: I suah hun lai-a mah bang teekteekin i ciahkik ding hi. A mawknapi ding a i sepna ah bang phattuamna ngah ihi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes5:17 I nuntak sungteng lungzinna, dahna, lunghihmawhna, natna satna le hehna bek tawh hun bei lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Keimah in ka phawkkhiat thu in: Pasian in tom kha nuntak hih leitungah hong piak sungin, i sep thaman ne-in dawnin i om ding a hoih pen ahi hi. Hih pen mihingteʼ thumong ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Pasian in mi khat neihlelam guanin, a hauhna nuam takin a neksak leh, amah lungdamin a sepna thaman ne-in a om ding hi. Tua nopsakna pen Pasianʼ kiang pan ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Pasian in lungdamin omsak ahih manin a nuntak tomlam phawkin nei kha lo ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Hih leitung a mihingte tungah a man het loin hong kibawlna ka phawk hi. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Pasian in mi khatpeuh tungah neihlelam, hauhna le pahtawina pia-in, a deih khempeuh neisak napi-in, tua nate nuam takin zangsak loin, midang khat in nopsak lawh laizang hi. Hih pen a mawknapi, a thuman het lo khat ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mi khat in ta za khat nei-in kum saupi zong nungta thei kha ding hi. Bangzahin sau veipi a nungta ahi zongin leitungah nopsakna ngah loin, limtak a vuina a ngah kei leh, a sisa-a suak naungek hoih zaw lai hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 A sisa-a suak naungek a kimanna om lo hi. Khuamial sungah suakin, khuamial sung mahah mangthangin kiphawk nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Sun khuavak mu kha loin, nuntakna bangci hiam, cih a theihkhak loh hangin tawlngakna a ngah hibuang hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Nuntakna ah nopsakna a ngah lo mipa kum tul nih a hing zongin, a tawpna ah a sisa-a suak naungek mah tawh a tunna mun kibang lel hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mihingteʼ nasepna pen a nektawm ding bek a ngaihsutna hi lo napi-in, a khamkhop ngah zo tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Tua ahih manin mihai pa sangin mipil pa a hamphat zawkna bang om tuan ahi hiam? Mihai pa in nuntak nading zia a theih hangin bang phatuam tuan ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Na dangdang deih thuah ngitngetna sangin i neihsa teng tawh lungkimna hoih zaw hi. Hih zong a mawknapi, huihpi nung delh mah tawh a kibang bek ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 A piang thu khempeuh, a tua ci mahin tangtawng a kiseh sa hi a, mi khat in amah sangin a thahat zaw mi khat a nial zawh lohna thu i vekpi-in i thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Sauvei kinial lehang a mawkna hi semsem a, a phattuamna om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Niliim bangin a pai hanhan, a mawknapi hih nuntak tom sungah mihing ading a hoih pen kua in thei ding ahi hiam? Ama sih khit ciangin leitungah bang piang ding cih kua in gen thei ahi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 A manpha paknamtui sangin min pha hoih zaw a, i suah ni sangin i sih ni hoih zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Pawi simna sangin si galna hoih zaw hi. Sih ding bek a ngak ahihna mihing khempeuh in a phawk ding uh kilawm hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Nuihna sangin dahna hoih zaw hi; na mai hong gumsak zahin na thutheihna hong khangsak hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mipilte dahna lakah om tual a, mihaite nopna lakah om tual hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mihaite in pahtawina la hong sak sangin mipilteʼ hong taina hoih zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Mihaiteʼ nuihna pen meikuang sunga selkeu kikhul a puak zaizai tawh kibang a, khiatna nei lo, a mawknapi ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Mipil khat in midangte a khem ciangin mihai bangin a gamta ahi hi. Sumgolh lakna in a lapaʼ gamtat hoihna siasak hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Thu khatpeuh a kipatna sangin a tawpna hoih zaw a, kiphatsakna sangin lungduaina hoih zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Heh pahpah kei in; hehna a haihuai ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 “Bang hangin nidang lai-in hih sangin hoih zaw tham ahi hiam?” ci-in dong kei in. Tua bangte pil thudotna hi lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Pilna pen hauhna zahin hoih a, mihingte adingin phattuamna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Sum in hong lungmuansak bangin pilna in zong hong lungmuangsak hi. Pilna a manphatna, a pilte a nuntaksak theihna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pasianʼ sep sate ngaihsun dih in. Pasian in a kawi-a a bawl sate kua in mamsakkik thei ahi hiam? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Nopna na ngah laitakin lungdam in; haksatna na tuah ciangin hih thu ngaihsun in: Lungdamna le lungkhamna hong pia pa pen Pasian hi a, mai lamah bang piang ding cih kuamah in thei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ka nuntakna a mawknapi hi a, ahi zongin ka nuntak sungin thu khempeuh ka thei hi. Mi khat hoih napi-in si a, mi khat siahuai napi-in a khansau hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Tua ahih ciangin hoih lua kei inla, lah sia lua kei in. Bang hangin nang kisiasak tawm ding na hi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Gilo lua, hai lua kei in. Bang hangin khansih laizang ding na hi hiam?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 A nih tuakin lenkip in. Pasian na zahtak nakleh khat peuhpeuh na zuihna ah na maa vang ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Khuapi a uk mihing sawm sangin pilna in mi khat hatsak zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 A manin a gamta, a khial ngei het lo, leitungah mi khat zong om het lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Miʼ gen khempeuh thudon kei in. Na nasem paʼ hong samsiatna na za kha ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Nang zong midang na samsiat zelzelna teltakin na kithei hi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hihte khempeuh ka pilna tawh ka ze-et a, pil ding ka hahkat hangin keiʼ bat zawh ding hi lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mihing nuntakna kua in thei khia zo ding ahi hiam? Eite adingin thuk lua a, telhak lua hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Keimah in pilna siamna ka theih nading, pilna mu-in thupiangte a hang ka theih nadingin nakpi takin hanciamin ka lungsim ka pia a, haina a hoih lohna le a haihuaina ka thei khia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Sihna sangin numei a siahuai zawkna ka thei khia hi. Ama hong piak itna in thang bangin hong tep cip a, ama hong kawina khut in sikkhau bangin hong hencip hi. Pasianʼ deihna bangin a gamtate in tua bang numei pelh thei a, ahi zongin a mawh nuamte a thang ah a awk uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Thugen siampa in hih bangin ci hi: Thu ka kan ciangin, a banbanin thu ka phawk khia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 A thudang ka zonzon hangin bangmah ka mu zo nawn kei hi. Pasal tul khat sung pan khat bang bek a pil a om khak theihna, ahi zongin numei lakah a pil cih bang a om lohna keimah in ka phawk khia hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Keima theihkhiat thu in: Pasian in eite a thuman dingin hong bawl hi napi-in, eite in paulap tuamtuam zongin, i kikai-awksak hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mipilte bek in na a khiatna taktak theithei uh hi. Pilna in mipilte maitaisak a, a hehmai a beisak hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kumpipaʼ hong sawl bangin gamta inla, Pasianʼ tungah thu mawk ciam pak kei in." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kumpipa in a ut peuhpeuh hih thei ahih manin ama kiang panin paikhia in; ama lungkim lohna hih teitei kei in. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kumpipa aana neihna tawh gamta hi. Ama gen bangin gamta in; kuamah in amah nial zo lo hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ama thu a mangte in haksatna tuak kha lo ding hi. Mipilte in a gamtatna zia le a hunhoih thei uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Na khatpeuh i hih ding ciangin a kilawm hun, le a ngeina man om a, ahi zongin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 A hong piang ding thu i thei kei a, a hong gen thei zong kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 A sih ding a pelh thei, a sih ding hun a phiat thei kuamah om lo hi. Gal a om ciangin gallauna a pelh thei, siatna sungah a lut ciangin a peng thei kuamah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Leitung a gamtatnate ka ngaihsut ciangin hih thute ka mu khia hi. Mi khat in midang tungah vangliatna nei-in, a uk sung mite a gimsak gawp hun a om hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Migilote si-in kivui a, a siat gamtatna khua sunga om mite mah in han panin a ciah ciangun amah a phat veve-na uh ka mu hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 A mawhte gim kipia pahpah lo ahih manin mihingte in khialh ding haksa sa lo uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mawhnei khat in zavei dong siatna bawl napi-in a khansau veve hi. Ahi zongin “Pasian a zahtakte adingin thu khempeuh nuam ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Migilote adingin thu nuam lo dinga, amaute in Pasian zahtak lo uh ahih manin a nuntak hun uh niliim bangin beipak dinga, khansih ding uh hi,” kici hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ahi zongin hih thugenna a mawknapi ahi hi. Leitung a thupiangte ngaihsun dih in: Khat veivei midikte in migiloteʼ gimthuak ding teng thuak zawsop a, migilote in midikteʼ thaman ngah ding teng ngah zawsop uh hi. Hih thu pen a haivai, a mawkna taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tua ahih ciangin mihing in hih leitungah nuam a sak theih ding a dang om lo ahih manin an ne tui dawnin nuamsa-in a om ding bek ahi hi. Pasian in hih leitungah nuntak a piak sungteng a sep thaman a ngah theih ding hih bek om hi. 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pil ding hahkatin, leitung a thupiangte ka theih ciangin sun le zanin ihmu lo liangin i om hangin," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pasianʼ nasepna i theih zawh lohna ka phawk hi. Mihingte in bangzahin i hahkat hangin kithei khia zo lo hi. Mipilte in thei a kisak hangun bangmah thei lo uh hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nakpi takin sau veipi ngaihsunin ka phawk thu in: Mipilte le midikteʼ gamtatna a vekpi-in Pasian in uk a, Pasianʼ itna hang hizaw hiam, a muhdahna hang hizaw hiam kuamah in thei lo hi. Amauʼ mailam thu khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh a thumong kibang a, midikte le migilote, mihoihte le misiate, mi siangte le mi ninte, biakna piate le a pia lote, a thutawpna uh a vekpi-in kibang lel hi. Mawhnei pa sangin mihoih pa hampha zaw tuan lo a, thuciamna a bawl lopa sangin a bawl pa hampha zaw tuan lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Mi khempeuhʼ thumong kibang kim a, hih pen leitung a thupiang lakah a man het lo khat ahi hi. Mihingte a nuntak lai teng gitlohna le a mawkna thu tawh a lungsim uh kidim a, theih kholh lohin mihingte sipak uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Ahi zongin a hing laite ading lametna om thei a, a si sa humpinelkai sangin a hing lai ui hoih zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 A hing laite in a si ding ahih lam uh thei a, a si sate in bangmah thei nawn lo uh hi. A si sate in thaman bangmah nei nawn lo uh a, amaute kiphawk kha nawn lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Amau adingin itna, muhdahna, hanciamna cihte om nawn lo a, leitung a om nate khat beek thei khakik nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 An ne-in lungdam inla, zu ne-in lungnuam in. Na gamtatna peuhpeuh Pasian in hoih a sa hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Na puante siangsakin paaksak tawntung inla, na sam gumsak ngei kei in." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Pasian in hih leitungah nang a hong piak, tom kha sung na nuntak lai teng, na it na zi tawh a nuam theithei-in om in. Leitung lungkhamna sungah na lawhtak, tua bek mah hi kha ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Na mai ah sep ding a om khempeuh, na tha neihzah tawh sem in. Bang hang hiam cih leh na zuat ding sihna gam sungah nasepna le thungaihsutna, pilna le theihna cihte om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Hih leitungah ka phawk dang thu khat in: A tai hat mite in tai kidemna ah zo tawntung lo a, galhang thahatte in gal zo tawntung lo hi. A pilte in an a kham ngah tawntung lo a, a pilte hau tawntung lo hi. Hih theih siamna a neite mi lian suak tawntung lo hi. Mi khempeuh tungah kamsiatna vive tung hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mihing in ama hun ding thei ngei lo hi. Thang ah a awk vasate le ngen ah a awk ngasate tawh i kibang hi. Lamet loh hun laitak keekin hunsia sungah mihingte i tung hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Thudang khat zong ka mu khia hi: Hih leitungah pilna a hoihna gentehna a hoih khat om hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Mi tawmno bek a omna khua khat om a, a vanglian kumpi khat in tua khua a sim hi. Amah in tua khua umcihin a khua sung luh gawp dingin a ngaihsun hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Tua khua sungah a zawng mipil khat om a, ama pilna tawh tua khua a hu zo hi. Ahi zongin kuamah in tua mizawng pa phawk kha lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Thahatna sangin pilna hoih zaw ka ci hi; ahi zongin kuamah in mizawngte a pil dingin ngaihsun lo a, mizawngteʼ thugen kuamah in thudonin nei lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mihai hon lakah gam ukpa in thu a gen lualua sangin mipil pa in dam takin a gen hiathiat ngaihhuai zaw hi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Galhiamte sangin pilna hoih zaw a, ahi zongin khialhna khat in a hoih tampi susia thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 A si sa thote in paknamtui bung sungah a om paknamtui uihsak thei a, hai tatna themno khat in pilna lian pen susia thei hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mipilte a manin a gamtat ding a ngeina hi a, mihaite a sia-in a gamtat ding a ngeina ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mihaite lampi ah a paikawm nangawnin hai tat uh a, a haina uh mi khempeuh theisak uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Nang tungah gam ukpa a heh leh na nasep za taisan pah kei in. Dai tak a om hithiatna in khialhna lianpi maisak thei hi. 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Hih leitungah a thuman lo gam ukteʼ piansak ka muhte: 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mihaite, zalianpi kipia a, mihaute kiniamkoih suk hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Sakol tungah silate tuang a, mi liante, sila bangin a khe-un pai uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Gum a tote gum sung mahah kia dinga, miʼ phung a phelsakte gul in tu ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Suang a to khiate suang mah in liamsak dinga, sing a ekte sing ehna mahah liam ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 I hei mawl napi-in i tat kei leh nakpi takin sat kul a, ngaihsut masak ding pilhuai zaw hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Gul khim thei napi i khim kei leh a kimanna om tuan lo hi; gul in hong tu veve ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mipilteʼ kampauna in pahtawina ngahsak a, mihaiteʼ kampauna in amau mah siasak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Thugen a kipat ciangun bangtum loteng tawh kipan pah malam uh a, gitloh vai teng tawh a thugen a khum lel uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Mihaite in thu gengenin ciakciak uh hi. Mailam a thupiang ding kuamah in thei lo a, a sih khit-a thupiang ding a hong gen thei om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 A inn zuat nading lampi a thei lo mihai luate bek, a inn lam zonna-in gim ding uh hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 A kumpipa miʼ cih bangbangin gamta lel a, zan khuavak-in zune makai a a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh in lungkhamna thuak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 A kumpipa in lungsim khensatna nei thei a, a makaite in an nek tui dawn a hun thei a, amau ki-uk thei-in zu a kham lo makai a nei, gam khat peuhpeuh a hampha gam ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Thadah lua-in a inn vang nangawn a hu nuam lo mipa, a inn keh dinga, a inn nangawn in puk lawh ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 An in lungdamsak a, zu in lung nuamsak hi. Sum in ahihleh na khempeuh a kicingsak hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Na lungsim nangawn ah kumpipa gensia kei in. Kuama zak lohna mun na lupna tung nangawn ah mihaute samsia kei in. Thopi in na thugen teng na puak kha ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Sum bawl nadingin na sumte zang in. Ni khat ni peuh teh a meet na ngah ding hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Na sumbuk vante mun sagih ah ahi a, mun giat ah ahi zongin khen kawikawi in. Hih leitungah bang thusia hong piang ding cih na thei khol kei hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Meii sungah tui a tam luat ciangin leitungah guahin hong zu suk a, singkung khatpeuh a puk ciangin a pukna sansan ah om paisuak hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Huih le guah ngakin khuahun hoih dong a ngak mi in khaici tuh ngei lo dinga, an zong la ngei lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nupi gai khat sungah nuntakna thak bangci kipat hiam, ci-in na theih zawh loh mah bangin na khempeuh a bawl Pasianʼ nasepna na thei zo ngei kei ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zingsang a kipan khaici tuh inla, nitak dong mateng khawl kei in. A vekpi-in a po kim ding ahi a, a khat sia-in, a khat a po ding ahi zongin na theih kholh bangmah om lo hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Khuavak hoih mahmah a, i mit in nitaang a muh ciangin nuam mahmah hi." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mi khat sau veipi a nuntak le a nuntak sung nuam takin om tahen. Sau veipi tak a hing zongin a sih khit hun a sauvei zawkna phawk tahen. Mai lamah a lamethuai bangmah a om kei hi. 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Khangnote aw, na khangnona uh nuamsa unla, na khangno lai-un lungdam un. Na hih nop peuhpeuh uh hih unla, na ut bangbangun gamta un. Ahi zongin na gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in Pasian in thu hong khen ding phawk gige un." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Note kilunggimsak kei unla, na pumpi uh gen theisak kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khangno hunsung uh sauvei lo ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Na lungkham hun ding a hong tun ma, “Nuntak nuamsa kei ing,” na cih ma hun, na khangno lai-in nang hong Piangsak pa phawk in." 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Lungkham hun i cih in: Nang adingin nitaang, khataang, aksi taangte a dialh hun, meiipi kai a then nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:3 na muan na suan a thahat na khut, na baan, na khete, a thaneem hun, an hai nadingin na ha tang tawm lua ta-in na mit maangin, limtakin khua na muh theih nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 khua sung gamlumnate na bil in za thei nawn loin, ansukna gingte na zak theih phat nawn loh hun, la kisate za thei nawn loin vasa ham nangawn in hong phawn zawh nawn loh hun," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 keen sangte ah pai ngam nawn loin, lam pai ding a haksat hun, na samte hong kangin, na khangno thahatna bei ta-in na tha a kiam hun ding ahi hi. Eite in a tawntung inn ding a zuan ding ihi a, khua sung lampi ah kahna awging kiza ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 I ngun meivak khaina a khau kitatin, i kham meivak kia-in kitam dinga, i tuikhaina khau kitatin, i tuikhaina beel kitam ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 I pumpi, lei suakkik dinga, i nuntakna a hong pia Pasianʼ kiangah i kha ciahkik ta ding hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Thugen Siampa in, “A kimanna a om lo, a mawknapi, na khempeuh a mawknapi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Thugen Siampa, mipil ahih banah, amah in ama theih teng mite tungah a hilh hi. Amah in paunakte limtakin sin a, a man ahihna thu hoihtakin en tel hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thugen Siampa in a zaknophuai kammal khawm a, ama gelh kammalte a man taktak ahi hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mipilteʼ thugente pen tuucingte in tuu hawlna-in a zat ciangkhut hiam tawh kibang hi. Tua thute pen eite khempeuh tuucin bangin a hong Cing Pasianʼ piak ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ka ta aw, na phawk ding thudang khat om lai hi. Lai gelhin a bu a bawlna in bei hun nei thei lo a, lai tam sin luatna in pumpi gimsak hi." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hih thute khempeuh banah gen ding thu khat bek om hi. Mihing hong kipiansakna a thu bulpi pen in: Pasian zahtakna le a thupiakte manna ahi hi. 
Ecclesiastes12:14 A pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh a simthamin ihih simte nangawn ihihna khempeuh ah Pasian in thu hong khen ding hi. 
SongOfSongs1:1 Solomonʼ la ngaih pente: 
SongOfSongs1:2 Na muk tawh nong tawp a, na hong itna leenggahzu sangin khum zaw hi." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Na omna khempeuh nam vuauvuau a, na min kizaza a, nungak khempeuh in nang hong ngai hi." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Hong kai inla zawltai ni. Ka kumpi hong hi inla, na inn ah hong ciahpih in. Nang tawh om leeng i lung dam hi; leenggahzu ne-in nuamsa ni. Nang kong ngaih khak tuahpha ing." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Jerusalem nungakte aw, ka vom hangin ngaihbaang ing. Savun puanbuk bangin ang hiuhiau ing a, Solomonʼ puankhaite tawh kei ka kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ka vom manin hong en neu kei un. Nisa ka thuakna hang ahi hi. Ka ute in kei hong gawtbawl uh a, lo hong kuan saksak uh a, ka pumpi ka don man kei hi." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ngaihno aw, hong gen dih in. Koi lai ah na tuu cing dinga, sunin koi lai ah khawl ding na hi hiam? Bang hangin tuucing dangte lakah nang hong zong kawikawi masa se ding ka hi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Nungak khempeuh lakah a ngaihbaang pen nungak aw, a mun thei lo na hi hiam? Tuuhonte zui-in na keelte hong khah inla, tuucingpaʼ puanbuk gei ah hong cing in." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ngaihno aw, Faroʼ sakoltal in sakolpite a delh bangin nang hong kidelh hi." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Na biang tuakah a kai suk na samphekte ngaihbaang a, suangmanpha bangin na liangko tungah kinga hi." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nangma adingin kham khainiang bawlin na kizepna ding zong ngun tawh bawl ni. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ka kumpipa a lupna tungah a om laitakin ka paknamtui hong kizel hi. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ka ang ah ka ngaihno hong lup laitakin myrrh paknamtui bangin namtui viauviau hi. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ka ngaihno pen Engedi gam leenggui lo ah a palh lihleh pak hoihte tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ngaihno aw, na mel hoih a, na mit zong ngaihbaang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ngaihno ngingei aw, na etlawm a, na ngaihhuai hi." 
SongOfSongs1:17 I lupna mun lopa tung hi dinga, taamtak kungte i innkhuam hi-in, taaksan hiangte i inn tungdap hi ding hi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Kei pen Sharon gam sunga a om gamlak pak, mualkuam sunga a om unok pak bang ka hi lel hi." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Tua bang hi lo a, ka ngaihno pen numei khempeuh lak panin ling lak a a om unok pak tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ka ngaihno tangval dang tawh teh lehang gamlak singkung lak a a om epel kung tawh kibang hi. Ama liim ah ka tu nuam a, a gahte lim ka sa hi." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Annekna phualah hong paipih inla, itna mai tawh hong en in." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Lungzuang, duangvul ka hih manin leenggahkeu tawh hong vak inla, epel gah tawh hong thadimsak in." 
SongOfSongs2:6 A veilam baan hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin kei hong kawi hi." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Jerusalem nungakte aw, koʼ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun sakhi le sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ka ngaihnoʼ awging ka za hi. Mual tung tawnin hong tai a, mualte kantanin kei hong zuan hi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ka ngaihno sanang tawh kibang a, sakhital no tawh zong a kibang hi. Ka inn pualam uh ah dinga, tawlet ah hong dak zialin kawmvang panin hong en giau hi." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ka ngaihno in ka kiangah thu hong gen a, “Hong pai in, ngaihno aw, hong zui in, itluat aw." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Phalbi veng ta a, guah zu nawn lo hi." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Gam sung tengah paakte palh a, la sak hun tung ta hi. Gam sung tengah vakhu hamte kiza ta hi." 
SongOfSongs2:13 Theite zong min ta a, leenggah pak gim namtui zong kiza ta hi. Hong pai in, ngaihno aw, hong zui in, itluat aw." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Suangheeng kawm a vasa bangin nang na bu niloh hi. A ngaihbaang na mai hong musak inla, a lungzuan huai na awging hong zasak in." 
SongOfSongs2:15 “I leengguite pak ta ahih manin ngia no hon in a suksiat ma-in tua ngia no honte man ni,” hong ci hi." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ka ngaihno keima aʼ hi; kei zong ama aʼ hiʼng. Amah in unok paakte lakah a tuu cing a," 
SongOfSongs2:17 nitak huih vot mateng nitak ni tum mateng a cing hi. Sanang bangin mual tunga sakhital no bangin itluat aw, hong paikik in." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Zan sialin ka lup kawmin, ka ngaihno ka lung ngaingai a, amah ka zon hangin ka mu zo kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Tho-in khua sung tengah ka vak a, kongzing kawm tengah ka pai kawikawi a, ka ngaihno ka zong a, ka zonzon hangin ka mu zo kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Khua sung cingin a pai kawikawite ka tuak a, “Ka ngaihno na mu uh hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
SongOfSongs3:4 Khua sung cingte tawh ka kikhen khit phetin ka ngaihno tawh ka kimu hi. Amah kawi-in ka lencip a, ka pianna ka nuʼ inn dei sung, ka nuʼ inn dong ka tunpih mateng ka khah kei hi." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Jerusalem nungakte aw, koʼ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun sakhi le sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Myrrh paknamtui le saledi paknamtui a kihel tawh a kibang, sumbuk a paknamtui om khempeuh a kihal khin a khu tawh a kibang, gamlak a hong khu to henhan bang ahi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 En un, Solomon kumpi luai-in hong kizawng! Israel gam sunga om galkap hoih pen galkap sawm guk in amah cing hi." 
SongOfSongs3:8 A vekpi-in namsau zat a siam vive hi a, galdo a siam vive hi khin uh hi. A vekpi-in namsau kuah kim uh a, miʼ hih khak ding a cing uh hi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Sing hoih pen tawh a kibawl luai-in Kumpi Solomon hong kizawng hi. 
SongOfSongs3:10 A luai khuamte, ngun tawh kizut a, a tungah kham tawh a kizem puan a kilam hi. A tut nadingin puansan kibawl a, a sungah savun kidap hi." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Jerusalem nungakte aw, hong pai unla, Kumpi Solomon en dih ve un. A zi neih ni, a lungdam ni-a, a nu in amah a khuksak Kumpi lukhu hong khu hi." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Itluat aw, na ngaihbaang a, na lu khuhna puan vang panin a ngaihbaang na mit hong tee kelkel hi. Gilead mual tunga keel hon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Na ha pak singsengte zong a mul a kimet khin phet, a kisawp siang tuute tawh kibang hi. Na ha khat zong tok lo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Na mukte puansan tawh kibang a, na kampau ngaihnop-huai hi. Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Na ngawng pen galhangteʼ zat lum tangzang tul khat a kikhai zeizaina Davidʼ tausang tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs4:5 Na nawite unok pak lakah a ta khawm helhel sanang nih tawh ahi a, a ta khawm hialhial sakhi peeng tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Zingsang huih vot a nun mateng, zingsang khuavak hong tun mateng, myrrh paknamtui a omna mual tungah omsuakin, saledi paknamtui lakah ka bual ding hi." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ngaihno aw, na ngaihbaang mahmah a, kawkbaanna ding na nei kei hi." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ka lawm ngaih aw, Lebanon Mual ah hong pai inla, Lebanon Mual panin kei hong zui in. Humpi-nelkaite le kamkeite a teenna, Amana Mual dawn panin hong tai suk inla, Senir Mual le Hermon Mual panin hong pai suk in." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, na mit hah in ka lung hong kuai a, na khi awh in ka lungsim hong zo hi." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, nang tawh kingaih nuam mahmah hi. Na itna leenggahzu sangin khum zaw a, na paknamtui paknamtui dang khempeuh sangin namtui zaw hi." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Lawm aw, na muk, khuaizu bangin khum a, na leii, bawngnawi le khuaizu bang hi. Na puante Lebanon Mual tunga paknamtui namkim a nam hi." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Ka lawmnu, ka naunu, a ki-umcip huan hi a, a kinei tuam tuinak ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Tua huan sungah singkungte hoihtakin khang a, mang kawlsing cinna huan tawh kibang hi. Singgah limci pente tua lai ah gah a, henna leh nard sing namtuite tua lai ah a po hi." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Nard sing le saffron sing, thalsing le sinnamon kung, a namtui a gah namkim kung po a, myrrh le aloes, a namtui namkim om hi." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Lebanon Mual tung panin tui hong luang suk a, ciktui luangte, luitui luangte, tua huan sungah a tung suk hi." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Saklam huih aw, hong nung suk inla, khanglam huih aw, hong nung to in. Ka huan sungteng hong namtuisak un. Ka ngaihno, ka huanah hong paisak unla, a gah limci pente hong nesak un." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Itluat ka lawmnu aw, ka huan sung hong tung zo ing. Ka paknamtuite ka kaikhawm hi. Ka khuaizu le ka khuailuzu ka ne a, ka leenggahzu le ka bawngnawite ka dawn hi. Nungak le tangval aw, na lungkim piikpeek dongun ne-in dawnin nuamsa un." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ka lup hangin ka lungsim ihmu lo a, ka ngaihno in ka kong hong kiuh ka za hi. Itluat ngaihno ka lungtup aw, kei hong tumsak in. Ka lu tungah daingo kia a, meii zun in ka sam kawtsak hi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ka puante suah khinzo ing. Ka puante silhkik ding ka hi hiam? Ka khete sil khinzo ing; ninsakkik ding ka hi hiam? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ka ngaihno in kongkhak hong len khin napi hong taisankik hi. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ka ngaihno tumsak dingin ka kithawi a, ka khutte myrrh paknamtui tawh ka zut a, ka khutmete myrrh paknamtui ka nuh a, kong a hong dingin a honna ka len hi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ka ngaihno a lutsak dingin kong ka hon a, amah na tai khia khinta hi. Amah a taikhiat manin ka dah lua a, amah ka zon hangin ka mu kei a, amah ka sap hangin hong dawng lo hi." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Khua sung a cing mite tawh ka kituak a, kei hong satin hong liamsak uh a, kulhzang a a kileh den khuacingte in ka puan tungsilh hawk khia uh hi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Kong thum hi, Jerusalem nungakte aw, ka ngaihno na muh uh leh lungzuangin ka sih dekna na gensak un." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nungak lak a a hoih pen aw, na ngaihno a bangci hiam, hong gen dih in. Tua bangin kong gen liang ding uh bangzah takin lamdang ahi hiam?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ka ngaihno a melhoih a, a thahat hi. Mi tul sawm lakah tehpih ding dang om lo hi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 A sam sau-in kil thiuhtheuh a, a sam hoihin vom dikdek a, kham sangin zong deihhuai zaw hi." 
SongOfSongs5:12 A mittangte ahihleh tuisiang phuan lakah a kisilsiang kiuhkeuh, luitui luang gei-a a om vahuite tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs5:13 A biangte pen paknamtui a dimin a kithun thawl san kiuhkeuh tawh a kibang hi. A mukte pen myrrh paknamtui tawh a kidim unok pak tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs5:14 A khutte etlawmin hi linlian a, suangmanpha a kiphut zungbuhte a bulh hi. A pumpi pen suangmanpha a kiphut dimdiam saiha pak tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs5:15 A khete pen kham citak a kiphuh dimdiamna suangngo khuamte tawh kibang a, ama duang pen Lebanon mual sang, taamtak kung hoih bangin thupi suak mahmah hi." 
SongOfSongs5:16 A kampaute khum zungzung a, a vekin, deih loh ding khat zong om lo hi. Ka ngaihno, hih bang teng hi, Jerusalem nungakte aw." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Nungak lak a hoih pen nu aw, na ngaihno, koi ah pai hiam? Na ngaihno koi lam pai hiam? Amah hong zon pih nung." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ka ngaihno, paknamtui kung a pona, a huan sungah pai hi. A huan sungah a tuu cing a, unok paakte a lo hi." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ka ngaihno kei aʼ hi a, kei zong ama aʼ hiʼng. Amah in unok pak lakah a tuute gamtasak hi." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ngaihno aw, Jerusalem khuapi bangin na etlawm mahmah a, Tirzah khuapi bangin na hoih mahmah a, vantung aksi bangin na deihhuai hi." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Keima lam hong nga kei in. Na mai in hong leng lua hi. Gilead mual tunga keel hon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi. 
SongOfSongs6:6 Na hate zong, a kisil khin phet tuu hon bangin pak singseng hi. A tok khat zong om lo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kumpi-zi sawm guk, kumpi zineu sawm giat, sim zawh lohin nungak tampi om kha dinga," 
SongOfSongs6:9 ahi zongin khat bek ka ngai a, amah pen vahui bangin it-huai hi. Amah pen a nuʼ tanu neihsun hi a, a nuʼ ta it pen khat ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Zing khuavak tawh a kibang hih nungak kua ahi hiam? Amah melhoih mahmah a, nitaang, khataang, a bang hi." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Kuam sunga om singkungnote a en ding, leengguite a pak nai hiam a en ding, mang kawlsing a pak nai hiam a en dingin singno huanah ka pai suk hi." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Galdo dingin a kipan sakol hawl pa a liin bangin nang kong ngaihna hangin ka liingliing hi. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in, Shulam numei aw. Nang kong muh theih nadingun hong ciahkik in, hong ciahkik in. Shulam nungak, khanglui lai-a a lamte bangin bang hangin hong mu nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kumpi mel a pua a ngaihbaang nungak aw, na khete le na khedap kilawm mahmah! Na phei le na tanzumte sing suih siamteʼ suih bang hiuhiau!" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Na kalkawm pen leenggahzu lim tawh a kilawi lo hai bangin uk kiukeu hi. Na kawng pen unok pak tawh a ki-um buhlom hen tawh kibang hi. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Na nawite pen a ta khawm helhel sakhi peeng, a om khawm hialhial sanang nih tawh kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Na ngawng, saiha tausang tawh kibang hi. Na mitte pen Heshbon khuapi kulh gei-a om tuilite tawh kibang hi. Na nak pen Damaskas khuapi lam a nga Lebanon tausang bangin hoih hiuhiau hi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Na lutang pen Karmel Mual bangin kitawi to a, na samphekte san hiuhiau a, a etlawmna in kumpipaʼ mit la vangvang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Itluat aw na ngaihbaang a, na mel kong muh nuam zungzung hi." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Tuum kung bangin na etlawm a, na nawite pen, nisuh gah a bawk pha mahmah tawh a kibang hi." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Tuum kung tungah kah to-in a gah ka lo ding hi. Na nawite kei adingin leenggah bawk tawh kibang a, na gimnam epel min bangin namtui hi." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Na kam, leenggahzu bangin khum zungzung hi. Ka ngaihno tungah leenggahzu khum luang henla, a muk a ha tawk kim hen." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ka ngaihno aʼ ka hi a, amah in kei hong deih hi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ngaihno aw, gamlak ah pai khia-in leenggui lo ah va giak ni." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Zingsangin tho baihin leengguite a sel nai hiam, leengguite a pak nai hiam, mang kawlsing kungte a pak nai hiam, i en ding hi. Tua lai munah kong itna letsong kong pia ding hi." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Tua lai ah zawl-ai kung a namtui gim na za dinga, singgah lim namcin i kong gei ah a om hi. Ngaihno aw, a gah a lui le a thak nang adingin na duhduh kong koihsak hi." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ka nuʼ sung pan a piang ka sanggampa hi lecin kei ka ut hi. Tua hileh, lamkal ah hong tuak taleng zong kong tawptawp dinga, kuamah in phamawh sa lo ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Keima pianna ka nuʼ inn dei sungah nang kong paipih dinga, tua lai ah nong kawi ding hi. Tua lai ah leenggahzu lim, mang kawlsing tui, kong tulh ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:3 A veilam khut hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin hong kawi hi." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Jerusalem nungakte aw, koʼ kingaihna nong suknawi loh nadingun kei tungah hong kiciam un." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Gamlak panin a lawmpa tawh khut kilen sa-in a hong paikhia kua ahi hiam? Nangmah na pianna mun, na nu in hong neihna mun, epel kung nuai panin nang kong phong hi." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Kei sim loh kuamah ngai kei inla, kei sim loh kuamah kawi kei in. Itna zong sihna zahin thahat a, ngaihna zong sihna zahin khauh hi. Itna, mei bangin kuang khia a, meikuang lian pen a suak hi." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Tui tampi nangawn tawh kisumit zo lo a, tui sungah i phumcip hangin mit zo tuan lo hi. Mi khat in a neihsa sum khempeuh tawh itna a lei dingin hong kithawi leh kinuihsan lel ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Sanggam numeino khat ka nei uh a, a nawite neu mahmah hi. Tangval khat in hong hel zenzen leh ka sanggamnu uh bangci huh ding ka hi uh hiam?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Amah khua umna kulh hileh, ngun kibawl tausang tawh ka hu ding uh a, amah kulh kongpi hileh, taamtak singpekte tawh ka dal ding uh hi." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Kei, khuakulh ka hi a, ka nawite, a tausang ahi hi. Limtakin kei hong kihutna ka ngaihno in thei ding hi." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Baal-hamon a kici munah Solomon in leenggui lo khat a nei hi. Amah in tua lo a kho dingin losapte sawl a, a lo-a piangteʼ man dingin losapte khat in ngun dangka tul khat ciat a piak ding uh ahi hi." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Keimah in keima aituam leenggui lo khat ka nei hi. Solomon aw, na ngun dangka tul khat la inla, lokhoteʼ tungah amauʼ tanh ding za nih pia in." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Huan sunga om ka ngaihno aw, ka lawmte in hong ngai dide ahih manin nangma aw zong, hong gingsak dih in." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Ka ngaihno aw, sanang bangin, paknamtui kung a pona mun mual tunga om sakhital no bangin kei kiangah hong pai in." 
Isaiah1:1 Judah gam kumpi ahi Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz le Hezekiah-teʼ hun lai-in Amozʼ tapa Isaiah in Judah gam le Jerusalem khua tawh kisai a maangmuhnate:" 
Isaiah1:2 Vantungte aw, na za un; leitung aw, na ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu hong gen khinzo a, “Ka pattah sa ka tate in kei hong lehdo uh hi." 
Isaiah1:3 Bawng in amah a nei pa thei a, la in zong a topaʼ an piakna mun thei buang hi. Ahih hangin Israel in bangmah thei lo a, keima mite in theithei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:4 Ah, a khial minam, mawhna in a nencip mite, siatna a bawlteʼ suanlekhakte, a gamtat sia tapate! Amaute in Topa nusia khin uh a, amaute in Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pasian simmawh khin uh hi. Amaute in lam khial khin taktak uh hi." 
Isaiah1:5 Bang hangin note hong kisat theih nadingin lehdo teitei na hi uh hiam? Israel aw, na lutang khempeuh liamma dim a, na lungsim le na ngaihsutna gim mahmah hi." 
Isaiah1:6 Khenuai a kipan luzang dong nangawnin a cidamna mun om lo a, sanim gawpnate, meimapite, le siluang liammate a om hi. Tuate pen a nai kisal lo, kitun lo, sathau tawh zong kinomsak lo hi." 
Isaiah1:7 Na gam uh khing a, na khuapite uh mei tawh kihal hi. Na muh tangpi mahun gamdang mite in na gam uh hong laksakin na khempeuh susia gawp hi." 
Isaiah1:8 Jerusalem khuapi bek om lai a, leenggui lo-a buk, tangmai lo sunga om hampheng bangin kuama don lohin kinusia a, a ki-umcip khuapi bangin kinusia hi." 
Isaiah1:9 Vanglian Topa in eite tawmno khat a nungta-in hong siit hikeileh, eite pen Sodom khua bang khinin Gomorrah khua i bang khinta ding hi." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom a uk mangte aw, Topa ’ thu na za un! No Gomorrah mite aw, i Pasianʼ hihna na ngai un!" 
Isaiah1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Noteʼ biakpiakna a tampite pen keiʼ tungah bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Tuutalte le ganhing thauteʼ sathau tawh meihal biaknate ka kham ta hi. Bawngtalte, tuunote le keelteʼ si tawh kei ka lungkim kei hi." 
Isaiah1:12 Keiʼ mai ah a kilaak dingin na hong pai uh ciangin hih bangin ka huang sung na tuatcil gawpna uh kuaʼn hong deih ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah1:13 Bangmahin a kimang lo piaknate hong paipih nawn kei un. Paknamtui halna ka kih hi. Khadet ni, Sabbath ni le thupi takin na kikhopnate uh mawhna tawh kidim ahih manin keʼn ka thuak zo kei hi." 
Isaiah1:14 Noteʼ Khadet nite le na pawite uh ka mudah hi. Tuate pen kei adingin van gikpi khat suak khin a, tuate khempeuh ka puakna-in ka gim hi." 
Isaiah1:15 “Thungenin na khutte uh nong zaak uh ciangin note kong en kei dinga, thu tampi na nget uh hangin keʼn ka ngai tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh sisan tawh noteʼ khut kidim hi." 
Isaiah1:16 Note kisil tawm unla, a siangtho-in kibawl un. Keima muhna ah na gamtat siatnate uh pai khia-in, siatna na bawlte uh khawl un." 
Isaiah1:17 Gamtat hoih ding kisin un. Thumanin gamta unla, kinetniamna kheel un. Pa nei lote hu unla, meigong numei panpih un,” ci hi." 
Isaiah1:18 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu-in hong pai unla, thu kikum khawm ni. Na mawhnate uh puansan a bat hangin vuk bangin hong ngo ding hi. Na mawhnate uh si bangin a san hangin tuumul bangin hong kang ding hi." 
Isaiah1:19 Note in utna lungsim nei-in thu na man nak uh leh lei pan a piang a gah hoihte na ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah1:20 Ahih hangin note in kei hong nialin na hong lehdo uh leh namsau in note hong vatmai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:21 A thutak, thutang tawh a kidim ngeisa khuapi, bangci-a a paktat numei tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Ama sungah thumanna omngei napi-in tu-in mi thatte bek a om ta hi." 
Isaiah1:22 Jerusalem khuapi aw, ngun tang na bang ngei a, tu-in ahihleh ngun-ek na suakta hi. Leenggahzu limci na bang ngei a, tu-in ahihleh tui mawkmawk na bang ta hi." 
Isaiah1:23 Na uliante, mi lehdote hi a, gutate tawh a kikhawlte ahi hi. Mi khempeuh in sumgolh le letsong a deih uh hi. Amaute in pa nei lote panpih lo uh a, meigongnuʼ thu amaute in sang lo uh hi." 
Isaiah1:24 Tua ahih ciangin, Topa, Vanglian Topa, Israel-teʼ Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Ah, ka lang ahi noteʼ tungah ka hehna kong khah khia dinga, ka gal ahi note tungah keimah in kong thuk ding hi." 
Isaiah1:25 Note tungah na kong sem dinga, meikhuk ah haltui bangin na saam-ek teng uh tui khiasakin, na kihel pih na nin khempeuh uh ka la khia ding hi." 
Isaiah1:26 A masa-a bangin na thukhente, a kipat cil a bangin na upate ka koihkik ding hi. Tua khit ciangin nang pen thuman khuapi, thutak khuapi, hong kici ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah1:27 Topa thutang ahih manin Jerusalem khuapi hon khia dinga, a sungah a teeng a kisik mi khempeuh zong a hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah1:28 Ahih hangin a lehdo mite le a khial mite kisusia khawmin Topa a nusiate pen kibeisak mang ding hi. 
Isaiah1:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh tawsaw kungte na biakna hangun note na maizum ding uh a, biakna huan na bawlna hangun zahhuai-in na mai uh san ding hi." 
Isaiah1:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen a teh a vul tawsaw kung le tui a ngah lo huan tawh na kibang ding uh hi. 
Isaiah1:31 A thahat mipa pen patlom tawh kibang dinga, ama nasepna pen mei-ek suak ding hi. Kuamah in phelh zo loin amau tegel kaang tum khawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:1 Judah gam le Jerusalem tawh kisai thu Amozʼ tapa Isaiahʼ muhna hih bang ahi hi: 
Isaiah2:2 Nidang ciangin Topa ’ inn a omna mual pen mual liante lakah a sang penin kikipsak dinga, mual neute tungah kisangsak ding hi. Tua lai ah minam khempeuh pai muamua ding uh a," 
Isaiah2:3 mi tampite hong pai-in, “Hong pai un, amah in ama zialetongte hong hilh theih nading le ama lampite i zuih theih nadingin Jakobʼ Pasianʼ inn, Topa ’ mualah pai to ni,” a ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion panin thu hong gen dinga, Jerusalem khua panin Topa ’ thuhilhna hong paikhia ding hi." 
Isaiah2:4 Amah in minamte khatlekhat kikalah thu khenin, mi tampiteʼ thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in a seek ding uh hi. Minam khat le minam khat kido nawn lo ding uh a, galdo dingin kithawi nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:5 Jakobʼ suanlekhakte aw, hong pai un; Topa ’ khuavak sungah gamta ni." 
Isaiah2:6 Amaute pen nisuahna lam gam a om khongkhaite le Filistia mite bangin aisante tawh kidim uh a, gamdang miteʼ ngeina zui uh ahih manin Jakob suanlekhak, na mite nang na nial hi." 
Isaiah2:7 Amauʼ gamah ngun le kham kidim a, amauʼ sumte in bei hun cih nei lo hi. Amauʼ gam pen sakolte tawh kidim a, amauʼ leengte in bei hun cih nei lo hi." 
Isaiah2:8 Amauʼ gam sung milimte tawh kidim a, amauʼ khut tawh a bawl sate uh amaute in a bia uh hi." 
Isaiah2:9 Tua ahih ciangin mite kiniamkhiat sukin, mite a niamin kikoih suk hi. Amauteʼ mawhna maisak kei in." 
Isaiah2:10 Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sungah lut unla, leihawm sungah bu un." 
Isaiah2:11 Miteʼ kiliatsakna pen kiniamkoih dinga, mihingteʼ kiphatsakna pen kiniamkhiat ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah2:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in a kiphasak le a kiliansak khempeuh, a kisangsak le a sangte khempeuh;" 
Isaiah2:13 a sang, a kilaam to, Lebanon mual taamtak kung khempeuh, Bashan mual tawsaw kung khempeuh;" 
Isaiah2:14 a lian mual sang khempeuh le a sang mual neu khempeuh; 
Isaiah2:15 tausang khempeuh le a muanhuai kulhte khempeuh; 
Isaiah2:16 Tarshish teembaw khempeuh le teembaw hoih khempeuh a niamkoih hun ding ni khat a nei hi. 
Isaiah2:17 Miteʼ kiliatsakna kiniamkhiat dinga, miteʼ kiphatsakna a niamin kikoih suk ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Topa bek a lianin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah2:18 Milimte khempeuh mangthang khin ding hi. 
Isaiah2:19 Leitung a liingsak gawp dingin Topa a kipat ciangin amah kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna panin suanghawm sung le leihawm sungah mite bu ding uh hi. 
Isaiah2:20 Amah pen leitung a liingsak gawp dingin a hong kipat hun ciangin Topa kihtakna le a lian ama minthanna vang panin suanghawmpite sung le keenhawmte sungah a buk theih nadingun amauʼ bawl tawm ngun le kham milimte, buite le bakte a paih ding uh hi." 
Isaiah2:21  
Isaiah2:22 Mihingte muanin nei nawn kei un. Amaute leltak banga simtham ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah3:1 Topa, Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem khua le Judah gam panin nuntakna le luhinna, nuntakna an khempeuh le nuntakna tui khempeuh;" 
Isaiah3:2 mi vanglian pa le galkap pa, thukhen pa le kamsang pa, aisan pa le upa pa," 
Isaiah3:3 mi sawm nga a ukpa le za lian a nei pa, thulamlak pa le mitphial siampa, le bum siamte a la khia hi." 
Isaiah3:4 Amauteʼ ulian dingin naupangte ka bawl dinga, naungekte in amaute uk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:5 Mite khatlekhat, mi khempeuh in a lawmte ciat, mi khempeuh in a veengte ciat, hih gawp ding uh hi. Khangnote pen uhamte tungah, migina lote pen mi liante tungah kiphasak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:6 Mi khat in ama pa inn sungah a sanggampa lenin, “Nang in puan na nei hi; nang, koteʼ makai pa nong hi dinga, hih a sia lomtangte pen nangma khut sung hi ding hi,” a cih ciangin amah in," 
Isaiah3:7 “Bangmah hih zo kei ning. Ka inn sungah an le puan om lo hi. Mite a makai-in nong bawl kei ding hi,” ci-in a gen khia ding hi." 
Isaiah3:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute khempeuh le amauʼ gamtatnate in Topa langpangin amah dem uh ahih manin Jerusalem khua kipukin Judah gam kia hi. 
Isaiah3:9 Amauʼ maipuak in amauʼ langah teci pang hi. Sodom bangin amaute a langtangin gamta uh a, amaute in im lo uh hi. Amaute in gimna ngah tahen! Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amauʼ tung mahah siatna kitun uh hi." 
Isaiah3:10 Amaute tungah thu hoih ding hi, ci-in thuman mite kiangah hih thu gen un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amauʼ gamtat hoih thaman ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:11 Migilo in gimna ngah tahen! Midang tungah a gitloh gamtatna tawh kizui-in ama tungah kithukkik ding ahih manin ama tungah thu sia ding hi. 
Isaiah3:12 Keima mite ahihleh naupangte in bawlsia uh a, numeite in zong uk uh hi. Ka mite aw, na makaite un note lam hong lakkhial a, noteʼ lampi zuih pen hong siasak hi." 
Isaiah3:13 Topa in thupang dingin ama panmun hong la a, ama miteʼ thu a khen dingin a ding hi." 
Isaiah3:14 Topa pen upate le ama miteʼ uliante tawh thukhen dingin kipan a, “Leenggui lo a netumte, note na hi uh a, mizawngteʼ na a kisutte noteʼ inn sungah om hi." 
Isaiah3:15 Ka mite sucipin mizawngte na gawina uh bang na cihnopna uh a hiam?” Vanglian Topa Pasian in ci hi. 
Isaiah3:16 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem numeite kiphasakin ngawng dok sa-in lam pai uh a, kiphatsakna tawh a mit uh hei pampamin hi tuihtuihin lam pai uh a, a khe uh gingsak sualsual ahih ciangun" 
Isaiah3:17 Topa in Jerusalem numeiteʼ lutang meima sakin Topa in amauʼ lutang kolhsak ding hi. 
Isaiah3:18 Tua ciangin Topa in khebuh hoihte, lutuam le khade lim tawh a kibang kizepnate;" 
Isaiah3:19 bilbah tualte, taaute le mai sitnate;" 
Isaiah3:20 lukhute, banbulhte, kawngtente, paknamtui bungte le a kivom aite;" 
Isaiah3:21 min gelhna zungbuhte le nakbuhte; 
Isaiah3:22 pawi puante, puan zaneute, puan pite le khutkhai ipte;" 
Isaiah3:23 puan zaneu vang siseihte, saihadial puan sungsilhte, dialkhipte le kikhuhna puante la khia ding hi." 
Isaiah3:24 Paknamtui tangin uihna, kawnggak tangin khauhual pi, limtak a kizem sam tangin lu kolhna, puan hoih tangin puanhampi, melhoihna tangin maizumna hun hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah3:25 Na mite, namsau tawh si ding uh a, a vanglian na mite, gal sungah kisia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah3:26 Khuapi kongpi tau-in thum ding hi. Khuapi, gamkhing suak dinga, a guaktang a om nupi leilak ah a tucip tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah4:1 Tua ni ciangin nupi sagih in papi khat neikhawm ding uh a, “Kote in komauʼ an ciat ne-in, komauʼ puan ciat mah ka silh ding uh hi. Kote pen, nangma zi cih min bek hong puasak in; ka min siatna teng uh hong hum in,” ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah4:2 Tua ni ciangin Topa ’ bul sel pen melhoihin minthang dinga, leitung panin a piang gahte pen, a suakta lai Israel miteʼ kiphatsakna le minthanna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah4:3 Topa in thukhenna le meihalna tawh Zion miteʼ mawhna teng siangsakin, Jerusalem khua sung panin mi thahna teng a beisak ciangin Zion ah a om lai mi, Jerusalem ah khang tawntungin a om dingin a kiciamteh sa mite khempeuh, a siangtho kici ding hi." 
Isaiah4:4  
Isaiah4:5 Tua ciangin Zion Mual tung, tua lai-a kikhawm mi khempeuh tungah, sunin meii sungah, zanin meikuang khu tawh Topa hong kilang dinga, Topa ’ minthanna vang in khuapi hu ding hi." 
Isaiah4:6 Tua minthanna vang pen sun ciangin nisa a liah ding le huihpi guahpi panin bukna le belhna zong hi ding hi. 
Isaiah5:1 Ka lawm it paʼ tangin a leenggui lo a itna la keʼn hong sa ning: Ka lawm it pa in leitang a hoih mahmahna mual tung khat ah leenggui lo khat a nei hi. 
Isaiah5:2 Amah in lei to-in a suangte paikhia a, leenggui hoihte a suan hi. A laizang ah tausang khat lam a, tua lo sungah leenggah sukna khuk khat a to hi. Amah in leenggah hoih a hong gah ding lamen a, ahih hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk hi." 
Isaiah5:3 Tu-in, Jerusalem khua ah a teengte le Judah mite aw, kei le ka leenggui lo kikalah thu nong khen nading uh kong thum hi." 
Isaiah5:4 Ka leenggui lo adingin ka hih nai loh ka hih ding a kilawm bang om lai ahi hiam? Leenggah hoih gah ding ka lamet laitakin bang hangin gam leenggah hong gah mawk ahi hiam? 
Isaiah5:5 Tu-in, ka leenggui lo tungah ka hih ding thu note tungah kong gen ding hi. A daai ka la khia dinga, kine mang ding hi. A gawl ka susia dinga, kituancil ding hi." 
Isaiah5:6 Lokhulin ka bawl ding hi. Kipuah loin, kikho lo dinga, tua lo sungah lingkung le lingte a khang ding hi. Ama tungah meiite in zong guah a zuksak loh nadingin thu ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah5:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa ’ leenggui lo pen Israel mite hi a, Judah mite pen lungdamna tawh a suan kungte ahi hi. Amah in thutang lamen a, ahih hangin sisan luanna om hi. Thumanna lamen a, ahih hangin kahna om hi." 
Isaiah5:8 Leitang tungah amau guak a teeng ding dong zahin midangte adingin mun khempeuh a bei matengin inn khatlekhat, lo khatlekhat gawmin a la thuah tawntung mite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah5:9 Vanglian Topa in ka zakna ah hih bangin kiciam a, “A mantakin inn tampi tak hawmsuak dinga, a lian a hoih innte ah a teeng om lo ding hi." 
Isaiah5:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lo eka sawm in phelpi khat dim bek gah dinga, khaici beem khat in an seu khat bek piangsak ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah5:11 Zingsang tungin tho-in, khamtheih zu delhin, leenggahzu in amaute a satsak pialpual matengin nitakin a tut kho mite in gimna ngah tahen!" 
Isaiah5:12 Amaute in a pawi sung uh ah laiza lasakna le harp lasakna, khuang, tamngai le leenggahzu, tampi a nei uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in Topa ’ sepnate don lo uh a, a khut tawh a bawlte zong mu lo uh hi." 
Isaiah5:13 Tua hi a, thu theih lohna hangin ka mite sal suak uh hi. A mi liante uh gil kialin sidek uh a, a mihonte uh dangtakin keu uh hi." 
Isaiah5:14 Tua ahih ciangin Leinuai in a duhna khangsakin bangmah tawh a kiteh thei lo zahin a kam ka beba a, Jerusalemʼ hoihna teng, a mipite, a mihonte, ama sunga a lungdam mite, a nawmvalh hi." 
Isaiah5:15 Mi khempeuh a niamin kikoih suk hi. A kiphasak mite kiniamkhiat suk hi. 
Isaiah5:16 Ahih hangin thutang sepna tawh Vanglian Topa in a liatna hong kilangsak a, a Siangtho Pasian in a mite a thukhenna tawh ama sianthona hong kilangsak hi." 
Isaiah5:17 Tua ciangin tuunote in amauʼ tatna gamlak mun bangin tua khua sungah lopa ne ding uh a, a thau ganhingte le keelnote a sia sa khuapi sungah gamta ding uh hi." 
Isaiah5:18 Amaute in, “I muh theih nadingin amah manlang sakin, ama nasep khawlsak ni. Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ deihna i theihtheih nadingin naisakin tungsak ni!” ci-in ganhing kaih bangin khauzen tawh mawhna kai-in, khauhual pi tawh khialhna kai uh ahih manin gimna ngah ta uh hen." 
Isaiah5:19  
Isaiah5:20 A phate sia ci-in, a siate pha ci a, khuavak dingin khuamial koihin, khuamial dingin khuavak koih a, a khum dingin a kha koihin, a kha dingin a khum a koihte in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah5:21 Amauʼ mitah pil kisa a, amauʼ muhna ah siam a kisate in gimna ngah tahen!" 
Isaiah5:22 Leenggahzu tampi a dawnte, khamtheih zunek a hatte," 
Isaiah5:23 mimawhte sumgolh tawh khah a, midikte a mawhsakte in gimna ngah tahen!" 
Isaiah5:24 Tua ahih ciangin mei in buhkung keute kaang tum a, meikuang sungah lopa keute a kattum bangin amauteʼ zung pen muat gawp dinga, amauteʼ pakpalhte leivui bangin vanah leeng to ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Vanglian Topa ’ thu nialin Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ thu a simmawh uh hi." 
Isaiah5:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa ’ hehna ama mite tungah hong khangin, a khut zanin amaute vat gawp a, mualte a kiliing hi. Amauteʼ luanghawmte kongzing lampite ah nin bangin a om hi. Hih bang teng hangin zong a hehna dam zo nai loin ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah5:26 Amah in a gamlapi-a om minam khat a sapna-in lim khat lak a, leimong panin hong pai nadingin a sam hi. Manlang takin tua mite hong pai pah hi." 
Isaiah5:27 Tua a hong pai mite kuamah gim lo uh a, kuamah tuk lo uh hi. Kuamah lusu lo a, kuamah ihmu lo uh hi. Dialkaih khat zong kol lo a, khedap khau khat zong kitat lo hi." 
Isaiah5:28 Amauʼ thaltangte hiam a, a thal khempeuh uh a kikeek sa ahi hi. Amauʼ sakolteʼ khecinte meisuang bangin sak a, a leengpeite uh pingpei bangin manlang hi." 
Isaiah5:29 Amauteʼ kikona pen humpinelkai hawk bang a, humpinelkai khanglaite bangin amaute a hawk uh hi. Amaute humhamin a sa nek ding uh man uh a, amaute in pua khia-in kuamah in hon khia zo lo hi." 
Isaiah5:30 Tua ni ciangin amaute in tuipi ging bangin Israel ngik ding uh hi. Mi khatpeuh in hih gam sung en leh khuamial le lungzinna bek om a, meiite in khua a mialsak hi." 
Isaiah6:1 Kumpi Uzziah a sih kumin, a sang mahmah, a lian kumpi tokhom tungah Topa a tu ka mu hi. Ama kumpi puanpi pen biakinn sungteng a dim hi." 
Isaiah6:2 Ama kiimah serafim van mite a ding uh hi. Tuate in kha guk ciat nei uh hi; nih tawh a mai liahin, nih tawh a khe tuamin, nih tawh a leeng uh hi." 
Isaiah6:3 Amaute khatlekhat kisamin: “Vanglian Topa, siangtho, siangtho, siangtho; leitung khempeuh ama minthanna tawh kidim,” ci-in awng uh hi." 
Isaiah6:4 Tua kikona aw in biakinn kongkhak khuam bulpite kiliingsak a, inn sungteng meikhu tawh a kidim hi." 
Isaiah6:5 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Gim ngah pa hi ta ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawknapi ka hi hi; ka kam a ka thugen khempeuh a mawkna vive hi a, a thugen khempeuh uh mawhna le nitna ahi mite lakah ka teeng kha hi. Vanglian Topa, Kumpipa ka mu kha khinta hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah6:6 Tua ciangin serafim van mite khat, biakna tau panin taiteh tawh a teh mei-am khat a khut ah tawi-in keima kiangah hong leeng hi." 
Isaiah6:7 Amah in ka muk hong bi a, “En in, hih in na muk su kha zo hi; na mawhna bei ta a, na khialhna kimaisak zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:8 Tua ciangin, “Kua sawl dinga, eite adingin kua va pai ding ahi hiam?” Topaʼ cihna aw ka za hi. Tua ciangin keʼn, “Hih lai ah kei om ing! Kei hong sawl in,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah6:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “Pai inla, hih mite tungah, ‘Zaza napi tel lo; mumu napi thei lo,’ va ci in." 
Isaiah6:10 Amaute in a mit uh tawh a muh loh nading, a bil uh tawh a zak loh nading, a lungsim uh tawh thu a theih tel loh nading, amaute kihei-in damna a ngah loh nadingun hih miteʼ lungsim mawlsak inla, amauʼ bil uh ngongsak inla, a mit uh va sisak in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah6:11 Tua ciangin keimah in, “ Topa aw, bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam?” ka ci hi. Amah in, “Khuapi ah a teeng kuamah om loin hawm suakin, innte ah kuamah om loin, leitang pen gamkhing suak kiuhkeuhin," 
Isaiah6:12 Topa in gamlapi ah mite khiin khia-in, leitungah a kinusia mun tampi a om dong, hi ding hi." 
Isaiah6:13 Mi sawm-ah-khat bang a om lai tei hangin, taak kung le tawsaw kungte a kiphuk khit ciangin a bulsum a omlaite mei tawh a kihalkik bangin amaute zong kisusia ding hi,” hong ci hi. (A bulsum pen Pasianʼ mite a kipat thakna ding lahna lim ahi hi.)" 
Isaiah7:1 Uzziahʼ tapa Jotham, Jothamʼ tapa Ahaz ahi Judah kumpipaʼ hun laitakin, Syria kumpipa Rezin le Remaliahʼ tapa Pekah ahi Israel kumpipa, Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin kuan to uh a, ahih hangin amaute in zo zo lo uh hi." 
Isaiah7:2 “Syria-te pen Efraim mite tawh kikop,” ci-in Davidʼ innkuante tungah a kigen ciangin, huih in gamlak a singte a mut bangin amah le a mihingteʼ lungsim kiliing hi." 
Isaiah7:3 Topa in Isaiah tungah, “Ahaz tawh kimu dingin Puansawp paʼ nasepna phual zuatna lampi kiangah a om, bual tungnung tuilakna mongah nang le na tapa Shear-jashub pai-in" 
Isaiah7:4 ama tungah, ‘Kidawm inla, om khinkhian in. Lau kei in. Syria kumpipa Rezin le Remaliahʼ tapaʼ hehna pen, sing tum bang nih a khute tawh kibang lel ahih manin na lung gimsak kei in." 
Isaiah7:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Syria kumpi a kipan Remaliahʼ tapa le Efraim mite in nang hong sawm uh a," 
Isaiah7:6 “Judah gam a sim dingin pai-in va su gawp ni; eima adingin va zo ni; tua gamah kumpi dingin Tabeelʼ tapa va koih ni,” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah7:7 Ahi zongin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Tua thu pen kip lo dinga, hong tung lo ding hi." 
Isaiah7:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Syriaʼ lutang, Damaskas khuapi hi a, Damaskasʼ lutang, Rezin ahi hi. (Kum sawm guk le kum nga sungin minam ahi zo nawn lo zah dongin Efraim kitamzan gawp ding hi.)" 
Isaiah7:9 Efraimʼ lutang, Samaria hi a, Samariaʼ lutang, Remaliahʼ tapa ahi hi. Hih thu upna kho na neih kei leh, nang na kip kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah7:10 Topa in Ahaz kiangah thu genkik a," 
Isaiah7:11 “ Topa na Pasian kiang panin lim khat ngen inla, a thuk Leinuai pan ahi a, a sang vantung panin ahi zongin ngen in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahih hangin Ahaz in, “Ka ngen kei ding hi; Topa ka ze-et kei ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah7:13 Tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Davidʼ innkuan aw, ngai un! Mite na lunggim sakna uh kicing sa lo a, ka Pasian zong lunggimsak lai na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah7:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa mahmah in note tungah lim khat hong pia ding hi. En un, nungak khat gai-in tapa khat nei dinga, ama min Immanuel kici ding hi." 
Isaiah7:15 Amah in a hoih lote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ciangin bawngnawi-thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding hi. 
Isaiah7:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh naupang in a hoih lote nialin a hoihte a teel theih hun ma-in na kihtak uh kumpi nihteʼ gam kinusiacip ding hi. 
Isaiah7:17 Efraim mite pen Judah miteʼ kiang panin a paikhiat hun a kipan nidangin a piang ngei lo thu, Assiria kumpipa pen nang le na mite le na pateʼ inn ah Topa in hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah7:18 “Tua ni ciangin Egypt luiteʼ nak ah a om Egypt mite, thopi hon bangin hong pai nading le Assiria mite, a gam panun khuaipi hon bangin hong pai nadingun Topa in sam ding hi." 
Isaiah7:19 Tuate khempeuh hong pai-in, keenhawmte sung, suangpi heengte sung, lingkung kawmte le ganhing tatna mun khempeuh ah dim ding uh hi." 
Isaiah7:20 “Tua ni ciangin Topa in Gun gal khat panin a kikawm temta ahi Assiria kumpipa tawh sam le khemul mettol dinga, khamul zong met khia ding hi." 
Isaiah7:21 “Tua ni ciangin mi khat in bawngla khat le tuu nih bang bek suahtak zo dinga," 
Isaiah7:22 ahi zongin tuate in nawi tampi a piakna hangin amah in bawngnawi-thaukhal ne zo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah a om lai mi khempeuh in bawngnawi-thaukhal le khuaizu ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah7:23 “Tua ni ciangin ngun tang tul khat a man leenggui tul khat a omna mun khempeuh pen lingkungte le lingteʼ omna suak ding hi. 
Isaiah7:24 Gam khempeuh lingkungte le lingte tawh kidim ding ahih manin, thal le thaltangte tawh tua munah mihingte gam vak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah7:25 Lingkungte le lingte na kihtakna hangin tupeek tawh a kikho ngei mual neute ah na pai ngam kei ding hi. Tua munte pen bawng khahna le tuuteʼ gamtatna mun suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah8:1 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Suangpek lianpi khat la inla, tua tungah mihingteʼ theihkim lai tawh, ‘Maher-shalal-hash-baz,’ ci-in gelh in,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:2 Hih thu a thei dingin a muanhuai teci, siampi ahi Uriah le Jeberekhiahʼ tapa Zekhariah ka nei hi, hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:3 Tua ciangin ka zi tawh ka lum khawm a, amah gai-in tapa khat hong nei hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ka tungah, “Ama min pen Maher-shalal-hash-baz, ci-in phuak in." 
Isaiah8:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh naungek in, ‘Nu aw, pa aw,’ a cih theih ma-in Damaskas khuaʼ hauhna le Samaria khua sunga a om a kisut vante, Assiria kumpipa in la-in masuan ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:5 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik leuleu a," 
Isaiah8:6 “Hih mite in dam takin a luang didi Shiloah tuite nial uh a, Rezin le Remaliahʼ tapaʼ mai ah launa tawh liingliang uh hi." 
Isaiah8:7 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Assiria kumpipa le ama galkap honpite, a tam mahmah a piau dimletin a khang Gunpi tui bangin amaute a sim dingin hong luangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah8:8 Judah gam dong hong nawt suk dinga, dimletin paisuakin, ngawng ciang dong tum ding hi,” hong ci hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in eite hong ompih a, a kizal ama khate in i gam hong hu ding hi." 
Isaiah8:9 No minam dangte aw, thei unla, lungkham un. Gamlapi ah a om gamte khempeuh aw, ngai un. Kigalging un; ahih hangin lungkiatna na thuak veve ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:10 Note kikhawmin thu na vaihawm uh hangin a mawkna suak dinga, thu khat peuhpeuh na gen uh hangin kip lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote tawh Pasian hong om khawm hi." 
Isaiah8:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama vangliatna tawh kei tungah thu hong gen a, hih miteʼ lampi ka zuih loh nadingin hong hilh khol a," 
Isaiah8:12 “Hih miteʼ vaihawmna pawlpih kei un. Amauʼ kihtakte kihta kei unla, lau kei un." 
Isaiah8:13 Ahih hangin Vanglian Topa pen a siangtho-in na ngaihsun ding uh hi. Amah pen noteʼ zahtak pa le noteʼ kihtak pa na hisak ding uh hi. 
Isaiah8:14 Amah pen, a lamdang mahmah in a siangthoʼ luatna hangin miteʼ puk theih nading suangtum tawh kibang hi. Judah le Israel kumpi gam mite le Jerusalem khua-a a teeng mite a awk nading thangzak tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah8:15 Mi tampi tak tuk ding uh hi. Amaute tukin kitamzan gawp ding uh a, amaute awkin kiman ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah8:16 Ka nungzuite aw, Pasian in kei tungah hong piak hih thute, limtakin kemin koihcing un." 
Isaiah8:17 Jakobʼ innkuanteʼ kiang panin a maitang a seel Topa ngakin amah ka muang ding hi. 
Isaiah8:18 En un, Topa in kei hong piak ka tate le keima pumpi pen Zion Mual tungah a teeng Vanglian Topa ’ tung panin Israel miteʼ sungah lim le kihilna ka hi uh hi." 
Isaiah8:19 Amaute in note kiangah, “Phun suausuau-in a pau mualmual vankah theite le aisan theite kiangah thu dong un. Mite in amauʼ pasian-te thu dongin, mihingteʼ thu pen misite dot ding mah hi lo ahi hiam?” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:20 Tua ciangin note in, “ Topa in note hong hilh thute ngai un. Aisanteʼ thu ngai kei un. Amauteʼ hong gen thute a kimanna om lo hi,” ci-in dawng un." 
Isaiah8:21 Mite pen gam sungah vak kawikawi-in, nakpi takin lungkhamin gilkial ding uh hi. A gil uh a kial ciangin amaute lungham gawp ding uh a, a kumpipa uh le a Pasian uh hamsiatin van dak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah8:22 Amaute in leilak a et suk hangun, lungkhamna le khua mialna, lungzing a gimna bek om hi. Khuamial ngeungau sungah amaute kihawl khia ding hi." 
Isaiah9:1 Zebulun minamte le Naftali minamteʼ teenna gamte in mindaina thuak ngei uh a, ahi zongin mai lamah pahtawina ngahkik ding uh hi. Mediterranean tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam Jordan gun gal, minam dangteʼ teenna Galilee gam sung minthangkik ding hi." 
Isaiah9:2 Khuamial sunga a pai mite in khuavak lianpi mu khinta a, khuamial thukna gam sungah a teeng mite tungah khuavak taang khinzo hi." 
Isaiah9:3 Nangmah in amaute na pungsak a, a lungdamna uh na khangsak hi. Anlak hun ciangin lungdamna le mite in vankisutte a hawm ciangun a lungdam bangun nangma mai ah amaute lungdam uh hi." 
Isaiah9:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Midian-te a kizawh ni-a bangin nangmah in amauʼ van gik puakna hakkol le amaute a kisatna ciangkhut na kuaihtansak a, nangma mi a bawlsia minamte na zo gawp hi." 
Isaiah9:5 Galkap hangteʼ khedap khempeuh le si a baang puan khempeuh mei-in kicih ding hi. 
Isaiah9:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh eite adingin naungek khat hong suak a, eiteʼ tungah tapa khat hong kipia hi. Amah pen eite hong ukpa hi dinga, ama min pen “Lamdang Thulak pa, Vanglian Pasian, Tawntung Pa, Nopsakna Kumpi,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah9:7 Tu hun a kipanin a tawntungin David kumpi tokhom tung le ama gam sungah thutang le thuman phutin, a lian semsem ama ukna le nopsakna in mong nei lo ding hi. Vanglian Topa ’ deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah9:8 Topa in Jakob tungah thu khat khah a, Israel tungah thu hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah9:9 “Leiseekte kicim khin hi; ahih hangin suangseek tawh i lam ding hi. Theithek singte kisia khin hi; ahih hangin taamtak sing tawh i khek ding hi,” ci-a kiphasakin lungsim kihisak Efraim mite le Samaria gam sunga teeng mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah9:10  
Isaiah9:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amaute do-in a langpang ding bawl a, amauʼ galte a hanthawn hi." 
Isaiah9:12 Ama mai-a om Syria mite le a nung a om Filistia mite in kam ka-in Israel ne tum uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna dam zo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah9:13 Amaute a sat paʼ lamah Israel mite kihei lo a, Vanglian Topa zong lo uh hi." 
Isaiah9:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Israel sung panin a makaite le a mihonte, a lu panin a mei dongin ni khat thu-in a vatmai hi." 
Isaiah9:15 Upa pa le a zahtakhuai mipa pen a lutang hi a, zuau thu a hilh kamsang pa pen a mei ahi hi." 
Isaiah9:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih minam a makaihte in lam khialsak a, amauʼ makaih mite in siatna ngah uh hi." 
Isaiah9:17 Tua ahih ciangin amauʼ tangvalte tungah Topa lungdam lo a, pa nei lote le a meigong numeite uh tungah hehpihna nei lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh pen Pasianʼ thu a khual om loin siatna a bawl vive hi a, kam khempeuh in haina thu a gen uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna dam zo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah9:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh gitlohna mei bangin kuang a, lingkungte le lingte kaang tumsak hi. Gamlak lopa phate kuangsak a, meikhu lomtangin van lamah kizial to uh hi." 
Isaiah9:19 Vanglian Topa ’ hehna hangin meikuang bangin gam sung kaang a, mite pen mei a kicih sing tawh kibang uh hi. Kuamah in a sanggampa nangawn zah tuan lo hi." 
Isaiah9:20 Amaute in a taklam a omte ne uh a, ahih hangin a gil uh kial lai veve hi. A veilam a omte ne uh a, ahih hangin kham nai lo uh hi. Mite in amauʼ veengteʼ sa ne ciat uh hi." 
Isaiah9:21 Manasseh in Efraim, Efraim in Manasseh ne-in, tua tegel in Judah langpang khawm uh hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna dam zo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah10:1 A cimawhteʼ thutang kimlai hei khiatsakin, keima mite sungah a zawngteʼ thuman sut khia-in, meigong numeiteʼ neihsa amau ading a suah theih nading le pa nei loteʼ neihsa amauʼ nek dingin a bawl theih nadingun a man lo thukhensatna pia a, nenniamna thu a gelhte in gimna ngah ta uh hen!" 
Isaiah10:2  
Isaiah10:3 Gimpiak ni hun, gamlapi panin huihpi hong nun ciangin note in bang cih ding na hi uh hiam? Huhna ngenin kua kiangah tai dinga, na neihsa uh koi lai ah koih ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah10:4 Thongkiateʼ lakah tonbucipin om ding le a kithat mite lakah sih ding bek a om hi. Hih thute khempeuh hangin ama hehna dam zo nai lo a, ama khut kizanlai hi." 
Isaiah10:5 Assiria-te pen ka hehna mite gimpiak nadingin molhtum le ciangkhutin ka zat ahi hi. 
Isaiah10:6 Keima thu a ngaihsun lo minam le kei a hong hehsak miteʼ neihsa sutin laksakin, amaute pen kong lak buannawng bangin a tuancil dingin amaute sawlin thu ka pia hi." 
Isaiah10:7 Ahih hangin a kumpipa in tua bang bek sawm lo a, a lungsim in zong tua bang bek ngaihsun lo hi. Ama lungsim sungah minam tampi suksiat nopna thu om hi." 
Isaiah10:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Ka galkap maangte, kumpi vive hi khin hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno khuapi pen Karkhemish khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? Hamath khuapi pen Arpad khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? Samaria khuapi pen Damaskas khuapi tawh kibang hi lo ahi hiam? 
Isaiah10:10 Jerusalem le Samaria milimte sangin milim lian zaw a nei milim kumpi gamte ka khut in ban khin ahih ciangin 
Isaiah10:11 Samaria le a milimte tungah ka bawl bangin Jerusalem le a milimte tungah bawl lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci hi. 
Isaiah10:12 Topa in Zion Mual le Jerusalem khua ah ama nasep ding teng a zawh khit ciangin Assiria kumpipa kiphasakin a kisialhna le a kiphatsakna hangin gim a pia ding hi. 
Isaiah10:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keimah in thu theihtelna nei ka hih manin keima thahatna le keima pilna tawh ka hih khin hi. Mihingteʼ gamgite la khia-in amauʼ sumte ka sut khin a, keimah in bawngtal bangin a gam mite ka su gawp hi." 
Isaiah10:14 Vasa bumek bangin mihingteʼ hauhna ka la ziau hi. A kinusia vasa tuite mite in a lak bangin leitung khempeuh ka la khin hi. A kha a zap, a kam a ka, a ham khat beek om lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah10:15 Amah a lik to pa pen molhtumin a zang ding bang keek, sing ahi lo mipa pen ciangkhut bangin a lik to ding bang keekin, phuk nadingin amah a zang pa tungah, hei, kihisak thei ding ahi hiam? Sing-at tem zong amah a zang pa tungah kiliansak thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah10:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in ama mi thaute lakah natna lianpi tungsak dinga, tua natna pen amaute sungah mei bangin kuang niloh ding hi." 
Isaiah10:17 Israel-teʼ khuavak pen mei suakin, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa pen meikuang suak ding hi. Ni khat sungin ama lingkungte le lingte kaangin beitum ding hi." 
Isaiah10:18 Gah tampi a piangsak ama leitang le ama gamlak a minthanna pen nuntakna le pumpi dong takin Topa in susia dinga, mi cina khat a si tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah10:19 A om lai gamlak singkungte tawm mahmah ta a, naupang khat nangawn in khatkhatin sim khin thei hi." 
Isaiah10:20 Tua ni a kipan Israel a omlaite, Jakob innkuan a suakta laite in amau a su gawp pa suang nawn loin, Topa ahi, Israel Siangtho Pa pen thuman tawh suanin nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah10:21 Jakob innkuan a omlaite a vanglian Pasian kiangah ciahkik ding hi. 
Isaiah10:22 Na mi Israel-te, tuipi sehnel zah a phak hangin amaute tawm khat bek hong ciahkik ding hi. Amauteʼ thuak dingin a kilawm bangin thu a kikhen ahi hi." 
Isaiah10:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Vanglian Topa in a thukhennasa bangin leitung khempeuh ah beisiangna a bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah10:24 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Topa in thu gen a, “Zion ah a teeng ka mihingte aw, Egypt miteʼ hih bangin amaute in molhtum tawh hong satin a ciangkhut uh hong liik ciangin Assiria mite kihta kei un." 
Isaiah10:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sawt loin note tungah ka thangpaihna bei dinga, ka hehna amauteʼ tung tu-in, amaute sia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah10:26 Vanglian Topa in Oreb suangpi ah Midian mite a suk gawp bangin, amah in amaute tungah gimpiakna zang dinga, Egypt mite a thuaksak bangin Assiria mite thuaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah10:27 Tua ni ciangin na liangko panun ama van gikpi kin khia dinga, ama hakkol pen na ngawng panun bei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah10:28 Rimmon gam pan galte hong kipanin Aiath khua hong tung uh a, Migron khua kantanin hong pai uh a, Mikmash khua ah a van uh hong seng uh hi." 
Isaiah10:29 Amaute in mual ciang kantanin Geba khua ah zan khat giak uh hi. Rama khua mite lau-in liing uh a, Saulʼ teenna Gibeah khua mite a tai uh hi." 
Isaiah10:30 Gallim khua mite aw, nakpi takin kiko un! Laisah khua mite aw ngai un! Anathoth khua mite aw, amah dawng un!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmenah khua mite tai khia a, Gebim khua-a a teeng mite a suakta dingin a tai uh hi." 
Isaiah10:32 Tu ni mahmah in Nob khua ah galte tungin khawl uh a, Zion Mual ahi Jerusalem khuapi a khuttum uh sinsan uh hi." 
Isaiah10:33 En un, Topa, Vanglian Topa in a kihtakhuai vangliatna tawh sing hiangte heuh ding hi. A kung sangte kiphuk dinga, a kisangsakte a niamin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah10:34 Amah in tulak singte hei tawh phuk dinga, Lebanon mual a singkung liante tawh pukkhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah11:1 Jessiʼ phung sung panin a sel khat hong khang khia dinga, a zungte panin a no khat hong khang ding hi." 
Isaiah11:2 Topa ’ kha in ama tungah ama mite a uk nading pilna, thutheihna le siamna pia ding hi. Amah in Topa ’ deihna thei-in Topa zahtak ding hi." 
Isaiah11:3 Amah in Topa ’ nasep nuamsa ding hi. Amah in a tungtham bek muhna tawh thu khen lo dinga, kam leng sawn bek zakna tawh thu khensat lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:4 Thumanna tawh mizawngteʼ thu khenin, lungsim nem miteʼ thu ahi bangin khensak ding hi. Ama kam panin a thupiakna tawh leitung mite gim kipia dinga, a muk panin a thugenna tawh migilote si ding uh hi." 
Isaiah11:5 Amah in thuman le thutak tawh ama mite uk ding hi. 
Isaiah11:6 Keivom pen tuuno tawh om khawm dinga, kamkei gialbem pen keel no tawh lum khawm ding hi. Bawng no le humpinelkai le ganhing thaute om khawm ding uh a, naupang no khat nangawn in tuate hawl zo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:7 Bawngpi le vompi in an nekhawm ding uh a, amauʼ note lum khawm ding uh hi. Humpinelkai in bawngtal mah bangin buhkung ne ding hi." 
Isaiah11:8 Nawine naungek, gul giloʼ kua vangah kimawl dinga, nawine nawn lo naupang in gul guneiʼ bu a sawk hangin a gul in tu lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:9 Ka mual siangtho buppi tungah amaute khatlekhat kiliamsak lo ding uh a, kisusia lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuite in tuipi omna a tuamcip mah bangin leitungah Topa ’ thutheihna kidim ding hi." 
Isaiah11:10 Tua ni ciangin Jessiʼ zung pen mihingteʼ tungah lim khat hi ding hi. Minamte in amah zong ding uh a, ama omna mun minthang mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah11:11 Tua ni ciangin Topa in Assiria gam, Egypt gam, Pathros gam, Ethiopia gam, Elam gam, Shinar gam, Hamath gam le tuipi gei-a gamte panin ama mi a omlaite a ngahkik nadingin a vangliatna zangkik ding hi." 
Isaiah11:12 Amah in minamte adingin lim khat koih dinga, Israel mi a kihawl khiate kaikhawmin, leitung kiu li panin Judah mi a kikhenthangte kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah11:13 Efraim in hazatna lungsim a neihnate bei dinga, Judah mi a galbawlte kisusia ding hi. Efraim in Judah haza nawn lo dinga, Judah in zong Efraim galbawl lo ding hi." 
Isaiah11:14 Ahih hangin amaute in nitumna lam a om Filistia mite simkhawm ding uh a, nisuahna lam a om mite luh khawm ding uh hi. Amaute in Edom mite le Moab mite zo gawp ding uh a, Ammon mite in amauʼ thu mang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah11:15 Topa in ama huih sa nungsakin Nail gunpi le Eufratis gunpi tuite kangsak dinga, mi khempeuh in nuam takin a kantan zawh ding lui neu sagih bek sitlai ding hi." 
Isaiah11:16 Egypt gam panin Israel-te hong pai toh ciangin amau adingin lam lianpi khat a om mah bangin, ama mi a omlaite adingin Assiria gam panin zong lam lianpi khat om ding hi." 
Isaiah12:1 Ni khat ni ciangin mite in, “ Topa aw, kei tungah na heh hangin na hehna dam ta a, kei hong hehnem na hih manin nang tungah lungdamna kong ko ding hi." 
Isaiah12:2 En in, Pasian pen kei a hong hon khia pa ahi hi. Amah ka muang dinga, ka lau kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in thahatna le vangliatna hong pia a, amah pen kei a hong hon khia pa ahi hi,” a cih hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah12:3 Tui siangtho in a dangtakte a lungdamsak mah bangin, Pasianʼ hotkhiatna in a mite lungdamsak ding hi." 
Isaiah12:4 Ni khat ni ciangin mite in, “ Topa ’ tungah lungdam ko unla, ama hong huh ding ngen un. Minam khempeuh lakah ama septe kitheisak unla, ama min kiliansak hi, ci-in gen un." 
Isaiah12:5 Amah in minthang takin sem khin ahih manin Topa ’ tungah phatna la sa unla, leitung khempeuh ah hih thu kitheisak un." 
Isaiah12:6 Zion-a teeng mite aw, nomauʼ lakah Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa lianin om ahih manin lungdamin awng unla, lungdamin la sa un,” a cih hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah13:1 Amozʼ tapa Isaiah in Babylon siat nading tawh kisai a thumuhnate: 
Isaiah13:2 Mual kolh tungah lim khat lak to unla, galkapte tungah nakpi takin kiko un. Mi lianteʼ kongpi ah amaute va pai-in a sim nadingun amaute khut vaan un." 
Isaiah13:3 Keimah in ka tuam koih sa mite thu pia khinin, ka hehna thu a sem khia dingin kiphatsakna tawh a lungdam ka mi thahatte ka sam khin hi." 
Isaiah13:4 Ngai un, mihonpi lungdam bangin mualtungte ah gamlumna! Ngai un, minamteʼ kumpi gamte kikhawmin a gamlumna! Vanglian Topa in galdo dingin mihon khat kai khawm hi." 
Isaiah13:5 Leitung buppi a susia dingin Topa le ama hehna galhiamte gamlapi van mong panin hong pai hi. 
Isaiah13:6 Topa ’ ni hong nai ta ahih manin nakpi takin kap un. Vanglian paʼ kiang panin suksiatna hong tung ta ding hi. 
Isaiah13:7 Tua ahih ciangin khut khempeuh zaw-in, mi khempeuhʼ lungsim tui suak dinga, amaute lungkia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:8 Amaute in gim mahmahna le nat velvalna thuak ding uh a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa ding uh hi. Amaute khatlekhat lamdangsakna tawh ki-en ding uh a, a maitangte un gimna mel pua ding hi." 
Isaiah13:9 En un, leitung gamkhing suaksakin, leitung mawhneite a susia dingin hehna le sinsona tawh nasia takin Topa ’ ni hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah13:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung aksite le amauʼ aksi honpite in khuavak pia khia lo ding hi. Ni a suah tung a kipan mial dinga, kha in zong khuavak taang khiasak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah13:11 Leitung mite a tatsiatna hangun gim ka pia dinga, migilote a mawhna hangun gim ka thuaksak ding hi. Mi kihisakteʼ kiphatsakna beisiang sakin, a kisatheiteʼ kiliatsakna ka niamkhiat ding hi." 
Isaiah13:12 Mihingte pen kham hoihte sangin a hoih zaw, minam pen Ofir gam khamte sangin a hoih zaw-in ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah13:13 Tua ahih ciangin ka sin so ni-in Vanglian Topa ka hehna hangin vantung lausakin ka liingsak dinga, ama omna panin leitung kising khia ding hi." 
Isaiah13:14 A kidelh sanang le a cing om lo tuu bangin mi khempeuh amauʼ miteʼ lam ciatah kihei-in, amauʼ gam ciatah tai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:15 A kimu mi peuhmah kithat dinga, a kiman mi peuhmah namsau tawh si ding hi." 
Isaiah13:16 Amauʼ muhna mahah a naungekte uh leilak kiden gawp nading hi. Amauteʼ inn kiluhin, a zite uh kibuansak ding hi." 
Isaiah13:17 En un, ngun le khamte tawh a lungkim lo Media mite pen amaute a sim dingin ka hanthawn hi." 
Isaiah13:18 Amauʼ thalte in tangvalte that ding hi. Amaute in gil sung pan a piang naungekte hehpih lo ding uh hi. Amauteʼ mit in naupangte khasiat lo ding hi. 
Isaiah13:19 Khaldea miteʼ hoihna, a kiphatsakpih, kumpi gam a minthang bel Babylon khuapi pen Pasian in Sodom le Gomorrah a siatsak lai hun bang ding hi." 
Isaiah13:20 Khang tawntungin tua lai ah kuamah teeng lo dinga, tua lai ah kuamah omngei nawn lo ding hi. Arabia mite kuamah in tua lai ah a puanbuk lam lo dinga, tuucingte kuamah in tua lai ah a tuute lumsak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah13:21 Tua munah gamsate lum ding uh a, tua mun a innte pen a hawk ganhingte tawh kidim ding hi. Tua munah vasa-kalaoh golpite teengin, tua munah keeldawite laam ding uh hi." 
Isaiah13:22 Mihauteʼ inn sungah ngiate, kumpi inn nuam sungah se-alte a ham ding uh hi. Babylon khuapi a siat ding hun hong nai ta a, a ni sawt nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah14:1 Topa in Jakob hehpihin Israel teelkik dinga, amaute pen a gam uh ah koihkik ding hi. Khual mite in amaute pawlin Jakob innkuan bel ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:2 Israel mite in amaute manin amauʼ gamah ciahpih ding uh a, Topaʼ gam sungah amaute pen sila numei sila pasal dingin nei ding uh hi. Amaute a man ngei mite pen tu-in amaute in leh mat ding uh a, amaute a nengniam ngei mite tungah tu-in ukna nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:3 A haksa nasep hong kisepsakna, gimna le lungkhamna panin Topa in note tungah tawldamna hong piak ciangin,"
