Isaiah14:4 Babylon kumpipa tungah hih zahkona kam na zang ding uh a, “Kumpi gilopa puk ta a, amah in kuamah nengniam zo nawn lo ding!" 
Isaiah14:5 Tawlnga loin mihingte satna-in a kizang, hehna tawh minamte ukin nakpi takin a bawlsia, migiloteʼ ciangkhut le gam ukteʼ kumpi ciangkhut, Topa in kuaitan khinta hi." 
Isaiah14:6  
Isaiah14:7 Leitung khempeuh tawlnga-in gamdai takin om ta uh a, amaute in la sa-in kiko uh hi." 
Isaiah14:8 Taksing kungte na tungah lungdamin, Lebanon mual taamtak singkungte in, ‘Nang hong kiniamkoih khit a kipanin kote a phuk dingin kuamah hong pai nawn kei,’ ci uh hi." 
Isaiah14:9 “Nang na pai suk ciangin a hong dawntuah dingin Leinuai-a misite kihanthawn a, nangmah a hong hopih dingin leitungah a lian ngei misi uliante kipusuaksak hi. A minamteʼ kumpite khempeuh amauʼ kumpi tokhom panin hong ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:10 Amaute in nang hong hopihin, ‘Nang zong kote mah bangin na thahat kei hi. Kote mah na bang ta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:11 Nangma harp lasakna awte, nangma liatna khempeuh Leinuai ah kipaipih suk hi. Thante pen nangma delhphah hi a, thante pen nangma silh ahi hi." 
Isaiah14:12 “Nang Khuavakʼ ta, Zingsol, Babylon kumpipa aw, vantung panin nang bangci kiat na hi hiam? Minamte a niamkoih pa ahi nangmah leilak dongah hong bangci kiphuk pai ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah14:13 Nang in na lungsim sungah, ‘Vantungah ka kah to ding hi. A sangna mun, Pasianʼ aksiteʼ tung pekah ka kumpi tokhom ka koih dinga, leilu lam pek a kikhopna mual tungah ka tu ding hi." 
Isaiah14:14 Meiiteʼ tung pekah ka kah to dinga, Sangpen pa bangin ka kibawl ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Isaiah14:15 Ahih hangin nang pen Leinuai thuk penna Leihawm sungah hong kikoih suk ding hi. 
Isaiah14:16 “Nangmah hong mu mite in nang hong en gega-in, nangma thu lungngai dedu ding uh a, ‘Hih mipa pen leitung a liingsak pa, kumpi gamte a lok gawp pa," 
Isaiah14:17 leitung pen sehnel gam suaksakin, khuapite a susia pa, thong sungah a kikhum mite inn ah a ciahsak lopa hih pa hi lo ahi hiam?’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:18 “Minam dangteʼ kumpite khempeuh amau hankhuk sung ciat uh ah a minthangin lum uh hi. 
Isaiah14:19 Ahih hangin nang pen namsau tawh a kithat misi a uihte, Suanghawmpi sunga a pai sukte, khe tawh a kisikcip si luang hawmte bangin, na hankhuk pua lamah hong kilawn khia hi." 
Isaiah14:20 Nangmah in na gam susia-in, nangma mihingte that khin na hih manin, nang pen amaute tawh hong kivui khawm lo ding hi. Siatna a bawlpaʼ suanlekhakteʼ min kilo ngei nawn kei tahen!" 
Isaiah14:21 Amaute khangto loin leitung a neih loh nading le leitung maitang teng khuapite tawh a kidimsak loh nadingin amauʼ pateʼ mawhna hangin a tateʼ kithah nading piang tahen,” na ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:22 Vanglian Topa in, “Amauteʼ lang khat ah ka pang dinga, Babylon min le a om lai miteʼ tate le suanlekhakte ka susia ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah14:23 Saphulipteʼ om nadingin tua khuapi bawlin, bualtui ka suaksak dinga, siatna munphiah tawh ka phiat khia siang ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah14:24 Vanglian Topa kiciam khin a, “Ka geel sa bangin piang dinga, ka ngimna sa bangin kip ding hi." 
Isaiah14:25 Keimah in ka gam sungah Assiria mite ka susia dinga, ka mual tungah ka sikcip ding hi. Ka miteʼ tung panin Assiria-teʼ hakkol amauteʼ liangko panin Assiria-teʼ van gik kia khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah14:26 Hih ngimna pen leitung buppi adingin a kingim ahi hi. Hih ka khut pen minam khempeuh gimpiak nadingin a kizan ahi hi. 
Isaiah14:27 Vanglian Topa in ngim khin ahih manin kua in phiat zo ding ahi hiam? Ama khut kizan khin ahih manin kua in kaitonkik zo ding ahi hiam? 
Isaiah14:28 Kumpi Ahaz a sih kumin thu hong tung a," 
Isaiah14:29 “Filistia mi khempeuh aw, note hong kisatna ciangkhut a kitan manin lungdam kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh singbul panin a sel a om bangin, gulpi a sih khit ciangin a siahuai zaw gul gunei hong om dinga, tuate pen a leng thei gulpi hong hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah14:30 Mizawngte in keima gankhahna sungah an ne ding uh a, a cimawhte lungnuam takin lum hithiat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin no Filistia mite, kialpi tawh kong that dinga, a suakta kha a omlaite keimah in ka that ding hi." 
Isaiah14:31 “Filistia khuapi kongpite aw, nakpi takin kap un; khuapite aw, kiko un. Filistia mi khempeuh aw, lau-in liing un! Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin galkap honteʼ hong paina leivui khu hong kitung a, tua galkapte a meidawi khat beek om lo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah14:32 Filistia mite in a hong sawl kamtaite mi khatpeuh in bangci dawn ding ahi hiam? “ Topa in Zion kipsak khin a, gimna a thuak ama mite in tua sungah bukna mu uh hi,” ci-in a dawng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab gam tawh kisai thu: Zan khat thu-in Ar khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei hi. Zan khat thu-in Kir khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei ta ahi hi. 
Isaiah15:2 A sangna munte ah a kap dingin Dibon khua mite pai to uh hi. Nebo le Medeba khuateʼ hangin Moab mite nakpi takin kap uh hi. Dahna limin lu khempeuh kimettol a, khamul khempeuh zong kimetmai hi." 
Isaiah15:3 Kongzing lakah amaute in puanhampi silh uh hi. Innkhum zang le kongzing lampi kituahnate ah mi khempeuh nakpi-in kapin khitui tawh a kawt uh hi. 
Isaiah15:4 Heshbon khua le Elealeh khua kiko uh a, amauʼ kahna awging Jahaz khua dongah kiza hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moab mi galhiam tawite lau-in nakpi takin kiko uh a, amaute a liing uh hi." 
Isaiah15:5 Moab gam adingin ka lungsim kiko hi. A galtai ama mite Zoar khua le Eglath-shelishiah khuate ah a tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Luhith lampi ah amaute a kap sa-in pai to uh hi. Horonaim khua zuatna lampi ah amaute in siatna a thuakna uh hangin nakpi-in kiko uh hi. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim luite kang hi. Lopa keu-in a sel thak om lo a, lopa hing om nawn lo hi." 
Isaiah15:7 Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a ngah sa uh le a khol sa uh na tampite pua-in Gialhek Lui ah a paipih uh hi. 
Isaiah15:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gam kiim khempeuh ah kahna aw a ging hi. Kahna in Eglaim khua ban a, kahna in Beerelim khua zong a ban hi." 
Isaiah15:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Dibon lui tuite sisan tawh kidim hi. Ahi zongin Dibon khua in a thuak ding a nasia zaw om lai a, Moab gam panin a suakta mi le gam sungah a om lai mite khempeuh kithat gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah16:1 Moab mite in Jerusalem-a om gam ukpa tungah sehnel gam Sela khua panin tuunote a puak uh hi. 
Isaiah16:2 A bu a kipaih khiatsak ciangin a cih nading thei loin a leng kawikawi vasate bangin Arnon gun tui ngahmun ah Moab mite om uh hi. 
Isaiah16:3 Amaute in Judah mite kiangah, “Kote tungah thuhoih hong lak unla, thutangin hong gamta un. Sunkim laitak a sing liim bangin kote hong liah un. A kihawl khia kote hong seel unla, galtai kote hong heek kei un." 
Isaiah16:4 A kihawl khia ko Moab mite note lakah hong tengsak unla, kote hong susiateʼ kiang panin koteʼ belh hong hi un. A nengniam pa om nawn loin siatna hun bei ta a, a khe tawh a sik mipa gam sung panin a manthan ciangin," 
Isaiah16:5 itna kip tawh kumpi tokhom khat kiphut dinga, thuman sep ding a manlang, thutang zongin thu a khen mipa pen Davidʼ buk sunga om tua tokhom tungah thuman tawh tu ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah16:6 Tua ciangin Judah mite in, “Moabʼ kiphatsakna thu i za khinta hi. Amah kiphasak mahmah hi. A kiliatsakna, a kiphatsakna, a kihihsakna, ama kisialhnate khempeuh a mawkna ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah16:7 Tua ahih ciangin a thuakna uh hangin Moab mite kap henla, mi khempeuh zong Moab miteʼ hangin kap ta uh hen. Nakpi takin gimna a thuak laitakun Kir-hareseth khua ah a an lim nekte uh a phawk khak uh ciangin khasia-in a kap uh hi." 
Isaiah16:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a hiang zaai-in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua banin sehnel gam dongah a zaam ama hiangte, minam dangteʼ tote in sattan ahih manin Heshbon lo laite le Sibmah leengguite vul ta uh hi." 
Isaiah16:9 Tua ahih ciangin Jazer khua mite a kah bangin Sibmah leengguiteʼ hangin kei ka kap hi. Heshbon le Elealeh khua mite aw, ka khitui tawh note kongkawtsak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gal kidona in noteʼ singgah le ante hong ban zo hi." 
Isaiah16:10 An tampi a pian ngeina lo lai ah lungdamna le nuamna om nawn lo hi. Leenggui lote ah lasakna om lo a, lungdam a kikona om nawn lo hi. Leenggah cilna ah kuamah in leengtui suk nawn lo a, leenggah lawh cianga kikona aw kidaisak ta hi." 
Isaiah16:11 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam hangin laiza lasakna bangin ka lungsim kisat gaihgaih a, Kir-hareseth khuapi hangin kei mahmah zong ka kisat gaihgaih hi." 
Isaiah16:12 Moab a mahmah hong kilaakin, a sangna munah lungkhamin hong pai a, ama siangtho munah thu a nget ciangin bangmah ngah lo ding hi." 
Isaiah16:13 Hih bang thu pen Topa in a beisa hun lai-in Moab tawh kisai-in a gen sa thu ahi hi. 
Isaiah16:14 Ahih hangin tu-in Topa in, “Nasem dingin a kicial kum hunte sung bangin, kum thum sungin, ama mihon tampite om taseleh Moabʼ minthanna in simmawhna thuak dinga, a suakta lai mite pen tawm mahmah in, thaneem ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah17:1 Damaskas tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: En un, Damaskas pen khuapi hi nawn loin ninbu lomtang suak ding hi." 
Isaiah17:2 Ama khuapite kinusiacip paisuak ding hi. Tuuhonteʼ omna mun suak dinga, tua tuuhonte lum hithiatin bangmah in lausak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah17:3 Efraim gam panin kulhpi bei-in, Damaskas khua panin kumpi gam mangthang ding hi. Syria mi a suakta laite pen Israel mite mah bangin mindai ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah17:4 Tua ni ciangin Jakobʼ liatna bei dinga, ama hauhna khempeuh mangthang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:5 An a la mi in ankung ding laite kaikhawmin ante a kilak khit ciangin leitang a hawmguakin a om tawh kibang dinga, mi khat in Refaim Kuam sungah ansang a kaihkhop khit ciangin lo lai a hawmguakin a om tawh zong kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:6 Oliv kung a kisin khit ciangin a hiang sang pen dawnah pum nih pum thum singkung hiang dawnah pum li pum nga a om lai tawh kibang lel ding hi, Israel-teʼ Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah17:7 Tua ni ciangin mite in amaute a Bawlpa pi ngaihsut ding uh a, amauteʼ mit in Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa en ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:8 Amaute in amau khut tawh a bawl sa uh biakna taute don lo ding uh a, amauʼ bawl sa Asherah milimte hitaleh paknamtui halna biakna taute hitaleh muanin nei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:9 Tua ni ciangin amauʼ khuapi muanhuaite pen Hiv mite le Amor mite in Israel miteʼ hangin a nusiat uh munte tawh kibang dinga, gamkhing a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah17:10 Nomau hong hon khia Pasian note in mangngilhin, nomauʼ belh Suangpi phawk lo na hih manun note in biakna huan bawlin kung hoihte suan a, kung namdangte tawh pehin," 
Isaiah17:11 tuate na suan ni mahun thakhatin khang a, na tuh ni uh a zing ciang mahin a hong pak hangin note in a gah na lo kha kei ding uh hi. Gimna le lungkhamna hong tun ni-in tuate maimang ding hi." 
Isaiah17:12 Ah, mi tampiteʼ kikona, tuipi ging bang! Ah, minamteʼ otna, tui lianpi ging bang!" 
Isaiah17:13 Tui lianpi a ging bangin minamte awng uh hi. Ahih hangin amah in amaute tai dinga, gamlapi pekah amaute tai khia ding uh hi. Mual tung a huih mai ah ansi leeng bang leh huihpi mai-a pingpei bangin leeng khia mang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah17:14 En un, nitakin hong lausak a, zingsang ma-in amaute bei ta! Hih bang thute pen eite hong susia-in eite a hong luh gawpte in a thuak ding uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah18:1 Ah, Ethiopia gunteʼ gal khat, puankhai gunkuangpi a omna gamte in Nail gun tawnin tui tungah laisah tawh a kibawl gunkuangpite tungah tuangin taangmi hong sawl uh hi. No a zaptel makaite aw, amauʼ gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cineel minamte kiangah va pai un." 
Isaiah18:2  
Isaiah18:3 Leitung a teeng mi khempeuh, leitung a om mi khempeuh aw, mualte tungah lim khat hong kilah ciangin en un! Peengkul hong kimut ciangin ngai un!" 
Isaiah18:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah, “Ni taang sunga nisa silsel, an lak nisat hun sunga meii zun bangin, ka omna panin daitakin ka en ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah18:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah lawh hun ma deuh, leenggui a pak khit, leenggah a puamcin laitakin, amah in singhiang heuhna temkawi tawh a selte at khia dinga, a zaam zeizai a hiangte heuh khia ding hi." 
Isaiah18:6 Tuate khempeuh mual tunga om vasateʼ nek ding le leitung a ganhingteʼ nek dingin kinusia ding hi. Khuakhal ciangin vasate in ne dinga, phalbi ciangin leitung a ganhingte in ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah18:7 Tua hun ciangin, amauʼ gam gunpi in a phelkhap, a vanglian a gualzo minam, a nai a gamla ah a kikihta mi, a tun sang mi, a cineel mite kiang panin Vanglian Topa ’ min omna Zion mual, Vanglian Topa ’ tungah letsong hong kipuak ding hi." 
Isaiah19:1 Egypt tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: A manlang mahmah meii tungah Topa tuangin Egypt gamah a pai hi. Ama mai ah Egypt gam milimte lau-in liing ding uh a, Egypt miteʼ hanna bei ta ding hi." 
Isaiah19:2 Egypt mite amau le amau ka kitawngsak ding hi. Mi kim in ama veengte ciat do dinga, khua khatlekhat kido-in, mi khatlekhat kumpi za kituh ding hi." 
Isaiah19:3 Egypt miteʼ lungsim hawmsuak dinga, amauʼ geelnate ka siasak ding hi. Amaute in milimte, vankah theite le aisan theite tungah thu dong ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:4 A thuak hak topaʼ khut sungah Egypt mite ka pia dinga, a kihtakhuai mahmah a gilo kumpipa in amaute uk ding hi, Topa, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah19:5 Nail gun tuite keu dinga, gun tui kangcipin keu ding hi." 
Isaiah19:6 Lei zui-a tui kilate uihin, Egypt gam a om Nail gun hiangte kiamin keucip dinga, pumpeeng kung le phai kungte muat ding hi." 
Isaiah19:7 Nail gun gei, Nail gun kiang kolh dinga, Nail gun kiangah a kituh khempeuh keucipin huih in leen khia-in om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah19:8 Nail gun sungah nga siahna sikkawi a khia ngei, ngasa bengte thumin tau ding uh a, tui tungah ngen a pai ngei mite thaneem ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:9 Anthul khau ciingin na a semte le patpuan a gante lungkham ding uh hi. 
Isaiah19:10 Gam sung makaite kisusiacip dinga, a kicial nasemte dah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:11 Zoan uliante hai cihtakin hai uh a, Faroʼ mipil thulamlakte in thu haihuai gen uh hi. Nang in Faroʼ tungah, “Mipil paʼ tapa ka hi hi; tanglai kumpiteʼ tapa ka hi hi,” bangci-in ci thei ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah19:12 Tua ahih kei leh Egypt kumpipa Faro aw, na mipilte koi ah om ahi uh hiam? Vanglian Topa in Egypt gam gimpiak ding a ngimna thu, na mipilte in nangma tungah hong gen thei kha ding hi." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan uliante mihai suak khin uh a, Memfis uliante zong hai khin uh hi. Minamte a makai dinga kineite in a mite uh lam khialhpih khin hi." 
Isaiah19:14 Topa in amauteʼ lungsim kitukalhsak khinzo hi. Zukham pa ama luak lakah a puk bangin Egypt gam miteʼ hihna khempeuh khialin hoi mang khin hi. 
Isaiah19:15 A hau a zawng, a lian a neu, mi khat beek in Egypt adingin a hihsak theih ding bangmah om lo hi." 
Isaiah19:16 Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite, numei bang ding uh a, Vanglian Topa in amaute a khut a sinsanna hangin lau-in liing ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:17 Judah gam pen Egypt miteʼ kihtak hong suak ding hi. Vanglian Topa in amaute gimpiak ding a ngimna hangin, hih thu a kigenna mi khempeuh lau ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:18 Tua ni ciangin Egypt gam sungah khuapi nga in Kanaan miteʼ kampau zangin Vanglian Topa ’ tungah thuman ding thu ciam ding uh hi. Hih khuapi khat pen, “Ni Khuapi,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah19:19 Tua ni ciangin Egypt gamah Topa ading biakna tau khat, a gamgi ah Topa ading khuapi khat om ding hi." 
Isaiah19:20 Tua pen Vanglian Topa adingin Egypt gam sungah lim le teci hi ding hi. A nengniam miteʼ bawlsiatna hangin Topa tungah amaute a kiko ciangin, amah in amaute kiangah honpa khat sawl dinga, amaute hu-in khah khia ding hi." 
Isaiah19:21 Topa in Egypt mite tungah a mahmah kitheisak ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Egypt mite in Topa thei-in biakpiakna le meihal biakna tawh bia ding uh a, amaute in Topa ’ tungah thuciamna bawlin, tua thuciamnate sem ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:22 Topa in Egypt mite sat dinga, ahi zongin damsakkik ding hi. Topa ’ lamah amaute kiheikik ding uh a, amah in amauteʼ thumna donin amaute a damsak ding hi." 
Isaiah19:23 Tua ciangin Egypt gam panin Assiria gamah lam lianpi khat pai-in, Assiria mite Egypt gamah hong pai dinga, Egypt mite Assiria gam sungah pai-in, Egypt mite in Assiria mite tawh bia khawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah19:24 Tua ni ciangin Israel, Egypt le Assiria, hih thumte pen leitung khempeuh adingin thupha hi ding uh a," 
Isaiah19:25 Vanglian Topa in, “Ka mihingte ahi Egypt, ka khut tawh ka bawl sa ahi Assiria le keima luah ahi Israel mite in thupha ngah tahen,” ci-in thupha a piakte hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah20:1 Assiria kumpipa Sargon in a sawl galkap maang lianpen pa, Filistia khuapi Ashdod ah pai-in, tua khua va sim hi." 
Isaiah20:2 Tua hun ma kum thum laitakin Topa in Amozʼ tapa Isaiah tungtawnin thu genin, “Na puanhampi suah inla, na khe panin na khedapte suah in,” a ci hi. Amah zong tua mah bangin gamta-in, tangguak le kheguak tawh lam a pai hi." 
Isaiah20:3 Ashdod khua a kilak khit ciangin Topa in, “Egypt le Ethiopia lang khat ah lim le siahil dingin ka nasem pa Isaiah tangguak le kheguak tawh kum thum sung lam a pai mah bangin," 
Isaiah20:4 Assiria kumpipa in, Egypt gam miteʼ maizumna ahi, a moi a hamin, tangguak kheguakin, tawbo dawk sa-in, Egypt mite galin manin, Ethiopia mite salin manin paikhiatpih ding hi." 
Isaiah20:5 Tua ciangin amauʼ lametna Ethiopia le amauʼ kisialh pih Egyptʼ hangin amaute lungkia-in a cih nading uh thei lo ding uh hi. 
Isaiah20:6 Tua ni ciangin hih tuipi gei-a teeng mite in, ‘En un, eiteʼ lametna, Assiria kumpipaʼ kiang panin eite hong hon khia dingin i belh miteʼ tungah hih bang piang khinta hi. Eite bangci suahtak ding ihi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah21:1 Babylon gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Leitaw lam panin pingpei hong kipat mah bangin, a lauhuai gam panin siatna hong pai hi." 
Isaiah21:2 A kihtakhuai maangmuhna khat kei tungah hong kigen hi. A sut zo mipa in sut a, a susia zo mipa in susia hi. Elam galkapte aw, kuan to un. Media galkapte aw, umcih un. Babylonʼ piansak khuisatnate khempeuh Pasian in beisak ta hi." 
Isaiah21:3 Tua ahih ciangin ka kawng na a, nausuak numei in na a sak bangin na ka sa hi. Khua a za thei lo zah dongin a kuncipin ka om a, khua a mu thei lo zah dongin lungkia-in ka om hi." 
Isaiah21:4 Ka lung vai a, launa in hong sidaangsak hi. Keima lunggulh zan khuamial pen keima linna a suak hi." 
Isaiah21:5 Amaute in sabuai phahin, sualpuante phah uh a, an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. Uliante aw, tho un; lum, sathau nuh un!" 
Isaiah21:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kei tungah: “Pai in; galvil khat koih inla, ama muh bangbang gensak in." 
Isaiah21:7 Amah in a kopkopin sakol tung tuang mite, la tunga a tuangte, kalaoh tunga a tuangte a muh ciangin limtak, phatakin encik hen,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:8 Tua ciangin a mu pa kiko a, “Topa aw, tausang tungah sun tawntung ka dinga, ka vilna munah zan khuavak ka om hi." 
Isaiah21:9 En in, sakol tung tuangte a kopkopin hong pai!” a ci hi. A dang khat in, “Babylon cim hi, cim hi. A milim pasian-te khempeuh leilak dongah amah in suksiatsak hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Isaiah21:10 A kicil sa, a kiseep sa keima mite aw, Israel-teʼ Pasian, Vanglian Topa ’ tung panin ka zak sa thu teng note tungah kong gen hi." 
Isaiah21:11 Edom gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Seir mual tung panin khat in kei hong sam a, “Galvil pa aw, tu zan bangci hiam? Galvil pa aw, tu zan bangci hiam?” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah21:12 Galvil pa keimah in, “Zing ni hong suak a, zan khua zong hong mial hi. Thukan nuam na hih leh hong paikik inla hong kan in,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabia gam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Dedan mi khualzin honte aw, Arabia gamlak ah na giak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah21:14 Tema gam a teeng mite aw, a dangtakte tui puak unla, galtaite an tawh dawn un." 
Isaiah21:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, namsau, a kidok sa namsau, a kikeek thal le gal in a phutna panin a hong tai uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah21:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah, “Tha cial kum hunte mah bangin kum khat sungin Kedar miteʼ minthanna khempeuh bei ding hi." 
Isaiah21:17 Kedar mi thaltawi siam a omlaite tawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, Israel Pasian in hih thu gen khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:1 Maangmuhna Kuam tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Kikona tawh a kidim, a gamlum khuapi, lungdamin a diang khua aw, note khempeuh, innkhum zang ah na kah toh uh bang na cihnopna uh ahi hiam? A kithat nangma mite pen namsau tawh a kithat hi lo a, gal sung a si hi lo uh hi." 
Isaiah22:2  
Isaiah22:3 Note hong uk mite tai uh a, thal zat kul loin amaute kiman hi. Gamlapi ah na tai uh hangin hong kimu note khempeuh hong kiman hi." 
Isaiah22:4 Tua ahih ciangin keimah in, “Kei hong en kei unla, khitui tampi luangin hong kapkapsak un. Ka mi tampi a sihna hangin keimah hehnep ding hong hanciam kei un,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah22:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Maangmuhna Kuam sungah buaina le tuatcil gawpna, kitawhzauna, kulhte suksiat gawpna le mualte tungah kikona hong tungsak hi." 
Isaiah22:6 Sakol leengte le sakol tung tuangte tawh Elam galkapte in thallawng pua uh a, Kir galkapte in a lumte uh a baih sa-in nei uh hi." 
Isaiah22:7 Nomauʼ teel Judah kuamte sakol leeng tawh kidim a, sakol tung tuangte in Jerusalem kulh kongpite ah a pang uh hi." 
Isaiah22:8 Judah a kihutna teng khempeuh kicim khinta hi. Tua ni ciangin Tulak Inn sunga kikoih galhiamte na suang dinga," 
Isaiah22:9 David khuapi mun tampi tak a siatna mu-in, bual nuainung tuite na cingkik a," 
Isaiah22:10 nangmah in Jerusalem innte a phazah simin, kulhpi siate puah nadingin innte na phel hi." 
Isaiah22:11 Nangmah in, bual lui pan a tuite khol nadingin kulhpi nih kikalah tuibeem pi khat na bawl hi. Ahih hangin nangmah in, tua na a na bawlpa phawk loin, sawtpekin a na geel pa na don kei hi." 
Isaiah22:12 Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in kahna le thumna, sam mettolna le puanhampi silhna a zang dingin thu hong pia hi." 
Isaiah22:13 Ahih hangin note in lungdamna le kipahna, bawngtalte le tuute gawhna, sa nekna le leenggahzu nekna na nei zawsop uh a, “Zing ciangin si ding ihih ciangin nene-in dawndawn ni,” na ci zawsop uh hi." 
Isaiah22:14 Vanglian Topa in keima tungah thu hong gen a, “Na sih matengun hih mawhna hong kimaisak het lo ding hi,” Vanglian Topa Pasian in hong ci hi." 
Isaiah22:15 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa Pasian in, “Hong pai in. Inn sung na teng a uk, neihsa kem pa Shebna kiangah pai inla ama tungah hih bangin gen in:" 
Isaiah22:16 Hih lai ah nangma ading hankhuk a to, a sangna munah hankhuk a bawl, na omna ding suang a khuak mipa aw, nang in hih lai ah bang hih a, vui ding kua nei na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah22:17 En in, nang mi that pa aw, Topa in nang hong lawn khia gawp ding hi. Amah in nakpi takin nang hong lenin," 
Isaiah22:18 hong pingpei dinga, lei tanzau munah bawlung bangin hong lawn ding hi. Na topaʼ inn sunga dingin maizumna ahi nang pen tua munah si-in, na kisaktheih pih na sakol leengte lakah na tuk ding hi." 
Isaiah22:19 Na nasepna phual panin nang kong nawt khia dinga, na omna panin nang hong kilawn khia suk ding hi." 
Isaiah22:20 “Tua ni ciangin Hikiahʼ tapa ahi ka nasem pa Eliakim ka sam dinga," 
Isaiah22:21 nangma puan tualpi amah silhsakin, nangma kawnggak tawh amah ka gak dinga, nangma ukna ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah pen Jerusalem khua-a teeng mite le Judah mite tungah pa hi ding hi." 
Isaiah22:22 Davidʼ suanlekhakteʼ khutnuai ah aana neihna tawhtang, ama tungah ka pia ding hi. Amah in hongin, kuamah in khak zo lo ding hi. Amah in khakin, kuamah in hong zo lo ding hi." 
Isaiah22:23 Amah pen a kician mun khat ah vankhaina bangin ka khenkip dinga, ama beh sungah pahtawi ngahna phungpi a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah22:24 “Ahi zongin a beh a phung, a suan a khakte khempeuh ama adingin van gikpi hi dinga, umlebeel, kuanglekeute, hai a kipan thawl dongin van khaina ah a kikhai bangin ama tungah kibom ding uh hi." 
Isaiah22:25 Tua ni ciangin mun hoihna a a kikhen vankhai in lel ding hi. Topa in gen khin ahih ciangin, amah pen kitanin kia dinga, ama tunga van gik kikhai teng kisia ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in hong ci hi." 
Isaiah23:1 Taia khua tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, Taia khua kisia a, inn le khawlmunte om nawn lo ahih manin kap un! Saipras gam panin amaute in hih thu hong za uh hi." 
Isaiah23:2 Tuipi gei-a teeng mite aw, thumin tau un. Sidon sumbukte aw, na sawltakte un tuipi kantanin tui lianpite tungah om uh hi." 
Isaiah23:3 Egypt gam a piang ante lei-in na zuak uh a, minam khempeuh tawh sum bawlin na kizom uh hi." 
Isaiah23:4 Sidon aw, maizum in; bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi in thu gen khin hi. Tua tuipi muanhuai in, “Keimah in naupaii-in na ka sa ngei kei a, nau ka nei ngei kei hi. Ta numei ka khoi ngei kei a, ta pasal zong ka khansuah ngei kei hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:5 Egypt gamah hih thu a kizak ciangin, Taia tawh kisai thu hangin amaute in na sa ding uh hi." 
Isaiah23:6 Tuipi gei-a teeng mite aw, Tarshish khua ah tai-in kap un!" 
Isaiah23:7 Tanglai pekin a piang, gamlapi pek panin a kiphut hih khuapi nomauʼ lungdam pih khuapi mah ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah23:8 Kumpi khuapi ahi, ama sumbukte ulian ahi, ama sum bawlte leitungah a kipahtawite ahi, Taia khuapi hih bang a pian nading kuaʼ vaihawm ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah23:9 A Vanglian Topa ’ vaihawm ahi hi. Mi lianteʼ kiphatsaknate a beisak nading le a kipahtawi uliante a niamkhiat nadingin a bawl ahi hi. 
Isaiah23:10 Tarshish mite aw, tu-in kuan khia-in lo kho un. Na sum bawlna teng uh maimang khinta hi." 
Isaiah23:11 Topa in tuipi tungah a khut zan a, kumpi gamte lumlet gawp hi. Sumbawlna phualpite a kisuksiatna ding Topa in thu pia zo hi." 
Isaiah23:12 Amah in, “Sidon khuapi aw, na lungdamna teng bei khinta hi. Na mite in nenniamna thuak uh a, Saipras tuikulh ah a va tai uh hangin, tua lai nangawn ah lungnopna hun nei lo ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:13 Taia khuapi, gamsateʼ phualpi a suaksakte pen Assiria mite hi lo a, Babylon mite ahi hi. Babylon mite in khuapi luhna ding panmun bawl uh a, Taia khuapi kulhte susia-in, khuapi sung khempeuh a sia a suaksak uh hi." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarshish teembaw hawlte aw, na muan uh khuapi kisia ta ahih manin thumin kap un." 
Isaiah23:15 Tua a siat hun a kipanin kumpi khat nuntak hunsung tan ahi, kum sawm sagih sung Taia khuapi kimangngilh ding hi. Kum sawm sagih a cin ciangin, paktat numei la sunga mah bangin Taia khuapi tungah piang ding hi. Tua la sungah," 
Isaiah23:16 “Kuama phawk loh numei paktat aw, harp lasakna khat la inla, khuapi kimkot ah pai in! Nangmah hong kiphawk theih nadingin la ngaih phuak inla, la tampi sa in,” ci hi." 
Isaiah23:17 Kum sawm sagih a cin ciangin Taia khuapi ah Topa hawh dinga, Taia khuapi in ama sep ngei sem kikin, leitung kumpi gam khempeuh tawh kizomin sum bawlna sem ding hi." 
Isaiah23:18 Ama sumbuk vante le ama sepna panin a ngah nate pen Topa ’ tungah kipia ding hi. Ahih hangin tuate kikholcip mawk loin, Topa a bia miteʼ an ding le puan hoih nono leina-in kizang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:1 En un, Topa in leitung hawmsuak sakin gamkhing suaksak dinga, amah in lei maitang huiheek gawpin, a tunga a teeng mite thehthang gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah24:2 Mi khempeuhteʼ thuakna kibang kim ding hi. Siampite le mi mawkmawkte silate le a tote, van leite le van zuakte, sumneite le leibate, a hau a zawng, a thuakna uh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:3 Leitung kihawmsuak sakin kisiacip ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi. 
Isaiah24:4 Leitung vulin keugaw a, leitung buppi thaneemin vul gawp hi. Vantung le leitung a nih tuakin vul khawm hi." 
Isaiah24:5 Ama tunga a teengte in leitung ninsak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in thukhamte khialin ngeina kipte palsat uh a, tawntung thuciamna peel uh hi." 
Isaiah24:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in leitung samsiatin susia a, a tunga a teeng mite in amauʼ mawhna hangun a thuak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin leitungah a teeng mite tawm semsem hi." 
Isaiah24:7 Leengguite keutumin leenggahzu tawm semsem a, a lungdam mi khempeuh khuisa ta uh hi." 
Isaiah24:8 Lungdamna khuang gingte dai-in lungdam a gamlumnate om nawn lo a, lungdam a laiza tawh lasaknate a dai ta hi." 
Isaiah24:9 Zu phung ah lungdam a lasakna om nawn lo a, zu khempeuh kisia-in kha gawp ta hi." 
Isaiah24:10 Khuapi hawmsuak pen kisiacip ta a, kuamah a tum theih loh nadingin inn khempeuh kikhakcip hi." 
Isaiah24:11 Leenggahzu a duh manun kongzing ah mite kiko uh hi. Lungdamna khempeuh mangthang khinta a, leitung kipahna teng kibeisak ta hi." 
Isaiah24:12 Khuapi sungah gamkhinna bek om a, kongpite kisat khamin kisia mang khinta hi." 
Isaiah24:13 Hih bangmahin leitungah a om mi khempeuh tungah a hong tung ding ahi hi. Oliv kung a kisin khit ciang, leenggah kilo khinin a sangte a kikaihkhop khit ciangin a kinusia lo hawmte tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah24:14 A suakta sun mite in lungdamin la sa ding uh hi. Nitumna lam a om mite in Topa a liat mahmahna thu gen ding uh hi. 
Isaiah24:15 Nisuahna lam a om mite in Topa phat ding uh hi. Tuipi dunga teeng mite in Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian phat ding uh hi." 
Isaiah24:16 Leimong a gamla pek pan nangawnin a thuman Israel minamte a kiphatna la i za ding hi. Ahih hangin keimah in, “Ka lungkham hi; ka lungkham hi. Gimna ngah hi ta ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khemte in khemkhem lai-in sia semsem uh a, khem zawh thu mah ciamciam lai uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah24:17 Leitung a a teeng mite aw, note adingin launa, gum le thangzakte om hi." 
Isaiah24:18 Lauhuaina panin a tai mipa gum sungah kia dinga, gum sung panin a taikhiat ciangin thangzak sungah awk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh van panin guahpi hong bua sukin leitung bulpite kiliing ding hi." 
Isaiah24:19 Leitung khang khamin kilok gawp dinga, kiphelkham ding hi." 
Isaiah24:20 Leitung pumpi zukham bangin hoi dinga, huihpiʼ mut gawp buk bangin awn ding hi. Ama mawhnate in nengcip gawp dinga, amah pukin thokik zo ngei nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah24:21 Tua ni ciangin Topa in vantung a om mihonpite le leitung kumpite gim pia ding hi. 
Isaiah24:22 Dum sunga om thongkiate bangin amaute khempeuh kikaikhawm ding hi. Thong sungah amaute kikhaknelh dinga, ni tampi khit ciangin amaute gim kipia pan ding hi." 
Isaiah24:23 Tua ciangin khapi mial dinga, ni taang nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in Zion Mual tung le Jerusalem khua sungah uk dinga, ama upateʼ mai ah ama minthanna vang kilangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah25:1 Topa aw, nang pen keima Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah kong liansak dinga, nangma min ka phat ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang nate na sem khin a, tanglai pek a na geelnate a kip a kho takpi ahi hi." 
Isaiah25:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang in khuapi ninbu lomtang na suah a, a muanhuai khuapi a sia na suaksak hi. Mi kiphasakteʼ kumpi inn pen khua bang nawn lo a, cikmah hunin kilamkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah25:3 Tua ahih ciangin mi thahatte in nangma min hong thangsak dinga, thu khual lo minamteʼ khuapite in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah25:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen mizawngte adingin mun muanhuai, a cimawh mite adingin a lungkhamna uh ah mun muanhuai, huihpi panin bukna le nisa panin niliim na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thu khual lo miteʼ hihna pen huihpi in kulh a nawk gawp tawh kibang a," 
Isaiah25:5 mun keuna ah nisa mahmah tawh kibang hi. Nang in mi kiphasakteʼ gamlumna na daisak hi. Meii liim in nisa a votsak bangin thu khual lo miteʼ lasakna kitawpsak ta hi. 
Isaiah25:6 Vanglian Topa in hih mual tungah mi khempeuh adingin an lim nekna pawi, a ciil mahmah leenggahzu nekna pawi, guhngek tawh a kidim annekna, a siangtho leenggahzu ciil nekna pawi bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah25:7 Amah in mi khempeuhʼ khuk dahna puan le minam khempeuhʼ silh dahna puante, hih mual tungah susia ding hi." 
Isaiah25:8 Amah in sihna beisak mang dinga, maitang khempeuh panin khitui nul ding hi. Leitung khempeuh panin ama mite a kizahkona la khia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih thu gen khinzo hi." 
Isaiah25:9 Tua ni ciangin, “En un, amah pen eima Pasian ahi hi. Eite a hong hon dingin amah i ngak hi. Amah pen eima Topa ahi hi. Amah i ngak hi. Amah in eite hong hon khia ahih manin lungdamin kipak ni,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah25:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih Zion Mual hu dinga, ahi zongin Moab mite ahihleh ninkholna dum sungah buhkungte a kisikcip bangin kisikcip gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah25:11 Tuipeek pa in tui peek dingin a khutte a van bangin amaute in a khut uh vanvan ding uh a, ahih hangin a khut uh a van simin a kiphatsaknate uh a khut uh tawh bengtum suk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah25:12 Amah in Moab miteʼ kulh muanhuaite suksiatsakin leilak denna dinga, leivui suak khin mang ding hi." 
Isaiah26:1 Tua ni ciangin Judah gam sungah hih la kisa ding hi: Khuapi muanhuai khat i nei a, Topa mahmah in i kulhte le i panmun kipte hong hutsak hi." 
Isaiah26:2 Upna ah a kip thuman minamte a lut theih nadingin kulh kongpite hong ta un. 
Isaiah26:3 Topa aw, nang hong muang a, nangma tungah a lungsim khempeuh a koih mipa lungnopna kicing pia ta in." 
Isaiah26:4 Topa Pasian in eite khempeuh hong hu tawntung ahih manin Topa muang tawntung un. 
Isaiah26:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a kiphasak mite niamkhiat suk hi. Amauʼ teenna khuapi muanhuai suksiatsak a, a kulhpite den khap sakin leivui a suah hi." 
Isaiah26:6 A zawng a cimawh a kinengniam mite in tu-in tua khua tuancil uh hi. 
Isaiah26:7 Midik paʼ lampi tamkim a, nangmah in midik paʼ lampi na neelsak hi." 
Isaiah26:8 Topa aw, nangma deihna kong zui uh a, nang kong ngak uh hi. Nang pen koteʼ deih kicinna na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:9 Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh zanin nang kong deih a, zingsang khuavak ciangin lungsim tak tawh nang kong zong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung le a mite tungah thu na khen ciangin leitung a a teeng mite in thuman i cih bang hiam, cih a phawk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah26:10 Migilote tungah nangmah na migit hangin a manin gamtat ding theithei tuan lo uh a, lungsim thutang miteʼ gam sungah amaute in khialhna bawl lai veve uh hi. Amaute in Topa ’ minliatna hong phawk nuam lo uh hi." 
Isaiah26:11 Topa aw, amaute gim na piak ding lamtak na galte in thei lo uh hi. Amaute maizumna thuaksak inla, amaute adingin na geel sa gimnate amaute thuaksak in. Na mite na itna thu na galte tungah kilangsak in." 
Isaiah26:12 Topa aw, kote tungah maavanna hong pia in. Koteʼ matut zawhna khempeuh nangmah in na hong sepsakna hang ahi hi." 
Isaiah26:13 Topa, koteʼ Pasian aw, nang ahi lo to dangte in ko tungah hong uk hangin, nangmah bek mah koteʼ Topa na hi hi." 
Isaiah26:14 Amaute si a, hingkik lo ding uh hi. Amaute mangthang ta uh a, omkik nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua bang a pian theih nadingin nangmah in amaute tungah siatna na tungsak a, amaute a kiphawkna khempeuh na beisak hi." 
Isaiah26:15 Ahih hangin nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak hi. Topa aw, nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak a, gamgi khempeuh na hong keeksak khin hi. Hih thu hangin nangma min a thang hi." 
Isaiah26:16 Topa aw, ka cihmawh uh ciangin nang kong zong uh a, nangma hong taina pen kote nong gimpiakna ahi hi." 
Isaiah26:17 Topa aw, nangma hangin kote pen naupaii numei a hun a nai ciangin na sa-in kiheek a, a kap tawh ka kibang uh hi." 
Isaiah26:18 Kote in naupaii-in ka kiheekheek uh a, huih bek a hing khia tawh ka kibang uh hi. Kote in ka gam uh ading bangmah ka suakkhiasak kei uh a, leitungah a teeng ding mi kuamah ka hing khia kei uh hi." 
Isaiah26:19 Nangma mi a si sate hingkik ding uh a, amauʼ pumpi thokik ding hi. Han sungah a lum mite aw, tho-in lungdamin la sa un! Bang hang hiam cih leh zing daitui in leitung a nosakkik bangin sawtpi a a si sa mite Topa in hingkiksak ding hi." 
Isaiah26:20 Ka mite aw, hong pai-in na inn sung uh ah tum unla, na kongte uh khak un. Hehna a dam matengin tawl khat sung bu un." 
Isaiah26:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, amauʼ mawhna hangin leitungah a teeng mite gim a pia dingin ama omna panin Topa hong paikhia a, leitung in ama tunga a kithat mite lak khia dinga, a kithat ama mite sincip nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah27:1 Tua ni ciangin Topa in a sak mahmah, a lian mahmah, a to mahmah namsau tawh, a tai khia gulpi ahi Awle, a kikualvial gulpi ahi Awle gim pia dinga, amah in tuipi sunga om tua gulpi a that ding hi." 
Isaiah27:2 Tua ni ciangin, “A deihhuai leenggah lo thu la-in sa un!" 
Isaiah27:3 Keimah, Topa, tua lo a hong pa ka hi a, a hunhunin tui ka buak hi. Khatpeuh in a suksiat loh nadingin sun le zanin ka hong ding hi." 
Isaiah27:4 Leenggui lo tungah ka heh nawn kei hi. Ling le lingkungte hong om leh keimah kuan khia-in tuate ka hal tum ding hi. 
Isaiah27:5 Tua ahih kei leh keima hutna sungah amaute hong om henla, amaute in kei tawh kilemna hong bawlin keimah tawh amaute hong kilem ta uh hen,” Topa in ci ding hi." 
Isaiah27:6 Hong tung ding hunah Jakob in zungkha dinga, Israel palhin dawn khia dinga, leitung khempeuh a gah tawh kidimsak ding hi." 
Isaiah27:7 Pasian in Israel-teʼ galte a vat gawp bangin Israel-te vat gawp ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh amau a thatte a kithah bangin Israel-te kithat ahi hiam? 
Isaiah27:8 A kithukkim dingin amaute sal suahsakna tawh gim a pia hi. Nisuahna huihpi in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a khiin khia hi. 
Isaiah27:9 Israel in suang tawh a kibawl biakna tau khempeuh suangkang satvui a batsak ciangin Asherah milimte le paknamtui taute a ding lai om nawn lo hi. Hih thu hangin Jakobʼ mawhna kimaisakin a mawhna kilak khiatsak hi. 
Isaiah27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh a muanhuai khuapi pen gamlak bangin amah guakin omin, miʼ teenna mun pen kitaisanin kinusia hi. Tua lai ah bawng no gamta-in lum a, sing hiangte a kheuh hi." 
Isaiah27:11 A hiangte a keu ciangin kitan hi. Nupite hong pai-in mei-in cih uh hi. Hih mite in khentel theihna nei lo ahih ciangin amaute a bawlpa in amaute hehpih lo dinga, amaute a piangsak pa in amaute tungah maipha lak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah27:12 Israel mite aw, tua ni ciangin Eufratis gunpi panin Egypt luipi dongin Topa in thu hong khen dinga, note khatkhatin hong kikaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah27:13 Tua ni ciangin peengkul lianpi khat kitum dinga, Assiria gam sunga a mangthang mite le Egypt gam sunga a kihawl khia mite hong pai-in Jerusalem mual siangtho tungah Topa hong bia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah28:1 Israel Kumpi gam in siatna a thuak ding hi ta hi. Zu a kham, a gam makaiteʼ lu tungah a om pak tawh a kibawl Kumpi lukhu bangin a minthanna maimang ta hi. A lutang uh paknamtui kinuh napi-in zukhamin tuk mangkhin uh hi." 
Isaiah28:2 En un, a vang a lian, a hat mahmah mi khat Topa in nei hi. A susia huihpi gialpi, tuikhang le a thahat huihpi bangin amah in leilak den gawp nading hi." 
Isaiah28:3 Israel zukham makaite in a kiphatsakpih kumpi lukhu pen khe nuai ah kituancil ding hi. 
Isaiah28:4 Tua a kiphasak zukham makaiteʼ minthanna pen tuk tun ma-in a om theipal min tawh kibang dinga, mi khat in tua theigah a muh ciangin lo in a nek pah bangin maimang lel ding hi." 
Isaiah28:5 Tua ni ciangin Vanglian Topa pen ama mi a omlaite adingin minthanna kumpi lukhu le hoihna lukhu hi ding hi. 
Isaiah28:6 Thukhenin a tupa tungah thutang lungsim guan dinga, khuapi kulh hong luh galte a not khia ding mite tungah hanna lungsim guan ding hi." 
Isaiah28:7 Hih mite zong leenggahzu tawh hoi-in khamtheih zu tawh awn uh hi. Siampite le kamsangte nangawn zukhamin hoi uh hi. Kamsangte in zu kham lua uh ahih manin Pasianʼ muhsak maangmuhnate theithei lo uh a, siampite in zong zu kham lua uh ahih manin a thukhen dingte uh khen thei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah28:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh sabuai tung khempeuh a luak uh tawh kidim a, a nit lohna mun om lo hi." 
Isaiah28:9 Amaute in kei hong phunsan uh a, “Amah in kua tungah hilh a, kua tungah thugen a kinei ahi hiam? Ang sung panin a kila khia, nawi tawh a kikhen tung naungekte a hilh a kinei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah28:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bang hi lel hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Isaiah28:11 A mantakin, note in ka thugen na ngaih kei uh leh Topa in a pau na theih loh uh gamdang mite, note tungah thu hong hilhsak ding hi." 
Isaiah28:12 Topa in note tungah tawlngakna le lungnopna hong pia napi-in, note in ama thu na ngai kei uh hi." 
Isaiah28:13 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in note tungah, mal khat khit mal khat, gual khat khit gual khat, thu khat khit thu khat, cih bangin hong hilh ding ahi hi. Tua ciangin na kalsuanna khempeuh uh ah na puk ding uh a, note liamin, thang ah awkin, salin hong kipaipih ding hi." 
Isaiah28:14 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khua sungah hih mite a uk, a kiphasak no uliante aw, Topa ’ thu za un!" 
Isaiah28:15 “Eite in sihna tawh thuciamna khat i bawl khin a, Leinuai tawh thukimna khat i nei zo hi. A tuumcip ding tuiciin hong tun ciangin eite hong ban lo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zuau thu i bel a, zuauna ah i bu hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Isaiah28:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, keimah in Zion sungah bulpi ding khat, suang, a kize-et sa suang, a manpha innkiu suang, bulpi muanhuai khat ka koih hi. Tua suang tungah, ‘Hih a um mi in lungkhamna tuak lo ding hi,’ ci-in kigelh hi." 
Isaiah28:17 Keimah in thutang pen khaukhai bangin ka bawl dinga, thuman pen khaukhai sikbawk bangin ka bawl ding hi. Gial in na zuau buk uh deng khia dinga, tui in na bukna mun uh susia ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah28:18 Tua ciangin sihna tawh na thuciamna uh kiphiat dinga, Leinuai tawh na thukimna uh kip lo ding hi. A tuumcip ding tuiciin in a hong nawk ciangin note hong su gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah28:19 Hong nawk sialin note hong ban ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh zingsang khat khit zingsang khat, sun le zanin hong nawk tawntung ding hi. Topa ’ tung panin na zak uh thute a banbanin launa lianpi vive hi ding hi." 
Isaiah28:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh puanbuk sungah khe khuan nadingin lupna tom lua a, silh dingin puanza neu lua hi, a cih tawh na kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah28:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh a lamdang ama bawlte a bawl ding le a lamdang ama nasep a sem dingin Perazim Mual tungah a sep bangin Topa in hong sem dinga, Gibeon kuama a heh bangin amah hong heh ding hi." 
Isaiah28:22 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, note hong kikhihna a to mahmah in kibawl kha ding ahih manin thusim loin om kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihonpiteʼ Topa Pasian ’ tung panin gam buppi ah siat nading thukhenna ka za khin hi." 
Isaiah28:23 Na bil uh hong ngat unla, ka aw hong za un. Ngai unla, ka thugenna hong za un." 
Isaiah28:24 Lokho pa in khaici tuhna ding a lo kho niloh ahi hiam? Amah in lei kalkhamin git niloh ahi hiam? 
Isaiah28:25 Amah in lei a zalh tam khit ciangin masala tang vawhin, kummin tang tuh a, mangbuhte a gualgualin tuhin, mangbuhham a omna ding sanah tuh a, mangbuh hamte a nawl hui ah tuh hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah28:26 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a manin kihilh a, ama Pasian in amah hilh hi." 
Isaiah28:27 Masalate buhcilna tawh kicil lo a, kummin tangte tungah buhcilna pei kihual lo hi. Ahih hangin masalate ciangkang tawh kisat khia a, kumminte molhtum tawh kisat hi." 
Isaiah28:28 Mi khatpeuh in antang cilvui ahi hiam? Hi lo hi; amah in cil paisuak ngitnget lo hi. A sakol tawh buhcilna pei a kihualsak ciangin amah in kitamvuisak lo hi. 
Isaiah28:29 Hih zong Vanglian Topa ’ kiang pan a hong pai thu ahi hi. Amah pen thu lamlahna ah lamdang mahmah a, pilna ah lian mahmah hi." 
Isaiah29:1 Pasianʼ biakna tau, Jerusalem khuapi, David in a sat khuapi, a sia ding hi ta hi. Kumte, a banbanin paipaisak unla, pawite zong a ngeina bangin kot paipaisak un." 
Isaiah29:2 Ahih hangin keimah in “Pasian biakna tau,” a kici tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Thumna le tauna om dinga, tua khuapi pen biakna halna biakna tau suak ding hi." 
Isaiah29:3 Na kimkot ah hong umcihin tausangpite tawh kong um dinga, nangmah umcih nading dum ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah29:4 Tua ciangin lei thuk sung panin nang na pau dinga, a niamna mun lei sung panin nangma kammal hong ging ding hi. Nangma aw pen lei sung panin sikhaʼ aw bangin hong ging dinga, na thugenna pen lei sung panin hong phun suausuau ding hi." 
Isaiah29:5 Ahih hangin nangma gal honpite leivui neel leeng bang ding uh a, thu khual lo mihonpite ansi leeng bang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin tom kha sungin thakhat thu-in," 
Isaiah29:6 Vanglian Topa in vanging, zin liing, a ging lianpi, pingpei le huihpi le, a kaang tum thei meikuang tawh nang hong hon ding hi." 
Isaiah29:7 Tua ciangin Pasian biakna tau a do minam honpite khempeuh, tua khuapi le a kulhpi simin a lungkhamsakte khempeuh, zan a mangmat tawh kibangin maimang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:8 A gilkial mipa in a mangin an ne a, a khanlawh ciangin a gil a vah tuan lo, a dangtak mipa in a mangin tui dawn a, a dangtak pha tuan loin a gim mahmah in a khanlawh mah bangin Jerusalem khuapi a do mi khempeuh zong tua ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:9 Lamdang kisasak unla lamdang a sa hi un! Kimittawsak unla a mittaw hi un! Leenggahzu a dawn lopi-in a zukham hi unla, khamtheih zu a ne lopi-in hoi un!" 
Isaiah29:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in noteʼ sungah ihmut nopna lungsim hong guan a, amauʼ mit ahi kamsangte mit si sakin amauʼ lutang ahi thu mu theite khuhcip hi." 
Isaiah29:11 Hih maangmuhnate khempeuh pen note adingin ahihleh a kimatcip laibu sunga thu om tawh a kibang a suak hi. Mite in lai a sim thei pa khat tungah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih ciangin amah in, “Kimatcip ahih manin ka sim thei kei hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah29:12 Tua ciangin amaute in lai a sim thei lopa kiangah, “Hih lai sim dih in,” a cih uh ciangin amah in, “Ka sim thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah29:13 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Amauteʼ lungsim kei tawh kigamla napi-in hih mite in a kam uh tawh kei kiangah hong pai uh a, a muk uh tawh kei hong pahtawi-in, amaute in kei hong kihtakna pen mihingteʼ thupiak a zuihna uh ahi lel hi." 
Isaiah29:14 Tua ahih ciangin en un, hih mite tungah a tumdang le a lamdang ahi a lamdang nate ka bawlkik ding hi. Amauʼ mipilteʼ pilna kisia dinga, amauʼ thu-mu-theiteʼ thu muhtel theihna kiseel ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah29:15 Topa ’ kiang panin amauʼ thu vaihawmna a seelcip, khuamial sungah a gamta, “Kua in hong mu ding hiam? Kua in hong thei ding hiam?” a cite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah29:16 Note in na khempeuh a lehlamin na koih uh hi. Beelseek pa pen tungman bangin kingaihsun dinga, a kibawl sa na in a bawlpa tungah, “Amah in kei hong bawl lo hi,” ci ding ahi hiam? A kipiangsak na in a piangsak pa tungah, “Amah in theihna nei kei,” ci ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah29:17 Lebanon mual pen singno lo hoih suakin, singno lo hoih pen tulak a suah nading hun tomno sung bek hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah29:18 Tua ni ciangin bilngongte in laibu sunga thute za dinga, lungzinna le khua mialna sung panin mittawteʼ mit in mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:19 Miʼ nopnehte in Topa ’ sungah lungdamna thak ngah ding uh a, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ sungah mizawngte lungdam ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:20 Bang hang hiam cih leh kampauna tawh a khialh nadingun mite bawlin, kongpi sungah mi a thuhilhpa thang siahin, a thuman mipa pen zuau thu tawh a hei khia, thu khual lo mite a mawkna suakin, mi a thusim lo mite bei-in, siatna hih ding a sawm mite khempeuh kisusia ding hi." 
Isaiah29:21  
Isaiah29:22 Tua ahih ciangin Abraham a hon khia Topa in Jakob innkuan tawh kisai thu a genin ah: “Jakob maizum nawn lo dinga, a mai khing nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah29:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima khut tawh ka bawl sa amauʼ tate a muh uh ciangin amaute in keima min hong phat ding uh hi. Amaute in Jakobʼ Siangtho Pa, a siangtho ahihna phawk ding uh a, Israel Pasian zahtakin kihta ding uh hi." 
Isaiah29:24 Lungzingin a khial mite in thu thei tel ta ding uh a, a phunphun mite in thuhilhna ngai ta ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:1 Topa in, “Keiʼ ngimna hi lopi-in thu vaihawmna a sem khia, keiʼ lungsim lopi-in kipawlna dang a bawl manun khialhna a bawl thuahthuah; keimah thu hong dong lopi-in Faroʼ hutna sung a beel ding le Egyptʼ liahna a zong dingin Egypt gamah pai suk dingin a kuan khia, a lehdo mite in gimna ngah tahen." 
Isaiah30:2  
Isaiah30:3 Tua ahih ciangin Faroʼ hutna pen na maizumna uh hi dinga, Egypt liahna sungah na bukna uh nomauʼ zahhuaina hi ding hi." 
Isaiah30:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ uliante Zoan khua ah va tung uh a, amauʼ taangmite in Hanes khua a va phak uh hangin," 
Isaiah30:5 amaute tungah phattuamna a pia thei lo, maizumna le mindaina cih loh buang huhna le phattuamna bangmah a pia thei lo Egypt miteʼ hangin Judah mi khempeuh in maizumna ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:6 Negeb gam a om ganhingte tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Amaute in humpinelkai nu le humpinelkai pa, gul gunei le a leeng thei gulpi a omna, lungkhamna le gimna gam nawkin, amauʼ hauhnate la nungzang ah amauʼ sumte kalaoh tungah suanin, amaute tungah phattuamna bangmah a pia thei lo mite tungah a puak uh hi." 
Isaiah30:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egyptʼ huhna bangmah man loin a hawmpi ahi hi. Tua ahih manin, “Taang loin a tu hithiat Egypt,” ci-in min ka phuah hi." 
Isaiah30:8 Tu-in pai inla, hong tung lai ding hunte ah teci ahi ngitnget dingin amauteʼ mai ah suangpek tungah gelh inla, laibu khat sungah at in." 
Isaiah30:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen a lehdo mite, a zuau thei tapate, Topa ’ thuhilhna a ngai nuam lo mite ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah30:10 Amaute in thu mu theite tungah, “Mu kei un,” ci uh a, kamsangte tungah, “Koteʼ tungah thuman hong gen kei un. Kote tungah thuzol bek hong gen unla, thutak ahi lote hong gen un." 
Isaiah30:11 Lampi nusia-in, lamzin panin pial unla, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ thu hong zasak kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah30:12 Tua ahih ciangin Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa in, “Note in hih thu simmawhin, zawhthawhna le khemna suangin, tuate muang na hih manun," 
Isaiah30:13 hih mawhna pen note adingin kulh sangpi khat khang kham a, lawt khia-in a cim dektak, theih kholh lohin a cim vat tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:14 Tua cipna pen iplah ding om nawn loin a kideng kham beelseek paʼ beel themte meikhuk a om meilakna ding ahi zongin, tuikhuk a om tui dipna ding ahi zongin a om nawn het lo tawh kibang ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah30:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, Topa Pasian in, “Kiheikikna le khawlna bek tawh note in suahtakna na ngah ding uh hi. Daitakin omna le muanna pen nomauʼ thahatna hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin note na tua ci kei uh a," 
Isaiah30:16 “Hi lo! Sakol tung tuangin manlang takin i tai ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note na tai khia ding uh hi. “Sakol zaptel tungah i tuang ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note hong delh mite zong zaptel ding hi." 
Isaiah30:17 Mual sang dawna om dial khuam ahi a, mual tunga limlahna tawh a kibangin ahi zongin, note hong kinusiat dong matengin, mi khatʼ tawnna tawh mi tul khat tai-in, mihing ngaʼ tawnna tawh note khempeuh na tai mang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:18 Tua ahih ciangin note hong hehpih nuamin Topa in hong ngak a, note tungah hehpihna hong lah ding amah kipakta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thutang Pasian hi a, amah a muangte khempeuh thupha ngah ahi hi." 
Isaiah30:19 Jerusalem khua sunga a teeng, Zion sunga om mite aw, note na kap nawn kei ding uh hi. Noteʼ kahna aw hangin Topa in hong hehpih taktak dinga, amah in a zak ciangin note hong dawng ding hi." 
Isaiah30:20 Topa in note tungah cihmawhna le gimna hong tunsak hangin a mahmah in note hong hilh dinga, note in amah na mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:21 Tak lamah na kihei ciang uh ahi a, veilamah na kihei ciang uh ahi zongin, “Hih pen lampi hi, hih tawn un,” cihna aw, na nung lam panun na bil un a za ding hi." 
Isaiah30:22 Tua ciangin note in ngun tawh a kizut na milimte uh le kham a kiluan, a kisung na milimte uh na ninsak ding uh hi. Nin bangin tuate na thehthang ding uh a, tuate tungah, “Bei mang ta un!” na ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:23 Khaici na tuh nadingun amah in guah hong zusak dinga, lei panin a piang an hoih tampi tak hong pia ding hi. Tua ni ciangin gankhahna, mun zaina ah na ganhingte un lopa ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:24 Lo a kho bawngtalte le late in kawbia le tu-ka tawh a kitok sa an al ne ding uh hi. 
Isaiah30:25 Na galte uhʼ tausangte pukin mi tampi a sih ni-in, mual sang le mual neute tung khempeuh ah luitui luang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:26 Tua tham loin, Topa in ama miteʼ liamma tuamin ama satna meimate a damsak ni ciangin, khataang pen nitaang bang dinga, nitaang pen ni sagih sunga taang zah bangin a zah sagihin a taang ding hi." 
Isaiah30:27 En un, Topa ’ vangliatna le a minthanna vang, gamlapi panin kimu thei hi. Meikuang le meikhu in ama hehna hong kilangsak a, ama kampaunate, mei bangin a kuang hi." 
Isaiah30:28 Na khempeuh a tai tuikhang bangin ama mai ah huihpi nungsak a, minam dangte nawtin su gawp a, amauʼ gitloh vaihawmnate a suksiatsak hi." 
Isaiah30:29 Ahi zongin no Pasianʼ mite in ahihleh biakna pawi a kikham ni zan a bangin la na sa ding uh hi. Israel-te a hu Topa ’ biakinn ah a pai dingin tamngai aw ginna zui-in a kuan khiate bangin na lungdam ding uh hi. 
Isaiah30:30 Topa in heh mahmahna le a kaang tum thei meikuang sung panin vanging, huihpi le gialpi tawh, ama liatna minthanna aw kizasakin, ama khut a vik sukna kimusak ding hi." 
Isaiah30:31 Amah in a ciangkhut tawh a sat ciangin, Assiria mite in Topa ’ aw kihta mahmah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah30:32 Topa in amaute gim pia-in ciang tawh a satna a gingte tawh kituakin khuang le laiza lasaknate tumin na gingsak ding uh hi. Amah in a khut vikin amaute a do ding hi. 
Isaiah30:33 Assiria kumpipa a kihalna ding mei phualpi mun, sawtpekin kibawl khinzo hi. Kumpipa adingin a baih sa-in kikoih a, a mi halna pen lianin kisangsak a, sing a sangpi-in vum venvan hi. Topa in kaat kuang hu sang khia dinga, tua mei phualpi tawhkuang ding hi." 
Isaiah31:1 Egypt gamah huhna ngen dingin pai suk a, sakol suanin nei-in leengte a tam manin muang a, sakol tung tuangte a hat mahmah manin muang napi-in Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa a suang lo, Topa thu a dong lote in gimna ngah tahen!" 
Isaiah31:2 Ahih hangin amah pilin gimna tungsak a, thu a gen sate dokkik loin, siatna a bawl mite le mawhna nasep a seppihte gim a pia hi." 
Isaiah31:3 Egypt mite mihing hi a, Pasian hi lo hi. Amauʼ sakolte sa hi a, kha hi lo hi. Topa in a khut a zan ciangin a huhpa pukin, huhna a ngah pa tuk dinga, amaute khempeuh siakhawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah31:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in keima tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: Humpinelkai ahi a, humpinelkai khanglai a hat mahmah in ahi zongin a sa nek ding a ngik ciangin tua humpi a do dingin tuucing honpi khat kikaikhawmin, amauteʼ otna hangin lau tuan het loin, amauteʼ gamlumna hangin a sin a dawi tuan loh mah bangin Vanglian Topa zong Zion Mual tungah galdo dingin kuan suk ding hi." 
Isaiah31:5 A bu a hongin, a kot lamlam vasate bangin Vanglian Topa in Jerusalem dal ding hi. Amah in dalin khah khia dinga, amah susia loin suaktasak ding hi." 
Isaiah31:6 Israel mite aw, nakpi takin na do pa uhʼ lamah kiheikik un." 
Isaiah31:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in no adingin na bawl sa uh, mawhna ahi na ngun milimte uh na paihkhiat hun uh hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah31:8 “Assiria pen mihingʼ namsau ahi lo, namsau khat tawh puk dinga, mihingʼ namsau ahi lo, namsau khat in susia ding hi. Namsau panin tai ding uh a, a tangvalte uh zawhthawh thu tawh nasem dingin kikoih ding hi." 
Isaiah31:9 Amauʼ belh a kumpipa uh a launa hangin tai dinga, buaina hangin a uliante in a dialkhai uh taisan ding uh hi,” ama meikuang Zion ah a om, ama meikhuk Jerusalem khua ah a om Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah32:1 En un, ni khat ni ciangin thuman takin kumpi khat in hong uk dinga, uliante in thutang tawh hong uk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:2 Amaute pen huihpi panin belhna, guahpi panin bukna bang ding uh hi. Sehnel gam sungah a luang tui bang ding uh a, nisa gam sungah a om suangpi liim bang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:3 Tua ciangin amauʼ mit in mi cimawhteʼ kisapna mu ding uh a, amauʼ bil in mi cimawhteʼ thugen ngai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:4 Amaute lungtomin hi phangphang nawn lo ding uh a, deihsakna lungsim tawh a kitel takin thu gen hiathiat ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:5 Mihaite pen mi thupi kici nawn lo dinga, migina lote pen mi zahtakhuai kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah32:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh mihai in haina thu gen a, a hoihin gamtat loh ding, Topa ’ thu a hoih lopi-in gen ding, a gilkialteʼ an duhna a phat loh nading le a dangtakte in tui dawn ding a neih theih loh nadingin, ama lungsim in mawhna bawl ding a sawm hi." 
Isaiah32:7 Migina loʼ ginat lohna siahuai mahmah hi. Zuauna kam tawh mizawngte a siasak ding le mi cimawhteʼ thu a thuman ciang nangawnin a siasak dingin amah in gitloh nasepna a bawl hi. 
Isaiah32:8 Ahih hangin mipi lungsim a nei mi in na a hoihte geel a, thuhoih nate ah a pang hi." 
Isaiah32:9 Nuam takin a om hithiat numeite aw, tho unla, ka aw za un. Nomauʼ tumtakin a lungkim tanute aw, ka thugenna na ngai un." 
Isaiah32:10 Nomauʼ tumtakin a lungkim numeite aw, kum khat val zek khit ciangin na liing lawng ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leenggah kum hong sia dinga, singgah lawhna hun hong tung lo ding hi." 
Isaiah32:11 Nuam takin a om hithiat numeite aw, liing un. Nomau tumtakin a lungkimte aw, liing lawng un. Na puan uh hawk khia-in na tangguakun om unla na kawng uh ah puanhampi teng un." 
Isaiah32:12 A hoih mahmah lote le tampi a gah leengguite a siatna, keima miteʼ leitang ah ling le lingkungte a pona, lungdamna khuapi sungah lungdamna a omna innte a siatna hangin dahin na dip uh hum un." 
Isaiah32:13  
Isaiah32:14 Kumpi innte kinusia-in, mi tampi a omna kumpi khuapi kilawi ding hi. Mual le tausangte zong kisia gawp dinga, late le tuuhonte in gamtatna munin nei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:15 Ahi zongin Pasian in ama kha hong puak ding hi. Leitang siate leihoih suakkik dinga, lo-a ante hoih mahmah in tulak bang ding hi." 
Isaiah32:16 Tua ciangin gam sung mun khempeuh ah thutang om dinga, thu a manin kisem ding hi." 
Isaiah32:17 Tua ciangin thumanna hangin nopna om dinga, thumanna hangin daihna le lungmuan tawntungna om ding hi." 
Isaiah32:18 Ka mihingte pen kilem takin a teenna, lungmuang takin a omna, daitakin a tawlngakna munah om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah32:19 (Tua ciangin tulak kolh siang dinga, a khuapi pen cim zan ding hi.)" 
Isaiah32:20 Tui tampi a omna ah khai tuh a, bawngtal le late a ututna ah a tasak note pen mi nuamsa na hi uh hi." 
Isaiah33:1 Hong kisusia nai lo, mi a susia pa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hi ta hi. Kuamah in hong khem nai loh, mi khem pa aw, tu-in gimna a ngah ding na hi ta hi. Na suksiat nawn loh ciangin nang hong kisusia dinga, na khem nawn loh ciangin nang hong kikhem ding hi." 
Isaiah33:2 Topa aw, kote hong hehpih in; nang kong muang uh hi. A tawntungin kote hong hu inla, lungkham hunin hong hon khia in." 
Isaiah33:3 Nangma vanging hangin mite tai uh a, nangma thawh tohna hangin minamte kithehthang hi." 
Isaiah33:4 Tangngol in na a khop bangin amau van kinusiate kaikhawm a, kauphe honpi bangin van tawmin mite phe zaizai hi." 
Isaiah33:5 A sangna munah teeng ahih manin Topa kipahtawi hi. Amah in thutang le thuman tawh Jerusalem dimsak ding hi. 
Isaiah33:6 Amah pen nangma hunte a kipna, hotkhiatna a kicinna, pilna le theihna hi ding hi. Topa kihtakna pen ama sumgum hi ding hi." 
Isaiah33:7 En un, galhangte huhna ngenin kiko uh a, kilem nading palai semte nakpi takin kap uh hi." 
Isaiah33:8 Lam lianpite gambulak suak a, kuamah khualzinin pai ngam nawn lo uh hi. Thuciamnate kipeksatin, thukimna sate kipalsat a, khatlekhat kizahtakna om nawn lo hi." 
Isaiah33:9 Leitang kinusiacipin om mawk hi. Lebanon mual a tulak singte vul gawp a, Sharon gam leihoih pen sehnel gam bang ta hi. Bashan le Karmel mual a singtehte pulh mang khinta hi." 
Isaiah33:10 Topa in minam dangte kiangah, “Tu-in ka gamtang dinga, ka vangliatna ka lak ding hi. Tu-in kei hong kipahtawi ta ding hi." 
Isaiah33:11 Na geelnate uh a kimanna om lo a, na nasepnate uh a mawkna ahi hi. No le no a kisusia na hi uh hi." 
Isaiah33:12 Leikang ngah nadingin suangkang a kihal bangin na vui suak ding uh a, meikhuk sunga a kihal tum lingkungte na bang ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah33:13 Gamlapi-a a om mite aw, ka sepna thu za un. A nai-a a om mite aw, ka vangliatna thei un." 
Isaiah33:14 Zion-a a om mawhnei mite lau uh a, Pasianʼ thu a ngaihsun lo mite lau-in liingcip uh hi. Amaute in, “Pasianʼ thukhenna pen a kuang tawntung mei tawh kibang hi. Tua bang meikuang kua in thuak zo ding ahi hiam?” ci uh hi." 
Isaiah33:15 Thumanin gamta-in thutang na gen uh leh na suakta ding uh hi. Na vangliatna uh mizawngte khemna-in zang kei unla, sumgolh deih kei un. Mi thah ding le siatna gamtat ding a vaihawmte tawh kipawl kei un." 
Isaiah33:16 Tua hileh na tangtung ding uh a, kulh muanhuai mahmah sungah a om bangin lungnuam takin na om ding uh hi. Annek tui dawn na kitasam kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:17 Tua ciangin a thupi mahmah kumpipa na mu ding uh a, a zai mahmah a gam zong na en ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:18 Nidangin na kihtak uh gamdang mi siahdongte, siahkhawmte, thukan mite, na phawk nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:19 Na theihtheih loh uh, a kitel lo kampau a zang, na tel theih loh un a pau bualbual, mi kihisakte na mu nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:20 Pawite i bawlna khuapi Zion en un! Daitakin a kiteenna mun, a khetphimte kidok khia ngei loin a khaute a tat ngei lo, a kikhiin thei het lo puanbuk a bang, Jerusalem khuapi, na mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:21 Tua khua sungah Topa in ama minthanna vang hong langsak dinga, a zai gunte le a zai lui geite ah i teeng ding hi. Tua tuite tungah ei hong do ding gal gunkuang hong kihot nawn lo dinga, gal teembaw zong hong pai nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah33:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen eiteʼ thukhen, Topa pen eite hong ukpa, Topa pen eiteʼ kumpi ahi hi. Amah in eite hong hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah33:23 Gal teembaw khaute kol a, ama omna ding mun sanah gunkuang puan khuam lenkip zo lo a, gunkuang puan kizal thei lo hi. Tua ciangin galteʼ neihsate kihawm keek dinga, khebaite nangawn in van ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah33:24 I gamah a teeng mite kuamah in, “Ka ci na hi,” ci nawn lo ding uh a, mawhna khempeuh kimaisak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:1 Minam khempeuhte aw, thu za dingin hong pai un. Mihingte aw, hong ngai un! Leitang le a tungah a om khempeuhte aw, ngai un. Leitung buppi le a tung panin a hong pai mi khempeuh in ngai un." 
Isaiah34:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh minam khempeuh tungah Topa lunghamin, amaute khempeuh tungah heh mahmah a, a si mang dingin amaute koihin, thah dingin a pia khinta hi." 
Isaiah34:3 A kithat amauʼ mite kilawn khia dinga, a siluang hawmte uih semsem ding hi. Amauʼ sisan in mual khempeuh sansak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:4 Vantung a a om khempeuh muat mang dinga, laidal bangin vantungte kizial ding hi. Leenggui panin a tehte pulhin, theikung panin a tehte a pulh bangin aksi hon khempeuh pulh ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka namsau in vantungah a sep ding khempeuh a zawh khit ciangin, en un, a sia mang dinga ka seh sa Edom mite tungah thu a khen dingin hong kum suk ding hi." 
Isaiah34:6 Topa in namsau khat nei hi. Sisan tawh kidim dinga, biakpiakna tuuno si le keel si, tuutalteʼ kal thau tawh a kizolsak bang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Bozrah khua ah hih biakpiakna nei dinga, Edom gamah hih bang tampi thahna omsak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:7 Gamsial talte amaute tawh tukkhawm dinga, bawngtalno geh sate le bawngtal hatte tukkhawm ding hi. Amauʼ gam pen sisan tawh kidiah dinga, amauʼ leitang pen sathau in nipsak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:8 Topa in Zion a hotkhiat ding, a galte a thuksak ding hun khat a nei hi." 
Isaiah34:9 Luitui khempeuh kultal tui suak dinga, leitang pen kaat suak ding hi. Gam sung khempeuh pen a kuang kultal tui a suak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:10 Sun le zanin mit lo dinga, vantung lamah a khu kah to ngitnget ding hi. Khang khat pan khang khat, a hawmguakin om dinga, kuamah in nawk ngei nawn het lo ding hi." 
Isaiah34:11 Ahih hangin mu le sakuh in gam sungteng luah ding uh a, keising le va-akte om ding uh hi. Tua gam pen gam simtham suakin, hawmsuak ding hi." 
Isaiah34:12 Kumpi om lo Gam, ci-in amaute in min phuak ding uh a, a ulian khempeuhte a mawkna hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:13 Kumpi inn liante sungah lingkung po dinga, kulh a nei khua sungah laho le thangling kungte a po ding hi. Ngiateʼ an zonna mun suakin, vasa-kalaohteʼ omna mun hi ding hi." 
Isaiah34:14 Sangak le ngiate kikhawl ding uh a, keeldawi in a lawmte sam ding hi. Dawi zong hong tuak sukin ama omna ding mun a zong ding hi." 
Isaiah34:15 Tua munah keising in bu tomin, tua lai ah tui-in keuh dinga, ama liim ah a note huai ding hi. Musite zong kikhawm tuahin a nupa ciat un om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah34:16 Topa ’ laibu sung panin zong unla hih thu sim un. Hih ganhingte khempeuh khat beek zong mangthang lo dinga, lawm sam khat zong om lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu pia khinzo a, a mahmah in amaute kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah34:17 Amah in amaute adingin leitang hawmsak dinga, amauʼ tanh ding ciat a pia ding hi. Amaute in tua gam nei tawntung ding uh a, khang khat pan khang khat dongin teeng paisuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:1 Gamlak le lei keuna gam lungdam dinga, sehnel gam lungdamin palh khia ding hi. Unok pak bangin" 
Isaiah35:2 tampi takin palh khia dinga, lungnopna le lasakna tawh lungdam ding hi. Lebanon mual a minthanna, Karmel mual le Sharon mual a minliatna tua leitang in ngah ding hi. Mi khempeuh in Topa ’ minthanna, i Pasianʼ liatna mu ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:3 A zaw khutte khauhsak unla, a no khukte kipsak un." 
Isaiah35:4 Lungsim patau-in, a lauthawng mite kiangah, “Thakhauh un, lau kei un! En un, na galte uh tungah phu hong laksak dingin Pasian hong pai dinga, amah in note hong hon khia ding hi,” ci un." 
Isaiah35:5 Tua ciangin mittawteʼ mit kihong dinga, bilngongteʼ bil kihong ding hi." 
Isaiah35:6 Tua ciangin khebai mipa diangin lam dinga, a pau thei lo mipa in lungdamin la sa ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlak ah tui hong phul khia dinga, sehnel gam sungah luitui hong luang ding hi." 
Isaiah35:7 A sa mahmah sehnelte bualtui hong suak dinga, a keugaw leitang pen ciktui tawh hong kidim ding hi. Ngiateʼ omna ngei leitang pen nawngpi suakin, lopa, pumpeeng le mau, a po ding hi." 
Isaiah35:8 Tua lai ah lam lianpi khat om dinga, Lampi Siangtho kici ding hi. A siang lo mite in tua tung tawn ngei lo dinga, mihaite in tua lam a zui mite khialsak nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah35:9 Tua lai ah humpinelkai om lo dinga, sasial ne ganhing khat peuhpeuh hong pai lo ding hi. Tua lai ah ganhing lauhuaite kimu lo ding hi. Topa ’ hotkhiat sa mite in tua lampi tawnin hong ciah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah35:10 Topa ’ hotkhiat sa mite hong ciahkikin, lungdam tawntungna mai pua-in la sa kawmin Jerusalem ah hong tung ding uh hi. Amaute in lungdamna le kipakna ngah ding uh a, dahna le khuisatna om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah36:1 Kumpi Hezekiah in a uk zawh kum sawm li le ngana kumin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib in Judah gam sunga khuapi muanhuai khempeuh simin a la hi. 
Isaiah36:2 Lakhish khua panin Assiria kumpipa in Jerusalem khua-a kumpi Hezekiah a lut ding a gen dingin ama nuai-a ulian khat le galkap honpi a sawl hi. Puansawp paʼ nasepna phual zuatna lampi a bual tungnung tui lampi gei ah a ulian pa a khawl hi. 
Isaiah36:3 Tua ciangin amah tawh a kimu dingin Hilkiahʼ tapa ahi kumpi inn sung a saipa Eliakim le lai-at pa Shebna le Asafʼ tapa ahi thuciamteh pa Joah hong paikhia uh hi. 
Isaiah36:4 Tua ciangin a ulian pa in amaute kiangah a genna panin, “Hezekiah kiangah, ‘Kumpi lian ahi Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih na lungmuanna uh ah bang siksan na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah36:5 Kampau lel pen galdo nadingin vaihawmna le vangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Kei nong lehdo nadingun kua suang na hi uh hiam? 
Isaiah36:6 En un, ama tunga a kingam mipaʼ khut a sun ding, a kikuai tan sa pumpeeng ciangkhut tawh a kibang Egypt na suang uh hi. Amah a muang khempeuhteʼ tungah Egypt kumpipa Faro, tua pumpeeng bang hi lel hi." 
Isaiah36:7 Ahih hangin note in, “ Topa ka Pasian uh ka suang uh hi,” a ci-a kinei na hih uh leh ama mun sangte le biakna taute Hezekiah in la khia-in, Judah le Jerusalem tungah, “Hih biakna tau mai ah na bia ding uh hi,” ci hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah36:8 Tu-in hong pai unla, ka topa Assiria kumpipa tawh kiciamna khat bawl un. A tungah a tuang ding mi na ngah zawh nak uh leh sakol tul nih kong pia ding hi." 
Isaiah36:9 Egypt miteʼ leengte le sakol galkapte muanna tawh ka topaʼ nasemte lak panin a neu pen khat ahi galkap maang khat bek nangawn bangci-in not zo ding na hi uh hiam? 
Isaiah36:10 Tua tham loin, hih gam a susia dingin Topa ’ thu loin hong pai ka hi hiam? Topa in kei kiangah, “Pai to-in hih gam sim inla, susia in,” hong ci hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah36:11 Tua ciangin Eliakim, Shebna le Joah in a ulian pa kiangah, “Kote in thei ngawn ka hih manun na nasemte tungah Aram pau tawh hong gen hoh in. Kulh tunga om miteʼ zakna ah Judah pau tawh thu nong gen loh nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah36:12 Ahih hangin a ulian pa in, “Hih thute na topa uh le noteʼ tung bekah gen dinga, amauʼ ek mah ne-in amauʼ zun mah dawnin note tawh a siakhawm ding kulh tunga a tu mite tungah a gen lo dingin ka topa in hong sawl sa na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Isaiah36:13 Tua ciangin a ulian pa ding to-in, Judah pau-in nakpi takin kiko a, “Assiria kumpi, kumpi lianpaʼ thu za un!" 
Isaiah36:14 Kumpipa in, ‘Amah in note hong hon khia thei lo ding ahih manin Hezekiahʼ khem sa-in om kei un." 
Isaiah36:15 “ Topa in eite hong hon khia taktak dinga, hih khuapi pen Assiria kumpipa khut sungah kipia lo ding hi,” ci-in Hezekiah in hong genna tawh na Topa uh muang kha kei un." 
Isaiah36:16 Hezekiahʼ thu ngai kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: Kei tawh kilemna hong bawl unla kei kiangah hong pai un. Tua hileh kei hong pai-in, noteʼ gam tawh a kibang gam khat, an le leenggahzu gamah kong koih matengin note khempeuh in nomauʼ leenggah ciat, nomauʼ theigah ciat, na tuikhuk panun nomau tui ciat na ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah36:17  
Isaiah36:18 Hezekiah in, “ Topa in eite hong hon khia ding hi,” ci-in lam hong khialsak kha ding ahih ciangin kidawm un. Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sung panin minam dangteʼ pasian khatpeuh in ama gam hon khia zo ngei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamath gam le Arpad gam pasian-te koi ah om ahi hiam? Sefarvaim gam pasian-te koi ah om ahi hiam? Amaute in ka khut sung panin Samaria hon khia zo ahi hiam? 
Isaiah36:20 Topa in ka khut sung panin Jerusalem khua a hotkhiat nadingin, hih gamte khempeuhʼ pasian lakah kua in ka khut sung panin a gam uh hon khia zo ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah36:21 Ahih hangin kumpipa in, “Dawng kei un,” ci-in thu pia khol ahih manin amaute daitakin om uh a, kam khat beek dawng lo uh hi." 
Isaiah36:22 Tua ciangin Hilkiahʼ tapa ahi kumpi inn sung a sai Eliakim, lai-at Shebna le Asafʼ tapa ahi thuciamteh pa Joah in a puan uh bal kekin Hezekiah kiangah pai uh a, a ulian paʼ thugen teng a va gen uh hi." 
Isaiah37:1 Kumpi Hezekiah in a zak ciangin dahin ama puante bal kek a, Topa ’ inn sungah a pai hi." 
Isaiah37:2 Tua ciangin amah in inn sung saipa Eliakim, lai-at pa Shebna le siampi khangham teng dahna limin puanhampi silh kawmin Amozʼ tapa kamsang pa Isaiah kiangah a sawl hi." 
Isaiah37:3 Amaute in Isaiah kiangah, “Hezekiah in, ‘Tu ni pen lungkham ni, tai ngah ni, mindai ni ahi hi. Naungek a suah hun tung napi-in a hing khia zo lo nupi tawh i kibang hi." 
Isaiah37:4 A nungta Pasian a zahko dingin ama topa, Assiria kumpipa in a sawl a ulian paʼ thugente, Topa na Pasian in za henla, tua bang thu a gente gim pia tahen. Tua ahih ciangin a om lai i mite adingin thu ngen in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Isaiah37:5 Kumpi Hezekiahʼ nasemte Isaiah kiangah a tun uh ciangin 
Isaiah37:6 Isaiah in amaute tungah, “Na topa uh kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Assiria kumpipaʼ nasemte in keimah a hong simmawhna na zak sa uh thute hangin lau kei un." 
Isaiah37:7 En un, amah in kam leng sawn khat za-in ama gamah a ciahkik nading lungsim ka guan dinga, ama gam sungah namsau tawh amah ka tuksak ding hi,’ ci-in gen un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:8 Tua ciangin a ulian pa ciahkik a, Assiria kumpipa in Libnah khua a simna ah a va pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa in Lakhish khua a nusiat khitna thu za zo ahih manin tua lai a va zuan pah ahi hi." 
Isaiah37:9 Tu-in, Ethiopia kumpi Tirhakah in Assiria gam a sim dingin Egypt galkap honpi tawh a hong kuanna thu Assiria mite in a za uh hi. Hih thu a zak ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Hezekiah kiangah kamtaite sawl a," 
Isaiah37:10 “Judah kumpi Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un: ‘Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sungah Jerusalem kipia lo ding hi, ci-a thu hong ciam na suan Pasianʼ khem sa-in om kei in." 
Isaiah37:11 En in, Assiria kumpite in gam khempeuh ah a bawlna, a suksiat mang khitna na za zo hi. Nang hong kisuaktasak tuan ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ka pu ka pate un a suksiat minamte, Gozan minam, Haran minam, Rezef minamte le Telassar khua-a om Eden mite pen amauʼ pasian-te in hon khia zo ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamath kumpipa, Arpad kumpipa, Sefarvaim khuapi kumpipa, Hena kumpipa ahih kei leh Ivvah kumpipate koi ah om ahi hiam?’ va ci un,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiah in kamtaite tung panin a lai puak uh sangin, a lai a sim hi. Topa ’ inn ah Hezekiah pai to-in, Topa ’ mai ah a lai a zal hi." 
Isaiah37:15 Hezekiah in Topa ’ tungah thu ngenin," 
Isaiah37:16 “Vanglian Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian, Kherub-te tunga a tupa aw, nangmah bek, leitung kumpi gam khempeuhteʼ Pasian na hi hi. Nangmah in vantung le leitung na bawl khin hi." 
Isaiah37:17 Topa aw, na bil hong ngat inla hong za in. Topa aw, na mit hak inla hong mu in. Sennakherib in a nungta Pasian a zahkona, hong khak hih thute khempeuh za in." 
Isaiah37:18 Topa aw, Assiria kumpite in mi khempeuh le a gam khempeuh susia mangkhin taktak a," 
Isaiah37:19 amauteʼ pasian-te pen meikhuk sungah paihsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen pasian hi loin miteʼ khut tawh a kibawl sing le suangte ahi uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuate kisusia hi. 
Isaiah37:20 Tua ahih ciangin Topa koteʼ Pasian aw, nang bek Topa na hihna thu leitung kumpi gam khempeuh in a theih nadingin, tu-in ama khut sung panin kote hong hon khia in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:21 Tua ahih ciangin Amozʼ tapa Isaiah in Hezekiah tungah thu puak a, “Israel-teʼ Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tawh kisai thu, kei kiangah thu hong ngen khin na hih ciangin," 
Isaiah37:22 amah tawh kisai-in Topa ’ thugen hih bang ahi hi: ‘Sennakherib aw, Jerusalem mite in nang hong simmawhin hong zahko uh hi. Jerusalem mite in na nungah a lu hong pei san lel uh hi." 
Isaiah37:23 Nang in kua zahko-in kua a simmawh na hi hiam? Nang in kuaʼ tungah na aw sangsakin kiphasak na hi hiam? Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, keiʼ tungah a hong tua ci na hi hi." 
Isaiah37:24 Nangmah in na nasem pa zangin Topa na zahko a, Lebanon mual dong pek, mual sangte tungah ka leeng tampite tawh ka pai khin hi. Taamtak sing a sang pente, taksing hoih pente ka phuk khin hi. A sang pen mun, tulak a thuk penna munah ka pai khin hi." 
Isaiah37:25 Tuikhuk to-in tui ka dawn a, Egypt lui tuite khempeuh ka galkapteʼ khenuai tawh ka keusak hi, na ci hi." 
Isaiah37:26 “‘Sawt pek a kipan ka ngaihsut sa ahih lamtak za ngei nai lo na hi hiam? Nang in khuapi muanhuaite susia gawpin ninbu lomtang na suahsakna ding, a sunga teeng mite a thahatna uh bei-in, lungkia-in a om mawk nading, amaute pen lo lai-a om kungnote le lopa ngeekte, innkhum zang ah a po, a khan khit ma-in a keutum lopate tawh a kibatna ding, tu-in ka tunsak ding thute pen tanglai pek panin ka ngaihsut sa thu ahi hi." 
Isaiah37:27  
Isaiah37:28 “‘Na omna mun, na vak suk na vak tohna le keima tungah na hehna ka thei hi." 
Isaiah37:29 Keima tungah nang hehin, na kiphatsakna thu keima tungah a thu hong tung ahih manin, na nak ah sikkawi bulhin, na kam ah kamkaih hong bulhin, nong kuanna lampi lam mahah nang kong ciahkiksak ding hi,’ ci hi." 
Isaiah37:30 “Nang Hezekiah adingin hih in lim hong hi ding hi: Tu kumin an li pote na ne ding uh a, a kum nihna ciangin tua bangmahin a pote na ne leuleu ding uh hi. A kum thumna ciangin khai tuhin an na la ding uh a, leenggui suanin a gah na ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah37:31 Tua ciangin, Judah minam sung panin a suakta lai mite in singkung bangin zungkha sukkikin, gah na gah tokik ding uh hi." 
Isaiah37:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh a omlaite, Jerusalem pan ahi zongin a suakta teng, Zion Mual panin ahi zongin paikhia ding uh hi. Vanglian Topa ’ deih luatna in hih thu hong tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah37:33 “Tua ahih ciangin Assiria kumpipa tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih khuapi sungah amah hong pai lo dinga, thaltang zong lawn lo ding hi. Lum tawh hong pai lo dinga, galsimna ding panmun zong hong bawl lo ding hi." 
Isaiah37:34 Hong kuanna lampi mahah amah ciahkik dinga, hih khuapi sungah hong pai lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah37:35 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah le ka nasem pa David ka khualna-in hih khuapi a suahtak nadingin ka hu ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah37:36 Tua ciangin Topa ’ vantungmi kuan khia-in Assiria miteʼ giahphual ah mihing tul za le tul sawm giat le tul nga a that hi. Zingsangin mite a thawh ciangin hihte khempeuh misi luang bekbek na hi hi. 
Isaiah37:37 Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa Sennakherib tai khia a, a inn ah ciahin Nineveh khua ah a teeng hi." 
Isaiah37:38 Amah in ama pasian Nisrok inn ah bia-in a om laitakin, ama tate Adrammelek le Sharezer in namsau tawh amah that uh a, Ararat gamah a tai uh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Esar-haddon in ama tangin a uk hi." 
Isaiah38:1 Tua hun laitakin Hezekiah a ci na-in si dektak hi. Amozʼ tapa, kamsang Isaiah ama kiangah hong pai-in, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na inn sung thu ding vaihawm in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang na damkik zo kei dinga, na si ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Isaiah38:2 Tua ciangin Hezekiah kawm lam nga-in Topa ’ tungah thu ngen a," 
Isaiah38:3 “ Topa aw, ka lungsim khempeuh le thuman tak tawh nangma mai ah gamta-in, nangma muhna ah a hoih nate ka sepna thu, tu-in nong phawk nadingin kong thum hi,” a ci hi. Hezekiah nakpi takin a kap hi." 
Isaiah38:4 Tua ciangin Isaiah tungah Topa ’ thu hong tung a," 
Isaiah38:5 “Pai inla Hezekiah kiangah gen in. Topa, na pa Davidʼ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na thungetna ka za khin a, na khitui ka mu khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin na nuntakna kum sawm le kum nga kong piak beh ding hi." 
Isaiah38:6 Assiria kumpipaʼ khut sung panin nang le khuapi kong hon khia dinga, hih khuapi ka hu ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah38:7 Isaiah in, “Amah in hong ciam sa thu Topa in hong bawl nadingin, hih pen Topaʼ tung panin nangma adingin lim ahi hi:" 
Isaiah38:8 En in, Ahaz kumpipaʼ ni-nai tungah ni tum kuana liim pen kal sawm ka nungkiksak ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tum khin sa ni pen ni-nai tungah kal sawm a nungkik hi." 
Isaiah38:9 Judah kumpipa Hezekiah a ci na-in, a natna panin a damkik khit ciangin la phuakin a gelh lai in:" 
Isaiah38:10 Ka hat saan laitakin a si ding ka hi ta a, ka hun om lai khempeuh Leinuai ah a om dingin hong kiseh hi ta hi, ka ci hi." 
Isaiah38:11 A hingteʼ gam sungah Topa ka mu nawn kei dinga, leitung a a teeng miteʼ lakah mihing ka en nawn kei ding hi, ka ci hi." 
Isaiah38:12 Tuucingpaʼ puanbuk bangin ka omna inn kibot khia-in kei kiang panin kila khia hi. Siamgante in a hial bangin ka nuntakna kihial khin a, amah in siambu panin kei hong at khia hi. Sun le zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak a," 
Isaiah38:13 zingsang dong huhna ngenin ka kiko hi. Humpinelkai bangin amah in ka guh khempeuh hong kuaihtansak a, sun le zan tawntung gimna hong kithuaksak hi." 
Isaiah38:14 Phialphiah ahi a, gun vapi bangin ahi zongin ka hamham a, vakhu bangin ka tautau hi. Vantung lam kong etetna-in ka mitte a gim hi. Topa aw, kei hong kinengniam hi; keima lungmuanna hong hi ta in!" 
Isaiah38:15 Ahih hangin keimah in bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in kei tungah hong gen khin a, a mahmah in hih thu hong bawl hi. Ka lunggim lua a, ka ihmu thei kei hi." 
Isaiah38:16 Topa aw, nang adingin kong nungta dinga, nang ading bekbekin kong nungta ding hi. Ka ci hong damsakkik inla, hong nungtasak in!" 
Isaiah38:17 Gimna lianpi ka thuakna pen keima lungnopna hong suak ding hi. Lauhuaina khempeuh panin kei nong hon khia a, ka mawhna khempeuh na hong maisak hi."
