Isaiah38:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Leinuai ah a om mite in nangma tungah lungdamna hong ko thei lo a, a si sa mite in nang hong phat thei lo uh hi. Gum sunga a pai sukte in nangma thumanna hong muang thei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah38:19 Tu ni-in keima hong gamtat bangin a hing mite bek in nang tungah lungdamna hong ko thei hi. Pate in tate tungah nangma thumanna gen sawn uh hi. 
Isaiah38:20 Topa in kei hong hon dinga, Topa ’ inn sungah i nuntak sung tawntung khausai lasakna i tum ding hi." 
Isaiah38:21 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Theigah la sak inla, na damkik nadingin na meimate nuhsak in,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekiah in, “ Topaʼ inn ah ka pai toh zawh nading a kitheih nadingin bang lim om ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Isaiah39:1 Tua hun laitakin Baladanʼ tapa, Babylon kumpi ahi Merodak-baladan in Hezekiah a ci na-in a damkikna thu za ahih manin ama kiangah laikhak le letsong tawh taangmite a sawl hi." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiah in amaute limtakin zin na do hi. Amah in ama dangka inn, ngun, kham, paknamtui, sathau manpha, a galvan koihna inn khempeuh le a vankoihna sunga a kimu theite khempeuh amaute a na lak hi. Ama inn sung hitaleh, ama gam sunga om khempeuh hitaleh Hezekiah in amaute a lah loh bangmah om lo hi." 
Isaiah39:3 Tua ciangin Kumpi Hezekiah kiangah kamsang Isaiah hong pai-in, “Hih mite in bang hong gen ahi uh hiam? Koi lai panin nang kiangah hong pai ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute, a gamlapi, Babylon gam panin kei kiangah a hong pai uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah39:4 Amah in, “Amaute in na inn sungah bang teng mu ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hezekiah in, “Amaute in ka inn sunga a om khempeuh a vekin mu khin uh hi. Ka vankoihna innte sunga nate amau ka lah loh om lo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
Isaiah39:5 Tua ciangin Isaiah in Hezekiah kiangah, “Vanglian Topa ’ thu ngai in:" 
Isaiah39:6 En in, na inn sunga a omte khempeuh le na pu na pate in tu ni donga a khol sate, Babylon ah a kipuak ding ni hong tung ding hi; bangmah kinusia lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah39:7 Nangʼ sung panin a suak, nangma tapate kim khat kipaikhiat pih dinga, Babylon kumpipaʼ inn sungah innsung maang nasep kisemsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah39:8 Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Isaiah kiangah, “Nong gen sa Topa ’ thu a hoih ahi hi,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, “Keiʼ nuntak hun sungin nopna le lungmuanna om buang ding hi,” ci-in a ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah40:1 Ka mite hehnem un, hehnem un, na Pasian un ci hi." 
Isaiah40:2 Dam takin Jerusalem mite hopih un. Amauʼ gimna hun bei ta a, amauʼ mawhna kimaisakin, amauʼ khialhnate hangin Topa in a kicingin gim pia khinzo ta hi, ci-in amau tungah gen un." 
Isaiah40:3 Awging khat in, “Gamlak ah Topa ’ lampi sial unla, sehnel gam sungah i Pasian ading lam lianpi khat a tangin bawl un." 
Isaiah40:4 Kuam khempeuh kivuk dim dinga, mual liante le mual neute kitotam ding hi. A tamkim lo munte kitamkimsak dinga, suanghum omna munte kizalh tam ding hi." 
Isaiah40:5 Topa ’ kam in gen khin ahih manin, Topa ’ minthanna vang hong kilang dinga, mi khempeuh in mu khawm ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah40:6 Awging khat in, “Kiko in!” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Bang thu kiko ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi. “Mi khempeuh, lopa bang hi a, ama hoihnate khempeuh gamlak ah a om pak tawh kibang lel hi." 
Isaiah40:7 Topa ’ hu in a mut ciangin lopa vulin, pak a pulh hi. Mihingte lopa bang lel hi taktak hi." 
Isaiah40:8 Lopa vul a, pak a pulh hi. Ahih hangin Pasianʼ thu kho tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah40:9 Jerusalem aw, mual sang dawnah kah to-in lungdamna thu kiko in. Zion aw, nakpi takin awng inla, lungdamna thu taangko in. Nakpi takin kiko inla, lau kei in. Judah gam khuapite tungah, “Na Pasian uh hong pai ta hi,” ci-in gen ta un." 
Isaiah40:10 Topa Pasian hong pai a, vangliatna tawh hong uk ding hi. Ama sep thamante hong pua a, a gualzawhna thamante hong masuan hi." 
Isaiah40:11 Amah in tuucingpa bangin ama tuuhonte an vak dinga, ama tuuhonte kaikhawmin a ang sungah pua dinga, no ngek lai a neite dam takin a paipih ding hi." 
Isaiah40:12 Kua in ama khutkuak sungah tuite tehin, ama khap tawh vantung teh a, leitung leivui khempeuh lawh khat sungah guangin, pongkhaina tawh mual liante khai a, tawitehna tawh mual neute teh ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:13 Kua in Topa ’ sep ding teng gen a, thulamlak pa bangin kua in amah hilh ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:14 Thu a kicingin a muh nadingin amah in kua dong ngei a, kua in amah lampi man hilhin, ama tungah thutheihna hilh a, thu theihtelna lampi lak ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:15 En un, minamte pen phelkhai khat panin tuimal them khat a taak khia tawh kibang a, tawitehna tungah a om leivui nengbaang bangin kingaihsun lel hi. Amah in tuikulhte pen leivui them bangin tawm to lel hi." 
Isaiah40:16 I Topa biak nadingin Lebanon sing kicing lo dinga, a ganhingte zong meihal biak nadingin kicing lo ding hi." 
Isaiah40:17 Minam khempeuhte, ama mai ah bangmah tham hi lo a, amaute pen bangmah a om lo le, a hawmguak sangin a tawm zaw-in amah in a ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah40:18 Tua ahih ciangin Pasian pen kua tawh tehkak dinga, amah pen bang lim tawh kibang ci ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah40:19 Milim tawh tehtheih ding hi lo hi. Milim a bawlpa in sungin, kham seek pa khat in tua milim kham tawh zut a, tua milim adingin ngun khainiangte a sunsak hi." 
Isaiah40:20 Ngun le kham a nei zo lo mipa in biakna-in a zat dingin a muat lo ding sing teel a, a taang thei lo milim khat ama adingin a bawlsak dingin khutsiam mi khat a zong hi." 
Isaiah40:21 Note in thei nai lo a, za nai lo na hi uh hiam? A kipat cil-in note tungah hong kigen khin hi lo ahi hiam? Leitung a pian a kipan thei khinta hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah40:22 Leitung a a teeng mite kauphe tawh kibang lel hi. Leitung kimkot tungah a tupa, vantungte puan bangin zalin, a sungah a om theih nadingin puanbuk bangin a zal pa," 
Isaiah40:23 uliante a mawkna suaksakin, leitung ukte pen bangmah lo a suaksak pa amah ahi hi." 
Isaiah40:24 Amaute pen a gina-in kisuan lo a, a gina-in kivawh lo a, amauʼ kungte in a gina-in lei sungah zungkha lo uh a, amah in a mut ciangin amaute vul a, huihpi in ham bangin amaute a lenkhiat pih hi." 
Isaiah40:25 Tua ahih ciangin kei kua tawh hong genteh ding na hi uh hiam, Siangtho Pa in ci hi." 
Isaiah40:26 A sangna lam en to unla mu un. Kua in hihte piangsak ahi hiam? Amauʼ honpite khatkhatin piangsakin, a lian ama thahatna tawh amaute khempeuh a minun a sam pa ahi hi. Vangliatna ah thahat ahih manin khat beek pelhem lo hi." 
Isaiah40:27 “ Topa ’ kiang panin keima lampi kiliah a, keima Pasian in ka lungkhamna hong thudon lo hi,” Jakob aw, bang hangin ci a, Israel aw, bang hangin tua ci pau na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah40:28 Thei nai lo a, za nai lo na hi hiam? Topa pen tawntung Pasian hi a, leitung mong khempeuh dong a Piangsak pa ahi hi. Amah gim lo a, zong tawl lo hi. Ama thu theihtelna kigen zo lo hi." 
Isaiah40:29 Amah in a gim mi tungah vangliatna pia a, thahatna a nei lo mi a thahatna khangsak hi." 
Isaiah40:30 Khangnote nangawn gimin tawl dinga, khanglai mite a tha uh bei ding hi." 
Isaiah40:31 Ahih hangin Topa a muang mite a tha uh dimkik dinga, muvanlai bangin kha tawh leeng to-in, amaute tai napi-un tawl lo ding uh a, amaute lam pai napi-un gim lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:1 Tuipi gei-a om gamte aw, gamdai takin ka thu ngai un. Na mite uh a tha uh dimsak unla, amaute a nai ah hong paisak un. Amaute in thugen theih nading hun ngah ding uh hi. Thukhen zumah kei tawh kisi nuʼng." 
Isaiah41:2 A paina peuh ah a gualzo, nisuahna panin a hong pai mipa kua in hanthawn ahi hiam? Amah in ama khut sungah minam dangte pia khin ahih manin amah in kumpite tuancil hi. Amah in a namsau tawh amaute leivui bangin bawl a, ama thal tawh buhkung leeng a bangsak hi." 
Isaiah41:3 Amah in amaute nawh delh lua kisa-in, a khe in lei nangawn sik kha lo liang a, nuam takin a paisuak hi." 
Isaiah41:4 A kipat cil a kipanin a khangkhangin mite a sam, hih nasep semin a bawl kua ahi hiam? Keimah Topa in, a masa le a nunung ka hi a, kei pen Topa ka hi hi." 
Isaiah41:5 Tuipi gei-a om gamte in mu khinin a lau uh hi. Leimong dongin mite lau-in liing uh a, amaute in hong nai-in hong pai uh hi." 
Isaiah41:6 Mi khempeuh in a veengte ciat huh a, a sanggamte ciat kiangah, “Lau kei un,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah41:7 Khutsiam pa in kham seek pa hanthawnin, sek tawh milim a neel puah pa in sekpi tawh a sat pa hanthawn a, sumtui a luanna uh, “Hoih hi,” a ci uh hi. A liing thei nawn lo dingin amaute in tua milim siktukkilh tawh a khenkip uh hi." 
Isaiah41:8 Ahih hangin nang ka nasem pa Israel, ka lawm Abrahamʼ suanlekhak, ka hong teel sa Jakob aw," 
Isaiah41:9 leimong panin kong lakkhiat, leimong kiu a gamla pen mun panin ka hong sapkhiat, “Nang pen ka nasem pa na hi a, nangmah kong teel khinzo a, nangmah kong nil khia kei hi,” ka hong cih pa aw," 
Isaiah41:10 nang hong ompih ka hih manin lau kei in. Na Pasian ka hih manin lungkia kei in. Nang hong tha khauhsakin kong huh dinga, nang hong huhin ka hong hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah41:11 Nangma tungah a heh mite khempeuh maizumna kithuaksakin kikoih khong ding hi. Nangmah hong dem mite a mawkna suakin siatna thuak ding uh hi. 
Isaiah41:12 Nangmah hong langpangte na zon hangin amaute na mu nawn kei ding hi. Nangmah hong dote pen bangmah hi het lo ding uh hi. 
Isaiah41:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa na Pasian in na khut taklam ka len hi. “Lau kei in, nangmah kong huh ding hi,” nang tungah a hong ci pa keimah ka hi hi." 
Isaiah41:14 Lungno bang ahi lel Jakob, no Israel mite aw, lau kei un! Note kong huh ding hi, Topa in ci hi. Note hong honpa pen Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:15 Note pen, a thak, a hiam, ha a nei buhcilna bangin kong bawl ding hi. Note in mual liante cilin na suvui ding uh a, mual neute pen ansi bangin na gawizan ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:16 Amaute na haih ding uh a, huih in amaute mut khia dinga, huihpi in amaute thehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ’ hangin na lungdam ding uh a, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ hangin na minthang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah41:17 Keima mite in tui duhin, tui zongin, a dang uh a taak ciangin amauʼ hong thungetna ka pia dinga, Israel-teʼ Pasian keimah in amaute ka nusia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah41:18 Bangmah a om lohna a sangna munte panin gunte ka luangsak dinga, kuamteʼ laizang ah tuikhukte ka omsak ding hi. Sehnel gam pen bualtui ka suaksak dinga, lei keuna mun pen ciktui ka suaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah41:19 Gamlak ah taamtak sing, singkha sing, mui sing le oliv kungte ka posak ding hi. Sehnel gam sungah taaksan sing, hiangpa sing le taksing ka suan khawm ding hi." 
Isaiah41:20 Topa ’ khut in hih nate bawl a, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa in hih nate piangsak hi, ci-in mite in mu-in a theih nading, a thu ngaihsunin a tel theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:21 Na thu uh sung un, Topa in ci hi. Na lahtel nop teng uh gen un, Jakobʼ Kumpipa in ci hi." 
Isaiah41:22 Amaute in a thu uh hong paipih uh henla, a piang ding thu hong gen uh hen. Eite in i ngaihsut theih nading, a hong piang ding thu i theih nadingin a beisa huna om nate bang teng hiam hong gen ta uh hen. Tua ahih kei leh zong, a hong piang ding thu eite tungah hong gen ta uh hen." 
Isaiah41:23 Note pen pasian-te na hihna uh ka theih nadingun tu khit ciangin a hong piang ding thute kote tungah hong gen un. Kote lungkia-in ka lau nadingun phatna ahi a, siatna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh hong bawl dih un." 
Isaiah41:24 A taktakin note bangmah na hi kei uh a, na nasepnate uh a mawkna ahi hi. Note a hong teelpa a etsathuai ahi hi." 
Isaiah41:25 Leilu lam gam panin mi khat ka hanthawn a, amah hong kuan khin hi. Nisuahna lam panin amah in ka min hong lo ding hi. Beelseek pa in buan a cil bang, sum sunga a kisu gawp bangin, amah in gam ukte tuancil gawp ding hi." 
Isaiah41:26 Eite in i theih nadingin a kipat cil a kipan kua in hong gen khia a, “Amah man hi,” i cih theih nadingin a hun ma-in kua in gen ahi hiam? Kuamah in gen khia lo, kuamah in pulak lo a, kuamah in noʼ thu za lo hi." 
Isaiah41:27 Topa ahi keimah in Zion tungah hih thu ka pulak masa a, Jerusalem tungah lungdamna thu ka gen hi." 
Isaiah41:28 Ahih hangin tua mun ka et ciangin kuamah om lo hi. Thu ka dot ciangin a hong dawng ding thulamlak amaute lakah om lo hi. 
Isaiah41:29 Amaute khempeuh zuaupi vive hi a, amauʼ nasepnate a mawkna ahi hi. A kisung amauʼ milimte pen huih hawmpi bang ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah42:1 Keimah in ka huh, ka teel, ka lungkimna ka nasem pa en un. Ka kha tawh amah ka kidimsak a, amah in minam khempeuh tungah thuman tungsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:2 Amah kiko loin, a aw zong sangsak lo dinga, kongzing lakah zong thu gen zakzak lo ding hi." 
Isaiah42:3 Amah in a zawngkhal mite dop bawl dinga, a cimawh mite tungah migi ding hi. Amah in thumanna tawh mi khempeuh tungah thutang thu sem khia ding hi." 
Isaiah42:4 Amah in leitungah thutang thu a phuh khit matengin lungsi lo, lungkia lo ding hi. Tuipi gei-a om gamte in ama thu ngak uh hi." 
Isaiah42:5 Vantungte piangsakin a zal, leitung phahin, a tung panin a hong paikhia nate a piangsak, leitungah a om mite tungah husanna pia-in, leitungah a paite khempeuh husanna a guan Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, thumanna tawh nangmah hong samin, ka khut tawh hong lenin nang ka hong kem hi. Mittawte a vaksak ding, leinuai thong sung panin thongkiate a la khia ding, thong sung a mialna munah a tu mite a la khia ding, mite tungah thuciamna ahi ding, minam dangte tungah khuavak ahi dingin nang ka hong koih khin hi." 
Isaiah42:7  
Isaiah42:8 “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, Topa pen keima min ahi hi. Pasian dangʼ tungah keima-aʼ tawh a kibang minthanna ka pia kei a, a kisui milimte zong keimah hong kiphatnate pawl ka ngahsak kei hi." 
Isaiah42:9 En un, hun beisa-a nate in hong kheng ta a, tu-in a thak nate kong gen hi. Tuate a hong piankhiat ma-in note tungah a thute ka hong gen khol hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah42:10 Topa ’ tungah la thak sa unla, leimong panin amah phatna sa un! Tuipi le a sunga omte, tuipi gei-a om gamte le a tunga teeng mite aw, la sa un." 
Isaiah42:11 Sehnel gam le a khuapite, Kedar miteʼ teenna khuaneute a aw uh sangkhaisak un. Sela gam a teeng mite lungdamna tawh la sasak unla, mual dawn panin amaute awngsak un." 
Isaiah42:12 Topa ’ minthanna gensak unla, tuipi gei-a gamte ah amah phatna gensak un." 
Isaiah42:13 Mi thahatpa bangin Topa kuan khia a, gal a do mipa bangin ama hehna sosak hi. Amah kiko-in nakpi takin awng khia a, ama hatna a galte tungah a lak hi." 
Isaiah42:14 Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “Sau veipi sung bangmah hih loin ka om a, keimah le keimah kikhamcipin ka om hithiat hi. Tu-in ahihleh numei nausuak ding bangin ka kiko khia dinga, ka kam ka-in ka tung nak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:15 Mual liante le mual neute ka susia dinga, a po khempeuh ka keusak ding hi. Gunte pen tuikulh ka suaksak dinga, bualtuite ka kangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:16 “Amauʼ theih loh lampi ah mittawte ka paipih dinga, amauʼ theih ngei loh sul zuih pihin ka kha ding hi. Amauʼ mai ah khuamial pen khuavak suaksakin, a phokna munte a tamin ka bawl ding hi. Hihte pen keima hih ding nate hi a, tuate sem loin ka nusia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah42:17 A kisui milimte muangin, a kisung milimte kiangah, ‘Note, komauʼ pasian-te na hi uh hi,’ a ci mite kinolh dinga, maizum mahmah in ki-omsak ding hi." 
Isaiah42:18 “Bilngongte aw, za un. Mittawte aw, na muh theih nadingun en un!" 
Isaiah42:19 Ka nasem pa bangin kua a mit taw a, keima sawl ka kamtai pa bangin kua a bilngong ahi hiam? Keima thuciampih pa bangin kua a mit taw a, Topa ’ nasem pa bangin kua a mit taw ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah42:20 Israel in na tampi mu a, ahih hangin tuate en cian lo hi. Ama bilte vang a, ahih hangin amah in khua za lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah42:21 Topa pen a hon khia nuam mahmah Pasian hi a, ama thuhilhnate limtakin a kizuih ding a deih hi." 
Isaiah42:22 Ahih hangin ama mite pen a kiluh, a kisut mite hi a, leihawm sungah amaute khempeuh kikhia suk a, thonginn sungah kiseel hi. Amaute pen a hon ding a om lo, nek dingin a kiman ganhing suak khin mang uh a, kuamah in, “Hong piakik in,” a cih loh van kinusiate a suak khinta uh hi." 
Isaiah42:23 Note lakah khat peuhpeuh in hih thu na ngai ding uh hiam? Tu a kipanin limtakin na ngai ding uh hiam? 
Isaiah42:24 Kua in a sut gawp pa tungah Jakob pia a, a luh gawpte tungah Israel pia ahi hiam? Topa mahmah in a piak hi lo ahi hiam? Ama tungah eite i khial hi. Ama hong deih bangin i nungta kei a, ama hong thuhilhnate i mang kei hi." 
Isaiah42:25 Tua ahih ciangin amah in ama hehna so leh galkidonate eite tungah hong tungsak hi. Israel mi khempeuh lakah ama hehna mei bangin hong kuang a, ahih hangin eite in bangmah i thei kei hi. Tua bang i thuakna hangin eite in bangmah i phawk thei tuan kei hi." 
Isaiah43:1 Ahih hangin Jakob aw, nangmah hong piangsak pa, Israel aw, nangmah hong bawlpa, Topa in tu-in hih bang ci hi: “Hong hon khia khin ka hih manin lau kei in. Na min tawh kong sam khinzo a, nang pen kei-aʼ na hi hi." 
Isaiah43:2 Tuite na kantan ciangin nang kong ompih dinga, gunte na kantan ciangin tui in hong tuum lo ding hi. Mei kantanin na pai ciangin na kaang kei dinga, meikuangte in nang hong kaang tum lo ding hi." 
Isaiah43:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Topa na Pasian, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong honpa ka hi hi. Nangmah tat nadingin Egypt ka pia a, nangmah khek nadingin Ethiopia le Seba ka pia hi." 
Isaiah43:4 Nang pen keima mitah manpha-in, pahtakhuai-in, nangmah hong it ka hih manin nangma tangin mite ka pia a, na nuntakna khek nadingin mihingte ka pia hi." 
Isaiah43:5 Nang hong ompih ka hih manin lau kei in. “Nisuahna lam panin na suanlekhakte kong paipih dinga, nitumna lam panin na mite kong kaikhawm ding hi." 
Isaiah43:6 Keimah in leilu lam kiangah, ‘Pia khia in,’ leitaw lam kiangah, ‘Len nawn kei in; keima piansak ka bawl sa, keima minthan nadingin ka piansak, keima min tawh a kilote khempeuh ahi, ka tapate a gamlapi panin, ka tanute leimong panin hong paipih un,’ ka ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah43:7  
Isaiah43:8 Mit nei napi-in a mit a tawte, bil nei napi-in a bil a ngongte, hong paikhiatpih un." 
Isaiah43:9 Minamte khempeuh kikaikhawmsak unla, mihingte kikhawmsak un. Amauteʼ lak panin kua in hih thu hong gen khia thei-in, a beisa huna nate kua in laktel thei ahi hiam? Amauʼ dikna a langsak dingin a tecite uh hong paipihsak unla, amaute a thu zasakin, man mah hi, cisak un." 
Isaiah43:10 “Note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci a, “Kei pen Amah ka hihna thu, nangmah in thei-in keimah nong up nading, nong theih tel nadingin kong teel sa ka nasem pa na hi hi. Keiʼ ma-in pasian om lo a, keiʼ khit ah zong kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Isaiah43:11 “Kei, keimah pen Topa ka hi a, kei sim loh honpa dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah43:12 Note lakah pasian dang a om ma-in hon khia-in, pulakin, ka gen khol hi. Tua ahih ciangin note pen keima teci na hi uh hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah43:13 “Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, a kipat cil a kipanin zong kei pen Amah ka hi hi. Keima khut sung panin a la khia zo kuamah om lo hi. Keima sepnate, a kua in hong khaktan zo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Isaiah43:14 Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, note a hong hon Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Noteʼ hangin Babylon ah galkapte puakin, khua kongpi sikzawl khempeuh ka kuaitan dinga, Khaldea miteʼ kikona pen tauna awging ka suaksak ding hi." 
Isaiah43:15 Kei pen Topa, noteʼ Siangtho Pa, Israel a Piangsak pa, noteʼ Kumpi ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah43:16 Tuipi sungah lampi bawlin, tui lianpi sungah pai nading sul bawl a, leeng le sakolte, galkapte le galhangte Egypt gam pan paikhiat pihin, a tho thei nawn lo dingin amaute a lumcipsak, amaute pen meivak khau kisumit bangin a mitsak Topa in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah43:17  
Isaiah43:18 “Masa lam a nate ciamteh kei unla, a beisa hun nate ngaihsun kei un." 
Isaiah43:19 Tu-in a thak na khat ka bawl a, tu-in hong piang khia hi. Note in thei lo na hi uh hiam? Gamlak ah lam lianpi khat ka bawl dinga, sehnel gam sungah gunte ka luangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah43:20 Gamsate, ngiate le vasa-kalaohte in kei hong pahtawi ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima adingin ka piansak mite in keimah hong phatna a genkhiat theih nadingun, keima teel miteʼ dawn dingin gamlak ah tui pia-in, sehnel gam sungah gun ka luangsak hi." 
Isaiah43:21  
Isaiah43:22 “Ahih hangin Jakob aw, ka min nong lo kei hi. Israel aw, kei nong cimtak hi." 
Isaiah43:23 Meihal biak nadingin kei kiangah na tuu nong paipih kei a, biakpiakna tawh kei nong pahtawi kei hi. Piakna tawh nang kong van giksak nai kei a, paknamtui piakna tawh kong gimsak nai kei hi." 
Isaiah43:24 Kei adingin paknamtui nong leisak nai kei a, nangmah in biakna sa a thaute tawh nong taisak nai kei hi. Ahih hangin nang in na khialhna tawh kei tungah van gik nong suan khin a, na mawhna tawh kei nong gimsak khin hi." 
Isaiah43:25 Na thupalsatnate hong paih khiatsak pa pen keimah ka hi a, kei ka hih manin na khialhnate ka ciamteh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah43:26 “Thuman na hihna hong laktel inla, thu kikum khawm ni. Na dikna a kilat nadingin na thu hong sung khia in." 
Isaiah43:27 Na pu na pa masate uh na khial uh a, na makaite uh zong kei tungah hong khial uh hi." 
Isaiah43:28 Na uliante un ka biakinn mindaisak uh ahih manin Israel tungah siatna ka tungsak a, Jakob ka mindaisak hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah44:1 Topa in, “Ka nasem pa Jakob aw, ka teel sa Israel aw, tu-in za in." 
Isaiah44:2 Nangmah a hong bawl, gil sung panin nang a hong piangsak, nang a hong huh ding Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka nasem pa Jakob aw, ka teel sa Israel aw, lau kei in." 
Isaiah44:3 “Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangtak leitang tungah tui ka sung dinga, lei keu tungah luitui ka luangsak ding hi. Na suanlekhakte tungah ka kha ka sung dinga, na tu na tate tungah ka thupha ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah44:4 Amaute pen tui sung panin a po khia, luitui luang gei ah a om, gialhek kungte bangin po khia ding uh hi." 
Isaiah44:5 “Khat in, ‘Kei pen Topa ka hi hi,’ ci-in, a dang khat in Jakob min tawh ama min lo dinga, a dang khat leuleu in, ‘ Topa -aʼ, ci-in ama khut tungah gelhin, Israel min tawh a mahmah kinophuah ding hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:6 Topa, Israel Kumpipa le amah Tan pa, Vanglian Topa in hih bangin gen a, “Kei pen a masa pen le a nunung pen ka hi hi. Kei sim loh pasian dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah44:7 Kua pen kei tawh kibang ahi hiam? Amah gensakin pulaksak unla, keima mai ah gensak un. A hong tung ding nate thu tanglai pek panin kua in tangko ahi hiam? Hong tung ding nate thu amaute gensak dih un." 
Isaiah44:8 Lau kei unla, kihta kei un. Tanglai pek panin note kiangah hong genin hong pulak khin hi lo ka hi hiam? Note khempeuh keima teci na hi uh hi. Kei sim loh pasian dang om ahi hiam? Suangpi dang om lo hi. Khat beek ka thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah44:9 Milim a bawl mite khempeuh a mawkna hi a, amauʼ deih milimte in phattuamna piangsak lo hi. Milim a biate in khua mu thei loin, thu theithei lo a, amaute in maizumna a thuak uh hi." 
Isaiah44:10 Bangmahin a kimang lo pasian kua in bawl a, milim kua in sung ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah44:11 Milim a bia mite khempeuh in maizumna ngah ding uh hi. Milim a bawl khutsiamte pen mi hi lel uh hi. Amaute khempeuh kikhawm sakin dingsak un. Amaute nakpi takin kilausak dinga, a vekpi-un maizumin kikoih khawm ding hi." 
Isaiah44:12 Sikseek pa in seekin hol tawh na sem hi. Amah in sek tawh seekin a thahat a khut tawh a sat hi. Amah a gil kialin a tha zaw a, dangtakin a gim hi." 
Isaiah44:13 Sing nasep khutsiam pa in khau khungin laikung tawh a ciamteh hi. Amah in singnawtna tawh nawt a, laikung tawh a kualin a ciamteh hi. Amah in, inn sungah a teeng ding mihing melhoih lim khat bangin mihing limin a bawl hi." 
Isaiah44:14 Amah in taamtak singkungte a phuk hi. Tua ahih kei leh sesing kung khat ahi a, tawsaw kung khat ahi zongin teng khia a, gamlak singte lakah khangsakin golsak hi. Amah in taamtak kung khat suan a, guah in khangsak hi." 
Isaiah44:15 Tua ciangin tua kung pen mi khat adingin mei sing a suak hi. Amah in tua sing kim khat la-in khua lum nadingin mei-in cih a, amah in mei tawhin moh a em hi. Amah in pasian khat zong bawlin bia a, amah in milim khat bawlin tua milim mai ah a kun hi." 
Isaiah44:16 Amah in a sing kim khat meikhuk ah cih hi. A dang kim khat tawh an ne a, amah in sa hangin a gil vah hi. Amah in mei awi-in, “Ah, ka khua lum ta, mei mu khin ing,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:17 Amah in a val lai teng, ama milim pasian khatin a bawl hi. Tua milim mai ah kunin a bia hi. Amah in tua milim tungah thu ngen a, “Nang pen keima pasian na hih ciangin kei hong hon khia in,” ci hi." 
Isaiah44:18 Amaute in bangmah thei lo a, amaute in bangmah khentel thei lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in bangmah a muh theih loh nadingun amah in a mit uh humsakin, bangmah a theih loh nadingun a lungsim uh khaksak hi." 
Isaiah44:19 A kim khat meikhuk ah cihin, a aam tungah moh zong ka em a, sa hangin ka ne khinzo hi. A om lai teng a kihhuai-in bawl buang ding ka hi hiam? Sing bek khat mai ah kun buang ding ka hi hiam, a ci ding, thu a ngaihsun, theihna le thumuhna a nei khat beek om lo hi." 
Isaiah44:20 Amah pen vut a nete tawh kibang lel hi. A lungsim haina in amah lam pialpih khin a, amah le amah kihon khia thei loin, “Ka khut sungah ka tawi milim pen a zumhuai hi lo ahi hiam?” cih zong phawk thei lo hi." 
Isaiah44:21 Jakob aw, hih thu phawk in. Israel aw, ka nasem pa na hi hi. Nang kong bawl a, nang pen keima nasem na hi hi. Israel aw, nang kong mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah44:22 Na thupalsatnate meiipi bangin na khialhnate meii lum bangin ka phiat khia khinzo hi. Hong hon khia khin ka hih manin kei kiangah hong ciahkik in. 
Isaiah44:23 Vantungte aw, Topa in tua thu sem khin ahih manin la sa un. Lei thuknate aw, awng un. Mualte aw, la sa-in awng khia un. Tulak le a sunga om sing khempeuh aw, awng un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jakob hon khia khin a, Israel sungah amah kiminthangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah44:24 Gil sung panin nangmah a hong piangsak, nangmah hong Honpa, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Keimah in na khempeuh bawlin, keimah guak in vantungte zalin, kuama seppih lohin leitung ka zal hi." 
Isaiah44:25 Zuau thu genteʼ hilhkholhna limte a siasak pa, aisante pen mihai a suaksak pa, mipilte leh heikikin, amauʼ thutheihte haina a suaksak pa;" 
Isaiah44:26 a nasem paʼ thu kipsakin, a kamtaiteʼ thugente a sem pa, ‘Jerusalem khua ah mi teengin, Judah khuapite kilamkik dinga, a kisia khuate ka lamkik ding hi,’ a ci pa;" 
Isaiah44:27 tui thukpi kiangah, ‘Keu in; na gunte ka keusak ding hi,’ a ci pa;" 
Isaiah44:28 ‘Sairas kumpipa pen ka tuucingpa hi a, ka deihna teng tungsak ding hi,’ a ci pa; ‘Jerusalem kilamkik dinga,’ biakinn pen, ‘Na bulpi kiphutkik ding hi,’ a ci Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:1 Kulh kongpi sungah a lut theih nadingin ama mai ah kongkhakte a honsak ding, kumpiteʼ vangliatnate a lakkhiatsak ding, ama mai ah minam dangte a zawhsak dingin, a taklam khutin a let, a sathau nilh pa Sairas tungah Topa in hih bangin ci hi:" 
Isaiah45:2 “Nangma min tawh nang a hong sam pa pen Israel Pasian, Topa, keimah ka hihna thu na theih nadingin, nangma mai ah kei pai-in mualte zalhmai-in, sumngo kongkhakte sat zanin a sikzawlte ka sattan dinga, a mialna mun sunga om sum kikoihte, mun simtham a sum kiseelte, nangma tungah kong pia ding hi." 
Isaiah45:3  
Isaiah45:4 Ka nasem pa Jakob, ka teel sa Israel ka ngaihsutna-in nang pen na minin kong sam a, nong theih loh hangin min thak kong phuak hi." 
Isaiah45:5 “Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. Kuamah dang om lo a, keimah sim loh Pasian dang om lo hi. Nisuahna lam pan hitaleh, nitumna lam pan hitaleh, kei sim loh a dang a om lohna thu mite in a theih nadingin, nong theih loh hangin a kisam thahatna nang ka hong guan hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi a, a dang kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:6  
Isaiah45:7 Keimah in khuavak le khuamial piangsakin, a pha nate le a sia nate ka piangsak a, hih nate khempeuh a bawlpa, keimah Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:8 Vantungte aw, tung lam panin thuman zusak unla, vantungte in thumanna bua suk ta un. Hotkhiatna a pokhiat theih nadingin leitang kihongsak unla, thumanna zong po khia tosak un. Keimah Topa in hih thu ka bawl khinzo hi." 
Isaiah45:9 Amah a Bawlpa tawh a kido mipa, beelseek pa tawh a kilehdo leibeel in gimna ngah tahen! Tungman in amah a sek pa kiangah, “Nang in bang bawl na hi hiam, na na bawl in khutlet nei lo hi,” ci-in a thu sel ngam ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah45:10 A pa kiangah, “Nangmah in kua piangsak na hi hiam?” a ci pa hitaleh, a nu kiangah, “Nang in nausuak dingin kua gimpih na hi hiam?” a ci pa in gimna ngah tahen!" 
Isaiah45:11 Amah a Bawlpa, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Nang in keima tateʼ thu hong dongin, ka khut tawh ka bawl sa tawh kisaite ah thu hong pia ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah45:12 Keimah in leitung ka bawl a, tua tungah mi ka piangsak hi. Keima khut in vantungte zal a, keimah in vantung na honpite khempeuh thu ka pia hi." 
Isaiah45:13 Thu a manin a sem dingin amah khua ka phawksak a, keimah in ama lampi khempeuh ka mamsak ding hi. Amah in nasep thaman ahi a, letsong ahi zongin ngaihsun loin keima khuapi lam dinga, salin a om ka mite a khah khia ding hi,” Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah45:14 Topa in Israel tungah, “Egyptʼ hauhna le Ethiopia sumbuk vante le a tun a sang Seba mite nangma kiangah hong pai-in nangma aʼ hong hi ding uh a, amaute in nang hong zui ding uh hi. Amaute sikkhau kibulh sa-in hong pai ding uh a, nangma kiangah hong kun ding uh hi. Amaute in nangma kiangah thumna hong bawl ding uh a, ‘Nangmah bek tawh Pasian om khawm a, kuamah dang om loin, amah sim loh pasian dang om lo hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah45:15 A taktakin, Israel-teʼ Pasian, Honpa pen, a mahmah a bucip Pasian ahi hi." 
Isaiah45:16 Milim a bawl mite khempeuh in maizumna thuakin cih nading thei loin om ding uh hi. 
Isaiah45:17 Ahih hangin Topa in Israel-te hon khia hi. A tawntungin gualzo ding uh a, cikmah hunin maizumna thuak ngei lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah45:18 Vantungte a piangsak pa (amah Pasian!) Leitung piangsakin a bawl pa (a kipsak pa; a awngthawl dingin bawl loin, ten nadingin leitung a piangsak pa!) Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen Topa ka hi a, kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:19 Keimah in mun simtham, khua mialna gam sungah thu ka gen kei hi. Jakob suanlekhakte tungah, ‘A awngthawl mun sungah kei hong zong un,’ ka ci kei hi. Keimah Topa in thuman ka gen a, a man nate ka pulak hi." 
Isaiah45:20 “Minamte sung panin a suakta lai note aw, nomau kikaikhawmin hong pai unla, hong nai un! Sing milim a pua kawikawi mite in theihna nei lo uh a, a hon khia thei lo pasian tungah thu ngenngen uh hi." 
Isaiah45:21 Na thu uh sung unla, hong gen un. Na thu uh kikum khawm un! Hih thu sawtpekin kua in gen ahi hiam? Tanglai-in kua in pulak ahi hiam? Keimah Topa hi lo ka hi hiam? Thuman Pasian le Honpa ahi, kei sim loh pasian dang om lo a, kei sim loh kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:22 “Leitung mi khempeuhte aw, kei lamah hong kihei unla hotkhiatna ngah un! Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasian ka hi a, kuamah dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah45:23 Kei mahmah ka kiciam khin a, a kikhelkik ngei nawn lo ding thukip hih bang ahi hi: ‘Keima mai ah mi khempeuh hong khukdin dinga, keima tungah thuman ding hong kiciam ding hi,’ cihna, keiʼ kam sung panin thumanna tawh pusuak khia khinzo hi." 
Isaiah45:24 Topa ’ hang bekin gualzawhna le thahatna kingah hi, hong kici ding hi. Kei hong mudahte khempeuh mindai-in maizum ding uh hi." 
Isaiah45:25 Israel suanlekhakte khempeuh, Topa ’ hangin gualzo-in a kisial ding uh hi." 
Isaiah46:1 “Bel pasian puksukin, Nebo pasian kun suk a, tua milimte pen ganhing le bawngte tungah kipua hi. Noteʼ puak hih nate pen a gim mahmah ganhingte tungah a kisuan van gik bangin note tungah hong gik hi." 
Isaiah46:2 Amaute kunin, amaute puk suk khawm uh a, amaute in van gik pengsak thei lo uh a, amaute mahmah zong galteʼ matna sungah tung uh hi." 
Isaiah46:3 “Na suah a kipan kong tawi, gil sung pan a kong puak, Jakob innkuan, Israel innkuan a suakta laite khempeuh aw, keima thu hong ngai un." 
Isaiah46:4 Na teek dongun kei pen Amah ka hi a, na sam uh a kanʼ hun dongin note kong kem ding hi. Ka hong bawl khin a, ka hong don ding hi. Keimah in hong tawi-in ka hong hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah46:5 “Note in kei, kua tawh hong kibangsakin kua tawh hong kikimsak dinga, ka kibat pih dingin a kua tawh hong en teh ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah46:6 Sumbawm panin khamte uang zatin tawitehna tawh ngunte a teh khiate in kham seek pa cial uh a, amah in tua nate pen pasian-in a seeksak hi. Tua ciangin amaute kunin tua milim a bia uh hi." 
Isaiah46:7 Amaute in tua pasian pen a liangko tung uh ah nga to-in pua uh a, ama omna ding munah a koih uh hi. Tua a koihna ah a milim om niloh hi. Ama omna panin kin khia thei lo hi. Mi khatpeuh in amah sam leh amah in dawng thei lo a, ama lungkhamna panin zong a hon khia thei kei hi." 
Isaiah46:8 “Thu a palsat mite aw, hih thu phawkin ngaihsun unla, lungngai pha un." 
Isaiah46:9 Hun lui thute phawk un; bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen Pasian ka hi a, a dang om lo hi. Kei pen Pasian ka hi a, kei tawh a kibang a dang om lo hi." 
Isaiah46:10 A kipat cil-in a tawpna ding thu ka pulak a, tanglai pek panin a piang nai lo nate genin, ‘Ka thugen kip dinga, ka ngimna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Isaiah46:11 Nisuahna gam panin sasial ne vasa khat samin, keima thu a sem khia dingin gamlapi panin mi khat ka sam hi. Thu ka gen khin a, ka tungsak ding hi. Ka geel khin a, ka sem ding hi." 
Isaiah46:12 “Suahtak nading haksa mahmah ding hi, a ci lungsim khauh mite aw, ka thu ngai un:" 
Isaiah46:13 Suahtak nading hun ka hong tungsak ta a, gamla nawn lo hi. Ka hong hotkhiat ding hun zekai nawn lo ding hi. Keima minthanna ahi Israel adingin Jerusalem ka hon khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah47:1 Nungak a bang Babylon aw, hong pai suk inla, leivui lakah tu in. Nungak a bang Khaldea aw, tokhom om lohna leilak ah hong tu suk in! Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen a moi milmel, a ngeek dikdek, hong kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah47:2 An gawina suangte hei inla, an gawi in. Na kikhuhna puan la khia inla, na nik na puan suahin gunte kantan in." 
Isaiah47:3 Na seelsim teng kilang dinga, na zumhuaina teng kimu ding hi. Keimah in kong thukkik dinga, kuamah ka zah kei ding hi." 
Isaiah47:4 Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa in eite hong suaktasak a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Isaiah47:5 Babylon aw, gamdai takin tu inla, khua mialna sungah pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen kumpi gamteʼ tonu, hong kici nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah47:6 Ka mite tungah ka heh a, ka luah gamh ka ninsak hi. Nangma khut sungah amaute kong pia a, nangmah in amaute na hehpih bawl kei hi. A khangham mite nangawn na ngongbawl mahmah hi." 
Isaiah47:7 Nangmah in, “Tonu ka hi tawntung ding hi,” ci na hih manin hih thute na lungsimah koih loin, a thumongte zong na phawk kha kei hi." 
Isaiah47:8 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, a nuam bek a ut, lungmuang takin a tu hithiat, na lungsimah, “Keimah hiʼng, kei sim loh midang om kei; meigongin omngei kei ning, ta-khuai cih zong sin kei ning,” a ci khuapi aw, hih thu za in:" 
Isaiah47:9 Aisan siamnate le mibum siamna vanglian pi na neih hangin ta khuaisuahna le meigonna, hih thu nihte thakhat thu-in ni khat sungin a kicing takin nangma tungah hong tung veve ding hi." 
Isaiah47:10 Na gitlohna ah nang na lungmuang a, “Kuamah in kei hong mu kei hi,” na ci hi. Na pilna le na theihnate in lam hong pialsak a, na lungsim sungah, “Keimah hiʼng, kei sim loh midang om kei,” na ci hi." 
Isaiah47:11 Ahih hangin nangmah in na beisak theih loh lungkhamna na tungah hong tung dinga, nangmah in maisakna na ngah theih loh gimna nang tungah hong tung ding hi. A thu na theih het loh siatna na tungah hong tung vat ding hi." 
Isaiah47:12 Na neu lai a kipan na sep na mi bumna le na aisannate ah kip takin om in. Phattuamna na ngah kha dinga, mite na lausak zo kha ding hi." 
Isaiah47:13 Nang tungah a hong kilak thu tampite hangin na gim hi. Vantungte a sehin khenin, aksite en a, khadet simin nang tunga thupiang ding a hong gen khol mite tu-in dingsak inla, nangmah kihonsak in." 
Isaiah47:14 En in, amaute pen buhkung tawh kibang uh a, mei in amaute kaang tum hi. Meikuangʼ vangliatna panin amau le amau kihon tawm thei lo uh hi. Hih pen khua lumna ding mei-am hi lo a, awi ding mei zong hi lo hi." 
Isaiah47:15 Nang tawh na a sem khawm, na neu lai a kipan nang tawh na a sem khawmte tungah hih thute hong tung ding hi. Amaute pen amauʼ tum ciatah zauvak uh a, nang a hong hon ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah48:1 Israel min tawh a kilo, Judah sung panin a piang khia, Topa ’ min tawh thu ciam napi-in, thuman thutak tawh Israel Pasian a pulak lo Jakob innkuan aw, hih thu ngai un." 
Isaiah48:2 Note tua bang hi napi-in, khuapi siangtho sungah a teeng mite ihi a, Israel Pasian i muang hi. Ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi, ci-in kisaktheihna-in na nei zaw lai uh hi." 
Isaiah48:3 A masa lam a nate thu tanglai-in ka gen a, keima kam panin tuate ging khia-in ka kitheithangsak hi. Tua ciangin thakhat thu-in keimah in ka sem a, a hong piang hi." 
Isaiah48:4 Note pen paupeeng in na ngawng uh sik thagui bang hi a, na thatang uh sumngo bangin a sakna thei khin ka hih manin," 
Isaiah48:5 note in, “Ka milim un hihte bawl a, a kisui ka milim uh le a kisung ka milim un thu pia hi,” na cih theih loh nadingun tanglai a kipanin note tungah hih thute kong gen a, tuate hong pian ma-in note tungah kong zasak khol hi." 
Isaiah48:6 Ka gen sa thu khempeuh hong tung ta ahih manin, na gennate a man hi, na hong cih ding uh hi ta hi. Tu a kipanin na a thakte, na theih ngei loh uh hong tung ding a ki-im nate kong gen ding hi." 
Isaiah48:7 Hihte pen tuhunin a piangsak ka hi a, a beisa hunah hih bang piang nai lo hi. A piang khin sa thu hileh, ka theih sa uh thu hi, na ci kha ding uh hi." 
Isaiah48:8 Note pen muan theih ding na hih lohna uh, na suah tung uh a kipan mi lehdo thei na hihna uh ka hong thei hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute na za ngei kei uh a, zong na thei ngei kei uh hi." 
Isaiah48:9 Note khempeuh kong suksiat khak loh nadingin ka min ka ngaihsutna tawh ka hehna diahin, keimah hong kiphatna ka ngaihsutna-in note tungah ka ki-ip hi." 
Isaiah48:10 Meikhuk sungah ngun a kisiansak bangin gimna meikhuk sungah note kong ze-et hi. Ahi zongin note bangmahin a kimang lo na hihna uh hong kimu khin hi. 
Isaiah48:11 Keimah ka kikhualna, keimah ka kingaihsutna-in hih bangin kong hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min a siat ding kilawm ahi hiam? Midang khat tungah keima minthanna ka pia kei ding hi." 
Isaiah48:12 Jakob aw, ka thu ngai in. Kong sap Israel-te aw, ka thu hong ngai un! Kei pen amah ka hi a, kei pen a masa hi-in, kei pen a nunung zong ka hi hi." 
Isaiah48:13 Ka khut in leitung bulpi koih a, ka khut taklam in vantungte zal hi. Amaute ka sap ciangin amaute om khawm pah uh hi." 
Isaiah48:14 Note khempeuh hong kikhawm unla hong za un! Amaute sung panin kua in hih ka sep ding nate gen khol thei ahi hiam? Ka teel sa mipa in Babylon tungah keima ngimna sem dinga, Khaldea miteʼ lang khat ah kei ka pang ding hi." 
Isaiah48:15 Kei, keimah in thu genin amah ka sam a, kei in amah ka panpih a, amah a daupai ding hi." 
Isaiah48:16 Kei kiangah hong nai unla, hih thu hong za un. A kipat cil a kipanin a simthamin thu ka gen ngei kei a, tua thu a pian a kipanin kei ka om hi. (Tu-in Topa Pasian in kei tungah a vangliatna hong pia a, kei hong sawl hi.)" 
Isaiah48:17 Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong hon Topa in: Phattuamna na ngah nadingin nang a hong hilh, na zuih ding a kilawm lampi ah a hong paipih Topa na Pasian ka hi hi." 
Isaiah48:18 Ka thupiakna a ngai hi hoh leteh! Nangma nopsakna gunpi bang dinga, na thumanna, tuihualte tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah48:19 Na tu le na tate sehnel zah pha dinga, na suanlekhakte sehnel vui zah pha ding hi. Keima mai ah amauteʼ min kiphiat khia lo dinga, kisusia ngei lo ding hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah48:20 Babylon panin pai khia-in Khaldea gam panin tai inla, lungdamna tawh hih thu genin taangko inla, leimong dongin puak in. “ Topa in ama nasem Jakob hon khia khinzo!” ci-in gen kawikawi in." 
Isaiah48:21 Amah in sehnel gam kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin a dang uh taak lo hi. Suangpi panin amau adingin amah in tui a luangsak hi. Amah in suangpi khangkhamsak a, tui a phul khia hi." 
Isaiah48:22 Tua ahih ciangin migilote adingin nopna om lo hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah49:1 Tuipi gei-a om gamte aw, ka thu ngai un. Gamlapi-a om mihingte aw, ka thu ngai un. Ka suah ma-in Topa in kei hong teel a, ka nu sungah ka om lai-in amah in keima min hong pulak khin hi." 
Isaiah49:2 Amah in ka thugente, namsau hiam bangsak a, ama khut tawh keimah hong hu hi. Amah in a kinawtngil thaltang bangin kei hong bawl a, a hiam sa-in zat pah dingin a thallawng sungah kei hong koih hi." 
Isaiah49:3 Amah in kei kiangah, “Nang pen keimah hong kiminthansakna ding ka nasem pa Israel na hi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:4 Ahih hangin keimah in, “Na ka sem a, ahi zongin a kimanna om lo hi. Ka thatang khempeuh ka beisak a, ahi zongin bangmah ka tangtun kei hi. Ahi zongin Topa in a manin na hong sem ding, ci-in ka muang a, ka sep thaman hong pia ding hi, ci-in ka um hi,” ka ci hi." 
Isaiah49:5 Ama kiangah Jakob kipaipihkikin, ama kiangah Israel-te a kikaihkhop theih nadingin Topa ’ mai ah kei hong kipahtawi a, Pasian pen keima thahatna suakin, ama nasem dingin ka nu sung panin keimah a hong piangsak Topa in tu-in thu hong gen hi." 
Isaiah49:6 Amah in, “Jakob minamte a laam to ding le a suakta lai Israel mite a ngei uh a bangsakkik dingin keima nasem na hihna pen a baih lua mahmah nasep ahi hi. Keima hotkhiatna in leimong dong a phak theih nadingin minam dangte tungah khuavak ahi dingin nang kong pia ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:7 Israel a honpa le ama Siangtho Pa ahi Topa in nakpi takin simmawhna a thuak, minamte in a muhdah, gam ukteʼ nasem pa tungah: “Nangmah a hong teel Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa, a thuman Topa ’ hangin mite na hotkhiatna thu kumpite in a muh uh ciangin zahtakna tawh na mai ah hong ding ding uh a, na mai ah uliante hong kun ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Isaiah49:8 Topa in ama mite kiangah, “Note hotkhiat ding hun a hong tun ciangin maipha kong pia dinga, huhna nong ngetna uh kong pia ding hi. Note hong kemin ka hong hu dinga, noteʼ tungtawnin mi khempeuh tawh thuciamna ka bawl ding hi. A kinusia na gam sung uh ah note kong teengsakkik ding hi." 
Isaiah49:9 Thong kia mite tungah, ‘Hong paikhia un,’ ci-in, khuamial sunga om mite tungah, ‘Hong pusuak un,’ ka ci ding hi. Amaute pen lam tawntung ah an a ne, mual pawn a sang munte khempeuh ah nuam takin a gamta tuute tawh kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:10 Amaute gilkial loin, dangtak lo ding uh a, huih sa le nisa in amaute su kha lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a hehpih pa in amaute lamkaih dinga, ciktui kiangah amaute paipih ding hi." 
Isaiah49:11 “Keimah in ka mite adingin mual liante kantanin lampi ka ziksak dinga, ka lam lianpite ah phung ka ciang ding hi." 
Isaiah49:12 Ka mite a gamlapi panin hong pai ding uh a, leilu lam gam le nitumna lam gamte panin amaute hong pai-in, pawl khatte, leitaw lam Siene gam panin hong ciah ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:13 Vantungte aw, lungdamin la sa un. Leitung aw, lungdamin diang in. Mual liante aw, lungdamin la sa-in awng khia un! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite hehnem ta a, gimna a thuak ama mite hehpih ta ding hi." 
Isaiah49:14 Ahih hangin Jerusalem mite in, “ Topa in eite hong nusia khin a, hong mangngilh khinta hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah49:15 Ahih hangin Topa in, “Ama sung panin a suak a tapa a hehpih lo ding zahin nupi khat in ama nawi a teep naungek mangngilh thei ding ahi hiam? Hihte nangawn in mangngilh kha thei dinga, ahi zongin keimah in kong mangngilh kei ding hi." 
Isaiah49:16 Jerusalem aw, ka khut peek sungah nang kong gelh khinzo a, nang ka hong mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Isaiah49:17 “Nang a hong lam mite in nang a hong susiate nuaisiah khinta uh a, nang hong siasakte nang kiang panin tai khia khinta uh hi." 
Isaiah49:18 Na kimkot ah khuadak to inla mu in. Na mi khempeuh hong kikhawm uh a, nangma kiangah amaute hong ciah uh hi. Kei pen a nungta Topa ka hih mah bangin, na mite khempeuh hangin nang na kisial dinga, mothak in kizepna-in a zat bangin amaute khempeuh na zang ding hi." 
Isaiah49:19 “A kisia, a kinusia khin sa nangma munte le a kisusia nangma gam pen nangma tungah a teeng mite adingin tu-in kawcik lua ta dinga, nang hong valh tum mite, gamlapi ah om ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:20 Na kikhen hun uh, salin a om sungun a suak mite in nangma kiangah, ‘Kote adingin mun kawcik lua hi; ka omna ding uh mun hong bawlsak in,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:21 Tua ciangin na lungsimah, ‘Kua in keima adingin hih mite hong hin khiatsak ahi hiam? Kei hong kinusia-in tang-awlin ka om a, salin hong kikoihin hong kipaikhiat pih hi. Hihte kua in hong khoisak ahi hiam? Keimah guakin hong kinusia hi. Tua ahih manin koi lai panin hihte hong piang ahi hiam?’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:22 Topa Pasian in, “En in, minamte tungah ka khut ka laam to dinga, mite tungah ka lim ka lak to ding hi. Amaute in a ang sung uh ah na tapate tawi-in hong paipih ding uh a, a liangko tung uh ah na tate hong pua ding uh hi." 
Isaiah49:23 Kumpite pen nang hong kem na pate hong hi dinga, kumpinute pen nang hong khoi na nute hong hi ding hi. Amaute in a maitang uh leilak ngatin nang kiangah hong kun ding uh a, na khe-a leivui baangte a liak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa ka hihna na hong thei ding hi. Kei hong muangte maizum lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah49:24 A thahatpaʼ kiang panin nate kila khia zo dinga, thukhauh paʼ mat mite kihon khia zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah49:25 Topa in, “A thahatpaʼ mat salte kila khia dinga, a thukhauh paʼ na kila khia ding hi. Nang hong dem mite keimah in ka dem dinga, na tate ka hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah49:26 Nang hong nengniam mite pen amauʼ satak mah ka nesak dinga, zukham bangin amauʼ si mah a kham ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Jakobʼ Vanglian Pa, nang hong Tan khia pa, nang hong Hon Topa ka hihna mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah50:1 Topa in, “Amah ka ciahsakna, na nu a kimakna lai koi ah om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh nang kong zuakna ka leibatnate koi pan ahi hiam? Nomau mawhna hangin note hong kizuak a, nomau khialhna hangin na nu uh kipaikhiasak hi." 
Isaiah50:2 “Kong pai ciangin bang hangin mi khat zong om lo ahi hiam? Kong sap ciangin bang hangin hong dawng ding khat zong om lo ahi hiam? Hong hon zo lo zah dingin ka khut hat lo lua ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong note khah khiatna ding vangliatna nei lo ka hi hiam? Keima taina tawh tuipi ka keusak a, gunte pen sehnel gam ka suaksak hi. Tui om loh manin a ngasate dangtakin si-in a uih gawp hi." 
Isaiah50:3 Vantungte khuamial ka silhsak a, amauʼ kituam nadingin puanhampi ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah50:4 A lunggim mite ka thahatsak theih nadingin Topa Pasian in ka gen ding thu hong hilh khin hi. Ama hong hilhnate a ngai dingin zingsang simin lawpna hong guan hi. 
Isaiah50:5 Topa Pasian in thu theihtelna hong guan hi. Amah ka lehdo kei a, zong ka nungngat kei hi." 
Isaiah50:6 Hong satte, ka nung ka dawh a, ka khamul-in a hong kai mite, ka paang ka dawh hi. Maizumna le cilphihna panin ka maitang ka hei kei hi." 
Isaiah50:7 Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Tua ahih ciangin cih nading thei loin ka om kei hi. Tua ahih manin ka thuak tentan a, hong maizumsak lo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Isaiah50:8 Ka thumanna a langsak Pasian a nai ah hong om hi. Keima lang khat ah kua hong pang zo ding ahi hiam? Thukhen zumah kikhia nuʼng. Thukhen zumah kua in hong khia nuam ahi hiam? Kei hong langpang dingin hong kuan tahen. 
Isaiah50:9 Topa Pasian in kei hong huh hi. Kua in kei mawh hi, ci-in gen thei ding ahi hiam? Amaute khempeuh puan bangin paat khia ding uh a, nget in amaute ne tum ding hi." 
Isaiah50:10 Topa kihta a, a nasem paʼ thu a mangte khempeuh khuamial sungah na pai hangun Topa muang unla, Pasian suanin nei un." 
Isaiah50:11 Midang suksiat ding a sawm mite aw, noteʼ vaihawm siatna mah in note hong susia ding hi. Topa ’ khut tung panin gimna thuakin na lum suk ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:1 Topa in, “Hotkhiat ding a ut, Topa a zongte aw, ngai un. Note hong ki-eu khiatna suangpi, note hong kitawh khiatna khuk en un." 
Isaiah51:2 Na pa uh Abraham le noteʼ pianna Sarah ngaihsun dih un. Bang hang hiam cih leh khat bek ahih laitakin amah ka sam khia a, amah thupha pia-in tampi ka phasak hi." 
Isaiah51:3 “Tu-in Zion ka hehnem ding hi. A kisia ama munte khempeuh puahpha-in, ama gamlakte Eden huan sung ka bangsak dinga, ama sehnel gamte Topa ’ huan ka bangsak ding hi. Ama sungah lungdamna le kipahna, lungdamkohna le lasakna awging om ding hi." 
Isaiah51:4 “Ka mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. Minamte tungah thu ka hilh a, keima thukham in amaute tungah khuavak tun ding hi." 
Isaiah51:5 Manlangin hong pai-in amaute ka hon khia ding hi. Ka gualzawh ding hun hong nai ta hi. Keimah in minamte ka uk ding hi. Tuipi gei-a gamte in kei hong muang uh a, amaute in keima hotkhiat ding hong ngak uh hi." 
Isaiah51:6 Dak to-in vantungte en unla, leitung zong en suk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh meikhu bangin vantungte mangthang hi. Puan bangin leitung paat khia dinga, ama tunga teengte pen thokang bangin si ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keima hotkhiatna kip tawntung dinga, keima khah khiatna bei ngei lo ding hi." 
Isaiah51:7 “Thuman a thei, na lungsim sung uh ah keima thu a vom mite aw, ka thu ngai un. Mihingteʼ kosiatna kihta kei unla, amauteʼ hong simmawhna hangin lungkia kei un." 
Isaiah51:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh nget in puan a nektum bangin amaute bei mang dinga, lungno in samul puan a peh tum bangin amaute maimang ding uh hi. Ahih hangin keima khah khiatna om tawntung dinga, khang tawntungin ka hotkhiatna kip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah51:9 Khanglo in, khanglo in; thakhauh in, Topa aw. Khang sawtpi, hun lui lai-a bangin na vangliatna zangin hong huh in. Rahab a satzan gawp pa, gulpi a sun pa, nangmah hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tuipi, tui thukpite a keusak, a kihon khia miteʼ kantan dingin tui thukpite lampi-in a bawlpa nangmah hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:11 Topa ’ mi a kithehthangte hong ciahkik dinga, lasakna tawh Zion ah hong pai ding uh hi. A tawntungin amaute lungdam ding uh a, amaute in lungdamna le kipakna ngahin, dahna le khuisatna nei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:12 Topa in, “Kei, keimah pen note hong hehnem pa ka hi hi. Lopa sangin sauvei a nungta zaw tuan lo, mihing lellelte, bang hangin kihta na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah51:13 Vantungte zalin, lei bulpite a koih, note a hong bawl Topa hong mangngilh khinta na hi uh hiam? Note susia dingin a kithawi, no a hong nengniamteʼ hehna, bang hangin kihta-in lau tawntung na hi uh hiam? Amauteʼ hehna in note hong susia zo het lo ding hi." 
Isaiah51:14 Thong sunga kikhum mite kikhah baih ding hi. Amaute sau veipi nungta ding uh a, an nek tui dawn kitasam lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:15 “Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen tuipi tok gawpin tuihualte a hawksak Topa, noteʼ Pasian ka hi hi. Keima min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Isaiah51:16 Vantungte zalin lei bulpi ka phut a, Zion kiangah, ‘Nang pen keima mi na hi hi. Nang tungah thu kong hilh khin a, ka khut tawh nang ka hong hu hi,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah51:17 Topa ’ khut sung panin ama gimpiakna hai a dawn khin, hoina haipi a tawdat dongin a dawn khin Jerusalem aw, nangmah kisosuah tawm in. Nangmah kihanthawn tawm inla, ding tang to in." 
Isaiah51:18 Na mite khempeuh sung panin nang a hong makaih ding kuamah om lo a, na khoi sa tapate khempeuh lak panin na khut a hong len ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Isaiah51:19 Nang tungah siatna le maimanna, kialpi le namsau, hih thu nih hong tung zo hi. Kua in nang hong dahpih ding ahi hiam? Kua in nang hong hehnem ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah51:20 Na mite gim khin a, ngenthang sungah a awk sanang bangin lam kiu khempeuh ah amaute lum uh hi. Topa ’ hehna, na Pasianʼ taina amaute in a thuak uh hi." 
Isaiah51:21 Tua ahih ciangin gimna a thuak, zu ne lopi-in zukham a bang note in hih thu za un." 
Isaiah51:22 Ama mite adingin a thumsak Topa, Topa ahi noteʼ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: “En un, noteʼ khut sung panin hoina hai ka la khia khin a, ka hehna haipi na dawn nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah51:23 Note kiangah, ‘Na tung uh ah kong pai theih nadingun kun suk un,’ a hong ci, no a hong bawlsiateʼ khut sungah tua haipi ka koih ding hi. Note in na nungzang uh leilak bangin bawlin, amauteʼ pai nadingin kongzing lampi bangin na bawl khin uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah52:1 Zion aw, khanglo in; khanglo inla na tha khauhsak in. Khuapi siangtho Jerusalem aw, na puan hoihte silh in. Bang hang hiam cih leh dawibia mite le a nin mite nang sungah hong pai nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah52:2 A kimancip Jerusalem mite aw, leivui panin kising khia unla ding to un. A kiman Zion mite aw, na ngawng panun hong kihenna khaute sut khia un." 
Isaiah52:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Man nei loin note hong kizuak a, sum pia loin note hong kitan khia ding hi." 
Isaiah52:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Egypt gamah peemta dingin ka mite a masa-in pai uh a, tua banah thu om lopi-in Assiria in amaute nengniam uh hi." 
Isaiah52:5 Tu-in Babylon ah tua bangmahin amaute tungah piang leuleu hi. Thu om lopi-in salin om uh hi. Amau a ukte, kihihsakna tawh awng uh a, sun thapai-in keima min kisimmawh hi." 
Isaiah52:6 Tua ahih ciangin ka mite in keima min hong thei ding uh a, thu a gen pa pen keimah ka hihna tua ni ciangin amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Keimah, hih lai ah ka om hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah52:7 Thuhoih hong puak, kilemna thu a genzak, thuhoih thupha a hong puak, hotkhiatna thu a genzak, Zion tungah, “Na Pasian in uk hi,” ci-in mualte kantanin thu hong gen kamtai pa bangzahin hoih ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah52:8 Ngai un, na galvilte un a aw uh sangsak a, amaute in lungdamin la sa khawm uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion ah Topa hong paikikna amaute in maitang kituahin a mu uh hi." 
Isaiah52:9 A kisia Jerusalem munte aw, la sa-in kiko khawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama mite hehnem ta a, Jerusalem hon khia khinta hi." 
Isaiah52:10 Topa in minam khempeuh mai ah a vangliatna siangtho zangin ama mite hon khia hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in i Pasianʼ hotkhiatna mu ding uh hi. 
Isaiah52:11 Kihem un, kihem un. Babylon panin paikhia unla, a nin nate lawng kei un. Topa ’ beellekuang a puate aw, khua sung panin paikhia unla, nomau kisiansuah tawm un." 
Isaiah52:12 Noteʼ mai ah Topa pai dinga, Israel Pasian pen noteʼ nungah hong cing pa hi ding ahih manin note galtai-in paikhia loin, a kinawh sa-in na paikhia kei ding uh hi." 
Isaiah52:13 Topa in, “En un; ka nasem pa a dau pai-in, amah a lianin kikoihin kilaam to dinga, sang mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah52:14 Mi tampite in amah lamdang sa uh hi. Mihing a bang nawn lo zah dongin nakpi takin a mai sia a, mihing a sun nawn lo zah dongin a mel a sia hi." 
Isaiah52:15 Tua ahih ciangin amah in minam tampite dipkuasak dinga, ama hangin kumpite in a kam uh cih ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah a kigen ngei lo nate mu ding uh a, amaute in a zak ngei loh uh nate thei tel ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah53:1 Tua ciangin mite in, “I zak thu kua in um thei ding ahi hiam? Hih bang thu ah Topa ’ vangliatna khut kua in bangci muh theih ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah53:2 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen kungno khat ahi a, lei keu sungah a om singzung khat bangin ahi zongin ama mai ah khangto lel hi. Eiteʼ et dingin amah in lim le deihhuaina mel bangmah nei lo a, eiteʼ deih dingin hoihna nei lo hi." 
Isaiah53:3 Amah pen mite in simmawhin nusia a, gimna le natna a thuak ahi hi. Mite in en nuam loin a mai uh a hum san uh mipa bangin amah kisimmawh a, eite in amah i thusim kei hi." 
Isaiah53:4 “Amah in eiteʼ natna teng thuakin, eiteʼ gimna teng pua khin taktak hi. Ahi zongin eite in amah pen ama mawhna hangin Pasian in a gimsak, gimna a thuak bangin i ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah53:5 Ahih hangin eiteʼ khialhna hangin amah kiliamsak a, eiteʼ mawhna hangin amah kisatnim hi. Ama gim thuakna hangin nopna i ngah a, ama liamna hangin damna i ngah hi." 
Isaiah53:6 Eite khempeuh in tuu bangin lam i khial khin a, eite khempeuh eimau san ciatah i pai khin hi. Topa in eite khempeuhʼ mawhnate ama tungah a suan hi." 
Isaiah53:7 “Amah kinengniamin gimna a kithuaksak hangin amah kam khat beek pau lo hi. Sa gote kiangah a kipaipih tuuno le a mul mette mai ah a kipaipih tuu a ham loh mah bangin amah kam khat beek pau lo hi. 
Isaiah53:8 Nenniamna le thukhenna tawh amah kipaikhiat pih hi. A hingteʼ gam panin amah kikhen khia-in, ama miteʼ khialhna hangin amah in gimna thuak hi, ci-in ama khang mite kua in thei ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah53:9 Amah in mawhna bawl lo, zuaugen ngei lo napi-in, amaute in migilote tawh sihna a kibang, mihaute tawh hankhuk a kibang a bawlsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah53:10 Ahih hangin amah a kisatnim ding pen Topa ’ deihna ahi hi. Amah in natna thuaksak hi. Mawhna hangin ama pumpi a kipiak ciangin amah in a suanlekhakte mu dinga, ama khan a sau ding hi. Topa ’ deihna ama khut sungah pung ding hi." 
Isaiah53:11 Amah in a gimna thaman mu-in a lungdam ding hi. A mawk thuak ahih lohna thei-in a thuman ka nasem pa in mi tampi tak a dik suaksak dinga, amah in amauteʼ mawhnate pua ding hi." 
Isaiah53:12 Tua ahih ciangin amah pen mi liante tawh nate ka hawmsak dinga, amah in mihatte tawh nate a hawm ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sihna dongin a nuntakna pia khia a, khialhna a nei mite tawh a kisim khawm hi. Ahih hangin amah in mi tampiʼ mawhna pua a, khialhna a neite adingin a thumsak hi." 
Isaiah54:1 Ta a nei lo, a ciing mi aw, lungdamin la sa in. Nausuak natna a thuak ngei lo mi aw, la sa khia inla, a gingin kiko in! Bang hang hiam cih leh a kinusia numeiʼ tate pen a kiteen pih numeiteʼ tate sangin tam zaw ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:2 Na bukmun khan inla, na teenna puanbukte kizalsak in. Cil bawl kei in. Na khaute sausak inla, na khetphimte khenkip in." 
Isaiah54:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh taklam le veilamah nangmah kizelin, na suanlekhakte in minam dangteʼ leitang luah ding uh a, a kinusia khuapite mi tawh dimsak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah54:4 Lau kei in, maizumna na thuak kei ding hi. Cih nading thei loin om kei in; maizumin nang hong kikoih lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khangno lai-in na zulhtatna le na meigonna hangin hong kikonate na phawk kha nawn kei ding hi." 
Isaiah54:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah hong Bawlpa pen nang adingin na pasal bang hi dinga, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi. Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa pen nang hong hon khia pa hi a, amah pen leitung buppiʼ Pasian a kici hi." 
Isaiah54:6 Khangno lai-a zi neih a kima, kinusia-in a dah mahmah zi a kisamkik bangin Topa in nang hong samkik hi, na Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:7 Tomno sung nang kong nusia pak a, ahih hangin hehpihna lianpi tawh nang kong lakik ding hi." 
Isaiah54:8 Hehluatna hangin tomno sung nang kiang panin ka maitang ka seel a, ahih hangin tawntung itna tawh nang kong hehpihkik ding hi, nangmah a hong hon khia Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen kei adingin Noahʼ hun mah tawh a kibang hi. Noah tuite leitungah hong pai nawn lo ding, ci-in ka kiciam mah bangin nang tungah heh nawn loin nang a hong tai nawn lo dingin ka kiciam hi." 
Isaiah54:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mual liante kihemin, mual neute a kikhiin zongin nang kiang panin ka itna kip paikhia ngei lo dinga, na nopsak nading ka thuciamna kin lo ding hi, nang a hong hehpih Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah54:11 “Gimna a thuak, huihpiʼ nawk gawp, hehnepna a ngah lo khuapi aw, en in, na suangte, suangvui hoih tawh ka ciang dinga, na bulpite suangmanpha tawh ka hih ding hi." 
Isaiah54:12 Na khumdawnte suangmanpha tawh, na kulh kongpite suangsan tawh, na kulh khempeuh a manpha suang tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah54:13 “ Topa in na tapate khempeuh hoihtakin hilh dinga, na tapate daupai mahmah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah54:14 Thuman le thutang in nang hong thahatsak ding hi. Nenniamna tawh na kigamla dinga, nang na lau kei ding hi. Kihtakna tawh na kigamla dinga, nangma nai ah tuate hong pai lo ding hi." 
Isaiah54:15 Mi khatpeuh in note tawh kidona a piansak leh tua pen keima kiang pan hi lo hi. Note tawh kidona a piangsak peuhmah noteʼ hangin puk ding uh hi. 
Isaiah54:16 “En un, pum zapin ama kizat nading ciatin a seek dingin hiam a bawl sikseek pa ka piangsak khin hi. A susia dingin a susia gawp thei pa zong ka piangsak khin hi." 
Isaiah54:17 Nangmah do nadingin a kibawl hiam peuhmah maavang lo dinga, thukhenna sungah na langah a pang mi khempeuh na nial gawp zo ding hi. Hih thu pen Topa ’ nasemteʼ gamhluah le keima kiang panin amauteʼ dikna a kilahna ahi hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah55:1 A dangtak mi peuhmah tui phualah hong pai un. An nei lote aw, hong pai unla hong ne un! Hong pai un; a man ding bangmah piak kul loin leenggahzu le bawngnawi na duh zahzah uh hong ne un." 
Isaiah55:2 An ahi lo nate lei nadingin bang hangin na sum uh zang a, hong gilvahsak thei lo nate ngah nadingin bang hangin na sem na hi uh hiam? Keima thu limtakin ngai-in a limci an ne unla, anlimte ah nuamsa-in om un." 
Isaiah55:3 Ka mite aw, ka thu ngai unla, kei kiangah hong pai un. Na nuntak theih nadingun a thu hong za un. David ka it mah bangin keima itna kip, tawntung thuciamna note tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah55:4 David pen mite tungah teci ding, mite a makai ding le a ukpa dingin ka koih hi." 
Isaiah55:5 Tu-in note in na theih ngei loh uh minam dangte na sam ding uh a, amah in note hong min thangsak zo ahih manin, Topa noteʼ Pasian, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ hangin note hong thei lo minamte note kiangah hong tai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah55:6 A kimuh theih hun lai-in Topa zong unla amah a nai om lai-in thu ngen un. 
Isaiah55:7 Migilo in ama gitlohna nusia henla, thuman lo mi in ama ngaihsutna nusia hen. Amah in a hehpih theih nadingin Topa eiteʼ Pasianʼ kiangah amah paisak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawhna maisiangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah55:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh keima ngaihsutnate nomauʼ ngaihsutna bang hi lo a, keima pai ziate nomauʼ paizia bang hi lo hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah55:9 Vantung pen leitung sangin a san zawk mah bangin, keima pai ziate zong, nomau paizia sangin sang zaw a, ka ngaihsutnate zong, nomau ngaihsutna sangin a sang zaw ahi hi." 
Isaiah55:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung panin guahtui le vuk hong pai-in, amaute ciahkik loin leitung kawtsakin, kungnote mengin sel khiasak a, khai vawhpa khaici pia-in a ne pa tungah an a piak mah bangin," 
Isaiah55:11 keima kam panin a paikhia ka thu zong tua mah bang ding hi. A hawmpi-in kei kiangah hong tungkik lo dinga, keima ngimna sa bangin tangtungsakin, amah ka sawlna thu tangtun ding hi." 
Isaiah55:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon panin lungdamna tawh na paikhia ding uh a, nopsakna tawh hong kipaikhiat pih ding hi. Note mai-a mual liante le mual neute in la sa-in awng ding uh a, gam sunga sing khempeuh in a khut uh beeng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah55:13 Ling tangin tak kung hong po dinga, lingkung tangin mui kung hong po ding hi. Tua pen Topa ’ nasepna phawk tawntungna, a kila khia ngei lo ding, a tawntungin a om lim khat hi ding hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “A sawt loin note ka hong hon khia dinga, hong khah khia ding ka hih manin thutang thumanin gamta un." 
Isaiah56:2 Hih banga a gamta mite, hih thu a lenkip mihingte, Sabbath tangin a siasak lote, siatna bawlna ding panin hoihtakin a kikemte, thupha ngah mi ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:3 Topa pawlin a beel gamdang mipa in, “ Topa in ama mite kiang panin kei hong khen khia taktak ding hi,” ci kei hen. A kiget mipa in, “En un, kei pen Pasianʼ mite lakah a kihel thei ding ka hi kei hi,” ci kei hen." 
Isaiah56:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Keima Sabbath nite tangin, kei hong lungdamsak thei nate teel a, ka thuciamna a lenkip a kiget mite tungah" 
Isaiah56:5 ka inn sung le ka huang sungah tanu le tapate sangin a hoih zaw phawkna le min ka pia dinga, a mang ngei nawn lo ding a kip tawntung min amaute tungah ka pia ding hi." 
Isaiah56:6 “Ama na a sem ding, Topa ’ min a it ding, ama nasem a suak dingin Topa pawlin amah a beel gamdang mite, Sabbath ni tangin a siasak lo, ka thuciamna hoihtakin a lenkip mi peuhmah," 
Isaiah56:7 ka mual siangtho ah paipihin keima thungetna inn sungah ka lungdamsak dinga, amauteʼ meihal biakna le a biakpiaknate uh ka biakna tau tungah kisang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka inn pen mi khempeuh adingin thungetna inn kici ding hi." 
Isaiah56:8 Israel a kikhenthangte a kaikhawm Topa Pasian in, a kikaikhawm sa mite banah midangte keima kiangah ka kaikhawm lai ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah56:9 Lo sungah a om ganhing khempeuhte, gamlak ah a om ganhing khempeuhte aw, a ne tum dingin hong pai un." 
Isaiah56:10 Amauʼ galvilte a mit uh taw a, amaute khempeuh in bangmah thei lo uh hi. Amaute khempeuh ui ham thei lo inncing tawh kibang uh a, amaute in tawng thei lo uh hi. Mot paupau, lumlum, lu susu in om ding bek nuam a sa uh hi." 
Isaiah56:11 Uite in nakpi takin duh uh a, kham hun cih nei ngei lo uh hi. Tuucingte in zong thutheihna nei lo uh hi. Amaute khempeuh amau tum ciatin gamta uh a, a vekpi-un amauʼ phattuam nading bek a zong ciat uh hi." 
Isaiah56:12 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, leenggahzu nene ni; khamtheih zu dawndawn ni. Zing ciangin zong tu ni sangin nuam zaw lai ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Isaiah57:1 Thuman mipa si a, kuamah in tua thu ngaihsutin nei nawn lo hi. Kuamah in a theih loh kalin thutak mite si uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuahsiatna panin thuman mipa kila khia a, nopsakna sungah amah tum hi." 
Isaiah57:2 Thutangin a gamta mite in a sihna uh ah nopna ngahin tawlnga uh hi. 
Isaiah57:3 No, ai san numeiteʼ tapate, numei tawh a mawh mite le numei pangtatteʼ tuletate aw, hih lai ah hong pai un." 
Isaiah57:4 Note in kua mawlpih gawpgawp na hi uh hiam? Kuaʼ tungah na kam uh ka beba-in na leii uh phen na hi uh hiam? Tawsaw kung lak singkung hing khempeuh nuai ah pasian biakna-in nulepa mawhna a bawl, kuam sung, suanghawm sungah na tate uh a that note pen khialhna tate, zuaunaʼ tuletate hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah57:5  
Isaiah57:6 Kuam sunga om suangmaite na la uh a, tua suangmaite na bia uh hi. Tuate tungah tui tawh biakpiakna sungin, an tawh biakpiakna na paipih uh hi. Hih thuteʼ hangin kei lungdam ding ka hi hiam?" 
Isaiah57:7 A lian a sang mual tungah nulepa mawhna na bawl uh a, tua munah biakna pia dingin na pai to uh hi." 
Isaiah57:8 Kongkhak le kongkhak mung nungah nangmah in na milimte na suang hi. Nangmah in kei hong nusia-in na puante na suah a, nang hong luppih dingin na cial mite tawh na lupna zai deda tungah kah to-in, tua lai ah na hukna teng na kamsak hi." 
Isaiah57:9 Molek pasian kiangah a pai dingin sathau tawh khual na zin a, na paknamtuite tawh na siam tawpin na kipuah hi. Nang in gamlapi ah na taangmite na sawl a, Leinuai dong nangawn ah na paisak hi." 
Isaiah57:10 A gamla na khualzinna hangin nang na gim mahmah a, ahih hangin nangmah in, “Lametna om kei,” na ci kei hi." 
Isaiah57:11 Nang zuautatin kei na hong phawk kei hi. Kei na hong ngaihsut loh nading a piangsak zah dingin hih pasian-te bang hi leltak ahi hiam? Sau veipi sung pau loin ka om hithiat manin kei hong zahtak lo na hi hiam? 
Isaiah57:12 Nangma gamtatna a manin na ngaihsun kha hi. Ahih hangin na gamtatnate ka pholak dinga, na milimte in nang hong huh zo lo ding hi." 
Isaiah57:13 Nang cimawhin na kiko ciangin na milim kaihkhopte kihonsak in! Huih in amaute mut khia-in, husanna in amaute seem khia ding hi. Ahih hangin kei hong beel mi in leitang ngah dinga, ka mual siangtho a luah ding hi." 
Isaiah57:14 “Zik un, zik un, lampi bawl un; ka miteʼ lampi a dongkhak thei ding na khempeuh la khia un,” kici ding hi." 
Isaiah57:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh a sang, a lian, a nungta tawntung Pa, ama min Siangtho ahi pa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen a sangna mun le a siangtho munah ka om a, a kiniamkhiat miteʼ lungsim le a kisik miteʼ lungsim a thakhauhsakkik dingin kisikna le kiniamkhiatna lungsim a neite tawh zong kei ka om khawm hi." 
Isaiah57:16 Ka mite tungah nuntakna ka pia hi. Amaute ka mawhsak paisuak kei dinga, amaute tungah ka heh tawntung kei ding hi." 
Isaiah57:17 Amauʼ huaiham-mawhna hangin ka heh mahmah a, ka hehna lungsim tawh amaute gim pia-in ka nusia hi. Ahih hangin amaute a lungsim uh khauhin, a gamtat ngei bangun gamta lai veve uh hi." 
Isaiah57:18 “Amauʼ mawh gamtatnate a vekin ka mu khin a, ahih hangin amaute ka damsak ding hi. Amaute makaihin ka hehnem dinga, a dah a kapte hehnemin ka lungdamsak ding hi." 
Isaiah57:19 Nopsakna, nopsakna, a gamla le a nai mi khempeuh tungah om tahen. Keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah57:20 Ahih hangin migilote pen a kilok tui tawh kibang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi khawlcip thei lo a, a tuite in buan le ninte laam to uh hi." 
Isaiah57:21 Migilote adingin nopsakna om lo hi,” ka Pasian in a ci hi." 
Isaiah58:1 Na aw siit het loin nakpi takin kiko inla, peengkul aw bangin gingsak in. Ka mihingte tungah amauʼ khialhnate gen inla, Jakob innkuan tungah amauʼ mawhnate gen in." 
Isaiah58:2 Amaute pen, thumanin a gamta, amauʼ Pasianʼ biakna ngeina kipte a nusia lo minam bang keekin nisimin amaute in kei hong zong uh a, keima lampi a thei nuam uh hi. Amaute in keima kiang panin thukhenna man hong ngen uh a, Pasianʼ kiang hong nai nuam uh hi." 
Isaiah58:3 “Kote in an tang napi-in bang hangin kote hong phawk lo na hi hiam? Kote kiniamkhiatin om napi-in bang hangin kote hong thei kha lo na hi hiam?” hong ci uh hi. Note in an na tan uh ciangin nomauʼ deihna na zong uh a, na nasemte uh na nengniam uh hi." 
Isaiah58:4 Note in a kitawng ding, a kilaii ding, gitloh gamtatin, khuttum tawh a kitum ding bekin an na tang uh hi. Hih bang lelin antanna tawh na thungetna uh hong kingai ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah58:5 Mau gua kun bangin na lu uh kun sukin, puanhampi le vut tungah lumin, nomau na kigimsak tawmnate uh keiʼ deih antanna nam sa na hi uh hiam? Hih bang hihna pen antanna man le Topaʼ san theih pawl hi, ci ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah58:6 Keiʼ deih antanna hih bang pawl ahi hi: Gitlohna khaute phelin, hakkol savun khaute phel a, a kinengniam mite khah khia-in thuman lohna hakkol khempeuh suk tan ding ahi hi." 
Isaiah58:7 Na an uh a gilkialte tawh nekhawm unla, inn nei lo a zawngte na inn sung uh ah paipihin, tangguakin a om mite puan silhsakin, na mipihte uh kiang panin bu lo ding hi lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Isaiah58:8 Tua ciangin ka maipha pen phalvak tung hong bang dinga, noteʼ tungah hong taang khia ding hi. Manlang takin na liammate uh hong dam ding hi. Note hong ompih tawntungin note kong hon dinga, na nung na mai uh ah ka hong dal ding hi." 
Isaiah58:9 Tua ciangin nong thungetna uh kong pia dinga, nong sap uh ciangin kong dawng ding hi. Mi bawlsiatnate khawlin, mi simmawhna le kam gilo na paunate uh na khawl uh a," 
Isaiah58:10 gilkial mite an pia-in, kisapna a nei mite tungah a kisapnate na piak uh leh na kimkot uh a khuamial pen khuavak hong suak dinga, na lungzinna uh nitaang hong bang ding hi." 
Isaiah58:11 Tua ciangin note lam kong lak tawntung dinga, na hoihte tawh kong lungkimsak ding hi. A cidam a thahatin kong omsak ding hi. Tui tampi a ngah tawntung huan, a kang ngei lo ciktui tawh na kibang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah58:12 Tanglai-in a kisia na munte uh na lamkik ding uh a, khang tampi sung a kisia bulpite na ding tosakkik ding uh hi. Note pen a sia a puahkik, ten nadingin mun siate a ngei a bangsakkikte hong kici ding hi." 
Isaiah58:13 Note in Sabbath siangthosakin, keima ni siangtho ni-in na nasepna panun khawlin Sabbath ni pen deihhuai sa-in, Topaʼ ni siangtho pen pahtawihuai na cih uh a, note in pahtawi-in noteʼ deih bang zui loin, noteʼ ut bang hi loin mot pau loin na om uh leh," 
Isaiah58:14 keimah biakna hangin lungdamna na ngah ding uh a, leitung khempeuh ah pahtawina kong ngahsak ding hi. Na pu uh Jakob tungah ka piak leitang luahin nuam na sa ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah59:1 A hon khia zo lo dingin Topa zawngkhal lo a, khua a za thei lo dingin a bilngong lo hi." 
Isaiah59:2 Ahih hangin noteʼ mawhnate in note le na Pasian uh kikhenna hong piangsak a, amah in noteʼ aw hong zak theih loh nadingin na khialhnate un ama maitang liah hi." 
Isaiah59:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khutte uh mi thahna sisan tawh nin a, na khutmete uh mawhna tawh a nin hi. Na mukte un zuau thu gen a, na leiite un gitlohna thu a gen hi." 
Isaiah59:4 Kuamah in thutang tawh thu na nei kei uh a, thuman tak tawh thukhen zumah na pai kei uh hi. Note in bangmah lopi suanin nei-in zuau thu na gen uh a, siat nading thu ngaihsunin buaina na piangsak uh hi." 
Isaiah59:5 Na ngaihsutnate uh gul gunei tui bangin gu a nei hi a, na vaihawmnate uh maimom khau puan tawh kibang lel hi. Gul gunei tui khat sukham lehang a dang khat hong tui zel hi." 
Isaiah59:6 Na maimom khau puante uh kizang thei lo dinga, kuamah in silh lo ding uh hi. Na vaihawmnate uh tua maimom khau puan bangin a mawkna suak lel ding hi." 
Isaiah59:7 Siatna bekbek na geelgeel uh a, na sepkhiat ding uh na ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Mawhnei lo mite thah ding haksa na sa kei uh hi. Na paina khempeuh uh ah siatna vive om kawikawi hi." 
Isaiah59:8 Noteʼ omna peuh ah kuamah lungmuang thei lo a, noteʼ sepna khempeuh ah thuman khat beek om lo hi. Na lungsim uh kawi mahmah a, hong zui kha mite in thunuam mu ngei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah59:9 Tua ahih ciangin ei a hong gimsakte kiang panin Pasian in a hong hotkhiat lohna a hang i thei hi. Eite in a nuam ding i lamen a, ahi zongin lungzinna bekbek i tuak hi." 
Isaiah59:10 Mittaw bangin kawm i zawt a, mit nei lote bangin i mai hi. Sun tang laipi mahin khuamial lak bangin i tuk a, a hat mite lakah misi tawh i kibang hi." 
Isaiah59:11 Eite khempeuh vompi bangin i humham a, vakhu bangin i thumthum hi. Eite in thutang i zong a, ahi zongin khat zong i mu kei hi. Hong hotkhiat ding i ngen a, ahi zongin bangmah hong piang lo hi." 
Isaiah59:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah koteʼ thupalsatna tampi tak pha a, ka mawhnate un koteʼ langah teci hong pang hi. Koteʼ thupalsatnate, ka mawhnate uh ka thei uh hi." 
Isaiah59:13 Nangmah hong lehdo-in nang kong nial uh a, na thu kong zui kei uh hi. Midangte nengniamin nang kong lehdo uh hi. Ka ngaihsutnate uh khial a, ka thugente uh zuau thu vive ahi hi." 
Isaiah59:14 Thutang kihawl khia a, thuman in hong naih thei lo hi. Mihonpiteʼ kikhopna munah thuman kizang lo a, thutang tum thei lo hi." 
Isaiah59:15 Thuman om lo lua ahih manin siatna a pelh mipa pen mihai-in kingaihsun zawsop hi. Topa in hih thu mu a, thutang om lo ahih manin amah lungkim lo hi." 
Isaiah59:16 Amah in nenniamna a thuakte a huh ding mi khat beek a om lohna a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute a hon khia ding le a gualzawh nadingin ama vangliatna a zang ding hi. 
Isaiah59:17 Amah in thumanna pen awmdal lum bangin silh dinga, gualzawhna pen sik lukhu bangin khu ding hi. Na khempeuh a manin bawlkik nopna, gimna a piangsakte gim pia-in thukkik nopna lungsim puan bangin a silh ding hi." 
Isaiah59:18 Amauʼ gamtatna bangin amah in thukkik dinga, amah a langpangte gim pia ding hi. Ama galte a thukkik ding hi. A gamla pekah a om tuipi gei-a gamte zong a thukkik ding hi." 
Isaiah59:19 Tua ahih ciangin nisuahna le nitumna kikalah a om mi khempeuh in amah zahtakin, a vangliatna kihta ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi nung bang, tuipi khang bangin amah hong pai ding hi." 
Isaiah59:20 Topa in ama mite tungah, “Note a hong hu dingin Jerusalem ah kong pai dinga, mawhna panin a kihei khia mi peuhmah ka hong hon khia ding hi." 
Isaiah59:21 “Note tawh hih bangin thuciamna ka bawl hi: Keima vangliatna tawh keima thukhamte le ka thuhilhnate note tungah kong pia khin a, tu a kipanin a tawntungin note in tua thute zui-in na suanlekhakte uh na hilh ding uh a, a khangkhangin na maimangsak kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah60:1 Jerusalem khuapi aw, tho-in sun nitaang bang in! Topa ’ minthanna in nangmah hong taan zo hi." 
Isaiah60:2 Minam dangte khuamial in tuamcip dinga, ahi zongin nangma tungah Topa ’ khuavak hong taang ding hi. Ama minthanna in nang hong ompih ding hi." 
Isaiah60:3 Nangma khuavak sungah minam dangte hong pai ding uh a, nangma taan khiatna sungah kumpite hong pai ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:4 Na kimkot ah khuadak inla mu in. Na mite kikaikhawmin nang kiangah a ciah dingin hong pai uh hi. Na tapate gamlapi panin hong ciah ding uh a, na tanute naungek bangin hong kipua ding hi." 
Isaiah60:5 Tua ciangin nangmah in mu-in na maitai dinga, na lungsim liingin na lungdam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuipi tawnin nangma kiangah van hong kipuak dinga, minamteʼ hauhna khempeuh nangma kiangah hong tung ding hi." 
Isaiah60:6 Midian mite le Efah miteʼ kalaoh note, kalaoh honpite in nang hong tuam ding uh a, Sheba gam sunga om khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi. Amaute in kham le paknamtui hong paipih ding uh a, Topa phatna a taangko ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:7 Kedar gam tuuhonte khempeuh nang kiangah hong kipua dinga, Nebaioth miteʼ tuutalte nangma deih nana ah kizang ding hi. Ka biakna tau tungah piak dingin tuate hong kipaipih dinga, keimah in a minthang ka biakinn ka min thangsak semsem ding hi." 
Isaiah60:8 Meiipi leeng bangin hong pai henhan hih teembawte, vakhute a buk ah a leeng bangin a hong leeng henhante kuate ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah60:9 Hih teembawte pen tuipi gei le tuikulh ah a om teembawte hi a, Tarshish teembaw lianpite in hong makaih hi. Topa in nangmah a minthang mahmah in hong bawl khin ahih manin gamlapi panin tua teembawte in nangma mite hong puak uh a, a ngun a khamte uh tawh hong puakkhawm uh hi. Topa, na Pasian, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Pa a pahtawina-in a hong puak uh ahi hi." 
Isaiah60:10 Gamdang mite in na kulhte ciangkik ding uh a, amauʼ kumpite in nangma na hong sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna tawh nang kong vat gawp khin a, ahih hangin tu-in keima maipha tawh nang tungah hehpihna kong nei khin hi." 
Isaiah60:11 Kigual deudau-in a hong paina uh ah a kumpite uh hong makai-in, mite in minamteʼ hauhna na kiang hong tut theih nadingin na kulh kongpite kihong tawntung dinga, a sun a zanin kikhak ngei lo ding hi." 
Isaiah60:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma na hong sem lo minam le kumpi gam bei mang dinga, tua minamte kisia-mai mang ding hi." 
Isaiah60:13 Keima biakinn mun a mel a hoihsak dingin Lebanon mual minthanna ahi taaksan sing, hiangpa sing le taksingte na kiangah hong tung dinga, keima khengakna mun ka min thangsak ding hi." 
Isaiah60:14 Nang hong nengniamteʼ tate na mai ah a kun sa-in hong pai ding uh a, nang hong simmawh mi khempeuh na khe mai ah hong bok ding uh hi. Amaute in nang pen Topa ’ khuapi, Israel-teʼ Siangtho Paʼ Zion, hong ci ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:15 Hong kinusia, hong kimudah, kuama hong nawk loh nang pen a tawntungin lianin, khang khat pan khang khat lungdamna ahi dingin kong bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah60:16 Nupi khat in a ta nawi pia-in limtakin a kep bangin, minamte le kumpite in nang hong vakin hong kem ding uh hi. Tua ciangin kei pen Topa, nangmah a hong Honpa, nangmah a hong Tan khia pa, Jakobʼ Vanglian Pa ka hihna na thei ding hi." 
Isaiah60:17 Sumngo tangin kham kong puak dinga, sik tangin ngun kong paipih ding hi. Sing tangin sumngo, suang tangin sik kong puak ding hi. Nuam na sak nadingin na mang liante uh bawlin na nasem ukte uh thuman thutang tawh na ka semsak ding hi." 
Isaiah60:18 Na gam sungah ngongtatna thu kiza nawn lo dinga, na gam sungah siatmaina le suksiatna om nawn lo ding hi. Nangmah in na kulhte pen Hotkhiatna, na kulh kongpite pen Phatna, na ci ding hi." 
Isaiah60:19 Sun hunin ni pen nangma khuavak hi lo dinga, zan hunin kha pen na khuavak hi nawn lo ding hi. Topa pen a tawntung nangma khuavak hi dinga, na Pasian pen na minthanna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah60:20 Na ni tum nawn lo dinga, na kha zong tumkik nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen nangma khuavak hi tawntung dinga, na thumna hunte bei ta ding hi." 
Isaiah60:21 Na mihingte khempeuh thuman ding uh hi. Keima min a than nadingin keima suan sa kung, ka khut tawh ka sep sa gam pen amaute in nei paisuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah60:22 A ngek pen mipa minam khat suak dinga, a neu pente milianpi suak ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi. A hun a tun ciangin keimah in thakhatin hih thu ka tungsak ding hi."
