Isaiah61:1 Gimna a thuak mite tungah thuhoih a puak dingin Topa in kei hong teelin hong sawl ahih manin keima sungah Topa Pasian ’ kha hong om hi. Lungsim kitamzante a damsak ding, salin a kimante tungah suahtakna thu a gen ding, a kikhum mite adingin thong kong a hong ding," 
Isaiah61:2 Topa in a mite hon khia-in, a galte a guallelhsak ding hun a tunna thu a gen ding, a thum mi khempeuh a hehnem ding," 
Isaiah61:3 amaute pen a thuman mite kici-in, amah a kiminthansak theih nadingin Topa in a mite kem hi, a kicih theih nadingin Zion ah a om a dah mite a lungdam nading, a lungkham mite in phatna la a sak theih nading, a lunggim mite in Pasian a phat theih nadingin amah in kei hong sawl zo hi." 
Isaiah61:4 Amaute in tanglai-a a sia sate, lamphakik ding uh a, a kisia-mai sate ding kiksak ding uh hi. Amaute in khang tampi sung a kisia-mai sa khuapite puahkik ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:5 Gamdang mite in na tuuhonte uh hong kepsak dinga, khual mite pen noteʼ lo kho le leenggui puahte hi ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:6 Ahih hangin note pen Topa ’ siampite hong kici dinga, mihingte in note pen i Pasianʼ nasemte, ci-in hong gen ding uh hi. Minamteʼ hauhna teng note in na ne ding uh a, amauʼ hauhna teng note in na kisaktheih pih ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:7 Noteʼ maizumna tangin nopsakna a zah nihin na ngah ding uh a, noteʼ mindaina tangin noʼ ngahna sungah na lungdam ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin na gam sung uh ah a zah nih na luah ding uh hi. Note-aʼ pen tawntung lungdamna hi ding hi." 
Isaiah61:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa in thutang deihin, miʼ nate suhna le khialhna ka mudah hi. Amaute tungah amauʼ thaman thuman takin ka pia dinga, tawntung thuciamna amaute tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Isaiah61:9 Amauʼ suanlekhakte pen minamte lakah kithei dinga, amauʼ tuletate pen mite laizang ah kithei ding hi. Amaute pen Topa in thupha a piak mite hi, ci-in a mu mi khempeuhte in thei-in sang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah61:10 Topa ’ hangin nakpi takin ka lungdam dinga, ka Pasianʼ hangin kipakin ka diang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh zipi pa puan hoih tawh kizemin, mothak nu a suang manphate tawh a kizep mah bangin amah in hotkhiatna puan kei hong silhsakin, thumanna puanpi tawh kei hong tuam khin hi." 
Isaiah61:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung in a dawn meengsakin, huan in a kituhte a posak mah bangin Topa Pasian in minam khempeuh mai ah thumanna le phatna a po khiasak hi." 
Isaiah62:1 Zion a kihotkhiatna thu khuavak bangin a taankhiat mateng, ama gualzawhna thu meivak kuang bangin a taankhiat matengin, Zion ka ngaihsutna-in gamdai takin ka om mawk kei dinga, Jerusalem ka ngaihsutna-in ka khawl mawk kei ding hi." 
Isaiah62:2 Minamte in na gualzawhna mu ding uh a, kumpi khempeuh in na minthanna mu ding uh hi. Topa in nang a hong phuah min thak tawh nang hong kisam ding hi." 
Isaiah62:3 Nang pen Topa adingin hotkhiatna lukhu, na Pasian adingin kumpi lukhu tawh na kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah62:4 Nang pen a kinusia, hong kici nawn lo dinga, na leitang pen Gamkhing, kici nawn lo ding hi. Nang pen ama tungah ka lungkimna om, hong kici dinga, na leitang pen a Kiteen pih, kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah Topa lungkim a, na leitang pen a kiteen pih zi tawh kibang ding hi." 
Isaiah62:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh tangval in nungak khat a teenpih mah bangin nang hong lam pa in nang hong teenpih dinga, zipi pa mothak nu tungah a lungdam mah bangin nang tungah na Pasian lungdam ding hi." 
Isaiah62:6 Jerusalem aw, na kulhte tungah galvilte ka koih khin a, sun tawntung le zan tawntungin amaute gamdai ngei lo ding uh hi. Amaute in a thuciamna Topa phawksak ding uh a, amah in Jerusalem kipsakin leitung miteʼ phat dingin a bawlkik matengin amaute khawl lo ding uh hi." 
Isaiah62:7  
Isaiah62:8 Topa in limtakin thuciamna bawl khinzo a, a vangliatna tawh tungsak ding hi. “Na galteʼ an dingin na ante ka piakik nawn kei dinga, nangma sep sa leenggahzu gamdang mite in dawn nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah62:9 Ahih hangin an a kholte in ne-in Topa na phat ding uh a, a kaikhawmte in keima biakinn huang sungah a dawn ding uh hi,” ci hi." 
Isaiah62:10 Jerusalem mite aw, kulh kongpite panin paikhia unla a hong ciahkik na mipihte uh adingin lam bawl khol un. Lam zik un; lam lianpi zikin suangtumte paikhia unla, miteʼ muh dingin lim khat khai to un." 
Isaiah62:11 Leimong dongah Topa taangko khin hi. Jerusalem mite tungah, “En un, no hong hon khia pa hong pai hi. Ama sep thaman a mite hong pua a, a gualzawhna thaman a mite hong masuan hi,” ci un." 
Isaiah62:12 Amaute pen A Siangtho Mi, Topa ’ Hotkhiatte kici dinga, nang pen A kizong khia, a kinusia lo khuapi, hong kici ding hi." 
Isaiah63:1 Edom gam, Bozrah khua panin puan ausan silhin a hong pai, a puan silhna ah minthanna mel nei-in, ama thahatna tawh a hong pai pa kua ahi hiam? A hon khia zo dingin hatna a nei, gualzawhna thu a zasak dingin a hong pai pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hi hi." 
Isaiah63:2 Bang hangin na puan san a, na puansilhte, leenggah cilna ah leenggah a cil paʼ puan tawh kibang ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah63:3 Mite lak panin kuamah in kei hong huh lo a, keimah guak in leenggah cil bangin minam dangte ka cil hi. Sinsona tawh amaute ka cil a, hehna tawh amaute ka tuancil hi. Ka puan tungah amauteʼ si hong kitheh gawp a, ka puan khempeuh tungah sisan hong baang khin hi." 
Isaiah63:4 Ka mite ka hotkhiat ding hun ta ka sa a, a galte uh gimpiak ding a hun hi ta hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Isaiah63:5 Hong huh ding mi ka zong a, ahi zongin kuamah om lo hi. Kei a hong huh ding a om loh ciangin lamdang ka sa hi. Ahi zongin ka hehna in hong thahatsak a, kei mahmah thahatna tawh ka gualzo hi." 
Isaiah63:6 Ka sinsona tawh minam dangte cilin, ka hehna hangin amaute zukham ka bangsak a, amauteʼ sisan leilak ah ka thehthang hi." 
Isaiah63:7 Topa ’ itna kip, Topa phatnate, Topa in eite tungah a hong piak khempeuh tawh a kizui leh, ama hehpihna le a lianpi ama itna kip tawh a kizui-in amaute tunga a piak, Israel innkuan tungah ama hoihna lianpite ka gengen ding hi." 
Isaiah63:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Amaute pen keima mi taktak hi a, amaute in kei hong khem lo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin a lungkhamna panun amaute a hon khia hi." 
Isaiah63:9 Vantung miteʼ hotkhiat hi loin, Topa mahmah in amaute hon khia hi. A itna le a hehpihna tawh amaute hon khia a, amah in a beisa hun khempeuh ah amaute hoihtakin a kem hi." 
Isaiah63:10 Ahih hangin amaute in lehdo uh a, ama kha siangtho a dahsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen amauteʼ gal suak a, a mahmah in amaute a do hi." 
Isaiah63:11 Tua ciangin amaute in hun lui lai, ama nasem Mosesʼ hun a phawk uh hi. Ama mi a makaite hon khia-in, tuipi sung panin a paikhiatpih Topa koi ah om ta ahi hiam? Amauteʼ tungah ama kha a pia pa," 
Isaiah63:12 Moses tungtawnin a vangliatna zangin na lian pipi a sem pa, ama miteʼ mai ah tuite khenkhamin, a minthan tawntung nadingin hih bang nate a sem pa, tu-in koi ah om ta ahi hiam, ci uh hi." 
Isaiah63:13 Topa in tui thuk kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin leilak a sakol pai bangin kip mahmah uh a, amaute puk lo uh hi." 
Isaiah63:14 Lo nona kuam sung a zuan suk bawngte bangin Topa in amaute tawldamna a pia hi. Tua bangin Topa in a mite lamlak ahih manin ama min thang tawntung hi. 
Isaiah63:15 A siangtho, a minthang, nangma omna vantung panin hong en suk inla hong mu in. Nangma deihsakna le na vangliatna koi ah om ta ahi hiam? Na lungsimʼ deihna le nangma hehpihna kote adingin maimang ta hi." 
Isaiah63:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Abraham in kote hong huh loin, Israel in kote hong phawk loh hangin nang pen koteʼ Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, nang pen koteʼ Pa na hi a, nangmah in tanglai pek pan kote a hong hon khia pa na hi hi." 
Isaiah63:17 Topa aw, kote in nang kong kihtak loh theih nadingun bang hangin na lampi panin kote hong pialsakin ka lungsim uh khauhsak na hi hiam? Nangma nasemte, nangma luah minamte na ngaihsutna-in hong kiheikik in." 
Isaiah63:18 Nangma mi siangthote in tawl khat sung bek na biakinn nei a, ko hong langpangte in tua na biakinn pen tuancil gawp khinta hi." 
Isaiah63:19 Kote pen nangmah in cikmahin na uk ngei loh mite, nangma mi ahi ngei lo mite tawh a kibang ka suak khin uh hi." 
Isaiah64:1 Nangma langte tungah na min na theihsakna ding le nangma omna ah minamte lau-in a liin nadingin mei in selkeu kuangsakin mei in tui a sosak bangin nangma mai ah mualte a liin nadingin bang hangin na vangliatna tawh vantung bal kekin hong pai suk lo na hi hiam? 
Isaiah64:2  
Isaiah64:3 Koteʼ lamet lohpi-in nang hong pai-in a lauhuai nate na bawl ngei a, na mai ah mualte a liing hi." 
Isaiah64:4 Amah a ngakte adingin na a sem paʼ thu tanglai pek panin kuamah in thei ngei lo, kuama bil in za ngei lo a, kuama mit in nang sim loh Pasian dang mu ngei lo uh hi." 
Isaiah64:5 Thuman nasep lungdam takin a semte, nangma deih bangin a nungtate, nangmah in na limbawl hi. Kote tungah nang na heh a, ahi zongin kote ka khial lai veve uh hi. Tanglai pek a kipanin ka mawh ngitnget uh hi. A tua bangpi mahin kote hong kihon ding ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah64:6 Kote khempeuh mawhnei mi ka hi khin uh a, ka gamtat hoih khempeuh uh zong puan nin tawh kibang lai veve hi. Kote khempeuh singteh bangin ka vul uh a, ka mawhna hangun huih letkhiat nahthel keu ka bang uh hi." 
Isaiah64:7 Tua ahih ciangin nangmah a hong pom dingin a hanciam tawm, nangma min a lo kuamah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kote kiang panin nang in na maitang na seel a, mawhna khut sungah kote na hong pia hi." 
Isaiah64:8 Ahi zongin Topa aw, nang pen koteʼ Pa na hi hi. Kote pen tungman bang hi-in, nang pen beelseek pa bang na hi a, kote khempeuh nangma bawl mite ka hi uh hi." 
Isaiah64:9 Topa aw, nakpi takin sin so kei inla, mawhna ciam tehteh kei in. Kote khempeuh nangma mi ka hihna uh hong ngaihsun in." 
Isaiah64:10 Nangma khuapi siangthote gamlak suak khinta a, Zion zong gamlakpi suak a, Jerusalem khua gamkhing a suak hi." 
Isaiah64:11 Koteʼ inn a siangtho le a hoihte, ka pate un nangmah hong phatna munte mei in kaang khin a, koteʼ mun nuam khempeuh a sia suak khinta hi." 
Isaiah64:12 Topa aw, hih thute ah nangmah ki-ipcip niloh ding na hi hiam? Nang daitakin om dide-in nakpi takin kote hong gimsak ding na hi hiam?" 
Isaiah65:1 Keima miteʼ thungetna a pia dingin a baih sa-in kei om napi-in, amaute in hong ngen lo uh hi. Amauteʼ muh dingin kei om napi-in, amaute in hong zong beek lo uh hi. Minamte tungah, “Hih lai ah om ing, hih lai ah om ing,” ci-in a dawng pah dingin kiging napi-in, amaute in kei tungah thu hong ngen lo uh hi." 
Isaiah65:2 A hoih loin gamta-in, amauʼ deih bang a zui teitei mite," 
Isaiah65:3 ka maitang ah a tawntungin kei hong hehsak denin, biakna huan sungah biakpiakna bawlin dawibiakna tau tungah paknamtui a hal mite," 
Isaiah65:4 han sungah tu-in, mun simtham ah zanin misite thu a dong mite, voksa ne-in amauʼ beel sungah dawibiakna sa meh tui a koih mite," 
Isaiah65:5 “Note kiang panin kote hong kituam koih ahih manin kihem khia unla, ko kiangah hong pai kei un,” ci-in midangte tungah a gen mite - hih bang mite khempeuh a sang dingin a beisa hun sungah ka kiging tawntung hi. Hih bang mite ka thuak zo nawn kei hi. Amaute tungah ka hehna pen a mit ngei lo meikuang tawh kibang hi." 
Isaiah65:6 Tu-in amaute gimpiak ding ka khensat khin a, amauteʼ thuak dingte lai sungah kiciamteh khin hi. Amauʼ mawhnate ka mawk koih kei dinga, amauʼ mawhna le a pu a pate uh mawhnate ka thukkik ding hi. Amaute in mual liante tungah paknamtui halin, mual neute tungah hong simmawh uh ahih manin amauʼ gamtatna tawh kizui-in ka thuk ding hi, ci hi." 
Isaiah65:7  
Isaiah65:8 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Leenggahzu pen leenggah bom panin kingah a, mite in, ‘Tuate kimang thei ding ahih ciangin susia kei un,’ a cih mah bangun kei zong a minam bupun susia loin, keima na hong semte ka suaktasak ding hi." 
Isaiah65:9 Jakob sung panin Judah minamte thupha ka pia dinga, amauʼ suanlekhakte in mual tung gam a luah ding uh hi. Keima na hong sem, keima teel mite, tua gamah teeng ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:10 Amaute in kei hong bia ding uh a, Sharon gam pen amauʼ tuu hon gamtatna mun suaksak ding uh a, Akhor Kuam pen amauʼ bawnghonteʼ lupna mun a suaksak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:11 “Ahih hangin kei a hong nusia, ka mual siangtho a mangngilh, Gad pasian adingin sabuai phahin, Meni pasian adingin zu hel sa hai sungah a dim note pen," 
Isaiah65:12 namsau tawh a si dingin ka hong seh dinga, hong that dingteʼ mai ah na ngawng uh na dawh ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kong sap ciangin note in nong dawng kei uh a, thu ka gen ciangin nong ngai kei uh hi. Keima thu man loh ding mah na ut zaw uh a, a sia na gamta uh hi." 
Isaiah65:13 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: En un, ka nasemte in ne ding uh a, ahih hangin note na gilkial ding uh hi. Ka nasemte in dawn ding uh a, ahih hangin note na dangtak ding uh hi. Ka nasemte lungdam ding uh a, ahih hangin note na maizum ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:14 Ka nasemte in lungdamin la sa ding uh a, note in lungsim na sa-in kiko-in, lungsim gimna hangin na tau ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:15 Keima teel mite in samsiatna-in na min uh zang ding uh a, Topa Pasian in note hong that ding hi. Ahih hangin ama nasemte pen min dang a phuah ding hi." 
Isaiah65:16 Leitungah thupha a kipiak ding a ngen pa in thuman Pasian min tawh thupha a kipiak ding ngen dinga, leitungah thuciamna a lapa in thuman Pasian min tawh a ciam ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a beisa huna haksatnate khempeuh kimangngilh khinta a, tuate bei mang khinta hi." 
Isaiah65:17 “Tu-in vantung thakte le leitung thak ka piangsak hi. A beisa thute kiciamteh nawn lo dinga, kiphawk kha nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah65:18 Keima piansak sa sungah lungdamin kipakin om tawntung un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khuapi lungdamna khua-in bawlin, a mite a lungnuam dingin ka bawl hi." 
Isaiah65:19 Jerusalemʼ hangin ka lungdam dinga, ka miteʼ hangin ka kipak ding hi. Tua khua sungah kahna aw le cimawhin kikona aw om nawn lo ding hi." 
Isaiah65:20 Naupangte a ngeksih om lo dinga, sauvei pipi kinungta ding hi. Kum za bek a nungtate a khansihin kingaihsun dinga, kum za cing loin a site, keima gimpiakna lim hi ding hi." 
Isaiah65:21 Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, a sungah teeng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui lo bawl ding uh a, a gah ne ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:22 Amaute in inn lam ding uh a, tua inn ah midang teng, cih om nawn lo ding hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin a dang khat in ne, cih om lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima miteʼ nuntak hun pen singkung khat nuntak tan bang sawt dinga, keima teel mite in amauʼ khut tawh a sep sa nate lungdamin nesuak ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:23 Amaute in a mawk nadingin na sem lo ding uh a, lungkham nadingin ta nei lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Topa ’ thupha piak, suanlekhakte hi ding uh a, amauʼ tate amaute tawh nungta khawm ding uh hi." 
Isaiah65:24 Amaute in hong sap ma-in keʼn ka dawng dinga, amaute in thu a gen laitakin keʼn ka za ding hi." 
Isaiah65:25 Keivom le tuuno in an nekhawm ding uh a, humpinelkai in bawngtal bangin buhkung ne ding hi. Leivui pen gulpiʼ an hi ta dinga, mite hong tu nawn lo ding hi. Keima mual siangtho tung tengah amaute kiliamsak lo ding uh a, kisusia lo ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Vantung pen keima tokhom hi a, leitung pen keima khengakna ahi hi. Kei adingin koi lai ah inn lam dinga, keima tawlngak nading mun koi lai ahi hiam?" 
Isaiah66:2 Hih nate khempeuh keima bawl sa ahih manin hih nate khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi, Topa in ci hi. Ahih hangin kiniamkhiatin, lungsim a kitamzan mipa, keima thu ah lau-in a liing kelkel pa, keima deih mipa ahi hi." 
Isaiah66:3 Biakna-in bawngtal a go pa in mihing zong that hi. Biakpiakna-in tuuno a go pa in ui ngawng zong at hi. An tawh biakpiakna a bawlpa in vok si zong pia hi. Paknamtui tawh phawkna biakpiakna a bawlpa in milim zong bia-in thupha a pia hi. Hih mite amau ut bang ciatin gamta uh a, amauʼ kihhuai gamtatna uh ah nuam a sa uh hi." 
Isaiah66:4 Tua ahih ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak dinga, amauʼ kihtak thute mah amauʼ tungah ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sap ciangin kuamah in hong dawng lo uh a, thu ka gen ciangin kuamah in hong ngai lo uh hi. Keima thu man loh ding mah ut zaw uh a, a sia-in gamta uh hi, a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:5 Ama thu ah lau-in a liing mite aw, Topa ’ thu za un: Keima tungah note nong cihtakna hangun na mipihte uh pawl khat in note hong mudahin hong hawl khia ding uh a, zahpihna tawh note hong hopihin, “Lungdamin na om ding uh hong deihsak ka hih manun, Topa in ama liatna hong lak henla, note hong hon khia tahen,” hong ci vial ding uh hi. Hih banga hong paute pen mindaina a thuak ding mite ahi uh hi." 
Isaiah66:6 Ngai un, khuapi sunga gamlumna! Biakinn sunga awging! Topa in a galte gim a piakna huging ahi hi." 
Isaiah66:7 Ka khuapi siangtho pen nausuak natna a thuak ma-in nau a suak nupi tawh kibang a, nausuak gimna a tun ma-in amah in tapa khat a nei hi." 
Isaiah66:8 A tua ci bang kuaʼn za ngei na hi uh hiam? A tua ci bang kuaʼn mu ngei na hi uh hiam? Ni khat thu-in gam khat piang ngei ahi hiam? Tomno khat sungin minam khat piang khia ngei ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion in nausuak gimna a thuak phetin a minamte suak khia pah hi. 
Isaiah66:9 Nausuah hun tungsak napi-in suaksak lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in ci hi. Nau a suakkhiasak keimah in naugil khakcip ding ka hi hiam, na Pasian in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:10 Naungek in a nuʼ nawi teepin nuam a sak mah bangin, Jerusalem in nuam a sakna ah nuam na sak khawm theih nadingun amah a it khempeuhte aw, Jerusalem tawh lungdam unla, ama hangin kipak un. Ama hangin kapin a thum khempeuhte aw, ama lungdamna ah amah tawh lungdam khawm un, a ci hi." 
Isaiah66:11  
Isaiah66:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tu-in gunpi bangin nopsakna le tui let khia bangin minamteʼ hauhna ama tungah ka tungsak ding hi. Note pen a nuʼ nawi teepin, a ang ah kipua a, a khuk tungah a diang naungek na bang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:13 A nu in a ta a hehnep bangin note kong hehnem dinga, note in Jerusalem khua sungah hehnepna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:14 Hih thu a hong piang na muh uh ciangin na lungdam ding uh hi. Note hong thahatsakin hong cidamsak ding hi. Tua ciangin ka thu hong mangte ka huhna, ka galte tungah ka hehna ka lahna thu na thei ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Isaiah66:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh heh mahmahna tawh ama sinsona le meikuang tawh gim a pia dingin meikuang sungah Topa hong pai dinga, huihpi bangin a leengte hong pai ding hi." 
Isaiah66:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in mei tawh thukhenna sem dinga, a mawh mi khempeuh tungah a namsau tawh thu khen dinga, Topa in a thah mite tam mahmah ding hi." 
Isaiah66:17 Biakna huan sungah a pai dingin amaute kisiansuahin a kisiangthosak, a laizang a om pen a zuite, voksa le kihhuaina le zusa a nete bei mang khawm ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ nasepnate le amauʼ ngaihsutnate ka thei a, minam khempeuh a khawm dingin ka hong pai hi. Amaute hong pai-in ka minthanna mu ding uh a," 
Isaiah66:19 amauteʼ lakah lim khat ka khai ding hi. Amauʼ sung panin, minamte tung, Tarshish mite tung, Put mi le Lud mite tung, Meshek mite tung, Tubal mi le Javan mite tung, ka min hoihna a za ngei lo, ka minthanna a mu ngei lo tuipi gei-a om gam mite tungah a suakta lai mite ka sawl ding hi. Amaute in minamte lakah ka minthanna genthang ding uh hi." 
Isaiah66:20 Israel mite in beel siangtho sungah an tawh amau biakpiakna tawi-in Topa ’ biakinn ah hong paipih uh mah bangin amaute in minam khempeuh lak panin Topa ’ tungah piak dingin na sanggamte khempeuh uh, sakolte, leengte, taalte le late, kalaoh hatte tungah hong pua-in ka mual siangtho Jerusalem ah hong paipih ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:21 Amaute kim khat zong, siampite le Levi mite a suak dingin ka la ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:22 Ka bawl ding vantung thak le leitung thak pen ahihleh keima mai ah kip ding hi. Tua mah bangin na suan na khakte uh le na min uh kip ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:23 Khadet khat pan Khadet khat, keimah bia dingin Jerusalem ah mi khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Isaiah66:24 Amaute a ciah uh ciangin kei hong lehdo miteʼ luanghawmte en ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau a ne thante si ngei loin, amau a kihalna mei mit ngei lo dinga, amaute pen mi khempeuhʼ kih hi ding hi, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:1 Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a siampi khat ahi Hilkiahʼ tapa Jeremiahʼ thugente hih bang ahi hi. 
Jeremiah1:2 Amonʼ tapa Josiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suah zawh kum sawm le kum thum a cin kumin ‘ Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi." 
Jeremiah1:3 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah ciangin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih leuleu hi. Tua khit ciangin Josiahʼ tapa Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak kum, a kha ngana, Jerusalem khua mite saltang dingin a kipuakkhiat dong tam veipi a ho pihpih hi." 
Jeremiah1:4 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Gil sungah kong bawl ma-in nang kong thei khinzo hi. Na suah ma-in nang kong teel khia khinzo a, minam dangte tungah kamsang dingin kong koih khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:6 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, kei thugen ka siam kei a, naupang khat ka hi lel hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:7 Ahih hangin Topa in, “‘Naupang khat ka hi lel hi,’ ci kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kong puakna khempeuhte kiangah na pai dinga, kong sawl peuhpeuh na gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:8 Amaute kihta kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:9 Tua ciangin Topa in a khut tawh hong zam phei-in ka muk hong lawnsakin hong hopih hi. “En in, ka thute na kam sungah kong koih khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah1:10 Gam khempeuh le kumpi khempeuhteʼ tungah a bot khia ding le a phel khia dingin ahi zongin, a susia ding le a lawn khia dingin ahi zongin, a lam ding le a phut dingin ahi zongin, tu ni-in za, nang kong pia zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Ngak, a kici almond singhiang khat ka mu hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Jeremiah1:12 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na man hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ka thugente ka tangtunsak nadingin kei zong ka ngak hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:13 Topa in a nih veina hong hopih leuleu a, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Beel a so khat ka mu a, leilu lam panin hong awn suk hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah1:14 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Leilu lam panin hih gam mi khempeuhteʼ tungah siatna hong so suk ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lamah a om gam khempeuh keimah in ka sam a, amaute hong pai-in Jerusalem khua kongpite ah ahi zongin, khua kimkot a kulh kiimte ah ahi zongin, Judah gam khuapi khempeuh kiimte ah ahi zongin a kumpi tokhomte uh hong phut ciat ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ka mite in kei hong taisan uh ahih manin a mawhna uh hangin amauʼ tungah thu ka khen ding hi; pasian dangte tungah meihal biakna pia uh a, a khut uh tawh a bawl sa uh milimte a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah1:17 Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, kithawi in. Pai inla kong sawl khempeuh amaute kiangah va gen in. Amaute kihta kei in; na kihtak leh amauʼ mai ah kong lausak zaw lai ding hi." 
Jeremiah1:18 En in, hih gambup langah a ding ding, Judah kumpite, uliante, siampite le hih gam mi khempeuh langah a pang dingin tu ni-in nang, khuapi muanhuai khat bang ahi zongin, sikkhuampi khat bangin ahi zongin, sumngo kulhpi khat bangin ahi zongin kong bawl hi." 
Jeremiah1:19 Amaute in nangʼ lang khat ah hong do ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, nangmah a hong hu dingin ka hong ompih ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Pai inla, Jerusalem khua miteʼ zak dingin va taangko in. Topa in kong cih in ah: Na khangno lai-a nong kipiakna, na mothak lai-a nong itna, a kikho nai lo gamlak ah keiʼ nung nong zuih lai hun ka phawk hi." 
Jeremiah2:3 Israel mite pen Topa adingin a tuam om hi a, ama anlakna ah a anpalte ahi uh hi. Amaute a ne peuhpeuh a mawh suak uh a, gimna a thuak uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:4 Jakob suan le Israel innkuan khempeuhte aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah2:5 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na pute na pate uh kei kiang panin gamlapi ah pai khia-in, bangmahin a kimang lo milim peuh bia-in, amau mahmah zong bangmahin a kimang lo a suah khit nadingun kei tungah bang mawhna hong mu uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Amaute in, ‘Egypt gam panin eite hong paikhiat pihin sehnel lak le dum lak, lei keu lak le a lauhuai khuamial bekbak lak, kuama pai ngei lohna mun, kuama ten lohna gamlak ah a hong makaih Topa koi ah om ahi hiam?’ ci beek lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:7 Singgah le a hoih nate na nek theih nadingun an tamna munah kong tunpih hi. Ahih hangin no nong pai uh ciangin ka gam na ninsak uh a, ka neihsa leitang a kihhuai mun na suaksak tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:8 Siampite in, ‘ Topa koi ah om ahi hiam?’ ci-in dong lo uh hi. Thukham a theite nangawn in kei hong thei lo uh hi. Kei tungah kumpi uliante hong khial khin uh a, kamsangte in Baal min tawh thu genin kimanna a nei lo milimte a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah, note kong mawhsak lai dinga, na tate uhʼ tate zong ka mawhsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah2:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh nitumna lamah Saipras tuikulh mong dong kantan unla va en dih un. Nisuahna lamah Kedar gamah mi sawl unla limtakin kan dih un; tua bang thu a piang ngei peuhmah hiam, en dih un." 
Jeremiah2:11 Gam khat peuhpeuh in pasian ahi taktak beek lo a pasian-te uh nangawn a khek ngei peuhmah uh hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in a minthanna uh ahi keimah, bangmahin a kimang lo na peuh tawh hong khek tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:12 Tua thu phawk unla lau un; vantungte aw, dah mahmah unla liing un, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in mawhna nam nih a bawl zo uh hi. Nuntakna ciktui ahi keimah a hong taisan zo uh hi. Tuikhuk to tawm uh a, a tuikhuk tawh uh keu-in, tui a vung thei kei hi." 
Jeremiah2:14 “Israel sal ahi hiam? Sila namte hi zenzen ahi hiam? Hi lo ahihleh bang hangin a galte in luh gawp zo ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah2:15 Humpinelkai bangin a galte in amah hawk san uh a, nakpi takin a hawk gawp uh hi. A gam uh gam simtham a suah uh a, a khuapite uh cimin kuamah teeng lo hi." 
Jeremiah2:16 Tham loin, Memfis le Tahpanhes mite in zong a luguh a suk tapsak zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:17 Israel aw, Topa na Pasian in lampi ah hong makaih laitakin amah na nusiat manin nang tungah hih bang teng hong tung hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tu-in Egypt gamah nang na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Nail gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam? Assiria gamah na pai manin bang phattuamna ngah ding na hi hiam? Eufratis gun tui a va dawn lel ding na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah2:19 Na gitlohna mah in nangmah hong thuhilh dinga, kei na hong up nawn lohna in nangmah hong mawhsak ding hi. Topa na Pasian nong nusia a, keimah nong kihtak nawn loh ciangin, nuam het loin kha velval hi, cih thu thei inla mu in, Vanglian Topa Pasian in ka hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Sawt pek lai a kipanin ka hakkol kuaitanin ka ukna nong nial a, hong kihenna khau su tatin, ‘Na na ka sem kei ding hi,’ na hong ci hi. Numei paktatte na bang uh a, mual sang tung teng le sing liim nuai tengah milim na bia kawikawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:21 A kiteelteel leenggui ci hoihte bangin nang kong suankik zo a, ahih hangin nang kisiakikin bang hangin leenggah gui a hoih lote na suakkik na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Vuttui tawh kisilin satpiang tampi na zang zongin na mawhna nin ka mu lai veve hi, Topa Pasian in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:23 Bangci bangin nangmah in, ‘Kei ka nin kei hi. Baal pasian-teʼ nung ka zui kei hi,’ bang hangin ci thei ding na hi hiam? Mualkuam zang ah a om na lampi totte en to inla, na hih sate mu dih in. A suk tai a to tai kawikawi kalaoh huk na bang tazen hi." 
Jeremiah2:24 Gamlak nuam a sa, la no hukte na bang tazen hi. A huk laitakin kua in kham zo ding ahi hiam? Amah a hih nuam peuhpeuh in haksa loin, a ut hunhunin a ngah lel ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:25 Na khe guakin lam pai kei inla, na dang taaksak kei in, kong cih hangin, nangmah in, ‘Bang phamawh ahi hiam? Gamdang pasian-te ka it a, amauʼ nung ka zui ding hi,’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:26 “Guta khatpeuh a kimat ciangin a zum bangin, Israel mite, a kumpite, a uliante, a siampite, le a kamsangte uh zong a maizum ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:27 Amaute in singtawng khat kiangah, ‘Nang pen ka pasian na hi hi,’ ci uh a, suangtum khat kiangah, ‘Ka pianna ka nu na hi hi,’ peuh a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingat lo uh hi. Ahih hangin haksatna a tuah uh ciangin, ‘Tho inla hong hon in,’ hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:28 “Note-aʼ dinga na bawl uh na pasian-te uh koi ah om ahi hiam? Haksatna na tuah uh ciangin a hong hon thei ahihleh kihonsak ta un; bang hang hiam cih leh Judah gam aw, na khuapi zahzah uh pasian na nei tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah2:29 Kei na hong mawhsakna uh bang thu teng tawh ahi hiam? Na vekpi-un kei nong langpan khin uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah2:30 Na tate uh thuhilhin ka sat hangin a mawkna suak zo ta hi. Amaute kibawl pha tuan lo uh hi. Humpinelkai hawk bangin na namsaute un na kamsangte uh a that khinzo uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:31 No Israel mite aw, Topaʼ kammal limtakin ngai dih un. Israel-te adingin gamlak tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? A mial mahmah gam tawh kibang ngei ka hi hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin ka mite in, ‘Ko ka suakta uh hi; nang kiangah kong pai nawn kei ding uh hi,’ ci uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nungak khat in a kizepnate mangngilh thei ahi hiam? A kipi mothak in a mothak puante mangngilh thei ahi hiam? Ahih hangin ka mite in sim zawh loh ni tampi sung a hong mangngilh uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:33 Na lawm ngaih ding na zon siam mahmah a, numei gilote nangawn a zia na hilh thei zen hi." 
Jeremiah2:34 Mawhnei lo mizawngteʼ sisan na puan tungah baang hi. Amaute in na inn hong luh ngei beek lo uh hi. “Tua bang teng hi napi-in 
Jeremiah2:35 nang in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi, kei tungah Pasian heh nawn lo hi,’ na ci hi. En in, ‘Kei ka mawh kei hi,’ na cih manin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah2:36 Bang hangin na lungsim kheel ziauziau na hi hiam? Assiria in nang hong maizumsak ngei bangin Egypt-te in zong nang hong maizumsak ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah2:37 Nangmah zong tua gam panin maizumna tawh na lu tungah vut khusa-in nong paikhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh p keimah Topa in na muan mite ka nial zo hi; amauteʼ hangin na gualzo ngei kei ding hi. 
Jeremiah3:1 “Mi khat in a zi ma henla, tua nu in zong amah nusia-in, midang khatʼ zi va suak leh, a pasal masa in tua nu lakik thei ding ahi hiam? Tua gam teng a ninsak khin suak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Nang pen numei paktat suakin mi tampi tak tawh kingai khinzo napi-in, tu-in kei kiang hong zuankik ding na hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:2 Khuadak inla mual sang dawnte en dih in. Hong kilup khop pih lohna mun koi laitak ah om ahi hiam? Arab mite in a suam dingun gamlak ah mi a ngak uh bangin lam gei ah tu-in na luppih ding mi na ngak hi. Na paktatna le na gitlohna tawh hih gam na ninsak zo hi. 
Jeremiah3:3 Tua hang mahin guahtui kikangsak a, guah nunung hong zu lo hi. Ahi zongin numei paktatte tawh a kibang hi napi-in na maizum thei kei lailai hi." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Tumahin kei nong sam a, ‘Ka pa aw, ka neu lai pek pan ka lawm na hi hi" 
Jeremiah3:5 nang keima tungah heh tawntung ding na hi hiam? A tawp dongin lungham den ding na hi hiam?’ na hong ci hi. En in, tua bang na cih hangin, siatna na hih theih khempeuh na hih khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:6 Kumpi Josiah in a uk laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “A zulhzau Israel, mual sang tung khempeuh ah pai-in sing liim nuai khempeuh ah numei paktat bangin a om kawikawina na mu khinzo hiam?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Hih teng a hih khit ciangin kei kiangah hong kilehkik ngawn ding hi, ci-in ka up hangin amah hong kilehkik tuan lo hi. Tua bangin a gamtatna pen numei gina lo a sanggamnu Judah in zong a mu hi." 
Jeremiah3:8 A zulhzau Israel, midang tawh a khialhna hangin kimakna lai pia-in, ka hawlkhiat zong amah in a mu hi. Ahih hangin numei gina lo Judah lau tuan loin, amah zong numei paktat khat mah a va suak veve hi." 
Jeremiah3:9 Tua bang hih ding amah in baih ngaihsut lel ahih manin suangtum le singtawng peuh bia-in khial a, gam a ninsak hi." 
Jeremiah3:10 Hih bang teng hi napi a sanggamnu, numei gina lo Judah, a lungsim takpi tawh hong kilehkik loin, a kilehkik hong kineihkhem bek hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “A zulhzau Israel, numei gina lo Judah sangin a mawhna tam zaw hi." 
Jeremiah3:12 Pai inla leilu lam Israel gamah hih bangin va taangko in: ‘Hong kilehkik in, a zulhzau Israel aw, Topa in kong ci hi. Hehna tawh nang kong en kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a hehpih thei pa ka hi hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Ka heh tawntung kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Na mawhna na phawk ding bek kisam hi. Topa na Pasian na langpanna, sing liim nuai khempeuh ah gamdang pasian-te tawh na khialh kawikawina le ka thu nong man lohnate pulak in, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:14 Hong kilehkik un, a zulhzau ka tate aw, Topa in kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note pen keima mite na hi uh a, khuapi khat panin mi khat, beh khat sung panin nih cih bangin hong la-in, Zion khua ah ka hong puak ding hi." 
Jeremiah3:15 “‘Ka thu a hong mang makaite kong pia dinga, amaute in pilna le siamna tawh note hong uk ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:16 Tua hun ciangin gam sungah note pungin na tam uh ciangin Topa in kong cih in ah, mite in, “ Topaʼ Thuciamna Singkuang,” ci-in genin a nei nawn kei ding uh hi. Amaute in ngaihsun kha lo ding uh a, phawk kha loin, zong a goih beek kei ding uh hi. Tham loin zong a bawlkik nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:17 Tua hun ciangin Jerusalem khua pen Topaʼ kumpi tokhom kici dinga, Jerusalem khua Topaʼ omna ah gam khempeuh hong kikhawmin, amaute in amauʼ mawhnopna lungsim uh a zui tentan nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Tua hun ciangin Judah mite in Israel mite hong pawlpih ding uh a, leilu lam gam salsuahna panin na pu na pate uhʼ luah dingin ka piak sa gamah a pai khawm ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah3:19 “‘Israel aw, ka tapa bangin nang hong bawlin, gam khempeuh lakah a hoih pen gam nopci mahmah khat nang hong pia ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ahih hangin a thuman lo zi in a pasal a nusiat bangin Israel mite aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, no zong kei tungah nong thuman kei uh hi,’ ci-in va taangko in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah3:21 Mual tung panin awging khat hong kiza a, Israel miteʼ kahna le tauna awging ahi hi. Lam a pialna hang uh le Topa a Pasian uh a mangngilhna hang uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah3:22 Topa in, “Hong kilehkik un, a zulhzau ka tate aw, na zulhzauna uh kong damsak ding hi,” a ci hi. Amaute in zong, “En in, nang kiang kong pai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa koteʼ Pasian na hi hi." 
Jeremiah3:23 Mualtungte le mual sangteʼ tungah gamlum lialuanate zuaupi taktak hi a, Israel mite hotkhiat nading Topa eiteʼ Pasianʼ kiang bekah om takpi hi." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Ahih hangin i neu lai a kipan a zumhuai Baal pasian i biakna hangin i pu i pateʼ biakna ahi tuu le bawngte, a tapate le a tanute khempeuh uh i sum khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Tua ahih manin maizumin lum ni. I min siatna silh ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh i neu lai a kipan tu ni ciang dong eite le i pu i pate pen Topa i Pasianʼ tungah i mawh khinzo hi. Topa i Pasianʼ thu i mang kei khinzo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:1 Topa in, “Israel mite aw, na kilehkik nop uh leh kei kiangah hong kilehkik un. Na kihhuainate uh kei kiang pan na paihkhiat uh a, na tai kawikawi kei uh a," 
Jeremiah4:2 ‘ Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in, thuman tak, kiptak, thutang takin thu na ciam nak uh leh gam khempeuh in thupha ka piak ding hong ngen ding uh a, keiʼ sungah amaute a lungdam ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:3 Judah gam mite le Jerusalem khua mite tungah Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Na lote uh kal unla, ling lakah khai vawh kei un." 
Jeremiah4:4 Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite aw, Topaʼ thu zui unla, lungsim takpi tawh zui un. Na tua cih kei uh leh na bawl uh mawhnate hangin ka hehna mei bangin hong kuang khia dinga, a phelh zo kuamah om lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:5 Judah gamah va gen unla, Jerusalem khua ah va taangko un. Gam sung khempeuh ah peengkul mutin awng unla, va gen un. Hong kikhawm unla khuapi muanhuaite sungah va bu ni, va ci un." 
Jeremiah4:6 Zion paina lampi kihilh unla, na suahtak nadingun tai un; zekai kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin siatna lianpi ka hong puak suk hi." 
Jeremiah4:7 Humpinelkai khat a bukna sawlkawm panin hong kuan khia zo a, gamte a susia ding pa hong paikhia zo hi. Na gam uh a kisiasak ding le na khuapite uh ah kuamah a ten loh nadingin a susia dingin ama omna panin hong kuan khia khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Tua ahih manin puanhampi silhin tau-in kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ hehna lauhuaipi eiteʼ kiang panin kihei khia nai lo hi. 
Jeremiah4:9 Topa in, “Tua ni ciangin kumpipa le kumpi uliante lungkia ding uh a, siampite lau mahmah in, kamsangte dipkua ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:10 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in hih mite le Jerusalem khua mite khem cihtakin na khem khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau kiangah, ‘Nopna hong om ding hi,’ ci napi-in, amau a sunlum dingin namsau khat a om gige hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:11 Tua hun ciangin hih mite le Jerusalem khua mite kiangah, “A sa mahmah huih, sehnel gam a sang mun panin ka mite tungah hong nung dinga, tua huih pen anvaite a zapsiang dingin a nung huih bang hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:12 Ka sawl huih pen tua bang dingin hat lua ding hi. Tu-in Topa in amaute tungah thu khenin a gen hi,” kici ding hi." 
Jeremiah4:13 En un, meii bangin i gal pa hong pai a, a sakol leengte pingpei tawh kibang a, a sakolte muvanlai sangin manlang zaw hi. Gimna i thuak ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gal lel ding ihi ta hi." 
Jeremiah4:14 Jerusalem khua aw, nang hong kihotkhiat nadingin na lungsim sung panin gitlohna sawp khia in. Na sungah gitlohna lungsim bang tanvei kemcip ding na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ngai un; Dan gam panin aw khat hong ging a, Efraim Mual panin kisiatna ding thu hong kitaangko hi." 
Jeremiah4:16 Minamte kiangah va gen unla, Jerusalem kiangah va taangko un. “Gamlapi panin mite hong pai uh a, Judah gam khuapite langpangin hong kiko uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:17 Judah gam in kei hong langpan ahih manin lohongte bangin a galte in a kimkot ah a pang dimdiam uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:18 Na lungsim le na gamtatnateʼ hangin nangʼ tungah hih thu hong tung hi. Hih pen nangma gitlohna hang hi a, na lungtang pailetin hong sun hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:19 Aw, ka lungtang, ka lungtang! Na ka sa mahmah hi. Ka lungtang kisai vanvan a, ka om hithiat thei kei hi; bang hang hiam cih leh peengkul mutna aw, gal kisimna aw ka za hi." 
Jeremiah4:20 Siatna khat khit ciangin a dang khat hong tung a, gam sung khempeuh kisia khinta hi. Thakhat thu-in ka bukte hong kisuksiatsak a, ka puankhaite kikek gawp hi." 
Jeremiah4:21 Bang tanvei gal kisimna mu lai ding ka hi hiam? Bang tanvei peengkul aw za lai ding ka hi hiam? 
Jeremiah4:22 Topa in, “Ka mite hai uh a, kei hong thei lo uh hi. Naupang haite bang uh a, bangmah thei lo uh hi. A sia bawl ding lamsang siam bek uh hi. A hoih bangmah bawl thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:23 Leitung ka et leh limlemel nei lo a, vantungah zong khuavak om lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:24 Mualte ka et leh kiliing damdam uh a, mual neute kileh kawikawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ka khuadak leh mi khat beek ka mu kei a, van a vasate zong a leeng mangkhin uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ka et leh, logam leihoih teng sehnel gam suak khin a, Topaʼ mai, a hehna lianpi mai ah, khuapi khempeuh kisia khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “Gam buppi, gamlak suak dinga, ahih hangin ka susia sam kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah4:28 Tua thu hangin leitung kap dinga, vantung mial ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka gen sa, ka khensat sa hi a, ka kisik loh bangin ka lungsim zong ka kheelkik kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah4:29 Sakol tunga tuangte le thal tawiteʼ aw a kizak ciangin mi khempeuh galtai mang uh a, gamlak ah tai-in suang lakah a kah to uh hi. Khuapi khempeuh kinusia khin a, kuamah teeng nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah4:30 Jerusalem khuapi aw, a siacip ding na hi ta hi. Puansan silhin kham tawh na kizep liatluat hangin, na mitte zemin na golsak hangin, a mawkna-in a kizem na hi ta hi. Na lawm ngaihte in nang hong nusia ta uh a, tu-in hong that nuam ta uh hi." 
Jeremiah4:31 Nau a suak ding numei a kiko bang khat ka za a, tacil a suak numeiʼ tauna tawh kibang hi. Zionʼ tanu husam liangin a kikona aw na hi a, a khut tegel zakin, “Gimna ka thuak ding hi. Kei hong that ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:1 Jerusalem khua sungah kileh kawikawi un. Khuadak unla en dih un! A thuman gamtat leh thuman a zong mi khat beek na mu uh hiam, zong dih un. Na muh uh leh tua khuaʼ mawhna ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:2 “ Topa a nuntak bangin,” ci-in a kiciam uh hangin a zuaupi uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah5:3 Topa aw, nangmah in thuman en gige hi lo na hi hiam? Nangmah in amaute na sat hangin a awlmawh tuan kei uh hi. Na suk gawp hangin na thuhilhna a ngai tuan kei uh hi. Amauteʼ maitang suangtum sangin sak zaw a, a kisik nuam kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:4 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih mite mihai hi a, a hehpihhuai ahi hi. Topaʼ lampi thei lo uh a, amauʼ Pasianʼ deihna a thei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:5 Mi liante kiangah pai-in ka va kiho ding uh hi. Amaute in Topaʼ lampi thei uh a, amauʼ Pasianʼ deihna thei uh hi,” ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahih hangin a vekpi-un ka uk ding nial khin uh a, ka hakkol kuaitanin ka henna khaute su tat khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:6 Tua ahih manin tulak panin humpinelkai in amaute that dinga, sehnel gam panin keivom in amaute a pet gawp ding hi. Kamkei in a khuapite uh limtakin vil gige a, a pusuak khia peuhpeuh balzan gawp ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ mawhna tam lua a, hong taisan mun lua uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Na mawhnate uh hong koici maisak thei ding ka hi hiam? Na tate un kei hong nusia zo uh a, pasian ahi lopite peuh tawh kiciam zo uh hi. Amaute a gilvah dong uh an ka vak khit ciangin amaute in angkawmin, numei paktatteʼ inn ah a hon om uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Sakol gilvah a lante bangin a inn veengteʼ zite uh nehin a tau huthut uh hi. 
Jeremiah5:9 Hih thute hangin amaute gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam? Topa in ka genin ah, hici bang minam tungah thukkik lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah5:10 A gualin a kisuan a leenggah huan sungah pai inla, suksiatsak in; ahi zongin suk maimangsak sam kei in. A hiangte heuh khiatsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh tua a hiangte Topa aʼ hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah5:11 Israel minamte le Judah minamte, Topa in ka cih in ah, keiʼ tungah hong thuman nawn het lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:12 “Amaute in Topa hong nial uh a, ‘Amah in bangmah hih lo ding hi. Eite tungah siatna hong tung lo dinga, gal ahi zongin kial ahi zongin i thuak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:13 Kamsangte lah huih bang hi lel uh a, a sung uh ah thu teeng lo hi. Amauʼ gen bangun amau mah in a thuak ding uh hi,’ ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:14 Tua ahih manin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hong hopih a, “Amaute, tu-a bangin kampau uh ahih manin na kam sungah mei bangin ka kuansak ka thute in sing tawh kibang hih minamte kaang tum gawp ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:15 “En un, Israel minamte aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, gamlapi panin note a hong sim dingin gam khat kong kuansak ding hi. Tua gam pen tanglai pekin a om khin sa, a hat mahmah, amauteʼ pau na theih loh uh gam khat ahi hi." 
Jeremiah5:16 Thal tawh a kap uh teh kap lum lianlian uh a, a vekpi-un galhang kim uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:17 Amaute in lo-a na ante uh le na an huante uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na tapate uh le na tanute uh hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tuu hon, na bawnghonte uh hong gaihsak ding uh a, na leenggah, na theigahte uh hong nek mangsak ding uh hi. Na muan mahmah uh kulhpi tawh a ki-um na khuapite uh namsau tawh hong suksiatsak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:18 “Ahih hangin tua bang hun ciang nangawnin, Topa in kong cih in ah, note kong sumai mangkhin sam kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah5:19 Na mipihte un, ‘Bang hangin Topa i Pasian in hih bangin eiʼ tungah hong bawl ahi hiam?’ a cih uh ciangin nangmah in, ‘ Topa nusia-in na gam sung uh ah gamdang pasian-teʼ na na sep uh bangin, noteʼ gam ahi lo gam dangah, gamdang miteʼ na na sem ding uh hi,’ na ci ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:20 Jakobʼ suanteʼ tungah gen in. Judah miteʼ tungah hih bangin ci in: 
Jeremiah5:21 “Ngai un, ngaihsutna a nei lo mihaite aw, mit nei napi-in a mu lote, bil nei napi-in a za lo mite aw," 
Jeremiah5:22 kei hong kihta lo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Keima mai ah liing lo na hi uh hiam? Tuipi gei-a om sehnelte keima koih hi a, tui ka dalsak tawntung hi. Tuihualte in a lawhlawh hangin zo zo lo uh a, a gin zuazua uh hangin kantan zo tuan lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ahih hangin hih mite a lungsim uh khauhin kei hong langpan zen uh hi. Hong kihei san uh a, hong paisan uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:24 A lungsim sung uh ah, ‘A huna guah hong zusak a, tuk guah, khal guah hong pia a, anlak hun ding a hong sehsak den Topa i Pasian zahtak ni,’ a ci kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:25 Na khialhnate un hih na hoihte khaktan a, na mawhnate uh hangin tuate na taanlawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Ka miteʼ lakah migilote kihel uh a, vasa thangsiah bangin mite thangsiahin a man uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:27 Bawm sung dimin vasa a kikhum bangin khemna tawh a ngah uh vante tawh a inn uh a dim hi. Tua ahih manin amaute lianin hau mahmah uh a, thau-in a mai uh a zol hi." 
Jeremiah5:28 Gitlohna lamah a hun bek a theithei kei uh hi. Tagah miteʼ phattuam nading khual loin thu a man lopi-in khen uh a, mizawngteʼ tungah thuman lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Hih thute hangin amaute gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in ka ci hi. Hih bang minamʼ tungah thukkik lo ding ka hi hiam, ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah5:30 A dipkuathuai, a patauhhuai thu khat gam sungah a piang khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah5:31 Kamsangte in thuman gen lo uh a, siampite in zong amauʼ ut bangun a uk uh hi. Ka mite in phamawh sa lo sawnsawn uh hi. A tawpna hun hong tun ciangin bang cih ding uh ahi hiam, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:1 Benjaminʼ suante aw, na suahtak nadingun tai un. Jerusalem khua taisan un. Tekoa khua ah peengkul tum unla, Bethlehem khua ah theihsakna meikhu khusak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin gimna leh siatna lianpi a hong pai ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:2 A melhoih, a ngeek dikdek Zion tanu ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:3 Kumpite, a galkapte uh tawh ama kiang hong tung ding uh a, a kimkot ah giahphual satin a deih peuhpeuh uh a la ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:4 Amaute in, “Jerusalem khua a sim dingin kisa un. Tho un, sun ciangin i sim ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amau mah in, “Citciat aw, zekai lua hang! Ni tum dektak ta a, i liimte sau keei ta hi." 
Jeremiah6:5 Kithawi un, zan ciangin i sim dinga, a kumpi innte uh i susia ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in, “A singte phuksak unla, Jerusalem khua sim nadingin phungin ciang un. Hih khuapi gim piak kul hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kinetniamna bekbek tawh a kidim hi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Tuikhuk panin tuiphul a tawlngak loh bangin, Jerusalem khua panin siatna tawlnga lo hi. Khua sungah ngongtatna le suksiatna ka za ngitnget a, cinatna le liamna bekbek ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah6:8 Jerusalem khuapi aw, kidawm in. Na kidop kei leh nang kong taisan dinga, kuama ten lohna gam simtham na suak kha ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:9 Vanglian Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Leenggah lo ah a sangte a kilawh khit bangin Israel mi a om lai sunteng lo siang vet in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:10 Keimah in ka dawngkik a, “Amaute in a zak theih dingun kua kiangah va gen ding ka hi hiam? En in, a bil uh bing a, khua za thei lo uh hi. Topaʼ thu simmawh uh a, lungdamna-in la lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, kei zong ka heh mahmah a, ka thuak zo nawn kei hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Keiʼ tang dinga na hehna kongzing lak a naupangte tungah bua khia inla, tangvalteʼ kikhopna ah zong bua khia in. Papite le nupite zong kila khia dinga, piteek puteekte zong kipaikhiat pih ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:12 A innte uh midangte in luah ding uh a, a lote le a zite uh a taan ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, hih miteʼ lang khat ah ka khut zanin gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh a neu pen pan a lian pen dongin, thuman lopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte a kipan siampite dongin thuman lo khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:14 Amaute in ka miteʼ thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:15 Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beek lo uh a, kisuang thei beek lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a siteʼ lak mahah amaute zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawn khia ding uh hi,” Topa in hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:16 Topa in mite tungah, “Lam ka bomah ding unla khuadak un. Lam hoih ahi lampi luite dong unla tawn un. Tua hileh na tawldam ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka tawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:17 Topa in, “Peengkul tumna awging a ngai dingin ‘Galvil ding mi ka koih hi,’ kong ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka ngai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:18 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Gamdangte aw, ngai un. Mite aw, amauʼ tungah bang tung ding hiam cih thei un." 
Jeremiah6:19 Leitung aw, ngai in! En un, hih mite tungah a thuak ding mahun a kilawm siatna ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, ka thukhamte a nial uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:20 Bang deihna tawh Sheba gam panin paknamtuite hong pai a, gamlapi panin sing namtuite hong tung ahi hiam? Na meihal biaknate uh ka sang thei kei a, nong biaknate uh deihhuai ka sa kei hi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: En un, hih mite a puk nadingin a mai uh ah suangtum ka koih dinga, pate le tate, inn veengte le lawmte pukin a si ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:22 Topa in, “En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, leimong gamla pen panin galsim dingin gam lian khat hong kithawithawi hi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Thal le teipi tawi uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, hehpihna lungsim nei loin a husa uh tuipi ging tawh kibang hi. Jerusalem aw, sakol tungah amaute tuangin, nangmah a hong sim dingin a kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah6:24 Tua thu i za a, bangmah i cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong lencip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na i sa hi." 
Jeremiah6:25 Gamlak ah paikhia kei unla, lampi ah zong pai dah un. Bang hang hiam cih leh i galte in namsau tawi uh a, i kimkot khempeuh a lauhuai hi." 
Jeremiah6:26 Topa in, “Ka miteʼ tanu aw, puanhampi silh inla, vut lakah kikhuk in. Tapa khat neihsun a si bangin kap vangvang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong susia ding pa thakhatin hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah6:27 Jeremiah aw, ka mite a ze-et dingin nang kong koih hi. Ze-et inla, a om dan uh thei in." 
Jeremiah6:28 A vekpi-un kei hong langpan tentan uh a, zuau thu a gen kawikawi uh hi. Sumngo le sik bangin khauh mahmah uh a, a vekpi-un a siat gamtat khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah6:29 Nakpi takin pum a kizap hangin a ekte tui thei lo a, luang khia thei lo hi. Pum a kizapzap hangin a mawkna a suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote om lai veve hi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Amaute, a kideih lo ngun-ek kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, ‘Amaute ka deih kei hi,’” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah7:1 Topa in Jeremiah kiangah hih bangin thu gen hi: 
Jeremiah7:2 “ Topaʼ biakinn kongkhakpi kiangah ding inla, hih thu teng va taangko in: Topa a bia dingin kongkhak sunga hong tum Judah mite aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah7:3 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hih bangin hong ci hi. Na nuntak zia uh le na gamtatnate uh kipuah un. Tua hileh hih munah kong tengsak bek ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:4 ‘A muanhuai sungah i om hi. Hih pen Topaʼ biakinn ahi hi, Topaʼ biakinn ahi hi, Topaʼ biakinn ahi hi,’ a kicici zuauthute um kei un." 
Jeremiah7:5 “Bang hang hiam na cih uh leh na nuntak zia uh le na gamtatnate uh na kipuah uh a, khatlekhat kikalah thuman le thutakin na vaihawm uh a," 
Jeremiah7:6 namdang mite, pa nei lote le meigongte na nuaisiah kei uh a, hih munah mawhnei lo mite that nawn loin, noteʼ gimna ding mah ahi pasian dang peuh na biak nawn kei uh leh," 
Jeremiah7:7 tanglai-a na pu na pate un a neih tawntung dingun ka piak hih gam sungah ka hong tengsak ding hi. 
Jeremiah7:8 “En un, phattuamna a om het lo zuau thu na um tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:9 Note in na gu-in, tual thatin, angkawmin, ahi lopi kiciamin, Baal kiangah meihal biakna pia-in, na theih ngei loh uh pasian dangte delhin," 
Jeremiah7:10 tua ciangin ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinn sung ka mai ah hong pai-in hong dingin, ‘Hong kihon khia zo hi,’ na cih khit uh ciangin hih a muhthadah huai nate khempeuh va hihkik zel ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ka min tawh a kilo hih biakinn noʼ ngaihsutna ah mi suam mi buluhteʼ bukna mun bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Keimah in noteʼ hih khempeuh kong mu khin hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah7:12 Ka min ka tensak masakna Shiloh khua-a biakinn ah va pai unla ka mi Israel-teʼ gitlohna hangin ka nasepna va en dih un. 
Jeremiah7:13 Tu-in zong hih nate khempeuh na hih uh a, kong gengen hangin hong ngai tuan loin kong sapsap hangin hong dawng lo na hih manun Topa in kong cih in ah," 
Jeremiah7:14 ka min tawh a kilo, note in na muan uh hih Jerusalem biakinn le note le na pu na pate uhʼ kiangah kong piak hih mun pen Shiloh a biakinn tungah ka hih bangin ka hih ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:15 Efraimʼ suanlekhak ahi leilu lam a na behte khempeuh uh ka paihkhiat bangin note zong ka muhna panin kong paikhia ding hi. 
Jeremiah7:16 “Jeremiah aw, hih mite adingin thu ngetsak kei in. Amau adingin kapin keiʼ tungah hong thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong thumna kong ngai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:17 Judah gam khuapite sung le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah bang hih uh cih mu lo na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah7:18 Naupangte in sing tomin, a pate un mei tawh uh a, nupite in a nusian uh vantung kumpinu ading moh bawlna ding annel meek uh a, kei hong hehsak nadingun, pasian dangteʼ dawn dingin leenggahzu tawh biakna a pia tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:19 Topa in kong cih in ah, tua hangin gimna a thuak, kei hi zenzen ka hi hiam? Hi lo hi. Amauʼ zum nadingin amau mah in a thuak uh hizaw hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: En in, ka hehna le ka thangpaihna hih munah ka bua dinga, mihingteʼ tung le ganhingteʼ tung, lo lai-a singkungte le leilak a singgahte tungah ka sung ding hi. Ka hehna mei bangin kuang dinga, kisumit lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:21 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hih bangin kong ci hi: Mei tawh hal tum ding na meihal biaknate uh hal nawn loin, sa nek theih biakpiaknate tawh kibangin ne vet un." 
Jeremiah7:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin na pute na pate uh ka lakkhiat lai-in ka hopih kei a, meihal biakna pia ding le biakpiakna a bawl dingin thu ka pia kei hi." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ahih hangin, ‘Ka thu hong mang un; tua hileh noteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, note pen ka mite na hi ding uh hi. Note adingin a hoih zawk nadingin na khempeuh ah kong thupiak bang na zui un,’ ci-in thu ka pia zaw hi." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang lo uh a, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh hi. Amauʼ gitlohna lungsim uh zui-in amauʼ thuthu-in a om zaw uh a, mainawt loin a nungkin zaw uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:25 Na pu na pate uh Egypt gam panin a hong paikhiat ni uh a kipan tu ni ciang dong, ni khat khit ni khat, ka nasemte ahi kamsangte ka sawl tawntung a," 
Jeremiah7:26 ahih hangin amau in ka kamsangteʼ thu ngai loin, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi. A pute a pate uh sangin a sia zaw uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih thute amau kiangah na va gen dinga, ahih hangin amau in a hong ngai kei ding uh hi. Amaute na sap hangin a hong dawng kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:28 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘Hih gam pen, Topa amauteʼ Pasianʼ thu a mang lo gam hi a, thuhilhna sang loin, thuman om nawn lo a, thuman genin zong a nei nawn kei uh hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:29 “Jerusalem mite aw, na lu uh mettol un. Na sam uh paai mang unla, mual tungah va kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih a gilo khang mite ka nial zo a, ka taisan khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cih in ah, Judah mite in hoih ka sak loh nate a hih khinzo uh hi. Ka min tawh a kilo ka biakinn a nitsak nadingun a kihhuai milimte a koih uh hi." 
Jeremiah7:31 Hinnom Kuam ah a tapate a tanute uh mei sungah a hal lupna ding uh Tofeth a kici biakna tau khat a bawl uh hi. Tua pen keiʼ sawl lah hi loin, zong ka ngaihsun kha ngei beek kei hi." 
Jeremiah7:32 Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, tua mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kici zaw ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Tofeth munah mun awng a om nawn lo zah dongin misite a kivui ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:33 Misi luangte huihlak a leeng vasate le leitungah a om ganhingteʼ an a suak ding uh a, tuate a delh mang ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Tua ciangin Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah gualnopna le lungdamna awte le zi nei thakte le mothakteʼ awte ka gingsak nawn kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua mun kinusia ding hi. 
Jeremiah8:1 “Tua hun ciangin, Topa in kong cih in ah, Judah gam kumpiteʼ guhte, ulianteʼ guhte, siampiteʼ guhte, kamsangteʼ guhte le Jerusalem khua miteʼ guhte a han sung uh panin kila khia ding hi." 
Jeremiah8:2 Amaute in a it uh, a na a sepsak uh, a delh uh, a zon uh le a biak uh ahi ni le kha le van a om nate khempeuh mai ah a kipho khia ding hi. Tua guhte kikhawm nawn lo dinga, kiphum nawn lo ding hi. Leilak a ek kinusia bang ahi lel ding hi." 
Jeremiah8:3 Hih a gilo minamteʼ lakah a om lai sunteng in ka hawl khiatna munah nuntak ding sangin sih ding a teel zaw ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Jeremiah aw, Topa in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in amaute kiangah va gen in. Mi khat a puk ciangin thokik buang hi lo ahi hiam? Mi khat in lam a khialh ciangin hong kilehkik buang hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Tua ahihleh bang hangin hih mite lam khialin hong kilehkik nawn lo ahi uh hiam? Zuau pasian milimte lenkip uh a, hong kilehkik nuam lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:6 Amauʼ thugente ka ngaihsak a, kuamah in thuman gen lo uh hi. A gitlohna uh panin kuamah kisik lo a, ‘Bang hih ka hi hiam?’ ci lel uh hi. Sakol galsim ding a tai bangin amauʼ tum ciatin a pai uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:7 Gunvapite nangawn in a lal hun ding thei uh a, sumkuangte, phialphiahte, le gunvapite zong a hun ciangin hong tung zel uh hi. Ahih hangin ka mite in Topaʼ ngeina kipte a thei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:8 Bangci bangin note in, ‘Ko ka pil uh a, Topaʼ thukham ka nei uh hi,’ ci thei ding na hi uh hiam? En un, thuman lo lai theite in tua thukham zuau thu a suah uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Na mipilte uh maizum ding uh a, lungmangin a cih nading a thei kei ding uh hi. En un, amaute in Topaʼ thu nial uh hi. Bang pilna nei nawn ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Tua ahih manin a zite uh midangte ka piaksak dinga, a lote uh zong midangte ka luahsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neu pen pan a lian pen dongin thuman lopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte a kipan siampite dongin thuman lo khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:11 Amaute in ka miteʼ thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna a om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:12 Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beek lo uh a, kisuang thei beek lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site lak mahah amau zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawn khia ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:13 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, amaute ka susia khin dinga, a lote uh ah leenggah a om nawn kei ding hi. Thei in zong gah a nei nawn kei ding hi. A tehte nangawn keu dinga, amaute ka piak sa nate a bei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:14 “Tua ciangin mite in, ‘Bang hangin tutu lai ihi hiam? Kikaikhawm unla khuapi muanhuaite va beel ni; tua lai ah va si ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ tungah i mawh manin Topa i Pasian in eite a si dingin hong seh khinzo a, i dawn dingin gu tui hong pia khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah8:15 Nopna i zong a, nopna i ngah kei hi. Cidamna i lamen a, siatna bek i ngah hi." 
Jeremiah8:16 Leilu lam Dan khua pek panin galteʼ sakol nak ging kiza hi. A sakol hatteʼ hamna awging in gam le lei liingsak hi. Amaute in i gam le a sunga om teng, hong susia khin ding uh hi,’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:17 “Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, note lakah gul kong khah ding hi. A kikhim zo lo gul guneite kong khah dinga, note hong tu ding hi,” Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ka dahna dam thei lo a, ka lungsim na mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ngai un, gam sung mun khempeuh ah ka miteʼ tanute kap uh a, “Zion khua ah Topa om nawn lo ahi hiam? A kumpipa uh om nawn lo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in dawngkik a, “Bang hangin milim bawl tawmte le a gamdang milimte uh tawh kei hong hehsak ahi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah8:20 Mite in, “An kila khinzo a, khuakhal hun zong bei ta napi-in, eite hong kihon nai lo lailai hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ka miteʼ thuakna hangin ka lungsim kisia a, lungkham lua-in ka kap hi." 
Jeremiah8:22 Gilead ah zatui om lo ahi hiam? Zato siam om lo ahi hiam? Bang hangin ka mite dam thei lo ahi uh hiam? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ka lutang tuikhuk hong hi thei henla, ka mitte khitui nak hong hi thei leh ka miteʼ kithah lupna hangin a sun a zanin ka kapkap ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:2 Sehnel gamlak ah khawl nading bukno khat nei thei-in ka mite nusia-in a taisan thei hi leng ka ut hi. A vekpi-un angkawm hat hi khin uh a, thuman lo kim uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:3 A leii uh thalpeu bangin zang uh a, zuau thu bekbek a lawn khia khia uh hi. Gam sungah thuman om loin zuau thu bekbek a dim hi. Siatna lam manawh tektek uh a, kei hong thei lo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mi khempeuh a inn veengte uh kidawm uh henla, a sanggamte uh muang kei uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh sanggamte khem hat ciat uh a, inn veengte khempeuh zong gensiat hat ciat uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:5 Mi khempeuh in a veengte uh khem ciat uh a, thuman gen kuamah om lo hi. A leii uh zuau thu gen dingin kisinsak uh a, mawhna a bawl manun tawl lua uh a, kisik zo nawn lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:6 Siatna khat khit siatna khat, a banbanin gamta uh a, zuau zong a phuakphuak uh hi. Kei hong thei nuam lo uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:7 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cih in ah, “En un, amaute a siantho nadingun suangtui-in ka ze-et ding hi. Tua lo ka mite bang cih nawn ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah9:8 A leii uh thaltang lauhuai bang a, zuau thu a gen uh hi. A kam uh tawh a inn veengte kiangah a aw-zol uh hangin, a sih nading uh a lungsim sung uh ah a ngaihsun veve mawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:9 Hih thute hangin gim pia lo ding ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Hih bang minam khat tungah ka phu la lo ding ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah9:10 “Mualte adingin kapin tau unla, gamlak lo nona munte adingin thumin tau un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate keu gawp a, kuamah pai nawn lo hi. Bawng ham zong kiza nawn lo a, van a leeng vasate le gamsate a taimang ta uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Jerusalem khuapi ninkholna ka bangsak dinga, se-alteʼ teenna mun ka suaksak ding hi. Judah gam khuapite gamlak ka suaksak dinga, kuamah teeng nawn lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:12 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hih thu a thei tel ding mipil kua om ahi hiam? Hih thu a gen tel theih nadingin Topa in kua tungah hilh tel na hi hiam? Kuamah in hih gam a kantan nawn loh nadingin bang hangin kisia-in gamlak tawh kibang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Jeremiah9:13 Topa in, “Amaute in a mai uh a ka lah ka thukham nusia uh a, ka thu hong mang loin ka cih bangin ta lo uh a," 
Jeremiah9:14 amauʼ lungsim deihna zui tentanin a pu a pate uh hilhna bangin Baal nung a zuih man uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah9:15 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: En in, hih mite gamsaai-in ka vak dinga, gu tui ka dawnsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:16 Amaute le a pute a pateʼ theih ngei lohna gam dangah ka kithehthangsak dinga, a sih khit dong uh namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:17 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in a cih in ah, “Ngaihsun unla, numei kapte a hong pai dingin va sam unla, a kah siam tata vaikhak un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:18 Mite in, “Va kinawhsak unla, i khitui a luan theih nading, i mitkhu a kawt theih nadingin eite hong kah uh hen,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Zion khua panin a kiza kahna awging in, “I kisia khinzo a, i zumhuai mahmah khinzo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in i innte hong suksiatsak uh ahih manin i gam i nusia ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah9:20 Tua ciangin keimah in, “No numeite aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un. A kam pan a hong ging khia thu na bil uh ah lutsak un. Na tanute uh a kah dan ding hilh unla, na inn veengte ciat uh kah la hilh un." 
Jeremiah9:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh tawlet vang panin sihna hong lut a, kumpipaʼ inn sungah zong sihna hong lut hi. Kongzing a naupangte vat mang a, sumbuk a tangvalte vatlum hi." 
Jeremiah9:22 Gamlak a ki-tha ek bangin misi luang kipaithang dinga, buhlom at sa kinusia bangin kuamah in a khawm kei ding hi, ci-in a gen dingin Topa in kei hong sawl hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:23 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mipilte in a pilna uh kisaktheih pih kei uh henla, mihatte in a hatna uh kisaktheih pih kei uh hen. Mihaute in zong a hauhna uh kisaktheih pih kei uh hen." 
Jeremiah9:24 A kisatheite in, keimah, leitungah migitna, thuman le thutang a zang ka hihna le tuate sungah nuam a sa pa ka hihna thu hong theihna uh ah kisathei uh hen. Topa in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah9:25 Topa in, “Vun ki-at hi napi-in vun ki-at miteʼ gamtat bangin a gamta lote gimpiak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah9:26 Egypt mite, Judah mite, Edom mite, Ammon mite, Moab mite le a sam uh a mettom sehnel gam a omte khempeuh zong gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih gamte khempeuh in a vun uh at lo uh a, Israel mi khempeuh zong a lungsim sung uh ah vun at lohpi ahi uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:1 Israel mite aw, note hong hopihna Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah10:2 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Gamdangteʼ om dan ciing kei unla, vantung a lim lamdangte lunghihmawhna-in ngaihsun kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamdang mite in tuate a lunghihmawh pih uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:3 Hih miteʼ ngeinate a kimanna om lo hi. Gamlak ah sing khat kiphuk a, khutsiam pa in a hei tawh milimin a bawl hi." 
Jeremiah10:4 Mite in tua pen kham le ngun tawh zem uh a, a kilakkhiat theih loh nadingin sik tawh a kilh uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:5 A milimte uh, tangmai huanah vasateʼ lau nadingin a kikhai milimte tawh kibangin pau thei lo uh a, lam pai thei lo uh ahih manin puak a kul hi. Tuate kihta kei un; siatna bawl thei lo uh a, phatna zong bangmah bawl thei lo uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:6 Topa aw, nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi. Nang na lian a, na min vanglian mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah10:7 Gam khempeuhteʼ Kumpipa aw, nang a hong kihta lo ding kua om ahi hiam? Nang, kihtak ding mah na hi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung mipil khempeuhte le amauʼ gam sung khempeuh lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah om lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:8 A mipilte uh mihai mi mawl ahi uh hi. Sing milim in amaute bangci-in hilh thei mah ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah10:9 Tarshish khua panin ngun sek sa va la uh a, Ufaz khua panin kham va la uh hi. Khutsiamte le kham seekte in milimin bawl uh a, siamgat siamteʼ gat ahi, puan engdup le puan sandup tawh a zem uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ahih hangin Topa pen Pasian man hi a, amah pen a nungta Pasian le tawntung kumpipa ahi hi. A heh ciangin lei kiliing a, gamte in a hehna nang zo lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:11 Amauteʼ tungah, “Vantungte le leitung a bawl lo pasian-te, leitung mun khempeuh panin a mangthang ding uh hi,” ci-in na gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah10:12 Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh leitung bawl a, ama pilna tawh leitung piangsakin, ama siamna tawh vantung a zal hi." 
Jeremiah10:13 Amah a pau ciangin vantungah tuite ging hunhun a, leimong panin tui khu a suaksak hi. Guahzuk nadingin khua phiasak a, huihkua panin huih a nungsak hi." 
Jeremiah10:14 Mi khempeuh hai-in pilna nei lo khin uh a, kham seekte khempeuh in a milimte uh a maizumlawh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a milimte uh zuau hi lel a, nak thei lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:15 Kimanna a nei lo, a haihuaipi hi a, gim a kipiak ni ciangin a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jakobʼ Pasian tua bang hi lo a, amah pen na khempeuh a piangsak pa ahi hi. Ama mi dingin Israel mite teel a, ama min, Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah10:17 Galteʼ umcih a thuak mite aw, na puan lom uh zial un!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, “En un, tu-in hih gam sungah a teeng mite ka lawn khia dinga, a theih nadingun a tung uh ah lungkhamna ka tungsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ka thuakna hangin ka gim a, ka liamna nasia mahmah hi. Ahih hangin, “Hih gimna ka thuak ding mah hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah10:20 Ka puanbuk hong kisuksiatsak a, a kikanna khau khempeuh kitat mangkhin hi. Ka tate in hong taisan uh a, tu-in om nawn lo uh hi. Ka puanbuk a hong lamsak ding leh ka kongkhak puante a hong khaisak ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:21 Bang hang hiam cih leh makaite hai khin uh a, Topaʼ deihna dong lo uh hi. Tua thu hangin amaute mapai lo uh a, a mite uh kithehthang mang hi." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ngai dih un, thu khat kigen hi. Judah khuapite gamlak a suaksak ding le se-alteʼ khua a suaksak dingin leilu lam gam panin buaina lianpi khat hong pai hi." 
Jeremiah10:23 Topa aw, mihingʼ om dan ama uk theih ahih lohna ka thei ta a, ama kalsuan nading ama geel theih hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah10:24 Topa aw, a hoihbek takin, heh lua loin kei hong hilh in. Hong heh lua lecin kei ka si ding hi." 
Jeremiah10:25 Nangmah a hong thei lo gamte tung le nangma min a hong lo ngei lo mite tungah na hehna sung suk in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jakobʼ suanlekhakte that mang khinin amauʼ teenna a susia khin uh hi. 
Jeremiah11:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Hih thuciamna thute ngai inla, Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite kiangah va gen in." 
Jeremiah11:3 Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah, hih thuciamna a mang lo mi peuhmah in hamsiatna thuak tahen, ci-in va gen in." 
Jeremiah11:4 Tua pen na pute na pate uh, sik haltuina meikhuk tawh a kibang Egypt gam pan a ka lakkhiat ni-a ka thuciamna ahi hi. Tua ni-in, ka thu hong ngai-in kong thupiakna bangin na sep uh leh, note ka mi na hi ding uh a, kei pen noteʼ Pasian hi-in," 
Jeremiah11:5 tua bang na hih uh leh na pute na pate uh tungah ka ciam sa, tu-a na neih uh bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam kong pia ding hi, ci-in thu ka pia hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, “Hi tahen, Topa aw,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah11:6 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih thuciamna thute ngai-in a sep nadingun Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah va taangko in." 
Jeremiah11:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiat pan a kipan tu ni ciang dong ka thu hong mang un, ci-in na pute na pate uh tungah tam veipi nakpi takin ka hilh ngitnget hi." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang loin a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a gitlohna lungsim uh a zui tentan uh hi. Hih thuciamna a zuih ding uh thu ka piak hangin hong nial veve uh ahih manin tua sunga thute a vekpi-in ka tungsak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah11:9 Tua ciangin Topa in hong hopih leuleu a, “Judah minamte le Jerusalem khua mite in kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:10 Ka thu a ngai nuam lo a pu a pate uhʼ mawhna lamah kilehhei khinzo uh a, pasian dangteʼ na a sem dingin a zui khinzo uh hi. Israel mite le Judah mite in a pu a pate uh tawh ka bawl sa uh thuciamna a palsat khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:11 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kong cih in ah, en un, a pelh theih loh uh gimna amauʼ tungah ka tungsak dinga, kei kiangah a hong kap liang uh zongin ka dawng nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:12 Tua ciangin Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite in meihal biakna tawh a biak uh a pasian-te uhʼ kiangah pai-in a va thum ding uh hi. Ahih hangin hih gimna hong tun ciangin a hon khia thei tuan kei ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah11:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Judah aw, na khua om zahzah uh pasian na nei uh a, Jerusalem khua kongzing om zahzah mah, meihal biakna tawh Baal biakna ding a zumhuai biakna taute na bawl tazen uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Tua ahih manin Jeremiah aw, hih mite ading thu ngetsak kei inla, amauʼ tangin thumsak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in gim ngahin hong sap uh ciangin ka ngai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:15 Ka itte in siatna a bawl khit uh ciangin ka biakinn sungah bang thu nei thei nawn ding ahi uh hiam? Nong kamkhapte uh le na biakpiakna sate un na kisiatna ding uh hong kipelhsak thei ding ahi hiam? Tua ciangin note na lungdam thei ding uh hiam? 
Jeremiah11:16 Nidang lai-in Topa in note, a hing dikdek a gah pha oliv kung tawh kong genteh ngei hi. Ahih hangin kong hal dinga, na hiangte uh kangtumin ging huhu ding hi." 
Jeremiah11:17 Israel mite le Judah mite in meihalna tawh Baal bia-in hong hehsak uh a, hih bang siatna bawl uh ahih manin, amaute a phut keimah Vanglian Topa in amauteʼ tungah siatna a tun nading thu ka pia zo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah11:18 Ka galte in kei a hong sawmna uh Topa in nong hilh ciangin keʼn ka thei pan hi. 
Jeremiah11:19 A kigo dingin a kipaipih mawhna a nei lo tuuno bang ka hi hi. Amaute in, “Singkung a gah phat hun laitakin phuk tan ni. Ama min a kiphawk nawn loh nadingin amah that lum ni,” ci-in a gen uh a, kei hong sawmna uh ahih lam ka thei kei kha hi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ahih hangin thu a mantakin khenin, mihingteʼ lungsim le a ngaihsutna uh a en tel a Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thuhkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka thu kong ap khin hi." 
Jeremiah11:21 Tua ahih manin kei hong that nuamin, “ Topaʼ min tawh thu hilh kei in. Na hilh leh koteʼ khutlumin na si ding hi,” a hong ci Anathoth khua mite tawh kisai-in" 
Jeremiah11:22 Vanglian Topa in, “En un, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. A tangvalte uh namsau-in si ding uh a, a tapate le a tanute uh kialin a puksi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah11:23 Anathoth khua mite tungah siatna tungsakin gim ka piak hun ciangin a suakta kuamah a om nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah12:1 Topa aw, nang tawh thu i kiseel ciangin nang a tawntungin na man den hi. Ahih hangin thu khat ka hong dong nuam lai hi. Bang hangin migilote daupai uh a, mi khem hatte gualzo sese ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Nangmah in amaute na suan a, amaute in zong zungkha in, khangin, gah hong gah uh hi. A kam uh tawh hong phat khem uh a, a lungsim uh nang tawh kigamla hi." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah in kei nong thei hi. Ka gamtatnate nong mu a, nang ka hong itna thu na hong thei hi. Amaute pen gawh dingin a kikoih tuu bangin kai khia inla, a kigawh ni hun ding a tun mateng tuam koih in." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ka gam sung bang tanvei keucip ding ahi hiam? Mun khempeuh ah lopate bang tanvei vul cip ding ahi hiam? A teng miteʼ gitlohna hangin gamsate le vasate a mangthang khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “I gamtatnate Pasian in hong mu kei ngawn,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:5 Topa in, “Jeremiah aw, mite tawh tai kidem a, nangmah hong gimsak zo uh ahihleh, sakol bangci dem zawh ding na hiam? A nopna munah tuk lailai na hih leh Jordan gun gei sing kawm lakah bang cih ding na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggamte le na innkuanpihte nangawn in nang hong zuak uh a, nang a hong do ding mihonpi a kaikhawm uh hi. Kam khum tawh nang a hong zol uh hangin um kei in,” ci-in hong dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah12:7 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka inn ka nusia khin a, ka luah sa mite ka pai mang ta hi. Ka it mahmah ka mite, a galte uhʼ khut sungah ka pia ta hi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Ka luah dingin ka teel sa mite in gamlak a humpinelkai bangin keiʼ lang khat ah pangin hong hawk san uh ahih manin amaute ka mudah hi. 
Jeremiah12:9 Ka mite pen, sasial ne vasa gial khat, sasial ne vasa dangte in a kimkot panin a tuk huan nainai uh tawh a kibang uh hi. Gamsate aw, hong kikhawm unla, pawi hong siim un." 
Jeremiah12:10 Tuucing dang tampi in ka leenggah lo hong suksiatsak uh a, kei aʼ teng hong tuatcilsak uh hi. A hoih mahmah ka leenggah lo pawn lak, gam lak, a suaksak uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:11 Pawn lak hong suahsak uh a, dahin ka kap hi. Gam sung khempeuh a kisiat khit hangin kuamah in phamawh sa lo sawnsawn uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:12 Sehnel gam mual sang panin a susia dingte hong pai zo uh hi. Gam mong khat panin gam mong khat dongah a lungmuang kuamah om lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ namsau in mi khempeuh a vattuk hi. 
Jeremiah12:13 Amaute in mangbuh tuh uh a, ahi zongin kiak bek a ngah uh hi. Nasep a hahkat mahmah hangun bangmah a ngah kei uh hi. A kihtakhuai Topaʼ hehna hangin anlak hun ciangin a maizum ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah12:14 Ka mi Israel-teʼ luah dingin ka piak gamh a susia nuam a gilo a veengte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cih in ah, “En un, a gam uh panin amaute ka bot khia dinga, amauʼ khut sung panin Judah mite ka suaktasak ding hi." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ahih hangin amaute ka lakkhiat khit ciangin ka hehpihkik dinga, amauʼ luah ding amauʼ gam ciatciat uh ah ka koihkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah12:16 Tua ciangin, ka miteʼ om dan hoihtakin a sin uh a, Baal min tawh a kiciam dingin ka mite a sinsak mah bangun, ‘ Topa a nuntak mah bangin,’ ci-in keima min tawh kiciam ding a sin uh leh ka mite lakah kip takin a om ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh in ka thu hong ngaih kei leh tua gam bot khia-in ka susia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:1 Topa in kei tungah, “Pai inla patpuan dialkaih khat na lei khit ciangin kawtsak loin teeng in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Tua ciangin kei zong Topaʼ hong gen mah bangin dialkaih khat lei-in ka teeng hi. 
Jeremiah13:3 Topa in a nih veina hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Na kawng ah na teen, na dialkaih lei la in. Tho inla Eufratis gun ah pai in. Tua lai ah suanghawm sungah va seel in,” hong ci leuleu hi." 
Jeremiah13:5 Kei zong pai-in Topaʼ hong sawlna bangin Eufratis gun gei ah ka seel hi. 
Jeremiah13:6 Tua zawh ni tampi khit ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Eufratis gun ah va pai inla, na seel dingin ka hong sawl na dialkaih va lakik in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:7 Tua ciangin kei zong Eufratis gun ah pai-in dialkaih ka seelna mun khuat kikin ka la hi. Dialkaih na ngot gawp khin a, zat theih ding hi nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah13:8 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah13:9 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, hih bangmahin Judah miteʼ kisaktheihna le Jerusalem khuateʼ ki-uatsaknate ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:10 Ka thu hong ngai nuam loin amauʼ ngaihsutna bang bekin a pai tentan nuam, pasian dangteʼ na a sem ding le a bia dingin a nung a zui hih migilote pen zat theih ding ahi nawn lo, hih dialkaih bang ahi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh dialkaih, miteʼ kawng tungah a belh cinten mah bangin Israel mi khempeuh le Judah mi khempeuh keiʼ tungah a hong belh cinten dingin ka bawl hi. Tua hileh amaute ka mi hi ding uh a, ka minthanna, ka hoihna le ka vangliatna ding ahi ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong mang lo uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:12 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Jeremiah aw, amauʼ kiangah, ‘ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a hong genin ah, “Zu beel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh a kidim ding hi,” hong ci hi,’ va ci in. Amaute in nang kiangah, ‘Beel khempeuh leenggahzu tawh kidim ding cih kote in thei lo ka hi uh hiam?’ hong cikik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:13 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in hong cih in ah: En un, Davidʼ tokhom tungah a tu kumpite, siampite, kamsangte le Jerusalem khua-a a teeng mi khempeuh a kipan gam sungah a om mi khempeuh zu tawh kidimsakin ka khamsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:14 Pate le tate a kipan amaute khatlekhat ka kiphusak dinga, Topa in kong cih in ah, hehpih lo, lainat lo, it loin ka sisak ding hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ngai-in na bil uh ngat un; kisathei kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in thu a gen zo hi.
