Jeremiah13:16 Topa in khua mialsak a, khua mialna mual tungah na tuk ma un, na lamet uh khuavak pen khuamial bikbek a suah ma-in, Topa na Pasian uh pahtawi un." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uh leh na kisaktheihna uh hangin ka kap sim dinga, khitui luangin nakpi takin ka kidik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ tuuhonte sal dingin kikai khia zo hi." 
Jeremiah13:18 Topa in kei kiangah, “Kumpipa le a nu kiangah, ‘Na kumpi tokhomte tung panun hong tuak suk un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na kumpi lukhute uh na lu tung uh panin kia khinzo hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah13:19 Negeb gam a om khua kongpite lah kikhak a, kuamah lut thei nawn lo hi. Judah mite zong salin kikai a, a vekun sal suak khin uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah13:20 Jerusalem khua aw, khuadak inla, leilu lam panin a hong paite en dih in. Nangmah a hong kipia a hoih mahmah na tuuhonte koi ah om ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Nangma lawm dingin na bawl mite teekteek in nang hong uk ni ciangin bang na ci ding hiam? Numei nausuakte in na a sak velval uh bangin nang zong na na sa ding hi. 
Jeremiah13:22 Bang hangin hih thute kei tungah hong tung ahi hiam, ci-in na ngaihsut leh na mawhna a liatluatna hang ahi hi. Tua thu hangin na nik hong kihawk gawp a, a hong kibuan gawp ahi hi." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ethiopia mi vomte in a vun uh khek thei a, kamkei in a gial khek thei ahi hiam? A khek theih uh leh siatna bawl ding a zongsang khin note in zong a hoih na bawl thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Sehnel gam panin a hong nung huih in buhvai a mut bangin note kong thehthang ding hi. 
Jeremiah13:25 Hih pen nangma ngah dingin ka hong sehsak ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei na hong mangngilh a, pasian zuau peuh na um hi." 
Jeremiah13:26 Kei mahmah in na nik kong hawksak dinga, kong maizumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah13:27 Na kihhuainate, na angkawmna, na hukna le gamlak mual tungah numei paktat bangin milim pasian peuh na biak kawikawinate ka mu zo hi. Jerusalem aw, gimna ngah ta in. Na siantho nadingin bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:1 Guah zu loin khua keuna tawh kisai-in Topa in Jerusalem kiangah hih bangin a gen hi: 
Jeremiah14:2 “Judah gam kap a, a khuapite maimang dekdek hi. A mite in puan vom khu-in leilak ah bok uh a, Jerusalem khua-a om miteʼ kahna aw ging hi." 
Jeremiah14:3 Uliante in a nasemte uh tuitawi dingin sawl uh a, tuikhuk a zuat uh leh tui na om lo hi. A beel hawm uh tawh hong kilehkik uh a, lungkhamin cih nading thei loin a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:4 Lokhote lungmang uh a, a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh guah zu lo ahih manin lei a keu gawp hi." 
Jeremiah14:5 Lopa om lo lua ahih manin sazuk in gamlak ah a no a nusia liang hi. 
Jeremiah14:6 Gam sakolte, bangmah om lohna mual tungah se-alte bangin a nak huhu uh hi. Lopa om lo ahih manin a hak zo kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:7 Ka mite in kei tungah, ‘ Topa aw, ka mawhna uh koteʼ lang khat ah hong pang ahi ta zongin nangma min hangin kote hong hehpih in. Kote in tam veipi nang kong nungngat uh a, nangma tungah ka hong khial khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:8 Israel miteʼ lamet pa aw, haksat hun ciangin ko a hong hon khia pa na hi hi. Bang hangin ka gam sung uh ah khualmi bangin nang omin khualzin zan khat bek a taam bangin hong om na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Bang hangin mi lungkia gawp bangin omin, a hon khia thei lo galkap pa bangin om na hi hiam? Ahih hangin Topa aw, koteʼ laizang ah nang na om a, nangma minin kote hong kisam hi. Kote hong nusia kei in,’ hong ci uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:10 Hih mite tawh kisai-in Topa in thu gen a, “Kei kiang panin amaute vak khia kawikawi nuam uh a, a kideek kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa keimah in amaute ka sang kei a, a khialhnate uh phawkin, a mawhnate uh hangin gim ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:11 Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih mite in thupha a ngah nadingin thu hong ngen nawn kei in." 
Jeremiah14:12 An a tan uh hangin amauʼ thumna ka ngai kei dinga, meihal biakna le an tawh biaknate hong piak uh hangin ka sang kei ding hi. Amaute namsau tawh ahi zongin, kial tawh ahi zongin, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin ka sisak zaw ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:13 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, en dih in. Kamsangte in amaute kiangah, ‘Note in namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin na mu kha ngei kei ding uh a, hih munah Pasian in lungnopna kip hong pia ding hi,’ a ci uh hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:14 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Tua kamsangte in keiʼ min suangin zuau thu hong gen uh hi. Amaute ka sawl kei a, thu ka pia kei a, zong ka hopih kei hi. Note kiangah hong gen uh thute a man lo maangmuhna, bangmahin a kimang lo aisanna le amauʼ ngaihsut tawm thute ahi hi." 
Jeremiah14:15 Tua ahih ciangin ka sawl lohpi, ‘Hih gam sungah namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin hong tung lo ding hi,’ ci-in keima min suangin thu a gen kamsangte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cih in ah, namsau le kial tawh hih kamsangte a si khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:16 A hilh uh mite in zong kial le namsau thuakin amaute a kipan a zite uh, a tapate uh le a tanute uh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah kipaithang dinga, kuamah in a vui kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gitlohna amauʼ tung mahah ka buak suk ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:17 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Jeremiah aw, amaute kiangah, ‘Sun le zanin ka khitui luangluang henla, kang ngei kei tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima mite in nakpi takin liamna thuak uh a, nakpi takin a kisat uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:18 Lo lai ah paikhia leng, namsau tawh a kithat mi bekbek ka mu a, khuapi sungah lut leng, kialin a puksite bekbek ka mu hi. Kamsangte le siampite in koi ah pai ding cih thei lopi-in gam sungah an ngenin a vak kawikawi uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah14:19 Topa aw, nangmah in Judah gam nial siang khinzo na hi hiam? Zion khua kihhuai sa na hi hiam? Bang hangin kote liamna hong thuaksak a, hong damsak nawn lo na hi hiam? Lungnopna ka lamen uh a, hoihna bangmah a hong tung kei hi. Dam nading hun ka lamen uh a, lauhuaina bekbek ka mu uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:20 Topa aw, ka gitlohna uh le ka pute ka pate uh gitlohnate ka hong pulak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka hong mawh khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah14:21 Nangma min na khualna-in kote hong nolh kei inla, a vanglian na tokhom mindaisak kei ta in. Kote tawh nong thuciamna hong phawk inla, hong ciampel kei ta in." 
Jeremiah14:22 Gamdang pasian zuauteʼ lakah guah a zusak thei om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong vantungmi in ama thu-in guah zu tawmsak thei ahi hiam? Tua bang a hih thei nang bek hi lo na hi hiam? Topa koteʼ Pasian aw, nangmah in tuate khempeuh hih na hih manin nangma sungah lametna kong nei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Moses le Samuel nangawn ka mai ah hong dingin hong thum uh zongin hih mite ka hehpih tuan kei ding hi. Ka muhna panin hawl khia unla, pai khiasak un." 
Jeremiah15:2 Amaute in, ‘Koi ah pai ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci-in hong dot uh leh hih bangin genkik in: ‘ Topa in, “Pulnatna tawh a si dingte pul-in si ding uh a, namsau tawh a si dingte namsau-in si ding uh hi. Kial tawh a puksi dingte kialin si ding uh a, sal a kikai dingte zong salin kikai ding uh hi,” a ci hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah15:3 “Amauteʼ sih nadingin gimna nam li ka tungsak ding hi. A kithah nading uh namsau, a kei zan gawp dingin ui, a valh tum ding le a susia gawp dingin huihlak a vasate le leilak a ganhingte ka koih ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:4 Judah kumpi Hezekiahʼ tapa Manasseh in Jerusalem khua ah hih bangin a bawl thu leitung gam khempeuhte in mu-in a lau ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah15:5 “Kua in nang hong hehpih ding ahi hiam? Jerusalem aw, kua in nang hong kah ding ahi hiam? Kua, hong lambaangin, damlenat kitheihsakna-in hong hawh ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Nangmah in kei nong taisan zo hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Kei nong nungngat niloh hi. Tua ahih manin ka khut zanin nang kong susia hi. Ka hehna ka ki-ip zo nawn kei hi." 
Jeremiah15:7 Na gam sung khua kongpite ah huihpiʼ mut bangin note kong mut mang ding hi. Na tate uh ka beisak dinga, ka mite ka susia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna uh le na om dan hoih lo panun na kiheikik kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Tuipi a sehnel omzah sangin nupi meigong ka tamsak zaw ding hi. Na tangvalte uh a khan laitakin ka that dinga, a nute uh ka lunggimsak ding hi. Noteʼ tungah thakhat thu-in lungkhamna le launa ka hong tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:9 Ta sagih a nei nupi khakham vei-in a sibup hi. Sunkim lai hi napi ama adingin khuamial bang a, maizumna le mindaina a thuak hi. No a nungta laite na galte un namsau tawh a hong sat lup dingun kong pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:10 Gimna ka thuak hi; ka nu aw, gam sung khempeuh a mite tawh a kitawng a kiseel dingin kei nong suaksak hi. Ka sumte kuamah lah leitawisak loin kuama-aʼ lah leitawi la lo napi, a vekpi-un kei hong hamsiat teitei uh hi." 
Jeremiah15:11 Topa aw, amauteʼ hoih nadingin nang tungah kong thumsak kei a, gimna le haksatna hun ciangin ka galte adingin nangʼ tungah kong ngetsak kei leh tua amauʼ hong hamsiatnate keiʼ tungah hong tung tahen!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Mi khat in sik kuaitan zo lo ding ahihleh leilu lam a sik le sumngo kihel khawm kuaitan zo zaw ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah15:13 Topa in, “Na gam sungteng a na bawl uh mawhna khempeuhteʼ hangin na neih na lam uh le na sum na paite uh man ngah loin na galte uh ka tuahsak mang ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:14 Na theih ngei loh uh gam khat ah na galte uhʼ na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna mei bangin kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:15 Tua ciangin keimah in: Topa aw, nang na thei hi. Hong phawk inla hong veh in. Kei a hong bawlsiate tungah phu hong laksak in. Ka galte tungah na lungduaina hangin keiʼ sih nading piangsak kei in. Nangma hangin min siatna a thuak ka hih lam hong thei in." 
Jeremiah15:16 Na thute in kei hong kem a, an bangin ka ne hi. Na thute kei adingin kipahna le lungdamna ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma minin kei hong kilo hi, aw, Topa, Vanglian Pasian aw." 
Jeremiah15:17 Mi gualnuam mawkmawkte tawh ka kikhawl kei a, zong ka lungdam khawm kei hi. Nangma thu kong manna hangin kei tangkai ka hih manin a hehin ka om den hi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Bang hangin ka natna dai thei lo a, ka liamna dam thei lo a, dam nuam het lo ahi hiam? Tui a kang lui tawh kibangin lungkiatna hong thuaksak ding na hi hiam, ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:19 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Na hong kilehkik leh kong koihna ngei ah kong koihkik dinga, ka na na semkik ding hi. Thu manpha lo gen loin thu manpha bek na gen leh, ka kamsang dingin ka hong zang ding hi. Nang kiangah amaute hong pai ding uh a, nang na hih leh amauʼ kiangah na pai kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah15:20 Hih mite tungah sumngo a kibawl khua kulhpi kong bangsak dinga, amaute in a hong sim uh hangin a hong zo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong hon khia ding le a hong suaktasak dingin nang ka hong ompih hi, Topa in ka hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah15:21 Migiloteʼ khut sung panin nang kong suaktasak dinga, mi lauhuaiteʼ khut sung panin nang kong hon khia ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Hih bang munah zi nei kei inla, tanu tapa zong nei kei in." 
Jeremiah16:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mun a suak tanu tapate le a nute uh tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cih in ah: 
Jeremiah16:4 Natna lian tawh si ding uh a, kuamah in kah loin kuamah in zong a vui kei ding uh hi. Leilak a ek ki-tha a bang lel ding uh hi. Namsau le kial tawh a si ding uh a, a luanghawmte uh huihlak a leeng vasate le leilak a ganhingte in a ne ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, miʼ kahna inn sungah lut kei unla, thumin kuamah va kah se kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh lungnopna, itna lianpi le ka hehpihna hih mite kiang panin ka la khia khinzo hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:6 Hih gamah mi liante le mi neute si ding uh a, kivui loin, amauʼ hangin kuamah kap loin, kuamah in a pumpi uh kui liam loin a sam uh zong a met kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:7 Misi hangin a kapte hehnep nadingin kuamah in anletui a lui kei ding uh a, a nu ahih kei leh a pa a site nangawn kuamah in a hehnem kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:8 Pawi kibawlna inn ah na pai kei ding uh a, amaute tawh a ne a dawn khawm dingin na tu kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hih bangin kong ci hi: En un, hih mun panin noteʼ muh teekteekin, noteʼ theih hunsung mahin gualnopna, lungdamna awte le zi nei thakte, pasal nei thakteʼ awte ka gingsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Hih thu teng hih mite tungah na gen ciangin amaute in, ‘Bang hangin Topa in hih gimna lianpi eite tungah hong tungsak ahi hiam? I khialhna bang ahi hiam? Topa i Pasianʼ tungah bang mawhna bawl ihi hiam?’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:11 Tua ciangin nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in, “Na pu na pate un kei hong taisan khin uh a, kei hong nusia-in ka thukham a zui kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:12 Note, na pu na pate sangun na siahuai zaw uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, noteʼ utna bang ciat na zui tentan uh a, ka thu nong ngai nuam kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:13 Tua ahih manin hih gam panin note le na pu na pate un na theih ngei loh uh gamah kong not khia ding hi. Tua lai ah sun le zanin pasian dangteʼ na na sem niloh ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note kong angvan nawn kei ding hi,” ci hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:14 “Tua ahih manin, en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, kuamah in, ‘Egypt gam panin Israel mite a hong la khia Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in keiʼ minin a kiciam nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:15 Amaute in, ‘Leilu lam gam le eite hong hawl khiatna gam khempeuh panin Israel mite a hong kaikhawm Topa a nuntak bangin,’ a ci zaw ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh ka piak sa, amauʼ neihsa gamah amaute ka paipih ding hi." 
Jeremiah16:16 “En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, ngabeng tampi ka khah dinga, amaute ka mansak ding hi. Tua khit ciangin sabeng tampi ka khah dinga, amaute in mual tung khempeuh le suanghawmte lakah amaute a beng ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a om dan khempeuh uh ka mitin ka mu a, keiʼ kiang panin a kiseel bangmah om lo hi. A khialhna khempeuh uh zong ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah16:18 Amauteʼ khialhna le a mawhnate uh a zah nihin ka thuk ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a muhthadah huai siluang hawmte tawh a kibang milimte tawh ka gam a ninsak uh a, kihhuaina tawh ka gamh a dimsak uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah16:19 Aw Topa, ka hatna le ka kulhpi, lungkham hun ciangin ka bukna pa aw, leimong panin gamdang mite nangma kiangah hong pai ding uh a, “Ka pu ka pate un zuau thu le bangmahin a kimang lo milimte longal bangmah dang a luah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:20 Mi in ama pasian ding bawl tawm thei ahi hiam? Tuate pasian hi lo hi,” hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah16:21 “Tua ahih manin amaute ka hilh ding hi. Tu tung peuhmah in Topa ka hihna thu a hong theih nadingun ka vangliatna le ka hatna ka theisak ding hi,” ci-in Topa in a gen hi." 
Jeremiah17:1 Topa in a genna ah, “Judah miteʼ mawhna sik laikung khat tawh kigelh hi. Suang manpha mukzum tawh amauteʼ lungtang peek tung le biakna tau kite tungah khuakin ki-at hi." 
Jeremiah17:2 A tate un singniim nuai khempeuh le mual sangteʼ tunga a biakna taute uh le a nusian uh Asherah milimte phawk veve uh a," 
Jeremiah17:3 zanglei-a om mualte tungah zong tua mawhna a kilang hi. Na gam sung khempeuh uh ah na bawl uh mawhnate hangin na neih na lam uh le na sum na paite uh, na galte uh ka tuah mangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:4 Note kong piak na gam uh zong na taan ding uh a, na theih ngei loh uh gam khat ah na galte uhʼ na ka hong semsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hehna kitawhkuang a, a mit nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah17:5 Topa in kong cih in ah: “Mi bek muangin miʼ hatna bek suang a, Topa tawh a lungsim a kilehngat mi in hamsiatna a ngah ahi hi." 
Jeremiah17:6 Amah pen sehnel gamah a po sawlbawk bang hi a, khangin a bawk a pha zo kei ding hi. Kuama ten lohna ci gam, keugaw gamah amah a teeng ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:7 “ Topa muangin amah a beel mi in thupha a ngah ahi hi. 
Jeremiah17:8 Amah, gun gei-a a kisuan singkung bang hi a, lui gei ah a zung a kha hi. A tehte hing den ahih manin nisa kihta lo hi. Tatsat loin gah den ahih manin guah zuk loh kum ciangin zong lungkham tuan lo hi." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Na khempeuh lakah lungsim a khem hat pen hi a, a kisia pha mahmah ahi hi. Kua in lungsim thei zo ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Keimah Topa in mi khempeuhʼ nuntak zia le a gamtatna tawh kizui-in a pia khia dingin ngaihsutna ka en tel a, lungsim ka sittel hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah17:11 Thuman lopi tawh a hau mi pen ama tui lopi a keuhsak dingin a opsim vasa tawh kibang hi. A khan lai-in a neihsa teng taan dinga, a tawpna ah mi haipi a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:12 I biakinnpi pen a kipat cil-in mual tungah a om a minthang mahmah kumpi tokhom tawh kibang hi. 
Jeremiah17:13 Aw Topa, Israel miteʼ lamet pa aw, nang a hong taisan mite a zahhuai ding uh hi. Nang a hong lehngat san mite leivui lak a min gelh bangin a mangthang uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nuntakna ciktui ahi Topa a hong taisan zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:14 Topa aw, hong damsak lecin ka natna teng bei dinga, hong hon khia lecin kei ka suakta ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong phat pa na hi hi." 
Jeremiah17:15 En in, amaute in, “ Topaʼ hong tawnnate koi laitak ah om ahi hiam? Tu-in hong tung tahen!” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:16 Ahih hangin amaute tungah gimna na tunsak ding kong ngen kei a, siatna ni hong tun ding ka deihsak loh lam zong na hong thei hi. Ka kam panin a ging khia thu khempeuh na thei khin hi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Kei hong lausak kei in. Gimna hong tun ciangin kong belh pa na hi hi. 
Jeremiah17:18 Kei hong bawlsiate na zahhuaisak inla, ahih hangin kei hong zahhuaisak kei in. Amaute lung-amsak inla, ahih hangin kei hong lung-amsak kei in. Amaute tungah siatna ni tungsak inla, a zah nihin susia in!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Topa in kei kiangah, “Va pai inla, Judah gam kumpiteʼ lutna le pusuahna Miteʼ Kongpi le Jerusalem khua kongpite khempeuh ah va ding inla, hih bangin va gen in:" 
Jeremiah17:20 ‘Hih kongpi sunga hong lut no Judah gam kumpite, Judah mi khempeuh le Jerusalem khuami khempeuhte aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai un." 
Jeremiah17:21 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Na nuntak nop lai uh leh kidawm unla, Sabbath ni-in van pua kei un. Jerusalem khua kongpite ah bangmah hong lutpih kei un." 
Jeremiah17:22 Sabbath ni-in na inn uh ah bangmah sem kei un. Na pu na pate uh ka thupiak mah bangin Sabbath ni siangthosak un. 
Jeremiah17:23 Ahih hangin na pu na pate un ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, a bil uh hong ngat lo uh hi. Ka thu hong mang lo uh a, ka hilhna a theih loh nadingun a lungsim uh a khauhsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:24 “‘Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, note in ka thu nong ngaih uh a, Sabbath ni-in hih khua kongpite ah bangmah hong lutpih loin, Sabbath ni siangthosakin, na na sep kei uh leh," 
Jeremiah17:25 na kumpite uh le na uliante un Davidʼ neih bang kumpi vangliatna a nei ding uh hi. Amaute in Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite tawh sakol leeng le sakolte tungah tuangin hih khua kongpite ah hong lut ding uh a, hih khuapi ah zong mi teeng tawntung ding hi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Mite in Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kiim panin ahi zongin, Benjamin gam, Shefelah zanglei gam, mual tung gam le leitaw lam Negeb gamte panin ahi zongin meihal biakna le biakpiaknate, an tawh biakna, paknamtui le lungdam biakpiaknate, Topaʼ biakinn ah hong pia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ahih hangin ka thu nong ngaih kei uh a, Sabbath ni siangthosak loin, Jerusalem khua kongpite ah van pua-in nong lutpih uh leh, tua kongpite ka hal ding hi. A mei in Jerusalem khua kumpi innte lawhin kaang tum dinga, a mei a kiphelh zo kei ding hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tho in. Beelseek paʼ inn ah pai suk inla, tua lai ah ka thute kong hilh ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:3 Tua ciangin kei zong beelseek paʼ inn ah ka pai suk leh beel a sek laitak ka va tuak kha hi. 
Jeremiah18:4 Buan tawh a bawl a beel ama khut sungah kisia ahih manin beelseek pa in hoih a sak bangin beel dang khatin a sek pha hi. 
Jeremiah18:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Israel mite aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, hih beelseek paʼ hih bangin note zong hong hih thei lo ding ka hi hiam? En un, beelseek paʼ khut sunga buan tawh kibangin, Israel mite aw, keiʼ khut sungah note na om uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin bot khia-in, khenkhamin, ka suksiatna ding thu, hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin" 
Jeremiah18:8 tua ka gen sa minam le gam a siatna panin a kiheikik leh, ama tungah siatna tunsak dingin ka seh sa pen ka kisikkik dinga, ka tungsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah18:9 Minam khat peuhpeuh ahi a, gam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin lam ding le phut dingin hun khat peuhpeuh lai-in ka gen khinzo ahi zongin," 
Jeremiah18:10 amah in ka thu hong ngai loin, hoih ka sak lohte a bawl teitei leh, ama tungah hoihna bawl ding ka seh sa pen ka kisikkik dinga, ka bawl nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah18:11 Tua ahih manin tu-in, Judah mite le Jerusalem khua miteʼ kiangah Topa in a cih in ah, ‘En un, noteʼ siat nading ka geel a, noteʼ lang khat ah ngimna khat ka nei hi. Na vekpi-un na siatna uh pan kilehkik unla, na om dan uh le na nasepnate uh bawl pha un,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah18:12 Amaute in, ‘Tua bang gen kul lo hi. Koʼ ngimna bangin ka gamta ding uh a, mi khempeuh ama lungsim siaʼ deihna bangin a gamta ding uh hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:13 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: Minam dangteʼ lakah hih bang thu a kiza ngei hiam, dong dih un. Keima mituam Israel in a mulkimhuai mahmah na khat a hih zo hi." 
Jeremiah18:14 Lebanon mual tung vuk in susia ngei ahi hiam? Mual tung panin a hong luang a vot kilkel luite kang ngei ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ahih hangin ka mite in kei hong mangngilh khin uh a, milim pasian-te kiangah paknamtui a hal uh hi. Amauʼ tot ding lampi ah tuk uh ahih manin a tot ngei uh lampi lui zui nawn loin, lampi lopi a tawn uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:16 Amauteʼ gam pen a mulkimhuai le simmawhna tawh a kiphitsan den ding gam a suaksak uh hi. Tua gam a kantan khempeuh mulkim mahmah uh a, lamdang sa-in a lu uh a pei uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nisuahna lam huih in nin a mut mang bangin a galte uh mai ah amaute ka thehthang ding hi. Haksatna a tuah ni-un amaute ka nungngat dinga, ka maingat kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah18:18 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Hong pai un, Jeremiah sawm ni. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite a hong hilh dingin siampite ahi zongin, i dot ding mipilte ahi zongin, Pasianʼ thu a hong gen dingin kamsangte ahi zongin i nei hi. Hong pai un, amah mawhsakin ama thu peuhmah mal khat zong i mang kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:19 Hong en in, Topa aw, keima hong thugennate le ka galte in keima thu a gennate hong ngai in." 
Jeremiah18:20 Hoihna pen siatna tawh a kituak ding mah ahi hiam? Keimah hong siahna-in gum a to uh hi. Nangma mai ah kong dinga, amau ading thuhoih kong gen hi. Na hehna amaute tungah na tunsak loh nadingin ka hong ngetnate hong phawk in." 
Jeremiah18:21 Tua ahih manin a tate uh kial tawh puksisak inla, amaute namsau-in sisak in. A zite uh ta neisak kei inla, meigong suaksak in. A pasalte uh pulnatna tawh sisak inla, a tangvalte uh gal sungah namsau tawh kithat lumsak in." 
Jeremiah18:22 Amau a that lum ding galkapte thakhat thu-in paisak inla, amauʼ innte panin kahna aw kizasak in! Bang hang hiam cih leh ka kiat nadingin gum to uh a, ka khete a awk nadingin thang a hong siah uh hi." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ahih hangin Topa aw, amaute in thah dingin kei a hong sawmna uh nang na thei hi. Amauʼ khialhnate na maisak kei inla, nangma muhna panin amauʼ mawhnate phiat mangsak kei in. Nangma mai ah amaute guallelsak inla, na heh ni mahin hih ek in." 
Jeremiah19:1 Topa in hong hopih a, “Beelseek pa kiangah pai inla, leibeel khat va lei in. Miteʼ lakah upa pawl khat le siampi upa pawl khat tonpih inla," 
Jeremiah19:2 nisuahna lam kongpi gei, Hinnom kuam ah pai-in, kong gen thute tua lai ah va taangko in." 
Jeremiah19:3 Nangmah in, ‘Judah kumpite le Jerusalem khua mite aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong cih in ah: En un, hih munah kong tunsak ding siatna lian lua ahih manin a za mi khempeuhteʼ bil sungah ging den ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite in kei hong taisan khinzo uh a, amaute a kipanin a pu a pate uh le Judah kumpiteʼ theih ngei loh pasian dangteʼ kiangah paknamtui halin, hih mun a ninsak uh hi. Hih mun pen mawhna nei lo mite thahna sisan tawh dimsak uh a," 
Jeremiah19:5 ka thupiak ahi lo, ka ngaihsut khak beek zong ahi lo, a tate uh meihal biakna tawh Baal biak nadingin Baal biakna tausangte a lam khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:6 Tua ahih manin, en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, hih mun pen Tofeth ahi zongin Hinnom Kuam ahi zongin a kicih nawn loh hun hong tung ding hi. Kithahna Kuam a kici zaw ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:7 Hih munah Judah mite le Jerusalem miteʼ ngimna ka tangtungsak kei dinga, a galte uhʼ namsau le a that nuamteʼ khutlumin amaute ka sisak ding hi. Amauʼ luanghawmte huihlak a leeng vasate le leilak ganhingteʼ an dingin ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Hih khuapi a mulkimhuai le a simmawhhuai ka suaksak dinga, a kantan mi khempeuh in khuapi siatna hangin lamdang sa-in zahpihin a phitsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:9 A galte uh le a that nuam mite in, amaute sim ding uh a, nek ding om lo lua ahih manin a tapate le a tanute uhʼ sa ka nesak dinga, mi khempeuh in a veengteʼ sa a ne ding uh hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah19:10 “Tua ciangin na tonpihteʼ muhin na beel sukham inla," 
Jeremiah19:11 amaute kiangah, Vanglian Topa in a cih in ah, hih beelseek paʼ beel kisukham a, a kibawl phatkik theih nawn loh bangmahin hih mite le hih khuapi ka sukham ding hi. Mun dangah si vui nading mun om nawn lo ding ahih manin Tofeth nangawn ah a kivui ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah19:12 Topa in kong cih in ah, hih mun le hih mun a teeng mite tungah tu-a bangin ka hih dinga, hih khuapi Tofeth ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah19:13 Jerusalem khua-a innte le Judah kumpiteʼ innte a kipan, innkhum zang ah vantung a aksite khempeuh tungah paknamtui hal biakna a kipiakna innte le pasian dangte tungah dawn ding biakna a kibuakna innte khempeuh a vekin Tofeth mun bangin a nin a suak ding hi, ci hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah19:14 Tua ciangin Topa in thu gen dinga hong sawlna Tofeth panin ka ciahkik a, Topaʼ biakinn sungah dingin mi khempeuh kiangah thu ka gen a," 
Jeremiah19:15 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a cih in ah: En un, hih khuapi le a kiim a khuaneute tungah ka gen sa siatna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lungsim uh khauhsak uh a, ka thute a ngai nuam kei uh hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah20:1 Jeremiah in a gen hih thute, Immerʼ tapa, Topaʼ biakinn ukpa ahi siampi Pashhur in a za hi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Tua ciangin Pashhur in kamsang Jeremiah sat a, Benjamin Kongpi saknung gei, Topaʼ biakinn sungah kol a bulh hi." 
Jeremiah20:3 A zing ciangin Pashhur in a kolbulhna panin Jeremiah a khah khit ciangin Jeremiah in, “ Topa in nang, Pashhur ci-in hong sam nawn lo a, ‘Mun Khempeuh ah Launa,’ ci-in hong sam ta hi." 
Jeremiah20:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong cih in ah, ‘En in, keimah in nang le na lawmteʼ lau nadingin nang kong bawl ding hi. Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah Judah gam khempeuh ka pia ding hi. Amah in sal dingin amaute Babylon khua ah paipih dinga, namsau tawh a that lum ding hi." 
Jeremiah20:5 Tua tham loin khuapi sunga hauhna khempeuh, a na sep sa uh khempeuh, a neih a lam a thupi teng khempeuh uh le Judah kumpiteʼ sumlepai khempeuhte a galteʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, amaute in sutin, manin, Babylon khua ah a paipih ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:6 Pashhur aw, nang le na inn sung uh a omte khempeuh sal dingin Babylon khua ah na pai ding uh a, tua lai munah nang na si ding hi. Nang a kipan a man lopi a na thuhilh a ngai na lawmte khempeuh hong kivui ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah20:7 Topa aw, kei nong khem a, khemna ka thuak takpi hi. Kei sangin nang na hat zaw a, keimah nong zo hi. Nisimin miteʼ nuihsat lel ka suak a, mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu ka gen simin, “Ngongtatna le kisiatna!” ci-in ka kiko den hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ kammal ka gen khiatna hangin nisimin simmawhna le zahpihna ka thuak lawh hi." 
Jeremiah20:9 Keimah in, “Ama thu ka gen kei dinga, ama min ka lo kei ding hi,” ci mah leng zong, ama thu ka lungsim sungah mei bangin hong kuang a, ka guh ka tang sungah kikhumcip ahih manin ka ki-ipipna-in ka gim lua a, gen loin ka om thei kei hi." 
Jeremiah20:10 Miteʼ kihuau simna thu tampi ka za a, mun khempeuh lauhuai hi. Ka lawm itte khempeuh in ka cihmawh ding hong ngak gige uh a, “A mawhna pulak ni! A mawhna pulak ni! Amah i khem zo kha ding hi. Tua hileh i zo kha dinga, tua ciangin i thukkik ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ahih hangin Topa pen a kihtakhuai galhang pa bangin kei tawh hong om khawm gige hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong bawlsiate tuk ding uh a, kei hong zo lo ding uh hi. A tawntung a a mindaina uh kimangngilh ngei lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah20:12 A thuman mite a en tel, lungsim le ngaihsutna a mu Vanglian Topa aw, amaute na thukkikna kei hong musak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma khut sungah ka thu kong ap khin hi." 
Jeremiah20:13 Topaʼ tungah la sa unla, Topa phat un! Migiloteʼ khut sung panin amah in mi cimawhte a hon khia hi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Keima suah ni in gimna thuak tahen! Ka nu in kei a hong suahsak ni in thupha ngah kei tahen! 
Jeremiah20:15 Ka pa kiangah, “Tapa khat na nei hi,” ci-in va ko-in a lungdamsak pa in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah20:16 Topa in hehpih loin a lumlet khuapite tawh tua pa kibang tahen. Zingsangin kahna aw za henla, sun ciangin patauhna aw za tahen." 
Jeremiah20:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in ka nuʼ gil sungah kei hong that lo hi. Hong that hileh ka nuʼ gil sung ka han suak pah ding hi. 
Jeremiah20:18 Gimna le dahna a mu ding le nisim a maizum den dingin bang hangin a gil sung panin suak khia sese ka hi hiam? 
Jeremiah21:1 Zedekiah kumpipa in Malkhiahʼ tapa Pashhur le Maaseiahʼ tapa Zefaniah te, Jeremiah kiangah sawl a," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Kote adingin Topaʼ kiangah thu hong dotsak in. Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a sim dingin hong umcih hi. Topa in a nalamdangte khat keiʼ tungah hong zang leh amah kilehkiksak thei kha ding hi,” ci-in a dongsak hi." 
Jeremiah21:3 Tua ciangin Jeremiah in dawngkik a," 
Jeremiah21:4 “Zedekiah kiangah hih bangin na genkik un, ‘ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a genin ah: En un, khua kulhpi pua lamah a hong umcih Babylon kumpipa le Khaldea mite na dona uh ahi, na khut sung uh a na kep na galhiamte uh bangmahin a kimang lo ka suaksak dinga, amaute khempeuh hih khuapi laizang ah kong paipih ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:5 Kei mahmah in hehna le thangpaihna lianpi tawh ka khut zanin, a hat mahmah ka khut tawh note kong do ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Hih khuapi sungah a teengte a mi a sa ci loin ka that lum dinga, pulnatna tawh a bei khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah21:7 Tua khit ciangin, Topa in kong cih in ah, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le a nasemte le pulnatna, namsau le kialin a si lo a nungta lai teng pen, amauʼ galte le amaute a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah ka pia ding hi. Amah in amaute namsau tawh that dinga, hehpih loin, zong a maap kei dinga, itna lungsim a nei kei ding hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Topa in Jeremiah hopih a, “Jeremiah aw, hih mite kiangah, ‘ Topa in a cih in ah: En un, na mai uh ah nuntakna lampi le sihna lampi ka khung hi." 
Jeremiah21:9 Hih khuapi sunga om mi peuhmah namsau tawh ahi a, kial tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Ahi zongin pusuak khia-in note a hong sim Khaldea mite kiangah a lut peuhmah suakta liailiai ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, hih khuapi hoih nading hi lo, a siat nadingin ka lungsim ka khensat khinzo hi. Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, amah in mei tawh a hal ding hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:11 “Judah kumpiteʼ innkuan tungah hih bangin va gen in: Davidʼ suante aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un. Topa in a cih in ah: Zingsang simin mantakin thu khen unla, mi bawlsia paʼ khut sung pan a bawlsiat pa hon khia un. Tua bang na hih kei uh leh siatna na bawlnate hangun mei bangin ka hehna hong kuang dinga, kuamah in a phelh zo kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah21:12  
Jeremiah21:13 Mualkuam zang pan kilaam to a, zanglei lak a suangtum bangin a sang to Jerusalem aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, na lang khat ah ka pang ding hi. Nangmah in, ‘Kua in kei hong sim suk dinga, ka omna ah kua hong lut ding ahi hiam?’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah21:14 Na gamtatna tawh kizui-in gimna kong pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Tu lak a sing hoihte tawh a kilam na kumpi innte uh mei tawh kihal dinga, a kimkot khempeuh ka kaang tumsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:1 Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Judah kumpipaʼ inn ah va pai suk inla, hih bangin va gen in." 
Jeremiah22:2 David tokhom tungah a tu Judah kumpipa aw, nang le na nasemte a kipan hih kongpi ah a hong lut na gam mite khempeuh in Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un." 
Jeremiah22:3 Topa in a cih in ah, thumanin dik tat unla, a bawlsiateʼ khut sung panin bawlsiatna a thuak mite hon khia un. Minam dangte, pa nei lote le meigongte simmawh bawl kha loin amauʼ tungah ngongtat kei unla, hih munah zong mawhna nei lo mite that kei un." 
Jeremiah22:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh note in hih thute na zuih takpi uh leh Davidʼ suante kumpi suak tawntung ding uh a, amaute a kipan a nasemte uh le a mite uh sakol leeng le sakol tungah tuangin hih inn kongpite ah hong lut ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ahih hangin note in hih thute na zuih kei uh leh keimah Topa in kong genin ah, hih inn gamlak a suaksak dingin ka kiciam hi." 
Jeremiah22:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpi inn tawh kisai-in Topa in kong cih in ah: Nang pen Gilead gam ahi a, Lebanon mual bangin ahi zongin na hoih mahmah hi. Ahih hangin nang sehnel gam kong suaksak dinga, kuamah a ten lohna khua kong suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nangʼ lang khat ah a hong susia ding mi ka kithawisak dinga, a hei uh hong keng ding uh hi. Amaute in na sidar khuam hoih pente hong phuksakin mei ah hong khulsak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Tua ciangin minam dang tampi in hih khuapi kantan ding uh a, a innsak a innkhangteʼ kiangah, ‘Bang hangin hih khuapi lian hici bawl ahi hiam,’ ci-in khatlekhat a kidong ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:9 Tua ciangin, ‘A Pasian uh Topaʼ thuciamna taisan uh a, pasian dang peuh bia-in a na a sepsak man uh ahi hi,’ ci-in a kidawngkik ding uh hi, va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:10 Judah mite aw, misi pa Josiah kah kei unla, khasiat kei un. A kipaikhiat pih Shallum hangin nakpi takin kap zaw un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pianna gam a mu dingin amah hong kilehkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Josiahʼ za a luah a tapa, hih mun panin a paikhia pa Shallum thu tawh kisai-in Topa in, “Amah hong kilehkik nawn lo dinga," 
Jeremiah22:12 salin a kikaihna munah a si ding hi. Hih gam a mukik nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Thuman lopi-in inn lam a, zuau thu tawh inn dei tungnung a lam mi, ama na a mawkna-in a inn veengte a semsak mi, thaman a pia lo mi in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah22:14 “Inndei tungnung zapi a awng inn gol khat ka lam ding hi,” ci-in tawlet vangte bawl a, taamtak singpeek tawh thuap sawm a, za san a zut mi in gimna thuak tahen." 
Jeremiah22:15 Taamtak sing tawh inn na lam manin kumpi kisa na hi hiam? Na pa in an ne tui dawn a, thumanna le diktatna tawh na a sep manin a maa pai hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah22:16 Amah in mizawngte le mi cimawhte thuman tawh thu khen a, na khempeuh a hoih a suak pah hi. Tu-a banga hihna pen kei nong theihna uh hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:17 Ahih hangin note in thuman lo tawh ngah nading ahi zongin, mimawh loteʼ sisan luanna ding ahi zongin, mi nuaisiahna le ngongtatna ding ahi zongin, na mitte uh le na lungsim uh na zang uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:18 Tua ahih manin Judah kumpipa Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim thu tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kong ci hi: “Amaute in, ‘Sanggampa aw,’ ‘Sanggamnu aw,’ ci-in a sih ciangun a kikah bangun amah a sih ciangin a kah kei ding uh a, ‘ Topa aw, kumpipa aw,’ ci-in zong a kah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:19 La si a kiphum bang lelin amah kivui dinga, Jerusalem kongpi pua lamah kikaitalin kipaai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:20 Jerusalem khua mite aw, Lebanon Mual tungah kah to-in awng unla, Bashan gamah va kiko un. Abarim mual tungah va kiko un; bang hang hiam cih leh na pawlte un gal lel khin hi." 
Jeremiah22:21 Na daupai laitakun kong hopih hangin na hong ngai nuam kei uh hi. Na neu tung uh a kipan nong tua cih ngitnget uh a, keima thu nong mang ngei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:22 Na makaite uh huih in hong mut mangsak dinga, na pawlte uh salin kiman ding uh hi. Tua ciangin na gitlohna uh hangin maizumin na lung-am ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:23 Lebanon gam panin a kila taamtak inn sungah nuam takin na teeng uh hi. Ahih hangin gimna hong tun ciangin bangzah takin na tau ding uh hiam? Numei nausuak dingte tawh na kibang ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah22:24 Topa in Jehoiakim tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin tungah, “Kei a nungta Pasian ka hih mah bangin, nangmah in ka taklam khut ah a om ka letmatthuhna tawh a kibang na hih hangin nang kong la khia dinga," 
Jeremiah22:25 na kihtak, nang hong that nuamteʼ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le Khaldea miteʼ khut sungah nang kong pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah22:26 Nangmah le nang hong paii na nu, na suahna mun uh ahi lo gam dangah kong lawn khia dinga, tua laitak ah na si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah22:27 Na ciahkik nopna gam uh ah na ciahkik thei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah22:28 Jehoiakhin, kuama deih loh a kipaai mang beel kitam tawh kibang ta ahi hiam? Bang hangin amah le a tate kilawn khia a, a theih loh uh gamah kipaai mang ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Aw ka gam, ka gam aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih veʼn!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih pa, ta nei lopa, a khan tawntungin a gualzo ngei lopa, ci-in ciamteh un. Ama suanlekhakte khat beek in Davidʼ tokhom luah lo dinga, Judah gam a uk kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:1 Topa in thu gen a, “Ka mite sisakin, a kikhenthangsak gam ukte in gimna ngah tahen!” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:2 Tua ahih manin ka mipihte a kem gam ukte tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah, “Note in ka mite kikhenthang sakin na hawl khia mang uh a, amaute na don kei uh hi. En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, na gamtat siate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ka mite a om lai sunteng, ka hawlkhiat nading gamte panin ka kaikhawmkik dinga, a gam uh ah ka ciahsakkik ding hi. Amaute pungin a khang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:4 Amaute a don ding makaite ka koih dinga, lau nawn lo, lungkham nawn loin khat beek a mangthang nawn kei ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:5 “En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, keimah in Davidʼ suan lak panin kumpi dingin a dik tat mi khat ka khan khiatsak ni hong tung ding hi. Amah gam uk siam mahmah dinga, gam sungah thuman thutang tawh thu hong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ama hun hong tun ciangin Judah mite kihon khia dinga, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teeng ding uh hi. Amah a kilawh nadingin a min, ‘ Topa, Eiteʼ Diktanna,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:7 “Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, mite in, ‘Egypt gam panin Israel mite a hong paikhiatpih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciam nawn kei ding uh a," 
Jeremiah23:8 ‘A hawl khiatna leilu lam gam le gamdangte khempeuh panin Israel miteʼ suanlekhakte kaikhawmin a makaih Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in a kiciam zaw ding uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute amauʼ gam sung mahah a teeng ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:9 Kamsangte tawh kisai-in: Topaʼ hang le ama thugen kammal siangthoteʼ hangin keima sungah ka lungsim hong kitam kham a, ka guh ka taang a liing hi. Zu tam ne lua-in a kham mipa tawh ka kibang hi." 
Jeremiah23:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh mun khempeuh ah angkawmte a dim hi. Topaʼ hamsiatna hangin gam sung tengah kahna dim a, gamlak lo nona munte a keu mang hi. Amaute gamtat sia uh a, a vangliatna uh a man lopi-in a zang uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:11 Topa in a cih in ah, “Kamsangte le siampite in Pasian a zahtak kei uh hi. Ka biakinn sung nangawn ah amauʼ gitlohna ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah23:12 Tua ahih manin amauteʼ lampi pen khuamial lak lamnal hi dinga, amaute kinot khia gawpin a tuk ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauteʼ gimthuak ding hun hong tun ciangin amaute tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:13 Samaria kamsangte sungah a muhthadah huai mahmah na khat ka mu hi. Baal min suangin thu hilh uh a, ka mi Israel-te lam a pialpih uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:14 Ahih hangin Jerusalem khua sunga om kamsangteʼ sungah a mulkimhuai zaw na khat keʼn ka mu hi. Angkawmin zuau thu gen uh a, mite a gitlohna uh pan a kikhel loh nadingin mihoih lote a hanthawn zaw lai uh hi. A vekpi-un keiʼ muhna ah Sodom khua mite tawh kibang khin ka sa a, Gomorrah khua mite tawh zong kilamdang lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Tua ahih manin tua kamsangte tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in kong genin ah: En un, keimah in gamsaai teh tawh amaute ka vak dinga, gu kisawh tui amaute ka dawnsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jerusalem khua-a om kamsangteʼ kiang panin gam sung mun khempeuh ah Pasian zahtak lohna hong kizel hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:16 Vanglian Topa in, “Note kiangah thu hong hilh a, a hong lamen khialsak kamsangteʼ thugennate na ngai kei un. Amaute in a lungsim uh ah a geel tawm uh thu hong gen uh hi a, keima kiang pan a hong pai thu ahi kei hi." 
Jeremiah23:17 Keimah Topaʼ thugenna a hong ngai lo mite kiangah, hong hoih na ve, ci-in a gen tawntung uh hi. Amauʼ lungsimʼ deihna bang ciat bek a zui tentan mi khempeuhte kiangah zong, gimna hong tung zenzen lo ding hi, ci-in a gen uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:18 Amauteʼ lakah kua pen Topa tawh thu kikum khawm ngei a, a thugennate va thei ngei, va za ngei ahi uh hiam? Kua in ama kammal va ngai ngei a, va thupi ngaihsut ngei ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah23:19 En un, Topaʼ hehna huihpi hong nung hi. A hehna huihpi hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilo paʼ lutang hong kidenna ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:20 A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtunsak matengin Topaʼ hehna damkik lo ding hi. Hong pai lai ding hunte ah note in siangtakin na tel zaw semsem ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah23:21 Topa in, “Keimah in sawl khia lo napi-in tua kamsangte kuan khia teitei uh hi. Thu bangmah ka gen lohpi, keiʼ min paulamin thu a gen mawkmawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ahih hangin amaute in keima lungsim tawng hong thei uh hileh keima thugente ka mite tungah taangko ding uh a, a nuntakna uh a hoih lote panin kikhelsakin, a gamtat hoih lote uh panin zong kikhelsak khinzo ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Kei pen mun khat bekah a om Pasian ka hi hiam? Mun khempeuh ah a om Pasian hi lo ka hi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:24 Mi khat peuhpeuh keiʼ muh loh dingin busim thei ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi. Leitung, vantung, mun khempeuh ah ka om lamtak thei lo na hi uh hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:25 Ka min tawh zuau phuakin, ‘Mang man zo ing, mang man zo ing,’ ci-in a gen kamsang zuautheiteʼ thuhilhnate zong ka za khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah23:26 Zuau thu tawh thu hilh a, a phuahtawm uh thu a hilh kamsangteʼ lungsim sungah zuau thu bang tanvei teeng lai ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah23:27 A pute a pate un keiʼ min hong mangngilhin Baal a biak uh bangin a mangmat uh a gen kawikawina uh tawh ka mite in ka min hong mangngilh ding uh hi, ci-in a ngaihsun uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:28 Kamsang pa in mang a mat leh a mang bek mah gen henla, ahih hangin ka thugenna a za mipa in ka thugente mah mantakin gen tahen. Buhtu le buhtang bangci kibat theih ding ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:29 Ka kammal pen mei tawh ahi a, suangtum a satnen zo sek tawh ahi zongin kibang hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:30 Tua ahih ciangin en un, Topa in kong genin ah, kamsangte in amau khatlekhat tung panin a theih uh thute keiʼ thugen bangin a gen khiatna uh ka deih kei hi." 
Jeremiah23:31 En un, Topa in kong genin ah, amauʼ ngaihsut tawm thu gen napi-in, ‘ Topa in ci hi,’ a ci khem kamsangteʼ lang khat ah kei ka pang hi." 
Jeremiah23:32 En un, Topa in kong genin ah, ka sawl lohpi zuau mang manin tua thu hilh a, a zuau thu uh le a kiphatsakna uh tawh ka mite lam a khialhpih miteʼ lang khat ah kei ka pang hi. Ka mite adingin amaute a kimanna uh themkha beek om lo hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Jeremiah aw, ka mite khat peuhpeuh in ahi a, kamsang khat ahih kei leh siampi khat peuhpeuh in ahi zongin, ‘ Topaʼ thugen bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in hong dot leh nangmah in, ‘ Topaʼ thugen nangmah na hi a, nang pen van gik khat na hi hi. Topa in nang, kong paai khia ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kamsang khat, ahih kei leh siampi khat, ahih kei leh ka mite khat peuhpeuh in, ‘ Topaʼ thugen pen van gik khat ahi hi,’ a cih leh tua mipa le a innkuanpihte khempeuh gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:35 Mi khempeuh in a lawmte kiangah ahi a, a sanggamte kiangah ahi zongin, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in na kidong zaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:36 ‘ Topaʼ thugen pen van gik khat ahi hi,’ ci-in na gen nawn kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ thugente, noteʼ van gik ahi zaw hi. Note in eiteʼ Pasian ahi a nungta Pasian, Vanglian Topaʼ thugennate na lumlet gawp uh hi." 
Jeremiah23:37 Kamsang pa kiangah, ‘ Topa in bangin hong dawng hiam? Topa in bang hong gen hiam?’ ci-in dong zaw un." 
Jeremiah23:38 Ahih hangin note in, ‘ Topaʼ thugen pen van gik ahi hi,’ na cih peuhmah uh leh Topa in kong cih in ah, note in na cih loh dingun kong hilh pen ci teitei na hih manun" 
Jeremiah23:39 keimah in note le na pu na pate uh ka piak sa khuapi ka dom to dinga, ka omna panin ka lawn khia taktak ding hi." 
Jeremiah23:40 A tawntungin simmawhna le maizumna kong thuaksak dinga, cikmah hunin na mangngilh ngei nawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah24:1 Babylon Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khua panin Jehoiakimʼ tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin le Judah kumpi uliante, khutsiamte le sikseek siamte, Babylon khua ah sal dingin a paikhiatpih khit ciangin Topa in hih maang hong musak hi. Topaʼ biakinn mai ah theigah bawm nih dim ka mu hi." 
Jeremiah24:2 Bawm khat sunga theigahte, a min masate tawh kibangin limci mahmah hi. Ahih hangin a bawm khat pen sunga theigahte limci het loin nek theih ding bang hi dek lo hi." 
Jeremiah24:3 Topa in hong hopih a, “Jeremiah aw, bang mu na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Theigah ka mu hi. A limcite limci mahmah a, a limci lote limci lo lua ahih manin nek theih ding bang hi lo hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah24:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah:" 
Jeremiah24:5 Hih mun panin Khaldea miteʼ gam a ka puakkhiat Judah mi saltangte hih theigah hoihte bangin a hoihin ka ngaihsun ding hi. 
Jeremiah24:6 Amaute limtakin ka kem dinga, hih gamah ka lakik ding hi. Amaute ka khangtosak dinga, ka susia kei ding hi; ka suan dinga, ka bot khia kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:7 Keimah Topa ka hih lam theihtheihna lungsim ka pia ding hi. A lungsim khempeuh uh tawh kei kiangah hong kileh ding uh ahih manin amaute ka mi ahi ding uh a, kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le ama gam uk uliante a kipan hih gamah a omsuak Jerusalem khua sunga a om lai sunteng le Egypt gamah a teengte limci lo lua ahih manin a kine thei lo theigahte bangin ka bawl ding hi. 
Jeremiah24:9 Amaute ka hawlkhiat nading mun khempeuh ah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna le zahkonate ka thuaksak dinga, amauteʼ thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi." 
Jeremiah24:10 Namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi le pulnatnate ka tungsak dinga, amaute le a pu a pateʼ kiangah ka piak sa gam sungah khat beek ka nungtasak nawn kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:1 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suah zawh kum sawm li a cin kumin Judah mite tawh kisai-in Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi. (Hih hun pen Babylon ah Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suah kum ahi hi.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Kamsang pa Jeremiah in zong Judah gam mi khempeuh le Jerusalem khuami khempeuhteʼ tungah hih bangin a gen sawn hi: 
Jeremiah25:3 “Amonʼ tapa Josiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suah zawh a kum sawm le kum thum pan tu ciang dong kum sawm nih le kum thum sung Topa in kei hong hopih a, keʼn zong note kiangah kong gen sawn tawntung hangin note in na ngai kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:4 Topa in ama nasem ahi kamsangte khempeuh hong sawl tawntung hi napi-in note in ngai loin na bil uh na ngat kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah25:5 Amaute in, ‘Tu-in na vekpi-un na gitlohna uh le na gamtat khialhnate uh panin na kihei uh leh Topa in note le tanglai-a na pu na pate uh tungah na neih tawntung dingun a hong piak gam sungah na teng thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:6 Pasian dangteʼ nung delh loin, a na sem loin na biak kei uh a, na khut uh tawh na bawl uh milimte peuh bia-in na hehsak kei nak uh leh, note bangmah hong cih kei ding hi,’ ci-in hong gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, note in ka thu nong ngai kei uh a, noteʼ gim ngah nading mahin na khut uh tawh milim bawlin nong hehsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in kong cih in ah, note in ka thu hong mang lo na hih uh ciangin" 
Jeremiah25:9 en un, leilu lam a om minam khempeuhte le ka nasem pa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar ka vaikhak dinga, hih gam le a sunga a teeng mi khempeuh le hih kiim a om gam khempeuh a sim dingin ka va la ding hi. Keimah in amaute ka susia mangkhin dinga, amaute a tawntungin siacipin simmawhna ka thuaksak ding hi, ci-in Topa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah25:10 Tua tham loin lungdamna le kipahna awte, zi nei thak pa le mothak nuʼ awte le an gawina suang gingte ka gingsak nawn kei dinga, meivak taangte ka sumit ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:11 Gam sung khempeuh kisia-in, gam simtham suak dinga, hih mite khempeuh kum sawm sagih sung Babylon kumpipaʼ salin a om ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:12 Kum sawm sagih a cin khit ciangin Topa in kong cih in ah, Babylon kumpipa le a gam amauʼ mawhna hangin gim ka pia dinga, tua gam a tawntungin gam simtham ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Tua gam a siat nading ka gen sa thute khempeuh hih laibu sungah kigelh a, Jeremiah in gam khempeuhteʼ kiangah a gen hi. Tuate khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh gam tampi le kumpi liante in amaute salin man ding uh a, amauʼ gamtatna amauʼ tungah ka thukkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:15 Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kei hong hopih a, “Ka khuttung panin hehna tawh a kidim hih leenggahzu hai la inla, kong sawlna gamte khempeuh dawnsak in." 
Jeremiah25:16 Amaute in dawn ding uh a, amauteʼ kiang a ka sawl namsau hangin hoi dangdangin a hai lawh ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tua ahih manin kei zong Topaʼ khuttung panin tua hai ka la a, Topaʼ hong sawlna gamte khempeuh ka dawnsak hi." 
Jeremiah25:18 Jerusalem le Judah gam a khuapite, a kumpite uh le a gam uliante uh ka dawnsak a, tu ni dongin gam simtham suakin, miteʼ simmawhna thuakin, a min uh hamsiat nadingin a kizang hi. Tua hai panin a dawn a dangte:" 
Jeremiah25:19 Egypt kumpipa Faro le a nasemte, a kumpi uliante;" 
Jeremiah25:20 Egypt mite le amauʼ lakah a teeng gamdang mite khempeuh; Uz gam sunga kumpite khempeuh le Filistia gam sunga om Ashkelon, Gaza, Ekron khuapite le Ashdod khuapi ah a om lai sunteʼ kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, Moab le Ammon mite;" 
Jeremiah25:22 Taia kumpite khempeuh, Sidon kumpite khempeuh; tuipi gei-a kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, Buz khuapite; a sam uh a tommet khempeuhte;" 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia kumpite khempeuh; sehnel gam sunga teeng minam kigawm khawmteʼ kumpite khempeuh; 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri kumpite khempeuh, Elam kumpite khempeuh le Media kumpite khempeuh;" 
Jeremiah25:26 le a gamla hitaleh a nai hitaleh leilu lam a a om kumpite khempeuh khat khit ciangin khat ka dawnsak hi. Tua ciangin leitung a om gam khempeuh ka dawnsak hi. A tawpna ah Babylon kumpipa in a dawn ding hi. 
Jeremiah25:27 Tua ciangin Topa in hong hopih a, “Amaute kiangah, Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Dawn un. Kham unla lua un. Note kiangah namsau hong paisak ding ka hih manin tuk unla, tho zo nawn kei un,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah25:28 “Amaute in na khuttung panin hai la-in dawn ding uh a, hong nial uh leh amaute kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa in hong genin ah: Na dawn uh kul ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:29 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, ka min tawh a kilo khuapi sungah suksiatna ka pan ding hi. Note in bangmah a thuak lo ding kisa na hi uh hiam? Gim thuak loin na om kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in kong cih in ah, leitung a teeng mite khempeuh a that dingin namsau khat ka sawl hi,’ ci in." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Tua ahih ciangin nangmah in amaute thu na va hilh dinga, hih bangin na va gen ding hi: ‘A sang vantung panin Topa hong hawk dinga, a teenna a siangtho panin hong pau khia ding hi. Ama miteʼ lang khat ah nasia takin hong hawk gawp dinga, leenggah cil mite bangin leitung mi khempeuhte a langpangin hong kiko ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:31 A awging, leimong dongah kithawn ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh gamteʼ lang khat ah Topa pang hi. Amah in mi khempeuh thu sit dinga, namsau tawh migilote a that lum ding hi, Topa in ci hi,’ na ci ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:32 “Vanglian Topa in a cih in ah: En un, gam khat pan gam khat ah siatna a paipai hi. Leitung a gamla pen mun panin huihpi hong nung hi." 
Jeremiah25:33 “Tua ni-a Topaʼ thah lup miteʼ luanghawmte leimong khat panin mong khat dongah a kithehthang ding uh hi. Amaute kuamah in a kah kei ding uh a, kikaikhawm loin, kiphum lo ding uh ahih manin leilak ah ek nusiatin a kinusia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah25:34 “No makaite aw, tau unla, kap un; vut lakah kikhuk un, no uliante aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh hong kithahlup ni ding le na kikhenthang ni ding uh hong tung zo hi; tuutal teelte bangin hong kithat lum ding hi." 
Jeremiah25:35 Makaite adingin bukna ding om lo dinga, uliante adingin suahtak theih nading om lo hi." 
Jeremiah25:36 Ngai dih un, makaiteʼ kahna aw le ulianteʼ tauna aw kiza hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a gam uh suksiatsak hi." 
Jeremiah25:37 A lauhuai mahmah Topaʼ hehna hangin a nop mahmah a gam uh kisia gawp hi. 
Jeremiah25:38 Topaʼ namsau hang ahi a, a lauhuai ama hehna hang ahi zongin, amauʼ gam pen gam simtham suak khin ahih manin humpinelkai in a kua a nusiat bangin Topa in a mite nusia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:1 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gam kumpi a suah tungin Topa in hih bangin Jeremiah hopih a," 
Jeremiah26:2 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, Topaʼ biakinnpi huang sungah va ding inla, Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah a bia dinga a hong pai Judah gam khuapite khempeuh kiangah gen dinga kong sawl khempeuh va gen in. Kam khat beek im kei in." 
Jeremiah26:3 Amaute in na thugen hong ngai-in, a gitlohna uh pan kihei kha thei ding uh hi. Tua hileh amauʼ gitlohna hanga amaute suksiat dingin ka ngaihsut sa ka kheelkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah26:4 Nangmah in amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Note in ka thu hong ngai loin, note mai-a kong lah sa ka thukham bangin na gamtat kei uh a," 
Jeremiah26:5 note in a thu na man ngei loh uh ahi, kong sawl zelzel ka nasem kamsangteʼ thu na thupi sim kei uh leh" 
Jeremiah26:6 hih Jerusalem biakinnpi Shiloh khua-a biakinn ka bawl bangin ka bawl dinga, hih khuapi pen leitung gam khempeuhteʼ kihamsiatna-in ka zangsak ding hi,’ na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Siampite, kamsangte le mi khempeuh in hih thu a gen teng a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:8 Mi khempeuh tungah Topa in gen dingin a sawl teng Jeremiah in a gen khit ciangin siampite, kamsangte le mi khempeuhte in amah man uh a, “Nang na sih ding kilawm hi." 
Jeremiah26:9 Bang hangin, ‘Hih biakinnpi pen Shiloh tawh kibang dinga, hih khuapi ah a teeng om loin gam simtham suak ding hi,’ ci-in Topaʼ minin thu hilh ngam na hi hiam?” ci-in a gen uh hi. Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah a om mi khempeuh in Jeremiah a umcih uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:10 Judah gam uk uliante in hih thu a zak uh ciangin kumpipaʼ inn sung pan Topaʼ biakinnpi ah hong pai to uh a, Topaʼ biakinnpi lutna Kongpi Thak ah a tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tua ciangin siampite le kamsangte in kumpi uliante le mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah, “Note in na bil uh tawh na zak ciat uh mah bangin hih pa in hih Jerusalem khuapi langpangin thu hilh ahih manin thah ding kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:12 Tua ciangin Jeremiah in kumpi ulian khempeuhte le mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah, “ Topa in na zak sa uh ahi hih biakinnpi le hih khuapi lang khat ah ka gen thu khempeuh a gen dingin kei hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Tua ahih manin tu-in na nuntak dante uh le na gamtat ziate uh kheel unla, Topa na Pasian uh thu ngai un. Tua hileh Topa in noteʼ kisiatna ding a gen sa thu a kheelkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah26:14 Ahih hangin kei ka hih leh, en un, noteʼ khut sungah ka om hi. Note in hoih na sak uh bangin kei tungah hong bawl un." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kei nong thah uh leh bel, mawhnei lo mi khat na thah manun note mahmah a kipan hih khuapi le a sunga teengte in na thuak ding uh thei ta un. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ bil mahmah in na zak dingun hih thute a gen dingin Topaʼ hong sawl taktak ka hi hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:16 Tua ciangin kumpi uliante le mi khempeuhte in siampite le kamsangte tungah, “Hih pa in eiteʼ Topa Pasianʼ min tawh thu hong gen ahih manin thah ding kilawm lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:17 Gam sung upa pawl khat in zong, dingin tua a kikhawm mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Judah kumpipa Hezekiah in a uk laitakin Moresheth khuami Mikah in Judah mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah, ‘Lo dingin Zion mual a kikho ding hi. Jerusalem khua kisia zan dinga, biakinn mual, gamlak a suak ding hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa in gen hi,’ ci hi." 
Jeremiah26:19 “Tua hi napi, Judah kumpipa Hezekiah le Judah mi khempeuhte in amah that zenzen uh ahi hiam? Kumpipa in Topa zahtakin, Topaʼ pahtak ding a nget ciangin Topa in zong amauʼ tungah siatna tunsak dingin a gen sa khelkik zaw hi lo ahi hiam? Ahih hangin eite in eiteʼ tungah siatna lianpi khat i tungsak dektak hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah26:20 Kiriath-jearim khua panin zong Topaʼ min tawh thu a hilh Shemaiahʼ tapa Uriah a kici midang khat a om lai hi. Jeremiahʼ gen bangmahin amah in zong hih Jerusalem khuapi le hih gam lang khat ah thu a gen hi. 
Jeremiah26:21 Kumpi Jehoiakim le a galkap maang khempeuh le kumpi ulian khempeuhte in ama thugente a zak uh ciangin kumpipa in thah dingin a zong hi. Ahih hangin Uriah in tua thu a zak ciangin lau-in Egypt gamah a taisim hi. 
Jeremiah26:22 Tua ciangin kumpi Jehoiakim in Akborʼ tapa Elnathan le midang pawl khat Egypt gamah sawl a," 
Jeremiah26:23 amau in zong Egypt gam panin Uriah manin kumpi Jehoiakim kiangah a puak uh hi. Amah in tua pa namsau tawh thatin a luanghawm mi mawkmawkteʼ kivuina munah a paai hi. 
Jeremiah26:24 Ahih hangin Shafanʼ tapa Ahikam in Jeremiah hu ahih manin thah dingin miteʼ khut sungah kipia lo hi. 
Jeremiah27:1 Josiahʼ tapa Zedekiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suah tungin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:2 Topa in kei tungah, “Savun khau tawh a kithuah hakkol bawl inla, na ngawng ah thuah in." 
Jeremiah27:3 Edom kumpipa tung, Moab kumpipa tung, Taiar kumpipa tung le Sidon kumpipa tungah, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah tawh kimu dingin Jerusalem khua ah a hong pai a kumpi taangmiteʼ tungtawnin thu zasak in." 
Jeremiah27:4 Amaute in a kumpite uh tungah, Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen uh hen." 
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Keimah in a lian mahmah ka vangliatna tawh ka khut zanin, leitung le leitung a om mite le ganhingte ka bawl a, piak tuak ka sakte tungah ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah27:6 Tu-in hih gamte, ka nasem pa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah ka pia khinzo hi. Gamsate nangawn ama nasem dingin ka pia lai hi." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ama gam a kisiat hun a tun mateng gam khempeuh in amah a kipan a tapa le a tupaʼ na a sepsak ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin gam tampi le kumpi liante in amah salin a leh neihkik ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah27:8 “‘Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh ahih kei leh kumpi khat peuhpeuh in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ na sem loin, Babylon kumpipaʼ hakkol a ngawng ah a puak kei leh, amah ka uk cipsak mateng namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh tua gam gim ka pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah27:9 Tua ahih manin Babylon kumpipaʼ na sem kei un, ci-a note kiangah a hong gen na kamsangte uh, na aisan theite uh, na mang man theite uh le na mang san theite uhʼ thugennate um kei un." 
Jeremiah27:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ kiang a hong gen uh thu pen zuau thu hi a, tua hangin na gam uh panin gamlapi ah note hong kipaikhiat pih ding hi. Keimah in note kong hawl khia dinga, note na si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipaʼ hakkol pua a, ama na a sem gam pen, lo kho-in a ten theih nadingin ama gam sung mahah ka omsak ding hi, ci-in Topa in hong gen hi,’ ci-in gen uh hen,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah27:12 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiangah zong tua bangmahin ka gen a, “Na nuntak theih nadingin Babylon kumpipaʼ hakkol pua in." 
Jeremiah27:13 Bang hangin namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh nang le na mite si ding uh ahi hiam? Babylon kumpipaʼ na a sem lo gam khat peuhpeuh tua ci sih ding, ci-in Topa in a gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:14 Babylon kumpipaʼ na sem kei un, ci-in noteʼ kiang a hong gen kamsangteʼ thugennate um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ kiang a hong gen uh thu pen zuau thu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah27:15 Topa in kong cih in ah, ‘Keimah in amaute ka sawl kei hi. Ahih hangin amaute in keiʼ min tawh a man lopi-in thu hilh uh a, tua hangin note le noteʼ kiangah thu hong hilh kamsangte kong sawl khia khawm dinga, na si ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah27:16 Tua ciangin siampite le hih mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah, “ Topa in hong genin ah, ‘En un, Babylon khua panin Topaʼ biakinn beelte kilakik baih ta ding hi,’ ci-in noteʼ kiangah na kamsangte uhʼ hong thugente um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah hong gen uh thu pen zuau thu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amauʼ thu na mang kei un. Na nuntak theih nadingun Babylon kumpipaʼ na na sem zaw un. Bang hangin hih khuapi gam simtham suak laizang ding ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah27:18 Amaute kamsang taktak ahih uh a, Topa in ka hopih taktak ahih uh leh, Topaʼ biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipaʼ inn sung le Jerusalem khua sungah a kinusia lai beelte Babylon khua ah a kipuakkhiat nawn loh nadingin Vanglian Topa kiangah hong thum uh hen." 
Jeremiah27:19 “Bang hang hiam cih leh, Jehoiakimʼ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin le, Judah gam le Jerusalem khua-a kumpi ulian khempeuh Jerusalem khua pan Babylon khua ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paikhiatpih laitakin, a nusiat lai khuampite, tuikuangpite, a kingaknate le hih khuapi sungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi a," 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 Topaʼ biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipaʼ inn sung le Jerusalem khua sungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi zongin Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a genin ah:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Tuate Babylon khua ah kipua khia dinga, ka kankik mateng tua lai ah a omsuak ding hi. Tua khit ciangin tuate ka lakik dinga, hih munah ka koihkik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tua kum mahin (Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum li le kha nga a phak kum) Gibeon khua panin a hong pai Azzurʼ tapa kamsang Hananiah in Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah siampite le mi khempeuh a omkim laitakin hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: Babylon kumpipaʼ vangliatna ka susia khin hi." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kum nih sungin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih mun pan la khia-in Babylon khua ah a puak, Topaʼ biakinnpi sunga beelte hih munah ka lakik ding hi." 
Jeremiah28:4 Jehoiakimʼ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin le Judah gam panin Babylon ah salin a paite khempeuh zong hih munah ka lakik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon kumpipaʼ vangliatna ka susia ding hi, ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah dingin a om siampite le mi khempeuhte a omkim laitakin keimah Jeremiah in Hananiah ka hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:6 “Amen! Topa in tua na gen bangin hong sem tahen. Topa in na thugen kholhna bangin hong tungsak henla, Babylon khua panin Topaʼ biakinnpi sunga beelte le salin a kimante khempeuh hih lai munah hong lakik tapeuh hen!" 
Jeremiah28:7 Ahi zongin tu-in nang le mi khempeuhteʼ zakin kong gen ding hih thu na ngai ta un. 
Jeremiah28:8 Nang le keiʼ ma-in a om, tanglai-a kamsangte in gam tampi le gam lianteʼ tungah gal ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin, pulnatna ahi zongin hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen khol zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ahi zongin, nopna hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen kamsang pa pen Topaʼ hong sawl kamsang pa hi taktak hiam, cih kamsang paʼ gen bang hong tun ciangin a kithei pan ding ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tua ciangin kamsang pa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol hong lak khiatsakin hong kuaihtansak hi. 
Jeremiah28:11 Hananiah in zong mi khempeuh a om laitakin thu gen a, “ Topa in, tu-a bangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ vangliatna kum nih sungin gam khempeuhteʼ tung panin ka beisak ding hi, ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin kei ka paikhia hi." 
Jeremiah28:12 Kamsang pa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol la khia a, hong kuaihtansak zawh tawl khat khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Pai inla Hananiah kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: Nangmah in sing tawh kibawl hakkol na kuaitan zo hi. Ahih hangin keimah in sik tawh kibawl hakkol khat tawh ka laih ding hi." 
Jeremiah28:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: Hih gam khempeuhteʼ ngawng ah sik hakkol ka thuah khinzo a, amaute in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ na a sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamsate nangawn ama tungah ka pia khinzo hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:15 Tua ciangin kei zong kamsang Hananiahʼ kiangah, “Na ngai in, Hananiah! Topa in nang hong sawl lohpi, hih mite zuau thu na umsak hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Tua ahih manin Topa in a hong genin ah: ‘En in, hih leitung panin nangmah hong la khia ding hi. Topa langpanna thu gen na hih manin tu kum sung mahin na si ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tua kum mah a kha sagih kha-in kamsang pa Hananiah a si ta hi. 
Jeremiah29:1 Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in Babylon khua ah salin a paikhiatpih uliante, siampite, kamsangte le mi khempeuhteʼ tungah lai khat ka khak hi." 
Jeremiah29:2 Tua hunin kumpi Jehoiakhin le a nu, a kumpi innsung maangte, Judah gam le Jerusalem khua-a makai upate, khutsiamte le sikseekte, Jerusalem khua panin kipaikhiat pih khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah29:3 Tua laikhak pen Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in Babylon khua Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa kiangah kumpi taangmi dingin a puak Shafanʼ tapa Elasah le Hilkiahʼ tapa Gemariah-te ka puasak hi. Tua sungah: 
Jeremiah29:4 “Jerusalem panin Babylon ah a hong puak khia Vanglian Topa, Pasian in saltang mi khempeuhteʼ tungah hih bangin ci hi:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Inn lam unla, a sungah teeng un. Huan bawl unla, a sungah na cinte uh ne un." 
Jeremiah29:6 Zi pi unla tanu tapa nei un. Na tapate ading mo la unla, na tanute uh mo kha un; tua hileh amau in zong tanu tapa hong nei ding uh hi. Kiam kei unla, pung zaw un." 
Jeremiah29:7 Note salin kong koihna khuapiʼ phattuam nading bawl unla, tua khuapi adingin Topaʼ tungah thu ngetsak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua khuapi in phattuamna ngah leh no zong phattuamna a ngah mah na hi uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:8 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah: Noteʼ lakah a om na kamsangte uh le na aisan theite uhʼ khem sa-in ta kei unla, a mangmat hong gente uh na ngai kei un." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min tawh no tungah hong gen uh thute zuau thu hi a, ka sawl lohpi ahi uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:10 “ Topa in kong cih in ah: Babylon khua ah kum sawm sagih na om khit uh ciangin, note kong kankik dinga, kong kamciamna sa hong tangtungsakin hih munah kong lakik ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, mai lamah lametna kong piak ding, note siat nading hi loin na nopsak nading uh geelna ka neihte kei bek in ka thei hi." 
Jeremiah29:12 Tua hun ciangin note in kei hong samin, hong pai-in thu nong ngen ding uh a, keʼn zong kong dawng ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:13 Note in kei nong zong ding uh a, na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh nong zon uh ciangin nong mu ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:14 Topa in kong cih in ah, note in nong mu ding uh a, na saltanna uh hong beisakin, kong hawl khiatna gam khempeuh le mun khempeuh panin kong kaikhawmkik dinga, note kong lak khiatna gam mahah kong tunpihkik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Note in, ‘Eite adingin Topa in Babylon khua ah kamsang hong koihsak hi,’ ci-in gen na hih manun" 
Jeremiah29:16 David kumpi tokhom tunga tu kumpipa le hih khuapi sunga om, note tawh saltang dingin a pai khawm lo na behte khempeuh uh tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin ah:" 
Jeremiah29:17 En un, amaute tungah namsau tawh kithahna, kialpi le pulnatna ka tungsak dinga, amaute, a kine thei lo theigah muat ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:18 Amaute, namsau, kialpi le pulnatna tawh ka nung delh dinga, ka hawlkhiat nading mun khempeuh ah mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat dingun simmawhna le zahkonate ka thuaksak dinga, amauteʼ thuakna hangin leitung gam khempeuh ka lausak ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:19 Bang hang hiam cih leh, Topa in kong cih in ah, ka nasem ka kamsangteʼ tungtawnin kong puak ngitnget thute amaute in thupi sim loin a hong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:20 Jerusalem khua panin Babylon khua ah kong puakkhiat, no saltangte khempeuh aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un:" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in, keiʼ min tawh note kiangah zuau thu a hong hilh Kolaiahʼ tapa Ahab le Maaseiahʼ tapa Zedekiah te tawh kisai-in kong genin ah: En un, keimah in amaute Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, amah in noteʼ muhin amaute a that lum ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:22 Amauteʼ hangin Judah gam panin Babylon khua ah saltang mi khempeuh in, ‘Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah le Ahab, a hingtangin mei sungah a hal bangin Topa in nang hong hal tahen,’ ci-in kihamsiatna-in a zang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah29:23 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, Israel gamah hai gamtat uh hi: A inn veengteʼ zite mawhpih uh a, thu ka piak lohpi ka min tawh zuau thu a gen uh hi. Keimah Topa in ka mu a, teci ka hi hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gelh hi." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelam khuami Shemaiah kiangah thugen dingin Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kei hong sawl hi. Shemaiah in ama min tawh Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuhteʼ kiang le siampi Maaseiahʼ tapa Zefaniah le siampi khempeuhte kiangah lai na khak hi. Tua a lai sungah Shemaiah in Zefaniahʼ kiangah," 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “ Topa in siampi Jehoiada tangin nangmah siampi-in hong koih khinzo a, Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah a ukpi ding na hi ta hi. Tua ahih manin thu a hilh mawkmawk mihaite thong kiasakin kol na bulh ding hi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Bang hangin note kiangah thu a hong hilh Anathoth khuami Jeremiah tai lo na hi hiam? 
Jeremiah29:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Babylon khua-ate lai hong khakin, sawt veipi saltang ding na hih manun, inn lamin a sungah teeng unla, huan bawlin a sunga na cinte uh ne un, hong ci hi,” ci-in a gelh hi. Hih bangin Zefaniahʼ kiangah a laikhakna thu tawh kisai Shemaiah kiangah a gen dingin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah29:29 Siampipa Zefaniah in hih laikhak kei kiangah hong sim khia hi. 
Jeremiah29:30 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Saltang mi khempeuhteʼ kiangah Nehelam khuami Shemaiah tawh kisai-in Topaʼ thugenna hih bangin zasak in: Kong sawl lohpi Shemaiah in note kiangah thu hong gen a, zuau thu hong umsak ahih manin," 
Jeremiah29:32 Topa in kong cih in ah: En un, keimah in Nehelam khuami Shemaiah le a suan a khakte gim ka pia ding hi. Amah in keimah hong langpanna ding thu gen ahih manin ka mite adingin a hoih ka bawl ding nate, amah le a suan a khakte khat beek in a mu kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:1 Topa in hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah30:2 “ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah: Kong gen sa thute khempeuh laibu khat sungah khum in." 
Jeremiah30:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, ka mi Israel le Judah-te a saltanna uh ka beisakkik ni a hong tung ding hi. A pu a pate uh tungah ka piak sa gamah ka tunpihkik dinga, amaute in tua gam a tangkik ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:4 Israel le Judah mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin a gen hi: 
Jeremiah30:5 “ Topa in kong cih in ah: Launa le patauhna aw ka za a, lungnopna aw ka za kei hi." 
Jeremiah30:6 Tu-in ngaihsun dih un. Pasalte nau a suak ngei uh hiam? Tua ahihleh bang hangin pasal khempeuh in numei nausuak dingte bangin a tai uh hum ahi uh hiam? Bang hangin a mai uh ah si teeng lo ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah30:7 Nu e! Tua ni lianpi hong tung dinga, nidang tawh teh theih ding hi lo hi. Jakob suanteʼ gim hun hi dinga, ahih hangin amaute suakta veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:8 “Vanglian Topa in kong cih in ah, tua ni ciangin amauʼ ngawng panin a hakkolte uh ka kuaihtansak dinga, a khaute ka su tat ding hi. Amaute, gamdang miteʼ salin a om nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:9 Topa, amauʼ Pasianʼ na ahi a, amauteʼ kumpipa-in ka koih ding Davidʼ na ahi zongin a sem zaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: Ka nasem pa Jakobʼ suante aw, lau kei un. Israel mite aw, patau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi gam panin no kong hon khia dinga, na suan na khakte uh a saltanna uh panin ka hon khia ding hi. Jakobʼ suante hong ciah ding uh a, nuam takin a tengkik ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, a hong hon khia dingin note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia dinga, ahih hangin note kong susia kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh dinga, gim pia loin kong mawk nusiat kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah: Na liamma uh dam thei lo a, na meima uh nasia mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah30:13 Note a hong don ding kuamah om lo a, na liamma uh ading zatui om lo a, noteʼ lungdam nading bangmah om lo hi." 
Jeremiah30:14 Na lawm ngaihte un hong mangngilh khin uh a, hong don nawn lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin, galte bangin note kong bawl a, nasia takin gim kong thuaksak hi." 
Jeremiah30:15 Bang hangin na sa-in kapkap na hi uh hiam? Na natna uh a dam thei ding hi lo hi. Na khialhnate uh lian lua-in, na mawhnate uh nasia lua ahih manin hih bangin note ka hong thuaksak hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Tua ahih manin no hong thatte kithat dinga, na galte khempeuh uh salin kimankik ding hi. No hong buluhte kibuluh dinga, no a hong mante, matin om zaw ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, na galte un note, pampaih mi pawl, hong ci-in, ‘Kuama don loh Zion na hi hi,’ hong cih uh hangin note kong cidamsakkik dinga, na liammate uh ka damsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:18 “ Topa in kong cih in ah: En un, keimah in Jakob suanteʼ bukte ka lamkik dinga, a teenna uh ka hehpih ding hi. Khuapi zong a omnasa mual tung mahah kilamkik dinga, kumpipaʼ inn zong a omnasa mahah omkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:19 Tuate sung panin lungdamna la kisa dinga, gualnopna aw kiza ding hi. Amaute ka pungsak dinga, tawm kha bek hi lo ding uh hi. Amaute ka kipahtawisak dinga, ka neusak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:20 A tate uh nidang bangmahin a omkik ding uh a, a mite uh zong kip takin ka mai ah ka phut dinga, amau a bawlsiate gim ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:21 A kumpi ding uh amaute khat mah hi dinga, amaute a uk ding amauʼ sung mah panin a piang ding hi. Keimah in amah ka kai dinga, kei kiangah amah hong pai ding hi. Tua hikeileh ama thu-in kei a hong zuan ngam ding kua om ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:22 Tua ciangin note, ka mite na hi ding uh a, kei pen noteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah30:23 En un, Topaʼ huihpi nung! A hehna hong kinuai nainai-in hong paikhia ta a, migilo paʼ lutang hong kidenna ding hi." 
Jeremiah30:24 A lungsim sunga a tupna teng a tangtunsak matengin, Topaʼ hehna a lauhuaipi kilehkik lo ding hi. Hong pai ding hunte ah note in na tel zaw semsem ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:1 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, tua hun ciangin kei pen Israel mi khempeuhteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:2 Topa in hong genin ah: “Namsau tawh thahna a thuak lote in gamlak ah hehpihna a mu ding uh hi. Israel mite in tawldamna ding a zon laitakun," 
Jeremiah31:3 gamlapi pek panin Topa ka kilang hi. Keimah in nang kong it tawntung a, tua ahih manin nangʼ tungah kong thuman tawntung hi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Aw, nungak siangtho Israel aw, nang kong bawl phakik ding hi. Na khuangte na mankik dinga, a gualnuamteʼ lamna ah na va kihel ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:5 Samaria gam mual tung tengah leenggah na suankik dinga, huan bawlte in suanin a gah ne-in nuam a sa ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Efraim mual tung panin galvilte in, ‘Tho un! Topa i Pasian kiang Zion khua ah va pai ni,’ ci-in a hong kiko hun uh hong tung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:7 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, “Jakob adingin lungdamna tawh ngaih takin la sa unla, gam khempeuh lakah gam lian pen adingin kiko-in awng un. ‘ Topa in Israel mi a omlaite, ama mite hong hon khia khinzo hi,’ ci-in taangko unla phat un." 
Jeremiah31:8 En un, keimah in leilu lam gam panin amaute ka la dinga, leitung a gamla pen mun panin ka kaikhawm ding hi. Mittawte le khebaite zong hong kihel ding uh a, nupi gaite le nausuak ding numeite a kipan hih lai munah mihonpi hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Amaute a kap kawmin hong pai ding uh a, keimah in hehnemin amaute ka pikik ding hi. Tui omna lui gei ah amaute ka paipihkik dinga, lam nuamah paipihin a tuk kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel miteʼ pa ka hi a, Efraim, ka ta upa pen ahi hi." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Aw, gamdangte aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai unla, gamlapi, tuipi gei-a omte kiangah va gen sawn un. ‘Israel mite a kithehthang sakpa in kaikhawmkik dinga, tuucingpa in a tuute a kep bangin a kem ding hi,’ va ci un." 
Jeremiah31:11 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Jakob ka suaktasak khinzo a, a zawhzawh loh khutteʼ sung pan ka hon khia zo hi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Amaute hong pai-in Zion mual tungah ngaih takin la sa ding uh a, Topaʼ hehpihna ahi, buh, leenggahzu, sathau le tuuno, bawngnoteʼ hangin amaute a lungdam mahmah ding uh hi. A nuntakna uh, tui a kibuak huan bang dinga, lungkham nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tua ciangin nungakte lamin lungdam ding uh a, tangvalte le papite zong nuam ding uh hi. Amauʼ kahnate lungdamna ka suaksak dinga, amaute hehpihin a dahnate uh kipahna ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:14 An lim pen tawh siampite ka vak dinga, keima hoihna hangin ka mite a lungkim ding uh hi, Topa in ka ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:15 Topa in kong cih in ah: “Ramah khua ah aw khat kiza a, tauna le kah ngutngutna awging ahi hi. Rachel, a tate adingin a kap hi. A tate om nawn lo ahih manin kinem zo lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Topa in kong cih in ah: “Kap nawn kei unla, na khitui uh nul un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, na nasep thaman uh na ngah uh hi. Amaute galteʼ gam panin hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Na mailam uh adingin lametna a om hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Na tate uh zong na gam mah uh ah hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:18 Efraimʼ kahna aw ka za zo a, ‘ Topa aw, bawngtal sin loh bangin kei nong thuhilh khinzo hi. Kong ciahkik theih nadingin hong lakik in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Topa ka Pasian na hi hi."
