Jeremiah31:19 Nangma kiang panin ka paikhiat khit phetin ka kisikkik a, nong thuhilh khit ciangin dahin ka kun hi. Ka neu laitak a ka min siatna teng pua niloh ka hih manin maizumin ka lung-am hi,’ a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:20 “Efraim, ka it ka tapa hi lo ahi hiam? Amah keima ngaihno hi lo ahi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh ama thu ka gen simin amah ka phawk lailai hi. Tua ahih manin amah ka ngaihsun tawntung a, ka hehpih taktak ding hi, Topa in ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lampi ah ciaptehnate bawl unla, lamlahnate phut un. Na pai khiatna uh lampi mah limtakin zongkik un. Nungak siangtho tawh a kibang Israel mite aw, hong kilehkik unla, na khuapite uh hong zuankik un." 
Jeremiah31:22 Bang tanvei lungka ding na hi hiam, a zulhzau ka tanu aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in leitungah na thak khat bawl a, numei in pasal a hon zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:23 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: “Keimah in amaute a gam uh ah ka omsakkik ciangin, Judah gam le a khuapite uh ah amaute in, ‘Thuman thutak a teenna mual siangtho aw, Topa in thupha hong pia tahen,’ ci-in a genkik leuleu ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Judah gam le a khuapite sungah lokhote le tuucing a a vak kawikawi mite a teeng khawm ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah31:25 Bang hang hiam cih leh a gim mite ka tawldamsak dinga, gil kialin a tha zawm mite khempeuh an ka vak kham ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:26 Tua khit ciangin ka khanglo a, ka khuadak hi. Ka khanlawh nuam ka sa mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah31:27 Topa in kong cih in ah, “Israel gam le Judah gam, mihing le ganhing tawh ka dimsak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:28 Amaute a kibetkhiat nading le a kitap zan nading ahi zongin, a kisuankhiat nading le a kisiat nading ahi zongin ka vaihawm mah bangin, Topa in ka cih in ah, amaute a kilam nading le a kiphuh nadingin ka vaihawm ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Tua ni ciangin amaute in: “‘Pate in leenggah thuk ne uh a, a tate uhʼ ha a kim hi,’ a kici paunak a zang nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:30 Mi khempeuh amauʼ mawhna ciat uh hang bekin a si ding uh hi. Leenggah thuk a neteʼ ha bek a kim ding hi. 
Jeremiah31:31 “En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, Israel minamte le Judah minamte tawh thuciamna thak khat ka bawl ni hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:32 Tua pen, a pu a pate uh, Egypt gam panin ka lakkhiat nadingin a khut uh tawh ka kaihkhiat huna ka bawl uh thuciamna tawh kibang lo ding hi. Tua hun lai-in kei amauteʼ pasal hi napi-in ka thuciamna a hong palsat uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, tua hun hong tun ciangin Israel minamte tawh hih bangin thuciamna ka bawl ding hi: Amauteʼ sungah ka thukham ka koih dinga, amauteʼ lungtang tungah ka gelh ding hi. Kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute pen keima mite ahi ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kuamah in midangte le a sanggamte uh kiangah, ‘ Topa thei in,’ ci-in a kihilh nawn kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, amaute in a neu pen panin a lian pen dongin, a vekpi-un kei a hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ khialhnate ka maisak dinga, amauteʼ mawhnate zong phawkin ka nei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Topa in sun-a khuavak dingin ni hong pia a, zan a khuavak dingin a kikheel ngei lo kha le aksite hong pia hi. Tuipi a lawh ciangin tuihualte ging zuazua a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa kici hi." 
Jeremiah31:36 Amah in, “ Topa in kong cih in ah, hih a kip mahmah leitung le vantung ngeinate a kikheel hun ciang bekin, Israel miteʼ suanlekhakte in gam nei loin a om pan bek ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Topa in hong genin ah, “Vantung a kiteh theih ciang le leinuai-a leitung bulpite a kivel theih ciang bekin Israel-teʼ suanlekhakte khempeuh a mawhna uh hangin ka lawn khia mang pan ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah31:38 Topa in kong cih in ah, “Hananel Tausangpi panin khuakulh Kiu Kongpi dongin khuapi a kibawl phat hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Tua lai panin khuapi huang dingin nitumna lamah Gareb mual dong kiteh suak dinga, Goah lamah a kihei ding hi." 
Jeremiah31:40 Misi luanghawmte le vutte a kibuakna kuam buppi le Kidron lui phak ma-a loteng khempeuh tawh, tua panin nisuahna lam a Sakol Kongpi kiu ciang dong, Topa adingin mun siangtho a suak ding hi. Cikmah ciangin tua khuapi kisusia nawn lo dinga, a kisuan khia ngei nawn kei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum giat a phak kumin, Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum sawm pha ta a, tua kumin Topa in Jeremiah a hopih hi." 
Jeremiah32:2 Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipaʼ galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak hi a, kamsang pa Jeremiah zong Judah kumpipaʼ inn huang sunga thong sungah a kikhumcip laitak ahi hi." 
Jeremiah32:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah kumpipa Zedekiah in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin nangmah in thu gen khol a, ‘ Topa in a cih in ah: En un, hih khuapi, Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, amah in a la ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah zong Khaldea miteʼ khut sung pan a suakta kei dinga, Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah a kipia taktak ding hi. Amah tawh maitang kimu-in a ki-en ding uh a, a kiho ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:5 Amah in Babylon khua ah Zedekiah la dinga, ama tungah na ka sep mateng tua lai ah om ding hi. Khaldea mite na do uh hangin na zo kei ding uh hi, Topa in hong ci hi,’ ci-in bang hangin thu hilh na hi hiam?” ci-in thong sungah a khum hi." 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiah in zong, “ Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah32:7 En in, na pano Shullamʼ tapa Hananel nang kiangah hong pai dinga, ‘Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a lei thei ding lak panin ka kinaipih pen nangmah na om hi,’ ci-in hong gen ding hi, hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tua ciangin Topaʼ hong cihna bangmahin thong sungah ka innlak sanggampa hong pai takpi-in hong hopih a, ‘Benjamin gam Anathoth khua-a ka lo hong lei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh, i ngeina bangin a nei ding le a tan khia ding nangmah na hi hi. Nang adingin lei in,’ hong ci hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Topaʼ hong hopihna taktak hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Jeremiah32:9 “Keimah in zong ka innlak sanggampa Hananelʼ kiang panin Anathoth khua-a lo ka lei a, ama adingin ngun shekel sawm le sagih ka teh khia hi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Thukimna lai bawlin, min gelhin, gip khenin, a hong theih pih ding mite zong ka sap khit ciangin tawi khaina ah sum ka teh hi." 
Jeremiah32:11 Tua ciangin ka kithukimna teng uh a ki-atna, gip a kikhen lai pen le gip a kikhen lo lai pen ka la a," 
Jeremiah32:12 Neriahʼ tapa ahi, Mahseiahʼ tupa Baruk kiangah ka pia hi. Tua laite, ka innlak sanggampa Hananel tawh, tua kileina laite tunga a min uh a gelh a hong theih pih mite tawh thong huang sunga a tu Judah mite tawh a omkim laitakun ka pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:13 Amauteʼ om laitakin Baruk kiangah," 
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a hong genin ah: Hih gip a kikhen lai le a kikhen lo lai tegel la inla, sia loin sawt veipi a kikep theih nadingin leibeel khat sungah koih in." 
Jeremiah32:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a hong genin ah: Hih gamah innte, lote le leenggah lote mite in a leikik ta ding uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah32:16 “Neriahʼ tapa Baruk kiangah kileina lai ka piak khit ciangin Topaʼ kiangah thu ka ngen a," 
Jeremiah32:17 ‘Topa Pasian! Nangma vangpi le na khut tawh vantung le leitung na bawl khinzo hi. Nang adingin a haksa lua khat beek om lo hi. 
Jeremiah32:18 Nangmah in a kikheel ngei lo itna mi tul tampiteʼ tungah na lak a, ahih hangin pateʼ mawhnate tateʼ tungah na thuk hi. Vanglian Topa a kici a lian mahmah, a hat mahmah Pasian aw," 
Jeremiah32:19 na ngimnate lian mahmah a, na sepnate thupi mahmah hi. Miteʼ nuntak zia khempeuh na mu a, amauʼ nuntak dan le a sepna tawh kizui-in mi khempeuh tungah thaman na pia kim hi." 
Jeremiah32:20 Egypt gamah lim le nalamdangte na lak a, tu-in zong Israel gam le minam dangte khempeuh tungah lakin, tu-in mun khempeuh ah na min thang mahmah hi." 
Jeremiah32:21 Na mi Israel-te Egypt gam panin lim le nalamdang tawh ahi a, a khauh mahmah a kizan na khut tawh ahi a, lauhuaina lianpi tawh ahi zongin na la khia a," 
Jeremiah32:22 a pute a pate uh tungah piak dingin na ciam sa, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna hih gam na pia hi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Amau zong lutin a luah pah uh hi. Ahih hangin amaute in na thu hong mang loin, thukham hong zui lo uh a, hih dinga na thupiakte khat beek a hih kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute tungah hih siatna khempeuh na tungsak hi." 
Jeremiah32:24 “‘En in, khuapi lak nadingin kan a to khinzo uh hi. Namsau tawh kithahna hang, kialpi hang le pulnatna hangin amaute a sim Khaldea miteʼ khut sungah khuapi a kipia ding hi. Nong gen sa bangin hong tun loh phamawh ahih manin en in, nangʼ na mu ta hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, hih khuapi Khaldea miteʼ khut sung a tung ding hi napi, nangmah in, “A hong theih pih ding mi sam inla, tua lo lei in,” ci-in nong sawl teitei hi,’ ci-in thu ka ngen hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah32:26 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah32:27 “En in, kei pen Topa ka hi a, mi khempeuhteʼ Pasian zong ka hi hi. Kei adingin a haksa lua bang om ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Tua ahih manin, Topa in kong cih in ah: En in, hih khuapi Khaldea miteʼ khut sung le Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, amah in a la ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:29 Hih khuapi a sim Khaldea mite hong pai-in mei tawh khuapi a hal ding uh a, ka heh nadingin innkhum tungah Baal milimte paknamtui halna tawh a biakna innte uh le pasian dangteʼ kiangah tui dawn biakna a piakna uh innte zong a hal tum ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:30 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite le Judah mite in a neu lai pek uh a kipan ka muhna ah a sia bekbek a gamta uh hi. Keimah Topa in kong cih in ah, Israel mite in a khut uh tawh milim a bawlna uh hangin kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:31 Hih khuapi in, a kisat cil a kipan tu ni ciang dong hong hehsakin hong thangpaisak ahih manin ka muhna panin ka hem khia ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite le Judah mite, a kumpite uh le a kumpi uliante uh, a siampite uh le a kamsangte uh a kipan Judah mite le Jerusalem khua mite khempeuh in kei hong hehsak nadingin siatna a bawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:33 Amaute in kei hong nungngatin hong maingat lo uh a, ka hilh tawntung hangin ka hilhna a hong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:34 Amaute in ka min tawh a kilo biakinn sung nangawn ah a kihhuai milimte a koih uh a, a ninsak uh hi." 
Jeremiah32:35 Hinnom Kuam ah a tapate le a tanute uh tawh Molek pasian a biak nadingun Baal ading biakna tausangte a bawl uh hi. Hih a kihhuai na semin, Judah mite mawhna a bawlsak nadingun amaute ka sawl kei a, zong ka ngaihsun kha ngei beek kei hi." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Jeremiah aw, nangmah in hih khuapi, namsau tawh thahna, kialpi tunna le pulnatna tawh Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah kipia ding hi, na ci hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang na cihna hih khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah:" 
Jeremiah32:37 En in, ka hehna, ka thangpaihna le ka lungkim lohna lianpi tawh ka hawl khiatna gam khempeuh panin amaute ka kaikhawmkik dinga, hih munah tun pihkikin, lungmuang takin ka omsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:38 Amaute keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:39 Amauteʼ hoih nading le amauteʼ nung a a tu a tate uh a hoih nadingin a tawntungin kei hong zahtak nadingun a lungsim uh kikhat sakin, a nuntak dan uh zong ka kikhatsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:40 Amaute tungah a tawntungin hoihna ka bawl den nadingin amaute tawh tawntung thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Kei kiang panin a kiheikhiat loh nadingun amaute sungah kei hong zahtak nading uh lungsim ka guan ding hi. 
Jeremiah32:41 Amaute tungah hoihna ka bawl manin ka lungdam dinga, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh thuman takin hih gamah amaute ka phut ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, hih siatna khempeuh hih mite tungah ka tunsak mah bangin, amauteʼ tunga ka khap sa a hoih khempeuh zong ka tungsak pelmawh ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:43 Nangmah in, hih gam pen mihing le ganhing a ten lohna gam simtham hi dinga, Khaldea miteʼ khut sungah kipia ding hi, ci-in na gen hangin tu-in hih gamah lo kileikik ta ding hi." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot le Judah gam khuapite a kipan mual tunga khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite le leitaw lam Negeb gam a khuapite ah sum tawh lo kilei dinga, a theih pih mite tawh thukimna min gelhin gip tawh kikhen ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in amaute a gam mah uh ah ka omsakkik ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:1 Thong huang sungah Jeremiah a kikhumcip laitak mahin Topa in a nih veina hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Leitung bawlin a kipsak Topa, a min Topa a kici Topa in kong genin ah:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Kei nong sap leh kong dawngkik dinga, na theih ngei nai loh a ki-imcip thu lianpite kong gen ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh galteʼ kan tawhna le gal kidona hangin a kisusia gawp ding hih khuapi sunga innte le Judah kumpiteʼ innte tawh kisai-in, Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Ka hehna le ka thangpaihna tawh ka thah lup ding misi luangte tawh a kidimsak dingin Khaldea mite in a hong sim ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuapi sunga a om miteʼ gitlohna hangin hih khuapi panin ka mai ka seel hi. 
Jeremiah33:6 Ahih hangin tu-in, keimah in hih khuapi ka damsak dinga, cidamin ka omsak ding hi. A mite cidamsakin hauhna le lungmuanna a kicing ka lak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Judah mite le Israel mite ka hausakkik dinga, a nidang a a omngei bangun ka omsakkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:8 Kei tungah hong bawl uh mawhna khempeuh panin amaute ka siangsak dinga, kei tungah a hong mawhnate uh le a hong langpanna khempeuhte uh ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:9 Jerusalem khuapi pen kei adingin lungdamna, minphatna le minthanna ahi hi. A sunga om mite tungah hoihna le hauhna ka tunsakna thu a za minam dangte lau-in a liing ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:10 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, note in, ‘Hih munah mihing, ganhing om loin mun dai suak hi,’ ci-in na gen uh mah bangin Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzingte awng a, mihing ganhing kuamah a teeng kei hi." 
Jeremiah33:11 Ahih hangin lungdamna aw le kipahna awte, zi nei thakte le mothakteʼ awte kizakik ding hi. Topaʼ biakinn ah mite hong pai-in lungdam kohna-in: ‘Vanglian Topaʼ tungah lungdamna ko un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa hoih a, ama itna kip tawntung hi,’ ci-in a lasakna awte uh a kizakik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, a masa-a mah bangin hih gam ka hausakkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:12 “Vanglian Topa in kong cih in ah, mihing ganhing om loin mun awng ahi mun le a khuapi khempeuhte ah tuucingte in tuu cingin a ten theih nading mun hong om ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mual tung a khuapite, Shefelah zanglei-a khuapite le leitaw lam Negeb gam a khuapite, Benjamin gam, Jerusalem khua kimkot le Judah gam khuapite ah, Topa in kong cih in ah, tuucingte in a tuute uh a phazah a sim ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:14 “En un, Topa in kong cih in ah: Israel mite le Judah mite tungah ka khap sa thu ka tangtunsak hun hong tung ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:15 Tua hun ciangin Davidʼ suan lak panin kumpi dingin a dik tat mi khat ka khangsak dinga, amah in gam sungah thuman tawh thu hong khen ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Tua ni ciangin Judah mite kihon khia dinga, Israel mite lungmuang takin a teeng ding uh hi. Amah a kisap nadingin a min ‘ Topa, Eiteʼ Diktanna,’ ci-in a kiphuak ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:17 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah: Israel miteʼ kumpi dingin Davidʼ suan sung panin mi kitasam ngei lo ding hi. 
Jeremiah33:18 Levi minam lak panin zong meihal biaknate, an tawh biakna le biakpiaknate a pia tawntung dingin ka mai ah a ding ding siampi kitasam ngei lo ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:19 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:20 “ Topa in kong cih in ah: Sun hun le zan hun a manmanin a hong tun loh theih nadingin sun tawh ka thuciamna le zan tawh ka thuciamna na siatsak zawh ciang bekin," 
Jeremiah33:21 keimah le ka nasem pa David tawh ka thuciamna kisia pan dinga, amah in a kumpi tokhom luah ding tapa nei loin, ka na a sem ding siampi Levi minamte tawh ka thuciamna zong a kisia hi pan ding hi." 
Jeremiah33:22 Van a aksite kisim zo loin, tuipi a sehnelte a kiteh zawh loh bangin keimah in ka nasem pa Davidʼ suanlekhakte ahi a, siampi Levi minamte ahi zongin ka pungsak den ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah33:23 Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Hih mite in, Topa in a teel sa Israel le Judah minam tegel a nusia ta hi, ci-in a gen uh thei kha lo na hi hiam? Tua bangin amaute in ka mite simmawh uh a, amauʼ muhna ah minam khatin a sim nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah33:25 Topa in kong genin ah: Sun le zan tawh ka thuciamna ahi a, vantung le leitung ngeina kipte ahi zongin a kipsak khin nai lo hi leng" 
Jeremiah33:26 Jakob le ka nasem pa Davidʼ suante ka nial dinga, Abraham, Isaac le Jakobʼ suante a uk dingin amauteʼ lakah mi khat zong a teel lo ding mah ka hi hi. Ahi zongin tu-in tua bang hi loin amaute ka hausakkik dinga, ka hehpih ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah34:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a galkapte khempeuh, a ukna gam khempeuh le a mi khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua le a kiim a khuapite a sim laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah34:2 “ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiangah pai inla, hih bangin va gen in: ‘ Topa in hong genin ah: En in, keimah in Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah hih khuapi ka pia dinga, amah in mei tawh a hal ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:3 Ama khut sung panin na suakta kei dinga, hong kimanin ama khut sungah nang hong kipia taktak ding hi. Nang le Babylon kumpipa maitang kimu-in na kiho ding uh a, Babylon khua ah na pai ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai lai dih in. Topa in nangmah tawh kisai-in a hong genin ah, nang in namsau tawh thahna na thuak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:5 Nuam takin na si dinga, nangʼ ma-a kumpi a suak na pu na pate-aʼ dingin paknamtui a kihal mah bangin nang adingin zong paknamtui hong kihal dinga, “Aw, topa aw,” ci-in hong kah ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hong gen khinzo hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah34:6 Kei zong hih thu teng khempeuh Jerusalem khua-a Judah kumpi Zedekiah kiangah ka gen hi. 
Jeremiah34:7 Tua hun pen Babylon kumpipaʼ galkapte in Jerusalem khuapi le Judah gam a khuapi muanhuai lakah a om lai Lakhish khua le Azekah khuate gel zong a sim laitak uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah34:8 Zedekiah kumpipa in numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin Hebru mipih silate khah khia-in, kuamah in a Jew mipihte sila-in khawi thei lo ding hi, ci-in suahtak nading thu zasak a, Jerusalem khua-a mi khempeuh tawh thuciamna a bawl hi." 
Jeremiah34:9  
Jeremiah34:10 Mi khempeuh in a silate uh numei ahi a, pasal ahi zongin khah khia-in sila-in khawikik thei nawn lo ding hi, ci-in thuciamna a nei kumpi uliante a kipan mi khempeuh in mang uh a, a khah khia uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:11 Ahih hangin tua nung ciangin a lungsim uh khelkikin a khahkhiat sa uh numei le pasal silate lakik uh a, sila mahin a zangkik mawk uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah34:13 “ Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah, keimah in na pu na pate uh koltanna Egypt gam pan ka lakkhiat laitakin amau tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl a," 
Jeremiah34:14 note kiangah nasem dinga hong kizuak na Hebru mipihte uh in note adingin kum guk, na hong sepsak khit a kum sagihna sungin na khah khia ding uh a, na na uh na semsak nawn kei ding uh hi, ka ci hi. Ahih hangin na pu na pate un ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, hong mang lo uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:15 Zan diakin no na kisikkik uh a, na mipihte ciat uh suahtak nading taangko-in, ka min tawh a kilo biakinn sung ka mai ah thuciamna na bawl uh a, ka muhna ah a kilawm na khat na sem khinzo uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:16 Ahih hangin na lungsim uh na kheelkik leuleu uh a, amauʼ utna banga na khahkhiat sa uh sila numei le pasalte na lakik uh a, na na uh semsakin ka min nong daisak uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:17 Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: Mi khempeuh in na sanggam na mipihte uh khah khia loin, suahtakna pia loin ka thu hong mang lo na hih uh leh, en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, note hong khah khia-in suahtakna kong pia ta hi. Namsau tawh kithahna, pulnatna le kialpite tawh na sih nadingun note kong khah khia a, kong suaktasak hi. Leitung gam khempeuhteʼ hong lipkhap dingin kong bawl hi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Mite in keiʼ mai ah thuciamna a bawl uh ciangin bawng no phel nih suahin a kikalah a pai uh hi. Judah gam kumpi uliante, kumpi innsung maangte, siampite a kipan bawng no phel nih kikalah a pai khin sa gam sunga ka mite khempeuh in ka thuciamna hong mang loin, thuciamna sunga om thute a zuih kei uh leh amaute tua bawng no ka bangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 A galteʼ khut sungah amaute ka pia dinga, a that nuam miteʼ khut sungah ka pia ding hi. A luanghawmte uh van a vasate le leitung a gamsateʼ an a suak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah34:21 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le a kumpi uliante, a galte uhʼ khut sungah pia-in, amaute a that nuam mite le noteʼ kiang panin a kilehkik khinzo Babylon kumpipaʼ galkapteʼ khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Jeremiah34:22 En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, keimah in thu ka pia dinga, hih khuapi ah hong paikik ding uh hi. Amaute in hih khuapi hong simin, hong la-in mei tawh hong halsak ding uh hi. Judah gam khuapite kuamaʼ ten lohna mun awng ka suaksak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:1 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Rekhab behte kiangah pai inla, amau tawh na kiho khit ciangin Topaʼ biakinn ah hong pai inla, inn dei khat sungah tum pihin, tua ciangin a dawn dingin leenggahzu pia in,” ci-in a hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tua ciangin Habazziniahʼ tupa ahi Jeremiah dang khatʼ tapa, Jaazaniah le a sanggamte, a tate khempeuh le Rekhab behte khempeuh ka sam hi." 
Jeremiah35:4 Amaute, Topaʼ biakinn sung, kumpi ulianteʼ inn dei gei, Shallumʼ tapa, kongpi uk biakinn upa lian Maaseiahʼ inn dei tung sanah a om, Igdaliahʼ tapa, Pasianʼ mi ahi Hananʼ tateʼ inn dei sungah ka lutpih hi." 
Jeremiah35:5 Tua ciangin Rekhab behteʼ mai ah leenggahzu a dimin a kikoih hai le keute ka pia a, leenggahzu dawn un, ci-in ka sawl hi." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote in leenggahzu ka ne kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Rekhabʼ tapa, ka pu uh Jonadab in thu hong pia a, ‘Note a kipan na ta na tute un leenggahzu na ne ngei peuhmah kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:7 Inn na lam kei ding uh a, khai na tuh kei ding uh hi. Singno na suan kei ding uh a, leenggah lo na bawl kei ding uh hi. Ahih hangin na ten pakna uh gam sungah sawt veipi na ten theih nadingun na nuntak hun sungteng uh puanbuk sungah na teeng ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:8 Kote in Rekhabʼ tapa ka pu uh Jonadabʼ hong thupiak khempeuh ka mang uh a, ka nuntak hun sungteng uh ko a kipan ka zite uh, ka tapate uh le ka tanute uh in leenggahzu dawn loin," 
Jeremiah35:9 ten nading inn ka lam kei uh hi. Leenggah huan, lo le khaici bangmah ka nei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ka pu uh Jonadabʼ hong sawl bangbangin ka mang uh a, puanbuk sungah ka teng den uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:11 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih gam hong sim ciangin kote in, ‘Hong pai un. Khaldea galkapte le Syria galkapte kihta ihih manin Jerusalem khua ah pai ni,’ ka kici uh a, tua mah bangin tu-in Jerusalem khua ah ka teng uh hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: Pai inla Judah mite kiang le Jerusalem khua-a teeng miteʼ kiangah, Topa in: Ka thuhilhna hong sang loin ka thu hong ngai lo ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Rekhabʼ tapa Jonadab in a suanlekhakte tungah leenggahzu a dawn loh nading uh a thupiakna amaute in zui uh a, tu ni ciang dong bangmah a dawn kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a pu uhʼ thupiakna a mang uh hi. Keimah in note kong hopih tawntung hangin ka thu nong mang kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka nasem ahi kamsangte khempeuh note kiangah hong sawl tawntungin, ‘Tu-in note khempeuh na hoih lohna uh panin kihei unla, na gamtat hoih lote uh kipuahpha un. Pasian dangte nung delh loin a na na sep kei nak uh leh note le na pu na pate uh kiangah ka piak gam sungah na teeng ding uh hi,’ ci-in note tungah hong gen uh hi. Ahih hangin note in na bil uh nong ngat kei uh a, ka thu nong ngai kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekhabʼ tapa Jonadabʼ suante in a pu uh thupiakna a man uh hangin hih mite in ka thu hong mang lo uh hi. 
Jeremiah35:17 Tua ahih manin keimah Topa Vanglian Pasian in kong genin ah: En un, Judah mite le Jerusalem khua ah a teeng mi khempeuh tungah a tung dingin ka genkhiat sa khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau tungah ka gen hangin amaute in ka thu hong ngai lo uh a, amaute ka sap hangin hong dawngkik lo uh hi, ci hi, ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tua ciangin kei zong Rekhab behte kiangah, “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: Na pu uh Jonadabʼ hong thupiakna mangin, a hong thuhilhna bangin zui-in, a hong sawl khempeuh sem khin na hih manun" 
Jeremiah35:19 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong cih in ah: Rekhabʼ tapa Jonadabʼ suanteʼ lak panin ka mai-a ding ka nasem ding pasal khat beek a kitasam ngei kei ding hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah36:1 Josiahʼ tapa Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a uk zawh kum li a phakna kumin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Laizial khat la inla, tua sungah Josiah kumpi a suah kum, nang kong hopih masak hun a kipan tu ni ciang dong Israel gam le gamdang khempeuhteʼ lang khat ah ka thugente khempeuh gelh in." 
Jeremiah36:3 Judah mite in amauʼ tungah tunsak dingin ka ngaihsut siatna khempeuh za-in, mi khempeuh in a siatna uh panin kiheina-in nei kha thei ding uh a, keimah in zong amauʼ khialhna le amauʼ mawhnate ka maisak thei kha ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tua ciangin kei zong Neriahʼ tapa Baruk ka sam a, Topa in keima tungah a hong gen khit sa thu khempeuh sitin Baruk in laizial khat tungah a gelh hi." 
Jeremiah36:5 Tua ciangin Baruk ka sawl a, “ Topaʼ biakinn ah a pai dingin kei hong kiphal nawn lo ahih manin" 
Jeremiah36:6 nang va pai inla, an tan ni ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sungah a om mi khempeuhteʼ zak dingin ka hong sit hih laizial sungah na at Topaʼ kammalte na va sim ding hi. Amauʼ khuapite pan a hong paikhia Judah mi khempeuhteʼ zakin zong na sim ding hi." 
Jeremiah36:7 Topaʼ tungah amaute thumin a vekpi-un a hoih lohna uh panin a kihei thei kha ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih miteʼ tungah Topa in tunsak dingin a gen sa a hehna le a thangpaihna lian mahmah hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah36:8 Topaʼ biakinn sungah laizial sunga Topaʼ kammal simkhiat dingin ka sawl bangbangin Neriahʼ tapa Baruk in zong a hih hi. 
Jeremiah36:9 Josiahʼ tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakim in a uk zawh kum nga a phak kum, a kha kuana kha-in Jerusalem khua-a om mi khempeuh le Judah gam khuapite panin Jerusalem khua ah a hong pai mi khempeuh in Topaʼ maipha ngah nadingin an a tang uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:10 Tua ciangin Topaʼ biakinn sung, a Kongpi Thak tumna gei, a dei tungnung a Shafanʼ tapa thuvanpi pa Gemariahʼ inn dei sungah mi khempeuhʼ zakin Baruk in laizial sunga ka gelhsak kammalte a sim khia hi." 
Jeremiah36:11 Gemariahʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa ahi Mikaiah in laizial sunga thu teng khempeuh a zak ciangin" 
Jeremiah36:12 kumpipaʼ inn sung, thuvanpi paʼ inn dei sungah pai suk a, tua lai munah thuvanpi pa Elishama, Shemaiahʼ tapa Delaiah, Akborʼ tapa Elnathan, Shafanʼ tapa Gemariah le Hananiahʼ tapa Zedekiah te a kipan kumpi ulian khempeuh tu-in na om uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:13 Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, mi khempeuhʼ zakin Baruk in a sim a zak sa thu teng khempeuh a gen hi." 
Jeremiah36:14 Tua ciangin kumpi ulian khempeuh in, Kushiʼ tu sawn ahi, Shelemiahʼ tupa, Nethaniahʼ tapa Jehudi, Baruk kiangah sawl uh a, “Mite kiangah na sim na laizial hong la inla hong pai in,” ci-in a samsak uh hi. Tua ciangin Neriahʼ tapa Baruk in zong tua laizial la-in amaute kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Jeremiah36:15 Amaute in, “Tu inla hong sim dih in,” ci-in a gen uh hi. Baruk in zong amaute kiangah a sim hi." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tua thute khempeuh a zak khit uh ciangin lau-in khatlekhat ki-en gapgap uh a, Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah i koh kul ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:17 Tua ciangin Baruk kiangah, “Hih thute khempeuh bangci at na hi hiam? Jeremiah in hong sit ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruk in zong, “Amah in hih thu khempeuh hong sit a, keʼn zong laizial sungah laitui tawh ka at hi,” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tua ciangin kumpi uliante in Baruk kiangah, “Pai inla, nang le Jeremiah va bu un. Na omna mun uh kuamah theisak kei un,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tua ciangin amaute in thuvanpi pa Elishamaʼ inn dei sungah tua laizial koih uh a, kumpipaʼ omna inn dei sungah a lut khit uh ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua thu khempeuh a gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:21 Kumpipa in zong tua laizial a la dingin Jehudi sawl a, amah in thuvanpi pa Elishamaʼ inn dei sung pan a va la khia hi. Kumpipa le kumpipa kiangah a ding ulian khempeuhteʼ zakin Jehudi in a sim hi." 
Jeremiah36:22 Kha kua kha pen phalbi laitak ahih manin kumpipa zong a phalbi inn sungah tu-in, meikhuk a meikuang a awi hi." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudi in khawk thum khawk li bang a sim khit ciangin kumpipa in temta neu khat tawh at khia a, meikhuk sungah a khul hi. Tua bangin laizial buppi a kattum dong meikhuk sungah a paipai hi." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ahih hangin kumpipa ahi a, hih thute a za khin a nasemte khat beek ahi zongin lau tuan loin, kisikkik lo uh ahih manin a puan uh a bal kek kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah36:25 Elnathan, Delaiah le Gemariah in kumpipa in laizial a hal loh nading a khoh uh hangin amah in a mang kei hi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Tua ciangin kumpipa in kumpipaʼ tapa Jerahmeel pen Azrielʼ tapa Seraiah le Abdeelʼ tapa Shelemiah tawh, ka lai-at Baruk le keimah a man dingin thu a pia hi. Ahih hangin Topa in ko tegel a hong seelsim hi." 
Jeremiah36:27 Keima sit bangin Baruk in a at laizial kumpipa in a hal tum khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Laizial dang khat la inla tua tungah, Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in a hal tum a masa laizial sunga thu om teng khempeuh atkik in." 
Jeremiah36:29 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakimʼ thu tawh kisai-in hih bangin ama kiangah va gen in: ‘ Topa in hong genin ah: Nangmah in, “Jeremiah aw, bang hangin Babylon kumpipa hong pai taktakin hih gam hong susia dinga, mihing le ganhing a tengsak nawn kei ding hi, ci-in hih lai sungah at na hi hiam?” ci-in na gen a, tua laizial na hal tum hi." 
Jeremiah36:30 Tua ahih ciangin Judah kumpipa Jehoiakimʼ thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kong genin ah, amah in David tokhom tunga tu ding suanlekhak a nei kei dinga, ama luanghawm pen sun laitakin nisaʼ kap ding le zan laitakin vukngoʼ tuam dingin kipaidak ding hi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Amah le a suanlekhakte le a nasemte a mawhna uh hangin gim ka pia dinga, ama tung le Jerusalem khua-a teengte tung a kipan Judah miteʼ tungah amauʼ tungah tunsak dingin ka gen sa gimna khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thu hong ngai lo uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” ci-in kei a hong sawl hi." 
Jeremiah36:32 Tua ciangin kei zong laizial dang khat la leuleu-in Neriahʼ tapa lai-at Baruk ka pia hi. Amah in zong Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim in meikhuk sungah a khul tum sa laizial sunga thu ki-at khempeuh, keima sit bangbangin a at hi. A thu kibang tampi zong ka gelhbehsak hi." 
Jeremiah37:1 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jehoiakimʼ tapa Jehoiakhinʼ tangin Judah gam a uk dingin Josiahʼ tapa Zedekiah a koih hi. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ahih hangin a mahmah a kipan a nasemte le a gam sung mite in keima tungtawn a Topaʼ thugennate a ngai kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah37:3 Kumpi Zedekiah in Shelemiahʼ tapa Jehukal le Maaseiahʼ tapa siampipa Zefaniah keima kiangah hong sawl a, “ Topa i Pasianʼ kiangah kote adingin thu hong ngetsak in,” ci-in a hong gensak hi." 
Jeremiah37:4 Hih hunin thong kia nai lo ka hih manin mi lakah ka ututin ka vak kawikawi hi. 
Jeremiah37:5 Tua hun laitak pen Babylon galkapte in Jerusalem khua a sim laitak uh hi a, tua hun laitak mahin Faro kumpipaʼ galkapte, galsim dingin Egypt gam panin hong kuan khia hi, cih thu a zak uh ciangin Jerusalem khua panin a nungkik uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:6 Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah37:7 “ Topa ahi Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: Keiʼ tungah thu a hong dongsak Judah kumpipa kiangah hih bangin na va gen ding hi: ‘En in, nang hong huh dingin a hong pai Faro kumpipaʼ galkapte a gam uh ah ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:8 Tua ciangin Babylon-te hong kilehkikin hih khuapi hong sim ding uh a, khuapi la-in mei tawh a hal ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:9 Topa in kong cih in ah, nang le nang kikhemin, “Babylon-te hong kilehkik nawn lo taktak ding uh hi,” ci kha kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute hong kilehkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangmah in na gal Babylon galkap khempeuh zo lua kisa-in buk sunga mi liam teng bek na suaktasak khaphial ahi zongin, amaute hong thokik teitei ding uh a, hih khuapi hong halsak veve ding uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:11 Faroʼ galkapte Jerusalem khua a hong naih ciangun Babylon galkapte a nungkik uh hi. 
Jeremiah37:12 Tua laitakin kei zong Jerusalem khua panin ka behte kiangah ka gamhluah teeng a la dingin Benjamin gamah a pai dingin ka ding khia hi. 
Jeremiah37:13 Benjamin Kongpi ka tun ciangin Shelemiahʼ tapa, Hananiahʼ tupa Irijah a kici kongcing pa in kei kiangah, “Nang Babylon miteʼ lamah a taisim ding na hi hi,” ci-in a hong man hi." 
Jeremiah37:14 Tua ciangin kei zong, “Hi lo hiʼng; Babylon miteʼ lamah ka taisim kei ding hi,” ka ci hi. Ahih hangin Irijah in ka thugen hong ngai loin kei hong man a, kumpi uliante kiangah hong paipih hi." 
Jeremiah37:15 Kumpi uliante zong kei tungah heh mahmah uh a, hong sat khit uh ciangin thong dingin a kizang sa, kumpi thuvanpi pa Jonathanʼ inn ah thong hong kiasak uh hi." 
Jeremiah37:16 Lei sung thongmial ah ni tampi ka om khit ciangin 
Jeremiah37:17 kumpi Zedekiah in kei hong samsak hi. Kumpipa in a inn sungah, “ Topaʼ hong thugen kam khat beek om lo ahi hiam?” ci-in a hong dongsim hi. Kei zong, “Om mah hi,” ka cih khit ciangin, “Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah nang hong kipia taktak ding hi,” ci-in ka gen hi." 
Jeremiah37:18 Tua ciangin kei zong kumpi Zedekiahʼ kiangah, “Kei thong nong kiatsak nadingin nangʼ tungah ahi a, na nasemte tung le hih miteʼ tungah ahi zongin bang khialhna hong bawl ka hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Nangʼ kiangah, ‘Babylon kumpipa in nang le hih gam hong sim lo ding hi,’ ci-in thu a hong gen khol, na kamsangte tu-in koi ah om ahi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Tu-in ka to kumpipa aw, ka thugen nong ngaih nadingin kong thum hi. Kumpi thuvanpi pa Jonathanʼ inn ah nong puakkik nawn loh nadingin na mai nuai ah kiniamkhiatna tawh kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nong puakkik leh tua lai ah ka si taktak ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tua ahih manin kumpipa Zedekiah in kumpi thonginn sungah ka kiat zawk nading thu pia a, khua sunga anlum a bei matengin anlum sai panin nisimin anlum khat ta hong piasak den hi. Tua ahih manin kumpipaʼ thong sungah a om ka suak hi." 
Jeremiah38:1 Mattanʼ tapa Shefatiah, Pashhurʼ tapa Gedaliah, Shelemiahʼ tapa Jehukal le Malkhiahʼ tapa Pashhur-te in mi khempeuh tungah keima thugenna a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:2 Keimah in mite kiangah, “ Topa in hong cih in ah: Hih khuapi sungah a om mi peuhmah namsau tawh ahi a, kial tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Ahih hangin pusuak khia-in Babylon mite a beel peuhmah nungta dinga, suakta liailiai ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:3 Topa in hong cih in ah, Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah hih khuapi kipia taktak dinga, a kila ta ding ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ uliante in kumpipa kiangah, “Hih mipa i that lum ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih thute a gen manin hih khuapi sungah a om lai galkapte le mi khempeuhte lungkiasakin tha zawsak hi. Hih mipa in i gam miteʼ phattuam nading zong loin a gim ngah nading uh a zong zaw ahi hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Kumpipa Zedekiah in, “En un, noteʼ khut sungah amah om hi. Keimah in note kong kho thei kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tua ciangin amaute in kei hong man uh a, thong huang sunga om kumpipaʼ tapa Malkhiahʼ tuikhuk sungah khau tawh hong khia suk uh hi. Tuikhuk sungah tui om loin buan bek om a, buan sungah ka tum suk hi." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kumpipaʼ inn sungah na a sem kumpi ulian khat ahi Ethiopia mi Ebedmelek in tuikhuk sungah kei hong kikhiat lam a za hi. Tua laitakin Benjamin Kongpi ah kumpipa tu-in a om hi. 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedmelek zong kumpi inn panin hong pai khia-in kumpipa kiangah," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ka to kumpipa aw, hih mite in kamsang pa Jeremiah, tuikhuk sungah a khiat suk uh a khial uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khua sungah anlum om nawn lo ahih manin an ngawlin a puksi veve ding ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:10 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ethiopia mipa Ebedmelek sawl a, “Hih lai panin mi thum tonpih inla, kamsang pa Jeremiah a sih ma-in tuikhuk sung pan va kai khia un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:11 Tua ciangin Ebedmelek in zong a mite tonpih a, kumpipaʼ inn ah pai-in vankoihna sungah a lut khit uh ciangin tuikhuk sung pan khau tawh kei hong kaih khiatna ding uh puan sia sa le puan lui pawl khat a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:12 Tua ciangin Ethiopia mipa Ebedmelek in keima kiangah, “Na lenuai le khau kikalah puan siate dap in,” ci-in hong sawl hi. Kei zong tua mah bangin ka hih hi." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tua ciangin amaute in tuikhuk sung panin khau tawh kei a hong kai khiato uh hi. Ahi zongin thong huang sung mahah ka om lai hi. 
Jeremiah38:14 Kumpi Zedekiah in kei hong vaikhak a, Topaʼ biakinn kongkhak thumna ah a hong sam hi. Kumpipa in kei kiangah, “Thu khat kong dong ding hi; bangmah hong im kei in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:15 Kei zong Zedekiah kiangah, “Thuman bangin hong gen leng kei nong that taktak ding hi. Ka ngaihsutna hong pia taleng zong nong mang nuam kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Eite nuntakna a hong pia Topa a nuntak bangin kong sisak kei dinga, nang a hong that nuam hih miteʼ khut sungah zong kong pia kei ding hi,” ci-in kiciamna a hong pia sim hi." 
Jeremiah38:17 Tua ciangin keimah in Zedekiah kiangah, “ Topa, Vanglian Pasian, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah, Babylon kumpipaʼ uliante na belh leh na nuntakna hong kimap dinga, hih khuapi in zong mei tawh hal tum na thuak loin nang le na innkuanpihte na nungta ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipaʼ uliante na belh kei leh Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah hih khuapi kipia dinga, amau in mei tawh halin amauteʼ khut sung pan na suakta kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:19 Kumpipa Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Babylon miteʼ kiangah a tai Judah mite ka kihta hi. Amauteʼ khut sungah kei hong kipia leh amaute in kei hong bawlsia ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:20 Kei zong, “Amauteʼ kiangah nang hong kipia lo ding hi. Tu-a kong gen bangin Topaʼ thu mang in. Tua hileh nang adingin hoih dinga, na nuntakna hong kimap ding hi." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ahih hangin na lut nop kei leh, Topa in ka maangmuhna sungah hih bangin hong lak hi:" 
Jeremiah38:22 En in, Judah kumpipaʼ inn sungah a kinusia numei khempeuh Babylon kumpipaʼ uliante kiangah kipaipih a, tua numeite in Zedekiah kiangah, ‘Na lawm muante in nang hong khem uh a, nang hong zo ta uh hi. Buan sungah na khe tum ahih manin nang hong nungngat ta uh hi,’ ci-in a gen uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:23 Na nupite le na tate khempeuh Babylon mite kiangah kipaipih dinga, nang mahmah zong amauteʼ khut sung panin na suakta kei ding hi. Babylon kumpipa in hong man dinga, hih khuapi mei tawh a kaang tum ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah38:24 Tua ciangin Zedekiah in kei kiangah, “Hih thute kuamah theisak kei in. Tua hileh na si kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ahih hangin kumpi uliante in nang kong hopih lam a zak khak uh a, nang kiangah hong pai-in hong hopihin, ‘Kumpipa kiangah na gen thute le kumpipa in nang kiangah hong gen thute hong gen in. Bangmah hong im kei lecin kong that kei ding uh hi,’ ci-in a hong gen khak uh leh" 
Jeremiah38:26 amaute kiangah, ‘Kumpipa in kei, Jonathanʼ inn ah a si dingin a hong puakkik nawn loh nadingin a thum hi ing,’ ci-in dawng in,” ci-in a hong gen hi." 
Jeremiah38:27 Kumpi ulian khempeuh ka kiangah hong pai takpi uh a, thu a hong dong uh hi. Kei zong kumpipaʼ hong vaikhakna bangin ka dawngkik hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a gen ding uh om nawn lo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa tawh ka kihona uh a hong za sim kuamah a om kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah38:28 Tua hi a, Jerusalem khua a kilak ciang dong kei zong thong huang sung mahah ka om lai hi." 
Jeremiah39:1 Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum kua le kha sawm a phak laitakin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le a galkap khempeuh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin a hong kuan uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekiah in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum khat, a kha lina, a ni kua ni-in, kumpipaʼ khuapi kulh a hong phu let uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:3 Jerusalem khua a kilak laitakin Nergal-sharezer, Samgar-nebo, galkap bu Sarsekhim le sakol galkap maang Nergal-sharezer te a kipan Babylon kumpi uliante khempeuh hong pai-in kongpi laita pen ah hong tu uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:4 Judah kumpipa Zedekiah le galkap khempeuh in amaute a muh uh ciangin a taisim uh hi. Zan laitakin kumpipaʼ huan sung tawnin kulh tegel kikal a kongpi kantanin khuapi sung pan paikhia uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ahih hangin Babylon galkapte in nung delh uh a, Jerikho zanglei ah Zedekiah a pha uh hi. A mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua ah, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ kiangah paipih uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah39:6 Riblah khua ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiahʼ muh mahin a tapate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a that lum hi." 
Jeremiah39:7 Zedekiahʼ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon ah a ciahpih hi." 
Jeremiah39:8 Babylon mite in kumpipaʼ inn le midangteʼ innte hal uh a, Jerusalem khua kulhpi a susia uh hi." 
Jeremiah39:9 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia lai mite pen ama kiangah a tai mite tawh, Babylon ah sal dingin a paipih hi." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in bangmah a nei lo mizawng pawl khat Judah gamah nusia a, leenggah huan le lo a pia hi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in kei tawh kisai-in kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan thu pia a," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Jeremiah la un. Limtakin kem unla bawlsia kei un. Ama deih bangbangin na bawl un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap maang Nebuzaradan tawh, galkap bu Nebushazban le sakol galkap maang Nergal-sharezer te a kipan Babylon kumpipaʼ uliante khempeuh in" 
Jeremiah39:14 thong huang sung panin kei a hong la khia uh hi. Ahikamʼ tapa ahi, Shafanʼ tupa Gedaliah in hong kemin inn ah a hong ciahpih dingin kei a hong ap uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka mipihteʼ lak mahah ka om hi." 
Jeremiah39:15 Thong huang sungah kikhumcipin ka om laitakin Topa in hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Ethiopia mi Ebedmelek kiangah pai inla, ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: En in, hih khuapi hoih nading hi lo, a siat nading ka gen sate ka tungsak dinga, tua ni a hong tun ciangin nangmah in zong na mu ding hi." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, tua ni ciangin nang kong hon khia dinga, na kihtak miteʼ khut sungah hong kipia lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah39:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong hon khia taktak dinga, namsau tawh thahna na thuak kei ding hi. Topa in kong cih in ah, kei hong muang na hih manin na nuntakna na suahtak liailiai ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:1 Kol kibulhin Jerusalem khua le Judah gam a saltangte khempeuh tawh Babylon khua ah hong kipuak khit ciangin Ramah khua panin kumpi cing galkap maang Nebuzaradan in hong khah khiakik hi. Tua khit ciangin Topa in kei a hong hopih hi. 
Jeremiah40:2 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in kei hong sam khia-in hong hopih a, “ Topa na Pasian in hih mun a siat nading thu gen khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah40:3 Ama gen bangmahin Topa in tu-in zong a hih khinzo hi. Note in Topaʼ thu mang loin a tungah mawh na hih manun, note tungah hih bang thu a hong tung ahi hi." 
Jeremiah40:4 Tu-in en in, na khut a kibulh kolte tu ni-in kong sutkhiatsak a, kong khah khia ta hi. Babylon khua ah kei tawh pai ding hoih na sak leh hong pai in. Keimah in limtakin nang kong kem ding hi. Ahih hangin Babylon khua ah kei tawh pai ding hoih na sak kei leh hong pai kei in. Gam khempeuh na mai ah om a, na pai nopna peuhpeuh ah na pai thei hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kei ka pau loh ciangin Nebuzaradan in, “Babylon kumpipa in Judah gam khuapite a uk dingin a koih Ahikamʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa Gedaliah kiangah paikik in. Amah tawh na mipihte lakah na teng in. Na ten nop kei leh lah na pai nopna peuhpeuh ah pai in,” a hong ci hi. Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa in an le letsong hong pia-in kei a hong paisak hi." 
Jeremiah40:6 Tua ciangin kei zong Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliahʼ omna Mizpah khua ah ka pai a, gam sungah a om lai ka mipihte tawh ka om khawm hi." 
Jeremiah40:7 Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah koih a, Babylon khua ah sal dingin a kipaipih lo gam sungah mizawng pente ahi papi, nupi le naupangte a en dingin a koihna thu, Babylon-teʼ khut sungah a lut nai lo, gam sung khua neu-a om galkap bute le a galkapte un a zak uh ciangin" 
Jeremiah40:8 Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah a pai uh hi. Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael, Kareahʼ tapa Johanan, Tanhumethʼ tapa Seraiah, Netofah khuami Efaiʼ tate le Maakath mi Jezaniah-te in a galkapte hong paipih uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ahikamʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa Gedaliah in zong amaute kiangah kiciamin gen a, “Babylon miteʼ khutnuai ah na om ding uh kihta tuan kei un. Hih gam sung mahah om unla, Babylon kumpipaʼ na sepsak le-uhcin note tungah thusia bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kei ka hih leh Mizpah khua mahah ka om dinga, ei kiangah hong pai ding Babylon mite kiangah noteʼ tangin ka ding ding hi. No na hih uh leh leenggahzu, khuakhal ante le sathaute khawm unla, na beel sung uh ah koih un. Na lak sa uh khua ciat mahah na teng un,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah40:11 Tua mah bangin Moab gam, Ammon gam, Edom gam le gamdang a teeng Judah mi khempeuh in, Babylon kumpipa in Judah gamah mi pawl khat omsak lai a, tuate a uk dingin Ahikamʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa Gedaliah koih hi, cih thu a za uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:12 Tua ciangin Jew mi khempeuh a kithehthangna mun khempeuh panin Judah gamah hong ciahkik uh a, Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh hi. Leenggahzu le khuakhal an tampi a kaikhawm uh hi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Tua ciangin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le gam sung khua neu-a om galkap bute khempeuh Mizpah khua Gedaliah kiangah hong pai uh a," 
Jeremiah40:14 “Ammon kumpipa Baalis in nang a hong suam dingin Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael a sawl lam na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Ahih hangin Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah in amauʼ thugen a um kei hi. 
Jeremiah40:15 Tua ciangin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan in Mizpah khua-a Gedaliahʼ kiangah, “Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael hong thatsak in. Kuamah in hong thei lo ding uh hi. Nang hong kithat leh nang a hong beel Jew mite kikhenthang dinga, Judah gamah mi a om lai sunteng in zong beilawh ding uh ahih manin bang hangin amah in nang hong that laizang ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a hopih sim hi." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahih hangin Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah in Kareahʼ tapa Johananʼ kiangah, “Tua bangin hih kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Ishmaelʼ thu na genna man lo hi,” a cikik hi." 
Jeremiah41:1 Kha sagih kha hong tun ciangin Nethaniahʼ tapa, Elishamaʼ tupa, kumpi nam le kumpipaʼ ulian pente khat ahi Ishmael, mi sawm tawh Mizpah khua Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliahʼ kiangah hong hawh uh hi. Mizpah khua ah amaute in an a nekkhawm laitakun," 
Jeremiah41:2 Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael le tua mi sawmte in, Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin a koih Ahikamʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa Gedaliah pen namsau tawh satin a that lum uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishmael in Mizpah khua ah Gedaliah tawh a om khawm Jew mi khempeuh le tua laitakin a om Babylon galkapte zong a that hi. 
Jeremiah41:4 Gedaliah a kisuam ni a zing ciang, kuama theih ma-in" 
Jeremiah41:5 Shekhem, Shiloh le Samaria khuate panin mi sawm giat hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a khamul uh metin a puan uh bal kekin, a pumpi uh a kikui gawp sa-in Topaʼ biakinn ah an tawh biakna le paknamtui tawh biakna a piak ding uh hong tawi khawm uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael zong Mizpah khua panin kap kawmin hong paikhia a, amau hong dawntuah hi. Amau tawh a kimuh ciangin amah in, “Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah hong en dih un,” ci-in a sam hi." 
Jeremiah41:7 Khuapi sung a tun uh ciangin Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael le a mi sawmte in amaute thatin a luang uh tuikhuk sung khat ah a paai uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:8 Ahih hangin amauteʼ lakah mi sawm in Ishmaelʼ kiangah, “Ko hong that kei in. Mangbuh, mangbuhham, sathau le khuaizu ka seelsim uh lo lai ah tampi a om hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih manin amah le a lawmte in amaute a that kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:9 Ishmael in a thah sa misi luanghawm khempeuh a paihna tuikhuk pen a gol khat hi a, kumpipa Asa in Israel kumpipa Baasha a nan nadingin a bawl ahi hi. Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael in a thah sa misi luanghawmte tua tuikhuk a dimsak hi." 
Jeremiah41:10 Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkap maang Nebuzaradan in, Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliahʼ uk dingin a piak kumpipaʼ tanute le Mizpah khua-a a kinusia mi khempeuh a kipan Mizpah khua ah a om lai mi khempeuh Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael in man a, Ammon gam lam zuanin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah41:11 Ahih hangin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le amah tawh a om khawm galkap maang khempeuh in Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmaelʼ tatsiatnate a zak uh ciangin 
Jeremiah41:12 a galkap khempeuh uh tawh Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael a sim dingin a kuan khia uh hi. Gibeon tuikhuk pi a tun uh ciangin a pha uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:13 Ishmaelʼ mat mi khempeuh in Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le a hong tonpih galkap maangte a muh uh ciangin a nuam uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:14 Tua ahih manin Mizpah khua panin Ishmael in manin a pai khiatpihte khempeuh hong kilehheikikin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan a beel uh hi. 
Jeremiah41:15 Ahih hangin Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael le mihing giat Johananʼ khut sung panin suakta uh a, Ammon gamah a tai uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:16 Tua ciangin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le a paipih galkap maangte khempeuh in, Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael in Mizpah khua ah Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah a thah khit ciangin manin a paikhiatpih galkapte, nupite, naupangte le kumpi inn sung mangte a kipan a om lai mi khempeuh Gibeon khua panin a ciah pihkik uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:17 Egypt gam a zuan dingin amaute pai uh a, Bethlehem khua gei Khimham Khawlmun ah a khawl uh hi." 
Jeremiah41:18 Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon mite a kihta uh hi. Babylon kumpipa in gam uk dingin a koih Ahikamʼ tapa Gedaliah pen Nethaniahʼ tapa Ishmael in suam lum ahih manin a kihta uh ahi hi. 
Jeremiah42:1 Tua ciangin galkap maangte khempeuh, Kareahʼ tapa Johanan, Hoshaiahʼ tapa Azariah le a neu pen pan a kipan a lian pen dongin mi khempeuh hong pai khawmin" 
Jeremiah42:2 kei kiangah, “Kong thumna uh hong ngai inla, a hong kinusia ko teng adingin Topa na Pasian kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatvei lai-in mi tampi ka hih uh hangin tu-in nong muh bangin mi tawmno khat bek ka hi ta uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:3 Topa na Pasian in ka lam pai nading uh ahi a, ka na sep nading uh ahi zongin a hong lah nadingin thu hong ngetsak in,” hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:4 Kei zong amaute kiangah, “Nong genna uh ka thei khinzo hi. En un, nong ngetna bangun Topa na Pasian uh kiangah thu ka ngen dinga, Topaʼ hong dawnkikna bangbang kong gen ding hi. Bangmah kong im kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:5 Tua ciangin amaute in kei kiangah, “ Topa na Pasian in kote adingin nang tungah a hong gen bangbang ka zuih kei tak mah uh leh Topa in mantakin thei tahen." 
Jeremiah42:6 Nang kong sawlna uh Topa i Pasianʼ hong gen bangbang hoih taleh sia taleh ka mang ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa i Pasianʼ thu mang leeng, ei adingin na hong hoih ding hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:7 Tua zawh ni sawm khit ciangin Topa in kei a hong hopih hi. 
Jeremiah42:8 Tua ciangin keimah in Kareahʼ tapa Johanan, amah tawh a om khawm galkap maangte khempeuh le a neu pen a kipan a lian pen dongin mi khempeuh ka sam a," 
Jeremiah42:9 “Na deihna uh kong thumsak nadingin nong sawlna uh Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a hong genin ah:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Hih gamah note na omsuak uh leh note kong lam dinga, kong phel kei ding hi. Kong phut dinga, kong bot khia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh noteʼ tungah siatna kong tunsak manin ka dah hi." 
Jeremiah42:11 Na kihtak uh Babylon kumpipa kihta nawn kei un. Topa in kong cih in ah, lau nawn kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama khut sung pan a hong hon khia ding le a hong la khia dingin keimah in note kong ompih hi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Amah in note hong hehpihin na gam mah uh ah na ten suak theih nadingun keimah in note kong hehpih ding hi. 
Jeremiah42:13 “Ahih hangin note in Topa na Pasian uhʼ thu mang loin, ‘Hih gam sungah ka teng nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:14 Gal om lohna, peengkul kitum lohna, anduh gilkial lohna Egypt gamah pai-in tua lai ah ka teeng ding uh hi,’ na cih uh leh" 
Jeremiah42:15 Judah gamah a om lai mite aw, Topaʼ kammal ngai un. Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: Egypt gamah a teeng dingin na pai teitei uh a, na ten teitei uh leh" 
Jeremiah42:16 na kihtaktak uh namsau in Egypt gamah note hong that veve dinga, na kihtaktak uh kialpi in zong Egypt gamah note hong nung delh veve-in, tua lai munah na si veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:17 Egypt gamah pai-in a teeng khempeuh namsau tawh ahi a, kialpi tawh ahi a, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin a si ding uh hi. Amauteʼ tungah ka tunsak ding gimna panin kuamah a suakta kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:18 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: Jerusalem khua ah a teeng miteʼ tungah ka hehna le ka thangpaihna a kibuak bangmahin Egypt gamah na pai uh leh note tungah ka hehna hong kibua ding hi. Mite in note hong lipkhap dinga, kihamsiatna-in hong zangin hong zahko ding uh hi. Note in hih mun na mukik nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in gen hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah42:19 Tua ciangin Judah gamah a om lai sunte kiangah, “ Topa in note kiangah, Egypt gamah pai kei un, hong ci hi. Tu ni-in note kong hilh kholhnate teltakin thei un." 
Jeremiah42:20 Na sih nadingun lam na pial khin uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian uh kiangah kei nong paisak uh a, ‘Ko adingin Topa i Pasianʼ kiangah thu hong ngetsak in. Topa i Pasian in a hong gen peuhpeuh ko kiangah hong gen in. Ko zong ka mang ding uh hi,’ na hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah42:21 Topa na Pasian un noteʼ kiangah gen dingin a hong sawl tu-in kong gen khinzo hi. Ahih hangin note in khat beek na mang kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah42:22 Tua ahih manin na ten nopna mun uh ah namsau tawh thahna, kial le pulnatna tawh sihna na thuak ding uh hi, ci-in tu-in tel takpi-in thei ta un,” ka ci thuah lai hi." 
Jeremiah43:1 Topa Pasian in mi khempeuh kiangah a hong sawl hih thu teng ka gen khit ciangin 
Jeremiah43:2 Hoshaiahʼ tapa Azariah le Kareahʼ tapa Johanan a kipan migilo dangte khempeuh in kei kiangah, “Nang in zuau na phuak hi. Topa i Pasian in, ‘Egypt gamah a teeng dingin pai kei un,’ ci-in a gen dingin nang hong sawl lo hi." 
Jeremiah43:3 Neriahʼ tapa Baruk in Babylon miteʼ khut sungah kote hong pia nuamin, hong kithah nading ahih kei leh Babylon ah saltang dingin hong kilak theih nading deih ahih manin ko a hong langpang dingin nang a hong zang ahi zaw hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:4 Tua ahih manin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le galkap maangte khempeuh a kipan mi khempeuh in Judah gamah om suakna ding Topaʼ thugenna a mang kei uh hi. 
Jeremiah43:5 Tua ciangin Kareahʼ tapa Johanan le galkap maangte khempeuh in, a kihawlkhiatna uh gam khempeuh panin a hong ciahkik mite le Judah gamah a om lai sunteng Egypt gamah a paipih uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:6 Papi, nupi, naupang, kumpipaʼ tanute a kipan kumpi cing galkap maang Nebuzaradan in Ahikamʼ tapa, Shafanʼ tupa ahi Gedaliahʼ kep dingin a nusiat mi khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Neriahʼ tapa Baruk le kei zong a hong kipaipih hi." 
Jeremiah43:7 Amaute in Topaʼ thu mang lo uh a, Egypt gamah pai-in Tahpanhes khua dong kitung hi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Tua ciangin Tahpanhes khua ah Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Suangtum gol pawl khat la inla, Tahpanhes khua Faro kumpi inn lutna suangphah nuai ah phum in. Na phum lam Judah mi khempeuh musak in." 
Jeremiah43:10 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: En un, keimah in ka nasem pa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar ka la dinga, hih ka suang phumte tungah ama kumpi tokhom hong phut dinga, tuate tungah a kumpi puanbuk a lam ding hi." 
Jeremiah43:11 Amah hong pai-in Egypt gam hong sim gawp dinga, pulnatna tawh a si ding mite pulnatna tawh si-in, sal a mat dingte salin kimanin, namsau a si ding mite namsau tawh kithat ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah43:12 Egypt pasian-te a kibiakna biakinnte hal dinga, a pasian-te uh halin a pua khia ding hi. Tuucingte in a puan tung uh a om khahte paai-in a siansak uh bangin amah in Egypt gam siangsak dinga, tua khit ciangin ngaihmuang takin a ciahkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah43:13 Amah in Egypt gam Heliopolis khua-a mual suangte susia dinga, Egypt pasian-te a kibiakna innte mei tawh a halsak ding hi, ci hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:1 Egypt gam Migdol khua, Tahpanhes khua, Memfis khua le leitaw lam a teng Jew mite tawh kisai-in Topa in thu hong gen a," 
Jeremiah44:2 “Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah: Note in Jerusalem khua le Judah gam khuapi khempeuh tungah ka tunsak gimna na mu zo uh hi. En un, tu ni-in tua khuate a sia sa mahin om lai a, kuamah teeng lo hi." 
Jeremiah44:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka heh nadingin gitlohna bawl uh a, amaute a kipan note le na pu na pate un a theih ngei loh uh pasian-teʼ na semin paknamtui halin a bia uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ahih hangin note kiangah ka nasem kamsangte khempeuh kong sawl a, ‘Ka muhdah hih a kihhuai na na gamta nawn kei un,’ ci-in kong gensak tawntung hi." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ahih hangin amaute in ka thu hong ngai loin a bil uh hong ngat lo uh a, a gitlohna uh panin kihei loin, pasian dangte kiangah paknamtui hal veve uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:6 Tua ahih manin Judah gam khuapite sung le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah ka hehna le ka thangpaihna ka bua a, ka kuangsak hi. Tu ni-a na muh uh bangin tuate kisia-in gamlak suak khinta hi." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Tu-in Vanglian Topa Pasian, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah: Bang hangin note in hih bangin noteʼ siat nadingin mawhna lianpi bawl na hi uh hiam? Judah gam sungah papi, nupi, naupang le naungek a kipan a nungta lai kuamah om nawn kei hen, cih na deihna uh ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Note si-in, leitung a minam dang khempeuhte in hamsiatna-in a hong zat ding uh le hong simmawh nadingun bang hangin na khut uh tawh milim bawlin, na ten nadingun na zuat uh Egypt gamah pasian dangteʼ kiangah paknamtui halin kei hong hehsak na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Judah gam le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah na pute na pate uhʼ gitlohna, Judah kumpiteʼ gitlohna, a zite uhʼ gitlohna, note mahmahʼ gitlohna le na zite uhʼ gitlohnate mangngilh khin na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Tu ni ciang dong note na kiniamkhiat kei uh a, kei hong zahtak loin, note le na pute na pate uh tungah kong piak ka thukhamte le ka ngeinate na zui kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong genin ah: En un, note a susia dingin na lang khat uh ah kei ka dinga, Judah gam khempeuh ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah44:12 Egypt gamah a teeng dingin a lungsim a khensat khin Judah mi a omlaite, a vekpi-un ka sisak khin ding hi. Egypt gamah namsau tawh kithat sakin kial tawh ka puksisak ding hi. A neu pen a kipan a gol pen dongin namsau le kialpi tawh a si ding uh a, miteʼ lipkhap, mite in kihamsiatna-in a zat leh miteʼ simmawh ka suaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem khua ka siatsak bangin Egypt gam a teeng mite namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh sihna ka thuaksak dinga," 
Jeremiah44:14 Egypt gamah pai-in a teeng Judah mi a omlaite in a zuatkik nop uh ahi Judah gamah ciahkik thei nawn loin, khat beek suakta loin, zong a nungta suak kei ding uh hi. Galtai pawl khat longal khat beek a suakta kei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:15 Tua ciangin a zite un pasian dangte kiangah paknamtui a hal lam a thei papi khempeuh le tua lai ah a ding nupi khempeuh a kipan Egypt gam leitaw lamah a teeng mi khempeuh, a vekpi-in mi tampi tak in kei kiangah," 
Jeremiah44:16 “ Topaʼ mina nong gen thute kong mang kei ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ahih hangin ka ciam sa uh bangin kote, ka pute ka pate, ka kumpite uh le kumpi uliante in Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah ka hih ngei uh bangin vantung kumpinu kiangah paknamtui halin tui dawn biakna ka hih zaw ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka tua cih uh ciangin an tampi ka nei uh a, hau-in gimna zong ka thuak kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ahih hangin vantung kumpinu kiangah paknamtui halna le tui dawn biakna ka hih nawn loh uh a kipan bangmah ka nei nawn kei uh a, namsau le kial in hong that lum zawsop hi,” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:19 Nupite in zong, “Vantung kumpinuʼ lim a sun dingin moh bawlin paknamtui halna le tui dawn biakna ka bawl uh ciangin ka pasalte uhʼ thukim lohpi-in a bawl ka hi zenzen uh hiam?” a hong ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:20 Tua ciangin tua bangin a hong dawngkik papi, nupi a kipan mi khempeuhte kiangah," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Judah gam khuapite le Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah note, na pute na pate uh, na kumpite uh le na kumpi uliante uh a kipan gam sung mi khempeuh in paknamtui halna na bawl uh ciangin Topa in tua pen a phawk lo sa na hi uh hiam? A ngaihsun lo sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Topa in na hoih lohnate uh le na bawl uh kihhuainate hangin note hong thuak zo nawn lo hi. Tua ahih manin tu ni mahmah in zong na gam uh gamlak suak khin a, miteʼ kihamsiatna suakin kuamah teeng nawn lo hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Note in paknamtui halin, Topaʼ tungah mawh tham loin, Topaʼ thu mang loin ama thukhamte, a ngeinate le a hong thupiakte zui lo na hih manun tu ni mahmah in zong hih gimna note tungah hong tung ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah44:24 Tua ciangin mi khempeuhte kiang le a diakdiakin nupi khempeuhte kiangah, “ Topaʼ kammal ngai dih un. Egypt gamah a om no Judah mite khempeuh aw," 
Jeremiah44:25 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in hong genin ah: Note le na zite un na khut bek uh tawh na sep uh hi loin na kam mahmah uh tawh, ‘Vantung kumpinuʼ tungah paknamtui hal ding le tui dawn biakna piak dingin ka kiciamnasa uh bangin ka sem taktak ding uh hi,’ ci-in na gen khinzo uh hi. Tua ahihleh na kiciamna uh kipsak ta unla, na kiciamna uh bangin sem dih un!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Ahih hangin Egypt gamah a om no Judah mite aw, Topaʼ thugenna hong ngai un. En un, Topa in kong cih in ah, Egypt gamah a om Judah mi khat beek in, ‘ Topa a nuntak bangin,’ ci-in ka min zangin a kiciam nawn loh nadingun ka min lianpi tawh ka kiciam khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah44:27 En un, amaute tungah hoihna tung loin siatna a tun nadingin keimah in ka bawl ding hi. Egypt gamah a om Judah mi khempeuh namsau le kialpi tawh si ding uh a, khat beek a suakta kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:28 Namsau tawh thahna a thuak kha lo mi tawmkhate, Egypt gam panin Judah gamah hong ciahkik ding uh a, Egypt gamah a teeng dingin a pai a nungta lai sunte in keiʼ kammal le amauʼ kammal koi zaw a manin tung, cih a thei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah44:29 Noteʼ siat nading ka gen sa thute a hong tung takpi ding ahihna thu na theih nadingun Topa in kong cih in ah, note tungah hih lim kong pia dinga, hih munah note kong thuaksak ding hi:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Topa in kong genin ah: ‘En un, Judah kumpi Zedekiah, a galpa ahi amah a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ khut sungah ka piak mah bangin Egypt kumpipa Faro Hofra, a galteʼ khut sung, amah a that nuam miteʼ khut sungah ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ka ci thuah lai hi." 
Jeremiah45:1 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suah zawh kum li a cin ciangin Neriahʼ tapa Baruk in laibu khat sungah keima gen bangbang a gelh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Baruk kiangah," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Baruk aw, Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in nang hong hopih hi." 
Jeremiah45:3 Nangmah in, ‘Gimna thuak ing! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ka dahna le ka natna hong behlap hi. Ka tautauna-in ka gim khinzo a, ka tawlnga thei kei hi,’ na ci hi." 
Jeremiah45:4 “ Topa in nang tungah hih bang a gen dingin hong sawl hi: En in, keimah in ka lam sate ka phelkik a, ka phuh sate ka bot khiakik hi. Keimah in leitung buppi tua bangin ka hih ding hi." 
Jeremiah45:5 Tua sung panin nang a peng thei tuam dingin kingaihsun na hi hiam? Tua bangin kingaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh en in, Topa in kong cih in ah, mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Ahih hangin nang pen na paina mun khempeuh ah kong suaktasak liailiai ding hi, ci hi,” ka ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:1 Gamdangteʼ thu tawh kisai-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah46:2 Josiahʼ tapa Jehoiakim, Judah gamah kumpi a suah zawh kum li a phak hunin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Eufratis gun gei Karkhemish khua ah Egypt kumpipa Faro Neko simin a zo hi. Egypt kumpipaʼ galkapte tawh kisai-in hih bangin a hong gen hi:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Na lumte uh la unla galsim dingin kuan khia un! 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakol vante vawh unla, tuang ta un, sakol galkapte aw. Na sik lukhute uh khu unla, na teipite uh tat hiamin, na sik puante uh silh un." 
Jeremiah46:5 “A bangci mawk ahi hiam? Amaute lungmangin a nungkik ta uh hi. A galkapte uh kilehhawl a, lau-in tai keek mang mawk uh hi. Kinunglehheikik lo uh hi; mun khempeuh ah launa vive!" 
Jeremiah46:6 A manlang pente zong paikhia thei tuan lo uh a, galkapte zong suakta lo uh hi. Leilu lam Eufratis gun gei ah hoi-in a tuk uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nail gunpi bangin a hong khang, gun tuikhang a bang kua ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Nail gunpi bangin Egypt gam hong khang a, gun tuikhang hong bang hi. Amah in, kei ka khang dinga, leitung khempeuh ka tuam ding hi. Khuapite le a sunga teeng mite ka susia ding hi, a ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:9 Sakolte aw, mai nawt un; sakol leengte aw, hat un! Lum a tawi Ethiopia mite le Put mite aw, thal tawi a siam Lud mite aw, na galkapte uh kuansak un." 
Jeremiah46:10 “Bang hang hiam cih leh tu ni pen Vanglian Topa Pasianʼ ni hi a, phu a lakkik ni, a galte a thuk ni ahi hi. Namsau in amaute that dinga, a kham mateng a si uh a dawn ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa Pasian in Eufratis gun gei leilu lamah amaute biakna-in a nei hi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Egypt nungakte aw, Gilead gamah pai unla, damna zatui va la un. Zatui tampi na zat khit uh hangin damna na ngah tuan kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:12 Gamdangte in na zumhuaina uh hong za khin uh a, leitung bupah na kahna aw uh kiza hi. Na galkapte uh khatlekhat kiphu kha-in, a nihun a pukkhawm uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Egypt gam a sim dingin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzarʼ hong paina tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei kiangah a hong gen hi: 
Jeremiah46:14 “Egypt gam le Migdol khua ah va gen in. Memfis khua le Tahpanhes khua ah va taangko in: ‘Kiging sa le kithawi sa-in om un; bang hang hiam cih leh namsau tawh note hong kithat khin ding hi,’ va ci in." 
Jeremiah46:15 Bang hangin na bawngtal pasian uh Apis guallelin tai mang ahi hiam? Topa in amah a vattuk hang ahi hi. 
Jeremiah46:16 Na mite uh tampi tak hoi-in tuk uh a, amaute in khatlekhat kiangah, ‘Kithawi dih un; i mipihte kiang, i suahna gamah va ciahkik ni; tua hileh hih namsau tawh sihna pan i suakta ding hi,’ a kici uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:17 “Egypt kumpipa Faro, min thak khat pia unla, ‘Kam si bekin hun mawk beisak pa,’ ci ta un." 
Jeremiah46:18 Vanglian Topa keimah Kumpipa ka hi hi. Taber mual, mual khempeuh sangin sang zaw-in, Karmel mual, tuipi tungah sangpi-in a dawk toh bangin, no hong sim paʼ thahatna a lian mahmah ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:19 Egypt gamah a teengte aw, note salin a hong kipaipih cianga ding na puan lomte uh zial khol un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Memfis khua gamlak suak dinga, kisia gawpin, kuamah teeng lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egypt gam, bawngla hoih mahmah tawh a kibang hi. Leilu lam panin a hong leeng cippi in amah a pet hi." 
Jeremiah46:21 A galkap cialte nangawn amauteʼ lakah bawng no hat lote a bang lel uh hi. Pang loin, do tentan lo uh a, nungkikin a taikeek uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ kisiat ding ni, amauʼ gimthuak ding ni, hong tung zo hi." 
Jeremiah46:22 A galte uh hong kuan uh ahih manin Egypt mite gul tai bangin zut khat a kisuah uh hi. A galte uh sing phuk bangin hei tawh hong kuan uh hi. 
Jeremiah46:23 Gam pha lua-in a kiphut zawh loh hangin a galte un a singte uh a phuk maisak teitei ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute kauphe sangin tam zaw uh a, sim zawh loh zahin a tam uh hi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Egypt nungakte a maizum ding uh hi. Leilu lam panin a hong pai miteʼ khut sungah amaute a kipia ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah46:25 Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in, “En un: Keimah in Thebes khua-a Amon pasian le Faro kumpipa a kipan a pasian-te uh le a kumpite uh, Egypt kumpipa le amah a muang mi khempeuh tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:26 Amaute a that nuam Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar le a ulianteʼ khut sungah amaute ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Topa in kong cih in ah, nidang lai bangin Egypt gamah mi a tengkik ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ahih hangin lau kei un, ka nasem pa Jakobʼ suante aw. Patau kei un, Israel mite aw. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamlapi panin note kong hon khia dinga, na suanlekhakte uh saltanna gam panin kong hon khia ding hi. Jakobʼ suante hong ciahkik ding uh a, nuam takin a om ding uh hi. Kuamah in amaute a lausak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah46:28 Topa in kong cih in ah, ka nasem Jakobʼ suante aw, lau kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kong ompih hi. Note ka hong thehthangna gamte khempeuh ka susia khin dinga, ahih hangin note kong susia khin kei ding hi. A kilawm zahin kong thuhilh dinga, gim pia loin kong mawk koih kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah47:1 Faro kumpipa in Gaza khua a sim ma-in Filistia mite tawh kisai-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah47:2 Topa in a hong genin ah, “En un, leilu lam panin tui hong khang dinga, hong let khia-in hong luang ding hi. Gam sung le gam sunga om khempeuh hong tum dinga, khuapi le a sunga teeng khempeuh hong tum ding hi. Mite kiko ding uh a, gam sunga om mi khempeuh a kap ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Sakol khegingte za-in, sakol leeng gingte le a pei kigawite a zak uh ciangin, a khut uh zaw lua ta ahih manin pate in a tate uh a don zo nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:4 Filistia mi khempeuh kisia-in, Taia le Sidon panin huhnate khaktanin, suksiat ding ni hong tung ta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah in Filistia mite le Kaftor tuipi gei ah a omlaite ka susia ding hi." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza khuate maizum ta uh a, Ashkelon khua kisia ta hi. Aw, no Anak mi a omlaite aw, bang tanvei no le no kisu liam ding na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Note in, ‘ Topaʼ namsau aw, tawlnga nai lo ding na hi hiam? Na paai sungah lutkik inla, taang loin khawl dide in,’ na ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah47:7 Topa in ka sawl nakleh bangci-in khawl dide thei ding ahi hiam? Ashkelon khua le tuipi geiteng a sim dingin ka sawl sa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in a genin ah: “Nebo mite in gimna a thuak ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a gam uh a kisia ding hi. Kiriathaim khua kila khinzo a, a kulhpite uh cim khinta hi. A mite in maizumna thuak uh a," 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab gam a minthanna bei ta hi. Heshbon khua ah a galte un a simna ding uh vaihawm uh a, ‘Hong pai un, Moab gam i beisak mang ding hi,’ a ci uh hi. Madmen khua aw, nang zong na gamdai ta ding hi. Namsau in nang hong nung delh ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ngai dih un! Horonaim khua ah mi kiko a, ‘Ngongtatna le siatna lianpi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:4 “Moab gam kisusia khinta a, a kahna aw uh Zoar khua dongin a kiza hi." 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith mual kah tohna lampi ah a paikawmun a kap uh hi. Horonaim khua ah a tuah suk laitakun khuapi siatna hangin a kikona aw uh a za uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Tai un! Na suahtak nadingun tai un! Sehnel gam a gamlak late bangin tai mang un!’ a ci uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:7 “Na hatnate uh le na neihsate uh na suan manun note zong hong kipaikhiat pih ding hi. Na pasian uh Khemosh zong a siampi teng le a ulian teng tawh, kipaikhiat pih ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khua khempeuh kisia khin dinga, khat beek a suakta kei ding hi. Topa in ka gen sa bangin mualkuam le zangleite a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Moab mite a leenkhiat theih nadingun a kha ding uh pia un. A khuapite uh gamlak suak dinga, kuamah a teeng kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:10 “ Topaʼ na citakin a sem lopa in kamsiatna thuak tahen. Thah nadingin a namsau a dok lopa in hamsiatna thuak tahen. 
Jeremiah48:11 Moab gam a neu lai a kipanin nuam takin a om den ahi hi. Gam dangah kipaikhiat pih ngei lo a, thawl khat pan thawl khat ah a kitei kawikawi leenggahzu tawh kibang lo hi. A limna kilamdang ngei lo a, a gimnam zong kikheel ngei lo hi." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, Moab mite leenggahzu buak bangin a bua khia ding mi kong paisak hun hong tung ding hi. Amaute in a thawl a hawm dong bung khia-in, tua khit ciangin a thawl sukham zan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:13 Tua ciangin Israel mite, a muan uh Bethel pasian in a maizumsak mah bangin Moab mite, a biak uh Khemosh pasian in a maizumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:14 Note in bang hangin, ‘Galhangte ka hi uh a, galsim hatte ka hi uh hi,’ ci thei na hi uh hiam?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab gam le a khuapite a susia ding pa hong pai to ta hi. A tangval hoih pente uh thah lup dingin kipaipih khinzo hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa a kici keimah Kumpipa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah48:16 Moab gam a kisiat ding sawt nawn lo a, a gimna ding hong nai ta hi." 
Jeremiah48:17 “A kiim a teengte le a min a thei mite aw, Moab gam kah un. ‘A minthanna bei khinta a, a vangliatna kumpi ciangkhut kitan ta hi,’ ci un." 
Jeremiah48:18 Dibon khua-a teeng mite aw, na minthanna uh mun sang panin hong kum suk unla, leivui lakah hong tu un! Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab hong sim dingte hong pai ta a, na kulhte uh hong suksiatsak zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aroer khua-a teeng mite aw, lam gei ah dingin na en un! A hong galtai numei le pasalte kiangah, ‘Bang thu piang ahi hiam?’ ci-in dong un." 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab gam kisia khinzo a, zumhuaina thuak khinzo hi. Thum unla kah un! Arnon gun dungah, Moab gam kisiatna thu va gen un." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Pasianʼ thukhenna, mual tung gam teng le Holon khua, Jahzah khua, Mefaath khua," 
Jeremiah48:22 Dibon khua, Nebo khua, Beth-diblathaim khua," 
Jeremiah48:23 Kiriathaim khua, Beth-gamul khua, Beth-meon khua," 
Jeremiah48:24 Kerioth khua le Bozrah khua a kipan Moab gam sung a gamla, a nai-a om khuapi khempeuh ah hong tung zo hi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Topa in kong cih in ah, Moab gamʼ hatna teng bei khinta hi. A hatna le a vangliatna teng kisuksiatsak hi." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Moab, zu khamsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa langpangin kiliansak hi. Tua ahih manin ama luak mahah amah bual dinga, mi khempeuh in awi-in a nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:27 Moab aw, nang zong Israel mite nuihsan hi lo na hi hiam? Ama thu na gen simin lungdamin na lu na sinsin, amah guta sa na hi hiam?" 
Jeremiah48:28 Moab gam a teeng mite aw, khuapite nusia unla, kawl lakah teeng un! Keen pangah vakhu bu bawl bangin va om un." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moabʼ kiphatsakna ka za khinzo a, kiphasak pha mahmah hi. Kiliansakin kisathei a, kuamah thusim loin mite a neu-et hi." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ama hehna ka thei a, a kisialhna teng zuaupi hi-in, a sepna teng zong zuaupi mah ahi hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:31 Tua ahih manin Moab adingin ka tau hi. Moab gam mi khempeuh adingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua adingin zong ka thum hi." 
Jeremiah48:32 Sibmah khua aw, Jazer khua ading sangin nang adingin ka nak kah zaw hi. Nang pen leenggah gui zaam bangin na hiangte in tuipi kantan a, Jazer khua dongah na zaam suak hi. Na khuakhal ante le na leenggahte hong kisuksiatsak ta hi." 
Jeremiah48:33 Leihoih mahmah Moab gamah lungdamna le kipahna a bei ta hi. Leenggah cilna panin leenggahzu ka luang khiasak nawn kei a, leenggah cilin lungdamin kuamah a kiko nawn kei a, a kikona uh lungdam kikona hi lo hi." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Heshbon khua panin Elealeh khua le Jahaz dongah, Zoar khua panin Horonaim khua le Eglath-shelishiah khua dongah miteʼ kahna aw kiza hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Nimrim tui nangawn keu ta a, kisusia ta hi." 
Jeremiah48:35 Moab gam mual sang tungah biakna pia a, milim pasian-te tungah paknamtui a hal mite, Topa in kong cih in ah, tua bang ka hihsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:36 Tua ahih manin Moab adingin ka kap a, Kirheres khua mite adingin misi vuina tamngai kitum bangin ka kap khia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a neih a lam khempeuh uh kisia mang khinta hi." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Mi khempeuh in a lu uh mettol uh a, a khamul uh kiat siang uh hi. A khutte uh kuikek uh a, a kawng uh ah puanhampi a teeng uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab gam innkhum khempeuh le lam lianpi khempeuh ah kahna bekbek a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, leibeel suk tap bangin Moab gam ka su tam a, kuamah in phamawh a sa kei hi." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moab gam kitam ta! A mite kap! Maizumin hong nungngat ta! Tua ahih manin amah pen miteʼ nuihsat ding le lipkhap ding a suak zo hi. 
Jeremiah48:40 Topa in kong cih in ah: En in, muvanlai leeng bangin manlang takin gam khat hong leeng dinga, Moab gam a sim dingin a kha hong zal ding hi." 
Jeremiah48:41 A khuapite kila-in a kulhpite zong kila ding hi. Tua ni ciangin Moab galkapte nupi nausuak ding bangin a lau ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab kisusia dinga, a minamin a om nawn kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa demin a kiliansak uh hi." 
Jeremiah48:43 Moab gam a teeng mite aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, launa, dum le thangte in note hong pang!" 
Jeremiah48:44 Lauhuaina pan a taisim mite dum sungah a kia ding hi. Dum sung panin a hong kah khiato mite, thang ah a awk veve ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gim ka piak ni-in hih thute ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah48:45 A bah gawp galtaite in Heshbon khua hong beel uh hi. Ahih hangin Sihon kumpipa a maanna ngei Heshbon khua panin meikuang hong kipan khia veve hi. Gal a sim nuam miteʼ teenna Moab gam, a gam mong dongin mual sangte zong a kaang tum hi." 
Jeremiah48:46 Moab aw, gimna na thuak ding hi. Khemosh pasian a bia mite si khinta uh hi. Na tapate uh sal dingin kipaipih khin a, na tanute uh zong thong kia dingin kipaipih hi." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, nidang ciangin Moab gam a ngei bangsakin ka hausakkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Moab tungah thukhenna tu-a zah ahi hi." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ammon mite tawh kisai-in Topa in a genin ah: “Israel mite in tapa nei lo ahi uh hiam? Innluah ding nei lo ahi uh hiam? Bang hangin Milkom pasian biate in Gad gam la-in a khuapite sungah teng ahi uh hiam? 
Jeremiah49:2 Tua ahih manin, Topa in kong cih in ah, Ammon gam Rabbah khua kisimin, galdona aw a kizak hun ka tungsak ding hi. Tua khuapi kisusia mang dinga, a khuaneute a kihal tum ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa in kong cih in ah, Israel mite in a gam uh a laksakteʼ kiang panin a gam uh a ngahkik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:3 Heshbon khua mite aw, kap un! Ai khua kisia khinta! Rabbah khua numeite aw, kap un! Puanhampi silh unla kap un. Khua lakah lung-amin kawi taitai un. Bang hang hiam cih leh na Milkom pasian uh le a siampite le a uliante hong kilak khiatsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:4 A citak lo mite aw, bang hangin na hatna uh kisaktheih pih na hi uh hiam? ‘Kua in eite hong sim zo ding ahi hiam?’ ci-in bang hangin na hauhna uh suang na hi uh hiam?"
