Jeremiah49:5 Vanglian Topa Pasian in kong genin ah, na kiim na pamte uh kiang panin note tungah gimna kong tungsak ding hi. Note hong kihawl khia dinga, mi khempeuh amau tum ciatin taikeek ding uh a, a hong kaikhawmkik ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Ahih hangin Topa in kong cih in ah, nidang ciangin Ammon mite a ngei bangsakin ka hausakkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom gam tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in a genin ah: “Teman gamah a pil om nawn lo ahi hiam? Thu ngaihsut siamte in ngaihsun thei nawn loin a pilna uh bei ta ahi hiam? 
Jeremiah49:8 Dedan gamah a teengte aw, kihei unla galtai un; guam sungah bu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gim ka piak ni ciangin Esauʼ suanlekhakte tungah siatna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Mite in leenggah a lawh uh ciangin a gui tungah tawm a nusia lai uh hi. Zanin gutate in na a guk uh ciangin a deih teng bek uh a gu uh hi. 
Jeremiah49:10 Ahih hangin Esauʼ suanlekhakte khempeuh ka guaksuaksak a, a bukna munte uh ka kilangkhiasak hi. Tua ahih manin a bu thei nawn kei uh hi. A tate uh, a sanggamte uh, le a veengte uh si khin uh a, khat beek a suakta kei hi." 
Jeremiah49:11 A tagah na tate uh ka kiangah hong koih un; keʼn amaute ka kem ding hi. Na meigong numeite uh zong kei hong muangsak un. 
Jeremiah49:12 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah: Gim a thuak dingin a kilawm lo mite nangawn in thuak veve uh ahihleh note in zong thuak loin om ding na hi uh hiam? Note in gim thuak loin na om kei ding uh a, na thuak veve ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cih in ah, Bozrah khua pen miteʼ lipkhap ding, zahpih ding, nusiat ding le kihamsiatna-in a zat ding uh a suak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:14 Topa kiang pan thu ka za a, gam khempeuh ah thugen dingin mi khat kisawl hi: “Hong kikaikhawm unla, Edom gam a sim dingin hong kithawi un." 
Jeremiah49:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in gamdangte sangin nang hong neusak zaw-in mite kong simmawhsak ding hi. 
Jeremiah49:16 Na kisaktheihna in nang hong khem a, na ngaihsut bangin mite in nang hong kihta lo hi. Suangkeen dawnah na teeng a, mual sang tungah na teeng hi. Muvanlai bu zahin sangpi-in na ten hangin tua lai mun panin kong la khia suk veve ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edom gam pen a mulkimhuai gam suak dinga, a kantan mi khempeuh in a siat gawpna hangin lamdang sa-in a mulkim ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:18 Topa in kong cih in ah, Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua le a kiim a khuate a kisiat gawp bangin, tua lai munah kuamah teeng lo dinga, kuamah a peem kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:19 En un, lo nona ah nuam takin a om tuute, Jordan gam tulak panin a hong pai to humpinelkai in a delh mang bangin, a gam uh nusia-in thakhat thu-in ka taisak mang dinga, a gam uh a uk dingin ka deih peuhpeuh ka seh ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei bang mi kua om ahi hiam? Keima to ahi ding kua om lai ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ka mai ah kua kumpi hong ding ngam ding ahi hiam? Tua ahih manin Edom miteʼ thuak ding le Teman gam a teeng miteʼ gim nadingin Topaʼ geelna le ngimnate ngai dih un. A ta ngeekte nangawn uh kikai khia ding hi. Mi khempeuh lau taktak ding uh hi. 
Jeremiah49:21 A pukna uh gin ngaih lua ahih manin leitung a kiliing ding hi. A kahna uh San Tuipi dongah kiza ding hi. 
Jeremiah49:22 En un, muvanlai bangin manlang takin galte hong leengin Bozrah khua a sim dingin tua khua tungah a kha hong zal ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin Edom galkapte pen nupi nausuak dingte bangin a lau ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damaskas khua tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in a genin ah: “Hamath khua le Arpad khuate in thusia za uh ahih manin lungmangin a om uh hi. Tuipi dai thei lo bangin a launa uh dai thei lo hi. 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaskas khua mite tha zaw mahmah uh a, a tai mang dingin a kithawi uh hi. Lungkhamna, dahna le launa in amaute lencip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin a om uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:25 Tua khuapi minthang, lungdamna khuapi, tu-in kinusia ta!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in kong cih in ah, tua ni ciangin khuapi laizang ah tangvalte si ding uh a, galkap khempeuh zong a kithat khin ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:27 Damaskas khua kulhpi mei tawh kihal dinga, Benhadad kumpipaʼ inn zong a kaang tum ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a zawh Kedar minamte le Hazor khua ukte tawh kisai-in Topa in a cih in ah: “Kisa un, Kedar mite va sim un! Nisuahna lamah a om amaute va that lum un!" 
Jeremiah49:29 A puanbukte uh le a tuuhonte uh a kipan a buk kongkhak puante uh le a nate khempeuh uh kilaksak ding hi. A kalaohte uh kipaikhiat pih dinga, ‘Mun khempeuh ah launa!’ ci-in a kiko ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah49:30 “Hazor khua ah a teeng mi khempeuhte aw, Topa in kong cih in ah, gamlapi ah tai mang unla, guam thuk sungah bu un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in note a hong langpang dingin geelna le ngimna a nei khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah49:31 Babylon kumpipa aw, tho in. Nuamtak, ngaihmuang takin a om gam va sim in. Tua khuapite in kongpi lah nei lo a, a kalhna sik tawn zong bangmah nei lo uh a, a tua ci om mawk uh ahi hi." 
Jeremiah49:32 “A kalaohte uh kisuh khiatsak dinga, a bawnghonte uh kilaksak mang ding hi. A sam uh a mettom amaute mun khempeuh ah ka kithehthangsak ding hi. Mun khempeuh panin amaute tungah siatna ka tungsak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:33 Hazor khua pen se-alteʼ teenna suak dinga, a tawntungin a kisia den khua a suak ding hi. Kuamah teeng lo dinga, tawmvei beek zong a va zin kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah49:34 Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah tungin Elam gam tawh kisai-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Jeremiah49:35 Vanglian Topa in a cih in ah: “En in, Elam gamʼ hatna bulpi ahi a thalpite ka kuaitan ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:36 Vantung mun li panin huihpi ka mut mangsak dinga, Elam gam panin ka hawl khiatte mun khempeuh ah kithehthangsakin a tun lohna uh gam khat beek ka omsak kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:37 Amaute a that nuam, a galte uh mai ah Elam mite ka lausak ding hi. Amaute ka thah siang mateng namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:38 Topa in ka cih in ah, Elam gamah a kumpipa uh le kumpi uliante thatin ka kumpi tokhom ka phut ding hi." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Ahih hangin nidang ciangin Elam gam nidang a a ngei bangin omsakin ka hausakkik ding hi, Topa in ka ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:1 Khaldea miteʼ gam sungah a om Babylon khuapi tawh kisai-in Topa in hih bangin kei tungah a hong gen hi: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Gam khempeuh ah genin taangko unla, dial khai unla im kei un. ‘Babylon khuapi kia ta hi. Bel pasian maizum ta a, Merodak pasian kitan gawp ta hi. A milimte uh maizum ta a, a pasian-te uh kisia gawp ta hi,’ ci-in taangko un." 
Jeremiah50:3 “Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin Babylon gam a sim ding le gamlak a suaksak dingin gam khat hong pai ding hi. Gam sungah kuamah teeng lo dinga, a mihing a ganhingin a tai mang ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:4 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, tua ni tua hun ciangin Israel mite le Judah mite kap kawmin hong pai khawm ding uh a, Topa a Pasian uh hong zong ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:5 Zion khua lampi a dong ding uh a, tua khua lam maingatin, ‘Hong pai un. A kimangngilh ngei nawn lo ding tawntung thuciamna khat Topaʼ tungah ciam khawm dih ni,’ a ci ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Ka mite tuu mangthang bang a hi khin uh hi. Makai tuucingte in mual tung tengah lam khialin a gam man pih uh hi. Mual khat panin mual khat ah a pai kawikawi uh a, a giahna inn uh a thei nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:7 Amau a mute in na ne gawp uh hi. A galte un, ‘Ko bangmah khialhna ka nei kei uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pute a pate un a muan leh a lametna uh Topaʼ tungah amaute a khial uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:8 “Israel mite aw, Babylon khuapi pan tai khia un. Khaldea gam panin paikhia un. Keel hon lak a keeltal bangin a paikhia masa ding kituh un." 
Jeremiah50:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, keimah in leilu lam panin gam pawl khat ka hanthawn dinga, Babylon ka simsak ding hi. Amaute in Babylon khua kimkot ah gal pangin tua khua a la ding uh hi. Galkap siamteʼ lot bangin a thaltangte un khak loh a nei kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:10 Khaldea gam kiluh gawp dinga, Topa in kong cih in ah, a luh khempeuh in a lungkim dong uh a la ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Babylon mite aw, note in keima gamh Israel mite na luh gawp uh hi. Lungdamin kipakin, lopa kham bawng no bangin omin sakol bangin na ham uh hangin," 
Jeremiah50:12 na nu uh Babylon khuapi maizum dinga, noteʼ pianna na nu uh a mindai ding hi. En un, na gam uh gam khempeuh lakah a gina lo pen hi dinga, lei keu, gamlak, sehnel gam a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Topaʼ hehna hangin kuamah teeng lo dinga, gamlakpi a suak ding hi. Babylon khua a kantan mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in khuapi siatna hangin zahko-in a phitsan ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:14 “No thal tawite khempeuh aw, Babylon khua a sim dingin a kimkot ah gal pang un. Thaltang khat beek siit loin kap un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ tungah a khial zo uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:15 Khuapi a sim dingin a kimkot ah awng un. Babylon khuapi in note hong lel khinzo hi. A galdalte uh cim khin a, a kulhte uh puk khinta hi. Hih pen Topaʼ phulakna ahih manin, amauʼ tungah phu la un. Midangte tungah a bawl bangin amauʼ tungah zong bawl un." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babylon khua ah khaici tuhte that lum unla, an la dingin phiaukawi a tawite beisak un. Galteʼ namsau kihta-in mi khempeuh in a mipihteʼ lak mah uh zuankik ciatin a gam mah uh ah a taikik ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israel mite, humpinelkai in a delh mang tuu tawh a kibang uh hi. A masa-in Assiria kumpipa in ne a, tu-in a tawpna ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a guh dongin a teeptum hi." 
Jeremiah50:18 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa, Israel miteʼ Pasian in kong cih in ah: En un, Assiria kumpipa gim ka piak bangmahin Babylon kumpipa le a gam ka thuaksak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:19 Israel mite a omnasa mun mahah ka omsakkik dinga, Karmel le Bashan mual, Efraim mual le Gilead mualah a piang ante lungkim takin a ne ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Tua ni hun ciangin, Topa in kong cih in ah, Israel gamah khialhna kizong dinga, a kimu kei ding hi. Judah gamah mawhna kizong dinga, a kimu tuan kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntaksak, ka nusiat lai mite a mawhna uh ka maisak ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Merathaim gam a sim dingin pai unla, Pekod mite zong va sim un. That unla a vekpi-in su mang un, Topa in kong ci hi. Kong sawl khempeuh hih un." 
Jeremiah50:22 Gam sungah galsimna aw kiza a, na tampi kisia hi." 
Jeremiah50:23 Leitung khempeuh sekpi bangin a satkham Babylon khuapi, tu-in tua sekpi kitanin kitam ta hi. Gamdangteʼ lakah tu-in Babylon khuapi a mulkimhuai a suakta hi." 
Jeremiah50:24 Babylon khua aw, nang thang kong siah a, thei lo na hih manin na awk pah hi. Topa langpang na hih manin nang hong kimu-in hong kiman hi." 
Jeremiah50:25 Topa in a galhiam koihna hong khia zo a, a hehna galhiamte a la khia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon gamah Vanglian Topa Pasian in sep ding khat a nei hi." 
Jeremiah50:26 Mun khempeuh panin hong sim unla, a ansal uh honsak un. An cian bangin amaute ciang un. A vekpi-in susia unla, bangmah nusiat kei un." 
Jeremiah50:27 A galkap hangte khempeuh uh thahsak un. Amaute in gimna thuak ding uh a, a thuak ni ding uh hong tung zo ta!”" 
Jeremiah50:28 (Ngai dih un. Topa i Pasianʼ thuhkikna, ama biakinnpi hangin a phulakna thu Zion khua ah a taangko dingin Babylon gam panin ka mite suakta-in a tai uh hi.)" 
Jeremiah50:29 “Babylon khua a sim dingin thalkap siam, thaltawi theite va sam un. Khuapi umcih unla, kuamah suaktasak kei un. Ama hihna tawh kituakin ama tungah hih un. Ama hih ngei bangmahin ama tungah bawl un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah kisathei-in Topa ahi, Israel miteʼ Siangtho Pa a simmawh hi." 
Jeremiah50:30 Tua ahih manin khua sung laizang ah a tangvalte uh si ding uh hi. Tua ni ciangin a galkapte uh a bei mangkhin ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah50:31 En in, a Vanglian Topa Pasian in kong cih in ah: Nang a kisathei Babylon aw, nang kong langpan hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang gim kong piak hun ding na ni hong tung zo ta hi." 
Jeremiah50:32 A kisathei gam hoi-in tuk dinga, kuamah in a phong to kei ding hi. A khuapite mei tawh ka hal dinga, a kiim a om khempeuh a kaang tum ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:33 “Vanglian Topa in kong genin ah: Israel mite le Judah mite in netniamna thuak uh a, sal dingin a paipih mite in lencipin a ciahsakkik nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:34 Ahih hangin amaute a hon khia pa hat mahmah a, Vanglian Topa kici hi. Amah in leitungah kilemna a omna ding le Babylon mite in gimna a ngah nadingin, amaute adingin a sem ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:35 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, Khaldea gam mite, Babylon khua ah a teengte, a kumpi uliante le a mipilte namsau tawh kithat tahen!" 
Jeremiah50:36 Kamsang zuau mihaite namsau tawh kithat tahen! A meidawi a galkapte namsau tawh kithat tahen! 
Jeremiah50:37 Sakolte le sakol leengte, numei tawh a kibang lel a galkap cialte uh, namsau tawh kithat tahen! A sum a pai khempeuh uh, kituah mang tahen!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Guah zu kei henla, a gunte uh kang tahen! Bang hang hiam cih leh milim biakna gam hi a, milimte a hai lawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Tua ahih manin gamsate le se-alte Babylon khua ah teeng ding uh a, vasa-kalaohte zong a teeng ding uh hi. A khang a khangin, a tawntungin mi kuamah a teeng ngei nawn kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:40 Topa in kong cih in ah, Sodom khua, Gomorrah khua le a kiim a khuate, Pasian in a suksiat bangin tua lai ah kuamah a teeng kei dinga, kuamah zong a va baang pak beek kei ding hi." 
Jeremiah50:41 “En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, gam lian khat le kumpi tampi leimong gamla pek panin galsim dingin kithawithawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:42 A thal uh le a teipi uh tawi uh a, gilo mahmah in hehpihna lungsim nei lo uh hi. A husa uh tuipi ging bang a, sakol tungah tuang uh hi. Babylon mite aw, note a hong sim gawp dingin hong kithawi uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:43 Babylon kumpipa in tua thu za khinzo a, bangmah a cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamin lumcip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na a sa hi." 
Jeremiah50:44 “En un, lo nona ah nuam takin a om tuute, Jordan gam tulak panin a hong pai to humpinelkai in a delh mang bangin a gam uh nusia-in thakhat thu-in amaute ka taisak mang dinga, a gam uh a uk dingin ka deih peuhpeuh ka seh ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei bang mi kua om ahi hiam? Ka to ding kua om lai ahi hiam? Ka mai ah kua kumpi hong ding ngam ding ahi hiam?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Tua ahih manin Babylon khuapiʼ thuak ding le Khaldea gamʼ gim nadingin Topaʼ geelna le ngimnate ngai dih un. A ta ngeekte nangawn uh kikai khia takpi dinga, mi khempeuh a lau taktak ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah50:46 A pukna uh gin ngaih lua ahih manin leitung a kiliing ding hi. A kahna aw uh gam khempeuh ah a kiza ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:1 Topa in a cih in ah: “En un, Babylon khuapi le Khaldea mite a susia dingin keimah in huih ka nungsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:2 A zapsiang ding mi Babylon ah ka sawl dinga, amaute in tua gam a zapsiang ding uh hi. Gimna ni hong tun ciangin amah a sim dingin mun khempeuh panin hong pai ding uh a, gam sungah bangmah a omsak nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:3 Thaltawite a thal uh lawnsak man kei unla, sik puan silhte dingsak man kei un. A tangvalte uh maap kei unla, a galkap honpi khempeuh uh nuai mangkhin un." 
Jeremiah51:4 Khaldea gam kongzing lakah liam gawp ding uh a, a si ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel le Judah mite Israel miteʼ Siangtho Pa tungah a khialh uh hangin, amauteʼ Pasian, Vanglian Topa in amaute taisan nai lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:6 Babylon khuapi sung panin tai khia un. Mi khempeuh kisuahtak ciat un. Babylonʼ mawhna sihpih kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a mawhna bangun a thuak nadingun Topaʼ thuhkik hun ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:7 Babylon khuapi, Topaʼ khut sungah a om kham hai tawh kibang a, leitung buppi zu a khamsak hi. Gamdangte in a zu a dawn manun a hai khin uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:8 Thakhat thu-in Babylon puk a, kisia gawp hi. Ama adingin kap un. A liammate adingin zatui la un, dam zo kha thei lai ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:9 Ahi zongin midangte in, ‘Babylon khua i damsaknop hangin a dam zo ding hi nawn lo hi. Nusia ta unla, i gam ciat zuanin ciah ni. Ama tunga thukhenna in vantung dong ban khinta a, van dawn dong a pai to hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Keima mite in, ‘ Topa in thuman ihihna hong kilangkhiasak zo hi. Hong pai un, Topa Pasianʼ nasepna Zion khua ah va taangko ni,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:11 Thaltangte hiam un. Lumte la un. “ Topa in Babylon khua susia nuam ahih manin Media kumpite a hanthawn hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih pen a biakinnpi hangin Topaʼ thukkikna ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:12 Babylon khua kulhpi tungah dial khai unla, galvil ding tampi koih un. Cingsak unla, galte a buk sim dingin kithawi un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon khua mite tawh kisai-in Topa in a gen sa teng a geel khinzo a, a sem khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah51:13 Aw, tui tamna gei ah a teeng mite, sum a hau note aw, na hun uh bei ta a, na nuntakna khau uh kitat ta hi." 
Jeremiah51:14 Vanglian Topa in, ‘Kauphe zahin a tam mite kong simsak dinga, amaute in note hong zo-in a kiko ding uh hi,’ ci-in keima min tawh ka kiciam khinzo hi." 
Jeremiah51:15 “Pasian in ama vangliatna tawh leitung bawl a, ama pilna tawh leitung piangsakin, ama siamna tawh vantung a zal hi." 
Jeremiah51:16 Amah a pau ciangin vantungah tuite ging huhu a, leimong panin tui khu a suaksak hi. Guah zuk nadingin khua phiasak a, a saal sung panin huih a nungsak hi." 
Jeremiah51:17 Mi khempeuh hai-in pilna nei lo hi khin uh a, kham seekte khempeuh in a milim uh a maizumlawh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a milim uh zuau hi lel a, nak thei lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:18 Kimanna a nei lo, a haihuaipi hi a, gim a kipiak ni ciangin a kisia ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakobʼ Pasian tua bang hi lo a, na khempeuh a piangsak pa ahi hi. Ama adingin Israel mite teel a, ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Babylon aw, nang pen ka sekpi le ka galhiam na hi a, nang hong zangin gamdangte ka satnen a, kumpi gamte ka susia hi." 
Jeremiah51:21 Nang hong zangin sakolte le a tunga a tuangte, sakol leengte le a hawlte," 
Jeremiah51:22 papite le nupite, khanghamte le khangnote, tangvalte le nungakte," 
Jeremiah51:23 tuucingte le a tuute, lokhote le a tute, kumpite le ukpite ka satnen hi." 
Jeremiah51:24 “ Topa in kong cih in ah, Babylon khua le Khaldea gamah a teengte khempeuh in Zion khua ah siatna a bawl manun noteʼ muhna ah ka thuk ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:25 “En in, mualpi bangin lian a, leitung khempeuh a susia zo Babylon aw, nang kong langpan hi, Topa in kong ci hi. Keimah in nangʼ lang khat ah ka khut ka zan dinga, mual dawn panin nang hong khuk khia-in, kong kaang tumsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:26 Na suangte innkiu suangin a kiciang kei dinga, inn bul suang nuaiphahin a kizang kei ding hi. A tawntungin gam simtham na suak ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Gal a sim dingin leitung bup thu pia unla, gamdangte kiangah peengkul mut un. Amah a sim dingin kithawisak un; Ararat, Minni le Ashkenaz gamte simsak un. Makai khat teel unla, kauphe honpi zahin a tam sakolte va la un." 
Jeremiah51:28 Amah a sim dingin gamdangte kithawisak un. Media kumpipa, a makaite, le a ukna gam khempeuh kithawisak un." 
Jeremiah51:29 Babylon gam in na sa-in, kitomin a liing hi; bang hang hiam cih leh ama tungah Topaʼ ngimna tangtung a, Babylon gam gam simtham suaksak a, kuamah a tengsak kei hi." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babylon galkapte in do nawn lo uh a, a phualpi uh ah a khawl uh hi. A tha uh om nawn lo a, numei tawh a kibang uh hi. A innte uh kihalsak a, a khua kongpi a kikalhna siktawnte a kitan hi." 
Jeremiah51:31 Babylon kumpipa kiangah thu a ko dingin a hong pai kamtaite a ciah leh a kuan kiphamat uh a, ‘Mun khempeuh panin galte in Babylon khua hong simin," 
Jeremiah51:32 gun-a ngahmun teng la khin mang uh a, galpanna teng mei tawh kihalin, galkapte lau mahmah uh hi,’ a ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:33 Vanglian Topa, Israel-teʼ Pasian in ka hong genin ah, Babylon mite tawl khat khit ciangin an lak bangin kila dinga, sual tunga ancil bangin a kicil gawp ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:34 “Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khua hong valh tumin, hong sukham gawp hi. Beel hawm bangin a hawmin hong koih a, gulpiʼ valh bangin hong nawmvalh hi. Ka neihsa a lim nono tawh amah kivak kham a, kei a hong hawl khia hi." 
Jeremiah51:35 Keiʼ tung le ka mipihte tungah hong kibawl ngongtatna Babylon mite tungah tung tahen, ci-in Zion khua ah a teengte in gen ta uh hen. Khaldea mite in ka thuakna teng thei tahen, ci-in Jerusalem khua in gen tahen." 
Jeremiah51:36 “Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cih in ah: En un, na thu uh ka hong sepsak dinga, note adingin ka hong thuksak ding hi. A bual ka keusak dinga, a ciktui ka kangsak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:37 Tua ciangin Babylon khuapi innsia losia suak gawp dinga, se-alteʼ teenna mun suakin, a lipkhaphuai, simmawhna tawh a kiphitsan, kuamah a ten lohna gam khing a suak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Babylon mite humpinelkai bangin a hawk khawm ding uh a, humpinelkai no bangin a ciak lualua ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:39 A duh mahmah laitakun amaute ka vak dinga, khua a phawk nawn loh dong uh zu ka khamsak ding hi. A tawntungin ihmu paisuak ding uh a, a khanglo nawn kei ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:40 Gawh dingin a kipaipih tuuno bangin ahi a, tuutal le keeltal bangin ahi zongin amaute ka paipih suk ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Leitung bup in a pahtawi Babylon khuapi kila ta hi. Gamdangteʼ lakah Babylon khua, a mulkimhuai a suakta hi." 
Jeremiah51:42 Babylon gamah tuipi hong kah to a, tuihual lauhuaite in a tum ta hi." 
Jeremiah51:43 A khuapite a mulkimhuai suak a, lei keuna sehnel gam a suak khinta hi. Gam sungah kuamah teeng lo a, kuamah in kantan ngei lo hi." 
Jeremiah51:44 Babylon khuateʼ pasian Bel zong gim ka pia dinga, a na guk sa teng ka lak khiatsakkik ding hi. Gamdangte in amah bia nuam nawn lo ding uh hi. Babylon khua kulhpi kicim khinta hi." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ka mite aw, amaute lak pan hong paikhia un. A lauhuai Topaʼ hehna panin mi khempeuh kisuahtak ciat un." 
Jeremiah51:46 Gam sungah kamdawn a kigen sawnte hangin lungkia kei un; lau kei un. Kum khatin thu khat kigen a, a kum kik ciangin thudang khat kigen lel hi. Gam sungah ngongtatna thu om a, kumpi khat le kumpi khat kidona thu kigen thei hi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Tua ahih manin en un, Babylon khua-a milimte gim ka piak hun hong tung ding hi. A gam buppi ka zumhuaisak dinga, khua sungah kithatin a tuk ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:48 Tua ciangin vantung, leitung, le a sunga om nate khempeuh in Babylonʼ hangin lungdamin la a sa ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin amaute a susia ding mi hong pai ding uh hi, Topa in kong ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babylon khua in leitung khempeuh ah mite a sihsak mah bangin tu-in amah in sihna a thuak ding hi. 
Jeremiah51:50 “Namsau in a hong thah khak loh a nungta lai note aw, pai un; dingding kei un. Gamlapi pek panin Topa hong phawk unla, Jerusalem khua zong mangngilh kei un." 
Jeremiah51:51 Note in, ‘Kote in maizumna ka thuak uh a, simmawhna kam ka za khin uh hi. Min siatna in ka maitang uh hong tuam khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ biakinn siangtho gamdang mite in a hong laksak uh hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:52 Tua ahih manin en un, Topa in kong cih in ah, Babylon khua ah a om a milimte uh tungah thu ka khen ni hun hong tung dinga, gam sung khempeuh ah a liamte a tau ding uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babylon khua vantungah kah to thei a, a sangpi ah kip takin galdalna a bawl thei ahi zongin, Topa in kong cih in ah, keiʼ kiang panin amah a suan khia ding mi a hong pai teitei ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Ngai un! Babylon khua ah mi kiko hi. Khaldea gam sung mite a kisuksiatna kahna awging ahi hi. 
Jeremiah51:55 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Babylon khua maimangsak a, a gamlumna zong a daisak hi. Galte, tuihual lum henhan bangin hong lut uh a, awng gawpin, a gamlum henhan uh hi." 
Jeremiah51:56 Babylon khua a susia ding mi khat hong pai khinzo hi. A galkapte uh kiman khin a, a thalte uh a tum a tel suak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a thukkik thei Pasian hi a, a thukkik taktak ding hi." 
Jeremiah51:57 A kumpi uliante le a mipilte uh a kipan ukpite, uliante le galkapte, zu ka khamsak dinga, a tawntungin ihmu-in a khanglo nawn kei ding uh hi, ci-in Vanglian Topa a kici kumpipa in kong gen hi." 
Jeremiah51:58 Vanglian Topa in ka hong genin ah: Babylon khua kulhpi sah mahmah in a muanhuai mahmah leilak ah cim suk dinga, a sang mahmah khua kongpite zong mei tawh kihal tum ding hi. Miteʼ nasepna a mawkna suak a, minamteʼ hanciamnate vutlevai a suak hi,” a ci hi." 
Jeremiah51:59 Neriahʼ tapa, Mahseiahʼ tupa Seraiah pen Zedekiah kumpipaʼ thuvaan pa ahi hi. Kumpi Zedekiah in Judah gamah a uk zawh kum li ciangin Seraiah le kumpipa Babylon ah a pai uh hi. Tua hun laitakin keimah in Seraiah thu ka vaikhak hi." 
Jeremiah51:60 Keimah in Babylon khua tawh kisai-in Babylon khua ah a tung ding gimna khempeuh laibu khat sungah ka gelh hi. 
Jeremiah51:61 Seraiah kiangah, “Babylon khua na tun ciangin hih thute khempeuh na sim dinga," 
Jeremiah51:62 tua khit ciangin, ‘ Topa aw, hih munah mihing hitaleh ganhing hitaleh bangmah teeng loin, a tawntungin a kinusia a suah nadingin na suksiatna ding na gen khinzo hi,’ ci-in thu ngen in." 
Jeremiah51:63 Hih laibu sunga thute miteʼ zakin na sim khit ciangin suang khat tawh hen khawm inla, Eufratis gun sungah paai in. Tua khit ciangin," 
Jeremiah51:64 ‘Babylon khuapiʼ gitlohna hangin a tungah gimna ka tungsak dinga, tu-a bangin Babylon khuapi zong tum sukin a hong dawkkik to nawn kei ding hi,’ ci-in gen in,” ka ci hi. Jeremiahʼ thugenna tu-a ciang ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiah kumpi a suahin kum sawm nih le kum khat pha a, Jerusalem khua ah kum sawm le kum khat sung a uk hi. A nuʼ min Hamutal hi a, Libnah khua-a teeng Jeremiahʼ tanu ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:2 Amah in kumpi Jehoiakim bangmahin Pasianʼ hoihsak lohte hong sem hi. 
Jeremiah52:3 Topa in Jerusalem khua mite le Judah gam mite ama kiang panin a hawl khiatna zah dong dingin a hehna a lian hi. Zedekiah in Babylon kumpipa langpan hi. 
Jeremiah52:4 Tua ciangin amah kumpi a suah zawh a kum kua kum, a kha sawmna, a ni sawm ni-in, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a galkap khempeuh tawh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin hong kuan uh a, khuapi kimkot ah galdalna a phut uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:5 Zedekiah in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum khat a phak dong khuapi a kisim hi. 
Jeremiah52:6 Tua kum a kha lina, a ni kua ni ciangin khuapi sungah kial nasia lua ahih manin, mite in annek ding a nei nawn kei uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:7 Tua ciangin khua kulhpi kiphu let a, khuapi kimkot ah Khaldea mite om napi-in, zan laitakin kumpipaʼ huan gei-a kulh tegel kikal a kongpi tawnin galkapte tai khia sim uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ahih hangin Khaldea galkapte in kumpi Zedekiah nung delh uh a, Jerikho zanglei ah a phak uh ciangin a galkap khempeuh kithehthangin amah a taisan uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:9 Amaute in kumpipa a mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah puak uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah52:10 Riblah khua ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiahʼ muh mahin a tate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a that lum hi." 
Jeremiah52:11 Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiahʼ mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon khuapi ah paipihin a sih mateng thong sungah a koih hi." 
Jeremiah52:12 Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in a uk zawh kum sawm le kum kua a phak kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Babylon kumpipa a cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan, Jerusalem khua sungah hong lut hi." 
Jeremiah52:13 Amah in Topaʼ biakinnpi a kipan kumpipaʼ inn le Jerusalem khua-a inn lian khempeuh a hal hi. 
Jeremiah52:14 Amah tawh a om khawm a galkap khempeuh in Jerusalem khua kimkot a kulh khempeuh a susia hi. 
Jeremiah52:15 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in mizawng pen pawl khat, khuapi sunga a kinusia lai mite, Babylon kumpipaʼ lamah a tai mite le khutsiam mi a om lai teng, sal dingin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ahih hangin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in leenggah lo a cing ding le lo a kho dingin gam sunga a zawng pente pawl khat a nusia lai hi. 
Jeremiah52:17 Babylon mite in Topaʼ biakinnpi sungah a om sumngo khuamte, sumngo tuikuang le a ngaknate suzan gawp uh a, sumngo khempeuh Babylon ah a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:18 Tua banah, biakpiakna a kizang beelte, vutluahnate, taitehte, kuangte, sikkeute le biakinn kikhopna a kizang sumngo tawh a kibawl kuangte khempeuh zong a la uh hi." 
Jeremiah52:19 Biakpiakna a kizang keuneute, mei-am luahna kuangdaite, kuangte, beelte, khuai meivak khuamte, sikkeute le tuibuahna dinga kizang keute zong a la uh hi. Kham tawh a kibawl nate kham dingin ahi zongin, ngun tawh a kibawl nate ngun dingin ahi zongin kumpi cing galkap mangpa in a la khia hi." 
Jeremiah52:20 Solomon kumpipa in Topaʼ biakinn adingin a bawl khuampi nih, tuikuangpi khat le tua nuai-a a pua sumngo bawngtal sawm le nih le a kingaknate, sumngote a gihna kiteh zo lo hi." 
Jeremiah52:21 Tua khuamte khat ciangin pi sawm nih le pi sagih sang a, a kimkot pi sawm le giat pha a, a sahna zung li pha-in a sung a hawm ahi hi." 
Jeremiah52:22 A tung lam pi sagih le alang ciang sumngo hi-in, tua mun teng a kimkot ah sumngo tawh a kibawl mang kawlsing lim kisuai hi." 
Jeremiah52:23 Mang kawlsing a vekpi-in a kimkot ah za khat om a, sawm kua le guk bek a kilang hi." 
Jeremiah52:24 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa in siampi lianpen pa Seraiah, siampi lian a nihna Zefaniah le kongpi uk biakinn upa thum a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:25 Tua banah khuapi sung panin galkapte a uk galkap maang khat le khua sunga a kimu kumpipaʼ uliante sagih, galkap zum lai a kem galkap mangpaʼ lai-at pa le khua sunga a kimu midang sawm guk, khua sung panin a paikhiatpih hi." 
Jeremiah52:26 Kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in amaute paipihin Riblah khua-a Babylon kumpipa kiangah a tunpih hi. 
Jeremiah52:27 Babylon kumpipa in zong Hamath gam Riblah khua ah amaute satin a that lum hi. Tu-a bangin Judah mite a gam panun sal dingin a kila khia hi. 
Jeremiah52:28 Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paipih mi phazah hih bang ahi hi: Kumpi a suah zawh a kum sagih kumin Judah mi tul thum sawm nih thum," 
Jeremiah52:29 a kum sawm le kum giat kumin Jerusalem khua panin Nebukhadnezzar in mi za giat sawm thum nih sal dingin a paipih hi. 
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukhadnezzar in a uk zawh a kum sawm nih le thum kumin kumpi cing galkap mangpa Nebuzaradan in a sal dingin Judah mi za sagih sawm li nga a paikhiatpih hi. A vekpi-in mi tul li le za guk a pha hi. 
Jeremiah52:31 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin sal a suah zawh kum sawm thum le kum sagih a cin ciangin Babylon ah Evil-merodak kumpi a suak hi. Tua kumpipa in Judah kumpipa Jehoiakhin hehpih a, tua kum kha sawm le kha nihna a ni sawm nih le ni nga ni ciangin thong sung panin a suaktasak hi." 
Jeremiah52:32 Hoihtakin hopih a, Babylon khua-a a ompih kumpi dangte sangin a sang zaw tutna a pia hi." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tua ahih manin Jehoiakhin in a thong puante a suah khia hi. A nuntak sungteng khempeuh kumpipaʼ sabuai ah nisimin an a ne hi. 
Jeremiah52:34 A sih mateng a nuntak hun sungteng nisimin a kisap khempeuh kumpipa in a pia tawntung hi. 
Lamentations1:1 Khat vei lai-in mi a dimtakin a teenna Jerusalem khuapi bangzah takin gamdai ahi hiam? Leitung bup in a zahtak khuapi tu-in meigong tawh a kibang ta hi. Leitung a om khuapi khempeuhteʼ lak panin a thupi pen khuapi tu-in salin a kiman khinzo hi. 
Lamentations1:2 Amah zan khuavakin kap a, a khitui a biang tungah a tak kauhkauh hi. Amah a it ngeite khempeuh a hehnem ding khat beek a om nawn kei hi. A kipawlpihte khempeuh in amah khemin, tu-in a langpan khinta uh hi." 
Lamentations1:3 Judah mite, a huh ding a nei lo silate bangin a inn panun kihawl khia hi. Amaute gam dangah teeng uh a, amauʼ gam ding a om kei hi. Galte in umcih uh a, a suahtak theih nading uh lampi a om kei hi." 
Lamentations1:4 Ni siangtho ni ciangin Pasian a bia dingin Biakinnpi ah kuamah a pai nawn kei hi. Tua lai-a lasa numeite in gimna thuak uh a, siampite a tau uh hi. Khua kongpi ah kuamah om nawn lo a, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna a thuak hi." 
Lamentations1:5 A galte gualzo uh a, amaute a nuaisiah gawp uh hi. Mawhna tampi a neih manun, Topa in tua bangin gimna a thuaksak hi. A mite khempeuh sila dingin a kipua khia hi." 
Lamentations1:6 Jerusalem a minthanna teng a maimang zo ta hi. A makaite uh, lo nona mun mu loin a vak kawikawi, sabengte a muh ciangin tailah pi-in a tai teitei sazuk tawh kibang hi." 
Lamentations1:7 Tu-in Jerusalem kisia zo ta a, nidang a a thupinate a nung phawkkik hi. Galte in a sim laitakin a huh ding khat beek a om kei hi. Guallel ahih manin a galte in a nuihsan uh hi." 
Lamentations1:8 A minthanna teng a bei ta hi. A guaktangin om ahih manin a maizum hi. Thumin tau a, a zum manin a mai a hum hi. Jerusalem in mawhna lian bawl ahih manin a kihhuai mahmah hi." 
Lamentations1:9 A kihhuaina teng kimu khia pah hi napi, gimna thuak ding ahih lam a awlmawh tuan kei hi. Tua ahih manin gimna a thuakna lian lua mahmah a, kuamah in a hehnem zo kei hi. A galte in zo ahih manin Topa kiangah hehpihna a ngen hi." 
Lamentations1:10 A galte in a neih a lam khempeuh a laksak khin mang hi. Biakinnpi sungah lut uh a, Topa in Gentail-te a pai ding a phal lohna munah a lut uh a mu hi." 
Lamentations1:11 Amaute, a thum kawm sa-in annek zong dingin a paikhia uh hi. A nuntak theih nadingun a sum a pai uh tawh an a khek uh hi. Khuapi in, “Hong en in Topa aw, ka thuakna teng hong mu in,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Lamentations1:12 A kiim a pam ah a pai mi khempeuh kiangah, “Hong en in, keiʼ thuak zahin gimna a thuak, Topa in a heh laitakin a hong thuaksak gimna a thuak kei longal, midang kuamah om lo hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Lamentations1:13 Amah in vantung panin meikuang hong khia suk a, ka sung lam a hong kang hi. Amah in thang hong siah a, awkin leilak ah ka kipuk hi. Tua bangin natna ka thuak tawntung hi." 
Lamentations1:14 Amah in ka mawhna khempeuh a vekpi-in ciamteh a, tuate henin lom khat suahin ka ngawngzang ah hong khih a, gik lua mahmah ahih manin ka taang zo peuhmah kei hi. Topa in ka galteʼ khut sungah hong pia ahih manin a cimawh ta ka hi hi." 
Lamentations1:15 Topa in ka galkap a thahat pente nuihsan lel a, amah in kei a hong sim ding, ka tangvalte a susia dingin galkap honpi a hong kuansak hi. Amah in ka nungakte leenggah gawizan bangin a hong gawizansak hi." 
Lamentations1:16 Tua ahih manin ka mit pan khitui a dimletin a luang hi. Hong hehnem ding le a hong hanthawn ding kuamah om lo hi. Galte in hong zo khin a, ka mite a cimawh uh hi." 
Lamentations1:17 Hong huh un, ci-in ka khut ka vanvan hangin kuamah in a hong huh nuam kei hi. Topa in mun khempeuh panin galte hong paisak a, amaute in a kihhuai na khat bangin kei a hong gimneih uh hi." 
Lamentations1:18 Topa a thutang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in ama thu a mang lo ka hi hi. Mun khempeuh ah a om mite aw, ka thugenna hong ngai un. Ka thuaknate hong mu dih un. Ka khangno numei le pasalte salin a kipua khia hi." 
Lamentations1:19 Ka kipawlpihte ka sapsap hangin a hong huh nuam kei uh hi. A nuntak nading uh an a zonna lamun siampite le makaite kongzing lakah a si uh hi. 
Lamentations1:20 Topa aw, ka thuaknate, ka lunggimnate hong en in. Ka mawhna hangin dah mahmah ka hih manin ka lungsim a kitam hi. Kongzing lakah kithahna om a, inn sungah zong sihna mah a om hi." 
Lamentations1:21 Ka tauna hong ngai in; kei a hong hehnem ding kuamah dang om nawn lo hi. Gimna nong thuaksak manin ka galte lungdam lua uh hi. Na ni ciam ni hong tungsak inla, keiʼ thuak bangin ka galte zong thuaksak in." 
Lamentations1:22 A gitlohna hangun amaute tungah thu khen in. Ka mawhna hangin gim nong piak mah bangin amaute zong gim pia in. Gimna ka thuak manin ka tautau a, ka lungsim a gim mahmah hi." 
Lamentations2:1 Topa in a heh manin Jerusalem khuapi a mialcipsak hi. A vantung minthanna teng uh kisiatna a suaksak hi. Amah in a heh ni-in a Biakinnpi nangawn a susia hi. 
Lamentations2:2 Topa in Judah gam a om khuate khempeuh hehpih loin a susia hi. Amah in a galdalna kulhpite khempeuh balzan gawpin a gam le a gam ukte a maizumsak hi. 
Lamentations2:3 A hehna tawh Israel-teʼ thahatnate hong suksiatsak gawp a, gal in a hong sim ciangin amah in eite a hong huh nuam kei hi. Meikuang tawh kibangin eiteʼ langah hong pang a, na khempeuh a susia hi." 
Lamentations2:4 Amah in galte bangin a thalpi tawh hong ngim a, i lungdamna teng le i kisaktheihna teng a hong thah khitsak hi. I inn sung ciatah a hehna meikuang i mu thei hi." 
Lamentations2:5 Topa in galte bangin Israel-te a susia hi. Amah in kulhpite le a kumpi innte a siasa-in a nusia hi. Amah in a bei thei lo dahna Judah gam sungah a tungsak hi. 
Lamentations2:6 Amah in biakna Biakinnpi a zan gawpsak hi. Amah in biakna ni siangtho nite le Sabbath nite a beisak hi. Kumpite le siampite in a nasia ama hehna a thuak khawm uh hi. 
Lamentations2:7 Topa in a siangtho biakinnpi le a biakna tau deih nawn lo a, biakinn kulhpi, galte a susiasak hi. Lungdamna tawh amah i biakna munah, amaute gualzo-in a kiko uh hi." 
Lamentations2:8 Jerusalem kulhpi a kipuk ding Topa in a ngaihsut sa ahi hi. A vekpi-in a kisia khin dingin amah in a seh sa ahi hi. Tausangte le kulhpite tu-in kisia khin piikpeek ta hi. 
Lamentations2:9 Kulh kongpite cim gawpin lei in vukcip a, kongpi kalhna zawlte a kitan gawp hi. Kumpipa le mi liante salin a om khin uh hi. Thukham kihilh nawn lo a, kamsangte in Pasian kiang pan maang a mu nawn kei uh hi." 
Lamentations2:10 Jerusalem puteekte pau loin leilak ah tu uh a, dahna lim lahna-in puanhampi silhin a lu zang uh leivui a buak uh hi. Jerusalem nungaknote a kun ngelhngalh uh hi." 
Lamentations2:11 Ka kahkahna-in ka mit paat gawp ta a, ka lungsim gim lua mahmah hi. Ka mite a kisiatna hangin dahin husamin ka bah gawp hi. Naupangte le nungakte kongzing lakah sibup uh hi." 
Lamentations2:12 Gilkial dangtakin nu aw, ci-in kapkap uh a, a liam a bai bangin kongzing tengah a tuk pekpak uh hi. Tua bangin damdamin a nute uh ang ah a si uh hi." 
Lamentations2:13 Ka it Jerusalem khuapi aw, bangci ding ka hi hiam? Hong bangci hehnep ding ka hi hiam? Nang thuak bangin a thuak kuamah om lo hi. Na tuahsiatna tuipi cia pha a, a lamethuai bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Lamentations2:14 Na kamsangte un zuau thu longal thudang gen ding nei lo uh a, a thuhilhna uh khemna thu bek ahih manin, a khial na hih lam uh a hong hilh tel kei uh hi. Amaute in lam hong lakkhial uh a, kisikkik theih nading hun a hong pia kei uh hi." 
Lamentations2:15 Tua khuapi a siatna a mu mi peuhmah in awi-in a khut a bet san uh hi. A kisia Jerusalem khuapi a muh uh ciangin awi-in a lu uh pei-in a nuihsan uh hi. “Khuapi it-huai i cih hih maw, leitung bup in a kisaktheih pih hih khua maw,” ci-in a nui uh hi." 
Lamentations2:16 Na galte in nang hong simmawh uh a, muhdahna tawh a hong sik-et uh hi. “Khuapi susia zo ta hang! I suksiat zawh mateng i cihcih niloh mah hi,” ci-in a hagawi uh hi." 
Lamentations2:17 Topa in a seh sa bangin a tawpkhakna ah a hong bawl hi. Sau veipi lai-in a hong hilhkholhna bangin hong hehpih nawn loin a hong susia hi. Galte gualzo a, ei hong guallelsak a, amaute a lungdamsak hi." 
Lamentations2:18 Jerusalem aw, na kulhpite mahmah Topa tungah kikosak in! Sun le zanin na khitui gun tui luang bangsak in. Dahna le kahna tawh na hun beisak in." 
Lamentations2:19 Zanin tho zelzel inla, Pasian tungah kiko in. Na tate in hehpihna a ngah nadingin na lungsim khempeuh pia in. Kongzing khempeuh ah naupangte puksi khin dektak uh hi." 
Lamentations2:20 Topa aw hong en in. Na bawlsiat mite hong en dih in. Nupite in a it mahmah uh a tate uhʼ sa ne tanghial uh hi. Siampite le kamsangte in biakinnpi sung mahmah ah thahna thuak uh hi. 
Lamentations2:21 Khangno le khanghamte kongzing tengah si uh hi. Galte in nungak le tangvalte namsau tawh a that lum uh hi. Amaute hehpih loin na heh ni-in na that lumsak hi. 
Lamentations2:22 Kei a hong dipkuasak dingin ka galte pen pawi siim ding bangin na sam a, amaute in hong umcih uh hi. Nangma heh ni-in a suakta zo khat beek a om kei hi. Ka hawmthawh ka it ka tate a hong thahsak uh hi." 
Lamentations3:1 Pasian in gim hong piakna zia a thuak khin pa kei ka hi hi. 
Lamentations3:2 Amah in a thuk mahmah khuamial sungah a hong hawl khia hi. 
Lamentations3:3 Hong hehpih het loin a khut tawh a hong tum niloh hi. 
Lamentations3:4 Amah in a liam a bai guh kitan sa-in a hong nusia hi. 
Lamentations3:5 Amah in lunggimna le gentheihna thonginn sungah a hong khumcip hi. 
Lamentations3:6 Amah in sihna khuamial uih sungah a teeng dingin aana tawh thu a hong pia hi. 
Lamentations3:7 Amah in kol hong bulh a, taikhiat zawh het lohna kulhpi sungah hong koih hi." 
Lamentations3:8 Hong huh un, ci-in ka kiko hangin ka kikona aw a pua lamah a kiza zo kei hi." 
Lamentations3:9 Hoi dangdang ka hih manin suang kulhpite ka kantan zo kei hi. 
Lamentations3:10 Amah in vompi bangin kei hong buk sim a, humpinelkai bangin a hong bawh hi." 
Lamentations3:11 Amah in lam pam ah hong delh khia a, a hong balnen khit ciangin a hong nusia hi." 
Lamentations3:12 Amah in a thalpi keek a, thal tawh kap dingin a hong ngim hi." 
Lamentations3:13 Amah in a thaltang a thuktum theithei dingin a hong kap hi. 
Lamentations3:14 Mite in sun tawntung hong nuihsan niloh uh a, leitung bup in ciamnuihna-in a hong nei uh hi." 
Lamentations3:15 Amah in ka ut lohpipi-in tui kha hong dawnsak a, ka duh lohpipi-in an kha a hong nesak hi." 
Lamentations3:16 Amah in ka maitang lei ah hong hiat a, suang tungah ka ha a hong tah tansak hi." 
Lamentations3:17 Lungnopna, cidamna, kipahna cihte bang ahi hiam, cih mel ka thei nawn kei hi." 
Lamentations3:18 Sau veipi ka nungta nawn kei ding hi. Topaʼ tung pan ka lametna teng a bei ta hi. 
Lamentations3:19 Gimna ka thuaknate le inn le lo nei loin ka omna pen gu-kha bang hi a," 
Lamentations3:20 tua pen a tawntungin lungkiatna ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:21 Ahi zongin ka phawk giugiau thu khat in lametna khat hong nei theisak hi. 
Lamentations3:22 A bei thei lo Topaʼ hong itna le a hehpihna a kizom paisuak hi a," 
Lamentations3:23 zing nisuak bangin thaksuak tawntung a, ni a hong suah pelmawh mah tawh a kibang ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:24 Topa longal neih dang nei lo ka hih manin ama tung bekah lametna ka nei hi. 
Lamentations3:25 Amah a muangte adingin Topa a hoih hi. 
Lamentations3:26 Tua ahih ciangin thuak zawhna tawh ngak kenkan zo lehang a hoih pen ahi hi. A hong hotkhiat ding amah ngak ni. 
Lamentations3:27 Na khangno lai-in thuak zawh hat ding kisin leteh hoih pen hi. 
Lamentations3:28 Gimna i thuak ciangin dam takin tu hithiatin i thuak zo ding hi. 
Lamentations3:29 Lametna ding om thei lai ahih manin phunphun huai dek lo hi. 
Lamentations3:30 Guallelin bawlsiatna thuak ta lehang tua banga om lel ding ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:31 Topa in hehpihna nei ahih manin hong nial paisuak lo ding hi. 
Lamentations3:32 Dahna hong thuaksak thei dinga, ahih hangin eite a hong itna muanhuai-in kip tawntung hi." 
Lamentations3:33 Dahna le gimna a hong thuaksak ciangin amah lungdam pah sam lo hi. 
Lamentations3:34 Topa in thong sungah i thuak i lunggimnate a hong thei hi. 
Lamentations3:35 Mite in Pasian thusim loin, i hamphatnate hong paih khiatsakin," 
Lamentations3:36 zum thukhenna ah a manin thu a kikhen loh ciangin, amah in a hong thei veve hi." 
Lamentations3:37 Topaʼ deihna bang bekin na khempeuh a piang ahi hi. 
Lamentations3:38 Ama thupiakna bangin a sia ahi a, a pha ahi zongin a piang ahi hi." 
Lamentations3:39 I mawhna hangin gim i thuak ciangin bang hangin phunphun ding ihi hiam? 
Lamentations3:40 I gamtatna sate limtakin ki-enphakikin Topaʼ lamah kiheikik ni. 
Lamentations3:41 Vantung a om Pasian tungah i lungsim pia-in thu ngen ni. 
Lamentations3:42 “ Topa aw, nang tungah kong khial uh a, hong leh do kha ka hih manun ka mawhna uh na hong maisak nai kei hi." 
Lamentations3:43 “Kote nong nung delh a, na hong that khinzo hi. Heh na hih manin na hehpihna a kiseelcip hi." 
Lamentations3:44 Na hehna, meiipi zahin sah mahmah ahih manin ka thungetna uh na kiang a hong tung zo kei hi." 
Lamentations3:45 Hih leitungah kote a kihhuai nahteh muat bangin na hong bawl hi. 
Lamentations3:46 “Ka galte khempeuh un hong simmawhin a hong zahpih uh hi. 
Lamentations3:47 Siatna bekbek tawh kidimin, kihtakna le launa tawh ka nungta uh hi." 
Lamentations3:48 Ka mite a kisiat manin ka khitui hawktui luang a bang hi. 
Lamentations3:49 “Ka khitui kang thei loin luitui bangin luang tawntung a," 
Lamentations3:50 vantung panin Topa in hong en sukin a hong muh ciangin," 
Lamentations3:51 ka khuapi kisiatna in ka lungsim hong kitamsak hi. 
Lamentations3:52 “A thu om lopi-in ka galte in hong mudah uh a, vasa siah bangin thang a hong siah uh hi." 
Lamentations3:53 Leihawm thukpi kawt sungah hong hing khiat uh a, suangtumpi tawh a hong sincip uh hi." 
Lamentations3:54 Tui in hong tuumcip gawp ahih manin a si khinta-in ka kingaihsun hi. 
Lamentations3:55 “ Topa aw, leihawm thukpi taw panin ka hong kiko to hi." 
Lamentations3:56 Kong thumna hong ngai in, ci-in ka hong thum ciangin na hong za hi." 
Lamentations3:57 Na hong dawng a, a lau lo dingin thu nong pia hi." 
Lamentations3:58 “Topa aw, nangmah in na hong huh a, na hong nungtasak hi." 
Lamentations3:59 A mawkna-in kei hong kimawhsaknate thei khin na hih ciangin thu hong khen inla, kei hong khah khia in." 
Lamentations3:60 Ka galteʼ hong muhdahna le a vaihawm simna thute uh na thei khinzo hi. 
Lamentations3:61 “ Topa aw, amauʼ hong simmawhnate na thei khinzo a, a ngimnate khempeuh uh zong na thei zo hi." 
Lamentations3:62 Sun tawntung keimah bawlsiat ding bekbek kikumin a vaihawm tawntung uh hi. 
Lamentations3:63 Zingsang a kipan nitak dong a hong zahpih uh hi. 
Lamentations3:64 “ Topa aw, amauʼ gamtatna bangin thukkik in." 
Lamentations3:65 Amaute phuisam inla, a cimawh dingin hawl khia in." 
Lamentations3:66 Amaute delh kek inla, leitung panin nuai mang gawp in,” ci ni." 
Lamentations4:1 Biakinnpi kisia ta a, suang kiciangte kongzing lakah a kithehthang hi. Khamtui tawh a kizut a tee daldalte mualmang khinzo ta hi." 
Lamentations4:2 Kham bangin a manpha Jerusalem tangvalnote, leibeel bang lelin kibawl khinta hi." 
Lamentations4:3 Keivom nangawn in zong a note itin a nawi pia thei buang napi, ka mite in vasa-kalaoh bangin a tanote a su gawp hi." 
Lamentations4:4 Amaute in a ta ngeekte uh gilkial dangtakin sisak uh a, naupangnote an ngen dingin vaksak uh a, kuamah in an a pia kei hi." 
Lamentations4:5 An lim pen a ne ngeite kongzing lakah puksi uh a, nuamsa-in a khang khia mite in nin buakna lak thai-in an a zong uh hi." 
Lamentations4:6 Jerusalemʼ mawhna Sodom khuapiʼ mawhna sangin lian zaw ahih manin, thakhatin Pasianʼ khut sung pan kisiatna a ngah uh hi." 
Lamentations4:7 Pasianʼ mi dingin a kipia Nazir-te pen amauʼ pumpi uh a siasak lo, vuk bangin a ngo, a cidam, a thahat mite ahi uh hi." 
Lamentations4:8 Tu-in amaute kuama theih lohin kongzing lakah tuk pekpak uh a, a si dingin a mai uh dup khin a, a vun uh sing bangin keugaw-in, a guh guakin a om uh hi." 
Lamentations4:9 Nek ding nei loin puksih sangin gal sungah a site hampha zaw lai hi. Annek ding nei loin a site a puksi ahi uh hi. 
Lamentations4:10 Ka mite a cihmawh laitakun, itna a nei nupite nangawn in, a tanote uh go-in beel sungah a huan uh hi." 
Lamentations4:11 Topa in a hehna khempeuh siit nawn loin hong bua khia a, meikuang tawh Jerusalem hong hal ahih manin a kaang tum hi." 
Lamentations4:12 Namdangteʼ gam ukte le mi khempeuh Jerusalem a sim zo ding kuamah om lo ding hi, ci-in a up laitakun hih thu hong piang hi." 
Lamentations4:13 Kamsangte le siampite in mawhna a bawl manun mi siangtho midikteʼ sihna a hong piang ahi hi. 
Lamentations4:14 Amaute mittaw bangin kongzing lakah vak uh a, kuama lawn ngam loh dingin silenai tawh a dim uh hi." 
Lamentations4:15 Mite in, “Pai khia un, mi ninte aw, hong lawng kha kei un,” ci-in a kiko uh hi. Tua bangin minam khat khit nam khat kiangah pai kawikawi uh a, ahih hangin kuamah in amaute a ngai kei uh hi." 
Lamentations4:16 Topa in amaute a zat nopna om nawn lo ahih manin amaute a thehthang hi. Amah in i makaite le i siampite a awlmawh nawn kei hi. 
Lamentations4:17 Huhna a ngenin ka khua dakdak uh a, khuadak zo nawn lo zah dongin ka om uh hangin bangmah ka ngah kei uh hi. A hong pia zo lo ding minamte tungah huhna ka ngenngen kha uh hi." 
Lamentations4:18 Galte in hong vil sim uh ahih manin ka vak khia ngam kei uh hi. Ka hun uh a bei ta hi a, a beina hun a tung zo ahi hi." 
Lamentations4:19 Mu ak bawh sangin a manlang zaw-in amaute in a hong delh uh hi. Amaute in mual tung panin hong delh suk uh a, theih kholh lohin a hong man khin uh hi." 
Lamentations4:20 Amaute in galteʼ khut sung panin a hong huh zo dingin ka up uh, Pasianʼ teel a muanhuai kumpi a hong matsak uh hi." 
Lamentations4:21 Edom le Uz mite aw, tu-in nuinui mai unla, ahih theih lai teng kipak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh siatna hun hong tung dinga, a hong tun ciangin na guaktangun omin, maizumin na om ding uh hi." 
Lamentations4:22 Jerusalem in a mawhna thaman a sang khinzo ta ahi hi. Ka thuak ding uh a nasia penpen teng ka thuak khinzo ta uh hi. Ahi zongin Edom aw, Topa in nang gim hong pia dinga, na mawhna khempeuh a hong pholak ding hi." 
Lamentations5:1 Topa aw, kote tunga thupiangte hong phawk in. Hong en inla, ka maizumna uh hong mu in." 
Lamentations5:2 Ka neihsa teng uh gamdang miteʼ khut sungah tung mangkhin a, ka inn sung uh ah gamdang mite teng ta uh hi." 
Lamentations5:3 Ka pate uh gal in hong thahsak khin a, ka nute uh meigong suak khin uh hi." 
Lamentations5:4 Ka tui dawn tawm ding uh lei ding kul ta a, ka sing cihtawm ding uh lei ding kul ta hi." 
Lamentations5:5 Kalaoh van pua le la van pua bangin nakpi takin a hong kihawl gawpgawp hi. Gim mahmah hi napi tawlngak nading hun a hong kipia kei hi. 
Lamentations5:6 Ka nuntak theih nadingun Assiria le Egypt-te kiangah an ngen dingin ka pai uh hi. 
Lamentations5:7 Ka pu ka pate un mawhna a bawl manun a si khin uh hi. Amauteʼ mawhna kote in ka thuak uh hi. 
Lamentations5:8 Silate sangin a zahpih huai zaw mite in kote hong uk tazen uh a, amauteʼ khut sung panin kuamah in a hong hon khia zo kei hi." 
Lamentations5:9 Gam sung khempeuh ah misuamte dim ahih manin, luangkham zen mahin an zong dingin ka pai uh hi." 
Lamentations5:10 Gilkial luat manin cisa-in ka nattun uh a, ka pumpi uh mei-am sa a bang hi." 
Lamentations5:11 Zion mual le Judah gam sung khempeuh ah ka zite uh le ka nungakte uh hong kibuansak hi. 
Lamentations5:12 Makaite khempeuh hong kikhailupsak a, ka puteekte uh a hong kithusimsak kei hi." 
Lamentations5:13 Tangvalte sila bangin aana tawh an kigawisak a, naupangnote sing kitomsakin a lelh pipi uh a kipuasak hi." 
Lamentations5:14 Puteekte khuapi kongpi ah tu nawn lo uh a, khangnote in la a sa nawn kei uh hi." 
Lamentations5:15 Lungnopna khempeuh bei mang khinta a, lungdamna khempeuh lungkhamna a suakta hi." 
Lamentations5:16 Kisaktheih nading bangmah om nawn lo a, mawh ihih manin gimna a thuak ihi hi." 
Lamentations5:17 I lungsim mahmah cina a, i khitui luangte in khua hong musak thei kei hi." 
Lamentations5:18 Zion mual gamdai ta a, kinusia khin ahih manin se-alte a kawi vak ta hi." 
Lamentations5:19 Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na hih leh a tawntungin kumpi na hi a, hun tawp dongin na uk paisuak ding hi." 
Lamentations5:20 Bang hangin sau veipi hong pampaih na hi hiam? Kote hong phawkkik nawn lo takpi ding na hi hiam? 
Lamentations5:21 Topa aw, kote hong kaikhawmkik in! Hong kaikhawmkik in! A beisa sau veipi lai mah bangin hong thaksuaksakkik in." 
Lamentations5:22 Kote hong nial tawntung takpi ding na hi hiam? Na hehna in ciangtan hun nei thei lo ding ahi hiam? 
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawm thum ka phak kum, a kha lina, a ni nga ni-in Babylon gam a om Khebar Gun gei ah sal a om Jew midangte tawh ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. Tua ka maangmuhna ah van hong kihong a, Pasian ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel1:2 Tua hun pen Kumpi Jehoiakhin salin a kimat zawh a kum ngana, tua kha sungah a ni nga ni mah ahi hi." 
Ezekiel1:3 Tua Babylon gam Khebar Gun gei ah ka om laitakin siampi Buziʼ tapa keimah Ezekiel in Topaʼ hong thugenna ka za a, ama vangliatna zong kei tungah a hong tunna ka phawk hi." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ka khuadak leh leilu lam panin huihpi a hong nung ka mu hi. Tua huihpi tawh a hong ton meiipi lak panin khua hong phia a, ka kimkot teng taang pempam hi. Tua khuaphiatna mun pen sumngo tawh kibangin a taang hi." 
Ezekiel1:5 Tua huihpi laizang ah ganhing li a om tawh a kibang pian ka mu hi. Tua ka muhte in mihing lim pua napi-in," 
Ezekiel1:6 maitang li le kha li ciat a nei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:7 A khete uh mam zeza a, ahi zongin a khepekte uh bawng khe tawh kibang hi. Tua ganhingte pen a kinawtngil sumngo tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:8 Maitang li le kha li ciat a neih ban uh ah, a khaphung nuai a pangpi uh panin a meeng khia mihing khut tawh a kibang li ciat mah nei lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:9 Tua ganhing lite in a kha nih ciat uh zalin, a mong le a mong kimatsak uh a, ki-umcihin sik li nei-in kimu hi. Amaute a gamtat uh ciangin a li-in tatkhatin tang uh ahih manin a pumpi uh kituam hei lo hi." 
Ezekiel1:10 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. Maitang ngeina lamah mihing mai, taklam pangah humpinelkai mai, veilam pangah bawngtal mai, a dek lamah muvanlai mai nei ciat uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Tua ganhingte in a kha nih ciat uh zalin a zom a omteʼ kha mong dawn tawh kimatsak uh a, a om lai a kha nih tegel ciat uh khupin a pumpi uh a tuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Tua ganhingte in maitang li ciat nei-in mun khempeuh a maingat suak uh ahih manin a painop uh ciangin a pumpi uh kihei kul loin a utna peuh uh ah pai thei pahpah uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:13 Tua ganhingte lakah meikuang tawh a kibang a phia niloh om hi. Tua meikuang pen kuang pha mahmah a, khua phiasak zaizai hi." 
Ezekiel1:14 Tua ganhingte khuaphia mah bangin kin zalzal kawikawi uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:15 Tua ganhing lite ka et laitakin amaute in leengpei khat ciat a neih lam uh ka mu a, a leengpeite leilak ah kinga hi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tua leengpeite a vekpi-in kibang kim a, suangmanpha bangin tee uh hi. Tua leengpeite in a kikantan lamin pei khat ciat nei thuah uh ahih manin," 
Ezekiel1:17 a utna lam peuhpeuh ah pai thei uh hi. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tua leengpei kualte tungah mittang vive a dimin om hi. 
Ezekiel1:19 Tua ganhingte a kin ciangin leengpeite tawh kin khawm a, leilak panin tua ganhingte van lamah kikhangin a kah toh ciangin a leengpeite tawh zong kikhang to khawm hi." 
Ezekiel1:20 Amauʼ utna peuhpeuh uh ah tua ganhingte pai uh a, tua leengpeite pen a ganhingteʼ khutnuai ahih manin, ganhingteʼ paina peuhpeuh ah a pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tua leengpeite pen ganhingteʼ khutnuai-a om ahih manin ganhingte pai leh pai-in, ganhingte khawl leh khawlin, vanah kah to leh kah to-in, a ganhingteʼ tat bang teekteekin a ta uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:22 Tua ganhingteʼ lu tung sanah limlang tawh a kibawl a kuum kiukiau pian khat om hi. 
Ezekiel1:23 Tua a kuum nuai ah, ganhingte in a kizom pih ciatteʼ lamah a kha nihte ciat zal uh a, a kha nih ciat uh tawh amauʼ pumpi ciat a tuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel1:24 Tua ciangin amauteʼ leenna a khaging uh ka za hi. Tua a khaging pen tuipi ging, galkap honpi huging le Vanglian Pasianʼ awgingte tawh kibang hi. A leen nawn loh uh ciangin a kha uh khup a," 
Ezekiel1:25 ahi zongin amauteʼ lu tung san a om a kuum tung san panin awging kiza lai hi. 
Ezekiel1:26 Tua kuum tungzang ah, sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat om a, tua tokhom tungah mi tawh a kibang pian lim khat a tu hi." 
Ezekiel1:27 Tua tokhom tungah a tu ka muh pen meikhuk sunga kihalsan sumngo bangin taang heuhau a, a kimkot khempeuh zong tua mah bangin taang pempam hi." 
Ezekiel1:28 Tua a taang khuavak in meii lakah sakhituihup a kai ciangin a neih mel nam tuamtuam khempeuh a nei kim hi. Topaʼ vangliatna lim pen tu-a ka gen bang ahi hi. Hih bang ka muh ciangin leilak ah ka bok suk a, tua ciangin awging khat ka za hi." 
Ezekiel2:1 Tua awging in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, ding to in. Nang tungah thu kong gen nuam hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tua bangin thu hong gen laitakin ka sungah Pasianʼ kha hong lutin ka khe-in hong ding tosak hi. Tua ciangin a awging kizom lai-in kei kiangah," 
Ezekiel2:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, kei hong langpangin a hong lehdo Israel minamte kiangah nang a hong sawl ka hi hi. A pu a pate uh mah bangin amaute in tu dongin kei hong lehdo lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Amaute a lungsim uh khauhin paupeeng uh hi. Keimah Topa Pasian in amaute tungah ka gen ding thute a va gen dingin a hong sawl ka hi hi. 
Ezekiel2:5 Amaute in nangma thu hong mang a, hong mang kei zongin, amaute lakah kamsang khat a om khit lamtak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Ahi zongin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute ahi a, a thugente uh ahi zongin na kihta kei ding hi. Amaute in nang ling hong kaihnelh ding uh a, momai lak a om na bang ding hi. Tua bang hitaseleh, hih a lehdo thei miteʼ maipuak zia le amauteʼ kampaunate hangin lau tuan kei in." 
Ezekiel2:7 Amaute in hong mang a, hong mang kei zongin, nang tungah kong gen khempeuh amaute tungah va gen in. Amaute pen a lehdo thei mi ahihna uh phawk in." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah kong gen thute ngai in. Amaute bangin hong langpang kei in. Na kam ka inla, tu-in ka hong piak ding na ne in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel2:9 Tua ciangin kei lamah khut khat hong kizan a, tua khut in laizial tawn khat a tawi ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel2:10 Tua ciangin tua khut in tua lai kizial hong phel a, a lang nih tuakah lai kigelhin, dahlekah thu le thumletau thute vive a kigelh ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel3:1 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah ka hong piak hih laizial ne in. Tua ciangin va pai inla, Israel mite kiangah thu va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:2 Tua ahih manin kei zong ka kam ka ka a, ka nek dingin a laizial hong pia hi." 
Ezekiel3:3 Amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, ka hong piak laizial ne inla, na gilpi dimtakin ne in,” a hong ci hi. Kei zong tua laizial ka ne a, khuaizu tawh kibangin khum ka sa mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite kiangah pai inla, nang tungah kong gen peuhpeuh, amaute tungah va gen in." 
Ezekiel3:5 A pau na theih loh minam dangte kiangah a hong sawl ka hi kei hi. Na mipih Israel-te kiangah a hong sawl ka hi hi. 
Ezekiel3:6 A pau na theih loh, pau haksa a zang minam liante kiangah nang hong sawl hi leng, amaute in na thugen hong mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ahi zongin Israel mite khat beek in na thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi. Keima kam teekteek nangawn ngai lo ding uh hi. Amaute a lungsim uh khauh a, demnopna lungsim nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tu-in amaute mah bangin a khauh mahmah, a duai mahmah in nang kong bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:9 Suang khempeuh sangin a sak zaw, diamond suang zahin a sakin na lungsim kong bawl ding hi. Tua ahih manin hih a lehdo thei mite kihta kei in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:10 Tua khit ciangin amah in thu hong gen thuah lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, nang tungah kong thugen khempeuh limtakin ngai inla ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel3:11 Tua ciangin amaute in na thu hong ngai a, hong ngai kei zongin, salin a om na mipihte kiangah va pai inla, nang tungah kong thugen khempeuh amaute tungah va gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ kha in hong paipih to a, zin liing zahin a gin ngaih awging khat ka nungah ka za a, “Vantungah a om Topa, ama minthanna hangin phat un,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Ezekiel3:13 Ganhingte in huih lakah a khazapna le leengpei gingte ka za a, zin liing zahin gin ngaih mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel3:14 Pasianʼ kha in hong paikhiatpih laitakin lungkim het loin ka heh suak mahmah hi. Ahi zongin Topaʼ vangliatna in kei hong zo zaw hi. 
Ezekiel3:15 Tua ahih manin ka mipih salteʼ omna, Khebar Gun gei-a a om Telabib munah ka va tung a, ka muh sa thute ngaihsunin tua lai-a amaute lakah ni sagih sung ka om hi." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ni sagih a cin khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel minamteʼ galvil pa dingin nang kong koih hi. Nangma tungah kong gen hilh kholhnate khempeuh amaute tungah na gen sawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:18 Migilo pa khat pen si ding hi, ci-in kong gen ciangin, amah kikheelin a nuntak theih nadingin thu na hilhkholh kei leh, tua mipa pen mawhnei mahin si dinga, ahi zongin ama sihna thu ahihleh nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:19 Migilo khat hilh khol napi-in a mawh bawlna a tawp kei leh, a mawhnei mahin si dinga, ahi zongin nangma nuntakna suakta ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Mihoih mahmah khat gamtat siat ding hong kipan leh a lauhuaina munah amah ka koih ding hi. Amah hilh khol kei lecin si ding hi. Ama mawhna hangin si dinga, ama gamtat hoih sate phawkin ka nei kei ding hi. Ama sihna thu ah nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:21 Ahi zongin a khialh loh nadingin mihoih khat na hilh a, na thu hong mangin mawhna a bawl kei leh amah nungta ding hi. Nang zong na suakta ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ka sungah Topaʼ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka phawk a, amah in kei kiangah, “Ding inla, kuam sungah va pai in. Tua lai mun panin nang kiangah thu kong gen ding hi,” hong cihna ka za hi." 
Ezekiel3:23 Tua ahih manin kei zong kuam sungah ka va pai a, Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh bang teek mahin tua lai ah Topaʼ minthanna vang ka mu hi. Kei zong lei ah ka bok suk a," 
Ezekiel3:24 ahi zongin ka sungah Pasianʼ kha hong lutin ka khe-in hong dingsak hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Inn ah ciah inla, inn kikhaknelh in." 
Ezekiel3:25 Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khauhual tawh nang hong kikhih dinga, mite kiangah na paikhia thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:26 Na leii ka zawsak dinga, hih a lehdo thei mite na thuhilh thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ahi zongin nang kong hopihkik ciangin kong pau theisakkik dinga, amaute kiangah, ‘ Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi,’ na ci ding hi. Tua ciangin mi pawl khat in na thu hong ngai ding uh a, ahi zongin amaute pen a lehdo thei minam ahih uh manin pawl khat in na thu hong ngai lo ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:1 Tua khit ciangin, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leiseek khat la-in na mai ah koih inla, Jerusalem khuapi lahna-in tua leiseek tung git in." 
Ezekiel4:2 Tua ciangin tua khuapi a ki-umcihna lah nadingin na kiimah dumte, phungte, galpanna phualte le kulh suk khapna ding molhtumte bawl in." 
Ezekiel4:3 Tua ciangin sik peek khat la inla, nang le khuapi kikalah kulh lim dingin koih in. Tua ciangin khuapi lam en in. Tua khuapi a ki-umcih hi-in, nang pen a umcihteʼ lim ding na hi hi. Hih pen Israel mite adingin lim hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Tua ciangin na veilam pang delhphahin lum in. Israel miteʼ mawhna hanga gimna nangma tungah kong nga ding hi. Tua lai munah lumin amauteʼ mawhna 
Ezekiel4:5 ni za thum le ni sawm kua sung na thuak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gimthuak ding kum khat sung dingin ni khat, amauʼ thuak ding kum zah nangmah in a ni-in na thuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:6 Hih bangin na gamtat khit ciangin na taklam delhphahin na kihei leuleu dinga, Judah miteʼ mawhna ni sawm li sung gim na thuak leuleu ding hi. Nangma thuak ni khat pen amauʼ thuak ding kum khat tang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a ki-umcihna sal gega in. Na puanak ban zial to inla, tua khuapi siat nading thu gen in." 
Ezekiel4:8 Nang pen khauhual tawh kong hencip dinga, tua khuapi umcihna a kiman mateng na kihei thei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Tu-in mangbuh, mangbuhham, belawi, taang le mangbuhman pawl khat la inla, tuate hel khawmin anlumin bawl in. Na veilam delhphahin na lup hun ni za thum le ni sawm kua sung tua na bawl anlum na ne ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:10 Nek khatin anlum shekel sawm nih gik bek na ne dinga, ni khatin khatvei bek na ne ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Tui zong duh zahzah hi loin, ni khatin thawl khat bek na dawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Na nek ding anlum pen miteʼ muhin mihing ekkeu khawmin tuate mei-in na cih khit ciangin tua sungah na em ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:13 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel mite, gam dangah ka thehthang hun ciangin thukham in nek dingin a kham an ninte tu-a mah bangin ne ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:14 Ahi zongin kei zong ka dawngkik a, “Topa Pasian aw, cikmahin kei ka kininsak ngei kei hi. Ka neu tung a kipan tu dongin ama thu-in a sitawm ganhing sa ahi a, gamsateʼ nek baang ahi zongin ka ne ngei kei hi. A ninin a kiseh an khat peuhpeuh ka ne ngei nai kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tua ahihleh pha hi. Mihing ek tangin bawng-ek na zang dinga, tua bawng-ek am sungah na em ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel4:16 Tua ciangin amah in thu hong gen thuah lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi sungah an ka beisak dinga, mite in lunghihmawhna tawh a annek a tuidawnte uh ciangtan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel4:17 Anletui loin amaute om ding uh a, amaute lunggimin, a tawpna ah a mawhna hangun bei mang ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel5:1 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, namsau hiam khat la inla, na sam le na khamul kiat khia in. Tua ciangin a multe tawi tehin seh thum suah in." 
Ezekiel5:2 Umcihna lim na man ciangin khuapi lim sungah seh khat hal tum in. Tua ciangin seh khat la leuleu inla, khuapi kiimah na pai kawmin na namsau tawh satnen in. A om lai seh khat pen huih lakah lawn in. Keimah in ka namsau tawh tuate ka sat ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:3 Tua ciangin a multe tawmno khat la inla, na puan mongteep ah tun in." 
Ezekiel5:4 Tua ciangin na tun sate sung panin tawmcik khat la leuleu inla, meikuang sungah lawnin kaang tumsak in. Tua sung panin mei hong kuangin Israel minam buppi hong lawh ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel5:5 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Hih Jerusalem khuapi lim en in. Leitung laizang ah ka koih a, a kimkot ah gamdang khempeuh ka omsak hi." 
Ezekiel5:6 Ahi zongin Jerusalem in ka thupiakna lehdo-in, minam dangte sangin a gilo zaw hong suak a, a kiim a om gamdangte sangin a thumang lo zaw hong suak hi. Jerusalem in ka thupiakte nialin, ka thukhamte zui nuam lo hi." 
Ezekiel5:7 Jerusalem aw, tu-in Topa Pasian ahi keima thugente ngai in. Ka thukhamte zui loin, ka thupiakte ngai lo na hih manin na kiim a om minam dangte sangin siatna tam zaw na piangsak hi. Minam dangteʼ gamtat ngeinate na zui hi." 
Ezekiel5:8 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang kong langpanna thu a hong gen ka hi hi. Minam dang khempeuhteʼ muhin nang tungah thu kong khen ding hi. 
Ezekiel5:9 Ka deih loh hih nate khempeuh na gamtatna hangin cikmahin ka hih ngei nai loh, cikmah ciangin zong ka hih nawn loh ding thu tawh nang Jerusalem gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:10 Tua kong gimpiakna hangin nang Jerusalem khuapi sungah papite in a tapateʼ sa ne-in, tapate in a pate uhʼ sa ne ding uh hi. No a mite gim kong pia dinga, a suakta kha sunsunte nangawn mun khempeuh ah kong thehthang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah a nungta ka hih mah bangin, note in siatna nam khempeuh le a muhdahhuai gamtatna tawh ka biakinn ninsak na hih manun cikze het loin note kong suk mang taak kei leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel5:12 Note seh thum suah seh khat pen cina le gil kialin khuapi sungah na si ding uh hi. Seh thum suah seh khat, khuapi kiimah namsau-in na si ding uh hi. A om lai seh thum suah seh khat ahihleh mun khempeuh ah hong thehthangin namsau tawh kong delh ding hi." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ka lung a kim dongin kong hih dinga, ka hehna le ka sinsona teng na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah hih thute hong tun ciangin, noteʼ cihtak lohna hangin deihsak luatna tawh a hong heh pau ka hihna na phawk ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel5:14 Na kiim uh ah a om minamte in note hong muh khak uh ciangin hong phit sanin hong pelh ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:15 Note tungah hehin sinsona tawh gim kong piak ciangin na kim uh a a om minam dangte khempeuh lau ding uh hi. Amaute in note hong muhdah et-in hong simmawh bawl ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:16 Na annek ding uh hong khaktan sakin note kong puksisak ding hi. Note a hong susia ding gilkialna pen thaltangʼ kap khak bangin na na sa velval ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel5:17 Na tate uh a sisak dingin kialpi hong tungsakin, a that dingin gamsate kong paisak ding hi. Natna, gal kidona le gal kikapnate in note hong sisak ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel6:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mual sang dawnte en inla, amaute tungah kong thupiak gen in." 
Ezekiel6:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual liante, mual neute, guam thukte, kuampite kiangah ka gen ding thute, Israel minamte in a ngaihna ding uh gen in. Mite in milim a biakna munte a vat gawp dingin namsau khat kong kuansak ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:4 Biakna taute kiphel kek dinga, paknamtui taute kisatkham ding hi. Tua lai ah a om mi khempeuh kithatin, a milimte uhʼ mai ah kipaithang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:5 Israel misi luanghawmte ka thehthang gawp dinga, a guhte uh biakna tau kiimah ka lawnthang gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:6 Israel khuapite khempeuh bei mang dinga, milim a biakna uh mun khempeuh kisusia ding hi. Tua ahih manin a biakna taute uh le a milimte uh vutlevai suakin, a paknamtui taute uh kisat vui gawp ding ahih manin, milim biak nadingin a bawl sa khempeuh uh maimang ding hi." 
Ezekiel6:7 Mun citeng ah mi kithat lum dinga, a suakta sunsunte in kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong phawk ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Tua banga kihonthahna panin pawl khat ka suaktasak dinga, minam dangte lakah kithehthangin," 
Ezekiel6:9 salin a om ding uh hi. Tua bangin salin a omna uh mun panin, amauʼ lungsim cihtak lohna uh hangin kei hong nusiatna uh le keimah sangin milim a deihzawkna uh hangin a maizum nadingun gim a pia ding ka hih lamtak thei-in kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amauʼ gitlohna le a hai tatna sate uh hangin amau mahmah kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:10 Tua ciangin kei pen Topa ka hih lamtak hong thei ding uh a, amaute gimpiak ding ka gen kholhnate a mawk pau ka hih loh lam a phawk ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel6:11 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Israel miteʼ gitlohna le a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh hangin na khut singin lei tuan inla, a dahin kap in. Amaute gal kidona, kial le natna hangin si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:12 A gamla a om mite cina-in si ding uh a, a nai-a omte gal sungah si ding uh hi. A om lai sunte gil kialin puksi ding uh hi. Amaute in keima hehna thuak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:13 Milimteʼ lak le biakna tau kiimah si luanghawm kithehthang dinga, mual sang tung teng, mual dawnzang teng, singniim nuai citeng, tawsaw kung lian nuai khempeuh le milim biakna-in paknamtui a halna uh mun khempeuh ah si luanghawm om ziazua kawikawi ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel6:14 Keimah in ka khut zanin a gam khempeuh uh ka susia ding hi. Leitaw lam sehnel gam pan a kipanin leilu lam Riblah khuapi dongin, Israel miteʼ omna mun khempeuh, siit nei loin ka vatmai ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel7:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel leitang tawh kisai-in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: A beina hi ta! Gam buppi a beina hi ta hi." 
Ezekiel7:3 Israel-te aw, tu-in na bei nading uh hong tung ta a, note in ka hehna tu-in na thuak ta ding uh hi. Na gamtatna sa uh tawh kizui-in thu kong khen dinga, na gamtat siatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:4 Note kong zah kei dinga, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatna sate uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel7:5 Topa Pasian in a gen thu in: “Noteʼ tungah haksatna khat khit khat a banbanin hong tung thuahthuah ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:6 A beina hong tung ta hi. Note a man na hi ta uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:7 Israel gam sungah a teeng noteʼ beina ding hong tung ta ding hi. Mual sang dawn citeng a biakna munte ah lungdamna om nawn loin buaina bek a omna ding hong nai ta hi. 
Ezekiel7:8 A sawt loin ka hehna thu na thuak ding uh a, na gamtatna sate uh hangin thu hong khenin, a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate uh hangin gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:9 Note kong zah kei dinga, zong kong khasiat kei ding hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtatna sate uh hangin gim a hong pia ding ka hi hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna le note tungah gim a hong pia pa ka hihna na thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Siat nading hun hong tung ta hi. Na ngongtatna uh khang a, na kiphatsakna uh lian hi." 
Ezekiel7:11 Migiloteʼ hauhna le lungmuannate haksa loin bei mang ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:12 A hun hong tung ta a, a ni hong nai ta hi. Mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna hong tung ta ding ahih manin sumzuak sumlei nasepnate a kimanna om nawn lo hi." 
Ezekiel7:13 A neihsa a zuak khia pa in a nuntak sungin a zuak sa van ngahkik lo ding hi. Mi khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung ahih manin a mawhna hangun kuamah nungta lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:14 “Amaute in gal peengkul tum uh a, a vekpi-un kiging uh hi. Ahi zongin mi khempeuh tungah ka hehna tungkim ding ahih manin galsim dingin kuamah kuan khia zo lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:15 Khua pua lamah gal kidona om a, khua sungah cinatna le gilkialna om hi. Gamlak a om khempeuh gal sungah si ding uh a, khua sunga om khempeuh cina le gil kialin si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:16 Vakhu lau bangin mi pawl khatte in mual tung tuh ding uh a, ahi zongin amauʼ mawhna hangin si veve ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Mi khempeuhʼ khut zaw dakdakin, a khuk uh liing kelkel ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Amaute in dahna limin puanhampi silh ding uh a, pumlin gawp ding uh hi. A sam uh kimettolsak dinga, a mindai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:19 Topaʼ hehna amauʼ tungah a tun ni ciangin, a ngun a khamte un amaute suahtak thei lo ahih manin, a ngun a khamte uh nin bangin kongzing lakah paai ding uh hi. A gilkial uh ciangin zong an bangin tuate ne thei lo uh hi. Ngun le khamte in mawhna sungah amaute tumpih zaw hi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Amaute in a kiphatsakpih uh kizepna a manphate, a muhdahhuai milim dingin a bawl uh hi. Tua ahih manin amauteʼ hauhna pen amau mah in a kih dingin ka bawl hi." 
Ezekiel7:21 Amauʼ nate, gamdang mite ka sutsak dinga, a neihsa khempeuh uh migilote sutsakin, ka ninsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ka biakinn a kinitsak ciangin ka kho kei ding hi. Gutate in ka biakinn luhin ninsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel7:23 “Na khuttum uh zial un. Bang hang hiam cih leh gam sungah mi kithahna dim a, khua sungah ngongtatna dim hi." 
Ezekiel7:24 Minam gilo pente hong paipihin na innte uh ka luahsak ding hi. Minam dangte in na biakna mun ngeite uh a nitsak ciangin mi thahat-a a kineiteʼ kimuanna bei ta ding hi. 
Ezekiel7:25 Lungkhamna na tuah uh ciangin lungnopna na zong ding uh a, ahi zongin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:26 Lungkhamna khat khit khat a banbanin na tuak ding uh a, thusia bekbek na zaza ding uh hi. Kamsangte kiangah thu na dong ding uh hi. Siampite in mite tungah hong hilh ding thu thei lo ding uh a, upate in hong gen ding mel thei lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel7:27 Kumpipa dahin thum dinga, ulian pen pa a cih nading thei loin om cipin, mi khempeuh lau-in liing ding uh hi. Na gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in gim kong pia dinga, midangte tungah thu na khen bangun note tungah thu kong khen ding hi. Hih bangin kong hih ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak na thei ding uh hi,” cihna thu ahi hi." 
Ezekiel8:1 Salin ka om uh kum guk a phak kum, a kha gukna, a ni nga ni-in sal a om Judah makaite tawh ka inn sungah thu genin ka tut laitakun, thakhatin Topa Pasianʼ vangliatna ka sungah hong tum hi." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ka khuadak leh, mihing tawh a kibang pian khat ka mu hi. A kawng nuaisiah ding teng meikuang tawh kibang a, a kawng tungsiah ding teng sumsan kinawtngil tawh kibangin san heuhau hi." 
Ezekiel8:3 A khut ding tawh a kibang pian khat in hong sawkin ka samin hong man hi. Tua ciangin hih ka maang sungin Pasianʼ kha in vanah hong len pih to-in Jerusalem khuapi hong tunpih hi. Tua lai panin, Pasian a hehsuahna ahi milim a omna mun, biakinn tual sung nung lutna, leilu lam kongpi ah hong paipih hi." 
Ezekiel8:4 Kuam sungah ka maang a ka muh bang teekin tua sanah Pasianʼ minthanna vang ka mu hi. 
Ezekiel8:5 Amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leilu lamah khuadak in,” hong ci hi. Kei zong ka khuadak leh, kongpi kiang a biakna tau kiangah, Pasianʼ hehsuahna milim ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amauteʼ gamtatnate na mu hiam? Israel mite in a bawl uh a muhdahhuai gamtatnate, ka mun siangtho panin a gamla semsem ah kei hong nawh khiatnate en in. Hihte sangin a mindaihuai zaw nangawn na mu lai ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:7 Tua ciangin biakinn tual pua nung lutna gei ah hong paipih a, tua lai ah kulh a vanna mun khat hong lak hi." 
Ezekiel8:8 Amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih kulhpi to vang in,” a hong ci hi. Kei zong kulh ka to vang a, kongkhak khat ka tuak hi." 
Ezekiel8:9 Tua ciangin amah in, “A sungah tum inla, a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate uh va en in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:10 Kei zong a sungah tumin ka khuadak hi. Kawm tung khempeuh ah gul lim, a dang ganhing ninte lim le Israel miteʼ biak ganhing khempeuh a kisuai ziazua ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel8:11 Tua lai ah Israel minam makai sawm sagih na om a, tuateʼ lakah Shafanʼ tapa Jaazaniah zong na om hi. Amaute in paknamtui halna kuang khat ciat tawi uh a, paknamtui a kihalna khute van lamah kah to biaibuai hi." 
Ezekiel8:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite a kimu lo munah a gamtatnate uh tu-in na mu hiam? Amaute in milim a dimna inn sungah biakna a bawl uh hi. Amaute in, ‘ Topa in hong mu lo hi. Topa in hih gam nusia khinta hi,’ ci-in paulap zong uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:13 Tua ciangin, “Hihte sangin a muhdahhuai zaw a gamtatna uh zong na mu lai ding hi,” hong ci thuah lai hi." 
Ezekiel8:14 Tua ciangin leilu lam a om biakinn kongpi ah hong paipih a, Tammuz a cih uh pasian a sihna hangin dahin a kapin a om numeite a hong lak hi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na mu hiam? Hihte sangin a muhdahhuai zaw na mu lai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Tua ciangin biakinn tual sung nungah hong paipih hi. Tua lai ah biakinn kongkhak gei, biakna taute le innliim kikal sanah mihing sawm nih le nga khawng na om a, biakna tau nungngatin nisuahna lam nga-in nisuak tung na bia uh hi." 
Ezekiel8:17 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, huate na mu hiam? Hih Judah gam mite in na muh sa a muhdahhuai a gamtatnate uh tawh lungkim nai lo lai uh a, gam sung khempeuh ah ngongtatna dimsak uh hi. Tua banah ka heh semsem nadingin hih bangin gamta uh hi. A sia thei tawpin hih bangin kei hong simmawh bawlna hong thei in." 
Ezekiel8:18 Tua ahih manin amaute in ka heh mahmahna thuak ding uh a, amaute zah loin, zong ka khasiat kei ding hi. Amaute in a thaneih tawpun kei kiangah thu hong nget uh hangin amauteʼ thungetna ka ngai kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel9:1 Tua ciangin Pasian hong kiko a, “Hih khuapi a susia ding no mihingte hong pai unla, na hiam zat ciat ding uh zong hong keng un,” ci-in a sam hi." 
Ezekiel9:2 Leilu lam biakinn kongpi pualam panin thakhatin mihing guk hong pai-in hiam khat ciat hong tawi uh hi. Saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawi mi khat tawh zong hong pai khawm uh hi. A vekpi-un sumngo biakna tau gei ah hong ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:3 Tua ciangin ama omnasa kherub-teʼ tung panin Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ minthanna vang hong pai-in biakinn kongah hong om hi. Tua ciangin amah in saihadial puan a silh, lai gelhna ding a tawipa samin," 
Ezekiel9:4 “Jerusalem khua sung khempeuh ah pai kawikawi inla, hih khuapi sungah a muhdahhuai gamtatnate a kisepna hangin dahin a lungkham mi khempeuhteʼ taltang ah ciaptehna va bawl in,” ci-in a sawl hi." 
Ezekiel9:5 Tua ciangin Pasian in a midangte kiangah, “Khua sung khempeuh ah amah va zui unla, mi va that un. Kuamah hinkhawi kei unla, kuamah khasiat kei un." 
Ezekiel9:6 Puteek, nungak, tangval, numei, naupang dong takin va that lum unla, ahi zongin a taltang ah ciaptehna a nei peuhmah su kei un. Hih ka biakinn mahmah panin kipan pah un,” a cihna ka za hi. Tua ahih manin tua biakinn sungah a ding Israel makaite, kipatna-in a nei pah uh hi."
