Ezekiel9:7 Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Biakinn ninsak un. A tual tengah misi luanghawm dimsak un. Tu-in kipan un,” ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute kuan khia-in khua sungah mi thah ding a kipan uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:8 Tua bangin mi a kithah laitakin keimah guak ka om hi. Kei zong lei ah bokin, “Topa Pasian aw, Jerusalem tungah na hehna hangin Israel mi a om laisun khempeuh that mang khin ding na hi hiam?” ci-in ka kiko hi." 
Ezekiel9:9 Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Israel mite le Judah miteʼ mawhna nak liat mahmah hi. Gam sung khempeuh mi thahna tawh kidimsak uh a, Jerusalem khuapi, siatna namkim tawh kidimsak uh hi. Amaute in, ‘ Topa in i gam susia khin a, Topa in eite hong mu lo hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel9:10 Tua ahih manin amaute ka zah kei dinga, kuamah ka khasiat kei ding hi. Amauteʼ gamtatna, amauteʼ tung mah ka tusak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel9:11 Tua ciangin saihadial puan silhin lai gelhna a tawi mipa in Topaʼ kiangah thu hong zasakkik a, “Nong sawl bangin ka sem khinzo hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel10:1 Tua ciangin kherub-teʼ lu tung sanah a om a kuum ka et leh sapfaia suangmanpha tawh a kibawl kumpi tokhom bang pian khat, tua a kuum tungah a om hi." 
Ezekiel10:2 Tua ciangin Pasian in saihadial puan a silhpa kiangah, “Na khut dimin mei-am tawi inla, kherub nuai-a om leengpeite kikalah va om in. Tua ciangin khuapi tungah a mei-amte theh in,” ci-in a sawl hi. Kei zong ama pai ka en gige hi." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tua ciangin mipa a pai laitakin kherub-te pen biakinn leitaw lamah na ding uh a, biakinn tual sung nung teng dimin meiipi a kai hi." 
Ezekiel10:4 Kherub-teʼ tung panin Topaʼ minthanna vang hong pai khia-in biakinn kongah va om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn sungah meiipi hong kai a, biakinn tual ah Topaʼ minthanna vang taang zeizai hi." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kherub-teʼ khazap ging pen biakinn tual pua nung ciang dongah kiza a, Vanglian Pasian a pau ciangin a awging tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel10:6 Kherub-teʼ nuai-a om leengpeiteʼ kikal panin mei a la dingin Topa in saihadial puan silhpa a sawl ciangin, tua mipa zong va pai-in leengpei khat gei ah a va ding hi." 
Ezekiel10:7 Tua ciangin kherub khat in a khut zanin amauʼ kikal a om meikhuk sawkin mei-am pawl khat la a, saihadial puan a silhpaʼ khut sungah a koih hi. Saihadial puan a silhpa zong tua mei-amte tawi-in a paikhia hi." 
Ezekiel10:8 Tua kherub-te in a kha nuai ciat uh ah mihing khut tawh a kibang nei ciat uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:9 Tua kherub-teʼ gei ah leengpei khat ciat omin, tua leengpeite suangmanpha bangin tee hi." 
Ezekiel10:10 Tua leengpeite a pianzia kibang kim a, leengpei khat in a kikantanin pei dang khat ciat nei thuah uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Tua kherub-te a pai ciangin kihei kul loin a utna lam peuhpeuh uh ah pai thei uh hi. A pai nading lam a nga a pei paina ah a dangte in zui-in kihei tuan lo uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:12 A leengpei kualte a pei kanna khaute le a pei buppi dimin mittang om hi. 
Ezekiel10:13 Hih leengpeite pen maang ka muh masakna sungate mah tawh a kibang ahi hi. 
Ezekiel10:14 Tua kherub-te in maitang li ciat nei uh hi. A maitang khatna bawngtal maitang, a nihna mihing maitang, a thumna humpinelkai maitang, a lina muvanlai maitang tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Hih kherub-te pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh ganhingte mah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih kherub-te leeng to uh a," 
Ezekiel10:16 amau a kin uh ciangin a leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. A leeng dingin a kha a zal uh ciangin zong leengpeite in zui lai uh hi. 
Ezekiel10:17 Kherub-te a khawl ciangin leengpeite khawl a, kherub-te a leen ciangin leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua leengpeite pen kherub-teʼ khutnuai ah a om ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:18 Tua ciangin biakinn kong panin Topaʼ minthanna vang pai khia-in kherub-teʼ tung sanah va om hi. 
Ezekiel10:19 Tua bangin ka et laitakin kherub-te in zong a kha uh zalin leilak panin leeng to uh a, leengpeite in zong a zui uh hi. Biakinn nisuahna lam kongpi ah khawl uh a, amauteʼ tung sanah Israel Pasianʼ minthanna vang zong a khawl hi." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hih kherub-te pen, Israel Pasian a kumpi tokhom tawh a pua, Khebar Gun gei-a ka muhte mah hi, ci-in ka thei hi." 
Ezekiel10:21 Amaute in maitang li, kha li le a kha nuai ciat uh ah mihing khut tawh a kibang khut nei ciat uh hi." 
Ezekiel10:22 Amauteʼ maitang pen Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh sa maitangte mah tawh kibang linlian a, a pai uh ciangin a mailam ciat mahah tang takin a pai thei uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:1 Tua ciangin Pasianʼ kha in biakinn nisuahna lam kongpi ah hong paipih hi. Tua kongpi gei ah mihing sawm nih le nga na om a, tuate lakah minam makai ahi nihte, Azzurʼ tapa Jaazaniah le Benaiahʼ tapa Pelatiah-te zong na kihel uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:2 Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih mite pen khuapi sungah thu hoih lo a gen migilote ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:3 Amaute in, ‘Inn lam ding hun nai lo hi. Hih khuapi pen an huanna beel tawh kibang hi. Eite pen beel sunga kihuan sa tawh i kibang hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:4 Tua ahih ciangin Ezekiel aw, hih mite tungah thukhenna thu gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:5 Ka sungah Topaʼ kha hong lutin mite tungah hih bangin thugen dingin hong sawl hi: “Israel mite aw, na thugente uh le na ngaihsutnate khempeuh uh ka thei hi." 
Ezekiel11:6 Hih khua sungah mi tampi tak that na hih manun kongzing khempeuh ah si luanghawm kidim hi. 
Ezekiel11:7 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in note kiangah kong gen thu in: Hih khuapi, an huanna beel tawh kibang hi, na cih uh man hi. Beel sunga om sa pen na thah sa uh misi luanghawmte ahi hi. Ahi zongin note na hih uh leh khuapi sung panin kong lawn khia ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:8 Note in namsau na kihta uh hi. Ahi zongin namsau tawh note a hong sat ding mi kong paisak ding hi. 
Ezekiel11:9 Khuapi sung panin note hong la khia-in gamdang miteʼ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Note a si dingin thu kong khen khin hi. 
Ezekiel11:10 Na gam sung uh ah galin na si ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel11:11 Note, beel sunga a om sa bang na hi kei uh hi. Hih khuapi in note hong hu lo ding hi. Israel gam sung na omna peuhpeuh uh ah gim kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:12 Noteʼ kiim a om minam dangteʼ ngeinate zui-in na om laitakun kei pen Topa ka hihna thu, na palsat uh thukhamte keima thukham ahihna le na zuih loh uh thupiaknate keima thupiak ahihna na thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:13 Tua bangin thu genin ka om laitakin Benaiahʼ tapa Pelatiah hong din sih hi. Kei zong leilak ah bok sukin ka kiko a, “Topa Pasian aw, Israel gam sungah a om lai mi khempeuh thah khit sawm na hi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:14 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khua sunga teeng mite in nang le salin a om na mipihteʼ thu gen uh a, ‘Salin a om mite pen Topa tawh kigamla om lua khinta uh hi. Amah in eima luah dingin hih gam hong pia khinta hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel11:16 Tua ahih ciangin na salpihte kiangah hih bangin keima thugente va gen sawn in: A gamlapi gamah a teeng dingin pua khia-in, gam dangah a thehthang pa pen keimah ka hi hi. Ahi zongin amauteʼ omna gam dangah tawl khat sung bek kei a hong bia dingin ka omsak hi." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Tua ahih manin Topa ahi keimah in amaute kiangah ka gen thu va gen in. Amaute ka thehthangna gam panin khawmkikin, amaute tungah Israel gam ka piakik ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:18 Amaute hong ciahkik ciangin a nin nate khempeuh le a muhdahhuai milimte khempeuh a nil khia ding uh ahi hi. 
Ezekiel11:19 Amaute tungah lungsim thak le ngaihsutna thak ka pia ding hi. Amauteʼ suang lungtang paih khiatsakin mihing lungtang ka guan ding hi. 
Ezekiel11:20 Tua ciangin amaute in ka thukhamte zui-in ka thupiak khempeuh citakin mang ding uh hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi-in, kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ahi zongin a nin a muhdahhuai milim a bia nuamte ahihleh gim ka pia ding hi. Amauʼ gamtatna tawh a kizui-in gim ka pia ding hi, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel11:22 Tua ciangin a leeng dingin kherub-te in a kha uh zal a, a leengpeite in zong a zui hi. Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ minthanna vang amauteʼ tung sanah a om hi." 
Ezekiel11:23 Tua ciangin Topaʼ minthanna vang zong khuapi sung panin pai khia-in khuapi nisuahna lamah a om mual tungah a om hi. 
Ezekiel11:24 Tua ciangin ka maang sung mahin Pasianʼ kha in hong leenpihin Babylon gamah salin a omte kiang hong tunpih hi. Tua ciangin ka maangmuhna hong bei ta a," 
Ezekiel11:25 Topa in kei hong muhsak sa thute khempeuh, salin a om mite kiangah ka gen hi." 
Ezekiel12:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lehdo thei mite lakah a teeng na hi hi. Amaute in mit nei napi-in khua mu lo uh hi. Amaute pen a lehdo thei mite ahihna hang uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ezekiel aw, tu-in galtai dingteʼ gamtat bangin na van puak ding guang inla, suntangpi-in paikhia in. Na omna panin na paikhiat lam mi khempeuh musak in. A lehdo thei mi ahih tei hangun a thu theithei kha ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:4 Khuavak lai-in miteʼ muhin salin a pai dingin na van guang inla, nitak ciangin salin a pai ding bangin na pai khiatna mite musak in." 
Ezekiel12:5 Tua bangin amaute in hong et laitakin na kawm su let inla, tua vang panin na van la khia in." 
Ezekiel12:6 Amauteʼ muhin na van na liangko ah kisuan to inla, na pai nading mun na muh theih loh nadingin na mit tun sa-in khuamial lakah paikhia in. Hih bangin na gamtatna pen Israel mite adingin hilhkholhna khat hi ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:7 Kei zong Topaʼ hong sawl bangin ka gamta hi. Galtaiteʼ hih ding bang teekin tua sunin ka van guangin, tua nitak khuamial ciangin ka khut tawh kawm ka su let hi. Amauteʼ muh mahin ka liangko ah van kisuanin ka paikhia hi." 
Ezekiel12:8 A zingsang ciangin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lehdo thei Israel mite in na gamtatna thu nang hong dot uh ciangin," 
Ezekiel12:10 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute kiangah ka gen thu tu-in gen in. Tua thu pen Jerusalem khua sung a uk ulian pa le Jerusalem khua sungah a teeng mi khempeuhte ading ahi hi. 
Ezekiel12:11 Na gamtatna sate pen amaute tungah a thupiang ding lahna lim ahihna thu gen in. Amaute pen a kiman, sal a suak ding mi ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:12 Amaute a uk ulian pa in khuamial lakah a liangko-in ama van pua-in paikhia ding hi. Ama paikhiat nadingin amaute in kulh tawhvang sakin tua panin amah suakta ding hi. Amah in a mai humcip ding ahih manin a pai nading mun mu thei lo ding hi. 
Ezekiel12:13 Ama pai nading munah ka ngenthang ka zak dinga, amah awk ding hi. Tua ciangin Babylon khuapi ah amah ka paipih dinga, a khuapi a mu lopi-in tua lai ah a si ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:14 A ulianpihte, a thulamlakte le amah a cingte, mun citeng ah ka thehthang dinga, amaute a that dingin namsau ka nungdelhsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:15 Minam dangteʼ lak gam dangah amaute ka thehthang ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong phawk ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel12:16 Ahi zongin gal sung, kialpi le natna sung panin tawm khat ka suaktasak dinga, minam dangteʼ lakah a omna mun panun a gamtatna sate uh a muhdah huaina phawkin, kei pen Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:17 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, lau mahmahna tawh a liing kawm sa-in an ne-in tui dawn in." 
Ezekiel12:19 Hih bangin na gamtatna pen, amauteʼ gam a om lai ahi Jerusalem khua mite tungah Topa Pasianʼ thugenna ahihna thu va gen in. Amaute in launa linna tawh an ne-in tui dawn ding uh hi. Amauʼ gam sungah a teengte a hoih gamtat khat beek om lo ahih manin, a gam sung uh ah a om mi khempeuh kipaikhiat pih mang ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:20 Mihing a dimna khuapite kisusia dinga, gam sung khempeuh gamkhing suak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:21 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, bang hangin, ‘Hun beibei a, gen kholhnate a tung om lo hi,’ cih paunak pen Israel miteʼ lakah zat belin kinei ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in tua thu tawh kisai-in ka thugenna amaute kiangah va gen in. Hih paunak ka beisak ta dinga, Israel mite in genin a nei nawn kei ding uh hi. Tu-in a hun a naina le gen kholhnate a manin a tun nading thu amaute kiangah va gen in." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israel mite lakah maangmuhna man lo ahi a, gen kholhna man lo ahi zongin om nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel12:25 Topa ahi keimah in amaute tungah thu ka gen dinga, ka gen bangin tung takpi ding hi. Tu-in zekai nawn lo ding hi. A lehdo thei mihingte aw, hih dingin ka gen bangin nomauʼ nuntak sung mahmah in ka tungsak ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in thu ka gen khinzo hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel12:26 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na maangmuhnate le na thugen kholhnate pen mailam hun saupi ciangin a hong piang pan dingin Israel mite in ngaihsun kha uh hi." 
Ezekiel12:28 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugenna: ‘Zekai cih om nawn lo dinga, ka gen sa bangin tung ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen khinzo hi, ci hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel kamsangte mawhsakna gen in. ‘ Topaʼ thugen ngai in,’ ci khemin amauʼ lungsim bangin thu a genteʼ tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel13:3 Topa Pasianʼ thugen hih bang ahi hi: Hih kamsang haite in gimna thuak ding uh hi. Amaute in amauʼ lungsim bangin thu gen tawmin, maang mu kineih uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:4 Israel mite aw, na kamsangte uh ahihleh innsia lakah a om ngiate tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:5 Amaute in kulh a kicipna munte cing lo uh a, a kicimte ciangkik lo uh ahih manin Topaʼ ni-in gal hong tun ciangin Israel-te hu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:6 Amauteʼ maangmuhnate zuaupi hi a, a thugen kholhnate uh zong zuau thu ahi hi. Keimah in amaute sawl lo napi-in amaute in, ‘ Topa in hih bangin ci hi,’ ci khem uh hi. Tua bang hi napi-in amauteʼ thugente ka tunsak ding a lamen lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:7 Tua ahih manin amaute kiangah ka gen thu in: ‘Na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi hi a, na thugen kholhnate uh zuau thu ahi hi. Note kiangah keimah in thu hong gen lo napi-in keima gen bangin na gen uh hi,’ ka ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:8 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in amaute kiangah, “Na thugente uh zuaupi hi a, na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi ahi hi. Tua ahih manin note kong langpan hi." 
Ezekiel13:9 Zuau thu tawh maang mu kineihin, mite a khialh theih nadingin zuau thu a gen khol no kamsangte gim a hong pia ding ka hi ta hi. Ka mite a kikhop uh ciangin tuate lakah na kihel kei ding uh a, Israel miteʼ min a kigelhna lakah noteʼ min kigelh lo ding hi. Na gam uh ah na ciahkik ngei nawn kei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh thu hoih lo napi-in hoih hi, ci khemin ka mite na makaih khial uh hi. Ka mite in kulh dingin suang a cian uh ciangin no kamsangte in a tungtham buan tawh na zut uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:11 Tu-in na kulh zut uh kicim hi. Tu-in guahpi ka zusak dinga, gialpite in tua kulh kha-in huihpi hat in mut gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:12 Tua bangin kulh a kicip ciangin na kulh zut uh bang phattuamna om ahi hiam, ci-in mite in hong dong ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:13 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Ka hehna tawh huihpi nungsakin, guahpi zusakin, gialpi kiasakin, tua kulhpi ka susia ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:14 A tungtham na zut uh kulh sukhamin, thehthangin, a bul dawksak ding a sawm ka hi hi. Tua bangin ka suksiat ciangin note a hong deng lum ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:15 Tua bangin kulh le tua kulh a zut note in ka hehna na thuak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in, ‘Tu-in kulh maimang ta a, tua mah bangin kulh a zut mite -" 
Ezekiel13:16 thu hoih lo napi-in thu hoih hi, ci-in Jerusalem a lungmuan nadingin thu a gen kamsangte zong bei khinta hi,’ ka ci ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel13:17 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na miteʼ lakah a om, a thugen ding uh a phuak tawm numeite en in. Amauteʼ gamtatna hangin mawhsakna thu gen inla," 
Ezekiel13:18 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: No numeite in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Mi khempeuh in a khut ah a bulh ding uh le a lu tungah a khip ding uh aite na bawl uh a, tua nate in miteʼ lungsim uk hi. Noteʼ phattuam nadingin sih nading le hin nading vangliatna thu, ka mihingte tungah na zang nuam uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:19 Mangbuhham khut khat dim le anlum them tawm khat na ngah theih nadingun ka miteʼ mai ah kei nong minsiasak uh hi. A si dingin a kilawm lopite na that nuam uh a, a hing dingin a kilawm lopite na hingsak nuam uh hi. Tua bangin ka mite tungah zuau thu genin, amaute in noteʼ thugen hong um uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:20 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu in: Sihna le hinna ukna-in na zat uh na aite uh ka deih kei hi. Noteʼ khut panin tuate hong bawh khiatsakin, uk cip dingin na hanciam uh mite ka khah khia ding hi." 
Ezekiel13:21 Na ai khipte uh zong hong hawk khiatsakin noteʼ khut sung panin ka mite ka suaktasak paisuak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel13:22 Keima gen hi lo napi-in na thuzuau gen teng uh tawh mihoihte na lunggimsak uh a, migilote a sih theih nadingun hong kihei loh nading lamah na leh hanthot zawsop uh hi." 
Ezekiel13:23 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na zuau maangmuhnate uh le mi lam a khialsak thei na thugen kholhnate uh bei ta ding hi. Noteʼ khut sung panin ka mite ka hon khia ta dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:1 Tua ciangin Israel mi makai pawl khat kei kiangah hong pai-in Pasianʼ deihna bang ahi hiam, ci-in hong dong uh hi." 
Ezekiel14:2 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih mite in milim bia uh a, milim in mawhna sungah amaute tunpih hi. Amauteʼ thu theihnopte a gen dingin hong um uh ahi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Milim bia-in mawhna sungah milimte kitunsak a, tua khit ciangin kamsangte tungah thu a dong dingin a hong pai Israel mi peuhmah in keima thudawnna kam ngah ding uh hi. Tua thudawnna pen a milim tampite uh in a zak dingun a kilawm dawnna hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:5 Tua milimte in keima kiang panin Israel mite paikhiatpih uh a, ahi zongin tua bangin ka dawnna tawh kei lamah ka mite ngahkik dingin ka kilamen hi." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Hong kiheikik unla, na milimte uh nusia un." 
Ezekiel14:7 Israel mite khat peuhpeuh ahi a, Israel mite lakah a om gamdang mi khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin, kei kiang panin pai khia-in milim bia a, milim in mawhna sungah a tunpih khit ciangin kamsang pa tungah thu a dong dingin a pai leh, Topa ahi keimah in ama thudotna ka dawng ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:8 Amah nialin, midangteʼ etteh dingin ka bawl ding hi. Keima mite lak panin amah ka la khia ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel14:9 Kamsang khat peuhpeuh in khemna tawh a man loin thu hong dawn leh, Topa ahi keima khem hi ding hi. Israel mite lak panin tua kamsang pa ka la khia ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:10 Kamsang pa le kamsang thu a dong pa a gim thuakna uh kibang ding hi. 
Ezekiel14:11 Israel mite in kei hong nusiat loh nading le a mawhna uh tawh a kinitsak loh nadingun hih bangin ka hih ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi ding uh a, kei pen amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:12 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khat peuhpeuh in khialhna bawlin kei tungah hong thuman kei leh keimah in a annek ding teng uh ka susia ding hi. Kialpi tungsakin a mihing a ganhingin ka siasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amauteʼ lakah a om hileh, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtak zo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amauteʼ lakah a om hileh, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtak zo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:14 Noah, Daniel le Job, hih mihing thumte nangawn, amauteʼ lakah a om hileh, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtak zo ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel14:15 Mite a that dingin gamsa kihtakhuaite khah khia-in, kuamah khual a zin ngam lo dingin tua gam sung a lauhuai-in om leh," 
Ezekiel14:16 tua gam sungah hih mihing thumte nangawn a om bang hileh, amauteʼ tanute le tapate nangawn uh suahtak zo loin, amauteʼ nuntakna ciat bek mah suahtak zo ding uh a, tua gam pen gamkhing suak takpi ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:17 Tua gam sungah gal tungsakin, mihing ganhing a siak siang dingin a husia galhiamte kizang leh," 
Ezekiel14:18 tua sungah hih mihing thumte a om hangin amauʼ pumpi ciat sim loh, amauʼ tate nangawn suahtak zo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:19 Tua gamah pulpi tungsakin, ka hehna tawh mihing ganhing sisak leng," 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek a hut zawh cih loh, amauteʼ tate nangawn hu zo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek a hut zawh cih loh, amauteʼ tate nangawn hu zo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:20 tua sungah Noah, Daniel le Job-te a om ahi zongin, amauteʼ hoihna in amauʼ nuntakna ciat bek a hut zawh cih loh, amauteʼ tate nangawn hu zo tuan lo ding hi, ci-in a nungta Topa Pasian ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Topa Pasianʼ thugen hih bang ahi hi: Mihing ganhing a sumai dingin gimna nasia pen li ahi gal, kialpi, a kihtakhuai gamsate le natna, Jerusalem ah ka tungsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:22 A tanute a tapate a paikhiatpih dingin mi khat peuhpeuh a suakta zo kha a om a, nang kiangah hong pai leh, amauteʼ om zia na en in. Amauteʼ gitlohna zia na mu dinga, Jerusalem gim ka piakna a kilawm a thuman mah ahihna na phawk ding hi." 
Ezekiel14:23 Amauteʼ gitlohna zia na muh ciangin ka hihnate khempeuh a kilawm mah ahihna na phawk ding hi. Topa Pasian in thu hong gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel15:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leenggui pen singkung tawh bangci kiteh ding ahi hiam? Tu lak a om singkungte tawh tehna-in leenggui hiangte banga kimang ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Leengguite na-in kizang thei ahi hiam? Vankhaina a zat ding singzum khet dingin kimang thei ahi hiam? 
Ezekiel15:4 Mei tawh nading bekin kimang hi. A mong tuak a kattum khit ciangin a om lai a zulkat teng, bangin kimang nawn ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel15:5 A kaat ma-in zong bangmahin kimang lo ahih manin, kaangin a vom khit ciangin a kimanna om lo semsem hi." 
Ezekiel15:6 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Tu lak a om singte in kimanna nei hi. Ahi zongin leengguite kila-in a kihal tum mah bangin Jerusalem-a teeng mite la khia-in 
Ezekiel15:7 gim ka pia ding hi. Mei panin khatvei a suahtak khit hangun tu-in mei in amaute kaang tum ding hi. Amaute gim ka piak ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi. 
Ezekiel15:8 Keiʼ tungah amaute hong citak lo uh ahih manin gam sung khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a muhdahhuai-in a gamtatna thu Jerusalemʼ tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel16:3 Topa Pasian in Jerusalem tungah ka gen hih thute gen in: Jerusalem aw, nang pen Kanaan gam panin a piang na hi hi. Na pa pen Amor mite hi a, na nu pen Hit mite ahi hi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Nang na suah lai-in kuamah in hong don lo hi. Na lai hong kitansak lo a, hong kisil lo a, ci tawh zong hong kizut lo a, puan tawh zong hong kitun lo hi." 
Ezekiel16:5 Hihte khempeuh a hong hih dingin kuamah in nang hehpihna lungsim hong nei lo hi. Na suah lai-in kuamah in nang hong it lo ahih manin gamlak ah nang hong kipaidak lel hi. 
Ezekiel16:6 “Tua ciangin na kiangah kong pai kha a, sisan naisan lakah na kitomtom kong mu hi. Tua bangin na om laitakin na sih loh nadingin thu kong pia hi." 
Ezekiel16:7 Singkung hoih bangin nang kong khangtosak hi. Nang cidamin nong khangto a, nungak nong suak hi. Na nawite zong hoihtak mahin hong bawk a, na mul zong hong po ta hi; ahi zongin guaktangin na om hi." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Nang kong muh khakkik ciangin pasal nei thei ding hun na hi ta hi. Na pum guakin a om kimlai, ka puan tawh kong khuh a, na zumhuaina teng hong seelsakin, teenpih dingin kam kong ciam hi. Kong kamciamna tangtungsakin nang pen keima-aʼ nong suak hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:9 Kei zong tui la-in na tunga si baang teng kong sawp khiatsak a, oliv thau tawh kong zut zol hi." 
Ezekiel16:10 Puan phan kizem hoihte tawh nang hong zemin, savun hoih pen tawh a kibawl khedap hong bulhsakin, saihadial puan hong khimsakin, nai puan tungsilh kong silhsak hi." 
Ezekiel16:11 Kizepna a manphate nang kong pia a, tau hong butsakin khainiang kong oksak hi." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nakbahte, bilbahte le na khuk ding kumpi lukhu hoih kong guan hi." 
Ezekiel16:13 Tua bangin kham le ngun kibawl kizepnate tawh na kizem a, saihadial puan, nai puan le a kiphan a kizem puante bek na silh tawntung hi. Annel hoih pen pawl a kibawl anlum ne-in, nek ding khuaizu le oliv thaute na kitasam ngei kei hi. Na hoihna a kigen thei lo zahin hong om a, kumpinu na suak hi." 
Ezekiel16:14 A paubaang het lo dingin nang hong bawl ka hih manin gam khempeuh ah na melhoihna kithang kawikawi hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Ahi zongin na melhoihna le na minthanna a sia lamin zangin, na tuah peuhpeuh luppih ding zolna in na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:16 Na puan pawl khatte, na biakna mun zep nadingin na zang a, numei paktat bangin mi citeng tungah na pumpi na pia hi." 
Ezekiel16:17 Nang kong piak sa kham le ngun kibawl kizepnate, pasal limin na bawl a, tuate tawh paktatna na gamta hi." 
Ezekiel16:18 Nang ka hong piak, a kizem a kiphan puan hoihte la-in milimte na silhsak a, nang ka hong piak oliv thau le paknamtuite, milim biakna-in na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:19 Na nek dingin a limci pen annel, oliv thau le khuaizu kong pia a, ahi zongin milim maipha zon nadingin biakna-in tuate na zang hi." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Tua ciangin kei tawh na neih na tanute le tapate la-in milim biakna-in hal tum dingin na pia hi. Kei tungah na cihtak lohna thuneu lua sa a," 
Ezekiel16:21 milim biak nadingin ka tate pia thuah lai na hi hiam? 
Ezekiel16:22 Hih bangin numei paktat nuntakna tawh a mindaihuai-in na om laitakin na neu lai thu, guaktangin na om lai, sisan naisan lakah na kitomtom lai thu na phawk kha kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gimna na thuak ding hi. Hih bang siatna nam khempeuh na gamta khin a," 
Ezekiel16:24 lam gei khempeuh ah milim biakna ding mun bawlin, paktatna na gamta hi." 
Ezekiel16:25 Na melhoihna beelmang na kizut nelh hi. Na kimuh pih peuhpeuh tungah na pumpi na kipia a, a nini-in na paktatna na khan semsem hi." 
Ezekiel16:26 A lan mahmah na veeng Egypt mite na luppih a, na paktatna tawh kei nong hehsak hi." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Tu-in nangmah gim a pia ding le na nopsakna teng a la khia dingin ka khut ka liik khin hi. Nang hong mudahin, na gamtat hoih lohna hangin nang a hong hua Filistia miteʼ khut sungah nang kong pia zo hi." 
Ezekiel16:28 Bang hang hiam cih leh a dangte tawh lungkim zo nai lo na hih manin Assiria mite na nung delh lai hi. Tuate tawh na paktat a, ahi zongin na lungkim zo nai sam kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:29 Sum bawl Babylon mite tawh na paktat a, ahi zongin tuate tawh zong na lungkim zo tuan nai sam kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:30 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: A bangci lawmlawm na hi hiam? Zumna mel thei loin hih bangin na paktat hi. 
Ezekiel16:31 Kongzing citeng ah milim biakna ding mun na bawl a, paktatna na gamta hi. Ahi zongin numei paktat dangte bangin sum a ngah zong na hi kei hi." 
Ezekiel16:32 A pasal it zaw loin, gamdang mite tawh mawhna a bawl numei tawh na kibang hi." 
Ezekiel16:33 Numei paktatte sum tawh kiguai a, ahi zongin nang in na lunggulhte tungah letsong pia zawsopin, nang a hong luppih dingin mun khempeuh panin mi na guai zaw hi." 
Ezekiel16:34 Nang pen a tuampian numei paktat na hi hi. Kuamah in na tua ci gamtat nadingin hong zol lo hi. Nang tungah sum tawh guaihna hong kipia loin nang in na pia zawsop hi. Tua ahih manin a tuampian mahmah na hi hi. 
Ezekiel16:35 “Tua ahih ciangin a paktat Jerusalem aw, Topaʼ thu ngai in." 
Ezekiel16:36 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nang in na puante suah khia-in, numei paktat bangin na pumpi, na lunggulh mite le na milimte tungah kipia-in, milim biakna-in na tate that na hih manin" 
Ezekiel16:37 na lawm luite khempeuh - na it hitaleh na muhdahte hitaleh a vekpi-in ka kaikhawm ding hi. Na kimkot ah amaute omsakin, tua ciangin na puan teng kong hawk khiatsak dinga, na guaktangin na omna ka ensak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Midangte tawh na mawhna hang le na mi thahna hangin thu kong khen dinga, ka hehna tawh sihna kong thuaksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:39 Na lunggulh miteʼ khut sungah kong pia dinga, na paktat gamtatna munte le na milim biakna munte, amaute in susia gawp ding uh hi. Na puante le a manpha na kizepnate hong lak khiatsakin, na guaktangin hong koih ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Amaute in mihonte hanthawnin, tua mihonte in suang tawh nang hong dengin, a namsau uh tawh hong satzan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:41 Amaute in na innte hong hal tum sakin, na gim thuakna, numei honpi ensak ding uh hi. Numei paktat na hihna kong khawlsak dinga, na mawhpih ding pasalte sum tawh na guaihna kong khawlsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:42 Tua ciangin ka hehna dam dinga, daitakin ka om ding hi. Na tungah ka heh nawn kei dinga, zong kong aam nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:43 Na neu lai-a kong bawlna na mangngilh a, hih bang tengin na gamtatnate tawh kei nong hehsak hi. Tua ahih manin na gamtatna tawh kizui-in kong thuk hi. A muhdahhuai na gamtat dangte banah bang hangin hih paktatna gamta thuah na hi hiam?” Topa in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:44 Topa in, “Jerusalem aw, ‘Tanu in a nu sun,’ cih paunak pen mite in nang tungah hong zang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:45 Nang pen na nuʼ ta taktak na hi hi. Na nu in a pasal le a tate mudah hi. A pasalte uh le a tate uh a mudah na sanggam numeite mah tawh na kibang hi. Nang le na sanggam numei ahi khuapi dangte in nu-in Hit mi nei-in, pa-in Amor mi na nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:46 Na unu pen leilu lam a om Samaria le a khuaneute ahi hi. 
Ezekiel16:47 Amauteʼ khekhap zui-in a muhdahhuai amauteʼ gamtatnate bek tawh na lungkim zo nai kei lai a, tawmvei sungin na gamtatnate khempeuh ah amaute sangin na sia zaw hi." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin kong cih in ah: Nang le na khuaneuteʼ gamtat siat zahin na sanggamnu Sodom le a khuaneute gamtat sia ngei nai lo hi. 
Ezekiel16:49 Na sanggamnuʼ mawhna pen: Amah le a tanute in nek ding tampi nei-in nuamsa mahmah in, daitakin om uh ahih manin amaute kiphasak uh a, a zawng a cimawhte don lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:50 Amaute kihisakin ka deih loh nate gamta uh ahih manin, na theih mah bangin amaute ka nusia hi." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria in nangma gamtat siat zah lang gamta lo hi. Na sanggamnu sangin gamtat sia zaw mahmah na hih manin, nang le na sanggam numei dangte i et kak ciangin, amaute a mawh mahmah hi napi-in a mawh lo zah phialin hong kimu hi." 
Ezekiel16:52 Tu-in na mindaina teng na thuak kul hi. Na sanggam numeiteʼ mawhna sangin nangma mawhnate naksiat zaw lua ahih manin nang kiang panin amaute a mawh lo tawh kibang phial hi. Na sanggam numeite a siangtho bangsak phial na hih manin zahla inla maizum in. 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ahi zongin, Sodom le a khuaneute le Samaria le a khuaneute a cithei-in ka bawlkik ding hi. Tua mah bangin nang Jerusalem zong kong cithei sakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:54 Na gamtatna sate hangin na maizum dinga, tua na maizumna in na sanggam numei dangte maingalsak tuam ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Na sanggam numei Sodom le a khuaneute le Samaria le a khuaneute citheikikin a ngei uh bangkik dinga, nang le na khuaneute zong na citheikik ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel16:56 Nangma siatna teng hong kipholak ma, na kiphatsak om hun laitakin na sanggamnu Sodom simmawh bawl hi lo na hi hiam? Tu-in na simmawh ngei na sanggamnu mah na bang teekteek hi. Edom mite, Filistia mite le na kiim a om nang hong mudahte in hong simmawh bawl hi." 
Ezekiel16:57  
Ezekiel16:58 Na gamtat hoih lohna, na zumhuai gamtatna teng na thuak kul hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi. Nang in i kamciamna le i thuciamna don lo na hih manin nangma gamtatna bangin nang tungah kong gamta hi. 
Ezekiel16:60 Ahi zongin na neu lai-a nang tawh i thuciamna len kipin, a kimang tawntung ding thuciamna nang tawh ka bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:61 Na unu le na naunu na ngahkik ciangin na gamtatna sa teng phawkkikin na mai a zum ding hi. Nang tawh i thuciamna sungah a kihel loh hangin amaute pen nangma tanu bangin hong om ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel16:62 Nang tawh ka thuciamna ka bawl pha dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel16:63 Na gamtatna sa khempeuh kong maisak khit ciangin na gamtatna sa khempeuh na phawkkik dinga, maizum lua-in cih nading mel thei loin na om ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel17:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite kiangah thu gentehna khat gen inla," 
Ezekiel17:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Muvanlai a gol mahmah, a khate zong golin a kizal deda khat om hi. Tua muvanlai in khaveng hoih mahmah nei hi. Lebanon Mual tungah va leengin taamtak kung khat a dawn va kuaitan a," 
Ezekiel17:4 sum bawlteʼ omna gamah pua-in sumbuk bawlteʼ khuapi sungah va koih hi. 
Ezekiel17:5 Tua ciangin Israel gam panin leenggui no khat la-in, a khan theih nadingin tui a om tawntungna leihoih mun khat ah a suan hi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Tua leenggui no hong khangin a hiang pha leenggui pi hong suak hi. A hiangte pen muvanlai lamah zaam a, a zungte in lei sung thukpi ah zungkha hi. Tua leenggui in hiang le teh tampi tak nei hi." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Tua ciangin a gol mahmah, a khate golin a mul a pha mahmah muvanlai dang khat a om hi. Tua ahih manin tua leenggui in, ama kisuanna sa mun a tui a ngah sangin tui a tam zaw pia zo ding, ci-in lametna tawh tua muvanlai lamah a zungkha in a tehte zong tua lam mah a ngasak hi." 
Ezekiel17:8 Ahi zongin tua leenggui pen, a teh no-in, a gah gah thei-in leenggui lianpi a suah theih nadingin limtakin tui a ngah theihna mun lei hoihna sungah a kisuan khin sa ahi hi." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka dotnop thu pen: ‘Hih leenggui hingin hoihtakin khang zo ding ahi hiam? Muvanlai masa pen in zungbawhin, a gahte zut khia-in, a hiangte kuaitanin, keu tumsak ding hi lo ahi hiam?’ cihna ahi hi. Tua leenggui bawhkhiat nadingin thahatna ahi a, minam lianpi ahi zongin kisam lo hi." 
Ezekiel17:10 Hih leenggui pen a kisuan hi mah hi. Ahi zongin hingin khang zo ding ahi hiam? Nisuahna huihpi in a mutkhiat ciangin keutum ding hi lo ahi hiam? Tua a kisuanna munah keutum lel ding hi lo ahi hiam?” a hong ci hi. 
Ezekiel17:11 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Hih a lehdo thei mite in hih thu gentehna a khiatna a thei uh hiam, dong in. Jerusalem khua ah Babylon kumpipa hong pai-in a kumpipa le a uliante manin Babylon ah a ciah pihna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel17:13 Amah in kumpipaʼ innkuan pih mite khat la-in, amah tawh thuciamna khat bawl a, ama tungah a thuman taktak nadingin kiciamna bawlsak hi. Tua gam a mi liante ciahpih hi." 
Ezekiel17:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh tua minamte in leh dokik nawn loin, a thuciam bawlna uh a kizuihna ding a deihna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ahi zongin Judah Kumpipa in amah lehdo veve a, sakol galkap honpite a ngen dingin Egypt gamah mi pai simsak hi. A deihna bangin tangtung ding ahi hiam? Tua bangin a gamtatna tawh suakta zo ding ahi hiam? A thuciamna palsat napi-in gimthuak loin om thei ding ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, kumpi tokhom tungah a tusak, Babylon kumpipa tawh a thuciamna palsat ahih manin Babylon gamah hih kumpipa si ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:17 Babylon mite in mi tampi a thah theih nadingun kan bawlin dum a tawh uh ciangin a thahat Faroʼ galkap honpite nangawn in amah huh zo lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel17:18 Amah in a kiciamna le a thuciamna palsatin hih bangin gamta khin ahih manin, amah suakta ngei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:19 “Tua ahih ciangin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin a zuih dingin keima min tawh a kiciam thukimna palsat ahih manin gim ka pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel17:20 Amah a awk theih nadingin ngenthang ka zak dinga, amah ka awksak ding hi. Kei tungah amah hong thutak lo ahih manin Babylon ah paipihin tua lai ah gim ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:21 A galkap muanhuai pente, gal sungah si dinga, a suakta sunte zong mun citeng ah kithehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ahi keimah in thu a gen ka hih lam na phawk ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel17:22 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “Keimah in taamtak sangpi a dawn khat la-in, a dawnngek khat ka sat khia dinga, mual sangpi dawn khat ah ka suan ding hi." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel mual sang pen dawnah suanin, a hiang zaai-in a gah luai dinga, taamtak lianpi khat suak ding hi. Tua tungah vasa nam khempeuh tawlnga dinga, bu bawlna munin a nei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel17:24 Tua ciangin singkung sangte phukin, singkung neute a liansak pa, singkung hingte keusakin, singkung keute a hingkiksak Topa ka hihna thu gam sunga om singkung khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin a, hih dingin ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel18:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Israel gam sungah mite in zat belin a neih paunak, ‘A pate in leenggah thuk ne a, a tateʼ ha kim,’ cihna pen bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin kong genin ah: Israel gam sungah hih paunak na zang nawn kei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel18:4 Mi khempeuh keima aʼ hi a, pate ahi a, tate ahi zongin keima-aʼ ahi hi. A mawh mipa bek si ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Gentehna-in mi a hoih mahmah, a thuman, a dik tat mi khat om hi." 
Ezekiel18:6 Amah in Israel miteʼ milim biakte biakpih lo a, milim biakna pia lo ding, ci-in a kikhamna munah milim biakna sate zong ne lo hi. Midangteʼ zi zong luppih dingin zol lo a, numei in nin a neih laitakin zong luppih lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:7 Kuamah khem lo a, kuama na zong sut lo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vakin, puan nei lote puan guan hi." 
Ezekiel18:8 A meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia lo hi. Gamtat siat ding ut lo a, miteʼ thu a manin khensak hi." 
Ezekiel18:9 Amah in ka thupiakte mangin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui hi. Tua bang mi pen mihoih ahih manin nungta ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Tua ciangin gentehna-in hih mihoih pa in tapa khat nei a, tua tapa in miʼ na gu-in mi that a, a paʼ gamtat ngei loh a sia teng gamta hi." 
Ezekiel18:11 Amah in milim biakna pia lo ding a kici munah a kipia biakna sate ne a, midangteʼ zite zolin luppih hi." 
Ezekiel18:12 Mizawng mi cimawhte khemin, miʼ na sut a, sum leitawi a lapa in khapna-in a piak nate piakik loin kem suak hi. Milim bia-in a zumhuai-in gamta hi." 
Ezekiel18:13 A meet lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia a, a meet zong a kilawm loin tampi tak la hi. Hih bang mipa nungta ding ahi hiam? Nungta het lo ding hi. Hih bangin a mindai huaite khempeuh gamta ahih manin tuateʼ hangin amah si ding hi. Ama sihna pen ama mawhna hang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Gentehna-in hih mihoih lopa in tapa khat hong nei hi. Tua a tapa in a paʼ gamtat hoih lohna teng mu a, a paʼ gamtat bangin gamta lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:15 Israel miteʼ milim biakte biakpih lo a, a kikhamna munah biakna-in a kipia biakna sa zong ne lo hi. Midangteʼ zi zol lo a, zong luppih lo hi." 
Ezekiel18:16 Kuamah bawlsia lo a, kuama na zong sut lo hi. Sum leitawi a lapa in a khapna van a apte zong piakik hi. Gilkialte an vak a, puan nei lote puan guan hi." 
Ezekiel18:17 Gamtat siat ding ut lo a, a meet bekbek lunggulhna-in sum leitawi pia lo hi. Ka thukhamte zui-in ka thupiakte mang hi. Tua ahih manin hih mipa pen nungta dinga, a paʼ mawhna hangin si het lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:18 A pa in ahihleh miʼ na sutin, mite tungah a sia gamta tawntung hi. Tua ahih manin ama mawhna hangin a mahmah si hi." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Ahi zongin, ‘Bang hangin a paʼ mawhna a tapa in thuak lo ding ahi hiam?’ nong ci kha ding uh hi. A tapa a hoih a manin a gamtatna hang ahi hi. Amah in ka thukhamte kemin hoihtakin zui hi. Tua ahih manin pel loin amah nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:20 A si ding pa pen a mawh mipa ahi hi. Ta in paʼ mawhna thuak lo dinga, tua mah bangin pa in taʼ mawhna thuak lo ding hi. Mihoih pa in a hoihna thaman ngah dinga, migilo pa in a gitlohna thaman thuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Migilo khat in a mawh bawlna khawlin ka thukham zui henla, a hoih a manin gamta leh, tua mipa si lo dinga, pel loin nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ama mawhna sa khempeuh kimaisak dinga, amah a manin a gamtat manin nungta ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:23 Migilo khat a si ka muh ciangin a lungdam dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? Ka lung dam het lo hi. Amah hong kisikin a nuntak ding pen keima deih ahi zaw hi. 
Ezekiel18:24 Ahi zongin mihoih khat in a gamtat hoihna teng khawlin, migiloteʼ gamtat bangin a mindaihuai gamtat siate gamtat ding hong kipan leh, amah nungta paisuak ding ahi hiam? Nungta het lo ding hi. A hoih ama gamtatna sate kiphawksak lo ding hi. Ama cihtak lohna le ama mawhna hangin si ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Ahi zongin note in, ‘ Topaʼ hihna zia man lo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, ka thugen hong ngai un. Keima hihna zia a man loin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam? A man lo pen nomauʼ ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel18:26 Mihoih khat a gamtat hoih khawlin mawhna a bawl ciangin si ding hi. Ama sihna pen a gamtat siatna hang ahi hi. 
Ezekiel18:27 Migilo khat a gitlohna panin khawlin a hoih a manin gamta leh ama nuntakna a suahtak ahi hi. 
Ezekiel18:28 Amah in a gamtatna phawkin a mawh bawlna khawl hi. Tua ahih manin amah si het lo dinga, nungta paisuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Ahi zongin no Israel mite in, ‘ Topaʼ hihna zia man lo hi,’ na ci uh hi. Israel mite aw, keima hihna zia man lo ahi zenzen hiam? A man lo pen nomauʼ ngaihsutna zia hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in note kiangah kong genin ah: Israel mite aw, na gamtatna sa bang ciat un thu kong khen ding hi. Kisikkikin na gamtat siatna khempeuh panun khawl unla, na mawhna hangun kisisak kei un." 
Ezekiel18:31 Na gamtatna sa uh mawhna khempeuh nusia unla, na lungsim uh le na ngaihsutna uh thaksuaksak un. Bang hangin no Israel mite si nuam na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Kuama sih ding ka deih kei hi. Tua ahih manin na mawh gamtatna uh khawlin nungta un, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel19:1 Israel uliante hih bangin tamlawh in hong ci hi: 
Ezekiel19:2 Na nu uh humpinelkai tawh kibang hi. Humpinelkai dangte tawh kikhawlin, a note a khoi hi." 
Ezekiel19:3 A note khat thuhilh a, hong khang cing hi. Sabet zong hong siam a, mi hong ne hi." 
Ezekiel19:4 Mite in tua thu za uh a, gum sungah awksak uh hi. Bawm sungah khum uh a, Egypt gamah paipih uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:5 A piʼ lametna teng bei ta hi. A no dang khat pantah leuleu a, a khang cing khat a suah hi." 
Ezekiel19:6 Amah hong khang cing a, a dangte tawh kikhawl hi. Sabet zong hong siam a, mi hong ne hi." 
Ezekiel19:7 Kulhpite su gawp a, khuapite siasak hi. Hawk zelzel a, a za mite lau mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel19:8 Amah a hih dingin mite kikaikhawm uh a, mun khempeuh panin hong kuan uh hi. A ngenthang uh zak uh a, thang ah a awksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bawm sungah khum uh a, Babylon kumpipa kiang a tunpih uh hi. Israel mual tung tengah ama hawkna a kizak nawn loh nadingin a khumcip uh hi." 
Ezekiel19:10 Na nu uh, luitui gei ah a kisuan leenggui tawh kibang hi. Tui tampi ngah a, a teh, a gah, a pha hi." 
Ezekiel19:11 A gui hiangte hong lian a, kumpi ciangkhut hong suak hi. Leenggui hong khang a, van hong ban hi. A teh pha-in sang mahmah a, mi khempeuh in mu kim hi." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ahi zongin hehna tawh leenggui kizung bawh a, leilak kidenna hi. Nisuahna huihpi hong nung a, a gah teeng keu tumsak hi. A hiangte kikuai tan a, keu-in kihal tum hi." 
Ezekiel19:13 Tui om lohna lei keu gamah tu-in hih leenggui kituah hi. 
Ezekiel19:14 Hih leenggui mei in kaang a, a hiang a gah kaang tum mang hi. A hiangte liankik nawn lo dinga, kumpi ciangkhut suakkik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Hih a tunga pen tamlawhna hi a, a kisa zelzel ngei khat ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:1 Sal ka suah uh a kum sagih kum, a kha ngana, a ni sawm ni-in Topaʼ kiang panin thu a dong dingin Israel makai pawl khat ka kiangah hong pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:2 Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen, ‘Kei tungah thu a dong dingin hong pai na hi uh hiam? Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin noteʼ thudotin ka om het kei ding hi, ci-in gen in,’ hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute tungah thu a khen dingin na kiging nai hiam? Na kigin khit leh amaute tungah thu khen in. A pu a pate uhʼ gamtat hoih lohna teng amaute phawksak in." 
Ezekiel20:5 Amaute tungah keima thugente gen in. Israel mite ka teel laitakin amaute tungah thuciamna khat ka bawl hi. Egypt gam sungah amaute tungah ka kilang a, kei pen Topa noteʼ Pasian ka hi hi, ci-in ka kigen hi." 
Ezekiel20:6 Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiat pihin, amaute adingin ka zon khiatsak, bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna gam ahi, gam sung khempeuh panin a hoih penna munah amaute ka tunpih ding ni teek mahin ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel20:7 Kei pen Topa amauteʼ Pasian ka hih manin a muhdahhuai a milim itte uh pai khia-in, Egypt miteʼ pasian man lote tawh a kinitsak loh nading uh ka gen hi." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ahi zongin amaute in kei hong demin, ka thugen hong ngai lo uh hi. A muhdahhuai a milimte uh paikhia tuan lo uh a, Egypt pasian-te zong nusia lo uh hi. Tua hi a, ka heh mahmahna teng Egypt gam sungah thuaksak gawp ning, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin no Israel mite kong paikhiatpih ding hi, ci-in amauʼ ompih miteʼ zakin gen khin ka hih manin, tua bangin gim thuaksak leng keima min a daisak suak ding, cih ngaihsutna hangin gim ka pia kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:10 “Tua ahih ciangin Egypt gam panin amaute paikhiat pihin gamlak ka tunpih a," 
Ezekiel20:11 a zui peuhpeuh a nuntak theih nading ka thukhamte le ka thupiaknate ka hilh hi. 
Ezekiel20:12 Topa ahi keimah in amaute pen mi siangtho-in ka bawlna thu a phawk nadingun koteʼ kikalah thukimna limin Sabbath tan ding thu ka pia hi. 
Ezekiel20:13 Ahi zongin Israel mite in gamlak nangawn ah kei hong dem uh a, a zui peuhpeuh in nuntakna a ngah nading uh ahi keima thukhamte le ka thupiaknate a nial uh hi. Ka Sabbath-te zong nakpi takin siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute a maiman nadingin ka hehna teng gamlak ah a thuaksak gawp dingin ka kithawi hi." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ahi zongin Egypt gam panin amaute ka paikhiat pihna minam dangte in hong mu khin ahih manin tua bangin gamta leng, keima mindai nading mah hi zel ahih manin amaute bangmah ka cih kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:15 Tua ahih manin bawngnawi le khuaizu tui bangin a luanna, gam hoih pen ahi, amaute tungah ka piak sa gamah amaute ka paipih loh nading thu, gamlak ah ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel20:16 Tua bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zui lo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Amaute in kei hong biak ding uh sangin milim biak ding ut zaw uh ahihna hang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:17 “Ahi zongin amaute ka khasiat a, gamlak ah amaute ka susia kei a, ka maimangsak kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:18 A tate uh kiangah, ‘Na pu na pate un a bawl thukhamte zui kei unla, amauteʼ tat ngeinate zui kei un. A milim biakte uh tawh zong kininsak kei un." 
Ezekiel20:19 Kei pen Topa ahi noteʼ Pasian ka hi hi. Ka thukhamte zui unla, ka thupiaknate bangin gamta un." 
Ezekiel20:20 Kei pen Topa ahi noteʼ Pasian ka hihna na phawk nading uh le note tawh i bawl sa thukimna lim dingin Sabbath-te na siangthosak un,’ ka ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:21 “Ahi zongin a tate nangawn un kei hong dem uh hi. A zuite in nuntakna a ngah nading ahi ka thukhamte palsatin ka thupiaknate mang lo uh a, Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua ahih manin, ka hehna teng gamlak ah thuaksak gawpin, amaute a sumai dingin ka kithawi hi." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ahi zongin tua bangin hih leng, Egypt gam panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih hong mu miteʼ lakah ka mindai ding ahih manin amaute ka susia kei hi." 
Ezekiel20:23 Tua ahih manin leitung gam khempeuh ah amaute ka thehthang gawp nading thu, amaute tungah kiciamna dang khat tua gamlak ah ka bawl leuleu hi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Hih bangin kiciamna ka bawlna pen, amaute in ka thupiaknate nialin, ka thukhamte zui lo uh a, ka Sabbath-te siasak uh hi. Tua banah a pu a pate un a biak milimte mah a biakna hang uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Tua ahih manin kei zong amaute adingin nuntakna a piangsak lo thukhamte le thupiaknate amaute tungah ka pia hi. 
Ezekiel20:26 Amauteʼ biakpiaknate mah tawh amau mah kininsakin, a tapa upa pente uh zong biakna-in ka piasak hi. Hih bangin ka hihna pen amaute gimpiakna le kei pen Topa ka hihna thu a hong theih nading uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen pen Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: A cihtak lohna uh tawh na pu na pate un ka min hong daisakin kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:28 Amaute tungah piak dingin ka ciamna gamah amaute ka paipih hi. Amaute in mual sang ahi a, singniim khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin a muh uh ciangin tua bang mun khempeuh ah biakna a pia uh hi. Meihal biakna a piakna uh le tui phih biakna a piaknate uh tawh kei hong hehsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:29 Amaute kiangah, ‘Na paina uh mun sangte bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in ka dong hi. Tua ahih manin tua hun a kipanin tua munte pen ‘Mun Sangte,’ kici hi." 
Ezekiel20:30 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin gen in: Na pu na pate un a bawl mawhnate mah note in zong bawlin a milimte mah uh sulzuih ding na hi uh hiam? 
Ezekiel20:31 Tu ni ciang dongin note in a kipia ngei letsongte mah puakin, tua milimte mah biakna-in na tate uh na hal uh ciangin no le no a kininsak tawm na hi uh hi. Tua bangin na gamtat khit uh ciangin no Israel mite, kei kiangah thu a dong dingin nong pai lai uh hi. Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, noteʼ thudotin ka om het kei taktak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:32 Note in na lungsim ngaihsutna uh khensat khinin, gam dangah a teeng minam dangte mah bangin sing le suang na bia nuam uh hi. Ahi zongin noteʼ ut bang hi thei ngei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khut khauh tak le ka vangliatna le ka hehna tawh note kong uk gawp taktak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:34 Gam khempeuh ah note kong thehthangna panin kong kaihkhopkik ciangin note tungah ka vangliatna le ka hehna kong lak ding hi. 
Ezekiel20:35 Note pen minam tuamtuamteʼ gamah kong paipih dinga, tua munah maitang kituahin note tungah thu kong khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:36 Egypt gam sung Sinai gamlak ah na pu na pate uh tungah thu ka khen mah bangin tu-in noteʼ tungah kong khen ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Note khauh takin kong uk dinga, thuciamna kong zuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:38 Note lak panin a lehdo thei mite le kei tungah hong mawh mite ka la khia ding hi. Tu laitakin a om pakna uh gam panin ka la khia dinga, ahi zongin Israel gamah ka ciahsakkik kei ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:39 Topa Pasian in, “Israel mite khempeuh aw, na milimte uh biabia un! Ahih hangin tu a kipanin keima thu nong man uh kul dinga, na milimte uh letsong piakna tawh ka min siangtho na daisak nawn kei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:40 Topa Pasian in, “Ka mual siangtho, Israel mual sang tungah Israel mite khempeuh in kei nong bia ding uh hi. Note tungah kong lungdam ta dinga, biakpiaknate, a limci pen piaknate le na letsong siangthote uh kong lamen ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:41 Na kithehthangna uh gam tuamtuam panin note hong paikhiat pihin mun khat ah note kong kaihkhop khit ciangin a namtui na biakpiaknate uh kong sang ding hi. Note in kei nong biak manun minam dangte in a siangtho ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel20:42 Na pu na pate uh tungah piak dingin ka ciam Israel gam sungah note kong tunpih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel20:43 Tua hun ciangin, a kilawm loin na gamtatnate khempeuh uh le nomau mah na kinitsak tawmna thute uh na phawk ding uh a, na gamtat siatna sate uh hangin nomau mah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel20:44 Na gitlohna, na gamtat siatna uh tawh kizui-in note tungah hong bawl loin, ka min a dai khak ding khualna tawh note tungah hong gamta ka hih manin kei pen Topa ka hihna thu no Israel mite in na hong thei ding uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:45 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, leitaw lam gam en inla, leitaw lam gam siat nading thu genin, leitaw lam gam tulakte a siat nading thu gen khol in." 
Ezekiel20:47 Leitaw lam tulakte kiangah thu gen inla, Topaʼ thugen ngai un. Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En un, tu-in gam hal a kipan ding ka hi a, na sunga om singkung a hing, a keu-in kaang tum mang ding hi. Kuamah in tua meikuang phelh zo lo ding hi. A taw panin a khung dongin kaang tum mang ding hi." 
Ezekiel20:48 Hih gam sung a hal pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu le kuamah in a phelh zawh lohna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel20:49 Tua ciangin kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, kei hong sawl kei in. Mi khempeuh in kei pen khiatna nei-a thugen thei pa hi, ci-in a hong ngaihsut uh ka hi hi,” ci-in ka nial hi." 
Ezekiel21:1 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Jerusalem khuapi le mite in biakna a piakna uh mun tuamtuamte mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel21:3 Israel gam mite tungah Topa ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: ‘Note ka hong langpan hi. Ka namsau dokin note a sia a pha a kibangin kong that mangkhin ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:4 Tua bangin kong thah nadingin leitaw lam pan leilu lam dongin mi khempeuh tungah ka namsau ka zang ding hi. 
Ezekiel21:5 Topa ahi keimah in namsau ka dawh khitna le a paai ah ka siatkik loh nading thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,’ ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Tua ahih ciangin mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, a lungkham mahmah bangin khuisa inla, mi khempeuhʼ muh dingin thumin tau in." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tua bangin na omna thu mite in hong dot ciangin mailam a thupiang ding hangin a tua ci om na hihna thu gen in. Tua hun ciangin a lungsim uh launa tawh kidimin, launa hangin a khut uh liingcipin, a hanna lungsim uh bei-in, lau-in a khuk uh a liin kelkelna ding thu le, tua hun ding pen tu-in a hong tung ta ahihna thu gen in,” Topa Pasian in a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:8 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu ding gen khol inla, Topa in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Namsau khat kitat hiam a, hoihtakin kipuah kilkel hi." 
Ezekiel21:10 Mi thah nadingin kitat hiam sitset a, khuaphia bangin a tee zialzial dingin a kipuah hi. Note in thuhilhna ngai nuam lo na hih manun, kuamah in tua namsau kho thei lo hi." 
Ezekiel21:11 Tua namsau limtakin kipuah a, zat pah lian dingin kikoih hi. Mi that ding paʼ zat dingin kitat hiamin kipuah siang hi." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, awng inla kiko in. Hih namsau pen ka mihingte le Israel makai khempeuh a kisawmna ahi hi. Amaute pen ka mite khempeuh tawh a kithat khawm ding ahi hi. Dahna tawh na dip hum in." 
Ezekiel21:13 Note hong kize-et ahi hi. Note in thuhilhna nial lailai le-uhcin, hih thu khempeuh piang loin om ding ahi hiam, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in mailam thu ding gen khol in. Na khut beeng in. Namsau in satsat ding hi. Tua namsau pen mi a that namsau, mi a lausak namsau, mi a lomlomin a that namsau ahi hi." 
Ezekiel21:15 Tua namsau in ka mite meidawi sakin puksak hi. Khuaphia bangin a tee zalzal, mi that dingin a kithawi ka namsau tawh a khuapi uh ka ngim hi." 
Ezekiel21:16 A hiam namsau aw, na ziat na vei vat gawp in! Na ngatna san peuhpeuh vat gawp in." 
Ezekiel21:17 Kei zong ka khut ka beeng dinga, tua ciangin ka hehna dam ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel21:18 Topa in kei tungah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa a namsau tawh hong kuan theih nading lampi nih ciaptehna bawl in. Tua lampi nihte pen gam khat panin a kipan khawm ding ahi hi. Tua lampi a katna munah ciaptehna khat phut in." 
Ezekiel21:20 Tua lamka khat in Ammon miteʼ khuapi Rabbah ah kumpipa a tun theih nadingin lak dinga, a khat pen in Judah gam sunga om Jerusalem khuapi sung teek a tun nadingin lak ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:21 Lamka a tun ciangin Babylon kumpipa khawl phot ding hi. A tot ding lampi a theih nadingin ai nam tuamtuam san dinga, a thaltangte sing seuhseuhin, inn sung pasian milimte thu dongin, biakna-in a gawh ganhingteʼ sin a vel ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Jerusalem ah a pai ding ai a phatna a lak a thaltangte a taklam khut ah a tawi hi. Tua ai in Jerusalem ah a pai nading, galnanna ding phung a cianna ding, galsim nadingin a kikona ding, kulhpite sat khapna ding molhtumte a bawlna ding, kidalna ding phung bawlin dumte a tawh nading a gen hi." 
Ezekiel21:23 Jerusalem khua mite in khatlekhat a kihuhna ding uh midangte tawh thukimna nei khin uh ahih manin hih bangin amauʼ khuapi a kisawmna thu um lo uh hi. Ahi zongin hih bangin ai a kisanna pen amauʼ mawhna a phawk theih nading uh le amaute a kiman ding ahih lam a theih nading uh lim khat ahi hi. 
Ezekiel21:24 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu pen: Na mawhna teng uh tu-in hong kipholak hi. Na mawhna uh mi khempeuh in thei hi. Na gamtatna panun na mawhna uh kilang hi. Mawhsakna a thuak ding na hi ta uh a, na galte uh khut sungah a hong pia ding ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel21:25 “A gilo, a siangtho lo, Israel gam uk migilo pa aw, nangʼ hun zong hong tung ta a, gim na tuah ding ni hi ta hi." 
Ezekiel21:26 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na kumpi lukhu le na dialkhip la khia in. Nidang bang nawn lo ding hi. Mi neute hong lian dinga, mi liante hong neu ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Siacip! Siacip! Hih khuapi ka sia cimitsak dinga, a mel a mang zong kimu nawn lo ding hi. A uk dingin a kilawm mipa hong om ciang bekin ama khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mailam thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in Israel mite a simmawh bawl Ammon mite tawh kisai-in ka thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: A vatlum dingin namsau khat a baih sa-in om a, mi thah nadingin kinawtngil a, khuaphia bangin a tee zialzial dingin a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel21:29 No Ammon mite aw, a siangtho lo, migilote, gim a tuahna ding uh a hun tung ta ahih manin sumai gawp un, ci-in a hong hanthawn, na maangmuhnate uh zuaupi hi a, na ai phate uh a mawkna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel21:30 “A do dingin kithawi vet kei unla na namsau uh a paai ah siatkik zaw un. Note na pianna gam, na suahna mun uh ah, thu a hong khen ding ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel21:31 Note tungah ka hehna kong khah dinga, mei-am kuang hong bang ding hi. Mi thah a siam, migiloteʼ khut sungah note kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel21:32 Mei in note hong kaang tum dinga, noteʼ gam mahah na sisan uh luangin, kuamah in note hong phawk kha nawn lo ding hi, Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tungah thukhen dingin na kiging nai hiam? A gamtat hoih lohna khempeuh tua khuapi kiangah gen in." 
Ezekiel22:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Nangma mite mahmah tampi tak thatin, milim biakna tawh nangmah kininsak tawm na hih manin, tu-in na hun hong tung ta hi." 
Ezekiel22:4 Na mi thahna hang le na milim bawlna hangin a mawh suak na hih manin tu-in nang adingin a ni cingin, a kha cing ta hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangteʼ simmawh bawl, gamdang khempeuhʼ hih thopthopin nang kong koih hi." 
Ezekiel22:5 A nai, a gamla ah a om mi khempeuh in na gamtat hoih lohna hangin nang hong simmawh uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:6 Na sunga om Israel ulian khempeuh in amauʼ thatang muang uh a, mi that uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:7 A nu a pa a zahtak bawl kuamah om lo hi. Peemtate kikhem gawp a, meigong le tagahte zong kihih thopthop hi." 
Ezekiel22:8 Mun siangthote zong zahtakna mel kinei loin, Sabbath-te zong kitang lo hi." 
Ezekiel22:9 Mi pawl khatte in midangte a sih theih nadingin zuau thu phuak uh hi. Mi pawl khat in milim biakna sa ne uh hi. Pawl khatte amauʼ lanna tawh kizui-in gamta tawntung hi. 
Ezekiel22:10 Pawl khatte in a paʼ zi mawhpih uh a, pawl khatte in numei ninnei kimlai pi buan uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:11 Pawl khat in midangteʼ zi tawh nulepa mawhna bawl uh a, pawl khat in a mote mawh pihin, pawl khat in a sanggamnu ahi a paʼ tanu mawhpih hi." 
Ezekiel22:12 Pawl khat in sum deih manin mi that uh hi. Pawl khatte in a Israel mipih sum leitawi a late tungah nuamtak sa-in a meet lakna tawh hauhlawh uh hi. Amaute in kei hong mangngilh uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:13 “A man loin miʼ na na suhna le mi na thahna hangin ka khuttum ka zial ding hi. 
Ezekiel22:14 Tua bangin kong hih ciangin hang nawn dingin ki-um a, na khuttum lik ngam lai dingin ki-um na hi hiam? Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:15 Gam khempeuh le minam dang khempeuh lakah na mite ka thehthang gawp dinga, na gamtat hoih lohna teng ka beisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:16 Tua ahih ciangin minam dangte in nang hong mindaisak dinga, ahi zongin nang Jerusalem in Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:17 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, kei adingin Israel mite a kimanna om nawn lo hi. Amaute pen sumngo, dal, sik, hak le ngun a kihel khawm sung panin meikhuk sungah kihalin a ngun teng a kilak khit ciangin a om lai ngun-ek tawh kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin ah: Note, tua ngun-ek bangin na kimanna uh om nawn lo ahih manin Jerusalem ah kong kaikhawm ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:20 Mite in ngun, sumngo, sik, hak le dalte kaikhawmin a tuisak dingun meikhuk sungah a khul bangin ka hehna tawh note hong kaikhawmin kong tuisuaksak mang ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:21 Jerusalem ah note hong khawm takpi-in na nuai uh ah mei tawhin, ka hehna tawh kong haltui ding hi." 
Ezekiel22:22 Meiphual sungah ngunte a kituisak bangin Jerusalem ah note hong kibawl ding hi. Tua ciangin keima hehna a thuak na hih lam uh na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel22:23 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen ka hehna hangin puah loin, a tungah guah ka zuksak lohna leitang tawh a kibatna uh amaute kiangah gen in." 
Ezekiel22:25 A uliante uh, ganhing a that humpinelkai hawk tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in mi thatin, a sum le a neihsa khempeuh laksak uh a, a mi thahna hangun numei tampi tak meigong suaksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:26 A siampite un ka thukham palsatin, a siangtho biakna nate ninsak uh hi. A siangtho biakna nate le a mawkmawk nate khenna mel nei lo uh a, a tate uh tungah a siang le a nin a kilamdanna zong hilh lo uh hi. Sabbath-te zong donin nei lo uh hi. Tuate khempeuh hangin Israel mite in kei hong zahtak lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:27 A kumpi uliante uh, a sa mat sa uh a bal gawpgawp ngia hon tawh kibang uh hi. Sum ngah theih nadingin mi that uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:28 Kulh nin kimlai leikang tui tawh a kizut kang bangin a kamsangte un hih bang mawhnate imcip uh hi. A man lopi maang mu uh a, a man lopi-in mailam thu gen uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in amaute tungah thu gen lo napi-in, Topa Pasian in hih bangin thu gen hi, ci-in zuau phuakin mite tungah thu gen uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:29 Mi cithei a kineite in mi khemin a na sut uh hi. Mizawng mi cimawhte bawlsia-in, peemtate tungah nuamtak sa-in khualna mel nei loin a ututun gamta uh hi." 
Ezekiel22:30 Keimah in ka hehna tawh ka suksiat ding hun ciangin kulh a ciang zo ding, kulh a kicipna munah a cing zo ding le gam sung a hu zo ding mi khat amaute lakah ka zong a, ahi zongin tua bang ding mi khat beek ka mu zo kei hi." 
Ezekiel22:31 Tua ahih ciangin amauteʼ gamtatna tawh kizui-in gimpiakna-in amaute tungah ka hehna khahin, mei in a kat bangin amaute ka maimangsak ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khatvei lai-in unau numei nih om hi." 
Ezekiel23:3 Amaute Egypt ah a om lai, a khangno laitakun, a nungakna lim uh bei-in numei paktat a suak uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:4 A unuʼ min Oholah hi a, Samaria khuapi tawh kibang a cihnopna ahi hi. A naunuʼ min Oholibah hi a, Jerusalem khuapi tawh kibang a cihnopna ahi hi. Hih numei nihte ka teenpih a, a nihun kei tawh ta nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:5 Keima zi hi napi-in Oholah pen numei paktatte mah bangin gamta lailai a, Assiria gam pan a a lawm ngaihte lunggulh mahmah hi. Tua a lawm ngaihte pen" 
Ezekiel23:6 puansan a silh galkap hangte, gam uk mangte le galkap maang liante hi a, a vekpi-un a ngaihhuai, sakol tung tuang galkap maang liante ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Amah pen Assiria uliante khempeuh tawh a mawh sa khat hi a, ama huk luatna hangin Assiria milimte nangawn va bia hi." 
Ezekiel23:8 A nungakna beisakin, Egypt gam a a paktat mah zom lailai hi. A nungak tung a kipanin mite in luppihin numei paktatte bangin bawlin a ututun hih uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Tua ahih ciangin a lunggulh mahmah, a it Assiria miteʼ khut sungah amah ka pia hi." 
Ezekiel23:10 Assiria mite in a puan hawk khiatsak uh a, a tanu le a tapate matsakin, tua ciangin namsau tawh amah that uh hi. Mun khempeuh a numeite in amah gentehna khatin nei uh a, ama tungah thu kikhen hi." 
Ezekiel23:11 “A naunu Oholibah in hih thu thei napi-in, a unu Oholah sangin zong a sia zaw, a suk zaw-in paktat lai hi." 
Ezekiel23:12 Amah in a vekpi-in a ngaihbaang Assiria mi tangval ahi gam ukte le galkap maangte, puansan a silh galkapte le sakol tung tuang uliante nak lunggulh mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel23:13 Hih a naunu zong a u zah mahin sia taktak hi, ci-in ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel23:14 “A paktatna nakpi takin hong sia semsem hi. Amah in Babylon ulianteʼ limte, kawm tungah a san zeza in a kizut, a kawngten puan le a dialkhip kaite tawh cing takin a kibawl limte a muh ciangin hoih sa mahmah hi." 
Ezekiel23:15  
Ezekiel23:16 Amah in tua limte a muh phetin amaute lunggulh mahmah pah a, a sam dingin Babylon gamah kamtai a paisak pah hi." 
Ezekiel23:17 Babylon mite zong amah tawh a mawh dingin hong pai uh hi. Amaute in a lungkim dongun tua nu hih nilohin ninsak uh a, a tawpna ah amaute a ngaih gen loh a kihzah ciang dongin a bawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:18 Amah numei paktat ahihna mi khempeuh theisakin, tua bangin amah le amah a kipholak ciangin a unu ka muhdah zah mah bangin amah zong ka mudah hi." 
Ezekiel23:19 A paktatna uang semsem a, a nungak lai-in Egypt gamah a paktat mah bangin gamta niloh hi." 
Ezekiel23:20 Sakoltal lan bangin a zang a gol, a lan mahmah mi khempeuh ngai pahpah hi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Tua hi a, Oholibah aw, Egypt gamah nungakin na om lai-in na nawi hong kinuai gawpsakin, na nungakna na beisak huna na gamtat hoih lote mah a gamtakik nuam na hi hi." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Oholibah aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima hong gen thu in: Tu-in nang in hih na lunggulh mite na cimtak ta hi. Ahi zongin nangma tungah amaute ka hehsak dinga, nang a hong umcih dingin kong paipih ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:23 Babylon khua mite, Khaldea gam mite, Pekod mite, Shoa mite, Koa mite le Assiria mite khempeuh kong paipih ding hi. Amaute a vekpi-in tangval melhoih, a ngaihbaang gam ukte le galkap maangte hi a, a vekpi-un ulian pipi, sakol tung tuang galkap maang liante vive ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Amaute in leilu lam panin nang hong sim ding uh a, leeng galkap le van pua leeng tampi hong kengin galkap tampi tak tawh hong kuan ding uh hi. Lumte le sik lukhute tawh kidalin amaute in nang hong umcih ding uh hi. Amauteʼ khut sungah nang kong ap dinga, amauteʼ ngeina om bangin nangʼ tungah thu hong khen ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nangma tungah kei heh ka hih manin nangma tungah amaute hong heh gamtat ding uh hi. Na nak le na bilte hong at khiatsakin na tate hong thahsak ding uh hi. Na tanu le na tapate na kiang panin hong sutin a hingtangun hallum ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:26 Na puante hong hawk khiatsakin, a manpha na kizepnate zong hong laksak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:27 Na huknate le Egypt gam a kipan na gamtat hoih lohnate ka beisak ding hi. Milimte et-in na nei nawn kei dinga, Egypt-te zong na ngaihsun nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na muhdah na etsat miteʼ khut sungah nang kong pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel23:29 Amaute zong nangma tungah hong muhdah gamtat ding uh a, na thalawh sa na khempeuh hong laksakin na hawmguakin hong nusia ding uh hi. Na paktat gamtatna teng hong kipholak ding hi. Na hukna le na paktat gamtatna in" 
Ezekiel23:30 nangma tungah hih bang teng hong tungsak hi. Minam dangte tawh na paktat a, a milimte uh tawh na kininsak hi." 
Ezekiel23:31 Na unuʼ khekhap teng mah tawn na hih manin amah gim ka piak bangin nang zong gim kong pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel23:32 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Na unuʼ hai mah na dawn dinga, tua hai golin thuk mahmah hi. A hai dim sitset ahih manin mi khempeuh in hong simmawhin hong nuihsan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Na unu Samariaʼ hai pen launa le siatna hai hi a, hong amsakin hong lungkhamsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:34 Tua hai a tawdat nangawn na dawn kang dinga, a hai na pet kham ding hi. A hai kitam themte tawh na nawi na kui kham ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:35 “Tu-in Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Nangmah in kei hong mangngilhin hong nungngat na hih manin na hukna le na paktatna hangin na thuak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel23:36 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Oholah le Oholibah tungah thukhen dingin na kithawi nai hiam? A gamtat hoih lohna teng uh amaute tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amaute in milim biakna tawh nulepa mawhna bawlin mi zong that lai uh hi. Milimte tawh mawhna gamta-in, kei tawh a neih a tapate uh that uh hi. A tapate uh milim biakna-in go uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:38 Amauteʼ gamtatna tu-a bang teng bek hi lo lai hi. Ka biakinn ninsak uh a, ka Sabbath-te zong palsat lai uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:39 Milim biakna-in ka tate a gawh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin ka biakinn ah pai-in ninsak uh hi. Ka biakinn sungah hih bangin gamta tazen uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:40 “Amaute in gamlapi-a a om mite a sam dingin kamtai sawl uh a, a sap mite hong pai uh hi. Hih numeite kisilin, a mit uh zemin, kizepna a manpha a tuamtuamte tawh kizemin kipuah uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:41 Lupna hoih mahmah tungah tu-in a mai uh ah sabuai limtakin koih uh hi. Tua sabuai tungah keima piak sa paknamtui le oliv thaute koih uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:42 Lungnuamin a om mihonteʼ gamlumna kiza a, gamlak panin mihon mawkmawk pawl khat zong hong kitun pih hi. Amaute in tua numeiteʼ khut ah tau butsak uh a, a lu tung uh ah kumpi lukhu hoihte khusak uh hi." 
Ezekiel23:43 Nulepa mawhna bawlin a paat ngingei sa numei khat, numei paktatte khat mah bangin a hih lailai uh hi tah a, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel23:44 Numei paktatte kiang a a hawh bangin amaute pai niloh uh hi. Tu-a bangin a gamtat hoih lo Oholah le Oholibah-te kiangah a paktat dingin amaute a pai uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:45 Amaute in nulepa mawhna bawlin mi thahna tawh zong kipelh lo uh ahih manin midikte in nulepa mawhna bawlna hang le mi thahna hangin a mawhsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel23:46 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Amaute lausak gawpin a nate uh a sut gawp dingin mihon khat paisak in. 
Ezekiel23:47 Tua mihonte in amaute suang tawh dengin, namsau tawh amaute su gawp henla, a tate uh thatin, a innte uh halsak hen." 
Ezekiel23:48 Amauteʼ gamtat bangin kuamah a gamtat loh nadingun gam sunga a om numei khempeuh hilhkholhna limin hih bang gamtat hoih lohnate, gam sung khempeuh ah ka beisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel23:49 No unau numei nihte ahihleh, na paktatna uh le na milim biakna hangun gim kong pia ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum kua kum, a kha sawmna sung a ni sagih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu ni pen Babylon kumpipa in Jerusalem khuapi a umcih ni ding ahih manin lai sungah tu ni limtakin ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel24:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute adingin gentehna-in ka gen ahi hih thu gentehna pen a lehdo thei ka mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Mei tungah beel suang unla a sungah tui a dimin buk un. 
Ezekiel24:4 Sa a phei, a liang, a limci pente khah unla, a guh limcite tawh zong dimsak un." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tuu limci penteʼ sa zang unla, beel nuai ah mei cih un. A tui sosak unla, a guh le a sate sosak un." 
Ezekiel24:6 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Amah pen a kang-op a kinawt khia ngei lo beel tawh kibang hi. Beel sunga sate khatkhatin kila khia a, a vekpi-in bei khinta hi." 
Ezekiel24:7 Khuapi sungah mi kithahna om a, a sisante, leivui in a vuh theih nading leilak ah taaksak loin, suang tungah taaksak uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ka heh suakin a phu a kilak theih nadingin a manthanʼ theih loh nading munah a sisante a tua ci-in ka omsak hi. 
Ezekiel24:9 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima gen thu hih bang ahi hi: Mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi pen tu-in a sia ding hi ta! Kei mahmah in a mei ka cih ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:10 Sing hong cih beh un! A mei sem un! A sa huan un! A tui kangsak un! A saguhte kaang tumsak un! 
Ezekiel24:11 Tua ciangin a taubeel hawm mei-am tungah suangin sansak veva un. Tua hileh a kang-op nin teng kangtumin hong siangkik ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:12 Ahi zongin bangzahin hanciamin a kisep hangin, a kang-op in bun lua ahih manin siang zo lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:13 Jerusalem aw, na gamtat hoih lohnate in nang hong ninsak khin hi. A siansuah dingin kong hanciamciam hangin a nin mahin na om lai veve hi. Ka heh mahmahna na thuak khit matengin na siangkik ngei kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:14 Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin hi. Tu-in ka gamtat hun ding hong tung ta hi. Kong kiphawkmawh bawl nawn kei dinga, ki-ip nawn loin, zong kong khasiat ngaihsut kei ding hi. Na gamtatna bangin gim hong kipia ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:15 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, na it penpen mi khat thakhatin a hong laksak ding ka hi hi. Na thum na tau kei dinga, zong kap loin, na khitui zong na luangsak kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Miteʼ zakin zong na kidik kei dinga, dahna limin lukhu khu lo, khedap bulh lo, cih bangin zong na om kei ding hi. Na mai zong na khuh kei dinga, a dahteʼ annekte pawl zong na ne kei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:18 A zingsang lamin mite kiangah thugenin ka om a, a nitak ciangin ka zi hong si hi. Kei zong a zing ciangin Topaʼ hong sawl bang teekteekin ka gamta hi." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tua ciangin mite in, “Bang hangin hici gamtat na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:20 Kei zong amaute kiangah, “ Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel24:21 Israel mite kiangah hih bangin thu gen in hong ci hi. Ama cihna ah: Note in na kisaktheih pih uh, a sungah paipai-in na etet nop uh ka biakinn pen a ninsak ding ka hi hi. Tua ciangin noteʼ nungah a om lai na tate uh, namsau-in si ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Ezekiel24:22 Tua ciangin keima gamtat bangin note gamta-in, na mai uh na khuh kei ding uh a, a dahteʼ annekte pawl zong na ne kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:23 Lukhu khu-in khedap na bulh ding uh a, thum lo, tau loin na om ding uh hi. Noteʼ gitlohna hangin note maimangin, a tau khawm litlit ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel24:24 Tua ciangin kei pen note adingin lim ka hi ding hi. Keima gamtat bangbangin a gamta ding na hihna uh hong gen hi. Hih bangin thu hong pian ciangin, kei pen Topa Pasian ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi, hong ci hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Ezekiel24:25 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute in a kisaktheih pih, a lungdam pih, paipai-in a etet nop uh biakinnpi ka la khia dinga, a tanu a tapate uh zong ka laksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel24:26 Tua bangin ka hih ni ciangin tua siatna panin a suakta mi khat hong tai-in nangma kiangah a thu hong ko ding hi. 
Ezekiel24:27 Tua ni ciangin nang na pau theikik dinga, amah tawh na kiho khawm thei ding hi. Tu-a bangin nang pen mite adingin lim khat na hi dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Ammon miteʼ lam nga inla, amaute mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel25:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Ka biakinn kininsakin, Israel gam kisusia-in, Judah mite salin a pai na muh uh ciangin nuamin na lungdam se uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:4 Tua ahih manin nisuahna lam panin a hong pai miteʼ khut sungah note kong pia dinga, amaute in noteʼ gam sungah phual hong satin hong teeng ding uh hi. Noteʼ nek ding singgahte le noteʼ dawn ding bawngnawite hong gaihsak mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:5 Rabbah khuapi pen kalaoh khua ka suaksak dinga, Ammon khuapi dangte zong tuukhawk ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:6 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin ah: Note lungdamin khut bengin, kipakin na diang uh a, Israel gam na simmawh bawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:7 Hih bangin gamta se na hih manun noteʼ nate hong sut gawp ding minamteʼ khut sungah kong pia ding hi. Note hong sumai mang ding ka hih manin a minamin ahi a, a gamin ahi zongin na ding zo nawn kei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:8 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Moab mite in a thugenna uh ah, Judah gam mite pen minam dangte bangmah hi lel uh hi, ci se uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:9 Tua ahih manin Moab gam hutna-in a kiphut a kiim a om khuapite le a khuapi minthang pente ahi Beth-jeshimoth, Baal-meon le Kiriathaim khuapite, midangte ka simsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ammon mite a zawh gawp mah bangin, Moab mite zong, nisuahna lam mite ka zo gawpsak dinga, Moab mite pen minamin ding zo nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:11 Tua bangin Moab mite gim ka pia dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:12 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Edom mite in Judah mite tungah a phulakna uh nasia lua ahih manin tua a phulakna hangun Edom mite tungah mawhna om hi." 
Ezekiel25:13 Tua ahih ciangin Edom mite gim pia-in, a mihing a ganhingin ka thahmangna ding thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Teman khuapi pan a kipan Dedan khuapi dongin a gam sung khempeuh uh gamkhing ka suaksak dinga, a mite khempeuh uh gal sungah si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:14 Keima mi Israel-te in Edom mite tungah phu hong laksak ding uh a, ka heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in Edom mite thuaksak ding uh hi. Keima phulakna zia Edom mite in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in thu gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel25:15 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Filistia mite in galin a neih tawntung mite uh tungah phu nasia lakin hehna tawh susia gawp uh hi." 
Ezekiel25:16 Tua ahih ciangin Filistia mite simin ka beimangsakna ding thu a hong gen khia ta ka hi hi. Filistia Zanglei a a om lai mi khempeuh ka susia mang ding hi. 
Ezekiel25:17 Amaute nakpi takin gim pia-in, a kicing zah dongin amaute tungah phu ka la dinga, ka hehna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi."
