Ezekiel26:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum khat kum, tua kha a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi mite awngin hih bangin kiko uh hi. Amaute in, ‘Sumbawlna lam a i kidem pih Jerusalem khuapi zancip gawp hi. A kulhpite tu-in kihong kek a, amauteʼ guallelhna tu-in eima hauhna suak ding hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin ah: Taia khuapi aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nangmah a sim dingin minam tampi kong paipih dinga, tuipi hualte bangin hong kuan henhan ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:4 Na kulhpite susia-in, na tausangte supai ding uh hi. Tua ciangin leitang khempeuh kiat khia-in a suangtumte bek om lai ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:5 Nidangin tuipi in a tup ngei suangte tungah tu-in ngasa bengte in a ngen uh pho ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin hi. Minam dangte in nang Taia khuapi hong luh gawp ding uh a," 
Ezekiel26:6 na gam sunga khuapi dangte sungah a teeng mi khempeuh, a namsau uh tawh that khin ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nang Taia khuapi in na hong thei ding hi, ci hi." 
Ezekiel26:7 “Tua ciangin kumpi khempeuh lak panin a lian pen ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar, nang Taia khuapi a sim dingin kong paipih ding hi. Amah leilu lam gam pan hong kipanin galkap honpi, sakolte le a leengte le sakol galkap honte hong tonpih ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Gam sunga om khuapi a teeng mi khempeuh gal kidona sungah si ding uh hi. Note hong sim nadingun galte in dum to-in, phung ciangin, a kidal nadingun kulh muanhuai bawl ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Amaute in molhtum tawh na kulhpite satkham ding uh a, na tausangte uh zong hei tawh phuk gawp ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:10 A sakolte uh a paina leivui khute in khuapi tuamcip ding hi. Van pua leeng le leeng galkapteʼ ginna in khuapi kulhte cimsak dinga, a kisusia sa kulh kongpi a pai bangin hong lut lel ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:11 Sakol galkapte in kongzing khempeuh tuancil gawp ding uh a, a namsau uh tawh mi khempeuh vatlum ding uh hi. Innkhuam lianpipite leilak kidenna ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Noteʼ neihsa na hoih khempeuh, na galte un a ututin zang ding uh hi. Kulhte su pai-in inn hoih pipite sat thang gawp ding uh hi. Inn-a kizang sing le suang le na khempeuh la-in tuipi sung den nading uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Khuapi sungah lasakna awging ka beisak dinga, tum theih awgingte khempeuh zong kiza nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Khuapi sungah bangmah om nawn loin, ngasa bengte in a ngen uh a pho theih nading suangtumte bek ka omsak lai ding hi. Nang Taia khuapi hong kilamkik nawn lo ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinta hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel26:15 Topa Pasian in Taia khuapi tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: “Nang hong kisimin hong kilak ni ciangin na sunga kithat miteʼ kut vengvangna in tuipi dunga teeng mite lau-in patausak ding hi. 
Ezekiel26:16 Tuipi a zang minamteʼ kumpite, a kumpi tokhom tung uh panin kum khia ding uh a, a kumpi puante uh le a puan hoih silhte uh suah khia-in, leilak ah tu-in, lau-in a liing ding uh hi. Nangma thuakna hong muh manun lau mahmah ding uh a, a ci-lin uh pha thei lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:17 Tua ciangin nang tawh kisai-in hih bangin dah la hong phuah ding uh hi: A minthang khuapi kisia ta a, a teembawte tuipi panin maimang ta hi. Hih khuapi mite in tuipi uk ngei uh a, tuipi gei ah a teeng mi khempeuhʼ kihtak hi ngei hi." 
Ezekiel26:18 Tu-in hih khuapi kia ta a, tuikulh khempeuh lau-in liing uh hi. Tua bang siatna hangin tuikulh ah a teeng mite, lau-in lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Ezekiel26:19 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Kuamah a ten lohna a kisia khuapi bangin a gamkhing khuapi-in kong bawl ding hi. Tuipi tuite kong tumsak ding hi. 
Ezekiel26:20 Tanglai-a a si sa mite tawh a teeng khawm dingin misiteʼ khua Leinuai ah kong puak ding hi. Siatna a thuak tawntung leinuai-a omte lakah kong koih dinga, a si sate tawh na om ding hi. A hingte lakah a omkik dingin tua lai panin nong kilehkik nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nang pen miteʼ etteh dingin a lauhuai mahmah in kong bawl dinga, tua pen nang adingin a beina hi ta ding hi. Mite in nang hong zonzon hangun hong mu zo nawn lo ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel27:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi tamlawhna kah la khat sa in." 
Ezekiel27:3 Tuipi gei ah omin tuipi dunga mite tawh sumlei sumzuakna a nei khuapi tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute hih bangin gen in: “Taia khuapi aw, na melhoihna na kisaktheih pih hi." 
Ezekiel27:4 Nangma inn pen tuipi hi a, nang hong lamte in teembaw hoih bangin hong bawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:5 A sing zat dingun Senir Mual a om taksingte zang uh a, na puankhai khuam dingin Labanon a om taamtak singte zang uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:6 Nangmah hawh nadingin Bashan tawsaw singte la uh a, Grik tuikulh panin a kila taaksante tawh na sual ding bawl uh a, saiha pak tawh nang hong zem uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:7 Egypt gam saihadial puan a kizemte tawh na puankhai kibawl a, gamlapi pek panin zong kithei thei hi. Saipras tuikulh panin a kingah puan hoih pente, kumpi mel puante tawh na tung khuh kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel27:8 Sidon le Arvad khuapi mite in nang hong hot uh a, misiam mahmahte in nang hong hawl uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:9 Nang hong lem lettamate pen Gebal khuapi mi khutsiam mahmahte ahi uh hi. Tuipi tungah a pai teembaw nasemte khempeuh in na sumbuk hong zuan uh hi. 
Ezekiel27:10 “Persia gam, Lud gam le Put gam mite in nangma galkap hong sem uh a, na sungah a lumte uh le a sik lukhute uh a khai uh hi. Amaute in nangma tungah minthanna hong tunpih uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:11 Arvad gam galkapte in na kulh cing uh a, Gamad gam mite in na tausangte cing uh hi. Amaute in na kulh tungah a lum uh a khai uh hi. Nang a hong etlawmsak mite pen amaute ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tarshish gam mite tawh sumlei sumzuakna ah na kizom uh a, na van tampite hong lei-in ngun, sik, dal le haknawte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan gam mite, Tubal mite le Meshek mite in zong sumlei sumzuakna ah nang tawh kizopna nei uh a, na vante hong leina-in sila dingin mite le sumngo beelte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:14 Beth-togarmah gam mite in zong vante hong leina-in van pua sakolte, sakol galkapte le late hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:15 Rods gam mite in zong nang tawh sumzuakna ah kizopna nei uh a, tuipi gei-a om gam khempeuhte in na van hong leina-in saiha le ningsing hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:16 Edom mite in zong na van tampi hong lei uh hi. Van leina-in emerald suangmanpha, puansan, a kizem puante, saihadial puan hoihte, suangkhi le ruby suang manphate hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judah le Israel gam mite in zong na van leina-in mangbuh, oliv thau le theipal, khuaizu le sing namtui tuamtuamte hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:18 Damaskas khuapi in zong na vante tampi tak hong lei a, a man dingin Helbon gam a piang leenggahzu, tuumul kang, a kihuan sa sik, taksing le thalsingte hong pia hi." 
Ezekiel27:19  
Ezekiel27:20 Dedan mite in na van hong leina-in sakol dapphahte hong pia uh hi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia mite le Kedar gam ukte in tuuno, tuutal le keeltal tawh na van hong lei uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Sheba le Raamah sumbukte in na van leina-in sing namtui hoih pente, suang manphate le kham hong pia uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanneh, Eden, Asshur le Khilmad khuapite in zong nang tawh sumlei sumzuakna ah kizopna hong nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:24 Amaute in nang kiangah puan manpha mahmahte, puansan, a kizem puante, sualphah puante le limtakin a kiheek khauhual hoih nam khempeuh hong zuak uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:25 Nangma vante ahihleh teembaw lian pente pawl in a honhonin hong pua uh hi. “Nang pen van a dim pua-in tuipi tungah a pai teembaw lianpi tawh na kibang hi. 
Ezekiel27:26 Nang hong hotte in tuipi thukna gamlapi ah hong hot uh a, nisuahna huihpi in tuipi laizang ah nang hong mut sia hi." 
Ezekiel27:27 Tua bangin nang na siat ni ciangin a tam mahmah na van khempeuh na sungah a om teembaw nasemte khempeuh, na lettamate le na sumbuk mite khempeuh, na sungah a om na galkap khempeuh, a vekpi-in nang tawh tuipi sungah tuum mangkhin uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:28 Teembaw nasem tui kiateʼ kikona in tuipi geiteng a thawn hi. 
Ezekiel27:29 “Teembaw dangah a tuang mi khempeuh kum khia uh a, a vekpi-un tuipi gei ah pai uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:30 Nangma hangin nakpi takin kap uh a, a lu uh leivui thehin vut lakah a bual uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:31 Nangma hangin a lu uh mettol uh a, dahna limin puanhampi silh uh a, na sa lua-in a kap uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:32 Amaute in nang hong tamlawh uh a, ‘Tuipi sungah a daicip suak Taia khuapi, kua dang tawh kiteh thei dinga, ama thuak bang kua in thuak ngei ahi hiam?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Na sumbuk vante tuipi tungah a pai ciangin minam khempeuhʼ tangsapna na cingsak hi. Nangma van hauhna in kumpi dangte hauhlawh hi. 
Ezekiel27:34 Tu-in tuipi tungah na sia a, tuipi thuk sungah na kia suk hi. Na vante le na mi khempeuh tuipi sungah nang tawh maimang ta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:35 “Tuipi gei ah a teeng mi khempeuh in lamdang hong sa ding uh hi. A kumpite uh zong lau mahmah ding uh a, a maipuak uh laumai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel27:36 Tu-in nang a maimang paisuak na hi ta a, nangma tuah bang a tuah khak ding uh leitungah a om sumbuk dang khempeuh lau-in liing uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi a ukpa kiangah Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen nop thu, ama tungah hih bangin gen in: “Kisaktheihna lungsim lianpi nangmah in na nei a, kei, pasian khat ka hi hi, na ci hi. Nang pen pasian bangin pil na kisak hangin mihing na hi lel bek hi." 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniel sangin pil na kisa zaw a, theih loh a nei loin na kingaihsun kha hi." 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniel sangin pil na kisa zaw a, theih loh a nei loin na kingaihsun kha hi." 
Ezekiel28:4 Na pilna le na siamna tawh ngun le kham tampi na nei hi. 
Ezekiel28:5 Sum bawl na siamna tawh na hauhna na behlap a, na hauhna na kisaktheih pih hi." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka hong genin ah: Nang pen pasian zahin a pil kisa na hih manin 
Ezekiel28:7 thukhualna a nei het lo galte, nang ka hong simsak ding hi. Na pilna le na siamna tawh na lam sa na khempeuh amaute in hong vatmaisak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:8 Amaute in nang hong that ding uh a, na hankhuk ding tuipi sungah hong khia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:9 Nang a hong that ding a hong kuan ciangun, kei pasian bang hi ing, na ci lailai diam? Nang hong thatte na tuah ciangin mihing na hih lelna hong kilang ding hi." 
Ezekiel28:10 Gamdang miteʼ khut sungah ui bang lelin na si ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:11 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia kumpipa in a thuak ding tawh kisai-in tamlawh inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: “Nidang lai-in mi kicing etteh pha khat na hi a, pilna le hoihna tawh a kidim na hi hi." 
Ezekiel28:13 Pasianʼ Eden huan sungah nang na teeng a, suangmanpha nam khempeuh tawh na kizem hi. Karnelian, topaz le jasper, khrisolait, beryl le onik, sapfaia, karbankel, le emerald suang manphate, nangma kizepna hi a, kham tawh kibawl kizepna tampi tak zong na nei lai hi. Hihte khempeuh nangma adingin na suah ni-in a hong kibawlsak ahi hi." 
Ezekiel28:14 Sathau a kinilh kherub-te nang ka hong cingsak a, ka mual siangtho tungah nang na teeng a, a tee zaizai suang manphate lakah na vak kawikawi hi." 
Ezekiel28:15 Gamtat siat ding na kipat ma hun ciang dong, na suah tung a kipanin na gamtatna khempeuh paubaanna khat beek om lo hi." 
Ezekiel28:16 Na sum bawl luatna hangin mi ngongtat na suak a, mawhna sungah na tung kha hi. Tua ahih manin ka mual siangtho panin nang ka hong hawl khia a, a tee zaizai suang manphate lak panin nang a hong cing kherub-te in a hong hawl khia uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:17 Na melhoihna na kisaktheih pih kha a, na minthanna in nang hong hai tatsak hi. Leilak ka hong denna a, kumpi dangte hilhkholhna in nang ka hong koih hi." 
Ezekiel28:18 A man loin sum na bawl luatna hang, tua bang na mawhna hangin na biakna munte nasiasak hi. Tua ahih manin khuapi sung ka hal a, a vekpi-in kaang tum mang hi. Nangmah a hong en mi khempeuhʼ muhna ah vutlevai ka hong suah hi." 
Ezekiel28:19 Tu-in nang a maimang paisuak na hi ta a, nangma tuah bang a tuah khak ding uh nang hong thei sa minam khempeuhte lau-in a liing uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:20 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Sidon lam nga inla, a siat nading thu gen khol in." 
Ezekiel28:22 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka gen thu, amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: “Sidon khuapi aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi a, nangma tungah ka hong bawlna hangin mite in kei hong phat ding uh hi. Nangma sungah a teeng mite gimpiakna tawh ka sianthona ka lah ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:23 Nangma sungah cinatna ka tungsak dinga, na kongzing khempeuh ah sisan ka luangsak ding hi. Na kimkot khempeuh panin nang hong kisim dinga, na mi khempeuh kithat lum mang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:24 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “A kimkot a om Israel mi a simmawh minam dangte in tu-in simmawh nawn lo ding uh a, Israel mite sunin a nasak thei ding ling le lingkung tawh kibang nawn lo ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel28:25 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Minam tuamtuamte lakah ka thehthangna panin Israel mite ka kaikhawmkik dinga, kei pen a siangtho pa ka hihna thu minam khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Tua ciangin ka nasem pa Jakob ka piak leitang ahi amauteʼ gam sungah Israel mite a teeng ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel28:26 Tua gam sungah lungmuang takin teeng ding uh a, amaute in inn lamin, leenggui suan ding uh hi. Israel mite a simmawh minam dangte gim ka pia dinga, Israel mite ahihleh lungmuang takin om hithiat ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa amauʼ Pasian ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel29:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawmna, a kha sawm, a ni sawm le nih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ lam nga inla, amah le Egypt gam khempeuh gim a kipiak nading thu gen khol in." 
Ezekiel29:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi, ci-in Egypt kumpipa kiangah gen in: “Gun sungah a om Awle lianpi ahi, nang Egypt kumpipa aw, kei pen nangma lang ka hi hi. Nail Gunpi, nangma aʼ in na gen a, nangma bawl sa-in na ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel29:4 Na khaguh ah sikkawi ka bulh dinga, na gun sunga om ngasa khempeuh nangma tungah ka belhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin nangma tungah a belh ngasa khempeuh tawh Nail gun sung panin nang kong kai khia ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:5 Nang le na ngasa khempeuh gamlak ah kong paai ding hi. Leilak ah na pumpi kiphah dinga, phum lohin hong kikoih ding hi. Ganhingte le vasateʼ an dingin nang kong pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:6 “Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu Egypt mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Israel miteʼ muan le suan khat na hi ngei a, ahi zongin nang pen a khauh lo pumpeeng kung khat bang na hi lel hi." 
Ezekiel29:7 Nangma tungah amaute hong kingap uh ciangin nang na kitan a, amaute sunin na puksak hi." 
Ezekiel29:8 Tu-in Topa Pasian in nang kiangah kong genin ah: Namsau tawh mi kong simsak dinga, na mite le na ganhingte that lum mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:9 Egypt gam khempeuh a kinusia gam simtham suak dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi. Nangmah in Nail Gunpi pen keima aʼ hi a, keima bawl sa hi, ci na hih manin," 
Ezekiel29:10 nangmah le Nail Gunpi langah keimah ka pang hi. Egypt gam khempeuh, leilu lam Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi, Ethiopia gamgi dong, a kinusia gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Na gam sungteng, mihing in ahi a, ganhing in ahi zongin sik nawn lo ding hi. Kum sawm li sung bangmah om lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:12 Leitung gam khempeuh lakah Egypt gam pen a gamkhing penin ka bawl ding hi. Kum sawm li sung khuapi sia dang khempeuh sangin a sia zaw-in Egypt khuapite ka bawl ding hi. Egypt mite galtai-in ka bawl dinga, gam khempeuh le minam dang khempeuh kiangah taisakin ka kithehthangsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Kum sawm li khit ciangin a kithehthangna minamte lak panin Egypt mite ka kaikhawmkik dinga," 
Ezekiel29:14 amauteʼ piancilna mun Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gamah ka tengsak ding hi. Tua lai ah kumpi gam gina loin om ding uh a," 
Ezekiel29:15 kumpi gam khempeuh lakah a gina lo pen suak ding uh a, minam dang kuamah uk zo nawn lo ding uh hi. A gina lo mahmah in bawl ding ka hih manin amauʼ deih bangin minam dang khat beek tasak zo lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Israel mite in muan le suanin amaute neikik ngei nawn lo ding uh hi. Egypt-te a tuahsiat ciangin a suang khial kha ahih lamtak uh Israel mite in a phawk ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa Pasian ka hihna thu Israel mite in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel29:17 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm nih le sagih kum, a kha masa a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Taia khuapi sim hi. A galkapte, nakpi takin hanciamsak lua ahih manin a sam nangawn uh pulhmangin, a liangkote uh a sa nangawn leng khia mang a, ahi zongin tua bangin amauʼ gim thamanin kumpipa le a galkapte in bangmah phattuamna ngah lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel29:19 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih bangin thu kong gen hi: Tu-in Taia khuapi a simna hangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar tungah Egypt gam ka pia ding hi. Amah in Egypt gam luhin a nate uh sut dinga, galkapteʼ thaman dingin Egypt-teʼ neihsa khempeuh pua khia mang ding hi." 
Ezekiel29:20 A galkapte in keima adingin na hong sepsak uh ahih manin, ama hong nasepsak ka thuhna-in ama tungah Egypt gam a pia ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Hih thu hong tun ciangin Israel mite a thahat minamin ka bawlkik dinga, mi khempeuhʼ zak nading munah nang thu kong gensak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel30:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen leuleu a," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: “‘A lauhuai ni,’ ci-in awng in." 
Ezekiel30:3 Minamteʼ siat nading hun Topaʼ ni hong nai ta hi. 
Ezekiel30:4 Egypt gamah galpi tung dinga, Ethiopia gamah lungkhamna lianpi om ding hi. Egypt gamah mi tampi kithat dinga, a neihsa khempeuh uh kipua khia-in, gam hawmguakin kinusia ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Tua galpi in Ethiopia gam, Put gam, Lud gam, Arabia gam le Libya gam panin a kicial galkap khempeuh that dinga, keima miteʼ lak pan a galkapte nangawn si ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Leilu lam a om Migdol khuapi panin leitaw lam Siene khuapi dong, Egypt gam a hute khempeuh gal sungah si mang ding uh a, Egyptʼ kiphatsakpih a galkap teng si mang ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel30:7 Egypt gam, leitung gam khempeuh ah a gamkhing pen suak dinga, khuapi dang a siate khempeuh sangin a khuapite sia zaw ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:8 Keimah in Egypt gam hal tum in, a gam sung a hute khempeuh ka beisak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Tua bangin Egypt gam a siat ni hun hong tun ciangin bangmah khua phawk loin a om Ethiopia mite kiangah kamtaite ka sawl dinga, amaute lau mahmah ding uh hi. Tua hun ding tu-in hong tung ta hi." 
Ezekiel30:10 “Egyptʼ hauhna teng a sumai dingin Babylon kumpi Nebukhadnezzar ka zang ding hi. 
Ezekiel30:11 Amah le a kihtakhuai a galkapte hong pai dinga, gam sung khempeuh susia ding hi. Namsau tawh Egypt mite vatlum dinga, gam sung khempeuh ah misi luanghawm dim ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nail Gun a tui ka kangsak dinga, migiloteʼ khut sungah Egypt ka koih ding hi. Gamdang mite in susia gawpin, gamkhing suaksak ding uh hi, Topa ahi keimah in ka ci khin hi." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Milim khempeuh ka susia dinga, Memfis khuapi ah a om pasian man lote ka beisak ding hi. Egypt gam a uk ding kuamah om nawn lo dinga, mi khempeuh lausakin ka liingsak gawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:14 Egypt gam khanglam Pathros gam teng gamkhing ka suaksak dinga, Egypt gam saklam ah a om Zoan khuapi ka hal dinga, kumpi khua ahi Thebes, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Egypt gam sungah khuapi muanhuai pen Pelusium khuapi, ka hehna ka thuaksak dinga, Thebes khuapi mi khempeuh ka sumai ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Egypt gam sung khempeuh ka hal tum dinga, Pelusium khuapi in gimna lianpi thuak ding hi. Thebes khuapi kulh khempeuh kicim gawp dinga, tui in a khuapi tuum ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:17 On khuapi le Pibeseth khuapi tangvalte, gal sungah si khin ding uh a, a dang teng salin kiman ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:18 Egyptʼ vangliatna ka suksiat ciangin Tahpanhes khuapi ah khim zing gawp dinga, a kisaktheih pihna teng uh a bei ta ding hi. Egypt gam sung meiipi in khuhcip dinga, a mi khempeuh salin pai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel30:19 Tu-a bangin Egypt tungah gim ka piak ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel30:20 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum khat kum, a kha masa a ni sagih ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ khut ka kuaihtansak zo hi. A khut damkikin namsau a tawi zawh nadingin kuamah in a khut tuamsak lo hi." 
Ezekiel30:22 Tua ahih manin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen in: Kei pen Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ lang ka hi hi. A khut a dam lai pen le a kitan sa zong, a langnihin ka kuaihtansak dinga, a khut panin namsau ka kiasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Egypt mite pen, gam khempeuh le minam khempeuhte lakah ka thehthang ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:24 Tua ciangin Babylon kumpipaʼ khut ka khauhsak dinga, ama khut sungah ka namsau ka pia ding hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa Faroʼ khut ka kuaihtansak dinga, a langteʼ mai ah tai-in a si ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:25 Amah ka tha neemsak dinga, Babylon kumpipa ka tha khauhsak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Babylon kumpipaʼ khut sungah ka namsau ka piak ciangin amah in Egypt lam a ngat ding hi." 
Ezekiel30:26 Tua ciangin gam khempeuh le minam tuamtuamte lakah Egypt mite ka thehthang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel31:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum khat kum, a kha thumna a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro le ama miteʼ kiangah hih bangin gen in: “Na lian mahmah uh a, kong tehpih theih ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Ezekiel31:3 A hiangte hoihin pha mahmah a, a kung sang mahmah in meii lak a ban, Lebanon-a a po taamtak tawh na kibang uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:4 A khangsak ding tui om a, lei sung panin an a pia ding tui om hi. Tua sing a pona mun tui kawt a, gam sung sing khempeuh in zong tui a ngah uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:5 Limtakin tui ngah ahih manin singkung dang khempeuh sangin a sang zaw hi. A hiangte golin sau mahmah hi. 
Ezekiel31:6 Vasa nam khempeuh in a hiang tungah bu tom uh a, ganhing nam khempeuh in a liim nuai, tasuahna-in a nei uh hi. Leitung minam khempeuh in zong a liim nuai belhin a nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:7 Tua singkung hoih mahmah a, a kung sangin, a hiang zau a, a zung in tui omna lei thukpi sung a ban hi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pasianʼ huanah a om taamtak hoihte tawh tehtheih ding hi lo a, taksing kung in tua bang hiang hoih nei ngei lo a, hiangpa kung in zong tua bang hiang hoih nei ngei lo hi. Pasianʼ huan a singkungte zong tua zahin hoih ngei lo hi." 
Ezekiel31:9 A melhoihin ka bawl a, a hiang ka zausak hi. Pasianʼ huan sunga a po singkung khempeuhteʼ enin ka bawl hi." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in hih bangin ka ci hi. Tua sing in meiipi a bat dongin khangto a, ahi zongin a san semsemna tawh kizui-in kiphasak semsem hi." 
Ezekiel31:11 Tua ahih manin tua singkung ka deih nawn kei hi. Gamdang kumpi khatʼ khut sungah ka pia dinga, ama thuak dingin a kilawm bangin tua kumpipa in a bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel31:12 Thukhualna a nei lo gamdang mite in tua singkung phukin a nusiacip ding uh hi. Mual khempeuh le guam khempeuh ah a hiang kitante a kia ding uh hi. A lim a beel minam khempeuh in taisan ta ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel31:13 Vasate hong leengin tua sing puk tungah tuang ding uh a, gamsate in a hiangte tuancil ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:14 Tua ahih ciangin tu a kipanin singkung khat beek, bangzahin tui a ngah hangin tua zahin khangin, a dawn in meiipi banin sang zo ngei nawn lo ding hi. Misiteʼ omna Leinuai khua a zuan ding, a si thei mihingte mah bangin singkung khempeuh a si ding ahi ta hi." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Topa Pasian in ka cih in ah: Tua singkung in misiteʼ khua Leinuai a zuat ciangin, leinuai-a tuite tuumsakin ka thuumsak ding hi. Gun tuite le lui tuite ka luangsak nawn kei dinga, Lebanon Mual mai khingin, gamlak sing khempeuh a keutum ding hi." 
Ezekiel31:16 Misiteʼ omna Leinuai khua ah tua singkung ka khiat suk ciangin, a kiatna ging in minam khempeuh lok gawp ding hi. Tua singkung a kiat manin Eden singkung khempeuh le a hoih pen, limtakin tui a ngah Lebanon singkungte khempeuh in zong Leinuai ah nuamtuam na sa ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Bang hang hiam cih leh a si sate a zuan dingin misiteʼ omna Leinuai ah amah tawh a pai khawm ding uh hi. Ama liim nuai a belte khempeuh, minam dangteʼ lakah kithehthang khin uh hi." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Tua singkung pen Egypt kumpipa Faro le ama mite ahi hi. Eden huan a singkungte nangawn tua zahin lianin hoih zo lo hi. Ahi zongin, Eden huan a singkungte mah bangin, Pasianʼ thu a ngaihsun lo, gal sung a a siteʼ omna a zuan dingin, misiteʼ omna Leinuai a manawh ta ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:1 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum nih kum, a kha sawm le nih a ni masa ni-in Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt kumpipa Faro tamlawh inla, hih bangin ci in: “Minam dangte lakah, humpinelkai bangin na kingaihsun hi. Ahi zongin nang pen gun sung tok gawpin a ninsak, Awle tawh na kibang zaw hi." 
Ezekiel32:3 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong cih in ah: Minam tampi hong kuansakin, ka ngen kong khuhsak dinga, tui gei ah kong kaisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:4 Leilak ah nang hong kai khia-in, leilak kong denna dinga, vasate le ganhingte, a kham takun kong nesak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:5 Mual teng guam teng, na sa ka dimsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:6 Na sisan tawh leitung khempeuh ka kawtsak dinga, mual teng guam teng na sisan tawh kidim ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:7 Nang kong suksiat ni ciangin vanpi ka khuhcip dinga, aksi ka mialsak ding hi. Ni, meiipi ka liahsak dinga, kha, ka mialsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:8 Vantung khuavak khempeuh ka mialsak dinga, na gam khempeuh khim zing ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Na theih ngei loh gamdangte ah salin kong omsak ciangin minam tampite lunggim ding hi. 
Ezekiel32:10 Nang tunga kong bawlna thu minam tampite in lamdang sa ding uh hi. Ka namsau ka vik ciangin kumpite lau-in kigaih ding uh hi. Nang na puk ni ciangin a sih khak ding uh lau-in mi khempeuh liing kelkel ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel32:11 “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Babylon kumpipaʼ namsau na thuak ding hi. 
Ezekiel32:12 Minam dang a gilo pente sung panin a galkapte uh a namsau uh doksakin, na mihonpite ka thatsak ding hi. “Na kisaktheih pih teng vatmai ding uh a, na minam khempeuh that mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:13 A tui nekna mun a omna khempeuh uh ah, na gan khawite ka that khin ding hi. Tui a siknin ding mihing ganhing khat zong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:14 Bangmah in su nawn lo ding ahih manin, tuite ciim sitset dinga, gunte zong dum dide ding hi, ci-in Topa Pasian in ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel32:15 Egypt gam gamkhing suaksakin, a gam sunga om teng ka suksiat ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Hih pen kah la-in a kisa ding tamlawhna hi a, Egypt le a mite tamlawhna-in minam dang numeite in nei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:17 Zedekiah in a uk a kum sawm le kum nih kum, a kha masa a ni sawm le nga ni-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Egypt mi tampiteʼ hangin kapin thum in. Misiteʼ omna Leinuai gamah a vanglian minam dangte tawh amaute paisak in. Amaute kiangah hih bangin ci in:" 
Ezekiel32:19 “Midang khempeuh sangin melhoih zaw hi lo na hi uh hiam? Ahi zongin pai unla, Pasian a thei lo miteʼ han sungah va lum un, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel32:20 “Gal sung a a kithatte tawh si khawm ding uh hi. Egypt gam sunga om mi khempeuh a vatlum dingin namsau khat a baih sa-in om hi. 
Ezekiel32:21 Egypt mite a panpih galhang pente in misiteʼ gam Leinuai panin amaute na dawn ding uh a, ‘Pasian a thei lo, gal sung a si mite hong pai suk uh a, hih lai ah lum ta uh hi,’ ci-in kiko ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:22 “Assiria zong, a kimkot ah a galkapteʼ han tawh, tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute khempeuh zong gal sungah a si uh hi a," 
Ezekiel32:23 Leinuai a thuk penna munah amauteʼ han om hi. A galkap khempeuh gal sungah a si hi a, a hante uh ama kimkot ah om hi. Ahi zongin amaute pen nidangin minam dangte a liinglawngsak zo ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elam zong, a kimkot ah a galkapteʼ han tawh, tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute khempeuh gal sungah a si uh hi a, misiteʼ gam Leinuai ah Pasian a thei loin pai suk uh hi. A hin lai-un mi khempeuh a lausak ngeite hi uh a, ahi zongin tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in a om uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:25 Gal sung a a site lak mahah Elam lum a, ama kimkot ah a galkapteʼ han om hi. Amaute, Pasian a thei loin, gal sungah si uh hi. A hin lai-un mite a lausak ngeite hi uh a, ahi zongin tu-in amaute si-in mindai-in om uh a, gal sung a site mah tawh a kibangin gimna a thuak uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Meshek le Tubal zong tua lai mahah om uh a, a kimkot uh ah a galkapte uhʼ han om hi. Amaute khempeuh zong Pasian a thei lo, gal sung a a si ahi uh hi. Ahi zongin a hin lai-un midangte a lausak zo ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Hih mite pen misiteʼ omna Leinuai ah a galvan teng uh tawh pai-in, a namsau uh kilukham sakin, a lum uh a awm tung uh ah a kikoihsak kawmin limtakin a kivui tanglai galkapte bangin pahtawi a vuina ngah lo uh hi. Ahi zongin hih mite pen midang a lausak zo dingin a vanglian ngeite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:28 Tua mah bangin nang Faro zong Pasian a thei lo, gal sung a site lakah na om ding hi." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edom zong a kumpite le a gam ukte tawh tua lai mahah om hi. Amaute pen a thahat galkapte hi a, ahi zongin tu-in Pasian a thei loin gal sung a a site lak, misiteʼ gam Leinuai ah a lum uh hi." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Leilu lam uliante le Sidon mite zong tua lai mahah om uh hi. Amauteʼ vangliatna in midangte lausak ngei a, ahi zongin tu-in gal sung a si mite tawh mindai-in pai suk uh a, Pasian a thei loin kivui uh hi. Misiteʼ gam Leinuai-a a pai sukte tawh a mindaina uh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Egypt kumpipa Faro in hih mite khempeuh a muh ciangin ama sihna le a galkapte gal sungah a sihna thu tawh kisai-in a lung nuamtuam ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Ezekiel32:32 Bang hang hiam cih leh Faro in midangte lausak gawp ahih manin amah le a galkapte khempeuh kithatin, Pasian a thei loin gal sung a a si mite tawh kivui khawm ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, gam khatpeuh ah gal ka tunsak ciangin a thupiang teng na mipihte tungah gen in. Tua gal tun nading gam mite in amaute lak panin galvil dingin mi khat seh uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Galvil pa in galte hong pai a muh ciangin mi khempeuh a theihsak nadingin pataukohna peengkul tum hi. 
Ezekiel33:4 Mi khatpeuh in tua pataukohna za napi-in don loin a om mawk a, a galte hong pai-in tua mipa a thah leh, ama sihna pen a mahmah ngawh ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel33:5 Amah in pataukohna za napi-in don lo ahih manin, ama sihna pen ama khialhna hang ahi hi. Thudon hileh amah a suakta ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ahi zongin galvil pa in galte hong pai mu napi-in pataukohna peengkul a tum kei a, galte hong pai-in mi a thah leh, tua a site amauʼ mawhna hangin a si hitaseleh galvil pa ka ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel minam khempeuhteʼ galvil pa dingin nang kong koih hi. Nang tungah kong piak hilhkholhna khempeuh amaute tungah na gen sawn ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Migilo pa khat pen si ding hi, ci-in kong gen ciangin amah a nuntak theih nadingin na hilh kei leh, tua mipa pen a mawhnei-in si dinga, ahi zongin ama sihna nang kong ngawh ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:9 Nangmah in migilo pa khat hilh khol napi-in a mawh gamtatna a khawl kei leh, tua mipa a mawhnei mahin si dinga, ahi zongin nang na suakta ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:10 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in, ‘Ka mawhna uh le ka khialhnate un hong hencipin ka tha uh bei ta ahih manin, bangci nuntak zawh ding ka hi uh hiam?’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:11 Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin mawhnei mi khat a si ka muh ciangin nuam ka sa het kei hi. A mawh gamtatna khawlin a nuntak ding ka deih hizaw hi. Israel mite aw, na mawh gamtatnate uh khawl un. Bang hangin si nuam se na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-in Israel mite kiangah hih bangin gen in: Midik khat in mawhna a bawl leh, a beisa-a ama hoihna in amah suaktasak thei lo hi. Migilo khat a gitlohna khawl leh gim kipia lo dinga, midik khat in mawhna bawl leh nungta suak tuan lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:13 Midik khat tungah nuntak nading kam ka ciam hangin, a beisa-a ama hoihna suangin mawh gamtat ding hong kipan leh, ama gamtat hoihna sate ka phawk kei ding hi. Ama mawh gamtatna hangin si veve ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:14 Migilo khat kiangah, na si taktak ding hi, ci-in ka hilhkholh hangin, a mawh gamtatna khawlin a man a hoihin hong gamtakik henla," 
Ezekiel33:15 gentehna-in, leitawi lapa in ama tungah a apkhapna vante piakikin, a guk sa nate piakikin, a mawh bawlnate khawlin, nuntakna a pia thei thukhamte a zuih leh, amah nungta taktak dinga, si het lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ama gamtatna sa mawhnate kimaisak ding hi. A man a hoihin amah gamta ahih manin nungta ding hi. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Ahi zongin na mipihte in, ‘ Topaʼ hihna zia thutang lo hi,’ ci-in ngaihsun uh hi. Tua bang hi lo zaw a, amauʼ ngaihsutna zia a man lohna hang hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mihoih khat in a gamtat hoih khawlin gamtat siat ding hong kipan leh, tua a gamtat siatna hangin amah si ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:19 Migilo khat in a gitlohna khawlin a man a hoihin gamta leh, tua thu hangin amah suakta ding hi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ahi zongin Israel mite in keima hihna zia a thutang loin a gen uh hi. Keimah in amauteʼ gamtatna tawh kizui-in thu a khen ding ka hi bek hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel33:21 Salin ka om zawh uh a kum sawm le kum nih kum, a kha sawmna a ni masa ni-in Jerusalem panin a hong suakta mi khat kei kiangah hong pai-in, “Jerusalem khuapi kila khinta hi,” ci-in thu hong ko hi." 
Ezekiel33:22 Tua ama hong tun ni ding a zan nitakin Topaʼ vangliatna ka sungah hong om lam ka kiphawk a, tua mipa hong tun ni zingsangin Topa in kei hong pau theisakkik hi." 
Ezekiel33:23 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel gam khuapi siate sungah a teeng mite in, ‘Abraham, mi khat bek hi napi-in gambup kipia hi. Tu-in eite a tampi ihih ciangin hih gam pen eima aʼ hi taktak hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:25 Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin amaute kiangah gen in: Note in sasi, a sa tawh na nekhawm uh a, milim zong na bia uh hi. Mi zong na that lai uh hi. Tua ahih manin bangci-in hih gam pen kote aʼ hi, ci thei na hi uh hiam?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Note in namsau suanin na nei uh a, na gamtatnate uh kihhuai mahmah hi. Mi khempeuh in nulepa mawhna na gamta uh hi. Tua bangpi-in hih gam luah thei ding na hi uh hiam, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel33:27 Amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih mah bangin, khuapi siate sungah a teeng mite galin si ding uh a, khuaneu ah a teeng mite khempeuh gamsate in ne ding uh hi. Dum muanhuai sung leh leihawm sungah a bute khempeuh zong pulnatna tawh si veve ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:28 Gam sung khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak dinga, amauteʼ kisaktheih pih vangliatna teng bei ding hi. Israel mualtungte gamkhing suak ding ahih manin kuamah in kantan ngam lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:29 A mawhna hangun a mite gim pia-in, a gam uh gamkhing ka suahsak ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, khuapi kulh gei ah ahi a, a inn kong gei uh ah ahi zongin na mipihte a kimuh uh ciangin nangma thu tawh kisai thu gen uh a, ‘Pai un, Topa in bang thu gen hiam, va ngai ni,’ ci-in khatlekhat kizawn uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:31 Tua ciangin nangma thugen a za dingin ka mite hong kisutuah uh a, ahi zongin nangma gen bangin amaute gamta lo uh hi. Amaute a kamun hoih khem napi-in, a lungsim uh ah amauʼ meetna ding bek ngaihsun uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Amaute adingin nang pen miteʼ lungnop nadingin zawl la sa-in lasaknate a tum mipa tawh na kibang lel hi. Na thugen khempeuh hong ngai napi uh, khat beek zui lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ahi zongin a tung takpi ding ahih mah bangin, na thugente a tun ciangin amaute lakah kamsang khat omngei ahih lam hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel34:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, keima tuu hon ahi Israel mi a cingte mawhsakna thu gen in. Amaute kiangah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, amaute kiangah hih bangin gen in: Israel mi a cing note aw, gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Nomau mahmah na kivak uh a, tuute na don kei uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:3 Tuunawi ne-in, tuumul silhin, tuu thaute go-in a sa na ne uh hi. Ahi zongin tuute na vak kei uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Tuu zawngkhalte na khoi kei uh a, a cinate damsak loin, a liamnate na tuamsak kei uh hi. A lampialte na khiang kei uh a, a mangte na zong kei uh hi. Tua bang bek hi loin, ngong bawlin na uk gawp zawsop uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:5 Tua tuute in a cing ding nei lo uh ahih manin kithehthang gawp uh a, gamsateʼ an a suak lel uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:6 Tua ahih manin ka tuute kithehthang gawp uh a, mualtungte le mual sang tung khempeuh ah vak mang uh hi. Leitung gam khempeuh ah ka tuute kithehthang uh a, kuamah in zon ding kan dingin ngaihsun lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, Topa ahi keima thugen ngai un:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, keima thu nong ngaih zawk ding uh hi napi-in, tu-in a cing om lo ahih manin gamsate in ka tuute manin thatin a ne uh hi. Ka tuu a cingte in a tuu uh zong lo uh a, amau pumpi bek mah kivakin ka tuute vak lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:9 Tua ahih manin no tuucingte aw, keima thugen ngai un." 
Ezekiel34:10 Topa Pasian ahi keimah, noteʼ lang ka hihna thu tu-in kong pulak hi. Noteʼ khut sung panin ka tuute ka la dinga, tuute don loin note bek a kidon no tuucingteʼ khut sungah ka tuute ka omsakkik nawn kei ding hi. Noteʼ khut sung panin ka tuute ka hon khia dinga, ka tuute, noteʼ nekin ka omsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Topa Pasian keimah in note kiangah kong genin ah: Kei mahmah in ka tuute zongin ka kem ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:12 Tuucingte in a kithehthang tuute kaikhawmin a kep bangin keimah in donin ka kem ding hi. Tua bang a lauhuai siat nading hun laitakin a kithehthangna uh mun khempeuh panin ka kaikhawm ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:13 Gamdang panin amaute la khia-in ka kaikhawm dinga, amauteʼ leitang ah ka tunpihkik ding hi. Israel mualtungte, lui geite le miteʼ teenna mun khempeuh ah amaute ka gamtasak ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:14 Lungmuang takin Israel mual tung lo nona le guam sung mun nuamte le Israel gam lo nona mun khempeuh ah ka gamtasak ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:15 Kei mahmah in ka tuute ka cing dinga, nuam takin a omna ding uh mun ka zonsak ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel34:16 Keimah in a mangte zongin, a lampialte kaikhawmin, a liamte a liamma tuamsakin, a cinate damsakin, a cidam a thahatte zong a kibangin ka en ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen a manin a gamta tuucingpa ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel34:17 “No ka tuuhonte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen ngai un: Note a tuamtuam ciatin thu kong khen dinga, note sung panin a hoih le a hoih lo hong khenin, tuu le keel zong kong khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Note pawl khat, lopa limci na nek bek uh tawh na lungkim kei uh a, na nek lohte nangawn uh na tuancil gawp uh hi. Tui a siang na dawn uh a, na dawn loh teng uh na siknin uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka tuu dangte in na tuatcil sa uh lopa ne-in na siknin sa uh tuite a dawn uh kul hi. 
Ezekiel34:20 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in ka thugen ngai un: No tuu thaute le tuu gawngte kong khen ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:21 Note in a cidam lote na ki uh tawh si gawpin, a hon lak panin na nawt khia uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:22 Keimah in ka tuuhonte ka hon dinga, a dangte ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi. Ka tuute khatlekhat kikalah thu ka khen ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:23 Amaute a cing dingin ka nasem pa David ka koih dinga, amah in amaute hoihtakin an vakin a kem ding hi." 
Ezekiel34:24 Topa ahi keimah, amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, ka nasem pa David, amaute a ukpa hi ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel34:25 Amaute lungmuang takin a om theih nadingun amaute tawh thuciamna khat ka bawl ding hi. Gam sung panin a lauhuai gamsa khempeuh ka beisak dinga, gamlak ah nuam takin gamta-in a lum thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Amaute thupha pia-in ka mual siangtho kiimah ka omsak ding hi. A kisap hunhunin thupha guahtui ka zusak ding hi. 
Ezekiel34:27 Singkungte tampi tak gahin, lo ah an tampi piang dinga, mi khempeuh a leitang ciat uh ah nuam takin teeng ding uh hi. Sal ahihna panun ka mite suaktasakin, a kikhihna kolte uh ka sutsak khit ciangin, Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:28 Gamdang mite in hih gawpgawp nawn lo ding uh a, gamsate in thatin ne nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute lungmuang takin om ding uh a, kuamah in lausak nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel34:29 Amaute tungah logam hoih pia ding ka hih manin gam sungah gilkial dangtak om nawn lo ding hi. Minam dangte in amaute simmawh bawl nawn lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel34:30 Israel mite ka hutna le amaute pen keima mi ahihna thu mi khempeuh in thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel34:31 “No ka ta ahi tuute aw, an ka hong vak tuu hon ahi keima mite na hi uh a, kei pen noteʼ Pasian ka hi hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel35:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Seir Mual lam nga inla, Edom mite mawhsakna thu gen in." 
Ezekiel35:3 Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen, hih bangin gen in: “Seir Mual tung gam aw, kei, nangma lang ka hi hi. Nang a gamkhingin kong bawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:4 Na khuapite ka siasak dinga, na gam sungteng gamkhing ka suaksak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Nang pen Israel miteʼ gal na hi tawntung a, a mawhna hangun gim a tuah ni a nunung pen, a lungkham thuak hun laitakun Israel mite nasiasak mang hi." 
Ezekiel35:6 Tua ahih ciangin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, nangma sih nading ka bawl dinga, na si takpi ding hi. Nangmah in mi sisak na hih manin nangma tungah sihna hong tung ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:7 Seir Mual tung gam khempeuh gamkhing ka suaksak dinga, tua gam sunga a vak mi khempeuh ka that ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:8 Mual tung khempeuh si luanghawm tawh ka kidimsak dinga, mual le guam khempeuh dimin gal sung a a siteʼ luanghawm a om ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:9 A gamkhingin kong bawl paisuak dinga, na khuapite sungah kuamah tengkik nawn lo ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Kei pen Israel le Judah miteʼ Topa Pasian hi napi-in, hih minam nihte nangma aʼ in ngaihsunin a luah dingin na kigen hi." 
Ezekiel35:11 Tua ahih manin kei pen a nungta Topa Pasian ka hih takpi mah bangin, hih ka minam nihte tungah na heh gamtatna, na muhdah bawlna le na hazat bawlna tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong thukkik ding hi. Amaute tungah na gamtatna sa hangin gim hong pia ka hihna thu amaute in thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Tua ciangin nangmah in, ‘Israel mualtungte gamkhing suakta a, keima ading hi ta hi,’ ci-in simmawhna tawh na kampaunate, Topa ahi keimah in a za ka hih lam na thei ding hi." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kei hong gensia-in na kiphatsak paunate khempeuh a vekin ka za khin hi. 
Ezekiel35:14 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin ka ci hi: Leitung buppi a lungdam theih nadingin nang a gamkhing pha mahmah in kong bawl dinga," 
Ezekiel35:15 keima mi Israel-te a siat gawp manin na lungdamna zah tawh kizui-in nangma tungah kong bawl ding hi. Seir Mual tung gam ahi Edom leitang khempeuh, gamkhing suak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel36:1 Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mualte tungah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah gen ding ka neih thute hih bangin gen in:" 
Ezekiel36:2 Israel-teʼ galte in, ‘Hih tangtawng mual tung gamte tu-in eima aʼ hi ta hi,’ ci vial uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:3 Tua ahih ciangin mailam thu ding gen inla, Topa Pasian ahi keima thugen hih bangin pulak in: Na kimkot uh ah a om minam dangte in no Israel mual tung gamte hong la-in na neihsate uh a hong suh uh ciangin, mite khempeuh in no Israel mite hong simmawh bawlin hong ciamnuih bawl lel uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:4 Tua ahih manin no Israel mual tung gamte aw, Topa Pasian ahi keimah in mual lian le mual neute, lui le guamte, a kisia-in a kinusia munte le a kiim a minam dangte in luh gawpin a ciamnuih bawl khuapite tungah ka gen thute ngai un." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkot ah a om minam dangte le a diakdiakin Edom mite tungah ka hehluatna tawh thu ka gen hi. Amaute in lungdamin nuihna le simmawhna tawh keima leitang la-in a tang uh hi. 
Ezekiel36:6 Tua ahih ciangin Israel gam tawh kisai-in mailam thu gen khol inla, a kimkot ah a om minam dangte in a simmawh bawlna hangun Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hehna tawh ka thugente, mual lian, mual neu, lui le guamte tungah gen in." 
Ezekiel36:7 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in a kimkot ah a om minam dangte ka mindaisak ding khauh takin ka kiciam hi. 
Ezekiel36:8 Ahi zongin Israel mual tung gamte ah no ka mi Israel-te adingin singkungte in teh le gah hong neikik ding uh a, a sawt loin note, inn ah a hong ciahkik ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:9 Kei pen noteʼ lamah kong pang dinga, pel loin na gam uh lo in kikho kikin khaici kituhkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:10 A mi-in zong kong pungsak dinga, khuapite sungah teengkikin a sia khempeuh na puahkik ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:11 A mihing a ganhingin kong pungsak dinga, a nidang sangin tam na pha zaw ding uh hi. Ta tampi tak na nei ding uh hi. Nidangin na omngei bangun kong omsakkik dinga, a nidang sangin a cithei zaw-in kong bawl ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:12 No ka mi Israel-te, na leitang uh ah kong gamtangsakkik ding hi. Noteʼ leitang suak dinga, tua leitang in na tate uh gil kialin puksisak nawn lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in kong genin ah: Israel mual tung gamte, mihing sa ne hi a, tua mual tung gamte in a gam sung miteʼ tate laksak hi, ci-in a beisa hunah hong kigennate a man ahi hi." 
Ezekiel36:14 Ahi zongin tu a kipanin mihing sa a ne, gam sung miteʼ tate a laksak gam hi nawn lo ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel36:15 Minam dangteʼ hong ko bawlna za nawn loin, a hong mindaisakna uh na thuak nawn kei ding uh a, na sung uh ah a teeng miteʼ tate zong no Israel mual tung gamte in na laksak nawn kei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel36:16 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite amauteʼ gamah a ten lai-un amauteʼ gamtatna le a sepnate uh tawh tua gam ninsak uh hi. Amauteʼ gamtatnate pen numeiteʼ neih nin zahin a ninin ka ngaihsun hi." 
Ezekiel36:18 Tua ahih manin gam sungah amauteʼ mi thahna le a milimte uh tawh gam sungteng a nitsakna hangun ka hehna teng ka thuaksak hi. 
Ezekiel36:19 Amauteʼ nuntakna zia le a gamtatna ziate uh tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu ka khen a, gamdang mun citeng ah amaute ka thehthang hi." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ahi zongin midangte in, ‘Hih mite pen Topaʼ mite hi napi-in, Pasian in amauteʼ tungah a piak gam panin tai khia uh hi,’ ci-in a paina peuhpeuh uh ah na kigen ahih manin, ka min siangtho hong daisak uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:21 Israel mite in a paina peuhpeuh uh gamdang mite lakah ka min siangtho hong daisak kawikawi uh ahih manin tua thu in ka lung hong himawhsak hi. 
Ezekiel36:22 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian keimah in Israel mite tungah ka gen ding thute hih bangin gen in: Israel mite aw, tu-a ka sep ding thu pen note kong khualna hang hi loin, minam dang khempeuhteʼ lakah na daisak kawikawi uh ka min siangtho ka khualna hang hizaw hi." 
Ezekiel36:23 Note in minam dangteʼ lakah na daisak sa uh a lian ka min siangtho pen tu-in minam dangteʼ lakah a sianthona ka langsak ding hi. Keimah in minam dangteʼ lakah ka sianthona ka lah nadingin note kong zang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel36:24 Gam khempeuh le minam khempeuhte lak panin note hong kaikhawmkikin na gam uh ah kong tunpihkik ding hi. 
Ezekiel36:25 Note tungah tui siangtho kong theh dinga, na milim biakna uh le note hong ninsak na dang khempeuh panin kong siangsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:26 Note sungah lungtang thak le lungsim thak kong guan dinga, na suang lungtang uh hong lak khiatsakin mihing lungtang kong guan ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:27 Note sungah keima kha kong guang dinga, note tungah kong piak ka thukhamte le ka thupiakte limtakin kong zuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:28 Tua ciangin na pu na pate uh tungah ka piak sa gamah na teeng ding uh a, note pen keima mi hi-in, kei pen noteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:29 Note hong ninsak thei ding na khempeuh panin kong hu ding hi. An tampi ka piangsak dinga, gilkial na thuak kha nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:30 Na singgah kungte uh le na lo lai ante uh tampi tak ka phasak dinga, minam dangte lakah gilkial a mindaina na thuak kha nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Na gamtatna sa uh na gitlohnate uh le na hoih lohnate uh na phawkkik ding uh a, na mawhna uh le na khialhnate uh hangin nomau mahmah na kimudahtawm ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:32 Israel mite aw, hih thute khempeuh, noteʼ lungdam nadingin a bawl ding ka hih lohna thu na theih ding uh ka deih hi. Na gamtatna sate uh hangin maizumin na mindai ding uh ka deihna hizaw hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Na mawhna khempeuh panun note kong siansak khit ciangin na khuapite uh sungah hong teengsakkikin, a sia khempeuh kong puahsakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:34 Na lote uh a nawk kha ngei miteʼ muhna ah gammang tulak a bat ngei hangin, tu-in tua lote kho-in note kong puahsakkik ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:35 Hih leitang pen gammang tulak a bang ngei hi napi-in tu-in Eden Huan a batna le a kisusia, a kiluh gawp, a kinusiacip khuapite pen tu-in a muanhuai kulh tawh ki-umin a sungah mi a teenna thu mi khempeuh in gen belin nei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel36:36 Tua ciangin noteʼ kimkot ah a om a suakta lai minam dangte in a sia sa khuapite lamkikin, a kinusia lote a puahkik pa pen Topa ahi keimah ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Tu-a teng bek hi loin a dang zong ka hih lai ding hi. Keima tung pan Israel mite huhna ka ngensak dinga, tuuhonpi bangin Israel mite ka tamsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel36:38 Tuhunin a sia-in a omcip khuapite pen a kiseh pawi hun ciangin biak nadingin a kipaipih, Jerusalem-a tuuhonpi om muamua bangin, mi tampi tawh kidim ding uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:1 Ka sungah Topaʼ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, ama kha in kei hong paipihin, misi guh tawh a kidimin a om kuampi khat ah hong koih hi." 
Ezekiel37:2 Tua guhte lakah hong vak pih kawikawi a, tua guhte a tam mahmahna le a keu mahmahna ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel37:3 Amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih misi guhte a nungtakik thei ding hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Topa Pasian aw, hih thu nang bek in na thei ding hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Ezekiel37:4 Tua ciangin amah in, “Hih guhte tungah thu hilh inla, hih guh keute in Topaʼ thu a ngaih nadingun gen in." 
Ezekiel37:5 Topa Pasian ahi keimah in amaute tungah ka gen thu hih bangin gen in: Note sungah hu kong guan dinga, note kong nungtasakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Thagui le sazang kong guan dinga, vun tawh kong tuam ding hi. Tua ciangin na sung uh ah hu hong guan in kong nungtasakkik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna nong thei ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:7 Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin thu ka gen hi. Tua bangin thu ka gen laitakin a kigawi zuazua a ging ka za a, tua guhte khatlekhat kizomkik uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Tua bangin ka et laitakin thagui le sazang in tua guhte tuam a, tua ciangin a vun in zong hong tuam hi. Ahi zongin tua pumpite sungah hintheihna hu om nai lo hi." 
Ezekiel37:9 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, huihte tungah thu gen inla, hih a si sa pumpite sungah hu sangin a hingkiksak dingin mun khempeuh panin hong pai un, ci-in Topa Pasian in thu hong pia hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:10 Tua ahih ciangin hong sawl bangin ka gen hi. Tua pumpite sungah hintheihna hu hong lut a, tua ciangin amaute hingin a khe-un hong ding uh hi. Galkap honpi khat zah pha-in tam mahmah uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:11 Tua ciangin Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen hih guhte tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in, ‘I keucip a, i lamet ding bangmah om nawn loin i nuntakna guipi bei ta hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:12 Tua ahih ciangin ka mi Israel-te tungah thu gen inla, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Ka mite aw, tu-in noteʼ hankhuk kong honsak dinga, note hong paikhiat pihin, Israel gam kong tunpihkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:13 Note na kiphumna uh hankhuk hong honsakin kong paikhiatpih ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel37:14 Note sungah keima nuntakna hu kong guan dinga, note hong hingkiksakin, na gam uh ah kong teengsakkik ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu nong thei ding uh hi. Hih bangin kong hih nading thu ka kiciam zo a, ka kiciam bangin kong hih ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khinzo hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel37:15 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, sing ciangkhut khat la inla a tungah, ‘Judah kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh in. Tua ciangin a dang khat la leuleu inla a tungah, ‘Israel kumpi gam,’ ci-in gelh leuleu in." 
Ezekiel37:17 Tua ciangin tua ciangkhut tegel ciangkhut khat a bat theih nadingin na khut sungah tawi khawm in. 
Ezekiel37:18 Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in na mipihte in hong dot uh ciangin" 
Ezekiel37:19 amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel ciangkhut la-in Judah ciangkhut tawh ka koih khawm ding hi. Tua ciangkhut nihte ciangkhut khatin ka bawl dinga, ka khut sungah ka tawi ding hi, ci hi, ci-in gen in." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Tua na gelh ciangkhut nihte miteʼ muhin na khut sungah tawi-in 
Ezekiel37:21 amaute kiangah, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Amauteʼ omna minam dangteʼ lak panin Israel mite la-in ka kaikhawm dinga, amauteʼ gamah ka paipihkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:22 Israel mual tung gamah, amaute minam khatin ka gawmkik ding hi. Amaute a uk ding kumpi khat nei ding uh a, amaute minam nihin kikhen nawn lo ding uh a, kumpi gam nihin zong kikhen nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:23 Amaute pen a muhdahhuai milimte tawh kininsak nawn lo ding uh a, mawhnate tawh zong kininsak nawn lo ding uh hi. Amauteʼ mawhna le kei hong leh heknate panin ka suaktasak ding hi. Amaute a siangtho mi-in ka bawl dinga, amaute keima mi hi-in, kei, amauteʼ Pasian ka hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ka nasem pa David pen amauteʼ kumpi hi dinga, mi khatʼ ukna nuai ah amaute kigawmin, ka thukhamte hoihtakin zui ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:25 A pu a pate uh a teennasa ahi ka nasem pa Jakob tungah ka piak leitang ah amaute teeng ding uh a, amaute bek hi loin a suan a khak dongun teeng suak ding uh hi. Ka nasem pa David in amaute uk tawntung ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:26 Amaute lungmuangin a om tawntungna ding uh thuciamna khat ka bawl dinga, amaute thupha pia-in a mi ka pungsak ding hi. Amauteʼ lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka phut ding hi." 
Ezekiel37:27 Amaute tawh teeng khawmin, amauteʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amaute pen keima mite hi ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel37:28 Amauteʼ lakah a om tawntung dingin ka biakinnpi ka koih ciangin, Topa ahi keimah in keima mi dingin Israel mite ka bawl khitna thu, minam dangte khempeuh in thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel38:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Magog gam a om Gog kumpipa mawhsakna thu gen in. Amah pen Meshek minamte le Tubal minamte a ukpa ahi hi. Amah mawhsakna thu gen inla," 
Ezekiel38:3 Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Meshek le Tubal minamte a ukpipa Gog aw, kei pen nangma langah ka pang hi." 
Ezekiel38:4 Nang hong lehhei-in, na khaguh ah sikkawi kong bulh dinga, na galkap honpite khempeuh tawh kong kai khia ding hi. Na galkap honpite pen a sakolte uh le a sakol tung tuangte uh tawh tam mahmah a, na galkap khempeuh in lum le namsau nei kim uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:5 Persia gam, Kush gam le Put gam mite in zong nang hong panpih uh a, amaute in lum le sik lukhu nei kim uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:6 Leilu lam gam pek a om Gomer gam a galkapte khempeuh le Beth-togarmah gam a galkapte khempeuh in nang hong panpih uh a, minam dang tampite in zong nang hong pawlpih uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:7 Tua ahih manin tu-in nang le na pawlte khempeuh a kigalging sa-in om unla, na thupiakna bangin a gamtang pah lian dingin na galkapte khempeuh omsak in." 
Ezekiel38:8 Minam tuamtuamte lak panin kikaikhawmkikin a gam uh a kitutkik zawh gallauna nei loin a om Israel miteʼ gam a sim dingin kum tampi khit ciangin kong sawl ding hi. Sau veipi sung kinusia-in gamkhing a suak ngei hi napi-in, tu-in a mite khempeuh lungmuang takin a omna Israel mual tung gamte a sim ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel38:9 Nang le na galkap honpite le nang hong pawlpih minam tampite in khuapi huih bangin na sim gawp ding uh a, meiipi bangin a gam sung khempeuh na tuamcip ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Topa Pasian ahi keimah in nang Gog tungah kong genin ah: Tua hun ding hong tun ciangin na lungsim sungah gitloh gamtat ding ngaihsut na kipan ding hi. 
Ezekiel38:11 A khuapite in galnanna ding kulh nei loin, lungmuang takin a om hithiat, a kihu tawm zo lo ding gam khat, sim gawp ding na ngaihsun ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:12 A sia ngeisa khuapite sungah a teeng mite luhin a nate uh na sut gawp ding hi. Tua mite pen minam tuamtuamte lak panin a kikaikhawmkik, tu-in ganhing le neihsa van zong nei kikin, leitung lam khempeuh a kituahna lamka bom sanah a teeng mite ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:13 Sheba mite le Dedan mite le Tarshish khuapite ah a teeng sumbukte in nang kiangah, ‘Ngun le khamte, ganhingte le vante na ngah nadingin luh gawpin a sut gawp ding le gen zawh loh van tampi tawh a ciah khia dingin galsim dingin na galkapte na kaikhawm nai hiam?’ ci-in hong dong ding uh hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel38:14 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih bangin thu gen in hong ci hi: Keima mi Israel-te lungmuang takin a om hun laitakin nangmah na kihanthawn tawm dinga," 
Ezekiel38:15 leilu lam pek a na omna gam panin sakol tung vive ah a tuang, minam tampite kiang panin na kaihkhop a thahat galkap hon tampite ma suanin na kuan khia dinga," 
Ezekiel38:16 khuapi huih in gam sung a nawk gawp bangin keima mi Israel-te na sim ding hi. A hun a tun ciangin, nangmah zangin na ka sepna tawh minamte lakah ka sianthona ka lah theih nadingin keima gam a sim dingin kong sawl ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:17 Ni khat ni ciangin Israel mite a sim dingin mi khat ka sawl ding hi, ci-in keima nasem Israel kamsangte tungtawnin, sawt pek lai-in ka gengen niloh mipa pen nang na hi hi. Hih thu Topa Pasian in gen khinzo hi." 
Ezekiel38:18 “Ahi zongin Gog in Israel gam a sim ni ciangin ka heh suak mahmah ding hi. 
Ezekiel38:19 Tua ni ciangin ka hehluatna tawh Israel gamah nakpi takin zin liing hen, ka ci ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:20 Ngasate le vasate, ganhing a neu a lian le leitung a om mi khempeuh, keimah kihtakna hangin lau-in liing ding uh hi. Mualte pukin, keente cimin, kulh le phung khempeuh kicim mang ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Gimna a tuamtuamte tawh Gog ka lausak gawp ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. Ama mite khatlekhat namsau tawh kisat gawp ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel38:22 Pulnatna le sisan luanna tawh amah gim ka pia ding hi. Amah le a galkap honte le amah a panpih minam tampite tungah guahpi, gialpi, meikuang le kaat kuang, ka zusak ding hi." 
Ezekiel38:23 Hih bangin hihna tawh a lian a siangtho ka hihna thu, keimah in minam khempeuh tungah ka langsak dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu amaute in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:1 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Gog mawhsakna thu gen inla, Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Meshek le Tubal minamte a ukpipa Gog aw, kei pen nangma lang khat ah a pang ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel39:2 Mun dang khat ah nang kong paisak dinga, leilu lam gam pek panin Israel mual tung gamah kong tunpih ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:3 Tua lai mun panin na veilam khut ah na tawi na thal hong bet khiatsakin, na taklam khut ah na tawi na thaltangte zong kong bet khiatsak ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nang le na galkap honte le nang hong panpih minam khempeuhte pen Israel mual tung gamah na si mang ding uh a, vasa nam khempeuh le gamsate in na sa uh ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:5 Topa Pasian in hih thu gen khin ka hih manin gamlak ah na tuk zeizai ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel39:6 Kuamah in nawngkaisak loin nuam takin mite a om hithiatna Magog gam sung le tuipi gei-a gamte ka hal dinga, tua ciangin Topa ka hihna thu mi khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:7 Keima mi Israel-te lakah ka min siangtho ka kitheisak dinga, keima min a daii dingin ka omsak nawn kei ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah pen a Siangtho, Israel-teʼ Pasian ahi Topa ka hihna thu minam khempeuh in hong thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:8 Topa Pasian in, “Tua ka gengen ni hong tung takpi ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:9 Israel gam khuapite ah a teeng mite kuan khia-in, tua a kinusia galhiamte ansing dingin khawm ding uh hi. Tua a kinusia lumte, thal le thaltangte, molhtumte le teipite, mei-in cih ding uh a, kum sagih sung kikhom ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:10 Amaute in mei cih dingin a kinusia galhiamte nei uh ahih manin gamlak ah sing tom kul lo dinga, tulak ah sing phuk ding zong kisam lo ding hi. Amaute in amauʼ na a sutteʼ na sutin, a suksiatsakteʼ na suksiatsak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:11 Topa in, “Hih thu hong pian ni ciangin Israel gam sung Si Tuipi nisuahna lamah a om Khualzin Miteʼ Kuam a cihna sungteng, a kivui nadingun Gog ka pia ding hi. Gog le a galkap honpite, tua lai munah kivui ding ahih manin khualzin miteʼ lampi khaktan dinga, tua mun pen, ‘Gog Galkapteʼ Kuam,’ kici ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Israel mite in a gam sung uh a siansakkik nadingin misi vuina in kha sagih sung hun bei ding hi. 
Ezekiel39:13 Gam sunga om mi khempeuh in misi vuina ah huh ding uh a, tua bangin a huhna hangun ka gualzawh ni-in pahtawina ngah ding uh hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Ezekiel39:14 Kha sagih a cin khit ciangin, a gam sungteng uh a siangthosak theih nadingun a kimangngilh kha si luang hawmte zongin a phum dingin gam sungteng a zong kawikawi ding mi pawl khat a seh ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:15 Gam sungteng a zon kawikawina uh ah misi guh a muh simun, misi vuite in hong tawmin Gog Galkapteʼ Kuam ah a vui hun ma sungteng uh a kitheih nadingin a gei ah ciaptehna khat bawl pahpah uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Tua galkap honpiteʼ min tamin a gei ah khuapi khat om hi.) Tua bangin gam sung siangsak ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:17 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, amaute adingin ka bawlsak biakpiakna sa a ne dingin mun khempeuh panin vasa khempeuh le ganhing khempeuh hong pai nadingun sam in. Israel mual tung gamah pawi lianpi khat om dinga, a duh zahzahun sa ne-in si dawn ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Tuutalte, tuunote, keelte le bawngtal thaute a kigawh bangin a kigo ahi galkapteʼ sate ne-in, leitung gam ukteʼ site a dawn ding uh ahi uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:19 Biakna dinga gawh bangin hih mite ka gawh ciangin vasate le ganhingte in a nek zawh zahzah uh a thaute ne ding uh a, a kham dongun a si dawn ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:20 Amaute in ka sabuai tungah, sakolte le a tunga tuangte, galkapte le galkap maangteʼ sa, a nek zawh zahzah uh ne ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:21 Topa in kei kiangah, “Minamte lakah ka minthanna ka lak dinga, thu a tangin ka khennate ka sepkhiat theih nadingin ka vangliatna ka zatna dan amaute tungah ka lak ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:22 Tua khit a kipanin amauteʼ Topa Pasian ka hihna thu, Israel mite in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Tua ciangin kei tungah hong khialhna uh hangin Israel mite sal suak uh a, amaute nungngatin, a galte uh khut sungah pia-in gal sungah a vekun a sisak ka hihna," 
Ezekiel39:24 le amauteʼ nitna le a gitlohna uh tawh kituakin amaute tungah bawlin, amaute a nungngat ka hihna thu, minam dangte in thei ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel39:25 Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Tu-in Jakob suanlekhak Israel mite ka hehpih dinga, amaute a cithei-in ka bawlkik ding hi. Keima min siangtho ka hu ta ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:26 Amauteʼ gam sungah kuamah in su loin lungmuangin a omkik uh hun ciangin, kei hong leh bawlnate uh le a mindainate uh mangngilh thei ta ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:27 Kei a siangtho ka hihna thu, minam tampite tungah ka lah nadingin a galte uh a omna gamdang khempeuh panin amaute la khia-in ka kaikhawmkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Tua ciangin, minam dangteʼ khut sungah salin amaute puakin, tua khit ciangin amaute khat zong siit loin kaikhawmkikin a gam sung uh ka tunpih kimna hangin amauteʼ Topa Pasian ka hihna thu, keima mite in hong thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel39:29 Israel mite tungah ka kha ka sung dinga, amaute ka nungngat nawn kei ding hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:1 Jerusalem khuapi a kilak zawh a kum sawm le kum lina kum, salin hong kipaipih zawh a kum sawm nih le ngana, a kha masa a ni sawm ni-in ka sungah Topaʼ vangliatna hong om lamtak ka kiphawk a, amah in kei hong paikhiatpih hi." 
Ezekiel40:2 Ka maang sungah, Pasian in Israel gamah hong paipih a, mual sang khat tungah hong koih hi. Khuapi tawh a kibang inn honpi bang khat ka mai ah ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel40:3 Amah in tua khuapi nai ah hong paipih a, sumngo bangin a tee mi khat ka mu hi. Tua mipa in pikhau khat le piciang khat tawi a, kongpi gei ah a ding hi." 
Ezekiel40:4 Tua mipa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-a kong lah ding nate, na mit tawh limtakin enin, na bil tawh limtakin ngai inla, limtakin ngaihsun in. Hih lai ah nang kong paipihna pen hih thu hang mah ahi hi. Na muh na khempeuhte, Israel mite tungah a gen ding na hi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ka muh pen biakinn na hi a, a kimkot ah kulh om hi. A mipa in pi sawm a pha tehna piciang la-in a kulh a teh hi. A teh ciangin pi sawm sahin, pi sawm mah sang hi." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam a om kulh kongpi ah amah pai a, a kahlei ah kah to-in a khung a tun ciangin kulh kongvang teh a, pi sawm mah sang hi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Tua banah lampi khat om a, a lampi pang tuakah galvilna inn dei neu thum tuak om hi. Inndei neute a dung a vai kikim a, pi sawm mah ahi hi. Inn dei neu khatlekhat kikal pi giat sah hi. Tua galvilna inn dei neute banah pi sawm mah a sau lampi khat om a, biakinnpi lam a maingat inn dei gol zaw sung a tung hi." 
Ezekiel40:8 Hih inn dei gol zaw a teh ciangin pi 14 pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:9 Hih inn dei pen biakinn tun nading lampi tawpna hi a, a biakinn lam neh pen a om kawm pen pi li a sah hi." 
Ezekiel40:10 (Hih lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inn dei neute pen a golna kikim a, a kikal a kawmte zong a sahna kikim hi.)" 
Ezekiel40:11 Tua ciangin a mipa in a lampi teh a, pi 16 zai-in pi 22 a sau hi." 
Ezekiel40:12 Tua galvilna inn dei neu mai ciatah letmat sawm nih sangin letmat sawm nih a sah kidalna khat a om hi. (Hih galvilna inn dei neute pen a dung a vai pi sawm tuak ahi hi.) 
Ezekiel40:13 Tua ciangin inn dei neu kawm nung panin lampi kantanin a gal san a inn dei neu kawm nung dong teh a, pi 42 a pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Inndei nunung pen zomah biakinn tual om a, tua tual a teh ciangin pi 34 a pha hi." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kulh kong pua panin inn dei nawlnung kawm pua dong lampi sauna pi 84 a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:16 Hih inn dei neuteʼ kawm a pualam pangah tawlet neu om a, inn dei kikal a om kawm tungah zong a vang neu om hi. Lampi omna lam pang, inn dei kikal a kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Tua ciangin a mipa in kongpi tawnin a tual ah hong paipih hi. A tual pualam kawm tawh kizomin inn dei sawm thum om a, tua inn deite mai ah suang a kiphah lampi om hi." 
Ezekiel40:18 Hih suangphah pen a tual kimkot ah om a, hih a pualam a tual pen a sung lam a om tual sangin niam zaw hi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Tua ciangin a sung lam tual lut nadingin a sang zaw ah kongpi khat om hi. A mipa in hih kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi 168 a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:20 Tua ciangin a mipa in a pualam tual paina ahi, leilu lam pangah a om kongpi lampi hong teh hi." 
Ezekiel40:21 Tua bangin a teh ciangin lampi pang tuak a om galvilna inn dei neu thumte, a kikal a om kawmte le a inn dei gol zaw pen, nisuahna kongpi-ate mah bangin a dung a vai kikim ciat hi. Tua kongpi lampi pen pi 84 sau a, pi 42 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:22 A inn dei gol zaw, a tawlette le nisuh kung lim a kibawlte pen nisuahna lam kongpi a omte mah tawh kibangin kikim hi. Hih lai ah zong kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei dawl sagih om a, a nawlnung a om a inn dei gol zaw pen in a tual lam maingat hi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Nisuahna lam pang a om bang teek mahin, leilu lam kongpi pan a lutna-a a tual gal khat ah tual sung nung lutna kongpi lampi khat mah a om hi. Tua kongpi nih kikal a teh ciangin pi 168 a sau hi." 
Ezekiel40:24 Tua ciangin a mipa in leitaw lam pangah hong paipih a, tua lai ah kongpi lampi khat mah na om leuleu hi. A teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi." 
Ezekiel40:25 Kongpi dang a omte mah bangin hih lai ah zong inn deite in tawlet nei uh hi. A kongpi lampi pen pi 84 sau-in pi 42 zai hi. 
Ezekiel40:26 Tua kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial sagih mah om a, a inn dei gol zaw pen a nawlnung mahah omin a tual lam a nga hi. Lampi omna lam pang, kawm sung nungteʼ tungah nisuh kung lim mah kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel40:27 Hih lai ah zong tual sung nung paina kongpi lampi khat mah om hi. A mipa in konglekong kikal a teh ciangin pi 168 a pha hi. 
Ezekiel40:28 Tua ciangin leitaw lam kongpi tawnin tual sung nungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi. 
Ezekiel40:29 A galvilna inn dei neute, a inn dei gol zaw le kawm sung nungte pen, kongpi dangate mah tawh kibang hi. Hih kongpi lam a om inn dei neute ah zong tawlet om hi. A lampi pi 84 sau-in, pi 42 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:30  
Ezekiel40:31 A inn dei gol zaw pen tual pua nung lam a nga hi. Lampi pang tuak a kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:32 Tua ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin a tual sung nungah hong paipih hi. A lampi a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kikim hi. 
Ezekiel40:33 A galvilna inn dei neute, a inn dei gol zaw le a kawm sung nungte zong, kongpi dangate mah tawh kikim hi. A kimkot ah tawlette om a, a inn dei gol zaw ah zong a om hi. A lampi, pi 84 sau a, pi 42 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:34 A inn dei gol zaw pen a tual pua nung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:35 Tua ciangin leilu lam kongpi lampi ah hong paipih a, a teh ciangin a dangte mah tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel40:36 A dangte mah bangin hih in zong galvilna inn dei neute, kawm sung lam tung kizemte, inn dei gol zaw pen le a kimkot ah tawlette a nei hi. A lampi pi 84 sau a, pi 42 zai hi." 
Ezekiel40:37 A inn dei gol zaw pen a tual pua nung lam nga hi. Lampi pang tuakah a om kawmte tungah nisuh kung lim kibawl a, hih kongpi lampi tun nadingin kahlei cial giat a om hi." 
Ezekiel40:38 Tual pua nung sungah lampi tawh a kimatin inn dei gol khat om a, a inn dei pen a tual lam a nga hi. Hih lai munah, biakna-in a pum a a hal ding uh ganhing luangte silsiang uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:39 Hih inn dei gol sungah sabuai li om a, alang tuakah nih tuakin kikoih hi. Meihal biakna-a piak ding ahi a, mawhna le khialhna hanga biakna-in piak ding ganhingte ahi zongin, hih sabuaite tungah go uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Hih inn dei pualam, leilu lam kongpi lutna pang tuakah zong sabuai nih tuak, a vekin sabuai li mah om hi." 
Ezekiel40:41 Tua ahih manin inn dei sungah sabuai li, a pua ah sabuai li, a vekpi-in giat om a, hih sabuaite pen, biakna-in piak ding ganhingte gawhna-in a kizang ahi hi." 
Ezekiel40:42 Meihal biakna-in piak ding ganhingte bawl nadingin a kizang sabuai lite pen suang a kiseek ahi hi. Tua sabuaite letmat sawm nih sang a, a dung a vai letmat sawm thum tuak ahi hi. Biakna-in piak ding gan gawhna-in a zat uh na khempeuh, hih sabuaite tungah koih uh hi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Hih sabuaiteʼ kimkot ah khut peek cia bang a zai geihual kibawl hi. Biakna-in piak ding sa khempeuh hih sabuaite tungah kikoih hi. 
Ezekiel40:44 Tua ciangin a pualam panin a tual sung nungah hong paipih a, a tual sung nungah inn dei nih na om hi. Khat pen leilu lam kongpi lam pangah omin leitaw lam nga a, a khat pen leitaw lam kongpi lam pangah omin leilu lam nga hi." 
Ezekiel40:45 A mipa in kei kiangah hih bangin hong gen hi: Leitaw lam a nga inn dei pen biakinn sungah na a sem siampite ading hi a," 
Ezekiel40:46 leilu lam a nga inn dei pen biakna tau ah na a sem siampite-aʼ ding ahi hi. Tua siampite khempeuh pen Zadokʼ suan Levi mite vive ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin Topaʼ omna ah amaute bek kipaisak hi, hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel40:47 A mipa in hih tual sung nung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi za khat le pi sawm guk le pi giat tuak a pha hi. A biakinn mai ah biakna tau khat a om hi. 
Ezekiel40:48 Tua ciangin biakinn sung lutna inn dei ah hong paipih hi. Amah in a sung lutna lampi teh a, pi kua sau-in pi 24 zai a, a pang tuak a kawmte pi nga tuak a sah hi." 
Ezekiel40:49 Inn sung lutna inn dei pen pi 34 sau a, pi 20 zai in, tua lai tun nadingin kahlei cial sawm a om hi. Inn sung lutna inn dei pang tuakah khuampi khat tuak a om hi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in a laizang a om inn dei ah hong paipih hi. Tua inn dei lutna lampi teh a," 
Ezekiel41:2 pi 18 zai a, a pang tuak a om kawmte pi giat tuak a sah hi. A laizang a om inn dei sung a teh ciangin pi 68 sau a, pi 34 zai hi." 
Ezekiel41:3 Tua ciangin inn dei sung nungah amah pai a, tua sung lutna lampi a teh ciangin pi thum sau-in pi sawm zai a, a pang tuak a om kawmte pi 12 tuak a sah hi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Tua inn dei sung nung a teh ciangin a dung a vai pi 34 tuak a pha hi. Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Hih lai pen Siangtho Pen Mun ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tua ciangin amah in biakinn kawm pua nung teh a, pi sawm tak a sah hi. Hih kawm tawh a kimatin biakinn kimkot ah inn dei neuneu om a, tuate pi sagih vive a zai hi." 
Ezekiel41:6 Hih inn dei neute dawl thum pha a, dawl khat gual pai phei suak ah inn dei neu sawm thum om hi. Tua inn dei neute a dawl sanna tawh kizui-in a biakinn kawm pa to tektek a, tua inn dei neute a nang dingin khuam a tuamin kul loin a biakinn kawm kimang toto hi." 
Ezekiel41:7 Tua biakinn kawm pang bel a kibawl inn dei neute sungah kahlei om to a, a dawl nuainung panin a tungnung dongin kizom to hi. A inn dei neute a dawl sanna lamah a biakinn kawm a pat tektek mah bangin a sang lam a om inn dei neute a sung zai semsem hi." 
Ezekiel41:8 Biakinn kimkot teng a lei kitawi to a, a mundangte sangin pi sawmin sang to zaw hi. Tua mun panin biakinn kawm le a kimkot a inn dei neute kipan to pan hi." 
Ezekiel41:9 Inndei neute a kawm sahna pi giat pha a," 
Ezekiel41:10 biakinn kimkot ah suangphah bangin a kitawi to-in a kibawl a zaina pi 34 ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:11 Biakinn kimkot ah a om inn dei neute ah pai nading kongvang, leilu lamah khat omin, leitaw lamah khat om hi. Tua biakinn kimkot ah pi giat paisuak a zai cial khat a om leuleu hi." 
Ezekiel41:12 Tua ciangin nitumna lamah biakinn lam a nga inn khat om hi. A inn dung pi 150 hi a, a vai pi 116 hi a, a kimkot a a kawm pi kua a sah hi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Tua ciangin mipa in biakinn teh a, pi 168 a pha hi. A kimkot a mun awng, a inn sung le a kawm tawh kigawmin pi 168 ahi hi." 
Ezekiel41:14 Nisuahna lam pang biakinn mailam a vailam zong a mun awng tawh kigawmin pi 168 mah ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:15 Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lam pangah a om, a tual lam a nga inn a sauna teh a, a kawm tegel tawh kigawmin pi 168 mah a pha hi. Biakinn sung lut nading inn dei le a inn deipi le Siangtho Pen Mun sungte pen" 
Ezekiel41:16 a sual panin a kongvangneute ciang dong singpeek tawh kidap hi. A tawlette pen a pualam a kihui-in a kibawl ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:17 Biakinn sung lam kawmte pen kongkhak zang ciang dong lim kibawlte tawh kidim a," 
Ezekiel41:18 nisuh kungte le kherub limte vive ahi hi. A masa-in nisuh kung, tua ciangin kherub, nisuh kung, kherub cih bangin a kimkot khempeuh ah kihelh to dimdiam hi. Tua kherub-te in maitang nih ciat nei uh hi." 
Ezekiel41:19 A mihing maitang pen a pang khat lam a om nisuh kung lam nga a, a humpinelkai maitang pen a pang lang khat lam a om nisuh kung lam a nga hi. A biakinn sung kimkot ah hih bangin kibawl a," 
Ezekiel41:20 sual panin kongkhak zang kikal sung khempeuh ah a dimin a om hi. 
Ezekiel41:21 Biakinn deipi kongkhak khuamte pen a siik kikim vive ahi hi. 
Ezekiel41:22 Tua ciangin Siangtho Pen Mun mai ah sing tawh a kibawl biakna tau bang pian khat a om hi. Pi nga sang a, a dung a vai pi li ahi hi. A khete, a kingaknate le a zawlte sing tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A mipa in kei kiangah, “Hih pen Topaʼ mai ah a kikoih sabuai ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel41:23 Inn deipi sung lut nading le Siangtho Pen Mun lutna dingah kongkhak a om hi. 
Ezekiel41:24 Tua kongkhakte pen a laizang ah a kituah, kongkhak peek nih nei-in a kibawl ahi hi." 
Ezekiel41:25 Biakinn sung kawmte tungah a kibawl mah bangin hih biakinn deipi sung lutna-a kongkhakte tungah zong nisuh kung le kherub mah a kibawl hi. Kongkhak pualam, inn sung lutna ding inn dei sanah singpeek tawh liimsun khat a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel41:26 Hih inn deipi sung kawmte tungah a pualam a kihui tawlette om a, nisuh kungte tawh zepna zong a kibawl hi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Tua ciangin mipa in a tual pua nungah hong paipih a, biakinn nitumna lam mongah a om inn tawh a kigamla lo, biakinn leilu lam a om inn khat ah hong tunpih hi." 
Ezekiel42:2 Leilu lam pang hih inn dung pi za khat sawm guk giat hi a, a vai pi sawm giat le li ahi hi." 
Ezekiel42:3 Tua inn pang khat pen biakinn gei-a mun awng pi sawm thum le li a zai a omna lam nga a, a pang lang khat pen tual pua nung a suangphah lam a nga hi. Tua inn pen cial thum a pha a kitawi to tungah kilam a, a tunga a cialte pen a nuai-ate sangin neu to zaw tektek hi." 
Ezekiel42:4 Hih inn leilu lam pangah pi sawm le guk zai-in, pi za khat sawm guk giat a sau lampi khat tung a, a lutna kong zong tua lam mahah a om hi." 
Ezekiel42:5 A cial tungnung ah a om inn deite pen a nuai-ate sangin neu zaw hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate pen a sang to zaw, a kawcik zaw ah om uh hi."
