Ezekiel42:6 Biakinn tual a a inn dangte mah bangin tua inn dei dawl thumte pen a cial tungah kinga uh a, a tuamin khuam nei lo uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:7 A cial nuainung a om inn deite pen pi sawm giat le li sau a, tua lai panin tua inngualte tawh a pai khawm hilhel pi sawm giat le li mah a sau kulh khat a om hi. Tua ciangin biakinn gal khat lam a om kulh pen pi za khat sawm guk giat sau hi." 
Ezekiel42:8  
Ezekiel42:9 Tua ciangin biakinn nitumna lam a om ahi, kulh a kipatna mun a inn nisuahna lam mongah kongkhakte a om hi." 
Ezekiel42:10  
Ezekiel42:11 Leilu lam pang a om mah bangin hih inn deite mai ah zong lampi khat a om hi. A sauna, a pianzia le a kongte zong leilu lam a om mah tawh kibang hi." 
Ezekiel42:12 Nisuahna lam pang a kulh a kipatna mun a inn leitaw lamah kongkhakte a om hi. 
Ezekiel42:13 Tua ciangin a mipa in kei kiangah, “Leilu lam a om leh leitaw lam a om hih inn nihte pen biakna inn siangtho ahi hi. Topaʼ omna ah a lut siampite in biakna-in a kipia a siangtho pente, hih innte sungah ne uh hi. Hih inn deite a siangtho ahih manin, a kipia nate an tawh biaknate le mawhna le khialhna hangin biakna-in a kipia sate, a sungah koih uh hi." 
Ezekiel42:14 Siampite in Topa tungah biakna pia-in biakinn sungah a lut khit uh ciangin a pua lamah a pusuah nop uh leh, Topa tungah biakna a piak laitakun a silh uh puante suahin hih inn deite sungah koih ding uh hi. Tua lai panin puan dang silhin midangte omna ah pai thei pan uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel42:15 A mipa in biakinn sung lam teng a teh a zawh khit ciangin nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin hong pusuah pih a, biakinn pualam teng a teh hi." 
Ezekiel42:16 Amah in a tehna piciang la-in nisuahna lam pang teh a, pi za giat sawm li a pha hi." 
Ezekiel42:17 Tua ciangin leilu lam pang, leitaw lam pang le nitumna lam pang teh a, a thumin a sauna kikimin pi za giat sawm li ciat a pha hi." 
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 Tua ahih manin a umna kulh a pang li-in a teh ciangin a pang li mahin kikim a, pang khat ciangin pi za giat sawm li vive pha a, tua deina kulh pen biakna-a a siangtho le a mawkmawkte a kikhenna ahi hi." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tua khit ciangin a mipa in biakinn nisuahna lam a om kongpi ah hong paipih a," 
Ezekiel43:2 nisuahna lam panin Israel-teʼ Pasianʼ minthanna vang hong pai ka mu hi. Pasianʼ awging pen tuipi ging tawh kibang a, ama minthanna vang in leitung taangsak lela hi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Hih ka maangmuhna pen, Pasian in Jerusalem khuapi a susia dingin a pai lai a ka muh leh Khebar Gun gei-a ka muh tawh kibang hi. Tua ciangin thakhatin leilak kidenna-in ka bok suk hi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Topaʼ minthanna vang in nisuahna lam kongpi tawnin biakinn sungah a lut hi. 
Ezekiel43:5 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kha in hong la-in a tual sung nungah hong paipih a, tua lai panin, Topaʼ minthanna vang tawh biakinn sung a kidimna ka mu hi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Tua lai mun panin kei kiangah a mipa a din laitakin biakinn sung panin Topa in kei hong hopihna ka za a," 
Ezekiel43:7 “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih lai munah ka kumpi tokhom om hi. Israel mite lak hih lai munah ka teng dinga, amaute ka uk tawntung ding hi. Israel mite le a kumpite un pasian dang biakna tawh ahi a, a kumpi si sate uh phawk nading mual bawlna tawh ahi zongin ka min siangtho daisak ngei nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:8 Bang hang hiam cih leh a kumpite un a kongkhuam uh le a kongzawlte uh keima biakinn kongkhuam le kongzawlte tawh kimatin bawl uh a, ka kikal uh kawm bek in hong hal hi. A muhdahhuai a gamtatnate khempeuh uh tawh ka min siangtho hong daisak uh a, kei zong ka heh manin amaute ka susia mang hi." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ahi zongin tu-in amaute in pasian dangte bia nawn loin, a kumpi si sate uh phawkna a mual uh a phiat ding uh ahi hi. Tua bangin a gamtat nak uh leh amaute lakah ka teeng paisuak tawntung ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:10 Tua ciangin Topa in a thugen hong zom lai a, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite tungah biakinn thu le a geelna khempeuh cing takin lak inla, amauteʼ mawh gamtatna hangin maizumsak in." 
Ezekiel43:11 Amaute a gamtatna sate uh hangin hong maizum theih uh leh, biakinn geelna, a lim, a lutna le a pusuahna, a buppi lim, a na khempeuh a kigeelna le a zat dan ding khempeuh a cing takin amaute tungah laktel inla, amaute in a kigelnate thei-in a zat dan ding bangin a zuih theih nadingun amaute adingin lai-in gelhsak in." 
Ezekiel43:12 Biakinn tawh kisai ngeina in: Mual tung a om biakinn kimkot mun khempeuh pen biakna tawh kisai-in a siangtho ahi hi. 
Ezekiel43:13 “Biakna tau golna pen hih bang hi ding hi. A teh nadingin biakinn tehna a kizang ngeite mah hi ding hi. A biakna tau bul kimkot pen letmat sawm nih sangin, letmat sawm nih mah zai dinga, a tau kimkot ah letmat sawm a sangin geivial nei ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:14 A tau bul panin a tau zawl nuainung ciang pi li hi dinga, a sahna letmat sawm nih hi ding hi. Tua bansiah pi sagih sang to dinga, letmat sawm nih sah ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:15 A tungnung pen, ganhing kihalna mun pi sagih sang dinga, a kiu li ah letmat sawm nih a sang ki om ciat ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:16 A biakna tau dawnzang pen a dung a vai a kikim hi dinga, pi sawm nih sau-in pi sawm nih mah zai ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:17 Biakna tau a pai to a laizang san teng pen a dung a vai a kikim, pi sawm nih le li hi dinga, a nuai dawl sangin letmat sawm pai-in neu zaw ding hi. Tua a dinna a nuai gual kimkot letmat sawm nih pai-in zai ding hi. Biakna tau tung kah nading kahlei pen nisuahna lam pangah om ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hih biakna tau zatna ding ngeinate hih bang hi ding hi: Biakna tau a kizawh khit ciangin a tungah meihal biakpiakna le biakpiakna ganhing site thehna tawh apna a bawl ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Zadokʼ suanlekhak Levi siampite pen keima na a sem dingin ka omna ah a hong pai dingte ahi uh hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong pia hi. Mawhna hangin biakna-a piak dingin amaute tungah bawngtal khat na pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel43:20 Nangmah in a sisan pawl khat la-in biakna tau kiu li-a om ki lite, biakna tau pai to a laizang kiute le a kimkot ah a om a geihualte na nuh dinga, hih bangin hihna tawh biakna tau siansuah in na ap ding hi." 
Ezekiel43:21 Mawhna hangin biakna-in a kipia bawngtal pen la-in biakinn huang pualam, a mun hong kigenna sanah a hal ding na hi hi." 
Ezekiel43:22 A zing ciangin paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat la-in mawhna hangin biakna-in na pia ding hi. Bawngtal si tawh na siansuah mah bangin hih keeltal si tawh zong biakna tau na siansuah ding hi. 
Ezekiel43:23 Hih bangin siansuahna na man khit ciangin, paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat le tuutal khat na la dinga," 
Ezekiel43:24 Topa ahi keima kiangah nong paipih ding hi. Siampite in tua ganhingte tungah ci thehin, keimah hong biakna-in tua ganhingte hal ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Mawhna hangin biakpiakna-in ni sagih sung nisimin, paubaanna a om lo keeltal khat, bawngtal khat le tuutal khat a pia ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel43:26 Siampite in ni sagih sung biakna tau apna bawlin zat theih dingin a baih sa-in omsak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel43:27 Hih bangin ni sagih sung a hih khit uh ciangin, a ni giat ni-a kipanin siampite in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakpiaknate, biakna tau tungah piak ding kipan ding uh hi. Tua ciangin note tungah kei ka lungkim ding hi. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tua ciangin a mipa in nisuahna lam biakinn huang kongpi pua ah hong paipih a, a kongpi na kikhak hi." 
Ezekiel44:2 Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih kongpi kikhak paisuak dinga, kihongkik ngei lo ding hi. Israel-teʼ Topa Pasian keimah in hih kongpi tawn khin ka hih manin kuamah dang in tawn thei nawn lo dinga, a kikhak den ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ahi zongin hih lai ah gam uk na a sem laitak ulian pa pen keima omna ah biakna an siangtho a ne dingin hong pai thei ding hi. Amah hong pai ciangin inn deipi tawnin inn dei sung nung kongvang ah hong lutin tua lai mahah pusuak ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin biakinn mai ah hong paipih a, ka khuadak leh, Topaʼ biakinn sung khempeuh ama minthanna vang tawh na kidim hi. Kei zong leilak kidenna-in ka bok suk hi." 
Ezekiel44:5 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, tu-a na muh ding nate le na zak ding thute khempeuh hoihtakin ciamteh in. Ka biakinn a zatna ding ngeina om khempeuh tu-in a hong gen ding ka hi hi. Biakinn sungah a pai thei dingte le Siangtho Pen Munah a pai thei lo dingte khempeuh limtakin ciamteh in." 
Ezekiel44:6 A lehdo thei hih Israel mite tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute, hih bangin gen in: No Israel mite aw, a beisa huna a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate khempeuh uh khawl un." 
Ezekiel44:7 Keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite nong piak uh ciangin, keima thu a mang lo, vun a ki-at lo gamdang mite a sungah na lutsak uh a, ka biakinn na ninsak uh hi. Tua bangin a muhdahhuai na gamtatnate uh tawh ka thuciamna nasiasak uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ka biakinn sungah biakna ngeinate na zui kei uh a, ka biakinn sungah gamdang mite peuh na na semsak uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in tu-in kong genin ah: Vun ki-at lo gamdang mite peuhmah ka biakinn sungah lut lo ding uh a, note lakah a teeng gamdang mite nangawn lut lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:10 No Israel midangte bangin kei hong nusia-in milim a bia Levi mite in zong gim thuak ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:11 Amaute in biakinn kongcin, biakinn sung nasepte sem thei ding uh hi. Meihal biakna-a kipia ganhingte le mite in biakna-in a piak ganhingte go thei ding uh a, miteʼ na a sepsak dingin tavuan la ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ahi zongin amaute in milim biakna lamah Israel mite makai-in mawhna sungah Israel mite tunpih uh ahih ciangin, amaute gim ka piak ding, Topa Pasian keimah nakpi takin ka kiciam hi." 
Ezekiel44:13 Amaute in keima siampi na sem loin, keima biakna na a siangtho nate nai ah pai thei loin, Siangtho Pen Munah zong lut thei lo ding uh hi. Hihte pen, a muhdahhuai a gamtatna sate uh hangin a hamsiatna uh ahi hi." 
Ezekiel44:14 Ahi zongin biakinn sunga nasep a kisam dangte a sem dingin amaute ka seh thei ding hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel44:15 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in keima kiangah, “Zadokʼ suanlekhak Levi mi siampite ahihleh, Israel mi a dangte in kei hong nusiat laitakun, amaute in citakin biakinn sungah keima na hong sem uh ahih manin, tu-in amaute in keima na hong semin, keimah biakna-in sathaute le sasite keima kiangah hong pia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ka biakinn sungah amaute lutin, ka biakna tau ah na semin, biakinn sunga biaknate ah makai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:17 A tual sung nung paina kongpi ah a lut uh ciangin saihadial puan silh ding uh hi. Tual sung nung sung le biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun samul puan peuhmah silh lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:18 Amaute in saihadial puan khimin, saihadial puan teengin, khua-ul a suaksak thei kawnggak gak lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:19 Midangte a omna biakinn tual pua nungah a pusuah ma-un, biakinn sungah na a sep laitakun a zat uh puante suahin inn dei siangtho sungah nusia ding uh hi. Tua lai panin amaute in puan dangte silhin pusuak ding uh hi. Tua hikeileh a biakna puan siangthote un midangte lawh kha ding hi." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Amaute in a sam uh mettol lo ding uh a, a sau lua-in zong hawi lo ding uh hi. A kilawm ciang bekin met ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:21 Biakinn tual sung nungah a lut ma-un siampite in leenggahzu ne lo ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel44:22 Meigong numei ahi a, a kima sa numei ahi zongin zi-in nei lo ding uh a, Israel nungak, ahih kei leh siampiteʼ zi meigongte bek teenpih thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Amaute in ka mite tungah, biakna na a siangtho le a mawkmawk nate le a nin le a siang nate a kilamdanna hilh ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:24 Thu nei khat peuhpeuh a om ciangin, keima ngeina om sa tawh kizui-in thu khen ding uh hi. A kiseh pawite a ngeina om sa bangin bawl ding uh a, Sabbath-te siangthosak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:25 Siampite pen misi lawnna tawh kininsak lo ding uh hi. Ahi zongin, a nu uh ahi a, a pa uh ahi a, a sanggam pasal uh ahih kei leh pasal a nei nai lo a sanggam numeite uh hangin kininsak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:26 Amaute a kisiansuah khit uh nipikal khat ciang bekin," 
Ezekiel44:27 biakinn tual sung nungah pai-in biakinn sungah na a sepkik theih nadingun kisiansuahna biakna pia ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu ka gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel44:28 “Israel mite tungah ka piak, khang khat pan khang khat ah a kiluah suksuk ding sung panin siampiteʼ tanh pen siampi nasep za ahi hi. Amaute in Israel mite lakah neihsa gamh nei lo ding uh hi. Amauteʼ kisapna khempeuh ah kei a kicing khin ka hi hi." 
Ezekiel44:29 An tawh biakna, mawhna le khialhna hanga biakna le Israel mite lak panin keima adingin a kipia khiate khempeuh amaute in ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:30 Anpal sung panin a limci pen teng le kei tungah hong kipia na khempeuh, amaute in tang ding uh hi. Israel miteʼ inn sungah ka thupha a tun theih nadingin amaute in anlum a em simun, biakna-in siampite tungah a em masak penpen uh pia ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel44:31 Siampite in vasa ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin, saʼ nek baang hitaleh ama thu-in a sitawm mawkte hitaleh, ne lo ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Israel minamte tungah piak dingin leitang a kihawm ciangin, Topaʼ tanh dingin seh khat kituam koih ding hi. Tua a kituam koih leitang pen a dung tai sawm hi dinga, a vai tai giat hi ding hi. Tua sung khempeuh a siangtho biakna leitang hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hih leitang sung panin biakinn ding tawh kisai-in a dung pi za giat sawm li, a vai pi za giat sawm li mah kisehin, tua banah a kimkot pi sawm giat le li paisuak mun awng tawh hi lai ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:3 Hih biakna leitang siangtho sung panin siangtho pen mun le biakinn mun dingin a sau lam tai sawm, a zai lam tai li kiseh khia ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:4 Hih a kiseh khia mun sungteng pen biakna leitang siangtho hi dinga, Topaʼ biakinn sungah na a sem siampite ading hi ding hi. Hih mun sungteng pen siampiteʼ inn lam nading mun le biakinn lam nading mun siangtho hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:5 Hih banah, a dung tai sawm, a vai tai li a pha seh khat kibawl leuleu dinga, biakinn sungah na a sem Levi mite ading hi ding hi. Tua sung tengah amauteʼ ten nading khua om ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:6 Khuapi huang sung dingin a dung tai sawm, a vai tai nih a pha leitang khat kiseh khia ding hi. Hih mun pen a siangtho leitang tawh kizom pah dinga, Israel mite khempeuh ading hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Gam sung a uk uliante adingin zong leitang kiseh khia ding hi. A siangtho leitang le khuapi huang panin kipanin nitumna lamah a gamgi ciang, nisuahna lamah zong a gamgi ciang mah hi dinga, nitumna pan nisuahna gamgi pen Israel minamte khat in a ngah zah tan mah hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:8 Hih mun teng pen Israel gam sung panin Israel ulianteʼ neih hi ding hi. Tua ahih manin amaute in Israel mite bawlsia nawn lo ding uh a, mun a om lai teng khempeuh, a minam zui-in Israel minamte a tangsak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:9 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel a uk uliante aw, na mawh gamtatna uh sauvei zo lua ta hi. Na ngongtatnate uh le mi na nenniamnate uh khawl unla, thuman thutangin na sem un. Amauʼ leitang panun ka mite not khia nawn kei un. Topa Pasian keimah in hih thu kong gen hi." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Mi khempeuh in tawisuang man le tehna man zang ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel45:11 An tehna bung le tui tehna bung kikim dinga, a kizang ding et kakna pen beem hi ding hi. Beem khat ah an bung sawm, tui bung sawm mah hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:12 A gik tehna pen, gerah sawm nih ciang shekel khat, shekel sawm guk ciangin mina khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Biakna na piak ding zia uh pen, mangbuh na neihzah uh pan sawm guk ah khat, mangbuhham zong sawm guk ah khat mah," 
Ezekiel45:14 sathau na neihzah uh sung pan seh za ah khat (bung tawh tehin bung sawm ciangin beem khat a seh)," 
Ezekiel45:15 tuu na neih sung uh panin za nih ciangin khat hi ding hi. Hihte pen an tawh biakna, meihal biakna, thunuam a biakpiaknate hi a, na mawhnate uh a mai theih nading ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong pia hi." 
Ezekiel45:16 Israel mi khempeuh in hihte pen biakna-in a piak dingin, amau a uk ulian pa tungah puak ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:17 Gam uk ulian pa in biakna-in piak ding ganhingte, an tawh biakna-in zat dingte le pawi khempeuh, Khadet ni, Sabbath nite-in Israel mi buppite adingin tui phih biaknate a piak ding ama nasep ahi hi. Israel miteʼ mawhna a mai theih nadingin mawhna hanga biakna, an tawh biakna, meihal biakna le thunuam a biakpiakna-in a zat dingte khempeuh amah in a si ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel45:18 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Kha khatna a ni masa ni-in paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat biakna-in pia-in biakinn a siangsak ding na hi uh hi. 
Ezekiel45:19 Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakpiakna ganhing si pawl khat la-in biakinn kong khuamte, biakna tau ki lite le tual sung nung lutna kong khuamte nuh ding hi." 
Ezekiel45:20 Tua bangmahin tua kha a ni sagih ni-in zong, tup lohpi le theih lohna hangin a khial kha mite adingin siansuahna a bawl ding na hi uh hi. Tu-a bang danin biakinn a siangthosak ding na hi uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:21 “A kha masa a ni sawm le li ni-in Paisan Pawi na kipan ding uh a, mi khempeuh in ni sagih sung silngo sawh loh anlum na ne ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel45:22 Tua pawi bawl a kipat ni-in gam uk ulian pa in amah le mi khempeuh adingin mawhna hanga biakpiakna-in bawngtal khat pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel45:23 Tua pawi ni sagih sung nisimin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal sagih le tuutal sagih la-in Topa tungah meihal biakna-in pia dinga, tua banah mawhna hanga biakna-in nisimin keeltal khat zong a pia ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel45:24 Bawngtal le tuutal a kipia zah tawh kizui-in an tawh biak nadingin an bung khat pai le sathau biing khat pai tawh pia khawm ding hi. 
Ezekiel45:25 “A kha sagihna a ni sawm le nga ni-in nipikal khat sung a kibawl ding Buk Pawi kipan dinga, mawhna hanga biakpiakna, meihal biakna le an tawh biakna-in piak dingin an le sathaute, nisimin a kisam zah, gam uk ulian pa in pia ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:1 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lam a om, tual sung nung kongpi pen nasep ni guk sung kikhakcip dinga, ahi zongin Sabbath ni le Khadet ni-in kihong ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:2 Siampite in meihal biakna le thunuam a biakna a piak laitakun, gam uk ulian pa pen tual pua nung lam panin inn dei lianpi kongpi ah pai-in kongpi khuamte gei ah ding dinga, tua kongpi ah bia-in tua khit ciangin pusuakkik ding hi. Nitak mateng tua kongpi kikhak lo ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:3 Sabbath ni le Khadet nisimin mi khempeuh in zong tua kongpi mai ah Topa bia-in kun ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Gam uk ulian pa in Sabbath ni-in meihal biak nadingin paubaanna a om lo tuuno guk le tuutal khat pia ding hi. 
Ezekiel46:5 Tua ganhingte tawh a piak khawm ding an tawh biakpiak nadingin zong, tuutal khat ciangin an bung khat kizuisak dinga, tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piak nop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna ah sathau biing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:6 Khadet ni ciangin paubaanna a om lo bawngtal khat, tuuno guk le tuutal khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Tuate tawh piakkhop dingin an tawh biakpiak nadingin bawngtal le tuutalte khat ciangin an bung khat pai le tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piak nop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna ah sathau biing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi. 
Ezekiel46:8 Gam uk ulian pa in a kuan lamin a tot lampi teng mah a ciah ciangin tawnin, inn deipi kongpi mahah pusuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:9 “A kiseh pawi hunte ah Topa a bia dingin a hong pai mite khempeuh pen a hong lutna kongpi zui-in kilehkik lo ding uh a, tangtakin paisuak ding uh hi. Leilu lam kongpi panin a lutte, leitaw lam kongpi ah ciah ding uh a, leitaw lam kongpi panin a lutte, leilu lam kongpi ah ciah ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Gam uk ulian pa zong mihonte mah tawh lutin, amaute mah tawh pusuak khawm ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:11 Pawi nite le a kiseh pawi hunte ah an tawh biakna-in piak ding pen, bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin khat ciangin an bung khat in zui dinga, tuunote tawh piak khawm ding pen a miteʼ piak nop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a kipiak ciangin sathau biing dim khat in zui ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:12 Gam uk ulian pa in ama utthu in biakpiakna, meihal biakna ahi a, thunuam a biakna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh a piak ciangin, ama lut nadingin nisuahna lam a om tual sung nung kongpi kihonsak ding hi. Amah in Sabbath ni-in biakpiakna a bawl mah bangin pia ding hi. Amah a ciahkik khit ciangin a kongpi kikhak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Gam uk ulian pa in meihal biakna-in piak dingin paubaanna a om lo kum khat a pha tuuno khat, zingsang simin Topaʼ tungah biakna-in pia ding hi. Hih pen nisimin a kipia ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:14 Mangbuhnel lawh dim khat le a meek khop pih ding sathau hai khat tawh, an tawh biakna-in zong, nisimin pia ding hi. Hih meihal biakpiakna ngeina pen a kip paisuak ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Tua bangin tuuno, mangbuhnel le sathau, zingsang simin Topa tungah a kipia ngitnget ding ahi hi." 
Ezekiel46:16 “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gam uk ulian pa in ama neihsa leitang mun khat peuhpeuh, a tapate khat peuhpeuh tungah a piak leh, tua leitang a ngah a tapa in a luah gamh-in nei paisuak ding hi." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ahi zongin gam uk ulian pa in ama nasemte khat peuhpeuh tungah leitang a piak leh, suahtakna kum a tun ciangin tua leitang pen a pia gam ukpaʼ neihsa suakkik ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua leitang pen ama neihsa hi a, amah le a tapate bek in nei paisuak thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel46:18 Gam uk ulian pa in midangteʼ neihsa leitang laksak ngei lo ding hi. Ama tungah a kipia leitang sung panin a tapate khen khia bek ding hi. Ka miteʼ leitang laksakin, bawlsia lo ding hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tua ciangin a mipa in biakinn tual sung nung leitaw lamah a om kongpi gei-a inn deite ah hong paipih hi. Hih inn deite pen siampiteʼ zat ding a siangtho inn deite ahi hi. Amah in tua inn deiteʼ omna nitumna lam pang mong hong kawk a," 
Ezekiel46:20 “Hih mun pen, siampite in mawhna le khialhna hangin biakna-in a kipia sate a huanna mun le an tawh biakpiaknate a em nading mun ahi hi. Hih pen, tual pua nungah biakna sa le ante paipih kha loin, tua a siangtho nate tawh tual pua nung a om mite a lawhsak khak loh nading uh ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel46:21 Tua ciangin tual pua nungah hong pusuah pih a, a tual kiu lite hong lak hi. Tua tual kiu liteʼ kiu ah tualno khat ciat na om hi." 
Ezekiel46:22 Tua tualnote pi sawm guk giat sau-in pi sawm li le giat zai a, a vekin a golna kikim hi." 
Ezekiel46:23 Tua tualno lite a umna kawm dingin suang kiciang ciat a, tua a kawmte belin meikhuk a om hi." 
Ezekiel46:24 A mipa in, “Hihte pen, mite in biakna-in a piak sate, biakinn sung nasemte in a huanna anbuk ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tua ciangin biakinn lutna kongkhak ah hong paipihkik hi. Biakinn kongkhak sangkil nuai panin tui luang a, biakinn ngatna nisuahna lamah luang sukin, biakna tau leitaw lam pang tawn suk hi." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tua ciangin a mipa in leilu lam kongpi tawnin hong pusuah pih a, nisuahna lam kongpi pua lamah hong paipih hi. Leitaw lam kulh kongpi ah a tui hong luang khia hi." 
Ezekiel47:3 A mipa in a tehna piciang tawi-in a tui luanna nisuahna lam pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang dong teh suk a, a tui kei hong ngaptansak hi. A tui pen siakmit ciang bek thuk hi." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tua ciangin pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang teh suk leuleu a, tua lai ah a tui hong ngaptansak a, khuk ciang tum hi. Tua ciangin pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang teh suk leuleu-in a tui hong ngaptansak a, ka kawng ciang tum hi." 
Ezekiel47:5 Tua ciangin pi tul khat za guk sawm giat ciang mah teh suk lai leuleu a, a tui thuk lua ta ahih manin ka ngap zo kei hi. Thuk lua ahih manin a tui i peek loh buangin a kikantan zo ding hi lo hi." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tua ciangin amah in, “Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, hihte khempeuh hoihtakin ciamteh in,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin a mipa in tua gun gei mahah hong paipihkik a," 
Ezekiel47:7 tua lai mun ka tun ciangin a gun lang nih tuakah singkung tampi tak a po ka mu hi. 
Ezekiel47:8 Amah in kei kiangah, “Hih tui pen nisuahna lam manawhin gam sung nawkin Jordan Kuam ah luang sukin Si Tuipi sungah tung hi. Si Tuipi a tun ciangin hih tui in tuipi tui pen, tuisiang suaksakkik hi." 
Ezekiel47:9 Hih tui a luanna mun peuhpeuh ah ganhing namkim le ngasa tampi om hi. Hih tui in Si Tuipi tui siangsakkikin, a luanna peuhpeuh ah nuntakna omsakkik ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Engedi khua panin Eneglaim khua ciang dong tuipi dungah ngasa bengte omin, tua dungah a ngen uh zalin pho keu ding uh hi. Mediterranean Tuipi sungah ngasa a omzah mah bangin ngasa nam tampi om ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ahi zongin tuipi dunga om nawnglakte le bualte a om tuite siang lo dinga, cikhuk dingin a tua ci mahin om lai ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:12 Hih gun pang tuakah a gah nek dingin singkung nam khempeuh po ding hi. A tehte pulh ngei lo dinga, a gah tawh zong kilawi ngei lo ding hi. Biakinn panin a luang khia tui ngah ding uh ahih manin kha simin a gah thak gah tawntung ding uh hi. A singgahte an ding hi dinga, a tehte zatui-in kizang ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Ezekiel47:13 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in kei kiangah, “Israel minam sawm le nihteʼ gamh dingin leitang hawm ding a gamgi ding hih bang hi ding hi. Josef minamte in a dangteʼ ngah zah nih ngah ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:14 Hih gam na pu na pate uh tanh dingin ka piak nading thu, amaute tungah thupi takin ka kiciam khinzo hi. Tua ahih manin tu-in noteʼ lakah a kikim dimdiamin hawm un." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Leilu lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi panin kipanin Hethlon khuapi ah, Hamath khua lutna ah, Zedad khuapi ah," 
Ezekiel47:16 tua panin Berothah le Sibraim khuapite ah (hih khuate pen Damaskas kumpi gam le Hamath kumpi gam kikalah om hi), tua panin Hazer-hattikon khuapi (Hauran kumpi gamgi gei-a om) hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:17 Leilu lam gamgi pen Mediterranean Tuipi a kipanin nisuahna lam manawhin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi a om Hazarenan khuapi ciang hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Nisuahna lam gamgi pen, Damaskas le Hauran gamgi kituahna panin hong kipan sukin, Jordan Gun zui suk a, Jordan Gun nitumna lam pang teng Israel gam hi-in, nisuahna lam pang teng Gilead gam hi a, tua panin Si Tuipi kimang sukin Tamar khuapi ciang hi suk ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Leitaw lam gamgi pen, Tamar khuapi panin hong kipanin Meribath-kadesh bual hong nawkin, tua panin sak nitumna lam manawhin Egypt gamgi zui to-in Mediterranean Tuipi sun ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Nitumna lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi hi to-in, Hamath khua lutna tawh a kitang ciang hi to ding hi." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Tua ahih ciangin hih gam sungteng, no Israel minamte lakah hawm un." 
Ezekiel47:22 Note adingin na neih kip tawntung ding uh gamh hi ding hi. Hih leitang na hawm uh ciangin note lakah hong teengin ta a nei khin sa minam dangte zong note mah bangin tanh na pia ding uh hi. Amaute pen Israel minam taktakte mah bangin na ngaihsun ding uh a, Israel minam dangte mah bangin leitang hawmna ah ai sawk thei ding uh hi." 
Ezekiel47:23 Noteʼ lakah a teeng gamdang mite in amauʼ teenna minamte tawh leitang ngahkhawm ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel48:1 “Leilu lam gamgi pen, Mediterranean Tuipi panin kipanin Hethlon khuapi ah, Hamath khua lutna ah, tua panin Damaskas le Hamath gamgi kituahna san a om Hazarenan khuapi ciang sun ding hi. Minam khat in leitang khen khat ciat ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi dinga, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung pen ah Dan minamte," 
Ezekiel48:2 a zomah Asher Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:3 a zomah Naftali Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:4 a zomah Manasseh Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:5 a zomah Efraim Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:6 a zomah Reuben Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:7 a zomah Judah Minamte hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:8 “Tuate zomah Pasian adingin a kipia leitang hi dinga, a zaina pen leilu lam panin a kipan leitaw lam tai sawm hi ding hi. A dunglam pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi dong, minam dangteʼ ngah zah tan mah hi dinga, a laizang sanah biakinn om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Topa adingin a kipia leitang a sauna tai sawm hi dinga, a zaina tai giat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Siampite in hih a siangtho leitang sung panin tanh ngah ding uh a, leilu lam pang le leitaw lam pang tai sawm tuak hi-in, nisuahna lam le nitumna lam pang tai li tuak hi ding hi. Siampiteʼ ngahna sung hih leitang laizang ah Topaʼ biakinn om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:11 Hih mun teng pen Zadokʼ suanlekhak siampite ading ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel midangte a gamtat khialh uh ciangin Levi midangte bangin va zui lo uh a, hih mite in citakin keima na hong sem uh hi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Tua ahih manin Levi midangte zomah hih bangin a mun tuam diak khat nei ding uh a, tua mun a siangtho pen mun khat hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Hih siampiteʼ zomah Levi mite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a sauna tai sawm hi-in, a zaina tai li hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Topa tungah a kipia hih leitang siangtho pen, leitang khempeuh panin a hoih pen mun hi a, hih leitang sung panin mun khat peuhpeuh, kizuak thei lo, a dang tawh zong kikhek thei lo, midang tungah zong kipia thei lo ding hi. Hih leitang pen a siangtho leitang hi a, Topa -aʼ ahi hi." 
Ezekiel48:15 “A om lai leitang, a sauna tai sawm le a zaina tai nih pen a siangtho leitang hi loin a mawkmawk leitang hi dinga, miteʼ taang zat ding mun hi ding hi. Ten nading le a mun awngthawl hi dinga, a laizang ah khuapi om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:16 A khuapi golna a dung a vai-in a kikim hi dinga, a pang li-in pang khat ciangin pi tul sagih za nga sawm guk hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:17 Khuapi kimkot paisuak ah pi za li sawm nih paisuak a zai mun awng om ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:18 Khuapi a kilam khit ciangin a siangtho leitang lamah a awng lai, nisuahna lam tai li, nitumna lam tai li a om lai teng pen khuapi sungah a teeng mite in a khawh ding leitang hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:19 Khuapi sungah nasemin a om mi peuhmah in Israel minam sung panin kuamah kideidanna om loin hih leitang kho thei ding uh hi. 
Ezekiel48:20 Hih a kiseh khia leitang buppi pen a pang li-in tai sawm pai hi dinga, hih pen leitang siangtho le khuapi huam sung kigawm hi ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:21 “A pang li-in tai sawm paisuak a pha, Topa adingin a kipia leitang le khuapi huamteng a kilakkhiat khit ciangin, a pang tuakah a om lai leitang, nitumna lamah tuipi dong, nisuahna lamah gambup gamgi dong, gam uk uliante ading hi ding hi. Hih leitang a kipia kikal sungah, biakinn, Topaʼ tungah a kipia leitang, Levi mite a kipia leitang le khuapi huam leitangte om dinga, gam uk ulianteʼ leitang in hihte laitaak ding hi. Hih gam uk ulianteʼ leitang pen leilu lamah Judah Minamte aʼ le leitaw lamah Benjamin Minamte aʼ kikalah om ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 “Hih leitang panin leitaw lam pang ah, Israel minam a omlaite in leitang ngah ding uh a, a kikal uh gamgite pen gambup nisuahna gamgi panin gambup nitumna gamgi ciang hi dinga, leilu lam panin a hawm uh kipan suk ding uh hi. Leilu lam a khungnung pen ah a ngah ding Benjamin Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:24 a zomah Simeon Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:25 a zomah Issakhar Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:26 a zomah Zebulun Minamte," 
Ezekiel48:27 a zomah Gad Minamte hi ding hi. 
Ezekiel48:28 “Leitaw lam panin Gad Minamte a kipia leitang banah gambup gamgi om dinga, Tamar khuapi panin kipanin Meribath-kadesh bual nawk dinga, tua panin sak nitumna lam manawhin Egypt-teʼ gamgi zui dinga, Mediterranean Tuipi ah tawp ding hi." 
Ezekiel48:29 Tu-a ka gen bangin Israel minamte in a khang a khangin a luah suksuk ding uh leitang dingin amaute tungah a kipia ding leitang ahi hi. Topa Pasian in hih thu kong gen khin hi. 
Ezekiel48:30 “A khuapi sungah lutna ding kulh kongpite om hi. A khuapi kulh pang lite, pang khat ciangin pi tul sagih za nga sawm guk sau hi. A pang khat ah kulh kongpi thum ciat om a, Israel minamte khat ciat tam hi. Leilu lam pang a om kulh kongpi thumte in Reuben, Judah le Levi tam hi. Nisuahna lam pang a omte in Josef, Benjamin le Dan tam hi. Leitaw lam pang a omte in Simeon, Issakhar le Zebulun tam hi. Nitumna lam pang a omte in Gad, Asher le Naftali tam uh hi." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32  
Ezekiel48:33  
Ezekiel48:34  
Ezekiel48:35 Khuapi kimkot a sauna pi tul sawm thum za nih sawm li pha a, tu a kipanin hih khuapi min pen, ‘Hih lai ah Topa om hi,’ kici ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel1:1 Judah kumpipa Jehoiakim kumpi a suah zawh a kum thumna kumin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem khuapi simin a umcih hi." 
Daniel1:2 Topa in kumpi Jehoiakim le biakinnpi na manphate kumpi Nebukhadnezzar a mansak hi. Amah in a mi matte Babylon gam ama pasian biakinn ah paipih a, na manpha a matte sumkoihna inn ah a koih hi." 
Daniel1:3 Kumpipa in Israel salte sunga kumpi nam le mi lian namte lak pan mi pawl khat a teel khia dingin innsung maang lian pen Ashpenaz thu a pia hi. 
Daniel1:4 Tua mite, kumpi inn sunga nasem siamte a suah theih nadingun a melhoih, pumpi tung poina a nei lo, a navak, hoihtakin pilna a kisinsak, na a thei baih, a lungsim navak ngentang ding ahi hi. Ashpenaz in amaute Babylon lai le a pau a hilh ding ahi hi." 
Daniel1:5 Amaute pen kumpi inn sunga nasem dangte mah bangin nisimin an le leenggahzu tawh a vak dingin kumpipa in thu a pia hi. Tua bangin kum thum sung sinna a neih khit uh ciangin kumpipa mai ah amaute a kilakkik ding uh ahi hi. 
Daniel1:6 Tua bangin a kiteelte, Judah mite vive hi a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael le Azariah-te ahi uh hi." 
Daniel1:7 Innsung maang lian pen pa in amaute min thak phuah a, Danielʼ min dingin Belteshazzar, Hananiahʼ min dingin Shadrak, Mishaelʼ min dingin Meshak, Azariahʼ min dingin Abednego a phuak hi." 
Daniel1:8 Daniel in kumpi inn sunga an le leenggahzu tawh a pumpi a thanghuaisak loh nadingin a lungsim a khensat hi. Amah in innsung maang lian pen Ashpenaz kiangah tua bang an a kipiak loh nadingin a ngen zaw hi. 
Daniel1:9 Tua ciangin Pasian in Daniel tungah Ashpenaz in ngaihsut siamna a neih theih nadingin a bawlsak hi. 
Daniel1:10 Ahih hangin Ashpenaz in Daniel kiangah, “Kumpipa in na annek ding uh le na dawn ding uh sehsa-in nei khinzo ahih ciangin, khangno dangte ban zo kei kha zenzen leteh a hong thah ding ka lau hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel1:11 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Ashpenaz in amah le a dang thumte a cing dingin a koihpa kiangah a pai hi. 
Daniel1:12 Amah in, “Ni sawm sung hong ze-etin, anteh bek hong nesak inla, tui bek hong dawnsak in." 
Daniel1:13 Tua ciangin kumpipaʼ an a ne khangnote tawh hong en kak khawm inla, nong muhna bangbangin thu khen ta in,” a ci hi." 
Daniel1:14 Amah in amauʼ ngetna bang mangin ni sawm sung ze-et dingin a thukim hi. 
Daniel1:15 Ni sawm a cin khit ciangin amaute pen kumpi an nete sangin cidam zaw uh a, a ci a sa uh a hoih zaw hi." 
Daniel1:16 Tua ciangin a cing pa in kumpi an le leenggahzu pia loin amaute anteh an a pia hi. 
Daniel1:17 Pasian in tua khangno lite lai theih siamna le pilna thukte a pia hi. Daniel pen maangmuhna le mangkhiat siamna a pia hi. 
Daniel1:18 Kumpipaʼ seh sa kum thum a cin khit ciangin Ashpenaz in khangnote khempeuh kumpipa kiangah a paipih hi. 
Daniel1:19 Kumpipa in amaute khempeuh hopih a, Daniel, Hananiah, Mishael le Azariah-te a dang teng khempeuh sangin a hoih zawk tuan lam uh a mu hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpi inn-a vaihawm ulian pawl a suak uh hi." 
Daniel1:20 Kumpipa in bangbang thuhaksa nono a dot hangin, hih mi lite pen ama gam sung khempeuh a mitphial siamte le aisan theite khempeuh sangin a zah sawmin a siam zawk lam uh a mu hi." 
Daniel1:21 Sairas, Babylon kumpi a suah hun dong, kumpi inn ah Daniel om to paisuak hi." 
Daniel2:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpi a suah zawh a kum nihna kumin mang khat a man hi. A lungsim patau lua mahmah ahih manin a ihmu thei kei hi. 
Daniel2:2 Tua ahih ciangin bang mang man cih a hilh dingin mitphial siamte, mibum theite le khongkhai siamte a samsak hi." 
Daniel2:3 Amaute hong pai-in kumpipa mai ah a din uh ciangin kumpipa in, “Mang khat ka man a, tua ka mang pen bang hiam cih thei nuam ka hih manin ka lungsim a patau mahmah hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:4 Amaute in Aram pau tawh, “Kumpipa aw, na khansau hen! Na mang hong gen leteh a khiatna zong kong gen ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel2:5 Kumpipa in, “Ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih kei uh leh note kong semnen gawp dinga, na inn uh suksiat gawp dingin ka ngaihsun khinzo hi." 
Daniel2:6 Ahi zongin ka mangmat le a khiatna nong gen theih uh leh, letsong le minphatna lianpi kong pia ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka mangmat bang hi a, a khiatna bang ahi hiam cih hong gen un,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:7 Amaute in, “Kumpipa aw, na mang hong gen phot leteh a khiatna kong gen thei pan ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Daniel2:8 Kumpipa in, “Ka ngaihsut sa teng hong zasak khinzo ka hih manin hun sau theihtheih nading a zong na hih lam uh teltakin kithei hi." 
Daniel2:9 Ka mangmat nong gen theih kei uh leh note khempeuh thukhenna khat bek kong pia ding hi. No teng khempeuh in lungsim kikhatin zuau thu gengen leeng a ngaihsutna hong kikheel ding hi, a ci nuam na hi tazen uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka mangmat hong gen phot un. Tua hileh a khiatna zong hong gen thei ding ci-in kong muang pan ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:10 Khongkhai theite in, “Kumpipa aw, na deihna bang a hong gen thei ding hih leitungah mihing khat beek om lo ding hi. Kumpi gen loh mi lian pen le mi thupi pen khat beek in, a aisan theite, a mitphial siamte le a khongkhai theite tungah tua bang thu a dong ngei kuamah om nai lo hi." 
Daniel2:11 Kumpipaʼ thudotna pen haksa lua mahmah ahih manin, mihing ahi lo pasian-te longal a gen thei ding kuamah om lo hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel2:12 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a, Babylon sunga kumpiʼ thudot mipilte khempeuh thah lup khit dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel2:13 Tua ahih ciangin mipilte khempeuh thah lup khitna ding thu kipia a, tua thah lup dingte sungah Daniel le a lawmte zong a kihel uh ahi hi." 
Daniel2:14 Tua ciangin Daniel zong Babylon gam sunga mipil teng a that lum dingin a kisawl kumpi cing a ukpa Ariok kiangah kampau kidawm takin a va pai hi. 
Daniel2:15 Amah in Ariok kiangah, “Bang dingin kumpipa in hih zahtakin thukhauh suaksak ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Ariok in a thupiang khempeuh a gen hi." 
Daniel2:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah Daniel pai a, a mangmat a khiatna a hilh theih nadingin hun tawmvei sung a kingak lai nadingin phalna a ngen hi." 
Daniel2:17 Tua ciangin Daniel a inn ah ciah a, a thupiang teng khempeuh a lawmte Hananiah, Mishael le Azariah-te kiangah a ko hi." 
Daniel2:18 Amah in, vantung Pasian in eite hong hehpihin, tua thuthukpi gen khia thei-in, Babylon gam sunga mipil dangte tawh thahna i thuak khawm loh nadingin thu i ngen ding hi, ci-in a gen hi." 
Daniel2:19 Tua ciangin tua zan sungin maangmuhna tawh tua thuthukpi Danielʼ tungah kihilh a, amah in vantung Pasianʼ min a phat hi." 
Daniel2:20 “Pasianʼ min kiphat tawntung tahen; amah pilin a vanglian hi. 
Daniel2:21 Amah in hun le khuahunte kheel a, kumpite koihin lah a la khia hi. Amah in mite tungah pilna le theihna a pia hi." 
Daniel2:22 Amah in thuthukpite le thusimte a lak khia hi. Amah in khuamial sunga kiseelte thei a, khuavak in amah a umcih hi." 
Daniel2:23 Nang pen ka pu ka pateʼ Pasian na hi a, kong phat a, ka hong zahtak hi. Nangmah in pilna le thahatna na hong pia zo hi. Ka thungetna nong za a, kumpipa kiang a ka gen ding thu nong lak zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:24 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Babylon mipilte a that dingin a sawl pa Ariok kiangah Daniel pai a, “Babylon gam sunga mipilte that kei in. Kumpipa kiangah hong paipih in; tu-in a mangmat a khiatna ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:25 Tua ciangin Ariok in thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel paipih pah a, “Kumpipa aw, na mangmat a khiatna a hong gen thei ding Jew mi salte khat ka va mu hi,” ci-in a gen hi." 
Daniel2:26 Kumpipa in Belteshazzar a kici Daniel kiangah, “Ka mangmat bang hi a, a khiatna bang hiam cih hong gen thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel2:27 Daniel in, “Kumpipa aw, tua na theihnop thu a hong gen thei ding khongkhai thei, mitphial siam, aisan siam kuamah om lo hi." 
Daniel2:28 Ahih hangin thusim a lak thei vantungah Pasian khat a om hi. Amah in mai lamah bang thu hong piang ding cih nangmah Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa tungah a hong hilh zo hi. 
Daniel2:29 Kumpipa na ihmut laitakin mailam a hong piang ding mang khat na man a, thuthukpi a lak khia Pasian in a piang ding thu a hong lak khol zo hi." 
Daniel2:30 Tu-in midangte sangin ka pil zawk manin kei tungah tua thu a hong kilak hi loin, Kumpipa in na mangmat a khiatna le na ngaihsut thu na theih nadingin a hong kilak ahi zaw hi." 
Daniel2:31 “Kumpipa aw, na mangin a tee daldal milim lian mahmah khat na mu a, kihtakhuai mahmah in na mai ah a ding hi." 
Daniel2:32 Tua milim lutang pen kham hoih mahmah tawh a kibawl ahi hi. A awm le a bante ngun tawh kibawl a, a gil le a pheite sumngo tawh kibawl hi." 
Daniel2:33 A khete sik tawh kibawl a, a khepekte khen khat sik, khen khat tungman kigawm ahi hi." 
Daniel2:34 Tua banga na et laitakin mual tung panin suangtumpi khat kuama khuk lohin hong tuk a, sik le tungman kigawm milim khete deng tanin a kithehthang hi." 
Daniel2:35 Thakhatin sik, tungman, sumngo, ngun le khamte kitam nen gawp a, khuakhal lai-a ansi zap bangin a leeng mang hi. Huih in leen mang khin ahih manin themkha beek a kimu nawn kei hi. Ahih hangin tua suangtum hong khangkhang a, mual cia hong pha-in leitung khempeuh a dim hi." 
Daniel2:36 “Na mangmat pen tu-a teng ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna kong gen ding hi. 
Daniel2:37 Kumpipa aw, kumpi khempeuh lak pan nang a lian pen na hi hi. Vantung Pasian in kumpi-in nang hong koih a, vangliatna, thahatna le zahtakna a hong pia hi." 
Daniel2:38 Amah in miʼ teenna leitung teng, ganhing teng le vasate a uk dingin nang a hong koih hi. Tua kham lutang pen nangmah na hi hi." 
Daniel2:39 Nangʼ khit ciangin nangʼ kumpi gam sangin a neu zaw kumpi gam a dang khat hong piang dinga, tua khit ciangin sumngo ahi kumpi gam a thumna in leitung khempeuh uk ding hi." 
Daniel2:40 Tua khit ciangin kumpi gam lina hong piang dinga, sik bangin a khauh ding hi. Sik in na khempeuh sat nenin a gawivui bangin, a masa kumpi gam teng khempeuh a sukham ding hi." 
Daniel2:41 A khepek le a khemete khen khat sik le khen khat tungman kigawm ahi na mu hi. Tua pen kumpi gam kikhenthang ding hi, cihna ahi hi. Tungman le sik kigawm ahih mah bangin sik bangin a hoih khop khat ciang khauhna a nei ding hi." 
Daniel2:42 A khemete khen khat sik hi a, a khen khat tungman ahih mah bangin kumpi gam khen khat thahatin khen khat a thahat kei ding hi." 
Daniel2:43 Sik le tungman kigawm na muh mah bangin tua kumpi gam ukte in kigawm ding hanciamin zileta in a kimat ding uh hi. Ahih hangin sik le tungman a kimat theih loh mah bangin a kigawm thei kei ding uh hi. 
Daniel2:44 Tua kumpite a maan laitakun vantung Pasian in a bei thei ngei lo ding kumpi gam a hong phut ding hi. Tua kumpi gam kuamah in zo zo lo dinga, tua gam in gamdang khempeuhte zo gawpin a kip tawntung ding hi." 
Daniel2:45 Kuama lawn lohpi-in mual tung pan hong tuk suk suangtum in sik, sumngo, tungman, ngun le kham tawh kibawl milim a den paih na mu hi. A lian Pasian in mai lamah bang hong piang ding cih Kumpipa tungah a hong hilh ahi hi. Na mangmat pen ahi bang teekteekin kong gen a, a khiatna zong a man bangin kong gen zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:46 Tua ciangin kumpi Nebukhadnezzar zong Danielʼ mai leilak ah kun sukin, Daniel tungah sagawh biakna le a namtui biakpiakna bawl dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel2:47 Kumpipa in, “Hih thuthukpi hong gen thei na hih manin na Pasian pen thuthuk a lak, pasian khempeuh sung pan a lian pen, kumpiteʼ tunga Topa ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel2:48 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Daniel letsong hoih tampi pia a, a za liansak a, Babylon gam teng uksakin, Babylon mipil thudotte a ukpipa dingin a koih hi." 
Daniel2:49 Kumpipa in Danielʼ ngetna mah bangin Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te Babylon gam khen tuamtuamte a uk dingin koih a, Daniel pen kumpi inn sungah a omsak hi." 
Daniel3:1 Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar in a tun pi sawm kua a sang, a vailam pi kua a gol kham milim golpi khat bawlsak a, Babylon gam sung Dura zanglei ah a koih hi." 
Daniel3:2 Kumpipa in a mi lian khempeuh, kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte, mangpite, sumkem mangte, thukhen mangte, khuapi uk mangte le mi lian dangte khempeuh, kumpipaʼ milim bawl apna ah a paikim ciat dingin sapna thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:3 Tua ahih ciangin tua mang liante khempeuh milim ap nadingin milim mai ah a ding uh hi. 
Daniel3:4 Tua ciangin nakpi takin taangkona khat kibawl a, “Minam tuamtuamte le pau nam tuamtuamte khempeuh aw!" 
Daniel3:5 Peengkul ging na za ding uh a, tua khit ciangin tamngaite, laiza lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsemte le tum theih a tuamtuamte a hong kitum ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzarʼ koih kham milim mai ah kunin na bia ding uh hi." 
Daniel3:6 A kun lo, a bia lo peuhmah thakhat thu-in mei phualpi sungah kikhul pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:7 Tua mah bangin minamkimte, minam tuamtuamte le pau nam tuamtuamte khempeuh in tum theih gingte a zak phetun kun sukin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzarʼ kham milim koih a bia uh hi." 
Daniel3:8 Tua ciangin Babylon mite pawl khat pai-in Jew mite a hek sim uh hi. 
Daniel3:9 Amaute in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzarʼ kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, na khansau hen!" 
Daniel3:10 Kumpipa in, tum theihte a hong kitum khit phetin mi khempeuh kham milim mai ah kunin bia ding uh hi, ci-in thu na pia khinzo hi." 
Daniel3:11 Tua milim mai ah kun loin, a bia lo khempeuh mei phualpi sungah a kikhul ding ahi hi." 
Daniel3:12 Babylon gam a khen liante a uk dingin na koih Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego a kici Jew mi pawl khat a om uh hi. Amaute in kumpipaʼ thupiakna a mang kei uh hi. Amaute in na pasian bia nuam loin, na milim koih mai ah a kun nuam kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel3:13 Tua thu hangin kumpipa heh mahmah a, tua mi thumte ama mai ah a kipaipihna ding thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:14 Amah in, “Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te aw, ka pasian bia nuam loin, ka kham milim koih mai ah kun nuam lo na hi uh hiam?" 
Daniel3:15 Tua ahih ciangin tu-in peengkulte, tamngaite, laiza lasakna gingte, harp lasakna gingte, gawsem le tum theih dang a gingte na zak khit phet uh ciangin kunin milim na bia ding uh hi. Na biak kei uh leh thakhatin mei phualpi sungah hong kikhul ding ahih ciangin a hong hon khia zo ding pasian omin um na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:16 Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te in Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar kiangah, “Kumpipa aw, hih thu kong dawng kei ding uh hi." 
Daniel3:17 Mei phualpi sung panin a hong hon khia thei pasian a om leh ka biak Pasian uh hi dinga, na khut sung panin a hong hon khia ding hi." 
Daniel3:18 Kumpipa aw, a hong hotkhiat kei zenzen leh zong, na pasian lah ka bia tuan kei ding uh a, na kham milim mai ah zong ka kun kei ding uh hi, ci-in thei ta in,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel3:19 Tua ciangin Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar pen Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te tungah heh mahmah ahih manin a mai a san pempam hi. A sat ngeina zah sangin a zah sagih vei a sa zaw mei phualpi a cih dingin a mite thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:20 Tua ciangin Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te a hencip ding le mei phualpi sungah a khul dingin galkap thahat khempeuh thu a pia hi." 
Daniel3:21 Tua ciangin amaute puanak le puan tualpi silh sa le lukhu khusa-in hencip uh a, mei phualpi sungah a khul uh hi." 
Daniel3:22 Bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipaʼ thupiakna kinawh lua mahmah a, mei phualpi lah sa lua mahmah ahih manin a khulte nangawn meikuang in hul lum hi." 
Daniel3:23 Tua ahih ciangin Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te hencip sa-in meikuangpi laizang ah a kia suk uh hi." 
Daniel3:24 Tua ciangin Nebukhadnezzar in lamdang sa mahmah in a ding vat hi. Amah in a thudotte kiangah, “Mihing thum hencip sa-in mei phualpi sungah khul hi lo ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Amaute in, “Hi mah hi, Kumpipa aw,” ci-in a dawngkik uh hi." 
Daniel3:25 “Tua ahihleh bang hangin meikuang sungah mihing li a kawi paipai mu ka hi hiam? Amaute lah kihencip lo a, liam zong liam tuak beek lo uh hi. A lina pen pa hoh pasian-te khat tawh a kibang hi,” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel3:26 Tua ahih ciangin Nebukhadnezzar zong mei phualpi kong gei ah pai to a, “Shadrak! Meshak! Abednego! A lianpen Pasianʼ nasemte hong paikhia un,” ci-in a sam hi. Tua ciangin amaute zong thakhatin a hong paikhia pah uh hi." 
Daniel3:27 Kumpi tapate, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte le kumpipaʼ thudotte khempeuh kikhawm uh a, mei in a kat loh mite a en uh hi. A sam uh zang khat beek mei in kaanghul lo a, a puan uh zong kaang loin meikhu gim zong a nam beek kei uh hi." 
Daniel3:28 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-teʼ Pasian phat un. Amah in a vantung mite sawl a, amah a muang ama nasem hih mite a hon khia hi. Amaute in ka thupiakna mang loin, amauʼ Pasian longal pasian dangʼ mai ah kun nuam lo, bia nuam lo uh ahih manin mei phualpi sungah khul ding a ut zaw uh ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:29 “Tu-in minamkimte, minam tuamtuamte, pau nam tuamtuamte, mi khat peuhpeuh in Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-teʼ Pasian gensiatna kampau a om leh kibalnen gawp dinga, a inn uh kisuksiatsak ding hi, ci-in thukham ka bawl hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih bangin a hon thei pasian dang om peuhmah lo hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel3:30 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Shadrak, Meshak le Abednego-te Babylon gam khen liante ah a gol zaw ukna za a pia hi." 
Daniel4:1 Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in leitung a om minamkimte, minam tuamtuamte, pau nam tuamtuamte khempeuh tungah a nuai-a thute hih bangin a khak hi: “Note tungah nopna om tahen!" 
Daniel4:2 A Lianpen Pasian in kei tungah lim le nalamdang a hong lahna thute kong gen nuam hi. 
Daniel4:3 “Pasianʼ hong lah nalamdangte, bangzahin lian ahi hiam? A bawl nalamdangte, bangzahin vanglian ahi hiam? A tawntungin Pasian kumpi hi dinga, amah in a tawntungin a uk paisuak ding hi." 
Daniel4:4 “Keimah Nebukhadnezzar lungnuam takin kumpi inn ah ka teeng a, nuamsa mahmah in ka om hi." 
Daniel4:5 Ahih hangin ka ihmut laitakin a lauhuai mang khat ka man a, a dipkuathuai maang ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:6 Ka mangmat a khiatna a hong hilh dingin Babylon gam kumpi thudotte khempeuh a hong pai nadingun thu ka pia hi. 
Daniel4:7 Tua ciangin aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai theite, aksi et siamte khempeuh hong pai uh a, amaute kiangah ka mang ka gen hi. Ahih hangin a khiatna a hong gen thei kei uh hi." 
Daniel4:8 Tua ciangin Daniel (a min ding Belteshazzar, ka pasianʼ min tamin a kiphuak pa) a hong pai hi. Pasianʼ kha ama sungah om ahih ciangin ama kiangah ka mangmat ka gen hi." 
Daniel4:9 Ama kiangah, aisan theite lak a a lian pen Belteshazzar aw, Pasianʼ kha na sungah om ahih manin thuthuk khempeuh na theihtheih lam ka thei hi. Hih ka mang a khiatna hong gen in, ka ci hi." 
Daniel4:10 “Ka ihmut laitakin maangmuhna khat ka nei a, leitung laizang ah a po singkung sang mahmah khat ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:11 Tua singkung pen khangkhangin gol semsem a, vantung dong ban to ahih ciangin leitung mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi." 
Daniel4:12 A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup khamkhop ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate in a liim beel uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu bawl uh a, a nungta thei khempeuh in a gah a ne uh hi." 
Daniel4:13 “Ka maangmuhna ngaihsunin ka om laitakin ka khuadak leh a vil, a patau vantungmi khat vantung pan a hong tuak suk ka mu hi." 
Daniel4:14 Amah nakpi-in kiko-in, ‘A singkung phuk inla, a hiang teng sattan in. A teh teng heuh siang inla, a gah teeng thehthang in. A nuai-a ganhing teng le a hiang tunga vasa teng hawl khia in." 
Daniel4:15 Ahih hangin a bul le lei sung a a zungte nusia in. Sik le sumngo kual tawh vial inla, gamlak lopate tawh nusia khawm in. Hih mipa tungah daitui kai henla, ganhingte le lopate tawh om khawm hen." 
Daniel4:16 Amah in mihing lungsim nei nawn loin, kum sagih sung ganhing lungsim a nei ding hi." 
Daniel4:17 Hih pen a vil, a patau vantungmiʼ thukhenna ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin mun khempeuh ah a om mi khempeuhte in, a Lian Pasian in miteʼ kumpi gamah vai a hawm hi, cih a thei ding uh hi. Amah in a teel peuhpeuh a neu pente nangawn kumpi a suaksak thei ding hi,’ a ci hi." 
Daniel4:18 “Belteshazzar aw, keimah Nebukhadnezzar Kumpipa in ka mangmat pen hih bang ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna hong gen in. Ka thudot mite khat beek a khiatna a hong gen thei a om kei uh hi. Ahi zongin nangʼ sungah Pasianʼ kha om ahih manin na hong gen thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:19 Tua ciangin Belteshazzar zong a kici Daniel lungmang lua ahih manin tawmvei sung bangmah gen thei loin a om hi. Kumpipa in, Belteshazzar aw, mang le a khiatna huhau-in na lung mangsak zenzen kei in, a ci hi. Belteshazzar in, Kumpipa aw, nang mangmat le a khiatna pen na galte tungah tung zaw hen, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:20 Singkung sang mahmah na muh pen hong khangkhang a, khauh mahmah a, vantung dong ban to a, leitungah a teeng mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi." 
Daniel4:21 A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup a vak zo ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate, a nuai ah tawlnga uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu a bawl uh hi." 
Daniel4:22 Kumpipa aw, nang pen tua singkung na hi hi. Nang na lian a, na thahat hi. Nakpi takin khangin lian mahmah na hih manin vantung dong na ban to a, leitung khempeuh ah na vangliatna kizel hi." 
Daniel4:23 Kumpipa in na et laitakin, vantungmi khat vantung panin hong pai suk a, “A singkung phuk inla susia in; ahih hangin lei sungah a bul le a zungte nusia in. A bulah sik le sumngo kual vial inla, gamlak lopate tawh nusia khawm in. A tungah daitui kia henla, kum sagih sung ganhingte tawh om khawm tahen,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:24 Kumpipa aw, a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi. A Lian Pasian in nang tungah a hong tung ding a thukhennasa a hong lak ahi hi." 
Daniel4:25 Mite sung panin hong kihawl khia dinga, gamsate tawh na teeng khawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin lopa na ne dinga, a pua lamah lumin, kum sagih sung na tungah daitui a hong kia ding hi. Tua ciangin a Lian Pasian in mihingteʼ kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi." 
Daniel4:26 Vantungmi in singbul le a zungte lei sungah nusiat dingin thu a pia hi. Tua pen, Pasian in leitung khempeuh uk hi, cih na theih ciangin kumpi na suakkik ding hi, a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Daniel4:27 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw, kong thuhilhna hong mang in. Mawhna bawl nawn kei inla, diktakin gamta in. Mizawngte hehpih leteh, tua in a sia-a na gamtatna sate hong puahsak dinga, na nuamsa toto ding hi, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:28 Hih thu teng khempeuh kumpi Nebukhadnezzarʼ tungah hong tung hi. 
Daniel4:29 Tua zawh kha sawm le nih khit ciangin kumpipa zong Babylon khua kumpi inn khumzang huan sungah vak a," 
Daniel4:30 Babylon khua bangzah takin lian ahi hiam? Kumpi khuapi ding le, ka vangliatna ka thahatna a kilat nadingin ka lam ahi hi, a ci hi." 
Daniel4:31 Tua thute a kam sung pan a pusuah ma-in vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar aw, ka thugen na ngai in. Na kumpi gam hong kilak khiatsak zo hi." 
Daniel4:32 Mite lak pan hong kihawl khia dinga, gamsate tawh na teeng khawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin kum sagih sung lopa na ne ding hi. Tua ciangin, Pasian in mihingteʼ kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi a suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel4:33 Tua hun lianin Nebukhadnezzarʼ tungah tua thukhenna a hong tung hi. Mite lak panin Nebukhadnezzar kihawl khia a, bawngtal bangin lopa a ne takpi hi. A pumpi tungah daitui kia a, a pumpi tunga a multe keel mul bangin sau a, a khutcinte muvanlai khecin bangin a hong sau hi." 
Daniel4:34 Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “A kiseh sa hun a cin ciangin keimah Nebukhadnezzar in vantung lam ka en to a, khua ka phawkkik hi. A nungta tawntung a Lianpen Pasianʼ min phatin, zahtakna le minthanna ka pia hi. “Amah in a tawntungin uk dinga, ama gam kip tawntung ding hi." 
Daniel4:35 Amah in leitung mite bangmahin a sim kei a, vantung mite le leitung mite ama khutnuai ahi hi. Ama deihna kuamah in nial thei lo a, a bawlnate kuamah in a hang a kan thei kei hi." 
Daniel4:36 “Ka khuatheihna a hong tunkik ciangin ka kumpi za, ka minthanna le ka gam minthannate a hong kipiakik hi. Ka mi liante le ka thudot mite in hong muak uh a, nidang sangin a lian zaw minthanna le ka kumpi za a hong kipiakik hi." 
Daniel4:37 Tu-in keimah Nebukhadnezzar in Vantung Kumpipa phatin, zahtakin a min ka thangsak hi. Ama bawlna khempeuh a man hi. Amah a tawntungin thuman a, a kiphasakin a gamtate a neusak hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:1 Kumpi a suah ciangin Belshazzar in pawi lianpi khat bawl a, a mi liante tul khat samin amaute tawh zu a ne uh hi." 
Daniel5:2 Zu a nek laitakun, Belshazzar in a pa Nebukhadnezzar in Jerusalem biakinnpi panin a puakkhiat ngun hai, kham hai le kuangte a va la dingin thu a pia hi. Kumpipa in a mi liante le a zite le a zineute in tua haite tawh zu a nek theih nadingun hai la dingin thu a pia hi." 
Daniel5:3 Thakhatin kham haite, kuangte hong paipih uh a, a vekpi-un tua haite tawh zu a ne uh hi." 
Daniel5:4 Amaute in zu ne uh a, kham tawh, ngun tawh, sumngo tawh, sik tawh, sing tawh, suang tawh a kibawl pasian-te a phat uh hi." 
Daniel5:5 Thakhat thu-in kumpi inn sung meivak a taan penna lam kawm tungah mihing khut khat hong kilangin lai a hong gelh hi. Tua khut in lai a gelh laitak kumpipa in a mu hi. 
Daniel5:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa lau lua mahmah a, a mai daang gawpin a khut a liing kauhkauh hi." 
Daniel5:7 Amah in mitphial siamte, aisan siamte, aksi et siamte va sam pak un, ci-in a kiko hi. Tua mite a hong tun uh ciangin kumpipa in, “Hih lai kigelh a sim thei, a khiatna a hong gen thei peuhmah kumpi puanpi silhsakin, minphatna khamkhi a ngawng ah ka oksak dinga, kumpi gam sungah a za lian a thumna-in ka koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:8 Kumpipaʼ thudot mite hong tung uh a, ahih hangin tua lai a sim thei le kumpipa tungah a khiatna a gen thei kuamah a om kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:9 Tua tak ciangin kumpi Belshazzar lungkham mahmah in a mel daang semsem a, a mi liante in a cih nading mel a thei kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:10 Kumpipa le a mi liante gamlum ngeingai-in a om laitakun, pawi inn sungah kumpinu hong lut a, “Kumpipa aw, sau veipi nungta in. Bang hangin lungkham lua-in na mai daangsak zenzen na hi hiam?" 
Daniel5:11 Na gam sungah Pasianʼ kha a nei mi khat a om hi. Na pa kumpi ahih laitakin, tua mipa in pasian-teʼ pilna tawh a kibang pilna, theihna le lungsim navakna a nei hi. Tua hi a, kumpi ahi na pa Nebukhadnezzar in tua pa pen aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai siamte le aksi et siamteʼ ukpi dingin a koih hi." 
Daniel5:12 Amah in a kan zaw siamna nei a, mangkhiat siamna, thudotna haksa nonote dawn theihna le thuthukpite gen tel theihna a nei hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in Beteshazzar ci-in a min a phuah Daniel samsak in. Tua hileh amah in a hong gen thei pah ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:13 Tua ciangin thakhatin kumpipa kiangah Daniel a paipih uh hi. Kumpipa in, “Nang Daniel pen kumpi ahi ka pa in Judah gam panin a hong lakkhiat Jew mi salte khat hi lo na hi hiam?" 
Daniel5:14 Nangma sungah Pasianʼ kha om ahih manin siamna nei-in, lungpilna le theihna na neih lam ka thei hi." 
Daniel5:15 Ka thudot mite le mitphial siamte, hih lai kigelh a sim ding le a khiatna a gen dingin a hong pai uh hi napi, a khiatna a thei zo kei uh hi." 
Daniel5:16 Ahih hangin nangmah in thuthukpi le kuama theih zawh loh thute gen thei hi, ci-in kong za zo hi. Hih lai kigelh sim thei-in a khiatna nong gen theih leh kumpi puansan kong silhsak dinga, minphatna khamkhi na ngawng ah hong oksakin, kumpi gam sungah a za lian thumna-in ka hong koih ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:17 Daniel in kumpipa kiangah, “Letsong pen kei hong pia kei inla, midang khatpeuh pia zaw in. Ahi zongin tua lai kigelh hong simsakin a khiatna kumpipa kong hilh ding hi." 
Daniel5:18 A Lianpen Pasian in na pa Nebukhadnezzar kumpi lianin koih a, zahtakna le vangliatna a pia hi." 
Daniel5:19 Amah lian lua mahmah ahih manin gam khempeuh, nam khempeuh, pau khempeuhte in kihta-in a liing uh hi. Mi khatpeuh a thah nop leh that a, a nuntaksak nop leh a nungtasak hi. A ut leh mi khatpeuh pahtawi-in, a ut leh a daisak thei hi." 
Daniel5:20 Ahih hangin amah a lung khauhin kiphasak a, gilo lua ahih manin a kumpi tokhom panin kila khia a, a minthanna a taan hi." 
Daniel5:21 Mihingte lak panin amah kihawl khia a, ganhing lungsim a nei hi. Gam sakolte tawh teeng khawmin, bawngtal bangin lopa ne a, daitui dal ding nei loin a pua lamah a lum hi. A tawpkhakna ah a Lianpen Pasian in mihingteʼ kumpi gamte uk a, a teel peuhpeuh kumpi suak hi, ci-in a phawk thei hi." 
Daniel5:22 “Ahih hangin a tapa ahi nangmah Belshazzar in hih thu khempeuh na theih hangin na kiniamkhiat tuan kei hi. 
Daniel5:23 Vantung Topaʼ langah na pang hi. A biakinnpi hai le kuangte la-in sabuai tungah nangmah tawh, na mi liante tawh a zineute le na zite uh tawh zu nekna-in na zang uh hi. Theihna a nei lo, a mu thei lo, khua a za thei lo ngun, kham, sumngo, sik, sing le suang tawh a kibawl pasian-teʼ min na phat uh hi. Na nuntakna le na hihna khempeuh a hong uk Pasian na zahtak kei hi." 
Daniel5:24 “Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in hih laimalte tua khut a hong gelhsak hi. 
Daniel5:25 Tua a kigelh laimal pen hih bang ahi hi: Mene, Mene, Tekel, Parsin." 
Daniel5:26 A khiatna zong hih bang ahi hi: Mene pen kisim a cihna hi a, Pasian in na gam ukna hong simsak a, a beisak ta hi, cihna ahi hi." 
Daniel5:27 Tekel pen kitawikhai a cihna hi a, nang hong kitawikhai-in na lek zo kei hi, a cihna ahi hi." 
Daniel5:28 Parsin pen kikhen cihna hi a, na gam kikhen khamin Media le Persia-te a kipia zo hi, a cihna ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel5:29 Tua ciangin Belshazzar in Daniel pen kumpi puansan a silhsak dingin thu pia pah a, minphatna khamkhi a ngawng ah a oksak hi. A gam sungah a za lian thum nadingin a koih hi." 
Daniel5:30 Tua zan mahmah in Babylon kumpipa Belshazzar kithat a," 
Daniel5:31 Media mi Darias kumpi a suak hi. (Tua laitakin Darias kum sawm guk le kum nih a pha hi.) 
Daniel6:1 Darias in gam sung khempeuh a uk sawn dingin gam ukpi za le sawm nih dingin a ngaihsun hi. 
Daniel6:2 Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua gam ukpite tungah a vaihawmpi ding le kumpi deih bang a sem dingin Daniel le a dang mi nih a teel hi. 
Daniel6:3 Gam ukpi dangte le vaihawmpi dangte sangin Daniel nasep siam zaw diak se hi. Tua bangin siam zaw diak se ahih manin kumpipa in gam buppi ukin koih ding a ngaihsun hi. 
Daniel6:4 Tua ahih ciangin vaihawmpi dangte le gam ukpite in Danielʼ nasepna en cikin a mawhna zon ding a hanciam uh hi. Ahih hangin Daniel pen a thuman le a citak khat ahih manin a mawhna le a simtatna a mu zo kei uh hi. 
Daniel6:5 Tua banga nasep kizen lohna le a tatkhialhna a muh loh uh ciangin, “Hih Daniel pen a biakna tawh kisai-in thu i muh kei ngal leh mawhsak nading dang i mu kei ding hi,” ci-in a kikum uh hi." 
Daniel6:6 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah amaute pai uh a, “Darias kumpipa aw, sau veipi nungta in!" 
Daniel6:7 Ngattakin zuih ding thukham khat kumpipa in na bawl ding, gam sung nasem ko vaihawmpite, gam ukpite, gam ukpi huhte le kumpipaʼ thudot mite khempeuh ka thukim uh hi. Tu zawh ni sawm thum sungin nang kumpipa kiang longal, pasian kiang ahi a, midang khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin thungen om thei lo ding hi, ci-in na kham ding hi. Hih na thupiakna a mang lo peuhmah humpinelkai kikhumna sungah kikhia ding hi." 
Daniel6:8 Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw, thupiakna lai hawm khia-in a tungah na min gelh in. Tua hileh Media-te le Persia-te upadi pen kikheel thei lo dinga, ngattakin a kizuih kul ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:9 Tua mah bangin kumpi Darias in a min gelhin thupiakna lai a hawm khia hi. 
Daniel6:10 Tua bang thupiakna lai kihawm khia khinzo ta hi, ci-in Daniel in a theih ciangin a inn ah a ciah hi. A inn dawl tungnung ah Jerusalem lam a nga tawlet thum a om hi. Tua laitak ah tawlet hon sa-in a hih ngei bangin khukdinin ni khatin thum vei ta Pasian kiangah thu a ngen hi." 
Daniel6:11 Tua ciangin amah a encik mite in Daniel in Pasian kiangah thu a nget a mu uh hi. 
Daniel6:12 Amaute khempeuh kumpipa kiangah Daniel a heek dingin a pai uh hi. Amaute in, “Kumpipa aw, tu zawh ni sawm thum sungin kumpipa kiang longal, pasian kiang ahi a, mi khat peuhpeuh kiangah ahi zongin thungen a om leh humpinelkai kikhumna sungah kikhia ding hi, ci-in thupiakna lai hawm khia-in na min gelh hi lo na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Hi mah hi; Media-te le Persia-teʼ upadi bangin a kikheel thei lo ding a ngat thupiakna ka bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:13 Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah, “Judah gam panin a hong pai Jew mi salte khat ahi Daniel in kumpipa hong zahtak lo a, na thupiakna a mang nuam kei hi. Nisimin thum vei ta thu a ngen tawntung hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:14 Kumpipa in hih thu a zak ciangin lungmang a, Daniel a suahtak theih nading lampi hanciamin ni tum dong a ngaihsun hi." 
Daniel6:15 Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah tua mite hong paikik uh a, “Kumpipa aw, Media le Persia-teʼ upadi bangin kumpipa in a hawmkhiat sa thupiakna kikhelkik thei lo hi, cih na thei hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Daniel6:16 Tua ciangin kumpipa in humpinelkai kikhumna sungah Daniel a khiat dingun thu a pia hi. Amah in Daniel kiangah, “Thuman takin na biak tawntung na Pasian in hong hon khia tahen,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin humpinelkai kikhumna sungah Daniel a khia uh hi." 
Daniel6:17 Amaute in suangtum khat la uh a, humpinelkai kikhumna gong a hu uh hi. Kuamah in Daniel a hotkhiat theih loh nadingin kumpipa in ama ciaptehna le a mi lianteʼ ciaptehna tawh a ciamteh hi." 
Daniel6:18 Kumpipa a inn ah ciahkik a, tua zan tawntung an ngawlin gualnopna zong a bawl kei hi. Tua zanin a ihmu thei peuhmah kei hi." 
Daniel6:19 Zingsang khuavak tung phetin kumpipa tho-in humpinelkai kikhumna ah a va pai pah hi. 
Daniel6:20 Humpinelkai kikhumna a tun dektak laitakin aw liingkawmin, “Daniel, a nungta Pasianʼ nasem pa! Thuman takin na biak tawntung na Pasian in humpinelkai kam sung panin a hong hon khia thei hiam,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Daniel6:21 Daniel in, “Kumpipa aw, sau veipi nungta in." 
Daniel6:22 Pasian in a vantungmi hong sawl a, ka liam loh nadingin humpi-nelkaiteʼ kam a humcipsak hi. Kumpipa aw, mawhna ka bawl loh lam leh, nang tungah zong khialhna ka bawl lohna amah in hong thei ahih manin tua bangin a hong bawl hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:23 Kumpipa lungdam mahmah a, humpinelkai kikhumna sung pan Daniel kaihkhiat dingin thu a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Daniel kai khiato uh a, liamna themcik zong a neih loh lam a mu uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Pasian muang hi." 
Daniel6:24 Tua ciangin kumpipa in Daniel a hek teng khempeuh a zi a ta ciat uh tawh humpinelkai kikhumna sungah khiat dingin thu a pia hi. Amaute humpinelkai kikhumna taw a tun ma-un humpi-nelkaite in bak khat suahin a guh a tangin a balzan gawp uh hi. 
Daniel6:25 Tua ciangin Kumpi Darias in leitung a om minamkimte, minam tuamtuamte le pau nam tuamtuamte khempeuh tungah hih bangin lai a khak hi: “Note tungah nopsakna thupha om tahen." 
Daniel6:26 Ka gam sunga om mi khempeuh in Danielʼ Pasian kihta-in a zahtak nadingun thu ka pia hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a nungta Pasian hi a, a tawntungin a uk ding hi. Ama gam kisia ngei lo dinga, a vangliatna a bei ngei kei ding hi." 
Daniel6:27 Amah pen a hon khia pa le a suaktasak pa hi a, vantung le leitungah lim le nalamdangte a bawl hi. Humpi-nelkaiteʼ thahatna panin Daniel a suaktasak hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel6:28 Tua ahih manin Darias kumpi ahih laitak leh Persia mi Sairas kumpi ahih laitakin Daniel nuamsa-in a om hi. 
Daniel7:1 Belshazzar, Babylon kumpi a suah zawh a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in mang khat ka man a, zanin maang ka mu hi. Ka mangmat lai-in ka gelh a, tua zan a ka maangmuhnate ka ciaptehna hih bang ahi hi:" 
Daniel7:2 Mun khempeuh panin huihpi hong nungin tuipi tung a seem gawp hi. 
Daniel7:3 Tua ciangin tuipi sung panin a kibang lo sa golpi li hong pusuak to uh hi. 
Daniel7:4 A masa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, ahi zongin muvanlai kha tawh a kibang kha a nei hi. Ka et laitakin a kha tegel a hong kibot khia hi. Leitung panin tua ganhing kidom kaang to-in, mihing bangin a khe nihin kidingsak a, mihing lungsim ama tungah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:5 Tua ciangin a nihna sapi vompi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi. A nung lam khe tawh dingin a ha tawh nakguh thum pet a, “Na duh zahzah sa tampi ne in,” cihna aw khat a hong ging hi." 
Daniel7:6 Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzang ah vasa kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a, ukna aana ama tungah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:7 Ka et lai leh sapi lina ka mu hi. Tua sapi kihtakhuai mahmah a, lipkhaphuai-in a thupi mahmah hi. Amah in a gol mahmah sik-ha a nei hi. Amah in nene-in a nek val teng a khe tawh a tuancil gawp hi. Sapi dangte tawh kibang loin amah in ki sawm a nei hi." 
Daniel7:8 Tua kite ka et laitakin tuateʼ lakah a dang ki neu khat hong po a, a om sa sung pan ki thumte a bot khia hi. Tua kiʼ tungah mihing mittang tawh a kibang mittang le kam om a, kiphatsakna kam tampi a pau hi." 
Daniel7:9 Ka et laitakin kumpi tokhomte a hong kikoih hi. A nungta tawntung mipa tua tokhomte khat tungah a tu hi. A puante vuk bangin ngo a, a samte tuumul hoih tawh a kibang hi. A tokhom pen meikuang leengpei tungah kinga-in mei kuang zuazua a," 
Daniel7:10 tua sung panin meikuang a hong leeng khia niloh hi. Ama nasem ding mihing tul za tampi om a, a mai ah mihing tul za sawm tampi a ding uh hi. Thukhenna ding hun kipan a, laibute a kiphen hi." 
Daniel7:11 Ka et laitakin tua ki neu in kiphatsakna kamsia a pau ka za hi. Ka et lailai leh tua sapi lian a lina kithat a, a pumpi meikuang sungah kikhulin a kisusia hi." 
Daniel7:12 Sapi dangte ahihleh a vangliatna uh kilak khiatsak a, ahih hangin a nuntak lai nading uh hun ciangtan khat a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:13 Zan ka maangmuh hun sungin ka khuadak leh mihing tawh a kibang mi khat meii tungah a hong pai ka mu hi. A nungta tawntung mipa kiangah pai-in, ama kiangah a kipia hi." 
Daniel7:14 Amah in vangliatna, minthanna le kumpi za ngah ahih manin minamkimte, minam tuamtuamte, pau nam tuamtuamte khempeuh in ama na a sem ding uh ahi hi. Amah in a tawntungin uk dinga, a kumpi gam a bei ngei kei ding hi." 
Daniel7:15 Ka maangmuhnate in hong liing lawng sakin a hong patausak mahmah hi. 
Daniel7:16 Ka pam a ding mite khat kiangah pai-in hihte khempeuh a khiatna hong hilh in, ci-in ka thum hi. Tua ciangin amah in a khiatna a hong hilh hi." 
Daniel7:17 “Hih sapi lite pen leitung panin a hong khang khia ding kumpi gam li ahi hi. 
Daniel7:18 Ahih hangin a Lianpen Pasianʼ mite in kumpi za ngah ding uh a, a tawntungin a nei paisuak ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel7:19 Tua ciangin a dangte tawh a kibang lo a kihtakhuai sik-ha le sumngo khecin a nei sapi lina thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in nene-in na khempeuh tuancil gawp hi. 
Daniel7:20 Tua ciangin a lu tungah ki sawm le, a nung ciangin ki khat hong po a, a om sa kite sung pan ki thum a kitanna thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in mittang le kiphatsakna kamsia pauna ding kam a nei hi. A dangte sangin nakpi takin kihtakhuai zaw hi." 
Daniel7:21 Ka et laitakin, tua ki in Pasianʼ mite galin do a, amaute a zo gawp hi." 
Daniel7:22 Tua ciangin a nungta tawntung mipa hong pai a, a Lianpen Pasianʼ mite ading a hoih thukhenna a hong gen hi. Pasianʼ mite in kumpi za a ngah nading uh hun a hong tung hi." 
Daniel7:23 Hih bangin hilh telna kei a hong kipia hi: “Sapi lina pen leitung a hong om ding kumpi gam lina ding hi a, kumpi gamdangte tawh kilamdang mahmah ding hi. Amah in leitung buppi valh tum dinga, tuancil gawpin a sukham ding hi." 
Daniel7:24 “Ki sawmte pen tua kumpi gam sung panin a hong piang ding kumpi sawmte ahi uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat hong piang leuleu dinga, amah in a om sate tawh a kilamdang mahmah in kumpi thum a nuaisiah ding hi." 
Daniel7:25 “Amah in a Lianpen Pasian langpangin thu gen dinga, Pasianʼ mite a bawlsia ding hi. Amah in amauteʼ biakna tawh kipawl thukhamte le pawi bawlna hunte kheelsak ding hanciam dinga, ama khut sungah kum thum le alang sung Pasianʼ mite a om ding uh hi." 
Daniel7:26 “Tua ciangin thukhenna hun hong kipan dinga, ama vangliatna lak khiatsakin, amah a kisusia maimang ding hi." 
Daniel7:27 “Hih leitung kumpi gam, vangliatna le liatna khempeuh a Lianpen Pasianʼ mite tungah a kipia ding hi. Amauʼ kumpi za cikmah hunin bei ngei lo dinga, leitung ukna za a nei khempeuhte in a thu uh mangin amauteʼ na a sem ding uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel7:28 Hih tangthu a beina hi ta hi. Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciangin keimah Daniel ka lau mahmah a, ka mel a daang gawp hi. Ahih hangin hih thu keima lungsim sung bekah ka koih hi." 
Daniel8:1 Belshazzar kumpi a suah zawh a kum thumna kumin keimah Daniel in a nih veina maang ka mu hi. 
Daniel8:2 Ka maangmuhna ah thakhatin Elam gam sunga om Susa khuapi kulh sungah a omin ka kingaihsun a, Ulai gun gei ah ka ding hi." 
Daniel8:3 Ka khuadak toh leh gun gei ah tuutal khat adingin a om ka mu hi. Amah in a sau mahmah ki nih nei a, a ki po nunung pen a po masa sangin a sau zaw hi." 
Daniel8:4 Tua tuutal in a ki tawh nitumna lam, saklam le khanglam a si kawikawi ka mu hi. Ama ut bangin kiphasakin gamta ahih manin amah a kho zo ding le a thahatna pan a suakta zo ding ganhing khat beek a om kei hi." 
Daniel8:5 A bangci hi ding hiam, ci-in ngaihsun thei loin ka om laitakin nitumna lam panin keeltal khat a hong tai veva hi. Hat lua mahmah ahih manin a khe in lei a su kha kei hi. A mit tegel kikalah a tuampian ki lamdang khat a nei hi." 
Daniel8:6 Ki nih a nei gun gei-a a ding ka muh tuutal kiang a hong phak ciangin a thaneih zahin a si hi. 
Daniel8:7 Heh lua mahmah ahih manin tua tuutal lai gawp a, a ki tegel a suktansak hi. Tuutal in nang zo lo ahih manin lei kidenna a, a huh zo ding kuamah a om kei hi." 
Daniel8:8 Tua keeltal a thahatna hong khangto semsem a, ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a ki a kitan hi. Tua a ki pona munah a lamdang ki li hong po tokik a, mun tuamtuam a kawk hi." 
Daniel8:9 Tua ki lite lak pan khatʼ tungah ki neu dang khat hong po a, khanglam, nisuahna lam le Thuciamna Gam lamah a vangliatna a lak hi." 
Daniel8:10 Vantung galkapte nangawn a do zo zah dong dingin a thahatna hong khangto a, aksi pawl khatte leitungah lawn khia-in, a tuancil gawp hi." 
Daniel8:11 Amah in vantung galkap kumpipa nangawn do-in, ama tunga kipia tawntung biakpiaknate nangawn khawlsakin, biakinnpi biaknate a beisak hi." 
Daniel8:12 Nisim biakpiaknate ah mawhna dim a, biakna man pen leilak ah a kipaai khia hi. A sepna peuhpeuh ah tua ki thahat mahmah hi." 
Daniel8:13 Vantungmi khat in a dang vantungmi khat kiangah thu a dot ka za a, “Hih maangmuhna bang tanvei sawt dinga, a muhdahhuai mawhna in nisim biakpiakna bang tanvei khaktan ding ahi hiam? Vantung galkapte le biakinnpi bang tanvei kituancil ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Daniel8:14 Amah in, “Zingsang le nitak biakpiakna tul nih le za thum vei a cin khit ciangin biakinnpi kipuahkik ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Daniel8:15 Keimah Daniel in maangmuhna a khatna thei nuamin ka hanciam hi. Thakhat thu-in mihing mel tawh a kibang khat ka mai ah a hong ding hi. 
Daniel8:16 Ulai gun gal panin mihingʼ aw khat hong ging a, “Gabriel aw, a muh nate ama kiangah a khiatna hilh in,” a cihna ka za hi." 
Daniel8:17 Gabriel hong pai-in ka kiangah hong dinga, lau lua mahmah ka hih manin leitungah ka puk hi. Amah in, “Leitung mi aw, a khiatna thei in. Maangmuhna pen hun beina ding lahna ahi hi,” ci-in ka kiangah a hong gen hi." 
Daniel8:18 Amah in thu a hong gen laitakin sibupin leilak ah ka tuk hi. Ahih hangin amah in hong dom to-in a hong dingsak hi. 
Daniel8:19 Amah in, “Pasianʼ hehna hangin thupiang dingte kong lak ding hi. Na maangmuh pen hun beina ding lahna ahi hi." 
Daniel8:20 Na muh ki nih a nei tuutal pen Media le Persia gam kumpite a cihnopna ahi hi. 
Daniel8:21 Keeltal pen Grik kumpi gam hi a, a mit kikal a a po ki pen kumpi masa pen a cihnopna ahi hi." 
Daniel8:22 Ki po masa pen a kitan khit ciangin a nung a hong po ki lite pen tua gam panin kumpi gam li hong piang ding a cihnopna ahi hi. Ahih hangin tua gamte ahihleh a masa pen kumpi gam zahin a thahat kei ding uh hi. 
Daniel8:23 “Tua kumpi gamte a bei ding hun a nai ciangin gilo lua mahmah ding uh ahih manin gim a kipia ding hi. Tua ciangin ama thu bek thu a sa, mawhna pawlpawl tawh a kidim, zuauphuah hat kumpi khat a hong om ding hi." 
Daniel8:24 Amah thahat mahmah dinga, ahih hangin ama thahatna ahi kei ding hi. Amah in a dipkuathuai siatna piangsak dinga, ahihna khempeuh ah a thahat mahmah ding hi. Amah in mi thahatte le Pasianʼ mite a susia ding hi." 
Daniel8:25 A lungsim daplan lua ahih manin zuauphuah siamna tawh a hih khempeuh a tangtun ding hi. Amah kiliansak lua-in theih kholh lohin mi tampi susia-in, a lian pen kumpiteʼ kumpipa nangawn a langpan ding hi. Ahih hangin mihing thahatna kizang loin amah a kisusia ding hi." 
Daniel8:26 Hih zingsang le nitak biakpiakna maangmuhna thu a hong kihilh telna pen a man ahi hi. Tu-in hih maangmuhna thu a hong tun ding hun sawtpi hi lai ding ahih manin imcip phot in,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel8:27 Keimah Daniel, ni tawmvei sung tha zaw gawpin ka ci a na hi. Tua ciangin tho-in ka nasep ngei a semkik dingin kumpi inn ah ka pai hi. Ka maangmuhna thu thei zo lo ka hih manin cih nading mel thei loin daptakin ka om hi." 
Daniel9:1 Media mi ahi Ahasuerasʼ tapa Darias in Babylon gam teng a uk hi. 
Daniel9:2 Amah kumpi a suah a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in, Topa in kamsang Jeremiah tungah Jerusalem kum sawm sagih sung kisia ding hi, ci-in a genna thu ngaihsunin biakna laibute ka sim hi." 
Daniel9:2 Amah kumpi a suah a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in, Topa in kamsang Jeremiah tungah Jerusalem kum sawm sagih sung kisia ding hi, ci-in a genna thu ngaihsunin biakna laibute ka sim hi." 
Daniel9:3 An ngawlin, puanhampi silhin, vut lakah tu-in, Topaʼ kiangah deih takin thu ka ngen hi." 
Daniel9:4 Topa ka Pasianʼ kiangah thu ngenin ka miteʼ mawhna ka pulak hi. Keimah in, “Topa Pasian aw, nang na lian a, ka hong zahtak uh hi. Nang na thuman a, na thuciamna le na thupiakna a mangte le a hong itte a tawntungin na it hi." 
Daniel9:5 “Kote ka hih uh leh ka gilo uh a, mawh khinin ka khial khin uh hi. Na hong sawlna bang ka mang kei uh a, na thupiakna le na thukhamte ka taisan khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:6 Ka kumpite uh, ko hong ukte, ka pu ka pate uh le minam khempeuh tungah na min tawh thu a hong gen na nasem kamsangteʼ thu ka ngai kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:7 Topa, nang na hih leh na siangtho a, ahih hangin kote ka hih uh leh a zumhuai-in ka gamta uh hi. Judah gam le Jerusalem khua sunga teeng Israel mite khempeuh thuman lo uh ahih manin, a nai a gamla gam tuamtuam ah na thehthang zo hi." 
Daniel9:8 Ka kumpite uh, ko hong ukte le ka pu ka pate uh a zumhuai-in gamta uh a, a hong uk Topa nangma tungah hong khial khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:9 Nang pen hehpihna tawh kidimin mawhna na maisak a, ahih hangin kote in nang ka hong langpan uh hi." 
Daniel9:10 Topa Pasian aw, na nasem kamsangte tungtawnin koteʼ zuih ding thukhamte nong piak hangin, tua thu ka mang tuan kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:11 Israel-te khempeuh in na gen sa thute le na thukhamte khempeuh a palsat khinzo uh hi. Na tungah khialhna kong bawl manun, na nasem Mosesʼ thukham sunga kigelh bangin koteʼ tungah samsiatna a hong tung hi." 
Daniel9:12 Na gen sa bangin kote tung le ko hong ukte tungah na hong bawl zo hi. Leitung a om khuapi dang khatpeuh sangin Jerusalem khuapi a nasia zaw-in gim na pia hi. 
Daniel9:13 Mosesʼ thukham sunga kigen gimna khempeuh ka thuak uh hi. Topa Pasian aw, tu nangawnin zong nang kong lungdamsakna ding uh hanciam loin, na thuman ka zuih theih nadingun mawhna ka kisik kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:14 Topa Pasian aw, nangmah in kote gim a pia dingin nong kithawi a, na hong pia takpi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na hihna khempeuh a thuman hi a, kote in na thu ka hong mang kei uh hi." 
Daniel9:15 “Koteʼ Topa Pasian aw, na mihingte Egypt gam panin na hong la khia a, na vangliatna tu dongin kiphawk lai hi. Ka mawh khin uh a, ka khial khin uh hi." 
Daniel9:16 Nang na siangtho hi. Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem tungah hong heh nawn peuhmah kei in. Tua pen na khuapi hi a, na mual siangtho ahi hi. Kote le ka pate uh khialhna le gitlohna hangin, ka kiim ka pam uh a mite khempeuh in Jerusalem le na mite a hong simmawh uh hi."
