Daniel9:17 Pasian aw, kong thungetna le kong thumna hong za in. A kisia sa na biakinnpi hong puahkik in. Mi khempeuh in nangmah Pasian na hih lam a theihtheih nadingun hong puahkik in." 
Daniel9:18 Pasian aw, kong thungetnate uh hong ngai inla hong za in. Hong en inla, koteʼ siatna le na min a pua khuapi a siatna hong mu in. Koteʼ gamtatna pha a suang hi loin nangma migitna suangin thu ka hong ngen uh hi." 
Daniel9:19 Topa aw, kong thungetna uh hong za inla, ka mawhna uh hong maisak in. Topa aw, hong ngai inla hong sem in! Mi khempeuh in Pasian na hih lam a hong theih nadingun hong zekai kei in. Hih khuapi le hih mite na neihsa ahi hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel9:20 Keima mawhna le ka mipih Israel-teʼ mawhna pulakin, ka Topa Pasian kiangah a biakinn siangtho a hong puahkik nadingin thumin ka ngenngen hi." 
Daniel9:21 Thu ka nget laitakin ka maangmuh masak sunga ka muh mipa Gabriel, ka omna munah a hong leeng suk hi. Tua hun pen nitak lam biakpiak hun laitak ahi hi." 
Daniel9:22 Amah in, “Daniel aw, hilhkholhna thu a theisak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi." 
Daniel9:23 Pasian tungah thum dingin na kisak laitakin amah in a hong za zo hi. Pasian in nang hong it ahih manin, tua thu a gen dingin ka hong pai hi. Tu-in, tua maangmuhna thu ka hong hilh tel laitakin ciamteh in." 
Daniel9:24 “Na mite le khuapi siangtho, a mawhna le a gamtat khialhnate a beina ding hun kum sawm sagih mun sagih sung a kiseh zo hi. Tua ciangin mawhna kimaisak dinga, a tawntung thutang thu a hong tung ding hi. Gen kholhna le maangmuhna thu a mantakin hong tangtung dinga, a Siangtho Pen Mun biakinnpi kisiansuah ding hi." 
Daniel9:25 Hih thu ciamteh inla thei in: Jerusalem lamkikna ding thu a kipiak hun a kipan sathau kinilh pa hong pai dong kum sagih mun sagih sung hi ding hi. Jerusalem kongzing lampi nei le kulhpi nei-in kilamkik dinga, kum sawm guk le nih mun sagih sung kip dinga, ahih hangin buai hunsung ahi ding hi." 
Daniel9:26 Tua hun a bei khit ciangin sathau kinilh pa thuman lopi-in a kithat ding hi. Galsim dingin a hong pai galkap maang lianpa in khuapi le biakinnpi a susia ding hi. A beina pen tuiciin tun bang hi dinga, a tawp dongin galdona le kisiatna vive ahi dingin Pasian in thu a khen zo hi." 
Daniel9:27 Tua makai pa in mi tampite tawh kum sagih sung thuciamna kip bawl ding uh hi. Gan gawh biakna le biakpiakna, hih hun lang sung a khawlsak ding hi. Biakinn dawn sang pen munah a Lipkhaphuai na kikoih ding hi; ahi zongin Pasian in tua a koihpaʼ thuak dingin a geel sa thu a koihpa in a thuak hun ciang dong, a Lipkhaphuai na pen a koihna mun mahah om lai phot ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Daniel10:1 Sairas, Persia gam kumpi a suah zawh kum thum a phak laitakin Beteshazzar zong a kici Daniel tungah thu khat a kipia hi. Tua thu pen theih tel hak mahmah ahih manin maangmuhna tawh teltakin a kilak hi." 
Daniel10:2 Tua hun laitakin keimah Daniel, nipikal thum sung khakunin dahin ka om hi." 
Daniel10:3 Zu le sa ahi a, an lim ahi zongin bangmah ka ne kei a, nipikal thum a bei mateng ka sam zong ka hiat kei hi." 
Daniel10:4 Tua kum a kha masa, ni sawm nih le li ni-in Tigris gunpi gei ah ka ding hi." 
Daniel10:5 Ka nung lam ka et toh leh puan pak silhin kham kawnggak tawh a kawng a gak mi khat ka mu hi. 
Daniel10:6 A pumpi, suangmanpha tawh kibangin a taang hi. A maitang, khuaphialep bangin taang a, a mittangte mei bangin a kuang zalzal hi. A ban le a khete sumngo zut siang bangin tee daldal hi. A aw, mihonpi kiko tawh kibangin a ging zuazua hi." 
Daniel10:7 Tua maangmuhna keimah bek in ka mu hi. Ka gei-a om midangte in bangmah a mu kei uh hi. Amaute lau uh ahih manin tai mangin a bu uh hi. 
Daniel10:8 Kei guak bek hong kinusia ahih manin tua a lamdang maangmuhna keimah guak bek mah in ka mu hi. Ka thaneih teng bei khin a, ka mel kikhel gawp ahih manin kei ka hih lam mel kuamah in a hong thei nawn kei uh hi." 
Daniel10:9 Tua mipaʼ kampau ka zak ciangin ka khuplamin leilak ah tuk sukin khua ka phawk nawn kei hi. 
Daniel10:10 Tua laitakin ka khut khatin hong phong to a, ka khut le ka khukin ka tho to a, liing kankan kawmin ka om hi." 
Daniel10:11 Amah in, “Daniel aw, Pasian in nang hong it hi. Ding inla kong thugente limtakin ciamteh in. Na kiangah thu a gen dingin kei hong kisawl zo hi,” a hong ci hi. Amah in hih thu teng a hong gen khit ciangin liing kankan kawmin ka ding hi." 
Daniel10:12 Tua ciangin amah in, “Daniel aw, lau kei in. Kiniamkhiat dingin na lungsim na khensat masak pen ni a kipan, tua thu na theihtheih nadingin Pasian in na thungetna a hong za zo hi. Na thungetna bang a hong pia dingin ka hong pai hi." 
Daniel10:13 Persia gam a cing vantungmi in ni sawm nih le khat sung kei a hong nial hi. Tua ciangin kei a hong huh dingin vantungmi thupite khat ahi Mikhael a hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Persia gam sungah keimah guak bek ka om hi. 
Daniel10:14 Mailam hunah na mipihteʼ tunga hong tung ding thu a hilh khol dingin a hong pai ka hi hi. Hih pen mailam a hong piang lai ding maangmuhna ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel10:15 Amah in hih thu a hong gen ciangin kei bangmah pau thei loin lei ka en suk gega mawk hi. 
Daniel10:16 Tua ciangin pasal mel tawh a kibang mi khat thakhatin ka mai ah hong om a, ka muk a hong lawnsak hi. Tua ciangin thugen dingin ka kisa hi. Ka mai-a a ding pa kiangah, “Topa aw, ka maangmuhna in ka tha hong zawsak lua ahih manin ka ci-lin a pha thei kei hi." 
Daniel10:17 A topaʼ mai ah a ding sila khat tawh ka kibang hi. Bangci bangin thu hong gen thei ding ka hi hiam? Husanʼ zawh nading thatang nangawn ka nei kei hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel10:18 Ahih hangin khatvei hong lenkik leuleu a, ka tha a hong khauhkik zaw deuh hi." 
Daniel10:19 Amah in, “Lunghimawh kei inla, lau kei in. Kihangsak in. Pasian in nang hong it hi,” a hong ci hi. Tua teng a hong gen khit ciangin ka tha hong khauh zaw a, “Topa aw, na gen ding peuhpeuh hong gen in; tu-in ka ci a hong dam zaw diak hi,” ka ci hi." 
Daniel10:20 Amah in, “Bang hangin na kiangah hong pai ka hi hiam, cih na thei hiam? Thuman Laibu sungah a kigelh thute a lak dingin a hong pai ka hi hi. Tu-in ciahkikin, Persia gam a cing vantungmi tawh ka kido ding hi. Tua khit ciangin Grik gam a cing vantungmi a hong kilang ding hi. Mikhael longal kei a hong huh ding kuamah a om kei hi." 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 Israel a cing vantungmi pen kei hong huhpa le a hong dal pa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel11:2 Tua ciangin amah in, “Tu-a na tunga kong gen ding thu, a thuman ahi hi. Kumpi thum in Persia gam uk lai dinga, tua banah a lina hong khang ding hi. Tua pa, a dang teng sangin a hau zaw ding hi. Amah in a hauh penpen laitak le a thahat pen laitakin Grik kumpi a to ding hi." 
Daniel11:3 Tua ciangin a minthang kumpi khat a hong kilang ding hi. Amah in gam zaipi tak uk dinga, ama thuthu-in a gamta ding hi." 
Daniel11:4 Ahih hangin a thahat pen laitakin a gam hong kitam dinga, khen li a kisuah ding hi. A suan a khakte in ama gam a uk kha kei ding uh hi. Midangte in uk ding uh a, ahi zongin amah zahin vang a nei zo kei ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:5 “Egypt kumpipa a hong thahat ding hi. Ahi zongin a galkap maang lian pente khat thahat pen dinga, gam lian zaw a uk ding hi." 
Daniel11:6 Kum sauvei sim khit ciangin Egypt kumpipa in a kipawl khawm theih nadingin Syria kumpipa le ama tanu a kiteengsak ding hi. Ahih hangin tua kipawlkhawmna kip lo dinga, tua numei le a tonpih a silate le a ta le a pasal a kithat lum ding hi." 
Daniel11:7 “A sawt loin tua numeiʼ behte khat in Syria kumpi sim dinga, a kulhpi sungah tumin amaute a zo gawp ding hi." 
Daniel11:8 Amah in amauteʼ milim pasian-te le a na manpha ngun le khamte Egypt gamah a pua ding hi. Kum tawmvei sung bek kilemna a om ding hi. 
Daniel11:9 Syria kumpipa in Egypt gam sim dinga, ahih hangin zo zo loin a nungkik ding hi." 
Daniel11:10 “Syria kumpipaʼ tate, galsim dingin kithawi-in galkap ding mi tampi a kaikhawm ding uh hi. Tua galkap maangte khat thahat diakin tuikhang bang dinga, galteʼ kulhpi a luh zo ding hi." 
Daniel11:11 Egypt kumpipa zong heh mahmah in Syria kumpipa sim gawp dinga, a galkapte tampi tak a matsak ding hi." 
Daniel11:12 A galhatna hang le galkap tampi a thahna hangin kisathei mahmah dinga, ahih hangin a gualzo tawntung kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:13 Syria kumpipa khatvei kuankikin a masa sangin galkap a tam zaw a kaikhawm ding hi. A hun kicing ta a sak ciangin galkap tampi le galhiam kicing piikpeek tawh a kuan khia ding hi. 
Daniel11:14 “Tua hun ciangin mi tampi tak in Egypt kumpipa a lehdo ding uh hi. Danielʼ mipihte ahi, mihoih lo pawl khat in zong a muh sa uh maangmuhna hangin a lehdo ding uh a, ahih hangin a guallel ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:15 Tua ahih ciangin Syria kumpipa in kulhpi tawh a ki-umcih khuapite luh zo-in a la khin ding hi. Egypt galkapte in gal dosuak zo nawn lo ding uh a, galkap thahat pente a thaneem ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:16 Galdo zo ding om nawn lo uh ahih manin a galte uh a ututin a gamta ding uh hi. Thuciam Gamah zong lutin a khut sungah tua gam a om ding hi. 
Daniel11:17 “Syria kumpipa in a galkap neih khempeuh zangin galsim ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Olno takin a gualzawh theih nadingin a tanu le a galte tensak ding a ngaihsun ding hi. Ahih hangin a tangtung zo kei veve ding hi. 
Daniel11:18 Tua khit ciangin tuipi tungtawnin minam dangte sim dinga, tampi tak mah a zo ding hi. Ahih hangin gamdang makai khat in amah zo gawp dinga, a minthanna teng a beisak ding hi." 
Daniel11:19 Kumpipa a kulhpi a zuankik dingin a gamah hong ciah dinga, ahih hangin gal lel khinta ahih manin amah a bei ta ding ahi hi." 
Daniel11:20 “Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat in ama nung hong zuikik leuleu dinga, a gam sung khantoh nadingin phiangsiah tampi a dong dingin mi khat a sawl ding hi. Tawlno khat khit ciangin tua kumpipa kithat lum dinga, ahih hangin gal sung a si ahi kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:21 “Ama zomah Syria kumpi ding pen migilo, kumpi dingin a kilawm lo mi khat ahi ding hi. Ahih hangin amah pen thakhat thu-in zuausiamna tawh kumpi a hong suak vat ding hi." 
Daniel11:22 Ama thu a nial galkap honpite le Pasianʼ siampi liante khempeuh a mangthangsak ding hi. 
Daniel11:23 Zuaugen siamna zangin minam dangte tawh kilemna a bawl ding hi. Minam tawmno khat bek a uk hangin a thahatna a khang semsem ding hi. 
Daniel11:24 Amah in a pu a pateʼ hih ngei loh, gam hau, gam kilemte nangawn a sim ding hi. Tua ciangin gal sung a a lak vante le nate a nungzuite tawh a hawm ding uh hi. Amah in galdalna kulhpite khempeuh luh ding hanciam dinga, ahih hangin tawmvei sung bek hun a nei ding hi." 
Daniel11:25 “Egypt gam hang takin a sim theih nadingin galkap tampi a kaikhawm ding hi. Egypt-te in zong galkap tampi tawh nasia takin a na do ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Egypt kumpipa in khemna thuak ding ahih manin gal a zo kei ding hi. 
Daniel11:26 Ama muan pen a thudot mipilte in amah leh bawlin a siasak ding uh hi. A galkapte tampi tak si ding ahih manin gal a lel ding hi. 
Daniel11:27 Tua kumpi tegel in sabuai khat tungah tu-in an a nekhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin a ngaihsutna uh a hoih zawsang om tuan lo ahih manin a kikhem tuak ding uh hi. A hun tung nai lo ahih manin a deih bang uh a ngah zo kei uh hi. 
Daniel11:28 Tua ciangin Syria kumpipa, a galvan lak teng tawh a gamah ciahkik dinga, Pasian miteʼ biakna suksiatsak ding a lungngai ding hi. A ut bang peuhin gamta dinga, tua ciangin a gam lamah a ciahkik ding hi." 
Daniel11:29 “Tua nung ciangin Egypt gam simkik leuleu dinga, ahih hangin a masa-a bangin a piang kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:30 Rom mite, teembaw tawh hong pai-in amah do ding uh ahih manin a lau ding hi. Tua ciangin amah kilehkik dinga, a thangpaihna tawh Pasianʼ miteʼ biakna suksiat ding a hanciam ding hi. Amah in tua biakna a nusia miteʼ zolsimna a mang ding hi." 
Daniel11:31 A galkapte pawl khat in biakinnpi le biakinnpi huang a ninsak ding uh hi. Amaute in nisim biakpiaknate khawlsak ding uh a, a Lipkhaphuai na a suang ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:32 Kumpipa in tua biakna a nusia mite a thu zawh theih nadingin zuaugen siamna a zang ding hi. Ahih hangin Pasianʼ nung a zui mite ahih uh leh thahatin a gualzo ding uh hi. 
Daniel11:33 Pilna a nei mite in a pilna uh midang tampite tawh a neikhawm ding uh hi. Ahih hangin tawl khat sung mi pawl khat in gal sung a sihna le meikuang sunga thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Mi pawl khatte in lawk gawpna le thongkiatna a thuak ding uh hi. 
Daniel11:34 Tua bangin thahna a thuak laitakun, pawl khat in huhna a ngah ding uh hi. Mi tampi in huhna a piak uh hangin amauʼ meetna ding ngaihsutna bek ahi hi." 
Daniel11:35 Mi pawl khat in thahna a thuak ding uh hi. Tua bangin a pianna thu pen beina a tun mateng sianthosakna le mipha le misia khentelna, Pasianʼ seh sa hun a tunna ahi hi." 
Daniel11:36 “Syria kumpipa a ut bangbangin a gamta ding hi. Amah in, pasian-te sangin ka lian zaw a, a Lianpen Pasian sangin zong ka thupi zaw lai hi, ci-in a kisathei ding hi. Pasian in amah gim a piak mateng tua bangin a om ding hi." 
Daniel11:37 Kumpipa in a pu a pateʼ biak pasian le numeite in a it pasian a thusim kei ding hi. Pasian a kici peuhmah khat beek a thusim kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuate sangin amah a lian zaw-in a kingaihsun hi. 
Daniel11:38 Tua pasian-te sangin kulhpi a dal pasian a thupi sim zaw ding hi. Amah in kham, ngun, suangmanpha le a thupi letsongte, a pu a pateʼ biak ngei loh pasian kiangah a pia ding hi." 
Daniel11:39 Amah in a kulhpi a ciang dingin pasian dang a biate a sawl ding hi. Amah in amah kumpi-in a sang mite minphatna, za liatna pia-in, leitang nangawn letsongin a pia ding hi." 
Daniel11:40 “Syria kumpipaʼ hun a bei dektak ciangin, Egypt kumpipa in amah a sim ding hi. Syria kumpipa in a thaneih teng siit loin tuikhang bangin sakol tawh, sakol galkapte tawh, teembaw tampi tawh Egypt a do ding hi." 
Daniel11:41 Amah in Thuciamna Gam zong sim dinga, mi tul tampi tak a that ding hi. Ahih hangin Edom gam, Moab gam le Ammon gam sungah a om lai sunteng a suakta ding uh hi." 
Daniel11:42 Amah in gam tampi tak sim dinga, Egypt nangawn zong a suakta kei ding hi." 
Daniel11:43 Amah in Egypt gam sunga kiseel ngun le kham le a neihsa uh na manpha khempeuh a la ding hi. Amah in Libya le Ethiopia gam zong a zo ding hi. 
Daniel11:44 Tua ciangin, nisuahna lam le saklam panin thupiang in amah patausak dinga, thangpaihna tawh gal do-in mi tampi tak a that ding hi." 
Daniel11:45 Amah in a kumpi puanbuk lianpite biakinn dinna mual tung le tuipi kikalah a lam ding hi. Ahih hangin amah a si ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a huh ding kuamah a om kei hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel12:1 Tua ciangin saihadial puan a silh vantungmi in, “Na mite a cing, a lian vantungmi Mikhael hong kilang ding hi. Tua ciangin leitungah mihing a pian zawh a kipan a nasia penpen gimna hun hong tung ding hi. Tua hun a hong tun ciangin Pasianʼ laibu sungah a min a kigelh na mite khempeuh kihon khia ding hi." 
Daniel12:2 A si sa mi tampite in nuntakna a ngahkik ding uh hi. Pawl khatte nungta tawntung ding uh a, pawl khatte in a tawntung zumna le min siatna a ngah ding uh hi." 
Daniel12:3 A pilte ahih uh leh vantung khuavak tawh a taang khawm ding uh hi. A pha-in gamtat ding mi tampi a hilhte pen aksi bangin a taang tawntung ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:4 Tu-in Daniel aw, beina hun a tun mateng laibu khupcip inla, a tungah ciaptehna koih in. A kallak ah mi tampite in bang thu piang hiam cih thei tel nuamin a hanciam ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Daniel12:5 Tua ciangin keimah Daniel in gun pang tuak a ding mi nih ka mu hi. 
Daniel12:6 Tua mite khat in puan pak silh a, gun gal a gamla zaw deuhin a ding pa kiangah, “Hih nalamdangte a beina ding bang tanvei sawt ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Daniel12:7 Puan pak silhpa in a khut tegel vantung lamah laam to-in, Tawntung Pasianʼ min tawh thuciamna a bawl hi. Amah in, “Kum thum le alang hi ding hi. Pasianʼ mite a kibawlsiatna a bei ciangin hih thute khempeuh hong piang ding hi,” ci-in a gen ka za hi." 
Daniel12:8 A thugen za napi-in teltakin ka thei kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin, “Topa aw, bangci bangin beina hong piang ding ahi hiam,” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Daniel12:9 Amah in, “Daniel aw, tu-in ciah in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih thute pen beina hun a tun mateng selcipin ipcip ding ahi hi." 
Daniel12:10 Mi tampite kisiansuahin a hoih le a hoih lo a kikhentel ding uh hi. Migilote in bangmah thei tel thei lo uh ahih manin a gilo semsem ding uh hi. Ahih hangin mipilte in theih tel theihna a nei ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:11 Amaute in nisim biakpiakna a khawlsak, a Lipkhaphuai na a hong pian ciangin ni tul khat za nih sawm kua sung a sawt ding hi." 
Daniel12:12 Ni tul khat za thum sawm thum le nga sung muanhuai takin a ngak zo kenkante in thupha a ngah ding uh hi. 
Daniel12:13 Nang Daniel na hih leh a tawp dong muanhuai takin om in. Tua ciangin na si dinga, ahi zongin hun a bei ciangin thaman a sang dingin na hingkik ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Hosea1:1 Judah kumpite Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, Hezekiah le Israel kumpi Joashʼ tapa Jeroboamʼ hun lai-in Beeriʼ tapa Hosea tungah Topa in thu na gen hi." 
Hosea1:2 Topa in Hosea tungtawnin Israel-te tungah thu a na gen cil lai-in, amah in Hosea kiangah, “Hih gam mite kei tungah citak loin pasian dangte bia uh ahih manin, nang zong hong tul pih lo ding numei paktat khat teenpih inla, tua nu tawh ta nei in,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:3 Tua ahih ciangin Hosea in zong Diblaimʼ tanu Gomer teenpih a, tua nu hong gai-in tapa khat hong nei hi." 
Hosea1:4 Tua ciangin Topa in Hosea kiangah, “Na tapaʼ min dingin Jezreel phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama pute Jehu in Jezreel khua ah a mi thahna hangin Israel kumpipa tungah gim ka pia baih dinga, Israel mite tungah Jehuʼ suanlekhakteʼ ukna ka beisak ding hi." 
Hosea1:5 Tua ciangin Jezreel kuam ah Israel miteʼ galhiam khempeuh ka sumai ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:6 Tua ciangin Gomer gaikikin tanu khat nei hi. Topa in zong Hosea kiangah, “Na tanuʼ min dingin hehpih loh, a cihnopna Loruhamah phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite ka hehpih nawn kei dinga, a mawhna uh ka maisak het kei ding hi." 
Hosea1:7 Ahi zongin Judah mite ka hehpih dinga, namsau le thal, sakol le sakol tung tuangte le galsimna tawh hi loin, amauteʼ Topa Pasian ahi kei mahmah in amaute ka hon khia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:8 Loruhamah a tei khit ciangin Gomer gai-in tapa khat nei leuleu hi. 
Hosea1:9 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Na tapaʼ min dingin ka mi hi lo a cihnopna Loammi phuak in; bang hang hiam cih leh no Israel mite, ka mi na hi nawn kei uh a, kei zong noteʼ Pasian ka hi kei hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea1:10 Ahi zongin, teh zawh loh, sim zawh loh zah dongin tuipi sehnel bangin Israel mite tampi pha ding uh a, tua hunin, “Note ka mi hi lo,” a kicih hangin ni khat ni ciangin, “A nungta Pasianʼ tate,” kici ding hi." 
Hosea1:11 Judah mite le Israel mite kigawmkik ding uh a, amaute a makai dingin mi khat a seh ding uh hi. Amaute khangin citheikik ding uh a, tua Jezreel hun pen a nuam mahmah hun hi ding hi." 
Hosea2:1 Tua ahih ciangin na Israel mipihte, “Pasianʼ mi,” ci inla, “ Topa in a hehpih mite,” zong ci in." 
Hosea2:2 Tate aw, na nu uh zolbawl un. Amah ka zi hi nawn lo a, kei zong ama pasal ka hih nawn loh hangin a paktatna le midang tawh a mawhnate a khawl nadingin zol un." 
Hosea2:3 A gamtat hoih lohna a khawl kei leh, a nu sung pan a suah laitakin a guaktangin a om mah bangin, a puan teng hawk khiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak dinga, a keu, bangmah a po zawh lohna gamlak bangin ka bawl dinga, dangtakin a si ding hi." 
Hosea2:4 Ama tate, paktatna panin a piang tate ahih manin, tua a tate zong ka hehpih kei ding hi." 
Hosea2:5 A nu uh a paktat hi a, tua ahih manin amaute a paii numei, zumna mel thei loin a gamta ahi hi. Amah in, “Ka it pasal dangte kiangah ka pai ding hi. Amaute in anletui, samul puan le saihadial puan, oliv thau le zu hong pia uh hi,” a ci zaw lai hi." 
Hosea2:6 Tua ahih ciangin amah a paikhiat zawh loh nadingin ling ka kaihnelh dinga, a kimkot ah kulh ka ciang ding hi." 
Hosea2:7 Amah in a pasal dangte delh dinga, ahi zongin amaute kiang tung zo lo ding hi. Amah in amaute zong niloh dinga, ahi zongin mu zo lo ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka pasal masa kiangah ciahkik ning; tu-a bangin ka om sangin ama kiang nuam zaw ding hi,” a ci ding hi." 
Hosea2:8 Ama tungah an, leenggahzu le oliv thau ka piakna le Baal pasian biak nadingin a zat ngun le kham tampi tak a pia pa ka hih lam hong phawk kha lo hi." 
Hosea2:9 Tua ahih manin anlak hun ciangin ama tungah ka piak ngei an le leenggahzute ka pia nawn kei dinga, a silh dingin ka piak samul puan le saihadial puante ka pia nawn kei ding hi." 
Hosea2:10 Tua ciangin ama it pasal dangteʼ muhna ah a puante hawk khiatsakin a guaktangin ka omsak dinga, kuamah in keiʼ khut sung panin hon khia zo lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:11 Ama lungdam theihna, a kumsim pawite, a khasim pawite, a nipisim pawite, a biakna kikhop khempeuh ka beisak ding hi." 
Hosea2:12 Ka pasal it dangte in thamanin hong piak hi, ci-in a gen a leengguite le a theikungte ka susia dinga, gamsate in tuate suksiatsakin gamlakpi a suak ding hi." 
Hosea2:13 Kei hong mangngilh tanvei sung, Baal pasian tungah paknamtui a hal tanvei sung le a pasal it dangte tawh a kikhawl dingin a manpha kizepna a tuamtuamte tawh a kizep hun tanvei sungzah mah gim ka pia ding hi." 
Hosea2:14 Tua ahih ciangin sehnel gamah amah ka paipihkik dinga, itna kam tawh hopihin ka zolkik ding hi." 
Hosea2:15 Tua lai panin a leenggui lote ka piakik dinga, Lungkhamna Kuam a cihnopna Akhor Kuam pen lametna kongpi ka suaksak ding hi. Egypt panin a paikhiat, a nungak no hun lai mah bangin ka thugennate hong ngai ding hi." 
Hosea2:16 Tua ciangin kei pen, ka pasal, hong cikik dinga, kei pen, ka Baal pasian, hong ci nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:17 Ama kam panin Baal pasian min ka pulaksak nawn kei dinga, a min kilo kha nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea2:18 Tua ciangin, ka mite a suksiat loh nadingun gamlak a om gamsate, huihlak a leeng vasate le leitungah a bokvak ganhingte tawh thuciamna ka bawl dinga, thalte, namsaute, galhiam khempeuh, leitung panin ka phiat khia ding hi. A lungmuang hithiatin ka mite ka omsak ding hi." 
Hosea2:19 Israel aw, nang, zi-in kong neikik dinga, nang tungah thuman thutangin kong gamtakik ding hi. Nang hong itin kong hehpih tawntung dinga, keima-aʼ na hi tawntung ding hi." 
Hosea2:20 Kei-aʼ ahi tawntung dingin nang kong la ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka hih lamtak nong thei ding hi. 
Hosea2:21 Tua ni ciangin keima mi Jezreel-teʼ thungetna ka pia dinga, leitungah guah ka zusak ding hi." 
Hosea2:22 Leitung in an, leenggahzu le sathaute piangsak ding hi." 
Hosea2:23 Leitungah ka mite kipsakin a cithei-in ka bawl dinga, hehpih loh, a kici mite ka hehpih dinga, ka mi hi lo, a kici mite, ka mi na hi uh hi, ka ci dinga, amaute in, “Nang pen koteʼ Pasian na hi hi,” hong ci ding uh hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Hosea3:1 Topa in kei kiangah thu hong genkik a, “Lawm a ngai khin sa, pasal tawh a lum khawm sa numei khat tawh va kingai in. Israel mite, pasian dangte kiangah pai uh a, leenggahkeu tawh a va biak uh hangin, amaute ka it lai veve mah bangin tua numei va it in,” hong ci hi." 
Hosea3:2 Tua ahih ciangin ngun shekel sawm le nga le mangbuhham seu sawm le nga tawh zi lei-in 
Hosea3:3 ama kiangah, “Sau veipi sung keima zi bangin na om dinga, midang tawh na paktat nawn kei ding hi. Midang tawh na lup khop loh mah bangin kei nangawn tawh zong i lum khawm kei ding hi,” ka ci hi." 
Hosea3:4 Hih pen kumpi ahi a, makai ahi zongin, biakpiakna le biakpiakna khuampite ahi zongin, siampi puanpi le milim pasian-te nei loin hun saupi sung Israel mite om ding a cihna ahi hi." 
Hosea3:5 Tua khit ciangin Israel mite in Topa amauʼ Pasian le a kumpipa uh David lamah hong kiheikik ding uh hi. Tua hun ciangin amaute in Topa zahtakin, ama letsongte a ngah ding uh hi." 
Hosea4:1 Israel mite aw, Topaʼ thugen ngai un. Hih gam sungah a teeng mite tungah Topa lungkim lo ahih manin hih bangin mawhsak hi: Hih gam sungah cihtakna ahi a, itna ahi zongin om lo a, mite in kei pen Pasian-in hong ngaihsun lo uh hi." 
Hosea4:2 Mite in thuciamna bawl napi-in a thuciamte uh palsat uh hi. Zuau genin, mi thatin, guta-in, nulepa mawhna bawl uh hi. A sia khat khit a sia khat a banbanin gamta-in a mawhna uh beh laplap uh hi." 
Hosea4:3 Tua ahih ciangin leitang keugaw-in a tunga teng khempeuh si dinga, leitung a om gamsa khempeuh le huihlak a leeng vasa khempeuh tawh si mang ding uh a, tuipi sunga om ngasate nangawn si mang ding hi." 
Hosea4:4 Kuamah in mihonte mawhsak kei henla, mihonte taii kei hen. Keiʼ lungkim lohna no siampiteʼ tung ahi hi." 
Hosea4:5 A sun a zan cih om loin na nasepnate uh a kimanna mel om lo hi; kamsangte zong note bangmah hi lel hi. Na nu uh Israel ka susia ding hi. 
Hosea4:6 Ka mite in kei hong phawk lo uh ahih manin ka susia ding hi. No siampite in kei hong phawk nuam loin, ka thuhilhnate nial na hih manun ka siampi dingin kong deih nawn kei a, na tate uh zong siampi-in ka zang kei ding hi." 
Hosea4:7 Siampi tam semsem leh kei tungah a khialhna uh tam semsem hi. Amauʼ minthanna pen mindaina ka suaksak ding hi. 
Hosea4:8 Ka miteʼ mawhna amaute in hauhlawh uh a, ka mite a mawh semsem ding uh a ut uh hi." 
Hosea4:9 Miteʼ thuak dingin a kilawm gimna mah siampite in zong thuak ding uh a, amauʼ gamtatna bangin gim pia-in amauʼ siatna bangin ka thukkik ding hi." 
Hosea4:10 Amaute, pasian dangte a bia dingin kei kiang panin kihei khia uh ahih manin biakpiakna a sa tanhte uh a nek hangun a gil uh vah tuan lo ding hi. Mi punna ding deihna-in biakpiakna-in numei tawh mawhna a bawl uh hangin mi pung tuan lo ding hi." 
Hosea4:11 Leenggahzu in ka miteʼ thungaihsut theihna beisak hi. 
Hosea4:12 Ka mite in aisanin singthem peuh thudotin nei uh a, amauʼ thu theihnopte, ciangkang peuh in gen tazen hi. Amaute in kei hong taisan uh a, a paktat numei bangin pasian dangte a zuan uh hi." 
Hosea4:13 Amaute in mual sangte dawna biakna munte ah biakna pia uh a, a nuai liim hoih ahih manin mual neute tungah a po tawsaw kung, poplar kung le terebinth kungte nuai ah paknamtui halin a bia uh hi. Tua thu hangin na tanute uh numei paktat suak uh a, na mote un midang tawh mawhna a bawl uh hi." 
Hosea4:14 Na tanute uh a paktat manin gim ka pia kei dinga, na mote uh midang tawh a mawh manin zong gim ka pia tuan kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note mahmah numei paktatte tawh na mawh uh a, biakinn numeite tawh nulepa mawhna biakna na bawl uh hi. Paunak ah, “Thuhoih phawk theihna a nei lo mite in siatna thuak ding hi,” kici hi." 
Hosea4:15 Kei tungah no Israel mite citak loin nong taisan hangun, note bangin Judah mite khial kei tahen. Gilgal ah ahi a, Bethaven ah ahi zongin pai kei unla, tua lai munah Topaʼ min tawh na kiciam kei un." 
Hosea4:16 A kizualsak zo lo bawngla bangin Israel mite phengphi uh ahih manin, lo nona munah tuunote an vak bangin amaute bangci vak ding ka hi hiam?" 
Hosea4:17 Israel mite, milim biak uuk lua uh a, cih theih hi lo hi." 
Hosea4:18 Amaute, zukham honpi hi uh a, nulepa mawhna a bawlbawl uh hi. Min phat ding sangin min siat ding ut zaw uh hi." 
Hosea4:19 Huihpi nung in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a phiat khia mang ding lungsim a nei uh hi. Amauʼ biak pasian-te in amaute huh lo ding hi. 
Hosea5:1 No siampite aw, hih thu ngai un! No Israel mite aw, thudon un. Kumpipaʼ innkuante aw, ngai un! Note in midangte tungah thu a khen ding hi napi-in, note tungah thukhenna hong tung ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih le note in miteʼ awk nadingin Mizpah mualah thang na siah uh a, miteʼ awk nadingin Tabor mualah ngenthang na hi uh hi." 
Hosea5:2 Note in miteʼ kiat nadingin Shittim ah gum a thukpi-in na to uh hi; hih thu hangin note kong thuhilh ding hi. 
Hosea5:3 Israel-teʼ gamtatna khempeuh ka thei khin a, kei tungah bangmah hong im thei lo ding uh hi. Kei tungah hong citak lo uh a, amaute, misia a suak khinta uh hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea5:4 Amauteʼ gamtatna in a Pasian kiang uh zuansak thei lo hi. Amaute in nakpi takin milim biaknopna lungsim nei uh ahih manin Topa phawk kha lo uh hi. 
Hosea5:5 Israel-teʼ kiphatsakna pen amau mahʼ siat nading ahi hi. Amauʼ mawhna in amaute puksak dinga, Judah mite in zong puk pih ding uh hi." 
Hosea5:6 Topa tungah biakna-in piak dingin a tuute uh le a bawngte uh paipih ding uh a, ahi zongin a mawkna suak ding hi. Topa in amaute nusia khin ahih manin amah mu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Hosea5:7 Topaʼ tungah amaute citak lo uh a, midangte tawh zawlta nei uh hi. Tu-in amaute le a neihsa khempeuh uh kisusia ding hi." 
Hosea5:8 Galdo nading zaksakna in Gibeah khua ah tuutal ki tum unla, Ramah khua ah peengkul tum un. Bethaven khua ah pataukohna gingsak un. Benjamin mite aw, kithawi un!" 
Hosea5:9 Gimthuak ni hun hong tun ciangin Israel mite in siatna thuak ding uh hi. A tung taktak ding thu, Israel mite lakah a gen ka hi hi." 
Hosea5:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mi uliante in gisuang khinin midangteʼ leitang keeksak uh ahih manin amaute tungah ka heh a, amaute tungah tuikhang bangin gimna ka tungsak ding hi." 
Hosea5:11 Israel in zong gimna thuakin a cimawh hi ta hi; bang hang hiam cih le kei kiangah hong pai nuam loin piak ding bangmah a nei lote kiangah huhna ngen dingin pai hamtang hi. 
Hosea5:12 Tua ahih manin Israel ka beitumsak dinga, Judah ka beisak mang ding hi." 
Hosea5:13 Israel in ama cinatna kithei-in, Judah in ama liamna a kimuh ciangin kumpi lianpa kiangah huh ngen dingin Assiria gamah Israel va pai hi. Ahi zongin amah in amauʼ natna damsak thei lo a, a liamna uh zong na damsak thei tuan lo hi." 
Hosea5:14 Humpinelkaiʼ suk gawp bangin Israel le Judah ka su gawp ding hi. Keimah teekteek in amaute bal gawpin ka paisan ding hi. Amaute ka tal kaih gawp dinga, kuamah in hon zo lo ding hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea5:15 Ka mite in a mawhna hangun gimna thuakin kei hong zonkik mateng ka tua ci nusiat phot ding hi. A lungkham uh ciangin kei hong zong ding uh hi. 
Hosea6:1 Amaute in, “Hong pai un, Topa kiangah ciahkik ni; amah in eite hong bal gawp hangin hong damsakkik dinga, eite hong liamsak hangin i liammate hong tunsakkik ding hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Hosea6:2 Ni nih sungin eite hong thahatsak dinga, ni thum sungin i ngei hong bangsak ding hi. Tua ciangin amah tawh i kikhawl ding hi." 
Hosea6:3 Topa i theih zawh nadingin hanciam ni. Zingsang sialin pel loin khua a vak mah bangin pel loin eite kiangah amah hong pai dinga, lei a kawtsak khuapi guah pel loin hong zuk bangin eite kiangah amah hong pai hamtang ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea6:4 Israel le Judah aw, note bang hong cih thei nawn ding ka hi hiam? Noteʼ hong itna pen zingsang meii lum bangin theng pak a, a mangthang pak daitui tawh kibang lel hi." 
Hosea6:5 Tua ahih manin note a hong thuhilh ding le note a hong taii dingin ka kamsangte kong sawl hi. No ka miteʼ gamtat ding ka deih zia kitel sinsen hi. 
Hosea6:6 Keima deih pen nong it tawntung ding uh hizaw a, gan tawh nong biakna uh ka deih pen hi lo zaw hi. Gan tawh nong biakna uh sangin kei nong theih ding uh ka deih zaw hi." 
Hosea6:7 Ahi zongin ka ciamna gam a tun uh ciangin amaute in Adam khua ah ka thuciamna palsat uh a, kei tungah hong thuman lo uh hi." 
Hosea6:8 Gilead pen migilo hontangteʼ omna khuapi hi a, mi thahna sisan luang tawh amauʼ sul a kidim hi." 
Hosea6:9 Zawhthawh thu-in miʼ na a sut dingin a pangsim mite bangin siampite gamta uh a, biakna a pia dingin Shekhem khua ah a pai mite nangawn, lamkal ah a that uh hi. Amau gamtatna siahuai mahmah hi." 
Hosea6:10 Israel mite lakah siatna lianpi khat ka mu hi. Milim biakna tawh amaute kininsak uh hi. 
Hosea6:11 No Judah mite zong gim kong piak ding hun kiseh khinzo hi. Ka mihingte a ngei uh bangsakkik ning," 
Hosea7:1 Israel-te a ci uh damsakkik ning, ci-in ka ngaihsut ciangin, amauʼ mawhna le amauʼ siatna bekbek kimu thei hi. Amaute in mi khemin, inn luhin na gu uh a, kong lak nangawn ah miʼ na sut uh hi." 
Hosea7:2 Amauʼ gamtat siatna khempeuh ka phawk lamtak amaute in ngaihsutin nei kha lo uh hi. Amauʼ mawhna in amaute gakcip a, ka muhna mahmah ah om gige uh hi." 
Hosea7:3 Amaute in a zuaupi teng uh tawh kumpipa lungdamsak uh a, a khemna teng uh tawh a uliante uh nuamsak uh hi." 
Hosea7:4 Amaute zuautatin citak lo uh hi. Amaute pen, moh bawl pa in a anlom meek a pawm mateng, moh emna meikhuk sunga a tawh sa, mut loh seem lohin a koih phot mei tawh kibang uh hi." 
Hosea7:5 Kumpipa in pawi a bawl ni-in amaute in uliante zu khamsakin haisak uh a, amauʼ ngimna a thei lopi-in kumpipa zong tua lakah hong kihel hi." 
Hosea7:6 Tua bangin amauʼ sawm simna mei bangin hong kuang hi. Zan thapai-in a hehna uh mei bangin khukhu a, zingsangin mei bangin hong kuang khia hi." 
Hosea7:7 A hehluatna uh tawh amau a ukte a that lum uh hi. A kumpite uh khat khit khat a banbanin kithat a, ahi zongin kuamah in kei kiangah huhna hong ngen lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:8 Israel, a kiim a om minam dangte tawh kipawlin tua mite muanin nei a, a kihei lo moh ki-em tawh kibang uh hi." 
Hosea7:9 A kipawl pih minam dangte in a thahatna teng uh teeptum a, ahi zongin a kiteep tum lam phawk kha lo uh hi. A lu tung uh a om a sam uh a kan lam nangawn phawk kha lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:10 Israel miteʼ kiphatsakna in amauʼ lang khat ah teci pang hi. Ahi zongin hih thu khempeuh ah zong, amauʼ Topa Pasian ahi keiʼ lamah hong kihei tuan lo uh a, kei hong zong lo uh hi." 
Hosea7:11 Israel pen a khemnop kawl vakhu hai tawh kibang hi. Egypt-te kiangah huhna va ngen masa uh a, tua ciangin Assiria-te kiangah a va tai uh hi." 
Hosea7:12 Amaute a va pai laitakun ka ngen tawh amaute ka na siah dinga, vasa mat bangin ka ngen tawh amaute ka man ding hi. Amauʼ gamtat siatna hangin gim ka pia ding hi." 
Hosea7:13 Amaute in kei hong taisanin hong lehdo uh ahih manin gimna ngahin siatna tuak ding uh hi. Amaute ka hotkhiat nop hangin amaute in kei hong lehgen zawsop uh hi. 
Hosea7:14 Amaute in lungsim takpi tawh kei tungah huhna hong ngen lo uh a, dawibia mite bang lelin a gamta uh hi. An le leenggahzu a nget uh ciangin zong lawkite bangin a ngen uh hi. Amaute in kei hong lehdo uh hi." 
Hosea7:15 Amaute khoi-in a thahat mite suaksak napi-in, amaute in kei hong leh sawm zawsop uh hi." 
Hosea7:16 Amaute, keiʼ lam hong nga loin, Baal pasianʼ lam nga tawntung uh hi. A khak nading san a kha thei lo thalpeu tel tawh kibang uh hi. Amauʼ kiphatsak pauna hangun a uliante uh namsau-in si ding uh a, Egypt mite in amaute nuihsan lel ding uh hi." 
Hosea8:1 Pataukohna peengkul tum in. Galte in muvanlai bangin ka gam a leenlak dingin hong kithawi uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mite in ka thuciamna uh pelhin, ka thuhilhnate hong nial uh hi." 
Hosea8:2 Amaute in kei pen amauʼ Pasian, hong ci-in, nangma mite hi ung, hong ci napi-in," 
Hosea8:3 amaute in a hoih nate paai khia uh ahih manin a galte un delh ding uh hi. 
Hosea8:4 Amaute in kei hong dong loin kumpi ding vaihawm uh a, keiʼ theih pih lohin ulian koih uh hi. A ngun a khamte uh tawh amauʼ siat nading milim a bawl uh hi." 
Hosea8:5 Samaria khuapi mite in a biak kham bawng no ka deih kei hi. Tua a bia mite tungah ka heh hi. Amaute in mihoih a suah nading uh bang tanvei ngak lai ding ahi uh hiam? 
Hosea8:6 Israel sunga om mi khat in tua milim bawl a, tua milim pen Pasian hi lo hi. Samaria mite in a biak milim kisuzan ding hi." 
Hosea8:7 Paunak ah, Huih a tuhte in huih ngahkik dinga, a vui om lo ankung in annek ding piangsak lo hi, kici hi. A vui om lo ankung panin an kingah mah taleh zong gamdang mite in ne tum ding hi." 
Hosea8:8 Israel khempeuh kinawmvalhin kisusia dinga, tu nangawnin minam dangte in bangmahin ngaihsun nawn lo uh hi." 
Hosea8:9 A hon lak panin a tai khia, a thumang lo gam la bangin Assiria mite tung panin huhna a ngen dingin va tai uh hi. A huh ding uh a deihna-in midangte tungah amau pumpi a va zuak uh hi." 
Hosea8:10 Tua bangin minam dangte a cial hangun keimah in amaute kaikhawmin gim ka pia veve ding hi. Assiria kumpipaʼ bawlsiatna tawh a sawt loin gimna a ngah ding uh hi. 
Hosea8:11 Israel mite in mawhmaisak nading mun biakna tau tam bawl semsem leh mawh nading mun tam a behlap semsem a suak zawsop uh hi. 
Hosea8:12 Amaute hilh nading sim zawh loh thukham tampi gelh taleng zong, amaute in don loin thu lamdangpi khatin ngaihsun lel uh hi." 
Hosea8:13 Amaute in gan tawh biak ding utin, a biakna sate ne nuam uh hi. Ahi zongin Topa ahi keimah ka hih leh amaute tungah ka lungkim kei a, amauteʼ mawhnate phawkin tua mawhnate hangin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Egypt ah amaute ka sawlkik ding hi." 
Hosea8:14 Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in amau a Piangsak pa mangngilh uh a, inn lianpipite a lam uh hi. Judah mite in zong kulh nei khuapi tampi a lam thuah uh hi. Keimah in tua khuapite mei tawh halin a inn lianpite uh ka kaang tumsak ding hi, ci hi." 
Hosea9:1 Israel mite aw, midangte bangin lungdamin kipak kei un. Na Pasian uh na nusia uh a, ama tungah na citak kei uh hi. Numei paktatte bangin mun citeng ah Baal tungah na kizuak uh a, a hong leina ante hangin na lungdam uh hi." 
Hosea9:2 Ahi zongin tua ante, oliv thaute le leenggahzute na kham takun na ne kha kei ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:3 Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ gam sungah na omsuak kei ding uh a, Egypt gamah paikikin, Assiria gam sungah an siang lo na ne ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:4 Gam dangah na om laitakun Topa tungah leenggahzu tawh biakna na pia kei ding uh a, gan gawh biakna zong na bawl kei ding uh hi. Sihna phual a annek bangin, na annekte un zong a ne teng hong ninsak ding hi. Na ante uh zong na gilvahna ding bek uh hi dinga, Topaʼ inn ah khat zong na tun kei ding uh hi." 
Hosea9:5 A kiseh pawi hunte le Topaʼ pawi hun hong tun ciangin bang cih ding na hi uh hiam? 
Hosea9:6 Lungkhamna hun hong tungin, mite na kithehthang uh ciangin, Egypt mite in note hong kaikhawm dinga, amau gam Memfis khuapi ah vui ding bek na hi uh hi. Na inn na lote uh, kiak le lopa in khuhcip lel ding hi." 
Hosea9:7 Gim thuakna hun hong tung ta a, thukkikna hun hong tung ta hi. Tua hun ciangin Israel mite in na thei ding uh hi. Noteʼ mawhna hang le note in kei nong muhdah luat manun, “Hih kamsang pa mihai hi; hih thumu pa lungsim kicing lo hi,” nong ci uh hi." 
Hosea9:8 Ama mi Israel-te a vil dingin kamsang nasemin Pasian in kei hong sawl hi napi-in, ka paina khempeuh ah vasa bangin thang nong siah uh a, Pasianʼ gam sung teekteek mahah mite pen kamsang paʼ gal a suak mawk hi." 
Hosea9:9 A gamtatna uh gen theih lohin siahuai uh a, Gibeah khua-a a gamtat ngeite uh tawh kibang hi. Pasian in amauʼ mawhnate thei-in gim a pia ding hi." 
Hosea9:10 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Israel kong muh cil-in hoih mahmah a, sehnel gam sunga a gah a zun kiuhkeuh leenggah tawh kibang hi. Na pu na pate uh ka muh cil-in hoih mahmah a, a hun ciangin a min a zun sitset theigah muh tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin Baalpeor a tun uh ciangin amaute in Baal milim bia pah uh ahih manin, amauʼ biak milimte ka muhdah zahin amaute nangawn ka mudah pah hi." 
Hosea9:11 Israel-teʼ minliatna teng vasa bangin leeng mang dinga, amauʼ sung panin ta suak nawn loin, nupi gai, naupaii cih zong om nawn lo ding hi." 
Hosea9:12 Amaute in ta khoi mah ta le-uh zong, suanlekhak a neih theih ma-un ka khansihsak khin ding hi. Hih mite ka nungngat ciangin amaute tungah a lungkham huai lianpite a tung ding hi." 
Hosea9:13 Tu-in ka mukhol khin hi. Mite in sabet-a a bet ding le, a thah ding bekin, Israel mite in a naupangte uh khah khia ding uh hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea9:14 Topa aw, hih mite tungah na piak ding bang hong ngen ding ka hi hiam? Amaute tatolhsak inla, a nawizu uh kangsak in." 
Hosea9:15 Topa in hih bangin gen hi: Amauʼ gamtat sia khempeuh Gilgal phual pan a kipan hi a, tua mun a kipanin amaute ka muhdah a kipan ahi hi. Amauteʼ gamtat siatna hangin gam sung panin ka hawl khia ding hi. Amaute ka it nawn kei ding hi. A uliante un kei hong langpang uh hi." 
Hosea9:16 Israel mite ahihleh a zung a keu, gah a gah lo ding singkung tawh kibang hi. Amaute in ta nei ta mah le-uh zong, amauʼ it mahmah tua a tate uh ka thahsak veve ding hi, ci hi." 
Hosea9:17 Amaute in a thu ngai lo uh ahih manin ka Pasian in a mite a nial ding hi. Minam dangte lakah a vakvai mite a suak ding uh hi. 
Hosea10:1 Israel mite ahihleh a gah pha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang hi. Cithei semsem leh biakna tau tam lam semsem uh hi. A gam sung uh cithei semsem leh biakna song a hoih bawl semsem uh hi. 
Hosea10:2 A lungsim uh man lo ahih manin tu-in a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in amauʼ biakna taute suzanin, a biakna songte uh suksiatsak ding hi." 
Hosea10:3 A sawt loin hih mite in, “ Topa kihta lo ihih manin kumpi i nei kei hi. Kumpi khat lel in eite ading bang hong hihsak thei ding ahi hiam?” ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:4 Amaute a kampi bek uh hi a, a kampi bekun thu genin thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Lo lai-a tu-ma-kuakte sungah gunei kiak a po mah bangin thusia neihna hong khang hi." 
Hosea10:5 Bethaven khua-a bawng no milim a taanna uh hangin Samaria khuapi sunga a teeng mite lau-in liing ding uh a, amaute le tua milim na a sem siampite a thum ding uh hi. A etlawmna teng a maiman ciangin a tau ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:6 Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria gam a kumpi lianpa tungah siah a piak dingin tua milim kipua khia ding hi. Thu kigen zui-in milim a biakna hangun Israel-te mindai-in maizum ding uh hi. 
Hosea10:7 Tui tunga tuiphuan laam bangin a kumpite uh maimang ding hi. 
Hosea10:8 Israel-te in milim bia-in mawhna a bawlna munte kisusia dinga, a biakna taute uh tungah ling le kiak a po ding hi. Tua ciangin mite in mual liante kiangah, “Hong vukcip un,” ci ding uh a, mual neute kiangah, “Hong deng cip un,” a ci ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:9 Gibeah khua ah a khialh uh a kipanin kei tungah hong khialhna uh Israel mite tawp nai lo hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeah khua ah gal in amaute pha ding hi. 
Hosea10:10 Hih mimawhte thuhilh nadingin gim ka pia dinga, a thuapthuapin a mawhna hangun thuhilh nadingin minam dangte in amaute hong sim ding uh hi." 
Hosea10:11 Israel pen limtakin a kihilh sa, an a cil nuam bawngla tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin a etlawm a ngawngzang ah kol bulhin lo khawhsak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Lokhawhna leeng, Judah ka kaisak a, lei kalhkhapna singka, Israel ka kaisak hi." 
Hosea10:12 Khai tuh bangin thuman tuhin, kei nong itna hangun a piang thuphate at un. Noteʼ Topa keima lamah nong kihei ding uh a hun hi ta ahih manin lo thak lei kal kham un. Tua hileh kei hong pai-in note tungah thupha kong pia ding hi, ka ci hi." 
Hosea10:13 Ahi zongin note in thusia na tuh zawsop uh a, thusia gah na at uh hi. Na zuauna uh hangin a piang gahte na ne uh hi. Note in na sakol leengte uh le na galkap tamna uh muang kha na hih manun," 
Hosea10:14 gal in na mite uh hong sim dinga, na kulh muanhuaite uh kisusia ding hi. Kumpi Shalman in a galsimna ah Beth-arbel khua su gawpin, nupite le a tate leilak denna-in a sih mangsak hun lai mah a bang ding hi." 
Hosea10:15 Israel mite aw, noteʼ gamtat hoih lohna hangin tu-a bang teekin note tungah thu hong piang ding hi. Galdo a kipat phetin Israel kumpipa si pah ding hi." 
Hosea11:1 Israel a neu lai-in ka it mahmah a, Egypt gam panin ka tapa ka sam khia hi." 
Hosea11:2 Amaute kilim sap semsem leh ka maitang pan gamla pai semsem hi. Ka mite in Baal tungah biakna pia uh a, milim biakna-in paknamtui a hal uh hi." 
Hosea11:3 Ahi zongin Israel mite lam a pai theih nading a hilh pa keimah ka hi a, ka ang sungah amaute ka tawi hi. Ahi zongin amaute ka don lamtak phawk kha lo uh hi." 
Hosea11:4 Amaute, itna le hehpihna tawh ka len a, dom to-in ka biang ciangah ka tawi a, awn sukin an ka pia hi." 
Hosea11:5 Tua bang hi napi, kei lamah amaute hong kihei nuam lo uh ahih manin Egypt gamah paikik ding uh a, Assiria mite, amauʼ kumpi hi ding hi." 
Hosea11:6 Galte in a khuapi sung uh luhin, a khuapi kulh kongpi zawlte uh suktansak ding hi. Ka mite in thu hoih lo zui kha uh ahih manin gal in susia mang ding hi." 
Hosea11:7 Ka mite in kei kiang panin pial ding ngaihsun tawntung uh a, a sangna lam ah a kiko khop uh hangin kihon khia lo ding hi." 
Hosea11:8 Israel mite aw, bangci-a hong nusia thei dinga, bangci-a hong paidak thei ding ka hi hiam? Admah khua ka suksiat bangin kong susia nuam kei a, Zeboiim khua ka bawl bangin kong bawl nuam kei hi. Note hong khasiat mahmah ka hih manin tua ci banga hih ding ka lungsimah om lo hi." 
Hosea11:9 Ka heh manin gim kong pia kei dinga, no Israel-te kong susia kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah, mihing hi loin, Pasian ka hi hi. Kei a Siangtho Pa, note tawh kong om khawm a, a hehsa-in note kiangah kong pai kei ding hi." 
Hosea11:10 Humpinelkai bangin a galte uh ka hawk san gawp dinga, tua ciangin ka mite in kei hong zui ding uh hi. Nitumna lam gam panin kei kiangah hong nawh tai ding uh hi." 
Hosea11:11 Egypt gam panin vasa bangin lawptakin hong leeng ding uh a, Assiria gam panin vakhu bangin hong leeng ding uh hi. Tua ciangin keimah in amauteʼ inn ngei sa ah ka tunpihkik ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Hosea11:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite in zuauna le khemna bekbek tawh kei hong khuhcip uh hi. Judah mite in zong a citak a Siangtho Pa keimah hong langpang lai uh hi. 
Hosea12:1 Israel mite, a nung kawikawi huih tawh kibang a, sunthapai a a nasepna uh a mawkna ahi hi. Zuauna le siatna lamsang bekbek khangsak uh hi. Assiria-te tawh kipawlna bawl uh a, Egypt-te tawh kizopna nei uh hi." 
Hosea12:2 Topa in Israel mite a mawhsak nading a thu om hi. Jakob a gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim pia dinga, ama gamtatna bangin thukkik ding hi." 
Hosea12:3 Jakob in a nu sung nangawn pek panin a sanggampa sawk pah a, a khangham ciangin zong Pasian tawh kilaii hi." 
Hosea12:4 Vantungmi tawh kilaii-in a zo hi. Tua ciangin Jakob zong kapin ama tung panin hehpihna a ngen hi. Pasian in Bethel munah amah mu-in a hopih hi. 
Hosea12:5 Ama min pen Topa, Vanglian Topa Pasian ahi hi." 
Hosea12:6 Pasianʼ huhna tawh note khempeuh kiheikik unla, thuman thutangin gamta un. Pasian muang tawntung un." 
Hosea12:7 Sumbukte in tawitehna man lo zang uh a, amaute in mi khem ding nuam a sa uh hi." 
Hosea12:8 Israel mite in, “Tu-in ka hau uh a, kote adingin neihsa tampi ka ngah uh hi,” ci uh hi. Ahi zongin a hauhna teng un a mawhna teng uh loh zo lo hi." 
Hosea12:9 Egypt gamah na om lai pek uh a kipanin kei pen noteʼ Topa Pasian ka hi a, ahi zongin tu-in tanglai hun bangin puanbuk sungah note kong teengsakkik ding hi." 
Hosea12:10 Kamsangte tungah thu ka gen hi. Maangmuhna a banbanin pia-in, kamsangte tungah thu gentehna tawh thu a gen pa zong keimah ka hi hi." 
Hosea12:11 Gilead gamah milim biakna om a, tuate a kimanna om lo hi. Gilgal gamah bawngtal tawh bia uh a, lokhote in a suang deih loh teng uh a phualphualin a cian kawikawi tawh kibangin, a biakna taute uh bangmahin kimang lo ding hi." 
Hosea12:12 Aram gamah Jakob tai a, Israel in tua lai ah zi khat thalawhin na sem a, zi thalawhna-in tuu a cing hi." 
Hosea12:13 Topa in kamsang khat zangin Egypt panin Israel-te paikhiatpih a, kamsang khatʼ nasepna tawh amaute suakta-in a nungta uh hi." 
Hosea12:14 Heh mahmah theih nadingin Israel mite gamta uh ahih manin amauteʼ Topa in amauʼ tung mahah a mawhna uh tungsak dinga, amauteʼ mawhna mah a thuaksak ding hi." 
Hosea13:1 Efraim-te beh in thu a gen ciangin a dangte lau uh a, Israel minam beh dangte in Efraim-te beh tung et uh hi. Ahi zongin Baal milim biakna hangin amaute khial uh hi; tua thu hangin si ding uh hi." 
Hosea13:2 Tua hi napi-in amaute khial thuah semsem uh a, a biak ding uh milim a bawl uh hi. Amauʼ ngunte milimin bawl uh a, a hoihtakin khutsiamte a bawlsak uh hi. Tua ciangin, “Hihte tungah biakna pia un,” a ci uh hi. Mihing in milim bia-in nam tazen uh hi." 
Hosea13:3 Tua ciangin amaute pen zingsang a kaai meii lum, a maimang pak daitui, ancilna panin huih in a letkhiat ansi, meikhu suahna-a a pai meikhu bangin a maimang ding uh hi." 
Hosea13:4 Kei pen Egypt gam panin note a hong paikhiatpih noteʼ Topa Pasian ka hi hi. Tua hun lai-in kei sim loh Pasian dang na thei kei uh a, note a hong hon khia pa kei bek ka hi hi." 
Hosea13:5 Sehnel gam keuna sungah note a hong kem pa keimah ka hi hi. 
Hosea13:6 Ahi zongin gam hoihna mun tungin na gil uh a vah ciangin na lungsim uh kiphasakin kei nong mangngilh uh hi. 
Hosea13:7 Tua ahih manin humpinelkai bangin note hong su gawpin, kamkei bangin na pai nading uh lampi ah kong pang hi." 
Hosea13:8 A no a kilaksak vompi bangin note hong su gawpin kong bal gawp ding hi. Humpinelkai bangin hong phualnek pahin, gamsate bangin kong bal kek gawp ding hi." 
Hosea13:9 No Israel-te kong su gawp ding hi. Kua in note hong huh zo ding ahi hiam? 
Hosea13:10 Na kumpi ding uh le na makai dingte uh nong ngen uh hi. Tu-in note hong hon dingin na hong nget uh na kumpipa uh koi ah om a, note hong hu ding na makaite uh koi lai tung khin ahi hiam?" 
Hosea13:11 Na kumpi dingte uh kong ngawh piak a, ka hehluatna hangin amaute ka la khiakik khin hi." 
Hosea13:12 Israel miteʼ mawhna le a khialhna teng uh limtakin kiciamteh a, tua ciaptehnate limtakin kikem hi." 
Hosea13:13 Israel mite, naungek bangin a suahkhiat hun tung napi-in, a hai luat manun suak khia loin a nu uh sung mahah omom lai uh hi." 
Hosea13:14 Misi khua pan ka tan khia diam, sihna khut pan ka hon khia diam? Sihna aw, na gu koi ah om hiam. Misi khua aw, na suksiatna koi ah om hiam." 
Hosea13:15 Israel mite kiak bangin a pung ahi zongin sehnel gam panin nisuahna huih sa mahmah ka nungsak dinga, a tuikhukte uh le a tuinakte uh a kangsak ding hi. Tua huih in a manpha nate le deih theih peuhpeuh leen mang ding hi." 
Hosea13:16 Israel-te in a Pasian uh lehdo uh ahih manin a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Gal sungah amaute si ding uh a, a naungekte uh lei kidenna dinga, a nupi naupaiite uh kikui kham ding hi, a ci hi." 
Hosea14:1 Israel-te aw, noteʼ Topa Pasianʼ lamah kiheikik un. Na mawhna hangun note na puk khin uh hi." 
Hosea14:2 Topaʼ lamah kihei unla, “Ka mawhna khempeuh uh hong maisak inla, kong thumna uh hong ngai in. Ka kampauna bangun kong gamta ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:3 Assiria mite in hong hon khia zo ngei lo dinga, sakol galkapte in zong hong hu zo ngei lo ding uh hi. Koteʼ bawl sa milimte pen Pasian hi, ka ci nawn kei ding uh hi. A cimawh mite in nangma tung panin hehpihna a ngah lamtak uh ka thei uh hi,” ci-in thu ngen un." 
Hosea14:4 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka mite tungah heh nawn lo ka hih manin ka kiangah ka mite ka samkik dinga, lungsim takpi tawh amaute ka it ding hi." 
Hosea14:5 Gam keuna mun a guahzu bangin Israel mite tungah nuntakna guah ka hi ding hi. Paak bangin amaute palh ding uh a, Lebanon gam a singkungte bangin zung thuk khakin a kip ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:6 Amaute meeng thakin oliv kung bangin melhoih ding uh a, Lebanon Mual bangin namtui ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:7 Keima liim nuai ah khatvei hong omkik ding uh hi. Huan hoih sunga a po ankung hoihte bang ding uh a, leenggui gah pha bangin tampi a pha ding uh hi. Lebanon gam leenggahzu bangin minthang ding uh hi." 
Hosea14:8 Israel mite in milim bia kha nawn lo ding uh hi. Amauteʼ thungetna pia-in amaute ka kem ding hi. Amaute, a hing tawntung singkung kep bangin ka kem ding hi; amauteʼ thupha ngah khempeuh keima kiang pan ahi hi,” a ci hi." 
Hosea14:9 Mipil, thu ngaihsun theite in hih thute thei telin limtakin ciamteh tahen. Topaʼ lampi tang mahmah a, a thutang mite in tua lampi a tawn uh hi. Mawhneite in tua lampi tawn lo ahih manin a puk uh hi." 
Joel1:1 Pethuelʼ tapa Joel tungah hih bangin Topaʼ thu hong tung hi: 
Joel1:2 No khangham zaw diakte aw, ngai un; Judah gam mi khempeuh aw, na bil uh ngat un. Noteʼ khan sung ahi a, na pu na pate uh khan sung ahi zongin, hih bang thu piang ngei peuhmah ahi hiam?" 
Joel1:3 Hih thute khempeuh na tate uh kiangah gen unla, na tate un amauʼ tateʼ tungah na gen sawn uh henla, amaute in a khangsawnte tungah na gen sawn leuleu uh hen." 
Joel1:4 A pettan kaupheteʼ nek bang teng, kauphe honte in ne tum a, kauphe honteʼ nek bang teng, a tuan kauphete in ne tum a, a tuan kaupheteʼ nek bang teng, a susia kauphete in ne mangkhin uh hi." 
Joel1:5 No zukhamte aw, tho unla kap un. No leenggahzu nete aw, thumin tau un. Na zunek ding teng uh bei mang khinta hi." 
Joel1:6 Kauphe honpi in i gam hong sim a, amaute tam mahmah uh a, hat mahmah uh hi. A ha uh humpinelkai ha bangin hiam a, humpi-nelkaipi ha bangin gupha mahmah hi." 
Joel1:7 Amaute in i leenggui teng susia mangkhin a, i theikung teng khempeuh ne tum mangkhin uh hi. A hawng khempeuh ne tum uh a, a hiangte kang sengsang hi." 
Joel1:8 Nungak khat, a teenpih ding a lawmpa in a sihsan ciangin a kah bangin note zong kapin thum un." 
Joel1:9 Topaʼ biakinn ah biakna-in piak ding an le leenggahzu om nawn lo a, Topaʼ na a sem siampite thumin a tau uh hi." 
Joel1:10 Lo ante kisusia a, leengguite keutum hi. Oliv kungte keugaw a, lo lai ah bangmah om nawn lo ahih manin leitang lungzuangin a thum hi." 
Joel1:11 Lokhote aw, dah un; leenggui ciingte aw, kap un; mangbuh le mangbuhham, lo an khempeuh a bei ta hi." 
Joel1:12 Leengguite keu a, theikungte vuai ta hi. Mang kawlsingte, nisuhte, epel kungte a kipan singkung khempeuh keu mangkhin hi. Mihingte a lungdamna ding teng zong a maimang ta hi." 
Joel1:13 Siampite aw, puanhampi silhin kap un; biakna tau-a nasemte aw, thumin tau un. Ka Pasianʼ na a semte aw, biakinn sungah tum unla, zan thapai-in dahna lim puanhampi silh un. Noteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn sungah piak ding an le leenggahzu khat zong om nawn lo hi." 
Joel1:14 An tan ding thu pia unla, a thupi biak kikhopna bawl un. Noteʼ Topa Pasianʼ biakinn sungah makaite le gam mi khempeuh kaikhawm unla, Topaʼ tungah kiko-in thum un." 
Joel1:15 Kalai! A hun hong nai ta! Topaʼ ni hong nai ta a, Vanglian paʼ suksiatna hun hong nai ta hi." 
Joel1:16 Eima muh mahmah in lo ante kisusia a, eiteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn sungah lungdamna a bei ta hi." 
Joel1:17 Guahtui om lo ahih manin khai kituhte khempeuh lei sungah keucip a, an khol ding bangmah om nawn lo ahih manin ansalte khempeuh a vekin kisia khinta hi." 
Joel1:18 A gilkial tuu le bawngte cimawhin tau uh a, lo nona mun om nawn het lo ahih manin ganhing honte cimawh uh a, tuuhonte in zong haksatna thuak uh hi." 
Joel1:19 Topa aw, nangma tungah kong kiko hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mei in a kattum tawh kibangin, lo nona leitang khempeuh le singkung khempeuh keu mang khinta hi." 
Joel1:20 Luitui luang khempeuh kangcip khinta a, meiʼ kattum bangin lo nona khempeuh keucip khin ahih manin nangma tungah gamsate nangawn hong kiko uh hi." 
Joel2:1 Zion mual tungah peengkul tum unla, Pasianʼ mual siangtho tungah pataukohna tum un. Topa ni hong nai ta ahih manin gam sung mi khempeuh lau ta uh hen." 
Joel2:2 Tua ni pen a mial, a lungzinhuai, meii kai-in khuazinʼ ni ahi ding hi. Mual tung a meiipi kai bangin sim zawh lohin kauphe honpi hong leeng muaimuai hi. Cikmahin hih bang thu omngei nai lo a, cikmah ciangin zong omkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:3 A madawkte, a hal tum thei meikuang bang a, a nungdalte, mei-am alh tawh kibang hi. Amau hong tun ma-in gam sungteng khempeuh Eden huan a bang hi a, amauʼ khit ciangin a kinusiacip keugaw gam tawh kibang hi. Amaute kiang pan a suakta bangmah om lo hi." 
Joel2:4 Amauteʼ mel sakolte tawh kibang a, sakol galkapte bangin a tai uh hi." 
Joel2:5 Mual tung tengah a tuan zuazua laitakun sakol leeng ging zuazuate le gamlak a lopa omte kaangin a puak ziazua tawh kibang uh a, galsim dingin a kithawi, galkap honpi tawh kibang uh hi." 
Joel2:6 Amaute hong pai ciangin mi khempeuh lau uh a, a maitang uh daang gawp hi." 
Joel2:7 Galte bangin hong sim uh a, galkapte bangin kulh tungah hong kah uh hi. A vekpi-in tangtakin mai hong nawt uh a, a hong heem pai kuamah om lo hi." 
Joel2:8 Amauʼ lampi san ciat hong tawn uh a, a kiphu kha kuamah om lo uh hi. Amau mah dal nadingin a kibawlte hong phu gawp uh a, khawl het loin hong paisuak uh hi." 
Joel2:9 Khuapi sung hong kidenna uh a, kulh tung khawngah tai zaizai uh hi. Inn tung khawngah kah to ngeingai uh a, gutate bangin tawlet ah hong lut uh hi." 
Joel2:10 Amauʼ mai ah leipi liing a, vanpi nangawn liing damdam hi. Ni le kha zong mial ta a, aksite zong taang nawn lo hi." 
Joel2:11 Ama mihonpite tam mahmah uh ahih manin amaute thu pia-in a mai uh ah Topa awng a, ama thupiakna bangin a semte hat mahmah uh hi. Topaʼ ni ding kihtakhuai mahmah ahih manin a thuak zo ding kua om ding ahi hiam?" 
Joel2:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tu mahmah nangawnin lungsim tak tawh kisikkikin, an tangin, kapin, thumna tawh kei kiangah hong paikik un." 
Joel2:13 Na dah taktakna uh lungkhamna tawh langsak unla, na puante uh a bal kek bek hi kei un,” hong ci hi. Topa, noteʼ Pasian kiangah ciahkik un. Amah migi mahmah in hehpihna a nei hi a, a lungduai-in hong huh nuam tawntung a, gim hong pia loin hong maisak nuam tawntung hi." 
Joel2:14 Topa, eiteʼ Pasian in a lungsim hong kheelin an hauhsakna tawh thupha hong pia kha ding hi. Tua hileh ama tungah an le leenggahzu tawh biakna i pia thei ding hi." 
Joel2:15 Zion mual tungah peengkul tumin antanna ding thu pia unla, biak kikhopna khat nei un." 
Joel2:16 Mite kaikhawm unla, amaute siansuah un. A khangham mite sam unla, naupangte zong kaikhawm un. Nawi ne lai naungekte zong paipih un. A kiteeng cil nungak le tangvalte nangawn in a omna uh nusia-in hong pai uh hen." 
Joel2:17 Topaʼ na a sem siampite, biakinn sung innliim le biakna tau kikalah kapin thu ngen uh henla, “ Topa aw, na mite hong hehpih in. Minam dangte in, ‘Na Pasian uh koi ah om ahi hiam,’ ci-in kote hong simmawhsak kei in. Amauteʼ nuihsatin kote hong omsak kei in,” ci uh hen." 
Joel2:18 Tua ciangin Topa in ama leitang hong donin, ama mite hong hehpih hi." 
Joel2:19 Topa in ama miteʼ thungetna dawng a, “Tu-in note tungah an, leenggahzu le sathau kong pia a, na kham takun na ne ding uh hi. Minam dangteʼ simmawhin na om nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Joel2:20 Leilu lam gam panin a hong pai mite, note kiang panin sehnel gamah ka hawl khia dinga, a madawkte uh nisuahna tuipi sungah khia-in, a nungdalte uh nitumna tuipi sungah ka khia dinga, amaute in note tungah hong bawlna hangin a luanghawmte uh uih gawp ding hi." 
Joel2:21 “Lote aw, lau nawn kei unla, lungdam kipakin om un. Topa in note adingin a lianpi hong bawlsak zo hi." 
Joel2:22 Ganhingte aw, lau nawn kei un. Gam sung tengah lo no ta a, singkungte gah ta-in, theigah le leenggah tampi a om hi." 
Joel2:23 “Zion mite aw, kipak unla, Topa na Pasian uh tungah lungdam ta un. Note in an na hauh theih nadingun nidang a bangin khuapi guah, tuk guah le phalbi guah, a hoihbek zah hong zusak hi." 
Joel2:24 Na ancilna phual uh an tawh kidim dinga, na koihna uh umlebeel khempeuh leenggahzu le sathau tawh kidim ding hi." 
Joel2:25 Note a hong sim dingin ka hong sawl kauphe honpi, a tuan kauphe, a susia kauphe, a pettan kauphe, hih ka galkap honte in a hong neksak kum sungin a piang ding teng tang kong piakik ding hi." 
Joel2:26 Tu-in nek ding tampi nei-in na gil uh vah dinga, note adingin a lamdang nate a hong bawlsak Topa na Pasian uh na phat ding uh hi. Tua ciangin ka mite hong kisimmawh nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:27 Tua ciangin no Israel mite lakah kei ka omna thu, keimah Topa pen noteʼ Pasian ka hihna thu, kei sim loh kuamah dang a om lohna na thei ding uh hi. Ka mite hong kisimmawh nawn lo ding hi." 
Joel2:28 “Tua khit ciangin mi khempeuh tungah ka kha ka sung dinga, na puteekte un mang manin na tangvalte un maang mu ding uh hi." 
Joel2:29 Tua hun ciangin nasem numei le nasem pasalte tung nangawn ah ka kha ka sung ding hi. 
Joel2:30 “Tua ciangin vantung le leitungah hilhkholhna lim ahi, sisan kiluansakna, meikatna le meikhu lompi hong om ding hi." 
Joel2:31 Topaʼ ni, tua a lauhuai hun a hong tun ma-in ni hong mialin, kha, sisan hong bang ding hi." 
Joel2:32 Ahi zongin Topaʼ tungah huhna a ngen khempeuh in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi. Topaʼ gen sa bangmahin Zion Mual le Jerusalem khua sungah a suakta mi om ding uh hi. Topa in a teel mite, suakta ding uh hi." 
Joel3:1 “Tua hun ciangin Judah le Jerusalem, a nidang hun lai mah uh ka bangsakkik ding hi." 
Joel3:2 Minam dang khempeuh kaikhawmin Jehoshafat Kuam ah ka paipih ding hi. Ka mihingte tungah a bawlnasa uh hangin tua munah amaute thu ka khen ding hi. Amaute in Israel mite, gam dangah thehthang uh a, ka gam sungteng phel hawm mangkhin uh hi." 
Joel3:3 A galmatte uh kua in ngah ding, ci-in ai san uh a, zu le numei lei nadingin numeino le naupangnote sila-in a zuak uh hi." 
Joel3:4 “Taia khua, Sidon khua le Filistia gam khempeuh aw, kei bang hong cih nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Bang khat peuhpeuh hangin hong thukkik nuamin a kinei na hi uh hiam? Kei a hong thukkik na hih uh leh, kei zong manlang takin kong thukkik pah ding hi." 
Joel3:5 Ka ngun, ka kham le ka na manpha tampite la-in, na biakinn sung uh ah na puak uh hi." 
Joel3:6 Judah le Jerusalem mite, amauʼ gam panin gamlapi ah paipihin, Grik mite tungah na zuak uh hi." 
Joel3:7 Tu-in amaute na zuakna uh mun panin a la khiakik ding ka hi a, amaute tungah na bawl bangun note tungah kong bawl ding hi." 
Joel3:8 Na tanute uh le na tapate uh Judah mite tungah ka zuak dinga, amaute in a gamlapi-a om Seba minamte tungah zuak sawn ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in gen khinzo hi." 
Joel3:9 “Minam dangte tungah hih bangin thu zaksakna bawl in: Galhang mite sam unla, galdo dingin kithawi un. Galkap khempeuh kaikhawmin hong kuan un!" 
Joel3:10 Lokhawhna tute namsau-in seek unla, singhiang heuhna temkawite teipi-in seek un. A thahat lote nangawn in do uh hen." 
Joel3:11 Kimkot ah a om minam dang khempeuh aw, manlangin hong kuan unla, tua kuamah hong kikhawm un. Topa aw, na galhangte hong paipih suk in." 
Joel3:12 “Minam dangte hong kithawi henla, Jehoshafat Kuam ah hong kuan suk uh hen. Kimkot ah a om minam dang khempeuhʼ thu a khen dingin Topa ahi keimah, tua munah ka tu ding hi." 
Joel3:13 Amaute gilo mahmah uh ahih manin an lak huna buhsi bangin at gawp unla, leenggahtui dawhna a dimletin a luang, leenggah cilna kuang sunga om leenggah bangin tuancil gawp un,” a ci hi." 
Joel3:14 Thukhenna Kuam ah a tul a thenin om uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai munah Topaʼ ni hong tung baih ding hi. 
Joel3:15 Ni le kha mial ta a, aksite zong taang nawn lo hi." 
Joel3:16 Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawk suk a, Jerusalem panin hong awngkek a, vanpi le leipi a liing damdam hi. Ahi zongin Topa pen ama miteʼ belh pa hi a, Israel mite a hu ding hi." 
Joel3:17 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Israel-te aw, ka mual siangtho Zion tungah a teeng keimah pen Topa noteʼ Pasian ka hihna na hong thei ding uh hi. Jerusalem pen a siangtho biakna khuapi hi dinga, gamdang mite in zokik nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Joel3:18 Tua hun ciangin mual tung khempeuh leenggui lo hi dinga, mual neute khempeuh tungah bawng hon dim dinga, Judah gam sung khempeuh ah tui tampi om ding hi. Topaʼ biakinn panin luitui khat hong luang khia dinga, Shitthim kuam sung khempeuh a kawtsak ding hi." 
Joel3:19 “Amaute in Judah gam simin, mawhnei lo mite that uh ahih manin, Egypt gam, sehnel gam suakin, Edom gam, gam sia suak ding hi." 
Joel3:20 A kithat miteʼ phu keimah in ka la dinga, a mawhte ka khah khong kei ding hi. Judah gamah mi teeng tawntung ta dinga, Jerusalem ah a khangkhangin mi om tawntung dinga, Zion Mual ah Topa a teeng ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Tekoa khua-a a teeng tuucingte lakah Amos a kici mi khat om hi. Uzziah pen Judah kumpi hi-in Joashʼ tapa Jeroboam in Israel kumpi a sep laitak, zinlin ma kum nih hun laitakin Pasian in Amos tungah hih thute kilangsak hi." 
Amos1:2 Amos in, “Zion Mual panin Topa hong hawk suk a, Jerusalem khua panin hong awngkek hi. Tua ahih manin lo nona gam teng keu gawp a, Karmel mual dawn dum dide teng kausan ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos1:3 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Damaskas khua mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in an gawina suang tawh gawizan bangin, Gilead gam mite gawi gawp uh hi." 
Amos1:4 Tua ahih manin Hazael innkuante mei tawh ka hal dinga, a meikuang in Kumpi Benhadadʼ mun muanhuaite kaang tum ding hi." 
Amos1:5 Damaskas khua kulhpi zawlte ka sutan dinga, Aven Kuam a teeng mi khempeuh le Betheden Kuam sungah a om gam ukte khempeuh keimah in ka susia dinga, Syria mite ahihleh Kir gamah salin kipaipih ding hi." 
Amos1:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Gaza khua mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minam bup khat sal dingin manin, Edom mite tungah ap uh hi." 
Amos1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Gaza khuapi kulh ka kaangsak dinga, a mun muanhuai teng a kaang tum mang ding hi." 
Amos1:8 Ashdod khuapi ah a teeng mite ka la khia dinga, Ashkelon khuapi ukte ka beisak ding hi. Ekron khuapi ka su gawp dinga, Filistia mi a omlaite si ding uh hi." 
Amos1:9 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Taia khua mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in minam bup khat Edom mite tungah ap uh a, lawmta dinga a thuciamna uh zui lo uh hi." 
Amos1:10 Tua ahih ciangin Taia khuapi kulh ka kaang tumsak dinga, a mun muanhuai teng kaang tum mang ding hi." 
Amos1:11 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Edom mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a sanggam uh Israel-te namsau tawh delh uh a, hehpihna lungsim nei lo uh hi. A hehna uh damsak ngei lo uh a, a tawntungin heh niloh uh hi." 
Amos1:12 Tua ahih ciangin Teman gam sung khempeuh ka kaang tumsak dinga, Bozrah khuapi mun muanhuai teng kaang tum ding hi." 
Amos1:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Ammon mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in huaihamin gam a deih thuah manun Gilead gam sim gawp uh hi." 
Amos1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Rabbah khuapi kulh ka hal tum dinga, a mun muanhuai teng khempeuh kaang tum ding hi. Galdo a kikona aw ging dinga, tua kidona awging khuapi huihnung bang ding hi." 
Amos1:15 A kumpipa uh le a uliante uh salin kiman ding hi. 
Amos2:1 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Moab mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leiseek cianna ah a kizang leikang a zat dingin Edom kumpipaʼ guhte a hal uh hi." 
Amos2:2 Tua ahih ciangin Moab gam sung khempeuh ka kaang tumsak dinga, Kerioth khuapi mun muanhuai teng a kaang tum ding hi. Galkapteʼ otna le peengkul kitumna lak, gal kidona gamlum sungah Moab mite si ding uh hi." 
Amos2:3 Tuate lakah Moab gam ukte ka sisak dinga, a uliante ka that ding hi." 
Amos2:4 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Judah mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in ka thukhamte nialin ka thuhilhnate zui lo uh hi. A pu a pate un a na biak sa pasian man lote mah in amaute lam pialsak uh hi." 
Amos2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Judah gam sungteng ka kaang tumsak dinga, Jerusalem mun muanhuai teng a kaang tum ding hi." 
Amos2:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite thum vei a khialh khit, a li veina hangin pel loin amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in leiba a loh zawh loh man bekun midik kimlai zuak uh a, khedap bu khat man a loh zawh loh man bekun mi cimawhte sila-in a zuak uh hi." 
Amos2:7 Amaute in mizawngteʼ lutang leivui lakah tuancil uh a, keima min siangtho a ninsak dingin biakinn-a numei paktatte kiangah tangvalte le papite a pai uh hi." 
Amos2:8 Biakna tau gei khempeuh ah amaute lum uh a, sum leitawina hangin a puan kepsakte uh a phah uh hi. Amaute in a Pasian uhʼ biakinn sungah leibate kiang pan a laksak uh leenggahzu a dawn uh hi." 
Amos2:9 Ahi zongin amaute ka khualna hangin taamtak sing bangin a sang mahmah, tawsaw kung bangin a khauh tuak mahmah Amor mite amau adingin ka suksiatsak a, a dawn pan a kipan a zung dongin ka suk maisak hi." 
Amos2:10 No ka mihingte, Egypt gam pek panin hong paikhiat pihin, gamlak ah kum sawm li sung kong makaih a, note adingin Amor miteʼ gam kong pia hi." 
Amos2:11 Na tapate uh pawl khat kamsang dingin ka teel a, na tangvalte uh pawl khat Nazir mi dingin ka teel hi. Israel aw, tu-a ka gen bangmah hi lo ahi hiam, Topa in kong ci khin hi." 
Amos2:12 Ahi zongin note in Nazir mite leenggahzu na dawnsak uh a, kamsangte in ka thu a gen lohna dingun thu na pia uh hi." 
Amos2:13 Tu-in buhlomte in a pua bawngleeng a netcip suk bangin note na omna mun uh ah kong nengcip suk ding hi. 
Amos2:14 A tai hatte nangawn suakta zo lo dinga, a thahatte a hatna bei dinga, galhangte in amauʼ nuntakna hu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Amos2:15 Thaltawite nangawn in do zo lo dinga, a tai hatte nangawn kisuahtak zo lo dinga, sakol tung tuangte nangawn in a nuntakna suahtak zo lo ding hi." 
Amos2:16 Tua ni ciangin galhang pente nangawn tai mang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos3:1 Israel mite aw, noteʼ lang khat a Topaʼ thugen, hih thu limtakin ngai un: Egypt gam panin na minam bupun note kong paikhiatpih hi." 
Amos3:2 Leitung minam khempeuh lakah note bek hong thei-in, note bek ka hong don hi. Tua ahih manin na khialhna khempeuh uh hangin note gim kong pia ding hi." 
Amos3:3 Mi nih, thukimna om masa lopi-in lampi ah tonkhawm thei uh ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:4 A samat ding mu lopi-in, gamlak ah humpinelkai mawk hawk ahi hiam? Samat nei lopi-in, a kua sungah humpinelkai khanglai mawk hawk ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:5 Thang antah om lopi-in leilak a thang ah vasa mawk awk ahi hiam? A su khat om lopi-in, thang kimawk sai ahi hiam?" 
Amos3:6 Khuapi sungah pataukohna gal peengkul a kitum ciangin mite lau loin om mawk thei ahi hiam? Topaʼ tunsak lohpi-in khuapi sungah lauhuaina mawk tun ahi hiam? 
Amos3:7 Topa Pasian in ama nasem kamsangte tungah ama geelna theisak masa lopi-in bangmah hih het lo hi. 
Amos3:8 Humpinelkai a hawk ciangin lau loin ki-om thei ahi hiam? Topa Pasian in thu a gen ciangin kua in ama thu gen loin om thei ding ahi hiam? 
Amos3:9 Samaria gam munmuanhuai ah a om mite le Egypt gam munmuanhuai ah a om mite tungah thu zasak unla, “Samaria ah hong kikhawm unla, tua lai-a buaina lianpite le kinenniamnate hong mu un,” ci un." 
Amos3:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih mite in a manin gamtat ding thei lo uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, miʼ na a suh uh vante tawh a inn lianpipite uh kidimsak uh hi." 
Amos3:11 Tua ahih ciangin galte in a gam uh umcihin, a panmun muanhuai teng uh susia gawp dinga, a inn lianpipite uh luh gawp ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos3:12 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Humpinelkaiʼ nek baang tuu khebom nih ahi a, a bil them khat bek ahi zongin tuucingpa in a ngah tei mah bangin, tutphah nip kiu khat le lupna them khat tawh a kibang, Samaria sungah a om Israel mi tawmno khat suakta tei ding hi." 
Amos3:13 Tu-in ngai un: Jakobʼ suanlekhakte hilh khol un, Vanglian Pasian ahi, Topa Pasian in ci hi." 
Amos3:14 Amauʼ khialhna hangin Israel gim ka piak ni ciangin, Bethel a biakna taute zong ka susia dinga, biakna tau kite kitanin leilak ah kia ding hi." 
Amos3:15 Keimah in phalbi le khuakhal innte ka susia dinga, saiha tawh a kibawl inn hoihte zong kisia-in, inn lian khempeuh bei mang ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:1 Bashan gam bawngpi bangin a thau mahmah, mizawngte nengniamin mi cimawhte a su gawp, na pasalte uh kiangah, “Ka dawn ding bang khatpeuh hong puak in,” ci-in a vaikhak no Samaria numeite aw, hih thu limtakin ngai un:" 
Amos4:2 Topa Pasian a siangtho ahih mah bangin, amah in kamciamna khat bawl khin a, “Amaute in sikkawi tawh note hong kaihkhiat hun ding, ni khat ni ciangin hong tung taktak dinga, note khempeuh sikkawi ah a awk ngasa na bang ding uh hi." 
Amos4:3 Na omna uh tawh a kinai pen kulh vang tawnin, ganhing si sa kaihkhiat bangin hong kikai khia dinga, ninlom lakah hong kilawn khia ding hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:4 Israel mite aw, Bethel a mun siangtho ah va pai unla, tua lai ah khialhna va bawl un. Gilgal ah va pai unla, va khial semsem un. Zingsang simin biakna va pia unla, ni thum simin sawm-ah-khat pia un." 
Amos4:5 Lungdam kohna-in silngo sawh anlum va pia unla, utthu-a biakpiaknate va pia-in va kisial un. Hihte pawl pen noteʼ hih nop pawl ahi hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:6 Na khuapi khempeuh uh ah kial tungsakin, annek ding nei loin note a hong koihpa pen keimah hi napi-in, keima lamah nong kihei tuan kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:7 Tua ahih manin anlak hun ding kha thum bek in a sap laitak, lo lai-a om ante in guahtui a sap mahmah laitakin guah ka zusak kei a, khuapi khat bekah zusakin a dangte ah ka zusak kei hi. Lo khat bekah guah zu a, a zuk lohna lote a keutum hi." 
Amos4:8 Dangtak manin thaneemin khuapi nih khuapi thum mite tui zong dingin a khua veengte kiangah pai uh a, ahi zongin tui dawn tawm ding nangawn a kicing om lo hi. Tua hi napi-in kei kiangah nong kihei tuan kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:9 Na ankungte uh lung nesakin ka vulsak a, na ankungte uh cinasakin a kang dikdekin ka bawl hi. Na huante uh le na leenggui lote uh a hawmguakin ka koih hi. Na theikungte uh le na oliv kungte uh kauphe in gai khin hi. Tua bang hi napi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:10 Egypt gamah ka hong tunsak bangin note lakah gimna kong tungsak hi. Gal sungah na tangval teng uh ka sisak a, na sakolte uh kong paih khiatsak hi. Na giahphual sungte uh a uih mahmahna tawh na nakngek uh kong zensak hi. Tua bang hi napi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:11 Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite ka suksiat bangin note pawl khat kong susia hi. Meikhuk panin a kiteen khia singkhuah khat tawh na kibang uh hi. Tua bang hi napi-in kei lamah nong kihei kei uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos4:12 Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite aw, hih bangin note tungah kong bawl ding hi. Hih bangin hong hih ding ka hih manin Pasianʼ thukhenna a thuak dingin kiging un." 
Amos4:13 Bang hang hiam cih leh mualte bawlin huihte a piangsak pa, ama ngaihsutna mihingte tungah kilangsakin, sun nitaang kimlai zanin a bawlpa, leitung khempeuh a ukpaʼ min, Topa, Vanglian Pasian ahi hi." 
Amos5:1 Israel mite aw, kap kawmin kong thugenna, limtakin ngai un:" 
Amos5:2 Nungak Israel puk khin a, thokik ngei nawn lo ding hi. Leilak ah lum dildel a, a phong to ding kuamah om lo hi." 
Amos5:3 Tua ahih manin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel khuapi khat in galkap tul khat kuan khiasak a, ahi zongin za khat bek hong ciahkik hi. Khuapi dang khat in galkap za khat kuan khiasak a, ahi zongin sawm khat bek hong ciahkik hi." 
Amos5:4 Tua ahih manin Topa in Israel mite tungah hih bangin ci hi: Kei hong zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. 
Amos5:5 A bia dingin Beer-sheba ah pai kei un. Bethel ah kei hong zong kei un; a mawkna suak ding hi. Gilgal ah zong lut kei un; Gilgal mite, sal a suak ding hi lel hi." 
Amos5:6 Topa zong un; tua hileh na nungta ding uh hi. Amah na zon kei uh leh Josef mite tungah meikuang bangin amah hong kuang dinga, tua mei in Bethel a om mite kangtumin, tua mei a phelh ding kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Amos5:7 Thutang lumletin thuman mite lei a denna, note adingin bangzahin nasia ding ahi hiam?" 
Amos5:8 Van a om aksi Seguk le Zawlzawngte bawlin, khuamial pen khuavak suaksak a, sun pen zan suaksakin, tuipi panin tuite sam khia a, leitungah tua tui a bua khia pa a min pen Topa ahi hi." 
Amos5:9 Amah in kulh muanhuaite le mun muanhuaite thakhatin susia thei hi. 
Amos5:10 Note in thukhen zumah thutang a deih pa na mudah uh a, thuman a gen pa na hua uh hi." 
Amos5:11 Note in mizawngte tuancilin, a an neih teng khempeuh uh laksak na hih manun, suangseek inn na lam hangun tua suang inn sungah na teeng kha kei ding uh a, leenggui lo hoih na neih hangun a leenggahzu na dawn kha kei ding uh hi." 
Amos5:12 Bang hang hiam cih leh na khialhna tampite uh le na mawhna tampite uh a vekin ka thei khin hi. Thuman mite gimsakin, sumgolh na la uh a, thukhenna zumah mizawngteʼ thu a manin na khen kei uh hi." 
Amos5:13 Tua ahih manin hih bang hun siat hun laitakin thu ngaihsun thei mite, pau loin a om khikhe, lamdangsak ding hi lo hi." 
Amos5:14 Note na nuntak theih nadingun siatna gamta loin, thumanin gamtat ding hanciam un. Tua hileh na gen sa uh mah bangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi." 
Amos5:15 Thusia mudahin thupha deih unla, thukhen zumah a manin thu khen un. Tua hileh Josef minam a suakta sunte tungah Topa, Vanglian Pasian hong thunuam kha thei ding hi." 
Amos5:16 Tua ahih ciangin Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Mihon omna lamka bom khempeuh ah mite in na sa-in thumin tau ding uh a, kongzing khempeuh ah kap ding uh hi. Khua neu a mite a thum dingin kisam dinga, a kah siam mite a kap dingin kicial ding hi." 
Amos5:17 Note gim a pia dingin hong pai ding ka hih manin leenggui lo khempeuh ah kahna aw ging ding hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos5:18 Topaʼ ni hong tun ding a ngaklah note adingin bangzah takin lauhuai ding ahi hiam? Note adingin tua ni a hoihna hong om ding ahi hiam? Tua ni pen lungzin ni hi a, lungtaii ni hi lo hi." 
Amos5:19 Humpinelkai kihta-in vompi a tuak pa tawh kibang ding hi. Tua ahih kei leh mi khat a inn ah hong tai a, a kawmah a khut a ngak ciangin gul in a tuk tawh kibang ding hi." 
Amos5:20 Topaʼ ni pen khuavak ni hi loin khuamial ni hi a, maitaina a om lo lungzin ni ahi hi." 
Amos5:21 Na biakna pawite uh mudahin ka deih kei a, na biak kikhopnate uh ah ka lung a kim kei hi." 
Amos5:22 Meihal biakna le an tawh biakna nong paipih uh hangin tuate kong sang kei ding hi. Thunuam a biakpiak nadingin na hong paipih uh a thau mahmah ganhingte zong et-in ka nei vet kei ding hi. 
Amos5:23 La sa-in na gamlumnate uh khawl un; na lasakna uh a gingte ka za nuam kei hi. 
Amos5:24 Thutang, tui bangin luang khiasak unla, thuman, a kang ngei lo tui bangin luangsak un." 
Amos5:25 Israel mite aw, gamlak ah kum sawm li na om sungun gan go-a biakna le keima tungah piakna bangmah nong bawl kei uh hi." 
Amos5:26 Tua hi napi tu-in note adingin na bawl tawm uh aksi pasian-te ahi Sakkuth le Kaivuan milimte na biak manun 
Amos5:27 Damaskas khengin gamdang khat ah sal dingin note kong paisak ding hi, Vanglian Pasian min a nei Topa in ci hi." 
Amos6:1 Israel minamte in muanin a hong neih, i minam lakah ulian ahi, Zion ah nuam takin a om hithiat, Samaria ah lungmuang takin a om note adingin zumhuai mahmah hi." 
Amos6:2 Kalneh khua ah pai unla limtakin va en un. Tua ciangin Hamath khuapi lian ah va paisuak unla, Filistia-teʼ khuapi Gath khua dong va pai suk un. Judah le Israel kumpi gamte sangin hoih zaw tuan a, amauteʼ gam pen noteʼ gam sangin lian zaw tuan ahi hiam?" 
Amos6:3 Noteʼ tungah siatna hong tun ni ding, a kipelh theih nading na hanciam uh a, ahi zongin tua bang na hihnate un, siatna khangsak semsem zawsop hi." 
Amos6:4 Saiha kibawl lupna tungah a lum hithiat, tutphah nip tungah a kizia hiathiat, tuuno sa le bawng no sa, duhduhin a ne note in gimna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Amos6:5 David bangin la phuah nuam na sa uh a, lasaknate na tum nuam uh hi." 
Amos6:6 Leenggahzu hai lian pipi-in na dawn uh a, sathau hoih pente tawh na kizut uh hi. Ahi zongin Josef minamteʼ siatna hangin them khat zong na dah het kei uh hi." 
Amos6:7 Tua ahih ciangin note pen salin a pai masa pente na hi ding uh a, na nopsakna teng uh a bei ta ding ahi hi." 
Amos6:8 Topa Pasian thupi takin kiciam khin a, Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Israel-teʼ kiphatsakna ka hua a, a mun muanhuaite uh ka mu nuam kei hi. Tua ahih manin a khuapi le a sunga a om teng, galteʼ khut sungah ka pia ding hi." 
Amos6:9 Inn khat sungah mi sawm bek nangawn a suakta a om laina a om leh, tuate khempeuh zong a si khin veve ding hi." 
Amos6:10 Mi khatpeuh a sihna inn panin a vui dingin a si pua khia-in, a behte khatpeuh hong pai ciangin, inn sung tawng ah a bu mi khatpeuh kiangah, “Hih lai ah a si dang a om hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Om lo hi; pau kei in. Topaʼ min na lawh khak ding kidawm in,” ci-in kidawngkik ding hi." 
Amos6:11 Topa in thu a piak ciangin inn liante kisatzanin inn neute kisat nen ding hi. 
Amos6:12 Sakolte, suangkeen tungah tai thei ngei a, bawngtalte tawh tuipi tung kikho thei ahi hiam? Tua hi napi-in note in thutang pen gu na suaksak uh a, thuman pen a khial na suaksak uh hi." 
Amos6:13 Lodebar khua bang lel na lak zawhna uh ah na lungdam uh a, “Eima thahatna tawh Karnaim khua i la zo hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Amos6:14 Topa, Vanglian Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: No Israel mite a do dingin minam khat ka khangsak dinga, leilu lamah, Hamath khua lutna ciangka panin, leitaw lamah Arabah lui kikal dong, note hong nuai gawp ding uh hi, a ci hi." 
Amos7:1 Topa Pasian in hih bangin hong musak hi: Kumpipaʼ gan an ding lopa a ki-at khit phet, selkik dingin a kisak laitakin Topa in kauphe honpi a piangsak hi."
