Amos7:2 Kauphe in gam sung lopate a gaih khit ciangin, keimah in Topa tungah ka thum a, “Topa Pasian aw, na mihingteʼ mawhna maisak in. Amaute minam tawm hi a, zawngkhal uh ahih manin bangci-in thuak zo ding ahi uh hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Amos7:3 Topa in zong a lungsim hong kheelkik a, “Tua na muh bangin hong piang nawn lo ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Amos7:4 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in hih bangin hong musak leuleu hi: Meikuang tawh a mite gim a pia dingin amah hong kithawi a, tuipite keu tumsakin leitung zong a hal tum dingin a hong kipan hi." 
Amos7:5 Tua ciangin Topa Pasian kiangah ka thum a, “ Topa aw, khawl dih in. Na mite, minam tawm hi a, zawngkhal mahmah uh ahih manin bangci-in thuak zo ding uh ahi hiam?” ka ci hi." 
Amos7:6 Tua ciangin Topa in zong a lungsim hong kheelkik a, “Na muh bangin hih zong hong piang nawn lo ding hi,” Topa Pasian in hong ci hi." 
Amos7:7 Tua ciangin Topa in hih bangin hong musak hi: Khaukhai zangin a kiciang kulh gei khat ah, Topa a ding ka mu a, a khut sungah khaukhai khat a tawi hi." 
Amos7:8 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Amos aw, bang na mu hiam?” hong ci hi. Kei zong dawngin, “Khaukhai khat mu ing,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “En in, ka mi Israel-te a khialhna uh a kitheih nadingin hih khaukhai tawh ka en hi. Amaute gim ka piak ding ka khiakik nawn kei ding hi." 
Amos7:9 Isaacʼ suanlekhakteʼ biakna munte kinusiacipin, Israel miteʼ siangtho munte kisusia dinga, Kumpi Jeroboamʼ innkuante a sim gawp dingin gal ka kuansak ding hi,” a hong ci hi." 
Amos7:10 Bethel ah a om siampi nasem Amaziah in Israel Kumpi Jeroboam kiangah thu puak a, “Amos in Israel mite lakah nang hong sawm hi. Ama thugen in i gam sung siasak ding hi." 
Amos7:11 Amah in hih bangin thu gen a, ‘Gal sungah Jeroboam si dinga, Israel mite amauʼ gam panin salin kipaikhiat pih ding hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in a khia hi." 
Amos7:12 Tua ciangin Amaziah in Amos kiangah, “Kamsang kineih pa aw, na Judah gamah ciah inla, tua lai ah na nuntakna ding na semin, thu va gen in." 
Amos7:13 Hih lai pen kumpipaʼ biakinn mun, minam bup biakinn mun ahih manin Bethel ah thu hong gen nawn kei in,” a ci hi." 
Amos7:14 Amos in Amaziah dawng a, “Kei pen kamsang ka hi kei a, kamsangteʼ ta zong ka hi beek kei hi. Kei pen tuucing ka hi a, theithek huan puah tawh a thuah khawm ka hi hi." 
Amos7:15 Ka tuucinna panin Topa in kei hong sam khia a, ama mi Israel-te tungah thugen dingin a hong sawl hi." 
Amos7:16 Tu-in Topaʼ thugen ngai in. Israel miteʼ lang khat ah thu ka gen ding na hong kho a, Isaacʼ suanlekhakteʼ lang khat ah thu ka gen ding na hong kham hi." 
Amos7:17 Amaziah aw, tua bangin kampau na hih manin Topa in nang kiangah, ‘Na zi pen khua sungah numei paktat suak dinga, gal sungah na tate si ding uh hi. Na gam kiphelkhamin midang tungah kipia dinga, lawkiteʼ gam sungah nang na si ding hi. Israel mite, galmatin kipaipih ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos8:1 Topa in hih bangin hong musak hi: Seeng sunga kikoih singgah min ka mu hi. 
Amos8:2 Topa in, “Amos aw, bang na mu hiam?” hong ci hi. “Seeng sunga kikoih singgah min ka mu hi,” ci-in kei zong ka dawng hi. Tua ciangin Topa in, “Ka mi Israel-te adingin a bei hun uh tung ta hi. Amaute gim ka piak ding ka khawl nawn kei ding hi." 
Amos8:3 Tua ni ciangin kumpi inn ah lungdam lasakna awgingte, kahna awging suak ding hi. Mun khempeuh ah misi dim dinga, mun citeng ah kipaithangin gamdai ding hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Amos8:4 Mi cimawhte tuancil gawpin, gam sung mizawngte a susia gawp mite aw, hih thu ngai un:" 
Amos8:5 Note in na lungsim sung uh ah, “I ante i zuak theih nadingin zum khak hun bei ding i ngaklah hi. I mangbuhte i zuak theih nadingin cik ciangin Sabbath ni bei ding ahi hiam? I an tehna seu neuseekin sum tampi i ngen nuam a, tawikhaina man lo zangin a hong leite i khem nuam hi." 
Amos8:6 Khedap bu khat man dingin mizawngte sila-in i zuak nuam a, i mangbuh hoih lote sum tampi i khawng nuam hi,” na ci uh hi." 
Amos8:7 Topa, Israel Pasian kiciam a, “Na gamtat siatnate uh ka mangngilh ngei kei ding hi." 
Amos8:8 Tua ahih manin zin hong liing dinga, leitung a om mi khempeuh a kap ding uh hi. Nail Gunpi bangin leitung khempeuh khang to-in kiam suk ding hi." 
Amos8:9 Tua ni ciangin sunkim laipi mahin ni ka tumsak dinga, sunkim laipi mahin leitung khempeuh ah khua ka mialsak ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Amos8:10 Na lungdam pawite uh dahna ka suaksak dinga, na lasaknate uh kahna awging ka suaksak ding hi. Dahna limin puanhampi na silh ding uh a, na sam uh zong na mettol ding uh hi. A tapa khat neihsun a sihsuah nupa na bang ding uh hi. Tua hun pen a tawp dongin nasia semsem ding hi." 
Amos8:11 “Keimah in leitungah kialpi kong tunsak hun hong tung ding hi. Tua kialpi pen anletui duhna kialpi hi lo dinga, Topaʼ thu zaknop mahmahna kialpi hi ding hi. Topa Pasian ahi keimah in hih thu kong gen khin hi." 
Amos8:12 Mihingte, leilu pan leitaw dong, Topaʼ thu kanin vak kawikawi ding uh a, ahi zongin mu zo lo ding uh hi." 
Amos8:13 Tua ni ciangin nungakte le tangvalte dangtakin puk ding uh hi. 
Amos8:14 Samaria milim pasian Ashimah min tawh kiciam a, ‘Dan khuapi pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin,’ le ‘Beer-sheba khuapi pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin,’ a ci mite pukin thokik nawn lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos9:1 Biakna tau gei ah Topa a ding ka mu a, hih bangin thu hong pia hi: “Biakinn bulpi khempeuh a kilin theih nadingin biakinn khuampi luzang nakpi takin sat gawp in. Tuate satkham inla, miteʼ luzang tusak in. Tua lai panin a suakta teng gal sungah ka sisak ding hi. A tai khia, a suakta, kuamah om lo ding hi." 
Amos9:2 Lei to sukin misiteʼ omna Leinuai ah a va tun uh hangin tua lai ah amaute ka su dinga, vantungah a kah toh uh hangin zong, tua lai mahah amaute ka su veve ding hi." 
Amos9:3 Karmel mual dawnah a buk uh hangin, amaute zongin ka man khia dinga, keima kiang panin tuipi tawng sungah bu ta le-uh zong, tuipi gulpite in a tuk nading thu ka pia ding hi." 
Amos9:4 Galte in a sal dingin hing mat ta le-uh zong, namsau tawh a thah nadingun thu ka pia ding hi. Amauteʼ hoih nading ngaihsun het loin, amaute suksiat ding ka sawm hi,” a ci hi." 
Amos9:5 Vanglian Topa Pasian in leitung a lawn ciangin tui suak a, leitung a om mi khempeuh a kap uh hi. Nail Gunpi bangin leitung buppi khang to-in kiam suk ding hi." 
Amos9:6 Topa in vantungah a inn deite bawl a, van kuumpi tawh leitung a khuh suk hi. Amah in tuipi panin tuite sam khia a, leitung khempeuh ah tua tuite a sung hi. Hih bangin a bawlpaʼ min pen Topa ahi hi." 
Amos9:7 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Israel mite aw, Ethiopia mite tawh a kibangin note kong bawl a, Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih bangin, Kaftor gam panin Filistia mite ka paikhiatpih a, Kir gam panin Syria mite ka paikhiatpih hi." 
Amos9:8 Keimah in hih a khial Israel kumpi gam ka encik a, hih leitung panin amaute ka susia ding hi. Ahi zongin a vekpi-un susia mang loin pawl khat ka sitlai ding hi." 
Amos9:9 Keimah in thu ka pia dinga, anhaihna ciang tawh an a kihaih mah bangin keimah in Israel mite ka lok niloh ding hi. A hoih loteng a kipaihkhiat theih nadingin minam dangte lakah ka haih ding hi." 
Amos9:10 Keima miteʼ sung panin, “I tungah siatna hong tung ngei lo ding hi,” a ci mawhneite khempeuh, gal sungah si ding uh hi." 
Amos9:11 Tua ciangin inn tawh kibangin a sia sa David ukna gam keimah in ka puahkik dinga, a vang teng hu-in, a sia teng ka puahkik dinga, a nidang a a ngeina lui mah uh ka bangsakkik ding hi." 
Amos9:12 Tua ciangin Israel mite in Edom gam a om lai teng le keima mi ahi ngei minam khempeuh zo-in ngahkik ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Amos9:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: An a kihauh luat manin, an lak a kizawh ma-in lo khawhkik hun tungin, leenggahte, leenggahzu a bawl a kizawh ma-in a suankik hun hong tun ding, hun nuam hong tung ta ding hi. Mual lian khempeuh panin leenggahzu khum hong taak khia-in, mual neu khempeuh tungah leenggahzu a luang ding hi." 
Amos9:14 Ka mi Israel-te, amauʼ gam ka tunkik dinga, a kisia a khuapite uh hoihtakin lamphakikin a sungah a teeng ding uh hi. Amaute in leenggui suanin, huan bawlin, a sunga piangte a ne ding uh hi." 
Amos9:15 Amaute adingin ka piak gam sungah amaute ka koihkik dinga, tua ka piak sa gam panin kuamah in amaute la khiakik nawn lo ding hi, Topa, noteʼ Pasian in ci hi, a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:1 Obadiahʼ gen kholhna: Edom gam tawh kisai-in Topa Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Minamte lakah kamtai khat kisawl zo a, “Kithawi un! Edom mite a sim gawp dingin kuan khia ni,” a cihna thu ka za zo hi." 
Obadiah1:2 En un, minamte lakah note kong neusak dinga, nakpi takin hong kisimmawh ding hi." 
Obadiah1:3 Na lungsim kiphatsakna un note a hong khem zo hi. Note in suang kulhpi beelin mual dawnah na ten manun, “Kua in eite hong puksak zo ding ahi hiam?” ci-in na ngaihsun uh hi." 
Obadiah1:4 Muvanlai bangin sangpi ah leengin, aksite lakah bu na bawl hangun no kong khia suk veve ding hi, Topa in a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:5 Zanin na kiangah gutate le misuamte hong pai-in supna tampi na thuak hangin a deih teng bek uh hong guksak ding hi lo ahi hiam? Leenggah late in lo lai ah a sangte nusia laitei hi lo ahi uh hiam? 
Obadiah1:6 Ahih hangin Esau kibuluh khinzo a, a sum a pai khempeuh a kilaksak zo hi." 
Obadiah1:7 Na pawl teng in nang hong khem zo uh a, gamgi ciang dong hong hawl khia zo uh a, na pawl teng in a hong zo khinta uh hi. Na ankuang um pihte in na nuai ah thang hong siah khin uh a, “A pilna koi ah om ahi hiam?” a hong ci uh hi." 
Obadiah1:8 Topa in: “Tua ni ciangin Edom sung pan a mipilte ka susia dinga, Esauʼ gamah pilna ka beisak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Obadiah1:9 Teman khua aw, Esauʼ gamah mi khempeuh a kithahlup khit nadingin na galhangte a meidawi ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:10 Bang hang hiam cih leh na sanggampa Jakob bawlsia-in na thahna hangin maizumna in nang hong khuh dinga, na khantawnin na mangthang ding hi." 
Obadiah1:11 Namdangte in a neihsa teng a puakkhiat ni-in gamdang mite a kongpi sungah a lut ni-in, Jerusalem-a vante hawmna ding ai a san ni-in, nangmah in gal et bek na hih manin nang zong a thukimpih na hi hi." 
Obadiah1:12 Na sanggamte uh a tuahsiat ni-in mu nuam dah hoh un. Judah mite a kisiat ni-in lungdamin nuam kei un. A kisiat ni-in lungdam kei un. A cihmawh ni-in nuihsan kei un. 
Obadiah1:13 Ka mite in haksatna a tuah ni-in a kongpi sungah tum kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a thuaknate uh mu nuam kei un. A tuahsiat ni-in a sum a paite uh laksak kei un. 
Obadiah1:14 A suakta sunte a khaktan dingin na ding kei ding uh hi. A cihmawh ni-in a hing lai sunteng, a galteʼ khut sungah na pia kei ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:15 Bang hang hiam cih leh minamkimte tungah ka thukhenna ding ni a nai zo hi. Nang bawl bangin nangma tungah hong kibawl ding hi. Na hih bangin na lu buk ah hong tukik ding hi. 
Obadiah1:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mual siangtho tungah na thuak mah bangun, na kiim na pam a om minamte khempeuh in zong ka gimpiakna a thuak ding uh hi. Thuak tawntung ding uh a, maimang ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:17 Ahih hangin Zion mualah pawl khat va tai ding uh a, tua mun pen a siangtho suak ding hi. Jakob innkuante in amauʼ gam mah luahkik ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:18 Tua ciangin Jakob innkuante mei bang ding uh a, Josef innkuante meikuang bang ding uh hi. Esau innkuante nin pa bang hi ding uh a, amaute in a hal ding uh hi. Amaute kaang tum khin ding uh a, Esau innkuante khat zong a suakta kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a gen zo hi." 
Obadiah1:19 Negeb gam mite in Esauʼ gam luah ding uh a, Shefelah mite in Filistia gam luah ding uh hi. Amaute in Efraim gam le Samaria gam luah ding uh a, Benjamin in Gilead gam luah ding hi." 
Obadiah1:20 Israel mi salin a omte in Kanaan gam Zarefat ciang dong luah ding uh a, Jerusalem mi, Sardis khua ah salin a omte in Negeb gam khuapite a la ding uh hi." 
Obadiah1:21 A gualzo Jerusalem khua mite in Esauʼ gam simin uk ding uh a, tua gam pen Topaʼ gam ahi ding hi." 
Jonah1:1 Topa in Amittaiʼ tapa Jonah tungah," 
Jonah1:2 “Kithawi inla, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi ah va pai-in thu va hilh in; bang hang hiam cih leh amauʼ gitlohna thu ka za khinzo hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:3 Ahih hangin Topaʼ kiang pan Jonah tai khia-in Tarshish khua lamah a taisim dingin a kithawi zawsop hi. Joppa khua ah pai suk a, Tarshish khua a zuan ding teembaw khat a mu hi. A sap man ding pia-in a tungah kah a, Topaʼ kiang pan a tai khia dingin teembaw hawlte tawh Tarshish khua ah a pai hi." 
Jonah1:4 Ahih hangin Topa in tuipi tungah huih nakpi-in nungsak a, huihpi hat lua ahih manin teembaw a kisia dekdek hi." 
Jonah1:5 Tua ciangin teembaw hawlte lau uh a, a pasian ciat uhʼ kiangah a kiko ciat uh hi. Teembaw a zan tuam nadingin a sunga vante tuipi sungah a paai uh hi. Tua bang hi napi-in teembaw sung tawng lamah Jonah na lutsukin a na ihmu hithiat hi." 
Jonah1:6 Teembaw ukpa in amah a muh ciangin, “Ihmu pa aw, bang na cihna ahi hiam? Tho inla na pasian kiangah thu ngen in. I sih loh nadingin amah in eite hong ngaihsun kha thei ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:7 Tua khit ciangin teembaw hawlte in, “Hong pai dih un. Kuaʼ hangin hih bang gimna eiʼ tungah hong tung ahi hiam, cih i theih nadingin ai san dih ni,” ci-in khatlekhat a kikum uh hi. Ai a san uh leh Jonah tung a tu hi." 
Jonah1:8 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Bang hangin hih gimna eiʼ tungah hong tung ahi hiam, hong gen in. Na nasep bang ahi hiam? Koi lai pan a hong pai na hi hiam? Na gam bang ahi hiam? Kua minam na hi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi." 
Jonah1:9 Amah in, “Kei pen Hebru mi ka hi hi; tuipi le leitang a bawl, vantungteʼ Pasian ahi Topa ka bia hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah1:10 Tua ciangin tua mite lau mahmah uh a, “Bang hangin hih bangin gamta mawk na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topaʼ kiang pan amah a tai khia sim ahih lam a gen khit sa ahih manin a thei khinzo uh hi." 
Jonah1:11 Tua ciangin amaute in, “Ei adingin tuipi a hong daih theih nadingin nang bang kong cih ding uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi lauhuai semsem hi." 
Jonah1:12 Amah in, “Hong dom to unla, tuipi sungah hong khia un; tua hileh no adingin tuipi a hong dai ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih huihpi na thuakna uh keima hang ahi hi, cih ka thei hi,” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Jonah1:13 Tua bang a cih hangin amaute in teembaw a khawlsak dingin hahkatin lei lamah a hot teitei uh hi. Ahih hangin a hih zo kei uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh huihpi a hat semsem hi. 
Jonah1:14 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ kiangah amaute kiko-in, “ Topa aw, hih mipa ka sihsak manun kote hong sisak kei inla, mi that hi, ci-in hong ngawh kei ta in, ci-in kong thum uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah in pha na sak banga na bawl ahi hi,” ci-in thu a ngen uh hi." 
Jonah1:15 Tua ciangin Jonah dom to-in tuipi sungah a khiat uh leh tuipi a dai pah hi. 
Jonah1:16 Tua ciangin tua mite in Topa kihta mahmah uh a, Topaʼ tungah biakna pia-in thuciamna a bawl uh hi." 
Jonah1:17 Ahih hangin Jonah a nawmvalh dingin Topa in ngapi khat a geel kholh sa hi a, tua ngapiʼ gil sungah Jonah sun thum le zan thum sung a om hi." 
Jonah2:1 Tua ciangin Jonah in tua ngapiʼ gil sung panin Topa a Pasian kiangah thu ngen a," 
Jonah2:2 “Ka cihmawhna panin Topa ka sam a, amah in kei hong dawng hi. Sihna gam Sheol panin kong kiko a, nangmah in ka aw nong za hi." 
Jonah2:3 Tuipi thuk sungah kei nong khia a, tui in kei hong tuumcip hi. Na tuihualte khempeuh in kei hong tum hi." 
Jonah2:4 Tua ciangin keimah in, ‘Na omna panin kei hong kihawl khia hi. Na biakinn siangtho hong koici etkik thei ding ka hi hiam?’ ka ci hi." 
Jonah2:5 Tui in kei hong tuamcip a, ka kimkot ah hong umcih hi. Tuipi tunga lopate in ka lu hong vialcip hi." 
Jonah2:6 Mualteʼ bul tuipi taw dong ka va pai suk a, kong hong kikhaknelh tawntungna mun ka tun hangin tua Leihawmpi sung panin a nungta-in nong la to veve hi, Topa ka Pasian aw." 
Jonah2:7 Kei ka lung a kiat ciangin Topa kong phawk a, ka thungetna, na biakinn siangtho sung, nangma kiang hong tung hi." 
Jonah2:8 Kimanna a nei lo milim a biate in nangmah hong taisan uh hi. 
Jonah2:9 Ahih hangin keʼn ahihleh lungdamna aw tawh biakna kong pia dinga, ka ciam sa thu ka tangtungsak ding hi. Topaʼ kiang pan hotkhiatna hong pai hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah2:10 Tua ciangin Topa in tua ngapi sawl a, amah in lei keu tungah Jonah a lua khia hi." 
Jonah3:1 Tua ciangin Topa in Jonah tungah a nih veina thu gen a," 
Jonah3:2 “Kithawi inla, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi ah va pai-in kong gen sa thu taangko in,” a ci hi." 
Jonah3:3 Jonah zong kithawi pah a, Topaʼ cih bangin Nineveh khua ah a pai hi. Nineveh khua pen khuapi lian mahmah khat hi a, ni thum sung tak kikantan hi." 
Jonah3:4 Jonah zong khua sung lam manawhin kipan a, ni khat sung lam a pai khit ciangin, “Ni sawm li khit ciangin hih Nineveh khuapi kisusia ding hi,” ci-in a kiko hi." 
Jonah3:5 Nineveh khua mite kisikin Pasian um uh a, an tan ding thu thangsakin, a gol pen pan a kipan a neu pen dongin puanhampi a silh uh hi." 
Jonah3:6 Nineveh khua kumpipa in tua thu a zak ciangin a kumpi tokhom tung pan ding khia-in a kumpi puan suah khia a, puanhampi silhin vut lakah a tu hi." 
Jonah3:7 Tua ciangin amah in Nineveh khua sung khempeuh ah thu thangsakin taangkosak a, “Kumpipa le ulianteʼ thu tawh: Mihing ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin, bawng hon ahi a, tuu hon ahi zongin, kuamah in bangmah ciam thei lo ding, an ne thei lo ding, tui dawn thei lo ding uh hi." 
Jonah3:8 Mihing le ganhingte in puanhampi silhin Pasianʼ tungah nakpi-in kiko ta uh hen. Mi khempeuh, a khialhnate uh le a gitlohnate uh panin kihei ta uh hen." 
Jonah3:9 Eite i sih loh nadingin Pasian kisikin a hehna damsak lo ding hi, kua in ci thei na hi uh hiam?” a cisak hi." 
Jonah3:10 Pasian in amauʼ hihnate mu a, a khialhna uh panin a kihei uh a muh ciangin kisik a, amau tungah hih dingin a cih sa siatna a tungsak nawn kei hi." 
Jonah4:1 Ahih hangin tua thu hangin Jonah lungkim het loin a heh hi. 
Jonah4:2 Topaʼ kiangah thu ngen a, “Kong thum hi, Topa aw; ka gam sungah ka om lai pekin hici mah in teh, ci hi lo ka hi hiam? Hanciamin Tarshish khua ah ka tai simna zong tua hang mah ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen a hehpih thei Pasian, a heh hak, a migi mahmah, siatna tunsak ding a kisik nuam Pasian na hihna kong thei hi." 
Jonah4:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, tu-in ka nuntakna hong la in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka nuntak sangin si leng kei adingin a hoih zaw hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:4 Topa in zong, “Na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:5 Tua ciangin khuapi pua lamah Jonah paikhia a, nisuahna lamah ama ading bukno khat lamin tua lai ah a tu hi. Tua khuapi bang hong ci ding hiam, cih a en dingin a buk liim nuai ah tu-in a ngak hi." 
Jonah4:6 Topa Pasian in zong Jonah a liah ding le a lungkhamna a tawldamsak dingin umgui khat a tungah a zaamsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua umgui hangin Jonah lungdam mahmah hi. 
Jonah4:7 Ahih hangin a zingsang khuavak ciangin Pasian in tua umgui lungno khat nesak ahih manin a keu hi. 
Jonah4:8 Ni hong suah ciangin Pasian in nisuahna lam panin huih a sa mahmah nungsak a, ni in zong Jonahʼ luzang kap suk veva ahih manin a gim mahmah hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka nuntak sangin si leng kei adingin hoih zaw hi,” ci-in a sih nading thu a ngen hi." 
Jonah4:9 Ahih hangin Pasian in Jonah kiangah, “Tua umgui hangin na heh ding kilawm sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Jonah in, “Ka heh ding kilawm sa tham loin heh lua-in ka si zongin kilawm ka sa veve hi,” a ci hi." 
Jonah4:10 Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nang in na gimpih lohpi, na khansak lohpi, zan khat thu-in hong piangin zan khat thu mahin a si tua umgui pammaih na sa hi." 
Jonah4:11 Tua ahihleh keimah in ganhing tampi tham lo, a taklam khut le a veilam khut nangawn a khen thei nai lo naupang tul za le tul sawm nih sangin a tam zawteʼ teenna, a lian mahmah Nineveh khuapi pammaih sa lo ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dawngkik hi." 
Micah1:1 Judah gam kumpi Jotham, Ahaz le Hezekiah-teʼ hun laitakin, Moresheth khuami Mikah tungah Topa in thu a pia hi. Samaria le Jerusalem tawh kisai-in Topa in Mikah tungah hih thute a lak hi." 
Micah1:2 No minam khempeuhte aw, hih thu za un: Leitungah a teeng mi khempeuhte aw, hih thu ngai un: Noteʼ lang khat ah Topa Pasian in teci pang a, a vantung biakinn panin thu hong gen hi." 
Micah1:3 Ama mun siangtho panin Topa hong pai a, amah in leitung mual sang dawnte hong sik suk ding hi." 
Micah1:4 Meikhuk sungah khuainun a kikoih bangin ama khe nuai ah mual liante tui suak dinga, mual tung panin tui a luang suk bangin, guam sungah tua mualte luang suk ding hi." 
Micah1:5 Pasianʼ tungah Israel-teʼ mawhna le a khialhnate uh hangin hih thute khempeuh a piang ahi hi. Israel-teʼ khialhna kua ngawh ding ihi hiam? Samaria mite ngawh ding ihi hiam? Judah gam sungah milim bia-in a khial kua ahi hiam? Jerusalem mite ahi hi. 
Micah1:6 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Samaria khuapi, gamlak a ninkholna mun, leenggui suanna mun lel dingin ka bawl ding hi. A khua sunga suangte zong guam sungah ka nil suk dinga, a khuapi bulpite ka dawksak ding hi." 
Micah1:7 A milim manphate khempeuh kisuzan gawp dinga, mei tawh kisusia ding hi. Pasianʼ tungah a thuman lohna hangun mihingte in hih milimte nei uh ahih manin, a thuman lohna uh tawh kizui-in tu-in thuakkik ding uh hi, ci hi." 
Micah1:8 Tua ahih manin kei kapin ka thum dinga, ka dahna thu ka lah nadingin khe guak le guaktangin ka vak ding hi. Gam-ui bangin ka ham dinga, vasa-kalaoh bangin ka tau ding hi." 
Micah1:9 Bang hang hiam cih leh Samariaʼ meima kidamsak thei lo hi; Judah in zong tua bangmah a thuak ding ahi ta hi. Ka miteʼ teenna Jerusalem khua mahmah, tua siatna in hong ban ta hi." 
Micah1:10 I guallelhna thu Gath khua mite theisak kei unla, na kahna uh amaute musak kei un. Beth-leafrah khua sungah na lungkhamna uh langsakin, leivui lakah kikhuk un." 
Micah1:11 Shafir khua ah a teeng mite aw, guaktangin maizumna tawh salin pai un. Zanaan khua-a teeng mite, a hingin paikhia ngei lo ding hi. Bethezel khua miteʼ kahna le thumna na zak uh ciangin, tua khua sungah belh ding mun muanhuai a om lohna na thei ding uh hi." 
Micah1:12 Topa in Jerusalem kulhpi dongah gimna lianpi tungsak ta ahih manin Maroth khua mite nakpi takin patau uh hi. 
Micah1:13 Lakhish khua ah a teeng mite aw, na sakol galkapte uh a leeng bulh pak un. Note in Israel-teʼ khialhna teng zui kha na hih manun, Jerusalem zong a khialsakte na hi uh hi." 
Micah1:14 Tu-in no Judah mite aw, Moreseth-gath khua, mangpha khak un. Israel kumpite in Akzib khua panin huhna ngah lo ding hi." 
Micah1:15 Mareshah khua mite aw, note a hong zong ding pa ka hong paisak ding hi, Topa in ci hi. Adullam leihawm sungah Israel kumpipa bu ding hi." 
Micah1:16 Judah mite aw, na it mahmah na tate uh, sal a suak dingin hong kilaksak ding ahih manin, amauteʼ hangin na dahna limun na sam uh met unla, musane bangin na lu uh tolsak un." 
Micah2:1 A lupna tungah lumin gitlohna a geelgeelte in gimna ngah tahen. Zingsang khua a vak ciangin, hih theih ding hun a ngah phetun, a ngaihsut sa uh gitlohna a sem khia uh hi." 
Micah2:2 Lo deih le-uh, mi-aʼ sut uh a, inn deih le-uh, mi-aʼ mah sut uh hi. Mite bawlsia-in, a inn le a neihsa uh a sut uh hi." 
Micah2:3 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Noteʼ tungah gimna tunsak ding ka ngaihsun a, tua gimna tawh na kipelh thei kei ding uh hi. Note adingin hunhoih lo hi ding ahih manin kiphatsakna tawh na gamta nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Micah2:4 Tua bang hun hong tun ciangin mite in noteʼ gim ngahna thugentehna-in zangin, dah la phuakin sa ding uh a, “Eite i sia khin taktak hi. Topa in i gam hong laksak a, ei a hong mante tungah hong piaksak hi,” ci ding uh hi." 
Micah2:5 Tua ahih ciangin Topaʼ mite lakah leitang a kihawm ciangin, kuamah in leitang na ngah kei ding uh hi." 
Micah2:6 Amaute in kei kiangah, “Tua bang thu hong gen kei in. Tua bang thu gen dingin kilawm lo hi. Tua bangin Pasian in hong minsiasak lo ding hi,” hong ci uh hi." 
Micah2:7 Israel mite aw, “ Topa a lung tom ta a, hihte khempeuh, ama hong bawl mah ahi hiam?” na cih ding uh kilawm lo hi. Ka thugenna kammalte, a thuman mite adingin a hoih hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Micah2:8 Ahi zongin Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: Note pen ka miteʼ gal na suak uh a, gal sung panin a hong ciahkik, lungmuang a a inn ah a om miteʼ puan tualpi ngahte na sut uh hi." 
Micah2:9 Ka mihingteʼ numeite, amauʼ inn nuam panin na hawl khia uh a, a tate un a ngah ding keima thuphate na taansak paisuak uh hi." 
Micah2:10 Tu-in ding unla paikhia un. Na khialhna hangun a lauhuai suksiatna tuak ding na hih manun, hih lai mun pen note adingin mun nuam hi lo hi." 
Micah2:11 Zuau genin khemna tawh thu gen kawikawi a, “Note adingin leenggahzu le khamtheih zu tampi tak hong om ding hi,” a hong ci kamsangte pawl, noteʼ deih kamsangte ahi hi." 
Micah2:12 Ahi zongin no Israel mi a omlaite khempeuh pel het loin kong kaikhawmkik ding hi. Tuubuk sunga tuu khum bangin, gankhawk sungah tuu hon kaihkhop bangin note kong kaikhawmkik dinga, na gam sung uh, mi tampiteʼ husa tawh kidimkik ding hi, ci hi." 
Micah2:13 Pasian in note ading lampi hong honsakin hong paikhiatpih ding hi. Salsuahna khuapi kulh panin pai khia-in na suakta ding uh hi. Kumpi ahi Topa mahmah in note hong makai ding hi. 
Micah3:1 Israel a uk makaite aw, hih thu ngai un: Note in thutang thuman a deih dingin a kilawm hi napi-in," 
Micah3:2 thuhoih deih loin thusia na deih zawsop uh hi. Note in miteʼ vun na hing hawkkhiat uh a, a guh uh na hing kheuh uh hi." 
Micah3:3 Ka miteʼ sa na ne tum uh hi. A vun uh hawkin, a guh uh na satkham uh a, beel a meh huan ding bangin na satnen gawp uh hi." 
Micah3:4 Topaʼ tungah huhna ngenin na kiko hun uh hong tung dinga, ahi zongin amah in note hong dawng lo ding hi. Note gamtat sia na hih manun, na ngetna uh hong ngai lo ding hi." 
Micah3:5 Sum a pia zo mite kiangah thunuam gen a, a pia lo mite kiangah gal tuah ding a gen kamsangte in mite lam a khialsak uh hi. Topa in tua bang kamsangte kiangah," 
Micah3:6 “Keima mite lam khialsak na hih manun mailam thu gen theihna maang na mu nawn kei ding uh a, mailam thu peuhmah na gen thei nawn kei ding uh hi. Kamsangte aw, noteʼ hun bei ta dinga, ni in hong tum san ta ding hi,” ci hi." 
Micah3:7 Hih bang thugen kamsangte, a thugen kholhna uh Pasian in a tunsak loh manin maizumin mindai ding uh hi." 
Micah3:8 Ahi zongin kei ka hih leh, Israel mite tungah a mawhna uh a gen khia dingin Topaʼ kha le a vang tawh ka kidim a, thutang gen ngam nading lungsim ka nei hi." 
Micah3:9 Ngai un! Israel a uk makaite aw. Note in thutang deih loin, thuman kimlai a khialin na hei uh hi." 
Micah3:10 Mi thahna le thuman lohna tawh, Pasianʼ khuapi, Jerusalem na lam uh hi." 
Micah3:11 Khuapi ukte in sumgolh ngah theih nading ngaihsutna bek tawh thu khen a, siampite in sum ngah theih nading ngaihsutna bek tawh thu gen a, kamsangte in zong sum ngah theih nading ngaihsutna bek mah tawh mailam thu gen khol uh hi. Tua bang hi napi-in amaute in Topa, muanin nei uh a, “ Topa in eite hong ompih a, eite tungah siatna hong tung lo ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Micah3:12 Tua ahih manin noteʼ hangin lo khawh bangin Zion kikho-in, Jerusalem, nin kipaihna phualpi hong suak dinga, biakinn omna mual, gamlak a suak ding hi." 
Micah4:1 Mailam hunah Topaʼ biakinn a omna mual, a sang pen mual hong suak dinga, minam tampi in hong zuan ding uh hi." 
Micah4:2 Minam tampite hong pai-in, “Israel miteʼ Pasianʼ biakinn, Topaʼ mualah va pai to ni. Tua lai ah ama deihna hong hilh dinga, ama deihna bangin i gamta ding hi,” ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zion panin thuhilhna hong ging khia a, Jerusalem panin Topaʼ thu hong paikhia hi." 
Micah4:3 Amah in minam tampiteʼ thu khensak dinga, Israel gam panin a gamla pekah a om, minam vanglianteʼ thu khensak ding hi. Amaute in a namsaute uh lokhawhna tu-in seek ding uh a, a teipite uh singhiang heuhna temkawi-in seek ding uh hi. Minam khatlekhat kido nawn lo ding uh a, gal kidona thei kha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Micah4:4 A kuamah peuh lungnuamin a leenggui phung le a theikung nuai ah tu hithiat dinga, kuamah in patausak nawn lo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa mahmah in hih thu hong gen khinta hi." 
Micah4:5 Bang hang hiam cih leh midangte in amauʼ pasian ciat bia-in a thu mang ding uh a, ahi zongin eite in ahihleh eima Topa Pasian mah a tawntungin bia-in ama thu i mang ding hi." 
Micah4:6 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Keimah in gim ka piak ahi, sal a om gimna a thuak mite, ka kaihkhopkik hun hong tung ding hi." 
Micah4:7 Amaute, a cimawhin gamlapi ah om uh a, ahi zongin keimah in amaute pansa kikin, minam vanglian khatin ka bawlkik ding hi. Tua hun a kipan a tawntungin Zion mual panin amaute ka uk paisuak ding hi." 
Micah4:8 Pasian in a mite a etna Jerusalem khuapi aw, nidang a na vangliatna na ngahkik dinga, kumpi khuapi na suakkik ding hi." 
Micah4:9 Bang hangin tu-in nakpi takin kap a, numei nausuak ding bangin na sa na hi hiam? Kumpi nei lo a, na thulamlakte si ahi hiam?" 
Micah4:10 Jerusalem khua mite aw, numei nausuak ding bangin na tha uh san un. Tu-in kumpi khuapi nusia-in, gam sung khua ah a teeng ding na hi ta uh a, Babylon khuapi a zuan ta ding na hi uh hi. Ahi zongin tua lai panin note hong kihon khia-in, na galte uh khut sung panin Topa in hong khah khia ding hi." 
Micah4:11 Note a hong sim dingin minam tampi hong kikhawm uh hi. Amaute in, “Jerusalem kisusia dinga, i mit in hih khuapi a siasa-in mu ding hi,” a ci uh hi." 
Micah4:12 Ahi zongin hih minamte in Topaʼ lungsim tawng thei lo uh a, ancilna phualah anphalte kaihkhop bangin amaute kaikhawmin, a cil gawp ding ahih lam phawk lo uh hi." 
Micah4:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Jerusalem khua mite aw, kipan unla, na galte uh su gawp un. Sumngo khe le sik ki a nei bawngtal bangin note kong thahatsak ding hi. Minam tampite na su gawp zo ding uh a, amauʼ neihsa teng keima-aʼ na suaksak ding uh a, amauʼ hauhna teng leitung buppiʼ Topaʼ neihsa na suaksak ding uh hi." 
Micah5:1 Jerusalem khua mite aw, na kulh sung uh ah lut un. Eite hong ki-umcih a, Israel makai pa a hong sim uh ahi hi." 
Micah5:2 Bethlehem Efrathah khua aw, nang pen Judah gamah khua neu pen khat na hi a, ahi zongin nang sung panin Israel-te a uk ding khat ka piangsak ding hi. Ama gui pen tangtawng pek tawh kizom hi." 
Micah5:3 Tua ahih ciangin, numei naupaii nu, a nau a suah khit mateng, amauʼ galteʼ khut sungah Topa in a mite a pia phot hi. Ama hong khan ciangin sal a a om a gam mite a mipihte uh tawh hong kigawmkik ding hi." 
Micah5:4 Amah in Topaʼ thahatna tawh a mite uk dinga, Topa ama Pasianʼ vangliatna tawh a uk ding hi. Leitung mi khempeuh in ama liatna phawk ding uh ahih manin ama mite lungmuang takin om thei ding uh hi." 
Micah5:5 Amah in lungnopna hong omsak ding hi. Assiria mite in i gam hong simin i galdalna teng hong suk ciangin, amaute a do dingin i makai hat pen teng i sawl ding hi." 
Micah5:6 A namsau uh tawh Nimrodʼ gam ahi, Assiria gam zo ding uh a, Assiria mite in i gam hong sim ciangin amauteʼ kiang panin eite hong hon khia ding uh hi." 
Micah5:7 Tua ciangin a om lai Israel mite pen Topa in minam tampite adingin a piak, lopate a nosak zing daitui, lopate a khangsak guahtui, a bang ding uh hi. Amaute in mihingte muanin nei loin Pasian bek a muang ding uh hi." 
Micah5:8 A om lai Israel mite pen minam dangteʼ lakah, gamlak ah sa a beng, tuute a tuah ciangin manin balnen gawp a, a kam sung pan a hon khia zo a om lo, humpinelkai a bang ding uh hi." 
Micah5:9 Israel-te in a gal khempeuh uh zo gawpin a susia mang ding uh hi. 
Micah5:10 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tua hun ciangin na sakolte uh hong paih khiatsakin, na leengte uh ka susia ding hi." 
Micah5:11 Na gam sung uh a om khuapite susia-in, na galpanna munte uh ka phel khia ding hi." 
Micah5:12 Na mitphial siamte uh susia gawpin, ai a san thei mi kong omsak nawn kei ding hi." 
Micah5:13 Noteʼ biak milimte le na biakna songte uh ka susia gawp dinga, noteʼ bawl sa nate na bia nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Micah5:14 Na gam sung uh a a om Asherah nusian milimte hong bawh khiatsakin, na khuapite uh ka susia ding hi." 
Micah5:15 Keima thu a hong mang lo minamte tungah hehna tawh phu ka la ding hi. 
Micah6:1 Topa le Israel a kitotna ngai un. Topa aw, kipan inla, mual liante le mual neute mai ah na thu sung in." 
Micah6:2 No mual liante le a kip tawntung leitung bulpite aw, Topaʼ thu ngai un. Topa in ama mite tawh thu nei a, Israel tawh thu kiseel ding hi." 
Micah6:3 Topa in hih bangin thu sung a, “Ka mite aw, note bang hong cih kha ka hi hiam? Tu-in hong dawng dih un!" 
Micah6:4 Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt gam panin note kong paikhiatpih a, salsuahna panin ka hong hon khia hi. Note a hong makai dingin Moses, Aaron le Miriam ka hong sawl hi." 
Micah6:5 Ka mite aw, Moab Kumpi Balak in note sukna ding a vaihawmna teng, Beorʼ tapa Balaam in ama nget bangin a sepna teng limtakin phawkkik un. Note hotkhiat nadingin ka sepna thu na theih nadingun Shittim le Gilgal kikal a thupiangte ngaihsunkik un,” a ci hi." 
Micah6:6 Vantung Pasian, Topa biak nadingin bang va keng ding ka hi hiam? Amah biakna-in hal dingin bawng no thaute va paipih ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:7 Topa kiangah tuu a tultulin va puakin, gun tui bangin sathau va luangsak leng, tuate tawh amah lungdam ding ahi hiam? Ka mawhnate maisak nadingin ka ta upa pen tawh va bia ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:8 Mun khempeuh ah a om no mihingte aw, Topa in a hoih nate hong gen khinzo hi. Topa in note tung panin hong kalh thu in: Thuman thutang sem dinga, itna kip nei tawntungin, kiniamkhiatna tawh Pasianʼ thu man ding ahi hi." 
Micah6:9 Topa, zahtak ding kilawm hi. Khua sungah amah hong kiko a, “Ngai un, khuapi sungah a hong kikhawm mite aw." 
Micah6:10 Thuman lopi-in a ngah uh, migiloteʼ inn sunga van omte, keima deih loh tawitehna man lo zatnate, mangngilh thei ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:11 Tawikhaina man lo le tawisuang man lo a zangte, khah khong ding ka hi hiam?" 
Micah6:12 Na mihaute uh mizawngte tungah tatsia mahmah in, na khua sung mi khempeuh uh zuaugen vive ahi uh a, a kam un khemna thu bekbek gen hi." 
Micah6:13 Tua ahih ciangin na mawhna hangun note suksiat ding ka kipan ta hi. 
Micah6:14 An na nek hangun na kham kei ding uh a, na gil uh kial lai veve ding hi. Na na koihcing uh hangin phatuam lo ding hi. Galte in tua na koihcing uh nate susia veve ding hi." 
Micah6:15 Khai na tuh uh hangin an na la kei ding uh hi. Oliv gah na cil uh hangin a thau na zang kha kei ding uh a, leenggah na cil uh hangin a zu na dawn kha kei ding uh hi." 
Micah6:16 Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Omriʼ gamtatna zui-in, ama tapa Kumpi Ahabʼ sep khempeuh na sem uh a, amauʼ gamtat khempeuh na zui uh hi. Tua ahih manin note kong susia ding hi. Minam dangte in note hong nuihsanin, amauteʼ simmawhna na thuak ding uh hi." 
Micah7:1 Kei a kamsia hiʼng! Singgah le leenggah a heu hun laitakin a gilkial mipa tawh ka kibang hi. Leenggah nek ding om nawn lo a, ka lung gulhgulh theigah bei ta hi." 
Micah7:2 Leitungah mihoih teng bei khinta a, Pasianʼ tungah a thuman mi kuamah om nawn lo hi. Mihoih teng si khinta hi. Mi khempeuh in mi thah ding bek ngaihsun uh a, a kuamah peuh in a mipihte thah ding bek hanciam uh hi." 
Micah7:3 A sia lam a gamtat ding siam mahmah uh a, uliante le thukhente in sumgolh ngenin, mi liante in amauʼ deih teng pulak uh a, kipawlin vaihawm khawm uh hi." 
Micah7:4 Amaute lakah a hoih penin a kineite, lingkung bang hi a, a thutang pen a kineite, ling hiam bang hi lel uh hi. Pasian in amaute a hilhkholh bangin, gim a piak ding hun hong tung ta a, a lungmanʼ hun ding uh hong hi ta hi." 
Micah7:5 Na veengteʼ thu upin nei kei inla, na lawmte zong muanin nei kei in. Na ang a lum na zi kiang nangawn ah thu na gen ding kidawm in." 
Micah7:6 Tu hun ciangin tapate in a pate hai bawl a, tanute in a nute langpan uh a, mote in a teeknu uh langneih uh hi. Mi khat adingin ama innkuanpihte mah a gal a suak mawk hi." 
Micah7:7 Ahi zongin keʼn ka hih leh Topa mah ka en dinga, kei hong suaktasak Pasian ka ngak ding hi. Ka Pasian in ka thu hong ngai ding hi." 
Micah7:8 Ka galte aw, kei tungah lungdam kei un. Ka puk hangin ka thokik veve ding hi. Khuamial sungah ka om hangin Topa in khuavak hong pia ding hi." 
Micah7:9 Topa tungah khial khin ka hih manin ama hehna tawl khat ka thuak ding hi. Ahi zongin a tawpna ah kei hong huh dinga, a man lopi-in a hong kibawlna teng hong bawl phatsakin, amah in hong hon khia ding hi." 
Micah7:10 Tua hun ciangin ka galte in hih thu hong mu ding uh a, “Na Topa Pasian, koi ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in a hong tawng ka galte a maizum ding uh hi. Amaute guallel ding uh a, kongzing buannawng bangin a kisik gawp mu-in, kei ka nuam ding hi." 
Micah7:11 Jerusalem khua mite aw, na khuapi kulh uh a kiciankik ding hun hong tung dinga, tua hun ciangin na gamgi uh nakpi takin kikhan ding hi." 
Micah7:12 Nisuahna lam Assiria gam pan hitaleh, leitaw lam Egypt gam pan hitaleh, a gamlapi tuipi khen pan le a gamlapi mualte - mun khempeuh panin na mite uh hong ciahkik ding uh hi." 
Micah7:13 Ahi zongin a tungah a teeng miteʼ gitlohna hangin, leitung pen sehnel gamkhing a suak ding hi." 
Micah7:14 Topa aw, nangma tuu ahi na mite hong cing in. Gam nuam lei hoihna sungah amau guakin om uh hi. Tanglai huna mah bangin, Bashan le Gilead gam nuamah amaute gamtasak in." 
Micah7:15 Egypt gam pan na paikhiat hun lai uh bangin, amau adingin a lamdang nate ka bawl ding hi." 
Micah7:16 Minam dangte in hih thu mu ding uh a, minam thahat hi napi-in a maizum ding uh hi. Lamdang sa-in kam khat zong pau lo ding uh a, hih thu a zakzakna un a bil uh ngong liang ding hi." 
Micah7:17 Amaute in gul bangin leivui namin, a bokvak ganhingte bangin hong awmtal ding uh a, a bukna uh mun muanhuaite panin lau-in a liing sa-in hong pusuak ding uh a, Topa Pasian hong kihta ding uh hi." 
Micah7:18 Topa aw, nang tawh a kibang Pasian dang om lo a, a om lai na miteʼ mawhna nangmah in na maisak hi. Nang na heh paisuak kei a, na itna kip nong lak hi." 
Micah7:19 Kote nong khasiatkik dinga, ka mawhnate uh hong sawp khiatsakin, tuipi taw ah nong paihsak ding hi." 
Micah7:20 Ka pu ka pate uh tungah na ciam sa bangin, Abrahamʼ suanlekhakte ahi nangma mite tungah na cihtakna le nong itna kip nong lak ding hi." 
Nahum1:1 Hih pen Nineveh khua tawh kisai thu genna hi a, Elkosh khuami Nahumʼ maangmuhna a kiciaptehna lai ahi hi." 
Nahum1:2 Topa Pasian in amah a demte koihkhong lo a, amah a langpangte gim pia-in a galte thukkik hi." 
Nahum1:3 Topa lungduai mahmah a, a vang zong lian mahmah a, ahih hangin mimawhte khah khong ngei lo hi. A paina peuhpeuh ah huihpi nungin pingpei kipei a, ama paina hanga leivui leeng meiipi kai tawh kibang hi." 
Nahum1:4 Amah in tuipi a tai ciangin tuipi kangcip pah a, gunpite zong kangcipsak hi. Bashan gam keu gawpin Karmel Mual kausan a, Lebanon Mual a om pakpalhte a vul hi." 
Nahum1:5 Ama mai ah mual liante liing a, mual neute a tui suak hi. Ama mai ah leitang kicim a, leitung le a tunga om khempeuh a liing uh hi." 
Nahum1:6 Ama hehna kua in nang zo dinga, ama lunghamna kua in thuak zo ding ahi hiam? A hehna, meikuang bangin hong khah khia a, ama mai ah suangtumpite kitamzan hi." 
Nahum1:7 Topa hoih hi; lungkham hunin a mite huh a, amah a beel mite limtakin a kem hi." 
Nahum1:8 Tuikhang in a suksiat bangin a langte susia gawp a, a galte khempeuh khuamial sungah a nawt khia hi." 
Nahum1:9 Bang hangin Topa sawm ngam na hi hiam? Amah in nang hong susia ding hi. Amah a su peuhpeuh a dingkik zo omngei lo hi. 
Nahum1:10 Amaute, ling lom bangin om uh a, zu le sa tawh kidiahin a om laitakun ham bangin kihal tum ding hi." 
Nahum1:11 Nineveh khuapi aw, gitlohna tawh thu vaihawmin, Topa a sawm mite, nangʼ sungah om hi lo ahi hiam?" 
Nahum1:12 Topa in ama mite tungah hih bangin thu gen a, “Assiria mite thahatin a tam mahmah hangin, amaute kisusia-in maimang ding uh hi. No ka mite na hih uh leh, khatvei lai-in kong gimsak khit hangin tu-in note kong gimsakkik nawn kei ding hi." 
Nahum1:13 Noteʼ tungah Assiria miteʼ aana neihna ka beisak dinga, note hong khihna sikkhaute ka su tat ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum1:14 Topa in Assiria mite tawh kisai-in hih bangin thu pia hi: “Note na cimang ding uh a, na pasian-te uh biakinn sunga om milimte ka susia ding hi. Note siahuai lua na hih manun na hankhuk ding uh a bawlbawl ka hi ta hi,” a ci hi." 
Nahum1:15 En un, mual tungah kamtai pa hong tai a, gualzawh nading thupha hong gen ding ahi hi. Judah mite aw, pawi bawl unla, Pasianʼ tungah na ciam bangun gamta un. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote kisusiacip khin a, na gam uh hong simkik nawn lo ding hi." 
Nahum2:1 Nineveh khuapi aw, nang hong kisim ta a, nang hong su gawp ding pa hong tung ta hi. Na kan uh ah pang unla, lampi vil un. Kithawi unla, galdo dingin kiging un." 
Nahum2:2 (Israel mite, a galteʼ suk gawp ma, a nidang ngeina bangun Topa in a omsakkik ding a kipan ahi hi.)" 
Nahum2:3 A galkapte in lum san hong keng uh a, puan zong a san mah hong silh uh hi. A sim dingin hong kipan uh a, a sakol leengte uh khuaphia bang a, a sakolte uh hong koplen uh hi." 
Nahum2:4 Sakol leengte kongzing lakah kileh suk kileh to uh a, lamka bom khempeuh nawkin leeng kawikawi uh hi. Meikuang bangin kikhawh uh a, khuaphia bangin leeng uh hi." 
Nahum2:5 Galkap mangte kikaikhawm a, a galkapte uh thu pia uh hi. Amaute, kan phung lam kidenna uh a, a lum uh tawh kidal uh hi." 
Nahum2:6 Tui luanna gei ah a om kulh kongpite kisatkham a, kumpi inn sungah patauhna om hi." 
Nahum2:7 Kumpinu kimanin kipua khia a, a nasemte thumin kap uh a, dahin dip hum uh hi." 
Nahum2:8 Tuibeem kitam panin tui a kikhawh khia bangin, Nineveh khuapi panin mite a tai khia uh hi. “Khawl un, khawl un,” a kicih hangin khat beek nunghei lo uh hi." 
Nahum2:9 Ngunte la un! Khamte la un! Khua sungah sum manpha bei cih om thei lo a, van manpha zong bei cih om thei lo hi." 
Nahum2:10 Nineveh khuapi kisusia a, kinusiacipin gamkhing suak hi. Launa lungsim tawh kidimin khukte liing kelkel a, mi khempeuh lunggimin a mai ah sisan teeng lo hi." 
Nahum2:11 Humpinelkai note an a kivakna mun, humpinelkai le a note lungmuang a a omna mun, humpi-nelkaiteʼ kua tawh a kibang koi ah om ta ahi hiam?" 
Nahum2:12 Humpinelkai in sa manin a zi le a tate adingin a sa balnensak a, a kua sung khempeuh sa tawh kidimsak ngei hi." 
Nahum2:13 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei pen noteʼ gal ka hi a, na sakol leengte uh ka hal tum ding hi. Na humpinelkai note uh namsau in vatmai dinga, midangteʼ na na suh teng uh ka susia mangkhin ding hi. Na taangmite uhʼ awging koi mahah kiza nawn lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum3:1 Zuauna le mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi, van top ding tampi a omna khuapi, tu-in a siacip ding hi ta hi." 
Nahum3:2 Ngai un! Sakol kisatna a ging, leengpei kigawi, sakol koplenna kheging, sakol leeng a tuan lauhlauh gingte!" 
Nahum3:3 Sakol tung tuangteʼ galsimna, namsau phia zalzal! Teipi tee zalzal! Misi luanghawmte sim zawh ding hi lo, kiciangin vum venvan! Tuate tung mah tawnin gal kido!" 
Nahum3:4 Nineveh khuapi in a paktatna hangin gim thuak hi. Ngaihbaang mel pua-in bum siamna nei a, minamte zolin a khem hi." 
Nahum3:5 Tua ahih manin Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Nineveh khuapi aw, gim kong pia ding hi. Na nik kong hawk khiatsak dinga, minamte in na guak omna hong mu ding uh a, na zumhuaina teng hong mu ding uh hi." 
Nahum3:6 Nang hong huat bawlin ninbulom tawh kong kidimsak dinga, mite in lamdangsakna tawh nang hong en ding uh hi." 
Nahum3:7 Nang hong mu khempeuh nungkik gaihin, ‘Nineveh khuapi siacip ta hi; kua in khasiat ding ahi hiam?’ ci ding uh hi. Ahi zongin nang a hong hehnem nuam kuamah om lo ding hi,” ci hi." 
Nahum3:8 Nineveh aw, Thebes khuapi sangin a gina zaw kisa zenzen na hi hiam? Amah zong, a kimkot ah tui in umcih a, amah a dal ding nei a, a kulh dingin a kimkot ah tui om hi." 
Nahum3:9 Nail Gun dung, gam khempeuh uk khin ahih manin gen zawh lohin a vang lian hi. Put mite le Libya mite zong ama pawl ahi hi." 
Nahum3:10 Tua bang hi napi-in, Thebes khua mite kipua khia-in sal a suak uh hi. Kong lak mun citeng ah a tate uh kisatlum hi. A mi liante, sikkol kibulhin kipua khia a, amau a man a galte un amaute a hawm uh hi." 
Nahum3:11 Nineveh khuapi aw, nang zong zukham bangin khua na phawk kei dinga, na galte kiang panin tai-in bukna na zong ding hi." 
Nahum3:12 Na kulh muanhuaite pen theigah min zun mahmah tawh kibang dinga, a kung sing lecin a gah na kam sung a hong tu tawh kibang ding hi." 
Nahum3:13 Na galkapte, numei bang hi lel dinga, na galte a lut zawh loh nadingin na gam sung kihu zo lo ding hi. Na kulh kongpi zawlte mei in kaang tum ding hi." 
Nahum3:14 Hong ki-umcihna na nan nadingin tui tawi-in na kulhte ciang beh inla, leiseek a seek dingin buan cilin, leiseekna kuang a baih sa-in nei talecin zong," 
Nahum3:15 tua bang na hih laitakin mei in hong kangtumin galte in hong vatlum ding hi. Kauphe honpite in an a nektum bangin nang na bei mang ding hi. Kauphe bangin tampi tak na pha khin uh hi. 
Nahum3:16 Van a aksi sangin a tam zaw sum bawl mi na om khinta uh hi. A kha zalin a leeng mang kauphe honpi bangin tu-in amaute om nawn lo uh hi. 
Nahum3:17 Na uliante uh ahihleh, phalbi hun lai-in kulh tungah a bawm miamua, ni a suah ciangin leeng khia mangin, a omna mel a kithei nawn lo kauphe hon tawh kibang uh hi." 
Nahum3:18 Assiria kumpipa aw, na gam sung a ukte si ta a, na uliante ihmu paisuak uh hi. Na mite, mual tung tengah kithehthang a, inn ah a kaikhawm ding kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Nahum3:19 Na liammate, a dam theih nading om lo a, na meimate a dam thei lo pawl ahi hi. Na thuakna thu a za mi khempeuh in lungdamin a khut uh beeng ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh na gitlohna a thuak kha lo kuamah om lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:1 Hih pen kamsang Habakkuk tungah Topa in maangmuhna sungah a gen thu ahi hi. 
Habakkuk1:2 Topa aw, bang tanvei huhna hong ngen dinga, hong za loin om niloh ding na hi hiam? Gimna thuak ung, ci-in bang tanvei hong kiko dinga, hong hon loin, om niloh ding na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Bang hangin hih bang siatnate le lungkhamnate hong musak na hi hiam? Kisuksiatna le kisuk gawpna in hong umcih a, kitotna le kiseelna, mun citeng ah om hi." 
Habakkuk1:4 Thukham in thu nei zo loin a mawkna suak a, thu a manin kisem ngei lo hi. Thutang thute kilehhei-in, migilote in thuman mite zo zawsop hi." 
Habakkuk1:5 Tua ciangin Topa in a mite kiangah thu gen a, “No, a thuman lo ka minamte aw, na kiim uh a a om minam dangte en dih un; lamdang na sa mahmah ding uh hi. Note kiangah thu hong kigen ciangin na up zawh het loh ding uh thu lamdang khat tu-in a bawl ding ka hi hi." 
Habakkuk1:6 A omkhong thei lo, a kihtakhuai Khaldea mite, a vang ka liansak dinga, leitung khempeuh ah amaute pai-in gam khempeuh a zo mang khin ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:7 Amaute lauhuai-in, kihtakhuai mahmah uh a, a gen khempeuh uh nial theih hi lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:8 “A sakolte uh kamkei sangin tai hat zaw a, keivom gilkial sangin kihtakhuai zaw hi. Gamlapi pek panin a sakol tung tuangte hong kipan uh a, a sakolte un lei ah a khe phut uh hi. Muvanlai in sa a bawh bangin a galte a leenlak uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:9 “A susia gawp dingin hong kuan khia uh a, a sukkhak ding uh mi khempeuh lau mahmah uh hi. A galmatte uh tam mahmah a, sehnel zahin kisim zo lo hi." 
Habakkuk1:10 Kumpite, simmawh bawl uh a, uliante nuihsan lel uh hi. Kulh muanhuaite zong nuihsan lel uh a, a kulh pua ah lei sungvumin tua tungtawnin khuapi a la uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:11 Tua ciangin huihnung bangin paisuak uh a, amauʼ hatna bek a suang uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Topa aw, a cil pek a kipan a tawntungin Pasian na hi a, nang pen a tawntungin keima Pasian, a Siangtho Pa na hi hi. Topa aw, kote gim a hong pia dingin amaute na seh hi bek hi. Ka belh Suangpi aw, kote nong thuhilhna ding bekin amauteʼ tungah vang a pia bek na hi hi." 
Habakkuk1:13 Ahi zongin hih a gilo a zuau tat mite bangci thuak zawh na hi hiam? Hih bang siatna a mu dingin na mit siangtho lua a, a gamtat sia mite na thuak zo kei hi. Tua ahih manin amaute sangin a dik zaw mite a suksiatna ah bang hangin daicip na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Bang hangin tuipi ngasa bang lelin mihingte bawl a, a uk ding a om lo ganhing note bangin omsak na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Amaute in ngasa mat bangin sikkawi tawh mite man uh a, a ngen uh tawh khuhin manin a ngenpi uh tawh kai khia a, tua bangin a matna hangun lungdamin a awng uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:16 A ngente un amauʼ deih peuhpeuh ngahsak ahih manin, amaute in a ngente uh bia-in biakpiakna zong a pia uh hi." 
Habakkuk1:17 Amaute in a namsau uh zangin, hehpihna mel nei loin mi that ding ahi uh hiam?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ka khuadakna tausang tungah kah to-in, Topa in kei tungah bang hong gen dinga, ka lungkim lohna teng hong bangci dawn hiam, cih ka ngak hi." 
Habakkuk2:2 Tua ciangin Topa in hih bangin hong dawng a, “Nangmah ka hong muhsak thu khempeuh a sim nop mahmah dingin tungman peek tungah gelh in." 
Habakkuk2:3 Hih thu a tun nading hun hi pah nai lo ahih manin lai-in ciamteh in. Ahi zongin hong tung baih ta dinga, kong lah khempeuh a manin hong tung ding hi. A tung hak tawh a kibang kha ahi zongin ngak keikai in. Ka seh hun a cin ciangin hong tung takpi dinga, zekai lua nawn lo ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:4 Tua a hong tung ding thu pen ‘A gilo mite suakta lo dinga, thuman mite ahihleh Pasian tungah a cihtak manun nungta ding hi,’” a hong ci hi." 
Habakkuk2:5 Hauhna pen zuaupi hi a, a huaiham mite kiphasakin omkhong thei lo uh a, hankhuk mah bangin, pha zo, cih omsak thei lo uh a, lungkim hun cih nei thei lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte a banbanin simin a uk uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:6 A zawhna gam mite in amau a zo mite simmawh bawlin, “No aʼ ahi lopi kimlai no adingin na la uh a, ahi zongin tu-in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah lei hong bate khem bawlin, bang tanvei na hauhna uh behlap nuam lailai na hi uh hiam?” ci ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:7 Note in na phawk ma-un note mahmah leiba neite na suak ding uh a, na leiba uh a meet hong kisungsak ding hi. Galte in note hong liingsak keuhkeuh dinga, na nate uh hong laksak mang khin ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:8 Note in minam dang tampiteʼ na na sut uh a, tu-in a om lai mite in noteʼ na hong sut ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in mi thatin, khuapite le a sunga teeng mite na bawlsia uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:9 Miʼ van na suhna uh tawh na mite uh hausakin, lauhuaina le siatna a ngah loh nadingin na innkuan uh bawl na hih manun gim na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:10 Noteʼ vaihawmna mah in na mite uh tungah maizumna hong tun a, minam dangte na suksiatna uh tawh, note mahmahʼ siat nading a bawl na hi uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:11 Note a hong langpan dingin kulh suangte nangawn hong kiko dinga, innkamte in zong kiko pih ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:12 Note in mi thahna tawh khuapi satin, mawhna tawh khuapi phut na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:13 Na zawh uh minamteʼ nasepnate a mawkna suakin, amauʼ sep sa teng khempeuh a khu-in leeng mang hi. Hih thu pen Vanglian Topa in a piansak ahi hi." 
Habakkuk2:14 Tuipi, tui tawh a kidim mah bangin Topa ’ minthanna theihna tawh leitung kidim ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:15 Na hehna uh tawh na gamveengte uh niamkhiatin na mindaisak uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoisak na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi." 
Habakkuk2:16 Tua ahih manin note in zong minthanna ngah loin maizumin mindaina tawh na kidiah ding uh hi. Note mahmah in na hoi dongun na dawn ding uh hi. Topa in gimpiakna hai, note hong dawnsak dinga, na minthanna uh mindaina a suak ding hi." 
Habakkuk2:17 Note in Lebanon gam singkungte phuk na hih manun note zong hong kiphuk dinga, a ganhingte zong that na hih manun tu-in ganhingte in note hong lausak ding uh hi. Gam sung khempeuh ah mi thatin na bawlsiatna hang uh le khuapite le a sunga teengte na suksiatna hangun note tungah hih bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi." 
Habakkuk2:18 Milim, banga kimang ahi hiam? Mihingteʼ bawl tawm na khat hi lel a, thuman hong gen thei lo hi. Tua bangin a pau thei beek lo pasian a bawlpa in muanin a neih bang phatuam ahi hiam?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Sing khatpeuh a kibawl na khat kiangah, “Khanglo in,” ci-in, a pau thei lo suangtum kiangah, “Tho in,” ci na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Hih bang milim in note hong hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Ngun le kham tawh limtakin a kizut hangin a sungah nuntakna om lo hi." 
Habakkuk2:20 Topa, a biakinn siangtho sungah om hi; leitung mi khempeuh ama mai ah dai dide-in om ta uh hen." 
Habakkuk3:1 Kamsang Habakkuk in hih bangin thu ngen hi: 
Habakkuk3:2 Topa aw, nangma sep sa thute ka za a, lamdang ka sa mahmah hi. Na hih ngeisa na liante, koteʼ hunin zong hong hihkik in. Na heh hun ciang nangawnin zong hehpihna lungsim hong nei in." 
Habakkuk3:3 Teman khua panin Pasian hong pai a, Paran Mual panin Siangtho Pa hong pai hi. Ama minthanna vang in vanpi tuam a, leitung khempeuh, amah phatna tawh kidim hi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Khuaphialep taang bangin amah hong pai a, a khut sung panin khuavak taang khia a, tua pen a vangliatna a koihna mun ahi hi." 
Habakkuk3:5 Ama mai ah cinatna tungsak a, tua nungah sihna zuisak pah hi." 
Habakkuk3:6 Amah a khawl ciangin leitung liing a, amah in a et ciangin minam khempeuh liing uh hi. Tangtawng lai-in a tot sa, tanglai mual liante kitam kham a, a om tawntung mual neute kimetcip hi." 
Habakkuk3:7 Kush gam mite a lau mahmahna, Midian gam mite a linna ka mu hi." 
Habakkuk3:8 Topa aw, na sakolte tungah nang hong tuangin, na gualzawhna leengte tawh nong pai nadingin, gunpite tungah na heh suak a, tuipi tungah thangpai na hi hiam?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Na thal a lawn dingin na kithawi a, na thallawng sungah na thaltang a dimin om a, na keek in leitung kap kham hi." 
Habakkuk3:10 Mual liante in nang hong muh ciangin liing uh a, van panin guah tampi hong zu hi. Leinuai-a om tuite ging zuazua a, tuihualte in a sang pipi ban to hi." 
Habakkuk3:11 Na thaltang leeng a muh ciang, na teipi tee zalzal a muh ciangin, ni le kha a omna sanah a khawlcip uh hi." 
Habakkuk3:12 A hehsa-in leitungah na pai a, a sin so sa-in minamte na tuancil hi." 
Habakkuk3:13 Na mite a hon khia dingin na paikhia a, na teel kumpipa, a hon khia dingin na kuan khia hi. Migiloteʼ makai pa na su gawp a, a nungzui khempeuh tawh zong na sumai hi." 
Habakkuk3:14 Mi cimawhte, mun simtham ah a suk gawp bangin, kote a hong suthang dingin huihpi bangin hong pai laitakin na thal tawh a galkap mangpa na kap let hi." 
Habakkuk3:15 Nangmah in na sakolte tawh tuipi na tuancil a, tui lianpite phuan zuazua hi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Hih thute khempeuh ka zak ciangin ka pumlinʼ a, lau lua-in ka muk liing sapsap hi. Ka guh ka taang hong zen a, guh nei lo bangin ka puk cip suk hi. Ko hong sim gawp mite Pasian in gim a piak ding hun daitakin ka ngak khikhe ding hi." 
Habakkuk3:17 Theigahte a hut khin a, leengguite a gah kei zongin, oliv kungte gah lo a, lo ah an a piang kei zongin, tuu khempeuh a si khin a, ganbuk khempeuh a hawm khin zongin," 
Habakkuk3:18 Topa Pasian pen hong hon khia pa ahih manin lungdamin ka kipak lai veve ding hi. 
Habakkuk3:19 Topa Pasian, keima thahatna ahi hi; sakhi khe bangin ka khe hong zaptelsak a, mun sangna ah lungmuang takin kei hong paisak hi." 
Zephaniah1:1 Amonʼ tapa Josiah, Judah gam kumpi ahih laitakin, Topa in Zefaniahʼ tungah hih thu a pia hi. Zefaniahʼ pa Kushi hi a, Kushiʼ pa Gedaliah hi a, Gedaliahʼ pa Amariah hi a, Amariahʼ pa pen Kumpi Hezekiah ahi hi" 
Zephaniah1:2 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Leitung a om na khempeuh ka susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:3 Mihing le ganhing, van a leeng vasa le tui sunga ngasa, a vekpi-in ka susia ding hi. Migilote ka susia dinga, leitung a om mihing khempeuh ka susia ding hi. Topa ahi keimah in hih thu ka gen khin hi." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Judah gam mi khempeuh susia mangin, Jerusalem khuami khempeuh ka sumai ding hi. Baal milim biakna a them baang lai khempeuh le tua milim na a sem siampite ahi a, keima siampite ahi zongin, a vekpi-in ka sumai ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:5 Innkhum zang ah kah to-in, ni, kha le aksi a bia mi khempeuh ka susia dinga, keimah hong bia-in, keima tungah thuman ding gen napi-in, Milkom pasianʼ min tawh a kiciam teiteite zong, ka susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:6 Lam pialin, kei hong zui nawn lote, thu dong dingin kei kiangah hong pai nawn lote, ka susia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:7 Topa Pasianʼ mai ah gamdai takin om un! Topaʼ ni hong nai ta hi. Topa in biakna-a sa gawh bangin a mite a go dingin kithawi a, a gawh ding mite siansuah khin hi." 
Zephaniah1:8 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua bangin mite a kigawh ni-in, uliante le kumpipaʼ tapate, le gamdangteʼ ngeina a zuite khempeuh, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:9 Lawki mite bangin biakinn sungah a lamte, khemna le thahna tawh a ngah uh vante tawh, a topa uhʼ inn a dimsakte khempeuh, tua ni mahin gim ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:10 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Jerusalem khua-a om Ngasa Kulh kongpi ah miteʼ kikona na za ding uh a, tua khuapi Veeng Nihna sungah miteʼ kahna le mual neute tungah a puak zaizai na za ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Khuapi Veeng Nuainung sungah a teeng mite aw, hih bang gamlumna na zak uh ciangin kapin thum un. Bang hang hiam cih leh sumbukte khempeuh si ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:12 “Tua laitakin Jerusalem khua sung meivak tawh ka zong dinga, thuphawk loin, a ngeina bangun omcip a, ‘ Topa in a pha hitaleh a sia hitaleh bangmah bawl ngei lo hi,’ a ci mite, gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:13 Amauʼ neihsa khempeuh kisut dinga, a innte uh kisuksiatsak ding hi. Inn a lam hangun a sungah teeng kha lo ding uh a, leenggui a suan hangun a leenggahzu dawn kha lo ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:14 Topaʼ ni hong nai ta a, nai mahmah in hong tung hathat hi. Tua Topaʼ ni hong tun ciangin galhang pente nangawn cimawhin kap ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah1:15 Tua ni pen heh mahmah ni, lungkham sinkham ni, tuahsia-in kisuksiat gawp ni, khua zingin mai mial ni, meiipi kai-in huihpi nun ni," 
Zephaniah1:16 galdo nading peengkul a kitum ni, kulh nei khuapite le a tausangte a kisimna-in galkapte a kiko ni hi ding hi." 
Zephaniah1:17 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Mihingte tungah lungkhamna lianpi ka tungsak dinga, amaute in mittaw bangin khua a zawt ding uh hi. Keima tungah amaute hong khial uh ahih manin, a sisan uh tui bangin kithehthang dinga, a luanghawm uh leilak ah muatcip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Topaʼ heh thuk ni hong tun ciangin a ngun le a khamte un amaute hon khia zo lo ding hi. Ama hehna meikuang in leitung khempeuh kaang tum dinga, thakhat thu-in leitung a teeng mi khempeuh a sumai ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:1 A maizum thei lo minam aw, hoihtakin thu ngaihsun in." 
Zephaniah2:2 Ansi bangin hong kizapkhiat ma, Topaʼ hehna na tungah hong tuk ma, Topa in a hehna hong lah hun a tun ma-in thu ngaihsunin kikheel in." 
Zephaniah2:3 Kiniamkhiatin, Topaʼ thupiakna a mang Judah gam mi khempeuh aw, Topaʼ kiang zuan un. A manin gamta unla, kiniamkhiat un. Tua hileh Topaʼ hehna hong kilat ciangin, tua hehna hangin gimna panin na peng kha thei ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaza khuapi ah kuamah om nawn lo dinga, Ashkelon khuapi kisusia ding hi. Ashdod khua mite suntangpi-in kihawl khia dinga, Ekron khua mite kipaikhiat pih mang ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:5 Tuipi gei ah a gual ten, no Filistia gam mite aw, gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Filistia miteʼ teenna Kanaan leitang aw, Topa in nang tungah thu hong khen zo hi. Mi khempeuh a bei mang dongin hong susia ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:6 Tuipi gei-a om leitang aw, tuuteʼ gamtatna mun, gamlak na suak lel ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:7 Judah mi a omlaite in na gam sung luah ding uh a, amaute in tuucinna in nei-in, Ashkelon khua sunga om innte sungah zanin lum ding uh hi. Topa ahi amauteʼ Pasian in amaute ompih dinga, cithei sakkik ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:8 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Moab mite in ka mite a simmawhna, Ammon mite in ka mite a zahkona le ka miteʼ gam a sut gawp dingin, a kisaktheih paunate uh ka za khin hi." 
Zephaniah2:9 Kei pen a nungta Israel Pasian ka hih mah bangin, Moab mite, Sodom mite bangin kisusia-in, Ammon mite, Gomorrah mite bangin kisusia-in, a gam sung uh ah lingkung bek po zo-in, a gam uh cikhuk tawh kidimin a sia tawntung suakin, a suakta lai ka mite in a neihsa uh sutin, a gam uh a laksak kei tak leh, ci-in ka kiciam hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah2:10 Amaute in Vanglian Topaʼ mite simmawhin kihisak uh ahih manin, a kiphatsakna hangun Moab mite le Ammon mite in hih bangin gim thuak ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Topa in amaute lausak gawp dinga, leitung pasian-te, neubawl gawp ding hi. Tua ciangin minam khempeuh in amauʼ gam ciat panun amah bia ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah2:12 No Ethiopia mite zong, Topa in hong that ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:13 Topa in leilu lamah a khut hong zanin Assiria gam susia dinga, Nineveh khuapi susia gawpin sehnel gam a suaksak ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:14 Tuu le bawnghonte tua khua sungah lumin, gan namkim khawk a suak ding hi. Gunva le gunvapite baang tung zawl ah tuangin, tawlet ah keising khuangin, sangkil tungah va-ak ham ding hi. Taamtak sing tawh a kilam innte maimang ding hi." 
Zephaniah2:15 A vangliatna a kisaktheih pih, lungmuang takin a om khuapi, tu-a bangin piang ding hi. Leitungah amauʼ khuapi a lian penin ngaihsun uh hi. Tua hi napi-in gamlak suakin, gamsateʼ omna suakta hi. A mu mi khempeuh in lamdang sa-in kigaih ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:1 Ama mite mah nengniamin, thumang loin a tatsia, Jerusalem khuapi in gimna ngah ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:2 Topaʼ thu ngai nuam lo a, a thuhilhna sang nuam lo hi. Topa muang nuam lo a, a Pasian naih nuam lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:3 A uliante, humpinelkai gilkial bang a, a thukhente, keivom gilkial bang uh hi. Zingsang khuavak mateng a saguh nek a nusia nuam lo, a huaiham gamsate tawh kibang uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:4 A kamsangte kihisak uh a, kamsang citak hi lo uh hi. A siampite in a siangtho nate ninsak uh a, amau angsung ding bek a khualna-un Pasianʼ thukham leh hei uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:5 Ahi zongin tua khuapi sungah Topa omin, a thuman na bek sem a, a khialin gamta ngei lo hi. Zingsang simin mihingte tungah pelh ngei loin thutang lak hi. Ahi zongin tua lai-a mihing thuman lote, a sia-in gamta teitei uh a, maizumna mel theithei lo uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:6 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “A kiphasak mite ka nil khia a, a gal panmunte uh ka susia hi. A kongzing lampite uh ka kinusiacipsak a, tua lampi kuamah in tawn nawn lo hi. A khuapi uh kisia gawpin kinusia a, a sungah kuamah om nawn lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:7 Tua ahih manin ka mite in kei hong zahtakin ka thuhilhna ngai ding uh a, mangngilh lo ding uh hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun hi. Ahi zongin a gamtat siat ngei bangun gamta lai veve uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah3:8 Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Tua ahih ciangin minamte ka mawhsak ni hun dong kei hong ngak phot dih un. Minamte le kumpi gamte kaikhawmin, ka hehna ka thuaksak ding, ka lungsim ka khensat khin hi. Ka hehluatna meikuang tawh leitung khempeuh kaang tum ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Tua ciangin minamteʼ lungsim ka hei dinga, amaute in keima tung bekah thu hong ngenin, lungsim kikhatin ka na hong sem ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:10 A gamlapi Ethiopia gam pekah a om, a kithehthang ka mite nangawn in biakna hong puak ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:11 Tua hun ciangin ka mite in kei nong lehdona hangun maizum nading bangmah om nawn lo ding hi. Note lak panin a kiphasak, a kihisak mite ka hawl khia dinga, Jerusalem khua-a ka mual siangtho tungah kei nong lehdo nawn kei ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:12 Note lakah a kiniamkhiat, mi neute bek, ka suaktasak lai dinga, keima tungah huhna hong ngen ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:13 Israel mi a om lai sunte, midangte tungah gilo nawn lo ding uh a, zuau thu gen nawn loin, mi khem ding zong ngaihsun nawn lo ding uh hi. Amaute cithei-in lungmuangin om ding uh a, kuamah kihta nawn loin om ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zephaniah3:14 Zion tanu aw, nakpi takin la sa inla, Israel aw, lungdamin kiko in. Jerusalem tanu aw, na lungsim khempeuh tawh lungdam in." 
Zephaniah3:15 Topa in na galte hong phiatkhiatsak khin a, hong langpang khempeuh hong hawl khiatsak khin hi. Topa ahi Israel kumpipa nang tawh hong om a, na launa ding bangmah om nawn lo hi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Tua ni ciangin Jerusalem khuapi kiangah, “Zion khuapi aw, lau kei in. Na khut tha zawsak kei in,” kici ding hi." 
Zephaniah3:17 Topa na Pasian un note hong ompih a, ama vangliatna in hong gualzosak hi. Note tungah Topa lungkim dinga, ama hong itna tawh hong thakbawl ding hi. Noteʼ hangin Topa lungdamin la sa dinga," 
Zephaniah3:18 pawi hun sungah mi a lungdamte bang ding hi. Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, “Note adingin a lauhuai thu ka beisak khin a, na mindaina teng uh kong paih khiatsak khin hi." 
Zephaniah3:19 En un, tua hun ciangin no a hong bawlsiate gim ka pia dinga, a khebaite hon khia-in, a kipaikhiat pih mite ka ciah pihkik ding hi. Amauʼ maizumna uh minthanna ka suaksak dinga, mi khempeuh in amaute a phat ding uh hi." 
Zephaniah3:20 Tua hun ciangin, a kithehthang na mite uh kong kaikhawm dinga, leitung mi khempeuh in note hong phat ding uh hi. A tawpna ah note na citheikik ding uh hi,” Topa in ci hi, a ci hi." 
Haggai1:1 Persia gam uk kumpi Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni masa ni-in, kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen hi. Tua a thugen pen, Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel, Judah gam ukpa le Jehozadakʼ tapa Joshua, siampi lianpen pa tungah gen ding ahi hi." 
Haggai1:1 Persia gam uk kumpi Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni masa ni-in, kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen hi. Tua a thugen pen, Shealtielʼ tapa Zerubbabel, Judah gam ukpa le Jehozadakʼ tapa Joshua, siampi lianpen pa tungah gen ding ahi hi." 
Haggai1:2 Vanglian Topa in thu gen a, “Hih mite in, biakinn lamkik ding hun nai lo hi, ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai1:3 Tua ciangin kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in hih bangin thu gen a," 
Haggai1:4 “Ka mite aw, ka biakinn a siacipin a om laitakin, inn hoih pipi sungah note na om ding uh kilawm sa na hi uh hiam?" 
Haggai1:5 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in ka hong cih in ah: Tu laitak a na om zia uh limtakin ngaihsun un. 
Haggai1:6 Khaici tampi na tuh uh hangin an tawm bek na la uh a, annek ding na neih tei uh hangin na kham ding uh na nei kei uh hi. Dawn ding leenggahzu na neih tei uh hangin na kham ding uh na nei kei uh hi. Puansilh ding na neih tei uh hangin a lum khop ding na nei kei uh hi. Sum thalawhte in zong a khamkhop ding uh thalawh zo lo uh hi." 
Haggai1:7 Tua ahih ciangin Vanglian Topa in ka hong cih in ah: Tu laitak a na om zia uh limtakin ngaihsun un. 
Haggai1:8 Tu-in mual tungah kuan to unla, sing sui un. Tua singte tawh biakinn lamkik le-uhcin kei ka lungkim dinga, nong biak ding uh a kilawm bangin kei nong bia thei ding uh hi." 
Haggai1:9 “An hau dingin na kilamet uh hangin tawmcik bek na nei uh hi. Na neihsunte nangawn uh inn na tunpih uh hangin kong mut khiatsak mangkhin hi. Bang hangin tua cih ka hi hiam? Note khempeuh, nomauʼ inn ding ciat lamin na manlah uh a, ka biakinn a siapi-in na koih dakna hang uh ahi hi." 
Haggai1:10 Tua thu hangin guah zu lo a, leitang panin bangmah khang khia zo lo hi." 
Haggai1:11 Keimah in gam sungteng, mual tung khempeuh, leitang pan a a piang kung khempeuh, mihing, ganhing le miteʼ nasepna khempeuh ah keuna ka tungsak hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai1:12 Tua ciangin Sheatielʼ tapa Zerubbabel, Jehozadakʼ tapa Joshua ahi siampi lianpen pa le salsuahna panin hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in Topa ahi amauʼ Pasianʼ thu mang uh a, Topa Pasianʼ kamtai ahi kamsang Haggaiʼ gen bangin gamta-in, Topa zahtakin a lau uh hi." 
Haggai1:12 Tua ciangin Sheatielʼ tapa Zerubbabel, Jehozadakʼ tapa Joshua ahi siampi lianpen pa le salsuahna panin hong ciahkik mi khempeuh in Topa ahi amauʼ Pasianʼ thu mang uh a, Topa Pasianʼ kamtai ahi kamsang Haggaiʼ gen bangin gamta-in, Topa zahtakin a lau uh hi." 
Haggai1:13 Tua ciangin Topaʼ kamtai Haggai in mite tungah Topaʼ thugente gen sawn a, “ Topa in note kong ompih hi,” ci hi, ci-in a gen hi." 
Haggai1:14 Tua hi a, Topa in Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua le salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mi khempeuhʼ sungah biakinn lam nopna lungsim a guan hi. Vanglian Topa, amauʼ Pasianʼ biakinn a lam dingin hong kithawi uh a," 
Haggai1:14 Tua hi a, Topa in Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua le salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mi khempeuhʼ sungah biakinn lam nopna lungsim a guan hi. Vanglian Topa, amauʼ Pasianʼ biakinn a lam dingin hong kithawi uh a," 
Haggai1:15 Darias in kumpi a sep a kum nihna kum, a kha gukna a ni sawm nih le ni li ni-in biakinn lam hong kipan uh hi." 
Haggai2:1 Tua kum mah, a kha sagihna, a ni sawm nih le ni khat ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen a," 
Haggai2:2 Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua le mi khempeuh tungah thu a gen dingin sawl a," 
Haggai2:2 Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel, siampi lianpen pa Joshua le mi khempeuh tungah thu a gen dingin sawl a," 
Haggai2:3 “Nidang a biakinn a hoihna dan a ciamteh thei lai na om uh hiam? Tu-in bangci na sa uh hiam? Noteʼ muhna ah a gen taak het lo tawh kibang ding hi. 
Haggai2:4 Tu-in note kuamah lungkia kei un. Note tawh hong om khawm ka hih manin nasep kipan un. 
Haggai2:5 Egypt gam panin na paikhiat lai-un, note kong ompih tawntungna ding thu kong ciam hi. Tu-in zong note hong ompih lai ka hih manin lau kei un." 
Haggai2:6 “A sawt loin vanpi le leipi, tuipi le leitung ka lok gawp ding hi." 
Haggai2:7 Minam dang khempeuh lok gawp ding ka hih manin a neihsa uh sum le paite, hih munah hong kipuak dinga, biakinn sungah a dimin van hong om ding hi." 
Haggai2:8 Leitung a a om ngun le kham khempeuh keima-aʼ ahi hi. 
Haggai2:9 Biakinn thak pen a lui sangin hoih zaw-in thupi zaw ding hi. Hih biakinn ah cihtheihna le nopsakna kong pia ding hi,” cisak hi." 
Haggai2:10 Gam uk kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna mah, a kha kuana a ni sawm nih le ni li ni-in kamsang Haggai tungah Topa in thu gen leuleu a," 
Haggai2:11 “Hih thu tawh kisai-in siampiteʼ ngaihsutna dong in: 
Haggai2:12 Mi khatpeuh in biakna-a a kipia sa siangtho them khat, a puan tualpi thep kawmah pua kha henla, tua a puan tualpi tawh anlum khat peuhpeuh ahi a, a kihuan an khat peuhpeuh ahi a, leenggahzu, ahih kei le oliv thau, ahih kei leh an nam khat peuhpeuh ahi zongin su kha leh, tua a sukkhak an pen biakna an siangtho a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dongsak hi. Tua bangin a kidot ciangin siampite in, “Tua puan tualpi in a sukkhak ante, biakna an siangtho suak tuan lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Haggai2:13 Tua ciangin Haggai in, “Mi khat in, misi tawh a kisukkhak manin mi nin a suah khit ciangin hih ante khat peuhpeuh lawng kha leh tua a lawnkhak ante a nin a suak ding hiam?” ci-in a dong hi. Siampite in, “A nin suak ding hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Haggai2:14 Tua ciangin Haggai in thu gen a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Tu-a nong dawnna uh mah bangin hih minam dangteʼ sepna khempeuh ah tua bangin piang ahih manin, biakna tau tungah a piak uh na khempeuh a nin suak hi." 
Haggai2:15 “Note tungah a piang sa thute limtakin ngaihsun un. Topaʼ biakinn lam ding na kipat ma-un bangci na hi uh hiam? 
Haggai2:16 An seu sawm nih pha ding ci-in ansal ah na pai uh ciangin seu sawm bek na pha a, leenggahzu thawlpi sawm nga pha ding ci-in leenggahzu kholna beel pi ah na pai uh ciangin thawlpi sawm nih dim bek a na pha hi." 
Haggai2:17 Na an ciin khempeuh uh cingteek sakin ka kausansak a, tuate nangawn a susia dingin gialpi ka kiatsak hangin note na kisik nuam kei lailai uh hi." 
Haggai2:18 Tu-in, kha kuana a ni sawm nih le ni li ni, biakinn bulpi a kiphuh khit, tu ni a kipanin limtakin ngaihsun un." 
Haggai2:19 Na ansal uh ah na upmawh zah sangun an na tawm zaw lai ding ahi hiam? Leenggui le theikung, mang kawlsing le oliv kungte gah nai lo lai ding ahi hiam? Tua bang hi nawn lo dinga, tu ni a kipanin note thupha kong pia ding hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Haggai2:20 Tua kha a ni sawm nih le ni li ni mahin Topa in Haggai tungah a nih veina thu genkik a," 
Haggai2:21 “Vanpi le leipi a lok gawp ding ka hihna thu, Judah gam ukpa Zerubbabel kiangah gen in." 
Haggai2:22 Kumpipaʼ gam khempeuh lumletin a vangliatna uh a beisak ding ka hi hi. Leengte le leeng hawlte ka lawnthal dinga, sakol leengte le a tung tuangte puk ding uh a, amaute khatlekhat kithat lum ding uh hi." 
Haggai2:23 Ka nasem Zerubbabel aw, tua ni ciangin nang hong la-in ka miteʼ kumpi dingin kong bawl ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen ka hong teelpa na hi hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah1:1 Persia gam uk Kumpipa Darias in a uk a kum nihna, a kha giatna sungin Topa in kamsang Zekhariah tungah thu a gen hi. Zekhariah pen Berekhiahʼ tapa hi a, ama pu Iddo ahi hi." 
Zechariah1:2 Topa in Zekhariah kiangah, “Mite tungah hih bangin thu gen in: ‘Na pu na pate uh tungah Topa ahi keimah ka heh mahmah hi." 
Zechariah1:3 Ahi zongin tu-in kei kiangah hong ciahkik le-uhcin, kei zong note kiangah kong paikik ding hi." 
Zechariah1:4 Na pu na pate uh bang nawn kei un. Nidang a kamsangte in amaute kiangah ka thu gen uh a, gamtat sia gamta loin, a mawh nawn loh nading hilh uh hi. Ahi zongin amaute in ka thu ngai nuam loin, ka thu hong mang lo uh hi." 
Zechariah1:5 Tu-in na pu na pate uh koi ah om ahi hiam? Tua kamsangte nungta lai sa na hi uh hiam? 
Zechariah1:6 Ahi zongin ka nasem ahi kamsangteʼ tungtawnin ka hilhkholhna le ka thupiaknate in note dongin hong su kha lo ding sa na hi uh hiam, ka ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tawpna ah amaute kisik uh a, hih dinga ka lungsimah ka geel sa bangin amauʼ gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim a pia ka hihna thu a phawk uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah1:7 Darias in a uk a kum nihna kum, kha sawm le khatna ahi Shebat kha ni sawm nih le ni li ni-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, zanin maang hong musak hi." 
Zechariah1:8 Topaʼ vantungmi khat sakol san khat tungah a tuang ka mu hi. Kuam sunga a om mui singkungte lakah amah khawl a, ama nungah sakol dang a san, a gial, a kang om hi." 
Zechariah1:9 Tua ciangin keimah in, “Sia aw, hih sakolte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Bang a cihnopna hiam cih kong lak ding hi." 
Zechariah1:10 Hih sakol tung tuangte pai kawikawi-in leitung a en dingin Topa in a sawl ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:11 Tua ciangin mui kung lakah a khawl Topaʼ vantung mite kiangah amaute in, “Leitung khempeuh ka en kawikawi khin uh a, leitung khempeuh khua phawk loin nuam takin om uh hi,” ci-in thu a zasak uh hi." 
Zechariah1:12 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in, “Vanglian Topa aw, Jerusalem khuapi le Judah gam khuapite tungah kum sawm sagih sung na heh khinta hi. Amaute hehpih loin bang tanvei om lai ding na hi hiam?” ci hi." 
Zechariah1:13 Tua ciangin Topa in dikna le hehnepna kam tawh vantung mite dawng a," 
Zechariah1:14 Vanglian Topa in ama tungah a gen sa thute khempeuh keimah in ka taangko sawn nadingin tua vantungmi in kei hong sawl a, “Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem, nakpi takin itin ka lunghimawh hi." 
Zechariah1:15 Tua bangin nuam takin a om hithiat minamte tungah ka heh mahmah hi. Ka mite tungah ka hehna ki-ip tentanin ka om laitakin, hih minam dangte in ka miteʼ gimna nasiasak semsem uh hi." 
Zechariah1:16 Tua ahih ciangin Jerusalem khuapi tungah ka hehpihna a lak dingin ka hong paikik hi. Tua khuapi sungah ka biakinn kilamkik dinga, khuapi kulh zong kiciangkik ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:17 Tua ciangin vantungmi in ka taangkona ding hong genkik leuleu a, “Ama khuapite nakpi takin citheikikin, Jerusalem khuapi a hehnep kikna ding le ama khuapi-in a neihkikna ding, Vanglian Topa in gen hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:18 Ka khuadak leh saki li ka mu hi. 
Zechariah1:19 Bang a cihnopna ahi hiam, ci-in vantungmi kiangah ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Judah mite le Jerusalem mite a thehthang gawp leitung vangliatnate a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah1:20 Tua ciangin Topa in sek tawi mihing li hong lak hi. 
Zechariah1:21 Hih mite, bang hih ding ahi hiam, ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Hih saki lite in Judah mite thehthang gawp a, alang uh ah kuamah pang ngam lo ahih manin, Judah gam su gawpin a mite a thehthang gawp minamte, tu-in hih sek tawi lite in lausakin a lawnthal ding ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah2:1 Ka muhna dang khat leuleu ah, a khut sungah tehna khau a tawi mi khat ka mu hi." 
Zechariah2:2 Koi a pai ding na hi hiam, ci-in ka dot ciangin amah in, “Jerusalem khuapi a sauna ka theih nadingin a teh dingin a pai ding ka hi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah2:3 Tua ciangin vantung mipa hong paikhia a, vantung midang khat in amah na dawntuah hi." 
Zechariah2:4 Tua ciangin vantungmi a masa pa in a dawntuah pa kiangah, “Va tai inla, tehna khau a tawi tangvalpa kiangah hih thu va gen in. Jerusalem khua sungah mihing le ganhing tam mahmah ding ahih manin Jerusalem kulh huam sungah ta zo lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:5 Tua khuapi a hu dingin mei kulh bangin Topa mahmah a omna ding le tua khua sungah a minthanna tawh a ten nading thu, Topa in kamciam zo hi, ci-in va gen in,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah2:6 Topa in ama mite kiangah, “Mun khempeuh ah note kong thehthang khin hi. Ahi zongin tu-in Babylon panin tai khia-in Jerusalem ah ciahkik un." 
Zechariah2:7 Babylon ah a om mite aw, Zion ah tai un,” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:8 Hih bangin maang ka muh khit ciangin, ama miteʼ na a sut gawp minam dangte kiangah thu a gen dingin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl a, Topaʼ mite a su mi peuhpeuh in a mitnauta bangin a manpha pen khat a su ahi hi." 
Zechariah2:9 Topa mahmah in note hong su dinga, nidang a noteʼ na hong sepsak mite in tu-in noteʼ nate hong leh suhkik ding uh hi, hong cisak hi. Hih bangin thu hong pian ciangin Vanglian Topa in kei hong sawl ahih lamtak na thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:10 Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: “Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin la sa un. Note tawh a hong om khawm ta ding ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Zechariah2:11 Tua hun ciangin Topa kiangah minam tampi hong pai ding uh a, ama mite a suak ding uh hi. Topa in note hong ompih dinga, tua ciangin note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah2:12 Judah mite pen gam siangtho sungah Topaʼ neihtuam hong suakkik dinga, Jerusalem khua pen ama it penpen khuapi hong hikik ding hi." 
Zechariah2:13 Mi khempeuh aw, Topaʼ mai ah gamdai-in om un. Bang hang hiam cih leh a siangtho ama omna mun panin amah hong paikhia ta hi." 
Zechariah3:1 Topa in maang hong musak a, Topaʼ vantungmi mai ah siampi lianpen pa Joshuaʼ mawhna a zong dingin a kiangah Satan zong a om ka mu hi." 
Zechariah3:1 Topa in maang hong musak a, Topaʼ vantungmi mai ah siampi lianpen pa Joshuaʼ mawhna a zong dingin a kiangah Satan zong a om ka mu hi." 
Zechariah3:2 Topaʼ vantungmi in Satan kiangah, “Satan aw, Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Jerusalem a it Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Hih Joshua pen meikhuk sung panin a kiteen khia singkhuah tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:2 Topaʼ vantungmi in Satan kiangah, “Satan aw, Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Jerusalem a it Topa in nang hong mawhsak hi. Hih Joshua pen meikhuk sung panin a kiteen khia singkhuah tawh kibang hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua ahihleh vantungmi mai ah dinga, puan a nin mahmah a silh hi." 
Zechariah3:3 Joshua ahihleh vantungmi mai ah dinga, puan a nin mahmah a silh hi." 
Zechariah3:4 Vantungmi in ama sawltak van midangte kiangah, “Hih mipaʼ silh a puan ninte suahkhiatsak un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in Joshua kiangah, “Na mawhna teng kong paih khiatsak khin a, tu-in na silh dingin puan thak kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:4 Vantungmi in ama sawltak van midangte kiangah, “Hih mipaʼ silh a puan ninte suahkhiatsak un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in Joshua kiangah, “Na mawhna teng kong paih khiatsak khin a, tu-in na silh dingin puan thak kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Tua ciangin a sawltak van mite thu pia a, Joshuaʼ lu tungah dial siangtho a khipsak ding uh a sawl hi. Topaʼ vantungmi tua munah a din sung mahin, amaute in zong Joshua, dial siangtho khimsakin, tua khit ciangin puan siangtho zong a silhsak uh hi." 
Zechariah3:5 Tua ciangin a sawltak van mite thu pia a, Joshuaʼ lu tungah dial siangtho a khipsak ding uh a sawl hi. Topaʼ vantungmi tua munah a din sung mahin, amaute in zong Joshua, dial siangtho khimsakin, tua khit ciangin puan siangtho zong a silhsak uh hi." 
Zechariah3:6 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in Joshua kiangah limtakin thu gen a," 
Zechariah3:6 Tua ciangin Topaʼ vantungmi in Joshua kiangah limtakin thu gen a,"
