Zechariah3:7 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Ka thukhamte zui-in kong sawl thute na sep leh, ka biakinn sung le biakinn huang sungteng na uk dinga, hih ka kiang a om vantung miteʼ thu ka ngaih bangin nangma thu zong ka hong ngai ding hi." 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahih ciangin siampi lianpen pa Joshua aw ngai in: Ama siampi pih ahi no a dangte in zong ngai un. Note pen mailam thuhoihna ding lim na hi uh hi. Sing bangin A Sel a kici min nei khat kong paisak ding hi. 
Zechariah3:8 Tua ahih ciangin siampi lianpen pa Joshua aw ngai in: Ama siampi pih ahi no a dangte in zong ngai un. Note pen mailam thuhoihna ding lim na hi uh hi. Sing bangin A Sel a kici min nei khat kong paisak ding hi. 
Zechariah3:9 Joshuaʼ omna mai ah, mai sagih a nei suang khat ka koih hi; tua suang tungah lai ka gelh dinga, ni khat sungin hih gam miteʼ mawhna ka paih khiatsak ding hi." 
Zechariah3:9 Joshuaʼ omna mai ah, mai sagih a nei suang khat ka koih hi; tua suang tungah lai ka gelh dinga, ni khat sungin hih gam miteʼ mawhna ka paih khiatsak ding hi." 
Zechariah3:10 Tua ni ciangin note khempeuh in leenggui le theikungte hau-in nuam na sa ding uh a, na veengte ciat un hong nek pihin hong lungdam pih nadingun na sam ding uh hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah4:1 Kei tawh a kiho vantungmi mah hong paikik a, a ihmu kimlai a kiphong bang keekin kei hong khanglosak hi." 
Zechariah4:2 Amah in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Kei zong, “Kham tawh a kibawl meivak khuam khat ka mu hi. Tua meivak khuam in meivak sagih nei a, meivak tui koih nading hai khat zong a khuam dawnah om hi. Tua meivak sagihte in meivak khau nei ciat uh hi." 
Zechariah4:3 Meivak khuam gei ah oliv kung nih zong om a, meivak khuam lang tuakah om uh hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah4:4 Tua ciangin kei zong vantungmi kiangah, “Sia aw, hihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dot ciangin" 
Zechariah4:5 amah in, “A cihnopna thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dawng a, kei zong, “Sia aw, ka thei kei hi,” ci-in ka dawngkik hi." 
Zechariah4:6 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei kiangah, “ Topa in Zerubbabel tungah hih bangin thu gen hi: Galkap tam neihna hang hi lo, nangma vangliatna hang zong hi lo, keima tung panin na ngah vangliatna bek tawh na ma na tun zo ding hi." 
Zechariah4:7 Thuhaksa pente nangawn in na ma hong khaktan zo lo ding hi. Biakinn na lamkik dinga, a khupna suang na cian laitakin, mite in ‘Hoih mahmah hi,’ ci-in awng ngeingai ding uh hi, hong ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah4:8 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Zechariah4:9 Amah in, “Zerubbabel in biakinn bulpi phut khin a, biakinn lam zong a zo ding hi. Tua ciangin ka mite in, amaute kiangah nang kong sawlna thu hong thei ding uh hi." 
Zechariah4:10 A maa uh a telh loh manun ka mite lungkia uh a, ahi zongin Zerubbabel in biakinn lam nasep a makaihna a muh uh ciangin a lung uh damkik ding hi,” hong ci hi. Vantungmi in, “Meivak sagihte pen, leitung khempeuh a etna Topaʼ mittang sagih ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah4:11 Tua ciangin kei zong ama kiangah, “Meivak khuam pang tuak a om oliv kung nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?" 
Zechariah4:12 Oliv thau a luan khiatna kham tuizawl nihteʼ gei-a om oliv hiang nihte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. 
Zechariah4:13 Amah in, “Thei lo na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Sia aw, thei kei ing,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah4:14 Tua ciangin amah in, “Leitung khempeuhʼ Topaʼ na a sem dingin Pasian in teelin sathau a nilh mi nihte a cihnopna ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:1 Ka khuadakkik leh huih lakah a leeng laizial khat ka mu hi. 
Zechariah5:2 Vantungmi in, “Bang na mu hiam?” ci-in hong dong a, kei zong, “Laizial a leeng khat ka mu a, a dung pi sawm thum pha-in, a vai pi sawm le pi nga pha hi,” ci-in ka dawng hi." 
Zechariah5:3 Tua ciangin amah in kei kiangah, “Leitung gam khempeuh ah a tung ding hamsiatnate, hih lai tungah kigelh hi. Guta khempeuh, gam sung panin kisiak mang ding hi, ci-in laizial dal lang khat ah kigelh a, a man lopi-in ka min tawh thuciam mi khempeuh zong kisiak khia mang ding hi, ci-in alang khat ah kigelh hi." 
Zechariah5:4 Vanglian Topa in hih samsiatna a khah khiatna ding thu gen a, guta mite khempeuh le a man loin ka min tawh thuciam mite khempeuhʼ inn sungah lut ding hi. Tua bang miteʼ inn sungah a tawntungin hamsiatna omin, amaute a kipan a sing a suang, a vekpi-in sumai ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:5 Tua ciangin vantungmi hong kilang kikin kei kiangah, “Tu-a a hong pai ding en in,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:6 Kei zong, “Bang ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi. Amah in hong dawng a, “Tua pen ciangpi hi a, gam sung khempeuhʼ mawhna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah5:7 Tua ciangpi siin pen haknaw tawh a kibawl ahi hi. Tua bangin ka et laitakin haknaw kibawl tua ciangpi siin pen kidom to a, tua ciangpi sungah numei khat a tu hi." 
Zechariah5:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in, “Hih numei pen gitlohna lim ahi hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin vantungmi in ciangpi sungah tua numei hen sukkik a, a siin tawh tua ciangpi a siinkik hi." 
Zechariah5:9 Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh numei nih ka mu a, gun vapi bangin kha nei-in, keima lamah hong leeng uh hi. Van lamah tua ciangpi a leen pih to uh hi." 
Zechariah5:10 Tua ciangin vantungmi kiangah, “Koi lai ah leen pih ding ahi uh hiam?” ci-in ka dot leh" 
Zechariah5:11 amah in, “Biakinn khat a lamsak dingin Babylon gamah a leen pih ding ahi uh hi. Biakinn a lamsak uh a zawh uh ciangin, biak dingin tua ciangpi kikoih ding hi,” ci-in a hong dawng hi." 
Zechariah6:1 Tua ciangin maang a dang khat ka mu leuleu hi. Sumngo mual nih kikal panin sakol leeng li hong paikhia ka mu hi. 
Zechariah6:2 A leeng masa pen sakol san in kai a, a nihna, sakol vom in kai a," 
Zechariah6:3 a thumna, sakol kang in kai a, a lina, sakol gial in kai hi." 
Zechariah6:4 Tua ciangin vantungmi kiangah, “Sia aw, hih sakol leengte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi." 
Zechariah6:5 Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Hihte pen huih leeng li a cihnopna hi a, leitung khempeuhteʼ Topaʼ kiang panin a hong paikhia ahi uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:6 Sakol vomte in a kaih leeng pen leilu lam Babylon ah a pai ding hi a, sakol kangte, nitumna lam, sakol gialte, leitaw lam, sakol sante, nisuahna lam gamah a pai ding ahi hi." 
Zechariah6:7 Tua sakolte, pai khia-in leitung teng a et ding uh ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih manin vantungmi in, “Pai unla, leitung teng va en un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amaute zong pai-in va en uh hi." 
Zechariah6:8 Tua ciangin vantungmi in kei hong ot san a, “Leilu lam Babylon gamah a paite in Topaʼ hehna damsak hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:9 Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi. 
Zechariah6:10 Amah in, “Babylon gam salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik Heldai, Tobijah le Jedaiah teʼ hong piak leengte la inla, tua na lak ni mahin Zefaniahʼ tapa Josiahʼ inn ah paipih in." 
Zechariah6:11 Amauteʼ hong piak ngun le khamte zangin kumpi lukhu khat bawl inla, Jehozadakʼ tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in." 
Zechariah6:11 Amauteʼ hong piak ngun le khamte zangin kumpi lukhu khat bawl inla, Jehozadakʼ tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in." 
Zechariah6:12 Ama kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih mipa pen sing bangin A Sel a kici mipa ahi hi. A omna peuhpeuh ah amah cithei dinga, Topaʼ biakinn lamkik ding hi." 
Zechariah6:13 Amah pen Topaʼ biakinn a lam ding pa hi a, kumpiteʼ ngah theih minliatna ngahin, ama mite uk ding hi. Ama kumpi tokhom gei ah siampi khat om dinga, kithutuakin, kilemin nasem khawm ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ va ci in." 
Zechariah6:14 Tua kumpi lukhu pen Heldai, Tobijah, Jedaiah le Josiah-te pahtawi-in phawk nadingin biakinn sungah om ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah6:15 Gamlapi-a a teeng mite hong pai-in Topaʼ inn lam nasep hong huh ding uh hi. Tua biakinn a kilamkik ciangin Vanglian Topa in note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian uhʼ thupiaknate cing takin na zuih nak uh leh tu-a ka gen bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi. 
Zechariah7:1 Kumpi Darias in a uk a kum lina, a kha kuana Khislev kha a ni li ni-in Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen hi." 
Zechariah7:2 Bethel khua mite in, Topaʼ tung panin thupha a ngen ding le Vanglian Topaʼ biakinn sunga a om siampite le kamsangte tungah, “A beisa kum tampi sung ka hih sa uh mah bangin biakinn siatna hangin kapkap lai-in, kha ngana sungin an na tangtang lai ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong dingin Sharezer le Regemmelek le a mite uh na sawl uh hi." 
Zechariah7:3  
Zechariah7:4 Tua ahih ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a," 
Zechariah7:5 “Gam sung mi khempeuh le siampite tungah hih bangin gen in: Amaute in a beisa kum sawm sagih sung kha ngana le kha sagihna sungin an tangin a kahna uh, kei hong pahtawina uh hi lo hi." 
Zechariah7:6 A annek a tuidawnte uh zong, amauʼ duh man bek ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusalem cithei-in a khua sungah mi tampi om a, leitaw lam gam, nitumna lam gam, a kiim a pam khuapite ah mi tampi teengin a om hun laitakin, tu-a bangmahin Topa in a kamsang masateʼ tungtawnin a gen sa thu ahi hi." 
Zechariah7:8 Topa in Zekhariah tungah thu gen a," 
Zechariah7:9 “Note in thu a tangin khenin, khatlekhat tungah itna le hehpihna kilakin," 
Zechariah7:10 note lakah a om meigong, tagah, gamdang mite, ahih kei leh mizawngte gim pia loin, khatlekhat kiliatsakna ding na ngaihsut loh nading uh thu ka hong pia zo hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah7:11 Ahi zongin amaute in mang nuam het lo uh a, hih thute ngaihsutin zong nei nuam lo uh hi." 
Zechariah7:12 Amaute in a lungsim uh suangtum bangin saksak uh a, Vanglian Topa in tanglai kamsangteʼ tungtawnin a gen thuhilhnate ngai nuam lo uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa heh mahmah hi." 
Zechariah7:13 Amaute ka hopih ciangin hong ngai nuam lo uh hi; kei zong amauteʼ hong thungetna ka ngai kei ding hi, Vanglian Topa in ci hi." 
Zechariah7:14 Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Huihpiʼ mutkhiat bangin amaute thehthang gawpin, a theih ngei nai lohna uh gam dangah amaute teeng ding uh hi. Amauʼ nusiat leitang hoih zong gamkhing suak dinga, a tungah kuamah om nawn loin daicip ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah8:1 Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin 
Zechariah8:2 amah in, “Jerusalem mite ka itluatna hangin Jerusalem khuapi ka huh nuam mahmah a, hih banga ka itluatna in a galte tungah ka heh hong suaksak hi." 
Zechariah8:3 Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem ah ciahkikin ka teeng ding hi. A citak khuapi, ci-in minthang dinga, Vanglian Topaʼ mual pen mual siangtho kici ding hi." 
Zechariah8:4 Jerusalem khuapi kongzing le lamkabomte ah a tu dingin puteekte omkik dinga, teek lua kisa-in ciangkhut khunin pai ding uh hi." 
Zechariah8:5 Kongzing khempeuh ah numei naupang kimawlin phe zaizai ding uh hi. 
Zechariah8:6 “Tu-a a om lai note adingin hih thu ahi thei lo ding tawh a kibat hangin kei adingin ahi mawh ding thu hi lo hi. 
Zechariah8:7 Nisuahna le nitumna gamte panin ka mite ka hon khia dinga," 
Zechariah8:8 Jerusalem khua sungah ka tunpihkik ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi-in, kei zong amauʼ Pasian ka hi dinga, amau tawh ka thuciamnate limtakin ka zui ding hi." 
Zechariah8:9 “Thakhauhin lungsim hang un. Ka biakinn a kilamkikna ding a bul a kiphuh laitakin kamsangte in a gen thute mah a za na hi uh hi. 
Zechariah8:10 Tua hun ma-in mi ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin na a sem dingin kuamah in cial zo lo a, galte kihtakna hangin kuamah a ututin om thei lo hi. Mi khatlekhat ka kidosak hi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ahi zongin tu-in a suakta lai hih minamte, nidang a te ka bangsak kei ding hi." 
Zechariah8:12 Lungnuam takin lokho singpua-in nuam a sa ding uh hi. Leengguite gah pha dinga, guah tampi zu-in lo ah an tampi piang dinga, a suakta lai ka minamte tungah hih bang thupha khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi." 
Zechariah8:13 A beisa hunah, Judah gam mite le Israel gam mite pen, minam dangte in kihamsiatna-in zang uh a, ‘Judah le Israel-teʼ thuak bangin thuak un,’ kici uh hi. Ahi zongin note kong hon khia dinga, tu-in midangte in, ‘Judah le Israel bangin thupha ngah un,’ ci-in thupha kipiakna-in zang ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh hangsak unla lau kei un." 
Zechariah8:14 “Na pu na pate un kei hong hehsak ciangin amaute tungah siatna tunsak ding ka ngaihsun a, ka lungsim ka khiam het kei hi." 
Zechariah8:15 Ahi zongin tu-in Jerusalem khua mite le Judah gam mite tungah thupha piak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin lunghimawh kei un. 
Zechariah8:16 Hih bangin note gamta un: Note khatlekhat tungah thuman thutak kam kipau un. Thukhenna zumah, kilemna a piangsak ding thutang zang un." 
Zechariah8:17 Khatlekhat kisiatsakna ding vaihawm kei unla, a man lopi-in teci pangin kiciam kei un. Zuauna, thuman lohna le kibawlsiatnate ka deih kei hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah8:18 Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin 
Zechariah8:19 amah in, “Kha lina, kha ngana, kha sagihna le kha sawmna sunga antannate pen, Judah gam mite adingin lungdamin kipakin pawi bawlna hun suakta ding hi. Tua ahih manin thuman le kilemna deih pha un,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah8:20 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Minam liante le khuapi liante panin Jerusalem ah mi hong pai hun hong tung ding hi. 
Zechariah8:21 Khuapi khat a om mite in khuapi dang a om mite kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa bia-in ama tung panin thupha ka ngen ding uh hi. Hong zui un,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Zechariah8:22 A vanglian a thahat minamte zong Vanglian Topa a bia ding le ama tung panin thupha a ngen dingin Jerusalem ah hong pai ding uh hi. 
Zechariah8:23 Tua hun ciangin minam tuamtuamte sung panin mi sawm, Jew mi khat kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Pasian in nang hong ompihna thu za ka hih manun na nung hong zuisak in,’ ci-in thum ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah9:1 Topaʼ thugenna: Hadrak gam miteʼ gimtuahna ding Topa in thu khen zo a, Damaskas khuapi in zong tuak ding hi. Israel minam khempeuh, Topa -aʼ ahih mah bangin leitung minam khempeuh zong Topa -aʼ mah ahi hi." 
Zechariah9:2 Hadrak tawh a kigi zawng Hamath zong, Topa -aʼ mah hi a, siamna a nei Taia khuapi le Sidon khuapite zong, ama aʼ mah ahi hi." 
Zechariah9:3 Taia khuapi in galnanna kulh bawl a, leivui zahin ngun le kham hau a, kongzing nin zahin kiciang venvan hi." 
Zechariah9:4 Ahi zongin Topa in a neih khempeuh laksakin tuipi sungah paihsak dinga, a khuapi a hal tum sak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:5 Ashkelon khuapi in hih thu mu-in lau dinga, Gaza khuapi in zong gim lawh ding hi. A lametna teng bei ding ahih manin Ekron khuapi in zong gim lawh ding hi. Gaza khuapi in a kumpipa taan dinga, Ashkelon khuapi kinusiacip ding hi." 
Zechariah9:6 Ashdod khuapi ah minam dangte zong teng dinga, a kiphasak Filistia mite ka beisak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:7 Amaute in sa, a si tawh ne nawn lo ding uh a, a kikham ante zong tang ding uh hi. A suakta sunteng, keima mite suak ding uh a, Judah mite lakah beh khat bang ding uh hi. Jebus mite mah bangin Ekron khua mite zong keima mi suak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:8 Tua ciangin ka gam sung ka hu dinga, galte ka nawksak nawn kei ding hi. Ka mihingteʼ thuakna mu khin ka hih manin migilote, ka bawlsiasak nawn kei ding hi." 
Zechariah9:9 Zion mite aw, nakpi takin lungdam un. Jerusalem mite aw, lungdamin awng un. En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai hi. Amah, gualzawhna tawh hong pai hi. Ahi zongin kiniamkhiatna tawh hong pai a, sin nai loh la no tungah hong tuang hi." 
Zechariah9:10 Gal kidona leengte Israel gam pan beisakin, sakol galkapte, Judah gam pan ka la khia dinga, galdona a kizang thalte kisusia ding hi. Na kumpipa un minam dangte lakah kilemna thu gen dinga, amah in tuipi mong khat pan tuipi mong khat dong, Eufratis Gunpi panin leimong dongin a uk ding hi." 
Zechariah9:11 Sisan tawh a kikipsak, note tawh ka thuciamna hangin na salsuahna uh keugaw gam panin note ka hong suaktasak ding hi." 
Zechariah9:12 Lametna a om no salte aw, ciahkik unla, a muanhuai mahmah na mun ngei uh zuankik un. Noteʼ thuakna sa a zah nihin thupha ka hong piak nading tu ni-in note kiangah kong gen hi." 
Zechariah9:13 Grik mite, sim nadingin Judah, thal bangin keekin, Israel thaltangin ka zang dinga, Zion mite, namsau-in ka zang ding hi." 
Zechariah9:14 Ama mite tungah Topa kilang dinga, a thaltang lotte khuaphia bang ding hi. Topa Pasian in peengkul tum dinga, leitaw lam panin a hong pai huihpi tawh a va kuan khia ding hi." 
Zechariah9:15 Vanglian Topa in ama mite hu dinga, ama mite in a galte uh susia ding hi. Galdona sungah zukham bangin awng gawp ding uh a, a galte uhʼ sisan luangsak gawp ding uh hi. Biakna site, biakna tau tungah hai a sun tawh kibangin a luangsak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:16 Tuucingpa in a tuuhonte lauhuaina panin a hotkhiat bangin, tua ni ciangin Topa, amauʼ Pasian in a mite a hon khia ding hi. Kumpi lukhu tungah a om suang manphate bangin ama gam sungah a mite taang ding uh hi." 
Zechariah9:17 Tua thu bangzah takin hoihin nuam ding ahi hiam? An lim nekna in tangvalte thahatsak dinga, zu lim nekna in nungakte thadimsak ding hi." 
Zechariah10:1 Singkung lopa a sel hunin Topa kiang pan guah ngen un. Meii kaisakin, guah zusak a, ankung khempeuh a dumsak pa, Topa ahi hi." 
Zechariah10:2 Mihingte in milim peuh thudotin nei uh a, a thu ngahte uh zuau thu le a mawkna hi lel hi. Mang khia thei-a kineite in lam lakkhial uh a, amauʼ hehnepnate a mawknapi hi lel hi. Tua ahih manin tuu bangin mite mangthang uh a, makai a neih loh manun gimna a ngah uh hi." 
Zechariah10:3 Ka mi a makaite tungah ka heh suak mahmah a, amaute gim ka pia ding hi. Judah mite pen Vanglian Topa ahi keima aʼ hi a, amaute limtakin kemin, ka sakol galkap thahatte a suak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:4 Amaute sung pan mi makaite, galkap maangte, gam ukte, hong khang khia ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:5 Kongzing buannawng lakah a galte uh a tuancil gawp galkapte bangin amaute gualzo ding uh a, Topa in a ompih manin amaute in gal a sim uh ciangin a galteʼ sakol galkapte zo gawp ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:6 Judah mite ka thahatsak dinga, Israel mite ka hon khia ding hi. Amaute ka khasiat dinga, inn ah ka ciahpih ding hi. Amaute cikmah hunin ka nial ngei loh bang keekin nuam takin a om ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa, amauʼ Pasian ka hi a, amauʼ thungetnate ka pia ding hi." 
Zechariah10:7 Israel mite, galkap hatte bang ding uh a, zukham lungnuam, bang ding uh hi. A suan a khakte un hih gualzawhna phawkin lungdam ding uh a, Topaʼ bawlna hangin kipak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:8 Amaute samin ka kaikhawm dinga, amaute hon khia-in a nidang zahin mi tampi ka phasak ding hi." 
Zechariah10:9 Minam dangte lakah amaute ka thehthang hangin a gamlapi panin kei hong phawk ding uh hi. Amaute le a tate uh suakta-in, a vekpi-un inn zuanin hong ciah khawm ding uh hi." 
Zechariah10:10 Egypt le Assiria gam panin amaute ka ciah pihkik dinga, a gam a lei uh ah ka tengsak ding hi. Gilead gam le Lebanon gamah zong ka tengsak dinga, gam khempeuh ah mi a dim ding hi." 
Zechariah10:11 Amaute in lungkhamna tuipi a phutkhak uh ciangin keimah in tuihualte ka vatmai dinga, Nail gun tui thukte kangcip ding hi. Assiria mite ka niamkhiat dinga, Egypt in a vangliatna taan ding hi." 
Zechariah10:12 Ka mite ka thahatsak dinga, amaute in kei hong bia-in ka thu hong mang ding uh hi, Topa in ci hi." 
Zechariah11:1 Lebanon aw, mei in na taamtak kungte a kat theih nadingin na kongpite hong in." 
Zechariah11:2 Taaksan kungte aw, kapin thum un. Taamtak kungte puk khin a, a minthang singkungte kisia ta hi. Bashan tawsaw kungte aw, kapin thum un; gammang tupi sing teng kiphuk mang khinta hi." 
Zechariah11:3 Tuucingte a minthanna uh bei khinta ahih manin dahin a kap uh hi. A tuulak inn uh kisusia khin ahih manin humpi-nelkaiteʼ hawkna za un. 
Zechariah11:4 Topa ka Pasian in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Gawh dingin a kikoih tuuhonte va cing in." 
Zechariah11:5 Tuu neite in a tuute go uh a, ahi zongin amaute gim kipia lo hi. Amaute in a tuu sa zuak uh a, ‘ Topa in thupha ngah tahen. Tu-in i hau ta hi,’ ci uh hi. A tuucingte mahmah in a tuute uh hehpihna nei lo uh hi." 
Zechariah11:6 Tua ahih ciangin hih gamah a teeng mite ka hehpih nawn kei ding hi. Amaute a ukpa le a kumpipaʼ khutnuai ah mi khempeuh ka koih ding hi. Gam uk mite in gam sungteng susia gawp dinga, amauʼ suksiatna panin kuamah ka hon khia kei ding hi,” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah11:7 Tuu sum meet bawlte in kei hong cial uh a, a kigo ding tuute a cing pa ka suak hi. Kei zong ciangkhut nih la-in khat pen “Hehpihna” ci-in min ka phuak a, a khat pen “Kipawlna” ci-in min ka phuak hi. Tua hi a, tuute a cingin kei ka om hi." 
Zechariah11:8 Kha khat sungin tuucing a dang thumte ka not khia hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute tungah ka lungduai zo nawn kei a, amaute in kei hong mudah uh hi." 
Zechariah11:9 Tua ciangin kei zong tuuhonte kiangah, “Note ka hong cing nawn kei ding hi. A si ding teng si unla, a kisusia ding teng siacip un. A om lai sunteng khatlekhat kisanek un,” ka ci hi." 
Zechariah11:10 Tua ciangin “Hehpihna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan a, minam khempeuh tawh ka bawl thuciamna ka phiat hi." 
Zechariah11:11 Tua ahih manin tua ni-in thuciamna kiphiat hi. Tuu sum meet bawlte in hong en giaugiau uh a, hih bang a ka gamtatna panin Topaʼ thugen ahih lam a phawk uh hi." 
Zechariah11:12 Tua ciangin kei zong amaute kiangah, “Hoih na sak uh leh ka tuucin thaman hong pia un. Hoih na sak kei uh leh lah tang lel un,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka thaman dingin ngun shekel sawm thum hong pia uh hi." 
Zechariah11:13 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Biakinn sumkoihna sungah tuate koih in,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin kei zong, kei tawh kituakin tam a sak mahmah uh tua dangka sawm thum la-in biakinn sumkoihna sungah ka koih hi." 
Zechariah11:14 Tua ciangin “Kipawlna” a kici ciangkhut la-in ka kuaitan leuleu a, Judah le Israel a kipawlna kiphiat hi." 
Zechariah11:15 Tua ciangin Topa in kei kiangah, “Khat vei tuucing nasep semkik inla, tutungin kimanna a nei lo tuucing nasep sem in." 
Zechariah11:16 Ka tuuhonte a cing dingin tuucing khat ka koih a, ahi zongin ka tuu a sia dingte huh loin, a mangthangte zong loin, a liamte bawl loin, a cidamte zong an vak lo hi. Amah in tua tuu thau penteʼ sa ne-in a khecinte nangawn hawk khiatsak zawsop hi." 
Zechariah11:17 “Kimanna a nei lo tuucingpa, a tuuhonte a nusia pa in gimna ngah tahen! Namsau in a khut ban tan henla, a taklam mit sat kham hen. A khut bei mang henla, a taklam mit tawcip hen!” hong ci hi." 
Zechariah12:1 Vanpi zalin leitung piangsak a, mihingte tungah nuntakna a pia Topa in Israel mite tawh kisai-in thu gen a," 
Zechariah12:2 “Leenggahzu bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl dinga, a kiim a om minam dangte in a nek ciangin khamin a hoi ding uh hi. Jerusalem khuapi a umcih uh ciangin Judah gam khuapi dangte zong umcih ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:3 Tua hun hong tun ciangin suangtumpi gik mahmah bangin Jerusalem khuapi ka bawl dinga, likkhiat a sawm minam khat peuhpeuh in liamlawh ding hi. Leitung minamdang khempeuh kipawlin Jerusalem a sim ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:4 Tua ni ciangin a sakolte uh ka lausak dinga, a sakol tung tuangte uh ka haisak ding hi. Ahi zongin Judah mite ka kem dinga, a galte uhʼ sakolte, a mit ka tawsak ding hi." 
Zechariah12:5 Tua ciangin Judah minamte in, ‘Jerusalem-a a teeng mite, Vanglian Topa ahi amauʼ Pasianʼ hangin thahat uh hi,’ ci ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:6 “Tua ni ciangin Judah minamte, tulak kaang le buhphual kaang ka bangsak dinga, a kiim a om minam dangte khempeuh a susia ding uh hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem mite, a khuapi sungah lungmuangin a om hithiat ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:7 “Tua ciangin Judah galkapte tungah gualzawhna ka pia masa dinga, Davidʼ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khua miteʼ minthanna pen Judah midangteʼ minthanna sangin lian zaw tuan lo ding hi." 
Zechariah12:8 Tua ni ciangin Topa in Jerusalem-a a teeng mite hu dinga, a gina lo pente nangawn David zahin thahat ding hi. Davidʼ suanlekhakte in Topaʼ vantungmi le Pasian mahmah bangin amaute a makai ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:9 Jerusalem sim ding a hanciam minam khempeuh tua ni ciangin ka susia ding hi. 
Zechariah12:10 “Davidʼ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khua miteʼ tungah hehpihna lungsim le thungetna lungsim ka guan ding hi. Amaute in a sut lup uh mipa enin, ta khat neihsun a sihsuah mite bangin kap ding uh a, tacil a khuaisuahte bangin nakpi takin kapin thum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:11 Tua hun laitakin Jerusalem khua sungah kapin thumna pen Megiddo zanglei-a Hadad-rimmon pasianʼ sihna hangin kahna le thumna zah mahin nasia ding hi. 
Zechariah12:12 Gam sung khempeuh ah a inn kuankuanin dahin kap ding uh hi. Davidʼ suanlekhakte sung panin a inn kuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi. Nathanʼ suanlekhakte zong a inn kuankuanin kapin, a zite uh zong a tuam mahin kap ding uh hi." 
Zechariah12:13 Leviʼ suanlekhakte le a zite, Shimeiʼ suanlekhakte le a zite," 
Zechariah12:14 le beh dang khempeuhte zong a behbehin, a zite uh tawh a tuam ciatin kapin a thum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:1 “Tua ni hong tun ciangin Davidʼ suanlekhakte le Jerusalem khua miteʼ mawhna le nitna teng khempeuh a silsiang dingin tuinak khat hong phul ding hi. 
Zechariah13:2 Tua ni ciangin gam sung panin milim khempeuh ka phiatsiang dinga, kuamah in a milim min nangawn uh phawk kha nawn lo ding uh hi. Kamsang zuautheite zong phiatin, milim biaknopna lungsim ka beisak ding hi." 
Zechariah13:3 Mi khatpeuh kamsang a kineih lai teitei leh, a pianna a nu le a pa mahmah in kho ding uh a, ‘ Topaʼ min paulamin zuau thu gen na hih manin na si ding hi,’ ci ding uh hi. Tua bangin thu a gen teitei le, a nu le a pa mahmah in tem tawh sunlum ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:4 Tua ni hong tun ciangin kamsangte in a maangmuh theihna uh kisialh pih ngam nawn loin, kamsangte bangin zong puan silh ngam nawn loin, kamsang zong kineih ngam nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:5 Kamsang ka hi kei hi; lokho mi ka hi a, ka khantawnin lokho-in a om ka hi hi, ci zawsop ding uh hi." 
Zechariah13:6 Mi khatpeuh in, ‘Na awm a na liammate bang ahi hiam?’ ci-in a dot ciangin, ‘Ka lawmteʼ inn khat ah zukham sulin kitotna a a liam ka hi hi,’ ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Zechariah13:7 “Namsau aw, ka tuucingpa a su dingin kipan inla, kei tawh nasem khawm pa langpang in. Tuucingpa sat in. Tuute kithehthang dinga, ka tuute gim ka pia ding hi." 
Zechariah13:8 Leitung khempeuh ah, seh thum suah sehnih si dinga, seh khat bek suakta lai ding hi." 
Zechariah13:9 Tua a suakta seh khatte pen meikhuk ah ngun a kisiansak bangin, meikhuk ah kham a kize-et bangin, meikhuk ah ze-etin ka siangsak ding hi. Amaute in kei tungah thu hong ngenin, kei zong amauʼ thungetna ka pia ding hi. Keima mi ahihna uh amaute tungah ka gen dinga, amaute in kei pen amauʼ Pasian ka hihna thu a kam uh tawh pulak ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Zechariah14:1 Topa in na hong sep hun hong tung ding hi. Jerusalem khuapi kiluh gawpin, noteʼ muh mahmah in a na lakte uh hawm ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:2 Jerusalem khuapi a sim dingin Topa in minam khempeuh kaikhawm ding hi. A khuapi kila-in, a innte kiluh gawpin, a numeite zong kibuan gawp ding hi. Mi alang bang salin kipaikhiat pih dinga, a dangte ahihleh kipaikhiat pih lo ding hi." 
Zechariah14:3 Tua ciangin Topa hong kuan khia dinga, a beisa hunah a sim ngei bangin hih minam dangte hong sim ding hi." 
Zechariah14:4 Tua ciangin Jerusalem nisuahna lamah a om Oliv Mual tungah Topa a ding ding hi. Tua ciangin nisuahna lam pan nitumna lamah Oliv Mual kitamin phel nih suak dinga, a kikalah kuampi om ding hi. A mual kim khat leilu lamah kikhiinin, kim khat leitaw lamah kikhiin ding hi." 
Zechariah14:5 Hinnom kuam sung kivukcip dinga, Judah kumpi Uzzahʼ hun lai-in zinlinna a, a kivukcip mah bang ding hi. Tua ciangin Topa ka Pasian hong pai dinga, a mi siangthote khempeuh hong tonpih ding hi." 
Zechariah14:6 Tua ni hong tun ciangin khua dam, vuk kiat cihte om nawn lo dinga," 
Zechariah14:7 khuamial hun cih zong om lo ding hi. Zan hun nangawnin sun khuavak bek om ding hi. Hih thu a pian ding hun, Topa bek in a thei hi." 
Zechariah14:8 Tua ni hong tun ciangin Jerusalem khua panin tuicim hong luang khia dinga, kim khat, nisuahna lamah a om Si Tuipi ah luang dinga, kim khat, nitumna lamah a om Mediterranean Tuipi ah luang ding hi. Tua tui in kan hun cih nei loin luang tawntung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:9 Tua ciangin Topa pen leitung khempeuhʼ kumpi suak dinga, mi khempeuh in amah bek thei-in bia ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:10 Leilu lam Geba khua panin leitaw lam Rimmon khua dong, leitung khempeuh, zanglei suak ding hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem khuapi pen bangmah ci loin a sangpi-in om dinga, Benjamin Kongpi pan a kipan nidang a kongpi a omnasa Kiu Kongpi dong le Hananel Tausang panin kumpipaʼ leenggah cilna phual ciang dong a ban ding hi." 
Zechariah14:11 Tua khuapi sungah lungmuang takin mi teeng ding uh a, lauhuaina tuak kha nawn lo ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:12 Tua ciangin Jerusalem khuapi a sim minam dang khempeuhte tungah Topa in gimna lianpi tungsak ding hi. A khe-un a ding thei kimlai mahin a sa uh muat mang dinga, a mitkua sung uh ah a mittangte uh muatin, a kam sung uh ah a leiite uh muat ding hi." 
Zechariah14:13 Tua ni ciangin Topa in amaute amkhamsak gawp dinga, mite in a gei-a a mat khak mite manin khatlekhat kilaii thang gawp ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:14 Judah mite in Jerusalem khuapi hutna-in galte do ding uh a, minam dang khempeuhteʼ neihsa kham, ngun le puante tampi tak a laksak ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:15 Galteʼ phual a om sakolte, la-sakolte, kalaohte, late le ganhing om khempeuh tungah gimna lianpi a tung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:16 Tua bangin galte a kizawh gawp khit ciangin, galte sung panin a nungta lai mite in Vanglian Topa, kumpi ahihna hangin a bia ding le ama gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin kum simin Jerusalem ah pai tawntung ding uh hi." 
Zechariah14:17 Minam khat peuhpeuh, Vanglian Topa ahi kumpipa a bia dingin Jerusalem ah a painop kei leh amauʼ gam sungah guah zu lo ding hi." 
Zechariah14:18 Tua gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin Egypt mite a painop kei leh, tua bangin a pai nuam lo minamteʼ thuak ding gimnate mah, amauʼ tungah a tung ding hi." 
Zechariah14:19 Gualzawhna pawi a bawl dingin a pai nuam lo Egypt mite le minam dang khempeuhte tungah a tung ding gimna pen tu-a bang ahi hi. 
Zechariah14:20 Tua ni ciangin sakol khilongte khempeuh tungah, “ Topa -aʼ dingin A Kipia,” ci-in ciaptehna kibawl ding hi. Biakinn sunga a om beelte khempeuh pen biakna tau mai ah a kikoih kuangte mah bangin a siangtho-in kinei ding hi." 
Zechariah14:21 Jerusalem khua sung le Judah gam sungah a om beelte khempeuh, Vanglian Topa biakna-in zat dingin a tuamin kikoih ding hi. Biakna a pia dingin a hong pai mi khempeuh in tua beelte zangin, biakna sa huanna-in a nei ding uh hi. Tua ni hong tun ciangin Vanglian Topaʼ biakinn ah sum zuak van zuak cihte om nawn lo ding hi." 
Malachi1:1 Topa in Malakhi tungtawnin Israel-te tungah thu gen hi. 
Malachi1:2 Topa in, “Note kong it hi,” ci hi. Ahi zongin note in, “Kote hong bangci it na hi hiam?” na ci uh hi. Topa in hong dawng a, “Esau le Jakob unau hi a, ahi zongin Jakob le a suan a khakte itin," 
Malachi1:3 Esau le a suan a khakte ka mudah hi. Esauʼ neih mual tung gamte ka susia a, gamsate tungah ka pia hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi1:4 Esauʼ suanlekhak Edom mite in, “I khuapite a kisiat khit hangin i lamkik ding hi,” ci le-uh, Topa in, “A ut uh leh lam uh hen; ahi zongin ka susiakik veve ding hi. Midangte in, ‘Gam gilo, Topaʼ heh tawntungna minamte,’ ci-in ko ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng ding hi." 
Malachi1:5 Noteʼ mit mahmah tawh hih thupiang na mu ding uh a, “Israel gam pualam nangawn ah Topa in vangliatna nei hi,” na ci ding uh hi." 
Malachi1:6 Vanglian Topa in siampite tungah hih bangin hong ci hi: “Tapa in a pa zahtak a, nasem pa in a topa kihta hi. Kei pen na pa uh hi napi, bang hangin hong zahtak lo a, na topa uh hi napi, bang hangin hong kihta lo na hi uh hiam? No siampite in kei hong simmawh napi-in, ‘Bang hong ci simmawh ka hi uh hiam?’ na cilai uh hi." 
Malachi1:7 Note in ka biakna tau tungah keimah biakna-in an gina lopite hong pia hi napi-in, ‘Kong zahtak bawl lohna uh bang om ahi hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Ka biakna tau simmawh bawl na hih manun hong zahtak bawl lo na hi uh hi." 
Malachi1:8 Ganhing a mit tawpite tawh kei nong biak uh ciangin, a hoihmah in kingaihsun na hi uh hiam? A khebai, a cina ganhingte tawh nong biak uh ciangin, a hoih mah kisa na hi uh hiam? Tua bang ganhing khat peuhpeuh, note hong ukpa kiangah va puak dih un. Note tungah nuamin hong pakta ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi." 
Malachi1:9 Tua ahih ciangin no siampite aw, Pasian in eite hong hehpih theih nadingin ama kiangah thum un. Na hih ngeisa bangun na nget uh hangin na ngetnate uh hong pia lo ding hi; tua pen nomauʼ khialhna ahi hi." 
Malachi1:10 Vanglian Topa in, “Ka biakna tau tungah, bangmah-a kimang lo mei na tawh mawkmawk theih loh nadingun, note khatpeuh in biakinn kongkhakte khak le-uhcin ka ut hi. Note tungah ka lungkim kei a, nong piak uh biakpiaknate kong sang kei ding hi." 
Malachi1:11 Leitung khempeuh ah a om minam khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh a, kei adingin mun khempeuh ah paknamtui halin, a kisang thei ding biakpiakna hong pia uh hi. Mi khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh hi." 
Malachi1:12 Ahi zongin note in keima biakna tau bangmah a man nei loin genin, tua biakna tau tunga na piak uh ante na thupi ngaihsut loh uh ciangin, keimah a hong simmawh na hi uh hi." 
Malachi1:13 Note in, ‘Hihte cimtak khin hang,’ ci-in nong nap nitsan lel uh hi. Keimah biak nadingin a kigu ganhing khatpeuh ahi a, a liam a bai, ahih kei leh a cina peuh nong paipih uh hi. Tua bangte, a sang dingin hong ngaihsun na hi uh hiam?" 
Malachi1:14 A tuu hon lakah tuutal cidam nei napi-in, a kamciam sa bangin kei tungah hong piak ciangin, a sitbaang ganhing a hong pia mi khempeuh in samsiatna thuak tahen. Bang hang hiam cih leh kei pen a lian mahmah Kumpipa ka hi a, minam khempeuh in kei hong zahtak uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi2:1 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Siampite aw, note adingin hih lai ah thupiakna khat om hi." 
Malachi2:2 Na gamtatna uh tawh kei nong zahtak ding uh hi. Ka thugente ngai loin, thupi takin na lak kei uh leh note tungah samsiatna ka hong tungsak dinga, siampi hihna tawh na ngah uh thuphate tungah samsiatna ka tungsak ding hi. A taktakin ci lehang, note in ka thupiaknate thupi lak lo na hih manun na thupha ngahte uh tungah samsiatna ka tungsak zo hi." 
Malachi2:3 Na suanlekhakte uh nakpi takin ka thuhilh dinga, note na hih uh leh, na biakpiakna ganhing uh a ekte tawh na maitang uh hong zut gawpin tuate tawh kong lawn khia khawm ding hi." 
Malachi2:4 Tua ciangin Leviʼ suanlekhakte ahi siampite tawh ka thuciamna a kip nawn lo ahihna thu, hih thu kong genna ah na thei ding uh hi." 
Malachi2:5 “Amaute a nuntakna ding le a nopsakna ding thu ka ciam a, amaute in kei hong zahtak theih nadingun hih ka thuciamte khempeuh ka pia hi. Amaute in kei hong zahtakin hong kihta takpi uh hi." 
Malachi2:6 Amaute in thuman taktakte mah hilhin gen uh a, amauteʼ kam panin zuau thu ging khia lo hi. Ka deihna bangin amaute gamta uh a, a khial ding mi tampite, thuman lamah a paisak uh hi." 
Malachi2:7 Siampiteʼ nasep pen Pasian a manin theih nading a hilh ding uh ahi hi. Amaute pen, Vanglian Topaʼ kamtaite ahih manun, mite in keima deihna a theih nadingun amauteʼ tungah thu a dot ding uh ahi hi." 
Malachi2:8 “Ahi zongin, no siampite na hih uh leh lampi man panin na pial khin uh hi. Na thuhilhnate un mi tampi tak khialsak hi. Note tawh ka bawl thuciamna na palsat khin uh hi." 
Malachi2:9 Tua ahih manin, note in ka thuhilhna zui loin, keima thu na hilh uh ciangin zong a kibangin hilh loin mi na deidan mah uh bangin, kei zong mi khempeuh mai ah simmawhna le niamkhiatna kong ngahsak ding hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi2:10 Eite khempeuh in, eite a hong piangsak Pasian ahi Pa khat bek nei hi lo ihi hiam? Tua hi napi-in bang hangin eite khatlekhat tungah citak loin, Pasian in i pu i pate tawh a bawl thuciamna palsat ihi hiam?" 
Malachi2:11 Judah mite citak loin, Pasian tungah a thuciamna uh palsat uh a, Israel miteʼ lak le Jerusalem khua sungah siatna tampi gamta uh hi. Topa in a it mahmah biakinn ninsak uh hi. Topa ahi lo, pasian dang a bia numeite, zi-in la-in a teenpih uh hi." 
Malachi2:12 Hih bangin a gamta mi peuhmah, a kua a kua hitaleh, Topa in su gawp henla, Vanglian Topa tungah biakna a paipih ei minamte tawh hong kigawmsak nawn kei hen." 
Malachi2:13 Noteʼ gamtatna a dang khat om lai hi. Tua pen, noteʼ paipih biaknate hong sang nawn lo ahih manin Topaʼ biakna tau, khitui tawh na kawtsak uh a, kapin thumin na om uh hi." 
Malachi2:14 Bang hangin hong sang lo hiam, na ci uh hi. Na khangno lai uh a na teenpih na zite uh tungah na cihtak lohna uh amah in hong thei a, na zite uh tungah na cihtak tawntungna ding uh Pasian tungah thu ciamin, na zite uh zong na lawmnu mah uh hi napi-in amaute tawh na thuciamna uh na pelhna hang uh ahi hi." 
Malachi2:15 Pasian in na zite uh tawh pum khat, lungsim khat ahi dingin hong bawl hi lo ahi hiam? Hih bangin a hong bawlna pen bang a deihna ahi hiam? Pasianʼ mi taktak ahi ding tate i neih theih nading ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na khangno lai-un na teenpih na zi uh tawh na thuciamna uh na palsat khak loh nadingun kidawm un." 
Malachi2:16 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Zi makna ka deih kei a, mi khatpeuh in a khangno lai-a a teenpih a zi tungah tua bang gitlohna a gamtatna ka mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin hoihtakin kidawm unla, a citak dingin na zite uh tungah na thuciamna uh palsat kei un,” ci hi, a ci hi." 
Malachi2:17 Thu na gengenna uh tawh Topa na gimsak uh hi. Note in, “Bangci gimsak ka hi uh hiam?” na ci uh hi. “ Topa in a sia-in a gamtate a hoihin ngaihsun a, zong itin amaute tungah lungkim takpi hi,” na cihna khawng uh le, “Thutang a gen Pasian koi lai ah om ahi hiam?” ci-in na dotnate uh tawh na gimsak uh hi." 
Malachi3:1 Hih bangin na thugenna uh tawh kisai-in Vanglian Topa in hong dawng a, “Ka pai nading lampi a bawl khol dingin ka kamtai pa ka sawl ding hi. Tua ciangin na ngakngak uh Topa a biakinn sungah thakhat thu-in hong pai ding hi. Na muhnop uh kamtai pa hong pai-in ka thuciamna hong taangko ding hi,” ci hi." 
Malachi3:2 Ahi zongin ama hong pai ni ciangin kua in thuak zo dinga, amah hong kilaak ciangin kua nungta zo ding ahi hiam? Amah pen, sikte a siangthosak mei le puante a siangthosak satpiang tawh kibang hi." 
Malachi3:3 A ninte kaang tumsakin, ngunte a siangsak pa bangin thukhen dingin hong pai ding hi. Ngun le khamte a kisiansak bangin amah in Levi suanlekhak ahi siampite siangsak ding hi. Tua ciangin Topaʼ tungah a kilawm biakna a pia ding uh hi." 
Malachi3:4 Tua ciangin Judah mite le Jerusalem miteʼ piak biaknate pen nidang a te mah bangin Topaʼ mai ah a lungkimhuai hi ding hi. 
Malachi3:5 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Note tungah thukhen dingin ka hong pai ding hi; ai tawite, numei tawh a mawhte, a man lopi a teci pangte, numeiteʼ thaman piakna ah khemna a zangte; meigong, tagah le gamdang mite a zawhthawh bawlte le kei hong zahtak lo mi khempeuhteʼ lang khat ah thakhatin teci pangin thu ka khen ding hi." 
Malachi3:6 “Kei, Topa ka hi a, lungsim a kheel lo mi ka hi hi. No Jakob suanlekhakte aw, a sia cimit na hi nai kei uh hi." 
Malachi3:7 Na pu na pate uh mah bangin ka thukhamte panin note na pial khia uh a, ka thukhamte na zui kei uh hi. Ahi zongin keima lamah hong kiheikik un; kei zong note lamah kong kihei ding hi. Ahi zongin note in, ‘Nang lamah hong bangci kihei ding ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi." 
Malachi3:8 Keimah in note kong dotnop thu pen, mi khatpeuh in Pasianʼ na guksak ding kilawm ahi hiam? Kilawm lo hi napi-in note in nong guksak uh hi. Ahi zongin note in, ‘Bang hong guksak ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi. Sawm-ah-khat piakna le biakpiaknate ah nong guksak uh hi." 
Malachi3:9 Na minam bupun keima neihsa hong guksak na hih manun note khempeuh tungah samsiatna hong tung hi. 
Malachi3:10 Ka biakinn ah an a om theih nadingin sawm-ah-khat a kimin hong paipih un. Kei hong ze-et un; vantung kongkhakte hongin, note adingin na hoih tampi kong piakna na mu ding uh hi." 
Malachi3:11 Lo panin a piang na ante uh, kauphe ka nesak nawn kei dinga, na leenggui uh gah pha mahmah ding hi." 
Malachi3:12 Tua ciangin na gam uh, ten nadingin a hoih mahmah leitang hong suak ding ahih manin, minam dang khempeuh in note pen a nuamsa minam hong ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi3:13 Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Kei tawh kisai-in na kampaunate uh khauh mahmah hi. Note in, ‘Bang kampau ka hi uh hiam?’ na ci uh hi." 
Malachi3:14 Note in, ‘Pasianʼ na i sep a mawkna hi. Ama hong sawl bangin i sep hangin bang a kimanna om a, i gamtatna sate hangin i dahna lim, Vanglian Topaʼ mai ah i lah hangin bang phattuamna om ahi hiam?" 
Malachi3:15 I muhna bang leh, mi kiphasak teng mah in thupha ngahin nuamsa uh hi. Mi gamtat siate ahihleh cithei bek loin, a gamtat siatnate uh tawh Pasian ze-et napi-un bangmah tuak se lo uh hi,’ na ci uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi3:16 Topa a zahtak mite khatlekhat tua bangin thu kigen uh a, amauteʼ thugennate, Topa in ngai-in za hi. Topa in laibu khat nei a, amah zahtakin a thupi ngaihsut mite khempeuh tua sungah kiciamteh hi." 
Malachi3:17 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Tua a kiciamteh mite pen keima mite hi ding uh hi. Keimah in na ka sep ni ciangin amaute pen keima neihtuam taktak mite hi ding uh hi. Pa in ama thu a mang a tapa a hehpih mah bangin kei zong amaute ka hehpih ding hi. 
Malachi3:18 Tua ciangin midikte le migilote le keima na hong semte le hong sem lote a kilamdanna na mukik ding uh hi,” a ci hi." 
Malachi4:1 Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “En un, mi kiphasak khempeuh le migilo khempeuh, a zung a hiang cih om loin buhtu bangin a kattum ding hun hong tung ding hi. Tua ni ciangin khat zong suakta loin a vekpi-in kaang tum khin ding uh hi." 
Malachi4:2 Ahi zongin ka thu a hong mang note tungah dikna ni hong taang ding a, tua in nizang bangin note tungah cidamna hong tun ding hi. Bawng khumna panin a kikhah bawngnote bangin suakta-in nuam na sa ding uh hi." 
Malachi4:3 Keimah in na kong sep ni ciangin note in migilote nuaisiahin leivui bangin na tuancil ding uh hi. 
Malachi4:4 “Israel mite khempeuh in a zuih dingin Horeb Mual panin ka nasem Moses tungah ka piak ahi, Mosesʼ thukhamte, ngeinate le biakna ngeina kipte khempeuh limtakin phawk un." 
Malachi4:5 “Ahi zongin tua a lauhuai lian mahmah Topaʼ ni hong tun ma-in note kiangah kamsang Elijah kong paisak ding hi. 
Malachi4:6 Amah in pate le tate lemtuah in a kilemsakkik ding hi. Tua bang hikeileh keimah hong pai-in na gam khempeuh uh ka susia gawp ding hi,” ci hi, a ci hi."

Matthew3:3 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topaʼ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen ciangin hih Johanʼ thu a gen ahi hi." 
Matthew4:14 Tua bangin a va teenna pen kamsang pa Isaiah thugen a tun nading ahi hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew8:17 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Amah in eiteʼ natna teng thuakin, eiteʼ gimna teng pua khia hi,” ci-in a genna thu a tun nadingin hih bang a piang ahi hi." 
Matthew12:16 Pasian in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin a gen thu a tun theih nadingin, kuama kiangah ama thu a gen loh nadingun thu a pia hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew12:39 Ahi zongin Jesu in, “Tu hun a mite bangzahin giloin, Pasianʼ thu thei lo ahi uh hiam? Nalamdang ka bawl ding na hong ngen tazen uh hi. Jonah thu tawh kisai nalamdang longal a dang hong kilak lo ding hi." 
Matthew12:40 Ngasa gilpi sungah sun thum le zan thum sung Jonah a om mah bangin Mihing Tapa zong sun thum le zan thum sung mah lei sungah om ding hi. 
Matthew12:41 Jonah in amaute kiangah thu a hilh ciangin a mawhna panun kisikkik uh ahih manin thukhen ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite in note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Note kiangah kong genin ah: Tu mahmah in note kiangah Jonah sangin a lian zaw khat a om hi. 
Matthew13:14 Kamsang Isaiahʼ thugen kholhna, hih thu tawh kisai ah amau adingin tung taktak hi. Tua a genna ah, ‘Na zakzak uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi." 
Matthew13:35 Hih bangin thu gentehna a zatna pen kamsang Isaiah in, “Thu gentehna zangin thu ka gen dinga, leitung piancil a kipan a kithei lo thute ka gen ding hi,” ci-in a gen kholhsakna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
Matthew15:7 Na tungtham-un mihoih a kineihkhem mite aw, Isaiah in noteʼ thu a genna man mahmah hi. Tua a genna ah," 
Matthew16:4 Tu lai hun mite giloin, Pasian tawh kipawl lo uh hi. Lim a nget uh hangin Jonah lim sim loh a dang kilak lo ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua ahih manin amaute nusia-in a paisan hi." 
Matthew16:14 Amaute in, “Pawl khat in Tuiphumpa Johan hi, hong ci uh hi; pawl khat in Elijah hi, hong ci uh hi; pawl khat in Jeremiah ahih kei leh kamsang khat peuhpeuh hi ding hi, hong ci uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi." 
Matthew16:17 Tua ciangin Jesu in ama kiangah, “Jonahʼ tapa Simon aw, hoih mahmah hi. Hih thu, leitung pilna tawh na theih tawm hi lo a, vantungah a om ka Pa in nangma tungah hong hilh ahi hi." 
Matthew24:15 “Tua ciangin kamsang Daniel in, ‘A lipkhaphuai zehphitna,’ ci-in a gen pen a siangtho munah hong om ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuʼ cihnopna thei ta un)," 
Matthew27:9 Tua ahih manin kamsang Jeremiah in, “Israel mite pawl khat in ama man dingin a seh tua ngun peek sawm thum la uh a," 
Mark1:2 Kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho sungah, “Nangma mai ah ka kamtai pa ka sawl a, amah in na pai nading lampi a bawl khol ding hi." 
Mark7:6 Jesu in amaute dawng a, “A tungtham a hoihin a kilang khem noteʼ thu, Isaiah in a gen kholhna man mahmah hi. Ama genna ah, ‘Pasian in hih bangin gen hi: Hih mite in a kampi bek uh tawh kei hong zahtak bawl uh a, a lungsim taktak uh kei tawh kigamla hi." 
Luke3:3 Tua ahih ciangin Jordan Gun kiim gam khempeuh ah Johan pai kawikawi a, kamsang Isaiah in Lai Siangtho sungah a gelh mah bangin, “Na mawhna panun kisik unla tui kiphum un. Tua hileh Pasian in na mawhnate uh hong maisak ding hi,” ci-in thu a hilh hi." 
Luke3:4 Isaiah in hih bangin na gelh hi: “Gam sungah mi khat kiko a, ‘Topaʼ pai nading lampi bawl unla, a tot ding lampi tangsak un." 
Luke3:25 Josefʼ pa Mattathias, Mattathiasʼ pa Amos, Amosʼ pa Nahum, Nahumʼ pa Esli, Esliʼ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:25 Josefʼ pa Mattathias, Mattathiasʼ pa Amos, Amosʼ pa Nahum, Nahumʼ pa Esli, Esliʼ pa Naggai," 
Luke3:29 Erʼ pa Joshua, Joshuaʼ pa Eliezer, Eliezerʼ pa Jorim, Jorimʼ pa Matthat, Matthatʼ pa Levi," 
Luke4:17 a nget bangin a sim dingin kamsang Isaiah Lai Siangtho bu a kipia hi. A laibu lemin a sim nopna mun a zon ciangin a nuai-a bangin a kigelhna mun mu-in a sim hi. Tua munah," 
Luke11:29 Mihonte in Jesu hong neh semsem uh a, Jesu in zong a thugen zomlai-in, “Tu hun mite gilo mahmah uh hi. Amaute in lim lamdang ngen uh a, ahi zongin Jonah lim sim loh a dang kipia lo ding hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite adingin kamsang Jonah pen lim khat ahih mah bangin tu hun mite adingin Mihing Tapa zong, lim ahi ding hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhen Ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite hong dingin note mawhsakna thu hong gen ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Jonahʼ thuhilhna a zak uh ciangin a mawhnate uh kisik uh a, ahi zongin Jonah sangin a lian zaw khat hih lai ah a om hi,” a ci hi." 
John1:23 Johan in, “Kamsang Isaiah in a na gen mah bangin, ‘Topaʼ tot ding lampi na tangsak un,’ ci-in gam sungah a kiko pa ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi." 
John12:38 Kamsang Isaiah in, “Topa aw, kua in ka thugente um a, Topaʼ vangliatna kua tungah kilak ahi hiam?” ci-in a genna thu a tun nading ahi hi." 
John12:39 Tua ahih manin amaute in um nuam lo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Isaiah mah in," 
John12:41 Isaiah in Jesuʼ neih Pasianʼ pianzia mu ahih manin hih bangin thu a gen ahi hi. 
Acts2:16 Hih thupiang pen kamsang Joel in a gen sa thu hi a, tua sungah," 
Acts8:28 inn zuan dingin leeng sungah a tuan kawmin kamsang Isaiah laibu a sim hi. 
Acts8:30 Filip zong ama kiangah va tai a, kamsang Isaiah laibu a simna za ahih manin, “Na laisim a khiatna na thei hiam?” ci-in a dong hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ciangin Paul in, “Kha Siangtho in kamsang Isaiah tungtawnin na pu na pate uh tungah a thugen man mahmah hi. Tua a genna ah, ‘Pai inla, hih mite tungah hih bangin va gen in: Thu na ngaihngaih uh hangin na tel kei ding uh a, na etet uh hangin na mu kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite lungsim mawk a, a bil uh humcip uh a, mit sicip uh hi. Tua bang hi kei le-uh, a mit un khua mu dinga, a bil un khua za dinga, a lungsim un thu mu thei ding hi. Tua bang hileh kei lamah hong kihei ding uh a, keimah in amaute ka damsak ding hi,’ ci-in a gen hi,” a cih khit ciangin amaute khatlekhat kithutuak loin a paikhia uh hi." 
Romans9:25 Hosea Lai Siangtho sungah, “Keima mi ahi lote, ‘Keima mi,’ ka ci dinga, ka it loh mite, ‘Ka itte,’ ka ci ding hi." 
Romans9:27 Isaiah in Israel miteʼ thu a genna ah, “Israel mite, tuipi gei-a sehnel zahin a tam hangin mi tawmno khat bek suakta ding uh hi." 
Romans9:29 Hih thu pen Isaiah mah in, “Vanglian Topa in eiteʼ suanlekhak ding hong siitsak lo hileh Sodom khua le Gomorrah khua mite i bang ding hi,” ci-in a gen kholh sa thu ahi hi." 
Romans10:16 Ahi zongin Isaiah in, “Topa aw, ka thugente uh kua in um ahi hiam?” a cih mah bangin Lungdamna Thu a za mi khempeuh in um kim lo uh hi." 
Romans10:20 Tua banah Isaiah in Pasianʼ min tawh hang takin thu na gen a, “Kei hong zong lo mite in kei hong mu uh a, kei hong kan lo mite tungah ka kilak hi,” ci-in na gen hi." 
Romans15:12 tua ciangin Isaiah in, “Jessiʼ suante khat hong khang dinga, Gentail mite a uk dingin mi lian hong suak dinga, ama hangin Gentail mite in lamet lungmuanna nei ding uh hi,” cihnate a kigelh hi." 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pasianʼ tawlngakna munah mite tunpih khin hileh Pasian in a nidang khat thu nung gen nawn lo ding hi. 
James5:11 Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi, i ci hi. Job in a thuakna ah a lungduaina na thei uh a, Topa in dikna le hehpihna nei ahih manin a tawpna ah Job tungah a piak thuphate na thei uh hi."
